śrī bhaviṣyamahāpurāṇam

| | śrī gaṇeśāya namaḥ | |
.a namo bhagavate vāsudevāya
bāhmaparva
atha prathamo.adhyāyaḥ
nārāyaṇaṃ namaskṛtya naraṃ caiva narottamam |
devīṃ sarasvatīṃ caiva tato jayamudīrayet | | 1
jayati parāśarasūnuḥ satyavatīhṛdayanandano vyāsaḥ |
yasyāsyakamalagalitaṃ vāṅmayamamṛtaṃ jagatpibati | | 2
mūkaṅkaroti vācālaṃ paṅgu laṅghayate girim |
yatkṛpā tamahaṃ vande paramānandamādhavam | | 3
pārāśaryavacaḥ sarojamamalaṃ gītārthagandhotkaṭaṃ,
nānākhyānakakesaraṃ harikathāsambodhanābodhitam |
loke sajjanaṣaṭpadairaharahaḥ pepīyamānaṃ mudā,
bhūyādbhāratapaṅkajaṃ kalimalapradhvaṃsi naḥ śreyase | | 4
yo gośataṃ kanakaśṛṅgamayaṃ dadāti,
viprāya vedaviduṣe ca bahuśrutāya |
puṇyāṃ bhaviṣyasukathāṃ śṛṇuyātsamagrāṃ,
puṇyaṃ samaṃ bhavati tasya ca tasya caiva | | 5
kṛtvā purāṇāni parāśarātmajaḥ sarvāṇyanekāni sukhāvahāni |
tatrātmasaukhyāya bhaviṣyadharmān kalau yuge bhāvi lilekha sarvam | | 6
tatrāpi sarvarṣivarapramukhyaiḥ parāśarādyairmunibhiḥ praṇītān |
smṛtyuktadharmāgamasaṃhitārthān vyāsaḥ samāsādavadadbhaviṣyam | | 7
alpāyuṣo lokajanānsamīkṣya vidyāvihīnānpaśuvatsuceṣṭān |
teṣāṃ sukhārthaṃ pratibodhanāya vyāsaḥ purāṇaṃ prathitaṃ cakāra | | 8
jayati bhuvanadīpo bhāskaro lokakarttā,
jayati ca śitidehaḥ śārṅgaḥdhanvā murāriḥ | |
jayati ca śaśimaulī rudranāmābhidheyo,
jayati ca sa tu devo bhānumāṃścitrabhānuḥ | | 1
śriyāvṛtaṃ tu rājānaṃ śatānīkaṃ mahābalam |
abhijagmurmahātmānaḥ sarve draṣṭuṃ maharṣayaḥ | | 2
bhṛguratrirvasiṣṭhaśca pulastyaḥ pulahaḥ kratuḥ |
parāśarastathā vyāsaḥ sumanturjaiministathā | | 3
muniḥ pailo yājñavalkyo gautamastu mahātapāḥ |
bhāradvājo munirdhīmāṃstathā nāradaparvatau | | 4
vaiśampāyano mahātmā śaunakaśca mahātapāḥ |
dakṣo.aṅgirāstathā gargo gālavaśca mahātapāḥ | | 5
tānāgatānṛṣīndṛṣṭvā śatānīko mahīpatiḥ |
vidhivatpūjayāmāsa abhigamya mahāmatiḥ | | 6
purohitaṃ puraskṛtya ardhyaṃ gāṃ svāgatena ca |
pūjayitvā tataḥ sarvānpraṇamya śirasā bhṛśam | | 7
sukhāsīnāṃstato rājā nirātaṅkān gataklamān |
uvāca praṇato bhūtvā bāhumuddhṛtya dakṣiṇam | | 8
idānīṃ saphalaṃ janma manye.ahaṃ bhuvi sattamāḥ |
ātmano dvijaśārdūlā! tathā kīrtiryaśo balam | | 9
dhanyo.ahaṃ puṇyakarmā ca yato māṃ draṣṭumāgatāḥ |
yeṣāṃ smaraṇamātreṇa yuṣmākaṃ pūyate naraḥ | | 1.1.10
śrotumicchāmyahaṃ kiñciddharmaśāstramanuttamam |
ānṛśaṃsyaṃ samāśritya kathayadhvam mahābalāḥ! | | 11
yenāhaṃ dharmaśāstraṃ tu śrutvā gacche parāṃ gatim |
yathāgato mama pitā śrutvā vai bhārataṃ purā | | 12
tathoktāstena rājñā vai brāhmaṇāste samantataḥ |
samāgamya mithaste tu vimṛśya ca 1 bhṛśam tadā | | 13
pūjayitvā tato vyāsamidaṃ vacanamabruvan |
vyāsaṃ prasādaya vibho! eṣa te kathayiṣyati | | 14
tiṣṭhatyasminmahābāho! vayaṃ vaktuṃ na śaknumaḥ |
tiṣṭhamāne gurau śiṣyaḥ kathaṃ vakti mahāmate! | | 15
ayaṃ guruḥ sadāsmākaṃ sākṣānnārāyaṇastathā |
kṛpāluśca tathā cāyaṃ tathā divyavidhānavit | | 16
caturṇāmapi varṇānāṃ pāvanāya mahātmanām |
dharmaśāstramanenoktaṃ dharmādyaiḥ susamanvitam | | 17
bibheti gahanācchāstrālloko vyādhirivauṣadhāt |
bhāratasya ca vistāro muninā vyāhṛtaḥ svayam | | 18
yathā svādu ca pathyaṃ ca dadyāstvaṃ bhiṣagauṣadham |
tathā ramyaṃ ca śāstraṃ ca bhārataṃ kṛtavānmuniḥ | | 19 āstikyārohasopānametadbhāratamucyate |
tacchrutvā svarganarakau lokaḥ sākṣādavekṣate | | 1.1.20
devatātīrthatapasāṃ bhāratādeva niścayaḥ |
na janyate nāstikatā tasya mīmāṃsakairapi | | 21
viṣṇau 1 deveṣu vedeṣu guruṣu brāhmaṇeṣu ca |
bhaktirbhavati kalyāṇī bhāratādeva dhīmatām | | 22
dharmārthakāmamokṣāṇāṃ bharatātsiddhireva hi |
ajihmo bhārataḥ panthā nirvāṇapadagāminām | | 23
mokṣadharmārthakāmānāṃ prapañco bhārate kṛtaḥ |
anityatāpasantaptā bhavanti tasya muktaye | | 24
vipattiṃ bhāratācchrutvā vṛṣṇipāṇḍavasampadām |
duḥkhāvasānādrājendra! puṇyaṃ ca saṃśrayedbudhaḥ | | 25
evaṃvidhaṃ bhārataṃ vai proktaṃ yena mahātmanā |
so.ayaṃ nārāyaṇaḥ sākṣāt vyāsarūpī mahāmuniḥ | | 26
sa teṣāṃ vacanaṃ śrutvā pratāpī yo mahīpatiḥ |
prasādayāmāsa muniṃ vyāsaṃ śāstraviśāradam | | 27
śatānīka uvāca
añjaliḥ śirasā brahman! kṛto.ayaṃ pādayostava |
brūhi me dharmaśāstraṃ 5 tu yenā pūtatāṃ vraje | | 28
samuddhara bhavādasmātkīrtayitvā kathāṃ śubhām |
yathā mama pitā pūrvaṃ kīrtayitvā tu bhāratam | | 29
vyāsa uvāca
tasyaitadvacanaṃ śrutvā vyāso vacanamabravīt |
eṣa śiṣyaḥ sumanturme kathayiṣyati te prabho! | | 1.1.30
yadicchasi mahābāho! prītidaṃ cādbhutaṃ śubham |
śravyaṃ bharataśārdūla! sarvapāpabhayāpaham | | 31
yathā vaiśampāyanena purā proktaṃ pitustava |
mahābhāratavyākhyānaṃ brahmahatyāvyapohanam | | 32
atha tamṛṣayaḥ sarve rājānamidamabruvan |
sādhu proktaṃ mahābāho! vyāsenāmitabuddhinā | | 33
sumantuṃ pṛccha rājarṣe! sarvaśāstraviśāradam |
asmākamapi rājendra! śravaṇe jāyate matiḥ |
atha vyāso mahātejāḥ sumantumṛṣimabravīt | | 34
kathayāsmai kathāstāta! yāḥ śrutvā modate nṛpaḥ |
bhāratādikathānāṃ tu yatrāsya ramate manaḥ | | 35
asāvapi mahātejāḥ śrutvā bhāvaṃ mahāmateḥ |
vyāsasya dvijaśārdūla! ṛṣīṇāṃ cāpi sarvaśaḥ | | 36
cakāra vaktuṃ sa manastasmai rājñe mahāmatiḥ |
vyāsasya śāsanādvipra! ṛṣīṇāṃ caiva sarvaśaḥ | | 37
atha rājā mahātejā ājamīḍho dvijottamam |
praṇamya śirasātyarthaṃ pravaktumupacakrame | | 38
śatānīka uvāca
puṇyākhyānaṃ mama brahman! pāvanāya prakīrtaya |
śrutvā yadbrāhmaṇaśreṣṭha! mucye.ahaṃ sarvapātakāt | | 39
sumanturuvāca
nānāvidhāni śāstrāṇi santi puṣpāni bhārata |
yāni śrutvā naro rājan! mucyate sarvakilbiṣaiḥ | | 1.1.40
kimicchasi mahābāho! śrotuṃ yattvāṃ bravīmi vai |
bhāratādikathānāṃ tu yāsu dharmādayaḥ sthitāḥ | | 41
śatānīka uvāca
matāni kāni viprendra 1! dharmaśāstrāṇi suvrata! |
yāni śrutvā naro vipra! mucyate sarvakilbiṣaiḥ | | 42
sumanturuvāca
śrūyantāṃ dharmaśāstrāṇi manurviṣṇuryamo.aṅgirāḥ |
vasiṣṭhadakṣasaṃvartaśātātapaparāśarāḥ | | 43
āpastambo.atha uśanā kātyāyanabṛhaspatī |
gautamaḥśaṅkhalikhitau hārīto.atrirathāpi vā | | 44
etāni dharmaśāstrāṇi śrutvā jñātvā ca bhārata! |
vṛndārakapuraṃ gatvā modate nātra saṃśayaḥ | | 45
śatānīka uvāca
yānyetāni tvayoktāni dharmaśāstrāṇi suvrata! |
necchāmi śrotuṃ viprendra! 3 śrutānyetāni hi dvija! | | 46
trayāṇāmapi varṇānāṃ proktānāmapi paṇḍitaiḥ |
śreyase na tu śūdrāṇāṃ tatra me vacanaṃ śṛṇu | | 47
caturṇāmiha varṇānāṃ śreyase yāni suvrata! |
bhavanti dvijaśārdūla! śrutāni bhuvanatraye | | 48
viśeṣataścaturthasya varṇasya dvijasattama! | | 49
brāhmaṇādiṣu varṇeṣu triṣu vedāḥ prakalpitāḥ |
manvādīni ca śāstrāṇi tathāṅgāni samantataḥ | | 1.1.50
śūdrāścaiva bhṛśaṃ dīnāḥ pratibhānti dvijaprabho |
dharmārthakāmamokṣasya śastāḥ syuravane katham | | 51
āgamena vihīnā hi aho kaṣṭaṃ mataṃ mam |
kaścaiṣāmāgamaḥ proktaḥ purā dvijamanīṣibhiḥ | |
trivargaprāptaye brahmañchreyase ca tathobhayoḥ | | 52
sumanturuvāca
sādhu sādhu mahābāho! śṛṇu me paramaṃ vacaḥ |
caturṇāmapi varṇānāṃ yāni proktāni śreyase | | 53
dharmaśāstrāṇi 1 rājendra! śṛṇu tāni nṛpottama |
viśeṣataśca śūdrāṇāṃ pāvanāni manīṣibhiḥ | | 54
aṣṭādaśapurāṇāni caritaṃ rāghavasya ca |
rāmasya kuruśārdūla! dharmakāmārthasiddhaye | | 55
tathoktaṃ bhārataṃ vīra! pārāśaryeṇa dhīmatā |
vedārthasakalaṃ yojya dharmaśāstrāṇi ca prabho! | | 56
kṛpālunā kṛtaṃ śāstraṃ caturṇāmiha śreyase |
varṇānāṃ bhavamagnānāṃ kṛtaṃ poto hyanuttamam | | 57
aṣṭādaśapurāṇāni aṣṭau vyākaraṇāni ca |
jñātvā satyavatīsūnuścakre bhāratasaṃhitām | | 58
yāṃ śrutvā puruṣo rājan! mucyate brahmahatyayā |
prathamaṃ procyate brāhmaṃ dvitīyaṃ caindramucyate | | 59
yāmyaṃ proktaṃ tato raudraṃ vāyavyaṃ vāruṇaṃ tathā |
sāvitraṃ ca tathā proktamaṣṭamaṃ vaiṣṇavaṃ tathā | | 1.1.60
etāni vyākaraṇāni purāṇāni nibodha me |
brāhmaṃ pādmaṃ vaiṣṇavaṃ ca śaivaṃ bhāgavataṃ tathā | | 61
tathānyannāradīyaṃ ca mārkaṇḍeyaṃ ca saptamam |
āgneyamaṣṭamaṃ vīra bhaviṣyaṃ navamaṃ smṛtam | | 62
daśamaṃ brahmavaivarttaṃ laiṅgamekādaśaṃ smṛtam |
vārāhaṃ dvādaśaṃ proktaṃ skāndaṃ caiva trayodaśam | | 63
caturdaśaṃ vāmanaṃ ca kaurmaṃ pañcadaśaṃ smṛtam |
mātsyaṃ ca gāruḍaṃ caiva brahmāṇḍaṃ ca tataḥ param | | 64
etāni kuruśārdūla dharmaśāstrāṇi paṇḍitaiḥ |
sādhāraṇāni proktāni varṇānāṃ śreyase sadā | | 65
caturṇāmiha rājendra śrotumarhāṇi suvrata |
kimicchasi mahābāho śrotumeṣāṃ nṛpottama | | 66
śatānīka uvāca
bhārataṃ tu śrutaṃ vipra tātasyāṅkagatena tu |
rāmasya caritaṃ cāpi śrutaṃ brahmansamantataḥ | | 67
purāṇāni ca viprendra bhaviṣyaṃ na tu suvrata |
purāṇaṃ vada viprendra! bhaviṣyaṃ kautukaṃ hi me | | 68
sumanturuvāca
sādhu sādhu mahābāho sādhu pṛṣṭo.asmi 4 mānada |
śṛṇu me vadato rājan purāṇaṃ navamaṃ mahat | | 69
yacchrutvā sarvapāpebhyo mucyate mānavo nṛpa |
aśvamedhaphalaṃ prāpya gacched bhānau na saṃśayaḥ | | 1.1.70
idaṃ tu brahmaṇā proktaṃ dharmaśāstramanuttamam |
viduṣā brāhmaṇenedamadhyetavyaṃ prayatnataḥ 5 | | 71
śiṣyebhyaścaiva vaktavyaṃ cāturvarṇyebhya eva hi |
adhyetavyaṃ na cānyena brāhmaṇaṃ kṣatriyaṃ vinā | |
śrotavyameva śūdreṇa nādhyetavyaṃ kadācana 6 | | 72
devārcāṃ purataḥ 1 kṛtvā brāhmaṇaiśca nṛpottama |
śrotavyameva śūdraiśca tathānyaiśca dvijātibhiḥ | | 73
śrautaṃ smārtaṃ hi vai dharmaṃ proktamasminnṛpottama |
tasmācchūdrairvinā viprānna śrotavyaṃ kathañcana | 74
idaṃ śāstramadhīyāno brāhmaṇaḥ saṃśitavrataḥ |
manovāgdehajairnityaṃ karmadoṣairna limpate | | 75
śṛṇvanti cāpi ye rājan bhaktyā vai brāhmaṇādayaḥ |
mucyante pātakaiḥ sarvairgacchanti ca divaṃ prabho | | 76
śrāvayeccāpi yo vipraḥ sarvānvarṇānnṛpottama |
sa guruḥ procyate tāta varṇānāmiha sarvaśaḥ | | 77
sa pūjyaḥ sarvakāleṣu sarvairvarṇairnarādhipa |
pṛthivīṃ ca tathaivemāṃ kṛtsnāmeko.api so.arhati | | 78
idaṃ svastyayanaṃ śreṣṭhamidaṃ buddhivivardhanam |
idaṃ yaśasyaṃ satatamidaṃ niḥśreyasaṃ param | | 79
asmindharmo.akhilenokto guṇadoṣau ca karmaṇām |
caturṇāmapi varṇānāmācāraścāpi śāśvataḥ | | 1.1.80
ācāraḥ prathamo dharmaḥ śrutyuktaśca narottama |
tasmādasminsamāyukto nityaṃ syādātmavāndvijaḥ | | 81
ācārādvicyuto vipro na vedaphalamaśnute |
ācāreṇa ca saṃyuktaḥ sampūrṇaphalabhāksmṛtaḥ | | 82
evamācārato dṛṣṭvā dharmasya munayo gatim |
sarvasya tapaso mūlamācāraṃ jagṛhuḥ param | | 83
anye ca mānavā rājannācāraṃ saṃśritā sadā |
evamasminpurāṇe tu ācārasya tu kīrtanam | | 84
vṛttāntāni ca rājendra tathā coktāni paṇḍitaiḥ |
trilokyāstu samutpattiḥ saṃskāravidhiruttamaḥ | |
śravaṇaṃ cetihāsasya vidhānaṃ kathyate nṛpa | | 85
tathāsminkathyate rājanmāhātmyaṃ vācakasya tu |
vratacaryāśramācārāḥ snātakasya paro vidhiḥ | | 86
dārādigamanaṃ caiva vivāhānāṃ ca lakṣaṇam |
puṃsāṃ ca lakṣaṇaṃ rājanyoṣitāṃ cātra kathyate | | 87
mahāyajñavidhānaṃ ca śāstrakalpaṃ ca śāśvatam |
pṛthivyā lakṣaṇaṃ tāta devārcāyāḥ sulakṣaṇam | | 88
vṛttīnāṃ lakṣaṇaṃ caiva snātakasya vratāni ca |
bhakṣyābhakṣyaṃ ca śaucaṃ ca dravyāṇāṃ śuddhireva ca | | 89
strīdharmayogastāpasyaṃ mokṣaḥ saṃnyāsa eva ca |
rājñaśca dharmo hyakhilaḥ kāryāṇāṃ ca vinirṇayaḥ | | 1.1.90
māhātmyaṃ savituścātra tīrthānāṃ ca viśāmpate |
nārāyaṇasya māhātmyaṃ tathā rudrasya kathyate | | 91
mahābhāgyaṃ ca viprāṇāṃ māhātmyaṃ pustakasya ca |
durgādevyāstathā coktaṃ satyasya ca mahāmate | | 92
saṃkṣiptaṃ 1 saṃvidhānaṃ ca dharmaṃ strīpuṃsayorapi |
vibhāgaṃ dharmadyūtaṃ ca kathakānāṃ ca śodhanam | | 93
vaiśyaśūdropacāraṃ ca saṃkīrṇānāṃ ca saṃbhavam |
āpaddharmaṃ ca varṇānāṃ prāyaścittavidhiṃ tathā | | 94
saṃdhyāvidhiṃ pretaśuddhiṃ snānatarpaṇayorvidhim |
vaiśvadevavidhiṃ cāpi tathā bhojyavidhiṃ nṛpa | | 95
lakṣaṇaṃ dantakāṣṭhasya caraṇavyūhamuttamam |
saṃsāragamanaṃ caiva trividhaṃ karmasambhavam | | 96
naiḥśreyasaṃ karmaṇāṃ ca guṇadoṣaparīkṣaṇam |
dārāṇāṃ lakṣaṇaṃ proktaṃ tathā pātraparīkṣaṇam | | 97
prasūtiṃ cāpi garbhasya tathā karmaphalaṃ nṛpa |
jātidharmānkuladharmānvedadharmāṃśca 1 pārthiva | | 98
vaitānavratikānāṃ ca tathāsau proktavānvibhuḥ |
brahmā kurukulaśreṣṭha śaṃkarāya mahātmane | | 99
śaṃkareṇa tathā viṣṇoḥ kathitaṃ kurunandana |
viṣṇunāpi punaḥ proktaṃ nāradāya mahīpate | | 1.1.100
nāradātprāptavāñchakraḥ śakrādapi parāśaraḥ |
parāśarāttato vyāso vyāsādapi mayā vibho | | 101
evaṃ paramparāprāptaṃ purāṇamidamuttamam |
śṛṇu tvamapi rājendra matsakāśātparaṃ hitam | | 102
sarvāṇyeva purāṇāni saṃjñeyāni nararṣabha |
dvādaśaiva sahasrāṇi proktānīha manīṣibhiḥ | | 103
punarvṛddhiṃ gatānīha ākhyānairvividhairvṛṣa |
yathā skāndaṃ tathā cedaṃ bhaviṣyaṃ kurunandana | | 104
skāndaṃ śatasahasraṃ tu lokānāṃ jñātameva hi |
bhaviṣyametadṛṣiṇā lakṣārddhaṃ saṃkhyayā kṛtam 2 | | 105
tacchrutvā puruṣo bhaktyā idaṃ phalamavāpnuyāt |
ṛddhirvṛddhistathā śrīśca bhavanti tasya niścitam | | 106
iti śrībhaviṣye mahāpurāṇe śatārddhasāhasryāṃ saṃhitāyāṃ brāhame parvaṇi
kathāprastāvane prathamo.adhyāyaḥ | 1 |

atha dvitīyo.adhyāyaḥ
sṛṣṭivarṇanaṃ purāṇānāṃ brahmapañcamāsyādutpattivarṇanañca
sumanturuvāca
śṛṇuṣvedaṃ mahābāho purāṇaṃ pañcalakṣaṇam |
yacchrutvā mucyate rājanpuruṣo brahmahatyayā | | 1
parvāṇi cātra vai pañca kīrtitāni svayambhuvā |
prathamaṃ kathyate brāhmaṃ dvitīyaṃ vaiṣṇavaṃ smṛtam | | 2
tṛtīyaṃ śaivamākhyātaṃ caturthaṃ tvāṣṭramucyate |
pañcamaṃ pratisargākhyaṃ sarvalokaiḥ supūjitam | | 3
etāni tāta parvāṇi lakṣaṇāni nibodha me |
sargaśca pratisargaśca vaṃśo manvantarāṇi ca | | 4
vaṃśānucaritaṃ caiva purāṇaṃ pañcalakṣaṇam |
caturdaśabhirvidyābhirbhūṣitaṃ kurunandana | | 5
aṅgāni caturo vedā mīmāṃsā nyāyavistaraḥ |
purāṇaṃ dharmaśāstraṃ ca vidyā hyetāścaturdaśa | | 6
āyurvedo dhanurvedo gāndharvaścaiva te trayaḥ |
arthaśāstraṃ caturthaṃ tu vidyā hyaṣṭādaśaiva tāḥ | | 7
prathamaṃ kathyate sargo bhūtānāmiha sarvaśaḥ |
yacchrutvā pāpanirmukto yāti śāntimanuttamām | | 8
jagadāsītpurā tāta tamobhūtamalakṣaṇam |
avijñeyamatarkyaṃ ca prasuptamiva sarvaśaḥ | | 9
tataḥ sa bhagavānīśo hyavyakto vyañjayannidam |
mahābhūtāni vṛttaujāḥ protthitastamanāśanaḥ 1 | | 1.2.10
yo.asāvatīndriyo.agrāhyaḥ sūkṣmo.avyaktaḥ sanātanaḥ |
sarvabhūtamayo.acintyaḥ sa eṣa svayamutthitaḥ | | 11
yo.asau ṣaḍviṃśako loke tathā yaḥ puruṣottamaḥ |
bhāskaraśca mahābāho paraṃ brahma ca kathyate | | 12
so.abhidhyāya śarīrātsvātsisṛkṣurvividhāḥ prajāḥ |
ata eva sasarjādau tāsu vīryamavāsṛjat | | 13
yasmādutpadyate sarvaṃ sadevāsuramānuṣam |
bījaṃ śukraṃ tathā reta ugraṃ vīryaṃ ca kathyate | | 14
vīryasyaitāni nāmāni kathitāni svayambhuvā |
tadaṇḍamabhavaddhaimaṃ jvālāmālākulaṃ vibho | | 15
yasmiñjajñe svayaṃ brahmā sarvalokapitāmahaḥ |
surajyeṣṭhaścaturvaktraḥ parameṣṭhī pitāmahaḥ | | 16
kṣetrajñaḥ puruṣo vedhāḥ śambhurnārāyaṇastathā |
paryāyavācakaiḥ śabdaireva brahmā prakīrtyate | | 17
sadā manīṣibhistāta virañciḥ kañjajastathā |
āpo nārā iti proktā āpo vai narasūnavaḥ | | 18
tā yadasyāyanaṃ pūrvaṃ tena nārāyaṇaḥ smṛtaḥ |
aramityeva śīghrāya niyatāḥ kavibhiḥ kṛtāḥ | | 19
āpa 3 evārṇavībhūtvā suśīghrāstena tā narāḥ |
yattatkāraṇamavyaktaṃ nityaṃ sadasadātmakam | | 1.2.20
tadvisṛṣṭaḥ sa puruṣo loke brahmeti kīrttyate |
evaṃ sa bhagavānaṇḍe tattvameva nirūpya vai | |2 1
dhyānamāsthāya rājendra tadaṇḍamakaroddvidhā |
śakalābhyāṃ ca rājendra divaṃ bhūmiṃ ca nirmame | | 22
antarvyoma diśaścāṣṭau vāruṇaṃ sthānameva hi |
ūrdhvaṃ mahāngato rājan samantāllokabhūtaye | | 23
mahataścāpyahaṃkārastasmācca triguṇā api |
triguṇā atisūkṣmāstu buddhigamyā hi bhārata | | 24
utpattihetubhūtā vai bhūtānāṃ mahatāṃ nṛpa |
teṣāmeva gṛhītāni śanaiḥ pañcendriyāṇi tu | | 25
tathaivāvayavāḥ sūkṣmāḥ ṣaṇṇāmapyamitaujasām | | 26
saṃniveśyātmamātrāsu sa rājanbhagavānvibhuḥ |
bhūtāni nirmame tāta sarvāṇi vidhipūrvakam | | 27
yanmūrtyavayavāḥ sūkṣmāstasyemānyāśrayāṇi ṣaṭ |
tasmāccharīramityāhustasya mūrtiṃ manīṣiṇaḥ | | 28
mahānti tāni bhūtāni āviśanti tato vibhum |
karmaṇā saha rājendra saguṇāścāpi vai guṇāḥ | | 29
teṣāmidaṃ tu saptānāṃ puruṣāṇāṃ mahaujasām |
sūkṣmābhyo mūrtimātrābhyaḥ sambhavatyavyayādvayam 1 | | 1.2.30
bhūtādimahatastāta yena vyāptamidaṃ jagat |
tasmādapi mahābāho puruṣāḥ pañca eva hi | | 31
kecidevaṃ parāṃ tāta sṛṣṭimicchanti paṇḍitāḥ |
anye.apyevaṃ mahābāho pravadanti manīṣiṇaḥ | | 32
yo.asāvātmā parastāta kalpādau sṛjate tanum |
prajanaśca mahābāho sisṛkṣurvividhāḥ prajāḥ | | 33
tena sṛṣṭaḥ pudgalastu pradhānaṃ viśate nṛpa |
pradhānaṃ kṣobhitaṃ tena vikārānyujate bahūn | | 34
utpadyate mahāṃstasmāttato bhūtādireva hi |
utpadyate viśālaṃ ca bhūtādeḥ kurunandana | | 35
viśālācca haristāta hareścāpi vṛkāstathā |
vṛkairmuṣṇanti ca budhāstasmātsarvaṃ bhavennṛpa | | 36
tathaiṣāmeva rājendra prādurbhavati vegataḥ |
mātrāṇāṃ kuruśārdūla vibodhastadanantaram 1 | | 37
tasmādapi hṛṣīkāṇi vividhāni nṛpottama |
tatheyaṃ sṛṣṭirākhyātā.a.arādhyataḥ kurunandana | | 38
bhūyo nibodha rājendra bhūtānāmiha vistaram |
guṇādhikāni sarvāṇi bhūtāni pṛthivīpate | | 39
ākāśamāditaḥ kṛtvā uttarottarameva hi |
ekaṃ dvau ca tathā trīṇi catvāraścāpi pañca ca | | 1.2.40
tataḥ sa bhagavānbrahmā padmāsanagataḥ prabhuḥ |
sarveṣāṃ tu sa nāmāni karmāṇi ca pṛthakpṛthak | | 41
vedaśabdebhya evādau pṛthaksaṃsthāśca nirmame |
karmodbhavānāṃ devānāṃ so.asṛjaddehināṃ prabhuḥ | | 42
tuṣitānāṃ gaṇaṃ rājanyajñaṃ caiva sanātanam |
dattvā 2 vīra samānebhyo guhyaṃ brahma sanātanam | | 43
dudoha yajñasiddhayarthamṛgyajuḥ sāmalakṣaṇam |
kālaṃ kālavibhaktīśca 3 grahānṛtūṃstathā nṛpa | | 44
saritaḥ sāgarāñchailānsamāni viṣamāṇi ca |
kāmaṃ krodhaṃ tathā vācaṃ ratiṃ cāpi kurudvaha | | 45
sṛṣṭiṃ sasarja rājendra sisṛkṣurvividhāḥ prajāḥ |
dharmādharmau vivekāya karmaṇāṃ ca tathāsṛjat | |4 6
sukhaduḥkhādibhirdvandvaiḥ prajāścemā nyayojayat |
aṇvyo mātrāvināśinyo daśārdhānāṃ tu yāḥ smṛtāḥ | | 47
tābhiḥ sarvamidaṃ vīra sambhavatyanupūrvaśaḥ |
yatkṛtaṃ tu purā karma sanniyuktena vai nṛpa | | 48
sa tadeva svayaṃ bheje sṛjyamānaṃ punaḥ punaḥ |
hiṃsrāhiṃsre mṛdukrūre dharmādharme ṛtānṛte | | 49
yadyathāsyābhavatsarge tattasya svayamāviśat |
yathā ca liṅgānyṛtavaḥ svayamevānuparyaye | | 1.2.50
svāni svānyabhipadyante tathā karmāṇi dehinaḥ |
lokasyeha vivṛddhyarthaṃ mukhabāhūrupādataḥ | | 51
brahma kṣatraṃ tathā cobhau vaiśyaśūdrau nṛpottama |
mukhāni yāni catvāri tebhyo vedā viniḥsṛtāḥ | | 52
ṛgvedasahitā tāta vasiṣṭhena mahātmanā |
pūrvānmukhānmahābāho dakṣiṇāccāpi vai śṛṇu | | 53
yajurvedo mahārāja yājñavalkyena vai saha |
sāmāni paścimāttāta gautamaśca mahānṛṣiḥ | | 54
atharvavedo rājendra mukhāccāpyuttarānnṛpa |
ṛṣiścāpi tathā rājañchaunako lokapūjitaḥ | | 55
yattanmukhaṃ mahābāho pañcamaṃ lokaviśrutam |
aṣṭādaśapurāṇāni setihāsāni bhārata | | 56
nirgatāni tatastasmānmukhātkurukulodvaha |
tathānyāḥ smṛtayaścāpi yamādyā lokapūjitāḥ | | 57
tataḥ sa bhagavāndevo dvidhā dehamakārayat |
dvidhā kṛtvātmano dehamardhena puruṣo.abhavat | | 58
ardhena nārī tasyāṃ ca virājamasṛjatprabhuḥ |
tapastaptvāsṛjadyaṃ tu sa svayaṃ puruṣo virāṭ | | 59
sa cakāra tapo rājansisṛkṣurvividhāḥ prajāḥ |
patīnprajānāmasṛjanmaharṣīnādito daśa | | 1.2.60
nāradaṃ ca bhṛguṃ tāta kaṃ pracetasameva hi |
pulahaṃ kratuṃ pulastyaṃ ca atrimaṅgirasaṃ tathā | | 61
marīciṃ cāpi rājendra yo.asāvādyaḥ prajāpatiḥ |
etāṃścānyāṃśca rājendra asṛjad bhūritejasaḥ | | 62
atha devānṛṣīndaityānso.asṛjatkurunandana |
yakṣarakṣaḥ piśācāṃśca gandharvāpsaraso.asurān | | 63
manuṣyāṇāṃ pitṛrṇāṃ ca sarpāṇāṃ caiva bhārata |
nāgānāṃ ca mahābāho sasarja vividhāngaṇān | | 64 kṣaṇaruco.aśanigaṇānrohitendradhanūṃṣi ca |
dhūmaketūṃstathā colkā niryātāñjyotiṣāṃ gaṇān | | 65 manuṣyānkinnarānmatsyānvarāhāṃśca vihaṅgamān |
gajānaśvānatha paśūnmṛgānvyālāṃśca bhārata | | 66
kṛmikīṭapataṅgāṃśca yūkālikṣakamatkuṇān |
sarvaṃ ca daṃśamaśakaṃ sthāvaraṃ ca pṛthagvidham | | 67
evaṃ sa bhāskaro devaḥ sasarja bhuvanatrayam |
yeṣāṃ tu yādṛśaṃ karma bhūtānāmiha kīrtitam | | 68
kathayiṣyāmi tatsarvaṃ kramayogaṃ ca janmani |
gajā vyālā mṛgāstāta paśavaśca pṛthagvidhāḥ | | 69
piśācā mānuṣāstāta rakṣāṃsi ca jarāyujāḥ |
dvijāstu aṇḍajāḥ sarpā nakrā matsyāḥ sakacchapāḥ | | 1.2.70
evaṃvidhāni yānīha sthalajānyaudakāni ca |
svedajaṃ daṃśamaśakaṃ yūkālikṣakamatkuṇāḥ | | 71
ūṣmaṇā copajāyante yaccānyatkiñcidīdṛśam |
udbhijjāḥ sthāvarāḥ sarve bījakāṇḍaprarohiṇaḥ | | 72
oṣadhyaḥ phalapākāntā nānāvidhaphalopagāḥ |
apuṣpāḥ phalavanto ye te vanaspatayaḥ smṛtāḥ | | 73
puṣpiṇaḥ phalinaścaiva vṛkṣāstūbhayataḥ smṛtāḥ |
gucchagulmaṃ tu vividhaṃ tathaiva tṛṇajātayaḥ | | 74
bījakāṇḍaruhāṇyeva pratānā 1 vallya eva ca |
tamasā bahurūpeṇa veṣṭitāḥ karmahetunā | | 75
antaḥsaṃjñā bhavantyete sukhaduḥkhasamanvitāḥ |
etāvatyastu gatayaḥ prodbhūtāḥ kurunandana | | 76
tasmāddevāddīptimanto bhāskarācya mahātmanaḥ |
ghore.asmiṃstāta saṃsāre nityaṃ satatayāyini | | 77
evaṃ sarvaṃ sa sṛṣṭvedaṃ rāja~mllokaguruṃ param |
tirobhūtaḥ sa bhūtātmā kālaṃ kālena pīḍayan | | 78
yadā sa devo jāgarti tadedaṃ ceṣṭate jagat |
yadā svapiti śāntātmā tadā sarvaṃ nimīlati | | 79
tasminsvapiti rājendra jantavaḥ karmabandhanāḥ |
svakarmabhyo nivartante manaśca glānimṛcchati | | 1.2.80
yugapattu pralīyante yadā tasminmahātmani |
tadāyaṃ sarvabhūtātmā sukhaṃ svapiti bhārata | | 81
tamo yadā samāśritya ciraṃ tiṣṭhati sendriyaḥ |
na navaṃ kurute karma tadotkrāmati mūrtitaḥ | | 82
yadāhaṃmātriko bhūtvā bījaṃ sthāsnu cariṣṇu ca |
samāviśati saṃsṛṣṭastadā mūtiṃ vimuñcati | | 83
evaṃ sa jāgratsvapnābhyāmidaṃ sarvaṃ jagatprabhuḥ |
saṃjīvayati cājasraṃ pramāpayati cāvyayaḥ | | 84
kalpādau sṛjate tāta ante kalpasya saṃharet |
dinaṃ tasyeha yattāta kalpāntamiti kathyate | | 85
kālasaṃkhyāṃ tatastasya 1 kalpasya śṛṇu bhārata |
nimeṣā daśa cāṣṭau ca akṣṇaḥ kāṣṭhā nigadyate | | 86
triṃśatkāṣṭhāḥ kalāmāhuḥ kṣaṇastriṃśatkalāḥ smṛtāḥ |
muhūrtamatha mauhūrtā vadanti dvādaśa kṣaṇam | | 87
triṃśanmuhūrtamuddiṣṭamahorātraṃ manīṣibhiḥ |
māsastriṃśadahorātraṃ dvau dvau māsāvṛtuḥ smṛtaḥ | | 88
ṛtutrayamapyayanamayane dve tu vatsaraḥ |
ahorātre vibhajate sūryo mānuṣadaivike | | 89
rātriḥ svapnāya bhūtānāṃ ceṣṭāyai karmaṇāmahaḥ |
pitrye rātryahanī māsaḥ pravibhāgastu pakṣayoḥ | | 1.2.90
karma ceṣṭāsvahaḥ kṛṣṇaḥ muktaḥ svapnāya śarvarī |
daive rātryahanī varṣaṃ pravibhāgastayoḥ punaḥ | | 91
ahastatrodagayanaṃ rātriḥ syāddakṣiṇāyanam |
brāhmasya tu kṣapāhasya yatpramāṇaṃ mahīpate | | 92
ekaikaśo yugānāṃ tu kramaśastantibodha me |
catvāryāhuḥ sahasrāṇi varṣāṇāṃ tatkṛtaṃ yugam | | 93
tasya tāvacchatī sandhyā sandhyāṃśaśca tathāvidhaḥ |
tretā trīṇi sahasrāṇi varṣāṇi ca vidurbudhāḥ | | 94
śatāni ṣaṭ ca rājendra sandhyāsandhyāṃśayoḥ pṛthak |
varṣāṇāṃ dve sahasre tu dvāpare parikīrtite | | 95
catvāri ca śatānyāhuḥ sandhyāsandhyāṃśayorbudhaḥ |
sahasraṃ kathitaṃ tiṣye śatadvayasamanvitam | | 96
eṣā caturyugasyāpi saṃkhyā proktā nṛpottama |
yadetatparisaṃkhyā tamādāveva caturyugam | | 97
etaddvādaśasāhasraṃ devānāṃ yugamucyate |
daivikānāṃ yugānāṃ tu sahasraparisaṃkhyayā | | 98
brāhmamekamaharjñeyaṃ tāvatī rātrirucyate |
etadyugasahasrāntaṃ brāhmaṃ puṇyamaharviduḥ | | 99
rātriṃ ca tāvatīmeva te.ahorātravido janāḥ |
tato.asau yugaparyante prasuptaḥ pratibudhyate | | 1.2.100
pratibuddhastu sṛjati manaḥ sadasadātmakam |
manaḥ sṛṣṭiṃ vikurute codyamānaṃ 1 sisṛkṣayā | | 101
vipulaṃ jāyate tasmāttasya śabdaṃ guṇaṃ viduḥ |
vipulāttu vikurvāṇātsarvagandhavahaḥ śuciḥ | | 102
balavāñjāyate vāyuḥ sa vai sparśaguṇo mataḥ |
vāyorapi vikurvāṇādvirociṣṇu tamonudam | | 103
utpadyate vicitrāṃśustasya rūpaṃ guṇaṃ viduḥ |
tasmādapi vikurvāṇādāpo jātāḥ smṛtā budhaiḥ | | 104
tāsāṃ guṇo raso jñeyaḥ sarvalokasya bhāvanaḥ 2 |
adbhyo gandhaguṇā bhūmirityeṣā sṛṣṭirāditaḥ | | 105
yatprāgdvādaśasāhasramuktaṃ saumanasaṃ yugam |
tadekasaptatiguṇaṃ manvantaramihocyate | | 106
manvantarāṇyasaṃkhyāni sargaḥ saṃhāra eva ca |
tathāpyahe sadā brāhme manavastu caturdaśa | | 107
kathyante kuruśārdūla 3 saṃkhyayā paṇḍitaiḥ sadā |
manoḥ svāyambhuvasyeha ṣaḍvaṃśyā 4 manavo.apare | | 108
sṛṣṭavantaḥ prajāḥ svāḥsvāḥ mahātmāno mahaujasaḥ |
sāvarṇeyastathā pañcabhautyo raucyastathāparaḥ | | 109
ete bhaviṣyā manavaḥ sapta proktā nṛpottama |
svasve.antare sarvamidaṃ pālayanti carācaram | | 1.2.110
evaṃvidhaṃ dinaṃ tasya viriñcestu mahātmanaḥ |
tasyānte kurute sargaṃ yathedaṃ kathitaṃ tava | | 111
krīḍannivaitatkurute parameṣṭhī narādhipa |
catuṣpātsakalo dharmaḥ satyaṃ caiva kṛte yuge | | 112
nādharmeṇāgamaḥ kaścinmanuṣyāṇāṃ pravartate |
itareṣvāgamāstāta dharmaśca kurunandana | | 113
yādṛśāḥ parihīyante yathāha bhagavānmanuḥ 1 |
cauryāccāpyanṛtādrājanmāyābhiramitadyute | | 114
pādena hīyate dharmastretādiṣu yugeṣu vai |
arogāḥ sarvasiddhārthāścaturvarṣaśatāyuṣaḥ | | 115
kṛtatretādiṣu tveṣāṃ vayo hrasati pādaśaḥ |
vedoktamāyurāśīśca martyānāṃ kurunandana | | 116
karmaṇāṃ tu phalaṃ tāta phalatyanuyugaṃ sadā |
prabhāvaśca tathā loke phalatyeva śarīriṇām | | 117
anye kṛtayuge dharmāstretāyāṃ dvāpare pare |
anye kaliyuge nṛṇāṃ yugadharmānurūpataḥ | | 118
tapaḥ paraṃ kṛtayuge tretāyāṃ jñānamucyate |
dvāpare yajñamityāhurdānamekaṃ kalau yuge | | 119
sarvasya rājansargasya guptyarthaṃ ca mahādyute |
mukhabāhūrupādānāṃ pṛthakkarmāṇyakalpayat | | 1.2.120
adhyāpanamadhyayanaṃ yajanaṃ yājanaṃ tathā |
dānaṃ pratigrahaṃ caiva brāhmaṇānāmakalpayat | | 121
prajānāṃ pālanaṃ rājandānamadhyayanaṃ tathā |
viṣayeṣu prasaktiṃ ca tathejyāṃ kṣatriyasya tu | | 122
paśūnāṃ rakṣaṇaṃ dānamijyādhyayanameva ca |
vaṇikpathaṃ 1 kusīdaṃ ca vaiśyasya kṛṣireva ca | | 123
ekameva tu śūdrasya karma loke prakīrtitam |
eteṣāmeva varṇānāṃ śuśrūṣāmanupūrvaśaḥ | | 124
puruṣasya sadā śreṣṭhaṃ nābherūrdhvaṃ nṛpottama |
tasmādapi śucitaraṃ mukhaṃ tāta svayambhuvaḥ | | 125
tasmānmukhāddvijo jāta itīyaṃ vaidikī śrutiḥ |
sarvasyaivāsya dharmasya dharmato brāhmaṇaḥ prabhuḥ | | 126
sa sṛṣṭo brahmaṇā pūrvaṃ tapastaptvā kurūdvaha |
havyānāmiva kavyānāṃ sarvasyāpi ca guptaye | | 127
aśnanti ca mukhenāsya havyāni tridivaukasaḥ |
kavyāni caiva pitaraḥ kimbhūtamadhikaṃ tataḥ | | 128
bhūtānāṃ prāṇinaḥ śreṣṭhāḥ prāṇināṃ buddhijīvinaḥ |
buddhimatsu narāḥ śreṣṭhā nareṣu brāhmaṇāḥ smṛtāḥ | | 129
brāhmaṇeṣu ca vidvāṃso vidvatsu kṛtabuddhayaḥ |
kṛtabuddhiṣu kartāraḥ kartṛṣu brahmavedinaḥ | | 1.2.130
janma viprasya rājendra dhamārthamiha kathyate |
utpannaḥ sarvasiddhayarthaṃ yāti brahmasado nṛpa | | 131
sa cāpi jāyamānastu pṛthivyāmiha jāyate |
bhūtānāṃ prabhavāyaiva dharmakośasya guptaye | | 132
sarvaṃ hi brāhmaṇasyedaṃ yatkiñcitpṛthivīgatam |
janmanā cottamenedaṃ sarvaṃ vai brāhmaṇo.arhati | | 133
svakīyaṃ brāhmaṇo bhuṅkte vidadhāti ca suvrata |
karuṇāṃ kurvatastasya bhuñjantī hetare janāḥ | | 134
trayāṇāmiha varṇānāṃ bhāvābhāvāya vai dvijaḥ |
bhavedrājanna sandehastuṣṭo bhāvāya vai dvijaḥ | | 135
abhāvāya bhavetkruddhastasmātpūjyatamo hi saḥ |
brāhmaṇe sati nānyasya prabhutvaṃ vidyate nṛpa | .| 136
kāmātkarotyasau karma kāmagaśca nṛpottama |
tasmādvṛndārakapurī tasmādapi mahaḥ punaḥ | | 137
maharlokājjanolokaṃ brahmalokaṃ ca gacchati |
brahmatvaṃ ca mahābāho yāti vipro na saṃśayaḥ | | 138
śatānīka uvāca
brahmatvaṃ nāma duṣprāpaṃ brahmalokeṣu suvrata | | 139
brahmatvaṃ kīdṛśaṃ vipro brahmalokaṃ ca gacchati |
nāmamātro.atha kiṃ vipro brahmatvaṃ brahmaṇaḥ sadā | |
yāti brahmanguṇāḥ ke syurbrahmaprāptau mamocyatām | | 1.2.140
sumanturuvāca
sādhusādhu mahābāho śṛṇu me paramaṃ vacaḥ | | 141
ye proktā vedaśāstreṣu saṃskārā brāhmaṇasya tu |
garbhādhānādayo ye ca 1 saṃskārā yasya pārthiva | | 142
catvāriṃśatathāṣṭau ca nirvṛttāḥ śāstrato nṛpa |
sa yāti brahmaṇaḥ sthānaṃ brāhmaṇatvaṃ ca mānada 1 ||
saṃskārāḥ sarvathā heturbrahmatve nātra saṃśayaḥ || 143
śatānīka uvāca
saṃskārāḥ ke matā brahmanbrahmatve brāhmaṇasya tu |
śaṃsa me dvijaśārdūlaṃ kautukaṃ hi mahanmama || 144
sumanturuvāca
sādhusādhu mahābāho śṛṇu me paramaṃ vacaḥ |
ye proktā vedaśāstreṣu saṃskārā brāhmaṇasya tu ||
manīṣibhirmahābāho śṛṇu sarvānaśeṣataḥ || 145
garbhādhānaṃ puṃsavanaṃ sīmantonnayanaṃ tathā |
jātakarmānnāśanaṃ ca cūḍopanayanaṃ 2 nṛpa || 146
brahmavratāni catvāri snānaṃ ca tadanantaram |
sadharmacāriṇīyogo yajñānāṃ 3 karma mānada || 147
pañcānāṃ kāryamityāhurātmanaḥ śreyase nṛpa |
devapitṛmanuṣyāṇāṃ bhūtānāṃ brāhmaṇastathā || 148
eteṣāṃ cāṣṭakākarma pārvaṇaśrāddhameva hi |
śrāvaṇī cāgrahāyaṇī caitrī cāśvayujī tathā || 149
pākayajñāstathā sapta agnyādhānaṃ ca satkriyā |
agnihotraṃ tathā rājandarśaṃ ca vidhusañkṣaye || 1.2.150
paurṇamāsaṃ ca rājendra cāturmāsyāni cāpi hi |
nirūpaṇaṃ 5 paśuvadhaṃ tathā sautrāmaṇīti ca || 151
haviryajñāstathā sapta teṣāṃ cāpi hi satkriyā |
agniṣṭomo.atyagniṣṭomastathokthyaḥ ṣoḍaśīṃ viduḥ ||152
vājapeyo.atirātraśca āptoryāmeti vai smṛtaḥ 1 |
saṃskāreṣu sthitāḥ sapta somāḥ kurukulodvaha || 153
ityete dvijasaṃskārāścatvāriṃśannṛpottama |
aṣṭau cātmaguṇāstāta śṛṇu tānapi bhārata || 154
anasūyā dayā kṣāntiranāyāsaṃ ca maṅgalam |
akārpaṇyaṃ tathā śaucamaspṛhā ca kurūdvaha || 155
ya ete.aṣṭaguṇāstāta kīrtyante vai manīṣibhiḥ |
eteṣāṃ lakṣaṇaṃ vīra śṛṇu sarvamaśeṣataḥ || 156
na guṇānguṇino hanti na stautyātmaguṇānapi |
prahaṣyante nānyadoṣairanasūyā prakīrtitā || 157
apare bandhuvarge vā mitre dveṣṭari vā sadā |
ātmavadvartanaṃ yatsyātsā dayā parikīrtitā || 158
vācā manasi kāye ca duḥkhenotpāditena ca |
na kupyati na cāprītiḥ sā kṣamā parikīrtitā || 159
abhakṣyaparihāraśca saṃsargaścāpyaninditaiḥ |
ācāre ca vyavasthānaṃ śaucametatprakīrtitam || 1.2.160
śarīraṃ pīḍyate yena śubhenāpi ca karmaṇā |
atyantaṃ tanna kurvīta anāyāsaḥ sa ucyate || 161
praśastācaraṇaṃ nityamapraśastavivarjanam |
etaddhi maṅgalaṃ proktaṃ munibhirbrahmavādibhiḥ || 162
stokādapi pradātavyamadīnenāntarātmanā |
ahanyahani yatkiṃcidakārpaṇyaṃ taducyate || 163
yathotpannena santuṣṭaḥ svalpenāpyatha vastunā |
ahiṃsayā parasveṣu 3 sā.aspṛhā parikīrtitā || 164
vapuryasya tu ityetaiḥ saṃskāraiḥ saṃskṛtaṃ dvijaḥ |
brahmatvamiha samprāpya brahmalokaṃ ca gacchati || 165
vaidikaiḥ karmabhiḥ puṇyairniṣekādyairdvijanmanām |
kāryaḥ śarīrasaṃskāraḥ pāvanaḥ pretya ceha ca | | 166
garbhaśuddhiṃ tataḥ prāpya dharmaṃ cāśramalakṣaṇam |
yāti muktiṃ na sandehaḥ purāṇe.asminnṛpottama | | 167
uśanti kuruśārdūla brāhmaṇā nātra saṃśayaḥ |
āśritānāṃ viśeṣeṇa ye nityaṃ svastivādinaḥ | | 168
nikaṭasthāndvijānhitvā yo.anyānpūjayati dvijān |
siddhaṃ pāpaṃ tadapamānāttadvaktuṃ naiva śakyate | | 169
tasmātsadā samīpasthaḥ sampūjyo vidhivannṛpa |
pūjayedatithīṃstadvadannapānādidānataḥ | | 1.2.170
brāhmaṇaḥ sarvavarṇānāṃ jyeṣṭhaḥ śreṣṭhastathottamaḥ |
evamasminpurāṇe tu saṃskārānbrāhmaṇasya tu | | 171
śṛṇoti yaśca jānāti yaścāpi paṭhate sadā |
ṛddhiṃ vṛddhiṃ tathā kīrtiṃ prāpyeha śriyamuttamām | | 172
dhanaṃ dhānyaṃ yaśaścāpi putrānbandhūnsurūpatām |
sāvitraṃ lokamāsādya brahmalokamavāpnuyāt | | 173
iti śrībhaviṣya mahāpurāṇe śatārddhasāhasryāṃ saṃhitāyāṃ
brāhme parvaṇi dvitīyo.adhyāyaḥ | 2 |

atha tṛtīyo.adhyāyaḥ
garbhādhānādārabhya samāsātsarvasaṃskāravarṇanamācamanādividhivarṇanañca
śatānīka uvāca
jātakarmādisaṃskārānvarṇānāmanupūrvaśaḥ |
āśramāṇāṃ ca me dharmaṃ kathayasva dvijottama | | 1
sumanturuvāca
garbhādhānaṃ puṃsavanaṃ sīmantonnayanaṃ tathā |
jātakarmānnaprāśaśca cūḍāmauñjīnibandhanam | | 2
baijikaṃ gārbhikaṃ caino dvijānāmapamṛjyate |
svādhyāyena vratairhomaistraividyenejyayā śrutaiḥ | | 3
mahāyajñaiśca brāhmīyaṃ yajñaiśca kriyate tanuḥ |
śṛṇuṣvaikamanā rājanyathā sā kriyate tanuḥ | | 4
prāṅnābhikartanātpuṃso jātakarma vidhīyate |
mantravatprāśanaṃ cāsya hiraṇyamadhusarpiṣām | | 5
nāmadheyaṃ daśamyāṃ tu kecidicchanti pārthiva |
dvādaśyāmapare rājanmāsi pūrṇe tathā pare | | 6
aṣṭādaśe.ahani tathā.anye vadanti manīṣiṇaḥ |
puṇye tithau muhūrte ca nakṣatre ca guṇānvite | | 7
maṅgalyaṃ tāta viprasya śivaśarmeti pārthiva |
rājanyasya viśiṣṭaṃ 1 tu induvarmeti kathyate 2 | || 8 ||
vaiśyasya dhanasaṃyuktaṃ śūdrasya ca jugupsitam |
dhanavardhaneti vaiśyasya sarvadāseti hīnaje | | 9
manunā ca tathā proktaṃ nāmno lakṣaṇamuttamam |
śarmavadbrāhmaṇasya syādrājño rakṣāsamanvitam | | 1.3.10
vaiśyasya puṣṭisaṃyuktaṃ śūdrasya preṣyasaṃyutam |
strīṇāṃ sukhodyamakrūraṃ vispaṣṭārthamanoramam | | 11
maṅgalyaṃ dīrghavarṇāntamāśīrvādābhidhānavat |
dvādaśe.ahani rājendra śiśorniṣkamaṇaṃ gṛhāt | | 12
caturthe māsi karttavyaṃ tathānyeṣāṃ mataṃ vibho |
ṣaṣṭhe.annaprāśanaṃ māsi yatheṣṭaṃ maṅgalaṃ kule | | 13
cūḍākarma dvijātīnāṃ sarveṣāmanupūrvaśaḥ |
prathame.abde tṛtīye vā kartavyaṃ kurunandana | | 14
garbhāṣṭame.abde kurvīta brāhmaṇasyopanāyanam |
garbhādekādaśe rājankṣatriyasya vinirdiśet | | 15
dvādaśe.abde.api garbhāttu vaiśyasya vratamādiśet |
brahmavarcasakāmena kāryaṃ viprasya pañcame | | 16
balārthinā tathā rājñaḥ ṣaṣṭhe .abde kāryameva hi |
arthakāmena vaiśyasya aṣṭame kurunandana | | 17
āṣoḍaśādbrāhmaṇasya sāvitrī nātivartate |
dvāviṃśateḥ kṣatrabandhorācaturviṃśaterviśaḥ | | 18
ata ūrdhvaṃ tu ye rājanyathākālamasaṃskṛtāḥ |
sāvitrīpatitā vrātyā vrātyastomādṛte 3 kratoḥ | | 19
na cāpyebhirapūtaistu āpadyapi hi karhicit |
brāhmaṃ yaunaṃ ca sambandhamācaredbrāhmaṇaiḥ saha | | 1.3.20
bhavanti rājaṃścarmāṇi vratināṃ trividhāni ca |
kārṣṇarauravavāstāni brahmakṣatraviśāṃ nṛpa | | 21
vaśīraṃścānupūrvyeṇa vastrāṇi vividhāni tu |
brahmakṣatraviśo rājañchāṇakṣaumādikāni ca | | 22
mauñjī trivṛtsamā ślakṣṇā kāryā viprasya mekhalā |
kṣatriyasya ca maurvījyā vaiśyasya śaṇatāntavī | | 23
muñjālābhe tu kartavyā kuśāśmantakabalvajaiḥ |
trivṛttā granthinaikena tribhiḥ pañcabhireva ca | | 24
kārpāsamupavītaṃ syādviprasyordhvavṛtaṃ trivṛt |
śaṇasūtramayaṃ rājño vaiśyasyāvikasautrikam | | 25
puṣkarāṇi tathā caiṣāṃ bhavanti trividhāni tu |
brahmaṇo bailvapālāśau tṛtīyaṃ plakṣajaṃ nṛpa | | 26
vāṭakhādirau kṣatriyastu tathānyaṃ vetasodbhavam |
pailavodumbarau vaiśyastathāśvatthajameva hi | | 27
daṇḍānetānmahābāho dharmato.arhanti dhāritum |
keśāntiko brāhmaṇasya daṇḍaḥ kāryaḥ pramāṇataḥ | | 28
lalāṭasammito rājñaḥ syāttu nāsāntiko viśaḥ |
ṛjavaste tū sarve syurbrāhmaṇāḥ saumyadarśanāḥ | | 29
anudvegakarā nṛrṇāṃ satvaco nāgnidūṣitāḥ |
pragṛhya cepsitaṃ daṇḍamupasthāya ca bhāskaram | | 1.3.30
samyagguruṃ tathā pūjya caredbhaikṣyaṃ yathāvidhi |
bhavatpūrvaṃ caredbhaikṣyamupanīto dvijottamaḥ | | 31
bhavanmadhyaṃ tu rājanyo vaiśyasya bhavaduttaram |
mātaraṃ vā svasāraṃ vā māturvā bhaginīṃ nijām | | 32
bhikṣeta bhaikṣyaṃ prathamaṃ yā cainaṃ nāvamānayet |
suvarṇaṃ rajataṃ cānnaṃ sā pātre.asya vinirdiśet | | 33
samāhṛtya tato bhaikṣyaṃ yāvadarthamamāyayā |
nivedya gurave.aśnīyādācamya prāṅmukhaḥ śuciḥ | | 34
āyuṣyaṃ prāṅmukho bhuṅkte yaśasyaṃ dakṣiṇāmukhaḥ |
śriyaṃ pratyaṅmukho bhuṅkte ṛtaṃ 1 bhuṅkte udaṅmukhaḥ | | 35
upaspṛśya dvijo rājannannamadyātsamāhitaḥ |
bhuktvā copaspṛśetsamyagadbhiḥ khāni ca saṃspṛśet | | 36
tathānnaṃ pūjayennityamadyāccaitadakutsayan |
darśanāttasya haṣyedvai prasīdeccāpi bhārata| | 37
abhinandya tato.aśnīyādityevaṃ manurabravīt |
pūjitaṃ tvaśanaṃ nityaṃ balamojaśca yacchati| | 38
apūjitaṃ tu tadbhuktamubhayaṃ nāśayedidam 6|
nocchiṣṭaṃ kasyaciddadyānnādyāccaitattathāntarā | | 39
yastvannamantarā kṛtvā lobhādatti nṛpottama |
vināśaṃ yāti sa nara iha loke paratra ca | |
yathābhavatpurā vaiśyo dhanavarddhanasaṃjñitaḥ | | 1.3.40
śatānīka uvāca
sa kathamantaraṃ pūrvamannasya dvijasattama |
kimantaraṃ tathānnasya kathaṃ vā tatkṛtaṃ bhavet | | 41
sumanturuvāca
purā kṛtayuge rājanvaiśyo vasati puṣkare |
dhanavardhananāmā vai samṛddhau dhanadhānyataḥ | | 42
nidāghakāle rājendra sa kṛtvā vaiśvadevikam |
saputrabhrātṛbhiḥ sārdhaṃ tathā vai mitrabandhubhiḥ | |
āhāraṃ kurute rājanbhakṣyabhojyasamanvitam 1 | | 43
atha tadbhuñjatastasya 2 annaṃ śabdo mahānabhūt |
karuṇaḥ kuruśārdūla atha taṃ sa pradhāvitaḥ | | 44
tyaktvā sa bhojanaṃ yāvanniṣkrānto gṛhabāhyataḥ |
atha śabdastirobhūtaḥ sa bhūyo gṛhamāgataḥ | | 45
tameva bhājanaṃ gṛhya 3 āhāraṃ kṛtavānnṛpa |
bhuktaśeṣaṃ mahābāho āhāraṃ sa tu bhuktavān | | 46
bhuktvā sa śatadhā jātastasminneva kṣaṇe nṛpa |
tasmādannaṃ na rājendra aśnīyādantarā kvacit | | 47
na caivātyaśanaṃ kuryānna cocchiṣṭaḥ kvacidvrajet |
raso bhavatyatyaśanādrasādrogaḥ pravartate | | 48
snānaṃ dānaṃ japo homaḥ pitṛdevābhipūjanam |
na bhavanti rase jāte narāṇāṃ bharatarṣabha | | 49
anārogyamanāyuṣyamasvargyaṃ cātibhojanam |
apuṇyaṃ lokavidviṣṭaṃ tasmāttatparivarjayet | | 1.3.50
yakṣabhūtapiśācānāṃ rakṣasāṃ ca nṛpottama |
gamyo bhavati vai vipra ucchiṣṭo nātra saṃśayaḥ | | 51 śucitvamāśrayettasmācchucitvānmodate diti? |
sukhena ceha ramate itīyaṃ vaidikī śrutiḥ | | 52
śatānīka uvāca
śucitāmiyātkathaṃ vipraḥ kathaṃ cāśucitāmiyāt |
etanme ihi viprendra kautukaṃ paramaṃ mama | | 53
sumanturuvāca
upaspṛśya śucirvipro bhavate bharatarṣabha |
vidhivatkuruśārdūla bhavedvidhiparo hyataḥ | | 54
śatānīka uvāca
upasparśavidhiṃ vipra kathaya tvaṃ mamākhilam |
śucitvamāpnuyādyena ācānto brāhmaṇo dvijaḥ | | 55
sumanturuvāca
sādhu pṛṣṭo.asmi rājendra śṛṇu vipro yathā bhavet |
śucirbharataśārdūla vidhinā yena vā vibho | | 56
prakṣālya hastau pādau ca prāṅmukhodaṅmukho.api vā |
upaviśya śucau deśe bāhuṃ kṛtvā ca dakṣiṇam | | 57
jānvantare mahābāho brahmasūtrasamanvitaḥ 1 |
susamau caraṇau kṛtvā tathā baddhaśikho nṛpa | | 58
na tiṣṭhanna ca saṃjalpaṃstathā cānavalokayan |
na tvarankupito vāpi tyaktvā rājansudūrataḥ | | 59
prasannābhistathādbhistu ācāntaḥ śucitāmiyāt |
noṣṇābhirna saphenābhiryuktābhiḥ kaluṣeṇa ca | | 1.3.60
varṇena rasagandhābhyāṃ hīnābhirna ca bhārata |
sabudbudābhiśca tathā nācāmetpaṇḍito nṛpa | | 61
pañcatīrthāni viprasya śrūyante dakṣiṇe kare |
devatīrthaṃ pitṛtīrthaṃ brahmatīrthaṃ ca mānada | | 62
prājāpatyaṃ tathā cānyattathānyatsaumyamucyate |
aṅguṣṭhamūlottarato yeyaṃ rekhā mahīpate | | 63
brāhmaṃ tīrthaṃ vadantyetadvasiṣṭhādyā dvijottamāḥ |
kāyaṃ kaniṣṭhikāmūle aṅgulyagre tu daivatam | | 64
tarjanyaṅguṣṭhayorantaḥ pitryaṃ tīrthamudāhṛtam |
karamadhye sthitaṃ saumyaṃ praśastaṃ devakarmaṇi | | 65
devārcābaliharaṇaṃ pravikṣapaṇameva ca |
etāni devatīrthena kuryātkurukulodvaha | | 66
annanirvapaṇaṃ rājaṃstathā sapavanaṃ 1 nṛpa |
lājāhomaṃ tathā saumyaṃ prājāpatyena kārayet | | 67
kamaṇḍalūpasparśanaṃ dadhiprāśanameva ca |
saumyatīrthena rājendra sadā kuryādvicakṣaṇaḥ | | 68
pitṛrṇāṃ tarpaṇaṃ kāryaṃ pitṛtīrthena dhīmatā |
brāhmeṇa cāpi tīrthena sadoṣasparśanaṃ param | | 69
ghanāṅgulikaraṃ kṛtvā ekāgraḥ sumanā dvijaḥ |
triḥ kṛtvā yaḥ pibedāpo mukhaśabdavivarjitaḥ | | 1.3.70
śṛṇu yatphalamāpnoti prīṇāti ca yathā surān |
prathamaṃ yatpibedāpa ṛgvedastena tṛpyati | | 71
yaddvitīyaṃ yajurvedastena prīṇāti bhārata |
yattṛtīyaṃ sāmavedastena prīṇāti bhārata | | 72
prathamaṃ yanmṛjedāsyaṃ dakṣiṇāṅguṣṭhamūlataḥ |
atharvavedaḥ prīṇāti tena rājannasaṃśayaḥ | | 73
itihāsapurāṇāni yaddvitīyaṃ pramārjati |
yanmūrdhānaṃ hi rājendra abhiṣiñcati vai dvijaḥ | | 74
tena prīṇāti vai rudraṃ śikhāmālabhya vai ṛṣīn |
yadakṣiṇī cālabhate raviḥ prīṇāti tena vai | | 75
nāsikālambhanādvāyuṃ prīṇātyeva na saṃśayaḥ |
yacchrotramālabhedvipro diśaḥ prīṇāti tena vai | | 76
yamaṃ kuberaṃ varuṇaṃ vāsavaṃ cāgnimeva ca |
yadbāhumanvālabhate etānprīṇāti tena 1 vai | | 77
yannābhimanvālabhate prāṇānāṃ granthimeva ca |
tena prīṇāti rājendra itīyaṃ vaidikī śrutiḥ | | 78
abhiṣiñcati yatpādau viṣṇuṃ prīṇāti tena vai |
yadbhūmyācchādakaṃ vāri visarjayati mānada | | 79
vāsukipramukhānnāgāṃstena prīṇāti bhārata |
yadbindavo.antare bhūmau patantīha narādhipa | | 1.3.80
bhūtagrāmaṃ tatastastu prīṇantīha caturvidham |
aṅguṣṭhena pradeśinyā labheta cākṣiṇī nṛpa | | 81
anāmikāṅguṣṭhikābhyāṃ nāsikāmālabhennṛpa |
madhyamāṅguṣṭhābhyāṃ mukhaṃ saṃspṛśedbharatarṣabha | | 82
kaniṣṭhikāṅguṣṭhakābhyāṃ karṇamālabhate nṛpa |
aṅgulībhistathā bāhumaṅguṣṭhena tu maṅgalam | | 83
nābhiṃ kurukulaśreṣṭha śiraḥ sarvābhireva ca |
aṅguṣṭhognirmahābāho prokto vāyuḥ pradeśinī | | 84
anāmikā tathā sūryaḥ kaniṣṭhā māghavā vibho |
prajāpatirmadhyamā jñeyā tasmādbharatasattama | | 85
evamācamya viprastu prīṇāti satataṃ jagat |
sarvāśca devatāstāta lokāṃścāpi na saṃśayaḥ | | 86
tasmātpūjyaḥ sadā vipraḥ sarvadevamayo hi saḥ |
brāhmeṇa vipratīrthena nityakālamupaspṛśet | | 87
kāyatraideśikābhyāṃ vā na pitryeṇa kadācana |
hṛdgābhiḥ pūyate vipraḥ kaṇṭhagābhistu bhūmipaḥ | | 88
vaiśyodbhiḥ prāśitābhistu śūdraḥ spṛṣṭābhirantataḥ |
uddhṛte dakṣiṇe pāṇāvupavītyucyate budhaḥ | | 89
savyena prācīnāvītī nivītī kaṇṭhasaṃjñite |
mekhalāmajinaṃ daṇḍamupavītaṃ kamaṇḍalum | | 1.3.90
astu prāsya vinaṣṭāni gṛhṇītānyāni mantravit |
upavītyācamennityamantarjānu mahīpate | | 91
evaṃ tu vipro hyācāntaḥ śucitāṃ yāti bhārata |
yāstvetāḥ karamadhye tu rekhā viprasya bhārata | | 92
gaṅgādyāḥ saritaḥ sarvā jñeyā bhāratasattama |
yānyaṅguliṣu parvāṇi girayastāni viddhi vai | | 93
sarvadevamayo rājankaro viprasya dakṣiṇaḥ |
hastopasparśanavidhistavākhyāto mahīpate | | 94
eṣu sarveṣu lokeṣu yenācānto divaṃ vrajet | | 95
iti śrībhaviṣye mahāpurāṇe śatārddhasāhasryāṃ saṃhitāyāṃ
brāhme parvaṇyupasparśanavidhivarṇanaṃ nāma tṛtīyo.adhyāyaḥ | 3 |

atha caturtho.adhyāyaḥ
praṇavārthasāvitrīmāhātmyopanayanavidhivarṇanañca
sumanturuvāca
keśāntaḥ ṣoḍaśe varṣe brāhmaṇasya vidhīyate |
rājanyabandhordvāviṃśe vaiśyasya tryadhike tataḥ | | 1
amantrikā sadā kāryā strīṇāṃ cūḍā mahīpate |
saṃskārahetoḥ kāyasya yathākālaṃ vibhāgaśaḥ | | 2
vaivāhiko vidhiḥ strīṇāṃ saṃskāro naigamaḥ smṛtaḥ |
nivasedvā gurorvāpi gṛhe vāgniparikriyā | | 3
eṣa te kathito rājannaupanāyaniko vidhiḥ |
dvijātīnāṃ mahābāho utpattivyañjakaḥ paraḥ | | 4
karmayogamidānīṃ te kathayāmi mahābala |
upanīya guruḥ śiṣyaṃ prathamaṃ śaucamādiśet | | 5
ācāramagnikāryaṃ ca sandhyopāsanameva ca |
adhyāpayettu sacchiṣyānsadācānta udaṅmukhaḥ | | 6
brahmāñjalikaro nityamadhyāpyo vijitendriyaḥ |
laghuvāsāstathaikāgraḥ sumanā supratiṣṭhitaḥ | | 7
brahmārambhe.avasāne ca pādau pūjyau guroḥ sadā |
saṃhatya hastāvadhyeyaṃ sa hi brahmāñjaliḥ smṛtaḥ | | 8
vyatyastapāṇinā kāryamupasaṅgrahaṇaṃ guroḥ |
savyena savyaḥ spraṣṭavyo dakṣiṇena tu dakṣiṇaḥ | | 9
adhyeṣyamāṇaṃ tu gururnityakālamatandritaḥ |
adhīṣva bho iti brūyādvirāmo.astviti vārayet | | 1.4.10
brahmaṇaḥ praṇavaṃ kuryādādāvante ca sarvadā |
sravatyanoṅkṛtaṃ pūrvaṃ parastācca viśīryate | | 11
śrūyatāṃ cāpi rājendra yathoṅkāraṃ dvijo.arhati |
prākkūlānparyupāsīnaḥ pavitraiścaiva pāvitaḥ | | 12
prāṇāyāmaistribhiḥ pūtastatastvoṅkāramarhati |
oṃkāralakṣaṇaṃ cāpi śṛṇuṣva kurunandana | | 13
akāraṃ cāpyukāraṃ ca makāraṃ ca prajāpatiḥ |
vedatrayāttu nirgṛhya bhūrbhuvaḥ svaritīti ca | | 14
tribhya eva tu vedebhyaḥ pādaṃpādamadūduhat |
tadityṛco.asyāḥ sāvitryāḥ parameṣṭhī prajāpatiḥ | | 15
etadakṣarametāṃ ca japanvyāhṛtipūrvikām |
sandhyayorubhayorvipro veda puṇyena yujyate | | 16
sahasrakṛtvastvabhyasya bahiretattrikaṃ dvijaḥ |
mahato.apyenaso māsāttvacevāhirvimucyate | | 17
etayarcā visaṃyuktaḥ kāle ca kriyayā svayā |
viprakṣatriyaviḍyonirgarhaṇāṃ yāti sādhuṣu | | 18
śṛṇuṣvaikamanā rājanparamaṃ brahmaṇo mukham |
oṃkārapūrvikāstisro mahāvyāhṛtayo.avyayāḥ | | 19
tripadā caiva sāvitrī vijñeyā brahmaṇo mukham |
yo.adhīte.ahanyahanyetāṃ trīṇi varṣāṇyatandritaḥ | | 1.4.20
sa brahma paramabhyeti vāyubhūtaḥ khamūrtimān |
ekākṣaraṃ paraṃ brahma prāṇāyāmaḥ parantapa | | 21
sāvitryāstu paraṃ nāsti maunātsatyaṃ viśiṣyate |
tapaḥ kiyā homakriyā tathā dānakriyā nṛpa | | 22
akṣayāntāḥ sadā rājanyathāha bhagavānmanuḥ |
avaraṃ svakṣaraṃ jñeyaṃ brahma caiva prajāpatiḥ | | 23
vidhiyajñātsadā rājañjapayajño viśiṣyate |
nānāvidhairguṇoddeśaiḥ sūkṣmākhyātairnṛpottama | | 24
pāṃśuḥ syāllakṣaguṇaḥ sahasro mānasaḥ smṛtaḥ |
ye pākayajñāścatvāro vidhiyajñena cānvitāḥ | | 25
sarve te japayajñasya kalāṃ nārhanti ṣoḍaśīm |
japādeva tu saṃsidhyeddbrāhmaṇo nātra saṃśayaḥ | | 26
kuryādanyanna vā kuryānmaitro brāhmaṇa ucyate |
pūrvāṃ sandhyāṃ japaṃstiṣṭhetsāvitrīmārkadarśanāt | | 27
paścimāṃ tu samāsīnaḥ samyagṛkṣavibhāvanāt |
dinasyādau bhavetpūrvā śarvaryādau tathā parā | | 28
sanakṣatrā parā jñeyā aparā sadivākarā |
japaṃstiṣṭhanparāṃ sandhyāṃ naiśameno vyapohati | | 29
aparāṃ tu samāsīno malaṃ hanti divākṛtam |
nopatiṣṭhati yaḥ pūrvāṃ nopāste paścimāṃ nṛpa | | 1.4.30
sa śūdravadbahiṣkāryaḥ sarvasmāddvijakarmaṇaḥ |
apāṃ samīpe niyato naityakaṃ vidhimāsthitaḥ | | 31
sāvitrīmapyadhīyīta gatyā.araṇyaṃ samāhitaḥ |
vedopakaraṇe rājansvādhyāye caiva naityake | | 32
nātra doṣostyanadhyāye homamantreṣu vā vibho |
naityake nāstvanadhyāyo brahmasatraṃ hi tatkṛtam | | 33
brahmāhutihutaṃ puṣyamanadhyāyavaṣaṭkṛtam |
ṛgekāṃ yastvadhīyīta vidhinā niyato dvijaḥ | | 34
tasya nityaṃ kṣaratyeṣā payo medhyaṃ ghṛtaṃ madhu |
agniśuśrūṣaṇaṃ bhaikṣamadhaḥ śayyāṃ gurorhitam | | 35
āsamāvartanātkuryātkṛtopanayano dvijaḥ |
ācāryaputraśuśrūṣāṃ jñānado dhārmikaḥ śuciḥ | | 36
āptaḥ śaktonnadaḥ sādhuḥ svādhyāpyā daśa dharmataḥ |
nāpṛṣṭaḥ kasyacidbrūyānna cānyāyena pṛcchataḥ | | 37
jānannapi hi medhāvī jaḍavalloka ācaret |
adharmeṇa ca yaḥ prāha yaścādharmeṇa pṛcchati | | 38
tayoranyataraḥ praiti vidveṣaṃ vā nigacchati |
dharmārthau yatra na syātāṃ śuśrūṣā cāpi tadvidhā | |
na tatra vidyā vaptavyā śubhaṃ bījamivoṣare | | 39
vidyayaiva samaṃ kāmaṃ martavyaṃ brahmavādinā |
āpadyapi hi ghorāyāṃ na tvenāmīriṇe vapet | |1.4.4 0
vidyā brāhmaṇamityāha śevadhiste.asmi rakṣa mām |
asūyakāya mā prādāstathā syāṃ vīryavattamā | |4 1
śevaṃ sukhamuśantīha kecijjñānaṃ pracakṣate |
tau dhārayati vai yasmācchevadhistena socyate | |42
yameva tu śuciṃ vidyānniyataṃ brahmacāriṇam |
tasmai māṃ brūhi viprāya nidhipāyāpramādine | |4 3
brahma yastvananujñātamadhīyānādavāpnuyāt | | 44
laukikaṃ vaidikaṃ vāpi tathādhyātmikameva ca |
sa yāti narakaṃ ghoraṃ rauravaṃ bhīmadarśanam | | 45
aṇumātrātmakaṃ dehaṃ ṣoḍaśārdhamiti smṛtam |
ādadīta yato jñānaṃ taṃ pūrvamabhivādayet | | 46
sāvitrīsāramātro.api varo vipraḥ suyantritaḥ |
nāyantritastrivedo.api sarvāśī sarvavikrayī | | 47
śayyāsanedhyācarite śreyasā na samāviśet |
śayyāsanasthaścaivenaṃ pratyutthāyābhivādayet | | 48
ūrdhvaṃ prāṇā hyutkrāmanti yūnaḥ sthavira āgate |
pratyutthānābhivādābhyāṃ punastānpratipadyate | | 49
abhivādanaśīlasya nityaṃ vṛddhopasevinaḥ |
catvāri samyagvardhante āyuḥ prajñā yaśo balam | | 1.4.50
abhivādaparo vipro jyāyāṃsamabhivādayet |
asau nāmāhamasmīti svanāma parikīrtayet | | 51
nāmadheyasya ye kecidabhivādaṃ na jānate |
tānprājño.ahamiti brūyātstriyaḥ sarvāstathaiva ca | | 52
bhoḥ śabdaṃ kīrtayedante svasya nāmnobhivādane |
nāmnaḥ svarūpabhāvo hi bho bhāva ṛṣibhiḥ smṛtaḥ | | 53
āyuṣmānbhava saumyeti vācyo vipro.abhivādane |
akāraścāsya nāmno.ante vācyaḥ pūrvākṣaraḥ plutaḥ | | 54
yo na vettyabhivādasya vipraḥ pratyabhivādanam |
nābhivādyaḥ sa viduṣā yathā śūdrastathaiva saḥ | | 55
abhivāde kṛte yastu na karotyabhivādanam |
āśīrvā kuruśārdūla sa yāti narakaṃ dhruvam | | 56
abhīti bhagavānviṣṇuà¤¾rvādayāmīti śaṅkaraḥ |
dvāveva pūjitau tena yaḥ karotyabhivādanam | | 57

bho bhavatpūrvakatvena iti svāyambhuvo.abravīt | 59
parapatnī tu yā rājannasambaddhā tu yonitaḥ |
vaktavyā bhavatītyevaṃ subhage bhaganīti ca | | 1.4.60 pitṛvyānmātulānrājañchvaśurānṛtvijo gurūn |

sampūjyā gurupatnī ca samāstā gurubhāryayā | | 62

putramitrabhāgineyā draṣṭavyā hyātmanā samāḥ | | 66
daśābdākhyaṃ paurasakhyaṃ pañcābdākhyaṃ kalābhṛtām |
abdapūrvaṃ śrotriyāṇāṃ svalpenāpi svayoniṣu | | 67

pitāputrau vijānīyādbrāhmaṇastu tayoḥ pitā | | 68
ityevaṃ kṣatriyapitā vaiśyasyāpi pitāmahaḥ |
prapitāmahaśca śūdrasya prokto vipro manīṣibhiḥ | | 69
vittaṃ bandhurvayaḥ karma vidyā bhavati pañcamī |
etāni mānyasthānāni garīyo yadyaduttaram | | 1.4.70
pañcānāṃ triṣu vargeṣu bhūyāṃsi guṇavanti ca |
yasya syuḥ so.atra mānārhaḥ śūdro.api daśamīṃ gataḥ | | 71
cakriṇo daśamīsthasya rogiṇo bhāriṇaḥ 1 striyāḥ |
snātakasya tu rājñaśca panthā deyo varasya ca | | 72

ābhyāṃ samāgame rājansnātako nṛpamānabhāk | | 73

sarahasyaṃ sakalpaṃ ca vedaṃ bharatasattama | |
tamācāryaṃ mahābāho pravadanti manīṣiṇaḥ | | 74
ekadeśaṃ tu vedasya vedāṅgānyapi vā punaḥ |
yo.adhyāpayati vṛttyarthamupādhyāyaḥ sa ucyate | | 75
niṣekādīni kāryāṇi yaḥ karoti nṛpottama |
adhyāpayati cānyena sa vipro gururucyate | | 76
agnyādheyaṃ pākayajñānagniṣṭomādikānmakhān |
yaḥ karoti vṛto yasya sa tasyartvigihocyate | | 77
ya āvṛṇotyavitathaṃ brahmaṇā śravaṇāvubhau |
sa mātā sa pitā jñeyastaṃ na druhyetkathañcana 1 | | 78
upādhyāyāndaśācāryaṃ ācāryāṇāṃ śataṃ pitā |
sahasreṇa piturmātā gauraveṇātiricyate | | 79
utpādakabrahmadātrorgarīyānbrahmadaḥ pitā |
brahmajanma hi viprasya pretya ceha ca śāśvatam | | 1.4.80
kāmānmātā pitā cainaṃ yadutpādayato mithaḥ |
sambhūtiṃ tasya tāṃ vidyādyadyonāvabhijāyate | | 81
ācāryastasya tāṃ jātiṃ vidhidvedapāragaḥ |
utpādayati sāvitryā sā satyā sā.ajarāmarā | | 82
upādhyāyamāditaḥ kṛtvā ye pūjyāḥ kathitāstava |
mahāgururmahābāho sarveṣāmadhikaḥ smṛtaḥ | | 83
sahasraśatasaṃkhyo.asāvācāryāṇāmidaṃ matam |
caturṇāmapi varṇānāṃ sa mahāgururucyate | | 84
śatānīka uvāca
ya ete bhavatā proktā upādhyāyamukhā dvijāḥ |
viditā eva me sarve na mahāgurureva hi | | 85
sumanturuvāca
jayopajīvī yo vipraḥ sa mahāgururucyate |
aṣṭādaśapurāṇāni rāmasya caritaṃ tathā | | 86
viṣṇudharmādayo dharmāḥ śivadharmāśca bhārata |
kārṣṇaṃ vedaṃ pañcamaṃ tu yanmahābhārataṃ smṛtam | | 87
śrautā 1 dharmāśca rājendra nāradoktā mahīpate |
jayeti nāma eteṣāṃ pravadanti manīṣiṇaḥ | | 88
evaṃ viprakadambasya dhārakaḥ pravaraḥ smṛtaḥ |
yastvetāni samastāni purāṇānīha vindati | | 89
bhārataṃ ca mahābāho sa sarvajño mato nṛṇām |
tasmātsa pūjyo rājendra varṇairviprādibhiḥ sadā | | 1.4.90
kiṃ tvayā na śrutaṃ vākyaṃ yadāha bhagavānvibhuḥ |
alpaṃ vā bahu vā yasya śrutasyopakaroti yaḥ | |
tamapīha guruṃ vidyācchrutopakriyayā tayā | | 91
brāhmasya janmanaḥ kartā svadharmasya ca śāsitā |
bālo.api vipro vṛddhasya pitā bhavati dharmataḥ 4 | | 92
adhyāpayāmāsa pitṛrñchiśurāṅgirasaḥ kaviḥ |
putrakā iti hovāca jñānena parigṛhya tām | | 93
te tamarthamapṛcchanta devānāgatamanyavaḥ |
devāścaitānsametyocurnyāyyaṃ vai śiśuruktavān | | 94
ajño bhavati vai bālaḥ pitā bhavati mantradaḥ |
ajñaṃ hi bālamityāhuḥ pitetyeva tu mantradam | | 95
pitāmaheti jayadamityūcuste divaukasaḥ |
jayo mantrāstathā vedā dehamekaṃ tridhā kṛtam | | 96
nahāyanairna palitairna mitreṇa na bandhubhiḥ |
ṛṣayaścakrire dharmaṃ yo.anūcānaḥ sa no mahān | | 97
brāhmaṇakṣatriyaviśāṃ śūdrāṇāṃ ca viśāṃpate |
jyeṣṭhaṃ vandanti rājendra sandehaṃ śṛṇu vai yathā | | 98
jñānato vīryato rājandhanato janmatastathā |
śīlatastu pradhānā ye te pradhānā matā mama | | 99
na tena sthaviro bhavati yenāsya palitaṃ śiraḥ |
yo vai yuvāpyadhīyānastaṃ devāḥ sthaviraṃ viduḥ | | 1.4.100
yathā kāṣṭhamayo hastī yathā carmamayo mṛgaḥ |
yaśca vipro.anadhīyānastrayaste nāma 1 bibhrati | | 101
yathā yoṣā.aphalā strīṣu yathā gaurgavi cāphalā |
yathā cājñe.aphalaṃ dānaṃ yathā vipro.anṛco.aphalaḥ | | 102
vaiśvadevena ye hīnā ātithyena vivarjitāḥ |

nānṛgbrāhmaṇo bhavati na vaṇiṅna kuśīlavaḥ |
na śūdraḥ preṣaṇaṃ kurvannasteno na cikitsakaḥ | | 104
avratā hyanadhīyānā yatra bhaikṣacarā dvijāḥ |
taṃ grāmaṃ daṇḍayedrājā corabhaktaprado hi saḥ | | 105
santuṣṭo yatra vai vipraḥ sāgnikaḥ kurunandana |
yāti sāphalyatāṃ vedairdevairevaṃ hi bhāṣitam | | 106
vedairuktaṃ yathā vīra surajyeṣṭhamupetya vai |
vepante brāhmaṇā bhūmāvabhyasyanti hyanagnikāḥ | |
kliśyante te kimarthaṃ hi mūḍhā vai phalakāmyayā | | 107
anuṣṭhānavihīnānāmasmānabhyasatāṃ bhuvi |
kleśo hi kevalaṃ deva nāsmadabhyasane phalam | | 108

ityevaṃ rājaśārdūla vedā ūcurhi vedhasam | |
tasmācca vedābhyasanādanuṣṭhānaṃ paraṃ matam | | 109
catvāro vā trayo vāpi yadbrūyurvedapāragāḥ |
sa dharma iti vijñeyo netareṣāṃ sahasraśaḥ | | 1.4.110
yadvadanti tamomūḍhā mūrkhā dharmamajānataḥ 1 |
tatpāpaṃ śatadhā bhūtvā vaktṛrnevānugacchati | | 111

gāyatrīmātrasāro.api brāhmaṇaḥ pūjyatāṃ gataḥ |

amṛtasyeva cākāṃkṣedapamānasya sarvadā | | 129
sukhaṃ hyavamataḥ śete sukhaṃ ca pratibudhyate |
sukhaṃ carati lokesminnavamantā vinaśyati | | 1.4.130
anena vidhinā rājansaṃskṛtātmā dvijaḥ śanaiḥ |
gurau vasansecinuyādbrahmādhigamidaṃ tapaḥ | | 131
tapoviśeṣairvividhairvrataiśca vividhoditaiḥ |
vedaḥ kṛtsnodhigantavyaḥ sarahasyo dvijanmanā | | 132
vedamevābhyasennityaṃ tapastapyaṃ dvijottamaḥ |
vedābhyāso hi viprasya tapaḥ paramihocyate | | 133
āhaiva sa nakhāgrebhyaḥ paramaṃ tapyate tapaḥ |
yaḥ supto.api dvijo.adhīte svādhyāyaṃ śaktito.anvaham | | 134
yo.anadhītya dvijo vedamanyatra kurute śramam |
sa jīvanneva śūdratvamāśu gacchati sānvayaḥ | | 135
na yasya vedo na japo na vidyāśca viśāmpate |
sa śūdra eva mantavya ityāha bhagavānvibhuḥ | | 136
māturagre ca jananaṃ dvitīyo mauñjibandhanam |
tṛtīyo yajñadīkṣāyāṃ dvijasya vidhirīritaḥ | | 137
tatra yadbrahma janmāsya mauñjībandhanacihnitam | | 138
tatrāsya mātā sāvitrī pitā tvācārya ucyate |
vedapradānāttvācāryaṃ pitaraṃ manurabravīt | | 139
na hyasya vidyate karma kiñcidāmauñjibandhanāt |
nābhivyāhārayedbrahama svadhāninayanādṛte 1 | | 1.4.140
śūdreṇa tu samaṃ tāvadyāvadvede na jāyate |
kṛtopanayanasyāsya vratādeśanamiṣyate | |
brahmaṇo grahaṇaṃ caiva krameṇa vidhipūrvakam | | 141
yatsūtraṃ cāpi yaccarma yā yā cāsya ca mekhalā |
vasanaṃ cāpi yo daṇḍastadvai tasya vrateṣvapi | | 142
sevetemāṃstu niyamānbrahmacārī gurau vasan |
sanniyamyendriyagrāmaṃ tapovṛddhyarthamātmanaḥ | | 143
vṛndārakarṣipitṛrṇāṃ kuryāttarpaṇameva hi |
narāṇāṃ ca mahābāho nityaṃ snātvā prayatnataḥ | | 144
puṣpaṃ toyaṃ phalaṃ cāpi samidādhānameva 3 ca |
nānāvidhāni kāṣṭhāni mṛttikāṃ ca tathā kuśān | | 145
varjayenmadhu māṃsaṃ ca gandhamālyarathānstriyaḥ |
śuklāni caiva sarvāṇi prāṇināṃ 1 caiva hiṃsanam | | 146
abhyaṅgamañjanaṃ cākṣṇorupānacchatradhāraṇam |
saṃkalpaṃ kāmajaṃ krodhaṃ lobhaṃ gītaṃ ca vādanam | | 147
nartanaṃ ca tathā dyūtaṃ janavādaṃ tathānṛtam |
parivādaṃ cāpi vibho dūrataḥ parivarjayet | | 148
strīṇāṃ ca prekṣaṇālambo rapavītaṃ parasya ca |
puṃścalībhistathā saṅgaṃ na kuryātkurunandana | | 149
ekaḥ śayīta sarvatra na retaḥ skandayetkvacit |
kāmāddhi skandayanreto hinasti vratameva tu | | 1.4.150
suptaḥ kṣaranbrahmacārī dvijaḥ śukramakāmataḥ |
snātvārkamarcayitvā tu punarmāmityṛcaṃ japet | | 151
manorapi tathā cātra śrūyate paramaṃ vacaḥ |
udakumbhaṃ sumanaso gośakṛnmṛttikāṃ kuśān | |
āharedyāvadarthānhi bhaikṣaṃ cāpi hi nityaśaḥ | | 152
gṛheṣu yeṣāṃ kartavyaṃ tāñchṛṇuṣva nṛpottama |
svakarmasu ratā ye vai tathā vedeṣu ye ratāḥ | |
yajñeṣu cāpi rājendra ye ca śraddhāsamāśritāḥ | | 153
brahmacāryā haredbhaikṣaṃ gṛhebhyaḥ prayato.anvaham |
guroḥ kule na bhikṣet svajñātikulabandhuṣu | | 154
alābhe tvanyagotrāṇāṃ pūrvaṃ pūrvaṃ vivarjayet |
sarvaṃ cāpi caredgrāmaṃ pūrvoktānāmasambhave | |
antyavarjaṃ mahābāho ityāha bhagavānvibhuḥ | | 155
vācaṃ niyamya prayatastvagniṃ śastraṃ ca varjayet |
cāturvarṇyaṃ caredbhaikṣamalābhe kurunandana | | 156
ārādāhṛtya samidhaḥ. sannidadhyād gṛhopari |
sāyaṃprātastu juhuyāttābhiragnimatandritaḥ | | 157
bhaikṣācaraṇamakṛtvā na tamagniṃ samidhya vai |
anāturaḥ saptarātramavakīrṇivrataṃ caret | | 158
vartanaṃ cāsya bhaikṣeṇa pravadanti manīṣiṇaḥ |
tasmādbhaikṣeṇa vai nityaṃ naikānnādī bhavedyatī | | 159
bhaikṣeṇa vratino vṛttirupavāsasamā smṛtā |
daivatye vratavadrājanpitrye karmaṇyatharṣivat | |
kāmamabhyarthito.aśnīyādvratamasya na lupyate | | 1.4.160
brāhmaṇasya mahābāho karma yatsamudāhṛtam |
rājanyavaiśyayornaitatpaṇḍitaiḥ kurunandana | | 161
codito.acodito 1 vāpi guruṇā nityameva hi |
kuryādadhyayane yogamācāryasya hiteṣu ca | | 162
buddhīndriyāṇi manasā śarīraṃ vācameva hi |
niyamya prāñjalistiṣṭhedvīkṣamāṇo gurormukham | | 163
nityamuddhṛtapāṇiḥ syātsādhvācārastu saṃyataḥ |
āsyatāmiti coktaḥ sannāsītābhimukhaṃ guroḥ | | 164
vastraveṣaistathānnaistu hīnaḥ syādgurusannidhau |
uttiṣṭhetprathamaṃ cāsya jaghanyaṃ cāpi saṃviśet | | 165
pratiśravaṇasambhāṣe talpastho na samācaret |
na cāsīno na bhuñjāno na tiṣṭhanna parāṅmukhaḥ | | 166
āsīnasya sthitaḥ kuryādabhigacchaṃśca tiṣṭhataḥ |
pratyudgantā tu vrajataḥ paścāddhāvaṃśca dhāvataḥ | | 167
parāṅmukhasyābhimukho dūrasthasyaitya cāntikam |
namaskṛtya śayānasya nideśe tiṣṭhetsarvadā | | 168
nīcaṃ śayyāsanaṃ cāsya sarvadā gurusannidhau |
gurośca cakṣurviṣaye na yatheṣṭāsano bhavet | | 169
nāmoccāraṇamevāsya parokṣamapi suvrata |
na cainamanukurvīta gatibhāṣaṇaceṣṭitaiḥ | | 1.4.170
parīvādastathā nindā guroryatra pravartate |
karṇau tatra pidhātavyo gantavyaṃ vā tato.anyataḥ | | 171
parīvādādrāsabhaḥ syātsārameyastu nindakaḥ |
paribhoktā kṛmirbhavati kīṭo bhavati matsarī | | 172
dūrastho nārcayedenaṃ na kruddho nāntike striyāḥ |
yānāsanagato rājannavaruhyābhivādayet | | 173
pratikūle samāne tu nāsīta guruṇā saha |
aśṛṇvaṃti gurau rājanna kiñcidapi kīrtayet | | 174
gośvoṣṭrayānaprāsādaprastareṣu kaṭeṣu ca |
āsīta guruṇā sārdhaṃ śilāphalaka nauṣu ca || 175
gurorgurau sannihite guruvadvṛttimācaret |
guruputreṣu cāryeṣu guroścaiva svabandhuṣu || 176
bālaḥ samānajanmā vā viśiṣṭo yajñakarmaṇi |
adhyāpayangurusuto guruvanmānamarhati || 177
utsādanamathāṅgānāṃ snāpanocchiṣṭabhojane |
pādayornejana rājanguruputreṣu varjayet || 178
guruvatpratipūjyāstu savarṇā guruyoṣitaḥ |
asavarṇāstu sampūjyāḥ pratyutthānābhivādanaiḥ || 179
abhyañjanaṃ sa snapanaṃ gātrotsādanameva ca |
gurupatnyā na kāryāṇi keśānāṃ ca prasādhanam || 1.4.180
gurupatnīṃ tu yuvatīṃ nābhivādeta pādayoḥ |
pūrṇaviṃśativarṣeṇa guṇadoṣau vijānatā || 181
svabhāva eva nārīṇāṃ narāṇāmiha dūṣaṇam |
atorthānna pramādyanti pratipādya vipaścitaḥ || 182
avidvāṃsamalaṃ loke vidvāṃsamapi vā punaḥ |
pramadā hyutpathaṃ netuṃ kāmakrodhavaśānugam || 183
mātrā svasrā duhitrā vā na viviktāsano bhavet |
balavānindriyagrāmo vidvāṃsamapi karṣati || 184
rājendra gurupatnīnāṃ yuvatīnāṃ yuvā bhuvi |
vidhivadvandanaṃ kuryādasāvahamiti bruvan || 185
vipro.asya pādagrahaṇamanvahaṃ cābhivādanam |
gurudāreṣu kurvīta satāṃ dharmamanusmaran || 186
yathā khanankhanitreṇa jalamāpnoti mānavaḥ |
tathā gurugatāṃ vidyāṃ śuśrūṣuradhigacchati || 187
muṇḍo vā jaṭilo vā syādatha vā syācchikhī jaṭī |
nainaṃ grāme.abhinimlocedarko nābhyudiyātkvacit || 188
taṃ cedabhyudiyātsūryaḥ śayānaṃ kāmakārataḥ | nimlocedvāpyabhijñānājjapannupavaseddinam || 189
sūryeṇa hyabhinirmuktaḥ śayānobhyuditaśca yaḥ |
prāyaścittamakurvāṇo yuktaḥ syānmahatainasā || 1.4.190
upaspṛśya mahārāja ubhe sandhye samāhitaḥ |
śucau deśe japañjapyamupāsīta yathāvidhi || 191
yadi strī yadyavarajaḥ śreyaḥ kiñcitsamācaret |
tatsarvamācaredyukto yatra vā ramate manaḥ || 192
dharmārthāvucyate śreyaḥ kāmārthau dharmameva ca |
artha eveha vā śreyastrivarga iti saṃsthitiḥ || 193
pitā mātā tathā bhrātā ācāryāḥ kurunandana |
nārtenāpyavamantavyā brāhmaṇena viśeṣataḥ || 194
ācāryo brahmaṇo mūrtiḥ pitā mūrtiḥ prajāpateḥ |
mātāpyathāditermūrtirbhrātā syānmūrtirātmanaḥ || 195
yanmātā pitarau kleśaṃ sahete sambhave nṛṇām |
na tasya niṣkṛtiḥ śakyā kartuṃ varṣaśatairapi | | 196
tayornityaṃ priyaṃ kuryādācāryasya ca bhārata |
teṣu hi triṣu tuṣṭeṣu tapaḥ sarvaṃ samāpyate | | 197
teṣāṃ trayāṇāṃ śuśrūṣā paramaṃ tapa ucyate |
na tairanabhyanujñāto dharmamanyaṃ samācaret | | 198
ta eva hi trayo lokāsta eva traya āśramāḥ 1 |
ta eva ca trayo vedāsta evoktāstrayo.agnayaḥ | | 199
mātā vai gārhapatyāgniḥ pitā vai dakṣiṇaḥ smṛtaḥ |
gururāhavanīyaśca sāgnitretā garīyasī | | 1.4.200
triṣu tuṣṭeṣu caiteṣu trīṃllokāñjayate gṛhī |
dīpyamānaḥ svavapuṣā devavaddivi modate | | 201
imaṃ lokaṃ pitṛbhaktyā mātṛbhaktyā tu madhyamam |
guruśuśrūṣayā caiva gacchecchakrasalokatām | | 202
sarve tenādṛtā dharmā yasyaite traya ādṛtāḥ |
anādṛtāstu yenaite sarvāstasyāphalāḥ ||203
yāvattrayaste jīveyustāvannānyatsamācaret|

tattannivedayettebhyo manovacanakarmabhiḥ | | 205

eṣa dharmaḥ paraḥ sākṣādupadharmo.anya ucyate | | 206
śraddhadhānaḥ śubhāṃ vidyāmādadītāvarādapi |
antyādapi paraṃ dharmaṃ strīratnaṃ duṣkulādapi | | 207
viṣādapyamṛtaṃ grāhyaṃ bālādapi subhāṣitam |
amitrādapi sadvṛttamamedhyādapi kāñcanam | | 208
striyo ratnaṃ nayo vidyā dharmaḥ śaucaṃ subhāṣitam |
vividhāni ca śilpāni samādeyāni sarvaśaḥ | | 209
abrāhmaṇādadhyayanamāpatkāle vidhīyate |
anuvrajyā ca śuśrūṣā yāvadadhyayanaṃ guroḥ | | 1.4.210
nābrāhmaṇe gurau śiṣyo vāsamātyantikaṃ vaset |
brāhmaṇe cānanūcāne kāñkṣangatimanuttamām | | 211
yadi tvātyantiko vāso rocate ca guroḥ kule |
yuktaḥ paricaredenamāśarīravimokṣaṇāt | | 212
ā samāpteḥ śarīrasya yastu śuśrūṣate gurum |
sa gacchatyañjasā vipro brāhmaṇaḥ sadya śāśvatam | | 213
na pūrvaṃ gurave kiñcidupakurvīta dharmavit |

dhānyaṃ vāsāṃsi śākaṃ vā gurave prītamāharet | | 215
svargate gāṃ parityajya gurau bharatasattama |
guṇānvite gurusute gurudāre.atha vā nṛpa | |
sapiṇḍe vā guroścāpi guruvadvṛttimācaret | | 216
eteṣvavidyamāneṣu sthānāsanavihāravān |
prayuñjāno.agniśuśrūṣāṃ sādhayeddehamātsanaḥ | |
vīrasya kurvañchuśrūṣāṃ yāti vīrasalokatām | | 217
caratyevaṃ hi yo vipro brahmacaryamaviplutaḥ |
sa gatvā brahmasadanaṃ brahmaṇā saha modate | | 218

gṛhasthasyāpi rājendra śṛṇu dharmamaśeṣataḥ | | 219
kāle prāpya vrataṃ vipra ṛtuyogena bhārata |
prapālayanvrataṃ yāti brahmasālokyatāṃ vibho | | 1.4.220
sadopanayanaṃ śastaṃ vasante brāhmaṇasya tu |
kṣatriyasya tato grīṣme praśastaṃ manurabravīt | | 221
prāpte śaradi vaiśyasya sadopanayanaṃ param |
ityeṣa trividhaḥ kālaḥ kathito vratayojane | | 222
iti śrībhaviṣye mahāpurāṇe śatārddhasāhasryāṃ saṃhitāyāṃ brāhme parvaṇi
upanayanavidhivarṇanaṃ nāma caturtho.adhyāyaḥ | 4 |
atha pañcamo.adhyāyaḥ
strīṇāṃ śubhāśubhalakṣaṇavarṇanam
sumanturuvāca
ṣaṭtriṃśadābdikaṃ caryaṃ gurau traivedikaṃ vratam |
tadardhikaṃ pādikaṃ vā grahaṇāntikameva ca | | 1
vedānadhītya vedau vā vedaṃ vāpi nṛpottama |
aviplutabrahmacaryo gṛhasthāśramamāvaset | | 2
taṃ pratītaṃ svadharmeṇa brahmadāyaharaṃ pituḥ |
sragviṇaṃ talpa 1 āsīnamarhayetprathamaṃ gavā | | 3
guruṇā samanujñātaḥ samāvṛttau yathāvidhi |
udvaheta dvijo bhāryāṃ savarṇāṃ lakṣaṇānvitām | | 4
śatānīka uvāca
lakṣaṇaṃ dvijaśārdūla strīṇāṃ vada mahāmune |
kīdṛglakṣaṇasaṃyuktā 1 kanyā syātsukhadā nṛpa | | 5
sumanturuvāca
yaduktaṃ brāhmaṇā pūrvaṃ strīlakṣaṇamanuttamam |
śreyase sarvalokānāṃ śubhāśubhaphalapradam | | 6
tatte vacmi mahābāho śṛṇuṣvaikamanā nṛpa |
śrutena yena jānīṣe kanyāṃ śobhanalakṣaṇām | | 7
sukhāsīnaṃ suraśreṣṭhamabhigamya maharṣayaḥ |
papracchurlakṣaṇaṃ strīṇāṃ yatpṛṣṭo.ahaṃ tvayādhunā | | 8
praṇamya śirasā devamidaṃ vacanamabruvan |
bhagavanbrūhi naḥ sarvaṃ strīṇāṃ lakṣaṇamuttamam | | 9
śreyase sarvalokānāṃ śubhāśubhaphalapradam |
praśastāmapraśāstāṃ ca jānīmo yena kanyakām | | 1.5.10
teṣāṃ tadvacanaṃ śrutvā viriñco vākyamabravīt |
śṛṇudhvaṃ dvijaśārdūlā vacmi yuṣmāsvaśeṣataḥ | | 11
pratiṣṭhitatalau samyagratāmbhojasamaprabhau |
īdṛśau caraṇau dhanyau yoṣitāṃ bhogavardhanau | | 12
karālairatinirmāsai rūkṣairardhaśirānvitaiḥ |
dāridryaṃ durbhagatvaṃ ca prāpnuvanti na saṃśayaḥ | | 13
aṅgulyaḥ saṃhatā vṛttāḥ snig(?)dhāḥ sūkṣmanakhāstathā |
kurvantyatyantamaiśvaryaṃ rājabhāvaṃ ca yoṣitaḥ | | 14
hrasvāḥ sujīvitaṃ hrasvā viralā vittahānaye |
dāridryaṃ mūlamagnāsu preṣyaṃ ca pṛthulāsu ca | | 15
parasparasamārūḍhaistanubhirvṛttaparvabhiḥ |
bahūnapi patīnhatvā dāsī bhavati vai dvijāḥ | | 16
aṅguṣṭhonnataparvāṇastuṅgāgrāḥ komalānvitāḥ |
ratnakāñcanalābhāya viparītā vipattaye | | 17
subhagatvaṃ nakhaiḥ snigdhairātāmraiśca dhanād yatā |
putrāḥ syurunnatairebhiḥ susūkṣmaiścāpi rājatā | | 18
pāṇḍuraiḥ sphuṭitai rūkṣairnīlairdhūmraistathā kharaiḥ 1 |
niḥsvatā bhavati strīṇāṃ pītaiścābhakṣyabhakṣaṇam | | 19
gulphāḥ snigdhāśca vṛttāśca samārūḍhaśirāstathā |
yadi syurnūpurāndadhyurbāndhavādyaiḥ samāpnuyuḥ | | 1.5.20
aśirā śarakāṇḍābhāḥ suvṛttālpatanūruhāḥ |
jaṅghā kurvanti saubhāgyaṃ yānaṃ ca gajavājibhiḥ | | 21
kliśyate romajaṅghā strī bhramatyuddhatapiṇḍikā |
kākajaṅghā patiṃ hanti vācāṭā kapilā ca yāḥ | | 22
jānubhiścaiva mārjārasiṃhajānvanukāribhiḥ |
śriyamāpya subhāgyatvaṃ prāpnuvanti sutāṃstathā | | 23
ghaṭābhairadhvagā nāryo nirmāṃsaiḥ kulaṭā striyaḥ |
śirālairapi hiṃsrāḥ syurviśliṣṭairdhanavarjitāḥ | | 24
atyantakuṭilai rūkṣaiḥ sphuṭitāgrairguḍaprabhaiḥ |
anekajaistathā romaiḥ keśaiścāpi tathāvidhaiḥ | | 25
atyantapiṅgalā nārī viṣatulyeti niścitam |
saptāhābhyantare pāpā patiṃ hanyānna saṃśayaḥ | | 26
hastihastanibhairvṛtai rambhābhaiḥ karabhopamaiḥ |
prāpnuvantyūrubhiḥ śaśvatstriyaḥ sukhamanaṅgajam | | 27
daurbhāgyaṃ baddhamāṃsaiśca bandhanaṃ romaśorubhiḥ |
tanubhirvadhamityāhurmadhyacchidreṣvanīśatā | | 28
sandhyāvarṇaṃ samaṃ cāru sūkṣmaromānvitaṃ pṛthu |
jaghanaṃ śasyate strīṇāṃ ratisaukhyakaraṃ dvija | | 29
aromako bhago yasyāḥ samaḥ suśliṣṭasaṃsthitaḥ |
api nīcakulotpanna rājapatnī bhavatyasau | | 1.5.30
aśvatthapatrasadṛśaḥ kūrmapṛṣṭhonnatastathā |
śaśibimbanibhaścāpi tathaiva kalaśākṛtiḥ | |
bhagaḥ śastatamaḥ strīṇāṃ ratisaubhāgyavardhanaḥ | | 31
tilapuṣpanibho yaśca yadyagre khurasannibhaḥ |
dvāvapyetau parapreṣyaṃ kurvāte ca daridratām | | 32
ulūkhalanibhaiḥ śokaṃ maraṇaṃ vivṛtānanaiḥ |
virūpaiḥ pūtinirmāṃsairgajasannibharomabhiḥ | |
dauḥśīlyaṃ durbhagatvaṃ ca dāridryamadhigacchati | | 33
kapitthaphalasaṃkāśaḥ pīno valivivarjitaḥ |
sphītāḥ praśasyate strīṇāṃ ninditabhrānyathā dvijāḥ | | 34 payodharabharānamrapracalattrivalīguruḥ |
madhyaḥ śubhāvahaḥ strīṇāṃ romarājīvibhūṣitaḥ | | 35
paṇavābhairmṛdaṅgābhaistathā madhye yavopamaiḥ |
prāpnuvanti bhayāvāsakleśadauḥśīlyamīdṛśaiḥ | | 36
avakrānulbaṇaṃ pṛṣṭhamaromaśamagarhitam |
nānāstaraṇaparyaṅkaratisaukhyakaraṃ param | | 37
kubjamadroṇikaṃ pṛṣṭhaṃ romaśaṃ yadi yoṣitaḥ |
svapnāntare sukhaṃ tasyā nāsti hanyātpatiṃ ca sā | | 38
vipulaiḥ sukumāraiśca kukṣibhiḥ subahuprajāḥ |
maṇḍūkakukṣiryā nārī rājānaṃ sā prasūyate | | 39
unnatairbalibhirvadhyāḥ suvṛttaiḥ kulaṭā striyaḥ |
jārakarmaratāstāḥ syuḥ pravrajyāṃ ca samāpnuyuḥ | | 1.5.40
unnatā ca nataiḥ kṣudrā viṣamairviṣamāśayā |
āyuraiśvaryasampannā vanitā hṛdayaiḥ samaiḥ | | 41
suvṛttamunnataṃ pīnamadūronnatamāyatam |
stanayugmamidaṃ śastamato.anyadasukhāvaham | | 42
unnatiḥ prathame garbhe dvayorekasya bhūyasī |
vāme tu jāyate kanyā dakṣiṇe tu bhavetsutaḥ | | 43
dīrghe tu cūcuke yasyāḥ sā strī dhūrtā ratipriyā |
suvṛtte tu punaryasyā dveṣṭi sā puruṣaṃ sadā | | 44
stanaiḥ sarpaphaṇākāraiḥ śvajihvākṛtibhistathā |
dāridryamadhigacchanti striyaḥ puruṣaceṣṭitāḥ | |
avaṣṭabdhaghaṭītulyā bhavanti hi tathā dvijāḥ | | 45
susamaṃ māṃsalaṃ cāru śiro romavivarjitam |
vakṣo yasyā bhavennāryā bhogānbhukte yathepsitān | | 46
hiṃsrā bhavati vakreṇa dauḥśīlyaṃ romaśena tu |
nirmāṃsena tu vaidhavyaṃ vistīrṇe kalahapriyā | | 47
catasro raktagambhīrā rekhāḥ snigdhāḥ kare striyāḥ |
yadi syuḥ sukhamāpnoti vicchinnābhiranīśatā | | 48
rekhāḥ kaniṣṭhikāmūlādyasyāḥ prāptāḥ pradeśinīm |
śatamāyurbhavettasyāstrayāṇāmunnatau kramāt | | 49
saṃvṛttāḥ samaparvāṇastīkṣṇāgrāḥ komalatvacaḥ |
samā hyaṃgulayo yasyāḥ sā nārī bhogavardhinī | | 1.5.50 bandhujīvāruṇaistuṃgairnakhairaiśvaryamāpnuyāt |
kharairvakrairvivarṇābhaiḥ śvetaprītairanīśatā | | 51
raktairmṛdubhiraiśvaryaṃ niśchidrāṅgulibhirdvijāḥ |
sphuṭitairviṣamai rūkṣaiḥ kleśaṃ pāṇibhirāpnuyuḥ | | 52
samarekhā yavā yāsāṅguṣṭhāṅguliparvasu |
tāsāṃ hi vipulaṃ saukhyaṃ dhanaṃ dhānyaṃ tathā.akṣayam | | 53
maṇibandho.avyavacchinno rekhātrayavibhūṣitaḥ |
dadāti na cirādeva bhogamāyustathākṣayam | | 54 śrīvatsadhvajapadmākṣagajavājiniveśanaiḥ |
cakrasvastikavajrāsipūrṇakumbhanibhāṅkuśaiḥ | | 55
prāsādacchatramukuṭairhārakeyūrakuṇḍalaiḥ |
śaṅkhatoraṇanirvyūhairhastanyastairnṛpastriyaḥ | | 56
yasyāḥ pāṇitale raktā yūpakumbhāśca kuṇḍikāḥ |
dṛśyante caraṇe yasyā yajñapalī bhavatyasau | | 57
vīthyāpaṇatulāmānaistathā mudrādibhiḥ striyaḥ |
bhavanti vaṇijāṃ patnyo ratnakāñcanaśālinām | | 58 dātrayoktrayugābandhaphalolūkhalalāṅgalaiḥ |
bhavanti dhanadhānyāḍhyā kṛṣīvalajanāṅganāḥ | 59
anunnataśirāsandhi pīnaṃ romavivarjitam |
gopucchākṛti nārīṇāṃ bhujayoryugulaṃ śubham | | 1.5.60
nigūḍhagranthayo yasyāḥ kūrparau romavarjitau |
bāhū vai lalitau yasyāḥ praśastau vṛttakomalau | | 61
unnatāvanatau caiva nātisthūlau na romaśau |
sukhadau tu sadā strīṇāṃ saubhāgyārogyavardhanau | | 62
sthūle skandhe vahedbhāraṃ romaśe vyādhitā bhavet |
vakraskandhe bhavedvandhyā kulaṭā connatānane | | 63
spaṣṭaṃ rekhātrayaṃ yasyā grīvāyāṃ caturaṅgulam |
maṇikāñcanamuktāḍhyaṃ sā dadhāti vibhūṣaṇam | | 64
adhanā strī kṛśagrīvā dīrghagrīvā ca .bandhakī |
hasvagrīvā mṛtāpatyā sthūlagrīvā ca duḥkhitā | | 65
anunnatā samāṃsā ca samā yasyāḥ kṛkāṭikā |
sudīrghamāyustvasyāstu ciraṃ bhartā ca jīvati | | 66
nirmāṃsā bahumāṃsā ca śirālā romaśā tathā |
kuṭilā vikaṭā caiva vistīrṇā na ca śasyate | | 67
na sthūlo na kṛśo.atyarthaṃ na vakro na ca romaśaḥ |
hanurevaṃvidhaḥ śreyāṃstato.anyo na praśasyate | | 68
caturasramukhī dhūrtā maṇḍalāsyā śivā 1 bhavet |
aprajā vājivakrā strī mahāvakrā ca durbhagā | | 69
śvavarāhavṛkolūkamarkaṭāsyāśca yāḥ striyaḥ |
kūrāstāḥ pāpakarmiṇyaḥ prajābāndhavavarjitāḥ | | 1.5.70 mālatībakulāmbhojanīlotpalasugandhi yat |
vadanaṃ mucyate naitatpānatāmbūlabhojanaiḥ | | 71
tāmrābhaḥ kiñcidālambhaḥ sthaulyakārśyavivarjitaḥ |
adharo yadi tuṅgaśca nārīṇāṃ bhojadaḥ sadā | | 72
sthūle kalahaśīlā syādvivarṇe cātiduḥkhitā |
uttaroṣṭhena tīkṣṇena vanitā cātikopanā | | 73
jihvā tanutarā vakrā tāmrā dīrghā ca śasyate |
sthūlā hrasvā vivarṇā yā vakrā bhinnā ca ninditā | | 74
śaṅkhakundendudhavalaṃ snigdhaistuṅgairasandhibhiḥ |
miṣṭānnapānamāpnoti dantairebhiranunnataiḥ | | 75
sūkṣmairatikṛśairhrasvaiḥ sphuṭitairviralaistathā |
rūkṣaśca duḥkhitā nityaṃ vikaṭairbhāminī bhavet | | 76 sumṛṣṭadarpaṇāmbhojapūrṇabimbendusannibham |
vadanaṃ varanārīṇāmabhīṣṭaphaladaṃ smṛtam | | 77
na sthūlā na kṛśā vakrā nātidīrghā samunnatā |
īdṛśī nāsikā yasyāḥ sā dhanyā tu śubhaṅkarī | | 78
unnatā mṛdulā yā ca rekhā śuddhā na saṅgantā |
bhrūrvakratulyā sūkṣmā ca yoṣitāṃ sā sukhāvahā | | 79
dhanustulyābhiḥ saubhāgyaṃ vandhyā syāddīrgharomabhiḥ |
piṅgalāsaṅgatā hrasvā dāridryāya na saṃśayaḥ | | 1.5.80 nīlotpaladalaprakhyairātāmraiścārupakṣmabhiḥ |
vanitā nayanairebhirbhogasaubhāgyabhāginī | | 81
khañjanākṣī mṛgākṣī ca varāhākṣī varāṅganā |
yatrayatra samutpannā mahāntaṃ bhogamaśnute | | 82
agambhīrairasaṃśliṣṭairbahurekhāvibhūṣitaiḥ |
rājapantyo bhavantīha nayanairmadhupiṅgalaiḥ | | 83
vāyasākṛtinetrāṇi dīrghāpāṅgāni yoṣitām |
anāvilāni cārūṇi bhavanti hi vibhūtaye | | 84
gambhīraiḥ piṅgalaiścaiva duḥkhitāḥ syuścirāyuṣaḥ |
vayomadhye tyajetprāṇānunnatākṣī tu yāṅganā | | 85
raktākṣī viṣamākṣī ca dhūmrākṣī pretalocanā |
varjanīyā sadā nārī śvanetrā caiva dūrataḥ | | 86
udbhrāntakaiḥ karaiścitrairnayanastvaṃganāstviha |
madyamāṃsapriyā nityaṃ capalāścaiva sarvataḥ | | 87
karālākṛtayaḥ karṇā nabhaḥśabdāstu saṃsthitāḥ |
vahanti vikasatkāntiṃ hemaratnavibhūṣaṇam | | 88
kharoṣṭranakulolūkakapilaśravaṇāḥ striyaḥ |
prāpnuvanti mahadduḥkhaṃ prāyaśaḥ pravrajanti ca | | 89
īṣadāpāṇḍugaṇḍā yā suvṛttā parvaṇi tviha |
praśastā ninditā tvanyā romakūpakadūṣitā | | 1.5.90
ardhendupratimābhogamaroma tu samāhitama |
bhogārogyakaraṃ śreṣṭhaṃ lalāṭaṃ varayoṣitām | | 91
dviguṇaṃ pariṇāhena lalāṭaṃ vihitaṃ ca yat |
śiraḥ praśastaṃ nārīṇāmadhanyā hastimastakā | | 92
sūkṣmāḥ kṛṣṇā mṛdusnigdhāḥ kuñjitāgrāḥ śiroruhāḥ |
bhavanti śreyase strīṇāmanye syuḥ kleśaśokadāḥ | | 93 haṃsakokilavīṇāliśikhiveṇusvarāḥ striyaḥ |
prāpnuvanti bahūnbhogānbhṛtyānājñāpayanti ca | | 94
bhinnakāṃsyasvarā nārī kharakākasvarā ca yā |
rogaṃ vyādhiṃ bhayaṃ śokaṃ dāridryaṃ cādhigacchati | | 95 haṃsagovṛṣacakrāhvamattamātaṅgagāminī |
svakulaṃ dyotayennārī mahiṣī pārthivasya ca | | 96
śvaśṛgālagatirnindyā yā ca vāyasavadvrajet |
dāsī mṛgagatirnārī drutagāmī ca bandhakī | | 97
phalinī rocanā hemakuṅkumaprabha eva ca |
varṇaḥ śubhakaraḥ strīṇāṃ yaśca dūrvāṅkuropamaḥ | | 98
mṛdūni mṛduromāṇi nātyantasvedakāni ca |
surabhīṇi ca gātrāṇi yāsāṃ tāḥ pūjitāḥ striyaḥ | | 99
nodvahetkapilāṃ kanyāṃ nādhikāṅgīṃ na rogiṇīm |
nālomikāṃ nātihrasvāṃ na vācāṭāṃ na piṅgalām | | 1.5.100
narkṣavṛkṣanadīnāmnīṃ nāntyaparvatanāmikām |
na pakṣyahipreṣyanāmnīṃ na ca bhīṣaṇanāmikām | | 101
avyaṅgāṅgīṃ saumyanāmnīṃ haṃsavāraṇagāminīm |
tanulomakeśadaśanāṃ mṛdaṅgīmudvahetstriyam | | 102
mahāntyapi samṛddhāni gojāvidhanadhānyataḥ |
strīsambandhe daśaitāni kulāni parivarjayet | | 103
hīnakriyaṃ niṣpuruṣaṃ niśchandoromaśārśasam |
kṣayāmayāvyapasmāriśvitrakuṣṭhikulāni ca | | 104
pādau sugulphau prathamaṃ pratiṣṭhau jaṅghe dvitīyaṃ ca sujānucakre |
meḍhroruguhyaṃ ca tatastṛtīyaṃ nābhiḥ kaṭiśceti caturthamāhuḥ | | 105
udaraṃ kathayanti pañcamaṃ hṛdayaṃ ṣaṣṭhamatha stanānvitam |
atha saptamamaṃsajatruṇī kathayantyaṣṭamamoṣṭhakandhare | | 106
navamaṃ nayane ca sabhruṇī salalāṭaṃ daśamaṃ śirastathā |
aśubheṣvaśubhaṃ daśāphalaṃ caraṇaṃ caraṇādyaśubheṣu śobhanam | | 107
idaṃ mahātmā sa mahānubhāvaḥ śacīnimittaṃ gururabravīddvijāḥ |
śakreṇa pṛṣṭaḥ saviśeṣamuttamaṃ saṃlakṣyamuktaṃ varayoṣalakṣaṇam 1 | | 108
matsakāśātpunaḥ śrutvā lakṣaṇaṃ puruṣasya ca |
yathādhunā bhavadbhistu śrutaṃ matto dvijottamāḥ | | 109
lakṣaṇebhyaḥ praśastaṃ tu strīṇāṃ sadvṛttamucyate |
sadvṛttamuktvā yā strī sā praśastā na ca lakṣaṇaiḥ | | 1.5.110
īdṛglakṣaṇasampannāṃ sukanyāmudvahettu yaḥ |
ṛddhirvṛddhistathā kīrtistatra tiṣṭhati nityaśaḥ | | 111
iti śrībhaviṣye mahāpurāṇe śatārddhasāhasryāṃ saṃhitāyāṃ brāhme parvaṇi strīlakṣaṇavarṇanaṃ
nāma pañcamo.adhyāyaḥ | 5 |

atha ṣaṣṭho.adhyāyaḥ
strīlakṣaṇasadvṛttavarṇanam
śatānīka_uvāca
sadvṛttaṃ śrotumicchāmi devastrīṇāṃ suvistarāt |
uttamādhamamadhyaṃ ca sambandhe strīkṛte yathā | | 1
sumanturuvāca
śatānīka mahābāho brahmaloke pitāmahaḥ |
uktvā sa lakṣaṇaṃ strīṇāṃ sadvṛttaṃ coktavānpunaḥ 1 | | 2
yathoktaṃ brahmaṇāṃ teṣāmṛṣīṇāṃ kurunandana |
sa preyo vacanaṃ śrutvā brahmā vacanamabravīt | | 3
śṛṇudhvaṃ dvijaśārdūlāḥ strīṇāṃ sadvṛttamāditaḥ |
vakṣye yuṣmānaśeṣaṃ vai lokānugrahakāmyayā | | 4
trivargaprāptaye vakṣye strīvṛttaṃ gṛhamedhinām |
prāgvidyādīnupādāya tairarthāṃśca yathākramam | |
vindeta sadṛśīṃ bhāryāṃ śāstradṛṣṭena karmaṇā | | 5
gṛhāśramo hi niḥsvānāṃ mahatyeṣā viḍambanā |
tasmātpūrvamupādeyaṃ vittameva gṛhaiṣiṇā | | 6
varaṃ soḍhā manuṣyeṇa tīvrā narakavedanā |
na tveva ca gṛhe dṛṣṭaṃ putradārakṣudhārditam | | 7
asambhave śiśuṃ dṛṣṭvā rudantaṃ prārthanāparam |
vajrasāramayaṃ manye hadayaṃ yanna dīryate | | 8
sādhvīṃ bhāryāṃ priyāṃ dṛṣṭvā kucailāṃ kṣutkṛśīkṛtām |
asya duḥkhasya tannāsti sukhaṃ yatsamatāṃ vrajet | | 9 rūkṣānvivarṇānkṣudhitānbhūmiprastaraśāyinaḥ |
putradārānnijāndṛṣṭvā kimakāryaṃ bhavennṛṇām | | 1.6.10
bāhūttarīyaṃ kṣutkṣāmaṃ dṛṣṭvā dīnamukhaṃ sutam |
mṛtyurevotsavaḥ puṃsāṃ vyasanaṃ jīvitaṃ dvijāḥ | | 11
parisīdatsvapatyeṣu dṛṣṭvā dīnamukho priyām |
vajrakāryaśarīrāste ye na yānti sahasradhā | | 12
tasmādarthavihīnasya puṃso dāraparigrahāt |
kutastrivarga saṃsiddhiryātanaiva hi tasya sā | | 13
abhāryasyādhikāro.asti na dvitīyāśrame yathā |
tadvadarthavihīnānāṃ sarvatra nādhikaritā | | 14
kecittvapatyamevāhustrivargāvāptisādhanam |
puṃsāmarthaḥ kalatraṃ ca ye.anye nītivido viduḥ | | 15
dharmo.api dvividho yasmādiṣṭāpūrtakriyātmakaḥ |
sa ca dārātmakaḥ sarvaṃ jñeyamarthaikasādhanam | | 16
nijenāpi 1 daridreṇa loko lajjati bandhunā |
paro.api hi manuṣyāṇāmaiśvaryātsvajanāyate | | 17
na daridraṃ samīpe.api sthitavantaṃ prapaśyati |
dūrasthamapi vittāḍhyamādarādbhajate janaḥ | | 18
tasmātprayatnataḥ pūrvamarthameva prasādhayeta |
sa hi mūlaṃ trivargasya guṇānāṃ gauravasya ca | | 19
sarve.api hi guṇā vidyākulaśīlādayo nṛṇām |
santi tasminnasanto.api santi santo.api nāsati | | 1.6.20
śāstraṃ śilpaṃ kalāḥ karma yaccānyadapi ceṣṭitam |
sādhanaṃ sarvamarthānāmarthā dharmādisādhanāḥ | | 21
sādhanānāṃ trivargo.asti taṃ vinā kevalaṃ nṛṇām |
ajāgalastanasyeva nidhanāyaiva saṃbhavaḥ | | 22
prākpuṇyairvipulā sampaddharmakāmādihetujā |
bhūyo dharmeṇa sāmutra tayā tāviti 4 ca kramaḥ. | | 23
ekacakrakametaddhi proktamanyonyahetukam |
pūrvapaścimabāhubhyāmuttarādharamadhyamāḥ | | 24
vijñāya matimānevaṃ yastrivargaṃ niṣevate |
saṃkhyāśatasamāyuktairavāpnotyuttarottaram | | 25
nābhāryasyādhikāro.asti trivarge nirdhanasya vā |
nā bhāryāyāmataḥ pūrvamarthamaiva prasādhayet | | 26
tasmātkramāgatairartheḥ svayaṃ vādhigatairyutaḥ |
kriyāyogyaiḥ samarthaśca kuryāddāraparigraham | | 27
anurūpe kule jātāṃ śrutavittakriyādibhiḥ |
labhetāninditāṃ kanyāṃ manojñāṃ dharmasādhanām | | 28
pumānardhapumāṃstāvadyāvadbhāryāṃ na vidanti |
tasmādyathākramaṃ kāle kuryāddāraparigraham | | 29
ekacakro ratho yadvadekapakṣo yathā khagaḥ |
abhāryo.api narastadvadayogyaḥ sarvakarmasu | | 1.6.30
patnīparigrahāddharmastathārtho bahulābhataḥ |
satprītiyogātkāmo.api trayamasyāṃ vidurbudhāḥ | | 31
tridhā vivāhasambandho hīnatulyādhikaiḥ saha |
tulyaiḥ saha samasteṣāmitarau nīcamadhyamau | | 32
asamairnindyate sadbhiruttamaiḥ paribhūyate |
tulyaiḥ praśasyate yasmāttasmātsādhutamo mataḥ | | 33
kṛtvaivādhikasambandhamapamānaṃ samaśnute |
na caiṣāmānatiṃ gacchennaiva nīcaiḥ saheṣyate | | 34
uttamo.api ca sambandho nīcaistatsamatāṃ vrajet |
atastaṃ varjayeddhīmānninditaṃ sadṛśottamaiḥ | | 35
vijātīyaiśca sambandhaṃ sahecchanti na sūrayaḥ |
ubhayorbhraśyate tena yathā kokilayā śukaḥ | | 36
tadbhāti kulabāhyatvādavaśyaṃ cāvamānataḥ |
pratipatteraśakyatvāccottamo.api na śasyate | | 37
eke.api parihartavyā anye pariharantyuta |
tasmāddvāvapi naiveṣṭau sambandhāvadhamottamau | | 38
ekapātrādibhiryeṣāmupacāraiḥ parasparam |
pratyahaṃ vardhate snehaḥ sambandhaḥ so.abhidhīyate | | 39
yatrāvāhavivāhādāvanyo.anyāḥ pratipattayaḥ |
spardhayaiva pravardhante taṃ sambandhaṃ vidurbudhāḥ | | 1.6.40
yyasane.abhyudaye vāpi yeṣāṃ prāṇairdhanairapi |
sahaikapratipattitvaṃ sambandhānāṃ sa uttamaḥ | | 41
snehavyaktau manuṣyāṇāṃ dvāveva nikaṣopalau |
tathā kṛtajñatāyāṃ ca vyasanābhyudayāgamau | |42
sa ca sneho nṛṇāṃ prāyaḥ sameṣveva hi dṛśyate |
sāmyaṃ cāpyupagantavyaṃ vittaśīlakulādibhiḥ | |4 3
tasmādvivāhasambandhaṃ saṃkhyamekāntakāriṇām |
sadṛśaireva kurvīta nottamenāpyanuttamaiḥ | | 44
iti śrībhaviṣye mahāpurāṇe śatārddhasāhasryāṃ saṃhitāyāṃ brāhme parvaṇi
strīlakṣaṇasadvṛttavarṇanaṃ nāma ṣaṣṭho.adhyāyaḥ | 6 |
atha saptamo.adhyāyaḥ
vivāha-dharmavarṇanam
brahmovāca
asapiṇḍā ca yā māturasagotrā ca yā pituḥ |
sā praśastā dvijātīnāṃ dārakarmaṇi maithune | | 1
sahajo na bhavedyasyā na ca vijñāyate pitā |
nopayaccheta tāṃ prājñaḥ putrikādharmaśaṅkayā | | 2
brāhmaṇānāṃ praśastā syātsavarṇā dārakarmaṇi |
kāmaśastu pravṛttānāmimāḥ syuḥ kramaśo.avarāḥ | | 3
kṣatrasyāpi savarṇā syātprathamā dvijasattamāḥ |
dve cāvare tathā prokte kāmatastu na dharmataḥ | |4
vaiśyasyaikā varā proktā savarṇā caiva dharmataḥ |
tathāvarā kāmatastu dvitīyā na tu dharmataḥ | | 5
śūdraiva bhāryā śūdrasya dharmato manurabravīt |
caturṇāmapi varṇānāṃ pariṇetā dvijottamaḥ | | 6
na brāhmaṇakṣatriyayorāpadyapi hi tiṣṭhatoḥ |
kasmiṃścidapi vṛtānte śūdrā bhāryopadiśyate | | 7
hīnajātistriyaṃ mohādudvahanto dvijātayaḥ |
kulānyeva nayantyāśu sasantānāni śūdratām | | 8
śūdramāropya vedyāṃ tu patitotrirbabhūva ha |
utathyaḥ putrajananātpatitatvamavāptavān | | 9
śūdrasya putramāsādya śaunakaḥ śūdratāṃ gataḥ |
bhṛgvādayopyevameva patitatvamavāpnuyuḥ | | 1.7.10
śūdrāṃ śayanamāropya brāhmaṇo yātyadhogatim |
janayitvā sutaṃ tasyāṃ brāhmaṇyādeva hīyate | | 11
devapitryātitheyāni tatpradhānāni yasya tu |
nādanti pitaro devāḥ sa ca svargaṃ na gacchati | | 12
vṛṣalīphenapītasya niḥśvāsopahatasya ca |
tasyāṃ caiva prasūtasya niṣkṛtirna vidhīyate | | 13
caturṇāmapi viprendrāḥ pretyeha ca hitāhitam |
samāsato bravīmyeṣa vivāhāṣṭakamuttamam | | 14
kālo daivastathā cārṣaḥ prājāpatyastathāsuraḥ |
gāndharvo rākṣasaścaiva paiśācaścāṣṭamo.adhamaḥ | | 15
ye yasya dharmā varṇasya guṇadoṣau ca yasya yau |
śṛṇudhvaṃ taddvijaśreṣṭhāḥ prasave ca guṇāguṇam | | 16
viprasya 1 caturaḥ pūrvānkṣatrasya caturo.avarān |
viṭśūdrayostu trīneva vidyāddharmānarākṣasān | | 17
caturo brāhmaṇasyādyānpraśastānkavayo viduḥ |
rākṣasaṃ kṣatriyasyaikamāsuraṃ vaiśyaśūdrayoḥ | | 18
kṣatriyāṇāṃ trayo dharmyā dvāvadharmyau smṛtāviha |
paiśācaścāsuraścaiva na karttavyau kathañcana | | 19
pṛthakpṛthagvā miśrau vā vivāhau pūrvacoditau |
gāndharvo rākṣasaścaiva dharmyau kṣatrasya tau smṛtau | | 1.7.20
ācchādya cārcayitvā tu śrutaśīlavate svayam |
āhūya dānaṃ kanyāyā bāhyo dharmaḥ prakīrtitaḥ | | 21
vitate cāpi yajñe tu karma kurvati cārtviji |
alaṅkṛtya sutādānaṃ daivo dharma udāhṛtaḥ | | 22
ekaṃ gomithunaṃ dve vā varādādāya dharmataḥ |
kanyāpradānaṃ vidhivadārṣīyo dharma ucyate | | 23
sahobhau carataṃ dharmamiti vācānubhāṣya tu |
kanyāpradānamabhyarca prājāpatyavidhiḥ smṛtaḥ | | 24
jñātibhyo draviṇaṃ dattvā kanyāyāścaiva śaktitaḥ |
kanyāpradānaṃ svacchandādāsuro dharma ucyate | | 25
icchayānyo.anyasaṃyogaḥ kanyāyāśca varasya ca |
gāndharvaḥ sa vidhirjñeyo maithunyaḥ kāmasambhavaḥ | | 26
hatvā chittvā ca bhittvā ca krośantīṃ rudatīṃ gṛhāt |
prasahya kanyāharaṇaṃ rākṣaso vidhirucyate | | 27
suptāṃ mattāṃ pramattāṃ ca raho yatropagacchati |
sa pāpiṣṭho vivāhānāṃ paiśācaḥ kathito.aṣṭamaḥ | | 28
jalapūrvaṃ dvijāgryāṇāṃ kanyādānaṃ praśasyate |
itareṣāṃ tu varṇānāmitaretarakāmyayā | | 29
yo yasyaiṣāṃ vivāhānāṃ vibhūnāṃ kīrtito guṇaḥ |
taṃ nibodhata vai viprāḥ samyaktakīrtayato mama | | 1.7.30
kulāni daśa pūrvāṇi tathānyāni daśaiva tu |
sa hi tānyātmanā caivaṃ mocayatyenaso dhruvam | | 31
brāhmīputraḥ sukṛtakṛddaivoḍhājaṃ sutaṃ śṛṇu |
daivoḍhājaḥ suto viprāḥ sapta sapta parāvarān | |
ārṣoḍhājaḥ sutaḥ strīṇāṃ puruṣāṃstārayeddvijāḥ | | 32
brahmādiṣu vivāheṣu caturṣvevānupūrvaśaḥ |
brahmavarcasvinaḥ putrā jāyante śiṣṭasammatāḥ | | 33
rūpasattvaguṇopetā dhanavanto yaśasvinaḥ |
putravanto.atha dharmiṣṭhā jīvanti ca śataṃ samāḥ | | 34
itareṣu nibodhadhvaṃ nṛśaṃsānṛtavādinaḥ |
jāyante durvivāheṣu brahmadharmadviṣaḥ 1 sutāḥ | | 35
aninditaiḥ strīvivāhairanindyā bhavati prajā |
ninditairniṃditā nṛṇāṃ tasmānnidyānvivarjayet | | 36
karagrahaṇasaṃskārāḥ savarṇāsu bhavanti vai |
asavarṇāsvayaṃ jñeyā vidhirudvāhakarmaṇi | | 37
bāṇaḥ kṣatriyayā grāhyaḥ pratodo vaiśyakanyayā |
vasanasya daśā grāhyā śūdrayotkṛṣṭavedane | | 38
na kanyāyāḥ pitā vidvāngṛhṇīyācchulkamaṇvapi |
gṛhṇanhi śulkaṃ lobhena syānnaro.apatyavikrayī | | 39
strīdhanāni tu ye mohādupajīvanti bāndhavāḥ |
nārīyānāni vastraṃ vā te pāpā yāntyadhogatim | | 1.7.40
ārṣe gomithunaṃ śulkaṃ kecidāhurmṛṣaiva 1 tat |
alpo vāpi mahānvāpi vikrayastāvadeva saḥ | | 41
yāsāṃ nādadate śulkaṃ jñātayo na sa vikrayaḥ |
arhaṇaṃ tatkumārīṇāmānṛśaṃsyaṃ ca kevalam | | 42
itthaṃ dārānsamāsādya deśamagryaṃ samāvaset |
brāhmaṇo dvijaśārdūla ya icchedvipulaṃ yaśaḥ | | 43
ṛṣaya ūcuḥ
ko deśaḥ paramo brahmankaśca puṇyo matastava |
pravasanyatra viprendra yaśaḥ prāpnoti kañjaja | | 44
brahmovāca
