na hīyate yatra dharmaścatuṣpātsa kalo dvijāḥ |
sa deśaḥ paramo viprāḥ sa ca puṇyo mato mama | | 45
vidvadbhiḥ sevito dharmo yasmindeśe pravartate |
śāstroktaścāpi viprendrāḥ sa deśaḥ paramo mataḥ | | 46
ṛṣaya ūcū
vidvadbhiḥ sevitaṃ dharmaṃ śāstroktaṃ ca surottama |
vadāsmāsu suraśreṣṭha kautukaṃ paramaṃ hi naḥ | | 47
brahmovāca
vidvadbhiḥ sevitaḥ sadbhirnityamadveṣarāgibhiḥ |
hṛdayenābhyanujñāto yo dharmastaṃ nibodhata | | 48
kāmātmatā na praśastā na vehāsyāpyakāmatā |
kāmyo hi vedādhigamaḥ karmayogaśca vaidikaḥ | | 49
saṅkalpājjāyate kāmo yajñādyāni ca sarvaśaḥ |
vratāḥ niyamadharmāśca sarve saṅkalpajāḥ smṛtāḥ | | 1.7.50
kāmādṛte kriyākārī dṛśyate neha karhicit |
yadyaddhi kurute kaścittattatkāmasya ceṣṭitam | | 51
nigamo 1 dharmamūlaṃ syātsmṛtiśīle tathaiva ca |
tathācāraśca sādhūnāmātmanastuṣṭireva ca | | 52
sarvaṃ tu samavekṣeta niścayaṃ jñānacakṣuṣā |
śrutiprādhānyato vidvānsvadharme nivaseta vai | | 53
śrutismṛtyuditaṃ dharmamanutiṣṭhansadā naraḥ |
prāpya ceha parāṃ kīrtiṃ yāti śakrasalokatām | | 54
śrutistu vedo 4 vijñeyo dharmaśāstraṃ tu vai smṛtiḥ |
te sarvārtheṣu mīmāṃsye tābhyāṃ dharmo hi nirbabhau | | 55
yo.avamanyeta te cobhe hetuśāstrāśrayāddvijaḥ |
sa sādhubhirbahiṣkāryo nāstiko vedanindakaḥ | | 56
vedaḥ smṛtiḥ sadācāraḥ svasya ca priyamātmanaḥ |
etaccaturvidhaṃ viprāḥ sākṣāddharmasya lakṣaṇam | | 57
dharmajñānaṃ bhavedviprā arthakāmeṣvasajjatām |
dharmaṃ jijñāsamānānāṃ pramāṇānnaigamaṃ param | | 58
niṣekādiśmaśānānto mantrairyasyodito vidhiḥ |
adhikāro bhavettasya vedeṣu ca japeṣu ca | | 59
sarasvatīdṛṣadvatyordevanadyoryadantaram 1 |
tadeva nirmitaṃ deśaṃ brahmāvartaṃ pracakṣate | | 1.7.60
yasmin deśe ya ācāraḥ pāramparyakramāgataḥ |
varṇānāṃ sāntarālānāṃ sa sadācāra ucyate | | 61
kurukṣetraṃ ca matsyāśca pañcālāḥ śūrasenayaḥ |
eṣa brahmarṣideśo vai brahmāvartādanantaram | | 62
etaddeśaprasūtasya sakāśādagrajanmanaḥ |
svaṃ svaṃ caritraṃ śikṣanti pṛthivyāṃ sarvamānavāḥ | | 63
himavadvindhyayormadhye yatprāgvinaśanādapi |
pratyageva prayāgācca madhyadeśaḥ prakīrtitaḥ | | 64
ā samudrāttu vai pūrvādāsamudrāttu paścimāt |
tayorevāntaraṃ giryorāryāvarttaṃ vidurbudhāḥ | | 65
aṭate yatra kṛṣṇā gaurmṛgo nityaṃ svabhāvataḥ |
sa jñeyo yājñiko deśo mlecchadeśastvataḥ paraḥ | | 66
etānnityaṃ śubhāndeśānsaṃśrayeta dvijottamaḥ |
yasminkasmiṃśca nivasetpādajo vṛttikarśitaḥ | | 67
prakīrtiteyaṃ dharmasya budhairyonirdvijottamāḥ |
sambhavaścāsya sarvasya samāsānna tu vistarāt | | 68
iti śrībhaviṣye mahāpurāṇe śatārdhasāhasryāṃ saṃhitāyāṃ brāhme parvaṇi vivāhadharmavarṇanaṃ
nāma saptamo.adhyāyaḥ | 7 |

athāṣṭamo.adhyāyaḥ
vivāhadharmeṣu strīviṣaye naravṛttavarṇanam
brahmovāca
kartavyaṃ yadgṛhasthena tadidānīṃ nibodhata |
gadato dvijaśārdūla vistarācchāstratastathā | | 1
vaivāhike.agnau kurvīta gṛhyaṃ karma yathāvidhi |
śubhadeśāśrayaścaiva patnī vaivāhikī gṛhe | | 2
svāśrayeṇa vinā śakyaṃ na yasmādrakṣaṇādikam |
vittānāmiva dārāṇāmatastadvidhirucyate | | 3
hetavo hi trivargasya viparītāstu mānada |
arakṣaṇādbhavantyasmādamīṣāṃ rakṣaṇaṃ matam | | 4 nisargātpuṃsyasantoṣādguṇadoṣavimarṣataḥ |
duṣṭānāṃ cāpi saṃsargādrakṣyā eva ca yoṣitaḥ | | 5
puruṣasthānaveśmāni trividhaṃ prāhurāśrayam |
vittānāṃ rakṣaṇādyarthamapūrvādhigamāya ca | | 6
kulīno nītimānprājñaḥ satyasandho dṛḍhavrataḥ |
vinīto dhārmikastyāgī vijñeyaḥ puruṣāśrayaḥ | | 7
nagare kharvaṭe kheṭe grāme cāpi kramāgate |
yātrāvaśādvā nivaseddhārmikādyajanānvite | | 8
guruṇānumatastatra grāmaṇyādijanena vā |
prativeśmādyabādhena śuddhaṃ kuryānniveśanam | | 9
dvāracatvaraśālānāṃ 1 sarvakārukaveśmanām |
dyūtasūnāsurāveśanaṭarājānujīvinām | | 1.8.10
pākhaṇḍadevavīthīnāṃ rājamārgakulasya ca |
dūrātsuguptaṃ kartavyā jīvikā vibhavocitā | | 11
sāpidhānaikaniṣkāśaṃ śuddhapṛṣṭaṃ samantataḥ |
sadvṛttāptajanākīrṇamaduṣṭaprātiveśikam | | 12
prāgudakpravaṇe deśe vāstuvidyāvidhānataḥ |
pravibhaktakriyākāñkṣaṃ sarvartukamanoharam | | 13
arcāsnānodakāgāragoṣṭhāgāramahānasaiḥ |
yuktaṃ govājiśālābhiḥ sadāsībhṛtyakāśrayaiḥ | | 14
bahirantaḥ purastrīkaṃ sarvopakaraṇairyutam |
vibhaktaśayanoddeśamāptavṛddhairadhiṣṭhitam | | 15
arakṣaṇāddhi dārāṇāṃ varṇasaṅkarajādayaḥ |
dṛṣṭā hi bahavo doṣāstasmādrakṣyāḥ sadā striyaḥ | | 16
na hyāsāṃ pramadaṃ dadyānna svātantryaṃ na viśvaset |
viśvastavacca ceṣṭeta nyāyyaṃ bhartsanamācaret | | 17
nādhikāraṃ kvaciddadyādṛte pākādikarmaṇaḥ |
strīṇāṃ grāmīṇavattā hi bhogāyālaṃ suśāsitā | | 18
nityaṃ tatkarmayogena tāḥ kartavyā nirantarāḥ |
ityevaṃ sarvadā vyāpteḥ syādavidyanirāśrayā | | 19
daurgatyamatirūpaṃ cāpyasatsaṅgaḥ svatantratā |
pānāśanakathāgoṣṭhīpriyatvākarmaśīlatā | | 1.8.20 kuhakekṣaṇikāmuṇḍābhikṣukīsūtikādibhiḥ |
goprasaṅgaistathā sadbhirliṅgiyācakaśilpibhiḥ | | 21 saṃvāhodyānayātrāsūdyāneṣvāmantraṇādiṣu |
prasaṅgastīrthayātrārthaṃ dharmeṣu prakaṭeṣu ca | | 22
viprayogaḥ sadā bhartrā tajjñātikulaniḥsvatā |
amādhuryakadaryatve bhṛśaṃ puṃsāṃ ca vācyatā | | 23 atikrauryamatikṣāntiratyantābhītipātanam |
strībhirjitatvamatyarthaṃ satyaṃ tāstāḥ sadoṣatāḥ | | 24
strīṇāṃ patyuradhīnatvātpumāneva hi nindyate |
bhartureva hi tajjāḍyaṃ yadbhṛtyānāmayogyatā | | 25
tasmādyathoditāsvetā rakṣyāḥ śāsanatāḍanaiḥ |
tāḍanaiśca yathākālaṃ yathāvatsamupācaret | | 26
parigṛhya bahūndārānupacāraiḥ samo bhavet |
yathākramocitaiḥ karma dānasatkāravāsanaiḥ | | 27
prathamo.abhijano dharmo yogyatvaṃ ca suputratā |
pakṣe vittaṃ viśetstrīṇāṃ mānastatkāraṇaṃ tathā | | 28
tasmānmāno na kartavyo heyaścāpi na tatkṛtaḥ |
gurutve lāghave vāpi satāṃ kāryaṃ nibandhanam | | 29
ākasmike prayuñjānaḥ prekṣāvānmānalāghave |
sa yatkiñcanakāritvāccāyamevaiti lāghavam | | 1.8.30
yathā mānāpamānau hi prayujyetānimittataḥ |
tannimittā janatyāge prayatante tadāśritāḥ | | 31
etadeva hyapatyānāṃ jñeyaṃ mānanakāraṇam |
yatsvāpatyanimitteṣu pradhāne kulayogyate | | 32
tatsaṃyogātsukhaṃ puṃsāṃ mahadduḥkhaṃ viyogataḥ |
tatprāptiḥ prati hātavyā svārthāyaiva priyāṇyapi | | 33
ataḥ svārthaikaniṣṭho.ayaṃ lokaḥ sarvo.avasīyate |
tatprasiddhirbhavedastamānād bhrāntividhāyakaḥ | | 34
tato dārādikā bhṛtyā niyantavyāstathā dvijāḥ |
yathehāmutra vā śreyaḥ prāpnuyāduttarottaram | | 35
strīṇāṃ dharmārthakāmeṣu nātisandhānamācaret |
tāsāṃ teṣvabhisandhānādbhavedātmābhisaṃhitaḥ | | 36
jāyā tvardhaṃ śarīrasya nṛṇāṃ dharmādisādhane |
nātastāsu vyathāṃ kāñcitpratikūlaṃ samācaret | | 37
yajñotsavādau nākasmātkāñcidāsāṃ viśeṣayet |
vastratāmbūladānādau pratipattau samo bhavet | | 38
priyāpriyatvaṃ bhedo hi kāmatastu rahogataḥ |
upacāraiḥ punarvākyaistulyavṛttiḥ praśasyate | | 39
ārtave tu punaḥ sarvā upagamyāḥ priyā iva |
pūrvābhijātadharmārthā putriṇī cottarottaram | | 1.8.40
udaggacchedanenaiva vidhinā nityamārtave |
tulyavṛttiryathākālaṃ svaṃ svaṃ vāsamakhaṇḍayan | | 41
nityaparyāyavāsānāmapādānamasūnviduḥ |
ṛtuduḥkhaṃ pramodaśca tathā pūrvaṃ samāgataḥ | | 42
anyayā saha yadduḥkhaṃ sadasadvā rahogatam |
utkaṇṭhitaṃ vā yatkiñcitsapatnīṣu na tadvaset | | 43 yatkiñcidanyasambaddhamanyathā kathitaṃ mithaḥ |
tasya kuryādanirvedamātmanaiva vicintayet | | 44
anyo.anyamatsarākhyānairna tā vācāpi bhartsayet |
guṇadoṣau ca vijñāya svayaṃ kuryānna niṣkalau | | 45
vastrālaṅkārabhojyādau tadapatyeṣvanukramāt |
mātṛdoṣānanādṛtya tulyadṛṣṭiḥ pitā bhavet | | 46
anyasyānyagatairdoṣairdūṣaṇaṃ na hi nītimat |
yattu teṣāmapatyaṃ tu tattulyamubhayorapi | | 47
prītiṃ dveṣamabhiprāyaṃ śaucāśaucagatāgamān |
bahirantaśca jānīyāddāsa gūḍhacaraiḥ sadā | | 48
ātmānamapi vijñāya cittavṛtteranīśvaram |
viśvaseta kathaṃ strīṣu sarvāvinayadhāmasu | | 49
vṛddhadāsyaḥ kramāyātā dhātryaśca paricārikāḥ |
tanmātṛpitṛkādyāśca ṣaṇḍavṛddhāścarā matāḥ | | 1.8.50 vividhaistatkathākhyānaistulyaśīladayānvitaiḥ |
praviśyāntarabhiprāyaṃ vidyātkāle prayojitaiḥ | | 51
teṣu teṣu kathārtheṣu kathyamāneṣu lakṣayet |
mukhākārādibhirliṅgairabhiprāyaṃ manogatam | | 52
sītārundhatisambandhaistathā śākuntalādibhiḥ |
sadasaccaritākhyānairbhāvaṃ vidyātpravṛttitaḥ | | 53
tadduṣṭānāmaduṣṭeṣu sādhūnāmitareṣu ca |
prītiḥ kathāprabandheṣu syātsakhyaṃ puruṣeṣvitaḥ | | 54
evamāgamaduṣṭābhyāmanumityā ca tattvataḥ |
strīṇāṃ viditvābhiprāyaṃ vartetāśu yathocitam | | 55
strībhyo vipratipannābhyaḥ prāṇairapi viyojanam |
dṛṣṭaṃ hi ca yathā 1 rājñāmato rakṣetprayatnataḥ | | 56
veṇyā gūḍhena śastreṇa hato rājā śubhadhvajaḥ |
mekhalāmaṇinā devyā sauvīraśca narādhipaḥ | | 57
bhrātrā devīprayuktena bhadraseno nipātitaḥ |
tathā putreṇa kārūṣo ghātito darpaṇāsinā | | 58
dvau kāśirājau vai vandyau cānandāpurayoṣitā |
viṣaṃ prayujya pañcatvamānītau pūjitātmakau | | 59
evamādi mahābhāgā rājāno brāhmaṇāśca ha |
strībhiryatra nipātyante tatrānyeṣviha kā kathā | | 1.8.60
tasmānnityāpramattena jāyā rakṣyāśca nityaśaḥ |
yathāvadupacaryāśca guṇadoṣānurūpataḥ | | 61
vaiṣamyādupacārāṇāṃ vikāraiścānimittajaiḥ |
viśeṣeṇa sapatnīkairakasmāccāpi vedanaiḥ | | 62
asambhāge ca vāgdaṇḍapāruṣyādaprasaṅgataḥ |
pradveṣo bhartari strīṇāṃ prakopaścāpi jāyate | | 63
tataścāyāti vārdhakyamudvoḍhuścāpi śatrutām |
tasmānna tānprayuñjīta doṣāndāravināśakān | | 64
na caitāḥ svakulācāramadharmaṃ vāpi cāñjasā |
na guṇāṃścāpyupekṣante prakṛtyā kimu pīḍitāḥ | | 65
satītve prāyaśaḥ strīṇāṃ pradṛṣṭaṃ kāraṇatrayam |
parapuṃsāmasamprītiḥ priye prītiḥ svarakṣaṇe | | 66
tasmātsurakṣitā nityamupacārairyathocitaiḥ |
subhṛtā nityakarmāṇaḥ kartavyā yoṣitaḥ sadā | | 67
uttamāṃ sāmadānābhyāṃ madhyamābhyāṃ tu madhyamām |
paścimābhyāmubhāmyāṃ ca adhamāṃ samprasādhayet | | 68
bhedadaṇḍau prayujyāpi prāgapatyādyapekṣayā |
tacchiṣṭānāṃ tadā paścātsāmadānaprasādhane | | 69
yāstu vidhvastacāritrā bhartuścāhitakārikāḥ |
tyājyā evaṃ striyaḥ sadbhiḥ kālakūṭaviṣopamāḥ | | 70
iṣṭāḥ 3 kulodgatāḥ sādhvyo vinītā bhartṛvatsalāḥ |
sarvadā sādhanīyāstāḥ sampradāyottarottaraiḥ 4| | 71
evameva yathoddiṣṭaṃ strīvṛttaṃ yo.anutiṣṭhati |
prāpnotyeva sa sampūrṇaṃ trivargaṃ 5 lokasambhavam | | 72
iti śrībhaviṣye mahāpurāṇe śatārddhasāhasryāṃ saṃhitāyāṃ brāhme parvaṇi vivāhadharmeṣu
strīviṣaye naravṛttavarṇanaṃ nāmāṣṭamo.adhyāyaḥ | 8 |
atha navamo.adhyāyaḥ
āgamapraśaṃsāvarṇanam
brahmovāca
evaṃ strīṣu manuṣyāṇāṃ vṛttiruktā samāsataḥ |
sāmprataṃ ca manuṣyeṣu strīṇāṃ samupadiśyate | | 1
samyagārādhanātpuṃsāṃ ratirvṛttiśca yoṣitaḥ |
putrāḥ svargādyadṛṣṭaṃ ca tasmādiṣṭo hi tadvidhiḥ | | 2
kartavyaṃ nāma yatkiñcitsarvaṃ 1 vidhimapekṣate |
vyaktimāyāti vaiphalyaṃ tadevārabdhamanyathā | | 3
vidhyapekṣīṇi sarvāṇi kāryāṇyaviphalānyapi |
hetubhūtāstrivargasya mahārambhā viśeṣataḥ | |4
sarvasādhyāvidhijñānamāgamaikanibandhanam |
sādhyaṃ dṛṣṭamadṛṣṭaṃ ca dvayaṃ vidhiniṣedhayoḥ | | 5
śāstrādhikāro na strīṇāṃ na granthānāṃ ca dhāraṇe |
tasmādihānye manyante tacchāsanamanarthakam | | 6
āgamaikakriyāyoge strīṇāmadhyadhikāritā |
mṛte bhartari sādhvī syādityādau smṛtibhāṣitam | | 7
tasmātkāryamakāryaṃ vā vijñāya prabhurāgamāt |
guṇadoṣeṣu tāḥ samyakchāsti rājā prajā iva | | 8
satyeva pramadāḥ kāścidviśeṣādhigatāgamāḥ |
yattu śāstrādhikāritvaṃ vacanaṃ syānnirarthakam | | 9
kecidvedavido viprāḥ kṛtyairveṣakriyāparāḥ |
tathāpi 4 jātimātreṇa ta evātrādhikāriṇaḥ | | 1.9.10
kriyante vedaśāstrajñaiḥ prayogāḥ śāstralaukikāḥ |
sthitameṣāmadūre.api śāstrameva nibandhanam | | 11
vyādhadhīvaragopālaprabhṛtīnāṃ ca dṛśyate |
viṣṭyaṃ gārakasauryādidinānāṃ parivarjanam | | 12
gamyāgamyādikāryeyaṃ niyatācārasaṃsthitiḥ |
lokānāṃ śāstravākyānāṃ prāṇāḥ sveṣṭanibandhanāḥ || 13
tasmāccaturṇāṃ varṇānāmāśramāṇāṃ ca sarvaśaḥ |
mukhyagauṇādibhedānāṃ jñeyā śāstrādhikāritā | | 14
paurvāparyaṃ tu vijñātumaśakyaṃ lokaśāstrayoḥ |
tacchāstrameva mantavyaṃ yathā karmaśarīravat | | 15
āgame ca purāṇe ca dvidhaiva nāstikagraham |
mārgaṃ mahadbhirācīrṇaṃ prapadyetāvikalpadhīḥ | | 16
mūlaṃ gṛhasthadharmāṇāṃ yasmānnāryaḥ pativratāḥ |
tasmādāsāṃ pravakṣyāmi bharturārādhane vidhim | | 17
iti śrībhaviṣye mahāpurāṇe śatārdhasāhasryāṃ saṃhitāyāṃ brāhme parvaṇi
āgamanapraśaṃsānāma navamo.adhyāyaḥ | 9 |
atha daśamo.adhyāyaḥ
strīdurācāravarṇanam
brahmovāca
ārādhyānāṃ hi sarveṣāmayamārādhane vidhiḥ |
citta jñānānuvṛttiśca hitaiṣitvaṃ ca sarvadā | | 1
kanyā punarbhūrveśyā ca trividhā eva yoṣitaḥ |
priyā madhyāpriyā caiva yogyā madhyetarā tathā | | 2
samā śreṣṭhā ca nīcā ca bhūyopi trividhāḥ punaḥ |
pūrvavatparayorvṛttiriṣṭānuktyā 1 priyāpriye | | 3
adhamāpriyayoratra patipatnyādikā matā |
niṣiddhānāṃ tu bhakṣyādi taddhi yatnādvidhīyate | | 4
ekadvitvabahutvādyā ye bhedāḥ samudāhṛtāḥ |
jyeṣṭhādivṛtte vakṣyāmastānaśeṣāndvijottamāḥ | | 5
vṛttaṃ ca dvividhaṃ strīṇāṃ bāhyamābhyantaraṃ tathā |
bharturanyajane bāhyaṃ tasyāḥ śārīramāntaram | | 6
jñātītaravibhāgena tadbāhyaṃ dvividhaṃ punaḥ |
pūjyaṃ tulyaṃ kaniṣṭhaṃ ca tatpratyekaṃ punastridhā | | 7
rahorataṃ prakāśaṃ ca śārīramapi tattridhā |
bhartuścittānukūlyena prayoktavyaṃ yathocitam | | 8
mātā pitā svasā bhrātā pitṛvyācāryamātulāḥ |
sabhāryā 3 bhaginī bhartā bhartṛmātṛpitṛṣvasā | | 9
dhātrī vṛddhāṅganādiśca yastatrāstā samo janaḥ |
prathamoḍhā sapatnī ca strīṇāṃ mānyatamo gaṇaḥ 4 | | 1.10.10
eṣāmeva tvapatyādibhaginībhrātarastathā |
kaniṣṭhā bharturityādibhāryāścāptasamo mataḥ | | 11
hīno.anyaḥ śāsanīyastu tatra tāvanna vidyate |
yogyatā sutasaubhāgyairna yāvatsyātpratiṣṭhitā | | 12
yatrāpi guru bhartṛrṇāmānukūlyena sarvadā |
vṛttiḥ praśasyate strīṇāṃ pūjācārāvirodhinī | | 13
devaraiḥ patimitraiśca parihāsakriyocitaiḥ |
viviktadeśāvasthānaṃ varjayediti narma ca | | 14
prāyaśo hi kulastrīṇāṃ śīlavidhvaṃsahetavaḥ |
duṣṭayogo raho nityaṃ svātantryamatinarmatā | | 15
duṣṭasaṅge tvarā strīṇāṃ yuvabhirnarma nocitam |
nirbheṣatā svatantrāṇāṃ sāphalyaṃ rahasi yajet | | 16
puṃso duṣṭeṅgitākārānduṣṭabhāvaprayojitān |
bhrātṛvatpitṛvaccaitānpaśyatī parivarjayet | | 17
puṃso.a nyāgrahamālāpasmitaviprekṣitāni ca |
karāntareṇa 1 dravyāṇāṃ nibandhaṃ grahaṇārpaṇam | | 18
dvārapradeśāvasthānaṃ rājamārgāvalokanam |
prekṣodyānādiśīlatvaṃ niruṣyāddeśamālayam | | 19
bahūnāṃ darśane sthānaṃ dṛṣṭivākkāyacāpalam |
ṣṭhīvanatvaṃ sasītkāramuccairhasitajalpitam | | 1.10.20
sāṅgatyaṃ liṅgiduṣṭastrībhighṛṇīkṣaṇikādibhiḥ |
mantramaṇḍaladīkṣāyāṃ saktiḥ saṃvasaneṣu ca | | 21
ityevamādidurvṛttaṃ prāyoduṣṭajanocitam |
varjayetparirakṣantī kulatritayavācyatām | | 22
iti śrībhaviṣye mahāpurāṇe śatārddhasāhasryāṃ saṃhitāyāṃ brāhme parvaṇi
strīdurvṛttavarṇanaṃnāma daśamo.adhyāyaḥ | 10 |
athaikādaśo.adhyāyaḥ
strīṇāṃ gṛhasthadharmavarṇanam
brahmovāca
yā patiṃ daivataṃ paśyenmanovākkāyakarmabhiḥ |
taccharīrārdhajāteva sarvadā hitamācaret | | 1
tatpriyāṃ priyavatpaśyettaddveṣyā dveṣyavatsadā |
adharmānarthayuktebhyo.ayuktā cāsya nivartate | | 2
priyaṃ kimasya kiṃ pathyaṃ sāmyaṃ cāsya kathaṃ bhavet |
jñātvaivaṃ sarvabhṛtyeṣu na pramādyeta vai dvijāḥ | | 3
devatāpitṛkāryeṣu bhartuḥ snānāśanādiṣu |
satkāre.abhyāgatānāṃ ca yathaucityaṃ na hāpayet | | 4
veśmātmā ca śarīraṃ hi gṛhiṇīnāṃ dvidhā kṛtam |
saṃskartavyaṃ prayatnena prathamaṃ paścimādapi | | 5
kṛtvā veśma susaṃmṛṣṭaṃ trikālavihitārcanam |
vṛttakarmopabhogānāṃ saṃskartavyaṃ yathocitam | | 6
prātarmadhyāparāhṇeṣu bahirmadhyāntareṣu ca |
gṛhasammārjanaṃ kṛtvā niṣkārānna niśi kṣipet | | 7
gomahiṣyādiśālānāṃ tatpurīṣādimātrakam |
vyapaneyaṃ tu yatnena sammārjanyā prasādhanam | | 8
dāsakarmakarādīnāṃ bāhyābhyantaracāriṇām |
poṣaṇādividhiṃ vidyādanuṣṭhānaṃ ca karmasu | | 9
śākamūlaphalādīnāṃ vallīnāmauṣadhasya ca |
saṅgrahaḥ sarvabījānāṃ yathākālaṃ yathābalam | | 1.11.10
tāmrakāṃsyāyasādīnāṃ kāṣṭhaveṇumayasya 1 ca |
mṛnmayānāṃ ca bhāṇḍānāṃ vividhānāṃ ca saṅgraham | | 11
kuṇḍakādijaladroṇyā kalaśodañcatālukāḥ |
śākapātrāṇyanekāni snehānāṃ gorasasya ca | | 12
musalaṃ kuṇḍanīyaṃ tu yantrakaṃ cūrṇacālanī |
dohanyo netrakaṃ manthā maṇḍanyaḥ śṛṅkhalāni ca | | 13
saṃdaṃśaḥ kuṇḍikā śūlāḥ paṭṭapippalako dṛṣat |
ḍāvikā hastako darvī bhrāṣṭasphuṭalakāni ca | | 14
tulāprasthādimānāni mārjanyaḥ piṭakāni ca |
sarvametatprakurvīta prayatnena ca sarvadā | | 15
hiṃgvādikamatho jājī pipalyo māricāni ca |
rājikā dhānyakaṃ śuṇṭhī tricaturjātakāni ca | | 16
lavaṇaṃ kṣāravargāśca sauvīrakaparūṣakau |
dvidalāmalakaṃ ciṃcā sarvāśca snehajātayaḥ | | 17
śuṣkakāṣṭhāni vallūramariṣṭā piṣṭamāṣayoḥ |
vikārāḥ payasaścāpi vividhāḥ kandajātayaḥ | | 18
nityanaimittikānāṃ hi kāryāṇāmupayogataḥ |
sarvamityādi saṃgrāhyaṃ yathāvadvibhavocitam | | 19
yatkāryāṇāṃ samutpattāvupāhartuṃ na dṛśyate |
tatprāgeva yathāyogaṃ saṅgṛhṇīyātprayatnataḥ | | 1.11.20
dhānyānāṃ ghṛṣṭapiṣṭānāṃ kṣuṇṇopahatayorapi |
bhṛśaṃ śuṣkārdrasiddhānāṃ kṣayavṛddhī nirūpayet | | 21
iti śrībhaviṣye mahāpurāṇe śatārddhasāhasryāṃ saṃhitāyāṃ brāhme parvaṇi
gṛhadharmavarṇanaṃ nāmaikādaśo.adhyāyaḥ | 11 |

atha dvādaśo.adhyāyaḥ
strīdharmavarṇanam
brahmovāca
vrīhīṇāṃ kodravāṇāṃ ca sāradharmamudārakaḥ 1 |
kaṅgukodravayorjñeyo varaṭaḥ pañcabhāgakaḥ | | 1
pañcabhāgānpriyaṅgūnāṃ śālīnāṃ ca trayo.aṣṭa ca |
caṇakānāṃ tṛtīyāṃśaḥ samakṣuṇṇaṃ trayaṃ viduḥ | | 2
pānīyayavagodhūmaṃ piṣṭadhānyacatuṣṭayam |
tulyamevāvagantavyaṃ mudgā māṣāstilā yavāḥ | | 3
pañcabhāgādikā ghṛṣṭā godhūmāḥ saktavastathā |
kulmāṣāḥ piṣṭamāṃsaṃ ca samyagardhādikaṃ bhavet | | 4
siddhaṃ tadeva dviguṇaṃ punnāko yāvakastathā |
kaṅgukodravayorannaṃ caṇakodārakasya ca | | 5
dviguṇaṃ 4 cīnakānāṃ ca vrīhīṇāṃ ca caturguṇam |
śāleḥ pañcaguṇaṃ vidyātpurāṇe tvatiricyate | | 6
kriyāpākaviśeṣāstu vṛddhirevopadiśyate |
nimittasya varānnasya tadvṛddhirdviguṇā bhavet | | 7
tasmādbhūyo virūḍhasya caturbhāgo vivardhate |
lājā dhānāḥ kalāyāśca bhṛṣṭāddviguṇavṛddhayaḥ | | 8
bhraṣṭavyānāmato.anyeṣāṃ pañcabhāgo.adhiko mataḥ |
cāpakānāṃ ca piṣṭānāṃ pādahīnāḥ kalāyajāḥ | | 9
mudgamāṣamasūrāṇāmardhapādāvarobhavet |
klinnaśuṣkavarānnānāṃ hānirvṛddhirviśiṣyate | | 1.12.10
tayārdhena tu śodhyānāmāḍhakyā mudgamāṣayoḥ |
masūrāṇāṃ ca jānīyātkṣayaṃ pañcamabhāgakam | | 11
ṣaḍbhāgenātasītailaṃ siddhārthakakapitthayoḥ |
tathā nimbakadambādau 1 vidyātpañcamabhāgakam | | 12
tileṅgudīmadhūkānāṃ 2 naktamālakusumbhayoḥ |
jānīyātpādakaṃ tailaṃ khalamanyatpracakṣate | | 13
kṣetrakālakriyādibhyaḥ kṣayādervyabhicārataḥ |
pratyakṣīkṛtya tānsamyaganumityāvadhārayet | | 14
kṣīradoṣe gavāṃ 3 prasthaṃ mahiṣīṇāṃ ca sarpiṣaḥ |
pādādhikamajāvīnāmutpādaṃ tadvido viduḥ | | 15
subhūmitṛṇakālebhyo vṛddhirvā kṣīrasarpiṣām |
atasteṣāṃ vidhātavyo hyarthādeva 4 viniścayaḥ | | 16
pratyakṣīkṛtya yatnena pakṣamāsāntare tathā |
payorvṛttairgavādīnāṃ kuryātsambhavanirṇayam | | 17
kārpāsa kṛmikośaumaurṇaka kṣaumādikartanam |
kuṇipaṅgvandhayoṣābhirvidhavābhiśca kārayet | | 18
bālavṛddhāndhakārpaṇye yatkartavyamavaśyataḥ |
viniyogaṃ nayetsarvaṃ priyopagrahapūrvakam | | 19
karmaṇāmantarāleṣu proṣite cāpi bhartari |
svayaṃ vai tadanuṣṭheyaṃ nityānāṃ cāvirodhataḥ | | 1.12.20
śūdrāṇāṃ sthūlasūkṣmatvaṃ bahutvaṃ ca vyayāvyayau |
matvā viśeṣaṃ kurvīta cetanapratipattiṣu | | 21
kārayedvastradhānyādi svāptavṛddhairadhiṣṭhitam 1 |
śūdrāṇāṃ kṣayavṛddhyādi mantavyaṃ vetanāni ca | | 22
kṣaumakārpāsayorvidyātsūtraṃ pañcamabhāgakam |
deśakālādibhāgāttu pratyakṣādeva nirṇayaḥ | | 23
avaghātena tūlasya kṣayo viṃśatibhāgakaḥ |
channāṃ vyāptāṃ tu vātena tadvadūrṇāṃ pracakṣate | | 24
pañcāśadbhāgikīṃ hāniṃ sūtre kurvīta lakṣaṇāt |
vṛddhistu maṇḍasamparkāddaśakādaśikā bhavet | | 25 ślakṣṇamadhyamasūtrāṇāmardhādhikasamaṃ bhavet |
sthūlānāṃ tu punarmūlyātpādonaṃ bālacetanam | | 26
karmaṇo bhūribhedatvāddeśakālaprabhedataḥ |
tadvidbhya eva boddhavyo bālacetananiścayaḥ | | 27
sthūlaṃ dinatrayaṃ deyaṃ madhyamaṃ ca trirātrikam |
sūkṣmamāpakṣato mṛṣṭaṃ 4 māsāttatparikarmakam | |
yadatra kṣatravṛddhyādi tadutsargātpradarśitam | | 28
kālakartrādibhedena vyabhicāro.api dṛśyate |
śayyāsanānyanekāni kambalāścaturāśrikāḥ | | 29
kambukāścāvakoṣāśca madhyā raktāśca bhūriśaḥ |
gurubālādivṛddhānāmabhyāgatajanasya ca | | 1.12.30
bhogāyānugato bharttā kuryādvividhamātrakam |
yadasya śvaśurādīnāṃ kalpitaṃ śayanādikam | | 31
bhartuścaiva viśeṣaṇa tadanyena na kārayet |
vastraṃ mālyamalaṅkāraṃ vidhṛtaṃ devarādibhiḥ | | 32
na dhārayenna caiteṣāmākramecchayanāni vā |
piṇyākanakakuṭṭāśca 3 kālarūkṣāṇi yāni ca | | 33
heyaṃ paryuṣitādyannaṃ gobhaktenopayojayet |
kulānāṃ bahudhenūnāṃ godhyakṣavrajajīvinām | | 34
kilāṭagavikādīnāṃ bhaktārthamupayojanam |
dadhnaḥ samāharetsarpirduhedvatsānna pīḍayet | | 35
varṣāśaradvasanteṣu dvau kālāvanyadā sakṛt |
takraṃ vāpyupayuñjīta śvavarāhādipoṣaṇe | | 36
piṇyākakledanārthaṃ vā vikreyaṃ vā tadarhayet |
vṛttiṃ dhānyahiraṇyena gopādīnāṃ prakalpayet | | 3 7
te hi kṣīravratā lobhādupahanyustadanvayān |
dohakālaṃ gavāṃ dogdhānītivarteta vai dvijāḥ | | 38
prasarodakayorgopā manthakasya ca manthakāḥ |
māsamekaṃ yathā stanyaṃ māsamekaṃ stanadvayam | | 39
satataṃ pāyayedūrdhvaṃ stanamekaṃ stanadvayam |
tilapiṣṭābhiḥ piṇḍābhistṛṇena lavaṇena ca | |
vāriṇā ca yathākālaṃ puṣṇīyāditi vatsakān | |1.12.4 0
jaradgurgarbhiṇī dhenurvatsā vatsatarī tathā |
pañcānāṃ samabhāgena ghāsaṃ yūthe prakalpayet | | 41
eko gopālakastasya trayāṇāmatha vā dvayam |
pañcānāṃ vatsakaścaikaḥ pravarāstu pṛthakpṛthak | | 42
gocarasyānayanārthaṃ vyālānāṃ trāsanāya 1 ca |
ghaṇṭā karṇeṣu badhnīyuḥ śobhārakṣārthameva ca | | 43
paśavye vyālanirmukte deśe bhūritṛṇodake |
abhūtaduṣṭe vāraṇye sadā kurvīta gokulam | | 44
saguptamaṭavīvāsaṃ nityaṃ kuryādajāvikam |
ūrṇāṃ varṣe dvirādadyāccaitrāśvayujamāsayoḥ | | 45
yūthe mṛṣā daśaitāsāṃ catvāraḥ pañca vā gavām |
aśvoṣṭramahiṣāṇāṃ ca yathā syuḥ sukhasevitāḥ | | 56
vidyātkṛṣīvalādīnā yogaṃ kṛṣikakarmasu |
bhaktavetanalābhaṃ ca karmakālānurūpataḥ | | 47
kṣetrakedāravāṭeṣu bhṛtyānāṃ karma kurvatām |
khaleṣu ca vijānīyātkriyāyogaṃ pratikṣaṇam | | 48
yogyatātiśayaṃ matvā karmayogeṣu kasyacit |
grāsācchadaśirobhyaṅgairviśeṣaṃ tasya kārayet | | 49
padmaśākādivāpānāṃ kandabījādijanmanām |
saṅgrahaḥ sarvabījānāṃ kāle vāpaḥ subhūmiṣu | | 1.12.50
jātānāṃ rakṣaṇaṃ samyagrakṣitānāṃ ca saṃgrahaḥ |
teṣāṃ ca saṃgṛhītānāṃ yathāvannivapakriyā | | 51
gṛhamūlaṃ striyaścaiva dhānyamūlo gṛhāśramaḥ |
tasmāddhānyeṣu bhakteṣu na kuryānmuktahastatām | | 52
dhānyaṃ tu sañcitaṃ nityaṃ mito bhaktaparivyayaḥ |
na cānte muktahastatvaṃ gṛhiṇīnāṃ praśasyate | | 53
alpamityeva nāvajñāṃ caredanneṣu vai dvijāḥ |
madhuvalmīkayorvṛddhiṃ kṣayaṃ dṛṣṭvāṃjanasya ca | | 54
ye kecidiha nirdiṣṭā vyāpārāḥ puruṣocitāḥ |
dāmpatyoraikyamāsthāya taddhidānaprasaṅgataḥ | | 55
santyeva puruṣā loke strīpradhānāḥ sahasraśaḥ |
teṣu tāsāṃ prayoktṛtvādadoṣa iti gṛhyatām | | 56
evaṃ yogyatayā yuktā saubhāgyenodyamena ca |
samyagārādhya bhartāraṃ tatrainaṃ vaśamānayet | | 57
iti śrībhaviṣye mahāpurāṇe śatārddhasāhasryāṃ saṃhitāyāṃ brāhmaṇe parvaṇi strīdharmavarṇanaṃ
nāma dvādaśo.adhyāya | 12
atha trayodaśo.adhyāyaḥ
strīdharmavarṇanam
brahmovāca
prathamaṃ pratibudhyeta pravarteta svakarmasu |
paścādbhṛtyajanasyāpi bhuñjīta ca śayīta ca | | 1
bhartrā virahitā strī ca śvaśurābhyāṃ viśeṣataḥ |
dehalīṃ nātivarteta pratīkāre 1 mahatyapi | | 2
utthāya prathamaṃ bharturavijñātā na niṣkramet |
kṣapāyāṃ sāvaśeṣāyāṃ rātrau vā vāsarādiṣu | | 3
tadvāsabhavanasyaiva śanairāhūya kārmikān |
svavyāpāreṣu tānsarvāṃstatratatra niyojayet | | 4
vibuddhasya tato bharturnirvartyāvaśyakaṃ vidhim |
gṛhakāryāṇi sarvāṇi vidadhītāpramādataḥ | | 5
muktvāvāsakanepathyaṃ karmayogyaṃ vidhāya ca |
tatkālocitakartavyamanutiṣṭhedyathākramam | | 6
mahānasaṃ susammṛṣṭaṃ cullyādivihitārcanam |
sarvopakaraṇopetamasambādhamanāvilam | | 7
na cātiguhyaṃ prakaṭaṃ pravibhaktakriyāśrayam |
bharturāptajanākīrṇaṃ gūḍhaṃ kakṣādivarjitam | | 8
tatra pākādibhāṇḍāni bahirantaśca kārayet |
niṇiktamalapaṅkāni śuktivalkādicūrṇakaiḥ | | 9
niśi kurvīta dhūmārciḥ śodhitāni divātapaḥ |
dadhipātrāṇi kurvīta sadaivāntaritāni ca | | 1.13.10
sādhukāritadugdheṣu śodhiteṣu divātape |
īṣadgṛhyoktapātreṣu svacchaṃ yena bhaveddadhi | | 11
snehagorasapākādi kṛtvā supratyayekṣitam |
kuryātsvayamadhiṣṭhāya bhartuḥ pākavidhikriyām | | 12
kiṃ priyaṃ ca kimāgneyaṃ ṣaḍrasābhyantareṣu ca |
kiṃ pathyaṃ kimapathyaṃ ca svāsthyaṃ vāsya kathaṃ bhavet | |
iti yatnādvijānīyādanuṣṭheyaṃ ca tattathā | | | 13
nityānurāgaṃ satkāramāhāraṃ suparīkṣitam |
mahānasādau kurvīta janamāptaṃ kramāgatam | | 14
śatru dāyādasambandhaṃ kruddhabhītāvamānitam |
avācyopagṛhītaṃ vā naivamādīni yojayet | | 15
punaḥ punaḥ pratiṣṭhāpya guptaṃ svayamadhiṣṭhitam |
bharturāhārapānādi vidadhyādapramādataḥ | | 16
pākaṃ nirvartya mātrāṇāṃ kṛtvā svedapramārjanam |
gandhatāmbūlamālyādi kiñcidādāya mātrayā | | 17
yathaucityāditatkāle bharturvinayasambhramaiḥ |
tatkālānugatātyarthamāhāramupapādayet | | 18
svabhāvāmayakālānāṃ vaiparītyena sarvadā |
sarvamāhārapānādi prayojyaṃ tadvido jaguḥ | | 19
hīnatulyādhikatvena bhartā paśyati yaṃ yathā |
taṃ tathaivādhikaṃ paśyennyāyataḥ pratipattiṣu | | 1.13.20
sāpatnakānyapatyāni paśyetsvebhyo viśeṣataḥ |
bhaginīvatsapatnīśca tadvadhūnnijabandhuvat | | 21 grāsācchādaśirobhyaṅgasnānamaṇḍanakādikam |
sapatnīnāmakṛtvā tu ātmano.api na kārayet | | 22
vyādhitānāṃ cikitsārthamauṣadhādikamādarāt |
vidadhyādātmanastāsāṃ sarvāśritajanasya ca | | 23
tacchoke śucamādadyāttattuṣṭau mudamāvahet |
bhṛtyabandhusapatnīnāṃ tulyaduḥkhasukhā bhavet | | 24
lagdhāvakāśā svapyācya niśi suptotthitā kramāt |
anyatra vyayakartāraṃ patiṃ rahasi bodhayet | | 25
yadavadyaṃ sapatnīnāṃ svayamasmai na tadvadet |
dauḥśīlyādi tu sāpāyaṃ gūḍhamasmai nivedayet | | 26
durbhagāmanapatyāṃ vā bhartrā cātitiraskṛtām | 1
aduṣṭāṃ samyamāśvāsya tenaitāmanukūlayet | | 27
tathā vāgdaṇḍapāruṣyairjanaṃ bhartrā vipīḍitam |
kuryādvidheyamāśvāsya na ceddoṣāya tadbhavet | | 28
matvātmanonapatyatvaṃ kālaṃ cāpi gataṃ bahum |
santānādikamuddiśya kāryamātmanivedanam | | 29
yaccānyadapi jānīyātkiñcidasya cikīrṣitam |
tatkilājānatīvāsya siddhameva pradarśayet | | 1.13.30
vaivāhikaṃ vidhiṃ bhartuḥ sarvaṃ kṛtvā sasambhramam |
pariṇītā ca tāṃ paśyennityaṃ bhaginikāmiva | | 31
pūjāṃ sambandhivargasya maṅgalaṃ maṅgalāni ca |
kuryādabhinavoḍhāyāḥ suprahaṣṭena cetasā | | 32
mātṛvacchikṣayedenāṃ gṛhakṛtyeṣvamatsarā |
pradeśikavidhiṃ vāsyā vidadhyādyatnataḥ svayam | | 33
evaṃ bharturabhiprāya sarvamityādikārayet |
sukhārthaṃ vāpi santyajya strīṇāṃ bhartādhidevatā | | 34
bhartādhidevatā nāryā varṇā brāhmadevatāḥ |
brāhmaṇā hyagnidevāstu prajā rājanyadevatāḥ | | 35
tāsāṃ trivargasaṃsiddhau pradiṣṭaṃ kāraṇadvayam |
bharturyadanukūlatvaṃ yacca śīlamaviplutam | | 36
na tathā yauvanaṃ loke nāpi rūpaṃ na bhūṣaṇam |
yathā priyānukūlatvaṃ siddhaṃ śaśvadanauṣadham | | 37
vayorūpādihāriṇyo dṛśyante durbhagāḥ striyaḥ |
vallabhā mandarūpāśca bahvyo galitayauvanāḥ | | 38
tasmātpriyatvaṃ lokānāṃ nidānaṃ yogyatāparam |
tāṃ vinānye guṇā vandhyāḥ sarve.anarthakṛto.api vā | | 39
tasmātsarvaprayatnena vidadhyādātmayogyatām |
paracittajñatā cāsyā mūlaṃ sarvakriyāsviha | |1.13.4 0
bahirāgacchato jñātvā kālaṃ saṃmṛjya bhūmikām |
sajjīkṛtāsanā tiṣṭhettasyājñāṃ pratitatparā | | 41
svayaṃ prakṣālayetpādāvutthāpya paricārikām |
tālavṛntādikaiḥ kuryācchamasvedāpanodanam | | 42
āhārasnānapānādau saspṛhaṃ yatra lakṣayet |
tadiṃgitajñā tattvena siddhamasmai nivedayet | | 43
sapantīpatibandhūnāṃ bhartṛcittānukūlyataḥ |
pratipattiṃ prayuñjīta svabandhūnāṃ na vai tathā | | 44
teṣu cātmani ca jñātvā bhartṛcittaṃ prasādayet |
pratipattiṃ tathāpyeṣāṃ nādriyeta svabandhuṣu | | 45
api bharturabhipretaṃ nārī tatkulavāsinī |
satkārairnijabandhūnāṃ tena nopaiti vācyatām | |46
pūjya eva hi sambandhaḥ sarvāvasthāsu yoṣitām |
kastato.apyupakārāṃśaṃ lipseta kulajaḥ pumān | |47
sampūjya svasutāṃ tasmai vidhivatpratipādyate |
tato.asyā lipsate nāma kimakāryamataḥ param | | 48
kanyāṃ pradāya yairvṛttirātmanaḥ parikalpyate |
dāsabhaṇḍanaṭādīnāṃ mārgo.ayaṃ na mahātmanām | |49
tasmātstrībāṃdhavā nityaṃ prītimātraikasādhinīm |
pratipattiṃ samādadyuḥ sambandhibhyaḥ prasaṃginīm | 1.13.50
tasyā bhartari rakṣeta prītiṃ loke ca vācyatām |
ātmano.asatpravādaṃ ca ceṣṭeransādhuvṛttayaḥ | | 51
evaṃ vijñāya sadvṛttaṃ strī varteta tathā sadā |
yena tatparivargasya bhavedbhartuśca sammatā | | 52
priyāpi sādhuvṛttāpi vikhyātābhijanāpi ca |
janāpavādātsamprāpa sītānarthaṃ sudāruṇam | | 53 sarvasyāmiṣabhūtatvādguṇadoṣānabhijñataḥ |
prāyeṇāvinayaucityātstrīṇāṃ vṛttaṃ hi duṣkaram | | 54
agṛhyatvānmanovṛtteḥ prāyaḥ kapaṭadarśanāt |
niraṅkuśatvāllokasya nirvācyā viralāḥ striyaḥ | | 55 daivayogādayogatvādvyavahārānabhijñataḥ |
vācyatāpattayo dṛṣṭāḥ strīṇāṃ śuddhe.api cetasi | | 56
tāsāṃ daivapratīkāro nopabhogādṛte bhavet |
cāritraṃ lokavṛttaṃ ca etayorvidurauṣadham | | 57
hiṃdolakādikrīḍāyāṃ prasaktāṃ taruṇīṃ niśi |
ramamāṇāṃ viṭaiḥ sārdhaṃ vidhavāṃ svairacāriṇīm | | 58
vṛddhādibhāryāṃ sajjāyāṃ yānageyādisaṃginīm |
kaḥ śraddadhyātsatītyevaṃ sādhvīmapi hi yoṣitam | | 59
yau cāsāmiṅgitākārau sandigdhārthaprasādhakau |
tayostattvaparijñānaṃ viṣayo yogināṃ yadi | | 1.13.60 tasmādyathoktamācāramanutiṣṭhetsusaṃyatā |
mithyālagnopyasadvādaḥ kampayatyeva tatkulam | | 61
trikulyā vācyatā rakṣyā pratiṣṭhāpyatha santatiḥ |
bhartustrivargasiddhiśca sādhyaṃ tatkulayoṣitām | | 62
pātayantyeva dauḥśīlyādātmānaṃ sakulatrayam |
uddharanti tadaivaitāḥ striyaścāritrabhūṣaṇāḥ | | 63
bhartṛcittānukūlatvaṃ yāsāṃ śīlamavicyutam |
tāsāṃ ratnasuvarṇādi bhāra eva na maṇḍanam | | 64
lokajñāne parā koṭiḥ patyau bhaktiśca śāśvatī |
śuddhānvayānāṃ nārīṇāṃ vidyādetatkulavratam | | 65
tasmāllokaśca bhartā ca samyagārādhito yayā |
dharmamarthaṃ ca kāmaṃ ca saivāpnoti niratyayā | | 66
iti śrībhaviṣye mahāpurāṇe śatārddhasāhasryāṃ saṃhitāyāṃ brāhme parvaṇi strīdharmakathanaṃ
nāma trayodaśo.adhyāyaḥ | 13 |

atha caturdaśo.adhyāyaḥ
patiparadeśavāse strīṇāṃ śṛṅgāraniṣedhaḥ
brahmovāca
preṣite maṇḍanaṃ strīṇāṃ patyau maṅgalamātrakam |
niṣpādanaṃ ca yatnena tadārabdhasya karmaṇaḥ | | 1
śayyāmupārjanamarthānāṃ vyayānāṃ parihāpaṇam | | 2
vratopavāsatātparyaṃ tadvārtāparimārgaṇam |
daivajñekṣaṇikapraśno devānāmupayācanam | | 3
nityaṃ tasyāgamāśaṃsā kṣemārthaṃ devapūjanam |
na cātyujjvalaveṣatvaṃ na sadā tailadhāraṇam | |4
jñātiveśma na gantavyaṃ sakāmagamanena 1 ca |
gurūṇāmājñayā yāvadbharturāptajanaiḥ saha | | 5
tatrāpi na ciraṃ tiṣṭhetsnānādīnvāpi nācaret |
yāvadarthaṃ kṣaṇaṃ sthitvā tataḥ śīghraṃ samācaret | | 6
āgate prakṛtisthaiva kṛtvā tātkālikaṃ vidhim |
muktapravāsane pathye snāte bhuktavati priye | | 7
ātmānaṃ samalaṅkṛtya saviśeṣaṃ mudānvitā |
devapūjopahārādīndadyātprāgupapāditān | | 8
kaniṣṭhāmātṛvajjyeṣṭhāṃ tadapatyāni cātmavat |
paśyettatparivargaṃ tu nityaṃ svaparivargavat | | 9
tatpuronāsane tiṣṭhetpatiṃ nāmaṃtrayeta ca |
tadabhiprāyataḥ kuryātpravṛttiṃ sarvakarmasu | | 1.14.10
na saṃsṛjeta taddviṣṭaiḥ sakhyaṃ kurvīta tatpriyaiḥ |
janamāptatamaṃ tasya sadābhartuśca mānayet | | 11
paitṛkātsamupānītaṃ vasusaugaṃdhikādikam |
tasmai nivedyātmatayā tadā tadupayojayet | | 12
sopi tatprītaye kiṃcidādadyādalpamūlyakam |
saṃgopya mātṛvatstheyaṃ tattathaivopayojayet | | 13
tatprītyarthaṃ gṛhītaṃ yadvailakṣyādinivṛttaye |
saviśeṣaṃ prasaṃgena tasyaitatpratipādayet 1 | | 14
strīṇāṃ yadetatsāpatnyaṃ paraṃ mātsaryakāraṇam |
tasmāttatparihartavyaṃ paramodāracaryayā | | 15
tathā kalpitanepathyā bhartuḥ paryāyavāsare |
hriyamādayamāneva patiṃ gacchedvisarjitā | | 16
gatvā rahasi bhartāraṃ tatkālocitasaṃbhramaiḥ |
tadbhāvānugataistaistaiḥ saviśeṣamupācaret | | 17
pratibudhya tataḥ kāle saviśeṣaṃ trapānvitā |
jyeṣṭhāya vasatiṃ gacchedviśeṣeṇa tathā punaḥ | | 18
aprātikūlyaṃ jyeṣṭhāyā hitamanyatra yoṣitaḥ |
tataḥ śanaistvavacchidya patiṃ svavaśamānayet | | 19
bahiṣpākādiyogena catuḥṣaṣṭyā rahogatam |
jyeṣṭhāmatiśayāneva bhartāramuparañjayet | | 1.14.20
prāgalbhyaṃ rahasi strīṇāṃ lajjādhikyaṃ tato.anyadā |
cittajñānānuvṛttiśca patyau saṃsevanaṃ param | | 21
evamārādhya bhartāraṃ gṛhamākramya ca kramāt |
gauravaṃ pratipattiṃ vā jyeṣṭhādiṣu na hāpayet | | 22
gṛhavyāpāradāneṣu patiṃ guḍhaṃ tadhā vadet |
adhikuryādanicchantī jyeṣṭhaivenāṃ yathā balāt | | 23
sāpi vijñāya bhartāraṃ kaniṣṭhākṛṣṭamānasam |
viśrāmaṃ prārthayedenāmadhikuryātsutāmiva | | 24
matvā bharturabhipretaṃ rakṣantī nijagauravam |
kṛtaṃ bhartranukūlaṃ syāttadiṣṭāyānumodayet | | 25
sthānino yadabhipretaṃ bhṛtyaiḥ kiṃ kriyate.anyathā |
kliśyate tatra mūḍhātmā paratantro vṛthā janaḥ | | 26
tasmātsarvāsvavasthāsu manovākkāyakarmabhiḥ |
hitaṃ svāmyanukūlatvaṃ nārīṇāṃ tu viśeṣataḥ | | 27
sāpi jyeṣṭhāpatiṃ caiva gṛhatantraṃ ca sarvadā |
samāvarjya 1 guṇairdhīrā prāgavasthāṃ na vismaret | | 28
na saubhāgyamadaṃ kuryānna cauddhatyādivikriyām |
nitarāmānatiṃ gacchetsadānāryabhayādiva | | 29
yathā yogyatayā patyau saubhāgyamabhivardhate |
spardhayecya kulastrīṇāṃ praśrayopādhikaṃ tathā | | 1.14.30
evamārādhya bhartāraṃ tatkāryeṣvapramādinī |
pūjyānāṃ pūjane nityaṃ bhṛtyānāṃ bharaṇeṣu ca | | 31
guṇānāmarjane nityaṃ śīlavatparirakṣaṇe |
pretya ceha ca nirdvandvaṃ sukhamāpnotyanuttamam | | 32
iti śrībhaviṣye mahāpurāṇe śatārddhasāhasryāṃ saṃhitāyāṃ brāhme parvaṇi strīdharmeṣu
sapatnīkartavyavarṇanaṃ nāma caturdaśo.adhyāyaḥ | 14 |
atha pañcadaśo.adhyāyaḥ
strīdharmavarṇanam
brahmovāca
durbhagā ca punarnityamupavāsāditatparā |
bāhyeṣu patikṛtyeṣu syādviśeṣābhiyoginī | | 1
na praśaṃsāṃ sapatnīṣu niṃdāṃ cāpi tathātmani |
asūyāṃ bharturīrṣyāṃ vā praṇayaṃ vāpi darśayet | | 2
madvidhā yā hi bahvetattaccāttyaṃtikamaśnute |
yadasyā yuṣmato yāyādbhāryāśabdābhidheyatām | | 3
na ca nirbhūṣaṇā tiṣṭhenna cāpyuddhatabhūṣaṇā |
nānyadā gaṃdhamālyādi grāhyaṃ patyupacārataḥ | | 4
tannyūnaṃ sarvaśo grāhyaṃ vallabhāyā viśeṣataḥ |
bhūṣaṇaṃ gandhamālyaṃ tu tāvatkālamalakṣitam | | 5
sambādhānāṃ pradeśānāṃ nityaṃ svedādimārjanam |
dantanāsādipaṅkānāṃ vigandhasya ca śodhanam | | 6
nimittaṃ bharturetāsāṃ yatkiṃcidabhilakṣayet |
nānena vā tayoryatnaṃ vidadhyādaṅgamārjane | | 7
sarvāsāṃ ca sapatnīnāṃ sarvatrānugatā bhavet |
vaitasīṃ vṛttimāsthāya vallabhāyā viśeṣataḥ | | 8
anyasyā yadanuṣṭheyaṃ yanna sīdetsamarpitam |
bhartuścāviditaṃ yatnāttatkuryādavirodhi cet | | 9
kośavastrānnatāmbūlagandhāpānauṣadhādikam |
tatsarvamaniyuktānāṃ doṣavatvādvirudhyate | | 1.15.10
yattu muktamanuṣṭheyaṃ gahasammārjanādikam |
strīṇāmanadhikāre.api prāyastadvidhirucyate | | 11
abhyaṅgodvartanaṃ snānaṃ bhojanaṃ maṇḍanāni ca |
kuryādbharturapatyānāṃ dhātrīkarmāṇi sādaram | | 12
ātmavattānyapatyāni sādhayatyanuyogataḥ |
svenāpyamīṣāṃ vittena vidadhyānmaṇḍanādikam | | 13
bhogaḥ svayamapatyairvā strīvittasya patirvidhā |
pūrve vayasyabhinandya paścime copayojanam | | 14
ubhayogastu vā mā vā karmajaḥ pṛthageva saḥ |
sadvṛtte tvadhikāṃ khyātiṃ kurvīta kriyayā punaḥ | | 15
na kāpi durbhagā nāma subhagā nāma jātitaḥ |
vyavahārādbhavatyeṣa nirdeśo ripumitravat | | 16
bhartṛcittāparijñānādananuṣṭhānato.api vā|
vṛttairlokaviruddhaiśca yānti durbhagatāṃ striyaḥ | | 17
prānukūlyānmanovṛttaiḥ paro.api priyatāṃ vrajet |
prātikūlyānnijopyāśu priyaḥ pradveṣatāmiyāt | | 18
tasmātsarvāsvavasthāsu manovākkāyakarmabhiḥ |
priyaṃ samācarennityaṃ taccitānuvidhāyinī | | 19
yāmanyāṃ kāmayettāsāṃ taṃ tayā saṃprayojayet |
kupitāṃ ca priyāṃ kāñcidyatnādasmai prasādayet | | 1.15.20
tatpādaparicaryāyāṃ gotrasaṃvāhane 1 tathā |
pīḍane śirasaścaiva paraṃ kauśalamabhyaset | | 21
pīḍanaṃ mṛdu madhyaṃ ca gātrāvasthāviśeṣataḥ |
mukhagātrādibhirliṅgaiḥ prayojyaṃ tatsukhāvaham | | 22
bāhūrukaṭipṛṣṭheṣu skaṃdhe śirasi pādayoḥ |
gāḍhamardanamicchanti prāyonyatrāpi madhyamam | | 23
nirmāṃseṣu pradeśeṣu nābhimūleṣu marmasu |
hṛdgaṇḍakakapolādāvicchanti mṛdumardanam | | 24
gāḍhaṃ jāgradavasthāyāmardhasuptasya madhyamam |
kiñcitsaparighātaṃ ca mṛdusuptasya neti vā | | 25
viruddhaṃ sarvagātreṣu lomavastu viśeṣataḥ |
utkaṇḍūyatyu soddharṣaṃ snehākteṣu ca marda nam | | 26
sparśādromāñcajananaṃ sanakhacchuritaṃ śanaiḥ |
pulakollekhanopetaṃ śiraḥkaṃḍūśca pārśvayoḥ | | 27
teṣu teṣu ca gātreṣu tatprayojyaṃ tathātathā |
nidrāgamāya tatkāle rāgasaṃdhukṣaṇāya ca | | 28
tiṣṭhataścopaviṣṭasya 1 jāgrataḥ svapato.api vā |
saṃvāhanaṃ praśaṃsaṃti yadatyarthaṃ sukhāvaham | | 29
naiṣpandyaṃ pulakodbhedo gātrāṇāmakṣimīlanam |
tatpradeśārpaṇaṃ kiñcidbodhedvikṛtidarśanam | | 1.15.30
ūrū mūlādideśe ca tatpāṇipratipīḍanam |
lakṣayennipuṇā yatra tatraivādhikamācaret | | 31
evameva yathoddiṣṭaṃ strīvṛttaṃ yānutiṣṭhati |
patimārādhya sampūrṇa trivargaṃ sādhigacchati | | 32
iti śrībhaviṣye mahāpurāṇe śatārddhasāhasryāṃ saṃhitāyāṃ brāhme parvaṇi strīdharmavarṇanaṃ
nāma paṃcadaśo.adhyāyaḥ | 15 |
atha ṣoḍaśo.adhyāyaḥ
pratipatkalpavarṇanam
sumanturuvāca
ityuktvā bhagavānbrahmā strīlakṣaṇamaśeṣataḥ |
sadvṛttaṃ ca tathā strīṇāṃ jagāma sa nijālayam | | 1
ṛṣayaśca tathā jagmuḥ svāni dhiṣṇyānyaśeṣataḥ |
strīlakṣaṇaṃ tathā vṛttaṃ śrutvā kṛtsnaṃ mahīpate | | 2
itthaṃ lakṣaṇasampannāṃ bhāryāṃ prāpya mahīpate |
kartavyaṃ yadgṛhasthena tadidānīṃ nibodha me | | 3
baivāhikāgnau kurvīta gṛhyaṃ karma yathāvidhi |
pañcayajñavidhānaṃ tu paktiṃ kuryātsadā gṛhī | |4
pañca sūnā gṛhasthasya tena svargaṃ na gacchati |
kaṇḍanī peṣaṇī cullī udakumbhīḥ pramārjanī | | 5
āsāṃ krameṇa sarvāsāṃ viśuddhyarthaṃ manīṣibhiḥ |
pañcoddiṣṭā mahāyajñāḥ pratyahaṃ gṛhamedhinām | | 6
adhyāpanaṃ brahmayajñaḥ pitṛyajñaśca tarpaṇam |
homo daivo balirbhaumastathānyo.atithipūjanam | |7
pañcaitānyo mahāyajñānna hāpayati śaktitaḥ |
sa gṛhe.api vasannityaṃ sūnodorṣairna lipyate | | 8
devatātithibhṛtyānāṃ pitṛrṇāmātmanaśca yaḥ |
na nirvapati pañcānāmucchvasanna ca jīvati | | 9
śatānīka uvāca
yasya nāsti gṛhe tvagniḥ sa mṛto nātra saṃśayaḥ |
na sa pūjayituṃ śakto devādīnbrāhmaṇottamaḥ | | 1.16.10
niragnikasya viprasya kathaṃ devādayo dvija. |
prītāḥ syuḥ śāntaye tasya paraṃ kautūhalaṃ mama | | 11
sumanturuvāca
sādhu pṛṣṭo.asmi rājendra śrūyatāṃ paramaṃ vacaḥ|
anagnayastu ye viprāsteṣāṃ śreyo.abhidhīyate | | 12
vratopavāsaniyamairnānādānaistathā 1 nṛpa |
devādayo bhavantyeva prītāsteṣāṃ na saṃśayaḥ | | 13
viśeṣādupavāsena tithau kila mahīpate |
prītā devādayasteṣāṃ bhavanti kurunandana | | 14
śatānīka uvāca
bhagavaṃstvaṃ tithīnbrūhi tithīnāṃ ca vidhiṃ hi me |
prāśanaṃ gṛhyadharmāṃśca upavāsavidhīnapi | | 15
mucyema yena pāpaughāttvatprasāddvijottama |
saṃsārāccāpi viprendra śreyase jagatastathā | | 16
sumanturuvāca
śṛṇu kaurava karmāṇi tithiguhyāśritāni tu |
śrutāni ghnanti pāpāni upoṣitaphalāni ca | | 17
pratipadi kṣīraprāśanaṃ dvitīyāyāṃ lavaṇavarjanam |
tṛtīyāyāṃ tilānnaṃ prāśnīyāccaturthyāṃ kṣīrāśanaśca pañcamyām | |
phalāśanaḥ sadā ṣaṣṭhyāṃ śākāśanaḥ saptamyāṃ bilvāhāroṣṭamyāṃ tu | | 18
piṣṭāśano navamyāmanagnipākāhāro daśamyāmekādaśyāṃ ghṛtāhāro dvādaśyāṃ pāyasāhāraḥ |
trayodaśyāṃ gomūtrāhāraścaturdaśyāṃ yavānnāhāraḥ | | 19
kuśodakaprāśanaḥ paurṇamāsyāṃ haviṣyāhāro.amāvāsyāyām |
eṣa prāśanavidhistithīnāmeva cānena vidhinā pakṣamekaṃ yo vartayati | | 1.16.20
so.aśvamedhaphalaṃ daśaguṇaphalamavāpnoti |
svarge manvantarāṇi yāvatprativasati | | 21
upagīyamānopsarogandharvairmāsatrayacatuṣṭayam |
sośvamedharājasūyānāṃ śataguṇamavāpnoti | | 22
svarge upagīyamānopsarogandharvaiścaturyugānāṃ daśaśatīryāvatprativasati |
tathāṣṭamāsapāraṇe rājasūyāśvamedhābhyāṃ sahasraguṇaphalamavāpnoti | | 23
svarge caturdaśa manvatarāṇi yāvatprativasati |
upagīyamānopsarogandharvairya evaṃ niyamamāsthāya varṣamekaṃ vartayati | | 24
sa saviturloke kālaṃ manvantaraṃ prativasati | | 25
ya evaṃ niyamānrājannāśvayujanavamyāṃ māghamāsasya saptamyāṃ vaiśākhatṛtīyāyāṃ kārtikapaurṇamāsyāṃ tithivratāni gṛdṛṇāti brahmacārī gṛhastho vanastho nārī naro vā śūdraḥ prayatamānasaḥ dīrghāyuṣyaṃ savituḥ sālokyaṃ vrajati||26
yaiścāpi purā rājannanena vidhinā etāsu tithiṣvanyajanmāntare upavāsavidhiḥ kṛtaḥ dānāni dattāni vividhaprakārāṇi brāhmaṇānāṃ tapasvijaneṣu vā | | 27
trirātropavāsināṃ tīrthayātrātapogurumātāpitṛśuśrūśāniratānāṃ teṣāṃ svargādibhogavāsanādihāgatānāṃ phalaniṣpatticihnāni manuṣyaloke pratyakṣata eva dṛśyante | | 28
hastyaśvayānayugyadhanaratnakanakahiraṇyakaṭakakeyūragraiveyakakaṭisūtrakarṇālaṅkāramukuṭavaravastravaranārī-varavilepanasurūpaguṇadīrghāyuṣo vigatādhivyādhayo dānopavāsaratānāṃ phalānyetāni nṛtyagīta-vāditramaṅgalapāṭhakaśabdairihādyāpi puṇyakṛto bodhyamānā dṛśyanta iti | | 29
tathākṛtopavāsā api hi dṛśyante | | 1.16.30
tathā adattadānā akṛtapuṇyāśca pratyakṣata eva dṛśyante | | 31
tadyathā kāṇakuṣṭhibadhirajaḍamūkavyaṅgā rogadāridryopasargavyādhihatāyuṣaśca dṛśyaṃte.adyāpi mānavāḥ | | 32
śatānīka uvāca
dvijendra tithayaḥ proktāḥ samāsena tvayā budha |
vistareṇaiva me bhūyaḥ prabrūhi dvijasattama | | 33
rahasyaṃ yattithīnāṃ tu devānāṃ ca viceṣṭitam |
yānīṣṭāni ca devānāṃ bhojyāni niyamāstathā | | 34
tāni me vada dharmajña yena pūto bhavenvaham |
nirdvandvo hi yathā vipra labhe yāgaphalāni tu | | 35
sumanturuvāca
rahasyaṃ yattithīnāṃ ca bhojanaṃ phalameva tu |
yāvacca yena niyamo viśeṣātstrījanasya ca | | 36
etatte sarvamākhyāmo rahasyaṃ tannibodha me |
yanmayā noktapūrvaṃ hi kasyacitsupriyasya hi | | 37
tatte.ahaṃ sampravakṣyāmi yasya devasya yā tithiḥ |
devatānāṃ rahasyāni vratāni niyamāstathā | | 38
tāñchṛṇuṣva mahābāho gadato mama nārada |
sṛṣṭiṃ pūrvaṃ vadiṣyāmi saṃkṣepeṇa tithiṃ prati | | 39
tamobhūtamidaṃ tvāsīdalabhyamavitarkitam |
jagadbrahmā samāgatyāsṛjadātmānamātmanā | | 1.16.40
saṃbhūtātmaiva ātmāsāvaṇḍamadhyādviniḥsṛtaḥ |
ātmanaivātmano hyaṇḍaṃ sṛṣṭvā sa vibhurāditaḥ | | 41
brahmā nārāyaṇākhyo.asau sṛṣṭiṃ kartuṃ samudyataḥ |
tābhyāṃ soṇḍakapālābhyāṃ divaṃ bhūmiṃ ca nirmame | | 42
diśaścaivopadiśaścaiva devādīndānavāṃstathā |
tithiṃ pūrvāmimāṃ rājaṃścakārātha vibhuḥ svayam | | 43
tithīnāṃ pravarā yasmādbrahmaṇā samudāhṛtā |
pratipāditā pare pūrve pratipattena tūcyate | | 44
asmātpadāttu tithayo yasmāttvanyāḥ prakīrtitāḥ |
asyānte kathayiṣyāmi upavāsavidhiṃ param | | 45
kārttikyāṃ māghasaptamyāṃ vaiśākhasya yugādiṣu |
niyamopavāsaṃ prathamaṃ grāhayeta vidhānavit 1 | | 46
yāṃ tithiṃ niyamaṃ kartuṃ bhaktyā samanugacchati |
tasyāṃ tithau vidhānaṃ yattannibodha janādhipa | | 47
yadā tu pratipadyāṃ vai gṛhṇīyānniyamaṃ nṛpa |
caturdaśyāṃ kṛtāhāraḥ saṃkalpaṃ parikalpayet | | 48
amāvāsyāṃ na bhuñjīta trikālaṃ snānamācaret |
pavitro hi japennityaṃ gāyatrīṃ śirasā saha | | 49
arcayitvā prabhāte tu gandhamālyairdvijottamān |
śaktyā kṣīraṃ pradadyāttu brahmā me prīyatāṃ prabhuḥ | | 1.16.50
tato bhuñjīta gokṣīramanena vidhinā nṛpa |
eṣa eva vidhirdṛṣṭaḥ sarvāsu tithiṣu nṛpa | | 51
saṃvatsaragate kāle vratametatsamāpyate |
vratāṃte yatphalaṃ tasya tannibodha narādhipa | | 52
vimuktapāpaḥ śuddhātmā divyadehasya dehinaḥ |
brahmā dadāti saṃtuṣṭo vimānamatitejasam | |
avyāhatagatiṃ divyaṃ kinnarāpsarasairyutam | | 53
ramitvā suciraṃ tatra daivataiḥ saha devavat |
iha cāgatya vipratvaṃ daśa janmānyasau labhet | | 54
vedavedāṃgavidyaśca dīrghāyuścaiva suprabhaḥ |
bhogī dhanapatirdātā jāyate.asau kṛte yuge | | 55
viśvāmitrastu rājendra brāhmaṇatvajigīṣayā |
tapaścacāra vipulaṃ santāpāya divaukasām | |
brāhmaṇatvaṃ na lebhe.asau lebhe vighnānanekaśaḥ | | 56
tatastu niyamātteṣāṃ tithīnāṃ pravarā tithiḥ |
upoṣitā bahuvidhā jñātvā brahmapriyāṃ tithim | | 57
tato dadau brahmā viśvāmitrāya dhīmate |
ihaiva tena dehena brāhmaṇatvaṃ sudurlabham | | 58
tithīnāṃ pravarā hyeṣā tithīnāmuttamā tithiḥ |
kṣatriyo vaiśyaśūdrau vā brāhmaṇatvamavāpnuyuḥ | | 59
evaṃ tithiriyaṃ rājankāmadā kañjajapriyā |
sarahasyā mayā proktā yā noktā yasya kasyacit | | 1.16.60
haihayaistālajaṅghaiśca turuṣkairyavanaiḥ śakaiḥ |
upoṣitā ihātraiva brāhmaṇatvamabhīpsubhiḥ 1 | | 61
ityeṣā paramā puṇyā śivā pāpaharā tathā |
paṭhitopāsitā rājañchraddhayā ca śrutā 1 tathā | | 62
māhātmyaṃ cāpi yopyasyāḥ śṛṇuyānmānavo nṛpa |
ṛddhiṃ vṛddhiṃ tathā kīrtiṃ śivaṃ cāpya divaṃ vrajet | | 63
iti śrībhaviṣye mahāpurāṇe śatārddhasāhasryāṃ saṃhitāyāṃ brāhme parvaṇi pratipatkalpavarṇanaṃ
nāma ṣoḍaśo.adhyāyaḥ | 16 |
atha saptadaśo.adhyāyaḥ
pratipatkalpaviṣaye brahmaṇaḥ pūjā
śatānīka uvāca
brūhi me vistarādbrahmanpratipatkṛtyamādarāt |
brahmapūjāvidhānaṃ ca pūjane yacca vai phalam | | 1
sumanturuvāca
śṛṇuṣvaikamanā rājankathayāmyeṣa śāntidam |
pūrvamekārṇave ghore naṣṭe sthāvarajaṅgame | | 2
svayambhūrabhavaddevaḥ surajyeṣṭhaścaturmukhaḥ |
sasarja lokāndevāṃśca bhūtāni vividhāni ca | | 3
kāyena manasā vācā jaṅgamasthāvarāṇi ca |
pitā yaḥ sarvadevānāṃ bhūtānāṃ ca pitāmahaḥ | | 4
tasmādeṣa sadā pūjyo yato lokaguruḥ paraḥ |
sṛjatyeṣa jagatkṛtsnaṃ pāti saṃharate tathā | | 5

|| śatānīka uvāca || ||
brūhi me vista rādbrahmanpratipatkṛtyamādarāt ||
brahmapūjāvidhānaṃ ca pūjane yacca vai phalam||1||
|| sumaṃturuvāca || ||
śṛṇuṣvaikamanā rājankathayāmyeṣa śāṃtidam ||
pūrvamekārṇave ghore naṣṭe sthāvarajaṃgame || 2 ||
svayaṃbhūrabhavaddevaḥ surajyeṣṭhaścaturmukhaḥ ||
sasarja lokāndevāṃśca bhūtāni vividhāni ca ||3||
kāyena manasā vācā jaṃgamasthāvarāṇi ca ||
pitā yaḥ sarvadevānāṃ bhūtānāṃ ca pitāmahaḥ || 4 ||
tasmādeṣa sadā pūjyo yato lokaguruḥ paraḥ ||
sṛjatyeṣa jagatkṛtsnaṃ pāti saṃharate tathā ||5||
rudro.asya manaso jāto viṣṇurjāto.asya vakṣasaḥ ||
mukhebhyaścaturo vedā vedāṃgāni ca kṛtsnaśaḥ || 6 ||
devāpsarasagaṃdharvāḥ sayakṣoragarākṣasāḥ ||
pūjayaṃti sadā vīra viriṃciṃ suranāyakam ||7||
sarvo brahmamayo lokaḥ sarvaṃ brahmaṇi saṃsthitam||
tasmātsamarcayedbrahmanya icchecchreya ātmanaḥ || 8 ||
yo na pūjayate bhaktyā surajyeṣṭhaṃ sureśvaram ||
na sa nākasya rājyasya na ca mokṣasya bhājanam || 9 ||
yastu pūjayate bhaktyā viriṃciṃ bhuvaneśvaram ||
sa nākarājyamokṣeṣu kṣipraṃ bhavati bhājanam || 1.17.10 ||
tasmātsaumyamanā bhūtvā yāvajjīvaṃ pratijñayā ||
arcayitvā sadā devamāpannopi naro nṛpa || 11 ||
varaṃ dehaparityāgo varaṃ narakasambhavaḥ ||
na tvevāpūjya bhuṃjaṃti devaṃ vai padmasaṃbhavam || 12 ||
sadā pūjayate yastu vīra bhaktyā pitāmaham ||
manuṣyacarmaṇā naddhaḥ sa vedhā nātra saṃśayaḥ||13||
na hi vedho.arcanātkiṃcitpuṇyamabhyadhikaṃ bhavet ||
iti vijñāya yatnena pūjanī yaḥ sadā vidhiḥ || 14 ||
yo brahmāṇaṃ dveṣṭi mohātsarvadevanamaskṛtam ||
naro narakagāmī syāttasya saṃbhāṣaṇādapi || 15 ||
brahmaṇorcāṃ pratiṣṭhāpya sarvayatnairvidhānataḥ ||
yatpuṇyaṃ phalamāpnoti tadekāgramanāḥ śṛṇu || 16 ||
sarvayajñatapodānatīrthavedeṣu yatphalam ||
tatphalaṃ koṭiguṇitaṃ labhedvedhaḥ pratiṣṭhayā || 17 ||
kañjajaṃ sthāpayedyastu kṛtvā śālāṃ manoramām ||
sarvāṃgamodita puṇyaṃ koṭikoṭiguṇaṃ labhet || 18 ||
mātṛjānpitṛjāṃścaiva yāṃ caivodvahate striyam ||
kulaikaviṃśamuttārya brahmaloke mahīyate || 19 ||
bhuktvā tu vipulānbhogānpralaye samupasthite ||
jñānayogaṃ samāsādya sa tatraiva vimucyate || 1.17.20 ||
atha vā rājyamākāṃkṣejjāyate saṃbhavāṃtare ||
saptadvīpasamudrāyāḥ kṣiteradhipatirbhavet || 21 ||
trisaṃdhyaṃ yo japedbrahma kṛtvāṣṭadala paṃkajam ||
paurṇamāsyāṃ pratipadi tasya puṇyaphalaṃ śṛṇu || 22 ||
anenaiva sa dehena brahmā saṃtiṣṭhate kṣitau ||
pāpahā sarvamartyānāṃ darśanātsparśanādapi || || 23 ||
uddhṛtya divi saṃsthāpya kulānāmekaviṃśatim ||
taiḥ kulaiḥ sahito nityaṃ modate gogato nṛpa || 24 ||
apyekavāraṃ yo bhaktyā pūjayetpadma saṃbhavam ||
padmasthaṃ mūrtimaṃtaṃ vā brahmalokaṃ sa gacchati ||25||
puṇyakṣayātkṣitiṃ prāpya bhavetkṣitipatirmahān ||
vedavedāṃgatattvajño brāhmaṇaścāpi jāyate|| || 26 ||
na tattapobhiratyugrairna ca sarvairmahāmakhaiḥ ||
gacchedbrahmapuraṃ divyaṃ mukttvā bhaktiparātmakān ||27||
mṛddārveṣṭakaśailairvā yaḥ kuryādbrahmaṇo gṛham ||
triḥsaptakulasaṃyukto brahmaloke mahīyate || 28 ||
mṛnmayātkoṭiguṇitaṃ phalaṃ dārviṣṭakāmaye ||
iṣṭakādviguṇa puṇyaṃ kṛte śailamaye gṛhe || 29 ||
krīḍamānopi yaḥ kuryācchālāṃ vai brahmaṇo nṛpa ||
brahmaloke sa labhate vimānaṃ sarvakāmikam || 1.17.30 ||
puṣpamālāparikṣiptaṃ kiṃkiṇījālabhūṣitam ||
dolāvikṣepasaṃpannaṃ ghaṃṭācāmarabhūṣitam || 31 ||
muktādāmavitānena śobhitaṃ sūryasuprabham ||
apsarogaṇasaṃkīrṇaṃ sarvakāmasukhapradam || 32 ||
tatroṣitvā mahābhogī krīḍamānaḥ sadā suraiḥ ||
punarāgatya lokesminrājā bhavati dhārmikaḥ || 33 ||
paśyanpariharañjantūnmṛdupūrvaṃ mahīpate ||
śanaiḥ saṃmārjanaṃ kurvaṃścāndrāyaṇaphalaṃ vrajet || 34 ||
vastrapūtena toyena yaḥ kuryādupalepanam ||
paśyanpariharañjatūṃścāṃdrāyaṇaphalaṃ labhet || 35 ||
nairaṃtaryeṇa yaḥ kuryātpakṣaṃ saṃmārjanārcanam ||
yugakoṭiśataṃ sāgraṃ brahmaloke mahīyate || 36 ||
tasyāṃte sa caturvedaḥ surūpaḥ priyadarśanaḥ ||
āḍhyaḥ sarvaguṇopeto rājā bhavati dhārmikaḥ || 37 ||
kapaṭenāpi yaḥ kuryādbrahmaśālāṃ sumānada ||
saṃmārjanādi vai karma so.api prāpnoti tatphalam || 38 ||
tāvaddhamaṃti saṃsāre duḥkhaśokabhayaplutāḥ ||
na bhavaṃti suraśreṣṭhe yāvadraktā mahīpate || 39 ||
samāsaktaṃ yathā cittaṃ jantorviṣayagocare ||
yadyevaṃ brahmaṇi nyastaṃ ko na mucyeta bandhanāt || 1.17.40 ||
khaṇḍasphuṭitasaṃskāraṃ śālāyāṃ yaḥ karoti vai ||
arāmāvasathādyeṣu labhate mauktikaṃ phalam || 41 ||
nāsti brahmasamo devo nāsti brahmasamo guruḥ ||
nāsti brahmasamaṃ jñānaṃ nāsti vedhaḥsamaṃ tapaḥ || 42 ||
pratipadyādisarveṣu divaseṣūtsaveṣu ca ||
parvakāleṣu puṇye paurṇamāsyāṃ viśeṣataḥ || 43 ||
śaṃkhabheryādinirghoṣairmahadbhigeṃyasaṃyutaiḥ ||
kuryānnīrājanaṃ deve surajyeṣṭhe caturmukhe || 44 ||
yāvatparvāṇi vidhinā kuryā nnīrājanaṃ nṛpa ||
tāvadyugasahasrāṇi brahmaloke mahīyate || 45 ||
snānakāle trisaṃdhyaṃ tu yaḥ kuryānnṛtyavādanam ||
gītaṃ vā mukhavādyaṃ vā tasya puṇya phalaṃ śṛṇu || 46 ||
yāvantyahāni kurute geyanṛtyādivādanam ||
tāvadyugasahasrāṇi brahmaloke mahīyate || 47 ||
kapilāpañcagavyena kuśavāriyutena ca ||
snāpayenmaṃtrapūtena brāhmaṃ snānaṃ hi tatsmṛtam || 48 ||
kapilāpaṃcagavyena dadhikṣīraghṛtena ca ||
snānaṃ śataguṇaṃ jñeyamitareṣāṃ narādhipa || 49 ||
devāgnikāryamuddiśya kapilāmāharetsadā ||
brahmakṣatraviśaścaiva na śūdrastu kadācana || 1.17.50 ||
kāpilaṃ yaḥ pibecchūdro devakāryārthanirmitam ||
sa pacyeta mahāghore suciraṃ narakārṇave || 51 ||
varṣakoṭisahasraistu yatpāpaṃ samupārjitam ||
surajyeṣṭhaghṛtābhyaṃgāddahetsarvaṃ na saṃśayaḥ || 52 ||
kalpakoṭisahasraistu yatpāpaṃ samupārjitam ||
pitāmahaghṛtasnānaṃ dahatyagniriveṃdhanam|53||
ghṛtasnānaṃ pratipadi sakṛtkṛtvā tu kāṃjajam ||
kulaikaviṃśamuttārya viṣṇuloke mahī yate ||54||
ayutaṃ yo gavāṃ dadyādbhaktyā vai vedapārage ||
vastrahemādiyuktānāṃ kṣīrasnānena yatphalam ||55||
sakṛdājyena payasā snapayettu yaḥ ||
gāṃgeyena sa yānena yāti brahmasalokatām || 56 ||
snāpya dadhnā sakṛdvīra kañjajaṃ viṣṇumāpnuyāt ||
madhunā snapayitvā tu vīraloke mahīyate || 57 ||
snānamikṣuraseneha yo viriṃceḥ samācaret ||
sa yāti lokaṃ savitastu tejasā bhāsayannabhaḥ || 58 ||
śuddhodakena yo bhaktyā snāpayetpadmasaṃbhavam ||
utsṛjya pāpakalilaṃ sa yātyeva salokatām || 59 ||
vastrapūtena toyena snapayedyaḥ sakṛdvibhum ||
sa sarvakālaṃ tṛptātmā lokavaśyatvamā pnuyāt || 1.17.60 ||
sarvauṣadhībhiryo bhaktyā snapayetpadmasaṃbhavam ||
kāṃcanena vimānena brahmaloke mahīyate || 61 ||
gandhacandanatoyena snāpayedyoṃbujodbhavam ||
rudralokamavāpnoti tejasā hemasannibhaḥ || 62 ||
pāṭalotpalapadmāni karavīrāṇi sarvadā ||
snānakāle prayojyāni sthirāṇi surabhīṇi ca || 63 ||
eṣāmekatamaṃ snānaṃ bhaktyā kṛtvā tu vedhasi ||
vidhūya pāpakalilaṃ vidhiloke mahīyate || 64 ||
karpūrāgarutoyena snapayedyastu kañjajam ||
sarvapāpaviśuddhātmā brahmaloke mahīyate || 65 ||
gāyatrīśatajaptena vimalenāṃbhasā vibhum ||
snapayitvā sakṛdbhaktyā brahmalokamavā pnuyāt || 66 ||
vibhuṃ śītāṃbunā snāpya dhāroṣṇapayasā tataḥ ||
tataḥ paścād ghṛtasnānaṃ kṛtvā pāpairvimucyate || 67 ||
etatsnānatrayaṃ kṛtvā pūjayitvā tu bhaktitaḥ ||
aśvamedhasahasrasya phalaṃ prāpnoti mānavaḥ || 68 ||
mṛtkuṃbhaistāmrajaiḥ kuṃbhaiḥ snānaṃ śataguṇaṃ bhavet ||
raupye lakṣottaraṃ proktaṃ haimaiḥ koṭiguṇaṃ bhavet || 69 ||
brahmaṇo darśanaṃ puṇyaṃ darśanātsparśanaṃ param ||
sparśanādarcanaṃ śreṣṭhaṃ ghṛtasnātamataḥ param || 1.17.70 ||
vācikaṃ mānasaṃ pāpaṃ ghṛtasnānena dehinām ||
kṣiṇute padmajo yasmāttasmātsnānaṃ samācaret || 71 ||
snapayitvārcayedbhaktyā yathā tacchṛṇu bhārata ||
śucivastradharaḥ snātaḥ kṛtanyāsaśca bhārata || 72 ||
caturhastaṃ likhetpadmaṃ caturbhāgavibhāgitam ||
madhye tasya likheccakraṃ dalairdvādaśabhiścitam || 73 ||
sarojāni tato nyasya akṣarāṇi samantataḥ ||
akṣaraṃ vihitaṃ cānyatpatrabhāge prakīrtitam || 74 || nānāvarṇakasaṃyogāllikheccaivānupūrvaśaḥ ||
kṛṣṇotkaṭaṃ tu madhyaṃ syātpītaraktaṃ tathā param || 75 ||
sitaṃ śuddhaṃ tu karttavyaṃ madhyabhāge tu vartulam ||
prabhākuṇḍalakairbāhyairveṣṭayeccakranāyakam ||76||
evamālikhya yatnena mūlamantraṃ tato nyaset ||
mūrdhnaḥ pādatalaṃ yāvatpraṇavaṃ vinyasedbudhaḥ || 77 ||
nādarūpaṃ nyasettāvadyāvacchabdasya śūnyatā ||
tatkāraṃ vinyasenmūrdhni sakāraṃ mukhamaṇḍale || 78 ||
vikāraṃ kaṇṭhadeśe tu tukāraṃ sarvasaṃdhiṣu ||
vakāraṃ hṛdi madhye tu rekāraṃ pārśvayordvayoḥ || 79 ||
ṇakāraṃ dakṣiṇe kukṣau yakāraṃ vāmasaṃjñake ||
bhakāraṃ kaṭinābhisthaṃ rgokāraṃ jānuparvasu || 1.17.80 ||
dekāraṃ jaṃghayornyasya vakāraṃ pādapadmayoḥ ||
syakāramaṃguṣṭhayornyasya dhīkāraṃ corasi nyaset || 81 ||
makāraṃ jānudeśe tu hikāraṃ guhyamāśritam ||
dhikāraṃ hṛdaye nyasya yokāraṃ cauṣṭhayo rnyaset || 82 ||
nakāraṃ nāsikāgre tu prakāraṃ netramāśritam ||
cokāraṃ tu bhuvormadhye dakāraṃ prāṇamāśritam || 83 ||
yākāraṃ vinyasenmūrdhni takāraṃ keśamāśritam ||
nyāsaṃ kṛtvātmano dehe deve kuryāttathā nṛpa ||
sarvopacārasaṃpannaṃ kṛtvā samyaṅ nirīkṣayet || 84 ||
kuṃkumāgurukarpūra candanena vimiśritam ||
gandhatoyamupaskṛtya gāyatryā praṇavena ca ||
prokṣayetsarvadravyāṇi paścādarcanamācaret || 85 ||
cakragranthiṣu sarvāsu praṇavaṃ viniveśayet ||
bhūyaḥ plutaṃ samuccārya praṇavaṃ sarvatomukham || 86 ||
vinyasetpadmamadhye tu pīṭhaniṣpattihetave ||
āsane pṛthivī jñeyā sarvasattvadharā matā || 87 ||
hrasvoṃkāre matā sā tu dīrghoṃkāre tu devarāṭ ||
plutastu vyāpayedbhāvaṃ mokṣadaṃ cāmṛtātmakam || 88 ||
yatnastho na nivarteta yogī prāṇaparāyaṇaḥ ||
āvāhanaṃ tataḥ kuryādakṣareṇa pareṇa tu || 89 ||
āvāhya tejorūpaṃ tu nyasenmantravarāṃstataḥ ||
tato vibhāvayeddevaṃ padmasthaṃ caturānanam||1.17.90||
sraṣṭāraṃ sarvajagatāṃ viṣṇurudravidhānagam||
saṃbhāvya gandhapuṣpādi saṃbhārānkramātsarvānprakalpayet||
gāyatrīmuccaranmantraṃ sarvakarmāṇi kārayet||92||
puṣpaṃ dhūpaṃ tathā dīpaṃ naivedyaṃ sumanoharam||
khaṃḍalaḍḍukaśrīveṣṭakāsārāśokavartikāḥ||93|| svastikollopikādugdhatilāveṣṭatilāḍhikāḥ||
phalāni caiva pakvāni lagnakhaṇḍaguḍāni ca||94||
anyāṃśca vividhāndadyātpūpāni vividhāni ca||
evamādīni sarvāṇi dāpayecachaktito nṛpa||95||
mūlamantreṇa devasya tato dehaṃ vibhāvayet ||
pūjayeccāpi vidhinā yena taṃ te bravīmyaham || 96 ||
prāṇāyāmatrayaṃ kṛtvā dehasaṃśodhanāya vai ||
āvāhayettatonantaṃ dhārayantaṃ vacaḥ sadā || 97 ||
dhyātvānantaṃ tato rudraṃ padmakiṃjalkamadhyagam ||
dhyāyedviṣṇuṃ tato devaṃ nyasetpadmodarodbhavam || 98 ||
evaṃ tridevatārūḍhaṃ padmamadhyeṃbujodbhavam ||
pūjayenmūlamantreṇa padmodarabhavaṃ nṛpa || 99 ||
ṛgvedaṃ tu yajurvedaṃ sāmavedaṃ ca pūjayet ||
jñānavairāgyamaiśvaryaṃ dharmaṃ saṃpūjayedbudhaḥ || 1.17.100 ||
īśānādikramādrājanvidiśāsu samaṃtataḥ ||
śikṣā kalpo vyākaraṇaṃ niruktaṃ chanda eva ca || 101 ||
jyotiṣaṃ ca mahābāho upavedāśca kṛtsnaśaḥ ||
itihāsapurāṇāni yathāyogyaṃ yathākramam || 102 ||
śikṣā kalpo vyākaraṇaṃ devasya purataḥ sadā ||
kalpādayastataścānye diśāsu vidiśāsu ca||103||
mahāvyāhṛtayaḥ sarvāḥ praṇavena samanvitāḥ||
pūrvādikramayogena pūjayedvidhinā nṛpa|| 104||
śaktayo brahmaṇastvetā lokarūpā vyavasthitāḥ||
pūjanīyāḥ prayatnena maṃtrarūpāḥ sthitāḥ svayam||105||
arakāṃtarasaṃsthāṃśca ṣaṭ samudrānsamarcayet ||
nakṣatrāṇi grahāścaiva rāśayaśca viśeṣataḥ | |
pūjyāḥ sarve yathānyāyaṃ surāgreṣu vyavasthitāḥ | | 106 ||
nāgāśca garuḍaścaiva pūjanīyastathāgrataḥ ||
devatā ṛṣayaścaiva sahitāḥ kulaparvatāḥ ||
tattejonilayāḥ sarve pūjanīyāḥ prayatnataḥ || 107 ||
ācamya vidhivatpūrvaṃ maṃtrapūtena vāriṇā ||
hṛdayādīnnyasedaṃgānhṛdayādiṣu kṛtsnaśaḥ | | 108 | |
śikhā netraṃ tathā carma astraṃ ca bharatarṣabha | |
maheṃdrādidiśaścaitāḥ pūjayedvidhivannṛpa | | 109 | |
hṛdayaṃ purataḥ pūjyaṃ śiro devasya pṛṣṭhataḥ ||
pūrvaṃ saṃpūjayeddevaṃ mūlamaṃtreṇa kṛtsnaśaḥ | | 1.17.110 ||
visarjayeddarśayitvā mudrāṃ tu bharatarṣabha | |
aṃkuśaṃ naraśārdūla hyāhvāne kaṃjamādiśet || 111 | |
yastvevaṃ pūjayeddevaṃ pratipannityameva ca | |
upoṣya paṃcadaśyāṃ tu sa yāti paramaṃ padam || 112 ||
|| sumaṃtu ruvāca | | | |
āpo hiṣṭheti maṃtro.ayaṃ hṛdayaṃ parikīrtitam | |
ṛtaṃ satyaṃ śikhā proktā udutyaṃ netramādiśet | | 113 ||
citraṃ devānāṃ mastamiti sarvalokeṣu viśrutam | |
varmaṇā te cchādayāmi kavacaṃ samudāhṛtam | | 114 | |
bhūrbhuvaḥ svariti tathā śirase parikīrtitam ||
gāyatrīmūlataṃtrastu sādhakaḥ sarvakarmaṇām | | 11 5| |
gāyatryā pūjayeddevamoṃkāreṇābhimaṃtritam| |
praṇavenāparānsarvānṛgvedādīnprapūjayet | | 116 | |
āhvāne pūjane vīra visarge brahmaṇastathā | |
gāyatrī paramo maṃtro vedamātā vibhāvinī | 117 ||
gāyatryakṣaratattvaistu pūjayedyastu devatām | |
sa gacchedbrahmaṇaḥ sthānaṃ durlabhaṃ yaddurā sadam | | 118 | | ||
iti śrībhaviṣye mahāpurāṇe śatārddhasāhasryāṃ saṃhitāyāṃ brāhme parvaṇi pratipatkalpe brahmaṇo.arcanavidhivarṇanaṃ nāma saptadaśo.adhyāyaḥ | | 17 | | cha | |
athāṣṭādaśo.adhyāyaḥ
pratipatkalpasamāptivarṇanam
sumanturuvāca
paurṇamāsyupavāsaṃ tu kṛtvā bhaktyā narādhipa |
anena vidhinā yastu viriñciṃ pūjayennaraḥ | | 1
pratipadyāṃ mahābāho sa gacchedbrahmaṇaḥ padam |
ṛgbhirviśeṣato 1 devī viriñcervāstudevatāḥ | | 2
kārttike māsi devasya rathayātrā prakīrtitā |
yāṃ kṛtvā mānavo bhaktyā yāti brahmasalokatām | | 3
kārtike māsi rājendra paurṇamāsyāṃ caturmukham |
mārgeṇa carmaṇā sārdhaṃ sāvitryā ca parantapa | | 4
bhrāmayennagaraṃ sarvaṃ nānāvādyaiḥ samanvitam |
sthāpayed bhrāmayitvā tu salokaṃ nagaraṃ nṛpa | | 5
brāhmaṇaṃ bhojayityāgre śāṃḍileyaṃ prapūjya ca |
āropayedrathe devaṃ puṇyavāditranisvanaiḥ | | 6
rathāgre śāṃḍilīputraṃ pūjayitvā vidhānataḥ |
bāhmaṇānvācayitvā ca kṛtvā puṇyāhamaṃgalam | | 7
devamāropayitvā tu rathe kuryātprajāgaram |
nānāvidhaiḥ prekṣaṇakairbrahmaghoṣaiśca puṣkalaiḥ | | 8
kṛtvā prajāgaraṃ hyevaṃ prabhāte brāhmaṇaṃ nṛpa |
bhojayitvā yathāśaktyā bhakṣyabhojyairanekaśaḥ | | 9
pūjayitvā janaṃ vīra vajreṇa vidhivannṛpa |
bījena ca mahābāho payasā pāyasena ca | | 1.18.10
brāhmaṇānvācayitvā ca cchāṃdena vidhinā nṛpa |
kṛtvā puṇyāhaśabdaṃ ca rathaṃ ca bhrāmayetpure | | 11
caturvedavidairviprairbhrāmayedbrahmaṇo ratham |
bahvṛcātharvaṇoccāraiśchandogādhvaryubhistathā | | 12
bhrāmayeddevadevasya surajyeṣṭhasya taṃ ratham |
pradakṣiṇaṃ puraṃ sarvaṃ mārgeṇa susamena tu | | 13
na voḍhavyo ratho vīra śūdreṇa śubhamicchatā |
nāruheta rathaṃ prājño muktvaikaṃ bhojakaṃ nṛpa | | 14
brahmaṇo dakṣiṇe pārśve sāvitrīṃ sthāpayennṛpa |
bhojako vāmapārśve tu purataḥ kañjajaṃ nyaset | | 15
evaṃ tūryaninādaistu śaṃkhaśabdaiśca puṣkalaiḥ |
bhrāmayitvā rathaṃ rājanpuraṃ sarvaṃ pradakṣiṇam | |
svasthāne sthāpayedbhūyaḥ kṛtvā nīrājanaṃ budhaḥ | | 16
ya evaṃ kurute yātrāṃ bhaktyā yabhrāpi paśyati |
rathaṃ cākarṣate yastu sa gacchedbrahmaṇaḥ padam | | 17
kārtike māsyamāvāsyāṃ yastu dīpapradīpanam |
śālāyāṃ brahmaṇaḥ kuryātsa gacchedbrahmaṇaḥ padam | | 18
pratipadi brāhmaṇāṃścāpi guḍamiśraiḥ pradīpakaiḥ |
vāsobhirahataiścāpi sa gacchedbrahmaṇaḥ padam | | 19
gaṃdhaipuṣpairnavairvastrairātmānaṃ 1 pūjayecca yaḥ |
tasyāṃ pratipadāyāṃ tu sa gacchedbrahmaṇaḥ padam | | 1.18.20
mahāpuṇyā tithiriyaṃ balirājyapravartinī |
brahmaṇaḥ supriyā nityaṃ bāleyā parikīrtitā | | 21
brāhmaṇānpūjayitvāsyāmātmānaṃ ca viśeṣataḥ |
sa yāti paramaṃ sthānaṃ viṣṇoramitatejasaḥ | | 22
caitre māsi mahābāho puṇyā pratipadā parā |
tasyāṃ yaḥ śvapacaṃ spṛṣṭvā snānaṃ kuryānnarottama | 23
na tasya duritaṃ kiñcinnādhayo vyādhayo nṛpa |
bhavanti kuruśārdūla tasmātsnānaṃ pravartayet | | 24
divyaṃ nīrājanaṃ taddhi sarvarogavināśanam |
gomahiṣyādi yatkiṃcittatsarvaṃ bhūṣayennṛpa | | 25
tailaśastrādibhirvastrastoraṇādhastato nayet |
brāhmaṇānāṃ tathā bhojyaṃ kuryātkurukulodvaha | | 26
tisro hyetāḥ parāḥ proktāstithayaḥ kurunandana |
kārttikeśvayuje māsi caitre māse ca bhārata | | 27
snānaṃ dānaṃ śataguṇaṃ kārttike yā tithirnṛpa |
balirājyāptisukhadā pāṃśulāśubhanāśinī | | 28
iti śrībhaviṣye mahāpurāṇe śatārddhasāhasryāṃ saṃhitāyāṃ brāhme parvaṇi pratipatkalpasamāptivarṇanaṃ nāmāṣṭādaśo.adhyāyaḥ | 18 |
athaikonaviṃśo.adhyāyaḥ
śaryātyākhyāne puṣpadvitīyā varṇanam
sumanturuvāca
dvitīyāyāṃ tu rājendra aśvinau somapītinau |
cyavanena kṛtau yajñe miṣato maghavasya ca | | 1
śatānīka uvāca
kathamindrasya miṣataḥ kṛtau tau somapītinau |
cyavanena hi devānāṃ paśyatāṃ tadvadasva me | | 2
aho mahattapastasya cyavanasya mahātmanaḥ |
yadindrasya balādeva devatvaṃ prāpitāvubhau | | 3
sumanturuvāca
purātanayuge sandhau paścime.atha narādhipa |
cyavano yogamāsthāya gaṃgākūle.avasacciram | | 4
tatra śaryātirāyātaḥ snātumantaḥ puraiḥ saha |
snātvābhyarcya pitṛrndevāngamanāyopacakrame | | 5
tatra mūḍhaṃ janapadamapaśyatpathi ceṣṭanam |
viṇmūtrotsargasaṃruddhaṃ jyotirākṣiptaniṣkriyam | |
bhramantaṃ tatratatraiva samīkṣya sa balaṃ nṛpaḥ | | 6
uvāca durmanā rājā amātyānsvānpurogamān |
cyavanasyāśramo.ayaṃ hi nāparāddhaṃ tu kenacit | | 7
na covāca yadā kaścittasya rājñastu pṛcchataḥ |
tadā sutā sukanyāsya provāca pitaraṃ vacaḥ | | 8
mayā dṛṣṭaṃ tu yattāta sakhibhiḥ saha kautukam |
tatte vacmi nibodha tvaṃ śṛṇu tāta mahādbhutam | | 9
śiñjitārāvabahulāḥ kāñcīnūpuramekhalāḥ |
gāyantyo vilapantyaśca kīḍantyaścātra kānane | | 1.19.10
kokiladhvanimaśrauṣaṃ vyaktāvyaktākṣaraṃ kṛśam |
sukanye hyehihyehīti valmīkādvacamudgiran | | 11
tatra gatvādbhutaṃ tāta paśyāmaḥ kila pāvakau |
dīpāvivācalaśikhau bhūyaḥ kanyā uvāca ha | | 12
mayā ca kautukāttāta kimetadityabuddhitaḥ |
sūditau darbhasūcyagraistattejaḥ samupāramat | | 13
tacchrutvā nṛpatistrastastūrṇaṃ tadvanamāgamat |
yatrāste bhārgavaḥ kaṣṭaṃ valmīkāntargato muniḥ | | 14
gatvā sa tatra provāca praṇipatya dvijottamam |
aparāddhaṃ mayā 1 deva tatkṣamasva namo.astu te | | 15
sa taṃ provāca nṛpatiṃ mayā jñātaṃ narādhipa |
sukanyāṃ me prayacchasva niveśārthī hyahaṃ nṛpa | |
anukramansukanyāṃ tu dattvā rājansukhī bhava | | 16
ityuktaḥ pradadau rājā sukanyāmavicārayan |
tataḥ svapuramāgamya avasatsuciraṃ sukhī | | 17
sukanyāpi patiṃ labdhvā suprītārādhayattadā |
rājyaśriyaṃ parityajya valkalājinadhāriṇī | | 18
gate bahutithe kāle vasante samupasthite |
tapodyotitasarvāṅgīṃ rūpodāryaguṇānvitām | |
snātāṃ svabhāryāṃ cyavana uvāca madhurākṣaram | | 19
ehyehi bhadre bhadraṃ te śayanīyaṃ samāśraya |
apatyaṃ janayasyādya kuladvayavivardhanam | | 1.19.20
evamuktā tu sā kanyā prāñjaliḥ patimabravīt |
nārhasyadya sukalyāṇa saṅgamaṃ sthaṇḍile.asame | | 21
mama priyaṃ kuruṣvādya tato māmāhvayasva ca |
pitṛgehe yathātiṣṭhaṃ śayanīye susaṃskṛte | | 22
bahugairikavarṇādyaiḥ śvetapītāruṇākule |
vastrālaṅkāragandhādyaistathā tvamapi tatkuru | | 23
ātmāna vayasopetaṃ rūpavantaṃ suvarcasam |
vastrālaṅkāragandhāḍhyaṃ paśyeyaṃ yena sādaram | | 24
sukanyāyā vacaḥ śrutvā cyavanaḥ prāha durmanāḥ |
na me.asti vittaṃ kalyāṇi pituste.asti yathā vane | | 25
sa kadhaṃ bhūṣayāmyadya surūpaśca kathaṃ vada |
provāca sā patiṃ bhūyaḥ prahasantī kṛtāñjaliḥ | |
vittaṃ dadāvailavilo rūpaṃ vairocano.adadat | | 26
cyavanaḥ prāha bhāryāṃ tāṃ na 1 kariṣye tapovyayam |
evamuktvā tapaścograṃ tatāpa suciraṃ tadā | | 27
atha tatrāgatau vīrāvaśvinau kālaparyayāt |
dṛṣṭavantau sukanyāṃ tau dīptyā vai devatāmiva | | 28
upagamyocatustāṃ tau kā tvaṃ sundari rūpiṇī |
kimarthamiha ekā tvaṃ tiṣṭhase kastavāśrayaḥ | | 29
sā tāvuvāca tanvaṅgī śaryātiduhitā hyaham |
bhartā ca cyavano mahyaṃ kau ca vāṃ me tathocyatām | | 1.19.30
ūcatuścāśvinau devāvāvāṃ viddhi nṛpātmaje |
kiṃ kariṣyasi tena tvaṃ jīrṇena ca kṛśena ca | |
āvayorvṛṇu bhartāramekameva yamicchasi | | 31
sā tvabravīcca mā maivaṃ vaktumarhau divaukasau |
bhartāramanuraktāṅgī yathā svāhā vibhāvasoḥ | | 32
aśvināvūcatuḥ
āyātu ca viśatvadya cyavano vaiṣṇavījalam |
tato nau madhyagaṃ hyekaṃ vṛṇīṣvānyaṃ yamicchati | | 33
tāvabrūtāṃ sukanyāṃ tu gatvā pṛccha svakaṃ patim |
taṃ ca pṛṣṭvā punaścātrāgaccha nau sannidhau punaḥ | | 34.
āvāmatraiva tiṣṭhāvo yāvadāgamanaṃ tava |
sā gatvā prāha bhartāramaśvināvevasūcatuḥ 1 | | 35
rūpavantaṃ ca bhartāraṃ kariṣyāvo yamicchasi |
atha madhyagataṃ hyekaṃ bhartṛtvena variṣyasi | | 36
evamastviti tāṃ prāha bhāryāṃ cyavanastvaran |
sā taṃ gṛhya jagāmāśu yatra tau bhiṣajāvubhau | | 37
sā tāvuvāca cyavano yathoktaṃ bhavatorvacaḥ |
kurutaṃ hyaśvinau kṣipraṃ sukanyā cepsitaṃ vṛṇot | | 38
tau taṃ saṅgṛhya gaṅgāyāṃ praviṣṭau muninā saha |
muhūrtāttu samuttiṣṭhanrūpataśca śriyā vṛtāḥ | | 39
śobhante sma mahābāhau kamudbhidya tapoyutāḥ |
kalpādau kalaśe yadvatkañjākṣa vyoma vedhasaḥ | |
udakādutthitāstasmātsarve te samarūpakāḥ ||1.19.40
sukanyā tu tato dṛṣṭvā bharttāraṃ devarūpiṇam |
harṣeṇa mahatāviṣṭā na ca taṃ veda bhārata ||41
samakāyāḥ samavayaḥ samarūpāḥ samaśriyaḥ |
vastrālaṅkārasadṛśāndṛṣṭvā cintāṃ gatā ciram ||42
sā cintayitvā suciraṃ vaidyadevāvuvāca ha |
bībhatso.api mayā bhartā parityakto na karhicit ||43
bhavadbhirātmasaṃdṛśaṃ kathaṃ tyaktvā vṛṇe param |
tasmāttameva bhartāraṃ prayacchadhvaṃ divaukasaḥ ||44
tayā sabahumānaṃ tau prāñjalyā prārthitau tadā |
devacihnāni svānyeva dhārayantau supūjitau ||45
sukanyā nipuṇaṃ tau tu sunirīkṣya ca vihvalā |
na rajo na nimeṣo vai na spṛśete dharāṃ pade ||46
ayaṃ ca sarajā mlāno bhūmimāśritya tiṣṭhati |
nimeṣaṃ caiva tasyaivaṃ jñātvā vai cyavano vṛtaḥ ||47
cyavane vṛte sukanyayā puṣpavṛṣṭiḥ papāta ha |
devadundubhayaścaiva prāvādyanta anekaśaḥ ||48
tatastu cyavanastuṣṭo divyarūpadharastadā |
uvāca tau tu suprīta aśvinau kiṃ karomi vām ||49
bhāryā dattā kṛtaṃ rūpaṃ devānāmapi durlabham |
upakāraṃ variṣṭhaṃ yo na karotyupakāriṇaḥ ||1.19.50
ekaviṃśatsa gacchecca narakāṇi krameṇa vai |
tasmādahaṃ variṣṭhaṃ vai kariṣye.ahamamānuṣam | | 51
upakāraṃ bhavadbhyāṃ tu prītaḥ kuryāṃ suniścitam |
yajñabhāgaphalaṃ dadyāṃ yaddeveṣvapi durlabham | | 52
evamuktvā tu deveśau visasarja mahāmuniḥ |
ājagāmāśramaṃ puṇyaṃ sahabhāryo mudānvitaḥ | | 53
atha śuśrāva śaryātiścyavanaṃ devarūpiṇam |
jagāma ca mahātejā draṣṭuṃ munivaraṃ vaśī | | 54
taṃ dṛṣṭvā praṇipatyādau pratipūjya yathārhataḥ |
sukanyāṃ tu tato dṛṣṭvā praṇipatyābhinandya ca | | 55
sasvaje mūrdhni āghrāya tatotsaṅgaṃ 1 samānayat |
sā tasyāḥ sasvaje premṇā ānandāśrupariplutā | |
saṃsthāpya tāṃ mudā yukto nṛpatiḥ saha bhāryayā | | 56
bhūyo.abravītsusaṃtuṣṭaṃ cyavanastaṃ narādhipam |
saṃbhāraṃ kuru yajñārthaṃ yājayiṣye narādhipa | | 57
evamuktaḥ sa nṛpatiḥ praṇipatya mahāmunim |
jagāma svapuraṃ hṛṣṭo yajñārthaṃ yatnamācarat | | 58
sapreṣyānpreṣayankṣipraṃ yajñārthe dravyamāharat |
maṃtripurohitācāryānānayāmāsa satvaram | | 59
samānīteṣu sarveṣu teṣu dravyeṣu bhārata |
ājagāma viśuddhātmā cyavanaḥ saha bhāryayā | | 1.19.60
sampūjitaśca śuśrāva mahāntaṃ tyāgamaujasam |
anyaiśca bahubhiḥ sārddhamatryaṅgirasabhārgavaiḥ | | 61
pravartite mahāyajñe yajamāne nṛpottame |
ṛtviktvakarmanirate hūyamāne hutāśane | |
āhūtāḥ svāgatāḥ sarve bhāgārthaṃ tridivālayāḥ | | 62
yajñabhāge pravṛtte tu śāstroktena vidhānataḥ |
āgatāvaśvinau tatra āhūto cyavanena tu | | 63
āhvāne kriyamāṇe tu aśvibhyāṃ tu tadā nṛpa |
provācendro.atha cyavanaṃ naitau bhāgānvitau kuru | |
devānāṃ bhiṣajāvetau na bhāgārhau na daivatau | | 64
cyavanastviṃdramāhedaṃ devau hyetāvubhāvapi |
mamopakāriṇāvetau dadmi bhāgaṃ na saṃśayaḥ | | 65
tato hyuvāca sakrodhaḥ sa śakraścyavanaṃ ruṣā |
viprarṣe prahariṣyāmi yadi bhāgaṃ prayacchasi | | 66
evamuktastu viprarṣirna covācāpi kiñcana |
bhāgau dadau ca so.aśvibhyāṃ sruvamudyamya mantrataḥ | | 67
atha udyamya bhiduraṃ moktukāmo divaspatiḥ |
stambhitaścyavanenātha savajraḥ sa narādhipa | | 68
sa stambhayitvātvindraṃ tu bhāgaṃ dattvāśvinorvaśī |
samāpayāmāsa tadā yajñakarma yathārthavat | | 69
kañjajo.athājagāmāśu āha ca cyavanaṃ tadā |
uttaṃbhyatāmayaṃ lekho bhāgaścāstvaśvinoriha ||1.19.70
tathendrastamuvācedaṃ cyavanaṃ prītamānasaḥ |
jānāmi śaktiṃ tapasaścyavaneha tavottamām ||7 1
khyāpanārthaṃ hi tapasastava etatkṛtaṃ mayā |
adyaprabhṛti bhāgo.astu devatvaṃ cāśvinostathā ||72
yastvimāṃ tapasaḥ khyātiṃ tvadīyāṃ vai paṭhiṣyati |
śṛṇuyādvāpi śuddhātmā tasya puṇyaphalaṃ śṛṇu ||73
virocanasado gatvā gatvā puṣpasadastathā |
kāle.atha vāmadevasya muñjakeśasadastathā ||
yauvanayuktaḥ sa krīḍāstiṣṭhatīti na saṃśayaḥ ||74
evamuktvā jagāmāśu devaḥ svabhavanaṃ vaśī |
cyavano.api sabhāryo vai śayārtiścāśramaṃ gataḥ ||75
athāpaśyadvimānābhaṃ bhavanaṃ devanirmitam |
śayyāsanavarairjuṣṭaṃ sarvakāmasamṛddhimat ||76
udyānavāpibhirjuṣṭaṃ devendreṇa samāhṛtam |
gokhaṇḍasannibhaṃ reje gṛhaṃ tadbhuvi durlabham ||77
subhūṣaṇāni divyāni ratnavanti mahānti ca |
arajānsi ca vastrāṇi divyaprāvaraṇāni ca | |78
tatsarvamakhilaṃ saha patnyā mahāmuniḥ |
mudaṃ paramikāṃ lebhe śakraṃ ca praśaśaṃsa ha ||79
evamiṣṭā tithiriyaṃ dvitīyā aśvinornṛpa |
devatvaṃ yajñabhāgaṃ ca samprāptāviha bhārata ||1.19.80
upoṣyā vidhinā yena taṃ śṛṇuṣva narādhipa |
rūpaṃ surūpaṃ yo vāñcheddvitīyāyāṃ narādhipa | | 81
kārtike śuklapakṣasya dvitīyāyāṃ narādhipa |
puṣpāhāro varṣamekaṃ bhavetsa niyatātmavān | | 82
kālaprāptāni yāni syurhaviṣyaṃ kusumāni tu |
bhuñjīyāttāni dattvā tu brāhmaṇebhyo narādhipa | | 83
sauvarṇaraupyapuṣpāṇi atha vā jalajāni 1 ca |
vratānte tasya santuṣṭau devau tribhuvane.aśvinau | | 84
dadatuḥ kāmagaṃ divyaṃ vimānamatitejasam |
suciraṃ divi nārībhirloke.asau ramate.aśvinoḥ | | 85
iha cāgatya kalpānte jāto vipraḥ puraskṛtaḥ |
vedavedāṃgaviduṣaḥ saptajanmāntarāṇyasau | | 86
jāto jāto bhavedvidvānbrāhmaṇo.asau kṛte yuge |
dātā yajñapatirvāgmī ādhivyādhivivarjitaḥ | | 87
putrapautraiḥ parivṛtaḥ saha pantyā.avasacciram |
madhyadeśe sunagare 2 dharmiṣṭho rājyabhāgbhavet | | 88
ityeṣā kathitā tubhyaṃ dvitīyā puṣpasaṃjñitā |
phalasaṃjñā tathānyā syātsute vai muñjakeśini | | 89
suṣṭhu puṇyā pāpaharā viṣṭaraśravasaḥ priyā |
aśūnyaśayanā loke prakhyātā kurunandana | | 1.19.90
tāmupoṣya naro rājañchraddhābhaktipuraskṛtaḥ |
ṛddhiṃ vṛddhiṃ śriyaṃ vātha bhāryayā saha modate | | 91
iti śrībhaviṣye mahāpurāṇe śatārddhasāhasryāṃ saṃhitāyāṃ brāhme parvaṇi dvitīyākalpe śaryātyākhyāne puṣpadvitīyāvarṇanaṃ nāmaikonaviṃśo.adhyāyaḥ | 19 |
atha viṃśo.adhyāyaḥ
aśūnyaśayanā nāmnyāḥ dvitīyātithermahattvam
śatānīka uvāca
brūhi me dvijaśārdūla dvitīyāṃ phalasaṃjñitām |
yāmupoṣya naro yoṣidviyogaṃ neha gacchati | | 1
patnyā naro muniśreṣṭha bhāryā ca patinā 1 saha |
tāmahaṃ śrotumicchāmi vidhavā strī na jāyate | |
upoṣitena yenārya patnyā ca sahito naraḥ | | 2
tanme brūhi dvijaśreṣṭha śreyo.arthaṃ narayoṣitām |
yena me kautukaṃ brahmañchrutvāpūrvaṃ prasarpati | | 3
sumanturuvāca
aśūnyaśayanāṃ nāma dvitīyāṃ śṛṇu bhārata |
yāmupoṣya na vaidhavyaṃ strī prayāti narādhipa | |
patnīviyuktaśca naro na kadācitprajāyate | |4
śete jagatpatiḥ kṛṣṇaḥ śriyā sārdhaṃ yadā nṛpa |
aśūnyaśayanā nāma tadā grāhyā hi sā tithiḥ | | 5
kṛṣṇapakṣe dvitīyāyāṃ śrāvaṇe māsi bhārata |
idamuccārayetsnātaḥ praṇamya jagataḥ patim | |
śrīvatsadhāriṇaṃ devaṃ bhaktyābhyarcya śriyā saha | | 6
śrīvatsadhāriñchrīkānta śrīvatsa śrīpate.avyaya |
gārhasthyaṃ mā praṇāśaṃ me yātu dharmārthakāmadam | | 7
gāvaśca mā praṇaśyantu mā praṇaśyantu me janāḥ | | 8
jāmayo mā praṇaśyantu matto dāmpatyabhedataḥ |
lakṣmyā viyujye.ahaṃ deva na kadācidyathā bhavān | | 9
tathā kalatrasambandho deva mā me viyujyatām |
lakṣmyā na śūnyaṃ varada yathā te śayanaṃ sadā | | 1.20.10
śayyā mamāpyaśūnyāstu tathā tu madhusūdana |
evaṃ pramādya pūjāṃ ca kṛtvā lakṣmyāstathā hareḥ | | 11
phalāni dadyācchāyāyāmabhīṣṭāni jagatpatim |
naktaṃ 1 praṇamyāyatane havirbhuñjīta vāgyataḥ | | 12
brāhmaṇāya dvitīye.ahni śaktyā dadyācca dakṣiṇām | | 13
śatānīka uvāca
kāni tāni abhīṣṭāni keśavasya phalāni tu |
yojyāni śayane vipra devadevasya kathyatām | | 14
kiṃ ca dānaṃ dvitīye.ahni dātavyaṃ brāhmaṇasya tu |
bhaktairnarairdvijaśreṣṭha devadevasya śaktitaḥ | | 15
sumanturuvāca
yāni tatra mahābāho kāle santi phalāni tu|
madhurāṇi sutīvrāṇi na cāpi kaṭukāni tu | | 16
dātavyāni nṛpaśreṣṭha svaśaktyā śayane nṛpa |
madhurāṇi pradattāni naro vallabhatāṃ yajet | | 17
yoṣicca kuruśārdūla bharturvallabhatāmiyāt |
tasmātkaṭukatīvrāṇi strīliṅgāni vivarjayet | | 18
kharjūramātuliṅgāni śvetena śirasā saha |
phalāni śayane rājanyajñabhāgaharasya tu | | 19
deyāni kuruśārdūla svaśaktyā muñjakeśine |
etānyeva tu viprasya gāṅgeyasahitāni tu | | 1.20.20
dvitīye.ahni pradeyāni bhaktyā śaktyā ca bhārata |
vāsodānaṃ tathā dhānyaphaladānasamanvitam | |
gāṅgeyasya viśeṣeṇa dhānyadānaṃ pracakṣate | | 21
evaṃ karoti yaḥ samyaṅnaro māsacatuṣṭayam |
tato janmatrayaṃ vīra gṛhabhaṅgo na jāyate | | 22
aśūnyaśayanaścāsau dharmakāmārthasādhanaḥ |
bhavatyavyāhataiśvaryaḥ puruṣo nātra saṃśayaḥ | | 23
nārī ca rājandharmajñā vratametadyathāvidhi |
yā karoti na sā śocyā bandhuvargasya jāyate | | 24
vaidhavyaṃ durbhagatvaṃ ca bhartṛtyāgaṃ ca sattama |
nāpnoti janma triyatametaccīrtvā mahāvratam | | 25
adattvā kaṭukānīha phalāni kurunandana |
kharjūramātuliṅgāni bṛhatphalaśirāṃsi ca | | 26
dattvā dvijebhyo rājendra madhurāṇi parāṇi ca |
tasmātsvaśaktyā yattena deyāni madhurāṇi ca | | 27
ityeṣā kathitā kṛṣṇadvitīyā tithiruttamā |
yāmupoṣya naro rājannṛddhiṃ vṛddhiṃ tathā vrajet | | 28
śatānīka uvāca
bhavatā kathiteyaṃ vai dvitīyā tithiruttamā |
aśvibhyāṃ dvijaśārdūla kathamasyāṃ janārdanaḥ | | 29
sampūjyaḥ phalasaṃjñāyāṃ kathitaḥ padmayā saha |
tadatra kautukaṃ mahyaṃ sumahajjāyate dvija | | 1.20.30
sumanturuvāca
evametanna sandeho tathā vadasi bhārata |
aśvinorvai tithiriyaṃ kiṃ tu vākyaṃ nibodha me | | 31
aśūnyaśayanā dattā viṣṇoramitatejasaḥ |
aśvibhyāṃ kuru śārdūla prītaye muñjakeśinaḥ | | 32
tāveva kuruśārdūla pūjyete.atra mahīpate |
nāsatyau bhagavānviṣṇurdattaśca śrīrvibhāvyate | | 33
iti śrībhaviṣye mahāpurāṇe śatārddhasāhasryāṃ saṃhitāyāṃ brāhme parvaṇi
dvitīyākalpasamāptau viṃśo.adhyāyaḥ | 20 |
athaikaviṃśo.adhyāyaḥ
tṛtīyātithivratamāhātmyam
sumantaruvāca
pativratā patiprāṇā patiśuśrūṣaṇe ratā |
evaṃvidhāpi yā proktā śuciḥ saṃśobhanā satī | | 1
sopavāsā tṛtīyāṃ tu lavaṇaṃ parivarjayet |
sā gṛhṇāti ca vai bhaktyā vratamāmaraṇāntikam | | 2
gaurī dadāti santuṣṭā rūpaṃ saubhāgyameva ca |
lāvaṇyaṃ lalitaṃ hṛdyaṃ ślāghyaṃ puṃsāṃ manoramam | | 3
puṃso manoramā nārī bharttā nāryā manoramaḥ |
gaurīvratena bhavati rāja~mllavaṇavarjanāt | | 4
idaṃ vrataṃ prati vibho dharmarājasya śṛṇvataḥ |
umayā ca purā proktaṃ yadvākyaṃ tannibodha me | | 5
mayā vratamidaṃ sṛṣṭaṃ saubhāgyakaraṇaṃ nṛṇām |
martye tu niyatā nārī vratametaccariṣyati | |
saha bhartrā sa modeta yathā bhartā haro mama | | 6
yā ca kanyā na bhartāraṃ vindate śobhanā satī |
sā tvidaṃ vratamuddiśya bhavedakṣārabhojanā | |
maccittā manmanāḥ kuryānmadbhaktā matparigrahā | | 7
gaurīṃ saṃsthāpya sauvarṇīṃ gandhālaṅkārabhūṣitām |
vastrālaṅkārasaṃvītāṃ puṣpamaṇḍalamaṇḍitām | | 8
lavaṇaṃ guḍaṃ ghṛtaṃ tailaṃ devyai śaktyā nivedayet | 1
kaṭukhaṇḍaṃ jīrakaṃ ca patraśākaṃ ca bhārata | | 9
guḍaghṛṣṭāṃstathāpūpānkhaḍaveṣṭāṃstathā nṛpa |
brāhmaṇe vratasampanne pradadyātsubahuśrute | | 1.21.10
śuklapakṣe sadā deyā yathā śaktyā hiraṇmayī |
dhanahīne tu bhaktyā ca madhuvṛkṣamayī nṛpa | | 11
arcyā nityaṃ saṃnidhānāttatra gaurī na saṃśayaḥ |
akṣāralavaṇaṃ rātrau bhuṃkte caiva suvāgyatā | | 12
gaurī sannihitā nityaṃ bhūmau prastaraśāyinī |
evaṃ niyamayuktasya devyā yatsamudāhṛtam | | 13
tacchṛṇuṣva mahābāho kathyamānaṃ mahāphalam |
bhartāraṃ tu labhetkanyā yaṃ vācchati mano.anugam | | 14
suciraṃ saha vai bhartrā krīḍayitvā ihaiva sā |
santatiṃ ca pratiṣṭhāpya saha tenaiva gacchati | | 15
helilokaṃ candralokaṃ lokaṃ citraśikhaṇḍinaḥ |
gatvā yāti sado rājanvāmadevasya bhārata | | 16
vidhavā tu yadā rājandevyā vrataparāyaṇā |
bharttāraṃ niyatā nityaṃ sadārcanaparāyaṇā | | 17
iha cotsṛjya dehaṃ svaṃ dṛṣṭvā haripure priyam |
ākṣipya yamadūtebhyaḥ saha bhartrā rameddivi | | 18
varṣakoṭiṃ daśaguṇāṃ ramitvā sā ihāgatā |
bhartrā sahaiva pūrvoktaṃ labhate phalamīpsitam | | 19
indrāṇyāpi vratamidaṃ putrārthinyā narādhipa |
labdhaḥ putro vratasyānte jayanto nāma nāmataḥ | | 1.21.20
arundhatyā tathā cīrṇaṃ vaśiṣṭhaṃ prati kāmataḥ |
dṛśyate divi cādyāpi vaśiṣṭhasya samīpataḥ | | 21

rohiṇyā lavaṇatyāgātsapannīgaṇamardanam |
labdhaṃ devyāḥ prasādena saubhāgyamacalaṃ divi | | 22

ityeṣā tithirityeva tṛtīyā lokapūjitā |
sadā viśeṣataḥ puṇyā vaiśākhe māsi yā bhavet | | 23

puṇyā bhādrapade māsi māghepyevaṃ na saṃśayaḥ |
māghe bhādrapade cāpi strīṇāṃ dhanyā pracakṣate | | 24

sādhāraṇī tu vaiśākhe sarvalokasya bhārata |
māghamāse tṛtīyāyāṃ guḍasya lavaṇasya ca | |

dānaṃ śreyaskaraṃ rājanstrīṇāṃ ca puruṣasya ca | | 25

guḍena tuṣyate datto lavaṇena tu viśvabhūḥ |
guḍapūpāstu dātavyā māsi bhādrapade tathā | | 26

tṛtīyāyāṃ tu māghasya vāmadevasya prītaye |
vāridānaṃ praśastaṃ syānmodakānāṃ ca bhārata | | 27

vaiśākhe māsi rājendra tṛtīyā candanasya ca |
vāriṇā tuṣyate vedhā modakairbhīma eva hi | |
dānāttu candanasyeha kañjajo nātra saṃśayaḥ | | 28

yātveṣā kuruśārdūla vaiśākhe māsi vai tithiḥ |
tṛtīyā sā.akṣayā loke gīrvāṇairabhinanditā | | 29

āgateyaṃ mahābāho bhūri candraṃ vasuvratā |
kaladhautaṃ tathānnaṃ ca ghṛtaṃ cāpi viśeṣataḥ | |

yadyaddattaṃ tvakṣayaṃ syātteneyamakṣayā smṛtā | | 1.21.30

yatkiñciddīyate dānaṃ svalpaṃ vā yadi vā bahu |
tatsarvamakṣayaṃ syādvai teneyamakṣayā smṛtā | | 31

yo.asyāṃ dadāti karakanvāribījasamanvitān |
sa yāti puruṣo vīra lokaṃ vai hemamālinaḥ | | 32

ityeṣā kathitā vīra tṛtīyā tithiruttamā |
yāmupoṣya naro rājannṛddhiṃ vṛddhiṃ śriyaṃ bhajet | | 33

iti śrībhaviṣye mahāpurāṇe śatārddhasāhasryāṃ brāhme parvaṇi tṛtīyākalpavidhivarṇanaṃ
nāmaikaviṃśo.adhyāyaḥ | 21 |
atha dvāviṃśo.adhyāyaḥ
caturthītithivratamāhātmyam
sumanturuvāca
caturthyāṃ tu sadā rājannirāhāravratānvitaḥ |
dattvā tilānnaṃ viprasya svayaṃ bhuṃkte tilaudanam | | 1
varṣadvaye samāptirhi vratasya tu yadā bhavet |
vināyakastasya tuṣṭo dadāti phalamīhitam | | 2
yāti bhāgyanivāsaṃ hi krīḍate vibhavaiḥ saha |
iha cāgatya puṇyānte divyo divyavapuryaśāḥ | | 3
matimāndhṛtimānvāgmī bhāgyavānkāmakāravā_n |
asādhyānyapi sādhyeha kṣaṇādeva mahāntyapi | | 4
hantyaśvarathasampannaṃ ṣalīputrasahāyavān |
rājā bhavati dīrghāyuḥ saptajanmānyasau nṛpa | |
etaddadāti santuṣṭo vighnahantā vināyakaḥ | | 5
śatānīka uvāca
vighnaḥ kasya kṛtastena yena vighnavināyakaḥ |
etadvadasva vighneśa vighnakāraṇamadya me | | 6
sumanturuvāca
kaumāre lakṣaṇe puṃsāṃ strīṇāṃ ca sukṛte kṛte |
vighnaṃ cakāra vighneśo gāṅgeyasya vināyakaḥ | | 7
taṃ tu vighnaṃ viditvāsau kārttikeyo ruṣānvitaḥ |
utkṛṣya dantaṃ tasyāsyāddhantuṃ taṃ ca samudyataḥ | | 8
nivāryāpṛcchaddeveśo roṣaḥ kāryaḥ kutastvayā |
taṃ cācakhyau sa pitre vai kṛtaṃ pūruṣalakṣaṇam | |
tatra vighnakṛte mahyaṃ yoṣitā na ca lakṣaṇam | | 9
athovāca mahādevaḥ prahasantsvasutaṃ kila |
mama kiṃ lakṣaṇaṃ putra paśyase tvaṃ vadasva me | | 1.22.10
sa covāca kare tubhyaṃ kapālaṃ dvijalakṣitam |
avicāreṇa saṃsthāpyaṃ kapālī tena cocyate | |
sa tallakṣaṇamādāya samudre prākṣipadruṣā | | 11
atha devasamāje vai pravṛtte brahmarudrayoḥ |
ahaṃ jyāyānahaṃ jyāyānvivādo.abhūttayordvayoḥ | |
tava saṃbhūtyabhijño.asti māṃ tu veda na kaścana | | 12
evaṃ śive.ati bruvati brahmaṇaḥ pañcamaṃ śiraḥ |
muktāṭṭahāsaṃ provāca tvāmahaṃ veditā bhava | | 13
evaṃ bruvantu rudreṇa brāhmaṃ hayaśiro mahat |
nakhāgreṇa nikṛttaṃ ca tasyaiva ca kare sthitam | | 14
karasthenaiva tenāsāvāgacchadyatra vai hariḥ |
tapastepe tadā merau tatrāsau bhagavānvaśī | | 15
kṛtte hayaśire tasminsthānāttasmāttu brahmaṇaḥ |
roṣādviniḥsṛtastvanyaḥ puruṣaḥ śvetakuṇḍalī | | 16
kavacī saśiraskaśca saśaraḥ saśarāsanaḥ |
anirdeśyavapuḥ sragvī kiṃ karomi sa cābravīt | | 17
athovāca ruṣā brahmā hanyatāṃ sa sudurmatiḥ |
sa tu mārgeṇa rudrasya āgacchadroṣato drutam | | 18
rudro.api viṣṇutejobhiḥ praviṣṭaḥ sa tvadhiṣṭhitaḥ |
sa praviśya tadāpaśyattapantaṃ cottamaṃ tapaḥ | |
haro nārāyaṇaṃ devaṃ vaikuṇṭhamaparājitam | | 19
haraṃ dṛṣṭvātha samprāptaṃ kāryaṃ cāsya vicintya ca |
uvāca śūlinaṃ devo bhindhi śūlena me bhujam | | 1.22.20
sa bibheda mahātejā bhujaṃ śūlena taṃ haraḥ | | 21
śūlabhedādasṛkcordhvaṃ jagāmāvṛtya rodasī |
vinivṛtya tataḥ paścātkapāle nipapāta ha | | 22
asṛkkapāle patitaṃ pradeśinyā vyavarddhayat |
yadā hi vinivṛttiḥ syāddevasya rudhiraṃ prati | | 23
tadā tu vyasṛjattoyaṃ sa kṛtvā vāruṇīṃ tanum |
toye pravṛtte.asṛgbhūte kapāle yatra tacchiraḥ | | 24
kapāle tu pradeśinyā rudro.asau rudhire.asṛjat |
āmuktakavacaṃ raktaṃ raktakuṇḍalinaṃ naram | | 25
athovāca bhavaṃ devaṃ kiṃ karomīti mānada |
asāvapi sasarjātha śvetakuṇḍalinaṃ naram | | 26
tāvubhau samayudhyetāṃ dhanuṣpravaradhāriṇau |
yathā rājanbalīyāṃsau kujaketū yugātyaye | | 27
tayostu yudhyatorevaṃ saṃvartaścādhiko gataḥ |
na cādṛśyata vijaya ekasyāpi tadā tayoḥ | | 28
athāntarikṣe tau dṛṣṭvā vāguvācāśarīriṇī |
avatāro.atha bhavitā yuvayorhi mayā saha | | 29
bhārāpanodaḥ karttavyaḥ pṛthivyarthe suraiḥ saha |
tadāścaryo hi bhavitā devakāryārthasiddhaye | | 1.22.30
bhūlokabhāvaṃ nirdhūya bhūyo gantā surālayam |
evamuktvā tu vaikuṇṭho dadāvekaṃ ravestadā | | 31
śvetakuṇḍalinaṃ dṛptaṃ taṃ jagrāha ravirmudā |
indrasyāpi tataḥ paścādraktakuṇḍalinaṃ dadau ||32
jagrāha ca mudā yukta indraḥ svaṃ ca puraṃ yayau |
gatau ravīndrau pragṛhya puruṣau krodhasambhavau ||3 3
athovāca tadā rudraṃ devaḥ kamalasaṃsthitaḥ |
gaccha tvamapi kāpāle kapālavratacaryayā ||
avatāro vratasyāsya martyaloke bhaviṣyati || 34
ye ca vrataṃ tvadīyaṃ vai dhārayiṣyanti mānavāḥ |
na teṣāṃ durlabhaṃ kiñcidbhaviteha paratra ca ||35
evaṃ saṃlapya bahuśaḥ sumukhaṃ pratinandya ca |
āhūya ca samudraṃ sa pratyuvācāvicārayan ||36
kuruṣvābharaṇaṃ strīṇāṃ lakṣaṇaṃ yadvilakṣaṇam |
kārttikeyena yatproktaṃ tadvadasvāvicārayan || 37
sa cāha mama nāmnedaṃ bhavetpuruṣalakṣaṇam |
devena tatpratijñātamevametadbhaviṣyati ||38
kārttikeyena yatproktaṃ tadvadasvāvicārayan ||39
prayacchāsya viṣāṇaṃ vai niṣkṛṣṭaṃ yattvayā.adhunā |
avaśyameva tadbhūtaṃ bhavitavyaṃ tu kasyacit ||1.22.40
ṛte vināyakaṃ tadvai daivayogānna kāmataḥ |
gṛhāṇa etatsāmudraṃ yattvayā parikīrtitam ||41
strīpuṃsorlakṣaṇaṃ śreṣṭhaṃ sāmudramiti viśrutama |
imaṃ ca saviṣāṇaṃ vai kuru devavināyakama ||42
athovāca ca deveśaṃ bāhuleyaḥ samatsaram |
viṣāṇaṃ dadmi cāsyāhaṃ tava vākyānna saṃśayaḥ | | 43
yadā tvayaṃ viṣāṇaṃ ca muktvā tu vicariṣyati |
tadā viṣāṇamuktaḥ sanbhasma aitaṃ kariṣyati | | 44
evamastviti taṃ coktvā viṣāṇaṃ tatkare dadau |
