vināyakasya deveśaḥ kārtikeyamate sthitaḥ | | 45
saviṣāṇakaro.adyāpi dṛśyate pratimā nṛpa |
bhīmasūnormahābāhorvighnaṃ karttuṃ mahātmanaḥ | | 46
etadrahasyaṃ devānāṃ mayā te samudāhṛtam |
yatra devo na vai veda devānāṃ bhuvi durlabham | | 47
mayā prasannena tava guhyametadudāhṛtam |
kathitaṃ tithisaṃyoge vināyakakathāmṛtam | | 48
ya idaṃ śrāvayedvidvānbrāhmaṇānvedapāragān |
kṣatriyāṃśca svavṛttisthānviṭśūdrāṃśca guṇānvitān | | 49
na tasya durlabhaṃ kiñcidiha cāmutra vidyate |
na ca durgatimāpnoti na ca yāti parābhavam | | 1.22.50
nirvighnaṃ sarvakāryāṇi sādhayennātra saṃśayaḥ |
ṛddhiṃ vṛddhiṃ śriyaṃ cāpi vindeta bharatottama | | 51
iti śrībhaviṣye mahāpurāṇe śatārddhasāhasryāṃ saṃhitāyāṃ brāhme parvaṇi caturthīkalpavarṇanaṃ
nāma dvāviṃśo.adhyāyaḥ | 22 |

vighna-vināyakakathāvarṇanam
śatānīka uvāca
kenāyaṃ bhīmajo vipra pramathādhipatiḥ kṛtaḥ |
bhartṛtve cāpi vighnānāmadhikārī kathaṃ babhau | | 1
sumanturuvāca
sādhu pṛṣṭo.asmi rājendra yadayaṃ vighnakārakaḥ |
yairvāpi vighnakaraṇairniryukto.api vināyakaḥ | |
tatte vacmi mahābāho śṛṇuṣvaikamanādhunā | | 2
ādye kṛtayuge vīra prajāsargamavāpa ha |
dṛṣṭvā karmāṇi siddhāni vinā vighnena bhārata | | 3
agatakleśāṃ prajāṃ dṛṣṭvā garvitāṃ kṛtsnaśo nṛpa |
bahuśaścintayityā tu idaṃ karma mahīpate | | 4
vināyakaḥ samṛddhyarthaṃ prajānāṃ viniyojitaḥ |
gaṇānāṃ cādhipatye ca bhīmaḥ kañjajasāttvataiḥ | |
tatopasṛṣṭo yastasya lakṣaṇāni nibodha me | | 5
svapnevagāhate.atyarthaṃ jalaṃ muṇḍāṃśca paśyati |
kāṣāyavāsasaścaiva kravyādāṃścādhirohati | | 6
antyajairgardabhairuṣṭraiḥ sahaikatrāvatiṣṭhate |
vrajamānastathātmānaṃ manyate.anugataṃ paraiḥ | | 7
vimanā viphalārambhaḥ saṃsīdatyanimittataḥ |
karaṭārūḍhamātmānamambhasontaragaṃ tathā | | 8
pattibhiścāvṛtaṃ yāntaṃ saṅgamanāntikaṃ nṛpa |
paśyate kuruśārdūla svapnānte nātra saṃśayaḥ | | 9
cittaṃ ca vikṛtākāraṃ karavīravibhūṣitam |
tenopasṛṣṭo labhate na rājyaṃ paurvasaṃbhavam | | 1.23.10
kumārī na ca bhartāramapatyaṃ garbhiṇī tathā |
ācāryatvaṃ śrotriyaśca śiṣyāścādhyayanaṃ tathā | |
vaṇiglābhaṃ ca nāpnoti kṛṣiṃ caiva kṛṣīvalaḥ | | 11
snapanaṃ tasya kartavyaṃ puṇye.ahani .a mahīpate |
gaurasarṣapakalkena sājyenotsāditena tu | | 12
śuklapakṣe caturthyāṃ tu vāsare dhiṣaṇasya ca |
tiṣye ca vīranakṣatre tasyaiva purato nṛpa | | 13
sarvauṣadhaiḥ sarvagandhairviliptaśirasastathā |
bhadrāsanopaviṣṭasya svasti vācya dvijāñchubhān | | 14
vyomakeśaṃ tu sampūjya pārvatīṃ bhīmajaṃ tathā |
kṛṣṇaṃ sapitaraṃ tāta pavamānaṃ sitaṃ tathā | | 15
dhiṣaṇaṃ cenduputraṃ ca koṇaṃ ketuṃ ca 3 bhārata |
vidhuntudaṃ bāhuleyaṃ nandakasya ca dhāriṇam | | 16
aśvasthānādgajasthānādvalmīkātsaṅgamādhradāt |
mṛttikāṃ rocanāṃ gandhānguggulaṃ cāpsu nikṣipet | | 17
yadāhṛtaṃ hyekavarṇaiścaturbhiḥ kalaśairhradāt |
carmaṇyānaḍuhe rakte sthāpyaṃ bhadrāsanaṃ tathā | | 18
sahasrākṣaṃ śatadhāramṛṣibhiḥ 1 pāvanaṃ kṛtam |
tena tvāmabhiṣiñcāmi pāvamānyaḥ punantu te | | 19
bhagaṃ te varuṇo rājā bhagaṃ sūryo bṛhaspatiḥ |
bhagamindraśca vāyuśca bhagaṃ saptarṣayo daduḥ | | 1.23.20
yatte keśeṣu daurbhāgyaṃ sīmante yacca mūrdhani |
lalāṭe karṇayorakṣṇorāpastad ghnantu te sadā | | 21
snātasya sārṣapaṃ tailaṃ suveṇaudumbareṇa tu |
juhuyānmūrdhani kuśānsavyena parigṛhya tu | | 22
mitaśca sammitaścaiva tathā ca śālakaṃṭakaḥ |
kūṣmāṇḍo rājaśreṣṭhāste.agnayaḥ svāhāsamanvitāḥ | | 23
nāmabhirbalimantraiśca namaskārasamanvitaiḥ |
dadyāccatuṣpathe śūrpe kuśānāstīrya sarvataḥ | | 24
kṛtākṛtāṃstaṇḍulāṃśca palalaudanameva ca |
matsyānpakvāṃstathaivāmānmāṃsametāvadeva tu | | 25
puṣpaṃ citraṃ sagandhaṃ ca surāṃ ca trividhāmapi |
mūlakaṃ pūrikāḥ pūpāṃstathaivoṇḍerikāsrajam | |
dadhipāyasamannaṃ ca guḍaveṣṭānsamodakān | | 26
vināyakasya jananīmupatiṣṭhettato.ambikām |
dūrvāsarṣapapuṣpāṇāṃ dattvā puṣpāñjalitrayam | | 27
rūpaṃ dehi yaśo dehi bhagaṃ bhagavati dehi me |
putrāndehi dhanaṃ dehi sarvānkāmāṃśca dehi me | |
acalāṃ buddhiṃ me dehi dharāyāṃ khyātimeva ca | | 28
tataḥ śuklāmbaradharaḥ śuklamālyānulepanaḥ |
bhojayed brāhmaṇāndadyādvastrayugmaṃ gurorapi | | 29
evaṃ vināyakaṃ pūjya grahāṃścaiva vidhānataḥ |
karmaṇāṃ phalamāpnoti śriyaṃ prāpnotyanuttamām | | 1.23.30
ādityasya sadā pūjāṃ tilakaṃ svāminastathā |
vināyakapateścaiva sarvasiddhimavāpnuyāt | | 31
iti śrī bhaviṣye mahāpurāṇe śatārddhasāhasryāṃ saṃhitāyāṃ brāhme parvaṇi caturthīkalpavarṇanaṃ
nāma trayoviṃśo.adhyāyaḥ | 23 |
atha caturviśo.adhyāyaḥ
caturthīkalpe puruṣalakṣaṇavarṇanam
śatānīka uvāca
narāṇāṃ yoṣitāṃ caiva lakṣaṇāni mahāmate |
proktāni yāni viprendra vyomakeśasya sūnunā | | 1
kruddhena yāni kṣiptāni īśvareṇa mahodadhau |
kṛṣṇasya vacanād bhūyaḥ samudreṇārpitāni vai | | 2
arpitāni tatastasya tena prāptāni vai kathan |
bāhuleyena viprendra tāni me vada suvrata | | 3
sumanturuvāca
yathā guhena rājendra strīpuṃsāṃ lakṣaṇāni vai |
proktāni kuruśārdūla tathā te kathayāmi vai | | 4
śaktipātāddhate krauñce vyomakeśasya sūnunā |
brahmā tuṣṭo.abravīdenaṃ varaṃ varaya me.anagha | | 5
asāvapi mahātejāḥ praṇamya śirasā vibhum |
pitāmahaṃ babhāṣedaṃ lakṣaṇaṃ brūhi me vibho | | 6
narāṇāṃ yuvatīnāṃ ca kautukaṃ paramaṃ mama |
yanmayoktaṃ purā deva prakṣiptaṃ lavaṇārṇave | | 7
matpitrā devadeveśa sakrodhena purā tathā |
prāptaṃ ca vismṛtaṃ bhūyastanme brūhi hyaśeṣataḥ | | 8
brahmovāca
sādhu pṛṣṭo.asmi deveśa bhīmasyānandavardhana |
lakṣaṇāni nibodha tvaṃ puruṣāṇāmaśeṣataḥ | |
adhamottamamadhyāni yāni prāpa payonidhiḥ | | 9
śive.ahani sunakṣatre grahe saumye śubhe ravau |
pūrvāhṇe maṅgalairyukte parīkṣeta vicakṣaṇaḥ | | 1.24.10
pramāṇaṃ saṃhatiṃ chāyāṃ gatiṃ sarvāṅgalakṣaṇam |
dantakeśanakhaśmaśru etatsarvaṃ vicakṣaṇaḥ | | 11
pūrvamāyuḥ parīkṣeta paścāllakṣaṇamādiśet |
kṣīṇe hyāyuṣi martyānāṃ lakṣaṇaiḥ kiṃ prayojanam | | 12
jaghanyo navatiḥ prokto madhyamastu śatāḍgulaḥ |
aṣṭottaraśataṃ yasya uttamaṃ tasya lakṣaṇam | | 13
pramāṇalakṣaṇaṃ proktaṃ samudreṇa śubhāśubham |
yanme purā devavara mayā vai kathitaṃ tava | |
ataḥ paraṃ pravakṣyāmi dehāvayavalakṣaṇam | | 14
pādaiḥ samāṃsakaiḥ 2 snigdhai raktaṃ saumyaiḥ suśobhanaiḥ |
unnataiḥ svedarahitaiḥ śirāhīnaiśca pārthivaḥ | | 15
yasya pādatale rekhā sāṃkuśeva prakāśate |
satataṃ hi sukhaṃ tasya puruṣasya na saṃśayaḥ | | 16
asvedanau mṛdutalau kamalodarasannibhau |
śliṣṭāṅgulī 1 tāmranakhau supārṣṇī vyomakeśaja | | 17
uṣṇau śirāvirahitau gūḍhagulphau ca bhīmaja |
kūrmonnatau ca caraṇau prakhyātau pārthivasya tu | 18
śūrpākṛtī mahābāho rūkṣau śvetanakhau tathā |
vakrau śirāsantatau ca saṃśuṣkau viralāṅgulī | | 19
dāridryaduḥkhadau jñeyau caraṇau bhīmanandana |
brahmaghnau devaśārdūla 3 pakvamṛtsadṛśau padau | | 1.24.20
pītāvagamyāniratau kṛṣṇau pānaratau sadā |
abhakṣyabhakṣaṇe śvetau jñeyau senādhipottama | | 21
aṅguṣṭhau pṛthulau yeṣāṃ te narā bhāgyavarjitāḥ |
kliśyante vikṛtāṅguṣṭhāste narāḥ pādagāminaḥ | | 22
cipiṭairvikṛtairbhagnairaṅguṣṭhairatininditāḥ |
vakrairbhagnaistathā hrasvairaṅguṣṭhaiḥ kleśabhāginaḥ | | 23
śūrpākāraiśca vikṛtairbhagnarvakraiḥ śirātataiḥ |
sasvedaiḥ pāṇḍurūkṣaiśca caraṇairatininditāḥ | | 24
yasya pradeśinī dīrghā aṅguṣṭhaṃ yā atikramet |
strībhogaṃ labhate nityaṃ puruṣo nātra saṃśayaḥ | |
kaniṣṭhāyāṃ tu dīrghāyāṃ suvarṇasya tu bhāginaḥ | | 25
cipiṭā viralāḥ śuṣkā yasyāṅgulyo bhavanti vai |
sa bhavedduḥkhito nityaṃ dhanahīnaśca vai 4 guha | | 26
śvetairnakhairvirūkṣaiśca puruṣā duḥkhajīvinaḥ |
kuśīlāḥ kunakhairjñeyāḥ kāmabhogavivarjitāḥ | |
vikṛtaiḥ sphuṭitairūkṣairnakhairdāridryabhāginaḥ | | 27
brahmahatyāṃ ca kurvanti puruṣā haritairnakhaiḥ |
bandhubhiśca viyujyante kulakṣayakarāśca te | | 28
indragopakasaṃkāśairnakhairnṛpatayaḥ smṛtāḥ |
śaṅkhāvartapratīkāśairnakhairbhavati pārthivaḥ | | 29
tāmrairnakhaistathaiśvaryaṃ dhanyāḥ padmanakhā narāḥ |
raktairnakhaistathaiśvaryaṃ puṣpitaiḥ subhago bhavet | |
sūkṣmairupacitaistāmrairnakhairnṛpatayaḥ smṛtāḥ | | 1.24.30
romaśābhyāṃ ca jaṅghābhyāṃ duḥkhadāridryabhāginaḥ |
bandhanaṃ hrasvajaṅghānāmaiśvaryaṃ caiva nirdiśet | | 31
mṛgajaṅghāśca rājāno jāyante nātra saṃśayaḥ |
dīrghajaṅghāḥ sthūlajaṅghā nityaṃ bhāgyavivarjitāḥ | | 32
śṛgālajaṅghāḥ puruṣā nityaṃ bhāgyavivarjitāḥ |
kākajaṃghā narā ye tu bhaveyurduḥkhabhāginaḥ | | 33
pīnajaṅghāstathaiśvaryaṃ prāpnuvanti na saṃśayaḥ |
siṃhavyāghrasamā jaṅghā dhaninaḥ parikīrtitāḥ | | 34
pārthivānāṃ bhavedroma caikaikaṃ romakūpake |
paṃḍitaśrotriyāṇāṃ ca dvedve jñeye mahāmate | | 35
tribhistribhistathā niḥsvā mānavā duḥkhabhāginaḥ |
keśāścaiva mahābāho ninditā pūjitāstathā | | 36
nirmāṃsajānurmriyate pravāse śivanandana 3 | | 37
saubhāgyamalpai kathitaṃ dāridryaṃ vikaṭaistathā |
nimnaiḥ svastrījitā jñeyāḥ samāṃsai rājyabhāginaḥ | | 38
haṃsabhāsaśukānāṃ ca tulyā yasya gatirbhavet |
sa bhavetpārthivaḥ pūjyaḥ samudravacanaṃ yathā | | 39
anyeṣāmapi śastānāṃ pakṣiṇāṃ ca śubhā gatiḥ |
vṛṣasiṃhagajendrāṇāṃ gatirbhogavivardhinī | | 1.24.40
jalormisadṛśī yā ca kākolūkasamā ca yā |
gatirdravyavihīnānāṃ duḥkhaśokabhayaṅkarā | | 41
śvānoṣṭmahiṣāṇāṃ kharasūkarayostathā |
gatirmeṣasamā yeṣāṃ te narā bhāgyavarjitāḥ | | 42
iti śrībhaviṣye mahāpurāṇe śatārddhasāhasryāṃ saṃhitāyāṃ brāhme parvaṇi caturthīkalpe
puruṣalakṣaṇavarṇanaṃ nāma caturviṃśodhyāyaḥ | 24 |
atha pañcaviṃśo.adhyāyaḥ
puruṣalakṣaṇavarṇanam
brahmovāca
dakṣiṇāvartaliṅgaśca naro vai putramānbhavet |
vāmāvarte tathā liṅge naraḥ kanyāṃ prasūyate | | 1
sthūlaiḥ śirālairviṣamairliṅgairdāridryamādiśet |
ṛjubhirvartulākāraiḥ puruṣā putrabhāginaḥ | | 2
nimnapādopaviṣṭasya bhūmiṃ spṛśati mehanaḥ |
duḥkhitaṃ taṃ vijānīyātpuruṣaṃ nātra saṃśayaḥ | | 3
bhūmau pādopaviṣṭasya gulphau spṛśati mehanaḥ |
īśvaraṃ taṃ vijānīyātpramadānāṃ ca vallabham | | 4
siṃhavyāghrasamo yasya hrasvau bhavati mehanaḥ |
bhogavānsa tu vijñeyo.aśeṣabhogasamanvitaḥ | | 5
rekhākṛtirmaṇiryasya mehane hi virājate |
pārthivaḥ sa tu vijñeyaḥ samudravacanaṃ yathā | | 6
suvarṇarajataprakhyairmaṇimuktāsamaprabhaiḥ |
pravālasadṛśaiḥ snigdhairmaṇibhiḥ pārthivo bhavet | | 7
pāṇḍurairmalinai rūkṣairdīrghavyāsairdiśo vrajet |
samaistathonnataiścāpi susnigdhairmaṇibhirgṛhī | | 8
dhanarakṣāstathā strīṇāṃ bhoktāraste bhavanti hi |
maṇibhirmadhyanimnaistu pitaraste bhavanti hi | | 9
yuvatīnāṃ mahābāho niḥsvāścāpi bhavanti te |
nolbaṇaiścāpi dhanino narā vīrā bhavanti hi | | 1.25.10
mūtradhārā patedekā valitā dakṣiṇā yadi |
sa bhavetpārthivaḥ pṛthvyāḥ samudravacanaṃ yathā | | 11
dve dhāre ca tathā snigdhe dhanavānbhogavānsmṛtaḥ |
bahudhārāstathā rūkṣāḥ saśabdāḥ puruṣādhamāḥ | | 12
mīnagandhi bhavedreto dhanavānputravānbhavet |
havigandhi bhavedyasya dhanāḍhyaḥ śrotriyaḥ smṛtaḥ | | 13
mūṣagandhirbhavetputrī padmagandhirnṛpaḥ smṛtaḥ |
lākṣāgandhirbhavedyaśca bahukanyaḥ prajāyate | |
madyagandhirbhavedyoddhā kṣāragandhirdaridrakaḥ | | 14
śīghramaithunagāmī yaḥ sa dīrghāyurato.anyathā |
alpāyurdevaśārdūla vijñeyo nātra saṃśayaḥ | | 15
tanuśukraḥ strījanako māṃsagandhī ca bhogavān |
padmavarṇaṃ bhavedraktaṃ sa naro dhanavānbhavet | | 16
kiñcidraktaṃ tathā kṛṣṇaṃ bhavedyasya tu śoṇitam |
adhamaḥ sa tu vijñeyaḥ sadā duḥkhaikabhājanam | | 17
pravālasadṛśaṃ snigdhaṃ bhavedyasya ca śoṇitam |
rājānaṃ taṃ vijānīyātsaptadvīpādhipaṃ guha | | 18
vistīrṇā māṃsalā snigdhā vastiḥ puṃsāṃ praśasyate |
nirmāṃsā vikaṭā rūkṣā bastiryeṣāṃ na te śubhāḥ | | 19
gomāyusadṛśī yasya śvānoṣṭramahiṣasya ca |
sa bhavedduḥkhito nityaṃ puruṣo nātra saṃśayaḥ | | 1.25.20
yaścaikavṛṣaṇastāta jale prāṇānvimuñjati |
strīcañcalastu viṣamaiḥ samai rājyaṃ pracakṣate | | 21
ūrdhvagaiścāpi hrasvāyuḥ śatañjīvī pralambadhṛk |
mānavāścāpi raktaistu dhanavanto bhavanti vai | | 22
sthūlasphigbhavati kṣemī dravyayuktaḥ samāṃsadhṛk |
vyāghrasphiṅmaṇḍalo rājā maṇḍūkasphiṅnarādhipaḥ | |
dvimaṇḍalo mahābāho siṃhasphiksārvabhaumatā | | 23
uṣṭravānarayoryastu dhārayetsphiṅmahāmate |
dhanadhānyavihīno.asau vijñeyo bhīmanandana | | 24
pumānmṛgodaro dhanyo mayūrodara eva ca |
vyāghrodaro narapatī rājā siṃhodaro bhavet | | 25
maṇḍūkasadṛśaṃ yasya puruṣasyodaraṃ bhavet |
sa bhavetpārthivaḥ puṣṭyā samudravacanaṃ yathā | | 26
māṃsalairṛjubhirvṛttaiḥ pārśvairnṛpatayaḥ smṛtāḥ |
īśvaro vyāghrapṛṣṭhastu senāyāścaiva nāyakaḥ | | 27
siṃhapṛṣṭho naro yastu bandhanaṃ tasya nirdiśet |
kūrmapṛṣṭhāstu rājāno dhanasaubhāgyabhāginaḥ | | 28
vistīrṇaṃ hadayaṃ yeṣāṃ māṃsalomacitaṃ samam |
śatāyuṣo vijānīyādbhogabhājo mahādhanān | | 29
viralāḥ śuṣkāstathā rūkṣā dṛśyante.aṅgulayaḥ kare |
sa bhaved duḥkhito nityaṃ naro dāridryabhājanam | | 1.25.30
yasya mīnasamā rekhā karmasiddhibhra tasya tu |
dhanavānsa tu vijñeyo bahuputraśca mānavaḥ | | 31
tulā yasya tu vedī vā karamadhye tu dṛśyate |
tasya sidhyati vāṇijyaṃ puruṣasya na saṃśayaḥ | | 32
saumye pāṇitale yasya dvijasya tu viśeṣataḥ |
yajñayājī bhavennityaṃ bahuvittaśca mānavaḥ | | 33
śailaṃ vāpyatha vā vṛkṣaḥ karamadhye tu dṛśyate |
acalāṃ śriyamāpnoti bahubhṛtyasamanvitaḥ | | 34
śaktitomarabāṇāsirekhā 1 cāpopamā tathā |
yasya haste mahābāho sa jayedvigrahe ripūn | | 35
dhvajabhrāpyatha vā śaṃkhaḥ karamadhye tu dṛśyate |
samudrayāyī sa bhaveddhanī ca satataṃ guha | | 36
śrīvatsamatha vā padmaṃ vajraṃ vā cakameva ca |
ratho vāpyatha vā kumbho yasya haste prakāśate | |
rājānaṃ taṃ vijānīyātparasainyavidāraṇam | | 37
dakṣiṇe tu karāṅguṣṭhe yavo yasya tu dṛśyate |
sarvavidyāpravaktā ca bhavedvai nātra saṃśayaḥ | | 38
yasya pāṇitale rekhā kaniṣṭhāmūlamutthitā |
gatā madhyaṃ pradeśinyāḥ sa jīveccharadaḥ śatam | | 39
iti śrībhaviṣye mahāpurāṇe śatārdhasāhasryāṃ saṃhitāyāṃ brāhme parvaṇi caturthīkalpe
puruṣalakṣaṇavarṇanaṃ nāma pañcaviṃśo.adhyāyaḥ | 25 |

atha ṣaḍaviṃśo.adhyāyaḥ
puruṣalakṣaṇavarṇanam
brahmovāca
samakukṣirbhavedbhogī nimnakukṣirdhanāpahaḥ |
māyāvī viṣamā 1 kukṣistathā kuhakakṛtsadā | | 1
rājā syānnimnakukṣistu sārvabhaumo mahābalaḥ |
sarpodarā daridrāḥ syurbahubhakṣāśca suvrata | | 2
vistīrṇābhirmaṇḍalābhirunnatābhiśca nābhibhiḥ |
bhavanti sukhino vīrā dhanadhānyasamanvitāḥ | | 3
nimnābhiratha svalpābhiḥ kleśabhājo bhavanti hi |
valirmadhyaṅgatā vīrā viṣamā ca viśeṣataḥ | |
dhanahāniṃ tathā śūlaṃ nityaṃ janayate vibho | | 4
vāmāvārtā sadā śāntiṃ karotīti vidurbudhāḥ |
karoti medhāṃ dakṣiṇena saṃpravṛttā divaspate | | 5
pārśvāyatā dīrghamāyuraiśvaryamūrdhvataḥ smṛtam |
gavāḍhyatāmadhastāttu karotīti vidurbudhāḥ | | 6
śatapatrakarṇikābhā nābhiryasya mahāmate |
bhūpatvaṃ kurute sā tu puruṣasya na saṃśayaḥ | | 7
samodaro bhavedbhogī nisvaḥ syādviṣamodaraḥ |
sūkṣmodaro bhavedvāgmī bahusampatsamanvitaḥ | | 8
śastreṇāntaṃ vrajedvīra strībhogaṃ cāpnuyāttathā |
ācāryo bahuputraśca yathāsaṅkhyaṃ vinirdiśet | | 9
valibhirdevaśārdūla ityāha sa payonidhiḥ |
agamyāgāmino jñeyā viṣamābhirna saṃśayaḥ | | 1.26.10
ṛjubhirvasubhogī syātparadāravinindakaḥ |
māṃsalairmṛdubhiḥ pārśvai rājā syānnātra saṃśayaḥ | | 11
anūrdhvacibukā ye tu subhagāste bhavanti vai |
nirdhanā viṣamairdīrghairbhavantīha suvīraja | | 12
pīnaiścopacitairnimnaiḥ 1 skandhairbhīmāṅgasambhava |
rājānaḥ sukhinaścāpi bhavantīha na saṃśayaḥ | | 13
samonnataṃ tu hṛdayaṃ samaṃ ca pṛthu caiva hi |
avepanaṃ māṃsalaṃ ca pārthivānāṃ na saṃśayaḥ | | 14
khararomacitaṃ vīraśirālaṃ ca viśeṣataḥ |
adhanānāṃ bhavedeva hṛdayaṃ ṛbhavottama | |
samavakṣaso.arthayutāḥ pīnaiḥ śūrāḥ smṛtā budhaiḥ | | 15
tanubhirdravyahīnāḥ syurasamaiścāpyakiñcanāḥ |
vadhyante cāpi śastreṇa nātra kāryā vicāraṇā | | 16
hanubhirviṣamairvīra janmahīno bhavennaraḥ |
yasyonnato bhaveddhanuḥ sa bhogī syānna saṃśayaḥ | | 17
nirmāṃsairviṣamairvīra niḥsvo nimnaiḥ pracakṣyate |
dhanavāṃśca bhavetpīnaiḥ sukhabhogasamanvitaḥ | |
viṣamairarthahīnaḥ syādduḥkhabhāgī sadā naraḥ | | 18
cipiṭagrīvako duṣṭo mato loke sa vai guha |
śūraḥ syānmahiṣagrīvo mṛgagrīvo bhayāturaḥ | | 19
kambugrīvo bhavedrājā lambakaṇṭho.agralakṣaṇaḥ |
hrasvagrīvastu dhanavānsusukhī bhogavāṃstathā | | 1.26.20
nimāṃsau romaśau bhagnāvalpau vāpi viśeṣataḥ |
nirdhanasyedṛśāvaṃsau prakhyātau vyomakeśaja | | 21
bhavedaromaśaṃ pṛṣṭhaṃ dhanināṃ bhīmasambhava |
salomaśaṃ tathā vakraṃ nirdhanānāṃ balādhipa | | 22
asvedanāvunnatau ca tathā pīnau ṣaḍānana |
samaromasugandhau ca kakṣau jñeyau dhanānvitau | | 23
avyucchinnau tathā śliṣṭau vipulau ca surādhipa |
śūrāṇāmīdṛśāvaṃsau nagajānandavardhana | | 24
udvṛddhabāhuko yastu vadhabandhanamāpnuyāt |
dīrghabāhurbhavedrājā samudravacanaṃ yathā | | 25
pralambabāhurvijñeyo naraḥ sarvaguṇānvitaḥ |
hrasvabāhurbhaveddāsaḥ parapreṣyakaro.api vā | | 26
vāmāvartabhujā ye tu dīrghāyatabhujāśca ye |
sampūrṇabāhū rājā syādityāha sa payonidhiḥ | | 27
grīvā ca vartulākārā kamburekhāsamāvṛtā |
sa bhavetpārthivo bhūmau sarvaduṣṭanibarhaṇaḥ | | 28
dīrghagrīvā bakagrīvā śukagrīvāśca ye narāḥ |
uṣṭragrīvāḥ karigrīvāḥ sarve te nirdhanāḥ smṛtāḥ | | 29
ibhāṅgasadṛśau vṛttau samau pīnau ca suvrata |
ājānulambinau bāhū pārthivānāṃ na saṃśayaḥ | | 1.26.30
daridrāṇāṃ lomaśau hrasvau bāhū jñeyau surottama |
taskarāṇāṃ ca viṣamau sthūlau sūkṣmau ca suvrata | | 31
nimnaṃ karatalaṃ yasya pitṛvittaṃ na tasya vai |
bhavedārbhavaśārdūla tathā bhīruśca mānavaḥ | | 32
suvṛttatanunimnena dhanavānkaratalena tu |
uttānakaratalo dātā bhavatīti na saṃśayaḥ | | 33
viṣamā bhavanti viṣamairnimnāścāpi viśeṣataḥ |
karatalairdevaśārdūla lākṣābhairīśvarāḥ smṛtāḥ | | 34
agamyāgamanaṃ pītai rūkṣairnirdhanatā smṛtā |
apeyapānaṃ kurvanti nīlakṛṣṇaiḥ sadaiva hi | | 35
nimnāḥ snigdhā bhavennṛṇāṃ rekhā karatale guha |
dhanināṃ na daridrāṇāmityāha sa payonidhiḥ | | 36
viralāṅgulayo ye tu te daridrāḥ pracakṣate |
dhaninastu mahābāho ye ghanāṅgulayo narāḥ | | 37
vadanaṃ maṇḍalaṃ yasya dharmaśīlaṃ tamādiśet |
śuṇḍavaktrā narā ye tu durbhagāste na saṃśayaḥ | | 38
harivaktrā jihmavaktrā vikṛtāsyāstathā narāḥ |
bhagnavatrāḥ karālāsyā sarve te taskarāḥ smṛtāḥ | | 39
sampūrṇavaktrā rājāno gajasiṃhānanāstathā |
chāgavānaravaktrāśca dhaninaḥ parikīrtitāḥ | | 1.26.40
yasya gaṇḍau susampūrṇau padmapatrasamaprabhau |
kṛṣibhāgī bhavennityaṃ bahuvittaśca mānavaḥ | | 41
siṃhavyāghragajendrāṇāṃ kapolaḥ sadṛśo yadi |
mahābhogī sa vijñeyaḥ senāyāścaiva nāyakaḥ | | 42
vadanaṃ tu samaṃ ślakṣṇaṃ saumyaṃ saṃvṛtameva hi |
pārthivānāṃ mahābāho viparītantu duḥkhadam | | 43
mahāmukhaṃ tu deveśa durbhagatvaṃ prayacchati |
strīmukhaṃ putranāśāya maṇḍalaṃ sukhitāṃ vrajet | | 44
dravyanāśāya vai dīrghaṃ pāpadaṃ bhayadaṃ tathā |
dhūrtānāṃ caturasraṃ syātputrahānikaraṃ śṛṇu | | 45
nimnavaktraṃ ca devendra putrahānikaraṃ bhavet |
hrasvaṃ bhatati kīnāśe pūrṇakāntaṃ ca bhoginām | | 46
raktādharo narapatirdhanavānkamalādharaḥ |
sthūloṣṭhā hanumūlāśca śuṣkaistīkṣṇaiśca duḥkhitāḥ | |47
asphoṭitāgraṃ snigdhaṃ ca nataṃ mṛdu tathā guha |
sampūrṇaṃ ca sadā śastaṃ śmaśru bhūmipaterguha | | 48
raktaiścālpaistathā rūkṣaiḥ śmaśrubhirbhīmanandana |
narāścaurā bhavantyeva paradāraratāstathā | |49
nirmāṃsau yasya vai karṇau saṃgrāmānnāśamṛcchati 1 |
cipiṭābhyāṃ bhavedrogī hrasvau ca kṛpaṇasya ca | | 1.26.50
śaṅkukarṇaśca bhūnāthaḥ sarvaśatrubhayaṅkaraḥ |
dīrghāyū romaśābhyāṃ tu vipulābhyāṃ narādhipaḥ | |
bhogī ca sa bhavennityaṃ devabrāhmaṇapūjakaḥ | | 51
śirāvabaddhau krūrasya vyālambau ca viśeṣataḥ |
māṃsalau sukhadau jñeyau śravaṇau vyomakeśaja | | 52
bhogī syānnigaṇḍo vai mantrī sampūrṇagaṇḍakaḥ |
śubhabhākchukanāsastu cirajīvī śuṣkanāsikaḥ | | 53
kundakuṇḍalasaṅkāśaiḥ prakāśairdaśanairnṛpaḥ |
ṛkṣavānaradantāśca nityaṃ kṣutparipīḍitāḥ | | 54
hastidantāḥ kharadantāḥ snigdhadantā guṇānvitāḥ |
karālairviralai rūkṣairdaśanairduḥkhajīvinaḥ | | 55
dvātriṃśaddantā rājāna ekatriṃśacca bhogavān |
triṃśaddantā narā nityaṃ sukhaduḥkhitvabhāgina | |
ūnatriṃśacya daśanaiḥ puruṣāḥ duḥkhabhāginaḥ | | 56
kṛṣṇajihvo bhavetpreṣyaḥ savalayā tu jihvayā |
bhavetkopasya kartā vai sthūlarūkṣaśca jihvayā | | 57
śvetajihvā narā jñeyāḥ śaucācārasamanvitāḥ |
padmapatrasamā jihvā sūkṣmā dīrghā suśobhanā | |
sthūlā ca na ca vistīrṇā yeṣāṃ te manujādhipāḥ | | 58
nimnā snigdhā ca hrasvā ca raktāgrā rasanā yadi |
sarvavidyāpravaktāraste bhavanti na saṃśayaḥ | | 59
kṛṣṇatālurnaro yastu sa bhavetkulanāśanaḥ |
sukhabhāgī duḥkhabhāgī pītatālurnarādhipaḥ | | 1.26.60
vikṛtaṃ sphuṭitaṃ rūkṣaṃ tālukaṃ na praśasyate |
siṃhatālurnarapatirgajatālustathaiva ca | |
padmatālurbhavedrājā śvetatālurdhaneśvaraḥ | | 61
haṃsasvarā narā dhanyā meghagambhīraniḥsvanāḥ |
krauṃcasvanāśca rājāno bhogavanto mahādhanāḥ | | 62
cakravākasvanā dhanyā rājāno dharmavatsalāḥ |
kumbhasvano narapatirdundubhisvana eva ca | |
rūkṣadīrghasvarāḥ krūrāḥ paśūnāṃ sadṛśā na tu | | 63
gurgurasvarasaṃyuktāḥ puruṣāḥ kleśabhāginaḥ |
cāṣasvanā bhāgyayutā bhinnakāṃsyasvarāśca ye | |
kṣīṇabhinnasvarā ye syuradhamāste prakīrtitāḥ | | 64
pārthivāstanunāsāśca dīrghanāsāśca bhoginaḥ |
hrasvanāsā narā ye tu dharmaśīlāstu te matāḥ | | 65
hastyaśvasiṃhanāsāśca sūcīnāsāśca ye narāḥ |
teṣāṃ sidhyati vāṇijyaṃ hayānāṃ caiva vikrayaḥ | | 66
vikṛtā nāsikā yasya sthūlāgrā rūpavarjitā |
pāpakarmā sa vijñeyaḥ sāmudravacanaṃ yathā | | 67
dāḍimīpuṣpasaṃkāśe bhavetāṃ yasya locane |
bhūpatiḥ sa tu vijñeyaḥ saptadvīpādhipo guha | | 68
vyāghrākṣāḥ kopanā jñeyāḥ karkaṭākṣāḥ kalipriyāḥ |
biḍālahaṃsanetrāśca bhavanti puruṣādhamāḥ | | 69
mapūranakulākṣāśca narāste madhyamāḥ smṛtāḥ |
na śrīstyajati sarvajña puruṣaṃ madhupiṅgalam | | 1.26.70
āpiṅgalākṣā rājānaḥ sarvabhogasamanvitāḥ |
rocanā haritālākṣā guñjāpiṅgā dhaneśvarāḥ | |
balasattvaguṇopetāḥ pṛthivīcakravartinaḥ | | 71
dvimātrāvīkṣaṇā nityaṃ jīvanti paramāśritāḥ |
trimātrāsyandino jñeyāḥ puruṣāḥ sukhabhāginaḥ | | 72
caturmātrānimeṣaiśca nayanairīśvarāḥ smṛtāḥ |
dīrghāyuṣo dharmaratāḥ pañcamātrānimeṣiṇaḥ | | 73
hrasvakarṇā mahābhāgā mahākarṇāśca ye narāḥ |
āvartakarṇā dhaninaḥ snigdhakarṇāstathaiva ca | | 74
dīrghāyuṣaḥ śuktikarṇāḥ śaṅkhakarṇā mahādhanāḥ |
dīrghāyuṣo dīrghakarṇā lambakarṇāstapasvinaḥ | | 75
lalāṭenārdhacandreṇa bhavanti pṛthivīśvarāḥ |
vipulena lalāṭena mahādhanapatiḥ smṛtaḥ | |
svalpena tu lalāṭena naro dharmarataḥ smṛtaḥ | | 76
rekhā pañca lalāṭe tu striyā vā puruṣasya vā |
śataṃ jīvati varṣāṇāmaiśvaryaṃ cādhigacchati | | 77
catūrekhāmaśītiṃ tu tribhiḥ saptatimeva ca |
dvābhyāṃ ṣaṣṭiṃ tu rekhābhyāṃ catvāriṃśattathaikayā | |
arekhena lalāṭena vijñeyā pañcaviṃśatiḥ | | 78
rekhācchedaistu vijñeyā hīnamadhyottamā narāḥ |
alpāyuṣastathālpābhirvyādhibhiḥ paripīḍitāḥ | | 79
triśūlaṃ paṭṭiśaṃ vāpi lalāṭe yasya dṛśyate |
īśvaraṃ taṃ vijānīyādbhoginaṃ kīrtimāśritam | | 1.26.80
utkrāntanimnaṃ tu śiraḥ svalpopahatameva ca |
candrākāraṃ narendrāṇāṃ gavāḍhyaṃ maṅgalaṃ smṛtam | | 81
viṣamaṃ tu daridrāṇāṃ śiro dīrghaṃ tu duḥkhinām |
nāgakumbhanibhaṃ rājñaḥ samaṃ sarvatra bhoginaḥ | | 82
kapilaḥ sphuṭitai rūkṣaiḥ sthūlaiśva śikhareśayaiḥ |
duḥkhitā puruṣā jñeyā romaśmaśrubhireva ca | | 83
rūkṣā vivarṇā nistejāḥ kharāḥ sthūlāśca mūrdhajāḥ |
nātistokā na bahuśo mūrdhajā duḥkhabhāginaḥ | | 84
viralāśca mṛdusnigdhā bhramarāñjanasaprabhāḥ |
kacā yasya tu dṛśyante sa bhavetpṛthivīpatiḥ | | 85
iti śrībhaviṣye mahāpurāṇe śatārddhasāhasryāṃ saṃhitāyāṃ brāhme parvaṇi caturthīkalpe
puruṣalakṣaṇavarṇanaṃ nāma ṣaḍviṃśo.adhyāyaḥ | 26 |
atha saptaviṃśo.adhyāyaḥ
puruṣalakṣaṇa-varṇanam
kārtikeya uvāca
saṃkṣepato mama vibho lakṣaṇāni nṛpasya tu |
śubhāni cāṅgajātāni brūhi me vadatāṃ vara | | 1
brahmovāca
śṛṇu vakṣyeṅgajātāni pārthivasya śubhāni ca |
pārthivo jñāyate yaistu narāṇāṃ madhyabhāgataḥ | | 2
trīṇi yasya mahābāho vipulāni narasya tu |
udyatāni tathā ṣaḍ vai gambhīrāṇi ca trīṇi vai | | 3
catvāri cāpi hrasvāni sapta raktāni vā vibho |
dīrghāṇi cāpi sūkṣmāṇi bhavanti yasya pañca vā | | 4
nābhiḥ saṃdhiḥ svanaśceti gambhīrāṇi ca trīṇi vai |
vadanaṃ ca lalāṭaṃ ca dantottama urastathā | | 5
vistīrṇametastritayaṃ vīra yasya narasya tu |
sa rājā nātra sandehaḥ śṛṇuṣvevonnatāni ca | | 6
kṛkāṭikā tadhā cāsyaṃ nakhā vakṣo.atha nāsikā |
kakṣe cāpi mahābāho ṣaḍetāni vidurbudhāḥ | | 7
liṅgaṃ pṛṣṭhaṃ tathā grīvā jaṅghā hrasvāni suvrata |
netrānte hastapādau tu tālvoṣṭhau ca surottama | |
jihvā raktā nakhāścaiva saptaitāni mahāmate | | 8
tvacaḥ kararuhāḥ keśā daśanā ṛbhavottama |
sūkṣmāṇyetāni ca guha pañca cāpi vidurbudhāḥ | | 9
nāsikālocane bāhū stanayorantaraṃ hanuḥ |
iti dīrghamidaṃ proktaṃ pañcakaṃ bhūbhujāṃ nṛpa | | 1.27.10
kṣutaṃ rājñāṃ sakṛddvistrirnāditaṃ hrāditaṃ tathā |
dīrghāyuṣāṃ prayuktaṃ te hasitaṃ ca vidurbudhāḥ | | 11
padmapatranibhe netre dhanināṃ śivanandana |
bhārgavīmāpnuyātso.api raktānte yasya locane | | 12
madhupiṅgairmahātmāno narā jñeyāḥ surādhipa |
bhīravo hi kṛśākṣāstu caurā maṇḍalacakrakaiḥ | | 13
hayaḥ kekaranetrāstu gambhīrairarthasampadaḥ |
nīlotpalābhairvedavido bhṛśaṃ kṛṣṇaistathārthitā | |
mantritvaṃ sthūlasudṛśo vadanti bhuvi tadvidaḥ | | 14
śyāmākṣāḥ subhagā jñeyā dīnākṣaibhra daridratā |
vistīrṇairbhogino śreyā vipulaiśca tathā guha | | 15
abhyunnatābhirhrasvāyurviśālābhiḥ sukhī bhavet |
daridro viṣamābhistu tato jñeyaḥ surottama | | 16
bhruvo bālendusadṛśā dhanināmārbhavottama |
dīrghābhirnirdhano jñeyaḥ saṃsaktābhistu suvrata | | 17
kṣīṇābhirarthahīnāḥ syurnarā jñeyāḥ surottama |
madhye natabhruvo ye ca paradāraratāstu te | | 18
viralairunnataiḥ śaṃkhairdhanyāḥ syurnātra saṃśayaḥ |
nimnaiḥ stutyarthasaṃsaktā unnataiśca janādhipāḥ | | 19
viṣamalalāṭā vidhanāḥ sadā syurdevasattama |
ācāryāḥ śuktisadṛśairnarāḥ syurnātra saṃśayaḥ | | 1.27.20
unnataśirobhirāḍhyā narā jñeyāḥ sadā guha |
vadhabandhabhāgino vīrā narā ninnalalāṭinaḥ | |
bhṛśamunnataiśca mūrkhāśca kṛpaṇāśca tathā nataiḥ | | 21
śubhāvahaṃ manuṣyāṇāṃ vadanaṃ syādyathā śṛṇu |
adīnamānanaṃ snigdhaṃ sasmitaṃ ca viśeṣataḥ | | 22
sāśrudīnaṃ tathā rūkṣamasnigdhaṃ ninditaṃ guha |
asambhāvyaṃ mukhaṃ jñeyaṃ narāṇāṃ nagadāraṇa | | 23
akampaṃ gubhadaṃ jñeyaṃ narāṇāṃ hasitaṃ guha |
nimīlitākṣaṃ pāpasya hasitaṃ cārbhavottama | | 24
āmaṇḍalaṃ śiro yasya sa gavāḍhyo naro bhavet |
chatrākṛti śiro yasya sa bhavennṛpatirnaraḥ | | 25
cipiṭākāritaśirā hanyādvai pitarau naraḥ |
ghaṇṭākṛti śirodhvānamasakṛtsevate naraḥ | |
nimnaṃ śironarthadaṃ syānnarāṇāmarbhavottama | | 26
guḍaiḥ snigdhaistathā kṛṣṇairabhinnāgraistathaiva hi |
keśairna cātibahulairmṛdubhiḥ pārthivo bhavet | | 27
bahulāḥ kapilāḥ sthūlā viṣamāḥ sphuṭitāstathā |
paruṣā hrasvātikuṭilā daridrāṇāṃ kacāḥ ghanāḥ | | 28
ityuktaṃ lakṣaṇaṃ nṛrṇāṃ śubhaṃ vāśubhameva ca |
yoṣitāṃ tadidānīṃ te lakṣaṇaṃ vacmi bhīmaja | | 29
iti śrībhaviṣye mahāpurāṇe śatārddhasāhasryāṃ saṃhitāyāṃ brāhme parvaṇi caturthīkalpe puruṣalakṣaṇavarṇanaṃ nāma saptaviṃśo.adhyāyaḥ | 27 |
athāṣṭāviṃśo.adhyāyaḥ
strīlakṣaṇavarṇanam
brahmovāca
śṛṇvidānīṃ mahābāho strīlakṣaṇamanuttamam |
yanmayoktaṃ purā vīra nāradasya mahātmanaḥ | | 1
tattvaṃ vijñāyate yena śubhāśubhamavasthitam |
ninditaṃ ca praśastaṃ ca strīṇāṃ vakṣyāmi lakṣaṇam | | 2
mātaraṃ pitaraṃ caiva bhrātaraṃ mātulaṃ tathā |
dvau tu bimbau parīkṣeta samudrasya vaco yathā | | 3
muhūrte tithisampanne nakṣatre cābhipūjite |
dvijaistu saha vāgamya kanyāṃ vīkṣeta śāstravit | | 4
hastau pādau parīkṣeta aṅgulīrnakhameva ca |
pāṇimeva ca jaṅghe ca kaṭināsoru eva ca | | 5
jaghanodarapṛṣṭhaṃ ca stanau karṇau bhujau tathā |
jihvāṃ coṣṭhau ca dantāśca kapolaṃ galakaṃ tathā | | 6
cakṣurnāsā lalāṭaṃ ca śiraḥ keśāṃstathaiva ca |
romarājiṃ svaraṃ varṇamāvartāni tu vā punaḥ | | 7
yasyāstu rekhāgrīvāyāṃ yā ca raktāntalocanā |
yasya sā gṛhamāgacchettadgṛhaṃ sukhamedhate | | 8
lalāṭe dṛśyate yasyāstriśūlaṃ devanirmitam |
bahūnāṃ strīsahasrāṇāṃ svāminīṃ tāṃ vinirdiśet | | 9
rājahaṃsagatiryasyā mṛgākṣī mṛgavarṇikā |
samaśuklāgradantā ca kanyāṃ tāmuttamāṃ viduḥ | | 1.28.10
maṇḍūkakukṣī yā kanyā nyagrodhaparimaṇḍalā |
ekaṃ janayate putraṃ so.api rājā bhaviṣyati | | 11
haṃsasvarā mṛduvacā yā kanyā madhupiṅgalā |
aṣṭau janayate putrāndhanadhānyavivardhinī | | 12
āyatau śravaṇau yasyāḥ surūpā cāpi nāsikā |
bhruvau cendrāyudhākārau sātyantaṃ sukhabhāginī | | 13
tanvī śyāmā tathā kṛṣṇā snigdhāṅgī mṛdubhāṣiṇī |
śaṅkhakundendudaśanā bhavedaiśvaryabhāginī | | 14
vistīrṇaṃ jaghanaṃ yasyā vedimadhyā tu yā bhavet |
āyate vipule netre rājapatnī tu sā bhavet | | 15
yasyāḥ payodhare vāme hastekarṇe gale.api vā |
maśakaṃ tilakaṃ vāpi sā pūrvaṃ janayetsutam | | 16
gūḍhagulphāṅguliśirā alpapārṣṇiḥ sumadhyamā |
raktākṣī raktacaraṇā sātyantaṃ sukhabhāginī | | 17
kūrmapṛṣṭhāyatanakhau snigdhabhāvavivarjitau |
vakrāṅgulitalau pādau kanyāṃ tāṃ parivarjayet | | 18
yena kenacidaṃśena māṃsaṃ yasyā vivardhate |
rāsabhīṃ tādṛśīṃ vidyānna sā kalyāṇamarhati | | 19
pāde pradeśinī yasyā aṅguṣṭhaṃ samatikramet |
duḥśīlā durbhagā jñeyā kanyāṃ tāṃ parivarjayet | | 1.28.20
pāde madhyamikā yasyāḥ kṣitiṃ na spṛśate yadi |
ramate sā na kaumāre svacchandā kāmacāriṇī | | 21
pāde anāmikā yasyāḥ kṣitiṃ na spṛśate yadi |
dvitīyaṃ puruṣaṃ hatvā tṛtīye sā pratiṣṭhitā | | 22
pāde kaniṣṭhā yasyāstu kṣitiṃ na spṛśate yadi |
dvitīyaṃ puruṣaṃ hatvā tṛtīye sā pratiṣṭhitā | | 23
na devikā na dhanikā na dhānyapratināmikā |
gulmavṛkṣasanāmnī ca kanyāṃ tāṃ parivarjayet | | 24
indracandrādipuruṣasanāmnī ca yadā bhavet |
naitāḥ patiṣu rajyante yāśca nakṣatranāmikāḥ | | 25
āvartaḥ pṛṣṭhato yasyā nābhiṃ samanuvindati |
tadapatyaṃ bhaved dhrasvaṃ hrasvāyuśca vinirdiśet | | 26
pṛṣṭhāvartā patiṃ hanti nābhyāvartā pativratā |
kaṭyāvartā tu svacchandā na kadācidvirajyate | | 27
yasyāstu hasamānāyā gaṇḍe jāyet kūpakam |
ramate sā na kaumāre svacchandā kāryakāriṇī | | 28
yasyāstu gacchamānāyāṣṭiṭṭīkāyati jaṅghikā |
putraṃ vyavasyetsā kartuṃ patitve nātra saṃśayaḥ | | 29
sthūlapādā ca yā kanyā sarvāṃgeṣu ca lomaśā |
sthūlahastā ca yā syādvai dāsīṃ tāṃ nirdiśedbudhaḥ | | 1.28.30
yasyāścotkaṭakau pādau mukhaṃ ca vikṛtaṃ bhavet |
uttaroṣṭhe ca romāṇi sā kṣipraṃ bhakṣayetpatim | | 31
trīṇi yasyāḥ pralambante lalāṭamudaraṃ sphicau |
trīṇi bhakṣayate sā tu devaraṃ śvasuraṃ patim | | 32
samudbhūṣitacāritrā gurubhaktā pativratā |
devabrāhmaṇabhaktā ca mānuṣīṃ tāṃ vinirdiśet ||3 3
nityaṃ snātā sugandhā ca nityaṃ ca priyavādinī |
alpāśinyalparoṣā ca devatāṃ tāṃ vinirdiśet || 34
pracchannaṃ kurute pāpamapavādaṃ ca rakṣati |
hadayaṃ syācca durgrāhyaṃ mārjārī tāṃ vinirdiśet ||35
hasate krīḍate caiva kruddhā caiva prasīdati |
nīceṣu ramate nityaṃ rāsabhī tāṃ vinirdiśet || 36
pratikūlakarī nityaṃ bandhūnāṃ bhartureva ca |
svacchande lalitāṃ caiva āsurīṃ tāṃ vinirdiśet ||37
bahvāśī bahuvākyā ca nityaṃ cāpriyavādinī |
hinasti svapatiṃ yā tu rākṣasīṃ tāṃ vinirdiśet || 38
śaucācāraparibhraṣṭā rūpabhraṣṭā bhayaṅkarā |
prasvedamalapaṅkā ca piśācīṃ tāṃ vinirdiśet ||39
nityaṃ snātāṃ sugandhāṃ ca māṃsamadyapriyādinīm |
vṛkṣodyānaprasaktā ca gāndharvīṃ tāṃ vinirdiśet ||1.28.40
capalā cañcalā caiva nityaṃ paśyeddiśastathā |
calasvabhāvā lubdhā ca vānarīṃ tāṃ vinirdiśet ||4 1
candrānanāṃ śubhāṅgīṃ tu mattavāraṇagāminīm |
āraktanakhahastāṃ tu vidyādvidyādharīṃ budhaḥ ||42
vīṇāvāditraśabdena vaṃśagītaraveṇa ca |
puṣpadhūpaprasaktāṃ ca gāndharvīṃ tāṃ vinirdiśet ||43

sumanturuvāca
ityevamuktvā sa mahānubhāvo jagāma vedhā nijamandiraṃ vai |
strīṇāṃ tathā puṃstvavatāṃ ca vīra yallakṣaṇaṃ pārthiva lokapūjyam | | 44
iti śrībhaviṣye mahāpurāṇe śatārddhasāhasryāṃ saṃhitāyāṃ brāhme parvaṇi caturthī kalpe
strīlakṣaṇavarṇanaṃ nāmāṣṭāviṃśo.adhyāyaḥ | 28 |
athaikonatriṃśo.adhyāyaḥ
gaṇapatikalpavarṇanam
śatānīka uvāca
gakārākṣaradevasya gaṇeśasya mahātmanaḥ |
ārādhanavidhiṃ brūhi sāṅgaṃ mantrasamanvitam | | 1
sumanturuvāca
na tithirna ca nakṣatraṃ nopavāso vidhīyate |
yatheṣṭaṃ ceṣṭataḥ siddhiḥ sadā bhavati kāmikā | | 2
śvetārkamūlaṃ saṅgṛhya kuryādgaṇapatiṃ budhaḥ |
aṅguṣṭhaparvamātraṃ tu padmāsanagataṃ tathā | | 3
caturbhujaṃ trinetraṃ ca sarvābharaṇabhūṣitam |
nāgayajñopavītāṅgaṃ śaśāṅkakṛtaśekharam | | 4
dantaṃ savye kare dadyāddvitīye cākṣasūtrakam |
tṛtīye paraśuṃ dadyāccaturthe modakaṃ nyaset | | 5
kuṅkumaṃ candanaṃ cāpi samālambhanamucyate |
vāsobhirbhūṣaṇai raktairmālyaiścārādhayedgaṇam | | 6
dhūpena ca sugandhena modakaiścāpi pūjayet |
evaṃ pūjyāgratastasya bhojayedbrāhmaṇaṃ budhaḥ | | 7
vāmanaṃ kubjakaṃ cāpi bhojayetpurato dvijam |
āśīrvādaṃ tatastasmātprāpya siddhimavāpnuyāt | | 8
bhaktyā kurukulaśreṣṭha śṛṇu mantrapadāni vai |
gaṃ svāhā mūlamantro.ayaṃ praṇavena samanvitaḥ | | 9
gāṃ namo hadayaṃ jñeyaṃ gīṃ śiraḥ parikīrtitam |
śikhā ca gūṃ namo jñeyo gaiṃ namaḥ kavacaṃ smṛtam | | 1.29.10
gauṃ namo netramuddiṣṭaṃ gaḥ phaṭ kāmāstramucyate |
āgaccholkāmukhāyeti mantra āvāhane hyayam | | 11
gaṃ gaṇeśāya namo gandhamantraḥ prakīrtitaḥ |
puṣpolkāya namaḥ puṣpamantra eṣa prakīrtitaḥ | | 12
dhūpolkāya namo dhūpamantra eṣa prakīrtitaḥ |
dīpolkāya namo dīpamantra eṣa prakīrtitaḥ | | 13
oṃ gaṃ maholkāya namo balimantraḥ prakīrtitaḥ |
oṃ saṃsiddholkāya namo mantraścāyaṃ visarjane | | 14
oṃ mahākarṇāya vidmahe vakratuṇḍāya dhīmahi |
tanno dantiḥ pracodayāt gāyatrī japaḥ pūrvataḥ | | 15
mahāgaṇapataye vīra svāhā dakṣiṇataḥ sadā |
maholkāya paścimataḥ kūśmāṇḍāyottareṇa tu | |
ekadantatripurāntakāya āgneyyāṃ vīra nirdiśet | | 16
oṃ śivadatta vikaṭaharahāsa prāṇāya svā nairṛtyām |
tulambanātyacaladantakāya svāhā vāyavyām | | 17
padmadaṃṣṭrāya narāyeti aiśānyāṃ homayedbudhaḥ |
huṃ phaṭ hu~m phaṭ hastatāladhvanirhasanakūrdanaḥ | | 18
mṛdanartanagaṇapatirdevasya mudrāṃ tato homaṃ samācaret |
na yadā vaśyā bhavati | |
kṛṣṇatilāhutimaṣṭasahasraṃ juhuyāttrirātreṇa rājā vaśyo bhavati | | 19
tilayavahomena sarve janapadā vaśyā bhavanti |
ati rūpavatī kanyā gacchantamanu(?)cchati | | 1.29.20
caṇatandulahomenājito bhavet |
nimbapatrasamaistailairvidveṣaṇaṃ karoti | |
somagrahaṇe udakamadhye avatīrya aṣṭasahasraṃ japet |
saṅgrāme aparājito bhavati | | 21
ādityābhimukho bhūtvā aṣṭasahasraṃ japet |
ādityo varado bhavati | | 22
śuklacaturthyāmupoṣya gandhapuṣpādibhirarcanaṃ kṛtvā tilatandulāñjuhuyāt |
śirasā dhārayaṃstairaparājito bhavati | | 23
apāmārgasamidbhiragniṃ prajvālya ekaviṃśatyāhutīryo juhuyāt |
trirātrācchatruṃ vyāpādayati | | 24
athottareṇa mantraṃ vyākhyāsye |
vṛkṣamūle kajjalaṃ saṅgṛhya saptabhirmantritaṃ kṛtvā netrāṇyañjayedyaṃ paśyati sa vaśī bhavati | | 25
puṣpaṃ phalaṃ mūlaṃ cāṣṭasahasrābhimantritaṃ kṛtvā yasmai dadāti sa vaśyo bhavati | | 26
yatkiñcinmūlamantreṇa karoti tatsidhyati |
sarve grahāḥ suprītā bhavanti | |
nagaradvāraṃ gatvā aṣṭasahasraṃ dvāraṃ nirūpayet | | 27
puraṃ dvāreṇa gṛhyate prāṅmukho yajati sa uccāṭayati |
sammukho japati corānvidrāvayati | | 28
tṛṇāni lūnayati | kāṣṭhāni cchedayati | | 29
gajarājena yuddhayati | jalamadhye saptarātraṃ japet | akāle varṣayati | kūpataḍāgāñchoṣayati | |
pratimāṃ nṛtyayati | ākarṣayati | stambhayati | yojanaśatātstrīpuruṣānākarṣayati | | 1.29.30
gorocanāṃ ca sahasrābhimantritāṃ kṛtvā haste baddhvā yojanaśatasahasraṃ gatvā punarāgacchati | | 31
atha mārayitukāmaḥ khadirakīlakaṃ kṛtvā strīpuruṣaṃ vicintya hadaye nikhanayet | kṣaṇādeva mriyate | | 32
sarvapātakavimukto bhavati | agnitejāḥ sarvebhyo.aparājito bhavati | | 33
oṃ vakatuṇḍāya svāhā | oṃ ekadaṃṣṭrāya svāhā | oṃ kṛtakṛṣṇāya svāhā | oṃ gajakarṇāya svāhā | |
oṃ lambodarāya svāhā | oṃ vikaṭāya svāhā | oṃ dhūmravarṇāya svāhā | oṃ gaganakūjāya svāhā | |
oṃ vināyakāya svāhā | oṃ gaṇapataye svāhā | oṃ hastimukhāya svāhā | | 34
iti śrībhaviṣye mahāpurāṇe śatārddhasāhasryāṃ saṃhitāyāṃ brāhme parvaṇi caturthīkalpe
gaṇapatikalpavarṇanaṃ nāmaikonatriṃśo.adhyāyaḥ | 29 |
atha triṃśo.adhyāyaḥ
vināyakapūjāvidhivarṇanam
sumantaruvāca
nimbamayamaṅguṣṭhaparvamātraṃ gaṇapatiṃ kṛtvā nityadhūpagandhādibhirarcayitvā pracchannaṃ śirasi baddhvā gacchet | |
sarvajanapriyo bhavati | śvetārkamūlāṅguṣṭhamātraṃ gaṇapatiṃ kṛtvā dhūpādibhirarcayitvā sarvānvarṇānvaśamānayati ||
śvetacandanamaṅguṣṭhamātraṃ gaṇapatiṃ kṛtvā puṣpagandhādibhirarcayitvā śuklacaturthyāmaṣṭamyāṃ vā baliṃ kuryādaṣṭasahasraṃ juhuyāddadhnā pāyasena rājānaṃ vaśamānayati |
raktacandanamayaṃ gaṇapatimaṅguṣṭhamātraṃ kṛtvā bhautikaṃ baliṃ dadyāddadhimadhughṛtāhutīnāṃ gaṇapatimaṣṭasahasraṃ juhuyādātmaprāpikāṃ prajāṃ vaśamānayati | raktakaravīramūlāṅguṣṭhaparvamātraṃ gaṇapatiṃ kārayet | |
raktapuṣpagandhopahārairbaliṃ dadyāt | tilalavaṇaghṛtenāṣṭasahasraṃ juhuyāt | daśagrāmānvaśamānayati | |
śvetakaravīrāṅguṣṭhaparvamātraṃ gaṇapatiṃ kṛtvā tilapiṣṭadadhighṛtakṣīraharidrāmiśreṇāṣṭasahasraṃ
juhuyādveśyāṃ vaśamānayati | |
aśvatthamūlāṅguṣṭhaparvamātraṃ gaṇapatiṃ kṛtvā gandhapuṣpadhūpabaliṃ dattvā śataṃ juhuyācchatruṃ vaśamānayati | |
arkamūlāṅguṣṭhaparvamātraṃ gaṇapatiṃ kṛtvā gandhapuṣpadhūpabalīn dadyāt |
tindukāṣṭaśataṃ juhuyācchatruṃ vaśamānayati | |
bilvamūlamayamaṅguṣṭhaparvamātraṃ gaṇapatiṃ kṛtvā gandhapuṣpadhūpārcitaṃ kṛtvā trimadhvaktānāmaṣṭasahasraṃ juhuyādrājāmātyānvaśamānayati | |
śirasi dhūpāndhṛtvā gacchedrājadvāraṃ vigrahe jayo bhavati |
hastidantamṛttikāmayamaṅguṣṭhaparvamātraṃ gaṇapatiṃ kārayet | |
gandhapuṣpadhūpārcitaṃ kṛtvā. kṛṣṇacaturthyāṃ nagno bhūtvābhyarcayet |
sapta vārāñjapennityaṃ 1 nārīṇāṃ subhago bhavati | |
vṛṣabhaśṛṅgamṛttikāṅguṣṭhamātraṃ gaṇapatiṃ kārayet |
gandhapuṣpārcitaṃ kṛtvā gugguludhūpaṃ dadyādghoṣapatiṃ vaśamānayati | |
atha vā valmīkamṛttikāṃguṣṭhaparvamātraṃ gaṇapatiṃ kārayet |
kaṭukatailena pratimāṃ lepayet | |
unmattakakāṣṭhenāgniṃ prajvālyāhutīnāmaṣṭasahasraṃ juhuyāttilasarṣapamiśreṇa sarvadhūpaṃ dadyāttrikaṭukena lepayet | |
agarudhūpaṃ dadyādrājānaṃ vaśamānayati | pareṣāṃ ca vallabho bhavati | raktacandanenātmānaṃ dhūpayetsubhago bhavati | |
oṃ gaṇapataye vakratuṇḍāya gajadantāya gulaguletininādāya caturbhujāya trinetrāya muśalapāśavajrahastāya sarvabhūtadamanāya sarvalokavaśaṃkarāya sarvaduṣṭopaghātajananāya sarvaśatruvimardanāya sarvarājyasamīhanāya rājānamiha vaśamānaya hana hana paca paca vajrāṅkuśena gaṇeśa phaṭ svāhā |
oṃ gāṃ gīṃ gūṃ gaiṃ gauṃ gaḥ svāhā namaḥ hadayaṃ mūlamantrasya |
oṃ kaḥ śiraḥ, oṃ khaḥ śikhā, oṃ gaḥ hadayam, oṃ guḥ vaktraṃ, oṃ gaiṃ netram | oṃ ghaḥ kavacam, oṃ ṅa āvāhanaṃ hadayasya āvāhanāṅgāni bhavanti oṃ namaḥ hadayaṃ mūlamantrasya, oṃ gāḥ śiraḥ, oṃ gaiḥ namaḥ śikhā oṃ gauḥ namaḥ kavacam, oṃ gaṃ namaḥ netre, oṃ gaḥ phaṭ astram | |
oṃ aṅguṣṭholkāya svāhā āvāhanaṃ hadayasya svāhā visarjanaṃ hadayasya oṃ gandholkāya svāhā | |
gandhamantraḥ | | oṃ dharmabhūtolkāya svāhā | | puṣpamantraḥ | | durjayāya 1 pūrveṇa | oṃ dhūrjaṭaye dakṣiṇena |
oṃ lambodarāya paścimataḥ | oṃ gaṇapataye uttarataḥ | oṃ gaṇādhipataye aiśānyām | oṃ mahāgaṇapataye āgneyyām | oṃ kūśmāṇḍāya nairṛtyām |
oṃ ekadantatripuraghātine trinetrāya vāyavyām | oṃ mahāgaṇapataye vidmahe vakratuṇḍāya dhīmahi | |
tanno dantiḥ pracodayāt | | gāyatrī | |
padmadaṃṣṭrāmālāprakarṣaṇīparaśvaṃkuśapāśapaṭahamudrā aṣṭau mudrā darśayitvā tataḥ karmāṇi kārayet | |
kṛṣṇatilāhutīnāmaṣṭasahasraṃ juhuyāt | rājānaṃ vaśamānayet | |
āvāhanādyekādaśamudrā naivedyāntaṃ kramāddarśayet | |
ārādhayedyena vidhinā trinetraṃ śūlinaṃ haram |
tenaivārādhayeddevaṃ vighneśaṃ gaṇapaṃ nṛpa | | 1
tadeva maṇḍalaṃ cāsya aṅganyāsastathaiva ca |
ṛte mantrapadānīha samānaṃ sarvameva hi | | 2
pūjayedyastu vighneśamekadantamumāsutam |
naśyanti tasya vighnāni na cāriṣṭaṃ kadācana | | 3
yaścopavāsaṃ kṛtvā tu caturthyāṃ pūjayennaraḥ |
sarve tasya samārambhāḥ sidhyeyurnātra saṃśayaḥ | |4
yasyānukūlo vighneśaḥ śivayoḥ kulanandana |
tasyānukūlaṃ sarvaṃ syājjagadvai sarvakarmasu | | 5
tasmādārādhayedenaṃ bhaktiśraddhāsamanvitaḥ |
kuṅkumāgurudhūpena tathaivoṇḍīrakasrajā | |
palalollāpikābhiśca jātikonmattakaistathā | | 6
śuklapakṣe caturthyāṃ tu vidhinānena pūjayet |
tasya sidhyati nirvighnaṃ sarvakarma na saṃśayaḥ | |7
ekadante jagannāthe gaṇeśe tuṣṭimāgate |
pitṛdevamanuṣyādyāḥ sarve tuṣyanti bhārata | | 8
tasmādārādhayedenaṃ sadā bhaktipuraḥsaram |
karṇalepaistuṇḍikābhirmodakaiśca mahīpate | |
pūjayetsatataṃ devaṃ vighnavināśāya dantinam | | 9
iti śrībhaviṣye mahāpurāṇe śatārddhasāhasryāṃ saṃhitāyāṃ brāhme parvaṇi caturthīkalpe
vināyakapūjāvidhinirūpaṇaṃ nāma triṃśo.adhyāyaḥ | 30 |
athaikatriṃśo.adhyāyaḥ
śivācaturthī pūjanam
sumanturuvāca
śivā śāntā sukhā rājaṃścaturthī trividhā smṛtā |
māsi bhādrapade śuklā śivā lokeṣu pūjitā | | 1
tasyāṃ snānaṃ tathā dānamupavāso japastathā |
kriyamāṇaṃ śataguṇaṃ prasādāddantino nṛpa | | 2
guḍalavaṇaghṛtānāṃ tu dānaṃ śubhakaraṃ smṛtam |
guḍāpūpaistathā vīra puṇyaṃ brāhmaṇabhojanam | | 3
yāstasyāṃ naraśārdūla pūjayanti sadā striyaḥ |
guḍalavaṇapūpaiśca śvaśrūṃ śvasurameva ca | |4
tāḥ sarvāḥ subhagāḥ syurve vighreśasyānumodanāt |
kanyakā tu viśeṣeṇa vidhinānena pūjayet | | 5
sumanturuvāca
māghe māsi tathā śuklā yā caturthī mahīpate |
sā śāntā śāntidā nityaṃ śāntiṃ kuryātsadaiva hi | | 6
snānadānādikaṃ karma sarvamasyāṃ kṛtaṃ vibho |
bhavetsahasraguṇitaṃ prasādāttasya dantinaḥ | | 7
kṛtopavāso yastasyāṃ pūjayedvi ghnanāyakam |
tasya homādikaṃ karma bhavetsāhasrikaṃ nṛpa | | 8
lavaṇaṃ ca guḍaṃ śākaṃ guḍapūpāṃśca bhārata |
dattvā bhaktyā tu viprebhyaḥ phalaṃ sāhasrikaṃ bhajet | | 9
viśeṣataḥ striyo rājanpūjayanto guruṃ nṛpa |
guḍalavaṇaghṛtairvīra sadā syurbhāgyasaṃyutāḥ | | 1.31.10
sumanturuvāca
sukhāvahā ca susukhā saubhāgyakaraṇī param | | 11
caturthī kuruśārdūla rūpasaubhāgyadā śubhā |
sukhāvrataṃ mahāpuṇyaṃ rūpadaṃ bhāgyadaṃ tathā | | 12
susūkṣmaṃ sukaraṃ dhanyamiha puṇyasukhāvaham |
paratra phaladaṃ vīra divyarūpapradāyakam | | 13
hasitaṃ lalitaṃ coktaṃ ceṣṭitaṃ ca sukhāvaham |
savilāsabhujakṣepaścaṃkramaśceṣṭitaṃ śubham | | 14
sukhāvratena sarveṣāṃ sukhaṃ kurukulodvaha |
kṛtyena pūjite ceśe vighreśe śivayoḥ sute | | 15
yadā śuklacaturthyāṃ tu vāro bhaumasya vai bhavet |
tadā sā sukhadā jñeyā caturthī vai sukheti ca | | 16
purā maithunamāśritya sthitābhyāṃ tu himācale |
bhīmomābhyāṃ mahābāho raktabinduścyutaḥ kṣitau | | 17
medinyāṃ sa prayatnena sukhe vidhṛto.anayā |
jātosyāḥ sa kujo vīra rakto raktasamudbhavaḥ | | 18
mamāṅgato yathotpannastasmādaṅgārako hyayam |
aṅgadoṅgopakāraśca aṅgānāṃ tu prado nṛṇām | | 19
saubhāgyādikaro yasmāttasmādaṅgārako mataḥ |
bhaktyā caturthyāṃ naktena yo vai śraddhāsamanvitaḥ | | 1.31.20
upavatsyati nā rājannārī vā nānyamānasā |
pūjayecca kujaṃ bhaktayā raktapuṣpavilepanaiḥ | | 21
gaṇeśaṃ prathamaṃ bhaktyā yojayecchaddhayānvitaḥ |
yasya tuṣṭaḥ prayacchetsa saubhāgyaṃ rūpasampadam | | 22
pūrvaṃ ca kṛtasaṅkalpaḥ snānaṃ kṛtvā yathāvidhi |
gṛhītvā mṛttikāṃ vandenmantreṇānena bhārata | | 23
iha tvaṃ vanditā pūrvaṃ kṛṣṇenoddharatā kila |
tasmānme daha pāpmānaṃ yanmayā pūrvasañcitam | | 24
imaṃ mantraṃ paṭhanvīra ādityāya pradarśayet |
ādityaraśmisampūtāṃ gaṅgājalakaṇokṣitām | | 25
dattvā mṛdaṃ śirasi tāṃ sarvāṅgeṣu ca yojayet |
tataḥ snānaṃ prakurvīta mantrayeta jalaṃ punaḥ | | 26
tvamāpo yoniḥ sarveṣāṃ daityadānavadyaukasām |
svedāṇḍajodbhidāṃ caiva rasānāṃ pataye namaḥ | | 27
snāto.ahaṃ sarvatīrtheṣu sarvaprasravaṇeṣu ca |
taḍāgeṣu ca sarveṣu mānasādisaraḥsu ca | | 28
nadīṣu devakhāteṣu sutīrtheṣu hradeṣu vai |
dhyāyanyaṭhannimaṃ mantraṃ tataḥ snānaṃ samācaret | | 29
tataḥ snātvā śucirbhūtvā gṛhamāgatya vai spṛśet |
dūrvāśvatthau śamīṃ spṛṣṭvā gāṃ ca mantreṇa mantravit | | 1.31.30
dūrvā namasya mantreṇa śucau bhūmau samutthitām |
tvaṃ dūrve.amṛtanāmāsi sarvadevaistu vanditā | | 31
vanditā daha tatsarvaṃ duritaṃ yanmayā kṛtam | | 32
śamīmantraṃ pravakṣyāmi tannibodha mahīpate |
pavitrāṇāṃ pavitrāṃ tvaṃ kāśyapī prathitā śrutau | |
śamī śamaya me pāpaṃ nūnaṃ vetsi dharādharān | | 33
aśvatthālambhane vīra mantrametaṃ nibodha me |
netraspandādijaṃ duḥkhaṃ duḥsvapnaṃ durvicintanam | |
śaktānāṃ ca samudyogamaśvattha tvaṃ kṣamasva me | | 34
imaṃ mantraṃ paṭhanvīra kuryādvai sparśanaṃ budhaḥ |
tato devyai tu gāṃ dadyādvīraṃ kṛtvā pradakṣiṇām | |
samālabhya tu hastena tato mantramudīrayet | | 35
sarvadevamayī devi munibhistu supūjitā |
tasmātspṛśāmi vande tvāṃ vanditā pāpahā bhava | | 36
imaṃ mantraṃ paṭhanvīra bhaktyā śraddhāsamanvitaḥ |
pradakṣiṇaṃ tu yaḥ kuryādarjunaṃ kurunandana | |
pradakṣiṇīkṛtā tena pṛthivī syānna saṃśayaḥ | | 37
evaṃ maunena cāgatya tato vahnigṛhaṃ vrajet |
prakṣālya ca mṛdā pādāvācāntognigṛhaṃ viśet | |
homaṃ tatra prakurvīta ebhirmantrapadairvaraiḥ | | 38
śarvāya śarvaputrāya kṣoṇyutsaṅgabhavāya ca |
kujāya lalitāṅgāya lohitāṅgāya vai tathā | | 39
oṃkārapūrvakairmantraiḥ svāhākārasamanvitaiḥ |
aṣṭottaraśataṃ vīra ardhārdhamardhameva ca | | 1.31.40
etairmantrapadairbhaktyā śaktyā vā kāmato nṛpa |
khādiraiḥ susamidbhistu cājyadugdhairyavaistilaiḥ | | 41
bhakṣyairnānāvidhaiścānyaiḥ śaktyā bhaktyā samanvitaḥ |
hutvāhutīstato vīra devaṃ saṃsthāpayetkṣitau | | 42
sauvarṇaṃ rājataṃ vāpi śaktyā dārumayaṃ nṛpa |
devadārumayaṃ vāpi śrīkhaṇḍacandanairapi | | 43
tāmre pātre raupyamaye cājyakuṅkumakesaraiḥ |
anyairvā lohitairvāpi puṣpaiḥ patraiḥ phalairapi | |
raktaiśca vividhairvīra atha vā śaktito.arcayet | | 44
varadvisṛjate vittaṃ vittavānvīra bhaktitaḥ |
tāvadvivardhate puṇyaṃ dātuṃ śatasahasrikam | | 45
anye tāmramaye pātre vaṃśaje mṛnmaye.api vā |
pūjayanti narāḥ śaktyā kṛtvā kuṅkumakeśaraiḥ | |
puruṣākṛtikṛtaṃ pātra imaṃ mantraiḥ samarcayet | | 46
agrirmūrdheti mantreṇa gandhapuṣpādibhistathā |
dhūpairabhyarcya vidhivadbrāhmaṇāya pradīyate | | 47
guḍaudanaṃ ghṛtaṃ kṣīraṃ godhūmāñchālitaṇḍulān |||
avekṣya śaktiṃ dadyādvai daridro vittavāṃstathā | | 48
vittaśāṭhyaṃ na kartavyaṃ vidyamāne dhane nṛpa |
vittaśāṭhyaṃ hi kurvāṇo nāmutra balabhāgbhavet | |4 9
śatānīka uvāca
aṅgārakeṇa saṃyuktā caturthī naktabhojanaiḥ |
upoṣyā katimātrā tu utāho sakṛdeva tu | | 1.31.50
sumanturuvāca
caturthī sā caturthī sā yadāṅgārakasaṃyutā |
upoṣyā tatra tatraiva pradeyo vidhivadguḍaḥ | | 51
upoṣya naktena vibho catasraḥ kujasaṃyutā |
caturthyāṃ ca caturthyāṃ ca vidhānaṃ śṛṇu yādṛśam | | 52
sauvarṇaṃ tu kujaṃ kṛtvā savināyakamādarāt |
daśasauvarṇikaṃ mukhyaṃ daśārdhamardhameva ca | |5 3
sauvarṇapātre raupye vā bhaktyā tāmramaye.api vā |
viṃśatpalāni pātrāṇi viṃśatyardhapalāni vā | | 54
viṃśatkarṣāṇi vā vīra viṃśadardhārdhameva vā |
raupyasaṅkhyaṃ palaṃ kāryaṃ palārdhamardhameva ca | | 55
śaktyā vittaiśca bhaktyā ca pātre tāmramaye.api tu |
pratiṣṭhāpya graheśaṃ vai vastraiḥ sampariveṣṭitam | |
vividhaiḥ sādhakai raktaiḥ puṣpai raktaiḥ samanvitam | | 56
brāhmaṇāya sadā dadyāddakṣiṇāsahitaṃ nṛpa |
vācakāya mahābāho guṇine śreyase nṛpa | | 57
iti te kathitā puṇyā tithīnāmuttamā tithiḥ |
yāmupoṣya naro rūpaṃ divyamāpnoti bhārata | | 58
kāntyātreyasamaṃ vīraṃ tejasā ravisannibham |
prabhayā ravikalpaṃ ca samīrabalasaṃśritam | | 59
īdṛgrūpaṃ samāpyeha yāti bhaumasado nṛpa |
prasādādvighnanāthasya tathā gaṇapaternṛpa | | 1.31.60
paṭhatāṃ śṛṇvatāṃ rājankurvatāṃ ca viśeṣataḥ |
brahmahatyādipāpāni kṣīyante nātra saṃśayaḥ | |
ṛddhiṃ vṛddhiṃ tathā lakṣmīṃ labhate nātra saṃśayaḥ | | | 61
iti śrībhaviṣye mahāpurāṇe śatārddhasāhasryāṃ saṃhitāyāṃ brāhme parvaṇi caturthīkalpe
sukhāvahāṅgārakacaturthīvratanirūpaṇaṃ nāmaikatriṃśo.adhyāyaḥ | 31 |
atha dvātriṃśo.adhyāyaḥ
nāgapañcamīpūjanam
sumanturuvāca
pañcamī dayitā rājannāgānāṃ nandivardhinī |
pañcamyāṃ kila nāgānāṃ bhavatītyutsavo mahān | | 1
vāsukistakṣakaścaiva kāliyo maṇibhadrakaḥ |
airāvato dhṛtarāṣṭraḥ karkoṭakadhanañjayau | |
ete prayacchantyabhayaṃ prāṇināṃ prāṇajīvitām | | 2
pañcamyāṃ snapayantīha nāgānkṣīreṇa ye narāḥ |
teṣāṃ kule prayacchanti te.abhayaprāṇadakṣiṇām | | 3
śaptā nāgā yadā mātrā dahyamānā divāniśam |
nirvāpayanti snapanairgavāṃ kṣīreṇa miśritaiḥ | | 4
ye snapayanti vai nāgānbhaktyā śraddhāsamanvitā |
teṣāṃ kule sarpabhayaṃ na bhavediti niścayaḥ | | 5
śatānīka uvāca
mātrā śaptāḥ kathaṃ nāgāḥ kiṃ samuddiśya kāraṇam |
kathaṃ cānandakaraṇaṃ kasya vā samprasādajam | | 6
sumanturuvāca
uccaiḥśravā aśvaratnaṃ śveto jāto.amṛtodbhavaḥ |
taṃ dṛṣṭvā cābravītkadrūrnāgānāṃ jananī svasām | | 7
aśvaratnamidaṃ śvetaṃ samprekṣe.amṛtasambhavam |
kṛṣṇāṃśca vīkṣase bālānsarvaṃ śvetamutāmbare | | 8
vinatovāca
sarvaśveto hayavaro nāsya kṛṣṇo na lohitaḥ |
kathaṃ paśyasi kṛṣṇaṃ tvaṃ vinatovāca tāṃ svasām | | 9
kadrūruvāca
bīkṣe.ahamekanayanā kṛṣṇabālasamanvitam |
dvinetrā tvaṃ tu vinate na paśyasi paṇaṃ kuru | | 1.32.10
vinatovāca
ahaṃ dāsī bhavitrī te kṛṣṇe keśe pradarśite |
na ceddarśayase kadru mama dāsī bhaviṣyasi | | 11
evaṃ te vipaṇaṃ kṛtvā gate krodhasamanvite |
vinatā śayane suptā kadrūrjihmamacintayat | | 12
āhūya putrānprovāca bālā bhūtvā hayottame |
tiṣṭhadhvaṃ vipaṇe jeṣye vinatāṃ jayagarddhinīm | | 13
procuste jihmabuddhiṃ tāṃ nāgā mātāṃ vigṛhya tu |
adharmyametanmātaste na kariṣyāma te vacaḥ | | 14
tāñśaśāpa ruṣā kadrūḥ pāvako vaḥ pradhakṣyati |
gate bahutithe kāle pāṇḍavo janamejayaḥ | | 15
sarpasatraṃ sa kartā vai bhuvi hyanyaiḥ suduṣkaram |
tasminsatre sa tigmāṃśuḥ pāvako vaḥ pradhakṣyati | | 16
evaṃ śaptvā ruṣā kadrūḥ kiñcinnoktavatī tu sā |
mātrā śaptāstathā nāgāḥ kartavyaṃ nānvapatsata | | 17
vāsukiṃ duḥkhitaṃ jñātvā brahmā provāca sāntvayan |
mā śuco vāsuke.atyarthaṃ śṛṇu madvacana param | | 18
yāyāvarakule jāto jaratkārūriti dvijaḥ |
bhaviṣyati mahātejāstasminkāle taponidhiḥ 1| ( 19
bhaginīṃ ca jaratkāruṃ tasmai tvaṃ pratidāsyasi |
bhavitā tasya putro.asāvāstīka iti viśrutaḥ | | 1.32.20
sa tatsatraṃ pravṛddhaṃ vai nāgānāṃ bhayadaṃ mahat |
niṣedhetsumatirvāgbhiragryābhistaṃ naviṣyati | | 21
tadimāṃ bhaginīṃ rājaṃstasya tvaṃ pratidāsyasi |
jaratkāruṃ jaratkāroḥ pradadyā avicārayan | | 22
yadāsau prārthate.araṇye yatkiñciddhi vadiṣyati |
tatkartavyamaśaṅkena yadīccheḥ śreya ātmanaḥ | | 23
pitāmahavacaḥ śrutvā vāsukiḥ praṇipatya ca |
tathākarodyathā coktaṃ yatnaṃ ca paramāsthitaḥ | | 24
tacchrutvā pannagāḥ sarve praharṣotphullalocanāḥ |
punarjātamivātmānaṃ menire bhujagottamāḥ | | 25
tatra satraṃ mahābāho tava pitrā pravartitam |
ṛtvigbhiḥ sa hi teneha sarvalokeṣu duṣkaram | | 26
proktaṃ ca viṣṇunā pūrvaṃ dharmaputrasya dhīmataḥ |
avaśyaṃ tasya bhavitā nāgānāṃ bhayakārakam | | 27
tasmātkālāntarādrājansāgre varṣaśate gate |
tatsatraṃ bhavitā ghoraṃ nāgānāṃ kṣayakārakam | | 28
yāsyantyadharmabharitā dandaśūkā viṣolbaṇāḥ |
koṭisaṅkhyā mahārāja nipatiṣyantyaharniśam | | 29
apūrve tu nimagnānāṃ ghore raudrāgnisāgare |
āstīkastatra bhavitā teṣāṃ naurvahnisāgare | | 1.32.30
śrutvā sa cāgniṃ rājānamṛtvijastadanantaram |
nivartayiṣyate yāgaṃ nāgānāṃ mohanaṃ param | | 31
pañcamyāṃ tatra bhavitā brahmā provāca lelihān |
tasmādiyaṃ mahābāho pañcamī dayitā sadā | |
nāgānāmānandakarī dattā vai brahmaṇā purā | | 32
kṛtvā tu bhojanaṃ pūrvaṃ brāhmaṇānāṃ tu kāmataḥ |
visṛjya nāgāḥ prīyantāṃ ye kecitpṛthivītale | | 33
ye ca helimarīcisthā ye.antare divi saṃsthitāḥ |
ye nadīṣu mahānāgā ye sarasvatigāminaḥ | |
ye ca vāpītaḍāgeṣu teṣu sarveṣu vai namaḥ | | 34
nāgānviprāṃśca sampūjya visṛjya ca yathārthataḥ |
tataḥ paścāttu bhuñjīta saha bhṛtyairnarādhipa | | 35
pūrvaṃ madhuramaśnīyāttato bhuñjīta kāmataḥ |
evaṃ niyamayuktasya yatphalaṃ tannibodha me | | 36
mṛto nāgapuraṃ yāti pūjyamāno.apsarogaṇaiḥ |
vimānavaramārūḍho ramate kālamīpsitam | | 37
iha cāgatya rājāsāvayutānāṃ varo bhavet |
sarvaratnasamṛddhaḥ syādvāhanāḍhyaśca jāyate | | 38
pañca janmānyasau rājā dvāpare dvāpare bhavet |
ādhivyādhivinirmuktaḥ patnīputrasahāyavān | |
tasmātpūjyāśca pālyāśca ghṛtapāyasaguggulaiḥ | | 39
śatānīka uvāca
daśanti ye naraṃ vipra nāgāḥ krodhasamanvitāḥ |
bhavetkiṃ tasya daṣṭasya vistarād brūhi me dvija | | 1.32.40
sumanturuvāca
nāgadaṣṭo naro rājanprāpya mṛtyuṃ vrajatyadhaḥ |
adho gatyā bhavetsarpo nirviṣo nātra saṃśayaḥ | |4 1
śatānīka uvāca
nāgadaṣṭaḥ pitā yasya bhrātā vā duhitāpi vā |
mātā putro.atha vā bhāryā kiṃ kartavyaṃ vadasva me | | 42
mokṣāya tasya viprendra dānaṃ vratamupoṣaṇam |
brūhi taddvijaśārdūla yena tadvai karomyaham | | 43
sumanturuvāca
upoṣyā pañcamī rājannāgānāṃ puṣṭivardhinī |
tvamevamekaṃ rājendra vidhānaṃ śṛṇu bhārata | | 44
māsi bhādrapade yā tu kṛṣṇapakṣe mahīpate |
mahāpuṇyā tu sā proktā grāhyāpi ca mahīpate | |45
jñeyā dvādaśa ṣañcamyo hāyane bharatarṣabha |
cartuthyāṃ tvekabhaktaṃ tu tasyāṃ naktaṃ prakīrtitam | |4 6
bhuvi citramayānnāgānatha vā kaladhautakān |
kṛtvā dārumayānvāpi atha vā mṛnmayānnṛpa | |47
pañcamyāmarcayedbhaktyā nāgānāṃ pañcakaṃ nṛpa |
karavīraiḥ śatapatrairjātīpuṣpaiśca suvrata | | 48
tathā gandhaiśca dhūpaiśca pūjya pañcakamuttamam |
brāhmaṇaṃ bhojayetpaścād ghṛtapāyasamodakaiḥ | |4 9
ananto vāsukiḥ śaṅkhaḥ padmaḥ kambala eva ca |
tathā karkoṭako nāgo nāgo hyaśvataro nṛpa | | 1.32.50
dhṛtarāṣṭraḥ śaṅkhapālaḥ kāliyastakṣakastathā |
piṅgalaśca tathā nāgo māsi māsi prakīrtitāḥ | | 51
vatsarānte pāraṇaṃ syādbrāhmaṇānbhojayedbahūn |
itihāsavide nāgaṃ gairikeṇa kṛtaṃ nṛpa | |
tathārcanā pradātavyā vācakāya mahīpate | | 52
eṣa vai nāgapañcamyā vidhiḥ proktā budhairnṛpa |
tava pitrā kṛtaścaiva piturmokṣāya bhārata | | 53
tvamekamekaṃ vai vīra pañcamyāṃ bharatarṣabha |
suvarṇabhāraniṣpannaṃ nāgaṃ dattvā tathā ca gām | | 54
vyāsāya kuruśārdūla piturānṛṇyamāpnuyāḥ |
tava pitrā kṛtā hyevaṃ pañcamyupāsanā nṛpa | | 55
utsṛjya nāgatāṃ vīra tava pūrvapitāmahaḥ |
puṣpottaraṃ sado gatvā tathā puṣpasado nṛpa | | 56
sunāsīrasado gatvā tadā bhargasado gataḥ |
svabhūsadastato gatvā kañjajasya sado gataḥ | | 57
anye.api ye kariṣyanti idaṃ vratamanuttamam |
daṣṭako mokṣyate teṣāṃ śubhaṃ sthānamavāpsyati | | 58
yaścedaṃ śṛṇuyānnityaṃ naraḥ śraddhāsamanvitaḥ |
kule tasya na nāgebhyo bhayaṃ bhavati kutracit | | 59
iti śrībhaviṣye mahāpurāṇe śatārddhasāhasryāṃ saṃhitāyāṃ brāhme parvaṇi pañcamīkalpe
nāgapañcamīvratavarṇanaṃ nāma dvātriṃśo.adhyāyaḥ | 32 |
atha trayastriṃśo.adhyāyaḥ
sarpabhedam
śatānīka uvāca
sarpāṇāṃ kati rūpāṇi ke varṇāḥ kiṃ ca lakṣaṇam |
kā jātistu bhavetteṣāṃ keṣu yonikuleṣu vā | | 1
sumanturuvāca
purā merau nagavare kaśyapaṃ tapasāṃ nidhim |
praṇamya śirasā bhaktayā gautamo vākyamabravīt | | 2
sarpāṇāṃ kati rūpāṇi kiṃ cihnaṃ kiṃ ca lakṣaṇam |
jātiṃ kulaṃ tadhā varṇānbrūhi sarvaṃ prajāpate | | 3
kathaṃ vā jāyate sarpaḥ kadhaṃ muñcedviṣaṃ prabho |
viṣavegāḥ kati proktāḥ katyeva viṣanāḍikāḥ | |4
daṃṣṭrāḥ katividhāḥ proktāḥ kiṃ pramāṇaṃ viṣāgame |
gṛhṇīte tu kadā garbhaṃ kathaṃ ceha prasūyate | | 5
kīdṛśī strī pumāṃścaiva kīdṛśaśca napuṃsakaḥ |
kiṃ nāma daśanaṃ caiva etatkathaya suvrata | | 6
tasya tadvacanaṃ śrutvā kaśyapaḥ pratyabhāṣata |
śṛṇu gautama tattvena sarpāṇāmiha lakṣaṇam | |7
māsyāṣāḍhe tathā jyeṣṭhe pramādyanti bhujaṅgamāḥ |
tato nāgo.atha nāgī ca maithune samprapadyate | | 8
caturo vārṣikānmāsānnāgī garbhamadhārayat |
tataḥ kārttikamāse tu aṇḍakāni prasūyate | | 9
aṇḍakānāṃ tu vijñeye dveśate dve ca viṃśatī |
tānyeva bhakṣayetsā tu bhogaikaṃ ghṛṇayā tyajet | | 1.33.10
svarṇārkavarṇādvai tasmātpumānsañjāyate.aṇḍakāt |
tānyeva khādate sarpa ahorātrāṇi viṃśatim | | 11
svarṇaketakavarṇābhāddīrgharājīvasannibhāt |
tasmādutpadyate strī vai aṇḍādbrāhmaṇasattama | | 12
śirīṣapuṣpavarṇābhādaṇḍakātsyānnapuṃsakaḥ |
tato bhinatti cāṇḍāni ṣaṇmāsena tu gautama | | 13
tataste prītisambandhātsnehaṃ badhnanti bālakāḥ |
tato.asau saptarātreṇa kṛṣṇo bhavati pannagaḥ | | 14
āyuḥpramāṇaṃ sarpāṇāṃ śataṃ viṃśottaraṃ smṛtam |
mṛtyuścāṣṭavidho jñeyaḥ śṛṇuṣvātra yathākramam | | 15
mayūrānmānuṣādvāpi cakorādgokhurāttathā |
biḍālānnakulāccaiva varāhādvṛścikāttathā | |
eteṣāṃ yadi mucyeta jīvedviṃśottaraṃ śatam | | 16
saptāhe tu tataḥ pūrṇe daṃṣṭrāṇāṃ cādhirohaṇam |
viṣasyāgamanaṃ tatra nikṣipecca punaḥ punaḥ | | 17
evaṃ jñātvā tu tattvena viṣakarmmārabheta vai |
ekaviṃśatirātreṇa viṣadaṃṣṭrā sujāyate | |
nāgīpārśvasamāvartī bālasarpaḥ sa ucyate | | 18
pañcaviṃśatirātrastu sadyaḥ prāṇaharo bhavet |
ṣaṇmāsājjātamātrastu kañcukaṃ vai pramuñcati | | 19
pādānāṃ cāpi vijñeye dve śate dve ca viṃśatī |
golomasadṛśāḥ pādāḥ praviśanti kramanti ca | | 1.33.20
sandhīnāṃ cāsya vijñeye dveśate viṃśatī tathā |
aṃgulyaścāpi vijñeyā dve śate viṃśatī tathā | | 21
akālajātā ye sarpā nirviṣāste prakīrtitāḥ |
pañcasaptativarṣāṇi āyusteṣāṃ prakīrtitam | | 22
raktapītaśukladantā anīlā mandaveginaḥ |
ete alpāyuṣo jñeyo anye ca bhīravaḥ smṛtā | | 23
ekaṃ cāsya bhavedvaktraṃ dve jihve ca prakīrtite |
dvātriṃśaddaśanāḥ proktāḥ pannāgānāṃ na saṃśayaḥ | | 24
teṣāṃ madhye catasrastu daṃṣṭrā yāḥ suviṣāvahāḥ |
makarī karālī kālarātrī yamadūtī tathaiva ca | | 25
sarvāsāṃ caiva daṃṣṭrāṇāṃ devatāḥ parikīrtitāḥ |
prathamā brahmadevatyā dvitīyā viṣṇudevatā | |
tṛtīyā rudradevatyā caturthī yamadevatā | | 26
hīnā pramāṇataḥ sā tu vāmanetraṃ samāśritā |
nāsyāṃ mantrāḥ prayoktavyā nauṣadhaṃ naiva bheṣajam | | 27
vaidyaḥ parāṅmukho yāti mṛtyustasyā vilekhanāt |
cikitsā na budhaiḥ kāryā tadantaṃ tasya jīvitam | | 28
makarīṃ māsikāṃ vidyātkarālī ca dvimāsikā |
kālarātrī bhavettrīṇi caturo yamadūtikā | | 29
makarīṃ guḍaudanaṃ dadyātkaṣāyānnaṃ karālikām |
kālarātrīṃ kaṭuyutaṃ dūtīṃ vai sānnipātikam | | 1.33.30
makarī śastrakaṃ vidyātkarālī kākapādikā |
karākṛtiḥ kālarātriryāmyā kūrmākṛtiḥ smṛtā | | 31
makarī vātulā jñeyā karālī paittikī smṛtā |
kaphātmikā kālarātrī yamadūtī sānnipātakī | | 32
śuklā tu makarī jñeyā karālī raktasannibhā |
kālarātrī bhavetpītā kṛṣṇā ca yamadūtikā | | 33
vāmā śuklā ca kṛṣṇā ca raktā pītā ca dakṣiṇā |
samāsena tu vakṣyāmi yathaitā varṇataḥ smṛtāḥ | | 34
śuklā tu brāhmaṇī jñeyā raktā tu kṣatriyā smṛtā |
vaiśyā tu pītikā jñeyā kṛṣṇā śūdrā tu kathyate | |
ataḥ paraṃ pravakṣyāmi daṃṣṭrāṇāṃ viṣalakṣaṇam | | 35
daṃṣṭrāṇāṃ tu viṣaṃ nāsti nityameva bhujaṅgame |
dakṣiṇaṃ netramāsādya viṣaṃ sarpasya tiṣṭhati | | 36
saṅkuddhasyeha sarpasya viṣaṃ gacchati mastake |
mastakāddhamanīṃ yāti tato nāḍīṣu gacchati | | 37
nāḍībhyaḥ padyate daṃṣṭrāṃ viṣaṃ tatra pravartate |
tatsarvaṃ kathayiṣyāmi yathāvadanupūrvaśaḥ | | 38
aṣṭabhiḥ kāraṇaiḥ sarpo daśate nātra saṃśayaḥ |
ākrānto daśate pūrvaṃ dvitīyaṃ pūrvavairiṇam | | 39
tṛtīyaṃ daśate bhītaścaturthaṃ madadarpitaḥ |
pañcamaṃ tu kṣudhāviṣṭaḥ ṣaṣṭhaṃ ceha viṣolbaṇaḥ | |
saptamaṃ purarakṣārthamaṣṭamaṃ kālacoditaḥ | | 1.33.40
yastu sarpo daśitvā tu udaraṃ parivartayet |
balabhugnākṛtiṃ daṃṣṭrāmākrāntaṃ taṃ vinirdiśet | |4 1
yasya sarpeṇa daṣṭasya gabhīraṃ dṛśyate vraṇam |
vairadaṣṭaṃ vijānīyātkaśyapasya vaco yathā | |4 2
ekaṃ daṃṣṭrāpadaṃ yasya avyaktaṃ na ca kalpitam |
bhītadaṣṭaṃ vijānīyādyathovāca prajāpatiḥ | | 43
yasya sarpeṇa daṣṭasya rekhā dantasya jāyate |
madadaṣṭaṃ vijānīyātkaśyapasya vaco yathā | | 44
dve ca daṃṣṭrāpade yasya dṛśyante ca mahākṣatam |
kṣudhāviṣṭaṃ vijānīyādyathovāca prajāpatiḥ | | 45
dve daṃṣṭre yasya dṛśyete kvacidrudhirasaṅkule |
viṣolbaṇaṃ vijānīyāddaṃśaṃ taṃ nātra saṃśayaḥ | | 46
apatyarakṣaṇārthāya jānīyāttaṃ na saṃśayaḥ |
yattu kākapadākāraṃ tribhirdantaistu lakṣitam | | 47
mahānāga iti proktaṃ kāladaṇḍaṃ vinirdiśet |
trividhaṃ daṣṭajātaistu lakṣaṇaṃ samudāhṛtam | |48
daṣṭānupītaṃ vijñeyaṃ kaśyapasya vaco yathā |
viṣabhāgāttu sarpasya tribhāgastatra saṃkramet | | 49
udaraṃ darśayedyastu uddhataṃ taṃ vinirdiśet |
charditaṃ viṣavegena nirviṣaḥ pannago bhavet | | 1.33.50
asādhyaścāpi vijñeyaścaturdaṃṣṭrābhipīḍitaḥ |
grīvābhaṅgo bhavetkiñcitsandaṣṭo viṣayogataḥ | |
ito daṃśastataḥ śuddho vyantaraḥ parikīrtitaḥ | | 51
iti śrībhaviṣye mahāpurāṇe śatārddhasāhasryāṃ saṃhitāyāṃ brāhme parvaṇi pañcamīkalpe
sarpadaṃṣṭrāvarṇanaṃ nāma trayastriṃśo.adhyāyaḥ | 33 |

kālalakṣaṇam
kaśyapa uvāca
ataḥ paraṃ pravakṣyāmi kāladaṣṭasya lakṣaṇam |
śṛṇu gautama tattvena yādṛśo bhavate naraḥ | | 1
jihrābhaṅgo.atha hṛcchūlaṃ cakṣurbhyāṃ ca na paśyati |
daṃśaṃ ca dagdhasaṃkāśaṃ pakvajambūphalopamam | | 2
vaivarṇyaṃ caiva dantānāṃ śyāvo bhavati varṇataḥ |
sarveṣvaṅgeṣu śaithilyaṃ purīṣasya ca bhedanam | | 3
bhagnaskandhakaṭigrīva ūrdhvadṛṣṭiradhomukhaḥ |
dahyate vepate caiva svapate ca muhurmuhuḥ | | 4
śastreṇa cchidyamānasya rudhiraṃ na pravartate |
daṇḍena tāḍyamānasya daṇḍarājī na jāyate | | 5
daṃśe kākapadaṃ sunīlamasakṛjjambūphalābhaṃ ghanamucchūnaṃ rudhirārdrasekabahulaṃ kṛcchrānnirodho bhavet |
hikkāśvāsagalagrahaśca sumahānpāṇḍustvacā dṛśyate śuṣkāṅgaḥ pravadanti śāstranipuṇāstatkāladaṣṭaṃ viduḥ | | 6
daṃśe yasyātha śothaḥ pracalitavalitaṃ maṇḍalaṃ vā sunīlaṃ prasvedo gātra bhedaḥ sravati ca rudhiraṃ sānunāsaṃ ca jalpet |
dantoṣṭhābhyāṃ viyogo bhramati ca hṛdayaṃ sannirodhaśca tīvro divyānāmeṣa daṃśaḥ sthalavipulamayo viddhi taṃ kāladaṣṭam | | 7
dantairdantānspṛśati bahuśo dṛṣṭirāyāsakhinnā sthūlo daṃśaḥ sravati rudhiraṃ kekaraṃ cakṣurekam | |
pratyādiṣṭaḥ śvasiti satataṃ sānunāsaṃ ca bhāṣetpāpaṃ brūte sakalagaditaṃ kāladaṇḍaṃ tamāhuḥ | | 8
vepate vedanā tīvrā raktanetraśca jāyate |
grīvābhaṅgaścalā nābhiḥ kāladaṣṭaṃ vinirdiśet | | 9
darpaṇe salile vāpi ātmacchāyāṃ na paśyati |
mandaraśmiṃ tathā tīvraṃ tejohīnaṃ divākaram | | 1.34.10
vepate vedanātrasto raktanetraśca jāyate |
sa yāti nidhanaṃ jantuḥ kāladaṇḍaṃ vinirdiśet | | 11
aṣṭamyāṃ ca navamyāṃ ca kṛṣṇapakṣe caturdaśīm |
nāgapañcamīdaṣṭānāṃ jīvitasya ca saṃśayaḥ | | 12

ārdrāśleṣāmaghābharaṇīkṛttikāsu viśeṣataḥ |
viśākhāṃ triṣu pūrvāsu mūlasvātīśatātmake | |
sarpadaṣṭā na jīvanti viṣaṃ pītaṃ ca yaistathā | | 13

śūnyāgāre śmaśāne ca śuṣkavṛkṣe tathaiva ca |
na jīvanti narā daṣṭā nakṣatre tithisaṃyute | | 14

aṣṭottaraṃ marma śataṃ prāṇināṃ samudāhṛtam |
teṣāṃ madhye tu marmāṇi daśa dve cāpi kīrtite | | 15

śaṅkhe netre bhruvormadhye bastibhyāṃ vṛṣaṇottare |
kakṣe skandhe hadi madhye tāluke cibuke gude | | 16
eṣu dvādaśamarmeṣu daṃśaiḥ śastreṇa vā hataḥ |
na jīvati naro loke kāladaṇḍaṃ vinirdiśet | | 17
akacaṭatapayaśāṃ vadanti proktā jīvanti na tatra hi |
gataṃ brūyādyadi skhalati śirastasya samprāptakālaḥ | | 18
bhavati ca yadi dūto hyuttamasyādhamo vā yadi bhavati ca dūta uttamo vādhamasya |
ādau daṣṭasya nāma yadi vadati kvacidvakti tasyātha paścāttaṃ varṇabhedo yadi bhavati samaḥ prāpta kālasya dūtaḥ | | 19
dūto vā daṇḍahasto bhavati ca yugalaṃ pāśahastastathā vā raktavastraṃ ca kṛṣṇaṃ mukhaśirasi gatamekavastraśca dūtaḥ | |
tailābhyaktaśca tadvadyadi tvaritagatirmuktakeśaśca yāti yaḥ kuryādghoraśabdaṃ karacaraṇayugaiḥ prāptakālasya dūtaḥ | | 1.34.20
nāgodayaṃ pravakṣyāmi īśānena tu bhāṣitam |
brahmaṇā tu purā sṛṣṭā grahā nāgāstvanekaśaḥ | | 21
anantaṃ bhāskaraṃ vidyātsomaṃ vidyāttu vāsukim |
takṣakaṃ bhūmiputraṃ tu karkoṭaṃ ca budhaṃ viduḥ | | 22
padmaṃ bṛhaspatiṃ vidyānmahāpadmaṃ ca bhārgavam |
kulikaḥ śaṃkhapālaśca dvāvetau tu śanaiścaraḥ | | 23
pūrvapādaḥ śaṃkhapālo dvitīyaḥ kulikastathā |
nityaṃ bhāge yathoddiṣṭe dinarātrī tathaiva ca | | 24
śukrasomau ca madhyāhne udaye tu kṣamāsutaḥ |
śaniḥ prāgaṣṭame bhāge divārātre tvihocyate | | 25
grahāśca bhuñjate caiva śeṣaṃ bhāgasya lakṣaṇam |
ravivāre sadā jñeyau pādau daśa caturdaśa | | 26
aṣṭa dvādaśa vai candre daśa ṣaṣṭhe kuje tathā |
budhasya navame pāde rāhau ca divasasya ca | | 27
gurordvitīyaḥ ṣaṣṭhaśca ṣoḍaśasya tu varjayet |
bhāskarasya dine prokte caturthe daśameṣṭame | | 28
śanaiścaradine pādaṃ tyajeccaiva sudāruṇam |
dvitīyaṃ dvādaśaṃ caiva ṣoḍaśasya tu varjayet | | 29
muhūrtaghaṭikādūrddhvaṃ ghaṭikā caturthaṃ bhāgaṃ viṃśatiśca |
kuhūsutaṃ budbudaṃ nimeṣametatkālasya lakṣaṇam | | 1.34.30
iti śrī bhaviṣye mahāpurāṇe śatārddhasāhasryāṃ saṃhitāyāṃ brāhme parvaṇi pañcamīkalpe
daṃśadaṣṭakadūtalakṣaṇaṃ nāma catustriṃśo.adhyāyaḥ | 34 |

yamadūtīlakṣaṇam
kaśyapa uvāca
saviṣā daṃṣṭrayormadhye yamadūtī tu vai bhavet |
na cikitsā budhaiḥ kāryā taṃ gatāsuṃ virnidaśet | | 1
praharārdhaṃ divārātrāvekaikaṃ bhuñjate bahiḥ |
ekasya ca samānaṃ ca dvitīyaṃ ṣoḍaśaṃ tathā | | 2
nāgodayo yamuddiśya hato viddho vidāritaḥ |
kāladaṣṭaṃ vijānīyātkaśyapasya vaco yathā | | 3
yanmātraṃ patate bindurvālāgraṃ saliloddhṛtam |
tanmātraṃ sravate daṃṣṭrā viṣaṃ sarpasya dāruṇam | | 4
nāḍīśate tu sampūrṇe dehe saṅkramate viṣam |
yāvatsaṅkrāmayedbāhuṃ kuñcitaṃ vā prasārayet | | 5
anena kṣaṇamātreṇa viṣaṃ gacchati mastake |
vepate viṣavege tu śataśo.atha sahasraśaḥ | | 6
vardhate raktamāsādya tato vātaiḥ śikhī yathā |
tailabindurjalaṃ prāpya yathā vegena vardhate | | 7
śikhaṇḍī āśrayaṃ prāpya mārutena samīritaḥ |
tataḥ sthānaśataṃ prāpya tvacāsthānaṃ viceṣṭitam | | 8
tvacāsu dviguṇaṃ vidyācchoṇiteṣu caturguṇam |
pitte tu triguṇaṃ yāti śleṣme vai ṣoḍaśaṃ bhavet | | 9
vāyau triṃśadguṇaṃ caiva majjāṣaṣṭiguṇaṃ tathā |
prāṇe caikārṇavībhūte sarvagātrāṇi sandhayet | | 1.35.10
śrotre nirudhyamāne ca yāti daṣṭastvasādhyatām |
tato.asau mriyate janturniḥśvāsocchvāsavarjitaḥ | | 11
niṣkrānte tu tato jīve bhūte pañcatvamāgate |
tāni bhūtāni gacchanti yasya yasya yathātatham | | 12
pṛthivyāpastathā tejo vāyurākāśameva ca |
ityeṣāmeva saṅghātaḥ śarīramabhidhīyate | | 13
pṛthivī pṛthivīṃ yāti toyaṃ toyeṣu līyate |
tejo gacchati cādityaṃ māruto mārutaṃ vrajet | | 14
ākāśaṃ caivamākāśe saha tenaiva gacchati |
svasthānaṃ te prapadyante parasparaniyojitāḥ | | 15
na jīvedāgataḥ kaścidiha janmani suvrata |
viṣārtaṃ na upekṣeta tvaritaṃ tu cikitsayet | | 16
ekamasti viṣaṃ loke dvitīyaṃ copapadyate |
yathā nānāvidhaṃ caiva sthāvaraṃ tu tathaiva ca | | 17
prathame viṣavege tu romaharṣo.abhijāyate |
dvitīye viṣavege tu svedo gātreṣu jāyate | | 18
tṛtīye viṣavege tu kampo gātreṣu jāyate |
caturthe viṣavege tu śrotrāntaranirodhakṛt | | 19
pañcame viṣavege tu hikkā gātreṣu jāyate |
ṣaṣṭhe ca viṣavege tu prāṇebhyo.api pramucyate | |
saptadhātuvahā hyete vainateyena bhāṣitāḥ | | 1.35.20
tvacaḥ sthāne viṣe prāpte tasya rūpāṇi me śṛṇu |
aṅgāni timirāyante tapante ca muhurmuhuḥ | | 21
etāni yasya cihnāni tasya tvaci gataṃ viṣam |
tasyāgadaṃ pravakṣyāmi yena sampadyate sukham | | 22
arkamūlamapāmārgaṃ priyaṅguṃ tagaraṃ tathā |
etadāloḍya dātavyaṃ tataḥ sampadyate sukham | | 23
tatastasmitkṛte vipra na nivarteta cedviṣam |
tvacaḥ sthānaṃ tato bhittvā raktasthānaṃ pradhāvati | | 24
viṣe ca raktaṃ saṃprāpte tasya rūpāṇi me śṛṇu |
dahyate muhyate caiva śītalaṃ bahu manyate | | 25
etāni yasya rūpāṇi tasya raktagataṃ viṣam |
tatrāgadaṃ pravakṣyāmi yena sampadyate sukham | | 26
uśīraṃ candanaṃ kuṣṭhamutpalaṃ tagaraṃ tathā |
mahākālasya mūlāni sinduvāranagasya ca | |
hiṅgulaṃ maricaṃ caiva pūrvavege tu dāpeyat | | 27
bṛhatī vṛścikā kālī indra vāruṇimūlakam |
saptagandhaghṛtaṃ caiva dvitīye parikīrtitam | | 28
sinduvāraṃ tathā hiṅguṃ tṛtīye kārayedbudhaḥ |
tasya pānaṃ ca kurvīta añjanaṃ lepanaṃ tathā | | 29
etenaivopacāreṇa tataḥ sampadyate sukham |
raktasthānaṃ tato gatvā pittasthānaṃ pradhāvati | | 1.35.30
pittasthānagate vipra viṣarūpāṇi me śṛṇu |
uttiṣṭhate nipatate dahyate muhyate tathā | | 31
gātrataḥ pītakaḥ syādvai diśaḥ paśyati pītikā |
prabalā ca bhavanmūrcchā na cātmānaṃ vijānate | |
viṣakriyāṃ tasya kuryādyathā sampadyate sukham | | 32
pittasthānamatikramya śleṣmasthānaṃ ca gacchati | | 33
pippalyo madhukaṃ caiva madhu khaṇḍaṃ ghṛtaṃ tathā |
madhusāramalābūṃ ca jātiṃ śaṅkaravālukām | |
indravāruṇikāmūlaṃ gavāṃ mūtreṇa peṣayet | | 34
nasyaṃ tasya prayuñjīta pānamālepanāñjanam |
etenaivopacāreṇa tataḥ sampadyate sukham | | 35
śleṣmasthānaṃ tataḥ prāpte tasya rūpāṇi me śṛṇu |
gātrāṇi tasya rudhyante niḥśvāsaśca na jāyate | |
lālā ca sravate tasya kaṇṭho ghurughurāyate | | 36
etāni yasya rūpāṇi tasya śleṣmagataṃ viṣam |
tasyāgadaṃ pravakṣyāmi yena sampadyate sukham | | 37
trikuṭakī śleṣmātako lodhrañca madhusārakam |
etāni samabhāgāni gavāṃ mūtreṇa peṣayet | | 38
tasya pānaṃ ca kurvīta añjanaṃ lepanaṃ tathā |
etenaivopacāreṇa tataḥ sampadyate sukham | | 39
śleṣmasthānamatikramya vāyusthānaṃ ca gacchati |
tatra rūpāṇi vakṣyāmi vāyusthānagate viṣe | | 1.35.40
ādhmāyate ca jaṭharaṃ bāndhavāṃśca na paśyati |
īdṛśaṃ kurute rūpaṃ vṛṣṭibhaṅgaśca jāyate | | 41
etāni yasya rūpāṇi tasya vāyugataṃ viṣam |
tasyāgadaṃ prakṣyāmi yena sampadyate sukham | |4 2
śoṇāmūlaṃ priyālaṃ ca raktaṃ ca gajapippalīm |
bhārṅgīṃ vacāṃ pippalīṃ ca devadāruṃ madhūkakam | | 43
madhūkasāraṃ sahasinduvāraṃ hiṅguṃ ca piṣṭā guṭikāṃ ca kuryāt |
dadyācca tasyāñjanalepanādi eṣo.agadaḥ sarpaviṣāṇi hanyāt | | 44
añjanaṃ caiva nasyaṃ ca kṣipraṃ dadyādviṣānvite |
vāyusthānaṃ tato muktvā majjāsthānaṃ pradhāvati | |45
viṣe majjāgate vipra tasya rūpāṇi me śṛṇu |
dṛṣṭiśca hīyate tasya bhṛśamaṅgāni muñcati | |4 6
etāni yasya rūpāṇi tasya majjāgataṃ viṣam |
tasyāgadaṃ pravakṣyāmi yena sampadyate sukham | | 47
ghṛtamadhuśarkarānvitamuśīraṃ caṃdanaṃ tathā ||
etadāloḍya dātavyaṃ pānaṃ nasyaṃ ca suvrata || 48 ||
tataḥ praṇaśyate duḥkhaṃ tataḥ saṃpadyate sukham ||
atha tasminkṛte yoge viṣaṃ tasya nivartate ||49||
majjāsthānaṃ tato gatvā marmasthānaṃ pradhāvati||
viṣe tu marma saṃprāpte śṛṇu rūpaṃ yathā bhavet||1.35.50||
niśceṣṭaḥ patate bhūmau karṇābhyāṃ badhiro bhavet||
vāriṇā sicyamānasya romaharṣo na jāyate ||51||
daṃḍena hanyamānasya daṃḍarājī na jāyate||
śastreṇa cchidyamānasya rudhiraṃ na pravartate || 52 ||
keśeṣu lucyamāneṣu naiva keśānpravedate ||
yasya karṇau ca pārśve ca hastapādaṃ ca saṃdhayaḥ ||
śithilāni bhavaṃtīha sa gatāsuriti śrutiḥ || 53||
etāni yasya rūpāṇi viparītāni gautama ||
mṛtaṃ tu na vijānīyātkaśyapasya vaco yathā ||54||
vaidyāstasya na paśyaṃti ye bhavaṃti kuśikṣitāḥ ||
vicakṣaṇāstu paśyaṃti maṃtrauṣadhisamanvitāḥ ||55||
tasyāgadaṃ pravakṣyāmi svayaṃ rudreṇa bhāṣitam ||
mayūrapittaṃ mārjārapittaṃ gandhanāḍīmūlameva ca || 56 ||
kuṃkumaṃ tagaraṃ kuṣṭhaṃ kāsamardatvacaṃ tathā||
utpalasya ca kiṃjalkaṃ padmasya kumudasya ca || 57 ||
etāni samabhāgāni gomūtreṇa tu peṣayet ||
eṣo.agado yasya haste daṣṭo na mriyate sa vai ||
kālāhināpi daṣṭena kṣipraṃ bhavati nirviṣaḥ ||58||
kṣiprameva pradā tavyaṃ mṛtasaṃjīvanauṣadham ||
aṃjanaṃ caiva nasyaṃ ca kṣipraṃ dadyādvicakṣaṇaḥ || 59 ||
iti śrībhaviṣye mahāpurāṇe śatārddhasāhasryāṃ saṃhitāyāṃ brāhme parvaṇi paṃcamīkalpe dhātugataviṣakriyāvarṇanaṃ nāma paṃcatriṃśo.adhyāyaḥ || 35 |||9|||

|| gautama uvāca|| ||
kīdṛśaṃ sarpadaṣṭasya sarpiṇyāḥ kīdṛśaṃ bhavet ||
kumāradaṣṭaḥ kīdṛksyātsūtikādaṃśitasya ca || 1 ||
rūpaṃ napuṃsakeneha vyaṃtareṇa ca kīdṛśam ||
etadākhyāhi me sarvamebhirdaṣṭasya lakṣaṇam || 2 || ||
|| kaśyapa uvāca || ||
ataḥ paraṃ pravakṣyāmi nāgānāṃ rūpalakṣaṇam ||
sarpadaṣṭasya ca tathā samāsāddvijapuṃgava || 3 ||
atha sarpeṇa daṣṭasya ūrdhva dṛṣṭiḥ prajāyate ||
sarpīdaṣṭasya ca tathā adhodṛṣṭiḥ prajāyate || 4 ||
kanyādaṣṭasya vāmā syādṛṣṭirdvijavarottama ||
kumāreṇāpi daṣṭasya dakṣiṇā eva jāyate ||5||
garbhiṇyā vātha daṣṭasya tathā svedaśca jāyate ||
romāṃcaḥ sūtikāyāstu vepathuścāpi jāyate ||
napuṃsakena daṣṭasya aṃgamardaḥ prajāyate || ||6||
pannagyaḥ prabhavo rātrau divā sarpo viṣādhikaḥ||
napuṃsakastu saṃdhyāyāṃ kaśyapena tu bhāṣitam||7||
aṃdhakāre tu daṣṭo ya udake gahane vane ||
supto vā cetpramatto vā yadi sarpaṃ na paśyati ||
daṣṭarūpāṇyajānanvai kathaṃ vaidyacikitsitam||8||
caturvidhā iha proktāḥ pannagāstu mahātmanā ||
darvīkarā maṃḍalino rājilā vyaṃtarāstathā || 9 ||
darvīkarā vātaviṣā maṃḍalā paittikāḥ smṛtāḥ ||
śleṣmalā rājilrā jñeyā vyaṃtarāḥ sānnipātikāḥ || 1.36.10 ||
raktaṃ parīkṣayedeṣāṃ sarpāṇāṃ tu pṛthakpṛthak ||
kṛṣṇaṃ darvīkarāṇāṃ tu jāyate nālpamulbaṇam || 11 ||
raktaṃ ghanaṃ ca bahuśaḥ śoṇitaṃ maṃḍalī kṛtam ||
picchilaṃ rājile svalpaṃ tadvadvyaṃtarake tathā || 12 ||
sarpā jñeyāstu catvāraḥ paṃcamo nopalabhyate ||
brāhmaṇaḥ kṣatriyo vaiśyaḥ śūdra ścaiva caturthakaḥ || 13 ||
brāhmaṇe madhuraṃ dadyāttiktaṃ dadyāttathottare ||
vaiśye karṣaphalaṃ dadyācchūdre tristhūṇameva ca || 14 ||
brāhmaṇena tu daṣṭasya dāho gātreṣu jāyate ||
mūrcchā ca prabalā syādvai nātmānamabhijānate || 15 ||
śyāmavarṇaṃ mukhaṃ ca syānmajjāstaṃbhaśca jāyate ||
tasya kuryātpratīkāraṃ yena saṃpadyate sukham || 16 ||
aśvagaṃdhāpyapāmārgaḥ siṃduvāraṃ surāmayam ||
etatsarpiḥ samāyuktaṃ pāne nasye ca dāpayet ||
etenaivopacāreṇa sukhī bhavati mānavaḥ || 17 ||
kṣatriyeṇa tu daṣṭasya kaṃpo gātreṣu jāyate ||
mūrchā mohastathā syādvai nātmānamabhivetti saḥ || 18 ||
jāyate vedanā tasya ūrdhvaṃ caiva nirīkṣate ||
tasya kuryātpratīkāraṃ yena saṃpadyate sukham || 19 ||
arkamūlamapāmārgaṃ priyaṃgumindravāruṇīm ||
etatsarpiḥ samāyuktaṃ pānaṃ nasyaṃ ca dāpayet ||
etenaivopacāreṇa sukhī bhavati mānavaḥ || 1.36.20 ||
vaiśyenāpi hi daṣṭasya śṛṇu rūpāṇi yāni tu ||
śleṣmaprakopo lālā ca na codvahati cetanām || 21 ||
mūrchā ca prabalā yasya ātmānaṃ nābhinaṃdati ||
tasya kuryātpratīkāraṃ yena saṃpadyate sukham || 22 ||
aśvagaṃdhā sagomūtrā gṛha dhūmaṃ saguggulam ||
śirīṣārkapalāśena śvetā ca girikarṇikā || 23 ||
gomūtreṇa samāyuktaṃ pānaṃ nasyaṃ ca dāpayet ||
eṣa vaiśyena daṣṭānāmagadaḥ parikīrttitaḥ || 24 ||
śūdreṇāpi hi daṣṭasya śṛṇu tattvena gautama ||
kuthyate vepate caiva jvaraḥ śītaṃ ca jāyate || 25 ||
aṃgāni culuculāyaṃte śūdradaṣṭasya lakṣaṇam ||
tatrāgadaṃ pravakṣyāmi yena saṃpadyate sukham || 26 ||
padmaṃ ca lodhrakaṃ caiva kṣaudraṃ padmasya kesaram ||
madhūkasāraṃ madhu ca śvetāṃ ca girikarṇikām || 27 ||
etāni samabhāgāni peṣayecchītavāriṇā ||
pānalepāṃjanairnasyaiḥ sukhī bhavati mānavaḥ || 28 ||
pūrvāhṇe carate vipro madhyāhne kṣatriyaścaret ||
aparāhne caredvaiśyaḥ śūdraḥ saṃdhyācaro bhavet ||29||
āhāro vāyupuṣpāṇi brāhmaṇānāṃ vidurbudhāḥ ||
mūṣikā kṣatri yāṇāṃ ca āhāro dvijasattama ||
vaiśyā maṃḍūkabhakṣāśca śūdrāḥ sarvāśinastathā ||1.36.30||
agrato daśate vipraḥ kṣatriyo dakṣiṇena tu ||
vāmapārśve sadā vaiśyaḥ paścādvai śūdra ādaśet || 31 ||
madakāle tu saṃprāpte pīḍyamānā mahāviṣāḥ ||
avelāyāṃ daśaṃte vai maithunārtā bhujaṃgamāḥ || 32 ||
puṣpagaṃdhāḥ smṛtā viprāḥ kṣatriyāścaṃdanāvahāḥ ||
vaiśyāśca ghṛtagaṃdhā vai śūdrāḥ syurmatsyagaṃdhinaḥ || 33 ||
vāsaṃ teṣāṃ pravakṣyāmi yathāvadanupūrvaśaḥ ||
vāpīkūpataḍāgeṣu giriprasravaṇeṣu ca ||
vasaṃti brāhmaṇāḥ sarpā grāmadvāre catuṣpathe ||34||
ārāmeṣu pavitreṣu śuciṣvāyataneṣu ca ||
vasanti kṣatriyā nityaṃ toraṇeṣu saraḥsu ca ||35||
śmaśāne bhasmaśālāsu palāleṣu taṭeṣu ca ||
goṣṭheṣu pathi vṛkṣeṣu vipra vaiśyā vasaṃti ca ||36||
avivikteṣu sthāneṣu nirjaneṣu vaneṣu ca ||
śūnyāgāre śmaśāne ca śūdrā vipra vasaṃti ca || 37 ||
śvetāśca kapilāścaiva ye sarpāstvanalaprabhāḥ ||
manasvinaḥ sāttvikāśca brāhmaṇāste budhaiḥ smṛtāḥ ||38||
raktavarṇāḥ suvarṇābhāḥ pravālamaṇisaṃnibhāḥ ||
sūryaprabhāstathā vipra kṣatriyāste bhujaṃgamāḥ||39||
nānāvicitrarājībhiratasīvarṇasannibhāḥ||
bāṇa puṣpasavarṇābhā vaiśyāste vai bhujaṃgamāḥ || 1.36.40 ||
kākodaranibhāḥ kecidye ca aṃjanasannibhāḥ ||
kākavarṇā dhūmravarṇāste śūdrāḥ parikīrtitāḥ ||41||
yasya sarpeṇa daṣṭasya daṃśamaṃguṣṭhamaṃtaram ||
bāladaṣṭaṃ vijānīyātkaśyapasya vaco yathā|| 42 ||
yasya sarpeṇa daṣṭasya daṃśaṃ dvyaṃgulamaṃtaram ||
yauvanasthena daṣṭasya etadbhavati lakṣaṇam || 43 ||
yasya sarpeṇa daṣṭasya sārdhaṃ dvyaṃgulamaztaram ||
vṛddhadaṣṭaṃ vijānīyātkaśyapasya vaco yathā || 44 ||
anaṃtaḥ prekṣate pūrvaṃ vāmapārśve tu vāsukiḥ ||
takṣako dakṣiṇeneha karkoṭaḥ pṛṣṭhatastathā || 45 ||
calate bhramate padmo mahāpadmo nimajjati ||
visaṃjñastiṣṭhate caiva śaṃkhapālo muhurmuhuḥ || 46 ||
sarveṣāṃ kurute rūpaṃ kulikaḥ pannagottamaḥ ||
anaṃtasya diśā pūrvā vāsukestu hutāśanī ||47||
dakṣiṇā takṣakasyoktā karko ṭasya tu nairṛtī ||
paścimā padmanābhasya mahāpadmasya vāyujā ||
uttarā śaṃkhapālasya aiśānī kaṃbalasya tu||48||
anaṃtasya bhavetpadmaṃ vāsukeḥ syāttathotpalam ||
svastikaṃ takṣakasyoktaṃ karkoṭasya tu paṃkajam || 49 ||
padmasya tu bhavetpadmaṃ śūlaṃ padmetarasya tu ||
śaṃkhapāle bhavecchatraṃ kulikasyā rdhacandrakam || 1.36.50 ||
anaṃtakapilau viprau kṣatriyau śaṃkhavāsukī ||
mahāpadmastakṣakaśca vaiśyau vipra prakīrtitau ||
padmakarkoṭakau śūdrau sadā jñeyau manīṣibhiḥ || 51 ||
anaṃtakulikau varṇato brahmasaṃbhavau ||
vāsukiḥ śaṃkhapālaśca raktau hyagnisamudbhavau || 52 ||
takṣakaśca mahāpadma īṣatpītau babhū vatuḥ ||
padmakarkoṭakau vipra sarpau kṛṣṇau babhūvatuḥ || 53 ||
hayaṃ yānaṃ vṛṣaṃ chatraṃ rājānamatha pāvakam ||
dharaṇīmutpādya dhṛtānetānsiddhikarānviduḥ || ||54||
pūrṇakumbhaḥ pātākā ca kāṃcanaṃ maṇayastathā ||
śirīṣaṃ māṇikaṃ kaṇṭhe jīvajīveti suvrata ||
eteṣāṃ darśanaṃ śreṣṭhaṃ kanyā caikaprasūyikā ||55||
catuḥṣaṣṭiḥ samākhyātā bhogino ye tu pannagāḥ |
adṛśyāsteṣu ṣaṭtriṃśaddṛśyāstriṃśanmahīcarāḥ || 56 ||
viṃśacca sragviṇaḥ proktāḥ sapta maṃḍalinastathā |
rājīvanto daśa proktā darvyaḥ ṣoḍaśa paṃca ca || 57 ||
duṃdubho ḍuṃḍubhaścaiva ceṭabhaśceṃdravāhanaḥ ||
nāgapuṣpasavarṇākhyā nirviṣā ye ca pannagāḥ||
evameva tu sarpāṇāṃ śatadvinavati smṛtam ||58||
varāhakarṇīṃ gajapippalīṃ ca gāṃdhārikāṃ pippaladevadāru ||
madhūkasāraṃ sahasiṃduvāraṃ hiṃguṃ ca piṣṭvā guṭikā ca kāryā ||59||
|| sumaṃturuvāca || ||
ityuktavānpurā vīra gautamasya prajāpatiḥ||
lakṣaṇaṃ sarvaināgānāṃ rūpavarṇau viṣaṃ tathā || 1.36.60 ||
tasmātsaṃpūjayennāgānsadā bhaktyā samanvitaḥ ||
viśeṣatastu paṃcamyāṃ payasā pāyasena ca ||61||
śrāvaṇe māsi paṃcamyāṃ śuklapakṣe narā dhipa |
dvārasyobhayato lekhyā gomayena viṣolbaṇāḥ || 62 |
pūjayedvidhivaddvāraṃ dadhidūrvākṣataiḥ kuśaiḥ |
gaṃdhapuṣpopahāraiśca brāhmaṇānāṃ ca tarpaṇaiḥ|| 63||
ye tvasyāṃ pūjaṃtīha nāgānbhaktipuraḥsarāḥ||
na teṣāṃ sarvapato vīra bhayaṃ bhavati karhicit|64||
iti śrībhaviṣye mahāpurāṇe śatārddha sāhasryāṃ saṃhitāyāṃ brāhme parvaṇi pañcamīkalpe śrāvaṇikanāgapañcamīvratavarṇanaṃnāma ṣaṭtriṃśo.adhyāyaḥ || 36 || || cha ||
|| sumaṃturuvāca || ||
tathā bhādrapade māsi paṃcamyāṃ śraddhayānvitaḥ ||
athālekhya naro nāgānkṛṣṇavarṇādivarṇakaiḥ || 1 ||
pūjayedgaṃdhapuṣpaiśca sarpiḥ pāyasaguggulaiḥ ||
tasya tuṣṭiṃ samāyāṃti pannagāstakṣakādayaḥ||2||
āsaptamātkulāttasya na bhayaṃ nāgato bhavet||
tasmātsarvaprayatnena nāgānsaṃpūjayedbudhaḥ||3||
iti śrībhaviṣye mahāpurāṇe śatarddhasāhasryāṃ saṃhitāyāṃ brāhme parvaṇi paṃcamīkalpe bhādrapadikanāgapañcamīvratavarṇanaṃ nāma saptatriṃśodhyāyaḥ||37||
|| || sumaṃturuvāca || ||
tathā cāśvayuje māsi pañcamyāṃ kurunaṃdana ||
kṛtvā kuśamayānnāgāngaṃdhāṃdyaiḥ saṃprapūjayet || 1 ||
ghṛtodakābhyāṃ payasā snapayitvā viśāṃpate ||
godhūmaiḥ payasā svinnairbhakṣyaiśca vividhaistathā || 2 ||
yastvasyāṃ vidhivannāgāñchucirbhaktyā samanvitaḥ ||
pūjayetkuruśārdūla tasya śeṣādayo nṛpa ||3||
nāgāḥ prītā bhavaṃtīha śāṃtimāpnoti vā vibho ||
sa śāṃtilokamāsādya modate śāśvatīḥ samāḥ || 4 ||
ityeṣa kathito vīra pañcamīkalpa uttamaḥ |
yatrāyamucyate maṃtraḥ sarvasarpaniṣedhakaḥ || 9||
oṃ kurukulle phaṭ svāhā|||
iti śrībhaviṣye mahāpurāṇe śatārddhasāhasryāṃ  saṃhitāyāṃ brāhme parvaṇi paṃcamīkalpe samāptikathanaṃ nāmāṣṭatriṃśo.adhyāyaḥ ||38|| ||cha||
||sumaṃturuvāca|| ||
ṣaṣṭhyāṃ phalāśano rājanviśeṣātkārtike nṛpa ||
rājyacyuto viśeṣeṇa svaṃ rājyaṃ labhate.acirāt||1||
ṣaṣṭhī tithirmahārāja sarvadā sarvakāmadā||
upoṣyā tu prayatnena sarvakālaṃ jayārthinā | | 2
kārttikeyasya dayitā eṣā ṣaṣṭhī mahātithiḥ |
devasenādhipatyaṃ hi prāptaṃ tasyāṃ mahātmanā | | 3
asyāṃ hi śreyasā yukto yasmātskando bhavāgraṇīḥ |
tasmātṣaṣṭhyāṃ naktabhojī prāpnuyādīpsitaṃ sadā | | 4
dattvārghyaṃ kārtikeyāya sthitvā vai dakṣiṇāmukhaḥ |
dadhnā ghṛtodakaiḥ puṣpairmantreṇānena suvrata | | 5
saptarṣidāraja skanda svāhāpatisamudbhava |
rudrāryamāgnija vibho gaṅgāgarbha namo.astu te | |
prīyatāṃ devasenānīḥ sampādayatu hṛdgatam | | 6
dattvā viprāya cātmānnaṃ yaccānyadapi vidyate |
paścādbhuṅkte tvasau rātrau bhūmiṃ kṛtvā tu bhājanam | | 7
evaṃ ṣaṣṭhyāṃ vrataṃ snehātproktaṃ skandena yatnataḥ |
tannibodha mahārāja procyamānaṃ mayākhilam | | 8
ṣaṣṭhyāṃ yastu phalāhāro naktāhāro bhaviṣyati |
śuklākṛṣṇāsu niyato brahmacārī samāhitaḥ | | 9
tasya siddhiṃ dhṛtiṃ tuṣṭiṃ rājyamāyurnirāmayam |
pāratrikaṃ caihikaṃ ca dadyātskando na saṃśayaḥ | | 1.39.10
yo hi naktopavāsaḥ syātsa naktena vratī bhavet |
iha vāmutra so.atyantaṃ labhate khyātimuttamām | |
svarge ca niyataṃ vāsaṃ labhate nātra saṃśayaḥ | | 11
iha cāgatya kālānte yathoktaphalabhāgbhavet |
devānāmapi vandyo.asau rājñāṃ rājā bhaviṣyati | | 12
yaścāpi śṛṇuyātkalpaṃ ṣaṣṭhyāḥ kurukulodvaha |
tasya siddhistathā tuṣṭirdhṛtiḥ syātkhyātisambhavā | | 13
iti śrībhaviṣye mahāpurāṇe śatārdhasāhasryāṃ saṃhitāyāṃ brāhme parvaṇi
ṣaṣṭhīkalpavarṇanaṃ nāma ekonacatvāriṃśo.adhyāyaḥ | 39 |
atha catvāriṃśo.adhyāyaḥ
kārtikeyavarṇanam
śatānīka uvāca
aho vrataṃ mahatkaṣṭaṃ saṃśayo hṛdi vartate |
kārtikeyasya māhātmyaṃ śrutvā janma tathā dvija | | 1
anekajanitasyeha kārttikeyasya suvrata |
māhātmyaṃ sumahadvipra kathametadvibhāvyate | | 2
jātiḥ śreṣṭhā bhavedvīra uta karma bhavedvaram |
saṃśayastu mahānatra dṛṣṭvā me kṛttikāsutam | | 3
etadvada viniścitya na yathā saṃśayo bhavet |
janmataḥ karmaṇaścaiva yajjvāyastad bravīhi me | | 4
sumanturuvāca
imamarthaṃ purā pṛṣṭo brahmā śiṣyairmanīṣibhiḥ |
yaduktaṃ tena teṣāṃ ca tatte vacmi nibodha me | | 5
surajyeṣṭhaṃ sukhāsīnamabhigamya maharṣayaḥ |
praṇamya ca mahābāho viśvāmitrasya vipratām | | 6
dṛṣṭvā vismayamāgatya kautūhalasamanvitāḥ |
bhaktiṃ śraddhāṃ purodhāya praṇamyānatakandharāḥ | | 7
ṛṣaya ūcuḥ
bho brahmannādakalpe hi brāhmaṇyaṃ brūhi kiṃ bhavet | jātyadhyayanadehātmasaṃskārācārakarmaṇām | | 8
bāhyābhyantarasāmānyaviśeṣā yadi kṛtrimāḥ |
manovākkarmaśārīrajātidravyaguṇātmakāḥ | | 9
santyaktavyāḥ prasiddhā ye jātibhedavidhāyinaḥ |
vastubhūtāḥ parokṣairvā pramāṇairna viniścitāḥ | | 1.40.10
avyaktāgamasiddhaścejjātibhedavidhirnṛṇām |
vikalpo.ayaṃ na puṣṇāti bhavataḥ śemuṣībalam | | 11
brahmovāca
evametanna sandeho yathā yūyaṃ vadanti ha |
śṛṇudhvaṃ yogino vākyaṃ satarkaṃ śiṣyaśreyase | | 12
yogeśvara uvāca
pramāṇe hi prasiddhe tu bhinnārthaviṣaye yataḥ |
spaṣṭayogyārthaviṣayaṃ pratyakṣaṃ tāvadīkṣate | | 13
samānyātīndriyagrāhī siddhānto.abhyupagamyate |
sa eva bhagavānekaṃ pramāṇamiti cenna tat | | 14
yasmādvividhame tatte saṅkaṭaṃ bhadra vartate |
vedasya pauruṣeyatvaṃ nityajātisamarthakam | | 15
kāryā viśeṣā vedoktā na yuktamakṛtaṃ vacaḥ |
tālvādikaraṇānāṃ ca vyāpārānantaraṃ śruteḥ | | 16
vyāpārātparatastasya prāgabhāvaviśeṣataḥ |
tadbhāvānuvidhāyitvamanvayavyatiraketaḥ | | 17
tasmāddhūmāgnivadvārthaphalabhāvo.avatiṣṭhate |
na ca vyāpāravacasoranyathānupapattitaḥ | | 18
puruṣānugatā jātirbrāhmaṇatvādikāsti cet |
dvivarṇajātibhedena pratyākṣārthopalakṣaṇāt | | 19
govargamadhyaṃ ca gato yathāśvo nirdhāryate jñaiḥ suvicakṣaṇatvāt |
manuṣyabhāvādaviśiṣyamāṇastadvaddvijaḥ śūdragaṇānna bhinnaḥ | | 1.40.20
manuṣyajāterna paro viśeṣo yaḥ kalpyate sarvanarānuyāyī |
saṃskārayuktā hi kriyāviśiṣṭā dvijanmanāṃ śūdravivekahetuḥ | | 21
jīvo.api brāhmaṇaḥ prokto yairatattvajñamānavaiḥ |
prabhraṣṭabrāhmaṇatvāste jāyante viprasaṅgataḥ | | 22
jarājanmāntarakleśaduṣṭagrāhakulākulam |
nara tiryagasacchūdra yoniduḥkhormisaṃkaṭam || 23
dausthityarogaśokārtijanāvartasamanvitam |
śvānuśūkaracāṇḍālakṛmikūrmādikāyakam | | 24
saṃsārasāgaraṃ ghoraṃ magnaḥ khalu pariplavan |
