bhūripāpabharākrāntaḥ sa jīvo brāhmaṇaḥ katham | | 25
brahmovāca
saptavyādhakathā viprā manunā parikīrtitāḥ |
taṃ niśamya yaduśreṣṭha nityaṃ jātipadaṃ tyajet | | 26
saptavyādhā daśārṇeṣu mṛgāḥ kālañjare girau |
cakravākāḥ sariddvīpe haṃsāḥ sarasi mānase | | 27
te.api jātāḥ kurukṣetre brāhmaṇā vedapāragāḥ|
prasthitā dīrghamadhvānaṃ mṛyaṃ kimavasīdatha | | 28
tasmānna jīve brāhmaṇyaṃ paśyāmo hi kathañcana | | 29
śastrādimadbhārgavajātiyukto gajāśvagojoṣṭrakharādikānām |
śaktyā kṛto hyaṅgajavarṇadharmairbhedaḥ sphuṭaṃ lakṣaṇato.atra yadvat | | 1.40.30
taduttarānnaiva vikartanīyā brāhmaṇyajātinṛṣu nāsti kācit |
nityākṛtirnānupabhedarūpā yathā hi bhedaḥ paramo.atra sidhyet | |
sitādyasādhāraṇatulyarūpāḥ sanātano.aṅgeṣu na varṇabhedaḥ | | 31
brāhmaṇyamadhruvamidaṃ kila kṛtrimatvādakṛtrimaṃ bhavati sāmayikatvayogāt |
sāṅketikaṃ sukṛtaleśaviśeṣalabdhaṃ vāṇijyabheṣajakṛtāmiva jātibhedāḥ | | 32
kiṃ brāhmaṇā ye sukṛtaṃ tyajanti kiṃ kṣatriyā lokamapālayantaḥ .|
svadharmahīnā hi tathaiva vaiśyāḥ śūdrāḥ svamukhyakriyayā vihīnāḥ | | 33
tasmānna gośvavatkaścijjātibhedo.asti dehinām |
kāryaśaktinimittastu saṅketaḥ kṛtrimo bhavet | | 34
evaṃ pramāṇaiḥ pratiṣidhyamānāṃ sāṅketikīṃ yāti naro vyavasthām |
svakīyasiddhāṃ svamatairniṣiddhāṃ na budhyate mūḍhamanā varākaḥ | | 35
gomahiṣyajavājyuṣṭravāneyāvigajādhipāḥ |
preṣyavārdhuṣikākāryakaraṇodyatamānasāḥ | | 36
vaṇikkārukriyāviṣṭā divyāste.api ca ye dvijāḥ |
vinaṣṭāste tu vijñeyāḥ kravyādāśca kuśīlavāḥ | | 37
palāṇḍulaśunādāśca mṛgyuṣṭrīkṣīrapāyinaḥ |
māṃsasarvarasakṣīrakrayavikrayakāriṇaḥ | | 38
punarbhūvṛṣalīveśyācāṇḍālastrīniṣeviṇaḥ |
śūdrānnarasapuṣṭāṅgāḥ pretavastrānnabhojanāḥ | | 39
mṛtasūtakalabdhānnapānādyabhyavahāriṇaḥ |
brahmadevapitṛbhūtamanuṣyeṣu bahiṣkṛtāḥ | |1.40.40
mātsaryamadavidveṣatṛṣṇākāmatamomayāḥ |
hīnācārā hi ye kecidapare piśunā dvijāḥ | |
prakārairbahubhiḥ sarve te praṇaśyanti nānyathā | |4 1
evaṃ śāstroditanyāyamārgabhraṣṭāstu ye narāḥ |
viśiṣṭagotrasaṃskārakalāpasakalātmakāḥ | |4 2
vedānadhyāpayanto.api te.adhīyānāḥ śrutikramāt |
brāhmaṇatvādvihīyante durācāravighāyinaḥ | |4 3
tasmānna jātirekatra bhūtātmāstyanapāyinī |
nāśitvādatra ca ślokānmānavāḥ samadhīyate | |4.
sadyaḥ patati māṃsena lākṣayā lavaṇena ca |
tryaheṇa śūdro bhavati brāhmaṇaḥ kṣīravikayī | |45
gorakṣakānvāṇijikāṃstathā kārukuśīlavān |
preṣyānvārdhuṣikāṃścaiva śūdrāstānmanurabravīt | |46
śūdro brāhmaṇatāmeti brāhmaṇaścaiti śūdratām |
kṣatriyo yāti vipratvaṃ vidyādvaiśyaṃ tathaiva ca | |47
iti śrī bhaviṣye mahāpurāṇa śatārddhasāhasryāṃ saṃhitāyāṃ brāhme parvaṇi ṣaṣṭhīkalpe
kārtikeyavarṇane jātivarṇanaṃ nāma catvāriṃśo.adhyāyaḥ |4 0 |

athaikacatvāriṃśo.adhyāyaḥ
brāhmaṇavivekavarṇanam
brahmovāca
vedādhyayanamapyetadbrāhmaṇyaṃ pratipadyate |
vipravadvaiśyarājanyau rākṣasā rāvaṇādayaḥ | | 1
śvādacāṇḍāladāsāśca lubdhakābhīradhīvarāḥ |
yenye.api vṛṣalāḥ kecitte.api vedānadhīyate | | 2
yadā deśāntaraṃ gatvā brāhmaṇyaṃ kṣatriyaṃ śritāḥ |
vyāpārākārabhāvādyairvipratulyaiḥ prakalpitaiḥ | | 3
vedānadhītya vedau vā vedaṃ vāpi yathākramam |
prodvahanti śubhāṃ kanyāṃ śuddhabrāhmaṇajā narāḥ | |4
athavādhītya vedāṃstu kṣatravaiśyaistu vā narāḥ |
gauḍapūrvāṃ kṛtāmeyurjātiṃ vā dākṣiṇātyajām | | 5
aparijñātaśūdratvādbrāhmaṇyaṃ yānti kāmataḥ |
tasmānna jñāyate bhedo vedādhyāyakriyākṛtaḥ | | 6
śāstrakāraistathā coktaṃ nyāyamārgānusāribhiḥ |
te sādhu matamākarṇya santaḥ santi vimatsarāḥ | | 7
ācārahīnānna punaṃti vedā yadyapyadhītāḥ saha ṣadbhiraṅgaiḥ |
śilpaṃ hi vedādhyayanaṃ dvijānāṃ vṛttaṃ smṛtaṃ brāhmaṇalakṣaṇaṃ tu | | 8
adhītya caturo vedānyadi vṛtte na tiṣṭhati |
na tena kriyate kāryaṃ strīratneneva ṣaṇḍhakaḥ | | 9
śikhāpraṇavasaṃskārasandhyopāsanamekhalāḥ |
daṇḍājinapavitrādyāḥ śūdreṣvapi niraṅkuśāḥ | | 1.41.10
prasaṅgo.api hi śūdrāṇāṃ na śakyo vinivāritum |
devottamatrayeṇāpi nivartante narāḥ svayam | | 11
tasmānnaite.api lakṣyante vilakṣaṇatayā nṛṇām |
yajñopavītasaṃskāramekhalācūlikādayaḥ | | 12
ābhicārikamantrādyairdurlabhatvādibhāṣaṇaiḥ |
brāhmaṇasyaiva śaktiścetkenāsya vinihanyate | | 13
tapaḥ satyādimāhātmyāddevatāsamayasmṛtiḥ |
mantraśaktirnṛṇāmeṣāṃ sarveṣāmapi vidyate | | 14
vañcanaṃ durvacasyāpi kriyate sarvamānavaiḥ |
śūdrabrāhmaṇayostasmānnāsti bhedaḥ kathañcana | | 15
śāpānugrahakāritvaṃ śaktibhedo na vidyate |
cauracāṭādirājanyadurjanābhihate nṛṇām | | 16
ātmāduḥkhodayāpāyaṃ sveṣu jantuṣu rakṣaṇam |
kartuṃ na prabhavecchūdro brāhmaṇastadvadeva hi | | 17
mā bhūdyuge kalāvetaddeśe cākāryakṛddvije |
syādanyadeśakālādau dvijānāmatiśāyinām | | 18
śāpānugrahasāmarthyamanyadvādhyātmagocaram |
brahmasādhanametaddhi liṅgaṃ kecitpracakṣate | | 19
saṃsārāraktacetaskā mohāndhatamasāvṛtāḥ |
patantyunmārgagarteṣu pratyagni śalabhā yathā | | 1.41.20
jātidharmaḥ svayaṃ kiñjidviśeṣaḥ śrutisaṅgamāt |
asiddhaḥ śūdrajātīnāṃ prasiddho viprajātiṣu | | 21
saṃskāro yonisādhyo vā sāmagrī prabhavo.atha vā |
śūdrebhyo.atiśayaṃ dhatte yaḥ sādhāraṇatāguṇaḥ | | 22
viprāṇāṃ pañcadhā bhedaḥ kalpanīyastu paṇḍitaiḥ |
na jātijastrayījo vā viśeṣo yuktibādhakāt | |
kramākramakriyāḥ santi na sanātanavastunaḥ | | 23
nityo na heturvigatakriyatvāddheturbhavedvedaviśeṣataḥ saḥ |
sa tatsamastatpratisannidhānātkālātyayekṣitvamayuktameva | | 24
svāntaḥ śarīravṛttisthaḥ śrutiyogādudeti yaḥ |
so.ananyavedavijñātasvabhāvo.anyairna gamyate | 25
viśiṣṭādhītidharmatve kṛtrimā brahmasaṅgatiḥ |
yasyāsyatiśayastasya nānyo nāśrayate yadi | | 26
dṛśyasvabhāvaṃ kimabhīṣṭametadbrāhmaṇyamāhosvidadṛṣṭarūpam |
sarvaiḥ pratīyeta hi dṛśyarūpaṃ tato.anyathāvadgatireva na syāt | | 27
sāmagryabhāvātparamaṃ viśeṣaṃ bhūdevagātrasthamabhūmidevāḥ |
smaranti tenātmani puṇyapāpaṃ yathā tathetyetadayuktamuktam | | 28
sāmagryanuṣṭhānaguṇaiḥ samagrāḥ śūdrā yataḥ santi samā dvijānām |
tasmādviśeṣo dvijaśūdranāmnornādhyātmiko bāhyanimittako vā | | 29
saṃskārataḥ so.atiśayo yadi syātsarvasya puṃso.astyatisaṃskṛtasya |
yaḥ saṃskṛto vipragaṇapradhāno vyāsādikaistena na tasya sāmyam | | 1.41.30
hetutvaṃ ghaṭate naiṣāṃ jātyādīnāmasambhavāt |
jāterakṛtakatvācca adhīte na viśeṣataḥ | | 31
saṃskārātiśayābhāvādantarasyāgate paraiḥ |
bhautikatvāccharīrasya samastānāmasaṃhataiḥ | | 32
kiṃ cānyanāstikamleccha yavanādijaneṣvalam | | 33
vedoditabahirduṣṭacariteṣu durātmasu |
dharmādatiśayo dṛṣṭaḥ krūrasāhasikādiṣu | |
tasmādvipreṣu jātyādisāmagrīprabhavo na saḥ | | 34
tasmānna ca vibhedo.asti na bahirnāntarātmani |
sukhādau na caiśvarye nājñāyāṃ nābhayeṣvapi | |3 5
na vīrye nākṛtau nākṣe na vyāpāre na cāyuṣi |
nāṅge puṣṭe na daurbalye na sthairye nāpi cāpale | | 36
na prajñāyāṃ na vairāgye na dharme na parākrame |
na trivarge na naipuṇye na rūpādau na bheṣaje | | 37
na strīgarbhe na gamane na dehamalasamplave |
nāsthirandhre na ca premṇi na pramāṇeṣu lomasu | | 38
śūdrabrāhmaṇyorbhedo mṛgyamāṇo.api yatnataḥ |
nekṣyate sarvadharmeṣu saṃhataistridaśairapi | | 39
uktamātrā visambhūtirvicārakramakāribhiḥ |
vṛddhavṛndārakādhīśairapradhṛṣyamidaṃ vacaḥ | | 1.41.40
na brāhmaṇāścandramarīciśubhrā na kṣatriyāḥ kiṃśukapuṣpavarṇāḥ |
na ceha vaiśyā haritālatulyāḥ śūdrā na cāṅgārasamānavarṇāḥ | | 41
pādapracāraistanuvarṇakeśaiḥ sukhena duḥkhena ca śoṇitena |
tvaṅmāṃsamedosthirasaiḥ samānāścatuṣprabhedā hi kathaṃ bhavanti ||42
varṇapramāṇākṛtigarbhavāsavāgbuddhikarmendriyajīviteṣu |
balatrivargāmayabheṣajeṣu na vidyate jātikṛto viśeṣaḥ ||43
sa eka evātra patiḥ prajānāṃ kathaṃ punarjātikṛtaḥ prabhedaḥ |
pramāṇadṛṣṭāntanayapravādaiḥ parīkṣyamāṇo vighaṭatvameti ||44
catvāra ekasya pituḥ sutāśca teṣāṃ sutānāṃ khalu jātirekā |
evaṃ prajānāṃ hi pitaika evaṃ pitraikabhāvānna ca jātibhedaḥ ||45
phalānyathodumbaravṛkṣajāteryathāgramadhyāntabhavāni yāni |
varṇākṛtisparśarasaiḥ samāni tathaikato jātiratipracintyā ||46
ye kauśikāḥ kāśyapagautamāśca kauṃḍinyamāṇḍavyavaśiṣṭhagotrāḥ |
ātreyakautsāṅgirasaḥ sagargā maudgalyakātyāyanabhārgavāśca ||47
gotrāṇi nānāvidhajātayaśca bhrātṛsnuṣāmaithunaputrabhāvāḥ |
vaivāhikaṃ karma na varṇabhedaḥ sarvāṇi śilpāni bhavanti teṣām ||48
ye cānye paṇḍitāḥ prāhurdehabrāhmaṇatāṃ narāḥ |
teṣāṃ durdṛṣṭitimiramapanīyānukampya ca ||49
nyāyāñjanauṣadhairdivyaiḥ pariṇāmasukhāvahaiḥ |
upanītaḥ prayatnena sudṛṣṭiṃ saṃvidadmahe ||1.41.50
mṛtimattvācca nāśitvaṃ nāśitvāccheṣabhūtavat |
dehādhāraniviṣṭānāṃ brāhmaṇyaṃ na prakalpyate | |5 1
ekaikovayavasteṣāṃ na brāhmaṇyaṃ samaśnute |
na cānekasamūhe.api sarvathātiprasaṅgataḥ | |52
pṛthivyudakavāyyagnipariṇāmaviśeṣataḥ |
dehataḥ sarvabhūtānāṃ brāhmaṇatvaprasaṅgataḥ | |53
dehasya brāhmaṇatvaṃ yairatattvajñaiḥ prakalpyate |
saṃskartṛrṇāṃ śarīrasya teṣāṃ na brahmatā bhavet | |54
mṛgyamāṇe prayatnena dehe tannopalabhyate |
tasmānna dehe brāhmaṇyaṃ nāpi dehātmakaṃ bhavet | |55
varṇāpasadacāṃḍālaśvādādīnāṃ prasajyate |
yadi dehasya vipratvaṃ bhavadbhirupagamyate | |56
dehaśaktiguṇaiḥ kṣīṇaiḥ kāyabhasmādirūpavat |
tasmāddehātmakenaitadbrāhmaṇyaṃ nāpi karmajam | | 57
iti śrībhaviṣye mahāpurāṇe śatārdhasāhasryāṃ saṃhitāyāṃ brāhme parvaṇi ṣaṣṭhīkalpe
brāhmaṇyavivekavarṇanaṃ nāmaikacatvāriṃśo.adhyāyaḥ |4 1 |
atha dvācatvāriṃśo.adhyāyaḥ
brāhmaṇasaṃskāravivekavarṇanam
brahmovāca
aparaiśca sadācārayogayuktairmanīṣibhiḥ |
yadakāri mahāsattvaiḥ subhāṣitamidaṃ śṛṇu | | 1
bahuvanaspatiśaṅkhapipīlikābhramaravāraṇajātimudāharan|
gatiṣu karmamito naṭavatsadā bhramati janturalabdhasudarśanaḥ | | 2
rūpaiśvaryajñānakulairvibhavairvarmito bhūtvā dharmapathaṃ cedvijahāsi |
na vakṣye vrajanbhuvanāni tvamaṭiṣyaṃstasmādabhibhasmībhūte mada ātmanaḥ | | 3
jātikularūpavayovarṇānekaśrutamadāndhāḥ klībāḥ |
paratra ceha ca hitamapyarthaṃ na paśyanti | |4
jñātvā bhavaparivarte jātīnāṃ koṭiśatasahasreṣu |
hīnottamamadhyatvaṃ ko jātimadaṃ budhaḥ kuryāt | | 5
naikāñjātiviśeṣānindriyanivṛttipūrvakānsarvān |
karmavaśādgacchatyatra kasyaikā śāśvatī jātiḥ | | 6
vidvatsadasi yo.apyāha saṃskārādbrāhmaṇo bhavan |
nyāyajñaiḥ sa nirākāryo vākyairnyāyānusāribhiḥ | | 7
garbhādhānaṃ puṃsavanaṃ sīmantonnayanaṃ tathā |
jātakarma nāmakarma tathānnaprāśanaṃ ca vai | | 8
cūḍopanayanaṃ cāsya vratādeśastathaiva ca |
samāvartanamapyanyatpāṇigrahaṇameva ca | | 9
ityevamādisaṃskāravidhānairye.atisaṃskṛtāḥ |
ta eva brāhmaṇā yeṣāṃ nairantaryeṇa kāmanāḥ | | 1.42.10
yasmādvai brāhmaṇā jātā brāhmaṇaiḥ kṛtasaṃskṛtaiḥ |
nāyuḥ śaktirhi kāntyādiviśeṣo vidyate sphuṭaḥ | | 11
tau vā brāhmaṇagātrotthau saṃskṛtāsaṃskṛtau narau |
iṣṭāniṣṭāptyanāptibhyāṃ na bhidyete parasparam | | 12
jñānādhyayanamīmāṃsā niyamendriyanigrahaiḥ |
vinā saṃskārayoge.api puṃsaḥ śūdrānna bhinnatā | | 13
saṃskāraḥ kriyamāṇaśca na śūdre ca pravartate |
saṃskṛtāṅgaśca pāpebhyo na paśyati nivartate | | 14
vilāsinībhujaṃgādijanavanmadavihvalāḥ |
vyāmuhyanti sadācārādbrāhmaṇatvātpatanti ca | | 15
saṃskṛto.api durācāro narakaṃ yāti mānavaḥ |
niḥsaṃskāraḥ sadācāro bhavedviprottamaḥ sadā | | 16
mantrapūtātmasaṃskārayukto.api plavate na tu |
brāhmaṇyādavikalpaṃ sa paścādduścarito naraḥ | | 17
sāmarthyātpatanaṃ tasmādbrāhmaṇyānmucyate dhruvam |
duranuṣṭhānasaktānāṃ puṃsāṃ puruṣapuṅgavaiḥ | | 18
kiṃ kvaciddṛṣṭamevaitatkiṃ vā spardhāvidatyayam |
tulyamutsahase kartumapyadṛṣṭaṃ tadā vada | | 19
ācāramanuṣṭhinto vyāsādimunisattamāḥ |
garbhādhānādisaṃskārakalāparahitāḥ sphuṭam | | 1.42.20
viprottamāḥ śriyaṃ prāptāḥ sarvalokanamaskṛtāḥ |
bahavaḥ kathyamānā ye katicittānnibodhata | | 21
jāto vyāsastu kaivartyāḥ śvapākyāśca parāśaraḥ |
śukyāḥ śukaḥ kaṇādākhyastatholūkyāḥ suto.abhavat | | 22
mṛgījotharṣaśṛṅgopi vaśiṣṭho gaṇikātmajaḥ |
mandapālo muniśreṣṭho nāvikāpatyamucyate | | 23
māṇḍavyo munirājastu maṇḍūkīgarbhasambhavaḥ |
bahavo.anye.api vipratvaṃ prāptā ye pūrvavaddvijāḥ | | 24
yaccaitaccārucaritairarcyamuccaritaṃ vacaḥ |
tadvicāryācarannuccairācāropacitadyutiḥ | | 25
hariṇīgarbhasambhūta ṛṣyaśṛṅgo mahāmuniḥ |
tapasā brāhmaṇo jātaḥ saṃskārastena kāraṇam | | 26
śvapākīgarbhasambhūtaḥ pitā vyāsasya pārthiva |
tapasā brāhmaṇo jātaḥ saṃskārastena kāraṇam | | 27
ulūkīgarbhasambhūtaḥ kaṇādākhyo mahāmuniḥ |
tapasā brāhmaṇo jātaḥ saṃskārastena kāraṇam | | 28
gaṇikāgarbhasambhūto vaśiṣṭhaśca mahāmuniḥ |
tapasā brāhmaṇo jātaḥ saṃskārastena kāraṇam | | 29
nāvikāgarbhasambhūto mandapālo mahāmuniḥ |
tapasā brāhmaṇo jātaḥ saṃskārastena kāraṇam | | 1.42.30
vedatantrajasaṃskārakalāpanipuṇairapi |
vidyātapodhanabalādutkṛṣṭaṃ labhyate phalam | 31
labdhasaṃskāradehāśca mahāpātakino narāḥ |
yasmānnivartate brahma tasmātsāṅketikaṃ viduḥ | | 32
iti śrībhaviṣye mahāpurāṇe śatārdhasāhasryāṃ saṃhitāyāṃ brāhme parvaṇi
ṣaṣṭhīkalpe brāhmaṇasaṃskāravivekavarṇanaṃ nāma dvācatvāriṃśo.adhyāyaḥ | 42 |
atha tricatvāriṃśo.adhyāyaḥ
varṇavyavasthāvarṇanam
brahmovāca
kiṃ cānyadaparaṃ yūyaṃ vedamantravido janāḥ |
praṣṭavyāḥ kasya saṃskāre viśeṣamupagacchata | | 1
kiṃ dehasyota yenāsau nisargamalinaḥ sthitaḥ |
śukraśoṇitasambhūtaḥ śamalodbhavakīṭavat | | 2
niṣekādiśmaśānāntairvividhairvidhivistaraiḥ |
dehino.atiśayaṃ kecidupagacchanti mānavāḥ | | 3
teṣāṃ gūḍhamanaḥ kāyavāgviduṣṭaiḥ suceṣṭitaiḥ |
asaṃyatamanuṣyāṇāṃ pakṣo.ayaṃ dūṣyate mayā | | 4
vaidikākhilasaṃskārasārabhūtā dvijātayaḥ |
sarvakāryakarānsarvānvṛṣalānatiśerate | | 5
caṇḍakarmā vikarmastho brahmahā gurutalpagaḥ |
steno goghnaḥ surāpāṇaḥ parastrīramaṇapriyaḥ | | 6
mithyāvādī madonmatto nāstiko vedanindakaḥ |
grāmayājakanirgranthau bahudoṣo durāsadaḥ | | 7
niṣiddhācārasaṃsevī coraścāṭo madoddhataḥ |
dhūrto naṭaḥ śaṭhaḥ pāpī sarvāśī sarvavikrayī | | 8
vāṅmanaḥ kāyajairduṣṭairhatā ye brāhmaṇādhamāḥ |
te na śuddhiṃ vrajantīha api yajñaśatairapi | | 9
śūdrāṇāṃ yānyaniṣṭāni sampadyante svabhāvataḥ |
viprāṇāmapi tānyeva nirvighnāni bhavanti na | | 1.43.10
tasmānmantrognihotraṃ vā vedyāṃ paśuvadho.api vā |
hetavo na hi vipratve śūdraiḥ śakyā kriyā yathā | | 11
ye cāpi karmabandhena baddhāḥ sīdanti jantavaḥ |
saṃsārānalasantāpaviklavīkṛtamānasāḥ | | 12
te janmamaraṇāṭavyāṃ sukhāmṛtapipāsavaḥ |
kṛpaṇasyāśraye.aṭanto labhante naiva nirvṛtim | | 13
caturvarṇā narā ye tu tattadvīrye narādhamāḥ |
teṣāṃ sarvātmanā sarvairdharmaiḥ sāṅkaryamīkṣyate || 14
śūdraviprādayo yonau na bhidyante parasparam |
sarvadharmasamānatvātsaṃskārādi nirarthakam || 15
tadanuṣṭhānavaidharmyaviyogamaraṇādibhiḥ |
asevyasevanairanyaiḥ śūdraviprādayaḥ samāḥ || 16
buddhyā śaktyā svabhāvena dharmairjātyādibhiḥ śriyā |
kartavyaiḥ puṇyapāpābhyāṃ śanaiḥ sarvaśarīragaiḥ || 17
bandhanai rodhanairnānāyātanopāyapīḍanaiḥ |
daṇḍairadaṇḍakaraṇairviṣādaparivedanaiḥ || 18
sāttvikaḥ pratidharmādyai rājasaiścitraveṣṭitaiḥ |
tāmasaistāpamohādyairdūyamānāḥ punaḥ punaḥ || 19
śleśmamārutapittādyairmahābībhatsadarśanaiḥ |
kvacidvṛttinivṛttibhyāmamṛtānṛtahitāhitaiḥ ||1.43.20
alaṅkāropayogena manmathādyairviceṣṭitaiḥ |
dhanalābhāśayānaikajantusaṅghātapātanaiḥ ||2 1
adhisiddhigatiṃ yāti nānāvidhamanorathaiḥ |
ātmasnehaparadveṣasvīkṛtadravarakṣaṇaiḥ ||22
atikṣībatvasaṃkṣobhakṣutakṣāmakṣamāmayaiḥ |
yātanopāyapaiśunyaśūnyatvopaśamaistathā ||23
apraśastairanuṣṭhānaiḥ samīpasthāpadaḥ samāḥ |
hiṃsakāḥ prāṇinaḥ pāpavitathālāpabhāṣiṇaḥ ||24
sādhūnāṃbhāṣakāḥ stenā nirdayāḥ pāradārikāḥ |
nīcakarmasamācārāḥ sarvabhakṣāḥ piśācavat ||25
duṣkulīnā durācārā nṛpāṇāmupajīvinaḥ |
viprakāryā vikarmasthā dhanino duṣṭacetasaḥ ||26
lubdhakā hariṇānhatvā vāsaṃ kṛtvā yathā vane |
tathā khādanti piśunā bahavaśca kriyāvaśāt ||27
vedavādamadhīyānāḥ prāṇighātābhiśaṃsinaḥ |
puṣṇanti kapaṭairarthānvedavikrayiṇo.adhamāḥ | | 28
māyino matsaragrastā lubdhā mugdhā madoddhatāḥ |
cāṭāḥ kārpaṭikāḥ kūrāḥ kadaryāḥ kalahapriyāḥ | | 29
vācāṭaduṣṭakulaṭā aṭanto bhāṭakaiḥ saha |
bhaṇḍamānyā bhaṭāṭopaiḥ saṃkruddhāḥ suviluṇṭhakāḥ | | 1.43.30
paryaṭā bhāṭakā jīvāḥ kaṇṭhakaślokabhāṣiṇaḥ |
vikrīṇate hyavikreyamabhakṣyadravyabhakṣiṇaḥ | | 31
śūdrakarmānutiṣṭhanto nistapāste narādhamāḥ | sevādhyāpanavāṇijyakṛṣyādyārambhalambhitāḥ | |
gṛhṇantaḥ sampado bāhayāddravyadhānyadhanādikāḥ | | 32
krodhādābhyantarāndoṣāṃstathā duṣṭamanorathān |
atyajanto viśiṣṭānāṃ śreṣṭhāste kacamardinaḥ | | 33
nopadeyāni vastrāṇi nityamādadate dvijāḥ |
hāpayanti na heyāni kathaṃ te guravaḥ kṣitau | | 34
dantikā diṇḍikā bhaṇḍāścaṇḍāścaṇḍālaceṣṭitā |
vaitaṇḍakāste nighnanti yathā siṃho mṛgānpaśūn | | 35
nirgranthaṃ munimālokya manyamānāḥ samunnatam |
paribhūyāvatiṣṭhante dhiktānriktānsavairiṇaḥ | | 36
tasmātsaṃsārikāḥ sattvāścittakleśakalaṅkitāḥ | dauḥśīlyadaurmanasyādyaistulyajātīyabandhanāt | | 37
śūdrāṃ prarocate vipro rāgiṇīṃ maithunaṃ prati |
sā kāmaduḥkhavigame garbhaṃ dhatte samāgame ||38
kāmakāmāturābhyastu rocante śūdramānavāḥ |
maithunaṃ prati brāhmaṇye te.api tāsāṃ sukhāvahāḥ ||39
ye tu jātyādibhirbhinnā gavāśvoṣṭmataṅgajāḥ |
te vijātiṣu no garbhaṃ kurvate.api sukhārthinaḥ ||1.43.40
anaḍvāneva goreva kāmaṃ puṣṇāti saṅgame |
ghoṭakāśca ratiṃ samyakkurvate vaḍavāsu ca ||41
patiṃ karabhamevāpya karabhī ramate mudā |
gajameva patiṃ labdhvā sukhaṃ tiṣṭhati hastinī ||42
tiryagjātiḥ striyā sākaṃ kurvāṇā.api hi maithunam |
na tasyāḥ kurute garbhaṃ naro nāpi sukhāsikām ||43
tiraścā saha kurvāṇā maithunaṃ manujāṅganā |
nādhatte tatkṛtaṃ garbhaṃ na yuktaṃ maithunaṃ tayoḥ ||44
naivaṃ kaścidvibhāgosti maithune strīmanuṣyayoḥ |
yena saṃkṣīyate bhedaḥ prasphuṭaṃ dvijaśūdrayoḥ ||45
vedapāṭhacchalenāyaṃ na kriyābhiḥ prapadyate |
bahubhirjaḍasaṅghātairaviśiṣṭe pade.ahani ||46
dehe dehini cāmuṣminnaśucāvanavasthite |
rāgadveṣādibhirdoṣairadhikaṃ paripīḍite ||47
kulālacakravadbhrāntamānase viṣayārṇave |
ghoraduḥkhabhayākrānte samāje.anīśvarātmani ||48
janmamṛtyujarāśokāniṣṭayogāgnipīḍite |
hīnasattvaśarīrādau na viśeṣo vibhāvyate ||49
tasmānmanuṣyabhedo.ayaṃ saṅketabalanirmitaḥ |
brāhmaṇyaṃ brāhmaṇāsaṅgādbrāhmaṇī copasevate ||1.43.50
patiṃ tyaktvā mukhasvādalālasairmadalālasaiḥ |
āsevyate viṭaṃ gatvā bandhakī ceṭakairapi | | 51
brāhmaṇyātpracyavante.anye mahāpātakasevitāḥ |
vyalīkakalpanaivaiṣā tasmājjātyādikalpanā | | 52
iti śrībhaviṣye mahāpurāṇe śatārddhasāhasryāṃ saṃhitāyāṃ brāhme parvaṇi ṣaṣṭhīkalpe
varṇavyavasthāvarṇanaṃ nāma tricatvāriṃśo.adhyāyaḥ | 43 |
atha catuścatvāriṃśo.adhyāyaḥ
varṇavibhāgavivekavarṇanam
brahmovāca
heyopādeyatattvajñāstyaktānyāyapathāgamāḥ |
jitendriyamanovācaḥ sadācāraparāyaṇāḥ | | 1
niyamācāravṛttasthā hitānveṣaṇatatparāḥ |
saṃsārarakṣaṇopāyakriyāyuktamanorathāḥ | | 2
samyagdarśanasampannāḥ samādhisthā hatakrudhaḥ |
svādhyāyabhaktahṛdayāstyaktasaṅgā vimatsarāḥ | | 3
viśokā vimadāḥ śāntā sarvaprāṇihitaiṣiṇaḥ |
sukhaduḥkhasamālokā viviktasthānavāsinaḥ | | 4
vratopayuktasarvāṅgā dhārmikāḥ pāpabhīravaḥ |
nirmamā nirahaṅkārā dānaśūrā dayāparāḥ | | 5
satyabrahmavidaḥ śāntā sarvaśāstreṣu niṣṭhitāḥ |
sarvalokahitopāyapravṛttena svayaṃbhuvā | | 6
vāgīśvareṇa devena nābheyena bhavacchidā |
brahmaṇā kṛtamaryādāsta evaṃ brāhmaṇāḥ smṛtāḥ | | 7
mahātapodhanairāryaiḥ sarvasattvābhayapradaiḥ |
sarvalokahitārthāya nipuṇaṃ supratiṣṭhitam | | 8
vṛhattvādbhagavānbrahmā nābheyastasya ye janāḥ |
bhaktyāsaktāḥ prapannāśca brāhmaṇāste prakīrtitāḥ | | 9
kṣatriyāstu kṣatatrāṇādvaiśyā vārtāpraveśanāt |
ye tu śruterdrutiṃ prāptāḥ śūdrāsteneha kīrtitāḥ | | 1.44.10
ye cācāraratāḥ prāhurbrāhmaṇyaṃ brahmavādinaḥ |
te tu phalaṃ praśaṃsanti yatsadā manasepsitam | | 11
kṣamā damo dayā dānaṃ satyaṃ śaucaṃ dhṛtirghṛṇā |
mārdavārjavasantoṣānahaṅkāratapaḥśamāḥ. | | 12
dharmo jñānamapaiśunyaṃ brahmacaryamamūḍhatā |
dhyānamāstikyamadveṣo vairāgyaṃ ca śamātmatā | | 13
pāpabhīrutvamasteyamamātsaryamatṛṣṇatā |
naiḥsaṅgyaṃ guruśuśrūṣā manovākkāya saṃyamaḥ | | 14
ya evambhūtamācāramanutiṣṭhanti mānavāḥ |
brāhmaṇyaṃ puṣkalaṃ teṣāṃ nityameva pravardhate | | 15
te svamatāsvādalabdhavarṇācārā mahaujasaḥ |
sarvaśāstrāvirodhena pavitrīkṛtamānasāḥ | | 16
sajjanābhimatāḥ prājñāḥ purāṇāgamapaṇḍitāḥ |
gītagītāgamācārāḥ smṛtikārāḥ paṭhanti ca | | 17
manvantareṣu sarveṣu caturyugavibhāgaśaḥ |
varṇāśramācārakṛtaṃ karma siddhyatyanuttamam | | 18
saṃsiddhāyāṃ tu vārtāyāṃ tatasteṣāṃ svayaṃ prabhuḥ |
maryādāṃ sthāpayāmāsa yathārabdhaṃ parasparam | | 19
ye vai parigṛhītārasteṣāṃ sattvabalādhikāḥ |
itareṣāṃ kṣatatrāṇānsthāpayāmāsa kṣatriyān | | 1.44.20
upatiṣṭhanti ye tānvai yācanto narmadāḥ sadā |
satyabrahma sadābhūtaṃ vadanto brāhmaṇāstu te | | 21
ye cānyepyabalāsteṣāṃ vaiśyakarmaṇi saṃsthitāḥ |
kīlāni nāśayanti sma pṛthivyāṃ prāgatandritāḥ | |
vaiśyāneva tu tānāha kīnāśānvṛttimāśritān | | 22
śocantaśva dravantaśca paricaryāsu ye narāḥ |
nistejaso.alpavīryāśca śūdrāṃstānabravīttu saḥ | | 23
brāhmaṇakṣatriyaviśāṃ śūdrāṇāṃ ca parasparam |
karmāṇi pravibhaktāni syabhāvaprabhavairguṇaiḥ | | 24
śamastapo damaḥ śaucaṃ kṣāṃtirārjavameva ca |
jñānaṃ vijñānamāstikyaṃ brahmakarma svabhāvajam | | 25
śauryaṃ tejo dhṛtirdākṣyaṃ yuddhe cāpyapalāyanam |
dānamīśvarabhāvaśca kṣātraṃ karma svabhāvajam | | 26
kṛṣigorakṣavāṇijyaṃ vaiśyakarma svabhāvajam |
paricaryātmakaṃ karma śūdrasyāpi svabhāvajam | | 27
yogastapo dayā dānaṃ satyaṃ dharmaśrutirghṛṇā |
jñānaṃ vijñānamāstikyametadbrāhmaṇalakṣaṇam | | 28
śikhā jñānamayī yasya pavitraṃ ca tapomayam |
brāhmaṇyaṃ puṣkalaṃ tasya manuḥ svāyambhuvo.abravīt | | 29
yatra vā tatra vā varṇe uttamādhamamadhyamāḥ |
nivṛttaḥ pāpakarmebhyo brāhmaṇaḥ sa vidhīyate | | 1.44.30
śūdro.api śīlasampanno brāhmaṇādadhiko bhavet |

brāhmaṇo vigatācāraḥ śūdrāddhīnataro bhavet | | 31
na surāṃ sandhayedyastu āpaṇeṣu gṛheṣu ca |
na vikrīṇāti ca tathā sacchūdro hi sa ucyate | | 32
yadyekā sphuṭameva jātiraparā kṛtyātparaṃ bhedinī |
yadvā vyāhṛtirekatāmadhigatā yaccānyadharmaṃ yayau | |
ekaikākhilabhāvabhedanidhanotpattisthitivyāpinī |
kiṃ nāsau pratipattigocarapathaṃ yāyādvibhaktyā nṛṇām | | 33
śrī bhaviṣye mahāpurāṇe śatārddhasāhasryāṃ saṃhitāyāṃ brāhme parvaṇi ṣaṣṭhīkalpe
varṇavibhāgavivekavarṇanaṃ nāma catuścatvāriṃśo.adhyāyaḥ | 44 |
atha pañcacatvāriṃśo.adhyāyaḥ
kārtikeyavarṇanam
brahmovāca
idaṃ śruṇu mayākhyātaṃ tarkapūrvamidaṃ vacaḥ |
yuṣmākaṃ saṃśaye jāte kṛte vai jātikarmaṇoḥ | | 1

punarvacmi nibodhadhvaṃ samāsānna tu vistarāt |
saṃsiddhiṃ yānti manujā jātikarmasamuccayāt | | 2

siddhiṃ gacchedyathā kāryaṃ daivakarmasamuccayāt |
evaṃ saṃsiddhimāyāti puruṣo jātikarmaṇoḥ | | 3

ityevamuktavānpūrvaṃ śiṣyāṇāṃ bodhane purā |
yogīśvaro mahātejāḥ samāsānna tu vistarāt | | 4

sumanturuvāca

iti pṛṣṭaḥ purā brahmā ṛṣīnprovāca bhārata |
savitarkamidaṃ vākyaṃ viprarṣe jātikarmaṇoḥ | | 5
tasmāttvayā mahābāho na kāryo vismayo nṛpa |
kārtikeyaṃ prati sadā devānāṃ durvidā gatiḥ | | 6

iti śrībhaviṣye mahāpurāṇe śatārdhasāhahasryāṃ saṃhitāyāṃ brāhme parvaṇi ṣaṣṭhīkalpe
kārtikeyavarṇanaṃ nāma pañcacatvāriṃśo.adhyāyaḥ | 45 |
atha ṣaṭcatvāriṃśo.adhyāyaḥ
brahmaparvavarṇanam
sumanturuvāca
yeyaṃ bhādrapade māsi ṣaṣṭhī ca bharatarṣabha |
supuṇyeyaṃ pāpaharā śivā śāntā guhapriyā | | 1

snānadānādikaṃ sarvaṃ yasyāmakṣayyamucyate |
ye.asyāṃ paśyanti gāṅgeyaṃ dakṣiṇāpathamāśritam | | 2

brahmahatyādibhiḥ pāpairmucyante nātra saṃśayaḥ |
tasmādasyāṃ sadā paśyetkārttikeyaṃ nṛpottama | | 3

pūjayanti guhaṃ ye.asyāṃ narā bhaktisamanvitāḥ |
prāpyeha te sukhānkāmāngacchantīndrasalokatām | | 4

yastu kārayate veśma sudṛḍhaṃ supratiṣṭhitam |
dārvaṃ śailamayaṃ cāpi bhaktayā śraddhāsamanvitaḥ | |
gāṅgeyaṃ yānamāruhya gacchedgāṅgeyasadma vai | | 5

sammārjanādi yaḥ karma kuryādguhagṛhe naraḥ |
dhvajasyāropaṇaṃ rājansa gacchedrudrasadma vai | | 6

candanāgarukarpūrairyaśca pūjayate guham |
gajāśvarathayānāḍhyaṃ saināpatyamavāpnute | | 7
rājñāṃ pūjyaḥ sadā proktaḥ kārtikeyo mahīpate |
kārttikeyamṛte nānyaṃ rājñāṃ pūjyaṃ pracakṣate | | 8

saṅgrāmaṃ gacchamāno yaḥ pūjayetkṛttikāsutam |
sa śatruṃ jayate vīra yathendro dānavānraṇe | | 9

tasmātsarvaprayatnena pūjayecchaṅkārātmajam |
pūjamānastu taṃ bhaktyā campakairvividhairnṛpa | |
mucyate sarvapāpebhyastadā gacchecchivālayam | | 1.46.10

tailaṃ ṣaṣṭhyāṃ na bhuñjīta na divā kurunandana |
yastu ṣaṣṭhyāṃ naro naktaṃ kuryāddhi bharatarṣabha | |
sarvapāpaiḥ sa nirmukto gāṅgeyasya sado vrajet | | 11

trikṛtvo dakṣiṇāmāśāṃ gatvā yaḥ śraddhayānvitaḥ |
pūjayeddevadeveśaṃ sa gacchecchāntimandiram | | 12

iti śrībhaviṣye mahāpurāṇe śatārddhasāhasryāṃ saṃhitāyāṃ ṣaṣṭhīkalpe kārttikeyamāhātmayavarṇanaṃ nāma ṣaṭcatvāriṃśo.adhyāyaḥ | 46 | |
iti ṣaṣṭhī kalpaḥ samāptaḥ |
atha saptacatvāriṃśo.adhyāyaḥ
śākasaptamīvratavarṇanam
sumanturuvāca
saptamyāṃ sopavāsastu naktāhāro.api vā bhavet |
saptamyāṃ devadevena labdhaṃ svaṃ rūpamādarāt | | 1
aṇḍena saha jāto vai aṇḍastho buddhimāptavān |
aṇḍasthasyaiva dakṣeṇa bhāryāṃ dattvā svakāṃ sutām || 2
nāmnā rūpeti rūpeṇa nānyā nārī tathā 1 bhavet |
aṇḍastha eva suciraṃ sthito mārtaṇḍa ityataḥ | | 3
dakṣājñayā viśvakarmā vapurasya prakāśayan |
prakāśatastato nāma tasya jātaṃ narādhipa | |
aṇḍasthasyaiva sañjāto yamunā yama eva ca | |4
dākṣāyaṇī tasya bhāryā vairāgyāttanumadhyamā |
cintayāmāsa sā devī duḥkhānnirvedamāgatā | | 5
aho tejomayaṃ rūpaṃ kāntaṃ kāntasya kāntimat |
na cāsya kiñcitpaśyāmi aṅgaṃ tejovimohitam | | 6
śubhaṃ kanakatulyaṃ me rūpaṃ kāntaṃ sukāntimat |
sāmprataṃ śyāmatāṃ yātaṃ dagdhametasya tejasā | | 7
tasmāttapsye tapaścāhaṃ gatvā vai uttarānkurūn |
svāṃ chāyāmatra nikṣipya bhayācchāpasya rūpiṇī | | 8
nikṣipyovāca tāṃ bālāṃ mā cāsmai vai vadiṣyasi |
evaṃ sā niścayaṃ kṛtvā gatā vai uttarānkurūn | | 9
svarūpaṃ tatra nikṣipya vaḍavārūpadhāriṇī |
cacāra sā mṛgaiḥ sārdhaṃ bahūnvarṣagaṇānnṛpa | | 1.47.10
asāvapi ca mārtaṇḍaśchāyāṃ bhāryāmamanyat |
śaniṃ ca tapatīṃ caiva dve apatye ca jajñivān | | 11
atha cchāyātmāpatyāni snehena paripālayet |
nātisnehena cāpaśyadyamunāṃ yamameva ca | | 12
atha tābhyāṃ vivādo.abhūdādityaduhitrordvayoḥ |
te ubhe vivadantyau tu parasparamasammatam | |
yamunā tapatī cobhe nimnage sambabhūvatuḥ | | 13
yamo.api yamunābhrātā chāyayā tāḍito bhṛśam |
pādamudyamya tasyā vai tasthau sammukha eva saḥ | | 14
chāyā śaśāpa taṃ roṣādyasmātpādodyato mama|
tasmātte karma bībhatsaṃ prāṇināṃ prāṇahiṃsanam | | 15
bhaviṣyati ciraṃ mūḍha ācandrārkaṃ na saṃśayaḥ |
pādaṃ ca yadi bhūmau tvamimaṃ saṃsthāpayiṣyasi | | 16
kṛmayo bhakṣayiṣyanti macchāpakaluṣīkṛtam | | 17
teṣāṃ vivadamānānāṃ mārtaṇḍo.abhyāgamattataḥ |
yamo.apyāha mahātmānaṃ mārtaṇḍaṃ lokapāvanam | | 18
tāta nityamiyaṃ cāpi krūrabhāvena paśyati |
na cāsyāḥ susamā dṛṣṭirasmāsvastīti lakṣyate | | 19
provācātha sa tāṃ chāyāṃ mārtaṇḍo bhṛśakopanaḥ |
same apatye kiṃ mūḍhe samatvaṃ nānupaśyasi | | 1.47.20
yamaḥ provāca pitaraṃ neyaṃ mātā pitarmama |
mātuśchāyā tviyaṃ pāpā śapto.ahamanayā pitaḥ | |
yamunā tapatī vṛttaṃ tatsarvaṃ vinyavedayat | | 21
atha provāca mārtaṇḍo mā te pādo mahītale |
māṃsaṃ rudhiramādāya kṛmayo yāntu bhūtalam | | 22
yamunāyāśca yattoyaṃ gaṅgātulyaṃ bhaviṣyati |
narmadāyāstapatyāśca samaṃ puṇyena vai dvija | | 23
vindhyasya dakṣiṇeneha tapatī pravahiṣyati |
tatsāyujyatayā sāgraṃ gaṅgā yāsyati śobhanā | | 24
gaṅgāmāsādya yamunā gaṅgā saiva bhaviṣyati |
saurasaumye ubhe puṇye sarvapāpapraṇāśane | | 25
saurī ca vaiṣṇavī cobhe mahāpāpabhayāpahe |
tvaṃ putra lokapālatvaṃ brahmaṇo.ajñāṃ sabhājayan | |
adyaprabhṛti cchāyeyaṃ svadehasthā bhaviṣyati | | 26
evaṃ saṃsthāpya svāṃ bhāryāmapatyāni tathaiva ca |
ājagāma sakāśaṃ vai dakṣasyāha ca kāraṇam | |
dakṣo vijñāya tatsarvaṃ mārtaṇḍamidamāha vai | | 27
rūpaṃ na paśyatī tubhyaṃ sā bhāryā uttarāngatā | | 28
rūpaṃ te prakaṭiṣyāmi yadi śakṣyasi vedanām |
asau provāca śakṣye.ahaṃ prakāśī kuru me vapuḥ | | 29
atha sasmāra takṣāṇaṃ smṛta evājagāma saḥ |
provāca dakṣastakṣāṇaṃ mārtaṇḍaṃ vai prakāśaya | | 1.47.30
takṣā provāca mārtaṇḍaṃ vedanā visahiṣyase |
visahiṣyetha provāca takṣāṇaṃ dakṣacoditaḥ | | 31
atha takṣā prakāśaṃ vai tasya rūpaṃ vibhāvasau |
mukhādārabhya pādāntaṃ tatakṣakaraṇaiḥ svakaiḥ | |
kiraṇaistudyamāneṣu tasyāṅgeṣu punaḥ punaḥ |
kṣaṇekṣaṇe mūrchayati mārtaṇḍo vedanāturaḥ | | 32
tasya śāpabhayāttakṣā pādau gulphādiyāvataḥ |
cakārātho nirākārā aṅgulyo na prakāśayat | | 33
paryāptaṃ takṣakarmedaṃ vedanā mama bādhate |
takṣā provāca mārtaṇḍaṃ vedanāṃ jahi gopate | | 34
karavīrasya puṣpāṇi raktacandanameva ca |
karādārabhya gātrāṇi vilimpe dehajāni te | | 35
tattatkṛtaṃ tathā tena sa rujaṃ tyaktavānraviḥ |
ataścemāni ceṣṭāni mārtaṇḍasyeha bhūpate | | 36
karavīrasya puṣpāṇi tathā vai raktacandanam |
idamāha purā devo hyanūroragrato nṛpa | | 37
karavīrasya puṣpāṇi raktacandanameva hi |
itihāsapurāṇābhyāṃ suparṇaguggulaṃ tathā | | 38
yaḥ prayacchati me bhaktyā sa me prāṇānprayacchati |
tasmānna deyamanyanme bhaktiyuktena jānatā | | 39
mārtaṇḍasyāṇḍajaṃ tejo gṛhītvā kila bhārata |
cakāra vajramajaraṃ 1 śatrulekhādināśanam | | 1.47.40
mārtaṇḍaḥ parituṣṭo.abhūllabdhvā rūpaṃ gatavyathaḥ |
jagāma sa kurūnvegātsvabhāryādarśanotsukaḥ | | 41
mṛgamadhyagatāṃ dṛṣṭvā vaḍavārūpadhāriṇīm |
aśvarūpaṃ tataḥ kṛtvā svabhāryāmadhiruhya saḥ | |
avāsṛjatsvakaṃ tejo vegenāruhya so.aśvavat | |4 2
parapuruṣāśaṅkayā sā sthitā devasya saṃmukhī |
tejo nāsāpuṭābhyāṃ tu yugapatsākṣipatpunaḥ | |4 3
tatra jātau devabhiṣajau nāsatyāvaśvināviti |
retaso.ante tu revanto virocanasuto mahān | | 44
tapatī śaniśca sāvarṇiśchāyāpatyāni vai viduḥ |
yamunā yamaśca pūrvoktau saṃjñā 2 yāśca tathātmajau | | 45
bhāryā labdhā vapurdivyaṃ tathā putrāśca bhārata |
saptamyāṃ devadevasya sarvamevamidaṃ yataḥ | |
anena kāraṇeneṣṭā sadā devasya saptamī | | 46
saptamyāṃ sopavāsastu rātrau bhuñjīta yo naraḥ |
kṛtvopavāsaṃ ṣaṣṭhyāṃ tu pañcamyāmekakālabhuk | | 47
dattvā susaṃskṛtaṃ śākaṃ bhakṣyabhojyaiḥ samanvitam |
devāya brāhmaṇebhyaśca rātrau bhuñjīta vāgyataḥ | | 48
yāvajjīvaṃ naraḥ kaścidvratametaccarediti |
tasya śrīrvijayaścaiva trivargaścāpi vardhate | | 49
mṛtaśca svargamāyāti 1 vimānavaramāsthitaḥ |
sūryaloke sa ramate manvantaragaṇānbahūn | |
iha cāgatya kālānte nṛpaḥ śānti samanvitaḥ | | 1.47.50
putrapautraiḥ parivṛto dātā syānnṛpatiściram |
bhunakti hi dharāṃ rājanvigrahaiścājitaḥ parai | | 51
ye narā rājaśārdūla śākāhāreṇa saptamīm |
upoṣya labdhaṃ tattīrthaṃ pitryaṃ vai rājasaṃjñikam | | 52
kuruṇā tava pūrveṇa śākāhāreṇa saptamīm |
dharmakṣetraṃ kurukṣetraṃ kṛtaṃ tasya vivasvatā | | 53
saptamī navamī ṣaṣṭhī tṛtīyā pañcamī nṛpa |
kāmadāstithayo hyetā ihaiva narayoṣitām | | 54
saptamī māghamāse tu navamyāśvayuje matā |
ṣaṣṭhī bhādrapade dhanyā vaiśākhe tu tṛtīyikā | | 55
puṇyā bhādrapade proktā pañcamī nāgapañcamī |
ityetāsteṣu māseṣu viśeṣāstithayaḥ smṛtāḥ | | 56
śākaṃ susatkṛtaṃ kṛtvā yaśca bhaktyā samanvitaḥ |
dattvā vipre yathāśaktyā paścādbhuṅkte niśi vratī | | 57
kārtike śuklapakṣasya grāhyeyaṃ kurunandana |
catubhirvāpi māsaistu pāraṇaṃ prathamaṃ smṛtam | | 58
agastyakusumaiścātra pūjā kāryā vibhāvasoḥ |
vilepanaṃ kuṅkumaṃ tu dhūpaścaivāparājitaiḥ | | 59
snānaṃ ca pañcagavyena tameva prāśayettataḥ |
naivedyaṃ pāyasaṃ cātra devadevasya kīrtitam | | 1.47.60
tadeva deyaṃ viprāṇāṃ śākaṃ bhakṣyamathātmanā |
śubhaśākasamāyuktaṃ bhakṣyapeyasamanvitam | | 61
dvitīye pāraṇe rājañchubhagandhāni yāni vai |
puṣpāṇi tāni devasya tathā śvetaṃ ca candanam | | 62
aguruścāpi dhūpo.atra naivedyaṃ guḍapūpakāḥ |
snānaṃ kuśodakenātra prāśanaṃ gomayasya tu | | 63
tṛtīye karavīrāṇi tathā raktaṃ ca candanam |
dhūpānāṃ guggulaścātra priyo devasya sarvadā | | 64
śālyodanaṃ tu naivedyaṃ dadhimiśraṃ mahāmate |
tameva brāhmaṇānāṃ ca bhakṣyalehyasamanvitam | |
kālaśākena ca vibho yuktaṃ dadyādvicakṣaṇaḥ | | 65
gaurasarṣapakalkena snānaṃ cātra vidurbudhāḥ |
tasyaiva prāśanaṃ dhanyaṃ sarvapāpaharaṃ śubham | | 66
tṛtīye pāraṇasyānte mahadbrāhmaṇabhojanam |
śravaṇaṃ ca purāṇasya vācanaṃ cāpi śasyate | | 67
daivasya puratastāta brāhmaṇānāṃ tathāgrataḥ |
brāhmaṇādvācakācchrāvyaṃ nānyavarṇasamudbhavāt | |
atha tānbrāhmaṇānsarvānbhaktyā śaktyā ca pūjayet | | 68
vācakasyāmale rājanvāsasī sannivedayet |
vācake pūjite devaḥ sadā tuṣyati bhāskaraḥ | | 69
karavīraṃ yatheṣṭaṃ tu tathā raktaṃ ca candanam |
yatheṣṭaṃ guggulaṃ tasya yatheṣṭaṃ pāyasaṃ sadā | | 1.47.70
yatheṣṭā modakāstasya yathā vai tāmrabhājanam |
yatheṣṭaṃ ca ghṛtaṃ tasya yatheṣṭo vācakaḥ sadā | |
purāṇaṃ ca yatheṣṭaṃ vai savituḥ kurunandana | | 71
ityeṣā saptamī puṇyā śākāhvā gopateḥ sadā |
yāmupoṣya naro bhaktyā bhāgyavāṃśca prajāyate | | 72
iti śrībhaviṣye mahāpurāṇe śatārddhasāhasryāṃ saṃhitāyāṃ brāhme parvaṇi saptamīkalpe
śākasaptamīvratavarṇanaṃnāma saptacatvāriṃśo.adhyāyaḥ | 47 |
athāṣṭacatvāriṃśo.adhyāyaḥ
ādityamāhātmyavarṇanam
śatānīka uvāca
vistarādvada viprendra saptamīkalpamuttamam |
mahābhāgyaṃ ca devasya bhāskarasya mahātmanaḥ | | 1
sumanturuvāca
atraivāhurmahātmānaḥ samvādaṃ puṇyamuttamam |
kṛṣṇena saha sattvena svaputreṇa mahīpate | | 2
bhaktayā praṇamya vidhivadvāsudevaṃ jagadgurum |
ihāmutra hitaṃ śāṃbaḥ papraccha jñānamuttamam | | 3
jāto jantuḥ kathaṃ duḥkhairjanmanīha na bādhyate |
prāpnoti vividhānkāmānkathaṃ ca madhusūdana | | 4
paratra svargamāpnoti sukhāni vividhāni ca |
anubhūyocitaṃ kālaṃ kathaṃ muktimavāpnute | | 5
dṛṣṭvaivaṃ mama nirvedo jāto vyādhirjanārdana |
dṛṣṭvemaṃ jīvitāśāpi rocate na hi me kṣaṇam | | 6
kiṃ tvevamakṛtārtho.asmi yanme prāṇā na yānti hi |
saṃsāre na patiṣyāmi jarāvyādhisamanvite | | 7
yenopāyena tanme.adya prasādaṃ kuru suvrata |
ādhivyādhivinirmukto yathāhaṃ syāṃ tathā vada | | 8
vāsudeva uvāca
devatāyāḥ prasādo.anyaḥ sarvasya paramo mataḥ |
upāyaḥ śāśvato nitya iti me niścitā matiḥ | | 9
anumānāgamādyaiśca samyagutpāditā mayā |
kadācidanyathā kartuṃ dhīyate kenacitkvacit | | 1.48.10
prasādo jāyate tasya samyagārādhanakriyā |
yadā tāṃ ca samuddiśya kṛtā tadvedinā tathā | | 11
viśiṣṭā devatā samyagviśiṣṭenaiva dehinā |
ārādhitā viśiṣṭaṃ ca dadāti phalamīhitam | | 12
śāmba uvāca
astitve na ca sandehaḥ keṣāñciddevatāṃ prati |
nāstīti niścayo.anyeṣāṃ viśiṣṭāstvaṃ kathāḥ kuruḥ | | 13
vāsudeva uvāca
siddhaṃ tu devatāstitvamāgameṣu bahuṣvatha |
pramāṇamāgamo yasya tasyāstitvaṃ ca vidyate | | 14
anumānena vāpyadya tadastitvaṃ prasādhyate |
pramāṇamasti yasyedaṃ siddhā yasyeha cāstitā | | 15
pratyakṣeṇāpi cāstitvaṃ devatāyāṃ prasādhyate |
taccāvaśyaṃ pramāṇaṃ ca dṛṣṭaṃ sarvaśarīriṇām | | 16
yadi nāmā viviktāstu tiryagyonigatā api |
notpadyate tathā hyasti vyavahāro yathā sthitaḥ | | 17
śāmba uvāca
pratyekṣeṇopalabhyante samyagvai yadi devatāḥ |
anumānāgamābhyāṃ ca tadarthaṃ ṇa prayojanam | | 18
vāsudeva uvāca
pratyakṣeṇopalabhyante na sarvā devatāḥ kvacit |
anumānāgamairgamyāḥ santi cānyāḥ sahasraśaḥ | |19
śāmba uvāca
yā cākṣagocarā kācidviśiṣṭeṣṭaphalapradā |
tāmevādau mamācakṣva kathayiṣyasyathāparām | | 1.48.20
vāsudeva uvāca
pratyakṣaṃ devatā sūryo jagaccakṣurdivākaraḥ |
tasmādabhyadhikā kāciddevatā nāsti śāśvatī | | 21
yasmādidaṃ jagajjātaṃ layaṃ yāsyati yatra ca |
kṛtādilakṣaṇaḥ kālaḥ smṛtaḥ sākṣāddivākaraḥ | | 22
grahanakṣatrayogāśca rāśayaḥ 1 karaṇāni ca |
ādityā vasavo rudrā aśvinau vāyavo.analaḥ | | 23
śakraḥ prajāpatiḥ sarve bhūrbhuvaḥsvastathaiva ca |
lokāḥ sarve nagā nāgāḥ saritaḥ sāgarāstathā | |
bhūtagrāmasya sarvasya svayaṃ heturdivākaraḥ | | 24
asyecchayā jagatsarvamutpannaṃ sacarācaram |
sthitaṃ pravartate caiva svārthe cānupravartate | | 25
prasādādasya loko.ayaṃ ceṣṭamānaḥ pradṛśyate |
asminnabhyudite sarvamudedastamite sati | |
astaṃ yātītyadṛśyena kimetatkathyate mayā | |2 6
tasmādataḥ paraṃ nāsti na bhūtaṃ na bhaviṣyati |
yo vai vedeṣu sarveṣu paramātmeti gīyate | | 27
itihāsapurāṇeṣu antarātmeti gīyate |
bāhyātmaiti suṣumṇāsthaḥ svapnastho jāgrataḥ sthitaḥ | | 28
astaṃ yātītyadṛṣṭena kimetatkathyate mayā |
tasmādataḥ paraṃ nāsti na bhūtaṃ na bhaviṣyati | | 29
yanna vāha iti khyātaḥ prerakaḥ sarvadehinām |
nānena rahitaṃ kiñcidbhūtamasti carācaram | | 1.48.30
yo vedairvedavidbhiśca vistareṇeha śakyate |
vaktuṃ varṣaśatairnāsau śakyaḥ saṃkṣepato mayā | | 31
tasmādguṇākaraḥ khyātaḥ sarvatrāyaṃ divākaraḥ |
sarveśaḥ sarvakartāyaṃ sarvabhartāyamavyayaḥ | | 32
jātā matsyādayaḥ samyaggatimanto maheśvarāt |
maṇḍalavyatiriktaṃ ca jānāmi paramārthataḥ | | 33
tathāsya maṇḍalaṃ kṛtvā yo hyenamupatiṣṭhate |
prātaḥ sāyaṃ ca madhyāhne sa yāti paramāṃ gatim | | 34
kiṃ punarmaṇḍalasthaṃ yo japate paramārthataḥ |
vividhāḥ siddhayastasya bhavanti na tadadbhutam | | 35
maṇḍale ca sthitaṃ devaṃ dehe cainaṃ vyavasthitam |
svabuddhyaivamasammūḍho ya- paśyati sa paśyati | | 36
dhyātvaivaṃ 1 pūjayedyastu japedyo juhuyācca yaḥ |
sa sarvānprāpnuyātkāmāngaccheddharmadhvajaṃ tathā | | 37
tasmāttvamiha duḥkhānāmantaṃ kartuṃ yadīcchasi |
ihāmutra ca bhogānāṃ bhuktiṃ muktiṃ ca śāśvatīm | | 38
ārādhayārkamarkastho mantrairiha tadātmani |
aṅgairvṛtaṃ vṛte caiva sthāne śāstreṇa śodhite | | 39
kavacena ca saṅguste sarvato.astreṇa rakṣite |
evaṃ prāpsyasi yatnena sarvadā phalamīpsitam | | 1.48.40
duḥkhamādhyātmikaṃ neha tathā caivādhibhautikam |
ādhidaivikamatyugraṃ na bhaviṣyati te sadā | | 41
na bhayaṃ vidyate teṣāṃ prapannā ye divākaram |
ihāmutra sukhaṃ teṣāmacchidraṃ jāyate sukham | | 42
sūryeṇedaṃ mamoddiṣṭaṃ sākṣādyajjñānamuttamam |
ārādhitena vidhivatkālena bahunā tathā | | 43
prāpyate paramaṃ sthānaṃ yatra dharmadhvajaḥ sthitaḥ |
etatsaṃkṣiptamuddiṣṭaṃ kṣiprasiddhikaraṃ param | |
yathā nānyadato.astīti svayaṃ tūryeṇa bhāṣitam | | 44
upāyo.ayaṃ samākhyātastava saṃkṣepatastviha |
yasmātparataro nāsti hitopāyaḥ śarīriṇām | | 45
iti śrībhaviṣye mahāpurāṇe śatārddhasāhasryāṃ saṃhitāyāṃ brāhme parvaṇi saptamīkalpe
ādityamāhātmyavarṇanaṃ nāmāṣṭacatvāriṃśo.adhyāyaḥ | 48 |
athaikonapañcāśattamo.adhyāyaḥ
sūryamāhātmyavarṇanam
vāsudeva uvāca
athārcanavidhiṃ vakṣye dharmaketoranuttamam |
sarvakāmapradaṃ puṇyaṃ vighnaghnaṃ duritāpaham | | 1
sūryamantraiḥ puraḥ snāto yajettenaiva bhāskaram |
yatastataḥ pravakṣyāmi snānamādau samāsataḥ | | 2
ācāntastamupālabhya mudrayā śuciśuddhayā |
kṛtvā nīrājanaṃ putra saṃśodhya ca jalaṃ tataḥ | | 3
snānāddhṛdayapūtena 1 mantreṇa matkulodvaha |
utthāyācamya tenaiva vāsasī paridhāya ca | | 4
dvirācamyātha samprokṣya tanuṃ saptākṣareṇa ca |
utthāyācamya tenaivaṃ raveḥ kṛtvārghyameva ca | | 5
dattvā tena japitvā taṃ svakaṃ dhyātvārkavaddhṛdi |
gatvā cāyatanaṃ śubhramārkamārkī tanuṃ yajet | | 6
pūrakaṃ kumbhakaṃ kṛtvā recakaṃ ca samāhitaḥ |
kṛtvoṅkāreṇa doṣāṃstu hanyātkāyādisambhavān | | 7
vāyavyāgneyamāhendravāruṇībhiryathākramam |
kilviṣaṃ vāruṇādbhiśca hanyātsiddhyarthamātmanaḥ | | 8
śoṣaṇaṃ dahanaṃ stambhaṃ plāvanaṃ ca yathākramāt |
vāyvagnīndrajanākhyābhirdhāraṇābhiḥ kṛte sati | | 9
dhyātvā viśuddhamātmānaṃ praṇamedarkamāsthitam |
dehaṃ tenaiva sañcintya pañcabhūtamayaṃ param | | 1.49.10
sūkṣmaṃ sthūlaṃ tathākṣāṇi svasthāneṣu prakamya ca |
vinyasyāṅgāni khādīni hṛdādyāni hṛdyādiṣu | | 11
khasvāhā hadayaṃ bhānoḥ khamarkāya śirastathā |
ulkā svāhā śikhārkasya yai ca huṃ kavacaṃ param | |
khāṃ phaḍastraṃ ca saṃhārāścāditaḥ praṇavaḥ kṛtaḥ | | 12
sa pūrve praṇavasyātho mantrakarmaprasiddhaye |
ebhirjalaṃ tridhā japtvā snānadravyāṇi tena ca | | 13
samprokṣya pūjayetsūryaṃ gandhapuṣpādibhiḥ śubhaiḥ |
tato mūrtiṣu sarvāsu rātrāvagnau prapūjayet | | 14
prākpaścimodagabhyagrāṃ prātaḥ sāyaṃ niśāsu vai |
saptākṣareṇa tanmantraṃ dhyātvā ca padmakarṇikām | | 15
ādityamaṇḍalāntasthaṃ tatra dehaṃ prakalpayet |
prabhāmaṇḍalamadhyasthaṃ dhyātvā dehaṃ yathā purā | |
sarvalakṣaṇasampūrṇaṃ sahasrakiraṇojjvalam | | 16
raktairgandhaiśca puṣpaiśca carubhirbalibhistathā |
raktacandanamiśrairvā vastrairāvaraṇaiḥ śubhaiḥ | | 17
āvāhanādikarmāṇi rakṣāṃ tu hṛdayena ca |
taccittaśca sadā kuryājjñātvā karmakramaṃ budhaḥ | | 18
kṛtvā cāvāhanaṃ mantrairekatra sthāpanaṃ tataḥ |
yāvadyāgāvasānaṃ tu sānnidhyaṃ tatra kalpya ca | | 19
dattvā pādyādikāṃ pūjāṃ śaktyā vārghyaṃ nivedya ca |
japitvā vidhivaddhyātvā tato devīṃ visarjayet | | 1.49.20
eṣa karma kramaḥ proktaḥ sarveṣāṃ yajanakramāt |
pravakṣyāmi japasthānaṃ padmeśāvaraṇe tathā | | 21
ādityaṃ karṇikāsaṃsthaṃ daleṣvaṅgāni pūrvaśaḥ |
somādīnrāhuparyaṃtāngrahāṃścaivodagāditaḥ | | 22
mūrtimallokapālāṃśca kramādāvaraṇeṣvatha |
tadastrāṇi ca rakṣārthaṃ svamantraiḥ pūjayetkramāt | | 23
praṇavaiścābhidhānaiśca caturthyāṃ hyabhiyojitaiḥ |
sarveṣāṃ kathitā mantrā mudrāśca kathayāmyataḥ | | 24
vyomamudrā ratiḥ padmā mahāśvetāstrameva ca |
pañcamudrāḥ samākhyātāḥ sarvakarmaprasiddhaye | | 25
uttānau tu karau kṛtyā aṅgulyo grathitāḥ kramāt |
tarjanīṃ yanti yāvattāḥ same vādhomukhe sthite | | 26
tarjanyo 1 madhyamasyaiva jyeṣṭhāgre vānugopari |
mudreyaṃ sarvamudrāṇāṃ vyoma mudreti kīrtitā | |
sarvakarmasu yogo.ayaṃ tathā sthānaṃ prakalpate | | 27
padmavatprasṛtāḥ sarvā mahāśvetā raveḥ smṛtā |
javasaṃnihito nityaṃ rathārūḍho raviḥ smṛtaḥ | | 28
hastāvūrdhvamukhau kṛtvā vāmāṅguṣṭhena yojitau |
dravyāṇāṃ śodhane yojyā rakṣārthaṃ ca viśeṣataḥ | | 29
anayā mudrayā sarvaṃ rakṣitaṃ śodhitaṃ bhavet |
arghyaṃ datvā prayoktavyā pūjānte ca viśeṣataḥ | | 1.49.30
japadhyānāvasāne ca yadīcchetsiddhimātmanaḥ |
anena vidhinā nityaṃ japedabdamatandritaḥ | | 31
sa labhetepsitānkāmānihāmutra na saṃśayaḥ |
rogārto mucyate rogāddhanahīno dhanaṃ labhet | | 32
rājyabhraṣṭo labhedrājyamaputraḥ putramāpnuyāt |
prajñāmedhāsamṛddhīśca ciraṃ jīvati mānavaḥ | |
surūpāṃ labhate kanyāṃ kulīnā puruṣo dhruvam | | 33
saubhāgyaṃ strī kulīnāpi kanyā ca puruṣottamam |
avidyo labhate vidyāmityuktaṃ bhānunā purā | | 34
nityayāgaḥ smṛto hyeṣa dhanadhānyasukhāvahaḥ |
prajāpaśuvivṛddhiśca niṣkāmasyāpi jāyate | | 35
tadaikaḥ stūyate svarge śabdyate ca narottamaḥ |
bhaktyā taṃ pūjayedyastu naraḥ puṇyataraḥ sadā | | 36
iha vai kāmikaṃ prāpya tato gacchenmanoḥ padam |
dvijastasya prasādena tejasā budhasannibhaḥ | | 37
iti śrībhaviṣye mahāpurāṇe śatārddhasāhasryāṃ saṃhitāyāṃ brāhme parvaṇi saptamīkalpe
sūryamāhātmyavarṇanaṃ nāmaikonapañcāśattamo.adhyāyaḥ | 49 |

atha pañcāśattamo.adhyāyaḥ
saptamīmāhātmyavarṇanam
vāsudeva uvāca
naimittikaṃ tato vakṣye yajjñātvā ca samāsataḥ |
saptamyāṃ grahaṇe caiva saṃkrāntiṣu viśeṣataḥ | | 1

śuklapakṣasya saptamyāṃ havirbhuktvaikadā divā |
samyagācamya sandhyāyāṃ vāruṇaṃ praṇipatya ca | | 2

indriyāṇi ca saṃyamya kṛtaṃ dhyātvā svapedadhaḥ |
darbhaśayyāgato rātrau prātaḥ snātaḥ susaṃyataḥ | | 3

tataḥ sandhyāmupāsyātha pūrvoktaṃ ca manuṃ japet |
juhuyācca tadā vahniṃ sūryāgnī parikalpya ca | |4

sūryāgnikaraṇaṃ vakṣye tarpaṇaṃ ca samāsataḥ |
arcanāgāramullikhya praviśyārcya janairjanam | | 5

prakṣipyāstīrya darbhaśca pātrādyālabhya ca kramāt |
pavitraṃ dvikuśaṃ kṛtvā sāgraṃ prādeśasammitam | | 6
tena pātrāṇi samprokṣya saṃśodhyādha vilokya ca |
udagagre sthite pātre prajvālyātholmukena ca | | 7

paryagnikaraṇaṃ kṛtvā tathājyotyavanaṃ tridhā |
parimṛjya sruvādīṃśra darbhaiḥ samprokṣayettataḥ | | 8

juhuyātprokṣya tānvahnau tatrārkaṃ pūrvavad vrajet |
abhūmau sthitapātreṇa viṣṭareṇa tu pāṇinā | |

dānena yaduśārdūla nāntarikṣe sthale kvacit | | 9

dakṣiṇena sruvaṃ gṛhya juhuyātpāvakaṃ budhaḥ |
hadayena kriyāḥ sarvāḥ kartavyāḥ pūrvacoditāḥ | | 1.50.10

arkādāramya saṃjñārthaṃ dadyāttūṣṇīṃ hutiṃ sthitaḥ |
varuṇāya śatairmāghe saptamyāṃ varuṇaṃ yajet | | 11
yathāśaktyā tu viprebhyaḥ pradadyātkhaṇḍaveṣṭakān |
dadyācca dakṣiṇāṃ śaktyā prāpnoti yācitaṃ phalam | | 12

evaṃ vai phālgune sūryaṃ caitre vaiśākha eva ca |
vaiśākhe māsi dhātāramindraṃ jyeṣṭhe yajedravim | | 13

āṣāḍhe śrāvaṇe māsi nabhaṃ bhādrapade yamam |
tathāśvayuji parjanyaṃ tvaṣṭāraṃ kārtike yajet | | 14

mārgaśīrṣe ca mitraṃ ca pauṣe viṣṇuṃ yajedyadi |
saṃvatsareṇa yatproktaṃ phalamiṣṭaṃ dine dine | |

tatsarvamāpnuyāt kṣipraṃ bhaktyā śraddhānvito vratī | | 15

evaṃ saṃvatsare pūrṇe kṛtvā vai kāñcanaṃ ratham |
saptabhirvājibhiryuktaṃ nānāratnopaśobhitam | | 16

ādityapratimāṃ madhye śuddhahemnā kṛtāṃ śubhām |
ratnairalaṅkṛtāṃ kṛtvā hemapadmoparisthitām | | 17
tasmin rathavare kṛtvā sārathiṃ cāgrataḥ sthitam |
vṛtaṃ dvādaśabhirvipraiḥ kramānmāsādhipātmabhiḥ | | 18

madhye kṛtvā svamācāryaṃ pūjayitvā yathāśrutiḥ |
sañcintyādityavarṇaṃ vai vastraratnādinārhayet | | 19

evaṃ māsādhipānviprānsampūjyātha nivedayet |
ācāryāya rathaṃ chatraṃ grāmaṃ gāśca mahīṃ śubhām | | 1.50.20

aśvānmāsādhipebhyastu dvādaśabhyo nivedayet |
evaṃ bhaktyā yathāśaktyā hemaratnādibhūṣaṇam | | 21

dattvā tasya namaskṛtya vrataṃ pūrṇaṃ nivedayet |
ata ūrdhvaṃ na doṣo.atra vratasyākaraṇeṣvapi || 22

evamastviti viprendraiḥ sahācāryaḥ punaḥ punaḥ |
bahvīścaivāśiṣo dattvā pravadetprīyatāmiti | | 23

ādityo yena kāmena tvayā ārādhito vrataiḥ |
tubhyaṃ dadātu taṃ kāmaṃ sampūrṇaṃ bhavatu vratam | | 24

ācāryānviprarūpaistu praviṣṭo bhāskaraḥ svayam |
dāsyatyeva paraṃ kartumityuktaṃ bhānunā svayam | | 25

viprebhyo guṇavadbhyaśca nisvebhyaśca viśeṣataḥ |
dīnāndhakṛpaṇebhyaśca śaktyā dattvā ca dakṣiṇām | |
brāhmaṇānbhojayitvā ca vratametatsamāpayet | | 26

kṛtvaivaṃ saptamīmabdaṃ rājā bhavati dhārmikaḥ |
puruṣaḥ strī bhavedrājñāṃ tādṛśāmatha vallabhā | | 27

śatayojanavistīrṇaṃ niḥsapatnamakaṇṭakam |
niṣpannamaṇḍalaṃ bhuṅkte sāgraṃ varṣaśataṃ sukhī | | 28

vittahīno.api yo 1 bhaktyā kṛttvā tāmramayaṃ ratham |
dadyādvratāvasāne tu kṛtvā sarvaṃ yathoditam | |
so.aśītiyojanaṃ bhuṅkte vistīrṇaṃ maṇḍalaṃ nṛpaḥ | | 29
evaṃ piṣṭamayaṃ yo.api vittahīnaḥ karoti nā |
āṣaṣṭiyojanaṃ bhuṅkte dīrghāyurnīrujaḥ sukhī | |
sūryaloke ca kalpāntaṃ yāvatsthitvedamāpnuyāt | | 1.50.30

manasāpi ca yo bhaktyā yajedarkamatandritaḥ |
sarvāvasthāsu so.apyatra vyādhibhirmucyate bhṛśam | | 31

āpado na spṛśantyenaṃ nīhārā iva bhāskaram |
kiṃ punarvratasampannaṃ bhaktaṃ 1 mantraiśca rakṣitam | | 32

yata evaṃ tato jñātvā vidhānaṃ kalpacoditam |
sukhena phalasiddhyarthaṃ kuryātsarvamaśeṣataḥ | | 33

ityetatkathitaṃ sāmba purā sūryeṇa me śubham |
kalpo.ayaṃ prathame kalpe sarvadā gopito mayā | | 34

anena vidhinā vatsa viśuddhenāntarātmanā |
bhānumārādhayetkṣipraṃ yadīcchetphalamuttamam | | 35

mayāsyaiva prasādena prāptāḥ putrāḥ sahasraśaḥ |
asurā nirjitāścaiva surāḥ sarve vaśīkṛtāḥ | | 36

tvayāpyayaṃ gopitavyaḥ kalpaḥ sūryasya sammataḥ |
prasādādasya kalpasya sadā sannihito raviḥ | |

cakre.asminnirjitā yena surā suranaroragāḥ | | 37

yadinādhiṣṭhitaṃ cakramidaṃ sūryāṃśubhiḥ svayam |
satataṃ syātprabhāyuktaṃ kathamadhyāhataṃ bhavet | | 38

ahametaṃ japannityaṃ yajandhyāyaṃśca śaktitaḥ |
jāto.asmi sarvakāmānāṃ pūjyaḥ śreṣṭhaśca tejasā | 39

tvamabhyasyaiva manasā vācā vā karmaṇāpi vā |
kuru bhaktimanenaiva vidhinā phalasiddhaye | | 1.50.40

śṛṇuyādbhaktiyukto yo naraḥ śraddhāsamanvitaḥ |
vidhānamāditaḥ putra saptamīṃ kurute ca yaḥ | | 41
seha 1 prāpyā.akhilaṃ kāmamārogyaṃ ca jayaṃ tathā |
bhārgavyā parayā yukto gacchedvairocanaṃ sadaḥ | | 42

iti śrībhaviṣye mahāpurāṇe śatārddhasāhasryāṃ saṃhitāyāṃ brāhme parvaṇi saptamīkalpe
saptamīmāhātmyavarṇanaṃ nāma pañcāśattamo.adhyāyaḥ | 50 |

athaikapañcāśattamo.adhyāyaḥ
mahāsaptamīvratavarṇanam
vāsudeva uvāca
māghasya śuklapakṣe tu pañcamyāṃ matkulodvaha |
ekabhaktaṃ sadākhyātaṃ ṣaṣṭyāṃ naktamudāhṛtam | | 1
saptamyāmupavāsaṃ tu kecidicchanti suvrata |
ṣaṣṭhyāṃ kecidvadantīha saptamyāṃ pāraṇaṃ kila | | 2
kṛtopavāsaḥ ṣaṣṭhyāṃ tu pūjayedbhāskaraṃ budhaḥ |
raktacandanamiśraistu karavīraiśca suvrata | | 3
guggulena mahābāho saṃyāvena ca suvrata |
pūjayeddevadeveśaṃ śaṅkaraṃ 2 bhāskaraṃ ravim | | 4
evaṃ hi caturo māsānmāghādīnpūjayedravim |
ātmanaścāpi śudhyarthaṃ prāśanaṃ gomayasya ca | | 5
snānaṃ ca gomayeneha kartavyaṃ cātmaśuddhaye |
brāhmaṇāndivyabhaumāṃśca bhojayeccāpi śaktitaḥ | | 6
jyeṣṭhādiṣvatha māseṣu śvetacandanamucyate |
śvetāni cāpi puṣpāṇi śubhagandhānvitāni vai | | 7
kṛṣṇāgarustathā dhūpo naivedyaṃ pāyasaṃ smṛtam |
tenaiva brāhmaṇāṃstuṣṭānbhojayecca mahāmate | | 8
prāśayetpañcagavyaṃ tu snānaṃ tenaiva putraka |
kārtikādiṣu māseṣu agastikusumaiḥ smṛtam | | 9
pūjayennaraśārdūla dhūpaiścaivāparājitaiḥ |
naivedyaṃ guḍapūpāstu tathā cekṣurasaṃ smṛtam | | 1.51.10
tenaiva brāhmaṇāṃstāta bhojayasva svaśaktitaḥ |
kuśodakaṃ prāśayethāḥ snānaṃ ca kuru śuddhaye | | 11
tṛtīye pāraṇāsyānte māghe māsi mahāmate |
bhojanaṃ tatra dānaṃ ca dviguṇaṃ samudāhṛtam | | 12
devadevasya pūjā ca kartavyā śaktito budhaiḥ |
rathasya cāpi dānaṃ tu rathayātrā tu suvrata | | 13
vratasya prāptihetorvai kartavyā vibhave sati |
dānaṃ svarṇarathasyeha yathoktaṃ vibhave sati | |
ityeṣā kathitā putra rathāhvā saptamī śubhā | | 14
mahāsaptamī vikhyātā mahāpuṇyā mahodayā |
yāmupoṣya dhanaṃ putrānkīrtiṃ vidyāmavāpnuyāt | | 15
tathākhilaṃ kuvalayaṃ candreṇa ca samorciṣā | | 16
iti śrībhaviṣye mahāpurāṇe śatārddhasāhasryāṃ saṃhitāyāṃ brāhme parvaṇi saptamīkalpe
mahāsaptamīvratavarṇanaṃ nāmaikapañcāśattamo.adhyāyaḥ | 51 |
atha dvipañcāśattamo.adhyāyaḥ
sūryapūjāvarṇanam
sumanturuvāca
ityuktvā bhagavāndevaḥ śaṅkhacakragadādharaḥ |
antardhānaṃ gato vīraṃ śāmbasyeha prapaśyataḥ | | 1
śāmbo.api kṛtvā vidhivatsaptamīṃ rathasaptamīm |
ādhi(di?)bhirvyādhibhirmukto jagāmāśu svamandiram | | 2
śatānīka uvāca
rathayātrā kathaṃ kāryā rathaḥ kāryaḥ rathaṃ raveḥ |
keneha martyalokeṣu rathayātrā pravartitā | | 3
sumanturuvāca
imamarthaṃ purā pṛṣṭaḥ padmayoniḥ prajāpatiḥ |
rudreṇa kuruśārdūla āsīnaḥ kāñcane girau | | 4
padmāsanaṃ padmayoniṃ sukhāsīnaṃ prajāpatim |
praṇamya śirasā devo rudro vācamudairayat | | 5
śrīrudra uvāca
ya eṣa bhagavāndevo bhāskaro lokabhāskaraḥ |
kathameṣa bhrameddevo rathastho vimalaḥ sadā | | 6
brahmovāca
yathā divi bhramettāta rathārūḍho raviḥ sadā |
tathā te vartayiṣye.ahaṃ rathaṃ cāsya trilocana | | 7
rathena hyekacakreṇa pañcāreṇa triṇābhinā |
hiraṇyamayena kāntena aṣṭabandhaikaneminā | | 8
cakreṇa bhāsvatā caiva divi sūryaḥ prasarpati |
daśayojanasāhasro vistāro.apyasya kathyate | | 9
triguṇā ca rathopasthādīvā daṇḍapramāṇataḥ |
yugamasya tu vistīrṇamaruṇo yatra sārathiḥ | | 1.52.10
prāsaṅgaḥ kācano divyo yuktaḥ pavanagairhayaiḥ |
chandobhirvājirūpaistu yataścakraṃ tataḥ sthitaiḥ | | 11
yenāsau paryaṭedvyomni bhāsvatā tu divaspatiḥ |
athaitāni tu sūryasya pratyaṅgāni rathasya tu | | 12
saṃvatsarasyāvayavaiḥ kalpitāni yathākramam |
nābhyastisrastu cakrasya trayaḥ kālāḥ prakīrtitāḥ | | 13
ārāḥ pañcartavastasya nemyaḥ ṣaḍṛtavaḥ smṛtāḥ |
rathavedī smṛte tasya ayane dakṣiṇottare | | 14
muhūrtā 2 iṣavastasya śamyāścāsya kalāḥ smṛtāḥ |
tasya kāṣṭhāḥ smṛtāḥ koṇā akṣadaṇḍaḥ kṣaṇāḥ smṛtāḥ | | 15
nimeṣāścāsya karṣāḥ syādīṣādaṇḍo lavāḥ smṛtāḥ |
rātrirvarūtho dharmo.asya dhvaja ūrdhvaṃ pratiṣṭhitaḥ | | 16
yugākṣikoṭī te tasya arthakāmāvubhau smṛtau |
aśvarūpāṇi cchandāṃsi vahante vāmato dhuram | | 17
gāyatrī caiva triṣṭup ca jagatyanuṣṭubeva ca |
paṅktiśca bṛhatī caiva uṣṇigeva tu saptamī | | 18
cakramakṣanibaddhaṃ tu dhruve cākṣaḥ samarpitaḥ |
sahacakro bhramatyakṣaḥ sa cākṣo bhramati dhruve | | 19
akṣaḥ sahaiva cakreṇa bhramate.asau dhruve sthitaḥ |
evamakṣavaśāttasya 3 sanniveśo rathasya tu | | 1.52.20
tathā saṃyogabhāvena saṃsiddho bhāskaro rathaḥ |
tena cāsau ravirdevo nabhaḥ saṃsarpate sadā | | 21
yugākṣakoṭīsambaddhe dve raśmī syandanasya tu |
dhruve te bhramato raśmī na cakrayugayostu vai | | 22
bhramato maṇḍalānyasya raverasya rathasya tu |
kulālacakravadyāti maṇḍalaṃ sarvatodiśam | | 23
yugākṣakoṭī te tasya dakṣiṇe syandanasya tu |
ṛgyajurbhyāṃ gṛhītena vicakrāśvena vai dhruve | | 24
hrasete tasya raśmī tu maṇḍaleṣūttarāyaṇe |
dakṣiṇe.atha samṛddhe tu bhramato maṇḍalāni tu | | 25
yugākṣakoṭī te tasya bhramete syandanasya tu |
saktāsaktaṃ ca bhramate maṇḍalaṃ sarvatodiśam | | 26
ākṛṣyete dhruveṇeha samaṃ tiṣṭhati suvrata |
tadā sābhyantaraṃ devo bhramate maṇḍalāni tu | | 27
dhruveṇa mucyamāne tu punā raśmiyugena vai |
tathaiva 1 bāhyataḥ sūryo bhramate maṇḍalāni tu | | 28
aśītimaṇḍalaśataṃ kāṣṭhayorubhayorapi |
saratho.adhiṣṭhito devairvibhramedṛṣibhiḥ saha | | 29
gandharvairapsarobhiśca sarpagrāmaṇirākṣasaiḥ |
etairvasati vai sūrye māsau dvau dvau krameṇa tu | | 1.52.30
dhātāryamā pulastyaśca pulahaśca prajāpatiḥ |
khaṇḍako vāsukiścaiva sakarṇo raśmireva ca | | 31
tumbururnāradaścaiva gandharvau gāyatāṃ varau |
kratusthalāpsaraścaiva yā ca sā puñjikasthalā | | 32
grāmaṇīrathakṛtsnaśca rathaujāśvatarāvubhau |
rakṣo hetiḥ prahetiśca yātudhānau ca tāvubhau | | 33
madhumādhavayoreṣa gaṇo vasati bhāskare |
tathā grīṣmau tu dvau māsau mitraśca varuṇaśca ha | | 34
ṛṣiratrirvaśiṣṭhaśca takṣako.ananta eva ca |
menakā sahajanyā ca gaṃdharvo ca hahā hūhūḥ | | 35
rathasvanaśca grāmaṇyau rathacitraśca tāvubhau |
pauruṣeyo vadhaścaiva yātudhānau mahābalau | | 36
śuciśukrau tu dvau māsau vasantyete divākare |
indraścaiva vivasvāṃśca aṅgirā bhṛgureva ca | | 37
elāparṇastathā sarpaḥ śaṅkhapālaśca pannagāḥ |
pramlocā dundukāścaiva gandharvau bhānudardurau | | 38
yātudhānau tathā sarpastathā brāhmaśca tāvubhau |
ete nabho nabhasyau ca nivasanti divākare | | 39
śaradyete punaḥ śubhrā nivasanti sma devatāḥ |
parjanyaścaiva pūṣā ca bhāradvājaḥ sagautamaḥ | | 1.52.40
citrasenaśca gandharvastathā vasuruciśca yaḥ |
viśvācī ca ghṛtācī ca te ubhe puṇyalakṣaṇe | | 41
nāgastvairāvataścaiva viśrutaśca dhanañjayaḥ |
senajicca suṣeṇaśca senānīrgrāmaṇīstathā | | 42
āpo vātaśca dvāvetau yātudhānau prakīrtitau |
vasantyete tu vai sūrye iṣorjau kālaparyayāt | | 43
hemaṃtikau tu dvau māsau vasantyete divākare |
aṃśau bhagaśca dvāvetau kaśyapaśca kratustathā | | 44
bhujaṅgaśca mahāpadmaḥ sarpaḥ karkoṭakastathā |
āpo vātaśca dvāvetau yātudhānau prakīrtitau | | 45
citrāṅgadaśca gandharvoruṇāyuścaiva tāvubhau |
sahe caiva sahasye ca vasantyete divākare |.| 46
pūṣā jiṣṇurjamadagnirviśvāmitrastathaiva ca |
kādraveyau mahānāgau kambalāśvatarāvubhau | | 47
gandharvo dhṛtarāṣṭraśca sūryavārcāśca tāvubhau |
tilottamā ca rambhā ca sarvaloke ca viśrute | | 48
grāmaṇīḥ senajiccaiva satyajicca mahātapāḥ |
brahmopetaśca vai rakṣo yajño yajñastathaiva ca | |
ete tapastapasyai ca nivasanti divākare | | 49
anye.api ye mandehā rākṣasādhipatayo devadevaguhyatamasya rakṣārthaṃ sakala devairasmadādibhiḥ
sanniyuktāstānbhavate kathayāmi | | 1.52.50
rudra uvāca
vada brahmankathāṃ divyāṃ yāmahaṃ praṣṭumāgataḥ |
tāmeva vistareṇaiva kathayāśu mama prabho | | 51
diviṣṭhaṃ bhāskaraṃ dṛṣṭvā nametkena vidhānataḥ |
kiṃ phalaṃ tasya vā deva samāpte bhavati karmaṇi | | 52
brahmovāca
śṛṇu rudra samāsena bhāskarasya natikriyām |
yāṃ kṛtvā rogaduḥkhārtā mucyante pāpasañcayāt | | 53
sthaṇḍile maṇḍalaṃ kṛtvā dvādaśāṅgulamānataḥ |
sadyo gomayalipte ca tatraivāvāhayedravim | | 54
pūjayitvā gaṇeśādīnvāsudevaṃ ca sātyakim |
satyabhāmāṃ tathā lakṣmīmumāṃ devīṃ ca śaṅkaram | | 55
maṇḍalasya samīpasthānpūrvoktānvedamantravit |
tataḥ pradakṣiṇīkṛtya daṇḍavatpraṇametsakṛt | | 56
śataṃ sahasramayutaṃ lakṣaṃ vā nijapāpataḥ |
dṛṣṭvā śaktiṃ praṇamyātha sadā saṃyatamānasaḥ | | 57
viprāya dakṣiṇāṃ dadyānnirucchvāsaḥ samāhitaḥ |
raktike ca hiraṇyasya śatamātre sahasrake | | 58
māṣakāṇāṃ catuṣkaṃ cāyutaṃ daśaguṇaṃ diśet |
dakṣe daśaguṇaṃ proktaṃ dadyādrogavimuktaye | | 59
evaṃ kṛte virūpākṣa sarvarogādvimucyate |
idaṃ rahasyaṃ paramaṃ śṛṇuyādyo hi mānavaḥ | | 1.52.60
tasya rogā vinaśyanti mārtaṇḍasya prasādataḥ |
anyacca te pravakṣyāmi yaccāpṛṣṭamumāpate | |
tacchṛṇuṣva mayā proktaṃ rathayantṛniyāmakam | | 61
iti śrībhaviṣye mahāpurāṇe śatārddhasāhasryāṃ saṃhitāyāṃ brāhme parvaṇi saptamīkalpe
sūryavarṇanaṃ nāma dvipañcāśattamo.adhyāyaḥ | 52 |
atha tripañcāśattamo.adhyāyaḥ
sūryavarṇanam
brahmovāca
tatrāruṇo mayā pūrvaṃ sārathye sanniyojitaḥ |
indreṇa māṭharo nāma vāyunā kalmaṣeṇa tu | | 1
vainateyena tārkṣyopari vimalo nakhatuṇḍapraharaṇaḥ purogāmī niyukta iti | |
kālena daṇḍo mahādaṇḍāyudho bhavatā śeṣā mahāgaṇādhipaḥ | | 2

vaiśākhena rājñā vasubhidāyudhāṅgārikau dvau agninā piṅgalaḥ |
saṃyantā mahādaṇḍāyudho bhavatā śeṣo mahāgaṇādhipaḥ | | 3
hasto yamena pāśahastombupatinā samindhanaḥ |
alakādhipatinā viṣṇuḥ | | 4
aśvibhyāṃ kālopakālau vākṣapradhānakau |
naranārāyaṇābhyāṃ kṣārau dhārau dhiṣaṇakṛṣṇau|| 5
vairājaśaṅkhapālaparjanyarajasāṃ diśāsu vidiśāsu diśāṃ pālanaṃ viśvedevā daduḥ | | 6
saptaitā lokamātaraḥ sarvamaruto.adadan |
oṃkāro vaṣaṭkāro vedanisvanaḥ pinākī vināyakaḥ śeṣo.ananto vāsukiśca nāgasahasreṇātmatulyenādityasya rathamanuyānti 1 | | 7
gāyatrī sāvitrī rathe sthite ubhe sandhye sadā sā devatā yā ravimaṇḍalaṃ nāpaiti |
bhagavantaṃ sahasrakiraṇamavalambitum | | 8
etadvai sarvadaivatyaṃ maṇḍalaṃ brahmavādinaṃ brahmayajñavādinīṃ yajñaḥ |
bhagavadbhaktānāṃ paramādityoyaṃ viṣṇurmāheśvarāṇām | | 9
sthānābhimānino hyete sadā vai vṛṣabhadhvaja |
sūryamāpyāyayantyete tejasāṃ teja uttamam | | 1.53.10
grathitaiḥ svairvacobhistu stuvante ṛṣayo ravim |
gandharvāpsarasaścaiva gītanṛtyairupāsate | | 11
viyadbhramaṇato rakṣāṃ kurvaṃti sma iṣugraham |
sarpā vahanti vai sūryaṃ yātudhānāstu yānti ca | | 12
vālakhilyā namantyetaṃ paricāryodayādravim |
divaspatiḥ svabhūścobhau agragau yojanasya tu | | 13
bhargo.atha dakṣiṇe pārśve kañjajo vāmataḥ sthitaḥ |
sarve te pṛṣṭhagā jñeyā grahā lokeṣu pūjitāḥ. | | 14
uparāgaśikhī cobhāvagrato nātra saṃśayaḥ |
manuṣyadharmā dakṣiṇata uttareṇa pracetasaḥ | | 15
sambhavanti tathā kṛṣṇa ubhāvetau sadāgragau |
vāmena vītihotrastu pṛṣṭhatastu hariḥ sadā | | 16
rathapīṭhe kṣamā jñeyā antarāle nabhastathā |
āśritya rathajāṃ kāntiṃ khaṃ divaḥ samayaḥ sthitaḥ | | 17
dhvajo daṇḍaśca vijñeyo dhvajāgre vṛṣa eva ca |
ṛddhirvṛddhistathā śrīśca patākā pārvatīpriya | | 18
dhvajadaṇḍāgre garuḍastadagre varuṇālayaḥ |
mainākaśchatradaṇḍastu himavāṃśchatramucyate | | 19
kecidevaṃ vadantīha loke cānye mahāmate |
chatradaṇḍastathā kleśaḥ kleśaṃ chatraṃ vidurbudhāḥ | | 1.53.20
eteṣāmeva devānāṃ yathā vīryaṃ tathā tapaḥ |
yathāyogaṃ tathā sattvaṃ yathā sattvaṃ tathā balam | | 21
tathā tapatyasau sūryasteṣāṃ siddhaḥ svatejasā |
ete tapanti varṣanti yānti viśvaṃ sṛjanti ca | | 22
bhūtānāmaśubhaṃ karma vyapohanti ca kīrtitāḥ |
ete sahaiva sūryeṇa bhramante sānugā divi | | 23
tapantaśca japantaśca hlādayantaśca vai dvijāḥ |
gopāyanti sma bhūtāni iha te hyanukampayā | | 24
prīṇāti devānamṛtena sūryaḥ somena sūktena vivardhayitvā |
śuklena pūrṇā divasakrameṇa taṃ kṛṣṇapakṣe vibudhāḥ pibanti | | 25
pītaṃ hi somaṃ dvikalāvaśeṣaṃ kṛṣṇe tu pakṣe rucibhirjvalantam |
sudhāmṛtaṃ tatpitaraḥ pibanti ūrjāśca saumyāśca tathaiva kalpāḥ | | 26
sūryeṇa gobhiśca samṛddhitābhiradbhiḥ punaścaiva samujjitābhiḥ |
tathauṣadhībhiḥ satataṃ pibanti atyantapānena kṣudhā jayanti | | 27
māsārdhatṛptistu matābhiradbhirmāsena tṛptiḥ svadhayā pitṛrṇām |
annena śaśvadvidadhāti martyaṃ tvayaṃ jagaccaiva bibharti gobhiḥ | | 28
ahorātraṃ rathenāsāvekacakreṇa vai bhraman |
saptadvīpasamudrāntāṃ saptabhiśca hayaiḥ saha | | 29

chandobhirvājirūpaistairyataścakraṃ tataḥ sthitaiḥ |
kāmarūpaiḥ sakṛdyuktairantarasthairmanojavaiḥ | | 1.53.30

haribhiravyayairvaśyai kṣudhāśramavivarjitaiḥ |
dvyaśītimaṇḍalaśatamīhantyabdena vai hayāḥ | | 31

bāhyato.abhyantaraṃ caiva maṇḍalaṃ divasakramāt |
kalpādau samprayuktāste vahantyābhūtasamplavam | | 32

āvṛtā bālakhilyaistairbhramanti tānyahāni tu |
grathitaiḥ svairvacobhistu stūyamāno maharṣibhiḥ | | 33

sevyate nṛtyagītaiśca gandharvairapsarogaṇaiḥ |
pataṅgaḥ patagairaśvairvasate bhramayandivi | | 34

vīthyāgryayā vicarate nakṣatrāṇi yathā śaśī |
madhyagāścāmarāvatyāṃ yadā bhavati bhāskaraḥ | | 35

vaivasvate saṃyamane uttiṣṭhandṛśyate tadā |
sukhāyāmardharātraṃ tu vibhāyāmastameti ca | | 36
vaivasvate saṃyamane madhyamastu raviryadā |
sukhāyāmatha vāruṇyāmuttiṣṭhandṛśyate tadā | | 37

rātryardhaṃ cāmarāvatyāmastameti yamasya vai |
somapuryāṃ vibhāyāṃ tu madhyagaścāryamā yadā | | 38

māhendrasyāmarāvatyāmuttiṣṭhati divākaraḥ |
ardharātraṃ saṃyamane vāruṇyāmastameti ca | | 39

evaṃ caturṣu pārśveṣu meroḥ kurvanpradakṣiṇam |
udayāstamane cāsāvuttiṣṭhati punaḥ punaḥ | | 1.53.40

pūrvāhṇe cāparāhṇe ca dvau dvau devālayau punaḥ |
tapatyekaṃ tu madhyāhne tābhireva gabhastibhiḥ | | 41

udito vardhamānābhirāmadhyāhnāttapedraviḥ |
tataḥ paraṃ hrasantībhirgobhirastaṃ niyacchati | | 42

yatrodyandṛśyate sūryaḥ sa teṣāmudayaḥ smṛtaḥ |
praṇāśaṃ gacchate yatra sa teṣāmastamucyate | | 43

evaṃ puṣkaramadhyena tadā sarpati bhāskaraḥ |
triṃśadbhāgaṃ tu medinyā muhūrtena sa gacchati | | 44

yojanāgreṇa saṅkhyāṃ 1 tu muhūrtasya nibodha me |
pūrṇaṃ śatasahasrāśaṃ sahasraṃ tu trilocana | | 45

pañcāśacca tathālpāni sahasrāṇyadhikāni tu |
mauhūrtiko gatirhyeṣā sūryasya tu vidhīyate | | 46

yojanānāṃ sahasre dve dve śate dve ca yojane |
nimeṣāntaramātreṇa divi sūryaḥ prasarpati | | 47

sa śīghrameva paryeti bhāskaro.alātacakravat |
bhramanvai bhramamāṇeṣu ṛkṣeṣu vicaratyasau | | 48

indraḥ pūjayate sūryamuttiṣṭhantaṃ dine dine |
madhyāhne ca yamaḥ paścādastaṃ yāntamapāṃ patiḥ | | 49

somastathārdharātre tu sadā pūjayate ravim |
viṣṇurbhavānahaṃ rudraḥ pūjayāma niśākṣaye | | 1.53.50
evamagnirnirṛtiśca vāyurīśāna eva ca |
pūjayanti krameṇaiva bhramamāṇaṃ divākaram | |
śreyo.arthaṃ devaśārdūla sarve brahmādayaḥ surāḥ | | 51

iti śrībhaviṣye mahāpurāṇe śatārddhasāhasryāṃ saṃhitāyāṃ brāhme parvaṇi rathasaptamīkalpe
sūryagativarṇanaṃ nāma tripañcāśattamo.adhyāyaḥ | 53 |
atha catuṣpañcāśattamo.adhyāyaḥ
sūryamahimavarṇanam
rudra uvāca
aho haṃsasya māhātmyaṃ varṇitaṃ bhavatedṛśam |
kathyatāṃ punarevedaṃ māhātmyaṃ bhāskarasya tu | | 1

brahmovāca
ādityamantramakhilaṃ trailokyaṃ sacarācaram |
bhavatyasmājjagatsarvaṃ sadevāsuramānuṣam | | 2

rudrendropendracandrāṇāṃ viprendratridivaukasām |
mahādyutimatāṃ kṛtsnaṃ tejo yatsārvalaukikam | | 3

sarvātmā sarvalokeśo devadevaḥ prajāpatiḥ |
sūrya eṣa trilokasya mūlaṃ paramadaivatam | | 4

agnau prāstāhutiḥ samyagādityamupatiṣṭhati |
ādityājjāyate vṛṣṭirvṛṣṭerannaṃ tataḥ prajāḥ | | 5
sūryātprasūyate sarvaṃ tatra caiva pralīyate |
bhāvābhāvau hi lokānāmādityānniḥsṛtau purā | | 6

etattu dhyānināṃ dhyānaṃ mokṣaṃ cāpyeṣa mokṣiṇām |
atra gacchanti nirvāṇaṃ jāyante.asmātpunaḥ prajāḥ | | 7

kṣaṇā muhūrtā divasā niśāḥ pakṣāśca nityaśaḥ |
māsāḥ saṃvatsarāścaiva ṛtavo.atha yugāni ca | | 8

sadādityādṛte hyeṣā kālasaṅkhyā na vidyate |
kālādṛte na niyamo 2 nāgnirna havanakriyā | | 9

ṛtūnāmavibhāgācca, puṣpamūlaphalaṃ kutaḥ |
kutaḥ sasyaviniṣpattistṛṇauṣadhigaṇāḥ 4 kutaḥ | | 1.54.10

abhāvo vyavahārāṇāṃ jantūnāṃ divi ceha ca |
jagatpratapanamṛte bhāskaraṃ vāritaskaram | | 11

nāvṛṣṭyā tapate sūryo nāvṛṣṭyā pariviśyate |
nāvṛṣṭyā vikṛtiṃ dhatte vāriṇā dīpyate raviḥ | | 12

vasante kapilaḥ sūryo grīṣme kāñcanasaprabhaḥ |
śveto varṇena varṣāsu pāṇḍuḥ śaradi bhāskaraḥ | | 13

hemante tāmravarṇastu śiśire lohito raviḥ |
iti varṇāḥ samākhyātāḥ śṛṇu varṇaphalaṃ hara | | 14

kṛṣṇobhayāya jagatastāmraḥ senāpatiṃ vināśayati |
pīto narendraputraṃ śvetastu purohitaṃ hanti | | 15

citro.atha vāpi dhūmro ravī raśmivyākulaṃ karotyuccaiḥ |
taskaraśastranipātairyadi na salilamāśu pātayati | | 16
iti śrībhaviṣye mahāpurāṇe śatārddhasāhasryāṃ saṃhitāyāṃ brāhme parvaṇi rathasaptamīkalpe
sūryamahimavarṇanaṃ nāma catuṣpañcāśattamo.adhyāyaḥ | 54 |
atha pañcapañcāśattamo.adhyāyaḥ
sūryarathayātrāvarṇanam
rudra uvāca
rathayātrā kathaṃ kāryā bhāskarasyeha mānavaiḥ |
phalaṃ ca kiṃ bhavetteṣāṃ yātrāṃ kurvanti ye raveḥ 1| | 1
vidhinā kena kartavyā kasminkāle surottama |
kathaṃ ca bhrāmayeddevaṃ rathārūḍhaṃ divākaram | | 2
devasya ye rathaṃ bhaktyā bhrāmayanti vahanti ca |
teṣāṃ ca kiṃ phalaṃ proktaṃ ye ca nṛtyakarā narāḥ | | 3
bhramanti ye na ca devena nṛtyagītaparāyaṇāḥ |
prajāgaraṃ ca kurvanti bhaktyā śraddhāsamanvitāḥ | | 4
teṣāṃ ca kiṃ phalaṃ proktaṃ. rathaṃ yacchanti 3 ye raveḥ |
baliṃ bhaktaṃ ca ye bhaktyā diśantyāhi(?)kabhojanam | | 5
etanme brūhi nikhilaṃ surajyeṣṭha savistaram |
lokānāṃ śreyase deva paraṃ kautūhalaṃ hi me | | 6
brahmovāca
sādhu pṛṣṭo.asmi bhūteśa gaṇeśo.asi trilocana |
śṛṇuṣvaikamanā vacmi yathāpraśnaṃ savistaram | | 7
devasya rathayātreyaṃ bhāskarasya mahātmanaḥ |
indrotsavastathā rudra mayā hyetau prakīrtitau | | 8
martyaloke śāntihetorlokānāṃ lokapūjita |
pravartitāvubhau yasmindeśe devamahotsavau | | 9
na tatropadravāḥ santi rājataskarasambhavāḥ |
tasmātkāryāvimau bhaktyā durbhikṣasyeha śāntaye | | 1.55.10
śuklapakṣe tu saptamyāṃ māsi bhādrapade hara |
ghṛtenābhyaṅgayeddevaṃ pañcapūtāṅgajena vai | | 11
abhyaṅgayedmaheśaṃ yaḥ sarṣapaiḥ śraddhayānvitaḥ |
dine dine jagannāthaṃ praviṣṭaṃ varṇake ravim | | 12
sa gacchedyānamārūḍho gairikaṃ kiṅkiṇīkṛtam |
vaiśvānarapuraṃ divyaṃ gandharvāpsaraśobhitam | | 13
śālyodanaṃ khaṇḍamiśraṃ vajraṃ vajrasamanvitam |
varṇabhaktaṃ prayacchedyo bhāskarāya dine dine | | 14
ārūḍhaḥ sa vimānaṃ tu jvālāmālākulaṃ śubham |
gacchenmama puraṃ deva stūyamāno maharṣibhiḥ | | 15
tasmātsarvaprayatnena bhāskarāya naraḥ śiva |
varṇabhaktaṃ pradātavyaṃ praviṣṭasyeha varṇakam | | 16
ghṛtapūrṇaṃ khaṇḍaveṣṭaṃ kāsāraṃ modakaṃ payaḥ |
dadhyodanaṃ pāyasaṃ ca saṃyāvaṃ guḍapūpakān | | 17
ye prayacchanti devasya bhāskarasyeha varṇakam |
te gacchanti na sandeho narā vai mandiraṃ mama | | 18
ahanyahani yo bhaktyā bhāskarāya prayacchati |
abhyaṅgāya ghṛtaṃ deyaṃ sa yāti paramāṃ gatim | | 19
tathā yo varṇabhaktaṃ ca ahanyahani bhaktitaḥ |
sa prāpyeha śubhānkāmāngacchetsa bhavasālayam | | 1.55.20
cūrṇamudvartanāyeha yaḥ prayacchecchubhaṃ raveḥ |
sa yāti paramaṃ sthānaṃ yatra devo divākaraḥ | | 21

tatastaṃ snāpayeddevaṃ pauṣe māsi vidhānataḥ |
saptamyāṃ śuklapakṣasya śṛṇuṣvaikamanāstathā | | 22

tīrthodakamupānīya anyadvātha jalaṃ śubham |
vedoktena vidhānena pratimāṃ sthāpayedbudhaḥ | | 23

yajeddhi tīrthanāmāni manasā saṃsmaranbudhaḥ |
prayāgaṃ puṣkaraṃ devaṃ kurukṣetraṃ ca naimiṣam | | 24

pṛthūdakaṃ candrabhāgāṃ śauraṃ gokarṇameva ca |
brahmāvartaṃ kuśāvartaṃ bilvakaṃ nīlaparvatam | | 25
gaṅgādvāraṃ tathā puṇyaṃ gaṅgāsāgarameva ca|
kālapriyaṃ mitravanaṃ śuṇḍīrasvāminaṃ tathā | | 26

cakratīrthaṃ tathā puṇyaṃ rāmatīrthaṃ tathā śivam |
vitastā harṣapaṃthā vai tathā vai devikā smṛtā | | 27

gaṅgā sarasvatī sindhuścandrabhāgā sanarmadā |
vipāśā yamunā tāpī śivā vetravatī tathā | | 28

godāvarī payoṣṇī ca kṛṣṇā veṇyā tathā nadī |
śatarudrā puṣkariṇī kauśikī sarayūstathā | | 29

tathānye sāgarāścaiva sānnidhyaṃ kalpayantu vai |
tathāśramāḥ puṇyatamā divyānyāyatanāni ca | | 1.55.30

evaṃ snānavidhiṃ kṛtvā arcayitvā praṇamya ca |
dhūpamarghyaṃ pradattvā tu pratimāmadhivāsayet | | 31

trirātraṃ saptarātraṃ vā māsaṃ māsārdhameva ca |
sthitaṃ snānagṛhe devaṃ pūjayedbhaktito naraḥ | | 32

catvare lepayedvediṃ caturasrāṃ śubhe kṛtām |
caturdiśaṃ śvetakumbhairvitānavaraśobhitām | | 33

kṛṣṇapakṣe tu māghasya saptamyāṃ tripurāṃtaka |
kṛtvāgnikāryaṃ vidhivatkṛtvā brāhmaṇabhojanam | | 34

śaṅkhabherīninādaistu brahmaghoṣaiśca puṣkalaiḥ |
puṇyāhaghoṣavividhairbrāhmaṇānsvasti vācya ca | | 35

tato.asya parayā bhaktyā sūryasya paramātmanaḥ |
rathena darśanīyena kiṅkiṇījālamālinā | |

sūryaśca bhrāmayeddevaṃ mahotsavapuraḥsaram | | 36

śuklapakṣe tu māghasya rathamāropayedravim |
kṛtvāgnihomaṃ vidhivattathā brāhmaṇabhojanam | | 37

prīṇayitvā janaṃ sarvaṃ dakṣiṇābhojanādinā |
prapūjya brāhmaṇāndivyānbhaumāṃścāpi suvācakān | | 38

itihāsapurāṇābhyāṃ vācako brāhmaṇottamaḥ |
tato devaśca iṣṭaśca sampūjyo yatnatastadā | | 39

māghasya śuklapakṣasya pañcamyāmekabhaktakam |
ayācitaṃ caturthyāṃ tu ṣaṣṭhyāṃ naktaṃ prakīrtitam | | 1.55.40
saptamyāmupavāsaṃ tu āśramādropayedratham |
agnikāryaṃ tu vai kṛtvā rathasya purataḥ śiva | | 41

ṣaṣṭhyāṃ ca rātrau bhūteśa rathasyehādhivāsanam |
brāhmaṇānbhojayitvā tu divyānbhaumāṃśca vācakān | | 42

rathamāropayeddevaṃ saptamyāṃ bhūtabhāvanam |
sitāyāṃ māghamāse tu tasya devālayāgrataḥ | | 43

tatrasthasyaiva devasya kuryādrātrau prajāgaram |
nānāvidhaiḥ prekṣaṇakairdīpavṛkṣopaśobhitaiḥ | |44

śaṃkhatūryaninādaiśca brahmaghoṣaiśca puṣkalaiḥ |
kuryātprajāgaraṃ bhaktyā devasya purato niśi | |45

tato.aṣṭamyāṃ ca yatnena devaṃ rathagataṃ nayet |
nagarasyottaraṃ dvāraṃ śaṅkhabherī nināditam | | 46
tataḥ pūrvaṃ dakṣiṇaṃ ca dvāraṃ cāpi tathā param |
evaṃ hi kriyamāṇāyāṃ yātrāyāṃ vatsarāvadhau | | 47
mānavāḥ sukhamedhante rājā jayati cāhitān |
nīrujaśca janāḥ sarve gavāṃ śāntirbhavettathā | |48
kartārabhrāpi yātrāyāḥ syargabhāgo bhavanti hi |
voḍhāraśca tathā vatsa sūryalokaṃ yajanti vai | | 49
rudra uvāca
kathaṃ sañcālyate brahmansthāpitā pratibhā sakṛt |
etanme vada deveśa sumahānsaṃśayo hi me | | 1.55.50
brahmovāca
pūrvameva sahasrāṃśoryānahetormahātmanaḥ |
saṃvatsarasyāvayavaiḥ kalpito.asya ratho mayā | | 51
sarveṣāṃ tu rathānāṃ vai sa rathaḥ prathamaḥ smṛtaḥ |
taṃ dṛṣṭvā tu tatastvanye syandanā viśvakarmaṇā | | 52
kalpitāḥ sarvadevānāṃ somādīnāmanekaśaḥ |
viśvakarmakṛtaṃ prāpya rathaṃ devena putraka | | 53
pūjārthamātmano dattaṃ manave satkulodvaha |
manunekṣvākave dattaṃ martyaiḥ sampūjyatāṃ raviḥ | | 54
atastu rathayānena cālanaṃ vihitaṃ raveḥ |
tasmānna cālane doṣaḥ savituścala eva saḥ | | 55
yasmādrathena paryeti bhāskaraḥ pṛthivīmimām |
gacchanna dṛśyate caitanmaṇḍalaṃ savitustathā | | 56
adṛṣṭaṃ calate yasmāttasmādvai pārvatīpriya |
tadevaṃ rathayātrāsu dṛṣṭaṃ bhānormanīṣibhiḥ | | 57
anyeṣāṃ cālanaṃ neṣṭaṃ devānāṃ pārvatīpriya |
brahmaviṣṇuśivādīnāṃ sthāpitānāṃ vidhānataḥ | | 58
tasmādrathena devasya yātrā kāryā vidhānataḥ |
prajānāmiha śāntyarthaṃ pratisaṃvatsaraṃ sadā | | 59
kāñcano vātha raupyo vā dṛḍhadārumayo.api vā |
dṛḍhākṣayugacakraśca rathaḥ kāryaḥ suyantritaḥ | | 1.55.60
tasmin rathavare śreṣṭhe kalpite sumanorame |
āropya pratimāṃ yatnādyojayedvājinaḥ śubhān | | 61
harillakṣaṇasampannānsumukhānvaśavartinaḥ |
kuṅkumena samālabdhāṃścāmarasragvibhūṣitān | | 62
sadaśvānyojayitvā tu rathasyārghyaṃ pradāya ca |
vibudhāmpūjayityā tu dhūpamālyānulepanaiḥ | | 63
āhārairvividhaiścāpi bhojayitvā dvijottamān |
dīnāndhakṛpaṇādīṃśca sarvānsaṃtarpya śaktitaḥ | | 64
na kañcidvimukhaṃ kuryāduttamādhamamadhyamam |
sūryakratau tu vitate evamāhurmanīṣiṇaḥ | | 65
yaścintayati bhagnāśaḥ kṣudhāvātaprapīḍitaḥ |
adāturhi pitṛrṃstena svargasthānapi pātayet | | 66
yajñaśca dakṣiṇāhīnaḥ saviturna praśasyate 1 |
tasmānnānāvidhaiḥ kāmairbhakṣyalehyasamanvitaiḥ | | 67
pūjayitvā janaṃ sarvamimamuccārayenmanum |
baliṃ gṛhṇantu me devā ādityā vasavastathā | | 68
marutothāśvinau rudrāḥ suparṇāḥ pannagā grahāḥ |
asurā yātudhānāśca rathasthā yāstu devatāḥ | | 69
digpālā lokapālāśca ye ca vighnavināyakāḥ |
jagataḥ svasti kurvaṃtu ye ca divyā maharṣayaḥ | | 1.55.70
mā vighnaṃ mā ca me pāpaṃ mā ca me paripanthinaḥ |
saumyā bhavantu tṛptāśca devā bhūtagaṇāstathā | | 71
vāmadevyaiḥ pavitraiśca mānastokarathantaraiḥ |
ākṛṣṇena rajasā ṛcamekāmudāharet | | 72
tataḥ puṇyāhaśabdena kṛtavāditraniḥsvanaiḥ |
rathakramaṇakaṃ kuryādvartmanā susamena tu | |
puruṣaiścāpi voḍhavyaḥ sūryabhaktisamanvitaiḥ | | 73
sukṛtaiḥ ca pragrahairdāntairbalīvarddairathāpi vā |
yathā paryaṭanaṃ ca syādviṣame pathi gacchataḥ | | 74
upavāsasthitairviprairdivyairbhaumaiśca suvrataiḥ |
triṃśadbhiḥ ṣoḍaśairvāpi pratimāṃ bhāskarasya tu | | 75
sthānātpracālyaṃ vai rudra rathamāropayecchanaiḥ |
rājñī ca nikṣubhā rudra bhārye tasya mahātmanaḥ | | 76
śanairāropayedrudra ubhayoḥ pārśvayo rathe |
nikṣubhāṃ dakṣiṇe pārśve rājñīṃ cāpyuttare tathā | 77
dvāveva brāhmaṇau tasmindivyo bhaumaśca pārśvayoḥ |
brahmakalpastathā bhaumaḥ kūbarasyopari sthitaḥ | 78
garuḍaṃ pṛṣṭhataścāsya valgamānaṃ prakalpayet |
ātapatraṃ tathā śvetaṃ svarṇadaṇḍamanaupamam | | 79
suvarṇabindubhiścitraṃ maṇimuktāphalojjvalam |
tatastvindradhanuḥprakhyaṃ svarṇadaṇḍamathāvraṇam | | 1.55.80
dhvajaṃ prakalpayettasya patākābhiralaṅkṛtam |
bhūteśanānāvarṇābhissaptabhiḥ kāmanāśanaḥ | | 81
dhvajoparicaraṃ vyoma aruṇādhiṣṭhitaṃ bhavet |
rathatuṇḍagatānviprānnayedrathavaraṃ raveḥ | | 82
sārathyaṃ rudra kuryādvai śreyo.arthamātmanaḥ sadā |
nāruheta rathe.aśraddho yadīcchecchreya ātmanaḥ | | 83
rathamārohatastasya kṣayaṃ gacchati santatiḥ |
sa ratho devadevasya voḍhavyo brāhmaṇaiḥ sadā | | 84
kṣatriyaiścāpi vaiśyaiśca na tu śūdraiḥ kadācana |
ye tvanyadevatābhaktā ye ca madyapravartakāḥ | | 85
naitaiḥ śūdraiśca voḍhavya itaraistu sadohyate |
upavāsavratopetairvoḍhavyaḥ pārvatīpriya | | 86
svasthānāccalito rudra pūrvadvāraṃ vrajeta vai |
dinamekaṃ vasettatra pūjyamāno nṛpeṇa vai | | 87
nānāvidhaiḥ prekṣaṇakaiḥ purāṇaśravaṇena ca |
nānāvidhairbrahmaghoṣairbrāhmaṇānāṃ ca tarpaṇaiḥ | | 88
sthitvā tu tatrāṣṭamyantaṃ navamyāṃ calate punaḥ |
vrajeta dakṣiṇaṃ dvāraṃ nagarasya trilocana | | 89
tatrāpi dinamekaṃ tu tiṣṭhantendhakasūdana |
sthite.atra taiḥ pūjyamāno yathā rājñā tathā nṛpaiḥ | | 1.55.90
tasmādapi caledbhadra dvāraṃ paścāttatottaram |
tatrāpi pūjyaḥ śūdraistu vidhivatpriyadarśana | | 91
tasmācca calate rudra vrajenmadhyaṃ purasya tu |
tatrasthaṃ pūjayanti sma brāhmaṇāḥ śraddhayānvitāḥ | | 92
śaṃkhavāditranirghoṣaistathā prekṣaṇakairvaraiḥ |
brahmaghoṣaiśca vividhaiḥ samantāddīpakaiḥ śubhaiḥ | | 93
nānāvidhairvittadānairbrāhmaṇānāṃ ca tarpaṇaiḥ |
dīnāndhakṛpaṇānāṃ ca tarpaṇaistripurāntaka | | 94
puramadhyāttu calitastiṣṭhetprāpya svamaṃdiram |
itthaṃ prāpya sthito devaḥ purato maṃdirasya tu | | 95
tatra sthitaḥ pūjanīyo bhavetpaureṇa kṛtsnaśaḥ |
pūjyamānastvahorātraṃ rathārūḍhastu tiṣṭhati | | 96
apare dine vrajetsthānaṃ taccirantanamādarāt |
trayodaśyāṃ vyatītāyāṃ caturdaśyāṃ trilocana | | 97
sadaivaṃ bhrāmayeddevaṃ graheśaṃ duritāpaham |
parivārayutaṃ rudra sānugaṃ parameśvaram | | 98
iti śrobhaviṣye mahāpurāṇe śatārddhasāhasryāṃ saṃhitāyāṃ brāhme parvaṇi rathasaptamīkalpe
rathayātrāvarṇanaṃ nāma pañcapañcāśattamodhyāyaḥ | 55 |
atha ṣaṭapañcāśattamo.adhyāyaḥ
sūryarathayātrāvarṇanam
śrīrudra uvāca
kathaṃ pracālayedbrahman rathasthaṃ tamanāśanam |
anugāśca kathaṃ cāsya ke ca te anugā kramāt | | 1
bhūyobhūyaḥ suraśreṣṭha vistarānmama śreyase |
vada sarvaṃ jagannātha paraṃ kautūhalaṃ hi me | | 2
brahmovāca
śanairnayedrathaṃ rudra vartmanā su samena tu |
yathā paryaṭanaṃ tu syādviṣame pathi gacchataḥ | | 3
pratīhārarathaṃ pūrvaṃ nayenmārgaviśuddhaye |
tasmādanantaraṃ rudra daṇḍanāyakamādarāt | | 4
piṅgalaṃ ca tatastasya pṛṣṭhagaṃ cādarānnayet |
rakṣako dvārako yasmādrathārūḍhau tu pṛṣṭhataḥ | | 5
rathārūḍhastathā diṇḍī devasya purataḥ sthitaḥ |
tasmādapi tathā rudra lekhako bhāskarapriyaḥ | | 6
śanaiḥśanairnayedrudra rathaṃ devasya yatnataḥ |
yugākṣacakrabhaṅgo vā yathā na syāttrilocana | | 7
īṣābhaṅge dvijabhayaṃ bhagne.akṣe kṣatriyakṣayaḥ |
tulābhaṅge tu vaiśyānāṃ śayyāśūdrakṣayo bhavet | | 8
yugabhaṅge tvanāvṛṣṭiḥ pīṭhabhaṅge prajābhayam |
paracakrāgamaṃ 1 vidyāccakrabhaṅge rathasya tu | | 9
dhvajasya patane cāpi nṛpabhaṅgaṃ vinirdiśet |
vyaṅgitapratimāyāṃ tu rājño maraṇamādiśet | | 1.56.10
chatrabhaṅgādbhayaṃ rudra yuvarājño vinirdiśet |
utpanneṣvevamādyeṣu utpāteṣvaśubheṣu ca | | 11
balikarma punaḥ kuryācchāṃtihomaṃ tathaiva ca |
brāhmaṇānvācayedbhūyo dadyāddānāni caiva hi | | 12
pūrvottare ca digbhāge rathasyāgniṃ prakalpayet |
samidbhistu ghṛtāktābhirhomayejjātavedasam | | 13
svāhākārānvadansamyagdaivatebhyastvanukramāt |
grahebhyaśca prajābhyaśca nāmānyuddiśya homayet | | 14
prathamaṃ cāgnaye svāhā svāhā somāya caiva hi |
svāhā prajāpataye ca deyā āhutayaḥ kramāt | | 15
svastyastviha ca viprebhyaḥ svasti rājñe tathaiva ca |
gobhyaḥ svasti prajābhyaśca jagataḥ śāntirastu vai | | 16
śaṃ no.astu dvipade nityaṃ śāntirastu catuṣpade |
śaṃ prajābhyastathaivāstu śaṃ sadātmani cāstu vai | | 17
bhūḥ śāntirastu deveśa bhuvaḥ śāntistathaiva ca |
svaścaivāstu tathā śāntiḥ sarvatrāstu tathā raveḥ | | 18
tvaṃ deva jagataḥ sraṣṭā poṣṭā caiva tvameva hi |
prajāpāla graheśāna śāntiṃ kuru divaspate | | 19
idamanyacca vakṣyāmi śāntyā paramakāraṇam |
yātrākāraṇabhūtasya puruṣasya svajanmanaḥ | | 1.56.20
duḥsthāngrahāṃśca vijñāya grahaśāntiṃ samācaret |
prādeśamātrāḥ karttavyāḥ samidho.atha pramāṇataḥ | | 21
arkamayyo raveḥ kāryā pālāśyaḥ śaśinaḥ smṛtāḥ |
khādiryaścaiva bhaumāya āpāmārgyo.abjasūnave | | 22
āśvatthyaścātha jīvāya audumbaryaḥ sitāya ca |
asitāya śamīmayyo dūrvā kāryastu rāhave | |2 3
ketave tu kuśāḥ kāryāḥ dakṣiṇāścāpyataḥ śṛṇu |
sūryāya śobhanāṃ dhenuṃ śaṃkhaṃ dadyādathendave | | 24
raktamanaḍvāhaṃ bhaumāya kāñcanaṃ somasūnave |
jīvāya vāsasī deye śukrāyāśvaṃ sitaṃ hara | | 25
śanaiścarāya gāṃ nīlāṃ rāhave bhāṇḍapāyasam |
chāgaṃ tu ketave dadyācchṛṇveṣāṃ bhojanānyapi | | 26
guḍaudanaṃ tu sūryāya somāya ghṛtapāyasam |
haviṣyamannaṃ bhaumāya kṣīrānnaṃ somasūnave | | 27
dadhyodanaṃ tu jīvāya śukrāyātha ghṛtāśanam |
tilapiṣṭāṃśca māṣāśca sūryaputrāya dāpayet | | 28
rāhave dāpayenmāṃsaṃ ketave citramodanam |
sauvīramāranālaṃ ca svinnabījaṃ ca kāñjikam | | 29
yathā bāṇaprahārāṇāṃ vāraṇaṃ kavacaṃ smṛtam |
tathā daivopaghātānāṃ śāntirbhavati vāraṇam | | 1.56.30
ahiṃsakasya dāntasya dharmārjitadhanasya ca |
nityaṃ ca niyamasthasya sadā sānugrahā grahāḥ | | 31
grahāḥ pūjyāḥ sadā rudra icchatā vipulaṃ yaśaḥ |
śrīkāmaḥ śāntikāmo vā grahayajñaṃ samācaret | | 32
vṛṣṭyāyuḥpuṣṭikāmo vā tathaivābhicaranpunaḥ |
yānapatyā bhavennārī duṣprajāścāpi yā bhavet | | 33
bālā yasyāḥ pramriyante yā ca kanyāprajā bhavet |
rājyabhraṣṭo nṛpo yastu dīrgharogī ca yo bhavet | | 34
grahayajñaḥ smṛtasteṣāṃ mānavānāṃ manīṣibhiḥ |
tasmādasau sadā kāryaḥ śreyo.arthaṃ jānatā hara | | 35
dattapuṣpaḥ krūradṛkca puṣpajo dhiṣaṇastathā |
sitāsitau tathā rudra uparāgaḥ śikhī tathā | | 36
ete grahā mahābāho vidvadbhiḥ pūjitāḥ sadā | tāmrakātsphāṭikādraktacandanātsvarṇakādapi | 37
rājatādāyasātsīsādgrahāḥ kāryāḥ prayatnataḥ |
svarṇe vātha paṭe lekhyā yathāśāstraṃ maheśvara | | 38
yathāvarṇaṃ pradeyāni vāsāṃsi kusumāni ca |
gaṃdhāśca balayaścaiva dhūpo deyaśca guggulaḥ | | 39
kartavyā mantravaṃtaśca caravaḥ pratidaivatam |
ākṛṣṇena imaṃ devā agnirmūrdhā divaḥ kakut | | 1.56.40
udbudhyasva yathāsaṃkhyamṛca etāḥ prakīrtitāḥ |
bṛhaspate atiyadaryastathaivānnātparisrutaḥ | | 41
śaṃ no devī tathā kāṃḍātketuṃ kṛṇvannimāḥ kramāt |
pūrvoktāḥ samidhastvatra yathāśāstraṃ prahomayet | |4 2
ekaikasyāṣṭaśatakamaṣṭāviṃśatireva vā |
hotavyā madhusarpibhyāṃ dadhnā caiva samanvitāḥ | |4 3
pūrvoktabhojanaṃ yaddhi brāhmaṇebhyo nivedayet |
śaktito vā yathālābhaṃ dakṣiṇā tu vidhānataḥ | | 44
yaśca yasya yadā duḥsthaḥ sa taṃ yatnena pūjayet |
mayaiṣā hi varo dattaḥ pūjitāḥ pūjayiṣyatha | | 45
grahādhīnā nareṃdrāṇāmucchrayāḥ patanāni ca |
bhāvābhāvau ca jagatastasmātpūjyatamā grahāḥ | | 46
grahā gāvo narendrāśca guravo brāhmaṇāstathā |
pūjitaḥ pūjayantyete nirdahantyapamānitāḥ | | 47
yathā samutthitaṃ yantraṃ yantreṇaiva prahanyate |
tathā samutthitāṃ pīḍāṃ grahaśāntyā 3 praśāmayet | | 48
yajvanāṃ satyavākyānāṃ tathā nityopavāsinām |
japahomaparāṇāṃ ca sarvaṃ duṣṭaṃ praśāmyati | | 4 9
evaṃ kṛtvā prajāśāntiṃ kṛtvā ca svastivācanam |
punaḥ sajjaṃ rathaṃ kṛtvā kuryātprakamaṇaṃ hara | | 1.56.50
mārgaṃ śeṣaṃ nayitvā tu nayeddevālayaṃ ravim |
pūjayitvā tataḥ pūrvā yāḥ proktā rathadevatāḥ | | 51
yathā pūjyā grahāḥ sarve utpāteṣu trilocana |
rathadevāstathā pūjyā yāḥ sthitā rathamāśritāḥ | | 52
iti śrībhaviṣye mahāpurāṇe śatārddhasāhasryāṃ saṃhitāyāṃ brāhme parvaṇi saptamīkalpe
ādityamahimavarṇanaṃ nāma ṣaṭpañcāśattamo.adhyāyaḥ | 56 |

atha saptapañcāśattamo.adhyāyaḥ
rathayātrāvarṇanam
brahmovāca
kṣīraṃ yavāgūrbrahmaṇe syātparamānnaṃ trilocana |
phalāni kārtikeyasya dadyādbhūteśaprītaye | |
vivasvate madhu māṃsaṃ tathā madyaṃ ca suvrata | | 1
puruhūtāya bhakṣyāṇi sānugāya nivedayet |
havirannamagnaye syādagrānnaṃ viṣṇave tathā | | 2
rākṣasebhyaḥ samaireyaṃ dadyānmāṃsaudanaṃ hara |
saṃskṛtaṃ piśitānnaṃ ca revatāya nivedayet | | 3
tilānnaṃ pitṛrājāya dadyāttripurasūdana |
āśvinābhyāmapūpāṃstu vasubhyo māṃsamodanam | | 4
pitṛbhyaḥ pāyasaṃ dadyādghṛtāktaṃ madhunā saha |
kātyāyanyai yavāgūṃ ca śriyai dadyāttathā dadhi | | 5
sarasvatyai trimadhuraṃ varuṇāyekṣurasaudanam |
khāḍavānnaṃ dhanapatāvevaṃ mitre trilocana | | 6
sasnehena tu takreṇa marudbhyastarpaṇaṃ smṛtam |
māṃsānnabhaktasūpāṃśca mātṛbhyo vai nivedayet | | 7
ullepikāśca bhūtebhyo jalaṃ sūryāya vai hara |
dadyādgaṇādhipataye modakāṃstripurāntaka | | 8
śaṣkulyastu nairṛtāya deyāḥ syurgaṇanāyaka |
sarvabhakṣyāṇi viśvebhyo dātavyāni samantataḥ | | 9
kṣīraudanamṛṣibhyastu kṣīraṃ nāgebhya eva hi |
sūryarathāya baliṃ dadyātkuryādvai sārvabhautikam | | 1.57.10
udvartanaṃ surā māṃsaṃ tadvāhebhyaśca bhārata |
ājyaṃ ca brahmaṇe dadyāttryambakāya tilāṃstathā | | 11
svāhātanaye vai lājā dātavyāstripurāntaka |
bhāskarāya sadā dadyātkovidāraṃ trilocana | | 12
rājavṛkṣaṃ tathendrāya haviṣyaṃ pāvakāya ca |
cakriṇe saptadhānyaṃ ca garuḍe matsyamodanam | | 13
yakṣebhyo vividhānnāni niryāsaṃ revate tyajet |
vaikaṃkatasrajo rudra yamāya parikīrtitāḥ | | 14
deyaṃ syātkarṇikāraṃ tu aśvibhyāṃ vṛṣabhadhvaja |
śriyai padmāni deyāni caṃḍikāya sucaṃdanam | | 15
navanītaṃ sarasvatyai vinatāyai tathāmiṣam |
puṣpāṇyapsarasāṃ rudra mālatyāḥ parikīrttitam | | 16
varuṇāyāgnimanthaṃ tu phalaṃ mūlaṃ nirṛtaye |
bilvaṃ dadyātkuberāya kapitthaṃ marutāṃ tathā | | 17
gaṃdharvebhyastvāragvadhaṃ dadyāttripurasūdana |
vāsavebhyastu karpūraṃ dadyāddāru gaṇādhipe | | 18
pitṛbhyaḥ piṇḍamūlāni bhūtebhyaśca bibhītakam |
gobhyo yavānpradadyādvai mātṛbhyaścākṣatānhara | | 19
guggulaṃ vighnapataye viśvebhyo deyamodanam |
ṛṣibhyo brahmavṛkṣaṃ tu nāgebhyo viṣamuttamam | | 1.57.20
bhāskarasyeha deyāni sakalāni gaṇādhipa |
madhusarpistathoktāni gairikasya trilocana | | 21
nyagrodhaṃ tasya vāhebhyo bhaktyā rudra nivedayet |
sāyaṃ prātastu madhyāhne sadaikāgramanā hara | | 22
sarveṣāṃ śaktito bhaktyā daheddhūpaṃ vicakṣaṇaḥ |
mantrato devaśārdūla yo yasyeha prakīrtitaḥ | | 23
śāntyarthaṃ brāhmaṇebhyastu tilāndadyādvicakṣaṇaḥ |
vaiśvānare vā juhuyād ghṛtena sahitānhara | | 24
devānāmamṛtaṃ hyete pitṛrṇāṃ hi svadhāmṛtam |
śaraṇaṃ brāhmaṇānāṃ ca sadā hyetānvidurbudhāḥ | | 25
kasyapasyāṅgajā hyete pavitrāśca tathā hara |
snāne dāne tathā home tarpaṇehyaśane parāḥ | | 26
itthaṃ devāngrahāṃścaiva pūjayitvā prayatnataḥ |
avatārya rathāccainaṃ maṇḍale sthāpayetpunaḥ | | 27
kṛtvā tvārārtikaṃ yatnāddīpatoyayavākṣataiḥ 1 |
kārpāsabījalavaṇatuṣairdurdṛṣṭiśāntaye | | 28
vedīmāropayetpaścātpatnībhyāṃ saha suvrata |
tatrasthaṃ pūjayeddevaṃ dināni daśa suvrata | | 29
daśāhiketi vikhyātā yā pūjā bhūtale hara |
tayā sampūyeddevaṃ caturthe.ahni tathā hara | | 1.57.30
caturthe.ahani kartavyaṃ yatnāddhi snapanaṃ raveḥ |
abhyaṅgabhojanādyaistu pūjāsatkāramaṇḍalaiḥ | | 31
anena vidhinā pūjya daśāhāni divākaram |
tato nayetparaṃ sthānaṃ yattatpūrvamathālayam | | 32
iti śrībhaviṣye mahāpurāṇe śatārddhasāhasryāṃ saṃhitāyāṃ brāhme parvaṇi rathasaptamīkalpa
