ādityamahimavarṇanaṃ nāma saptapañcāśattamo.adhyāyaḥ | 57 |
athāṣṭapañcāśattamo.adhyāyaḥ
ratha-yātrāvarṇanam
brahmovāca
anena vidhinā yastu kuryādvā kārayeta vā |
yātrāṃ bhagavato bhaktyā bhāskarasyāmitaujasaḥ | | 1
sa parārdhaṃ tu varṣāṇāṃ sūryaloke mahīyate |
kule na jāyate tasya daridro vyādhito.api vā | | 2
abhyaṅgāya ghṛtaṃ yastu bhāskarāya prayacchati |
kṛte tu varṇatilake sa gacchetsurabhī 1 puram | | 3
tīrthodakaṃ tu yo bhaktyā gaṃgāyāśca tathodakam |
snānārthamānayedyastu bhāskarasya trilocana | |4
bhaktyā varṇatrayaṃ dadyādbhāskarasya trilocana | samāpyehākhilānkāmānprāpnuyādvaruṇālayam | | 5
raktavarṇaṃ tu yo dadyāddhaviṣyānnaṃ guḍaudanam |
sa gaccheddīptimānrudra sūryalokaṃ puraṃ varam | | 6
gacchetpuravare rudra yatra devaḥ prajāpatiḥ |
snāpayedyastu vā bhaktyā bhāskaraṃ pūjayettathā | | 7
sa gaccheddīptimānrudra sūryalokaṃ na saṃśayaḥ |
rathamāropayedyastu rathamārgaṃ pramārjati | | 8
sa yāti vātasālokyaṃ vātatulyaparākramaḥ |
rathasya gacchato yastu mārge kuryātsumaṇḍalam | | 9
sa lokaṃ prāpnuyātpuṇyaṃ mārutaṃ nātra saṃśayaḥ |
sūryasya gacchato yastu mārgaṃ kuryātsumaṇḍalam | | 1.58.10
sa lokaṃ prāpnuyātpuṇyaṃ yaḥ kuryānmārgamādarāt |
puṣpaprakaraśobhāḍhyaṃ śubhatoraṇamaṇḍitam | | 11
śaṃkhatūryaninādāḍhyaṃ tathā prekṣaṇakānvitam |
sa yāti paramaṃ sthānaṃ yatra devo vibhāvasuḥ | | 12
devena sahito yastu nṛtyangāyaṃstathārcayan |
kuryānmahotsavaṃ bhaktyā sa yāti paramaṃ padam | | 13
prajāgaraṃ yastu kuryāddeve rathagate ravau |
sa sukhī puṇyavānnityaṃ modate śāśvatīḥ samāḥ | | 14
bhaktadāsādikaṃ 1 sarvaṃ yo dadāti ravernaraḥ | samprāpyehākhilānkāmānsūryalokamavāpnuyāt | | 15
rathārūḍhasya sūryasya bhramato darśanaṃ hara |
durlabhaṃ devaśārdūla viśeṣātpurato vrajan | | 16
uttarābhimukhaṃ yāntaṃ tathā vai dakṣiṇāmukham |
dhanyaḥ paśyati deveśaṃ bhāskaraṃ bhaktavatsalam | | 17
atha saṃvatsare prāpye bhānoryātrādine yadi |
rathaprakamaṇaṃ tatra na kathañcitkṛtaṃ bhavet | | 18
tato vai dvādaśe varṣe kartavyaṃ bhūtimicchatā |
indradhvajasya cāpyevaṃ yadi notthāpanaṃ kṛtam | | 19
tato vai dvādaśe varṣe kartavyaṃ nāntarā punaḥ |
yātrāyāścāpi ye bhaṅgaṃ kurvanti vṛṣabhadhvaja | | 1.58.20
mandehā nāma te jñeyā rākṣasā nātra saṃśayaḥ |
ye kurvanti tathā yātrāṃ narā dharmadhvajasya tu | | 21
indrādidevāste jñeyā gatāśca paramaṃ padam |
punaryātrāvidhiṃ cemaṃ samāsātkathayāmi te | | 22
yaṃ śrutvā sarvapāpebhyo mucyate nātra saṃśayaḥ |
vartamāne tu vai māghe rathe devagaṇāśrite | | 23
sa tasminneva manasā sthāpanīyo rathopari |
dyaurmahī ca dvimūrtisthe yathāpūrvaṃ pratiṣṭhite | | 24
tathaiva rājñī dyaurjñeyā nikṣubhā pṛthivī smṛtā |
etābhyāmapi devībhyāṃ yathaiva savitustathā | | 25
diṇḍinaḥ piṃgalādīnāṃ pṛthuḥ kāryo rathakramaḥ |
manasā cintayedanyāṃ yathāsthāneṣu devatām | | 26
dikpālāṃllokapālāṃśca kalpayetmanasaiva tu |
devo vedamayaścāyaṃ sarvadevamayastathā | | 27
maṃḍalamṛṅmayaṃ caiva chandāṃsyāsyaṃ prakīrtitam |
gāyatrī caiva triṣṭupca jagatyanuṣṭubeva ca | | 28
paṃktiśca bṛhatī caiva uṣṇigeva ca saptamī |
tato devamayātvācca cchandasāṃ caiva kalpanāt | | 29
tato vedamayātvācca taraṇirlokapūjitaḥ |
rathaprakamaṇātsūryo voḍhavyo brahmavādibhiḥ | | 1.58.30
upavāsaparairyuktairvedavedāṃgapāragaiḥ |
rathaṃ tu nāruhecchūdro bhāskarasya trilocana | | 31
āruhya taraṇeryānaṃ vrajecchūdro hyadhogatim |
yathoktakaraṇādrudra sadā śāntirbhavennṛṇām | | 32
nāyakaścāpi sarveṣāṃ devānāṃ tu divākaraḥ |
vinyasettu rathānāṃ tu devatāyataneṣu ca | | 33
tato dhūpopahāraistu pūjayetprathamaṃ ravim |
digdevānucarāṃścaiva pūjayetpūjyate śriyā | | 34
apūjya prathamaṃ sūryamaparānyastu pūjayet |
tattadbhūtakṛtaṃ pādyaṃ na pragṛhṇanti devatāḥ | | 35
yātrākāle tu samprāpte saviturdīkṣitāṃ tanum |
ye drakṣyaṃti narā bhaktyā te bhaviṣyantyakalmaṣāḥ | | 36
paurṇamāsyāmamāyāṃ ca darśanaṃ puṇyadaṃ smṛtam |
saptamyāṃ ca tathā ṣaṣṭhyāṃ dine tasya ravestathā | | 37
āṣāḍhī kārttikī māghī tithyaḥ puṇyatamāḥ smṛtāḥ |
mahābhāgyaṃ tithe puṇyaṃ yathā śāstreṣu gīyate | | 38
kārttikyāṃ tu viśeṣeṇa mahākārtikyudāhṛtā |
evaṃ kālasamāyogādyātrākālo viśiṣyate | | 39
darśanaṃ ca mahāpuṇyaṃ sarvapāpaharaṃ bhavet |
upavāsaparo yastu tasminkāle yatavrataḥ | |1.58.4 0
pūjayettu raviṃ bhaktyā sa gacchetparamāṃ gatim |
devo.ayaṃ yajñapuruṣo lokānugrahakāṃkṣayā | | 41
pratimāvasthito bhūtvā pūjāṃ gṛhṇātyanugrahāt | snānāddānājjapāddhomātsaṃyogāddevakarmaṇaḥ | | 42
kūrcānāṃ vapanāccaiva dīkṣitaḥ puruṣo bhavet |
kacānāṃ vāpanaṃ kāryaṃ sūryabhaktaiḥ sadā naraiḥ | | 43
sūryakratau śucistvevaṃ dīkṣitaḥ puruṣo bhavet |
caturṇāmapi varṇānāṃ bhaktyā sūryasya nityadā | | 44
evaṃ ye.atra kariṣyanti te narā nityadīkṣitāḥ |
cīrṇavratā mahātmānaste yāsyanti parāṃ gatim | | 45
ityeṣā kathitā rudra rathayātrā divaspateḥ |
yāṃ śrutvā vācayitvā sarvarogairvimucyate | | 46
kṛtvā ca vidhivadbhaktyā yāti sūryasado naraḥ |
rathāhvā kathitā rudra samāsātsaptamī śubhā | | 47
bhūyo.api śrūyatāṃ rudra saptamī gadato mama | |48
iti śrībhaviṣye mahāpurāṇe śatārddhasāhasryāṃ saṃhitāyāṃ brāhme parvaṇi saptamīkalpe
rathayātrā varṇanaṃ nāmāṣṭapañcāśattamo.adhyāya | 58 |
athaikonaṣaṣṭitamo.adhyāyaḥ
rathasaptamīmāhātmyavarṇanam
brahmovāca
māghe māsi tathā deva site pakṣe jitendriyaḥ |
ṣaṣṭhyāmupoṣito bhūtvā gandhapuṣpopahārataḥ | | 1
pūjayitvā dinakaraṃ rātrau tasyāgrataḥ svapet |
vibuddhastvatha saptamyāṃ bhaktyā bhānuṃ samarcayet | | 2
brāhmaṇānbhojayetpaścādvittaśāṭhyaṃ vivarjayet |
khaṇḍaveṣṭairmodakaiśca tathekṣuguḍapūpakaiḥ | | 3
atha saṃvatsare pūrṇe saptamyāṃ kārayedbudhaḥ |
devadevasya vai yātrāṃ pūrvoktavidhinā hara | | 4
kṛṣṇapakṣe tu yaḥ kṛtvā rathamārohitaṃ ravim |
paśyedbhaktyā jagannāthaṃ sa yāti paramāṃ gatim | | 5
tṛtīyāyāmaikabhaktaṃ caturthyāṃ naktamucyate |
pañcamyāmayācitaṃ syātṣaṣṭhyāṃ caivamupoṣaṇam | | 6
saptamyāṃ pāraṇaṃ kuryāddṛṣṭvā devaṃ rathe sthitam |
pūjayitvā ca vidhinā śaktyā bhaktyā trilocana | | 7
sauvarṇaṃ tu rathaṃ kṛtvā tāmrapātropari sthitam |
rathamadhye nyasedvyoma pūjitaṃ maṇibhirhara | | 8
padmarāgaṃ nyasenmadhye mauktikaṃ pūrvato nyaset |
iṃdranīlamatho yāmyāṃ vāruṇyāṃ marakataṃ hara | | 9
pravālamuttare rudra savajraṃ vinyased budhaḥ |
śvetaṃ pītāsitaṃ cāpi raktaṃ cāndhakasūdana | | 1.59.10
etāni tāta vastrāṇi dikṣu sarvāsu vinyaset |
patākākārasaṃsthānaṃ ghaṇṭābharaṇabhūṣitam | | 11
puṣpairdāmairalaṃkṛtya rathaṃ rudra samantataḥ |
yathānyāyaṃ pūjayitvā bhāskarāya nivedayet | | 12
bhojayitvātha vā viprānācāryāya nivedayet |
yo.adhīte saptamīkalpaṃ sopākhyānaṃ ca bhārata | | 13
ācāryaḥ sa dvijo jñeyo varṇānāmanupūrvaśaḥ |
saurāṇāṃ vaiṣṇavānāṃ tu śaivānāṃ pārvatīpriya | | 14
alābhe tu suvarṇasya rathaṃ rājatamādiśet |
tadalābhe tāmramayaṃ rathaṃ vyoma ca kārayet | | 15
abhāve cāpi tāmrasya rathaḥ piṣṭamayaḥ smṛtaḥ |
sahiraṇyo mahādeva tāmrabhājanamāśritaḥ | | 16
kauśeyayugmasahitaṃ brāhmaṇāya nivedayet |
pūrvoktāya mahādeva vācakāya mahātmane | | 17
pañcaratnasamāyuktaṃ gubhagandhādhivāsitam |
svaśaktyā tu virūpākṣa vittaśāṭhyaṃ vivarjayet | | 18
eṣā puṇyā pāpaharā rathāhvā saptamī hara |
kathitā te mayā rudra mahatīyaṃ prakīrtitā | | 19
snānaṃ dānamatho homaḥ pūjā grahapaterhara |
śatasāhasraṃ bhavedasyāṃ kṛtaṃ bhūdharavidyate | | 1.59.20
evameṣā puṇyatamā māghe proktā tu saptamī |
yāmupoṣya naro bhaktyā sūryasyānucaro bhavet | | 21
brāhmaṇo yāti devatvaṃ kṣatriyo vipratāṃ vrajet |
vaiśyaḥ kṣatriyatāṃ yāti śūdro vaiśyatvameti ca | | 22
vidyāvinayasampannaṃ bharttāraṃ 3 kanyakā labhet |
aputrā strī sutaṃ vindetsaumāgyaṃ ca gaṇādhipa | | 23
vidhavā cāpyupoṣyemāṃ saptamīṃ tripurāntaka |
nānyajanmasu vaidhavyaṃ prāpnuyātpārvatīpriya | | 24
bahuputrā bahudhanā patyurvallabhatāṃ vrajet |
yāvadvai sapta janmāni striyastu puruṣāstathā | | 25
evaṃvidhā saptamī te kathitā vṛṣabhadhvaja |
yāṃ śrutvā mānavo bhaktyā mucyate brahmahatyayā | | 26
iti śrībhaviṣye mahāpurāṇe śatārdhasāhasryāṃ saṃhitāyāṃ brāhme parvaṇi saptamīkalpe
rathasaptamīmāhātmyavarṇanaṃ nāmaikonaṣaṣṭitamo.adhyāyaḥ | 59 |

atha ṣaṣṭitamo.adhyāyaḥ
rathayātrāvarṇanam
sumanturuvāca
ityuktvā sa jagāmāśu surajyeṣṭhaṃ trilocanam |
rathayātrā mahābāho sūryasyetyamitaujasaḥ | | 1
śatānīka uvāca
yamārādhya jagannāthaṃ mama pūrvapitāmahāḥ |
tuṣṭyarthaṃ brāhmaṇānāṃ tu annamāpuścaturvidham | | 2
tasya devasya māhātmyaṃ śrutaṃ ca bahuśo mayā |
devarṣisiddhamanujaiḥ stutasya hi dinedine | | 2
kaḥ stotumīśastamajaṃ yasyaitatsacarācaram |
avyayasyāprameyasya vibudhyetodayājjagat | | 4
karābhyāṃ yasya deveśau kaviṣṇū lokapūjitau |
utpannau dvijaśārdūla lalāṭāttripurāntakaḥ | | 5
tasya devasya kaiḥ śakyā vaktuṃ sarvā vibhūtayaḥ |
so.ahamicchāmi devasya tasya sarvātmanā dvija | | 6
śrotumārādhanaṃ yena nistareyaṃ bhavārṇavam |
kenopāyena mantrairvā rahasyaiḥ paricaryayā | | 7
dānairvṛtopavāsairvā homairjāpyairathāpi vā |
ārādhitaḥ samastānāṃ kleśānāṃ hānido bhavet | | 8
saikā vidyā hi vidyānāṃ yayā tuṣyati sarvakṛt |
śrutānāmapi tatpuṇyaṃ yatra bhānoḥ prakīrtanam | | 9
rahasyānāṃ rahasyaṃ tadyena haṃsaḥ prasīdati |
ekaḥ śreṣṭhatamo maṃtrastadekaṃ paramaṃ vratam | | 1.60.10
upoṣitaṃ ca tacchreṣṭhaṃ yena bhānuḥ prasīdati |
sā caikā rasanā dhanyā mārtaṇḍaṃ stauti yā sadā | | 11
tadekaṃ nirmalaṃ cittaṃ yadgataṃ satataṃ ravau |
ślāghyānāmapi tau ślāghyāviha loke paratra ca | | 12
yo sadā dvijaśārdūla bhānoḥ pūjākarau karau |
tadekaṃ kevalaṃ dhanyaṃ śarīraṃ sarvajantuṣu | | 13
yadeva pulakodbhāsi bhānornāmānukīrtane |
sā jihvā kaṇṭhatālūkamatha vā pratijihvikā | | 14
atha vā sāparo rogo yā na vakti raverguṇam |
navadvārāṇi santyasminpure puruṣasattama | | 15
prākāraistvāvṛte viṣvagvṛthā tāni vidurbudhāḥ |
dattvāvadhānaṃ yacchabde vinaiva ravisaṃstutim | | 16
śreyasāṃ na hi. samprāptau puruṣāṇāṃ viceṣṭitam |
janmanyaviphalā sevā kṛtā yāśritya bhāskaram | | 17
durgasaṃsārakāṃtāramapāramabhidhāvatām |
eko bhānunamaskāraḥ saṃsārārṇavatārakaḥ | | 18
ratnānāmākaro meruḥ sarvāścaryamayaṃ nabhaḥ |
tīrthānāmāśrayo gaṃgā devānāmāśrayo raviḥ | | 19
evamādiguṇo bhogo bhānoramitatejasaḥ |
śruto me bahuśaḥ siddhairgīyamānaistathāmaraiḥ | | 1.60.20
so.ahamicchāmi taṃ devaṃ saptalokaparāyaṇam |
divākaramaśeṣasya jagato hṛdyavasthitam | | 21
ārādhayitumīśeśaṃ bhāskaraṃ cāmitaujasam |
mārtaṇḍaṃ bhuvanādhāraṃ smṛtamātrāghadāriṇam | | 22
iti śrībhaviṣye mahāpurāṇe śatārddhasāhasryāṃ saṃhitāyāṃ brāhme parvaṇi
saptamīkalpe sūryaparicaryāvarṇanaṃ nāma ṣaṣṭitamo.adhyāyaḥ | 60 |

athaikaṣaṣṭitamo.adhyāyaḥ
sūrya-mahimāvarṇanam
sumanturuvāca
tamekamakṣaraṃ dhāma paraṃ sadasatormahat |
bhedābhedasvarūpasthaṃ praṇipatya raviṃ nṛpa | | 1
pravakṣyāmi yathāpūrvaṃ viriñcena mahātmanā |
ṛṣīṇāṃ kathitaṃ pūrvaṃ taṃ nibodha narādhipa | | 2
ārādhanāya saviturmahātmā padmasaṃbhavaḥ |
yogaṃ brahmaparaṃ prāha maharṣīṇāṃ yathā prabhuḥ | | 3
samastavṛttisaṃrodhātkaivalyapratipādakam |
tadā jagatpatirbrahmā praṇipatya maharṣibhiḥ | |4
sarvaiḥ kilokto bhagavānātmayoniḥ prajāhitam |
yoyaṃ yogo bhagavatā prokto vṛttinirodhajaḥ | | 5
prāptuṃ śakyaḥ sa tvanekairjanmabhirjagataḥ pate |
viṣayā durjayā nṛrṇāmindriyākarṣiṇaḥ prabho | | 6
vṛttayaścetasaścāpi cañcalasyāpi durdharā |
rāgādayaḥ kathaṃ jetuṃ śakyā varṣaśatairapi | | 7
na yogayogyaṃ bhavati mana ebhiranirjitaiḥ |
alpāyuṣaśca puruṣā brahmankṛtayugepyamī | | 8
tretāyāṃ dvāpare caiva kimu prāpte kalau yuge |
bhagavaṃstvāmupāsīnānprasanno vaktumarhasi | | 9
anāyāsena yenaiva uttarema bhavārṇavam |
duḥkhāmbumagnāḥ puruṣāḥ prāpya brahmanmahāplavam | | 1.61.10
uttarema bhavāmbhodhiṃ tathā tvamanuciṃtaya |
evamuktastadā brahmākriyāyogaṃ mahātmanām | | 11
teṣāmṛṣīṇāmācaṣṭa narāṇāṃ hitakāmyayā |
ārādhayata viśveśaṃ divākaramatandritāḥ | | 12
bāhyālambanasāpekṣāstamajaṃ jagataḥ patim |
ijyāpūjānamaskāraśuśrūṣābhiraharniśam | | 13
vratopavāsairvividhairbrāhmaṇānāṃ ca tarpaṇaṃ |
taistaiścābhimataiḥ kāmairye ca cetasi tuṣṭidāḥ | | 14
aparicchedyamāhātmyamārādhayata bhāskaram | tanniṣṭhāstadgatadhiyastatkarmāṇastadāśrayāḥ | | 15
taddṛṣṭayastanmanasaḥ sarvasmintsa iti sthitāḥ |
samastānyatha karmāṇi tatra sarvātmanātmani | | 16
saṃnyasadhvaṃ sa vaḥ karttā samastāvaraṇakṣayam |
etattadakṣaraṃ brahma pradhānapuruṣāvubhau | | 17
yato yasminyathā cobhau sarvayyāpinyavasthitau |
paraḥ parāṇāṃ paramaḥ saikaḥ sumanasāṃ paraḥ | | 18
yasmādbhinnamidaṃ sarvaṃ yaccedaṃ yacca neṅgati | mokṣakāraṇamavyaktamacintyamaparigraham | |
samārādhya jagannāthaṃ kriyāyogena mucyate | | 19
iti te brahmaṇaḥ śrutvā rahasyamṛṣisattamāḥ | | 1.61.20
narāṇāmupakārāya yogaśāstrāṇi cakrire |
kriyāyogaparāṇīha muktikārīṇyanekaśaḥ | | 21
ārādhyate jagannāthastadanuṣṭhānatatparaiḥ |
paramātmā sa mārtaṇḍaḥ sarveśaḥ sarvabhāvanaḥ | | 22
yānyuktāni purā tena brahmaṇā kurunandana |
tāni te kuruśārdūla sarvapāpaharāṇyaham | | 23
vakṣyāmi śrūyatāmadya rahasyamidamuttamam |
saṃsārārṇavamagnānāṃ viṣayākrāṃtacetasām | | 24
haṃsapotaṃ vinā nānyatkiṃcidasti parāyaṇam |
uttiṣṭhaṃściṃtaya raviṃ vrajaṃściṃtaya gopatim | | 25
bhuñjaṃściṃtaya mārtaṃḍaṃ svapāṃściṃtaya bhāskaram |
evamekāgracittastvaṃ saṃśritaḥ satataṃ ravim | | 26
janmamṛtyumahāgrāhaṃ saṃsārāmbhastariṣyasi | | 27
graheśamīśaṃ varadaṃ purāṇaṃ jagadvidhātāramajaṃ ca nityam |
samāśritā ye ravimīśitāraṃ teṣāṃ bhavo nāsti vimuktibhājām | | 28
iti śrībhaviṣye mahāpurāṇe śatārddhasāhasryāṃ saṃhitāyāṃ brāhme parvaṇi saptamīkalpe
sūryayogamahimavarṇanaṃ nāmaikaṣaṣṭitamo.adhyāyaḥ | 61 |
atha dviṣaṣṭitamo.adhyāyaḥ
sūryadiṇḍīsaṃvādam
sumanturuvāca
athānyaṃ sarahasyaṃ tu saṃvādaṃ vacmi te.akhilam |
sūryasya diṇḍinā sārdhaṃ sarvapāpapraṇāśanam | | 1
brahmahatyābhibhūtastu parā diṃḍirmahātapāḥ |
ārādhanāya devasya stotraṃ cakre mahātmanaḥ | | 2
śrutvā tasyārthataḥ stotraṃ tutoṣa bhagavānraviḥ |
uvāca devadevastaṃ diṇḍinaṃ gaṇanāyakam | | 3
āditya uvāca
haṃta diṇḍe prasanno.asmi bhaktyā stotreṇa te.anagha |
varaṃ vṛṇīṣva dharmajña yatte manasi vartate | | 4
diṇḍiruvāca
eṣa eva varaḥ ślāghyo yatprāpto.asi mamāntikam |
tvaddarśanamapuṇyānāṃ svapneṣvapi ca durlabham | | 5
yathaiṣā brahmahatyā me āgatā lokagarhitā |
bhavāñjānāti sarveśo hadisthaḥ sarvadehinām | | 6
tvatprasādānmameśāna nāśamāśu prayātu vai |
tathā ca duritaṃ sarvaṃ yaccānyallokagarhitam | | 7
yadyadicchāmyahaṃ tattatsarvamastu divaspate |
etenaivānumānena prasanno bhagavanniti | | 8
jñātaṃ mayā hi mārtaṇḍe nāprasanne vibhūtayaḥ |
evaṃ sarvasukhāhlādamadhyastho.api hi bhānumān | | 9
tvaṃ māmagādhe saṃsāre magnamuddhartumarhasi |
sukhāni tāni caivānte teṣāṃ duḥkhaṃ na tatsukham | | 1.62.10
yadā tu duḥkhamāgāmi kiṃ vā kasyaiva bhakṣaṇāt |
tatprasādaṃ kuru vibho jagatāṃ tvaṃ jagatpate | | 11
jñānadānena yenaivamuttareyaṃ bhavārṇavam |
ityuktastena mārtaṇḍaḥ kathayāmāsa yogavit | | 12
yogaṃ nirbījamatyantaṃ duḥkhasaṃyogabheṣajam |
śrutvā yogaṃ tu taṃ diṇḍirnirbījaṃ niṣkalaṃ babhau | | 13
praṇipatya mahātejā idaṃ vacanamabravīt |
devadeva tvayā yogo yaḥ prokto dhvāntanāśana | |
naiṣa prāpyo mayā nānyairmānavairajitendriyaiḥ | | 14
viṣayā durjayāḥ puṃbhirindriyākarṣiṇaḥ sadā |
indriyāṇāṃ jayo yuktaḥ kaḥ śaktānāṃ kariṣyati | | 15
ahaṃmametivikhyātirdurjayaṃ cañcalaṃ manaḥ |
rāgādayastathā tyaktuṃ śakyā janmāntarairyadi | | 16
so.ahamicchāmi deveśa tvatprasādādanirjitaiḥ |
rāgādibhiramartyatvaṃ prāpuḥ prakṣīṇakalmaṣāḥ | | 17
āditya uvāca
yadyevaṃ muktikāmastvaṃ gaṇanātha śṛṇuṣva tam |
kriyāyogaṃ samastānāṃ kleśānāṃ hānikārakam || 18.
manmanā bhava madbhakto madyājī māṃ namaskuru |
māmevaiṣyasi yuktvaivamātmānaṃ matparāyaṇaḥ | | 19
madbhāvanā madyajanā madbhaktā matparāyaṇāḥ |
mama pūjākarāścaiva mayi yānti layaṃ narāḥ | | 1.62.20
sarvabhūteṣu māṃ paśyanmamavasthitamīśvaram |
karttāsi kena caiva tvamevaṃ doṣānprahāsyasi | | 21
jaṅgamājaṅgame jñāte mayyāsakte samantataḥ |
rāgalobhādināśena bhavitrī kṛtakṛtyatā | | 22
bhaktyātipraṇayasyāpi cañcalatvānmano yadi |
mayyāveśaṃ dadhad bhūyaḥ kuru madrūpiṇīṃ tanum | | 23
suvarṇarajatādyaistvaṃ śailamṛddārulekhanam |
pūjopahārairvividhaiḥ sampūjaya trilocanam | | 24
tasyāśritaṃ samāviśya sarvabhāvena sarvadā |
pūjitā saiva te bhaktyā dhyātā caivopakāriṇī | | 25
gacchaṃstiṣṭhansvapanbhuñjastāmevāgre ca pṛṣṭhataḥ |
uparyadhastathā pārśve cintayaṃstanmayaśca vai | | 26
snānaistīrthodakairhadyaiḥ puṣpairgandhānulepanaiḥ |
vāsobhirbhūṣaṇairbhakṣyairgītavādyairmanoramaiḥ | | 27
yacca yacca taveṣṭaṃ vai kiñcidbhojyādikaṃ tava |
bhaktinamro gaṇaśreṣṭha prīṇayasva kṛtiṃ mama | | 28
rāgeṇākṛṣyate tāta gandharvābhimukhaṃ yadi |
mayi buddhiṃ samāveśya gāyethā yāḥ kathā mama | | 29
kathayā ramate ceto yadi tadbhavato mama |
śrotavyāḥ prītiyogena matsvarūpodayāḥ kathāḥ | | 1.62.30
evaṃ samarpitamanāścetaso ye.atha āśrayāḥ |
heyāstānnikhilāndiṇḍe parityajya sukhī bhava | | 31
akṣīṇarāgadveṣo.api matpriyaḥ paramaḥ param |
padamāpnoṣi mā bhaiṣīrmayyarpitamanā bhava | | 32
mayi saṃnyasya sarvaṃ tvamātmānaṃ yatnavānbhava |
madarthaṃ kuru karmāṇi mā ca dharmavyatikramam | | 33
evaṃ vyapohya hatyāstvaṃ brahmaṇa mokṣyase bhavāt |
etenaivopadeśena vyākhyātamakhilaṃ tava | | 34
kriyāyogaṃ samāsthāya madarpitamanā bhava | | 35
diṇḍiruvāca
maddhitāya jagannātha kriyāyogāmṛtaṃ mama |
vistareṇa samākhyāhi prasannastvaṃ hi duḥkhahā | | 36
tvāmṛte na hi tadvaktuṃ samartho.anyo jagadguro |
guhyametatpavitraṃ ca tadācakṣva prasīda me | | 37
āditya uvāca
ākhyāsyate tadakhilaṃ nirvikalpaṃ gaṇādhipa |
ityuktvāntardadhe devaḥ sarvalokapradīpakaḥ | | 38
sa ca diṇḍirmahātejā jagāmāśu nabhogatim | | 39
iti śrībhaviṣye mahāpurāṇe śatārddhasāhasryāṃ saṃhitāyāṃ brāhme parvaṇi
diṇḍyādityasaṃvādavarṇanaṃ nāma dviṣaṣṭitamo.adhyāya | 62 |
atha triṣaṣṭitamo.adhyāyaḥ
ādityamahimāvarṇanam
sumanturuvāca
praṇamya śirasā devaṃ surajyeṣṭhaṃ caturmukham |
uvāca sa mahātejā diṇḍirlokeśamādarāt | | 1
devadevena bhavatādiṣṭo.asmi ca mahātmanā |
kriyāyogāmṛtaṃ sarvamākhyāsyati bhavānkila | | 2
sa tvāṃ pṛcchāmyahaṃ brahmankriyāyogaṃ nirantaram |
santoṣayitumīśehaṃ yathāvadvaktumarhasi | | 3
brahmovāca
ehyehi matsakāśaṃ ca matsamīpe gaṇādhipa |
brahmahatyā praṇaṣṭā te darśanādeva tasya tu | | 4
anugrāhyo.asi bhūteśa bhāskarasyāmitaujasaḥ |
ārādhanāya bhūteśa yadīśe pravaṇaṃ manaḥ | | 5
yadi devapatiṃ bhānumārādhayitumicchasi |
bhagavantamanādyantaṃ bhava dīkṣāguṇānvitaḥ | | 6
na hyadīkṣānvitairbhānurjñātu stotuṃ ca tattvataḥ |
draṣṭuṃ vā śakyate mūḍhaiḥ praveṣṭuṃ kuta eva hi | | 7
janmabhirbahubhiḥ pūtā narāstadgatacetasaḥ |
bhavanti bhagavansaurāstadā dīkṣāguṇānvitāḥ | | 8
anekajanmasaṃsāracite pāpasamuccaye |
nākṣīṇe jāyate puṃsāṃ mārtaṇḍābhimukhī matiḥ | | 9
pradveṣaṃ yāti mārtaṇḍe dvijānvedāṃśca nindati |
yo narastaṃ vijānīyātpāpabījasamudbhavam 1 | | 1.63.10
pākhaṇḍeṣu ratiḥ puṃsāṃ hetuvādānukūlatā |
jāyate viṣṇumāyāmbhaḥ patitānāṃ durātmanām | | 11
yadā pāpakṣayaḥ puṃsāṃ tadā vedadvijādiṣu |
ravau ca devadeveśe śraddhāṃ bhavati niścalā | | 12
yadā svalpāvaśeṣastu narāṇāṃ pāpasañcayaḥ |
tadā dīkṣāguṇānsarve bhajante nātra saṃśayaḥ | | 13
bhramatāmatra saṃsāre narāṇāṃ pāpadurgame |
hastāvalambadopyeko bhaktiprīto divākaraḥ | | 14
sarvabhāgavato bhūtvā sarvapāpaharaṃ ravim |
ārādhayeha taṃ bhaktyā prītimeṣyati bhāskaraḥ | | 15
diṇḍiruvāca
kiṃ lakṣaṇā narā dīkṣāmarhanti padmasambhava |
yacca dīkṣānvitaiḥ kāryaṃ tanme kathaya padmaja | | 16
brahmovāca
karmaṇā manasā vācā prāṇināṃ yo na hiṃsakaḥ |
bhāvabhaktaśca mārtaṇḍe tasya dīkṣā guṇānvitā | | 17
brāhmaṇāṃścaiva devāṃśca nityameva namasyati |
na ca drogdhā paraṃ vāde sa mārtaṇḍaṃ samarcati | | 18
sarvāndevān raviṃ vetti sarvalokāṃśca bhāskaram |
tebhyaśca nānyamātmānaṃ sa naraḥ sauratāṃ vrajet | | 19
devaṃ manuṣyamanyaṃ vā paśupakṣipipīlikān |
tarupāṣāṇakāṣṭhāni bhūmyaṃbho gaganaṃ diśaḥ | | 1.63.20
ātmānaṃ cāpi deveśādvyatiriktaṃ divākarāt |
yo na jānāti yatiṣu sa vai dīkṣāguṇānbhajet | | 21
bhāvaṃ na kurute yastu sarvabhūteṣu pāpakam |
karmaṇā manasā vācā sa tu dīkṣāṃ samarhati | | 22
sutapteneha tapasā yathairvā bahudakṣiṇaiḥ |
tāṃ gatiṃ na narā yānti yāṃ gatāḥ sūryamāśritāḥ | 23
yena sarvātmanā bhānau bhaktyā bhāvo niveśitaḥ |
gaṇeśvara kṛtārthatvācchlāghyaḥ sauraḥ sa mānavaḥ | | 24
api na: sa kule dhanyo jāyate kulapāvanaḥ |
bhagavānbhaktibhāvena yena bhānurupāsitaḥ | | 25
yaḥ kārayati - devārcāṃ hṛdayālambanaṃ raveḥ |
sa naro bhānusālokyamāpnoti dhutakalmaṣaḥ | | 26
yastu devālayaṃ bhānorbhaktyā kārayati dhruvam |
sa sapta puruṣā~mllokaṃ bhānornayati mānavaḥ | | 27
yāvantyābdāni devārcā ravestiṣṭhati mandire |
tāvadvarṣasahasrāṇi sūryaloke mahīyate | | 28
devārcā lakṣaṇopetā tadgṛhe santato vidhiḥ |
niṣkāmaṃ ca mano yasya sa yātyakṣarasāmyatām | | 29
puṣpāṇi ca sugandhīni manojñāni ca yaḥ pumān |
prayacchati sahasrāṃśoḥ sadā prayatamānasaḥ | | 1.63.30
dhūpāṃśca tāṃstānvividhāngandhāḍhyaṃ cānulepanam |
naraḥ so.anudinaṃ yajñaṃ karotyārādhanaṃ raveḥ | | 31
yajñeśo bhagavānpūṣā sadā kratubhirijyate |
bahūpakaraṇā yajñā nānāsambhāravistarāḥ | | 32
na te diṇḍinnavāpyante manuṣyairalpasañcayaiḥ |
bhaktyā tu puruṣaiḥ pūjā kṛtā dūrvāṅkurairapi | |
bhānordadāti hi phalaṃ sarvayajñaiḥ sudurlabham | | 33
yāni puṣpāṇi hṛdyāni dhūpagandhānulepanam |
dayitaṃ bhūṣaṇaṃ yacca prītaye caiva vāsasī | | 34
yāni cābhyavahāryāṇi bhakṣāà¤¾ṇi ca phalāni vai |
prayaccha tāni mārtaṇḍe bhavethāścaiva tanmanāḥ | | 35
ādyaṃ taṃ bhuvanādhāraṃ yathāśaktyā prasādaya |
ārādhya yāti taṃ devaṃ tasminneva naro layam | | 36
puṣpaistīrthodakairgandhairmadhunā sarpiṣā tathā |
kṣīreṇa snāpayedbhānuṃ graheśaṃ gopatiṃ khagam | | 37
dadhikṣīrahradānpuṇyāṃstato lokānmadhucyutaḥ |
prayāsyati gaṇaśreṣṭha nirvṛttiṃ ca vilakṣaṇām | | 38
stotrairgītaistathā vādyairbrāhmaṇānāṃ ca tarpaṇaiḥ |
manasaścaiva yogena ārādhaya divākaram | | 39
ārādhya taṃ jagannāthaṃ mayā sargaḥ pravartitaḥ |
viṣṇuśca pālayellokāṃstamārādhya divākaram | | 1.63.40
rudraśca prāptavāndevīṃ bhavānīṃ tatprasādataḥ |
dīpyante ṛṣayaścāpi tamārādhya divākaram | | 41
sa tvamebhiḥ prakāraistamupavāsaiśca bhāskaram |
toṣayābdaṃ hi tuṣṭo.asau bhānurdvaṃdvapraśāntidaḥ | | 42
iti śrībhaviṣye mahāpurāṇe śatārddhasāhasryāṃ saṃhitāyāṃ brāhme parvaṇi saptamīkalpe brahmadiṇḍisaṃvāde ādityakriyāyogavarṇanaṃ nāma triṣaṣṭitamo.adhyāyaḥ | 63 |
atha catuḥṣaṣṭitamo.adhyāyaḥ
phalasaptamīvarṇanam
diṇḍiruvāca
upavāsaiḥ suraśreṣṭha kathaṃ tuṣyati bhāskaraḥ |
parihārāṃstathācakṣva ye tyājyāścopavāsibhiḥ | | 1
yadyatkāryaṃ yathā caiva bhāskarārādhane narai |
tatsarvaṃ vistarādbrahmanyathāvadvaktumarhasi | | 2
brahmovāca
smṛtaḥ sampūjito dhūpapuṣpānnairbhānurādarāt |
bhogināmupakārāya kiṃ punaścopavāsinām | | 3
upāvṛttasya pāpebhyo yastu vāso guṇaiḥ saha |
upavāsaḥ sa vijñeyaḥ sarvabhogavivarjitaḥ | | 4
ekarātraṃ dvirātraṃ vā trirātraṃ naktameva ca |
upavāsī raviṃ yastu bhaktyā dhyāyati mānavaḥ | | 5
tannāmajāpī tatkarmaratastadgatamānasaḥ |
niṣkāmaḥ puruṣo diṇḍe sa brahma paramāpnuyāt | | 6
yaṃ ca kāmamabhidhyāya māskarārpitamānasaḥ |
upoṣati tamāpnoti prasanne khagame.akhilam | | 7
diṇḍiruvāca
brāhmaṇaiḥ kṣatriyairvaiśyaiḥ śūdraiḥ strībhiśca kañjaja |
saṃsāragarte paṅkasthe sugatiḥ prāpyate katham | | 8
brahmovāca
anārādhya jagannāthaṃ gopatiṃ dhvāntanāśanam |
nirvyalīkena cittena kaḥ prayāsyati sadgatim | | 9
viṣayagrāhi vai yasya na cittaṃ bhāskarārpitam |
sa kathaṃ pāpapaṅkākto naro yāsyati sadgatim | | 1.64.10
yadi saṃsāraduḥkhārtaḥ sugatiṃ gantumicchasi |
tadārādhaya sarveśaṃ bhāskaraṃ jyotiṣāṃ patim | | 11
puṣpaiḥ sugandhairhadyaiśca dhūpaiḥ sāgarucandanaiḥ |
vāsobhirbhūṣaṇairbhakṣyairupavāsaparāyaṇaḥ | | 12
yadi saṃsāranirvedādabhivācchasi sadgatim |
tadārādhaya mārtaṇḍaṃ bhaktipravaṇacetasā | | 13
puṣpāṇi yadi te na snuḥ śastapādapapallavaiḥ |
dūrvāṅkarairapi diṇḍe tadabhāve.arcayāryamam | | 14
puṣpapatrāmbubhirdhūpairyathāvibhavamātmanaḥ |
pūjitastuṣṭimatulāṃ bhaktyā yātyekacetasā | | 15
yaḥ sadāyatane bhānoḥ kurute mārjanakriyām |
sa yātyuttamake sthāne sarvapāpaṃ vyapohati | | 16
yāvatyaḥ pāṃsukaṇikā mārjyante bhāskarālaye |
dināni divi tāvanti tiṣṭhatyarkasamo naraḥ | | 17
ahanyahani yatpāpaṃ kurute gaṇanāyaka |
gocarmamātraṃ sammārjya hanti tadbhāskarālaye | | 18
yaścānulepanaṃ kuryādbhānorāyatane naraḥ |
so.api lokaṃ samāsādya haṃsena saha modate | | 19
mṛdā dhātuvikārairvā varṇakairgomayena vā |
upalepanakṛdyāti matpuraṃ yānamāsthitaḥ | | 1.64.20
udakābhyukṣaṇaṃ bhānoryaḥ karoti sadā gṛhe |
so.api gacchati yatrāste bhagavānyādasāṃ patiḥ | | 21
puṣpaprakaramatyarthaṃ sugandhaṃ bhāskarālaye |
anulipte naro dattvā na durgatimavāpnuyāt | | 22
vimānamatiśobhāḍhyaṃ sarvartusukhabhūṣitam |
samāpnoti naro dattvā dīpakaṃ bhāskarālaye | | 23
yastu saṃvatsaraṃ pūrṇaṃ tilapātraprado naraḥ |
dhvajaṃ ca bhāskare dadyātsamamatra phalaṃ labhet | | 24
vidhūto hanti vātena dāturajñānataḥ kṛtam |
pāpaṃ karturgṛhe bhānordivā rātrau narādhipa | | 25
gītavādyādibhirbhānuṃ ya upāste tamopaham |
gandharvairnṛtyagītaiḥ sa vimānastho niṣevyate | | 26
jātismaratvaṃ medhāṃ ca tathaivoparame smṛtim |
prāpnoti gaṇāśārdūla kṛtvā pustakavācanam | | 27
evaṃ khageśvaro bhaktyā yena bhānurupāsitaḥ |
sa prāpnoti gatiṃ ślādhyāṃ yāṃ yāmicchati cetasā | | 28
devatvaṃ manujaiḥ kaiścidgandharvatvaṃ tathā paraiḥ |
vidyādharatvamaparaiḥ saṃrādhyeha divākaram | | 29
śakraḥ 1 kratuśateneśamārādhya jyotiṣāṃ patim |
devendratvaṃ gatastasmānnānyaḥ pūjyatamaḥ kvacit | | 1.64.30
brahmacārigṛhasthānāṃ vanasthānāṃ gaṇādhipa |
nānyaḥ pūjyastathā strīṇāmṛte devaṃ divākaram | | 31
madhye parivrājakānāṃ sahasrāṃśuṃ mahātmanām |
mokṣadvāraṃ viśantīha taṃ raviṃ vijitātmanām | | 32
evaṃ sarvāśramāṇāṃ hi sahasrāṃśuḥ parāyaṇam |
sarveṣāṃ caiva varṇānāṃ graheśo vai gatiḥ parā | | 33
śṛṇuṣva gadataḥ kāmyānupavāsāṃstathāparān |
śṛṇu diṇḍe mahāpuṇyaphalakāṃ saptamīṃ parām | | 34
ādityārādhanāyaināṃ sarvapāpaharāṃ śivām |
yāmupoṣya naro bhaktyā mucyate sarvapātakaiḥ | | 35
tathā lokamavāpnoti sūryasyāmitatejasaḥ |
atha bhādrapade māsi śuklapakṣe samāgate | | 36
sopoṣyā prathamaṃ tāta vidhānaṃ śṛṇu tatra vai |
ayācitaṃ caturthyāṃ tu pañcamyāmekabhojanam | | 37
upavāsaparaḥ ṣaṣṭhyāṃ jitakrodho jitendriyaḥ |
arcayitvā dinakaraṃ gandhadhūpanivedanaiḥ | | 38
purataḥ sthaṇḍile rātrau svapyāddevasya putraka |
pradhyāyanmanasā devaṃ sarvabhūtārtināśanam | | 39
sarvadoṣapraśamanaṃ sarvapātakanāśanam |
vibuddhastvatha saptamyāṃ kuryādbrāhmaṇabhojanam | | 1.64.40
pūjayitvā dinakaraṃ puṣpadhūpavilepanaiḥ |
naivedyaṃ tāta devasya phalāni kathayanti hi | |4 1
kharjūranālikerāṇi tathā āmraphalāni tu |
mātuliṅgaphalānyeva kathitāni manīṣibhiḥ | | 42
etaiśca bhojayedviprānātmanā ca prabhakṣayet |
tathaiṣāṃ cāpyabhāvena śṛṇu cānyāni suvrata | |4 3
śāligodhūmapiṣṭāni kārayedgaṇanāyaka |
guḍagarbhakṛtānīha ghṛtapākena pāvayet | |44
cāturyāvakamiśrāṇi ādityāya nivedayet |
agnikāryamatho kṛtvā brāhmaṇānbhojayettataḥ | |45
itthaṃ dvādaśa vai māsānkāryaṃ vratamanuttamam |
māsi māsi phalāhāraḥ phaladāyī phalārcanaḥ | |46
varṣānte tvatha kurvīta śaktyā brāhmaṇabhojanam |
snānaprāśanayoścāpi vidhānaṃ śṛṇu suvrata | | 47
gomūtraṃ gomayaṃ kṣīraṃ dadhi sarpiḥ kuśodakam |
tilasarṣapayoḥ kalkaṃ śvetā mṛccāpi suvrata | |48
dūrvākalkaṃ ghṛtaṃ cāpi gośṛṃgakṣālitaṃ jalam |
jātigulmaviniryāsaḥ praśastaḥ snānakarmaṇi | | 49
prāśane cāpyathaitāni sarvapāpaharāṇi vai |
ādau kṛtvā bhādrapadaṃ yathā saṃkhyaṃ vidurbudhāḥ | | 1.64.50
itthaṃ varṣāntamāsādya bhojayitvā dvijottamān |
divyānbhogānmahādeva tatastebhyo nivedayet | | 51
phalāni tāta haimāni yathā śaktyā gaṇādhipa |
savatsāmatha vā dhenuṃ bhūmiṃ sasyānvitāmatha | | 52
prāsādamatha vā bhaumaṃ sarvadhānyasamanvitam |
dadyātchuklāni vastrāṇi tāmrapātraṃ savidrumam | | 53
śaktiyuktasya caitāni daridrasya tu me śṛṇu |
phalāni piṣṭakānyeṣāṃ tilacūrṇānvitāni tu | | 54
bhojayitvā dvijāndadyādrājatāni phalāni tu |
dhāturaktaṃ vastrayugamamācāryāya nivedayet | | 55

sahiraṇyaṃ mahādeva pañcaratnasamanvitam |
itthaṃ samāpyate tāta pāraṇaṃ vārṣikāntikam | | 56
ityeṣā vai puṇyatamā saptamī duritāpahā |
yāmupoṣya narāḥ sarve yānti sūryasalokatām | | 57
pūjyamānaḥ sadā devairgandharvāpsarasāṃ gaṇaiḥ |
anayā mānavo nityaṃ pūjayedbhāskaraṃ sadā | | 58
dāridyaduḥkhaduritairmukto yāti divākaram |
brāhmaṇo mokṣamāyāti kṣatriyaścendratāṃ vrajet | | 59
vaiśyo dhanadasālokyaṃ śūdro: vipratvamāpnuyāt |
aputro labhate putraṃ durbhagā subhagā bhavet | | 1.64.60
yāmupoṣya ca nārīmāṃ saptamīṃ lokapūjitām |
vidhavā vā satī bhaktyā anayā pūjayedravim | | 61
nānyajanmani vaidhavyaṃ nārī prāpnoti mānada |
cintāmaṇisamā hyeṣā vijñeyā phalasaptamī | | 62
paṭhatāṃ śṛṇvatāṃ diṇḍe sarvakāmapradā smṛtā | | 63
iti śrībhaviṣye mahāpurāṇe śatārddhasāhasryāṃ saṃhitāyāṃ brāhme parvaṇi brahmadiṇḍisaṃvāde
saptamīkalpe phalasaptamīvarṇanaṃ nāma catuḥṣaṣṭitamo.adhyāya | 64 |
atha pañcaṣaṣṭitamo.adhyāyaḥ
ādityamāhātmyavarṇanam
brahmovāca
ataḥ paraṃ pravakṣyāmi rahasyāṃ nāma saptamīm |
saptamī kṛtamātreyaṃ narāṃstārayate bhavāt | | 1
saptāparānsapta pūrvānpitṛrṃścāpi na saṃśayaḥ |
rogāṃśchinatti duśchedyāndurjayāñjayate hyarīn | | 2

arthānprāpnoti duṣprāpānyaḥ kuryānnāma saptamīm |
kanyārthī labhate kanyāṃ dhanārthī labhate dhanam | | 3

putrārthī labhate putrāndharmārthī dharmamāpnuyāt |
samayānpālayansarvānkuryāccemāṃ vicakṣaṇaḥ | |4

samayāñchṛṇu bhūteśa śreyase gadato mama |
ādityabhaktaḥ puruṣaḥ saptamyāṃ gaṇanāyaka | | 5

maitrīṃ sarvatra vai kuryādbhāskaraṃ vāpi ciṃtayet |
saptamyāṃ na spṛśettailaṃ nīlaṃ vastraṃ na dhārayet | |

na cāpyāmālakaiḥ snānaṃ na kuryātkalahaṃ kvacit | | 6

diṇḍiruvāca

kimarthaṃ na spaśettailaṃ saptamyāṃ padmasaṃbhava | | 7

kaśca doṣo bhaveddeva nīlavastrasya dhāraṇāt |

brahmovāca
śṛṇu diṇḍe mahābāho nīlavastrasya dhāraṇe | | 8

dūṣaṇaṃ gaṇaśārdūla gadato mama kṛtsnaśaḥ |
pālanaṃ vikrayaścaiva sadvṛttirupajīvanam | | 9

patitastu bhavedviprastribhiḥ kṛcchairviśuddhyati |
nīlīraktena vastreṇa yatkarma kurute dvijaḥ | | 1.65.10

snānaṃ dānaṃ japo homaḥ svādhyāyaḥ pitṛtarpaṇam |
vṛthā tasya mahāyajñā nīlasūtrasya dhāraṇāt | | 11

nīlīraktaṃ yadā vastraṃ viprastvaṅgeṣu dhārayet |
ahorātroṣito bhūtvā pañcagavyena śuddhyati | | 12
romakūpe yadā gacchedraktaṃ nīlasya kasyacit |
patitastu bhavedviprastribhiḥ kṛcchrairviśuddhyati | | 13

nīlīmadhyaṃ yadā gacchetpramādādbrāhmaṇaḥ kvacit |
ahorātroṣito bhūtvā pañcagavyena śuddhyati | | 14

nīlīdāru yadā bhiṃdyādbrāhmaṇānāṃ śarīrake |
śoṇitaṃ dṛśyate yatra dvijaścāndrāyaṇaṃ caret | | 15

kuryādajñānato yastu nīlervā dantadhāvanam |
kṛtvā kṛcchradvayaṃ diṇḍe viśuddhaḥ syānna saṃśayaḥ | | 16

vāpayedyatra nīlīṃ tu bhavettatrāśucirmahī |
pramāṇadvādaśābdāni tata ūrdhvaṃ śucirbhavet | | 17

saptamyāṃ spṛśatastailamiṣṭā bhāryā vinaśyati |
ityeṣa nīlītailasya doṣaste kathito mayā | | 18

na caiva khādenmāṃsāni madyāni na pibedbudhaḥ |
na drohaṃ kasyacitkuryānna pāruṣyaṃ samācaret | | 19

nāvabhāṣeta cāṇḍālaṃ striyaṃ naiva rajasvalām |
na vāpi saṃspṛśeddhīnaṃ mṛtakaṃ nāvalokayet | | 1.65.20

nāsphoṭayennātihasedgāyeccāpi na gītakam |
na nṛtyedatirāgeṇa na ca vādyāni vādayet | | 21

na śayīta striyā sārdhaṃ na seveta durodaram |
na rudyādaśrupātena na ca vācyaṃ ca śaukikam | | 22

ākṛṣenna śiroyūkā na vṛthāvādamācaret |
parasyāniṣṭakathanamatiśokaṃ ca varjayet | | 23

na kañcittāḍayejjantuṃ na kuryādatibhojanam |
na caiva hi divā svapnaṃ dambhaṃ śāṭhyaṃ ca varjayet | | 24

rathyāyāmaṭanaṃ vāpi yatnataḥ parivarjayet |
athāparo vidhiścātra śrūyatāṃ tripurāntaka | | 25

caitrātprabhṛti kartavyā sarvadā nāma saptamī |
dhāteti caitramāse tu pūjanīyo divākaraḥ | | 26
aryameti ca vaiśākhe jyeṣṭhe mitraḥ prakīrtitaḥ |
āṣāḍhe varuṇo jñeya indro nabhasi kathyate | | 27

vivasvāṃśca nabhasye.atha parjanyośvayuji smṛtaḥ |
pūṣā kārttikamāse tu mārgaśīrṣeṣurucyate | | 28

bhagaḥ pauṣe bhavetpūjyastvaṣṭā māghe tu śasyate |
viṣṇuśca phālgune māsi pūjyo vandyaśca bhāskaraḥ | | 29

saptamyāṃ caiva saptamyāṃ bhojayedbhojakānbudhaḥ |
saghṛtaṃ bhojanaṃ deyaṃ bhojayitvā vidhānataḥ | | 1.65.30

bhojakāyaiva viprāya dakṣiṇāṃ svarṇamāṣakam |
saghṛtaṃ bhojanaṃ deyaṃ raktavastrāṇi caiva hi | | 31

abhāve bhojakānāṃ tu dakṣiṇīyā dvijottamāḥ |
tathaiva bhojanīyāśca śraddhayā parayā vibho | | 32

viśeṣato vācakaśca bāhmaṇaḥ kalpavitsadā |
ityeṣā kathitā tubhyaṃ saptamī gaṇanāyaka | | 33

śrutā satī pāpaharā sūryalokapradāyinī | | 34

iti śrībhaviṣye mahāpurāṇe śatārddhasāhasryāṃ saṃhitāyāṃ brāhme parvaṇi brahmadiṇḍisaṃvāde saptamīkalpe ādityamahātmyavarṇane saptamīvarṇanaṃ nāma pañcaṣaṣṭitamo.adhyāyaḥ | 65 |
atha ṣaṭṣaṣṭitamo.adhyāyaḥ
yājñavalkyavarṇanam
sumanturuvāca
ityuktvā bhagavānbrahmā jagāmādarśanaṃ vibhoḥ 3 |
sūryamārādhayaddiṇḍī sūryasyānucaro.abhavat | | 1
śatānīka uvāca
bhūyaḥ kathaya viprendra māhātmyaṃ bhāskarasya me |
śṛṇvato nāsti me tṛptiramṛtasyeva suvrata | | 2
sumanturuvāca
śṛṇuṣvāvahito rājansamvādaṃ dvijaśaṅkhayoḥ |
yaṃ śrutvā sarvapāpebhyo mucyate mānavo nṛpa | | 3

āsīnamāśrame śaṃkhaṃ dvijo draṣṭuṃ jagāma ha |
phalabhārānatacchāye vṛkṣavṛndasamākule | | 4

parasparamṛgaśṛṅgakaṇḍūyitamṛgāvṛte |
barhirvanāmbarānītatīrthakandopabhogini | | 5

prabhūtakusumāmodaṣaṭpadodgītaśālinī |
siddhadevarṣigandharvatīrthasevitavāriṇi | | 6

muṇḍaiśca jaṭilaiścaiva tāpasairupaśobhite |
āśrame taṃ muniśreṣṭhaṃ śaṃkhāhvaṃ sukhamāsthitam | | 7

stotraiḥ stotuṃ sahasrāṃśuṃ tadbhaktaṃ tatparāyaṇam |
tataḥ saṃhatya sahasā taṃ bhojakakumārakāḥ | | 8

vinītā upasaṃgamya yathāvadabhivādya ca |
āsaneṣūpaviṣṭāsta upaviṣṭamathābruvan | | 9

bhagavantsarvavedeṣu cchiṃdhi naḥ saṃśayo mahān |
vinayenopapannānāṃ kumārāṇāṃ tato muniḥ | | 1.66.10

anādīṃścaturo vedānuvāca prītamānasaḥ |
teṣāṃ tu paṭhatāmeva āśramaṃ tu yadṛcchayā | | 11

muniśreṣṭho.atha taṃ deśamājagāma dvijo nṛpa |
yathāvadarcitastena śaṅkhenāmitatejasā | | 12

vanditaśca kumāraistairabhavatprītamānasaḥ |
athaitānabravīcchaṃkhastānbhojakakumārakān | | 13
śiṣṭāgamādanadhyāyaḥ sa ca jāto viramyatām |
yathājñāpayasītyāhuḥ kumārāste ṛṣiṃ tataḥ | | 14

prapaccha siddhidaścaitānke hyete kiṃ paṭhanti ca |
śaṅkhovāca mahārāja kumārā bhojakātmajāḥ | | 15

sasūtrakalpāṃścaturo vipra vedānadhīyate |
tathaiva saptamīkalpe paricaryāṃ ca bhāsvataḥ | | 16

agnikāryavidhānaṃ ca pratiṣṭhākalpamāditaḥ |
adhyaṅgalakṣaṇaṃ 1 brahman rathayātrāvidhiṃ tathā | | 17

dvija uvāca

kathaṃ kriyeta saptamyāṃ kabhrārcanavidhikramaḥ |
gandhapuṣpapradīpānāṃ kiṃ phalaṃ ravimandire | | 18

kena tuṣyati dānena vratena niyamena ca |
dhūpapuṣpopahārādi kiṃ ca deyaṃ vivasvate | | 19

etadicchāmyahaṃ śrotuṃ tanme brūhi tapodhana |
viśeṣatastu māhātmyaṃ brūhi māṃ bhāskarasya hi | | 1.66.20

śaṅkha uvāca
imamarthaṃ vaśiṣṭhena pṛṣṭaḥ sāmbo yathā purā |
sa covāca vaśiṣṭhāya tadahaṃ kathayāmi te | | 21

atrāśrame puṇyatame tīrthānāmuttame prabhuḥ |
vavande niyatātmānaṃ vaśiṣṭhaṃ munisattamam | | 22

vinayenopasaṃgamya vavande caraṇau muneḥ |
kṛtapraṇāmaṃ sāmbaṃ tu bhaktiprahvīkṛtānanam | | 23

vilokya paramaprīto muniḥ papraccha taṃ tadā |
sarvataḥ sphuṭitaṃ gātraṃ kuṣṭhena mahatā tava | | 24
ghorarūpeṇa tīvreṇa kathaṃ tadvigataṃ tava |
kathaṃ ca lakṣmīradhikā rūpaṃ cātimanoharam | | 25

tejasvitātimahatī tathaiva sukumāratā | | 26

sāmba uvāca
stuto nāmasahasreṇa lokanātho divākaraḥ |
darśanaṃ ca gataḥ sākṣāddattavāṃśca varānmama | | 27

vaśiṣṭha uvāca
kathamārādhitaḥ sūryastvayā yādavanaṃdana |
kaiśca vratatapodānairdarśanaṃ bhagavāngataḥ | | 28

sāmba uvāca
śṛṇuṣvāvahito brahmansarvameva mayā yathā |
toṣito bhagavānsūryo vidhinā yena suvrata | | 29

mohānmayopahasito durvāsāḥ kopano muniḥ |
tato.ahaṃ tasya śāpena mahākuṣṭhamavāptavān | | 1.66.30

tato.ahaṃ pitaraṃ gatvā kuṣṭhayogābhipīḍitaḥ |
lajjamāno.atigarveṇa idaṃ vākyamathābravam | | 31

tāta sīdati me gātraṃ svaraśca parihīyate |
ghorarūpo mahāvyādhirvapureṣa jighāṃsati | | 32

aśeṣavyādhirājñāhaṃ pīḍitaḥ krūrakarmaṇā |
vaidyairoṣadhibhiścaiva na śāntirmama vidyate | | 33

so.ahaṃ tvayā hyanujñātastyaktumicchāmi jīvitam |
yadi vāhamanugrāhyastato.anujñātumarhasi | | 34
ityuktavākyaḥ sa pitā ṣutraśokābhipīḍitaḥ |
pitā kṣaṇaṃ tato dhyātvā māmevaṃ vākyamuktavān | | 35

dhairyamāśrayatāṃ putra mā śoke ca manaḥ kṛthāḥ |
hanti śokārditaṃ vyādhiḥ śuṣkaṃ tṛṇamivānalaḥ | | 36

devatārādhanaparo bhava putraka mā śucaḥ |
ityukte ca mayā prokto devamārādhayāmi kam | | 37

kamārādhya vimucye.ahaṃ tāta rogaiḥ samantataḥ |
ityevamukto bhagavānmāmuvāca pitā mama | | 38

imamarthaṃ purā pṛṣṭaḥ padmayoniḥ sanātanaḥ |
yājñavalkyena ṛṣiṇā yogīśena mahātmanā | | 39

yaduvāca mahātejāstasmai sa yadunandana |
tacchṛṇuṣva śucirbhūtvā ātmanaḥ śreyase suta | | 1.66.40

surajyeṣṭhaṃ sukhāsīnaṃ padmayoniṃ prajāpatim |
yājñavalkyo mahātejāḥ paryapṛcchatpitāmaham | | 41

bhagavañchrotumicchāmi kiṃcidātmamanogatam |
samārādhya vibho devaṃ naro mucyeta vai bhavāt | | 42

gṛhastho brahmacārī vā vānaprastho.atha bhikṣukaḥ |
ya icchenmokṣamāsthātuṃ devatāṃ kāṃ yajeta saḥ | | 43

kuto hyasya dhruvaḥ svargaḥ kuto naiḥ śreyasaṃ sukham |
svargataścaiva kiṃ kuryādyena na cyavate punaḥ | | 44

devātānāṃ tu ko devaḥ pitṛrṇāṃ caiva kaḥ pitā |
tasmātparataraṃ yacca tanme brūhi pitāmaha | | 45

kena sṛṣṭamidaṃ viśvaṃ brahmansthāvarajaṅgamam |
pralayo ca kamabhyeti tanme tvaṃ vaktumarhasi | | 46

brahmovāca
sādhu pṛṣṭo.asmi bhavatā tuṣṭaścāsmi mahāmate |
praṇamya śirasā devaṃ puṇyottaramanuttamam | | 47
kathayiṣye dvijaśreṣṭha śṛṇuṣvaikamanādhunā |
ātmanaḥ śreyase vipra śucirbhūtvā samāhitaḥ | |48

udyanya eṣa kurute jagadvitimiraṃ karaiḥ |
nātaḥ parataro devaḥ kimanyatkathayāmi te | |4 9

anādi nidhano hyeṣaḥ puruṣaḥ śāśvato.avyayaḥ |
dīpayatyeva lokāṃstrīnravī raśmibhirulbaṇaiḥ | | 1.66.50

sarvadevātmako hyeṣa tapasā cāṃśutāpanaḥ |
sarvasya jagato nāthaḥ karmasākṣī śubhāśubhe | | 51

kṣapayatyeṣa bhūtāni tathā visṛjate punaḥ |
eṣa bhāti tapatyeṣa vardhate ca gabhastibhiḥ | | 52
eṣa dhātā vidhātā ca pūṣā prakṛtibhāvana |
na hyeṣa kṣayamāyāti nityamakṣayamaṇḍalaḥ | | 53
pitṛrṇāṃ hi pitā devatānāṃ ca devatā |
dhruvaṃ sthānaṃ smṛtaṃ hyeṣa ādhāro jagatastathā | | 54
sarvakāle jagatkṛtsnamādityātsaṃprasūyate |
pralaye ca tamabhyeti ādityaṃ dīptatejasam | | 55
yoginaścātra saṃlīnāstyaktvā gṛhakalevaram |
vāyubhūtā viśantyasmiṃstejorāśau divākare | | 56
tasya raśmisahasrāṇi śākhā iva vihaṃgamāḥ |
vasantyāśritya munayaḥ saṃsiddhā daivataiḥ saha | | 57
janakādayo gṛhasthāstu rājāno yogadharmiṇaḥ |
vālakhilyādayaścaiva munayo brahmacāriṇaḥ | | 58
vyāsādayo vanasthāśca bhikṣuḥ pañcaśikhastathā |
sarve te yogamāsthāya praviṣṭāḥ sūryamaṇḍalam | | 59
śuko vyāsātmajaḥ śrīmānyogadharmamavāpya tu |
ādityakiraṇānpītvā na punarbhavamāntavān | | 1.66.60
śabdamātrāḥ śrutisukhā brahmaviṣṇuśivādayaḥ |
pratyakṣo.ayaṃ smṛto devaḥ sūryastimiranāśanaḥ | | 61
tasmādanyavrate bhaktirna kāryā śubhamicchatā |
hṛṣṭena sādhyate yasmādadṛṣṭaṃ nityameva hi | |
tvayātaḥ satataṃ vipra arcanīyo divākaraḥ | | 62
yājñavalkya uvāca
aho ya eṣa kathito bhavatā bhāskaro mama |
devatā sarvadevānāṃ naitanmithyā prajāyate | | 63
tasya devasya māhātmyaṃ śrutaṃ subahuśo mayā |
devarṣisiddhamanujaiḥ stutasyeha mahātmanaḥ | | 64
kaḥ stauti daivatamajaṃ yasyaitatsacarācaram |
akṣayasyāprameyasya kiraṇodgamanādbhavet | | 65
dakṣiṇātkiraṇādyasya sambhūto bhagavānhariḥ |
vāmādbhavāṃstathā jātaḥ kiraṇātkila kañjaja | | 66
lālāṭādyasya rudrastu kā tulyā tena devatā |
tasya devasya kaḥ śaktaḥ pravaktuṃ guṇavistaram | | 67
so.ahamicchāmi devasya tasya sarvātmanaḥ prabho |
śrotumārādhanaṃ yena nistareyaṃ bhavārṇakam | | 68
kenopāyena mantrairvā rahasyaiḥ paricaryayā |
dānairvratopavāsairvā homairjapyairathāpi vā | | 69
ārādhitaḥ samastānāṃ kleśānāṃ hānido raviḥ |
śakyaḥ samārādhayituṃ kathaṃ śaṃsa prajāpate | | 1.66.70
dharmārthakāmasamprāptau puruṣāṇāṃ viceṣṭatām 1 |
janmanyavitathā saikā kriyā yārkaṃ samāśritā | | 71
durgasaṃsārakāṃtāramapāramabhidhāvatām |
ekaḥ sūryanamaskāro muktimārgasya deśakaḥ | | 72
so.ahamicchāmi taṃ devaṃ saptalokaparāyaṇam |
kālāyanamaśeṣasya jagato hadyavasthitam | | 73
ārādhayituṃ gopālaṃ graheśamamitaujasam |
śaṅkaraṃ jagato dīpaṃ smṛtamātrāghanāśanam | | 74
tamanādyaṃ suraśreṣṭhaṃ prasādayitumicchataḥ |
upadeśapradānena prasādaṃ kartumarhasi | | 75
tasyaitadvacanaṃ śrutyā bhaktimudvahato ravau |
jagāma paritoṣaṃ sa padmayonirmahātapāḥ | |7 6
brahmovāca
yatpṛcchasi dvijaśreṣṭha sūryasyārādhanaṃ prati |
vratopavāsajapyādi tadihaikamanāḥ śṛṇu | | 77
anādi yatparaṃ brahma sarvaheyavivarjitam |
vyāpya yatsarvabhūteṣu sthitaṃ sadasataḥ param | | 78
pradhānapuṃsoranayoryataḥ kṣobhaḥ pravartate |
nityayorvyāpinoścaiva jagadādau mahātmanoḥ | |79
tatkṣobhakatvād brahmāṃḍaṃ sṛṣṭerheturnirañjanaḥ |
aheturapi sarvātmā jāyate parameśvaraḥ | | 1.66.80
pradhānapuruṣatvaṃ ca tathaiveśvaralīlayā |
samupaiti tataścaivaṃ brahmatvaṃ chandataḥ prabhuḥ | | 81
tataḥ sthitau pālayitā viṣṇutvaṃ jagataḥ kṣaye |
rudratvaṃ ca jagannāthaḥ svecchayā kurute raviḥ | | 82
tamekamakṣaraṃ dhāma sarvadevanamaskṛtam |
bhedābhedasvarūpaṃ taṃ praṇipatya divākaram | |
varṇayiṣye.akhilaṃ vipra tasyaivārādhanaṃ raveḥ | | 83
guhyaṃ cāpi tathā tasya bhāskarasya śṛṇuṣva vai |
tuṣṭena hi purā mahyaṃ kathitaṃ bhāskareṇa tu | | 84
iti śrībhaviṣye mahāpurāṇe śatārddhasāhasryāṃ saṃhitāyāṃ brāhme parvaṇi yājñavalkyabrahmasaṃvāde saptamīkalpe ādityamāhātmyavarṇanaṃ nāma ṣaṭṣaṣṭitamo.adhyāyaḥ | 66 |

atha saptaṣaṣṭitamo.adhyāyaḥ
brahmayājñavalkyasamvādavarṇanam
brahmovāca
prabhāte saṃstuto devo mūrtihetormayā purā |
yajantaṃ cāparaṃ devaṃ bhaktinamraṃ mahāmatiḥ | | 1
pratyakṣatvamatho gatvā rahasyaṃ proktavānmama |
ahaṃ ca kṛtavānpraśnaṃ dṛṣṭvā pratyakṣato ravim | | 2
vedeṣu ca purāṇeṣu sāṅgopāṅgeṣu gīyase |
tvamajaḥ śāśvato dhātā mahābhūtamanuttamam | | 3
pratiṣṭhitaṃ bhūtabhavyaṃ tvayi sarvamidaṃ jagat |
catvāro hyāśramā deva sarve gārhasthyamūlakāḥ | | 4
yajante tvāmaharaharnānāmūrtisamāśritāḥ |
pitā mātā hi sarvasya daivataṃ tvaṃ hiṃ śāśvatam | | 5
yajase caiva kaṃ devameva cāpi na vidmahe |
kathyatāṃ mama deveśa paraṃ kautūhalaṃ hi me | | 6
itthaṃ mayokto bhagavānidaṃ vacanamabravīt |
avācyametadvaktavyamātmaguhyaṃ sanātanam | | 7
tava bhaktimato brahmanvakṣyāmīha yathātatham |
yataḥ sūkṣmamavijñeyamavyaktamacalaṃ dhruvam | | 8
indriyairindriyārthaiśca sarvabhūtaiśca varjitam |
sa hyantarātmā bhūtānāṃ kṣetrajñaśceti kathyate | | 9
triguṇavyatirikto.asau puruṣaśceti kathyate |
hiraṇyagarbho bhagavānsaiva buddhiriti smṛtaḥ | | 1.67.10
mahāniti ca yogeṣu pradhānaśceti kathyate |
sāṃkhye ca paṭhyate śāstre nāmabhirbahubhiḥ sadā | | 11
viśvago viśvabhūtaśca viśvātmā viśvasambhavaḥ |
dhṛtaṃ caivātmakaṃ yena idaṃ trailokyamātmanā | | 12
aśarīraḥ śarīreṣu lipyate na ca karmabhiḥ |
mamāntarātmā tava ca ye cānye dehasaṃjñakāḥ | | 13
sarveṣāṃ sākṣibhūto.asau na karoti na lipyate |
saguṇo nirguṇo viṣṇurjñānagamyo hyasau smṛtaḥ | | 14
sarvataḥ pāṇipādo.asau sarvato.akṣiśiromukhaḥ |
sarvataḥ śrutiyukto.asau sarvamāvṛtya tiṣṭhati | | 15
viśvamūrdhā viśvabhujo viśvapādākṣināsikaḥ |
ekaścarati kṣetreṣu svairacārī yathāsukham | | 16
kṣetrāṇyasya śarīrāṇi bījaṃ cāpi śubhāśubham |
tāni vetti sa yogātmā ataḥ kṣetrajña ucyate | |
avyaktake pure śete tenā.asau puruṣaḥ smṛtaḥ | | 17
viśvaṃ bahuvidhaṃ jñeyaṃ sa ca sarvatra vidyate |
tasmātsa bahurūpatvādviśvarūpa iti smṛtaḥ | | 18
mahāpuruṣaśabdaṃ hi bibhartyeṣa sanātanaḥ |
sa tu vai vikriyāpannaḥ sṛjatyātmānamātmanā | | 19
ākāśātpatitaṃ toyaṃ yāti svādvantaraṃ yathā |
bhūme rasaviśeṣeṇa tathā guṇavaśāttu saḥ | | 1.67.20
eka eva yathā vāyurdehe tiṣṭhati pañcadhā |
ekatvaṃ ca pṛthaktvaṃ ca tathā tasya na saṃśayaḥ | | 21
sthānāntaraviśeṣeṇa yathāgnirlabhate parām |
saṃjñāṃ dāvāgrikādyeṣu tathā devo hyasau smṛtaḥ | | 22
yathā dīpasahasrāṇi dīpa ekaḥ prasūyate |
tathā rūpasahasrāṇi sa evaikaḥ prasūyate | | 23
sa yadā budhyatetmānaṃ tadā bhavati kevalaḥ |
ekatvaṃ pralaye cāsya bahutvaṃ syātpravartane | | 24
nityaṃ hi nāsti jagati bhūtaṃ sthāvarajaṅgamam |
ṛte tamekamīśānaṃ puruṣaṃ bījasaṃjñitam | | 25
akṣayaścāprameyadhra savargabhra sa ucyate |
tasmādavyaktamutpannaṃ triguṇaṃ sarvakāraṇam | | 26
avyaktāvyaktabhāvasthā yā sā prakṛtirucyate |
tāṃ yoniṃ brahmaṇo viddhi yo.asau sadasadātmakaḥ | | 27
nāsti tasmātparo hyanyaḥ sa pitā sa prajāpatiḥ |
ātmā mama sa vijñeyastatastaṃ pūjayāmyaham | | 28
svargatāścāpi ye kecittaṃ namasyanti dehinaḥ |
te tatprasādādgacchanti tenādiṣṭāḥ parāṃ gatim | | 29
taṃ devāścāsurāścaiva nānāmatasamāśritāḥ |
bhaktyā sampūjayantyādyaṃ gatiṃ caiṣāṃ dadāti saḥ | | 1.67.30
sa hi sarvagataścaiva nirguṇaścāpi kathyate |
evaṃ jñātvā tamātmānaṃ pūjayāmi sanātanam | |
bhāskaraṃ devadeveśaṃ sarvabhūteśamacyutam | | 31
brahmovāca
ityuktavānpurā pṛṣṭo mayā devo divākaraḥ |
pūjaya tvaṃ mahātmānaṃ tapantaṃ vipulaṃ tapaḥ | | 32
iti śrībhaviṣye mahāpurāṇe śatārddhasāhasryāṃ saṃhitāyāṃ brāhme parvaṇi vrahmayājñavalkyasaṃvāde saptamīkalpe sūryamahimavarṇanaṃ nāma saptaṣaṣṭitamo.adhyāyaḥ | 67 |

athāṣṭaṣaṣṭitamo.adhyāyaḥ
siddhārthasaptamīvratavarṇanam
brahmovāca
vacmi te paramaṃ devaṃ sarvadevaiśca pūjitam |
ārādhayanti yaṃ devaṃ brahmaviṣṇumaheśvarāḥ | | 1
padmākṛtiṃ sadā brahmā nalinairguggulena tu |
vyomarūpaṃ sadā devaṃ mahādevorcate ravim | | 2
jātipuṣpairdvijaśreṣṭha dhūpena vijayena tu |
vṛṣaṇaṃ sihlakaṃ vipra śrīkhaṇḍamagarustathā | | 3
karpūraṃ ca tathā mustā śarkarā satvacā dvija |
ityeṣa vijayo dhūpaḥ svayaṃ devena nirmitaḥ | | 4
keśavaścakrarūpaṃ tu sadā sampūjayedravim |
nīlotpaladalaśyāmo nīlotpalakadambakaiḥ | | 5
dhūpenāgurusaṃjñena bhaktiśraddhāsamanvitaḥ |
mayā sa pṛṣṭo deveśastasyaivārādhanāya vai | | 6
kāni puṣpāṇi ceṣṭāni sadā bhāskarapūjane |
tena coktāni puṣpāṇi svayaṃ tāni nibodha me | | 7
mallikāyāstu kusumairbhogavāñjāyate naraḥ |
saubhāgyaṃ puṇḍarīkaiśca bhajatyeva ca śāśvatam | | 8
gandhakuṭajakaiḥ puṣpaiḥ paramaiśvaryamaśnute |
bhavatyakṣayamatyantaṃ nityamarcayato ravim | | 9
mandārapuṣpaiḥ pūjā tu sarvakuṣṭhavināśinī |
bilvapatraiśca kusumairmahatīṃ śriyamaśnute | | 1.68.10
arkasrajā bhavatyarthaṃ sarvakāmaphalapradaḥ |
pradadyādūpiṇīṃ kanyāmarcito bakulasrajā | | 11
kiṃśukairarcito devo na pīḍayati bhāskaraḥ |
pūjito.agastyakusumairānukūlyaṃ prayacchati | | 12
karavīraistu viprendra sūryasyānucaro bhavet |
tathā mudgarapuṣpaiśca samabhyarcya divākaram | | 13
haṃsayuktena yānena raveḥ sālokyatāṃ vrajet |
śatapuṣpasahasraistu pūṣasālokyatāṃ vrajet | |
bakapuṣpairdvijaśreṣṭha yāti bhānusalokatām | | 14
catuḥsamena gandhena samabhyarcya divākaram |
pañcabhūtālayasthānamāpnuyānnātra saṃśayaḥ | | 15
devāgāraṃ tu sammārjya bhaktyā yastu pralepayet |
sa rogānmucyate kṣipraṃ dravyalābhaṃ ca vindati | | 16
tasya cāyatanaṃ bhaktyā gairikeṇopalepayet |
prāpnuyānmahatīṃ lakṣmīṃ rogaiścāpi pramucyate | | 17
aṣṭādaśeha kuṣṭhāni ye cānye vyādhayo nṛṇām |
pralayaṃ yānti te sarve mṛdā yadyupalepayet | | 18
vilepanānāṃ sarveṣāṃ raktacandanamuttamam |
puṣpāṇāṃ karavīrāṇi praśastāni pracakṣate | | 19
nātaḥ parataraṃ kiṃcidbhāsvatastuṣṭikārakam |
kiṃ tasya na bhavelloke yastvebhiḥ svarcayedravim | | 1.68.20
karavīraiḥ pūjayedyo bhāskaraṃ śraddhayānvitaḥ |
sarvakāmasamṛddho.asau sūryakāmamavāpnuyāt | | 21
vilepyāyatanaṃ yastu kuryānmaṇḍalakaṃ śubham |
sa sūryalokamāsādya modate śāśvatīḥ samāḥ | | 22
ekenāsya bhavedartho dvābhyāmārogyamaśnute |
tribhiḥ santatyavicchinnā caturbhirbhārgavīṃ labhet | | 23
pañcabhirvipulaṃ dhānyaṃ ṣaḍbhirāyurbalaṃ yaśaḥ |
saptamaṇḍalakārī syānmaṃḍalādhipatirnara | | 24
āyurdhanasutairyuktaḥ sūryaloke mahīyate |
ghṛtapradīpadānena cakṣuṣmāñjāyate naraḥ | | 25
kaṭutailapradānena sa śatrūñjayate naraḥ |
tilatailapradānena sūryaloke mahīyate | | 26
madhūkatailadānena saubhāgyaṃ paramaṃ vrajet |
saṃpūjya vidhivaddevaṃ puṣpadhūpādibhirbudhaḥ | | 27
yathāśaktyā tataḥ paścānnaivedyaṃ bhaktito nyaset |
puṣpāṇāṃ pravarā jātī dhūpānāṃ vijayaḥ paraḥ | | 28
gandhānāṃ kuṅkumaṃ śreṣṭhaṃ lepānāṃ raktacandanam |
dīpadāne ghṛtaṃ śreṣṭhaṃ naivedye modakaḥ paraḥ | | 29
etaistuṣyati deveśaḥ sānnidhyaṃ cādhigacchati |
evaṃ saṃpūjya vidhivatkṛtvā cāpi pradakṣiṇam | | 1.68.30
praṇamya śirasā devaṃ devadevaṃ divākaram |
sukhāsīnastataḥ paśyedraverabhimukhe sthitaḥ | | 31
ekaṃ siddhārthakaṃ kṛtvā haste pānīyasaṃyutam |
kāmaṃ yatheṣṭaṃ hṛdaye kṛtvā taṃ vāñchitaṃ naraḥ | | 32
pibetsatoyaṃ taṃ vipra aspṛṣṭaṃ daśanaiḥ sakṛt |
dvitīyāyāṃ tu saptamyāṃ dvau gṛhītvā tu suvrata | | 33
tṛtīyāyāṃ tu saptamyāṃ grahītavyāstrayo.api ca |
jñeyāścaturthyāṃ catvāraḥ pañcamyāṃ pañca eva hi | | 34
ṣaṭ pibeccāpi ṣaṣṭhyāṃ tu itīyaṃ vaidikī śrutiḥ |
saptamyāṃ saptamāyāṃ tu sapta caiva pibennaraḥ | | 35
ādau prabhṛti vijñeyo mantro.ayamabhimantraṇe |
siddhārthakastvaṃ hi loke sarvatra śrūyase yathā | |
tathā māmapi siddhārthamarthataḥ kurutāṃ raviḥ | | 36
tato havirupaspṛśya japaṃ kuryādyathepsitam |
hutāśanaṃ ca juhuyādvidhidṛṣṭena karmaṇā | | 37
evameva parāḥ kāryā saptamyaḥ sapta sarvadā |
ekātprabhṛti kāryā sā sarvadodakasaptamī | | 38
ekaṃ toyena sahitaṃ dvau cāpi ghṛtasaṃyutau |
trīṃstathā madhunā sārdhaṃ dadhnā catura eva ca | | 39
yuktānnapayasā pañca ṣaṭ ca gomayasaṃyutān |
pañcagavyena vai sapta pibetsiddhārthakāndvija | | 1.68.40
anena vidhinā yastu kuryātsarṣapasaptamīm |
bahuputro bahudhanaḥ siddhārthaścāpi sarvadā | | 41
iha loke naro vipra pretyayāti vibhāvasum |
tasmātsampūjayeddevaṃ vidhinānena bhāskaram | | 42
iti śrībhaviṣye mahāpurāṇe śatārddhasāhasryāṃ saṃhitāyāṃ brāhme parvaṇi saptamīkalpe
siddhārthasaptamīvratavarṇanaṃ nāmāṣṭaṣaṣṭitamo.adhyāyaḥ | 68 |
athaikonasaptatitamo.adhyāyaḥ
svapnadarśanavarṇanam
brahmovāca
saptamyāmuṣito vipraḥ svapnadarśanamucyate |
svapne dṛṣṭe ca saptamyāṃ puruṣo niyatavrataḥ | | 1
samāpya vidhivatsarvaṃ japahomādikaṃ kramāt |
pūjayitvā dineśaṃ tu yathāvibhavamātmanaḥ | | 2
tataḥ śayīta śayane devadevaṃ vicintayan |
samprasupto yadā paśyedudayantaṃ divākaram | | 3
śakradhvajaṃ tathā candraṃ tasya sarvāḥ samṛddhayaḥ |
dṛśyaṃ janaṃ tathā śaktiṃ sragvigoveṇunisvanāḥ | | 4
śvetābjacāmarādarśakanakāsisutodbhavam |
rudhirasya srutiṃ sekaṃ pānaṃ caiśvaryakārakam | | 5
śvetāyāḥ pañcapūtāyā darśanaṃ vṛddhikārakam |
prajāpaterghṛtāktasya darśanaṃ putradaṃ smṛtam | | 6
śastavṛkṣābhirohaśca kṣipramaiśvaryakārakaḥ |
dohanaṃ mahiṣīsiṃhīgodhenūnāṃ svake mukhe | | 7
dhanuṣāṃ ca śarāṇāṃ ca nābhau ca drutanirgatiḥ |
abhihanyātsvayaṃ khādetsiṃhāngā bhujagāṃstathā | | 8
svāṃgaśīrṣaṃ hutavahe tasya śrīragrataḥ sthitā |
rājate haimane pātre yo bhuṃkte pāyasaṃ dvijaḥ | | 9
padmapatre yathā viprastasya jantorbalaṃ bhavet |
dyūte vāde.atha vā yuddhe vijayo hi sukhāvahaḥ | | 1.69.10
agnestu grasanaṃ vipra āgreyaṃ vṛddhikārakam |
gātrasya jvalanaṃ vipra śirovedhaśca bhūtaye | | 11
mālyāmbarāṇāṃ yuktānāṃ śastānāṃ śuklapakṣiṇām |
sadā lābhaṃ praśaṃsanti tathā viṣṭhānulepanam | | 12
svāṅgasya kartane kṣepe rathayāne prajāgamaḥ |
nānāśirobāhutā ca hastānāṃ kurute śriyam | | 13
agamyāgamanaṃ caiva śokamadhyayanaṃ tathā |
devadvijajanācāryaguruvṛddhatapasvinaḥ | | 14
yadyadvadanti tatsarvaṃ satyameva hi nirdiśet |
praśastadarśanaṃ caiva abhiṣeko nṛpaśriyāḥ | | 15
syādrājyaṃ śiraśchedena bahudhā sphuṭitena tu |
ruditaṃ harṣasamprāptyai rājyaṃ nigaḍabandhane | | 16
turaṅgaṃ vṛṣabhaṃ padmaṃ rājānāṃ śvetakuñjaram |
mahadaiśvaryamāpnoti yobhīkaścādhirohati | | 17
grasamāno grahāṃstārā mahīṃ ca parivartayan |
unmūlayanparvatāṃśca rājyalābhamavāpnuyāt | | 18
dehānniṣkrāntirantrāṇāṃ tairvā vṛkṣasya veṣṭanam |
pātaḥ samudrasaritāmaiśvaryāṇi sukhāni ca | | 19
udadhiṃ saritaṃ vāpi tīrtvā pāraṃ prayāti ca |
adriṃ laṅghayateścāpi bhavantyarthajayāyuṣaḥ | | 1.69.20
ujjvalā strī viśedaṅkamāśīrvādaparāḥ striyaḥ |
bhavatyarthāgamaḥ śīghraṃ kṛmibhiryadi bhakṣyate | | 21
svapne svapna iti jñātaṃ dṛṣṭaprakathanaṃ tathā |
maṅgalānāṃ ca sarveṣāṃ śubhaṃ darśanameva ca | | 2 2
saṃyogaścaiva maṅgalyairārogyadhanakārakaḥ |
aiśvaryarājyalābhāya yasminsvapna udāhṛtaḥ | | 23
tairdṛṣṭai rogiṇo rogānmucyante nātra saṃśayaḥ |
na svapnaṃ śobhanaṃ dṛṣṭvā svapyātprātaśca kīrtayet | |
rājabhojakaviprebhyaḥ śucibhyaśca śucirnaraḥ | | 24
iti śrībhaviṣye mahāpurāṇe śatārddhasāhasryāṃ saṃhitāyāṃ brāhme parvaṇi saptamīkalpe
svapnadarśanavarṇanaṃ nāmaikonasaptatimo.adhyāyaḥ | 69 |
atha saptatitamo.adhyāyaḥ
sarṣapasaptamīvarṇanam
brahmovāca
tato madhyāhnasamaye snātaḥ prayatamānasaḥ |
tathaiva devānvidhivatpūjayitvā yathāsukham | | 1
samyakkṛtajapo maunī naro hutahutāśanaḥ |
niṣkramya devāyatanādbhojakānbhojayettataḥ 1 | | 2
tathā purāṇaviduṣa itihāsavido dvijān |
tathā vedavidaścaiva divyānbhaumāṃśca suvrata | | 3
raktāni vastrāṇi tathā ca gāvaḥ sugandhamālyādi haviṣyamannam |
payasvinī cāpyatha bhojakāya deyā tathānyatpriyamātmano yat | | 4
bhavedalābho yadi bhojakānāṃ viprāstadārhanti jayopajīvinaḥ |
ye mantravidbrāhmaṇapāṭhakāśca ye ye.api sāmādhyayaneṣu yuktāḥ | | 5
prathamaṃ bhojakā bhojyāḥ purāṇaviduṣaiḥ saha |
teṣāmṛte mantravidastathā vedavido dvijāḥ | | 6
kṛtvaivaṃ saptamī sapta naro bhaktyā samanvitaḥ |
śraddadhāno.anasūyaśca anantaṃ prāpnuyātsukham 3 | | 7
daśānāmaśvamedhānāṃ kṛtānāṃ yatphalaṃ labhet |
tatphalaṃ saptamī sapta kṛtvā prāpnoti mānavaḥ | | 8
duṣprāpaṃ nāsti talloke anayā yanna labhyate |
na ca rogostyasau loke anayā yo na śāmyati | | 9
kuṣṭhāni cāpi sarvāṇi durucchedyānyapi dhruvam |
apayānti yathā nāgā garuḍasya bhayārditāḥ | | 1.70.10
vrataniyamatapobhiḥ saptamīḥ saptaevaṃ vidhivadiha hi kṛtvā mānavo dharmaśīlaḥ |
śrutadhanasutabhāgyārogyapuṇyairupeto vrajati tadanulokaṃ śāśvataṃ tigmaraśmeḥ | | 11
imaṃ vidhiṃ dvijaśreṣṭha śrutvā kṛtvā ca mānavaḥ |
sahasraraśmiṃ sa viśeṣānnātra kāryā vicāraṇā | | 12
surairvā munibhirvāpi purāṇajñairidaṃ śrutam |
sarve te paramātmānaṃ pūjayanti divākaram | | 13
idamākhyānamārṣeyaṃ yanmayābhihitaṃ tava |
sūryabhaktāya dātavyaṃ netarāya 1 kadācana | | 14
yaścaitacchrāvayennityaṃ yaścaitacchṛṇuyānnaraḥ |
sa sahasrārciṣaṃ devaṃ praviśennātra saṃśayaḥ | | 15
mucyedārtastathā rogācchrutvemāmāditaḥ kathām |
jijñāsurlabhate kāmānbhaktaḥ sūryagatiṃ labhet | | 16
kṣemeṇa gacchate.adhvānaṃ yastvidaṃ paṭhatedhvani |
yo yaṃ prārthayate kāmaṃ sa taṃ prāpnoti ca dhruvam | | 17
ekāntabhāvopagata ekānte susamāhitaḥ |
prāpyaitatparamaṃ guhyaṃ bhūtvā sūryavrato naraḥ | | 18
prāpnoti paramaṃ sthānaṃ bhāskarasya mahātmanaḥ |
lagnagarbhā pramucyeta garbhiṇī janayetsutam | | 19
vandhyā prasavamāpnoti putrapautrasamanvitam |
evametanmamākhyātaṃ bhāskareṇāmitaujasā | |
mayāpi tava mākhyātaṃ bhaktyā bhānoridaṃ dvija | | 1.70.20
pūjanīyastvayā bhānuḥ sarvapāpopaśāntaye |
sa hi dhātā vidhātā ca sarvasya jagato guruḥ | | 21
udyanyaḥ kurute nityaṃ jagadvitimiraṃ karaiḥ |
dvādaśātmā sa deveśaḥ prīyatāṃ te.aditeḥ sutaḥ | | 22
iti śrībhaviṣye mahāpurāṇe śatārddhasāhasryāṃ saṃhitāyāṃ brāhme parvaṇi saptamīkalpe
ādityamāhātmye sarṣapasaptamīvarṇanaṃ nāma saptatitamo.adhyāyaḥ | 70 |
athaikasaptatitamo.adhyāyaḥ
brahmaproktasūryanāmavarṇanam
brahmovāca
nāmabhiḥ saṃstuto devo yairarkaḥ parituṣyati |
tāni te kīrtayāmyeṣa yathāvadanupūrvaśaḥ | | 1
namaḥ sūryāya nityāya ravaye kāryabhānave |
bhāskarāya mataṅgāya mārtaṇḍāya vivasvate | | 2
ādityāyādidevāya namaste raśmimāline |
divākarāya dīptāya agnaye mihirāya ca | | 3
prabhākarāya mitrāya namaste.aditisambhava |
namo gopataye nityaṃ diśāṃ ca pataye namaḥ | |4
namo dhātre vidhātre ca aryamṇe varuṇāya ca |
pūṣṇe bhagāya mitrāya parjanyāyāṃśave namaḥ | | 5
namo hitakṛte nityaṃ dharmāya tapanāya ca |
haraye haritāśvāya viśvasya pataye namaḥ | | 6
viṣṇave brahmaṇe nityaṃ tryambakāya tathātmane |
namaste saptalokeśa namaste saptasaptaye | | 7
ekasmai hi namastubhyamekacakrarathāya ca |
jyotiṣāṃ pataye nityaṃ sarvaprāṇabhṛte namaḥ | | 8
hitāya sarvabhūtānāṃ śivāyārtiharāya ca |
namaḥ padmaprabodhāya namo vedādimūrtaye | | 9
kādhijāya namastubhyaṃ namastārāsutāya ca |
bhīmajāya namastubhyaṃ pāvakāya ca vai namaḥ | | 1.71.10
dhiṣaṇāya namonityaṃ namaḥ kṛṣṇāya nityadā |
namo.astvaditiputrāya namo lakṣyāya nityaśaḥ | | 11
etānyādityanāmāni mayā proktāni vai purā |
ārādhanāya devasya sarvakāmena suvrata | | 12
sāyaṃ prātaḥ śucirbhūtvā yaḥ paṭhetsusamāhitaḥ |
sa prāpnotyakhilānkāmānyathāhaṃ prāptavānpurā | | 13
prasādāttasya devasya bhāskarasya mahātmanaḥ |
śrīkāmaḥ śriyamāpnoti dharmārthī dharmamāpnuyāt | | 14
āturo mucyate rogādbaddho mucyeta bandhanāt |
rājyārthī rājyamāpnoti kāmārthī kāmamāpnuyāt | | 15
etajjapyaṃ rahasyaṃ ca saṃdhyopāsanameva ca |
etena japamātreṇa naraḥ pāpātpramucyate | | 16
iti śrībhaviṣye mahāpurāṇe śatārddhasāhasryāṃ saṃhitāyāṃ brāhme parvaṇi saptamīkalpe
brahmaproktasūryanāmavarṇanaṃ nāmaikasaptatitamo.adhyāyaḥ | 71 |
atha dvisaptatitamo.adhyāyaḥ
durvāsāśāpavisarjanavarṇanam
sumanturuvāca
itthaṃ brahmavaco yogī śrutvā rājandivākaram |
vyomarūpaṃ samārādhya gataḥ sūryasalokatām | | 1
tathā tvamapi rājendra pūjayitvā vibhāvasum |
gamiṣyasi paraṃ sthānaṃ devānāmapi durlabham | | 2
śatānīka uvāca
ādyaṃ sthānaṃ raveḥ kutra jambūdvīpe mahāmune |
yatra pūjāṃ vidhānoktāṃ pratigṛhṇātyasau raviḥ | | 3
sumanturuvāca
sthānāni trīṇi devasya dvīpe.asminbhāskarasya tu |
pūrvamindravanaṃ nāma tathā muṇḍīramucyate | | 4
kālapriyaṃ tṛtīyaṃ tu triṣu lokeṣu viśrutam |
tathānyadapi te vacmi yatpurā brahmaṇoditam | | 5
candrabhāgātaṭe nāmnā puraṃ yatsāmbasaṃjñitam |
dvīpesmiñchāśvataṃ sthānaṃ yatra sūryasya nityatā | | 6
prītyā sāmbasya tatrarko janasyānugrahāya ca |
tatra dvādaśabhāgena mitro maitreṇa cakṣuṣā | | 7
avalokañjagatsarvaṃ śreyo.arthaṃ tiṣṭhate sadā |
prayuktāṃ vidhivatpūjāṃ gṛhṇāti bhagavānsvayam | | 8
śatānīka uvāca
ko.ayaṃ sāmbaḥ sutaḥ kasya kasya prīto divākara |
yasya cāyaṃ sahasrāṃśurvaradaḥ puṇyakarmaṇaḥ | | 9
sumanturuvāca
ya ete dvādaśādityā virājante mahābalāḥ |
teṣāṃ yo viṣṇusaṃjñastu sarvalokeṣu viśrutaḥ | | 1.72.10
ihāsau vāsudevatvamavāpa bhagavānvibhuḥ |
tasmātsāmbaḥ suto jajñe jāmbavatyāṃ mahābalaḥ | | 11
sa tu pitrā bhṛśaṃ śaptaḥ kuṣṭharogamavāptavān |
tenāyaṃ sthāpitaḥ sūryaḥ svānāmnā ca puraṃ kṛtam | | 12
śatānīka uvāca
śastaḥ kasminnimitte.asau pitrā caivātmasambhavaḥ |
nālpaṃ hi kāraṇaṃ vipra yenāsau śaptavānsutam | | 13
sumanturuvāca
śṛṇuṣvāvahito rājaṃstasya yacchāpakāraṇam |
durvāsā nāma bhagavānrudrasyāṃśasamudbhavaḥ | | 14
aṭamānaḥ sa bhagavāṃstrīllokānpracacāra ha |
atha prāpto dvāravatīṃ madhusaṃjñocitāṃ purā | | 15
tamāgatamṛṣiṃ dṛṣṭvā sāmbo rūpeṇa garvitaḥ |
piṅgākṣaṃ kṣudhitaṃ rūkṣaṃ virūpaṃ sukṛśaṃ tathā | | 16
anukārāspadaṃ cakre darśane gamane tathā |
dṛṣṭvā tasya mukhaṃ sāmbo vakra cakre tathātmanaḥ | | 17
mukhaṃ kurukulaśreṣṭha garvito yauvanena tu |
atha kruddho mahātejā durvāsā ṛṣisattamaḥ | | 18
sāmbaṃ covāca bhagavānvidhunvanmukhamātmanaḥ |
yasmādvirūpaṃ māṃ dṛṣṭvā svātmarūpeṇa garvitaḥ | | 19
gamane darśane mahyamanukāraṃ samācaraḥ |
tasmāttu kuṣṭharogitvamacirāttvaṃ gamiṣyasi | | 1.72.20
iti śrībhaviṣye mahāpurāṇe śatārddhasāhasryāṃ saṃhitāyāṃ brāhme parvaṇi saptamīkalpe
sāmbāya durvāsasā śāpavisarjanaṃ nāma dvisattatitamo.adhyāyaḥ | 72 |
atha trisaptatitamo.adhyāyaḥ
sāmbakṛtasūryārādhanavarṇanam
sumanturuvāca
etasminneva kāle tu nārado bhagavānṛṣiḥ |
brahmaṇo mānasaḥ putrastriṣu lokeṣu viśrutaḥ | | 1
sarvalokacaraḥ so.atha aṭamānaḥ samantataḥ |
vāsudevaṃ sa vai draṣṭuṃ nityaṃ dvāravatīṃ purīm | | 2
āyāti ṛṣibhiḥ sārdhaṃ krodhano munisattamaḥ |
athāgacchati tasmiṃstu sarve yadukumārakāḥ | | 3
pradyumnaprabhṛtayo ye prahvāścāvanatāḥ sthitāḥ |
abhivādyārghyapādyābhyāṃ pūjāṃ cakruḥ samantataḥ | | 4
sāmbastvavaśyabhāvitvāttasya śāpasya kāraṇam |
avajñāṃ kurūte nityaṃ nāradasya mahātmanaḥ | | 5
rataḥ krīḍāsu vai nityaṃ rūpayauvanagarvitaḥ |
avinītaṃ tu taṃ dṛṣṭvā cintayāmāsa nāradaḥ | | 6
asyāhamavinītasya kariṣye vinayaṃ śubham |
evaṃ sañcintayityā tu vāsudevamathābravīt .| | 7
imāḥ ṣoḍaśasāhasryaḥ striyo yādavasattama |
sarvāsāṃ hi sadā sāmbe bhāvo deva samāśritaḥ | | 8
rūpeṇāpratimaḥ sāmbo lokesminsacarācare |
sadā hīcchanti tāstasya darśanaṃ cāpi hi striyaḥ | | 9
śrutvaivaṃ nāradādvākyaṃ cintayāmāsa keśavaḥ |
yadetannāradenoktamanyadatra tu kiṃ bhavet | | 1.73.10
vacanaṃ śrūyate loke cāpalyaṃ strīṣu vidyate |
ślokau cemau purā gītau cittajñairyoṣitāṃ dvijaiḥ | | 11
pauṃścalyāccalacittatvānnaiḥsnehyācca svabhāvataḥ |
rakṣitāḥ sarvato hyetā vikurvanti hi bhartṛṣu | | 12
naitā rūpaṃ parīkṣante nāsāṃ vayasi niścayaḥ |
surūpaṃ vā virūpaṃ vā pumānityeva bhuñjate | | 13
manasā cintayanneva kṛṣṇo nāradamabravīt |
na hyahaṃ śraddadhāmyetadyadetadbhāṣitaṃ tvayā | | 14
bruvāṇamevaṃ devaṃ tu nārado vākyamabravīt |
tathāhaṃ tatkariṣyāmi yathā śraddhāsyate bhavān | | 15
evamuktvā yayau svargaṃ nāradastu yathāgataḥ |
tataḥ katipayāhobhirdvārakāṃ punarabhyagāt | | 16
tasminnahani devo.api sahāntaḥpurikairjanaiḥ |
anubhūya jalakrīḍāṃ pānamāsevate rahaḥ | | 17
ramyaraivatakodyāne nānādrumavibhūṣite |
sarvartukusumairnityaṃ vāsite sarvakānane | | 18
nānājalajaphullābhirdīrghikābhiralaṅkṛte |
haṃsasārasasaṃghuṣṭe cakravākopaśobhite | | 19
tasminsa ramate devaḥ strībhiḥ parivṛtastadā |
hāranūpurakeyūraraśanādyairvibhūṣaṇaiḥ | | 1.73.20
bhūṣitānāṃ varastrīṇāṃ cārvaṅgīnāṃ viśeṣataḥ |
tābhiḥ sampīyate pānaṃ śubhagandhānvitaṃ śubham | | 21
etasminnantare buddhvā madyapānāttataḥ striyaḥ |
uvāca nāradaḥ sāmbaṃ sāmbottiṣṭha kumāraka | | 22
tvāṃ samāhvāyate devo na yuktaṃ sthātumatra te |
tadvākyārthamabuddhaiva nāradenātha coditaḥ | | 23
gatvā tu satvaraṃ sāmbaḥ praṇāmamakarotprabhoḥ |
sāṣṭāṅgaṃ ca hareḥ sāmbo vidhivadvallabhasya ca | | 24
etasminnantare tatra yāstu vai svalpasāttvikāḥ |
taṃ dṛṣṭvā sundaraṃ sāmbaṃ sarvāścukṣubhire striyaḥ | | 25
na sa dṛṣṭaḥ purā yābhirantaḥpuranivāsibhiḥ |
madyadoṣāttatastāsāṃ smṛtilopāttathā nṛpa | | 26
svabhāvatolpasattvānāṃ jaghanāni visusruvuḥ |
śrūyate cāpyayaṃ ślokaḥ purāṇaprathitaḥ kṣitau | | 27
brahmacarye.api vartantyāḥ sādhvyā hyapi ca śrūyate |
hṛdyaṃ hi puruṣaṃ dṛṣṭvā yoniḥ saṃklidyate striyāḥ | | 28
loke.api dṛśyate hyetanmadyasyātyarthasevanāt |
lajjāṃ muñcanti niḥśaṅkā hrīmatyo hyapi hi striyaḥ | | 29
samāṃsairbhojanaiḥ snigdhaiḥ yānaiḥ sīdhusurāsavaiḥ |
gandhairmanojñairvastraiśca kāmaḥ strīṣu vijṛmbhate | | 1.73.30
sīdhuprayuktaṃ śukreṇa satataṃ sādhu hīcchatā |
madyaṃ ṇa peyamatyartha puruṣeṇa vipaścitā | | 31
nāradopyatha taṃ sāmbaṃ preṣayitvā tvarānvitaḥ |
ājagāmātha tatraiva sāmbasyānupadena tu | | 32
āyāntaṃ tāśca taṃ dṛṣṭvā priyaṃ saumanasamṛṣim |
sahasaivotthitāḥ sarvāḥ striyastaṃ madavihvalāḥ | | 33
tāsāmathotthitānāṃ tu vāsudevasya paśyataḥ |
bhittvā vāsāṃsi śubhrāṇi patreṣu patitāni tu | | 34
tā dṛṣṭvā tu hariḥ kruddhaḥ sarvāstā śaptavānstriyaḥ |
yasmādgatāni cetāṃsi māṃ muktvānyatra ca striyaḥ | | 35
tasmātpatikṛtā~mllokānāyuṣoṃnte na yāsyatha |
patilokaparibhraṣṭāḥ svargamārgāttathaiva ca | | 36
bhūtvā cāśaraṇā yūyaṃ dasyuhastaṃ gamiṣyatha | | 37
sumanturuvāca
śāpadoṣāttatastasmāttāḥ striyaḥ svargate harau |
hṛtāḥ pāñjanadaiścaurairarjunasya tu paśyataḥ | |
alpasattvāstu yāstvāsangatāstā dūṣaṇaṃ striyaḥ | | 38
rukmiṇī satyabhāmā ca tathā jāmbavatī priyā |
naitā gatā dasyuhastaṃ svena sattvena rakṣitāḥ | | 39
śaptvaiva tāḥ striyaḥ kṛṣṇaḥ sāmbamapyaśapattataḥ |
yasmādatīva te kāntaṃ rūpaṃ dṛṣṭvā imāḥ striyaḥ | | 1.73.40
kṣubdhāḥ sarvā yatastasmātkuṣṭharogamavāpnuhi |
tasya tadvacanaṃ śrutvā sāmbaḥ kṛṣṇasya bhārata | | 41
uvāca prahasanrājansaṃsmarannṛṣibhāṣitam |
animittamahaṃ tāta bhāvadoṣavivarjitaḥ | |
śapto na me.atra vai kruddho durvāsā anyathā vadet | | 42
sumanturuvāca
asmicchapte.animitte.asau pitrā jāmbavatīsutaḥ |
prāptavānkuṣṭharogitvaṃ virūpatvaṃ ca bhārata | | 43
sāmbena punarapyeva durvāsāḥ kopito muniḥ |
tacchāpānmusalaṃ jātaṃ kulaṃ yenāsya ghātitam | | 44
śrutvā hyavinayāddoṣānsāmbenāptānkṣamādhipa |
nityaṃ bhāvyaṃ vinītena gurudevadvijātiṣu | | 45
priyaṃ ca vākyaṃ vaktavyaṃ sarvaprītikaraṃ vibho |
kiṃ tvayā na śrutau ślokau yāvuktau vedhasā purā | |
śṛṇvato devadevasya vyomakeśasya bhārata | | 46
yo dharmaśīlo jitamānaroṣo vidyāvinīto na paropatāpī |
svadāratuṣṭaḥ paradāravarjito na tasya loke bhayamasti kiñcit | | 47
na tathā śītalasalilaṃ na candanaraso na śītalā chāyā |
prahlādayati ca puruṣaṃ yathā madhurabhāṣiṇī vāṇī | | 48
tataḥ śāpābhibhūtena samyagārādhya bhāskaram |
sāmbenāptaṃ tathārogyaṃ rūpaṃ ca paramaṃ punaḥ | | 49
rūpamāpya tathā.a.arogyaṃ bhāskarāddharisūnunā |
niveśito ravirbhaktyā svanāmnā kṣmādhipeśvara | | 1.73.50
iti śrībhaviṣye mahāpurāṇe śatārddhasāhasryāṃ saṃhitāyāṃ brāhme parvaṇi saptamīkalpe
sāmbakṛtasūryārādhanavarṇanaṃ nāma trisaptatitamo.adhyāyaḥ | 73 |
atha catuḥsaptatitamo.adhyāyaḥ
ādityadvādaśamūrtivarṇanam
śatānīka uvāca
sthāpito yadi sāmbena sūryaścandrasarittaṭe |
tasmānnadyamidaṃ sthānaṃ yathaitadbhāṣate bhavān | | 1
sumanturuvāca
ādyaṃ sthānamidaṃ bhānoḥ paścātsāmbena bhārata |
vistareṇāsya cādyasya kathyamānaṃ nibodha me | | 2
atrādyo lokanātho.asau raśmimālī jagatpatiḥ |
mitratve ca sthito devastapastepe purā nṛpa | | 3
anādinidhano brahmā nityaścākṣaya eva ca |
sṛṣṭvā prajāpatīnbrahmā sṛṣṭvā ca vividhāḥ prajāḥ | | 4
sasarja mukhato devaṃ pūrvamambujasannibham |
kañjajastaṃ tato devaṃ vakṣasto nirmame nṛpa | | 5
lalāṭātkuruśārdūla nīrajākṣaṃ digambaram 1 |
ṛbhavaḥ pādataḥ sarve sṛṣṭāstena mahātmanā | | 6
tataḥ śatasahasrāṃśuravyaktaḥ puruṣaḥ svayam |
kṛtvā dvādaśadhātmānamadityāmudapadyata | | 7
indro dhātā ca parjanyaḥ pūṣā tvaṣṭāryamā bhagaḥ |
vivasvānaṃśurviṣṇuśca varuṇo mitra eva ca | | 8
ebhirdvādaśabhistena ādityena mahātmanā |
kṛtsnaṃ jagadidaṃ vyāptaṃ mūrtibhistu narādhipa | | 9
tasya yā prathamā mūrtirādityasyendrasaṃjñitā |
sthitā sā devarājatve dānavāsuranāśinī | 1.74.10
dvitīyā cāsya yā mūrtirnāmnā dhāteti kīrtitā |
sthitā prajāpatitve sā vidhātrī sṛjate prajāḥ | | 11
tṛtīyā tasya yā mūrtiḥ parjanya iti viśrutā |
kareṣveva sthitā sā tu varṣatyamṛtameva hi | | 12
caturthī tasya yā mūrtirnāmnā pūṣeti viśrutā |
mantreṣvavasthitā sā tu prajāḥ puṣṇāti bhārata | | 13
mūrtiryā pañcamī tasya nāmnā tvaṣṭeti viśrutā |
vanaspatiṣu sā nityamoṣadhīṣu ca vai sthitā | | 14
ṣaṣṭhī mūrtistu yā tasya aryameti ca viśrutā |
prajāsamvaraṇārthaṃ sā pureṣveva sthitā sadā | | 15
bhānoryā saptamī mūrtirnāmnā bhaga iti smṛtā |
bhūmau vyavasthitā sā tu kṣmādhareṣu ca bhārata | | 16
aṣṭamī cāsya yā mūrtirvivasvāniti saṃjñitā |
agnau vyavasthitā sā tu pacate.annaṃ śarīriṇām | | 17
navamī citrabhānoryā mūrtirañśuriti smṛtā |
vīra candre sthitā sā tu āpyāyayati vai jagat | 18
mūrtiryā daśamī tasya viṣṇurityabhidhīyate |
prādurbhavati sā nityaṃ gīrvāṇārivināśinī | | 19
mūrtistvekādaśī yā tu bhānorvaruṇasaṃjñitā |
jīvāyayati sā kṛtsnaṃ jagaddhi samupāśritā | | 1.74.20
apāṃ sthānaṃ samudrastu varuṇo.atra pratiṣṭhitaḥ |
tasmādvai procyate vīra sāgaro varuṇālayaḥ | | 21
mūrtiryā dvādaśī bhānornāmato mitrasaṃjñitā |
lokānāṃ sā hitārthaṃ tu sthitā candrasarittaṭe | | 22
vāyubhakṣā tapastepe yuktā maitreṇa cakṣuṣā |
anugṛhṇansadā bhaktānvarairnānāvidhaiḥ sadā | | 23
evamādyamidaṃ sthānaṃ puṇyaṃ mitrapadaṃ smṛtam |
tatra mitraḥ sthito yasmāttasmānmitrapadaṃ smṛtam | | 24
tayārādhya mahābāho sāmbenāmitatejasā |
tatprasādāttadādeśātpratiṣṭhā tasya vai kṛtā | | 25
ābhirdvādaśabhistena bhāskareṇa mahātmanā |
kṛtsnaṃ jagadidaṃ vyāptaṃ mūrtibhistu narādhipa | | 26
tasmādvandyo namasyaśca dvādaśasvapi mūrtiṣu |
ye namasyanti cādityaṃ narā bhaktisamanvitāḥ | | 27
te yāsyanti paraṃ sthāna 1 tiṣṭhedyatrāmbujeśvaraḥ |
ityevaṃ dvādaśātmānamādityaṃ pūjayettu yaḥ | | 28
sa muktaḥ sarvapāpebhyo yāti helisalokatām | | 29
iti śrībhaviṣye mahāpurāṇe śatārddhasāhasryāṃ saṃhitāyāṃ brāhme parvaṇi saptamīkalpe
sūryadvādaśamūrtivarṇanaṃ nāma catuḥsaptatitamo.adhyāyaḥ | 74 |
atha pañcasaptatitamo.adhyāyaḥ
nāradopasaṅgamanavarṇanam
śatānīka uvāca
kathaṃ sāmbaḥ prapanno.arkaṃ kena vā pratipāditaḥ |
ugraṃ śāpaṃ ca taṃ prāpya pitaraṃ sa kimuktavān | | 1
sumanturuvāca
uktameva purā vīra yathā śaptaḥ sa yādavaḥ |
pitrā sāmbo mahārāja hariṇāmbujadhāriṇā | | 2
atha śāpābhibhūtastu sāmbaḥ pitaramabravīt |
vinayāvanato bhūtvā prāñjaliḥ śirasā gataḥ | | 3
kiṃ mayāpakṛtaṃ deva yena śaptosmyahaṃ tvayā |
ahaṃ tvadājñayā deva tvaramāṇotra āgataḥ | | 4
kasmānnipātitaḥ śāpo mayi te.anapakāriṇi |
na vai jānāmyahaṃ kiñcitprasīda jagataḥ pate | | 5
śāpaṃ niyaccha me deva prasādaṃ kuru me prabho |
kaśmalenābhibhūto.ahaṃ yena mucyeya kilbiṣāt | | 6
tamuvāca tataḥ kṛṣṇaḥ sāmbaṃ buddhvā hyanāgasam |
nāhaṃ putra punaḥ śakto rogasyāsya vyapohane | | 7
asyāyaṃ jagato nātho dvādaśātmā divākaraḥ |
sahasraraśmirādityaḥ śaktaḥ putra vyapohitum | | 8
jñātaṃ mayādhunā caiva yathā tvaṃ nāradena tu |
roṣādvisarjitaḥ putra matsakāśaṃ mahātmanā | | 9
tasmāttameva pṛccha tvaṃ prasādya ṛṣisattamam |
ākhyāsyati sa te devaṃ śāpaṃ yaste.apaneṣyati | | 1.75.10
athaitatsa piturvākyaṃ śrutvā jāmbavatīsutaḥ |
dīnaḥ śokaparītātmā tataḥ sañcintya bhārata | | 11
dvāravatyāṃ sthitaṃ viṣṇuṃ kadāciddraṣṭumāgatam |
vinayādupasaṅgamya sāmbaḥ papraccha nāradam | | 12
bhagavanvedhasaḥ putra sarvalokajña suvrata |
prasādaṃ kuru me vipra praṇatasya mahāmate | | 13
ye me nīrujaṃ kāyaṃ kaśmalaṃ ca praṇaśyati |
taṃ yogaṃ ihi me vipra praṇatasyāsya suvrata | | 14
nārada uvāca
yaḥ stutyaḥ sarvadevānāṃ namasyaḥ pūjya eva ca |
pūjayitvāśu taṃ devaṃ tato vyādhiṃ prahāsyasi | | 15
sāmba uvāca
kaḥ stutyaḥ sarvadevānāṃ namasyaḥ pūjya eva ca |
kaḥ sarvagaśca sarvatra śaraṇaṃ yaṃ vajrāmyaham | | 16
pitṛśāpānalenāhaṃ dahyamāno mahāmune |
śāntyarthamasya kaṃ devaṃ śaraṇaṃ ca vrajāmyaham | | 17
etacchrutvā tu sāmbasya vacanaṃ karuṇāvaham |
hitvā tu kāmajaṃ vīra nārado vākyamabravīt | | 18
stutyo vandyaśca pūjyaśca namasya īḍya eva ca |
bhāskaro yaduśārdūla brahmādīnāṃ sadānagha | | 19
iti śrībhaviṣye mahāpurāṇe śatārddhasāhasryāṃ saṃhitāyāṃ brāhme parvaṇi sāmbopākhyāne sāmbaṃ prati kṛṣṇaśāpe sāmbasya nāradopasaṃgamanavarṇanaṃ nāma pañcasaptatitamo.adhyāyaḥ | 75 |
atha ṣaṭasaptatitamo.adhyāyaḥ
nāradasāmbasaṃvāde sūryaparivāravarṇanam
nārada uvāca
kadācitparyaṭa~mllokānsūryalokamahaṃ gataḥ |
tatra dṛṣṭo mayā sūryaḥ sarvadevagaṇairvṛtaḥ | | 1
gandharvairapsarobhiśca nāgairyakṣaiśca rākṣasaiḥ |
tatra gāyanti gandharvā nṛtyantyapsarasastathā | | 2
rakṣantyudgataśastrāstaṃ yakṣarākṣasapannagāḥ |
ṛco yajūṃṣi sāmāni mūrtimantīha sarvaśaḥ | |
tatkṛtairvividhaiḥ stotraiḥ stuvanti ṛṣayo ravim | | 3
mūrtimatyaḥ sthitāstatra tisraḥ saṃdhyāḥ śubhānanāḥ |
gṛhītavajranārācāḥ parivārya raviṃ sthitāḥ | | 4
aruṇā varṇataḥ pūrvā madhyamā cendusannibhā |
tṛtīyākṣmājasaṃkāśā 1 saṃdhyā caiva prakīrtitā | | 5
ādityā vasavo rudrā marutothāśvinau tathā |
trisaṃdhyaṃ pūjayantyarkaṃ tathānye ca divaukasaḥ | | 6
īrayañjayaśabdaṃ tu indrastatraiva tiṣṭhati |
kavistu tryambako devastrisaṃdhyaṃ pūjayanti vai | | 7
dinādāvambujākāraṃ pūjayedambujāsanam |
cakrarūpaṃ tu madhyāhne ghṛtārciḥ pūjayetsadā | | 8
pūjayetsagaṇaṃ rātrau vipulājyasvarūpiṇam |
raviṃ bhaktyā sadā devaṃ kaṃjārdhakṛtaśekharaḥ | | 9
sārathyaṃ kurute tasya patagasyāgrajaḥ 1 sadā |
vahamāno rathaṃ divyaṃ kālāvayavanirmitam | | 1.76.10
haritaiḥ saptabhiryuktaṃ chandobhirvājirūpibhiḥ | | 11
dve bhārye pārśvayostasya rājñīnikṣubhasaṃjñitā |
tathānyairnāmabhirdevāḥ parivārya raviṃ sthitāḥ | | 12
piṅgalo lekhakastatra tathānyo daṇḍanāyakaḥ |
rājāśroṣau ca dvau dvāre sthitau kalmāṣapakṣiṇau | | 13
tato vyoma catuḥśṛṅgaṃ meroḥ sadṛśalakṣaṇam |
diṇḍistathāgratastasya dikṣu cānye sthitāḥ surāḥ | | 14
evaṃ sarvagamaṃ devaṃ pradīptaṃ jagati dvija |
brahmādyaiḥ saṃstutaṃ devaṃ gīrvāṇairṛṣabhottamam | |
graheśaṃ bhuvaneśānamādityaṃ śaraṇaṃ vraja | | 15
sāmba uvāca
tattvataḥ śrotumicchāmi kathaṃ sarvagato raviḥ | | 16
kati vā raśmayastasya mūrtayaśca kati smṛtāḥ |
kā rājñī nikṣubhā kā ca kaścāyaṃ daṇḍanāyakaḥ | | 17
piṅgalaścāpi kastatra kiṃ cāsau likhate sadā |
rājāśroṣau ca kau tatra kau ca kalmāṣapakṣiṇau | | 18
kiṃ daivatyaṃ ca tadvyoma meroḥ sadṛśalakṣaṇam |
ko diṇḍiragratastatra ke devā dikṣu ye sthitāḥ | | 19
tattvato nigamaiścaiva vistareṇa vadasva māma |
yenāhaṃ tattvato jñātvā vrajāmi śaraṇaṃ dvija | | 1.76.20
iti śrībhaviṣye mahāpurāṇe śatārddhasāhasryāṃ saṃhitāyāṃ brāhme parvaṇi saptamīkalpe sāmbopākhyāne nāradasāmbasaṃvāde sūryaparivāravarṇanaṃ nāma ṣaṭsaptatitamo.adhyāyaḥ | 76 |
atha saptasaptatitamo.adhyāyaḥ
sāmbopākhyāne sūryavarṇanam
nārada uvāca
vistareṇānupūrvyā ca sūryaṃ nigadataḥ śṛṇu |
tataḥ śeṣānpravakṣye.ahaṃ namaskṛtya vivasvate | | 1
avyaktaṃ kāraṇaṃ yattannityaṃ sadasadātmakam |
pradhānaṃ prakṛtiśceti yamāhustattvacintakāḥ | | 2
gandhairvarṇai rasairhīnaṃ śabdasparśavivarjitam |
jagadyoniṃ mahadbhūtaṃ paraṃ brahmā sanātanam | | 3
nigrahaṃ sarvabhūtānāmavyaktamabhavatkila |
anādyantamajaṃ sūkṣmaṃ triguṇaṃ prabhavāpyayam | | 4
anākāramavijñeyaṃ tamāhuḥ puruṣaṃ param |
tasyātmanā sarvamidaṃ jagadvyāptaṃ mahātmanaḥ | | 5
tasyeśvarasya pratimā jñānavairāgyalakṣaṇā |
dharmeśvaryakṛtā buddhirbrāhmī tasyābhimāninaḥ | | 6
avyaktājjāyate tasya manasā yadyadicchati |
caturmukhasya brahmatve kālatve cāntakṛdbhavet | | 7
sahasramūrdhā puruṣastisrovasthāḥ svayambhuvaḥ |
sattvaṃ rajaśca brahmatve kālatve ca rajastamaḥ | | 8
sāttvikaṃ puruṣatve ca guṇavṛttaṃ svayaṃbhuvaḥ |
brahmatve sṛjate lokānkālatve cāpi saṃkṣipet | | 9
puruṣatve udāsīnastisro.avasthāḥ prajāpateḥ |
tridhā vibhajya cātmānaṃ trikālaṃ sampravartate | | 1.77.10
sṛjate grasate caiva vīkṣate ca tribhiḥ svayam |
agre hiraṇyagarbhastu prādurbhūtaḥ svayambhuvaḥ | | 11
ādityasyādidevatvādajātatvādajaḥ smṛtaḥ |
deveṣu sa mahāndevo mahādevaḥ smṛtastataḥ | | 12
sarveśatvācca lokasya adhīśatvācca īśvaraḥ |
bṛhattvācca smṛto brahmā bhavatvādbhava ucyate | | 13
pāti yasmātprajāḥ sarvāḥ prajāpatirataḥ smṛtaḥ |
pure śete ca vai yasmāttasmātpuruṣa ucyate | | 14
notpādyatvādapūrvatvātsvayaṃbhūriti viśrutaḥ | | 15
hiraṇyāṇḍagato yasmādgraheśo vai divaspatiḥ |
tasmāddhiraṇyagarbho.asau devadevo divākaraḥ | | 16
āpo nārā iti proktā ṛṣibhistattvadarśibhiḥ |
ayanaṃ tasya tā āpastena nārāyaṇaḥ smṛtaḥ | | 17
ara ityeṣa śīghrārtho nipātaḥ kavibhiḥ smṛtaḥ |
āpa evārṇavā bhūtvā na śīghrāstena tā narāḥ 1 | | 18
ekārṇave purā tasminnaṣṭe sthāvarajaṅgame |
nārāyaṇākhyaḥ puruṣaḥ suṣvāpa salile tadā | |
sahasraśīrṣā sumanāḥ sahasrākṣaḥ sahasrapāt | | 19
sahasrabāhuḥ prathamaḥ prajāpatistrayīpathe yaḥ puruṣo nigadyate |
ādityavarṇo bhuvanasya goptā apūrva ekaḥ puruṣaḥ purāṇaḥ | | 1.77.20
hiraṇyagarbhaḥ puruṣo mahātmā sampadyate vai tamasā parastāt | | 21
iti śrībhaviṣye mahāpurāṇe śatārddhasāhasryāṃ saṃhitāyāṃ brāhme parvaṇi saptamīkalpe
sāmbopākhyāne sūryavarṇanaṃ nāma saptasaptatitamo.adhyāyaḥ | 77 |
athāṣṭasaptatitamo.adhyāyaḥ
sūryamahimāvarṇanam
nārada uvāca
tulyaṃ yugasahasrasya naiśaṃ kālamupāsya saḥ |
śarvaryante prakurute brahmatvaṃ sargakāraṇāt | | 1
salilenāplutāṃ bhūmi dṛṣṭvā kāryaṃ vicintya saḥ |
bhūtvā sa tu varāho vai apaḥ saṃviśate prabhuḥ | | 2
sañcityaivaṃ sa deveśo bhūmeruddharaṇe kṣamaḥ |
mahīṃ mahārṇave magnāmuddhartumupacakrame | | 3
uttiṣṭhatastasya jalārdrakukṣermahāvarāhasya mahīṃ vidhārya |
vidhunvato vedamayaṃ śarīraṃ romāntarasthā munayo japanti | | 4
uddhṛtyorvīṃ sa salilātprajāsargamakalpayat |
manasā janayāmāsa putrānātmasamāñchubhān | | 5
bhṛgvaṅgirasamatriṃ ca pulastyaṃ pulahaṃ katum |
marīcimatha dakṣaṃ ca vaśiṣṭhaṃ navamaṃ tathā | | 6
nava prajāpatīnsṛṣṭvā tataḥ sa puruṣottamaḥ |
prādurbhūto.aditeḥ putraḥ prajānāṃ hitakāmyayā | | 7
marīcātkaśyapaṃ putraṃ yaṃ vedhā janayajjale |
prajāpatīnāṃ daśamaṃ tejasā brahmaṇaḥ samam | | 8
vṛkṣakanyā.aditirnāmnā patnī sā kaśyapasya tu |
aṇḍaṃ sā janayāmāsa bhūrbhuvaḥsvastrisaṃyutam | | 9
tatrotpannaḥ sahasrāṃśurdvādaśātmā divākaraḥ |
navayojanasāhasro vistāro.asya mahātmanaḥ | |
vistārāstriguṇaścāsya pariṇāho vibhāvasoḥ | | 1.78.10
yathāpuṇyaṃ kadambasya samantātkeśarairvṛtam |
tathaiva tejasāṃ golaṃ samantādraśmibhirvṛtam | | 11
sahasraśīrṣā puruṣo brāhma yogamudāharan |
taijasasya ca golasya sa tu madhye vyavasthitaḥ | | 12
ādatte sa tu raśmīnāṃ sahasreṇa samantataḥ |
apo nadīsamudrebhyo hradakūpebhya eva ca | | 13
saurī prabhā yā devasya astaṃ yāte divākare |
agnimāviśate rātrau tasmāddūrātprakāśate | | 14
udite ca tataḥ sūrye teja āgneyamāviśat |
pādena tejasaścāgnestasmātsa tapate raviḥ | | 15
prakāśatvaṃ tathoṣṇatvaṃ sūrye.agnau ca prakīrtite |
parasparānupraveśādāpyāyete divāniśam | | 16
vyāpakatvaṃ ca raśmīnāṃ nāmāni ca nibodha me |
hetayaḥ kiraṇā gāvo raśmayo.atha gabhastayaḥ | | 17
abhīṣavo ghanaṃ cosrā vasavo.atha marīcayaḥ |
nāḍyo dīdhitayaḥ sādhyā mayūkhā bhānavoṃśavaḥ | | 18
saptārcayaḥ suparṇāśca karāḥ pādāstathaiva ca |
eṣāṃ tu nāmnāṃ raśmīnāṃ paryāyā viṃśatiḥ smṛtāḥ | | 19
candanādīni vakṣyāmi nāmānyeṣāṃ pṛthakpṛthak |
sahasraṃ tāta kathitaṃ śītavarṣoṣṇaniḥśravam | | 1.78.20
teṣāṃ catuḥśataṃ nāḍyo varṣaṃte citramūrtayaḥ |
candanāccaiva mandāśca kotanāmānumāstathā | |
amṛtā nāma te sarve raśmayo vṛṣṭihetavaḥ | | 21
himodvahāstu tatrānye raśmayastriśataṃ smṛtāḥ |
candrāste nāmataḥ sarve pītāste tu gabhastayaḥ | | 22
saumyeśāścaiva vāmaśca hlādino himasarjanāḥ |
śuklāśca kakubhaścaiva gāvo viśvabhṛtastathā | | 23
śuklāste nāmataḥ sarve triśataṃ dharmasarjanāḥ |
samaṃ bibhrati te sarve manuṣyā devatāstathā | | 24
manuṣyānoṣadhībhistu svadhayā ca pitṛrnapi |
amṛtena surānsarvāṃstrayastribhiratarpayan | | 25
vasante caiva grīṣme ca śataiḥ sa tapate tribhiḥ |
varṣāśaratsu caiveśastapate sampravarṣate | | 26
hemante śiśiraṃ caiva himotsargaṃ ca sa tribhiḥ |
oṣadhīṣu balaṃ dhatte svadhāyāṃ ca svadhāṃ punaḥ | |
amareṣvamṛtaṃ sūryastrayaṃ triṣu niyacchiti | | 27
kālognirvatsaraścaiva dvādaśātmā prajāpatiḥ |
tapatyeṣu suraśreṣṭhastrīṃllokānsacarācarān | | 28
eṣa brahmā tathā viṣṇureṣa eva maheśvaraḥ |
ṛco yajūṃṣi sāmāni eṣa eva na saṃśayaḥ | | 29
ṛcābhiḥ stūyate pūrvaṃ madhyāhne yajurbhiḥ sadā |
sāmabhistvaparāhṇeṣu maheśānaḥ prapūjyate | | 1.78.30
pūjyamānastu nityaṃ vai tapatyeṣa divaspatiḥ |
sadaiṣa tejasāṃ rāśirdīptimānsarvalokagaḥ | | 31
pārśvatordhvamadhaścaiva tāpayatyeṣa sarvataḥ |
brahmaviṣṇumaheśānaiḥ pūjyamānastu nityaśaḥ | | 32
yathā sarvagato vāyurvahamānastu tiṣṭhati |
tadvatsahasrakiraṇo graharājo divaspatiḥ | | 33
sūryo gobhirjagatkṛtsnamādīpayati sarvaśaḥ |
trīṇi raśmiśatānyasya bhūrlokaṃ dyotayanti vai | | 34
trīṇitrīṇi tathā cānyau dvau lokau tāpayantyuta |
śataṃ cāpi adhastāttu pātālaṃ tāpayantyuta | | 35
ityetanmaṇḍalaṃ śuklaṃ bhāsvaraṃ helisaṃjñitam |
nakṣatragrahasomānāṃ pratiṣṭhāyonireva ca | |
vidhuṛkṣagrahāḥ sarve vijñeyāḥ sūryasabhbhavāḥ | | 36
raveḥ karasahasraṃ yatprāṅmayā samudāhṛtam |
teṣāṃ śreṣṭhāḥ punaḥ sapta raśmayo grahasaṃjñitāḥ | | 37
suṣumṇo harikeśaśca viśvakarmā tathaiva ca |
sūryaścaivāparo raśmirnāmnā viṣṇuriti smṛtaḥ | | 38
sasattvaḥ sarvabandhustu jīvāyati ca vai jagat |
saptajaḥ prathamastatra kañjajaśca tathā paraḥ | | 39
tāreyaścāparastatra guruḥ sumanasāṃ tathā |
ugrāhvaḥ pañcamasteṣāṃ putro.anyo vanamālinaḥ | |
kaḥ śeṣaḥ saptamasteṣāmete vai sapta raśmayaḥ | | 1.78.40
ādityamūlamakhilaṃ trailokyaṃ sacarācaram |
bhavatyasmājjagatsarvaṃ sa devāsuramānuṣam | | 41
rudrendropendracandrāṇāṃ viprendra tridivaukasām |
mahadyutimataḥ kṛtsnaṃ tejo yatsārvalaukikam | | 42
sarvātmā sarvalokeśo devadevaḥ prajāpatiḥ |
sūrya eva trilokasya mūlaṃ paramadaivatam | | 43
agnau prāstāhutiḥ samyagādityamupatiṣṭhate |
ādityājjāyate vṛṣṭirvṛṣṭerannaṃ tataḥ prajāḥ | | 44
sūryātprasūyate sarvaṃ tasminneva pralīyate |
bhāvābhāvau tu lokānāmādityānniḥsṛtau purā | | 45
etattu dhyānināṃ dhyānaṃ mokṣaścāpyeva mokṣiṇām |
atra gacchanti nirvāṇaṃ jāyante.asmātpunaḥ prajāḥ | | 46
kṣaṇā muhūrtā divasā niśāḥ pakṣāstu nityaśaḥ |
māsāḥ samvatsarāścaiva ṛtavo.atha yugāni ca | |
athādityamṛte hyeṣāṃ kālasaṃkhyā na vidyate | | 47
kālādṛte na niyamā nāgnerviharaṇakriyā |
ṛtū nāmavibhāgācca puṣpamūlaphalaṃ kutaḥ | | 48
abhāvo vyavahārāṇāṃ jantūnāṃ divi ceha ca |
jagatpratāpanamṛte bhāskaraṃ vāritaskaram | | 49
nāvṛṣṭyā tapate sūryo nāvṛṣṭyā pariveṣyate |
ādityasya ca nāmāni sāmānyānīha dvādaśa | | 1.78.50
dvādaśaiva pṛthaktvena tāni vakṣyāmyanekaśaḥ |
ādityaḥ savitā sūryo mihiro.arkaḥ pratāpanaḥ | | 51
mārtaṃḍo bhāskaro bhānuścitrabhānurdivākaraḥ |
ravirvai dvādaśaścaiva jñeyaḥ sāmānyanāmabhiḥ | | 52
viṣṇurdhātā bhagaḥ pūṣā mitrendro varuṇo.aryamā |
vivasvānaṃśumāṃstvaṣṭā parjanyo dvādaśa smṛtāḥ | | 53
ityete dvādaśādityāḥ pṛthaktvena prakīrtitāḥ |
uttiṣṭhanti sadā hyete māsairdvādaśabhiḥ kramāt | | 54
viṣṇustapati caitre ca vaiśākhe cāryamā tathā |
vivasvāñjyeṣṭhamāse tu āṣāḍhe cāṃśumāṃstathā | | 55
parjanyaḥ śrāvaṇe māsi varuṇaḥ proṣṭhasaṃjñake |
indraścāśvayuje māsi dhātā tapati kārtike | | 56
mārgaśīrṣe tathā mitraḥ pauṣe pūṣā divākaraḥ |
māghe bhagastu vijñeyastvaṣṭā tapati phālgune | | 57
taiśca dvādaśabhirviṣṇū raśmīnāṃ dīpyate sadā |
dīpyate gosahasreṇa śataiśca tribhiraryamā | | 58
dvisaptakairvivasvāṃstu aṃśumānpañcakaistribhiḥ |
vivasvāniva parjanyo varuṇaścāryamā iva | | 59
indrastu dviguṇaiḥ ṣaḍbhirdhātaikādaśabhiḥ śataiḥ |
mitravadbhagavattvaṣṭā sahasreṇa śatena ca | | 1.78.60
uttaropakrame.arkasya vardhante raśmayaḥ sadā |
dakṣiṇopakrame bhūyo hrasante sūryaraśmayaḥ | | 61
evaṃ raśmisahasraṃ tu sauryaṃ lokārthasādhakam |
bhidyate ṛtumāsaistu sahasraṃ bahudhā bhṛśam | | 62
evaṃ nāmnāṃ caturviṃśadekasyaiṣā prakīrtitā |
vistareṇa sahasraṃ tu punarevaṃ prakīrtitam | | 63
āsāṃ paramayatnena bruvate bhinnadarśanāḥ |
tāmasā buddhimohācca dṛṣṭāntāni bruvanti hi | | 64
brahmāṇaṃ kāraṇaṃ kecitkecidāhurdivākaram |
kecidbhavaṃ paratvena āhurviṣṇuṃ tathāpare | | 65
kāraṇaṃ tu smṛtā hyete nānārtheṣu surottamāḥ |
ekaḥ sa tu pṛthaktvena svayaṃbhūriti viśrutaḥ | | 66
vanamālinamugreśaṃ divi cakṣurivāntakam |
taṃ svayaṃbhūriti proktaṃ sa soparṇimanaupamam | | 67
yathānurajyate varṇervividhaiḥ sphāṭiko maṇiḥ |
tathā guṇavaśāttasya svayaṃbhoranurañjanam | | 68
eko bhūtvā yathā meghaḥ pṛthaktvena pratiṣṭhitaḥ |
varṇato rūpataścaiva tathā guṇavaśāttu saḥ | | 69
nabhasaḥ patitaṃ toyaṃ yāti svādāntaraṃ yathā |
bhūme rasaviśeṣeṇa tathā guṇavaśāttu saḥ | | 1.78.70
yathendhanavaśādagnirekastu bahudhāyate |
varṇato rūpataścaiva tathā guṇavaśāttu saḥ | | 71
yathā dravyaviśeṣācca vāyurekaḥ pṛthagbhavet |
