sugandhiḥ pūtigandhirvā tathā guṇavaśāttu saḥ | | 72
yathā vā gārhapatyogniranyatsaṃjñāntaraṃ vrajet |
dakṣiṇāhavanīyādibrahmādiṣu tathā hyasau | | 73
ekatve ca pṛthaktve ca proktametannidarśanam |
tasmādbhaktiḥ sadā kāryā deve hyasmindivākare | | 74
eṣo.aṇḍajo.adhigaścaiva eṣa eva bhṛgustathā |
eṣa rajastamaścaiva eṣa sattvaguṇastathā | | 75
eṣa vedāśca yajñāśca sarvaścaiva na saṃśayaḥ |
sūryavyāptamidaṃ sarvaṃ jagatsthāvarajaṅgamam | | 76
ijyate pūjyate cāsāvatra yānātmako raviḥ |
sarvatra savitā devastanubhirnāmabhiśca saḥ | | 77
vasatyagnau tathā vāte vyomni toye tathā vibho |
evaṃvidho hyayaṃ sūryaḥ sadā pūjyo vijānatā | | 78
ādityaṃ vetti yastvevaṃ sa tasminneva līyate |
apyekaṃ vetti yo nāma dhātvarthanigamai raveḥ | | 79
sa rogairvarjitaḥ sarvaiḥ sadyaḥ pāpātpramucyate |
na hi pāpakṛtaḥ sāmba bhaktirbhavati bhāskare | | 1.78.80
tathā tvaṃ parayā bhaktyā prapadyasva divākaram |
yena vyādhivinirmuktaḥ sarvānkāmānavāpsyasi | | 81
yathā tava pitā sāmba yathā vedhā yathā haraḥ |
yathā guṇavaśāttasya svayambhoranurañjanam | | 82
ekībhūya yathā meghaḥ pṛthaktvena pratiṣṭhate |
varṇato rūpataścaiva tathā guṇavaśāttu saḥ | | 83
iti śrībhaviṣye mahāpurāṇe śatārddhasāhasryāṃ saṃhitāyāṃ brāhme parvaṇi saptamīkalpe
sūryamahimavarṇanaṃ nāmāṣṭasaptatitamo.adhyāyaḥ | 78 |
athaikonāśītitamo.adhyāyaḥ
ādityamahimavarṇanam
sumanturuvāca
etacchrutvā tu kārtsnyena hṛṣṭo jāmbavatīsutaḥ |
jātakautūhalo bhūyaḥ paripapraccha nāradam | | 1
sāmba uvāca
aho sūryasya māhātmyaṃ varṇitaṃ harṣavardhanam |
yena me bhaktirutpannā parā hyasminvibhāvasau | | 2
tato rājñīṃ mahābhāgāṃ nikṣubhāṃ ca mahāmune |
diṇḍinaṃ piṅgalādīṃśca sarvānkathaya me mune | | 3
nārada uvāca
prāgukte.arkasya dve bhārye rājñī nikṣubhasaṃjñite |
tayorhi rājñī dyaurjñeyā nikṣubhā pṛthivī smṛtā | |4
saumyamāsasya saptamyāṃ dyāvārkaḥ saha yujyate |
māghakṛṣṇasya saptamyāṃ mahyā saha bhavedraviḥ | |
bhūrādityaśca bhagavāngacchataḥ saṅgamaṃ tathā | | 5
ṛtusnātā mahī tatra garbhaṃ gṛhṇāti bhāskarāt |
dyaurjalaṃ sūyate garbhaṃ varṣāsviha ca bhūtale | | 6
tatastrailokyabhūtyarthaṃ mahī sasyāni sūyate |
sasyopayogasaṃhṛṣṭā juhvatyāhutayo dvijāḥ | | 7
svāhākārasvadhākārairyajanti pitṛdevatāḥ | | 8
nikṣubhā sūyate yasmādannauṣadhisudhāmṛtaiḥ |
martyānpitṛrṃśca devāṃśca tena bhūrnikṣubhā smṛtā | | 9
yathā rājñī dvidhā bhūtā yasya ceyaṃ sutā matā |
apatyāni ca yānyasyāstāni vakṣyāmyaśeṣataḥ | | 1.79.10
marīcirbrahmaṇaḥ putro marīceḥ kaśyapaḥ sutaḥ |
tasmāddhiraṇyakaśiṣuḥ prahlādastasya cātmajaḥ | | 11
prahlādasya suto nāmnā virocana iti śrutaḥ |
virocanasya bhaginī saṃjñāyā jananī śubhā | | 12
hiraṇyakaśipoḥ pautrī diteḥ putrasya sā smṛtā |
sā viśvakarmaṇaḥ putrī prāhlādī procyate budhaiḥ | | 13
atha nāmnā surūpeti marīcerduhitā śubhā |
putrī hyaṅgirasaḥ sā tu jananī tu bṛhaspateḥ | | 14
bṛhaspatestu bhaginī viśrutā brahmavādinī |
prabhāsasya tu sā patnī vasūnāmaṣṭamasya tu | | 15
prasūtā viśvakarmāṇaṃ sarvaśilpakaraṃ varam |
sa vai nāmrā punastvaṣṭā tridaśānāṃ ca vārdhakiḥ | | 16
devācāryaśca tasyeyaṃ duhitā viśvakarmaṇaḥ |
sureṇuriti vikhyātā triṣu lokeṣu bhāminī | | 17
rājñī saṃjñā ca dyaustvāṣṭrī prabhā saiva vibhāvyate |
tasyāttu yā tanucchāyā nikṣubhā sā mahīmayī | | 18
sā tu bhāryā bhagavato mārtaṇḍasya mahātmanaḥ |
sādhvī pativratā devī rūpayauvanaśālinī | | 19
na tu tāṃ nararūpeṇa sūryo bhajati vai purā |
ādityasyeha tadrūpaṃ mahatā svena tejasā | | 1.79.20
gātreṣvapratirūpeṣu nātikāntamivābhavat |
aniṣpatreṣu gātreṣu golaṃ dṛṣṭvā pitāmahaḥ | | 21
mārtastvaṃ bhava cāṇḍastu mārtaṇḍastena sa smṛtaḥ |
devānāṃ ca yatastvādistenāditya iti smṛtaḥ | | 22
ataḥ paraṃ pravakṣyāmi prajāstasya mahātmanaḥ |
trīṇyapatyāni saṃjñāyāṃ janayāmāsa vai raviḥ | | 23
varṣāṇāṃ tu sahasraṃ vai vasamānā piturgṛhe |
bhartuḥ samīpaṃ yāhīti pitroktā sā punaḥpunaḥ | | 24
agacchadvaḍavā bhūtvā tyaktvā rūpaṃ yaśasvinī |
uttarāṃśca kurūngatvā tṛṇānyanucacāra ha | | 25
pituḥ samīpaṃ yā bhāryā saṃjñā yā vacanena sā |
saṃjñāyā dhārayadrūpaṃ chāyā sūryamupasthitā | | 26
dvitīyāyāṃ tu saṃjñāyāṃ saṃjñeyamiti cintayan |
ādityo janayāmāsa putrau kanyāṃ ca rūpiṇīm | | 27
pūrvajasya manostulyau sādṛśyena ca tāvubhau |
śrutaśravāśca dharmajñaḥ śrutakarmā tathaiva ca | | 28
śrutaśravā manustābhyāṃ sāvarṇiryo bhaviṣyati |
śrutakarmā tu vijñeyo graho yo vai śanaiścaraḥ | | 29
kanyā ca tapatī nāma rūpeṇāpratirūpiṇī |
saṃjñā tu pārthivī teṣāmātmajānāṃ yathākarot | | 1.79.30
na snehaṃ pūrvajānāṃ tu tathā kṛtavatī tu sā |
manustu kṣamate tasyā yamastasyā na cakṣame | | 31
bahuśo yātyamānastu pituḥ patnyā suduḥkhitaḥ |
sa vai kopācca bālyācca bhāvino.arthasya vai balāt | | 32
padā santarjayāmāsa saṃjñāṃ vaivasvato yamaḥ |
taṃ śaśāpa tataḥ krodhātsaṃjñā sā pārthivī bhṛśam | | 33
padā tarjayase yanmāṃ piturbhāryāṃ garīyasīm |
tasmāttavaiṣa caraṇaḥ patiṣyati na saṃśayaḥ | | 34
yamastu tena śāpena bhṛśaṃ pīḍitamānasaḥ |
manunā saha tanmātuḥ pituḥ sarvaṃ nyavedayat | | 35
snehena tulyamasmāsu mātā deva na vartate |
niḥsnehāñjyāyaso hyasmātkanīyāṃ saṃ bubhūṣati | | 36
tasyā mayodyataḥ pādo na tu deva nipātitaḥ |
bālyādvā yadi vā mohāttadbhavānkṣantumarhati | | 37
śapto.ahamasmiṃllokeśa jananyā tapatāṃ vara |
tava prasādāccaraṇastrāyatāṃ mahato bhayāt | | 38
raviruvāca
asaṃśayaṃ mahatputra bhaviṣyatyatra kāraṇam |
yena tvāmāviśatkrodho dharmajñaṃ dharmaśālinam | | 39
sarveṣāmeva śāpānāṃ pratighātastu vidyate |
na tu mātrābhiśaptānāṃ kvacinmokṣo bhavediha | | 1.79.40
na śakyametanmithyā me kartuṃ māturvacastava |
kiñcitte.ahaṃ vidhāsyāmi pitṛsnehādanugraham | |4 1
kṛmayo māṃsamādāya yāsyanti tu mahītale |
kṛtaṃ tasyā vacaḥ satyaṃ tvaṃ ca trāto bhaviṣyasi | |4 2
sumanturuvāca
ādityastvabravīcchāyāṃ kimarthaṃ tanayāvubhau |
tulyeṣvabhyadhikaḥ sneha ekatra kriyate tvayā | | 43
sā tatpurābhavaṃ tasmai nācacakṣe vivasvate |
ātmānaṃ sa samādhāya vaktuṃ tasyāmapaśyat | |44
tāṃ śaptukāmo bhagavānudyataḥ kupitastataḥ |
tataśchāyā yathāvṛttamācacakṣe vivasvate | | 45
vivasvāṃstu tataḥ kruddhaḥ śrutvā śvaśuramāgataḥ |
sā cāpi taṃ yathānyāyamarcayitvā divākaram | |
nirdagdhukāmaṃ roṣeṇa sāntvayāmāsa taṃ śanaiḥ ||46
viśvakarmovāca
tavātitejasāviṣṭamidaṃ rūpaṃ suduḥsaham |
asahantī tu saṃjñā ca vane carati śādvale ||47
drakṣyate tāṃ bhavānadya svāṃ māyāṃ śubhacāriṇīm |
rūpārthaṃ bhavatoraṇye carantīṃ sumahattapaḥ ||48
rūpaṃ te brahmaṇo vākyādyadi vai rocate vibho |
praśātayāmi devendra śreyo.arthaṃ jagataḥ prabho ||49
santuṣṭastasya tadvākyaṃ bahu mene mahātapāḥ |
tato.anvajānāttvaṣṭāraṃ rūpanirvartanāya tu ||1.79.50
viśvakarmā hyanujñātaḥ śākadvīpe vivasvataḥ |
bhramimāropya tattejaḥ śātayāmāsa tasya vai ||5 1
ājānulikhitaścāsau nipuṇaṃ viśvakarmaṇā |
lekhanaṃ nābhyanandattu tatastena nivāritaḥ ||52
tatra tadbhāsitaṃ rūpaṃ tejasā prakṛtena tu |
kāntātkāntataraṃ bhūtvā adhikaṃ śuśubhe tataḥ ||53
dadarśa yogamāsthāya svāṃ bhāryāṃ vaḍavāṃ tathā |
adṛśyāṃ sarvabhūtānāṃ tejasā svena saṃvṛtām ||54
aśvarūpeṇa mārtaṇḍastāṃ mukhena samāsadat |
maithunāya viceṣṭanto parapuṃso viśaṅkayā ||55
sā taṃ vivasvataḥ śukraṃ nāsābhyāṃ samadhārayat |
devau tasyāmajāyetāmaśvinau bhiṣajāṃ varau ||56
nāsatyaścaiva dasraśca tau smṛtau nāmato.aśvinau |
ataḥ paraṃ svakaṃ rūpaṃ darśayāmāsa bhāskaraḥ ||
taddṛṣṭvā cāpi saṃjñā tu tutoṣa ca mumoha ca ||57
tatastu janayāmāsa saṃjñā sūryasutaṃ śubham |
rūpeṇa cātmanastulyaṃ revataṃ nāma nāmataḥ | | 58
pirtugṛhyāṣṭamaṃ so.aśvaṃ jātamātraḥ palāyata |
sa tasmintsakṛdārūḍhastamaśvaṃ naiva muñjati | | 59
tato.arkeṇa samādiṣṭau daṇḍanāyakapiṅgalau |
aśvaṃ pratyānayethāṃ me mā balācchidrato.asya tu | | 1.79.60
pārśvasthau tiṣṭhatastasya aśvacchidrābhikāñkṣiṇau |
na cchidraṃ tu labhete tau tasyādyāpi mahātmanaḥ | | 61
plavangacchatyasau yasmātsaṃjñāyāḥ śāntidaḥ sutaḥ |
revṛstu ca gatau dhātū revantastena sa smṛtaḥ | | 62
manuryamo yamī caiva sāvarṇiḥ sa śanaiścaraḥ |
tapatī cāśvinau caiva revantaśca raveḥ sutāḥ | | 63
evameṣā purā saṃjñā dvitīyā pārthivī smṛtā |
yā saṃjñā sā smṛtā rājñī chāyā yā sā tu nikṣubhā | | 64
rājṛdīptau smṛto dhātū rājā rājati yatsadā |
adhikaḥ sarvabhūtebhyo rājate ca divākaraḥ | | 65
adhikaṃ rājate yasmāttasmādrājā sa ucyate |
rājñaḥ patnī tu sā yasmāttasmādrājñī prakīrtitā | | 66
kṣubha sañcalane dhāturniścalā tena nikṣubhā |
bhavantītyatha vā yasmātsvargīyāḥ 1 kṣudvivarjitāḥ | |
chāyāṃ tāṃ viśate divyāṃ smṛtā sā tena nikṣubhā | | 67
dṛṣṭvā janaṃ sadā tāta bhṛśaṃ pīḍitamānasam |
dharmeṇa rañjayāmāsa dharmarājastataḥ smṛtaḥ | | 68
śuddhena karmaṇā tāta śubhena paramadyutiḥ |
pitṛrṇāmādhipatyaṃ ca lokapālatvamāpa ca | | 69
sāmprataṃ vartate yo.ayaṃ manurloke mahāmate |
yasyānvavāye jātastu śaṅkhacakragadādharaḥ | | 1.79.70
yamasya bhaginī yā tu yamī kanyā yaśasvinī |
sābhavatsaritāṃ śreṣṭhā yamunā lokapāvanī | | 71
manuḥ prajāpatistveṣa sāvarṇiḥ sa mahāyaśāḥ |
bhaviṣyansa manustāta aṣṭamaḥ parikīrtitaḥ | | 72
merupṛṣṭhe tapo divyamadyāpi carate prabhuḥ |
bhrātā śanaibhrarastasya grahatvaṃ sa tu labdhavān | | 73
tapatī nāma yā nāmnā tayoḥ kanyā garīyasī |
sā babhūva śubhā patnī rājñaḥ saṃvaraṇasya tu | | 74
tāpī nāma nadī ceyaṃ vindhyamūlādviniḥsṛtā |
nityaṃ puṇyajalā snāne paścimodadhigāminī | | 75
saumyayā saṅgatā sā tu sarvapāpabhayāpahā |
vaivasvatī yathā vīra saṅgatā śivakāntayā | | 76
aśvinau devavaidyatvaṃ labdhavantau yadūttama |
tayoḥ karmopajīvanti lokesminbhiṣajaḥ sadā | | 77
revanto nāma yo.arkasya rūpeṇārkasamaḥ sutaḥ |
aśvānāmādhipatye tu yojitaḥ sa tu bhānunā | | 78
kṣemeṇa gacchate.adhvānaṃ yastaṃ pūjayate pathi |
sukhaprasādyo martyānāṃ sadā yadukulodvaha | | 79
tvaṣṭāpi tejasā tena mārtaṇḍasyaiva cājñayā |
bhojānutpādayāmāsa pūjāyai satya suvrata | | 1.79.80
ya idaṃ janma devasya śṛṇuyādvā paṭheta vā |
vivasvato hi putrāṇāṃ sarveṣāmamitaujasām | | 81
sarvapāpavinirmukto yāti sūryasalokatām |
iha rājā bhavatyeva punaretya na saṃśayaḥ | | 82
iti śrībhaviṣye mahāpurāṇe śatārddhasāhasryāṃ saṃhitāyāṃ brāhme parvaṇi saptamīkalpe
ādityamāhātmyavarṇanaṃ nāmaikonāśītitamo.adhyāyaḥ | 79 |
athāśītitamo.adhyāyaḥ
ādityamahimāvarṇanam
sumanturuvāca
itthaṃ śrutvā kathāṃ divyāṃ helimāhātmyamāśritām |
sāmbaḥ papraccha bhūyo.api nāradaṃ munisattamam | | 1
sāmba uvāca
sūryapūjāphalaṃ yacca yacca dānaphalaṃ mahat |
praṇipāte phalaṃ yacca gītavādye ca yat phalam | | 2
bhāskarasya dvijaśreṣṭha tanme brūhi samantataḥ |
yena sampūjayāmyeṣa bhānuṃ devaiḥ sadārcitam | 3
nārada uvāca
imamarthaṃ purā pṛṣṭo brahmā lokapitāmahaḥ |
diṇḍinā yaduśārdūla śṛṇuṣvaikāgramānasaḥ | | 4
sukhāsīnaṃ tathā devaṃ surajyeṣṭhaṃ pitāmaham |
praṇamya śirasā diṇḍiridaṃ vacanamabravīt | | 5
diṇḍiruvāca
sūryapūjāphalaṃ brūhi brūhi dānaphalaṃ tathā |
praṇāme yatphalaṃ deva yaccoktaṃ tauryakatraye | | 6
itihāsapurāṇābhyāṃ kārite śravaṇe tathā |
purato devadevasya yatphalaṃ syāttaducyatām | | 7
mārjane lepane yacca devadevasya mandire |
bhāskarasya kṛte brūhi mama lokapitāmaha | | 8
brahmovāca
stutijapyopahāreṇa pūjayā na naro raveḥ |
upavāsena ṣaṣṭhyāṃ ca sarvapāpaḥ pramucyate | | 9
praṇidhāya śiro bhūmau namaskāraparo raveḥ |
tatkṣaṇātsarvapāpebhyo mucyate nātra saṃśayaḥ | | 1.80.10
bhaktiyukto naro yastu raveḥ kuryātpradakṣiṇām |
pradakṣiṇī kṛtā tena saptadvīpā bhavenmahī | | 11
sūryalokaṃ vrajeccāpi iha rogaiśca mucyate |
upānahau parityajya anyathā narakaṃ vrajet | | 12
sopānatko naro yastu ārohetsūryamandiram |
sa yāti narakaṃ ghoramasipatravanaṃ vibho | | 13
sūryaṃ manasi yaḥ kṛtvā kuryādvyomapradakṣiṇām |
pradakṣiṇī kṛtāstena sarve devā bhavanti hi | | 14
parituṣṭāśca te sarve prayacchanti gatiṃ śubhām |
sarve devā mahābāho hyabhīṣṭaṃ tu parantapa | | 15
ekāhāro naro bhūtvā ṣaṣṭhyāṃ yo.arcayate ravim |
saptamyāṃ vā mahābāho sūryalokaṃ sa gacchati | | 16
ahorātropavāsī sa pūjayedyastu bhāskaram |
saptamyāṃ vātha ṣaṣṭhyāṃ vā sa gacchetparamāṃ gatim | | 17
kṛṣṇapakṣasya saptamyāṃ sopavāso jitendriyaḥ |
sarvaraktopahāreṇa pūjayedyastu bhāskaram | | 18
paṅkajaiḥ karavīrairvā kuṅkamodakacandanaiḥ |
modakaiśca gaṇaśreṣṭha sūryalokaṃ sa gacchati | | 19
śuklapakṣasya saptamyāmupavāsarataḥ sadā |
sarvaśuklopahāreṇa pūjayedyastu bhāskaram | | 1.80.20
jātīmudgarakaiścaiva śvetotpalakadambakaiḥ |
pāyasena tathā devaṃ savajreṇārcayedravim | | 21
sarvapāpaviśuddhātmā vidhuḥ kāntyā na saṃśayaḥ |
haṃsayuktena yānena haṃsalokamavāpnute | | 22
diṇḍiruvāca
brūhi me vistarāddeva saptamīkalpamuttamam |
upoṣya saptamīṃ yena gamiṣye śaraṇaṃ raveḥ | | 23
brahmovāca
sādhu pṛṣṭo.asmi bhavatā saptamīkalpamuttamam |
yathā sahasrakiraṇaḥ purā pṛṣṭo.aruṇena vai | | 24
kathitāḥ sapta saptamyo bhānunā śreyase nṛṇām |
aruṇasya gaṇaśreṣṭha pṛcchataḥ kāraṇāntare | | 25
kasyacittvatha kālasya devadevaṃ divākaram |
dhyānamāśritya tiṣṭhantamaruṇo vākyamabravīt | | 26
kimarthaṃ devadevaśa dhyānamāśritya tiṣṭhasi |
dinaṃ na yāti deveśa kāraṇaṃ mama kathyatām | | 27
kuru caṅkramaṇaṃ deva vahamāno divaspate |
ityevaṃ bhagavānpṛṣṭa idaṃ vacanamabravīt | | 28
śṛṇu tvaṃ dvijaśārdūla yadarthaṃ dhyānamāśritaḥ |
arvāvasurdvijaśreṣṭhaḥ sa cāputraḥ khagottama | | 29
ārādhayati māṃ nityaṃ gandhapuṣpopahārakaiḥ |
putrakāmaḥ khagaśreṣṭha na ca jānātyayaṃ yathā | | 1.80.30
putrado.ahaṃ bhave yena vidhinā pūjitaḥ khaga |
śrūyatāṃ ca vidhiḥ sarve yena prīto bhave nṛṇām | | 31
saptamīkalpasaṃjño vai vidhīnāmuttamo vidhiḥ |
yastu māṃ pūjayennityaṃ tasya putrāndadāmyaham || 32
gṛhṇīṣva saptamīkalpaṃ gatvā brūhi dvijottamam |
yenāhaṃ bahuputratvaṃ dadyāṃ tasya tathā khaga | | 33
śrutvā bhānoḥ kṣaṇādeva jagāma sa khagottamaḥ |
kathayāmāsa tatsarvaṃ bhānorvacanamāditaḥ | | 34
brāhmaṇasya khagaśreṣṭha sa ca śrutvā dvijottamaḥ |
cakāra saptamīkalpaṃ yathākhyātaṃ khagena tu | | 35
ṛddhiṃ vṛddhiṃ tathārogyaṃ prāpya putrāṃśca puṣkalān |
gato.asau sūryalokaṃ ca tejasā tatsamobhavat | | 36
iti śrībhaviṣye mahāpurāṇe śatārddhasāhasryāṃ saṃhitāyāṃ brāhme parvaṇi
saptamīkalpamāhātmyavarṇanaṃ nāmāśītitamo.adhyāyaḥ | 80 |

athaikāśītitamo.adhyāyaḥ
vijayāsaptamīvarṇanam
brahmovāca
jayā ca vijayā caiva jayantī cāparājitā |
mahājavā ca nandā ca bhadrā cānyā prakīrtitā | | 1
śuklapakṣasya saptamyāṃ sūryavāro bhavedyadi |
saptamī vijayā nāma tatra dattaṃ mahāphalam | | 2
snānaṃ dāna tathā homaṃ upavāsastathaiva ca|
sarvaṃ vijayasaptamyāṃ mahāpātakanāśanam | | 3
pañcamyāmekabhaktaṃ syātpaṣṭhyāṃ naktaṃ pracakṣate |
upavāsastu saptamyāmaṣṭamyāṃ pāraṇaṃ bhavet | | 4
keciddevamuśantyeva neti cānye gaṇādhipa |
abhipretastu me 1 ṣaṣṭhyāmupavāso gaṇottama | | 5
caturthyāmekabhaktaṃ tu pañcamyāṃ naktamādiśet |
upavāsastu ṣaṣṭhyāṃ syātsaptamyāṃ pāraṇaṃ bhavet | 16
upavāsaparaḥ ṣaṣṭhyāmabdeśaṃ pūjayedbudhaḥ |
gandhapuṣpopahāraiśca bhaktyā śraddhāsamanvitaḥ | | 7
prakalpya pūjāṃ bhūmau tu devasya purataḥ svapet |
japamānastu gāyatrīṃ saurasūktamathāpi vā | | 8
akṣaraṃ vā mahāśvetaṃ ṣaḍakṣaramathāpi vā |
vibuddhastvatha saptamyāṃ kṛtvā snānaṃ gaṇādhipa | | 9
graheśaṃ pūjayitvā tu homaṃ kṛtvā vidhānataḥ |
brāhmaṇānbhojayedbhaktyā śaktyā ca gaṇanāyaka | | 1.81.1 0
śālyodanamapūpāśca khaṇḍaveṣṭāṃśca śaktitaḥ |
saghṛtaṃ pāyasaṃ dadyāttathā vipreṣu śaktitaḥ | | 11
dattvā ca dakṣiṇā bhaktyā 1 tato viprānvisarjayet |
ityeṣā kathitā deva puṇyā vijayasaptamī | 12
yāmupoṣya naro gacchetpadaṃ vairocanaṃ param |
karavīrāṇi raktāni kuṅkumaṃ ca vilepanam | | 13
vijayaṃ dhūpamasyāṃ tu bhānostuṣṭikarāṇi vai |
eṣā puṇyā pāpaharā mahāpātakanāśinī | | 14
atra dattaṃ hutaṃ cāpi kṣīyate na gaṇādhipa |
snānaṃ dānaṃ tathā homaḥ pitṛdevābhipūjanam | | 15
sarvaṃ vijayasaptamyāṃ mahāpātakanāśanam |
ādityavāreṇa yutā smṛtā vijayasaptamī |16
ityeṣā kathitā vīra sarvakāmapradāyinī |
dhanyaṃ yaśasyamāyuṣyaṃ kīrtitaṃ śravaṇaṃ tathā | | 17
smaraṇaṃ tu tathāsyāṃ tu puṇyadaṃ tripurāntaka | | 18
iti śrībhaviṣye mahāpurāṇe śatārddhasāhasryāṃ saṃhitāyāṃ brāhme parvaṇi saptamīkalpe
vijayasaptamīvarṇanaṃ nāmaikāśītitamo.adhyāyaḥ | 81 |
atha dvyaśītitamo.adhyāyaḥ
nandavarṇanam
diṇḍiruvāca
ye tvādityadine brahmanpūjayanti divākaram |
snānadānādikaṃ teṣāṃ kiṃ phalaṃ syādbravītu me||1
puṇyā sā saptamī proktā yuktā tena pitāmaha |
vijayeti tathā nāma varṇyatāmasya 1 puṇyatā | | 2

brahmovāca
ye tvādityadine brahmañ chrāddhaṃ kurvanti mānavāḥ |
saptajanmasu te jātāḥ sambhavanti virogiṇaḥ | | 3

naktaṃ kurvanti ye tatra mānavāḥ sthairyamāśritāḥ |
japamānā paraṃ jāpyamādityahadayaṃ param | |4

ārogyam iha vai prāpya sūryalokaṃ vrajanti te |
upavāsaṃ ca ye kuryurādityasya dine sadā | | 5

japanti ca mahāśvetāṃ te labhante yathepsitam |
ahorātreṇa naktena trirātraniyamena vā | | 6

japamāno mahāśvetāmīpsitaṃ labhate phalam |
viśeṣataḥ sūryadine japamāno gaṇādhipa | | 7

ṣaḍakṣaraṃ tathā śvetāṃ gacchedvairocanaṃ padam |
dvādaśeha smṛtā vārā ādityasya mahātmanaḥ | | 8

nando bhadrastathā saumyaḥ kāmadaḥ putradastathā |
jayo jayanto vijaya ādityābhimukha sthitaḥ | | 9

hṛdayo rogahā caiva mahāśvetapriyo.aparaḥ |
śuklapakṣasya ṣaṣṭhyāṃ tu māghe māsi gaṇādhipa | | 1.82.10
yaḥ kuryātsa bhavedbhūpaḥ sarvapāpabhayāpahaḥ |
atra naktaṃ smṛtaṃ puṇyaṃ ghṛtena snapanaṃ raveḥ | | 11
agastyakusumānīha bhānostuṣṭikarāṇi tu |
vilepanaṃ sugandhastu śvetacandanamuttamam | | 12
dhūpastu guggulaḥ śreṣṭho naivedyaṃ pūpameva hi |
dattvā pūpaṃ tu viprasya tato bhuñjīta vāgyataḥ | | 13
nakṣatradarśanānnaktaṃ kecidicchanti mānada |
muhūrtonaṃ dinaṃ kecitpravadanti manīṣiṇaḥ | | 14
nakṣatradarśanānnaktamahammanye gaṇādhipa |
prasthamātraṃ bhavetpūpaṃ godhūmamayamuttamam | | 15
yavodbhavaṃ vā kurvīta saguḍaṃ sarpiṣānvitam |
sahiraṇyaṃ ca dātavyaṃ brāhmaṇe setihāsake 2 | | 16
bhaume divye.atha vā deyaṃ nyasedvā purato raveḥ |
dātavyo mantrataścāyaṃ maṇḍako grāhya eva hi | | 17
bhūtvādityena vai bhaktyā ādityaṃ tu namasya ca |
ādityatejasotpannaṃ rājñīkaravinirmitam | |
śreyase mama vipra tvaṃ pratīcchāpūpamuttamam | | 18
kāmadaṃ sukhadaṃ dharmyaṃ dhanadaṃ putradaṃ tathā |
sadāstu te pratīcchāmi maṇḍakaṃ bhāskarapripam | | 19
etau caiva mahāmantrau dānādāne ravipriyau |
apūpasya gaṇaśreṣṭha śreyase nātra saṃśayaḥ | | 1.82.20
eṣa nandavidhiḥ prokto narāṇāṃ śreyase vibho |
anena vidhinā yastu naraḥ pūjayate ravim | |
sarvapāpavinirmuktaḥ sūryaloke mahīyate | | 21
na daridraṃ na rogaśca kule tasya mahātmanaḥ |
yo.anena pūjayedbhānuṃ na kṣayaḥ santatestathā | | 22
sūryalokāccyutaścāsau rājā bhavati bhūtale |
bahuratnasamāyukta stejasā dvijasannibhaḥ | | 23
paṭhatāṃ śṛṇvatāṃ cedaṃ vidhānaṃ tripurāntaka |
kaṃ 1 dadātyacalaṃ divyamambujāmacalāṃ tathā | 24
iti śrī bhaviṣye mahāpurāṇe brāhme parvaṇi ādityavārakalpe nandavidhivarṇanaṃ
nāma dvayaśītitamo.adhyāyaḥ | 82 |

atha tryaśītitamo.adhyāyaḥ
bhadravidhivarṇanam
brahmovāca
māsi bhādrapade vīra śukte pakṣe tu yo bhavet |
ṣaṣṭhyāṃ gaṇakulaśreṣṭha sa bhadraḥ parikīrtitaḥ | | 1

tatra naktaṃ tu yaḥ kuryādupavāsamathāpi vā |
haṃsayānasamārūḍho yāti haṃsasalokatām | | 2

mālatīkusumānīha tathā śvetaṃ ca candanam |
vijayaṃ ca tathā dhūpaṃ naivedyaṃ pāyasaṃ param | | 3

pūjāyāṃ bhāskarasyeha kuryāttriṣurasūdanam |
itthaṃ sampūjya deveśaṃ madhyāhne ca dinādhipam | 4

dattvā tu dakṣiṇāṃ śaktyā tato bhuñjīta vāgyataḥ |
pāyasaṃ gaṇaśārdūla saguḍaṃ sarpiṣā saha | 5

ya evaṃ pūjayedbhaktyā mānavastimirāpaham |
sarvakāmānavāpnoti putradāradhanādikān | | 6
vimuktaḥ sarvapāpebhyo vrajadbhānusalokatām |
eṣa bhadrā vidhiḥ prokto mayā yaste gaṇādhipa ||7
śrutvā kṛtvā ca yatpāpānmucyate mānavo bhuvi | | 8
iti śrībhaviṣye mahāpurāṇe brāhme parvaṇyādityavārakalpe bhadravidhivarṇanaṃ nāma
tryaśītitamo.adhyāyaḥ | 83 |
atha caturaśītitamo.adhyāyaḥ
saumyavidhivarṇanam
brahmovāca
nakṣatraṃ rohiṇī vīra yadā vāre.asya vai bhavet |
yātyasau saumyatāṃ vīra sa saumyaḥ parikīrtitaḥ | | 1
snānaṃ dānaṃ japo homaḥ pitṛdevāditarpaṇam |
akṣayaṃ syānna sandehastvatra vāre mahātmanaḥ | | 2
naktaṃ samāśrito yo.atra pūjayedbhāskaraṃ naraḥ |
yāti lokaṃ sa devasya bhāskarasya na saṃśayaḥ | | 3
raktotpalāni vai tatra tathā raktaṃ ca candanam |
sugandhaścāpi dhūpastu naivedyaṃ pāyasaṃ tathā | |
brāhmaṇāya ca dātavyaṃ bhoktavyaṃ cātmanā tathā | | 4
ya evaṃ pūjayetsaumye citrabhānuṃ gavāmpatim |
sa vimuktastu pāpebhyastvāṣṭrīṃ kāntimavāpnuyāt | | 5
iti śrībhaviṣye mahāpurāṇe brāhme parvaṇi ādityavārakalpe saumyavidhivarṇanaṃ
nāma caturaśītitamo.adhyāyaḥ | 84 |
atha pañcāśītitamo.adhyāyaḥ
kāmadavidhivarṇanam
brahmovāca
prāpte mārgaśire māsi śuklaṣaṣṭhyāṃ tu yo bhavet |
sa jñeyaḥ kāmado vāraḥ sadeṣṭo bhāskarasya tu | | 1
tatra yaḥ pūjayedbhānuṃ bhaktyā śraddhāsamanvitaḥ |
vimuktaḥ sarvapāpaistu prāpnute nandanādhipam || 2
raktacandanamiśrāṇi karavīrāṇi suvrata |
dhūpaṃ ghṛtāhutiṃ vīra bhāskarasya prayojayet | | 3
naivedyaṃ cāpi kṛśaraṃ sugandhaṃ tīkṣṇameva ca |
kṛtvopavāsamatha vā naktaṃ tripurasūdana | | 4
itthaṃ prapūjito hyatra bhāskaro lokabhāskaraḥ |
kāmāndadāti sarvānvai atoyaṃ kāmadaḥ smṛtaḥ | | 5
sa putra putrakāmasya dhanakāmasya vā dhanam |
vidyārthine śubhāṃ vidyāmārogyaṃ rogiṇe vibho | | 6
anyāṃśca vividhānkāmānmantraiḥ sampūjito raviḥ |
dadāti gaṇaśārdūla atoyaṃ kāmadaḥ smṛtaḥ | | 7
dadyādyo maṇḍakaṃ cātra gopatergotrabhūṣaṇaḥ |
gotrāritejasā tulyo gopatergopuraṃ vrajet | | 8
iti śrībhaviṣye mahāpurāṇe brāhme parvaṇi ādityavārakalpe kāmadavidhivarṇanaṃ
nāma pañcāśītitamo.adhyāyaḥ | 85 |
atha ṣaḍaśītitamo.adhyāyaḥ
jayavāratithivarṇanam
brahmovāca
pañcatāraṃ bhavedyatra nakṣatraṃ te vṛṣadhvaja |
vāre tu devadevasya sa vāraḥ putradaḥ smṛtaḥ | | 1
upavāso bhavettatra śrāddhaṃ kāryaṃ tathā bhavet |
prāśanaṃ cāpi piṇḍasya madhyamasya prakīrtitam | | 2
sopavāsastu yo bhaktyā pūjayedatra gopatim |
dhūpamālyopahāraistu divyagandhasamanvitaiḥ | | 3
evaṃ pūjya vivasvantaṃ tasyaiva purato niśi |
bhūmau svapiti vai vīra japañchvetāṃ mahāmate | | 4
prātarutthāya ca snānaṃ kṛtvā dattvārghyamuttamam |
raktacandanasammiśraiḥ karavīrairgaṇādhipa | | 5
prapūjya grahabhūteśamaṃśumantaṃ trilocana |
vīraṃ 1 ca pūjayitvā tu tataḥ śrāddhaṃ prakalpayet | | 6
pañcabhirbrāhmaṇairdeva divyaibhomaiśca suvrata |
magasaṃjñau tatra divyau brāhmaṇau parikalpayet | | 7
trīnatra brāhmaṇānbhīmānprakalpyāndhakasūdana |
kuryādevaṃ tataḥ śrāddhaṃ pārvaṇaṃ bhāskarapriyam | | 8
śrāddhe tvatha samāpte tu dadyātpiṇḍaṃ tu madhyamam |
purato devadevasya sthitvā mantreṇa suvrata | | 9
sa eṣa piṇḍo deveśa yo.abhīṣṭastava sarvadā |
aśnāmi paśyate tubhyaṃ tena me santatirbhavet | | 1.86.10
prasādāttava deveśa iti me bhāvitaṃ manaḥ |
itthaṃ sampūjito hyatra bhāskaraḥ putrado bhavet | | 11
ato.ayaṃ putrado vāro devasya parikīrtitaḥ |
evamatra sadā yastu bhāskaraṃ pūjayennaraḥ | | 12
upavāsaparaḥ śrāddhe sa putraṃ labhate dhruvam |
dhanaṃ dhānyaṃ hiraṇyaṃ ca ārogyaṃ sukhadaṃ tathā | |
sūryalokaṃ ca samprāpya tato rājā bhavennṛṣu | | 13
prabhayā dvijasaṃkāśaḥ kāntyā cāmbujasannibhaḥ |
vīryeṇa gopatestulyo gāmbhīrye sāgaropamaḥ | | 14
brahmovāca
dakṣiṇe tvayane yaḥ syātsa jayaḥ parikīrtitaḥ | | 15
atropavāso naktaṃ ca snānaṃ dānaṃ japastathā |
bhavecchataguṇaṃ deva bhāskaraprītaye kṛtam | | 16
tasmānnaktādi kartavyaṃ yatsyācchataguṇaṃ vibho | | 17
iti śrībhaviṣye mahāpurāṇe brāhme parvaṇi ādityavārakalpe jayavāratithivarṇanaṃ nāma
ṣaḍaśītitamo.adhyāyaḥ | 86 |
atha saptāśītitamo.adhyāyaḥ
jayantavidhivarṇanam
brahmovāca
jayanto hyuttare jñeyaścāyane gaṇanāyaka |
vāro devasya yaḥ syādvai tatra pūjyo divākaraḥ | | 1
pūjitastatra deveśaḥ sahasraguṇitaṃ phalam |
dadāti devaśārdūla snānadānādikarmaṇām | | 2
ghṛtena payasā yatra snānamikṣurasena tu |
vilepanaṃ kuṅkumaṃ tu praśastaṃ bhāskare priyam | | 3
dhūpakriyā guggulena naivedye modakaḥ smṛtaḥ |
itthaṃ sampūjya deveśaṃ kuryāddhomaṃ tatastilaiḥ | |
brāhmaṇānbhojayetpaścānmodakāṃstilaśaṣkulīḥ | | 4
itthaṃ yaḥ pūjayedbhānuṃ mantreṇaiva gaṇādhipa |
sahasraguṇitaṃ tasya phalaṃ devo dadāti vai | | 5.
snānadānajapādīnāmupavāsasya vai vibho | | 6
iti śrībhaviṣye mahāpurāṇe brāhme parvaṇyādityavārakalpe jayantavidhivarṇanaṃ nāma
saptāśītitamo.adhyāyaḥ | 87 |
athāṣṭāśītitamo.adhyāyaḥ
vijayavāravidhivarṇanam
brahmovāca
śuklapakṣasya saptamyāṃ prājāpatyarkṣasaṃyutaḥ |
sa jñeyo vijayo nāma sarvapāpabhayāpahaḥ | | 1
tatra koṭiguṇaṃ sarvaphalaṃ puṇyasya karmaṇaḥ |
dadāti bhagavāndevaḥ pūjitaścandanādhipaḥ | | 2
snānaṃ dānaṃ japo homaḥ pitṛdevādipūjanam |
naktaṃ cāpyupavāsastu sarvamatra divākaraḥ | | 3
kuryātkoṭiguṇaṃ sarvaṃ pūjito hyatra gopatiḥ |
tasmādatra sadā devaṃ pūjayedbhaktimānnaraḥ | | 4
sarveśaṃ saptadvīpeśaṃ saptasaindhavavāhanam |
saptamyāṃ tu samārādhya saptaprakṛtisambhavam | |5
saptalokādhipatyaṃ tu prāpnute saptaraśmibhiḥ | | 6
iti śrībhaviṣye mahāpurāṇe brāhme parvaṇyādityavārakalpe vijayavāravidhivarṇanaṃ
nāmāṣṭāśītitamo.adhyāyaḥ | 88 |
atha navāśītitamo.adhyāyaḥ
ādityābhimukhavidhivarṇanam
brahmovāca
kṛṣṇapakṣasya saptamyāṃ māghamāse bhavettu yaḥ |
sādityābhimukho jñeyaḥ śṛṇu cāsya vidhiṃ param | | 1
kṛtvaikabhaktaṃ kṛṣṇasya vāre tripurasūdana |
prātaḥ kṛtvā tataḥ snānaṃ pūjayitvā divākaram | | 2
ādityābhimukhastiṣṭhedyāvadastamanaṃ raveḥ |
japamāno mahāśvetāṃ lābhamāśritya suvrata | | 3
caturhastamṛjaṃ ślakṣṇamavraṇaṃ susamaṃ dṛḍham |
raktacandanavṛkṣasya stambhaṃ kṛtvā gaṇādhipa | | 4
tamāśritya mahābhaktyā devadevaṃ divākaram |
paśyamāno japañśvetāṃ tiṣṭhedastamanādraveḥ | | 5
gandhapuṣpopahāraistu pūjayitvā divākaram |
brāhmaṇe dakṣiṇāṃ dattvā tato bhuñjīta vāgyataḥ | | 6
itthametaṃ tu yaḥ kuryādādityaprītaye naraḥ |
bhānumāṃstasya prītaḥ syātsarvaṃ prīto dadādi hi | | 7
dhanaṃ dhānyaṃ tathā putramārogyaṃ bhārgavo yaśaḥ |
tasmātsampūjayedatra gīrvāṇādhipatiṃ hara | | 8
iti śrībhaviṣye mahāpurāṇe brāhme parvaṇyādityavārakalpe ādityābhimukhavidhivarṇanaṃ
nāma navāśītitamo.adhyāyaḥ | 89 |
atha navatitamo.adhyāyaḥ
hṛdayavāravidhivarṇanam
brahmovāca
ravisaṅkramaṇe yaḥ syādravervāro gaṇādhipa |
sa jñeyo hṛdayo nāma ādityahadayapriyaḥ | | 1
tatra naktaṃ samāśritya devaṃ sampūjya bhaktitaḥ |
gatvā ca sadane bhānorādityābhimukhasthitaḥ | | 2
japedādityahadayaṃ saṅkhyayāṣṭaśataṃ budhaḥ |
atha vāstamanaṃ yāvadbhāskaraṃ ciṃtayeddhṛdi | | 3
gṛhametya tato viprānbhojayecchaktitaḥ śiva |
bhuktvā tu pāyasaṃ vīra tato bhūmau svapedbudhaḥ | | 4
yo.atra sampūyedbhānuṃ bhaktyā śraddhāsamanvitaḥ |
sa kāmā~mllabhate sarvānbhāskarāddhṛdayasthitān | | 5
tejasā yaśasā tulyaḥ prabhayaiṣāṃ mahātmanaḥ |
śakragopāṇḍajānāṃ tu gopatergovṛṣekṣaṇa | | 6
iti śrībhaviṣye mahāpurāṇe brāhme parvaṇyādityavārakalpe hṛdayavāravidhivarṇanaṃ
nāma navatitamo.adhyāyaḥ | 90 |
athaikanavatitamo.adhyāyaḥ
rogaharavidhivarṇanam
brahmovāca
pūṣṇo bhavedyadā ṛkṣaṃ bhavecca bhagadaivatam |
vāsaraḥ sa mahānproktaḥ sarvarogabhayāpahaḥ | | 1
yo.atra pūjayate bhānuṃ śubhagandhavilepanaiḥ |
sarvarogavinirmukto yāti bhānusalokatām | | 2
arkapatrapuṭe kṛtyā puṣpāṇyarkasya suvrata |
devasya purato rātrau bhaktyā yaḥ sthāpayedbudhaḥ | | 3
pūjayitvārkapuṣpaistu arkamarkapriyaṃ sadā |
prāśayitvārkapuṣpaṃ tu dattvā viprāya dakṣiṇām | | 4
bhaktyā ca pāyasaṃ vīra rātrau svapiti bhūtale |
anena vidhinā yastu pūjayedatra vai ravim | | 5
sa muktaḥ sarvarogaistu gaccheddinakarālayam |
tasmādapi vrajellokaṃ phuṃkāraravahetinaḥ | | 6
iti śrībhaviṣye mahāpurāṇe brāhme parvaṇyādityakalpe rogaharavidhivarṇanaṃ
nāmaikanavatitamo.adhyāyaḥ | 91 |
atha dvinavatitamo.adhyāyaḥ
mahāśvetavāravidhivarṇanam
brahmovāca
yastvādityagrahasyāsya vāro devasya suvrata |
śasyaḥ proktaḥ priyo loke khyāto gośrutibhūṣaṇaḥ | | 1
yastu pūjayate tasminpataṅgaṃ patagapriyam |
gandhapuṣpopahāraistu sūryalokaṃ sa gacchati | | 2
sopavāso gaṇaśreṣṭha ādityagrahaṇe śuciḥ |
japamāno mahāśvetāṃ khapoṣamatha vā śivam | | 3
pūjayejjagatāmīśaṃ tamonāśanamāśugam |
pūjayitvā khapoṣaṃ tu mahāśvetāṃ tato japet | |4
pūjayitvā mahāśvetāṃ raviṃ devaṃ samarcayet 1 |
mahāśvetāṃ pratiṣṭhāpya gandhapuṣpaiḥ supūjitām | | 5
tasyā eva bahiḥ kāryaṃ sthaṇḍilaṃ susamāhitaḥ |
śucau bhūmivibhāge tu vīraṃ saṃsthāpya yatnataḥ | | 6
kuryāddhomaṃ tilaiḥ snātaḥ sarpiṣā ca viśeṣataḥ |
ādityagrahavelāyāṃ japeñchvetāṃ mahāmate | | 7
mukte dinakare paścātsnānaṃ kṛtvā samāhitaḥ |
pūjayitvā mahāśvetāṃ khagolkaṃ ca grahādhipam | | 8
brāhmaṇān vācayitvā ca tato bhuñjīta vāgyataḥ |
ādityagrahayukte.asminvāre tripurasūdana | | 9
yatkarma kriyate puṇyaṃ tatsarvaṃ śubhadaṃ bhavet |
snānadānajapādīnāṃ karmaṇāṃ govṛṣadhvaja | | 1.92.10
anantaṃ hi phalaṃ teṣāṃ bhavatyasminna saṃśayaḥ |
kṛtānāṃ tu gaṇaśreṣṭhā bhāskarasya vaco yathā | | 11

tasmād dvijagaṇaiḥ kāryaṃ puṇyakarmavicakṣaṇaiḥ |
ekabhaktaṃ ca naktaṃ ca upavāsaṃ gaṇādhipa | | 12

ye vādityadine kuryuste yānti paramaṃ padam |
dharmyaṃ puṇyaṃ yaśasyaṃ ca putrīyaṃ kāmadaṃ tathā | | 13

tasmindānamapūpasya godānena samaṃ bhavet |
dvādaśaite mahābāho vīrabhānormahātmanaḥ | | 14

tuṣṭidāḥ kathitāstubhyaṃ sarvapāpabhayāpahāḥ |
paṭhatāṃ śṛṇvatāṃ tāta kurvatāṃ ca viśeṣataḥ | | 15

kṛtvaikameṣāṃ vidhivadvāraṃ vṛṣabhavāhana |
vṛṣāditritayaṃ prāpya cātrijāmacalāṃ tathā | | 16

tato yāti paraṃ lokaṃ vṛṣaketo mahātmanaḥ |
tejasāmbujasaṃkāśaḥ prabhayāṇḍajasannibhaḥ | | 17

patrihetisamo vīrye kāntyā candrasamaprabhaḥ | | 18

iti śrībhaviṣye mahāpurāṇe brāhme parvaṇyādityavārakalpe mahāśvetavāravidhivarṇanaṃ
nāma dvinavatitamo.adhyāyaḥ | 92 |
atha trinavatitamo.adhyāyaḥ
bhānumahimavarṇanam
brahmovāca
yeṣāṃ dharmakriyāḥ sarvāḥ sadaivoddiśya bhāskaram |
na kule jāyate teṣāṃ daridro vyādhito.api vā | | 1
devāyatanabhūmestu gomayenopalepanam |
yaḥ karoti naro bhaktyā sadyaḥ pāpātpramucyate | | 2
śvetayā raktayā vāpi pītamṛttikayāpi vā |
upalepanakartā vai cintitaṃ labhate phalam | | 3
citrabhānuṃ virañcyaiva kusumairyaḥ sugandhibhiḥ |
pūjayetsopavāsastu sa kāmānīpsitā~mllabhet | | 4
ghṛtena dīpakaṃ jvālya tilatailena vā raveḥ |
prayāti sūryalokaṃ sa dīpakoṭiśatairvṛtaḥ | | 5
dīpatailapradānena na yāti narakaṃ naraḥ |
dīpatailaṃ tilāścaiva mahāpātakanāśanāḥ | | 6
dīpaṃ dadāti yo nityaṃ bhāskarāyataneṣu vai |
catuṣpatheṣu tīrtheṣu rūpaujasvī ha jāyate | | 7
yastu kārayate dīpaṃ raverbhaktisamanvitaḥ |
sa kāmānīpsitānprāpya vṛndārakapuraṃ vrajet | | 8
yaḥ samālabhate sūryaṃ candanāgurukuṅkumaiḥ |
karpūreṇa vimiśraiśca tathā kastūrikānvitaiḥ | | 9
śubhaṃ kālaṃ koṭiśataṃ vihṛtya ca bhavālaye |
punaḥ sañjāyate bhūmau rājarājo na saṃśayaḥ | |
sarvakāmasamṛddhātmā sarvalokanamaskṛtaḥ | | 1.93.10
candanodakamiśraiśca dattvārghyaṃ kusumai raveḥ |
saputrapautrapatnīkaḥ svargaloke mahīyate | | 11
sugandhodakamiśraistu dattvārghyaṃ kusumai raveḥ |
devaloke ciraṃ sthitvā rājā bhavati bhūtale | | 12
sa hiraṇyena cārgheṇa raktodakayutena vā |
koṭīśataṃ tu varṣāṇāṃ svargaloke mahīyate | | 13
padmairabhyarcanaṃ kṛtvā raveḥ svargagato naraḥ |
padme vasati varṣāṇāṃ strīpadmaśatasaṃvṛtaḥ | | 14
guggulaṃ saghṛtaṃ dattvā raverbhaktisamanvitaḥ 1 |
tatkṣaṇātsarvapāpebhyo mucyate nātra saṃśayaḥ | | 15
pakṣaṃ tu guggulaṃ dattvā mucyate brahmahatyayā |
saṃvatsareṇa labhate aśvamedhaphalaṃ śiva | | 16
dhūpena labhate svargaṃ turuṣkeṇa sugandhinā |
karpūrāgurudhūpena rājasūyaphalaṃ labhet | | 17
pūrvāhṇe mānavo bhaktyā śraddhayā yo.arcayedravim |
sa tatphalamavāpnoti yaddatte kapilāśate | | 18
madhyāhne yo.arcayetsūryaṃ prayatātmā jitendriyaḥ |
labhate bhūmidānasya gośatasya ca tatphalam | | 19
paścimāyāṃ tu sandhyāyāṃ yo.arcayedbhāskaraṃ naraḥ |
śuciḥ śuklāmbaroṣṇīṣo gosahasraphalaṃ labhet | | 1.93.20
ardharātre tu yo heliṃ bhaktyā sampūjayennaraḥ |
jātismaratvamāpnoti kule jāto vṛṣānvitaḥ | | 21
pradoṣarātrivelāyāṃ yaḥ pūjayati bhāskaram |
sa gatvā sahasā vīra krīḍetsaumanasaṃ kṣayam | | 22
daṇḍanāyakavelāyāṃ prabhātasamaye punaḥ |
pūjayitvā raviṃ bhaktyā vrajedanimiṣālayam | | 23
evaṃ velāsu sarvāsu avelāsu ca mānavaḥ |
bhaktyā pūjayate yo.arkamarkapuṣpaiḥ samāhitaḥ | |
tejasādityasaṃkāśo hyarkaloke mahīyate | | 24
ayane tūttare sūryamatha vā dakṣiṇāyane |
pūjayedyastu vai bhaktyā sa gacchetkañjajālayam | | 25
tatrasthaḥ pūjyate keśaiḥ sarveḥ sumanasastathā |
gopatiḥ pūjyate yadvadgopatipramukhaiḥ suraiḥ | | 26
viṣuveṣūparāgeṣu ṣaḍaśītimukheṣu ca |
pūjayitvā raviṃ bhaktyā nātmānaṃ śocate naraḥ | | 27
vibudhya vā svayaṃ vāpi yo namaskurute ravim |
santuṣṭo bhāskarastasmai gatimiṣṭāṃ prayacchati | | 28
kṛśarāpāyasāpūpapalalonmiśramodakaiḥ |
baliṃ kṛtvā tu sūryāya sarvakāmamavāpnuyāt | | 29
modakānāṃ pradānena pāyasasya ca suvrata |
madhumāṃsarasaiścāpi prīyate.atīvabhāskaraḥ | | 1.93.30
ghṛtena tarpaṇaṃ kṛtvā sadā snigdho bhavennaraḥ |
tarpayitvā tu māṃsena sadyaḥ pāpātpramucyate | | 31
ghṛtena snapanaṃ kṛtvā ekāhamudaye raveḥ |
gavāṃ śatasahasrasya dattasya phalamaśnute | | 32
gavāṃ kṣīreṇa santarpya puṇḍarīkaphalaṃ labhet |
rasena snāpayeddevamaśvamedhaphalaṃ 5 labhet | | 33
sūryāya taruṇīṃ dhenuṃ gāmekāṃ yaḥ prayacchati |
kañjajāmacalāṃ prāpya punarlekhapuraṃ vrajet | | 34
gośarīre tu romāṇi yāvanti tripurāntaka |
sa tāvadvarṣakoṭīstu lekhaloke mahīyate | | 35
gośataṃ bhānave dattvā rājasūyaphalaṃ labhet |
aśvamedhaphalaṃ tasya yaḥ sahasraṃ prayacchati | | 36
guggulaṃ devadāruṃ ca dahennityaṃ ghṛtasravam |
ājyadhūmo hi devānāṃ prakṛtyaiva priyaḥ sadā | | 37
bheryādīni ca vādyāni śaṅkhaveṇvādikāni ca |
ye prayacchanti sūryāya yānti te haṃsamandiram | | 38
vajramāharate yastu raverbhaktisamanvitaḥ |
tīrthodakamathaivānyaḥ sa yāti vibudhālayam | | 39
vimānaiḥ strīśatākīrṇaiḥ krīḍayitvā ciraṃ naraḥ |
mānuṣatvamanuprāpya rājā bhavati dhārmikaḥ | |1.93.4 0
chatraṃ dhvajaṃ vitānaṃ ca patākāścāmarāṇi ca |
hemadaṇḍāni vai dadyādraveryo bhaktimānnaraḥ | | 41
vimānena sa divyena kiṅkiṇījālamālinā |
sūryalokamato gatvā bhavatyapsarasāṃ patiḥ | | 42
tatroṣya suciraṃ kālaṃ svargātpratyāgataḥ punaḥ |
mānuṣye jāyate rājā sarvarājanamaskṛtaḥ | | 43
dattvā vāsāṃsi sūryāya alaṅkārāṃstathaiva ca |
krīḍate janalokastho yāvadābhūtasaṃplavam | | 44
gītavāditranṛtyaiśca kuryājjāgaraṇaṃ raveḥ |
gandharvāpsarasāṃ madhye krīḍate suciraṃ naraḥ | | 45
gandhaiḥ puṣpaistathā patraiḥ stotrairvā vividhaistathā |
ye stuvanti raviṃ bhaktyā te yānti patagālayam | | 46
uṣaḥ stuvanti ye sūryamupagāyanti te sadā |
pāṭhakāścāraṇāścaiva sarve te svargagāminaḥ | | 47
aśvayuktaṃ yugairyuktaṃ yo dadyādravaye ratham|
kāñcanaṃ vāpi raupyaṃ vā maṇiratnānvitaṃ śubham | | 48
sa yānenārkavarṇena kiṅkiṇījālamālinā |
svargalokamito gatvā krīḍate.apsarasā saha |4 9
yastu dārumayaṃ kuryādrave rathamanuttamam |
sa yātyarkasavarṇena vimānenārkamaṇḍalam | | 1.93.50
yātrāṃ kurvanti ye bhānornarāḥ saṃvatsarādapi |
ṣaṇmāsādvā gaṇaśreṣṭha teṣāṃ puṇyaphalaṃ śṛṇu | | 51
dhyānino yoginaścaiva prāpnuvantīha yāṃ gatim |
tāṃ gatiṃ pratipadyante sūryavartmāvagāhinaḥ | | 52
rathaṃ vahanti ye bhānornarā bhaktisamanvitāḥ |
arogāścādaridrāśca jātau jātau bhavanti te | | 53
kartāro rathayātrāyā ye narā bhāskarasya tu |
te bhānulokamāsādya viharanti yathāsukham | | 54
yātrābhaṅgaṃ tu yo mohātkrodhādvā kurute naraḥ |
mandehāste narā jñeyā rākṣasāḥ pāpakāriṇaḥ | | 55
dhanaṃ dhānyaṃ hiraṇyaṃ vā vāsāṃsi vividhāni ca |
ye prayacchanti sūryāya te yānti paramāṃ gatim | | 56
gā vātha mahiṣīrvāpi gajānaśvāṃśca śobhanān |
ya prayacchati sūryāya tasya puṇyaphalaṃ śṛṇu | | 57
akṣayaṃ sarvakāmīyamaśvamedhaphalaṃ labhet |
sahasraguṇitaṃ tacca dānamasyopatiṣṭhati | | 58
mahīṃ dadāti yo.arkāya kṛṣṭāṃ phalavatī śubhām |
sa tārayati vai vaṃśyāndaśa pūrvāndaśāparān | | 59
vimānena ca divyena gopuraṃ gopatervrajet |
krīḍatyapsarasāṃ madhye karīva kariṇīgaṇe | | 1.93.60
grāmaṃ dadāti yo bhaktyā sūryāya matimānnaraḥ |
vimānenārkavarṇena sa yāti paramāṃ gatim | | 61
ārāmānye prayacchanti patrapuṣpaphalopagān |
bhānave bhaktiyuktāstu te yānti paramāṃ gatim | | 62
mānasaṃ vācikaṃ vāpi karmajaṃ yacca duṣkṛtam |
sarvaṃ sūryaprasādena aśeṣaṃ ca praṇaśyati | | 63
ārto vā vyādhito vāpi daridro duḥkhito.api vā |
ādityaṃ śaraṇaṃ gatvā nātmānaṃ śocate naraḥ | | 64
ekāhenāpi yadbhānoḥ pūjāyāḥ prāpyate phalam |
tadvai kratuśatairiṣṭaiḥ prāpyate phalamuttamam | | 65
kṛtvā prekṣaṇakaṃ bhānordivyamāyatane śubham |
akṣayaṃ sarvakāmīyaṃ rājasūyaphalaṃ labhet | | 66
veśyākadambakaṃ yastu dadyātsūryāya bhaktitaḥ |
sa gacchetparamaṃ sthānaṃ yatra tiṣṭhati bhānumān | | 67
pustakaṃ bhānave dadyādbhāratasya gaṇādhipa |
sarvapāpavimuktātmā viṣṇuloke mahīyate | | 68
rāmāyaṇasya datvā tu pustakaṃ tripurāntaka |
vājapeyaphalaṃ prāpya gopateḥ puramāvrajet | | 69
bhaviṣyaṃ sāmbasaṃjñaṃ vā dattvā sūryāya pustakam |
rājasūyāśvamedhābhyāṃ phalaṃ prāpnoti mānavaḥ | |1.93.7 0
sarvānkāmānavāpnoti yāti sūryasalokatām |
sūryaloke ciraṃ sthitvā brahmalokaṃ vrajetpunaḥ | |
sthitvā kalpaśataṃ tatra rājā bhavati bhūtale | | 71
bhānorāyatane yastu prapāṃ kuryādgaṇādhipa |
sa yāti paramaṃ sthānaṃ divyaṃ saumanasaṃ naraḥ | | 72
śītakāle ghanaṃ dadyānnarāṇāṃ śītanāśanam |
bhānorāyatane deva aśvamedhaphalaṃ labhet | | 73
itihāsapurāṇābhyāṃ puṇyaṃ pustakavācanam |
aśvamedhasahasraṃ yo nityaṃ kartuṃ pravartate | |
na tatphalamavāpnoti yadāpnotyasya karmaṇaḥ | | 74
tasmātsarvaprayatnena kāryaṃ pustakavācanam |
itihāsapurāṇābhyāṃ bhānorāyatane śubham | | 75
nānyatpuṣṭikaraṃ bhānostathā tuṣṭikaraṃ param |
puṇyākhyānakathā yāstu yathā tuṣyati bhāskaraḥ | | 76
iti śrībhaviṣye mahāpurāṇe brāhme parvaṇi saptamī kalpe bhānumahimavarṇanaṃ
nāma trinavatitamo.adhyāyaḥ | 93 |
atha caturnavatitamo.adhyāyaḥ
puṇyaśravaṇamāhātmyavarṇanam
brahmovāca
atrākhyānamuśantīha saṃvādaṃ gaṇapuṅgava |
pitāmahakumārābhyāṃ puṇyaṃ pāpaharaṃ śivam | | 1
sraṣṭāraṃ sarvalokānāṃ sukhāsīnaṃ pitāmaham |
praṇamya śirasā devaṃ śraddhābhaktisamanvitaḥ | | 2
kumāro devaśārdūla idaṃ vacanamabravīt |
gato.ahamadya bhagavandraṣṭuṃ devaṃ divākaram | | 3
kṛtvā pradakṣiṇaṃ devaḥ sa mayā pūjito raviḥ |
praṇamya śirasā bhaktyā parayā śraddhayā vibho | | 4
anujñātastatastena sukhāsīno hyahaṃ sthitaḥ |
āsīnena mayā tatra dṛṣṭamāścaryamadbhutam | | 5
kāñcanena vimānena kiṅkiṇījālamālinā |
maṇimuktāvicitreṇa vaidūryavaravedinā | | 6
āgataṃ puruṣaṃ tatra dṛṣṭvā devo divākaraḥ |
sasambhramaṃ samutthāya āsanādeva sattama | | 7
gṛhītvā dakṣiṇe pāṇau purataḥ prāpya taṃ naram |
śirasyāghrāya deveśa pūjayāmāsa vai raviḥ | | 8
upaviṣṭaṃ tu taṃ bhānuridaṃ vacanamabravīt |
susvāgataṃ bhadra sukhakṛtā prītāstvayā vayam | | 9
samīpe mama tiṣṭha tvaṃ yāvadābhūtasaṃplavam |
punaryāsyasi tatsthānaṃ yatra brahmā svayaṃ sthitaḥ | | 1.94.10
etasminnaṃtare cānyo vimānavaramāsthitaḥ |
āgataḥ puruṣo devo yatra tiṣṭhati bhāskaraḥ | | 11
sa cāpyevaṃ naro deva pūjito bhānunā tadā |
sāmapūrvaṃ tathoktastu praśrayāvanataḥ sthitaḥ | | 12
tatra me kautukaṃ jātaṃ dṛṣṭvā pūjāṃ kṛtāṃ tayoḥ |
bhānunā devaśārdūla pṛṣṭo bhānurmayā tataḥ | | 13
kimanena kṛtaṃ deva yo.ayaṃ pūrvamihāgataḥ |
narastatra sakāśaṃ vai yasya tuṣṭo bhavādṛśām | | 14
yadasya bhavatā pūjā kṛtā hi svayameva tu |
atra me kautukaṃ jātaṃ vismayaśca viśeṣataḥ | | 15
tathaivāsya kṛtā pūjā dvitīyasya narasya ca |
sarvathā puṇyakarmāṇāvimau naravarottamau | | 16
brahmaviṣṇuśivādyaistu pūjyate bhagavānsadā |
yastvamābhyāṃ paraṃ pūjāṃ kṛtavāndevasattama | | 17
kathyatāṃ mama deveśa kimetau karma cakratuḥ |
yasyedṛkparamaṃ puṇyaṃ phalaṃ divyamavāpatuḥ | |
śrutvā tadvacanaṃ deva idaṃ vacanamabravīt | | 18
sūrya uvāca
sādhu pṛṣṭo.asmi bhavatā karmaṇo nirṇayaṃ param | | 19
yadanena kṛtaṃ karma nareṇa munisattama |
yo.asau sūryamihāyātastacchṛṇuṣva mahāmate | | 1.94.20
yeyaṃ madaṃśasambhūtaiḥ pārthivaiḥ pālitā sadā |
ayodhyā nāma nagarī prakhyātā pṛthivītale | | 21
tatrāsau vaiśyajātīyo dhanapāla iti smṛtaḥ |
tasyāḥ puryāṃ dvijaśreṣṭha divyamāyatanaṃ vyadhāt | | 22
tasminnāyatane divye hyāmnāyārthaṃ tathāśritaḥ |
brāhmaṇānāṃ viśiṣṭānāṃ pūjayityā kadambakam | | 23
itihāsapurāṇābhyāṃ vācakaṃ ca viśeṣataḥ |
pūjayitvā dvijaśreṣṭhaṃ munaśreṣṭhaṃ mahāmunim | | 24
pustakaṃ cāpi sampūjya gandhapuṣpopahārataḥ |
tasya viprakadambasya vyāsasya ca yathāgrataḥ | | 25
prakalpyokto dvijo.anena pāṭhako vācakottamaḥ |
eṣa tiṣṭhati deveśaḥ sahasrakiraṇo raviḥ | | 26
cāturvarṇyamidaṃ vāpi śrotukāmaṃ kadambakam |
tiṣṭha ceha dvijaśreṣṭha kuru pustakavācanam | | 27
yena me varado bhānuḥ sapta janmāni vai bhavet |
yāvatsaṃvatsaraṃ vipra pragṛhya vṛttimuttamām | | 28
svarṇaniṣkaśataṃ vipra tato dāsye tathāparam |
pūrṇe varṣe dvijaśreṣṭha śreyo.arthamahamātmanaḥ | | 29
evaṃ pravartite tasminpuṇye pustakavācane |
ṣaṇmāsāgatamātre tu kāle suravarottama | |
tathaivāntarataścāyaṃ kāladharmamupeyivān | | 1.94.30
mayā cāsya vimānaṃ tu preṣitaṃ kurvato vratam |
ityeṣā karmaṇastuṣṭiḥ puṇyākhyānakajārcitā | | 31
gandhapuṣpopahāraistu na tathā jāyate mama |
prītirdevavara śreṣṭha purāṇaśravaṇe yathā | | 32
gosuvarṇahiraṇyānāṃ vastrāṇāṃ cāpi kṛtsnaśaḥ |
grāmāṇāṃ nagarāṇāṃ ca dānaṃ prītikaraṃ mama | | 33
na tathā syātsuraśreṣṭha yathā prītikaraṃ guha |
itihāsapurāṇābhyāṃ śravaṇaṃ surasainyapa || 34
śrāddhaṃ kurvanti ye mahyaṃ bhakṣyabhojyairanekaśaḥ |
na karoti tathā prītiryathā pustakavācanam | | 35
karṇaśrāddhe yathā prītirmama syātsurasattama |
na tathā jāyate prītirbhojyaśrāddhe tathaiva ca | | 36
atha kiṃ bahunoktena nānyatprītikaraṃ mama |
puṇyākhyānādṛte deva guhyametatprakītitam | | 37
yaścāyamaparo vipra ihāyato narottamaḥ |
ayamāsīddivajaśreṣṭhastasminneva purottame | | 38
ekadā tu gataścāyaṃ dharmaśravaṇamuttamam |
śrotuṃ bhaktyā ddvijaśreṣṭha śraddhayā parayā vṛtaḥ | | 39
śrutvā tatra tato bhaktyā puṇyākhyānamanuttamam |
kṛtvā pradakṣiṇaṃ tasya vācakasya mahātmanaḥ | |
eṣa vipro.amaraśreṣṭha dattavānsvarṇamāṣakam | | 1.94.40
dattvā tu dakṣiṇāṃ tasmai vācakāyāmitaujase 1 |
ānandamagamadvipraḥ prāptavānkāñcanaṃ yathā |4 1
etaddhi saphalaṃ cāsya na cānyatkṛtavānayam |
yadanena kṛtā pūjā vācakasya mahātmanaḥ | |
phalaṃ hi karmaṇastasya yanmayā pūjitaḥ svayam | | 42
vācakaṃ pūjayedyastu śraddhābhaktisamanvitaḥ |
tenāhaṃ pūjitaḥ syāṃ vai ko viṣṇuḥ śaṅkarastathā | | 43
vācakaṃ bhojayedyastu bhaktyā bhojyeranuttamaiḥ |
tenāhaṃ pūjitaḥ syāṃ vai daśa varṣāṇi pañca ca ||44
na yamo na yamī cāpi na mando na manustathā |
tapatī na tathānviṣṭā yatheṣṭo vācako mama ||45
vācake satkṛte deva bhojite surasainyapa |
tṛptirbhavati me deva saṃvatsaraśatadvayam ||46
na kevalaṃ mama prītirvācake bhojite bhavet |
kṛtsnaśo devatānāṃ ca indrādīnāṃ tathā bhavet ||47
brahmaviṣṇuśivādīnāṃ sa ceṣṭho vācako mama |
prīte tasmindevatāḥ syuḥ sarvāḥ prītā na saṃśayaḥ ||48
ityetatkathitaṃ sarvamābhyāṃ karma mahābala ||49
na cānyaccakratuḥ karma kimanyacchrotumicchasi |
etaddṛṣṭvāhamāścaryaṃ tavābhyāśamihāgataḥ ||
kimatra tathyaṃ deveśa kathyatāṃ kautukaṃ mama ||1.94.50
śrutvā kumāravacanaṃ sarvalokapitāmahaḥ ||51
brahmovāca
hanta bhoḥ sādhu puṇyo.asi nāsti tulyastvayāparaḥ |
yaddṛṣṭau bhavatā tau hi supuṇyau puṇyakāriṇau ||52
yaduktaṃ bhānunā vatsa tattathā nānyathā bhavet |
yadāsīnme mukhaṃ putra prathamaṃ lokapūjitam ||53
tasmādetāni sarvāṇi nirgatāni samantataḥ |
itihāsapurāṇāni lokānāṃ hitakāmyayā ||54
yathaitāni mameṣṭāni purāṇāni mahāmate |
na tathā vai caturvedī na cāṅgini mahāmate ||55
śṛṇvantyetāni ye bhaktyā nityaṃ śraddhāsamanvitāḥ |
dattvā tu vācake vṛttiṃ te gacchanti paraṃ padam ||56
dharmārthakāmamokṣāṇāṃ spaṣṭīkaraṇamuttamam |
itihāsapurāṇāni mayā sṛṣṭāni suvrata | | 57
catvāro ya ime vedā gūḍhārthāḥ satataṃ smṛtāḥ |
atastvetāni sṛṣṭāni bodhāyaiṣāṃ mahāmate | | 58
yastu kārayate nityaṃ dharmaśravaṇamuttamam |
ādityādbhāskaraṃ prāpya yāti tatparamaṃ padam | | 59
dattvā tu dakṣiṇāṃ tatra ādityasya puraṃ vrajet |
kimāścaryaṃ suraśreṣṭha dānapātraṃ hi tatparam | | 1.94.60
yathā devavaro lekho yathā hetiḥ paraṃ paviḥ |
brāhmaṇānāṃ tathā śreṣṭho vācako nātra saṃśayaḥ | | 61
hetiryathā tejasāṃ tu sarasāṃ sāgaro yathā |
tathā sarvadvijebhyastu vācakaḥ pravaraḥ smṛtaḥ | | 62
vācakaṃ pūjayedyastu naro bhaktipuraḥ saram |
pūjitaṃ sakalaṃ tena jagatyānnātra saṃśayaḥ | | 63
satyamuktaṃ na sandeho bhānunā matkulodvaha |
vācakena samaṃ pātraṃ na jātvanyadbhavetkvacit | | 64
tacchrutvā brahmaṇo vākyaṃ kumāro vākyamabravīt | | 65
aho hi dhanyatā tasya puṇyaśravaṇakāriṇaḥ |
dānaṃ ca dadato.atyarthaṃ puṇyatā vācakāya vai | | 66
brahmovāca
itthaṃ diṇḍe sadā yastu devadevasya mandire |
kuryāttu dharmaśravaṇaṃ sa yāti paramāṃ gatim | | 67
iti śrībhaviṣyamahāpurāṇe brāhme parvaṇi saptamīkalpe puṇyaśravaṇamāhātmya varṇanaṃ
nāma caturnavatitamo.adhyāyaḥ | 94 |

atha pañcanavatitamo.adhyāyaḥ
ādityālayamāhātmyavarṇanam
brahmovāca
tribhiḥ pradakṣiṇāṃ kṛtvā yo namaskurute ravim |
bhūmau gatena śirasā sa yāti paramāṃ gatim | | 1
sopānatko devagṛhamārohedyastu mānavaḥ |
sa yāti narakaṃ ghoraṃ tāmisraṃ nāma nāmataḥ | | 2
śleṣmamūtrapurīṣāṇi samutsṛjati yastu vai |
devasyāyatane bhānoḥ sa gacchennarakaṃ kramāt | | 3
ghṛtaṃ madhu payastoyaṃ tathekṣurasamuttamam |
snapanārthaṃ tu devasya ye dadatīha mānavāḥ | |
sarvakāmānavāpyeha te yānti helimaṇḍalam | | 4
snāpyamānaṃ raviṃ bhaktyā ye paśyanti vṛṣadhvaja |
te.aśvamedhaphalaṃ prāpya layaṃ yānti vṛṣadhvaje | | 5
snapanaṃ ye ca kurvaṃti bhānorbhaktisamanvitāḥ |
labhante tatphalaṃ bhīma rājasūyāśvamedhayoḥ | | 6
yathā na laṅghayetkaścitsnapanaṃ bhāskarasya tu |
tathā kāryaṃ prayatnena laṅghitaṃ hyasukhāvaham | | 7
tāmisraṃ narakaṃ yāti laṅghayecca sa rauravān |
tasmātsarvaprayatnena kāryaṃ snapanamāditaḥ | | 8
ghṛtena snāpayeddevaṃ kañjamāpnoti mānavaḥ |
madhunā priyamāyāti toyenāpi ghṛtaukasam | | 9
ikṣurasena saṃsnāpya payasā kañjaśadhvajam |
evamebhiḥ snāpayedvai ravimīhitamāpnuyāt | | 1.95.10
iti śrībhaviṣye mahāpurāṇe brāhmeparvaṇi saptamīkalpe ādityālayamāhātmyavarṇanaṃ
nāma pañcanavatitamo.adhyāyaḥ | 95 |
atha ṣaṇṇanavatitamo.adhyāyaḥ
jayānāmasaptamīvarṇanam
diṇḍiruvāca
yaccaitāḥ sapta saptamyo bhavatā kathitā mama |
tāsāṃ yā prathamā deva kathitā sā savistarā | | 1
yāstvanyā devaśārdūla tāḥ sarvāḥ kathayasva me |
yenopoṣya tatastāstu vraje.ahaṃ helisadma vai | | 6
brahmovāca
śuklapakṣasya saptamyāṃ nakṣatraṃ pañcatārakam |
yadā syātsā tadā jñeyā jayā nāmeti saptamī | | 3
tasyāṃ dattāṃ hutaṃ jāpastarpaṇaṃ devapūjanam |
sarvaṃ śataguṇaṃ proktaṃ pūjā cāpi divākare | | 4
bhāskarasya priyā hyeṣā saptamī pāpanāśinī |
dhanyā yaśasyā putryā ca kāmadā kañjajāvahā | | 5
vidhinānena kartavyā tithiryā mama vidyate |
taṃ śṛṇuṣva vidhiṃ matto yena kṛtvārthamaśnumate | 6
haṃse haṃsamākye śukleyaṃ saptamī purā |
samupoṣya ca kartavyā vidhinānena śaṅkara | | 7
pāraṇā tṛtīyā.ahe syātkathitaṃ govṛṣāvaham |
prathamaṃ caturo māsānpāraṇaṃ kathitaṃ budhaiḥ | | 8
kathitānyatra puṣpāṇi karavīrasya suvrata |
candanaṃ ca tathā raktaṃ dhūpārthaṃ guggulaṃ param | | 9
kāsāraṃ tu supakvaṃ ca naivedyaṃ bhāskarāya vai |
anena vidhinā pūjya mārtaṇḍaṃ vibudhādhipam | | 1.96.10
pūjayedbrāhmaṇānbhīma bhakṣyabhojyairyathāvidhi |
kāsāraṃ bhojayedviprānpāraṇe.asminvicakṣaṇaḥ | |
svayameva tathāśnīyātprayato maunamāśritaḥ | | 11
pañcamyāmekabhaktaṃ tu ṣaṣṭhyāṃ naktaṃ pravartate |
kṛtvopavāsaṃ saptamyāmaṣṭamyāṃ pāraṇaṃ bhavet | | 12
ṣaṣṭhyā sametā kartavyā nāṣṭamyeyaṃ kadācana |
yasyopavāsanāyaiva ṣaṣṭhyāmāhurupoṣitam | | 13
yathaikādaśyāṃ kurvanti upavāsaṃ manīṣiṇaḥ |
upavāsanāya dvādaśyāṃ tatheyaṃ parikīrtitā | | 14
siddhārthakaiḥ snānamantraḥ prāśanaṃ gomayasya tu |
bhānurme prīyatāmatra dantakāṣṭhaṃ tathārkajam | | 15
ityeṣa kathitastāta prathame pāraṇe vidhiḥ |
dvitīyaṃ śrūyatāṃ bhīma pāraṇaṃ gadato mama | | 16
mālatīkusumānīha śrīkhaṇḍaṃ candanaṃ tathā |
naivedyaṃ pāyasaṃ bhānordhūpaṃ vijayamādiśet | | 17
brāhmaṇānbhojayedvāpi tathāśnīyātsvayaṃ vibho |
ravirme prīyatāmatra nāma devasya kīrtayet | | 18
prāśayetpañcagavyaṃ tu khadiraṃ dantadhāvane |
dvitīye pāraṇe vīra vidhirukto mayādhunā | | 19
tṛtīyaṃ pāraṇaṃ cāpi kathyamānaṃ nibodha me |
agastikusumairatra bhāskaraṃ pūjayedbudhaḥ | | 1.96.20
samālambhanamatroktaṃ śrīkhaṇḍaṃ kusumaṃ tathā |
sihlako dhūpa uddiṣṭo bhānoḥ prītikaraḥ paraḥ | | 21
śālyodanaṃ tu naivedyaṃ rasāloparisaṃyutam |
brāhmaṇānāṃ tu dātavyaṃ bhakṣayeta tathātmanā | | 22
kuśodakaprāśanaṃ tu badaryā dantadhāvanam |
vikartanaḥ prīyatāṃ me nāma devasya kīrtayet | | 23
varṣāsu devadevasya pūjā kāryā vidhānataḥ |
gandhapuṣpopahāraistu nānāprekṣaṇakaistathā | | 24
godānairbhūmidānairvā brāhmaṇānāṃ ca tarpaṇaiḥ |
itthaṃ sampūjya deveśaṃ devasya purataḥ sthitaḥ | | 25
kārayetparamaṃ puṇyaṃ dhanyaṃ pustakavācanam |
vastrairgandhaistathā dhūpairvācakaṃ pūjayettataḥ | | 26
devasya purataḥ sthitvā tato mantramudīrayet |
devadeva jagannātha sarvarogārtināśana | |
graheśa lokanayana vikartana tamo.apaha | | 27
kṛteyaṃ devadeveśa jayā nāmeti saptamī |
mayā tava prasādena dhanyā pāpaharā śivā | | 28
anena vidhinā vīra yaḥ kuryātsaptamīmimām |
tasya snānādikaṃ sarvaṃ bhavecchataguṇaṃ vibho | | 29
kṛtvemāṃ saptamīṃ vīra puruṣaḥ prāpnuyādyaśaḥ |
dhanaṃ dhānyaṃ suvarṇaṃ ca putramāryabalaṃ śriyam | | 1.96.30
prāpyeha devaśārdūla sūryalokaṃ sa gacchati |
tasmādetya punarbhūmau rājarājo bhavedbudhaḥ | | 31
ityeṣā kathitā vīra jayā nāmeti saptamī | kṛtā smṛtā śrutā sā tu helilokapradāyinī | | 32
iti śrībhaviṣye mahāpurāṇe brāhme parvaṇi saptamīkalpe jayānāmasaptamīmāhātmyavarṇanaṃ
nāma ṣaṇṇavatitamo.adhyāyaḥ | 96 |
atha saptanavatitamo.adhyāyā.a
jayantīkalpavarṇanam
brahmovāca
māghasya śuklapakṣe tu saptamī yā trilocana |
jayantī nāma sā proktā puṇyā pāpaharā śivā | | 1
sopoṣyā yena vidhinā śṛṇu taṃ pārvatīpriya |
pāraṇāni tu catvāri kathitānyatra paṇḍitaiḥ | | 2
pañcamyāmekabhaktaṃ tu ṣaṣṭhyāṃ naktaṃ prakīrtitam |
upavāsastu saptamyāmaṣṭamyāṃ pāraṇaṃ bhavet | | 3
māghe ca phālgune māsi tathā caitre ca suvrata |
bakapuṣpāṇi ramyāṇi kuṅkumaṃ ca vilepanam | | 4
naivedyaṃ modakāṃścātra dhūpa ājyamudāhṛtaḥ |
prāśanaṃ pañcagavyaṃ tu pavitrīkaraṇaṃ param || 5
modakairbhojayedviprānyathāśaktyā gaṇādhipa |
śālyodanaṃ ca bhūteśa dadyācchaktyā dvijeṣu vai | 6
itthaṃ sampūjayedyastu bhāskaraṃ lokapūjitam |
sarvasminpāraṇe vīra so.aśvamedhaphalaṃ labhet | | 7
dvitīye pāraṇe pūjya rājasūyaphalaṃ labhet |
vaiśākhāṣāḍhajyeṣṭheṣu śrāvaṇe māsi suvrata | |
pūjārthamatha bhānorvai śatapatrāṇi suvrata | | 8
śvetaṃ ca candanaṃ bhīma dhūpo guggulurucyate |
naivedyaṃ guḍapūpāstu prāśanaṃ gomayasya tu | |
bhojane cāpi viprāṇāṃ guḍapūpāḥ prakīrtitāḥ | | 9
dvitīyamidamākhyātaṃ pāraṇaṃ pāpanāśanam |
rājasūyāśvamedhābhyāṃ phaladaṃ bhāskarapriyam | | 1.97.10
tṛtīyaṃ śṛṇu devasya pūjārthe bhāskarasya tu |
māsi bhādrapade vīra tathā cāśvayuje vibho | | 11
kārttike cāpi māse tu raktacandanamādiśet |
mālatīkusumānīha dhūpo vijaya ucyate | | 12
naivedyaṃ ghṛtapūpāstu bhojanaṃ ca dvijanmanām |
kuśodakaprāśanaṃ tu kāyaśuddhikaraṃ param | | 13
tṛtīyamapi cākhyātaṃ pāraṇaṃ pāpanāśanam |
rājasūyāśvamedhābhyāṃ phaladaṃ bhāskarapriyam | | 14
caturthamapi te vacmi pāraṇaṃ pāpanāśanam |
rājasūyāśvamedhābhyāṃ phaladaṃ bhāskarapriyam | | 15
tadadya devaśārdūla pāraṇaṃ śreyase śṛṇu |
māsi mārgaśire vīra pauṣe māsi tathā śiva | | 16
māghe ca devaśārdūla śṛṇu puṇyānyaśeṣataḥ |
karavīrāṇi raktāni tathā raktaṃ ca candanam | 17
amṛtākhyastathā dhūpo naivedyaṃ pāyasaṃ param |
ārjanīyaṃ tathā takraṃ prāśanaṃ paramaṃ smṛtam | | 18
agaruṃ candanaṃ mustaṃ sihlakaṃ tryūṣaṇaṃ tathā |
samabhāgaistu kartavyamidaṃ cāmṛtamucyate | | 19
nāmāni kathitānyatra bhāskarasya mahātmanaḥ |
citrabhānustathā bhānurādityo bhāskarastathā | | 1.97.20
prīyatāmiti sarvasminpāraṇe vidhimādiśet |
anena vidhinā yastu kuryātpūjāṃ vibhāvasoḥ | | 21
tasyāṃ tithau devadeva sa yāti paramaṃ padam |
kṛtvaivaṃ saptamīṃ bhīma sarvakāmānavāpnute | | 22
putrārthī labhate putrāndhanārthī labhate dhanam |
sarogo mucyate rogaiḥ śubhamāpnoti puṣkalam | | 23
pūrṇe saṃvatsare bhīma kāryā pūjā divākare |
gandhapuṣpopahāraistu brāhmaṇānāṃ ca tarpaṇaiḥ | |
nānāvidhaiḥ prekṣaṇakaiḥ pūjayā vācakasya tu | | 24
itthaṃ sampūjya deveśaṃ brāhmaṇāṃścābhipūjya ca |
vācakaṃ ca dvijaṃ pūjya idaṃ vākyamudīrayet | | 25
dharmakāryeṣu me deva arthakāryeṣu nityaśaḥ |
kāmakāryeṣu sarveṣu jayo bhavatu sarvadā | | 26
tato visarjayedviprānvācakaṃ tu dvijottamam |
itthaṃ kuryādidaṃ yastu sa jayaṃ prāpnuyātphalam | |
sarvapāpaviśuddhātmā sūryalokaṃ sa gacchati | | 27
vimānavaramāruḍhaḥ kañjajodbhavamuttamam |
tejasā ravisaṃkāśaḥ prabhayā patagopamaḥ | | 28
iti śrībhaviṣye mahāpurāṇe brāhme parvaṇi saptamīkalpe jayantīkalpavarṇanaṃ
nāma saptanavatitamo.adhyāyaḥ | 97 |

athāṣṭanavatitamo.adhyāyaḥ
aparājitāvarṇanam
brahmovāca
māsi bhādrapade śuklā saptamī yā gaṇādhipa |
aparājiteti vikhyātā mahāpātakanāśinī | | 1
caturthyāmekabhaktaṃ tu pañcamyāṃ naktamādiśet |
upavāsaṃ tathā ṣaṣṭhyāṃ saptamyāṃ pāraṇaṃ smṛtam | | 2 |
pāraṇānyatra catvāri kathitāni manīṣibhiḥ |
puṣpāṇi karavīrasya tathā raktaṃ ca candanam | |3
dhūpakriyā guggulena naivedyaṃ guḍapūpakāḥ |
bhādrapadādimāseṣu vidhireṣa prakīrtitaḥ | | 4
śvetāni bhīmapuṣpāṇi tathā śvetaṃ ca candanam|
dhūpamājyamihākhyātaṃ naivadyaṃ pāyasaṃ raveḥ | | 5
mārgaśīrṣādimāseṣu vidhireṣa prakīrtitaḥ |
tato.agastyasya puṣpāṇi kuṅkumaṃ ca vilepanam | | 6
dhūpārthaṃ sihlakaṃ proktamatha vā ravivarṇakam |
śālyodanaṃ ca naivedyaṃ sarasaṃ phālgunādiṣu | | 7
raktotpalāni bhūteśa sāguruṃ candanaṃ tathā |
ananto dhūpa uddiṣṭo naivedyaṃ khaṇḍapūpakāḥ | | 8
śrīkhaṇḍaṃ granthisahitamaguruḥ sihlakaṃ tathā |
mustā tathendraṃ bhūteśa śarkarā gṛhyate tryaham | | 9
ityeṣa dhūpo.anantastu kathito devasattama |
jyeṣṭhādimāseṣu tathā vidhirukto manīṣibhiḥ | | 1.98.10
śṛṇu nāmāni devasya prāśanāni ca suvrata |
sudhāṃśuraryamā caiva savitā tripurāntakaḥ | | 11
pāraṇeṣveva sarveṣu prīyatāmiti kīrtayet |
gomūtraṃ pañcagavyaṃ tu ghṛtaṃ coṣṇaṃ payo dadhi | | 12
yastvetāṃ saptamo kuryādanena vidhinā naraḥ |
aparājito bhavetso.asau sadā śatrubhirāhave | | 13
jitvā śatruṃ labhetāpi trivargaṃ nātra saṃśayaḥ |
trivargamatha samprāpya svarbhānoḥ puramaśnute | | 14
tataḥ pūrṇeṣu māseṣu pūjayecchaktitaḥ khagam |
gandhapuṣpopahāraistu purāṇaśravaṇena ca | | 15
aśvadānena ca vibhorbrāhmaṇānāṃ ca tarpaṇaiḥ |
vācakaṃ pūjayitvā ca bhāskarasya priyaṃ sadā | | 16
bhāskarāya dhvajāndadyānnānāratnavibhūṣitān |
ya itthaṃ kurute vīra saptamīṃ yatnataḥ sadā | | 17
sa parājitya vai śatruṃ yāti haṃsasalokatām | | 18
śuklāśvodbhavayānena āpagena patākinā |
āpagādhipasaṃkāśa āpagānucaro bhavet | | 19
iti śrībhaviṣye mahāpurāṇe brāhme parvaṇi saptamīkalpe aparājitāvarṇanaṃ
nāmāṣṭanavatitamo.adhyāyaḥ | 98 |
athaikonaśatatamo.adhyāyaḥ
mahājayākalpavarṇanam
brahmovāca
śuklapakṣe tu saptamyāṃ yadā saṃkramate raviḥ |
mahājayā tadā sā vai saptamī bhāskarapriyā | | 1
snānaṃ dānaṃ japo homaḥ pitṛdevābhipūjanam |
sarvaṃ koṭiguṇaṃ proktaṃ bhāskarasya vaco yathā | | 2
yastasyāṃ mānavo bhaktyā ghṛtena snāpayedravim |
so.aśvamedhaphalaṃ prāpya svargalokamavāpnuyāt | | 3
payasā snāpayedyastu bhāskaraṃ bhaktimānnaraḥ |
vimuktaḥ sarvapāpebhyo yāti sūryasalokatām | |4
kārpūreṇa vimānena kiṅkiṇījālamālinī |
tejasā harisaṃkāśaḥ kāntyā sūryasamastathā | | 5
sthitvā tatra ciraṃ kālaṃ rājā bhavati cāñjasā |
mahājayaiṣā kathitā saptamī tripurāntaka | | 6
yāmupoṣya naro bhaktyā bhavate sūryalokagaḥ |
tato yāti paraṃ brahma yatra gatvā na śocati | | 7
iti śrībhaviṣye mahāpurāṇe brāhme parvaṇi saptamī kalpe mahājayākalpavarṇanaṃ
nāmaikonaśatatamo.adhyāyaḥ | 99 |
atha śatatamo.adhyāyaḥ
nandānāmasaptamīvarṇanam
brahmovāca
yā tu mārgaśire māsi śuklapakṣe tu saptamī |
nandā sā kathitā vīra sarvānandakarī śubhā | | 1
pañcamyāmekabhaktaṃ tu ṣaṣṭhyāṃ naktaṃ prakīrtitam |
saptamyāmupavāsaṃ tu kīrtayanti manīṣiṇaḥ | | 2
pāraṇānyatra vai trīṇi śaṃsantīha manīṣiṇaḥ |
mālatīkusumānīha sugandhaṃ candanaṃ tathā | | 3
karpūrāgarusammiśraṃ dhūpaṃ cātra vinirdiśet |
dadhyodanaṃ sakhaṇḍaṃ ca naivedyaṃ bhāskarapriyam | | 4
tameva dadyādviprebhyo.aśnīyācca tadanu svayam |
dhūpārthaṃ bhāskarasyaiṣa prathame pāraṇe vidhiḥ | | 5
palāśapuṣpāṇi vibho dhūpo yaḥ śakya eva ca |
karpūraṃ candanaṃ kuṣṭhamaguruḥ sihlakaṃ tathā | | 6
sagranthi vṛṣaṇaṃ bhīma kuṃkumaṃ gṛñjanaṃ tathā |
harītakī tathā bhīma eṣa pakṣaka ucyate | | 7
dhūpaḥ prabodha ādiṣṭo naivedyaṃ khaṇḍamaṇḍakāḥ |
kṛṣṇāgaruḥ sitaṃ kañjaṃ bālakaṃ vṛṣaṇaṃ tathā | | 8
caṃdanaṃ tagaro mustā prabodhaśarkarānvitā |
bhojayedbrāhmaṇāṃścāpi khaṇḍakhādyairgaṇādhipa | |
nimbapatraṃ tu samprāśya tato bhuñjīta vāgyataḥ | | 9
pāraṇasya dvitīyasya vidhireṣa prakīrtitaḥ | | 1.100.10
nīlotpalāni śubhrāṇi dhūpaṃ gauggulamāharet |
naivedyaṃ pāyasaṃ deyaṃ prītaye bhāskarasya tu | | 11
vilepanaṃ candanaṃ tu prāśane vidhirucyate |
tṛtīyasyāpi te vīra kathito vidhiruttamaḥ | | 12
śṛṇu nāmāni devasya pāvanāni nṛṇāṃ sadā |
viṣṇurbhagastathā dhātā prīyatāmudgirecca vai | | 13
anena vidhinā yastu kuryātprayatamānasaḥ |
sakāmāniha samprāpya nandate śāśvatī samāḥ | | 14 |
tataḥ sūryasado gatyā nandate nandavardhana |
eṣā tu nandajananī tavākhyātā bhayā śiva | | 15
yāmupoṣya tato bhuktvā nandate haṃsamāpya vai | | 16
iti śrībhaviṣye mahāpurāṇe brāhme parvaṇi saptamīkalpe nandānāmasaptamīvarṇanaṃ
nāma śatatamo.adhyāyaḥ | 100 |
athaikādhikaśatatamo.adhyāyaḥ
bhadrākalpavarṇanam
brahmovāca
śuklapakṣe tu saptamyāṃ nakṣatraṃ saviturbhavet |
yadā prathamatā caiva tadā vai bhadratāṃ vrajet | | 1
snapanaṃ tatra devasya ghṛtena kathitaṃ budhaiḥ |
kṣīreṇa ca tathā vīra punarikṣurasena ca | | 2
snāpayitvā tu deveśaṃ candanena vilepayet |
dagdhvā tu guggulaṃ tasya dadyādbhadraṃ tathāgrataḥ | | 3
godhūmacūrṇaṃ nivapanvimalaṃ śaśisannibham |
savajraṃ saguḍaṃ caiva raktapuṣpopaśobhitam | | 4
yadasya śṛṅgamīśānaṃ tatra vai mauktikaṃ nyaset |
yadāgneyaṃ tatra māṇikyaṃ nyasedvā lohitaṃ maṇim | | 5
nairṛtye makaraṃ dadyādvāyavye padmarāgiṇam |
gāṅgeyamantatastasya svaśaktyā vinyasedbudhaḥ | | 6
caturthyāmekabhaktaṃ tu pañcamyāṃ naktamādiśet |
ṣaṣṭhyāmayācitaṃ proktaṃ(kta?) upavāso hyataḥ paraḥ | | 7
pāṣaṇḍino vikarmasthānbaiḍālavratikāntyajān |
saptamyāṃ pālayetprājño divā svāpaṃ vivarjayet | | 8
anena vidhinā yastu kuryādvai bhadrasaptamīm |
tasmai bhadrāṇi sarvāṇi yacchanti ṛbhavaḥ sadā | | 9
bhadraṃ dadāti yastvasyāṃ bhadrastasya suto bhavet |
bhadramāsādya bhūteśa sadā bhadreṇa tiṣṭhati | | 1.101.10
diṇḍiruvāca
ko.ayaṃ bhadra iti proktaḥ kathaṃ kāryaṃ prabhūṣaṇam |
dattvā ca kiṃ phalaṃ vidyādvidhinā kena dīyate | | 11
brahmovāca
vyoma bhadramiti proktaṃ devacihnamanūpamam |
yaddhṛtveha naraḥ sūryaṃ mucyate sarvakilbiṣaiḥ | | 12
śālipiṇḍamayaṃ kāryaṃ catuṣkoṇamanūpamam |
gavyena sarpiṣā yuktaṃ khaṇḍaśarkarayānvitam | | 13
cāturjātakapūrṇaṃ tu drākṣābhiśca viśeṣataḥ |
nālikeraphalaiścaiva sugandhaṃ ca gaṇādhipa | | 14
madhyendranīlaṃ bhadrasya nyasetprājñaḥ svaśaktitaḥ |
puṣparāgaṃ marakataṃ padmarāgaṃ tathaiva ca | | 15
anaupamyaṃ ca māṇikyaṃ kramātkoṇeṣu vinyaset |
vācakāyātha vā dadyādatha vā bhojake svayam | | 16
anena vidhinā yastu kṛtvā bhadraṃ prayacchati |
sa hi bhadrāṇi samprāpya gacchedgopatimandiram | | 17
brahmalokaṃ tato gacchedyānārūḍho na saṃśayaḥ |
tejasā gojasaṃkāśaḥ kāṃtyā gojasamastathā | | 18
prabhayā gopatestulya ūrjasā goparasya ca |
tasmādetya punarbhūmau gopatiḥ syānna saṃśayaḥ | |
prasādādgopatervīra sarvajñādhipapūjitaḥ | | 19
ityeṣā kathitā bhīma bhadrā nāmeti saptamī |
yāmupoṣya naro bhīma brahmalokamavāpnuyāt | | 1.101.20
śṛṇvanti ye paṭhantīha kurvanti ca gaṇādhipa |
te sarve bhadramāsādya yānti tadbrahma śāśvatam | | 21
sumanturuvāca
ityuktavānpurā brahmā diṇḍine saptamīvratam |
mayāpyuktaṃ tava vibho yathājñātaṃ yathāśrutam | | 22
gṛhītvā saptamīkalpaṃ mānavo yastu bhūtale |
tyajetkāmādbhayādvāpi sa jñeyaḥ patito.abudhaḥ | | 23
tasmāddhāraya tadvīra na tyājyaṃ saptamīvratam |
tyajamāno bhavedvīra ārūḍhapatito naraḥ | | 24
śrāvayedyastu bhaktyā ca saptamīkalpamāditaḥ |
so.aśvamedhaphalaṃ prāpya tato yāti paraṃ padam | | 25
iti śrībhaviṣye mahāpurāṇe brāhme parvaṇi saptamīkalpe bhadrākalpavarṇanaṃ
nāmaikādhikaśatatamodhyāyaḥ | 101 |
atha dvyadhikaśatatamo.adhyāyaḥ
nakṣatrapūjāvidhivarṇanam
sumanturuvāca
evaṃ yā devadevasya saptamī bhāskarasya tu |
yathā bahūnāṃ bhāryāṇāṃ bhartuḥ kācitpriyā bhavet | | 1
sarvāśca tithayo hyasya priyāḥ sūryasya bhārata |
tasmādasyāṃ nareṇeha pūjanīyo divākaraḥ | | 2
śatānīka uvāca
tithīnāmadhipaḥ sūryaḥ sarvāsāṃ kathito yadi |
saptamyāmeva yāgo.asya kimarthaṃ kriyate budhaiḥ | | 3
sumanturuvāca
idamarthaṃ purā pṛṣṭaḥ surajyeṣṭho divi sthitaḥ |
viṣṇunā kuruśārdūla tenoktaṃ haraye yathā | |
tathā te sarvamākhyāsye śṛṇuṣvaikamanā vibho | | 4
sukhāsīnaṃ surajyeṣṭhaṃ purā devaṃ pitāmaham |
praṇamya śirasā deva kṛṣṇo vacanamabravīt | | 5
yadyeṣa bhānumāndevastithīnāmadhipaḥ smṛtaḥ |
kimarthaṃ pūjyate brahmansaptamyāṃ brūhi me vibho | | 6
evamuktaḥ surajyeṣṭho viṣṇunā prabhaviṣṇunā |
prahasya bhagavāndeva idaṃ vacanamabravīt | | 7
brahmovāca
devebhyastithayo dattā bhāskareṇa mahātmanā |
muktvaikāṃ saptamīṃ sarvāṃ samyagārādhanena vai | | 8
yasyaiva yaddinaṃ dattaṃ sa tasyaivādhipaḥ smṛtaḥ |
svadine pūjitastasmātsvamantrairvarado bhavet.. | | 9
viṣṇuruvāca
arkeṇa kataratkasmai dinaṃ dattaṃ mahātmanā |
svadine pūjite.asminvai svamantrairjāyate dhruvam | | 1.102.10
brahmovāca
agnaye pratipaddattā dvitīyā brahmaṇe tathā |
tṛtīyā yakṣarājāya gaṇeśāya caturthyapi | | 11
pañcamī nāgarājāya kārtikeyāya ṣaṣṭhyapi |
saptamī sthāpitātmārthaṃ dattā rudrāya cāṣṭamī | | 12
durgāyai navamī dattā yamāya daśamī svayam |
viśvebhyaścātha devebhyo dattā caikādaśī sadā | | 13
dvādaśī viṣṇave dattā madanāya trayodaśī |
caturdaśī śaṅkarāya dattā somāya pūrṇimā | | 14
pitṛrṇāṃ bhānunā dattā puṇyā pañcadaśī sadā |
tithyaḥ pañcadaśaitāstu somasya parikīrtitāḥ | | 15
pīyate kṛṣṇapakṣe tu surairebhiryathoditaiḥ |
śuklapakṣe prapūryante ṣoḍaśyā kalayā saha | | 16
akṣayā sā sadaikaikā tatra sākṣātsthito raviḥ |
kṣayavṛddhikaro hyevaṃ tenāsau tatpatiḥ smṛtaḥ | | 17
dadāti gatimakṣīṇā dhyānamātrasthito 1 raviḥ |
anyepīṣṭānyathākāmānprayacchanti sukhena vai | | 18
tathā sarvaṃ pravakṣyāmi kṛṣṇa saṃkṣepataḥ śṛṇu |
agnimiṣṭvā ca hutvā ca pratipadyamṛtaṃ ghṛtam | |
haviṣā sarvadhānyāni prāpnuyādamitaṃ dhanam | | 19
brahmāṇaṃ ca dvitīyāyāṃ sampūjya brahmacāriṇam |
bhojayitvā ca vidyānāṃ sarvāsāṃ pārago bhavet | | 1.102.20
tṛtīyāyāṃ ca vitteśaṃ vittāḍhyo jāyate dhruvam |
krayādivyavahoraṣu lābho bahuguṇo bhavet | | 21
gaṇeśapūjanaṃ kuryāccaturthyāṃ sarvakarmasu |
avighnaṃ vidviṣāṃ vighnaṃ kuryāccāsya na saṃśayaḥ | | 22
nāgāniṣṭvā ca pañcamyāṃ na viṣairabhibhūyate |
striyaṃ ca labhate putrānparāṃ ca śriyamāpnuyāt | | 23
sampūjya kārtikeyaṃ tu ṣaṣṭhyāṃ śreṣṭhaḥ prajāyate |
medhāvī rūpasampanno dīrghāyuḥ kīrtivardhanaḥ | | 24
saptamyāṃ pūjya rakṣeśaṃ citrabhānuṃ divākaram |
aṣṭamyāṃ pūjito devo govṛṣābharaṇo haraḥ | | 25
jñānaṃ dadāti vipulaṃ kāntiṃ ca vipulāṃ tathā |
mṛtyuhā jñānadaścaiva pāśahā ca prapūjitaḥ | | 26
durgāṃ sampūjya durgāṇi navamyāṃ taratīcchayā |
saṅgrāme vyavahāre ca sadā vijayamaśnute | | 27
daśamyāṃ yamamātiṣṭhetsarvavyādhiharo dhruvam |
narakādatha mṛtyośca samuddharati mānavam | | 28
ekādaśyāṃ yathoddiṣṭā viśvedevāḥ prapūjitāḥ |
prajāṃ paśuṃ dhanaṃ dhānyaṃ prayacchanti mahīṃ tathā | | 29
dvādaśyāṃ viṣṇumiṣṭveha sarvadā vijayī bhavet |
pūjyaśca sarvalokānāṃ yathā gopatigokaraḥ | | 1.102.30
kāmadevaṃ trayodaśyāṃ surūpo jāyate dhruvam |
iṣṭāṃ rūpavatīṃ bhāryāṃ labhetkāmāṃśca puṣkalān | | 31
dṛṣṭveśvaraṃ caturdaśyāṃ sarvaiśvaryasamanvitaḥ |
bahuputro bahudhanastathā syānnātra saṃśayaḥ | | 32
paurṇamāsyāṃ tu yaḥ somaṃ pūjayedbhaktimānnaraḥ |
svādhipatyaṃ bhavettasya sampūrṇaṃ na ca hīyate | | 33
pitaraḥ svadine diṇḍe dṛṣṭāḥ kurvanti sarvadā |
prajāvṛddhiṃ dhanaṃ rakṣāṃ cāyuṣyaṃ balameva ca | | 34
upavāsaṃ vināpyete bhavantyuktaphalapradāḥ |
pūjayā japahomaiśca toṣitā bhaktitaḥ sadā | | 35
mūlamantraiśca saṃjñābhiraṃśamantraiśca kīrtitāḥ |
pūrvavatpadmamadhyasthāḥ karttavyāśca tithīśvarāḥ | | 36
gandhapuṣpopahāraiśca yathā śaktyā vidhīyate |
pūjā bāhyena vidhinā kṛtāpi ca phalapradā | | 37
ājyadhārāsamidbhiśca dadhikṣīrānnamākṣikaiḥ |
yathoktaphalado homo japaḥ śāntena cetasā | | 38
mūlamantrāśca saṃjñābhiraṅgamantrāśca kīrtitāḥ |
kṛtvā yajñāndaśa dvau ca phalānyetāni bhaktitaḥ | | 39
yathoktāni tathoktāni labhetehādhikānyapi |
iha yasmādyathānyasminyo vasedyaḥ sukhī sadā | | 1.102.40
teṣāṃ lokeṣu mantrajño yāvatteṣāṃ tithiḥ sthitā |
dahettasmāttathāriṣṭaṃ tadrūpo jāyate naraḥ | | 41
surūpo dharmasampanno kṣapitārirmahīpatiḥ |
strī vā napuṃsako vāpi jāyate puruṣottamaḥ | | 42
ityetāḥ kathitāḥ kṛṣṇa tithayo yā mayā tava |
nakṣatradevatāḥ sarvā nakṣatreṣu vyavasthitāḥ | | 43
iṣṭānkāmānprayacchanti yāstā vakṣye mahīdhara |
candramā yatra nakṣatre mahāvṛddhyā sthitaḥ sadā | |44
uktastu devatāyajñastadā sā phaladā bhavet |
devatāśca pravakṣyāmi nakṣatrāṇāṃ yathākramam | | 45
nakṣatrāṇi ca sarvāṇi yajñāścaiva pṛthakpṛthak |
aśvinyāmaśvināviṣṭvā dīrghāyurjāyate naraḥ | | 46
vyādhibhirmucyate kṣipramatyarthaṃ vyādhipīḍitaḥ |
bharaṇyāṃ yama uddiṣṭaḥ kusumairasitaiḥ śubhaiḥ | | 47
tathā gandhādibhiḥ śubhrairapamṛtyorvimocayet | | 48
analaḥ kṛttikāyāṃ tu iha sampūjitaḥ paraḥ |
raktamālyādibhirdadyātphalaṃ homena ca dhruvam | | 49
pūjyaḥ prajāpatiḥ prīta iṣṭo dadyātpaśūṃstathā |
rohiṇyāṃ devaśārdūla pūjanādiha gopate | |
mṛgaśīrṣe sadā somo jñānamārogyameva ca | | 1.102.50
ārdrāyāṃ tu śivaṃ pūjya paścāddvija yamāpnuyāt |
padmādibhiḥ sa divyaiśca pūjitaḥ śaṃ prayacchati | | 51
tathā punarvasvaditiḥ sadā sampūjyate divi |
gurūṇāṃ tarpitā caiva māteva parirakṣati | | 52
puṣye bṛhaspatirbuddhiṃ dadāti vipulāṃ śubhām |
gītairgandhādibhirnāgā āśleṣāyāṃ prapūjitāḥ | | 53
tarpitāśca yathānyāyaṃ bhakṣyādyairmadhuraiḥ sitaiḥ |
rakṣāmiṣādibhistaistaiḥ prītiṃ kurvanti mānada | | 54
maghāsu pitaraḥ sarve havyaiḥ kavyaiśca pūjitāḥ |
prayacchanti dhanaṃ dhānyaṃ bhṛtyānputrānpaśūṃstathā | | 55
phālgunyāmatha vai pūṣā iṣṭaḥ puṣpādibhiḥ śubhaiḥ |
pūrvāyāṃ vijayaṃ dadyāduttarāyāṃ bhagaṃ tathā | | 56
bhartāramīpsitaṃ dadyātkanyāyai puruṣāya tām |
iha janmani yujyeta rūpadraviṇasampadā | | 57
pūjitaḥ savitā haste viśvatejonidhiḥ sadā |
gandhapuṣpādibhiḥ sarvaṃ dadāti vipulaṃ dhanam | | 58
rājyaṃ tu tvaṣṭā citrāyāṃ niḥsapatnaṃ prayacchati |
iṣṭaḥ santarpitaḥ prītaḥ svātyāṃ vāyurbalaṃ param | | 59
iṃdrāgnī ca viśākhāyāṃ jātaraktai prapūjya ca |
dhanadhānyāni labdhveha tejasvī nivasetsadā | | 1.102.60
raktairmitramanūrādhāsvevaṃ sampūjya bhaktitaḥ |
śriyo bhajanti sarveṣāṃ ciraṃ jīvanti sarvadā | | 61
jyeṣṭhāyāṃ pūrvavacchakramiṣṭvā puṣṭimavāpnuyāt |
guṇairjyeṣṭhaśca sarveṣāṃ karmaṇā ca dhanena ca | | 62
mūle devapitṛrntsarvānbhaktyā sampūjya pūrvavat |
pūrvavatphalamāpnoti svargasthāne dhruvo bhavet | | 63
pūrvāṣāḍhe hyapaḥ pūjya hutvā tatraiva pūrvavat |
santāpānmucyate kṣipraṃ śārīrānmānasāttathā | | 64
āṣāḍhāsu tathā viśvānuttarāṣāḍhayogataḥ |
viśveśaṃ pūjya puṣpādyaiḥ sarvamāpnoti mānavaḥ | | 65
śravaṇe tu sitairviṣṇuṃ pītairnīlaiśca bhaktitaḥ |
sampūjya śriyamāpnoti paraṃ vijayameva ca | | 66
dhaniṣṭhāsu vasūniṣṭvā na bhayaṃ bhajate kvacit |
mahato.api bhayāttvetairgandhapuṣpādibhiḥ śubhaiḥ | | 67
indraṃ śatabhiṣāyāṃ ca vyādhibhirmucyate dhruvam |
āturaḥ puṣṭimāpnoti svāsthyamaiśvaryameva ca | | 68
ajaṃ bhādrapadāyāṃ tu śuddhasphaṭikasannibham |
sampūjya bhaktimāpnoti paraṃ vijayameva ca | | 69
uttarāyāmahirbudhnyaṃ parāṃ śāntimavāpnuyāt |
revatyāṃ pūjitaḥ pūṣā dadāti satataṃ śubham | |
sitaiḥ puṣpaiḥ sthitiṃ caiva dhṛtiṃ vijayameva ca | | 1.102.70
tavaivaite samākhyātā yajñāḥ saṃkṣepato mayā |
nakṣatradevatānāṃ ca sādhakānāṃ hitāya vai | |
bhaktyā vittānusāreṇa bhavanti phaladāḥ sadā | | 71
gantumicchedanantyaṃ vā kriyāṃ prārabdhameva ca |
nakṣatradevatāyajñaṃ kṛtvā tatsarvamācaret | | 72
evaṃ kṛte hi tatsarvaṃ yātrāphalamavāpnuyāt |
kriyāphalaṃ ca sampūrṇamityuktaṃ bhānunā svayam | | 73
yajñātsa vijayaṃ kuryātkriyāṃ kuryādyathepsitām |
kālacakre.atha vā sūryaṃ rāśicakre kalātmanā | | 74
viśvatejonidhiṃ dhyātvā sarvaṃ kuryādyathepsitam |
vibhūtireṣā coddiṣṭā kriyābhiḥ sādhyate dhruvam | | 75
uddiṣṭābhiḥ prayatnena muktiyogena sādhyate |
bhānorārādhanādvāpi prāpyate muktireva hi | |
tasmādārādhaya raviṃ bhaktyā tvaṃ madhusūdana | | 76
ijyāpūjānamaskāraśuśrūṣābhiraharniśam |
vratopavāsairvividhairbrāhmaṇānāṃ ca tarpaṇaiḥ | | 77
yaḥ kārayati devārcāṃ hadayālambanaṃ raveḥ |
sa naro bhānusālokyamupaiti gatakalmaṣaḥ| | 78
iti śrībhaviṣye mahāpurāṇe brāhme parvaṇi saptamīkalpe nakṣatrapūjāvidhivarṇanaṃ
nāma dvyadhikaśatatamo.adhyāyaḥ | 102 |
atha tryadhikaśatatamo.adhyāyaḥ
sūryapūjāmahimavarṇanam
brahmovāca
yaśca devālayaṃ bhaktyā bhānoḥ kārayate sthiram |
sa sapta puruṣāṃllokānbhānornayati mānavaḥ | | 1
yāvantyabdāni devārcā ravestiṣṭhati mandire |
tāvadvarṣasahasrāṇi sūryaloke sa modate | | 2
devārcā lakṣaṇopetā yadgṛhe santato vidhiḥ |
niṣkāmaṃ vā mano yasya sa yāti ravisāmyatām | | 3
puṣpāṇyatisugandhīni manojñāni ca yaḥ pumān |
prayacchati hi deveśaṃ tadbhāvagatamānasaḥ | |4
dhūpāṃśca vividhāṃstāṃstāngandhāḍhyaṃ cānulepanam |
dīpabalyupahārāśca yaccābhīṣṭamathātmanaḥ | | 5
naraḥ so.anudinaṃ yajñātprāpnotyārādhanādrave |
yajñeśo bhagavānbhānurmakhairapi ca toṣyate | | 6
bahūpakaraṇā yajñā nānāsambhāravistarāḥ |
prāpyante tairdhanayutairmanuṣyairlokasañcayaiḥ || 7
bhaktyā tu puruṣaiḥ pūjā kṛtā dūrvāṃkurairapi |
raverdadāti hi phalaṃ sarvayajñaiḥ sudurlabham | | 8
yāni puṣpāṇi bhakṣyāṇi dhūpagandhānulepanam |
dayitaṃ bhūṣaṇaṃ yacca raktake caiva vāsasī | | 9
yāni cābhyupahārāṇi bhakṣyāṇi ca phalāni ca |
prayaccha tāni deveśa bhavethāścaiva tanmanāḥ | | 1.103.10
ādyaṃ taṃ yajñapuruṣaṃ yathāśaktyā prasādaya |
ārādhya sthāpitaṃ devaṃ tasminneva narālaye | | 11
puṣpaistīrthodakairgandhairmadhunā sarpiṣā tathā |
kṣīreṇa snāpayeddevaṃ citrabhānuṃ divākaram| | 12
dadhikṣīrahradānyāti syargalokānmadhucyutān |
prayāsyati yaduśreṣṭha nirvṛtiṃ vāpi śāśvatīm | | 13
stotrairgītaistathā vādyairbrāhmaṇānāṃ ca tarpaṇaiḥ |
manasaścaikatāyogādārādhaya vibhāvasum | | 14
ārādhya taṃ videhānāṃ puruṣāḥ saptasaptatiḥ |
haihayānāṃ ca pañcāśadamṛtatvaṃ samāgatāḥ | | 15
sa tvamebhiḥ prakāraistamupavāsaistu bhāskaram |
santoṣaya hi tuṣṭo.asau bhānurbhavati śāntidaḥ | | 16
kṛṣṇa uvāca 2
upavāsaiścitrabhānuḥ kathaṃ tuṣṭaḥ prajāyate |
paricaryā kathaṃ kāryā yā kāryā copavāsinā | | 17
yadyatkāryaṃ yadā caiva bhānorārādhanaṃ naraiḥ |
tatsarvaṃ vistarādbrahmanyathāvadvaktumarhasi | | 18
brahmovāca
smṛtaḥ sampūjito dhūpapuṣpādyaiḥ sa sadā raviḥ |
bhogināmupakārāya kiṃ punaścopavāsinām | | 19
upāvṛttastu pāpebhyo yastu vāsoguṇaiḥ saha |
upavāsaḥ sa vijñeyaḥ sarvabhogavivarjitaḥ | | 1.103.20
ekarātraṃ dvirātraṃ vā trirātramatha vā hare |
upavāsī raviṃ yastu bhaktyā dhyāyati mānavaḥ | | 21
tannāmayājī tatkarmaratastadgatamānasaḥ |
niṣkāmaḥ pūjayitvā taṃ paraṃ brahmādhigacchati | | 22
yaśca kāmamabhidhyāya bhāskarārpitamānasaḥ |
upoṣati tamāpnoti prasanne tu vṛṣadhvaje | | 23
śrīkṛṣṇa uvāca
brāhmaṇaiḥ kṣatriyairvaiśyaiḥ śūdraiḥ strībhistathā vibho |
saṃsāragartapaṅkasthaiḥ sugatiḥ prāpyate katham | | 24
brahmovāca
athārādhya jagannāthaṃ bhāskaraṃ timirāpaham |
nirvyalīkena cittena prayāsyati ca sadgatim | | 25
viṣayāgrāhavaiṣamyaṃ na cittaṃ bhāskarārpaṇam |
sa kathaṃ pāpa kartā vai naro yāsyati sadgatim | | 26
yadi saṃsāraduḥkhārtaḥ sugatiṃ gantumicchasi |
tadārādhaya sarveśaṃ graheśaṃ lokapūjitam | | 27
puṣpaiḥ sugandhairhadyaiśca dhūpaiḥ sāgurucandanaiḥ |
vāsovibhūṣaṇairbhakṣyairupavāsaparāyaṇaḥ | | 28
yadi saṃsāranirvedādabhivācchasi sadgatim |
tadārādhaya kāleśaṃ yacceṣṭaṃ tava cetasā | | 29
puṣpāṇi yadi tena syuḥ śastaṃ pādapapallavaiḥ |
dūrvāṃkurairapi kṛṣṇa tadabhāve.arcayedravim | | 1.103.30
puṣpapatrāmbubhirdhūpairyathāvibhavamātsanaḥ |
pūjitastuṣṭimatulāṃ bhaktyā yātyekacetasām | | 31
yaḥ sadāyatane bhānoḥ kuryātsammārjanaṃ naraḥ |
sa pāṃsudehasaṃyogātsarvapāpaiḥ pramucyate | | 32
yāvatyaḥ pāṃsukaṇikā mārjyante bhāskarālaye |
dināni divi divyāni tāvanti modate naraḥ | | 33
sabāhyābhyantaraṃ veśma mārjate bhāskarasya yaḥ |
sa bāhyābhyantarastasya kāyo niṣkalmaṣo bhavet | | 34
yaścānulepanaṃ kuryādbhānorāyatane naraḥ |
sa helilokamāsādya modate gogate harau | | 35
mṛdā vā mṛdvikārairvā varṇakairgomayena vā |
anulepanakṛdbhaktyā naro gopatimāpnuyāt | | 36
udakābhyukṣaṇaṃ bhānoryaḥ karoti tathākṣaye |
sa gacchati naraḥ kṛṣṇa yatrāste gopatiḥ sadā | | 37
puṣpaprakaramatyarthaṃ sugandhaṃ bhāskarālaye |
anulipte naro dadyātpūṣottaragṛhaṃ vrajet | | 38
vimānavaramabhyeti sarvaratnamayaṃ divi |
samprāpnoti naro dattvā dīpakaṃ bhāskarālaye | | 39
yastu samvatsaraṃ pūrṇaṃ tilapātraprado naraḥ |
dhvajaṃ ca bhāskare dadyātsamamatra phalaṃ labhet | | 1.103.40
vidhunotyativātena dāturajñānataḥ kṛtam |
pāpaṃ dāturgṛhe bhānurdivārātrau na saṃśayaḥ | | 41
gītavādyādirbhirdevaṃ ya upāste vibhāvasum |
gandharvanṛtyairvādyaiśca vimānastho niṣevyate | | 42
jātismaratvaṃ vṛddhiṃ ca tatastu paramāṃ gatim |
prāpnoti helerāyatane puṇyākhyānakathākaraḥ | | 43
tasmātkuryātprayatnena pūjayedvāpi vācakam |
nānyatprītikaraṃ bhānoḥ puṇyākhyānādṛte kvacit | | 44
eko.api heleḥ sukṛtaḥ praṇāmo daśāśvamedhāvabhṛthena tulyaḥ |
daśāśvamedhī punareti janma helipraṇāmī na punarbhavāya | | 45
evaṃ deveśvaro bhaktyā yena bhānurupāsitaḥ |
sa prāpnoti gatiṃ ślāghyāṃ yāmicchati ca cetasā | |4 6
tamārādhya mayā prāptaṃ brahmatvaṃ lokapūjitam |
saureryathepsitaṃ prāptaṃ tvayā tasmātpurānagha | | 47
brahmahatyābhibhūtastu gośrutābharaṇo haraḥ |
tamārādhya raviṃ bhaktyā mukto.asau brahmahatyayā | |48
devatvaṃ manujaiḥ kaiścidgandharvatvaṃ tathā paraiḥ |
vidyādharatvamaparairevāptaṃ hi divākarāt | | 49
lekhaḥ kratuśateneśamārādhyainaṃ divākaram |
indratvamagamattasmānnānyaḥ pūjyo divākarāt | | 1.103.50
devebhyo.apyatipūjyastu svagururbrahmacāriṇā |
tasmātsa yajñapuruṣo vivasvānpūjya eva hi | | 51
striyāśca bhartāramṛte pūjyo.atyantaṃ vibhāvasuḥ |
bharturgṛhasthasya sataḥ pūjyo gopatiraṃśumān | | 52
vaiśyānāmapi cārādhyastapobhistamanāśanaḥ |
dhyeyaḥ parivrājakānāṃ sadā devo vibhāvasuḥ | | 53
evaṃ sarvāśramāṇāṃ hi citrabhānuḥ parāyaṇam |
sarveṣāṃ caiva varṇānāṃ tamārādhyāpnuyādgatim | | 54
iti śrībhaviṣye mahāpurāṇe brāhme parvaṇi saptamī kalpe sūryapūjāmahimavarṇanaṃ nāma
tryadhikaśatatamo.adhyāyaḥ | 103 |
atha caturadhikaśatatamo.adhyāyaḥ
trivargasaptamīvratanirūpaṇam
śṛṇuṣva saṃyataḥ kāmyānupavāsāṃstathāparān |
tāṃstānāśritya yānkāmānkurutepsitamānasaḥ | | 1
saptamyāṃ śuklapakṣe tu phālgunasyeha mānavaḥ |
japanhelīti devasya nāma bhaktyā punaḥpunaḥ | | 2
devārcane cāṣṭaśataṃ kṛtvaitacca japecchuciḥ |
snātaḥ prasthānakāle tu utthāne skhalite kṣute | | 3
pākhaṇḍānpatitāṃścaiva tathaivānyāyaśālinaḥ |
nālapeta tathā bhānumarcayecchraddhayānvitaḥ | |
idaṃ codāharedbhānau manaḥ saṃdhāya tatparaḥ | |4
haṃsahaṃsa kṛpālustvamagatīnāṃ gatirbhava |
saṃsārārṇavamagnānāṃ trātā bhava divākara | | 5
evaṃ prasādyopavāsaṃ kṛtvā niyatamānasaḥ |
pūrvāhṇa eva ca sakṛtprāśyāccācamanīyakam | | 6
snātvārcayitvā haṃseti punarnāma prakīrtayet |
vajradhārātrayaṃ caiva kṣipettrirdevapādayoḥ | | 7
caitravaiśākhayoścaiva tadvajjyeṣṭhe tu pūjayan |
martyaloke gatiṃ śreṣṭhāṃ kṛṣṇa prāpnoti vai naraḥ | | 8
utkrāṃtastu vrajetkṛṣṇa divyaṃ haṃsālayaṃ śubham |
vṛṣadhvajaprasādādvai saṃkrandanaśriyā vṛtaḥ | | 9
āṣāḍhe śrāvaṇe caiva māsi bhādrapade tathā |
tathaivāśvayuje caiva anena vidhinā naraḥ | | 1.104.10
upoṣya sampūjya tathā mārtaṇḍeti ca kīrtayet |
gomūtraprāśanotpūto dhanī dhanapuraṃ vrajet | | 11
ārādhitasya jagatāmīśvarasyāvyayātmanaḥ |
utkrāṃtikāle smaraṇaṃ bhāskarasya tathāpnuyāt | | 12
kṣīrasya prāśanaṃ kṛṣṇa vidhiṃ caiva yathoditam |
kārttikādi yathānyāyaṃ kuryānmāsacatuṣṭayam | | 13
tenaiva vidhinā kṛṣṇa bhāskareti ca kīrtayet |
sa yāti bhānusālokyaṃ bhāskaraṃ smarati kṣaye | | 14
pratimāsaṃ dvijātibhyo dadyāddānaṃ yathepsitam |
cāturmāsye tu sampūrṇe kṛtvā pustakavācanam | | 15
kathāṃ tu bhāskarasyeha saṅgītakamathāpi vā |
dharmaśravaṇamabhīṣṭaṃ sadā dharmadhvajasya tu | | 16
vācakaṃ pūjayitvā tu tasmātkāryaṃ vipaścitā |
śrāddhamanyena pakvena vācakena dvijena tu | |
divyena ca yathāyuktamabhīṣṭaṃ bhāskarasya hi | | 17
evameva gatiṃ śreṣṭhāṃ devānāmanukīrtanāt |
prāpnuyāttrividhāṃ kṛṣṇa trilokākhyāṃ naraḥ sadā | | 18
kathitaṃ pāraṇaṃ yatte prathamaṃ godharādhanam |
ādhipatyaṃ tathā bhogāṃstataḥ prāpnoti mānuṣaḥ | | 19
dvitīyena tathā bhogāngopateḥ prāpnuyānnaraḥ |
sūryalokaṃ tṛtīyena pāraṇena tathāpnuyāt | | 1.104.20
evametatsamākhyātaṃ gatiprāpakamuttamam |
vidhānaṃ devāśārdūla yaduktaṃ saptamīvrate | | 21
yaḥ śvetāṃ saptamīṃ kuryātsugatiṃ śraddhayā naraḥ |
tathā bhaktyā ca vai nārī prāpnoti trividhāṃ gatim | | 262
eṣā dhanyā pāpaharā tithirnityamupāsitā |
ārādhanāya yasteṣāṃ yadā bhānordharādhara | | 23
paṭhatāṃ śṛṇvatāṃ cāpi sarvapāpabhayāpahā |
tathā dhanyā ca puṇyā ca trivargādīṣṭadā sadā | | 24.
iti śrībhaviṣye mahāpurāṇe brāhme parvaṇi saptamīkalpe trivargasaptamīvratanirūpaṇaṃ nāma
caturadhikaśatatamo.adhyāyaḥ | 104 |
atha pañcādhikaśatatamo.adhyāyaḥ
kāmadāsaptamīvratanirūpaṇam
brahmovāca
phālgunāmalapakṣasya saptamyāṃ kṣmādharāvyaya |
upoṣito naro nārī samabhyarcya tamo.apaham | | 1
sūryanāma japanbhaktyā mitabhoktā jitendriyaḥ |
uttiṣṭhanprasvapaṃścaiva sūryamevābhikīrtayet | | 2
tato.anyadivase prāpte tvaṣṭamyāṃ prayato ravim |
snātvā devaṃ samabhyarcya dadyādviprāya dakṣiṇām | | 3
ravimuddiśya vai cāgnau ghṛtahomakṛtakriyaḥ |
praṇipatya jagannāthamiti vāṇīmudīrayet | | 4
yamārādhya purā devī sāvitrī kāmanāya vai |
sa me dadātu deveśaḥ sarvānkāmānvibhāvasuḥ | | 5
samabhyarcya iti prāptānkṛtsnānkāmānyathepsitān |
sa dadātyakhilānkāmānprasanno me divaspatiḥ | | 6
bhraṣṭarājyaśca devendro yamabhyarcya divaspatiḥ |
kāmānsamprāptavānrājyaṃ sa me kāmaṃ prayacchatu | | 7
evamabhyarcya pūjāṃ ca niṣpādyeha vivasvataḥ |
bhuñjīta prayataḥ samyagghaviṣyaṃ patagadhvaja | | 8
phālgune caitravaiśākhajyeṣṭhe yasya samāpanam |
caturbhiḥ pāraṇaṃ māsairebhirniṣpāditaṃ bhavet | | 9
karavīraiścaturo māsānbhaktyā sampūjayedravim |
kṛṣṇāguruṃ daheddhūpaṃ prāśyaṃ gośṛṅgajaṃ jalam | | 1.105.10
naivedyaṃ khaṇḍaveṣṭāṃstu dadyādviprebhya eva ca |
tataśca śrūyatāmanyā hyāṣāḍhādiṣu yā kriyā || 11
jātīpuṣpāṇi śastāni dhūpo gauggula ucyate |
kūpodakaṃ samaśnīyānnaivedyaṃ pāyasaṃ matam | | 12
svayaṃ tadeva cāśnīyāccheṣaṃ pūrvavadācaret |
kārttikādiṣu māseṣu gomūtraṃ kāyaśodhanam | | 13
mahāṅgo dhūpa uddiṣṭaḥ pūjā raktotpalaistathā |
kāsāraṃ cātra naivedyaṃ nivedyaṃ bhāskarāya vai | | 14
pratimāsaṃ ca viprāya dātavyā dakṣiṇā tathā |
karpūraṃ candanaṃ mustāmagaruṃ tagaraṃ tathā | | 15
ūṣaṇaṃ śarkarā kṛṣṇa sugandhaṃ sihlakaṃ tathā |
mahāṅgo.ayaṃ smṛto dhūpaḥ priyo devasya sarvadā | | 16
prīṇanaṃ ceṣṭayā bhānoḥ pāraṇepāraṇe gate |
yathāśakti yathāyogaṃ vittaśāṭhyaṃ vivarjayet | | 17
sadbhāvenaiva saptāśvaḥ pūjitaḥ prīyate yataḥ |
pāraṇānte yathāśaktyā pūjitaḥ snāpito raviḥ | | 18
prīṇitaścepsitānkāmāndadyādavyāhataṃ hare |
eṣā puṇyā pāpaharā saptamī sarvakāmadā | | 19
yathābhilaṣitānkāmā~mllabhate garuḍadhvaja |
upoṣyaitāṃ tribhuvanaṃ prāptamindreṇa vai purā | | 1.105.20
putraṃ prāpacca sāvitrī putrāṃstu aditistathā |
yadavaḥ kāmanāṃ prāptā dhaumyo vedamavāptavān | | 21
tvayāptā bhārgavī kṛṣṇa śaṅkaraḥ śuddhimāptavān |
pitāmahatvaṃ prāpto.ahaṃ tatprasādājjanārdana | | 22
anyaiścādhigatāḥ kāmāstamārādhya na saṃśayaḥ |
brāhmaṇaiḥ kṣatriyairvaiśyaiḥ śūdrairyoṣidbhireva ca | | 23
yaṃ yaṃ kāmamabhidhyāyettaṃtaṃ prāpnotyupoṣaṇāt |
janaḥ prāpnotyasaṃdigdhaṃ bhānorārādhanādyataḥ | | 24
aputraḥ putramāpnoti rogataścāpi modate |
rogābhibhūta ārogyaṃ kanyā vindati satpatim | | 25
samāgatya pravasita upoṣyaitadavāpnuyāt |
sarvānkāmānavāpnoti gogataścāpi modate | | 26
nāputro nādhano vāpi na vāniṣṭo na nirghṛṇaḥ |
upoṣyaitadvrataṃ martyaḥ strījano vāpi jāyate | | 27
gohelilokamāsādya modate śāśvatīḥ samāḥ |
gaurikaṃ yānamārūḍhastejasā ravisannibhaḥ | | 28
punaretya mahīṃ kṛṣṇa ghanāghanasamo nṛpaḥ |
kṣmātale syānna saṃdehaḥ prasādādgopaternaraḥ | | 29
iti śrībhaviṣye mahāpurāṇe brāhme parvaṇi saptamīkalpe kāmadāsaptamīvratanirūpaṇaṃ
nāma pañcādhikaśatatamo.adhyāyaḥ | 105 |
atha ṣaḍadhikaśatatamo.adhyāyaḥ
pāpanāśinīvratavidhivarṇanam
brahmovāca
punaścaitanmahābhāga śrūyatāṃ gadato mama |
proktaṃ khagena devānāṃ tithimāhātmyamuttamam | | 1
viṣṇuruvāca
vijayātijayā caiva jayantī ca mahātithiḥ |
tvattaḥ śrutā suratheṣṭha brūhi me pāpanāśinīm | | 2
tathottarāyaṇaṃ brūhi śastaṃ yadbhāskarārcane |
yatra sampūjito bhānurbhavetsarvāghanāśanaḥ | |
tanme kathaya yatnena bhaktyā pṛṣṭo.akṣayaṃ phalam | | 3
brahmovāca
śuklapakṣe tu saptamyāṃ yadarkṣaṃ tu raverbhavet |
tadā syātsā mahāpuṇyā saptamī pāpanāśinī | |4
tasyāṃ sampūjya deveśaṃ citrabhānuṃ jagadgurum |
saptajanmakṛtātpāpānmucyate nātra saṃśayaḥ | | 5
yaścopavāsaṃ kurute tasyāṃ niyatamānasaḥ |
sarvapāpavimuktātmā sūryaloke mahīyate | | 6
dānaṃ yaddīyate kiñcittamuddiśya divākaram |
homo vā kriyate tatra tatsarvaṃ cākṣayaṃ bhavet | | 7
eka ṛgvedaḥ purato japtaḥ śraddhāpareṇa tu |
ṛgvedasya samastasya yacchate satphalaṃ dhruvam | | 8
sāmavedaphalaṃ sāma yajurvedaphalaṃ yajuḥ |
atharvā atharvāṃgiraso nikhilaṃ yacchate raviḥ | | 9
tārakā iva rājante dyotamānā divāniśam |
samabhyarcya ca saptamyāṃ devadevaṃ divākaram | | 1.106.10
yatra pāpamaśeṣaṃ vai nāśayatyatra bhāskaraḥ |
kartavyā saptamī kṛṣṇa tenoktā pāpanāśinī | | 11
asyāṃ samabhyarcya raviṃ yāti saurapuraṃ naraḥ |
vimānavaramāruhya karpūrodbhavamuttamam | | 12
tejasā kavisaṃkāśaḥ prabhayā sūryasannibhaḥ |
kāntyātreyasamaḥ kṛṣṇa śaurye harisamaḥ sadā | | 13
modate tatra suciraṃ vṛndārakagaṇaiḥ saha |
punaretya bhuvaṃ kṛṣṇa bhavedvai kṣmādhipādhipaḥ | | 14
iti śrībhaviṣye mahāpurāṇe brāhme parvaṇi saptamīkalpe pāpanāśinīvratavidhivarṇanaṃ
nāma ṣaḍadhikaśatatamo.adhyāyaḥ | 106 |
atha saptādhikaśatatamo.adhyāyaḥ
bhānupādadvayavratavarṇanam
brahmovāca
tathānyadapi dharmajña śṛṇuṣva gadato mama |
padadvayaṃ jagaddhāturdevadevasya gopateḥ | | 1
yadekapādapīṭhaṃ hi tatra nyastaṃ padadvayam |
svayamaṃśumatā kṛṣṇa lokānāṃ hitakāmyayā | | 2
vāmanasya padaṃ kṛṣṇa jñeyaṃ vai uttarāyaṇam |
devādyaiḥ sakalairvandyaṃ dakṣiṇaṃ dakṣiṇāyanam | | 3
ahaṃ tvaṃ ca sadā kṛṣṇa dakṣiṇaṃ pādamarcataḥ |
śraddhānvitau bhāskarasya harīśau vāmamarcataḥ | | 4
tasminyaḥ pratyahaṃ samyagdevadevasya mānavaḥ |
karotyārādhanaṃ tasya tuṣṭaḥ syādbhānumāntsadā | | 5
viṣṇuruvāca
kathamārādhanaṃ tasya devadevasya gopateḥ |
