kriyate devaśārdūla tatsamākhyātumarhasi | | 6
brahmovāca
uttare tvayane kṛṣṇa snāto niyatamānasaḥ |
ghṛtakṣīrādibhirdevaṃ snāpayettimirāpaham | | 7
cāruvastropahāraiśca puṣpadhūpānulepanaiḥ |
samabhyarcya tataḥ samyagbrāhmaṇānāṃ ca tarpaṇaiḥ | | 8
padadvayaṃ vrataṃ yasya gṛhṇīyādbhānutatparaḥ |
vandetsnātaścitrabhānuṃ tataśca garuḍadhvaja | | 9
bhuktvānnaṃ citrabhānuṃ tu citrabhānuṃ vrajaṃstathā |
svapanvibudhyanpraṇamanhomaṃ kurvaṃstathārcayan | | 1.107.10
citrabhānoranudinaṃ kariṣye nāmakīrtanam |
yāvadadya dinātprāptaṃ kramaśo dakṣiṇāyanam | | 11
calite huṃkṛte caiva vedārambhe.api vā sadā |
tāvadvakṣye citrabhānuṃ yāvadevottarāyaṇam | | 12
yāvajjīvaṃ ca yatkiñcijjānatojñānato.api vā |
kariṣye.ahaṃ tathā caiva kīrtayiṣyāmi taṃ prabhum | | 13
yadānṛtaṃ kiñcidvakṣye tadā vakṣyāmi tadvacaḥ |
ajñānādatha vā jñānātkīrtayiṣyāmi taṃ prabhum | | 14
ṣaṇmāsamekamanasā citrabhānumayaṃ param |
taṃ smaranmaraṇe yāti yāṃ gatiṃ sāstu me gatiḥ | | 15
ṣaṇmāsābhyantare mṛtyuryadi tasminbhavenmama |
tanmayā bhāskarasyeha svayamātmā niveditaḥ | | 16
paramātmamayaṃ brahma citrabhānumayaṃ param |
yamaṃ te saṃsmariṣyāmi sa me bhānuḥ parā gatiḥ | | 17
yadi prātastathā sāyaṃ madhyāhne vā japāmyaham |
ṣaṇmāsābhyantare nyāsaḥ kṛto vratamayo mayā | | 18
tathā kuru jagannātha svargalokaparāyaṇaḥ |
citrabhāno yathā śaktyā bhavānbhavati me gatiḥ | | 19
evamuccārya ṣaṇmāsaṃ citrabhānumayaṃ vratam |
tāvanniṣpādayedyāvatsampūrṇaṃ dakṣiṇāyanam | | 1.107.20
tataśca prīṇanaṃ kuryādyathāśaktyā vibhāvasoḥ |
bhojayedbrāhmaṇāndivyānbhaumāṃścāpi sadakṣiṇān | | 21
puṇyākhyānakathāṃ kuryānmārtaṃḍasya tathāgrataḥ |
pūjayedvācakaṃ bhaktyā yathāśaktyā ca lekhakam | | 22
evaṃ vratamidaṃ kṛṣṇa yo dhārayati mānavaḥ |
ihaiva devaśārdūla mucyate sarvakilbiṣaiḥ | | 23
ṣaṇmāsābhyantare cāsya maraṇaṃ yadi jāyate |
prāpnotyanaśanasyoktaṃ yatphalaṃ tadasaṃśayam | | 24
padadvayaṃ ca devasya samyaktvena sadārcitam |
bhavatyetajjagau bhānuḥ purā candrāya pṛcchate | | 25
iti śrībhaviṣye mahāpurāṇe brāhme parvaṇi saptamīkalpe bhānupādadvayavratavarṇanaṃ
nāma saptādhikaśatatamo.adhyāyaḥ | 107 |
athāṣṭādhikaśatatamo.adhyāyaḥ
sarvārthāvāptisaptamīvarṇanam
brahmovāca
kṛṣṇapakṣe tu māghasya sarvāptiṃ saptamīṃ śṛṇu |
yāmupoṣya samāpnoti sarvānkāmāṃstathā parān | | 1
pākhaṇḍādibhirālāpaṃ na kuryādbhānutatparaḥ |
pūjayetpraṇato devamekāgramanasā śubham | | 2
māghādyaiḥ pāraṇaṃ māsaiḥ ṣaḍbhiḥ sāṃkrāntikaṃ smṛtam |
mārtaṇḍaḥ prathamaṃ nāma dvitīyaṃ kaḥ prakīrtitam | | 3
tṛtīyaṃ citrabhānuśca vibhāvasurataḥ param |
bhageti pañcamaṃ jñeyaṃ ṣaṣṭhaṃ haṃsaḥ sa ucyate | |4
pūrṇeṣu ṣaṭsu māseṣu pañcagavyamudāhṛtam |
snāne ca prāśane caiva praśastaṃ pāpanāśanam | | 5
praṇāmaṃ devadevasya kṛtvā pūjāṃ yathāvidhi |
viprāya dakṣiṇāṃ dadyācchraddadhānaśca śaktitaḥ | | 6
pāraṇānte ca devasya prīṇanaṃ bhaktipūrvakam |
kurvīta bhaktyā vidhivadravibhaktyā tu gṛhyate | | 7
naktabhojī tathā viṣṇo tailakṣāravivarjitaḥ |
kṛṣṇa jāgaraṇaṃ rātrau saptamyāmatha vā dine | | 8
etāmuṣityā dharmajño haṃsaprīṇanatatparaḥ |
sarvānkāmānavāpnoti sarvapāpaiḥ pramucyate | | 9
yataḥ sarvamavāpnoti yadyadicchati cetasā |
ato lokeṣu vikhyātā sarvārthāvāptisaptamī | | 1.108.10
kṛtābhilaṣitā hyeṣā prārabdhā dharmatatparaiḥ |
pūrayatyakhilānkāmānsaṃśrutā ca dinedine | | 11
tamārādhayasva raviṃ tathātha garuḍadhvaja |
yathārādhitavānbhānuṃ bhagaṇādhipatiḥ purā | | 12
iti śrībhaviṣye mahāpurāṇe brāhme parvaṇi saptamī kalpe sarvārthāvāptisaptamīvarṇanam
nāmāṣṭādhikaśatatamo.adhyāyaḥ | 108 |

atha navādhikaśatatamo.adhyāyaḥ
mārtaṇḍasaptamīvarṇanam
brahmovāca
mārtaṇḍasaptamīṃ kṛṣṇa yathānyāṃ vacci te.anagha |
śṛṇuṣvaikamanā vīra gadato me śubhapradām | | 1
yasyāḥ samyaganuṣṭhānātprāpnotyabhimataṃ phalam |
pauṣe māse site pakṣe saptamyāṃ samupoṣitaḥ | | 2
samyaksampūjya mārtaṇḍaṃ mārtaṇḍa iti vai japet |
pūjayetkutapaṃ bhaktyā śraddhayā parayānvitaḥ | | 3
dhūpapuṣpopaharādyairupavāsaiḥ samāhitaḥ |
mārtaṇḍeti japannāma punastadgatamānasaḥ | | 4
viprāya dakṣiṇāṃ dadyādyathāśaktyā khagadhvaja |
svapanvibodhanskhalito mārtaṇḍeti ca kīrtayet | | 5
pāṣaṇḍādivikarmasthairālāpaṃ ca vivarjayet |
gomūtraṃ gopayo vāpi dadhi kṣīramathāpi vā | | 6
godehataḥ samudbhūtaṃ prāśnīyādātmaśuddhaye |
dvitīye.ahni punaḥ snātastathaivābhyarcanaṃ raveḥ | | 7
tenaiva nāmnā sambhūya dattvā viprāya dakṣiṇām |
tato bhuñjīta godohasambhūtena samanvitam | | 8
evamevākhilānmāsānupoṣya prayataḥ śuciḥ |
dadyādgavādikaṃ viprānpratimāsaṃ svaśaktitaḥ | | 9
dhāritā cetpunarvarṣe yathāśaktyā gavādikam |
dattvā paraṃ raverbhūyaḥ śṛṇu yatphalamaśnute | | 1.109.10
svarṇaśṛṃgīṃ ca pañcamyāṃ ṣaṣṭhyāṃ ca vṛṣabhaṃ naraḥ |
pratimāsaṃ dvijātibhyo yaddattvā phalamaśnute | | 11
tatprāpnotyakhilaṃ samyagvratametadupoṣitaḥ |
taṃ ca lokamavāpnoti mārtaṇḍo yatra tiṣṭhati | | 12
śāṇḍeleyasamaḥ kṛṣṇa tejasā nātra saṃśayaḥ |
mārtaṇḍasaptamīmetāmupoṣyaite gaṇā divi | | 13
vidyotamānā dṛśyante lokairadyāpi bhūdhara |
tasmāttvamādideveśaṃ graheśaṃ bhāskaraṃ ravim | |
anayārcaya govinda gopatiṃ golasannibham | | 14
iti śrībhaviṣye mahāpurāṇe brāhme parvaṇi saptamīkalpe mārtaṇḍasaptamīvarṇanam
nāma navādhikaśatatamo.adhyāyaḥ | 109 |
atha daśādhikaśatatamo.adhyāyaḥ
saptamīkalpe .anantarasaptamīvratavarṇanam
brahmovāca
śuklapakṣe tu saptamyāṃ māsi bhādrapade.acyuta |
praṇamya śirasādityaṃ pūjayetsaptavāhanam | | 1
puṣpadhūpādibhirvīra kutapānāṃ ca tarpaṇaiḥ |
pāṣaṇḍādibhirālāpamakurvanniyatātmavān | | 2
viprāya dakṣiṇāṃ dattvā naktaṃ bhuñjīta vāgyataḥ |
tiṣṭhanvrajanprasthitaśca kṣutapraskhalitādiṣu | | 3
ādityanāmasmaraṇaṃ kurvannuccāraṇaṃ tathā |
anenaiva vidhānena māsāndvādaśa vai kramāt | | 4
upoṣya pāraṇe pūrṇe samabhyarcya jagadgurum |
puṇyena śrāvaṇeneha prīṇayanpuṣṭimaśnute | | 5
anantaṃ śrāvaṇeneha yataḥ phalamudāhṛtam |
tenādityaṃ samabhyarcya tadeva labhate phalam | | 6
evaṃ yaḥ puruṣaḥ kuryādādityārādhanaṃ śuciḥ |
prāpyeha vipulaṃ bhogaṃ dharmamarthaṃ tathāvyayam | | 7
amutra lokamāyāti divye khe gītasaṃyute |
nārī vā svargamabhyetya hyanantaṃ phalamaśnute | | 8
iti śrībhaviṣye mahāpurāṇe brāhme parvaṇi saptakalpe.anantarasaptamīvratavarṇanam
nāma daśādhikaśatatamo.adhyāyaḥ | 110 |
athaikādaśādhikaśatatamo.adhyāyaḥ
saptamīkalpe.abhyaṅgasaptamīvarṇanam
brahmovāca
śrāvaṇe māsi devāgryaṃ saptamyāṃ saptavāhanam |
śuklapakṣe samabhyarcya puṣpadhūpādibhiḥ śuciḥ | | 1
pākhaṇḍādibhirālāpamakurvanniyatātmavān |
viprāya dakṣiṇāṃ dattvā naktaṃ bhuñjīta vāgyataḥ | | 2
abhyaṅgaṃ devadevasya varṣe varṣe niyojayet |
saptamyāmannamevāgryaṃ śubhaṃ śuklaṃ navaṃ tathā | | 3
vibhaveṣu tathānyeṣu vāditrāṇyeva vai viduḥ |
tathā devasya māse.asminnabhyaṅgaḥ parigīyate | |4
yastu cārādhayedbhaktyā bhāskarasya naro.acyuta |
abhyaṅgaṃ vidhivacchaktyā kṛtvā brāhmaṇabhojanam | | 5
śaṅkhatūryaninādaiśca brahmaghoṣaiśca puṣkalaiḥ |
sa divyaṃ yānamārūḍho lokamāyāti helinaḥ | | 6
anenaiva vidhānena māsāndvādaśa vai kramāt |
upoṣya pāraṇe pūrṇe dadyādviprāya dakṣiṇām | | 7
vrataṃ yaḥ puruṣaḥ kuryādādityārādhanaṃ śuciḥ |
sa gacchetparamaṃ lokaṃ divyaṃ vai vanamālinaḥ | | 8
iti śrībhaviṣye mahāpurāṇe brāhme parvaṇi saptamīkalpe.abhyaṅgasaptamīvarṇanam
nāmaikādaśādhikaśatatamo.adhyāyaḥ | 111 |
atha dvādaśādhikaśatatamo.adhyāyaḥ
tṛtīyapadavratavarṇanam
brahmovāca
evaṃ kṛṣṇa sadā bhānurnarairbhaktyā yathāvidhi |
phalaṃ dadātyasulabhaṃ salilenāpi pūjitaḥ | | 1
na bhānurjīvadānena na puṣpairna phalaistathā |
ārādhyate suyuddhena hṛdayenaiva kevalam | | 2
rāgādapetaṃ hṛdayaṃ vāgduṣṭā nānṛtādibhiḥ |
hiṃsāvirahitaṃ karma bhāskarārādhanatrayam | | 3
rāgādidūṣite citte nāspandī timirāpahaḥ |
badhnāti taṃ naraṃ haṃsaḥ kadācitkardamāmbhasi | | 4
tamaso nāśanāyālaṃ cendorlekhā hyanāratam |
hiṃsādidūṣitaṃ karma keśavārādhane kutaḥ | | 5
janaścittāprasādādvai na cāpa timirāpaham |
tasmātsatyasvabhāvena satyavākyena cācyuta | | 6
ahiṃsakena cādityo nisagadeva toṣitaḥ |
sarvasvamapi devāya yo dadyātkuṭilāśayaḥ | | 7
sa naivārādhayedevaṃ devadevaṃ divākaram |
rāgādapetaṃ hadayaṃ kuru tvaṃ bhāskarārpaṇam | |
tataḥ prāpayasi duṣprāpyamayatnenaiva bhāskaram | | 8
viṣṇuruvāca
deveśaḥ kathitaḥ samyalkāmyo.ayaṃ bhāskaro mayi |
ārādhanavidhiṃ sarvaṃ bhūyaḥ pṛcchāmi taṃ vada | | 9
kule janma tathārogyaṃ dhanavṛddhiśca durlabhā |
tritayaṃ prāpyate yena tanme vada jagatpate | | 1.112.10
brahmovāca
māse tu māghe sitasaptame.ahni hastarkṣayoge jagataḥ prasūtim |
sampūjya bhānuṃ vidhinopavāsī sugandhadhūpānnavaropahāraiḥ | | 11
gṛhī tu puṣpaiḥ pratipādya pūjāṃ dānādiyuktaṃ vratamabdamekam |
dadyācca dānaṃ munipuṅgaḥvebhyastatkathyamānaṃ vinibodha dhīra | | 12
vajraṃ tilānvrīhiyavānhiraṇyaṃ yavānnamambhaḥ karakāmupānaham |
chatropapannaṃ guḍapheṇitāḍhyaṃ dadyātkramādvastu anukrameṇa | | 13
yadyeṣa varṣe vidhinoditena yasyāṃ tithau lokaguruṃ prapūjya |
aśmantanānyātmaviśuddhihetoḥ samprāśanānīha nibodha tāni | | 14
gomūtramambhaśca rase nu śākaṃ dūrvā dadhivrīhitilānyavāṃśca |
sūryāṃśutaptaṃ jalamambujākṣa kṣīraṃ ca māsaiḥ kramaśaḥ prayujyaḥ | | 15
kule pradhāne dhanadhānyapūrṇe padmāvṛte hyastasamastaduḥkhe |
prāpnoti janmā.avikalendriyaśca bhavatyarogo matimānsukhī ca | | 16
tasmāttvamapyetadamoghavīrya divākarārādhanamapramattaḥ |
kuru prabhāvaṃ bhagavantamīśamārādhya kāmānakhilānupehi | | 17
iti śrībhaviṣye mahāpurāṇe brāhme parvaṇi saptamīkalpe tṛtīyapadavratavarṇanaṃ
nāma dvādaśādhikaśatatamo.adhyāyaḥ | 112 |
atha trayodaśādhikaśatatamo.adhyāyaḥ
ādityālayavandanamārjanādivarṇanam
viṣṇuruvāca
surajyeṣṭha punarbrūhi yatpṛcchāmyahamāditaḥ |
yatphalaṃ samavāpnoti kārayitvā ravergṛham | | 1
devārcāṃ kārayitvā tu yatpuṇyaṃ puruṣo.aśnute |
pūjayitvā ca vidhivadanulipya ca yatphalam | | 2
kāni mālyāni śastāni kāni nārhati bhāskaraḥ |
ke dhūpā bhānudayitāḥ ke varjyāśca jagatpateḥ | | 3
upacāraphalaṃ kiṃ syātkiṃ phalaṃ gītavādite |
ghṛtakṣīrādinā yattu snāpite bhāskare phalam | | 4
yathopalepanādau ca phalamabhyukṣitena tu |
divākaragṛhe tāta tadaśeṣaṃ vadasva me | | 5
brahmovāca
sādhu vatsa yadetattvaṃ mārtaṇḍasyeha pṛcchasi |
śuśrūṣaṇe vidhiṃ puṇyaṃ tadihaikamanāḥ śṛṇu | | 6
yastu devālayaṃ bhānordārvaṃ śailamathāpi vā |
kārayenmṛnmayaṃ cāpi tasya puṇyaphalaṃ śṛṇu | | 7
ahanyahani yajñena yajato yanmahatphalam |
prāpnoti tatphalaṃ bhānoryaḥ kārayati mandiram | | 8
kulānāṃ śatamāgāmi samatītaṃ kulaṃ śatam |
kārayedbhagavaddhāma sa nayedarkalokatām | | 9
saptajanmakṛtaṃ pāpaṃ svalpaṃ vā yadi vā bahu |
bhānorālayavinyāsaprārambhādeva naśyati | | 1.113.10
saptalokamayo bhānustasya yaḥ kurute gṛham |
pratiṣṭhāṃ samavāpnoti sa naraḥ sāptalaukikīm | | 11
praśastadeśabhūbhāge praśastaṃ bhavanaṃ raveḥ |
kārayedakṣayā~mllokānsa naraḥ pratipadyate | | 12
iṣṭakācayavinyāso yāvadvarṣāṇi tiṣṭhati |
tāvadvarṣasahasrāṇi tatkarturdivi saṃsthitiḥ | | 13
pratimāṃ lakṣaṇavatīṃ yaḥ kārayati mānavaḥ |
divākarasya tallokamakṣayaṃ pratipadyate | | 14
ṣaṣṭirvarṣasahasrāṇāṃ sahasrāṇi sa modate |
loke sumanasāṃ vīra pratyekaṃ madhusūdana | | 15
pratiṣṭhāpya raverarcāṃ supraśaste niveśane |
puruṣaḥ kṛtakṛtyo.asti na doṣaphalamaśnute | | 16
ye bhaviṣyanti ye.atītā ākalpaṃ puruṣāḥ kule |
tāṃstārayati saṃsthāpya devasya pratimāṃ raveḥ | | 17
anuśiṣṭāḥ kila purā yamena yamakiṅkarāḥ |
pāśadaṇḍakarāḥ kṛṣṇa prajāsaṃyamanodyatāḥ | | 18
yama uvāca
viharantu yathānyāyaṃ niyogo me.anupālyatām |
nājñābhaṅgaṃ kariṣyanti bhavatāṃ jantavaḥ kvacit | | 19
kevalaṃ ye jaganmūlaṃ vivasvantamupāśritāḥ |
bhavadbhiḥ parihartavyāsteṣāṃ naiveha saṃsthitiḥ | | 1.113.20
ye tu vaivasvatā loke taccittāstatparāyaṇāḥ |
pūjayanti sadā bhānuṃ te ca tyājyā sudūrataḥ | | 21
tiṣṭhaṃśca prasvapangacchannuttiṣṭhanskhalite kṣute |
saṅkīrtayati devaṃ yaḥ sa nastyājyaḥ sudūrataḥ | | 22
nityanaimittikairdevaṃ ye yajanti tu bhāskaram |
na cālokyā bhavadbhiste yaddhyānaṃ haṃti vo gatim | | 23
ye puṣpadhūpavāso.abhirbhūṣaṇaiścāpi vallabhaiḥ |
arcayanti na te grāhyā matpituste parigrahāḥ | | 24
upalepanakartāraḥ kartāro mārjanasya ye |
arkālaye parityājyaṃ teṣāṃ tripuruṣaṃ kulam | | 25
ye vāyatanaṃ bhānoḥ kāritaṃ tatkulodbhavaḥ |
pumānna nāvalokyo vai bhavadbhirduṣṭacakṣuṣā | | 26
yenārcā bhagavadbhaktyā matpituḥ kāritā śubhā |
narāṇāṃ tatkulaṃ vīrāḥ sadā tyājyaṃ sudūrataḥ | | 27
bhavatāṃ bhramatāṃ yatra bhānusaṃśrayamudrayā |
na cājñābhaṅgakṛtkaścidbhaviṣyati naraḥ kvacit | | 28
ityuktāḥ kiṅkarāstena yamena sumahātmanā |
anāśritya vacaḥ kṛṣṇaḥ satrājitamatho gatāḥ | | 29
tasya te tejasā sarve bhānorbhaktasya suvrata |
mohitāḥ patitā bhūmau yathā ca vihagā nagāt | | 1.113.30
etāṃ mahāphalāṃ yorcāṃ bhānoḥ kārayate naraḥ |
tavākhyānaṃ mahābāho gṛhaṃ kārayituśca yat | | 31
yajñā narāṇāṃ pāpaughanāśakāḥ sarvakāmadāḥ |
tathaiveṣṭo jagadbhānuḥ sarvayajñamayo raviḥ | | 32
iti śrībhaviṣye mahāpurāṇe brāhme parvaṇi saptamīkalpe ādityālayavandanamārjanādivarṇanaṃ nāma trayodaśādhikaśatatamo.adhyāyaḥ | 113 |
atha caturdaśādhikaśatatamo.adhyāyaḥ
ādityasnāpanayogavarṇanam
brahmovāca
sthāpitāṃ pratimāṃ bhānoḥ samyaksampūjya mānavaḥ |
yaṃ yaṃ prārthayate kāmaṃ taṃ taṃ prāpnotyasaṃśayam | | 1
yaḥ snāpayati devasya ghṛtena pratimāṃ raveḥ |
prastheprasthe dvijāgryāṇāṃ sa dadāti gavāṃ śatam | | 2
gavāṃ śatasya viprebhyo yadvattasya bhavetphalam |
ghṛtaprasthena tadbhānorbhavetsnātakayoginām | | 3
bhūridyumnena samprāptā saptadvīpā vasundharā |
ghaṭodakena mārtaṇḍapratimā snāpitā kila | |4
pratimāmasitāṣṭamyāṃ ghṛtena jagatīpateḥ |
snāpayitvā samastebhyaḥ pāpebhyaḥ kṛṣṇa mucyate | | 5
saptamyāmatha ṣaṣṭhyāṃ vā gavyena haviṣā raveḥ |
snapanaṃ tu bhavecchreṣṭhaṃ mahāpātakanāśanam | | 6
jñānato.ajñānato vāpi yatpāpaṃ kurute naraḥ |
tatkṣālayati sandhyāyāṃ ghṛtena snapanaṃ raveḥ | | 7
sarvayajñamayo bhānurhavyānāṃ paramaṃ ghṛtam |
tayoraśeṣapāpānāṃ kṣālakaḥ saṅgamo bhavet | | 8
yeṣu kṣīravahā nadyo hradāḥ pāyasakardamāḥ |
modate teṣu lokeṣu kṣīrasnānakaro raveḥ | | 9
āhlādaṃ nirvṛtisthānamārogyaṃ cārurūpatām |
saptajanmānyavāpnoti kṣīravānaparo raveḥ | | 1.114.10
dadhyādīnāṃ vikārāṇāṃ kṣīrataḥ sambhavo yathā |
yathā ca vimalaṃ kṣīraṃ yathā nirvṛtikārakam | |
tathā ca nirmalaṃ jñānaṃ bhavatyapi na saṃśayaḥ | | 11
grahānukūlatāṃ puṣṭiṃ priyatyamakhile jane |
karoti bhagavānbhānuḥ kṣīrasnapanatoṣitaḥ | | 12
sarvasya snigdhatāmeti dṛṣṭamātre prasīdati |
ghṛtakṣīreṇa deveśa snāpite timirāpahe | | 13
iti śrībhaviṣye mahāpurāṇe brāhme parvaṇi saptamīkalpe ādityasnāpanayogavarṇanaṃ
nāma caturdaśādhikaśatatamo.adhyāyaḥ | 114 |
atha pañcadaśādhikaśatatamo.adhyāyaḥ
sūryapūjāvidhivarṇanam
brahmovāca
praśaṃsanti mahātmānaḥ saṃvādaṃ bhāskarāśrayam |
gautamyā saha kauśalyā sumanāyāṃ surālaye | | 1
svarge.atiśobhanāṃ dṛṣṭvā kauśalyāṃ patinā saha |
brāhmaṇī gautamī nāma paryapṛcchata vismitā | | 2
gautamyuvāca
śataśaḥ santi kauśalye devāḥ svarganivāsinaḥ |
devapatnyastathaivaitāḥ siddhāḥ siddhāṅganāstathā | | 3
na teṣāmīdṛśo gandho na kāntirna surūpatā |
na vāsasī śobhane ye yathā te patinā saha | | 4
naivābharaṇajātāni teṣāṃ bhrājanti vai tathā |
yathā tava yathā patyurna ca svarganivāsinām | | 5
susnātacailataścaiva yuvayoratiricyate |
lekhādyānāmapīśānāṃ kṣayātiśayavarjitaḥ | | 6
tapaḥprabhāvo dānaṃ vā homo vā karmasaṃjñitaḥ |
yuvayoryatsamācakṣva tatsarvaṃ varavarṇini | |
yena me vikrame buddhirmanujā yena saṅgatāḥ | | 7
kauśalyovāca
yajño yajñeśvaro bhānurāvābhyāṃ jātu toṣitaḥ |
svargaprāptiriyaṃ tasya karmaṇaḥ phalamuttamam | | 8
surūpatā tataḥ prītiḥ paśyatāṃ cāruveṣitā |
yatpṛcchasi mahābhāge tadapyeṣāṃ vadāmi te | | 9
tīrthodakaistathā gandhaiḥ snāpito yaddivākaraḥ |
tena kāntiriyaṃ nityaṃ devāṃstribhuvaneśvarān | | 1.115.10
manaḥprasādaḥ saumyatvaṃ śarīre ye ca nirvṛtāḥ |
yatpriyatvaṃ ca sarvaṃ syāttadghṛtasnapanātphalam | | 11
yānyabhīṣṭāni vāsāṃsi yaccābhīṣṭavibhūṣaṇam |
ratnāni yānyabhīṣṭāni yatpriyaṃ cānulepanam | | 12
ye dhṛtā yāni mālyāni dayitānyabhavansadā |
mama bhartustadaivāsya tadā rājyaṃ praśāsataḥ | | 13
tāni sarvāṇi sarvajña sarvapātari bhānuni |
dattāni taṃ samuttho.ayaṃ gandhadhūpātmako guṇaḥ | | 14
āhārā dayitā ye ca pavitrāśca niveditāḥ |
trilokakartuḥ savitustṛptistadguṇasambhavā | | 15
svargakāmena me bhartrā mayā ca śubhadarśane |
kṛtametatkṛtenābhūdāvayorbhavasaṃkṣayaḥ | | 16
ye tvakāmā narāḥ samyaktatkurvanti ca śobhane |
teṣāṃ dadāti viśveśo bhagavānmuktimīśvaraḥ | | 17
brahmovāca
evamabhyarcya mārtaṇḍamarkaṃ deveśvaraṃ gurum |
prāpto.asmyabhimatānkāmānkṛṣṇāhaṃ śāśvatīḥ samāḥ | | 18
candanāgurukarpūrakuṅkumośīrapadmakaiḥ |
anulipto narairbhaktyā dadāti sāgarodbhavām | | 19
kāleyakaṃ turuṣkaṃ ca raktacandanameva ca |
yānyātmani sadeṣṭāni tāni śasyānyapākuru | | 1.115.20
gandhāścāpi śubhā ye ca dhūpā ye vijayodayāḥ |
divākarasya dharmajña nivedyāssarvadācyuta | | 21
na dadyātsallakīkṣāraṃ no mukhena ca saṃhṛtam |
dadyādarkāya dharmajña dhūpamārādhanodyataḥ | | 22
mālatī mallikā caiva yūthikā cātimuktikaḥ |
pāṭalāḥ karavīraśca japā sevantireva ca | | 23
kuṅkumastagaraścaiva karṇikāraḥ sakeśaraḥ |
campakaḥ ketaka kundo bāṇabarbaramālikā | | 24
aśokastilako lodhrastathā caivāṭarūṣakaḥ |
śatapatrāṇi dhanyāni bakāhvānī viśeṣataḥ | | 25
agastiṃ kiṃśukaṃ tadvatpūjārthaṃ bhāskarasya tu |
amī puṣpaprakārāstu śastā bhāskarapūjane | | 26
bilvapatraṃ śamīpatraṃ patraṃ vā bhṛṅgarasya ca |
tamālapatraṃ ca hare sadaiva bhagavatpriyam | | 27
tulasī kālatulasī tathā raktaṃ ca candanam |
ketakī patrapuṣpaṃ tu sadyastuṣṭikaraṃ raveḥ | | 28
padmotpalasamutthāni raktaṃ nīlotpalaṃ tathā |
sitotpalaṃ tu bhānostu dayitāni sadācyuta | | 29
kṛṣṇalokanmattakaṃ kāntaṃ tathaiva girimallikā |
na karṇikārikāpuṣpaṃ bhāskarāya nivedayet | | 1.115.30
kuṭajaṃ śālmalīpuṣpaṃ tathānyadgandhavarjitam |
niveditaṃ bhayaṃ rogaṃ niḥsvatāṃ ca prayacchati | | 31
yeṣāṃ na pratiṣedho.asti gandhavarṇānvitāni ca |
tāni puṣpāṇi deyāni mānave lokabhānave | | 32
sugandhaiśca murāmāṃsīkarpūrāgarucandanaiḥ |
tathānyaiśca śubhairdravyairarcayedvanamālinam | | 33
dukūlapaṭṭakauśeyavārkṣakārpāsakādibhiḥ |
vāsobhiḥ pūjayedbhānuṃ yāni cātmapriyāṇi tu | | 34
bhakṣyāṇi yānyabhīṣṭāni bhojyānyabhimatāni ca |
phalaṃ ca vallabhaṃ yatsyāttatte deyaṃ divākare | | 35
suvarṇamaṇimuktāni rajataṃ ca tathācyuta |
dakṣiṇā vividhā ceha yaccānyadapi vallabham | | 36
ātmānaṃ bhāskaraṃ matvā yajñaṃ tasmai nivedayet |
tattadavyaktarūpāya bhāskarāya nivedayet | | 37
iti śrībhaviṣye mahāpurāṇe brāhme parvaṇi saptamīkalpe ādityamāhātmye sūryapūjāvidhivarṇanaṃ
nāma pañcadaśādhikaśatatamo.adhyāyaḥ | 115 |
atha ṣoḍaśādhikaśatatamo.adhyāyaḥ
ravipūjāvidhivarṇanam
brahmovāca
kṛṣṇa rājā mahānāsīdyayātikulasambhavaḥ |
satrājiditi vikhyātaścakravartī mahābalaḥ | | 1
prabhāvaistejasā kāntyā kṣāntyā balasamanvitaḥ |
dhairyagambhīryasampanno vadānyo yaśasānvitaḥ | | 2
buddhyā vikramadakṣaśca sampanno brāhmaṇāyataḥ |
kṛtī kavistathā śūraḥ ṣaṭpadākhyairna nirjitaḥ | | 3
sadā pañcasu raktaśca vasumadbhirna nirjitaḥ |
rudratā vasubhirjātaiḥ sattvaśraddhāsamanvitaḥ | | 4
ambujasyāṇḍajasyeva ātreyasya tathācyuta |
ambujāyāstathā kṛṣṇa vāryapātraṃ sa vai vibho | | 5
gāṅgeyena bale tulyaḥ paulastyārcāśramo yathā |
gāṅgeyasya tathā kṛṣṇa dhiṣaṇasya hareryathā | | 6
kāmyaśca dvijabhaktastu tathā vālmīkivatsadā |
vyāsasya devaśārdūla jāmadagnyasya vā vibhoḥ | | 7
eṣāṃ naikairguṇairyuktaḥ sa rājā kṣmātale vibho |
śaśāsa sa mahābāhuḥ saptadvīpāṃ vasundharām | | 8
yasmingāthāṃ pragāyanti ye purāṇavido janāḥ |
satrājite mahābāhau kṛṣṇa dhātrīṃ samāśrite | | 9
yāvatsūrya udeti sma yāvacca pratitiṣṭhati |
satrājitaṃ tu tatsarvaṃ kṣetramityamidhīyate | | 1.116.10
sa sarvaratnasaṃyuktāṃ saptadvīpavatīṃ mahīm |
śaśāsa dharmeṇa purā cakravartī mahābalaḥ | | 11
nānyāyakṛnna cāśakto vadānyo balavattaraḥ |
tasyābhūtpuruṣā rājñaḥ samyagdharmānuśāsinaḥ | | 12
catvāraḥ sacivāstasya rājñaḥ satrājitasya tu |
babhūburapratihatāḥ sadā vāti balasya vai | | 13
tasya bhaktiratīvāsīnnisargādeva bhūpateḥ |
divākare jagadbhānau raktacandanamālini | | 14
tasyordhvamahimānaṃ ca vilokya pṛthivīpateḥ |
na kevalaṃ janasyāpi hyabhavattasya vismayaḥ | | 15
sañcintayāmāsa nṛpaḥ samṛddhyā vismitastathā |
kathaṃ syāt sampadeṣā me punarapyanyajanmani | | 16
evaṃ sa bahuśo rājā tadā kṛṣṇa mahāyaśāḥ |
cintayannapi tanmūlaṃ nāsadanniścayānvitaḥ | | 17
yadā na niścayaṃ rājā sa yayau bhārgavīpriyaḥ |
tadā papraccha dharmajñānsa viprānsamupāgatān | | 18
sarvāśca sasukhānvīra viviktāntaḥ purasthitaḥ |
praṇipatya mahābāhurgrahītuṃ śāsanakriyāḥ | | 19
viśvāsānugrahā buddhirbhavatāṃ mayi sattamāḥ |
tadahaṃ praṣṭumicchāmi kiñcittadvaktumarhatha | | 1.116.20
sadvidyākhilavijñānasamyagdhautāntarātmabhiḥ |
bhavadbhiryadyanugrāhyaḥ syāmahaṃ vedavittamāḥ | | 21
tadyathāvanmayā pṛṣṭā bhavanto matprasādinaḥ |
vaktumarhatha vidvāṃsaḥ sarvasyaivopakāriṇaḥ | | 22
brahmovāca
yaste manasi sandehastaṃ pṛcchādya mahīpate |
vadiṣyāmo yathānyāyaṃ yatte manasi varttate | | 23
vayaṃ hi nṛpaśārdūla bhavatā pāritoṣitāḥ |
samyakprajāṃ pālayitrā dadatā bhojanaṃ sadā | | 24
santuṣṭo brāhmaṇo.aśnīyācchiṃdyādvā dharmasaṃśayam |
hitaṃ copadiśedvartma ahitādvā nivartayet | | 25
vivakṣumatha bhūpālaṃ bhāryā tasyaiva dhīmataḥ |
praṇipātena cāhedaṃ vinayātpraṇayānvitam | | 26
na strīṇāmavanīpāla vaktumīdṛgiheṣyate |
tathāpi bhūpate vakṣye sampadīdṛksudurlabhā | | 27
bhūyo.api saṃśayānpraṣṭumalamīśo bhavānṛṣīn |
nanvahaṃ puraṣavyāghra sadāntaḥ puracāriṇī | | 28
tatprasādaṃ yadi bhavānkaroti mama pārthiva |
tanmadīyamṛṣīnpraṣṭuṃ sandehaṃ pārthivārhasi | | 29
satrājita uvāca
brūhi subhrūrmataṃ yatte praṣṭavyā yanmayā dvijāḥ |
bhūyo.ahamātmasandehaṃ prakṣyāmyetaddvijottamān | | 1.116.30
vimalavatyuvāca
śrūyante pṛthivīpāla nṛpā ye tu cirantanāḥ |
yeṣāṃ ca sampadbhūpāla yathā te.adya kilābhavat | | 31
tadīdṛksampado dhāma tavāśeṣaṃ kṣitīśvara |
yena karmavipākena tadvadantu maharṣayaḥ | | 32
ahaṃ ca bhavato bhāryā sarvasīmantinīvarā |
atīva karmaṇā yena tadvijñāne kutūhalam | | 33
tathā sampatsamṛddhatvamanyeṣvapi hi vidyate |
nirastātiśayatvena nūnaṃ nālpena karmaṇā | | 34
tadanyajanmacaritaṃ naranātha nijaṃ bhavān |
munīnpṛccha tvayā cāhaṃ yanmayā ca purā kṛtam | | 35
brahmovāca
sa tathoktastayā rājā patnyā vismitamānasaḥ |
munīnāṃ purato māyāṃ praśaṃsanvākyamabravīt | | 36
sādhu devi mataṃ yanme tvayā yadidamīritam |
satyaṃ munivacaḥ puṃsāṃ syāddha vai gṛhiṇī tathā | | 37
so.ahametanmahābhāge pṛcchāmyetānmahāmunīn |
teṣāmaviditaṃ kiñcittriṣu lokeṣu na vidyate | | 38
evamuktvā priyāṃ rājā praṇipatya ca tānṛṣīn |
yathāvadetadakhilaṃ papraccha dharaṇīdharaḥ | | 39
rājovāca
bhagavanto mamāśeṣaṃ prasādāvṛtacetasaḥ |
kathayantu yathāvṛttaṃ yanmayā sukṛtaṃ kṛtam | |1.116.4 0
ko.ahamāsaṃ purā viprāḥ kiṃsvitkarma mayā kṛtam |
kiṃ vānayā tu cārvaṃgyā mama patnyā kṛtaṃ dvijāḥ | |4 1
yenāvayoriyaṃ lakṣmīrmartyaloke sudurlabhā |
catvāraścāpratihatā amātyā mama gacchataḥ | |4 2
aśeṣā bhūbhṛto vaśyā dhanasyānto na vidyate |
balaṃ caivāpratihataṃ śarīrārogyameva ca | |4 3
pratibhāti ca me kāntyā bhāryāyāmakhilaṃ jagat |
mamāpi vapuṣastejo na kaścitsahate dvijāḥ |44
so.ahamicchāmi tajjñātuṃ tathaiveyamaninditā |
nijānuṣṭhānamakhilaṃ yasyāśeṣamidaṃ phalam | |45
brahmovāca
iti pṛṣṭā narendreṇa samastāste tapodhanāḥ |
parāvasumathocuste kathyatāmasya bhūbhṛtaḥ | | 46
coditaḥ so.api dharmajñairmahāśūrā mahāmatiḥ |
yogamāsthāya suciraṃ yathāvadyatamānasaḥ | | 47
jñātavānnṛpatestasya pūrvadehaviceṣṭitam |
sa tamāha munirbhūpaṃ vijñānecchaṃ mahāmatim | | 48
satrājitaṃ mahātmānaṃ jitaśatruṃ manasvinam |
sapatnīkaṃ mahābuddhiṃ brāhmaṇānsatyavādinaḥ | | 49
parāvasuruvāca
śṛṇu bhūpāla sakalaṃ yasyedaṃ karmaṇaḥ phalam |
tava rājyādikaṃ subhrūryeyaṃ cāsīnmahīpate | | 1.116.50
tvamāsīḥ śūdrajātīyaḥ parahiṃsāparāyaṇaḥ |
kuṣṭhārto daṇḍapāruṣye niḥsnehaḥ sarvajantuṣu | | 51
dvayaṃ ca bhavato bhāryā pūrvamapyāyatekṣaṇā |
nityaṃ babhūva tvaccittā bhavacchuśrūṣaṇe ratā | | 52
pativratā mahābhāgā bhartsyamānāpi niṣṭhuram |
tvadvākyeṣu ca sarveṣu vīra karmasu codyatā | 53
naiśvaryādasahāyasya tyajyamānasya bandhubhiḥ |
kṣayaṃ jagāma yortho.abhūtsañcitaḥ prapitāmahaiḥ | | 54
tasminkṣīṇe kṛṣiparastvamāsīḥ pṛthivīpate |
sāpi karmavipākena kṛṣirviphalatāṃ gatā | | 55
tato niḥsvaṃ parikṣīṇaṃ pareṣāṃ bhṛtyatāṃ gatam |
tatyāja sādhvī neyaṃ tvāṃ tyajyamānāpi pārthiva | | 56
anayā tu samaṃ sādhvyā bhānorāvasathe tvayā |
kṛtaṃ śuśrūṣaṇaṃ vṛttyā bhaktyā sammārjanādikam | | 57
niḥsnehaḥ sarvakāmebhyastanmayastvaṃ tadarpaṇaḥ |
ahanyahani visrambhāttasminnāvasathe raveḥ | | 58
kānyakubjapure vīra mahāśuśrūṣitaṃ tvayā |
divākarālaye nityaṃ kṛtaṃ tanmārjanaṃ tvayā | | 59
tathaivābhyukṣaṇaṃ bhūpa nityaṃ caivānulepanam |
patnyānayā nṛpa tathā yuṣmaccittānuvṛttayā | | 1.116.60
kāritaṃ śravaṇaṃ puṇyamitihāsapurāṇayoḥ |
dattvāṅgulīyakaṃ rājanpitṛdattaṃ tu vācake | | 61
ahanyahani yatkarma yuvayornṛpakurvatoḥ |
tatraiva tanmayatvena pāpahānirajāyata | | 62
bhānoḥ kāryaṃ mayā kāryaṃ paraṃ śuśrūṣaṇaṃ tathā |
nāprabhātaṃ prabhātaṃ vā cinteyamabhavanniśi | | 63
evamāyatanaṃ ramyamityevaṃ ca sukhāvaham |
sūryavaccaivametatsyādityāsītte manastadā | | 64
yogināṃ sukhadaṃ karma tathaiva sukhamityapi |
bhavaccittamabhūttatra yogakarmaṇyaharniśam | | 65
evaṃ tanmanasastatra kṛtodyogasya pārthiva |
bhūtānumāninaḥ samyagyathoktādhikakāriṇaḥ | | 66
smarato gopatiṃ nityaṃ cittenāpi dṛḍhātmanaḥ |
niḥśeṣamupaśāṃtaṃ te pāpaṃ sūryaniṣevaṇāt | | 67
tato.adhikaṃ purastasmādagārasyānulepanam |
saṃmārjanaṃ ca bahuśaḥ sapatnīkena yatkṛtam | | 68
kevalaṃ dharmamāśritya tyaktvā vṛttimaśeṣataḥ |
anayā śravaṇaṃ puṇyaṃ kāritaṃ vācakātsadā | 69
nānādhātuvikāraistu gomayena mṛdā tathā |
upalepanaṃ kṛtaṃ bhaktyā tvayā pūrvaṃ surālaye | | 1.116.70
athājagāma vai tatra kuvalāśvo mahīpatiḥ |
mahāsainyaparīvāraḥ prabhūtagajavāhanaḥ | | 71
sarvasampadupetaṃ taṃ sarvābharaṇabhūṣitam |
vṛtaṃ bhāryāsahasreṇa dṛṣṭvā saṃkrandanodbalam | |
spṛhā kṛtā tvayā tatra cārumaulini pārthive | | 72
sarvakāmapradaṃ karma kriyate bhāskārāśritam |
tenaitadakhilaṃ rājyamaśeṣaṃ cāptavānmahīm | | 73
tejaścaivādhikaṃ yatte tathaiva śṛṇu pārthiva |
yogaprabhāvato labdhaṃ kathayāmyakhilaṃ tava | | 74
tatraivāvasathe dīpaḥ praśāntaḥ snehasaṃkṣayāt |
nijabhojanatailena punaḥ prajvalitastvayā | | 75
anyā cottarīyeṇa vīra vartyopabṛṃhitaḥ |
tava patnyā svayaṃ jvālya kāntirasyāstato.adhikā | | 76
tavāpyakhilabhūpālamanaḥ kṣobhakaraṃ punaḥ |
tejo narendra etasmātkimutārādhya bhāskaram | | 77
evaṃ narendraḥ śūdratvādbhānukarmaparāyaṇaḥ |
tanmayatvena samprāpto mahimānamanuttamam | | 78
kiṃ punaryo naro bhaktyā nityaṃ śuśrūṣaṇāvṛtaḥ |
karoti satataṃ pūjāṃ niṣkāmo nānyamānasaḥ | | 79
sarvāmṛddhimimāṃ labdhvā sarvalokamaheśvaraḥ |
pūjayitvārkamīśeśaṃ tamārādhya na sīdati | | 1.116.80
puṣpai dhūpaistathā vānyairdīpairvastrānulepanaiḥ |
ārādhayārkaṃ tadveśma sadā sammārjanādinā | | 81
yadyadiṣṭatamaṃ kiñcidyadyanyattu durlabham |
taddatvā ca jagaddhātre bhāskarāya na sīdati | | 82
sugandhāgurukarpūracandanāgurukuṃkumaiḥ |
vāsobhirvividhairdhūpaiḥ puṣpaiḥ srakcāmaradhvajaiḥ | | 83
anyopahārairvividhaiḥ kṛtakṣīrābhiṣecanaiḥ |
gītavāditranṛtyādyaistoṣayasvārkamādarāt | | 84
puṇyarātriṣu mārtaṇḍaṃ nṛtyagītairathojjvalam |
bhūpa jāgaraṇairbhaktyā homaḥ kāryaḥ sadā śuciḥ | | 85
itihāsapurāṇānāṃ śravaṇena .viśeṣataḥ |
tathā vedasvanaiḥ puṇyairṛksāmayajubhirnṛpa | | 86
evaṃ santoṣyate bhaktyā bhagavānbhavabhaṅgakṛt |
bhūyo vaivasvato bhūtvā bhavahṛdbhāskaro naraiḥ || 87
toṣito bhagavānbhānurdadātyabhimataṃ phalam |
daivakarmasamarthānāṃ prāṇināṃ smṛtisambhavaiḥ | | 88
toṣito bhagavānkāmānprayacchati divākaraḥ |
naiṣa vṛttairna ratnaughaiḥ puṣpairdhūpānulepanaiḥ | |
sadbhāvenaiva mārtaṇḍastoṣamāyāti saṃsmṛtaḥ | | 89
tvayaikāgramanaskena gṛhasammārjanādikam |
kṛtvālpamīdṛśaṃ prāptaṃ rājyamanyena durlabham | | 1.116.90
anayā śravaṇaṃ puṇyaṃ kārayitvā gṛhe raveḥ |
īdṛkprāptā sampadiyaṃ pūjāṃ kṛtvā tu vācake | | 91
prāptopakaraṇairyastamekāgramatiraṇḍajam |
santoṣayati nendro.api bhavatā vai samaḥ kvacit | | 92
tasmāttvamanayā devyā sahātyantavinītayā |
bhāskarārādhane yatnaṃ kuru dharmabhṛtāṃ vara | | 93
brahmovāca
etanmunervaco vīra niśamya sa narādhipaḥ |
bhāryāsahāyaḥ sa tadā saṃprahṛṣṭatanūruhaḥ | | 94
kṛtakāryamivātmānaṃ manyamānastadābhavat |
uvāca praṇato bhūtvā rājā satrājito.acyuta | | 95
satrājita uvāca
yathāmaratvaṃ samprāpya yathā vāyurbalaṃ param |
paraṃ nirvāṇamāpnoti tathāhaṃ vacasā tava | | 96
kṛtakṛtyaḥ sukhāsīno nirvṛtiṃ paramāṃ gataḥ |
ajñānatamasācchanne yatpradīpastvayā dhṛtaḥ | | 97
ahameṣā ca tanvaṅgī vibhūtibhraṃśabhīrukaḥ |
dravyamāpāditaṃ brahmannihādya vacasā tava | | 98
sampadaḥ kathitaṃ bījamāvayorbhavatā mune |
tvadvaktrādudyatā vāco vijñātā hi dvijottama | | 99
na ratnairna ca vittaughairna ca puṣpānulepanaiḥ |
ārādhyaśca jagannātho bhāvaśūnyairdivākaraḥ | | 1.116.100
bāhyārthanirapekṣaiśca manasaiva manogatiḥ |
niḥsvairārādhyate devo bhānuḥ sarveśvareśvaraḥ | | 101
sarvametanmayā jñātaṃ yattvamāttha mahāmune |
yacca pṛcchāmi tanme tvaṃ prasādasumukho vada | | 102
kathamārādhito devo naraiḥ strībhiśca bhāskaraḥ |
toṣamāyāti viprendra tadvadasva mahāmune | | 103
rahasyāni ca devasya prītaye yā tithiḥ sadā |
cānyaśeṣāṇi me brūhi arkārādhanakāṃkṣiṇaḥ | | 104
parāvasuruvāca
śṛṇu bhūpāla yairbhānurgṛheṣyārādhyate janaiḥ |
nārībhiścātighore.asminpatitābhirbhavārṇave | | 105
samabhyarcya jagannāthaṃ devamakaṃ samādhinā |
ekamaśnāti yo bhaktaṃ dvitīyaṃ brāhmaṇārpaṇam | | 106
karoti bhāskaraprītyai kārttikaṃ māsamātmanā |
pūrve vayasi yatnena jānatā.ajānatāpi vā | | 107
pāpamācaritaṃ tasmādbhidyate nātra saṃśayaḥ |
anenaiva vidhānena māsi mārgaśire punaḥ | | 108
samabhyarcya marakataṃ viprebhyo yaḥ prayacchati |
bhagavatprīṇanārthāya phalaṃ tasya śṛṇuṣva me | | 109
madhye vayasi yatpāpaṃ yoṣitā puruṣeṇa vā |
kṛtamasmācca tenekto vimokṣaḥ paramātmanā | | 1.116.110
tathā caivekabhaktaṃ tu yastu viprāya yacchati |
divākaraṃ samabhyarcya pauṣe māsi mahīpate | | 111
tattacca prīṇayatyarkaṃ vārdhikenaiva yatkṛtam |
sa tasmānmucyate rājanpumānyoṣidathāpi vā | | 112
trimāsikaṃ vratamidaṃ yaḥ karoti nareśvara |
sa bhānuprīṇanātpāpairlaghubhiḥ parimucyate | | 113
dvitīye vatsare rājanmucyate copapātakaiḥ |
tadvattṛtīye.api kṛtaṃ mahāpātakanāśanam | | 114
vratametannaraiḥ strībhistribhirmāsairanuṣṭhitam |
tribhiḥ saṃvatsaraiścaiva pradadāti phalaṃ nṛṇām | | 115
tribhirmāsairanuṣṭhānāttrividhātpātakānnṛpa |
trīṇi nāmāni devasya mocayanti ca vārṣikaiḥ | | 116
yatastato vratamidaṃ vividhaṃ samudāhṛtam |
sarvapāpapraśamanaṃ bhāskarārādhane param | | 117
satrājita uvāca
katamāya .atu viprāya dātavyaṃ bhaktito mune |
dvitīye dvijaśārdūla kathayasvākhilaṃ mama | | 118
parāvasuruvāca
deye purāṇaviduṣe vastre viprottamāya ca |
śrūyatāṃ cāpi vacanaṃ yaduktaṃ bhāskareṇa ca | |
aruṇāya mahābāho pṛcchate yatpurā nṛpa | | 119
udayācalamārūḍhaṃ bhāskaraṃ timirāpaham |
praṇamya śirasā nūnamidaṃ vacanamabravīt | | 1.116.120
kāni priyāṇi te deva pūjane santi sarvadā |
puṣpādīnāṃ samastānāmārādhanavidhau sadā | |
uparāgādivastrādau brāhmaṇānāṃ tathā rave | | 121
bhāskara uvāca
puṣpāṇāṃ karavīrāṇi tathā raktaṃ ca candanam |
guggulañcāpi dhūpānāṃ naivedye modakāḥ priyāḥ | | 122
pūjākaro bhojakastu ghṛtadīpastathā priyaḥ |
dānaṃ priyaṃ khagaśreṣṭha vācakāya pradīyate | | 123
māmuddiśya ca yaddānaṃ dīyate mānavairbhuvi |
vācakāya tu dātavyaṃ tanmama prītaye khaga | | 124
itihāsapurāṇāmyāmabhijño yastu vācakaḥ |
brāhmaṇo vai khagaśreṣṭha sampūjyaḥ prītaye mama | | 125
pūjite.asminsadā vipre pūjitohaṃ na saṃśayaḥ |
bhavāmi khagaśārdūla yatastviṣṭaḥ sa me sadā | | 126
vedavīṇāmṛdaṅgaiśca nātigandhavilepanaiḥ |
tathā me jāyate prītiryathā śrutvā khagottama | | 127
itihāsapurāṇāni vācyamānāni vācakaiḥ |
ataḥ priyo vācako me pūjākartā ca bhojakaḥ | | 128
iti bhaviṣye mahāpurāṇe brāhme parvaṇi saptamīkalpe satrājitopākhyāne ravipūjāvidhivarṇanaṃ nāma ṣoḍaśādhikaśatatamo.adhyāyaḥ | 116 |
atha saptadaśādhikaśatatamo.adhyāya
upalepanasnāpanamāhātmyavarṇanam
aruṇa uvāca
kimarthaṃ bhojakastubhyaṃ priyo deveśa kathyatām |
nānye viprādayo varṇā devatāyataneṣu vai | | 1
kaścāyaṃ bhojako deva kasya putraḥ kimātmakaḥ |
varṇataścāsya me brūhi karma cāsya samantataḥ | | 2
āditya uvāca
sādhu pṛṣṭo.asmi bhadraṃ te vainateya mahāmate |
śṛṇuṣvaikamanāḥ sarvaṃ gadato mama khecara | | 3
viprādayastu ye tvanye varṇāḥ kaśyapanandana |
te pūjayanti māṃ nityaṃ bhaktiśraddhāsamanvitāḥ | |4
devālayeṣu ye viprāḥ prītyā māṃ pūjayanti hi |
anyāśca devatāvṛttyā te syurdevalakāḥ khaga | |
etasmātkāraṇānmahyaṃ bhojako dayitaḥ sadā | | 5
varṇato brāhmaṇaścāyaṃ svānuṣṭhānaparo yadi |
anuṣṭhānavihīno hi narakaṃ yātyasaṃśayam | | 6
na tyājyaṃ bhojakaistasmātsvakaṃ karma kadācana |
mayāsau nirmitaḥ pūrvaṃ tejasā svena vai khaga | | 7
pūjārthamātmano nūnaṃ karma cāsya prakīrtitam |
priyavratasuto rājā śākadvīpe mahāmatiḥ | | 8
tena me kāritaṃ divyaṃ vimānapratimaṃ gṛham |
tasmindvīpe tadātmīye divyaṃ śilāmayaṃ mahat | | 9
sa madarcāṃ kārayitvā kāñcanīṃ lakṣaṇānvitām |
pratiṣṭhāpanāya vai tasyāścintayāmāsa suvrataḥ | | 1.117.10
kṛtamāyatanaṃ śreṣṭhaṃ teneyaṃ pratimā kṛtā |
ko vai pratiṣṭhāpayitā devamarkaṃ śubhālaye | | 11
evaṃ sañcintayitvā tu jagāma śaraṇaṃ mama |
bhaktiṃ tasya ca sañcintya khagāhaṃ pārthivasya tu | | 12
gato.ahaṃ darśanaṃ tasya uktañcāpi mayā khaga |
kiṃ cintayasi rājendra kutaściṃtā samāgatā | | 13
brūhi yatte hṛdi prauḍhaṃ cintākāraṇamāgatam |
saṃpādayiṣye tatsarvaṃ vimanā bhava mā nṛpa | | 14
atyarthaṃ duṣkaramapi kariṣye nātra saṃśayaḥ |
ityuktaḥ sa mayā rājā idaṃ vacanamabravīt | | 15
dvīpe.asmindevadevasya kṛtamāyatanaṃ tava |
mayā bhaktyā jagannātha tatheyaṃ pratimā kṛtā | | 16
pratiṣṭhāṃ kārayedyastu tava devālaye khaga |
yatra santi trayo varṇā dvīpesminkṣatriyādayaḥ | | 17
te mayoktā na kurvanti pratiṣṭhāṃ tava kṛtsnaśaḥ |
na cāpyarcāṃ jagannātha brāhmaṇaścātra vidyate | | 18
teneyamāgatā cintā hṛdi śalyaṃ tayārpitam |
tato mayokto rājā.asau vainateya vacaḥ śubham | | 19
evametanna saṃdeho yathāttha tvaṃ narādhipaḥ |
kṣatriyāditrayo varṇā dvīpe.asminnātra saṃśayaḥ | | 1.117.20
te ca nārhanti me pūjāṃ na pratiṣṭhāṃ kadācana |
tasmātte śreyase rājanpratiṣṭhāmātmanastathā | | 21
sṛjāmi prathamaṃ varṇaṃ bhagasaṃjñamanaupamam |
ityuktvā tamahaṃ vīra rājānaṃ khagasattama | | 22
jagāma paramāṃ cintāṃ tasya kāryasya siddhaye |
atha me cintayānasya svaśarīrādviniḥsṛtāḥ | | 23
śaśikundendusaṃkāśāḥ saṃkhyayāṣṭau mahābalāḥ |
paṭhanti caturo vedānsāṃgopaniṣadaḥ khaga | | 24
kāṣāyavāsasaḥ sarve karaṇḍāmbujadhāriṇaḥ |
lalāṭaphalakāddvau tu dvau cānyau vakṣasastathā | | 25
caraṇābhyāṃ tathā dvau tu pādābhyāṃ dvau tathā khaga |
atha te ca mahātmānaḥ sarve praṇatakandharāḥ | | 26
pitaraṃ manyamānā māmidaṃ vacanamabruvan |
tāta tāta mahādeva lokanātha jagatpate | | 27
kimarthaṃ bhavatā sṛṣṭā vayaṃ devasya dehataḥ |
brūhi sarvaṃ kariṣyāma ādeśaṃ bhavato.akhilam | | 28
pitāsmākaṃ bhavāndevo vayaṃ putrā na saṃśayaḥ |
ityuktavantaste sarve mayoktā devasambhavāḥ | | 29
priyavratasuto yoyamasya vākyaṃ kariṣyatha |
sa cāpyukto mayā rājā śākadvīpādhipaḥ khaga | | 1.117.30
ya ete matsutā rājannarghyā brāhmaṇasattamāḥ |
kārayantu pratiṣṭhāṃ me sarvairebhirmahīpate | | 31.
kārayitvā pratiṣṭhāṃ tu mamārcāyāṃ narādhipa |
paścādāyatanaṃ sarvameṣāmarpaya pūjane | | 32
ete matpūjane yogyāḥ pratiṣṭhāsu ca sarvaśaḥ |
samāpya na prahartavyaṃ bhojakebhyaḥ kadācana | | 33
sarvamāyatanārthaṃ tu gṛhakṣetrādikaṃ ca yat |
dhanadhānyādikaṃ rājanyanmamāyatane bhavet | | 34
tatsarvaṃ bhojakebhyastu dātavyaṃ nātra saṃśayaḥ |
dhanadhānyasuvarṇādi gṛhakṣetrādikaṃ ca yat | |
yanmadīyaṃ bhavetkiñjidgrāme vā nagare kvacit | | 35
tasya sarvasya rājendra madīyasya samantataḥ |
adhipā bhojakāḥ sarve nānye viprādayo nṛpa | | 36
yathādhikārī putrastu pitṛdravyasya vai bhavet |
tathā madīyavittasya bhojakāḥ syurna saṃśayaḥ | | 37
ityuktena mayā rājñā tathā sarvaṃ pravartitam |
kārayitvā pratiṣṭhāṃ tu dattvā sarvasvameva hi | |
bhojakebhyaḥ khagaśreṣṭha tato harṣamavāptavān | | 38
evamete mayā sṛṣṭā bhojakā garuḍāgraja |
ahamātmā tato hyeṣāṃ sarve sumanasastathā | | 39
matputreṇa samā jñeyāstathā mama hitāḥ sadā |
tasmāttebhyaḥ pradātavyaṃ na hartavyaṃ kadācana | | 1.117.40
bhojakasya haredyastu lobhāddveṣāttathāpi vā |
sa yāti narakaṃ ghoraṃ tāmisraṃ śāśvatīḥ samāḥ | | 41
tasmādgrāmādikaṃ dravyaṃ yatkiñcinmama vidyate |
tatsarvaṃ bhojakasvaṃ hi pitṛparyāgataṃ mama | | 42
bhojakaśca bhavedyādṛktatte vacmi khageśvara |
mamājñāṃ pāleyadyastu svānuṣṭhānaparaḥ sadā | | 43
vedādhigamanaṃ pūrvaṃ dārasaṃgrahaṇaṃ tathā |
abhyaṅgadhāraṇaṃ nityaṃ tathā triṣavaṇaṃ smṛtam | | 44
pañcakṛtvaḥ sadā pūjyo hyahaṃ rātrau dine tathā |
devabrāhmaṇavedānāṃ nindā kāryā na vai kvacit | | 45
nānyādevapratiṣṭhā tu kāryā vai bhojakena tu |
mamāpi ca na kartavyā tena ekākinā kvacit | | 46
sarvameva nivedyānnaṃ nāśnīyādbhojakaḥ sadā |
na bhuñjīta gṛhaṃ gatvā śūdrasya garuḍāgraja | | 47
śūdrocchiṣṭaṃ prayatnena sadā tyājyaṃ hi bhojakaiḥ |
ye.aśnanti bhojakā nityaṃ śūdrānnaṃ śūdraveśmani | | 48
te vai pūjāphalaṃ cātra kathaṃ prāpsyanti khecara |
gatvā gṛhaṃ tu śūdrasya na bhoktavyaṃ kadācana | | 49
gṛhāgataṃ ca śūdrānnaṃ tacca tyājyaṃ tathaiva ca |
ādhmātavyombujo nityaṃ bhojakenāgrato mama | | 1.117.50
sakṛtpravādite śaṃkhe mama prītirhi jāyate |
ṣaṇmāsānnātra sandehaḥ purāṇaśravaṇaṃ tathā | | 51
tasmācchaṃkhaḥ sadā vādyo bhojakena prayatnataḥ |
tasyeyaṃ paramā vṛttirnaivedyaṃ yanmadīyakam | | 52
nābhojyaṃ bhuñjate yasmāttenaite bhojakā matāḥ |
magaṃ dhyāyanti te yasmāttena te magadhāḥ smṛtāḥ | | 53
bhojayanti ca māṃ nityaṃ tena te bhojakā smṛtāḥ |
abhyaṅgaṃ ca prayatnena prāyaṃ śuddhikaraṃ param | | 54
abhyaṅgahīno hyaśucirbhojakaḥ syānna saṃśayaḥ |
yastu māṃ pūjayedvīra abhyaṅgena vinā khaga | | 55
na tasya santatiḥ syādvai na cāhaṃ prītimānbhave |
muṇḍanaṃ śirasā kāryaṃ śikhā dhāryā prayatnataḥ | | 56
naktaṃ cādityadivase tathā ṣaṣṭhyāṃ pravartayet |
saptamyāmupavāsastu mama saṃkramaṇe tathā | | 57
kartavyo bhojakenaiva matprītyai garuḍāgraja |
trikālaṃ cāpi gāyatrīṃ japedvācā puro mama | | 58
mukhamāvṛtya yatnena pūjanīyo.ahamādarāt |
maunaṃ cāsya prayatnena tyaktvā krodhaṃ ca dūrataḥ | | 59
śūdrebhyo yastu vaiśyebhyo lobhātkāmātprayacchati |
nirmālyaṃ mama vai vatsa sa yāti narakaṃ dhruvam | | 1.117.60
lobhādvai bhojako yastu matpuṣpāṇi khagādhipa |
yacchatenyasya duṣṭātmā mayyanāropya khecara | | 61
sa jñeyo me paraḥ śatruḥ sa māmarho na cārcitum |
nirmālyaṃ mama deyaṃ syādbrāhmaṇādiṣu vai nṛṣu | | 62
naivedyaṃ yanmadīyaṃ tu tadaśnīyātsadaiva hi |
tenāsau śuddhyate nityaṃ haviṣyānnasamaṃ tathā | | 63
tatkṣaṇādutkṣipedyastu mamāṃgātpuṣpameva hi |
nānyasya deyaṃ naivedyaṃ madīyamudake kṣipet | | 64
pañcagavyasamaṃ tasya manmataṃ nātra saṃśayaḥ |
mamāṅgalagnaṃ yatkiñcidgandhaṃ puṣpamathāpi vā | | 65
dātavyaṃ na ca vaiśyāya na śūdrāya kadācana |
ātmanā tadgrahītavyaṃ na vikreyaṃ kathañcana | | 66
yastu nāropya puṣpāṇi avyaṅgāni mamopari |
yaḥ kaścidāharelloke sa yāti narakaṃ dhruvam | | 67
snapanaṃ mama nirmālyaṃ pāvakaṃ yastu laṅghayet |
sa naro narakaṃ yāti saraudraṃ rauravaṃ khaga | | 68
bhojakena sadā kāryaṃ snapanaṃ me prayatnataḥ |
yathā na laṅghayetkaścidyathā śvā nāpi bhakṣayet | | 69
yadyayatnaparaḥ kuryādbhojakaḥ snapanaṃ mama |
yathā vai laṅghitamatirbhakṣyatāṃ ca khagādhipa | | 1.117.70
sa yāti narakaṃ raudraṃ tāmiśraṃ nāma nāmataḥ |
ekabhaktaṃ sadā kāryaṃ snānaṃ traikālameva hi | | 71
tricailaṃ parivarteta bhavitavyaṃ dinedine |
pūjākāle.arghakāle ca krodhastyājyaḥ prayatnataḥ | | 72
amāṃgalyaṃ na vaktavyaṃ vaktavyaṃ ca śubhaṃ tadā |
īdṛgbhūto bhojako me preyān pūjākaraḥ sadā | | 73
sanmānyaḥ pūjanīyaśca viprādīnāṃ yathāsmyaham |
yaḥ karotyavamānaṃ tu vṛttirūpaṃ tu bhojake | | 74
tasyāhaṃ roṣametyāśu kulaṃ hanmi samantataḥ |
priyo me bhojako nityaṃ yathā tvaṃ vinatāsuta | | 75
upalepanakartā ca sammārjanaparaśca yaḥ | |
parāvasuruvāca
ityuktvā bhagavānbhānurbabhrāma rathamāsthitaḥ | | 76
aruṇo.api tathā śrutvā mudayā parayā nṛpaḥ |
pūjyastasmānmahārāja bhojakastu mahīpate | | 77
tasmāddevaṃ vācakāya dvitīyamaśanaṃ naraiḥ | | 78
brahmovāca
itthaṃ śrutvā sa rājā tu karmaṇaḥ phalamātmanaḥ |
purātanaṃ mahābāhurmudamāpa mahīpatiḥ | |79
yadyadāyatanaṃ bhānoḥ pṛthivyāṃ paśyate nṛpaḥ |
tasmiṃstasminkārayati upalepanamādarāt | | 1.117.80
bhāryā tasyāpi suśroṇi puṇyaśravaṇamādarāt |
vācake vetanaṃ dattvā bhānordevasya mandire | | 81
itthaṃ rājā sapatnīkaḥ pūjya bhaktyā divākaram |
prāptāvubhau parāṃ prītiṃ gatiṃ cānuttamāṃ tathā | | 82
iti śrībhaviṣye mahāpurāṇe brāhme parvaṇi saptamīkalpa upalepanasnāpanamāhātmyavarṇanaṃ nāma saptadaśādhikaśatatamo.adhyāyaḥ | 117 |
satrājitopākhyānaṃ samāptam
athāṣṭādaśādhikaśatatamo.adhyāyaḥ
dīpadānaphalavarṇanam
brahmovāca
dīpaṃ prayacchati naro bhānorāyatane tu yaḥ |
tejasā ravisaṃkāśaḥ sarvayajñaphalaṃ labhet | | 1
kārttike tu viśeṣeṇa kaumāre māsi dīpakam |
datvā phalamavāpnoti yadanyena na labhyate | | 2
kṛṣṇakṛṣṇātra te vacmi saṃvādaṃ pāpanāśanam |
bhrātṛbhiḥ saha bhadrasya brāhmaṇasya mahātmanaḥ | | 3
jagatyasminpurī ramyā nāmnā māhiṣmatī purā |
tasyāmāsīddvijaḥ kṛṣṇa nāgaśarmeti viśrutaḥ | |4
tasya putraśataṃ jātaṃ prasādādbhāskarasya ca |
teṣāṃ kaniṣṭho bhadrastu tatputrāṇāṃ vicakṣaṇaḥ | | 5
sa ca nityaṃ jagaddhāturdevadevasya bhāsvataḥ |
dīpavartiparastadvattailādyāharaṇodyataḥ | | 6
bhānorāyatane tasya sahasraṃ bhārgavīpriya |
pradīpānāṃ tu jajvāla divārātramaninditam | |7
tasya dīptyā parābhūtāstasya lāvaṇyadharṣitāḥ |
sarve te bhrātaro bhadraṃ papracchuridamādarāt | | 8
bho bhadra vada vai bhrātarbhadraṃ testu sadā dvija |
kautūhalaparāḥ sarve yatpṛcchāmastaducyatām | | 9
teṣāṃ tadvacanaṃ śrutvā bhadro vacanamabravīt |
viṣaye sati vaktavyaṃ yanmayā tadihocyatām | | 1.118.10
nāhaṃ matsarayukto vai na ca rāgādidūṣitaḥ |
bhavanto mama sarve vai bhrātaro guravastathā | | 11
kathaṃ na kathayāmyeṣa bhavatāṃ putrasammitaḥ |
tasmādbruvantu māṃ sarve bhrātaro yadvivakṣitam | | 12
bhrātara ūcuḥ

na tathā puṣpadhūpeṣu na tathā dvijapūjane |
suprayatnaṃ tu paśyāmo bhānorāyatane param | | 13
yathāhani tathā rātrau yathā rātrau tathāhani |
tava dīpapradānāya yathā bhadra sadodyamam | | 14
tattvaṃ tatkathayāsmākaṃ haṃta kautūhalaṃ param |
yannāma dīpadānasya bhavatā viditaṃ phalam | | 15
tadetatkathayāsmākaṃ saviśeṣaṃ mahābala |
evamuktastatastaistu bhrātṛbhiścodito mudā | | 16
vyājahāra sa bhrātṛrṇāṃ na kiñcidapi suvrata |
punaḥ punarasau taistu bhrātṛbhiścodito mudā | | 17
dākṣiṇyasāro bhadrastu kathayāmāsa kṛtsnaśaḥ |
bhavatāṃ kautukaṃ caitadatīvālpe.api vastuni | | 18
tadeṣa kathayāmyadya yadvrataṃ mama suvrata |
ikṣvākurājñastu purā vaśiṣṭho.abhūtpurohitaḥ | | 19
tena cāyatanaṃ bhānoḥ kāritaṃ sarayūtaṭe |
ahanyahani śuśrūṣāṃ puṣpadhūpānulepanaiḥ | | 1.118.20
dīpadānādibhiścaiva cakre tatra sa vai dvijaḥ |
kārtike dīpako bhaktyā pradattastena vai sadā | | 21
āsīnnirvāṇa evāsau devārcāpurato niśi |
devatāyatane cāhamavasaṃ vyathito bhṛśam | | 22
pūyaśoṇitaniṣpandaṃ prāvahankāyataḥ sadā |
śīrṇa ghrāṇo hyarvaravo durgaṃdhapatitastathā | | 23
duṣṭabuddhyā sadā yuktaḥ saptāśvaṃ prati suvrata |
yadṛcchyā dīpadānaṃ vartyādīnāṃ vibhāvasau | |24
tattadbhuktvā sadā tuṣṭiṃ vrajāmi dvijasattamāḥ |
ekadā tu tatastasminbhānorāyatane gataḥ | | 25
rātrau dṛṣṭā mayā tatra bhaktā jāgaraṇāgatāḥ |
pratiśrayaṃ prārthitāśca taiśca datto dayānvitaḥ | | 26
vyādhito.ayaṃ sudīnaśca iti kṛtvā matiṃ śubhām |
tato.ahamagnimāśritya sthitasteṣāṃ samīpataḥ | | 27
duṣṭāṃ buddhiṃ samāśritya hartukāmo vivasvataḥ |
divyamābharaṇaṃ bhānośchidrānveṣī dvijottamāḥ | | 28
sthito.ahaṃ bhojakā hyatra yadi nidrāṃ vrajanti te |
yenāsya vairivadbhānorharāmyābharaṇaṃ śubham | | 29
atha suptā bhojakāste nidrayā mohitāstadā |
nirvāṇāścāpi dīpāstu tato.ahamutthitastvaran | | 1.118.30
mudā paramayā yukto gato vaiśvānaraṃ prati |
prajvālyaṃ pāvakaṃ yatnāddīpavartintato mayā | | 31
yojayitvā tu vai dīpe dhṛto dīpo.agrato raveḥ |
hartukāmenābharaṇaṃ bhānordevasya suvrata | | 32
atha te bhojakāḥ sarve vṛddhā devasya putrakāḥ |
taistu dṛṣṭo hyahaṃ tatra dīpahasto vibhāvasoḥ | | 33
puraḥ sthito dvijaśreṣṭhā gṛhītaścāpi tairiha |
tato.ahaṃ tejasā mūḍho bhāskarasya mahātmanaḥ | | 34
vilapankaruṇaṃ teṣāṃ pādayoravaniṃ gataḥ |
taiścāpi karuṇāṃ kṛtvā mukto.ahaṃ bhojakaistadā | | 35
gṛhīto rājapuruṣaiḥ pṛṣṭaścāpi samantataḥ |
kimidaṃ bhavatārabdhaṃ devadevasya maṃdire | | 36
dīpaṃ prajvālya duṣṭātmankathyatāṃ mā ciraṃ kuru |
ityuktvā tu tatastaistu śastrahastaiḥ samāvṛtaḥ | | 37
tato.ahaṃ vyādhinā kliṣṭo bhayena ca dvijottamāḥ |
hitvā prāṇāngato yatra svayaṃ devo vibhāvasuḥ | | 38
sthitvā kalpaṃ tatastatra yuṣmākaṃ bhrātṛtāṃ gataḥ |
eṣa prabhāvo dīpasya kārtike māsi suvratāḥ | | 39
dattasyārkasya bhavane yasyeyaṃ vyuṣṭiruttamā |
duṣṭabuddhyā kṛtaṃ yattu mayā dīpapravartanam | | 1.118.40
bhagāyatanadīpasya tasyedaṃ bhujyate phalam |
kṣudhābhibhūtena mayā devadevasya bhūṣaṇam | | 41
dīpaśca devapurato jvālito bhāskarasya tu |
tato jātismṛtirjanma prāntaṃ brāhmaṇaveśmani | | 42
kuṣṭhinā cāpi śūdreṇa prāptaṃ brāhmaṇyamuttamam |
nānāvidhāni śāstrāṇi sāṃgaṃ vedaṃ samāptavān | | 43
duṣṭabuddhyā dhṛtāddīpātphalametanmahādbhutam |
prāptaṃ mayā dvijaśreṣṭhāḥ kiṃ punardīpadāyinām | | 44
etasmātkāraṇāddīpānahamevamaharniśam |
prayacchāmi raverdhāmni jñātamasya hi yatphalam | |45
yuṣmākamidamuktaṃ vai snehātsatyaṃ na saṃśayaḥ |
eṣa prabhāvo dīpasya kārtike māsi suvratāḥ | |4 6
arkāyatanadīpasya bhadrovocadyathā purā |
dinedine japannāma bhāskarasya samāhitaḥ | |47
dadāti kārtike yastu bhagāyatanadīpakam |
jātismaratvaṃ prajñāṃ ca prākāśyaṃ sarvajantuṣu | | 48
avyāhatendriyatvaṃ ca samāpnoti na saṃśayaḥ |
sarvakālaṃ ca cakṣuṣmānmedhāvī dīpado naraḥ | |4 9
jāyate narakaṃ cāpi tamaḥ saṃjñaṃ na paśyati |
ṣaṣṭhīṃ vā saptamīṃ vāpi pratipakṣaṃ ca yo naraḥ | | 1.118.50
dīpaṃ dadāti yatnādyatphalaṃ tasya nibodha me |
kāñcanaṃ maṇiyuktaṃ ca manojñamatiśobhanam | | 51
dīpamālākulaṃ divyaṃ vimānamadhirohati |
tasmādāyatane bhānordīpāndadyātsadācyuta | | 52
tāṃśca dattvā na hiṃsyācca na ca tailaviyojitān |
kurvīta dīpahartā tu mūṣakondhaśca jāyate | | 53
tasmāddadyānnāharedvai śreyo.arthī dīpakaṃ naraḥ | | 54
iti śrībhaviṣye mahāpurāṇe brāhme parvaṇi saptamīkalpe bhadropākhyāna
ādityāyatanadīpadānaphalavarṇanaṃ nāmāṣṭādaśādhikaśatatamo.adhyāyaḥ | 118 |
athaikonaviṃśatyadhikaśatatamo.adhyāyaḥ
dīpadānavarṇanam
brahmovāca
andhe tamasi duṣpāre narake patitātkila |
saṃkrośamānānsaṃkṣubdhānuvāca yamakiṅkaraḥ | | 1
vilāpairalamatreti kiṃ vo vilapite phalam |
yatpramādādibhiḥ pūrvamātmāyaṃ samupekṣitaḥ | | 2
pūrvamālocitaṃ naitatkathamante bhaviṣyati |
idānīṃ yātanāṃ bhuṅdhvaṃ kiṃ vilāpaṃ kariṣyatha | | 3
deho dināni svalpāni viṣayāścātidurbalāḥ |
etatko na vijānāti yena yūyaṃ pramādinaḥ | | 4
janturjanmasahasrebhya ekasminmānuṣo yadi |
sa tatrāpyatimūḍhātmā kiṃ bhogānabhidhāvati | | 5
putradāragṛhakṣetrahitāya satatodyatāḥ |
na jānanti tato mūḍhāḥ svalpamapyātmano hitam | | 6
vañcito.ahaṃ mayā labdhamidamasmādupāgatam |
na vetti mohitaḥ kaścitprakrāntanarako naraḥ | | 7
na vetti sūryacandrādīnkālamātmānameva ca |
sākṣibhūtānaśeṣasya śubhasyehāśubhasya ca | | 8
janmānyanyāni jāyante putradārādidehinām |
yadarthaṃ yatkṛtaṃ karma tasya janmaśatāni tu | | 9
aho mohasya māhātmyaṃ mamatvaṃ narakeṣvapi |
krandate mātaraṃ tātaṃ pīḍyamāno.api yatsvayam | | 1.119.10
evamākṛṣṭacittānāṃ viṣayaiḥ svādutarpaṇaiḥ |
nṛṇāṃ na jāyate buddhiḥ paramārthavilokinī | | 11
tathā ca viṣayāsaṅge karotyavirataṃ manaḥ |
ko hi bhāro ravernāmni jihvāyāḥ parikīrtane | | 12
vartitaile.alpamūlye ca yadvarttirlabhyate sudhā |
ato vai kataro lābhaḥ kā taścintā bhavettadā | | 13
yenāyateṣu hasteṣu svātaṃtrye sati dīpakaḥ |
mahāphalo bhānugṛhe na datto narakāpahāḥ | | 14
naro vilapate kiñcididānīṃ dṛśyate phalam |
asvātaṃtrye vilapatāṃ svātaṃtrye sati māninām | | 15
avaśyaṃ pātinaḥ prāṇā bhoktā jīvo.apyaharniśam |
dattaṃ ca labhate bhoktaṃ kāmayanviṣayānapi | | 16
etatsthānaṃ duṣkṛtairvā yuktaṃ cādya mayekṣitam |
idānīṃ kiṃ vilāpena sahadhvaṃ yadupāgatam | | 17
yadyetadanabhīṣṭaṃ vo yadduḥkhaṃ samupasthitam |
tadadbhutamatiḥ pāpe na kartavyā kadācana | | 18
kṛte.api pāpake karmaṇyajñānādaghanāśanam |
kartavyamanavacchinnaṃ pūjanaṃ savituḥ sadā | | 19
brahmovāca
nārakāstadvacaḥ śrutvā tamūcuratiduḥkhitāḥ |
kṣutkṣāmakaṇṭhāstṛṭtāpavisaṃsphuṭitatālukāḥ | | 1.119.20
bho bhoḥ sādho kṛtaṃ karma yadasmābhistaducyatām |
narakasthairvipāko.ayaṃ bhujyate yatsudāruṇaḥ | | 21
kiṅkara uvāca
yuṣmābhiyauṃvanonmādānmuditairavivekibhiḥ |
ghṛtalobhena mārtaṇḍagṛhāddīpaḥ purā hṛtaḥ | | 22
tenāsminnarake ghore kṣuttṛṣṇāparipīḍitāḥ |
bhavantaḥ patitāstīvre śītavātavidāritāḥ | | 23
brahmovāca
etatte dīpadānasya pradīpaharaṇasya ca |
puṇyaṃ pāpaṃ ca kathitaṃ bhāskarāyatane.acyuta | | 24
sarvatraiva hi dīpasya pradānaṃ kṛṣṇa śasyate |
viśeṣeṇa jagaddhāturbhāskarasya niveśane | | 25
ye.andhā mūkā badhirā nirvivekā hīnāstaistairdānasādhanairvṛṣṇivīra |
taistairdīpāḥ sādhulokapradattā devāgārādanyataḥ kṛṣṇa nītāḥ | | 26
iti śrī bhaviṣye mahāpurāṇe brāhme parvaṇi saptamīkalpe dīpadānamāhātmyavarṇanaṃ
nāmaikonaviṃśatyadhikaśatatamo.adhyāyaḥ | 119 |
atha viṃśatyadhikaśatatamo.adhyāyaḥ
ādityapūjāvarṇanam
viṣṇuruvāca
bhagavanprāṇinaḥ sarve viṣarogādyupadravaiḥ |
duṣṭagrahopaghātaiśca sarvakālamupadrutāḥ | | 1
ābhicārikakṛtyābhiḥ sparśarogaiśca dāruṇaiḥ |
sadā sampīḍyamānāstu tiṣṭhantyambujasambhava | | 2
yena karmavipākena viṣarogādyupadravāḥ |
prabhavanti nṛṇāṃ tanme yathāvadvaktumarhasi | | 3
brahmovāca
vratopavāsairyairbhānurnānyajanmani toṣitaḥ |
te narā devaśārdūla graharogādibhāginaḥ | | 4
yairna tatpravaṇaṃ cittaṃ sarvadaiva naraiḥ kṛtam |
viṣagrahajvarāṇāṃ te manuṣyāḥ kṛṣṇa bhāginaḥ | | 5
ārogyaṃ paramāṃ vṛddhiṃ manasā yadyadicchati |
tattadāpnotyasaṃdigdhaṃ paratrādityatoṣaṇāt | | 6
nādhīnprāpnoti na vyādhīnna viṣayagrahabandhanam |
kṛtyāsparśabhayaṃ vāpi toṣite timirāpahe | | 7
sarve duṣṭāḥ samāstasya saumyāstasya sadā grahāḥ |
devānāmapi pūjyo.asau tuṣṭo yasya divākaraḥ | | 8
yaḥ samaḥ sarvabhūteṣu yathātmani tathā hite |
upavāsādinā yena toṣyate timirāpahaḥ | | 9
toṣite.asminprajānāthe narāḥ pūrṇamanorathāḥ |
arogāḥ sukhino nityaṃ bahudharmasukhānvitāḥ | | 1.120.10
na teṣāṃ śatravo naiva śarīrādyabhicārakam |
graharogādikaṃ cāpi pāpakāryupajāyate | | 11
avyāhatāni devasya dhanajālāni taṃ naram |
rakṣanti sakalāpatsu yena śvetādhipo.arcitaḥ | | 12
viṣṇuruvāca
anārādhitamārtaṇḍā ye narāḥ duḥkhabhāginaḥ |
te kathaṃ nīrujaḥ santu vijvarā gatakalmaṣāḥ || 13
brahmovāca
ārādhayantu deveśaṃ puṣpeṇaivamanaupamam |
bhāskaraṃ tu jagannāthaṃ sarvadevaguruṃ param || 14
viṣṇuruvāca
doṣābhibhūtadehaistu kathamārādhanaṃ raveḥ |
karttavyaṃ vada deveśa bhaktyā śreyo.arthamātmanaḥ || 15
anugrāhyo.asmi yadi te mamāyaṃ bhaktimāniti |
tanmayopadiśa tvaṃ ca mahadārādhanaṃ raveḥ || 16
anantamajaraṃ devaṃ duṣṭasandehanāśanam |
ārādhayitumicchāmi bhagavantastvadanujñayā | |
yenāhaṃ tvatprasādena bhaveyamativikramaḥ || 17
brahmovāca
anugrāhyo.asi devasya nūnamavyaktajanmanaḥ |
ārādhanāya te viṣṇo yadetatpravaṇaṃ manaḥ || 18
yadi devapatiṃ bhānumārādhayitumicchasi |
bhagavantamanādyaṃ ca bhava vaivasvato.acyuta || 19
na hyavaivasvatairbhānurjñātuṃ stotuṃ ca śakyate |
draṣṭuṃ vā śakyate mūḍhaiḥ praveṣṭuṃ kuta eva tu ||1.120.2 0
tadbhaktiprārthitāḥ pūtā narāstadbhakticetasaḥ |
vaivasvatā bhavantyevaṃ vivasvantaṃ viśanti ca ||2 1
anekajanmasaṃsāracite pāpasamuccaye |
nākṣīṇe jāyate puṃsāṃ mārtaṇḍābhimukhī matiḥ | | 22
pradveṣaṃ yāti mārtaṇḍe dvijānvedāṃśca nindati |
yo narastaṃ vijānīyādasurāṃśasamudbhavam | | 23
pāṣaṇḍeṣu ratiḥ puṃsāṃ hetuvādānukūlatā |
jāyate dambhamāyāmbhaḥ patitānāṃ durātmanām | | 24
yadā pāpakṣayaḥ puṃsāṃ tadā vedadvijātiṣu |
bhānau ca yajñapuruṣe śraddhā bhavati naiṣṭhikī | | 25
yadā svalpāvaśeṣastu narāṇāṃ pāpasañcayaḥ |
tadā bhojakavipreṣu bhānau pūjāṃ prakurvate | | 26
bhramatāmatra saṃsāre narāṇāṃ karmadurgame |
karāvalambano hyeko bhaktiprīto divākaraḥ | | 27
sa tvaṃ vaivasvato bhūtyā sarvapāpaharaṃ harim |
ārādhaya samaṃ bhaktyā prītimabhyeti bhāskaraḥ | | 28
viṣṇuruvāca
kiṃ lakṣaṇā bhavantyete narā vaivasvatā guṇaiḥ |
yacca vaivasvataṃ kāryaṃ tanme kathaya kañjaja | | 29
brahmovāca
karmaṇā manasā vācā prāṇināṃ yo na hiṃsakaḥ |
bhāvabhaktaśca mārtaṇḍa kṛṣṇa vaivasvato hi saḥ | | 1.120.30
yo bhojakadvijāndevānnityameva namasyati |
na ca bhoktā parasvāderviṣṇo vaivasvato hi saḥ | | 31
sarvāndevānraviṃ vetti sarvāṃllokāṃśca bhāskaram |
tebhyaścānanyamātmānaṃ kṛṣṇa vaivasvato hi saḥ | | 32
devaṃ manuṣyamanyaṃ vā paśupakṣipipīlikam |
tarupāṣāṇakāṣṭhādibhūmyambhodhiṃ divaṃ tathā | | 33
ātmānaṃ cāpi devaśādvyatiriktaṃ divākarāt |
yo na jānāti taṃ vidyātkṛṣṇa vaivasvataṃ naram | | 34
sarvo vaivasvato bhāgo yadbhūtaṃ yadvyavasthitam |
iti vai yo vijānāti sa tu vaivasvato naraḥ | | 35
bhavabhītiṃ haratyeṣa bhaktibhāvena bhāvitaḥ |
vivasvāniti bhāvo yaḥ sa tu vaivasvato naraḥ | | 36
bhāvaṃ na kurute yastu sarvabhūteṣu pāpakam |
karmaṇā manasā vācā sa ca vaivasvato naraḥ | | 37
bāhyārthanirapekṣo yaḥ kriyāṃ bhaktyā vivasvataḥ |
bhāvena niṣpādayati jñeyo vaivasvato hi saḥ | | 38
nārayo yasya na snigdhā na bhedādhīnavṛttayaḥ |
vīkṣate sarvamevedaṃ bhānuṃ vaivasvato hi saḥ | | 39
sutapteneha tapasā yajñairvā bahudakṣiṇaiḥ |
tāṃ gatiṃ na narā yanti yāṃ tu vaivasvato gataḥ | |1.120.4 0
yena sarvātmanā bhānau bhaktyā bhāvo niveśitaḥ |
devaśreṣṭha kṛtārthatvācchlāghyo vaivasvato hi saḥ | | 41
api naḥ sa kule dhanyo jāyeta kulapāvanaḥ |
bhāskaraṃ bhaktibhāvena yastu vai pūjayiṣyati | |42
yaḥ kārayati devārcāṃ hadayālambinīṃ raveḥ |
sa naro.arkamavāpnoti dharmadhvajamanaupamam | |4 3
yaśca devālayaṃ bhaktyā bhānoḥ kārayate sthiram |
sa sapta puruṣā~mllokānbhānornayati mānavaḥ | |44
yāvantobdānhi devārcā ravestiṣṭhati maṃdire |
tāvadvarṣasahasrāṇi puṣpottaragṛhe vaset | | 45
devārcālakṣaṇopeto yadgṛhe santato vidhiḥ |
niṣkāmaṃ ca mano yasya sa yātyakṣarasāmyatām | | 46
puṣpāṇyatisugaṃdhīni manojñāni ca yaḥ pumān |
prayacchati jagannāthe saptāśve jyotiṣāṃ patau | |
sa yāti paramaṃ sthānaṃ yatra jyotiḥ sanātanam | |47
yasya yasya vihīno yo deśo yadvarjitaṃ ca yat |
dhūpāṃśca vividhāṃstāṃstāngaṃdhāḍhyaṃ suvilepanam | |48
dīpavartyupahārāṃśca yaccābhīṣṭamathātmanaḥ |
naraḥ sonudinaṃ yajñānkarotyārādhanādraveḥ | |4 9
yajñeśo bhagavānbhānurmakhairapi sa toṣyate |
bahūpakaraṇā yajñā nānāsaṃbhāravistarāḥ | |
saṃprāpyante dhanayutairmanuṣyairnālpasaṃcayaiḥ | | 1.120.50
bhaktyā tu puruṣaiḥ pūjā kṛtā dūrvāṃkurairapi |
raverdadāti hi phalaṃ sarvayajñaiḥ sudurlabham | | 51
yāni puṣpāṇi hṛdyāni dhūpagandhānulepanam |
dayitaṃ bhūṣaṇaṃ yacca tathā rakte ca vāsasī | | 52
yāni cābhyavahāryāṇi bhakṣyāṇi ca phalāni ca |
prayaccha tāni mārtaṇḍa bhavethāścaiva tanmanāḥ | | 53
ādyaṃ taṃ yajñapuruṣaṃ yathā bhaktyā prasādaya |
ārādhya yāti taṃ devaṃ yattadbrahma paraṃ smṛtam | | 54
puṇyaistīrthodakaiḥ puṣpairmadhunā sarpiṣā tathā |
kṣīreṇa snāpayeddevamacyutaṃ jagatāṃ patim | | 55
dadhikṣīrahradānpuṇyāṃstato lokānmadhucyutaḥ |
prayāsyasi yaduśreṣṭha nirvṛtiṃ cāpi aiśvarīm | | 56
stotrairhadyairyathā vādyairbrāhmaṇānāṃ ca tarpaṇaiḥ |
manasaścaikatāyogādārādhaya divākaram | | 57
ārādhyaṃ taṃ mahādevo mahacchabdamavāptavān | | 58
ahaṃ cāpi samastānāṃ lokānāṃ sṛṣṭikārakaḥ |
tamārādhya vivasvantaṃ tatprasādājjanārdana | | 59
tvamapyetaṃ hṛṣīkeśa tatprasādānna saṃśayaḥ |
samartho devaśatrūṇāṃ daityānāṃ nāśane sadā | | 1.120.60
dakṣiṇaḥ kiraṇastasya yo devasya vivasvataḥ |
ahaṃ tasmātsamutpanno vedavedāṅgasammitaḥ | | 61
vāmo yaḥ kiraṇaḥ kṛṣṇa raśmimālākulaḥ sadā |
tasmādīśaḥ samutpannaḥ pārvatīdayito.acyuta | | 62
vakṣasastvaṃ samutpannaḥ śaṃkhacakragadādharaḥ |
tathāmbujakarā devī ambujānanavallabhā | | 63
samārādhya balaṃ kīrtiṃ śriyaṃ cāvāptavānaham |
tathā ttvamapi rājendra tamārādhya divākaram | |
yānyānicchasi kāmāṃstvaṃ tāṃstānsarvānavāpsyasi | | 64
ya idaṃ śṛṇuyānnityaṃ saṃvādaṃ vidhikṛṣṇayoḥ |
so.api kāmānavāpyāgryāṃstato lokamavāpnuyāt | | 65
gairikaṃ yānamārūḍho yuktaṃ kuñjaravājibhiḥ |
tejasāmbujasaṃkāśaḥ prabhayāṇḍaja sannibhaḥ | | 66
kāntyā caṃdrasamo rājanvṛndārakagaṇairvṛtaḥ |
gandharvairgīyamānastu tathā cāpsarasāṃ gaṇaiḥ | | 67
iti śrībhaviṣye mahāpurāṇe brāhme parvaṇi saptamīkalpe ādityapūjāvarṇanaṃ nāma
viṃśatyadhikaśatatamo.adhyāyaḥ | 120 |

athaikaviṃśatyadhikaśatatamo.adhyāyaḥ
viśvakarmakṛtasūryatejaḥ śātanavarṇanam
śatānīka uvāca
śarīralekhanaṃ bhānoruktaṃ saṃkṣepatastvayā |
vistarācchrotumicchāmi tanmamācakṣva suvrata | | 1
sumanturuvāca
piturgṛhaṃ tu yātāyāṃ saṃjñāyāṃ kurunaṃdana |
bhāskaraściṃtayāmāsa saṃjñā madrūpakāriṇī | | 2
etasminnaṃtare brahmā tatrāgatya divākaram |
avravīnmadhurāṃ vācaṃ raveḥ prītikarāṃ śubhām | | 3
ādidevo.asi devānāṃ vyāptametattvayā jagat |
śvaśuro viśvakarmā te rūpaṃ nirvartayiṣyati | | 4
evamuktvā raviṃ brahmā viśvakarmāṇamabravīt |
nivartasya mārtaṇḍaṃ svarūpaṃ tatsuśobhanam | | 5
tato brahmasamādeśādbhra(bhū?)mimāropya bhāskaram |
rūpaṃ nirvartayāmāsa viśvakarmā śanaiḥśanaiḥ | | 6
tatastuṣṭāva taṃ brahmā sarvadevagaṇaiḥ saha |
guhyairnānāvidhaiḥ stotrairvedavedāṅgapāragaiḥ | | 7
svasti te.astu jagannātha dharmavarṣahimākara |
śāṃtiste sarvalokānāṃ devadeva divākara | | 8
tato rudraśca viṣṇvādyāḥ stuvaṃtastaṃ divākaram |
tejaste vardhatāṃ deva likhyate.api divaspate | | 9
indraścāgatya taṃ devaṃ likhyamānamathāstuvat |
jaya deva jayasveti tattvado.asi jagatpate || 1.121.10
ṛṣayastu tataḥ sapta viśvāmitrapurogamāḥ |
tuṣṭuvurvividhaiḥ stotraiḥ svastisvastītivādinaḥ || 11
vedoktābhirathāśīrbhirvālakhilyāśca tuṣṭuvuḥ |
tvaṃ nātha mokṣiṇāṃ mokṣo dhyeyastvaṃ dhyānināmapi || 12
tvaṃ gatiḥ sarvabhūtānāṃ tvayi sarvaṃ pratiṣṭhitam |
prajābhyaścaiva deveśa śaṃ no.astu jagataḥ pate || 13
tvatto bhavati vai nityaṃ jagatsaṃlīyate tvayi |
tvamekastvaṃ dvidhā caiva tridhā ca tvaṃ na saṃśayaḥ || 14
tvayaikena jagatsṛṣṭaṃ tvayaikena prabodhitam |
tato vidyādharagaṇā yakṣarākṣasapannagāḥ || 15
kṛtāñjalipuṭāḥ sarve śirobhiḥ praṇatā ravim |
ūcurevaṃvidhā vāco manaḥ śrotrasukhapradāḥ || 16
sahyaṃ bhavatu te tejo bhūtānāṃ bhūtabhāvana |
hāhā hūhūstataścaiva tumbururnāradastathā || 17
upagātuṃ samārabdhā gāmuccaiḥ kuśalā ravim |
ṣaḍjamadhyamagāṃdhāragrāmatrayaviśāradāḥ || 18
mūrcchanābhistataścaiva tathā dhaivatapañcamaiḥ |
nānānubhāvamandraiśca ardhamandraistathaiva ca || 19
trisādhanaiḥ prakāraistu vādyatālasamanvitaiḥ |
viśvācī ca ghṛtācī ca urvaśī ca tilottamā ||1.121.20
menakā sahajanyā ca rambhā cāpsarasāṃ varā |
hāvabhāvavilāsaiśca kurvatyo.abhinayānbahūn ||2 1
tato.atīva kalaṃ geyaṃ madhuraṃ ca pravartate |
sarveṣāṃ devasaṃghānāṃ manaḥ śrotrasukhapradam ||22
pravādyaṃ tu tatastatra vīṇāvaṃśādi suvrata |
paṇavāḥ puṣkarāścaiva mṛdaṅgāḥ paṭahāstathā | | 23
devadundubhayaḥ śaṃkhāḥ śataśo.atha sahasraśaḥ |
gāyadbhiścaiva gandharvairnṛtyadbhiścāpsarogaṇaiḥ | | 24
tūryavāditraghoṣaiśca sarvaṃ kolāhalīkṛtam |
tataḥ kṛtaiḥ karapuṭaiḥ padyakuḍmalasannibhaiḥ | | 25
lalāṭopari vinyastaiḥ praṇemuḥ sarvadevatāḥ |
tataḥ kolāhale tasminsarvadevasamāgame | | 26
tejasaḥ śātanaṃ cakre viśvakarmā śanaiḥ śanaiḥ | | 27
iti himajalagharmakālahetorharakamalāsanaviṣṇusaṃstutasya |
tadupari likhanaṃ niśamya bhānorvrajati divākaralokamāyuṣonte | | 28
iti śrībhaviṣye mahāpurāṇe brāhme parvaṇi saptamīkalpe viśvakarmakṛtasūryatejaḥ śātanaṃ
nāmaikaviṃśottaraśatatamo.adhyāyaḥ | 121 |
atha dvāviṃśatyadhikaśatatamo.adhyāyaḥ
ādityastavavarṇanam
śatānīka uvāca
tasminkāle samārūḍho likhyamāno divaspatiḥ |
brahmādibhiḥ stuto devairyathā vai tadvadasva me | | 1
sumanturuvāca
śṛṇuṣvaikamanā rājanyathā devo divaspatiḥ |
brahmādibhiḥ stuto devairṛṣibhiśca purā.anagha | | 2
prayatnataḥ praṇatahitānukampine svarūpato lokavibhāvine namaḥ |
divaspate kamalakulāvabodhine namastamaḥ paṭasapaṭāvapāyine | | 3
pāvanātiśayapuṇyakarmaṇe naikakāmavibhavapradāyine |
bhāsurāmalamayūkhamāline sarvalokahitakāriṇe namaḥ | | 4
ajāya lokatrayabhāvanāya bhūtātmane gopataye priyāya |
namo mahākāruṇikottamāya sūryāya lokatrayabhāvanāya | | 5
vivasvate jñānakṛtāntarātmane jagatpratiṣṭhāya jagaddhitaiṣiṇe |
svayambhuve lokasamastacakṣuṣe surottamāyāmitatejase namaḥ | | 6
nijodayāya suragaṇamaulimaṇe jagatā tvaṃ mahitastvamurumayūkhasahasratapāḥ |
jagati vibho vatamasatuda vanatimirāsavapāvana madādbhavati vilohitavigrahatātimiravināśinamugraṃ sutarāṃ tribhuvanabhāprakaraiḥ | | 7
rathāmāruhya samāmayaṃ bhramasi sadā jagato hitadaḥ | | 8
ityevaṃ saṃstuto devo bhāskaro vedhasā purā |
daivataiśca mahābāho śivaviṣṇvādibhirnṛpa | | 9
iti śrībhaviṣye mahāpurāṇe brāhme parvaṇi saptamīkalpe ādityastavo
nāma dvāviṃśatyadhikaśatatamo.adhyāyaḥ | 122 |
atha trayoviṃśatyadhikaśatatamo.adhyāyaḥ
parilekhavarṇanam
śatānīka uvāca
bhūyo.api kathayasvemāṃ kathāṃ sūryasamāśritām |
na tṛptimadhigacchāmi śṛṇvannetāṃ kathāṃ mune | | 1
sumanturuvācaṃ
bhāskarasya kathāṃ puṇyāṃ sarvapāpapraṇāśinīm |
vakṣyāmi kathitāṃ pūrvaṃ brahmaṇā lokakartṛṇā | | 2
ṛṣayaḥ paripṛcchanti brahmaloke pitāmaham |
tāpitāḥ sūryakiraṇaistejasā sampramohitāḥ | | 3
ṛṣaya ūcuḥ
ko.ayaṃ dīpto mahātejā havīrāśisamaprabhaḥ |
etadveditumicchāmaḥ prabhāvo.asya kutaḥ prabho | | 4
brahmovāca
tamobhūteṣu lokeṣu naṣṭe sthāvarajaṅgame |
pravṛtte guṇahetutve pūrvaṃ buddhirajāyata | | 5
ahaṃkārastato jāto mahābhūtapravartakaḥ |
vāyvagnirāpaḥ khaṃ bhūmistatastvaṇḍamajāyata | | 6
tasminnaṇḍa ime lokāḥ sapta vai saṃpratiṣṭhitāḥ |
pṛthvī ca saptabhirdvīpaiḥ samudraiścāpi saptabhiḥ | | 7
tatraivāvasthito hyāsamahaṃ viṣṇurmaheśvaraḥ |
pramūḍhāstamasā sarve pradhyātā īśvaraṃ param | | 8
tato bhidya mahātejaḥ prādurbhūtaṃ tamonudam |
dhyānayogena cāsmābhirvijñātaṃ savitustathā | | 9
jñātvā ca paramātmānaṃ sarva eva pṛthakpṛthak |
divyābhiḥ stutibhirdevaṃ saṃstotumupacakramuḥ | | 1.123.10
ādidevo.asi devānāmīśvarāṇāṃ tvamīśvaraḥ |
ādikartāsi bhūtānāṃ devadeva sanātana | | 11
jīvanaṃ sarvasattvānāṃ devagandharvarakṣasām |
munikinnarasiddhānāṃ tathaivoragapakṣiṇām | | 12
tvaṃ brahmā tvaṃ mahādevastvaṃ viṣṇustvaṃ prajāpatiḥ |
vāyurindraśca somaśca vivasvānvaruṇastathā | | 13
tvaṃ kālaḥ sṛṣṭikartā ca hartā trātā prabhustathā |
saritaḥ sāgarāḥ śailā vidyudindradhanūṃṣi ca | |
pralayaḥ prabhavaścaiva vyaktāvyaktaḥ sanātanaḥ | | 14
īśvarātparato vidyā vidyāyāḥ parataḥ śivaḥ |
śivātparataro devastvameva parameśvara | | 15
sarvataḥ pāṇipādastvaṃ sarvato.akṣiśiromukhaḥ |
sahasrāṃśustvaṃ tu deva sahasrakiraṇastathā | | 16
bhūrādibhūrbhuvaḥ svaśca maharjanastapastathā |
durnirīkṣyaṃ surendrāṇāṃ yadrūpaṃ tasya te namaḥ || 17
surasiddhagaṇairjuṣṭaṃ bhṛgvatripulahādibhiḥ |
śubhaṃ paramamavyagraṃ yadrūpaṃ tasya te namaḥ || 18
pañcātītasthitaṃ tadvai daśaikādaśa eva ca |
ardhamāsamatikramya sthitaṃ tatsūryamaṇḍale ||
tasmai rūpāya te deva praṇatāḥ sarvadevatāḥ || 19
viśvakṛdviśvabhūtaṃ ca viśvānarasurārcitam |
viśvasthitamaciṃtyaṃ ca yadrūpaṃ tasya te namaḥ ||1.123.20
paraṃ yajñāt paraṃ devātparaṃ lokātparaṃ divaḥ |
duratikrameti yaḥ khyātastasmādapi paraṃ parāt ||
paramātmeti vikhyātaṃ yadrūpaṃ tasya te namaḥ ||2 1
avijñeyamacityaṃ ca adhyātmagatamavyayam |
anādinidhanaṃ devaṃ yadrūpaṃ tasya te namaḥ ||22
namonamaḥ kāraṇakāraṇāya namonamaḥ pāpavināśanāya |
namonamo vaṃditavaṃdanāya namonamo rogavināśanāya ||2 3
namonamaḥ sarvavarapradāya namonamaḥ sarvabalapradāya |
namonamo jñānanidhe sadaiva namonamaḥ pañcadaśātmakāya ||24
stutaḥ sa bhagavānevaṃ tejasāṃ rūpamāsthitaḥ |
uvāca vācaṃ kalyāṇīṃ ko varo vaḥ pradīyatām ||25
tavātitejasā rūpaṃ na kaścitsahate vibho |
sahanīyaṃ bhavatvetaddhitāya jagataḥ prabho ||26
evamastviti gāmuktvā bhagavānsarvakṛtsvayam |
lokānāṃ kāryasiddhyarthaṃ gharmavarṣāhimapradaḥ | | 27
ataḥ sāṃkhyāśca yogāśca ye cānye mokṣakāṃkṣiṇaḥ |
dhyāyanti dhyānino nityaṃ hadayasthaṃ divākaram | | 28
sarvalakṣaṇahīno.api yukto vā sarvapātakaiḥ |
sarvaṃ tarati vai pāpaṃ devakarmasamāśritaḥ | | 29

agnihotraṃ ca vedāśca yajñāśca bahudakṣiṇāḥ |
bhānorbhaktyā namaskārakalāṃ nārhanti ṣoḍaśīm | | 1.123.30

tīrthānāṃ paramaṃ tīrthaṃ maṅgalānāṃ ca maṅgalam |
pavitraṃ ca pavitrāṇāṃ taṃ prapadye divākaram | | 31

brahmādyaiḥ saṃstutaṃ devairye prapadyanti 1 bhāskaram |
nirmuktāḥ kilbiṣaiḥ sarvaiste yānti ravimandiram | | 32

upacaryādibhiḥ sādhyo yathā vede divaspatiḥ |
lokānāmiha sarveṣāṃ tathā devo divākaraḥ | | 33
śatānīka uvāca
śarīralekhanaṃ sūrye kathaṃ vai pratipāditam |
devaiḥ saṛṣibhirvāpi tanmamācakṣva suvrata | | 34

sumanturuvāca
brahmaloke sukhāsīnaṃ brahmāṇaṃ te surāsurāḥ |
ṛṣayaḥ samupāgamya idamūcuḥ samāhitāḥ | | 35

bhagavandevatāputro ya eṣa divi rājate |
tenāndhakāro nikṛttaḥ so.ayaṃ jājvalitīti hi | | 36
asya tejobhirakhilaṃ jagatsthāvarajaṃgamam |
nāśamāyāti deveśa yathā kliṣṭaṃ nadītaṭam | | 37
vayaṃ ca pīḍitā sarve tejasā tasya mohitāḥ |
padmaścāyaṃ yathā mlāno yoyaṃ yonistava prabho | | 38

divi bhuvyantarikṣe ca śarma nopalabhāmahe |
tathā kuru surajyeṣṭha yathā tejaḥ praśāmyati | | 39

evamuktaḥ sa bhagavānpadmayoniḥ prajāpatiḥ |
uvāca bhagavānbrahmā devānviṣṇupurogamān | | 1.123.40

mahādevena sahitā indreṇa ca mahātmanā |
tameva śaraṇaṃ devaṃ gacchāmaḥ sahitā vayam | | 41

tataste sahitāḥ sarve brahmaviṣṇvādayaḥ surāḥ |
gatvā te śaraṇaṃ sarve bhāskaraṃ lokabhāskaram | | 42

stotuṃ pracakramuḥ sarve bhaktinamrā samantataḥ |
keśādidevatāḥ sarvā bhaktibhāvasamanvitāḥ | | 43

brahmaviṣṇvīśā ūcuḥ
namonamaḥ suravara tigmatejase namonamaḥ suravara saṃstutāya vai |
jaḍāndhamūkānbadhirānsakuṣṭhānsaśvitriṇoṃ.adhānvividhavraṇāvṛtān | |
karoṣi tāneva punarnavāntsadā ato mahākāruṇikāya te namaḥ | | 44
yadaudaraṃ jyotiratitvaranmahadyadalpatejo yadapīha cakṣuṣām |
yadatra yajñeṣvapanītamāhitaṃ tavaiva tadūpamanekataḥ sthitam | | 45
suradviṣaḥ sāgaratoyavāsinaḥ pracaṇḍapāśāsiparaśvadhāyudhāḥ |
samucchritāste bhuvi pāpacetasaḥ prayāṃti nāśaṃ tava deva darśanāt | | 46
yato bhavāṃstīrthaphalaṃ samastaṃ yajñeṣu nityaṃ bhagavānavasthitaḥ |
namo bhavannatra vicāraṇāsti sadā samaḥ śāṃtikaro narāṇām | |
yaccāpi loke tapa ucyate budhaistatte mahāteja uśaṃti paṇḍitāḥ | |47
stutaḥ sa bhagavānevaṃ prajāpatimukhaiḥ suraiḥ |
avadhānaṃ tataścakre śravaṇābhyāṃ mahīpate | |48
stuvanti te tato bhūyaḥ śivaviṣṇupurogamāḥ |
kṛtvā māṃ purataḥ sarve bhaktinamrāḥ samantataḥ | |49
namonamastribhuvanabhūtidāyine kratukriyāsatphalasampradāyine |
namonamaḥ pratidinakarmasākṣiṇe sahasrasaṃdīdhitaye namonamaḥ | | 1.123.50
prasaktasaptāśvayuje kṣayāya dhruvaikaraśmigrathine namonamaḥ |
savālakhilyāpsarakinnaroragaiḥ saṃsiddhagandharvapiśācamānuṣaiḥ | |
sayakṣarakṣogaṇaguhyakottamaiḥ stutaḥ sadā deva namonamaste | | 51
yato rasānsaṃkṣipase śarīriṇāṃ gabhastibhirhimajalagharmanisravaiḥ |
jagacca saṃśoṣayase sadaiva atosi loke jagato viśoṣaṇam | | 52
brahmovāca
jñātvā teṣāmabhiprāyamuvāca bhagavānvacaḥ |
labdhvānujñāṃ tataḥ sarve surāḥ saṃhṛṣṭacetasaḥ | | 53
tvaṣṭāraṃ pūjayāmāsurmanovākkāyakarmabhiḥ |
viśvakarmā tavādeśātkarotu tava saumyatām | | 54
tatastu tejaso rāśiṃ sarvakarmavidhānavit |
bhramimāropayāmāsa viśvakarmā vibhāvasum | | 55
amṛtenābhiṣiktasya tadā sūryasya vai vibhoḥ |
tejasaḥ śātanaṃ cakre viśvakarmā śanaiḥ śanaiḥ | | 56
ājānulikhitaścāsau samurāsurapūjitaḥ |
nābhyanandattato deva ullekhanamataḥ param | | 57
tataḥ prabhṛti devasya caraṇau nityasaṃvṛtau |
tāpayanglāpayaṃścaiva yuktatejo.abhavattadā | | 58
yaccāsya śātitaṃ tejastena cakraṃ vinirmitam |
yena viṣṇurjaghānogrānsadā vai daityadānavān | | 59
śūlaśaktigadāvajraśarāsanaparaśvadhān |
devatānāṃ dadau kṛtvā viśvakarmā mahāmatiḥ | | 1.123.60
tridevanirmitaṃ stotraṃ sandhyayorubhayorjapan |
kulaṃ punāti puruṣo vyādhibhirna ca pīḍyate | | 61
prajāvānsiddhakarmā ca jīvetsāgraṃ śaracchatam |
putravāndhanavāṃścaiva sarvatra cāparājitaḥ | |
hitvā puraṃ bhūtamayaṃ gacchetsṛryamayaṃ puram | | 62
bhūyo.api tuṣṭuvurdevāstathā devarṣayo ravim |
vāgbhiritthamaśeṣasya trailokyasya samāgatāḥ | | 63
devā ūcuḥ
namaste ravirūpāya somarūpāya te namaḥ |
namo yajuḥ svarūpāyātharvāyāṅgirase namaḥ | | 64
jñānaikadhāmabhūtāya nirdhūtatamase namaḥ |
śuddhajyotiḥsvarūpāya nistattvāyāmalātmane | | 65
namo.akhilajagadvyāptisvarūpāyātmamūrtaye ||
sarvakāraṇabhūtāya niṣṭhāyai jñānacetasām||66||
namo.astu jñeyarūpāya prakāśe lakṣarūpiṇe ||
bhāskarāya namastubhyaṃ tathā śabdakṛte namaḥ || 67 ||
saṃsārahetave caiva saṃdhyājyotsnākṛte namaḥ ||
tvaṃ sarvametadbhagavāñjagadvai bhramati tvayā || 68 ||
bhramatvāviddhamakhilaṃ brahmāṇḍaṃ sacarācaram ||
tvadaṃśubhiridaṃ sarvaṃ saṃsṛṣṭaṃ jāyate śuci || 69 ||
kriyate tvatkarasparśājjalādīnāṃ pavitratā ||
homadānādiko dharmo nopakārāya jāyate || 1.123.70 ||
tāvadyāvanna saṃyogī jagatyatra bhavāñchuciḥ ||
prātarhomaṃ praśastaṃ hi udite tvayi jāyate || 71 ||
ṛco.atha sakalā hyetā yajūṃṣi tvaṃ jagatpate ||
sakalāni ca sāmāni tapatyevaṃ jagatsadā || 72 ||
ṛṅmayastvaṃ jagannātha tvameva ca yajurmayaḥ ||
tathā sāmamayaścaiva tato nātha trayīmayaḥ || 73 ||
tvameva brahmaṇo rūpaṃ paraṃ cāparameva ca ||
mūrto.amūrtastathā sūkṣmaḥ sdhūlarūpatayā sthitaḥ || 74 ||
nimeṣakāṣṭhādimayaḥ kālarūpaḥ kṣayātmakaḥ ||
prasīda svecchayā rūpaṃ svatejomayamādiśa || 75 ||
itthaṃ saṃstūyamānastu devairdevarṣibhistathā ||
mumoca svaṃ tadā tejastejasāṃ rāśiravyayaḥ||76||
yattasya ṛṅmayaṃ tejo bhavitā tena medinī ||
yajurmayenāpi divaṃ svayaṃ sāmamayo raviḥ||77||
śātitāstejaso bhāgā ye ca syurdaśa paṃca ca||
tasyaiva tena śarvasya kṛtaṃ śūlaṃ mahātmanā|| 78||
cakraṃ viṣṇorvasūnāṃ ca śaṃkarasya ca dāruṇam||
ṣaṇmukhasya tathā śaktiḥ śibikā dhanadasya ca||79||
anyeṣāṃ cāsurārīṇāṃ śastrāṇyugrāṇi yāni vai||
yakṣavidyādharāṇāṃ ca tāni cakre sa viśvakṛt||1.123.80||
tataśca ṣoḍaśaṃ bhāgaṃ bibharti bhagavānraviḥ||
tattejasaḥ paṃcadaśa śātitā viśvakarmaṇā|| 81||
tataḥ surūpadṛgbhānuruttarānagamatkurūn||
dadarśa tatra saṃjñāṃ ca vaḍavārūpadhāriṇīm||82||
ityetannikhilaṃ bhānoḥ kathitaṃ munisattamāḥ||
śṛṇuyādyo naro bhaktyā aśvamedhaphalaṃ labhet||83||
iti śrībhaviṣye mahāpurāṇe brāhme parvaṇi saptamīkalpe brahmarṣisaṃvāde parilekhavarṇanaṃ nāma trayoviṃśatyuttaraśatatamo.adhyāyaḥ||123||cha||

brahmovāca||
vakṣyāmyahaṃ te punareva diṃḍe sūryasya sarvapravarapradhānam||
vyomnaḥ paraṃ tiṣṭhati yastu magnaḥ sa mucyate rudra ihāpi diṃḍī||1||
sthitvā purā brahmaśiraḥ kilāsau pragṛhya tattasya śiraḥkapālam||
tato hyasāvāśramamuttamaṃ śivo bahūdakaiḥ puṣpaphalaiḥ samṛddham || 2 ||
nagno yadā dāruvane munīnāṃ dṛṣṭvā ca taṃ bhaikṣyacaraṃ sureśam ||
yoṣitsutāḥ saṃkṣubhitāstu sarve jagmurharaṃ taṃ munayaḥ sutuṣṭāḥ || ||
sa hanyamāno munimukhyasaṃghairgṛhītaloṣṭairṛṣidaṃḍakāṣṭhaiḥ ||
vihāya diṃḍiḥ sa tu tānsurarṣīṃstato raverlokamathājagāma || 4 ||
āgacchamānaṃ pramathāstamūcurdeveśa nityaṃ bhramase kimartham ||
sa prāha tānpāpavimocanārthamaṭāmi tīrthāni surālayāṃśca || 5 ||
te bhūya ūcuḥ pramathāstamevamatraiva tiṣṭhasva raveḥ purastāt ||
śuddhiṃ tavaiṣa prakariṣyatīti śuddhastato yāsyasi rudralokam || 6 ||
ityevamuktaḥ pramathaistu rudrastatraiva tasthau ravitoṣaṇāya ||
nagno jaṭī muṣṭikapālapāṇī rūpeṇa caivāpratimastriloke || 7 ||
uktaḥ sa tuṣṭena tataḥ savitrā prītosmi devāgamanāttavāham ||
maddarśanādeva bhavānviśuddho diṃḍīti nāmnā bhavitāsi loke || 8 ||
aṣṭādaśaite pramathāstu bhānoścaturdaśānye tu rave rathasthāḥ ||
he devate dvau ca ṛṣipradhānau gaṃdharvasarpāvapi tāvadeva || 9 ||
yakṣau ca siddhau ca niśācarau cādityātmajāvapsarasāṃ pradhānau ||
vasaṃti te hyastamuṣaśca sūrye teṣāma śītiścaturottarā sā || 1.124.10 || ityādidevapravarāstu sarve dhātvarthaśabdaiśca bhavaṃti siddhāḥ || 11 ||
|| ṛṣaya ūcuḥ || ||
vistarādbrūhi me brahmanpravarāndhātuśabdajān ||
yataśca kautukaṃ brahmannasmākamiha jāyate || 12 ||
brahmovāca || ||
bhūyastava pravakṣyāmi daṃḍanāyakapiṃgalau ||
rājñasrauṣādayaścānye digdevā diṃḍinā saha || 13 ||
mayā saha samāgamya purā devairvicāritam ||
eṣa kāruṇikaḥ sūryo yudhyate dānavaiḥ saha || 14 ||
te tu labdhavarā bhūtvā amātyādyā hyabhīkṣṇaśaḥ ||
ādityaṃ manyamānāste tapaṃtaṃ haṃtumudyatāḥ || 15 ||
tasmātteṣāṃ vighātārthaṃ pravarāśca bhavāmahe ||
asmābhiḥ pratiruddhāste na drakṣyaṃti divākaram || 16 ||
saṃmaṃtryaivaṃ tataḥ skaṃdo vāmapārśve raveḥ sthitaḥ ||
daṃḍanāyakasaṃjñastu sarvalokasya sa prabhuḥ || || 17 ||
uktaśca sa tadārkeṇa tvaṃ prajādaṃḍanāyakaḥ ||
daṃḍanītikaro yasmāttasmāttvaṃ daṃḍanāyakaḥ || 18 ||
likhate yaḥ prajānāṃ ca sukṛtaṃ yacca duṣkṛtam ||
agnirdakṣiṇapārśve tu piṃgalatvātsa piṃgalaḥ || 19 ||
āśvinau cāpi sūryasya pārśvayorubhayoḥ sthitau ||
aśvarūpātsamupannau tena tāvaśvinau surau || 1.124.20 ||
dvārapālau smṛtau tasya rājñaḥ śreṣṭhau mahābalau ||
kārttikeyaḥ smṛto rājñaḥ śreṣṭhaścāpi haraḥ smṛtaḥ || 21 ||
rājṛdīptau smṛto dhāturnakārastasya pratyayaḥ ||
surasenāpatitvena sa yasmāddīpyate sadā ||
tasmātsa kārtikeyastu nāmnā rājña iti smṛtaḥ || 22 ||
sugatau ca smṛto dhāturyasya sa pratyayaḥ smṛtaḥ ||
gacchatīti rahastasmātparyāyātsrauṣa ucyate || 23 ||
prathamaṃ yadbhaveddvāraṃ dharmārthābhyāṃ samāśritam ||
tatraitau saṃsthitau devau lokapūjyau dvijottamāḥ || 24 ||
dvitīyāyāṃ tu kakṣāyāmapradhṛṣṭau vyavasthitau ||
pakṣipretādhipau nāmnā smṛtau kalmāṣapakṣiṇau || 25 ||
varṇasya śabalatvācca yamaḥ kalmāṣa ucyate ||
pakṣāvasyeti yaḥ pakṣī garuḍaḥ parikīrtitaḥ || 26 ||
sthito dakṣiṇata tasya daṃḍahastasamanvitaḥ ||
uttareṇa sthito.arkasya kuberaśca vināyakaḥ || 27 ||
kubero dhanado jñeyo hastirūpo vināyakaḥ ||
kutsayā kupyatā śaptaṃ kuśarīramajāyata ||
kuberaḥ kuśarīratvātsa nāmnā dhanadaḥ smṛtaḥ || 28 ||
nāyakaḥ sarvasattvānāṃ tena nāyaka ucyate ||
vividhaṃ nayate yasmātsa tu tasmādvināyakaḥ || 29 ||
raivataścaiva diṃḍiśca tau raveḥ pūrvataḥ sthitau ||
tato diṃḍiḥ smṛto rudro revatastanayo raveḥ || 1.124.30 ||
plutaṃ gacchatyasau yasmātsarvalokanamaskṛtaḥ ||
revṛplavagatau dhātū revatastena sa smṛtaḥ ||31||
ḍīṅgatāvasya vai dhātordiṃḍiśabdo nipātyate ||
ḍayate.asau sadā diṃḍī tena diṃḍī prakīrtitaḥ || 32 ||
ityete pravarāḥ proktā dhātvarthā naigamaiḥ śubhaiḥ ||
eṣāṃ saṃkṣepato bhūyaḥ saṃkhyāṃ vo nigadāmi vai || 33 ||
aśvinau tau tato jñeyau daṃḍanāyakapiṃgalau ||
tau sūryadvārapau jñeyau rājñasrauṣau tataḥ smṛtau || 34 ||
revataścaiva diṃḍiśca ityete pravarā mayā ||
aṣṭādaśa samā khyātāḥ saṃkṣepātsaṃkhyayā mayā || 35 ||
ityebhirnāmabhistvanye dānavānāṃ jighāṃsayā ||
parivārya sthitāḥ sūryaṃ nānāpraharaṇāyudhāḥ || 36 ||
sarūpāścānyarūpāśca virūpāḥ kāmarūpiṇaḥ ||
parivārya sthitāḥ sūryaṃ garuḍaśca mahābalaḥ || 37 ||
dhāturdiviti vai prokto krīḍāyāṃ sa tu ucyate ||
krīḍaṃte divi vai yasmāttasmātte daivatāḥ smṛtāḥ || 38 ||
ṛco yajūṃṣi sāmāni yānyuktānīha vai mayā ||
nānārūpaiḥ sthitānyeva ravestāni sama ntataḥ || 39 ||
|| sumaṃturuvāca || ||
ityevamuktavānbrahmā ṛṣīṇāṃ pṛcchatāṃ purā ||
te śrutvārādhya deveśaṃ saṃsiddhā divi saṃsthitāḥ || 1.124.40 ||
iti śrībhaviṣye mahāpurāṇe brāhme parvaṇi saptamīkalpe brahmarṣisaṃvāde pravaravarṇanaṃ nāma caturviṃśatyuttaraśatatamo.adhyāyaḥ || 124 || || cha || ||

|| śatānīka uvāca || ||
yadetaddṛśyate vyoma sūryasya purato dvija ||
taducyate kimātmā ca kathaṃbhūtaśca kathyatām || 1 ||
|| sumaṃturuvāca || ||
haṃta vyoma pravakṣyāmi sūryapraharaṇaṃ śubham ||
yadātmakaṃ hi yatproktaṃ yathā vasaṃti devatāḥ || 2 ||
purastācca catuḥśṛṃgaṃ tadvyomāyatanaṃ raveḥ ||
vyomaśabdaṃ catuḥśṛṃgaṃ sarvadevamayaṃ ca yat || 3 ||
gairikārṇavasaṃbhūtaṃ yadaṃtargarbhamāśritam ||
tatrotpannamidaṃ vyoma kalervyoma mahī smṛtā || 4 ||
varuṇasya yathā pāśo huṅkāro vedhaso yathā ||
viṣṇoścāpi yathā cakraṃ triśūlaṃ tryaṃbakasya ca ||5||
indrasya ca yathā vajraṃ tathā vyoma raveḥ smṛtam ||
tasminvyomni trayastriṃśatkrīḍanto yajñiyāḥ surāḥ || 6 ||
haraśca varṣaśuddhaśca tryaṃbakaścāparājitaḥ ||
vṛṣākapiśca śaṃbhuśca kapardī raivatastathā ||
īśvaro bhuvanaścaite rudrā ekādaśa smṛtāḥ || 7 ||
ādityānāṃ ca nāmāni viṣṇoścakrasya dīyatām ||
aryamā ca tathā mitro bhago.atha varuṇastathā || 8 ||
vivasvāntsavitā caiva pūṣā tvaṣṭā tathaiva ca ||
aṃśo bhagaścātitejā ādityā dvādaśa smṛtāḥ || 9 ||
dhruvo dharaśca somaśca āpaścaivā.anilo.analaḥ |
pratyūṣaśca prabhātaśca vasavo.aṣṭau prakīrtitāḥ | | 1.125.10
nāsatyaścaiva dasraśca smṛtau dvāvaśvināvubhau |
viśvedevānpravakṣyāmi nāmatastānnibodhata | | 11
kraturdakṣo vasuḥ satyaḥ kālakāmau dhṛtiḥ kuruḥ |
śaṅkumātro vāmanaśca viśvedevā daśa smṛtāḥ | | 12
vartamānā ime devā bhaviṣyānantare śṛṇu |
yamaśca tuṣitāścaiva vasavo vaśavartinaḥ | | 13
satyāśca bhūtarajasaḥ sādhyāśca tadanantarā |
ṣaṭsu manvantareṣvevaṃ devā dvādaśadvādaśa | |
pārāvatāstathā cānye te hyāsaṃstuṣitaiḥ saha | | 14
sādhyāndevānpravakṣyāmi nāmatastānnibodha me |
mano.anumantā prāṇaśca naro nārāyaṇastathā | | 15
vṛttilambo manuścaiva samo dharmaśca vīryavān |
vittasvāmī prabhuścaiva sādhyā dvādaśa kīrtitāḥ | | 16
ete yajñabhujo devāḥ sarvalokeṣu pūjitāḥ |
ādityāmeva te dhīra kaśyapasyātmajāḥ smṛtāḥ | | 17
viśve ca vasavaḥ sādhyā vijñeyā dharmasūnavaḥ |
evaṃ dharmasutaḥ somastṛtīyo vasuriṣyate | | 18
dharmo.api brahmaṇaḥ putraḥ purāṇe niścayaṃ gataḥ |
atha cendrānvasūṃścaiva nāmabhiśca nibodha me | | 19
svāyambhuvo manuḥ pūrvaḥ tataḥ svārociṣaḥ smṛtaḥ |
uttamastāmasaścaiva raivataścākṣuṣastathā | | 1.125.20
ityete ṣaḍatikrāntāḥ saptamaḥ sāmprato manuḥ |
vaivasvateti vijñeyo bhaviṣyāḥ sapta cāpare | | 21
eṣāmādyorkasāvarṇirbrahmasāvarṇireva ca |
tasmācca bhavasāvarṇirdharmasāvarṇirityuta | | 22
pañcamo dakṣasāvarṇiḥ sāvarṇiḥ pañca kīrtitāḥ |
raucyo bhauvyaśca dvāvanyāvityete manavaḥ smṛtāḥ | | 23
indrastu viṣṇubhugjñeyo vidyutistadanantaram |
vibhuḥ prabhuścaiva śikhī tathaiva ca manojavaḥ | | 24
ojasvī sāmpratisvindro balirbhāvyastataḥ param |
adbhutastridivaścaiva daśamastvindra ucyate | | 25
susāttvikaśca kīrtiśca śatadhāmā divaspatiḥ |
iti bhūtā bhaviṣyāśca indrā jñeyāścaturdaśa | | 26
kaśyapo.atrirvaśiṣṭhaśca bharadvājaśca gautamaḥ |
viśvāmitro jamadagniḥ saptaite ṛṣayaḥ smṛtāḥ | | 27
ataḥ paraṃ pravakṣyāmi maruto.agniparigrahān |
pravahothāvahaścaiva udvahaḥ saṃvahastathā | | 28
vivaho nivahaścaiva parivāhastathaiva ca |
antarikṣacarā hyete pṛthaṅmārgavisāriṇaḥ | | 29
sūryo.agniśca śucirnāmnā vaidyutaḥ pāvakaḥ smṛtaḥ |
nirmanthaḥ pavamāno.agnistrayaḥ proktā imegnayaḥ | | 1.125.30
agnīnāṃ putrapautrāstu catvāriṃśattathaiva tu |
marutāmapi sarveṣāṃ vijñeyāḥ saptasaptakāḥ | | 31
ṛtuḥ saṃvatsaro.ahyagnirṛtavastasya jajñire |
ṛtuputrāśca vai pañca iti sargaḥ sanātanaḥ | | 32
saṃvatsarastu prathamo dvitīyaḥ parivatsaraḥ |
idvatsarastṛtīyastu caturthastvanuvatsaraḥ | | 33
pañcamo vatsarasteṣāmityevaṃ pañca te smṛtāḥ |
teṣu saṃvatsaro hyagniḥ sūryastu parivatsaraḥ | | 34
soma idvatsarasteṣāṃ vāyuścaivānuvatsaraḥ |
rudrastu vatsaro jñeyaḥ pañcaitā .a yugadevatāḥ | | 35
ārtavā pitaro jñeyā ye jātāḥ ṛtusūnavaḥ |
pitāmahāstu vijñeyāḥ pañcābdā brahmaṇaḥ sutāḥ | | 36
saumyā barhiṣadaścaiva agniṣvāttāśca ye trayaḥ |
ete vai pitarasteṣāṃ ye jīvatpitṛkā narāḥ | | 37
ādityaścaiva somaśca lohitāṅgo budhastathā |
bṛhaspatiśca śukraśca tathā helisutaśca yaḥ | | 38
uparāgaḥ śikhī cobhau navaite nu grahāḥ smṛtāḥ |
trailokyasya tvime nityaṃ bhāvābhāvanivedakāḥ | | 39
ādityaścaiva somaśca dvāvetau maṇḍalagrahau |
rāhuśchāyāgrahasteṣāṃ śeṣāstārā grahāḥ smṛtāḥ | |1.125.4 0
nakṣatrādhipatiḥ somo graharājo divākaraḥ |
paṭhyate cāgnirāditya udakaścandramāḥ smṛtaḥ | | 41
ādityaḥ paṭhyate brahmā viṣṇusteṣāṃ tu candramāḥ |
maheśvarastu vijñeyastṛtīyastārakagrahaḥ | | 42
kaśyapasya sutaḥ sūryaḥ somo dharmasutaḥ smṛtaḥ |
devāsuragurū dvau tu nāmatastau mahāgrahau | | 43
prajāpatisutāvetāvubhau śukrabṛhaspatī | budhaḥ
somātmajaḥ śrīmāñchanī ravisutaḥ smṛtaḥ | | 44
siṃhikāyāḥ suto rāhuḥ ketustu brahmaṇaḥ sutaḥ |
sarveṣāṃ ca grahāṇāṃ hi adhastāccarate raviḥ | | 45
tato dūraṃ smṛtaṃ tāvadvidhornakṣatramaṇḍalam |
nakṣatrebhyaḥ kujabudhau śvetāhvastadanantaram | | 46
tasmānmāheśvaraścorddhvaṃ dhiṣaṇastadanantaram |
kṛṣṇaścordhvaṃ tatastasmādatha citraśikhaṇḍijaḥ | | 47
eṣāmeva kramaḥ proktāścāsaktaṃ tridivaṃ dhruve |
ādityanilayo rāhuḥ kadācitsomamārgagaḥ | | 48
sūryamaṇḍalasaṃsthastu śikhī sarpati sarvadā |
navayojanasāhasro vistāro bhārgavasya tu | | 49
dviguṇaḥ sūryavistārādvistāraḥ śaninaḥ smṛtaḥ |
triguṇaṃ maṃḍalaṃ jñeyaṃ nākṣatraṃ vistarādvidhoḥ | | 1.125.50
nakṣatramaṇḍalāttatra pādahīno bṛhaspatiḥ |
bṛhaspateḥ pādahīnaḥ śukroṅgāraka eva hi | | 51
vistāro maṇḍalānāṃ tu pādahīnastayorbudhaḥ |
budhatulyāni ṛkṣāṇi sarvaṛkṣāṇi yāni tu | | 52
yojanānyardhamātrāṇi tebhyo hrasvaṃ na vidyate |
rāhuḥ sūryapramāṇaśca kadācitsomasannibhaḥ | | 53
nakṣatragrahamānastu ketustvaniyataḥ smṛtaḥ |
avijñātagatiścaiva cañcalatvannarādhipa | | 54
tathālakṣitarūpastu bahurūpadharo hi saḥ |
bhūrlokaḥ pṛthivī proktā antarikṣaṃ bhuvaḥ smṛtam | | 55
svarlokastridivaṃ jñeyaṃ śeṣādūrdhvaṃ yathākramam |
bhūpatistu sadā tvagnistenāsau bhūpatiḥ smṛtaḥ | | 56
vāyurnabhaspatistena tathā sūryo divaspatiḥ |
gandharvāpsarasaścaiva guhyakāḥ siddharākṣasāḥ | |57
bhūrlokavāsinaḥ sarve antarikṣacarāñchṛṇu |
marutaḥ saptamaskaṃdhe rudrāstatraiva cāśvinau | |58
ādityā vasavaḥ sarve tathaiva ca gavāṃ gaṇāḥ |
caturthe tu maharloke vasante kalpavāsinaḥ | |5 9
prajānāṃ patibhiḥ sarveḥ sahitāḥ kurunandana |
janaloke pañcame ca vasante bhūmidāḥ sadā | | 1.125.60
ṛtuḥ sanatkumārādyā vairājabhra tathāśrayāḥ |
satyastu saptame loke hyapunarmārgagāminām | | 61
brahmalokaḥ samākhyāto hyapratīghātalakṣaṇaḥ |
itihāsavido yatra krīḍante kurunandana | | 62
śṛṇvanti ca purāṇāni ye sadā bhīmanaṃdana |
mahītalātsahasrāṇāṃ śatādūrdhvaṃ divākaraḥ | | 63
śatayojanakoṭyastu bhūmerūrdhvaṃ dhruvaḥ sthitaḥ |
tato viṃśatilakṣastu trailokyotsedha ucyate | | 64
dviguṇaistu sahasraistu yojanānāṃ śateṣu ca |
lokāṃtaramatho caivaṃ dhruvādūrdhvaṃ vidhīyate | | 65
devadānavagandharvā yakṣarākṣasapannagāḥ |
bhūtā vidyādharāścaiva aṣṭau te devayonayaḥ | | 66
yasminvyomni tvime lokāḥ sapta vai sampratiṣṭhitāḥ |
marutaḥ pitaro hyete tasminnevāgnayo grahāḥ | | 67
yāstvapyetāḥ samākhyātā mayāṣṭau devayonayaḥ |
mūrtāścāmūrtayaścaiva sarvāstā vyomni saṃsthitāḥ | | 6 8
