evaṃvidhamidaṃ vyoma sarvavyomamayaṃ smṛtam |
sarvadevamayaṃ caiva sarvagrahamayaṃ tathā | | 69
tasmādyo hyarcayedvyoma tena sarve.arcitāḥ surāḥ |
tasmātsarvaprayatnena śubhārthī vyoma cārcayet | | 1.125.70
yastvarcate sadā vyoma bhaktyā śraddhāsamanvitaḥ |
vṛṣadhvajasado rājansa gacchennātra saṃśayaḥ | | 71
iti śrībhaviṣye mahāpurāṇe brāhme parvaṇi saptamīkalpe vyoma māhātmye bhuvanakośavarṇanaṃ nāma pañcaviṃśatyadhikaśatatamo.adhyāyaḥ | 125 |
atha ṣaḍaviṃśatyadhikaśatatamo.adhyāyaḥ
vyomamāhātmyavarṇanam
sumanturuvāca
ākāśaṃ khaṃ diśo vyoma antarikṣaṃ nabho.ambaram |
puṣkaraṃ gaganaṃ merurvipulaṃ ca bilaṃ tathā | | 1
āpochidraṃ tathā śūnyaṃ tamo vai rodasī tathā |
nāmānyetāni te vyomnaḥ kīrtitāni mahīpate | | 2
lavaṇakṣīradadhyamlaghṛtamadhvikṣavastathā |
svādūdakaśca saptaite samudrāḥ parikīrtitāḥ | | 3
himavānhemakūṭaśca niṣadho nīla eva ca |
śvetaśca śṛṅgavāṃścaiva ṣaḍete varṣaparvatāḥ | |4
madhyasaṃsthastathaiteṣāṃ mahārājataparvataḥ |
māhendrī cāpyathāgneyī yāmyā ca nairṛtī tathā | | 5
vāruṇī cātha vāyavyā saumyaiśānī tathaiva ca |
etāḥ puryastu devānāṃ tathopari samāśritāḥ | | 6
pṛthivyāṃ tu sthito vīra lokālokastu parvataḥ |
tataścaṇḍakapālaṃ tu tasmāttatparatastu yaḥ | | 7
tato.agnirvāyurākāśaṃ tato bhūtādirucyate |
tato mahānahaṅkāraḥ prakṛtiḥ puruṣastataḥ | | 8
puruṣādīśvaro śreya īśvareṇāvrṛtaṃ jagat |
īśvaro bhagavanbhānustenedaṃ pūritaṃ jagat | | 9
sahasrāṃśurmahātejāścaturbāhurmahābalaḥ |
ūrdhvamapyatha lokāstu prāṅmayā ye prakīrtitāḥ | | 1.126.10
bhūyastānsampravakṣyāmi aṇḍāvaraṇakārakān |
bhūrlokastubhuvarlokastṛtīyaḥ parikīrtitaḥ | | 11
maharjanastapaḥ satyaḥ saptalokāḥ prakīrtitāḥ |
tatastavaṃḍakapālaṃ tu tasmācca parastapaḥ | | 12
tato.agnirvāyurākāśaṃ tato bhūtādirucyate |
tato mahānpradhānaśca prakṛtipuruṣastataḥ | | 13
puruṣādīśvaro jñeya īśvareṇāvṛtaṃ jagat |
bhūmeradhastātsaptaiva lokānabhimatāñchṛṇu | | 14
talaṃ sutalapātāle talātalaṃ tathātalam |
vitalaṃ ca kuruśreṣṭha saptamaṃ ca rasātalam | | 15
tato.agnirvāyurākāśaṃ tato bhūtādirucyate |
tato mahānpradhānaśca prakṛtiḥ puruṣastataḥ | | 16
puruṣādīśvaro jñeya īśvareṇāvṛtaṃ jagat |
evaṃ meroḥ pramāṇaṃ tu sarvametatprakīrtitam | | 17
caturasraścatuḥ śṛṃgaḥ sa meruḥ kāñcanaḥ śubhaḥ |
pṛthivyāṃ saṃsthito madhye siddhagandharvasevitaḥ | | 18
caturbhiḥ kāñcanaiḥ śṛṃgairdivyairdivamivollikhan |
yojanānāṃ sahasrāṇi caturāśītirucchritaḥ | | 19
praviṣṭaḥ ṣoḍaśādhastādaṣṭaviṃśativistṛtaḥ |
vistārastriguṇaścāsya pariṇāhastataḥ smṛtaḥ | | 1.126.20
tasya saumanasaṃ nāma śṛṃgamekaṃ tu kāñcanam |
dvitīyaṃ padmarāgābhaṃ jyotiṣkaṃ nāma nāmataḥ | | 21
tṛtīyaṃ nāmataścitraṃ sarvadevamayaṃ śubham |
caturthaṃ rājataṃ śuklaṃ candraujaskamiti smṛtam | | 22
yattu saumanasaṃ nāma śṛṃgaṃ gāṅgeyamucyate |
tadeva codayo nāmnā yatrodyandṛśyate raviḥ | | 23
uttareṇa parikramya jambūdvīpaṃ divākaraḥ |
dṛśyo bhavati bhūtānāṃ śikharaṃ ca samāsthitaḥ | | 24
kāñcanasya ca śailasya tejasārkasya cāhṛte |
ubhe sandhye prakāśete ātāmre pūrvapaścime | | 25
śṛṃge saumanase sūrya uttiṣṭhatyuttarāyaṇe |
jyotiṣe dakṣiṇe cāpi viṣuve madhyatastayoḥ | | 26
īśendrodriśca aiśānyāṃ tatrāgniḥ pūrvadakṣiṇe |
nairṛte.api tato jñeyo vāyavye marutastathā | | 27
madhye tu kaṃjajaḥ sākṣādgrahā jyotīṃṣi caiva hi |
ādityastena rūpeṇa tasminvyomni pratiṣṭhitaḥ | | 28
idaṃ devamayaṃ vyoma tathā lokamayaṃ smṛtam |
pūrvakoṇasthite śṛṃge sthitaḥ śukro mahīpate | | 29
helijaścāpare jñeyo dhananāthastathāpare |
somaścāpi caturthe tu sthitaḥ śṛṃge janādhipa | | 1.126.30
madhye keśāsthito rājanhuṅkāraśca pinākinaḥ |
śṛṃge pūrvottare rājansthito devo vidhukṣaye | | 31
tataḥ sthito mahādevo gopatirlokapūjitaḥ |
pūrvāgneyīsthite śṛṃge sthito vai śāṇḍilaḥ sutaḥ | | 32
tataḥ sthito mahātejāḥ kīnāśo helinandanaḥ |
sthito vai nairṛte śṛṃge virūpākṣo mahābalaḥ | | 33
tasmādanantaro devaḥ sthito vai yādasāṃ patiḥ |
tataḥ sthito mahātejā vīra mitro mahābalaḥ | | 34
vāyavyaṃ śṛṃgamāśritya sarvadevanamaskṛtam |
tataḥ sthito daśabalo naramāruhya bhārata | | 35
brahmā madhye sthito devo hyanantaścādha eva hi |
upendraśaṅkarau devau brahmaṇo.ante samāsthitau | | 36
eṣa merustathā vyoma eṣa dharmaśca paṭhyate |
sarvadevamayaścāyaṃ merurvyoma iti smṛtaḥ | | 37
tathā vedamayaścāpi paṭhyate nātra saṃśayaḥ |
śṛṃgāṇi vedāścatvāraḥ pūrvaśṛṃgādayo viduḥ | | 38
iti śrībhaviṣye mahāpurāṇe brāhme parvaṇi saptamīkalpe vyomamāhātmyavarṇanaṃ
nāma ṣaḍviṃśatyadhikaśatatamo.adhyāyaḥ | 126 |
atha saptaviṃśatyadhikaśatatamo.adhyāyaḥ
sūryaprasādavarṇanam
śatānīka uvāca
kathamārādhitaḥ sūryaḥ sāmbenāmitatejasā |
vimuktastu kathaṃ rogairbrūhi māṃ dvijasattama | | 1
sumanturuvāca
sādhu pṛṣṭo.asmi rājendra śṛṇu sāmbakathāṃ purā |
vistārādvacmi te sarvāṃ kathāṃ pāpavimocinīm | | 2
purā saṃśrutya māhātmyaṃ bhāskarasya sa nāradāt |
vinayādupasaṅgamya vacaḥ pitaramabravīt | | 3
kaśmalenābhibhūto.asmi malena vyādhinācyuta |
vaidyairoṣadhibhiścāpi na śāntirmama vidyate | | 4
vanaṃ gacchāmi bhagavannanujñāṃ dātumarhasi |
śivena puṇḍarīkākṣa dhyāya māṃ puruṣottama | | 5
anujñātaḥ sa kṛṣṇena sindhoruttarakūlataḥ |
gatvā santārayāmāsa candrabhāgāṃ mahānadīm | | 6
tato mitravanaṃ gatvā tīrthaṃ trailokyaviśrutam |
upavāsaparaḥ sāmbaḥ śuṣko dhamanisantataḥ | | 7
ārādhanārthaṃ sūryasya guhyaṃ stotraṃ jajāpa ha |
vedaiścaturbhiḥ samitaṃ purāṇāśrayabṛṃhitam | | 8
yadetanmaṇḍalaṃ śuklaṃ divyaṃ hyajaramavyayam |
yuktaṃ manojavairaśvairhārītairbrahmavādibhiḥ | | 9
ādireṣa hi bhūtānāmāditya iti saṃjñitaḥ |
trailokyacakṣurevātra paramātmā prajāpatiḥ | | 1.127.10
eṣa vai maṇḍale hyasminpuruṣo dīpyate mahān |
eṣa viṣṇuracintyātmā brahmā caiṣa pitāmahaḥ | | 11
rudro mahendro varuṇa ākāśaṃ pṛthivī jalam |
vāyuḥ śaśāṅkaḥ parjanyo dhanādhyakṣo vibhāvasuḥ | | 12
yaṣa eṣa maṇḍale hyasmin puruṣo dīpyate mahān |
ekaḥ sākṣānmahādevo vṛtramaṇḍanibhaḥ sadā | | 13
kālo hyeṣa mahābāhurnibodhotpattilakṣaṇaḥ |
ya eṣa maṇḍale hyasmiṃstejobhiḥ pūrayanmahīm | | 14
bhrāmyate hyavyavacchinno vātairyo.amṛtalakṣaṇaḥ |
nātaḥ parataraṃ kiñcittejasā vidyate kvacit | | 15
puṣṇāti sarvabhūtāni eṣa eva sudhāmṛtaiḥ | antasthānmlecchajātīyāṃstiryagyonigatānapi | | 16
kāruṇyātsarvabhūtāni pāsi tvaṃ ca vibhāvaso |
śvitrakuṣṭhyaṃdhabadhirānpaṃgūṃścāpi tathā vibho | | 17
prapannavatsalo deva kurute nīrujo bhavān |
cakramaṇḍalamagrāṃśca nirdhanālpāyuṣastathā | | 18
pratyakṣadarśī tvaṃ deva samuddharasi līlayā |
kā me śaktiḥ stavaiḥ stotumārto.ahaṃ rogapīḍitaḥ | | 19
stūyase tvaṃ sadā devairbrahmaviṣṇuśivādibhiḥ |
mahendrasiddhagandharvairapsarobhiḥ saguhyakaiḥ | | 1.127.20
stutibhiḥ kiṃ pavitrairvā tava deva samīritaiḥ |
yasya te ṛgyajuḥ sāmnāṃ tritaya maṇḍalasthitam | | 21
dhyānināṃ tvaṃ paraṃ dhyānaṃ mokṣadvāraṃ ca mokṣiṇām |
anantatejasākṣobhyo hyaciṃtyāvyaktaniṣkalaḥ | | 22
yadayaṃ vyāhataḥ kiñcitstotre.asmiñjagataḥ patiḥ |
ārtiṃ bhaktiṃ ca vijñāya tatsarvaṃ jñātumarhasi | | 23
tamuvāca tataḥ sūryaḥ prītyā jāmbavatīsutam |
prīto.asmi tapasā vatse brūhi tanmāṃ yadicchasi | | 24
sāmba uvāca
yadi prasanno bhagavāneṣa eva varo mama |
bhaktirbhavatu me.atyarthaṃ tvayi deva sanātana | | 25
śrīsūrya uvāca
bhūyastuṣṭo.asmi bhadraṃ te varaṃ varaya suvrata |
sa dvitīyaṃ varaṃ vavre tadaiva varadaṃ vibhum | | 26
malaḥ śarīrasaṃstho me tvatprasādātpraṇaśyatu |
yena me śuddhamakhilaṃ vapurbhavatu gopate | | 27
sumanturuvāca
sa tathāstviti tenokto bhāskareṇa mahātmanā |
tāṃ mumoca rujaṃ sāmbo dehāttvacamivoragaḥ | | 28
tato rūpeṇa divyena rūpavānabhavatpunaḥ |
praṇamya śirasā devaṃ purato.avasthito.abhavat | | 29
śrīsūrya uvāca
bhūyaśca śṛṇu me sāmbaṃ tuṣṭo.ahaṃ yadbravīmi te |
adya prabhṛti tvannāmnā mama sthānāni suvrata | |
kṣitau ye sthāpayiṣyanti teṣāṃ lokāḥ sanātanāḥ | | 1.127.30
sthāpayasvaiva māmasmiṃścandrabhāgātaṭe śubhe |
tava nāmnā ca sāmbedaṃ parāṃ khyātiṃ gamiṣyati | | 31
kīrtistavākṣayā loke khyātiṃ yāsyati suvrata |
bhūyaśca te pradāsyāmi pratyahaṃ svapnadarśanam | | 32
sumanturuvāca
evaṃ dattvā varaṃ tasmai vṛṣṇisiṃhāya cāparam |
pratyakṣadarśanaṃ dattvā tatraivāntaradhāddhariḥ | | 33
ya idaṃ paṭhate stotraṃ trikālaṃ bhaktimānnaraḥ |
trisaptaśatamāvartya homaṃ vā saptarātrakam | | 34
rājyakāmo labhedrājyaṃ dhanakāmo labhedadhanam |
rogārto mucyate rogādyathā sāmbastathaiva saḥ | | 35
sūryalokaṃ vrajeccāpi bhaktyā pūjya divākaram |
ramate ca tathā tasmindevaiśca parivāritaḥ | | 36
iti śrībhaviṣye mahāpurāṇe brāhme parvaṇi saptamīkalpe sāmbopākhyāne sūryaprasādavarṇanaṃ
nāma saptaviṃśatyadhikaśatatamo.adhyāyaḥ | 127 |
athāṣṭāviṃśatyadhikaśatatamo.adhyāya
sāmbastavavarṇanam
sumanturuvāca
astāvīcca tata sāmbaḥ kṛśo dhamanisantataḥ |
rājannāmasahasreṇa sahasrāṃśuṃ divākaram | | 1
khidyamānaṃ tato dṛṣṭvā sūryaḥ kṛṣṇātmajaṃ tadā |
svapne.asmai darśanaṃ dattvā punarvacanamabravīt | | 2
śrīsūrya uvāca
sāmba sāmba mahāvāho śṛṇu jāmbavatīsuta |
alaṃ nāmasahasreṇa paṭha cemaṃ śubhaṃ stavam | | 3
yāni guhyāni nāmāni pavitrāṇi śubhāni ca |
tāni te kīrtiyiṣyāmi prayatnādavadhāraya | 4
vaikartano vivasvāṃśca mārtaṇḍo bhāskaro raviḥ |
lokasākṣī trilokeśaḥ kartā hartā tamisrahā |
tapanastāpanaścaiva śuciḥ saptāśvavāhanaḥ | 6
gabhastihasto brahmā ca sarvadevanamaskṛtaḥ |
ekarviśatirityeṣa stava iṣṭassadā mama | | 7
śarīrārogyadaścaiva dhanavṛddhiyaśaskaraḥ |
stavarāja iti khyātastriṣu lokeṣu viśrutaḥ | 8
ya etena mahābāho dve sandhye.astamanodaye |
stauti māṃ praṇato bhūtvā sarvapāpaiḥ pramucyate || 9
mānasaṃ vācikaṃ vāpi kāyikaṃ yacca duṣkṛtam |
ekajāpyena tatsarvaṃ praṇaśyati mamāgrataḥ | 1.128.10
eṣa japyaśca homaśca sandhyopāsanameva ca |
balimantro.arghyamantro.atha dhūpamantrastathaiva ca | |11
annapradāne snāne ca praṇipāte pradakṣiṇe |
pūjito.ayaṃ mahāmantraḥ sarvapāpaharaḥ śubhaḥ | | 12
evamuktvā sa bhagavānbhāskaro jagatāṃ patiḥ |
āmantrya kṛṣṇatanayaṃ tatraivāntarhito.abhavat | | 13
sāmbo.api stavarājena stutvā saptāśvavāhanam |
prītātmā nīrujaḥ śrīmāṃstasmādrogādvimuktavān | | 14
iti śrībhaviṣye mahāpurāṇe brāhme parvaṇi saptamīkalpe sāmbastavavarṇanaṃ
nāmāṣṭāviṃśatyadhikaśatatamo.adhyāyaḥ | 128 |
athaikonatriṃśadadhikaśatatamo.adhyāyaḥ
sāmbakṛtādityamūrtisthāpanavarṇanam
sumanturuvāca
atha labdhavaraḥ sāmbo varaṃ prāpya purātanam |
manyamānastadāścaryaṃ prahṛṣṭenāntarātmanā | | 1
pūrvābhyāsena tenaiva sārdhamanyaistapasvibhiḥ |
snāpanārthaṃ nātidūraṃ candrabhāgāṃ nadīṃ yayau | | 2
kṛtvātmamaṇḍalākāraṃ śraddadhāno dinedine |
sasnau sañcintayāmāsa kiṃ rūpaṃ sthāpayāmyaham | | 3
sa snātaḥ sahasaivātha praṇamya tu prabhāvatīm |
uhyamānāṃ jalaughena pratimāṃ sammukhīṃ raveḥ | | 4
tāṃ dṛṣṭvā tasya vīrasya samutpannamidaṃ yathā |
devena yattadājñaptaṃ tadidaṃ nātra saṃśayaḥ | | 5
sa tāmuttārya salilādānīya ca mahīpate |
tasminmitravanoddeśe sthāpayāmāsa tāṃ tadā | | 6
nidhāya pratimā~mlloke sāmbastasya mahātmanaḥ |
mitraṃ mitravane ramye sthāpayitvā vidhānataḥ | | 7
tatastāmeva papraccha praṇamya pratimāṃ raveḥ |
keneyaṃ nirmitā nātha bhavato hyākṛtiḥ śubhā | | 8
pratimā tamuvācātha śṛṇu sāmba bruve svayam |
nirmitā yena cāpyeṣā madīyā puruṣākṛtiḥ | | 9
mamātitejasāviṣṭaṃ rūpamāsītpurātanam |
asahyaṃ sarvabhūtānāṃ tato.asmyabhyarcitaḥ suraiḥ | |
sahyaṃ bhavatu te rūpaṃ sarvaprāṇabhṛtāmiti | | 1.129.10
tato mayā samādiṣṭo viśvakarmā mahātapāḥ |
tejasāṃ śātanaṃ kurvanrūpaṃ nirvartayasva me | | 11
tatastu matsamādeśāttenaiva nipuṇaṃ tadā |
śākadvīpe bhramiṃ kṛtvā rūpaṃ nirvartitaṃ mama | | 12
prītyā teṣāṃ prapañco.ayaṃ sa mayā kāritaḥ punaḥ |
teneyaṃ kalpavṛkṣāttu nirmitā viśvakarmaṇā | | 13
kṛtvā himavataḥ pṛṣṭhe purā siddhaniṣevite |
tvadarthaṃ candrabhāgāyāṃ tatastenāvatāritā | | 14
bhavatastāraṇārthaṃ hi tataḥ sthānamidaṃ śubham |
ruciraṃ sarvadā sāmba sānnidhyaṃ me.atra yāsyati | | 15
sānnidhyaṃ mama pūrvāhṇe sutīre drakṣyate janaiḥ |
kālapriye ca madhyāhne.aparāhṇe cātra nityaśaḥ | | 16
pūrvāhṇe pūjayed brahmā madhyāhne cakradhṛtsvayam |
śaṅkaraścāparāhṇe tu māṃ pūjayati sarvadā | | 17
ityukto.asau bhagavatā bhāskareṇa sa yādavaḥ |
harṣamāpa mahābāho bhāskaro.antardadhe tataḥ | | 18
iti śrībhaviṣye mahāpurāṇe brāhme parvaṇi saptamīkalpe sāmbopākhyāne
sāmbakṛtādityamūrtisthāpanaṃ nāmaikonatriṃśadadhikaśatatamo.adhyāyaḥ | | 129 |
atha triṃśadadhikaśatatamo.adhyāyaḥ
prasādalakṣaṇavarṇanam
śatānīka uvāca
kathaṃ sāmbena viprendra pratiṣṭhā kāritā raveḥ |
kasya vā vacanāttena prāsādaḥ kārito raveḥ | | 1
sumanturuvāca
atra te vacmi rājendra yathā sāmbena dhīmatā |
pratiṣṭhā kāritā bhānoḥ prasādaśca mahīpate | | 2
sulabdhvā pratimāṃ bhānościntayāmāsa nāradam |
sa cāpi cintitaścāgādyatra jāmbavatīsutaḥ | | 3
tamāgatamabhiprekṣya nāradaṃ munisattamam |
sampūjya vidhivatsāṃbo nāradaṃ vākyamabravīt | |4
prāsādaṃ kārayedyastu bhāskarasya naro dvija |
kiṃ phalaṃ tasya devarṣe pratiṣṭhāṃ yaśca kārayet | | 5
nārada uvāca
prāsādaṃ śobhane deśe yastu kārayate raveḥ |
sa yāti naraśārdūla sūryalokaṃ na saṃśayaḥ | | 6
sāmba uvāca
kathaṃ kuryādāyatanaṃ kasmindeśe dvijottama |
kīdṛkchastaṃ cāyatanaṃ devadevasya vai dvija | | 7
nārada uvāca
yatra prabhūtaṃ salilamāgame ca vināśane |
devatāyatanaṃ kuryādyaśodharmavivṛddhaye | | 8
iṣṭāpūrtena labhate lokāṃstāṃśca vibhūṣitān |
devānāmālayaṃ kāryaṃ dvayaṃ yatra ca dṛśyate | | 9
salilādyaṃ ca ārāmaḥ kṛteṣvāyataneṣu ca |
sthāneṣveteṣu sānnidhyamupagacchanti devatāḥ | | 1.130.10
saraḥsu nalinīcchannanirastaraviraśmiṣu |
haṃsasaṃkṣiptakahlāravīthīvimalavāriṣu | | 11
haṃsakāraṇḍavakrauñcacakravākavirāviṣu |
paryantavimalacchāyāviśrāntajanacāriṣu | | 14
krauñcakāñcīsulāpāśca kalahaṃsakalasvanāḥ |
nadyastoyāṃśukā yatra śapharīkṛtamekhalāḥ | | 13
phulladrumottamāvāsāḥ saṅgamaśroṇimaṇḍalāḥ |
pulinādyunnatoraskā rasahāsāśca nimnagāḥ | | 14
vanopāntanadīśailasaṃskaropāntabhūmiṣu |
ramante devatā nityaṃ pureṣūdyānavatsu ca | | 15
bhūmayo brāhmaṇādīnāṃ yāḥ proktā vāstukarmaṇi |
tā evaṃ teṣāṃ śasyante devatāyataneṣvapi | | 16
catuḥṣaṣṭipadaṃ kuryāddevatāyatanaṃ sadā |
dvāraṃ ca madhyamaṃ tasminsamadiksampraśasyate | 17
yo vistāro bhavettasya dviguṇā tatsamunnatiḥ |
ucchrāyastu tṛtīyo.atha tena tulyā kaṭirbhavet | | 18
vistārārdho bhavedgarbho bhinnayonyāḥ samantataḥ |
garbhapādonavistīrṇaṃ dvāraṃ dviguṇamucchritam | | 19
ucchrayātpādavistīrṇā śākhā tadvadudumbarī |
vistārātpādapratimādbāhulyaṃ śeṣayoḥ smṛtam | | 1.130.20
nṛpaṃ saptanavabhiḥ śākhābhistatpraśasyate |
atha śākhācaturbhāge pratihārau niveśayet | | 21
śailamaṅgalyavihagaḥ śrīvṛkṣaḥ svastikairghaṭaiḥ |
mānāṣṭamena bhāgena pratimā syātsapiṇḍikā | | 22
dvibhāgā pratimā tatra tṛtīyo bhāgapiṇḍikā |
pūrve merurmahābāho kailāsaśca tathāpare | | 23
bhavanti cāpare vīra vimānacchadanaṃ tathā |
samudrapadmagaruḍanandivarddhanakuñjarāḥ | | 24
gṛharājo vṛṣo haṃsaḥ sarvatobhadrako ghaṭaḥ |
siṃho vṛṣaścatuṣkoṇaḥ ṣoḍaśāṣṭāśrayastathā | | 25
ityete viṃśatiḥ proktāḥ prāsādā yadunandana |
yathoktānukrameṇaiva lakṣaṇāni vadāmi te | | 26
navatriṃśaducchritamerurdvādaśabhaumo vividhakuharaśca | dvārairyutaścatubhirdvātriṃśaddhastavistīrṇaḥ | | 27
triṃśaddhastāyāmo daśabhaumaḥ sapta mandaraḥ |
śikharayutaḥ kailāso.api śikharavānaṣṭāviṃśoṣṭabhaumaśca | | 28
jālagavākṣairyukto vimānasaṃjñastrisaptakāyāmaḥ |
nandana iti vai bhaumo dvātriṃśatṣoḍaśāṅgayutaḥ | | 29
vṛttaḥ samudganāmā padmākṛtirayaṃ cāṣṭau |
śṛṅgeṇaikena bhavedekena ca bhūmikā tasya | | 1.130.30
garuḍākṛtiśca garuḍo nandī vai ṣaṣṭivistīrṇaḥ |
kāyaśca saptabhaumo vibhūṣitoṃ.agaiśca saptaviṃśatibhiḥ | | 31
kuñjara iti gajapṛṣṭhaḥ ṣoḍaśāhastocchrito madhye |
gṛharājaḥ ṣoḍaśakastricakraśālā bhavedvalabhī | | 32
vṛṣa evaṃ mṛmiśṛṅgo dvāvaśahastaḥ samunnato vṛttaḥ |
haṃso haṃsākāro ghaṭo.aṣṭasahasrakalaśarūpaḥ | | 33
dvārairyutaścaturbhirbahuśikharo bhavati sarvatobhadraḥ |
bahuruciracandraśālaḥ ṣaptaviṃśadbhāgabhūmiśca | | 34
siṃhaḥ siṃhākāro dvādaśakoṇo.aṣṭahastaśca | | 35
sahasratritayaṃ caiva kathitaṃ viśvakarmaṇā |
prāhuḥ sthāpayataścātra matamekaṃ vipaścitaḥ | | 36
kapotapālinīyuktamato gacchati tulyatām | | 37
sāmba uvāca
ya ete kathitā vipra prāsādā viṃśatistvayā |
teṣāṃ sūryasya kaḥ kāryaḥ prāsādo bhāskarasya tu | | 3 8
sthānāni yāni coktāni prāsādasya dvijottama |
teṣāṃ tvayoktaṃ hi puraṃ vyayavadbhirnarairyutam | | 3 9
tasminpradeśe vai kāryaṃ bhānormandiramuttamam |
diśāṃ bhāge ca katame brūhi śeṣaṃ dvijottama | | 1.130.40
nārada uvāca
puramadhyaṃ samāśritya kuryādāyatanaṃ raveḥ |
diśāṃ bhāge.atha vā pūrve pūrvadvārasamīpataḥ | | 41
bhūmiṃ parīkṣya pūrvaṃ tu kuryādāyatanaṃ tataḥ .a |
iṣṭagandharasopetā nimnā bhūmiḥ praśasyate | 42
śarkarātuṣakeśāsthikṣārāṅgāravivarjitā |
meghadundubhinirghoṣā sarvabījaprarohiṇī | | 43
śuklā raktā tathā pītā kṛṣṇā ca kathitā kṣitiḥ |
dvijarājanyavaṃśyānāṃ śūdrāṇāṃ ca yathākramam | | 44
parīkṣitāyāṃ tasyāṃ tu madhye tasyāḥ pramāṇataḥ |
upalipya caturhastaṃ caturasraṃ ca samantataḥ | | 45
hastamātramadhaḥ kṛtvā madhye tasyā daśāṅgulam |
gartamutkīrya tenaiva pāṃsunā pratipūrayet | | 46
same samaguṇā jñeyā hīne hīnaguṇā bhavet |
vardhamāne tu vai pāṃsau bhavedvṛddhikarī kṣitiḥ | | 47
nityaṃ sammukhamarkasya kadācitpaścimāmukham |
sthāpanīyaṃ gṛhaṃ samyakprāṅmukhasthānakalpanāt | | 48
bhavanāddakṣiṇe pārśve raveḥ snānagṛhaṃ bhavet |
agnihotra gṛhaṃ kāryaṃ raveruttarataḥ śubham | |
udaṅmukhaṃ bhavecchambhormātṛrṇāṃ gṛhameva ca | | 49
brahmā paścimataḥ sthāpyo viṣṇuruttaratastathā |
nimbastu dakṣiṇe pārśve vāme rājñī prakīrtitā | | 1.130.50
piṃgalo pakṣiṇe bhānorvāmato daṇḍanāyakaḥ |
śrīmahāśvetayoḥ sthānaṃ puratastvaṃśumālinaḥ | | 51
tataḥsthāpyāśvinoḥ sthānaṃ pūrvadevagṛhādvahiḥ |
dvitīyāyāṃ tu kakṣāyāṃ rājñāsrauṣau vyavasthitau | | 52
tṛtīyāyāṃ tu kakṣāyāṃ sthitau kalmāṣapakṣiṇau |
jaṇḍakāmacarau sthāpyau dakṣiṇāṃ diśamāśritau | | 53
udīcyāṃ sthāpanīyastu kubero lokapūjitaḥ |
uttareṇa tatastasya revataḥ savināyakaḥ | | 54
yatra vā vidyate sthānaṃ dikṣu sarvā guhādayaḥ |
dve maṇḍale.arghyadānārthaṃ kārye savyāpasavyataḥ | | 55
dadyādudayavelāyāmarghaṃ sūryāya dakṣiṇe |
uttare maṇḍale dadyādarghyamastamane raveḥ | | 56
cakrākṛtāṃ tathānyasmindevasya pratimāṃ raveḥ |
sthāpayedvidhivadvīra caturbhiḥ kalaśaiḥ śubhaiḥ | | 57
nānātūryaninādaiśca śaṅkhaśabdaiśca puṣkalaiḥ |
tṛtīye maṇḍale hyeva pūjanīyo divākaraḥ | | 58
caturasraṃ catuḥśṛṅgaṃ vyoma devagṛhāgrataḥ |
pratimāyāstu sūtreṇa kāryaṃ madhye.asya maṇḍalam | | 59
diṇḍī sthāpyaḥ purastasmādādityābhimukhaḥ sthitaḥ |
yadetatkathitaṃ vyoma sarvadevamayaṃ mayā | | 1.130.60
madhyāhne tasya dātavyamarghyamatra yadūttama |
atha vā maṇḍalaṃ cānyattṛtīyaṃ cakrasammitama | | 61
sthāpayitvā tu deveśaṃ dātavyo.arghaḥ supaṇḍitaiḥ |
devasya purataḥ kāryaṃ vyomasthānaṃ samīpataḥ | |
pustakavācanasthānamatha vā yatra rocate | | 62
eṣa sthānavidhiḥ prokto devatānāṃ yathākramam |
gṛharājño.atha rudrastu dvāvetau bhāskarapriyau | | 63
iti śrībhaviṣye mahāpurāṇe brāhme parvaṇi saptamīkalpe sāmbopākhyāne
prāsādalakṣaṇavarṇanaṃ nāma triṃśadadhikaśatatamo.adhyāyaḥ | 130 |
athaikatriṃśadadhikaśatatamo.adhyāyaḥ
dāruparīkṣāvarṇanam
nārada uvāca
atha te sampravakṣyāmi pratimāvidhivistaram |
sarveṣāmeva devānāmādityasya viśeṣataḥ | | 1
arcā saptavidhā proktā bhaktānāṃ śubhavṛddhaye |
kāñcanī rājatī tāmrī pārthivī śailajā smṛtā | | 2
vārkṣī cālekhyakā ceti mūtisthānāni sapta vai |
vārkṣīvidhānaṃ te vīra varṇayiṣyāmyaśeṣataḥ | | 3
kartranukūle divase saṃvatsaraviśodhite |
śubhairnimittaiḥ śakunaiḥ prasthānaiśca vanaṃ viśet | | 4
kṣīriṇo varjitāḥ sarve durbalāste svabhāvataḥ |
catuṣpatheṣu na grāhyā ye ca putrakavṛkṣakāḥ | | 5
devatāyatanasthā ye tathā valmīkasambhavā |
utkīrṇā devatā yeṣu caityavṛkṣāśca ye smṛtāḥ | | 6
śmaśānabhūmijā ye ca pakṣiṇāṃ nilayāśca ye |
sakoṭarāśca ye vṛkṣāḥ śuṣkāgrā ye ca pādapāḥ | | 7
śastreṇa nihatā ye ca kuñjarāśāstathā kṛtāḥ |
sāmādyāḥ sarujo.adhaśca vyādhinaśca tathaiva ca | | 8
akāle puṣpitā ye ca kāle te ca vivarjitāḥ |
śīrṇaparṇāśca taravo rakṣodhvāṃkṣaniṣevitāḥ | |
ekaśākhātiśākhāśca triśākhāśca tathādhamāḥ | | 9
madhūko devadāruśca vṛkṣarājaśca candanaḥ |
bilvaścāmrātakaścaiva khadirothāñjanastathā | | 1.131.10
nimbaḥ śrīparṇavṛkṣaśca panasaḥ saralo.arjjunaḥ |
raktacandanaparyantāḥ śreṣṭhāḥ syuḥ pratimādrumāḥ | | 11
varṇānāmānupūrvyeṇa dvau dvau vṛkṣau prakīrtitau |
nimbādyāḥ sarvavarṇānāṃ vṛkṣā sādhāraṇāḥ smṛtāḥ | | 12
kathyamānānviśeṣeṇa śṛṇu vīra tathāparān |
suradāruḥ śamī caiva madhūkaścandanastathā | |
ete vai taravastāta brāhmaṇānāṃ śubhāḥ smṛtāḥ | | 13
kṣatrasya ca tathāriṣṭaḥ khadirastindukastathā |
aśvatthaśca tathā sāmba drumaḥ karakataḥ śubhaḥ | | 14
vaiśyānāṃ tadvadeva syuḥ khadiraścandanastathā |
puṇyāśca taravaścaite śubhadāstu tathaiva ca | | 15
kesaraḥ sarjakaścāmraḥ śālavṛkṣastathetaraḥ |
ete vai taravaḥ puṇyāḥ śūdrāṇāṃ śubhadāyakāḥ | | 16
liṅgaṃ ca pratimāṃ caivamavasthāpya yathāvidhi |
vṛkṣaṃ cābhimataṃ gatvā pūjayedbalipuṣpakaiḥ | | 17
śucau deśe vivikte ca keśāṃgāravivarjite |
prāgudaksūcake deśe lokakaṣṭavivarjite | | 18
vistīrṇaskandhaviṭapaḥ ṣatravānṛjuvṛddhigaḥ |
ātaṅkahīno vivaśaḥ sattvakparṇaḥ śubhastathā | 19
svenaiva patitā ye ca hastibhiḥ pātitāstathā |
śuklāśca vahnidagdhāśca pakṣibhiścāpi varjitāḥ | | 1.131.20
taravo varjanīyāśca grahītavyāḥ śubhā drumāḥ |
snigdharūpāḥ saparṇāśra sapuṣpāḥ saphalāstathā | | 21
teṣāṃ tu grahaṇaṃ cāṣṭamāseṣu kārttikādiṣu |
bhūtvā śubhadine caiva sopavāso.adhivāsayet | | 22
samantādupalipyātha tasyādhastādvasundharām |
gāyatryā paripūtena paritaḥ prokṣya vāriṇā | | 23
śukle ca paridhūte ca paridhāya ca vāsasī |
pūjayedgandhamālyaiśca sadhūpabalikarmabhiḥ | | 24
tataḥ kuśaiḥ paristīrṇe hutvāgnau tasya cāntike |
devadārusamidbhiśca mantreṇānena tattvavit | | 25
oṃ bhūrbhuvaḥ suvariti tato vṛkṣaṃ ca pūjayet |
oṃ prajāpataye satyasadāya nityaṃ śreṣṭhantarātmantsacarācarātman | |
sānnidhyamasminkuru deva vṛkṣe sūryāvṛtaṃ maṇḍalamāviśeśca namaḥ | | 26
nārada uvāca
evaṃ sampūjayityā tu vākyaistaṃ parisāntvayan |
vṛkṣalokasya śāntyarthaṃ gaccha devālayaṃ śubham | | 27
deva tvaṃ sthāsyase tatra cchedadāhavivarjitaḥ |
kāle dhūpapradānena sapuṣpairbalikarmabhiḥ | | 28
lokāstvāṃ pūjayiṣyanti tato yāsyasi nirvṛtim |
vṛkṣamūle kuṭhāraṃ tu dhūpamālyaiḥ prapūjya ca | | 29
pūrvatastu śiraḥ kṛtvā sthāpanīyaḥ prayatnataḥ |
paramānnamodakaudanapalapūpikādibhirbhakṣyaiḥ | | 1.131.30
madyaiḥ kusumairdhūpairgandhaiśca taruṃ samabhyarcya | surapitṛpiśācarākṣasabhujaṅgasuragaṇavināyakādyānām | | 31
kṛtvā pūjāṃ rātrau vṛkṣaṃ saṃspṛśya ca brūyāt | | 32
arcāsu devadeva tvaṃ devaiśca parikalpitaḥ |
namaste vṛkṣa pūjeyaṃ vidhivatparigṛhyatām | | 33
yānīha bhūtāni vasanti tāni baliṃ gṛhītvā vidhivatprayuktam |
anyatra vāsaṃ parikalpayantu kṣamantu te cādya namo.astu tebhyaḥ | | 34
prabhātāyāṃ tu śarvaryāṃ punaḥ sampūjya taṃ nagam |
brāhmaṇebhyastato dattvā bhojakebhyaśca dakṣiṇām | |
chindyādvanaspatīṃstajjñaistai kṛtasvastivācanaiḥ | | 35
pūrvasyāṃ diśi pāto.asya aiśānyāṃ cāpi yo bhavet |
athavā uttarasyāṃ tu tathā chindyāttu nānyathā | | 36
aindryaiśānyorudīcyāṃ caḥ pātastisṛṣu śasyate |
nairṛtyāgneyayāmyāsu dikṣu pāto na śobhanaḥ | |
vāyavyāṃ caiva vāruṇyāṃ tasya pātastu madhyamaḥ | | 37
yasya bāhyasthitā śākhā dikṣu naṣṭā catasṛṣu |
vāstupūrvaṃ tataḥ sthitvā tataḥ paścādavasthitā | | 38
avilagnamaśabdaṃ tu patanaṃ tu praśasyate |
utpadyeddvidalaṃ yasya drāvaśca madhuro bhavet | | 39
sarpistailaṃ kṣaredyasya pādapaṃ taṃ vivarjavet |
śubhadaṃ yaduśārdūla śṛṇu tvaṃ kathaye śuci | | 1.131.40
vṛkṣaṃ prabhāte salilairniṣiktaṃ pūrvottarasyāṃ diśi sannikṛtya |
madhvājyadigdhena kuṭhārakeṇa pradakṣiṇāṃ śoṣamabhiprahaṇyāt | | 41
pūrvottare.apyuttaradigvibhāge pāte yadā vṛddhikarastadā syāt |
āgneyakoṇakramaśo.agnidāha ugrograrogāḥ sudhanakṣayaśca | |42
gāruḍe diśi pāṣāṇaṃ kapoto gṛhagodhikā |
sitavarṇaṃ jalaṃ jñeyamaṅguṣṭhābhaṃ bhavetkṛmiḥ | |
doṣairetairvinirmuktaṃ mudā kālaṃ samuddharet | | 43
iti śrībhaviṣye mahāpurāṇe brāhme parvaṇi saptamīkalpe dāruparīkṣāvarṇanaṃ
nāmaikatriṃśadadhikaśatatamo.adhyāyaḥ | 131 |
atha dvātriṃśadadhikaśatatamo.adhyāyaḥ
śrīsūryapratimālakṣaṇavarṇanam
nārada uvāca
hanta te sarvadevānāṃ pratimālakṣaṇaṃ param |
vacmi te yaduśārdūla ādityasya viśeṣataḥ | | 1
ekahastā dvihastā vā trihastā vā pramāṇataḥ |
tathā sārddhatrihastā ca savituḥ pratimā śubhā | | 2
prasādāddvārato vāpi pramāṇaṃ ca prakalpitam |
tadvatprayāṇaṃ kartavyaṃ satataṃ śubhamicchatā | | 3
ekahastā bhavetsaumyā dvihastā dhanadhānyadā |
trihastā pratimā bhānoḥ sarvakāmapradā smṛtā | | 4
sārdhatrihastā pratimā subhikṣakṣemakāriṇī |
agre madhye ca mūle ca pratimā sarvataḥ samā | |
gāndharvī sā tu vijñeyā dhanadhānyāvahā smṛtā | | 5
devāgārasya yaddvāraṃ tasmādaṣṭāṃśamudyatā |
vibhāgaiḥ piṇḍikāḥ kāryā dvau bhāgau pratimā bhavet | | 6
aṅgulaiśca tathā mūrtiścaturaśītisaṃmitaiḥ |
vistārāyāmataḥ kāryā vadanaṃ dvādaśāṅgulam | | 7
mukhāttribhāgaiścibukaṃ lalāṭaṃ nāsikā tathā |
karṇau nāsikayā tulyau pādau cāniyatau tayoḥ | | 8
nayane dvyaṃgule syātāṃ tribhāgā tārakā bhaveta |
tṛtīyatārakābhāgātkuryāddṛṣṭiṃ vicakṣaṇaḥ | | 9
lalāṭamastakotsedhaṃ kuryāttatsamameva ca |
pariṇāhastu śiraso bhaveddvāviṃśadaṅgulaḥ | | 1.132.10
tulyā nāsikayā grīvā mukhena hadayāṃtaram |
mukhamātrā bhavennābhistato meḍhramanantaram | |
mukhavistāraṇamurastato.arddhaṃ tu kaṭiḥ smṛtā | | 11
bāhū pravāhatulyau tu ūrū jaṅghe ca tatsame |
gulphādhastāttu pādaḥ syāducchritaścaturaṅgulaḥ | | 12
ṣaḍaṅgulasuvistārastasyāṅguṣṭhāṅgulatrayam |
pradeśinī ca tattulyā hīnā śeṣā nakhairyutāḥ | | 13
caturdaśāṅgulaḥ pāda āyāmātparikīrtitaḥ |
evaṃ lakṣaṇasaṃyuktā pratimārcyā bhavetsadā | | 14
aṃsau harestathaivorū lalāṭaṃ ca sanāsikam |
niyate nayane gaṇḍau mūrteḥ kuryātsamunnate | | 15
viśāladhavalāvāmapakṣmalāyatalocane |
sasmitānanapadmasya cārubimbādharastathā | | 16
ratnaprodbhāsimukuṭakaṭakāṅgadahāravān |
avyaṅgapadamadhyādisamāyogo.api śobhitaḥ | | 17
suprabho maṇḍalaścārurvicitramaṇikuṇḍalaḥ |
karābhyāṃ kāñcanīṃ mālāṃ prodvahansasaroruhām | | 18
evaṃ lakṣaṇasaṃyuktāṃ kārayedīhitapradām |
prajābhyaśca sadā bhānuḥ śivārogyābhayapradaḥ | | 19
alpāṅgāyāṃ nṛpabhayaṃ hīnāṅgāyāmakalpatā |
khātodaryāṃ ca kṣutpīḍā kṛśāyāṃ tu daridratā | | 1.132.20
sakṣatāyāṃ bhayaṃ śastrātsphuṭitā mṛtyukāriṇī |
dakṣiṇāvanatāyāṃ tu śaśvadāyuḥ kṣayo bhavet | | 21
uttarāvanatāyāṃ tu viyogo bhavati dhruvam |
nālokyā nāpyanālokyā rakṣyāmūrtiḥ praśasyate | | 22
tasmādbhāskarabhaktena lokadvayahitaiṣiṇā |
tanmūrteścādaraḥ kāryastadadhīnāstu sampadaḥ | | 23
śirorugaṇḍavadanaiḥ sarvāṅgāvayavaistathā |
evaṃ lakṣaṇasaṃpūrṇā pratimā bhavate śubhā | | 24
nāsālalāṭajaṅghorudaṇḍavakṣobhiranvitā |
kuryādādityaveṣaṃ tu gūḍhapādodaraṃ tathā | | 25
kamalodarakāntinibhaḥ kañcukaguptaḥ prasannamukhaḥ |
raktotpalaprabhāmaṇḍalaśca kartuḥ śubhaṃ karotyarkaḥ | | 26
kuṇḍalabhūṣitavadanaḥ pralambahāro.api gṛhavṛttaḥ |
nṛpatibhayaṃ vyaṅgāyāṃ hīnāṅgāyāmakalpanā kartuḥ | | 27
khātodaryāṃ kṣudbhayamarthavināśaḥ kṛśāṅgāyām |
maraṇaṃ tu sakṣatāyāṃ śastranipātena nirdiśetkartuḥ | | 28
vāmonnatā tu patnīṃ dakṣiṇāvanatā hinastyāyuḥ |
andhatvamūrddhvadṛṣṭiḥ karoti cintāmadhomukhī dṛṣṭiḥ | | 29
sarvapratimāsvevaṃ śubhāśubhaṃ bhāskareṇoktam |
brahmā kamaṇḍalukaraścaturmukhaḥ paṅkajasthaśca | | 30
skandaḥ kumārarūpaḥ śaktidharo barhiketuśca |
śuklaścaturviṣāṇo dvipo mahendrasya vajrapāṇitvam | | 31
tiryagūrdhvalalāṭasaṃsthaṃ tṛtīyamapi locanaṃ cihnam | | 32
iti śrībhaviṣye mahāpurāṇe brāhme parvaṇi saptamīkalpe sāmbopākhyāne
śrīsūryapratimālakṣaṇavarṇanaṃ nāma dvātriṃśadadhikaśatatamo.adhyāyaḥ | 132 |
atha trayastriṃśadadhikaśatatamo.adhyāyaḥ
viśvarūpavarṇanam
nārada uvāca
tato.adhivāsanaṃ kuryādvidhidṛṣṭena karmaṇā |
aiśānyāṃ diśi vai kuryādadhivāsanamaṇḍapam | | 1
catustoraṇasampannaṃ sarvābharaṇasaṃyutam |
diśāsu vidiśāsveva patākābhistu bhūṣitam | | 2
āgneyyāṃ diśi raktāḥ syuḥ kṛṣṇāḥ syuryāmyanairṛte |
śvetā diśyaparasyāṃ tu vāyavyāmeva pāṇḍurā | | 3
citrā cottara pārnye tu pītā pūrvottare tathā |
śriyamāyurjayaṃ caiva balaṃ yaśo yadūttama | | 4
dadāti sā vīra kṛtā sampadardhe na saṃśayaḥ |
hitāya sarvalokānāṃ mṛṇmayī pratimā bhavet | | 5
subhikṣakṣemadā nityaṃ sarvā maṇimayīkṛtā |
gāṅgeyā puṣṭidā raupyā syādvai kīrtipravartinī | | 6
prajāvṛddhiṃ tāmramayīṃ kuryānnityamasaṃśayaḥ |
bhūmerlābhaṃ tu vipulaṃ kuryādaśmamayī sadā | | 7
pradhānapuruṣaṃ hanti trapulohamayī sadā |
sarvadevamayasyaivamarcā kuryātprayatnataḥ | | 8
sāmba uvāca
sarvadevamayatvaṃ hi brūhi me bhāskarasya tu |
sarvadevamayo hyeṣa kathaṃ nārada kathyate | | 9
nārada uvāca
sādhu sāmba mahābāho śṛṇu me paramaṃ vacaḥ |
budhasomau smṛtau netre lalāṭe ceśvaraḥ sthitaḥ | | 1.133.10
surajyeṣṭhaḥ śirastasya kapāle.asya bṛhaspatiḥ |
ekādaśe tathā rudrāḥ kaṇṭhamasya samāśritāḥ | | 11
nakṣatrāṇi grahāścaiva daśaneṣu samāśritāḥ |
dharmādharmau ca devasya oṣṭhasampuṭake sthitau | | 12
sarvaśāstramayī devī jihvāyāṃ ca sarasvatī |
diśaśca vidiśaścaiva sarvāḥ śrotreṣu saṃsthitāḥ | | 13
brahmendrau tāludeśe tu sthitau devaiśca pūjitau |
ādityā dvādaśa vibhobhrurvormadhye samāśritāḥ | | 14
ṛṣayo romakūpeṣu samudrā jaṭhare sthitāḥ |
yakṣakinnaragandharvāḥ piśācā dānavāstathā | | 15
rākṣasāśca gaṇāḥ sarve hṛdaye syuḥ sthitāḥ raveḥ |
nadyo bāhugatāścaiva nagāḥ kakṣāntare sthitāḥ | | 16
pṛṣṭhamadhye sthito meruḥ stanayorantare kujaḥ |
tasya putro dharmarājaḥ sthito vai nābhimaṇḍale | | 17
kaṭideśe pṛthivyādyā liṅge sṛṣṭiḥ samāśritā |
jānunī cāśvinīdevāvūrū tasyācalā smṛtāḥ | | 18
sapta pātālalokāstu nakhamadhye samāśritāḥ |
sasāgaravanā pṛthvī pādamadhye.asya vartate | | 19
devaḥ kālāgnirudro yo dantānteṣu samāśritaḥ |
sarvadevamayo bhānuḥ sarvadevātmakastathā | | 1.133.20
vyaṃgeṣu vāyavaścaiva lokālokaṃ carācaram |
vyāptaṃ karmaśarīreṇa vāyunā tasya vai vibhoḥ | | 21
sa eṣa bhagavānarko bhūtānugrahaṇe sthitaḥ |
etatte paramaṃ jñānametatte paramaṃ padam | | 22
tasya sthānavibhāgena pratimāsthāpanaṃ yathā |
tatte sarvaṃ pravakṣyāmi yathoktaṃ brahmaṇā purā | | 23
iti śrībhaviṣye mahāpurāṇe brāhme parvaṇi saptamīkalpe sāmbopākhyāne pratimāpratiṣṭhākalpe viśvarūpavarṇanaṃ nāma trayastriṃśadadhikaśatatamo.adhyāyaḥ | 133 |
atha catustriṃśadadhikaśatatamo.adhyāyaḥ
maṇḍalavidhivarṇanam
nārada uvāca
pratipacya dvitīyā ca caturthī pañcamī tathā |
daśamī trayodaśī caiva paurṇamāsī ca kīrtitā | | 1
somo bṛhaspatiścaiva śukraścaiva budhastathā |
ete saumyā grahāḥ proktāḥ pratiṣṭhāyajñakarmaṇi | | 2
triṣūttarāsu revatyāmaśvinyāṃ brāhmabhe tathā |
punarvasvostathā haste vāsave śravaṇe.athavā | |
bharaṇyāṃ caiva nakṣatre bhānoḥ sthāpanamuttamam | | 3
śodhayitvā tu vai bhūmiṃ tuṣakeśavivarjitām |
vālukāṅgārapāṣāṇāsthivihīnāṃ viśodhya tu | | 4
caturhastasamāyuktā vedī vistarato raveḥ | | 5
maṇḍapastu pramāṇena daśahastaḥ samaṃtataḥ |
maṇḍalaṃ vṛkṣaśākhābhiḥ kārayedvidhipūrvakam | | 6
nadīsaṅgamatīrotthāṃ mṛttikāṃ ca samānayet |
upalipya tato bhūmiṃ kārayetkuṇḍamuttamam | | 7
caturasraṃ śriyā yuktaṃ pūrvaṃ kuṇḍaṃ tu kārayet |
dakṣiṇe cārdhacandraṃ syādvāruṇyāṃ diśi vartulam | | 8
padmākāraṃ tu vai kuryāduttare ca vicakṣaṇaḥ |
toraṇāni tataḥ kuryātpañcahastāni suvrata | | 9
nyagrodhodumbarau caiva bilvapālāśameva ca |
aśvatthaśca śamī caiva candanaśceti kīrtitāḥ | | 1.134.10 śuklavastrasamāyuktaścitrapaṭṭasamanvitaḥ |
japamālānvitaḥ kuryāttoraṇāni vicakṣaṇaḥ | | 11
agnimī,leti mantreṇa yajedvai pūrvatoraṇam |
iṣetvorjeti mantreṇa yajeddakṣiṇatoraṇam | | 12
agna āyāhīti mantreṇa paścimaṃ tu samarcayet |
śaṃ no devīti mantreṇa yajeduttaratoraṇam | | 13
kalaśāṃstu samādāya hemagarbhasamanvitān |
śvetacandanapaṅkena kaṇṭhasvastikabhūṣaṇān | | 14 yavaśāliśarāvānnavastrālaṅkāravigrahān |
ājighreti ca mantreṇa kalaśāṃstu niveśayet | | 15
dukūlaścitrapaṭṭaiśca veṣṭayetstambhamālikām |
dhvajādarśapatākābhiścāmaraistu vitānakaiḥ | | 16
śaṅkhaghaṇṭāninādaiśca geyamaṅgalavācanaiḥ |
tūryabherīninādaiśca vedadhvanisamanvitaiḥ | | 17
puṇyaiśca jayaśabdaiśca kārayeta mahotsavam |
patākābhirvicitrābhiḥ pūjāmālyopaśobhitam | | 18
vicitrasragvitānāḍhyaṃ prakīrṇakusumāṅkuram |
tanmadhye tu kuśāstīrṇe devārcāṃ sthāpayed budhaḥ | | 19
patākāṃ pītavarṇāṃ tu pūrve śakrāya dāpayet |
āgneyyāṃ raktavarṇābhāṃ yamāśāyāṃ yamopamān | | 1.134.20
nīlāñjanasamaprakhyāṃ nairṛtyāṃ ca pradāpayet |
vāruṇyāṃ sitavarṇāṃ ca kṛṣṇāṃ vāyavyagocare | | 21
haritāṃ yakṣarājāya aiśānyāṃ sarvavarṇikām |
śvetaraktakacūrṇena padmamālekhayettataḥ | | 22
vaidyā vedīti mantreṇa vedyā ālabhanaṃ bhavet |
pūrvāgrānuttarāgrāṃśca kuśānāstīrya yatnataḥ | | 23
yogeyogeti mantreṇa kuśaścāstaraṇaṃ bhavet |
śayyā tatraiva kartavyā divyāstaraṇasaṃyutā | | 24
gaḍuke dve vicitre tu tanmadhye sthāpayedbudhaḥ | vicitradīpamālābhirbhakṣyabhojyānnapānakaiḥ | | 25
pūpakānsuvicitrānvai modakāṃśca pradāpayet |
pāyasaṃ kṛśaraṃ caiva dadhyodanasamanvitam | | 26
dadhi candrasamaprakhyaṃ śubhacchatraṃ ca vinyaset | | 27
iti śrībhaviṣye mahāpurāṇe brāhme parvaṇi saptamīkalpe sāmbopākhyāne sūryapratiṣṭhāyāṃ
maṃḍalavidhivarṇanaṃ nāma catustriṃśadadhikaśatatamo.adhyāyaḥ | 134 |
atha pañcatriṃśadadhikaśatatamo.adhyāyaḥ
pratiṣṭhāsnānavidhivarṇanam
nārada uvāca
ataḥ paraṃ pravakṣyāmi snānakarmavidhiṃ tava |
snāpakastu mahāprājño brāhmaṇo vedapāragaḥ | | 1
abhijñaḥ sauraśāstrāṇāmaruṇo yadusattama 1 |
bhojako bhojakaiścānyairbrāhmaṇaiśca tathā vṛtaḥ | | 2
diśābhāge maṇḍalasya īśāne vai yathākramam |
hastamātrapramāṇaṃ tu bhadrapīṭhaṃ tu vinyaset | | 3
hastinā śakaṭenāpi bhaktyā brahmarathena ca |
maṃgalairbrahmaghoṣaiśca devaṃ prāsādamānayet | | 4
bhadrapīṭhaṃ samādāya bhadraṃ karṇeti mantrataḥ |
sūtradhārastathā proktaḥ śuklāmbaradharaḥ śuciḥ | | 5
snāpayetkalaśaṃ gṛhya devadevaṃ vibhāvasum |
sāmudraṃ toyamāhṛtya jāhnavaṃ yāmunaṃ tathā | | 6
sārasvataṃ jalaṃ puṇyaṃ cāndrabhāgaṃ sasaindhavam |
puṣkarasya jalaṃ śreṣṭhaṃ giriprasravaṇodakam | | 7
anyadvāpi śuci toyaṃ nadīnadataḍāgajam |
yathāśaktyā upāhṛtya kalaśaiḥ kāñcanādibhiḥ | | 8
bhojakāścāṣṭabhiḥ sūryaṃ kalaśaiḥ snāpayanti vai |
tatastu maṇiratnāni sarvabījauṣadhīstathā | | 9
sugandhīni ca mālyāni sthalajānyambujāni ca |
candanāni ca mukhyāni gandhāśca vividhāstathā | | 1.135.10
brāhmī suvarcalā mustā viṣṇukrāntā śatāvarī |
dūrvā ca śibipuṣpī ca priyaṅgū rajanī vacā | | 11
sambhṛtyaitāṃstu sambhārānsnānakarmavibhāgavit |
balāśvatthaśirīṣāṇāṃ pallavaiḥ kuśasaṃyutaiḥ | | 12
kalaśopari vinyasya dadyādarghyaṃ raveḥ sadā |
kāñcanai rājataistāmrairmṛṇmayaiḥ kalaśaistathā | | 13
sākṣataiḥ sahiraṇyaiśca sarvauṣadhisamanvitaiḥ |
gāyatryā paripūtaistu ṣoḍaśaiḥ snāpayedravim | | 14
kuśottarāṃ tataḥ kṛtvā vediṃ pakveṣṭakāmayīm |
tasyāṃ vedyāṃ samāropya paridhāpya ca vāsasī | 15
pratimāmabhiṣiñcecca sopavāsaḥ prayatnataḥ |
mūrdhni sarvauṣadhīḥ kṛtvā tathaivāmalakāni ca | | 16
mantreṇa mṛttikāṃ cāpi mantrataśca jalaṃ tathā |
tvaṃ devī vanditā devaiḥ sakalairdaityadānavaiḥ | | 17
tena saṃsthāpitā mūrdhni mayā devasya śuddhaye |
ādistvaṃ sarvabhūtānāṃ devatānāṃ ca sarvathā | | 18
rasānāṃ pataye tubhyamāhvānaṃ ca kṛtaṃ mayā |
itthaṃ paurāṇikairmaṃtraivaidikaiśca viśeṣataḥ | | 19
kāryaṃ hi vāruṇaṃ snānaṃ devasya yadunaṃdana |
itthamuccārayedvācaṃ kuryātsnānaṃ vicakṣaṇaḥ | | 1.135.20
devāstvāmabhiṣiñcantu brahmaviṣṇuśivādayaḥ |
vyomagaṅgā ca pūrṇena dvitīyakalaśena tu | | 21
sārasvatasya pūrṇena kalaśena surottama |
śakrādayobhiṣiṃcantu lokapālāḥ surottamāḥ | | 22
sāgarodakapūrṇena caturthakalaśena tu |
vāriṇā paripūrṇena padmapatrasugandhinā | | 23
pañcamenābhiṣiñcantu nāgāśca kalaśena tu |
himavaddhemakūṭādyāścābhiṣiñcantu vāriṇā | | 24
nairṛtodakapūrṇena ṣaṣṭhena kalaśena tu |
sarvatīrthāmbupūrṇena padmareṇusuvāsinā | | 25
saptamenābhiṣiñcantu ṛṣayaḥ sapta ye varāḥ |
vasavaścābhiṣiñcantu kalaśenāṣṭamena vai | | 26
aṣṭamaṅgalayuktena devadeva namo.astu te |
tato vai kalaśairdivyaiḥ snānakarma samārabhet | | 27
samudraṃ gaccha yaḥ prokto mantrametamudīrayet |
hiraṇyagarbheti ca yo mantrastaṃ samudīrayet | | 28
samudrajyeṣṭheti mantreṇa kṣālayenmṛttikānvitam |
sinīvālīti mantreṇa dadyādvalmīkamṛttikām | | 29
śamyudumbaramaśvatthaṃ nyagrodhaṃ ca palāśakam |
yajñaṃ yajñeti mantreṇa dadyātpañcakaṣāyikam | | 1.135.30
pañcagavyaṃ pavitraṃ ca āharettāmrabhājane |
gāyatryā caiva gomūtraṃ gandhadvāreti gomayam | | 31
āpyāyasveti ca kṣīraṃ dadhikrāvṇeti vai dadhi |
tejo.asīti ghṛtaṃ tadvaddevasya tvā kuśodakam | | 32
evamādividhiyutaṃ pañcagavyaṃ prakīrtitam |
yā oṣadhīti maṃtreṇa snānamoṣadhibhiḥ kramāt | | 33
drupadābhiḥ punastasya kuryāccodvartanaṃ budhaḥ |
śiraḥ snānaṃ tato dadyānmānastokābhimantritam | | 34
viṣṇorarāṭamantreṇa dadyādgandhodakaṃ śubham |
tato nadyudbhavenaiva kṣālayecchuddhavāriṇā | | 35
jātavedasamuccārya vastrapūtena vāriṇā |
tata āvāhayeddevaṃ raktamālyāmbaraṃ śubham | | 36
ehyehi bhagavanbhāno lokānugrahakāraka |
yajñabhāgaṃ gṛhāṇārghyamarkadeva namo.astu te | | 37
hiraṇyena tu pātreṇa devāyārghyaṃ pradāpayet |
idaṃ viṣṇurvicakrame mantreṇārghyaṃ samarpayet | | 38
pārthivaiḥ prathamaṃ kalaśaiḥ snāpayedbhāskaraṃ budhaḥ |
tatastvaudumbarairvīra rājataistadanantaram | | 39
tatastu kāñcanairdevaṃ snāpayedyadunandana |
sarvatīrthajalairyuktaṃ sarvauṣadhisamanvitam | | 1.135.40
śaṅkhamādāya devasya tato mūrdhani śaṅkara |
dattvā puṣpāṇi devasya mūrdhni yatnādvicakṣaṇaḥ | |4 1
toyamutkṣipya yatnena tataḥ snapanamācaret |
prathamaṃ snāpayeddevaṃ vāriṇā yadunandana | | 42
tatastu payasā rājanpāyasena tatastu vai |
ghṛtena madhunā vāpi tathā ikṣurasena ca | | 43
agniṣṭomasya yajñasya gomedhasya ca suvrata |
jyotiṣṭomasya rājendra vājapeyasya vai vibho | | 44
rājasūyāśvamedhābhyāṃ ghṛtādyairlabhate phalam |
yastu kārayate snānaṃ yastu bhaktyā prapaśyati | |
kriyamāṇaṃ tu devasya snānaṃ yadukulodvaha | | 45
ya ete kathitā yajñā eteṣāṃ kramaśaḥ phalam |
arcāṃ ca kuruśārdūla dṛṣṭvā vai labhate phalam | | 46
snānaṃ tu yatnataḥ kāryaṃ devadevasya suvrata |
yathā na laṅghayetkaściddevasya snapanaṃ vibhoḥ | | 47
na prāśnanti yathā kākāstīrthaṃ lokavigarhitāḥ |
snānodakaṃ tu devasya athavā paya eva hi | | 48
bhūmau gataṃ yathā caiva prāśnāti yadunaṃdana |
rogaṃ prāpnoti kartā vai duḥkhaṃ kārayitā tathā | | 49
tasmādyatnena kartavyaṃ devasya snapanaṃ vibhoḥ | | 1.135.50
snāpayitvā krameṇetthaṃ snānakarma vidhānavit |
tato vardhanikāṃ gṛhya vāridhārāṃ samutsṛjet | | 51
trivārānpurato.arkasya ācamasveti ca bruvan | ve
dosīti ca mantreṇa upavītaṃ pravāpayet | | 52
bṛhaspateti mantreṇa vastrayugmaṃ pradāpayet |
yatnakramaṃ prakurvāṇaḥ puṣpamālāṃ pradāpayet | | 53
dhūrasīti ca mantreṇa dhūpaṃ dadyātsaguggalam |
samiddhoñjanamantreṇa añjanaṃ tu pradāpayet | | 54
yuñjānīti ca mantreṇa rocanāṃ tasya dāpayet |
ārārtikaṃ ca vai kuryāddīrghāyuṣṭvāya varcase | | 55
snānakarma tvidaṃ proktaṃ bhāskarasya mahātmanaḥ |
bhojakā brāhmaṇāścaiva kriyāṃ kuryuḥ prayatnataḥ | | 56
bahavṛco.atharvaṇaścaiva chandogodhvaryureva ca |
snāpakasya ca cihnāni ye ca mūrtidharāstathā | | 57
teṣāṃ pravakṣyāmi vibho śṛṇu caikamanāḥ kila |
sampūrṇagātro matimāñchāstrajñaḥ priyadarśanaḥ | | 58
kulīnaḥ śraddadhānaśca āryadeśasamudbhavaḥ |
na sthūlo na kṛśo dīrghaḥ sauraśāstraviśāradaḥ | | 59
yaśca yukto jitātmā ca gurubhakto jitendriyaḥ |
pañcaviṃśatitattvajñaḥ sthāpakaḥ samudāhṛtaḥ | | 1.135.60
varjanīyāṃśca vakṣyāmi yaistu karma na kārayet |
hīnāṅgaścādhikāṅgaśca vāmano vikaṭastathā | | 61
nātigauro na kṛṣṇaśca snāpanāya prayojayet |
cārvāko yājakaścaiva nityaṃ gomukhadambhakaḥ | | 62
aśucivratasaṃyuktaḥ śyāmadanto.atha matsarī |
kopano duṣṭaśīlaśca yuvā vā vṛddha eva ca | | 63
śvitrī kuṣṭhī ca rogī ca kāṇo durmatireva ca |
saṃkīrṇo jātihīnaśca tathā na vṛṣalīpatiḥ | | 64
kubjaścādhastathā vyaṃgaḥ khalvāṭo vikalendriyaḥ |
avinīto durātmā ca vikalaḥ paṅgureva ca | | 65
tithinakṣatrayogānāṃ vārāṇāṃ ca tathā vibho |
sūcako jīvikārthaṃ hi yaśca mūlyena pāṭhayet | | 66
īdṛśānsnāpakānsarvānvarjayeta prayatnataḥ |
tasmātsarvaprayatnena parīkṣyāḥ snāpakā budhaiḥ | | 67
iti śrībhaviṣye mahāpurāṇe brāhme parvaṇi saptamīkalpe sāṃbopākhyāne
sūryapratiṣṭhāsnānavidhivarṇanaṃ nāma pañcatriṃśadadhikaśatatamo.adhyāyaḥ | 135 |
atha ṣaṭtriṃśadadhikaśatatamo.adhyāyaḥ

sūryapratiṣṭhāvarṇanam
nārada uvāca
ataḥ paraṃ pravakṣyāmi adhivāsanamuttamam |
sahasraśīrṣā puruṣo maṇḍapaṃ yatnato viśet | | 1
tato.anye ca śucau deśe asaṃspṛṣṭopalepane |
maṇḍalaṃ pañcavarṇaistu ālikheccaturasrakam | | 2 patākātoraṇacchatradhvajamālyādyalaṃkṛtam |
vicitrasuvitānāḍhyaṃ prakīrṇakusumotkaraiḥ | | 3
tasya madhye kuśāstīrṇe mūrtiḥ sthāpyā vivasvataḥ |
tatrāsyāvāhanaṃ kṛtvā dadyādarghyaṃ vivasvate | | 4
suvarṇamadhuparkādi kṛtvā tatra vidhānataḥ |
devasya darśayedgāṃ ca savatsāṃ rohiṇīṃ śubhām | | 5
namo gopataye tubhyaṃ sahasrāṃśo prasīda me |
evamarghyeṇa sammantrya paridhāya ca vāsasī | | 6
yajñopavītamātithyaṃ tathābhyaṅgaṃ tathaiva ca |
vatsare vatsare tasya navamavyaṅgamāharet | | 7
śrāvaṇe māsi rājendra pavitraṃ tasya taddhi vai |
brāhmaṇānbhojayitvā tu varṣevarṣe prayojayet | | 8
avyaṅgaṃ yaduśārdūla śrāvaṇe māsi bhāskaram |
sarvagandhaiḥ samālabhya candanāgurukuṅkumaiḥ | | 9
alaṅkārairalaṅkṛtya kusumaiśca sugandhibhiḥ |
mālābhiśca vicitrābhirābaddhābhiranekaśaḥ | | 1.136.10
tato dhūpaṃ nivedyāśu pratimāgre prayatnataḥ |
sahasraśīrṣā puruṣo maṇḍapaṃ ca praveśayet | | 11
namaḥ śambhaveti mantreṇa śayyāyāṃ viniveśayet |
viśvataścakṣurityeva kuryātkamalaniṣkalam | | 12
punareva ca vakṣyāmi saṅkalīkaraṇaṃ śubham |
snāpane tu yathākāryaḥ svadehe nyāsa uttamaḥ | | 13
pratimāyāṃ tathā kāryo yathā cālambhanaṃ budhaḥ |
oṃ huṃ khaṣolkāya namo mūlamantraḥ prakīrtitaḥ | | 14
ādityo.ayaṃ svayaṃ devo hyakṣareṇopabṛṃhitaḥ |
oṃkāraṃ vinyasenmūrdhni huṃkāraṃ nāsikopari | | 15
khakāraṃ ca lalāṭe tu ṣakāraṃ vadane nyaset |
lakāraṃ caiva kaṃṭhe tu kakāraṃ hṛdaye nyaset | | 16
yakāraṃ tu bhuje vāme nakāraṃ dakṣiṇe bhuje |
makāraṃ vāmakukṣau ca visargaṃ dakṣiṇe nyaset || 17
oṃkāraṃ tu sadā dhyāyejjvālāmālāsamākulam |
huṅkāraṃ śuddhavarṇābhaṃ prasuvantamalaṃ śubham || 18
khakāraṃ cintayetprājño bhinnāñjanasamaprabham |
taruṇādityavarṇābhaṃ khakāraṃ cintayedbudhaḥ || 19
ṣokāraṃ tu mahābāho hemavarṇaṃ vicintayet |
śuklapadmanibhākāramakāraṃ ciṃtayedbudhaḥ ||1.136.20
jātīkusumasaṃkāśaṃ hrīṃkāraṃ sarvavarṇakam |
kṣīravarṇaṃ sakāraṃ tu cintayetsatataṃ budhaḥ ||2 1
nakāraṃ himakundābhaṃ makāramamṛtākṣaram |
hrīṃkāraṃ vidyutsaṃkāśaṃ hrīṃkāraṃ sarvavarṇakam ||221
kṣīravarṇaṃ sakāraṃ tu cintayetsatataṃ budhaḥ |
nakāraṃ svarṇavarṇābhaṃ makāraṃ kanakaprabham ||23
tato devaṃ mahātmānaṃ sahasrakiraṇaṃ ravim |
prasādābhimukhaṃ devaṃ śayanīye niveśayet ||24
agnikāryaṃ tataḥ kuryuragnikuṇḍeṣu vai dvijāḥ |
tato.araṇyāṃ samutthāpya agniṃ laukikameva vā ||25
prajvālyāgniṃ vidhānena kuryāddhomaṃ vicakṣaṇaḥ |
bahvṛcaḥ pūrvakāṇḍeṣu yāmyāṃ madhyandinastathā ||26
paścime caiva cchandoga uttare.atharvaṇo mataḥ |
madhye ca bhojakaḥ kuryāddhomaṃ yajñe yaduttama ||27
śamīpālāśodumbarāṇi hyapāmārgastathaiva ca |
dvādaśa tu sahasrāṇi aṣṭau catvāri eva ca ||28
dve trīṇi ca sahasrāṇi atha vā ekameva hi |
agnirmūrdheti mantreṇa kuṇḍasyālambhanaṃ bhavet ||29
ullikhyābhyukṣya tenaiva agniṃ dūtamiti smṛtāḥ |
sambudhyasvāgne mantreṇa garbhādhānaṃ tu kārayet ||1.136.3 0
sīmanteti punastatra mahāmantreṇa homayet |
jātakarma tathā proktaṃ prāṇāyāmaṃ vidurbudhāḥ | | 31
namaḥ svāheti mantreṇa nāmakaraṇameva ca |
annaprāśanamantreṇa annaprāśanamādiśet | | 32
jyeṣṭhamagreti mantreṇa tena cūḍopakarmaṇi |
vratabandhasya mantreṇa vratabandhaṃ samādiśet | | 33
samāvartanamityeva ākṛṣṇeti ca homayet |
patnīsaṃyojanaṃ caiva svayameva prakalpayet | | 34
agnihotrādikaṃ karma yajñakarmāṇi yāni ca |
mahāvyāhṛtimantreṇa hotavyāni samantataḥ | | 35
mātṛrṇāṃ yajñabhūtānāṃ balikarma pradāpayet |
sarvakāmasamṛddhyarthaṃ kārayedadhivāsanam | | 36
trirātraṃ pañcarātraṃ ca ahorātramathāpi vā |
tataḥ tvalaṅkṛtāṃ snātāṃ maṇiratnairvibhūṣitām | | 37
kṛtarakṣāṃ prayatnena pratimāmadhivāsayet |
devāgārādathaiśāne digbhāge divyamandiram | | 38
kṛtvā kuśaparistīrṇe varāstaraṇasaṃvṛte |
pūrvaśīrṣāṃ tathā śayyāṃ śuklāṃ śuklāmbarottarām | | 39 tasyāmāveśayetsamyaṅmahāśvetamupāharet |
nikṣubhā dakṣiṇe pārśve vāme rājñī ca kīrtitā | | 1.136.40
daṇḍapiṅgalakau cāsya sthitau pādapraveśitau |
tasyāṃ saṃveśitāyāṃ tu śarvaryāṃ pratimāṃ raveḥ | | 41
vasettāṃ rajanīṃ tatra stūyamānaścatudiśam |
brāhmaṇairbandibhiścāpi gītajñaiścāraṇaistathā | | 42
kuryājjāgaraṇaṃ tatra sūryabhaktisamanvitaiḥ |
prabhātāyāṃ tu śarvaryāṃ bodhayedṛgvidhānataḥ | | 43
haviṣyaṃ bhoktukāmāṃstu brāhmaṇānbhojakāṃstathā |
dakṣiṇābhiśca sampūjya taiḥ kṛtasvastivācanaḥ | |44
tato garbhagṛhasthāya madhye kṛtvā tu piṇḍikām |
vidhivattatra sauvarṇaṃ nyasetsaptahayaṃ ratham | |45
sarvabījauṣadhaiścaiva tatra dhṛtvā vidhānavit |
dattvārghyaṃ sthāpayettatra yajamānaḥ sahāyavān | | 46 śaṅkhadundubhinirghoṣairjaladhārāsahākṣataiḥ |
kṛtyā puṇyāhaśabdaṃ tu ālayasya pradakṣiṇām | |47
śubhalagne dine ṛkṣe pūrvāhṇe bhānave kṣaṇe |
muhūrte ca śubhe bhānoḥ pratimāṃ sthāpayedbudhaḥ | |48
nādhomukhīṃ nordhvamukhīṃ na pārśvāvanatāṃ tathā |
samāmabhimukhīṃ cemāṃ pratimāṃ tu niveśayet | |49
patnyau cāsya tataḥ samyakpārśvayorviniveśayet |
nikṣubhā dakṣiṇe pārśve rave rājñī tu vāmataḥ | | 1.136.50
tatastadupahārārthaṃ sambhāraṃ prāktamāhṛtaiḥ |
modakāyūṣikāpūpaśaṣkulībhūtaśīrṣakaiḥ | | 51
kṛśaraiḥ pāyasonmiśraiḥ sarvadikṣu kṣipedbalim |
indrāya devapataye baline vajrapāṇaye | |5 2
śatayajñādhipataye tasmai indrāya te namaḥ |
trātāramindramantreṇa indrasyāvāhanaṃ bhavet | | 53
agnaye raktanetrāya jvālāmālārcitāya vai |
śaktihastāya tīvrāya tathā caivājavāhine | |
āgreyyāmagrimantreṇa vahnerāvāhanaṃ smṛtam | | 54
daṇḍahastāya kṛṣṇāya mahiṣottamavāhine |
sūryaputrāya devāya dharmarājāya vai namaḥ | | 55
yamāya tviti mantreṇa mudrāstasyaiva kīrtitāḥ |
nairṛte khaḍgahastāya nīlalohitakāya ca | | 56
sarvabāhyādhipataye virūpākhyāya vai namaḥ |
āyaṃ gauriti mantreṇa nairṛtyāṃ tu prakalpayet ||57
vāruṇyāṃ pāśahastāya varuṇāyeti kalpayet |
mantreṇāvāhanaṃ vidyātpañcanadyaḥ sarasvatīm ||58
prāṇātmakāya dhūpāya avyaṅgāyānilāya ca |
dhvajahastāya bhīmāya namo gandhavahāya ca ||59
tasyāpyāvāhanaṃ vidyādyaddevādevaheḍanam |
gadāhastāya somāya śuṣmiṇe nṛgatāya ca ||1.136.6 0
gadāpaṭṭiśahastāya somarājāya vai namaḥ |
īśāvāsyaṃ ca guhyā vai somamantraḥ prakīrtitaḥ ||6 1
caturmukhāya devāya padmāsanagatāya ca |
kṛṣṇājinaniṣaṇṇāya namo lambodarāya ca ||62
gaṇādhipataye deva nīlakaṇṭhāya śūline |
virūpākṣāya rudrāya trailokyādhipate namaḥ ||
abhi tvā śūra no mantra īśānāya prakalpayet ||6 3
sarvanāgādhirājāya śvetavarṇāya bhogine |
sahasraphaṇine nityamanantāya namonamaḥ ||64
namo.astu sarpebhya iti mantraścaiva prakīrtitaḥ |
pañcarātrādibhirnyāso hyaṃganyāsaḥ prayujyate ||65
tathopakṣīrapānaiśca stutistotraiśca bhāskaram |
viprebhyo bhojakebhyaśca tato dadyācca dakṣiṇām ||66
sūryakratuṃ mahāpuṇyaṃ naiva kuryādadakṣiṇam |
sthāpyate.anena vidhinā tadbhaktaiḥ pratimā ca yā ||67
sā tu vṛddhikarā nityaṃ sānnidhyācca sadā bhavet |
saptajanmasu teṣāṃ tu na rogāḥ sambhavanti hi ||68
upāsate trirātraṃ ye bhānoryātrābhivāsane |
gandhamālyopahāraistu te yānti bhuvanaṃ raveḥ ||69
ātmīyaṃ parakīyaṃ vā pratimāsthāpanaṃ raveḥ |
yaḥ paśyati pumānbhaktyā sa svarlokamavāpnuyāt | | 1.136.70
daśānāmaśvamedhānāṃ vājapeyaśatasya ca |
phalaṃ prāpnoti puruṣaḥ pratiṣṭhāpya divākaram | | 71
yāvatkīrtiḥ puṇyakṛtā bhānoḥ sthāne niveśite |
tāvatsa tu yaduśreṣṭha sūryaloke mahīyate | | 72
sthāpane cāsya vai mantraḥ prokto lokeṣu pūjitaḥ |
dhruvā dyauśca dhruvā pṛthvī dhruvaṃ viśvamidaṃ jagat | |
śreyase yajamānasya tathā tvaṃ dhruvatāṃ vraja | | 73
sthāpayitvā raviṃ bhaktyā vidhidṛṣṭena karmaṇā |
māse māse ṛtuphalaṃ labhante nātra saṃśayaḥ | | 74
ekāhenāpi yadbhānoḥ pūjayā prāpyate phalam |
na tu kratuśatairvīra prāpyate mānavairbhuvi | | 75
kṛtvāpi sumahatpāpaṃ yaḥ paścātsevate ravim |
sa yāti sūryalokaṃ tu naro vigatakalmaṣaḥ | | 76
na bhavediṣṭakānāṃ ca dravaṇaṃ bhūmisaṃmiti |
svarge mahīyate tāvatkārako devaveśmanaḥ | | 77
khaṇḍasphuṭitasaṃskāraṃ kṛtvā yatphalamāpyate |
na tu kratusahasraistu prāpyate phalamuttamam | | 78
sikatāyāmapi gṛhaṃ yastu kuryādvibhāvasoḥ |
gopateḥ sa priyasadaḥ pragacchedgopatervaram | | 79
ityevaṃ suravarasya tasya bhānorbhūtānāṃ sthitinilayaprasūtihetoḥ |
śrībhāgī bhavati naro niketakārī kalpānāṃ vasati śataṃ sa sūryaloke | | 1.136.80
iti śrībhaviṣye mahāpurāṇe brāhme parvaṇi saptamīkalpe sāmbopākhyāne sūryapratiṣṭhāvarṇanaṃ nāma ṣaṭtriṃśadadhikaśatatamo.adhyāyaḥ |136 |
atha saptatriṃśadadhikaśatatamo.adhyāyaḥ
pratiṣṭhāpanavidhivarṇanam
nārada uvāca
yaḥ prāsādaṃ racayati pumāndevatānāṃ prayatnāttatra prītyā sapadi kurute sthāpanāṃ bhānubhaktaḥ |
divyānbhogā~mllabhati ca sadā kāmataścāprameyāṃstānbhuktvāsau punarapi bhaveccakravartī pṛthivyām | | 1
ye mānavāstridaśamūrtiniketanāni kurvanti sādhujanadṛṣṭimanoharāṇi |
teṣāṃ mṛte.apyaparamārthamaye śarīre loke paribhramati kīrtimayaṃ śarīram | | 2
iti te kathitamidaṃ devapūjyasya savituḥ sthāpanamivādhānam |
sādhāraṇaṃ vidhānaṃ śṛṇu devānāṃ pratiṣṭhāpane vīra | | 3
snāto bhukto vastrālaṅkṛtakusumairgandhaiḥ pratimāyā āstīrṇāyāṃ śayyāyāṃ sthāpanaṃ kuryāt |
suptāyāṃ tu sa nṛtyagītairjāgaraṇaiḥ samyagevādhivāsya daivajñena pratidiṣṭakāle saṃsthāpanaṃ kuryāt |
abhyarcya kusumagandhānulepanaiḥ śaṅkhatūryanirghoṣaiḥ prādakṣiṇyena nayedāyatanasya prayatnena kṛtvā baliṃ pratimāmabhyarcya brāhmaṇāṃśca sādhūndattvā hiraṇyakalaśaṃ vidhinā nikṣipetpiṃṇḍikāmadhye suśvabhre sthāpakadaivajñadvijānsamyagviśeṣato.abhyarcyākalpāntaṃ bhogī bhavatīha paratra sukhī | |4
viṣṇorbhāgavatā matāśca savituḥ śambhoḥ sabhasmadvijā mātṛrṇāmapi mātṛmaṇḍalavido viprā vidurbrāhmaṇāḥ |
sarve yasya vimuktaśuklavasanā buddhasya raktāmbarā ye yaṃ devamupāśritāḥ suvidhinā taistasya kāryā kriyā | | 5
sāmānyamidaṃ devānāmadhivāsanaṃ bhavati mayā kathitam |
kriyamāṇamidaṃ dṛṣṭvā devānāṃ pratiṣṭhāpanam | |
naro bhaktyā iha kāmānavāpya svargabhājanaṃ bhavati | | 6
idaṃ te kathitaṃ rājanpratiṣṭhāpanamāditaḥ |
yatkṛtvā savituḥ snānaṃ naro yāti manogatim | | 7
itthaṃ kuryānnaro bhaktyā savituḥ sthāpanaṃ budhaḥ |
kārayetpurato bhaktayā savituḥ sthāpanaṃ budhaḥ | | 8
itihāsapurāṇasya śravaṇaṃ pāpanāśanam |
tābhyāṃ hi śravaṇādvīra sānnidhyaṃ yāti bhāskaraḥ | | 9
kṛte tvāyatane tasminye cānye cāpi devatāḥ |
tasmātkāryaṃ budhairnityaṃ dharmaśravaṇamāditaḥ | | 1.137.10
vācakaṃ pūjayitvā tu brāhmaṇānupapūjya ca |
kārayedvācanaṃ vīra pustakasyāgrato raveḥ | | 11
sarvasvaṃ sthāpake dadyādyatkiñjidgṛhamāgatam |
godānamathavā dadyāttasya cittaṃ prasādayet | | 12
ityeṣa kathito vīra pratiṣṭhākalpa āditaḥ |
kṛtvā dṛṣṭvā ca śrutvā ca yaṃ naro.arkamavāpnuyāt | | 13
iti śrībhaviṣye mahāpurāṇe brāhme parvaṇi saptamīkalpe sāmbopākhyāne
pratiṣṭhāpanavidhivarṇanam nāma saptatriṃśadadhikaśatatamo.adhyāyaḥ | 137 |
athāṣṭatriṃśadadhikaśatatamo.adhyāyaḥ
dhvajāropaṇavidhivarṇanam
nārada uvāca
hanta te kathayiṣyāmi dhvajāropaṇamuttamam |
yaduktaṃ brahmaṇā pūrvamṛṣabhādhipate puraḥ | | 1
purā devāsure yuddhe yāni devairjayepsubhiḥ |
kṛtānyupari cihnāni vāhanāni dhvajāni tu | | 2
lakṣmacihnadhvajaṃ keturiti paryāyanāmabhiḥ |
kīrtitaḥ sa ca tasyeha pramāṇaṃ gadataḥ śṛṇu | | 3
dhvajo vaṃśasya kartavyastvaviddha ṛjuravraṇaḥ |
prāsādavyāsa tulyasya dhvajavaṃśapramāṇataḥ | | 4
devāgārasya ye proktā mañjarīkalaśādayaḥ |
atha vā tatpramāṇastu dhvajadaṇḍaḥ prakīrtitaḥ | | 5
antargṛhasya yā vedī sūtrataḥ parikalpitā |
tasyā vyāso bhavedvaṃśaḥ prasādasya yadūttama | | 6
atha vā mūlasūtreṇa yo vyāso.antargṛhasya tu |
prāsādavyāsa iti te proktaśceha na saṃśayaḥ | | 7
keturbhavedvaro vaṃśo na nimno na ṛjustathā |
patraṃ dhvaje yugaṃ caiva nalikāpuruṣastathā | | 8
caturhastā bhavantyete praśastāḥ kṛṣṇanandana |
aṣṭahastapramāṇastu viṃśārdhasya pramāṇataḥ | | 9
sāmānyo dhvajadaṇḍastu sarvasādhāraṇo mataḥ |
daṇḍapāṇidhvajo yastu smṛtaḥ ṣoḍaśahastavān | | 1.138.10
viṃśaddhastātparo daṇḍo na kāryaḥ sarvathā raveḥ |
yugmahastastu kartavyo dhvajadaṇḍo manīṣibhiḥ | | 11
caturaṅgulavistīrṇaḥ suvṛtto dvyaṅgulopari |
nātisūkṣmo na ca sthūlo na kāryo nataparvakaḥ | | 12
samaparvātu kartavyaḥ sudṛḍhaḥ sūkṣma eva hi |
vakraḥ putravināśāya savraṇo.arthavināśanaḥ | | 13
rogado yugmahastastu bhinno duḥkhamanantakam |
karoti hāni dharmasya hīno yastu pramāṇataḥ | | 14
vaiṣamyamasamaparvā dadyātkṛcchramadhonnataḥ |
jayo jayanto jaitreyaḥ śatruhantā jayāvahaḥ | | 15
nandopanandanau caivendropendrau gaditau tathā |
daśaite kīrtitā bhedā dhvajasyānandasammitāḥ | | 16
dvijahastastu jayo daṇḍo jayanto dviguṇo mataḥ |
dvādaśahastastu jaitreyaḥ śatruhantā kalānvitaḥ | | 17
jayāvahastu viṃśārdho nanda ādityasannibhaḥ |
caturdaśopanandastu indraḥ ṣoḍaśa ucyate | | 18
upendro.aṣṭādaśaḥ proktastathendro viṃśatiḥ smṛtaḥ |
bhinno vakro.asādhitaśca na kāryo daṇḍa eva hi | | 19
mūlamantreṇa kartavyo vyāsato.antargṛhasya tu |
dhvajadaṇḍo mahābāho atha vā vāstumānataḥ | | 1.138.20
mañjarīmānato vāpi tadardhenāthavā vibho |
patākā vai śubhā kāryā dhvajavaṃśāvalambinī | | 21
devāgārasya śikharāttribhāgaparimārjanī |
sā proktā daśadhā vīra mānatomānatastathā | | 22
aṅkuraḥ pallavaścaiva skandhaḥ śākhā tathaiva ca |
patākā kadalī vīra keturlakṣma jayastathā | | 23
dhvajaśca daśamaḥ proktaḥ sarvadevamayovyayaḥ |
aṅkuro dvayaṃgulaḥ proktaḥ pallavaścaturaṅgulaḥ | | 24
skandhaḥ ṣaḍaṅgulaḥ proktaḥ śākhā cāṣṭāṅgulo matā |
ekādaśapatākā tu kadalī ca caturdaśa | | 25
ketustu ṣoḍaśaḥ prokto lakṣmāṣṭādaśamucyate |
jayā viṃśati vai proktā etāvattvaṅgulāni tu | | 26
devāgārasya kumbhasya prasannā sā pramārjanī |
aṅkureti patākā sā vijñeyā yadunandana | | 27
pallaveti dvitīyasya mārjanī parikīrtitā |
tribhāgamārjanīskandhaḥ śākhā vai pañcamasya tu | | 28
ṣaṣṭhasyoktā patākā tu kadalī saptamasya tu |
aṣṭamasya tathā keturlakṣma ca navamasya tu | | 29
tatastu daśamaḥ prokto jayanto yadunandana |
vṛṣasthānāvamārgī tu dhvajastu parikīrtitaḥ | | 1.138.30
gajo meṣo.atha mahiṣaḥ kabandhastu vṛṣastathā |
hariṇo.atha naraścaiva naraśca narasattama | | 31
sthānānyetāni bhūyo.atha prayuktasya dhvajasya tu |
diśabhāge tu pūrvāttu krameṇa parikalpayet | | 32
evaṃ daśavidhā proktā patākā tattvadarśibhiḥ |
kartavyā sā yathāpūrvaṃ tacchṛṇu tvaṃ narādhipa | | 33
śuklavastramayī citrā saghaṇṭā sumanoharā |
nānācāmarasampannā kiṅkiṇījālamaṇḍitā | | 34
dhvajāgre caiva kartavyo devatāliṅgasūcakaḥ |
kāñcano vātha raupyo vā maṇiratnamayo.api vā | | 35
raṅgakairlikhyate vāpi tadvāhanasamākṛtiḥ |
dhvajadaṇḍo.atra vinyastaḥ kartavyo yadunandana | | 36
garutmātmāṃstu dhvajo viṣṇorīśvarasya dhvajo vṛṣaḥ |
brahmaṇaḥ paṅkajaṃ kāryaṃ raverdharmaḥ smṛto dhvajaḥ | | 37
haṃso jalādhipasyoktaḥ somasya tu naro dhvajaḥ |
baladevasya kālastu kāmasya makaradhvajaḥ | | 38
siṃho dhvajastu durgāyāḥ kīrtito yadunandana |
godhā cāpi umādevyā raivatasya hayaḥ smṛtaḥ | | 39
kacchapo varuṇasyokto vātasya hariṇo mataḥ |
pāvakasya tathā meṣa āsurgaṇapatermataḥ | | 1.138.40
brahmarṣīṇāṃ kuśaḥ prokta ityeṣā dhvaja kalpanā |
yasya yadvāhanaṃ proktaṃ tattasya dhvaja ucyate | | 41
viṣṇordhvaje tu sauvarṇaṃ daṇḍaṃ kuryādvicakṣaṇaḥ |
patākā cāpi pītā syādgaruḍasya samīpagā | | 42
īśvarasya dhvaje daṇḍo rājato yadunandanaḥ |
patākā cāpi śuklā syādvṛṣabhasya samīpagā | | 43
pitāmahadhvaje daṇḍaḥ smṛtastāmramayo budhaiḥ |
padmavarṇā patākā syātpaṅkajasya samīpagā | | 44
ādityasya ca sauvarṇo dhvaje daṇḍaḥ prakīrtitaḥ |
pañcavarṇā patākā syāddharmasyādhogatā nṛpa | | 45
kiṅkiṇījālasampannā nānabudbudasannibhā |
puṣpamālopasampannā nānāvādibhirāvṛtā | | 46
daṇḍa indradhvajasyoktaḥ kāñcano yadunandana |
patākā bahuvarṇā syātkuñjarasya samīpagā | | 47
āyasaścāpi daṇḍokto yamacihnaṃ vicakṣaṇaiḥ |
patākā varṇataḥ kṛṣṇā mahiṣasya samīpagā | | 48
jalādhipadhvajo daṇḍo rājataḥ parikīrtitaḥ |
patākā sarvataḥ śvetā vicitrā sā ca kathyate | | 49
dhvaje cāpi kuberasya daṇḍo maṇimayaḥ smṛtaḥ |
patākā cāpi raktā syānnarapādasamīpagā | | 1.138.50
baladevadhvaje daṇḍo rājato yadunandana |
patākā varṇataḥ śuklā tālasyādhogatā smṛtā | | 51
kāmadhvaje trilohaḥ syāddaṇḍo yadukulodvaha |
patākā rohiṇī tatra makarasya samīpagā | | 52
māyūraṃ kārttikeyasya cihnaṃ lokeṣu gīyate |
trilohadaṇḍamārūḍhaṃ bahuratnavibhūṣitam | | 53
bahuvarṇakacitrā tu patākā kathitā budhaiḥ |
hastidantabhavaṃ daṇḍaṃ kuryādgaṇapaternṛpa | | 54
tāmradaṇḍaṃ samāruḍhaṃ saṃśuddhaṃ sampratiṣṭhitam |
śuklā patākā kartavyā supramāṇā mahīpate | | 55
mātṛrṇāṃ cāpi kartavyo naikarūpo dhvajo budhaiḥ |
patākābhiranekābhibarhuratnābhiranvitaḥ | | 56
revatasyāpi kartavyo dhvajo vājī narādhipa |
raktā patākā tatrāpi kartavyā yadunandana | | 57
cāmuṇḍāmandire kāryaḥ śiromālākulo dhvajaḥ |
nīlā patākā kartavyā daṇḍo lohamayastathā | | 58
rītīmayaśca mātṛrṇāṃ revatasya ca kārayet |
gauryā dhvajastāmramayaḥ patākā gopasannibhā | | 59
svarṇadaṇḍastu vīrasya dhvajo meṣasamanvitaḥ |
patākā bahuratnāḍhye kartavyā yadunandana | | 1.138.60
aśmasāramayo daṇḍo dhvajo vātasya ucyate |
patākā kṛṣṇavarṇā tu hariṇasya samīpagā | | 61
bhagavatyā dhvajo daṇḍaḥ sarvaratnamayaḥ smṛtaḥ |
patākā tu trivarṇā syātsiṃhasyādhogatā nṛpa | | 62
evaṃvidhamimaṃ kṛtvā dhvajaṃ lakṣaṇalakṣitam |
adhivāsya tato rājaṃstata āropayedbudhaḥ | | 63
tataḥ sarvauṣadhībhiśca snāpayitvā prayatnataḥ |
samālabhya ca badhnīyānmadhye pratisarānnṛpa | | 64
kalpayitvā śubhāṃ vediṃ kalaśairupaśobhitām |
tasyāṃ vedyāṃ samāropya tāṃ rātrimadhivāsayet | | 65
nānākusumacitrāṃ ca srajaṃ tasyānulambayet |
samabhyarcya prayatnena dhūpamasya nivedayet | | 66
balikarma tataḥ kṛtvā kṛśarāpūpakādibhiḥ |
palālapūpikābhiśca dadhipāyasasūpakaiḥ | | 67
uddiśya lokapālebhyo baliṃ dadyācca vāyasaiḥ |
brāhmaṇānsvasti vācyātha kṛtvā puṇyāhamaṅgalam | | 68
vāditrakṛtanirghoṣaṃ jalaṃ saṃskārasaṃyutam |
nānābudbudasapannaṃ veṣṭitaṃ navavāsasā | | 69
śubhe lagne dine ṛkṣe dhvajaṃ cāropayedbudhaḥ |
vinyasya svarṇakalaśaṃ śvabhrarājaṃ dhvajasya tu | | 1.138.70
evamāropayedyastu dhvajaṃ devālayopari |
sa śriyā vardhate nityaṃ prāpnoti paramāṃ gatim | | 71
asurā vāsamicchanti dhvajahīne surālaye |
tasmāddevālayaṃ prājño dhvajahīnaṃ na kārayet | | 72
mantraśca sthāpane prokto vidhānajñairdhvajasya tu |
ehyehi bhagavandeva devavāhana vai khaga | | 73
śrīkaraḥ śrīnivāsaśca jaya jaitropaśobhita |
vyomarūpa mahārūpa dharmātmaṃstvaṃ ca vai gateḥ | | 74
sānnidhyaṃ kuru daṇḍe.asminsākṣī ca dhruvatāṃ vraja |
kuru vṛddhiṃ sadā kartuḥ prāsādasyārkavallabha | | 75
oṃ ehyehi bhagavannīśvaravinirmita uparicaravāyumārgānusāriñchrīnivāsa ripudhvaṃsa
yakṣanilaya sarvadevapriyaṃ kuru sānnidhyaṃ śānti svastyayanaṃ ca mebhayaṃ sarvavighnā vyapasarantu | | 76
mantreṇānena rājendra śvabhre daṇḍe niveśayet |
patākāṃ pūrvamantreṇa sthityā pūrvamukho nṛpa | | 77
kṣipedūrdhvamathākāśaṃ prāsādaśikharādvibhoḥ |
yajamānastataḥ paśyetpatākāṃ yadunandana | | 78
prāsādapurato vāpi patākāṃ pātayedyadi |
indralokaṃ tadā kartā viśedvai yadunandana | | 79
āgneyyāmagnilokaṃ tu yāmyāṃ yamasado bhajet |
naiṛtyāṃ naiṛtaṃ lokaṃ vāruṇyaḥ vāruṇaṃ vrajet | | 1.138.80
yasya devasya yadveśma kṛtaṃ yadukulodvaha |
tasya lokamavāpnoti vṛṣasthānagato yadi | | 81
vāyavye vāyumāpnoti saumyāyāṃ somamāpnuyāt |
aiśānyāmīśamāpnoti kartā vai devaveśmanaḥ | | 82
ya evaṃ kārayedbhaktyā dhvajasyāropaṇaṃ raveḥ |
sa hi bhuktvā parānbhogānsūryaloke mahīyate | | 83
tejasāmbujasaṃkāśaḥ kāntyā cāmbujasannibhaḥ |
dvijātitulyaḥ prabhayā vikrameṇa ca gopateḥ | | 84
iti śrībhaviṣye mahāpurāṇe brāhme parvaṇi saptamīkalpe sāmbopākhyāne
dhvajāropaṇavidhivarṇanaṃ nāmāṣṭatriṃśadadhikaśatatamo.adhyāyaḥ | 138 |
athaikonacatvāriṃśadadhikaśatatamo.adhyāyaḥ
bhojakānayanavarṇanam
sāmba uvāca
tvatprasādānmayā prāptaṃ rūpametatpurātanam |
pratyakṣadarśanaṃ cāpi bhāskarasya mahātmanaḥ | | 1
sarvametattu samprāpya punaścintākulaṃ manaḥ |
devasya paricaryāyāḥ pālanaṃ kaḥ kariṣyati | | 2
guṇayuktaṃ dvijaṃ kiñcitsamarthaṃ paripālane |
mamaivānugrahādbrahmandvijaṃ vyākhyātumarhasi | | 3
evamuktastu sāmbena nāradaḥ pratyuvāca tam |
na dvijāḥ parigṛhṇanti devasya svīkṛtaṃ dhanam | | 4
vidyate hi dhanaṃ hyatra guṇaścāyaṃ pratigrahaḥ |
devacaryāgatairdravyaiḥ kriyā brāhmī na vidyate | | 5
avajñayā ca kurvanti ye kriyāṃ lobhamohitāḥ |
apāṅkteyā bhavantīha te vai devalakā dvijāḥ | | 6
devasvaṃ brāhmaṇatvaṃ ca yo lobhādupajīvati |
sa pāpātmā naro loke gṛdhrocchiṣṭena jīvati | |
tato na brāhmaṇaḥ kaściddevacaryāṃ kariṣyati | | 7
vidhijñaṃ jñānavantaṃ ca paricaryākṣamaṃ tathā |
deva eva tamākhyātuṃ tasmāttaṃ śaraṇaṃ vraja | | 8
athavā yaduśārdūla ugrasenapurohitam |
gatvā gauramukhaṃ pṛccha sa te kāmaṃ vidhāsyati | | 9
nāradenaivamuktastu sāmbo jāmbavatīsutaḥ |
sukhāsīnaṃ gṛhe vīra ugrasenapurohitam | | 1.139.10
kṛtapūrvāhṇikaṃ vīra vipraṃ gauramukhaṃ nṛpa |
vinayenopasaṅgamya sāmbo vākyamathābravīt | | 11
mayā bhānoḥ prasādena kāritaṃ vipulaṃ gṛham |
sapatnīkaṃ sasainyaṃ ca pṛthivyāṃ sāravatsthitam | | 12
sarvaṃ tasminmayā dattaṃ kṛtaṃ mūrteśca maṇḍalam |
tasmādiṣṭvā viśiṣṭebhyo deyaṃ dānaṃ manogatam | | 13
tatsarvaṃ mama samprītyā gṛhāṇa tvaṃ mahāmune |
sāmbavākyamidaṃ śrutvā pratyuvāca mahāmuniḥ | | 14
gauramukha uvāca
bravīmyahamaśeṣeṇa yathāvadanupūrvaśaḥ |
ahaṃ vipro bhavānrājā sa ca devaparigrahaḥ | |
aparasparamevaṃ tu grahaṇaṃ me virudhyate | | 15
brahmavidyāpraṇītāni svakarmāṇi dvijātayaḥ |
kurvāṇā na prahīyante anyathā bhinnavṛttayaḥ | | 16
kṣāntiradhyāpanaṃ jāpaḥ satyaṃ ca yadunandana |
etāni viprakarmāṇi na devārthaparigrahaḥ | | 17
yadi devārthadānaṃ syāttato devalakā dvijāḥ |
devadravyābhilāṣaśca brāhmaṇyaṃ tu vimuñcati | | 18
devadvāre ca yaddānaṃ brāhmaṇāya prayacchati |
dvāvetau pāpakartārāvātmadoṣeṇa mānavau | | 19
devārthadānaṃ vārṣṇeya yadgṛhītvā ca yo dvijaḥ |
śrāddhe vā yadi vā satre tajjuhoti dadāti vā | |
bhinna vṛtto dvijaḥ pāpo rākṣasaḥ so.abhijāyate | | 1.139.20
dvijo devalako yatra paṅktyāṃ bhuṅkte mahīpate |
annānyupaspṛśennīcā sā paṅktiḥ pāpamācaret | | 21
dvijo devalako yasya saṃskāraṃ samprayacchati |
so.adhomukhānpitṛrnsarvānākramya vinipātayet | | 22
ātmānaṃ pātayedyastu sonyānuddharate katham
uddhariṣyati cātmānamityeṣā kalpanādhamā | | 23
yo haṭhācca bhayāccaiva kurute raviveśmanaḥ |
vṛttiṃ vidhatte vipratvātpatitassa tu jāyate | | 24
sapratigrahamantreṇa dvijo.aśnāti parigraham |
devapratigrahārtheṣu vedavākyaṃ na vidyate | | 25
tasmādrājā na devārthaṃ vipre dadyātkathañcana |
brahmasūtramahaṃ chittvā gamiṣyāmīti gamyatām | | 26
sāmba uvāca
agrāhyaṃ cedvijātibhyaḥ kasmai deyamidaṃ mayā |
śrutaṃ vā dṛṣṭapūrvaṃ vā tanme vyākhyātumarhasi | | 27
gauramukha uvāca
magāya samprayaccha tvaṃ purametacchubhaṃ vibho |
tasyādhikāro devānne devatānāṃ ca pūjane | | 28
sāmba uvāca
ko.ayaṃ mageti te proktāḥ kva vāsau vasate vibho |
kasya putro dvijaśreṣṭha kimācāraḥ kimākṛtiḥ | | 29
gauramukha uvāca
yo.ayaṃ mageti vai prokto mago divyo dvijottamaḥ |
nikṣubhāyāṃ 1 suto vīra ādityātmaja ucyate | | 1.139.30
sāmba uvāca
kathaṃ sa nikṣubhāputraḥ kathaṃ vīrasutastathā |
kathaṃ cādityatanayo mago.asāvucyatena.agha | | 31
gauramukha uvāca
mānuṣatvaṃ gatā devī nikṣubhā kila yādava |
gatā śāpamavāpyeha bhāskarāllokapūjitā | | 32
gotraṃ mihiramityāhustasmai brāhmaṇyamuttamam |
sujihvā nāma dharmātmā ṛṣiputraḥ purānagha | | 33
tasyātmajā samutpannā nikṣubhā sā varāṅganā |
rūpeṇāpratimā loke hāralīlā matā tu sā | | 34
piturniyogātsā kanyā viharejjātavedasi | | 35
viharantī yathānyāyaṃ samiddhe pāvake tathā |
atha tāṃ devadeveśo hyaṃśumālī dadarśa ha | | 36
rūpayauvanasampannāṃ tataḥ kāmavaśaṃ gataḥ |
cintayāmāsa deveśaḥ kathaṃ tāṃ vai bhajāmyaham | | 37
anayāvahṛto yo.ayaṃ pāvako devapūjitaḥ |
vanamāviśya tanvaṅgīṃ bhajeyaṃ lokapūjitām | | 38
iti sañcintya deveśaḥ sahasrāṃśurdivaspati |
viveśa pāvakaṃ vīra tatputraścābhavattadā | | 39
tato vilāsalāvaṇyarūpayauvanaśālinī |
samiddhaṃ laṅghayitvāgniṃ jagāmāyatalocanā | | 1.139.40
kruddhaḥ svarūpamāsthāya dṛṣṭvā kanyāṃ sa pīḍitaḥ |
karaṃ kareṇa saṅgṛhya tatastāṃ havyavāhanaḥ | | 41
uvāca yaduśārdūla nodito bhāskareṇa tu |
vedoktaṃ vidhimutsṛjya yathāhaṃ laṃghitastvayā | |4 2
tasmānmattaḥ samutpanno na ca putro bhaviṣyati |
jaraśabda iti khyāto vaṃśakīrtivivardhanaḥ | | 43
agnijātyā magāḥ proktāḥ somajātyā dvijātayaḥ |
bhojakādityajātyā hi divyāste parikīrtitāḥ | |44
tāmevamuktvā bhagavānādityo.antaratastadā |
athotpannāṃ prajāṃ jñātvā dhyānayogena vai ṛṣiḥ | | 45
patitaḥ syānmahātejā ṛgjihvaḥ sumahāmatiḥ |
śāpamudyamya tejasvī ṛgjihvo vākyamabravīt | | 46
ātmāparādhātkāminyā yathā garbho nalāvṛtaḥ |
sambhūtaste mahābhāge apūjyo.ayaṃ bhaviṣyati | | 47
putraśokābhisantaptā bālā paryākulekṣaṇā |
cintayāmāsa duḥkhārtā tamekaṃ jvalanākṛtim | | 48
tato devavariṣṭhasya mama yonisamudbhavaḥ |
ayaṃ datto mahāśāpaḥ pūjyatāṃ kartumarhasi | |4 9
bhavetpūjyo hi me putro deveśvara tathā kuru |
evaṃ ciṃtayamānastu bhagavānaryamā kila | | 1.139.50
āgneyaṃ rūpamāśritya cedaṃ vacanamabravīt |
snigdho gambhīranirghoṣaḥ śānto jvaravivarjitaḥ | | 51
ṛgjihraḥ sumahātejā dharmaṃ carati suvrata |
tenotsṛṣṭaṃ mahāśāpaṃ nānyathā kartumutsahe | | 52
kiṃ tu kāryagarīyastvādātmano yogyamuttamam |
tava putraṃ vidhāsyāmi cāpūjyaṃ vedapāragam | | 53
vaṃśaśca sumahāṃstasya nivasiṣyati bhūtale |
mamāṅgāni mahātmāno vāśiṣṭhā brahmavādinaḥ | | 54
madgāyanā madyajanā madbhaktā matparāyaṇāḥ |
mama śuśrūṣakāścaiva mama ca vratacāriṇaḥ | | 55
tvāṃ ca māṃ ca yathānyāyaṃ vedaṃ tattvārthadarśinaḥ |
pūjayiṣyanti niratāḥ sadā madbhāvabhāvitāḥ | | 56
matkarmaṇāṃ madaṅgānāṃ madbhāvaviniveśanāt |
virajā matprasādena māmevaiṣyantyasaṃśayam | | 57
jaṭāśmaśrudharā nityaṃ sadā mayi parāyaṇāḥ |
pañcakālavidhānajñā vīrakālasya yajvinaḥ | | 58
pūrṇekadakṣiṇe pāṇau varma vāmena dhārayan |
patidānena vadanaṃ pracchādya niyataḥ śuciḥ | | 59
prāṇaṃ hi mahatāṃ kṛtvā tato bhuñjīta vāgyataḥ |
ayamāccāprasādācca vyākulendriyacetasā | | 1.139.60
vidhihīnaṃ maṃtrahīna ye vai yakṣyanti māmataḥ |
te.api svargāccyutāḥ klāntā ramante sūryasannidhau | | 61
evaṃvidhāstava sutā bhaviṣyanti mahītale |
magavaṃśe mahātmāno vedavedāṅgapāragāḥ | | 62
evamāśvāsya tāṃ devīṃ bhāskaro vāritaskaraḥ |
antadardhe mahātejāḥ sā ca harṣamavāpa ha | | 63
evamete samutpannā bhojakāḥ kṛṣṇanandana |
viṣṇubhāste tathādityā utpannā lokapūjitāḥ | | 64
teṣāmetatpuraṃ dehi paryāptāste pratigrahe |
tvadīyasyāsya me vīra tathā bhāskarapūjane | | 65
tasya gauramukhasyedaṃ vākyaṃ śrutvā sa yādavaḥ |
sāmbo jāmbavatīputraḥ praṇamya śirasoktavān | | 66
kva vasante mahātmāna ete bhāskaraputrakāḥ |
bhojakā dvijaśārdūla yena tānānayāmyaham | | 67
gauramukha uvāca
nāhaṃ jāne mahābāho vasante yatra vai magāḥ |
jānīte tānravirvīra tasmāttaṃ śaraṇaṃ vraja | | 68
brāhmaṇenaivamuktastu praṇamya śirasā ravim |
jagāda bhāskaraṃ sāmbaḥ kaste pūjāṃ kariṣyati | | 6 9-
vijñaptastveva sāmbena pratimā tamuvāca ha |
na yogyāḥ paricaryāyāṃ jambūdvīpe mamānagha | | 1.139.70
mama pūjākaraṃ gatvā śākadvīpādihānaya |
lavaṇodātpare pāre kṣīrodena samāvṛtaḥ | | 71
jambūdvīpātparo yasmācchākadvīpa iti smṛtaḥ |
tatra puṇyā janapadāścaturvarṇasamanvitāḥ | | 72
magāśca magagāścaiva gānagā mandagāstathā |
magā brāhmaṇabhūyiṣṭhā magagāḥ kṣatriyāḥ smṛtāḥ | | 73
vaiśyāstu gānagā jñeyāḥ śūdrāsteṣāṃ tu mandagāḥ |
na teṣāṃ saṅkaraḥ kaściddharmāśrayakṛte kvacit | | 74
dharmasyāsya vicāro vā hyekataḥ sukhinaḥ prajāḥ |
tejasaste madīyasya nirmitā viśvakarmaṇā | | | | 75
tebhyo vedāstu catvāraḥ sarahasyā mayoditāḥ |
vedoktairvividhaiḥ stotraiḥ parairguhyairmayā kṛtaiḥ | | 76
te ca dhyāyanti māmeva yajante māṃ ca nityaśaḥ |
manmānasā madyajanā madbhaktā matparāyaṇāḥ | | 77
mama śuśrūṣakāścaiva mama ca vratacāriṇaḥ |
avyaṅgadhāriṇaścaiva vidhidṛṣṭena karmaṇā | | 78
kurvanti te sadā bhadrāṃ mama pūjāṃ mamānugāḥ |
tathā devāḥ sagandharvāḥ siddhāśca saha cāraṇaiḥ | |
viharante ramante ca dṛśyamānāśca taiḥ saha | | 79
jambūdvīpe tvahaṃ viṣṇurvedavedāṅgapūjitaḥ |
śakro.ahaṃ śālmalīdvīpe krauñcadvīpe hyahaṃ bhagaḥ | | 1.139.80
plakṣadvīpe tvahaṃ bhānuḥ śākadvīpe divākaraḥ |
puṣkare ca smṛto brahmā tataścāhaṃ maheśvaraḥ | | 81
tānmagānmama pūjārthaṃ śākadvīpādihānaya |
āruhya garuḍaṃ sāmba śīghraṃ gatvāvicārayan | | 82
tatheti gṛhya tāmājñāṃ raverjāmbavatīsutaḥ |
punardvāravatīṃ gatvā kāntyātīva samanvitaḥ | | 83
ākhyātavānpituḥ sarvaṃ svakīyaṃ devadarśanam |
tasmācca garuḍaṃ labdhvā yayau sāmbo.adhiruhya tam | | 84
śākadvīpamanuprāpya samprahṛṣṭatanūruhaḥ |
tatrāpaśyadyathoddiṣṭānsāmbastejasvino magān | | 85
vivasvantaṃ pūjayanto dhūpadīpādibhiḥ śubhaiḥ |
so.abhivādya ca tānpūrvaṃ kṛtvāpyeṣāṃ pradakṣiṇām | | 86
pṛṣṭvā cānāmayaṃ teṣāṃ praśaṃsāsāmapūrvakam |
yūyaṃ hi puṇyakarmāṇo draṣṭavyārthe śubhārthinaḥ | |
ratā ye.arkasya pūjāyāṃ yeṣāṃ caiva varapradaḥ | | 87
tanayaṃ vitta māṃ viṣṇoḥ sāmbaṃ nāmnā ca viśrutam |
candrabhāgātaṭe cāpi mayā sūryo niveśitaḥ | | 88
tenāhaṃ preṣitaścātra uttiṣṭhadhvaṃ vrajāmahe |
te tamūcustataḥ sāmbamevametanna saṃśayaḥ | | 89
asmākamapi devena vyākhyātāṃ pūrvameva hi |
aṣṭādaśa kulānīha magānāṃ vedavādinām | |
yāsyanti ye tvayā sārdhaṃ yathā devena bhāṣitam | | 1.139.90
tatastāni daśāṣṭau ca kulānīha samantataḥ |
āropya garuḍe sāmbastvaritaḥ punarabhyagāt | | 91
so.alpenaiva tu kālena prāpto mitravanaṃ tataḥ |
kṛtvājñāṃ tu raveḥ sāmbaḥ kṛtsnaṃ tvevaṃ nyavedayat | | 92
raviḥ śobhanamityuktvā prasannaḥ sāmbamabravīt |
mama pūjākarā hyete prajānāṃ śāntikārakāḥ | | 93
mama pūjāṃ kariṣyanti vidhānoktāṃ yadūttama |
tatkṛte na punaścintā tava kācidbhaviṣyati | | 94
iti śrībhaviṣye mahāpurāṇe brāhme parvaṇi saptamīkalpe sāmbopākhyāne bhojakānayanaṃ
nāmaikonacatvāriṃśadadhikaśatatamo.adhyāyaḥ | 139 |
atha catvāriṃśadadhikaśatamo.adhyāyaḥ
bhojakotpattivarṇanam
sumanturuvāca
evaṃ sa ānayitvā tu magānsāmbo mahīpate |
sa mahātmā purā sāmbaścandrabhāgāsarittaṭe | | 1
puraṃ niveśayāmāsa sthāpayitvā divākaram |
kṛtvā dhanasamṛddhaṃ tu bhojakānāṃ samarpayat | | 2
tatpuraṃ savituḥ puṇyaṃ triṣu lokeṣu viśrutam |
sāṃbena kāritaṃ yasmāttasmātsāmbapuraṃ smṛtam | | 3
tasminpratiṣṭhito devaḥ puramadhye divākaraḥ |
satkṛtya sthāpitāḥ sarve ātmanāmāṅkite pure | | 4
magānāṃ tu sadācāro dṛṣṭācārakulocitaḥ |
devaśuśrūṣaṇaṃ gītaṃ vedaproktena karmaṇā | | 5
kṛtakṛtyastadā sāmbo varaṃ labdhvā punaryuvā |
ādidevaṃ surajyeṣṭhamādityaṃ praṇipatya saḥ | | 6
anantaraṃ magānsarvānpraṇipatyābhivādya ca |
prasthito nirmalaḥ sāmbaḥ purīṃ dvāravatīṃ tadā | | 7
magānāṃ kāraṇārthena prārthitā bhojavaṃśajāḥ |
vasudevasya pautreṇa gotrajena mahātmanā | | 8
kanyādānaṃ kṛtaṃ teṣāṃ magānāṃ bhojakottamaiḥ |
sarvāstāḥ sahitāḥ kanyāḥ pravālamaṇibhūṣitāḥ | | 9
arcayitvā tu tāḥ sarvāḥ preṣitāḥ saviturgṛham |
punargatvā tu sāṃbena pṛṣṭo devo divākaraḥ | | 1.140.10
magānāṃ jñānamākhyāhi vedānavyaṅgameva ca |
sāmbasya vacanaṃ śrutvā bhāskaro vākyamabravīt | | 11
pṛccha tvaṃ nāradaṃ gatvā sa te sarvaṃ vadiṣyati |
evamukto.atha vai sāmbo gatavānnāradaṃ prati | | 12
gatvā kṛtsnamidaṃ sarvaṃ tasmai tena niveditam |
sa cāpyāha tataḥ sāmbaṃ na jāne jñānamuttamam | | 13
bhojakānāṃ yaduśreṣṭha jñānaṃ vyāso mahāmuniḥ |
taṃ gatvā paripṛccha tvaṃ praṇamya śirasā munim | | 14
kṛṣṇānurodhātte sarvaṃ sa vakṣyati na saṃśayaḥ |
nāradenaivamuktastu sāmbo jāmbavatīsutaḥ | | 15
vyāsāśramaṃ sa gatvā tu praṇamya śirasā munim |
kṛtāñjalipuṭo bhūtvā idaṃ vacanamabravīt | | 16
śākadvīpaṃ mayā gatvā ānītā magapuṅgavāḥ |
bālā yauvanasampannāḥ sanniviṣṭā magottamāḥ | | 17
satkṛtya pūjayitvā tu puraṃ teṣāṃ samarpitam |
samprāpya tu puraṃ te vai jyeṣṭhamadhyakanīyasaḥ | | 18
bhojavaṃśasamutpannāḥ kanyakāḥ samalaṅkṛtāḥ |
varayitvā kṛtaṃ teṣāṃ viprapraṇayanaṃ śubham | | 19
aho sabhāgyāḥ ślāghyāśca kṛtapuṇyāśca te sadā |
pūjāyāṃ ye ratā bhānoryeṣāṃ caiva varapradaḥ | | 1.140.20
paryāptaṃ sarvameteṣāmiha cāmuṣmikaṃ phalam |
anitye sati mānuṣye devapūjāratā hi ye | | 21
kintu cintayataḥ sūryaṃ cintayitvā tu bhojakān |
jñānaṃ prati tathā caiṣāṃ hadaye saṃśayo mama | | 22
kathaṃ pūjākarā hyete ke magāḥ ke ca bhojakāḥ |
jñānaṃ kiṃ paramaṃ teṣāṃ jñeyasteṣāṃ ka eva tu | | 23
divyeti te kathaṃ proktāḥ kimarthaṃ kūrcadhāraṇam |
sauravrataṃ kimarthaṃ tu vācakāste kathaṃ smṛtāḥ | | 24
kimarthaṃ tejasā vedāngāyantaścaiva te katham |
athāhikañcukasyāṅgaṃ kiṃ pramāṇaṃ ca kasya vai | | 25
kasya vai kā samākhyātā yadutpannaṃ kathaṃ smṛtam |
kathaṃ devāṃśca gāyanti yajñaṃ kurvanti te katham | | 26
agnihotraṃ ca kiṃ teṣāṃ pañca dolāśca kāḥ smṛtāḥ |
etatsarvaṃ samākhyāhi bhojakānāṃ viceṣṭitam | | 27
sāmbasya vacanaṃ śrutvā kṛṣṇadvaipāyano muniḥ |
kālīsuto mahātejā uvāca paramaṃ vacaḥ | | 28
sādhusādhu yaduśreṣṭha sādhu pṛṣṭo.asmi suvrata |
durjñeyaceṣṭitaṃ kiñcidbhojakānāṃ na saṃśayaḥ | | 29
bhāskarasya prasādena mamāpi smṛtimāgatam |
yathākhyātaṃ vaśiṣṭhena tathā te vacmi kṛtsnaśaḥ | | 1.140.30
magānāṃ caritaṃ śreṣṭhaṃ śṛṇu tvaṃ kṛṣṇanandana |
jñānavedina evaite karmayogaṃ samāśritāḥ | | 31
śrūyante ṛṣayaḥ sarve maunena niyamasthitāḥ |
bhuñjate cāpi maunena sarve vai paramarṣayaḥ | | 32
municaryākṛtaste.api śākadvīpanivāsinaḥ |
tasmānmaunena bhoktavyamaguṇatvamanicchatā | | 33
vacaḥ sūryasamākhyātaṃ kāraṇaṃ ca varaṃ tathā |
arcāyāṃ te ca te nityamarcayantaśca te smṛtāḥ | | 34 bhojakanyāsujātatvādbhojakāstena te smṛtāḥ |
brāhmaṇānāṃ yathā prokto vedāścatvāra eva tu | | 35
ṛgvedo.atha yajurvedaḥ sāmavedastvatharvaṇaḥ |
brahmaṇoktāstathā vedā magānāmapi suvrata | | 36
ta eva viparītāstu teṣāṃ vedāḥ prakīrtitāḥ |
vedo viśvamadaścaiva vidvadvahnirasastathā | | 37
vedā hyete magānāṃ tu purovāca prajāpatiḥ |
magā vedamadhīyante vedāṅgāstena te smṛtāḥ | | 38
śeṣo na hi mahābhāgaḥ sarvasattvasukhāvahaḥ |
sasūryarathamāsādya rathibhiḥ saha varṣati | | 39
yastasya tu punarmokaṃ sa raverhi mahānakaḥ |
vanditavyo magānāṃ tu astramantreṇa nityaśaḥ | |1.140.4 0
yathā srajo dvijānāṃ tu pūjākāle pramīyate |
sarvasaṃskārayajñeṣu yathā darbhā dvijātiṣu | |4 1
pavitrāḥ kīrtitāsteṣāṃ tathā dharmo magasya tu |
ebhirjayanti bhūyiṣṭhaṃ tasmindvīpe magādhipāḥ | |42
vidyāvantaḥ kulaśreṣṭhāḥ śaucācārasamanvitāḥ |
yajñāvasaktā bhaktāśca japanto mantramāditaḥ | |4 3
priyāstu yaduśārdūla bhojakā yadunandana |
astramiva vai mantro vedasya paripaṭhyate | |44
sarveṣāṃ brāhmaṇānāṃ tu sāvitrī parikalpyate |
asmākaṃ tu yaduśreṣṭha mahāvyāhatipūrtikā | |45
amohakenātha vimānabhuñjī maunena caivāpi yathā hi yuktam |
na cāpi kiñcitsmṛtikaṃ spṛśecca taccāpi nātraiva ca saṃspṛśeddhi | | 47
śvasantyanicchaṃstu parikṣipettu svābhīṣṭasūryaṃ tu nametsadaiva |
yathā yajñaṃ hi mantreṇa vedaproktena karmaṇā | |47
tattvamanyanmagānāntu vidhimantrapuraskṛtam |
haviḥ sampadyate yasmāttena te yajvinaḥ smṛtāḥ | |48
yathāgnihotraṃ prathitaṃ dvijānāṃ tathādhvahotraṃ vihitaṃ magānām |
acchaṃ ca nāmeti tadadhvarasya munervaco nātra vicāraṇāsti | |49
pañcadhūpāḥ pradātavyāḥ siddhirasyeha sarvadā |
daṇḍanāyakavele dve trisandhyaṃ bhāskarasya tu | | 1.140.50
iti śrībhaviṣye mahāpurāṇe brāhme parvaṇi saptamīkalpe sāmbopākhyāne bhojakotpattivarṇanaṃ nāma catvāriṃśadadhikaśatatamo.adhyāyaḥ | 140 |
athaikacatvāriṃśadadhikaśatatamo.adhyāyaḥ
bhojakajātivarṇanam
sāmba uvāca
bhojakānāṃ yattvayoktamavyaṅgo dehaśodhakaḥ |
vratabandhastvasau proktasteṣāṃ jātiśca kā smṛtā | | 1
vyāsa uvāca
te pṛṣṭā bhavatā sarve bhojakānāṃ kumārakāḥ |
kimākhyātaṃ tatastaistu tadevācakṣva kṛtsnaśaḥ | | 2
sāmba uvāca
sanniveṣā mayā proktā bhojakānāṃ samantataḥ |
mamaiva brūta tattvaṃ tadvarṇaḥ ko.atra kathaṃ sthitaḥ | | 3
tatastu bhagavānprāha vākyaṃ vākyaviśāradaḥ |
ye tvayoktā śrutāḥ sāmba bhojakānāṃ kumārakāḥ | | 4
mamaivaite magā jñeyā aṣṭau śūdrā madaṅgajāḥ |
etadbuddhvā tu vacanaṃ praṇamya śirasā ravim | | 5
dattā bhojakulotpannā daśabhyo daśakanyakāḥ |
tatastu mandakebhyo.api dattāścāṣṭau hi kanyakāḥ | | 6
tato niveśitaṃ teṣāṃ mayā sāmba puraṃ smara |
dāsakanyāstu yāścāṣṭau bhojakanyāśca yā daśa | | 7
etāsteṣāṃ kumārāṇāṃ jñeyāstā daśa cāṣṭa ca |
tatra te bhojakanyāsu dvijairutpāditāḥ sutāḥ | | 8 bhojakāstāngaṇānprāhurbrāhmaṇāndivyasaṃjñitān |
dāsakanyāsu ye jātā mandagairantyasaṃjñitaiḥ | | 9
madaṅgā nāma te jñeyāḥ savituḥ paricārakāḥ |
te ca viprapure tasminputradāraśubhairvṛtāḥ | | 1.141.10
svadharmairyaṣṭumārabdhaiḥ śākadvīpe.arcito raviḥ |
nānāvidhairvaidikaistu mantrairmunivarottamāḥ | | 11
avyaṅgadhāriṇo martyāḥ pūjayante divaspatim |
dṛṣṭvā vyaṅgaṃ tu vai teṣāṃ kautūhalasamanvitaḥ | | 12
sāmbaḥ prāha namaskṛtya bhūyaḥ satyavatīsutam |
kathaṃ varo.ayamavyaṅgaḥ kathito munisattama | | 13
kuta eṣa samutpannaḥ kasmācca sa śuciḥ smṛtaḥ |
bandhanīyaḥ kadā cāyaṃ kimarthaṃ caiva dhāryate | |
kiṃ pramāṇaṃ ca bhagavanvyaṅgaścāyaṃ kimucyate | | 14
sumanturuvāca
śrutvaivaṃ vacanaṃ vyāso jāmbavatyāḥ sutasya ca | | 15
uvāca kuruśārdūla sāmbaṃ kālīsutaḥ sa tu | |
vyāsa uvāca
etacca me yathoktastvaṃ jātireṣāṃ na saṃśayaḥ | | 16
avyaṅgasyāpi te vacmi lakṣaṇaṃ gadataḥ śṛṇu | | 17
iti śrībhaviṣye mahāpurāṇe brāhme parvaṇi saptamīkalpe sāmbopākhyāne bhojakajātivarṇanaṃ nāmaikacatvāriṃśadadhikaśatatamo.adhyāyaḥ | 141 |
atha dvicatvāriṃśadadhikaśatatamo.adhyāyaḥ
vyaḍgotpattināmavarṇanam
vyāsa uvāca
devatā ṛṣayo nāgā gandharvāpsarasāṃ gaṇāḥ |
yakṣarakṣāṃsi vai bhānau nivasanti ṛtukramāt | | 1
tatra tu vāsukirhyabdamudyatsūryarathaṃ javāt |
svasthānamājagāmāśu namaskṛtya divākaram | | 2
avyaṅgameva sūryāya prītyarthaṃ vai samarpayat |
gāṅgeyabhūṣitaṃ divyaṃ nātiraktasitaṃ śubham | | 3
babandha taṃ ca tatprītyai madhyabhāge tamātmanaḥ |
nāgarājāṅgasambhūto dhṛto yasmācca bhānunā | | 4
tattasmāddhāryate sūryaprītyai tadbhaktimicchatā |
vidhānena ca tattvena śucirbhavati bhojakaḥ | | 5
nityaṃ ca dhāraṇāttasya bhavetprīto divākaraḥ |
na dhārayanti ye tvevaṃ bhojakāḥ pūjakāḥ raveḥ | | 6
saurahīnā na te yājyā ucchiṣṭā nātra saṃśayaḥ |
smṛtyācāre te hi bhagnā raviṃ nārhanti pūjitum | | 7
pūjayanto raviṃ te hi narakaṃ yānti rauravam |
na vai hasenna uttiṣṭhedyāvadarcā labhanti te | | 8
itthaṃ jñātvā na sandeho hyavyaṅgena vinā raviḥ |
nāgarājasya saṃspṛṣṭo hyārasustena saṃsmṛtaḥ | | 9
ekavarṇaḥ sa kartavyaḥ kāryasiddhikarastathā |
pramāṇenāṅgulānāṃ tu śatāddhi śatamuttaram | | 1.142.10
utkṛṣṭo.ayaṃ pramāṇena madhyamo viṃśaduttaraḥ |
śatamaṣṭottaraṃ hrasvo na tu hrasvatarastataḥ | | 11
tadākṛtiḥ kṛtaścaiṣa nirmito viśvakarmaṇā |
madhyame bhojakānāṃ tu paraḥ śata udāhṛtaḥ | | 12
saṃskṛto.api vinā tena śucirnaiva bhavatyuta |
tenāsya dhāraṇādvīra śucireva tadā bhavet | | 13
havirhomādikāḥ sarvā bhavantyasya kriyāḥ śubhāḥ |
avyaṅgaḥ patitāṅgaśca avyaṅgo.atha mahīpate | | 14
eṣa sāraśca sā ramyā vai jñeyā jayanāmabhiḥ |
aheraṅgātsamutpanno hyavyaṅgastu tataḥ smṛtaḥ | | 15 yasmādasmādaheraṅgamavyaṅgastena cocyate |
arheti pūjāyāṃ dhātoḥ pratyayo ṇvultataḥ smṛtaḥ | | 16
pūjitaśca pavitraśca yasmāttenārhakaḥ smṛtaḥ |
sārasārtaḥ smṛtaṃ rūpaṃ pradhānaṃ sāra ucyate | | 17
ṣaṇa bhaktau smṛtau dhātustasmātsārasanaḥ smṛtaḥ |
yasmādarcitamevaṃ tu suvarṇamaṇimauktikaiḥ | | 18
sa jñeyaḥ patitāṅgastu nityayajñairupāhṛtaḥ |
ityete kathitā vīra avyaṅgā vyaṅgabhojakāḥ | | 19
ṛddhivṛddhikaro nityaṃ kāyaśuddhikarastathā |
sarvavedamayaścāyaṃ sarvadevamayastathā | | 1.142.20
sarvabhūtamayaḥ sāmba sarvalokamayastathā |
madhye.asya saṃsthito brahmā mūle viṣṇurmahāmate | | 21
śaśāṅkamaulirantye tu saṃsthito yadunaṃdana |
ṛgvedo.asya sthito mūle yajurvedo.asya madhyagaḥ | | 22
agre sthitaḥ sāmavedo granthirāṅgirasonagha |
pṛthvī mūlamāśritya sthitā ca yadusattama | | 23
mūlāśanāstvapaḥ sāmba madhye devo vibhāvasuḥ |
tāsāmanantaraṃ vāta ākāśo.agre samāsthitaḥ | | 24
mūle sthitastu bhūrloko bhuvarlokastu madhyagaḥ |
svarlokaścāgramāśritya sthito vyaṅgasya yāvatā | | 25
evaṃ devamayaḥ sāṃba evaṃ lokamayastathā |
dhāraṇīyo mahānbhaktyā pūjakaḥ prītaye raveḥ | | 26
pūjayanti raviṃ ye vai vinānena yadūttama |
pūjāphalaṃ na teṣāṃ syānnarakaṃ ca vrajanti hi | | 27
tathā teṣāṃ bhavennityamavyaṅgo bhojakaḥ sadā |
anyakāle yaduśreṣṭha ityetatkathitaṃ tava | | 28
bandhane kāraṇaṃ vīra bhūṣaṇāni ca suvrata | | 29
iti śrībhaviṣye mahāpurāṇe brāhme parvaṇi saptamīkalpe sāmbopākhyāne vyaṅgotpattirnāma dvicatvāriṃśadadhikaśatatamo.adhyāyaḥ | 142 |
atha tricatvāriṃśadadhikaśatatamo.adhyāyaḥ
dhūpādivividhavidhivarṇanam
sumanturuvāca
śrutvaivameva sāmbena vyāsātsatyavatīsutāt |
avyaṅgasya ca utpattiṃ punarāgānmahāmatiḥ | | 1
athāgatya mahātejāḥ sāmbo gatvāśramaṃ punaḥ | | 2
nāradasya mahābāhornāradaṃ vākyamabravīt |
kathamutkṣipya vai dhūpaṃ bhojakaiḥ saviturmune | | 3
snānamācamanaṃ caivamarghyadānaṃ mahātmane |
sāmbasya vacanaṃ śrutvā nārado munisattamaḥ | | 4
uvāca kuruśārdūla sāmbaṃ jāmbavatīsutam |
hanta te kathayiṣyāmi raverdhūpavidhikramam | | 5
snānamācamanaṃ caiva svarṇadānaṃ tathaiva ca |
ācāntastristataḥ snātvā vāsasī nirmale śubhe | | 6
anārdre saṃvasītaiva pavitre paridhāya ca |
udaṅmukhaḥ prāṅmukho vāpyācāmecca prayatnataḥ | | 7
jale jalastho nācāmejjalāduttīrya yatnataḥ |
apsu sūryastathāgniśca mātā devī sarasvatī | | 8
tasmāduttīrya cācāmennācāmettu jalāśaye |
upaviśya śucau deśe prayataḥ prāgudaṅmukhaḥ | | 9
pādau prakṣālya hastau ca antarjānustathācamet |
prasannāstriḥ pibettvāpaḥ prayataḥ susamāhitaḥ | | 1.143.10
sammārjanaṃ tu dviḥ kuryāttribhirabhyukṣaṇaṃ punaḥ |
mūrdhānaṃ khāni cātmānamupaspṛśyānu pūrvaśaḥ | | 11
ācānto.arkaṃ namaskṛtya śauceṣu śucitāmiyāt |
kriyāṃ yaḥ kurute mohādanācamyeha nāstikaḥ | | 12
bhavantīha kriyāḥ sarvā vṛthā tasya na saṃśayaḥ |
śucikāmā hi vai devā vedairevamudāhṛtāḥ | | 13
inopāsākṛtaścaiva sarve devāḥ prayatnataḥ |
śaucameva praśaṃsanti śaucāṅgairhi vidhīyate | | 14
ācānto maunamāsthāya devāgāraṃ tato vrajet |
śvāsarodhanimittaṃ tu prāṇamācchādya vāsasā | | 15
śiraḥ prāvṛtya yatnena keśodakanivṛttaye |
tataḥ pūjāṃ raveḥ kuryātpuṣpairnānāvidhaiḥ śubhaiḥ | | 16
gāyatrīṃ saśiraskāṃ ca yajamānaḥ prayatnataḥ |
dhūpaṃ tato.agnaye dadyātprathamaṃ guggulāhutam | | 17
puṣpāñjaliṃ tato gṛhya tacchikhāyāṃ prayatnataḥ |
ravermūrdhani taṃ dadyāddevamantramudāharan | | 18
oṃ vratena yadvratino varjayanti devā manuṣyāḥ pitaraśca sarve |
tasyādityaṃ prasaraṃ ca manāmahe yastejasā prathamaṃ nāvibhāti | | 19
dhūpavelāḥ smṛtāḥ pañca dhūpeṣveva tu pañcasu |
havanādyāḥ kriyāḥ pañca rakṣiṣye.ahaṃ tathā punaḥ | 1.143.20
