daṇḍanāyakavelā tu pratyūṣe ṛkṣadarśanāt |
nājñāvelā pradoṣastu tattvakāryaṃ vijānatā | | 21
trikālaṃ tu raveḥ pūjā kartavyā sūryadarśanāt |
ardhoditastu pūrvāhṇe tato.arddhastu ravirvibhuḥ | | 22
helayeti ca pūrvāhṇe madhyāhne jvalanāya ca |
tathaiva maṇḍale deyaṃ nīcāhne jvalanāya ca | | 23
candanodakamiśrāṇi gandhodakayutāni ca |
padmāni karavīrāṇi tathā raktotpalāni ca | | 24
kusumodakamiśrāṇi kuruṃṭakusumaṃ tathā |
gandhādīni ca divyāni kṛtvā vai tāmrabhājane ||25
dhūpaṃ dattvāgnaye vīra prayatnādguggulāhutim |
arghyapātraṃ tadā gṛhya kuryādāvāhanaṃ raveḥ ||26
ehi sūrya sahasrāṃśo tejorāśe jagatpate |
anukampya māṃ deva gṛhāṇārghyaṃ divākara ||27
anenāvāhanaṃ kṛtvā jānubhyāmavanīṃ gataḥ |
ravernivedayedarghyamādityahṛdaye gataḥ ||28
oṃ namo bhagavate ādityāya viśvāya kheśāya brahmaṇelokakartṛṇe|
īśānāya purāṇāya sahasrākṣāya te namaḥ ||29
somāya ṛgyajuratharvāya|
oṃ bhūrbhuvaḥsvaḥoṃmahaḥ oṃjanaḥ oṃtapaḥ oṃ satyaṃ brahmaṇe muṇḍe madhye purataḥ || ādityāya namaḥ ||1.143.3 0
nārada uvāca
sāvitryāśca pare tantre trailokyatrāṇakāriṇe |
paritaḥ parigṛhyātha dhūpabhājanamutkṣipet ||3 1
nivedayettato dhūpaṃ vācametāmudīrayet |
tvameka eva rudrāṇāṃ vasūnāṃ ca purātanaḥ ||32
devānāṃ gīrbhirabhitaḥ saṃstutaḥ śāśvato divi |
pūrvāhṇe ca tvayā tena madhyāhne cāpareṇa tu ||3 3
oṃ namo bhagavate jñānātmane tvāṃ ca |
viṣṇostatparamaṃ padaṃ sadā paśyaṃti sūrayaḥ ||34
divākarastu sāyāhne mantreṇārghyaṃ nivedayet | oṃ
namo varuṇāya śambhave ||35
oṃ ākṛṣṇena rajasā vartamāno niveśayannamṛtaṃ martyaṃ ca |
hiraṇyayena savitā rathenādevo yāti bhuvanāni paśyan||36
anena vidhinā dattvā dhūpaṃ sūryāya bhojakaḥ |
utkṣipeccaiva dhūpena viśedgarbhagṛhaṃ tataḥ | | 37
tataḥ praviśya dhūpaṃ tu pratimārthaṃ nivedayet |
mantreṇa mihirāyeti nikṣubhāyeti nityaśaḥ | | 38
tato rājñai namaśceti nikṣubhāyai tato namaḥ |
daṇḍanāyakasaṃjñāya piṅgalāya ca vai namaḥ | | 39
tathā rājñāya srauṣāya tatheśāya garutmate |
tataḥ pradakṣiṇaṃ kurvandigdevebhyo nivedayet | | 1.143.40
diṇḍine tu tato dadyāddhemantāya yadūttama |
maheśvarāya dadyāttu tathā vyomāya yādava | |4 1
oṃ brahmaṇe muṇḍapataye ādityāya puruṣeśvarāya sūryāya namonamaḥ | | 42
oṃ anekakāntaye natvā śeṣāya vāsukitakṣakakarkoṭakāya padmaśaṅkhakulikebhyo nāgarājebhyo namaḥ | |4 3
talasutalapātālātalavitalarasātalādivāsibhyo daityādānavapiśācebhyo namaḥ |
tataḥ pradakṣiṇaṃ kuryānmātṛkābhyo namonamaḥ ( oṃ grahebhyo namaḥ | | 44
oṃ daṇḍanāyakāya namaḥ | oṃ mārtaṃḍāya namaḥ | oṃ vināyakāya namaḥ | | 45)
evamuddiśya nāmāni dhūpaṃ dattvā varānana |
utkṣipto yatra vai dhūpo muktvā tatraiva taṃ punaḥ | | 46
sūryaguptairabhiṣṭūya evaṃ vijñāya te tataḥ |
arcitastvaṃ yathā śaktyā mayā bhaktyā vibhāvaso | |
aihikāmuṣmikīṃ nātha kāryasiddhiṃ vadasva me | | 47
evaṃ triṣavaṇaṃ snātvā yo.arcayetpraṇato ravim |
vidhinā tu yathoktena so.aśvamedhaphalaṃ labhet | | 48
yaścaivaṃ kurute nityaṃ yathoktaṃ dhūpavistaram |
sa putravānarogī ca mṛtaḥ saṃlīyate ravau | | 49
vidhinā tu yathoktena kriyamāṇāni yatnataḥ |
sarvakāryāṇi siddhyanti saphalāni bhavanti ca | | 1.143.50
puṣpaṃ śreṣṭhaṃ yadā na syātpatrāṇi samupāharet |
patraṃ na syāttato dhūpaṃ dhūpo na syāttato jalam | | 51
sarvaṃ na syādyadā caiva praṇipātena pūjayet |
aśaktaḥ praṇipātasya manasā pūjayedravim | | 52
asambhave tu dravyāṇāṃ vidhireṣa prakīrtitaḥ |
dravyāṇāṃ sambhave caiva sarvamevopahārayet | | 53
mantraiḥ karmayuto yastu mitre dhūpaṃ nivedayet |
uccāraṇācca vai teṣāṃ dhūpaprīto bhavedraviḥ | | 54
śiro nāsāmukhaṃ caiva bhṛśamāvṛtya yatnataḥ |
pūjayedbhāskaraṃ vīra śithilaṃ tu na kārayet | | 55
nalinena tu rājendra naro yāti divākaram |
tasmādyuktaṃ sadā kāryaṃ pūjyate ca divākaraḥ | | 56
te.aśvamedhaphalaṃ prāpya sūryalokaṃ vrajanti hi |
dhūpena pūjyamānaṃ tu narāḥ paśyanti yādava | | 57
yānti te paramaṃ sthānaṃ yanna paśyanti sūrayaḥ |
kriyamāṇaṃ tathārkaṃ ca bhaktyā paśyanti ye narāḥ | |
sarvānkāmāniha prāpya te yānti paramaṃ padam | | 58
iti śrībhaviṣye mahāpurāṇe brāhme parvaṇi saptamīkalpe sāmbopākhyāne
dhūpādivividhavarṇanaṃ nāma tricatvāriṃśadadhikaśatatamo.adhyāyaḥ | 143 |
atha catuścatvāriṃśadadhikaśatatamo.adhyāyaḥ
bhojakasyotpattivarṇanam
sumanturuvāca
athājagāma bhagavānvyāso dvāravatīṃ purīm |
draṣṭuṃ nārāyaṇaṃ devaṃ śaṅkhacakragadādharam | | 1
tamāgatamṛṣiṃ dṛṣṭvā vāsudevo viśāṃpate |
abhyutthāya mahātejāḥ pūjayāmāsa bhārata | | 2
svayamevāsanaṃ dattvā pādyamarghyaṃ tathaiva ca |
papraccha prayato bhūtvā vyāsaṃ satyavatīsutam | | 3
ya ete bhojakā viprā ānītā matsutena vai |
śākadvīpamito gatvā jñānino mokṣagāminaḥ | | 4
tāndṛṣṭvā rūpato vipra praveśātkarmatastathā|
kautūhalaṃ samutpannaṃ harṣaśca paramo mama | | 5
kathamete kṣaṇamapi tiṣṭhante pṛthivītale |
yeṣāṃ raviḥ sadā pūjyasteṣāṃ muktiḥ sadā vaset | | 6
nāgatvā bhojakatvaṃ hi mokṣamāpnoti kaścana |
idaṃ me manaso brahmansadā sampratibhāti vai | | 7
vyāsa uvāca
evameva yathāttha tvaṃ śaṅkhacakragadādhara |
dhanyā ete mahātmāno bhojakā nātra saṃśayaḥ | | 8
ye pūjayanti satataṃ bhānumantaṃ divākaram |
jñāninaḥ karmaniṣṭhāśca sadā mokṣagatiṃ gatāḥ | | 9
yajante satataṃ bhānuṃ balipuṣpaphalaistathā |
annenauṣadhibhiścaiva ājyahomaiśca kṛtsnaśaḥ | | 1.144.10
homaṃ ca śāśvataṃ kṛtvā paraṃ homaṃ tataḥ śritāḥ |
parahomasya karaṇātpūtātmāno hyakalmaṣāḥ | | 11
viśanti paramāṃ divyāṃ bhāskarīṃ taijasīṃ kalām |
karmaṇaḥ sādhane caikā tatra cāgnau pratiṣṭhitā | | 12
vāyumārgasthitā vyomni dvitīyāntaḥ prakāśikā |
tataḥ paraṃ tṛtīyā tu tatsmṛtaṃ sūryamaṇḍale | | 13
maṇḍalaṃ tacca saviturdivyaṃ hyajaramavyayam |
tasyā.asau puruṣo madhye yo.asau sadasadātmakaḥ | | 14
kṣarākṣarastu vijñeyo mahāsūryastathaiva ca |
niṣkalaḥ sakalaścāpi dvau ca tasya prakalpitau | | 15
akṣaraḥ sakalaścaiva sarvabhūtavyavasthitaḥ |
satattvaḥ sakalaḥ proktastattvahīnastu niṣkalaḥ | | 16 tṛṇagulmalatāvṛkṣavṛkasiṃhadvijādhipān |
surasiddhamanuṣyāṃśca sthalajāñjalajānharet | | 17
vyavasthitaḥ sa sarvatra sarveṣāmantarātmani |
yadā kalpātmakaścaiva dvitīyāṃ tanumāśritaḥ | | 18
niṣkalastu sadā jñeyaḥ saṃsthitastaijasīṃ kalām |
himaṃ gharmaṃ ca varṣaṃ ca trailokye kurute sadā | | 19
dvitīyā yā tanustasya akṣaraṃ tatparaṃ padam |
devayānaṃ tu panthānaṃ karmayogena saṃsthitā | 1.144.20
ādityasiddhāntaritāḥ sāṅkhyayogavidaśca ye |
te.abhigacchanti tatsthānaṃ sa mokṣaḥ parikīrtitaḥ | | 21
nirdvandvo nirgamaścaiva tatra gatvā na śocati |
vedeṣu brahma vadanti dhyāyante tattvavedinaḥ | | 22
akāraṃ tattvataścāpi dhyāyante puruṣottama |
tryakṣaraṃ ca tamoṃkāraṃ sārdhamātrātraye sthitam | | 23
vadanti cārdhamātrasthaṃ makāraṃ vyañjanātmakam|
dhyāyanti ye makārīyaṃ jñānaṃ te hi sadātmakam | | 24
makāro bhagavāndevo bhāskaraḥ parikīrtitaḥ |
makāradhyānayogācca magā hyete prakīrtitāḥ | | 25
dhūpamālyairyutaścāpi upahāraistathaiva ca |
bhojayanti sahasrāṃśuṃ tena te bhojakāḥ smṛtāḥ | | 26
iti śrībhaviṣye mahāpurāṇe brāhme parvaṇi saptamīkalpe sāmbopākhyāne bhojakasyotpattivarṇanaṃ nāma catuścatvāriṃśadadhikaśatatamo.adhyāyaḥ | 144 |
atha pañcacatvāriṃśadadhikaśatatamo.adhyāyaḥ
bhojakajñānavarṇanam
vāsudeva uvāca
jñānopalabdhiṃ viprendra bhojakānāṃ mahāmune |
brūhi tattvaṃ dvijaśreṣṭha kautukaṃ paramaṃ mama | | 1
vyāsa uvāca
imāṃ jñānopalabdhiṃ tu nibodha gadato mama |
asthisthūlaṃ snāyuyutaṃ māṃsaśoṇitalepanam | |
carmāvanaddhaṃ durgaṃdhipūrṇaṃ mūtrapurīṣayoḥ | | 2
jarāśokasamāviṣṭaṃ rogāyatanamāturam |
rajasvalamanityaṃ ca bhūtāvāsamimaṃ tyajet | | 3
kapālaṃ vṛkṣamūlāni kucailamasahāyatā |
samatā sarvabhūteṣu evaṃ muktasya lakṣaṇam | | 4
tile tailaṃ gavi kṣīraṃ kāṣṭhe pāvakasantatiḥ |
upāyaṃ cintayedasya dhiyā dhīraḥ samāhitaḥ | | 5
pramāthi ca prayatnena manaḥ saṃyamya cañcalam |
buddhīndriyāṇi saṃyamya śakunāniva pañjare | | 6
indriyairniyatairdehī dhārābhiriva tṛpyate |
satatamamṛtasyaiva janārdana mahāmate | | 7
prāṇāyāmairdaheddoṣāndhāraṇābhiśca kilbiṣam |
pratyāhāreṇa saṃsargāndhyānenānīśvarānguṇān | | 8
dhyāyamānasya dahyante cānte doṣā yathāgninā |
tathendriyakṛtā doṣā dahyante prāṇanigrahāt | | 9
cittaṃ cittena saṃśodhya bhāvaṃ bhāvena śodhayet |
manastu manasā śodhyaṃ buddhiṃ buddhyā tu śodhayet | | 1.145.10
cittasyātiprasādena bhāti karma śubhāśubham |
śubhāśubhavinirmukto nirdvandvo niṣparigrahaḥ | |
nirmamo nirahaṅkārastato yāti parāṃ gatim | | 11
parvāhṇe lohitaṃ rūpaṃ prathamamṛṅmamayaṃ smṛtam |
yajurmayaṃ dvitīyaṃ tu śvetaṃ mādhyāhnikaṃ smṛtam | | 12
kṛṣṇaṃ tṛtīyaṃ sāyāhne sāmno rūpaṃ tu tatkṛtam |
prathamaṃ rājasaṃ deva dvitīyaṃ sāttvikaṃ smṛtam | 13
tṛtīyaṃ tāmasaṃ rūpaṃ traiguṇyaṃ tasya kalpitam |
trayāṇāṃ vyatirekeṇa caturthaṃ sūryamaṇḍalam | | 14
caturthaṃ tu vedavidaḥ sūryasiddhāntavedinaḥ | | 15
oṃkārapraṇavairyuktā dhyānanirbhūtakalmaṣāḥ |
sthitāḥ padmāsane vīrā nābhisaṃnyastapāṇayaḥ | | 16
suṣumnānāḍikāmārgaṃ kumbharecakapūrakaiḥ |
tribhiḥ saṃśodhya tānpañca maruto dehamadhyagān || 17
padāṅguṣṭhānvitaḥ svinnamūrdhvamutkṣepayetkramāt |
nābhideśe tu taṃ dṛṣṭvā devamagnimanāmayam || 18
somaṃ ca hadaye dṛṣṭvā mūrdhni vāgniśikhāṃ tataḥ |
vātaraśmibhirāsādya taṃ bhittvā maṇḍalaṃ param || 19
tataḥ paraṃ tu yo gacchedyogasthaḥ sūryamaṇḍalam |
yatra gatvā na śocanti tatsauraṃ paramaṃ padam ||1.145.2 0
devārcanaṃ mahābāho kīrtitaḥ keśisūdana |
prathamaṃ hadayaṃ sthānaṃ dvitīyaṃ cāgnimāśritam ||2 1
tṛtīyaṃ nābhisaṃsthaṃ ca caturthaṃ sūryamaṇḍalam ||22
sthānaṃ paraṃ vai paramātmasaṃsthaṃ bhānoḥ sureśasya vadanti tajjñāḥ |
jñeyaḥ sa mokṣaśca nṛṇāṃ sa eva saṃsāravicchittikaraṃ padaṃ tataḥ ||23
idamamṛtasamaṃ parasya vedyaṃ kiraṇasahasramṛto hitaṃ janānām |
ṛṣicaritamavetya tattvasāraṃ vyapagatamohadhiyaḥ prayānti mokṣam ||24
idaṃ magānāṃ caritaṃ mayā te prakhyāpitaṃ yānavareṇa yuktam |
jñātvātvimaṃ mokṣavido vadanti siddhāśca tatsthānamavāpnuvanti ||25
yanmayoktamidaṃ jñānaṃ deyaṃ śraddhāvatāṃ nṛṇām |
nāstikānāmabuddhīnāṃ na deyaṃ bhūtimicchatā ||26
sumanturuvāca
ityuktvā bhagavānvyāso bhojakajñānamuttamam |
nārāyaṇaṃ mahābāho jagāmāyatanaṃ hareḥ ||27
khyāto yastriṣu lokeṣu gaṃgayā paritoṣitaḥ |
badaryā maṇḍito vīra naranārāyaṇāśramaḥ | | 28
iti śrībhaviṣye mahāpurāṇe brāhme parvaṇi saptamīkalpe bhojakajñānavarṇanaṃ
nāma pañcacatvāriṃśadadhikaśatatamo.adhyāyaḥ | 145 |
atha ṣaṭcatvāriṃśadadhikaśatatamo.adhyāyaḥ
bhojakavarṇanam
śatānīka uvāca
ya ete bhojakāḥ proktā devadevasya pūjakāḥ |
nānyaṃ bhojyamathaiteṣāṃ brāhmaṇaiśca kadācana | | 1
bhāskarasya priyā hyete pūjyatvaṃ ca tathā gatāḥ |
divyāścaite smṛtā viprā ādityāmbhaḥ samudbhavāḥ | | 2
abhojyatvaṃ kathaṃ yātā bhojakāstadvadasva me |
kiṃ kurvāṇāstathā karma bhojyatāṃ yānti me vada | | 3
sumanturuvāca
imamarthaṃ purā pṛṣṭo vāsudevo mahīpate |
kṛtavarmaṇā purā rājaṃstathā sāmbo mahābalaḥ | | 4
gatau sāmbapurīṃ vīra tathā nāradaparvatau |
bhuktavanto gṛhe sarve bhojakasya mahātmanaḥ | | 5
ādityakarmaṇo loke devānnakhyātimāgatāḥ |
tena te pūjitāḥ sarve bhaktyā bhojyairanekaśaḥ | | 6
āgatāste purīṃ vīra puṇyāṃ dvāravatīṃ vibhoḥ |
tāvṛṣī divamāruḍhau rājannāradaparvatau | 7
vāsudevaṃ mahātejā hārdikyo vākyamabravīt |
ya ete bhojakā vipra pūjakā bhāskarasya tu | | 8
annameṣāṃ kathaṃ viprau bhuktavantau janārdana |
tāvṛṣī divyamākhyātau yau tau nāradaparvatau | |
abhojyāḥ kila ete vai brāhmaṇānāṃ janārdana | | 9
vāsudeva uvāca
na te bhojyā mahābāho bhojyā bhojāśca sarvadā |
abhivādyāṃ prayatnena yathādityo mahāmate | | 1.146.10
ācarantaśra tatkarma bhojyatvaṃ pravajanti te |
tacchrūyatāṃ yaduśreṣṭha yatkāryaṃ cāpi tairvibho | |
yatamānairmahābāho tadihaikamanāḥ śṛṇu | | 11
vṛṣalī yasya vai bhāryā yaścāvyaṅgaṃ na dhārayet |
abhojyaḥ sa tu vijñeyo bhojako nātra saṃśayaḥ | | 12
asnātaḥ pūjayedyastu tathābhyaṅgavivarjitaḥ |
ādityaṃ yaduśārdūla tathā ca vidhinā vibho | | 13
sevako bhojako yastu śūdrānnaṃ yena bhujyate |
kṛṣiṃ ca kurute yastu devārcāmapi varjayet | | 14
jātakarmādayo yasya na saṃskārāḥ kṛtā vibho |
āruṇeyaiśca mantraiśca sāvitrīṃ na ca vai paṭhet | |
tasya gehe dvijo bhuktvā kṛcchrapādena śudhyati | | 15
pitṛdevamanuṣyāṇāṃ bhūtānāṃ bhāskarasya tu |
akṛtvā vidhivatpūjāṃ yastu bhuṅkte sa dharmahā | | 16
abhyaṅgena vihīno yaḥ śaṃkhahīnastathaiva ca |
śirasā dhārayetkeśānsa jñeyo bhojakādhamaḥ | | 17
devārcanaṃ tathā homaṃ snānaṃ tarpaṇameva ca |
dānaṃ brāhmaṇapūjāṃ ca kurvato bhojakasya tu | |
abhyaṅgena vihīnasya sarvaṃ bhavati niṣphalam | | 18
sarvadevamayo hyeṣa sarvavedamayastathā |
abhyaṅgo yaduśārdūla pavitraḥ paramaḥ smṛtaḥ | | 19
bhojakānāṃ yaduśreṣṭha tasya mūle sthito hariḥ |
madhye brahmā mahātejā agre gośrutibhūṣaṇaḥ | | 1.146.20
ṛgvedo yasya mūlastho madhye sāmāni kṛtsnaśaḥ |
yajurvedastathā śreṣṭhaścātharvasahitaḥ sthitaḥ | | 21
trayo.agnayastathā rājaṃstrayo lokāḥ sthitāḥ kramāt |
evameva pavitrastu abhyaṅgo bhojakasya tu | | 22
yastvanena vihīnastu bhojako bhojakādhamaḥ |
abhojyaḥ sa tu vijñeyaḥ so.aśucirnātra saṃśayaḥ | | 23
nirmālyamatha naivedyaṃ kuṅkumaṃ devahelinām |
ye prayacchanti śūdrāṇāṃ vikrīṇanti ca bhojakāḥ | |
te.adhamā bhojakā jñeyā ye ca devasvahāriṇaḥ | | 24
na pūjayanti deveśaṃ devasvaṃ kṣapayanti ca |
na te deva priyāstāta vijñeyā bhojakādhamāḥ | | 25
yasminna bhukte naivedyaṃ bhojako.aśnāti mānada |
tadannaṃ bhuṅjatastasya narakāya na śāntaye | | 26
naivedyaṃ bhojayettasmādbhāskarasya naraḥ sadā |
prathamaṃ yaduśārdūla tacca dehaviśodhanam | | 27
brāhmaṇānāṃ puroḍāśo yathā kāyaviśodhanaḥ |
bhojakānāṃ tathā vīra naivedyaṃ kāyaśodhanam | | 28
iti śrībhaviṣye mahāpurāṇe brāhme parvaṇi saptamīkalpe sāmbopākhyāne bhojakavarṇanaṃ
nāma ṣaṭcatvāriṃśadadhikaśatatamo.adhyāyaḥ | 146 |
atha saptacatvāriṃśadadhikaśatatamo.adhyāyaḥ
bhojakabrāhmaṇavarṇanam
vāsudeva uvāca
atra pṛṣṭo yathā devo bhāskaro devapūjitaḥ |
aruṇena mahābāho ke priyā bhojakāstathā | | 1
pūjāyāṃ tava ke yogyāḥ ke na yogyā bhavanti ca |
iti pṛṣṭaḥ sa bhagavānaruṇena divākaraḥ | |
yaduvāca mahābāho tadihaikamanāḥ śṛṇu | | 2
bhāskara uvāca
paradārānparadravyaṃ ye na hiṃsanti bhojakāḥ |
te priyā mama vai nityaṃ ye na niṃdanti daivatān | | 3
vāṇijyaṃ kṛṣisevāṃ tu vedānāṃ nindanaṃ ca ye |
kurvanti bhojakā jñeyāḥ sarve te mama vairiṇaḥ | | 4
yeṣāṃ bhāryāsaṅgrahaṇaṃ karṣaṇaṃ ye prakurvate |
nṛpasevāṃ khagaśreṣṭha vijñeyāḥ patitāstu te | |
bhuñjate ye ca śūdrānnaṃ jñeyāste śatravo mama | | 5
pūjā kṛtā tu yā taistu tathārghyaṃ ca khagottama |
pūjāṃ tāmatha cāpyarghyaṃ nāhaṃ gṛhṇāmi khecara | | 6
ya ete kathitā vīra ye ca śaṅkhavivarjitāḥ |
nirmālyaṃ ye madīyaṃ tu naivedyaṃ kuṅkumaṃ tathā | | 7
śūdrāya ye prayacchanti vikīrṇanti ca ye khaga |
yacchanti ye ca vaiśyāya bhojakā me na te priyāḥ | | 8
yajante ye ca sāvitrīṃ mahāśvetāṃ ca gopateḥ |
ye na jānanti me mudrāṃ kiṅkarāṇāṃ ca nāmataḥ | | 9
ya ete kathitā vīra bhojakāste mayā khaga |
naite pūjayituṃ śaktā ye priyā mama bhojakāḥ | |
tāñchṛṇuṣva khagaśreṣṭha bhūtvā caikāgramānasaḥ | | 1.147.10
devadvijamanuṣyāṇāṃ pitṛrṇāṃ cāpi pūjakāḥ |
te priyā mama vai nityaṃ śaktāḥ pūjayituṃ ravim | | 11
yeṣāṃ muṇḍaṃ śiro nityaṃ ye cābhyaṅgasamanvitāḥ |
vādayanti ca ye śaṅkhaṃ divyāste bhojakā matāḥ | | 12
trikālaṃ ye ca māṃ nityaṃ susnātāḥ krodhavarjitāḥ |
pūjayanti khagaśreṣṭha te priyā mama bhojakāḥ | | 13
vāre madīye naktaṃ tu ṣaṣṭhyāṃ ye ca prakurvate |
saptamyāmupavāsaṃ tu tathā saṅkramaṇe mama | | 14
divyāste brāhmaṇā jñeyā bhojakā mama pūjakāḥ |
pūjayanti ca ye viprānmadbhaktā matparāyaṇāḥ | |
te priyāḥ satataṃ mahyaṃ bhojakā garuḍāgraja | | 15
mayi bhaktiṃ na kurvanti brāhmaṇānpūjayanti no |
na te pūjyā na vandyāśca ye dviṣanti ca māṃ sadā | | 16
ye kurvanti mahāyajñānbhojakā garuḍāgraja |
pitṛdevamanuṣyāṇāṃ pūjārthaṃ santataṃ khaga | | 17
priyāste satataṃ vīra bhojakānāṃ tathottamāḥ |
tasmātsarvaprayatnena pañcayajñānpravartayet | | 18
ekabhaktena ye nityaṃ vartante kaśyapātmaja |
bhuñjate na ca ye rātrau bhojakāste priyā mama | | 19
mama vāre ca ye vīra tathā ṣaṣṭhyāṃ ca keśava |
na rātrau bhuñjate prājñā matpriyāste magāḥ khaga | | 1.147.20
pratisaṃvatsaraṃ ye tu bhojakā garuḍāgraja |
na yacchanti piturmāturdivase tena me priyāḥ | | 21
itthaṃ bhūtā bhojakā yā māghamāse ca saptamī |
puṣpāṇāṃ karavīrāṇi tathā raktaṃ ca candanam | | 22
vācako brāhmaṇānāṃ tu naivedyaṃ modakāstathā |
ghṛtāhutyo guggulaśca kṣīreṇa snapanaṃ tathā | | 23
vādyānāṃ śaṅkhaśabdaśca nṛtyaṃ nāṭyaṃ mataṃ mama |
pañcavarṇā patākāstu śvetaṃ chatraṃ ca me priyam | | 24
nānyavarṇaiḥ kṛtā pūjā tathā prīṇāti māṃ khaga |
yathā kṛtā bhojakena pūjā prīṇāti māṃ sadā | |
nānyadevapratiṣṭhā tu kartavyā bhojakena tu | | 25
vāsudeva uvāca
ityuktvā bhagavāndevaścāruṇāya purānagha |
lakṣaṇaṃ bhojakānāṃ tu tato merumathākramat | | 26
evaṃ bhojyā bhojakāstu na cābhojyāḥ kadācana |
anuṣṭhānavihīnā ye na te bhojyāstu bhojakāḥ | | 27
bhaumāstu brāhmaṇā ye tu anuṣṭhānavivarjitāḥ |
te.apyabhojyā bhavantīha vikarmasthā viśeṣataḥ | | 28
nāsti pūjyatamaṃ kiñcinmāṅgalyaṃ pāvanaṃ tathā |
caturṇāmiha varṇānāṃ muktvā bhojakamuttamam | |
pūjite bhojake vīra ādityaḥ pūjito bhavet | | 29
bhuñjate yasya vai gehe bhojakā yadunaṃdana |
tasya bhuṅkte svayaṃ bhānurbrahmā viṣṇustathā śivaḥ | | 1.147.30
yatheha sarvasattvānāṃ pradhānatve sthito raviḥ |
tatheha sarvabhūtānāṃ bhojakaḥ pūjya ucyate | | 31
tīrthānāṃ tu kurukṣetraṃ sarasāṃ sāgaro yathā |
tathā pūjyatamo jñeyaḥ pūjyānāṃ bhojako vibho | | 32
viśeṣeṇa ca saurāṇāṃ bhojakaḥ pūjya ucyate |
bhartā pūjyo yayā strīṇāṃ śiṣyāṇāṃ ca yathā guruḥ | |
bhojakastu tathā pūjyaḥ saurāṇāṃ hṛdikātmaja | | 33
yasya bhuṅkte bhojakastu gandhapuṣpādinārcitaḥ |
tasya bhuṅkte svayaṃ bhānuḥ pitaro devatāstathā | | 34
evaṃ pūjyāstathā bhojyā bhojakā hṛdikātmaja |
ye saurā bhojakasyānnaṃ bhuñjate nirvikalpataḥ | |
te sarve pāpanirmuktā yānti sūryasalokatām | | 35
kathito yatra yo bhojyo yathā bhojyaḥ sa varjitaḥ |
atha kiṃ bahunoktena śrūyatāṃ vacanaṃ mama | | 36
nāsti vedātparaṃ śāstraṃ nāsti gaṅgāsamā sarit |
aśvamedhasamaṃ puṇyaṃ nāsti putrasamaṃ sukham | | 37
nāsti bhānusamo devo nāsti mātṛsamā gatiḥ |
yathaitāni samastāni uttamāni yadūttama ||
tathottamo bhojakastu samprokto bhāskareṇa tu | | 38
iti śrībhaviṣye mahāpurāṇe brāhme parvaṇi saptamīkalpe sāmbopākhyāne bhojakalakṣaṇavarṇanaṃ nāma saptacatvāriṃśadadhikaśatatamo.adhyāyaḥ | 147 |
athāṣṭacatvāriṃśadadhikaśatatamo.adhyāyaḥ
kālacakravarṇanam
sumanturuvāca
adha sāmbo mahātejā dṛṣṭvā cakraṃ pituḥ kare |
jvālāmālākarālaṃ tu mahatā tejasānvitam | | 1
papraccha pitaraṃ sāmbo bhaktyā śraddhāsamanvitaḥ |
kutastāta tvayā prāptaṃ cakramādityasannibham | | 2
kimarthaṃ vahate deva divyamāyudhamuttamam |
etadākhyāhi me sarvaṃ śrotukāmasya kautukāt | | 3
vāsudeva uvāca
sādhusādhu mahābāho sādhu pṛṣṭosmya.ahaṃ tvayā |
śṛṇuṣvaikamanāḥ putra cakrasya vidhinirṇayam | |4
divyaṃ varṣasahasraṃ tu bhānumārādhya śraddhayā |
prāptaṃ cakraṃ mayā tasmādbhāskarāllokapūjitāt | |5
nabhogaḥ pañcakārūḍhaḥ sthitaḥ sākṣāddivākaraḥ |
grahāḥ somādayo yasya saṃsthitā nābhimaṇḍale | | 6
ādityā dvādaśa samā areṣu kramaśastathā |
proktaṃ pathiṣu tattvāni pṛthivyādīni yāni vai | |7
etaistattvaiḥ parivyāptaṃ cakraṃ kālātmakaṃ param |
saṃkṣepātte mayākhyātaṃ dattaṃ cakramivāparam | | 8
sāmba uvāca
kathaṃ kālamayaṃ deva cakraṃ kamalamucyate |
idaṃ tāvanmamācakṣva jñātumicchāmi tattvataḥ | | 9
vāsudeva uvāca
kamalaṃ hyṛtubhiḥ ṣaḍbhiḥ ṣaṭdalaṃ cākṣayāśritam |
puruṣādhiṣṭhitaṃ taddhi tatra sāṅgo raviḥ sthitaḥ | | 1.148.10
yacca kālatrayaṃ loke tannābhitrayamucyate |
māsā arā mahābāho pakṣāśca pradhayaḥ smṛtāḥ | | 11
nemī caiva pare prokte ayane dakṣiṇottare |
pathinābhiṣu yoge ca yogākhyāstapanādibhiḥ | | 12
nakṣatrāṇi grahāścaiva sadā cātra sthitāḥ smṛtāḥ |
etairvyāptamidaṃ cakraṃ sthūlasūkṣmaprabhedataḥ | | 13
atroddiṣṭeṣu kāleṣu ye noddiṣṭā mayā tava |
yugādikalpaparyantāste.api cātra sthitāḥ kramāt | | 14
yatte kālātmakaṃ cakramidaṃ saṃkṣepato mayā |
kathitaṃ tadviniṣkrāntaṃ pradīptātsūryamaṇḍalāt | | 15
asurāṇāṃ vadhāyedaṃ mayā labdhaṃ divākarāt |
ārādhya tapasā sūryaṃ purā kalpe jagadgurum | |
ataḥ sampūjyayāmyenaṃ grahaistattvairvṛtaṃ sadā | | 16
arkaṃ bhakto hi cakrasthaṃ yaḥ pūjayati bhaktimān |
tejasā ravisaṃkāśaḥ puṣpottarapuraṃ vrajet | | 17
tasmāttaṃ matkulānandaṃ mitraṃ sampūjayāmyaham |
grahaistattvairvṛtaṃ bhaktyā svamantraiḥ satataṃ vibhum | | 18
saptamyāṃ cakramālikhya ye yajanti divākaram |
raktacandanapūrṇena kuṃkumena sugaṃdhinā | | 19
piṣṭagandhādibhirvāpi raktavarṇakamiśrakaiḥ |
raktaiśca kamalaiḥ śuddhaiḥ karavīraiḥ sugandhibhiḥ | | 1.148.20
anyairvā kusumairvanyaiḥ pratyagrairjantuvarjitaiḥ |
aparyuṣitaniśchidraiḥ śubhadhanyairdalairapi | | 21
phalaiḥ pakvairoṣadhibhistathā dūrvāṅkuraiḥ kuśaiḥ |
dhūpaiśca vividhairgandhaistathā vastraiśca bhūṣaṇaiḥ | | 22
bhakṣyairbhojyaiśca peyaiśca coṣyairlehyaiśca śaktitaḥ |
vitānaśobhāsikataiḥ palāśairupaśobhitaiḥ | | 23
chatracāmaraghaṇṭābhirbhūṣaṇairdarpaṇādibhiḥ |
nṛtyavāditragītaiśca vedaiḥ puṇyakathāsvanaiḥ | | 24
sarvatra jayaghoṣaiśca sampūrṇe pūjayanti ye | sampūrṇānvividhānkāmānnirvighnānprāpnuvanti te | | 25
svacakraṃ cāpi nirvighnaṃ vṛddhimāyāti suvrata |
hanyate paracakraṃ ca yatredaṃ pūjyate sakṛt | | 26
saṅkrāntau grahaṇe cāpi likhitvā yo japedidam |
bhavanti niyatāḥ sāmba tasya sānugrahā grahāḥ | | 27
sarvarogavihīnastu sarvaduḥkhavivarjitaḥ |
ciraṃ jīvati dharmātmā sarvaiśvaryasamanvitaḥ | | 28
eṣa vai kathito vatsa cakrayogo mayā tava |
arkasya sarvayajñānāṃ śreṣṭhaṃ siddhiprado bhṛśam | | 29
puṇyo dharmastathā puṣṭyaḥ śatrughnaśca viśeṣataḥ |
śveto rakto.atha pītaśca kṛṣṇaścāpi vibhāgaśaḥ | | 1.148.30
iti śrībhaviṣye mahāpurāṇe brāhme parvaṇi saptamīkalpe sāmbopākhyāne kālacakravarṇanaṃ
nāmāṣṭacatvāriṃśadadhikaśatatamo.adhyāyaḥ | 148 |
athaikonapañcāśadadhikaśatatamo.adhyāyaḥ
sūryadīkṣāvarṇanam
sāmba uvāca
kiṃ pramāṇaṃ likheccakraṃ tatra padmaṃ ca kiṃ bhavet |
nemipradhyāranābhīnāṃ vibhāgaḥ kriyate katham | | 1
vāsudeva uvāca
catuḥṣaṣṭyaṅgulaṃ cakraṃ kṛtvā vṛttaṃ pramāṇataḥ |
aṣṭāṅgulā bhavennemiḥ seyaṃ vibhavataḥ sadā | | 2
nābhikṣetraṃ tathaiva syātpadmaṃ tattriguṇaṃ bhavet |
arakṣetraṃ ca padmasya kaṇikākesarāṇi ca | | 3
kesarasya ca pādena śeṣapatrāṇi kalpayet |
patrasandhiśca pādāṅgaṃ kramāttatrāpi bhidyate | |4
unnataṃ kamalaṃ tattu kuryānnābhyāṃ na saṃśayaḥ |
ākīrṇāḥ saṃvibhaktāśca kartavyāḥ pradhayaḥ kramāt | |5
aṅgulasthūlamūlaṃ syādarāgraṃ triguṇaṃ tataḥ |
bhūmiḥ pītā bahirjñeyā karṇikākesarāṇi ca | | 6
sitaṃ nābhisthalaṃ tatra dvārāṇi parikalpayet |
hastamātraṃ bhavettasya tanmānaṃ dvārasannibham | |7
śeṣaṃ raktaṃ samuddiṣṭaṃ saṃhatāḥ patrasandhayaḥ |
nābhinemyantare lekhāḥ sitāścāṅgulamānataḥ | | 8
sitaraktasitābhiśca samantādupaśobhitam |
kapolaṃ dvārapadmaṃ ca dvārakoṇe prakalpayet | | 9
caturdvāraṃ bhavedevamaindradvāraṃ prakalpayet |
aparāhṇe.atha pūrvāhṇe varuṇamāvāhayetsadā | | 1.149.10
dvārāṇyetāni saṃvartya yathoktavidhinā yajet |
yathoktā devatāḥ sarvāḥ svamantraireva bhaktitaḥ | | 1 1
cakramevaṃ samuddiṣṭaṃ yajanārthaṃ mayā tava |
yajñenānena sambaddho dīkṣitaścārkamaṇḍale | |
itthaṃ me bhānunā pūrvamidamuktaṃ varānana | | 12
sāmba uvāca
ke mantrāścakrayajñe.asmindevatānāṃ prakīrtitāḥ |
yajñakramaśca kaḥ prokto rūpaṃ kiṃ ca pṛthakpṛthak | | 13
vāsudeva uvāca
khaṣolkaṃ hadayādhyakṣaṃ pūrvokte kamale yajet |
karṇikāyāṃ daleṣvevamaṅgāni hṛdayādi ca | | 14
nāmamantrāścaturthyaṃtāsteṣāṃ pūrvoktakoṭayaḥ |
namaskāraśca sarvatra eṣa eva vidhiḥ smṛtaḥ | | 15
svāhāntā homakāle ca karmasvanyeṣu te punaḥ |
yathā karmāvasānāśca prayoktavyāḥ samāsataḥ | | 16
oṃ khaṣolkāya vidmahe divākarāya dhīmahi |
tannaḥ sūryaḥ pracodayāt | | 17
sāvitrī ca mahābāho caturviṃśākṣarā matā |
sarvatattvamayī puṇyā brahmagotrārkavallabhā | | 18
evaṃ mantrāḥ prayoktavyāḥ sarvakarmasvataṃdritaiḥ |
anyathā viphalaṃ karma bhavediha paratra ca | | 19
tasmātsarvaprayatnena mantrāñjñātvā vidhiṃ tathā |
yathāvatkarma tatkṛtvā sādhayedīpsitaṃ phalam | | 1.149.20
sāmba uvāca
ādityamaṇḍale dīkṣā kasya kāryā kathaṃ ca sā |
kadā kena kimarthaṃ ca kathayedaṃ mamākhilam | | 21
vāsudeva uvāca
brāhmaṇaṃ kṣatriyaṃ vaiśyaṃ kulīnaṃ śūdrameva ca |
puruṣaṃ vā striyaṃ vāpi dīkṣayetsūryamaṇḍale | | 22
svayaṃ bhaktyopapannaśca praṇipatya guruṃ tathā |
gurustaṃ dīkṣayedvipraḥ kalpajñaḥ satyavākchuciḥ | | 23
ṣaṣṭhyāmagniṃ samādhāya pūrvoktavidhinā kramāt |
sampūjyārkaṃ tathā vahnau hutvā vai haviṣā ravim | | 24
śiṣyaṃ snātamathācāntaṃ khaṣolkākṛtivigraham |
svāṅgairālabhya cāṅgeṣu darbhavadbhistathākṣataiḥ | | 25
puṣpaiḥ sampūjya cāṅgāni deyaḥ kāryo balistathā |
ādityo varuṇo.arko.agniḥ sādhito hṛdayena ca | | 26
bhaved ghṛtaguḍakṣīraistandulaiśca pramāṇataḥ |
tribhirañjalibhirhutvā devāyāgnau hutaṃ punaḥ | | 27
dattvā śiṣṭāya muktvaivaṃ dattvānte dantadhāvanam |
kṣīraṃ vṛkṣodbhavaṃ tasmai dvādaśāṅgulasannibham | | 28
dantaśliṣṭe.apanīte ca tena prācyāṃ kṣipettataḥ |
dantadhāvanamāsyaṃ ca tadā tasyopari kṣipet | | 29
maitrāvāruṇamīśānaṃ vakraṃ saumyasamāśritam |
praśastaṃ dantakāṣṭhasya mukhamanyatra ninditam | | 1.149.30
yāṃ diśaṃ dantakāṣṭhasya mukhaṃ paśyati tatpatim |
arcayettena śāṃtiḥ syādityuktaṃ bhānunā svayam | | 31
punastadvacanaṃ śrutvā aṅgairālabhya ca kramāt |
sampūjya locane tatra sañciṃtya parijapya ca | | 32
kārayitvā ca saṅkalpaṃ tathā cendriyasaṃyamam |
sthāpayeta svayaṃ cāpi varaṃ śrutvā samāhitaḥ | | 33
ācamya kṛtarakṣastu kṛtadravyādhivāsanaḥ |
hadayena nametprātaḥ snātvā hutvā hutāśanam | | 34
svapnaṃ pṛcchedyathā dṛṣṭaṃ śubhaṃ saṃvādayecca tam |
hadayenāśubhe dṛṣṭe śatahomaṃ samācaret | | 35
svapne paśyati harmyāṇi devatānāṃ hutāśanam |
nadīyānāni ramyāṇi udyānopavanāni ca | | 36
patrapuṣpaphalāḍhyāni kamalāni ca rājatam |
sampaśyati yadi svapne brāhmaṇaṃ vedapāragam | | 37
rājānaṃ śauryasampannaṃ dhanāḍhyaṃ kṣatriyottamam |
śuśrūṣaṇaparaṃ śūdraṃ yadi tattvārthamādiśet | | 38
praśastaṃ bhāṣaṇaṃ caiva yathāsambhavato matam |
etaiḥ sparśanameteṣāṃ śreṣṭhamārohaṇaṃ tataḥ | | 39
vāhanāni praśastāni prāsādaṃ nāvameva ca |
parvataṃ ca samāruhya vipulāṃ bhārgavīṃ bhajet | | 1.149.40
pītvā surāṃ samudraṃ ca dadhyājyaṃ kṣīrameva ca |
somaṃ māṃsaṃ havirbhuktvā kāśyapīṃ labhate naraḥ | | 41
labdhvā vastrāṇi ratnāni vividhābharaṇāni ca |
vāhanāni mahīṃ gāśca dhānyopakaraṇāni ca | | 42
samṛddhimāpnuyātkiñcitsvapnānāṃ darśanaṃ śubham |
śubhakarmānugaṃ yacca tatsarvaṃ śubhamucyate | |4 3
tasmādanyadaniṣṭaṃ syāttasmādyuktā pratikriyā |
kramādālikhya saptamyāṃ tatra sampūjya bhāskaram |44
tarpayitvā dvijāñcchiṣṭānānamya pūrvavadgurum |
sṛṣṭikrameṇa bhṛtyarthaṃ muktyarthaṃ nānyathā bhavet | |45
divākaraṃ samālabhya puruṣo.atha yathākramam |
sarvagraheṣu tattveṣu yathāvattanniyojayet | |46
viśuddheṣu viśuddhaṃ taṃ dhyātvā cādityavatkramāt |
niyojayetpṛthivyāśca tataḥ prabhṛti sarvaśaḥ | |47
ādityamaṇḍalaṃ śuddhaṃ sarvamuktaṃ niyojayet |
evaṃ tu manasā dhyātvā juhuyāccaiva taṃ śatam || 48
sarvairmantraiḥ kramādevaṃ dīkṣā proktā varāparā |
kṛtvaiva puṣpapātaṃ tu tasminnādityamaṇḍale | | 49
baddhvāsyamañjalau puṣpaṃ kṛtvā dattvā ca mantritam |
kṣipedvai kulaśuddhyarthaṃ nāmārthaṃ ca viśeṣataḥ | 1.149.50
yatra tatpatitaṃ puṇyaṃ tasya tatkulamādiśet |
nāma cādityasaṃyuktamityuktaṃ bhānunā svayam | | 51
sampūjya śrāvayettatra samayānarkabhāṣitān |
prātaḥ sāyaṃ madhyāhne raverabhimukhaḥ sthitaḥ | | 52
upasthānaṃ sadā kuryādarcanaṃ ca sadā naraḥ |
adṛṣṭvārkaṃ na bhoktavyaṃ divā rātrau hutāśanam | |5 3
dṛṣṭvā bhoktavyamarkākhyaṃ na bhoktavyaṃ kadācana |
na ca padyā spṛśettadvannāsanaṃ parivarjayet | | 54
na laṅghyā pratimācchāyā na laṅghyāstithayaḥ kvacit |
nakṣatrāṇi grahā yogā māsā māsādhipāśca ye | | 55
ayane ṛtavaḥ pakṣāstathaiva divasāni ca |
kālaḥ saṃvatsaraścāpi yaḥ kaścitkāla ucyate | | 56
abhivandyaḥ sa sarvo.api namasyaḥ pūjya eva ca |
tasmātkālādhipaḥ sūryaḥ svayaṃ kālaśca paṭhyate | |57
jyotirgaṇasya sarvasya sthāvarāsthāvarasya ca |
cetanācetanasyāpi sarvātmā yaḥ prakīrtitaḥ | | 58
stutyo vandyaḥ sadā pūjyastvayāyaṃ sarvathā nṛpa |
manasā karmaṇā vācā devanindāṃ parityajet | |5 9
preṣayitvā ca nirmālyaṃ tadaśvebhyo nivedayet |
prakṣālya hastau pādau ca namaskuryāddivākaram | | 1.149.60
ityeṣā paramā dīkṣā tava saṃkṣepato mayā |
bhuktimuktikarī cāpi kathitā pravibhāgataḥ | | 61
iti śrībhaviṣye mahāpurāṇe brāhme parvaṇi saptamīkalpe sāmbopākhyāne sūryadīkṣāvarṇanaṃ
nāmaikonapañcāśadadhikaśatatamo.adhyāyaḥ | 149 |
atha pañcāśadadhikaśatatamo.adhyāyaḥ
ādityapūjāvidhivarṇanam
vāsudeva uvāca
ataḥ paraṃ pravakṣyāmi yathā pūjyo divākaraḥ |
sthaṇḍile yaduśārdūla nibodhaikāgramānasaḥ | | 1
maṇḍalairaṣṭabhiḥ kāryaṃ cakraṃ kālātmakaṃ śubham |
madhye padmākṛtaṃ cakramarairdvādaśabhiryutam | | 2
tanmadhye kamalaṃ proktaṃ patrāṣṭakasamanvitam |
sarvātmā sakalo devaḥ khaṣolkaḥ kiraṇojjvalaḥ | | 3
pūjanīyaḥ sadā madhye sahasrakiraṇāyudhaḥ |
praṇavena mahābāho caturbāhusamanvitaḥ | |4
aruṇaṃ pūjayetprājñaḥ sadā devāgrajaṃ śubham |
dakṣiṇe pūjayeddevīṃ nikṣubhāṃ bhāskarasya tu | | 5
revataṃ dakṣiṇe pārśve uttare piṅgalaṃ sadā |
saṃjñāṃ ca yaduśārdūla śreyase satataṃ budhaḥ | | 6
āgneyyāṃ lekhakaṃ vīra nairṛtyāmaśvinau tathā |
vāyavyāṃ pūjayeddevaṃ manuṃ vaivasvataṃ vibhum | | 7
aiśānyāṃ pūjayeddevīṃ yamunāṃ lokapāvanīm |
dvitīyāvaraṇe vīra pūrvataḥ pūjayedviyat | | 8
dakṣiṇe ca tato devīṃ paścime garuḍaṃ tathā |
uttare nāgarājānaṃ putramairāvataṃ śubham | | 9
āgneyyāṃ pūjayeddheliṃ praheliṃ nairṛte tathā |
vāyavyāmurvaśīṃ devīmīśāne vinatāṃ tathā | | 1.150.10
tṛtīyāvaraṇe pūrve pūjayedgurumādarāt |
paścime tvarkaputraṃ tu uttare dhiṣaṇaṃ tathā | | 11
aiśāne śaśiputraṃ tu somamāgneyamaṇḍale |
pūjayeddakṣiṇe koṇe nairṛte rāhumādarāt | | 12
vāyavye vikacaṃ vīra pūjayetsatataṃ budhaḥ |
caturthāvaraṇe devaṃ pūjayellekhamādarāt | | 13
āgneye śāṇḍilīputraṃ dakṣiṇe dakṣiṇādhipam |
virūpākṣaṃ nairṛte devaṃ jaleśaṃ paścime tathā | | 14
vāyuputraṃ ca vāyavyāṃ satataṃ pūjayennaraḥ |
īśāne devamīśānaṃ pūjayetsatataṃ budhaḥ | | 15
uttare yakṣarājānāṃ kuberaṃ pūjayedbudhaḥ |
pañcame pūjayedvīra sadā svāvaraṇe dvijāḥ | | 16
pūrvataḥ paramāṃ devīṃ mahāśvetāṃ mahāmatiḥ |
śriyamṛddhiṃ vibhūtiṃ ca dhṛtiṃ caivonnatiṃ tathā | | 17
pṛthivīṃ yaduśārdūla mahākīrtiṃ tathaiva ca |
indraṃ viṣṇuṃ cāryamaṇaṃ bhagaṃ parjanyameva ca | | 18
vivasvantaṃ tathārkaṃ ca tvaṣṭāraṃ kiraṇojjvalam |
pūjayedvaruṇaṃ ṣaṣṭhe caivametāndivākarān | | 19
śiro netre tathā varma astraṃ ca yadusattama |
aruṇaṃ sarathaṃ vīra saptame pūjayedbudhaḥ | | 1.150.20
tathāśvānyaduśārdūla sadā cāvaraṇe budhaḥ |
yakṣarakṣāṃsi gandharvānmāsānpakṣānahāni tu | | 21
saṃvatsaraṃ tathā putra hyetānsaṃpūjayetpurā |
ya evaṃ pūjayeddevaṃ bhāskaraṃ satataṃ naraḥ | |
sa gacchetparamaṃ sthānaṃ yatra gatvā na śocati | | 22
mūlamantrākṣarāṇīha cāṅgāni paricakṣate |
anena vidhinā yas tu pūjayet satataṃ ravim | | 23
nityam ubhayasaptamyāṃ sa gacchet paramaṃ padam |
ity uktvā bhagavān devo jagāmāśu gṛhaṃ raviḥ | | 24
iti śrībhaviṣye mahāpurāṇe brāhme parvaṇi saptamīkalpe sāmbopākhyāne ādityapūjāvidhivarṇanaṃ nāma pañcāśadadhikaśatatamo.adhyāyaḥ | 150 |
athaikapañcāśadadhikaśatatamo.adhyāyaḥ
sauradharmavarṇanam
sūta uvāca
atha rājā mahātejāḥ śatānīko dvijottamam |
praṇamya śirasā bhaktyā sumantuṃ vākyam abravīt | | 1
aho devasya māhātmyaṃ bhāskarasyāmitaujasaḥ |
kīrtitaṃ bhavatā mahyaṃ sarvapāpapraṇāśanam | | 2
tasmān nārkasamaṃ devaṃ loke paśyāmi suvrata |
na cāpy asya sthitā vipra gatir lokeṣu vidyate | | 3
pravartate jagad vipra sargakāle divākarāt |
sthitau pālayate cāpi kalpānte saṃharet punaḥ | | 4
śrutvaivaṃ devamāhātmyaṃ bhāskarasyāmitaujasaḥ |
kīrtitaṃ bhavatā mahyam aśvamedhaśatād varam | | 5
kiṃ tu me saṃśayo brahman sumahān hṛdi vartate |
kenopāyena viprendra mucyate sambhavārṇavāt | | 6
divākaraprasādādvai suprasannādvṛṣadhvajāt |
kathaṃ tuṣyetsadā devo dharmeṇa katareṇa tu | | 7
śrutā me bahavo dharmāḥ śrutismṛtyuditāstathā |
vaiṣṇavāḥ śaivadharmāśca tathā paurāṇikāḥ śrutāḥ | | 8
śrotukāmo hy ahaṃ vipra sauraṃ dharmam anaupamam |
bhagavan sarvadhanyās te sauradharmaparāyaṇāḥ | | 9
brūhi me devadevasya bhānordharmamanaupamam |
śṛṇvato nāsti me tṛptiramṛtasyaivameva ca | | 1.151.10
aśvamedhādayo yajñā bahusambhāravistarāḥ |
na śakyāste yataḥ kartumalpavittadvijātibhiḥ | | 11
sukhopāyamato brūhi dharmakāmārthasādhakam |
hitāya sarvamartyānāṃ sarvapāpabhayāpaham | | 12
sauradharmaparaṃ puṇyaṃ pavitraṃ pāpanāśanam |
śrutvā tu vacanaṃ rājño vyāsaśiṣyo mahāmuniḥ | |
praṇamya śirasā vyāsamidaṃ vacanamabravīt | | 13
sumanturuvāca
śrūyatāmabhidhāsyāmi sukhopāyaṃ mahāphalam |
paramaṃ sarvadharmāṇāṃ sarvadharmamanaupamam | | 14
raviṇā kathitaṃ pūrvamaruṇasya viśāṃpate |
kṛṣṇasya brahmaṇo vīra śaṅkarasya na vidyate | | 15
saṃsārārṇavamagnānāṃ sarveṣāṃ prāṇināmayam |
sauradharmatamaḥ śrīmānhitāya jagatoditaḥ | | 16
yairayaṃ śāntahṛdayaiḥ sūryabhaktairbhagārthibhiḥ |
saṃsevyate paro dharmaste saurā nātra saṃśayaḥ | | 17
ekakālaṃ dvikālaṃ vā trikālaṃ nityameva ca |
ye smaranti raviṃ bhaktyā sakṛdevāpi bhārata | |
sarvapāpairvimucyante saptajanmakṛtairapi | | 18
stuvanti ye sadā bhānuṃ na te prakṛtimānuṣāḥ |
svargalokātparibhraṣṭāste jñeyā bhāskarā bhuvi | | 19
nānarkaḥ smarate.arkaṃ vai nānarko.arkaṃ samarcayet |
nānarkaḥ kīrtayedarkaṃ nānarko.arkamavāpnuyāt | | 1.151.20
sauradharmasya sāro.ayaṃ sūryabhaktiḥ suniścalā |
ṣoḍaśāṅgā ca sā proktā raviṇeha divaukasām | | 21
prātaḥ snānaṃ japo homastathā devārcanaṃ nṛpa |
dvijānāṃ pūjanaṃ bhaktyā pūjā gośvatthayostathā | | 22
itihāsapurāṇebhyo bhaktiśraddhāpuraskṛtam |
śravaṇaṃ rājaśārdūla vedābhyāsastathaiva ca | | 23
madbhaktyā janavātsalyaṃ pūjāyāṃ cānumodanam |
svayamabhyarcayedbhaktyā mamāgre vācakaṃ param | | 24
pustakasya sadā śreṣṭha mamātīva priyaṃ surāḥ |
matkathāśravaṇaṃ nityaṃ svaranetrāṅgavikriyā | | 25
mamānusmaraṇaṃ nityaṃ bhaktyā śraddhāpuraskṛtam |
ṣoḍaśāḍgā bhaktiriyaṃ yasminmlecche.api vartate | |
viprendraḥ sa muniḥ śrīmānsajātyaḥ sa ca paṇḍitaḥ | | 26
na me pṛthakcaturvedā madbhaktaḥ śvapaco.api yaḥ |
tasmai deyaṃ tato grāhyaṃ sa ca pūjyo yathā hyaham | | 27
patraṃ puṣpaṃ phalaṃ toyaṃ yo me bhaktyā prayacchati |
tasyāhaṃ na praṇaśyāmi sa ca me na praṇaśyati | | 28
yo māṃ sarvagataṃ paśyetsarvaṃ ca mayi saṃsthitam |
tasyāhamāsthito nityaṃ sa ca nityaṃ mayi sthitaḥ | | 29
aṣṭādaśārdhakakṣāyāḥ paraṃ cāṣṭabhirudbhavaiḥ |
rodhayitvā mahābāho tathā jñānatareṇa tu | | 1.151.30
durgapālaṃ vijityāśu bhāskarārdhaṃ tu durjayam |
jitvā ca purarājānāṃ mahātejamanaupamam | | 31
manasācalayā bhaktyā yo māṃ dhyāyati mānavaḥ |
ahaṃ tameva ciṃtāmi ātmavatsatataṃ naram | | 32
iti śrībhaviṣye mahāpurāṇe brāhme parvaṇi saptamīkalpe sauradharmavarṇanaṃ
nāmaikapañcāśadadhikaśatatamo.adhyāyaḥ | 151 |
atha dvipañcāśadadhikaśatatamo.adhyāyaḥ
sūradharmeṣu praśnavarṇanam
sumanturuvāca
sūre ca durlabhā bhaktirdurlabhaṃ surapūjanam |
sūrāya durlabhaṃ dānaṃ sūrahomaśca durlabhaḥ | | 1
sudurlabhaṃ raverjñānaṃ tadabhyāso.api durlabha |
sudurlabhataraṃ jñeyaṃ khaṣolkajñānamuttamam | | 2
sudurlabhataraṃ jñānaṃ sadā vai bhāskarasya tu |
pradakṣiṇāṃ cakraturvai pādau bhaktyā.arkamandire | | 3
tau karau ślāghyatāṃ prāptau yau pūjāṃ cakratū raveḥ |
saivaikā rasanā dhanyā stotraṃ yā kurute raveḥ | | 4
tanmanaḥ puṇyatāṃ prāptaṃ yaddhitvā viṣayaṃ nṛpa |
niścalā ca raverlīlā nirbhīkā krodhavarjitā | | 5
śatānīka uvāca
sūryārcanavidhiṃ kurvañchrotumicchāmi tattvataḥ |
tvatprasādāddvijaśreṣṭha kautūhalamatīva me | | 6
yatpuṇyaṃ sthāpite sūrye kṛte sūryālaye ca yat |
sammārjane ca yatpuṇyaṃ yatpuṇyamupalepane| | 7
sthāne kṛte ca yatpuṇyaṃ tathā nīrājane kṛte |
nīlauṣadhipravāpena nṛtyamaṅgalavāditaiḥ | | 8
arghyadānena yatpuṇyaṃ toyasnānena yadbhavet |
pañcāmṛtamayasnāne dadhisnāne ca yatphalam | | 9
cakrābhyaṅge ca yatproktaṃ vajrasnāne ca yatphalam |
madhusnāne payaḥsnāne snāna ikṣurasasya tu | | 1.152.10
udvartanaṃ śucisthāne kuśapuṣpodakena tu |
suvarṇaratnatoyaiśca gandhacandanavāribhiḥ | | 11
karpūrāgurutoyena svacchato yena yatphalam |
vilepanaiśca gandhāḍhyairvilepanaphalaṃ labhet | | 12
tālapatrapradāne tu pradāne cāmarasya tu |
raktapuṣpārcane yacca dāmabhiḥ pūjanena ca | | 13
sumānāṃ maṇḍape yacca puṣpamālāvalambanāt |
pūjābhaktiviśeṣaiśca gṛhamālāvalambane | | 14
puṣpadānaviśeṣeṇa dhūpadīpaiśca yatphalam |
vastrālaṅkāradāne tu puṇyaśravaṇakīrtane | | 15
brahmaśravasya dāne tu avyaṅgasya ca gopate |
magānāṃ matprasādena abhivādanapūjane | | 16
vyomapūjāphalaṃ yacca aruṇasya ca pūjanam |
tathānyadapi yatproktamajñānādbrāhmaṇottama | | 17
tatsarvaṃ brūhi me brahmanbhaktānāmanukampayā | | 18
iti śrībhaviṣye mahāpurāṇe brāhme parvaṇi sūradharmeṣu praśnavarṇanaṃ nāma
dvipañcāśadadhikaśatatamo.adhyāyaḥ | 152 |
atha tripañcāśadadhikaśatatamo.adhyāyaḥ
sūryatejovarṇanam
sumanturuvāca
sumatiśca raverbhaktaḥ pāṇḍaveya mahāmate |
ataste nikhilaṃ vacmi śṛṇuṣvaikamanā nṛpa | | 1
kalpādau sṛjato vīra brahmaṇo vividhāḥ prajāḥ |
ahaṃkāro mahānāsīnnāsti loke maduttamaḥ | | 2
tathā pālayato vīra keśavasya dharāpate |
tathā saṃharato jajñe.ahaṅkārastryambakasya ca | | 3
ciṃtayantotha te devāḥ keśavaśca narādhipa |
mithaste spardhayā yuktāḥ parasparavirodhinaḥ | | 4
vivādastu mahānāsītkañjāmbunagaukasām |
parasparaṃ mahābāho manasāśritya kevalam | | 5
ahaṃ kartā vikartā.ahaṃ pālako.ahaṃ jagatprabhuḥ |
ityāha bhagavānbrahmā kṛṣṇabhīmau samarcitau | | 6
tathaitya śaṃkaraḥ kruddhaḥ kaḥ śakto madṛte bhuvi |
saṃhartuṃ jagadetaddhi sraṣṭuṃ pālayituṃ tathā | |7
nārāyaṇo.apyevameva manāk krodhasamanvitaḥ |
na vā śakto jagatsraṣṭuṃ saṃhartuṃ rakṣituṃ tathā | | 8
evaṃ teṣāṃ pravadatāṃ kruddhānāṃ ca parasparam |
samāviśattadā.ajñānaṃ tamo mohātmakaṃ vibho | | 9
tena krāntadhiyaḥ sarve na paśyanti parasparam |
atyarthaṃ mohamāpannā na jānantīha kiñcana | | 1.153.10
apaśyanto mithaste tu niṣaṇṇāḥ kṣmātale vibho |
āramanti hi ye cānye te divākaramāsthitāḥ | | 11
tamasā mohitāḥ sarve nidrāvatkrāntacetasaḥ |
manāgjñānena cākrāntāḥ kiṃ kuryāmeti mohitāḥ | | 12
atha bhūtādhipo devo gośrutābharaṇojjvalaḥ |
candrārdhakṛtaśobhastu śītalāṃśuviśodhitaḥ | | 13
ārtimetya parāṃ vīra mohitastamasā vibho |
apaśyannabravīddevaṃ mādhavaṃ bhūdharaṃ harim | | 14
mahādeva uvāca
kṛṣṇa kṛṣṇa mahābāho kva gatastvaṃ mahāmate |
brahmā ca kva gato vīra nāhaṃ paśyāmi vāṃ kvacit | | 15
mohena mahatāhaṃ vai tamasā ca vimohitaḥ |
kiṃ karomi kva gacchāmi kva cāhamadhunā sthitaḥ | | 16
kṣmādharaṃ pṛthivīṃ vṛkṣān devagandharvadānavān |
vipulaṃ sāgaraṃ sindhūnnahi paśyāmi kiñcana | | 17
kenopāyena paśyeyaṃ jagatsthāvarajaṅgamam |
brūhi me devaśārdūla vrīḍā me.atīva jāyate | | 18
śaṅkarasya vacaḥ śrutvā harirvacanamabravīt |
śokagadgadayā vācā tamasā mohito nṛpa | | 19
viṣṇuruvāca
bhīma bhīma na jāne.ahaṃ kva bhavānvartate.adhunā |
mamāpi mohitaṃ cetastamasātīva śaṅkara | | 1.153.20
kva gacchāmi kva tiṣṭhāmi kathaṃ tatsvasthatāṃ vrajet |
tamasā pūritaṃ sarvaṃ jagaddhi parameśvara | | 21
yadyasau dṛśyate devaḥ surajyeṣṭho.ambujodbhavaḥ |
pṛcchāvastaṃ mahātmānaṃ yadi te rocate hara | | 22
hitvā darpamahaṅkāraṃ samamāsthāya kevalam |
padmānanaṃ padmayoniṃ padmapatranibhekṣaṇam | | 23
ityevaṃ gadato vākyaṃ viṣṇoramitatejasaḥ |
śrutvovāca vibhurbrahmā gaṅgādharamahīdharau | | 24
kṛṣṇa kṛṣṇa mahābāho bhīma bhīma mahāmate |
kva bhavantau brūta kiṃ ca kiṃ yuvāmūcathurmithaḥ | | 25
mamātīva manobuddhī tamasā vaśamāgate |
na śṛṇomi na paśyāmi nidrāmohavaśaṃ gataḥ | | 26
aho bata jagatsarvaṃ sadevāsuramānuṣam |
tamasā vyāṣṭataṃ devau na jāne kva gataṃ mahaḥ | | 27
atha teṣāṃ pravadatāṃ brahmādīnāṃ divaukasām |
darpakrodhabhayārtānāṃ tamasākrāntacetasām | | 28
teṣāṃ darpāpahārāya prabodhārthaṃ ca gopateḥ |
tejorūpaṃ samudbhūtamaṣṭaśṛṅgamanaupamam | | 29
alakṣyaṃ pāpatamasā mahadvyoma narādhipa |
jvālāmālāvṛtaṃ vīra bahurūpaṃ ca bhāsate | | 1.153.30
śatayojanavistīrṇaṃ gatamūrdhvaṃ bhramattathā |
gomadhyato mahārāja karṇikevāmbujasya tu | | 31
prakāśaṃ tejasā tasya jagatsarvamidaṃ nṛpa |
pureṣvantaryathā vīra ambujasyārcibhiḥ sadā | | 32
dṛṣṭvā parasparaṃ sarve huṅkārādivikāriṇaḥ |
tejasā mohitāstasya jagatsarvamidaṃ nṛpa | | 33
tejasā mohitaṃ tasya mahadvyoma narādhipa |
tato vismayamāsīnaḥ dṛṣṭagopatayo nṛpa | | 34
paśyamānā maho vyomni mitho vacanamabruvan |
aho tejaḥ samuddhūtamasmākaṃ śreyase nṛpa | | 35
prakāśāya ca lokānāṃ sarve paśyāma kiṃ nvidam |
jñānāyordhvaṃ gato brahmā cādhastāttripurāntaka. | | 36
tiryagjagāma deveśaścakrāmbujagadādharaḥ |
alabdhvā tasya te sarve pramāṇaṃ gairikādhipāḥ | | 37
vismayotphullanayanā samāgamya parasparam |
sarve kañjādikā devā idaṃ vacanamabruvan | | 38
ko.ayaṃ kimātmakaścāyaṃ kimidaṃ tejasāṃ nidhiḥ |
aho.asya darśanātsarve sañjātā jñānino vayam | | 39
tasmātsarve praṇamyainaṃ stuvīmo.adbhutadarśanam |
kṛtāñjalipuṭāḥ sarve cāstuvaṃstridivaukasaḥ | | 1.153.40
stuvatāmapyathaiteṣāṃ sahasrakiraṇo raviḥ |
ātmānaṃ darśayāmāsa kṛpayā parayā vṛtaḥ | | 41
jñātvā bhaktiṃ mahābāho brahmādīnāṃ mahopamām |
atha te vyomni deveśaṃ dadṛśuḥ parameśvaram | | 42
khaṣolkalokanātheśaṃ sahasrakiraṇojjvalam |
kṛttikābhirasaṃspṛṣṭaṃ yadvā tatkārtikāsthitam | | 43
durjayaṃ kṛttikānāṃ tu tathaikena vivarjitam |
tathā hastavihīnaṃ ca saptarṣirahitaṃ tathā | | 44
varṣābdarahitaṃ devaṃ saptasvaravivarjitam |
sakalaṃ niṣkalaṃ caiva sadaikākārarūpiṇam | |45
taddṛṣṭvānekaśirasamanekacaraṇaṃ tathā |
anekodarabāhvaṃsamanekābharaṇānvitam | |4 6
anekānanamakṣībaṃ sahasrākṣamanaupamam |
anekavarṇarūpaṃ ca anekamukuṭojjvalam | |47
dṛṣṭvaivaṃ devadevasya rūpaṃ bhānormahātmanaḥ |
vismayotphullanayanāstuṣṭavuste divākaram | | 48
kṛtāñjalipuṭo bhūtvā brahmā stotuṃ pracakrame |
praṇamya śirasā bhānumidaṃ vacanamabravīt | | 49
brahmovāca
namaste devadeveśa sahasrakiraṇojjvala |
lokadīpa namaste.astu namaste koṇavallabha | | 1.153.50
bhāskarāya namo nityaṃ khaṣolkāya namonamaḥ |
viṣṇave kālacakrāya somāyāmitatejase | | 51
namaste pañcakālāya indrāya vasuretase |
khagāya lokanāthāya ekacakrarathāya ca | | 52
jagaddhitāya devāya śivāyāmitatejase |
tamoghnāya surūpāya tejasāṃ nidhaye namaḥ | | 53
arthāya kāmarūpāya dharmāyāmitatejase |
mokṣāya mokṣarūpāya sūryāya ca namonamaḥ | | 54
krodhalobhavihīnāya lokānāṃ sthitihetave |
śubhāya śubharūpāya śubhadāya śubhātmane | | 55
śāntāya śāntarūpāya śāntaye.asmāsu vai namaḥ |
namaste brahmarūpāya brāhmaṇāya namonamaḥ | | 56
brahmadevāya brahmarūpāya brahmaṇe paramātmane |
brahmaṇe ca prasādaṃ vai kuru deva jagatpate | | 57
evaṃ stutvā raviṃ brahmā śraddhayā parayā vibho |
tūṣṇīmāsīnmahābhāga prahṛṣṭenāntarātmanā | | 58
brahmaṇo.anantaraṃ rudraḥ stotraṃ cakre vibhāvasoḥ |
tripurārirmahātejāḥ praṇamya śirasā ravim ||59
mahādeva uvāca
jaya bhāva jayājeya jaya haṃsa divākara |
jaya śambho mahābāho khaga gocara bhūdhara ||1.153.60
jaya lokapradīpena jaya bhāno jagatpate |
jaya kāla jayānanta saṃvatsara śubhānana ||6 1
jaya devāditeḥ putra kaśyapānandavardhana |
tamoghna jaya sapteśa jaya saptāśvavāhana ||62
maheśa jaya kāntīśa jaya kāleśa śaṅkara |
arthakāmeśa dharmeśa jaya mokṣeśa śarmada ||63
jaya vedāṅgarūpāya graharūpāya vai namaḥ |
satyāya satyarūpāya surūpāya śubhāya ca ||64
krodhalobhavināśāya kāmanāśāya vai jaya |
kalmāṣapakṣirūpāya yatirūpāya śambhave ||65
viśvāya viśvarūpāya viśvakarmāya vai jaya |
jayoṅkāra vaṣaṭkāra svāhākāra svadhāmaya ||66
jayāśvamedharūpāya cāgnirūpāryamāya ca |
saṃsārārṇavapītāya mokṣadvārapradāya ca ||67
saṃsārārṇavamagnasya mama deva jagatpate |
hastāvalambano deva bhava tvaṃ gopate.adbhuta ||68
īśo.apyevamahīnāṅgaṃ stutvā bhānuṃ prayatnataḥ |
virarāma mahārāja praṇamya śirasā ravim ||69
atha viṣṇurmahātejāḥ kṛtāñjalipuṭo ravim |
uvāca rājaśārdūla bhaktyā śraddhāsamanvitaḥ ||1.153.70
viṣṇuruvāca
namāmi devadeveśaṃ bhūtabhāvanamavyayam |
divākaraṃ raviṃ bhānuṃ mārtaṇḍaṃ bhāskaraṃ bhagam ||71
indraṃ viṣṇuṃ hariṃ haṃsamarkaṃ lokaguruṃ vibhum |
trinetraṃ tryakṣaraṃ tryaṅgaṃ trimūrtiṃ trigatiṃ śubham | |72
ṣaṇmukhāya namo nityaṃ trinetrāya namonamaḥ |
caturviṃśatipādāya namo dvādaśapāṇaye | 73 |
namaste bhūtapataye lokānāṃ pataye namaḥ |
devānāṃ pataye nityaṃ varṇānāṃ pataye namaḥ | |74
tvaṃ brahmā tvaṃ jagannātho rudrastvaṃ ca prajāpatiḥ |
tvaṃ somastvaṃ tathādityastvamoṃkāraka eva hi | | 75
bṛhaspatirbudhastvaṃ hi tvaṃ śukrastvaṃ vibhāvasuḥ |
yamastvaṃ varuṇastvaṃ hi namaste kaśyapātmaja | | 76
tvayā tatamidaṃ sarvaṃ jagatsthāvarajaṅgamam |
tvatta eva samutpannaṃ sadevāsuramānuṣam | | 77
brahmā cāhaṃ ca rudraśca samutpannā jagatpate |
kalpādau tu purā deva sthitaye jagato.anagha | | 78
namaste vedarūpāya ahorūpāya vai namaḥ |
namaste jñānarūpāya yajñāya ca namonamaḥ | |79
prasīdāsmāsu deveśa bhūteśa kiraṇojjvala |
saṃsārārṇavamagnānāṃ prasādaṃ kuru gopate | |1.153.80
vedāntāya namo nityaṃ namo yajñakalāya ca | |
sumanturuvāca
stutvaivaṃ bhāskaraṃ bhaktyā viṣṇurbharatasattama |
pradadhyau nṛpaśārdūla raviṃ tadgatamānasaḥ | 81
evaṃ te naraśārdūla devā brahmādayo.anagha |
stuvanti taṃ mahātmānaṃ sahasrakiraṇaṃ ravim | | 82
ityevaṃ stuvatāṃ teṣāṃ raviṃ bhaktyā mahātmanām |
atha tuṣṭo ravisteṣāṃ brahmadīnāṃ jagatpatiḥ | 83
vijñāya bhaktiṃ paramāṃ śraddhāṃ ca paramāṃ vibhuḥ |
uvāca sa mahātejāḥ prahṛṣṭenāntarātmanā |84
graheśo vyoma cārūḍhastejasā prajvalandiśaḥ |
brahmāṇaṃ viṣṇumīśānamāmantryaitānviśāṃpate | |85
dṛṣṭvā tānpraṇatāntsarvāñchirobhiravaniṃ gatān |
tuṣṭo.asmi te surajyeṣṭha caturmukha jagatpate | |
varaṃ varaya bhadraṃ te manasā tvaṃ yadicchasi ||86
kṛtvā tu vacanaṃ bhānorbrahmā lokagururnṛpa |
jagāma śirasā bhūmāvuvāca sa kṛtāñjaliḥ ||87
brahmovāca
kṛtakṛtyo.asmi deveśa pūtaścāsmi khagādhipa |
dhanyo.asmyanugṛhīto.asmi gato.asmi paramāṃ gatim | |88
sahasrakiraṇairyanme bhavāndarśanamāgataḥ ||89
apaśyataśca deveśa mūḍhamāsīnmano mama |
bhagavansamprasīda tvaṃ mamopari vibhāvaso | |1.153.9 0
prayaccha tvaṃ balaṃ bhaktimātmano mama gopate |
gatvā śirobhiravanimaṣṭāṅgaiḥ patitasya ca | |
bhaktyā vijñaptimākarṇya prasādaṃ kuru gopate | | 91
brahmaṇo vacanaṃ śrutvā pūṣā devo jagatpatiḥ |
tathetyāha mahārāja virāṭa praśrayānvitam | | 92
brahmaṇe ca varaṃ dattvā rājandevo divākaraḥ |
uvāca tryambakaṃ devaṃ śaśāṅkakṛtaśekharam | | 93
varaṃ varaya bhūteśa bhūbhṛjjādayitānagha |
yamicchasi mahādeva dade.ahaṃ tadaśeṣataḥ | | 94
bhāskarasya vacaḥ śrutvā īśvarastripurāntaka |
gatvā tu śirasā bhūmau praṇamyovāca bhāskaram | | 95
mahādeva uvāca
puṇyo.ahaṃ puṇyakarmāhaṃ nāsti dhanyataro mama |
gato.ahaṃ paramāṃ siddhiṃ gataśca paramāṃ gatim | | 96
nāprāpyamasti deveśa nāsādhyaṃ mama kiṃcana |
yasya me bhagavāndevaḥ prasādapravaṇaḥ sthitaḥ | | 97
tvayā tatamidaṃ sarvaṃ jagatsthāvarajaṅgamam |
tvatta eva samutpannaṃ layaṃ ca tvayi yāsyati | | 98
yadi tuṣṭo mama vibho anugrāhyo.asmi te yadi |
acalāṃ dehi me bhaktimātmanaścaraṇaṃ naya | | 99
vyomakeśavacaḥ śrutvā pūṣā devo divākaraḥ |
tathetyāha haraṃ vīra tato harimuvāca | | 1.153.100
nārāyaṇa mahābāho varaṃ varaya godhara |
parituṣṭo.asmi te deva yamicchasi mahābala | | 101
śrutvā tu bhāskaravacaḥ kīlālajanako hariḥ |
uvāca parayā bhaktyā natvā ca śirasā ravim | | 102
nārāyaṇa uvāca
jaya deva jagannātha jaya deva guro rave |
prasīda mama deveśa bhaktiṃ yacchātmano rave | | 103
yenāhaṃ sarvadevānāmuttamaḥ syāṃ jagatpate |
ajeyaśca tathā deva daityadānavarakṣasām | | 104
tvadbhaktyā bṛṃhitabalastejasā mahatānvitaḥ |
tato mayā mahatkarma kartavyaṃ tava śāsanāt | | 105
prajānāṃ pālanaṃ deva devānāṃ ca grahādhipa |
varṇānāmāśramāṇāṃ ca varṇadharmasya vā vibho | | 106
duṣṭadaityavināśāya lokānāṃ pālanāya ca |
sṛṣṭo.ahaṃ bhavatā pūrvaṃ kalpādau ca kṛto.anagha | | 107
yasya ruṣṭo bhavānsyādvai kathañcitpuruṣasya tu |
vyādhirduḥkhaṃ manorogaṃ dāridryaṃ santatikṣayaḥ | | 108
tasyaitāni bhavantīha ādhayo vividhāstathā |
tasmāttvaṃ ca tato deva saṃstavyaḥ satataṃ budhaiḥ | | 109
evaṃ tvāṃ gopate deva bhaktyā śraddhāsamanvitaḥ |
ahamarcitumicchāmi tasmānmayi kṛpāṃ kuru | | 1.153.110
iti śrībhaviṣye mahāpurāṇe brāhme parvaṇi saptamīkalpe sauradharme sūryatejovarṇanaṃ
nāma tripañcāśadadhikaśatatamo.adhyāyaḥ | 153 |
atha catuḥpañcāśadadhikaśatatamo.adhyāyaḥ
trayī-upākhyānavarṇanam
sumanturuvāca
śrutvā tu vacanaṃ bhānurviṣṇoramitatejasaḥ |
uvāca kuruśārdūla ādityaḥ kṛpayānvitaḥ | | 1
āditya uvāca
kṛṣṇa kṛṣṇa mahābāho śṛṇu me paramaṃ vacaḥ |
yadarthaṃ prārthitaḥ kṛṣṇa tatsarvaṃ te bhaviṣyati | | 2
devadānavayakṣāṇāṃ gandharvoragarakṣasām |
ajeyastvaṃ mahābāho bhaviṣyasi na saṃśayaḥ | | 3
jagatpālayituṃ sarvaṃ samarthaśca bhaviṣyasi |
acalā tava bhaktiśca bhaviṣyati mamopari | |4
brahmāpi satataṃ śakto jagatsraṣṭuṃ bhaviṣyati |
saṃhartuṃ śaṅkaraścāpi matprasādādbhaviṣyati | |5
bhavanto matprasādena jñānināmuttamaṃ padam |
gamiṣyanti na sandeho matpūjāprasādataḥ | |6
ravervacanamākarṇya gośrutābharaṇo vibho |
uvāca gopatirgogo gopatiṃ govṛṣadhvajaḥ | |7
tvāmārādhya bhaviṣyāmo vayaṃ sarve surottamāḥ |
kathamārādhayāmo hi bhavantaṃ śraddhayānvitāḥ | |
śreyase satataṃ deva brūhi nastattvamātmanaḥ | |8
bhavato hi na paśyāmo mūrtiṃ paramapūjitām |
paśyāmaḥ kevalaṃ tejo hyabdhestoyamivojjhitam | | 9
jvālāmālākulaṃ sarvamanekākṛti cādbhutam |
na cākāravihīnaṃ tu cetaso lambanaṃ bhavet | | 1.154.10
ālambanādṛte deva na cittaramaṇaṃ kvacit |
cetaso.aramaṇe bhaktirna puṃsāṃ jāyate kvacit | | 11
bhaktiṃ vinā pūjayituṃ na śakyante divaukasaḥ |
tvatpūjane hi prāpyante deva dharmādayo naraiḥ | | 12
tasmāddarśaya tāṃ mūrtimātmano yā parā matā |
yena tvāṃ pūjayitvā tu vayaṃ siddhā bhavāmahe | | 13
sūrya uvāca
sādhu sādhu mahādeva sādhu pṛṣṭo.asmi suvrata |
śṛṇu caikamanāḥ kṛtsnaṃ gadato mama mānada | | 14
caturmūrtirahaṃ deva jagadvyāpya vyavasthitaḥ |
śreyase sarvalokānāmādimadhyāntakṛtsadā | | 15
ekā me rājasī mūrtirbrahmeti parikīrtitā |
sṛṣṭiṃ karoti sā nityaṃ kalpādau jagatāṃ vibho | | 16
dvitīyā sāttvikī proktā yā parā parikīrtitā |
jagatsā pālayennityaṃ duṣṭadaityavināśinī | | 17
tṛtīyā tāmasī jñeyā īśeti ṣarikīrtitā |
trailokyaṃ saṃharetsā tu kalpānte śūlapāṇinī | | 18
caturthī tu guṇairhīnā satyādibhiranuttamā |
sā cāśakyā kvaciddraṣṭuṃ sthitā sā cābhavatsadā | | 19
tayā tatamidaṃ sarvaṃ yaccodgīthaṃ tu me gatiḥ |
niṣkalā sakalā sā tu surūpā rūpavarjitā | | 1.154.20
antargatā ca lokānāṃ na ca karmaphalaṃ gatā |
tiṣṭhamānāpyaliptā sā padmapatramivāmbhasā | | 21
anaṣṭā ca sadā ṣaḍbhiḥ saptātītya vyavasthitā |
catustanā ca sā ṣaḍbhyasturīyākhyā supūjitā | | 22
na sā spraṣṭuṃ tvayā śakyā hariṇā brahmaṇā na ca |
māmanārādhya bhūteśa vyomarūpaṃ kadācana | | 23
yadetadbhavatāṃ deva prabodhārthamupasthitam |
ahaṃkāravimūḍhānāṃ tamasā ca trilocana | | 24
prakāśāya ca lokānāṃ jvālāmālāsamākulam |
karṇikeva sthitaṃ deva bhūpadmasyākhilasya ca | | 25
yasya saṃdarśanādeva yūyaṃ sarve prabodhitāḥ |
prakāśamabhavadvāpi jagatsarvamathārcibhiḥ | | 26
tasmādārādhayasvainamaspṛṣṭaṃ gamanopamam |
manmūrtiṃ yena tāṃ divyāṃ drakṣyasi tvaṃ trilocana | | 27
yattvādyamīśvaraṃ jajñe tadvyoma parikīrtitam |
kalpānte hyatra vai vyomni līyante sarvadevatāḥ | | 28
dakṣiṇe līyate brahmā vāme tasya janārdanaḥ |
tvaṃ sadā kacadeśe tu līyase tripurāntaka | | 29
gāyatrī līyate tasya hṛdaye lokamātaraḥ |
līyante mūrddhni vai vedaḥ saṣaḍaṅgapadakramaḥ | | 1.154.30
jaṭhare līyate sarvaṃ jagatsthāvarajaṅgamam |
punarutpadyate hyasmādbrahmādyaṃ sacarācaram | | 31
ākāśaṃ vyoma ityāhuḥ pṛthivī nikṣubhā matā |
bhūtaśreyoha.amākāśo nikṣubhā dayitā mama | | 32
mayā nikṣubhayā sarvaṃ jagadvyāptaṃ trilocana |
tasmādārādhaya vyoma tvaṃ brahmā keśavastathā | | 33
tanme rūpaṃ mahadvyoma pūjayitvā trilocana |
divyaṃ varṣasahasraṃ hi girau tvaṃ gandhamādane | |
tato yāsyasi saṃsiddhiṃ ṣaḍaṅgāṃ paramāṃ śubhām | | 34
kalāpagrāmamāśritya śaṅkhacakragadādharaḥ |
ārādhayatu māṃ bhaktyā vyomarūpaṃ janārdanaḥ | | 35
antarikṣagataṃ tīrthaṃ puṣkaraṃ lokapāvanam |
tatra gatvā viriñco me vyomarūpaṃ sadārcatu | | 36
evaṃ māṃ satataṃ yūyaṃ samārādhya jagatpatim |
samānāṃ ca sudivyānāṃ sahasratrayamādarāt | | 37
tato drakṣyatha me mūrtiṃ paramāṃ yāṃ vidurbudhāḥ |
kadambagolakākārāṃ raśmimālākulāṃ parām | | 38
atha nārāyaṇo devaḥ praṇamya śirasā ravim |
kṛtāñjalipuṭo bhūtvā idaṃ vacanamabravīt | | 39
viṣṇuruvāca
yadi te paramaṃ rūpaṃ mataṃ vyoma hyanaupamam |
tamārādhya vayaṃ sarve yāsyāmaḥ siddhimuttamām | |1.154.4 0
kīdṛgvyoma tvahaṃ brahmā haraśca tripurāntakaḥ |
ārādhayāmahe deva bhaktyā śreyo.arthamātmanaḥ | |4 1
yena siddhiṃ gamiṣyāmastamārādhya divākaram |
tasmānno lakṣaṇaṃ brūhi vyomnaḥ paramapūjita | |42
iti śrībhaviṣye mahāpurāṇe brāhme parvaṇi saptamīkalpe sauradharme trayyupākhyāne
catuḥpañcāśadadhikaśatatamo.adhyāyaḥ | 1 54|
atha pañjapañcāśadadhikaśatatamo.adhyāyaḥ
sauradharmanirūpaṇam
āditya uvāca
sādhusādhu suraśreṣṭha sādhu pṛṣṭo.asmi bhūdhara |
śṛṇuṣvaikamanāḥ kṛṣṇa gadato nikhilaṃ mama | | 1
ārādhayatvayaṃ devo mama rūmanaupamam |
catuṣkoṇaṃ paraṃ vyoma adbhutaṃ gairikojjvalam | | 2
tvāmārādhya ca cakrāṃkaṃ śaṃkaro vṛttamādarāt ||
śabdādau satataṃ brahma sagarādau trilocanaḥ || 3 ||
madhyāhne tvaṃ sadā deva bhaktyā māmarcayasva vai ||
yatheṣṭamṛbhavaḥ sarve bhaktyā māṃ pūjayaṃtu vai || 4 ||
tato brahmādayo devāḥ śrutvā vākyaṃ vibhāvasoḥ ||
praṇamya śirasā sarvaṃ idaṃ vacanamabruvan || 5 ||
dhanyā deva vayaṃ sarve kṛtakṛtyāstathaiva ca ||
asmābhirbhagavānpṛṣṭa stejasā prajvalaṃti ca || 6 ||
saṃbhūtā jñāninaḥ sarve bhavato darśanādvayam ||
tamomohāttathā taṃdrā sarvamekapade gatam || 7 ||
vayaṃ tvanmūrtayaḥ sarve tejasā tava saṃvṛtāḥ ||
utpattisthitināśāya lokānāṃ tava śāsanāt || 8 ||
sthitāḥ sarve surajyeṣṭha lokapālāśca kṛtsnaśaḥ ||
adhunā sādha yāmeha vyomnaḥ pūjāṃ vrajāmahe || 9 ||
itthaṃ teṣāṃ vacaḥ śrutvā bhāskaro vāritaskaraḥ ||
uvāca brahmaviṣṇvīśānsāmapūrvamidaṃ vacaḥ || 1.155.10 || ||
|| āditya uvāca || ||
evametanna saṃdeho yadā vadatha suvratāḥ||
yūyaṃ manmūrtayaḥ sarve yuṣmākamahameva hi||11||
yadetaddarśanaṃ devāḥ pramāṇa ca yaduttamam||
jvālāmālākulaṃ śubhraṃ śāṃḍileyamivojjhitam || 12 ||
yuṣmākaṃ devaśārdūlāstannibodhata kāraṇam||
ahaṃkāravimūḍhānāṃ mithaḥ kalahināṃ tathā || || 13 ||
prabodhārthaṃ hi yuṣmākaṃ tamaso nāśanāya ca ||
pravartanāya sarveṣāṃ karmaṇāṃ ca pradarśitam ||14||
tasmādevaṃ viditvā tu nāhaṃkāraḥ kadācana ||
kartavyo bhūtimicchadbhiḥ satataṃ devasattamāḥ || 15 ||
mānaṃ darpamahaṃkāraṃ pūrvaṃ tyaktvā sudūrataḥ ||
ārādhayata māṃ bhaktyā satataṃ śraddhayānvitāḥ || 16 ||
tato drakṣyatha me rūpaṃ sakalaṃ niṣkalaṃ ca yat ||
yasya saṃdarśanādeva sarve siddhimavāpsyatha || 17||
evamuktvā mahārāja sahasrakiraṇo vibhuḥ ||
jagāmādarśanaṃ teṣāṃ paśyatāmeva bhārata || 18 ||
atha te vismitāḥ sarve brahmaviṣṇupinākinaḥ ||
tejasā tasya devasya bhāskarasya mahaujasaḥ ||19||
parasparamathocuste vismayena tadā nṛpa ||
aho mahātmā.ayaṃ devo.aditiputro divaspatiḥ || 1.155.20 ||
bṛhadbhānurmahātejā lokadīpo vibhāvasuḥ ||
yena sarve vayaṃ trātā nighnatā vipulaṃ tamaḥ ||21||
ārādhayāmastaṃ sarve gatvā sthānāni kṛtsnaśaḥ ||
yena sarve vayaṃ tasya prasādātsiddhimāpnumaḥ ||22 ||
tadvyoma pūjayitvā tu parayā śraddhayā vibhoḥ ||
āmaṃtrya te mithaḥ sarve gatāḥ pūjārthamādarāt || 23 ||
jagāma puṣkaraṃ brahmā śālagrāmaṃ janārdanaḥ ||
vṛṣabhadhvajo gato vīra parvataṃ gaṃdhamādanam ||24||
tyaktvā mānamahaṃkāraṃ kurvaṃtastapa uttamam ||
ārādhayaṃti taṃ devaṃ bhāskaraṃ vāritaskaram||25||
vyomni kṛtvā catuṣkoṇaṃ brahmā nityamapūjayat ||
cakrāṃkitaṃ harirnityaṃ samyagvyomaṃ tvapūjayat || 26 ||
haro.api satataṃ vīra tejasā vahnisannibham ||
apūjayatsadā vṛttaṃ vyomaṃ bhaktyā samanvitaḥ || 27 ||
divyavarṣasahasrāṃte pūjayaṃto divākaram ||
gaṃdhamālyopahāraistu nṛtyagītapravāditaiḥ ||28||
atoṣayanmahātmānaṃ kurvāṇāstapa uttamam ||
bhaktyācalena manasā vivasvaṃtamanuttamam || 29 ||
atha teṣāṃ mahārāja prasanno bhuvanādhipaḥ ||
darśayāmāsa lokātmā yugapadvai vibhāvasuḥ || 1.155.30 ||
kṛṣṇātmā ca mahātejāścaturdhā yogatonagha ||
gatvaikena suraśreṣṭhaṃ sobravītparamaṃ vacaḥ || 31 ||
anyena śaṃkaraṃ manye anyena garuḍadhvajam ||
sa tatāpa tathānyena rathārūḍho divaṃ sadā || 32 ||
evaṃ yogabalādbhānuḥ kṛtavānmahadadbhutam||
ugre tapasi vartaṃtaṃ dṛṣṭvā cainaṃ caturmukham || 33 ||
pūjayantaṃ mahadvyoma bhūgatairmukhapaṅkajaiḥ ||
uvāca taṃ mahārāja bhāskaraścaturānanam || 34 ||
paśyapaśya suraśreṣṭha varadaṃ māmupāgatam ||
śrutvaivaṃ vacanaṃ bhānorviriṃcastamathaikṣata || 35 ||
dṛṣṭvā jagāma praṇato hyavaniṃ mukhapaṃkajaiḥ ||
harṣādutphullanayanaḥ punarutthāya bhāskaram ||
uvāca paramaṃ vākyaṃ kṛtāṃjalipuṭaḥ sthitaḥ || 36 ||
|| brahmovāca || ||
namaste devadeveśa namaste timirāpaha ||
namaste bhūta bhavyeśa bhūtāde bhūtabhāvana || 37 ||
prasādaṃ kuru me deva prasanno.atha divākaraḥ ||
gatiranyā na me deva vidyate tvadṛte vibho || 38 ||
|| āditya uvāca || ||
evameva yathāttha tvaṃ nāsti tatra vicāraṇā ||
tvaṃ me prathamajaḥ putraḥ saṃbhūtaḥ kāraṇātpurā || 39 ||
varaṃ varaya bhadraṃ te varadosmi tavāgrataḥ ||
yamicchasi surajyeṣṭha mā tvaṃ śaṃkāṃ kuru prabho || 1.155.40 ||
|| brahmovāca || ||
yadi me bhagavāṃstuṣṭo dadāti varamuttamam ||
kartuṃ śaknomi sṛṣṭiṃ ca prasādāttava gopate ||
kṛtākṛtā hi me deva sṛṣṭirneha prasidhyati || 41 ||
|| āditya uvāca || ||
na putratvamahaṃ prāptastava deva caturmukha ||
tavānvaye gamiṣyāmi putratvaṃ hi marīcaye || 42 ||
tato yāsyati te siddhiṃ kṛtsnā sṛṣṭiścaturmukha ||
bhavitaivaṃ na sandeho matprasādā jjagatpate || 43 ||
evamukto viriṃcistu raviṇā pṛthivīpate ||
taṃ vai vyoḍhaṃ vivastraṃtaṃ lokanāthaṃ jagatpatim || 44 ||
punarāha surajyeṣṭhaḥ praṇamya śirasā ravim ||
kva me vāso jagannātha bhaviṣyati divaspate || 45 ||
|| āditya uvāca || ||
yanme rūpaṃ mahadvyoma pṛṣṭhaśṛṃgamanuttamam ||
tatra devakadaṃbaistu bhavānnityaṃ nivatsyati || 46 ||
indraḥ pūrvadiśo bhāge āgneyyāṃ śāṃḍilīsutaḥ ||
dakṣiṇasyāṃ yamo nityaṃ nairṛtyāmatha nirṛtiḥ || || 47 ||
paścimāyāṃ tu varuṇo vāyavyāṃ tu sadāgatiḥ ||
uttare tu diśo bhāge nivaseddhanadastataḥ || 48 ||
aiśānyāṃ śaṃkaro devo madhye tvaṃ viṣṇunā saha ||
śrutvaitvaṃ vacanaṃ bhānorvedhāḥ prītyā tamabravīt || 49 ||
kṛtakṛtyaṃ tathātmānaṃ manyate ca narādhipa ||
cakāra ca tathā sarvaṃ bhāska roktamaśeṣataḥ || 1.155.50 ||
sa ca siddhiṃ gato vīra prasādādbhāskarasya tu ||
ādityopi varaṃ dattvā brahmaṇyo brahmaṇe.anagha || 51 ||
jagāma saha devena parvataṃ gandhamādanam ||
dadarśa tatra bhūteśaṃ tapastīvraṃ samāśritam || 52 ||
kapardinaṃ śūladharaṃ candrārkakṛtaśekharam ||
pūjayaṃtaṃ paraṃ vyoma suvrataṃ teja sānvitam || 53 ||
gandhamālyopahāraiśca nṛtyagītapravāditaiḥ ||
mukhavādyaiśca bahubhiḥ praṇavastotragītibhiḥ |||
saṃpūjyaiva mahadvyoma jagāma śirasā mahīm || 54 ||
dṛṣṭvaivaṃ pūjayantaṃ ca bhāskarastripurāṃtakam ||
tuṣṭovocanmahātejā gośrutābharaṇaṃ haram || 59 ||
bhīma tuṣṭo.asmi te vatsa varaṃ matto vṛṇuṣva vai ||
tavāṃtikamahaṃ prāpto varado bhūbhṛdālaya || 56 ||
śrutvaivaṃ vacanaṃ bhānormahādevo mahīpate ||
dadarśa lokanāthaṃ taṃ prajvalaṃtamanuttamam ||
uvāca praṇato bhūtvā aṣṭāṃgairbhūtalaṃ gataḥ || 57 ||
namonamaste deveśa prabhākara divākara ||
śubhālaya śubhādhāra vikartana śubhānana || 58 ||
prasādaṃ kuru deveśa prasannastvaṃ vikartana ||
saṃsārārṇavamagnasya bhava poto jagatpate || 59 ||
tavāṃgasaṃbhavo deva putrohaṃ vallabhastava ||
yatkaroti mahādeva pitā putrasya tatkuru || 1.155.60 ||
|| āditya uvāca || ||
evametanna sandeho yathā vadasi śaṃkara ||
lalāṭāttvaṃ samutpannaḥ putraḥ putravatāṃ vara || 61 ||
varaṃ varaya bhadraṃ te mananā tvaṃ yamicchasi ||
durdeyaṃ cāpi te dāsye tripurāntaka sundara || 62 ||
|| mahādeva uvāca || ||
yadi tuṣṭo.asi me deva anugrāhyosmi te yadi ||
prayaccha me varaṃ bhāno dehi bhaktiṃ mamācalām || 63 || devadānavagaṃdharvayakṣarakṣogaṇāṃstathā ||
nirjityāhaṃ yathā deva yugānte saṃhare prajām || 64 ||
tathā prayaccha me deva sthānaṃ ca paramaṃ vibho ||
yenāhaṃ hetisarvaṃ ca jaye deva jagatprabho || 65 ||
|| āditya uvāca || ||
devadānavagandharvayakṣarākṣasapannagān ||
hariṣyasi jagaccāpi yugānte tripurāntaka || 66 ||
yadetatpūjitaṃ nityaṃ madrūpaṃ vyoma cotta mam ||
etattriśūlaṃ paramaṃ tava śastraṃ bhaviṣyati ||
īśāne ca tathā bhāge vyomno vāso bhaviṣyati || 67 ||
|| mahādeva uvāca || ||
evaṃ bhavatu me deva yaḥ prasādastvayā kṛtaḥ ||
kṛtakṛtyo.asmi deveśa yanme devo varapradaḥ || 68 || ||
iti śrībhaviṣye mahāpurāṇe brāhme parvaṇi saptamīkalpe sauradharmanirupaṇaṃ nāma pañcapañcāśaduttaraśatatamo.adhyāyaḥ || 155 || || cha ||
traisuropākhyānavarṇanam
|| sumanturuvāca || ||
itthaṃ dattvā varaṃ bhānurīśvarāya viśāṃ pate ||
śālagrāmaṃ jagāmāśu varaṃ dātuṃ harernṛpa || 1 ||
dadarśa sa hariṃ tatra tapantaṃ paramaṃ tapaḥ ||
kṛṣṇājinadharaṃ śāntaṃ prajvalantaṃ svatejasā || 2 ||
pūjayantaṃ mahadvyoma cakrākāramanaupamam||
gandhamālyopahāraiśca nṛtyagītapravāditaiḥ || 3 ||
evaṃ saṃpūjya tadvyoma bhaktyā śraddhāsamanvitaḥ ||
jagāma śirasā bhūmiṃ hṛdi dhyāyandivākaram || 4 ||
viṣṇuṃ taṃ praṇataṃ dṛṣṭvā tuṣṭo devo vibhāvasuḥ ||
uvāca viṣṇumāmaṃtrya paśya māmāgataṃ hare || 5 ||
tadvākyaṃ keśavaḥ śrutvā śirasā ca mahīṃ gataḥ ||
namaste sarvadeveśa namaste gaganecara || 6 ||
jagatpate namaste.astu grahāṇāṃ pataye namaḥ ||
dāridryavyādhiduḥkhaghna namaste bhavanāśana || 7 ||
ādityārka rave bhāno bhaga pūrṇa divākara ||
namaste sarvatattvajña sarvapāpavitarjita || 8 ||
prasīda me jagannātha haṃsānagha divaspate ||
saṃsārārṇavamagnānāṃ trāhi deva vṛṣadhvaja || 9 ||
putro.ahaṃ tava deveśa dvitīyo brāhmaṇo.anagha ||
piteva putrasya rave dehi kāmāñjagatpate || 1.156.10 ||
viṣṇorvacanamākarṇya harṣaṃ prāpya divākaraḥ ||
uvāca kuruśārdūla harṣagadgadayā girā || 11 ||
sādhu kṛṣṇa mahābāho tuṣṭohaṃ tava keśava ||
niśamya te parāṃ bhaktiṃ śraddhāṃ ca puruṣottama || 12 ||
varaṃ varaya tasmāttvaṃ vatsa yaṃ manasecchasi ||
varado.a hamanuprāpto bhaktyākrāṃtastavānagha || 13 ||
niśamya vacanaṃ bhānorviṣṇurbhaktyā samanvitaḥ ||
kṛtāṃjalipuṭo bhūtvā idaṃ vacanamabravīt || 14 ||
kṛtakṛtyo.asmi deveśa nāsti dhanyataro mama ||
yasya me bhagavaṃstuṣṭo varadastvaṃ gataḥ svayam || 15 ||
yadi tuṣṭo mama vibhurbhaktyā krīto mayā yadi ||
prayaccha tvacalāṃ bhaktiṃ yathā śatruṃ parājaye ||
tathā mama varaṃ dehi sarvārāti vināśanam || 16 ||
mama sthānaṃ ca paramaṃ sarvalokanamaskṛtam ||
lokānāṃ pālane yuktiṃ balaṃ vīryaṃ yaśaḥ sukham || 17 ||
evamukto ravirbhaktyā viṣṇunā vākyamuttamam ||
uvāca kuruśārdūla gajatsannādayanniva||18||
sādhu sādhu mahābāho brahmaṇastvaṃ jaghanyajaḥ ||
harasya agrajaścāpi sarvadevanamaskṛtaḥ || 19 ||
bhaktaścāpi mamātyaṃtaṃ brahmaṇyaśca sadānagha ||
tasmāttavācalā bhaktirbhaviṣyati mamopari || 1.156.20 ||
etadeva mahadvyoma cakraṃ te prabhaviṣyati ||
sarvāyudhavaraṃ vīra sarvārātivināśanam ||
tathā sthānaṃ ca paramaṃ sarvalokanamaskṛtam || 21 ||
itthaṃ bhānorvaraṃ prāpya harirdevo jagatpatiḥ ||
mahāprasādamityuktvā jagāma śirasā mahīm || 22 ||
bhāskaro.api varaṃ dattvā keśavāyāmitaujase ||
jagāmāśu mahārāja svapuraṃ vibudhādhipaḥ ||23 ||
lokānāṃ pālane śaktiṃ balaṃ vīryaṃ yaśaḥ sukham ||
dattvā kṛṣṇāya deveśastathānyadapi kāṃkṣitam || 24 ||
evaṃ brahmādayo devāḥ pūjayitvā divākaram ||
śaktimaṃto babhūvuste sargādīnāṃ pravartane || 25 ||
iti te kathitaṃ puṇyamākhyānaṃ pāpanāśanam ||
tridaivatyamupākhyānaṃ traisuraṃ lokapūjitam ||26||
stotratrayasamāyuktaṃ dharmakāmārthasādhanam ||
dharmyaṃ svargyaṃ tathā puṇyamārogyadhanadhānyadam || 27 ||
ya idaṃ śṛṇuyānnityaṃ paṭhetstotratrayaṃ ca yaḥ ||
so.agneyaṃ yānamārūḍho yāti bhānoḥ para padam || 28 ||
aputro labhate putramadhano dhanamaśnute ||
vidyārthī labhate vidyāṃ prasādādbhāskarasya tu ||29||
tejasā ravisaṃkāśaḥ prabhayā pṛśnisannibhaḥ ||
modate suciraṃ kālaṃ jñānināmuttamo bhavet || 1.156.30 ||
iti śrībhaviṣye mahāpurāṇe brāhme parvaṇi saptamīkalpe sauradharme traisuropākhyānavarṇanaṃ nāma ṣaṭpaṃcāśaduttaraśata tamo.adhyāyaḥ || 156 || cha ||
sūryāvatārakathāprastāvavarṇanam
|| śatānīka uvāca || ||
etanme kautukaṃ brahmanyadvaraṃ brahmaṇe raviḥ ||
dattavāṃstava putratvamanvaye kaśyapasya tu || || 1||
yāsyāmi dvijaśārdūla prapannatimirāpahaḥ ||
etanme mahadāścaryaṃ śaṃsa bhūmiṃ kathaṃ vrajet || 2 ||
devādīnāṃ praṇetā yo yo bhuvi prasavo vibhuḥ ||
sa kathaṃ bhūtale vyoma janmabhāvaṃ gamiṣyati || 3 ||
kimarthaṃ divyamātmānaṃ janmane sa niyokṣyati ||
yaścakraṃ vartayatyeko brahmādīnāṃ manoramam||4|||
sa janmani kathaṃ puṇyāṃ buddhiṃ cakre vidāṃvara ||
gopāyanaṃ yatkurute jagataḥ sarvalaukikam ||5 ||
gobhiḥ pālayate kṛtsnamātmano yaḥ svayaṃ raviḥ |||
mahābhūtāni bhūtātmā yaścakāra dadhāra ca || 6 ||
agarbhaḥ sa kathaṃ garbhamudare yācate vibhuḥ ||
yena gobhiḥ samākrāṃtā vipra lokāścaturdaśa || 7 |||
sthāpitā jagato mārgāstrivargapravarāstrayaḥ ||
yo.antakāle jagatpītvā kṛtvā vajramayaṃ vapuḥ || 8 ||
lokamekārṇavaṃ cakre dṛśyate svena karmaṇā ||
yaḥ purāṇe purāṇātmā tejasāṃ rūpamāsthitaḥ || 9 ||
api sṛṣṭvā dvijaśreṣṭha yaḥ sasarja vasuṃdharām||
cakāra ca purā yaśca trailokyamidamavyayaḥ || 1.157.10 ||
dadau kṛtvā vasumatīṃ surāṇāṃ surasattamaḥ ||
yaḥ sthito hyanalaṃ pītvā saṃvatsaramayaśca yaḥ ||
pātālasthorṇavarasaṃ madhyatoyamayaṃ haviḥ || 11 |||
sahasraśirasaṃ devaṃ sahasrākṣaṃ sahasraśaḥ ||
sahasracaraṇaṃ brahmanyamāhurvai yuge yuge || 12 ||
mukhādyasya samutpanno vedhā lokapitāmahaḥ ||
hariśca vakṣaso yasya lalāṭādyasya śaṃkaraḥ || 13 ||
yena te nihatā daityā maṃdehā nāma nāmataḥ ||
brahmādīnāṃ durādharṣo yaḥ sadā vighnanāśanaḥ ||14||
sarvadevamayaṃ kṛtvā sarvāyudhadharaṃ vapuḥ ||
ekacakrarathārūḍho garuḍāgrajasārathiḥ || 15 ||
karāṃte yo jagatsarvaṃ saha dānavarākṣasam ||
prakāśatamamaspṛṣṭaṃ vapuryasya sadā dvija || 16 ||
pūrvā diśaṃ gato nityamudayācalamakramam ||
nāśayedyastu satataṃ tamo lokasya śāṃtaye || 17 ||
nāśayitvā tamo yastu kriyāḥ sarvāḥ pravartayet ||
yoktrāṇi dakṣiṇādīkṣya musalolūkhalāni ca || 18 ||
gārhapatyena vidhinā tadvaddhāryeṇa karmaṇā ||
agnimāhavanīṃ caiva vediṃ caiva kuśaṃ srucam ||
prokṣaṇīyavrataṃ caiva avabhṛthaṃ tathaiva ca || 19 ||
sarvānimāṃśca yaścakre havyabhāgapradānmukhe ||
havyādāṃśca surānyajñe kavyādāṃśca pitṛrnapi || 1.157.20 ||
bhāgārthe madhudhānāya cakre yo yajñakarmaṇi ||
pūṣaṇaṃ ca sutaṃ somaṃ pavitrāmaraṇīmapi || 21 ||
yajñāni ca dravyāṇi yajñāṃścāpi saṛtvijaḥ ||
sadasyānyajamānāṃśca medhāvinastathottamān|| 22 ||
vibabhāja purā sarvaṃ pārameṣṭhayena karmaṇā ||
yugānurūpo yaḥ kṛtvā lokānanuvaraṃ kramāt || 23 ||
kṣaṇānkalāśca kāṣṭhāśca kālavaikalyameva ca ||
muhūrtāstithayo māsāḥ pakṣāḥ saṃvatsarāstathā ||24||
ṛtavaḥ kālayogāśca pramāṇaṃ vividhaṃ nṛṣu ||
āyuḥ kṣetrāṇyapacayopacayāṃścaiva yo.akarot || 25 ||
sṛṣṭā lokāstrayonaṃtā yena jñānena vartmanā ||
sarva ,bhūtagaṇāḥ sṛṣṭāḥ sarvabhūtātmanā sadā || 26 ||
praṇāmatrayapūrveṇa yogena ramate ca yaḥ ||
yo gatāgatipotena trātāsti jagadīśvaraḥ || 27||
yo gatirvṛṣayuktānāṃ gatiryo.apāpakarmaṇām ||
cāturvarṇyaprabhāvaśca vapurhotrasya rakṣitā || 28 ||
dhātuvaidyasya yo vettā caturāśramasaṃśrayaḥ ||
digaṃbarānubhūtaśca vāyurvāyuvibhāvanaḥ || 29 ||
agnīṣomātmakaṃ jyotiryogīśaḥ kṣaṇadāṃtakaḥ ||
yaḥ paraṃ śrūyate jyotiryaḥ paraṃ śrūyate tapaḥ || 1.157.30 ||
yaṃ paraṃ paramaṃ prāhuḥ paramātmānamacyutam ||
brahmādibhiḥ stuto devo yaśca daityāṃtakṛdvibhuḥ ||31||
yugāṃteṣvataṃko yastu yaśca lokāṃtakottamaḥ ||
seturyo lokasetūnāṃ madhye yo madhyakarmaṇām ||32||
vettā yo vedaviduṣāṃ prabhuryaḥ prabhaviṣṇunām ||
saumyabhūtastu saumyānāmagnibhūtognivarcasām || 33 ||
mānuṣāṇāṃ manobhūtastapobhūtastapasvinām ||
vinayo nayavṛttīnāṃ tejastejasvināmapi || 34 ||
vigraho vigrahāṇāṃ ca gatirgatimatāmapi ||
ākāśaprasavo vāyurvāyuḥ prāṇo hutāśanaḥ ||
devāhutipradānodyatprāṇāgnistamanāśanaḥ || 35 ||
rasāddhi śoṇitaṃ bhavati śoṇitānmāṃsamucyate ||
māṃsānmajjāvasorjanma majjanosthīni janmataḥ || 36 ||
asthimajjñaḥ samabhavattato vai śukramādiśet ||
śukrādgarbhaḥ samabhavadrasamūlena karmaṇā ||
tatrāpaḥ prathamo bhāgaḥ sa saumyo rāśirucyate || 37 ||
tataḥ kṣmāsaṃbhavo jñeyo dvitīyo rāśirucyate ||
śukraṃ somātmakaṃ vidyādātmarūpaṃ yadātmakam || 38 ||
bhavo rasātmakasteṣāṃ vīryaṃ ca śaśipāvakam ||
kaphavarge bhavecchukraṃ pittavarge ca śoṇitam || 39 ||
kaphasya pṛthivī sthānaṃ pittaṃ nābhau pratiṣṭhitam ||
devasya madhyahṛdayaṃ sthānaṃ tu manasaḥ smṛtam ||
nābhikoṣṭhāṃtarasthaṃ tu tatra devo divākaraḥ ||1.157.40||
manaḥ prajāpatirjñeyaḥ kaphaḥ somo vibhāvyate ||
pittamagniḥ smṛto yasmādagnīṣomātmakaṃ jagat || 41 ||
evaṃ pravartite garbhe vardhiteṃ.abudasannibhe ||
vāyuḥ praveśaṃ saṃcakre saṃgataḥ paramātmanā || 42 ||
tatoṃ.agāni visṛjate bibharti parivartayan ||
prāṇo.apānaḥ samānaśca udāno vyāna eva ca || 43 ||
prāṇosya prathamaṃ sthānaṃ vardhayanparivartate ||
apānaṃ paścime kāya udānordhvaṃ śarīragaḥ ||
vyāno.atha vyāpako dehe samānaḥ sannivartate || 44 ||
bhūtāvāptistatastasya jāyatīṃdriyagocarā ||
pṛthivī vāyurākāśa āpo jyotiśca paṃcamaḥ || 45 ||
tasyeṃdriyāṇi piṣṭāni svaṃsvaṃ yogaṃ pracakramuḥ ||
pārthivaṃ dehamāhustu prāṇātmānaṃ ca mārutam || 46 ||
nidrā hyākāśayoniśca jalāśraye pravartate ||
jyotiścakṣuṣi tajjanma tadaṃśastāmasaḥ smṛtaḥ || 47 ||
grāmāśca viṣayāścaiva yasya vīryaṃ pravartitam||
evaṃ yaḥ sṛjate lokānsadevāsuramānavān || 48 ||
sa kathaṃ devadeveśo garbhameṣyati cāṃśumān ||
yathodaramadityāstu yaḥ svayaṃ cāviśatpurā ||49||
evaṃ me saṃśayo brahmanneṣa me vismayo mahān ||
kathaṃ raviryayau garbhabhāvaṃ dvijavareti me || 1.157.50 ||
āścaryaṃ paramaṃ pṛcche tvāmahaṃ bhāskarasya vai ||
bhānorutpattimāścaryaṃ hṛdi me parivartate || 51 ||
etadāścaryamākhyānaṃ kathayasva mahāmune ||
samākhyāhi balaṃ vīrya bhānoramitatejasaḥ || 52 ||
iti śrībhaviṣye mahāpurāṇe brāhme parvaṇi saptamīkalpe sauradharme sūryāvatārakathāprastāvavarṇanaṃ nāma saptapaṃcāśaduttaraśatatamo.adhyāyaḥ || 157 |||6||
sauradharmeṣu sūryotpattivarṇanam
sumaṃturuvāca || ||
praśnabhāro mahāṃstāta tvayokto raśmimālini ||
yathāśakti tu vakṣyāmi śrūyatāṃ bhānavaṃ yaśaḥ || 1 ||
bhānoḥ prabhāvaśravaṇe yasya te matirutthitā ||
haṃta bhānoḥ pravṛttiṃ ca śṛṇu divyāṃ mayeritām || 2 ||
sahasrāsyaṃ sahasrākṣaṃ sahasrakiraṇaṃ ca yam ||
sahasraśirasaṃ devaṃ sahasrakarama vyayam || 3 ||
sahasrajihvaṃ bhāsvaṃtaṃ sahasramukuṭaṃ prabhum ||
sahasradaṃ sahasrāriṃ sahasrabhujamavyayam || 4 ||
savanaṃ bhavanaṃ caiva havyaṃ hotārameva ca ||
pātrāṇi samatītāni vedadīkṣī caruṃ śubham || 5 ||
śrotriyaṃ śūrpamusalaṃ prokṣaṇaṃ dakṣiṇāyanam ||
adhvaryuṃ sāmagaṃ vipraṃ sadasyaṃ sadanaṃ tathā || 6 ||
yūpaṃ samitsruvaṃ darvīṃ musalolūkhalāni ca ||
prāgvaṃśaṃ jayabhūtiṃ ca hotāraṃ cayanaṃ ca yat || 7 ||
rahasyāni pramāṇāni sthāvarāṇi carāṇi ca ||
pratiṣṭhitāni dārḍhyaṃ ca sthaṃḍilāni kuśāṃstathā || 8 ||
maṃtrayajñavahaṃ vahnibhāgaṃ bhārgavameva ca ||
agrebhujī somabhujāṃ yaśca triṣu udāhṛtaḥ || 9 ||
āyurvedavido viprā yajaṃte śāśvataṃ vibhum ||
tasya bhānoḥ sureśasya vīra caṃdanamālinaḥ || 1.158.10 ||
prāhurbhāvasahasrāṇi samatītānyanekaśaḥ ||
bhūyaścaiva bhaviṣyaṃti vinaśyaṃti dinedine || 11 ||
yatpṛcchasi mahārāja puṇyāṃ divyāṃ kathāṃ śubhām ||
yadarthaṃ bhagavānbhānuḥ kaśyapasya suto.abhavat || 12 ||
tāmahaṃ tvaṃ pravakṣyāmi śṛṇu sarvamaśeṣataḥ ||
hitārthaṃ sarvamartyānāṃ lokānāṃ prabhavāya ca || 13 ||
bahuśaḥ sarvabhūtātmā svayaṃ samabhijāyate ||
tathā samabhavaddevaḥ kaśyapasyāditeḥ sutaḥ || 14 ||
tuṣṭo dattvā varaṃ vīra virañcasya mahātmanaḥ ||
yaṃ yaṃ janayate putramaditiḥ kaśyapādvibhoḥ || 15 ||
sa sa yāti vināśaṃ vai tatkṣaṇādeva bhārata ||
dṛṣṭvā sutānnaśyamānānputraśokānvitā .aditiḥ || 16 ||
jagāma kaśyapābhyāśe śokavyākulitekṣaṇā ||
sāpaśyattaṃ ca mārīcaṃ muniṃ dīptaṃ taponidhim || 17 ||
ādyaṃ devaguruṃ vipraṃ divyaṃ triṣavaṇāṃbubhiḥ ||
tejasā vahnisaṃkāśaṃ sauraṃ vṛkasamaprabham || 18 ||
nyastadaṇḍaśriyā yuktaṃ baddhakṛṣṇājināṃbaram ||
valkalājinasaṃvītaṃ pradīptaṃ brahmavarcasam || 19 ||
hutāśamiva dīvyantaṃ tapantamiva bhāskaram ||
athāditiśca dṛṣṭvaivaṃ bhartāramamitaujasam || 1.158.20 ||
śokagadgadayā vācā idaṃ vacanamabravīt ||
kimarthaṃ bhagavāndevo nirudyogastu tiṣṭhati || 21 ||
jātojāto hi me putraḥ sadya eva vinaśyati ||
śrutvā tu vacanaṃ tasyāḥ kaśyapo munisattamaḥ || 22 ||
cakāra gamane buddhiṃ brahmalokaṃ prati prabho ||
sa gatvā brahmabhavanaṃ nānābhāvasamanvitam || 23 ||
tadvākya muktaṃ taṃ sarvaṃ yaduktaṃ tasya jāyayā ||
kaśyapasya vacaḥ śrutvā kañjajo vākyamabravīt || 24 ||
putra gacchāma sadanaṃ bhānoḥ paramadurlabham||
ityuktvā yānamāruhya āgneyaṃ padmalocanaḥ || 25 ||
vedhā jagāma bhavanamādityasya mahātmanaḥ ||
aditiḥ kaśyapo brahmā jagmurvipulamāśritāḥ || 26 ||
te muhūrtena saṃprāptāḥ sūryalokaṃ suvarcasam ||
divyakāmagamairyānairyathārhaṃ kurunandana || 27 ||
ādityaṃ praṣṭumicchaṃti tejasāṃ rāśimuttamam ||
gacchantaste ca vistīrṇāmādityasya parāṃ sabhām || 28 ||
ṣaṭpadodgītaninadāṃ sābhagaistu samīritām ||
kratavo bahvṛcamukhāḥ proktāḥ puṇyavadakṣarāḥ || 29 ||
tuṣṭuvuḥ puruṣavyāghraṃ vitateṣu ca karmasu ||
yajñasandhau vedavidāṃ padakramavidāṃ tathā || 1.158.30 ||
ghoṣeṇa paramarṣīṇāṃ sarvaṃ tatra nināditam ||
yajñasaṃstavavidbhiśca śikṣāvidbhistathā dvijaiḥ || 31 ||
aṣṭādaśapurāṇajñaiḥ sarvavidyāviśāradaiḥ ||
mīmāṃsāhetuvādajñaiḥ sarvavādaviśāradaiḥ || 32 ||
lokāyatikamukhyaiśca tuṣṭuvuḥ sūryamīritam ||
tatratatra ca viprendrān niyatāñchaṃsitavratān||33||
japahomaparānyogyāndadṛśuḥ kaśyapādayaḥ ||
tasyāṃ sabhāyāmāste sa raśmimālī divākaraḥ || 34 ||
surāsuraguruḥ śrīmāñchuśubhe vīra māyayā ||
upāsate ca tatraiva prajānāṃ patimīśvaram || 35 ||
dakṣaḥ pracetāḥ pulaho marīciśca dvijottamaḥ ||
bhṛguratrirvaśiṣṭhaśca gautamo nāradastathā || 36 ||
divyā ātmāṃtarikṣaṃ ca vāyustejobalaṃ mahī ||
śabdaḥ sparśaḥ svarūpaṃ ca rasagandhau tathaiva ca || 37 ||
prakṛtiśca vikārāśca yaccānyatkāraṇaṃ mahat ||
sāṃgopāgāśca catvāro vedā lokapate tathā || 38 ||
lavāśca ṛtavaścaiva saṃkalpapraṇavāstathā ||
ete cānye ca bahavo bhānumaṃtamupāsate || 39 ||
artho dharmaśca kāmaśca mokṣaśca saviśeṣataḥ ||
dveṣo harṣaśca mohaśca matsaro māna eva ca || 1.158.40 ||
vṛko viṣṇusutaḥ putraḥ puṣpajo dhiṣaṇastathā ||
māheśvarastathā sauro viṭapo vikacastathā || 41 ||
māruto viśvakarmā ca aśvi nāvanyavāhanau ||
evamuktaḥ suvacanairbhānunā prabhaviṣṇunā || 42 ||
jagāma kaśyapo vīra sahādityā svamāśramam ||
aditirdevamātā ca taṃ garbhaṃ nidadhe svayam || 43 ||
bhūtātmānaṃ mahātmānaṃ divyaṃ varṣasahasrakam ||
pūrṇe varṣasahasre tu pravṛtto garbha uttamaḥ || 44 ||
surāṇāṃ śaraṇaṃ devaścāsurāṇāṃ vināśanaḥ ||
garbhasthena tu tenaiva paritrātaḥ sutastathā || 45 ||
ādadānastu tejāṃsi trailokyasya narādhipa ||
tasmiñjāte tu deveśe trailokyasya sukhāvahe || 46 ||
prahatya daityasaṃghāṃśca surāṇāṃ nādavardhane ||
abhavatparamānandaḥ sarveṣāṃ tatra tasthuṣām || 47 || ||
iti śrībhaviṣye mahāpurāṇe brāhme parvaṇi saptamīkalpe sauradharmeṣu sūryotpattirnāmāṣṭapañcāśaduttaraśatatamo.adhyāyaḥ || 158 || || cha || ||
sūryāvatāravarṇanam
sumaṃturuvāca || ||
dakṣaḥ prajāpatiścaiva namaskāraṃ cakāra ha ||
vidyotamāno vapuṣā sarvābharaṇabhūṣitaḥ || 1 ||
upātiṣṭhata deveśaṃ bhānuṃ carṣigaṇaiḥ saha ||
tato gaṃdharvamukhyeṣu praṇadatsu vihā yasi ||
bahubhiḥ saha gaṃdharvaiḥ pragāyatsu mahīpate || 2 ||
evaṃ te devagaṃdharvā upāgāyaṃta bhaktitaḥ ||
utpannaṃ dvādaśātmānaṃ bhāskaraṃ vāritaskaram || 3 ||
indro vivasvānpūṣā ca tvaṣṭā ca savitā tathā ||
bhargoṃ.aśumānaryamārkaḥ pṛśnirmārtaṃḍa eva ca ||
ityekādaśa evaite dvādaśo viṣṇurucyate || 4 ||
evaṃ dvādaśadhā jātamaṃśumaṃtaṃ mahādbhutam ||
stuvanti devatāḥ sarve gatāśca tarasā mahīm || 5 ||
mṛgavyādhaśca śarvaśca mṛgāṃkāṃko mahāyaśāḥ ||
ajaikapādahirbudhnyaḥ patiḥ kācaḥ paraṃtapaḥ || 6 ||
damanaśceśvaraścaiva kapālī ca viśāṃpate ||
sthāṇurbhagaśca bhagavānrudrāścaite.avatasthire || 7 ||
aśvinau vasavaścāṣṭau garuḍaśca mahābalaḥ ||
viśvedevāśca sādhyāśca tasthuḥ prāṃjalayo nṛpa || 8 ||
nāgarājo mahārāja vāsukiḥ prāṃjaliḥ sthitaḥ ||
anye ca bahavo nāgā rākṣasāśca mahābalāḥ || 9 ||
tārkṣyaścāriṣṭanemiśca garuḍaśca mahābalaḥ ||
aruṇaścāruṇiścaiva tatra prāṃjalayaḥ sthitāḥ ||1.159.10||
pitāmahaśca bhagavānsvayamāgamya lokakṛt ||
prāha devaguruḥ śrīmāntsuraiḥ sarvairmaharṣibhiḥ ||11||
yasmātprekṣayate sarvaṃ prabhaviṣṇuḥ sanātanaḥ ||
tasmāllokeśvaraḥ śrīmānvivasvāṃśca bhavatviti || 12 ||
devadānavayakṣāṇāṃ gaṃdharvoragarakṣasām ||
yasmādayamādidevastasmādāditya eva hi || 13 ||
evamuktvā tu bhagavānsārdhaṃ devarṣibhiḥ prabhuḥ ||
namaskṛtvā susaṃpūjya yayau tatsadanaṃ prati || 14 ||
yā gatiryajñaśīlānāṃ yā gatiḥ puṇyakarmaṇām||
yā gatiḥ siddhayogānāṃ yā gatiśca mahātmanām || 15 ||
yasyāṣṭaguṇamaiśvaryaṃ samabhūddevasattamam.||
yaṃ prāpya śāśvataṃ viprā nāvartaṃte bhavārṇave || 16 ||
vālakhilyādayo ye ca sarvāśramanivāsinaḥ ||
sevaṃte yaṃ yatātmāno duścaraṃ vratamāsthitāḥ||17||
yo.anaṃta iva nāgeṣu yasya te sarvayoginaḥ ||
sahasramūrdhā raktākṣaḥ śeṣādibhiranuttamaiḥ ||| || 16 ||
yo yajña iti vipreṃdrairarcyate sukhamīpsubhiḥ ||
sarve ca yaṃ yataprāṇā dhyāyanti brahmarūpiṇam || 19 ||
yaṃ vedavido gāyaṃti vettāraṃ yajñadāyi nam ||
taṃ putraṃ dvādaśātmānaṃ kaśyapaḥ prāpya sattamam || 1.159.20 ||
mudaṃ lebhe sahādityā sukhaṃ ca paramaṃ vibho ||
lokaśca mumude sarvo rākṣasā bhayamāpnu van || 21 ||
madhupiṃgalo mahābāhuḥ kaṃbugrīvo hasanniva ||
iṃgudībaddhamukuṭo diśaḥ prajvalayanniva || 22 ||
sa uvāca mahātejāḥ kaśyapaṃ carṣisatta mam ||
eṣohaṃ tava putratvaṃ gato garbhasya siddhaye || 23 ||
dattvā varaṃ purā vipra viraṃcasya mahātmanaḥ ||
tasmāttvamṛṣiśārdūla kuru sṛṣṭimanaupamām || || 24 ||
evamārādhya deveśaṃ brahmā sṛṣṭimavāptavān ||
ārādhya kaśyapaścāpi bhāskaraṃ sutamāptavān || 25 ||
iti śrībhaviṣye mahāpurāṇe brāhme parvaṇi saptamīkalpe ubhayasaptamīmahātmye sūryāvatāravarṇanaṃ nāmaikonaṣaṣṭyuttaraśatamo.adhyāyaḥ || 159 || cha ||
sūryāvatāravarṇanam
|| śatānīka uvāca || ||
aho devasya caritaṃ bhāskarasya tvayoditam ||
brahmādayo.api yaṃ nityaṃ pūjayaṃti vidhānataḥ || 1 ||
brahmā viṣṇuḥ surā brahmaṃstamārādhya divākaram ||
dadṛśustasya kiṃbhūtaṃ rūpaṃ yattanmahādbhutam || 2 ||
|| sumaṃturuvāca || ||
ārādhya devamīśānaṃ bhāskaraṃ sūtivācakam ||
kaviṣṇū kuruśārdūla jagmatustau himācalam ||3||
gopateraṃtikaṃ vīra prahṛṣṭau vibhudarśane ||
kuṃdeṃdusaṃnibhaṃ draṣṭuṃ kaṃjajaścācyutaśca tau ||4||
dadṛśaturmahātmānaṃ caṃdrārdhakṛtaśekharam ||
pūjayaṃtaṃ vivasvaṃtaṃ bhāskaraṃ vīravannṛpa || 5 ||
ārcyocaturmahātmānaṃ kaviṣṇū taṃ trilocanam ||
bhobho bhīma suraśreṣṭha paśyāvāmiha cāgatau || 6 ||
śrutvovāca tayorvākyaṃ kaṃjajasyācyutasya ca ||
praṇamya śirasā bhūmau kṛtvā pūjāṃ vidhānataḥ ||7||
uvāca madhuraṃ vākyaṃ śikṣākṣarasamanvitam ||
harṣa gadgadayā vācā diśaḥ sannādayanniva || 8 ||
kimārādhya raviṃ prāptau sarvadevavaraṃ vibhum ||
kathyatāṃ nikhilaṃ devau paramaṃ kautukaṃ mama || 9 ||
dṛṣṭavaṃtau paraṃ kiṃcidrūpaṃ devasya śaṃkaram ||
avyayasyāprameyasya bhānoramitatejasaḥ ||1.160.1 0||
niśamya vacanaṃ vīra śaṃkarasya mahātmanaḥ ||
ūcatustau mahātmānau kaviṣṇū devasattamau ||11||
na tatpaśyāvahe rūpaṃ yattatparamamadbhutam ||
ārādhayitumevāpi hyāgatau teṃtikaṃ ca tam ||12||
tasmādārādhayāmo hi ekībhūya vibhāvasum||
gatvodayagiriṃ puṇyaṃ parvataṃ kanakojjvalam||13||
śrutvā tu vacanaṃ vīra kaṃjajācyutayorharaḥ||
tathetyāha mahābāho harṣādutphullalocanaḥ|| ||14||
atha te rājaśārdūla vivigogatayo nṛpa ||
jagmustaṃ parvataśreṣṭhamudayācalamāśu vai ||15||
tamāsādya nagaṃ puṇyaṃ śṛṃgaistribhiralaṃkṛtam ||
nānā dhātupinaddhāṅgaṃ nānādhātuvibhūṣitam || 16 ||
ārādhanāya vidhivadyatnaṃ cakrurvibhāvasoḥ ||
stuvantaste samarcaṃto dhyāyaṃtaśca vibhāvasum || 17 ||
divyavarṣasahasrāṃte tapaṃtaḥ saṃsthitā nage ||
padmāsanagato brahmā dhyāyamāno divākaram ||18||
sthāṇuvatsaṃsthito bhūmāvūrdhvabāhustrilocanaḥ ||
paṃcāgniṃ bhajamānastu sthito viṣṇuravākchirāḥ || 19 ||
evaṃ varṣasahasrāṃte tapaścakruḥ sudāruṇam ||
ārādhayaṃto vidhivadgopatiṃ putramālinam || 1.160.20 ||
atha brahmeśaviṣṇūnāṃ kurvatāṃ tapa uttamam ||
tutoṣa bhagavānbhānuruvāca ca mahīpate || 21 ||
brahmañchaṃbho hare brūta mattaḥ kimabhivāṃchatha ||
tuṣṭohaṃ bhavatāṃ dātu mihāyāto varaṃ svayam || 22 ||
|| sumaṃturuvāca || ||
niśamya vacanaṃ bhānoḥ śāṃtaṃ hṛdyaṃ manoramam ||
praṇamya śirasā keśā idaṃ vacamabruvan|| || 23 ||
kṛtakṛtyā vayaṃ sarve prasādāttava gopate ||
tvāmārādhya purā deva tvattaḥ prāpya varaṃ śubham || 24 ||
utpattisthitināśānāṃ vayaṃ sarve divākara ||
saṃbhūyeha samarthā vai tvatprasādānna saṃśayaḥ || 25 ||
kiṃ tvekaṃ devadeveśa varamicchāmahe vibho ||
yatte paramakaṃ rūpaṃ durlabhaṃ durdṛśaṃ tathā || 26 ||
tasmādasmājjagannātha rūpaṃ darśaya te.acyutam ||
sarvadevamayaṃ yatte yattvayoktaṃ purānagha ||27||
teṣāṃ tadvacanaṃ śrutvā brahmaviṣṇvīśabhāṣitam||
darśayāmāsa tadrūpamadbhutaṃ lokapūjitam || 28 ||
anekavaktraśirasamanekādbhutadarśanam ||
sarvadevamayaṃ divyaṃ sarvalokamayaṃ tathā || 29 ||
bhūḥ pādau dyauḥ śiraścāpi tatrāgnī locane mate ||
pādāṃgulyaḥ piśācāśca hastāṃgulyaśca guhyakāḥ || 1.160.30 ||
viśve devāḥ smṛtāstasya jaṃghāsaṃghāḥ surottamāḥ ||
yakṣāḥ kukṣiṣu saṃlīnāḥ keśāścāpsarasāṃ gaṇāḥ ||31||
dṛṣṭidhṛṣṭyaśca vipulāḥ keśā vīrāṃśavaḥ smṛtāḥ ||
tārakā romarūpāṇi romāṇi ca maharṣayaḥ ||32||
bāhavo vidiśastasya diśaḥ śrotre narādhipa||
aśvinau śravaṇe cāsya nāsā vāyurmahābalaḥ ||33||
prasādaśca kṣamā caiva mano dharmastathaiva ca ||
satyamasyābhavadvāṇī jihvā devī sarasvatī || 34 ||
grīvāditirmahādevī tālū rudraśca vīryavān ||
dvāraṃ svargasya nābhirvai mitrastvaṣṭā picaṃḍakaḥ || 35 ||
mukhaṃ vaiśvānaraścāsya vṛṣaṇau ca bhagastadā ||
hṛdayaṃ bhagavānbrahmā hyudaraṃ kaśyapo muniḥ || 36 ||
pṛṣṭhe.asya vasavo devā marutaḥ sarvasaṃdhiṣu ||
sarvacchaṃdāṃsi daśanā jyotīṃṣi vimalā prabhā || 37 ||
prāṇo rudro mahādevaḥ kukṣau cāsya mahārṇavāḥ ||
udare cāsya gaṃdharvā bhujagāśca mahābalāḥ || 38 ||
lakṣmīrmedhā dhṛtiḥ kāṃtiḥ sarvā vidyāśca vai kaṭau ||
lalāṭamasya paramaṃ vayaḥsthānaṃ parātmanaḥ || 39 ||
sarvajyotīṃṣi jānīhi tapaścakraśca deva rāṭ||
tadetadādidevasya tanau hyāhurmahātmanaḥ || 1.160.40 ||
stanau kukṣau ca vedāśca teṣṭau cāsya makhāḥ smṛtāḥ ||
yaṣṭavyapaśubaṃdhāśca dvijānāṃ veṣṭi tāni ca || 41 ||
sarvadevamayaṃ dṛṣṭvā rūpamarkasya te nṛpa ||
brahmā haro harirdevāḥ paraṃ vismayamāgatāḥ || 42 ||
praṇamya śirasā devaṃ vepamānā dharāṃ gatāḥ ||
bhayagadgadayā vācā idaṃ vacanamabruvan|| 43 ||
samīkṣya rūpaṃ te deva bhīmaṃ jvālāsamākulam ||
anekamukhabāhūrucaraṇaṃ cakitā vayam||44||
digjñānaṃ hṛtamasmākaṃ tatprasīda jagatpate ||
