upasaṃhara viśvātmandraṣṭuṃ śaktā na te vayam || 45 ||
iti teṣāṃ vacaḥ śrutvā devadevo divākaraḥ ||
prasanno bhagavānāha vacastānprahasannidam || 46 ||
|| āditya uvāca || ||
yadetatparamaṃ puṇyamadbhutaṃ lokabhāvanam||
dṛṣṭaṃ bhavadbhirdeveṃdrā mama sarvajaganmayam || 47 ||
etanmayā prasannena yuṣmākaṃ śreyase.anaghāḥ ||
darśitaṃ pūjiteneha yogināṃ yanmahālayam || 48 ||
|| brahmeśācyutā ucuḥ || ||
evametanna saṃdeho yathāttha tvaṃ divaspate ||
yogināmapi deveśa darśanaṃ hyasya durlabham || 49 ||
tvāmārādhya jagannāthaṃ nāprāpyamiha vidyate ||
tasmātpūjyatamo loke nānyo deveṣu vidyate || 1.160.50 ||
evamuktvā.aditeḥ putro jagāmādarśanaṃ raviḥ ||
brahmādayopi te harṣaṃ prāpurdevasya darśanāt || 51 ||
evaṃ brahmādayo devāḥ pūjayitvā divākaram ||
gatāste paramāṃ siddhiṃ gaṃdharvā ṛṣayastathā || 52 || ||
iti śrībhaviṣye mahāpurāṇe brāhme parvaṇi saptamīkalpe sauradharmeṣu brahmādīnāṃ sūryarūpadarśanavarṇanaṃ nāma ṣaṣṭyuttaraśatatamo.adhyāyaḥ || 160 || || cha ||
sūryapūjāphalapraśnavarṇanam
|| śatānīka uvāca || ||
evametadyathāttha tvaṃ bhāskaro daivataṃ param ||
nāstyādityasamo devo nāstyādityasamā gatiḥ || 1 ||
ādityamūlamakhilaṃ trailokyaṃ nātra saṃśayaḥ ||
bhavatyasmājjagatsarvaṃ sadevāsuramānuṣam || 2 ||
rudreṃdropeṃdrakeṃdrāṇāṃ vipreṃdra tridivaukasām ||
dyutirdyutimatāṃ kṛtsnā tejo yatsārvalaukikam|| 3 ||
sarvātmā sarvalokeśo mahādevaḥ prajāpatiḥ ||
sūrya eva trilokasya mūlaṃ paramadaivatam || 4 ||
tataḥ saṃjāyate sarvaṃ tatraiva pravilīyate ||
bhāvābhāvau hi lokanāmādityānniḥsṛtau purā || 5 ||
jagajjyeṣṭho graho vipra pradīptaḥ prabhavo raviḥ ||
tatra gacchaṃti nidhanaṃ jāyaṃte ca punaḥ punaḥ || 6 ||
kṣaṇā muhūrtā divasā rātripakṣāśca kṛtsnaśaḥ ||
māsāḥ saṃvatsarāścaiva ṛtavaśca yugāni ca || 7 ||
sa eṣa kālaścāgniśca dvādaśātmā prajāpatiḥ ||
prabhāsayati vipreṃdra trailokyaṃ sacarācaram || 8 ||
tasmādasya dvijaśreṣṭha pūjane yatphalaṃ bhavet ||
tanme brūhi prayatnena prasādapravaṇo bhava || 9 || ||
iti śrībhaviṣye mahāpurāṇe saptamīkalpe brāhme parvaṇi sauradharme sūryapūjāphalapraśnavarṇanaṃ nāmaikaṣaṣṭyutaraśatatamo.adhyāyaḥ ||161|| || cha ||
sauradharmavarṇanam
|| sumaṃturuvāca || ||
bhānuṃ pratiṣṭhāpya naraḥ sarvadevamayaṃ vibhum ||
prāpnotyamaratāṃ vīra tejasā ravisannibhaḥ || 1 ||
yo bhānuṃ dveṣṭi saṃmohātsarvadevanama skṛtam ||
naro narakagāmī syāttasyasaṃbhāṣaṇādapi || 2 ||
bhānumiṣṭaṃ pratiṣṭhāpya sarvayatnairvidhānataḥ ||
yatpuṇyaphalamāpnoti tadekāgramanāḥ śṛṇu || || 3 ||
sarvayajñatapodānatīrthadeveṣu yatphalam ||
tatphalaṃ koṭiguṇitaṃ sthāpya bhānuṃ labhennaraḥ || 4 ||
yo bhānuṃ sthāpayedbhaktyā vidhipūrvaṃ narādhipa ||
sarvāṃgamuditaṃ puṇyaṃ labhetkoṭiguṇaṃ naraḥ || 5 ||
mātṛjānpitṛjāṃścaiva yatra codvahate striyam ||
kulatrayaṃ samuddhṛtya śakraloke mahīyate ||6||
bhuktvā vipulānbhogānpralaye samupasthite ||
jñānayogaṃ samāsādya tatraiva pravimucyate || 7 ||
atha vā rājyamākāṃkṣejjāyate saṃbhavāṃtare ||
saptadvīmasamudrāyāḥ kṣiteradhipatirbhavet || 8 ||
yatkṛtvā pārthivaṃ byomni arcayetsarvadevakam ||
samūlamakhilaṃ tena trailokyaṃ pūjitaṃ bhavet || 9 ||
ihaiva dhanavāñcchrīmā nsoṃte.arkatvamavāpnuyāt ||
trisaṃdhyaṃ kīrtayedvyoma kṛtvā biṃbena pārthivam || 1.162.10 ||
śataikādaśakaṃ yāvattasya puṇyaphalaṃ śṛṇu ||
anena saha dehena bhānuḥ saṃtiṣṭhate kṣitau || 11 ||
pāpahā sarvamartyānāṃ darśanātsparśanādapi ||
uddhārayecca saṃsthāpya kulānāmekaviṃśatim || 12 ||
gīrvāṇaiḥ sahito nityaṃ modate divi sūravat ||
yo.api piṣṭamayaṃ vyoma sarvagaṃdhopaśobhitam || 13 ||
kusumaiḥ susugaṃdhaiśca phalaiśca vividhairnṛpa ||
bhakṣyalehyarasaiścaiva kṛtadīpairalaṃkṛtaiḥ || 14 ||
nānārasamāyuktaṃ nānāgaṃdhasamanvitam ||
tasya dakṣiṇapārśve tu vinyasedaguruṃ budhaḥ || 15 ||
dadyādvai paścime bhāge śrīkhaṃḍaṃ caṃdanaṃ śubham ||
uttare caṃdanaṃ dadyādraktaṃ dadyācca pūrvataḥ || 16 ||
evaṃ vittānusāreṇa kṛtvā vibhavavistaram ||
kṛṣṇapakṣe tu saptamyāṃ bhāska rasya nivedayet || 17 ||
sakṛdeva tu yaḥ kuryādvyoma bharatasattama ||
yatphalaṃ hi bhavettasya tanme nigadataḥ śṛṇu || 18 ||
sarvapāpavinirmuktaḥ sarvaduḥkhavivarjitaḥ ||
niṣkalaḥ sarvago bhūtvā praviśetparamavyayam ||
tejasā ravisaṃkāśaḥ prabhayārkasamaprabhaḥ || 19 ||
pāṃsunā krīḍamāno yaḥ kuryādvyoma hyakāryataḥ ||
sa rājanbhavate rājā parvateṣu samaṃtataḥ || 1.162.20 ||
sarveṣāmeva pātrāṇāṃ paraṃ pātraṃ vibhāvasuḥ||
etatsaṃtārayedyasmādatīva narakārṇavāt || 21 ||
tasya pātrasya māhātmyaṃ dhruvamakṣayamādiśet ||
tasmāttasmai sadā deyamaprameyaphalārthibhiḥ || 22 ||
ravau dattaṃ hutaṃ japtaṃ baliṃ pūjāṃ nivedayet ||
anaṃtaphalamādiṣṭaṃ brahmādisurasattamaiḥ || 23 ||
bhaktyā vittānusāreṇa yaḥ kuryādālayaṃ raveḥ ||
sogneyaṃ yānamāruhya modate saha bhānunā || 24 ||
mahāvibhavasāropi yaḥ kuryādbhaktivarjitam||
alpe mahati vā tulyaṃ phalamāḍhyadaridrayoḥ || 25 ||
vittaśāṭhyena yaḥ kuryādvittavānapi mānavaḥ ||
na sa phalamavāpnoti pralobhākrāṃtamānasaḥ || 26 ||
tasmāttribhāgaṃ vittasya jīvanāya prakalpayet ||
bhāgadvayaṃ ca dharmārthe anityaṃ jīvanaṃ yataḥ || 27 ||
bhaktyā pracoditaṃ kuryādalpavitto.api yo naraḥ ||
mahāvibhavasāro.api na kuryādbhaktivarjitaḥ || 28 ||
sarvasvamapi yo dadyādarke bhaktivivarjitaḥ ||
na tena dharmabhāgī syādbhaktirevātra kāraṇam || 29 ||
na tapobhirvibhorugrairna ca sarvairmahāmakhaiḥ ||
gacchedekaṃ puraṃ divyamarke bhaktiyuto nṛpa || 1.162.30 ||
ruciraṃ śubhaśailotthaṃ kuryāyastu ravergṛham ||
trisaptakulasaṃyuktaḥ sūryalokamavāpnuyāt || 31 ||
yanmayā koṭiguṇitaṃ kṛtaṃ syādiṣṭakāmyayā ||
dviparārdhaguṇaṃ puṇyaṃ śailaje.api vidurbudhāḥ || 32 ||
mṛcchailena samaṃ jñeyaṃ puṇyamāḍhyadaridrayoḥ ||
yatra tatra gataḥ kuryādbhaktyā puṇyaṃ bhagālayam || 33 ||
śailotthamiṣṭakābhirvā dṛḍhaṃ dārumayaṃ śubham||
sa gacchetparamaṃ sthānaṃ bhānoramitatejasaḥ ||
gairikaṃ yānamāruhya yaḥ kuryāddhṛtabhūṣaṇaḥ || 34 ||
krīḍamāno.api yaḥ kuryādbālabhāve.arkamaṃdiram||
so.arkalokamavāpnoti vimānavaramāsthitaḥ || 35 ||
puṣpamālākulaṃ divyaṃ dhūpagaṃdhādivāsitam ||
apsarogaṇasaṃkīrṇaṃ sarvakāmamukhapradam || 36 ||
tatra rūḍho mahārāja vatsaraṃ vṛndamuttamam ||
uṣitvā bhāskarapure pūjyamānastu daivataiḥ || 37 ||
kramādāgatya loke.asminrājā bhavati dhārmikaḥ ||
dharmārthakāmasaṃpanno yaśasā ca narādhipa ||38||
paśyanpariharañjaṃtūnmārjanyā mṛdusūkṣmayā ||
śanaiḥ saṃmārjanaṃ kuryāccāṃdrāyaṇaphalaṃ bhavet ||39||
putrārthaṃ dehajīrṇāyā vandhyāyāśca viśeṣataḥ ||
rogārtānāṃ ca bhūtānāmārogyārthaṃ prapūjayet || 1.162.40 ||
gṛhītvā gomayaṃ svacchaṃ sthāne ca patitaṃ śubhe ||
uparyupari saṃtyajya pratyagraṃ jantuvarjitam || 41 ||
vastrapūtagomayena yaḥ kuryādupalepanam ||
paśyettu sukhitāñjaṃtūṃścāṃdrāyaṇaśataṃ labhet || 42 ||
yaḥ kuryātsarvakāryāṇi vastrapūtena vāriṇā ||
sa muniḥ sa mahāsādhuḥ sa gacchetparamāṃ gatim || 43 ||
kṣaraṃti sarvadānāni yajñahomabalikriyāḥ ||
akṣaraṃ tu mahādānaṃ sukhadaṃ sarvadehinām || 44 ||
nairaṃtaryeṇa yaḥ kuryātpakṣaṃ saṃmārjanārcanam ||
varṣamekaṃ śataṃ divyaṃ suraloke mahīyate || 45 ||
tasyāṃte ca caturveda surūpaḥ priyadarśanaḥ ||
ādyaḥ sarvaguṇopeto rājā bhavati dhārmikaḥ || 46 ||
saṃparkeṇāpi yaḥ kuryānnaraḥ karma bhagālaye ||
sopi saumanasaṃ gatvā puraṃ krīḍati nityaśaḥ ||47||
tāvadbhramaṃti saṃsāre duḥkhaśokapariplutāḥ ||
na bhajaṃti raviṃ bhaktyā yāvatsarve.api dehinaḥ || 48 ||
samāsaktaṃ tathā cittaṃ jantorviṣayagocare ||
yadyarko na bhavaddevaḥ ko muñcedeva bandhanāt || 49 ||
yaḥ kuryātkuṭṭimāṃ bhūmiṃ darpaṇodarasannibhām ||
nānāvarṇavicitrāṃ ca vicitra kusumojjvalām|| 1.162.50 ||
kvacitkalaśavinyastāṃ paṃkajairupaśobhitām||
ramyāṃ manoramāṃ saumyāmarkāyatanasaṃsadi || 51 ||
yāvaddaṃḍā bhavedbhūmiḥ samaṃtācca suśobhanā ||
tāvadyugasahasrāṇi sūraloke mahīyate || 52 ||
kārayeccitraśāstrajñaiścitrakarmārkamaṃdire ||
vicitraṃ yānamāruhya citrabhānorgṛhaṃ vrajet||53||
yāvatsa devarūpāṇi graharūpāṇi lekhayet ||
tāvadyugasahasrāṇi svargaloke mahīyate || 54 ||
bhavedbhūmiḥ samaṃtācca yaḥ kuryādarkamaṃdi ram ||
ārāmāvasathādīnāṃ labhedāmūlyakaṃ phalam || 55 || ||
iti śrībhaviṣye mahāpurāṇe brāhme parvaṇi saptamīkalpe sauradharmavarṇanaṃnāma dviṣaṣṭyu ttaraśatatamo.adhyāyaḥ || 162 ||7|||
sauradharmeṣu puṣpapūjāvarṇanam
|| sumanturuvāca || ||
bhāskarasya mahābāho bhānoramitatejasaḥ ||
snānakāle prakurvīta jayaśabdādimaṃga lam || 1 ||
padmasvastikaśaṃkhaṃ tu śrīvatsaṃ dvijasattama ||
hemarūpādipātreṣu kalpitaṃ gomayādibhiḥ || 2 ||
nānāvarṇakasaṃyuktairakṣataistilataṃdulaiḥ ||
svacchaiśca dadhisaṃmiśrairyathāśobhaṃ prapūritaiḥ || 3 ||
dravyapīṭhapradīpāśca bhūtāśvatthādipallavaiḥ ||
auṣadhībhiśca medhyābhiḥ sarvabījairyavādibhiḥ || || 4 ||
saptamyādiṣu sarveṣu ṣaṣṭhyādiṣu viśeṣataḥ ||
śaṃkhabheryādibhiḥ kuryādvādyaghoṣaṃ suśobhanam || 5 ||
trisandhyaṃ vedanirghoṣaṃ kurvīta phalamuttamam ||
kuryānnīrājanaṃ caiva śaṃkhavāditramaṃgalaiḥ || 6 ||
yāvannīrājanaṃ kuryātparvāṇi vidhivadravau ||
tāvadyugasahasrāṇi sūraloke mahīyate || 7 ||
kapilāpañcagavyena kuśavāriyutena vai ||
snāpayenmantrapūtena brahmasnānaṃ hi tatsmṛtam || 8 ||
yastvekamapi sarvebde brahmasnānaṃ prayacchati ||
sa muktaḥ sarvapāpaistu sūryaloke mahīyate || 9 ||
kapilāpañcagavyena dadhikṣīrayutena ca ||
snānaṃ daśaguṇaṃ jñeyaṃ mahatpuṇyaṃ narādhipa || 1.163.10 ||
ṛbhavo vīramuddiśya dehaśuddhiṃ ca śāśvatīm ||
kapilāmāharennityaṃ munidevāgninirmitām || 11 ||
kāpilaṃ yaḥ pibecchūdro devakāryārthanirmitam ||
sa pacyate mahāghore suciraṃ narakārṇave || 12 ||
varṣakoṭisahasreṇa yatpāpaṃ samupārjitam ||
ghṛtābhyaṃgena sūryasya dahetsarvaṃ na saṃśayaḥ || 13 ||
kalpakoṭisahasraistu yatpāpaṃ samupārjitam ||
vajrasnānena tatsarvaṃ dahatyagniriveṃdhanam || 14 ||
saptamyāṃ ca kṛtasnāno yajetsūryaṃ sakṛnnaraḥ ||
kulānyuddhṛtya sapteha sūryaloke mahīyate ||
vasuhemādiyuktaṃ ca kṣīrasnānasya tatsamam || 15 ||
sakṛdāḍhakena payasā yo bhānuṃ snāpa yennaraḥ ||
rājatena vimānena so.arkaloke mahīyate || 16 ||
snāpya dadhnā sakṛdbhānuṃ sa triloke mahīyate ||
madhunā snapayitvā taṃ śukraloke mahī yate || 17 ||
uddhṛtya śālipiṣṭena vāyulokeṣu pūjyate ||
snānamikṣuraseneha yaḥ sūrye sakṛdācaret ||
sa gopatipuraṃ gacchetsarvakāmasamanvitaḥ || || 18 ||
phalodakena yo bhānuṃ sakṛtsnāpayate naraḥ ||
utsṛjya pāpakalilaṃ pitṛloke mahīyate || 19 ||
śrīkhaṃḍavāriṇā snāpya sakṛdbhānuṃ narā dhipa ||
caṃdrāṃśunirmalaḥ śrīmāṃścaredātreyamaṃdire || 1.163.20 ||
vastrapūtena toyena yadyarkaṃ snāpayetsakṛt ||
sa sarvakāmatṛptātmā rākādhipapuraṃ vrajet ||21||
āpo hiṣṭheti japyena gaṃgātoyena bhārata ||
gairikeṇa vimānena brahmaloke mahīyate || 22 ||
karpūrāgurutoyena yo.arkaṃ snāpayate sakṛt ||
snāpya bhānuṃ sakṛnmantraiḥ saptamyāṃ samupoṣitaḥ ||
sa kulānekaviṃśatimuttārya ravimāvrajet || 23 ||
pitṛnuddiśya yo bhānuṃ snāpayecchītavāriṇā ||
tṛptāḥ svarga vrajaṃtyāśu pitaro narakādapi || 24 ||
bhānuṃ śītāṃbunā snāpya dhāroṣṇapayasā saha ||
snāpya paścādvrateneśamagniloke mahīyate || 25 ||
etatsnānatrayaṃ kṛtvā pūjayitvā tu bhārata ||
aśvamedhasahasrasya phalaṃ prāpnoti mānavaḥ || 26 ||
mṛtkumbhāttāmrakumbhaistu snānaṃ śataguṇaṃ matam ||
raupyaiḥ pādottaraṃ puṇyaṃ darśanātsparśanaṃ param ||
sparśanādarcanaṃ śreṣṭhaṃ ghṛtasnānamataḥ param || 27 ||
ihāmutra kṛtaṃ pāpaṃ ghṛtasnānena naśyati ||
saptajanma kṛtaṃ pāpaṃ purāṇaśravaṇena tu ||28||
daśāparādhāṃstoyena kṣīreṇa tu śataṃ kṣamet ||
sahasraṃ kṣamate dadhnā ghṛtenāpyayutaṃ kṣamet ||29||
nairantaryeṇa yo māsaṃ ghṛtasnānaṃ samācaret ||
daśaikādaśa kulānīha nayetsūryasya maṃdiram || 1.163.30 ||
snānaṃ palaśataṃ jñeyamabhyaṃgaḥ pañcaviṃśatiḥ ||
palānāṃ dvisahasreṇa mahāsnānamati śrutiḥ||31||
ghṛtābhyaṃgaṃ ghṛtasnāna bhānoḥ kuryyāddvijottama||
yaśca godhūmacūrṇaistu kaṣāyairdarbhasaṃmitaiḥ||32 ||
daśadhenusahasrāṇi yaddattvā labhate phalam||
tatphalaṃ labhate sarvamarkasyodvartane kṛte||33||
arghyaṃ puṣpaphalopetaṃ yastvarkāya nivedayet||
sa pūjyaḥ sarvalokeṣu arkavanmodate divi||34||
gaṃdhatoyena saṃmiśramudakāddvādaśottaram ||
pañcagavyasamāyuktamarghyaṃ śataguṇaṃ nṛpa || 35 ||
yoṣṭāṃgagarbhamāpūrya bhānormūrdhni nivedayet ||
daśavarṣasahasrāṇi ramate cārkamaṃdire || 36 ||
āpaḥ kṣīraṃ kuśāgrāṇi ghṛtaṃ dadhi tathā madhu ||
raktāni karavīrāṇi tathā raktaṃ ca canda nam || 37 ||
aṣṭāṃga eṣa argho vai brahmaṇā parikīrtitaḥ ||
satataṃ prītijanano bhāskarasya narādhipa || 38 ||
dāturvaiṇavapātreṇa datte.arghye yatphalaṃ bhavet ||
tasmācchataguṇaṃ puṇyaṃ mṛtpātreṇa narādhipa || 39 ||
tāmrārghyapātradānena puṇyaṃ śataguṇaṃ matam ||
pālāśapadmapatrābhyāṃ tāmrapātre phalaṃ labhet || 1.163.40 ||
raupyapātreṇa vijñeyaṃ lakṣārghyaṃ nātra saṃśayaḥ ||
suvarṇapātravinyastamarghyaṃ koṭiguṇaṃ bhavet || 41 ||
evaṃ snānārghyanaivedyabalidhūpādiṣu kramāt ||
pātrāṃtaraviśeṣeṇa tatphalaṃ tūttarottaram || 42 ||
raupyapātrapradānena yatpuṇyaṃ vedapārage ||
tāmrapātrapradānena tasmācchataguṇaṃ ravau || || 43 ||
phalaṃ koṭisuvarṇasya yo dadyādvedapārage ||
sūryāya rūpyapātre tu bhavetpuṇyaṃ tato.adhikam ||44||
suvarṇapātraṃ yo dadyādbhāskarāya mahīpate ||
na śakyaṃ tasya tadvaktuṃ puṇyaṃ pātraviśeṣataḥ || 45 ||
tulyameva phalaṃ proktaṃ sarvamāḍhyadaridrayoḥ ||
tayorabhyadhikaṃ tasya yastvarke bhāvanādhikaḥ || || 46 ||
vibhave sati yo mohānna kuryādvidhivistaram ||
naiva tatphalamāpnoti pralobhākrāṃtamānasaḥ || 47 ||
tasmānmantraiḥ phalaistoyaiścandanādyaiśca yatnataḥ ||
tadanaṃtaphalaṃ jñeyaṃ bhaktirevātra kāraṇam || 48 ||
varṣakoṭiśataṃ divyaṃ sūryaloke mahīyate ||
gaṃdhānulepanaṃ puṇyaṃ dviguṇaṃ candanasya tu || || 49 ||
gaṃdhāccaturguṇaṃ jñeyaṃ puṣpamaṣṭaguṇaṃ nṛpa ||
kṛṣṇāguru viśeṣeṇa dviguṇaṃ phalamādiśeta ||
tasmācchataguṇaṃ puṇyaṃ kuṃkumasya vidhīyate || 1.163.50 |||
caṃdanāgurukarpūraiḥ ślakṣṇapiṣṭaiḥ sakuṃkumaiḥ ||
bhānuṃ paryāptamālipya kalpakoṭiṃ vaseddivi || 51 ||
sa dīvyetsuravṛndena puṇyagaṃdhaiḥ pralepitaḥ ||
daśavarṣasahasrāṇi vīra mitrapure vaset || 52 ||
bhaktyā nivedya arkāya tālavṛṃtaṃ narādhipa ||
daśavarṣasahasrāṇi vīralokaṃ mahīyate || 53 ||
māyūraṃ vyajanaṃ dattvā sūryāyātīva śobhanam ||
varṣakoṭiśataṃ pūrṇaṃ prabhaṃjanapure vaset || 54 ||
puṣpairaraṇyasaṃbhūtaiḥ patrairvā girisambhavaiḥ ||
aparyuṣitaniśchidraiḥ proṣitairjaṃtuvarjitaiḥ || 55 ||
ātmārāmabhavaiścaiva puṣpaiḥ saṃpūjayedravim ||
puṣpajātiviśeṣeṇa bhavetpuṇyaṃ tato.adhikam || 56 ||
tapaḥśīlaguṇopeta iti hāsavidi dvije ||
dattvā daśa suvarṇasya niṣkānyallabhate phalam || 57 ||
karavīrasya kusumamarkāya vinivedayet ||
labhate tatphalaṃ vīra yathāha bhagavānraviḥ ||
evaṃ puṣpaviśeṣeṇa phalaṃ tadadhikaṃ bhavet ||
jñeyaṃ puṇyaṃ rasajñena yathā syāttannibodha me || 58 ||
sadā puṣpasahasrebhyaḥ karavīraṃ viśiṣyate ||
bilvapatrasahasrebhyaḥ padmamekaṃ narādhipa|| 59 ||
padmapuṣpasahasrebhyo bakapuṣpaṃ viśiṣyate ||
bakapuṣpasahasrebhyo mudgaraṃ paramucyate||1.163.60||
kuśapuṣpasahasrebhyaḥ śamīpatraṃ viśiṣyate ||
śamīpuṣpasahasrebhyo nṛpa nīlotpalaṃ param ||
sarvāsāṃ puṣpajātīnāṃ pravaraṃ nīlamutpalam || 61 ||
raktotpalasahasreṇa nīlotpalaśatena ca ||
raktaiśca karavīraiśca yastu pūjayate ravim || 62 ||
kalpakoṭisahasrāṇi kalpakoṭiśatāni ca ||
vasedarkapure śrīmānsūryatulyaparākramaḥ || 63 ||
śeṣāṇāṃ puṣpajātīnāṃ yatphalaṃ parikīrtitam ||
tatphalasyānusāreṇa sūryaloke mahīyate || 64 ||
śamīpuṣpaṃ bṛhatyāśca kusumaṃ tulyamucyate ||
karavīrasamā jñeyā jātīvijayapāṭalāḥ|| 65 ||
śvetamaṃdārakusumaṃ sitapuṣpaṃ ca tatsamam ||
nalacaṃpakapunnāgamudgarāṇāṃ samāḥ smṛtāḥ || 66 ||
gaṃdhavaṃtyapavitrāṇi kusumāni vivarjayet ||
gaṃdhahīnamapi grāhyaṃ pavitraṃ yatkuśādikam || 67 ||
sāttvikaṃ taddhi kusumamapavitraṃ ca tāmasam ||
mudgarāṇi kadaṃbāni rātrau deyāni sūraye || 68 ||
divāśeṣāṇi puṣpāṇi tyajedupahatāni ca ||
mukulairmārcayedbhānumapakvaṃ na nivedayet || 69 ||
phalaṃ kvathitaviddhaṃ ca yatnātpakvamapi tyajet ||
alābhe bata puṣpāṇāṃ patrāṇyapi nivedayet || 1.163.70 ||
patrāṇāmapyalābhe tu phalānyapi nivedayet ||
phalānāmapyalābhena tṛṇagulmauṣadhīrapi || 71||
oṣadhīnāmabhāve tu bhaktyā bhavati pūjitaḥ ||
pratyekaṃ muktapuṣpeṇa daśasauvarṇikaṃ phalam || 72 ||
yaḥ sugandhairmuktapuṣpaiḥ samyagbhānuṃ prapūjayet ||
māghāsite.api sumanāḥ so.anaṃtaphalamaśnute || 73||
karavīrairmahārāja saṃyato bhānumarcayet ||
sarvapāpavinirmuktaḥ sūryaloke mahīyate || 74 ||
agastyakusumairbhaktyā yaḥ sakṛdbhānumarcayet||
gavāṃ prayutadānasya phalaṃ prāpya divaṃ vrajet || 75 ||
mallikotpalapadmaiśca jātīpunnāgacaṃpakaiḥ ||
aśokaśvetamaṃdārakarṇikārāṃdhukaistathā || 76 ||
karavīrārkakahlāraśamītagarakeśaraiḥ ||
agastibakapuṣpaistu śatapatrairnarādhipa || 77 ||
puṣpairetairyathālābhaṃ yo naraḥ pūjayedravim ||
sa tatphalamavāpnoti tadekāgramanāḥ śṛṇu || || 78 ||
sūryakoṭipratīkāśairvimānaiḥ sarvakāmibhiḥ ||
puṣpamālāparikṣiptairgītavāditranāditaiḥ || 79 ||
taṃtrīmadhuravādyaiśca svacchaṃdagamanairnṛpa ||
sūryakanyāsamākīrṇairdevānāṃ ca sudurlabhaiḥ || 1.163.80 ||
dodhūyamānaścamaraiḥ stūyamānaḥ surāsuraiḥ ||
gacchedarkapurīṃ divyāṃ tatra saṃpūjito bhavet || 81||
yaistaiśca vāpikusumairjalajaiḥ sthalajairnṛpa ||
saṃpūjya śraddhayā bhānumarkaloke mahīyate ||82 ||
sūryasyopari yaḥ kuryācchobhanaṃ puṣpamaṃḍalam||
śobhitaṃ puṣpasragdāmairāpīṭhāṃtaṃ pralaṃbitaiḥ || 83 || atyāścaryamahāyānairdivyapuṣpopaśobhitaḥ ||
sarveṣāmupariṣṭācca vasedarkapure sukhī || 84 ||
anekarāgavinyastaiḥ sugandhaiḥ kusumairgṛham ||
yaḥ kuryātparvakāle tu vicitrakusumojjvalam || 85 ||
sa puṣpakavimānena puṣpamālākulena tu ||
puṣpetarapuraṃ divyaṃ śrayate nātra saṃśayaḥ || 86 ||
akṣayaṃ modate kālamatiraskṛtaśāsanaḥ ||
saurādisarvalokeṣu yatreṣṭaṃ tatra yāti saḥ || 87 || ||
iti śrībhaviṣye mahāpurāṇe brāhme parvaṇi saptamīkalpe sauradharmeṣu puṣpapūjāvarṇanaṃ nāma triṣaṣṭyuttaraśatatamo.adhyāyaḥ || 163 || || cha ||
sūryaṣaṣṭhīvratavarṇanam
śatānīka uvāca || ||
punastvaṃ devadevasya bhāskarasya mahaujasaḥ ||
pūjane yatphalaṃ proktaṃ tanme brūhi dvijottama || 1
|| sumaṃturuvāca || ||
śṛṇu tvaṃ hi mahārāja sarvadaṃ lokapūjitam ||
brahmeśopeṃdradevānāṃ trayāṇāmapi bhārata || 2 ||
sukhāsīnaṃ surajyeṣṭhaṃ manovatyāṃ caturmukham||
praṇamya śirasā bhūmau viṣṇvīśau vākyamūcatuḥ || 3 ||
ya eṣa bhagavāndevaḥ sahasrakiraṇo raviḥ ||
asya yatpūjane puṇyaṃ prāpyate tadvadasva nau || 4 ||
|| brahmovāca || ||
sādhu sādhu jagannātha sādhu pṛṣṭo.asmi vāmiha ||
tasmācchṛṇutamekāgrau gadato nikhilaṃ mama || 5 ||
svayamutpādya puṣṇāṇi yaḥ sūryaṃ pūjayetsvayam ||
tāni sākṣātpragṛhṇāti tadbhaktyā satataṃ raviḥ || 6 ||
yastvārāmaṃ raveḥ kuryādāmrabilvādiśobhitam||
jātīvijayarājārkakaravīraiḥ sakuṃkumaiḥ ||7||
punnāganāgabakulairaśokatilacaṃpakaiḥ ||
agastikadalīkhaṃḍaistasya puṇyaphalaṃ śṛṇu || 8 ||
yāvaddhi patraṃ kusumaṃ bījaṃ sūtaphalāni ca ||
tāvadvarṣasahasrāṇi sūraloke mahīyate || 9 ||
saghṛtaṃ guggulaṃ dadyādrājanvā kaṃduruṃ tathā ||
caturvedigṛhe janma prāpnoti satataṃ sukhī || 1.164.10 ||
kṛṣṇāguruṃ ca karpūradhūpaṃ dadyāddivākare ||
nairaṃtaryeṇa yastasya rājanpuṇyaphalaṃ śṛṇu || 11 ||
kalpakoṭisahasrāṇi kalpakoṭiśatāni ca ||
bhuktvā sūryapure bhogāṃstasyāṃte kṣmādhipo bhavet || 12 ||
gugguluṃ ghṛtasaṃyuà¥ktaṃ yakṣo gṛhṇāti śabdakṛt ||
yakṣāhvayasya dānena tasya loke mahīyate || 13 ||
kṛṣṇāṃśau kṛṣṇa saptamyāṃ yaḥ sājyaṃ gugguluṃ dahet ||
sa cāsau sauramāsādya varṣāṇāṃ ca daśārbudam || 14 ||
devadāruṃ nameruṃ ca śrīvāsaṃ kuṃduruṃ tathā ||
śrīphalaṃ cājyasaṃyuktaṃ dagdhvāśrayamavāpnuyāt || 15 ||
evaṃ saugadhikaṃ rūpaṃ ṣaṭsahasraguṇottaram||
aguruṃ daśasāhasraṃ saghṛtaṃ dviguṇaṃ bhavet ||16||
anaṃtaphaladaṃ devaṃ sadā kuṃdurukāmukam||
dvisahasrapalānāṃ tu mahiṣākṣasya gugguloḥ ||17||
dagdhvārdhamavimiśrasya sūryatulyaḥ prajāyate ||
śodhayetpāpasaṃyuktaṃ puruṣaṃ nātra saṃśayaḥ || 18 ||
kṛṣṇāgurubhavaṃ dhūpaṃ tuṣāgniriva kāṃcanam ||
yoṃtaḥpuragṛhaṃ gandhaiḥ sugandhaiḥ pravilepayet || 19 ||
kapāṭadvārakuḍyāditiryagūrdhvaṃ savedikam ||
vāsayetpuṣpamālābhirdhūpaiścāpi sugaṃdhibhiḥ || 1.164.20 ||
tasya puṇyaṃ yathāvattu yuvayorvacmi kṛtsnaśaḥ ||
āpūrayandiśaḥ sarvā nānāgaṃdha samanvitaiḥ || 21 ||
kalpakoṭiśataṃ divyaṃ tejasā vahnisannibhaḥ ||
śakravatprajvalandevaḥ sūryaloke mahīyate || 22 ||
tasyāṃte dharmaśeṣeṇa trailokyā dhipatirbhavet||
śatāvṛtaṃ tu yaḥ kuryādevaṃ gandhairbhagālayam|| 23 ||
sa sarvaśarmasaṃyuktaḥ sūryatulyaparākramaḥ ||
sūryaloke vaseddevo yuvābhyāṃ saṃprapū jitaḥ || 24 ||
tadvacchuklaiśca saṃvītaṃ paṭṭasūtrairvinirmitam ||
dattvopavītaṃ sūryāya bhavedvedāṃgapāragaḥ || 25 ||
vāsāṃsi suvicitrāṇi sūraloke mahīyate ||
truṭimātraṃ tu yo dadyādūrṇāvastraṃ sapaṃkajam|| 26 ||
bhāskarasyottamāṃgeṣu tasya puṇyaṃ bravīmyaham ||
indrasyārdhāsane tiṣṭhedyāvadrindrāścaturdaśa || 27 ||
evaṃ vittānusāreṇa sarvaṃ jñeyaṃ samāsataḥ ||
sarveṣāṃ hemapātrāṇāṃ mukuṭānāṃ ca sarvaśaḥ || 28 ||
arkapatrapuṭaṃ cūrṇaṃ madhuparṇasamanvitam||
yo nivedayate.arkāya so.aśvamedhaphalaṃ labhet ||29||
śālitaṃḍulaprasthasya kuryādannaṃ susaṃskatam ||
sūryāya ca caruṃ dattvā saptamyāṃ tu viśeṣataḥ ||1.164.30||
saṃyāvaṃ kṛśaraṃ pūpaṃ pāyasaṃ yāvakaṃ tathā ||
dadhyodanarasālānnamodakānguḍapūpakān || 31 ||
yāvaṃtastaṇḍulāstasminnaivedye parisaṃkhyayā ||
tāvadvarṣa sahasrāṇi sūraloke mahīyate || 32||
guḍakhaṃḍakṛtānāṃ ca bhakṣyāṇāṃ vinivedane ||
ghṛtena plāvitānāṃ ca phalaṃ śataguṇaṃ labhet || 33 ||
rasāla khādyakādyānāṃ bhakṣyāṇāṃ phalamiṣyate ||
tadardhaṃ salilasyāpi vāsitasya nivedayet || 34 ||
yathākālopalabdhāni bhakṣyāṇi vividhāni ca ||
nivedyārkāya paramaṃ sthānaṃ prāpnoti pūjanāt || 35 ||
prajvālya ghṛtadīpaṃ tu bhāskarasyālaye śubham ||
āgneyaṃ yānamāruhya gacchetsaumanasaṃ puram|| 36 ||
yaḥ kuryātkārtike māsi śobhanāṃ dīpamālikām||
saptamyāmatha ṣaṣṭhyāṃ vāmāvāsyāyāmathāpi vā || 37 ||
bhāskarāyutasaṃkāśastejasā bhāsayandiśaḥ ||
divyābharaṇasaṃpannaḥ kulamuddhṛtya sarvaśaḥ || 38 ||
yāvatpradīpasaṃkhyānaṃ ghṛtenāpūrya bodhitam||
tāvadvarṣasahasrāṇi sūryaloke mahīyate || 39 ||
dīpavṛkṣamathodbodhya parvasvāyataneṣu vai ||
pūrvasmāddviguṇaṃ puṇyaṃ labhate nātra saṃśayaḥ || 1.164.40 ||
dīpavṛkṣaṃ samudbodhya bhāskarāyataneṣu bhoḥ ||
sarvalohamayaṃ vīra raviloke mahīyate || 41 ||
śirasā dhārayeddīpaṃ bhāskarasyāgrato niśi ||
lalāṭe caiva hastābhyāṃ samudyuktastatho rasi || 42 ||
bhāskarāyutasaṃkāśo vimānairarkasannibhaiḥ ||
kalpāyutaśataṃ caiva sūryaloke mahīyate || 43 ||
annadātā tu yo vīra vīraloke mahī yate ||
bhāskarasyāgrato dattvā darpaṇaṃ nirmalaṃ śubham || 44 ||
paryaṃke śobhitaṃ kṛtvā śvetamālyaiḥ sacandanaiḥ ||
vṛkārkanirmalaḥ śrīmāndivyābharaṇa rūpadhṛk ||
kalpāyutasahasrāṇi sūraloke mahīyate || 45 ||
kṛtvā pradakṣiṇaṃ bhaktyā śraddadhāno ravernaraḥ ||
aśvamedhasahasrasya sukhena labhate phalam|| || 46 ||
kṛtvā pradakṣiṇaṃ yastu namaskāraṃ prayojayet ||
rājasūyāśvamedhābhyāṃ sakalaṃ vindate phalam || 47 ||
namaskāraḥ smṛto yajñaḥ sarvayajñottamottamaḥ ||
namaskṛtvā sahasrāṃśumaśvamedhaphalaṃ labhet || 48 ||
praṇamya daṃḍavadbhūmau namaskāreṇa yo.arcayet ||
sa yāṃ gatimavāpnoti na tāṃ kratu śatairapi || 49 ||
sarvayajñopavāseṣu sarvatīrtheṣu yatphalam ||
abhijñāpyopahāreṇa pūjayā phalamaśnute || 1.164.50 ||
śvetaṃ mahādhvajaṃ kṛtvā kṛtvā cāpaṃ ca raṃgakam ||
kiṃkiṇījālanirghoṣaṃ mayūracchatrabhūṣitam ||
yastvaryamṇe naro dadyācchraddhayā parayānvitaḥ || 51 ||
sa śatena vimānānāṃ sarvadeva namaskṛtaḥ ||
manvantaraśataṃ deva modate divi devavat || 52 ||
dhvajamālākulaṃ kuryādyaḥ prāṃteṣu bhagālayam||
mahādhvajāṣṭakaṃ cāpi digvidikṣu nivedayet || 53 ||
sa vimānasahasreṇa dhvajamālākulena tu ||
kalpāyutaśataṃ divyaṃ modete divi sūravat || 54 ||
śatacandrāṃśuvimalaṃ muktādāmopaśobhitam ||
maṇidaṃḍamayaṃ chatraṃ dadyādvā kāṃcanādikam || 55 ||
sa dhāryamāṇacchatreṇa hemadaṃḍopaśobhinā ||
modate sūryaloke tu vimānavaramā sthitaḥ || 56 ||
tatastasmāccyuto lokānnisargādbhuvamāgataḥ ||
bhuṅkte samudraparyaṃtāmekacchatrāṃ vasundharām || 57 ||
yaḥ śṛṃkhalāsamāyuktāṃ mahāghaṇṭāṃ mahāsvanām ||
kāṃsyalohamayīṃ vāpi nibadhnīyādbhagālaye || 58 ||
śobhanaḥ syānnaraḥ śrīmānbhagasyātīva vallabhaḥ ||
sūryatulyabalo bhūtvā sūryaloke mahīyate || 59 ||
bherīmṛdaṃgapaṭahajharjharīmardalādikam ||
daśakāṃsyādivāditraṃ yo bhagāya nivedayet || 1.164.60 ||
sa vimānairmahābhāgervaṃśavīṇāyutasvanaiḥ ||
yugāntakaśataṃ divyaṃ bhagaloke mahīyate || 61 ||
susaṃgītakadānena savādyena viśeṣataḥ ||
yatheṣṭaṃ bhāskare loke modate kālamakṣayam || 62 ||
mahāmahāsvanaṃ dattvā śaṃkhayugmaṃ bhagālaye ||
yugakoṭiśataṃ divyaṃ bhagaloke mahīyate || 63 ||
vimānaṃ bahuvarṇābhaṃ madhye paṃkajabhūṣitam ||
vicitramekavarṇaṃ vāsanavastropakalpitam || 64 ||
kiṃkiṇījālasaṃpannaṃ varṇakaiścopaśobhitam ||
puṣpamālāprabhaṃ vāpi ghaṃṭācāmarabhūṣitam || 65 ||
bhagasyopari yo dadyātsarvaratnopaśobhitam ||
dukūlapaṭṭadevāṃgairvastrairvā varṇakānvitaiḥ || 66 ||
paṭṭādivastrataṃtūnāṃ parisaṃkhyā tu yā bhavet ||
tāvadyugasahasrāṇi sūraloke mahīyate || 67 ||
bhagāhutyā jagatsarvaṃ sṛṣṭidvāreṇa dhāryate ||
agnivartmā vacasyukto hyagnirasyātmajaḥ sadā || 68 ||
yastvagnikāryaṃ(ya?) vidhivatkuryānnityaṃ bhagālaye ||
bhagamuddiśya rājeṃdra sa yāti paramāṃ gatim || 69 ||
sarvānnaṃ yāvakopetaṃ yastu nityavidhiṃ haret ||
puṣpadhūpajalopetaṃ kālekāle viśeṣataḥ || 1.164.70 ||
mahāśvetādimātṛrṇāṃ trikalpānāṃ ca sarvaśaḥ ||
yaḥ kṛtvā sakṛdapyevaṃ sarvadikṣu baliṃ haret ||
sa naraśca sahasrāṇi śāṃḍileyapure vaset || 71 ||
saurasaṃdhyābaliṃ kṛtvā dināṃte satataṃ raveḥ ||
varṣāyutaśataṃ sāgraṃ bhagaloke mahīyate || 72 ||
dadhyodanapayobhiryaḥ pūritaṃ pātramāvṛtam ||
puṣpadhūpārcitaṃ caiva vitānopari śobhitam || 73 ||
śirasā dhārayetpātraṃ śanairgacchetpradakṣiṇam ||
ravyāyatanaparyaṃte śaṃkhavīṇādinisvanaiḥ || 74 ||
darpaṇairdhūpamālābhirgeyanṛtyādiśobhitam ||
bhānorhi smṛtiśīlaśca tasya puṇyaphalaṃ śṛṇu || 75 ||
divyaṃ varṣasahasraṃ tu divyaṃ varṣaśataṃ tathā ||
tapastaptaṃ mahattena bhavedevaṃ na saṃśayaḥ || 76 ||
bhagabhaktiprasannātmā yadyapi syātsa pāpakṛt ||
bhagaloke vasennityaṃ bhagānucaratāṃ gataḥ || 77 ||
kṛṣṇāṃ tu ṣaṣṭhīṃ naktena yaśca kṛṣṇāṃ ca saptamīm ||
iha bhogānavāpnoti paratra ca śubhāṃ gatim || 78 ||
yobdamekaṃ tu kurvīta naktaṃ bhagadine naraḥ ||
brahmacārī jitakrodho bhagārcanaparo naraḥ ||
ayācitātparaṃ naktaṃ tasmannāktena vartayet || 79||
devaistu bhuktaṃ madhyāhne pūrvāhṇe ṛṣibhistathā ||
aparāhṇe tu pitṛbhiḥ saṃdhyāyāṃ guhyakādibhiḥ || 1.164.80 ||
sarvā velā hyatikramya saurāṇāṃ bhojanaṃ param ||
bhuṃjāno naktakāle tu sūryabhaktiparāyaṇaḥ || 81 ||
bhagalokamavāpnoti sumanāḥ sumanovrataḥ ||
bhuktvā saumanasā~mllokānrā jā bhavati bhūtale ||82||
haviṣyabhojanaṃ snānamāhārasya ca lāghavam ||
agnikāryamadhaḥśayyāṃ naktabhojī samācaret|| 83 ||
kṛṣṇāṣṭamyāṃ prayatnena kṛtvā naktaṃ vidhānataḥ ||
naro mārgaśire māsi aṃśumāniti pūjayeta ||84||
vidhivatprāśya gomūtramanāhāro niśi svapet||
atirātrasya yajñasya phalamāpnoti mānavaḥ || 85 ||
puṣyepyevaṃ sahasrāṃśuṃ bhānumaṃtamuśaṃti ca ||
vājapeyaphalaṃ prāpya ghṛtaṃ prāśya labhennaraḥ || 86 ||
māghe divākaraṃ nāma kṛṣṇaṣaṣṭhyāṃ narottama ||
niśi pītvā tu gokṣīraṃ gomedhaphalamāpnuyāt || 87 ||
mārtaṃḍaṃ phālgune māsi pūjayitvā gavāṃ payaḥ ||
pibettataḥ sūryaloke modate so.ayutāyutam ||88||
caitre māsi vivasvaṃtaṃ pūjayitvā subhaktimān ||
haviṣyāśī sūryaloke.apsarobhiḥ saha modate||89||
vaiśākhe caṇḍakiraṇaṃ pūjayecca payovrataḥ||
varṣāṇāmayutaṃ sāgraṃ modate sūryasaṃnidhau||1.164.90||
jyeṣṭhe divaspatiṃ pūjya gavāṃ śṛṃgodakaṃ pibet||
gavāṃ koṭipradānasya nikhilaṃ phalamā pnuyāt ||91||
āṣāḍhe tvarkanāmānamiṣṭvā prāśya ca gomayam ||
prayātyarkasalokaṃ tu varṣāṇāṃ ca śataṃśatam||92||
śrāvaṇe.aryamanāmānaṃ pūjayitvā payaḥ pibet ||
varṣāṇāmayutaṃ sāgraṃ modate bhāskarālaye || 93 ||
māsi bhādrapade ṣaṣṭhyāṃ bhāskaraṃ nāma pūjayet ||
bhāskaraṃ paṃcagavyasya sarvamedhaphalaṃ labhet||94||
māsi cāśvayuje ṣaṣṭhyāṃ bhagākhyaṃ nāma pūjayet ||
palagomūtrabhukcaiva aśvamedhaphalaṃ labhet ||95||
māse tu kārtike ṣaṣṭhyāṃ śakrākhyaṃ nāma pūjayet ||
dūrvāṃkuraṃ sakṛtprāśya rājasūyaphalaṃ labhet||96||
varṣāṃte bhojayedviprānsūryabhaktiparāyaṇān||
pāyasaṃ madhusaṃyuktaṃ vajreṇa ca pariplutam||97||
śaktyā hiraṇyavāsāṃsi bhaktyā tebhyo nivedayet ||
nivedayecca sūryāya kṛṣṇāṃ gāṃ ca payasvinīm || 98 ||
varṣamekaṃ ca deve vai nairaṃtaryeṇa yo nayet ||
kṛṣṇaṣaṣṭhīvrataṃ bhaktyā tasya puṇyaphalaṃ śṛṇu ||99||
sarvapāpavinirmuktaḥ sarvakāmasamanvitaḥ ||
modate sūryaloke tu sa naraḥ śāśvatīḥ samāḥ||1.164.100||
puṇyeṣvahaḥsu sarveṣu viṣuvadgrahaṇādiṣu ||
dānopavāsahomādyairakṣayaṃ khaga jāyate ||101||
|| sumaṃturuvāca || ||
ityuktavānpurā bhānuraruṇāya viśāṃpate||
kṛṣṇaṣaṣṭhīvrataṃ puṇyaṃ sarvapāpabhayāpaham || 102 ||
kṛtvedaṃ puruṣo bhaktyā bhāskarasya mahātmanaḥ ||
prayāti paramaṃ sthānaṃ bhānoramitatejasaḥ ||103||
iti śrībhaviṣye mahāpurāṇe brāhmeparvaṇi saptamīkalpe sūryaṣaṣṭhīvratavarṇanaṃ nāma catuḥṣaṣṭyuttaraśatatamodhyāyaḥ||164||||
ubhayasaptamīvarṇanam
|| sumaṃturuvāca || ||
ahaṃ te saṃpravakṣyāmi sūryasyavrattamuttamam||
dharmakāmārthamokṣāṇāṃ pratipādanamuttamam||1||
pauṣamāse tu saṃprāpte yaḥ kuryānnaktabhojanam||
jiteṃdriyaḥ satyavādī śāligodhūmagorasaiḥ ||2||
pakṣayoḥ saptamīṃ yatnādupavāsena yāpayet ||
trisaṃdhyamarcayedbhānuṃ śāṃḍileyaṃ ca suvrata||3||
adhaḥśāyī bhavennityaṃ sarvabhogaviva rjitaḥ ||
māsi pūrṇe tu saptamyāṃ ghṛtādibhirariṃdama || 4 ||
kṛtvā snānaṃ mahāpūjāṃ sūryadevasya bhāsta||
naivedyaṃ modakaprasthaṃ kṣīraṃ siddhaṃ nivedayet ||5||
bhojayecca dvijānaṣṭau bhagārcā śubhalakṣaṇām ||
gāṃ ca dattvā mahārāja kapilāṃ bhāskarāya tu ||6||
ya evaṃ kurute puṇyaṃ sūryasya vratamuttamam||
tasya puṇya phalaṃ vacmi sarvakāmasamanvitam||7||
sūryakoṭipratīkāśairvimānaiḥ sārvakāmikaiḥ ||
apsarogaṇasaṃkīrṇairmahāvibhavasaṃyutaiḥ ||8||
saṃgītanṛtyavādyādyairgaṃdharvagaṇaśobhitaiḥ ||
dodhūyamānaścamaraiḥ stūyamānaḥ surāsuraiḥ ||9||
sahasrakiraṇābhāsaḥ sauraiḥ sūryasamanvitaiḥ ||
sa yāti paramaṃ sthānaṃ yatrāste raviraṃśumān||1.165.10||
romasaṃkhyā tu yā tasyāstatprasūtiḥ kuleṣu ca ||
tāvadyugasahasrāṇi sūraloke mahīyate ||11||
triḥsaptakulajaiḥ sārdhaṃ bhogānbhuktvā yathepsitān ||
jñānayogaṃ samāsādya punareva pramucyate || 12 ||
yogādduḥkhāṃtamāpnoti jñānayogaṃ pravartate ||
sauradharmādbhavejjñānaṃ sauradharmo bhagārcanāt|| || 13 ||
ityevaṃ te samākhyātaṃ bhavārṇavavyapohanam||
sauramokṣakramopāyaṃ sūrāśrayaniṣevaṇam || 14 ||
māghamāse tu saṃprāpte yaḥ kuryānnaktabhojanam ||
piṇyākaṃ ghṛtasaṃyuktaṃ bhuṃjānaḥ sa jitendriyaḥ || 15 ||
sopavāsaśca saptamyāṃ bhavedubhayapakṣayoḥ ||
ghṛtābhiṣekamaṣṭamyāṃ kuryādbhānornarādhipa ||
gāṃ ca dayāddineśāya taruṇīṃ nīlasaṃnibhām|| 16 ||
indranīlapratīkāśairvimānaiḥ śikhisaṃyutaiḥ ||
gatvādityapuraṃ ramyaṃ bhogānbhuṃkte yathepsitān || 17 ||
rājeṃdra phālgune māsi yaḥ kuryānnaktabhojanam ||
śyāmākakṣīranīvārairjitakrodho jitendriyaḥ || 18 ||
ṣaṣṭhyāṃ vāpyatha saptamyāmupavāsaparo naraḥ ||
aṣṭamyāṃ tu mahāsnānaṃ pañcagavyaghṛtādibhiḥ ||19||
valmīkajādimṛdbhiśca gomūtraśakṛdādibhiḥ||
tvagbhiśca kṣīravṛkṣāṇāṃ snāpayitvā pramārjayet ||1.165.20||
saurabheyīṃ tato dadyādraktābhāṃ raktamāline ||
padmarāgapratīkāśairvimānairhastisaṃyutaiḥ ||
gatvādityapuraṃ ramyaṃ modate śāśvatīḥ samāḥ || 21 ||
māsi caitre tu saṃprāpte yaḥ kuryānnaktabhojanam ||
śālyannaṃ pāyasairyuktaṃ bhuñjānaśca jitendriyaḥ ||
bhānave pāṭalāṃ dadyādvaiṣṇavīṃ taruṇīṃ nṛpa || 22 ||
puṣparāga prabhairyānairnānāhaṃsādiyāyibhiḥ ||
gacchetsūryapuraṃ ramyaṃ modate śāśvatīḥ samāḥ ||23||
vaiśākhe vīramāse tu yaḥ kuryānnaktabhojanam ||
sūrye khaṃḍājya saṃmiśraṃ sakṛddadyānnivedanam || 24 ||
gāṃ ca dadyānmahārāja bhāskarāya śubhānana ||
sāmānyaṃ ca vidhiṃ kuryātprayukto yo mayā tava || 25 || śuddhasphaṭikasaṃkāśairyānairbarhiṇavāhanaiḥ ||
aṇimādiguṇairyuktaḥ sūryavadvicareddivi || 26 ||
saṃprāpte śrāvaṇe māsi yaḥ kuryānnaktabhojanam ||
kṣīraṣaṣṭikabhaktena sarvasattvahite rataḥ || 27 ||
pītavarṇāṃ ca gāṃ dadyādbhāskarāya mahātmane ||
sāmānyamakhilaṃ kuryādvidhānaṃ yatprakīrtitam ||28||
sa vicitrairmahāyānairhaṃsasārasagāmibhiḥ ||
gatvādityapuraṃ śrīmānpūrvoktaṃ labhate phalam || 29 ||
vīra bhādrapade māsi yaḥ kuryānnaktabhojanam ||
hutaśeṣahaviṣyāśī vṛkṣamūlamupāśritaḥ || 1.165.30 ||
svapyādāyatane rātrau sarvabhūtānukampakaḥ ||
dadyādgāṃ rohiṇīṃ śreṣṭhāṃ bhāskarāya mahātmane || 31 ||
niśākarakaraprakhyairvajravaidūryasannibhaiḥ ||
cakravākasamāyuktairvimānaiḥ sārvakāmikaiḥ || 32 ||
gatvādityapuraṃ ramyaṃ surāsurasuvanditam||
modate sa mahābhāgo yāvadā bhūtasaṃplavam || 33 ||
śrīmānāśvayuje māsi yaḥ kuryānnaktabhojanam ||
mitāśanaṃ prabhuñjāno jitakrodho jitendriyaḥ || 34 ||
dadyādgāṃ padmavarṇābhāṃ ,bhānave.amitatejase ||
divyābharaṇasaṃpannāṃ taruṇīṃ ca payasvinīm ||35|| svastimauktikasaṃkāśairiṃdranīlopaśobhitaiḥ ||
jīvo jīvakasaṃyuktavimānaiḥ sārvakāmikaiḥ ||
gacchedbhānusalokatvaṃ bhuñjānaḥ sa jitendriyaḥ || 36 ||
divākarāya gāṃ dadyājvalanārkasamaprabhām ||
pūrvoktaṃ ca vidhiṃ kuryātsūrya tulyo bhavennaraḥ || 37 || kālānalaśikhaprakhyairmahāyānairnagopamaiḥ ||
mahāsiṃhakṛtāropaiḥ sūryavanmodate sukhī || 38 ||
mārgaśīrṣe śubhe māsi yaḥ kuryānnaktabhojanam ||
yaccānnaṃ payasā yuktaṃ bhuñjānaḥ sa jitendriyaḥ ||39||
prayacchedgāṃ tathā raktāṃ nānālaṃkārabhūṣitām ||
sūryāya kuruśārdūla vidhiṃ cāpi samācaret || 1.165.40 ||
sitapadmanibhairyānaiḥ śvetāśvarathasaṃyutaiḥ ||
gatvā tatra pure ramye prabhayā parayānvitaḥ || 41 ||
ahiṃsāsatyavacanamasteyaṃ kṣāṃtirārjavam ||
triṣavaṇāgnihavanaṃ bhūśayyā naktabhojanam || 42 ||
pakṣayorubhayormārge saptamyāṃ kurunaṃdana ||
etānguṇānsamāśritya kurvāṇo vratamutta mam || 43 ||
saptamyobhayavikhyātaṃ sarvapāpabhayāpaham ||
sarvarogapraśamanaṃ sarvakāmaphalapradam ||44||
ityevamādīnniyamāṃścaretsūryavratī sadā||
ya icchedvipulaṃ sthānaṃ bhānoramitatejasaḥ ||45|| ||
iti śrībhaviṣye mahāpurāṇe brāhme parvaṇi saptamīkalpa ubhayasaptamīvarṇanaṃ nāma paṃcaṣaṣṭyuttaraśatatamo.adhyāyaḥ || 165 || cha
sauradharme nikṣubhāvratavarṇanam
||sumaṃturuvāca ||
sūryabhaktā tu yā nārī dhruvaṃ sā puruṣo bhavet||
strī putramuttamaṃ sā cetkāṃkṣate śṛṇu tadvratam|| 1 ||
nikṣubhārkākhyamākhyātaṃ sadā prītivivardhanam ||
aviyogakaraṃ vīra dharmakāmārthasādhakam || 2 ||
saptamyāmatha ṣaṣṭhyāṃ vā saṃkrāṃtau ca raverdine ||
haviṣā havirhomaṃ tu sopavāsaḥ samācaret || 3 ||
nikṣubhāṃ kāṃsyaniṣpannāṃ kṛtvā svarṇamayīṃ śubhām ||
rājatīṃ vātha vā varṣaṃ snāpayecca ghṛtādibhiḥ ||4||
gaṃdhamālyairalaṃkṛtya vastrayu gmaiśca śobhanaiḥ ||
bhakṣyabhojyairaśeṣaiśca vitānadhvajacāmaraiḥ || 5 ||
bhojayetsūryabhaktāṃśca śuklavastrāvaguṇṭhitān ||
kṛtvāyatanamadhye tu pratimāmupakalpayet || 6 ||
kṛtvā śirasi tatpātraṃ vitānacchatraśobhitam ||
dhvajaśaṃkhādivibhavairbhagasyāyatanaṃ nayet || 7 ||
nikṣubhārkadineśasya vratametannivedayet ||
tatpiṃḍyāṃ sthāpayetpātramupaśobhāsamanvitam || 8 ||
pradakṣiṇīkṛtya raviṃ praṇipatya kṣamāpayet ||
samāpya tadvrataṃ puṇyaṃ śṛṇuyātpha lamaśnute || 9 || dvādaśādityasaṃkāśairmahāyānairnagopamaiḥ ||
yatheṣṭaṃ bhānave loke sauraiḥ sārdhaṃ pramodate || 1.166.10 ||
varṣakoṭisahasrāṇi varṣakoṭiśatāni ca ||
naṃdate.asau mahābhāga viṣṇuloke mahīyate || 11 ||
tataḥ karmaviśeṣeṇa sarvakāmasamanvitam ||
brahmalokaṃ samāsādya paraṃ sukhamavāpnuyāt|| 12 ||
brahmalokātparibhraṣṭaḥ śrīmāntsurasupūjitaḥ ||
prajāpatimavāpnoti surāsuranamaskṛtaḥ || 13 ||
lokāniha ciraṃ bhuktvā somaloke mahīyate ||
somādeṃdraṃ punarlokamāsādyeṃdrapatirbhavet || 14 ||
iṃdralokācca gaṃdharvalokaṃ prāpya sa modate ||
tatastaddharmaśeṣeṇa bhavatyādityabhāvitaḥ || 15 ||
svakarmabhāvanodyogātpunaḥ prārabhate śubham ||
śubhācca punaretyeha sa yātyatisahasraśaḥ || 16 ||
yāvannāpnoti maraṇaṃ tāvadbhramati karmaṇā ||
sunirvedātsavairāgyaṃ vairāgyājjñānasaṃbhavaḥ || 17 ||
jñānātpravartate yogo yogādduḥkhāṃtamāpnuyāt || 18 ||
iti śrībhaviṣye mahāpurāṇe brāhme parvaṇi saptamīkalpe sauradharme nikṣubhāvratavarṇanaṃ nāma ṣaṭṣaṣṭyuttaraśatatamo.adhyāyaḥ || 166 || cha ||
nikṣubhārkavratavarṇanam
|| sumaṃturuvāca || ||
ṣaṣṭhyāṃ cāpyatha saptamyāṃ niyatā brahmacāriṇī ||
varṣamekaṃ na bhuṃkte yā mahābhāgajigīṣayā || 1 ||
varṣāṃti pratimāṃ kṛtvā nikṣubhāṃketi viśrutām |!
snānādyaṃ ca vidhiṃ kṛtvā pūrvoktaṃ labhate guṇam||2||
jāṃbūnadamayairyānaiścaturdvārairalaṃkṛte ||
gatvādityapure ramye aśeṣaṃ viṃdate phalam || 3 ||
saurādisarvalokeṣu bhogānbhuktvā yathepsitān ||
kramādāgatya loke.asminrājānaṃ patimāpnuyāt || 4 ||
yā nāryupavasedevaṃ kṛṣṇāmekāṃ tu saptamīm ||
sā gacchetparamaṃ sthānaṃ bhānoramitatejasaḥ || 5 ||
varṣāṃte pratimāṃ kṛtvā śālipiṣṭamayīṃ śubhām ||
pītānulepanairmālyaiḥ pītavastraiśca pūjayet ||
pūrvoktamakhilaṃ kṛtvā bhāskarāya nivedayet || 6 ||
saptabhīmairmahāyānairdaṃticāmīkaraprabhaiḥ ||
varṣakoṭiśataṃ sāgraṃ sūryaloke mahīyate || 7 ||
sauralokādilokeṣu bhuktvā bhogānnarādhipa ||
kramādāgatya loke.asminya theṣṭaṃ viṃdate patim ||
sarvalakṣaṇasaṃpannaṃ dhanadhānyasamanvitam || 8 ||
kṛṣṇapakṣe tu saptamyāṃ yā nārī tu dṛḍhavratā ||
|| 9 || varṣāṃte sarvagaṃdhāḍhyaṃ nikṣubhārkaṃ nivedayet ||
suvarṇamaṇimuktābhyāṃ bhojayitvā magāṃganām ||1.167.10|| suvicitrairmahāyānairdivyagaṃdharvaśobhitaiḥ||
sā vai yugasahasrāṇi sūraloke narādhipa ||11||
yatheṣṭaṃ bhānave loke bhogānbhuktvā tu kṛtsnaśaḥ ||
kramādāgatya lokesminrājantaṃ viṃdate patim ||12||
evaṃ yā kurute rājanvrataṃ pāpabhayāpaham ||
nikṣubhārkamidaṃ puṇyaṃ sā yāti paramaṃ padam || 13 ||
varṣamekaṃ mahābāho śraddhayā parayānvitaḥ ||
varṣāṃte vai bhojayedvīra dāṃpatyaṃ bhojakeṣu vai ||14||
bhojayitvā tu dāṃpatyaṃ bhogakānāṃ mahābalaiḥ ||
pūjayedgaṃdhamālyaistu vāsobhiḥ kurunaṃdana || 15 ||
kṛtvā tāmramaye pātre vajrapūrṇairalaṃkṛtam ||
nikṣubhārkaṃ tu sauvarṇaṃ dattvā tābhyāṃ tu śaktitaḥ || 16 ||
nikṣubhā bhojikā jñeyā bhojako.arkaḥ prakīrtitaḥ ||
tasmāttau pūjayetsaurīśvaravacchraddhayānvitaḥ || 17 ||
iti śrībhaviṣye mahāpurāṇe brāhme parvaṇi saptamīkalpe sauradharmeṣu nikṣubhārkavrataṃ nāma saptaṣaṣṭyuttaraśatatamo.adhyāyaḥ || 167
kāmapradastrīvratavarṇanam
|| sumaṃturuvāca || ||
ekabhaktena yā nārī kārttikaṃ kṣapayennṛpa ||
kṣamāhiṃsādiniyamaiḥ saṃyatā brahmacāriṇī ||1||
guḍājyamiśraṃ śālyannaṃ bhāskarāya nivedayet ||
pakṣayorubhayostāta śradayā parayānvitā || 2 ||
puṣpāṇāṃ karavīrāṇāṃ guggulaṃ sājyamādiśet ||
saptamyāṃ tāta ṣaṣṭhyāṃ vai upavāsaratirbhavet || 3 ||
iṃdranīlapratīkāśairvimānaiḥ sārvakāmikaiḥ ||
varṣāyutaśataṃ sāgraṃ sūraloke mahīyate || 4 ||
tathā ca sarvalokeṣu bhogamāsādya yatnataḥ ||
kramādāgatya loke.asminyatheṣṭaṃ viṃdate patim || 5 ||
ityevaṃ sarvayajñeṣu vidhistulyaḥ prakīrtitaḥ ||
ekabhaktopavāsasya phalaṃ ca sadṛśaṃ bhavet || 6 ||
kṣamā satyaṃ dayā dānaṃ śaucamiṃdriyanigrahaḥ ||
sūryapūjāgnihavanaṃ saṃtoṣaḥ steyavarjanam||7||
sarvavrateṣvayaṃ dharmaḥ sāmānyo daśadhā smṛtaḥ ||
niḥśeṣamahaṃ vakṣyāmi māsānmāsavrataṃ prati || 8 ||
mārgaśīrṣe śubhe māsi vyomapṛṣṭhe vinirmitam ||
gaṃdhamālyairalaṃkṛtya śubhānanamanaupamam|| 9 ||
tāmrapātrādikaiścaivāpyapsarogaṇasevitaiḥ ||
sumerau daśasāhasre sūryaloke mahīyate || 1.168.10 ||
sarvadevakadaṃbeṣu saṃprāpya vimalāṃ śriyam ||
kramādāgatya loke.asminrājānaṃ patimāpnuyāt ||
puṣpairamumalaṃkṛtya bhānave vinivedayet || 11 ||
gaṃdhamālyairalaṃkṛtya śubhānanamanaupa mam ||
tāmrapātrādikāṃsyaṃ vā kṛtvā tatra nivedayet || 12 ||
mahāpuṣpakayānena divyagaṃdhapravāhinā ||
sumerau daśasāhasraṃ sūryaloke mahīyate ||13||
bhuktvā tu vipulānbhogānsarvalokeṣu bhārata ||
saṃprāpyaitaṃ kramāllokaṃ yatheṣṭaṃ vidate patim||14||
māghe rathamaśvayujaṃ dīpamālyavibhūṣitam||
piṣṭasānusamā yuktaṃ kṛtvāyatanamānayet||15||
mahārathopamairyānaiḥ śvetāśvavarasaṃyutaiḥ ||
varṣāyutaśataṃ sāgraṃ sūryaloke mahīyate||16||
sarvāmarāṇāṃ lokeṣu prāpya bhogānyathepsitān||
kramādāgatya loke.asminyatheṣṭaṃ patimāpnuyāt ||17||
pratimāṃ phālgune māsi kṛtvā piṣṭamayī raveḥ ||
gaṃdhamālyairalaṃkṛtya sthāpayedbhāskarā laye||18||
yānairapratimairdivyairgītanādasamākulaiḥ||
sumerau daśasāhasraṃ sūryaloke mahīyate ||19||
sarvābhimataloke.asminprāpya bhogānyathepsitān||
punaretya imaṃ lokaṃ yatheṣṭaṃ viṃdate patim ||1.168.20||
kṛtvāruṇaṃ tathā caitre gaṃdhamālyopaśobhitam ||
sthāpya pātre yathokte tu bhāskarāya nivedayet ||21||
śaradiṃdupratīkāśairvimānaiḥ sārvakāmikaiḥ ||
varṣāyutaśataṃ sāgraṃ sūryaloke mahīyate || 22||
karmakṣayādihāgatya putrapautrasamanvitam ||
abhīṣṭaṃ patimāsādya labhedbhogāntsudurlabhān || 23 ||
taṃḍulāḍhakapiṣṭena kṛtvā vai meruparvatam ||
nikṣubhārkasamāyuktaṃ sarvadhātuvibhūṣitam || 24
nānālaṃkārasaṃpannaṃ nānāmālyavibhūṣitam ||
sarvaratnasamāyuktaṃ sthāpayedbhāskarālaye || 25 ||
mahadvyomavrataṃ hyetadvaiśākhe yaḥ samācaret ||
nānāvidhaiśca yānaistu sūryaloke mahīyate || 26 ||
saurādisarvalokeṣu bhuktvā bhogānaśeṣataḥ ||
kramādāgatya loke.asminrājānaṃ patimāpnuyāt || 27 ||
dvitīyaṃ ca tathā padmamāṣāḍhe piṣṭamuttamam ||
sarvabījarasaiḥ pūrṇaṃ kṛtvā tu śubhralakṣaṇam ||
nānākeśaragaṃdhāḍhayaṃ sarvaratnavibhūṣitam || 28 ||
etairvā haimabhiryānaiḥ sarvabhogānvitairnṛpa ||
varṣakoṭiśataṃ sāgraṃ sūryaloke mahīyate ||29||
bhuktvā tu vipulānbhogānsarvalokeṣvanukramāt ||
prāptā tu sarvabhogāḍhayaṃ taruṇaṃ viṃdate patim || 1.168.30 ||
sarvadhātusamākīrṇaṃ vicitradhvajaśobhitam ||
nivedayeta sūryāya śrāvaṇe tilaparvatam || 31 ||
svacchaṃdagāmibhiryānairnānā varṇavibhūṣitaiḥ ||
varṣakoṭiśataṃ sāgraṃ sūryaloke mahīyate || 32 ||
saṃprāpya vividhānbhogānbahvāścaryasamanvitān ||
kramāllokamimaṃ prāpya rājānaṃ viṃdate patim || 33 ||
kṛtvā bhādrapade māsi vyoma śālimayaṃ nṛpa ||
vitānadhvajacchatrāḍhyaṃ nānāmālāvibhūṣitam || 34 ||
taruṇārkakaraprakhyairmahā yānaiḥ suśobhanai ||
varṣakoṭisahasrāṇi sūryaloke mahīyate || 35 ||
saṃprāpya vividhānbhogāntsarvānnimiṣasaṃbhavān ||
kramādāgatya loke.asminrājānaṃ viṃdate patim || 36 ||
kṛtvā cāśvayuje māsi vipulaṃ dhānyaparvatam ||
suvarṇavastragaṃdhāḍhyaṃ bhāskarāya nivedayet || 37 ||
sāvitraiśca mahāyānairvarabhogasamanvitaiḥ ||
varṣakoṭisahasrāṇi sūryaloke mahīyate || 38 ||
sūryalokādilokeṣu bhuktvā bhogānyathepsitān ||
asmi~mlloke cā saṃprāptā rājānaṃ viṃdate patim ||
candrāgnibhāskarāṇāṃ tu kāṃtitejaḥprabhānvitam || 39 ||
yaṃyaṃ kāmaṃ samuddiśya naranārīnapuṃsakāḥ ||
pūjayaṃti raviṃ bhaktyā tatsarvaṃ prāpnuvaṃti hi || 1.168.40 || ||
iti śrībhaviṣye mahāpurāṇe brāhme parvaṇi saptamīkalpe sauradharmeṣu kāmapradastrīvratavarṇanaṃ nāmāṣṭa ṣaṣṭyuttaraśatatamo.adhyāyaḥ || 168 || cha ||
sūryavratavarṇanam
|| sumaṃturuvāca || ||
mṛnmayaṃ dārujaṃ śailaṃ pakveṣṭakamathāpi vā ||
kṛtvā maṭhaṃ gṛhaṃ vāpi yathā vibha vasaṃbhavāt || 1 ||
sarvopakaraṇopetaṃ sarvadhānyasamanvitam ||
sūryāyetthaṃ gṛhaṃ dadyātsarvānkāmānavāpnuyāt || 2 ||
kṛtvaikabhaktaṃ hemaṃte māghamāsamataṃ dritaḥ ||
māsāṃtena rathaṃ kuryāccitravastropaśobhitam || 3 ||
śvetaiścaturbhiḥ saṃyuktaṃ turagaiḥ samalaṃkṛtam ||
śvetadhvajapatākābhiśchatracāmaradarpaṇaiḥ || || 4 ||
taṃḍulāḍhakapiṣṭena kṛtvā bhānuṃ narādhipa ||
vinyasya taṃ rathopasthe saṃjñayā saha bhūpate || 5 ||
taṃ rātrau rājamārgeṇa śaṃkhabheryādinisvanaiḥ ||
bhramayitvā śanaiḥ paścātsūryāyatanamāviśet || 6 ||
tatra jāgarapūjābhiḥ pradīpāvaliśobhitaiḥ ||
prekṣaṇīyaiḥ pradānaiśca kṣapayitvā śanaiḥ kṣapām ||7 ||
prabhāte snapanaṃ kṛtvā madhukṣīraghṛtena ca ||
dīnāṃdhakṛpaṇebhyo.annaṃ yathāśaktyā ca dakṣiṇām || 8 ||
rathaṃ saṃvāhanopetaṃ bhāskarāya nivedayet||
bhuktvā ca bāṃdhavaiḥ sārdhaṃ praṇamyārkagṛhaṃ vrajet ||9||
sarvavratānāṃ pravaraṃ maṃtradharmānvitaḥ sadā ||
vrataṃ sūryavrataṃ nāmasarvakāmārthasiddhaye ||1.169.10||
sarvavrateṣu yatpuṇyaṃ sarvayajñeṣu yatphalam ||
sarvaṃ sūryaratheneha tatpuṇyaṃ labhate nṛpa || 11 ||
sūryāyutapratīkāśairvimānaiḥ sārvakāmikaiḥ ||
trisaptakulajaiḥ sārdhaṃ sūryaloke mahīyate || 12 ||
bhuktvā tu vipulānbhogānsarvalokeṣvanukramāt ||
kalpāyutaśataṃ sāgraṃ tato rājā bhavetkṣitau || 13 ||
paṃcabalisamāyuktaṃ mṛdu ṣaḍvāstukalpitam ||
sarvopakaraṇopetaṃ sūryaṃ saṃjñāṃ prakalpayet || 14 ||
saṃjñādevīsamāyuktaṃ paiṣṭāśāḍhyaṃ nivedayet||
saurajñānārthatattvajñamācāryamudayānvitam || 15 ||
saṃpūjya gaṃdhapuṣpādyairvastrālaṃkāracāmaraiḥ ||
bhakṣya bhojyairaśeṣaiśca tataḥ śayyāṃ nivedayet || 16 ||
tadūrṇātūlavastrāṇāṃ parisaṃkhyā tu yāvatī ||
tāvadvarṣasahasrāṇi sūryaloke mahīyate || 17 ||
surādisarvalokeṣu bhuktvā bhogānaśeṣataḥ ||
kāmādāgatya loke.asminrājā bhavati dhārmikaḥ || 18 ||
daśa gobhiḥ saha vṛṣaṃ tā vṛṣaikādaśāḥ smṛtāḥ ||
sūryāya vinivedyeha yatphalaṃ labhate śṛṇu || 19 ||
dvādaśādityatulyātmā aṇimādiguṇairyutaḥ ||
sarvatra modate rājansūryasyānucaro bhavet || 20 || ||
iti śrībhaviṣye mahāpurāṇe brāhme parvaṇi saptamīkalpe sūryavratavarṇanaṃ nāmaikonasaptatyuttaraśatatamo.adhyāyaḥ || 169 || || cha ||
godānavarṇanam
|| sumanturuvāca || ||
savṛṣaṃ gośataṃ dattvā bhāskarāya narādhipa ||
triḥsaptakulajaiḥ sārdhaṃ śṛṇu yatphalamāpnuyāt || 1 ||
varakoṭipratīkāśaiḥ sarvakāmasamanvitaiḥ ||
mahāyānairasaṃkhyeyairamarāsurapūjitaiḥ || 2 ||
dvādaśādityasaṃkāśo divākara ivāparaḥ ||
gatvādityapuraṃ ramyaṃ krīḍate sūryamaṃḍape || 3 ||
bhuktvā tu vipulānbhogānpralaye sarvadehinām ||
mohakaṃcukamutsṛjya viśatyādityamaṃḍale || 4 ||
sarvajñaḥ sūraparamaḥ śuddhaḥ svātmanyavasthitaḥ ||
sarvagaḥ paripūrṇatvātsūryavaddīptimānbhavet || 5||
yo dadyādubhayamukhīṃ saurabheyīṃ divākare ||
saptadvīpāṃ mahīṃ dattvā yatphalaṃ tadavāpnuyāt ||
pādadvayaṃ śiro.ardhaṃ ca saśailavanakānanā || 6 ||
iti śrībhaviṣye mahāpurāṇe brāhme parvaṇi saptamīkalpe godānavarṇanaṃ nāma saptatyuttaraśatatamo.adhyāyaḥ || 170 || cha ||
bhojakabhojanānuṣṭhānavarṇanam
|| śatānīka uvāca || ||
magānāṃ brūhi me dharmaṃ samāsavyāsayogataḥ ||
phalaṃ ca kiṃ bhavedbrahmanmagadharmaniṣevaṇāt || 1 ||
|| sumaṃturuvāca || ||
ya eṣa dharmaḥ sūryeti tavākhyāto mayānagha ||
magadharmaḥ sa evoktaḥ sarvapāpabhayāpahaḥ || 2 ||
sarveṣāmeva varṇānāṃ magadharmaniṣevaṇam||
magadharmaśca saṃprokta eteṣāṃ bhavamuktaye ||3||
brāhmaṇāḥ kṣatriyā vaiśyāḥ strī śūdro vā magāśramī ||
yaḥ pūjayati mārtaṃḍaṃ sa yāti paramāṃ gatim || 4 ||
trisaṃdhyamarcayedbhānumagnikāryaṃ ca śaktitaḥ ||
kuryānmago mahābāho mukhamāvṛtya yatnataḥ ||5||
trisaṃdhyamekakālaṃ vā pūjayecchaddhayā ravim ||
asaṃpūjya raviṃ mohānna bhuṃjīta kadācana || 6 ||
eṣa dharmaḥ paro jñeyaḥ śeṣo bhavati mānavaḥ ||
apūjayitvā bhuṃjāno viṣṭhāṃ bhuṅkte ca vai magaḥ || 7 ||
devaṃ samāśritaiḥ pūjā kartavyeyaṃ tribhiḥ sadā ||
manasā pūjayedyogī puṣpaiścāraṇyasaṃbhavaiḥ || 8 ||
devārthapuṣpahiṃsāyāṃ na bhavettasya hiṃsakaḥ ||
yadyalpamapi cātmārthaṃ nihanyāddhiṃsakastadā || 9 ||
magaścāgniparo nityaṃ tadbhakto.atithipūjakaḥ ||
magī maithunavarjyaḥ syācchrīmāngṛhamagāśramī || 1.171.10 ||
devāgnisvatithau bhaktaṃ pacate cātmakāraṇāt ||
ātmārthe yaḥ pacenmohātsa mago narakaṃ vrajet || 11 ||
devārthe pacanaṃ yeṣāṃ saṃtānārthaṃ tu maithunam ||
artho dānārthaṃ uddiṣṭo narakaṃ hi viparyayāt|| || 12 ||
jīvatṛtīyabhāgepi na prakurvīta vārcanam ||
vittārjane tadardhena yato nityaṃ hi jīvitam || 13 ||
nyāyopārjitavittaḥ syādanyāyaṃ pari varjayet ||
anyāyārjitavittaistu kurvannarakamāpnuyāt || 14 ||
vācorthe brahmacārī yaḥ sūryapūjāgnitatparaḥ ||
bhavejjiteṃdriyaḥ śāṃto naiṣṭhiko bhauti ko.api vā || 15 ||
sarvagaṃdhavinirmuktaḥ kaṃdamūlaphalāśanaḥ ||
mama vaikhānaso jñeyaḥ sūryapūjāgnitatparaḥ || 16 ||
nivṛttaḥ saṃgamebhyastu sūryadhyāna rataḥ sadā ||
jñeyaḥ saurayatīṃdrāya pūjāniṣṭho jiteṃdriyaḥ || 17 ||
muṃḍopanayano vyaṃgī śuklavāsaḥ samanvitaḥ ||
jñeyaṃ tadarcanasthānametatkāryaṃ prayatnataḥ || 18 ||
athāvyaṃgo mahārāja dhārayedyastu bhojakaḥ ||
agamyaṃ sarvasattvānāṃ sūryalokaṃ sa gacchati || 19 ||
dhvaṃsanaṃ sarvaduṣṭānāṃ sarvapāpa bhayāpaham ||
bhāvaśuddhena satatamarcanīyo divākaraḥ || 1.171.20 ||
gaṃdhalepavihīno.api bhāvaśuddho na duṣyati ||
bhāveṣu ca carecchaucaṃ vastrapūtaṃ jalaṃ pibet || 21 ||
dṛṣṭipūtaṃ nyasetpādaṃ satyapūtaṃ vaco vadet ||
sauradhyānaratāḥ śāṃtāḥ sauradharmaparāyaṇāḥ || 22 ||
sarva evāśramā jñeyā bhāskarāṃgasamudbhavāḥ ||
bhojakāṣṭavrataṃ dhāryaṃ raviṇoktamanaupamam ||23||
sarvavratānāṃ paramaṃ dharmālayamanuttamam ||
saurabhakte sadā kṣāṃtirahiṃsā sarvadā śamaḥ ||24||
saṃtoṣaḥ satyamasteyaṃ brahmacaryaṃ tathāṣṭamam ||
yathāsaṃbhavapūjābhiḥ karmaṇā manasā girā || 25 ||
saurabhaktiḥ sadā kāryā bhojakeṣu viśeṣataḥ ||
svadehānnirviśeṣaṃ hi bhojakānpālayedbudhaḥ || 26 ||
bhayadāridryarogebhyasteṣāṃ kuryātpriyāṇi vai ||
sūryasya paripūrṇasya kiṃ nāma kriyate naraiḥ || 27 ||
yatkṛtaṃ bhojakānāṃ vai tatkṛtaṃ syādravernṛpa ||
sudūramapi gaṃtavyaṃ magānāṃ yatra vai gaṇaḥ || 28 ||
sa ca prayatnāddraṣṭavyastatra saṃnihito raviḥ ||
bhojakasya tu bhaktasya sūryapūjāratasya ca || 29 ||
ājñāṃ kṛtvā yathānyāyamaśvamedhaphalaṃ labhet ||
devāśramagato bhaktyā devārcāṃ pūjayennṛpa || 1.171.30 ||
svāgatāsanapādyārghyamadhuparkādyanukramāt ||
bhojayitvā yathānyāyaṃ sūryaloke mahīyate ||31||
pratiśrayapradānena rājā bhavati bhārata ||
dattvā sthānaṃ tathā śaucaṃ vāruṇaṃ lokamāpnuyāt || 32 ||
śvetabiṃduparītāṃgaṃ dhyānaśramavikarśitam ||
saṃvījya tālavṛṃttena vāyuloke mahīyate || 33 ||
kṣutpipāsāturaṃ śrāṃtaṃ malinaṃ rogiṇaṃ tathā ||
pālayitvā yathā śaktyā sarvānkāmānavāpnuyāt || 34 || patitāśastasaṃkīrṇacaṃḍālādīnāṃ pakṣiṇām ||
kāruṇyātsarvabhūtānāṃ deyamannaṃ svaśaktitaḥ || 35 ||
atyalpamapi kāruṇyāddattaṃ bhavati cākṣayam ||
tasmātsarveṣu bhūteṣu devakāruṇyamucyate ||36||
abhāve tṛṇabhūmyannaṃ patraṃ dhanaphalāni ca ||
dattvā.a.agatāya praṇataḥ svargaṃ yāti priyeṇa vā ||37||
na hīdṛksvargayānāya yathā loke priyaṃ vacaḥ ||
ihāmutra sukhaṃ teṣāṃ vāgyeṣāṃ madhurā bhavet ||38||
amṛtasyaṃdinī vācaṃ caṃdanasparśaśītalām ||
dharmāvirodhinīmuktvā sukhamakṣayyamāpnuyāt || 39 ||
alaṃ dānena rājeṃdra pūjayādhyāpanena vā ||
idaṃ svargasya sopānamacalaṃ yatpriyaṃ vacaḥ || 1.171.40 ||
pūjābhibhāṣaṇaṃ dṛṣṭiḥ pratyekaṃ svargahetavaḥ ||
saṃpṛcchedā(pā)gataṃ bhaktyā kuśalaṃ praśnamādarāt || 41 ||
gamane tasya vaktavyaṃ paṃthānaḥ saṃtu te śivāḥ ||
sukhaṃ bhavatu te nityaṃ sarvakāryakaraṃ bhṛśam || 42 ||
āśīrvādamidaṃ vākyaṃ sarvakāleṣu sarvadā ||
namaskārādivākyeṣu svasti maṃgalavādane || 43 ||
śivaṃ bhavatu te nityaṃ taṃ brūyātsarvakarmasu ||
evamādi ca vācāramanuṣṭhāya sadāśramī || 44 ||
aśeṣapāpa nirmuktaḥ sūryaloke mahīyate ||
sūryabhakte tu yā bhaktiḥ sadbhaktaiḥ kriyate naraiḥ ||
sūrye bhaktisamā nityaṃ bhakte bhaktiranuṣṭhitā || 45 ||
ākruṣṭe tāḍite vāpi yo nākrośenna tāḍayet ||
vākyādadhikṛtaḥ svasthaḥ sa duḥkhātparimucyate || 46 ||
sarveṣāmeva tīrthānāṃ kṣāṃtiḥ paramapūjitā ||
tasmātpūrva prayatnena kṣāṃtiḥ kāryā kriyāsu vai || 47 ||
jñānayogatapo yasya yajñadānāni satkriyā ||
krodhanasya vṛthā yasmāttasmātkrodhaṃ vivarjayet || || 48 ||
marmāsthiprāṇahṛdayaṃ nirdahedapriyaṃvacaḥ ||
na vaco hyapriyaṃ tasmādbhojakeṣu viśeṣataḥ || 49 ||
kṣamā dānaṃ tviṣaḥ satyaṃ kṣamāhiṃsārkasaṃbhavāḥ ||
na śakyā vistarādvaktumapi varṣaśatairapi || 1.171.50 ||
iti śrībhaviṣye mahāpurāṇe brāhme parvaṇi saptamīkalpe sauradharme bhojakabhojanānu ṣṭhānavarṇanaṃ nāmaikasaptatyuttaraśatatamo.adhyāyaḥ || 171 || || cha|| ||
sauradharmavarṇanam
|| sumaṃturuvāca || ||
punaḥ śṛṇu mahārāja dharmamādityasaṃmatam ||
saurapriyaṃ sadā sauraṃ pavitraṃ pāpanāśanam || 1 ||
kvacidgacchanyadā paśyetsūryārcāsaṃprapūjanam ||
yatra pūjā tato gacchantsa sūryo nātra saṃśayaḥ ||2 ||
snānanaivedyavastraiśca nānālaṃkārabhūṣaṇaiḥ ||
yathāvibhavamāśritya namaskārādisaṃstavaiḥ || 3 ||
dṛṣṭvāyatanamākramya namaskṛtya raviṃ vrajet ||
kvacitpathi nadīṃ śailaṃ gacchamānaṃ ca bhojakam || 4 ||
upaśrutyāvaniṃ gatvā bhojakaṃ pūjayedbudhaḥ ||
rathāśvagajayānebhyo hyavatīrya magānnṛpa ||
magānāṃ bhojanaṃ bhaktyā śaktyā dānaṃ prakalpayet || 5 ||
daśapūrvāndaśa parānātmanā saha bhārata ||
samādāya vrajetsthānaṃ raveramitatejasaḥ || 6 ||
daivaparvotsave śrāddhe puṇyeṣu divaseṣu ca ||
bhānuṃ saṃpūjya vidhivadbhojakānbhojayettataḥ || 7 ||
pitaraḥ sarvadevānāṃ sūryamāśritya saṃsthitāḥ ||
prīte sūrye tu te sarve prītāḥ syurnātra saṃśayaḥ || 8 ||
yadā ca śraddhayā yuktaṃ prasaktaṃ ravipūjanam ||
bhojayedbhojakaṃ bhaktyā śrāddheṣu vidhivannṛpa || 9 ||
bhojakasya mahārāja divasenāpi yatphalam ||
na tacchakyamidaṃ tena prāptuṃ varṣaśatairapi || 1.172.10 ||
yaḥ paśyati prasannātmā yo na dveṣṭi na kāṃkṣati ||
śabdādīnāṃ tu saṃbhogaṃ sa vijñeyo jiteṃdriyaḥ || 11 ||
jñānavijñānasampannaḥ sūryabhaktyā samanvitaḥ ||
pāṣaṃḍayogamuktaśca sa vai bhojaka ucyate|| 12 ||
sūryadharmādbhavejjñānaṃ jñānādvairāgyasaṃbhavaḥ ||
jñānavairāgyayuktasya sūryayogaḥ pravartate || 13 ||
sūryayogācca sarvajñaḥ paripūrṇaḥ sunirvṛtaḥ ||
ātmanyavasthitaḥ śuddhaḥ sūryavaddi vi modate ||14||
sarveṣāmeva bhūtānāmuttamaḥ puruṣaḥ smṛtaḥ ||
puruṣebhyo dvijaḥ śreṣṭho dvijebhyo graṃthapāragaḥ || 15 ||
granthibhyo vedavidvāṃsastebhyasta ttvārthaciṃtakāḥ ||
arthavidbhyaśca jñānārthapratibuddho viśiṣyate || 16 ||
jñānārthakoṭikoṭibhyo variṣṭhā yogino matāḥ ||
yogināṃ koṭikoṭibhyo bhojakaścottamo bhavet || 17 ||
yogajñā yoganiṣṭhāśca pitaro yogasaṃbhavāḥ ||
bhojite bhojake sarve prītāḥ syuste na saṃśayaḥ || 18 ||
sarvajñānatapodānaiḥ kṛtairdattaiśca yatphalam ||
tatphalaṃ labhate sarvaṃ vidhivadbhojyabhojakam || 19 ||
yaśca dravyakalāpātmā dakṣiṇā havirṛtvijaḥ ||
ṛgyajuḥsāma yogaiśca devayajñaḥ prakīrtitaḥ ||1.172.20||
brahmacaryaṃ tapo maunaṃ kṣāṃtirāhāralāghavam ||
ityetattapasāṃ rūpaṃ sudhīraṃ paṃcalakṣaṇam ||21||
yacca diṣṭaṃ viśiṣṭaṃ ca nyāyaprāptaṃ ca yadbhaveta||
tattadguṇavate deyamityetaddānalakṣaṇam||22||
vivardhanīṃ sahasrāṇāṃ sarvasasyaprarohiṇīm||
dadyādbhūmiṃ jalopetāṃ bhūmidānaṃ taducyate ||23||
ekacchatrāṃ mahīṃ kṛtvā dvijebhyaḥ pratipādayet ||
saṃpūrṇāṃ parvatāraṇyairbhūmidānaṃ taducyate||24||
kanyāmalaṃkṛtāṃ dadyādadhanāya narādhipā|
dvijāya vedaviduṣe kanyādānaṃ taducyate ||25||
sarvadoṣavinirmuktāṃ kulayogyāmalaṃkṛtām ||
madhyamottamavastrāṇāṃ yo dadyādahatāni ca ||26||
etatsamāsato jñeyaṃ vastradānasya lakṣaṇam||
brahmaviṣṇusamādhikyakāṃtiśīlaparāyaṇaḥ||
ahorātraṃ na bhuñjīta hyupavāsasya lakṣaṇam ||27||
catvāriṃśatsamāyuktaṃ piṃḍānāṃ hi śatadvayam ||
māse hyadyāyathākāmamidaṃ cādrāyaṇaṃ smṛtam||28||
ṛṣibhiḥ sarvaśāstrajñaistaponiṣṭhairjiteṃdriyaiḥ ||
devaiśca sevitaṃ toyaṃ kṣitau tattīrthamu cyate || 29 ||
sūryāvāṃtarasthānāni puṇyakṣetrāṇi nirdiśet||
mṛtānāṃ teṣu sūryatvaṃ saurakṣetreṣu dehinām || 1.172.30 ||
dānānyāvasathaṃ kuryādudyānaṃ deva tāgṛham || āvasatha
tīrtheṣvetāni yaḥ kuryātso.akṣayaṃ labhate phalam || 31 ||
kṣāntiḥ spṛhā tathā satyaṃ dānaṃ śīlaṃ tapaḥ śrutam||
etadaṣṭāṃgamuddiṣṭaṃ paraṃ pātrasya lakṣaṇam || 32 ||
yajñopavāsadānāni tapastīrtharphalāni ca ||
saṃpūrṇaṃ labhate bhaktyā bhojayitvā tu bhojakān || 33 ||
sūre bhaktiḥ kṣamā satyaṃ daśeṃdriyavinigrahaḥ ||
sukhiteṣu ca maitrī ca sūryadharmasya lakṣaṇam || 34 ||
sūryabhaktaṃ dvijaṃ bhaktyā yaḥ śrāddheṣu ca bhojayet ||
kulasaptakamuddhṛtya sūryaloke mahīyate || 35 ||
bahunātra kimuktena sūryabhaktaṃ tu bhojayet ||
sūryabhaktena yadbhuktaṃ bhānunāmāśrayaṃ nṛpa || 36 ||
na vedaviduṣāṃ koṭyā labhyate ceha tatphalam ||
tatphalaṃ labhate rājanbhojaṃ bhājya vidhānataḥ || 37 ||
tasmācchrāddhe viśeṣeṇa puṇyeṣu divaseṣu ca ||
sūryamuddiśya vipreṃdra bhojaṃ saṃbhojayennṛpa || 38 ||
asaṃyataḥ saṃyato vā sarvāvasthāṃ gatopi vā ||
yaścāsau ravibhaktaḥ syātsūryavatpūjya eva hi || 39 ||
saṃsargādvāpi vā lobhādbhojakaṃ yastu bhojayet ||
so.api yāṃ gatimāpnoti na tāṃ yajñaśatairapi || 1.172.40 ||
tasmānmānyaśca pūjyaśca rakṣaṇīyaśca sarvadā ||
bhojakaḥ kuruśārdūla saureṇa gatimicchatā || 41 ||
nāmamātraprayatno.api yadi syādbhojako raveḥ ||
sūryavatsa hi draṣṭavyaḥ pūjanīyaśca bhārata || 42 ||
gṛhe śrāddhasya yatpuṇyamaraṇye tacchatādhikam ||
saurāśrameṣu vijñeyaṃ tatpuṇyamayutādhikam || 43 ||
dattvā tu bhojake saumyaṃ hyāsanaṃ saparicchadam ||
dhātudaṃtamayaṃ cāpi rājā bhavati bhūtale || 44 ||
vimale vāsasī dattvā bhojakāya mahīpate ||
uddhṛtya śatasāhasraṃ sūryaloke mahīyate || 45 ||
dattvā tu lomaśāṃ rājanbhojakāya śubhāṃ bṛhat ||
romṇiromṇi suvarṇasya dattasya phalamāpnuyāt || 46 ||
śaṃkhaṃ dadāti yo bhaktyā tathā divye ca pāduke ||
sūryalokamavāpnoti tejasā ravisannibhaḥ || 47 ||
likhāpayati yo bhaktyā purāṇena tu pustakam ||
yugakoṭiśataṃ divyaṃ sūryaloke mahīyate || 48 ||
bhavedihāgataḥ śrīmānsukhāḍhyo vedapāragaḥ||
yaḥ karoti gṛhaṃ bhānostatsthānaṃ cottamaṃ bhavet || 49 ||
tatsūryo bhojakaḥ sotra bhojakaḥ sūrya eva hi ||
tena bhojakavipreṣu dānamakṣayyamityapi || 1.172.50 ||
yadyadyasyopayujyeta deyaṃ tattasya yatnataḥ ||
upayogaparo nityaṃ sūryastadubhayorapi ||51||
vyākhyāne sauradharmasya kṛtvā āmalakaṃ mahat ||
śobhitaṃ puṣpapatrādyairnyasettatrāsane surāḥ || 52 ||
śobhitaṃ mālyagandhaistu sūryasya sādhanaṃ mahat ||
purastāttasya saṃsthāpya ācāryaṃ pūjayetsadā ||
sūryavatsauradharme ca tulyametaddvayaṃ vacaḥ || 53 ||
ya evaṃ nyāyato vakti sauradharmaṃ śṛṇoti ca ||
āyurvidyāṃ yaśaḥ kīrtimupalabhya raviṃ japet ||
vadaṃtyanye pibaṃtyanye sarve te phalabhāginaḥ || 54 ||
tasmādevaṃvidho dharmo vācakaiśca vidurbudhāḥ ||
tasyānte pūjayedbhaktyā ya icchedvipulaṃ yaśaḥ || 55 ||
iti śrībhaviṣye mahāpurāṇe brāhme parvaṇi saptamīkalpe sauradharme dvisaptatyuttaraśatatamo.adhyāyaḥ || 172 || || cha ||
sauradharmavarṇanam
|| śatānīka uvāca || ||
punarme brūhi viprendra sauraṃ dharmamanuttamam ||
samāsātkathitaṃ brahmanvistareṇa prakīrtaya || 1 ||
|| sumanturuvāca || ||
sādhusādhu mahābāho sādhu pṛṣṭo.asmi bhārata ||
tvatsamo nāsti loke.asminsauraḥ pārthivasattama || 2 ||
kīrtayāmyatha taṃ puṇyaṃ saṃvādaṃ pāpanāśanam ||
garuḍāruṇayo rājanpurāvṛttaṃ narādhipa || 3 ||
sukhāsīnaṃ purā rājannaruṇaṃ sūryasārathim ||
upagamya mahābāho garuḍo vākyamavravīt || 4 ||
dharmāṇāmuttamaṃ dharmaṃ sarvapāpapraṇāśanam ||
sauradharmaṃ khagaśreṣṭha brūhi me kṛtsnaśonagha || 5 ||
|| aruṇa uvāca || ||
sādhu vatsa mahātmāsi dhanyastvaṃ pāpavarjitaḥ ||
śrotukāmo.asi yatputra sauradharmamanuttamam || 6 ||
śṛṇu tvaṃ kīrtayāmyeṣa sukhopāyaṃ mahatphalam ||
paramaṃ sarvadharmāṇāṃ sauradharmamanuttamam || 7 ||
ajñānārṇavamagnānāṃ sarveṣāṃ prāṇināmayam ||
sauradharmo hyayaṃ śrīmānparatīraprado yataḥ || 8 ||
ye smaraṃti raviṃ bhaktyā kīrtayaṃti ca ye khaga ||
pūjayanti ca ye nityaṃ te gatāḥ paramaṃ padam || 9 ||
ātmadrohaḥ kṛtastena jāteneha khagādhipa ||
nārcito yena deveśaḥ sahasrakiraṇo raviḥ || 1.173.10 ||
suciraṃ saṃbhramatyasminduḥkhade ca bhavārṇave ||
jarābhūtamahāgrāhe tṛṣṇāvelākulāpare || 11 ||
mānuṣyaṃ durlabhaṃ prāpya ye.arcayaṃti divākaram||
teṣāṃ hi saphalaṃ janma kṛtārthāste narottamāḥ || 12 ||
sūryabhaktiparā ye ca ye ca tadgatamānasāḥ ||
ye smaraṃti sadā sūryaṃ na te duḥkhasya bhāginaḥ || 13 ||
vividhāni manojñāni vividhābharaṇāḥ striyaḥ ||
dhanaṃ vā dṛṣṭaparyaṃtaṃ sūryapūjāvidheḥ phalam || 14 ||
ye vāṃchanti mahābhogānrājyaṃ vā tridaśā laye ||
saubhāgyaṃ kāṃtimatulāṃ bhogaṃ tyāgaṃ yaśaḥ śriyam || 15 ||
saundaryaṃ jagataḥ khyātiḥ kīrtirdharmādayaḥ smṛtāḥ ||
phalānyetāni vai putra sūrya bhaktividherbudha || 16 ||
tasmātsaṃpūjayetsūryaṃ sarvadevagaṇārcitam ||
durlabhā bhāskare bhaktirdurlabhaṃ ca tadarcanam || 17 ||
dānaṃ ca durlabhaṃ tasmai taddhomaśca sudurlabhaḥ ||
durlabhaṃ tasya vijñānaṃ tadabhyāso.api durlabhaḥ || 18 ||
sudurlabhataraṃ jñeyaṃ tadārādhanamuttamam ||
lobhasteṣāṃ manuṣyāṇāṃ ye raviṃ śaraṇaṃ gatāḥ || 19 ||
yeṣāmiheśvare bhānau nityaṃ sūrye gataṃ manaḥ ||
namaskārādisaṃyuktaṃ ravirityakṣaradvayam || 1.173.20 ||
jihvāgre vartate yasya sakalaṃ tasya jīvitam ||
ya evaṃ pūjayedbhānuṃ śraddhayā parayānvitaḥ|
mucyate sarvapāpebhyaḥ sa naro nātra saṃśayaḥ || 21 ||
ḍākinyo vividhākārā rākṣasāḥ sapiśācakāḥ ||
na tasya pīḍāṃ kurvaṃti tathānyāśca vibhīṣaṇāḥ || 22 ||
śatravo nāśamāyāṃti saṃgrāme jayamāpnuyāt ||
na rogaiḥ pīḍyate vīra āpado na spṛśaṃti tam || 23 ||
dhanamāyuryaśo vidyā prabhāvo hyatulaṃ tathā ||
śubhenopacayaṃ yāṃti nityaṃ pūrṇamanorathāḥ |||24 || ||
iti śrībhaviṣye mahāpurāṇe brāhme parvaṇi saptamīkalpe garuḍāruṇasaṃvāde sauradharmavarṇanaṃ nāma trisaptatyuttaraśatatamo.adhyāyaḥ || 173| || cha ||
sūryastutivarṇanam
|| || aruṇa uvāca || ||
pūjayitvā raviṃ bhaktyā brahmā bahmatvamāgataḥ ||
viṣṇutvaṃ cāpi deveśo viṣṣurāpa tadarcanāt || 1 ||
śaṃkaro.api jagannāthaḥ pūjayitvā divākaram ||
mahādevatvamagamattatprasādātkhagādhipa || 2 ||
sahasrākṣopi deveśa indro bhānuṃ tamopaham ||
indratvamagamaddevaṃ pūjayitvā divākaram || 3 ||
mātaro devagaṃdharvāḥ piśācoragarākṣasāḥ ||
pūjayaṃti sadā bhānumīśānaṃ suranāyakam || 4 ||
sarvametajjagannityaṃ bhānau deve pratiṣṭhitam ||
tasmātsaṃpūjayedbhānuṃ ya icchetsvargamakṣayam || 5 ||
yo na pūjayate sūryaṃ bhāskaraṃ tamasūdanam ||
dharmārthakāmamokṣāṇāṃ na naro bhājanaṃ bhavet || 6 ||
tasmātkāryaṃ hi taddhyānaṃ yāvajjīvaṃ pratijñayā ||
arcayeta sadā bhānumāpanno.api sadā khaga || || 7 ||
yastu saṃtiṣṭhate nityaṃ vinā sūryasya pūjanāt ||
varaṃ prāṇaparityāgaḥ śiraso vātha cchedanam || 8 ||
sūryaṃ saṃpūjya bhuñjīta tridaśeśaṃ divākaram ||
itthaṃ nirvahate yasya yāvajjīvaṃ tadarcanam ||
manuṣyacarmaṇā naddhaḥ sa ravirnātra saṃśayaḥ || 9 ||
na hi arkārcanādanyatpuṇyamapyadhikaṃ bhavet ||
iti vijñāya yatnena pūjayasva divākaram || 1.174.10 ||
sūryabhaktāgamāścaiva sūryārcanaparāyaṇāḥ ||
saṃyatā dharmasaṃpannā dharmādīnsādhayanti te || 11 ||
sarvadvandvasahā vīrā nītividhyuktacetasaḥ ||
paropakāraniratā guruśuśrūṣaṇe ratāḥ || 12 ||
amānino buddhimanto.avyaktaspardhā gataspṛhāḥ ||
śāṃtā svāṃtagatā bhadrā nityaṃ svāgatavādinaḥ || 13 ||
svalpavācaḥ sumanasaḥ śūrāḥ śāstraviśāradāḥ ||
śaucācārasusaṃpannā dayādākṣiṇyagocarāḥ || 14 || daṃbhamatsaranirmuktāstṛṣṇālobhavivarjitāḥ ||
saṃvibhāgaparāḥ proktā na śaṭhāścāpyakutsitāḥ || 15 ||
viṣayeṣvapi nirlepāḥ padmapatramivāṃbhasā ||
na dīnā māninaścaiva na ca rogavaśānugāḥ || 16 ||
bhavaṃti bhāvitātmānaḥ susnigdhāḥ sādhusevitāḥ ||
na pāṇipādavākcakṣuḥśrotraśiśnodare ratāḥ || 17 ||
capalāni na kurvaṃti sarvavyāsaṃgavarjitāḥ ||
sūryāsanaratāḥ śāṃtāḥ ṣaḍakṣaramanogatāḥ || 18 ||
ityācārasamāyuktā bhavaṃti bhuvi mānavāḥ ||
ekāṃtabhaktimāsthāya dharmakāmārthasiddhaye || 19 ||
pūjanīyo ravirnityaṃ guṇeṣveteṣu vartate ||
sarveṣāmeva pātrāṇāmatipātraṃ divākaraḥ ||
patantaṃ trāyate yasmādatīva narakārṇavāt || 1.174.20 ||
tasya pātrātipātrasya māhātmyaṃ dānamaṇvapi ||
anena phalamādiṣṭamihaloke paratra ca || 21 ||
dravyeṇāpi hi yaḥ kuryānnaraḥ karma tadālaye ||
so.api dehakṣaye jñānaṃ prāpya śāṃtimavāpnuyāt ||22||
sarvadvijakadaṃbeṣu kaścijjñānamavāpnuyāt ||
kaścidetattu me divyaṃ labdhvā jñānaṃ vimuñcati || 23 ||
tāvadbhramaṃti saṃsāre duḥkhaśokapariplutāḥ ||
na bhavaṃti raverbhaktā yāvatsarvepi dehinaḥ || 24 ||
sūryasyālepanaṃ puṇyaṃ dviguṇaṃ candanasya tu ||
candanādagurau jñeyaṃ puṇyamaṣṭaguṇottaram || 25 ||
kṛṣṇāgurau viśeṣeṇa dviguṇaṃ phalamiṣyate ||
tasmācchataguṇa puṇyaṃ kuṃkumasya vidhīyate || 26 ||
sūryayajñopakaraṇaṃ kṛtvālpaṃ yadi vā bahu ||
bhāvādvittānusāreṇa sūryaloke mahīyate || 27 ||
yadapīṣṭamaniṣṭaṃ ca nyāyenobhayamāgatam ||
tatsūryāya nivedyaṃ sadbhaktyānantaphalārthinā || 28 ||
karmaśāṭhyena yaḥ kuryādduḥkhenāpi tadarcanam ||
so.api dvijo divaṃ yāti karmaṇā pāpavarjitaḥ || 29 ||
sarvamanyatparityajya sūrye caikamanā sadā ||
sūryapūjāvidhiṃ kuryādya icchecchreya ātmanaḥ || 1.174.30 ||
tvaritaṃ jīvitaṃ yāti tvaritaṃ yauvanaṃ tathā ||
tvaritaṃ vyādhirapyeti tasmānnityaṃ raviṃ vrajet || 31 ||
yāvannābhyeti maraṇaṃ yāvannākramate jarā !||
yāvanneṃdriya vaikalyaṃ tāvadarceddivākaram || 32 ||
na sūryārcanatulyopi na dharmonyo jagattraye ||
itthaṃ vijñāya deveśaṃ pūjayasva divākaram || 33 ||
ye bhaktyā devadeveśaṃ sūryaṃ śāṃtamajaṃ prabhum||
iha loke sukhaṃ prāpya te gatāḥ paramaṃ padam || 34 ||
gopatiṃ pūjayitvā tu prahṛṣṭenāṃtarātmanā ||
kṛtāṃjalipuṭo bhūtvā purā brahmābravīdidam || 35 ||
|| brahmovāca || ||
bhagavantaṃ bhagakaraṃ śāṃtacittamanuttamam ||
devamārgapraṇetāraṃ praṇato.asmi raviṃ sadā || || 36 ||
śāśvataṃ śobhanaṃ śuddhaṃ citrabhānuṃ divaspatim ||
devadeveśamīśeśaṃ praṇato.asmi divākaram || 37 ||
sarvaduḥkhaharaṃ devaṃ sarvaduḥkhaharaṃ ravim ||
varānanaṃ varāṃgaṃ ca varasthānaṃ varapradam|| 38 ||
vareṇyaṃ varadaṃ nityaṃ praṇato.asmi vibhāvasum ||
arkamaryamaṇaṃ cendraṃ viṣṇumīśaṃ divākaram || 39 ||
deveśvaraṃ devarataṃ praṇato.asmi vibhāvasum ||
ya idaṃ śṛṇuyānnityaṃ brahmaṇoktaṃ stavaṃ param ||
sa hi kīrtiṃ parāṃ prāpya punaḥ sūryapuraṃ vrajet || 1.174.40 ||
iti śrībhaviṣye mahāpurāṇe brāhme parvaṇi saptamīkalpe garuḍāruṇasaṃvāde sūryastutirnāma catuḥsaptatyuttaraśatatamo.adhyāyaḥ ||174|| |||9||
sūryāgnikarmavarṇanam
|| garuḍa uvāca|| ||
sarvarogahatā ye tu ādhivyādhisamanvitāḥ ||
grahopaghātairvividhairarditā ye ca mānavāḥ || 1 ||
aribhiḥ pīḍitā ye ca vināyakahatāśca ye ||
kartavyaṃ kiṃ bhavetteṣāmātmanaḥ śreyase.anagha || 2 ||
|| aruṇa uvāca || ||
nānārogahatānāṃ tu arditānāṃ tathāribhiḥ ||
ādityārādhanaṃ muktvā nānyacchreyaskaraṃ param || 3 ||
tasmādārādhayennityaṃ sarvarogavināśanam ||
grahopaghātahaṃtāraṃ rājopadravanāśanam || 4 ||
|| garuḍa uvāca || ||
sarvapatravihīnaṃ me sarvarogavivarjitam ||
śāpena brahmavādinyāḥ paśyāṃgaṃ dvijasattama || 5 ||
evaṃ mattasya me tāta kiṃ kāryamavaśiṣyate ||
yenāhaṃ karmaṇā kalpo bhaveyaṃ patravānpunaḥ || 6 ||
tanme brūhi khagaśreṣṭha prapannasya khagādhipa ||
yatkṛtvā kalpatāṃ prāpya pūjayāmi divākaram ||7||
|| aruṇa uvāca || ||
pūjayasva jagannāthaṃ bhāskaraṃ timirāpaham ||
sūryāgnikāryaṃ satataṃ śuddhacittaḥ samācara || 8 ||
mahāśāṃtikaraṃ khyātaṃ sarvopadravanāśanam ||
grahopaghātahaṃtāraṃ śubhakāryaṃkaraṃ param || 9 ||
|| garuḍa uvāca || ||
nāhaṃ śaktosmi vai kartuṃ pūjāṃ dinakarasya ca ||
na cāgnikāryaṃ śaknomi kartuṃ vikalatāṃ gataḥ ||1.175.1 0||
tasmānme kuru śāṃtyarthamagnikāryaṃ khagādhipa ||
mahāśāṃtiriti khyātaṃ śāṃtaye mama suvrata || 11 ||
|| aruṇa uvāca ||| ||
evameva yadāttha tvaṃ vainateya khagādhipa ||
akalpastvaṃ na śaknoṣi mahāvyādhiprapīḍitaḥ || 12 ||
ahaṃ karomi te putra śāṃtaye pāvakārcanam ||
yatkṛtaṃ mama cārkeṇa purā śāṃtidamādarāt ||13||
sarvapāpaharaṃ puṇyaṃ mahāvipravināśanam ||
mahodayaṃ śātikaraṃ lakṣahomavidhi smṛtam || 14 ||
apamṛtyuharaṃ vīra sarvavyādhiharaṃ param ||
paracakrapramathanaṃ sadāvijayavardhanam || 15 ||
tṛptidaṃ sarvadevānāṃ bhāskarapriyamuttam||
āgneyyāṃ diśi lipyātha sthaḍilaṃ gomayena tu ||16||
devālayasya vidhivatkuryādagniprabodhanam ||
mahāvyāhṛtibhirvīra lakṣahomaṃ samācaret ||17||
bhūrbhuvaḥsvariti svāhā praṇavena samanvitam||
āraktadeharūpāya raktākṣāya mahātmane||18||
dharādharāya śāntāya sahasrākṣiśirāya ca||19||
adhomukhāya śvetāya svāhā pūrvāhutiṃ sṛjet |||
caturmukhāya śāṃtāya padmāsanagatāya ca ||1.175.20||
padmavarṇāya vedhāya kamaṇḍaludharāya ca ||
dvitīyordhvamukhāyeha svāhākārāhutiṃ sṛjet||21||
hemavarṇāya dehāya airāvatagatāya ca ||
sahasrākṣaśarīrāya pūrvadiśyunmukhāya ca || 22 ||
devādhipāya cendrāya vihastāya śubhāya ca ||
svāhākāraṃ cotsṛjedeva tṛtīyavadanāya ca || 23 ||
dīptāya vyaktadehāya jvālāmālākulāya ca ||
indranīlābhadehāya sarvārogyakarāya ca|| 24 ||
yamāya dharmarājāya dakṣiṇāśāmukhāya ca ||
kṛṣṇāṃbaradharāyeha svāhāhutimanutsṛjet ||25||
nīlajīmūtavarṇāya raktāṃbaradharāya ca ||
muktāphalaśarīrāya piṃgākṣāya mahātmane || 26||
śuklavastrāya pītāya divyapāśadharāya ca ||
svāhākārāya ca tathā paścimābhimukhāya ca || 27 ||
kṛṣṇapiṃgalanetrāya vāyavyābhimukhāya ca||
nīladhvajāya vīrāya tathā cendrāya vedhase ||28||
svāheti pavanāyeha āhutiṃ cotsṛjedbudhaḥ||
gadāhastāya sūryāya citrasragbhūṣaṇāya ca||29||
mahodarāya śāṃtāya svāhādhipataye tathā ||
uttarābhimukhāyeha mahādevapriyāya ca || 1.175.30 ||
śvetāya śvetavarṇāya citrākṣāya mahātmane ||
śāṃtāya śāṃtarūpāya pinākavaradhāriṇe || 31 ||
īśānābhimukhāyeha dadyādīśāya cāhutim ||
visṛjetkhagaśārdūla vidhivacchreyasenagha || 32 ||
evaṃ devaṃ mahātmānaṃ pāvakaṃ vidhivatkhaga ||
arhediti tu yatkāryaṃ tatsauraṃ khagasattama || 33 ||
lakṣahomaṃ ca vidhivatkṛtvā śāṃtikamācaret ||
bhūrbhuvaḥsvariti svā hā lakṣahomavidhiḥ smṛtaḥ || 34 ||
mahāhome ca vai saura eṣa eva vidhiḥ paraḥ ||
kṛtvaivamagnikāryaṃ tu bhojako bhāskarāya vai || 35 ||
śāṃtyarthaṃ sarvalokānāṃ tataḥ śāṃtikamācaret ||
sindūrāsanaraktābhaḥ raktapadmābhalocanaḥ || 36 ||
sahasrakiraṇo devaḥ saptāśvarathavāhanaḥ ||
gabhastimālī bhagavānsarvadevanamaskṛtaḥ || 37 ||
karotu te mahāśāṃtiṃ grahapīḍānivāriṇīm ||
tricakrarathamārūḍha apāṃ sāramayaṃ tu yaḥ ||38||
daśāśvavāhano deva ātreya ścāmṛtasravaḥ ||
śītāṃśuramṛtātmā ca kṣayavṛddhisamanvitaḥ ||
somaḥ saumyena bhāvena grahapīḍāṃ vyapohatu || 39 ||
padmarāganibho bhaumo madhupiṃgala locanaḥ ||
aṃgārako.agnisadṛśo grahapīḍāṃ vyapohatu || 1.175.40 ||
puṣparāganibheneha dehena paripiṃgalaḥ ||
pītamālyāṃbaradharo budhaḥ pīḍāṃ vyapohatu || || 41 ||
taptagairikasaṃkāśaḥ sarvaśāstraviśāradaḥ ||
sarvadevagururvipro hyatharvaṇavaro muniḥ || 42 ||
bṛhaspatiriti khyāta arthaśāstraparaśca yaḥ ||
śāṃtena cetasā sopi pareṇa susamāhitaḥ || 43 ||
grahapīḍāṃ vinirjitya karotu tava śāṃtikam ||
sūryārcanaparo nityaṃ prasādādbhāskarasya tu || 44 ||
himakuṃdeṃduvarṇābho daityadānavapūjitaḥ ||
maheśvarastato dhīmānmahāsauro mahāmatiḥ || 45 ||
sūryārcanaparo nityaṃ śukraḥ śuklanibhastadā ||
nītiśāstraparo nityaṃ grahapīḍāṃ vyapohatu || 46 ||
nānārūpadharovyakta avijñātagatiśca yaḥ ||
notpattirjāyate yasya nodayapīḍitairapi || 47 ||
ekacūlo dvicūlaśca triśikhaḥ paṃcacūlakaḥ ||
sahasraśirarūpastu candraketuriva sthitaḥ ||48||
sūryaputrogniputrastu brahmaviṣṇuśivātmakaḥ ||
anekaśikharaḥ ketuḥ sa te pīḍāṃ vyapohatu || 49 |
ete grahā mahātmānaḥ sūryārcanaparāḥ sadā ||
śāṃtiṃ kurvaṃtu te hṛṣṭāḥ sadā kālaṃ hitekṣaṇāḥ || 1.175.50 ||
iti śrībhaviṣye mahāpurāṇe brāhme parvaṇi saptamīkalpe sauradharmeṣu sūryāgnikarmaṇi paṃcasaptatyuttaraśatatamo.adhyāyaḥ || 175 || cha ||
sauradharmavarṇanam
|| sumaṃturuvāca || ||
padmāsanaḥ padmavarṇaḥ padmapatranibhekṣaṇaḥ ||
kamaṇḍaludharaḥ śrīmāndevagaṃdharvapūjitaḥ || 1 ||
caturmukho devapatiḥ sūryārcanaparaḥ sadā ||
surajyeṣṭho mahātejāḥ sarva lokaprajāpatiḥ ||
brahmaśabdena divyena brahmā śāṃtiṃ karotu te || 2 ||
pītāṃbaradharo deva ātreyīdayitaḥ sadā ||
śaṃkhacakragadāpāṇiḥ śyāmavarṇaścaturbhujaḥ || 3 ||
yajñadehaḥ kramo deva ātreyīdayitaḥ sadā ||
śaṃkhacakragadāpāṇirmādhavo madhusūdanaḥ || 4 ||
sūryabhaktānvito nityaṃ vigatirvigatatrayaḥ ||
sūryadhyānaparo nityaṃ viṣṇuḥ śāṃtiṃ karotu te || 5 ||
śaśikuṃdeṃdusaṃkāśo viśrutābharaṇairiha ||
caturbhujo mahātejāḥ puṣpārdhakṛtaśekharaḥ || 6 ||
caturmukho bhasmadharaḥ smaśānanilayaḥ sadā ||
gotrārirviśvanilayastathā ca kratudūṣaṇaḥ || 7 ||
varo vareṇyo varado devadevo maheśvaraḥ ||
ādityadehasaṃbhūtaḥ sa te śāṃtiṃ karotu vai || 8 ||
iti śrībhaviṣye mahāpurāṇe brāhme parvaṇi saptamīkalpe sauradharmeṣu ṣaṭsaptatyuttaraśatatamo.adhyāyaḥ || 176 || cha ||
agnikāryavidhivarṇanam
|| aruṇa uvāca || ||
padmarāgaprabhā devī caturvadanapaṃkajā ||
akṣamālārpitakarā kamaṃḍaludharā śubhā || 1 ||
brahmāṇī saumyavadanā ādityārādhane ratā ||
śāṃtiṃ karotu suprītā āśīrvādaparā khaga || 2 ||
mahāśveteti vikhyātā ādi tyadayitā sadā ||
himakuṃdeṃdusadṛśā mahāvṛṣabhavāhinī || 3 ||
triśūlahastāvaraṇā viśrutābharaṇā satī ||
caturbhujā caturvaktrā trinetrā pāpanāśinī||
vṛṣadhvajārcanaratā rudrāṇī śāṃtidā bhavet || 4 ||
mayūravāhanā devī siṃdūrāruṇavigrahā ||
śaktihastā mahākāyā sarvālaṃkārabhūṣitā ||5||
sūryabhaktā mahāvīryā sūryārcanaratā sadā ||
kaumārī varadā devī śāṃtimāśu karotu te || 6 ||
gadācakradharā śyāmā pītāṃbaradharā khaga ||
caturbhujā hi sā devī vaiṣṇavī surapūjitā ||7||
sūryārcanaparā nityaṃ sūryaikagatamānasā ||
śāṃtiṃ karotu te nityaṃ sarvāsuravimardinī ||8||
airāvatagajārūḍhā vajrahastā mahā balā ||
sarvatralocanā devī varṇataḥ karburāruṇā || 9 ||
siddhagaṃdharvanamitā sarvālaṃkārabhūṣitā ||
iṃdrāṇī te sadā devī śāṃtimāśu karotu vai || 1.177.10 ||
varāhaghoṇā vikaṭā varāhavaravāhinī ||
śyāmāvadātā yā devī śaṃkhacakragadādharā || 11 ||
tejayaṃtīti nimiṣānpūjayaṃtī sadā ravim ||
vārāhī varadā devī tava śāṃtiṃ karotu vai || 12 ||
ardhakośā kaṭīkṣāmā nirmāṃsā snāyubaṃdhanāt ||
karālavanā ghorā khaḍgaghaṃṭodgatā satī || 13 ||
kapālamālinī krūrā khaṭvāṃgavaradhāriṇī ||
āraktā piṃganayanā gajacarmāvaguṃṭhitā || 14 ||
gośrutābharaṇā devī pretasthānanivāsinī ||
śivārūpeṇa ghoreṇa śivarūpabhayaṃkarī ||
cāmuṃḍā caṃḍarūpeṇa sadā śāṃtiṃ karotu te || 15 ||
caṃḍamuṃḍakarā devī muṃḍadehagatā satī ||
kapālamālinī krūrā khadvāṃgavaradhā riṇī || 16 ||
ākāśamātaro devyastathānyā lokamātaraḥ ||
bhūtānāṃ mātaraḥ sarvāstathānyāḥ pitṛmātaraḥ || 17 ||
vṛddhiśrāddheṣu pūjyaṃte yāstu devyo manīṣibhiḥ ||
mātre pramātre tanmātre iti mātṛmukhāstathā || 18 ||
pitāmahī tu tanmātā vṛddhā yā ca pitāmahī ||
ityetāstu pitāmahyaḥ śāṃtiṃ te pitṛmātaraḥ || 19 ||
sarvā mātṛmahādevyaḥ svāyudhāvyagrapāṇayaḥ ||
jagadvyāpya pratiṣṭhaṃtyo balikāmā mahodayāḥ || 1.177.20 ||
śāṃtiṃ kurvaṃtu tā nityamādityārādhane ratāḥ ||
śāṃtena cetasā śāṃtyaḥ śāṃtaye tava śāṃtidā || 21 ||
sarvāvayavamukhyena gātreṇa ca sumadhyamā !|
pītaśyāmāti saumyena snigdhavarṇena śobhanā || 22 ||
lalāṭatilakopetā caṃdrarekhārdhadhāriṇī ||
citrāṃbaradharā devī sarvābharaṇabhūṣitā || 23 ||
varā strīmayarūpāṇāṃ śobhā guṇasusampadā ||
bhāvanāmātrasaṃtuṣṭā umā devī varapradā ||24||
sākṣādāgatya rūpeṇa śāṃtenāmitatejasā ||
śāṃtiṃ karotu te prītā ādityā rādhane ratā || 25 || ||
iti śrībhaviṣye mahāpurāṇe brāhme parvaṇi saptamīkalpe sauradharmeṣu daśamukhe agnikāryavidhau saptasaptatyuttaraśatatamodhyāyaḥ || || 177 ||
sauradharmavarṇanam
|| aruṇa uvāca || ||
abalo bālarūpeṇa khaṭvāṃgaśikhivāhanaḥ ||
pūrveṇa vadanaḥ śrīmāṃstriśikhaḥ śaktisaṃyutaḥ || 1 ||
kṛttikāyāśca rudrasya cāṃgodbhūtaḥ surārcitaḥ ||
kārtikeyo mahātejā ādityavaradarpitaḥ ||
śāṃtiṃ karotu te nityaṃ balaṃ saukhyaṃ ca tejasā || 2 ||
ātreyībalavāndeva ārogyaṃ ca khagādhipa ||
śvetavastraparīdhānastryakṣaḥ kanakasuprabhaḥ || 3 ||
śūlahasto mahāprājño nadīśo ravibhāvitaḥ ||
śāṃtiṃ karotu te śānto dharme ca matimuttamām || 4 ||
dharmetarāvubhau nityamacalaḥ saṃprayacchatu ||
mahodaro mahākāyaḥ snigdhāṃjanasamaprabhaḥ || 5 ||
ekadaṃṣṭrotkaṭo devo gajavaktro mahābalaḥ ||
nāgayajñopavītena nānābharaṇabhūṣitaḥ ||6||
sarvārthasaṃpadoddhāro gaṇādhyakṣo varapradaḥ ||
bhīmasya tanayo devo nāyakotha vināyakaḥ ||
karotu te mahāśāṃtiṃ bhāskarārcanatatparaḥ || 7 ||
iṃdranīlanibhastryakṣo dīptaśūlāyudhodyataḥ ||
raktāṃbaradharaḥ śrīmānkṛṣṇāṃgo nāgabhūṣaṇaḥ || 8 ||
pāpāpanodamatulamalakṣyo malanāśanaḥ ||
karotu te mahāśāṃtiṃ prītaḥ prītena cetasā || 9 ||
varāṃbaradharā kanyā nānālaṃkārabhūṣitā ||
tridaśānāṃ ca jananī puṇyā lokanamaskṛtā || 1.178.10 ||
sarvasiddhikarā devī prasādaparamāspadā ||
śāṃtiṃ karotu te mātā bhuvanasya khagādhipa || 11 ||
snigdhaśyāmena varṇena mahāmahiṣamardanī ||
dhanuścakrapraharaṇā khaṅgapaṭṭiśadhāriṇī || 12 ||
ātarjanyāyatakarā sarvopadravanāśinī ||
śāṃtiṃ karotu te durgā bhavānī ca śivā tathā || 13 ||
atisūkṣmo hyatikrodhastryakṣo bhṛṃgiriṭirmahān ||
sūryātmako mahāvīraḥ sūryaikagatamānasaḥ ||
sūryabhaktikaro nityaṃ śivaṃ te saṃprayacchatu || 14 ||
pracaṃḍagaṇasainyeśo mahāghaṃṭākṣadhārakaḥ ||
akṣamālārpitakaraścākṣacaṃḍeśvaro varaḥ || 15 ||
caṃḍapāpaharo nityaṃ brahmahatyā vināśanaḥ ||
śāṃtiṃ karotu te nityamādityārādhane rataḥ ||
karoti ca mahāyogī kalyāṇānāṃ paraṃparām || 16 ||
ākāśamātaro divyāstathānyā devamātaraḥ ||
sūryāyaṇaparā devyo jagadvyāpya vyavasthitāḥ ||
śāṃtiṃ kurvaṃtu me nityaṃ mātaraḥ surapūjitāḥ || 17 ||
ye rudrā raudrakarmāṇo raudra sthānanivāsinaḥ ||
mātaro rudrarūpāśca gaṇānāmadhipāśca ye || 18 ||
vighnabhūtāstathā cānye digvidikṣu samāśritāḥ ||
sarve te prītamanasaḥ pratigṛhṇaṃtu me balim ||
siddhiṃ kurvaṃtu te nityaṃ bhayebhyaḥ pāṃtu sarvataḥ || 19 ||
aiṃdrādayo gaṇā ye tu vajrahastā mahābalāḥ ||
himakundeṃdusadṛśā nīlakṛṣṇāṃgalohitāḥ || 1.178.20 ||
divyāṃtarikṣā bhaumāśca pātālatalavāsinaḥ ||
aiṃdrāḥ śāṃtiṃ prakurvaṃtu bhadrāṇi ca punaḥ punaḥ || 21 ||
āgneyyāṃ ye bhṛtāḥ sarve dhruvahatyānuṣaṃgiṇaḥ ||
sūryānuraktā raktābhā japāsumanibhāstathā || 22 ||
viraktalohitā divyā āgneyyāṃ bhāskarādayaḥ ||
ādityārādhanaparā ādityagatamānasāḥ || 23 ||
śāṃtiṃ kurvaṃtu te nityaṃ prayacchaṃtu baliṃ mama ||
bhayā.a.adityasamā ye tu satataṃ daṇḍapāṇayaḥ ||
ādityārādhanaparāḥ kaṃ prayacchaṃtu te sadā || 24 ||
aiśānyāṃ saṃsthitā ye tu praśāṃtāḥ śūlapāṇayaḥ ||
bhasmoddhūlitadehāśca nīlakaṇṭhā vilohitāḥ || 25 ||
divyāṃtarikṣā bhaumāśca pātālatalavāsinaḥ ||
sūryapūjākarā nityaṃ pūjayitvāṃśumālinam || 26 ||
tataḥ suprītamanaso lokapālaiḥ sama nvitāḥ ||
śāṃtiṃ kurvaṃtu me nityaṃ kaṃ prayacchaṃtu pūjitāḥ ||27||
amarāvatī purī nāma pūrvabhāge vyavasthitā ||
vidyādharagaṇākīrṇā siddhagandharvase vitā ||28||
ratnaprākārarucirā mahāratnopaśobhitā ||
tatra devapatiḥ śrīmānvajrapāṇirmahābalaḥ ||
gopatirgosahasreṇa śobhamānena śobhate ||29||
airāvatagajārūḍho gairikābho mahādyutiḥ||
deveṃdraḥ satataṃ hṛṣṭa ādityārādhane rataḥ || 1.178.30 ||
sūryajñānaikaparamaḥ sūryabhaktisamanvitaḥ ||
sūryapraṇāmaḥ paramāṃ śāṃtiṃ te.adya prayacchatu || 31 ||
āgneyadigvibhāge tu purī tejasvatī śubhā ||
nānādevagaṇākīrṇā nānāratnopaśobhitā || 32 ||
tatra jvālā samākīrṇo dīptāṃgārasamadyutiḥ ||
purago dahano devo jvalanaḥ pāpanāśanaḥ || 33 ||
ādityārādhanarata ādityagatamānasaḥ ||
śāṃtiṃ karotu te devastathā pāpaparikṣayam || 34 ||
vaivasvatī purī ramyā dakṣiṇena mahātmanaḥ ||
surāsuraśatākīrṇā nānāratnopaśobhitā ||35||
tatra kundeṃdusaṃkāśo haripiṃgalalocanaḥ ||
mahāmahiṣamārūḍhaḥ kṛṣṇasragvastrabhūṣaṇaḥ || 36 ||
antako.atha mahātejāḥ sūryadharmaparāyaṇaḥ ||
ādityārādhanaparaḥ kṣemārogye dadātu te || 37 ||
nairṛte digvibhāge tu purī kṛṣṇeti viśrutā ||
moharakṣogaṇāśaucapiśācapretasaṃkulā || 38 ||
tatra kundanibho devo raktasragvastra bhūṣaṇaḥ ||
khaḍgapāṇirmahātejāḥ karālavadanojjvalaḥ || 39 ||
rakṣeṃdro vasate nityamādityārādhane rataḥ ||
karotu me sadā śāṃtiṃ dhanaṃ dhānyaṃ praya cchatu || 1.178.40 ||
paścime tu diśo bhāge purī śuddhavatī sadā ||
nānābhogisamākīrṇā nānākinnarasevitā || 41 ||
tatra kundedusaṃkāśo haripiṃgala locanaḥ ||
śāṃtiṃ karotu me prītaḥ śāṃtaḥ śāṃtena cetasā || 42 ||
yaśovatī purī ramyā aiśānīṃ diśamāśritā ||
nānāgaṇasamākīrṇā nānākṛta śubhālayā ||
tejaḥprākāraparyaṃtā anaupamyā sadojvalā || 43 ||
tatra kuṃdeṃdusaṃkāśaścāṃbujākṣo vibhūṣitaḥ ||
trinetraḥ śāṃtarūpātmā akṣamālā dharādharaḥ ||
īśānaḥ paramo devaḥ sadā śāṃtiṃ prayacchatu || 44 ||
bhūloke tu bhuvarloke nivasaṃti ca ye sadā ||
devādevāḥ śubhāyuktāḥ śāṃtiṃ kurvaṃtu te sadā || 45 ||
maharloke janoloke paraloke gatāśca ye ||
te sarve muditā devāḥ śāṃtiṃ kurvaṃtu te sadā || 46 ||
sarasvatī sūryabhaktā śāṃtidā vidadhātu me ||
cārucāmīkarasthā yā sarojakarapallavā ||
sūryabhaktyāśritā devī vibhūtiṃ te prayacchatu || 47 ||
hareṇa suvicitreṇa bhāsvatkanakamekhalā ||
aparājitā sūryabhaktā karotu vijayaṃ tava || 48 ||
iti śrībhaviṣye mahāpurāṇe brāhme parvaṇi saptamīkalpe sauradharmavarṇanaṃ nāmāṣṭasaptatyu ttaraśatatamo.adhyāyaḥ || 178 || || cha ||
sauradharmavarṇanam
|| aruṇa uvāca || ||
kṛttikā paramā devī rohiṇī ca varānanā ||
śrīmanmṛgaśiro bhadrā ārdrā cāpyaparojjvalā || 1 ||
punarvasustathā puṣya āśleṣā ca tathādhipa ||
sūryārcanaratā nityaṃ sūryabhāvānubhāvitāḥ || 2 ||
arcayaṃti sadā devamādityaṃ surate sadā ||
nakṣatramātaro hyetāḥ prabhāmālāvibhūṣitāḥ || 3 ||
maghā sarvaguṇopetā pūrvā caiva tu phālgunī ||
svātī viśākhā varadā dakṣiṇāṃ diśamāśritāḥ || 4 ||
arcayaṃti sadā devamādityaṃ surapūjitam ||
tavāpi śāṃtikaṃ dyotaṃ kurvaṃtu gaganoditāḥ || 5 ||
anurādhā tathā jyeṣṭhā mūlaṃ sūryapuraḥsarā ||
pūrvāṣāḍhā mahāvīryā āṣāḍhā cottarā tathā || 6 ||
abhijinnāma nakṣatraṃ śravaṇaṃ ca bahuśrutam ||
etāḥ paścimato dīptā rājaṃte cānu mūrtayaḥ || 7 ||
bhāskaraṃ pūjayaṃtyetāḥ sarvakālaṃ subhāvitāḥ ||
śāṃtiṃ kurvaṃtu te nityaṃ vibhūtiṃ ca maharddhikām ||8||
dhaniṣṭhā śatabhiṣā tu pūrvabhādrapadā tathā || 9 ||
uttarā bhādrarevatyau cāśvinī ca mahāmate ||
bharaṇī ca mahādevī nityamuttarataḥ sthitāḥ || 1.179.10 ||
sūryārcanaratā nityamādityagatamā nasāḥ ||
śāṃtiṃ kurvatu te nityaṃ vibhūtiṃ ca maharddhikām || 11 ||
meṣo mṛgādhipaḥ siṃho dhanurdīptimatāṃ varaḥ ||
pūrveṇa bhāsayaṃtyete sūryayogaparāḥ śubhāḥ ||
śāṃtiṃ kurvaṃtu te nityaṃ bhaktyā sūryapadāṃbuje || 12 ||
vṛṣaḥ kanyā ca paramā makaraścāpi buddhimān ||
ete dakṣiṇabhāge tu pūjayaṃti raviṃ sadā ||
bhaktyā paramayā nityaṃ śāṃtiṃ kurvaṃtu te sadā ||13||
mithunaṃ ca tulā kuṃbhaḥ paścime ca vyavasthitāḥ ||
japaṃtyete sadākālamādityaṃ grahanāya kam || 14 ||
śāṃtiṃ kurvaṃtu te nityaṃ khakholkājñānatatparāḥ ||
satapodattapuṣpābhyāṃ ye smṛtā satataṃ budhaiḥ || 15 ||
ṛṣayaḥ sapta vikhyātā dhruvāṃtāḥ praramojjvalāḥ ||
bhānuprasādātsaṃpannāḥ śāṃtiṃ kurvaṃtu te sadā || 16 ||
kaśyapo gālavo gārgyo viśvāmitro mahāmuniḥ ||
munirdakṣo vaśiṣṭhaśca mārkaṇḍaḥ pulahaḥ kratuḥ || 17 ||
nārado bhṛgurātreyo bhāradvājaśca vai muniḥ ||
vālmīkiḥ kauśiko vātsyaḥ śākalyo.atha punarvasuḥ || 18 ||
śālaṃkāyana ityete ṛṣayo.atha mahātapāḥ ||
sūryadhyānaikaparamāḥ śāṃtiṃ kurvaṃtu te sadā|| 19 ||
munikanyā mahābhāgā ṛṣikanyāḥ kumārikāḥ ||
sūryārcanaratā nityaṃ śāṃtiṃ kurvaṃtu te sadā || 1.179.20 ||
siddhāḥ samṛddhatapaso ye cānye vai mahātapāḥ ||
vidyādharā mahātmāno garuḍaśca tvayā saha || 21 ||
ādityaparamā hyete ādityārādhane ratāḥ ||
siddhiṃ te saṃprayacchaṃtu āśīrvādaparāyaṇāḥ || 22 ||
namucirdaityarājedraḥ śaṃkukarṇo mahābalaḥ ||
mahānātho.atha vikhyāto daityaḥ paramavīryavān || 23 ||
grahādhipasya devasya nityaṃ pūjāparāyaṇāḥ ||
balaṃ vīryaṃ ca te ṛddhimārogyaṃ ca bruvaṃtu te ||24||
mahāḍhyo yo hayagrīvaḥ prahlādaḥ prabhayānvitaḥ ||
tānaikāgnimukho daityaḥ kālanemirmahābalaḥ || 25 ||
ete daityā mahātmānaḥ sūryabhāvena bhāvitāḥ |||
tuṣṭiṃ balaṃ tathā.a.arogyaṃ prayacchaṃtu surārayaḥ || 26 ||
vairocano hiraṇyākṣasturvasuśca sulocanaḥ ||
mucakuṃdo mukuṃdaśca daityo raivatakastathā ||27||
bhāvena parameṇemaṃ yajaṃte satataṃ ravim ||
satataṃ ca śubhātmānaḥ puṣṭiṃ kurvaṃtu te sadā || 28 ||
daityapatayo mahābhāgā daityānāṃ kanyakāḥ śubhāḥ ||
kumārā ye ca daityānāṃ śāṃtiṃ kurvaṃtu te sadā || 29 ||
āraktena śarīraṇa raktāṃtāyatalocanāḥ ||
mahābhāgāḥ kṛtāṭopāḥ śaṃkhādyāḥ kṛtalakṣaṇāḥ || 1.179.30 ||
anaṃto nāgarājeṃdra ādityārādhane rataḥ ||
mahāpāpaviṣaṃ hatvā śāṃtimāśu karotu te || 31 ||
atipītena dehena visphuradbhogasaṃpadā ||
tejasā cātidīptena kṛtasvastikalāṃchanaḥ || 32 ||
nāgarāṭ takṣakaḥ śrīmānnāmakoṭyā samanvitaḥ ||
