karotu te mahāśāṃtiṃ sarvadoṣaviṣāpahām || 33 ||
atikṛṣṇena varṇena sphuṭādhikaṭamastakaḥ ||
kaṃṭharekhātrayopeto ghoradaṃṣṭrāyudhodyataḥ || 34 ||
karkoṭako mahānāgo viṣadarpabalānvitaḥ ||
viṣaśastrāgnisaṃtāpaṃ hatvā śāṃtiṃ karotu te || 35 ||
padmavarṇaḥ padmakāntiḥ phullapadmāyatekṣaṇaḥ ||
khyātaḥ padmo mahānāgo nityaṃ bhāskarapūjakaḥ || 36 ||
sa te śāṃti śubhaṃ śīghramacalaṃ saṃprayacchatu ||
śyāmena dehabhāreṇa śrīmatkamalalocanaḥ || 37 ||
viṣadarpabalonmatto grīvāyāṃ rekhayānvitaḥ ||
śaṃkhapālaśriyā dīptaḥ sūryapādābjapūjakaḥ || 38.||
mahāviṣaṃ garaśreṣṭhaṃ hatvā śāṃtiṃ karotu te ||
atigaureṇa dehena caṃdrārdhakṛtaśekharaḥ || 39 ||
dīpabhāge kṛtāṭopaśubhalakṣaṇalakṣitaḥ ||
kuliko nāma nāgendro nityaṃ sūryaparāyaṇaḥ ||
apahṛtya viṣaṃ ghoraṃ karotu tava śāṃtikam || 1.179.40 ||
aṃtarikṣe ca ye nāgā ye nāgāḥ svargasaṃsthitāḥ ||
girikaṃdaradurgeṣu ye nāgā bhuvi saṃsthitāḥ || 41 ||
pātāle ye sthitā nāgāḥ sarve yatra samāhitāḥ ||
sūryapādā rcanāsaktāḥ śāṃtiṃ kurvaṃtu te sadā ||42||
nāginyo nāgakanyāśca tathā nāgakumārakāḥ ||
sūryabhaktāḥ sumanasaḥ śāṃtiṃ kurvaṃtu te sadā ||43||
ya idaṃ nāmasaṃsthānaṃ kīrtayecchṛṇuyāttathā ||
na taṃ sarpā vihiṃsati na viṣaṃ kramate sadā || 44 ||
iti śrībhaviṣye mahāpurāṇe brāhme parvaṇi saptamīkalpe saura dharmavarṇanaṃ nāmaikonāśītyuttaraśatatamo.adhyāyaḥ ||179|| ||
śāntikavarṇanam
gaṃgā puṇyā mahādevī yamunā narmadā nadī ||
gautamī cāpi kāverī varuṇā devikā tathā ||1||
sarvagrahapatiṃ devaṃ lokeśaṃ lokanāyakam ||
pūjayaṃti sadā nadyaḥ sūryasadbhāvabhāvitāḥ ||
śāṃtiṃ kurvaṃtu te nityaṃ sūryadhyānaikamānasāḥ ||2||
niraṃjanā nāma nadī śoṇaścāpi mahānadaḥ ||
maṃdākinī ca paramā tathā sannihitā śubhā||3||
etāścānyāśca bahavo bhuvi divyaṃtarikṣake||
sūryārcanaratā nadyaḥ kurvaṃtu tava śāṃtikam ||4||
mahāvaiśravaṇo devo yakṣarājo maharṣikaḥ ||
yakṣakoṭiparīvāro yakṣasaṃkhyeyasaṃyutaḥ ||5||
mahāvibhavasaṃpannaḥ sūryapādārcane rataḥ ||
sūryadhyānaikaparamaḥ sūryabhāvena bhāvitaḥ||6||
śāṃtiṃ karotu te prītaḥ padmapatrāyatekṣaṇaḥ ||
māṇibhadro mahāyakṣo maṇiratnavibhūṣitaḥ ||7||
manohareṇa hāreṇa kaṃṭhalagnena rājate ||
yakṣiṇīyakṣakanyābhiḥ parivāritavigrahaḥ ||
sūryārcanasamāsaktaḥ karotu tava śāṃtikam||8||
suciro nāma yakṣeṃdro maṇikuḍala bhūṣitaḥ ||
lalāṭe hemapaṭalaprabaddhena virājate || 9 ||
bahuyakṣasamākīrṇo yakṣairnamitavigrahaḥ ||
sūryapūjāparo yuktaḥ karotu tava śāṃtikam || 1.180.10|||
pāṃciko nāma yakṣeṃdraḥ kaṃṭhābharaṇabhūṣitaḥ ||
kukkuṭena vicitreṇa bahuratnānvitena tu || 11 ||
yakṣavṛndasamākīrṇo yakṣakoṭisamanvitaḥ ||
sūryārcanakaraḥ śrīmānkarotu tava śāṃtikam || 12 ||
dhṛtarāṣṭro mahātejā nānāyakṣādhipaḥ khaga ||
divyapaṭṭaḥ śuklacchatro maṇikāṃcanabhūṣitaḥ || 13 ||
sūryabhaktaḥ sūryarataḥ sūryapūjāparāyaṇaḥ ||
sūryaprasādasaṃpannaḥ karotu tava śāṃtikam || 14 ||
virūpākṣaśca yakṣeṃdraḥ śvetavāsā mahādyutiḥ ||
nānākāṃcanamālābhirupaśobhitakaṃdharaḥ || 15 ||
sūryapūjāparo bhaktaḥ kaṃjākṣaḥ kaṃjasannibhaḥ ||
tejasādityasaṃkāśaḥ karotu tava śāṃtikam || 16 ||
aṃtīrakṣagatā yakṣā ye yakṣāḥ svargagāminaḥ ||
nānārūpadharā yakṣāḥ sūryabhaktā dṛḍhavratāḥ || 17 ||
tadbhaktāstadgamanasaḥ sūryapūjāsamutsukāḥ ||
śāṃtiṃ kurvaṃtu te hṛṣṭāḥ śāṃtāḥ śāṃtiparāyaṇāḥ || 18 ||
yakṣiṇyo vividhākārāstathā yakṣakumārakāḥ ||
yakṣakanyā mahābhāgāḥ sūryārādhanatatparāḥ || 19 ||
śāṃtiṃ svastyayanaṃ kṣemaṃ balaṃ kalyāṇamuttamam ||
siddhiṃ cāśu prayacchaṃtu nityaṃ ca susamāhitāḥ || 1.180.20 ||
parvatāḥ sarvataḥ sarve vṛkṣāścaiva maharddhikāḥ ||
sūryabhaktāḥ sadā sarve śāṃtiṃ kurvaṃtu te sadā || 21 ||
sāgarāḥ sarvataḥ sarve gṛhāraṇyāni kṛtsnaśaḥ ||
sūryasyārādhanaparāḥ kurvaṃtu tava śāṃtikam || 22 ||
rākṣasāḥ sarvataḥ sarve ghorarūpā mahābalāḥ ||
sthalajā rākṣasā ye tu aṃtarikṣagatāśca ye ||23||
pātāle rākṣasā ye tu nityaṃ sūryārcane ratāḥ ||
śāṃtiṃ kurvaṃtu te sarve tejasā nityadīpitāḥ || 24 ||
pretāḥ pretagaṇāḥ sarve ye pretāḥ sarvatomukhāḥ ||
atidīptāśca ye pretā ye pretā rudhirāśanāḥ ||25|||
aṃtarikṣe ca ye pretāstathā ye svargavāsinaḥ ||
pātāle bhūtale vāpi ye pretāḥ kāmarūpiṇaḥ || 26 ||
ekacakro ratho yasya yastu devo vṛṣadhvajaḥ ||
tejasā tasya devasya śāṃtiṃ kurvaṃtu te sadā ||27||
ye piśācā mahāvīryā vṛddhimaṃto mahābalāḥ ||
nānārūpadharāḥ sarve sarve ca guṇavattarāḥ ||28|||
aṃtarikṣe piśācā ye svarge ye ca mahābalāḥ ||
pātāle bhūtale ye ca bahurūpā manojavāḥ || 29 ||
yasyāhaṃ sārathirvīra yasya tvaṃ turagaḥ sadā ||
tejasā tasya devasya śāṃtiṃ kurvaṃtu te.añjasā || 1.180.30 ||
apasmāragrahāḥ sarve sarve cāpi jvaragrahāḥ ||
ye ca svargasthitāḥ sarve bhūmigā ye grahottamāḥ || || 31 ||
pātāle tu grahā ye ca ye grahāḥ sarvato gatāḥ ||
dakṣiṇe kiraṇe yasya sūryasya ca sthito hariḥ || 32 ||
haro yasya sadā vāme lalāṭe kaṃjajaḥ sthitaḥ ||
tejasā tasya devasya śāṃtiṃ kurvaṃtu te sadā || 33 ||
iti devādayaḥ sarve sūryayajñavidhāyinaḥ ||
kurvaṃtu jagataḥ śāṃtiṃ sūryabhakteṣu sarvadā || 34 ||
jayaḥ sūryāya devāya tamohaṃtre vivasvate ||
jayapradāya sūryāya bhāskarāya namostu te || 35 ||
grahottamāya devāya jayaḥ kalyāṇakāriṇe ||
jayaḥ padmavikāśāya budharūpāya te namaḥ || 36 ||
jayaḥ dīptividhānāya jayaḥ śāṃtividhāyine ||
tamoghnāya jayāyaiva ajitāya namonamaḥ ||37||
jayārka jayadīptīśa sahasrakiraṇojjvala ||
jaya nirmitalokastvamajitāya namonamaḥ || 38 ||
gāyatrīdeharūpāya sāvitrīdayitāya ca ||
dharādharāya sūryāya mārtaṃḍāya namonamaḥ || 39 ||
sumaṃturuvāca ||
evaṃ hi kurvataḥ śāṃtimaruṇasya mahīpate ||
śreyase vainateyasya garuḍasya mahātmanaḥ || 1.180.40 ||
etasminneva kāle tu suparṇaḥ patravānabhūt ||
tejasā budhasaṃkāśo valena hariṇā samaḥ || 41 ||
saṃpūrṇāvayavo rājanyathāpūrvaṃ tathābhavat ||
prasādāddevadevasya bhāskarasya mahātmanaḥ || 42 ||
evamanye.api rājeṃdra mānavā ye ca rogiṇaḥ ||
asmitkṛte.agnikārye tu virujāste bhavaṃti hi ||
tasmādyatnena kartavyamagnikāryaṃ vidhānataḥ || 43 ||
karaṇīyaṃ ca rājeṃdra mānavaiśca prarogibhiḥ ||
asminkṛte agnikāye virujāste bhavaṃti hi|| 44 ||
graho paghāte durbhikṣa utpāteṣu ca kṛtsnaśaḥ ||
avarṣamāṇe parjanye lakṣahomasamanvitaḥ || 45 ||
pūjayitvā prasūktaṃ tu dhyātvā vīraṃ prayatnataḥ ||
vāruṇaiśca tathā sūktairhomaṃ kuryādvicakṣaṇaḥ || 46 ||
cetasā suprasannena sarpiṣā madhunā saha ||
tilairyavaiśca sahitaiḥ pāyasaṃ madhunā tathā || 47 ||
idaṃ ca śāṃtikaṃ kuryādbaliṃ dayātprayatnataḥ ||
evaṃ kṛte śriyaṃ devā varṣaṃte kāmanā nṛṇām || 48 ||
ityevaṃ śāṃtikādhyāyaṃ yaḥ paṭhecchṛṇuyādapi ||
vidhinā sarvalokastu dhyāyamāno divākaram|| 49 ||
sa vijitya raṇe śatruṃ mānaṃ ca paramaṃ labhet ||
akṣayaṃ modate kālamatiraskṛtaśāsanaḥ || 1.180.50 ||
vyādhibhirnābhibhūyeta putrapautraiḥ pratiṣṭhitaḥ ||
bhavedādityasadṛśastejasā prabhayā tathā || 51 ||
yānuddiśya paṭhedvīra vācako mānavo bhuvi||
na pīḍyate ca tai rogairvātapittakaphātmakaiḥ || 52 ||
nākāle maraṇaṃ tasya na sarpaiścāpi daśyate ||
na viṣaṃ kramate dehe na jaḍāṃdhyaṃ na mūkatā || 53 ||
na cotpatti bhayaṃ tasya nābhicārakajaṃ bhavet ||
ye rogā ye mahotpātā ye.ahayaśca mahāviṣāḥ ||
te sarve praśamaṃ yāṃti śravaṇādasya bhārata|||54 ||
yatpuṇyaṃ sarva tīrthānāṃ gaṃgādīnāṃ viśeṣataḥ ||
tatpuṇyaṃ koṭiguṇitaṃ prāpnoti śravaṇādibhiḥ || 55 ||
daśānāṃ rājasūyānāmanyeṣāṃ ca viśeṣataḥ ||
jīvedvarṣaśataṃ sāgraṃ sarvavyādhivivarjitaḥ || 56 ||
goghnaścaiva kṛtaghnaśca brahmahā gurutalpagaḥ ||
śaraṇāgatadīnārtamitraviśrabhaghātakaḥ || 57 |||
duṣṭaḥ pāpasamācāraḥ pitṛhā mātṛhā tathā ||
śravaṇādasya pāpebhyo mucyate nātra saṃśayaḥ || 58 ||
itihāsamimaṃ puṇyamagnikāryamanuttamam ||
na dadyātkasyacidvīra mūrkhasya kaluṣātmanaḥ || 59 ||
sūryabhakte sadā deyaṃ sūryeṇa kathitaṃ purā ||
aruṇasya mahābāho garuḍasyāruṇena ca || 1.180.60 ||
garuḍena purā proktaṃ bhojakānāṃ mahātmanām ||
sūryaśarmasukhādīnāṃ śākadvīpe mahīpate || 61 ||
taiścāpi kathitaṃ puṇyaṃ munervyāsasya dhīmataḥ ||
tenāpi kathitaṃ puṇyaṃ sarvapāpabhayāpaham || 62 || ||
iti śrībhaviṣye mahāpurāṇe brāhme parvaṇi saptamīkalpe garuḍāruṇasaṃvāde śāṃtikaṃ varṇanaṃ nāmāśītyuttaraśatatamo.adhyāyaḥ || 180 || cha ||
smṛtibhedavarṇanam
|| śatānīka uvāca|| ||
paṃcaprakāraṃ dharmaṃ me vada smārtaṃ yathākramam ||
kautukaṃ pṛccha te brahmansamāsavyāsayogataḥ || 1 ||
|| sumanturuvāca || ||
paṃcadhā varṇitaṃ dharmaṃ śṛṇu rājansamāsataḥ ||
yathoktaṃ bhāskareṇeha aruṇasya mahātmanaḥ || 2 ||
sahasrakiraṇaṃ bhānumudayasthaṃ divākaram ||
praṇamya śirasā devamuvāca garuḍāgrajaḥ || 3 ||
bhagavandevadeveśa sahasrakiraṇojjvala ||
smṛtidharmānyathātattvaṃ vaktumarhasi pṛcchataḥ || 4 ||
evaṃ pṛṣṭastu bhagavānaruṇena khagādhipaḥ ||
uvāca parayā prītyā pūjayitvā mahīpate || 5 ||
|| || bhāskara uvāca || ||
smṛtidharmaṃ vedamūlaṃ śṛṇu tvaṃ garuḍāgraja ||
pūrvānubhūtaṃ yaddhyānamatha tatsmaraṇaṃ smṛtiḥ || 6 ||
dharmaḥ kriyātmā nirdiṣṭaḥ śreyobhyudayalakṣaṇaḥ ||
sa ca pañcavidhaḥ prokto vedamūlaḥ sanātanaḥ || 7 ||
asya śabdasyānuṣṭhānātsvargo mokṣaśca jāyate ||
iha loke sukhaiśvaryamalaṃ yacca khagādhipa || 8 ||
|| anūruruvāca || ||
kathaṃ paṃcavidho hyeṣa prokto dharmaḥ sanātanaḥ ||
kasya bhedāstu te paṃca brūhi me devasattama || 9 || ||
|| bhāskara uvāca || ||
vedadharmaḥ smṛtastveka āśramāṇāṃ sa tatparaḥ ||
varṇāśramastṛtīyastu guṇanaimittiko yathā || 1.181.10 ||
varṇatvamekamāśritya adhikāre pravartate ||
savarṇāśramadaṃḍastu bhikṣā daṃḍādiko yathā ||11||
varṇāśramāśramatvaṃ ca yodhikṛtya pravartate||
sa varṇāśramadharmastu daṃḍādyā mekhalā yathā ||12||
yo guṇena pravarteta sa guṇo dharma ucyate ||
yathā mūrdhābhiṣiktasya prajānāṃ pālanaṃ param ||13||
nimittamekamāśritya yo dharmaḥ saṃpravartate ||
naimittikaḥ sa vijñeyo jātidravyaguṇāśrayaḥ ||14||
eṣa tu dvividhaḥ proktaḥ samāsādaviśeṣataḥ ||
naimittikaḥ sa vijñeyaḥ prāyaścittavidhiryathā || 15 ||
sa caturdhā nirūpyastu svarūpaphalasādhanaiḥ ||
pramāṇatastu pratyekasamastaiśca yathākramam || 16 ||
śrutyā saha virodhe tu bādhyate viṣayaṃ vinā ||
vyavasthayā virodhena kāryo yatnaḥ parīkṣyate ||17||
smṛtyā saha virodhena cārthaśāstrasya sādhanam ||
parasparavirodhe tu arthaśāstrasya sādhanam ||18||
adṛṣṭārthe vikalpastu vyavasthāsaṃbhave sati ||
smṛtiśāstravikalpastu ākāṃkṣāpūraṇe sati || 19 ||
vedamūle sthitaṃ tvetadanuṣṭhānaṃ kriyā satī ||
evaṃ śakyavidhānaṃ tu nyāyo hyevaṃ vyavasthitaḥ || 1.181.20 ||
niṣedhavidhirūpaṃ tu dvidhā śāstraṃ khagādhipa ||
ekarūpaṃ vadaṃtyanye bahurūpamathā pare || 21 ||
paṃcaprakārāḥ smṛtaya evaṃ śiṣyavyavasthitāḥ ||
tridhā caturdhā dvedhā vā ekadhā bahudhā khaga || 22 ||
dṛṣṭārthā tu smṛtiḥ kācidadṛṣṭārthā tathāparā ||
anuvādasmṛtistvanyā dṛṣṭādṛṣṭā tu paṃcamī ||
sarvā etā vedamūlāḥ smṛtā vai ṛṣibhiḥ svayam || 23 || ||
|| aruṇa uvāca || ||
yā etā bhavatā proktāḥ smṛtayaḥ parvagopane ||
etāsāṃ lakṣaṇaṃ brūhi samāsādeva sattama || 24 ||
dṛṣṭārthā kā matā deva adṛṣṭārthā ca kā bhavet ||
dṛṣṭādṛṣṭasvarūpā kā nyāyamūlā ca kā bhavet ||
anuvādasmṛtiḥ kā syādṛṣṭādṛṣṭā tu kā bhavet || 25 ||
evamukto mahātejā bhāskaro vāritaskaraḥ ||
uvāca taṃ khagaṃ vīraṃ praṇataṃ vinayānvitam || 26 ||
|| āditya uvāca || ||
ṣaḍguṇasya svarūpaṃ tu prayogā tkāryagauravāt ||
samayānāmupāyānāṃ yogo vyāsasamāsataḥ || 27 ||
adhyakṣāṇāṃ ca nikṣepaḥ karaṇānāṃ nirūpaṇam ||
dṛṣṭārtheyaṃ smṛtiḥ proktā ṛṣibhirgaruḍāgraja || 28 ||
saṃdhyopāstistathā kāryā śuno māṃsaṃ na bhakṣayet ||
adṛṣṭārthā smṛtiḥ proktā manunā vinatātmaja || 29 ||
pālāśaṃ dhārayeddaṃḍamubhayārthā vidurbudhāḥ ||
virodhe tu vikalpaḥ syādyāgo homastato yathā || 1.181.30 ||
śrutau dṛṣṭaṃ yathā kāryaṃ smṛto tattādṛśaṃ yadi ||
uktānuvādinī sā tu pārivrājyaṃ tathā gṛhāt || 31 ||
ukto dharmaśca saṃkṣepātparibhāṣā ca tadgatā ||
tatsādhanaṃ ca deśādi itthamityabravīdraviḥ || 32 ||
brahmāvartaḥ paro deśa ṛṣiśastastvanaṃtaraḥ ||
madhyadeśastato.apyanya āryāvartastvanaṃtaraḥ || 33 ||
kṛṣṇasārastu vicarenmṛgo yatra svabhāvataḥ ||
yajñiyaḥ sa tu deśaḥ syānmlecchadeśastataḥ paraḥ || 34 ||
brahmādīnāṃ ca devānāṃ brāhmaṇādestathaiva ca ||
bhūtagrāmasya kṛtsnasya trayaṃ kṛtsnasya khecara || || 35 ||
sādhanatvaṃ manuḥ prāha vedamūlaṃ sanātanam ||
prakāśayajñasaṃsiddhyai yadaśabdasya eva tu || 36 ||
upalabhya yathātattvaṃ sa ca darśitavānṛṣiḥ ||
samyaksaṃsādhanaṃ dharmaḥ kartavyastvadhikāriṇā || 37 ||
niṣkāmena sadā vīra kāmyaṃ rūpānvitena ca ||
ācārayuktaḥ śraddhālurvedajño.adhyātmaciṃtakaḥ ||
karmaṇāṃ phalamāpnoti nyāyārjitadhanaśca yaḥ || 38 ||
|| aruṇa uvāca || ||
brahmāvartādideśānāṃ samastānāṃ vibhāvaso ||
vibhāgaṃ brūhi deveṃdra saṃmānaya grahādhipa || 39 ||
|| āditya uvāca || ||
sarasvatīdṛṣadvatyordevanadyoryadaṃtaram ||
taṃ devanirmitaṃ deśaṃ brahmāvartaṃ pracakṣate || 1.181.40 ||
himavadviṃdhyadharayoryadaṃtaramudāhṛtam ||
pratyageva prayāgācca madhyadeśaḥ prakīrtitaḥ ||
āsamudrāttu vai pūrvādāsamudrāttu paścimāt || 41 ||
tayorevāṃtaraṃ giryorāryāvartaṃ vidurbudhāḥ || āryāvarta
etānvijñāya saddeśāntsaṃśrayeta prayatnataḥ || 42 ||
śūdrastu yasmiṃstasminvā nivasedvṛttikarśitaḥ ||
eṣā dharmasya vai jyotiḥ samāsātkathitā tava || 43 || ||
iti śrībhaviṣye mahāpurāṇe brāhme parvaṇi saptamīkalpe sauradharmeṣu aruṇādityasaṃvāde smṛtibhedavarṇanaṃ nāmaikāśītyuttaraśatatamo.adhyāyaḥ || 181 || ||9
vivāhavidhivarṇanam
|| || āditya uvāca || ||
uktaṃ dharmasya rūpaṃ tu sādhikāraṃ sanātanam ||
ataḥ paraṃ pravakṣyāmi dharmamāśramiṇāṃ khaga || 1 ||
brahmacārī gṛhasthaśca vanastho bhikṣureva ca ||
catvāra āśramāḥ proktā eka eva caturvidhaḥ || 2 ||
gāyatro brahmacārī tu prājāpatyo dvitīyakaḥ ||
devavratastṛtīyastu naiṣṭhikastu caturthakaḥ || 3 ||
catvāra āśramāḥ proktāḥ savedāḥ samadharmakāḥ ||
ataḥ paraṃ pravakṣyāmi saṃskāraṃ dharmasiddhaye || 4 ||
garbhādhānamṛtau kāryaṃ hṛṣṭayostu samantrakam ||
kāryaṃ puṃsavanaṃ mātustṛtīye māsi saṃyutaiḥ || 5 ||
sīmantaḥ saptame garbhe ṣaṣṭhe vā saptame.api vā ||
pātrasaṃskārakā iṣṭā garbhādhānādayastrayaḥ || 6 ||
jātakarmādayaḥ sarve saṃskārāḥ puruṣasya tu ||
jātasya prāśanaṃ yatra svarṇā dīnāṃ samantrakam || 7 ||
jātakarmeti tatproktaṃ guhyaṃ nāma tadaiva tu ||
prakāśo nāma kartavyaṃ dine tvekādaśerthavat || 8 ||
dharmaśāstrādisaṃyuktaṃ ṣaṣṭhe.annaprāśanaṃ khaga ||
prathame.abde tṛtīye vā cūḍākarma vidhīyate || 9 ||
aṣṭame daśame vāpi brāhmaṇasyopanāyanam ||
puruṣasya tathā cānyajātīyānāṃ viśeṣataḥ || 1.182.10 ||
ekādaśe dvādaśe vā kārya kṣatriyavaiśyayoḥ ||
vedasaṃskārakaṃ vacmi manyante tvaupanāyanam || 11 ||
puruṣasya tathā cānya ubhayośca bravīmyaham ||
sāvitraṃ vaidikaṃ caiva mahānāmnīmahāvratam || 12 ||
tathaupaniṣadaṃ cābdaṃ godānaṃ ca suvarṇakam ||
vratāni grahaṇārthāni vedasyeti manormatam || 13 ||
vedaikadeśapāṭhasya uktaṃ gṛhye prapañcakam ||
uktā gurostu śuśrūṣā dṛṣṭādṛṣṭārthasādhanam || 14 ||
ubhayorvā tathā cānyā yathānyāyaṃ yathāśrutam ||
gurorapyeva taṃ vidyāttaddhyānaṃ trividhaṃ smṛtam || 15 ||
toṣaḥ parasparasyeti etāvāndharmasaṃgrahaḥ ||
kṛtsno vedo.adhigaṃtavyaḥ svadharmamanutiṣṭhatā || 16 ||
jñātvā vedaṃ brahmacārī graṃthārthānyānyathāvidhi ||
naiṣṭhikaśca vidhānaṃ tu yāvatklībaṃ vidhīyate ||
vidyānte.abhīṣṭadānaṃ ca anujñāto gṛhī bhavet || 17 ||
niṣkāsanaṃ gurugṛhādgṛhasthasya yathābhavet ||
naiṣṭhikaśca tathā snānaṃ kuryātsamyagyathāvidhi || 18 ||
udvahedvai tato bhāryāṃ savarṇāṃ lakṣaṇānvitām ||
aviplutabrahmacaryaścādhikārī khagottama || 19 ||
svatantramanye cecchanti hyadhikāraṃ dvijottamāḥ ||
saptamīṃ pañcamīṃ caiva kanyakāṃ pitṛmātṛtaḥ || 1.182.20 ||
udvaheta dvijo bhāryāmasamānārṣagotrajām ||
saṃkhyāvidhivivāheṣu gotrārthaṃ vidhivarjitam || 21 |||
vikalpenaiva mantavyamṛṣīṇāṃ vividhā śrutiḥ ||
aṣṭau vivāhā varṇānāṃ saṃskārākhyā iti śrutiḥ || 22 ||
yastu doṣavatīṃ kanyāmanākhyāya praya cchati ||
tasya kuryānnṛpo daṃḍaṃ svayaṃ ṣaṇṇavatiṃ paṇān ||23||
piturgṛhe tu yā kanyā rajaḥ paśyatyasaṃskṛtā ||
pataṃti pitarastasya kanyā ca vṛṣalī bhavet || 24 ||
yastu tāṃ varayetkanyāṃ brāhmaṇo jñānadurbalaḥ ||
aśrāddheyamapāṅkteyaṃ taṃ vidyādvṛṣalīpatim || 25 ||
sarvadoṣānhi vikhyāpya striyā vā puruṣasya vā ||
ubhayorapi vikhyāpya tataḥ saṃbandhamācaret || 26 ||
gaurī kanyā pradhānā vai madhyamā kanyakā smṛtā ||
rohiṇī tatsamā jñeyā adhamā tu rajasvalā || 27 ||
|| anūruruvāca || ||
gaurī tu kā matā kanyā rohiṇī ca jagatpate ||
rajasvalā nagnikā ca devakanyā ca kā bhavet || 28 ||
|| bhāskara uvāca || ||
asaṃprāptarajā gaurī prāpte rajasi rohiṇī ||
avyañjanayutā kanyā kucahīnā ca nagnikā || 29 ||
saptavarṣā bhavedgaurī daśavarṣā tu nagnikā ||
dvādaśe tu bhavetkanyā ata ūrdhvaṃ rajasvalā || 1.182.30 ||
vyañjanena samopetāṃ somo bhuṅkte hi kanyakām ||
payodhareṣu gaṃdharvā rajasyagniḥ prakīrtitaḥ || 31 ||
hinasti vyañjanaiḥ putrānkulaṃ hanyātpayodharaiḥ ||
gatimiṣṭāṃ tathā lokānhanyāttu rajasā pituḥ || 32 || tasmādavyañjanopetāmarajaskapayodharām ||
nānyopabhuktāṃ somādyairdadyādduhitaraṃ pitā || 33 ||
annaṃ tasya na bhoktavyaṃ vṛthā pāko hi sa smṛtaḥ ||
vṛthā pākasya bhuktvānnaṃ prāyaścittaṃ samācaret ||34||
prāṇāyāmaṃ trirabhyasya ghṛtaṃ prāśya viśuddhyati ||
vivāhayedekagotrāṃ samānapravarāṃ khaga ||
kṛtvā tasyāṃ samutsargamatikṛcchro viśodhanam || 35 ||
udvāhayetsagotrāṃ ca tanayāṃ mātulasya ca ||
ṛṣibhiścaiva tulyo yo dvijaścāṃdrāyaṇaṃ caret || 36 ||
asapiṇḍā tu yā māturasagotrā ca yā pituḥ ||
sā praśastā dvijātīnāṃ dārakarmaṇi maithune || 37 || ||
|| aruṇa uvāca || ||
dārakarma kimuktaṃ vai yaduktaṃ bhavatā idam ||
sā praśastā dvijātīnāṃ dārakarmaṇi maithune || 38 ||
|| āditya uvāca || ||
agnihotrādi yatkarma vaidikaṃ vinatātmaja ||
taduktaṃ dārakarmeti dvābhyāṃ yogāttu maithune ||39||
nodvahetkapilāṃ kanyāṃ nādhikāṃgīṃ na rogiṇīm ||
nālomikāṃ nātilomāṃ na cākūṭāṃ na piṅgalām ||1.182.40||
ṛkṣavṛkṣanadīnāmnīṃ nānyaparvatanāmikām ||
na yakṣāhipreṣyanāmnīṃ cātibhīṣaṇanāmikām||41||
yasyāstu na bhavedbhrātā na vijñāyeta vai pitā ||
nopagaccheddhi tāṃ prājñaḥ putrikādharmaśaṃkayā ||42||
haṃsasvarāmekavarṇāṃ madhupiṃgalalocanām ||
tādṛśīṃ varayetkanyāṃ gṛhārthī khagasattama || 43 ||
dārāgnihotrasaṃyogaṃ kurute yo.agraje sthite ||
parivettā sa vijñeyaḥ parivittistu pūrvajaḥ ||44 ||
parivittiḥ parivettā ca yayā sa parividyate ||
sarve te narakaṃ yāṃti dātṛyājakapaṃcamāḥ || 45 ||
klībe deśāṃtarasthe vā patite vrajite tathā ||
yogaśāstrābhiyukte ca na doṣaḥ parivedane ||46||
khaṃjavāmanakubjeṣu gadgadeṣu jaḍeṣu ca ||
jātyaṃdhe badhire mūke na doṣaḥ parivedane || 47 ||
na śrāddhaṃ tu kaniṣṭhasya vikulāya ca kanyakā ||
varaśca kulaśīlābhyāṃ na śuddhyeta kadācana ||
na maṃtrāḥ kāraṇaṃ tatra na ca kanyā vṛtā bhavet || 48 ||
udvāhitā tu yākanyā na ca prāptā tu maithunam ||
punarabhyeti bhartāraṃ yathā kanyā tathaiva sā || 49 ||
samākṣipya matāṃ kanyāṃ pitā tvakṣatayonikām ||
kulaśīlavate dadyānna syāddoṣaḥ khagādhipa || 1.182.50 ||
|| anūruruvāca || ||
ete.aṣṭau prabhavāḥ proktā vivāhā ye jagatpate ||
lakṣaṇaṃ brūhi caiteṣāṃ samāsāttimirāpaha || 51 ||
|| āditya uvāca || ||
śubhāṃ lakṣaṇasaṃpannāṃ kulaśīlaguṇānvitām ||
alaṃkṛtyārhate dānaṃ vivāho brāhma ucyate || 52 ||
saha dharmakriyāhetordānaṃ samayabaṃdhanāt ||
alaṃkṛtyaiva kanyāyāḥ prājāpatyaḥ sa ucyate || 53 ||
pradānaṃ yatra kanyāyāḥ sahagomithunena tu ||
savarṇāyāḥ sagotrāyāstamārṣamṛṣayo viduḥ|| 54 ||
aṃtarvedyāṃ samānīya kanyāṃ kanakamaṃḍitām ||
ṛtvije caiva yaddānaṃ vivāho daivasaṃjñakaḥ || 55 ||
ete vivāhāścatvāro dharmakāmārthadāyakāḥ ||
aśulkā brahmaṇā proktāstārayaṃti kuladvayam || 56 ||
caturṣveteṣu dattāyāmutpanno yaḥ sutaḥ striyām ||
dātuḥ pratigrahītuśca punātyāsaptamānpitṛrn || 57 ||
vivikte svayamanyo.anyaṃ strīpuṃsoryaḥ samāgamaḥ ||
prītihetuḥ sa gāṃdharvo vivāhaḥ paṃcamo mataḥ ||58||
hatvā cchittvā ca bhittvā ca krośaṃtīṃ rudatīṃ gṛhāt||
prasahya kanyāharaṇaṃ rākṣasodvāha ucyate||59||
śulkaṃ pradāya kanyāyā haraṇaṃ vyasanādapi||
prasāda heturuktoyamāsuraḥ saptamastathā || 1.182.60 ||
suptāṃ mattāṃ pramattāṃ vā raho yatropagacchati ||
sa pāpiṣṭho vivāhānāṃ paiśācaścāṣṭamodhamaḥ || 61 ||
etānsaśulkānsāmānyānvivāhāṃścaturo viduḥ ||
kevalaṃ kṣatriyasyaiva vīryaṃ chittvā hi rākṣasaḥ || 62 ||
prāpte pūrvavivāhe tu vidhirvaivāhikaḥ śivaḥ ||
kartavyastu tribhirvarṇaiḥ samayenāgnisākṣikaḥ || 63 ||
doṣavatyāḥ pradāne tu dātuḥ ṣaṇṇavatirdamaḥ ||
syāttu śulkapradāne ca kanyāyāścāpavarjane ||64||
mokṣopavartanaṃ dveṣaḥ strīdhanasya nivartanam ||
ākāṃkṣā tīrthasaṃrodhastyāgahetuśca vakṣyate || 65 ||
parasparasya saṃbaṃdhānmokṣaḥ strīpuṃsayoḥ smṛtaḥ ||
na syādanyataraḥ prīto roṣātsāṃpratikādapi || 66 ||
bādhate cetpatirbhāryāṃ sa tu dveṣa iti smṛtaḥ ||
vṛttirābharaṇaṃ śulkaṃ lābhaśca strīdhanaṃ bhavet||67||
bhoktṛstu svayamevedaṃ pratijñāhananaṃ bhavet ||
vṛthā mokṣeṇa bhogena striyai dadyātsavṛddhikam ||68||
āpattisamaye jāte strīdhanaṃ bhoktumarhati ||
ākāṃkṣetāṣṭavarṣāṇi bhartāpi prasavaṃ striyāḥ || 69 ||
jāyante yadi no putrāstasyāṃ yatne mahatyapi ||
tato viṃdeta putrārthī dharmataḥ kulajāṃ striyam|| 1.182.70 ||
putralābhātparaṃ loke nāsti hi prasavārthinaḥ ||
etāṃ śulkasya tāṃ bhuktvā anyāṃ labdhuṃ yadīcchati ||
samastāstoṣayitvārthaiḥ sūryoḍhāṃ paramāṃ varet||71||
ekā śūdrasya vaiśyasya dve tisraḥ kṣatriyasya tu||
catasro brāhmaṇasya syurbhāryā rājño yatheṣṭataḥ || 72 ||
atīrthagamanātpuṃsastīrthe saṃgāhanātstriyāḥ ||
ubhayordharmalopaḥ syātsveṣveva tu viśeṣataḥ || 73 ||
yaugapadye tu tīrthānāṃ vivāhakramaśo vrajet ||
tatsāmyaṃ jīvaputrā vā grahaṇakramaśopi vā||74||
brāhmādibhirvivāhaistu saṃskṛtau tau khagādhipa ||
aṣṭau vivāhā varṇānāṃ vainateya uśaṃti vai || 75||
brāhmo daivastathārṣaśca prājāpatyaḥ khagā dhipa ||
gāṃdharvaścāsuro rakṣaḥ paiśācastvaṣṭamo.adhamaḥ || 76 ||
praśastāḥ kṣatriyādīnāṃ viprādīnāṃ tu mānataḥ ||
pratigrahādayo baddhā vivāhā brāhmaṇasya tu ||77||
kṣatriyasyāpi deyā tu pratigrahavivarjitā ||
pravṛttiṃ kecidicchaṃti dānamityapare striyāḥ ||
pāvanaṃ puruṣāṇāṃ tu vivāhaṃ paricakṣate ||78||
iti śrībhaviṣye mahāpurāṇe saptamīkalpe brāhme parvaṇi sūryāruṇasaṃvāde vivāhavidhivarṇanaṃ nāma dvyaśītyuttaraśatatamo.adhyāyaḥ || 182 |||7||
śrāddhavidhikathāvarṇanam
bhāskara uvāca||
kuryātpaṃcamahāyajñānadhikāro dvijasya saḥ||
bhūtapitramarabrahmamanuṣyāṇāṃ yathāvidhi||1||
sadā sadāna kṛtyānāṃ phalārthamapare sthitāḥ||
nityānitya miti prāhuranuṣaṃgātphalaṃ pare ||2||
atitheḥ paritoṣāya paricaryā vidhīyate ||
adṛṣṭaniyamādṛṣṭamārogyāntaṃ ca varjanam ||3||
tisroṣṭakāstu kartavyā madhyāvartī caturthikā||
śākapāyasapūpaistu māṃsena tu caturthikā||4||
pratipadi kriyate yattu catuṣpārvaṇamucyate ||
svagṛhyoktavidhānena tattu pakṣādi kīrtyate||5||
nityaṃ naimittikaṃ kāmyaṃ vṛddhiśrāddhaṃ sapiṃḍanam||
pārvaṇaṃ ceti vijñeyaṃ goṣṭhaśuddhyarthamuttamam||
karmāṃgaṃ navamaṃ proktaṃ vaidikaṃ daśamaṃ smṛtam ||6|| ||
|| anūruruvāca || ||
yadetadbhavatā proktaṃ śrāddhaṃ dvādaśadhā vibho ||
tasya sarvasya mā brūhi lakṣaṇaṃ vai pṛthakpṛthak || 7 ||
nityaṃ kimucyate śrāddhaṃ kiṃ vā naimittikaṃ bhavet ||
kāmyādi devadeveśa eteṣāṃ lakṣaṇaṃ vada || 8 ||
|| āditya uvāca || ||
ahanyahani yacchrāddhaṃ tannityaṃ khaga kīrtitam ||
vaiśvadevavihīnaṃ tu aśaktāvudakena tu || 9 ||
ekoddiṣṭaṃ tu yacchrāddhaṃ tannaimittikamucyate ||
tatsadaiva prakartavyamayugmānbhojayeddvijān || 1.183.10 ||
kāmayuktaṃ hi tatkāmyamabhipretārthasiddhaye ||
pārvaṇena vidhānena tadapyuktaṃ khagādhipa || 11 ||
vṛddhau yatkriyate śrāddhaṃ vṛddhiśrāddhaṃ taducyate ||
sarvaṃ pradakṣiṇaṃ kāryaṃ pūrvāhṇe tūpavītinā ||12||
gaṃdhodakatilairyuktaṃ kuryātpātracatuṣṭayam||
arghārthaṃ pitṛpātreṣu pretapātraṃ pramocayet ||13||
ye samānā iti dvābhyāmetajjñeyaṃ sapiṃḍanam ||
nityena tulyaṃ śeṣaṃ syādekoddiṣṭaṃ striyā api||14||
darśe vai kriyate yattu tatpārvaṇamudāhṛtam ||
parvaṇi kriyate yacca tatpārvaṇamiti sthitiḥ ||
gobhyaśca kriyate śrāddhaṃ tadgoṣṭhaśrāddhamucyate || 15 ||
bahūnāṃ viduṣāṃ saṃpatsukhārthaṃ pitṛtṛptaye ||
kriyate śuddhaye yadvai brāhmaṇānāṃ ca bhojanam ||
śudyarthamiti tatproktaṃ vainateya manīṣibhiḥ || 16 ||
niṣekakāle some ca sīmatonnayane tathā ||
jñeyaṃ puṃsavanaṃ śrāddhaṃ tacca karmāṃgameva ca || || 17 ||
kriyate devamuddiśya saptamyādiṣu yatnataḥ ||
gaccheddeśāṃtare yastu śrāddhaṃ kuryāttu sarpiṣā ||
tadyatnārthamiti proktaṃ pradiśecca na saṃśayaḥ ||18||
śarīropacaye śrāddhamaśvavṛddhyarthameva ca ||
puṣṭyarthametadvijñeyamaupacārikamucyate || 19 ||
sarveṣāmeva śrāddhānāṃ śreṣṭhaṃ sāṃvatsaraṃ matam ||
kiyate yatkhagaśreṣṭha mṛtehani budhaiḥ saha || 1.183.20 ||
mṛte.ahani punaryastu na kuryācchrāddhamādarāt ||
mātuśca khagaśārdūla vatsarāṃte mṛte.ahani || 21 ||
nāhaṃ tasya khagaśreṣṭha pūjāṃ gṛhṇāmi no hariḥ ||
na brahmā na ca vai rudro na cānye devatāgaṇāḥ || 22 ||
tasmādyatnena kartavyaṃ varṣevarṣe mṛte.ahani ||
nareṇa khagaśārdūla bhojakena viśeṣataḥ || 23 ||
bhojako yastu vai śrāddhaṃ na karoti khagādhipa ||
mātāpitṛbhyāṃ satataṃ varṣevarṣe mṛte.ahani |||27|
sa yāti narakaṃ ghoraṃ tāmisraṃ nāma nāmataḥ ||
tato bhavati duṣṭātmā nagare sūkaraḥ khaga || 25 ||
anūruruvāca || ||
na jānāti dinaṃ yastu na māsaṃ vibudhādhipa ||
mṛtau yatra mahāprājña pitarau sa kathaṃ naraḥ ||
śrāddhaṃ karotu vai tābhyāṃ vidhivadvatsarātmakam || 26 ||
|| āditya uvāca || ||
na jānāti naro yastu mṛtānāṃ vinatātmaja ||
māsaṃ dinaṃ mṛtānāṃ tu pitṛrṇāṃ khagasattama || 27 ||
yathā kuryātkhagaśreṣṭha śṛṇu kṛtsnaṃ samāsataḥ ||
mṛtāhaṃ yo na jānāti mānavo vinatātmaja || 28 ||
tena kāryamamāyāṃ ca śrāddhaṃ sāṃvatsaraṃ khaga ||
māse mārgaśire vīra māghe vā vidhivatkhaga || || 29 ||
viśeṣato bhojanena yo māṃ pūjyate sadā ||
prītaye mama vai tena saṃpūjyāḥ pitaraḥ sadā || 1.183.30 ||
mameṣṭāḥ pitaro nityaṃ gāvo viprāśca suvrata ||
tasmācca te sadā pūjyā madbhaktena viśeṣataḥ || 31 ||
iti śrībhaviṣye mahāpurāṇe brāhme parvaṇi saptamīkalpe sauradharme śrāddhavidhikathanaṃ nāma tryaśītyuttaraśatatamo.adhyāyaḥ ||183|| ||
brāhmaṇadharmavidhivarṇanam
prakhyāte pratyayenaiva praśnapūrvaṃ pratigrahaḥ ||
yajane.adhyāpane vāde ṣaḍvidho vedavikrayaḥ || 1 ||
veda vikrayanirdiṣṭaṃ striyā cāvarjitaṃ dhanam ||
na deyaṃ pitṛdevebhyo yacca klībātkhagādhipa || 2 ||
anuyogena yo dadyādbrāhmaṇāya pratigraham ||
sa pūrvaṃ narakaṃ yāti brāhmaṇāstadanaṃtaram || 3 ||
vedākṣarāṇi yāvaṃti niyujyanterthakāraṇāt ||
tāvatyo bhrūṇahatyā vai vedavikrayamāpnuyāt || 4 ||
vaiśvadevena yo hīna ādityasya ca karmaṇaḥ ||
sarve te vṛṣalā jñeyāḥ prāptavedāśca brāhmaṇāḥ ||5||
yeṣāmadhyayanaṃ nāsti ye ca kecidanagnayaḥ||
kulaṃ vā.aśrotriyaṃ yeṣāṃ sarve te śūdradharmiṇaḥ || 6 ||
akṛtvā vaiśvadevaṃ tu yo bhuṅkte so.abudhaḥ khaga ||
vṛthā tenānnapākena yamayoniṃ vrajettu saḥ || 7 ||
priyo vā yadi vā dveṣyo mūrkhaḥ paṃḍita eva ca ||
vaiśvadeve tu saṃprāpte so.atithiḥ svargasaṃkramaḥ || 8 ||
naikagrāmīṇamatithiṃ viprasāṃgatikaṃ tathā ||
aciṃtyobhyāgato yasmāttasmādatithirucyate || 9 ||
aciṃtyaḥ sa tu vai nāmnā vaiśvadeva upāgataḥ ||
atithiṃ taṃ vijānīyānna punaḥ pūrvamāgataḥ || 1.184.10 ||
yāvacca prāpnuyādannaṃ kṛtāśīḥ snātako dvijaḥ ||
tasyānnasya caturbhāgaṃ haṃtakāraṃ viduḥ khaga||11||
grāsamātrā bhavedbhikṣā catuṣkālaṃ caturguṇam ||
puṣkalāni ca catvāri haṃtakāro vidhīyate || 12 ||
ārūḍho naiṣṭhikaṃ dharmaṃ yastu pracyavate punaḥ ||
cāṃdrāyaṇaṃ carenmāsamiti viddhi khagādhipa || 13 ||
ārūḍhapatitāpatyā brāhmaṇo vṛṣalena ca ||
dvāvetau viddhi cāṃḍālau veditrādyaśca jāyate || 14 ||
brāhmaṇī kulaṭā nityaṃ svakaṃ tyaktvā patiṃ khaga ||
anyasya viśate gehe brāhmaṇasya khagādhipa||15||
utpadyate tu yastasyā brāhmaṇena mahāmate ||
sa cāṃḍālo mahānprokto mahācāṃḍāla ityuta||16||
yastu pravrajito bhūtvā punaḥ sevati maithunam||
ṣaṣṭivarṣasahasrāṇi viṣṭhāyāṃ jāyate krimiḥ ||
paṃcagavyena śuddhiḥ syādityāha mama dehakṛt||17||
abhojyaṃ brāhmaṇasyānnaṃ vṛṣalena nimaṃtritam ||
tathaiva vṛṣalasyānnaṃ brāhmaṇena nimaṃtritam ||18||
brāhmaṇānnaṃ dadacchūdraḥ śūdrānnaṃ brāhmaṇo dadat ||
ubhāvetāvabhojyānnau bhuktvā cāṃdrāyaṇaṃ caret ||19||
upanikṣepadharmeṇa śūdrānnaṃ ca paceddvijaḥ ||
abhojyaṃ tadbhavedannaṃ sa ca vipraḥ purohitaḥ ||1.184.20||
śūdrānnaṃ śūdrasaṃparkaṃ śūdreṇa saha vāsanam ||
śūdrājjñānāgamaḥ kaścijvalaṃtamapi pātayet ||21||
śūdrānnopahatā viprā vihvalā ratilālasāḥ ||
kupitāḥ kiṃ kariṣyaṃti nirviṣā iva pannagāḥ || 22 ||
hastadattāstu ye snehāllavaṇavyaṃjanādayaḥ ||
dātāraṃ nādhitiṣṭhaṃti bhoktā bhuṃkte tu kilbiṣam || 23 ||
āyasena tu pātreṇa yadannamupadīyate ||
bhoktā viṣṭhāśanaṃ bhuṃkte dātā tu narakaṃ vrajet || 24 ||
aṃgulyā daṃtakāṣṭhaṃ yatpratyakṣalavaṇaṃ ca yat ||
mṛttikābhakṣaṇaṃ caiva tulyaṃ gomāṃsabhakṣaṇaiḥ || 25 ||
mukhe paryuṣite nityaṃ bhavatyaprayato dvijaḥ ||
tasmācchuṣkamathārdraṃ vā bhakṣayeddaṃtadhāvanam || 26 ||
puṣpālaṃkāravastrāṇi gaṃdha mālyānulepanam||
upavāse na duṣyaṃti daṃtadhāvanamaṃjanam ||27||
gṛhāṃte vasate mūrkho dūre cāsya guṇānvitaḥ ||
guṇanvite ca dātavyaṃ nāsti mūrkhavya tikramaḥ || 28 ||
brāhmaṇātikramo nāsti vipre vedavivarjite ||
jvalaṃtamagnimutsṛjya na hi bhasmani hūyate || 29 ||
sannikṛṣṭamadhīyānaṃ brāhmaṇaṃ yo vyatikramet||
bhojanenaiva dānena dahatyāsaptamaṃ kulam || 1.184.30 ||
|| anūruruvāca || ||
evameva jagannātha devadeva jagatpate ||
kiṃ tu yatte purā deva śrutaṃ vākyaṃ mahātmanaḥ || 31 ||
gadato nāradasyaiva śṛṇu tvaṃ vibudhādhipa ||
gadato me suraśreṣṭha dharmyamarthaṃ sukhāvaham || 32 ||
satyaniṣṭhaṃ dvijaṃ yastu śuklajātiṃ priyaṃvadam ||
mūrkhaṃ pākhaṃḍinaṃ vāpi vṛttihīnamathāpi vā || 33 ||
atikramya naro ghoraṃ narakaṃ pātayetkhaga||
sapta parānsapta pūrvānpuruṣānātmanā saha || 34 ||
tasmānnātikramedrājā brāhmaṇaṃ prātiveśikam ||
saṃbandhatastathāsannaṃ dauhitraṃ vidyate tathā || 35 ||
bhāgineyaṃ viśeṣeṇa tathā baṃdhuṃ grahādhipa ||
nātikramennarastvetānsumūrkhānapi gopate ||
atikramya mahadraudraṃ rauravaṃ narakaṃ vrajet || 36 ||
|| āditya uvāca || ||
evametanna saṃdeho yathā vadasi khecara ||
mamāpyavagataṃ vīra brāhmaṇaṃ na parīkṣayet || 37 ||
sarvadevamayaṃ vipraṃ sarvalokamayaṃ tathā ||
tasmātsaṃpūjayedenaṃ na guṇāṃstasya ciṃtayet || 38 ||
kevalaṃ ciṃtayejjātiṃ na guṇānvinatātmaja ||
tasmādāmaṃtrayetpūrvamāsannaṃ brāhmaṇaṃ budhaḥ || 39 ||
yastvāsannamatikramya brāhmaṇaṃ patitādṛte ||
dūrasthānpūjayenmūḍho guṇāḍhyānnarakaṃ vrajet || 1.184.40 ||
devakarmavināśena brahmasvaharaṇena ca ||
devadravyaṃ dvijānnaṃ ca brahmasvaṃ brāhmaṇārjitam ||
viyonyāṃ kṣipate yastu viyonimadhigacchati || 41 ||
mā dadasveti yo brūyādgavāgnibrāhmaṇeṣu vai ||
tiryagyoniśataṃ gatvā cāṃḍā leṣvabhijāyate || 42 ||
yattu vācā pratijñātaṃ karmaṇā nopapāditam ||
tadṛṇaṃ dharmasaṃyuktamiha loke paratra ca || 43 ||
vedavidyāvratasnāte śrotriye gṛhamāgate ||
krīḍaṃtyoṣadhayaḥ sarvā yāsyāmaḥ paramāṃ gatim || 44 ||
madhu māṃsaṃ surāṃ somaṃ lākṣādyaṃ lavaṇaṃ tathā ||
vikrīyānyatamaṃ teṣāṃ dvijaścāṃdrāyaṇaṃ caret || 45 ||
guḍaṃ tilaṃ tathā nīlaṃ keśāngodhūmakānyavān ||
vikrīya brāhmaṇo gāṃ ca kṛcchraṃ sāṃtapanaṃ caret || 46 ||
auṣṭramāvikadugdhaṃ ca annaṃ mṛtakasūtake ||
caurasyānnaṃ mṛtaśrāddhe bhuktvā cāṃdrāyaṇaṃ caret || 47 ||
gavāṃ śṛṃgodake snāto mahānadyāśca saṃgame ||
samudradarśanādvāpi śunā daṣṭaḥ śucirbhavet || 48 ||
vedavidyāvratasnātaḥ śunā daṣṭo dvijaḥ khaga ||
hiraṇyodakamiśraṃ tu ghṛtaṃ prāśya viśuddhyati || 49 ||
tiṣṭhanvāpyatha vā gacchañchunā daṣṭo dvijaḥ khaga ||
vajraṃ prāśya śuciḥ syādvai yathāha bhagavānmanuḥ || 1.184.50 ||
vratinaścāpi daṣṭasya trirātraṃ kṣapaṇaṃ smṛtam ||
saghṛtaṃ ca tato bhuktvā vrataśeṣaṃ samācaret || 51 ||
brāhmaṇī tu śunā daṣṭā some dṛṣṭaṃ samācaret ||
yadā na dṛśyate somaḥ prāyaścittaṃ kathaṃ bhavet || 52 ||
yāṃ diśaṃ vrajate somastāṃ diśaṃ cāvalokayet ||
somamārgeṇa sā pūrvā pañcapūtena śudhyati || 53| ||
brāhmaṇasya brahmadvāre pūya śoṇitasaṃbhave ||
krimibhirdaśyate yaśca niṣkṛtiṃ tasya vacmi te || 54 ||
gavāṃ tatra purīṣeṇa trikālaṃ snānamācaret ||
dadhi kṣīraṃ ghṛtaṃ pītvā kṛmidaṣṭo viśudhyati || 55 ||
atha nābhyāḥ pradaṣṭasya āpādādvinatātmaja ||
etadvinirdiśetprājñaḥ prāyaścittaṃ khagādhipa || 56 ||
nābhikaṇṭhāṃtare vīra yadā cotpadyate kṛmiḥ ||
ṣaḍrātraṃ tu tadā proktaṃ prāyaścittaṃ manīṣibhiḥ || 57 ||
yadā daśaṃti śirasi kṛmayo vinatātmaja ||
kṛcchraṃ tadā caretprājñaḥ śuddhaye kaśyapātmaja || 58 ||
mṛtānnaṃ madhu māṃsaṃ ca yastu bhuñjīta brāhmaṇaḥ ||
sa trīṇyahānyupavasedekāhaṃ codake vaset || 59 || ||
iti śrībhaviṣye mahāpurāṇe brāhme parvaṇi saptamīkalpe.anūrvādityasaṃvāde brāhmaṇadharmavarṇanaṃ nāma caturaśītyuttaraśatatamo.adhyāyaḥ || 184 || || cha ||
mātṛśrāddhavidhivarṇanam
|| || āditya uvāca || ||
rātrau śrāddhaṃ na kurvīta rākṣasī kīrtitā hi sā ||
sandhyayorubhayorvīra sūrye caiva tirohite ||1||
akṛtvā mātṛyajñaṃ tu yaḥ śrāddhaṃ pariveṣayet ||
tātasya krodhasaṃyuktāṃ hiṃsāmicchaṃti dāruṇām ||2||
|| anūruruvāca || ||
mātṛśrāddhaṃ kathaṃ kāryaṃ kāśca tā mātaraḥ smṛtāḥ||
nāṃdīmukhāśca pitaraḥ kathaṃ pūjāmavāpnuyuḥ || 3 ||
|| āditya uvāca || ||
hanta te sampravakṣyāmi mātṛśrāddhavidhiṃ khaga ||
śṛṇu tvaṃ khagaśārdūla gadato mama kṛtsnaśaḥ ||4||
pūrvāhṇe bhojayedviprānaṣṭau sarvānpradakṣiṇān ||
tathānyaṃ navamaṃ vipraṃ caturaśca khagādhipa || 5 ||
ṛjūnvai kṛtapāndattvā satyena vidhivatkhaga ||
kṛtvā yavaistilārthaṃ tu dadhimiśraṃ krameṇa ca ||6||
gandhapuṣpādikaṃ sarvaṃ kuryādviprapradakṣiṇam ||
brāhmaṇebhyastato dadyānmadhuraṃ bhojanaṃ khaga || 7 ||
guḍamiśraṃ khagaśreṣṭha savastramodanaṃ param ||
rasānāṃ modakāṃścaiva na ca tānkaṭukāṃstathā || 8 ||
evaṃ bhukteṣu vipreṣu dadyātpiṃḍā nsamāhitaḥ ||
dadhyakṣatavimiśrāṃstu badaraiśca khagādhipa || 9 ||
kṛtvā tu maṃḍapaṃ vīra caturasraṃ pradakṣiṇam ||
pūrvāgrāṃśca kuśāndattvā puṣpāṇāṃ prakaraṃ tathā || 1.185.10 ||
savyena pāṇinā vīra vidhivatkhagasattama ||
mātre pramātre tanmātre nirvapetpūrvatomukhaḥ || 11 ||
piturmātre tu tanmātre nirvapedvidhiva tkhaga ||
vṛddhāyai prapitāmahyai tathānyaṃ nirvapedbudhaḥ || 12 ||
evamuddiśya vai mātṛrḥ ṣaṭ piṃḍānnirvapetkhaga ||
aṣṭāśayeddvijānvīra mātṛśrāddhe khagā dhipa ||
navamaṃ sarvadaivatyaṃ bhojayedvidhivatkhaga || 13 ||
nāṃdīmukhāṃstānuddiśya pitṛrnpaṃca dvijottamān ||
bhojayedvidhicchrāddhe vṛddhiśrāddhe pradakṣiṇam || 14 ||
itthaṃ śrāddhadvayaṃ kuyādvṛddhau kaśyapanaṃdana ||
tathānyamapi te vacmi paraṃ śrāddhavidhiṃ tava || 15 ||
athaivaṃ bhojayecchrāddhe tatpūrvaṃ tu pravartayet||
anyathā tatra luṃpaṃti sadevāsuramānuṣāḥ ||16||
agnyabhāve tu viprasya pāṇāvevopapādayet||
yo hyagniḥ sa dvijo vīnda maṃtradarśibhirucyate|| || 17 ||
pūrva pātre yadannaṃ ca yaccānnamupakalpitam ||
tenaiva saha bhoktavyaṃ pṛthagbhāvo na vidyate ||18||
dvau daive.atharvaṇau viprau prāṅmukhāvupaveśayet||
pitrye trīnudagāsyāṃśca vṛddhau cādhvaryusaṃgamān || 19 ||
trīṇi śrāddhe pavitrāṇi dauhitraḥ kutupāstilāḥ ||
trīṇi cātra praśaṃsaṃti śaucamakrodhamatva ram || 1.185.20 ||
dauhitraṃ khaṃḍamityuktaṃ lalāṭāya prajāpate ||
tatra śṛṃgasya yatpātraṃ taddauhitramiti smṛtam || 21 ||
savyādaṃsātparibhraṣṭaṃ nābhideśe vyava sthitam ||
ekavastraṃ tu taṃ vidyāddaive pitrye ca varjayet || 22 ||
pitṛdevamanuṣyāṇāṃ pūjanaṃ bhojanaṃ tathā ||
nottarīyaṃ vinā kāryaṃ kṛtaṃ syānniṣphalaṃ yataḥ || 23 ||
paridhānakṛte skaṃdhe gṛhastho yo.arcayetpitṛrn ||
na sa tatphalamāpnoti yathā yogapaṭāvṛtaḥ || 24 ||
vanasthānāṃ khagaśreṣṭha yatīnāṃ ca mahāmate ||
siddhaye karmaṇāṃ vīra yogapaṭṭakamucyate || 25 ||
hastau prakṣālya gaṃḍūṣaṃ yaḥ pibedavicakṣaṇaḥ ||
sa tu daivaṃ ca pitryaṃ ca ātmānaṃ copaghā tayet || 26 ||
bhojaneṣveva tiṣṭhaṃti svasti kurvaṃti ye dvijāḥ ||
āsuraṃ tadbhavecchrāddhaṃ pitṛrṇāṃ nopatiṣṭhate || 27 ||
dātāro nobhivardhaṃtā vedāḥ saṃta tireva ca||
śraddhā ca no mā vyagamadbahudeyaṃ ca no.astviti ||28|| ||
iti śrībhaviṣye mahāpurāṇe brāhme parvaṇi saptamīkalpe sauradharme aruṇāditya saṃvāde mātṛśrāddhavidhivarṇanaṃ nāma paṃcāśītyuttaraśatatamo.adhyāyaḥ || 185 || a ||
śuddhiprakaraṇavarṇanam
bhāskara uvāca || ||
śrāvaṇyāṃ tu baliḥ kāryaḥ sarpāṇāṃ maṃtrapūrvakaḥ ||
śayanārohaṇe caiva kārye sukhamabhīpsatā || 1 ||
kāryaḥ pratyavarohastu mārgaśīrṣyāṃ na saṃśayaḥ ||
phalaṃ vinā tvanuṣṭhānaṃ nityānāmiṣyate sphuṭam || 2 ||
kāmyānāṃ saphalārthaṃ tu doṣaprāptyarthameva ca ||
naimittikānāṃ karaṇaṃ trividhaṃ karmaṇāṃ phalam || 3 ||
phalaṃ kecidupāttasya duritasya pracakṣate ||
anutpattiṃ tathā cānye pratyetyābhyupamaṃtrya ca || 4 ||
nityakriyaṃ tathā cānye anuṣaṃgātphalaṃ śrutiḥ ||
agnyādheyaṃ tathā darśaṃ paurṇamāsaṃ dvitīyakam||5||
cāturmāsyamagnihotraṃ paśubaṃdho nirūḍhakāḥ ||
sautrāmaṇī saṃsthāḥ syurhaviṣaḥ śrutinoditāḥ || 6 ||
agniṣṭomo.atyagniṣṭoma ukthyaḥ saṃṣoḍaśī tathā ||
vājapeyātirātraśca āpyoryāmaḥ śrutau śrutaḥ ||7||
dayā syātsarvabhūteṣu anasūyātha maṃgalam ||
kṣāṃtirdayā tvanāyāsaḥ śaucamaspṛhatā vratam || 8 ||
samyaguktāstu saṃskārā brahmaprāptinimittakāḥ ||
anaṃtaraṃ pravakṣyāmi viprāṇāṃ vṛttayaḥ śubhāḥ || 9 ||
ṛtāmṛte ca viprāṇāmṛtaṃ pramṛtameva ca ||
pratigrahavaṇijyādi śreyasī nottarottarā || 1.186.10 ||
ājīvikāvṛttayastu ityādyāḥ saṃpravartitāḥ ||
tāsāṃ kayāpi jīvettu anutiṣṭhedyathāvidhi || 11 ||
nityaṃ śuciḥ sugaṃdhaśca snānaśīlaḥ priyaṃvadaḥ ||
pūjyaśca pūjayeddevānkāryāṇi svayamācaret || 12 ||
nekṣetārkaṃ na nagnāṃ strīṃ na ca saṃspṛṣṭa maithunam ||
nāpsu mūtraṃ purīṣaṃ vā nāśucī rātritārakāḥ || 13 ||
śāstroktā yaṃtraṇā yā tu nānuktāni vratāni ca ||
svargārthaṃ sādhayettaiśca śaktimānmanasā tathā ||14||
nityāni kecidicchaṃti kāmyāni ca tathāpare ||
kāmyāpravṛttau saṃge ca prāyaścittaṃ vidhīyate ||15||
vratāni manasā tviṣṭasaṃkalpa iti mānasaḥ ||
aṃtarānuphalaṃ yattadṛṣivādāḥ prakīrtitāḥ ||16||
anadhyāyaṃ svayaṃ samyagvarjayetphalasādhanam ||
ātmā śuddhastathā deśo hyasuhāraḥ prajāpadaḥ || 17 ||
aśubhāni nimittāni utpāto vikṛtaṃ tathā ||
parvāṇi manaso.aśuddhiranadhyāya iti smṛtaḥ ||18||
anadhyāyāśca dṛṣṭārthā adṛṣṭārthāstathāpare ||
vedādhyayanameveti tridhā maddhyānadarśanam ||19||
abhakṣyaṃ sarvavarṇānāṃ śāvāśaucaṃ khagādhipa ||
dravyaśuddhistathaiva syādanyathā tvasamaṃjasam ||1.186.20||
jātiduṣṭaṃ kriyāduṣṭaṃ kāladuṣṭaṃ vibhūṣitam||
saṃsargāśrayaduṣṭaṃ ca sahṛllekhaṃ svabhāvataḥ ||21||
laśunaṃ gṛṃjanaṃ caiva palāṃḍuṃ kavakāni ca ||
vārtākaṃ nālikeraṃ tu mūlakaṃ jātiduṣṭakam||22||
no bhuñjīta kriyāduṣṭaṃ duṣṭaṃ ca patitaiḥ pṛthak||
kāladuṣṭaṃ tu vijñeyaṃ hānidaṃ cirasaṃsthitam ||23||
dadhibhakṣyavikārāśca madhuvarjyāstadiṣyate ||24||
surālaśunasaṃspṛṣṭaṃ peyūṣādisamanvitam ||
saṃsargaduṣṭametaddhi śunocchiṣṭaṃ khageśvara||25||
śūdrasaktaṃ khaṃḍasaktaṃ jñeyamāśrayadūṣitam||
vicikitsā tu hṛdaye bhakṣye yasmintsujāyate||26||
sahṛllekhaṃ tu tajjñeyaṃ purīṣaṃ tu svabhāvataḥ ||
rasaduṣṭe vikāro.api rasasyeti pradarśitaḥ||27||
pāyasaṃ kṣīrapākādi tasminneva dine tathā||
yathāśāstraṃ khagaśreṣṭha bhakṣyābhakṣye nirūpayet||28||
prāṇātyaye prokṣitaṃ ca śrāddhe ca dvijakāmyayā ||
pitṛrndevāṃścārpayitvā bhuṃjanmāṃsaṃ na doṣabhāk||29||
pretāśuddhiḥ sapiṃḍānāṃ tasminneva mṛte sati||
daśāhaṃ dvādaśāhaṃ vā pakṣaṃ māsaṃ tvaśuddhatā || 1.186.30 ||
daśāhāditrike bhāge varṇaśo na bhavaṃti hi ||
daśāhena tu bhojyāḥ syuḥ sūtakāśaucayostathā || 31||
ūrdhvaṃ daśāhādekāhaśravaṇe sati jāyate ||
saṃvatsare vyatīte tu snānādeva viśudhyati || 32 ||
samānodakatā proktā janmanāmnoraparyaye ||
sapiṃḍāḥ saptapuruṣāḥ śrutāvetannidarśanam || 33 ||
ā daṃtajanmanaḥ sadya ācūḍānnaiṣṭhikī smṛtā ||
trirātramāvratādeśātsapiṃḍeṣu mṛteṣu ca || 34 ||
teṣāmapi tadekaṃ syādvayovasthāpyapekṣyate ||
samānodakāttrirātreṇa śudhyedvai mṛtyujanmanoḥ || 35 ||
garbhasrāve trirātreṇa udakyā śudhyate tathā ||
anaṃtajanma maraṇe taccheṣeṇa viśudhyati || 36 ||
dvijānāṃ tvevameva syātpitrarthaṃ mātureva vā ||
agnihotrārthaṃ vijñeyaṃ sadyaḥ śaucamiti sthitiḥ ||37||
asapiṃḍe tu nirhārāttrirātramapi mānavaḥ ||
tasyaivānugatau jñeyaṃ sadyaḥ śaucaṃ khagādhipa || 38 ||
śudhyeddvijo daśāhena janmahānau dviyoniṣu ||
ṣaṅbhistribhirahai kena kṣatraviṭśūdrayoniṣu || 39 ||
uktaśaucaṃ yathānyāyaṃ śārīraṃ tattvadarśibhiḥ ||
dravyaśuddhividhānaṃ tu yathāvadabhidhīyate || 1.186.40 ||
taijasī mārtikī vīra vāriśuddhiḥ smṛtā tathā ||
nirlepakṣālanenaiva sparśe tu prokṣaṇena vai || 41 ||
aśuddhaṃ naiva kiṃciddhi dravyamastīti khecara ||
vacanācchuddhyaśuddhī tu dravyāṇāmiha khecara || 42 ||
snānaṃ śaucaṃ ca kartavyaṃ dravyaśaucādanaṃtaram ||
prātaḥsnānaṃ tu nityaṃ syādgrahaṇe kāmyameva ca || 43 ||
naimittikaṃ kṣurāśaucaṃ tena pāpādviśudhyati ||
uktaṃ tu śaucaṃ vijñeyaṃ doṣakṣayakaraṃ khaga || 44 ||
karmāṃgaṃ ceti vijñeyaṃ ṣaṭprakārā samāsataḥ ||
evamācamanaṃ vidyādviśiṣṭaṃ tu dvijanmanām ||45||
tadā mṛtānāṃ tadvatsyādanyeṣāṃ tu yathāsukham ||
kanyānivṛttiṃ putraistu yathānyāyaṃ samācaret|| 46 ||
kalāśilpānisarvāṇi gṛhrīyātparituṣṭaye || 47 ||
śuśrūṣeta patiṃ bhāryā paritoṣaṃ yathā vrajet ||
gurūṇāṃ paritoṣaśca dharmaḥ strīṇāṃ sanātanaḥ||48||
vṛddhā.aputrā yadi mṛtā tadabhāve nṛpasya tu ||
mṛtāpatyāpyagarbhā ca vṛddhāpatyā pativratā || 49 ||
kuryādanirvṛtaṃ bharturgate sannihitepi vā ||
etāṃ dharma samāṃ niṣṭhāṃ bhartṛlokamavāpnuyāt ||1.186.50||
strī dharmacāriṇī sādhvī mṛtā dāhyā tathāgnibhiḥ ||
viparītādadāhyā tu punardārakriyā tathā ||51||
strīṇāṃ niyogo vihito maraṇādbrahmacārakam ||
prāptavyaśca yathādharmo dṛṣṭādṛṣṭaphalapradaḥ || 52 ||
tasmāddharmaṃ sadā kuryātkurvatī svargamāpnuyāt || 53 ||
iti śrībhaviṣye mahāpurāṇe brāhme parvaṇi saptamīkalpe sauradharmeṣu śuddhiprakaraṇavarṇanaṃ nāma ṣaḍaśītyuttaraśatatamo.adhyāyaḥ || 186 || cha ||
sauradharme dhenumāhātmyavarṇanam
|| anūruruvāca || ||
kāni puṇyāni kṛtveha svargaṃ gacchaṃti mānavāḥ ||
manuṣyaloke saṃbhūtāḥ svarloke gāminaḥ param ||1||
karmayajñastapoyajñaḥ svādhyāyo dhyānanirmitaḥ ||
jñānayajñaśca paṃcaite mahāyajñāḥ prakīrtitāḥ || 2 ||
eteṣāmeva yajñānāmuttamaḥ katamaḥ smṛtaḥ ||
etadyajñaphalānāṃ ca kiṃ phalaṃ kā gatirbhavet ||3||
dharmādharmaprabhedāśca kiyantaḥ parikīrtitāḥ ||
tatsādhanāni katidhā gatayaśca yathā vada ||4||
khaga nārakiṇāṃ puṃsāmāgatānāṃ punaḥ kṣitau ||
kāni cihnāni jāyante muktaśeṣeṇa karmaṇā || 5 || mahābhavārṇavādghorāddharmādharmābhisaṃkulāt ||
garbhādiduḥkhaphenāḍhyānmucyaṃte dehinaḥ katham || || 6 ||
ityukto bhagavānbhānuḥ sarvapraśnārthamādarāt || 7 ||
pratyuvāca mahātejāḥ samāsavyāsayogataḥ || 7 ||
|| āditya uvāca || ||
svargāpavargaphaladaṃ narakārṇavatāraṇam ||
dharmaṃ pāpaharaṃ puṇyaṃ śṛṇu śūra prabhāṣataḥ || 8 ||
śraddhāpūrvaḥ sadā dharmaḥ śraddhāmadhyāṃtasaṃsthitaḥ ||
śraddhāniṣṭhapratiṣṭhaśca dharmaḥ śraddhā prakīrtitā || 9 ||
śrutimaṃtrarasāḥ sūkṣmāḥ pradhānapuruṣeśvaraḥ ||
śraddhāmātreṇa gṛhyaṃte na pareṇa ca cakṣuṣā || 1.187.10 ||
kāyakleśairna bahubhirna caivārthasya rāśibhiḥ ||
dharmaḥ saṃprāpyate sūkṣmaḥ śraddhāhīnaiḥ surairapi || 11 ||
śraddhā dharmaḥ paraḥ sūkṣmaḥ śraddhā yajñāhutaṃ tapaḥ||
śraddhā mokṣaśca svargaśca śraddhā sarvamidaṃ jagat || 12 ||
sarvasvaṃ jīvitaṃ vāpi dadyādaśraddhayā ca yaḥ ||
nāpnuyātsa phalaṃ kiṃcittasmācchraddhāparo bhavet |||13 ||
evaṃ śraddhāmayāḥ sarve mama dharmāḥ prakīrtitāḥ ||
pūjyastu śraddhayā puṃsā dhyeyaḥ pūjyaśca śraddhayā || 14 ||
adhikārasya prāptyarthaṃ mahāsāravimuktidam ||
ajñāduktaṃ sasaṃdigdhaṃ vākyametanmamādbhutam || 15 ||
nānāsiddhikaraṃ divyaṃ lokacittānuraṃjanam ||
suniścitārthagaṃbhīraṃ vākyaṃ mama manoramam || 16 ||
manmānasasamudro hi dvipadoyaṃ vidurbudhāḥ ||
sa khaṣolketi vikhyātaḥ saśivaṃ maṃḍalaṃ khaga || 17 ||
devatrayaguṇātītaḥ sarvajñaḥ sarvavitprabhuḥ ||
omityekākṣare maṃtre sthitaḥ sa paramo mama ||18||
yathānādipravṛttoyaṃ ghoraḥ saṃsārasāgaraḥ ||
khaṣolkopi tathānādiḥ saṃsārārṇavaśodhanaḥ ||19||
vyādhīnāṃ bheṣajaṃ yadvatpra tipakṣasvabhāvataḥ ||
mokṣiṇāṃ muktihetuśca siddhaḥ sarvārthasādhakaḥ || 1.187.20 ||
mamābhidhānamantroyamabhidheyaḥ sadā smṛtaḥ ||
abhidhānābhidheyohaṃ mantrasiddho.asmi khecara || 21 ||
vedo manogame cātra ṣaḍakṣaramaṃtrasthitaḥ ||
yadvā mukto.akṣaraikena loke pañcākṣaraḥ smṛtaḥ || 22 ||
kiṃ tasya bahubhirmantraiḥ śāstrairvā bahuvistaraiḥ ||
yasyoṃ namaḥ khaṣolketi mantro.ayaṃ hṛdi saṃsthitaḥ || 23 ||
tenādhītaṃ śrutaṃ tena tena sarvamanuṣṭhitam ||
yenoṃ namaḥ khaṣolketi mama vākyaṃ ṣaḍakṣaram || 24 ||
vidhivākyamidaṃ sarvaṃ nārthavādaṃ vaco mama ||
etatte vakṣyate.aśeṣaṃ mama vākyārthamuttamam ||
pṛcchasvemaṃ praṇamyāśu vainateya mahāmate || 25 ||
|| sumanturuvāca || ||
śrutvā tu vacanaṃ bhānorvainateyo mahābalaḥ ||
saptāśvatilakaṃ bhaktyā praṇamyovāca bhārata || 26 ||
|| anūruruvāca || ||
brūhi māṃ devaśārdūla yatpṛcchāmi mahāmate ||
kīdṛgvākyamidaṃ bhānorvākyārthaṃ brūhi ca prabho || 27|| ||
|| saptāśvatilaka uvāca || ||
vimuktāśeṣadoṣeṇa sarvajñena bhagena yat ||
praṇītamamalaṃ vākyaṃ tatpramāṇaṃ na saṃśayaḥ || 28 ||
yasmānmārtaṃḍa nāmāsau kathyate ca manīṣibhiḥ ||
yathārthaṃ puṇyamāpnoti patatyaśraddhayā tvadhaḥ || 29 ||
sauravākyapravaktāraṃ sūravatpūjayedgurum ||
saṃsārārṇava nirmagnaṃ yaḥ samuddharate janam || 1.187.30 ||
sauradharmāmbuhastena kastena sadṛśo guruḥ ||
ajñānavahnisaṃtaptaṃ nirvāpayati yaḥ śanaiḥ ||
jñānāmṛtena vai bhaktā kastaṃ na pratipūjayet || 31 ||
naiva rājyena mahatā na caivārthasya rāśibhiḥ ||
prāptamajñānaśamanaṃ paraloke sukhāvaham || 32 ||
svargāpavarga siddhyarthaṃ bhāṣitaṃ yattu śobhanam ||
vākyaṃ te devadevena tadvijñeyaṃ subhāṣitam || 33 || rāgadveṣākṣamākrodhakāmatṛṣṇānusāriṇām ||
vākyaṃ niraya hetutvāttaddurbhāṣitamucyate || 34 ||
saṃskṛtenāpi kiṃ tena mṛdulālāpasaṃginā ||
avidyārāmavākyena saṃsārakleśahetunā || 35 ||
yacchrutvā jāyate puṇyaṃ rāgādīnāṃ ca saṃkṣayaḥ ||
virūpamapi tadvākyaṃ vijñeyamatiśobhanam || 36 ||
smṛtayo bhārataṃ vedāḥ śāstrāṇi sumahāṃti ca ||
svāyuṣaḥ kṣapaṇāyaiva dhamo.arthasamagranthitaḥ || 37 ||
putradārādisaṃsāre narāṇāṃ mūḍhacetasām ||
saṃsāraviduṣāṃ śāstramanādi mukhanirgatam || 38||
idaṃ śreṣṭhamidaṃ jñeyaṃ sarvaṃ tvaṃ jñātumicchasi ||
api varṣasahasrāyuḥ śāstrāntaṃ nādhigacchati || 39 ||
vijñāyākṣaratanmātraṃ jīvitaṃ cātivaṃcanam ||
vihāya sarvaśāstrāṇi paralokaṃ samācaret || 1.187.40 ||
paṇḍitenāpi kiṃ tena samarthena ca dehinām ||
yaḥ puṇyabhāramudvoḍhumaśaktaḥ pāralaukikam || 41 ||
paṇḍito.api sa mūrkhaḥ syācchaktiyukto.apyaśaktikaḥ ||
yaḥ saurajñānamāhātmyamuccārayitumakṣamaḥ || 42 ||
tasmātsa paṃḍitaḥ śaktaḥ sa tapasvī jitendriyaḥ ||
yaḥ saurajñānasadbhāvamālocayitumudyataḥ || 43 ||
yaḥ pradadyānnṛpaḥ kṛtsnāṃ kṣmāṃ dhanaṃ kāṃcanaṃ tathā ||
sarvamanyāyataḥ pṛchenna tasyopadiśedguruḥ || 44 ||
yaḥ śṛṇoti raverdharmaṃ nyāyataḥ sa ca vakti ca ||
tato gacchati susthānaṃ narakaṃ tadviparyaye || 45 ||
dattagodohasaṃbhūtaḥ ṣaḍakṣaravidhānataḥ ||
raviḥ saṃpūjitaḥ śīghraṃ narāṇāṃ tulyatā bhṛśam || 46 || surāsurairmathyamānātkṣīrodātsāgarātpurā ||
pañca gāvaḥ samutpannāḥ sarvalo kasya mātaraḥ || 47 ||
naṃdā subhadrā surabhī sumanā śobhanāvatī ||
gāvaḥ sūryasamā bhāsā utpannāḥ kṛtimāgatāḥ || 48 ||
sarvalokopakārārthaṃ devānāṃ tarpaṇāya ca ||
māmāśritya sthitā gāvaḥ snānārthaṃ bhāskarasya tu || 49 ||
tāsāmaṃgāni puṇyāni ṣaḍrasāḥ khagasattama ||
khagādiṣu ca sarveṣu sthirāṇītyupadhāraya || 1.187.50 ||
gomayaṃ rocanaṃ mūtraṃ kṣīraṃ dadhi ghṛtaṃ gavām ||
ṣaḍaṃgāni pavitrāṇi sarvasiddhikarāṇi ca || 51 ||
gomayādutthitaḥ śrīmānbilvavṛkṣo.arkavallabhaḥ ||
tatrāste padmahastā śrīrvṛkṣastena ca sa smṛtaḥ || 52 ||
paṃkānyutpalapadmāni punarjātāni gomayāt ||
gorocanaṃ ca maṃgalya pavitraṃ sarvakāmadam || 53 ||
gomūtrādguggulurjātaḥ sugaṃdhiḥ priyadarśanaḥ ||
āhāraḥ sarvadevānāṃ bhāskarasya viśeṣataḥ || 54 ||
yadbījaṃ jagataḥ kiṃcittajjñeyaṃ kṣīrasaṃbhavam ||
dadhnaḥ sarvāṇi jātāni māṃgalyānyarthasiddhaye || 55 || ghṛtādamṛtamutpannamamarāṇāmatipriyam ||
tasmāddhṛtena payasā dadhnā yaḥ snāpayedravim || 56 ||
tadaṃte coṣṇatoyena kaṣāyaiśca nirūpayet ||
snāpya śītāṃbunā paścādbhānuṃ rocanayālabhet || 57 ||
pūjayedbilvapatraiśca padmairnīlotpalaistathā ||
arghyaṃ dadyāttataḥ paścātsavajraṃ guggulaṃ khaga || 58 ||
pāyasaṃ dadhibhaktaṃ ca vajraṃ ca madhunā saha ||
nivedayecca sadbhaktyā bhakṣyāṇi vividhāni ca || 59 ||
kṛtvā pradakṣiṇaṃ paścātpraṇipatya kṣamāpayet ||
anena vidhinā bhānuṃ ṣaḍaṃgena divaspatim || 1.187.60 ||
iha loke pare caiva sarvānkāmānsa gacchati ||
ṣaḍaṃgavidhinā taṃ cāpūjyaivaṃ sumanā ravim || 61 ||
svargaṃ nayetsadhīmāṃstu kulānāmekaviṃśatim ||
svarge sthāpya svayaṃ gacchejjyautiṣaṃ nāma tatpadam || 62 ||
aṃśena bhojakā vīra devakārye niyojitāḥ ||
prayāṃti svāminā sārdhaṃ śrīmadbhānuṃ paraṃ mahaḥ || 63 ||
bhuktvā bhogāṃstu vipulānbhojako bhogasaṃmitaḥ ||
kālātpunarihāyātaḥ pṛthivyāmekarāḍbhavet || 64 ||
puṣpaṃ patraṃ phalaṃ toyaṃ yadgataṃ bhāskarārcane ||
saurā gāvaśca gacchaṃti sūryalokaṃ na saṃśayaḥ || 65 ||
yaḥ pibedbhojane dhenoradattā bhānave payaḥ ||
sa gacchennarakaṃ ghoramakurvaṃstarpaṇaṃ raveḥ || 66 ||
ekakālaṃ pibetkṣīraṃ dhenūnāṃ bhāskarasya tu ||
anena snāpayeddevaṃ kṣīreṇa khagasattama || 67 ||
pratyūṣe yadbhavetkṣīraṃ dhenūnāṃ bhāskarasya tu ||
snāpayettena vai bhānuṃ kṛtsnena garuḍāgraja || 68 ||
yastu loko bhajetsarva na devāya nivedayet ||
yāvanto romakūpāśca gavāṃ dehe khagādhipa ||
tāvadvarṣasahasrāṇi narake pacyate khaga || 69 ||
pūjitaṃ pūjyamānaṃ vā yaḥ kaścicchṛṇuyādravim ||
śrutvānumodate yastu sa yajñaphalamaśnute || 1.187.70 ||
bhāskaraṃ pṛjitaṃ dṛṣṭvā sarvapāpaiḥ pramucyate ||
harṣātpraṇamya vai bhānuṃ tasya loke mahīyate || 71 ||
pūjyamānaṃ raviṃ bhaktyā yaḥ paśyenmānavaḥ khaga ||
so.api yajñaphalaṃ kṛtsnaṃ prāpnuyānnātra saṃśayaḥ || 72 ||
śrutvānumodate yastu pūjyamānaṃ divākaram ||
tatsarvaṃ phalamāpnoti prasādādbhāskarasya tu || 73 ||
ekajanmānugaṃ dānaṃ bhaktyā yacca niveditam ||
japayajñādviyuktebhyaḥ sahasrabhavikaṃ smṛtam ||
ābhūtasaṃplava sthāyi pradānaṃ japajīvinām || 74 ||
atyalpamapi yaddattaṃ vācakāya khagādhipa ||
tanmahāpralayaṃ yāvaddāturbhogāya kalpate || 75 ||
na dānamalpaṃ bahudhā kiṃcidasti vijānatām ||
deśakālavidhiśraddhāpātrayuktaṃ tadakṣayam || 76 ||
pātre deśe ca kāle ca vidhinā śraddhayā ca yat ||
dattaṃ hutaṃ kṛtaṃ caiva tadanaṃtaphalaṃ bhavet || 77 ||
tilārdhamapi yadvīra dīyate śraddhayā dvija ||
satpātre vidhivadbhaktyā tadbhavetsarvakāmikam || 78 ||
yatsnātaṃ jñānasalilaiḥ śīlabhasmapramārjitam || snāna
tatpātraṃ sarvapātrebhya uttamaṃ parikīrtitam || 79 ||
japo damo yamaḥ puṃsāṃ trātā saṃsāgsāgarāt ||
ajñānāṃ pāpanetrāṇāṃ tatpātraṃ paramaṃ smṛtam || 1.187.80 ||
jñānaplavena copetaṃ śāstraṃ pāpamahārṇavāt ||
ajñānsaṃtārayennūnaṃ kiṃ śilā tārayecchilām || 81 ||
dvijānāṃ vedaviduṣāṃ kaṭisaṃbhogi yatphalam ||
haṃtakārapradānena tatphalaṃ japajīvine || 82 ||
jīvo yasyaitya gṛhe ca bhuṅkte satkṛtisatkṛtaḥ ||
kulamuttārayettasya narakārṇavasaṃsthitam || 83 ||
yajñāgnihomatīrtheṣu yatphalaṃ parikīrtitam ||
japināmannadānena tatsamagraṃ phala labhet || 84 ||
bhojine śāṃtacittāya paridhyānaratāya ca ||
śraddhayānnaṃ sakṛddattvā sarvapāpaiḥ pramucyate || 85 || japakāñchāṃtisaṃyuktānādityārpitacetasaḥ ||
bhojayitvā sakṛdbhaktyā sarvānkāmānavāpnuyāt || 86 ||
dhyāyamāno raveḥ sūktaṃ bhojayetsatataṃ ca yaḥ ||
tataḥ sākṣādanenaiva tadbhuktamaśana bhavet || 87 ||
pitṛrnudiśya yaḥ śrāddhe bhojayedbhojakaṃ naraḥ ||
sa sthānaṃ samavāpnoti bhānavīyamasaṃśayaḥ || 88 ||
iti śrībhaviṣye mahāpurāṇe brāhme parvaṇi saptamīkalpe sauradharme dhenumāhātmyavarṇanaṃ nāma saptāśītyadhikaśatatamo.adhyāyaḥ || 187 || cha ||
bhojakasatkāravarṇanam
|| saptāśva uvāca || ||
sūryāya sarvapākānnaṃ nivedyāgnau ca homayet ||
hutvāgnau prakṣipedvīra baliṃ dikṣu samaṃtataḥ || 1 ||
sūryāgniguruviprāṇāṃ sarvapākānnamanvaham ||
yo.anivedyātmanā bhuṃkte sa bhuṃkte kilbiṣaṃ naraḥ || 2 ||
kṛṣipālye ca vāṇijye krodhasatyakṣayādibhiḥ ||
puṃsāṃ pāpāni vardhaṃte sūnādoṣaiśca paṃcabhiḥ || 3 ||
kaṃḍanī peṣaṇī cullī udakuṃbhaḥ pramārjanī ||
paṃca sūnā gṛhasthasya tena svargaṃ na gacchati || 4 ||
sūryāgnigurupūjābhiḥ pāpairetairna lipyate ||
anyaiśca pātakaighoraistasmātsaṃpūjayetsadā || 5 ||
sūryāgnigurunaivedyaṃ yāvatsyādannasaṃkhyayā ||
tāvadvarṣasahasrāṇi dātā sūryapure vaset || 6 ||
ghṛtapūpayutaiḥ siktaiḥ puṇyaṃ daśaguṇottaram ||
avadaṃśaguṇairyuktaṃ puṇyaṃ śataguṇaṃ khaga || 7 ||
ṣaṣṭikaudananaivedyaṃ sahasraguṇitaṃ phalam ||
sugaṃdhaśālinaivedyaṃ vijñeyamayutottaram|| 8 ||
bhakṣyānnapānadānāni tatphalāni tathātathā ||
yadvā tadvā sadā deyaṃ sūryāgnigurusādhuṣu ||
bhakṣyaṃ nivedya pūrvoktamakṣayaṃ labhate phalam || 9 ||
evaṃ yaḥ kurute bhaktiṃ deva deve divākare ||
sa pitṛrnsarvapāpebhyaḥ samuddhṛtya divaṃ nayet || 1.188.10 ||
gaṃgāsnānamidaṃ puṇyaṃ darśanātprāpnuyādraveḥ ||
sarvatīrthābhiṣekaṃ ca praṇāmādviṃdate khaga || 11 ||
mucyate sarvapāpebhyaḥ praṇamya śirasā ravim ||
śuśrūṣeta ca saṃdhyāyāṃ sūryaloke mahīyate || 12||
yugapatpūjitāstena brahmaviṣṇu maheśvarāḥ ||
pitaraḥ sarvadevāśca bhaveyuḥ pūjitā ravau || 13 ||
tuṣyaṃti pitarastasya sukṛṣṭeneva karṣukāḥ ||
yaḥ śrāddhe bhojayedbhaktyā brāhmaṇaṃ japajīvinam || 14 ||
api naḥ sa kule kaṃciduddharetkiṃ khageśvara ||
yaḥ saṃpūjya raviṃ śrāddhe bhojayejjapajīvinam || 15 ||
tṛpyaṃti pitarastasya gāyaṃti ca pitāmahāḥ ||
adya naḥ sa kule prājño vācakaṃ bhojayiṣyati || 16 ||
purāṇavidamāyāṃtaṃ dṛṣṭvaiva saha saṃsthitāḥ ||
krīḍaṃtyoṣadhayaḥ sarvā yāsyāmaḥ svargamakṣayam || 17 ||
anugrahāya lokānāṃ śraddhāyāśca parīkṣaṇe ||
caraṃtyatithirūpeṇa pitaro devatāstathā || || 18 ||
tasmādatithimāyāṃtamagre gacchetkṛtāṃjaliḥ || svāgatāsanapādyārghyasnānānnaśayanādibhiḥ || 19 ||
rūpānvitaṃ virūpaṃ vā malinaṃ malināṃbaram ||
velāyāmatithiṃ prāptaṃ paṃḍito na vicārayet || 1.188.20 ||
bhojakānāṃ śarīreṣu nityaṃ sannihito raviḥ ||
ye bhojakāstyajaṃtyanye sarvapāpeṣvavasthitāḥ ||
adhomukhorddhvapādāste pataṃti narakāgniṣu || 21 ||
kṛmibhirbhinnavadanāstapyamānāśca vahninā ||
pīḍyaṃte cāyudhai rghoṃrairyāvadiṃdrāścaturdaśa || 22 ||
ye cāpavādaṃ śṛṇvaṃti vimūḍhā brāhmaṇeṣu vai ||
te viśeṣeṇa pacyaṃte narakeṣu madicchayā || 23 ||
sarveṣāmeva pātrāṇāṃ satpātraṃ jāpakaḥ paraḥ ||
tasmātsarvaprayatnena pūjayetsusamāhitaḥ || 24 || ||
iti śrībhaviṣye mahāpurāṇe brāhme parvaṇi saptamī kalpe sauradharmeṣu bhojakasatkāravarṇanaṃ nāmāṣṭāśītyadhikaśatatamo.adhyāyaḥ || 188 || || cha ||
sauradharmeṣu saptāśvasaṃvādaḥ
|| saptāśvatilaka uvāca || ||
āmapātrarasā yadvannaśyaṃte naśyabhājane ||
japopekṣe tathā dānaṃ saha pātreṇa naśyati ||
sadbījamūṣare yadvatsamuptaṃ niṣphalaṃ bhavet ||1||
bhasmanīva hutaṃ havyaṃ yathā hotuśca niṣphalam ||
japena rahite vipre tathā dānaṃ nirarthakam ||2||
yathā ṣaṇḍho.aphalaḥ strīṣu yathā gaurgavi cāphalā ||
brāhmaṇasya tathā janma japahīnasya niṣphalam ||3||
lohoḍupena pratarannimajjatyudake yathā ||
dātā dātā grahītā ca patatyaṃdhe tamasyatha||4||
kāruṇyātsarvabhūteṣu śraddhayā yatpradīyate ||
dānaṃ tadvai khaga jñeyaṃ sārvakāmikamuttamam || 5 ||
dīnāṃdhakṛpaṇānāṃ ca bālavṛddhātureṣu ca ||
yaddīyate khagaśreṣṭha tasyānantaphalaṃ bhavet || 6 ||
na hi svārthaṃ samuddiśya pratigṛhṇaṃti sādhavaḥ ||
dāturevopakārāya jagṛhuḥ śravaṇādayaḥ || 7 ||
dāturevopakārāya vadatyarthī dadasva me ||
yasmāddātā prayātyūrdhvamadhastiṣṭhetpratigrahī || 8 ||
dehīti suvadannarthī dhanaṃ bodhayatīva saḥ ||
yanmayā kṛtamarthitvaṃ prage.adānaphalaṃ hi tat || 9 ||
bodhayaṃti na yācante dehīti kṛpaṇā janāḥ ||
avastheyamadānasya yadyācāmo gṛhegṛhe || 1.189.10 ||
āyātyarthī gṛhaṃ yastu kastaṃ na pratipūjayet ||
koyamarthī na pūjyaḥ syādyācamāno dinedine || 11 ||
yadbalādapyanicchaṃtaṃ yojayaṃti narāśrayān ||
ahanyahani yācaṃte dātuste darśayaṃti hi || || 12 ||
ekastiṣṭhati cādhastādanyaścopari tiṣṭhati ||
dātṛyācakayorbhedaḥ karābhyāmeva sūcitaḥ || 13 ||
yaḥ prāptāyārthine dānaṃ tyaktvā pātra mudīkṣate ||
sarvakarmasu yuktatvānna dātā pāramārthikaḥ ||14||
yadyarthino narā na syurdānadharmaḥ kathaṃ bhavet||
tadarthiṣu bhaveddānaṃ svāgataṃ svāgataṃ priyam|| || 15 || pādodakamanuvrajyātsvargasopānasaptakam ||
ciṃtāciṃtānurūpeṇa kadā kasya vinaṣyati || 16 ||
grāsādardhamapi grāsaṃ yuktaṃ dātuṃ sadārthinām ||
dānaṃ priyavinirmuktaṃ naṣṭamāhurmanīṣiṇaḥ || 17 ||
tasmātsatkṛtya dātavyamanaṃtaphalamicchatā ||
pretyākhyānamapi śreyaḥ priyānunayapeśa lam ||18||
na taddānamasatkārapāruṣyamalinīkṛtam ||
varaṃ na dattamarthibhyaḥ saṃkruddhenāṃtarātmanā||19||
na taddhanaṃ na ca prītirna dharmaḥ priyavarjitaḥ ||
dānapradānaniyamayajñadhyānaṃ hutaṃ tapaḥ ||
yatnenāpi kṛtaṃ sarvaṃ krodho.asya niṣphalaṃ khaga || 1.189.20 ||
yaḥ śraddhayārcitaṃ dadyātprati gṛhṇāti cārcitam ||
tāvubhau gacchataḥ svargaṃ naraka tadviparyayāt || 21 ||
audāryaṃ svāgataṃ maitrī hyanukaṃpā ca matsaraḥ ||
paṃcabhistu gurau dānaṃ dāturdāne mahāphalam||22||
vārāṇasī kurukṣetraṃ prayāgaṃ puṣkarāṇi ca ||
gātaṭaṃ samudraśca naimiṣāraṇyameva ca || 23 ||
mūlasthānaṃ mahāpuṇyaṃ puṃḍīrasvāmikaṃ tathā ||
kālapriyaṃ khagaśreṣṭha kṣīrikāvāsa eva ca || 24 ||
ityete kīrtitā deśāḥ surasiddhaniṣevitāḥ ||
sarve sūryāśramāḥ puṇyāḥ sarvā nadyaḥ saparvatāḥ ||
gosiddhamuni vāsāśca deśāḥ puṇyāḥ prakīrtitāḥ || 25 ||
sūryāyatanasaṃsthānāṃ yadyadalpaṃ tu dīyate ||
tadanaṃtaphalaṃ jñeyaṃ vacaḥ kṣetrānubhāvataḥ|| 36 ||
grahaṇaṃ caṃdrasūryābhyāmuttarāyaṇamuttamam ||
viṣuvaṃ savyatīpātaṃ ṣaḍaśītimukhaṃ tathā || 27 ||
dinacchidrāṇi saṃkrāṃtiḥ puṇyaṃ viṣupadaṃ khaga ||
iti kālaḥ samā khyātaḥ puṃsāṃ puṇyavivardhanaḥ || 28 ||
bhaktibhāvaḥ parā prītirdharmo dharmaikabhāvanaḥ ||
pratipattiriti jñeyaṃ śraddhāparyāyapaṃcakam ||29||
śraddhayā vidhivatpātre pratipāditamuttamam ||
tasmācchraddhāṃ samāsthāya deyamakṣayamicchatā || 1.189.30 ||
yaddānaṃ śraddhayā pātre vidhivatpratipāditam ||
tadanaṃtaphalaṃ jñeya mapi vā bhāramātrakam || 31 ||
ārteṣu dīneṣu guṇānviteṣu yaḥ śraddhayā svalpamapi pradadyāt ||
sa sarvakāmānsamupaiti lokāñcchraddhaiva dānaṃ pravadaṃti tajjñāḥ || 32 ||
śraddhā dānaṃ paraṃ jñeyaṃ śraddhā eva tapaḥ param ||
śraddhāṃ yajñamuśantīha śraddhā paramupoṣitam || 33 ||
athāhiṃsā kṣamā satyaṃ hrīḥ śraddheṃdriyasaṃyamaḥ ||
dānamiṣṭaṃ tapo dhyānaṃ daśakaṃ dharmasādhanam || 34 ||
haṃtavyastaiḥ samastairvā sūryadharmairanuṣṭhitaiḥ ||
sūryaukasāṃ ca saṃprāptergatirekā prakīrtitā || 35 ||
yathā bhūḥ sarvabhūtānāṃ śāṃtiratiśayaḥ smṛtaḥ ||
kuryātpuṇyaṃ mahattasmānmama lokepsayā sudhī || 36 ||
parastrīdravyasaṃkalpaṃ yaḥ sāpekṣaṃ karoti ca ||
gurumārtamaśaktaṃ vā videśe prasthitaṃ tathā ||
aribhiḥ paribhūtaṃ ca saṃtyajeccaiva pāpakṛt || 37 ||
tadbhāryāmitraputreṣu yaścāvajñāṃ karoti ca ||
ityetatpātakaṃ jñeyaṃ guruniṃdāsamaṃ bhavet || 38 ||
brahmaghnaśca surāpaśca steyī ca gurutalpagaḥ ||
mahāpātakinastvete tatsaṃyogī ca pañcamaḥ || 39 || krodhāddveṣādbhayāllobhādbrāhmaṇasya vadeta yaḥ ||
prāṇāṃtikaṃ mahādoṣaṃ brahmahā sa udāhṛtaḥ || 1.189.40 ||
brāhmaṇaṃ ca samāhūya yācamānamakiṃcanam ||
yannāstīti ca yo brūyātsa cāṇḍālaṃ udāhṛtaḥ || 41 ||
devadvijagavāṃ bhūmiṃ pūrvadattāṃ hareta yaḥ ||
pranaṣṭāmapi kāle tu tamāhurbrahmaghātakam || 42 ||
adhītya yo raverjñānaṃ parityajati maṃdadhīḥ ||
surāpena samaṃ jñeyaṃ tasya pāpaṃ ca suvrata || 43 ||
agnihotraparityāgaḥ paṃcayajñiyakarmaṇām ||
mātāpitṛparityāgaḥ kūṭasākṣyaṃ suhṛdvadhaḥ || 44 ||
apriyaṃ sūryabhaktānāmabhakṣyasya ca bhakṣaṇam ||
evaṃ niraparādhānāṃ prāṇināṃ ca pramāraṇam || 45 ||
sarvādhipatyameteṣāṃ nāsti devapurottame ||
ātmalokādhipatyaṃ tu yacchetsarvajatpatiḥ || 46 ||
kecidatraiva mucyante jñānayogaparā narāḥ ||
āvartaṃte punaścānye saṃsāre bhogatatparāḥ || 47 ||
tasmādvimokṣamanvicchanbhogāsaktiṃ vivarjayet ||
viraktaḥ śāṃtacittātmā sauralokamavāpnuyāt || 48 ||
yaccāpyasaktahṛdayā japantīmaṃ prasaṃgataḥ ||
teṣāmapi vadatyekaḥ svānubhāvānurūpataḥ || 49 ||
tannārcayanti ye bhānuṃ sakṛducchiṣṭadehinaḥ ||
teṣāṃ piśācaloke tu bhogānbhānuḥ prayacchati || 1.189.50 ||
dvirjapaṃti ca ye bhānuṃ krūrāḥ saṃkruddhalocanāḥ ||
rakṣoloke ravisteṣāṃ mahābhāgyaṃ prayacchati || 51 ||
trirarcayanti ye bhānuṃ madyamāṃsaratā narāḥ ||
ṛṣiloke ravisteṣāṃ bhogāndivyānprayacchati || 52 ||
ye nṛtyagītaṃ kurvaṃti triścaturdhā yadṛcchayā ||
sūryasyāgre tu te yāṃti gaṃdharvabhavanaṃ khaga || 53 ||
lokāḥ khyātiṃ samuddiśya pūjayaṃti ca gopatim ||
teṣāṃ śakrālaye bhānuḥ kāmāntsarvānprayacchati || 54 ||
kāmāsaktena cittena yaḥ ṣaḍarcayate ravim ||
prājāpatye ravistasya loke bhogānprayacchati || 55 ||
navakṛtvorcayedyastu citrabhānuṃ khagādhipa ||
sa yāti viṣṇusālokyaṃ viṣṇunā saha modate || 56||
tasmādapi paraṃ sthānaṃ yadbhūtānāṃ manoharam ||
aprameyaguṇaidivyairvimānaiḥ sārvakāmikaiḥ || 57 ||
asaṃkhyairvastubhirvyāptaṃ gairikai raktacitrakaiḥ ||
nānāgṛhasamākīrṇaiḥ sūryakoṭisamaprabham || 58 ||
tatsthānaṃ te pragacchaṃti arcayanti ca ye dvijān ||
tatra loke khagaśreṣṭha vasaṃti viharaṃti ca ||
tasmādapi paraṃ sthānaṃ jyotiṣkaṃ sauramucyate || 59 ||
evaṃ sūryānubhāvena nikṛṣṭenāpi karmaṇā ||
naraiḥ sthānānyavāpyante śraddhābhāvānurūpataḥ || ||1.189.60||
iti śrībhaviṣye mahāpurāṇe brāhme parvaṇi saptamīkalpe sauradharmeṣu saptāśvānūrusaṃvādo nāma ekonanavatyadhikaśatatamo.adhyāyaḥ||189|| |||9|||
sauradharmeṣu sūryānūrusaṃvādavarṇanam
|| || saptāśvatilaka uvāca || ||
tārārūpavimānānāmimāḥ saṃti ca koṭayaḥ ||
yaḥ kuryāttu namaskāraṃ tasyaiva ca phalaṃ bhavet || 1 ||
ityetā gatayaḥ proktā mahatyaḥ sauradharmiṇām ||
tasmātsauraḥ sadā dharmaḥ kartavyaḥ sukhamicchatā || 2 ||
idānīṃ pāpanicayāḥ sthūlā narakahetavaḥ ||
te samāsena kathyante manovākkāyasādhanaiḥ || 3 ||
gavāṃ mārge vane cāgneḥ pure grāme samarpaṇam ||
ityetānīha pāpāni surāpānasamāni ca || 4 ||
vane sarvasya haraṇaṃ narastrīgajavājinām ||
gobhūsamīpajātānāmoṣadhīnāṃ ca khecara || 5 ||
candanāgurukarpūrakastūrīpaṭṭavāsasām ||
hastanyāsāpa haraṇaṃ rukmasteyasamaṃ smṛtam || 6 ||
kanyānāṃ varayogyānāmākarṣaṇamasaṃgataḥ ||
putramitrakalatreṣu gamanaṃ bhaginīṣu ca || 7 ||
kumārīsāhasaṃ ghoramaṃtyajastrīniṣevaṇam ||
savarṇāyāśca gamanaṃ gurutalpasamaṃ smṛtam || 8 ||
mahāpātakatulyāni pāpānyuktāni yāni tu ||
tāni pātakasaṃjñāni brūmahe copapātakam || 9 ||
dvijāyārthaṃ pariśrutya na prayacchati yo dvija ||
sadbhāryāṇāṃ ca saṃtyāgaḥ sādhubandhutapasvinām || 1.190.10 ||
gobhū hiraṇyavastrāṇāmapahāraḥ prayatnataḥ ||
īśvarārpitabuddhīnāṃ pīḍanaṃ sumahatkṛtam || 11 ||
yaḥ pīḍāmāśramasthāna ācaredalpikāmapi ||
tadbhūtyuparibhūtasya paśudhānyadhanasya ca || 12 ||
kūpadhānyapaśusteyamayājyānāṃ ca yājanam ||
yajñārāmataḍāgānāṃ dārāpatyasya vikrayaḥ || 13 ||
tīrtha yātropavāsānāṃ vrate ca japakarmaṇi ||
strīdhanānyupakarṣaṃti ye janāḥ pāpakarmaṇā || 14 ||
arakṣaṇaṃ ca nārīṇāṃ madyapastrīniṣevaṇam ||
ṛṣīṇāmapradānaṃ ca dhānyavṛddhyupasevanam || 15 ||
devāgnisādhusādhvīnāṃ nindā gobrāhmaṇasya ca ||
pratyakṣaṃ vā parokṣaṃ vā rājamāṇḍalikānapi || 16 ||
utsannapitṛdevāśca svakarmatyāginaśca ye ||
duḥśīlā nāstikāḥ pāpāḥ sadasacchūnyavādinaḥ || 17 ||
evaṃ kāme pravṛtte tu viyonau paśuyoniṣu ||
rajasvalāsvayonau tu maithunaṃ yaḥ samācaret || 18 ||
strīputramitrasaṃprīte rārāmocchedakāśca ye ||
janasyāpriyavaktāro janābhiprāyabhedinaḥ || 19 ||
bhettā taḍāgavaprāṇāṃ saṃkramāṇāṃ rasasya ca ||
ekapaṃktisthitānāṃ ca paṃktibhedaṃ karoti yaḥ ||1.190.20||
ityetaistu narāḥ pāpairupapātakinaḥ smṛtāḥ ||21||
iti śrībhaviṣye mahāpurāṇe brāhme parvaṇi saptamīkalpe sauradharmeṣu sūryānūrusaṃvāde navatyadhikaśatatamo.adhyāyaḥ || 190 || || cha ||
saptāśvatilakāruṇasaṃvādam
|| saptāśvatilaka uvāca || ||
ye gobrāhmaṇasasyānāṃ sādhūnāṃ tu tapasvinām ||
dūṣakāścaiva vartaṃte narā narakagāminaḥ || 1 ||
pariśrameṇa tapyante ye.apare tasya sūcakāḥ ||
paradāraratānāṃ ca kanyāyā dūṣakāśca ye || 2 ||
goṣṭhāgnijalaramyāsu tarucchāyānageṣu ca ||
tyajaṃti ye purīṣāṇi ārāmā yataneṣu ca || 3 ||
madyapānaratā nityaṃ gītavādyaratā narāḥ ||
kāmakrodhamadāviṣṭā raṃdhrānveṣaṇatatparāḥ || 4 ||
pākhaṇḍamatasaṃyuktā vṛthā saṃlāpa kautukāḥ ||
ye mārgānuparudhaṃti parasīmāṃ haraṃti ca || 5 ||
kūṭaśāsanakartāraḥ kūṭakarmakṛto narāḥ ||
dhanuṣaḥ śilpiśastrāṇāṃ yaḥ kartā yaśca vikrayī || 6 ||
nirdayotīvabhṛtyeṣu paśūnāṃ damakaśca yaḥ ||
mithyā pravadato vācamākarṇayati yaḥ śanaiḥ ||
svāmimitragurudrohī māyāvī capalaḥ śaṭhaḥ || 7 ||
ye bhāryāputramitrāṇi bālavṛddhakuśāturān ||
bhṛtyānatithibandhūṃśca tyajaṃti ca bubhukṣitān || 8 ||
yaḥ svayaṃ pakvamaśnāti viprāyānnaṃ na yacchati ||
vṛthā pākaḥ sa vijñeyo brahmavādiṣu garhitaḥ || 9 ||
niyamaṃ svayamādāya ye tyajaṃtyajiteṃdriyāḥ ||
pravrajyāvasitā ye ca rahasyānāṃ tu bhedakāḥ || 1.191.10 ||
ye tāḍayaṃti gāṃ mūḍhāstrāsayaṃti muhurmuhuḥ ||
durbalaṃ na ca puṣṇaṃti pranaṣṭānnānviṣaṃti ca || 11 ||
pīḍayaṃtyatibhāreṇa akṣayaṃ vāhayaṃti ca ||
vṛṣāṇāṃ vṛṣaṇānanye pāpiṣṭhā gālayaṃti hi ||
vāhayaṃti ca gāṃ vaṃdhyāṃ te pāpiṣṭhā narādhamāḥ || 12 ||
anarthavikalaṃ hīnaṃ bālavṛddhakṛśānugam ||
nānukaṃpaṃti ye mūḍhāste yāṃti narakaṃ narāḥ || 13 ||
ajāvikā māhiṣikāḥ savitrīvṛṣalīpatiḥ ||
kṣatraviṭśūdravṛddhāśca svadharmavihatāḥ sadā || 14 ||
śilpinaḥ kārukā veśyāḥ kṣemakāranṛpadhvajāḥ ||
nartakyo jyotiṣi hatāḥ sarve narakagāminaḥ || 15 ||
ghṛta tailānupānāni madhumāṃsarasāsavam ||
guḍekṣukṣīraśākānhi dadhimūlaphalāni ca || 16 ||
tṛṇāni kāṣṭhaṃ puṣpāṇi bījauṣadhimanuttamām ||
upānacchatra śakaṭamāsanaṃ śayanaṃ mṛdaḥ || 17 ||
tāmraṃ sīsaṃ trapuṃ kāṃsyaṃ śaṃkhādyaṃ ca jalodbhavam ||
vārkṣaṃ vā vaiṇavaṃ vāpi gṛhopakaraṇāni ca ||18||
aurṇakārpāsakauśeyabhaṃgapaṭṭodbhavāni ca ||
sthūlasūkṣmāṇi saṃmūḍhā ye ca lokā haraṃti vai ||19||
evamādīni cānyāni dravyāṇi vividhāni ca||
narakeṣu dhruvaṃ gacchedyau hareta pumānbalāt || 1.191.20 ||
yadvā tadvā tu pārokṣyamapi sarṣapamātrakam ||
apahṛtya naro yāti narakaṃ nātra saṃśayaḥ || 21 ||
evamādyairnaraḥ pāpairutkrāṃteḥ samanaṃtaram ||
śarīrayātanārthaṃ tatpūrvakāyamavāpnuyāt || 22 ||
yamaloke vrajedevaṃ śarīreṇa yamājñayā ||
yamadūtairmahāghorairnīyamānaḥ suduḥkhitaḥ || 23 ||
devamānuṣajīvānāmadharmaniratātmanām ||
dharmarājaḥ smṛtaḥ śāstā sughorairvividhairvadhaiḥ || 24 ||
vinayābhāvayuktānāṃ pramādā tsvalitātmanām ||
prāyaścittairbahuvidhaiḥ pātakaṃ naṣṭatāmiyāt || 25 || pāradārikacorāṇāmanyāyavyavahāriṇām ||
śāstā kṣitipatiḥ proktaḥ pracchannānāṃ ca dharmarāṭ || 26 ||
tasmātkṛtasya pāpasya prāyaścittaṃ samācaret ||
nābhuktasyānyathā nāśaḥ kalpakoṭiśatairapi || 27 ||
yaḥ karoti śubhaṃ karma kārayedanumodayet ||
kāyena manasā vācā sa viṃdetottamaṃ sukham ||28||
iti saṃkṣepataḥ proktā pāpabhedāttridhā gatiḥ ||
tathānyā gatayaścitrāḥ kathyaṃte karmabhedataḥ || 29 ||
|| iti śrībhaviṣye mahāpurāṇe brāhme parvaṇi saptamīkalpe sauradharme saptāśvatilakāruṇasaṃvāda ekanavatyadhikaśatatamo.adhyāyaḥ || 191 |||| cha || ||
saptāśvatilakānūrusaṃvādavarṇanam
saptāśvatilaka uvāca || ||
saṃtrāsajananaṃ ghoraṃ pāpānāṃ pāpakāriṇām |||
garbhasthairjāyamānaiśca bālaistaruṇamadhyamaiḥ || 1
strīpunapuṃsakairvṛddhairgaṃtavyaṃ sarvajaṃtuṣu ||
śubhāśubhaphalaṃ tatra bhoktavyaṃ dehibhistathā || 2 ||
citraguptādibhiḥ sarvairdharmasthaiḥ satyavādibhi ||
proktaṃ vai dharmarājasya nikaṭe yacchubhāśubham ||
avaśyaṃ hi kṛtaṃ karma bhoktavyaṃ tadvicāritam || 3 ||
tatra ye śubhakarmāṇaḥ saumya cittā dayānvitāḥ ||
te narā yāṃti saumyena yathā yamaniketanam || 4 ||
yaḥ pradadyāddvijeṃdrāṇāmupānatkāṣṭhachatrakam ||
sa ca dharmeṇa mahatā sukhaṃ yāti yamālayam || 5 ||
sopānatko naro yastu devāyatanamāviśet ||
viśeṣato garbhagṛhaṃ sa saṃtrāsamupāśnute ||6||
sopānatkāni dānāni tathānnaṃ tu viśeṣataḥ ||
evaṃ dānaviśeṣeṇa dharmarājapuraṃ naraḥ ||
yasmādyāti sukhenaiva tasmāddharmaṃ samācaret ||7||
ye punaḥ krūrakarmāṇo narāḥ pāparatāḥ khaga ||
te ghoreṇa tathā yāṃti dakṣiṇena yamālayam || 8 ||
ṣaḍaśītisahasrāṇi yojanānāmaśīti ca ||
vaivasvatapuraṃ jñeyaṃ nānārūpamiti sthitam || 9 ||
samīpasthamivābhāti narāṇāṃ śubhacāriṇām ||
pāpānāmatidūrasthaṃ tathā raudreṇa gacchatām || 1.192.10 ||
tīkṣṇakaṃṭakayuktena śarkarānicitena ca ||
kṣuradhārātinistriṃśaiḥ pāṣāṇaiściṃtitena ca || 11 ||
kvacidarkeṇa mahatā duraṃtaiścaiva khātakaiḥ ||
lohaśaṃkubhirācchinnāstathā khaḍgaiḥ samanvitāḥ || || 32 ||
tataḥ patadbhirvimalaiḥ parvatairvṛkṣasaṃkulaiḥ ||
pretaprākārayuktena yāṃti mārgeṇa duḥkhitāḥ || 13 ||
kvacidviṣamagartābhiḥ kvacilloṣṭhaiḥ sapicchalaiḥ ||
sutaptavālukābhiśca tathā tīkṣṇaiśca śaṃkubhiḥ || 14 || anekaśākhāracitairvyāptairvaṃśavanaiḥ kvacit ||
kaṣṭena tamasaḥ mārga anā laṃbe sudāruṇi ||15||
atha śṛṃgāṭakairvyāptaiḥ kvaciddāvāgninā punaḥ ||
kvacittaptaśilābhiśca kvacidvyāptaṃ himena tu || 16 ||
kvacidvālukayā vyāptamākaṃṭhāṃtaṃ praveśayet ||
kvacidduṣṭāṃbunā vyāptaṃ kvacicca kariṣāgninā||17||
kvacitsiṃhaiḥ kvacidvyāghrairdaṃśaiḥ kīṭaiśca dāruṇaiḥ ||
kvacinmahājalaukābhiḥ kvaci dvājagaraiḥ punaḥ ||18||
makṣikābhiśca raudrābhiḥ kvacitsapeṃrviṣolbaṇaiḥ ||
mahāgajeṃdrayūnaiśca balonmattaiḥ pramāthibhiḥ ||19||
paṃthānamullikhadbhiśca tīkṣṇa śṛṃgairmahāvṛṣaiḥ ||
mahāśṛṃgaiśca mahiṣairuṣṭrairmattairmadāturaiḥ||1.192.20||
ḍākinībhiśca raudrābhirvikarālaiśca rākṣasaiḥ||
vyādhibhiśca mahāghoraiḥ pīḍyamānā vrajaṃti hi || || 21 ||
mahāpāśavimiśreṇa mahācaṃḍena vāyunā ||
mahāpāṣāṇavarṣeṇa hanyamānā nirāśrayāḥ || 22||
kvacidvidyutprapātena dīryamāṇā vrajaṃti hi ||
patadbhirvajrasaṃghātairulkāpātaiśca dāruṇaiḥ || 23 ||
pradīptāṃgāravarṣeṇa dahyamānā vrajaṃti hi ||
mahāṃdhakāraśukreṇa pīḍyamānā vrajaṃti hi || 24 ||
mahāmegharavairghorairvitrāsyaṃte muhurmuhuḥ ||
tīkṣṇapāṣāṇayuktena pūryamāṇāḥ samantataḥ || 25 ||
mahākṣurāṃbudhārābhiḥ sevyamānā vrajaṃti hi ||
mahāmegharavairghorai rvitrāsyante muhurmuhuḥ ||26||
bhṛśaṃ śītena tīkṣṇena rūkṣeṇa mārutena ca ||
itthaṃ mārgeṇa raudreṇa pātheyarahitena ca ||27||
nirālaṃbena durgeṇa nirjanena samaṃtataḥ ||
aviśrāmeṇa mahatā vigatāpāyadurdharaiḥ || 28 ||
nīyaṃte dehinaḥ sarve ye mūḍhāḥ pāpakāriṇaḥ ||
iti jñātvā naraḥ kuryātpuṇyaṃ pāpaṃ ca varjayet ||
puṇyena yāti devatvaṃ pāpena narakaṃ vrajet || 29 ||
yairmanāgapi deveśo manasā pūjito raviḥ ||
te kadāpi na paśyaṃti yamasya vadanaṃ khaga || || 1.192.30 ||
kiṃ tu pāpairmahāghoraiḥ kiñcitkālaṃ tavājñayā ||
bhavaṃti pretarājānastato yāṃti raveḥ puram|| 31 ||
ye punaḥ sarvabhāvena bhajante bhuvi bhāska ram ||
na te limpaṃti pāpena padmapatramivāṃbhasā || 32 ||
tasmātprakuryādbhaktiṃ vai bhāskare satataṃ naraḥ ||
śraddhayā pūjayedbhānuṃ ya icchedvipulaṃ dhanam || 33 ||
iti śrībhaviṣye mahāpurāṇe brāhme parvaṇi saptamīkalpe sauradharme saptāśvatilakānūrusaṃvāde dvinavatyadhikaśatatamo.adhyāyaḥ ||192|| ||9||
dantakāṣṭhavidhivarṇanam
|| || saptāśvatilaka uvāca || ||
ayane viṣuve vāre saṃkrāṃtau grahaṇe tathā ||
pūjayetsatataṃ bhānuṃ saptamyāṃ tu viśeṣataḥ || 1 ||
vainateya nibodha tvaṃ vidhānaṃ saptamīvrate ||
etaddhi paramaṃ guhyaṃ raverārādhanaṃ param || 2 ||
siddhārthakaistu prathamā dvitīyā cārkasaṃpuṭaiḥ ||
tṛtīyā maricaiḥ kāryā caturthī tila saptamī || 3 ||
saptamī caudanairvīra saptamī parikīrtitā ||
ityetāḥ sapta saptamyaḥ kartavyā bhūtimicchatā || 4 ||
tathā cānukrame tāsāṃ lakṣaṇaṃ kathayā myaham ||
māghe vā mārgaśīrṣe vā kāryā śuklā tu saptamī || 5 ||
ārtasya tu na niyamaḥ pakṣamāsakṛto bhavet ||
ardhapraharaśeṣe tu kuryādvai daṃtadhāva nam || 6 ||
pañcamyāṃ tatra ye vṛkṣāḥ kāmitāstānvadāmyaham ||
madhūke putralābhaḥ syādduḥkhahā mārkavo bhavet || 7 ||
badaryā ca bṛhatyā ca kṣipraṃ rogātpramucyate ||
aiśvaryaṃ ca bhavedbilvaiḥ khadireṇa ca saṃcayaḥ || 8 ||
śatrukṣayaḥ kadaṃbeṣu arthalābhotimuktake ||
gurutāṃ yāti sarvatra āṭarūṣakasaṃbhavaiḥ || 9 ||
jñātipradhānatāṃ yāti aśvattho yacchate yaśaḥ ||
karavīrātparijñānamacalaṃ syānna saṃśayaḥ || 1.193.10 ||
śriyaṃ prāpnoti vipulāṃ śirīṣasya nive śane ||
priyaṃguṃ sevyamānasya saubhāgyaṃ paramaṃ bhavet || 11 ||
abhīpsitārthasiddhyarthaṃ sukhāsīnotha vāgyataḥ ||
kāmaṃ yatheṣṭahṛdaye kṛtvā samabhi maṃtrya ca ||
maṃtreṇānena matimānaśnīyāddantadhāvanam|| 12 ||
varaṃ dattvābhijānāsi kāmadaṃ ca vanaspate ||
siddhiṃ prayaccha me nityaṃ daṃtakāṣṭha namo.astu te || 13 ||
trīnvārānparijapyaivaṃ bhakṣayeddaṃtadhāvanam ||
paścātprakṣālya kāṣṭhaṃ tu śucau deśe vinikṣipet || 14 ||
ūrdhve nipatite siddhistathā cābhi mukhe sthite ||
atonyathā tu patite ānīya punarutsṛjet || 15 ||
parāṅmukhaṃ yadi bhavettrīnvārāndaṃtadhāvanam ||
asiddhāṃ tu vijānīyānna grāhyā sā tu saptamī || 16 ||
brahmacārī tu tāṃ rātriṃ svapyānmaṃgalasevayā ||
bibhradvāsonupahataṃ śucirācārasaṃyutaḥ || 17 ||
tasyāṃ rātryāṃ vyatītāyāṃ prāta rutthāya vai khaga ||
prakṣālayenmukhaṃ dhīmānaśnīyāddantadhāvanam || 18 ||
upaviśya śucirbhūtvā praṇamya śirasā ravim ||
japaṃ yatheṣṭaṃ kṛtvā tu juhuyācca hutāśane || 19 ||
tatoparāhnasamaye snātvā mṛdgomayāṃbubhiḥ ||
vidhivanniyamaṃ kṛtvā maunī śuklāṃbaraḥ śuciḥ || 1.193.20 ||
pūjayitvā vidhiṃ bhaktyā devadevaṃ divākaram ||
svapyāddevasya purato gāyatrījapatatparaḥ || 21 ||
iti śrībhaviṣye mahāpurāṇe brāhme parvaṇi saptamīkalpe sauradharme dantakāṣṭhavidhivarṇanaṃnāma trinavatyadhikaśatatamo.adhyāyaḥ || 193 || || cha ||
sūryāruṇasaṃvāde svapnavarṇanam
|| saptāśvatilaka uvāca || ||
ataḥ paraṃ pravakṣyāmi yairyairya tphalamaśnute ||
svapne dṛṣṭe tu saptamyāṃ puruṣo niyatavrataḥ || 1 ||
samāpya vidhivatsarvāṃ japahomādikāṃ kriyām ||
bhūmau śayyāṃ samāsthāya devadevaṃ vicintayet || 2 ||
hanta supto yadi naraḥ paśyetsvapne divākaram ||
śakradhvajaṃ vā candraṃ vā tasya sarvāḥ samṛddhayaḥ || 3 ||
bhṛṃgāracamarādarśakanakābharaṇāni ca ||
rudhirasya srutiḥ keśapātaṃ aiśvaryakārakaḥ ||
svapne vṛkṣādhirohe tu kṣipramaiśvaryamāhave || 4 ||
dohanaṃ mahiṣīsiṃhīgodhenūnāṃ kare svake ||
bandhaścāsāṃ rājyalābho nābheḥ sparśe tu durmatiḥ || 5 ||
aviṃ hatvā svayaṃ khādetsiṃhamaṃbujameva ca ||
svāṃgamasthi hutāśaṃ ca surāpānaṃ khagādhipa || 6 ||
haime vā rājate vāpi yo bhuṃkte pāyasaṃ naraḥ ||
pātre tu padmapatre vā tasyaiśvaryaṃ samaṃ bhavet || || 7 ||
dyūte ca vātha vā yuddhe vijayo hi sukhāvahaḥ ||
gātrasya svasya jvalanaṃ śirobandhaśca bhūtaye || 8 ||
mālyāṃbarāṇāṃ śuklānāṃ hayānāṃ paśupakṣiṇām ||
sadā lābhaṃ praśaṃsaṃti viṣṭhānāṃ cānulepanam || 9 ||
hayayāne bhavetkṣipraṃ rathayāne prajāgamaḥ ||
nānāśirobāhutā ca gṛhasthāṃ kurute śriyam || 1.194.10 ||
agamyāgamanaṃ dhanyaṃ vedādhyayanamuttamam ||
devadvijaśreṣṭhavīraguruvṛddhatapasvinaḥ || 11 ||
yadvadaṃti naraṃ svapne satyameveti tadviduḥ ||
praśastaṃ darśanaṃ caiṣāmāśīrvādaḥ khagādhipa || 12 ||
rājyaṃ syātsvaśiraśchede dhanaṃ bahuvadhe bhavet ||
rudite bhakṣyasaṃprāptī rājyaṃ nigaḍabandhane||13||
parvataṃ turagaṃ siṃhaṃ vṛṣabhaṃ gajameva hi ||
mahadaiśvaryamāpnoti yo vikramyādhirohati || 14 ||
āgṛhṇāno grahāṃstārā marīciṃ parivartayan ||
unmūlayati parvatāṃśca rājā bhavati bhūtale || 15 ||
dehānniṣkāṃtiraṃtrāṇāṃ sarveṣāṃ ca khagādhipa ||
pānaṃ samudrasaritāmaiśvaryasukhakārakam || 16 ||||
balaṃ cāṃbunidhiṃ vāpi tīrthapāraṃ prayāti yaḥ ||
tasyāpatyaṃ bhavedvīra acalaṃ ca khagādhipa || 17 ||
bhavatyarthāgamaḥ śīghraṃ kṛmirvā yadi bhakṣayet |||
aṃgānāṃ ca surūpāṇāṃ lābho darśanameva ca ||
saṃyogaścaiva māṃgalyairārogyaṃ dhanameva ca || 18 ||
aiśvaryaṃ rājyalābhaśca yasminsvapna udāhṛtaḥ ||
sapta syānnātra saṃdehaścaturbhiḥ śruta uttamaḥ || 19 ||
paṃcabhiḥ putrabāhulyaṃ ṣaḍbhirāyuḥ sutāndhanam ||
saptabhirvividhānkāmānaṣṭabhirvividhaṃ yaśaḥ || || 1.194.20 ||
iti śrībhaviṣye mahāpurāṇe brāhme parvaṇi saptamīkalpe sūryāruṇasaṃvāde svapnavarṇanaṃ nāma caturnavatyadhikaśatatamo.adhyāyaḥ || 194 |||5 ||
sūryāruṇasaṃvāde svapnavarṇanam
|| || anūruruvāca || ||
bhagavañchrotumicchāmi saptamīnāṃ paraṃ vidhim ||
sarvāsāmanurūpāṇāṃ kathayasva mahāmune || 1 ||
|| saptāśvatilaka uvāca || ||
śṛṇu vīra khagaśreṣṭha saptamīnāṃ paraṃ vidhim ||
kīrtayiṣyāmi te sarvaṃ yathāvatparipṛcchate || 2 ||
tulyaṃ kila khagaśreṣṭha yathākhyātaṃ vivasvatā ||
śuklapakṣe ravidine pravṛtte cottarāyaṇe || 3 ||
putradāradhanakṣetre gṛhṇīyātsaptamīvratam ||
ṛṣibhirjñānasaṃpannaiḥ sarvakāmaphala pradaiḥ || 4 ||
saptamyaḥ saptāakhyātāstāsāṃ nāmāni me śṛṇu ||
arkasaṃpuṭakairekā dvitīyā maricaistathā || 5 ||
tṛtīyā niṃbapatraiśca caturthī phala saptamī ||
saptamī kāmikā nāmnā vidhimāsāṃ nibodha me || 6 ||
paṃcamyāmekabhaktaṃ tu kuryānniyatamānasaḥ ||
alpāhāraṃ na kurvīta maithunaṃ dūratastyaje t || 7 ||
varjayenmadhu māṃsaṃ ca atyamlaṃ ca khagādhipa ||
prabhāte caiva ṣaṣṭhyāṃ tu ekaikaparṇasaṃpuṭe || 8 ||
ghṛtaśālyodanaṃ kṛtvā bhakṣayettu vidhānataḥ ||
anyadannamabhuṃjānaḥ saptamyāṃ bhojanaṃ bhavet || 9 ||
ekaikavṛddhābhiyuktairyo vasettu khageśvara ||
anyatra maricaṃ bhakṣenniṃbapatrāṇyataḥ param || 1.195.10 ||
evaṃ labdhaphalānīha pakṣayorubhayorapi||
annādai rahito yatnādanodana iti smṛtaḥ || 11 ||
ācaredvidhivadbhaktyā pūjayitvā vibhāvasum ||
ahorātraṃ vāyubhakṣaḥ kuryādvijayasaptamīm || 12 ||
ekaikaṃ sapta saptamīratraiva vidhivaccaret ||
prālekhya tāsāṃ nāmāni patrakeṣu pṛthakpṛthak || 13 ||
tāni sarvāṇi nāmāni vilekhya susamāhitaḥ ||
śvetacaṃdanadigdhāṃge mālyadāmopaśobhite || 14 ||
saptadhānyahiraṇyāḍhye śaśikundeṃdusannibhe|13 ||
aśvatthāśokapatrāḍhye dadhyodanasamanvite || 15 ||
tadarthaṃ pūjayedbhaktyā taistairdṛṣṭairna saṃśayaḥ ||
dṛṣṭvā tu śobhanaṃ svapnaṃ na bhūyaḥ śayanaṃ svapet||16||
prātaśca kī rtayetsvapne yathādṛṣṭaṃ khagādhipa ||
prājñabhojakaviprebhyaḥ suhṛdbhyaśca khagādhipa || 17 ||
tato madhyāhnasamaye snātaḥ prayatamānasaḥ ||
taṃ caiva devaṃ vidhivatpūjayitvā divākaram || 18 ||
samyakkṛtajapo maunī naro hutahutāśanaḥ ||
niṣkramya devāyatanādbhojakāya nivedayet || 19 ||
bhavedalābho yadi bhojakānāṃ viprāstamarhaṃti purāṇavijñāḥ ||
ye maṃtravedāvayaveṣu niścitā vibhuṃ samabhyarcya divaṃ vrajeyuḥ || 1.195.20 ||
kṛtvaivaṃ saptamī sapta naro bhakti samanvitaḥ ||
śraddadhānopi sūryasya sa kathaṃ nāpnuyātphalam ||21||
daśānāmaśvamedhānāṃ kṛtānāṃ yatphalaṃ bhavet ||
tatphalaṃ saptamī sapta kṛtvā bhaktyā labheta nā || 22 ||
duṣpāpaṃ nāsti tadvīra saptamyāṃ yanna dahyate ||
na ca rogo.astyasau loke ya etābhirna śāmyati || 23 ||
kuṣṭhāni yāni raudrāṇi duśchedyāni bhiṣagjanaiḥ ||
nīyante tāni sarvāṇi garuḍeneva pannagāḥ || 24 ||
sakalavibudhamānyaṃ svaprakāśaṃ janānāmabhimataphaladāne dīkṣitaṃ taṃ supūjyam || sutadhanakulabhogaiḥ saukhyapuṇyairupeto vrajati ca sutanuṃ kāṃ śāśvatā tigmaraśmeḥ || 25 || ||
iti śrībhaviṣye mahāpurāṇe brāhme parvaṇi saptamīkalpe sauradharme sūryāruṇasaṃvāde svapnavarṇanaṃ nāma paṃcanavatyadhikaśatatamo.adhyāyaḥ || 195 || cha ||
nāmapūjāvidhivarṇanam
||saptāśvavatilaka uvāca|| ||
atītya bhuktaṃ puruṣaḥ saptamyāṃ garuḍāgraja ||
maitrīṃ vidadhyātsarvatra jīvahiṃsāṃ vivarjayet || 1 ||
saptamyāṃ na spṛśettailaṃ nīlaṃ vastraṃ na dhārayet ||
na śayīta striyā sārdhaṃ na seveta durodaram || 2 ||
na rudyādaśrupātena na vā dhyāyetpiśācakān ||
nākṛṣecchiraso yūkā na vṛthāvādamācaret ||
parasyāniṣṭakathanamativādaṃ ca varjayet || 3 ||
na kaṃcittāḍayejjaṃtuṃ na viśeta kadācana ||
brahmahatyāmavāpnoti viśamāno ravergṛham || 4 ||
ityete samayāḥ proktāḥ saurāṇāṃ garuḍāgraja ||
bhojakānāṃ viśeṣeṇa purā me bhānunānagha || 5 ||
bhojakaḥ khagaśārdūla yo lobhāddravyamutsṛjet ||
vṛddhyai tu satataṃ vīra sa gacchennarakaṃ dhuvam || 6 ||
viśeṣe cālpakaśate kāmayāne khagādhipa ||
prayujyamāno bhojakastu paṃcakena śatena vai || 7 ||
prāyaścittī bhavedvīra na cārhaḥ pūjane raveḥ||
kṛtvā sāṃtapanaṃ kṛcchraṃ tatraḥ saṃpūjayedravim || 8 ||
nānyadevapratiṣṭhā tu kartavyā bhojakena tu ||
kṛtvā tu tāṃ khagaśreṣṭha prāyaścittīyate naraḥ || 9 ||
tasmāttu tāṃ na kuryādvai bhojakaḥ khagasattama ||
muktvā tu bhāskaraṃ devaṃ nānyaṃ devaṃ nivedayet || 1.196.10 ||
kṛtvādhiveśaṃ devānāṃ brahmādīnāṃ khagādhipa ||
bhojako na spṛśedbhānuṃ kuryātkṛcchraṃ ca śuddhaye || 11 ||
kṛtvā tu kṛcchraṃ vidhi vacchuddherhetuṃ khagādhipa ||
tataḥ pūjayituṃ bhānumadhikārī bhavennaraḥ || 12 ||
na vijñātaṃ pradātavyaṃ na mlānaṃ na ca dūṣitam ||
na ca paryuṣitaṃ mālyaṃ dātavyamṛddhimicchatā || 13 ||
devamullocayedyastu sa khalaḥ puṣpalobhataḥ ||
puṣpāṇi ca sugaṃdhīni bhojako netarāṇi ca || 14 ||
brahmahatyāmavāpnoti bhojako lobhamohitaḥ ||
mahārauravamāsādya pacyate śāśvatīḥ samāḥ || 15 ||
haṃta te kīrtayiṣyāmi dhūpadānavidhiṃ param ||
pradāne devadevasya yena dhūpena yatphalam || 16||
sadā caṃdanadhūpena sānnidhyaṃ kurute raviḥ ||
pradadyānmānase caiva yadyadicchati mānavaḥ ||17||
tathaivāgurudhūpena varaṃ dadyā dabhīpsitam ||
ārogyaṃ vā striyaṃ prepsurnityadā guggulaṃ dahet || 18 ||
maṃgalaṃ dhūpadānena sadā yacchati bhānumān ||
ārogyaṃ ca striyaṃ dadyā tsaukhyaṃ ca paramaṃ bhavet || 19 ||
sadā kuṃkumadhūpena saubhāgyaṃ labhate naraḥ ||
śrīvāsakasya dhūpena vāṇijyaṃ saphalaṃ bhavet || 1.196.20 ||
rasaṃ sarvarasopetaṃ dadatorthāgamo dhruvam ||
devadāruṃ ca dahato bhavatyannamathākṣayam || 21 ||
vilepanaṃ kuṃkumena sarvakāmaphalapradam ||
iha loke sukhī bhūtvā dātā svargama vāpnuyāt || 22 ||
caṃdanasya pradānena śriyamāyuśca viṃdati ||
raktacaṃdanadānena sarvaṃ dadyāddivākaraḥ || 23 ||
api rogaśatairgrastaiḥ kṣiprārogyamavā pnuyāt ||
vartigaṃdhaiśca saugaṃdhyaṃ paramaṃ viṃdate naraḥ || 24 ||
kastūrikālepanakairaiśvaryamatulaṃ labhet ||
karpūrasaṃyutairgaṃdhaiḥ kṣmādhipādhipatirbhavet || 25 ||
catuḥsamena gaṃdhena kiṃ tulyaṃ prāpnuyānnaraḥ ||
devāgāraṃ tu tanmanye bhaktyā ya upalepayet || 26 ||
sa rogānmucyate kṣipraṃ puruṣo bhogavānbhavet ||
aṣṭādaśeha kuṣṭhāni ye cānye vyādhayo nṛṇām ||
pralayaṃ yāṃti te sarve mṛdā yadyupalepayet || 27 ||
pralepanānāṃ sarveṣāṃ raktacaṃdanamuttamam ||
nātaḥ parataraṃ kiṃcidbhānostuṣṭikaraṃ param || 28 ||
kiṃ tasya na bhavelloko yo hyanena pralepayet ||
sarvakāmasamṛddho.asau sūryaloke mahīyate || 29 ||
upalipya ravergehaṃ kuryādvai maṃḍalaṃ punaḥ ||
ekenātha samāpnoti bhāgyamārogyamuttamam || 1.196.30 ||
tribhiḥ saptabhiracchinnā bālo vānyopi yo naraḥ ||
tena pradāpayeddevānkuryāttānna nivārayet ||
anena vidhinā kuryādyāvatīḥ sapta saptamī || 31 ||
etā vai sapta saptamyo yathā proktā vivasvatā ||
kurvīta yo naro bhaktyā sarvapāpaiḥ pramucyate ||32||
arkasaṃpuṭakairvittaṃ maricaiḥ priyasaṃgamam ||
niṃbapatrai roganāśaṃ phalaiḥ putrānyathepsitān ||
dhanaṃ dhānyaṃ suvarṇaṃ ca tato dadyādvivasvate || 33 ||
jayaṃ prāpnoti vipulaṃ kṛtvā sarvatra khecara ||
sarvānkāmānkāmikastu prāpnuyānnātra saṃśayaḥ || 34 ||
naro vā yadi vā nārī yathoktaṃ saptamīvratam ||
yaḥ karoti khagaśreṣṭha sa yāti paramaṃ padam || 35 ||
na teṣāṃ triṣu lokeṣu kiṃcidastīti durlabham ||
ye bhaktyā lokanāthasya vratinaḥ saṃyatendriyāḥ || 36 ||
sarvayajñaphalaṃ teṣāṃ yathā vedoditaṃ bhavet||
brahmeṃdraviṣṇavastena pūjitā nātra saṃśayaḥ ||37 ||
nāṃdho na kuṣṭhī na klībo na vyaṃgo na ca nirdhanaḥ ||
kadāpi ca bhavetkaścidyaścaretsaptamīvratam || 38 ||
putrārthī śrutisaṃpannālla~mbhetputrāścirāyuṣaḥ ||
na teṣāṃ triṣu lokeṣu kiṃcidastīti durlabham ||
bhogārthī labhate bhogānvratenānena suvrata|| 39 ||
krodhātpramādāllobhācca vratabhaṃgo yadā bhavet ||
prāyaścittamidaṃ kṛtvā punareva vratī bhavet ||1.196.40||
