saptaiva yāvatsaptamyaḥ saṃprāptā guruṇā khaga ||
tāsu bhāskaramabhyarcya mālyadhūpādibhirnaraḥ ||
bhojayitvā dvijāñchaktyā prāpnuyātsvargamakṣayam || 41 ||
saptamyāṃ vipramukhyebhyo yo.annaṃ dadyātkhageśvara ||
tadakṣayaṃ bhavettasya sa ca sūryagṛhaṃ vrajet || 42 ||
iti te kīrtitaṃ vīra saptamīvratamuttamam ||
bhūya evābhidhāsyāmi śṛṇu me vadatonagha || 43 ||
yena vrataprabhāveṇa kāmikaṃ phalamaśnute ||
saptamīṃ khagaśārdūla śuklāṃ dvādaśanāmikām || 44 ||
gomūtragomayāhāraḥ ṣaḍvṛtāhāra eva ca ||
atha vā yāvakāhāraḥ śīrṇaparṇāśanopi vā| |45||
kṣīrāśī caikabhaktaṃ(caiva bhaktaṃ?) vā sikthāhārotha vā punaḥ ||
jalāhārotha vā vidvānpūjayeta divākaram || 46 ||
puṣpopahārairvividhaiḥ padmasaugaṃdhikotpalaiḥ ||
nānāprakārairgaṃdhaiśca dhūpairguggulucaṃdanaiḥ || 47 ||
kṛśaraiḥ pāyasānnairvā vividhaiśca vibhūṣaṇaiḥ ||
arcayitvā dvijaśreṣṭha bhakṣyavastrādibhūṣaṇaiḥ || 48 ||
sarvapakṣaphalaṃ prāpya sūryalokaṃ tato vrajet ||
tapasoṃte tato vīra kule mahati jāyate || 49 ||
yathākramaṃ prayatnena nāmāni parikīrtayet ||
māghe ca phālgune māsi caitre ca garuḍāgraja || 1.196.50 ||
vaiśākhe tvatha jyeṣṭhe tu āṣāḍhe śrāvaṇe tathā ||
māsi bhādrapade vīra tathā cāśvayuje khaga || 51||
mārgaśīrṣe tathā pauṣe pūjayetsatataṃ ravim ||
vibhāvasuṃ vivasvaṃtaṃ bhāskaraṃ pakṣisattama || 52 ||
vikartanaṃ pataṃgaṃ ca sahasrāṃśuṃ khagādhipa ||
etāni devanāmāni māseṣveteṣu khecara || 53 ||
pūjayeddevadeveśaṃ devānāmapi durlabham ||
evaṃ krameṇa tīkṣṇāṃśuṃ nāmabhiḥ paripūjayet || 54 ||
ityevaṃ te samākhyātaṃ mayā guhyamidaṃ khaga ||
abhaktāya na dātavyaṃ nāśiṣyāya kathaṃcana || 55 ||
na ca pāpakṛte vīra dātavyaṃ vinatātmaja ||
vyādhestu nāśanārthāya deyaṃ viprāya suvrata || 56 ||
dattvā svargamavāpnoti śrutvā ca vidhivatkhaga || 57 || ||
iti śrībhaviṣye mahāpurāṇe brāhme parvaṇi sauradharme saptamīkalpe nāmapūjāvidhivarṇanaṃ nāma ṣaṇṇavatyadhikaśatatamo.adhyāyaḥ || 196 || cha ||
varāṭikāvarṇanam
|| saptāśvatilaka uvāca || ||
ataḥ paraṃ pravakṣyāmi puṣpadhūpādikāmikam ||
yena yena tu dānena tattatphalamavāpnuyāt || 1 ||
mālatīkusumaiḥ pūjā bhavetsānnidhyakārikā ||
ārogyaṃ karavīraistu bhavatyarthaśca śāśvataḥ || 2 ||
aiśvaryamatulaṃ caiva yaśaśca vipulaṃ tathā ||
mallikāyāśca kusumairbhagavatsammukho bhavet || 3 ||
saubhāgyaṃ puṃḍarīkaistu paramaiśvaryamāpnuyāt ||
kamalotpalakuṃdaistu yaśo vidyā balaṃ bhavet || 4 ||
nānāvidhaiḥ sukusumaiḥ kṣipraṃ rogātpramucyate ||
bhavatyakṣayamannaṃ ca nityama rcayato ravim || 5 ||
maṃdārakusumaiḥ pūjā sarvakuṣṭhanivāriṇī ||
bilvasya patrakusumairmahatīṃ śriyamāpnuyāt || 6 ||
arkasrajā bhavatyarkaḥ sarvadā varadaḥ prabhuḥ ||
pradadyādrūpiṇīṃ kanyāmarcito bakulasrajā ||7||
kiṃśukaiḥ pūjito devo na pīḍayati bhāskara. ||
agatsyakusumaiḥ siddhiṃ sānukūlyaṃ prayacchati || 8 ||
svayaṃ rūpavatīṃ dadyātpūjitaścaṃpakasrajā ||
nirudvego bhavennityaṃ pūjitaḥ puṣpamālayā || 9 ||
aśokakusumairdevamarcayedyo divākaram ||
āmrātakasya kusumaṃ nirmālyamiva dṛśyate || 1.197.10 ||
apratyagnaṃ(graṃ) bahiryasmāttasmāttatparivarjayet ||
navabhistvacalāṃ kīrtiṃ daśabhiḥ sukhamuttamam || 11 ||
bhogānekādaśeneha prāpnuyānnātra saṃśayaḥ ||
dvādaśenācalaṃ rājyaṃ dvādaśākhyamavāpnuyāt || 12 ||
prathamaṃ pūjayedbhaktyā bhūrūpaṃ praṇametsadā ||
bhuvarnamo dvitīyaṃ ca tṛtīyaṃ svarnamennaraḥ || 13 ||
maharnamaścaturthaṃ tu paṃcamaṃ tu jano namaḥ ||
tapo namastathā ṣaṣṭhaṃ namaḥ satyaṃ tu saptamam || 14 ||
aṣṭamaṃ bhūrbhuvaśceti navamaṃ khagasattama ||
daśamaṃ ṣaḍato vīra namolkāya tathā param || 15 ||
dvādaśaṃ tu khaṣolketi oṃ namaḥ pūjayetkhaga ||
evaṃ maṃḍalakārī tu kramādevaṃ phalaṃ labhet ||16||
ghṛtadīpapradānena cakṣuṣmāñjāyate naraḥ ||
kaṭutailasya dīpena śatrūṇāṃ saṃśrayo bhavet ||
madhūkānāṃ tu tailena saubhāgyaṃ paramaṃ labhet || 17 ||
saṃpūjya vidhivaddevaṃ puṣpadhūpādibhirnaraḥ ||
yathāśaktyā tataḥ paścānnaivedyaṃ tu prakalpayet || 18 ||
puṣpāṇāṃ pravarā jātī dhūpānāṃ caiva candanam ||
gaṃdhānāṃ kuṃkumaṃ śreṣṭhaṃ modakāśca nivedane || 19 ||
etaistuṣyati deveśaḥ sānnidhyaṃ cādhigacchati ||
dadāti pravarāniṣṭāndātuśca svargatiṃ tathā || 1.197.20 ||
evaṃ saṃpūjya vidhivatkṛtvā cāpi pradakṣiṇām ||
praṇamya śirasā devaṃ bhāskaraṃ timirāpaham ||
āruhya suvimānaṃ sa yāti bhānoḥ salokatām||21||
punaḥ saṃpūjya deveśaṃ japaṃ kuryādyatheṣṭakam||
hutāśane ca juhuyādvidhidṛṣṭena karmaṇā ||
evamekaikaśaḥ kāryāḥ saptamyaḥ sapta sarvadā||22||
udakaprasṛtiṃ pītvā kriyate yā tu saptamī ||
sā jñeyā sukhadā vīra sadaivodakasaptamī || 23 ||
yā kācitsaptamī noktā tāṃ te vakṣyāmi marvadā||
varāṭikā krameṇāptaṃ yatkiṃcitpratibhakṣayet || 24 ||
anena deyamūlyena yallabdhaṃ tatprabhakṣayeta ||
abhakṣyaṃ cāpi bhakṣyaṃ vā nātra kāryā vicāraṇā|| 25 |||
iti śrībhaviṣye mahāpurāṇe brāhme parvaṇi saptamīkalpe sauradharmeṣu varāṭikāvarṇanaṃ nāma saptanavatyadhikaśatatamo.adhyāyaḥ || 197 || cha ||
vyāsabhīṣmasaṃvādavarṇanam
|| śatānīka uvāca || ||
kimekaṃ daivataṃ loke kiṃ vāpyekaṃ parāyaṇam ||
stuvantaḥ kaṃ kamarcataḥ prāpnuyurmānavāḥ śubham || 1 ||
ko dharmaḥ sarvadharmāṇāṃ kaśca pūjyo matastava ||
brahmādayaḥ kamarcaṃti kaścādistridivaukasām|| 2 ||
|| sumanturuvāca || ||
atrāhaṃ te pravakṣyāmi saṃvādaṃ pāpanāśanam ||
bhīṣmasya naraśārdūla vyāsasya ca mahātmanaḥ ||3||
sukhāsīnaṃ mahāvyāsaṃ gaṃgākūle dvijottama||
taṃ dṛṣṭvā sumahātejā jvalaṃtamiva pāvakam ||4||
sākṣānnārāyaṇaṃ devaṃ tejasādityasannibham||
praṇamya śirasā vīra sarvaśāstrālayaṃ param ||5||
mahābhāratakartāraṃ vedārthanikaṣaṃ param ||
ācāryaṃ paramarṣīṇāṃ rājarṣīṇāṃ ca bhārata ||6||
kartāraṃ kuruvaṃśasya daivataṃ paramaṃ mama ||
papraccha kuruśārdūlo dvijabhaktyā samanvitaḥ ||7||
devadevasya māhātmyaṃ cittasthaṃ bhāskarasya tu ||
sa mahātmā mahātejā bhīṣmaḥ pūrvaṃ muniṃ tathā || 8 ||
|| bhīṣma uvāca || ||
bhagavandvijaśārdūla pārāśarya mahāmate ||
mamākhyātaṃ tvayā sarvaṃ vāṅmayaṃ sacarācaram || 9 ||
bhāskarasya muniśreṣṭha saṃśayodyāpi vartate ||
ādau tasya namaskāramanyeṣāṃ tadanaṃtaram || 1.198.10 ||
brahmādīnāṃ tu rudrādyairbrūhi tattvena hetunā ||
ka eṣa bhāskaro brahmankuto jātaḥ ka ucyate || 11 ||
kīrtayasva yathānyāyaṃ kautukaṃ hi paraṃ mama ||
kuśalo hi bhavāṃlloke tasmāttvaṃ vaktumarhasi || 12 ||
|| vyāsa uvāca || ||
aho tava mahatkaṣṭaṃ pramūḍhosi na saṃśayaḥ ||
stuvaṃtaśca tamarcābhiḥ siddhā brahmādayaḥ surāḥ || 13 ||
sarveṣāmeva devānāmādirāditya ucyate ||
sa haṃti timiraṃ sarvaṃ digvidikṣu vyavasthitam || 14 ||
sa dharmaḥ sarvadharmāṇāṃ sa ca pūjyatamo mataḥ ||
brahmādayastamarcaṃti sa cādistridivaukasām || 15 ||
aditiḥ kaśyapasatī ādityastena cocyate ||
ādikartātha vā yasmā ttasmādāditya ucyate || 16 || tasmādetajjagatsarvamādityātsaṃpravartate ||
sadevāsuragaṃdharvaṃ sayakṣoragarākṣasam || 17 ||
rudropeṃdrau tatheṃdraśca brahmā dakṣotha kaśyapaḥ ||
ādityadevatāḥ sarve tathānye devadānavāḥ || 18 ||
mukhādbhūto viriṃcistu rudro vakṣasthalāttataḥ ||
upeṃdro dakṣiṇāddhastāddhātā vāmakarāttathā || 19 ||
vāmapādatalāddakṣo dakṣiṇātkaśyapastathā ||
ityutpannāstathā cānye devāsuranarāḥ khagāḥ ||
tenāsau deva ādityaḥ sarvadeveṣu pūjitaḥ ||1.198.20||
|| bhīṣma uvāca || ||
yadītthaṃ gīyate vīra digvidikṣu sa bhāskaraḥ ||
yadi tasya prabhāvoyaṃ pārāśarya jagatpateḥ ||21||
sa kimarthaṃ trisaṃdhyaṃ tu rākṣasaiḥ paribhūyate ||
dvijaiḥ saṃrakṣyate bhūyaścakravadbhramate punaḥ ||
rāhuṇā gṛhyate.agrāhyastatkimarthaṃ dvijottama ||22||
||vyāsa uvāca || ||
piśācoragarakṣāṃsi ḍākinīdānavāṃstathā ||
dakṣiṇāgnirdahetkrodhāttamākrāmati bhāskaraḥ || 23 ||
trisaṃdhyaṃ tu trayo devāḥ sānnidhyaṃ ravimaṃḍale ||
muhūrtasya prabhāvoyamasādhye dṛṣṭake tathā || 24 ||
tamekamevamuddiśya loke dharmaḥ pravartate ||
namaskṛte stute tasminsarve devā namaskṛtāḥ || 25 ||
trisandhyaṃ vasudhādevairbhāskarastriḥ praṇamyate ||
rāhurādityabiṃbasya sthitodhastānna saṃśayaḥ || 26 ||
amṛtārthī vimānastho yāvatsaṃsravate.amṛtam ||
vimānāṃtaritaṃ biṃbamādiśedgrahaṇaṃ tataḥ || 27 ||
na kaściddharṣituṃ śakta ādityo dahate dhruvam ||
divārātrimuhūrtānāṃ jñānāyākramate raviḥ||28||
nādityena vinā rātrirna dinaṃ na ca tarpaṇam ||
nādharmmo nātha vā dharmmastena dṛṣṭaṃ carācaram || 29 ||
ādityaḥ pāti vai sarvamādityaḥ sṛjate sadā ||
etatsarvaṃ samākhyātaṃ yatpṛṣṭaṃ bhavatā mama || 1.198.30 || ||
iti śrībhaviṣye mahāpurāṇe brāhme parvaṇi saptamīkalpe sauradharme vyāsabhīṣmasaṃvāde.aṣṭanavatyadhikaśatatamo.adhyāyaḥ || 198 || cha ||
bhīṣmavyāsasaṃvādavarṇanam
|| bhīṣma uvāca || ||
sa ādityo bhavedyena acirāttu varapradaḥ ||
tadahaṃśrotumicchāmi vipra māṃ brūhi tattvataḥ || 1 ||
|| vyāsa uvāca || ||
pūjayā japahomena dhyānadhāraṇayā saha ||
sakalaṃ maṇḍalaṃ kṛtvā taddīkṣā samayaṃ tathā || 2 ||
labdhvā rādhayate yastu bhaktyā tadgatamānasaḥ ||
tasya bhānurbhavedvīra acirāttu varapradaḥ || 3 ||
balasiddhiṃ mahadvīryaṃ pratāpaṃ ca svakāyanam ||
dhanaṃ dhānyaṃ suvarṇaṃ ca rūpaṃ saubhāgyasaṃpadam || 4 ||
ārogyamāyuḥ kīrtiṃ ca yaśaḥ putrāṃśca mānada ||
dadate nātra saṃdeho yasya tuṣṭo divākaraḥ || 5 ||
dharmamarthaṃ tathā kāmaṃ vidyāṃ mokṣaśriyaṃ tathā ||
dadate bhāskarastuṣṭo narāṇāṃ nātra saṃśayaḥ || 6 ||
saureṇa vidhinā tāta pūjayitvā divākaram ||
sarvānkāmānavāpnoti tathādityālayaṃ nṛpa || 7 ||
|| bhīṣma uvāca || ||
saurasnānavidhiṃ brūhi sarahasyaṃ mahāmate ||
yena snāto.amalo yāti naraḥ pūja yituṃ ravim || 8 ||
|| vyāsa uvāca || ||
haṃta te saṃpravakṣyāmi snānaṃ pāpapraṇāśanam ||
śucau manorame sthāne saṃgṛhyāstreṇa mṛttikām ||9 ||
saṃdhisaṃgho hakārastu ṭarephophasamanvite ||
anenāstreṇa saṃgṛhya tataḥ snānaṃ samācaret || 1.199.10||
malasnānaṃ tataḥ paścāccheṣārdhena tu kārayet ||
bhāgatrayaṃ tu sārdhaṃ tu tṛṇapāṣāṇavarjitam || 11 ||
ekamastreṇa cālabhya tathānyaṃ bhāskareṇa tu ||
aṃgaṃ caiva tṛtīyena abhimaṃtrya sakṛtsakṛt || 12 ||
japtvāstreṇa kṣipeddikṣu nirvighnaṃ tu jalaṃ bhavet ||
sūryatīrthe dvitīyena abhimaṃtrya sakṛtsakṛt || 13 ||
gu(mu)ṇḍayitvā tataḥ snāyāditi tīrtheṣu mānavaḥ ||
tūryaśaṃkhaninādena dhyātvā devaṃ divākaram || 14 ||
snātvā rājopacāreṇa punarācamya yatnataḥ ||
snānaṃ kṛtvā tato bhīṣma maṃtrarājena saṃyutam || 15 ||
harephau biṃduyuktaśca tathānyo dīrghayā saha ||
mātrayā rephasaṃyukto hakāro biṃdunā saha || 16 ||
sakāraḥ savisargastu maṃtrarājo.ayamucyate ||
tatastu tarpayenmaṃtrānsarvāṃstāṃstu karāgrajaiḥ || 17 ||
parvaṇāmūrdhvato devāḥ savyena munayastathā ||
pitaraścāpasavyena tadbījena pratarpayet|| || 18 ||
yadgītaṃ pravaraṃ loke akṣarāṇāṃ manīṣibhiḥ ||
tadbiṃdusahitaṃ proktaṃ hṛdbījaṃ nātra saṃśayaḥ || 19 ||
kṛtvā vāmakare hastāddhyātvā prājño vidhānavit ||
evaṃ snātvā vidhānena saṃdhyāṃ vandedvidhānataḥ || 1.199.20 ||
tato vidvānkṣipetpaścādbhāskarāyodakāṃjalim ||
japecca tryakṣaraṃ maṃtraṃ ṣaṇmukhaṃ vā yadicchayā || 21 ||
maṃtrarājeti yaḥ pūrvaṃ tavākhyāto mayā nṛpa ||
paścāttīrthe tu maṃtrāṃstu saṃhṛtya hṛdayaṃ nyaset || 22 ||
maṃtrairātmānamekatra kṛtvā hyarghyaṃ pradāpayet ||
raktacandanagaṃdhaistu śucisnāto mahītale || 23 ||
kṛtvā maṇḍalakaṃ vittamekacitto vyavasthitaḥ ||
gṛhītvā karavīrāṇi saṃsthāpya tāmrabhājane || 24 ||
tilataṃḍulasayuktaṃ kuśagandhodakena tu ||
raktacandanadhūpena yuktamarghyaṃ prasādhya tat || 25 ||
kṛtvā śirasi tatpātraṃ jānubhyāmavaniṃ gataḥ ||
pūrvamaṃtreṇa saṃyuktamarghyaṃ dadyāttu bhānave ||26||
mucyate sarvapāpaistu yo hyevaṃ vinivedayet ||
yadyugādisahasreṇa vyatīpātaśatena ca || 27 ||
ayanānāṃ sahasreṇa candrasya grahaṇe tathā ||
gavāṃ śatasahasreṇa yatphalaṃ jyeṣṭhapuṣkare ||
datte kurukulaśreṣṭha tadarghyeṇa phalaṃ labhet ||28||
dīkṣāmantravihīno.api bhaktyā saṃvatsareṇa tu ||
phalamarghyeṇa vai vīra labhate nātra saṃśayaḥ || 29 ||
yaḥ punardīkṣito vidvānvidhinārghyaṃ nivedayet ||
nāsāvutpadyate bhūmau sa layaṃ yāti bhāskare||1.199.30||
iha janmani saubhāgyamāyurāgegyasaṃpadām ||
acirādbhavate vīra sa bhāryāsukhabhājanam||31||
eṣa snānavidhiḥ prokto mayā saṃkṣepatastava ||
hitāya mānaveṃdrāṇāṃ sarvapāpapraṇāśanaḥ ||32|| ||
iti śrībhaviṣye mahāpurāṇe brāhme parvaṇi saptamīkalpe sauradharmeṣu bhīṣmavyāsasaṃvāda ekonadviśatatamo.adhyāyaḥ || 199 || || cha ||
sauradharmavarṇanam
|| bhīṣma uvāca || ||
kathitaste snānavidhirbrahmanvai pāpahārakaḥ ||
samyagbrahmarcanavidhiṃ pūjayiṣyāmi yena vai || 1 ||
|| vyāsa uvāca || ||
haṃta te saṃpravakṣyāmi vidhimādityapūjane ||
vivikte vijaya sthāne suprasanne suśobhane || 2 ||
pūjayedbhāskaraṃ mantrī saralīkṛtavigrahaḥ ||
bhadrāsanasamārūḍhaḥ prāṅmukhaḥ sādhakottamaḥ || 3 ||
astrabījena maṃtreṇa naraḥ svāṃgāni vinyaset ||
aṃguṣṭhamāditaḥ kṛtvā kaniṣṭhāntaṃ suvinyaset ||4|| hṛdayādīnphaḍantāṃstānvinyasetkramataḥ sadā ||
netrapāṇitale vīra nyasya arghyādi maṃtravit || 5 ||
yavarge yacaturthaṃ tu karṇabiṃdusamanvitam ||
netrabījamiti proktaṃ jyotīrūpaṃ na saṃśayaḥ ||6||
paścāttu tryakṣaraṃ sūryaṃ kavacaṃ vinyasedbudhaḥ ||
kathitaṃ tanmayā vīra maṃtrarājeti pṛcchataḥ || 7 ||
prāṇāyāmaṃ tataḥ kuryātprathamaṃ bījamudgiran ||
śeṣakrameṇa hutvāyaṃ viraje bhīṣmaśaktitaḥ || 8 ||
tribhireva tato ghorairātmaśuddhiḥ kṛtā bhavet ||
iti saṃśodhya cātmānaṃ sūryaṃ sarvāṃtikaṃ nyaset || 9 ||
hṛdaye hṛdayaṃ nyasya śiraḥ śirasi vinyaset ||
ekaviṃśatimātṛkāyā akṣaraṃ yatprakīrtitam ||1.200.1 0||
hṛdbījamiti vikhyātaṃ brahmasthānamanaupamam||
śirasārkasya pūjā tu lokerkaḥ pratikathyate || 11 ||
śikhāyāṃ tu śikhāṃ nyasyeccharīre kavacaṃ nyaset ||
netrayorvinyasennetraṃ karayorastrameva ca || 12 ||
mahāvyāhṛtayo rājaṃstathārajvālinī śikhā ||
hakāraśca rakāraśca kukāro biṃdunā saha ||13 ||
eteṣāṃ samayāścaiva kavacaṃ parikathyate ||
netrayorvinyasennetraṃ karayora strameva ca || 14 ||
evamaṃgāni vinyasya nāsau kenāpi bāddhyate ||
śatravo mitratāṃ yāṃti alābhe lābhamāpnuyāt ||15||
ātmānaṃ bhāskaraṃ jñātvā yathoktaṃ tattvadarśibhiḥ ||
tatastu pūjayedbhānuṃ sthaṃḍile vidhivatpunaḥ || 16 ||
kṛtvā tu dakṣiṇe pārśve divyapuṣpakaraṃḍakam ||
kṛtvā suśobhite vāme tāmrapūrṇena vāriṇā || 17 ||
astreṇa kṣālitāṃ pūrṇāṃ śeṣaṃ maṃtrairjalaistathā ||
abhimaṃtrya tataḥ sthāpya kavacenāvaguṃṭhitām || 18 ||
sthaṃḍile caiva dravyāṇi pūjārthaṃ kalpitāni tu ||
sarvāṇi prokṣayedvidvānarghyapātraṃ jalena tu ||
tato maṃtraṃ japetpaścādekacittena maṃtravit ||19||
|| bhīṣma uvāca || ||
purāṇasahitairmaṃtrairyo vidhiḥ kathito budhaiḥ ||1.200.20||
sa mayā viditaḥ kṛtsnaḥ kathito naikaśo dvijaiḥ ||
vedoktairvividhairmaṃtrairyathā saṃpūjyate raviḥ ||21 ||
tathā me brūhi sakalaṃ vaidikaṃ vidhisattamam || 22 ||
iti śrībhaviṣye mahāpurāṇe brāhmeparvaṇi saptamīkalpe sauradharme dviśatatamo.adhyāyaḥ ||200||
sūryamaṇḍaladevatārcanavidhivarṇanam
|| vyāsa uvāca ||
atha tvāṃ kathayiṣyehaṃ saṃvādaṃ dharmavarddhanam ||
surajyeṣṭhasya devasya keśavasya ca bhārata || 1 ||
manovatyāṃ surajyeṣṭhaṃ sukhāsīnaṃ caturmukham||
praṇamya śirasā viṣṇuridaṃ vacanamabravīt || 2 ||
|| viṣṇuruvāca || ||
bhagavandevadeveśa surajyeṣṭha caturmukha ||
ārādhanavidhiṃ brūhi bhāskarasya mahātmanaḥ || 3 ||
kathamārādhayedbhānuṃ maṃḍalasthaṃ divaspatim ||
brūhi me.atra gaṇaṃ devaṃ yenāhaṃ pūjaye vibhum || 4 ||
sādhusādhu mahābāho sādhu pṛṣṭo.a smi bhūdhara ||
śṛṇu caikamanā deva bhāskarārādhane vidhim ||5||
khaṣolkaṃ nirmalaṃ devaṃ pūjayitvā vibhāvasum ||
pūrve madhye tathāgneyyāṃ virūpākṣe prabhaṃ jane || 6 ||
krameṇa yāvadīśānīṃ hṛdi bījena vinyaset ||
khaṣolkāsanametattu vinyastaṃ mānavottamaiḥ || 7||
tatastasyopariṣṭāttu hṛdayena tu kaṃcu kam ||
saptāvaraṇasaṃyuktamaṣṭapatraṃ sakarṇikam || 8 ||
kesarālaṃbadevatvaṃ paṃcavarṇaṃ mahādbhutam ||
parīkṣābhūmividhivacchāstroktavidhinā kṛtam || 9 ||
dīptādi pūrvādārabhya yāvadīśānagocaram ||
nyasecchaktyaṣṭakaṃ maṃtrī madhyataḥ sarvatomukhīm || 1.201.10 ||
dīptā sūkṣmā jayā bhadrā vibhūtirvimalā tathā ||
amoghā vidyutā caiva navamī sarvatomukhī || 11 ||
tata āvāhayedbhānuṃ sthāpayetkarṇikopari||
upasthānaṃ tu vai kṛtvā maṃtreṇānena suvrata || 12 ||
udutyaṃ jātavedasamiti maṃtraḥ prakīrtitaḥ ||
agniṃ dūtena maṃtreṇa anena viśvasuvrata ||13||
ākṛṣṇena rajasā maṃtreṇānena cārcayet ||
haṃsaḥśuciṣaditi ca maṃtreṇārkaṃ prapūjayet || 14 ||
apaptetārakaṃ devīdīptānena prapūjayet ||
adṛśramasyaketavaḥ sūkṣmāṃ devīṃ samarcayet || 15||
taraṇirviśvadarśeti anena satataṃ jayam ||
pratyaṅdevānāṃ viśeti bhadrāṃ devīṃ samarcayet || 16 ||
vibhūtimarcayennityaṃ yenāpāvakacakṣasā ||
vidyāmeṣīti maṃtreṇa hyanena vimalāṃ sadā || 17 ||
amoghāṃ pūjayennityaṃ maṃtreṇānena suvrata||
navamīṃ pūjayeddevīṃ satataṃ sarvatomukhīm || 18 ||
maṃtreṇānena kṛṣṇasya udvayaṃtamitīha ca ||
udyannadyamitrahomaṃ prathamamakṣaraṃ vrajet|| 19 ||
dvitīyaṃ pūjayetkṛṣṇaṃ śukleṣu harimāhave ||
udagādayamādityo anenāpi tṛtīyakam || 1.201.20 ||
tatsaviturvareṇyeti caturthaṃ parikīrtitam ||
mahitomahitoyeti paṃcarcaṃ parikīrtayet || 21 ||
hiraṇyagarbhaḥ samavartatā ṣaṣṭhaṃ bījaṃ prakīrtitam ||
savitā paścātātpurastātsaptamaṃ devasattama || 22 ||
evaṃ bījāni vinyasya ādityaṃ sthāpayeddvijaḥ ||
ādityaṃ sthāpayeddhyāne sarveṣāṃ pūjayedbudhaḥ || 23 ||
bāhyato devaśārdūla indrādīnāṃ samaṃtataḥ||
raktavarṇaṃ mahātejaṃ sitapadmopari sthitam||24||
sarvalakṣaṇasaṃyuktaṃ sarvābharaṇabhūṣitam||
dvibhujaṃ caikacakraṃ ca saumyaṃ padmadhanuṣkaram||25||
vartulaṃ tena biṃbena madhyasthamatitejasam||
ādityasya tvidaṃ rūpaṃ sarvalokeṣu pūjitam||26||
dhyātvā saṃpūjayennityaṃ sthaṃḍilaṃ maṃḍalāśritam||27|| ||
iti śrībhaviṣye mahāpurāṇe brāhme parvaṇi saptamīkalpe sauradharmeṣu sūryamaṇḍaladevatārcanavidhivarṇanaṃ nāmaikādhika dviśatatamo.adhyāyaḥ || 201 ||
ādityapūjāvidhivarṇanam
viṣṇuruvāca || ||
maṇḍalasthaṃ suraśreṣṭha vidhinā yena bhāskaram ||
pūjayenmānavo bhaktyā sa vidhiḥ kathyatāṃ mama || 1 ||
pūjayedvidhinā yena bhāskaraṃ padmasaṃbhavam ||
mūrtisthaṃ sarvagaṃ devaṃ pūjitaṃ sasurāsuraiḥ ||2||
|| brahmovāca ||
sādhu kṛṣṇa mahābāho sādhu pṛṣṭo.asmi suvrata ||
śṛṇu caikamanāḥ pūrvaṃ mūrtisthaṃ yena pūjayet || 3 ||
iṣe tveti ca mantreṇa uttamāṃgaṃ sadārcayet ||
agnimī,leti mantreṇa pūjayeddakṣiṇe kare ||4||
agna āyāhi mantreṇa pādau devasya pūjayet ||
ājighreti ca maṃtreṇa pūjayetpuṣpamālayā ||5||
yogayogati maṃtreṇa muktapuṣpāṃjaliṃ kṣipet ||
samudraṃ gaccha yatproktamanena snāpayedravim || 6 ||
imaṃ me gaṃgeti yatproktamanenāpi ca bhūdhara ||
samudrajyeti mantreṇa kaṣāyaiḥ parirūpayet|| 7 ||
snāpayetpayasā kṛṣṇa āpyāyasveti mantrataḥ ||
dadhikrāvṇeti vai dadhnā snāpayeddadhivadravim || 8 ||
tejo.asi śukramiti ca ghṛtena snapanaṃ param||
yā auṣadhīti maṃtreṇa snānamoṣadhibhiḥ smṛtam || 9 ||
udvartayettato dvipadābhiḥ surādhipa ||
mānastoketi mantreṇa yugapatsnānamācaret||1.202.10||
viṣṇorarāṭamantreṇa snāpayedgandhavāriṇā||
sauvarṇena tu maṃtreṇa arghyaṃ pādyaṃ nivedayet||11||
idaṃ viṣṇurvicakrame maṃtreṇārghyaṃ pradāpayet||
vedo.asīti hi maṃtreṇa upavītaṃ pradāpayet||12||
bṛhaspateti mantreṇa dadyādvastrāṇi bhānave||
yena śriyaṃ prakurvāṇāṃ puṣpamālāṃ prayojayet||13||
dhūrasīti ca mantreṇa dhūpaṃ dadyātsaguggulam||
samiddhoṃ.ajanamaṃtreṇa aṃjanaṃ tu prayacchati||14||
yuñjānīti ca maṃtreṇa bhānuṃ rocanayārcayet ||
āraktakaṃ ca vai kuryāddīrghāyuṣṭvāya vai budhaḥ || 15 ||
sahasraśīrṣā puruṣo raviṃ sarasi pūjayet ||
saṃbhāvayeti maṃtreṇa padmanetre parāmṛśet || 16 ||
viśvataścakṣurityevaṃ bhānordehaṃ samālabhet ||
śrīśca te lakṣmīśceti maṃtreṇānena pūjayet || 17 ||
iti śrībhaviṣye mahāpurāṇe brāhme parvaṇi saptamīkalpe sauradharma ādityapūjāvidhivarṇanaṃ nāma dvyadhikadviśatatamo.adhyāyaḥ || 202 ||
bhāskarārādhanavidhivarṇanam
|| viṣṇuruvāca ||
vyomapūjāvidhiṃ brūhi samāsāccaturānana ||
aṣṭaśṛṃgaṃ kathaṃ vyoma pūjayedbhāskarasya tu || 1 ||
|| brahmovāca || ||
vyomapūjāvidhiṃ kṛṣṇa nibodha gadato mama ||
aṣṭaśṛṃgaṃ yathā vyoma pūjayaṃti manīṣiṇaḥ || 2 ||
sauvarṇaṃ rājataṃ tāmraṃ kṛtvā cāśmamayaṃ tathā ||
aṣṭaśṛṃgaṃ mahābāho anena vidhinārcayet || 3 ||
prathamaṃ pūjayedbhānuṃ madhye maṃtreṇa suvrata ||
mahiṣā vo mahāyeti nānāpuṣpakadaṃbakaiḥ || 4 ||
trātāramiṃdraṃ maṃtreṇa sarvaśṛṃgaṃ sadārcayet ||
udīratāmavara ityatha vānena pūjayet || 5 ||
āyaṃ gauriti mantreṇa nairṛ(kṛ)taṃ śṛṃgamarcayet ||
rakṣohaṇaṃ vājinaṃ vā pūjayedasurāṃtakam || 6 ||
indrasomāṃtapataye hyatha vānena pūjayet ||
abhitvā śūra no numa aiśānaṃ śṛṃgamarcayet || 7 ||
evaṃ bhānuṃ ca paritaḥ pūjayaṃti sadācyuta ||
yenedaṃ bhūtamiti vai atha vānena pūjayeta || 8 ||
namo.astu sarvapāpebhyo vyomapīṭhaṃ sadārcayet ||
te narāḥ satataṃ kāmānprāpnuvaṃti na saṃśayaḥ || 9 ||
tvameko rudrāṇāṃ vasūnāṃ pūrvāhṇe tena pūjayet ||
tadviṣṇoḥ paramaṃ padaṃ haṃsaḥ śuciṣaditi vai aparāhne sadārcayet || 1.203.1 0||
evaṃ bhānuṃ grahaiḥ sārdhaṃ pūjayaṃti sadaspate ||
te sarvānvividhānkāmānprāpnuvaṃti na saṃśayaḥ || 11 ||
vimale vāsasī dattvā gurave sapavitrake ||
upānahau tathā kṛṣṇa sauvarṇamaṃgulīyakam || 12 ||
gandhapuṣpāṇi citrāṇi bhakṣyabhojyānyanekaśaḥ ||
anena vidhinā yastu sopavāsorcayedravim ||
bahuputro bahudhanaḥ sa naro bhavyavānbhavet ||13||
uttare cāyane yastu sopavāsorcayedravim ||
sośvamedhaphalaṃ viṃdyādbahuputraśca jāyate || 14 ||
kṛtvopavāsaṃ viṣuve yastu pūjayate ravim ||
bahuputro bahudhano kīrtimāṃścāpi jāyate || 15 ||
kṛtvopavāsaṃ grahaṇe vidhivaccaṃdrasūryayoḥ ||
pūjayedbhāskaraṃ bhaktyā brahmalokaṃ sa gacchati || 16 ||
iti te kathito viṣṇo bhāskarārādhane vidhiḥ ||
yaṃ śrutvā puruṣo bhaktyā mama loke mahīyate || 17 ||
punaretya mahīṃ kṛṣṇa rājā bhavati bhūtale ||
bahu putro bahudhanaḥ samareṣvaparājitaḥ || 18 ||
iti śrībhaviṣye mahāpurāṇe brāhme parvaṇi saptamīkalpe sauradharme bhāskarārādhanavidhivarṇanaṃ nāma tryadhi kadviśatatamo.adhyāyaḥ || 203 ||
vyomārcanavidhivarṇanam
|| sumanturuvāca || ||
ataḥ paraṃ pravakṣyāmi vidhiṃ paramapūjitam ||
ratnavyomapratiṣṭhāyāṃ yathā bhānuṃ prapūjayet || 1 ||
arcayitvā tu prakṛtiṃ gaṃdhapuṣpākṣatairvibho ||
sahodakenāṃjalinā sahapuṣpākṣatena vā || 2 ||
āvāhayenmahādevaṃ khaṣolkaṃ bhāskaraṃ vibhum ||
mantreṇa kuruśārdūla pratyakṣakiraṇāya vai || 3 ||
oṃ khaṣolkamāvāhayāmi oṃ bhūrbhuvaḥ svaroṃ ādityārādhane mantraḥ || 4 ||
abhimantrya bhuve mātraṃ sāvitryā ca ṛcā vibho ||
āpo hiṣṭheti yā proktā vṛthā sūryasya sarvadā || 5 ||
yathānyāyaṃ tu saṃkṣālya pūrayeccānyato yataḥ ||
hiraṇyagarbhaḥ samavartatetyanayā kṣālayedbudhaḥ || 6 ||
savitā paścātātsavitā hyanayā pūrayedbudhaḥ ||
ityevaṃ pūrayitvā tu vāri puṣpākṣatairbudhaḥ || 7 ||
pātramaudumbaraṃ gṛhya kṛtsnaṃ sūryasya darśayet ||
udutyaṃ jātavedasamanayā vyomni nikṣipet || 8 ||
haṃsaḥ śuciṣaditi pādyaṃ dadyādvicakṣaṇaḥ ||
nirvāpayecca payasā khaṣolkaṃ snāpayettataḥ || 9 ||
agnistu saptabhirvīra kīrtitāstāśca kṛtsnaśaḥ ||
āpo hiṣṭheti ca kramāttisṛbhiḥ kurunaṃdana || 1.204.10 ||
hiraṇyavarṇeti kramāccaturbhiśca narādhipa ||
abhimaṃtryodakamṛgbhistisṛbhi rnikṣipennṛpa || 11 ||
bhānoḥ pradakṣiṇaṃ kṛtvā kṛṇuṣvapāja ityapi ||
tya(itya)mūṣu vājinaṃ giraḥ prathamā parikīrtitā || 12 ||
patimiṃdrastavācāma dvitīyā parikīrtitā ||
patimiṃdrastu śuddho na āgahi tṛtīyā parikīrtitā || 13 ||
sidhye vṛtrāṇi jighne śagaṃdhairbhānuṃ prapūjayet||
asya vāmasyetyanayā akṣataiḥ pūjayedravim || 14 ||
sapta yuṃjaṃti rathamanayā pūjayedravim ||
puṣpairbharataśārdūla satataṃ tamanāśanam || 15 ||
ko dadarśa prathama manayā dhūpamādiśet ||
pākaḥ pṛcchāmyanayā caṃdanaṃ pratipādayet || 16 ||
uddīpyasyetyanayā dīpaṃ dadyādvibhāvasoḥ ||
arcitvā kuṃkumaṃ caiva śīrṣaṃ kṣīraṃ tu maṃḍalam || 17||
yuktā mātāsītyanayā naivedyaṃ pratipādayet ||
gaurīrmimāyeti dadyāttathā śukle ca vāsasī || 18 ||
tasyāḥ samudretyanayā upavītaṃ nivedayet ||
iti saṃpūjya deveśaṃ tataḥ kuryātparāṃ stutim || 19 ||
ṛgbhirvai paṃcabhistāta śṛṇu caikamanādṛtaḥ ||
ukṣāṇaṃ pṛśniriti ca prathamā parikīrtitā || 1.204.20 ||
catvāri vāgiti bhaveddvitīyā parikīrtitā ||
iṃdraṃ mitraṃ tṛtīyā tu varādhikye prakīrtitā || 21 ||
kṛṣṇaṃ niyānaṃ hi tathā caturthī parikīrtitā ||
yo ratnavāhītyanayā kirīṭaṃ yojayedravau || 22 ||
gatehanāmityanayā avyaṃgaṃ bhāskaraṃ nyaset ||
iyamadadādrabhasamṛṇacyutamiti ṛgāditaḥ || 23 ||
kṛtvā pūjāṃ tataścargbhiraṣṭābhiriti cācyuta ||
devasya śaktayo.aṣṭau ca pūjayedvidhivatkramāt || 24 ||
ityeṣa te mayākhyātaḥ pratimāpūjane vidhiḥ ||
yaḥ purokto mahābāho brahmaṇā viṣṇave tathā ||25||
anena vidhinā yastu satataṃ pūjayedravim ||
sa prāpnotyakhilānkāmāniha loke paratra ca ||26||
putrārthī labhate putrāndhanārthī labhate dhanam ||
kanyārthī labhate kanyāṃ vedārthī vedavidbhavet ||27||
niṣkāmaḥ pūjayedyastu sa mokṣaṃ prāpnuyānnaraḥ ||
anena vidhinā pūjya gataḥ siddhiṃ sa vaiṣṇavaḥ || 28 ||
brahmādayastathā devaṃ pūjayitvā vibhāvasum ||
anena vidhinā pūjya saṃtaḥ siddhiṃ parāṃ gatāḥ || 29 || ||
iti śrībhaviṣye mahāpurāṇe brāhme parvaṇi saptamīkalpe vyomārcanavidhivarṇanaṃ nāma caturadhikadviśatatamo.adhyāyaḥ || 204 ||.a|||
mahādevārcanavidhivarṇanam
|| vyāsa uvāca || ||
punarnibodha me bhīṣma gadataḥ paramaṃ vidhim ||
yena pūjayate nityaṃ mahādevaṃ divā karam || 1 ||
prabhūtaṃ nirmalaṃ teja ārādhya paramaṃ sukham ||
pūrvamaṃtastathāgneyyāṃ nairṛtyāṃ pavanālaye || 2 ||
krameṇa yāvadīśānaṃ hṛdi bījaṃ ca vinyaset ||
bhāskarāsanametattu nyastavyaṃ tattvadarśibhiḥ || 3 ||
upariṣṭāttatastasya hṛdayena tu paṃkajam ||
aṣṭapatraṃ keśarālaṃ paṃcavarṇasakeśaram || 4||
dīptādi pūrvamārabhya āmahādevagocaram ||
śaktyaṣṭakaṃ nyasenmaṃtrairāditaḥ sarvatomukhīm || 5 ||
abījaiḥ kesarāgreṣu krameṇaiva ca pūjayet ||
tatastvāvāhayedbhānuṃ sthāpayetkarṇikopari || 6 ||
tasyopahṛtya taṃ cānyaṃ veditavyaṃ khapuṣkaram ||
tenaivāvāhanaṃ cārcya sthāpanaṃ cārdhameva ca || 7 ||
pādyamācamanaṃ sthānaṃ vastragaṃdhādibhūṣaṇam ||
vidhinā vīrapuṣpāṇi naivedyaṃ dhūpameva ca || 8 ||
kartavyaṃ śraddhayā bhaktyā evaṃ tuṣyati bhāskaraḥ ||
mahāpātakino.apyāśu labhaṃte ciṃtitaṃ phalam || 9 ||
ādityaṃ pūjayitvā tu paścādaṃgāni pūjayet ||
dīptāyāṃ hṛdayaṃ nyasya bhavānyā śiraso nyaset || 1.205.10 ||
digvidikṣu nyasedastramiṃdrādi diśottarāṃtikam ||
karṇikāyāṃ nyasennetraṃ svabījena tu vārcayeta ||1 1||
puṣpairgaṃdhaiśca dhūpaiśca hṛdayāni krameṇa tu ||
pūjayitvā tu vidhivadgarbhaṃ paścāttu maṃtravit || 12 ||
bāhyataḥ pūrvato maṃdaṃ dakṣiṇena budhaṃ tathā ||
viṣāṇaṃ paścime pūjya uttareṇa tu bhārgavam || 13 ||
āgneyyāṃ ca kujaṃ pūjya nairṛtyāṃ bhānudehajam ||
vāyavyāṃ pūjayetkṛṣṇamaiśānyāṃ vikacaṃ nṛpa || 14 ||
indrādilokapālāṃśca tato.aṣṭau pūjayedbudhaḥ ||
sugaṃdhairvividhaiḥ puṣpairdhūpaiścaiva manoramaiḥ || 15 ||
krameṇa pūjayedbhānuṃ lokapālairgrahaiḥ saha ||
maṃtraiḥ kurukulaśreṣṭha ya icchecchreya ātmanaḥ || 16 ||
anena vidhinā yatra devaḥ saṃpūjyate raviḥ ||
na caurāgnibhayaṃ tatra na cāpi narakādbhayam || 17 ||
varṣopalaviṣādibhyo bhayaṃ tatra na vidyate ||
sukhamārogyamānaṃdaṃ subhikṣamacalāṃ śriyam || 18 ||
tejobiṃbāṃtamadhyastha ādityaḥ paramārthataḥ ||
yaṣṭavyaḥ sādhakairnityaṃ na ratho na ca vājinaḥ || 19 ||
ityeṣa vidhirākhyāto mayā bhīṣma tavākhilaḥ ||
yena pūjayate nityaṃ mahādevo divākaram || 1.205.20 ||
itthaṃ pūjya vivasvantaṃ hṛdbījena visarjayet ||
ya evaṃ pūjayedbhānuṃ sa yāti paramāṃ gatim || 21 || ||
iti śrībhaviṣye mahāpurāṇe brāhme parvaṇi saptamīkalpe sauradharme bhīṣmavyāsasaṃvāde mahādevā rcanavidhivarṇanaṃ nāma paṃcādhikadviśatatamo.adhyāyaḥ || 205 ||
sūryapūjāmāhātmyavarṇanam
|| bhīṣma uvāca || ||
maṃtroddhāraṃ paraṃ brūhi mudrāśaktisamanvitam ||
rūpavarṇa samaṃ caiva paurāṇikamanuttamam || 1 ||
|| vyāsa uvāca || ||
śṛṇu bhīṣma mahābāho yathā vakṣyāmi tenagha ||
paurāṇikānāṃ maṃtrāṇāmuddhāraṃ vaidikādṛte ||2||
varṇarephasamāyuktaṃ vidrumenaiva bhūṣitam ||
aṃtasthānāṃ hi aṃtyaṃ vai brahmadaivatyamucyate ||3||
biṃdurephasamāyuktaṃ dīrghayā mātrayā tathā ||
dīkṣākṣaraṃ samuddiṣṭaṃ dvitīyaṃ viṣṇudaivatam ||4||
tṛtīyaṃ tu tathā proktaṃ savisargaṃ janādhipa ||
sa tṛtīyo budhaiḥ prokto rudradaivata eva hi ||5||
bhāskaroyaṃ mahānsākṣānmaṃtramūrtistrirakṣaraḥ||
durlabhaḥ paramo guhyastridevo devapūjitaḥ ||6||
yastvidaṃ japate bhaktyā sa yāti paramāṃ gatim ||
tataśca mudrāṃ vakṣyāmi sānnidhya kāraṇaṃ param ||7||
padmākārau karau kṛtvā madhye śliṣṭe tu madhyame||
aṃguliṃ kṣārayettasminvimudreti ca socyate ||8||
anayā baddhayā rājanbhāskarasya priyo bhavet ||
mahābhayeṣu sarveṣu mātṛvatparirakṣati || 9 ||
hṛdayaṃ tasya vijñeyaṃ yadakṣaravaraṃ smṛtam ||
vidrumopari saṃchannaṃ hṛdgataṃ tadgataṃ sadā || 1.206.10 ||
śirasyarkamiti proktaṃ devadevasya bhārata ||
mahāvyāhṛtayastisrastathārajvālinī śikhā || 11 ||
aṣṭākṣarā tu vidyeyamādityasya mahātmanaḥ ||
yaḥ smaretsādhakastvenaṃ nāsau kenāpi bādhyate || 12 ||
akāreṇa samāyuktaṃ biṃdurephasamanvitam ||
hakāramagnidaivatyaṃ kavacaṃ bhāskarapriyam|| 13 ||
ekākṣaramidaṃ proktamabhedyaṃ yaḥ smaredidam ||
duṣṭānāṃ caiva vighnānāṃ nāśanaṃ nātra saṃśayaḥ || 14 ||
savisargo repha iti astramekākṣaraṃ smṛtam ||
nāśayedduṣṭakarmāṇi sādhakasya na saṃśayaḥ || 15 ||
saṃmukhau tau karau kṛtvā śliṣṭau tu grathitāṃgulī ||
kaniṣṭhenāmike yojye tarjanyau madhyame tathā || || 16 ||
hṛcchiraḥ saśikhā carmā mudreyaṃ vyomasaṃjñitā ||
muṣṭivakrocchritaṃ kuryātsavyahastasya tarjanīm ||17||
mālaśabdakṛtādistu mudrā hyastrasya kīrtitā ||
trāsanī nāma vikhyātā sarvaviprabhayaṃkarī || 18 ||
karṇabiṃdusamāyuktaṃ yaṃ caturthaṃ mahāmate ||
bhāskarasya tvidaṃ netramagridaivatamucyate ||| || 19 ||
smaraḥ syātsādhakeṃdrāṇāṃ duraṃto nāśane dhruvam ||
madhyamā tarjanī caiva savyahastasya cocchritam|| 1.206.20 ||
kaniṣṭhānāmike kuṃcya aṃguṣṭhena tataḥ kramet ||
netrābhyāṃ sparśayedenāṃ netramudrā prakīrtitā || 21 ||
govṛṣā nāma vikhyātā darśayeddivyagocaram ||
rāṃ dīptāriṃ tataḥ sūkṣmārīṃ jayā bhīṣma ucyate || 22 ||
ubhāhvārūṃ vibhūtiśca vimalā reṃ prakīrtitā ||
aghahā ca mahābāho vidyutā rauṃ prakīrtitā || 23 ||
govṛṣā nāma raṃ sarvaṃ vīrabhadrakarī tathā ||
ityetā bījarūpāstu kathitāścaiva śaktayaḥ || 24 ||
uttānau tu karau kṛtvā savyākuṃcya tatoṃgulīḥ ||
kuryādupari cāṃguṣṭhau cālayeta punaḥpunaḥ || 25 ||
sarvāsāṃ caiva śaktīnāmetā mudrāḥ pradarśayet ||
nāmnā ca vidyutā caiva navamī sarvatomukhī || 26 ||
nāmānyetāni śaktīnāṃ samāsātkathitāni tu ||
sabījāni mahābāho mayā snehena bhārata || 27 ||
grahāṇāṃ śṛṇu bījāni rūpaṃ ca gadato mama ||
sarvatra bhaṃ tathā khaṃ ca kaṃjakūtuhalodvaha || 28 ||
oṃkārā dīpitāḥ sarve namaskārāṃtayojitāḥ ||
pūjākāle prayoktavyā japakāle tathaiva ca || 29 ||
homakāle tu svāhāṃtaṃ maṃtraṃ ṣaṭkārasaṃyutam ||
sarve biṃduyutā bhīṣma śikhā biṃduvibhūṣitāḥ || 1.206.30 ||
somādyāḥ ketuparyaṃtā grahā hyevaṃ prakīrtitāḥ ||
etā mudrāḥ pravakṣyāmi sarvasiddhipradāyikāḥ || 31 ||
sumukhau tu karau kṛtvā śliṣṭau caiva prasāritau ||
iyaṃ mudrā namaskāre grahasānnidhyakārikā || || 32 ||
maṃtroddhārastavākhyāto rahasyo durlabho nṛpa ||
śṛṇuṣva rūpaṃ devānāṃ dhyānakāle hyupasthite || 33 ||
japāvarṇaṃ mahātejaṃ śvetapadmopari sthitam||
sarvalakṣaṇasaṃpannaṃ sarvābharaṇabhūṣitam || 34 ||
tathaikavaktraṃ dvibhujaṃ somapaṃkajakaṃdharam ||
maṃḍalena ca rūpaṃ tu madhyasthaṃ raktavāsasam || 35 ||
mārtaṃḍasya idaṃ rūpaṃ śuciḥ snāto jiteṃdriyaḥ||
trikālaṃ yaḥ smaredbhīma ekacitto vyavasthitaḥ || 36 ||
so.acirādbhavate loke vittena dhanadopamaḥ ||
mucyate sarvabhogaistu tejasvī balavānbhavet || 37 ||
hṛdayaṃ cottamāṃgaṃ ca śikhā vai vaktrameva ca ||
raktavarṇā ime śyāmāḥ sarvābharaṇabhūṣitāḥ || 38||
varadā.abhayahastāśca dhyātavyā sādhakena tu ||
taḍitpuṃjanibhaṃ śastraṃ raudraṃ caṃdrakarālinam || 39 ||
viśeṣaḥ kathito hyeṣa kāmarūpaḥ svabhāvataḥ ||
dīptā dīptaśikhākārā dhyātavyā mama śaktayaḥ || 1.206.40 ||
śvetavarṇaṃ smaretsomaṃ raktavarṇaṃ kujaṃ smaret ||
saumyamaṣṭāpadābhaṃ ca guruṃ ca pītavarṇakam || || 41 ||
śaṃkhakṣīranibhaṃ śvetaṃ kāṇaṃ cāṃjanasaṃnibham ||
rajāvartanibhaṃ rāhuṃ dhūmraṃ ca vikacaṃ smaret || 42 ||
vāmahastau kaṭinyastau dakṣiṇau cābhayapradau ||
raktabhrūraktanetrāsya ardhakāyakṛtāṃjaliḥ || 43 ||
iti bhānuṃ grahaiḥ sārdhaṃ ye dhyāyaṃti nṛpottama ||
labhaṃte te mahāsiddhimacirānnātra saṃśayaḥ || || 44 ||
tavākhyātamidaṃ vaktraṃ grahāṇāṃ bhīṣma kṛtsnaśaḥ ||
yacchrutvā sarvapāpebhyo mucyaṃte bhuvi mānavāḥ || 45 ||
anena vidhinā bhīṣma sadā devaṃ divākaram||
trikālaṃ pūjayedbhaktyā vīra śraddhāsamanvitaḥ || 46 ||
itthaṃ pūjayamānastu sarvadevaṃ divākaram ||
brahmahatyāvinirmukto mahādevatvamāpnuyāt|| 47 ||
iti śrībhaviṣye mahāpurāṇe brāhme parvaṇi saptamīkalpe sauradharmeṣu sūryapūjāmāhātmyavarṇanṃ nāma ṣaḍuttaradviśatatamo.adhyāyaḥ || || 206 ||
ādityapūjāvidhivarṇanam
|| bhīṣma uvāca || ||
aho devasya māhātmyaṃ bhāskarasya tvayoditam ||
pūjayaṃti sadā hyenaṃ brahmaviṣṇuśivādayaḥ || 1 ||
|| || vyāsa uvāca || ||
evametanna saṃdeho yathā vadasi bhārata ||
nāsti sūryasamo devo nāsti sūryasamā gatiḥ || 2 ||
nāsti sūryasamaṃ brahma nāsti sūryasamaṃ hutam ||
nāsti sūryasamo dharmo nāsti sūryasamaṃ dhanam || 3 ||
nāsti sūryādṛte kāmo nāsti sūryādṛte padam ||
nāsti sūryasamo baṃdhurnāsti sūryasamaḥ suhṛt || 4 ||
nāsti sūryasamā mātā nāsti sūryasamo guruḥ ||
nāsti sūryasamaṃ tīrthaṃ na pavitraṃ tataḥ param || 5 ||
tamekaṃ daivataṃ vidyānnaivāpyarkaparāyaṇam ||
lokānāṃ devatānāṃ ca pitṛrṇāṃ cāpi bhārata || 6 ||
tamarcaṃtaḥ stuvaṃtaśca prāpnuvaṃti parāṃ gatim||
te prapannāstu ye bhaktyā muktāste bhavasāgarāt|| 7 ||
rājā corā grahāḥ sarpā dāridryaṃ duḥkhasaṃpadaḥ ||
naite pīḍayituṃ śaktāḥ prasanne bhāskare sati || 8 ||
||vyāsa uvāca || ||
evaṃ tāta mahābāho devo bhāskaratatparaḥ ||
sa pūjyaḥ sa namaskāryaḥ sa hi dhyātavya eva ca || 9 ||
pratyakṣadevatā hyeṣā devadevoyamādarāt ||
atha kiṃ bahunoktena yadvakṣyāmi nibodha me || 1.207.10 ||
pūjayettanayaḥ pāpī tathādityadinairapi ||
pūjayanti narā ye vai te yāṃti paramāṃ gatim || 11 ||
prāpte sūryadine bhaktyā bhānuṃ saṃpūjya śraddhayā ||
naktaṃ karoti puruṣaḥ sa yātyamaraloktām || 12 ||
yastu pūrvaṃ raverbhaktyā pañcaratnasamanvitam||
nivedayati maṃtreṇa sa yātyamaralokatām || 13 ||
mārtaṃḍaprītaye yastu kuryācchrāddhaṃ vidhānataḥ ||
saṃkrāntāvayane vīra sūryalokaṃ sa gacchati || 14 ||
kṛtvopavāsaṃ ṣaṣṭhyāṃ tu saptamyāṃ yastu mānavaḥ ||
karoti vidhivacchrāddhaṃ bhāskaraḥ prīyatāmiti||15||
sarvadoṣavinirmuktaḥ sūryaloke mahīyate ||
mānavo yastu saptamyāṃ yoṣidvāpi divākaram ||16||
prapūjya vidhivadbhānuṃ sarvānkāmānavāpnuyāt ||
viśeṣatastasya dine grahaṇe ca narādhipa || 17 ||
iti bhīṣma vijānīhi na devo bhāskarātpriyaḥ ||
ādityamekaṃ paramaṃ devadeveṣu pūjitam || 18 ||
ratnaparvatamāruhya yathā bhuvi narādhipāḥ ||
sattvānurūpaṃ gacchanti ratnabhāgānaśeṣataḥ || 19 ||
tathā bhānuṃ samārādhya prāpnuvaṃti narāḥ phalam||
dhanārthī prāpnuyādarthaṃ putrārthī prāpnuyātsutam || 1.207.20 ||
mokṣārthī mokṣamāpnoti cātha vā.amaratāṃ vrajet ||
atha kiṃ bahunoktena śṛṇu tvaṃ vacanaṃ mama || 21 ||
brahmādayo devagaṇā bhānumārādhya bhārata ||
manoharāṇi divyāni divi sthānānyavāpnuvan || 22 ||
acalāni mahābhāgāḥ sarvapāpaharāṇi ca || 23 ||
|| sumanturuvāca || ||
ityuktvā bhagavānvyāsastatraivāṃtaradhīyata ||
bhīṣmo.api pūjayāmāsa bhaktyā bhānuṃ vidhānataḥ ||24||
tathā tvamapi rājendra pūjayemaṃ divākaram ||
pūjayitvā raviṃ bhaktyā sthānaṃ yāsyasi śāśvatam ||25||
yathā gataḥ sa bhagavānvyāso bhīṣmaśca mānada ||
sakṛtprapūjya saptamyāṃ bhaktyā devaṃ divākaram || 26 ||
iti śrībhaviṣye mahāpurāṇe brāhme parvaṇi saptamīkalpe vyāsabhīṣmasaṃvāde ādityapūjāmāhātmyavarṇanaṃ nāma saptādhikadviśatatamo.adhyāyaḥ || 207 ||
saptamīvratavarṇanam
|| śatānīka uvāca || ||
punarme brūhi saptamyāṃ prītaye bhāskarasya tu ||
upoṣito bhavatīha naro yastu dvijottama || 1 ||
|| sumanturuvāca || ||
kathitāḥ sapta saptamyaḥ punarasminmahāmate ||
bahavaḥ kuruśārdūla bhūyastvetāḥ śṛṇuṣva me || 2 ||
svayaṃ yāḥ kathitāḥ pūrvamādityena khagādhipa ||
aruṇasya mahābāho saptamyaḥ sapta pūjitāḥ || 3 ||
arkasaṃpuṭakairekā dvitīyā maricaistathā ||
tṛtīyā niṃbapatraiśca caturthī phalasaptamī || 4 ||
anodanā pañcamī syātṣaṣṭhī vijayasaptamī ||
saptamī kāmikā jñeyā vidhiṃ tāsāṃ nibodha me || 5 ||
śuklapakṣe ravidine dakṣiṇe cottarāyaṇe ||
grahaṇe sūryanakṣatre gṛhṇīyātsapta saptamī || 6 ||
sa tāṃ su brahmacārī syācchaucayukto jitendriyaḥ ||
sūryārcanarato dāṃto japahomaparastathā || 7 ||
pañcamyāmeva puruṣaḥ kuryānnitya manātmakam ||
ṣaṣṭhyāṃ na maithunaṃ gacchenmadhumāṃsaṃ ca varjayet || 8 ||
arkasaṃpuṭakairekāṃ tathānyāṃ maricairnayet ||
tathāparāṃ niṃbapatraiḥ phalākhyāyāṃ phalaṃ caret || 9 ||
anodanāmannarahita upāsīta yathāvidhi ||
ahorātraṃ vāyubhakṣaḥ kuryādvijayasaptamīm || 1.208.10 ||
tathaikāṃ saptamīṃ kṛtvā pratimāsaṃ vicakṣaṇaḥ ||
kuryādyathāvidhi mudā tataḥ kurvīta kāmikām || 11 ||
āsāṃ likhitvā nāmāni patrakeṣu pṛthakpṛthak ||
tāni sarvāṇi patrāṇi kṣipedabhinave ghaṭe || 12 ||
tadarthaṃ yo na jānāti lokavāhyopi vā naraḥ ||
tena hyuddhārayedekaṃ na kuryācca vicāraṇām ||13||
tenaiva vidhinā yastu pratimāsaṃ ca tattapaḥ ||
saptaiva yāvatsaptamyo vijñeyā sā tu kāmikā || 14 ||
ityetāḥ sapta saptamyaḥ svayaṃ proktā vivasvatā ||
kurvīta yo naro bhaktyā sa yātyarkasado nṛpa || 15 ||
arkasaṃpuṭakairvittamacalaṃ saptapauruṣam ||
maricaiḥ saṃgamaḥ syādvai priyaiḥ putrādibhiḥ sadā || 16 ||
sarvarogāḥ praṇaśyaṃti niṃbapatrairna saṃśayaḥ ||
phalaistu putrapautrāśca dauhitraścāpi puṣkalaḥ || 17 ||
ato dhanaṃ dhanaṃ dhānyaṃ suvarṇaṃ rajataṃ tathā ||
tathā paśurhiraṇyaṃ ca ārogyaṃ satataṃ nṛpa || 18 ||
upoṣya vijayāṃ śatrūnrājañjayati nityaśaḥ ||
sādhayetkāmadā kāmānvidhivatsamupāsitā || 19 ||
putrakāmo labhetputramarthakāmorthamakṣayam ||
vidyākāmo labhedvidyāṃ rājyārthī rājyamāpnuyāt ||
kṛtsnānkāmāndadātyeṣā kāmadā kurunandana || 1.208.20 ||
naro vā yadi vā nārī yathoktaṃ saptamīvratam ||
karoti niyatātmā vai sa yāti paramāṃ gatim || 21 ||
na teṣāṃ triṣu lokeṣu kiṃcidastīti durlabham ||
ye bhaktyā lokanāthasya vratinaḥ saṃśitavratāḥ || 22 ||
vrataistu vividhairvīra tapobhirvā suduṣkaraiḥ ||
na tatphalamavāpnoti yajñairvā bahudakṣiṇaiḥ || 23 ||
tīrthābhiṣecanairvāpi dānahomārcanaistathā ||
yatphalaṃ ca pūjayituṃ saptamyāṃ prāpya mokṣadam ||
mokṣārthī pārthivaśreṣṭha yathāha bhagavānraviḥ || 24 ||
kṛtvādityadine naktaṃ bhaktyā saṃpūjayedravim ||
acalaṃ sthānamāpnoti mānavaḥ śraddhayānvitaḥ ||
sūryaloke ca niyataṃ tasya vāso na saṃśayaḥ || 25 ||
yastu pūjayate bhaktyā saptamyāṃ bhāskaraṃ naraḥ ||
brahmeṃdrarudralokeṣu tasyāpratihatā gatiḥ ||26 ||
nāṃdho na kuṣṭhī na klībo na vyaṃgo na ca nirdhanaḥ ||
kule tasya bhavedvīra yaścaretsaptamīvratam || 27 ||
vidyārthī labhate vidyāṃ dhanārthī dhanamāpnuyāt ||
bhāryārthī rūpasaṃpannāṃ striyaṃ putrāṃśca bhārata || 28 ||
lobhātpramādānmohācca vratabhaṃgo yadā bhavet ||
tadā trirātraṃ nāśnīyātkuryādvā keśamuṃḍanam |||29||
prāyaścittamidaṃ kṛtvā punareva vratī bhavet ||
saptaiva yāvatsaptamyo bhavaṃti ca khageśvara||1.208.30||
abhyarcya sūryasaptamyāṃ mālyadhūpādibhirnaraḥ ||
bhojayitvā dvijāñchaktyā prāpnuyātsvargamakṣayam||31||
saptamyāṃ vipramukhyebhyo hiraṇyaṃ yaḥ prayacchati||
sa tadakṣayyamāpnoti sūryalokaṃ ca gacchati ||32||
itīdaṃ kīrtitaṃ vīra saptamīvratamuttamam||
bhūya evābhidhāsyāmi śṛṇuṣvaikamanā nṛpa ||33||
iti śrībhaviṣye mahāpurāṇe brāhme parvaṇi saptamīkalpe sauradharme sūryāruṇasaṃvāde saptasaptamīvratavarṇanaṃ nāmāṣṭādhikadviśatatamo.adhyāyaḥ || 208 ||
saptamīvratavarṇanam
|| sumanturuvāca || ||
yaḥ kṣipedgomayāhāraḥ śuklā dvādaśa saptamīḥ ||
athavā yāvakāhāraḥ śīrṇaparṇāśano.api vā || 1 ||
kṣīrāśī caikabhakto vā bhikṣāhārotha vā punaḥ ||
jalāhāropi vā vidvānpūjayitvā divākaram || 2 ||
puṣpopahārairvividhaiḥ padmasaugandhikotpalaiḥ ||
nānāprakārairgaṃdhaiśca dhūpairguggulucaṃdanaiḥ || 3 ||
kṛṣṇagaṃdhapāyasādyairvicitraiḥ suvibhūṣaṇaiḥ ||
arcayitvā dvijāñcchreṣṭhānhiraṇyānnādibhirnaraḥ || 4 ||
sa tatphalamavāpnoti kratubhirbhūridakṣiṇaiḥ ||
yadeha tapyate vīra prāpyate kevalaṃ raveḥ || 5
vimānavaramārūḍhaḥ sūryaloke mahīyate ||
tataḥ puṇyakṣayādrājankule mahati jāyate || 6 ||
evaṃ bhaktyā vivasvaṃtaṃ pratimāsaṃ samāhitaḥ ||
pūjayedvidhivadbhaktyā nāmāni parikīrtayet || 7 ||
caitrike māsi viṣṇuśca mādhave hyaryameti vai ||
śukre vivasvān māse tu śucau māse divākaraḥ || 8 ||
parjanyaḥ śrāvaṇe māsi nabhasye varuṇastathā ||
mārtaṃḍeti ca vijñeyaḥ kārtike bhārgavaḥ punaḥ || 9 ||
mārgaśīrṣepi mitrastu kīrtitaḥ satataṃ budhaiḥ ||
pūṣā pauṣe tu vai māse pūjanīyaḥ prayatnataḥ || 1.209.10
māghe bhageti vijñeyastvaṣṭā caivātha phālgune ||
evaṃ krameṇa nāmāni kīrtayetprītaye raveḥ || 11 ||
dhūpārcanavidhimimaṃ saptamyāṃ susamāhitaḥ ||
yaḥ karoti naro bhaktyā sa yāti paramāṃ gatim || 12 ||
tataste sarvamākhyātaṃ yathāguhyatamaṃ vibhoḥ ||
naiva deyamaśiṣyāya nābhaktāya kadācana ||13||
na ca pāpakṛte deyaṃ na deyaṃ nāstikāya vā||
kṛtaghne nāstike vīra na deyaṃ krūrakarmaṇi || 14 ||
ya idaṃ śṛṇuyānnityaṃ saptamīvratamuttamam ||
paṭhedyaścāpi niyataḥ śraddhayā parayānvitaḥ || 15 ||
iha loke sukhaṃ prāpya sūryaloke mahīyate ||
puṇyakṣayādihāgatya rājā bhavati bhūtale || 16 || ||
iti śrībhaviṣye mahāpurāṇe brāhme parvaṇi saptamīkalpe sūryāruṇasaṃvāde pratimāsasaptamīvratavarṇanaṃ nāma navādhikadviśatatamo.adhyāyaḥ || 209 ||
sūryapūjāvarṇanam
|| sumanturuvāca || ||
ityeṣa saptamīkalpaḥ samāsātkathitastava||
vistarātte punarvacmi śṛṇu caikamanā vibho || 1 ||
phālgunāmalapakṣasya ṣaṣṭhyāṃ ca samupoṣitaḥ ||
pūjayedbhāskaraṃ snātvā gaṃdhapuṣpavilepanaiḥ ||2||
arkapuṣpairmahābāho guggulena sugaṃdhinā ||
śvetena karavīreṇa caṃdanena divākaram ||3|
guḍodakena naivedyaṃ nivedyaṃ prītaye raveḥ ||
evaṃ pūjya divā bhānuṃ rātrau tasyāgrataḥ svapet||
japanbhaumaṃ paraṃ jāpyaṃ vinidraḥ satataṃ budhaḥ||4
śatānīka uvāca
kiṃ tatparaṃ bhagavataḥ priyaṃ jāpyamanuttamam | | 5
japtavyo yatparairbhaktyā bhānustasyāgrato naraiḥ |
tanme brūhi tathā mantrāndhūpadīpānviśeṣataḥ | |
yenāhaṃ taṃ japañjapyaṃ pūjayāmi divākaram | | 6
sumanturuvāca
vacmi te bharataśreṣṭha samāsānna tu vistarāt | | 7
ṣaḍakṣareṇa mantreṇa kuryātsarvaṃ samāhitaḥ |
japaṃ homaṃ tathā pūjāṃ śatajaptena sarvadā | | 8
sāvitryā ca japaṃ pūrvaṃ kṛtvā śatasahasraśaḥ |
paścātsarvaṃ prakurvīta japādikamanākulam | | 9
oṃ bhoḥ sāvitri bhāskarāya sahasraraśmi dhīmahi |
tena sūryaḥ pracodayāt | | 1.210.10
japa eva paraḥ proktaḥ saptamyāṃ bhānunā svayam |
japtvā sakṛdbhavetpūto mānavo nātra saṃśayaḥ | | 11
prabhāte tvatha saptamyāṃ japanniyatamānasaḥ |
pūjayedbhānkaraṃ bhaktyā pūrvoktavidhinā nṛpa | | 12
śraddhayā bhojayeccāpi brāhmaṇāñchaktito nṛpa |
divyānbhogāṃśca vidhivadbhakṣyabhojyairanekaśaḥ | | 13
vittaśāṭhyaṃ na kurvīta bhojakāṃśca prabhojayet |
na bhojayettathā.asaurānsaurānyatnena bhojayet | | 14
śatānīka uvāca
ke bhojyā ke na vā bhojyā brāhmaṇā brahmavittama |
keṣu citteṣu saptamyāṃ devadevo divākaraḥ | | 15
ghaṭībhojyo bhavedvipraḥ saptamīṃ kurute ca yaḥ |
saurabhinneṣvabhojyo yo yaśca bhukto divākare | | 16
ete bhojyā dvijā rājannādityena samāsataḥ |
proktāḥ kurukulaśreṣṭha tathā.abhojyāñchṛṇuṣva vai | | 17
sabhāryaḥ sapatiryastu kuṣṭharogairhataśca yaḥ |
yaścānyadevatābhaktastathā nakṣatrasūcakaḥ | | 18
parāpavādanirato yaśca devalakastathā |
ete.abhojyāḥ savitrā tu svayaṃ devena cintitāḥ | | 19
śatānīka uvāca
ye bhojyā brāhmaṇāḥ proktā ye cābhojyā dvijottamāḥ |
eteṣāṃ lakṣaṇaṃ brūhi sarveṣāṃ vai samāhitaḥ | | 1.210.20
sumanturuvāca
sādhu pṛṣṭho.asmi rājendra kīrtayāmyeva kṛtsnaśaḥ |
paṭhatāṃ tu trayī vidyāṃ brāhmaṇānāṃ kadambakaḥ | | 21
ghaṭetyuktā tu sā rājansvayaṃ devena bhānunā |
sā ghaṭā vidyate yasya sa ghaṭītyucyate dvijaiḥ | | 22
brahmakṣatraviśāṃ vīra śūdrāṇāṃ ca kadambakaḥ |
śṛṇvatāṃ vidhivatpuṇyaṃ bhaktyā pustakavācanam | | 23
iti māse nibaddhasya homasyeti ca bhānunā |
kathitaṃ kuruśārdūla svayamākāśagāminā | | 24
yasyāḥ kartā bhavedyastu mama syātkarako mataḥ |
sa vipro rājaśārdūla sadeṣṭo bhāskarasya tu | | 25
jayopajīvī vyāsaśca samaḥ syājjīvakastathā |
yānyetāni purāṇāni setihāsāni bhārata | |
jayeti kathitānīha svayaṃ devena bhāsvatā | | 26
ekaṃ nivāsayanyastu brāhmaṇaṃ tūpajīvati |
jayopajīvī sa jñeyo vācakaśca tathā nṛpa | | 27
āruṇeyādiśāstrāṇi saptāśvatilakaṃ tathā |
yaśca jānāti saurāṇi vipraḥ saurassa tattvavit | | 28
pūjayetsatataṃ yastu bhāskaraṃ nṛpasattama |
bhojakāṃśca tathā rājanyathā devaṃ divākaram | | 29
sa jñeyo bhāskare bhakto bhojanīyaḥ prayatnataḥ ||
bhojyānāṃ lakṣaṇaṃ hyetadabhojyānāṃ śṛṇuṣva me || 1.210.30 ||
vṛṣalī yasya vai bhāryā brāhmaṇasya viśeṣataḥ ||
parabhāryāpatirasau brāhmaṇo brāhmaṇādhamaḥ || 31 ||
daivena nihataḥ kuṣṭhī brāhmaṇo brahmaghātakaḥ ||
bhojako viṃdate yastu na ca taṃ pūjaye ttathā || 32 ||
jñeyonyadevabhaktosau sa vipraḥ kurunaṃdana ||
ādityaṃ bhojakaṃ vidyādbhānordehasamudbhavam || 33 ||
nādityaṃ pūjayedyastu sa bhojyo na kadācana ||
muṇḍo vyaṃgadharo gauraḥ śaṃkhapuṣpadharastathā ||34||
yasya yāti gṛhe rājanbhojako mānavasya tu ||
tasya yāṃti gṛhe devāḥ pitaro bhāraka rasya tu || 35 ||
rakṣobhūtapiśācāśca yoginyopi palāyitāḥ ||
sakṛdbhuṅkte gṛhe yasya bhojako gṛhadharmiṇaḥ || 36 ||
saptasaṃvatsaraṃ yāvatṛpto bhavati bhāskaraḥ ||
tasmāttānbhojayeddivyānbhojakānsatataṃ budhaḥ ||
yastu tānniṃdate vipraḥ sa na bhojyaḥ kadācana || 37 ||
nijaṃ bhartāramutsṛjya svairaṃ yānyatra gacchati ||
svairiṇī sā tu vai proktā pāpiṣṭhā kuladūṣiṇī || 38 ||
pracchannaṃ rocate rājanyā nārī bhavadoṣataḥ ||
jñeyā sā svairiṇī rājankule bhavati nāśinī ||39||
yo.asyāṃ rato bhavedvipraḥ sa jñeyaḥ svairiṇīrataḥ ||
raṃgopajīvī kathako yaśca prākṛtanartakaḥ || 1.210.40 ||
raṃgopajīvī rājeṃdra tathā ca bahuyācakaḥ ||
dve ete nāmanī rājankathakasya prakīrtite ||
kṛtenānena yādṛkca udvṛttaḥ kurunaṃdana || 41 ||
yaḥ stutiṃ gāyate vipraḥ proccaistu janasaṃsadi ||
raṃgopajīvī proktoyaṃ dvitīyaḥ parikīrtitaḥ || 42 ||
sūcanaṃ kathanaṃ proktaṃ sarvaśāstreṣu bhārata ||
sūcayedyastu ṛkṣāṇi sa vai nakṣatrasūcakaḥ || 43 ||
|| śatānīka uvāca || ||
aho bata mahatkaṣṭaṃ bhavato yaddvijānprati ||
vedāṃgaṃ jyotiḥśāstraṃ tu ṣaṣṭhaṃ proktaṃ manīṣibhiḥ || 44 ||
ṣaḍaṃgo na bhavettena rahitena dvijena ca ||
abhojye paṭhanāttasya yadvatsyādbrāhmaṇo dvija || 45 ||
bhojyo.akhaṇḍaṃ yayau vipro.anarthakena tvanarthakam||
vimṛśya kathyatāṃ vipra atra me saṃśayo mahān || 46 ||
|| sumaṃturuvāca || ||
sādhu pṛṣṭosmi bhavatā śrūyatāmatra nirṇayaḥ ||
yasya jīvyamidaṃ jñeyamaṃgaṃ viprasya vai bhavet || 47 ||
sāṃvatsareṇa jyotiṣā jñānanakṣatrasūcakaḥ ||
na sa bhojyo bhavedrājanyasyeyaṃ jīvikā bhavet || 48||
niṣkāraṇaṃ parāṇāṃ ca parokṣaṃ doṣakīrtanam||
guṇānāṃ ca yathā guptiḥ parivādaparastu saḥ || 49 ||
brāhmaṇo yastu rājeṃdra vṛttyā karma karoti vai ||
devatāyatane ceha devānāṃ pūjanaṃ tathā || 1.210.50 ||
ādhipatyaṃ bhakṣaṇaṃ ca naivedyasya paraṃtapa ||
sa jñeyo devalo rājanbrāhmaṇo brāhmaṇādhamaḥ || 51 ||
nādhikārastu viprāṇāṃ bhaumānāṃ devapūjane ||
vṛttyā bharataśārdūla ādhipatye viśeṣataḥ || 52 ||
yastu pūjayate devīṃ brāhmaṇo dravyalobhataḥ ||
vṛttyai kurukulaśreṣṭha sa yāti narakaṃ dhruvam || 53 ||
devālayeṣu sarveṣu agnikāryaṃ ca suvrata ||
yaḥ kuryāddravyalobhena adhogatimavāpnuyāt || 54 ||
devālayeṣu sarveṣu varjayitvā śivālayam ||
devānāṃ pūjanaṃ rājannagnikāryeṣu vā vibho || 55 ||
adhikāraḥ smṛto rājanbhojakānāṃ na saṃśayaḥ ||
pūjayaṃtastu te devānprāpnuvaṃti parāṃ gatim || 56 ||
naivedyaṃ bhuñjate yasmādbhojayaṃti ca bhāskaram ||
pūjayaṃti ca devānāṃ divyatantreṇa te gatāḥ || 57 ||
pūjayitvā tu vai devānnaivedyaṃ bhakṣya ca prabhoḥ ||
yāṃti te paramaṃ sthānaṃ yatra devo divākaraḥ || 58 ||
brāhmaṇaścāpi taṃ brūyā ttīkṣṇe sati mahāmate ||
evaṃ kariṣye śreyorthaṃ nātmanastava vā vibho || 59 ||
ityāmaṃtrya tato gacchetsvagṛhaṃ kurunandana ||
tathā pare.ahni saṃpūjya devaṃ bhaktyā divākaram || 1.210.60 ||
kṛtvā ca pāvakaṃ rājanbrāhmaṇānbhojayettataḥ ||
śālyodanaṃ tathā mudgaṃ sugandhaṃ mudgameva hi || 61 ||
apūpānguḍapūpāṃśca payo dadhi tathā nṛpa ||
etaistu tṛptimāyāti bhāskaro narasattama || 62 ||
varjyāni bharataśreṣṭha śṛṇu tvaṃ gadato mama ||
kulatthakānmasūrāṃśca niṣpāvādīṃstathaiva ca || 63 ||
sisrukaṃ ca tathānyacca rājamāṣāṃstathaiva ca ||
naitāni bhāskare dadyādya icchecchreya ātmanaḥ || 64||
durgadhaṃ yacca kaṭukamatyalpaṃ bhāskarasya tu ||
vimiśrāṃstaḍulāṃścāpi na dadyādbhāskarāya vai || 65 ||
itthaṃ bhojya dvijaṃ rājanprāśayedarkasaṃpuṭam ||
praṇamya śirasā devamudakena samanvitam || 66 ||
gṛhītvā ketanaṃ yastu bhajate.anyatra lokataḥ ||
nāśnaṃti pitarastasya na devā na ca mānavāḥ || || 67 ||
niṣkramya nagarādrājangatvā pūrvottarāṃ diśam ||
nātyucce nātinīce ca śucau deśe.arkamuttamam || 68||
jātaṃ dṛṣṭvā mahābāho pūjayitvā khagottama||
pūrvottaragatāścaiva tasya śākhā diśannṛpa||69||
śākhāyā agrataḥ pātre susūkṣme pallavāśrite||
suśliṣṭe na pṛthagbhūte saṃpūjya gṛhamāvrajet||1.210.70||
snātaḥ pūjya vivasvaṃtamarkapuṣpaiḥ khagottama||
brāhmaṇānbhojayitvā tu arko me prīyatāmiti||71||
prāśya maṃtreṇārkapuṭaṃ tato bhuṃjīta
vāgyataḥ || devasya purato vīra tvaspṛśandaśanaiḥ puṭam || 72 ||
oṃ arkasaṃpuṭa bhadraṃ te bhadraṃ te.arkaṃ sadāstu vai ||
mamāpi kuru bhadraṃ ca prāyaścittaprado bhava || 73 ||
imaṃ maṃtraṃ japanrājansmarannarkaṃ mahāmate ||
sthitvā pūrvamukho brahma vāriṇā sahitaṃ nṛpa|| 74||
prāśya bhuṃkte ca yo rājansa yāti paramāṃ gatim ||
daṃtairaspṛśya he vīra tatpuṭaṃ cārkasaṃjñitam || 75 ||
anena vidhinā bhaktyā kartavyā saptamī sadā ||
yāvadvarṣe mahābāho prītaye.arkasya śraddhayā || 76 ||
yaścemāṃ saptamīṃ kuryādbhāskaraṃ prīṇayannaraḥ ||
tasyākṣayaṃ bhavedvittamacalaṃ sāptapauruṣam || 77 ||
suvarṇaṃ rajataṃ tāmraṃ hiraṇyaṃ ca tathā kṣayam ||
kṛtvemāṃ siddhimāyātaḥ kauthumiḥ sahasā gataḥ || 78 ||
kuṣṭharogācca vai mukto jayastomo mahīpatiḥ ||
bṛhadbaladhvajaḥ kopī yājñavalkyo .atha kṛṣṇajaḥ || 79 ||
arkaṃ caiva samārādhya tato.aguste.arkasāmyatām ||
iyaṃ dhanyatamā puṇyā saptamī pāpanāśinī || 1.210.80 ||
paṭhatāṃ śṛṇvatāṃ rājankurvatāṃ ca viśeṣataḥ ||
tasmādeṣā sadā kāryā vidhivacchreyase.anagha || 81 ||
|| śatānīka uvāca || ||
janakādayo yathā siddhiṃ gatā bhānuṃ prapūjya ca ||
śrutaṃ mayā tu bahuśo na śrutaṃ kauthumiryathā || 82 ||
siddhiṃ gato.arkamārādhya kuṣṭhānmuktaśca suvrata ||
kaścāsau kauthumirvipraḥ kathaṃ kuṣṭha mavāptavān || 83 ||
kathamārādhayāmāsa bhānuṃ devapatiṃ dvija ||
etanme vipra nikhilaṃ kīrtayasva samāsataḥ || 84 || ||
iti śrībhaviṣye mahāpu rāṇe brāhme parvaṇi saptamīkalpe sauradharmeṣu sūryapūjādivarṇanaṃ nāma daśādhikadviśatatamo.adhyāyaḥ || 210 ||
arkasampuṭikāvarṇanam
|| sumaṃturuvāca || ||
sādhu pṛṣṭo .asmi rājeṃdra śṛṇuṣva gadato mama ||
āsītpurā mahāvidvānbrāhmaṇaḥ sthānagottamaḥ || 1 ||
sa gataḥ putrasahito janakasyāśramaṃ dvijaḥ ||
tatra vādo.a bhavatteṣāṃ viprairanyairnṛpottama || 2 ||
krodhāviṣṭena vai tatra hataḥ kauthuminā dvijaḥ ||
tena dṛṣṭvā hataṃ vipraṃ tyaktaḥ pitrā sa kauthumiḥ || 3 ||
bhrātṛbhiśca mahābāho tathā śiṣṭaiśca kṛtsnaśaḥ ||
pratyuktaḥ sa ca sarvaistu śokaduḥkhasamanvitaḥ || 4 ||
tīrthāni sa jagāmātha divyānyāyatanāni ca ||
na ca muktastvasau vipraḥ sahasā brahmahatyayā || 5 ||
amukte.atha tayā vipre paro vyādhirajāyata ||
karṇanāsāvihīnastu pūyaśoṇitavisravaḥ || 6 ||
pṛthivīṃ paryaṭansarvāṃ punarāgātpiturgṛham ||
duḥkhopahatacittastu pitaraṃ vākyamabravīt ||7||
pitargatastu tīrthāni puṇyānyāyatanāni ca ||
mukto.asmi nānayā tāta krūrayā brahmahatyayā || 8 ||
kṛte.api hi pare tāta prāyaścitte tu me.anagha ||
kiṃ karomi kva gacchāmi tātātīva rujo mama || 9 ||
kṛtena karmaṇā yena alpāyāsena me vibho ||
naśyettu brahmahatyeyaṃ vyādhiścāyaṃ paraṃtapa ||1.211.1 0||
kathyatāṃ mā ciraṃ tāta kuru niḥśreyasaṃ mama ||
hiraṇyanābho viprastu śrutvā vākyaṃ sutasya tu ||
śokaduḥkhābhibhūtastu vākyaṃ putramuvāca ha || 11 ||
|| hiraṇyanābha uvāca || ||
jñātaḥ putra tava kleśaḥ prāpto yastvayāṭatā mahīm || 12 ||
tīrthāni ca tvayā vatsa prāyaścittāni kurvatā ||
na cāpi brahmahatyā tvāṃ muṃcate matkulodvaha || 13 ||
upāyamekaṃ vakṣyāmi yena tvaṃ mokṣamāpsyasi ||
alpāyāsena vai putra śṛṇuṣva gadato mama || 14 ||
|| kauthumiruvāca || ||
ārādhayāmi kaṃ devaṃ brahmādīnāṃ kathaṃ vibho ||
śarīreṇa vihīno.asmi hetunā sarvakarmaṇām || 15 ||
|| hiraṇyanābha uvāca || ||
siddhisaṃtatiyuktena karmaṇā tuṣṭimāpnuyuḥ ||
devairapi supūjyoyamupalepanamārjanaiḥ || 16 ||
bhānureko dvijaśreṣṭha ūcurevaṃ manīṣiṇaḥ ||
brahmā viṣṇurmahādevo jaleśo dhanadastathā || || 17 ||
bhānumāśritya sarve te modaṃte divi putraka ||
tasmādbhānoḥ samaṃ devaṃ nāhaṃ paśyāmi kaṃcana || 18 ||
evaṃ bhānuṃ sarvamānyamadhunā khilakāmadam ||
pitaraṃ mātaraṃ tāta narāṇāṃ nātra saṃśayaḥ || 19 ||
tamārādhaya vai bhaktyā japanmaṃtramanuttamam ||
itihāsapurāṇāni śṛṣu śraddhā samanvitaḥ || 1.211.20 ||
ārādhayanraviṃ bhaktyā japansāma mahāmate ||
purāṇāni tato loke mokṣaṃ prāpsyasi putraka || 21 ||
|| kauthumiruvāca || ||
diśa sāmāni vai tāta pravarāṇi mahāmate||
oṃkārapravarodgīthaṃ prasthānaṃ ca catuṣṭayam|| 22 ||
paṃcamaḥ parihārotra ṣaṣṭhamāhustamadbhutam||
nidhanaṃ saptamaṃ sāmnāṃ sāptavidhyamiti smṛtam ||23||
sāptavidhyamiti proktaṃ hiṃkārapraṇaveṣu ca||
aṣṭamaṃ ca tava śāṭhyaṃ navamaṃ vāmadevikam ||24|||
jyeṣṭhaṃ tu daśamaṃ sāma vedhase priyamuttayam ||
eteṣāṃ tāta sāmnāṃ vai kaṃṭhe jāpyaṃ paraṃ matam ||
japitvā tu ahaṃ śaktyā gacchāmi paramaṃ padam || 25 || ||
|| hiraṇyanābha uvāca || ||
sādhu putra kulaṃ pūtaṃ tvatputreṇa samena ca || 26||
evaṃ gatasyāpi hi te jātā putra vidheḥ smṛtiḥ ||
evaṃ tāta na saṃdehaḥ sāmānyetāni putraka || 27 ||
pravarāṇi hi sāmnā vai brahmaṇā kathitāni ha ||
eṣāmapi paraṃ proktaṃ sāmadvayamanuttamam ||
tasmādekaṃ paraṃ jāpyaṃ sarva pāpabhayāpaham||28||
|| kauthumiruvāca || ||
kathyatāṃ tāta tacchīghraṃ yattu sāmadvayaṃ param ||
eteṣāṃ tāta sāmnāṃ tu nānyajjāpyaṃ ca yadbhavet ||29|| ||
|| hiraṇyanābha uvāca || ||
jyeṣṭhasāmaparaṃ pūrvaṃ dvitīyaṃ gadataḥ śṛṇu ||1.211.30||
tataḥ śrāvyaṃ tṛtīyaṃ tu japtavyaṃ muktimicchatā ||
tataśca paramaṃ proktaṃ svayaṃ devena bhānunā || 31 ||
svayaṃ daivatamādiṣṭaṃ chaṃdasāmuttamaṃ vratam ||
priyaṃ hiraṇyagarbhasya priyaṃ sūryasya sarvadā || 32 ||
japaśca viniyogopi lakṣaṇaṃ ca nibodha me ||
satyena svaralīnastu śūkarādi smṛtaṃ budhaiḥ || 33 ||
ṛturbhāvastathā dharmo vidharmaḥ satyakṛttathā ||
dharmādharmau tathā kāryau dharmavedaname va ca || 34 ||
yadebhirgīyate śabde ruciraṃ samayairdvijaiḥ ||
jāpyaṃ tatparamaṃ proktaṃ svayaṃ devena bhānunā || 35 ||
etadvai japamānastu punarāvartate na tu ||
sarvarogavinirmukto mucyate brahmahatyayā || 36 ||
etajjāpyaṃ tu saṃjapya ārādhaya divākaram ||
gāyansāma tava proktaṃ śṛṇu paurāṇikaṃ suta || 37 ||
jyeṣṭhasāmno.api te putra lakṣaṇaṃ kathayāmi hi ||
ādyāyādājyadoheti jyeṣṭhasāmopi lakṣaṇam || 38 ||
tava śrāvyaṃ japaṃ putrajyeṣṭhagāyai raviḥ sadā ||
samārādhaya śṛṇvanvai putrāṇāmiva putraka ||
evamārādhya deveśaṃ tato duḥkhaṃ prahāsyasi || 39 ||
|| sumaṃturuvāca || ||
tataḥ śrutvā piturvākyaṃ sāmagaḥ kauthumistathā || 1.211.40 ||
ārādhayāmāsa raviṃ bhaktyā śraddhāsamanvitaḥ ||
tataḥ śrāvyaṃ japanrājaṃtrikāle purato raveḥ || 41 ||
śṛṇvatastu purāṇāni bahmahatyā gatā tadā ||
vyādhiśca kuruśārdūla phalametacchrutasyavai .a| 42 ||
japatā yatphalaṃ tena devaṃ pūjayatā nṛpa ||
sopi prāpto raviṃ rājañchṛṇuṣvaika manā nṛpa || 43 ||
sa gato mūrtimānvipraḥ prasādādbhāskarasya tu ||
praviśya maṃḍalaṃ bhānoḥ padaṃ yatparamaṃ vibhoḥ || 44 ||
āvartate na cādyāpi gatosau paramaṃ padam ||
iti te kathitaṃ rājangataḥ siddhiṃ mahādvijaḥ ||45||
upoṣyemāṃ bhavedvīra saptamīṃ yāti bhāskaram ||
kauthumirnaraśārdūla prasā dādbhāskarasya tu || 46 ||
japamānastu vai sopi purāṇaśravaṇastathā ||
ityeṣā kathitā rājanprathamā saptamī tathā || 47 ||
arkasya puṭikā puṇyā vittadā yā priyā raveḥ || 48 || ||
iti śrībhaviṣye mahāpurāṇe brāhme parvaṇi saptamīkalpe sauradharme.arkasaṃpuṭikānāmasaptamīvratavarṇanaṃ nāmaikādaśādhikadviśatatamo.adhyāyaḥ || 211 ||
saurārcanavidhivarṇanam
|| sumaṃturuvāca || ||
ityeṣā kathitā vīra arkasaṃpuṭikā tava ||
dvitīyā maricairyā tu śṛṇuṣva gadato mama || 1 ||
śuklapakṣe tu caitrasya ṣaṣṭhyāṃ samyagupoṣitaḥ ||
pūjayedbhāskaraṃ bhaktyā sauradharmavidhānataḥ || 2 ||
|| śatānīka uvāca || ||
brūhi sarvānmama brahmanmaṃtrānpuṇyānviśeṣataḥ ||
sūryādihṛdayaṃ cāpi śironyāsayutāṃstathā || 3 ||
|| sumaṃturuvāca || ||
ahaṃ te kathayiṣyāmi rahasyaṃ paramaṃ vibho ||
yaduktaṃ brahmaṇā pūrvaṃ bhaktyā bhānormahātmanaḥ || 4 ||
sarvapāpakṣayārthāya tacchṛṇuṣva mahāmate ||
sarvapāpaharaṃ puṇyamādityaṃ lokapūji tam || 5 ||
śikhādāmasamāyuktaṃ vakārāmṛtamuttamam ||
oṃ vaṃ phaṭ ||
oṃ eṣa sūryaḥ svayaṃ tāta maṃtramūrtirmahābalaḥ || 6 ||
asyānusmaraṇānmaṃtrī nityaṃ madhurabhojanaḥ ||
saṃvatsareṇa deveśaṃ sākṣādbhānuṃ prapaśyati || 7 ||
vyādhimṛtyośca nirmuktaḥ sūryalokaṃ sa gacchati ||
satataṃ japamānastu rājanmaṃtravidāṃ varaḥ || 8 ||
manasā karmaṇā vācā śāpānugrahatopi vā ||
kṣīrāśī maunamāśritya vivikte niyatendriyaḥ || 9 ||
japitvā dvādaśalakṣaṃ saśarīro divaṃ vrajet ||
trailokyaṃ carate rājaṃściṃtāmaṇirivecchayā || 1.212.10 ||
athedaṃ paramaṃ vāmaṃ sūryasya hṛdayaṃ śṛṇu ||
smartavyaṃ śucinā nityaṃ sarvapāpabhayāpa ham || 11 ||
viyuktaṃ caṃdrasaṃyuktamṛkāreṇa ca bhārata ||
oṃkāradīpitaṃ caiva hṛdayaṃ parikīrtitam || 12 ||
yakārabiṃdusaṃyuktaṃ vaiśākhaḥ kathito budhaiḥ||
yakāraśca vakāraśca mātrā biṃdustathā nṛpa ||13||
iṣṭaṃ kavacamādiṣṭamastraṃ vakṣye nibodha me ||
praṇavādiṃ dukāraṃ ca sānusvāraṃ kaṭastathā || 14 ||
idamastraṃ smṛtaṃ rājannamṛtaṃ ca nibodha me ||
biṃducaṃdrasamāyuktaṃ vakāramamṛtaṃ smṛtam ||15||
oṃ brahmannastramamṛtaṃ gāyatrīṃ cāpi te rogaṃ dhenurvai parikīrtitam||
yakāraśca vakāraśca rirovetramādiśet ||16||
vyanetra etānyaṃgāni sūryasyāmitatejasaḥ ||
ādityaṃ mūrdhni vinyasya hṛdaye hṛdayaṃ nyaset||17||
sāvitrīṃ kaṃṭhadeśe tu aśeṣaṃ mūrdhni ciṃtayet ||
arkanyāso mayākhyāto vidvānnyāsaṃ prakalpayet ||18||
ekākṣarasya sūryasya śṛṇvarcanavidhiṃ param ||
prathamaṃ kiṃkiṇīmudrāṃ baddhvā tu hṛdaye nṛpa || 10 ||
prāṇāyāme ca tathā parivīrasamanvitam ||
ekākṣaraṃ samāvetti ātmaśuddhyarthamādarāt || 1.212.20 ||
punastvāmeva vadhyaṃ tu vakāreṇātmanā labhet || 21 ||
etatkṛtvādityasamo bhavatīti na saṃśayaḥ ||
kṛtvā ca mudrāṃ prāsāde astraṃ yojya mahīpate || 22 ||
prāsādaśobhanaṃ syādvai kṛtvā tadbharatarṣabha ||
kavacenārkavāñchatruṃ kṣālayedvardhanakriyām || 23 ||
tatorghyapātraṃ puṣpaiśca pūjayedvidhivanṛpa ||
hṛdinā snāpayeddevaṃ tataḥ pūjāṃ samācaret || 24 ||
padmamudrā puṣpagarbhā devaṃ śirasi vinyaset ||
āvāhito bhavedevaṃ devadevo divākaraḥ || 25 ||
hṛdayenārghyasaṃyuktāṃ pūjāṃ badhnīta bhārata ||
hṛdayena ca naivedyaṃ dātavyaṃ śaktito vibhoḥ || 26 ||
yathāśakti japaṃ kuryātsuvratī vāgyatendriyaḥ ||
anena vidhinā rājansarvakā ryāṇi sādhayet || 27 ||
na kvacitpratighātaḥ syānna cāpi duritaṃ bhavet ||
vyomamudrāṃ parāṃ baddhvā kṛtvā cāpi pradakṣiṇam || 28 ||
devaṃ visarjayetpaścāddhṛdayena mahīpate || 29 ||
iti śrībhaviṣye mahāpurāṇe brāhme parvaṇi saptamīkalpe sauradharme saurārcanavidhivarṇanaṃ nāma dvādaśādhikadviśatatamo.a dhyāyaḥ || 212 || || cha ||
saurārcanavidhivarṇanam
|| sumaṃturuvāca || ||
dṛṣṭvā tu pāvakaṃ devaṃ pāvakasthaṃ divākaram ||
avyāttu saparīvāraṃ ghukāraṃ parikīrtayet || || 1 ||
evaṃ kṛte śodhanaṃ syātpāvakasya na saṃśayaḥ ||
padmagarbhe tato vātha hṛdayāgnau samākṣipet || 2 ||
āvāhito bhaveddevadevaḥ sākṣānna saṃśayaḥ ||
oṃkāreṇāhutiśataṃ netrāṃjanasamādhinā || 3 ||
pañcāhutīstato dadyādaṃgānāṃ prītaye nṛpa ||
visarjanaṃ tataḥ kuryāddhṛdayena vicakṣaṇaḥ || 4 ||
iti śrībhaviṣye mahāpurāṇe brāhme parvaṇi saptamīkalpe saurārcanavidhivarṇanaṃ nāma trayodaśādhikadviśatatamo.adhyāyaḥ || 213 || || cha ||
maricasaptamīvratavarṇanam
|| sumantu ruvāca || ||
padminī ca tathānyā tu madhyamānāmanī tathā ||
arkiṇī jvālinī caiva tejanī ca gabhastinī || 1 ||
śaṃkhamudrā ca daśamī sūrya vaktrā tathāparā ||
sahasrakiraṇā caiva mudrā dvādaśa kīrtitāḥ || 2||
dadyādarghyaṃ tu padminyā vyoma baddhā japedbudhaḥ ||
udayāśrayaḥ samākarṣe madhyamā vyādhināśinī || 3 ||
arkiṇyā paśyate sūryaṃ vidhisthastu bhavedyadi ||
jvālinīmupasaṃgaṃtuṃ baddhvā sūryamukho japet || 4 ||
saptāhādvīkṣate sūryaṃ sidhyate ca tataḥ svayam ||
avatīrya padmakhaṃḍaṃ sūryādabhimukho naraḥ || 5 ||
japañchatasahasraṃ hi akṣayaṃ labhate nidhim ||
śaṃkhamudrādibhirimaṃ sūrya cakravidhiṃ śṛṇu || 6 ||
ahorātroṣito bhūtvā baddhvā sūryamukho naraḥ ||
sthitaḥ padmāsane rājañjapaṃścāpyayutaṃ manum || 7 ||
paśyate tu tryahātsūryaṃ bhavetsiddhiśca mānasī ||
sahasrakiraṇaṃ baddhvā nābhimātrajale sthitaḥ || 8 ||
japedayutamātraṃ tu bhavettadgatamānasaḥ ||
sahasrakiraṇaṃ devaṃ paraṃ raśmibhirāvṛtam|| || 9 ||
sa paśyati paraṃ dhāma bhavetsiddhiśca puṣkalā ||
śāpānugrahakartāsau sarveṣāṃ prāṇināṃ bhavet || 1.214.10 ||
sarvataḥ kañcukaṃ muktvā bhavedvai vigata jvaraḥ || 11 ||
parau gulphau karau kṛtvā saṃlagnau ca parasparam ||
vāmānāmikayākramya dakṣiṇāṃ tu kanīyasīm || 12 ||
vāmā dakṣiṇayā caiva dakṣiṇā vāmayā tathā ||
mudraiṣā hi mahāpuṇyā vyomamudrā prakīrtitā || 13 ||
baddhayā cānayā sadyo hīyaṃte vyādhayo nṛṇām ||
nānayā rahitaḥ kaścitsiddhiṃ prāpnoti sādhakaḥ || 14 ||
sarvatraivottamā hyeṣā maṃtramuṣṭiriti smṛtā ||
sūryasya hṛdayaṃ seyamarkamudreti viśrutā || 15 ||
badhnīyātsatataṃ mantrairāyurārogyavṛddhaye ||
sūryamaṃḍala abhyagre mantrī sūryodaye sthitaḥ || 16 ||
sa sūryābhimukho bhūtvā japenmaṃtraṃ tu sādhakaḥ ||
dinatrayeṇa vīkṣeta dhyānī japaparāyaṇaḥ || 17 ||
taṃ dṛṣṭvā nāśnute mṛtyuṃ duḥkhī na ca na saṃśayaḥ ||
prāpnoti ca paraṃ sthānaṃ yatra devo divākaraḥ || 18 ||
uttānau tu karau kṛtvā pṛṣṭhalagnau parasparam ||
baddhvā tvaṃgulayaḥ sarvāḥ suprakīrṇā na saṃśayaḥ || 19 ||
ākramya cāṃgulīmūlamaṃguṣṭhābhyāṃ yathākramam ||
udayā nāma mudraiṣā badhnīyādudaye raveḥ || 1.214.20 ||
dvādaśādvīkṣate sūryaṃ dinātsa hi na saṃśayaḥ ||
sarvapāpaharā caiva sarvapāpavināśinī || 21 ||
udayā ca vinā vāmaṃ madhyataścaiva taṃ kṣipet ||
madhyamā nāma vikhyātā madhyasūà¥rye tu cintayet || 22 ||
madhyamā vidhinā tena baddhvā mudrāṃ tu sādhakaḥ ||
aṃgulyoḥ paramaṃguṣṭhau vidhinā tāvubhau grathet || 23 ||
mudrā sāstamanī hyeṣā sarvatantreśvarī śubhā ||
sūryasyāstamane mudrā baddhvā japtaṃ samārabhet || 24 ||
sahasraṃ hi śataṃ vāpi mudrāṃ baddhvā japedbudhaḥ ||
sarvapātakasaṃyuktaḥ saptāhādanuśobhanam || 25 ||
karau parasparaṃ lagnāvaṃguṣṭhau cordhvasaṃsthitau ||
ubhau cāṃguṣṭhakau cordhvau saṃlagnau mūrdhni saṃsthitau || 26 ||
mudrā nu mālinī caiva nirdahetpāpapañjaram ||
brahmahatyādi yatpāpaṃ yojitā sā tu mūrdhani || 27 ||
vidarbhyāṃgulayaḥ sarvā īṣanmadhyastathāgrataḥ ||
ūrdhvasthitau taṣāṃguṣṭhau mudreyaṃ tarjanī smṛtā || 28 ||
sarvavyādhiharā devī sarva śatruvināśinī ||
etāṃ baddhvā mahāpuṇyāṃ sarvānstaṃmbhayate ripūn || 29 ||
ubhau prasārya vai hastau madhye sārdhena saṃsthitau ||
śeṣānāmyā tataścaiva aṃguṣṭhāgraṃ tathā kramāt || 1.214.30 ||
mudrā gabhastinī nāma sūryasya hṛdayaṃ param ||
mṛtyuṃ nāśayate hyeṣā baddhvā sūryodaye śubhā ||31||
arghyakāle tu badhnīyādarcayāgniṃ prapūjayet ||
japakāle ca badhnīyānmaṃtrāṇāṃ nātra saṃśayaḥ || 32 ||
vidakṣiṇakaniṣṭhikyāṃ tarjanībhyāṃ tathā bhavet ||
tarjanībhyāṃ tathāṃguṣṭhau saṃlagnau tu parasparam ||
japaṃ yaḥ kurute nityaṃ tribhirmāsairviśudyati || 33 ||
karau tu saṃpuṭau kṛtvā tarjanyau dve ca kuñcayet ||34||
sahasrakiraṇā hyeṣā sarvamudreśvareśvarī ||
trisaṃdhyametāṃ badhnīyātsādhako maṃtramūrdhani ||
nāśayetsarvapāpāni tamorāśimivāṃśumān || 35 ||
mudrā mudrakakuṃbheti baddhvā paścāttu maṃtrayet ||
māsena nāśayetkuṣṭhaṃ tribhirmāsairna saṃśayaḥ ||
iti mudrāṃgasahitaṃ sūryaṃ pūjayate tu yaḥ || 36 ||
anena vidhinā rājanbrahmā pūjayate ravim ||
tasmāttvamapi rājeṃdra pūjayānena bhāskaram || 37 ||
tataḥ sūryamavāpyeha sūryalokaṃ sa gacchati ||
anena vidhinā yastu pūjayetsata taṃ ravim || 38 ||
sa yāti paramaṃ sthānaṃ yatra devo divākaraḥ ||
itthaṃ pūjya ca deveśamanena vidhinā nṛpa || 39 ||
bhojayitvā yathāśakti brāhmaṇāṃśca vidhānataḥ ||
saptamyāṃ prāśayedvāpi maricaṃ maṃtratastathā || 1.214.40 ||
ekaṃ gṛhītvā maricamavraṇaṃ ca dṛḍhaṃ param ||
sajalaṃ prāśayedrājanmantreṇānena vā smṛtam || 41 ||
yathoktena vidhānena pūjayitvā divākaram||
iti saṃprāśya maricaṃ tato bhuṃjīta vāgyataḥ ||42||
priyasaṃgamavāpnoti tatkṣaṇādeva nānyathā ||
itīyaṃ saptamī puṇyā priyasaṃgamadāyinī || 43 ||
kuryādekena kāmāṃstu vatsareṇa sa gacchati ||
putrādibhirnaraśreṣṭha punaḥ saṃgamamṛcchati || 44 ||
kuru tasmānmahābāho tvameva priyadāyinīm ||
upoṣya iṃdro vidhivatsurāmaricasaptamīm || 45 ||
saṃyogaṃ kṛtavānvīra saha śacyā vidhānataḥ ||
upoṣyaināṃ nalaścāpi damayantyā mahābalaḥ || 46 ||
rāmo.agātsītayā sārdhamupoṣyaināṃ narādhipa || 47 ||
iti śrībhaviṣye mahāpurāṇe brāhme parvaṇi saptamīkalpe maricasaptamīvratavarṇanaṃ nāma caturdaśādhikadviśatatamo.adhyāyaḥ || 214 || ||cha||
sūryamantroddhāravarṇanam
|| sumaṃturuvāca|| ||
tṛtīyāṃ saptamī vīra śṛṇuṣva gadato mama ||
niṃbapatraiḥ smṛtā yā tu paramā roganāśinī|| 1 ||
yathārcanavidhirvānyo yena pūjayate ravim||
devadevaḥ śārṅgapāṇiḥ śaṃkha cakragadādharaḥ || 2 ||
athārcanavidhiṃ vacmi maṃtroddhāraṃ nibodha me || 3 ||
oṃ khaṣolkāya namaḥ || mūlamaṃtraḥ ||
oṃ viṭi 2 śiraḥ ||
oṃ sahasraraśma ye astram ||
oṃ sahasrakiraṇāya 200 ūrdhvabaṃdhaḥ ||
oṃ ghanāya bhūtabhāvine namaḥ iti bhūtabaṃdhaḥ ||
oṃ jvala 2 prajvala 2 agniprakara || 4 ||
oṃ ādityāya vidmahe viśvabhāgāya dhīmahi ||
tannaḥ sūryaḥ pracodayāt || 5 ||
gāyatrīsaṃkalīkaraṇamidam ||
oṃ dharmātmane namaḥ || eśānyām ||
oṃ dakṣiṇāya namaḥ āgneyyām ||
oṃ vajrapāṇaye.anaṃtāya namaḥ uttarataḥ ||
oṃ śyāmapiṃgalāya namaḥ aiśānyām ||
oṃ amṛtāya namaḥ āgneyyām ||
oṃ budhāya somasutāya namo dakṣiṇataḥ ||
oṃvāgīśvarāya sarvavidyādhipataye nairṛtyām ||
oṃ śukrāya maharṣaye bhūtāya paścimataḥ ||
oṃ īśvarāya sūryātmane namo vāyavyām ||
oṃ kṛtavate namaḥ uttarataḥ ||
oṃ rāhave namaḥ aiśānyām||
oṃ aṃtarāya sūryātmane namaḥ pūrvataḥ||
oṃ dhruvāya namaḥ aiśānyām ||
oṃ bhagavate pūṣanmālinsakalajagatpate saptāśvavāhana bhūbhuja paramasiddhiśirasi gataṃ gṛhṇa tejorūpaṃ anaṃtajvāla 2 || āvāhanamaṃtraḥ ||
oṃ namo bhagavate ādityāya sahasrakiraṇāya yathāsukhaṃ punarāgamanāya iti || 6 || || iti śrībhaviṣye mahāpurāṇe brāhme parvaṇi saptamīkalpe sauradharme sūryamaṃtroddhāravarṇanaṃ nāma pañcadaśādhikadviśatatamo.adhyāyaḥ || 215 || || a ||
purāṇaśravaṇavidhivarṇanam
|| sumaṃturuvāca || ||
śṛṇuṣvarcāvidhiṃ rājanmaṃtrapūtena vāriṇā ||
prokṣaṇīyaṃ prayatnena kimarthaṃ susamāhitaḥ || 1 ||
hadayādiṣvathāṃgeṣu maṃtraṃ vinyasya maṃtravit ||
ātmānaṃ bhāskaraṃ dhyātvā paricārasamanvitaḥ || 2 ||
kuryātsaṃmārjanīṃ mudrāṃ diśāṃ ca pratibodhanam ||
pātāle bhūśodhanaṃ caiva nabhasaśca tathā matam || 3 ||
arcanasya prakāro.ayaṃ sarveṣāmīpsitapradaḥ ||
sarvairapi budhairvīra padmametatprakīrtitam || 4 ||
aṣṭapatraṃ likhetpadmaṃ śucau deśe sakarṇikam ||
āvāhanīṃ tato baddhvā mudrāmāvāhayedravim || 5 ||
khaṣolkaṃ snāpayettatra svarūpaṃ lobhadāyakam ||
sthāpayetsnāpayeccaiva maṃtrai maṃtraśarīriṇam || 6 ||
āgneyyāṃ diśi devasya hṛdayaṃ sthāpayennaraḥ ||
aiśānyāṃ tu śiraḥ sthāpya nairṛtyāṃ vinyasecchikhām || 7 ||
pauraṃdaryāṃ nyasennetre ekāmahṛdayastu saḥ ||
āvāhya caikaṃ kavacaṃ vāruṇyāmastrameva ca || 8 ||
aiśānyāṃ sthāpayetsomaṃ pauraṃdaryāṃ tu lohitaḥ ||
āgneyyāṃ somatapanaṃ yāmyāṃ caiva bṛhaspatim || 9 ||
nairṛtyāṃ dānavaṃ śukraṃ vāruṇyāṃ ca śanaiścaram ||
vāyavyāṃ ca tathā ketuṃ kauberyāṃ rāhumeva ca || 1.216.10 ||
dvitīyāyāṃ tu kakṣāyāṃ devatejaḥsamudbhavān || sthāpayeddvādaśādityānkāśyapeyānmahābalān || 11 ||
bhagaḥ sūryoryamaścaiva mitro varuṇa eva ca ||
savitā caiva dhātā ca vivasvāṃśca mahābalaḥ || 12 ||
tvaṣṭā pūṣā tathā rudro dvādaśo viṣṇurucyate ||
pūrve cendrāya dakṣiṇe yamāya paścime varuṇāya uttare kuberāya aiśānyāmīśvarāya āgneyyāmagnidevatāyai nairṛtyāṃ pitṛdevebhyo vāyavyāṃ vāyave ||
jayā ca vijayā caiva jayaṃtī cāparāji tā ||
śeṣaśca vāsukiścaiva revatī ca vināyakaḥ ||
mahāśvetā mahādevī rājñī caiva suvarcalā || 13 ||
tathānyo vāpi devānāṃ samūhasta tra tatra ha ||
tathānyo lokavikhyāto yogaḥ proktaśca dakṣiṇe || 14 ||
purastādbhāsurasthāne sthāpanīyā vijānatā ||
siddhirvṛddhiḥ smṛtirdevī śrīścaivotpalamālinī || 15 ||
sthāpyā svadakṣiṇe pārśve lokapūjyā samaṃtataḥ ||
prājñāvatī kṣudhā vīra hārītā buddhireva ca || 16 ||
sthāpya buddhimatī nityaṃ śrīkāmairvā vivasvataḥ ||
ṛddhiścaiva visṛṣṭiśca paurṇamāsī vibhāvarī||
sthāpyāśca svottare pārśve ityetā devaśaktayaḥ ||17||
dīpaścānnamalaṃkāro vāsaḥ puṣpāṇi mantrataḥ ||
deyāni devadevāya sānugāya samūrtaye ||18||
vidhinānena satataṃ sadā yorcayati bhāskaram ||
saṃprāpya paramānkāmāṃstato bhānusado vrajet || 19 ||
anena vidhinā yastu bhojayedbhāskaraṃ nṛpa ||
tvaṃ niṃba kaṭukātmāsi ādityanilayastathā ||
sarvarogaharaḥ śānto bhava me prāśanaṃ sadā || 1.216.20 ||
itthaṃ prāśya japedbhūmau devasya purato nṛpa ||
brāhmaṇānbhojayitvā tu śaktyā dattvā tu dakṣiṇām|| 21 ||
bhuñjīta vāgyataḥ paścānmadhuraṃ kṣāravarjitam ||
ityeṣā varṣaparyantaṃ kartavyā caiva saptamī || 22 ||
kurvāṇaḥ saptamīmetāṃ sarvarogaiḥ pramucyate ||
sarvaroga vinirmuktaḥ sūryalokaṃ sa gacchati || 23 ||
|| sumanturuvāca || ||
atha bhādrapade māsi site pakṣe mahīpate ||
kṛtvopavāsaṃ saptamyāṃ vidhivatpūjayedravim || 24 ||
māheśvareṇa vidhinā pūjayedatra bhāskaram ||
aṣṭamyāṃ tu punaḥ snātaḥ pūjayitvā divākaram || 25 ||
dadyātphalāni viprebhyo mārtaṇḍaḥ prīyatāmiti ||
kharjūraṃ nālikeraṃ ca mātuliṅgaphalāni ca || 26 ||
devasya purato dattvā tathā cāmraphalāni ca ||
iti te kathitaṃ rājansaptamīphalamāditaḥ || 27 ||
mahātapo mahāśreṣṭhaṃ bhāskarasya viśāmpate ||
yacchrutvā mānavo rājanmucyate brahmahatyayā || 28 ||
tathedaṃ paramaṃ parva kathitaṃ brahmasaṃjñitam ||
yacchrutvā sarvapāpebhyo mucyante mānavā nṛpa || 29 ||
aśvamedhasahasrasya vājapeyaśatasya ca ||
sarvatīrthābhigamane vedābhyāse ca yatphalam ||
yatphalaṃ pṛthivīdāne tatsarvaṃ prāpnuyānnaraḥ || 1.216.30 ||
rājasūyasahasrasya vājapeyaśatasya ca ||
sahasraśatadānasya phalaṃ viṃdati mānavaḥ || 31 ||
lekhatvaṃ brāhmaṇo gacchetkṣatriyo vipratāṃ vrajet ||
vaiśyo.api kṣatratāṃ yāti śūdro vaiśyatvameva ca || 32 ||
sūtamāgadha bandyādyā ye cānye saṃkarodbhavāḥ ||
te.api yāṃtyuttamaṃ sthānaṃ purāṇaśravaṇādvibho || 33 ||
itihāsapurāṇābhyāṃ na tvanyatpāvanaṃ nṛṇām ||
yeṣāṃ śravaṇamātreṇa mucyate sarvakilbiṣaiḥ || 34 ||
vidhinā rājaśārdūla śṛṇvatāṃ yatphalaṃ kila ||
yathoktaṃ nātra saṃdehaḥ paṭhatāṃ ca viśāṃpate || 35 || ||
|| śatānīka uvāca || ||
bhagavankena vidhinā śrotavyaṃ bhārataṃ naraiḥ ||
caritaṃ rāmabhadrasya purāṇāni viśeṣataḥ || 36 ||
kathaṃ tu vaiṣṇavā dharmāḥ śivadharmā aśeṣataḥ ||
saurāṇāṃ cāpi viprendra ucyatāṃ śravaṇe vidhiḥ || 37 ||
vācanīyaṃ kathaṃ cāpi vācako dvijasattama ||
lakṣaṇaṃ cāsya me brūhi vācakasya mahātmanaḥ || 38 ||
svarūpaṃ cāsya me brūhi khaṣolkasya mahātmanaḥ ||
phalaṃ ca pūjite kiṃ syādvācake vidhivaddvija || || 39 ||
pāraṇepāraṇe pūjyo vācakaḥ śrāvakaiḥ katham ||
samāpte bhagavankiṃkiṃ deyaṃ parvaṇi vācake || 1.216.40 ||
na ca kiṃ kāryasiddhaṃ yatsiddhaṃ parvaṇi parvaṇi ||
|| sumanturuvāca || ||
samyakpṛṣṭo.asmi rājendra itihāsapurāṇayoḥ || 41 ||
śravaṇe tu mahābāho śrūyatāṃ yanmayā purā ||
pṛṣṭo vocanmahātejā viriṃco bhagavānguruḥ || 42 ||
haṃta te kathayāmyeṣa purāṇaśravaṇe vidhim ||
itihāsapurāṇāni śrutvā bhaktyā viśeṣataḥ ||
mucyate sarvapāpebhyo brahmahatyādibhirvibho || 43 ||
sāyaṃ prātastathā rātrau śucirbhūtvā śṛṇoti yaḥ ||
tasya viṣṇustathā brahmā tuṣyate śaṃkarastathā || 44 ||
pratyūṣe bhagavānbrahmā dināṃte tuṣyate hariḥ ||
mahādevastathā rātrau śṛṇvatāṃ tuṣyate vibhuḥ ||
pāraṇāni daśāheṣu eke kurvaṃti tāni bhoḥ || 45 ||
bhavedvai rājaśārdūla śṛṇu teṣāṃ ca yatphalam ||
vidhānaṃ vācakasyeha śṛṇvatāṃ ca viśāṃpate||46||
śuddhavāsā gṛhādetya sthānaṃ yatsamayānvitam ||
pradakṣiṇaṃ tato gatvā yastasmindeva eva hi || 47 ||
nātyuccaṃ nātinīcaṃ ca hyāsanaṃ bhajate tataḥ ||
āsanaṃ tasya vai rājanbodhakasya sadā bhavet || 48 ||
vandanīyaṃ prapūjya ca śrotṛbhiḥ kurunandana ||
vyāsapīṭhaṃ tu tatproktaṃ gurorāsanamādiśet || 49 ||
na stheyaṃ śrāvakaistasmādvācakasyāsane nṛpa ||
rājāsane yathā bhṛtyairyathā putraiḥ piturnṛpa || 1.216.50 ||
yathā śiśurgurorvīra sa teṣāṃ hi gururmataḥ ||
devārcāmagrataḥ kṛtvā brāhmaṇārcāṃ viśeṣataḥ || 51 ||
upa viśya tataḥ paścācchrāvakaḥ śṛṇuyānnṛpa ||
samastānāgatānkṛtvā tataḥ pustakamādadet || 52 ||
praṇamya śirasā tasya pustakasya viśāṃpate ||
graṃthiṃ ca śithilāṃ kuryādvācakaḥ kurunandana ||
punarbadhnīta tatsūtraṃ tanmuktvā vācayetkvacit || 53 ||
trividhaṃ pustakaṃ vidyātsūtraṃ vāsukirucyate ||
patrāṇi bhagavānbrahmā akṣarāṇi janārdanaḥ ||54||
śaṃkaraśca tathā sūtraṃ paṃktayaḥ sarvadevatāḥ ||
pāvakaśca tathā sūtre madhye bhānuḥ samāśritaḥ ||55||
agre sthitā grahāḥ sarve diśo vāpi tathā vibho ||
smṛto meruḥ sadā śaṃkuśchidramākāśamucyate ||56||
yaṃtradvayaṃ kāṣṭhamayamadhordhvaṃ yadudāhṛtam ||
dyāvāpṛthivyośca śaṃkhastathā caṃdra udāhṛtaḥ ||57||
itthaṃ devamayaṃ hyetatpustakaṃ devapūjitam ||
namasyaṃ pūjanīyañca gṛhe sthāpyaṃ vibhūtaye|| 58 ||
yo.asya sūtraṃ bṛhatkṛtvā prayacchati narottamaḥ ||
sa yāti paramaṃ sthānaṃ yatra devo divākaraḥ||59||
nirūpya pātraṃ rājendra karābhyāṃ gṛhya vācakaḥ ||
praṇamya śirasā sarvānbrahmādīnvyāsameva ca ||
vālmīkiṃ ca tathā rājanvidhiṃ viṣṇuṃ śivaṃ ravim||1.216.60||
namaskāramathaiṣāṃ tu paṭhitvā kurunaṃdana||
tatosau vyāharedviprānvācakaḥ śradayānvitaḥ|| |
alaṃbitamatastabdhamadbhutaṃ vīramūrjitam ||
asaṃsaktākṣarapadaṃ rasabhāvasamanvitam || 62 ||
saptasvarasamāyuktaṃ kālekāle viśāṃpate ||
pradarśayanrasāntsarvānvācako vyāharennṛpa || 63 ||
īdṛśādvācakādviprācchrutvā śraddhāsamanvitaḥ ||
itihāsapurāṇāni rāmasya caritaṃ tathā|| 64||
niyamasthaḥ śuciḥ śrotā śṛṇuyātphalamaśnute ||
brāhmaṇaḥ kṣatriyo vaiśyaḥ śūdraścāpi viśeṣataḥ || 65 ||
aśvamedhamavāpnoti sarvānkāmānavāpnute ||
rogaiśca mucyate sarvairmahatpuṇyaṃ ca viṃdati ||
gacchedvāpi paraṃ sthānaṃ devasyādbhutamuttamam ||66||
snātairgṛhaṃ samāgamya śrotṛbhirvācakasya tu ||
praṇamya śirasā vipraṃ vācakaṃ śraddhayā nṛpa||67||
āsanaṃ ca samāśritya sthātavyaṃ vācakasya tu||
saṃmukhaṃ rājaśārdūla vāgyataiḥ susamāhitaiḥ||68||
vācakena namaskāre kṛte vyāsasya bhūpate||
na vaktavyaṃ mahābāho śrāvakaiḥ saṃśayādṛte ||69||
saṃśaye sati praṣṭavyo vācakaḥ saṃprasādya tu ||
yataśca sa gurusteṣāṃ dharmato baṃdhurucyate||1.216.70||
vācakenāpi vaktavyaṃ yatsyātteṣāṃ nibodhanam ||
anugrahāya sarveṣāmaśeṣā guravo nṛpa || 71 ||
namaskārādayaḥ śrāvyā śivamastviti vodyate ||
vāgyatairnṛpaśārdla varṇaiḥ sarvairmahīpate||72||
śūdrāṇāṃ purato vaiśyā vaiśyānāṃ kṣatriṇastathā ||
madhyasthito.atha sarveṣāṃ vācako vyāharennṛpa ||
ye ca saṃkarajā rājannarāste śūdrapṛṣṭhataḥ || 73 ||
brāhmaṇaṃ vācakaṃ vidyānnānyavarṇajamādaret ||
śrutvānyavarṇajādvācaṃ vācakānnarakaṃ vrajet || 74 ||
itthaṃ hi śṛṇvatāṃ teṣāṃ varṇānāmanupūrvaśaḥ ||
māsimāsi bhavedrājanpāraṇaṃ kurunandana || 75 ||
śreyo.arthamātmano rājanpūjayedvācakaṃ budhaḥ ||
māsi pūrṇe dvija śreṣṭhe dātavyaṃ svarṇamāṣakam || 76 ||
brāhmaṇena mahābāho dve deye kṣatriyasya tu ||
vācakāya dvijaśreṣṭha vaiśyenāpi trayaṃ tathā || 77 ||
śūdreṇaiva ca catvāro dātavyāḥ svarṇamāṣakāḥ ||
māsimāsi dvijaśreṣṭha śraddhayā vācakāya tu || 78 ||
prathame pāraṇe rājanvācakaṃ pūjya śaktitaḥ ||
agniṣṭomasya yajñasya phalaṃ viṃdati mānavaḥ || 79 ||
kārtikādīnsamārabhya yāvatkārttikamacyuta ||
agniṣṭomaṃ gosavaṃ ca jyotiṣṭomaṃ tathā nṛpa || 1.216.80 ||
sautrāmaṇiṃ vājapeyaṃ vaiṣṇavaṃ ca tathā vibho ||
māheśvaraṃ tathā brāhmaṃ puṃḍarīkaṃ yajeta yaḥ || 81 ||
ādityayajñasya tathā rājasūyāśvamedhayoḥ ||
phalaṃ prāpnoti rājeṃdra māsairdvādaśabhiḥ kramāt ||
itthaṃ yajñaphalaṃ prāpya yāti lokāṃstathottamān || 82 ||
vajravedikasaṃpannaṃ maṇiratnavibhūṣitam ||
vimānamāsthito rājanmodate śakramaṃdire || 83 ||
tataścaṃdrasya bhavane vāruṇe bhavane tataḥ ||
śociṣkeśagṛhe gatvā gaccheccailavile gṛhe || 84 ||
dhiṣaṇasya gṛhaṃ gatvā tataścitraśikhaṃḍinaḥ ||
vṛddhaśravasamāsādya gacchetkaṃjajamaṃdire ||
evameva nṛpaśreṣṭha nātra kāryā vicāraṇā || 85 ||
phalametatsamuddiṣṭaṃ śṛṇvatāṃ satataṃ nṛṇām ||
etatphalaṃ vatsareṇa śṛṇvato vidhito nṛpa || 86 ||
etāni parimāṇāni vatsareṇa bhavaṃti vai ||
śṛṇvatāṃ nṛpaśārdūla dadatāṃ vācakāya vai || 87 ||
ekaṃ ca dve tathā trīṇi catvāri ca viśāṃpate ||
deyāni vācakāyeha māsimāsi narādhipa || 88 ||
brāhmaṇādyairnṛpa śreṣṭha sarvavarṇavibhāgaśaḥ ||
samāpte parvaṇi tathā vācakaṃ pūjayetpunaḥ ||89||
vācakaṃ brāhmaṇaṃ caiva sarvakāmaiḥ prapūjayet ||
gandhamālyādibhirdivyairvā sobhirvividhairapi || 1.216.90 ||
vācakāya pradattvā tu tato viprānprapūjayet ||
hiraṇyaṃ rajataṃ rukmaṃ gāśca kāṃsyopadohanāḥ ||91||
dattvā ca vācakāyeha śrutasya prāpyate phalam ||
yathā sadakṣiṇaṃ cānnaṃ śrāddhakāle prakīrtitam ||
tathā śrutaṃ nṛpaśreṣṭha sadakṣiṇamudāhṛtam || 92 ||
vācakaṃ pūjayedyasmā tpaścāllekhakapūjanam ||
samāpte parvaṇi vibho viśeṣeṇaiva cārcayet || 93 ||
vācakaḥ pūjito yena pūjitāstena devatāḥ ||
vācake parituṣṭe ca mama prītiranuttamā ||94||
iti vedhāḥ sadā prāha devānāṃ purataḥ purā ||
tasmiṃstuṣṭe jagatsarvaṃ tuṣṭaṃ bhavati nityaśaḥ||||
tasmātprapūjayedvipra vācakaṃ nṛpa sattama ||
na tulyaṃ vācakeneha pātradānasya vidyate||96||
tiṣṭhaṃti yasya śāstrāṇi jihvāgre pṛthivīpate||
dṛṣṭaśca gocarastāta kastena sadṛśo dvijaḥ||97||
na tulyaṃ vidyate tena bhuvi pātraṃ nareṣu vai ||
tasmādannaṃ sadā pūrvaṃ tasmai deyaṃ vidurbudhāḥ ||
śrāddhe yasya dvijo bhuṃkte vācakaḥ śradayānvitaḥ ||
bhavaṃti pitarastasya tṛptā varṣaśataṃ nṛpa ||98||
yatheha sarvadevānāṃ bhāskaraḥ pravaraḥ smṛtaḥ ||
vispaṣṭamadbhutaṃ śāṃtaṃ spaṣṭākṣarapadaṃ tathā ||
kalasvarasamāyuktaṃ rasabhāvasamanvitam || 99 ||
budhyamānaḥ sadātyarthaṃ graṃthāthaṃ kṛtsnaśo nṛpa ||
brāhmaṇādiṣu varṇeṣu graṃthārthaṃ vācayennṛpa || 1.216.100 ||
ya evaṃ vācayedrājanya vipro vyāsa ucyate ||
ato.anyathā kathayitā jñeyo.asau vaktṛnāmakaḥ || 101 ||
itthaṃbhūto vasedyasminvācako vyāsasannibhaḥ ||
deśe.atha pattane rājansa deśaḥ pravaraḥ smṛtaḥ || 102 ||
te dhanyāste mahātmānaste kṛtārthā na saṃśayaḥ ||
vasaṃti yatnato yasminsa deśaḥ pravaraḥ smṛtaḥ || 103 ||
na śobhate puraṃ vīra vyāsahīnaṃ kadācana ||
yathārkahīnaṃ hi dinaṃ caṃdrahīnā yathā niśā || 104 ||
na rājate saro yadvatpadminī rahitaṃ nṛpa ||
tathā vyāsavihīnaṃ tu rājate na puraṃ kvacit || 105 ||
praṇamya vācakaṃ bhaktyā yatphalaṃ prāpyate naraiḥ ||
na tatkratusahasreṇa prāpyate kurunaṃdana || 1 0 6 ||
yathaikato grahāḥ sarve ekatastu divākaraḥ ||
tathaikato dvijāḥ sarve ekatastu sa vācakaḥ || 107 ||
yathā vedasamo nāsti āgamo bhuvi kaścana ||
tathā vyāsasamo nāsti brāhmaṇo bhuvi kaścana || 108 ||
kurukṣetrasamaṃ tīrthaṃ na dvitīyaṃ pracakṣate ||
na nadī gaṃgayā tulyā na devo bhāskarādvaraḥ ||109||
nāśvamedhasamaṃ puṇyaṃ na pāpaṃ brahmahatyayā ||
putrajanmasukhaistulyaṃ na sukhaṃ vidyate yathā ||1.216.11 0||
tathā vyāsasamo vipro na kvacitprāpyate nṛpa ||
daive karmaṇi pitrye ca pāvanaḥ paramo nṛṇām || 111 ||
nāsti vyāsasamaḥ śreṣṭha itīyaṃ vaidikī śrutiḥ ||
atha viprasahasrāṇāṃ vipro.ayaṃ śreṣṭha īritaḥ ||
upaviṣṭo yadā bhuṃkte vyāso vai vipramaṇḍale ||112||
śrāddhe tāta pavitrāṇi kathitāni purā mama||
brahmaṇā rājaśārdūla śṛṇu tāni yathāvidhi ||113||
madhu pāyasaṃ kālaśākastilāśca kutapastathā ||
rājataṃ cāpi pātreṣu brāhmaṇeṣvatha vācakaḥ ||114||
daive karmaṇi pitrye ca sa jñeyaḥ paṃktipāvanaḥ ||
vācakaśca yatiścaiva tathā yaśca ṣaḍaṃgavit || 115 ||
ete sarve nṛpaśreṣṭha vijñeyāḥ paṃktipāvanāḥ ||
nāmanī vācakasyaite śṛṅgavārthamathaitayoḥ || 116 ||
itihāsapurāṇāni jayeti viditāni vai ||
upajīvati yasmādvai vācayāno dvijo nṛpa ||
jayopajīvī tenāsau gataḥ khyātiṃ tu vācakaḥ || 117 ||
vispaṣṭamadbhutaṃ śāṃtaṃ spaṣṭākṣaramidaṃ tathā ||
kalasvarasamāyuktaṃ rasabhāvasamanvitam||118||
yudhyamānotha vātyarthaṃ graṃthārthaṃ kṛtsnaśo nṛpa ||
brāhmaṇādiṣu varṇeṣu graṃthārthaṃ cārpayettathā || 119 ||
ya evaṃ vācayedrājanya vipro vyāsa ucyate ||
ato.anyathā vācayitā na gacchedvyāsatāṃ kvacit || 1.216.120 ||
trividhaṃ vācakaṃ vidyātsadā guṇavibhedataḥ ||
śrāvakaṃ ca mahābāho trividhaṃ guṇabhedataḥ || 121 ||
dvāvetau kathyamānau tu nibodha gadato mama ||
abhidrutaṃ tathāspaṣṭaṃ vistaraṃ svaravarjitam ||122||
padacchedavihīnaṃ ca tathā bhāvavivarjitam ||
abudhyamāno graṃthārthamabhīṣṭotsāhavarjitaḥ || 123 ||
īdṛśaṃ vācayedyastu vācakaḥ kṣmādhipeśvara ||
krodhano.apriyavādī ca ajñānādgraṃthadūṣakaḥ || 124 ||
budhyate na ca kaṣṭācca sa jñeyo vācakādhamaḥ ||
vispaṣṭamadbhutaṃ śāṃtaṃ rasabhāvasamanvitam|| 125 ||
abudhyamāno graṃthārthaṃ vācayedyastu vācakaḥ ||
sa jñeyo rājaso rājannidānīṃ sāttvikaṃ śṛṇu || 126 ||
vispaṣṭamadbhutaṃ śāṃtaṃ spaṣṭākṣarapadaṃ tathā ||
kalasvarasamāyuktaṃ rasabhāvasamanvitam ||127 ||
attyarthaṃ budhyamānastu graṃthārthaṃ kṛtsnaśo nṛpa ||
brāhmaṇādiṣu varṇeṣu ācāryo vidhivannṛpa || 128 ||
ya evaṃ vācayedrājansa jñeyaḥ sāttviko budhaiḥ ||
śraddhā bhaktivihīno yo lobhiṣṭhaḥ kaṭuko yathā || 129 ||
hetuvādaparo rājaṃstathāsūyāsamanvitaḥ ||
nityāṃ naimittikāṃ kāmyāmādadaddakṣiṇāṃ nṛpa || || 1.216.130 ||
vācako yo mahābāho śṛṇuyādyastu mānavaḥ ||
sa jñeyastāmaso rājañchrāvako mānavo.api saḥ || 131 ||
na tasya purato vīra vācaye tprājña eva hi ||
prasaṃgācchṛṇuyādyastu śraddhābhaktivivarjitaḥ || 132||
rājankautukapātraṃ tu sa jñeyo rājaso bhavet ||
saṃtyajya sarvakāryāṇi bhaktyā śraddhāsamanvitaḥ || 133 ||
satataṃ pūjayedyastu vācakaṃ śraddhayā mudā ||
nitye naimittike kāmye gurūnvai devatāstathā || 134 ||
ya evaṃ śṛṇuyādvīra sa jñeyaḥ sāttviko budhaiḥ ||
vyāsaḥ pūjyaḥ śrāvakāṇāṃ yathā vyāsavaco nṛpa|| 135 ||
tasmātpūjyatamo nānyaḥ śrāvakāṇāṃ nṛpottama ||
yataḥ sa vai gurusteṣāṃ jñānadātā sadā nṛpa ||136||
caturṇāmiha varṇānāṃ nānyo bandhuḥ pracakṣyate ||
vyāsādṛte nṛpaśreṣṭha itīyaṃ vaidikī śrutiḥ ||137||
tasmātsarvaprayatnena pūjayedvācakaṃ sadā ||
sa guruḥ sa pitā mātā sa baṃdhuḥ sa suhṛttathā || 138 ||
vācako nṛpaśārdūla viprādīnāmaśeṣataḥ ||
itthaṃ vyāso gururjñeyaḥ pūjyo mānyo dvijātibhiḥ || 139 ||
śṛṇvaṃti ye narā rājansa teṣāṃ gururucyate ||
pūjārthaṃ tasya samayaḥ śrāvakāṇāmudāhṛtaḥ || | 1.216.140 ||
ye śṛṇvaṃti nṛpaśreṣṭha māsi māsi dadaṃti te ||
svarṇamāṣakamekasmai vācakāya pṛthakpṛthak ||141||
dvādaśyāṃ cāmāvāsyāyāmatha vā ravisaṃkrame ||
sā nityā dakṣiṇā tasyāṃ yā ca śreyo.arthamātmanaḥ||142||
ayane viṣuve caiva caṃdrasūryagrahe tathā ||
prāpte vāparapakṣe ca dānaṃ tasyai svaśaktitaḥ || 143 ||
deyaṃ syācchrāvakaistāta taṃ muktvā nānyato nṛpa ||
prathamaṃ tasya dātavyaṃ śreyo.arthaṃ śrāvakaiḥ sadā ||144||
adattvā tasya yenyasmai saṃprayacchaṃti śrāvakāḥ ||
avamānaḥ kṛtastaistu vācakasya bhavennṛpa || 145 ||
