kṛtvāvamānamatha taiḥ prāpyate yatphalaṃ nṛpa ||
brāhmaṇādyaiḥ samastaiśca tacchṛṇuṣva varānana ||146||
śūdratvaṃ brāhmaṇo yāti kṣatriyo yāti kākatām ||
jāyate ca tathā vaiśyaḥ śūdraścāṇḍālatāṃ vrajet ||147||
tasmātpūjyo nṛpaśreṣṭha prathamaṃ vācako budhaiḥ ||
āpatkāle ca vṛddhau ca yataścāsau guruḥ smṛtaḥ || 148 ||
vaiśākhyāmayane vīra tṛtīyāyāṃ ca suvrata ||
kārttikyāmatha mārgyāṃ ca saṃpūjyaḥ prathamaṃ bhavet || 149 ||
parvasvanyeṣu ca vibho saṃpūjyo dharmataḥ smṛtaḥ ||
hiraṇyaṃ ca suvarṇaṃ ca dhanaṃ dhānyaṃ tathaiva ca || 1.216.150 ||
annaṃ cāpi tathā pakvaṃ māṃsaṃ ca kurunaṃdana ||
dātavyaṃ prathamaṃ tasmai śrāvakairnṛpasattama || 151 ||
vācakastu yathā nityaṃ sukhamāste narādhipa ||
na pīḍyate yathā dvaṃdvaistathā kāryaṃ varānana || 152 ||
hemaṃte lomaśā deyāśchatraṃ prāvṛṣi sattama ||
upānahau kālayogye kāle caivānulomaśaḥ ||153||
itthaṃ dvaṃdvavinirmuktaḥ sa yeṣāṃ vācako nṛpa ||
te dhanyāḥ śrāvakā loke te gatāḥ paramaṃ padam || 154 ||
ātmanā tu kathaṃ vīra sukhamicchedvicakṣaṇaḥ ||
viṣamasthe gurau rājanyataśca sa guruḥ smṛtaḥ || 155 ||
vācakaśrāvakāṇāṃ ca tasmāddvaṃdvaṃ vighātayet ||
yatnaḥ kāryaḥ śrāvakaiśca vācakasya janādhipa || 156 ||
itthaṃ pūjyaḥ sadā vyāsaḥ śreyo.arthaṃ prathamaṃ nṛpa ||
bhartā pūjyo yathā strīṇāṃ sarvāsāṃ vai mahī pate || 157 ||
śrāvakāṇāṃ tathā rājanvācakaḥ pūjya ucyate ||
upādhyāyastu śiṣyāṇāṃ yathā bhāgavato hariḥ || 158 ||
saurāṇāṃ ca yathā bhānuḥ śaivānāṃ śaṃkaro yathā ||
vācakastu tathā pūjyaḥ śrāvakāṇāṃ narādhipa || 159 ||
dakṣiṇāṃ dadatā nityaṃ śrotavyaṃ bhūtimicchatā ||
pūrvoktamāṣakaṃ tasmai vācakāya janādhipa || 1.216.160 ||
yadā dātuṃ na śaknoti māṣakaṃ kāṃcanasya tu ||
rajatasya tadā deyaṃ māṣakaṃ śreyase nṛpa || 161 ||
tadabhāve hiraṇyaṃ ca vittaśāṭhyavivarjitaḥ ||
mṛttikāpi hi dātavyā prāpnoti satphalaṃ śubham || 162 ||
ityeṣā dakṣiṇā nityā māsimāsi bhavennṛpa ||
naimittikā bhavedrājangrahaṇādiṣu parvasu || 163 ||
amale vāsasī rājangaṃdhamālyavibhūṣaṇe ||
samāpte parvaṇi vibho dātavye bhūtimicchatā || || 164 ||
jñātvā sarvasamāptiṃ tu pūjayecchrāvako dhuvam ||
ātmānamapi vikrīya ya icchetsaphalaṃ śrutam || 165 ||
naimittikāṃ ca nityāṃ ca dakṣi ṇāmapradāya ca ||
śṛṇoti ca sadā yastu tasya tanniṣphalaṃ śrutam || 166 ||
yathā ca dakṣiṇāhīnādyajñānna phalamaśnute ||
tathā śrutaṃ ca rājeṃdra dakṣi ṇārahitaṃ smṛtam || 167 ||
caturguṇā bhavedrājanyā nityā dakṣiṇā vibho ||
samāpte parvaṇi vibho ityāha bhagavāñchivaḥ || 168 ||
ityeṣa kathito rājanpurāṇaśravaṇe vidhiḥ ||
yataśca vidhihīnaṃ tu na karmaphalamudyate || 169 ||
snānaṃ dānaṃ japo homaḥ pitṛdevābhipūjanam ||
vidhipūrvaṃ smṛtaṃ jñeyaṃ yatheha kurunadana||1.216.170 ||
phaladaṃ nṛpaśārdūla purāṇaśravaṇaṃ tathā ||
yathāyaṃ kathitaṃ tubhyaṃ vidhinā śravaṇaṃ mayā ||171||
yathoktaṃ tu yathā jīvaṃ yathoktaṃ brahmavādinā ||
sa brāhmaṇo mahārāja sarvalokeṣu pūjitaḥ || 172 ||
yathāśrutaṃ mahābāho tathedaṃ kathitaṃ tava ||
bhāskarasya tu māhātmyaṃ māhātmyaṃ vācakasya tu || 173 ||
tathā ca saptamīkalpaḥ sarvapāpabhayāpahaḥ ||
anena vidhinā yastu pūjayetsatataṃ naraḥ || 174 ||
bhagalokaṃ samāsādya triṣu lokeṣu gīyate ||
tato.arkalokamāsādya gaccheccitraśikhaṃḍinaḥ || 175 ||
tasmādapi mahābāho gacchellokaṃ divākaram||
arkaloke tato yātastato golokamaśnute || 176 ||
ṛtasya ca tato gacchetkaṃjajasya tataḥ param ||
daśānāṃ rājasūyānāmagniṣṭomaśatasya ca || 177 ||
śravaṇātphalamāpnoti pitāmahavaco yathā || 178 ||
iti śrībhaviṣye mahāpurāṇe brāhme parvaṇi saptamīkalpe sauradharme ādityamāhātmyavācakamāhātmyapurāṇa śravaṇa vidhivarṇanaṃ nāma ṣoḍaśādhikadviśatatamo.adhyāyaḥ || 216 ||
|| pūrvārdhaḥ samāpto.ayam ||
|| śrīnārāyaṇārpaṇamastu || ||
iti śrībhaviṣye mahāpurāṇe prathamaṃ brāhmaparva samāptam || 1 ||

viṣayasūcī

iti prathamaṃ bāhmaparva samāptam || 1 ||

pātālavarṇanam
|| śrīgaṇeśāya namaḥ ||
oṃ namaḥ kamaladalanayanābhirāmāya ||
śrīrāmacaṃdrāya ||
svacchaṃ caṃdrāvadātaṃ kavikaramakarakṣobhasaṃjātaphenaṃ bakṣodbhūtiprasūktairvrataniyamaparaiḥ sevitaṃ vipramukhyaiḥ ||
oṃkārālaṃkṛtena tribhuvanaguruṇā brahmaṇā dṛṣṭapūtaṃ saṃbhogābhogagamyaṃ janakaluṣaharaṃ pauṣkaraṃ vaḥ punātu || 1 |1
jayati bhuvanadīpo bhāskaro lokakartā jayati ca śitidehaḥ śārṅgadhanvā murāriḥ || jayati ca śaśimaulī rudranāmābhidheyo jayati sakalamaulirbhānu māṃścitrabhānuḥ || 2 || namaskṛtyāprameyāya devāya brahmarūpiṇe ||
purāṇaṃ saṃpravakṣyāmi yaduktaṃ brahmayoginā || 3 ||
purāṇasaṃhitāṃ puṇyāṃ papracchū raumaharṣaṇim ||
vaktumarhasi cāsmākaṃ purāṇārthaviśārada ||4||
munīnāṃ vacanaṃ śrutvā sūtaḥ paurāṇikottamaḥ ||
praṇamya manasā prāha guruṃ satyavatīsutam|||||
|| sūta uvāca || ||
namaskṛtya jagadyoniṃ brahmarūpadharaṃ harim ||
vakṣye paurāṇikīṃ divyāṃ kathāṃ pāpapraṇāśinīm || 6 ||
yacchrutvā pāpakarmāṇi sa gacchetparamāṃ gatim ||
puṇyaṃ pavitramāyuṣyamidānīṃ śṛṇuta dvijāḥ || 7 ||
bhaviṣyapurāṇamakhilaṃ yajjagāda gadādharaḥ ||
madhyaparva hyatho vakṣye pratiṣṭhādivinirṇayam || 8 ||
dharmapraśaṃsanaṃ cātra brāhmaṇādipraśaṃsanam ||
āpaddharmasya kathanaṃ vidyāmāhātmyavardhanam|| 9 ||
pratimākaraṇaṃ caiva sthāpanācitralakṣaṇam ||
kālavyavasthāsargādipratisargādilakṣaṇam || 2.1.1.10 ||
purāṇalakṣaṇaṃ caiva bhūgolasya ca nirṇayam ||
nirūpaṇaṃ tithīnāṃ ca śrāddhasaṃkalpamantaram || 11 ||
mumūrṣorapi yatkarma dānamāhātmyameva ca ||
bhūtaṃ bhavyaṃ bhaviṣyaṃ ca yugadharmānuśāsanam || 12 ||
uccāvacāvadhānaṃ ca prāyaścittādikaṃ ca yat || ṣaṣṭyādhikāṣṭasāhasranavaślokaśatodbhavam || 13 ||
paṃcataṃtrasamāyuktaṃ pratitaṃtre ca viṃśatiḥ ||
paṃcottaraṃ tathādhyāyāḥ purāṇe.asmindvijottamāḥ || 14 ||
trayāṇāmāśramāṇāṃ ca gṛhastho yonirucyate ||
anye.api sūpajīvanti tasmācchreṣṭho gṛhāśramī || 15||
ekāśramaṃ gṛhasthasya trayāṇāṃ mūrtidarśanam ||
tasmādgārhasthamevaikaṃ vijñeyaṃ dharmaśāsanam || 16 ||
parityajedarthakāmau yau syātāṃ dharmavarjitau ||
sarvalokaviruddhaṃ ca dharmamapyācarenna tu ||17||
taḍāgasya ca sānnidhye taḍāgaṃ parivarjayet ||
prapāsthāne prapā varjyā maṭhasthāne maṭhaṃ tyajet ||18||
dharmātsaṃjāyate hyartho dharmātkāmo.abhijāyate ||
dharmādevāpavargo.ayaṃ tasmāddharmaṃ samāśrayet || 19 ||
dharmaścārthaśca kāmaśca trivargastriguṇo mataḥ ||
sattvaṃ rajastamaśceti tasmāddharmaṃ samāśrayet || 2.1.1.20 ||
ūrdhvaṃ gacchaṃti sattvasthā madhye tiṣṭhaṃti rājasāḥ ||
jaghanyaguṇavṛttisthā adho gacchaṃti tāmasāḥ || 21 ||
yasmindharmaḥ samāyukto hyarthakāmau vyavasthitau ||
iha loke sukhī bhūtvā pretyānaṃtyāya kalpate||22||
tasmādarthaṃ ca kāmaṃ ca yuktvā dharmaṃ samāśrayet ||
dharmātsaṃjāyate kāmo dharmādarthobhijāyate||23||
evaṃ dharmasya madhye.ayaṃ caturvargaḥ pradarśitaḥ ||
evaṃ ca dharmakāmārthaṃ mokṣasyāpi ca mānavaḥ ||
māhātmyaṃ vānutiṣṭhecca sa cānaṃtyāya kalpate || 24 ||
tasmādarthaṃ ca kāmaṃ ca muktvā dharmaṃ samācaret ||
dharmātsaṃjāyate sarvamityāhurbrahmavādinaḥ || 25 ||
dharmeṇa dhāryate sarvaṃ jagatsthāvarajaṃgamam ||
anādinidhanā śaktirnaiṣā brāhmī dvijottama || 26 ||
karmaṇā prāpyate dharmo jñānena ca na saṃśayaḥ ||
tasmājjñānena sahitaṃ karmayogaṃ samācaret || 27 ||
pravṛttiśca nivṛttiśca dvividhaṃ karma vaidikam ||
jñānapūrvā nivṛttiḥ syātpravṛttirvartate.anyathā || 28 ||
nivṛttiṃ sevamānastu yāti tatparamaṃ padam ||
tasmānnivṛttaṃ saṃsevyamanyathā saṃsaretpunaḥ||29||
śamo damo dayā dānamalobhastyāga eva ca ||
ārjavaṃ cānasūyā ca tīrthānusaraṇaṃ tathā || 2.1.1.30 ||
satyaṃ saṃtoṣa āstikyaṃ śraddhā cendriyanigrahaḥ ||
devatābhyarcanaṃ pūjā brāhmaṇānāṃ viśeṣataḥ ||31||
ahiṃsā satyavāditvamapaiśunyaṃ sukalpatā ||
śaucācāraścānukaṃpā sarvavarṇe.abravīnmuniḥ||32||
śraddhāpūrvāḥ smṛtā dharmāḥ śraddhāmadhye tu saṃsthitāḥ ||
śraddhāniṣṭhāḥ pratiṣṭhāśca dharmāḥ śraddheva kīrtitāḥ || 33 ||
prājāpatyaṃ brāhmaṇānāṃ śrutaṃ sthānaṃ kriyāvatām ||
sthānamaindraṃ kṣatriyāṇāṃ saṃgrāmeṣvapalāyinām ||34||
vaiśyānāmamṛtaṃ sthānaṃ svadharmamanuvartatām ||
gāṃdharvaṃ śūdrajīvānāṃ paricāreṇa vartatām || 35 ||
aṣṭāśīti sahasrāṇāṃ munīnāmūrdhvaretasām ||
smṛtaṃ sthānaṃ tu yatsthānaṃ tadeva guruvāsinām || 36 ||
saptarṣīṇāṃ tu yatsthānaṃ śrutaṃ tadvai vanaukasām ||
prājāpatyaṃ gṛhasthānāṃ sthānamuktaṃ svayaṃbhuvā || 37 ||
yatīnāṃ yatacittānāṃ tadeva vanavāsinām ||
hiraṇyagarbhaṃ yatsthānaṃ tasmānnāvartate punaḥ || 38 ||
yogināmamṛtaṃ sthānaṃ vyomākhyaṃ paramākaram ||
ānaṃdamaiśvaraṃ nāma sā kāṣṭhā paramā gatiḥ || 39 || ||
iti śrībhaviṣye mahāpurāṇe madhyamaparvaṇi prathamabhāge prathamo.adhyāyaḥ || 1 || cha ||
sṛṣṭivarṇanam
|| sūta uvāca || ||
idānīṃ vistaraṃ caiva vibhāgaṃ rūpamaiśvaram ||
vakṣye kalpānusāreṇa manvataraśatānugam || 1 ||
āsīttamomayaṃ sarvamaprajñātamalakṣaṇam ||
tatra caiko mahānāsīdrudraḥ paramakāraṇam || 2 ||
ātmanā svayamātmānaṃ sañcitya bhagavānvibhuḥ ||
manaḥ saṃsṛjate pūrvamahaṃkāraṃ ca pṛṣṭhataḥ || 3 ||
ahaṃkārātprajānāti mahābhūtāni pañca ca ||
aṣṭau prakṛtayaḥ proktā vikārāścaiva ṣoḍaśa || 4 ||
śabdaḥ sparśaśca rūpaṃ ca raso gaṃdhastathaiva ca ||
prāṇo.apānaḥ samānaścodānavyānau tathaiva ca || 5 ||
sattvaṃ rajastamaścaiva guṇāḥ proktāstu te trayaḥ ||
tasmādbhāgavato brahmā tasmādviṣṇurajāyata ||6||
brahmaviṣṇumohanārthaṃ tataḥ śaṃbhustu tejasā ||
aśarīro vāsudevo hyanutpattirayonijaḥ ||7||
vyāmohayitvā tatsarvaṃ tejasā.amohayajjagat ||
tasmātparataraṃ nāsti tasmātparataraṃ na hi || 8 ||
brahmā viṣṇuśca dvāvetāvudbhūtau bhagavatsutau ||
kalpekalpe tu tatsarvaṃ sṛjate.asau janaṃ jagat || 9 ||
upasaṃharate caiva nānābhūtāni sarvaśaḥ ||
dvāsaptatiyugānyeva manvantara iti smṛtaḥ || 2.1.2.10 ||
caturdaśa tu tānyevaṃ kalpa ityabhidhīyate ||
dinaikaṃ brahmaṇaḥ proktaṃ niśi kalpastathocyate || 11 ||
evaṃ māsaśca varṣaśca tathā cāṣṭaśataṃ dvijāḥ ||
evaṃ buddhīndriyasyāsya viṣṇośca nimiṣaḥ smṛtaḥ || 12 ||
brahmādistaṃbaparyaṃtaṃ nimeṣaśca dhruvasya vai ||
nimeṣajīvanaṃ sarvaṃ sarvalokacarācaram || 13 ||
bhūrloko.atha bhuvarlokaḥ svarlokaśca prakīrtitaḥ ||
janastapaśca satyaṃ ca brahmalokaśca saptamaḥ || 14 ||
pātālaṃ vitalaṃ taddhi atalaṃ talameva ca ||
pañcamaṃ viddhi sutalaṃ saptamaṃ ca rasātalam || 15 ||
eteṣu saptavikhyātā adhaḥpātālavāsinaḥ ||
teṣāmādau ca madhye ca aṃte rudraḥ prakīrtitaḥ || 16 ||
grasate jāyate lokānkrīḍārthaṃ tu maheśvaraḥ ||
brahmalokaparīpsūnāṃ gatirūrdhvaṃ prakīrtitā || 17 ||
pṛthivīṃ cāṃtarikṣaṃ ca diśaśca vidiśastathā ||
samudrāṇāṃ girīṇāṃ ca adhastiryakprasaṃkhyayā || 18 ||
samudrāṇāṃ ca vistāraṃ pramāṇaṃ ca tataḥ śṛṇu ||
sthāvarāṇāṃ ca śailānāṃ devānāṃ ca divaukasām || 19 ||
catuṣpadānāṃ dvipadāṃ tathā dharmaikabhāṣiṇām ||
sahasraguṇamākhyātaṃ sthāvarāṇāṃ prakīrtitam || 2.1.2.20 ||
sahasraguṇaśīlāśca ityāha bhagavānmuniḥ ||
ṛṣistu prathamaṃ kurvanprakṛtiṃ nāma nāmataḥ || 21 ||
tasyā brahmā prakṛtyāstu utpannaḥ saha viṣṇunā ||
tasmādbuddhyā prakurute sṛṣṭiṃ naimittikīṃ dvijāḥ || 22 ||
tasmātsvayaṃbhuvo brahmā brāhmaṇānsamakalpayat ||
pādahīnānkṣatriyāṃśca tasmāddhīnāṃstu vaiśyakān || 23 ||
caturtha pādahīnāṃśca ācāreṣu bahiṣkṛtān ||
pṛthivīṃ cāṃtarikṣaṃ ca diśaścaivāpyakalpayat || 24 ||
lokālokasya saṃsthā ca dvīpānāmudadhestathā ||
saritāṃ sāgarāṇāṃ ca tīrthānyāyatanāni ca || 25 ||
meghastanitanirghoṣarohiteṃdradhanūṃṣi ca ||
ulkānirghātaketūṃśca jyotīṃṣyāyatanāni ca || 26 ||
utpannaṃ tasya deheṣu bhūyaḥ kālena pīḍayet || 27 ||
iti śrībhaviṣye mahāpurāṇe madhyamaparvaṇi prathamabhāge dvitīyo.adhyāyaḥ || 2 || || a || ||
pātālavarṇanam
|| sūta uvāca || ||
dhruvādūrdhvaṃ maharlokaḥ koṭiyojanavistaraḥ ||
kalpābhikaraṇe tatra saṃsthitā dvijapuṅgavāḥ || 1 ||
janaloko maharlokāttathā koṭidvayātmakaḥ ||
sanaṃdanādayastatra saṃsthitā brahmaṇaḥ sutāḥ || 2 ||
janalokāttapolokaḥ koṭitrayasamanvitaḥ ||
virājaṃte tu devā vai sthitā dāha vivarjitāḥ || 3 ||
prājāpatyāttu bhūrlokaḥ koṭiṣaṭkena saṃyutaḥ ||
sanatkumārakastatra brahmalokastu sa smṛtaḥ || 4 ||
tatra loke gururbrahmā viśvātmā viśvatomukhaḥ ||
āste yadyogibhiḥ pītvā yogaṃ mṛtyoḥ paraṃ gatam || 5 ||
gāyaṃti yatayo gāthā hyāstikā brahmavādinaḥ ||
yoginastāpasāḥ siddhā jāpakāḥ parameṣṭhinam || 6 ||
dvāraṃ tu yogināmekaṃ gacchatāṃ paramaṃ padam ||
tatra gatvā na śocaṃti sa viṣṇuḥ sa ca śaṃkaraḥ || 7 ||
sūryakoṭipratīkāśaṃ puraṃ tasya durāsadam ||
na me varṇayituṃ śakyaṃ jvālāmālāsamākulam || 8 ||
tatra nārāyaṇasyāpi bhavanaṃ brahmaṇaḥ pure ||
śeṣe tasya hariḥ śrīmānmāyāsahacaraḥ paraḥ || 9 ||
sa viṣṇurlokakathitaḥ punarāvṛttivarjitaḥ ||
prayāṃti ca mahātmāno ye prapannā janārdanam || 2.1.3.10 ||
ūrdhvaṃ brahmāsanātpūrvaṃ paraṃ jyotirmayaṃ śubham ||
vahninā upari kṣiptaṃ tatrāste bhagavānbhavaḥ ||11||
devyā saha mahādevaścintyamāno manīṣibhiḥ ||
yogibhiḥ śatasāhasrairvṛtaikatvaiśca saṃvṛtaḥ || 12 ||
tatra te yāṃti niyatā dvijā vai brahmavādinaḥ ||
mahādevapareśānāstāpasā brahmavādinaḥ || 13 ||
nirmamā nirahaṃkārāḥ kāmakrodhavivarjitāḥ ||
drakṣyaṃti brahmaṇā yuktā rudralokaḥ sa vai smṛtaḥ || 14 ||
ete sapta maharlokāḥ pṛthivyāṃ parikīrtitāḥ ||
mahītalādayaścādhaḥ pātālāḥ saṃti vai dvijāḥ || 15 ||
mahātalaṃ haimatalaṃ sarvavarṇopaśobhitam ||
prāsādairvividhaiḥ śubhrairdevatāyatanairyutam || 16 ||
anaṃtena samāyuktaṃ mucukundena dhīmatā ||
nṛpeṇa balinā caiva pātālaṃ svargavāsinā || 17 ||
śailaṃ rasātalaṃ viprāḥ śāṃkaraṃ hi rasātalam ||
pītaṃ sutalamityuktaṃ vitalaṃ vidrumaprabham || 18 ||
sitaṃ hi vitalaṃ proktaṃ talaṃ caiva sitetaram ||
suvarṇena muniśreṣṭhāstathā vāsukinā śubham || 19 ||
rasātalamiti khyātaṃ sarvaśobhāsamanvitam ||
vainateyādibhiścaiva kālanemipurogamaiḥ || 2.1.3.20 ||
śaṃkukarṇena saṃbhinnaṃ tathā namucipūrvakam ||
tathānyairvivi dhairnāgaistalaṃ caiva suśobhanam || 21 ||
teṣāmadhastānnarakā rauravādyāśca koṭayaḥ ||
pāpinasteṣu pātyaṃte na te.avanamituṃ kṣamāḥ || 22 ||
pātālā nāmadhaścāṃte śeṣākhyā vaiṣṇavī tanuḥ ||
kālāgnirudrayogātmā nārasiṃho.api mādhavaḥ || 23 ||
yo.anaṃtaḥ paṭhyate devo nāgarūpī janārdanaḥ ||
tadādhāramidaṃ sarvaṃ sakalāgnimupāśritam || 24 ||
tamāviśya mahāyogī kālastadvadanānalaḥ ||
viṣajvālāsamo.anaṃto jagatsaṃharati svayam ||25||
tāmasī śāṃbhavī mūrtiḥ kālātmā parameśvaraḥ||
sa eva garbhamāśritya prakāśayati nityaśaḥ ||26||
iti śrībhaviṣye mahāpurāṇe madhyamaparvaṇi prathamabhāge pātāla varṇanaṃnāma tṛtīyo.adhyāyaḥ || 3 || || a ||
jyotiścakravarṇanam
|| sūta uvāca || ||
etadbrahmāṃḍamākhyātaṃ caturvidhamidaṃ mahat ||
ataḥ paraṃ pravakṣyāmi bhūrlokasya vinirṇayam || 1 ||
taddvīpapradhāno jaṃbūḥ plakṣaḥ śālmala eva ca ||
kuśaḥ krauṃcaśca śākaśca puṣkaraścaiva saptamaḥ || 2 ||
ete sapta mahādvīpāḥ samudraiḥ saptabhirvṛtāḥ ||
dvīpāddvīpo mahānuktaḥ sāgarādapi sāgaraḥ || 3 ||
kṣīrodekṣurasodo.atha kṣārodaśca ghṛtodakaḥ ||
dadhyodaḥ kṣīrasalilo jalodaśceti sāgarāḥ || 4 ||
paṃcāśatkoṭivistīrṇā samudravalayā smṛtā||
dvīpaiśca saptabhiryuktā yojanānāṃ samānataḥ || 5 ||
jaṃbūdvīpaḥ samastānāṃ dvīpānāṃ madhyataḥ śubhaḥ ||
tasya madhye mahāmerurviśrutaḥ kanakaprabhaḥ || 6 ||
caturāśītisāhasrayojanairasya cocchrayaḥ ||
praviṣṭaḥ ṣoḍaśādhastāddvātriṃśanmūrdhni viṣkṛtaḥ || 7 ||
mūle ṣoḍaśasāhasraṃ vistārastasya sarvataḥ ||
bhūpramukhyaśca śailo.asau kalikātvena saṃsthitaḥ || 8 ||
himavānhimakūṭaśca niṣadhasta sya dakṣiṇe ||
nīlaḥ śvetaśca śṛṃgī ca uttare varṣaparvataḥ||9||
lakṣapramāṇau dvau madhye daśahīnāstathāpare ||
sahasradvitayaṃ dīrghāstāvadvistāriṇaśca te || ||2.1.4.10||
bhārataṃ dakṣiṇaṃ varṣaṃ tataḥ kiṃpuruṣaṃ smṛtam ||
harivarṣaṃ tathaivānyanmerordakṣiṇato dvijāḥ ||11||
caṃpakaṃ cottaraṃ varṣaṃ tathaivāśvahiraṇmayam||
uttarāḥ kuravaścaiva yathaite bhāratāstathā || 12 ||
navasāhasramekaikameteṣāṃ dvijasattamāḥ ||
ilāvṛtaśca tanmadhye tanmadhye merurucchritaḥ ||13||
meroścaturdiśastatra navasāhasraviṣkṛtam ||
ilāvṛtaṃ mahābhāgāścatvārastatra parvatāḥ ||14||
viṣkaṃbhā racitā meroryojanāyutamucchritāḥ ||
pūrveṇa maṃdaro nāma dakṣiṇe gaṃdhamādanaḥ || 15 ||
vipulaḥ paścime bhāge supārśvaścottare sthitaḥ ||
kadaṃbeṣveṣu nadyaśca pippalo vaṭa eva ca || 16 ||
jaṃbūdvīpasya sā jaṃbūrnāmahetormaharṣayaḥ ||
mahāgajapramāṇāni jaṃbūnyasya phalāni ca || 17 ||
pataṃti bhūbhṛtaḥ pṛṣṭhe śīryamāṇāni sarvaśaḥ ||
rasena caiva prakhyātā tasya jaṃbūnadī iti ||18||
sarittu vartate sāpi pīyate tatra vāsibhiḥ||
na khedo na ca daurgaṃdhyaṃ na jarā neṃdriyakṣayaḥ ||
utpannāḥ svacchamanaso narāstatra bhavanti vai ||19||
tīrasūtraṃ samaṃ prāpya vāyunā ca viśoṣitam ||
jāṃbūnadākhyaṃ bhavati suvarṇaṃ siddhabhūṣaṇam || 2.1.4.20 ||
bhadrāśvaḥ pārśvato meroḥ ketumālaśca paścime ||
varṣe dve tu muniśreṣṭhāstayormadhye ilāvṛtam || 21 ||
merorupari vipreṃdrā brahmaṇaḥ sthānamuttamam ||
tadūrdhve vāsavasthānaṃ tadūrdhve śaṃkarasya ca || 22 ||
tadūrdhvaṃ vaiṣṇavo loko dugārlokastadūrdhvataḥ ||
jyotirmayaṃ paraṃ sthānaṃ nirākāraṃ hiraṇmayam || 23 ||
bhaktasthānaṃ tadūrdhvaṃ ca devo hi bhagavānraviḥ||
jyotiścakrasthitaḥ śuddho niścalaḥ parameśvaraḥ ||
rāśicakre ca bhramati merorupari sattamāḥ || 24 ||.
biṃbaṣaṭkedrinābhau ca rathacakraṃ divāniśam ||
vātarajjunibaṃdhena dhruvādhāre pratiṣṭhitam|| 25 ||
dikpālādyā grahāstatra dakṣiṇāduttarāyaṇam ||
pratimāsaṃ gataḥ paṃthā hrāsavṛddhidinakṣayaḥ || 26 ||
raviṇā laṃghito māsaścāṃdraḥ khyāto malimlucaḥ ||
dvādaśe bhagavatsūrye pratyahaṃ bhaktasevake || 27 ||
kṛtvā triṣu tvahorātraṃ tārāmayagataṃ vibhum ||
yāmeyāme codayaśca deśedeśe ca śarvarī || 28 ||
divā carati yaḥ sūryo rātrau carati candramāḥ ||
nakṣatrāṇi divā rātrau sūryacakre pratiṣṭhitam||29||
deśānnaṃ cāvagamanaṃ yatra tasmādivābhavat ||
yatra caṃdrakṣayo bhavati yatra sūryaḥ pravartate || 2.1.4.30 ||
rātriṃdivaṃ vijānīyājjyotiścakre pratiṣṭhitam ||
udayāstamanaṃ nāsti nakṣatrāṇāṃ viśeṣataḥ || 31 ||
yannakṣatre ca yo deśaḥ sa teṣāmudayaḥ smṛtaḥ ||
tatrāsto jīvaśukrāṇāṃ sūryādīnāṃ ca sarvaśaḥ || 32 ||
tadā kāle niyoktavyā bhārgavāstādikī kriyā ||
sūryaḥ somo budhaścaṃdro bhārgavaścaiva śīghrakaḥ || 33 ||
dakṣiṇāyanamāsthāya yadā carati raśmimān ||
tadā sarvagrahāṇāṃ sa sūryodhastātprasarpati || 34 ||
vistīrṇamaṃḍalaṃ kṛtvā tasyordhve carate śaśī ||
nakṣatramaṃḍalaṃ kṛtsnaṃ somādūrdhvaṃ prasarpati || || 35 ||
nakṣatrebhyo budhaścordhvaṃ budhādūrdhvaṃ tu bhārgavaḥ ||
candrastu bhārgavādūrdhvaṃ caṃdrādūrdhvaṃ śanaiścaraḥ || 36 ||
tasmācchanaiścarādūrdhvaṃ tataḥ saptarṣimaṃḍalam ||
ṛṣīṇāṃ caiva saptānāṃ dhruvaścordhvaṃ vyavasthitaḥ || 37 ||
kālacakramaye cakre sūryo bhavati sarvadā ||
rāśyardeà¥dheṣu gatiryatra tithīnāṃ ca tithau smṛtā || 38 ||
staṃbhate carate śīghraṃ hrāse cāpi dinakṣayaḥ ||
pādāstaṃ cāpi śukrasya mahāstaṃ tatra dṛśyate || 39 ||
pādāste pakṣamātraṃ syānmahāste yāmamātrakam ||
cakre pakṣārdhamāsaḥ syādaticāro.aṣṭavāsarān || 2.1.4.40 ||
na gaṇyate deśabhede nakṣatreṇa ca gaṇyate ||
bāla vṛddhastu śukrasya deśasthe vā gaṇasya ca || 41 ||
bālyavārddhye kṣatriyasya na gaṇyete sadā budhaiḥ ||
pādādūrdhvaṃ mahāstasya vaiśyasya dvijasa ttamāḥ || 42 ||
śeṣārdhaṃ bhārgavāstasya śūdrāṇāmatha garhitam ||
abhicāre ca cakre ca na śūdrasya vidhīyate || 43 ||
varjayedvāsarānsapta iti cātharvaṇī śrutiḥ || 44 ||
iti śrībhaviṣye mahāpurāṇe madhyamaparvaṇi prathamabhāge jyotiścakre caturtho.adhyāyaḥ || 4 || || a || || ||
karmānusāravyaktinirdhāraṇavarṇanam
|| sūta uvāca || ||
trayāṇāmeva varṇānāṃ janmato brāhmaṇaḥ prabhuḥ ||
saṃsṛṣṭā brāhmaṇāḥ pūrvaṃ tapastaptvā dvijottamāḥ || 1 ||
havyānāmiha kavyānāṃ sarvasyāpi ca guptaye ||
aśnaṃti ca mukhenāsya havyāni tridivaukasaḥ || 2 ||
kavyāni caiva pitaraḥ kiṃ bhūtamadhikaṃ tataḥ ||
janmanā cottamo.ayaṃ ca sarvārcā brāhmaṇo.arhati || 3 ||
svakīyaṃ brāhmaṇo bhuṃkte vidadhāti dvijottamāḥ ||
trayāṇāmiha varṇānāṃ bhāvābhāvāya vai dvijaḥ || 4||
bhavedvipro na saṃdehastuṣṭo bhāvāya vai bhavet ||
abhāvāya bhavetkruddhastasmātpūjyaḥ sadā hi saḥ || 5 ||
garbhādhānādayaśceha saṃskārā yasya sattamāḥ ||
catvāriṃśattathā cāṣṭau nirvṛttāḥ śāstrato dvijāḥ .||
sa yāti brahmaṇaḥ sthānaṃ brāhmaṇatvena saṃyutaḥ || 6 ||
saṃskārapūtaḥ prathamo vedapūto dvitīyakaḥ ||
vidyāpūtastṛtīyaḥ syāttīrthapūtastvanaṃtaram || 7 ||
kṣetrapūtaṃ pravijñāya vipūtaṃ pūjayeddvijāḥ ||
svargāpavargaphaladamanyathā śramatāmiyāta || | 8 ||
pūtānāṃ paramaḥ pūto gurūṇāṃ paramo guruḥ ||
sarvasattvānvitā vipro nirmito brahmaṇā purā || 9 ||
pūjayitvā dvijāndevāḥ svargaṃ bhuñjaṃti cākṣayam||
manuṣyāścāpi devatvaṃ svaṃsvaṃ rājyaṃ gatena saḥ || 2.1.5.10 ||
yasya viprāḥ prasīdaṃti tasya viṣṇuḥ prasīdati ||
tasmādbrāhmaṇapūjāyāṃ viṣṇustuṣyati tatkṣaṇāt || 11 ||
yasmādviṣṇumukhādvipraḥ samudbhūtaḥ purā dvijāḥ ||
vedāstatraiva saṃjātāḥ sṛṣṭisaṃhārahetavaḥ || 12 ||
tasmādvipramukhe vedāścārpitāḥ puruṣeṇa hi ||
pūjārthaṃ brahmalokānāṃ sarvajñānārthato dhruvam || 13 ||
pitṛyajñavivāheṣu vahnikāryeṣu śāṃtiṣu ||
praśastā brāhmaṇā nityaṃ sarvasvastyayaneṣu ca || 14 ||
devā bhuñjaṃti havyāni baliṃ pretādayo.asurāḥ ||
pitaro havyakavyāni viprasyaiva mukhād dhruvam || 15 ||
devebhyaśca pitṛbhyaśca yo dadayādyajñakarmasu ||
dānaṃ homaṃ baliṃ caiva vinā vipreṇa niṣphalam || 16 ||
vinā vipraṃ ca yo dharmaḥ prayāsaphalamātrakaḥ ||
bhuñjate cāsurāstatra pretā bhūtāśca rākṣasāḥ || 17 ||
tasmādbrāhmaṇamāhūya tasya pūjāṃ ca kārayet ||
kāle deśe ca pātre ca lakṣakoṭiguṇaṃ bhavet || 18 ||
śraddhayā ca dvijaṃ dṛṣṭvā prakuryādabhivādanam||
dīrghāyustasya vākyena ciraṃjīvī bhavennaraḥ || 19 ||
anabhivādināṃ vipre dveṣādaśraddhayāpi ca |||
āyuḥ kṣīṇaṃ bhavetpuṃsāṃ bhūmināśaśca durgatiḥ || 2.1.5.20 || āyurvṛddhiryaśorvṛddhirvṛddhirvidyādhanasya ca ||
pūjayitvā dvijaśreṣṭhānbhavennāstyatra saṃśayaḥ ||| || 21 ||
na viprapādodakakardamāni na vedaśāstrapratigarjitāni ||
svāhāsvadhāsvastivivarjitāni śmaśānatulyāni gṛhāṇi tāni || 22 || ṣadviṃśatidoṣamāhurnarā narakabhīravaḥ ||
vimucyaiva vasettīrthe grāme vā pattane vane || 23 ||
te svarge pitṛloke ca brahmalokeṣvavasthitāḥ || 24 ||
anyathā na vasedvāsastasmātsteyī na pālayet ||
adharmo viṣamaścaiva paśuśca piśunastathā || 25 ||
pāpiṣṭho naṣṭakaṣṭau ca ruṣṭo duṣṭaśca muktakaḥ |||
hṛṣṭaḥ kuṇṭhaśca andhaśca kāṇaścaiva tathāparaḥ || 26 ||
caṇḍaḥ khaṇḍaśca vaktā ca dattasyāpaharastathā ||
nīcaḥ khalaśca vācālaḥ kadaryaścapala stathā || 27 ||
malīmasaśca te doṣāḥ ṣaḍviṃśatiramī matāḥ ||
eteṣāṃ cāpi viprendrāḥ pañcāśītirnigadyate || 28 ||
śṛṇudhvaṃ dvijaśārdūlāḥ śāstresminbruvataḥ kramāt ||
adhamo.atra tridhāvidyādviṣamaḥ syādvidhocitaḥ ||29||
paśuścaturvidhaścaiva kṛpaṇopi hi vai dvidhā ||
dvidhāthāpi ca pāpiṣṭho naṣṭaḥ saptavidhaḥ smṛtaḥ || 2.1.5.30 ||
kaṣṭaḥ syātpañcadhā jñeyo ruṣṭopi syāddvidhā ddvijāḥ ||
duṣṭaḥ syātṣaḍvidho jñeyaḥ puṣṭaścaiva bhaveddvidhā 31 ||
hṛṣṭaścāṣṭavidhaḥ proktaḥ kuṇṭhaścaiva tridhoditaḥ ||
andhaḥ kāṇaśca tau dvau dvau syādvai ca saguṇo.aguṇaḥ || 32 ||
dvau caṇḍau capalaścaikāvaṇḍacaṇḍo dvigurbhavet ||
daṇḍapaṇḍau tathā jñeyau khalanīcau caturdvayam || 33 ||
vācālaśca kadaryaśca kramāttribhirudāhṛtaḥ ||
kadaryaścapalaścaiva tathā jñeyo malīmasaḥ || 34 ||
dvāvekau caturaścaiva steyī caikavidho bhavet ||
pṛthaglakṣaṇameteṣāṃ śṛṇudhvaṃ dvijasattamāḥ || 35 ||
samyagyasya parijñānaṃ naro devatvamāpnuyāt ||
upānacchatradhārī ca gurudevāgrataścaran || 36 ||
uccāsanaṃ guroragre tīrthayātrāṃ karoti yaḥ ||
yānamāruhya viprendrāḥ sopyekatrādhamo mataḥ || 37 ||
nimajjya tīrthe vidhivadgrāmyadharmeṇa vartayan ||
dvitīyaścādhamaḥ prokto niṃditaḥ parikīrtitaḥ || 38 ||
vācaiva madhurā ślakṣṇā hṛdi hālāhalaṃ viṣam ||
vadatyanyatkarotyanyaddvāvetau viṣamau smṛtā || 39 ||
mokṣacintāmatikramya yo.anyacintāpariśramaḥ ||
harisevā vihīno yaḥ sa paśuryonitaḥ paśuḥ ||2.1.5.40||
prayāge vidyamāne.api yo.anyatra snānamācaret ||
dṛṣṭaṃ devaṃ parityajya adṛṣṭaṃ bhajate tu yaḥ ||41||
āyuṣastu kṣayārthāya śāstreyamṛṣisaṃmataḥ ||
yogābhyāsaṃ tato hitvā tṛtīyaścādhamaḥ paśuḥ || 42 ||
bahūni pustakānīha śāstrāṇi vividhāni ca ||
tasya sāraṃ na jānāti sa eva jaṃbukaḥ paśuḥ|| 43 ||
balena cchalachadmena upāyena prabaṃdhanam ||
so.api syātpiśunaḥ khyātaḥ praṇayādvā dvitīyakaḥ || 44 ||
madhurānnaṃ pratiṣṭhāpya daive pitrye ca karmaṇi ||
mlānaṃ cāpi ca tiktānnaṃ yaḥ prayacchati durmatiḥ || 45 ||
kṛpaṇaḥ sa tu vijñeyo na svargī na ca mokṣabhāk ||
kudātā ca mudā hīnaḥ sakrodhastu yajeta yaḥ || 46 ||
sa eva kṛpaṇaḥ khyātaḥ sarvadharmabahiṣkṛtaḥ ||
adoṣeṇa śubhatyāgī śubhakāryopavikrayī || 47 ||
pitṛmātṛgurutyāgī śaucācāravivarjitaḥ ||
pitroragre samaśnāti sa pāpiṣṭhatamaḥ smṛtaḥ ||48 ||
jīvatpitṛparityaktaṃ sutaṃ sevanna vā kvacit ||
dvitīyastu sa pāpiṣṭho homalopī tṛtīyakaḥ || 49 ||
sādhvācāraṃ ca pracchāya sevanaṃ cāpi darśayet ||
sa naṣṭa iti vijñeyaḥ krayakrītaṃ ca maithunam || 2.1.5.50 ||
jīveddevalavṛttiryaḥ bhāryāvipaṇajīvakaḥ ||
kanyāśulkena jīvedvā strīdhanena ca vā kvacit || 51 ||
ṣaḍeva naṣṭāḥ śāstre ca na svargamokṣabhāginaḥ ||
sadā kruddhaṃ mano yasya hīnaṃ dṛṣṭvā prakopavān || 52 ||
bhrukuṭīkuṭilaḥ kruddho ruṣṭaḥ paṃcavidhoditaḥ ||
akārye bhramate nityaṃ dharmārthe na vyavasthitaḥ || 53 ||
nidrālurvyasanāsakto madyapaḥ srtrīniṣevakaḥ ||
duṣṭaiḥ saha sadālāpaḥ sa duṣṭaḥ saptadhā smṛtaḥ ||54 ||
ekākī miṣṭamaśnāti vaṃcakaḥ sādhuniṃdakaḥ ||
yathā sūkaraḥ puṣṭaḥ syāttathā puṣṭaḥ prakīrtitaḥ || 95 ||
nigamāgamataṃtrāṇi nādhyāpayati yo dvijaḥ||
na śṛṇoti ca pāpātmā sa duṣṭa iti cocyate || 56 ||
śrutiḥ smṛtiśca viprāṇāṃ nayane dve vinirmite ||
ekena vikalaḥ kāṇo dvābhyāmaṃdhaḥ prakīrtitaḥ || 57 ||
vivādaḥ sodaraiḥ sārddhaṃ pitrorapriyakṛdvadet ||
dvijādhamaḥ sa vijñeyaḥ sa caṃḍaḥ śāstraniṃditaḥ ||58||
piśuno rājagāmī ca śūdrasevaka eva ca ||
śūdrāṃganāgamo vipraḥ sa caṃḍaśca dvijādhamaḥ ||59||
pakvānnaṃ śūdragehe ca yo bhuṃkte sakṛdeva vā ||
paṃcarātraṃ śūdragehe nivāsī caṃḍa ucyate || || 2.1.5.60 ||
aṣṭakuṣṭhānvitaḥ kuṣṭhī trikuṣṭhī śāstraninditaḥ ||
etaiḥ saha sadālāpaḥ sa bhavettatsamo.adhamaḥ || 61 ||
kīṭavadbhramaṇaṃ yasya kuvyāpārī kupaṃḍitaḥ ||
ajñānācca vadeddharmamagravṛttiḥ pradhāvati || 62 ||
avimuktaṃ parityajya yo.anyadeśe vasecciram ||
sa dvidhā śūkarapaśurniṃditaḥ siddhasaṃmataḥ|| || 63 ||
kapolena hi saṃyukto bhrukuṭīkuṭilānanaḥ ||
nṛpavaddaṃḍayedyastu sa daṃḍaḥ samudāhṛtaḥ || 64 ||
brahmasvaharaṇaṃ kṛtvā nṛpadeva svameva ca ||
dhanena tena itaraṃ devaṃ vā brāhmaṇānapi || 65 ||
saṃtarpayati yo.aśnāti yaḥ prayacchati vā kvacit ||
sa kharaśca paśuśreṣṭhaḥ sarvavedeṣu niṃditaḥ || 66 ||
akṣarābhyāsanirataḥ paṭhatyeva na budhyate ||
padaśāstraparityaktaḥ sa paśuḥ syānna saṃśayaḥ || 67 || vadatyanyatkarotyanyadgurudevāgrato yataḥ ||
sa nīca iti vijñeyo hyanācārastathāparaḥ || 68 ||
ṣaḍguṇālaṃkṛteḥ sādhordoṣānmṛgayate khalaḥ ||
vane puṣpaphalākīrṇe śalabhaḥ kaṃṭakāniva || 69 ||
daivena ca vihīno yaḥ kusaṃbhāṣāṃ vadettu yaḥ ||
sa vācāla iti khyāto yo hyapatrapatāyutaḥ || 2.1.5.70 ||
cāṃḍālaiḥ saha ālāpaḥ pakṣiṇāṃ poṣaṇe rataḥ ||
mārjāraiścāpi saṃbhuṃkte yatkṛtyaṃ makarṭoditam || 71 ||
tṛṇacchedī loṣṭamadī vṛthā māṃsāśanaśca yaḥ ||
capalaḥ sa tu vijñeyaḥ parabhāryāratastathā|| 72 |||
snehodvartanahīno yo gaṃdhacaṃdanavarjitaḥ ||
nityakriyā akurvāṇo nityaṃ sa ca malīmasaḥ || 73 ||
anyāyena gṛhaṃ viṃdedanyāyena gṛhāndhanam |||
śāstrādanyadgṛha maṃtraṃ sa steyī brahmaghātakaḥ || 74 ||
devapustakaratnāni maṇimuktāśvameva ca||
gobhūmisvarṇaharaṇaḥ sa steyīti nigadyate || 75 |||
devo.api bhāvayetpaścānmānuṣo.api na saṃśayaḥ ||
anyonyabhāvanā kāryā sa steyī yo na bhāvayet|| 76 ||
guroḥ prasādājjayati pitroścāpi prasādataḥ ||
karoti ca yathārhaṃ ca sa ca svarge mahīyate ||77 ||
na poṣayati duṣṭātmā sa steyī cāparaḥ smṛtaḥ || 78 ||
upakārijanaṃ prāpya na karoti pariṣkriyām ||
sa taptanarake śete śoṇite ca patatyadhaḥ || 79 ||
sarveṣāṃ ca savarṇānāṃ dharmato brāhmaṇaḥ prabhuḥ ||
pṛthivīpālako rājā dharmacakṣurudāhṛtaḥ || 2.1.5.80 ||
prajāpatermukhodbhūto horātaṃtre yathoditam ||
tadvido gaṇanābhijñā anyaviprāḥ pracakṣate || 81 ||
gaṃgāhīno hato deśo viprahīnā yathā kriyā ||
horājñaptivihīno yo deśo.asau viplavaplavaḥ || 82 ||
apradīpā yathā rātriranādityaṃ yathā nabhaḥ ||
tathā.asāṃvatsaro rājā bhramatyaṃdha ivādhvani || 83 ||
sthāpayeddharmato vipraṃ bhāvayetkarmavṛddhaye ||
śmaśruyukto dvijaḥ pūjyaḥ sūryo viprastu śmaśrulaḥ || 84 ||
pratyakpradarśanātpuṇyaṃ tridinaṃ kalmaṣāpaham ||
darśane vrātyaviprasya sūryaṃ dṛṣṭvā viśudhyati || 85 ||
na vrātyatvaṃ sūryavipre pūjayedyajñasiddhaye ||
jyotirvedasyādhikāraḥ sūryaviprasya vai dvijāḥ || 86 ||
jātibhedāśca catvāro bhojakaḥ kathakastathā ||
śivavipraḥ sūryavipraścaturthaḥ paripaṭhyate || 87 ||
kathako madhyamasteṣāṃ sūryaviprastathottamaḥ ||
śivaliṃgārcanarataḥ śivaviprastu niṃditaḥ || 88 ||
sūryaviprasya viprasya vaidyasya ca nṛpasya ca ||
pravāsayedakṣatena saputrapaśubāṃdhavaḥ ||
avadhyaḥ sarvalokeṣu rājā rājyena pālayet || 89 ||
vasubhirvastragaṃdhādyairmālyaiśca vividhairapi ||
deśacakravidaḥ pūjyā horācakravidaḥ parāḥ || 2.1.5.90 ||
sūryacakravidaḥ pūjyā nāvamanyetkathaṃcana ||
siddhavṛddhiṃ ca dhanarddhiṃ ca ya icchedāyuṣā samam ||
gaṇaviprasamaḥ pūjyo daivajñaḥ samudāhṛtaḥ || 91 ||
jāte bāle nirūpye ca lagnagrahanirūpaṇam ||
saṃsthānaṃ sūryavipro yaḥ sūryaviprasya sattamāḥ ||
dvimātrikāṃ samabhyasya sarvavedaphalaṃ labhet || 92 ||
iti śrībhaviṣye mahāpurāṇe madhyamaparvaṇi prathamabhāge paṃcamo.adhyāyaḥ || 5 || cha ||
guruvarṇanam
|| sūta uvāca || ||
caturṇāmapi varṇānāṃ nānyo baṃdhuḥ pracakṣate ||
ṛte piturdvijaśreṣṭhā itīyaṃ naigamī smṛtiḥ || 1 ||
trayo.api guravaḥ śreṣṭhāstābhyāṃ mātā paro guruḥ ||
ye sodarā jyeṣṭhaśreṣṭhā uttarottarato guruḥ || 2 ||
dvādaśyāṃ tu āmavāsyāmatha vā ravisaṃkrame ||
vāsāṃsi dakṣiṇā deyā maṇimuktā yathāruci || 3 ||
ayane viṣuve caiva caṃdrasūryagrahe tathā ||
prāpte cāparapakṣe tu bhojayeccāpi śaktitaḥ || 4 ||
paścātpravaṃdayetpādau maṃtreṇānena sattamāḥ ||
vidhivadvaṃdanādeva sarvatīrthaphalaṃ labhet || 5 ||
svargāpavargapradamekamādyaṃ brahmasvarūpaṃ pitaraṃ namāmi ||
yato jagatpaśyati cārurūpaṃ taṃ tarpayāmaḥ salilaistilairyutaiḥ || || 6 ||
pitaro janayaṃtīha pitaraḥ pālayaṃti ca ||
pitaro brahmarūpā hi tebhyo nityaṃ namonamaḥ || 7 ||
yasmādvijayate lokastasmāddharmaḥ pravartate |||
namastubhyaṃ pitaḥ sākṣādbrahmarūpa namo.astu te || 8 ||
yā kukṣivivare kṛtvā svayaṃ rakṣati sarvataḥ ||
namāmi jananīṃ devīṃ parāṃ prakṛtirūpiṇīm ||9|||
kṛcchreṇa mahatā devyā dhārito.ahaṃ yathodare ||
tvatprasādājjagaddṛṣṭaṃ mātarnityaṃ namo.astu te || 2.1.6.10 ||
pṛthivyāṃ yāni tīrthāni sāgarādīni sarvaśaḥ ||
vasaṃti yatra tāṃ naumi mātaraṃ bhūtihetave || 11 ||
gurudevaprasādena labdhā vidyā yaśaskarī ||
śivarūpa namastasmai saṃsārārṇavasetave || 12 ||
veda vedāṃgaśāstrāṇāṃ tattvaṃ yatra pratiṣṭhitam ||
ādhāraḥ sarvabhūtānāmagrajanmannamo.astu te || 13 ||
brāhmaṇo jagatāṃ tīrthaṃ pāvanaṃ paramaṃ yataḥ ||
bhūdeva hara me pāpaṃ viṣṇurūpinnamo.astu te || 14 ||
pitāmahaṃ ca praṇametsarvādau mātaraṃ gurum ||
mātāmahaṃ ca tadanu ācāryamatha ṛtvijam || 15 ||
mātṛmaṃtraiśca prathamaṃ praṇamedbhaktibhāvataḥ ||
yathāgrajastathā jyeṣṭhaḥ pitṛvyo.api dvijottamāḥ || 16 ||
dṛṣṭādṛṣṭe ca sa gururgururmātā tathā guruḥ ||
dṛṣṭādṛṣṭastṛtīyaḥ syātsūryo.agniścaṃdra eva ca ||17||
maṃtradātā guruḥ khyātassaptamaḥ parikīrtitaḥ ||
kabhojanaguruḥ śreṣṭhaḥ svargāpavargahetukaḥ ||18||
dṛṣṭadevaṃ ca yo hitvā adṛṣṭaṃ ca niṣevate ||
pāpātmā paramaḥ saikastiryagyoniṃ ca gacchati ||19||
yathā pitā jyeṣṭhapitā kanīyāṃśca tathā dvijāḥ ||
jyeṣṭho bhrātā pitṛtulyo mānyaḥ satkārabhāgyataḥ ||2.1.6.20||
ācāryo brahmaṇo mūrtiḥ pitā mūrtiḥ prajāpateḥ ||
mātā syānpṛthivīmūrtirbhrātaro mūrtirātmanaḥ || 21 ||
pitā merurva śiṣṭhaḥ syāddharmamūrtiḥ sanātanaḥ ||
sa cāpi dṛṣṭadevaḥ syāttadājñāṃ paripālayet || 22 ||
pitāmahaṃ ca pitragre havyakavyaiśca tarpayet ||
sa yāti brahmaṇaḥ sthānaṃ yasmānnāvartate punaḥ || 23 ||
tasya pādodakasnānādgaṃgā nārhati kevalam ||
tathāvalokanāttasya jyotirliṃgaśataiśca kim || 24 ||
dvātriṃ śatkuṃḍakaśilāsparśane yādṛśaṃ phalam ||
tādṛśaṃ koṭiguṇitaṃ pitāmahapradakṣiṇe || 25 ||
śatamātṛvariṣṭhāśca pitāmahyāśca poṣaṇe ||
guṇāstaddarśane viprāḥ saṃsāre na punarviśet || 26 ||
iti śrībhaviṣye mahāpurāṇe madhyamaparvaṇi prathamabhāge guruguṇavarṇanaṃ nāma ṣaṣṭhodhyāyaḥ || 6 ||
guruvarṇanam
|| sūta uvāca || ||
samākhyāmīha vipreṃdrā itihāsaṃ purātanam ||
śravaṇepi ca dharmātmañchrūyatāṃ yanmayā purā || 1 ||
pṛṣṭovocanmahātejā viriṃco bhagavānprabhuḥ ||
haṃta te kathayāmyeṣa purāṇaśravaṇe vidhim || 2 ||
itihāsapurāṇāni śrutvā bhaktyā dvijottamāḥ ||
mucyate sarvapāpebhyo brahmahatyāśataṃ ca yat || 3 ||
sāyaṃ prātastathā rātrau śucirbhūtvā śṛṇoti yaḥ ||
tasya viṣṇustathā brahmā tuṣyate śaṃkarastathā || 4 ||
pratyūṣe bhagavānbrahmā dināṃte tuṣyate hariḥ ||
mahādevastathā rātrau śṛṇvatāṃ paṭhatāṃ nṛṇām||5||
śuklavastradharaścaiva cailājinakuśottaraḥ ||
pradakṣiṇatrayaṃ kuryādyā tasmindevatā gurau ||6|||
nātyucchritaṃ nātinīcaṃ svāsanaṃ bhajate tataḥ ||
dikpatibhyo namaskṛtya ū~mkārādhiṣṭhitānapi || 7 ||
pustakaṃ dharmaśāstrasya dharmādhiṣṭhānaśāśvatam ||
āgamānāṃ śivo devastaṃtrādīnāṃ ca śāradā || 8 ||
jāmalānāṃ gaṇapatirḍāmarāṇāṃ śatakratuḥ ||
nārāyaṇo bhāratasya tathā rāmāyaṇasya ca || 9 |||
vāsudevo bhaveddevaḥ saptānāṃ śṛṇu sattama ||
ādityo vāsudevaśca mādhavo rāmakeśavau || 2.1.7.10 ||
vanamālī mahādevaḥ saptānāṃ saptaparvasu ||
viṣṇudharmādikānāṃ ca śivo jñeyaḥ sanātanaḥ ||
atha cādipurāṇasya viriṃciḥ parikīrtitaḥ || 11 ||
śuddhaudanaṃ yavakṣīraṃ pāyasaṃ kṛśaraṃ tathā ||
kṛśarānnaṃ ca vā dadyātkramādbaligaṇaṃ viduḥ || 12 ||
śālibhaktaṃ sagodhūmaṃ tilākṣatavimiśritam ||
gavyaṃ ca saphalaṃ caiva deyaścaibhyastvayaṃ baliḥ ||13||
pṛthakpṛthakcaiva kāṃsye vinyaseddikṣu madhyataḥ ||
paṭheccāpi vidhānena sa yāgaḥ ṣaṇmayaḥ paraḥ ||14||
śītodakaṃ madhu kṣīraṃ sitekṣvośca raso guḍaḥ||
sagarbhaśca paro jñeyaḥ ṣaṇmayaścāparo baliḥ || 15 ||
śālitaṃḍulaprasthaṃ tu tadardhaṃ vā tadardhakam ||
kṣīreṇāpi ca saṃbhaktaṃ yavakṣīramidaṃ smṛtam || 16 ||
kṣīraṃ bhāgāṣṭakaṃ grāhyaṃ saptabhāgena saṃsthitam||
haimaṃtikaṃ sitākhyaṃ ca tāṃḍulaṃ prapaceccarum || 17 ||
aśītipalamānena siddhamāsādayettataḥ ||
bhāgārdhena dadetpaścānmākṣikaṃ vā sitāmapi || 18 ||
guḍamiśreṇa yo dadyātsaṃparko jāyate kvacit ||
saṃpṛktaṃ mākṣikeṇāpi dadyādikṣurasaṃ budhaḥ ||
gṛhītvā yācakaḥ śuddhaḥ śṛṇuta dvijasattamāḥ || 19 ||
śṛṇute vādhīyāno yo dadyāddhaste ca pustakam ||
samutthāya ca gṛhṇīyātpraṇamya vinivedayet || 2.1.7.20 ||
pūrvasthaḥ śrāvako vipro vikhyātastasyadakṣiṇe ||
paścimāśāmukhenaiva tarjanyāṃguṣṭhayā saha ||21||
prastareṇāpi hastena vinyāsaḥ paṃḍitaiḥ sadā ||
itonyathā na kartavyaḥ kṛtvā nyāsamathāpnuyāt ||22||
asakṛdvinyasedviprāḥ pāvamānīṃ jale japet ||
vedāṃtāgamavedāṃtavidhireṣa smṛto budhaiḥ ||23||
yamadiksaṃmukhe śrotā vācakaścottarāmukhaḥ ||
purāṇabhāratākhyāna eṣa vai kathito vidhiḥ ||24||
vaiparītyena vidhinā vijñeyo dvijasattamāḥ ||
rāmāyaṇe dharmaśāstre harivaṃśe ca sattamāḥ || 25 ||
ito.anyathā yātudhānāḥ praluṃpaṃti phalaṃ yataḥ ||
tasmādvidhividhānena śṛṇuyādatha vā paṭhet || 26 ||
śrutvā prati puṇyavidyāṃ yo.aśnīyānmāṃsameva tu ||
sa yāti gārdabhīṃ yoniṃ yadi maithuninaḥ kvacit || 27 ||
yadi devālaye tīrthe vācayecchṛṇuyādatha ||
yasya devagṛhe tasya tasya tīrthasya varṇanam ||28||
māhātmyaśravaṇādeva godānasya phalaṃ labhet||
mahāgurośca māhātmyaṃ pitroragre na ca smaret ||
piturmāhātmyaṃ yatputrairvācyaṃ saṃsadi parvaṇi || 29 ||
vāsudevāmataścāpi rudramāhātmyavarṇanam ||
rudrāgre vāsudevasya kīrtanaṃ puṇyavardhanam || 2.1.7.30 ||
durgāgre śivasūryasya vaiṣṇavākhyānameva ca ||
yaḥ karoti vimūḍhātmā gārdabhīṃ yonimāviśet || 31 ||
guroranujñayā pitroḥ prakuryādabhivādanam ||
anujñayā tathā pitrorhareḥ kuryātpradakṣiṇam || 32 ||
na viṣṇurna ca brahmā ca na ca rudraḥ śacīpatiḥ ||
sarvavedena tattulyaṃ sarvadharmaparāyaṇam || 33 ||
sarvajñānamayaṃ caiva sarvajñena ca tatsamam ||
tasmāddvijanmanpitrorhi sevanādbrahmaśāśvatam ||34||
gurubhyo vaṃdanaṃ vyartha pitaraṃ yo na tarpayet ||
jīvanna tarpayenmukhyaṃ gaṃgāyāṃ maraṇepi ca ||
ubhayostarpaṇaṃ nāsti jīvannapi na jīvati || 35 ||
purāṇaśravaṇaṃ puṇyaṃ śūnyaṃ bhāgavataṃ yadi ||
vyarthaṃ bhāgavataṃ viprā nārasiṃhavihīnakam || || 36 ||
ādiparvaṇi hīne tu bhāratākhyaṃ na dhārayet ||
vināśvamedhikaṃ viprā vinā yajñānanaṃ vinā || 37 ||
dānakarmavihīnaṃ ca mokṣadharmaṃ na dhārayeta ||
bhārataṃ ca divārohadhāraṇādau varaṃ vrajet || 38 ||
vāyupurāṇamaśrutvā śāstraṃ ca yaugikaṃ vinā ||
vāyuhīnaṃ dehikulaṃ vṛthā tasya na dhārakam || 39 ||
tathā vāyupurāṇaṃ yadvihīnaṃ śravyamanyakam ||
yathā sundarakāṃḍena āraṇyaṃ ca na dhārayeta || 2.1.7.40 ||
laṃkāṃ vinā cādikāṃḍaṃ tallikhitvā na dhārayet ||
pārāśaraṃ vinā vyāsaṃ yājñavaktyaṃ vinā makham || 41 ||
dakṣaṃ vinā na śaṃkhaṃ ca śaṃkhahīnaṃ bṛhaspatim ||
vahnīyaṃ śravaṇādyena na ca yuktimathāpayet || 42 ||
saṃsthāpanādeva vinā na ca kimapi rākṣasaiḥ ||
na dadetprārthakādibhyo na vikrīyetkathaṃcana || 43 ||
na haretpustakaṃ cāpi na haredakṣarāṇi ṣaṭ ||
brahmākṣarasya haraṇādrauravānna nivartate ||44||
ādyākṣarasya haraṇāttāmrakuṣṭhī bhavediha ||
mukhavṛttasya haraṇādyāvadācaṃdratārakam|| ||45||
kuvale asipatre ca patatīha na saṃśayaḥ ||
svākṣarasya haraṇe svamātṛharaṇe.api yat ||46||
tasmātpustakamātraṃ yo harennarakamāpnuyāt ||
yadbhārataṃ yatpurāṇaṃ stotrarūpāṇi tāni ca || 47 ||
tāni vedāgamādīni pustakeṣvapi vācayet ||
vedānāṃ pustakaṃ yatra likhitvā tanna vācayet || || 48 ||
tathā tantroditānmaṃtrā~mllikhitvā tanna vācayet ||
pustakaṃ nigamānāṃ ca mantravyākhyānasaṃgraham || 49 ||
sphuṭaṃ kṛtvā puraḥ sthāpya yāvatkālaṃ pravartate ||
tāvatsa narake ghore pretatvaṃ janmajanmani || 2.1.7.50 ||
na vācayecca vyākhyātā vācako.api pravācayet ||
pauṣkare ca śloka pādamāśvamedhaṃ padepade || 51 ||
vedārthaṃ vācayedyasmādviparīto.apavācakaḥ ||
tāvubhau patitau jñeyau pāvamānīśataṃ japet|| 52 ||
ādimadhyāvasāne ca mantre ca praṇavaṃ diśet ||
balibhirgaṃdhapuṣpaiśca pustakaṃ devanirmitam || 53 ||
tridevaṃ pustakaṃ vidyātsūtraṃ vāsukirucyate ||
amānakaraṇe doṣastasmāttacca na hāpayet || 54 ||
patrāṇi bhagavānbrahmā ūrdhvadīrghāṇi yāni ca ||
janārdanaścākṣarāṇi mātrā prakṛtiravyayā || 55 ||
lipī bhaṃgī maheśaḥ syāttasyā mātrā sarasvatī ||
ekarekhā ca ekātmā pādācca pādavicyutiḥ || 56 ||
catuṣpādāṃtare yugmaṃ madhyamoṃ.ate yugaṃ yugam ||
vipatkaraṃ yugmapaṃktāvayugme svargasādhanam || 57 ||
bhārate cetihāse ca purāṇe dvijasattamāḥ ||
ayugmapaṃktau svargaḥ syādyugme narakamāviśet || || 58 ||
vaktṛnāmākṣarairyuktaṃ paṃktibhedena sattamāḥ ||
upanyastasya yannāma tatkalau mātrayā saha || 59 ||
ātmasaṃśuddhisaṃśuddhyā dhārayeddharma saṃhitām ||
ito.anyathā bhaveddoṣastasmāttatparivarjayet || 2.1.7.60 ||
ripuḥ sūryastayārāmo yakṣo.anaṃtaḥ sarasvatī ||
brāhmī ca yakṣiṇī caiva gāyatrī navamī smṛtā || 61 ||
viṣṇvante ca bhavenmuktiḥ sūryāṃ.ate pādavicyutiḥ ||
ripuṃkaraṃ bhavettasya yakṣe durgatimādiśet || 62 ||
anaṃte vipulā kīrtiḥ sarasvatyāṃ dhanāgamaḥ ||
brāhmyā brahmatvamāpnoti yakṣiṇyā yakṣamandiram || 63 ||
muktimāpnoti gāyatryā iti paṃktiphalodayaḥ ||
caturdhā pratibhaktiḥ syātpustakaṃ dharmanirmitam || 64 ||
brahmendravaiṣṇavaṃ śaivaṃ śāktikaṃ ca maheśvarī ||
brahmarūpaṃ cetihāsamaiṃdraṃ rāmāyaṇātmakam||65||
vaiṣṇavaṃ paramaṃ daivaṃ yacchaivaṃ tallalāṭakam ||
pāvako.asya tathā mūle madhye bhāge śatakratuḥ || 66 ||
agre sthitā grahāḥ sarve diśāmīśāstathā dvijāḥ ||
meruḥ sumeruruddiṣṭaḥ saṃgavānkāma ucyate || 67 ||
dvāvāpṛthivyau pātālaṃ tasyāṃtaḥ samudāhṛtam ||
paurāṇikakathāyuktapustako devapūjitaḥ || 68 ||
na śasyaḥ pūjanīyaśca gṛhe sthāpyeta mānavaḥ ||
yo yasmai śūdro viprāya vṛttiṃ dadyācca mānavaḥ || 69 ||
sa yāti brahmasadanaṃ maṇivartmādikuṭṭimam ||
na śasyaḥ pūjanīyaśca gṛhe sthāpyeta mānavaḥ ||2.1.7.70||
patrāṇāmagrabhāge tu vedhaṃ kuryātsuvartulam ||
śravaṇāttatra mātreṇa tatra padmaṃ ca vartulam || 71 ||
saṃhitāgamatantreṣu prativedhe ca saṃkulam ||
prakuryāccittatāpena tataḥ śakrapuraṃ vrajet || 72 ||
madhyaṃ tasya haredāyuḥ pārśvavedhaḥ śivaṃ haret ||
yugmavedhe jayaṃ dadyādekavedhe balirbhavet ||73||
paramaṃ prakṛterguhyaṃ sthānaṃ devairvinirmitam ||
pūrayettāmraliṃgena atha raityamayena vā ||74||
aśakto bilvakāṣṭhasya tathā śrīparṇikasya ca ||
na kāṣṭhasya navaṃ śasyaṃ na lauhaṃ yojayetkvacit || 75 ||
prāgāraṃbhaślokaśataṃ dharmaśāstrasya vai likhet ||
saṃhitāyāṃ purāṇāyāṃ yugmakalpaṃ tadardhakam|| 76 ||
brahmacaryeṇa vilikhenna mohādbrahmaṇaḥ kvacit ||
tathāpi cākhilavyāsa lekhanātsaṃtatikṣayaḥ || 77 ||
anāmātve hemayutāṃ balākaṃ cittameva ca ||
na likhetkhilabhāgaṃ ca harivaṃśasya sattamāḥ || 78 ||
gāruḍasya ca skāndasya na likhenmadhyatantrakam ||
lekhanaṃ harivaṃśasya vratastho niyamairyutaḥ || 79 ||
gṛhastho na likhedgraṃthaṃ likhecca mathurāṃ vinā ||
lekhane pārijātasya matsya māṃsāśinaṃ likhet || 2.1.7.80 ||
vālmīkisaṃhitāyāśca lekhane ca tathā kvacit ||
stotramātraṃ likhedviprā avratī na likhetkvacit || 81 ||
abrāhmaṇena likhitaṃ niṣphalaṃ parikīrtitam|| 82 ||
patitairapi pākhaṃḍairna strī vilikhati kvacit ||
durvicāro duṣṭabhāryo durmatiścāpi lekhakaḥ ||
na likheddharmaśāstraṃ ca purāṇaṃ stotrasaṃhitam || 83 ||
tacca prāpnuvankartavyaṃ suvarṇarajatasya ca ||
kajjalairmalinaṃ kuryānmantrī niryāsamaṃtritaiḥ || 84 ||
jīvantyāśca rasairyuktairmaṇikardamalolupaiḥ ||
vaṃgunyānmukhyāyutairvāpi pītayogairathāpi vā || 85 ||
kṛṣṇe vāyupradaṃ vidyātpīte vāyukṣayo bhavet ||
rakte puṣṭimavāpnoti kṛṣṇe ca saṃpadāgamaḥ ||86||
itihāsapurāṇānāṃ vilikhedyanmukhācchṛṇu ||
vāyavyādimukhenaiva kāṣṭhavedaṃ ca saṃlikhet || 87||
pūrvāmukhe cārthahāniruttare ca mukhe śriyaḥ ||
maraṇaṃ dakṣiṇāsye tu paścimāsye dhanakṣayaḥ ||88||
pitṛmedhe bhuvaḥ kaṃpe na likhejjanmavāsare ||
aśauce mṛtake sūtāvamāyāṃ ravisaṃkrame || 89 ||
atra lekhāddaridraḥ syāttathā putravināśanam ||
baladharmaṃ kṣayaṃ caiva tasmādyatnena varjayet || 2.1.7.90 ||
pitṛśrāddhadine lekhaḥ kulakṣayakaro bhavet ||
ekarātraṃ bhuvaḥ kaṃpe tasmi~mllekhe dhanakṣayaḥ ||91||
aśoce.api daridraḥ syājjanmāhe cāyuṣaḥ kṣayaḥ ||
lipicchaṃdaḥ padajñaśca yuvā dhīmāñjitāsanaḥ ||92||
drutalekhī ca tejasvī yo lekhayati lekhakaḥ ||
asaṃvalitabhāvena ūrdhvordhve syātsamākṣaram ||93||
lipiyuktaḥ samāyuktaḥ evāgamalekhakaḥ ||
nāṃdīnāgarakairvarṇaiḥ śuddhanāgarakairapi || 94 ||
kāmarūpākṣarairvāpi yāvacca saṃhitāgaṇaḥ ||
acetanena likhitaṃ yāvatkālaṃ pravartate || 95 ||
yāvadakṣarasaṃsthānaṃ tāvatsvarge mahīyate ||
anukto vācayedyastu dharmaśāstrasya vetanam || 96 ||
likhitvā yastu pāpātmā yāvadakṣara saṃkhyayā ||
tāvatkālaṃ tu narake pacyate nātra saṃśayaḥ || 97 ||
kuṭuṃbabharaṇārthaṃ tu gṛhṇīyādvāpi vetanam ||
na jīvati sa duṣṭātmā dhanavastraphalānvitaḥ || 98 ||
patitairaṃtyajairmlecchai rogī kuṣṭhī kṣayī tathā ||
rogī śilīpadaiścaiva mūko.api dharmasaṃhataḥ || 99 ||
etairvilikhitaṃ yacca dhārayenna gṛhāśramī ||
anāyuṣyakaraṃ yasmāttasmāttatparivarjayet || 2.1.7.100 ||
hīnāṃgā pratimā caiva pustakaṃ mānahīnakam ||
na kalau dhārayeddeha anāyuṣyakaraṃ bhavet || 101 ||
dvātriṃśadagulairyuktaṃ kartavyaṃ pustakottamam ||
sa vai nārāyaṇaḥ khyāto dhāraṇācca kuto.apyalam || 102 ||
catuviśāṃgulaṃ yacca tadvai svadhanamucyate ||
śaṃkaraḥ sa tu vijñeyo dharmakāmaphalapradaḥ || 103 ||
aṣṭāṃgulaṃ bhavedyacca tatkaniṣṭhamihocyate ||
tasmādbrahmamayaṃ jñeyaṃ trivarga phaladāyakam || 104 ||
tāḍitā jalapatre ca atha vā cāgurutvaci ||
etyāḥ patrakṛte mānaṃ bhūrje mānaṃ na vidyate || 105 ||
dvādaśāṃgulakaṃ yacca bhūrjataiḍādinirmitam ||
aṃgulānāṃ pramāṇaṃ yattenāpi jñānapustakam || 106 ||
hastasaṃsthāpite tasya tenāyuṣyakaraṃ bhavet ||
dharmaśāstrasya sāhasre dharmaśāstrasya vetanam || 107 ||
svargamārgasya gamane bhārate ca tadardhakam ||
harivaṃśe svarṇamāne kṛte mūlyasahasrake || 108 ||
yugeyuge pādahīnaṃ dharmaṃ kuryādyathāruci ||
praṇamya śirasā sarvānvyāsādīnsaṃhitāśrutān || 109 ||
jaiminiṃ ca tato vyāsaṃ śaṃkaraṃ ca tathā harim |||
namaskāramathaiṣāṃ tu ādimadhyāvasānake || 2.1.7.110 ||
tataḥ pravācayedvipro dharmaśāstrārthakovidaḥ ||
alakṣitamanāstadvadyadrūpaṃ spaṣṭamuccaran|| 111 ||
asaṃyuktākṣarapadaṃ spaṣṭabhāgasamanvitam ||
saptasvarasamāyuktaṃ saptanādavibhūṣitam || 112 ||
sāmagāthāḥ samāśritya rāgayuktāṃtaraṃ paṭhet||
maṇivāro dhanaṃ yatsyādgaurāṃdhāṃ saṃtikastathā || 113 ||
śrīrāgaścaiva hillolarāgo vājāvikastathā ||
evaṃ prakramamāṇena śṛṇuyāddharmasaṃhitāḥ || 114 ||
brāhmaṇaḥ kṣatriyo vaiśyaḥ śūdraścāpi viśeṣataḥ ||
aśvamedhamavāpnoti sarvānkāmānavāpnuyāt ||
pāpaiḥ pramucyate sarvairmahāpuṇyaṃ ca viṃdati || 115 ||
śūdrāṇāṃ purato vaiśyo vaiśyānāṃ kṣatriyaḥ paraḥ ||
kṣatriyāṃte tathā viprāḥ śṛṇuyuścāgrataḥ sadā || 116 ||
na śūdraḥ kathayeddharmāṃstapādhyāpane tathā ||
naihikatvaṃ paratvaṃ ca na śubhaṃ na parāṃ gatim || 117 ||
śūdreṇādhigataṃ nāsti viśeṣācchabdalakṣaṇam ||
yaddvijasya kṛto dāso brahmaṇā.avyaktayoninā ||118||
śvaśṛgālakharīkṣīramapeyaṃ hi yathā bhavet ||
evaṃ śūdramukhāddharmā na grāhyāḥ śabdasaṃskṛtāḥ ||119||
amedhyaṃ śudhyate toyaiḥ śūdraḥ śrotā hi śudhyati ||
evaṃ śūdro.apyaśuciḥ syādyadi vyākaraṇārthavit ||2.1.7.120||
yaḥ śūdra uddiśeddharmaṃ tathā cāgamavaidikam ||
sa vai vadhyo nareṃdreṇa jihvāṃ cakreṇa chedayet || ||| 121 ||
budhyamānaḥ sadā hyarthaṃ graṃthārthaṃ kṛtsnameva ca ||
ya evaṃ kathayetsamyaksa vipro vyāsa ucyate || 122 ||
vasetsa pattane grāme puṇye deśe sa kīrtitaḥ ||
te dhanyāste kṛtātmānaste kṛtārthā na saṃśayaḥ ||
vasaṃti pattane tasminvyākhyātā yatra saṃvaset || 123 ||
yathārkahīnaṃ divasaścaṃdrahīnā yathā niśā ||
na rarāja sabhā tadvadvyāsena rahitā dvijāḥ||124||
yadgṛhe naiva śiśavo na rarāja gṛhaṃ kvacit ||
yathaikato grahāḥ sarve ekatastu divākaraḥ ||
tathaiva sodara gehe dṛṣṭvā puṣkaradarśanam || 125 ||
iti śrībhaviṣye mahāpurāṇe madhyamaparvaṇi prathamabhāge saptamo.adhyāyaḥ || 7 || a ||
aṅkamāhātmyavarṇanam
|| sūta uvāca || ||
śṛṇudhvaṃ viprasaṃghātāḥ purāṇaṃ devasaṃmatam||
yacchrutvā mucyate pāpātpuruṣo brahmahatyayā||1||
tṛtīyaṃ śaivamākhyātaṃ tato bhāgavataṃ param||
paṃcamaṃ ca tathā mātsyaṃ bhaviṣyaṃ ṣaṣṭhamucyate ||2||
asāmarthye ca mātsyoktaṃ vaiṣṇavaṃ ca bhaviṣyakam ||
bhārate cāpi parvaṃ ca śāṃtibhaiṣmīyakaṃ tathā || 3 ||
parāśaramataṃ gṛhyaṃ gobhiloktāni yāni ca ||
kātyāyanoktamaparamabhyasennigamāditaḥ || 4 ||
aṃtareṇāgate martye śāstraṃ nādhyāpayetkvacit ||
ekarātraṃ gate martye trirātramajameṣayoḥ || 5 ||
maṃḍūke paṃcarātraṃ tu sarpe rātricatuṣṭayam ||
saṃvatsaraṃ tu turage gaje dvādaśavatsarān || 6 ||
māsamekaṃ khare kāke sthānatyāgānna kutracit ||
kerave vā rave caiva ahorātraṃ pracakṣate ||7||
trirātramapi mārjāre nakule mūṣake khare ||
haṃse dinamanadhyāyaṃ kṣudrajaṃtau na dūṣaṇam || 8 ||
adhyāpayedguroḥ putraṃ jñāninaṃ dhārmikaṃ śucim ||
bhaktaṃ śāṃtaṃ vaiṣṇavaṃ ca jitakrodhaṃ jiteṃdriyam || 9 ||
adhyātmādhyāpayedebhyaḥ śaṭhaṃ pāpaharaṃ dviṣam ||
anyāyenaiva yacchatamabhayaṃ dāṃbhikaṃ dviṣam||2.1.8.10||
nirarthakaṃ maṃtharaṃ ca viśuśrūṣumayājakam ||
ṣaṇḍaṃ caivānṛjuṃ kruddhaṃ kṛpaṇaṃ vyasanārthinam|| 11 ||
niṃdakaṃ cāvidhijñaṃ ca dūrataḥ parivarjayet ||
apracchannanataṃ brūyātputrapautrādikādṛte || 12 ||
vidyayā saha martavyaṃ na dadyācca pṛthagjane ||
ato vidyā vadatyevaṃ pāṭhayaṃtaṃ dvijottamam ||13||
mā dadyādbhaktihīnāya durjanāya durātmane ||
apramādāya viprāya śucaye brahmacāriṇe || || 14||
sārthakāya vidhijñāya sādhave dehi sattama ||
dadyādyadi niṣiddhāya vidyādhanamanuttamam || 15 ||
tayorekataro gacchedacireṇa yamakṣayam ||
anyāyena grahaṃ vidyāmanyaṃ pāṭhayate sukhāt || 16 ||
sa yāti narakaṃ ghoraṃ vidyāvarjyaḥ sa ucyate ||
ādhyātmikaṃ vaidikaṃ cālaukikaṃ vātha yo vadet||17||
mānamādau praṇamyātha tato.adhīyīta suvrataḥ ||
karmakāṃḍaṃ jyotiṣasya tadvinā na samabhyaset || 18||
cūtabhogasamabhyāsāddaridraścābhijāyate ||
vādabhāgasamabhyāsāddhananāśāya jāyate ||19||
nidhibhāgasamabhyāsājjāyate nārake kule||
yānyanuktāni śāstrāṇi mānanīyāni yāni ca ||2.1.8.20||
mlecchoktāni mahimnāni nābhyaseddūratastyajet ||
lokānāṃ jñānavṛddhyarthaṃ yaḥ kuryāddharmasaṃgraham || 21 ||
pravartayitvā sa gururbhavejjānapradaḥ pitā ||
jñānadātā ca lokānāṃ teṣu dharmaḥ pravartate||22||
nigamānāṃ jyotiṣāṇāṃ vedānāṃ nāṭakasya ca ||
vyākhyānasaṃgrahaṃ kṛtvā kalau nāśamavāpnuyāt ||23||
vedānāṃ dharbhaśāstrāṇāṃ purāṇānāṃ tathaiva ca ||
mīmāṃsājyotiṣāṃ caiva nāṭakānāṃ viraṃcinī||24||
bhāgāvasāne kathitaḥ purāṇādhyāya eva ca ||
puṣpakaśca paricchedaḥ khaṃḍaśca pratikhaṃḍakaḥ ||25||
vyavahāraścārthaśāstramaśvaśāstrasya caiva hi ||
yasya bhāgāvasāne tu prayoktavyaḥ sa eva hi|| ||26||
tatsaṃgrahepi kavinā niyoktavyaḥ sa eva hi||
yasya nātropadeśe tu pravartayati saṃgrahaḥ ||27||
tattadakṣarasakhyānāṃ brahmalokānna taccyutiḥ ||
na saṃgrahastaṃtramaṃtre vedamaṃtre ca varjayet ||28||
mohātkṛtvā homadhenuṃ dattvā śuddhirbhaviṣyati ||
kṛtvā cākhyāyikāgraṃthasvarūpānsa divaṃ vrajet || 29 |||
dharmaśāstrasya gamyasya vyavahārasya caiva hi ||
kalau yaḥ saṃgrahaṃ kuryātprasupte caiva keśave || 2.1.8.30 ||
yāvatpravartate lokastāvatsvarge mahīyate ||
siṃhe pauṣe ca caitre ca na kuryātsaṃgrahaṃ kvacit || 31 ||
prātaḥkāle na kurvīt tathā madhyaṃdine dvijāḥ ||
pakṣāṃte bhūbhidāhe ca bhuvaḥ kaṃpe dinakṣaye || 32 ||
malamāse viśeṣeṇa sandhyayośca vivarjane ||
amedhyāktaṃ ca patraṃ ca lipyakṣaravibhūṣitam || 33 ||
pūtaṃ syāttatkṣaṇādviprāścatuḥ paṃcākṣareṇa vā||
nārasiṃhasya vinyāse pūto bhavati tatkṣaṇāt || 34 ||
māyāvibhavavinyaste mahāpāpakalevare ||
muhūrtārdhena pūtatvaṃ prabhoryāṃti parāṃ gatim || 35 ||
striyo vā niṃdito vāpi mleccho yāti parāṃ gatim ||
yo mūḍho manyate doṣaṃ tasya śaucaṃ samācaret ||
sa gardabhīṃ kharīṃ yoniṃ praviśennātra saṃśayaḥ|| || 36 ||
ekamevātmakaṃ brahma tatprakṛtyātmakaṃ dvayam ||
navātmako bhairavaśca daśamaśca janārdanaḥ || 37 ||
rudra ekādaśaścaiva arkārkaścāpi dvādaśaḥ ||
trayoviṃśe ca bhūtātmā ṣaḍviṃśe manurīritaḥ || 38 ||
tithyātmakaṃ paṃcadaśe ṣoḍaśākhyā kalāparā ||
vātātmakaḥ saptadaśo mantraḥ samanuvartate ||39||
aṣṭādaśākṣaro maṃtraḥ purāṇātmaka eva ca ||
ūnaviṃśaścaṃdramāḥ syādviṃśo nārāyaṇo vapuḥ ||2.1.8.40||
jyotirmayaścaikaviṃśo dvāviṃśe keśavārcanam ||
nakṣatrāṇi trayoviṃśe caturviṃśe ca tānakam || 41 ||
paṃcaviṃśe ca tīrthāni ṣaḍviṃśe ca triyaṃbakaḥ ||
aṣṭāviṃśe dhaneśaśca ūnatriṃśe sarasvatī || 42 ||
triṃśadyoge śivaḥ proktaḥ pātālamekatriṃśake ||
ahorātraśca dvātriṃśe catustriṃśe ca jāhnavī || 43 ||
paṃcatriṃśe tadaṃtaḥ syācchate pūrṇe divākaraḥ ||
sahasre ca śivo jñeyaścāyute merurucyate || 44 ||
lakṣe brahmā tathā koṭyāṃ devo nārāyaṇaḥ paraḥ ||
puṃprakṛtyātmakaṃ cānyacchāradālipimātṛkā ||45||
śuddhabrahmamayaṃ nityaṃ jñānarūpaṃ paraṃ mahat ||
yasminna vyasanādeva śucau cāpyaśucisthale ||
kṣaṇe brahmamayaṃ yāti ityāha bhagavānmanuḥ || 46 ||
iti śrībhaviṣye mahāpurāṇe madhyamaparvaṇi prathamabhāgeṃ.akamāhātmyakathanaṃ nāmāṣṭamo.adhyāyaḥ || 8 || || cha ||
pūrtanirṇayavarṇanam
|| sūta uvāca || ||
aṃtarvediṃ pravakṣyāmi brahmaṇoktaṃ yugāṃtare ||
bahirvedaṃ tathaivoktaṃ śastaṃ syāddvāpare kalau || 1 ||
jñānasādhyaṃ tu yatkarma aṃtarvedīti kathyate ||
devatāsthāpanaṃ pūjā bahiveṃdirudāhṛtā || 2 ||
prapāpūrtādikaṃ caiva brāhmaṇānāṃ ca toṣaṇam ||
gurubhyaḥ paricaryā ca bahirvedī dvidhā matā || 3 ||
akāmena kṛtaṃ karma karma ca vyasanādikam ||
aṃtarvedī tadevoktaṃ bahirvedī viparyayaḥ || 4 ||
dharmasya kāraṇaṃ rājā dharmametadbhavennṛpaḥ ||
tasmānnṛpaṃ samāśritya bahirvedī tato bhavet || 5 ||
saptāśītirbahirvedī sārameṣāṃ tṛtīyakam ||
devatāsthāpanaṃ caiva prāsādakaraṇaṃ tathā || 6 ||
taḍāgakaraṇaṃ caiva tṛtīyaṃ na caturthakam ||
paṃcamaṃ pitṛpūjā ca gurupūjāpuraḥsarā || 7 ||
adhivāsaḥ pratiṣṭhā ca devatānāmavikriyā ||
pratimākaraṇaṃ caiva vṛkṣāṇāmatha ropaṇam || 8 ||
trividhā sā vinirdiṣṭā uttamā cātha madhyamā ||
kaniṣṭhā śeṣakalpaśca sarvakāryeṣvayaṃ vidhiḥ || 9 ||
tridhā bhavati sarvatra pratiṣṭhādividhirmataḥ ||
pūjāhomādibhirdānairmānataśca tribhāgataḥ || 2.1.9.10 ||
tryahasādhyavidhānena aṣṭāviṃśatidevatāḥ ||
tridhā bhavati sarvatra pratiṣṭhādividhirmataḥ || 11 ||
pratyahaṃ pūjayettatra jāpakāstatra ṣoḍaśa ||
uttamo.asau vidhiḥ kṛtsno hyaśvamedhaphalapradaḥ || 12 ||
catvāro yājakāstatra trayoviṃśatidevatāḥ ||
brahadikpāla vāruṇyaṃ pṛthivī ca śivastathā || 13 ||
ekāhenaiva pūjā ca madhyamaḥ kathito vidhiḥ ||
gaṇeśagrahadikpālānvaruṇaṃ ca śivaṃ tathā || 14 ||
saṃpūjya pūjyate yatra kaniṣṭho.asau vidhiḥ smṛtaḥ ||
ekavṛkṣaścaikarūpaiḥ pratimākṣudradevatāḥ || 15 ||
nalinīdīrghikāgartavāpīmalaprapādikam ||
eṣāṃ saṃskārakāryeṣu pratimānāṃ pariṣkriyā || 16 ||
agnikāryaṃ tataḥ kṛtvā na kuryādvidhivistaram ||
gaṇeśagrahadikpālānpūjayedupacārataḥ || 17 ||
vāpyādeḥ puṣkariṇyāśca kṣipedgaṃgājalaṃ tataḥ ||
ulūkhaladvayenāpi jīrṇānāṃ tu kadācana || 18 ||
setuprāsādavāpīnāṃ pratiṣṭhāṃ naiva kārayet ||
prāsādaḥ setavaścaiva taḍāgādyāstathaiva ca || 19 ||
tribhirvarṇaiḥ pratiṣṭhārhā jīrṇānāṃ tu samudgatāḥ ||
munayo mānamicchaṃti amānaṃ na hi dṛśyate || 2.1.9.20 ||
tasmānmānaṃ pravakṣyāmi yanmānaṃ yādṛśaṃ phalam ||
ṣaṣṭihastapramāṇena taduktaṃ vāraṇoditam || 21 ||
ekaṣaṣṭihastamitaṃ prāsādaṃ cottamaṃ viduḥ ||
madhyaṃ tadardhaṃ vijñeyaṃ kaniṣṭhaṃ tatparaṃ smṛtam || 22 ||
atha vā devamānena kartavyaṃ bhūtimicchatā ||
yastaḍāgaṃ navaṃ kṛtvā jīrṇaṃ vā navatāṃ nayet || || 23 ||
sarvaṃ kulaṃ samuddhṛtya svargaloke mahīyate ||
vāpīkūpataḍāgāśca udyānapravahāstathā || 24 ||
punaḥ punaśca saṃskāryo labhate mauktikaṃ phalam ||
guṇānāṃ ca pramāṇena pratimānaṃ vibhāgataḥ || 25 ||
dviśatena śatenāpi prāsādasyaiṣa niścayaḥ ||
sahasrahastavistāraṃ dairghyeṇāṣṭādhikaṃ bhavet || 26 ||
taḍāgaṃ taṃ vijānīyātprathamaṃ mānamīritam ||
madhyaṃ catuḥśatenāpi prastāve daśahīnakam || 27 ||
kaniṣṭhaṃ triśataṃ caiva prasthe syādviṃśahīnakam ||
tadardhena kalau jñeyaṃ tadardhena tadardhakam || 28 ||
taḍāgamānaṃ vijñeyaṃ trivargaphaladāyakam ||
atha puṣkariṇīpakṣe dve śate mānamuttamam || 29 ||
taḍāge dviguṇā nemī mānārdhe gartamīritam ||
tatkṣetraṃ vāruṇaṃ sthānaṃ tryuditaṃ tadbahiḥ smṛtam || 2.1.9.30 ||
caturthaṃ caiva gāṃdharvaṃ paiśācaṃ paṃcamaṃ viduḥ ||
yakṣasthānamitā bhāge evaṃ sarvakramāṇi hi || 31 ||
aśītihastamānena nalinyā maṇirucyate ||
pañcahīnaṃ ca prastāve evaṃ mānavido viduḥ || 32 ||
ṣaṣṭihastena nalinī prastāve turyahīnakam ||
catuḥṣaṣṭihastamitā dīrghikā ca prakīrtitā || 33 ||
turyahīnaṃ ca prastāve garte mānaṃ na vidyate || 34 ||
agnau rogo baṃdhunāśaśca yāmyāṃ mṛtyuścograḥ prāpyate rākṣase ca ||
bhītiścogrā prāpyate vāyavīye tasmādetā varjanīyāḥ prayatnāt || 35 ||
viprādīnāṃ devatānāṃ samāje merusthāne yatra tatraiva kuryāt ||
nadyāstīre varjayedvā smaśāne taḍāgādvai āśramādīñjanānām || 36 ||
yadā pratiṣṭhāṃ na karoti mūḍhaḥ prāsādavāpyādiṣu pāpacetāḥ ||
bhayaṃ samāpnoti ca pāpamugraṃ pade.ahinā vai vadhabhāgitāṃ vrajet || 37 ||
yadā tu dīrghāsarasītaḍāgaprāsādakūpādiṣu nirmitāni ||
kurvaṃti cānyāni yadā makhāni bhavaṃti naivāsya phalapradāni ||38||
yadapratiṣṭheṣu nipānakeṣu prāsādakūpeṣu vanādikeṣu ||
pratiṣṭhite yatphalamāpnuvaṃti phalaṃ tadālpālpakamāhurasya ||39 ||
tasmātpratiṣṭhāṃ vidhinā jalādeḥ kuryādyatheṣṭaṃ prayato manuṣyaḥ ||
puṇyārjanenaiva dhanena kāle svavittasādhyena śubhāśayena || 2.1.9.40 ||
prasāde mṛnmayaṃ puṇyaṃ mayaitatkathitaṃ dvijāḥ ||
tasmāccaturguṇaṃ proktaṃ tṛṇakāṣṭhamaye tathā || 41 ||
tṛṇamaye śatamayaṃ tadardhaṃ navavalkale ||
tasmāddaśaguṇaṃ proktaṃ kṛte dārumaye bhavet|| 42 ||
tato daśaguṇaṃ proktamiṣṭikāracite śubhe ||
tasmācchataguṇaṃ śaile sahasraṃ tāmraraupyake || 43 ||
tataśca śatasāhasraṃ sauvarṇe dvijasattamāḥ ||
anaṃtaphalamāpnoti ratnādi racite tathā || 44 ||
yadatītaṃ bhaviṣyacca kulānāmayutaṃ naraḥ ||
viṣṇulokaṃ nayatyāśu kārayitvā harergṛham|| 45 ||
kaniṣṭhaṃ madhyamaṃ śreṣṭhaṃ kārayitvā harergṛham ||
ardhaṃ ca vaiṣṇavaṃ lokaṃ mokṣaṃ ca labhate kramāt || 46 ||
hastānāṃ poḍaśairyāvatprasthe syātkarahīnakam||
tṛṇavaṃśamaye mānaṃ madhyaṃ cārkakaraṃ bhavet || 47 ||
kaniṣṭhaṃ tārahastaṃ syāduttamaṃ paṃcaviṃśatiḥ ||
sarvottamaṃ ca dvātriṃśaccatuṣkoṇe mahāphalam || 48 ||
puradvāraṃ ca kartavyaṃ caturasraṃ samaṃ bhavet ||
aṣṭakoṇaṃ na kartavyaṃ tripuraṃ ca kalau yuge || 49 ||
suraveśmani yāvaṃto dvijendrāḥ paramāṇavaḥ ||
tāvadvarṣasahasrāṇi svargaloke mahīyate || 2.1.9.50 ||
karturdaśaguṇaṃ proktamāpānaparipālakaḥ ||
patitānyuddharedyastu sa sarvaṃ phalamaśnute || 51 ||
patitaṃ patamānaṃ ca tathārddhasphuṭitaṃ tathā ||
samuddhṛtya harerveśma dviguṇaṃ phalamāpnuyāt || 52 ||
patitasya tu yaḥ kartā patamānasya rakṣitā ||
viṣṇoradhitalasyaiva mānavaḥ svargabhāgbhavet || 53 ||
yaḥ kuryādviṣṇuprāsādaṃ jyotirliṃgasya vā kvacit ||
sūryasyāpi viriṃceśca durgāyāḥ śrīdharasya ca || 54 ||
svayaṃ svakulamuddhṛtya kalpakoṭiṃ vaseddivi ||
svargādbhraṣṭo bhavedrājā dhanī pūjyatamopi vā || 55 ||
devīliṃgeṣu yonau vā kṛtvā devakulaṃ naraḥ ||
smaratvaṃ prāpnuyālloke pūjito divi sarvadā || 56 ||
prāvṛṭkāle sthitaṃ toyamagniṣṭomaphalaṃ labhet ||
śaratkālasthitaṃ toyaṃ yajñatoyādviśiṣyate || 57 ||
nidāghakāle pānīyaṃ yasya tiṣṭhati vāpinaḥ ||
svargaṃ gacchetsa narakaṃ na kadācidavāpnuyāt || 58 ||
ekāhaṃ tu sthitaṃ toyaṃ pṛthivyāṃ dvijasattamāḥ ||
kulāni tārayettasya sapta sapta parāṇi ca || 59 ||
pūrvaṃ pitṛkule sapta tadvanmātṛkule dvijāḥ ||
caturdaśamidaṃ jñeyaṃ śatalekhaṃ tataḥ śṛṇu || 2.1.9.60 ||
piturūrdhvaṃ kulaṃ viṃśaṃ māturūrdhva kulaṃ tathā ||
tadvatparaṃ vijānīyādbhāryāyāḥ paṃca eva ca || 61 ||
paṃca vai mātṛtaścāsya piturmātāmahe kule ||
paṃca paṃca vijānīyānmāturmātāmahasya ca || 62 ||
guroḥ pitṛkule paṃca tasya mātṛkule tathā ||
ācāryasya kule dvaṃdvaṃ daśarājakulasya ca || 63 ||
rājño mātāmahakule paṃca caiva prakīrtitāḥ ||
ekottaraṃ śatakulaṃ parisaṃkhyātameva ca ||64||
ātmanā saha vipreṃdrā uddhāraḥ saṃmataḥ smṛtaḥ ||
kuryāddevārcanaṃ tīrthe svavimukte daśārṇave ||65||
samuddharetkulaśataṃ śṛṇu viṃśakulaṃ dvija ||
paṃca paṃca ca pitrośca piturmātāmahasya ca || 66 ||
māturmātāmahasyaiva jātiṃ dvaṃdvamudāhṛtam||
guroḥ saṃtānake dvaṃdvaṃ tadvadyādavasāttvatau ||67||
parapakṣasya caikaṃ syādekaviṃśaṃ kulaṃ kramāt||
pānīyametatsakalaṃ trailokyaṃ sacarācaram|| || 68 ||
pānīyena vinā vṛttirloke nāstīti karhicit||
vārasvasthaṃ puṣpakhaṃḍaṃ toye patati yāvati ||69||
tāvatkālaṃ vasetsvarge cānte brahmatvamāpnuyāt ||
tasmāttoyopari gṛhaṃ prasādopari varjayet||2.1.9.70||
sūryaraśmiyutaṃ yadvai tattoyaṃ tu viniṃdatam||
caṃdraraśmivihīnaṃ yannāmṛtatvāya kalpate ||71||
tasmāddaśaguṇaṃ kuṃḍe tasmāddaśaguṇaṃ hrade||
devānāṃ sthāpanaṃ kuryādavimuktaphalaṃ śubham ||72||
susthitaṃ duḥsthitaṃ vāpi śivaliṃgaṃ na cālayet ||
cālanādrauravaṃ yāti na svargaṃ na ca svargabhāk ||73||
ucchannagaragrāme sthānatyāge ca viplave ||
punaḥ saṃsāradharmeṇa sthāpayedavicārayan||74||
bāhudaṃtādipratimā viṣṇoścānyasya sattamāḥ||
na cālayetsthāpite ca vipravṛkṣaṃ na cālayet ||4||
keśavaṃ harivṛkṣaṃ ca madhūkaṃ kiṃśukaṃ tathā||
nākāle sthāpayejjātu cālanādbrahmahā bhaveta||76||
devālayasya purataḥ kuryātpuṣkariṇī dvijāḥ||
brāhmaṇānāṃ samāje ca rājadvāre catuṣpathe||77||
devātheṃ brāhmaṇārthe ca mukhaṃ kuryācca sarvataḥ ||
paścime puṣṭikāmaṃ tu uttare sarvakāmadam || 78 ||
yāmye svārthaṃ na kurvīta koṇe tu narakaṃ bhavet ||
mukhaṃ prakalpayenmadhye keciduttaralaṃghanam || 79 ||
kuryāddakṣiṇapūrve tu arkahastapramāṇataḥ ||
taḍāge tu phalāhastaṃ hastikaṃ hrāsayetkramāt || 2.1.9.80 ||
tṛpye hastaṃ nalinyādāvato hīnaṃ na kārayet ||
gartatṛṇaṃ kalāhastaṃ taḍāge.atra pracakṣyate || 81 ||
hīne hīnataraṃ kuryāddhastamānena hrāsayet ||
yūpastathā khādira eva kāryaḥ śraiparṇiko dhātrisamudbhavaśca ||
mānastathā ṣoḍaśahastasammito ratnātsagaṇḍīyugakāmayojitaiḥ || 82 ||
ānāhabhagne ca bhavecca tasya viṃśāṃ gulo dviguṇo madhyagaśca ||
madhyeṃ.agulaiśca hīnaḥ kāryaḥ śubhadaḥ sarvadā syāt || 83 ||
evaṃvidhaścaiva taḍāgayūpo madhye tathā ṣoḍaśahastasaṃmitaḥ ||
kūpe ca yūpopyatha hastamātrastataścaturhastamitaḥ prakīrtitaḥ || 84 ||
ārāmayoge.apyatha maṇḍape ca kāryaścaturhastamito.atha yūpaḥ ||
saṃpūrṇamāne kathitaṃ pramāṇaṃ hīne tu hīnaṃ pravadaṃti tajjñāḥ ||
hastadvayaṃ prāpitavyaṃ taḍāge hastaḥ sārdhaḥ puṣkariṇyāṃ praropaḥ ||85||
prādeśaṃ vai hastamānaṃ kūpayūpasya ropataḥ ||
na kuryājjalamagnaṃ ca yūpaṃ sarvatra sattamāḥ || 86 ||
taḍāge cāpi ārāme sthāpayecca jalopari ||
hastamardhaṃ tadardhaṃ syānmānenānena dāpayet ||
vāpyāṃ garte puṣkariṇyāṃ prakuryājjalasaṃmitam || 87 || yāvatpratolīgatareṇusaṃgasaṃkhyāgaṇo no jaratāmupaiti ||
tāvatsureśaḥ suralokavāsī prāsādakṛjjātu na jāyate hi ||88||
kiṃ vā vācyaḥ puṣkariṇyā prabhāvaḥ kartā yaḥ syādvāruṇo brahmalokāt ||
yāvatkālo bāhumātroddhatā syād dṛṣṭiḥproktā na nivartetkadācit || 89 || lakṣaikamārāmamayottamaḥ syānmadhyaṃ tadardhaṃ ca kaniṣṭhamānam ||
tadardhaṃ vā praśastaṃ tadananyaṃ munayo vadaṃti ||
vinārjunairbadaraiḥ śailukaiśca hīnaṃ kuryācchānalaiḥ pātilaiśca || 2.1.9.90 ||
iti śrībhaviṣye mahāpurāṇe madhyamaparvaṇi prathamabhāge pūrtanirṇayo nāma navamo.a dhyāyaḥ || 9 ||. |||7|||
pūrtanirṇayavarṇanam
|| sūta uvāca || ||
śodhayetprathamaṃ bhūmiṃ mitāṃ kṛtvā tato dvijāḥ ||
daśahastena daṇḍena pañcahastena vā punaḥ || 1 ||
vāhayetsadā vṛṣabhaistaḍāgārthe.api bhūmikām ||
devāgārasya yā bhūmiḥ śvetaiśca vṛṣabhairapi || 2 ||
yā bhūmirgrahayāgārthe tanna vāhairapi spṛśet ||
ārāmārthe kṛṣṇavṛṣaiḥ kṛṣārthakhananairapi || 3 ||
vāhayettridinaṃ viprāḥ pañcavrīhīṃśca vāpayet ||
devapakṣe saptaguṇa ārāmakaraṇe guṇaḥ || 4 ||
mudgamāṣau dhānya tilāḥ śyāmākaśceti pañcamaḥ ||
masūraśca kalāyaśca saptavrīhigaṇaḥ smṛtaḥ || 5 ||
sarṣapaśca kalāyaśca mudgo māṣaścaturthakaḥ ||
vrīhitrayaṃ māṣamudgau śyāmāko mahiṣo gaṇaḥ || 6 ||
suvarṇamṛttikā grāhyā varṇānāmanupūrvaśaḥ ||
bilvavṛkṣairiyaṃ kuryādyūpaśūnadhvaje dine ||7||
aratnimātraṃ vijñeyaṃ praśastaṃ yaṣṭihastakam ||
ūrṇāsūtramayīṃ mūrtiṃ kṛtvā kuryāccatuṣṭayam || 8 ||
kṣīradārugartayutaṃ dvādaśāṃgulameva ca ||
jvālayettilatailena tathā keśarajena vā| || 9 ||
pūrvadikpraṇave siddhiḥ paścimāśāgatiḥ śubhā ||
maraṇe dakṣiṇāyāṃ ca hāniḥ syāduttare sthite || 2.1.10.10 ||
kalpe vipatkaraṃ vidyāttathā caiva ca diggate ||
nārasiṃhena manunā cāgniṃ prajvālya dāpayet || 11 ||
māse ghaṭe tathā māsaṃ kuryādbhūmiparigraham ||
sūtrayetkīlayetpaścānmahāmāne dvijottamāḥ || 12 ||
tato vāstubaliṃ dadyātkhanitraṃ paripūjayet ||
ābrahmanniti mantreṇa khanayenmadhyadeśataḥ || 13 ||
ājyena madhuyuktena gātramekaṃ pralepayet ||
svarṇatoyaistathā ratnatoyaiḥ snātvā pralepayet || 14 ||
īśānābhimukhenaiva kūpapakṣe vidurbudhāḥ ||
akṛtvā vāstuyāgaṃ ca yastaḍāgaṃ samutsṛjet || 15 ||
tasya vaivasvato rājā dharmasyārdhaṃ nikṛntati ||
prāsāde ca tathārāme mahākūpe tathaiva ca || 16 ||
gṛhāraṃbhe ca vipreṃdrā dadyādvāstu baliṃ tataḥ ||
śālaiśca khādiraiścaiva palāśaiḥ keśarasya ca |17||
bilvasya bakulasyaiva kalau yūpaḥ praśasyate ||
śunā cakrodarakṛtaṃ tatpārśve tu dhvajadvayam || 18 ||
sarpākārastaḍāge ca kūpe kumbhākṛtirbhavet ||
ārāme padmapuṣpābhaśchatrakārastu maṃḍale ||19||
kuryācchunākṛtiṃ setau viṣṇugehe gadākṛtim ||
aśvākāraṃ cāśvamedhe naramedhe narākṛtim ||2.1.10.20||
goyāge ca vṛṣākāraṃ gṛhayāge dhvajākṛtim ||
śmaśānagopracārārthaṃ caityavṛkṣālayottamāḥ || 21 ||
cakrākāro lakṣahome koṭihome halākṛtiḥ ||
nakṣatrāṇi tathā mūlaṃ śasyate drumaropaṇe || 22 ||
evaṃ śasyoditāṃ bhūmiṃ śuddhāṃ pūrvaplavānvitām ||
parigṛhya yajeddevaṃ vanapālaṃ śikhidhvajam ||23||
somaṃ ca nāgarājānaṃ tato bījaṃ suśodhayet ||
ānayeddhārayetpaścādraudratāpena tāpayet|| ||24||
dinadvayāṃtare caiva maṃtraiśca parimaṃtrayet ||
garbhādhānaṃ tataḥ kuryādviṣṇumaṃtraṃ japaṃstridhā || 25 ||
evamasyeti maṃtreṇa tridhā japtvā vimārjayet ||
dehi meti ca maṃtreṇa saṃprokṣya daśavāriṇā ||26||
ityagṛhītamanunā pañcadhā parimaṃtritam ||
tryaṃbakeneti maṃtreṇa bījamāropayettataḥ || 27 ||
bhāryāmṛtumatīṃ snātvā pañcame.ahani sattamāḥ ||
utsaṃge sthāpayitvā ca cumbayenmaṃtrayettataḥ || 28 ||
evaṃ vṛkṣasya saṃskāramadhye.api tvanugacchati ||
tena putratvamāpnoti nātra kāryā vicāraṇā || 29 ||
tulasyā bījamādāya vaiṣṇavarkṣe dvijo.ahani ||
khānayedapi gomūtrabiṃdutoyaiḥ prasecayet || 2.1.10.30 ||
etāṃ tu svargamāpnoti sitakuṃbhe nipātayet ||
ekarātraṃ paristhāpya tata āropayedbhuvi || 31 ||
avidhau kūpavāpyādau khanane sūyate kvacit ||
kurvaṃti sahakārādiropaṇaṃ ye narādhamāḥ ||
labhaṃte na phalaṃ teṣāmiha cābhyetyadhogatim || 32 ||
nadītīre śmaśāne ca svagṛhasya ca dakṣiṇe ||
tulasīropaṇaṃ kṛtvā yāti kartā yamālayam || 33 ||
patrapuṣpaphalānāṃ ca rajoreṇusamāgamāḥ ||
poṣayaṃti ca pitaraṃ pratyahaṃ pratikarmaṇi || 34 ||
yastu vṛkṣaṃ prakurute chāyāpuṣpaphalopagam ||
pathi devālaye cāpi pāpāttārayate pitṛrn||
kīrtiśca mānuṣe loke pratyabhyeti śubhaṃ phalam || 35 ||
atītānāgatāścātaḥ pitṛrnsa svargato dvijāḥ||
tārayedvṛkṣaropī ca tasmādvṛkṣaṃ praropayeta ||36||
aputrasya hi putrattvaṃ pādapā iha kurvate ||
yatnenāpi ca vipreṃdrā aśvatthāropaṇaṃ kuru || 37 ||
śataiḥ putrasahasrāṇāmeka eva viśiṣyate ||
kāmena ropayedviprā ekadvitriprasaṃkhyayā || 38 ||
muktihetuḥ sahasrāṇāṃ lakṣakoṭīni yāni ca ||
dhanī cāśvatthavṛkṣe ca aśokaḥ śokanāśanaḥ ||39||
plakṣo bhāryāpradaścaiva bilva āyuṣyadaḥ smṛtaḥ ||
dhanaprado jaṃbu vṛkṣo brahmadaḥ plakṣavṛkṣakaḥ || 2.1.10.40 ||
tiṃdukātkulavṛddhiḥ syāddāḍimī kāminīpradaḥ ||
bakulo vaṃjulaścaiva pāpahā balabuddhidaḥ || 41 ||
svargapradā dhātakī syādvaṭo mokṣapradāyakaḥ ||
sahakāraḥ kāmaprado guvākaḥ siddhimādiśet || 42 ||
sarvaśasyaṃ balabale madhuke cārjune tathā ||
kadaṃbe vipulā kīrtistiṃtiḍī dharmadūṣikaḥ || 43 ||
jīvaṃtyā rogaśāṃtiḥ syātkeśaraḥ śatrumardanaḥ ||
dhanapradaścaiva vaṭo vaṭaḥ śvetavaṭastathā || 44 ||
panase maṃdabuddhiḥ syātkali vṛkṣaḥ śriyaṃ haret ||
kalivṛkṣaṃ ca śākhoṭa udarāvartakaṃ tathā || 45 ||
tathā ca markaṭīnīparopaṇātsaṃtatikṣayaḥ ||
śiṃśapāṃ cārjunaṃ caiva jayaṃtī haya mārakān ||
śrīvṛkṣaṃ kiṃśukaṃ caiva ropaṇātsvargamādiśet || 46 ||
na pūrvāṃ ropayejjātu samidhaṃ kaṃṭakīdrumam ||
kuśaṃ padmaṃ jalajānāṃ ropaṇāddurgatiṃ vrajet || 45 ||
maṃdāre kulahāniḥ syācchālmale śukabuddhimān ||
niṃbe paśuvināśaḥ syācchatrāke kulapāṃsalaḥ || 48 ||
utpanne kulapātaḥ syā tpaśoreva kṣayo bhavet ||
śatruvṛddhiḥ kākanāde balapūge hataśriyaḥ || 49 ||
vinā kratau viruddhaśca na siṃhaṃ dvijasattamāḥ ||
kratau hi syādviruddhaśca prāpnuyānnarakākṛtim || 2.1.10.50 ||
sahakārasahasrāttu variṣṭhaṃ dhātakīdvayam ||
tasmāccaiva sahasrāddhi pāṭalaikā viśiṣyate || 51 ||
pāṭalānāṃ śatātpaścādekaraktavaṭo bhavet ||
vaṭānāṃ dvisahasrācca paṃcakaṃ nāgakeśaram || 52 ||
tasmādvariṣṭhaḥ śrīvṛkṣo jaṃbūvṛkṣaḥ praśasyate ||
tasmāddhimavato jñeyaḥ śrīparṇīvṛkṣa uttamaḥ || 53 ||
tiṃdukasya trayaścaiva jaṃbūvṛkṣasya paṃcakam ||
kadaṃbārjunavṛkṣasya nārikerasya ca trayam ||
evamuktvā sa dharmātmā kārayetkīdṛśaṃ balam || 54 ||
kalpakoṭisahasrāṇi kalpakoṭiśatāni ca ||
svargabhogaṃ samaśnāti vidhivaddrumaropaṇe || 55 ||
janmatrayādikaṃ pāpaṃ vināśya svargamādiśet ||
śataropī ca brahmatvaṃ viṣṇutvaṃ ca sahasrake || 56 ||
tulasīropaṇāccaitra ādhivyādhiyuto bhavet ||
vaiśākhe kīrtimāpnoti jyeṣṭhe tu maraṇaṃ vrajet || 57 ||
āṣāḍhe kīrtimāpnoti śrāvaṇe paramāṃ gatim ||
bhādre dhanāgamaścaiva āśvine kārtike kṣayaḥ ||
tulasī trividhā loke kṛte śvetā praśasyate || 58 ||
kiṃcicchedaṃ ca yaḥ kuryādaśvatthasya vaṭasya ca ||
śrīvṛkṣasya ca vipreṃdrāḥ sa bhavedbrahmaghātakaḥ || 59 ||
mūlacchedena vipreṃdrāḥ kulapāto bhavedanu ||
vṛkṣacchedī bhavenmūka ādhivyādhiśataṃ bhajet ||
sāyaṃ prātaśca gharmāṃte śītakāle dināṃtare || 2.1.10.60 ||
phalamāmakulatthaśca māṣo mudgāstilā yavāḥ ||
nṛtyagītapayaḥkeśaphalapuṣpaprado bhavet || 61 ||
avikākasakṛccūrṇaṃ yavacūrṇāni yāni ca ||
gomāṃsamudakaṃ caiva saptarātraṃ nidhāpayet || 62 ||
tamekaṃ sarvavṛkṣāṇāṃ phalapuṣpādivṛddhidam ||
rohimatsyasya pittāni dhānyākaṃ tatra sthāpayet || 63 ||
tenodakādisekaśca kṛto vai vṛddhimādiśet ||
tittiḍībījamādāya ikṣudaṃḍena mardayet ||64||
tenāśoke prasekaḥ syātsahakārasya vṛddhimān ||
nālikerodakaṃ caiva mākṣikaiḥ saha secayet || 65 ||
dohadaṃ sarvavṛkṣāṇāṃ pūgādīnāṃ viśeṣataḥ ||
daśaśirābījayutādabhiṣekācca jīvati || 66 ||
prākprasūtirgavādīnāṃ chāgādimahiṣasya ca ||
jarāsu toyaṃ vṛkṣāgre sthāpayedavicārayan || 67 ||
parasya sahakārasya phalaṃ syānnātra saṃśayaḥ ||
meṣasya ca vitālasya yavāgūṃ ca samāharet || 68 ||
tatra māsaiḥ sarṣapaiśca pūrayenmardayettataḥ ||
guvākavṛkṣakaṃ deva gharṣayenmardayettribhiḥ || 69 ||
mṛto.api jīvayecchīghraṃ mriyamāṇo.api jīvati ||
niṃbapatraṃ yogapatraṃ śatāvaripunarnavām || 2.1.10.70 ||
kṣīrikātāmrakaiḥ patrairdhūmaṃ dadyāddinatrayam ||
sahakārasya mūlena kīṭa rodho na jāyate || 71 ||
tataḥ prādhānyato vakṣye drumāṇāṃ dohado.anyathā ||
matsyodakena siktena āmrāṇāṃ vṛddhiriṣyate || 72 ||
pakvāmraṃ rudhiraṃ caiva dāḍimānāṃ praśasyate ||
yavodakaṃ sagomāṃsaṃ ketakīnāṃ praśasyate || 73 ||
kṣīrake balavṛddhiḥ syāttiṃdukaḥ karamardakaḥ ||
māṃsapūti rasāmajjā śokatāle guvākake || 74 ||
sapūtimāṃsaṃ saghṛtaṃ nālikerasya rohitam ||
madhuyaṣṭyudakaiḥ sekātsāmānyaṃ nihitaṃ bhavet || 75 ||
kapitthabilvayoḥ sekaṃ guḍatoyena secayet ||
jātīnāṃ mallikānāṃ ca kuṃdānāṃ raṃtikasya ca || 76 ||
gaṃdhatoyasitakaraṃ sarpanirmokadhūpakam ||
kūrmamāṃsamannarasaṃ viḍaṃgasya ca puṣpakam || 77 ||
rathyāvṛkṣe pratiṣṭhāpya phalavāñjāyate tataḥ ||
vātasarpasya nirmokaṃ tagarājagavasya ca || 78 ||
dadyāddhūpaṃ dhānyamadhye dhānyavṛddhiśca jāyate ||
mayūrapatramādāyacchāgaromāṇi sapta vai || 79 ||
eraṃḍatailayogena dadyāddhūpaṃ niśāgame ||
hiṃgukusumasaṃyogānmūṣikāṇāṃ parinyaset || 2.1.10.80 ||
kariviṣṭhāmṛcchaviṣṭhāṃ kṛttikāyāṃ samāharet ||
niśātoye prasekaḥ syāttatkṣātramūlakaṃ haret || 81 ||
aśvatthamūle daśahastamātraṃ kṣetraṃ pavitraṃ puruṣottamasya ||
aśvatthacchāyāsalilasya madhye viśeṣato vai tripathaiva gaṃgā || 82 ||
bāhuviṃśāṃtare ropetsahakāraṃ sa dharmavit ||
kalāhastāṃtaraṃ dhātrī bakulaṃ vaṃjulaṃ tathā || 83 ||
śraiparṇikaṃ ca punnāgaṃ śrīvṛkṣaṃ dviguṇaṃ tarau ||
haste śailamaye caiva uttamaṃ mānamīritam || 84 ||
śaileṣṭakādiracite caturhaste tu saṃmite ||
vāpyādīnāṃ tu kūpānāmekavṛkṣādikasya ca || 85 ||
śrīviṣṇorvṛkṣapakṣe ca varuṇeṣṭaṃ ca kūpake ||
gaṇeśaṃ pūjayetkumbhaṃ dikpālāṃśca viśeṣataḥ || 86 ||
agnikāryaṃ vinā kuryātprakuryācca satāṃ gatim ||
śrutvā kṛtiṃ vidhānena anyeṣāṃ vā tathodbhavam || 87 ||
anyeṣāṃ caiva vṛkṣe ca tathā ca tulasīvane ||
kumbhe vanaspatiḥ sthāpyaḥ pūjayeddhomayettataḥ|| 88 ||
vṛkṣānvānena saṃskṛtya vāsobhirabhiveṣṭayet ||
śucyamānamidaṃ jñeyamanyeṣāṃ vā tathodbhavam || 89 ||
tulasyāḥ sahakārasya brahmavṛkṣasya caiva hi ||
aśvatthasya vaṭasyaiva svarṇatāmatha vedhayet || 2.1.10.90 || ||
iti śrībhaviṣye mahāpurāṇe madhyamaparvaṇi prathamabhāge daśamo.adhyāyaḥ || 10 || ||9||||
tantrātmakapratiṣṭhāvarṇanam
|| || sūta uvāca || ||
atha taṃtravidhiṃ vakṣye purāṇeṣvapi gīyate ||
tantre caiva pratiṣṭhāṃ ca kuryātpuṇyatame.ahani||1||
śatavṛkṣakṣudravṛkṣe daśadvādaśa vṛkṣake ||
dṛṣṭimātrāṃtare setau kūpayāge samutsṛjet ||2||
na kūpamutsṛjejjātu vṛkṣayāge kathaṃcana ||
tulasīvanayāge tu na cānyaṃ yāgamācaret || 3 |||
taḍāgayāge setvādīnna cārāme kadācana ||
na setuṃ devayāge tu taḍāgaṃ na samutsṛjet ||4||
taṃtre śrāddhaṃ pṛthaṅnāsti karturbhede pṛthagbhavet ||
śivaliṃgasthāpanāyāṃ na cānyaddevasthāpanam ||5||
svadeśe varjayettaṃ taṃ svatantreṇa vidhīyate ||
viparīte kṛte cāpi āyuḥkṣaya iti smṛtiḥ ||6||
taḍāge puṣkariṇyā vā ārāme.api dvijottamāḥ ||
mānahīne mānapūrṇe daśahaste na dūṣaṇam||7||
dvisahasrādhikaṃ yatra tatpratiṣṭhāṃ samācaret||
daśa dvādaśavṛkṣe ca ārāme pūrvavaddvijāḥ ||8||
pratiṣṭhāṃ bilvavṛkṣe ca anyathā karṇavedhanam ||
kuryāddohadadānaṃ ca tatra nirmaṃthanādikam ||9||
anaṃtaraṃ pradātavyā lājā mūrdhnyakṣatādikam || 2.1.11.10 || ||
iti śrībhaviṣye mahāpurāṇe madhyamaparvaṇi pūrvabhāge ekādaśo.adhyāyaḥ || 11 || cha ||
pratimālakṣaṇavarṇanam
|| sūta uvāca || ||
pratimālakṣaṇaṃ vakṣye yathāśāstramataṃ dvijāḥ ||
pratimāṃ lakṣaṇairhīnāṃ gṛhītāṃ naiva pūjayet || 1 ||
śailajā dārujā tāmrī mṛdbhavā sarvakāmadā ||
ekahastā dvihastā vā sārdhahastā tathāpi vā || 2 ||
prāsādamānamathavā athavā sarvalakṣaṇam ||
aṣṭāṃgulotsedhakaṃ ca na gehe.arcayetkṛtī || 3 ||
devāgārasya yaddvāraṃ tasmādaṣṭāṃgulena tu ||
tribhāgapiṃḍikā kāryā dvau bhāgau pratimā bhavet || 4 ||
aṃgulaṃ vai bhavedvṛddhiraśītiścaturuttarā||
vistāramānataḥ kāryaṃ vadanaṃ dvādaśāṃgulam || 5 ||
mukhatribhāge cibukaṃ lalāṭaṃ nāsikāṃ tathā ||
karṇau nāsikayā grīvātulyau vā niyatau tu yau || 6 ||
nayane dvyaṃgule syātāṃ tribhāgā tārakā bhavet ||
tṛtīyatārakābhāge śubhadṛṣṭiṃ vicakṣaṇaḥ || 7 ||
lalāṭamastakagrīvaṃ kuryāttatsamameva tu ||
pariṇāhastu śiraso bhaveddvātriṃśadaṃgulaḥ || 8 ||
tulyau nāsikayā grīvā mukhena hṛdayāṃtaram ||
atha vistārapaṃktistu tato.ardhaṃ tu kaṭiḥ sadā || 9 ||
bāhū ca bāhutulyau ca ūrū jaṃghe ca jāghanam ||
gulphāvasthnastu pādaḥ syāddhāṭitaścaturaṃgulaḥ ||
ṣaḍaṃgulastu vistārastulyāṃguṣṭhoṃ.agulatrayam || 2.1.12.10 ||
pradeśinī ca tattulyā hīnā śeṣānnakhānakham ||
caturdaśāṃgulaḥ pādasyāyāmaḥ parikīrtitaḥ || 11 ||
evaṃ lakṣaṇasaṃyuktā sā pūjyā pratimā śubhā ||
adharoṣṭhastathaivorubhrūlalāṭamanīṣikam || 12 ||
gaṃḍaṃ ca niyataṃ mūrtau kuryādaṃgasamunnateḥ ||
viśālanayanastāmrapado vāyatalocanaḥ || 13 ||
savitānala patrasya cāruvidyādharastathā ||
vatsaprokto.atimukuṭaḥ kaṭakāṃgadahāravān || 14 ||
abhyaṃgapadabandhādi sāmānyenopaśobhi ca ||
suprabhāmaṃḍalā cāru vicitramaṇikuṇḍalā || 15 ||
karābhyāṃ kāṃcanīṃ mālāṃ prodvahaṃtīṃ śiroruhān||
evaṃ lakṣaṇasaṃpannāṃ kārayedvihitapradām || 16 ||
susnigdhāṃ varadāṃ saumyāṃ dvitīyāśramiṇāmimām ||
navatālo bhavedviṣṇurvāsudevastritālakaḥ || 17 ||
nṛsiṃhaḥ pañcatālaḥ syāddhayagrīvastu paṃcamaḥ ||
nārāyaṇaścāṣṭatālo maheśaḥ pañcatālakaḥ || 18 ||
navatālā bhaveddurgā lakṣmīścaiva tritālikā ||
vāṇīṃ tritālikāṃ vidyātsavitā saptatālakaḥ || 19 ||
dakṣiṇe vāsudevasya kare cakraṃ pratiṣṭhitam ||
śaṃkho bhavecca tadadho vāmārdhe tasya vai gadā || 2.1.12.20 ||
tadadhaśca bhavetpadmaṃ śrīvatsenopaśobhitam ||
savye.ardhe tārakāsyaṃ ca trinetramubhayātmakam || 21 ||
pārśve nalinasiṃhau dvau subhadrāṃ dakṣiṇe nyaset ||
rukmiṇī vāmabhāge ca tadadhastāddivīṃdrakam || 22 ||
kṛtāṃjalipuṭasthaśca nāradaḥ kapilastathā ||
dharmādharmāvubhau pārśve kartavyau sragviṇāṃ varau || 23 ||
yadugraṃ vāsudevasya tathā nārāyaṇasya ca ||
vaiparītyaṃ vijānīyānmādhavānāṃ tathaiva ca || 24 ||
tīrthe girau taḍāge ca samīpe sthāpayetsudhīḥ ||
nagaragrāmamadhye vā brāhmaṇānāṃ ca saṃsadi || 25 ||
avimukte viśeṣaṇa siddhakṣetre daśārṇake ||
trīṇyuttarasahasrāṇi paṃcapaṃcottarāṇi ṣaṭ || 26 ||
kulāni pūrvaṃ vipreṃdrāḥ samuddharati nānyathā ||
kalau dārumayaḥ kāryo hyaśakto mṛnmayotha vā || 27 ||
caṃdanāgurubhiḥ kuryādbilvaśrīparṇikasya ca ||
padmakāṣṭhamayaścaiva vāmamasya tathaiva hi || 28 || ||
iti śrībhaviṣye mahāpurāṇe madhyamaparvaṇi prathamabhāge dvādaśo.adhyāyaḥ || 12 || || cha || ||
kuṇḍanirmāṇavidhivarṇanam
|| sūta uvāca || ||
ataḥ paraṃ pravakṣyāmi kuṃḍānāmatha nirṇayam ||
tasyoddhāraṃ ca saṃskāraṃ śṛṇudhvaṃ dvijasattamāḥ || 1 ||
caturasraṃ ca vṛttaṃ ca pādārdhaṃ cārdhacaṃdrakam ||
yonyākāraṃ caṃdrakaṃ ca aṣṭārdhamatha paṃcamam || 2 ||
saptārdhaṃ ca navārdhaṃ ca kuṃḍaṃ daśakamīritam ||
bhūmiṃ saṃśodhya vidhivattuṣakeśādivarjitām || 3 ||
bhrāmayeccordhvatastasyā bhasmāṃgārāṇi yatnataḥ ||
aṃkurārpaṇakaṃ kuryātsaptāhādeva buddhimān || 4 ||
sthānaṃ vimarditaṃ kuryātkhanitvā secayejjalaiḥ ||
puṣṭihastocchrāyamitaṃ prakuryātparisūtrayet|| 5 ||
arkāṃgulamitaṃ sūtraṃ caturasraṃ prakalpayet ||
aṣṭādaśāṃgake kṣetre nyasedekaṃ bahistataḥ || 6 ||
māpayettena mānena trivṛttaṃ kuṃḍamujjvalam ||
pūrvavadvibhajetkṣetraṃ bhāgaikaṃ purato nyaset || 7 ||
vṛttāni kālikādīni bahistrīṇi vivarjayet ||
padmakuṃḍamidaṃ proktaṃ vilocanamanoharam || 8 ||
daśadhā bhedayetkṣetre urdhvādhordhvāṃguladvayam ||
saṃparipātayetsūtraṃ pāṭayettatpramāṇataḥ || 9 ||
paṃcadhā bhedite kṣetre kāmaṃ vā vibhajetsudhīḥ ||
nyasetpurastādevāṃgaṃ koṇārdhārdhapramāṇataḥ || 2.1.13.10 ||
yonisthānaṃ pratiṣṭhāpya aśvatthasya dalākṛtiḥ ||
sūtradvayaṃ tato dadyātkuṃḍaṃ parimitaṃ bhavet || 11 ||
caturasraṃ samuddhṛtya sūtraṃ saṃkalpayogataḥ ||
diśaṃ prati yathānyāyaṃ pātayecca dvijottamāḥ || 12 ||
śṛṃgāṭakaṃ yugmapuṭaṃ ṣaḍasraṃ kuṃḍatrayaṃ budhāḥ ||
jalāśayārāmakūpe nitye gṛhamaye yathā || 13 ||
catusraṃ bhavetkuṃḍaṃ dvijasaṃskārakarmaṇi ||
devapratiṣṭhāyāge ca gṛhavāstau caturthakam || 14 ||
vasuṃdharāyogabhede prapaṃce vartamādiśet ||
some.aṣṭau paṃkajaṃ proktaṃ naramedhāśvamedhayoḥ || || 15 ||
aṃkurārpaṇayāge ca vaiṣṇave yāgakarmaṇi ||
śivadevyośca janmādāvaṣṭamyāṃ cārdhacaṃdrakam || 16 ||
mārjārapauṣṭike vairaṃ ramye ca śāṃtike tathā ||
śāṃtipratiṣṭhāyāge tu śāktānāṃ kāmyakarmaṇi || 17 ||
puraścaraṇakāmyeṣu jvarādīnāṃ vimokṣaṇe ||
evaṃvidheṣu kāryeṣu yonikuṃḍaṃ praśasyate || || 18 ||
devatātīrthayātrādau mahāyuddhapraveśane ||
saure śāṃte pauṣṭike ca ṣaṭpuraṃ kuṃḍamuttamam|| 19||
māraṇoccāṭane caiva tathā rogopaśāṃtaye ||
vaiṣṇavānāṃ koṭihome nṛpāṇāmatiśocane || 2.1.13.20 ||
aṣṭāsramabjakuṃḍaṃ ca saptāsraṃ nidhisādhane ||
rājñā sādhye ca paṃcāsraṃ kanyāprāptau trirasrakam ||21||
yāvannimnaṃ bhavedeva vistārastāvadeva tu ||
kuṃḍānurūpataḥ kāryā mekhalā sarvato budhaiḥ || 22 ||
ayutādiṣu homeṣu mekhalāṃ yojayetsudhīḥ ||
nimna pramāṇe cātrāpi mūle sārdhāṃgulaṃ tyajet || 23 ||
koṇavedarasairmānaṃ yathāyogyamanukramāt ||
muṣṭihaste samutsedho sārdhāṃgulapariṣkṛtaḥ || 24 ||
aratnimātre kuṃḍe tu triścaikāṃgulataḥ kramāt ||
ekahastamite kuṃḍe vedāgninayanāṃgulāḥ || 25 ||
saptamekhalakaṃ yuktaṃ lakṣahome na śasyate ||
paṃcamekhalakaṃ vātha lakṣakoṭyāṃ ca yojayet || 26 ||
ekāṃgulādimānena nemiṃ saṃvardhayetsudhīḥ ||
caturhastamite kuṃḍe tāvadeva guṇāṃgulāḥ || 27 ||
vasuhaste bhānupaṃktiryugmahīne.api tāḥ kramāt ||
sarvāḥ samā grahamakhe mekhalāśca sahasrake || 28 ||
pārśvato yojayettatra mekhalāstā yathākramam || |
sārdhāṃgulādimānena nemiṃ saṃvardhayetsudhīḥ || 29 ||
ekamekhalayāgena yojayecchaktibhāvataḥ ||
homādhikye bahuphalamanyūnaṃ nādhikaṃ bhavet ||2.1.13.30||
kuṃḍasya rūpaṃ jānīyātparamaṃ prakṛtervapuḥ ||
tato home śataguṇaṃ sthaṃḍile svalpakaṃ phalam || 31||
ṣaṭacaturdhā guṇāyāmavistāronnatiśālinī ||
ekāṃgulaṃ tu yonyagraṃ kuryādīṣadadhomukham || 32 ||
ekaikāṃgulato yoniṃ kuṃḍaśūnyeṣu vardhayet ||
samamadhye mekhalāyāḥ saparyā yā sulakṣaṇā || 33 ||
sthāpayetkuṃḍakoṇeṣu yoniṃ tāṃ dvijasattamāḥ ||
kuṃḍānāṃ kalpayennābhiṃ sphuṭamaṃbujasannibhām || 34 ||
tattu kuṃḍānurūpaṃ vā suvyaktaṃ sumanoharam ||
yonikuṃḍe yonimabjaṃ kuṃḍe nābhiṃ ca varjayet || 35 ||
yāvaddvayapramāṇena ardhāṃgulakramādbahiḥ ||
nābhiṃ pravardhayedekaṃ kuṃḍānāṃ rūpato yathā || 36 ||
tatra tatra bhavetkuṃḍaṃ biṃbaśūnyaṃ na homayet ||
śivaśaktisamāyogātkāma utpadyate yataḥ || 37 ||
avaṭopi umādevī biṃbaḥ khyātaḥ sadāśivaḥ ||
na kuryādekayā hīnaṃ maraṇaṃ ca samuddiśet ||38||
trayodaśāṃgulaṃ hitvā vahnihastamathāpi vā ||
mahātīrthe siddhakṣetre yatra śaṃbhugṛhe kule || 39 ||
tasya dakṣiṇadigbhāge agrato maṃḍalaṃ likhet ||
tatra pūjā prakartavyā pūrvamānena cāśrayet ||2.1.13.40||
arkahastāṃtare kuryācchatordhvāṃte śatena vā || 41 ||
iti śrībhaviṣye mahāpurāṇe madhyamaparvaṇi prathamabhāge trayodaśo.adhyāyaḥ || 13 || || cha ||
yajñamānavidhānavarṇanam
|| sūta uvāca || ||
yasya yajñasya yanmānaṃ tattu tenaiva yojayet ||
amānena hato yajñastasmānmānaṃ na hāpayet || 1 ||
śatārdhaṃ prathamaṃ mānaṃ śatasāhasrameva ca ||
ayutaṃ ca tathā lakṣaṃ koṭihomamataḥ param ||2||
ataḥ paraṃ tu vibhave rājā vānyo ddhijottamāḥ ||
na sa siddhimavāpnoti ayāgaphalabhāgbhavet ||3||
vipākaṃ karmaṇāṃ sarvaṃ naraḥ prāpnoti sarvadā ||
śubhāśubhaṃ tato nityaṃ prāpnoti manujaḥ kila || 4 ||
yuktāścāpi grahāstatra nityaṃ śāṃtikapauṣṭike ||
tasmātprayatnato bhaktyā nityaṃ pūjā yathāvidhi || 5 ||
adbhute ca tathā śāṃtiṃ kuryādbhaktisamanvitaḥ ||
tasmādgrahābhijanitaṃ śubhāśubhaphalaṃ khalu || || 6 ||
adbhuteṣu ca sarveṣu ayutaṃ kārayennaraḥ ||
homaṃ yathābhirucitaṃ pauṣṭike kāmyakarmaṇi || 7 ||
lakṣahomaṃ koṭihomaṃ rājā kuryādyathāvidhi ||
anyaḥ śatādikaṃ kuryādayutaṃ vibhave sati || 8 ||
grahāṇāṃ lakṣahomastu koṭihomastathā kalau ||
nidhihomaṃ cābhicāraṃ tanna kuryādgṛhāśramī || 9 ||
yatra yatra japaḥ kāryo homo vā yatra kutracit ||
mānaṃ naiva ca kartavyaṃ mānādau cāṣṭakaṃ nyaset || 2.1.14.10 ||
yugmasādhyaṃ na kartavyaṃ yugmato bhayamādiśet ||
lakṣe saptatālasaṃkhyā koṭihome ca viṃśatiḥ || 11 ||
ekatriṃśaddinairvāpi na kuryādvyatyayaṃ kvacit ||
āraṃbhastrisahasraḥ syāddvitīye.aṣṭasahasrakaḥ || 12 ||
tṛtīye tu sahasraṃ syādgrahasādhyaḥ smṛto vidhiḥ ||
pañcāhe ca samāraṃbhe sahasraṃ juhuyādbudhaḥ || 13 ||
dvitīye.ahni dvisāhasraṃ tṛtīye tu sahasrakam ||
guṇasāhasrakaṃ turye pañcāhe śeṣamīritam || 14 ||
navāhe kalpayellakṣamekaikāṃgaṃ dine dine ||
paṃcame ca tathā ṣaṣṭhe kule bhāgadvayādhikam || 15 ||
koṭihome ca tithyaṃge śatabhāgena kalpayet ||
na nyūnaṃ nādhikaṃ kāryametanmānamudāhṛtam || 16 ||
nityamekaṃ dine dadyātpṛthaṅnityaṃ na cācaret ||
sa samāje japennityaṃ pañcatāreṇa sviṣṭakṛt || 17 ||
ayute lakṣahome ca koṭihome ca sarvadā ||
prathame divase kuryāddevatānāṃ ca sthāpanam || 18 ||
mahotsave dvitīye tu balidānaṃ tathaiva ca ||
tryahasādhye trirātre ca pūrṇaṃ kṛtvā visarjayet || 19 ||
pañcāhe tu tṛtīye.ahni balidānaṃ praśasyate ||
saptāhe cāṣṭadivase navāhe paṃcame.ahani || 2.1.14.20 ||
pañcāhe dvādaśāhe tu dvātriṃśatṣoḍaśe.ahani ||
ito.anyathā na kurvīta nātra yajñaphalaṃ labhet || 21 ||
iti śrībhaviṣye mahāpurāṇe madhyamaparvaṇi prathamabhāge caturdaśo.adhyāyaḥ || 14 || || cha ||

kuṇḍasaṃskāravarṇanam
|| sūta uvāca || ||
kuṇḍānāmatha saṃskāre vakṣye śāstramataṃ yathā ||
asaṃskṛte cārthahānistasmātsaṃskṛtya homayet || 1 ||
aṣṭādaśa syuḥ saṃskārāḥ kuṇḍānāṃ tatra darśitāḥ||
tāreṇāvekṣayetsthānaṃ kuśatoyaiḥ prasecayet ||2||
trisūtrīkaraṇaṃ paścādvṛttasūtraṃ nipātayet||
vāreṇa kīlakaṃ dadyānnārasiṃhena kuḍmalam ||3||
jihvāṃ prakalpayetpaścāttasmādagniṃ samāharet ||
na ca mlecchagṛhādagniṃ na śūdranilayātkvacit || 4 ||
nadīparvataśālābhyaḥ strīhastātparivarjayet ||
saṃskṛtya parigṛhṇīyāttridhā kṛtvā samuddharet || 5 ||
tamagniṃ pratigṛhṇīyādātmano.abhimukhaṃ yathā ||
vahnibījena matimāñchivabījena prokṣayet || 6 ||
vāgīśvarīmṛtusnātāṃ vāgīśvarasamāgatām ||
dhyātvā samīraṇaṃ dadyātkāmamutpadyate tataḥ || 7 ||
kālabījena caiśānyāṃ yonāvagniṃ vinikṣipet ||
paścāddevasya devyāśca dadyādācamanīyakam || 8 ||
pitṛpiṅgala dahadaha paṃcayugmamudīrya ca ||
sarvajñājñāpaya svāhā mantroyaṃ vahnipūjane || 9 ||
vahnibarhiṣi saṃyuktāḥ sādiyāṃtāḥ sabiṃdavaḥ ||
