vahnimantrāḥ samuddiṣṭā dvijānāṃ maṃtra īritaḥ || 2.1.15.10 ||
jihvāstāstrividhāḥ proktā yajñadattena sattamāḥ ||
hiraṇyā mājyahomeṣu homayetsaṃyatātmakaḥ || 11 ||
trimadhvaktairyatra homaṃ karṇikāyāṃ ca homayet ||
kanakāsyāttu kṛṣṇāsyāddhirṇyā śubhratā tathā || 12 ||
bahurūpātirūpā ca sāttvikā yogakarmasu ||
viśvamūrtiṃ sphuliṃginyau dhūmravarṇā manojavā ||13|| lohitāsyātkarālāsyātkālībhāsasya ityapi||
etāḥ sapta niyuṃjīta vijñeyāḥ krūrakarmasu ||14||
samidbhedeṣu yā jihvāstāstu tenaiva yojayet ||
hiraṇyāmājyahome homayetsayataptamakaḥ ||15||
trimadhvaktairyathā homaṃ karṇikāyāṃ ca homayet ||
śuddhakṣīreṇa raktāyāṃ naityikeṣu prabhā smṛtā || 16 ||
bahurūpā puṣpahome kṛṣṇā cānnena pāyasaiḥ ||
ikṣuhome padmarāgā suvarṇā padmahomake 317||
lohitā padmahome ca śvetā vai bilvapatrake ||
dhūminī tilahome ca kāṣṭhahome karālikā || 18 ||
lohitāsyā pitṛhome tato jñeyā manojavā ||
vaiśvānaraṃ sthitaṃ home samiddhomeṣu sattamāḥ || 19 ||
samānamājyahome ca niṣaṇṇaṃ śeṣavastuṣu ||
āsyāttu juhuyādvahnau pipattiṃ sarvakarmasu || 2.1.15.20 ||
karṇahome tu vai vyādhirnetre taddvayamīritam ||
nāsikāyāṃ manaḥpīḍā mastake.adhvā na saṃśayaḥ || 21 ||
putraṃ vipatkaraṃ caiva tasmāttatra na homayet ||
sādhāraṇamatho vakṣye vahnerjihvāśca kīrtitāḥ || 22 ||
pravakṣyāmi vidhiṃ kṛtsnaṃ yadviśeṣaṃ punaḥ śṛṇu ||
ghṛtāhutau hiraṇyākhyā gaganā pāṇihomataḥ || 23 ||
vakrā khyātā mahāhome kṛṣṇābhā sā kratau matā ||
suprabhā modakavidhau bahurūpātirūpikāḥ || 24 ||
puṣpapatravidhau home vahnerjihvāḥ prakīrtitāḥ ||
na vā saṃkalpayetkuṇḍe śūdrākāra vibhedataḥ || 25 ||
indrakoṣṭhaṃ mastakaṃ syādīśāgneye ca mastake ||
tatkāṣṭhapārśve dve netre dvau karau ca padakramāt || 26 ||
aviśiṣṭaṃ bhavetpucchaṃ madhye codarasambhavam ||
udare homayetpuṣṭimannaṃ pāyasakaṃ ca yat || 27 ||
hutvā vrīhigaṇaṃ tatra karṇe puṣpāhutiṃ hunet ||
vāmakarṇe vāmanetre hunedabjādikaṃ budhaḥ || 28 ||
śravaṇe caiva netre ca dakṣiṇe cekṣukhaṃḍakam ||
vāmapāde vāmakare abhicāreṣu śasyate || 29 ||
māraṇe puṣpadeśe tu na cānyaṃ homayetkvacit ||
vipatkaraṃ vijānīyāddhvaniḥ sarvavināśakṛt || 2.1.15.30 || candanāgarukarpūrapāṭalāyūthikānibhaḥ ||
pāvakasya suto gaṃdhaḥ samaṃtātsumahodayaḥ || 31 ||
pradakṣiṇastyaktakalpā chatrākā śithilā śikhā ||
śubhadā yajamānasya rājyasyāpi viśeṣataḥ || 32 ||
chinnavṛttāḥ śikhāḥ kuryānmṛtyurdhanaparikṣayaḥ ||
nirvāpyaṃ maraṇaṃ vidyānmahādhūmākule.api ca || 33 ||
evaṃvidheṣu doṣeṣu prāyaścittaṃ samācaret ||
aṣṭāviṃśāhutīstyaktvā brāhmaṇānbhojayettataḥ || 34 ||
mūlenājyena juhuyājjuhuyātpañcaviṃśatim ||
mahāsnānaṃ prakartavyaṃ trikālaṃ haripūjanam || || 35 ||
iti śrībhaviṣye mahāpurāṇe madhyamaparvaṇi prathamabhāge pañcadaśo.adhyāyaḥ || 15 || || cha ||
yajñāntapūjāvidhivarṇanam
|| sūt uvāca || ||
nityaṃ naimittikaṃ caiva yāgādau ca samāptake ||
homāvasāne prajapedupacārāṃśca ṣoḍaśa || 1 ||
dadyātsamīraṇaṃ paścātpīṭhapūjāṃ samācarat ||
gṛhītvā raktapuṣpaṃ ca dhyāyedvahniṃ yathāvidhi || 2 ||
iṣṭaṃ śaktisvastikābhītimuccairdīrghairdorbhirdhārayantaṃ varāṃtam ||
hemākalpaṃ padmasaṃsthaṃ trinetraṃ dhyāyedvahniṃ baddhamauliṃ jaṭābhiḥ || || 3 || pūrvādidvāradeśeṣu kāmadevaṃ śatakratum ||
varāhaṃ ṣaṇmukhaṃ caiva gaṃdhādyaiḥ sādhu pūjayet || 4 ||
āvāhya sthāpayetpaścādaṣṭau mudrāḥ pradarśayet ||
dattvāsanaṃ svāgataṃ ca dadyātpādyādikatrayam || 5 ||
ataḥ pūrvādipātreṣu yāvatā ca hutāśanam ||
suvarṇavarṇamamalaṃ samiddhaṃ sarvatomukham || 6 ||
mahodaraṃ mahājihvamākāśatvena pūjayet ||
tārakādīnsamāpte ca gandhaiḥ puṣpaiḥ pṛthagvidhaiḥ || 7 ||
tatraiva jihvāstrividhā dhyāyenmaṃtrapuraḥsarāḥ ||
vakṣyamāṇena maṃtreṇa upacārairanaṃtaram || 8 ||
tvamādiḥ sarvabhūtānāṃ saṃsārārṇavatārakaḥ ||
paramajyotīrūpastvamāsanaṃ saphalī kuru || 9 ||
dadyādāsanametena puṣpagucchatrayeṇa tu ||
puṭāṃjaliṃ tato baddhvā pṛcchetkuśalapūrvakam || 2.1.16.10 ||
vaiśvānara namaste.astu namaste havyavāhana ||
svāgataṃ tu suraśreṣṭha śāṃtiṃ kuru namo.astu te || 11 ||
namaste bhagavandeva āponārāyaṇātmaka ||
sarvalokahitārthāya pādyaṃ ca pratigṛhyatām|| 12 ||
nārāyaṇaparaṃ dhāma jyotīrūpa sanātana ||
gṛhāṇārghyaṃ mayā dattaṃ viśvarūpa namo.astu te || 13 ||
jagadādityarūpeṇa prakāśayati yaḥ sadā ||
tasmai prakāśarū pāya namaste jātavedase || 14 ||
dhanaṃjaya namaste.astu sarvapāpapraṇāśana ||
snānīyaṃ te mayā dattaṃ sarvakāmārthasiddhaye || 15 ||
hutāśana mahābāho devadeva sanātana ||
śaraṇaṃ te prayacchāmi dehi me paramaṃ padam || 16 ||
jyotiṣāṃ jyotīrūpastvamanādinidhanācyuta ||
mayā dattamalaṃkāramalaṃkuru namostu te || 17 ||
devīdevā mudaṃ yāṃti yasya samyaksamāgamāt ||
sarvadoṣopaśāṃtyartha gandho.ayaṃ pratigṛhyatām || 18 ||
tvaṃ viṣṇustvaṃ hi brahmā ca jyotiṣāṃ gatirīśvara ||
gṛhāṇa puṣpaṃ deveśa sānulepaṃ jagadbhavet || 19 ||
devatānāṃ pitṛrṇāṃ ca sukhamekaṃ sanātanam ||
dhūpo.ayaṃ devadeveśa gṛhyatāṃ me dhanaṃjaya || 2.1.16.20 ||
tvamekaḥ sarvabhūteṣu sthāvareṣu careṣu ca ||
paramātmā parākāraḥ pradīpaḥ pratigṛhyatām || 21 ||
namo.astu yajñapataye prabhave jātavedase ||
sarvalokahitārthāya naivedyaṃ pratigṛhyatām || 22 ||
hutāśana namastubhyaṃ namaste rukmavāhana ||
lokanātha namaste.astu namaste jātavedase || 23 ||
ityanena tu mantreṇa dadyāddivye.apyadhītakam ||
sarvasvaṃ yajñasūtraṃ ca paramānnaṃ samākṣikam ||24||
iti śrībhaviṣye mahāpurāṇe madhyamaparvaṇi prathamabhāge ṣoḍaśo.adhyāyaḥ || 16 || || cha ||

agnivarṇanam
|| sūta uvāca || ||
yajñabhedaṃ tribhedaṃ ca vakṣye śāstramataṃ yathā ||
yathāvedānusāreṇa yathāgrahaṇa yojanam || 1 ||
śatārdhe vahniruddiṣṭaḥ śatārdhe kāśyapaḥ smṛtaḥ ||
ghṛtapradīpake viṣṇustilayāge vanaspatiḥ || 2 ||
sahasre brāhmaṇo nāma ayute hariru cyate ||
lakṣahome tu vahniḥ syātkoṭihome hutāśanaḥ ||3||
varuṇaḥ śāṃtike jñeyo māraṇe hyaruṇaḥ smṛtaḥ ||
nityahome.analo nāma prāyaścitte hutāśanaḥ || 4 ||
lohitaścānnayajñe yo grahāṇāṃ pratyanukramāt ||
devapratiṣṭhāyāge tu lohitaḥ parikīrtitaḥ || 5 ||
prajāpatirvāstuyāge maṃḍape cāpi padmake ||
prapāyāṃ caiva nāgākhyo mahādāne havirbhujaḥ ||6||
godāne ca bhavedrudraḥ kanyādāne tu go.ajakaḥ ||
tulāpuruṣadāne ca dhātāgniḥ parikīrtitaḥ || 7 ||
vṛṣotsarge bhavetsūyo.avasānāṃte raviḥ smṛtaḥ ||
pāvako vaiśvadeve ca dīkṣāpakṣe janārdanaḥ || 8 ||
trāsane ca bhavetkālaḥ kravyādaḥ śaradāhane ||
parṇadāhe yamo nāma hyasthidāhe śikhaṃḍikaḥ || 9 ||
garbhādhāne ca marutaḥ sīmaṃte piṃgalaḥ smṛtaḥ ||
puṃsave tviṃdra ākhyātaḥ praśasto yāgakarmaṇi || 2.1.17.10 ||
nāmasaṃsthāpane caivamupanyaste ca pārthivaḥ ||
niṣkame hāṭakaścaiva prāśane ca śucistathā || 33 ||
ṣaḍānanaśca cūḍāyāṃ vratādeśe samudbhavaḥ ||
vītihotraścopanaye samāvarte dhanaṃjayaḥ || 12 ||
udare jaṭharāgniśca samudre vaḍavānalaḥ ||
śikhāyāṃ ca vibhurjñeyaḥ svarasyāgniḥ sarīsṛpaḥ || 13 ||
aśvāgnirmaṃtharo nāma rathāgnirjātavedasaḥ ||
gajāgnirmaṃdaraścaiva sūryāgnirviṃdhyasaṃjñakaḥ || 14 ||
toyāgnirvaruṇonāma brāhmaṇāgnirhavirbhujaḥ ||
parvatāgniḥ kratubhujo dāvāgniḥ sūrya ucyate || 15 ||
dīpāgniḥ pāvako nāma gṛhyāgnirdharaṇīpatiḥ ||
ghṛtāgniśca nalo vāyuḥ sūtikāgniśca rākṣasaḥ || 16 ||
iti śrībhaviṣye mahāpurāṇe madhyamaparvaṇi prathamabhāge.agnināmavarṇanaṃnāma saptadaśo.adhyāyaḥ || 17 |||cha|||

homadravyakathanam
|| sūta uvāca || ||
athāto homadravyāṇāṃ pramāṇamabhidhīyate ||
pramāṇe cāpramāṇe ca niṣphalaṃ bhavati dhuvam ||1||
karṣamātraṃ ghṛtaṃ home śuktimātraṃ payaḥ smṛtam ||
tatsamaṃ pañcagavyaṃ ca dadhi dugdhaṃ tathā madhu || 2 ||
muṣṭimānena pṛthukā lājāḥ syurmuṣṭisaṃmitāḥ ||
śarkarā muṣṭimātrā ca śarkarātolakaṃ viduḥ || 3 ||
tritolakaṃ guḍaṃ vidyādikṣuparvavi dhirbhavet ||
ekaikaṃ patrapuṣpāṇi śālūkasya trimuṣṭikam ||4||
ekalagne na juhuyānna pṛthagjuhuyātkvacit ||
savṛṃtakaṃ japāpuṣpaṃ keśaraṃ tatsavṛṃtakam || || 5 ||
ekaikaśaśca padmānāṃ jalajānāṃ tathaiva ca ||
jīvaṃtyāḥ phalamānena piṣṭakānāṃ prasaṃkhyayā || 6 ||
vasaṃtakaṃ dhātrimāne modakasya pramāṇataḥ ||
ekaikaśaḥ phalānāṃ ca mātuliṃgatrikheḍakam ||7||
aṣṭadhā nālikerasya panasaṃ daśadhā bhavet||
padmabījapramāṇena kūṣmāṃḍaṃ cāṣṭadhā bhavet ||8||
urvārukaṃ cāṣṭadhā ca guḍūcī caturaṃgulam ||
pūgamānaṃ ca māṃsasya saguḍaṃ tatra dṛśyate ||9||
anyatra badarīmānaṃ tiṃdukaṃ ca tridhā kṛtam ||
kāṣṭhaṃ prādeśamātraṃ syāddūrvā yāśca tripatrakam || 2.1.18.10 ||
bhūrjapatraṃ ca gṛhṇīyācchamīṃ prādeśamātrikām ||
vrīhayo muṣṭimātrāḥ syuḥ śuktimānena sarṣapāḥ || 11 ||
maricāḥ syurvimā nena mṛṇālaṃ cātha mūlakam ||
saptakhaṃḍaṃ ca vārtākaṃ tripuṣṭaṃ ca tridhoditam ||12||
caṃdanāgurukarpūrakastūrīkuṃkumāni ca ||
tittiḍībījamānena samuddi ṣṭāni deśikaiḥ || 13 ||
samidāplavane tryaṃgatilānāmapi madhyataḥ||
daśakaṃ plāvanenaiva sahasrāṇāṃ śataṃ vinā || 14 ||
evaṃ vrīhiplāvane ca kāṣṭhavadi kṣudaṃḍakam ||
prokṣaṇaṃ mṛdupuṣpāṇāṃ latādīnāṃ tathaiva ca || 15 ||
pāyasānne tathānne ca modake piṣṭake.api ca ||
śālyāsaktena juhuyādvyatyaye vyatyayaṃ phalam || 16 ||
bilvapatrasya plavanaṃ daṃḍaṃ hitvā ca plāvayet ||
vṛṃtasaṃplāvanādeva phalaṃ harati rākṣasaḥ || 17 ||
bilvapatrasya pūrvārdhaprāptamātreṇa yoja yet ||
patratrayaṃ tathā home chinnebhinne.atidūṣaṇam || 18 ||
na dvitriplavanaṃ kuryātkṛtvā yāti rasātalam ||
tasmācca putraśiṣyādyairbrāhmaṇaistattvakovidaiḥ || 19 ||
pūrvāśābhimukho bhūtvā pāvayecca yathākramāt ||
na nyūnaṃ nādhikaṃ kuryācchāṃtipakṣa udaṅmukhaḥ || 2.1.18.20 ||
pāyasānyanyadeveṣu yatnena pariva rjayet ||
na cāgnau dāpayedyatnādetebhyaḥ pratipādayet ||21||
kaniṣṭhāṃgulimāsādya prakuryātparvabhūṣaṇam ||
guṇadorakamānena tāvaddhomagatirbudhāḥ ||22||
aṃgulairdvitricaturaiḥ patrahomākṛtikramāt || 23 ||
iti śrībhaviṣye mahāpurāṇe madhyamaparvaṇi prathamabhāgeṣṭādaśo.adhyāyaḥ || 18 || cha ||
sruvadarvīnirṇayavarṇanam
|| sūta uvāca || ||
śrīparṇī śiṃśapā kṣīrī bilvaḥ khadira eva ca ||
sruve praśastāstaravaḥ siddhidā yāgakarmaṇi || 1 ||
pratiṣṭhāyāṃ praśastāstu dhātrīkhadirakeśarāḥ ||
saṃskāre śaśibhinnau ca dhātrī dhātrā vinirmitā || 2 ||
saṃprāśe yaḥ sruvaḥ proktaḥ saṃskāre yajñasādhane ||
pratiṣṭhāyāṃ tu kathitāsta danye śāstravedibhiḥ || 3 ||
sruvaṃ srucamatho vakṣye yadadhīnaśca jāyate ||
yajñe na sarvakaṃ dhāryamakṣareṇa ca vyatyayaḥ || 4 ||
tasyādau ca sruvaṃ vakṣye yacca mānaṃ yadāspadam ||
kāṣṭhaṃ gṛhītvā bilvasya riktāditithivarjite || 5 ||
samupoṣya ca racayedāmiṣāṇi na ca smaret ||
varjayedgrāmyadharmaṃ ca nirmāṇe sruksruvasya vai || 6 ||
kāṣṭhaṃ gṛhītvā vibhajedbhāgāṃstriṃśattathā punaḥ ||
viṃśatyaṃgulamānaṃ tu kuṃḍavedisamodaram|| 7||
kaṭāhākāranimnaṃ ca sruvaṃ kuryādvicakṣaṇaḥ ||
dhātrīphalasamākāraṃ svadhānimnaṃ suśobhanam || 8 ||
vedīṃ śūrpākṛtiṃ kuryātkuṃḍāni parikalpayet ||
haṃsavattriguṇā vāpi hastenā.anumukhaṃ likhet || 9 ||
sruvaṃ caturviṃśatibhirbhāgaiśca racayeddhruvam ||
dvitriṃśaṃ syātkuṃḍamānamadaive tasya kīrtitam || 2.1.19.10 ||
caturbhiraṃgairānāhaṃ karṣādyagraṃ tataḥ sruvam ||
aṃgadvayena vilikhetpaṃke mṛgamadākṛtim ||11||
daṃḍamūlāśraye daṃḍī bhavetkaṃkaṇabhūṣitaḥ ||
sauvarṇasya ca tāmrasya kāryā darvī pramāṇataḥ ||12||
śraivarṇikodbhavaṃ yacca iṃduvṛkṣasamudbhavam||
kṣīravṛkṣasamudbhūtaṃ dvādaśāṃgulasaṃmitam||13||
dvayaṃgulaṃ maṃḍalaṃ tasya darvī sā yajñasādhane||
catvāriṃśattolikābhiriti tāmramayasya ca||14||
paṃcāṃgulaṃ maṃḍalaṃ ca aṣṭahastaṃ ca daṃḍakam||
annādipāyasavidhau darvī yajñasya sādhane||15||
daśatolakamānena sā ca darvī udāhṛtā ||
ājyasaṃśodhanārthaṃ tu sā tu tāmramayasya ca || 16 ||
ṣoḍaśāṃgulamānena sarvābhāve ca paippalīm ||
ājya sthālīṃ ghṛtamayīṃ mṛnmayīṃ ca samāśrayet || 17 ||
atha tāmramayī kāryā na ca tāṃ tatra yojayet || 18 ||
iti śrībhaviṣye mahāpurāṇe madhyama parvaṇi prathamabhāge sruvadarvīnirṇayo nāmaikonaviṃśo.adhyāyaḥ || 19 || || cha ||
pūrṇavidhivarṇanam
|| sūta uvāca || ||
atha pūrṇavidhiṃ vakṣye yathā caṃdrārthavedinām ||
yasya samyaganuṣṭhānātsaṃpūrṇaṃ syāditi sthitiḥ || 1 ||
homapūrtau mokṣakalpaḥ pūjāṃte.arghyaṃ vidhīyate ||
atha tasyāmapūrṇāyāṃ hataśrīryajñabhraṃśatā || 2||
tasmātsarvaprayatnena sruvādho vinyaseccarum||
pūrṇaṃ dattvā savitre.arghyaṃ brāhmaṇānbhojayettataḥ||3||
gṛhaṃ praviśya ca tataḥ kulapūjāṃ samācaret||
saptate dehi me pūrṇāṃ punātviti ṛcā kramāt||4||
niyojayetpratiṣṭhāyāṃ nityanaimittike śṛṇu||
punātviti ṛcā pūrṇā prathamā parikīrtitā || 5 ||
saptateti dvitīyā syāddehimeti tṛtīyikā ||
pūrṇā darvī caturthī syātkulevasthāpya deśikaḥ || 6 ||
utthāya dadyātpūrṇāṃ tu nopaviśya kadācana ||
kanakāyāṃ ca jihvāyāṃ raktāyāṃ grahayāgake || 7 ||
grahahome śatāṃte ca pūrṇā ekā vidhīyate ||
sahasrāṃte yugaṃ dadyādayutāṃte yugadvayam || 8 ||
sahasrāṃte dadedekaṃ puṣpahome ca sattamāḥ ||
pūrṇā tvekasahasraṃ tu dadyādyajñaphalepsayā || 9 ||
mṛdupuṣpākṛtau tvekā kevale cekṣuhomake ||
śataṃ dve ca śate caiva garbhādhānānnaprāśane || 2.1.20.10 ||
sīmaṃtonnayane caiva prāyaścittākṛtīṣu ca ||
vaiśvadeve ca nitye ca pūrṇā tvekā vidhīyate || 11 ||
evaṃ srucau samau kṛtvā uparyupari vinyaset ||
yathā na vyayate kṛtvā na kalpayati yāvatā || 12 ||
ṛṣichaṃdādikaṃ śrutvā pratimaṃtrasya sattamāḥ ||
anyathālpālpakaphalaṃ tasmātsaṃnyasya homayet ||13||
saptateti brāhmaṇasya ṛṣiḥ kauṃḍinya īritaḥ ||
jagatī ca bhavecchaṃdo devatāgniḥ prakīrtitaḥ || || 14 ||
dehi meti ca maṃtrasya prajāpatirṛṣiḥ smṛtaḥ ||
anuṣṭup ca bhavecchaṃdo devatāsya prajāpatiḥ || 15 ||
pūrṇā darvīti mantrasya śatakraturṛṣiḥ smṛtaḥ ||
chaṃdonuṣṭupsamākhyātaṃ vahniścaivātra devatā || 16 ||
punātviti ca mantrasya ṛṣiḥ syātpavanaḥ smṛtaḥ ||
chaṃdo.api jagatī khyātaṃ devatāgniśca kīrtitaḥ || 17 ||
turyapūrṇā yajñamadhye nakule dvijasattamāḥ ||
na cāśiṣaṃ yajñamadhye abhiṣekaṃ ca tarpaṇam || 18 ||
ṛtvikchaṃdaḥ spṛśansamyagdakṣiṇāṃgamathāpi vā ||
yajamānaḥ sapatnīko mahotsavapuraḥsaram || 19 ||
viśvāmitro.ayutaṃ tatra homaṃ kuryādvicakṣaṇaḥ ||
lavalī badarī śastaṃ picumaṃdakacchatrakam || 2.1.20.20 ||
nāgaraṃgaṃ dhātakīṃ ca pūrṇāyāṃ ca vivarjayet ||
japyahānirasaṃkhyāte homabhraṃśaśca jāyate || 21 ||
tasmātprāgeva satilāngaṇitvā sthāpayetpṛthak ||
yugapadgaṇayedvātha na cāṃgena kadācana ||22||
dhātakyāśca phalaiḥ saṃkhyā kartavyā phalamicchatā ||
badaryāśca lavalyāśca phalaiḥ sarvārthasiddhaye || 23 ||
nāgaraṃgaphalaireva dhātakyā bakulaiḥ phalaiḥ ||
yajñahānikaraṃ yasmāttasmāttatparivarjayet || 24 ||
karpūracaṃdanaiḥ kuryāddholikāṃ yajñasiddhaye ||
gaṃgāmṛttikayā yuktaḥ śunikāmatha vā dvijāḥ || 25 ||
raktaguṃjāphalaiḥ saṃkhyāṃ puṣṭikāmeṣu yojayet ||
vātārdhe ca śate caiva sahasre ca tathaiva hi || 26 ||
hotā syādayutenāpi ekāhe vedasaṃkhyayā ||
ṛṇasādhye bhaveddhotā traya eva dvijottamāḥ || 27 ||
lakṣahome tu hotāraḥ ṣaḍeva parikīrtitāḥ ||
koṭihome tu viprāḥ syuḥ praśastāḥ paṃktisaṃkhyayā || 28 ||
nava paṃca daśadaśakaṃ paṃcaviṃśamathāpi vā ||
kāmakrodha vihīnāḥ syurṛtvijaḥ śāṃtacetasaḥ || 29 ||
navagrahamakhe viprāścatvāro vedavedinaḥ ||
athavā ṛtvijau śāṃtau dvāveva parikīrtitau ||2.1.20.30||
kāryāvayutahome tu na prasajyeta vistare ||
tadvatsadaśadhā cāṣṭau navahome tu ṛtvijaḥ || 31 ||
kartavyāḥ śaktitastadvaccatvāro.api vimatsarāḥ ||
tameva pūjayedbrahmā dvau vā trīnvā yathāvidhi || 32 ||
ekamapyarcayedbrahmā sahasre tvekabrāhmaṇam ||
dakṣiṇābhiḥ prayatnena nirvahedalpavittavān || 33 ||
lakṣahomastu kartavyo yadā vittaṃ bhavettadā ||
yataḥ sarvamavāpnoti kuryātkāmavidhānataḥ || 34 ||
pūjyate śivaloke ca vasvādityamarudgaṇaiḥ ||
yāvatkalpaśatānyaṣṭāvaṃte mokṣamavāpnuyāt || 35 ||
akāmo yastvimaṃ kuryāllakṣahomaṃ yathāvidhi ||
śatakāmamavāpnoti padaṃ cānaṃtyamaśnute || 36 ||
putrārthī labhate putraṃ dhanārthī labhate dhanam ||
bhāryāthīṃ labhate bhāryāṃ kumārī ca śubhaṃ patim || 37 ||
bhraṣṭarājyastathā rājyaṃ śrīkāmaḥ śriyamāpnuyāt ||
yaṃ yaṃ kāmayate kāmaṃ sarvaṃ prāpnoti puṣkalam || 38 ||
niṣkāmaḥ kurute yastu paraṃ brahmādhigacchati ||
tasmācchataguṇaḥ proktaḥ koṭihomaḥ svayaṃbhuvā || 39 ||
ācārya eva hotā syādbrāhmaṇānāmasaṃbhave ||
na yojayedekameva cāyute homakarmaṇi || 2.1.20.40 ||
darbhāsane.ato na kuśe tṛṇe pattre tvace.api ca ||
pāṣāṇe mṛttikāyāṃ ca na ca vastrāsane kvacit || 41 ||
tatra dārumayaṃ kuryādāgamaṃ bhajate dvijaḥ ||
dānaṃ dadyācca homāṃte pūrṇādau ca yathā bhavet || 42 ||
dvijasaṃskārakāryeṣu pūrṇādau cāpi dakṣiṇā ||
maṃtropāsanakāryeṣu somayāgāśvamedhake || 43 || ||
iti śrībhaviṣye mahāpurāṇe madhyamaparvaṇi prathamabhāge viṃśo.adhyāyaḥ || 20 || || cha
maṇḍalavidhivarṇanam
|| sūta uvāca || ||
athāto maṃḍalaṃ vakṣye purāṇeṣu yathoditam ||
yadadhīnā bhavetsiddhistasmātkuryātsamāhitaḥ || 1 ||
devāḥ padmāsanasthāśca bhaviṣyaṃti vasaṃti ca ||
vinābjaṃ nārcayeddevīmarcite yakṣiṇī haret || 2 ||
ato maṃḍalavicchedaṃ yasmāddaśaguṇaṃ bhavet ||
rajaḥsādhye śataguṇaṃ kevale dviguṇaṃ phalam || 3||
triśataṃ vaṃdane sādhye sahasraṃ ca rajo.aṣṭakam ||
rajobhiḥ ṣoḍaśairbiṃbaṃ śataṃśatamanaṃtakam || 4 ||
yantre maṇau śālagrāme pratimāyāṃ viśeṣataḥ ||
mahālaye mahāyonau raktaliṃge ca sādhikam || 5 ||
rajoyuktaṃ likhedyastu pūjākārye vibhūtaye ||
karaṇādiphalaṃ yasmāttasmāttatparivarjayet ||6||
caturasraṃ navaṃ vyūhaṃ krauṃcaprāṇaṃ catu rvidham ||
kāmabījaṃ vajranābhaṃ vighnarājaṃ gajāhvayam || 7 ||
pārijātaṃ caṃdrabiṃbaṃ sūryakāṃtaṃ ca śekharam ||
śatapatraṃ sahasrāraṃ navanābhaṃ ca muṣṭikam || || 8 ||
paṃcābjaṃ caiva mainākaṃ kāmarājaṃ ca puṣkaram ||
aṣṭāsraṃ caiva śrībiṃbaṃ ṣaḍasraṃ tryasrameva tu ||9||
catvāriṃśattathā paṃcasvādhikaṃ parisaṃkhyayā ||
caturasraṃ navavyūḍhaṃ vaiṣṇave yāgakarmaṇi || 2.1.21.10 ||
praśastaṃ cāpi gomedhe krauṃcaṃ ghrāṇaṃ caturvidham ||
subhadraṃ cāśvamedhe ca naramedhe narāsanam || 11 ||
sarvatra sarvatobhadraṃ caturasraṃ subhadrakam ||
kāmarājaṃ tathā tryasramaṣṭāsraṃ ca ṣaḍasrakam ||12||
śaktānāṃ kāmapakṣe ca paṃcasiṃhāsanaṃ mahat ||
dhyānācale merupṛṣṭhaṃ maṇimuktācaleṣvapi || 13 ||
sahasraṃ śatapatraṃ ca annadāne tilācale ||
harivallabhaṃ rājasūye somayāgeṣu śasyate || 14 ||
pratiṣṭhāyāṃ subhadraṃ ca sarvatobhadrameva ca ||
jalāśayapratiṣṭhāyāṃ vighnarājaṃ praśasyate || 15 ||
ghaṭaprasthāpane caiva gajāhvaṃ turagāsanam ||
śatapatraṃ lakṣahome ayute caturasrakam || 16 ||
yasya yajñasya yadbiṃbaṃ tattu tenaiva yojayet ||
ito.anyathā bhaveddoṣo viparīteṣvadhogatiḥ || 17 ||
dvihastā caturasrā ca vedikā parikīrtitā ||
caturaṃgulocchrāyamitā ṣaḍaṃgulā hyathāpi vā ||18||
ṣaḍaṃgulā navavyūhe vardhayedyajñakovidaḥ ||
ekāṃgulasamutsedhaḥ kartavyassusamāhitaiḥ|| ||| 19 ||
krauṃcaprāṇe turyahastaṃ muṣṭihastaṃ samucchritam ||
madhyadvaye hīnakaraṃ kaniṣṭhaṃ tryaṃgulādhikam || 2.1.21.20 ||
kuryāddvitrikramāddhīnamucchrāye dvijasattamāḥ ||
pārijātaṃ caṃdrabiṃbaṃ sūryakāṃtaṃ ca śekharam || 21 ||
grahāṇāṃ pauṣṭike pakṣe bāhyagrāmādisādhane ||
niyojayettatratatra vedikācakrakatrayam || 22 ||
prathame muṣṭihastaḥ syātsaṃpūrṇe śeṣamānakaiḥ ||
navalābhe ca paṃcābjaṃ karatrayamudāhṛtam || 23 ||
śeṣā caiva variṣṭhā ca lavalī bhitti vedikā ||
vijñeyā dvijaśārdūlā yathākāmyeṣu yojayet || 24 ||
ayathāvyatyaye doṣastasmādyatnena sādhayet ||
daśahaste cāṣṭahaste aṣṭahaste ca ṣoḍaśam ||25||
muṣṭibāhuñca prādeśaṃ vardhayetṣoḍaśāṃśake ||
hastotsedhaṃ ca kartavyaṃ hīne hīnaṃ ca hrāsayet || 26 ||
darpaṇākārakaṃ kuryādyāgake śāṃti karmaṇi ||
hīnaṃ kuryātprayatnena vaprākāraṃ paristave || 27 ||
niśāraṇairgomayaiśca vedikāṃ ca pralepayet ||
svarṇaratnamayaistoyairabhiṣicya kuśodakaiḥ || || 28 ||
hīnavīryagavānāṃ ca purīṣaṃ dhenukaṃ tathā ||
kapilāyāśca yatnena kuṃḍamaṃḍalalepane || 29 ||
varjayetsarvayāgeṣu sthaṃḍileṣu prayatnataḥ ||
vinā sūtraiḥ kīlake na maṃḍale naiva sūtrayet || 2.1.21.30 ||
tasmātprayatnataḥ kāryaṃ yatsūtraṃ yacca kīlakam ||
arkahastamitaṃ sūtraṃ mṛdu lākṣāmayaṃ tathā || 31 ||
pītakāryasrajaṃ caiva kīlakaṃ svarṇanirmitam ||
raupyatāmramayaṃ kuryādvaiṣṇave yāgakarmaṇi || 32 ||
gaṇanāyake supraśastaṃ śaiṣepāmārgameva ca ||
grahapakṣe tatheśasya kacchapasya dvijottamāḥ || 33 ||
ṣoḍaśe cārkahaste ca tatra nemiyutaṃ bhavet || 34 ||
iti śrībhaviṣye mahāpurāṇe madhyamaparvaṇi prathama bhāge ekaviṃśatitamo.adhyāyaḥ || 21 || || cha || ||
|| iti madhyamaparvaṇi prathamabhāgaḥ samāptaḥ || 1 || cha || || || ||
viṣayānukramaṇikā
atha dvitīyaṃ madhyamaparva || 2 ||
prathamabhāgaḥ || 1 ||

maṇḍaladevaracanāvarṇanam
|| sūta uvāca || ||
athoddhāraṃ pravakṣyāmi caturasrādikasya ca ||
arkāṃgulamitaṃ kṣetraṃ caturasraṃ prakalpayet||1||
guṇāṃgulaṃ pratidiśaṃ vardhayetsuvicakṣaṇaḥ ||
caturasraṃ samaṃ kuyādiṣṭeraṣṭādaśāṃgulam || 2 ||
dvihaste caiva sūtrāgre tryaṃgulāni samaṃtataḥ ||
caturasrīkṛte paścāddvihastamapi jāyate || 3 ||
evaṃ poḍaśahastāṃtaṃ vardhayetkramataḥ svayam ||
haste vinirṇayaṃ viprā racayenmaṃḍala sudhīḥ || 4 ||
dvādaśāṃgulakalpābhyāṃ madhuhaste ca maṃḍale ||
dvihaste hastamātraṃ syāddvihastaṃ tu catuṣkare || 5 ||
padmamānaṃ caturddhā tu vṛttaṃ kuryātsamaṃtataḥ ||
prathame karṇikā kāryyā keśarāṇi dvitīyake || 6 ||
tṛtīye dalasaṃdhīṃśca dalāgrāṇi caturthake ||
karṇikāṃ pītavarṇena śuddhena paṃkajaṃ likhet ||7||
keśarāstrividhāḥ proktā mūlamadhyāgradeśataḥ ||
mūle śuklāruṇā madhye pītāścāgre pratiṣṭhitāḥ || 8 ||
pātrasaṃdhirbhavecchyāmaḥ koṇe raktena raṃjayet ||
devāstrāṇi likhedbāhye puramadhye ca koṇake || 9 ||
aṣṭāṃgulapramāṇaṃ yadyathāvarṇaṃ vināditaḥ ||
śaṃbhurgaurī tathā brahmā rāmakṛṣṇetyanukramāt || 2.2.1.10 ||
sīmarekhāṃgulocchrāyaṃ tattadardhena yojayet ||
śivaviṣṇvormahāyāge śaṃbhumārabhya dāpayet || 11 ||
pratiṣṭhāyāṃ ca rāmāṃtaṃ kṛṣṇāṃtaṃ ca jalāśaye ||
durgāyāge ca śrīpakṣe brahmādīnparikalpayet || 12 ||
grahayāge ca pītādīnkuryācca na tadanyathā ||
navavyūhamatho vakṣye purāṇamatasammatam || 13 ||
sarvaṃ ca pūrvavatkāryaṃ paṃkajaṃ sulikhetsudhīḥ ||
tāvatsaṃkhyāharaṇayorveṣṭayetprakramādapi || 14 ||
śuklāruṇaistathā pītaiḥ pītāruṇasitairapi ||
pītāruṇasitairevaṃ svabhāve pratibhāgake || 15 ||
kalāyaṃtraṃ tadaṃte ca guhyapatrā grakeṇa tu ||
ṣoḍaśairviṃśamāne tu saliṅgaṃ cāṣṭapatrake ||16||
evaṃ maṃḍalamaṃtrāṇāṃ varjayetparamārthataḥ ||
tadvanmūleṣu koṇeṣu keśarāṇi prakalpayet||17||
daśadaṃḍasamākāraṃ trivarṇaṃ pratiraṃjitam ||
araṃ dadyāddaśāgre tu sarvāṃgulapramāṇataḥ || 18 ||
pītenāraṃ ca sarvatra tanmadhye śoṇatuṃḍakam ||
navavyūhamidaṃ proktaṃ dharmakāmārthadāyakam || 19 ||
na śūdro maṃḍalaṃ kuryānna kuryādbrāhmaṇabruvaḥ ||
kuryācca saṃgame tīrthe devatāyataneṣu ca || 2.2.1.20 ||
likhitvā nārcayedya stu agnikāryavihīnakaḥ ||
aviddho jāyate so.api yato janmanijanmani || 21 || ||
iti śrībhaviṣye mahāpurāṇe madhyamaparvaṇi dvitīyabhāge prathamo.adhyāyaḥ || 1 || cha ||
krauñcamānavarṇanam
|| sūta uvāca ||
krauñcamānaṃ pravakṣyāmi yathāvedārthavādinām ||
saṃmataṃ sarvataṃtreṣu gopanīyaṃ prayatnataḥ || 1 ||
ātmano.aratnimānena dviguṇaṃ parikalpayet ||
madhye vṛddhyā tu tatsūtraṃ bhrāmayetkīlakopari || 2 ||
catuṣṭayaṃ nyasedvṛttaṃ madhyamādhamabhāvataḥ||
karṇikā prathame vṛtte dvitīye tvatha keśaram || 3 ||
tṛtīye padmapatrāṇi caturthe ṣoḍaśacchadāḥ ||
śobhopaśobhe kuryācca caturasre same śubhe || 4 ||
taddakṣiṇāgraṃ sulikhetpārśvayoḥ pakṣakadvayam ||
tatra padmayugaṃ kuryānmadhye cāṃgulamaṃtaram||5||
śuklaṃ pītaṃ tathā raktaṃ kṛṣṇaṃ lohitasannibham ||
saṃkhyātaṃ tāmraparṇaṃ ca śyāmalaṃ cāṣṭakaṃ rajaḥ || 6 ||
śuklaṃ taṃḍulacūrṇotthaṃ pītaṃ tu niśayā smṛtam ||
raktaṃ tu niśayā yogācchaṃkhacūrṇādibhāvitam || 7 ||
kṛṣṇaṃ pulakādidagdhaṃ raktaṃ pītāsyayogataḥ ||
kuṃkumābhaṃ pāṃḍuraṃ ca raktaśvetairvinirmitam || 8 ||
tāmravarṇaṃ kusuṃbhena śyāmalaṃ bilvapatrajam ||
yavagodhūmacūrṇādiyogena tu rajaḥ smṛtam || 9 ||
sarvarekhāsu vibhajecchuklaṃ madhye tu pītakam ||
karṇikāyāṃ keśareṣu śubhrameva nipātayet || 2.2.2.10 ||
pūrvādikramayogena śuklādīni prayoja yet ||
patrasaṃdhau tu vibhajedrajaḥ sekāṃtarakramāt ||11||
tataḥ ṣoḍaśapatreṣu pūrvādikramato bhavet ||
śuklaṃ pītaṃ tathā tāmraṃ tataḥ saṃkhyātameva ca ||12||
śyāmalaṃ kuṃkumābhaṃ ca raktaṃ śuklaṃ ca kṛṣṇakam ||
pītaṃ tāmraṃ ca saṃkhyātaṃ śyāmaṃ kuṃkumaraktakam || 13||
evaṃ dadyādvijaḥ pūrve īśānāṃtaṃ vibhāvayet ||
krauṃcamṛrghni bhavedraktaṃ caturaṃgulamānataḥ||14||
tuṃḍabhāge bhavetpītaṃ grīvāyāṃ śuklameva ca ||
pucche viṃśatipatrāṇi ādau paṃca rajaḥkramāt ||15||
ṣaḍaṃguleṣvaṃḍabhāge pītena parikalpayet ||
grīvāyāṃ śuklarajasā bhāvitāyāṃ viśeṣataḥ ||16||
tatra pītādikaṃ lekhyaṃ pūrvoktaṃ ca yathā bhavet ||
śuklādikaṃ pradadyānu pātreṣvekaikaśaḥ pṛthak || 17 ||
caturaṃgulake pāde jānorūrdhve tu pītakam ||
adhastāttu bhavedraktaṃ tadeva caturaṃgulam ||18||
dvyaṃgulena bhavecchyāmamaṃgulīṣvapi vinyaset ||
evaṃ pakṣadvayenāpi likhecchuklaṃ vibhāvayet || 19 ||
pade śuddhaṃ cāṃgulīṣu raktaṃ śyāmena bhāvayet ||
pūrvapaścimadigbhāge śuklaṃ syādvāradeśataḥ ||2.2.2.20||
dakṣiṇottarataścaiva raktavarṇaṃ vinirdiśet ||
mahākrauṃcamidaṃ jñeyaṃ madhyakraucamidaṃ śṛṇu || 21 ||
kaniṣṭhaṃ sarvayajñeṣu vidyānāṃ saptamuttamam ||
athāparaṃ pravakṣyāmi sarvataṃtramataṃ kramāt || 22 ||
raktapītaṃ raktapītaiḥ kuryātpucchacatuṣṭayam ||
pūrvādikramayoge tu patrāṃte dharaṇītale || ||23||
sulikhenmūlasaṃlagnaṃ bahiṣkoṇacatuṣṭayam ||
kaniṣṭhe.aṣṭakulaṃ kuryātpucchaṃ kuryāccaturvidham ||24||
trivṛttaṃ veṣṭayetpaścātsitaraktāsitaiḥ kramāt ||
dṛṣṭaṃ janmaśatodbhūtaṃ pāpaṃ nāśayate dhuvam ||25||
pītaṃ vā vilikhedviprā naśyaṃti sakalāpadaḥ||
ataścakraṃ bahiścakraṃ kṣetre ca pratidarśanam ||26||
tasya kalpaśatodbhūtaṃ pāpaṃ nāśayate dhuvam ||
mayūraṃ vṛṣabhaṃ caiva siṃhaṃ krauṃcaṃ ca vai kapim ||27||
pramādādvā gṛhe kṣetre vṛkṣāgre cāpi bho dvijāḥ ||
utthāya vaṃdanaṃ kuryādbrahmahatyāśataṃ dahet || 28 ||
poṣaṇātkīrtimāpnoti darśanātpāpavicyutiḥ ||
darśanādvardhate lakṣmīrāyurvṛddhiśca jāyate || 29 ||
mayūro brahmaṇo mṛrtirvṛṣabhaśca sadāśivaḥ|| .
siṃhe ca saṃbhaveddurgā vaiṣṇavo vidhirucyate ||2.2.2.30||
krauṃco nārāyaṇo devo vyāghrastripurasuṃdarī ||
kālikā kṛṣṇavyāghraśca lakṣmīścitrakapotakaḥ ||31||
snātaḥ paśyati pratyahni grahadoṣo na jāyate ||
tasmātprayatnato bhūtvā dhārayetpoṣayedgṛhe || 32 ||
ataḥ paraṃ pravakṣyāmi maṃḍale maṃḍaleṣvapi ||
rajodravyapramāṇaṃ ca yathoktaṃ yatnavarjanam || 33 ||
taṃḍulotthaṃ yavotthaṃ vā varjyaṃ makararopaṇam ||
yadbālyaśrāvaṇe jātaṃ hiṃgulaṃ gaṃdhakaṃ tathā ||34||
haritālaṃ subhadraṃ ca sadā vighnaṃ vivarjayet ||
haimaṃtikodbhavaṃ yacca sitapāṣāṇameva ca ||35||
kāṃcanyāśca prabhedaṃ yacchastaṃ śuklaguṇaṃ dvijāḥ ||
śephālivṛttaṃ niśayā atasīkusumāni ca ||36||
kiṃśukasya ca puṣpāṇi śastaṃ pītaṃ guṇaṃ bhavet ||
nāgajaṃ gairikaṃ caiva kusuṃbha kusumāni ca ||37||
kuśītaṃ guḍakaṃ caiva maṃjiṣṭhāṃ paṃcaraṃgakam ||
vijayāpatrakaṃ caiva bilvapatraṃ tathaiva ca||38||
punarnavāyāḥ patraṃ ca keśarasya bakasya ca||
kṛṣṇapāṣāṇakaṃ caiva kṛṣṇābhraṃ samayūthakam||39||
nāgapāṣāṇakaṃ caiva punnāgaṃ dagdhapaṃcakam ||
śaṃkhacūrṇaṃ lohaviṣṭhāṃ nāgaviṣṭhāṃ ca varjayet||2.2.2.40||
karpūraṃ kuṃkumaṃ caiva rocanārocanāṃ śrayet ||
yavaśālīyakairbhinnaṃ śuklaṃ ca kārayetsudhīḥ ||41||
lākṣāṃ ca yadi gṛhṇīyāttadbharjitvā pradāpayet ||
ākāśaṃ pṛthivīṃ caiva bhaumaṃ rāmaṃ tathā śanī ||42||
dharaṇīṃ sadanasthāne pañcadhā vibhajedbahiḥ ||
padmamullikhya prathamaṃ karṇikāṃ tadanantaram ||43||
tarjanyamadhyā pūrvotthaṃ vibhajedvā samāhitaḥ ||
tarjanyaṃguṣṭhayogairvā tṛṇamārabhya yadbhavet || 44 ||
tṛṇamārabhya sāmānye śakto vā madhyamāditaḥ ||
rākṣasādipratiṣṭhāyāṃ grahapakṣe.agnimāditaḥ || 45 ||
aṃgulyagre ca vibhajetsarvakāmārthasiddhaye ||
pratiṣṭhāyāṃ grahamakhe kāmyeṣu parivarjayet || 46 ||
subhadraṃ maṇḍalaṃ vakṣye śubhadaṃ śubhamādiśet ||
ataḥ subhadramuddiṣṭaṃ svargamokṣapradāyakam || 47 ||
sārdhahastena mānena kuryānmaṃṇḍalamuttamam ||
caturviśāṃgulaiḥ pūrṇaṃ sarvatra hastamādiśet || 48 ||
karturmadhyasahasrasya madhyamā madhyaparvaṇi ||
madhyamā dīrghamānena mānāṃgulamiti smṛtam || 49 ||
rekhādvayāṃtaraṃ yacca mūlarekhāṃ na cāśrayet ||
vaddhāṃguṣṭhanakhadvaṃdvaṃ mānāṃgulamathāpi vā ||2.2.2.50||
madhye nibadhya śaṃkuṃ ca muṣṭibāhupramāṇataḥ ||
trivṛttaṃ kārayenmadhye jyeṣṭhottarakanīyasam || 51 ||
prakalpya karṇikādīni madhye cāṣṭadalaṃ likhet ||
bahiścārkadalaṃ kuryādvarṇānāṃ kramakeṇa tu ||52||
paṃcamaṃ śvetavarṇena bahiḥ kuryāttriveṣṭanam ||
sitapītāruṇaṃ kuryātpaścādvedāṃgulāṃtare || 53 ||
veṣṭayecchuklavarṇena madhye kalpalatāṃ likhet ||
subhadraṃ maṇḍalātpūrvaṃ sarvatobhadrakaṃ śṛṇu || || 54 ||
sarvakāryeṣu yajñeṣu sarvakalyāṇamāpnuyāt ||
maṃḍalaṃ sarvatobhadraṃ sarvayajñeṣu puṣṭidam || 55 ||
sādhakānāṃ hitārthāya īśvareṇaiva bhāṣitam ||
caturviṃśatyaṃgulena hastaḥ prathamato bhavet || 56 ||
koṇe sūtradvayaṃ dadyānmadhye sūtradvayaṃ punaḥ ||
tato matsyānviracayetkarṇe sūtrāṇi sādhakaḥ ||57||
catuḥ sūtraṃ pātayecca pūrvāparavibhāgataḥ ||
punardadyāccatuḥsūtraṃ karṇasūtraṃ punardadet || 58 ||
śatadvayapadaṃ yāvatṣaṭpaṃcāśādhikaṃ tathā ||
pātayecca tathā sūtramevaṃ saptadaśaṃ bhavet || 59 ||
ūrdhvapaṃktyā padayugaṃ cādye padacatuṣṭayam ||
dvārapārśve bhavedyāvaddaṃtapaṃktyā padatrayam || 2.2.2.60 ||
rekhāṃ sarvatra śuklena racayedyajñiyottamaḥ ||
paṅkajaṃ śuklavarṇena vaiṣṇavo yāgakarmaṇi || 61 ||
śaktiyoge bhavedraktaṃ śaive pītaṃ vinirdiśet ||
pratiṣṭhāsu ca sarvāsu śuklameva praśasyate || 62 ||
pītena karṇikā kāryā caturbhāgena mānataḥ ||
śubhaṃ cakorāvasthāne tāpayitvā vicakṣaṇaḥ || 63 ||
karṇikāmūlamārabhya rekhāḥ ṣoḍaśa kalpayet ||
rekhāmūle bhavecchuklaṃ madhye raktaṃ nipātayet || 64 ||
agre pītaṃ bhavedevaṃ kṛtvā paṃkajaveṣṭanam ||
śubhravarṇena taddadyātpītavarṇena sarvataḥ || 65 ||
madhye raktaṃ bhavettacca evaṃ ṣoḍaśakalpayet ||
koṇeṣu raktaṃ dadyācca padmaṃ kṣetreṣu nirdiśet || 66 ||
śuklena pīṭhagātrāṇi pīṭhakoṇe padatraye ||
pītavarṇena racayeddvidhā paṃktidvaye tathā || 67 ||
śuddhena racayetpādau punaḥ pītādivarṇakaiḥ||
citraṃ suśobhanaṃ kāryaṃ tatra kalpalatāṃ nyaset || ||68||
mānaṃ kalpalatāyāstu dvyaṅgulaṃ parikīrtitam ||
dvedve śastaṃ ca bhramaṇaṃ śaṃkhāvartakramāttrayam ||69||
graṃthaugraṃthau puṣpaphale nānāvarṇena bhāvayet ||
nānāpaśugaṇairyuktaṃ nānāpakṣigaṇairyutam || 2.2.2.70 ||
vaiṣṇave gāruḍaṃ śastaṃ śaive kīśavṛṣaṃ likhet ||
śākte vyāghraṃ tathaiśe ca śarabhaṃ harimālikhet ||71||
śobhāṃ pītena racayedupaśobhāṃ ca pītakaiḥ ||
koṇeṣu kṛṣṇavarṇena bahiḥ syādveṣṭanatrayam || 72 ||
śuklapītāruṇaiḥ kāryaṃ maṇḍalaṃ syānmanoramam ||
sarvatobhadramaparaṃ sarvasiddhipradāyakam || 73 ||
sarvajñānamayaṃ śuddhaṃ dharmakāmārthadāyakam ||
caturasraṃ samaṃ kṛtvā digbhyo dvādaśadhā dvijāḥ || 74 ||
pātayettatra sūtrāṇi koṣṭhānāṃ dṛśyate śatam ||
catuścatvāriṃśadādyaṃ paścātṣaṭtriṃśadaṃbujam || 75 ||
koṣṭhaṃ prakalpayetpīṭhaṃ paṃktyā caivātra vīthikām ||
dvāraśobhe yathāpūrvamupaśobhaṃ ca dṛśyate || 76 ||
avaśiṣṭaiḥ padaiḥ kuryātsadbhistaṃtrāṇi mantravit ||
vidadhyātpūrvavaccheṣamevaṃ vā maṇḍalaṃ bhavet || 77||
pūrvoktamaṇḍale vidvandharaṇīsadanaṃ bahiḥ ||
madhye kalpalatā kāryā bahiṣkoṇeṣu sattamāḥ || 78 ||
gulālītūryavarṇena mahāmatta iti smṛtaḥ ||
śobhopaśobhe śobhāgrāṃ kuryādvai maṇḍalaṃ bhavet || 79 ||
etaddhi sarvatobhadraṃ rāśiyuktamataḥ param ||
śatapatraṃ vajranābhaṃ biṃbanābhaṃ sahasrakam || 2.2.2.80 ||
gajāhvaṃ ca gajākāraṃ madhye tu samalaṅkṛtam ||
catuścandre candrabimbaścandrakāṃtamudāhṛtam || 81 ||
bahirdvādaśabhiḥ sūryaiḥ sūryākrāṃtaṃ prakīrtitam ||
śekharī tripuṭaṃ caiva śatapatraṃ ca prakramāt || 82 ||
sahasrameva viprendrāḥ padmānte yasya svastikam ||
svastikaṃ tadbhavedviprāḥ puṣkaraṃ vajrasaṃmatam || 83 ||
cintāmaṇiṃ kuṃkumāṃśaṃ khātaṃ ca harivallabham ||
pañcasiṃhāsanasthaṃ ca pañcasiṃhāsanaṃ viduḥ || 84 ||
tadvadvṛṣāsanaṃ jñeyaṃ śikhirūpaṃ śikhidhvajam ||
nārasiṃhaṃ padmagarbhaṃ kapotāsyaṃ tathā bhavet || 85 ||
gāruḍaṃ merugarbhaṃ ca nīlakaṇṭhaṃ narākṛtim ||
śatakratugajārūḍhaṃ śrībiṃbanavasūtrakam || 86 ||
aṣṭāsramaṣṭakoṇādyaṃ bahiḥ padmavanaṃ kṛtam ||
kāmadvayena puṭitaṃ sahasraṃ padmaveṣṭitam || 87 ||
tryasragarbhaṃ paṅkajaṃ ca tryasraṃ tatparikīrtitam ||
aṣṭa patrāṇi vai meruṃ sumeruṃ tadviparyaye || 88 ||
mahāmahāmerupṛṣṭhaṃ śatatrayacchadairvṛtam ||
chidravyaktiṃ pravakṣyāmi yathā mānena bho dvijāḥ || 89 ||
vasu 8 dig 10 viṃśakaiścaiva 20 catvāriṃśat 40 śatārdhakam 50 ||
daṃḍiśravaṇasaṃpanna 60 mākāśaṃ vasusaṃmitam || 2.2.2.90 ||
śataviṃśādhikaṃ caiva 120 dalāni tadanantaram ||
śuklaraktaṃ cāṣṭavaṇairbiṃboṣṭhaṃ paripūrayet || 91 ||
śuklena paṅkajaṃ tatra paścātkuryāttriveṣṭanam ||
śatapatramatho vakṣye bimbarājeti kathyate || 92 ||
sthaṃḍile kuśahaste ca pūrvavadveṣṭayetkramāt ||
vasu 8 pañcakalā 16 pañcaviṃśakaṃ 25 tannapatrakāt || 93 ||
catvāriṃśattataḥ paścā 40 daṣṭottaraśataṃ 108 bhavet ||
śuklaṃ śoṇaṃ tathā pītaṃ śyāmaśuklairanaṃtaram || 94 ||
vilome dalasandhīni śākte śaive tu ṣaṭpuram ||
veṣṭayetpaṃcavarṇena śuklādīni samaṃtataḥ || 95 ||
raktapītaiḥ samāstīrya koṇāñchuklena pūrayet ||
sthaṃḍile tārahastena aṣṭahastaṃ prakalpayet || 96 ||
maṃḍalaṃ biṃbarājasya aṣṭottaradalairvṛtam ||
vasupañcaśaktiviṃśaccatvāriṃśacchatārddhakam || 97 ||
tryṛtupatraṃ suvṛttaṃ syādvṛttayuktaṃ sabilvakam ||
catvāriṃśaddvayaṃ caiva gaganena samāvṛtam || 98 ||
śataṃ viṃśādhikaśataṃ dviśataṃ viṃśamuttamam ||
veṣṭanāṃse ca triśataṃ prakramādatha vardhayet || 99 ||
lavalyābhamatho vakṣye sārddhahastapramāṇataḥ ||
navaviṃśaṃ kalpayettu catuḥsūtrāṇi pātayet || 2.2.2.100 ||
dakṣiṇottarataścaiva tadvadeva vijānīhi ||
pītena retapuḥṭitā madhye śuklaṃ vibhāvyate || 101 ||
grahapakṣennapītena madhye raktaṃ pratiṣṭhitam ||
sarvā rekhāśca śuklena pauṣṭike pītamādiśet || 102 ||
saśāṃtike na yoktavyaṃ kāme raktaṃ vinirdiśet ||
madhye tu paṅkajaṃ raktaṃ yugme somasya paṅkajam || 103 ||
śuklavarṇena tatkuryātpītavarṇamudasya ca ||
aiśānyāṃ cottare bhāge guroḥ pītaṃ tu paṅkajam || 104 ||
pūrvasyāṃ diśi śukrasya paṅkajaṃ śubhravarṇakam ||
vāruṇe tu śanaiḥ kṛṣṇaṃ nairṛtyāṃ dhūmravarṇakam || 105 ||
rāhoḥ prakalpayettacca ketorapi niyojayet ||
vāyavyāṃ diśi saṃyojya paṅkajaṃ vilikhettataḥ || || 106 ||
vilome dalasandhīni pūrayatsuvicakṣaṇaḥ ||
bahiḥ pañcarajaiḥ kāryaṃ yuvadurgavibhūṣitam || 107 ||
pūrvapaścimadigbhāge śuklaṃ syāddvāradeśataḥ ||
dakṣiṇottaradigbhāge raktameva praśasyate || 108 ||
tristhāne samamadhye ca dvādaśāṃgulaprakramāt ||
dvihastādāvaṃgulena varddhayettadvibhāgataḥ || || 109 ||
pañcābjamaṇḍalaṃ jñeyaṃ catuḥsvastikabhūṣitam || 2.2.2.110 ||
iti śrībhaviṣye mahāpurāṇe madhyamaparvaṇi dvitīyabhāge dvitīyo.adhyāyaḥ ||2||
mūlyakathanavarṇanam
|| sūta uvāca || ||
na kuryāddakṣiṇāhīnaṃ mānahīnaṃ na kārayet ||
amānena hato yajñastasmānmānaṃ praśasyate || 1 ||
yasya yajñasya yanmānaṃ tattu tenaiva yojayet ||
amānena kṛte sarve vrajeyurnarakaṃ punaḥ || 2 ||
ācāryahotṛbrahmāṇo vidhijñaḥ sahakartṛkaḥ ||
yasya yajñe pāpakaśca jātihīnaḥ praveśayet || 3 ||
aśītibhirvarāṭaiśca paṇa ityabhidhīyate ||
taistu ṣoḍaśabhirjñeyaṃ purāṇaṃ saptabhistu taiḥ || 4 ||
rājataiścāṣṭabhiḥ svarṇaṃ yajñādau dakṣiṇā smṛtā ||
mahārāme dvisauvarṇaṃ kūpe svarṇārdhameva ca || 5 ||
tulasyāmalakīyāge suvarṇaikaṃ pracakṣate ||
yakṛlloke ca sauvarṇaṃ lakṣe svarṇaṃ catuṣṭayam || 6 ||
navame koṭihome ca devatānāṃ ca sthāpane ||
prāsādasya samutsarge aṣṭādaśa suvarṇakāḥ || 7 ||
taḍāge puṣkariṇyāṃ ca ardhārdhaṃ pari kīrtitam ||
mahādāne ca dīkṣāyāṃ vṛṣotsarge ca sattamāḥ || 8 ||
jīvataśca vṛṣotsarge gayāśrāddhe tathaiva ca ||
avittasādhyamānena yajñaṃ kuryātkalauyuge || 9 ||
daṃpatyośca vṛṣotsarge mānamekamudāhṛtam ||
bahubhiḥ kiyamāṇopi yāga eko mahottamaiḥ || 2.2.3.10 ||
rājñaḥ karagrahe caiva dīkṣāyāṃ dāna karmaṇi ||
aśītirattikaṃ svarṇaṃ śravaṇe bhāratasya ca || 11 ||
grahayāge pratiṣṭhāyāṃ suvarṇaśatarattikaḥ ||
lakṣahome cāyute ca koṭyāmeva vidhīyate || || 12 ||
devānāṃ brāhmaṇānāṃ ca dānaṃ yasya prakalpitam ||
tasyaiva deyaṃ taddānaṃ sāṃgopāṃgaṃ sadakṣiṇam || 13 ||
nānāsya kiñciddātavyaṃ saṃgabhaṃgo bhavedyataḥ ||
gṛhī tu kṛtvā yaddānaṃ tadā tasya ṛṇī bhavet || 14 ||
yajñeṣu home yaddravyaṃ kāṣṭhamājyādikaṃ ca yat ||
tannāyakasya pūjāyāṃ dravyamāhurvinirmitam || 15 ||
anādidevatārcāyāṃ pūjāsnānādikarmaṇi ||
yasyārhaṇādikaṃ dravyaṃ tasya devasya tadbhavet || 16 ||
pratyakṣaṃ dakṣiṇāṃ dadyādyajñadānavratādike ||
adakṣiṇaṃ naiva kāryaṃ prakuryādbhūridakṣiṇam || 17 ||
ato dattaṃ purā dattaṃ dātavyaṃ caiva saṃprati ||
parasvodārabuddhīnāṃ sā sā hi dakṣiṇā bhavet || 18 ||
dattāni vidhivatpuṃsāṃ devadānāni yāni hi ||
dāsīdāsagavādīni manasā yāni karhi cit || 19 ||
dātavyānyapi tānyeva kārayetparivarttanam ||
ekasyānekadānaṃ ca dadetkaścitpṛthakpṛthak || 2.2.3.20 ||
varaṇaṃ ca kadā kuryāttantre kuryācca dakṣiṇām ||
ratnasya dakṣiṇā deyā kāṃcanaṃ samudāhṛtam || 21 ||
kāṃcanasya bhavedraupyaṃ raupye kāṃcanamudviśet ||
bhūmerbhūmirdakṣiṇā syādvastrasya vastradakṣiṇā || 22 ||
pānīyasya tu pānīyaṃ vrīhīṇāṃ vrīhidakṣiṇā ||
gajasya dakṣiṇā chāgo hyaśvasya meṣa īritaḥ || ||23||
paśūnāṃ ca catuṣpādā devasya devadakṣiṇā ||
yajño mānasya ṣaḍbhāgo dviguṇaḥ parikīrtitaḥ || 24 ||
ācāryasyaiva bhāgaikaṃ yajamānaḥ pradāsyati ||
pāpakaistu kalatrāṇāṃ bhāgaikaṃ tadanaṃtaram || 25 ||
pātrāṇāmṛtvigādīnāṃ bhāgatrayamudāhṛtam ||
sarvasattvasya bhāgaikaṃ svalpaṃ cecchiṣṭagauravāt ||26|ḥ
ācāryādyaṃśataḥ kaścitkṣīṇavittaṃ samāharet ||
amūlyaṃ vargamūlyaṃ yadbhavedvai dakṣiṇottamā || 27 ||
mānāśaktau tu yajñānāṃ yaddeyaṃ yajñasiddhaye ||
devatā pustakaṃ ratnaṃ gāvo dhānyaṃ tilāstathā ||28||
nameruphalapuṣpāṇi deyānyetāni sarvataḥ ||
catuścakrāṃkito yastu sāṃdro vṛtto janārdanaḥ ||29||
devatāpratimādyaṃ ca śironābhistathaiva ca ||
śvetaliṃgaṃ ratnaliṃgamindranīlādikaṃ ca yat ||2.2.3.30||
dakṣiṇāvartaśaṃkhaṃ ca harivaṃśastathā khilaḥ ||
kapilo nīlavṛṣabhaḥ somadhānyaṃ tathaiva ca || 31 ||
amūlyānyāhuretāni dattvānantaphalāni ca ||
svarṇapādo bhavenmūlyaṃ śālagrāmasya dakṣiṇā || 32 ||
kṣudraliṃge svarṇamūlyaṃ pādārdhaṃ śrīdharepi ca ||
anantonantamityuktaṃ pādārdhaṃ bāṇaliṅgake || 33 ||
yathā pustakamātreṇa svarṇa pādārdhamiṣyate ||
jyotiṣerdhaṃ suvarṇasya rajatārdhaṃ vṛṣe tathā || 34 ||
harivaṃśe ślokaśate svarṇamekaṃ prakīrtitam ||
dharmaśāstrasya sāhasre rajatatrayamīritam|| 35 ||
kapilāyāṃ suvarṇārdhaṃ dhenumātre purāṇakam ||
prāyaścittavidhau jñeyaṃ dhenumātraṃ purāṇakam || 36 ||
purāṇatritayaṃ cānye vīryahīne dvayaṃ bhavet ||
kṛṣṇe vṛṣe ṣaṭpurāṇaṃ śvete navapurāṇakam ||37||
dvātriṃśacca purāṇaṃ syādvṛṣe nīle tathaiva ca ||
nameroḥ praticakre ca dvādaśa svarṇarattikāḥ || || 38 ||
mūlyaṃ śrīphalamātre.api purāṇatritayaṃ bhavet ||
paṅktyāpi turyakaṃ vivātkalau paṇavyavasthayā || 39 ||
dhātrīphalasya pratyekaṃ bhavedrajatamā ṣakam ||
etānyāhuḥ praśastāni mūlayoge paraṃ viduḥ || 2.2.3.40 || ||
iti śrībhaviṣpe mahāpurāṇe madhyamaparvaṇi dvitīyabhāge mūlyakathane tṛtīyo.a dhyāyaḥ || 3 |||9||

mūlyadānavarṇanam
|| sūta uvāca || ||
pūrṇapātramatho vakṣye yajñe sādhāraṇe.api ca ||
kāmahome bhavenmuṣṭirmuṣṭayoṣṭau tu kuñcikā || 1 ||
ekaika kuñcimānena kuryātpātrāṇi vai sadā ||
pātrāṇi ca pṛthakkṛtvā sthāpayeddvāradeśataḥ || 2 ||
siddhānāṃ khaḍgadhārāṇāṃ pratyekasya dinakramāt ||
tatraiva dadyā nnānyatra na kuryādvyatyayaṃ kvacit || 3 ||
kuṇḍānāṃ kuḍmalānāṃ ca vedanaṃ yādṛśaṃ śṛṇu ||
caturasrapadasyāpi raupyārdhaṃ ca kalau yuge || 4 ||
dve raupye sarvatobhadre krauñcaghrāṇe caturthakam||
mahāsiṃhāsane pañca daśapātre tadardhakam || 5 ||
sahasrāre merupṛṣṭhe turyaraupyavṛṣādhikam ||
vṛṣe gale ca vṛṣabhaṃ śeṣe raupyasahasrakam || 6 ||
caturasrasya nirmāṇe svarṇapādaḥ kalau yuge ||
mahākuṇḍe tu dviguṇaṃ vṛtte raupyaṃ nivedayet || 7 ||
padmakuṇḍe tu vṛṣabhamardha candre tu raupyakam ||
yonikuṇḍe dadeddhenumaṣṭārdhasvarṇamāṣakam || 8 ||
ṣaḍasre tu tadardhaṃ syādyāge māṣadvayaṃ bhavet ||
śaive codyāpane caiva pratyahnā svarṇamāṣakam || 9 ||
dāraṇe hastamātraṃ syātsvarṇakṛṣṇakalaṃ bhavet ||
iṣṭikākaraṇe caiva pratyahnā syātpaṇadvayam || 2.2.4.10 ||
khaṇḍe daśavarāṭaṃ syādbṛ hanmāne tu kākiṇī ||
taḍāge puṣkariṇyāṃ ca khanane prathamāṃgake || 11 ||
saptahastamite kuṇḍe niṣṭhe ābaddhamātrakam ||
purāṇasya ca ekāṃśaṃ vetanaṃ parikīrtitam || 12 ||
vardhayetpaṇamātreṇa nimne patre ca prakramāt ||
bṛhatkūpasya nirmāṇe pratyahaṃ ca paṇadvayam || 13 ||
śaile jñeyaṃ kāñcanasya rattikā gṛhakarmaṇi||
koṣṭhe jñeyaṃ sārddhapaṇaṃ raṃgādiracite paṇam||14||
vṛkṣāṇāṃ ropaṇe dadyātpratyahnā sārdhamāṣakam ||
setubaṃdhe ca paṃkile ca paṇadvayaṃ ca kākiṇī || 15 ||
paṇepaṇe tu tāmrasya dadyātpaṇacatuṣṭayam ||
ghaṭane kāṃsyasīsānāṃ paṇatrayamudāhṛtam || 16 ||
atha vā dinasaṃkhyānaṃ paṇaikaṃ ca sakākiṇi ||
suvarṇasya paṇaike tu purāṇaṃ ratnakuṭṭime || 17 ||
rajate tu tadardhaṃ syātsphaṭikasya ca dāraṇe ||
dinasaṃkhyāpaṇadvaṃdvaṃ ratnānāmatha kuḍmalam|| 18 ||
maṇivedhe maṇau jñeyaṃ kākiṇī parikīrtitā ||
caturvarāṭamadhikaṃ sphāṭike maṇivedhane || 19 ||
kāṃsyatālasya nirmāṇe dhamane tu paṇatrayam ||
lākṣānirmāṇake kārye tadardhamapi kīrtitam||2.2.4.20||
gavāṃ ca dohane caiva varāṭe turyavetanam||
vetane vastranirmāṇe patre hastapaṇatrayam ||21||
avivastrasya nirmāṇe syaṃdanaṃ daśakākiṇī ||
pidhānavastranirmāṇe tripaṇaṃ parikīrtitam || 22 ||
daśa kākiṇī ūrdhvādhastadvyaye paṇyavetanam ||
vaṃśājīvasya pratyahnā paṇasyārdhe sakākiṇi || 23 ||
lohakārasya ca tathā nāpitasya ca vetanam ||
śirasā tasya vapane vijñeyā daśa kākiṇī || 24 ||
saśmaśrunakhamāne tu pradadyātkākiṇīdvayam ||
nārīṇāmatha saṃskāre nakhacitrādirañjane || 25 ||
sakākiṇi paṇaṃ tacca savitre ca payodhare ||
paṇānāṃ turyakaṃ dadyātsīmaṃtasyālake tathā || 26 ||
padacitre tu sārddhaṃ syādgrīvāṇāṃ guhyadhāraṇe ||
dhānyānāṃ ropaṇe caiva dinaike paṇa vetanam || 27 ||
lavaṇe tu tathā deyā guvākānāṃ ca ropaṇe ||
daṇḍapatrasya saṃskāre maricānāṃ tathaiva ca || 28 ||
paṇadvayaṃ varāṭānāmadhikaṃ daśameva tu ||
halehale paṇaikaṃ syātkākiṇyadhikameva ca || 29 ||
paṇatrayaṃ cakrapaṇe mahiṣāṇāṃ paṇādhikam ||
narāṇāṃ vāhane caiva paṇaikaṃ daśa kākiṇī || 2.2.4.30 ||
dāsīnāṃ gardabhānāṃ ca adhikaṃ kākiṇīdvayāt ||
kṣālane cāpi vastrasya tailakṣāravivarjite || 31 ||
vastre pratipaṇaṃ dadyāddīrghe prasthe.api vardhayet ||
sadyaḥ prakṣālane.apyardhaṃ dinādāvadhikaṃ bhaved || 32 ||
śvetavastre bhavennyūnaṃ pade sūkṣme ca varddhayet ||
mṛttikānāṃ samuddhāraṃ kuddāle cekṣupīḍane || 33 ||
vetanaṃ puṣpasaṃskāre sahasraṃ daśakākiṇī ||
kākiṇī sraṅnibaddhe ca dviguṇaṃ kaṇṭhamālikā || 34 ||
abaddhe dvyaṃgulaṃ yāvanmuṇḍamālā prakīrtitā ||
hastatraye kaṇṭhamālā ānābhi kamalāvadhi || 35 ||
kākiṇīkatrayaṃ caiva nirmāṇe dvijasattamāḥ ||
mālatyāśca tulasyāśca jātiyūthyośca sattamāḥ || 36 ||
tadardhārdhaṃ mārutena damane bakulasya ca ||
vetanaṃ dīpataile ca ājyasya parivardhayet || 37 ||
yāmeyāme raupyamāṣaṃ snehe caiva tu kākiṇī ||
sārdhāṃgulapramāṇena vastravartiṃ vidurbudhāḥ || 38 ||
ṣaḍaṃgulena dairghyaṃ ca na nyūnaṃ nādhikaṃ bhavet ||
pañcaviṃśatibhiḥ saṃkhyā taṃtubhirdvijasattamāḥ || 39 ||
pañcāṅgulena mānena kartavyaḥ susamāhitaḥ ||
hastocchrāye pradadyāttu muṣṭihaste tu madhyamam || 2.2.4.40 ||
trihaste caturhaste vā uttamaṃ mānamīritam ||
svarṇadhāre hato rājā rajate sarvakāmadaḥ || 41 ||
tāmre cāyuḥkṣayakaramāyase durgatipradaḥ ||
śastasya karamardasya praśastottara ucyate || 42 ||
dīpādhāraṃ kāṃsyamayaṃ tathārītimayasya ca ||
abhāve mṛnmayasyaiva mṛnmaye mānavarjitam || 43 ||
daśāṅgadhūpake mūlyaṃ viṃśake tu paṇatrayam ||
dvādaśakāṃgule.apyardhavartiṃ dhūpāya vartayet || 44 ||
haste paṃcapramāṇaṃ ca vastraiḥ kuryācca vartikām ||
pañcaviṃśatibhirvā yaḥ sa mahāvartirucyate ||45|| ||
iti śrībhaviṣye mahāpurāṇe madhyamaparvaṇi dvitīyabhāge caturtho.adhyāyaḥ ||4|| ||
kalaśanirṇayavarṇanam
sūta uvāca ||
ataḥ paraṃ pravakṣyāmi kalaśānāṃ vinirṇayam ||
yasyārpite ca māṃgalye yātrāsiddhiśca jāyate ||1||
saptāṅgaṃ kalaśe jñeyaṃ pañcāṅgamatha vā punaḥ ||
vārimātreṇa saṃpūrṇe na sā siddhiḥ prajāyate ||2||
atha vākṣatapuṣpeṣu devamāvāhya pūjayet ||
na cānyatra yajeddevānviphalaṃ parikīrtitam||3||
vaṭasyāśvatthavṛkṣasya dhātakībilvakasya ca ||
pañcapallavamuddiṣṭaṃ vinyasetkalaśopari || 4 ||
sauvarṇā rājatā vāpi tāmrādyā mṛnmayāstathā ||
kalaśāḥ kramaśaḥ proktā yathāvittānusārataḥ || 5 ||
abhedyāḥ suṣamāḥ plakṣāḥ sarve ādyāḥ supūritāḥ ||
niśchidrā ṛjavaścaiva secanānyekakarṣakaḥ || 6 ||
eka triṃśāṅgulaṃ kuryātkālāhe dviguṇaṃ śatam ||
mukhaṃ cāṣṭāṃgulaṃ tasya dvyaṃgule ca varārthite ||7||
taijasaiḥ kārayenmānaṃ mṛnmaye mānamucyate ||
kalaśodakanirmāṇe amānaṃ naiva yojayet || 8 ||
kalaśasthāpanaṃ vakṣye yatra sannihitāḥ surāḥ ||
vyutkrameṇa pravinyāse yātudhāno haretkila || 9 ||
yajñe sādhāraṇaṃ vakṣye yadvidhānaṃ yathāmatam ||
svastikopari vinyāse saṃpūrṇasyārdhamānake || 2.2.5.10 ||
caturasrottaraṃ bhittvā cordhvādhomānataḥ samam ||
turyasūtrāṇi matimānpañca pūrvāyatanāni ca || 11 ||
mārjayetsvastikākāraṃ turyamātraṃ yathā bhavet ||
svastikaṃ jāyate tatra kalaśānāṃ tathāsanam || 12 ||
syonā pṛthivīti maṃtreṇa kuryādbhūbhiparigraham ||
madhyamānānikābhyāṃ ca nyasyetpātālasaṃmukham ||
ṛṣirnārāyaṇo.asya syādgāyatrī devatā raviḥ || 13 ||
viniyogaḥ sthāpane ca tathā bhūmiparigrahaḥ ||
dhānyamasīti mantreṇa dhānyasūktaṃ paristavet || 14 ||
asya mantrasya ca ṛṣirgautamaḥ parikīrtitaḥ ||
anuṣṭupca bhavecchando devatāsya guruḥ smṛtaḥ || 15 ||
ājighraṃ kalaśaṃ mahyāṃ sthāpayetkalaśaṃ tataḥ ||
kaniṣṭhāṃguṣṭhakaṃ tyaktvā kumbhāgre udare.api ca || 16 ||
vinyāsaścaiva kartavyastryaṃgule brahmamudrayā ||
ājighrasya ca mantrasya ṛṣirbharga udāhṛtaḥ ||
paṃktiśchandaśca uddiṣṭo devatā viṣṇuravyayaḥ || 17 ||
kalaśasthāpane caiva somayāge ca yojayet ||
paṃcanadyetimantreṇa kṣipedgaṅgājalaṃ tataḥ || 18 ||
devatā paramā triṣṭubdevatā somabhāvitaḥ ||
viniyogaḥ pallave ca vinyasetparikīrtitaḥ || 19 ||
yāḥ phalinīti maṃtreṇa pradadyātsaphalākṣatam ||
yāḥ phalinīti maṃtrasya ṛṣiḥ kamalasaṃjñakaḥ ||
triṣṭupchando gaṇapatirdevatā parikīrtitā || 2.2.5.20 ||
badaraṃ nāgaraṃ caiva dhātrī ca picumardakam ||
jīvaṃtī pīvaraṃ caiva phalānyetāni varjayet || 21 ||
hiraṇyagarbheti ṛcā pañcaratnāni nikṣipet ||
ṛṣirhiraṇyagarbhosya chandastriṣṭubudāhṛtam ||
savitā devatā cāsya ratnanyāseti yoja yet ||22||
amṛtīkaraṇaṃ kuryāddaivaśulbanameva ca ||
varuṇasya tveti ṛṣirvaruṇāṃtare yojayet ||23||
śrīśca te iti mantreṇa dadyātpuṣpaṃ sacandanam ||
gandhadvāreti maṃtreṇa dadyādgandhaṃ viloḍitam || 24 ||
kāṇḍāditi ca mantreṇa dadyāddūrvākṣataṃ punaḥ ||
vrīhayaśceti mantreṇa pañca vrīhīṃśca nikṣipet ||25||
tilāśca māṣā mudgāśca śyāmākāḥ śālayaḥ smṛtāḥ ||
pañca dhānyagaṇaḥ proktaḥ sarvāriṣṭaniṣūdanaḥ || 26 ||
iti śrībhaviṣye mahāpurāṇe madhyama parvaṇi dvitīyabhāge pañcamo.adhyāyaḥ|| 5 || cha ||
māsavarṇanam
|| sūta uvāca || ||
atha māsāśrayaṃ karma kartuṃ māsanirūpaṇam ||
kriyate tadvidhaṃ saṃkhye bhavenmāsa ścaturvidhaḥ || 1 ||
cāndraḥ sauraḥ sāvanaśca nākṣatraśca tathāparaḥ ||
śuklapratipadaṃ prāpya yāvaddarśa ca aindavaḥ || 2 ||
ekarāśau raviryāvatsa māsaḥ saura ucyate ||
triṃśatā divasairmāsaḥ sāvanaḥ parikīrtitaḥ || 3 ||
nākṣatramāso.aśvinyādirevatyanto hi viśrutaḥ||
udayādudayaṃ yastu sāvano divaso raveḥ || 4 ||
taṃtreṇaikatitherbhāgakālo divasa aindavaḥ ||
rāśestriṃśadbhāgakālaḥ kālastvekasya bhāsvataḥ ||5||
ahorātraṃ tu tannaivaṃ saure.api bhāgamānataḥ||
ahorātraṃ sādhanasya mukhyavṛttvaiva labhyate || 6 ||
saure cāndre tūpagaṇau triṃśadbhāge tvadarśanāt ||
sāvanā divasā grāhyā ṛṣīṇāṃ samaye gṛhe || 7 ||
atibhāgavyavasthāyāṃ prāyaścittakriyāsu ca||
mantropāsanakārye ca annasya prāśane śiśoḥ||8||
karasya grahaṇe rājño vyavahāreṣu māḥsu ca||
yajñeṣu dinasaṃ khyāyāṃ grāhyo māsastu sāvanaḥ ||9||
sauramāso vivāhādau yadādyaiḥ supragṛhyate ||
yajñeṣvapi vrate vāpi vihite snānakarmaṇi ||2.2.6.10||
cāndrastu pārvaṇe grāhyo vārṣikeṣvaṣṭakāsu ca ||
śrāddheṣu tithikāryeṣu tithyukteṣu vrateṣu ca ||11||
nākṣatraḥ somapādīnāmāryabhāgavicāraṇe ||
karagrahavidhau rājñāṃ nāyaṃ sarvajanākṛtiḥ || 12||
tadvaccaitrādimāsoktaṃ tithyuktaṃ karma dṛśyate ||
tattu cāndreṇa kartavyaṃ sā hi caitrādinocyate ||13||
rājoktau sāvanaḥ prokte tithisaṃbhāgakarmaṇi||
tatra sauro bhavedvācyaḥ sauraśabdapravartanāt ||14||
citrānakṣatrayogena caitrī sā pūrṇimā smṛtā||
tayopalakṣito māsaścaitra ityabhidhīyate || 15 ||
sa ca tithyātmako māsaścāndraḥ śravaṇabhāskaraḥ ||
cāndraścaitryaṃtiko māso mukhyaścaitrādisaṃjñakaḥ || 16||
gauṇo.apyasau yugādyāderanurodhena vardhanāt ||
mukhyaḥ śuklādidarśāṃto māso lākṣaṇiko mataḥ || 17 ||
caitrādyāścāndramāsā ye dvādaśāpi tu yogataḥ ||
paurṇamāsīyutābhistu na carkṣatvaṃ na rebhire || 18 ||
viśākhayādyeṣu yā vā tathā bhādrapadena vā ||
yatra na pūrṇimāyogo māsaḥ sa syādvināśakaḥ || 19 ||
yo.asau yadyapi caitrādau naiṣṭhiko.api pralabhyate ||
yathā saure.api yāto.asau yogo.ayamatidurghaṭaḥ || 2.2.6.20 ||
tathā ca māsasāmānye yogenāyaṃ bhavetkvacit ||
yadi varṣasahasrānte tadakṣeṇaiva pūrṇimā || 21 ||
saṃyuktā labhyate yatra bhavedrājyavināśanam ||
sūryācandramasau nityaṃ kurvāte tithibhojanam || 22 ||
daṇḍadvaye bhuktaśeṣe na bhuñjīta kadācana ||
atikramyāparāṃ bhoktuṃ tithiṃ yatra ubhāvapi ||23||
yatra viṃśattithistasmātsañcitaikā bhavediti ||
triṃśatā cāndramāsau tu candreṇaiko hi varddhate || 24||
sa cādhiko yato māsastataḥ syādadhimāsakaḥ ||
samarātriṃ divaṃ kṛtvā vaivasvatapurīgatim || 25 ||
gaśe rāśyaṃtare sūryo yāvadgacchati bhānumān ||
gacchanvardhayati pūrvaṃ tithayastāstu saṃcitāḥ || 26 ||
vardhate tithayo yāvattulāṃ yāti divā karaḥ ||
tulādirāśiṣaṭke tu na varddhate kadācana || 27 ||
svabhāvātsamagatyā tu yataḥ saṃkramate raviḥ ||
saṃcayamānātvekaikā pratimāsaṃ vivarddhate ||
niśāsvapi tu saure tā ekasmiṃstisra ityapi || 28 || saṃpūrṇatriṃśattithibhirmāsyekasminyadā bhavet ||
sa cāndro malino māsaḥ koṇapādyaiḥ samīhitaḥ || 29 ||
bhuktocchiṣṭā tu tanmāsādasaṃspṛṣṭadivākaraḥ ||
yadā saṃkramate laṃghya tadā jñeyo malimlucaḥ || 2.2.6.30 ||
sārdhavarṣadvaye pūrṇe patatyevaṃ niśākaraḥ ||
parityaktāśca yāvaṃtyo vyutkramiṇyaśca yāḥ punaḥ ||
tithayaste niyoktavyā naro na syātsa pūraṇaḥ || 31 ||
nairṛtyāṃtaṃ hitārthāya jalaketurnigacchati ||
nirmamaṃ malinaṃ māsaṃ pretānāṃ ca hitāya ca ||32||
ataḥ pretakriyāḥ sarvāḥ kāryā malimluce.api ca||
yatkartavyaṃ na kartavyaṃ malamāse dvijottamāḥ ||33||
tadidānīṃ pravakṣyāmi kathitaṃ ca prasaṃgataḥ ||
yacchrāddhaṃ pretasaṃbaṃdhi sarpiḍīkaraṇāvadhi ||
malamāse.api tatkāryaṃ viśi naṣṭi sapiṃḍanam || 34 ||
yadā tu dvādaśo māso daivānmalimluco bhavet|
tatraiva yatnātkartavyā kriyā pretasya vārṣikī || 35 ||
māsāṃtare tu patite tasminneva malimluce ||
tadā trayodaśe māsi kartavyaṃ tatsapiṃḍanam|| 36 ||
varjyaṃ māsikayā śrāddhamekaṃ tasmiṃstrayodaśe ||
triṃśatā ghaṭikaiḥ śrāddhaṃ vardhate.adyāpi saṃmitam || 37 ||
kuryātpatyābdikaṃ karma prayatnena malimluce ||
naimittikaṃ ca kurvīta nādhikārastayorbhavet || 38 ||
tīrthasnānamalabhyaṃ tattadādyaṃ devadarśanam ||
upavāsādikaṃ karma sīmantonnayanaṃ tathā || 39 ||
ārtavarjaṃ puṃsavanaṃ putrādimukhadarśanam ||
malamāsepi kurvīta śukre cāstamupāgate ||2.2.6.40||
malamāsepi kurvīta nṛpāṇāmabhiṣecanam||
vratāraṃbhaṃ pratiṣṭhāṃ ca cūḍākarma ca mekhalām||41||
maṃtropāsāṃ rahasyaṃ ca mahādānaṃ sumaṅgalam ||
vivāhaṃ ca gṛhāraṃbhaṃ praveśaṃ navaveśmanaḥ || 42 ||
upagrahaṃ gavādīnāmāśramāṃtarasaṃkramam ||
dīrghamātrāsu nejyaṃ vai tīrthayātrāvasecanam|| 43 ||
varṣavṛddhivṛṣotsargakanyā dvirnayanādi ca ||
yajñaṃ ca kāmikaṃ vidvānmalamāse vivarjayet ||44||
evamastaṃ gate śukre vṛddhabālye ca saṃtyajet||
pādāstaṃ ca mahāstaṃ ca dvividhaṃ cāstamasya tu || 45 ||
dvisaptatirdinānyasya mahāstaṃ pūrvato bhavet ||
pṛthivyāmeva pādāstaṃ bhaveddvādaśa vatsarān || 46 ||
ūnapañcāśadadhikaṃ divasānāṃ śatadvayam ||
pratīcyāmuditaḥ kāvyo dṛśyo bhavati sarvadā || 47 ||
ekarkṣe guruṇā yukto yāvattiṣṭhati bhārgavaḥ ||
malamāsavatkarmāṇi prāhustyājyāni sarvaśaḥ ||48||
ṛkṣabhede tvekarāśau saṃparke yadi vānayoḥ ||
guro rāhorapi tathā tyajedvidvānna saṃśayaḥ || 49 ||
siṃhe rāśau sthite sūrye jīve cāstamupāgate ||
heyāni yāni karmāṇi niṣiddhāni malimluce || 2.2.6.50 ||
mithunasthe yadā bhānau malamāsaḥ patatyasau ||
dvirāṣāḍha iti khyāto gauṇe śabdavivartanāt || 51 ||
phalaṃ cātra mṛtasyaurdhvadehikaṃ karma kurvatā ||
āṣāḍhakīrtanaṃ kāryamevaṃ varṣāṃtare.api ca || 52 ||
āṣāḍhadvayasaṃyuktapūrṇamāsīdvayaṃ tathā ||
yugmakarkaṭayo rāśyo dvirāṣāḍhastadā bhavet || 53 ||
bhavedgauṇo dvirāṣāḍho rāśistatraiva saṃyute ||
pūrvatrike tu patite tadeva bhagavānhariḥ || 54 ||
karkaṭe śayanaṃ kuryādāgamiṣyaṃ paratrake ||
karkiṇyarke suptaharau śakrapūjāśvine bhavet || 55 ||
durgotthānaṃ tulāyāṃ tu viṣṇurnidrāṃ jahātyasau || 56 ||
iti śrībhaviṣye mahāpurāṇe madhyamaparvaṇi dvitīyabhāge ṣaṣṭho.adhyāyaḥ || 6 |||9|||
tithividhānavarṇanam
|| sūta uvāca || ||
daivaṃ vā paitṛkaṃ karma kālamāśritya vartate ||
kāle tānyeva karmāṇi phalaṃ yacchaṃti kurvatām || 1 ||
muhurbālye karmaphalaṃ trikāle.api na vidyate ||
vyayo vā mukhyabhāvena phaladaḥ karmaśālinām || 2 ||
kālastu guṇabhāvena sarvakālāśritā kriyā ||
na kālena vinā kiñcittriṣu lokeṣu jāyate || 3 ||
ataḥ kālaṃ pravakṣyāmi nimittaṃ karmaṇāmiha |
kāle hyamūrtirbhagavāneka eva tu yadyapi ||
tathāpyupādhibhedena bhidyate kālabhedibhiḥ ||4||
tithinakṣatravārādau rātriyogādayopi ye ||
te.api kālāḥ pakṣamāsarāśivarṣāṃtare.api ca ||
sādhanāni bhavantyete svātantryeṇa na kasyacit ||5||
dharmasya vāpyadharmasya mukhyo vyāpāra eva saḥ ||
tithyādikālabhāveṣu niṣiddhaṃ nihitaṃ hi tat || 6 ||
pālayansvargamāpnoti hitvā prāpnotyadhogatim ||
sādhayaṃtyapi karmāṇi parasparamavekṣyate || || 7 ||
kālabhāgo niḥsahāyo ye.api syuḥ karmasādhanāḥ ||
tithau pūrvāhṇavyāpinyāṃ kurvīta karma vaidikam || 8 ||
ekoddiṣṭaṃ tu madhyāhnavyāpinyāṃ hi samācaret||
parāhṇavyāpinīṃ prāpya tithiṃ kuryāttu pārvaṇam || 9 ||
na tu pūrvāhṇamadhyāhnaparāhṇeṣu yathocitam ||
apradhāne tu kurvīta karma daivādikaṃ ca yat||2.2.7.10||
eko hi kālaḥ prātastu vṛddhiśrāddhādisādhane ||
nāpekṣate sāhāyyaṃ tattithyādiviṣuvādiṣu ||11||
devebhyo brahmaṇā dattaḥ pūrvāhṇastithibhiḥ saha ||
pitṛbhyo hyaparāhṇastu pārvaṇaṃ tu paraṃ vinā || 12 ||
pūrvāhṇamātrasaṃprāptau tato devānprapūjayet ||
pūrvāhṇasparśamātre.api tithikhaṇḍena cārpayet ||13||
kharvā darpā tathā hiṃsrā tithiśca trividhā bhavet ||
kharvādi laṃghayettulyā darpā bhavati varddhitā ||14||
hiṃsrā tu kṣayajā jñeyā kālabhedena gṛhyate ||
kharvā darpā pare grāhyā hiṃsrā grāhyā tu pūrvataḥ || 16||
śuklapakṣe parā grāhyā kṛṣṇe pūrvā praśasyate ||
snānadānavrate caiva viṣayogo nidarśitaḥ || 17 ||
tithau codeti savitā kālamātraṃ ca vā yadi ||
anyāpi saiva vijñeyā tithistasminnaharniśam || 16 ||
yathāvāste ravirbhāti ghaṭikā daśa vāpi vā||
sā tithistadahorātraṃ vyapadeśyā na cetarā||19||
śukle vā yadi vā kṛṣṇe kharvā darpā tithiśca yā ||
yayāstaṃ savitā yāti pitṛkārye ca sā tithiḥ || 2.2.7.20 ||
dinadvaye.api kutape astagāṃ tithimāśrayet ||
śrāddhakālādikaṃ yatra tatra śrāddhaṃ vidhīyate ||
vrate ca vṛddhigāminyāṃ yatrodayo raverbhavet ||21||
amāvāsyapārvaṇe ca sā tithiḥ pitṛpūjane ||
amāvasyāmṛtasyaiva pārvaṇaṃ yatra kutracit ||22||
astagāmitithiryatra sā tithiḥ pitṛmaṃdiram||
ekoddiṣṭaṃ carettatra nodaye ca kadācana||23||
śuklapakṣe ca kṛṣṇe ca yo yogaḥ parapūrvayoḥ||
pūrvedyurvā paredyurvā trisaṃdhyavyāpinī tithiḥ||
sā pūjyā ca svakṛtyeṣu pakṣayorubhayorapi ||24||
pūjyā hi vyastaṃ saṃtyajya pūrvaṃ caikādaśīyugam ||
dvitīyā vahninā yuktā caturthī paṃcamīyutā || || 25 ||
etā upoṣyāstithayaḥ puṇyāḥ syurdharmavedibhiḥ ||
etadvyastāstu puṇyāni ghnaṃti pūrvakṛtānyapi || 26 ||
bāṇena viddhā yā ṣaṣṭhī munividdhā tathāṣṭamī ||
daśamyekādaśīviddhā trayodaśyā caturdaśī || 27 ||
amāvāsyā bhūtaviddhā nopoṣyā munināpi ca ||
haṃti putrakalatrāṇi dhanāni samupoṣitā || 28 ||
viddhā ye nābhinindyāḥ syuryuktāstenābhinanditāḥ ||
vyastasya saṃbhave yugmaṃ viddhā bhavati sarvaśaḥ ||29||
tāmastāṃ tu tithiṃ prāpya yugmānyapūjyatāmiyuḥ ||
yugmāni ca divāyoge grāhyāṇi vyastaniṃdanam || 2.2.7.30 ||
naktādivratayoge tu divāsaṃvarddhamarkarān ||
rātriyogaścaturthyostu viśiṣya parigṛhyate || 31 ||
rātriyogaṃ vināpi syādekādaśyādikaṃ vratam ||
naktaṃ jāgaraṇaṃ caiva vināyoge.api śasyate || 32 ||
ekādaśyupavāsaṃ tu dvādaśīyogataścaret ||
divāyoge tu saṃpūrṇāṃ tyajedubhayapūrvataḥ || 33 ||
rātriyoge tu saṃpūrṇā sopāsyaikādaśī sadā ||
saptamī śukla pakṣe.api pūjyā ṣaṣṭhyā samanvitā || 34 ||
niśi tu syādyadā ṣaṣṭhī saptamī navamī divā ||
upoṣya kevalāṃ ṣaṣṭhīṃ toṣayedbhāskaraṃ naraḥ || 35 ||
evaṃ trayodaśīṃ kṛṣṇāṃ vidhiprāptāṃ vinā dvijāḥ ||
upoṣya pārvatīnāthaṃ toṣayedyaśca kevalam ||36 ||
divā trayodaśīyuktā kṛṣṇopoṣyā caturdaśī ||
pareṇāpi caturdaśyā na tu kuryādamātithau ||37||
trisaṃdhyavyāpinī prāpya yadi kuryādupauṣaṇam ||
pāraṇaṃ tu sinīvālyāṃ caturdaśyāmupoṣayet||38||
caturdaśīmatikramya sinīvālyāṃ tu pāraṇāt||
vratāni tasya naśyaṃti prākṛtāni caturdaśīm ||39||
saptamī lalitā bhādre śaktotthānaṃ ca vāruṇī ||
pūjyāścaitāḥ parāḥ kuryāttrisaṃdhyavyāpinīṣvapi ||2.2.7.40||
trisaṃdhyāvyāpinī pūrve parato varddhate yadi ||
saṛkṣā ṛkṣayoge tu ṛkṣābhāve parā yutā||41||
ṛkṣābhāve parā grāhyā trisaṃdhyavyāpinīṣvapi ||
śrāvaṇe cādyapāde tu praśastā śakrapūjane ||42||
abhāve cottarāṣāḍhā dhaniṣṭhā ca viśiṣyate ||
daṇḍārdhaṃ daṇḍamekaṃ vā tadardhaṃ palameva vā ||43||
udaye saṃyutā grāhyā sā tithiścottamā bhavet ||
trisaṃdhyavyāpinīṃ hitvā pūjyā śuklāṣṭamī parā ||44||
ravicakravatā grāhyā rathe tithyāderapi ca ||
trisaṃdhyavyāpinī yā tu palamekaṃ pare dine ||45||
apare.api ca sarvatra halānāṃ vāhanaṃ tyajet||
śuklaikādaśyamāvāsyāsaṃkrāntyāṃ śrāddhavāsare ||46||
narāśvagogajādīnāṃ vāhanātpātakī bhavet ||47||
karturgomahiṣādīnāṃ gardabhoṣṭrakharasya ca ||
na vāhayeddāsa dāsī vāhanenāsti dūṣaṇam || 48 ||
bahukālikayajñe ca yajñaśrāddhe tathaiva ca ||
grāmāṃtare na doṣaḥ syāddivi nadyaṃtare.api ca || 49 ||
nityaśrāddhe.apyambughaṭe yacchrāddhaṃ māsikaṃ bhavet ||
tatra gomahiṣādīnāṃ vāhane nāsti dūṣaṇam || 2.2.7.50 ||
kuryādaṃbughaṭaśrāddhaṃ na kālaniyamaṃ kvacit ||
na cānnaniyamaṃ kuryādaśmapātraṃ ca varjayet || 51 ||
taijasairnirmitaṃ kumbhamatha vā vṛkṣapatrajam ||
na yojayenmṛnmayaṃ ca śūdrāṇāṃ mṛnmaye vidhiḥ || 52 ||
nivedayecca māsāṃte mṛnmayaṃ vṛkṣamūlake ||
āsphālayetpareṇaiva na vastraṃ tu kathañcana ||
parvaśrāddhe daivalakaṃ tathā raṇḍāśramaṃ tyajet || 53 ||
mātāpitṛparityāgī tailahavyādivikrayī ||
catvāriṃśadutsavānāṃ sāṣṭānāṃ ca caredyadi || 54 ||
striyā vimucyate kaścitsa tu raṇḍāśramī mataḥ ||
aṣṭacatvāriṃśadabdaṃ vayo yāvanna pūryate || 55 ||
putrabhāryāviyuktasya nāsti yajñādhikāritā || 56 ||
yāṃ tithiṃ samanuprāpya samudeti divākaraḥ ||
snānādhyayanadāneṣu sā tithiḥ sakalā smṛtā || 57 ||
yayāstaṃ savitā yāti kṛṣṇapakṣe tu sā tithiḥ ||
pitṛrṇāṃ sakalā jñeyā snānadānādikarmasu || || 58 ||
saptamī śuklapakṣe yā yāvadicchecca khaṇḍitā ||
ādyabhāge raveḥ ṣaṣṭhyāṃ parādau yāṣṭamīyutā ||
yadyakhaṇḍā bhavetsaiva tadā jñeyā bhavātmikā || 59 ||
māghamāsena sāpyevaṃ pūrveṇa ravitoṣiṇī ||
manvaṃtarā pareṇaiva snānapānādikarmasu || 2.2.7.60 ||
iti śrībhaviṣye mahāpurāṇe madhyamaparvaṇi dvitīyabhāge saptamodhyāyaḥ || 7 || || cha ||
uttamatithinirṇayavarṇanam
||sūta uvāca || ||
tithīnāṃ pravarā yasmādbrahmaṇā samudāhṛtā ||
pratipāditā pare pūrve pratipādya navodyate || 1 ||
kārtikāśvayujoścaitre māghe cāpi viśeṣataḥ ||
snānaṃ dānaṃ daśaguṇaṃ śivaviṣṇvośca pūjanam || 2 ||
agnimiṣṭvā ca kṛtvā ca pratipadyāmiti smṛtam ||
haviṣā sarvadhānyāni prāpnuyādīpsitaṃ dhanam || 3 ||
bṛhaspatau dvitīyāyāṃ śuklāyāṃ vidhipūjanam ||
kṛtvā naktaṃ samaśnīyāllabhate bhūtimīpsitām ||4||
mithune karkaṭe caiva govipradamanāṃtaram ||
dvitīyā yā tu vipreṃdāstāmupoṣya hariṃ yajet ||
yāmupoṣya na vaidhavyaṃ prayāti strī na saṃśayaḥ || 5 ||
amūlyaśayanaṃ māsaṃ daṃpatī pratipūjayet ||
vāsobhirgandhapuṣpaiśca nānābhakṣyaiḥ pṛthagvidhaiḥ || 6 ||
vaiśākhe śuklapakṣe tu tṛtīyāyāṃ tathaiva ca ||
gaṃgātoye naraḥ snātvā mucyate sarvakilbiṣaiḥ ||7||
svātiyuktatṛtīyāyāṃ vaiśākhe tu viśeṣataḥ ||
māghe tu rohiṇīyuktā vṛṣe cāśvayuje tathā || 8 ||
tasyāṃ yaddīyate kiñcittadakṣayamudāhṛtam ||
viśeṣato haviṣyānnaṃ modakādisamāyutam ||9||
toyadānaṃ viśeṣeṇa praśaṃsaṃti manīṣiṇaḥ ||
guḍakarpūrasaṃyuktaṃ brahmaloke mahīyate || 2.2.8.10 ||
budhaśravaṇasaṃyuktā tṛtīyā yadi labhyate ||
tasyāṃ snānopavāsādyamakṣayaṃ parikīrtitam ||11||
caturthībharaṇīyoge bhaveccaradinaṃ yadā ||
tadābhyarcya yamaṃ devaṃ mucyate sarvakilibiṣaiḥ || 12 ||
śivā śāṃtā sukhā caiva caturthī trividhā smṛtā ||
sāpi bhādrapade śuklā śivaloke supūjitā || 13 ||
kārttike tu bhavecchāyā tathā māghe tu kīrtyate ||
tasyāṃ snānaṃ tapo dānamupavāso japastathā ||
bhavetsahasraguṇitaṃ śrāddhaṃ bhavati cākṣayam || 14 ||
gaṇeśe kārayetpūjāṃ modakādibhirādarāt ||
caturthyāṃ vighnanāśāya sarvakāmaprasiddhaye || 15 ||
śrāvaṇe māsi pañcamyāṃ śuklapakṣe viśeṣataḥ ||
snāpayennavanāgāṃśca gaṃdhatoyaiḥ sugaṃdhibhiḥ || 16 ||
teṣāṃ kule prayacchaṃti abhayaṃ prāṇarakṣaṇam || 17 ||
dvādaśyobhayalekhe ca gomayena viśeṣataḥ ||
pūjayeddadhidugdhādyaiḥ siṃdūrairapi bhaktitaḥ || 18 ||
supte janārdane kṛṣṇapañcamyāṃ bhavanāṃgaṇe ||
pūjayenmanasādevīṃ vāmāṃ snuhīti saṃśrayām || 19 ||
picumaṃdasya patrāṇi sthāpayedbhavanodare ||
pūjayitvā naro devīṃ na sarpabhayamāpnu yāt || 2.2.8.20 ||
yeyaṃ bhādrapade ṣaṣṭhī ṣaṣṭhī ca dvijasattama ||
snānadānādikaṃ tasyāṃ sarvamakṣayamucyate || 21 ||
ṣaṣṭhyāṃ phalāśano viprā viśeṣānmāghakārtike ||
iha cāmutra mukhyāṃ ca labhate khyātimuttamām || 22 ||
śuddhe pakṣe ca saptamyāṃ yadā saṃkramate raviḥ ||||
mahājayā tadā syādvai saptamī bhāskarapriyā || 23 ||
aparājitā tu bhādrasya mahāpātakanāśinī ||
lalitā kevalā jñeyā putrapautra vivarddhinī || 24 ||
śuklā vā yadi vā kṛṣṇā ṣaṣṭhī vā saptamī tu vā ||
ravivāreṇa saṃyuktā tithiḥ puṇyatamā smṛtā || 25 ||
āśvinasya sitāṣṭamyāmaṣṭādaśabhujāṃ yajet ||
kārttike śuklapakṣe vā mahāvibhavavistaraiḥ || 26 ||
āṣāḍhe śrāvaṇe māsi śuklāṣṭamyāṃ ca caṃḍikām ||
prātaḥ snātvārcayedbhaktyā rātrau saṃsnāpayeddvijāḥ || 27 ||
caitramāsi sitāṣṭamyāmaśokakusumairdvijāḥ ||
arcayenmṛnmayīṃ devīmaśokārthaṃ ca sarvadā || 28 ||
satyaṣṭamamuhūrte vā rohiṇīsahitāṣṭamī ||
śrāvaṇe māsi siṃhārke kvacitsāpi ca śasyate || 29 ||
ekādaśīnāṃ koṭīnāṃ vrataiśca labhate phalam||
ato daśaguṇaṃ proktaṃ kṛtvaitatphalamāpnuyāta || 2.2.8.30 ||
aśakto.anyakriyāṃ kartumupavāsaṃ tu kevalam ||
kṛtvā vimucyate pāpātsaptakṛtyakṛtāṃ varaḥ ||31||
na kālaniyamastatra na vāraniyamaḥ kvacit ||
nāpi nakṣatradoṣo.asti vāradoṣo na gaṇyate || 32 ||
trikālaṃ pūjayeddevaṃ divā rātrau viśeṣataḥ ||
ardharātre viśeṣeṇa puṣpairnānāvidhairapi ||33||
divā titheralābhe tu na kuryādvidhivadvratam ||
rātrisparśe yadi paraṃ rajanyāmapi cāṣṭamī ||34||
saptamī sārdhayāmaṃ ca rohiṇī vā na saṃspṛśet||
vratī saṃkalpayettatra na ca rātrau kadācana||35||
prāgāraṃbhaṃ prakurvīta adhimātrādhike vratī ||
viśvanāthādidevānāṃ darśanaṃ prāgvivarjayet||36||
yatra tatropavāsī syādyāmāṣṭakavrataṃ caret||
yāmārdhaṃ tatparaṃ yāme pāraṇaṃ vicaredvratī||37||
tatpare cā.annajanyaṃ vā na kuryātpāraṇaṃ gṛhī || 38 ||
nakṣatrayoge grahaṇe pūjayetparameśvaram ||
japahomādikaṃ kuryādgṛhī nopavasetkvacit || 39 ||
divāṣṭamyāṃ muhūrte vā prājāpatyena saṃyutam ||
tathāpi ca divākṛtyaṃ samāpya ca vrataṃ caret || 2.2.8.40 ||
muhūrtāṃte ca māsāṃte aṣṭamyāmapi rohiṇī ||
upavāse ca yo doṣaḥ pūjāhomaḥ praśasyate || 41 ||
navamyāṃ ca sadā pūjyāḥ pratimāse.ayutaṃ dvijāḥ ||
gṛhṇīyānniyamaṃ caiva yathā karma phalapradam || || 42 ||
kārtikasya tu māsasya daśamī śuklapakṣikā ||
tasyāṃ yuktāśanā viprā brahmalokamavāpnuyuḥ || 43 ||
daśamī jyeṣṭhamāsasya sā ceddaśaharā smṛtā ||
āśvinasya mahāpuṇyā kārtike vijayā smṛtā || 44 ||
ekādaśī vrataparā sarvapāpapraṇāśinī ||
sarvapāpavinirmuktā yathā kurvaṃti mānavāḥ || 45 ||
daśamyāmekabhaktastu saṃyataḥ syājjitendriyaḥ ||
ekādaśyāmupoṣyātha dvādaśyāṃ pāraṇaṃ caret ||46||
dvādaśa dvādaśīrhanti tasmāttathācaredbudhaḥ ||
pūrvedyurekādaśī pūrṇā parehani ca vardhate || 47 ||
na vardhate dvādaśī tu tadā tvevaṃ vyavasthitiḥ ||
vanavāsī parāṃ kuryātpūrvāṃ kuryādgṛhāśramī ||48||
pūrvevaikādaśī tyājyā vardhate cettithidvayam ||
ekādaśī dvādaśī tu tadopoṣyā parā tithiḥ || 49 ||
yadā tu pāraṇā yogyā dvādaśī nopatiṣṭhate ||
tadā pūrvaiva saṃgrāhyā tyājyā vṛddhā pare.ahani || 2.2.8.50 ||
ekādaśī kalāyuktā sakalā dvādaśī yadi ||
tatra kratusamaṃ puṇyaṃ trayodaśyāṃ tu pāraṇam || 51 ||
ekādaśī dvādaśī ca pare.ahani na labhyate ||
nopoṣyā sā mahādoṣā putrapautradhanakṣayāt || 52 ||
ekādaśī daśāviddhā dvādaśyāṃ liptikā yadā ||
dvādaśī pāraṇāyogyā vardhate cāpare.ahani ||
tadā dinadvaye tyājyā pāraṇaṃ ca niyogataḥ || 53 ||
ṣoḍaśīgrahaṇaṃ dṛṣṭvā dvādaśī luptapāraṇā ||
caṇḍātithau vrataṃ caiva haṃti puṇyaṃ purā kṛtam || 54 ||
trayodaśyāṃ yadvihitaṃ pāraṇaṃ na tu puṇyadam ||
gṛhāśramī na kuryādvā daśamīdvādaśīkṣayāt || 55 ||
yadi rudrā daśamitrā pare.ahniravisaṃkramaḥ ||
tathāpi saṃparityajya dvādaśyāṃ samupāvaset || 56 ||
vajrālokanamātraṃ tu daśamī saṃviśedyadi ||
ekādaśī na bhoktavyā parā hyekādaśī tadā || 57 ||
tadā ceddaśamīviddhā samupoṣyā na dūṣaṇam|| 58 ||
dvādaśyāmupavāsaṃ tu yaḥ karoti narottamaḥ ||
sa yāti paramaṃ sthānaṃ yatra viṣṇuranāmayaḥ || 59 ||
upoṣya daśamīmitrāṃ mohādekādaśīṃ naraḥ ||
nirayaṃ yāti sa pretya dharmasaṃtatisaṃkṣayāt || 2.2.8.60 ||
ravivāre śukravāre saṃkrāntyāṃ tu dinakṣaye ||
upavāsaṃ prakurvīta pāraṇaṃ tu vivarjayet || 61 ||
śuklāṃ vā yadi vā kṛṣṇāṃ pūrvasaṃkalpitāmapi ||
ekādaśīṃ sadā kuryānna vai kṛṣṇettarāṃ kvacit ||62||
naktena vartayetkṛṣṇāmiti śāstraviniścayaḥ ||
māse caikādaśī yatra labhyate śuklapakṣake ||
tatra kuryātkṛṣṇapakṣe parā tithirna gṛhyate ||63||
śrāvaṇī dvādaśī śuklā cāṃdrabhadre yadā harau ||
tatropoṣya hṛṣīkeśaṃ pūjayedvidhivannaraḥ || 64 ||
śrāvaṇe cāśvine caiva labhyate dvādaśīdine ||
śravaṇena samāyuktā mahatī sā prakīrtitā || 65 ||
puṣyeṇa drādaśīyuktā phālgune vijayā smṛtā ||
kārtike cetparityājyā māghe tu nārakī bhavet ||66||
yā bhādre vijayā proktā śravaṇena samāyutā||
viśeṣaḥ kathyate tatra yathāvadvratamācaret ||67||
ekādaśyāmuttarato dvādaśī ca divānvitā ||
niśipūrṇā dvādaśī ca śravaṇenāpi saṃyutā ||68||
saphalā dvādaśī jñeyā upoṣyaiṣā mahāphalā || 69 ||
dvādaśyāṃ viṣṇuviddhāyāṃ vāsudevaṃ prapūjayet ||
kṛṣṇāyāṃ tu vrataṃ kuryādbahuduḥkhaṃ samācareta || 2.2.8.70 ||
dvādaśī kāmaviddhā cenmanyate nāpyupoṣaṇam ||
hanyātpurākṛtaṃ puṇyaṃ trayodaśyāmupoṣaṇam ||71||
prahareprahare snānaṃ śarvaryāṃ ca vidhīyate ||
pūjanaṃ cāgnikāryaṃ ca ṣaṭsu kāryaṃ vratī caret ||72||
ekādaśīṃ dvādaśīṃ ca prāpnoti śravaṇe yadi ||
ekādaśyāmupoṣyātha dvādaśyāmapyupāvaset||73||
pāraṇaṃ tu trayodaśyāṃ dvādaśī cenna labhyate ||
āmiṣānnaṃ na bhuñjīta haviṣyānnena pāraṇam ||74||
yadā tu pāraṇāyogyā labhyate dvādaśī tadā ||
tasyāṃ nātikramo yuktastadabhāve trayodaśī||75||
ekādaśī dvādaśī ca śravaṇarkṣeṇa saṃyutā ||
viṣṇuśṛṃkhalako nāma budhavāre viśiṣyate ||76||
daśamyāṃ saṃyato bhūtvā prātarekādaśīdine ||
kṛtvā tu saṅgame snānaṃ prahareprahare dvijāḥ ||77||
anena vidhinā kṛtvā vijayāyāṃ vratottamam ||
sarvapāpaṃ kṣayaṃ nītvā viṣṇuloke vasennaraḥ || 78 ||
caturyugānāṃ divyānāṃ yāvatsyādviṣṇurūpadhṛka ||
tāvadeva hi sarvatra sārvabhaumo bhavennaraḥ || 79 ||
tretāyāṃ daśajanmāni madhyadeśeṣu bho dvijāḥ ||
tataśca bhārate varṣe vedavedāṃtasāravit ||
putrapautradhanairyukto lakṣado nṛpasannibhaḥ || 2.2.8.80 ||
jāyate daśa janmāni tretāyāṃ brāhmaṇottamaḥ ||
sapatnīkaśca dīrghāyurdharmakarmasu pūjitaḥ || 81 ||
bhādre māsi site pakṣe dvādaśyāṃ pṛthivīpatim ||
śatrumutthāpayetprāhṇe śubhalagne śubhakṣaṇe || 82 ||
śalyaśālmalikasyāpi saptaparṇīyakasya ca ||
eṣāmanyatamaṃ vṛkṣaṃ caṃpakasyārjunasya vā || 83 ||
bṛhatkadaṃbavṛkṣasya dvicatvāriṃśadaṃgulaiḥ ||
dvātriṃśadaṃgulairvāpi mānadvayamathāpi vā ||
trivyāyāmaṃ ca prathamaṃ dvāviṃśahastameva vā || 84 ||
hastaḥ ṣoḍaśavārasya gṛhasthasya viśiṣyate ||
hastatrayeṇa viprasya dvādaśa kṣatriyasya tu || 85 ||
aṣṭahastaṃ tu vaiśyasya śūdrasya pañcahastakam ||
abhrataḥ śvetacchatraṃ syātpatākā ca purepure || 86 ||
ghanasārasamāyuktāṃ karpūramaṃḍanānvitām ||
raktavastraparicchannāṃ puṣpamālyairalaṃkṛtām || 87 ||
mañcasthāṃ kārayetpūjāṃ bhaktyā ca sudṛḍho naraḥ ||
saptarātraṃ caretpūjāmaindramantreṇa mantravit || 88 ||
kākādīnna spṛśejjātu vairapakṣe viśeṣataḥ ||
patākāyā nipāte tu rāṣṭrahāniṃ samādiśet || 89 ||
patāke nissṛte bhagne mahiṣāṇāṃ vināśanam ||
sthūṇāpāte ca bhagne vā cāśvahāniṃ samādiśet || 2.2.8.90 ||
taskaraśca kule tasya prāyaścittaṃ samācaret ||
tadviṣṇoriti maṃtreṇa śatapadmasamanvitam || 91 ||
viṣṇumuddiśya juhuyādayutaṃ pippalasya ca ||
grahāṇāṃ ca tribhāgena cāyutaṃ juhuyādbudhaḥ || 92 ||
ādityasyādbhutamidaṃ dvijapāte tu bho dvijāḥ ||
kapotapāte śukrasya kākādau bhaumamādiśet || 93 ||
bhūkaṃpe jāyate viṣṭaṃ guroradbhutamādiśet ||
kīṭaviddhe kṛte viprāścandrasyādbhutamādiśet || 94 ||
patāke nissṛte bhagne rāhoradbhutamādiśet|| 95 ||
śivā ruvaṃti cāndrasya vānaro vā spṛśetkvacit ||
ketoradbhutamuddiṣṭaṃ bhūmikaṃpe tu te dvijāḥ || 96 ||
trayodaśīṃ sitāṃ prāpya puṣpairnānāvidhairapi ||
kāmadevaṃ samabhyarcedgandhādyaiḥ sumanoharaiḥ || 97 ||
caitre māsi sitāṣṭamyāṃ śanau śatabhiṣā yadi ||
gaṃgāyā yadi labhyeta sūryagrahaśataiḥ samā || 98 ||
seyaṃ mahāvāruṇīti khyātā kṛṣṇatrayodaśī ||
asyāṃ snānaṃ ca dānaṃ ca śrāddhaṃ vākṣayamucyate || 99 ||
madhumāse site pakṣe dambhabhañjī caturdaśī ||
tasyāṃ madanamūle ca akṣaraṃ kāmamarcayet || 2.2.8.100 ||
sa yāti paramaṃ sthānaṃ madanasya prabhāvataḥ ||
jugupsitavacobhistu samyaktuṣṭo manobhavaḥ || 101 ||
anantasya vrataṃ vakṣye sarvapāpapraṇāśanam ||
anantaṃ sukhamāpnoti yaḥ kuryādbhaktimānnaraḥ || 102 ||
dvādaśyāṃ pūjite śakre dhvajake vāstuyaṣṭiṣu ||
tataḥ śuklacaturdaśyāmanantaṃ pūjayeddharim || 103 ||
kṛtvā darbhamayānantaṃ vāridhānyānvitaṃ tathā ||
pūjayeccandanairgandhairnaivedyairvividhairapi || 104 ||
caturdaśa phalairmūlairjalajaiḥ kusumairapi ||
yavagodhūmaśālīnāṃ cūrṇairnaikatamasya ca || 105 ||
kṛtvā pūpāhvayaṃ tasmai dadyādekaṃ śrutekṣitam ||
svayamekaṃ tu bhuñjīta dadyātsatrasya dorakam || 106 ||
caturdaśagranthiyutaṃ kuṃkumena vilepitam ||
caturdaśasūtramayaṃ sūtraṃ kārpāsameva ca || 107 ||
ataḥ preta caturdaśyāṃ bhojayitvā tapodhanān ||
dānaṃ dattvā dvijebhyaśca yamalokaṃ na gacchati || 108 ||
tataḥ pretakathāṃ śrutvā śākairnaktaṃ samācaret ||
caturdaśaṃ dvādaśaṃ vā saptamaṃ vāpi pañcamam || 109 ||
mānamātrādikaṃ kṛtvā sarvapāpaiḥ pramucyate || 2.2.8.110 ||
māghe māsi vaṭāpāyaḥ kasya pāpaṃ punīmahe ||
snātvā tatra caturdaśyāṃ samaye tārakāmaye || 111 ||
saṃbhavetphālgune māsi yā ca kṛṣṇā caturdaśī ||
śivarātririti khyātā sā jagatsarvakāmadā || 112 ||
divā tasyā alābhe tu rātriyoge vrataṃ caret ||
caturdaśī amāviddhā tadvrataṃ parivarjayet || 113 ||
tithiyoge ca śarvaryāṃ saṃpūrṇe vratamācaret ||
kāmaviddhā sā ca pūjyā rātriyoge caredvratī || 114 ||
prahareprahare snānaṃ svayaṃ snātvā śivasya ca ||
kārayedvidhivadbhaktyā homaṃ kuryādyathāvidhi || 115 ||
atha vakṣyāmi caitrādimāse tu pūrṇimā yathā ||
citrānakṣatrasaṃyukto gurupūrṇo vidhuryadi ||
mahācaitrīti sā jñeyā pūrṇimākṣayapuṇyadā || 116 ||
viśākhādiṣu bhedeṣu pūrṇacandro guruścaret ||
mahāvaiśākhikādyāstu pūrṇimā dvādaśa smṛtāḥ || 117 ||
mahājyaiṣṭhī viśeṣo.ayaṃ prājāpatye yathā raviḥ ||
gurupūrṇacandro jyeṣṭhāyāṃ mahājyaiṣṭhīti sā smṛtā || 118 ||
vināpi guruṇā candraḥ kṛttikā pūrṇimā tathā ||
tathā mahākārttikī sā tithiḥ puṇyatamā bhavet || 119 ||
rohiṇyāṃ tu sthitaścandraḥ paurṇamāsyāṃ tu kārttike ||
mahākārttikī tathāpi syātsvargaloke.api durlabhā || 2.2.8.120 ||
citrā vā yadi vā pūrṇā yadā syātpūrṇimātithiḥ ||
mahācaitrī tathāpi syādaśvamedhaphalapradā || 121 ||
raviṇā kṛttikāyogādravivāre ca pūrṇimā ||
mahācaitrī tathāpi syāddattasyākṣayakārikā || 122 ||
evaṃ gurau guroryoge mahācaitrī prakīrtitā ||
tatra snānaṃ ca dānaṃ ca japo niyama eva ca || 123 ||
sarvamakṣayatāṃ yāti phalaṃ caivāśvamedhikam ||
pitarastarpitā yāṃti vaiṣṇavaṃ lokamakṣayam || 124 ||
bharaṇyāṃ kārttike māsi yadi syātpūrṇimā tithiḥ ||
gaṃgādvāre tu mahatī vaiśākhī puṇyadā smṛtā || 125 ||
śālagrāme mahācaitrī kṛtapuṇyā mahātithiḥ ||
gaṃgādvāre tu mahatī vaiśākhī puṇyadā smṛtā || 126 ||
puruṣottame mahājyaiṣṭhī mahāṣāḍhī tu śṛṃkhale ||
mahāśrāvaṇī kedāre mahāpuṇyatamā matā || 127 ||
mahābhādrī badaryāṃ ca kujo.api syānnarastathā ||
mahākārttikī puṣkare ca kānyakubje tathottaraṃ || 128 ||
mahatī mārgaśīrṣe syādayodhyāyāṃ tathottare ||
mahāpauṣī puṇyatamā mahāmāghī prayāgataḥ || || 129 ||
mahāphālgunī naimiṣe ca nirdiṣṭāḥ syurmahāphalāḥ || 2.2.8.130 ||
atra sma vihitaṃ karma śubhaṃ vā yadi vāśubham ||
sarvamakṣayatāṃ yāti varddhate cādhikaṃ phalam || 131 ||
āśvine paurṇamāsī tu kaumudīti prakīrtitā ||
asyāṃ candrodaye lakṣmīṃ pūjayedvidhivannaraḥ || 132 ||
nirvatayenna yaḥ śrāddhaṃ prabhāte paitṛkaṃ dvijaḥ ||
indukṣaye māsimāsi prāyaścittīyate tu saḥ || 133 ||
candrāśvine tu kṛṣṇāyāṃ pañcadaśyāṃ yathāvidhi ||
kṛtvā snānādikaṃ karma sopavāso dinaṃ nayet ||134||
pradoṣasamaye lakṣmīṃ pūjayitvā yathāvidhi ||
dīpavṛkṣānyathā vṛkṣā~mllakṣmīprītyai samutsṛjet || || 135 ||
nadītīre girau goṣṭhe śmaśāne vṛkṣamūlataḥ ||
catuṣpathe nijāgāre catvare tānnidhāpayet || 136 ||
dvirbhojanamamāvāsyāṃ na kartavyaṃ kadācana ||
śarvaryāṃ ca viśeṣeṇa māghaphālgunayornaraiḥ ||137|| ||
iti śrībhaviṣye mahāpurāṇe madhyamaparvaṇi dvitīyabhāge.aṣṭamo.adhyāyaḥ || 8 || || ||
pravaravicāravarṇanam
|| sūta uvāca || ||
vakṣye pravarasaṃtānaṃ yathākramamiti dvijāḥ ||
yadvinā vyatyayo yasmāttasmācchāstrānusārataḥ || 1 ||
pravaratrayaṃ kāśyapasya kāśyapāśāvanairdhruvam ||
pañcāśvagautamasyādya gautamaścoya eva ca || 2 ||
cyavano jāmadagnyaśca āplavāyanameva ca ||
mokunyāṃgirasabhāsyājjāmadagnyāplavāyanam || 3 ||
śāṃḍilyāsitadaivalāḥ pravaratrayameva ca ||
parāśarasya ca tathā svayaṃ śāṃbavaśiṣṭhakam || 4 ||
ātreyamācāryaṇasyābālapravarameva hi ||
vātsyavāsyāyanau caiva urukaṃṭaka eva ca || 5 ||
arthakṣīramitrāvaruṇaṃ pañcamaṃ parikīrtitam||
autathyasya trayaṃ vidyādvālmīko.avarameva hi || 6 ||
autathyasya ca vāśiṣṭhamaindre cakraṃ ca krauñcāyanaṃ tathā ||
autathyeti samākhyātaṃ māhiṣyaṃ cyavanaṃ tathā || 7 ||
urukaṃṭatrayaṃ vidyātkauśikasya trayaṃ tathā ||
yadgālo devarāṭ khyātaḥ kuśikādyāśca bho dvijāḥ ||8||
viśvāmitro devarāṭca svayaṃ caiva trayaṃ matam ||
ghṛtakauśikasya kuśikā viśvāmitrāghamarṣaṇam || 9
caṇḍakauśikasya ca tathā devarāṭ devarātakam||
viśvāmitre tu vikhyātaḥ sumantoreva eva hi || 2.2.9.10 ||
taruṃkaśākaṭāyanaḥ svayameva pravaratrayam ||
bhramadvayaṃ jaimineśca svayaṃ vāśiṣṭhameva ca || 11 ||
śaṃkhamāṃgirasacyavanaṃ śaṃkhabhasya trayaṃ matam||
vātsyasya cyavano nāma āplavāyanakastathā || 12 ||
sāvarṇasya tu sāvarṇyacyavanajāmadagnibhārgavam ||
āplavāyaneti pāṭhīne eka eva tu sattamāḥ || 13 ||
kṛṣṇājinasya kṛṣṇājinaṃ viśvāmitrasya jaiminam ||
kātyāyanasya kātyāyanagārgyāyaṇatrayaṃ tathā || 14 ||
vātsyāyaneti vikhyātaṃ kuśikasya ca paṃcamam ||
amuṃ ca viśvāmitraṃ ca jāmadagnyāplavāyanam || 15 ||
gārgyasya gārgyasāmuṃca tathāṃgirasa eva ca ||
bārhaspatyabharadvāja iti paṃca prakīrtitam || 16 ||
vaśiṣṭhasya ca vāsiṣṭhaṃ ca tathāṃgirasa eva ca ||
mitrāvaruṇasaṃyuktaṃ tāvattasya prakīrtitam|| 17 ||
jāhvakarṇabhavakarṇau pravarau parikīrtitau ||
upamanyurupamanyostathendraḥ saha eva ca || 18 ||
taduttameti tritayaṃ mitrāvaruṇasya ca trayam ||
ātreyagautamāṃgirasapravaratrayameva hi || 19 ||
kamaṃḍalotpalamitrāmitrāvaruṇa eva ca ||
kamaṃḍaluśceti tritayaṃ pravaratrayameva ca || 2.2.9.20 ||
cyavanasya tathā jñeyamūrvacyavanāplavāyanam ||
atha sa kasyāṃgirasabārhaspatya eva trayam || 21 ||
āgastyasya agastiśca māhaśca cyavaneti ca ||
viśvāmitre devarāta autathyeti tathaiva ca || 22||
ye noktā ye .apyavijñātāste proktāḥ kāśyapājjagat || 23 ||
iti śrībhaviṇye mahāpurāṇe madhyama parvaṇi dvitīyabhāge navamo.adhyāyaḥ || 9 || cha ||
vāstuyāgavarṇanam
|| sūta uvāca || ||
vāstuyāgamatho vakṣye balimaṇḍalapūrvakam ||
aṃkurārpaṇakaṃ kṛtvā madhye kuryācca maṃḍalam || 1 ||
trihastā piṃḍikā kāryā caturasrā udakplavā ||
prādeśamātra utsedho darpaṇāṃtarnibho bhavet || 2 ||
madhye saṃmārjayedvidvānpādānnava yathākramāt||
koṇe catuṣpadaṃ jñeyaṃ dikṣu tripadakaṃ kramāt || 3 ||
pañcakaṃ yugmapādena caturdikṣu tataḥ param ||
koṇe catuṣpadaṃ sthāpyaṃ catuṣkoṇe vibhāvayet || 4 ||
catuṣkoṇaṃ bahiḥ kuryātkoṇe cāpi catuṣṭayam ||
dvātriṃśacca bhavedbāhye cātaścāpi trayodaśa || 5 ||
catvāriṃśatpañcayutā militvā vāstudevatāḥ ||
śikhī caivātha parjanyo jayaṃtaḥ kuliśāyudhaḥ || 6 ||
sūryaḥ satyo vṛṣaścaiva ākāśaṃ vāyureva ca ||
pūṣā ca vitathaścaiva guhānyaśca yamastathā ||7||
gandharvo mṛgarājastu mṛgāḥ pitṛgaṇāstathā ||
dauvāriko.atha sugrīvaḥ puṣpadanto jalādhipaḥ || 8 ||
asuraḥ paśupāśau ca rogo hi mokṣa eva ca ||
bhallāṭaḥ somasarpau ca aditiśca ditistathā || 9 ||
bahirdvādaśa ityetānīśānādīnyathākramam ||
īśānādicatuṣkoṇaṃ saṃsthitānpūjayedbudhaḥ || 2.2.10.10 ||
āpaścaivātha sāvitro jayo rudrastathaiva ca ||
aryamā savitā caiva vivasvānvibudhādhipaḥ || 11 ||
mitro.atha rājayakṣmā ca saptamaḥ pṛthivīdharaḥ ||
aṣṭamastvāpavatsastu paridhau brahmaṇaḥ smṛtaḥ || 12 ||
pūrvādiṣu tathā pūjyā gandhapuṣpaiḥ pṛthagvidhaiḥ ||
paṃcacatvāriṃśadetaccarakyā ca caturthakam || 13 ||
militvā ūnapañcāśaduttamā vāstudevatāḥ ||
nānyatra yojayedviprāḥ prāsāde ca viśeṣataḥ || 14 ||
bahiḥ koṇe carakyādi carakaṃ ca vidārikām ||
pūtanāṃ ca tataḥ paścādvāyavye pāparākṣasīm || 15 ||
svaiḥsvairmaṃtraiśca gaṃdhādyaiḥ pūjayetkusumādinā ||
yathoktena baliṃ dadyātpāyasānnena vā punaḥ|| 16 ||
rekhāḥ sarvatra śuklena padmaṃ raktena bhāvayet ||
rañjayedeva varṇena bahiṣpañcarajena tu || 17 ||
devavarṇānatho vakṣye yathāvadanuvarṇitāḥ ||
rakto gaurastathā śoṇaḥ sitaraktaḥ sitastathā || 18 ||
pītaḥ śuklaśca dharmaśca pūṣā raktaḥ prakīrtitaḥ ||
śyāmaḥ śukraśca kṛṣṇaśca pītaḥ śuklo yathākramam || 19 ||
pīto bhṛṃgaḥ punaḥ śuklaḥ kṛṣṇaḥ śuklastathaiva ca ||
raktaḥ śuklaśca śoṇaśca kṛṣṇaraktastathaiva ca || 2.2.10.20 ||
dhūmrapīto raktapītaḥ śuklaḥ kṛṣṇaśca śyāmakaḥ ||
raktavarṇena dvātriṃśaddaśa varṇāḥ prakīrtitāḥ || 21 ||
śuklaśoṇaṃ punaḥ śvetaṃ siṃdūrābhaṃ prakīrtitam ||
pāṃḍurakuṃkumābhaṃ ca raktaṃ jñeyaṃ ca pītakam || 22 ||
śuklapītaṃ ca śvetaṃ ca gauraṃ cetyaṣṭavarṇakam ||
pītaṃ raktaṃ ca śyāmaṃ ca gauraṃ ceti catuṣṭayam|| 23 ||
dharaṇīmadanaṃ vādye śaṃbhuvarṇādiprakramāt ||
śuklena rañjayeddvārānpuradvāraṃ ca madhyame || 24 ||
madhyeṃte ūnapañcāśatsarvaṃ ca vāstukarmaṇi ||
catvāriṃśaddvārayutaṃ gṛhadevakule.api ca || 25 ||
mahākūpe tathā śveto anyatrāpi praśasyate ||
sulipte ca śucau deśe sārdhahastapramāṇataḥ || 26 ||
daśa pūrvāyatā rekhā daśa caivottarāyatāḥ ||
ekādaśīpadaṃ kuryādrekhābhiḥ padakena tu || 27 ||
sarvavāstuvibhāgena vijñeyā navakā nava ||
padasthānpūjayeddevāṃstriṃśatpañcādaśadeva tu ||28||
dvātriṃśadbāhyataḥ pūjyāḥ pūjyāgāre trayodaśa ||
madhye nava pade brahmā tasyāpyaṣṭau samīpagāḥ ||29||
caturdikṣu ṣaṭpadaṃ tu tripadaṃ tu catuṣpadam ||
padaikaṃ tu catuṣkoṇe eṣa vāstuvinirṇayaḥ ||
carakyādi tato hitvā catvāriṃśacca paṃcakam|| || 2.2.10.30 ||
aparaṃ maṇḍalaṃ vakṣye yathāvadanupūrvaśaḥ ||
navarekhāprayogeṇa navakoṣṭhānprakalpayet || 31 ||
dvicatuṣkoṣṭhakairdikṣu yajetāryamaṇaṃ tataḥ ||
vivasvaṃtaṃ tato mittraṃ mahīdharamataḥ param || 32 ||
koṇeṣu koṣṭhadvaṃdveṣu bāhyādiparikīrtitam ||
sāvitraṃ savitāraṃ ca śakramindraṃ jayaṃ punaḥ || 33 ||
rudraṃ rudrajayaṃ caiva vāyuṃ jṛṃbhakameva ca ||
pilipicchaṃ ca medhāvī vidārī pūtanā tathā || 34 ||
kramādīśānaparyaṃtāṃ jayaṃtaḥ śakrabhāskarau ||
satyovṛṣāṃtarikṣau ca diśi prācyāmavasthitāḥ || 35 ||
agniḥ pūṣā ca vitadho yamaśca gṛharakṣakaḥ || gaṃ
dharvo bhṛṃgarājaśca mṛgo dakṣiṇamāśritāḥ || 36 ||
nirṛtirdauvārikaśca sugrīvavaruṇau tataḥ ||
puṣpadaṃtasvarau śoṣarogau pratyagdiśi sthitāḥ || 37 ||
prāṇavāyuśca nāgaśca somo bhallāṭa eva ca ||
mudgalākhyo dityaditī kuberasya diśi sthitāḥ || 38 ||
militvā ca tripañcāśattebhyaḥ pūrve baliṃ haret ||
piṇyākaiḥ paramānnairvā pūrvoktairvā yathā kramāt|| 39 ||
raktamaryamaṇaṃ dhyāyeccaturbhirbahubhirvṛtam ||
śvetāśvavāhanaṃ divyaṃ kirīṭaiḥ svairvibhūṣitam || 2.2.10.40 ||
ākṛṣṇeneti mantrasya svarṇa ṛṣijagatīchandaḥ savitraryamaprītaye viniyogaḥ || 41 || vivasvaṃtaṃ pītavarṇaṃ pītāmbaradharaṃ śubham ||
meṣasthaṃ ca mahākāyaṃ devagandharvasevitam ||42||
etātaviṣaṃtīti maṃtrasya kardama ṛṣiḥ paṃktiśchandaḥ kamalādevatāvivasvatprītaye viniyogaḥ || 43 ||
mitraṃ dhyāyecchuklavarṇaṃ śvetahaṃsoparisthi tam ||
trinetraṃ tribhujaṃ caiva śvetāṃbaradharaṃ śubham || 44 ||
kayānaścīti maṃtrasya jayaṃta ṛṣirgāyatrī chandaḥ śaṅkaro devatā mitraprītaye viniyogaḥ || ||45||
prītaṃ mahīdharaṃ dhyāyedvṛṣabhopari saṃsthim||
tribhujaṃ padmahastaṃ ca vyālayajñopavītinam ||46||
tryambakamiti maṃtrasya gargaṛṣistriṣṭup chando haro devatā mahīdharaprītaye viniyogaḥ || 47 ||
sāvitrīṃ śvetavarṇāṃ ca sarvalakṣaṇasaṃyutām ||
dvibhujāṃ pītavastrāṃ ca śvetasiṃhāsane sthitām || 48 ||
raktāmbaradharāṃ raktāṃ raktamālopaśobhitām || 49 ||
tadvarṣaṃ iti maṃtrasya gautama ṛṣirvirāṭ chandaḥ sūryo devatā savitṛprītaye viniyogaḥ || 2.2.10.50 ||
śakraṃ dhyāyetpītavarṇaṃ śuklakairāvatasthitam ||
sarvadevaiḥ stūyamānaṃ dvibhujaṃ pītavāsasam ||51||
trātāramiti maṃtrasya bhārgava ṛṣistriṣṭup chando narasiṃho devatā indrajayaprītaye viniyogaḥ || 52 ||
rudraṃ dhyāyecchvetavarṇaṃ vṛṣabhārūḍhavigraham ||
nāgayajñopavītaṃ ca sarvalakṣaṇasaṃyutam || 53 ||
namaste rudreti maṃtrasya gāyatrī chaṃdastryaṃbako devatā rudraprītaye viniyogaḥ || 54 || raktaṃ rudraṃ jayaṃ dhyāyedraktapadmopari sthitam ||
raktaśyāmāṃbaradharaṃ dvibhujaṃ raktavāsasam || 55 ||
tryaṃbakamiti mantrasya gāyatrīcchando maheśo devatā rudrajayaprītaye viniyogaḥ || 56 ||
api śvetaṃ tato dhyāyedvarābhayakaraṃ param ||
sarvalakṣaṇasaṃpannaṃ śvetapadmopari sthitam || 57 ||
īśāna iti maṃtrasya marīcirṛṣiḥ paṃkticchando vāyurdevatā apāṃ prītaye viniyogaḥ|| āpavatsaṃ pītavarṇaṃ meṣārūḍhaṃ caturbhujam ||58||
padmaśaṃkhadharaṃ vāme varābhayakaraṃ param || 59||
varuṇasyottaṃbhanamasīti mantrasya narottama ṛṣirvirāṭ chando varuṇo devatā āvayaḥ prītaye viniyogaḥ ||2.2.10.60||
koṇasūtrasyobhayataḥ śvetakoṣṭhadvaye punaḥ||
śarvaṃ dhyāyedraktavarṇaṃ vṛṣabhopari saṃsthitam ||61||||
dvibhujaṃ ca trinetraṃ ca jaṭābhāropaśobhitam ||62||
mālā svāheti maṃtrasya bhārgava ṛṣirgāyatrīchando mahādevo devatā śarvaprītaye viniyogaḥ|||63|
guhaṃ dhyāyetpītavarṇaṃ pītapadmāsanasthitama ||
nānābharaṇaśobhāḍhyaṃ kuṇḍalādyairalaṅkṛtam || 64 ||
sa bodha iti mantrasya agastirṛṣirgāyatrī chando haro devatā guhaprītaye viniyogaḥ || 65 ||
aryamṇaṃ dvibhujaṃ raktaṃ raktamālyopaśobhitam||
