raktapadmāsanasthaṃ ca devagandharvasevitam || 66 ||
vāto vāreti maṃtrasya kāśyapa ṛṣiranuṣṭupchando vāyurdevatā aryamaprītaye viniyogaḥ||67||
dhyāyecca jambhakaṃ śvetaṃ dvibhujaṃ kuṭilānanam ||
karālavadanaṃ ghoraṃ varāhopari saṃsthitam || 68 ||
kuvidogavaya iti mantrasya viśvāmitra ṛṣirjagatī chandaḥ somo devatā jaṃbhakaprītaye viniyogaḥ ||69||
pilapicchaṃ raktavarṇaṃ raktamālyairalaṅkṛtam ||
raktapadmāsanasthaṃ ca raktābharaṇaśobhitam || 2.2.10.70 ||
devasya heti mantrasya paṃktiśchaṃdaḥ śacī devatā pilapicchaprītaye viniyogaḥ || 71 || pītāṃ ca carakīṃ dhyāyedraktamālyairalaṃkṛtām ||
sucāruvadanāṃ bhavyāṃ guñjāhāropaśobhitām || 72 ||
tadvarṣaṃ iti mantrasya jaṭila ṛṣirbṛhatī chando bhavo devatā carakīprītaye viniyogaḥ || 73 ||
śyāmāṃ vidārikāṃ dhyāyettrinetrāṃ ca caturbhujām||
nānāgaṇayutāṃ devīṃ paṅkajadvayadhāriṇīm || 74||
śrīśca te iti mantrasya varuṇa ṛṣirnṛsiṃho devatā vidārikāprītaye viniyogaḥ || 75 ||
raktāṃ ca pūtanāṃ dhyāyetpaṅkajasthāṃ suśobhanām ||
sarvābharaṇasaṃpannāṃ sarvālaṃkāraśobhitām || 76 ||
mayi gṛhṇāmīti maṃtrasya vivasvānṛṣirnārāyaṇo devatā pūtanāprītaye viniyogaḥ || 77 ||
pūrvādidikṣu sarvāsu sārdhādyaṃtapadeṣu ca ||
īśānaṃ jaṭilaṃ śvetaṃ śūlahastaṃ mahābhujam ||78||
trinetraṃ vṛṣabhārūḍhaṃ nāgahāro paśobhitam || 79 ||
āyuḥśīrṣāṇa iti maṃtrasya vāmadeva ṛṣirbṛhatī chando dharaṇīdharo devatā īśānaprītaye viniyogaḥ || 2.2.10.80 ||
raktaṃ dhyāyecca parjanyaṃ dvibhujaṃ pītavāsasam ||
dakṣiṇe paraśuṃ dhyāyedoṃkāraṃ ca tathāpare || 81||
kayānaśceti mantrasya dharma ṛṣirbṛhatī chando bhavo devatā parjanya prītaye viniyogaḥ ||82||
jayantaṃ śvetaṃ śvetavṛṣabhārūḍhaṃ dhyātvā||
mānastoketi mantrasya śaktyṛṣistriṣṭupchandaḥ śaṅkaro devatā jayaṃtaprītaye viniyogaḥ || 83 ||
śuklaṃ pītaṃ dvibhujamairāvatasthaṃ vajradharaṃ dhyātvā mūlabījena sthāpayet || 84 ||
bhāskaraṃ raktadvibhujaṃ raktāśvasthaṃ dhyātvā māyābījena pūjayet ||85||
satyaṃ ca dvibhujaṃ śvetaṃ trinetraṃ pītavāsasaṃ mandakuṃdabījena pūjayet||
vṛṣaṃ pītaṃ vṛṣabhārūḍhamākāśabījena pūjayet ||86||
ṛkṣaṃ nīlaṃ caturbhujaṃ mahiṣārūḍham ||
ācchīma iti mantrasya hotā yakṣa ṛṣistriṣṭupchandaḥ śaṃkaro devatā ṛkṣaprītaye viniyogaḥ || 87 ||
agnimārabhya pūjayet ||
agniṃ raktaṃ saptajihvaṃ raktavāsasaṃ piṅgākṣaṃ dhyātvā ||
agnidūtamiti maṃtrasya bharadvāja ṛṣistriṣṭucchandaḥ śaṃkaro devatā agniprītaye vini yogaḥ || 88 ||
vitathaṃ raktamajavāhanaṃ dvibhujaṃ dhyātvā gāyatryā pūjayet || 89 ||
gāyatryā viśvāmitra ṛṣirgāyatrīchandaḥ savitā devatā vitathaprītaye viniyogaḥ ||2.2.10.90||
yamaṃ kṛṣṇamahiṣārūḍhaṃ daṇḍahastaṃ dhyāyet ||
acchiya iti mantrasya triṣṭupchando bhavānī devatā yamaprītaye viniyogaḥ ||91||
gṛhe kṣetraṃ raktamūrdhvakeśaṃ mahābhujaṃ raktavāsasaṃ dhyātvā vahnibījena pūjayet ||92|| gandharvaṃ śvetaṃ dvibhujaṃ padmāsanasthaṃ dhyātvā yamabījena pūjayet ||93||
bhṛṅgarājaṃ raktasiṃhāsanārūḍhaṃ divyayajñopavītinaṃ dhyāyet || 94 ||
hotā yasketi mantrasya bhārgava ṛṣirgāyatrīchando yaśo devatā bhṛṃgarājaprītaye viniyogaḥ || 95 ||
mṛgaṃ pītaṃ mṛgārūḍhaṃ pītavāsasaṃ dhyātvā ||
kadācaneti mantrasya vāmadevaṛṣirbṛhatī chando vāmadevo devatā mṛgaprītaye viniyogaḥ ||96||
nairṛtārddhapadeṣu ca ||
nirṛtiṃ pītaṃ śvetaṃ padmāsanasthaṃ dhyātvā ||
kaidācaneti mantrasya paṃktiśchandaḥ savitā devatā nirṛtiprītaye viniyogaḥ ||97|| nairṛtārddhapadeṣu ca dauvārikaṃ śvetaśarabhārūḍhaṃ trinetraṃ sarvābharaṇabhūṣitaṃ dhyātvā ||
hotasveti mantrasya narasiṃhaṛṣirbṛhatī chando gaṇeśo devatā dauvārikaprītaye viniyogaḥ || 98 ||
śyāmaṃ sugrīvaṃ kṛṣṇameṣārūḍhaṃ pītavāsasaṃ dhyātvā ||
svādityeti mantrasya triṣṭupchando vāmano devatā sugrīvaprītaye viniyogaḥ || 99 || sumitriyā na iti mantrasya kandarpaṛṣiḥ paṅktiśchandaḥ sūryo devatā varuṇaprītaye viniyogaḥ || 2.2.10.100 ||
puṣpadaṃtaṃ pītaṃ meṣārūḍhaṃ pītavāsasaṃ dhyātvā ||
yā oṣadhīriti mantrasya manmatha ṛṣirjagatī chando vāyurdevatā puṣpadaṃtaprītaye viniyogaḥ || 101 ||
asuraṃ kṛṣṇaṃ kṛṣṇamālyairalaṃkṛtaṃ kṛtvā ||
ākṛṣṇeti mantrasya hiraṇyavarṇa ṛṣirjagatī chandaḥ savitā devatā asuraprītaye viniyogaḥ || || 102 ||
asuraṃ kṛṣṇaṃ nāgahārānvitaṃ padmāsanasthaṃ dhyātvā ||
ābrahmanniti maṃtrasya nalina ṛṣistriṣṭupchando bhavānī devatā somaprītaye viniyogaḥ || 103 ||
rogaṃ kṛṣṇaṃ nīlendīvaradharaṃ śvetavṛṣabhārūḍhaṃ dhyātvā ||
namaste rudra iti mantrasya nārada ṛṣiḥ paṃktiśchandaḥ śrīrdevatā rogaprītaye viniyogaḥ || 104 ||
vāyukoṇādārabhya pūjayet ||
vāyuṃ dhūmravarṇaṃ dhvajahastaṃ mṛgārūḍhaṃ dhyātvā ||
devā iti mantrasya bṛhatī chando yamo devatā nāgaprītaye viniyogaḥ || 105 ||
śvetaṃ somaṃ śvetavarṇāsanasthaṃ dhyātvā bhadrabījena pūjayet || || 106 ||
raktaṃ bhallāṭaṃ pītavāsasaṃ dhyātvā vahnibījena pūjayet ||
pītavāsasamajavāhanaṃ hārakeyūrānvitaṃ vāyubījena maṃdarādyaiḥ pūjayet || || 107 || raktāṃ ditiṃ nāgahārānvitāṃ raktapadmāsanasthāṃ dhyātvā ||
mānārthaṃ iti mantrasyeti pūjayet || 108 ||
māno tvā iti maṃtrasya bhārgava ṛṣiḥ paṃktiśchandaḥ pṛthivī devatā ditiprītaye viniyogaḥ || 109 ||
aditiṃ pītavarṇāṃ siṃhārūḍhāṃ pītāṃbaradharāṃ dhyātvā ||
hiraṇyavarṇa iti maṃtrasya janārdana ṛṣirbṛhatī chandaḥ somo devatā aditiprītaye viniyogaḥ || 2.2.10.110 ||
evaṃ yathā vidhāyātha homaṃ kuryādyathāvidhi ||
homāṃte dakṣiṇāṃ dadyātkāñcanaṃ hemasaṃyutam || 111 ||
taḍāgayāgapakṣe tu suvarṇaṃ cārdhameva vā || 112 || ||
iti śrībhaviṣye mahāpurāṇe madhyamaparvaṇi dvitīyabhāge daśamo.adhyāyaḥ || 10 || || cha ||
pūjākramavarṇanam
|| sūta uvāca || ||
atha pūjākramaṃ vakṣye purāṇasmṛticoditam ||
uttare paścime vātha pūrve cāpi samācaret || 1 ||
nadītīre nemiprāṃte daśadvādaśasaṃkhyayā ||
maṃḍalaṃ racayedviprāścarukadvayasaṃyutam || 2 ||
tribhāgaṃ vibhajetkṣetraṃ madhyabhāgadvayena tu ||
trihastavedikāṃ kuryāttālotsedhāmudakplavām || 3 ||
uttarāśe dakṣiṇe cāratnihastāṃtare.api ca ||
trimekhalāṃ hastamātrāṃ guṇavedīsamanvitām|| 4 ||
mūle sārdhaṃ ca śuklāṃ ca mekhalāṃ tu tathaiva ca ||
caturaṃgulikāṃ vediṃ madhyonnatāṃ prakalpayet || 5 ||
ṣaṭsaptāṃgulikāṃ yoniṃ paścime mekhalopari ||
vinyasennābhisaṃyuktamevaṃ kuṇḍaṃ prakalpayet || 6 ||
śrāddhaṃ vṛddhyātmakaṃ kuryātsaṃkalpaṃ mānasaṃ caret ||
śrāddhārthaṃ naiva saṃkalpettathā vai devadarśane || 7 ||
gayāśrāddhārthakaṃ cāṣṭatīrthaśrāddhārthameva ca ||
aiśānyāṃ kalaśe devaṃ pūjayedgaṇanāyakam || 8 ||
madhye kuṇḍe mahāṃścaiva viṣṇudevaṃ digīśvarān||
brahmāṇaṃ cāgnikuṇḍe tu svaiḥ svairmantraiḥ prapūjayet || 9 ||
prāṇāyāmaṃ vidhāyātha bhūtaśuddhiṃ samācaret ||
dhyāyedvāṭavīśapuruṣaṃ sarvalakṣaṇasaṃyutam || 2.2.11.10 ||
śvetaṃ caturbhujaṃ śāṃtaṃ kuṇḍalādyairalaṃkṛtam ||
pustakaṃ cākṣamālāṃ ca varābhayakaraṃ param || 11 ||
pitṛvaiśvānaropetaṃ kuṭilabhrūpaśobhitam ||
karālavadanaṃ caiva ājānukaralaṃbitam || 12 ||
mūrdhanyagniṃ samāviśya mukhe vāyuḥ samāhitaḥ ||
pṛthvīdharoryamā caiva tathāṣṭavaneṣṭitau || 13 ||
vakṣasthale .aparāṃ saṃdhyāṃ yajeccaiva yathāvidhi ||
netrayorditiparjanyau śrotre ditījyaputrakau || 14 ||
sarpendrāvāsanasthau ca vāme dakṣaṃ vibhāvayet ||
satyasomāgnayastatra rāhoḥ paṃca ca paṃca ca || 15 ||
rudraśca rājayakṣmā ca vāmahaste vyavasthitau ||
pārśve tu dakṣiṇe tadvadvirathaśca maharkṣakaḥ|| 16 ||
ubhau jñeyau tathā jānvorubhau gandharvapuṣpakau ||
jaṃghayorbhṛṃgasugrīvau sphicordauvāriko gaṇaḥ || 17 ||
jayaśakrau tathā meḍhre padayoḥ pitarastathā ||
evaṃ dhyātvā nyasetpuṣpaṃ some naivaṃ viciṃtayet || 18 ||
mandaraṃ dīrghayuktena ṣaḍaṅgāni samācaret||
tāvadvīryaṃ tataḥ kṛtvā praṇavaṃ brahmaṇeti ca || 19 ||
vāstvīśāya vidmaheti tanno viṣṇuḥ pracodayāt ||
anena snapanaṃ kuryātpūjādravyāṇi prokṣayet || 2.2.11.20 ||
āsanaṃ pūjayetpūrvaṃ dharmeṇāpi svaśaktitaḥ ||
ādau tu bhāskaraṃ sūryaṃ śacīnāthaṃ gaṇādhipam || 21 ||
ādhāraśaktiṃ pṛthivīṃ pūjayettatra paṅkajam ||
baṃdīśāsanamityuktaṃ pūjayedāsanaṃ tataḥ || 22 ||
sitacandanayuktena śvetapuṣpaṃ pragṛhya ca ||
harerdhyānaṃ tataḥ kuryātsthāpayenmadhyamaṇḍale ||23||
āvāhya cāsanaṃ dadyāttataḥ pādyādikatrayam ||
madhuparkaṃ tato dadyādvāstoṣpatimatheśvaram || 24 ||
asya mantrasya ca ṛṣiśchando gāyatramīritam ||
devatā ca bhavedbrahmā yojayedaśvamedhakam || 25 ||
maṃdaraṃ vijayaṃ somaṃ mahādevaṃ ca mādhavam ||
rudraṃ haraṃ jayaṃ bhaṃ ca pūrvādidalamūlake || 26 ||
jayā ca vijayā caiva satyā māyā śivāṃbikā ||
hāsinī kāminī caitā dalamūleṣu bhāvayet || 27 |
puṣpāñjalitrayaṃ dadyādvāstoṣpataya ityapi ||
arghyamaṃtreṇa gaṃdhādyaiḥ pūjayedbhūtimicchatā ||28||
vāstoṣpate bhava mate iti dhyātvā ṛtaṃ ceti maṃtreṇa pūjayet ||
ṛṣirnārāyaṇaśchando gāyatrī parikīrtitam || 29 ||
sūryaśca devatā khyātaḥ prīṇitaḥ kuliśāyudhaḥ ||
sūryaṃ raktāsanārūḍhaṃ dvibhujaṃ raktavāsasam || 2.2.11.30 ||
raktapadmadvayadharaṃ kuṃḍalādyaiḥ suśobhitam||
evaṃ dhyātvā tu matimānhaṃsaṃ samaṃtramīśvaram||31||
haṃsasya iti maṃtrasya ṛṣirautathya īritaḥ ||
paṃktiśchandaḥ svayaṃ devo viniyogastu prītaye ||32||
nīlotpaladvayadharaṃ satyaṃ mṛtyūparisthitam||
svacchaśvetāṃbaradharaṃ varadaṃ bhaktavatsalam ||33||
svaṃ madātvamiti mantreṇa śvetacandanapuṣpakaiḥ ||
pūjayetparayā bhaktyā vastrālaṃkārabhūṣaṇaiḥ ||34||
uddharṣaṇa iti maṃtreṇa kṛṣṇapuṣpairathārcayet ||
satyavrata ṛṣiścāsya triṣṭupchando.asya devatā ||
savitā caiva vijñeyaḥ prītaye ca vṛṣasya ca ||35||
śulkavarṇaṃ tathākāśamṛṣṭisaṃghaiśca saṃstutam ||
ghaṭasthaṃ dvibhujaṃ dhyāyedgadāpadmavidhāriṇam ||36||
śanno devīti paṭhanādgandhapuṣpādibhiryajet ||
ṛṣiḥ syātkardamo viprāśchando jāgatikā tathā ||
devatā ca bhaveccāgnirākāśaprītaye nyaset ||37||
dhvajahastamahābāhuṃ marudbhiścopasevitam||
dvibhujaṃ dhūmravarṇaṃ ca vāyuṃ dhyātvā prapūjayet||38||
rājāna iti mantreṇa pūjayetsitataṃḍulaiḥ||
ṛṣirnārāyaṇacchando gāyatrī devatā dvijāḥ||39||
devatā ca bhavedvāyuḥ prītaye tasya yojayet ||
pūṣāraktaśca dvibhujo raktapadmāsanasthitaḥ ||2.2.11.40||
rājāna iti ca ṛcā pūjayedgandhacandanaiḥ||
gobhilosya ṛṣiḥ paṅktiśchando.atha jagatī smṛtam ||
devatā ca bhavedvāyuḥ prītaye viniyojayet ||41||
vitathaṃ śyāmavarṇaṃ ca caturbhirbāhubhirvṛtam||
mṛgākṣapāśakhaṭvāṅga śūlaṃ ca dadhataṃ karaiḥ ||
meṣārūḍhaṃ viśālākṣaṃ rājāno mahyamīrayan || 42 ||
gṛhakṣataṃ tathā śuklaṃ caturbhirgardabhairvṛtam ||
śūlaṃ daṃḍaṃ ca khaḍvāṃgaṃ dadhataṃ vṛṣavāhanam || 43 ||
pītavastradharaṃ devaṃ jaṭāmukuṭasaṃyutam ||
āśuḥ śiśāna iti mantreṇa pūjayedgandhacandanaiḥ || 44 ||
puṣpadaṃta ṛṣistriṣṭupchandaśca parikīrtitam ||
īśvarasya devatāyā prītaye viniyojayet || 45 ||
yamaṃ dhyāyetkṛṣṇavarṇaṃ mahiṣasthaṃ dvibāhukam ||
daṇḍapāśadharaṃ caiva keyūrādyairvibhūṣitam|| 46 ||
īśāneti ca mantreṇa pūjayetkusumādinā ||
vāmadeva ṛṣiḥ paṃktiśchandaḥ kālosya devatā || 47 ||
ṣaḍānanaṃ ca gandharvaṃ pītaṃ dhyāyeccaturbhujam ||
pītāṃbaradharaṃ caiva nānābharaṇabhūṣitam || 48 ||
yaddeva iti mantreṇa pūjayetkusumādinā ||
hārītosya ṛṣiḥ prokto jagatīchanda īritam ||
hiraṇyagarbho devatāsya prītaye viniyojayet || 49 ||
bhṛṅgarājaṃ jaṭārūḍhaṃ svacchaṃ pītāṃbaraṃ śubham ||
cakṣuḥ pīteti mantreṇa pūjayedgandhacaṃdanaiḥ || 2.2.11.50 ||
ṛṣiścāgastirākhyātastriṣṭupchandaḥ prakīrtitam ||
viśvedevā devatā ca bhṛṅgarājasya prītaye || 51 ||
pītaṃ mṛgaṃ mṛgārūḍhaṃ jaṭāmukuṭamaṃḍitam ||
paro devā iti maṃtreṇa pūjayedbalipāyasaiḥ || 52 ||
kapilaśca ṛṣiḥ prokto gāyatrī chanda īritam ||
varuṇo devatā cāsya prītaye viniyojayet || 53 ||
dhyāyetpitṛgaṇaṃ śukraṃ caturbhirbāhubhirvṛtam ||
pitṛbhya iti mantreṇa pūjayetkusumādinā || 54 ||
śunaḥśepa ṛṣiścāsya triṣṭupchandaśca devatā ||
viśvedevāḥ samākhyātāḥ pitṛmedhena pūjayet || 55 ||
dauvārikaṃ cāṣṭabhujaṃ kṛṣṇavarṇaṃ vicintayet ||
raktavastrapiṃgalākṣaṃ kṛṣṇavyāghropari sthitam || 56 ||
yo naḥ piteti mantreṇa pūjayedbhaktitatparaḥ || 57 ||
vaiśvānara ṛṣiścāsya gāyatrī chanda īritam ||
devatā ca bhavecchaktirviniyogaśca pūjane || 58 ||
śaṃkhābhaṃ caiva sugrīvaṃ dvibhujaṃ cakradhāriṇam ||
haṃsārūḍhaṃ mahākāyaṃ balivijñānakāraṇam || 59 ||
śaṃkhapadmadharaṃ caiva mahiṣasthaṃ vicintayet||
sa iṣu hasteti maṃtreṇa pūjayedraktabhūṣaṇaiḥ || 2.2.11.60 ||
ṛṣiḥ śaṃkhastathācchandaḥ paṅktiḥ somo.atha devatā ||
śvetaṃ jalādhipaṃ dhyāyedgandharvādyaiśca veṣṭitam || 61 ||
ṛṣyāsanagataṃ dhyāyecchvetagandhena carcayet ||
bṛhaspate paridīyā iti maṃtreṇa bhaktitaḥ || 62 ||
tryaṃbako.asya ṛṣistriṣṭupchando devo jalādhipaḥ ||
dhyāyecca asuraṃ raktaṃ karālaṃ naravāhanam || 63 ||
daśabhirbāhubhiryuktaṃ kṛṣṇavastrānulepanam ||
śanno devīti maṃtreṇa kṛṣṇapuṣpaiḥ prapūjayet|| 64 ||
ṛṣirvaiśvānaraśchando virāḍityabhidhīyate||
vaiśvānarottaro devaḥ prītaye tasya yojayet || 65||
śeṣaṃ ṣaḍānanaṃ dhyāyetkṛṣṇaṃ ca madhupiṃgalam ||
meṣasthaṃ kuṇḍalopetaṃ nāgayajñopavītinam ||
udvarṣa iti mantreṇa pūjayedbhūtimicchatā || 66||
pāpaṃ raktaṃ trinetraṃ ca raktaṃ prānte vicintayet ||
raktaśmaśrudharaṃ caiva varahastaṃ vicintayet || 67||
siddho vīreti mantreṇa kṛṣṇapuṣpairathārcayet||
yamaṃ ca kṛkarākṣaṃ ca ākuñcanmūrdhaje dvijāḥ||68||
kapilo.asya ṛṣiśchando.anuṣṭup caiva prakīrtitam ||
devatā ca yaśaḥ khyātaṃ prītaye viniyojayet || 69 ||
yamaṃ ca kṛkarākṣaṃ ca kṣamākuñcitamūrdhajam || ||
kharasthaṃ dvibhujaṃ dhyāyedimaṃ mantramudīrayet || 2.2.11.70 ||

hiraṇyagarbha ityuktaḥ prītaye.asya niyojayet || 71 ||

ṛṣirvāyuśca gāyatrī chando vāyuśca devatā || 73 ||
mugdharaktaṃ śaṃkhacakragadāpadmadharaṃ tathā ||
pītavastraṃ pannagasthaṃ hārakeyūramaṃḍitam || 74 ||
avasṛṣṭā parāpata iti mantreṇa pūjayet ||
agniścāsya ṛṣiḥ proktacchandaḥ somaśca devatā || 75 ||

dvibhujaṃ padmahastaṃ ca devamevaṃ vicintayet ||
yanmāturiti mantreṇa pūjayetsitataṃḍulaiḥ || 76 ||

devatā ca bhavetkumbhaḥ prītaye viniyogataḥ || || 77 ||

nānābharaṇasampannaṃ kirīṭavaradhāriṇam ||

devatā ca bhavetsomaḥ prīyate viniyojayet || 79 ||

nāgayajñopavītiṃ ca śikhistaṃbhaṃ dvijottamāḥ || 2.2.11.80 ||

paṃktiśchandastathā proktaṃ devaḥ pañcānanaḥ smṛtaḥ || 82 ||
śyāmavarṇāṃ ditiṃ dhyāyeddvibhujāṃ pītavigrahām ||

suparṇo.asīti mantreṇa pūjayetpītacandanaiḥ || 84 ||

bhaveddevo bhārgavaśca iṣṭārthe paripūjayet || 85 ||
raktābhāmaditiṃ dhyāyetsarvālaṃkārabhūṣitām ||

vāmadeva ṛṣiścāsya gandhādyairabhipūjayet |

ācāryavihitaḥ kalpastasmāccakṣa iti smṛtaḥ || || 3 ||
trikuśaṃ parigṛhṇāti tataśca kurute dṛḍham ||
ṛṣirdakṣaśca jagatī chando viṣṇuśca devatā ||4||
kaśyapastṛpyatāmiti bhūrasīti ca śodhanam ||
ṛṣiḥ suvarṇa gāyatrī jagatī chanda iṣyate ||
devatā ca bhavetsūryaḥ pṛthivīśodhane nyaset || 5 ||
aiśānyādikrameṇaiva prādakṣiṇyena yatnataḥ ||
yatpavitreti maṃtreṇa tarjanyaṃguṣṭhayorapi || 6 ||
kuśagarbhatrayeṇāpi bhrāmayedvalayākṛti ||
parisamūhanamityuktaṃ snapanaṃ śṛṇu sattama || 7 ||
īśānādeśca saṃskāraṃ kuryātparisamūhanam ||
pratiṣṭhāyāṃ caretyādinairṛtyādigrahaṃ makhe || 8 ||
parisamūhanamaindrasya parvato.asya ṛṣiḥ smṛtaḥ ||
paṃkticchandaḥ samuddiṣṭamindrāṇī cāsya devatā || 9 ||
gomayaṃ ca trigaṃdhaṃ ca paṃcamūrtikayāpi ca ||
kaniṣṭhaṃ guhyakaṃ tyaktvā devatārthe na lepayet || 2.2.13.10 ||
mānastokeneti ṛcā viśvedevaśca pūjyatām ||
ṛṣiḥ syātkāśyapacchando viśvadevaḥ prakīrtitaḥ || 11 || yojayellepayedvidvānghaṭamābaddhya sattamāḥ ||
madhyamātarjanībhyāṃ ca kuśamārabhya dakṣiṇam || 12 ||
caturastrīkṛte kṣetraṃ hastamānaṃ tathānanam ||
yajvabhiriti mantreṇa sūryaḥ prīṇāti sattamāḥ || 13 ||
dakṣe sārdhāṃgulaṃ tyaktvā paścimena parityajet ||
uttarāgrāṃ likhedrekhāmanyathā.amaṃgalaṃ bhavet || 14 ||
āpyāyasveti mantrasya dhanvatari ṛṣiḥ smṛtaḥ ||
triṣṭupchandaḥ samākhyātaṃ savitā cātra devatā || 15 ||
tallagnaṃ dakṣiṇe caikaṃ pūrvārddhadvādaśāṅgulam ||
anyāṃgulāṃtaraṃ caikaṃ tataḥ saptāṃgulaṃ bhavet || 16 ||
kuśamūlena svarṇena pratiṣṭhāyāṃ ca rājate ||
aṃguṣṭhānāmikābhyāṃ ca saṃjyotīti ca saṃjapan || 17 ||
saṃsmarenmitrā varuṇau ṛṣirautathyasaṃjñakaḥ ||
paṃktiśchandaḥ śivo devo rekhāmatha ca yojayet || 18 ||
tenaivorddhvakarau kuryāddakṣavāme sakṛtsakṛt ||
bhāsvarāya kṣipedagnau tata ūrdhvaṃ raṇaṃ smṛtam || 19 ||
sadasaṃpadṛṣiḥ karṇo virāḍiti udāhṛtaḥ ||
chanda indro devatā ca pṛthivyā devatā bhavet || 2.2.13.20 ||
kuśapuṣpodakenāpi devatīrthena sattamāḥ ||
paṃcagavyena matimānpañcaratnodakena ca ||
pañcapallavatoyena mahāyoge viśeṣataḥ || 21 ||
athonasya ca mantrasya variṣṭhaḥ parikīrtitaḥ ||
chando.atha devī gāyatrī devatā gaṇanāyakaḥ || 22 ||
kīśādagniṃ samādāya me gṛhṇāmīti saṃpaṭhan ||
me gṛhṇāmīti maṃtrasya ṛṣirgautama īritaḥ ||
chandonuṣṭupsamākhyātaṃ vāmadevo.atha devatā || 23 ||
kravyādagniṃ parityajya kravyādamagnimīrayan ||
mantreṇānena matimāndakṣiṇasyāṃ vinikṣipet || 24 ||
asya mantrasya hārīta ṛṣiḥ syācchanda iṣyate ||
devatā vāmadevo.api dāhepi viniyojayet || 25 ||
āvāhanaṃ tataḥ kuryātsaṃsarakṣeti saṃjapan||
saṃsarakṣeti maṃtrasya ṛṣirnīla udāhṛtaḥ ||
virāṭ chando.atha vijñeyo devatā ca śatakratuḥ || 26 ||
vaiśvānara iti ṛcā agnisthāpanamīritam||
maṃtramācāti prīṇāti ṛṣiḥ syātkāśyapaḥ smṛtaḥ ||
anuṣṭup ca bhavecchando devatā havyavāhanaḥ || 27 ||
badhnāsīti ca maṃtreṇa agniṃ kuryātpradakṣiṇam ||
ṛṣiḥ svayaṃbhūrākhyāto virāṭchanda udāhṛtam ||
devatā paramātmā ca namaskāreṇa yojayet || || 28 ||
tatognidakṣiṇe bhāge prāgagrakuśakubjake ||
dvihaste bhavataścaiva hastapānāsane atha || 29 ||
brahmannihopaveśyatāmiti brahmāṇaṃ viniveśayet ||
brahmayajñānṛcā dogdhrī dhenuriti tvṛcā ||2.2.13.30||
dvābhyāmiti ca mantrābhyāmiti brahmapraveśanam||
śakro.asya trāyatāmeti śṛṇu ṛgbhyāmṛṣīdvijāḥ ||31||
prajāpatirṛṣiśchandastriṣṭubdevo.atha śaṃkaraḥ ||
nāradaśca ṛṣiśchandastriṣṭubdevaḥ śacīpatiḥ || 32 ||
agneruttarabhāge ca hastamānāṃtarepi ca ||
praṇītā sthāpanaṃ kuryāddina ehīti saṃjapan|| 33 ||
mantrasya ca ṛṣiśchando vāmadevaḥ prakīrtitaḥ ||
jagatī ca bhavecchando devatā ca śatakratuḥ || 34 ||
śrīparṇīsahakārotthaṃ varuṇasya viśeṣataḥ ||
ṣaḍaṃgulena vistāraṃ viṃśatyaṃgulakena ca || 35 ||
dairghyeṇa ca catuḥkhyātakāṃgulaṃ ca pramāṇataḥ ||
dvyaṃgule carakākāyāmāsāsandevakarmaṇi || 36 ||
abhicāre bhavetkāṃsyaṃ tāmraṃ syācchāṃtikarmaṇi ||
pratiṣṭhāyāṃ mṛnmayaṃ ca aṣṭāṃgulamathāpi vā || 37 ||
dvādaśāṃgulaprastāraṃ taijasaṃ mānavarjitam||
imaṃ me varuṇenarcā praṇītāmatha pūrayet || 38 ||
sāgarā atha prīyaṃtāmitthamādhyānamācaret ||
sakṛdacchinnadarbheṇa digvidikṣu paristaret || 39 ||
nairṛte dikṣu sītaḥ syādvaiśvadeve tathaiva ca ||
kayā naścitra ityṛcā nāgaḥ prīṇāti sattamāḥ || 2.2.13.40 ||
asya maṃtrasya ca ṛṣirbharadvāja udāhṛtaḥ ||
chando.anuṣṭubdevatā ca īśānaḥ parikīrtitaḥ || 41 ||
prayojanādikaṃ dravyaṃ tata āsādayetkramāt ||
dakṣiṇādi uttarāṃtaṃ dhuvāsa ityṛcāpi ca || 42 ||
ṛṣiḥ syānnāradaśchandonuṣṭupcaivātha devatā ||
śatakratuśca prīṇāti yojayedatha sādarāt || 43 ||
kāṣṭhaṃ ca paścime kuryātprayacchanpaścimena tu ||
purato.annaṃ pañcavrīhīstilāśca sahasarṣapān || 44 ||
dakṣiṇe caiva āpūpaṃ bhṛṃgarājaṃ tathaiva ca ||
phalapatre vāmabhāge piṣṭakaṃ dadhi dugdhakam || 45 ||
panasaṃ nārikelaṃ ca modakaṃ laḍḍukaṃ tathā ||
praṇītāṃ ca digvidikṣu sthāpayedavicārayan || 46 ||
praṇītāṃ na spṛśejjātu homakāle kathaṃcana ||
snānakuṃbhaṃ ca bho viprā yāvadyāgaḥ pravartate || 47 ||
uccīrakaṃ mātuliṃgaṃ dūrvāṃ dhātrīphalāni ca ||
tulasīmālatījātī jalajāni viśeṣataḥ || 48 ||
aiśānyāṃ sthāpayetsarvaṃ yacca vai kaṃkatīmayam ||
nairṛtyeti viśeṣoyaṃ yacca vaikaṃkatī śamī || 49 ||
yathāyogena tatsarvaṃ grāhyaṃ tatpatrameva ca ||
kṣīrapāke tu kṣīrāṃte carusthālīmathānayet || 2.2.13.50 ||
pavivacchedanakuśaiśchiṃdyātprādeśikaṃ punaḥ ||
chittvā pavitraṃ prokṣaṇyāṃ sthāpayedbalabhidāmrakam || 51 ||
viṣṇo rarāṭamaṃtreṇa chedayedagrabhāgataḥ ||
pāyasena kāṭhinena pramathnīyātkadācana || 52 ||
na rasena na kārṣṇena na dṛḍhena kadācana ||
tāmreṇa bhasmanā cātha śuktiśaṃkhena vāgyataḥ ||53||
chedayetpiñjulīṃ cāpi pavitramatha deśikaḥ||
viṣṇo rarāṭamaṃtrasya hārītaśca ṛṣiḥ smṛtaḥ || 54 ||
paṃktiśchaṃdo bhaveddevaḥ saṃskāre viniyojayet ||
praṇītābhājanaṃ gṛhya prokṣaṇīṃ pūrayettribhiḥ || 55 ||
kāyatīrthena tatkuryāddevatīrthena cetyapi ||
vāmahastatale paścātsthāpayetprokṣaṇīyakam || 56 ||
madhyamāmadhyamāṃguṣṭha apāmārgeṇa maṃtribhiḥ ||
uttānaṃ tatpavitraṃ ca pavitraṃ teti saṃjapan || 57 ||
ṛṣiḥ syādgautamaśchando dharmarājo.atha devatā ||
atha sthāpitadravyāṇi prokṣayetsthāpayetkramāt || 58 ||
sakṛddravye tribhiḥ kāṣṭhaistrivāraṃ maṃtrapuṣpakaiḥ ||
sthirasthāne tu saṃprāptapraṇītāyāśca dakṣiṇe || 59 ||
prādeśāṃtarataścaiva ājyasthālīmathārpayet ||
agrato maṇḍalaṃ kṛtvā vahniṃ vipre tu sthāpayet || 2.2.13.60 ||
dyūtaṃ niḥsārayettattu nirūpyāśu krameṇa tu ||
īśāneti ca maṃtreṇa adhiśrapaṇamīritam ||61||
ṛṣirnārāyaṇaśchandaḥ paṃktirīśo.atha devatā||
paryagnikaraṇaṃ kuryādādarāddvayamapyatha || 62 ||
avekṣya īśamārabhya dakṣiṇāvartakena tu ||
kulāyanīti maṃtreṇa ṛṣicchandādikaṃ smaran || 63 ||
pariveṣyājyasthālīṃ ca triḥ sakṛdvā samāhitaḥ ||
pitarastṛpyatāmiti saṃskāre mātaraḥ smṛtāḥ || 64 ||
ṛṣiḥ syājjamadagniśca gāyatrī chanda īritam ||
devatā ca pinākī syādagniṣṭome ca yojayet || 65 ||
ghṛtasya ca tathā tvaṃ no brahmā vai tṛpyatāmiti ||
ṣaḍaṃgulaṃ sruvaṃ paścādgṛhītvāgnau pratapya ca || 66 ||
trirātraṃ tu mahāyoge sakṛdanyatra sattamāḥ ||
saṃmārjayetkuśenāpi mūlādagraṃ tu secayet || 67 ||
agrānmūlaṃ punaḥ kuryātsaṃpūjya ca punaḥ punaḥ ||
tribhistribhiḥ praṇītode prokṣayettadanaṃtaram || 68 ||
bhuvaṃ punaḥ pratapyātha prokṣaṇyuttarato nyaset ||
ājyapātraṃ puraskṛtya pavitraṃ ca samāharet ||69||
aṃguṣṭhe dve anāme tu gṛhṇīyāttatpavitrakam ||
aṣṭāṃgulaṃ madhyakṛtvo ghṛtaṃ triḥ pavanaṃ caret ||2.2.13.70||
pātāle tristathākāśe avekṣyājyaṃ tatastribhiḥ ||
prokṣaṇyāṃ ca tathā kuryādadhaḥ saṃprokṣya deśikaḥ || 71 ||
tataḥ pāyasamādāya utthāya ca samantra kam ||
tūṣṇīṃ dadyāttathā cāgnau sanniveśena tattvataḥ || 72 ||
sapavitraṃ dakṣakare gṛhītvā prokṣaṇīyakam ||
aṣṭāṃgule mūlabhāge tajjalena īśāditaḥ || 73||
agniṃ paryukṣayetpaścāddakṣiṇāvartakena ca ||
pavitraṃ ca praṇītāyāṃ nidhāya prokṣaṇīyakam || 74 ||
saṃyāvārthaṃ ca bho viprā agnivattatra deśikaḥ ||
dhyāyedagniṃ raktavarṇaṃ sruvahastaṃ tribāhukam || 75 ||
kamaṃḍaluṃ pare haste tato dakṣakareṇa tu ||
sruvaṃ gṛhītvā juhuyāttūṣṇīmeva samāhitaḥ || 76 ||
aṃte ca devatoddeśaṃ prājāpatyaṃ samīrayan ||
praṇavāṃtena juhuyātsarvatra dvijasattamāḥ || 77 ||
vāyukoṇaṃ samārabhya vahnikoṇāntakena tu ||
acchinnena ghṛtenaiva indrāya tadanaṃtaram || 78 ||
agnīṣomātmakaṃ caiva juhuyādrākṣasāditaḥ ||
aiśānakoṇaparyaṃtaṃ tato naimittikaṃ caret || 79 ||
paścātsviṣṭaṃ tato dadyāddadyācca matibhistathā ||
vāruṇaṃ pañcakaṃ caiva kṛtvā pūrṇāṃ tato labhet || 2.2.13.80 ||
udvāha iti maṃtra sya atharvaṇa ṛṣiḥ smṛtaḥ ||
chaṃdo devī ca gāyatrī devataṃ cāpi vāruṇam || 81 ||
prakṛte yojayenmantrī stutau cāpi niyojayet ||
tvannogna iti maṃtrasya ṛṣirvāśiṣṭhasaṃjñakaḥ ||
chaṃdaśca bṛhatī khyātaṃ tadevāgniḥ prakīrtitaḥ || 82 ||
iḍo gatamiti mantrasya ṛṣiḥ ko guhyasaṃjñakaḥ ||
chandaśca jagatī khyātaṃ devo viṣṇuḥ prakīrtitaḥ || 83 ||
udvartana iti maṃtrasya ṛṣiḥ ko nu prakīrtitaḥ ||
chando devī ca gāyatrī varuṇaścādhidevatā ||84||
iti śrībhaviṣye mahāpurāṇe madhyamaparvaṇi dvitīyabhāge trayodaśo.adhyāyaḥ || 13 || ||
makhavidhānavarṇanam
|| sūta uvāca || ||
makhe sarvatra brahmāṇamṛtvijaṃ varayedatha ||
kuśakaṇḍīṃ svagṛhyena kṛtvāgniṃ cārcayettataḥ || 1 ||
āghārājyabhāgau tu mahāvyāhṛtayastrayaḥ ||
sarvaṃ prāyaścittasaṃjñakaṃ prājāpatyaṃ ca sviṣṭakṛt || 2 ||
etannityaṃ hi sarvatra home karmaṇi nirdiśet ||
prājāpatye ca indrāya etāvāghārasaṃjñakau || 3 ||
agnaye caiva somāya ājyabhāgau prakīrtitau||
bhūrbhuvaḥsvastrayaścaiva mahāvyāhṛtayaḥ smṛtāḥ ||4||
ayāścāgne iti tathā ye te śatamanuttamam ||
sarvaprāyaścittasaṃjñā ete vai pañca maṃtrakāḥ || 5 ||
prājāpatyāhutiścaikā sviṣṭakṛccāparā smṛtā ||
caturdaśaitāḥ kṛtayo hotavyā nityasaṃjñakāḥ || 6 ||
kṛtvā sakṛddevatoddeśaṃ homaṃ paścātsamācaret ||
somapā ye ca goyāge naramedhāśvamedhayoḥ || 7 ||
anyatra viparītena svāhāṃtena hunedbudhaḥ ||
naimittikaṃ vinā nityaṃ viphalaṃ yāti nānyathā || || 8 ||
nityaṃ varjyaṃ śatārdhena vaiśvadeve tathaiva ca || trya
hasādhyādiyāgeṣu yannideśaṃ śṛṇu dvijāḥ || 9 ||
ekāhe vāghārārajyau kṛtvā naimittikīṃ kṛtīḥ ||
samā sviṣṭakṛtaṃ vidyādākṛtyādyāstataḥ param || 2.2.14.10 ||
viśeṣatastryahādau tu aghārāvājyapūrvakam ||
paścānnaimittikaṃ kuryātsamāptidivase pyatha || 11 ||
āghārārājyapūrveṇa tato naimittikaṃ caret ||
sviṣṭakṛdvyāhṛtiścaiva vāruṇādyāstathā hi ṣaṭ || 12 ||
dvijātiḥ patito yatra dvitrikaṃ ca catuścatuḥ ||
ekasmindivase kuryātsomayāge ca śaiśave || 13 ||
dvijātīnāṃ vivāhe tu naityikaṃ prathamaṃ bhavet ||
ekasmindivase kuryādagnikāryaṃ pṛthakpṛthak || 14 ||
dadyādekaṃ ca nityaṃ ca pṛthaṅ nityaṃ na cācaret ||
dvijātiḥ patito yatra dvitrikaṃ ca catuścatuḥ || 15 ||
ekasmindivase kuryāttatrāpi naittikaṃ tyajet ||
home brahmā stute viṣṇuḥ sruve caiva maheśvaraḥ || 16 ||
ajasyāniyame cendro.adhiśrayaṇaṃ vivasvataḥ ||
paryagnikaraṇe caiva udvāhe mātaraḥ smṛtāḥ || 17 ||
candrādityau cotpavane vīkṣaṇe ca diśastathā ||
prokṣaṇyāṃ sthāpane durgā ime lakṣmī pratiṣṭhitā || 18 ||
homaṃ kuryāddvijaśreṣṭhā vidhiṃ kuryātsamāhitaḥ||
eteṣu devatāḥ proktā dvijātīnāṃ hitāya ca||19||
yajetsupaśubaddheṣu saṃskāre caiva parvaṇi ||
devatāḥ sarvā jñātavyā etā yajñe samāhitaiḥ ||2.2.14.20||
adhidaivena jānīyātkaravalyāṃ paṃcaphalaṃ yataḥ||
tasmātsarvaprayatnena devatāmatha vinyaset ||21||
iti śrībhaviṣye mahāpurāṇe madhyamaparvaṇi dvitīyabhāge caturdaśo.adhyāyaḥ || 14 || cha ||
devadhyānavarṇanam
|| sūta uvāca || ||
atha vakṣyāmi saccaiṣāṃ devānāṃ dhyānamuttamam ||
asya yajñe parijñānājjihvā samyakphalapradā ||1||
hiraṇyavarṇāṃ prathamāṃ vahnijihvāṃ mahādyutim ||
kanakāḍhyakarāṃ devīṃ hiraṇyākhyeṣṭasiddhaye || 2 ||
kanakāṃ dvibhujāṃ śuklāṃ hastābhyāṃ darbhasaṃyutām ||
kamaṃḍaluṃ ca bibhrāṇāṃ numaḥ sādhakasiddhidām || 3 ||
udyadindunibhāṃ raktāṃ caturbhirbhujapa llavaiḥ ||
śaṃkhacakrābhayavarāndadhatīṃ praṇamāmyaham || 4 ||
bhinnāṃjanacayaprakhyāṃ svarṇakuṃbhaṃ tu vāmataḥ ||
dakṣiṇena varāraktāṃ dhārayaṃtīṃ namāmyaham || 9 ||
suprabhāmaṇḍalābhā ca karābhyāṃ tatkṛtāñjaliḥ ||
padmāsanasthā kauśeyavasanā me prasīdatu || 6 ||
japākusumasaṃkāśā bahurūpā sakhe mama ||
śubhadā syādbhujaiḥ śubhrā sahasraṃ dadhatī parān || 7 ||
nīlotpalanibhe devi vahnivarṇaparābhave ||
japāpuṣpadhare nityaṃ satīrūpe prasīda me || 8 ||
mūlena vīkṣayetsthānaṃ maṃtreṇa khananaṃ matam ||
trisūtrīkaraṇaṃ kuryāccatuḥsūtraṃ nipātayet || 9 || ||
iti śrībhaviṣye mahāpurāṇe madhyama parvaṇi dvitīyabhāge pañcadaśo.adhyāyaḥ || 15 ||
devadhyānavidhānavarṇanam
|| sūta uvāca || ||
pratiṣṭhāyāḥ pūrvadine kuryāddevādhivāsanam ||
dhānyapratiṣṭhāṃ tasyaiva yūpaṃ cāpi yathāvidhi || 1 ||
rātrau mūlāgre ca ghaṭe sthāpayedgaṇanāyakam ||
saṃpūjya ca vidhānena digīśāṃśca tathā grahān || 2 ||
brahmāṇaṃ ca taḍāgeṣu varuṇaṃ śāntiyāgake ||
somaṃ ca maṃḍale sūryaṃ pāde viṣṇuṃ tathaiva ca || 3 ||
śaive śaivaṃ tathā proktaṃ prapāyāmatha vāruṇam ||
ārāme caiva brahmāṇaṃ pādyādyairapi cārcayet || 4 ||
drupadādīti mantreṇa snāpayetprathamaṃ budhaḥ ||
gāyatryā ca tataḥ paścādgandhadvāreti tailakam || 5 ||
sunābheti ca maṃtreṇa dvābhyāmeva viśiṣyate ||
śrīśca te iti kusumaṃ phalinīti ca vai phalam || 6 ||
kāṃḍāditi ca maṃtreṇa dadyāddūrvāśataṃ tataḥ ||
siṃdoriveti siṃdūraṃ viśvāmiti ca mārjanam || 7 ||
samicchetyañjanaṃ dadyādduḥsthaṃ surāsurā japan ||
candanaṃ yajvabhirjaptvā mānastoketi candanam || 8 ||
yūpe caiva viśeṣoyamuttarāgraṃ pravinyaset ||
adyaiva tena maṃtreṇa sthāpayedatha vāriṇā || 9 ||
gāyatryā prathamaṃ caiva āpo hiṣṭheti vai japan ||
śanno devīti drupadāṃ snāpayettadanantaram || 2.2.16.10 ||
abhimantryātha brahmeti trirātraṃ maṃtramīrayan ||
yogaṃ yogadṛḍhaṃ japtvā pavitraṃ vinyasettataḥ || 11 ||
tvaṃ gandharveti mantreṇa tathā subhābha ityapi ||
dvābhyāṃ tailagaṃdhayutaṃ śrīsūktenāpi puṣpakam || 12 ||
dhūrasīti ca tathā dhūpamāsrajyotirbhirdīpakam ||
anumīmahatāti dadyāddūrvākṣataṃ tataḥ || 13 ||
viśvāmīti ca nimnyaṃtakāṃḍāditi tathākṣatam ||
siṃdoriveti sindūraṃ samidheti tathāñjanam || 14 ||
pādo.asyetyatha bhuktaṃ syādyāḥ phalinīti punaḥ phalam ||
rūpaṃ neti dahedrūpaṃ na sociti ca pūjanam || 15 ||
yuvā suvāseti vastraṃ nāgagandheti candanam ||
tato yamagṛhādbāhye maṇḍapāṃtaramāśritaḥ ||16||
sunātīti vaco dadyāttataścāvāhayetprabhum ||
tatrādhivāsanaṃ kuryādrakṣayecca surakṣibhiḥ ||17||
ācāryo yajamānaśca ṛtvigbhojanamācaret ||
akṣāralavaṇānyāsī dadhi viśvaṃ tilāṃstyajet ||18||
ādhāraṇaṃ cādhivāsaṃ vakṣye tatrānusārataḥ ||
sunāteti vaco dadyāttailaṃ caiva śive tribhiḥ || 19 ||
pañcabhirbrāhmaṇaiḥ sārdhaṃ gandharvā iti vismaran ||
dadyādgandhaṃ tailayutaṃ gandhadvāretyṛcā punaḥ || 2.2.16.20 ||
yāḥ phalinīti ca phalaṃ pūgatānāmavarjanam ||
kauśikīruttamosīti dadyātkhaḍgaṃ sutīkṣṇakam || 21 ||
rūpena veti mantreṇa mudgaraṃ ca nivedayet ||
śrīśca te iti kusumaṃ viśvānīti ca saṃpaṭhan || 22 ||
nirmathanaṃ tataḥ kāryamiti sādhāraṇo vidhiḥ ||
tatodhivāsakalpe tu pradeśe tu samācaret || 23 ||
vinādhivāsanaṃ viprāḥ pratiṣṭhānaṃ samācaret ||
na tatphalamavāpnoti vivāhe śaraṇaṃ diśet || 24 ||
tataḥ prayatnataḥ kāryaṃ pūrvāhne rātriyogataḥ ||
nitye naimittike kāmye kārayetkuṇḍamaṇḍapam || 25 ||
sthaṃḍile hasta mātreṇa vālukānirmite.api ca ||
trayodaśāṃgule haste dvihaste cāpi varddhate || 26 ||
ekaikāṃgulako viprāḥ pīṭhe nāsti vicāraṇā ||
navapañcaka kuṇḍe ca lakṣādāvapi śaṃkayā || 27 ||
tato daśāṃgule pakṣe daśāṃgaṃ śṛṇuta dvijāḥ ||
kāṣṭhaṃ pattraṃ ca puṣpaṃ ca modakaṃ piṣṭakaṃ tathā || 28 ||
annaṃ ca paramānnaṃ ca hyavekṣyaṃ tilameva ca ||
etadvai gṛhapakṣe ca viṣṇupakṣe tilāditaḥ||29||
śaive yavāditaḥ kāryā śākte puṣpādito bhavet ||
sūrye pakṣe piṣṭakādi gopāle kṛśarāditaḥ || 2.2.16.30 ||
kṛṣṇe ca karavīrādi śrīphalāni ca traipure ||
sārasvate ca śrīvṛkṣe mokṣakāme nigadyate || 31 || ||
iti śrībhaviṣye mahāpurāṇe madhyamaparvaṇi dvitīyabhāge ṣoḍaśo.adhyāyaḥ || 16 || || cha ||
devadhyānavarṇanam
|| sūta uvāca || ||
aṣṭau hotāro dvārapālāthāṣṭau aṣṭau kāryā brāhmaṇā yājakāśca ||
sarve śuddhā lakṣitā lakṣaṇādyairekaḥ kāryo jāpakosminmahātmā || 1 ||
divyairgadhai rgaṃdhamālyaiḥ suvarṇaistailaṃ kāryaṃ brāhmaṇāḥ pañcaviṃśāḥ ||
āvāpyaistu dviguṇairvai balīyo divyairvastrairarhaṇādakṣiṇābhiḥ || 2 ||
nārhayitvā yathoktena kaścitpatraṃ niveśa yet ||
anarhiteṣu vipreṣu na samyakphalamāpnuyāt || 3 ||
pratiṣṭhādiṣu sarveṣu samyagviprānathārhayet ||
kuśadvijaṃ tu sarvatra arghyaṃ viṣṭaramā trakam || 4 ||
pradadyādarhaṇaṃ samyakpaścātpātraṃ nivedayet ||
vinārhaṇaṃ kṛte tasminnarake paripacyate || 5 ||
pratyekaṃ brāhmaṇā yajñe vedamantreṣu pāragāḥ ||
ācāryo yadi kāryeṣu varayeddaśa govrajān || 6 ||
viśiṣṭānāmabhāve.api kuryātkuśamayāndvijān ||
kuśapratikṛtau cāpi svagotraṃ svaṃ dvijaṃ vinā || 7 ||
na kuryāccaraṇoddeśaṃ tathā praharasaṃhatim ||
gotrādikīrtanāṃteṣu svanāmoddeśamīrayan || 8 ||
tulāpuruṣadāne ca tathā ca hāṭakācale ||
kanyādāne tathotsarge kīrtayetpravarādikam || 9 ||
na pātraṃ pratikṛtyarthaṃ na cālaṃ sodakaṃ tathā ||
mṛtabhāryyo hyabhāryaśca aputro mṛtaputrakaḥ || 2.2.17.10 ||
śūdrasaṃskārakaścaiva kṛpaṇo gaṇayājakaḥ ||
prāyaścittagṛhītaśca rājayājakapaiśunau || 11 ||
śūdragehanivāsī ca śūdrapreraka eva ca ||
svalpakaṇṭho vāmanaśca vṛṣalīpatireva ca || 12 ||
bandhudveṣī gurudveṣī bhāryādveṣī tathaiva ca ||
hīnāṃgaścaiva vṛddhāṃgo bhagnadaṃtaśca dāṃbhikaḥ || 13 ||
pratigrāhī ca kunakhaḥ pāradārika eva ca ||
śvitrī kuṣṭhī kulodbhūto nidrālurvyasanārthakaḥ ||14||
adīkṣitaḥ kadaryaśca caṃḍarogī galadvraṇaḥ ||
mahāvraṇī ca udarī yajñapātraṃ na kārayet || 15 ||
varaṇāṃte tu pātrāṇāṃ pūjāmantrāñchṛṇu dvija ||
pratimantreṇa gandhādyairarcayenmantravittamaḥ || 16 ||
brahmamūrtistvamācāryaḥ saṃsārātpāhi māṃ vibho ||
tvatprasādādguro yajñaṃ prāptosmi yanmayepsitam ||| || 17 ||
ciraṃ me śāśvatī kīrtiryāvallokāścarācarāḥ ||
prasīda tvaṃ maheśāna pratiṣṭhākarmasiddhaye || 18 ||
tvamādiḥ sarvabhūtānāṃ saṃsārārṇava tārakaḥ ||
jñānāmṛtapradācāryo yajurveda namo.astu te || 19 ||
brahmaṇaiva samudbhūta prakāśitadigantara ||
śuddhajāṃbūnadaprakhya yajurveda namo.astu te || 2.2.17.20 ||
prataptakanakābhāsa bhāsitadyutibhūtala ||
mantraprakhyānasaṃsthāna yajurveda namo.astu te || 21 ||
praphullakanakābhāsa bhāsvarāsurabhūṣita ||
prakīrṇamantrasaṃbhāravidhijña praṇato.asmi te || 22 ||
ṣaḍaṃgavedavedajña ṛtviṅgamokṣaprado bhava ||
praviśya maṇḍalaṃ viprā svasthāne sthāpayetkramāt || 23 ||
vedyāḥ paścimabhāge tu ācāryaṃ sthāpayedbudhaḥ ||
kuṇḍasyāgre tu brahmāṇaṃ maṇḍalasyaiva paścime || 24 ||
hotāraṃ sthāpayettatra vidhijñamatha cottare ||
dvaudvau kṛtvā jñāpakau ca khaḍgadhārakameva ca ||25||
dvāridvāri prayatnena dvārapālānanukramāt ||
vakṣyamāṇena maṃtreṇa pratye kamatha sthāpayet ||26||
pūjayedgandhapuṣpādyairvāsaso yugalena tu ||
yajñe savitate yo.asau pūjyate puruṣaḥ sadā||27||
nārāyaṇasvarūpeṇa yajñaṃ me saphalaṃ kuru ||
yajñeṣu sākṣī sarveṣu yajurvedārthatattvavit || 28 ||
ṛgvedārthasya tattvajña indrarūpa namo.astu te ||
makhaśreṣṭheṣu sarveṣu yena maṃtrāḥ suvistṛtāḥ || || 39 ||
yajurvedārthatattvajña brahmarūpa namo.astu te ||
makhaśreṣṭheṣu sarveṣu eṣa eva vidhiḥ smṛtaḥ || 2.2.17.30 ||
māṃgalyaṃ karmaṇāṃ nityaṃ sarvajñaṃ jñānarūpi ṇam ||
siddhaye mama yajñasya namāmi śivarūpiṇam || 31 ||
pālaya tvaṃ diśaḥ sarvā vidiśaśca tathā imam ||
dikpālarūpiṇaṃ vipraṃ yajñasiddhau namā myaham ||
na saṃkalpaṃ caredyāgaṃ vrataṃ devārcanaṃ tathā || 32 ||
saṃkalpamūlaḥ kāmo vai yajñāḥ saṃkalpasaṃbhavāḥ ||
saṃkalpena vinā viprā yatkiñcitkurute naraḥ || 33 ||
phalaṃ cālpālpakaṃ tasya dharmasyārddhakṣayo bhavet ||
tasmātsarvaprayatnena yāgaṃ saṃkalpayetsudhīḥ || 34 ||
kāmātparo naiva bhavenniṣkā mo.api na śobhanaḥ ||
tasmātkāmamayaṃ dharmaṃ vinā mokṣaṃ na cācaret || 35 ||
saṃkalpena vinā yastu dharmaṃ carati mānavaḥ ||
na tasya phalamāpnoti nityanaimittikasya ca || 36 ||
na kuryātsthāpane caiva kuryādvai maṃḍalāṃtare ||
gṛhītvauduṃbaraṃ pātraṃ vāripūrṇaṃ guṇānvitam || 37 ||
jalāśayārāmakūpa saṃkalpe pūrvadiṅmukhaḥ ||
sādhāraṇe cottarāsyo grahayajñe tu saṃmukhaḥ ||38||
mahāvrate pratiṣṭhāyāṃ pātraṃ tāmraṃ hiraṇmayam ||
rājatāśmamayaṃ sāṃgaṃ yadyajñeṣu praśasyate || 39 ||
yajñīyapātrapuṭakaṃ hastasthāne prakīrtitam ||
aiśyānyāṃ nikṣipettoyaṃ pratiṣṭhāyāṃ ca pūrvataḥ ||2.2.17.40||
ākāśe nikṣipedyāge vrate īśepi nityake ||
pitṛmedhe ca goyāge naramedhe ca dakṣiṇe ||41||
śuktikāṃsyādihastaiśca tāmraraupyādibhistathā||
saṃkalpo naiva kartavyo mṛnmaye ca kadācana || 42 ||
praṇavaṃ pūrvamuccārya yajedyajñeśvaraṃ smaret ||
gaṅgā cādityacaṃdrau ca dyaurbhūmī rātrivāsarau ||43||
sūryaḥ somo yamaḥ kālo mahābhūtāni paṃca ca ||
ete śubhāśubhāsyeha karmaṇo nava sākṣiṇaḥ || 44 ||
ityuccārya nyaseddharmaṃ dhyātvā puṣpāñjaliṃ sṛjet ||
amṛtaṃ kṛtyapātre ca oṃ tatsaditi nirdiśet || 45 ||
dharmaḥ śubhravapuḥ sitāṃbaradharaḥ kāryordhvadeśe vṛṣo hastābhyāmabhayaṃ varaṃ ca satataṃ rūpaṃ paraṃ yo dadhat ||
sarvaprāṇisukhāvahaḥ kṛta dhiyāṃ mokṣaikahetuḥ sadā soyaṃ pātu jagaṃti caiva satataṃ bhūyātsatāṃ bhūtaye || 46 ||
yajñasaṃbaṃdhiviprāṃśca ekāhenaiva yojayet ||
havirdravyāṇi yāni syuraṣṭayāgāṃtarepi ca || 47 ||
punaḥpunarniyojyāni brāhmaṇā haviragnayaḥ || 48 ||
iti śrībhaviṣye mahāpurāṇe madhyamaparvaṇi dvitīyabhāgesaptadaśo.adhyāyaḥ || 17 || || || cha ||
yogasthāpanadevapratiṣṭhāpanavarṇanam
|| sūta uvāca || ||
māghādimāseṣvapi ṣaṭsu kāryā yogapratiṣṭhā ṛṣibhiḥ praṇītā ||
devādisaṃsthāpanamā huratra yāvanna supto madhusūdanaśca || 1 ||
vāre bhṛgordevagurorbudhasya somasya sarvāḥ śubhadā bhavaṃti ||
lagne śubhasthe śubhavīkṣite vā kāryā pratiṣṭhā ca jalāśayānām || 2 ||
śuddhā dvitīyā ca tathā tṛtīyā trayodaśī cāpi tathaiva viprāḥ ||
tathāpi saptamyapi paurṇamāsī daśamyasau cāpyatha paṃcamī ca || 3 ||
prāṇapratiṣṭhā ca jalāśayāderetāḥ praśastāstithayo bhavaṃti ||
aprāpya caitāni śubhāni yāni kāryā pratiṣṭhā viṣuvadvaye ca || 4 ||
ṣaḍaśītilokāpyayanadvayena yugādike puṇyādine śubhe ca ||
kāryā taḍāgādijalāśayasya prācyāṃ pratiṣṭhā atha cottare vā || 5 ||
sucāru īṣatpravaṇe ca deśe suvartulaḥ ṣoḍaśahastamaṃḍapaḥ ||
dvāraiścaturbhiḥ prathitairupetaścaturmukhaścāpi bhavetsuretāḥ || 6 ||
pūrvādidvāreṣu catuṣṭayeṣu plakṣādibhistoraṇakaiḥ sureśaḥ ||
plakṣastathoduṃbarapippalau ca nyagrodhakaṃ cāpi yathākrameṇa ||7||
ūrdhve ca hastānamitāni yāni vicitramālyāṃbarabhūṣitāni ||
bhūmau yathā prīti ca hastakāni bhavaṃti caitānyapi toraṇāni ||8||
sarvatra yāgepi hi maṃḍapasya kāryā dhvajā dikṣu vidikṣu śubhrāḥ|| dikpālavarṇābhapatākayuktā madhye ca vai nīlapatākayuktāḥ || 9 ||
dhvajāśca yasmindaśahastasammitāstasminpatākā api pañcahastāḥ ||
aratnimātrā yadi mūlabhāge paṃcāṃgu lāgre vinibaddhagūḍhāḥ || 2.2.18.10 ||
dvāre ca tasmiṃśca nirūpitā vā raṃbhā supuṣpā sukhaśāḍvalāśca || vacābhivṛkṣottarapaṃcahastāḥ sapaṃcaśākhā api tora ṇāni ||11||
muṃjodbhavairbarhisamudbhavairvā suraṃjitaścettritapadmapallavaiḥ ||
puṣṭadvaye sūtritaṃ veṣṭayecca tathekṣukāṇḍairatha yāgamaṇḍapam||12||
vedistathā maṃḍapa madhyabhāge kāryā ca koṇesthituṣādihīnā||
hastocchritā reravavatī surekhapariṣkṛtā hastacatuṣṭayena || 13 ||
vedyāṃ parityajya daśāṃgulāni aiśānyata strīṇi tathā parāṇi ||
kuṃḍāya dadyāccaturasramekamavasthitaṃ tryaṃgulamekhalojjvalam||14||
prāsāde ca taḍāge ca mahārāme tathaiva ca ||
maṃḍalaṃ sarvatobhadraṃ prayatnenaiva kārayet ||15||
kuṃḍaṃ cāpi prakurvīta yathābhyantaramekhalam ||
bahiryonigataṃ śvetaṃ niścitraṃ samasūtrakam ||16||
kuṃḍāni kuryānnava kuṃḍapakṣe vedyāstathoccairavidikṣu caiva|
sarvāṇi sarvatra ca mekhalāni ṣaḍasrapaṃcāsrasamekhalāni||17||
aṣṭāsrajānyabjatrikoṇakāni tathārddhacandraṃ caturasrakaṃ ca||
kuṇḍasya pūrvottaradigvibhāge sthāpyo ghaṭaścandanacāruliptaḥ || 18 || mālyāmbarācchāditapūrṇapāthāḥ savṛttapatraśca suvarṇagarbhaḥ || 19 ||
||
iti śrībhaviṣye mahāpurāṇe madhyamaparvaṇi dvitīyabhāge aṣṭādaśo.adhyāyaḥ || 18 || a ||
devagrahapūjāvidhānavarṇanam
|| sūta uvāca || ||
gato yāgagṛhādanyanmaṇḍalāṃtaramāśritaḥ ||
yajamānastathā nityaṃ karma kṛtvā yathāvidhi || 1 ||
paṃca devānnamaskṛtya tathā yajñeśvaraṃ harim ||
saṃkalpaṃ ca tataḥ kṛtvā brāhmaṇā nāmanujñathā || 2 ||
etasminpuṇyadeśe tu phalaṃ gotraśca vai yamaḥ ||
vedavyāsādipraṇītaṃ yathāśāstranidarśanam || 3 ||
yathāyathā svatantroktaṃ puṇyā raṇyābhidhāyakam ||
jalāśayapratiṣṭhāyāṃ karidhye vidhivaddvijāḥ || 4 ||
yathāyathā ca kalpoktaṃ yathākuṇḍaṃ vidhānataḥ ||
sādhivāsaṃ yathaivaikaḥ puṇyā raṇyavidhāyakaḥ || 5 ||
jalāśayapratiṣṭhāṃ ca kariṣye vidhivaddvijāḥ ||
saṃkalpamevaṃ kṛtvā tu vṛddhiśrāddhaṃ samācaret || 6 ||
mātṛyāgaṃ puraskṛtya vṛddhiśrāddhaṃ samāpayet||7||
bheryādighoṣeṇa sumaṃgalena padyaṃ likhedatra saṣoḍaśākṣaram ||
indrādidikpālavarāyudhāni samullikhedeva diśi sthitāni || || 8 ||
brahmeśānvarayetsarvānācāryaṃ tu viśeṣataḥ ||
svarṇakuṃḍalayugmena tathā tāmrādibhājanaiḥ || 9 ||
nānāratnaiśca vastraiśca ācāryaṃ varayedbudhaḥ ||
hemālaṃkārayugmaiśca vāsobhirvividharaipi || 2.2.19.10 ||
yathāmānaṃ yathāśakti yathābhivṛṇuyādbudhaḥ ||
racitā yajamānena dhruvaṃ svastyastu te iti ||11||
tataḥ sarvauṣadhībhiśca yajamānaḥ sapatnikaḥ ||
āpohiṣṭhetimantreṇa snāpayāmāsuraprajāḥ || 12 ||
yavagodhūmanīvāratilaśyāmākaśālayaḥ ||
priyaṃguvrīhaya ścāṣṭau sarvauṣadhigaṇaḥ smṛtaḥ || 13 ||
tataḥ śuklāmbaradharaḥ śuklamālyānulepanaḥ ||
sarvauṣadhyudakasnātaḥ snāpito vedapuṅgavaiḥ || 14 ||
brāhmaṇairabhyanujñātaḥ purohitapuraḥsaraḥ ||
nānāmaṃgalaghoṣeṇa bherīpaṭahanisvanaiḥ || 15 ||
yajamānaḥ sapatnīkaḥ putrapautrasamanvitaḥ ||
paścimaṃ dvāramāsādya praviśed yāgamaṇḍapam || 16 ||
carake pūjayedvighnaṃ gaṃgāṃ ca yamunāṃ tathā ||
pārśvayoścārdhato lakṣmīṃ pratihāramanukramāt || 17 ||
vediṃ pradakṣiṇīkṛtya namaskuryādyathāvidhi ||
upaviśya tatastasminbrāhmaṇānumate sthitaḥ || 18 ||
svasti vācyaṃ tataḥ kṛtvā paṃca devānprapūjayet ||
bhūtotsādaṃ tataḥ kṛtvā vikirānvikiredbhuvi || 19 ||
apakrāmaṃtu ye bhūtā ye cāsminviprakārakāḥ ||
yasmānno nāmni vartaṃte yajñamātraṃ pravartatām || 2.2.19.20 ||
pūjayedāsanaṃ paścātsvakīyaṃ puṣpacaṃdanaiḥ ||
namonaṃtāsanāyeti tathā padmāsanāya ca || 21 ||
vimalāsanāya ca namo namaḥ sārāsanāya ca ||
yogāsanāya ca namaḥ pṛthivyai nama ityapi || 22 ||
tato bhūmitale vāmahastaṃ dattvā paṭhennaraḥ ||
pṛthvi tvayā dhṛtā lokā devi tvaṃ viṣṇunā dhṛtā || 23 ||
tvaṃ ca dhāraya māṃ nityaṃ pavitramāsanaṃ kuru ||
sūryāyārghyaṃ tato dattvā guruṃ natvā kṛtāñjaliḥ || 24 ||
devaṃ hṛtpadmake nītvā prāṇāyāmatrayaṃ caret ||
tato.arcayedvighnarājamaiśānyāṃ ca ghaṭopari || 25 ||
gandhapuṣpaistathā vastrairnaivedyairvividhairapi ||
gaṇānāṃ tveti maṃtreṇa vrahmāṇaṃ tadanaṃtaram || 26 ||
ābrahmanniti ṛcā tadviṣṇoriti saṃsmaran ||
vāsudevaṃ tataḥ paścādbalibhirgandhacaṃdanaiḥ || 27 ||
tato devaśarīraṃ tu navamāsādya triṃśatam ||
vedyāśca paritaḥ sarvānsvesve sthāne yathākramam || 28 ||
tato rājādhirājena bhūtaśuddhiṃ samācaret ||
tato budbudamadhye tu śvetapadmāsanasthitam || 29 ||
śuddhasphaṭikasaṃkāśaṃ śaṃkhakundendusaprabham||
kirīṭakuṇḍalayutaṃ sitaṃ paṃkajadhāriṇam || 2.2.19.30 ||
śuklamālyāṃbaraṃ śuklaṃ śuklagaṃghānulepanam ||
ahituṇḍāsanasthaṃ ca pāśahastaṃ mahābalam || 31 ||
stūyamānaṃ suragaṇaiḥ siddhagaṃdharvasevitam ||
sucāruvadanaṃ devaṃ padmamālopaśobhitam || 32 ||
rājīvalocanaṃ nityaṃ nāgalokopaśobhitam ||
makaragrāhakūrmādyairnānājalacarairvṛtam || 33 ||
jalāśayagataṃ devaṃ ciṃtayejjalaśāyinam||
tato nyāsaṃ prakurvīta pacāṃgatvāvaśobhitam || 34 ||
arghyapātraṃ tataḥ kṛtvā tribhāgajalapūritam ||
aṣṭadhā mūlamaṃtraṃ ca japtvā tenodakena ca || 35 ||
āsanaṃ yāgavastūni prokṣayettena vāriṇā ||
aruṇāya vidmahe tamoghnāya ca dhīmahi || 36 ||
tanno aruṇaḥ pracodayāditi snānaṃ samācaret ||
tato gaṇeśamaiśānyāmāgneyyāṃ gurupādukām|| 37 ||
dharmādharmādikānsarvāntsattvādīnatha cārcayet ||
sūryasomajalādīnāṃ maṇḍalāni yathākramam ||38||
madhye śaktiṃ ca kṣīrodamanaṃtaṃ pṛthivīṃ tathā ||
kūrmaṃ cādhāraśaktiṃ ca sumeruṃ mandaraṃ tathā || 39 ||
pañcatattvaṃ samabhyarcya sāṃgopāgamanaṃtaram ||
tataḥ śvetaṃ ca kusumaṃ sākṣataṃ yogamāyayā || 2.2.19.40 ||
gṛhītvā pūrvavaddeśe sthāpayetkalaśopari ||
āvāhanaṃ tataḥ kṛtvā mantreṇānena maṃtravit || 41 ||
ehyehi bhagavanvaruṇa eṣa yajñaḥ pravartate ||
yajñabhāgaṃ gṛhāṇedaṃ tvāmevāvāhayāmyaham || 42 ||
evamāvāhya lokeśamaṣṭau mudrāḥ pradarśayet ||
gāyatryā snāpayitvā tu dadyātpādyādikatrayam || 43 ||
puṣpāñjaliṃ tato dattvā mūlamaṃtreṇa deśikaḥ ||
pūrvādipatramūleṣu dharmādīnpūjayedbudhaḥ || 44 ||
sattvādyāḥ pūjayettatra teṣāmeva varāṃganāḥ ||
jñānaṃ dharmaṃ ca somaṃ ca rajaḥ sattvaṃ tamastathā || 45 ||
pūrvādipatramadhye tu grahānaṣṭau prapūjayet ||
patrāgre lokapālānāmagnyā(gryā?)dīnāyudhāṃstathā || 46 ||
karṇikādakṣiṇe pūrvaṃ vāme cāpi śacīpatim ||
pūrvapatre tu brahmāṇaṃ pūjayetsitapaṅkajaiḥ || 47 ||
nairṛtye varuṇa syātha madhye.anaṃtaṃ prapūjayet ||
pīṭhamantreṣu pūrvādibrahmāṇaṃ ca śivaṃ tathā || 48 ||
viṣṇuṃ cāpi gaṇeśaṃ ca pṛthivīṃ gaṃdhacandanaiḥ ||
japenmantraṃ sāṣṭaśataṃ sahasraṃ vijapedbudhaḥ ||49 ||
jānubhyāmavanīṃ gatvā vijayākhyastavaṃ paṭhet ||
īśānādipīṭhakoṇeṣu kamalāmaṃbikāṃ tathā || 2.2.19.50 ||
nairṛtyāṃ viśva karmāṇaṃ vāyavye tu sarasvatīm ||
pūrvādidvāradeśe tu marutaṃ cāvahādikam || 51 ||
āvahaṃ pravahaṃ caiva tathaivodvahasaṃvahau ||
vinyasetpaścime dvāri nivahaṃ ca parīvaham || 52 ||
vinyaseduttaradvāri marutaṃ ca parābhavam ||
āgneyādiṣu koṇeṣu bahiṣpīṭhaṃ tato jayet || 53 ||
piśācānrākṣasānbhūtānvetā lāṃśca tathā kramāt ||
kṣobhakaḥ kāmarūpaśca saubhadro marutastathā || 54 ||
gomukho nandabhadraśca dvijihvo malinastathā ||
hastikarṇo viśālākhyaḥ saptarakṣogaṇaḥ smṛtaḥ || 55 ||
bhūmido varadaścaiva jayaṃtaḥ kṣobhakastathā ||
vivasvaṃtaḥ sudaṃtaśca ete bhūtagaṇāḥ smṛtāḥ || 56 ||
aṃgado nīlakarṇo.asau vasaṃto yāvakastathā ||
ghorarūpā mahākāyaḥ vetālāśca prakīrtitāḥ ||57||
gaṃdhapuṣpākṣatairbhaktaṃ sarve devā grahādayaḥ ||
dhyānavarṇānurūpeṇa pūjanīyāḥ prayatnataḥ || 58 ||
dhyāyedādityamāraktaṃ raktapadmāsanasthitam ||
raktāṃbaradharaṃ raktaṃ raktamālyānulepanam || 59 ||
yavavidrumasaṃkāśaṃ siṃdūrāruṇasaprabham||
ākṛṣṇeneti maṃtreṇa sthāpayetkalaśopari || 2.2.19.60 ||
ihāgaccheti cāvāhya pādyārghyaiśca pṛthagvidhaiḥ ||
gaṃdhapuṣpādibhirbhaktyā pūjayettaṃ yathāvidhi || || 61 ||
baliṃ ca lohitaṃ dadyātpāyasaṃ dadhikhaṃḍakam ||
ghṛtaliptaṃ ca śālyannaṃ patākāṃ raktavarṇikām || 62 ||
śvetāṃbaradharaṃ śvetaṃ śuklagaṃdhānu lepanam ||
dvibhujaṃ varadaṃ devaṃ gadāhastaṃ mahābalam || 63 ||
nānābharaṇasaṃpannaṃ siddhagaṃdharvasevitam ||
śuklapadmāsanasthaṃ cāśvaṃ dadyācchvetabhūṣitam|| || 64 ||
imaṃ devā iti maṃtreṇa sthāpayetpūrvadigdale ||
sitavastraiśca puṣpaiśca śuklamālyānulepanaiḥ || 65 ||
pāyasaiḥ śvetabalibhirdadhibhaktaṃ nivedayet||
dhūpaiḥ śvetapatākābhirnaivedyairvividhairapi || 66 ||
raktamālyāṃbaraṃ devaṃ raktābharaṇabhūṣitam ||
sucārunayanaṃ raktaṃ raktapadmāsanasthitam || 67 ||
kirīṭakuṃḍaladharaṃ meṣakaṃṭhaṃ caturbhujam ||
varadaṃ yajñanāśaṃ ca śūlaśaktigadādharam || 68 ||
sarvakāmapradaṃ devaṃ siddhagaṃdharvasevitam ||
ciṃtayetparayā bhaktyā maṃgalaṃ dharaṇīsutam || 69 ||
agnimī,letimaṃtreṇa sthāpayedagnidigdale ||
pūjayedraktapuṣpaiśca raktamālyānulepanaiḥ || 2.2.19.70 ||
dhūpai raktapatākābhirguḍabhaktanive danaiḥ ||
atasīpuṣpasaṃkāśaṃ karṇikārasamaprabham || 71 ||
rauhiṇeyaṃ mahākāyaṃ nīlanīrajalocanam ||
praśāṃtavadanaṃ devaṃ pītavastraṃ caturbhujam ||72||
khaṅgacarmadharaṃ tadvadgadāparaśudhāriṇam ||
padmāsanagataṃ devaṃ pītapadmāsanasthitam || 73||
nānābharaṇasaṃpūrṇaṃ mṛgendravaravāhanam ||
udbudhyasveti maṃtreṇa yā myāṃ tu sthāpayedbudham || 74 ||
pūjayedgandhapuṣpādyaiḥ pītagaṃdhānulepanaiḥ ||
vastraiḥ pītapatākābhirbalibhiḥ kṛśarānvitaiḥ || 75 ||
pītavarṇaṃ guruṃ dhyāyetpītapadmāsanasthitam ||
pītābharaṇasaṃpannaṃ pītavastraṃ caturbhujam ||76||
varadaṃ daṃḍahastaṃ ca sākṣasūtrakamaṃḍalum ||
pūjyamānaṃ sugaṃdharvaiḥ sendrairdevagaṇairapi ||77||
bṛhaspataya iti maṃtreṇa nairṛtyāṃ diśi saṃsthitam ||
pītacandanagaṃdhaiśca pītavastrādibhūṣaṇaiḥ ||78||
dhūpaiḥ pītapatākābhiḥ pītodakanivedanaiḥ||
pūjayetparayā bhaktyā puraṃdarapurohitam || 79 ||
dhyāyecchukraṃ bhṛgusutaṃ śvetapadmāsanasthitam ||
caturbhujaṃ mahākāyaṃ varadaṃ daṃḍadhāriṇam || 2.2.19.80 ||
mahābāhuṃ viśālākṣaṃ sākṣasūtrakamaṃḍalum ||
stūyamānaṃ muniśreṣṭhaiḥ sevitaṃ daityapuṅgavaiḥ || 81 ||
siṃhāsanagataṃ devaṃ nīlendīvaralocanam ||
vilasatpuṇḍarīkasya mālābhirupaśobhitam || 82 ||
nānādaityendraputrāṃśca pāṭhayantaṃ muhurmuhuḥ ||
nānāśastrāstracaturaṃ nānāśāstraviśāradam || 83 ||
evaṃ dhyātvā bhṛguśreṣṭhaṃ japannannātparisrutam ||
manasā bhaktiyuktena sthāpayetpaścime dale || 84 ||
sitacaṃdanavastraiśca dhūpamālyānulepanaiḥ ||
dhūpaiḥ śvetapatākābhiḥ saktubhiḥ kṣīrasaṃyutaiḥ || 85 ||
pūjayetparayā bhaktyā puṃḍarīkākṣatairapi ||
dhyāyetsauriṃ caturbāhuṃ śūlahastaṃ varapradam || 86||
indranīlanibhaṃ śyāmaṃ divya bāṇadhanurdharam||
indīvarāsanasthaṃ ca sarojavarasaprabham || 87 ||
nīlāṃbaradharaṃ nīlapadmamālopaśobhitam ||
ghorarūpaṃ mahākāyaṃ chāyāhṛdayananda nam|| 88 ||
śannodevīti maṃtreṇa vāyavyāṃ diśi vinyaset ||
kṛṣṇacaṃdanavastraiśca kṛṣṇamālyānulepanaiḥ || 89 ||
dhūpairnīlapatākābhirbalibhirmāṣamiśritaiḥ ||
dhūmravarṇaṃ sadā ketuṃ gadāhastaṃ varapradam || 2.2.19.90 ||
dvibhujaṃ bhīmakāyaṃ ca dhūmrākṣaṃ dhūmravāsasam ||
ketuṃ kṛṇvanniti mantreṇa aiśā nyāṃ sthāpayeddiśi || 91 ||
dhūmravarṇaiśca mālyaiśca dhūmragaṃdhānulepanaiḥ ||
dhūmradhūmrapatākābhirbalibhirmāṣamiśritaiḥ || 92 ||
pūjayetparayā bhaktyā ketuṃ sarvārthasiddhidam ||
lokapālānahaṃ vakṣye sarvasiddhipradāyakān || 93 ||
yeṣu pūjitamātreṣu nālabhyaṃ vidyate kvacit ||
devarājaṃ tato dhyāyetpuṣpabāṇacayaprabham ||
dvibhujaṃ pītasaṃkāśaṃ nīlendīvaralocanam || 94 ||
raktotpaladharaṃ tadvatpītavāsasamanvitam ||
cāmarāsaktahastaiśca kanyāratnaiśca śobhitam || 95 ||
indrāṇīṃ ciṃtayedvāme utpaladvayadhāriṇīm ||
evaṃ saṃpūjayedbhaktyā surarājaṃ jagatprabhum ||
trātāramiti mantreṇa sthāpayetkarṇikottare || 96 ||
pūjayetparayā bhaktyā dhṛpagaṃdhānulepanaiḥ ||
nānāvidhopahāraiśca patākābhirdhvajairapi || 97 ||
baliṃ kṣīrānvitaṃ dadyānmodakaṃ sitaśarkarām ||
uttaptasvarṇasaṃkāśaṃ vītihotraṃ caturbhujam || 98 ||
ardhacandrasamasthaṃ ca ajavāhanamuttamam ||
jvālāvitānasaṃraktaṃ mūrdhni saptaśikhānvitam || 99 ||
varadaṃ vibhayaṃ mālāṃ dakṣe sūtraṃ kamaṇḍalum ||
trinetraṃ raktanayanaṃ jaṭāmukuṭamaṃḍitam || 2.2.19.100 ||
nānābharaṇasaṃpannaṃ siddhagandharvasevitam ||
agnijihveti maṃtreṇa snāpayedagnidigdale || 101 ||
pūjayedraktapuṣpaiśca raktamālyānulepanaiḥ ||
dhūpai raktapatākābhirbalibhiḥ pāyasairapi || 102 ||
nīlāñjanacayaprakhyaṃ nīlasiṃhāsanasthitam ||
mahāmahiṣamārūḍhaṃ daṃḍapāśadhara vibhum || 103 ||
karālavadanaṃ bhīmaṃ jvālā ghūrṇitalocanam ||
ghoradaṃṣṭrākarālaiśca kiṃkarāṇāṃ gaṇairvṛtam ||
mahiṣaṃ ciṃtayedvāme citraguptaṃ ca dakṣiṇe || 104 ||
acchīyasa iti maṃtreṇa sthāpayedya madigdale ||
pūjayetparayā bhaktyā dharmarājaṃ jagadgurum ||
rākṣasendraṃ mahākāyaṃ kṛṣṇavarṇaṃ dvibāhukam || 105 ||
nānābharaṇasaṃpannaṃ khaṅgahastaṃ mahāba lam ||
varamuktāvimānasthaṃ ghorarūpaṃ jaleśvaram || 106 ||
eṣa ta iti maṃtreṇa nairṛtyāṃ sthāpayeddiśi ||
kṛṣṇacandanavastraiśca kṛṣṇamālyānulepanaiḥ || 107 ||
dhūpaiḥ kṛṣṇapatākābhirbalibhirmāṣamiśritaiḥ ||
śuddhasphaṭikasaṃkāśaṃ śaṃkhakundendusaprabham || 108 ||
dvibhujaṃ pāśahastaṃ ca sundarāṅgaṃ varapradam ||
varuṇasyeti maṃtreṇa sthāpayetpaścime dale || 109 ||
sitacandanadhūpaiśca patākābhirdhvajairapi || 2.2.19.110 ||
samīraṇaṃ kuñjaravarṇasannibhaṃ mṛgādhirūḍhaṃ dvibhujaṃ dvinetram ||
dhvajāṃbaraṃ cāpi dadhānamekaṃ nīlāṃbaraṃ meghagaṇairvṛtaṃ ca || 111 ||
nīlacandanavastraiśca nīlamālyānulepanaiḥ ||
pūjayetparayā bhaktyā patākābhirdhvajairapi || 112 ||
dhūpairnīlapatākābhirbalibhiḥ pāyasairapi || 113 ||
dhyāyeddvinetraṃ dvibhujaṃ dhaneśaṃ pītāṃbaraṃ vai naravāhanaṃ ca ||
gadādharaṃ bhaktavarapradaṃ ca āvāhayeduttarapadmapatre || 114 ||
gandhacaṃdanavastraiśca pītamālyānulepanaiḥ || 115 ||
dhūpaiḥ pītapatākābhirbalibhiḥ pāyasairapi || 116 ||
snigdhakarpūrasaṃkāśaṃ tuṣārakiraṇaprabham ||
triśūlatumburudharaṃ tathābhayavarapradam || 117 ||
uttaṃgavṛṣabhārūḍhaṃ trinetraṃ bhasmabhūṣitam ||
kapālamālinaṃ tadvatkhaṇḍeṃdukṛtaśekharam || 118 ||
evaṃ dhyātvā maheśānaṃ sthāpayedīśadigdale || 119 ||
pūjayetparayā bhaktyā bhakṣyabhojyairanekaśaḥ || || 2.2.19.120 ||
sitadhvajapatākābhirbalibhiḥ pāyasādibhiḥ ||
tvamīśāna iti maṃtreṇa ṛṣiṃ chandaḥ samīrayan || 121 ||
brahmāṇaṃ raktagaurāgaṃ śoṇa padmasamaprabham ||
rājīvalocanaṃ tadvatpadmagarbhasamaprabham || 122 ||
padmāsanasthitaṃ tadvacchvetavastraṃ caturbhujam ||
caturmukhaṃ suraśreṣṭhaṃ meghagambhīranisva nam || 123 ||
rājahaṃsasamāyuktaṃ vimānavarasaṃsthitam ||
sruksruvau dakṣiṇe haste vāme daṃḍaṃ kamaṇḍalum ||124||
kurvāṇamiva lokāṃstrīnsiddhagandharvasevitam ||
ājyasthālīṃ tathaivāgre kuśāṃśca samidhaṃ tathā || 125 ||
vāmapārśve tu sāvitrīṃ dakṣiṇe tu sarasvatīm ||
ābrahmanniti maṃtreṇa sthāpayetpūrva digdale || 126 ||
nānābhakṣyopacāraiśca pūjayedgaṃdhacandanaiḥ ||
dhūpaiḥ śvetapatākābhirbalibhiścājyapāyasaiḥ || 127 ||
anantaśuklavarṇābhaṃ pītavastraṃ caturbhujam ||
śaṃkhacakragadāpadmadhāriṇaṃ jagadīśvaram || 128 ||
ādhārabhūtaṃ jagatāṃ svarṇayajñopavītinam |
nānābharaṇasampannaṃ phaṇāśatasamanvitam|| || 129 ||
oṃ namostviti maṃtreṇa sthāpayedvaruṇāṃtare ||
pūjayedbhakṣyabhojyaiśca dīpagandhānulepanaiḥ || 2.2.19.130 ||
dhūpaiḥ śvetapatākābhirbalibhiścaiva nirmitaiḥ ||
tato maṇḍalapūrve tu brahmāṇaṃ pītavāsasam |||34|||
caturbhujaṃ caturvaktraṃ sruvahastaṃ varapradam ||
bibhrataṃ ca śrutaṃ tadvattathā daṃḍakamaṇḍalū ||132||
ābrahmanniti mantreṇa pūjayedgandhacandanaiḥ ||
dakṣiṇe tryaṃbakaṃ dhyāyecchūlakhaṭvāṃdhāriṇam || 133 ||
varadaṃ ḍamarudharaṃ nāgayajñopavītinam ||
nibaddha jṛṭacandrārdhaṃ śuddhasphaṭikasannibham .|| 134 ||
kapālamālinaṃ devaṃ bhujaṃgābharaṇānvitam||
trinetraṃ kundasaṃkāśaṃ bhūtapretagaṇairvṛtam|| 135 ||
tryaṃbakaṃ ceti mantreṇa pūjayenmadhupāyasaiḥ ||
atasīpuṣpasaṃkāśaṃ hārakeyūrabhūṣitam || 136 ||
nānābharaṇasaṃpannaṃ pītavastraṃ caturbhujam ||
dakṣiṇe ca gadāṃ cakraṃ vāme śaṃkhaṃ sapadmakam || 137 ||
śriyā dakṣiṇato vāme sarasvatyā samanvitam ||
tadviṣṇoriti maṃtreṇa sthāpayetpaścime tataḥ || 138 ||
pūjayedgandhapuṣpādyaiḥ pāyasena ghṛtena ca ||
gaṇeśaṃ tu caturbāhuṃ vyālayajñopavītinam || 139 ||
gajendravadanaṃ devaṃ śvetavastraṃ caturbhujam ||
paraśuṃ laguḍaṃ vāme dakṣiṇe daṃḍamutpalam || 2.2.19.140 ||
mūṣakasthaṃ mahākāyaṃ śaṅkhakundeṃdusaprabham ||
yuktaṃ buddhikubuddhibhyāmekadaṃtaṃ bhayāpaham || 141 ||
nānābharaṇasaṃpannaṃ sarvāpattivināśanam ||
gaṇānāṃ tviti mantreṇa vinyaseduttare dhruvam || 142 ||
uttaptajāṃbūnadahemasannibhāṃ lakṣmīṃ sarojāsanasaṃsthitāṃ śubhām||
vāme sarojaṃ dadhatīṃ tathaiva haste ca dakṣe dhṛtacāmarāṃ ca || 143 ||
śrīśca teti ca mantreṇa aiśānyāṃ maṃḍalādbahiḥ ||
sthāpayetpūjayedbhaktyā sitacandana paṅkajaiḥ || 144 ||
modakaṃ paramānnaṃ ca yavakṣīraṃ nivedayet || 145 ||
tato devīmaṃbikāṃ divyarūpāṃ brahmeṃdrādyaiḥ stūyamānāṃ trinetrām ||
siṃheśasthāṃ taptajāṃbūnadābhāṃ candrārddhenābaddhamauliṃ jaṭābhiḥ || 146 ||
divyairvastrairbāhubhiḥ sāgralambairdivyairmālyairbhūṣaṇaiḥ svairupetām ||
brahmeṃdrādyairdurjayāṃ māhiṣāsyaṃ tīkṣṇairastrairdānavaṃ mardayaṃtīm || 147 ||
śūlaṃ tīkṣṇaṃ bāṇaśaktī ca tīkṣṇe khaḍgaṃ tīkṣṇaṃ bibhratīṃ dakṣiṇena ||
cāpaṃ pāśaṃ kheṭakaṃ cāṃkuśaṃ ca ghaṇṭāṃ vāme bibhratīṃ vai kuṭhāram || 148 || śiraśchedādardhajātaṃ kabandhaṃ khaḍgaṃ tīkṣṇaṃ bibhratīṃ daityarājam ||
nāgaiḥ pāśairveṣṭayitvā samaṃ tācchūlenainaṃ nighnatīṃ dehamadhye || 149 ||
sendrairdevaiḥ stūyamānāṃ suveṇīṃ gaṃdharvādyaiḥ siddhasaṃghaiśca sevyām || nānāvastrairbhūṣaṇairdīpyamānāṃ dhyāyeddevīmaṃbikāmujvalaṃtīm || 2.2.19.150 || vastrairmālyairyakṣadhūpairvitānairbhakṣyairbhojyairmodakaiḥ pāyasaiśca ||
māṃsaiḥ piṣṭaiśchāgalāḍhyairaśeṣaiḥ pūjyā devī caṃḍikā.abhīṣṭadā ca || 151 ||
śyāmāṃ ca pṛthivīṃ dhyāyetpaṃkajadvayadhāriṇīm || 152 ||
maṇḍūkasthāṃ dvibhujāṃ syonā pṛthivīti cārcayet ||
nairṛtyāṃ viśvakarmāṇaṃ dvibhujaṃ ṭaṃkadhāriṇam || 193 ||
utpalaṃ dakṣiṇe haste padmasthaṃ pītavāsasam ||
evaṃ dhyātvā tato brahmanniti maṃtreṇa pūjayet || 154 ||
svasthāṃ sarasvatīṃ dhyāyedvaradābhayadāyinīm ||
pītavastrāṃ sumukuṭāṃ devagandharvasevitām || 155 ||
yāmadhā iti mantreṇa pūjayetsitacaṃdanaiḥ ||
baliṃ śveta caruṃ dadyātkṛśaraṃ yāvakaṃ tathā || 156 ||
sthāpayedvāmadigbhāge kuṃdapuṣpaiḥ prapūjayet ||
pūrvādidvāradeśe tu pūjayecca marudgaṇaiḥ || 157 ||
agnyādiṣu ca koṇeṣu bahirbhūtānsamācaret ||
piśācā rākṣasā bhūtā vetālakapijātayaḥ || 158 ||
nirṇāsāścaiva te sarve raudrā vikṛtarūpiṇaḥ ||
tato maṇḍala madhye tu vāruṇaṃ pūrvavartmanā || 159 ||
pūrayetkalaśe tatra suvarṇādivinirmitam ||
kūrmaṃ kūrmākṛtiṃ kuryācchuddhasvarṇena sattamāḥ || 2.2.19.160 ||
bṛhatparva pramāṇena rājatasya ca durlabham ||
pādaṃ pādena mānena aṃgulaṃ parimaṇḍalam || 161 ||
prauṣṭhīmatsyaṃ tathā kuryātkulīraṃ tāmranirmitam ||
tenaikasya vinirmāṇaṃ dvyaṃgulāyāmavistṛtam || 162 ||
tathā mānena maṇḍūkaṃ tāṃ bhūmiṃ munisattamāḥ ||
śiśumāraṃ ca vai samyaktolakadvayanirmitam || 163 ||
aṃgulatrayadīrghaṃ ca yathā tasyākṛtirbhavet ||
sitacandanavastraiśca pūjanīyāḥ samaṃtataḥ || 164 ||
yāvakaiśca viśeṣeṇa bahumaṃtraviśāradān ||
bahvṛcau pūrvamatsyārthe dakṣiṇe tu yajurvidau || 165 ||
sāsanau paścime cātha uttare.atharvaṇau smṛtau ||
jayadhvamiti tānbrūyāddhotṛkānpunareva hi || 166 ||
sthāpayitvā pṛthaksūtre sarpaṃ ca mātaruddīpameva ca ||
pañcāṃgaṃ śivasūktaṃ ca yathā viṣṇorharasya ca || 167 ||
jayāgrataḥ puruṣasūktamadbhyaḥ saṃbhūtameva ca ||
āśuḥ śiśānamārabhya vayaṃ moṣāṃgarudrake || 168 ||
yajjāgrataścāgneśca viṣṇorarāṭameva ca ||
samastādhyāyarudreṇa śatarudrākhyamīritam || || 169 ||
pañcāṃgarudrasya puṣpadaṃta ṛṣirgāyatrī chando vedāhametadbījaṃ śrīśca te iti śaktirnamaste rudra iti nāyakaḥ paramarudro devatā parama stutau viniyogaḥ ||
saptāṃgarudrasya puṣpadaṃtaṛṣiḥ paṃktiśchaṃdaḥ ||
tryaṃbakamiti aṃguṣṭhābhyāṃ namaḥ ||
tripādūrdhvamiti tarjanībhyāṃ svāhā ||
vedāhamiti madhyamābhyāṃ vaṣaṭ ||
amīṣāṃ citramiti anāmikābhyāṃ hum ||
yavāgūṃ soma iti kaniṣṭhikābhyāṃ vauṣaṭ ||
parito dhenumiti karatalakarapṛṣṭhābhyām astrāya phaṭ iti ||
yajjāgrata iti hṛdayāya namaḥ ||
sahasraśīrṣeti śirase svāhā ||
adbhyaḥ saṃbhūta iti śikhāyai vaṣaṭ ||
āśuḥ śiśāna iti kavacābhyāṃ huṃ || namaste rudra iti netratrayāya vauṣaṭ ||
rūḍhaṃ brahmanniti astrāya phaṭ ||
caturdikṣu choṭikāṃdānam || iti sarvāṃgeṣu ||)
home pravartamāne tu sūktānanyāṃśca vai japet ||
prajapedvāruṇaṃ sūktaṃ tathā ca pālasūktakam || 2.2.19.170 ||
rātrisūktaṃ ca raudraṃ ca pāvamānaṃ samujjvalam ||
japecca pauruṣaṃ sūktaṃ sarvatovarataṃ pṛthak || 171 ||
śāktaṃ raudraṃ ca saumyaṃ ca kūṣmāṇḍaṃ jātavedasam ||
saurasūktaṃ ca yajato dakṣiṇena yajurvidaḥ || 172 ||
vairājaṃ pauruṣaṃ sūktaṃ sauvarṇaṃ rudrasaṃhitām ||
śaiśavaṃ pañcanirayaṃ gāyatryaṃ jyeṣṭhasāma ca || 173 ||
vāmadevyaṃ bṛhatsāma tathā caiva rathaṃtaram ||
govrataṃ ca vikarṇaṃ ca rakṣoghnaṃ pāvanaṃ smṛtam || 174 ||
gāyaṃtaṃ brāhmaṇā ye ca pūrvādidvāradeśataḥ ||
annātparisruta iti pañcapūrvaṃ saurasūktakam || 175 ||
rudrādhyāyaṃ ca pañcāṃgaṃ raudra ityabhidhīyate ||
āpyāyasveti ca catuḥ saumyaṃ sūktaṃ pracakṣate || 176 ||
īśāvetyādi svāṃgaṃ ca kauṣmāṃḍaṃ daśamaṃ smṛtam ||
agre bṛhanniti navasūktaṃ vai jātavedasam || 177 ||
ṣoḍaśaṃ tu vibhrāḍ vṛhatsauraṃ sūktaṃ prakīrtitam ||
saurasūktaṃ dhruvosīti iṣavo maṃgalaṃ smṛtam || 178 ||
rātrisūktaṃ hi yajvāgne rakṣoghnaṃ śaivasūktakam ||
gaṇānāntveti pañca āpohiṣṭheti ca trayam || 179 ||
pavamānaṃ tu tadviddhi pāvamānaṃ tu ṣoḍaśa ||
samastaṃ devayāgeṣu tadrātrau tu tadūrdhvakam ||
tadarddhārddhaṃ ca ārāme kūpe tvekaṛcaṃ japet || 2.2.19.180 ||
svagṛhyoktavidhānena pratikuṇḍeṣu homayet ||
saṃskuryādīkṣaṇādyaiśca saṃpūjya ca parasparam ||181||
prajvālyāgniṃ ca vidhivaddhomaṃ kuryādanantaram ||
vāgīśvaraṃ samabhyarcya vāgīśvaryā samanvitam || 182 ||
yasya devasya yo yāgaḥ pratiṣṭhā yasya kasyacit ||
prāgeva tasya juhuyātsahasraṃ ca śataṃ tathā || 183 ||
tilājyaiḥ pāyasairvātha patrapuṣpākṣatena ca ||
grahebhyo vidhivatsarvaṃ tathendrāyeśvarāya ca || 184 ||
marudbhyo lokapālebhyo vidhivadviśvakarmaṇe ||
ūrjena samidhā kuryādaṣṭāṣṭau svagṛheṣvapi ||185||
indreśvaramārutānāṃ tilājyena ghṛtena vā ||
ekaikāmāhutiṃ dadyātsvairmaṃtrairyathākramāt || 186 ||
digīśānāṃ ca pratyekamaṣṭāṣṭau ca viśeṣataḥ ||
viśvakarmanniti mantreṇa kṛtvā ājyāhutitrayam || 187 ||
samittrayaṃ palāśasya athavāśvatthasaṃbhavam ||
ekaikāmāhutiṃ dadyādājyena ca viśeṣataḥ || 188 ||
śivaṃ prajā patiṃ viṣṇuṃ durgāṃ ca kamalāmapi ||
sarasvatīṃ ca vidhivatpṛthivyā iti pāvakaiḥ || 189 ||
bhūtebhyo.apyāhutiṃ dadyādevaṃ māsadvayaṃ kramāt ||
anyeṣāṃ madhurāktena tilalājairyayākramam || 2.2.19.190 ||
viṣṇuṃ caiva tu vāyavye durgāyāśca tathottare ||
kamalāyāśca īśāne īśānasya sabhūtakam|| 191 ||
ekakuṇḍe tu ekasminhomaṃ kuryādyathāvidhi ||
pakṣe vai pañcakuṇḍe tu pūrvādīnāṃ krameṇa tu || 192 ||
ekakuṃḍe grahānkṛtvā kṛtvā balabhidā saha ||
dakṣiṇe kramataścaiva lokeśaṃ ca tathaiva ca || 193 ||
paścime yasya yāgasya durgāyāścottare diśi ||
īśāne bhūtayakṣmā ca juhuyāddeśikottamaḥ ||! || 194 ||
viṣṇvādidevatānāṃ ca agrakuṃḍe vidhīyate ||
prathame divase kuryāddevatānāṃ ca sthāpanam ||
dvitīye pūjanaṃ kuryāddhomaṃ kuryādyathāvidhi || || 195 ||
balidānaṃ tṛtīye tu caturthīkaṃ caturthake ||
nīrājanaṃ pañcame tu pañcāhasādhyako vidhiḥ ||
tryahasādhye tṛtīye tu navāhe tvatha paṃcame ||| | 196 ||
udaṅmukhaḥ prāṅmukho vāpyaiśānyādi krameṇa tu ||
prādakṣiṇyena yajñaṃ tu mantraiḥ parisamūhanam ||
mantrapūrvaṃ sāgnikānāṃ niragnestuṣṭikena tu || 197 ||
trikuśena mahāyāge vivāhādau dvipatrakam ||
vaiśvadeve tvekapatramiti sādhāraṇo vidhiḥ || 198 ||
digvidikṣu paristīrya mahāyāgeṣu sarvadā ||
dikṣumātraṃ nityake ca viśvadeve tathaiva ca || 199 ||
akṛtvā karma nityaṃ ca vṛthā naimittikaṃ bhavet ||
tasmātphalādyairapi tatkṛtvā naimittikaṃ caret || 2.2.19.200 ||
prāyaścitte vaiśvadeve sāyaṃprātaḥ pratīṣu ca || 201 ||
māraṇoccāṭahomeṣu tathā saṃkalpitākṛtī 1
pratyavāyakule kvāpi tatra nityākṛtiṃ vinā || 202 ||
śatārddhaṃ juhuyādyatra tatra nityaṃ vivarjayet ||
tūryahomaṃ tataḥ kṛtvā tūṣṇīmeva jitendriyaḥ || 203 ||
prajapedindramagniṃ ca somāya ca yathākramam ||
tatastu samidhāhomaṃ vyāhṛtistadanantaram || 204 ||
bhūrbhuvaḥ svāheti tathā tatra ityādipaṃcakam ||
ante sviṣṭakṛtaṃ dadyādvidhānaṃ tasya bhoḥ śṛṇu || 205 ||
ghṛtāhutiṃ sviṣṭakṛcca dvijasaṃskārakarmasu ||
ghṛtaiḥ sviṣṭakṛtaṃ dadyādyāgādau parivarjayet || 206 ||
sarvauṣadhyudakasnānaṃ karidaṃtotthamuṣṇayā ||
rathyāvalmīkagoṣṭhasya tathāśvasya surasya ca || 207 ||
trigandhaṃ ca triśītaṃ ca kuśamūlasya mṛttikāḥ ||
nikṣipetsnānakumbheṣu ācāryādīṃstu sthāpayet || 208 ||
yajamānaḥ puraḥ kṛtvā daṃtakāṣṭhapuraḥsaram ||
rātrau ca bhakṣyabhojyādyaiḥ paritoṣya yavākṣatam || 209 |.a
kṛtvā yathoktakālena pūjayettailadhārayā ||
tataḥ prabhāte vimale snānaṃ kuryādyathā vidhi || 2.2.19.210 ||
snānamabdaivatairmantraiḥ sūktena puruṣeṇa tu ||
vāruṇena ca sūktena surāstvādi yathākramam || 211 ||
surāstvāmabhiṣiṃcaṃtu brahmanna viṣṇumaheśvarāḥ ||
vāsudevo jagannāthastathā saṃkarṣaṇaḥ prabhuḥ || 212 ||
ākhaṃḍalognirbhagavānyamo vai nirṛtistathā ||
varuṇaḥ pavanaścaiva dhanāyakṣastathā śivaḥ || 213 ||
brahmaṇā sahitaḥ śeṣo dikpālāḥ pātu te sadā ||
kīrtirlakṣmīrdhṛtirmedhā puṣṭiḥ śraddhā kriyā matiḥ || 214 ||
buddhirlajjā vapuḥ śāṃtistuṣṭiḥ kāṃtiśca mātaraḥ ||
etāstvāmabhiṣiṃcaṃtu devapantyaḥ samāhitāḥ || 215 ||
ādityaścandramā bhaumo budhajīvasitārkajāḥ||
grahāstvāmabhiṣiṃcaṃtu rāhuḥ ketuśca tarpitāḥ || 216 ||
devadānavagaṃdharvā yakṣarākṣasapannagāḥ ||
ṛṣayo manavo devā devamātara eva ca || 217 ||
devapatnyo drumā nāgā daityāścāpsarasāṃ gaṇāḥ ||
astrāṇi sarvaśastrāṇi rājāno vāhanāni ca || 218 ||
auṣadhāni ca ratnāni kālasyāvayavāśca ye ||
saritaḥ sāgarāḥ śailāstīrthāni jaladā nadāḥ || 219 ||
ete tvāmabhiṣiṃcaṃtu sarvakāmārthasiddhaye ||
snānaṃ samāpya vidhivatsvagaṇenānu lepayet || 2.2.19.220 ||
gavāmaṣṭottaraśataṃ tadardhaṃ cātha viṃśatim ||
ācāryāyābhirūpāya pradadiyādabhipūjayan|| 221 ||
tataḥ prabhāte vimale jale samṛvatārayet ||
śuddhāṃ ca kapilāṃ dogdhrīṃ ghaṭācāmaravarjitām || 222 ||
sāmagāya tato dadyātsuvarṇadakṣiṇānvitām ||
yūpamādāya saṃsthāpya snāpayedvāruṇaṃ japan || 223 ||
acchevatena mantreṇa gāyatryā tadanantaram ||
rocanābhistriratnena tathā kuṃbhodakena ca || 224 ||
parvatāgramṛdā toyanāgavalmīkajātayā ||
gajadaṃtamṛdā caiva kūlamūlatamṛdā tathāta ||225||
puṣpodakena śaṃkhena tathā ratnodakena ca ||
dadhyakṣatena dugdhena ghaṭena śatadhārayā || 226 ||
sugaṃdhena triśītena vilipya ca samāhitaḥ ||
dāpayetkāṃsyamūlaṃ ca dadyāllohamayaṃ ca vā || 227 ||
mālyavastrairalaṃkṛtya pūjayedgandhacandanaiḥ ||
īśāvā iti maṃtreṇa dadyātpuṣpāñjalitrayam || 228 ||
punastvāditi maṃtreṇa punaḥ puṣpaṃ samutsṛjet ||
prādeśamātravistāraṃ madhye vṛttaṃ ṣaḍaṃgulam || 229 ||
kāṃsyacakrasya mānaṃ tu ūrdhvaṃ yaddvādaśāṃgulam ||
tadūrdhve vilikhecchūlaṃ caturaṃgulamānataḥ || 2.2.19.230 ||
aṃguṣṭhahīne lohasya tatra śūlaṃ na kārayet ||
tato maṃgalapūrve tu dvijātīnāṃ matena ca || 231 ||
samutsṛjecca prāsādaṃ taḍāgaṃ ca viśeṣataḥ ||
caturdarbhaṃ gṛhītvā tu īśānābhimukhena tu ||
samutsṛjettataḥ paścādvākyametadurīyet || 232 || omityādiśrīkṛṣṇadvaipāyanābhidhāna vedavyāsapraṇīta bhaviṣyapurāṇokta phalapraptikāmaścatuṣkoṇādyavacchinnamatkāritapuṣkariṇījalametadūrjitaṃ gaṃdhapuṣpādyarcitaṃ varuṇadaivataṃ sarvasattvebhyaḥ snānāvagāhanārthamahamutsṛje || 233 || tato varuṇasūktena varuṇaṃ nāgasaṃyutam ||
makaraṃ kacchapaṃ caiva toyeṣu parinikṣipet ||234||
pūjayedvaruṇaṃ devamarghyaṃ dadyādviśeṣataḥ ||
tenodakena saṃsnāpya gajadaṃtotthamṛtsnayā || 235 ||
śvetāśvasurasaṃbhūtaṃ śrīśca teti ca saṃjapan ||
āpyāyasveti maṃtreṇa mṛdaṃ catuṣpathodbhavām || || 236 ||
tadviṣṇoriti maṃtreṇa kuśamūlena sthāpayet ||
tīrthatoyena gaṃdhena tathā pañcāmṛtena ca || 237 ||
gāyatryā snāpayeddevaṃ ratnatoyena sādhakaḥ ||
āpyāyasveti maṃtreṇa kṣīreṇa tadanaṃtaram || 238 ||
dadhikrāvṇeti dadhnā ca madhuvāteti vai madhu ||
sarasvatyāṃteti jātīpuṣpatoyena snāpayet || 239 ||
śrīśca te iti maṃtrasya kardama ṛṣiḥ paṃktiśchaṃdaḥ sariddevatā aśvakhuramṛdā snāne viniyogaḥ ||
āpyāyasveti maṃtrasya parvata ṛṣiḥ uṣṇikchandaḥ sarasvatī devatā varuṇaprītaye catuṣpathamṛdā snāne viniyogaḥ ||
tadviṣṇoriti maṃtrasya maināka ṛṣistriṣṭupchandaḥ sarasvatī devatā varuṇaprītaye kuśamṛdā snāne viniyogaḥ ||
kayā na iti maṃtrasya vasiṣṭha ṛṣiranuṣṭupchandaḥ somo devatā varuṇaprītaye nāgagaṃdhasnāne viniyogaḥ ||
tejosīti maṃtrasya garga ṛṣistriṣṭupchanda vāsavo devatā varuṇaprītaye viniyogaḥ || sarasvatyai bhaiṣajyeneti maṃtrasya vāmadeva ṛṣiḥ paṃktiśchaṃdo viṣṇurdevatā varuṇaprītaye viniyogaḥ ||
puṣpodakasnāne ||
agna āyāhīti maṃtrasya janārdana ṛṣiḥ jagatīchanda aindrī devatā varuṇaprītaye viniyogaḥ ||)
prakṣipetpañca vrīhīṃśca iyañceti ca saṃpaṭhan ||
paścānnīrājanaṃ kuryātpañcaghoṣapuraḥsaram || 2.2.19.240 ||
śirīṣapuṣpasaṃbhūtaṃ darpaṇaṃ kāsyasaṃbhavam ||
gopīcandanasaṃbhūtaṃ gaṃgāmṛttikayātha vā ||
kṛṣṇāṃ gāṃ gomayaṃ vāpi svastikaṃ śaṃkhameva ca || 241 ||
kārayetpadakaṃ vāpi yavagodhūmakasya vā ||
utpannasvargasaṃbhūtaṃ kalaśaṃ māṣasaṃbhavam ||
śrīrasaṃ puṣpasaṃbhūtaṃ darpaṇaṃ kāṃsyasaṃbhavam || 242 ||
nandyāvarte malayaje tato nirmalayetsudhīḥ ||
ekaikaṃ pratimaṃtreṇa pratyekaṃ tu jalopari || 243||
dhruvapratikṛtairmaṃtrairaṣṭabhiśca yathākramam ||
pūrvākṣataṃ māṣabhaktabaliṃ dadyādvidhānataḥ || 244 ||
tato nārāyaṇasūktena devaṃ nārāyaṇaṃ vrajet ||
anyeṣāṃ caiva devānāṃ pradadyāttriṃśataṃ balim || 245 ||
tata ācamanīyaṃ ca vastrayugmaṃ nivedayet ||
vakṣyamāṇena maṃtreṇa krameṇāpi vidhānataḥ || 246 ||
pṛthakpṛthaktato dadyāttāvaṃtyenāpi bho dvijāḥ ||
vedasūktasamāyukte yajñasūtrasamanvite ||
sarvavarṇaprade deva vāsasī te vinirmite ||247||
śarīraṃ te na jānāmi ceṣṭāṃ naiva ca naiva ca ||
mayā niveditāngandhānpragṛhya ca vilipyatām ||248||
aṣṭottaraśatāndīpānparitaḥ sthāpayetkramāt ||
tadardhaṃ vā pañcaviṃśaṃ maṃtreṇa prayajetsudhīḥ || 249 ||
tvaṃ sūryyacandrajyotīṃṣi viṣādastvaṃ tathaiva ca||
tvameva sarvajyotīṃṣi dīpo.ayaṃ pratigṛhyatām || 2.2.19.250 ||
pradakṣiṇaṃ tataḥ kuryātpañcadhā saptadhātha vā ||
vakṣyamāṇena maṃtreṇa dadyāddhūpaṃ daśāṃgakam || 251 ||
vanaspatiraso divyo gaṃdhāḍhyaḥ surabhiḥ śuciḥ |||
mayā nivedito bhaktyā dhūpo.ayaṃ pratigṛhyatām || 252 ||
alaṃkāraiśca gaṃdhaiśca pītavastraistathaiva ca ||
dūrvākṣatena mālyena yuktaṃ puṣpeṇa pūjayet ||
dadyātpañcāñjaliṃ paścādviṣṇusūktaṃ punarjapet || 253 ||
tataḥ suśobhane sthāne vedīṃ nirmāya deśikaḥ ||
varuṇaṃ vinyasettatra tathā puṣkariṇīmapi || 254 ||
vivāhoktena vidhinā kuryānnirmaṃchanādikam ||
gaṃdhapuṣpaṃ tato dadyādgāṃ ca dadyātsadakṣiṇām ||255||
cāmaraṃ vyajanaṃ chatraṃ kāṃsyaṃ lohaṃ tathaiva ca ||
kuryātpuṣkariṇīṃ ramyāṃ rājatīṃ ca tripādikām || 256 ||
catuṣkoṇāṃ ca suṣamāṃ dvyaṃguṣṭhaparimaṃḍalām ||
suvarṇapratimāṃ kuryādbhālenaikena bho drijāḥ || 257 ||
atha vā svarṇapatre ca kuṃkumena tale likhet ||
bāṇaśaktipramāṇena svarṇapatraṃ tu dvyaṃgulam ||258||
kārayeccaturasraṃ ca pīṭhopari nyasedbudhaḥ ||
nīrājanāṃte vipreṃdrāḥ saṃsmaredamṛtaṃ taret || 259 ||
aśaktena tathaivaikakāṣṭhe vā pippalacchade ||
tāmrapaṭṭe likhedvāpi alaktena yathāvidhi ||2.2.19.260||
prāṇapratiṣṭhāṃ kuryāttu varuṇāya nivedayet ||
mahaṃ tu vatsaraṃ kuryādvedaghoṣapuraḥsaram || 261 ||
aśokaḥ khadiraḥ śālo hyaśvattho bilvakastathā ||
dhātrī kurubakaścaiva bakulo nāgakeśaraḥ || 262 ||
eṣāmeva kāṣṭhayūpaṃ yajamānapramāṇakam ||
samādāya ca saṃsthāpya vastrādyaiḥ pratigṛhya ca || 263 ||
yūpa rakṣeti maṃtreṇa khanitvā ca pradāpayet ||
sthiro bhaveti mantreṇa hastaṃ dattvā paṭhettataḥ || 264 ||
taḍāgasya tathaiśānyāṃ tathā prāsādakasya ca ||
prāpayeddakṣiṇe bhāge āvāsasya ca madhyake || 265 ||
naukā gatvā tataḥ paścādyūpamādāya vāgyataḥ ||
madhyadeśe taḍāgasya samulaṃghya tathottaram || 266 ||
gaṃtavyaṃ prakalpya tatraiva āpyāyasveti vai ṛcā ||
śilāyāṃ homayettatra hunennaukāhutitrayam || 267 ||
aṃgadāya svāheti bhaumāya nama ityataḥ ||
lājāśaktau dadhimadhau vāsane pratihomayet || 268 ||
kūrmāya nama ityuktvā pṛthivyai nama ityuta ||
svāhetyanaṃtamaṃtreṇa dadyādarghyamanaṃtaram||269||
pañcaratnena gandhena śaṃkhenārghyaṃ pradāpayet ||
caturasraṃ samākīrṇaṃ caturdikṣvadhṛtairjanaiḥ || 2.2.19.270 ||
kalpayedropayettatra hastaṃ dattvā paṭhedidam ||
sthiro bhaveti maṃtreṇa gaṃdhapuṣpaiḥ prapūjayet || 271 ||
cakraṃ sadarpaṇaṃ dadyānnāgadaṃḍaśiro gataḥ ||
vidyudatra ca kartāraṃ gra(gna?)haduḥkhaharipriyam || 272 ||
evaṃ cakraṃ pūjayitvā śūlaṃ nāgāṃśca pūjayet ||
uccairdhvajaṃ tataḥ kṛtvā na nāgeti ca saṃpaṭhet || 273 ||
gāyatrasveti maṃtreṇa paṭheddvāradvayaṃ tataḥ ||
dikpālebhyo baliṃ dadyānmāṣabhaktaṃ guḍaudanam || 274 ||
raktapuṣpānvitaṃ kṛtvā praṇipatya prasādayet ||
sahasraṃ vā dhanaṃ dadyādbrāhmaṇāya kuṭuṃbine||275||
tato bhojyaṃ sasarpiśca sahiraṇyaṃ yathāvidhi ||
ikṣusvastītikāṃ dadyājjale mātṛrśca pūjayet ||276||
maṃtharāṃ vasutāṃ kāṃtāṃ rākṣasīṃ ca piśācikām||
nāginīrnāgaputrāṃśca madhye saṃpūjayettataḥ || 277 ||
pūrṇāṃte ca pṛthagdadyāllājādyairguḍamiśritaiḥ ||
indro balavatī svāhā yaśo balavatāmapi ||278||
bṛhatpakṣāviśaṣo.ayaṃ madhyame ca kanīyake ||
bṛhaspate ca indrāya tava devalatāmiti || 279 ||
svāheti juhuyātpaścātpraṇītāṃ cālayettataḥ||
kaniṣṭha pakṣe prāsāde tathā caiva jalāśaye || 2.2.19.280 ||
mandare toraṇasyaiva viṣvaksenaṃ prakalpayet ||
ārāme ca tathā setau viśeṣaḥ pañcamo dvijāḥ ||281||
pūjāṃtareṇa yaḥ kasya japenmantrasahasrakam ||
stutiṃ samāpya vidhivadimaṃ maṃtramudāharet || 282 ||
sarvasattvebhya ucchiṣṭamapi tajjalamuddhṛtam ||
iti paṭhitvā puṣkariṇījalaṃ haste gṛhītvā jale kṣipet || 283 ||
tato jalamātṛbhyo nama iti jalamātṛrḥ prapūjayet ||
trailokye yāni sthānāni sthāvarāṇi carāṇi ca || 284 || teṣāmāpyāyanāyaitajjalamutsṛjyate mayā ||
mātre tu kṛtametatte jagadānaṃdakārakam || 285 ||
śivāya sarvabhūtānāṃ sadā pāhi jalāśayam ||
pibaṃto hyavagāhaṃtaḥ sukhinaḥ sarvajaṃtavaḥ || 286 ||
jalaṃ viśvopakārāya kṛtametanmayā sadā ||
kīrtistiṣṭhatu me devāścirāya dharaṇītale || 287 ||
tvatprasādānmahābhāga nāgarāja namo.astu te ||
ye.atra kecidvipadyaṃte svakarmaphalabhojanāḥ || 288 ||
teṣāṃ doṣairna lipye.ahaṃ svaṃsvaṃ gamamavāpnuyāt ||
nārāyaṇo jagatprāṇaḥ sarvakāmapradāyakaḥ || 289 ||
āpeyā mātaraḥ saṃtu jagatāṃ vṛkṣayonayaḥ ||
apāṃpate rasāyātra yādasāmīśvara prabho || 2.2.19.290 ||
varuṇāsyāsane kīrtiṃ sanātana namostu te ||
tattoyaṃ nidhivaddadyāddakṣiṇārthaṃ dvijanmane || 291 ||
suvarṇaṃrajataṃ dadyādanaḍvāhaṃ payasvinīm ||
dadyāddhenudvayaṃ paścātkuryādbrāhmaṇatarpaṇam ||292||
vahnipūjāṃ puraskṛtya mantreṇa prāśayettataḥ ||
pitṛrṇāṃ dāpayedarghyaṃ tato devaṃ prasādayet || 293 ||
biṃbamudrāṃ padmamudrāṃ nāgamudrāṃ pradarśayet ||
vaiśvānarā iti ṛcā pūjāṃ kṛtvā vivarjayet ||294||
yaste prāṇāñjapanpaścātprakuryādatha candanam||
pradakṣiṇaṃ tataḥ paścāttaḍāgasya śṛṇu dvijāḥ ||295||
brāhmaṇānpurataḥ kṛtvā vedaghoṣaṃ samuccaran ||
mahāmaṅgalapūrveṇa praviśedbhavanaṃ sudhīḥ || 296 ||
tato gṛhārcanaṃ kuryādbrāhmaṇānāṃ ca bhojanam ||
dīnānāṃ kṛpaṇānāṃ ca savitre.arghyaṃ nivedayet ||297||
iti śrībhaviṣye mahāpurāṇe madhyamaparvaṇi dvitīyabhāge ūnaviṃśo.adhyāyaḥ || 19 || ||
madhyamavidhānavarṇanam
||sūta uvāca || ||
saptāgniṣṭomako nāma dyuttamaḥ kathito vidhiḥ ||
madhyame madhyamaphalaṃ kaniṣṭhe tu kaniṣṭhakam || 1 ||
adhunā madhyamaṃ vakṣye vidhiṃ śāstrānusārataḥ ||
yathāvibhavayāgena yatkartavyaṃ nareṇa vai || 2 ||
sadyodhivāsakalpena yūpādīnadhivāsya ca ||
pūrvasminneva divase daivajñakathite śubhe || 3 ||
muhūrte kalaśaṃ sthāpya saṃgṛhya gaṇanāyakam ||
sthāpayetprathamaṃ yūpamā pohiṣṭhetimantrakaiḥ || 4 ||
śanno devyāstataḥ paścādgandhadvāreti gaṃdhakam ||
śrīsūktena tato dadyātpuṣpaṃ dūrvākṣataṃ tataḥ || 5||
kāṇḍāditi ca mantreṇa tato dhūpaṃ nivedayet ||
ye gṛhṇāmīti ca ṛcā pūjāyāṃ sthāpayettataḥ || 6 ||
vivāhavidhinā sarvaṃ kāryaṃ caivādhivāsanam || 7 ||
sarvameva prayuṃjīta taḍāgādiṣu paṇḍitaḥ ||
adhivāsya taḍāgādīnācāryādīṃśca sarvaśaḥ || 8 ||
saṃgṛhya gaṃdhapuṣpādyairdhūpairdīpaiḥ suśobhanaiḥ ||
tataḥ prabhātasamaye nityaṃ nirvartya śāstrataḥ || 9 ||
vṛddhiśrāddhaṃ tataḥ kuryānmātṛpūjāpuraḥsaram ||
alaṃkṛtya yathāśakti ācāryādīṃścaredbudhaḥ || 2.2.20.10 ||
śṛṇuyātpaścime bhāge maṃḍapasya samīpataḥ ||
madhyadeśe samudbhūtaṃ yajñapātraṃ praśasyate || 11 ||
atha vā tatra deśīyaṃ guruṃ vā śrotriyodbhavam ||
yajñe pradhānadvitīyamṛtvigācāryameva hi || 12 ||
vaitānakalpe saṃpannaṃ śaktikalpaparāyaṇam ||
nigamajñānasaṃpannaṃ yajñe pātraṃ praśasyate || 13 ||
patnīhīnamaputraṃ ca śyāvadaṃtamadaṃtakam ||
gaṇānāṃ yājakaṃ ṣaṃḍhaṃ svagotraṃ parivarjayet || 14 ||
apradhāneṣu yajñeṣu dānayajñeṣu sattamāḥ ||
niyojayetsvagotraṃ ca home nasti vicāraṇā || 15 ||
kuśapratikṛtau cāpi tataḥ svargaṃ sa gacchati ||
dhanamādau ca saṃśodhya tato yajñaṃ samācaret || 16 ||
ayājyayājanodbhūtaṃ pallavaṃ vyavahārake ||
kūṭasākṣyeṇa pallave sthāpyahārakameva ca || 17 ||
devasvaṃ brāhmaṇasvaṃ ca lohavikrayaṇaṃ dhanam ||
havirvikrayaṇaṃ kṛtvā putrabhāryā divikrayī || 18 ||
niṃditāni purāṇeṣu yatkṛtaṃ tatra tatphalam ||
yajñasadmani viprāṃśca na śrāddhānbhojayetkvacit ||
na dadyāttasya dānaṃ ca yāvannaiva samāpayet || 19 ||
brahmannācāryamukhyosi saṃsārāttrāhi māṃ vibho ||
tvatprasādādguro yajñe prāpnuyāṃ mānasepsitam || 2.2.20.20 ||
ciraṃ me śāśvatī kīrtiryāvallokāścarācarāḥ ||
prasīda tvaṃ maheśāna pratiṣṭhākarmasiddhaye || 21 ||
tvamādiḥ sarvabhūtānāṃ saṃsārārṇavatāraka ||
jñānāmṛtapradācārya viṣṇu rūpa namo.astu te || 22 ||
brahmāsanasamudbhūtaṃ prakāśitadigaṃtaram ||
tvaṃ ca jāṃbūnadaprakhya yajurveda namostu te ||23||
praphullakamalodbhāsi bhāsvarāṃbarabhūṣita ||
prakīrṇaśāstrasaṃbhāra vidhijña praṇatosmi te ||24||
jvaladvaiśvānaraprakhya dhūmaśyāmālitānana ||
ṣaḍaṃgavedatattvajña ṛtviṅ mokṣaṃ samācara || 25 ||
tatastūryādighoṣeṇa puraskṛtya dvijottamān ||
yajamānaḥ sapatnīkaḥ praviśedyāgamaṇḍapam || 26 ||
svasthāne sthāpayedviprānmakhe dharmairyathākramam ||
pūjayedgandhamālyādyairgaṃdhādyaiḥ sumanoharaiḥ || 27 ||
yajñe suvitate yosau pūjyate puruṣaḥ sadā ||
nārāyaṇasvarūposau yajñaṃ me saphalaṃ kuru ||28||
makhaśreṣṭheṣu sarveṣu yena maṃtrāḥ suvistṛtāḥ ||
yajurvedārthatattvajña brahmarūpa namostu te ||29||
yajñeṣu sākṣī sarveṣu vedavedārthatattvavit ||
ṛgvedajña mahāprājña viśvarūpa namostu te || 2.2.20.30 ||
māṃgalyaṃ karmaṇāṃ nityaṃ śāśvataṃ brahmarūpiṇam ||
siddhaye mama yajñasya namāmi śivarūpiṇam || 31 ||
pālayaṃti diśaḥ sarvā vidiśaśca tathā imāḥ ||
dikpālarūpiṇaṃ vipraṃ yajñasiddhyai namāmyaham ||
pātayeddakṣiṇaṃ jānu vikirānvikirettataḥ || 32 ||
trailokye yāni bhūtāni sthāvarāṇi carāṇi ca ||
brahmaviṣṇuśivāḥ sarve rakṣāṃ kurvaṃtu tāni vai||33||
vedyāvedīti maṃtreṇa paṭhedvediṃ praṇamya ca||
saṃpūjya gandhapuṣpādyairimaṃ maṃtramudā haret|| 34 ||
yājanaṃ yajamānaśca śreyasā tatra yājakaḥ ||
idamarghyamidaṃ pādyaṃ dhūpoyaṃ pratigṛhyatām || 35 ||
aiśānyāṃ kalaśe devaṃ saṃpūjya gaṇa nāyakam ||
brahmāṇaṃ vāsudevaṃ ca dvitīyakalaśe yajet ||36||
maṃḍalaṃ caiva viṣṇurvai dvārakārūpamāsthitaḥ||
tena tvāṃ pūjayāmyadya svargaprāptiṃ kuruṣva me || || 37 ||
pūrvādidikṣu kalaśānsaṃsthāpya ca trayaṃtrayam ||
ardhapādasavarṇena nirmitaṃ tāraṇaṃ budhaḥ || 38 ||
gaṃgāmṛttikayā yukte pallave saṃnivedayet ||
maṃdaraṃ kalpayitvā tu gopīnāṃ ca kulena vā ||39||
kalaśopari saṃsthāpya maṃdaraṃ saṃprapūjayet ||
syonā pṛthivīti maṃtreṇa gaṃdhapuṣpaiḥ pṛthigvidhaiḥ ||2.2.20.40||
evaṃ dakṣiṇadigbhāge navatolakanirmitam ||
prādeśamātralohaṃ tu raupyeṇa gaṃdhamādanam ||
mṛdā saṃghaṭanaiḥ paścātkadācana ṛcā yajet || 41 ||
kadācaneti maṃtrasya sūrya ṛṣistriṣṭupchandaḥ sūryo devatā gaṃdhamādanaprītaye viniyogaḥ ||)
uttare toraṇatodreraṃguṣṭhadvayamānake ||
tolakadvayamānena yavānāṃ piṣṭakopari || 42 ||
pūjayetpārśvakalaśe dhātrādīnpūrvadikkramāt ||
śrīsūktenaiva mantreṇa yajedvijayasaptakam ||
pūjayetparayā bhaktyā gaṃdhapuṣpākṣatādinā || 43 ||
aṃbāaṃbiketi maṃtrasya nalina ṛṣirgāyatrī chandaḥ śaṃbhurdevatā jaya prītaye viniyogaḥ || gāyatryā pūjayeddakṣe paścimaṃ kalaśadvayam || 44 ||
bhadraṃ caiva subhadraṃ ca prayataḥ saṃyajedbudhaḥ||45||
bhūtaśuddhiṃ tataḥ kṛtvā nyāsaṃ kṛtvā vidhānataḥ ||
vidhāyārghyādikaṃ caiva dharmādimaṃḍale yajet ||46||
madhye ādhāraśaktyādīnvaruṇaṃ madhyato yajet ||
pūrvādikramataścaiva indrādīnkuladevatāḥ ||47||
pārśvadvaye karṇikāyā brahmāṇaṃ cāpyanantakam ||
svaiḥsvairmaṃtrairyathoktaiśca balibhirgandhapuṣpakaiḥ || 48 ||
indrābhiṣekamaṃtrasya vādyaṃ gāṃdhārarāgakam ||
agnestejosīti vādyaṃ rāgaṃ caiva varāṭakam || 49 ||
ghanakaṃṭakamasyāpi vācyaṃ rāgaṃ tu gurjaram ||
rakṣodhipasya saṃgrāmaṃ vaitālaṃ vādyamucyate || 2.2.20.50 ||
nāṭakākhyaṃ tathā rāgaṃ varuṇasyāpi me śṛṇu ||
vādyaṃ rājyābhiṣekākhyaṃ rāgo vasaṃtasaṃjñakaḥ || 51 ||
īśasya naṃdighoṣākhyaṃ vādyaṃ rāgotha kāmadaḥ ||
suvarṇaṃ duṃdubhirvādyaṃ brahmaṇaḥ kathito budhaiḥ || 52 ||
rāgo devī vasaṃtaśca anaṃtasya nibodha me ||
vādyaṃ gāṃdhāratārākhyaṃ rāgaścāṅgāravātakaḥ || 53 ||
some ghoṣe bhavedvādyaṃ jaleśasya mahātmanaḥ ||
mālavākhyo bhavedrāgaḥ patrāgreṣu mahānapi || 54 ||
svaiḥ svairdharmaiśca saṃgṛhya dakṣiṇe pṛthivīṃ yajet ||
syonā pṛthivīti maṃtreṇa upacāraiḥ pṛthagvidhaiḥ || 55 ||
maṇḍapasyottare bhāge mahādevaṃ prapūjayet ||
namo vṛkṣebhya ityādi naivedyaiśca pṛthagvidhaiḥ || 56 ||
namo vṛkṣebhya iti mantrasya brahmā ṛṣirgā yatrī chaṃdaścandro devatā candraprītaye viniyogaḥ ||)
gaṃdhapuṣpādibhirbhaktyā bhūtāni parito yajet || 57 ||
vetālāśca piśācāśca rākṣasāśca sarī sṛpāḥ ||
asmātprayāṃtu me sthānādye cānye vighnakārakāḥ || 58 ||
madhuyuktaṃ pāyasānnaṃ varuṇāya nivedayet ||
pītaṃ cālohitaṃ kṛṣṇaṃ śuddhaṃ kṛṣṇaṃ ca dhūmrakam|| 59 ||
pītaṃ śuklaṃ tathā citraṃ śvetamannaṃ yathākramam||
balayastu digīśānāṃ grahāṇāmapi tāñchṛṇu || 2.2.20.60 ||
kṣīraudanaṃ graheśāya śuklānnaṃ śaśine smṛtam ||
lohitānnaṃ ca bhaumāya budhāya kṣīraṣāṣṭikam || 61 ||
pītamannaṃ devaguroḥ śukrasya sitataṃdulam ||
māṃsaudanaṃ śanerjñeyaṃ rāhośca kṛṣṇa bhaktakam || 62 ||
dhūmravarṇaṃ tu tāmraṃ tu bhaumasya kṣīraṣāṣṭikam ||
piṣṭakānnaṃ śivasyoktaṃ bhūtānāṃ māṣabhaktakam || 63 ||
evaṃ baliṃ vidhāyātha agre kuṃbhaṃ niveśayet ||
pradeśadvyaṅgulaṃ nāma aṣṭottarasahasrakam ||64||
bahvaṃgulakaṃ vinyasya vinyasya kalaśopari||
niśāvāṃchtisūtraiśca saṃveṣṭya pihitaṃ tathā || 65 ||
śarāvaṃ ca punardadyādvardhanīṃ pratipūjayet ||
astrāya phaḍiti maṃtreṇa dhyātvā devaṃ jaleśvaram || 66 ||
sūktaṃ yajedyathāśakti śatamaṣṭottaraṃ japet ||
kuṃḍeṣu vinyasennāgānaṣṭau pūrvādiṣu kramāt || 67 ||
anaṃtaṃ pūjayetpūrvaṃ mānenāṃgulamātrakam ||
nirmitaṃ kāṃcanenaiva saptavartikayā sudhīḥ || 68 ||
rājataṃ vāsukiṃ nāgaṃ yajetpatrāṃtare punaḥ ||
pādamātrepi cāṃguṣṭhamātraṃ tāmrasya bhakṣyakam || 69 ||
paṃcāṃgulaṃ tolikayā lohaṃ karkoṭakaṃ punaḥ ||
vartikābhiḥ ṣoḍaśabhirbṛhatparvapramāṇakam || 2.2.20.70 ||
śaṃkhapālaṃ kuśamayamardhapādena nirmitam||
aṃguṣṭhamātraṃ raktena nāgaṃ tālakamātrakam ||71||
aṃguṣṭhe tolakaṃ paścātpadmanāgaṃ punaryajet ||
tolakārdhapramāṇena aṃgulaṃ parimāṇataḥ || 72 ||
kuryācchailamayaṃ samyagyathāvallakṣaṇānvitam ||
mahāpadmasya vai tasya pūrvamānena nirmitam || 73 ||
dhyātvānaṃtaṃ caturbāhuṃ śuklasaptaphaṇānvitam ||
dakṣiṇordhvakare śaṃkhamadhicakraṃ pratiṣṭhitam || 74 ||
vāmordhve tu gadāpadmaṃ madhyasthāne vyavasthitam ||
sarvālaṃkārasaṃyuktamevaṃ dhyātvā yathāvidhi ||75|||
sahasraśīrṣeti maṃtreṇa pūjayitvā baliṃ haret ||
lājaiśca tilasaṃmiśraiḥ kṣīrayuktaiḥ pṛthagvidhaiḥ || 76 ||
caturvidhaṃ tathā śvetaṃ sarvālaṃkārasaṃyutam ||
svakīyaṃ prajapettatra āpyāyasveti vai ṛcā || 77 ||
piṇyākaṃ nāgajihvāṃ ca tathā sarjarasaṃ dadhi ||
balayastasya nirdiṣṭāstakṣakaṃ lohitaṃ yajet || 78 ||
padmaṃ ṭaṃkaṃ dadhānaṃ ca bhujābhyāṃ nāgasattamam||
manonnā iti maṃtreṇa ājyaṃ somo baliṃ haret || 79 ||
karkoṭakaṃ ca dvibhujaṃ pītavastradharaṃ yajet ||
pañca nadya iti ṛcā viṣṇukrāṃtā balirbhavet || 2.2.20.80 ||
pītavastraṃ ca kuliśaṃ yājayettu caturbhujam ||
bhujābhyāmūrdhvabhāge tu raktapadmadharaṃ harim || 81 ||
śarkarā kuṣṭhakaṃ caiva balistasya prakī rtitaḥ||
dvibhujaṃ śaṃkhapālaṃ ca śaṃkhābhaṃ śaṃkhadhāriṇam || 82 ||
padmāsanasthaṃ padmābhyāṃ hastābhyāṃ ca varaṃ vibhum||
dhruvakṣitidhruvosīti maṃtrābhyāṃ pūjayetpṛthak || 83 ||
ghaṭaudanaṃ bhṛṃgarājaṃ padmaṃ ca valayastayoḥ ||
svagṛhyoktena vidhinā saṃsthāpyāgniṃ kuśaṃḍikām || 84 ||
kṛtvā ājyasya saṃskāraṃ vāruṇaṃ śrapayeccarum ||
juhuyādaṣṭa bilvāni digīśānāṃ ghṛtena vai || 85 ||
ekaikāmāhutiṃ dadyādgrahāṇāṃ ca trayaṃtrayam ||
susamidbhirghṛtamadhu payobhirmiśritaiḥ pṛthak || 86 ||
palāśasamidhaṃ paścātpratiṣṭhāmāhutitrayam ||
śivasya paramānnena juhuyādaṣṭasaṃkhyayā || 87 ||
madhvājyaguḍamiśrābhirlājābhirjuhuyātpṛthak ||
lājānyathoktaṃ vitaredekaikāmāhutiṃ kramāt || 88 ||
sthālīpākasya juhuyādekaikāmāhutiṃ punaḥ ||
varuṇaṃ ca samuddiśya rudraṃ sarvaṃ pṛthakpṛthak || 89 ||
vāstoṣpataya iti maṃtreṇa pañcagavyo bhavettataḥ ||
syonāpṛthivīti maṃtreṇa vrīhimṛttikayā punaḥ || 2.2.20.90 ||
vṛṣānna iti maṃtreṇa kayā na iti vai punaḥ ||
kuśamūlamṛdā caiva catuṣpathamṛdā tathā || 91 ||
imā rudreti maṃtreṇa śrīśceti ṛcā punaḥ ||
padmakhaṇḍasya ca mṛdā snāpayetsusamāhitaḥ || 92 ||
tadviṣṇoriti maṃtreṇa tathā puṣpodakena ca ||
tīrthodakena kṛṣṇena triraktena triśītakaiḥ || 93 ||
pañcaraktena raktānāṃ mṛdā kaiśca kuśodakaiḥ ||
svarṇatoyaiśca kalaśairaṣṭottaraśatena tu || 94 ||
taijasairmārttikaiścāpi aṣṭāviṃśatibhistathā ||
yathāśakti tu saṃsthāpya kuṃkumaiścandanairapi || 95 ||
annaṃ lipya tato mṛdbhirdadyāccaiva yathākramam ||
surāsureti ca ṛcā vastrayugmena veṣṭayet || 96 ||
dhvajaṃ ca dhanunāgeti gaṃdhadvāreti gomayam ||
dhūrasīti tato dhūpaṃ hotre cāhutidīpakam || 97 ||
siṃdhosīti ca siṃdūraṃ svabhāve raktakaṃ tathā ||
mālatīkusumaiḥ kṛtyairnāgānsaṃsthāpayettataḥ || 98 ||
dhārābhiḥ śatapuṣpābhirgandhatoyādibhistathā ||
athavāśvatthapatreṣu vaṭapatreṣu vā sudhīḥ || 99 ||
rocanā kuṃkumairvāpi saṃlikhya tatra pūjayet ||
prakṣipettatra muktā hi kalaśeṣu vinikṣipet || 2.2.20.100 ||
maṃḍapasyottaredeśe śayyāṃ nirmāya śobhanām ||
rājataṃ vāruṇaṃ tasyāṃ pādamātreṇa nirmitām || 101 ||
aṃguṣṭhamātraṃ saṃsthāpya tataḥ puṣkariṇīmapi ||
