svarṇapādena ghaṭitāṃ caturasrāṃ suśobhanām || 102 ||.a
aṃguṣṭhamātraṃ sampūjya varuṇāya nivedayet ||
yathāśakti tato gāṃ ca saṃbhave pañcaviṃśatiḥ || 103 ||
suvarṇaṃ rājataṃ caiva dhānyaṃ vāso varāṭakam || || 104 ||
nāgayaṣṭiṃ samādāya kiṃciduttaragāṃ tathā || 105 ||
tatokṣatāya bhaumāya kṛtvā cājyāhutitrayam ||
lājāndadhisamāyuktaṃ ghṛtaṃ madhu guḍaṃ tathā || 106 ||
kṣīraṃ ca piṣṭakaṃ caiva śaṣkulīgandhapuṣpakam ||
paṃcāmṛtaṃ pañcaratnaṃ garbhe dadyātsamāhitaḥ || 107 ||
ācāryo yajamānena susannaddhaiśca bhṛtyakaiḥ ||
gaṃgājaleśayormadhye paṃcaghoṣapuraḥsaram || 108 ||
avāpya ca tato yaṣṭiṃ sthiro bhavati vairivā ||
dhruvaṃ dhruveti maṃtreṇa yaṣṭimā maṃtrayettataḥ || 19103 ||
yajñapriyāsi devi tvaṃ sarvavighnavināśinī ||
pāhi māṃ sarvapāpebhya ātmanā tvaṃ sthirībhava || 2.2.20.110 ||
ityāmaṃtrya yajeccaiva gāyatrīṃ ca paṭhettataḥ ||
vanaspateti viḍavāmiti maṃtraṃ japetpunaḥ || 111 ||
punarāgatya tāṃ vediṃ nirmathya varuṇaṃ prabhum ||
tathā puṣkariṇīṃ caiva vardhanīṃ kalaśodaraiḥ || 112 ||
aniṣṭaṃ mārjayennāgānuddhṛtya kalaśaṃ tathā ||
pāṣāṇābhyaṃtaraṃ kṛtvā gomayaiḥ parilipya ca || 113 ||
varuṇaṃ puṣkariṇyāṃ ca jalamadhye vinikṣipet ||
namostviti ca mantreṇa baliṃ dadyācca pāyasam || 114 ||
nirmanthettatra yo nāgaḥ sthāpayettu yathāvidhi ||
śrāvayettamimaṃ maṃtramatra saṃnihito bhava || 115 ||
atra svāmī bhavānnāga rakṣaṇīyastvayā janaḥ ||
gāyatreṇa tvā chaṃdasāmīmantraṃ saṃśrāvayetpunaḥ || || 116 ||
saṃpūjya gaṃdhapuṣpādyaiḥ purato nikṣipeddiśi ||
pidhāya nāgarājānamṛcābhyāṃ parisūtrakaiḥ || 117 ||
sanniruddhyāśu saṃsthāpya baliṃ dadyā dvidhānataḥ ||
lājaudanaṃ manastasya yajjāgrata ṛcā japet || 118 ||
evaṃ bhūriti maṃtrai svaiḥ svaireva tu pṛthagvidhaiḥ ||
svāsu dikṣu ca saṃsthāpya pūja yecca prayatnataḥ || 119 ||
pūrvabhāge puṣkariṇyāṃ haritābhaṃ savajrakam ||
halagrahīta maṃtreṇa nyasya lājāhutiṃ kule || 2.2.20.120 ||
trātāramiti maṃtreṇa agnau vinyasya mauktikam ||
manaḥśilāṃ pravālaṃ ca agnimīḍeti saṃpaṭhet ||121||
vaiśvānareṇa mantreṇa paṭhallā~mjāhutiṃ punaḥ ||
dadyādye te śatamantreṇa paścime kāṭikaṃ nyaset ||122||
śālibījena sahitaṃ kayā na iti maṃtrakam ||
varuṇasyo iti maṃtreṇa dadyādaṣṭādaśāhutīḥ ||123||
uttare rocanāṃ kanyāṃ tathaiva gaurasarṣapam ||
kuṃkumena samāyuktaṃ kuvidaṃḍamṛcā paṭhan || 124 ||
vinyasya tena maṃtreṇa pradadyādāhutiṃ punaḥ ||
aiśānyāṃ maṃdrakaṃ raṃgamī śāvā iti saṃpaṭhan || 125 ||
saṃsthāpyājyāhutiṃ dadyāttamīśāna ṛcā punaḥ||
āsadyairmaṃtrasaṃyuktairdevaṃ nārāyaṇaṃ yajet || 126 ||
varuṇātmakaṃ tato dhyātvā tato nīrājanaṃ paṭhet ||
jānubhyāmavaniṃ gatvā paṭhejjñānāmṛtaṃ stavam || 127 ||
dharmo vaṃśaṃ tataḥ kuryādutsargāṃte vidhīyate ||
tato devīṃ punaḥ kṛtvā dattvā puṣpāñjalitrayam || 128 ||
sarvasattvopakārāya samutsṛjettu vai janam ||
utsṛṣṭaṃ sarvasattvebhyo dṛśyate jalamūrjitam || 129 |||
ramaṃtīṃ sarvabhūtāni snānapānāvagāhanaiḥ ||
varuṇaṃ ca tato devaṃ puṣkariṇyāṃ ca nikṣipet || 2.2.20.130 ||
jale varuṇamantreṇa matsyādīnprakṣipettataḥ ||
pakṣiṇaśca śubhāṃstatra bhekaṃ kūrmaṃ ca kardamam ||131||
śaivālaṃ prakṣipeccaiva dakṣiṇāṃ tadanaṃtaram ||
suvarṇaṃ dhānyaratnaṃ ca ācāryāya pṛthagdadet||132||
ṛtvigbhyaśca pṛthagdadyādyathāvittānusārataḥ ||
brāhmaṇebhyo gāyanebhyo vasubhyaśca pṛthakpṛthak || 133 ||
nityaṃ samāpya vidhivaddadyātpūrṇāhutiṃ punaḥ ||
dadyādarghyaṃ ca sūryāya hastāsa iti saṃjapan || 134 ||
tataḥ pradakṣiṇāvartaṃ saṃveṣṭya kṣīradhārayā ||
prāsādapakṣe prāsādamārāme atha maṃḍapam ||135||
śatādhidhārayā śaktyā trivāraṃ brāhmaṇaiḥ saha ||
vikīrya lājakusumaṃ vrīhīścaiva kapardakān || 136 ||
tūryaghoṣeṇa mahatā tato viprapuraḥsaram ||
yajamānaḥ sapatnīkaḥ praviśetsvagṛhaṃ punaḥ || 137 ||
tato gṛhārcanaṃ kṛtvā brāhmaṇānatha bhojayet ||
kumārīśca kumārāṃśca dīnāndhakṛpaṇānapi ||138||
nārāyaṇaṃ tato dadyādvipramuddiśya bhaktitaḥ || 139 || ||
iti śrībhaviṣye mahāpurāṇe madhyamaparvaṇi dvitīyabhāga viṃśo.adhyāyaḥ|| 20 || cha || iti madhyamaparvaṇi dvitīyabhāgaḥ samāptaḥ || 2 ||
viṣayānukramaṇikā

upavanādipratiṣṭhāvarṇanam
|| || sūta uvāca || ||
ārāmādau viśeṣo yo vakṣyate.atra mayādhunā ||
maṃḍalaṃ kārayitvā tu caturasraṃ samaṃ śubham ||1||
aiśānyāṃ kalaśe devaṃ tatra nāthaṃ prapūjayet ||
madhyame kalaśe pūjā grahāṇāṃ ca tataḥ param || 2 ||
svadikṣu dvāradeśe tu paścimadvāradeśayoḥ ||
brahmāṇaṃ cāpyanantaṃ ca madhyato varuṇaṃ yajet ||3||
varuṇaṃ codakumbhasthaṃ bhūtaśākhāsu śobhanam ||
tena cāvāhayāmi tvāṃ vibho svargāya vai bhava ||4||
pūrvagaṃ mandaraṃ sthāpya toraṇopari sattamāḥ ||
viṣvaksenaṃ samabhyarcya arcanaṃ svargasaṃyutam ||5||
karṇikāyāṃ vāsudevaṃ śuddhasphaṭikasannibham ||
caturbhujaṃ śaṅkhacakragadāpadmavibhūṣitam || 6 ||
śrīvatsakaustubhoraskaṃ mukuṭādyairalaṃkṛtam ||
dakṣiṇe kamalā tasya vāme puṣṭivyavasthitiḥ || 7 ||
siddhakinnarayakṣādyaiḥ stūyamānaṃ surāsuraiḥ ||
saṃpūjya vidhivadbhaktyā viṣṇorarāṭa ityṛcā || 8 ||
dale saṃkarṣaṇādīṃśca vimalādyāśca nāyikāḥ ||
saṃpūjya dhūpadīpādyairupahārairanuttamaiḥ || 9 ||
ghṛtapradīpo devasya gugguluḥ saralastathā ||
dhūpo devabaliḥ kṣīraṃ paramānnaṃ ghṛtaplutam || 2.3.1.10 ||
dhyāyetsomaṃ karṇikāyāṃ dakṣiṇe padmasaṃsthitam ||
śuklābhaṃ dvibhujaṃ śāntaṃ keyūrādyupaśobhitam|| 11 ||
praśasyaṃ devayakṣāṇāṃ varadābhayahastakam ||
imaṃ devā iti ṛcā upacāraiḥ pṛthagvidhaiḥ || 12 ||
pūjayecca niśānāthaṃ ghṛtabhaktaṃ nivedayet ||
indraṃ jayantamākāśaṃ varuṇaṃ cāgnimeva ca || 13 ||
īśānaṃ tatpuruṣaṃ caiva vāyuṃ pūrvādidikṣvapi ||
karṇikāyā vāmabhāge varadābhayahastakam ||14||
dvibhujaṃ śuklavarṇaṃ ca mahādevaṃ prapūjayet ||
tryaṃbakeṇa ca maṃtreṇa dadyācca ghṛtapiṣṭakam || 15 ||
vāsudevāya devāya juhuyādaṣṭa āhutīḥ ||
paramānnena saumyasya juhuyādaṣṭaviṃśatim || 16 ||
śivāya paramānnena juhuyādāhutidvayam ||
gaṇeśasya tathājyena dadedekāhutiṃ budhaḥ || || 17 ||
brahmaṇo varuṇasyātha ekaikāmāhutiṃ tathā ||
grahāṇāṃ svoktasamidhā digīśānāṃ pṛthakpṛthak || 18 ||
ekaikāmāhutiṃ dadyādājyena ca yathākram ||
karālī dhūmalī śvetā lohitā kanakaprabhā || 19 ||
atiraktā padmarāgā vahnijihvā prakīrtitāḥ ||
tāsāṃ maṃtrāḥ krameṇaiva sādivāsāṃta bindavaḥ || 2.3.1.20 ||
yakārasthāśca vijñeyā aṣṭasvaravibhūṣitāḥ ||
ghṛtamadhvājyasiktābhirhomayecca pṛthakpṛthak || 21 ||
ekaikāmāhutiṃ dadyāddattvā caiva samāhitaḥ ||
agnīṣomaṃ tathendraṃ ca pṛthivīmantarikṣakam || 22 ||
sthālīpākena juhuyānmadhukṣīrayavānvitam ||
ekaikāmāhutiṃ teṣāṃ samuddiśya pṛthakpṛthak || 23 ||
yāvakairgaṃdhapuṣpādyairarcitvā saparāvakam ||
japasva tvaṃ mahābhāga śraddhayā caiva vāgyataḥ || 24 ||
jāpako vidhinānena prajapettatra ruddhakam ||
maṅgalaṃ paramānnaṃ ca saurasūktaṃ tathā japet || 25 ||
tataḥ saṃmṛjya vidhinā snāpayitvā yathāvidhi ||
yūpaṃ garbhe vinikṣipya tatra kuryādvicakṣaṇaḥ ||26||
dhvajānāropya prāṃteṣu dadyātsomaṃ vanaspatim ||
ko.adāditi paṭhitvā ca vṛkṣāṇāṃ karṇavedhanam ||27||
sūcyā sutīkṣṇayā kāryaṃ dvipātre vāmadakṣiṇe ||
navagrahāṇāṃ tṛptyarthaṃ yāvakaṃ laḍḍukaṃ tathā || 28 ||
piṣṭakaṃ ca pṛthagdadyātkumārībālakeṣu ca ||
niśāraṃjitasūtreṇa saṃveṣṭya ca sacūrṇakam || 29||
pradadyāddohakaṃ caiva vṛkṣāṇāṃ vidhipūrvakam ||
prāśayeccaiva tānvṛkṣānimaṃ mantramudāharet || 2.3.1.30 ||
vṛkṣāgrātpatitasyāpi ārohātpatitasya ca||
maraṇe vāsthibhaṅge vā kartā pāpairna lipyate ||31||
dhenuṃ suvarṇaṃ dhānyaṃ ca ācāryāya pradakṣiṇam||
dattvā ca ṛtvije dadyātsuvarṇaṃ rajataṃ tathā || 32 ||
dhānyaṃ ca brahmaṇe dadyādghṛtabhojyaṃ saśarkaram ||
iṣṭāṃ ca dakṣiṇāṃ dadyātsadasyāya tathaiva ca || 33 ||
adhikalaśaṃ samānīya snānaṃ kuryādvidhānataḥ ||
kṛtvā caivāniśaṃ kuryāddadyātpūrṇāhutiṃ tathā ||34||
sarvauṣadhyudakaṃ prokṣya trivāraṃ kṣīradhārayā ||
saṃveṣṭya triścaturvāraṃ brahmaghoṣapuraḥsaram || || 35 ||
gṛhaṃ vrajettato vipraiḥ kuryāccaiva gṛhārcanam ||
taṃtau viśeṣaṃ vakṣyāmi varā evedamityṛcā || 36 ||
balaṃ kāmaṃ hayagrīvaṃ mādhavaṃ puruṣottamam||
vāsudevaṃ dhanādhyakṣaṃ tato nārāyaṇaṃ yajet||37||
dadhibhaktaṃ baliṃ dadyātpañcagavyasamudbhavam||
evaṃ saṃpūjya vidhinā dakṣiṇe pṛthivīṃ yajet||38||
śuddhakāṃñcanavarṇābhāṃ varābhayakarāṃ śubhām ||
maṃḍūkasthāṃ ca dvibhujāṃ sarvālaṅkārasundarīm ||39||
syonā pṛthivīti mantreṇa pūjayitvā yathāvidhi ||
pāyasaṃ madhusaṃyuktaṃ baliṃ dadyātsaśarkaram || 2.3.1.40 ||
vāmato viśvakarmāṇaṃ śuddhasphaṭikasaṃnibham ||
śūlaṭaṃkadharaṃ śāṃtaṃ saṃyajedupacārakaiḥ || 41 ||
viśvanniti ṛcā taṃ ca baliṃ ca madhu piṣṭakam ||
dadyājjapecca kauṣmāṇḍaṃ sūktaṃ pauruṣameva ca |||45|||
madhupāyasayuktena homānaṣṭau vidhāya ca||
ekaikaṃ homayetpaścā tpṛthivīhomakarmaṇi ||43||
samutsṛjya tataḥ setumimaṃ mantraṃ paṭhettataḥ ||
picchile patitānāṃ ca ucchritenāṃgasaṃgataḥ || 44 ||
pratiṣṭhite dharmasetau dharmo me syānna pātakam ||
setorasya prabandhasya śraddhayā parayā tathā || 45 ||
ye cātra prāṇinaḥ saṃti rakṣāṃ kurvati setavaḥ ||
vedāgamena yatpuṇyaṃ yathaiva hi samarpitam || 46 ||
gartaṃ kṛtvā pañcaratnaṃ saṃsthāpyaṃ tadanantaram ||
saṃsthāpya ca tato yūpaṃ saṃpūjya ca yathāvidhi || 47 ||
ācāryāya tato dadyādiṣṭāṃ ca varadakṣiṇām ||
pūjayeddvijadāṃpatyaṃ lājābhiḥ paripūjitam || 48 ||
poṭikāṃ ca tataḥ śayyāṃ dadyādiṣṭārthasiddhaye ||
setau vṛkṣa sthitā ye syū ropayetkadalīṃ śubhām || 49 ||
teṣāṃ pārśvadvayepyevamārāme ca pṛthakpṛthak || 2.3.1.50 || ||
iti śrībhaviṣye mahāpurāṇe madhya maparvaṇi tṛtīyabhāge prathamo.adhyāyaḥ || 1 || || cha ||

gopracāravaiśiṣṭyavarṇanam
|| sūta uvāca || ||
gopracāraṃ punarvakṣye viśeṣaṃ tatra me śṛṇu ||
yajedviṣṇuṃ sala kṣmīkamupacāraiḥ pṛthagvidhaiḥ || 1 ||
upacāraiśca brahmāṇaṃ rudraṃ caiva karālikām ||
varāhaṃ somasūrye ca mahādevaṃ yathākramam || 2 ||
homaṃ caiva yathā viṣṇoḥ kamalāyāstrayaṃtrayam ||
ājyena kṣetrapālānāmanyeṣāṃ madhumiśritaiḥ || 3 ||
ekaikāmāhutiṃ dadyāllājādiṣu pṛthakpṛthak ||
samutsṛjya vidhānena yūpaṃ saṃsthāpya pūjayet || 4 ||
trihastamāttraṃ racitaṃ kuryānnāgaphaṇānvitam ||
ropayedekahastena garbhe homaṃ prayojayet ||5||
lājāsaṃyuktavidhinā viśveṣāmiti sañjapan ||
nāgādhipataye tadvadacyutāya tṛtīyakam || 6 ||
bhaumāyeti caturthaṃ ca tato yūpaṃ nivedayet ||
mayi gṛbhṇāmīti sampūjya yūpaṃ ca rudradaivatama || 7 ||
saṃpūjya rudraṃ pañcāṃgaṃ dhānyaṃ vastraṃ ca dakṣiṇām ||
ācāryāya tathā hotre anyeṣāmiṣṭadakṣiṇām || 8 ||
gopracāre ca śaileyaṃ yūpaṃ hastadvayānvitam ||
pañcaśīrṣānvitaṃ kuryāddhastamātraṃ praropayet || 9 ||
yūpaṃ ca caitravṛkṣaṃ ca kuṇḍalīmaṭhapīṭhikām ||
saṃspṛśyācamya vai viprāḥ prāṇāyāmena śudhyati || 2.3.2.10 ||
caturhastapramāṇena śatakuṇḍena saṃmitam ||
tadardhaṃ ca kaniṣṭhena aṣṭakāṣṭādhikaṃ bhavet || 11 ||
bhūmau ratnaṃ ca saṃsthāpya imaṃ mantramudāharet ||
śivalokastathā gāvaḥ sarvadevasupūjitāḥ || 12 ||
gobhya eṣā mayā bhūmiḥ sampradattā śubhārthinā ||
evaṃ nivedayedyastu gopracāraṃ samāhitaḥ || 13 ||
sa muktaḥ sarvapāpebhyo viṣṇuloke mahīyate ||
yāvaṃti tṛṇagulmāni saṃti bhūmau śubhāni ca || 14 ||
tāvadvarṣasahasrāṇi svargaloke mahīyate ||
pūrve sīmāṃ nibadhnīyātkṛtvā vṛkṣasya ropaṇam || 15 ||
setuṃ kṛtvā dakṣiṇataḥ paścimeṃgāraropaṇam ||
uttare khānayetkūpaṃ tasya sīmāṃ na laṃghayeta||16||
tataḥ sahasradhārāṃ ca śasyena paripūritām ||
pradadyādvā tato viprāḥ sarvapāpaiḥ pramucyate ||17||
nagaragrāmapūrve vā uttare paścimepi vā ||
na kuryādagnidigbhāge dakṣiṇāṃ vā tataḥ śubhām || 18 ||
gopracāraṃ khanedyastu vāhayedvā kathaṃcana ||
kulāni pātayatyāśu brahmahatyāśca viṃdati || 19 ||
svargaṃ nayati gocarma samyagdattaṃ sadakṣiṇam ||
yāvattṛṇāni tadbhūmau saptasaṃkhyāni saṃkhyayā || 2.3.2.20 ||
tāvatkālaṃ vasetsvarge viṣṇulokānna taccyutiḥ || 21 ||
mahāyāgāvasāne ca yo na tarpayati dvijān ||
nirarthakaṃ tasya karma prayāsaphalamātrakam || 22 ||
vṛṣotsargā vasāne tu pradadyādyo mahīṃ dvijāḥ ||
na yāti viprāḥ pretatvaṃ tasmādviprādamatsarāḥ || 23 ||
tatra mānaṃ pṛthakcaiva śṛṇutātra samāgatāḥ ||
amānena dadedyastu narakaṃ yāti rauravama || 24 ||
gavāṃ śataṃ vṛṣaścaiko yatra tiṣṭhatyayaṃtritaḥ ||
tadgocarmeti vikhyātaṃ dattaṃ sarvāghanāśanam || 25 ||
gopracārasya devasya brāhmaṇasya ca bho dvijāḥ ||
yāvatkālāvadhe sīmā atīte nāsti pātakam || 26 ||
maṇḍapaṃ pūjayetsūryaṃ vāsudevasamanvitam||
homastila guḍābhyāṃ ca aṣṭāvaṣṭau pṛthakpṛthak || 27 ||
dehi meti ca mantreṇa vinyasenmaṃḍapopari ||
yatnasiddhaṃ tataḥ kṛtvā śulkaghaṭacatuṣṭayam|| 28 ||
samutsṛjejjapetpaścātsauraṃ sūktaṃ ca vaiṣṇavam ||
vaṭapatre tu saṃlikhya citraṃ nirmāya vā punaḥ || 29 ||
dikpālānsaṃnyasetsvāsu svāsu dikṣu vicakṣaṇaḥ ||
baddhāñjaliḥ paṭhenmaṃtrāniṃdrādīnāṃ yathākramam || 2.3.2.30 ||
dharmasaṃsthāpanārthāya ātmano vibhavāya ca ||
vajrahasto mahendra tvaṃ dharmatastrātumarhasi ||31||
bho vahne meṣavāhastvaṃ catuḥśṛṃgavirājita ||
anāthaṃ maṇḍapaṃ tvaṃ hi dharmatastrātumarhasi || 32 ||
yama tvaṃ dakṣiṇāśeśa mahāmahiṣavāhana ||
anāthaṃ maṇḍapaṃ tvaṃ hi dharmatastrātumarhasi || 33 ||
mañcastho rākṣasendrastvaṃ khaḍgapāṇirmahābalaḥ ||
anāthaṃ maṇḍapaṃ tvaṃ hi dharmatastrātumarhasi || 34 ||
vārirāṭ dhvajahasto.asi pavano mṛgavāhanaḥ ||
anāthaṃ maṇḍapaṃ tvaṃ hi dharmatastrātumarhasi || 35 ||
dhanādhyakṣo gadāhastaḥ piṃgākṣo naravāhanaḥ ||
anāthaṃ maṇḍapaṃ tvaṃ hi dharmatastrātumarhasi || 36 ||
ādidevosi devānāṃ kartā hartā maheśvaraḥ ||
anāthaṃ maṇḍapaṃ tvaṃ hi dharmatastrātumarhasi || 37 ||
anaṃto nāgarājo yo dharāmuddhṛtya tiṣṭhati ||
anāthaṃ maṇḍapaṃ tvaṃ hi dharmatasrātumarhasi || 38 ||
caturṇāmeva varṇānāṃ sthityarthaṃ mṛgapakṣiṇām ||
prītaye vāsudevasya evaṃ maṇḍapamutsṛjet || 39 ||
bhagne stambhe tṛṇe jīrṇe punastṛṇapradāpane ||
sthāpane ca tathaivāsya pratiṣṭhā syādyathākṣayā || 2.3.2.40 ||
ghātāpāyādidoṣeṇa mriyaṃte yadi jantavaḥ ||
pratiṣṭhāyāṃ kṛtāyāṃ tu dharmo me syānna pātakam || 41 ||
mānuṣāḥ paśavo ye ca nivasantīha maṇḍape ||
svasti cāstu sadā teṣāṃ tvatprasādātkila prabho || 42 ||
tatastriguṇasūtreṇa sutrāmāṇeti vai ṛcā ||
saptadhā veṣṭayitvā tu dakṣiṇāṃ saṃprakāśya ca || 43 ||
upānahau tathā chatramācāryāya nivedayet ||
maṇḍape bhojayedviprāṃsteṣāṃ dadyādyathepsitān || || 44 ||
dīnebhyaśca pṛthagdadyādgṛhaṃ viprapuraḥsaram ||
praviśettūryaghoṣeṇa prakuryācca gṛhārcanam || 45 ||
evaṃ prapāyāṃ vijñeyo viśeṣo varuṇaṃ vrajet ||
vāsudevena sahitaṃ sāṃgopāṃgaṃ sadakṣiṇam || 46 ||
sthālīpākavidhānena prakuryāddeśikottamaḥ ||
ācāryāya gṛhaṃ dadyātparicchedasamanvitam || 47 ||
ṛtvije tāmrapātraṃ ca jalapūrṇaṃ ca dhānyakam ||
dikpālāndvāradeśe tu kūpayāge viśeṣataḥ || 48 ||
brahmāṇaṃ nāgarājānaṃ dvārapālau ca paścime ||
yajenmantraiḥ pṛthagdevānmantrairebhiryathākramam || 49 ||
balidānaṃ vidhānena kṛtvā dadyādyathāvidhi ||
patākānāmatastattvaṃ pravakṣyāmi yathākramam || 2.3.2.50 ||
vajrī ca dhūmalī kṛṣṇā pītā caivātha vāruṇī ||
śīghrā gaurī umā caiva pītā śuklā prakīrtitā ||51||
kuṃbheṣu pūjayeddevānmaheśaṃ prathamaṃ budhaḥ ||
grahāṃśca madhyakalaśe brahmāṇaṃ ca tataḥ param || 52 ||
vedikāpūrvabhāge tu uttare kalaśe śivam ||
dakṣiṇe kalaśe viṣṇuṃ karṇikāyāṃ jaleśvaram || 53 ||
kalaśe vidhivadbhaktyā upacāraiḥ pṛthagvidhaiḥ ||
saṃpūjya vaṭapatre ca nāgānsaṃlikhya nāgajaiḥ || 54 ||
yo nāgāstānpravakṣyāmi anaṃto vāsukistathā ||
tathā karkoṭakaścaiva padmaśca kulikastathā ||
padmaścaiva mahāpadmo mantrairebhiḥ pṛthakpṛthak || 55 ||
puṃḍarīkadalābhāsa śubhakarṇāṃtalocana ||
phaṇāsahasrasaṃyukta śaṃkhābjakṛtalocana || 56 ||
anaṃta nāgarājendra ihāgaccha namo.astu te ||
sita kuṃdenduvarṇābha visphuradbhogamaṃḍala || 57 ||
sarvanāgasya śūrasya kṛtasvastikalāṃchana ||
nāgendratakṣaka śrīmannihāgaccha namostu te || 58 ||
navīnajaladaśyāma śrīmankamalalocana ||
viṣadarpabalonmatta grīvāyāmekaśekhara || 59 ||
śaṃkhapāla iti khyāta jalādhārapratīkṣaka ||
adhyakṣe nāgalokānāmihāgaccha namo.astu te || 2.3.2.60 ||
atipīta suvarṇābha candrārdhāṃkitamastaka ||
dīptabhogakṛtāṭopa śubhalakṣaṇalakṣita || 61 ||
kulīra nāgarājeṃdra sarvasattvahite rata ||
tiṣṭheha yajñasiddhyarthaṃ kāmarūpa namostu te || 62||
yaḥ suvarṇena varṇena padmapatrāyatekṣaṇaḥ ||
paṃcabiṃdukṛtābhogo grīvāyāmekaśekharaḥ ||
tasmai te padmanāgendra tīvrarūpa namo.astu te || 63 ||
nāginyo nāgakanyāśca tathā nāgakumārakāḥ ||
sarve te prītamanasaḥ pūjāṃ gṛhṇaṃtu me sadā || 64 ||
svagṛhyoktena vidhinā kṛtvāgnisthāpanaṃ budhaḥ ||
ājyaṃ saṃskṛtya juhuyāddigīśānāṃ yathākramam || 65 ||
ādityādigrahāṃścaiva brahmāṇaṃ kṛṣṇameva ca ||
madhupiṣṭena ca śivaṃ varuṇaṃ juhuyāttataḥ || 66 ||
prādeśamātraṃ saṃprokṣya yūpaṃ cāsya pramāṇakam ||
caturasraṃ śūlayuktaṃ gaṇānānīya pūjayet || 67 ||
kūpe nikṣipya tānnāgānpañcaratnaṃ kṣipettataḥ ||
sutrāmāṇeti maṃtreṇa tridhā saṃveṣṭya sūtrakaiḥ || 68 ||
rañjitaḥ kadalīvṛkṣaṃ varuṇāya samutsṛjet ||
trātāramiti maṃtreṇa vastramālyena bhūṣayet ||
karṇavedhaṃ tataḥ kṛtvā utsṛjedvākyamuccaran || 69 ||
oṃ adyetyādi sarvabhūtebhyaḥ phalapuṣpapatracchāyāvṛtamukhyanānātaruviracitamārāmaṃ vanaspatidevataṃ supūjitaṃ vedavyāsādyuktaphalāvāptaye amukaṛṣisagotraḥ amukadeva śarmāhamutsṛje ||)
mahotsavaṃ tataḥ kuryātkṛtvā baddhāñjaliḥ paṭhet ||
vṛkṣāgrātpatitasyāpi ārohātpatitasya vā || 2.3.2.70 ||
maraṇe cāsthibhaṃge vā kartā pāpairna lipyate ||
vajrāghātādidoṣeṇa mriyaṃte taravo yadā || 71 ||
taddośamanārthāya tasyāpyetatpratiṣṭhitam ||
madhye yūpaṃ samāropya catuṣko ṇepi yatnataḥ || 72 ||
madhulājākṣataṃ dadyādañjanaṃ mālyameva ca ||
niśāsūtreṇa saṃveṣṭya kadalīviṭapaṃ nyaset || 73 ||
veṣṭayetkṣīradhārāṃ ca pātayedghṛtadhārayā ||
toyānvitaṃ gucchayuktaṃ veṣṭayetsvagṛhaṃ vrajet|| 74 || ||
iti śrībhaviṣye mahāpurāṇe madhyamaparvaṇi tṛtīyabhāge dvitīyo.adhyāyaḥ| || 2 || || cha ||
kṣudrārāmapratiṣṭhāvarṇanam
|| sūta uvāca || ||
kṣudrārāmapratiṣṭhāṃ ca vakṣye vai dvijasattamāḥ ||
amaṃḍale śubhe sthāne dvihaste.apyatha sthaṃḍile || 1 ||
sthāpayetkalaśaṃ tatra viṣṇuṃ somaṃ samarcayet ||
ācāryamātraṃ varayenniśāsūtraiḥ praveṣṭayet|| 2 ||
vṛkṣānmālyairalaṃkṛtya bhūṣayedbhūṣaṇādinā ||
dohadaṃ ca tato dadyātsthāpayecchatadhārayā || 3 ||
bhojayetpañcaviprānhi puratastaṃ viśeṣayet ||
karṇavedhaṃ tataḥ kṛtvā utsṛjedvākyapūrvakam || 4 ||
dadyādyūpaṃ madhyadeśe ropayetkadalīṃ tataḥ ||
raṃbhāśca ropayeddikṣu sthālīpākavidhānataḥ || 5 ||
aṣṭāvaṣṭau ca juhuyādanyeṣāṃ ca ghṛtena tu ||
ekaikāmāhutiṃ dadyātsviṣṭakṛttadanaṃtaram || 6 ||
dakṣiṇāṃ ca tato dadyātpūrṇāṃ dattvāhutiṃ vrajet ||7||
ekādivṛkṣaṃ vṛkṣāṇāṃ vidhiṃ vakṣye dvijottamāḥ ||
samutsṛjya tato yūpaṃ karmaṇā saha dharmavit || 8 ||
vṛkṣamūle yajeddharmaṃ pṛthivī ca viśaṃ tathā ||
digīśāṃśca tathā yakṣānācāryaṃ toṣayettataḥ || 9 ||
dhenuṃ ca dakṣiṇāṃ dadyāddohadaṃ vṛkṣapūjanam ||
kṛtvā samyagvidhānena savitre.arghyaṃ nivedayet || 2.3.3.10 || ||
iti śrībhaviṣye mahāpurāṇe madhyamaparvaṇi tṛtīyabhāge tṛtīyo.a dhyāyaḥ ||3|| ||6|||
kṣudrārāmapratiṣṭhāvarṇanam
|| sūta uvāca || ||
athāśvatthapratiṣṭhāyāṃ mūle bāhupramāṇake||
sthaṃḍilaṃ kārayettatra caṃdanenokṣitaṃ tathā ||1||
padmaṃ prakalpayettatra sāmānyārghyaṃ vidhāya ca ||
pūrvedyu rātrisamaye tadviṣṇoriti vai ṛcā||2||
sthāpayedvāriṇā pūrṇaṃ kayā neti ca gandhakam ||
gaṃdhadvāreti tailena śrīśca teti ca candanam || 3 ||
dadyāddūrvākṣataṃ kalpe brāhmaṇatrayabhojanama ||
kārayetsitasūtraiśca veṣṭayeccandanokṣitaiḥ ||4||
kuṃbhe vināyakaṃ pūjya brahmāṇaṃ ca pare ghaṭam ||
svadikṣu dikpatīṃścaiva vṛkṣamūle navagrahān ||5|
maṃḍale śivamabhyarcya pīṭhapūjāpuraḥsaram ||
atha dhyānaṃ pravakṣyāmi śvetaṃ vṛṣabhameva ca || 6 ||
dvibhujaṃ śūlahastaṃ ca sarvābharaṇasaṃyutam||
āropayetsvasāmarthyādbhūtaśuddhiṃ samācaret ||7||
tatorghyapātraṃ kṛtvā tu pīṭhapūjāṃ samācaret||
gaṇeśaṃ gurupādaṃ ca jayaṃ bhadraṃ samāhitaḥ||8||
madhye ādhāraśaktiṃ ca kūrmānaṃtau sapadmakau||
candrasūryāgnikādīnāṃ maṃḍalāni kramādyajet||9||
punaḥ pātrāṃtarasthaṃ ca gṛhītvā kusumaṃ budhaḥ ||
pāṇikacchapikāṃ kṛtvā dhyāyedvai varuṇaṃ tathā ||2.3.4.10||
pūrvavacca vidhānena dadyātpātrādikaṃ trayam ||
madhuparkaṃ cāsanaṃ ca pṛcchecca svāgataṃ punaḥ || 11 ||
mudrāṃ pradarśya vidhivadaṃgapūjāṃ samācaret ||
pūrvādipatre indrādīnbrahmāṇaṃ madhyato yajet || 12 ||
anaṃtaṃ purataścaiva teṣāmastrāṇi tadbahiḥ ||
madhye toyādhipaṃ rudraṃ śāṃtaṃ caiva praśāṃtakam || 13 ||
bhūstattvaṃ ca bhuvastatvaṃ svastattvādi ca tattvakam ||
kāmaṃ dharmamadharmaṃ ca dikṣu nārā yaṇaṃ śivam || 14 || ||
nairṛte ca yajeddurgāṃ pārśvayośca śatakratum ||
vināyakaṃ ca viṣṇuṃ ca gaṅgāṃ pṛthiviṣaṣṭikam || 15 ||
ṣoḍaśenopacāreṇa pūjayecca viśeṣataḥ ||
maṃḍalasyottare bhāge nāgarūpamanaṃtakam || 16 ||
paṃcakṛṣṇālakaiḥ kuryādbṛhatparvapramāṇakam ||
āropayeccākṣatādyaiḥ śvetacandanapuṣpakaiḥ || 17 ||
pūjayetparayā bhaktyā agnikāryamathācaret ||
varuṇaṃ juhuyātpūrvaṃ madhunā pāyasena vā || 18 ||
tilākṣatairvā ājyairvā trimadhvaktairathāpi vā ||
aṣṭottaraśataṃ kuryāddigīśānāṃ ghṛtena tu ||19||
ekaikāmāhutiṃ dadyātpuṣpaistilaghṛtena ca ||
nārāyaṇaṃ śivaṃ durgāṃ gaṇeśaṃ ca grahānniśi|| || 2.3.4.20 ||
aṣṭāvaṣṭau ca juhuyādghṛtairekāhutirbhaveta ||
brahmāyudhvānamiti maṃtreṇa brahmāṇaṃ pāyasena tu ||21||
ekāhutiṃ tato dadyādāpohiṣṭheti vā tribhiḥ ||
tato varuṇamuddiśya dadyādājyāhutitrayam || 22 ||
imaṃ varuṇa iti vā tadvaromā ṛcā punaḥ ||
varuṇasyottaṃbhanamasīti yenāpāvaka eva ca || 23 ||
vātasyayamiti punaḥ pañcavarṇaṃ yathākramāt ||
tato varuṇamuddiśya ghṛtena ca guḍaiḥ saha || 24 ||
tataḥ sviṣṭakṛte dadyādbaliṃ dadyādanukramāt||
madhvājyapāyasaṃ dadyādvaruṇāya viśeṣataḥ ||25||
yavakṣīraṃ digīśebhyo hyanyebhyaḥ pāyasena tu ||
nāgāya piṣṭakaṃ dadyāllājāhomāṣṭakaṃ punaḥ|| 26 ||
anaṃtasyottare tīre padmapatraṃ paristaret ||
aṣṭāṣṭāpadamānena varuṇaṃ rājatena tu || 27 ||
kuryātpūrvadvayenāpi bāṇarattisuvarṇakaiḥ ||
kuryātpuṣkariṇīṃ tatra pūrvārdhe caturasrake || 28 ||
varuṇaṃ vinyasettatra tathā puṣkariṇīmapi ||
vidhivadvākyapūrveṇa utsṛjecca jaleśayam || 29 ||
oṃ adyetyādi viṣṇurūpāya karuṇāya śrutiratyādyuktavedavyāsasapraṇītāgniṣṭomaphalaprāptaye puṣkariṇīpratiṣṭhākarmaṇi imāṃ puṣkariṇīṃ suvarṇarājatāṃ svagṛhyoditāṃ sālaṃkārāṃ supūjitāmamukagotraḥ amukadevaśarmā tubhyamahaṃ saṃpradade || ityutsargavākyam || oṃ adyetyādi brāhmaṇamukhyebhyaḥ mamāgniṣṭomādyanekaphalaprāptaye imaṃ jalāśayaṃ varuṇadaivataṃ supūjitaṃ caturmukhasahitaṃ catuḥsattvāvacchinnasnānapānādyupabhogāya amukasagotraḥ amukadevaśarmāhamutsṛje ||)
tato naukāṃ samādāya madhyātkiṃcittathottare ||
jalāśayasya madhyaṃ tu ṛtvigghomaṃ carettataḥ || 2.3.4.30 ||
pūrvāvasthāyinīṃ yaṣṭiṃ samāropya vidhānataḥ ||
tato varuṇa sūktena varuṇaṃ rājatodbhavam ||
puṣkariṇyāsamaṃ tena nāgayaṣṭyaṃtare kṣipet || 31 ||
tatraivānaṃtanāgaṃ ca maṃtrametadudīrayed||
puṃḍarīkadalābhāsa śubharaktāṃtalocana ||
phaṇāsahasrasaṃyukta supratiṣṭha namo.astu te || 32 ||
dakṣiṇāṃ ca tato dadyāttataḥ pūrṇāṃ vidhāya ca ||
mocayenmakarāngrāhānmīnakūrmāñjalecarān || 33 ||
padmotpalaṃ ca śaivālaṃ maṃtrameva prayatnataḥ ||
puṣkariṇyāṃ ca triḥ kuryātkhātaṃ sarvapradakṣiṇām || 34 ||
ādityādhyāyakaṃ japtvā kṣipellājakapardakān ||
pātayetkṣīradhārāṃ ca sahasreṇa śatena ca || 35 ||
sūtreṇa veṣṭayetprājño raktena ca catuṣkramāt ||
pathi saṃtoṣayeddīnānsaṃtoṣya ca gṛhaṃ vrajet || 36 || ||
iti śrībhaviṣye mahāpurāṇe madhyamaparvaṇi tṛtīyabhāge caturtho.adhyāyaḥ || 4 || cha ||
sarovarādipratiṣṭhāvidhānavarṇanam
|| sūta uvāca || ||
nalinyāśca tathā vāpyā hradasya dvijasattamāḥ ||
vidhiṃ vakṣye sahāṅgena vidhānaṃ śṛṇuta dvijāḥ || 1 ||
svarṇapādena mānena pūrvedyuradhivāsa yet |||
āpohiṣṭheti mantreṇa tathā astraiḥ śatairapi || 2 ||
svamaṇḍale śubhe sthāne viśetpūrvamukhena tu ||
gaṇeśaṃ varuṇaṃ caiva ghaṭe saṃpūjayecchivam || 3 ||
vāgīśaṃ ca tathā viṣṇuṃ sūrye kuṃbhe samarcayet ||
pāyasenāhutiṃ dadyādvaruṇāya ghṛtena ca || 4 ||
ekaikāmāhutiṃ dadyādanyeṣāṃ ca sruveṇa ca ||
balidānaṃ pāyasena utsṛjettadanaṃtaram || 5 ||
yūpaṃ niveśayetpaścāddadyāddhenuṃ ca dakṣiṇām ||
pūrṇaṃ dadyātsavitre.arghyaṃ dattvā tu svagṛhaṃ vrajet || 6 ||
ārāmasya vidhiṃ vakṣye pratiṣṭhāvidhivistaram ||
hīnārāmasya ca tathā eka vṛkṣasya ca dvijāḥ || 7 ||
araṇyamadhye pāścātye uttare vā viśeṣataḥ ||
maṃḍapaṃ vartulaṃ kuryādarghyahastapramāṇakam || 8 ||
taddakṣiṇe bhavetkuṃḍaṃ caturasraṃ samaṃ śubham ||
caturmukhaṃ ca kartavyaṃ toraṇādyairalaṃkṛtam || 9 ||
maṃdarādikamāvāhya tataḥ saṃpūjayetkramāt ||
viṣvaksenaṃ ca tatraiva pūjayedgandhacandanaiḥ || 2.3.5.10 ||
bhṛguṃ karṇasamārūḍhaṃ sarvabhūṣaṇabhūṣitam ||
viṣvaksenasya maṃtroyaṃ pūjāyāṃ caiva sarvataḥ || 11 ||
dvārapālaṃ ca saṃpūrṇaṃ gauryādīnkalaśeṣu ca ||
svāsu dikṣu digīśānāṃ balipuṣpākṣatādi nā || 12 ||
nairṛtyavaruṇayormadhye anaṃtaṃ pratipūjayet ||
indreśānayośca madhye brahmāṇaṃ ca prakalpayet || 13 ||
vedipārśve tato gatvā vedimāvāhya pūjayet ||
āsanaṃ kalpayitvā tu sāmānyārghyaṃ vidhāya ca || 14 ||
aiśāne kalaśe vidyudbrahmāṇaṃ ca tathā grahān ||
svaiḥsvairmaṃtrairgaṃdhapuṣpairnaivedyaiśca pṛthagvidhaiḥ || 15 ||
maḍaleśaṃ vāsudevaṃ sāsanaṃ ca bṛhaspatim ||
pūjayetparayā bhaktyā pāyasānnaṃ baliṃ haret || 16 ||
dvibhujaṃ vāsudevaṃ ca śaṃkha cakradharaṃ vibhum ||
padmāsanagataṃ dhyāyetpītavastraṃ suśobhanam || 17 ||
nīlotpaladalābhāsaṃ haricaṃdanacarcitam ||
devarṣisiddhasahitaṃ kalatradvaya saṃyutam|| 18 ||
dhyātvā āropayedevaṃ bālādīnatha nāyakān ||
vimalādyā nāyikāśca digīśāṃśca yathāvidhi || 19 ||
ṣoḍaśoccaiḥ pṛthagrūpaiḥ pratipuṣpāṃjalikramāt||
paritaḥ pūjayedviṣṇuṃ śivaṃ durgāṃ sarasvatīm || 2.3.5.20 ||
śuddhasphaṭikasaṃkāśaṃ dhyāyetsomaṃ caturmukham ||
aśvārūḍhaṃ divya rūpaṃ padmākṣaṃ dhṛtapuṣpakam || 21 ||
varadaṃ devagaṃdharvaiḥ sevitaṃ munibhiḥ stutam ||
śvetaṃ vanaspatiṃ dhyāyeddvibhujaṃ pītavāsasam || 22 ||
svarathasthaṃ mahābāhuṃ śaṃkhāṃkuśasakheṭakam ||
vidyāṃ ca vāmato dhyāyetsvamantreṇa ca sthāpayet || 23 ||
daśasvarānvitaṃ toyaṃ svabhāvaṃ tamasānvitam ||
maṃtro.ayaṃ devadevasya pūjāyāṃ viniyojayet ||24||
nīlaṃ jayaṃ bhṛṃgiṇaṃ ca paritaśca yathākramāt ||
tataḥ kuśakaṃḍikāṃ kṛtvā sthālīpākaṃ vidhānataḥ|| || 25 ||
aṣṭottaraśataṃ caiva somāya dvādaśāhutīḥ ||
vānaspatestathāṣṭau ca ājye.anyeṣāṃ vidhīyatām || 26 ||
ekaikāmāhutiṃ dadyātsaptajihvāmanaṃtaram ||
vāstoṣpataya iti maṃtreṇa sthālīpākadvayaṃ nayet || 27 ||
vanaspatiṃ samuddiśya tatoyamīrayedṛcam ||
vṛkṣādīnsthāpayetpūrve gāyatryā prathamaṃ budhaḥ || 28 ||
abjairagraṃ kāṃsyavastraṃ ratnaṃ dikṣu yathākramam ||
brīhayaśceti maṃtreṇa tathā ca saritaśca me || 29 ||
mitratrayaśceti tathā pūṣā ca ma ṛcā tathā ||
saṃsthāpya vrīhīnsaṃvāpya tatraiva vidhipūrvakam || 2.3.5.30 ||
kṣipedgaṅgājalaṃ toye sarvauṣadhyudakena ca ||
saṃsthāpya yajamānaṃ ca surāstvāmiti mantrakaiḥ || 31 ||
ācāryamātmane tatra saṃsthitaṃ dvijapuṃgavaiḥ ||
samāpya nityavidhinācāryāyātha ca dakṣiṇām || 32 ||
dhenuṃ ca lohapātraṃ ca dattvā iṣṭāṃ ca dakṣiṇām ||
brāhmaṇebhyo yathāśakti dadyātpūrṇāṃ gṛhaṃ vrajet || 33 || || ||
iti śrībhaviṣye mahāpurāṇe madhyamaparvaṇi tṛtīyabhāge paṃcamo.adhyāyaḥ || 5 || a ||
kṣudrārāmapratiṣṭhāvarṇanam
|| sūta uvāca || ||
kṣudrārāmapratiṣṭhāṃ ca vakṣye ca dvijasattama ||
amaṃḍale śubhe sthāne dvihastama yasthaṃḍile || 1 ||
sthāpayetkalaśaṃ tatra somaṃ viṣṇuṃ samarcayet ||
ācāryamātraṃ varayenniśāsūtraiḥ praveṣṭayet || 2 ||
vṛkṣānmālyairalaṃkṛtya bhūṣayedbhūṣaṇādinā ||
dohadaṃ ca tato dadyātsthāpayecchitadhārayā || 3 ||
bhojayetpaṃcaviprāṃśca puratoṃ.ate viśeṣataḥ ||
karṇavedhaṃ tataḥ kṛtvā utsṛjedvāsyapūrvakam|| || 4 ||
dadyādyūpaṃ madhyadeśe ropayetkadalīṃ tataḥ ||
raṃbhāṃ ca ropayeddikṣu sthālīpākavidhānataḥ || 5 ||
aṣṭāvaṣṭau ca juhuyādanyeṣāṃ ca ghṛtena tu ||
ekaikāmāhutiṃ dadyātsviṣṭakṛttadanaṃtaram || 6 ||
dakṣiṇāṃ ca tato dadyātpūrṇāṃ dadyādgṛhaṃ vrajet || 7 ||
|| iti śrībhaviṣye mahāpurāṇe madhyamaparvaṇi tṛtīyabhāge ṣaṣṭho.adhyāyaḥ || 6 || || a ||
śreṣṭhavṛkṣapratiṣṭhāvidhānavarṇanam
|| sūta uvāca || ||
ekādivaravṛkṣāṇāṃ vidhiṃ vakṣye dvijottamāḥ ||
vṛkṣasya paścime bhāge sthāpayetkalaśaṃ tataḥ || 1 ||
vṛkṣaṃ saṃsthāpayetpūrvaṃ sūtreṇa pariveṣṭayet ||
brahmāṇaṃ kalaśebhyaśca somaṃ viṣṇuṃ vanaspatim || 2 ||
tatastilayavairhomānaṣṭāṣṭau vidhivaccaret ||
samutsṛjya tato yūpaṃ kadalyā saha dharmavit || 3 ||
vṛkṣamūle yajeddharmaṃ pṛthivīṃ ca viśaṃ tathā ||
digīśāṃśca tathā yakṣānnācāryaṃ toṣayettataḥ|| 4||
dhenuṃ ca dakṣiṇāṃ dadyāddohadaṃ vṛkṣapūjanam ||
kṛtvā samyagvidhānena savitre.arghyaṃ nivedayet || 5 ||
iti śrībhaviṣye mahāpurāṇe madhyamaparvaṇi tṛtīyabhāge saptamo.adhyāyaḥ || 7 || a ||
aśvatthapratiṣṭhāvidhānavarṇanam
|| sūta uvāca || ||
athāśvatthapratiṣṭhāyāṃ mūle bāhupramāṇakam ||
sthaṇḍilaṃ kārayettatra caṃdanenāṅkitaṃ yathā || 1 ||
padmaṃ prakalpayettatra sāmānyārghyaṃ vidhāya ca ||
pūrvedyu rātrisamaye tadviṣṇoriti vai ṛcā || 2 ||
sthāpayedvāriṇā pūrṇaṃ kayā neti ca gaṃdhakam ||
gaṃdhadvāreti tailena śrīśca teti ca caṃdanam || 3 ||
dadyāddūrvākṣataṃ kalye brāhmaṇatrayabhojanam ||
kārayetsitasūtraiśca veṣṭayeccaṃdanasya ca || 4 ||
kumbhe vināyakaṃ pūjya brahmāṇaṃ ca pare ghaṭe ||
svadikṣu dikpatīṃścāpi vṛkṣamūle navagrahān || 5 ||
maṃḍale śivamabhyarcyaṃ pīṭhapūjā puraḥsaram ||
pūrve caṃḍaṃ pracaṃḍaṃ ca dakṣiṇe naṃdibhṛṃgiṇau ||6||
anaṃtaṃ paścime kāmamuttare gaṇanāyakam ||
kārtikeyaṃ madhyadeśa ādhāraśaktipūrvakam||7|||
anaṃtaṃ pṛthivīṃ caiva trivṛttaṃ ca trimaṃḍalam||
atha dhyānaṃ pravakṣyāmi śvetaṃ vṛṣabhameva ca || 8||
dvibhujaṃ śūlahastaṃ ca sarvābharaṇasaṃyutam||
āropayetsvataṃtreṇa mūle viṣṇuṃ samarcayet||9||
śaṃkaraṃ ca tathā madhye agre brahmāṇakaṃ yajet||
baliṃ ca piṣṭakānnaṃ ca dattvā ca śrapayeccarum||2.3.8.10||
juhuyādrudramuddiśya rudrasaṃkhyāhutiṃ kramāt ||
anyeṣāṃ ca sruveṇaiva homaṃ dadyātprayatnataḥ || 11 ||
ropayetkadalīvṛkṣamācāryaṃ paritoṣayet ||
kṛtvā pūrṇāṃ paṃcadhārāṃ kṛtvā cāpi pradakṣiṇām || 12 ||
kṣīradhārāṃ ca saṃpādya arghyaṃ dattvā gṛhaṃ vrajet || 13 || ||
iti śrībhaviṣye mahāpurāṇe madhyamaparvaṇi tṛtīyabhāge.aṣṭamo.adhyāyaḥ || || 8 || cha ||
vaṭapratiṣṭhāvidhānavarṇanam
|| sūta uvāca || ||
vaṭasthānamatho vakṣye tasya mūle tu dakṣiṇe ||
trihastavedimupari sthāpayetkalaśatrayam || 1 ||
gaṇeśaṃ ca śivaṃ viṣṇuṃ pūjayitvā huneccarum ||
raktasūtraistriguṇitaiḥ svarṇameva puraḥsaram|| 2 ||
yavakṣīrabaliṃ dadyādutsṛjedvākyamuccaran||
yūpamāropayetpaścādvaṭamūlaiḥ samarpayet || 3 ||
yakṣānnāgāṃśca gaṃdharvānsiddhāṃścaiva marudgaṇān || 4 || ||
iti śrībhaviṣye mahāpurāṇe madhyamaparvaṇi tṛtīyabhāge navamo.adhyāyaḥ || 9 || || cha ||
bilvapratiṣṭhāvidhānavarṇanam
|| sūta uvāca || ||
vakṣye bilvapratiṣṭhāṃ ca pūrvedyuradhivāsayet ||
tryaṃbakaṃ ceti maṃtreṇa sthāpayedgaṃdhavāriṇā || 1 ||
sunābheti ca maṃtreṇa me gṛhṇāmīti cākṣatam ||
kayāneti tato dhūpaṃ vastraṃ mālyaṃ nivedayet || 2 ||
yajedrudraṃ tato devaṃ madhye durgāṃ dhaneśvaram ||
tataḥ kalye samutthāya nityaṃ nirvartya śāstrataḥ || 3 ||
svagṛhe sapta viprāṃśca bhojayeddvijadaṃpatī ||
mūle hastadvayaṃ dattvā vartulā vedikā bhavet || || 4 ||
tatra gairikayuktena kusuṃbhacūrṇakena vā ||
niśāraktena vā kuryādaṣṭapatraṃ suśobhanam|| 5 ||
niveṣṭanaṃ tataḥ kuryādvṛkṣasya dvijasattamāḥ ||
rakta sūtrairveṣṭayecca paṃcasaptanavabhistu || 6 ||
vrīhīṃśca vāpayettatra uttarābhimukhastathā ||
śivaṃ viṣṇuṃ ca brahmāṇaṃ pūjayedbhūtimicchatā || 7 ||
śivaṃ ca nāyakaṃ kuryādādityānpatramūlake ||
śeṣaṃ ca tarumūle tu madhye.anaṃtaṃ śatakratum || 8 ||
vanapālaṃ ca somaṃ ca sūryaṃ pṛdhvīmanukramāt ||
homastilākṣataiḥ kāryo baliṃ dadyādghṛtaudanaiḥ || 9 ||
yakṣebhyo māṣabhaktaṃ ca vāyanāni ca dvādaśa ||
grahāṇāṃ prītaye dadyātkṣīreṇāveṣṭya dakṣiṇām|| 2.3.10.10
kāṃcanaṃ kāṃsyapātraṃ ca tāṃbūlaṃ tāmrapātrakam ||
yūpāropaṃ karṇavedhaṃ savitre.arghyaṃ nivedayet || 11 ||
atha rātripratiṣṭhāṃ ca vakṣye śāstrānusārataḥ ||
yakṣaikavṛkṣasaṃskāre na punarjāyate bhuvi || 12 ||
pūrvedyurupavāhe tu vṛkṣamūle ghaṭaṃ nyaset ||
viṣṇuṃ śivaṃ gaṇeśaṃ ca pūjayitvā tu sthāpayet|| 13 ||
kalaśānpañca vā sapta gaṃdhatailairalaṃkṛtān ||
dugdhena paṃcagavyena śaṃkhatoyena yatnataḥ ||14||
sūtraiḥ saṃveṣṭanaṃ kṛtvā vastramālyairanaṃtaram||
kāṃḍāditi ca maṃtreṇa dadyāddūrvā kṣataṃ tataḥ || 15||
viṣṇusūktena ca punaḥ siṃdūrāṃjanacaṃdanam||
dadyātphalaṃ ca dīpaṃ ca svayaṃ tatra svapettataḥ||16||
hunetpaṃcāhutīstatra yūpaṃ dadyātsamutsṛjet|| 18 ||
baliṃ ca pāyasenaiva prakuryātkarṇavedhanam ||
veṣṭayetkṣīratoyena dhānyaṃ dhenuṃ ca dakṣiṇām ||19||
dadyādarghyaṃ hunetpūrṇaṃ bhojayeddvijadaṃpatī || 20 || ||
iti śrībhaviṣye mahāpurāṇe madhyamaparvaṇi tṛtīyabhāge daśamo.adhyāyaḥ || 10 || a ||
sadvṛkṣapratiṣṭhāvidhānavarṇanam
|| sūta uvāca || ||
śatahastamitāṃ muṣṭiṃ nānātaruvibhūṣitām ||
pūgāmrādiphalairyuktaṃ vāstuṃ kṛtvā yajettu yaḥ || 1 ||
ṣaṣṭivarṣasahasrāṇi svargaloke vasecciram||
tadvidhānaṃ pravakṣyāmi yathāśāstrānusārataḥ || 2 ||
nityaṃ nirvartya vidhivatpaṃca viprānsamarcayet ||
bhojayetpūjayedviṣṇuṃ prajāpatisamanvitam || 3 ||
agnikāryaṃ tataḥ kṛtvā dadyādviprāya dakṣiṇām || 4 || ||
iti śrībhaviṣye mahāpurāṇe madhyamaparvaṇi tṛtīyabhāga ekādaśo.adhyāyaḥ|| 11 || a || ||
maṇḍapapratiṣṭhāvidhānavarṇanam
|| sūta uvāca || ||
pratiṣṭhāṃ maṃḍapasyaiva śailadārumayasya ca ||
tṛṇakāṣṭhasya ca vibho tṛṇavattasya ca dvijāḥ || 1 ||
adhivāsasya pūrvedyuḥ śubhe lagne ghaṭaṃ nyaset ||
sūryaṃ somaṃ tathā viṣṇuṃ kalaśe tu samarcayet || 2 ||
prokṣayetkuśatoyena āpohiṣṭheti vai ṛcā ||
āpyāyasveti gaṃdhena gaṃdhadvāreti gaṃdhakam || 3 ||
ākṛṣṇeneti tailena śrīśca te iti caṃdanam ||
siṃdūrālaktakaṃ dadyādaṃjanaṃ pūrvayā saha || 4 ||
tataḥ prabhāte vimale śrāddhaṃ vṛddhyātmakaṃ caret ||
dikpālāṃścaiva vinyasya maṃḍape śubhalakṣaṇe || 5 ||
madhye vedyaṃtare caiva rājabhirmaḍalaṃ likhet ||
sūryamāvāhayettatra somaṃ viṣṇuṃ ca pārśvayoḥ || 6 ||
gaṇeśaṃ ca grahāṃścaiva dikpālāṃśca ghaṭe.arcayet ||
pāyasaṃ juhuyādagnāvaṣṭottaraśataṃ tathā || 7 ||
ādityasya tathā viṣṇoḥ somasya dvādaśāhutīḥ ||
baliṃ ca pāyasaṃ dadyāttailaṃ kṣīramathāpi vā || 8 ||
tata utsṛjya vidhivadvākyametadudīrayet ||
jānubhyāmavaniṃ gatvā śanairoṣṭhaṃ na cālayet || 9 ||
vāstoṣpatiṃ ca tatraiva pūjayedgandhacandanaiḥ ||
arghyaṃ dadyācca vidhivadbhūnaivāhutiṃ hunet|| 2.3.12.10 ||
tataḥ śvetaghaṭaṃ dadyānmaṇḍapopari sattamāḥ ||
triguṇena niśāktairvā veṣṭayedvāridhārayā || || 11 ||
dakṣiṇāṃ vidhivaddadyātsūryāyārghyaṃ nivedayet ||
tṛṇaveśmani vai sūryaṃ vāsudevasamanvitam || 12 ||
ghaṭe gaṇeśaṃ varadaṃ varaṃ kṛtvā samutsṛjet ||
aiśānyāṃ dāpayedyūpaṃ dhvajāndikṣu prakalpayet || 13 ||
maṇḍapopari kalaśaṃ saṃsthāpya mantramuccaret ||
prapāyāṃ varuṇaḥ pūjyo viśvakarmā prayatnataḥ||| 14 ||
pṛthivīṃ ca gaṇeśaṃ ca pūjayitvā hunedghṛtam ||
sarvavarjyamidaṃ vākyaṃ dhvajamātraṃ vidhīyate || 15 || ||
iti śrībhaviṣye mahāpurāṇe madhyamaparvaṇi tṛtīyabhāge dvādaśo.adhyāyaḥ || 12 || || cha ||
mahāyūpanirmāṇapratiṣṭhāvarṇanam
|| sūta uvāca || ||
caturhastaṃ mahāyūpaṃ hastaṣoḍaśanirmitam ||
vakṣye taṃ ca pratiṣṭhāṃ ca rātrau trairātrikaṃ yajet || 1 ||
varuṇaṃ sitakuṃbhe ca prapākūpasya paścime ||
gāyatryā snāpayetpūrva māpohiṣṭheti vai kramāt || 2 ||
gaṃdhadvāreti gandhaṃ ca aṃśunā ceti tailakam ||
manonnā iti kusumaṃ dhūrasīti ca dhūpakam || 3 ||
kayāneti dadedvastraṃ naivedyaṃ dīpacandanam ||
ādau śrāddhaṃ na kartavyaṃ pratiṣṭhāṃte vidhīyate || 4 ||
daṃpatībhojanaṃ kuryādvarayedekabrāhmaṇam ||
maṃḍape cāṣṭahaste ca kalaśaṃ tatra vinyaset || 5 ||
pūjayedvaruṇaṃ devaṃ nārāyaṇasamanvitam ||
śivaṃ ca pṛthivīṃ caiva svaiḥ svairmantrairyathākramāt || 6 ||
tataḥ kuśakaṃḍikāṃ kṛtvā sthālīpākavidhānataḥ ||
varuṇaṃ ca samabhyarcya juhuyādāhutīrdaśa ||7||
anyeṣāṃ ca sruveṇaiva dadyādekāhutiṃ kramāt ||
varuṇasyoktavaruṇaṃ tattvā yāmi tataḥ param || 8 ||
varuṇasyottaṃbhanamasīti ca ābhyāṃ devāṃstathaiva ca ||
yenāpāvakacakṣasā paṃcamaṃ samudāhṛtam || 9 ||
rātrasya yūpamityādi paraṃ ca daśamastakam ||
tataḥ sviṣṭakṛtaṃ kṛtvā saptajihvaṃ caruṃ nayet ||2.3.13.10||
iha vetyādikaṃ paṃca tataḥ paṃcāhutiṃ hunet ||
śaṃbhave ca pṛthivyai ca mahārājāya ca kramāt ||11||
carupāketi naivedyaṃ baliṃ caivāgurūdanam ||
śaṃkarāya ca rudrāya śarvāya paśupataye iti ca ||
ugrāya asanāyeti bhavāya tadanaṃtaram || 12 ||
mahādevāya ca punarīśānāyeti ca kramāt ||
carupāketi naivedyaṃ baliṃ caivāgurūdanam || 13 ||
vākyapūrvaṃ sṛjettoyaṃ tatra vākkaraṇaṃ śṛṇu || 14 ||
dakṣiṇāṃ vidhivaddadyādgāṃ ca dadyātpayasvinīm || 15 ||
maṃḍape kṣudrakūpe ca pratiṣṭhāṃ śṛṇuta dvijāḥ ||
gaṇeśaṃ varuṇaṃ kuṃbhe vidhivatpūjayetsudhīḥ || 16 ||
veṣṭayedraktasūtraiśca dadyādyūpaṃ samutsṛjet||
dakṣiṇāṃ vidhivaddadyādviprānsaṃpūjayettataḥ || 17 ||
iti śrībhaviṣye mahāpurāṇe madhyamaparvaṇi tṛtīyabhāge trayodaśo.adhyāyaḥ || 13 ||
puṣpavāṭikāpratiṣṭhāvidhānavarṇanam
|| sūta uvāca || ||
puṣpārāmapratiṣṭhāṃ tu vakṣye śṛṇvaṃtu vai dvijāḥ ||
madhye vediṃ trihastāṃ ca kṛtvā saṃsthāpayedghaṭam || 1 ||
adhivāsasya pūrvedyuryathāvadviprabhojanam ||
kṛtvā ghaṭe gaṇeśaṃ ca sūryaṃ somaṃ hutāśanam || 2 ||
nārāyaṇaṃ sthaṃḍile ca juhuyānmadhupāyasam||
vidhivadyūpamāropya godhūmānsecayedgurau || 3 ||
veṣṭayedraktasūtraiśca pradadyācceti dakṣiṇām ||
etaddhārājalenaiva yavānnaṃ saguḍaṃ payaḥ || 4 ||
aiśānyāṃ yūpamāropya vidhivaddvijasattamāḥ ||
karṇavedhaṃ samāropya snāpayetkuśavāriṇā || 5 ||
dhānyaṃ yavaṃ ca godhūmaṃ dadyādviprāya dakṣiṇām ||
śatadhārajalenaiva veṣṭayetparito dvijāḥ || 6 || ||
iti śrībhaviṣye mahāpurāṇe madhyama parvaṇi tṛtīyabhāge caturdaśo.adhyāyaḥ || 14 || cha ||
tulasīpratiṣṭhāvidhānavarṇanam
|| sūta uvāca || ||
jyeṣṭhāṣāḍhe tulasyāśca pratiṣṭhāṃ vidhivaccaret ||
yajamānaḥ śuddhadine ekādaśyāmathāpi vā || 1 ||
tato rātrau ghaṭaṃ sthāpya pūjayetparameśvaram ||
nārāyaṇaṃ śivaṃ somaṃ brahmāṇaṃ ceṃdrameva ca || 2 ||
gāyatryā snapanaṃ kuryāttathoktairmaṃtrakairapi ||
kayāneti ca gaṃdhena aśruneti ca tailakam || 3 ||
tvāṃ gaṃdharveti ca punaḥ puṣpaṃ maṃḍeśaneti ca|
mānastoketi kusumaṃ śrīścateti ca caṃdanam || 4 ||
vaiśvadevīti ca punarmaṃtreṇānena caṃdanam ||
dūrvāmaṃtreṇa dūrvāśca rūpeṇeti ca darppaṇam|| 5 ||
phalamaṃtreṇa ca phalaṃ samedheti ca aṃjanam ||
sakuśaiḥ pītasūtrādyairveṣṭayetkṣīradhārayā || 6 ||
śatadhārājalenaiva veṣṭayetsvagṛhaṃ vrajet||
vastreṇāvṛtya vidhivadbudhaḥ kāle ghaṭaṃ nyaset || 7 ||
saptapaṃcatribhirvātha tadviṣṇoriti vai ṛcā ||
snāpayedatha sādhvībhiḥ kṛtamaṃgalapūrvakam || 8 ||
tataḥ śrāddhaṃ samāpyaiva mātṛpūjāpuraḥsaram ||
ācāryaṃ varayetpūrvaṃ gaṃdhādyaiḥ kusumairapi || 9 ||
ācārya eva hotā syādbrahmāṇaṃ ca sadasyakam ||
maṃḍape daśahaste.api vartule sthaṃḍileṣu ca || 2.3.15.10 ||
sahasraṃ maṃḍalaṃ kuryāttatra nārāyaṇaṃ yajet ||
grahā~mllokeśvarānmadhye ādityāṃśca marudgaṇān || 11 ||
rudrānvasūṃśca kalaśe paritaśca samarcayet||
tataḥ kuśakaṃḍikāṃ kṛtvā homaṃ tilayavena tu || 12 ||
aṣṭottaraśataṃ kuryādanyeṣāṃ śaktito hunet||
nārāyaṇaṃ samuddiśya dadyādutsṛjya sattamāḥ || 13 ||
madhye yūpaṃ samuddiśya carupākaṃ baliṃ dadet ||
kadalīṃ dikṣu saṃnyasya dhvajāndikṣu praropayet || 14 ||
dakṣiṇāṃ kāṃcanaṃ dadyāttilaṃ dhānyaṃ sapuṣpakam ||
dhenuṃ payasvinīṃ dadyādveṣṭayetkṣīradhārayā|| 15||
jayaṃtyāḥ somavṛkṣasya tathā somavaṭasya ca ||
panasasya kadaṃbasya niṃbasya dvijasattamāḥ || 16 ||
pāṭalākanakasyaiva śālmalīniṃbakasya ca||
biṃbāśokavaṭasyaiva pratiṣṭhāṃ naiva kārayet || 17 ||
bhadrakasya śamīkoṇacaṃḍātakabakasya ca ||
khadirasyaiva kartavyaṃ karṇavedhaṃ na kārayet ||18||
iti śrībhaviṣye mahāpurāṇe madhyamaparvaṇi tṛtīyabhāge paṃcadaśo.adhyāyaḥ||15||
pratiṣṭhāviśeṣaniyamavarṇanam
|| sūta uvāca || |
vṛkṣādīnāṃ pratiṣṭhāṃ ca uttameṣūttamaṃ caret||
madhyemadhye kaniṣṭhā tu kaniṣṭhaṃ parikīrtitam||1||
vartulaṃ maṃḍalaṃ kuryāttattu śīrṣe tathāntyake||
madhye vā vedikāṃ kuryāttanmadhye kuṃḍamaṃḍalam||2||
pūrvedyū rātrisamaye ghaṭaṃ saṃsthāpya pūjayet||
śeṣaṃ saṃpūjya vidhivatpṛthivīṃ ca śivaṃ tathā|| 3 ||
gaṃdhatoyena gāyatryā setuṃ saṃpūjya mokṣayet||
kayāneti ca mantreṇa āpyāyasveti vai ṛcā || 4 ||
dadyādgandhādikaṃ śrīśca te lakṣmīriti candanam ||
dūrvāmantreṇa dūrvāśca phalamantreṇa vai phalam || 5 ||
śannodevīti mantreṇa dadyātkuśapavitrakam ||
surāsureti mantreṇa pradadyādvastrayugmakam || 6 ||
añjanālaktakaṃ kuryānmanonnā iti saṃpaṭhan||
kuryācchrāddhaṃ paradine vasudhārāpuraḥsaram || 7 ||
varayedatha ācāryaṃ hotāraṃ nṛvaraścaret ||
pātradvayaṃ vidhātavyaṃ sadasyācāryameva ca ||8 ||
setuyāge vidhātavyaṃ tathā dhānyācalepi ca ||
sahasrahome vaikaṃ tu vivāhe brahmaṛtvijau || 9 ||
yajedenaṃ kṛte mauliyāgārthaṃ yāgamaṃḍapam ||
vedimāvāhayetpūrvaṃ maṃḍapaṃ pratipūjayet || 2.3.16.10 || vighnagrahā~mllokapālānsarvasiddhipradāyakān||
sthaṃḍile sarvatobhadre śeṣaṃ viṣṇuṃ pradarśayet || 11||
tatraiva tu varāhākhyaṃ pratītamṛtviguttamam ||
sthālīpākena juhuyādaṣṭāviṃśatikatrayam || 12 ||
ājyena tu varāhasya homapañcakamīritam |
tatastilayavenaiva ekaikāmāhutiṃ kramāt || 13 ||
baliṃ dadyātpṛthagrūpaṃ śeṣayedvidhipūrvakam ||
piṣṭakānnaṃ ghṛtānnaṃ ca vistare vā guḍaudanam || 14 ||
māṣabhaktaṃ tu lokāya pṛthivyai paramānnakam ||
vākyapūrvaṃ sṛjeddhīro vākyaprakaraṇaṃ śṛṇu || 15 ||
baddhāṃñjaliḥ paṭhenmantraṃ kuryācca vidhivattataḥ ||
picchile patitānāṃ ca udgatenāṅgabhaṅgataḥ ||
pratiṣṭhite dharmasetau dharmo me syānna pātakam || 16 ||
setorasya prabandhasya śraddhayā parayā yutaḥ ||
ye cātra prāṇinaḥ santi sarveṣāṃ prāṇadhārakāḥ || 17 ||
vedāgamena yatpuṇyaṃ kathitaṃ setubandhane ||
tatpuṇyaṃ tu mayā deva pātheye hi samarpitam || 18 ||
yūpaṃ dadyāditi mantreṇa ante cāpi tathā dhvajān ||
vidhivaddakṣiṇāṃ dadyātkulāni nava pañca vā || 19 ||
pūrṇāṃ dattvā savitre.arghyaṃ dattvā ca svagṛhaṃ vrajet ||
anātape kṣudrasetoḥ pratiṣṭhāṃ vidhivaccaret || 2.3.16.20 ||
pūrvaṃ ca dadhivāsaṃ ca prabhāte viprabhojanam ||
setumadhyaṃ tato gatvā gandhādīnvidhivaccaret || 21 ||
viṣṇuṃ śivaṃ hutāśaṃ ca ekakuṇḍe samarcayet ||
vāstoṣpatiṃ yajettatra homaṃ tilayavena tu || 22 ||
kuryādekaikaśo viprā aṣṭā viṃśatisaṃkhyayā ||
utsṛjya dāpayeddhūpaṃ dhvajavarjyaṃ hi sattamāḥ ||
jñātibhiḥ saha bhuñjīta kṛtakṛtyo.abhidhīyate || 23 || ||
iti śrībhaviṣye mahā purāṇe madhyamaparvaṇi tṛtīyabhāge ṣoḍaśo.adhyāyaḥ || 16 || || cha ||
gopracāravidhivarṇanam
|| sūta uvāca || ||
tatra daṃḍe ca viprendrāścaturasre samaṃtataḥ ||
ṣaṣṭihastamitāṃ bhūmiṃ tasya pūrṇāṃ manoramām || 1 ||
pracārārthaṃ gavāṃ caiva yo dadyātsusamāhitaḥ ||
ṣaṣṭivarṣasahasrāṇi rudraloke mahīyate ||2||
tadardhaṃ ca tadardhaṃ ca tadardhaṃ vā samutsṛjet ||
yo dadyātkevalāṃ bhūmiṃ kanyāṃ dāsīṃ tathā vṛṣam || 3 ||
alaṃkāraṃ vinā dhenuṃ phalasyārdhaṃ prakīrtitam||
amaṇḍape śubhe sthāne śarkarādivivarjite || 4 ||
dvihastavedikāmadhye prakuryātsetumaṃḍapam||
tatra saṃpūjayedbhadraṃ brahmāṇaṃ ca śacīpatim || 5 ||
gaṇeśaṃ kṣetrapālaṃ ca śeṣaṃ caiva digīśvarān ||
pañcopacārairvidhivatpūjayetpāyasādinā || 6 ||
sthālīpākena juhuyādante vai viprabhojanam ||
atra yāge śrāddhavarjyaṃ pūrvedyuradhivāsayet || 7 ||
tryambakenaiva maṃtreṇa bhūmiṃ saṃsthāpya pūjayet ||
tadviṣṇoriti maṃtreṇa gandhatailaṃ sacandanam || 8 ||
pradadyādasunīteti punastu naiva sthāpayet ||
pañcagavyena ca punaḥ śrīścateti ca puṣpakam || 9 ||
evaṃ yūpasya ca tathā adhigṛhṇāti maṃtrakam ||
gandhadvāreti gandhena aṃśunāteti tailakam || 2.3.17.10 ||
surāsureti kusumaṃ dūrvāmantreṇa dūrvikām ||
prabhāte pūjayeddevānrudramuddiśya homayet || 11 ||
sthālīpākena vidhinā anyeṣāṃ pūrvavaccaret ||
utsṛjyāropayeddīpaṃ sthiro bhaveti vai ṛcā || 12 ||
taṃtreṇa nirmitaṃ kuryātsakalaṃ ca trihastakam ||
hastaikaṃ prāpayenmadhye kṣetre caiva viśeṣataḥ || 13 ||
sthāpayettatra mantreṇa pañcagavyena yatnataḥ ||
madhuvāteti madhunā āpyāyasveti vai dadhi || 14 ||
tadviṣṇoriti mantreṇa ghaṭatoyairanantaram ||
pṛthivīṃ ca varāhaṃ ca kūrmamādhavaśaktikān || 15 ||
vāstoṣpatiṃ ca viṣṇuṃ ca yūpe saṃpūjayetkramāt||
dadyādarghyaṃ ca vivare garte homaṃ vivarjayet || 16 ||
arghyapātre ca duṣṭe ca hastenotsṛjya sattamāḥ ||
evaṃ nivedayedvipro gopracāraṃ samāhitaḥ ||
sa muktaḥ sarvapāpebhyo viṣṇuloke mahīyate || 17 ||
yāvaṃti tṛṇagulmāni saṃti bhūmau śubhāni ca ||
tāvadvarṣasahasrāṇi svargaloke mahīyate || 18 || ||
iti śrībhaviṣye mahāpurāṇe tṛtīyabhāge gopracāravidhau saptadaśo.adhyāyaḥ || 17 || || cha || ||
dinaikasādhyapratiṣṭhāvidhānavarṇanam
|| sūta uvāca || ||
kalau caikāhasādhyena pratiṣṭhāmalpavittavān ||
sadyodhivāsamājyena prakuryāttāṃtrikottamaḥ || 1 ||
uttaraṃ tu gate haṃse atīte cottarāyaṇe ||
śaratkāle vyatīte tu vasaṃte yajñamārabhet || 2 ||
nārāyaṇādimūrtīnāṃ dvātriṃśadbheda eva tu ||
pratiṣṭhāṃ pratimānāṃ ca gajāsyādīṃśca sattamāḥ || 3 ||
nityaṃ nirvartya matimānkuryādabhyudayaṃ tataḥ ||
viprānsaṃbhojayedvātha tato yāgagṛhaṃ vrajet || 4 ||
gaṇeśa grahadikpālānpratikuṃbheṣu pūjayet ||
sthaṃḍile pūjayedviṣṇuṃ parivāragaṇaṃ yajet || 5 ||
snāpayetprathamaṃ devaṃ toyaiḥ pañcavidhairapi ||
pañcāmṛtaiḥ pañcagavyaiḥ paṃcamṛtpiṇḍakairapi || 6 ||
tilatailaiśca snehaiśca kaṣāyairapi sattamāḥ ||
pañcapuṣpodakairvātha tripadairapi sattamāḥ || 7 ||
tulasīkusumāpuṣpapatrāṇyāhustripatrakam ||
pañcakāmraśamīpadmakaravīraṃ ca paṃcakam ||8||
mṛttikā karidaṃtasya tathāśvakhuramṛttikā ||
gomūtraṃ gomayaṃ kṣīraṃ dadhi sarpistu paṃcamam || || 9 ||
kuryātprāṇapratiṣṭhāṃ ca homaṃ kuryādyathāvidhi ||
dakṣiṇāṃ vidhivaddadyātpūrṇāṃ tu tadanaṃtaram || 2.3.18.10 ||
iti śrībhaviṣye mahāpurāṇe madhyama parvaṇi tṛtīyabhāge.aṣṭādaśo.adhyāyaḥ || 18 || cha ||
devādipratiṣṭhāvarṇanam
|| sūta uvāca || ||
ataḥ paraṃ tu viprendrāḥ kālyādīnāṃ tathaiva ca ||
adhivāsya ca pūrvedyuḥ śrāddhamabhyudayātmakam || 1 ||
prathame jalajaiḥ snānaṃ pañcagavyairanaṃtaram ||
pūrvavacca vidhānena kuṃbhe durgāṃ samarcayet || 2 ||
pañcāmṛtaiḥ pañcagavyaiḥ karīṣaśatadhārayā ||
śrībilve pūjayeddevīṃ dadyātprāṇamanaṃtaram || 3 ||
bilvapatraiḥ phalairvāpi dadyāccāpi śatāhutīḥ ||
ekaikaśastu sarveṣāṃ dadyātkāñcana dakṣiṇām || 4 ||
pratimāṃ kālikāyāśca tārāyāśca pṛthakpṛthak ||
grāhyaṃ vinārcayedviprāḥ pañcapañcaśatairapi || 5 ||
bhojayetsnāpayeddevo gaṃdhatoyairdinatrayam ||
tāmrakuṃbhe.arcayeddevīṃ tridinaṃ prātareva hi || 6 ||
samīraṇaṃ tato dadyātpeṭikāyāṃ niveśayet ||
tato.api gandhatoyaiśca snāpayetkanyakādibhiḥ|| || 7 ||
tato vai cāṣṭamadine rātrāvapi prapūjayet ||
paśudānaṃ prakartavyamagnikāryaṃ ca pāyasaiḥ || 8 ||
śivaliṅgapratiṣṭhāṃ ca vakṣye taṃtramataṃ yathā ||
trivipraṃ bhojayedviprā adhivāsyaṃ viśeṣataḥ || 9 ||
nityaṃ samāpya ca punaḥ kuryādabhyudayaṃ tataḥ ||
ācāryaṃ varayetprātaḥ snāpayetpūrvavartmanā ||2.3.19.10||
parivāragaṇaiḥ sārddhamarcayettadanaṃtaram ||
dadyātsamīraṇaṃ paścādagnikāryaṃ samācaret || 11 ||
tilahemamayīṃ gāṃ ca dadyādgāṃ ca vidhānataḥ ||
na nāma na ca gotraṃ ca homakarmaṇi sarvadā || 12 ||
pūrṇimāyāṃ viśeṣeṇa nānyeṣāṃ ca kathaṃcana ||
homāṃte vasudhārāṃ ca kuṃbhe dattvā vidhānataḥ || 13 ||
trihastacarakāyaṃ ca hastaikaṃ caturhastake ||
śālaśamaśilāyāśca pratiṣṭhāṃ vidhivaccaret || 14 ||
sadyodhivāsayeddevaṃ dvādaśyāṃ snāpayedatha ||
ratnatoyaiḥ parimalaistrigaṃdhaiḥ paṃcapallavaiḥ || 15 ||
kuṃbhe prajāpatiṃ sthāpya śvetābjaṃ navanābhake ||
navadurgoktamārgeṇa pūjayetparameśvaram || 16 ||
cakrasvarūpato jñeyaṃ pradadyācca samīraṇam ||
ānīya tāmrabhāṃḍe ca trikālaṃ pratipūjayet ||17||
pāyasānnairutpalairvā paṅkajairvāpi homayet ||
sakāñcanaṃ vastrayugmaṃ prada dyādbhūridakṣiṇam || 18 ||
śrīsūryasya gaṇeśasya viriñceścāpi sattamāḥ ||
vaṭavṛkṣāṃtikaṃ gatvā sthāpayedvaruṇaṃ tataḥ || 19 ||
raktābje pūjayetsūryaṃ parivārasamanvitam ||
aṣṭāviṃśatibhirddattvā dadyātprāṇamanaṃtaram || 2.3.19.20 ||
ekāhamathavākāśe guptaṃ kṛtvā dinatrayam ||
tryahādeva punaḥ pūjāṃ punarhomaṃ samācaret || 21 ||
punaśca bhojayedviprāndadyātkāñcanadakṣiṇām ||
vārāhyāstripurāyāśca nārikelodakairapi ||22||
sthāpayedvā vidhānena sindūrādyaiḥ samarcayet ||
dadyātsamīraṇaṃ paścātpunaḥ pūjāṃ ca homayet || 23 ||
paśujñānaṃ ca kartavyaṃ ṣaṇmāsaiḥ pañcamodakaiḥ ||
kumārīṃ bhojayedrātrau dadyātkāñcana dakṣiṇām || 24 ||
pratimāṃ bhuvaneśīṃ ca mahāmāyāmbikāmapi ||
kāmākṣīṃ ca tato devīmindrākṣīṃ cāparājitām || 25 ||
pūrvedyū rātrisamaye piṣṭa kāṣṭau nivedayet ||
aṣṭau nirmāṇayetpaścādbaliṃ cāṣṭau vidhānavit || 26 ||
parivāragaṇaiḥ sārddhaṃ pūjayetprayataḥ sudhīḥ ||
samīraṇaṃ tato dadyācchivaṃ sūryaṃ yajetpunaḥ || 27 ||
pāyasānnaiśca juhuyāttridinaṃ lipipūjanam ||
kumārīpūjanaṃ kuryādagnikāryaṃ dinatrayam || 28 ||
paśudānaṃ ca kartavyaṃ vibhave sati sattamāḥ ||
rātrau jāgaraṇaṃ kuryānmaṭhotsavapuraḥsaram ||29||
iti śrībhaviṣye mahāpurāṇe madhyamaparvaṇi tṛtīyabhāge ekonaviṃśo.adhyāyaḥ ||19|| ||
grahopadravotpātaśāntivarṇanam
|| sūta uvāca || ||
durnimittānyatho vakṣye śṛṇvaṃtu munisattamāḥ ||
yasya ye grahadoṣāḥ syusteṣāṃ śāṃtiṃ yathākramāt || 1 ||
divyaṃtarikṣe bhaume cetyevaṃ triḥ parikīrtitam ||
graharkṣādyaiḥ kṛtaṃ divyamāntarikṣaṃ nibodha me || 2 ||
ulkāhito diśo dāhaḥ pariveṣastathaiva ca ||
jalāśayānāṃ vai kṛtyaṃ bhaumaṃ tadapi kīrtitam || 3 ||
bhaumaṃ cālpaphalaṃ jñeyaṃ divyāntarikṣameva ca ||
saptāhamaphalaṃ dadyāddaivaṃ cāpi ca tatkṣaṇāt || 4 ||
devānāṃ hasanaṃ caiva kalkanaṃ rudhirasravaḥ ||
akasmādvyasanaṃ tatra yatra nirghātanirdayaḥ ||
sarpādyārohaṇaṃ caiva daivaṃ tadapi kīrtitam || 5 ||
tato meghātsamutpannā yadi vṛṣṭiḥ śilātale ||
saptāhābhyaṃtare jīvamutpannaṃ niṣphalaṃ bhavet || 6 ||
ekarāśisthitāḥ pāpāḥ śanibhaumadivākarāḥ ||
pṛthvī dhūmākulā tatra rudaṃti bahavo janāḥ ||7||
abhicāraṃ gate jīve śanau ca tatra nāgate ||
tatra paśyati rājendraḥ ko dharāṃ dhārayiṣyati||8||
sūryamapaśyano dvaṃdvaṃ digdāhaśca tathaiva ca ||
darśanaṃ dhūmaketośca nakṣatre dhūmadarśanam || 9 ||
bhūkampa eva māse ca ekamāse tathā dine ||
rājño janmadine vātha śakracāpaṃ dināṃtare || 2.3.20.10 ||
darśanaṃ kharavātasya grahayuddhasya darśanam ||
māsatraye tu grahaṇamulkāpātaprapātanam || 11 ||
ākāśe.apyatha bhūmau ca tatra maṇḍūkameva ca ||
haridrāvṛṣṭiḥ pāṣāṇe siṃhabilvākṛtiryadi ||
darśane rāṣṭradurbhikṣamakaraṃ nṛpatikṣayaḥ || 12||
caitre kumbhe nadīvegadarśane viplavo bhavet ||
arka syādbhutametaddhi srugyuktaṃ śrapayeccarum || 13 ||
ākṛṣṇeneti mantreṇa atha vārkeṇa yatnataḥ ||
prāsādatoraṇaṃ tatra dvāraṃ prākāraveśma ca || 14 ||
dhānyasāraṃ gavāṃ sāraṃ kūpe kumbhapradarśanam ||
ādityasyādbhutaṃ vidyātkamalaṃ juhuyāttataḥ ||15||
sahasraṃ juhuyādvātha tataḥ śāṃtirbhaveddhruvam ||
vikṛtāḥ pakṣiṇaścaiva pāṃḍukapotakāstataḥ || 16 ||
śvetolūko bṛhaṃścaiva droṇakākaśca kokilaḥ ||
krauṃcaśca varddhanī caiva nipataṃti gṛhe yadi || 17 ||
gṛhe tasya mahotpāto bhaviṣyati na saṃśayaḥ ||
sthūlabhaṅgapragrahaṇaṃ prarohaṇamathāpi vā || 18 ||
hārāḥ kaṭakaṭāyaṃte jātasya daṃtasambhavaḥ ||
hasatā devatānāṃ ca gātre svedaśca jāyate ||
sarpamaṇḍūkaprasavaḥ kuṃbhe vāpi kvacidbhavet || 19 ||
nimittānyevamādīni jāyaṃte yasya veśmani ||
ṣaḍbhirmāsaiśca mriyate gṛhiṇī ca śubhā ca yā ||2.3.20.20||
aśaniḥ patate yatra gṛhe vajraṃ ca pādape ||
śuklā vahnisphuliṃgāśca tasya viddhi mahadbhayam ||21||
kharjūra udarāvarte nikocagarale.api ca ||
phalivṛkṣe tinduke ca yatra nirjāyate kvacit ||22||
udyāne devagehe ca svagṛhe caityavṛkṣake ||
kuryādādityavāre vā ayutaṃ tilapāyasam ||
tataḥ śāṃtirbhavedāśu dhenuṃ dadyācca dakṣiṇām || 23 ||
pāyasaṃ tilamudgau ca puṣpaṃ vā tālavṛntakam ||
ikṣumodakapiṇyākāñjuhuyādravimuddiśan || 24 ||
siṃhāsanaṃ rathacchatraṃ dhvajaścāmarabhūṣite ||
akasmāddṛśyate yatra rājño vānyatra kutracit || 25 ||
nadayaṃti ca satyasyojjvalanaṃ strīpuruṣayoḥ ||
āgamasya ca dṛṣṭvaiva bhaṃgaḥ kaṭakaṭāyanam || 26 ||
upariṣṭādbhavedyasya mahotpāto bhavedayam ||
calatvaṃ cādharasyāpi tathā kaṭakaṭāyanam || 27 ||
ruditaṃ kokilasyāpi ulūkopyaśubhaṃ vadet ||
rājāmātyavināśāya mahīṃ ca tatsuto.api vā ||
hastino madayuktāśca mriyaṃte nātra saṃśayaḥ || 28 ||
tāḍīpūgādayo yatra yamau syātāṃ pramādataḥ ||
gehī tatra vinaśyeta sadāraḥ putrasaṃyutaḥ || 29 ||
baddhapuṣpe yadā puṣpaṃ phalaṃ vā yadi dṛśyate ||
akṣatādarśanāttatra somasyādbhutadarśanam ||
dadhi madhu ghṛtaṃ caiva juhuyādayutaṃ dvijāḥ ||2.3.20.30||
pālāśaṃ somamuddiśya somasya ca bhaveddine ||
imaṃdevā iti maṃtreṇa somāya śrapayeccarum ||31||
utpataṃti gṛhe yasya yavā māṣāśca puṣkalāḥ ||
dadhikṣīrājyapākeṣu rudhiraṃ dṛśyate yadi ||32||
akasmādgṛhadāhastu anagnijvalanaṃ yathā ||
meghahīnā bhavedvidyudvṛṣasyodgamanaṃ tathā ||33||
vyādhilīnā vinaśyaṃti nikhilāḥ paśumānuṣāḥ ||
evaṃ sarvāṇi bhūtāni bhavaṃtyakārake dhruvam || 34
rājāmātyavināśāya gehe gehī vinaśyati ||
prāṇanāśāya viprāyāhutyā ca prabhavaṃti hi || 35 ||
dṛṣṭvā vābhadramatyugraṃ juhuyādayutaṃ kramāt ||
dadhimadhughṛtairyuktaṃ khādirodumbare.api ca || 36 ||
agnirmūddheṃti maṃtreṇa śrapitaṃ lohitaṃ carum ||
triviprānbhojayeddadyāddakṣiṇāṃ lohitaṃ tataḥ ||
svarṇamaṃgāramuddiśya tataḥ śāṃtiḥ prajāyate || 37 ||
puṣpaṃ vā pātayedyatra phalaṃ vāpi tathaiva ca ||
dadhyannaṃ ca ghṛtairmiśraṃ raupyaṃ hiraṇyameva ca ||38||
hastyaśvamahiṣā gāvo dārāpatyadhanāni ca ||
tuṣṭenāṃgārakeṇaiva sarvametatpradīyatām||
āṃgārakeṇa maṃtreṇa khādiraṃ cākṣatairyutam|| || 39 ||
dakṣiṇāṃ ca yathāśakti dadyādviprāya vā punaḥ ||
lohitaṃ ca baliṃ dadyāttataḥ saṃpadyate śubham ||2.3.20.40||
dhāvaṃti cordhvapucchāśca gṛhe gāvaḥ svayaṃ yadi ||
ārohaṃti gṛhaṃ viprāḥ sārameyāśca sūkarāḥ|| 41 ||
gṛhe yasya bhavaṃtyete tasya bhāryā vinaśyati ||
sarveṣāṃ vā bhavenmṛtyurvaṃdhyā gaurvā prajāyate ||42||
mithyāvādena gehī ca rājñā vādaiśca tiṣṭhati ||
atha vā yadgṛhe gāvo nardayaṃti hasaṃti ca ||43||
dharaṇīhananaṃ yatra dvayorāskadanaṃ tathā ||
nimittānyevamādīni gośvajātāni sattamāḥ ||44||
yasya gehe bhavaṃtyete nāśastasya bhaveddhruvam ||
maṇḍūkasarpakūṣmāṃḍāḥ prasuvaṃti yathā striyaḥ ||45||
akasmādyadi caitāni budhasyotpātalakṣaṇam ||
śāṃtiṃ tatra pravakṣyāmi yathā saṃpadyate sukham || 46 ||
dadhimadhughṛtāktaṃ ca apāmārgaṃ tathā punaḥ ||
ayutaṃ budhavāre ca juhuyācchraddhayā yutaḥ || 47 ||
aṃbaketi ca maṃtreṇa budhāya śrapayeccarum ||
suvarṇaṃ budhamuddiśya gāṃ ca dadyātpayasvinīm || 48 ||
suvarṇaṃ puṣpavṛṣṭiṃ ca suphalaṃ cākṣataṃ tathā ||
gṛhe prāṃgaṇake yasya nipataṃti kadācana ||49||
alaṃkārayutāṃ vāpi sarvābharaṇabhūṣitām ||
gṛhamadhye tu yaḥ paśye tkṣīṇāmaṃtarhitāṃ striyam || 2.3.20.50 ||
akasmānmālatīpuṣpaṃ jātaṃ syāttasya vā gṛhe ||
somāya na ca saṃtuṣṭaḥ sarvametatpradṛśyate || 51 ||
dhanaṃ dhānyaṃ tathā putra aiśvaryaṃ ca varastriyaḥ ||
sabhṛtyāśca mahiṣyaśca mariṣyaṃti na saṃśayaḥ ||52||
śrīścateti ca mantreṇa apāmārgaṃ tathā budhaḥ ||
sahasraṃ budhavāre ca juhuyād ghṛtasaṃyutam || 53 ||
payasvinīṃ tathā gāṃ ca vāsoyugasamanvitam ||
dvijāya śraddhayā dadyāttataḥ saṃpadyate śubham|| 54 ||
raktasrāvo bhavedyatra tatra ṛtvikprasūyate ||
siṃhavyāghragavādīnāṃ dhanahānivipatkaraḥ || 55 ||
eko vṛṣastrayo gāvaḥ saptāṣṭa nava daṃtinaḥ ||
saṃvatsareṇa tasyaikā prasūtirvihatā punaḥ || 56 ||
punaḥpunarvrataṃ cāśu akāle maithunaṃ tathā ||
gāvo yatra prasūyaṃte yamau doṣakarāvimau || 57 ||
bhuñjīkṛtāni dhānyāni vrīhayo yavataṃḍulāḥ ||
grāvimārjāramaṃḍūkāḥ sthūṇābhaṃge ca prāṅgaṇe || 58 ||
vikiraṃti nakhairbhūmiṃ prarohaṃti grahaṃ tathā ||
gṛhe yasya prajāyaṃte tasyā mṛtyurna saṃśayaḥ || 59 ||
ṣaṇmāsābhyantare yatra śmaśānaṃ yāsyati dhruvam ||
kalahaṃ jñātivairaṃ ca vyādhipīḍā bhaviṣyati || 2.3.20.60 ||
vipralāpo mitra nāśa iṣṭeṣvaniṣṭadarśanam||
bhāryāputravināśaśca bhavedeṣu viniścitam || 61 ||
kriyāvaṃtaṃ yadā kurvankurvīta gṛdhrabilvake ||
tadā rājñāṃ vibhramaśca tathā gṛhavināśanam || 62 ||
amātyavargāśca pure rājñāṃ rājyaparāṅmukhāḥ ||
bṛhaspatiṃ samuddiśya gāṃ ca dadyātpayasvinīm || 63 ||
vārimaṃḍe ca kūpe ca vāpyāṃ ca madhukāṃjike ||
kṣīraṃ dadhighṛtaṃ caiva jātaṃ yadi bhaviṣyati || 64 ||
akasmāttatra vṛkṣaśca phalena saha saṃyutaḥ ||
gṛhamadhye prajāyeta tataḥ saṃpadyate śubham || 65 ||
bṛhaspatestu tuṣṭasya sarvametannidarśanam ||
gauraṃ bṛhaspateścaiva prakuryātprāyadakṣiṇām || 66 ||
aśubhaṃ hi śubhenaiva śāṃtiṃ homaṃ ca kārayet ||
tatraiva rākṣasaṃ yatra ghaṭakaṃ pariśoṣaṇam || 67 ||
kesarī śarkarā tailaṃ rājataṃ tāṃḍavaṃ sthitam ||
māṣabhaktaṃ tathā dhānyaṃ suvarṇaṃ rajatāni ca || 68 ||
tāmraṃ kāṃsyaṃ tathā lohaṃ sīsakaṃ pittalaṃ tathā ||
sthāpitānīva dṛśyaṃte gṛhe caitāni yasya vai || 69 ||
dhananāśo bhavettasya svarga bhaṃgo hyathāpi vā ||
vyādhipīḍe tathā ghore rājopadravabaṃdhane ||
gajāśvapaśubhṛtyānāṃ vināśo jāyate dhruvam || 2.3.20.70 ||
yasyaitāni pradṛśyaṃte parvataḥ kanakāni ca ||
saṃpattasya prajāyeta niścalā sukhadā sadā || 71 ||
daṃtottareṣu daṃtāśca paṃktimākramya saṃsthitāḥ ||
te.api doṣakarāḥ sarve śalā kākṛtinastathā ||
upadaṃtāśca sarve te na te doṣakarāḥ kvacit || 72 ||
bhāṃḍe kuṃbhe yadā caiva śrūyate ghanagarjitam ||
kaṃcukānāṃ gṛhe caiva prākāraḥ śrūyate yadi || 73 ||
mūṣikānāṃ mukhe caiva jvalaṃtī yasya paśyati ||
gehī tatraiva naśyeta śukrasyādbhutadarśanam ||74||
śāṃtiṃ tatra pravakṣyāmi yayā saṃpadyate śubham ||
śamīpatraṃ nirmitaṃ ca yavairyuktaṃ gṛhiṇyapi ||
dadhimadhughṛtāktaṃ ca juhuyādbhārgave dine || 75 ||
śuklavāsoyugaṃ caiva gāṃ ca śuklāṃ payasvinīm ||
suvarṇaṃ śraddhayā caiva dadyādviprāya dakṣiṇām || 76 ||
devāgāre yadā bhūmirlohitā yasya dṛśyate ||
puṣpitā dṛśyate loke tatra viddhi mahadbhayam || 77 ||
rājā vā rājaputro vā rājyaṃ vāpi vinaśyati ||
maṃtriṇo maṃtriputrāśca mriyaṃte nātra saṃśayaḥ ||78||
yatra vā dṛśyate loke gṛhe yasya supūjitāḥ ||
puṣpitāśca gṛhastaṃbhāḥ śarīraṃ ca ghaṭastathā || 79 ||
hastyaśvamahiṣāścaiva ajā gāvastathaiva ca ||
nityaṃ svāmivadhārthāya puṣpitāṃ pravahaṃti ca || 2.3.20.80 ||
gṛhe haṃso gṛhe samyaṅmaṇḍūkā jalacāriṇaḥ ||
dvāre praviśya sarpaśca pratimāyāḥ prakalpanam || 81 ||
akasmāddhaṭaśabdopi yatra kutrāpi jāyate ||
sravaṃti pramadā yatra bhinnāste syurnavāṃgikāḥ || 82 ||
gṛhī tatra vinaśyeta saputrapaśubāṃdhavaḥ ||
dhanuḥkhaḍgadharā rātrau madhyāhne cāndrake tathā || 83 ||
udito dṛśyate vyomni jvalitaḥ pāvakastathā ||
manuṣyāṅganānāṃ maraṇaṃ tathā syādrāṣṭraviplavaḥ || 84 ||
rasasiddhāni vastūni surādyāścāpi vā punaḥ ||
hastino madayuktāśca aśvā dhīritahiṃsakāḥ ||
vinaśyaṃti sadā caite śaneradbhutadarśane || 85 ||
nagare vā tathā grāme jāyante tasya vairiṇaḥ ||
divā vā yadi vā rātrau śaneradbhutadarśanam || 86 ||
mṛgavyāghrādirakṣāṃsi tathā gomahiṣā api ||
utpataṃti yadā caite śaneradbhutamādiśet || 87 ||
nidhimaṃtraṃ pravakṣyāmi yena saṃpadyate śubham ||
juhuyādayutaṃ samyaksasyāṃśca samidhaṃ dvijāḥ || 88 ||
śanno devīti maṃtreṇa śubhārthaṃ śanivāsare ||
caruṃ ca śrapayettatra samuddiśya śanaiścaram || 89 ||
gāṃ ca nīlāṃ tato dadyājjīvadvatsāṃ payasvinīm ||
vāsoyugaṃ ca viprāya suvarṇaṃ rajataṃ tathā || 2.3.20.90 ||
dattvā tu śraddhayā samyagdakṣiṇāṃ śirasi sthitām ||
vidhiṃ homāvasāne tu tataḥ saṃpadyate śubham || 91 ||
yadā dvāre godhikā ca śaṃkhinī praviśedgṛham ||
tadā.aśubhaṃ vijānīyādrājapīḍā dhanakṣayaḥ ||
ayutaṃ juhuyātsamyaktataḥ saṃpadyate śubham || 92 ||
vinā garjitameghena śilāvṛṣṭiḥ prajāyate ||
raktamiśrā hi pāṃḍuśca patantī yatra dṛśyate || 93 ||
tatra saṃdṛśyate cābhraṃ vṛkṣā vātavivarjitāḥ ||
śakradhvajastathā cāpaṃ patanaṃ sumanasya ca || 94 ||
divā śivā purā rauti ulūko vā niśācaraḥ ||
niśi nipatya kākutsthe pradeśe rauti vā vṛṣaḥ || 95 ||
adharmaprabalā deśā rājā dharmaparāṅmukhaḥ ||
anyonyaṃ ca jighāṃsaṃti gobrāhmaṇamathāpi vā || 96 ||
gṛhe gṛhī vinaśyecca saputrapaśubāṃdhavaḥ ||
utsānaṃ dvāradeśe.asya maraṇaṃ rāṣṭravibhramaḥ || 97 ||
rājyanāśo bhavedrājño maraṇaṃ vāhanasya ca ||
viparītāni deśāni kramataḥ saṃbhavaṃti hi || 98 ||
rāhuṇā grastasūryo.api niśi cātha yadā divā ||
tārakāgaṇavaccaiva rājñāṃ nidhanakārakaḥ || 99 ||
sahāmātyā vinaśyaṃti svarge ye ca sudurjayāḥ ||
paracakreṇa pātyaṃte rājāno nātra saṃśayaḥ || 2.3.20.100 ||
chāyādhvajaśca gagane dṛśyate cetkadācana ||
darśanādeva rājñastu vināśaḥ saharāṣṭrakaiḥ || 101 ||
jvalito dṛśyate yatra pāvakaśca sakṛjjale ||
vajre śirasi gātre vā jīvitaṃ tasya durlabham || 102 ||
dvāropāṃte tathā staṃbhe āgnirvā dhūma eva vā ||
puruṣasya tu tatraiva maraṇaṃ jāyate dhruvam || 103 ||
gagane.aśanighātaśca śaktihastena vā punaḥ ||
abdasyābhyaṃtare tasya maraṇaṃ nātra saṃśayaḥ ||104||
śikhāvalayamadhye tu sadhūmaḥ pāvakodgamaḥ ||
dṛśyate nagare madhye tatraivādbhutadarśanam || 105 ||
śavasya nīyamānasya utthānaṃ vā pramādataḥ ||
sthāpitasya ca liṃgasya anyatra gamanaṃ tathā || 106 ||
nirghātaścāpi bhūkaṃpo nivātolkāpradarśanam ||
akāle puṣpitā vṛkṣāḥ phalaṃ cākālasaṃbhavam || || 107 ||
animittāni sarvāṇi dūramāgatya nirbharam ||
animittasya nāśo yaḥ saiṃhikeyakṛtasya ca || 108 ||
narāṇāmāsanaṃ caiva gavāṃ vā mānuṣīgirā ||
pakṣamātrāṃtare tasya putrasya maraṇaṃ diśet || 109 ||
ayutaṃ juhuyāttatra rāhumuddiśya yatnataḥ ||
śāṃtimatra pravakṣyāmi yayā saṃpadyate śubham || 2.3.20.110 ||
dadhimadhughṛtāktaṃ ca kuryāddūrvākṣataṃ tathā ||
kalāyu iti mantreṇa juhuyādravivāsare || 111 ||
caruṃ ca śrapayettatra rāhumudiśya saṃśrayāt ||
homaṃ kuryāttato gāṃ ca kapilāṃ ca payasvinīm || 112 ||
atasī tilaśaṃkhau vā vāsoyugamathāpi vā ||
śraddhayā rāhumuddiśya dadyādviprāya dakṣiṇām || 113 ||
duritasya vināśāya tasya saṃpadyate śubham ||
dadhimadhughṛtakṣīreṇa vāruṇena ca vāruṇe || 114 ||
dṛśyate cādbhutaṃ teṣu viśiṣṭairdoṣadarśibhiḥ ||
gṛhī tatra vinaṣṭaśca bhavetsapaśubāṃdhavaḥ ||115||
dṛśyaṃte tatra krauñcāśca jaṃbukā gṛdhravāyasāḥ ||
dāruṇaṃ bhīṣaṇaṃ ghoraṃ nṛtyaṃti ca hasaṃti ca ||1 16||
maithunāni ca sarveṣāṃ yasya vāse bhavedyadi ||
mṛtyustasya bhavedāśu īśvarasya ca śāsanāt || 117 ||
dhūmaketuryadā vyomni jvalatpāvaka sannibhaḥ ||
sthānātsthānāṃtaraṃ yāti bhūmau vā patate bhṛśam ||
sabaṃdhurasyate rājā paracakraiḥ sa pīḍitaḥ || 118 ||
durbhikṣaṃ maraṇaṃ caiva ciraṃ rāṣṭre bhaviṣyati ||
gāvo markaṭakuṃbhā va viśaṃte gṛhaveśmani || 119 ||
gāvaśca tasya naśyaṃti dārāpatyadhanāni ca ||
anyasya doṣo bhavati gṛhe yāṃti pramādataḥ || 2.3.20.120 ||
abdāṃtare bhavenmṛtyurvirajā hi bhaviṣyati ||
śāṃtimatra pravakṣyāmi yayā saṃpadyate śubham || 121 ||
saptāśvarathasaṃyuktaṃ hemacchatravibhūṣitam ||
viprāya maṃḍapaṃ dadyādbilvapatramathāpi vā || 122 ||
aiṃdreṇaiva tu mantreṇa homaḥ kāryo dvijātibhiḥ ||
akasmācchālatālākṣakhadirotpalaserakāḥ || 123 ||
gṛhamadhye prajāyeta ketoradbhutadarśanam ||
haṃso vā droṇakāko vā mayūro vā gṛhopari || 124 ||
gṛhe tasya mahotpātaḥ ketoradbhutadarśanam ||
śāṃtimatra pravakṣyāmi yayā saṃpadyate śubham||125||
dadhimadhughṛtāktaṃ ca juhuyādayutaṃ kuśam||
tryaṃbakaṃ ceti mantreṇa ketavebhivape ccarum || 126 ||
nīlāṃ dhenuṃ savatsāṃ ca bahukṣīrapradāṃ tathā ||
mṛttikāṃ hemavāsaśca nānālaṃkārameva ca || 127 ||
dakṣiṇāṃ ca pravakṣyāmi yasya nāsti pratikriyā ||
devamuddiśya dānena homena caruṇā tathā || 128 ||
dakṣiṇasyāṃ diśi cchāyāṃ yaḥ paśyedātmanaḥ svayam ||
svacchāyāṃ pādukasyaiva paśyetpañcaśirodvayam || 129 ||
evamevaiva yacchinnaṃ śinaṣṭi ca tato hitam ||
śīghraṃ nāśamavāpnoti saptāhānnātra saṃśayaḥ || 2.3.20.130 ||
uccāvacānpravakṣyāmi yathā śāstreṇa coditam ||
kākamārjāraśūkānāṃ kapotānāṃ viśeṣataḥ ||
maithunaṃ dṛśyate yatra tacca rāhormahādbhutam || 131 ||
śanimuddiśya juhuyādayutaṃ śanivāsare ||
pūjayedarkapuṣpeṇa śatena juhuyāccarum || 132 ||
kṛtvā tatraiva paśyeta śaneradbhutadarśanam ||
aṣṭāviṃśaṃ caruṃ kṛtvā tataḥ śāṃtirbhaveddhruvam 133 ||
bhujapadostathā cakṣuḥspaṃdane maraṇaṃ diśet ||
tattu somādbhutaṃ vidyādvāmadakṣiṇataḥ kramāt || 134 ||
kṛṣṇapakṣe bhavedvāme viparīte.adbhutaṃ diśet ||
aniṣṭasūcakaṃ yasmāttasmācchāṃtiṃ prakalpayet||135||
śatārddhaṃ ravimuddiśya śāntyarthe homamācaret ||
carupākavidhānena yavaistilasusarpiṣā || 136 ||
pustake yajñasūtraṃ ca asatpātre carau tu vā ||
śakravastrapradagdhe ca sūryasyādbhutadarśanam || 137 ||
hayamāraṃ trimadhvaktaṃ juhuyādiṣṭasiddhaye ||
devapustakaratnāni maṇikāṃcanameva ca || 138 ||
lohitasyādbhutaṃ vidyātsahasraṃ ca viśodhanam ||
devāgāre tathā godhā śaṃkhinī praviśetkvacit || 139 ||
droṇakāko bakaścaiva ulūkadvayameva ca ||
raktakaṃṭhaḥ kapotaśca vyāghra eṇaśca vā viśet || 2.3.20.140 ||
yasya devagṛhaṃ paśyettasya tasyāyutaṃ hunet ||
na cātra gṛhavaikṛtyaṃ hasanaṃ yadi dṛśyate ||
saṃpattisūcakaṃ gehe maraṇaṃ duḥkhadarśanam || 141 ||
kraṃdane hatarājyena gajāśvavāhane kvacit ||
sūryamuddiśya juhuyādayutaṃ sarvasiddhaye || 142 ||
pramādātkaṃpane hāniḥ svede jāte vipadbhavet ||
kṣīrasrāve ca rudhire tatra rājye mahadbhayam || 143 ||
gocchāgau vātha gomāyurgṛhopari pranṛtyati ||
yadā rauti divā pherustadā nāśo bhaveddhruvam || 144 ||
śvajaṃbukāvatha vyāghro yathāśakti ca dhāvati ||
īśāne mahiṣastadvattadā deśe ca viplavaḥ || 145 ||
rāhoradbhutamudiśya sahasraṃ juhuyāccarum ||
vṛkṣādbhutaṃ yadā paśyettatra tasyāṃ parityajet ||
yadgṛheṣu hutaṃ yāti deśaviplavamādiśet || || 146 ||
deśe vā nagare grāme āraṇyapaśubandhanam ||
sarpe vā viparītaṃ ca māṃsapiṃḍamathāpi vā ||
tadgṛhe maraṇaṃ caiva deśa viplavamādiśet || 147 ||
divādbhute.ayutaṃ rātrau dviguṇaṃ ca bhaveddhruvam ||
dviguṇaṃ cāpi saṃdhyāyāmardharātre caturguṇam || 148 ||
akāle tatra maraṇamakāle gṛhiṇīmṛtiḥ ||
saurādbhutaṃ vijānīyādaśubhe vā viśodhanam || 149 ||
ekaikasyāyutaṃ yatra kuryāttatraiva homayet ||
sāṃgopāṃgena sahita maṣṭāvaṣṭau hutaṃ ca vā || 2.3.20.150 ||
adhipratyadhisahitaṃ gṛhapakṣe.api sattamāḥ ||
tanmānena hutaṃ viprā kuryāttatraiva bhūṣaṇam || 151 ||
ekaikasyāhutaṃ viprā aṣṭāvaṣṭau hutaṃ ca vā ||
adhipratyadhidevānāṃ yāścānyāścāṃgadevatāḥ || 152 ||
mānāṃtaṃ ca dadetpūrṇāṃ dattvā pūrṇāṃ na homayet ||
vakṣye grahamakhe mānaṃ yena mānena sidhyati || 153 ||
amānakaraṇe doṣastasmānmānaṃ na hāpayet ||
paṃkticatvāriṃśadādyaiścaturdhā vibhajennaraḥ || 154||
aniṣṭāya tato dadyāccaruhomaṃ vibhāgaśaḥ ||
adhipratyadhidevānāmaṣṭāvaṣṭa hyudāhṛtam ||155 ||
tryaṃbakādiṣu maṃtreṣu homatrayamudāhṛtam ||
dhanaṃjaye tathā dadyāccaruhomaṃ vibhāgataḥ || 156 ||
ādityāyāṣṭāvaṣṭāvadhikakalpayetsudhīḥ ||
śatahome tu sarvatra daśāṃgaṃ kalpayennaraḥ || 157 ||
aniṣṭāya yugāṃgaṃ tu grahebhyo hyaṃganāya ca ||
adhipratyadhidevānāṃ tathaivāṃgaṃ prakalpayet || 158 ||
dvau tu dadyāttryaṃbakāya tathā dhanaṃjayāya ca ||
tatra homo nāyakāya sarvatraiva vicakṣaṇaḥ || 159 ||
sahasre caiva viṃśāṃge aniṣṭāya daśāṃśakam ||
pañcāṃśena grahāṇāṃ ca pañcāṃśena yavānapi || 2.3.20.160 ||
tatrāniṣṭe paṃcaśataṃ tasyārdhaṃ grahavāgyataḥ ||
ekatriṃśadbhavenmānam ( 31) anyeṣāṃ tu caturdaśa ||161||
grahādhikaṃ homayugaṃ tatra bhāge prakalpayet ||
adhātaye ca tithyaṃgaṃ pañcāṃgaṃ yasya cādbhutam || 162 ||
grahebhyaścaiva paṃcāṃgaṃ tatra vāṃgaṃ parānapi ||
ekaikāṃge bhavenmānaṃ ṣaṭśataṃ ṣaṣṭireva ca || 163 ||
adhikaṃ ca bhavetṣaṣṭirdaśame bhāgaśeṣataḥ ||
aniṣṭāṃśe trisahasraṃ triśataṃ triṃśataṃ tathā || 164 ||
catuḥśataṃ grahāṇāṃ ca tathā saptaśatādhikam ||
upagrahebhyo dadyācca paṃcāśītyadhikaṃ śatam || 165 ||
tithyaṃgabhāgaḥ śeṣeṇa grahe saptaśatādhikam ||
ekaikaṃ tu grahasyaivamādityāya yugaṃ bhavet || 166 ||
grahāṃge yaḥ sthito bhāgo yugalaṃ bhāgaśeṣataḥ ||
tryaṃbakāya ca taddadyāttathā dhanaṃjayāya ca ||167||
śāṃtike pauṣṭike kāmye yadīcchetsukhamātmanaḥ||
grahāṇāṃ cāyutaṃ homaṃ tryahasādhyena homayet || 168 ||
tryahasādhye vidhānaṃ yatpuraivodīritaṃ dvijāḥ ||
idānīṃ prakrameṇaiva yo bhāgaḥ sa nigadyate || 169 ||
pūrvasmindivase.aniṣṭe sahasraṃ triśatottaram ( 1300) ||
itareṣāṃ grahāṇāṃ ca pratyekaṃ tu śataṃ śatam( 100) || 2.3.20.170 ||
adhipratyadhidevānāṃ paṃcāśaddhoma ucyate ||
prathamehni pradadyācca militvā trisahasrakam( 3000) || 171 ||
dvitīyadivase.aniṣṭe dvisahasramudāhṛtam ( 2000) ||
prati grahebhyastriśataṃ dadyādaṣṭa śatādhikam( 108) || 172 ||
upagrahebhyo dadyācca ṣoḍaśabhyo yathākramam ||
ekāśītiṃ dadau yatnādaśītiṃ cāṃtyayordvayoḥ || 173 ||
evaṃ dvitīyadivase militvā ṣaṭsahasrakam ( 6000) ||
aniṣṭāya triśataṃ tu tṛtīyadivase matam||174||
tatpratyekaṃ grahāṇāṃ ca dvācatvāriṃśaducyate ||
adhipratyadhidevānāṃ pratyekaṃ paṃcatriṃśakam || 175 ||
tṛtīyadivase dadyānmilitvaikasahasrakam ( 1000) ||
ādityāya yugaṃ dadyādekaṃ tu tryaṃbakāya ca || 176 ||
dhanaṃjayāya homaikamekaṃ cāyutamucyate ||
tadardhakaṃ grahebhyaśca itarebhyastadardhakam || 177 ||
grahāṇāṃ trisahasraṃ tu paṃcānāṃ ca sahasrakam ||
trisahasrabhāgaśeṣamādityāya sahasrakam || 178 ||
tryaṃbakāya tathā dadyāttathā dhanaṃjayāya ca ||
ṣaṭpādādhika ṣaṭaṣaṭkasahasraparisaṃkhyayā ||
navaślokaśatodbhūtaṃ saṃpūrṇaṃ syādbhaviṣyakam || 179 || ||
iti śrībhaviṣye mahāpurāṇe madhyamaparvaṇi tṛtīyabhāge viṃśo.adhyāyaḥ || 20 || || cha ||
iti tṛtīyabhāgaḥ samāptaḥ ||
iti śrībhaviṣye mahāpurāṇe madhyamaparva samāptam||
||śrīveṅkaṭeśvarārpaṇamastu ||
viṣayānukramaṇikā
iti madhyamaparvasyaviṣayānukramaṇikā || 3 ||

kṛtayugabhūpākhyānam
|| || śrīgaṇeśāya namaḥ || ||
nārāyaṇaṃ namaskṛtya naraṃ caiva narottamam ||
devīṃ sarasvatīṃ vyāsaṃ tato jayamudīrayet ||1||
|| śaunaka uvāca || ||
bhaviṣyākhye mahākalpe brahmāyuṣi parārddhake ||
prathame.abdehni tṛtīye prāpte vaivasvate.antare || 1 ||
aṣṭāviṃśe satyayuge ke rājāno.abhavanmune ||
teṣāṃ rājyasya varṣāṇi tanme vada vicakṣaṇa || 2 ||
|| sūta uvāca || ||
kalpākhye śvetavārāhe brahmābdasya dinatraye ||
prāpte saptamuhūrte ca manurvaivasva to.abhavata || 3 ||
sa taptvā sarayūtīre tapo divyaṃ śataṃ samāḥ ||
tacchikkāto.abhavatputra ikṣvākuḥ sa mahīpatiḥ || 4 ||
brahmaṇo varadānena divyaṃ yānaṃ sa āptavān ||
nārāyaṇaṃ pūjayitvā harau rājyaṃ nivedya ca || 5||
ṣaṭtriṃśacca sahasrāṇāmabdaṃ rājyaṃ tadā.akarot ||
tasmājjāto vikukṣiśca śatahīnaṃ tadabdakam ||6||
rājyaṃ kṛtvā divaṃ yātastasmājjāto ripuṃjayaḥ||
śatahīnaṃ kṛtaṃ rājyaṃ tatkakutsthasutaḥ smṛtaḥ||7||
śatahīnaṃ kṛtaṃ rājyaṃ tato.anenāṃsa ātmajaḥ ||
śatahīnaṃ kṛtaṃ rājyaṃ tasmājjāto nṛpaḥ pṛthuḥ || 8 ||
śatahīnaṃ kṛtaṃ rājyaṃ viṣvagaśvaśca tatsutaḥ ||
śatahīnaṃ kṛtaṃ rājyaṃ tasmādārdro nṛpo.abhavat || 9 ||
śatahīnaṃ kṛtaṃ rājyaṃ bhadrāśvastatsuto.abhavat ||
śatahīnaṃ kṛtaṃ rājyaṃ yuvanāśvastu tatsutaḥ || 3.1.1.10 ||
śatahīnaṃ kṛtaṃ rājyaṃ śravasthastatsuto.abhavat ||
satyapādaśca saṃjātaḥ prathamo bhārate.antare || 11 ||
udayādastaparyaṃtaṃ tairnṛpairbhūmimaṃḍalam ||
bhuktaṃ nītiparairdevaiḥ śravasthena tu bhūtale||
śatahīnaṃ kṛtaṃ rājyaṃ bṛhadaśvastato.abhavat || 12 ||
śatahīnaṃ kṛtaṃ rājyaṃ tasmātkuvalayāśvakaḥ ||
śatahīnaṃ kṛta rājyaṃ dṛḍhāśvastatsuto.abhavat||13||
sahasrahīnaṃ rājyaṃ tattasmātputro nikuṃbhakaḥ ||
sahasrahīnaṃ rājyaṃ tatsaṃkaṭāśvastu tatsutaḥ || 14 ||
sahasrahīnaṃ rājyaṃ tattasmājjātaḥ prasenajit ||
sahasrahīnaṃ rājyaṃ tadravaṇāśvastu tatsutaḥ || 15 ||
sahasrahīnaṃ rājyaṃ tanmāṃdhātā tatsuto.abhavat ||
śatahīnaṃ kṛtaṃ rājyaṃ purukutsastu tatsutaḥ ||16||
śatahīnaṃ kṛtaṃ rājyaṃ triṃśadaśvastu tatsutaḥ ||
rathe yasya smṛtā vāhā vājinastriṃśato varāḥ || 17 ||
anaraṇyastato jāto hyaṣṭāviṃśatsahasrakam ||
rājyaṃ dvitīyacaraṇe smṛtaṃ satyayugasya vai || 18 ||
pṛṣadaśvastato jāto rājyaṃ ṣaṣṭhasahasrakam ||
tadabdaṃ bhūtale kṛtvā pitṛlokamupāyayau || 19 ||
haryaśvastu tato jāto viṣṇubhaktakule nṛpaḥ ||
sahasrahīnaṃ rājyaṃ tattatsuto vasumānsmṛtaḥ || 3.1.1.20 ||
sahasrahīnaṃ rājyaṃ tattridhanvā tanayastataḥ ||
sahasrahīnaṃ rājyaṃ tattena rājñā ca satkṛtam || 21 ||
satyapādaḥ samāpto.ayaṃ dvitīyo bhārate.antare ||
tridhanvanaśca nṛpatestrapāraṇyastu vai sutaḥ || 22 ||
sahasrahīnaṃ rājyaṃ tatkṛtvā svargamupāyayau ||
tasmājjātastriśaṃkuśca rājyaṃ varṣasahasrakam || 23 ||
chadmanā hīnatāṃ jāto hariścaṃdrastu tatsutaḥ ||
rājyaṃ viṃśatsahasraṃ ca rohito nāma tatsutaḥ ||24 ||
pitustulyaṃ kṛtaṃ rājyaṃ hārītastanayo.abhavat ||
pitustulyaṃ kṛtaṃ rājyaṃ caṃcubhūpaśca tatsutaḥ || 25 ||
pitustulyaṃ hi rājyaṃ tadvijayo nāma tatsutaḥ ||
pitustulyaṃ hi rājyaṃ tadrurūkastanayastataḥ || 26 ||
pitustulyaṃ kṛtaṃ rājyaṃ sagarastanayo.abhavat ||
bhūpāśca bāhusenāntā vaiṣṇavāḥ parikīrtitāḥ||27||
rājyamānaṃ kṛtaṃ samyagbhūpairvaivasvatādibhiḥ ||
maṇisvarṇasamṛddhiśca bahvannaṃ bahudugdhakam || 28 ||
pūrṇo dharmastadā bhūmyāṃ mune satyayugasya vai ||
tṛtīyacaraṇe madhye sagaro nāma bhūpatiḥ || 29 ||
śivabhaktaḥ sadācārastatputrāḥ sāgarāḥ smṛtāḥ ||
triṃśatsahasravarṣaṃ tadrājyaṃ vai munibhiḥ smṛtam || 3.1.1.30 ||
naṣṭeṣu sāgareṣvevamasamañjasa ātmajaḥ ||
śatahīnaṃ kṛtaṃ rājyamaṃśumāṃstatsuto.abhavat ||31||
śatahīnaṃ kṛtaṃ rājyaṃ dilīpastatsuto.abhavat ||
śatahīnaṃ kṛtaṃ rājyaṃ tasmājjāto bhagīrathaḥ ||32||
śatahīnaṃ kṛtaṃ rājyaṃ śrutasenastato.abhavat ||
śatahīnaṃ kṛtaṃ rājyaṃ nābhāgastanayastataḥ ||33||
śatahīnaṃ kṛtaṃ rājyamambarīṣastato.abhavat ||
śaivāḥ ṣaṭśrutasenāntā nābhāgo vaiṣṇavo nṛpaḥ || 34 ||
satyapādaḥ samāpto.ayaṃ tṛtīyo bhārateṃtare ||
aṃvarīṣeṇa bhūpena śatahīnaṃ kṛtaṃ padam || 35 ||
caturthe caraṇe tasya cāṣṭādaśa sahasrakam ||
abdaṃ rājyaṃ śubhaṃ jñātaṃ karmabhūmyāṃ ca bhārate || 36 ||
ekonatriṃśadvarṣāṇi rājyaṃ tattriṃśatāni ca ||
śatahīnaṃ kṛtaṃ rājyaṃ siṃdhudvīpo.ambarīṣajaḥ || 37 ||
śatahīnaṃ kṛtaṃ rājyamayutāśvastato.abhavat ||
śatahīnaṃ kṛtaṃ rājyamṛtuparṇastu tatsutaḥ || 38 ||
śatahīnaṃ kṛtaṃ rājyaṃ sarvakāmo nṛpastataḥ ||
śatahīnaṃ kṛtaṃ rājyaṃ nṛpaḥ kalmāṣapādakaḥ || 39 ||
śatahīnaṃ kṛtaṃ rājyaṃ sudāsastanayo.abhavat||
tasmādaśamakaścaiva madayantyā vaśiṣṭhajaḥ || 3.1.1.40 ||
śatahīnaṃ kṛtaṃ rājyaṃ harivarmā tato.abhavat ||
sapta bhūpāḥ sudāsāntā vaiṣṇavāḥ parikīrtitāḥ ||41||
guruśāpāttu saudāso rājyāṅgaṃ gurave.arpayat ||
gokarṇaliṃgabhaktaśca śaivaḥ samaya ucyate || 42 ||
harivarmā śamakajo vaiśyavatsādhupūjakaḥ ||
ūnatriṃśatsahasrāṇi tathā saptaśatāni vai || 43 ||
harivarmā.akarodrājyaṃ tasmāddaśaratho.abhavat ||
pitustulyaṃ kṛtaṃ rājyaṃ tasmāddillīvayassutaḥ || 44 ||
pitustulyaṃ kṛtaṃ rājyaṃ bhṛpo viśvāsahastataḥ ||
rājyaṃ daśasahasraṃ tanniyajñaḥ prākṛto nṛpaḥ || 45 ||
tadadharmapratāpena hyanāvṛṣṭistadā.abhavat ||
śatavarṣamanā vṛṣṭissarvarājyaṃ vyanāśayat || 46 ||
yajñaṃ kṛtvā vaśiṣṭhastu rājñīvacanatatparaḥ ||
yajñātkhaṭvāṃga utpannaḥ khaṭvāṃgaṃ śastramudvahan || 47 ||
indrasāhāyyamagamadrājyaṃ triṃśatsahasrakam ||
kṛtvā ṭatra varaṃ labdhvā devebhyo muktitāṃ gataḥ .|| 48 ||
khaṭṭāṃgāddīrghabāhuśca rājyaṃ viṃśatsa hasrakam ||
tasmātsudarśano jāto devīpūjanatatparaḥ || 49 ||
vaiṣṇavā dāśarathyaṃ tāstrayo vikhyātasadbalāḥ ||
khaṭvāṃgo dīrghabāhuśca vaiṣṇavau parikīrtitau || 3.1.1.50 ||
sudarśano mahāprājñaḥ kāśīrājasutāṃ nṛpaḥ ||
udūhya bhūpatīñjitvā devīsevāprasādataḥ|| ||
rājyaṃ bharatakhaṇḍāntamadadhaddharmato nṛpaḥ ||
varṣapañcasahasrāṇi rājyaṃ cakre sa bhūpatiḥ || 52 ||
svapnamadhye vacaḥ proktaṃ mahākālyā nṛpāya vai ||
vatsa tvaṃ priyayā sārddhaṃ vaśiṣṭhādibhiranvitaḥ || 53 ||
himālayaṃ giriṃ prāpya vāsaṃ kuru mahāmate ||
mahāvāyuprabhāvena kṣayo bharatakhaṃḍake || 54 ||
ratnākaraḥ paścimo.abdhistasya dvīpāḥ kṣayaṃ gatāḥ ||
mahodadhiḥ pūrvato.abdhistasya dvīpāḥ kṣayaṃ gatāḥ || 55 ||
vāḍavo.abdhirdakṣiṇe ca tasya dvīpāḥ kṣayaṃ gatāḥ ||
himābdhiruttare tasya sagaraiḥ khanito hi saḥ || 56 ||
ye dvīpāstu suvikhyātāste.api sarve layaṃ gatāḥ ||
bhārato varṣa evāsau vatsare saptame.ahani || 57 ||
sajīvaḥ pralayaṃ yāyāttasmāttvaṃ jīvito bhava ||
tatheti matvā sa nṛpaḥ parvataṃ vai himālayam || 58 ||
prāptavānmukhyabhūpaiśca mukhyavaiśyairdvijaiḥ saha ||
pañcavarṣapramāṇena vāyustejaḥkramājjalam || 59 ||
śarkarā ca mahīṃ prāptāstato jīvāḥ kṣayaṃ gatāḥ ||
paṃcavarṣamite kāle jalaṃ jātā vasuṃdharā ||3.1.1.60||
śāṃto bhūtvā punarvāyurjalaṃ sarvamaśoṣayat ||
daśavarṣāṃtare bhūmiḥ sthalī bhūtvā pradṛśyate || 61 || ||
iti śrībhaviṣye mahāpurāṇe pratisargaparvaṇi caturyugakhaṃḍāparaparyāye kṛtayugabhūpākhyānaṃ nāma prathamo.adhyāyaḥ || 1 || || cha ||
tretāyugabhūpākhyānavarṇanam
|| sūta uvāca || ||
vaiśākhaśuklapakṣe tu tṛtīyāguruvāsare ||
sudarśano janaiḥ sārddhamayodhyāmagamatpunaḥ || 1 ||
māyādevīprabhāveṇa puraṃ sarvaṃ manoharam ||
mahāvṛddhiyutaṃ prāptaṃ bahvannaṃ sarvaratnakam || 2 ||
daśavarṣa sahasrāṇi rājyaṃ kṛtvā sudarśanaḥ ||
prāptavāñchāśvataṃ lokaṃ dilīpastatsuto.abhavat || 3 ||
nandinīvaradānena tatputro raghuruttamaḥ ||
daśavarṣasahasrāṇi dilīpo rājyasatkṛtaḥ || 4 ||
rājyaṃ kṛtaṃ ca raghuṇā dilīpānte pitussamam ||
raghuvaṃśastataḥ khyātastretāyāṃ bhṛgunandana || 5 ||
viprasya varadānena tatputro.aja iti smṛtaḥ ||
pitustulyaṃ kṛtaṃ rājyaṃ tasmāddaśaratho.abhavat || 6 ||
pitustulyaṃ kṛtaṃ rājyaṃ tasmādrāmo hariḥ svayam ||
ekādaśa sahasrāṇi rāmarājyaṃ prakīrtitam || 7 ||
tasya putraḥ kuśo nāma rājyaṃ daśasahasrakam ||
atithirnāma tatputraḥ kṛtaṃ rājyaṃ pituḥ samam || 8 ||
nibandho nāma tatputraḥ kṛtaṃ rājyaṃ pitussamam ||
tasmājjāto nalo nāma tretāyāṃ śaktipūjakaḥ ||9||
pitustulyaṃ kṛtaṃ rājyaṃ tasmānnābhaḥ suto.abhavat ||
pitustulyaṃ kṛtaṃ rājyaṃ puṃḍarīkaḥ suto.abhavat || 3.1.2.10 ||
pitustulyaṃ kṛtaṃ rājyaṃ kṣemadhanvā tu tatsutaḥ ||
pitustulyaṃ kṛtaṃ rājyaṃ dvārako nāma tatsutaḥ || 11 ||
pitustulyaṃ kṛtaṃ rājyaṃ tasmājjāto hyahīnajaḥ ||
pitustulyaṃ kṛtaṃ rājyaṃ kururnāma sutastataḥ ||12||
kurukṣetraṃ kṛtaṃ tena tretāyāṃ śatayo janam ||
tretāpādassamāpto.ayaṃ prathamo bhārate.antare || 13 ||
pitustulyaṃ kṛtaṃ rājyaṃ pāriyātraḥ suto.abhavat ||
pitustulyaṃ kṛtaṃ rājyaṃ dalapālassutastataḥ || 14 ||
pitustulyaṃ kṛtaṃ rājyaṃ chadmakārī tu tatsutaḥ ||
pitustulyaṃ kṛtaṃ rājyaṃ tasmādukthaḥ suto.abhavat || 15 ||
pitustulyaṃ kṛtaṃ rājyaṃ vajranābhistato.abhavat ||
pitustulyaṃ kṛtaṃ rājyaṃ śaṃkhanābhistato.abhavat || 16 ||
pitustulyaṃ kṛtaṃ rājyaṃ vyutthanābhistato.abhavat ||
pitustulyaṃ kṛtaṃ rājyaṃ viśvapālastato.abhavat || 17 ||
pitustulyaṃ kṛtaṃ rājyaṃ svarṇanābhistu tatsutaḥ ||
pitustulyaṃ kṛtaṃ rājyaṃ puṣpasenastu tatsutaḥ || || 18 ||
pitustulyaṃ kṛtaṃ rājyaṃ dhruvasaṃdhistu tatsutaḥ ||
pitustulyaṃ kṛtaṃ rājyamapavarmā tu tatsutaḥ || 19 ||
pitustulyaṃ kṛtaṃ rājyaṃ śīghragantā tu tatsutaḥ ||
pitustulyaṃ kṛtaṃ rājyaṃ marupālastu tatsutaḥ || 3.1.2.20 ||
pitustulyaṃ kṛta rājyaṃ prasūvaśruta ucyate ||
pitustujyaṃ kṛtaṃ rājyaṃ susaṃdhistanayo.abhavat ||
tretāpādaḥ samāpto.ayaṃ prathamo bhārateṃtare || 21 ||
udayādudayaṃ yāvadrājñā tatra susaṃdhinā ||
pitustulyaṃ kṛtaṃ rājyaṃ māmarbastanayastataḥ || 22 ||
pitustulyaṃ kṛtaṃ rājyaṃ mahā.aśvastanayo.abhavat ||
pitustulyaṃ kṛtaṃ rājyaṃ bṛhadbālaḥ sutastataḥ || 23 ||
pitustulyaṃ kṛtaṃ rājyaṃ bṛhadaiśāna eva tat ||
pitustulyaṃ kṛtaṃ rājyamurukṣepastato.abhavat||24||
pitustulyaṃ kṛtaṃ rājyaṃ vatsapālastu tatsutaḥ||
pitustulyaṃ kṛtaṃ rājya vatsavyūhastato.abhavat || 25 ||
pitustulyaṃ kṛtaṃ rājyaṃ prativyomā tato nṛpaḥ ||
pitustulyaṃ kṛtaṃ rājyaṃ suto devakarastataḥ || 26 ||
pitustulyaṃ kṛtaṃ rājyaṃ sahadevastato.abhavat ||
pitustulyaṃ kṛtaṃ rājyaṃ bṛhadaśvastato nṛpaḥ || 27 ||
pitustulyaṃ kṛtaṃ rājyaṃ bhānuratnastato.abhavat ||
pitustulyaṃ kṛtaṃ rājyaṃ supratīkastato.abhavat || 28 ||
pitustulyaṃ kṛtaṃ rājyaṃ marudevassutastataḥ ||
pitustulyaṃ kṛtaṃ rājyaṃ sunakṣatrastato.abhavat || 29 ||
pitustulyaṃ kṛtaṃ rājyaṃ sutaḥ keśīnarastataḥ ||
pitustulyaṃ kṛtaṃ rājyamantarikṣastato nṛpaḥ || 3.1.2.30 ||
pitustulyaṃ kṛtaṃ rājyaṃ suvarṇāṃgo nṛpo.abhavat ||
pitustulyaṃ kṛtaṃ rājyaṃ tasya putro hyamitrajit || 31 ||
pitustulyaṃ kṛtaṃ rājyaṃ bṛhadrājastato.abhavat || 32 ||
pitustulyaṃ kṛtaṃ rājyaṃ dharmarājastato nṛpaḥ ||
pitustulyaṃ kṛtaṃ rājyaṃ tasmājjātaḥ kṛtañjayaḥ || 33 ||
pitustulyaṃ kṛtaṃ rājyaṃ tasmājjāto raṇañjayaḥ ||
pitustulyaṃ kṛtaṃ rājyaṃ sañjayastatsutaḥ smṛtaḥ || 34 ||
pitustulyaṃ kṛtaṃ rājyaṃ tatputraḥ śākyavardhanaḥ ||
pitustulyaṃ kṛtaṃ rājyaṃ krodhadānastu tatsutaḥ || || 35 ||
pitustulyaṃ kṛtaṃ rājyaṃ tasmādatulavikramaḥ ||
pitustulyaṃ kṛtaṃ rājyaṃ tasmājjātaḥ prasenajit || 36 ||
pitustalyaṃ kṛtaṃ rājyaṃ tatputraḥ śūdrakaḥ smṛtaḥ ||
pitustulyaṃ kṛtaṃ rājyaṃ surathastatsuto.abhavat || 37 ||
piturarddhaṃ kṛtaṃ rājyaṃ sarve tu raghuvaṃśajāḥ ||
pañcaṣaṣṭimitā bhūpā devīpūjanatatparāḥ || 38 ||
hiṃsāyajñaparāḥ sarve svargalokamito gatāḥ ||
buddhā jātāśca ye putrāste sarvai varṇasaṃkarāḥ || 39 ||
tretātṛtīyacaraṇaprārambhena navatāṃ gatāḥ ||
indreṇa preṣito bhūmau candramā rohiṇīpatiḥ || 3.1.2.40 ||
prayāganagare ramye bhūmirājayamacīkarat||
viṣṇubhaktaścandramāśca śivapūjanatatparaḥ || 41 ||
māyādevīprasannārthe śataṃ yajñamacīkarat ||
aṣṭādaśasahasrāṇi rājyaṃ kṛtvā divaṃ gataḥ ||42 ||
tasya putro budho nāma merudevasya vai sutaḥ ||
ilāmudvāhya dharmeṇa tasmājjātaḥ purūravāḥ ||43||
caturdaśasahasrāṇi bhūmirājyamacīkarat||
urvaśīṃ so.api svarveśyāṃ samayenaiva bhogyavān || 44 ||
āyurnāma suto jāto dharmātmā viṣṇutatparaḥ ||
ṣaṭtriṃśacca sahasrāṇi rājyaṃ kṛtvā purūravāḥ || 45 ||
gaṃdharvalokaṃ saṃprāpya modate divi devavat ||
pitustulyaṃ kṛtaṃ rājyamāyuṣo nahuṣassutaḥ || 46 ||
pitustulyaṃ kṛtaṃ rājyaṃ tataḥ śakratvamāgataḥ ||
trilokīṃ svavaśaṃ cakre varṣamekasahasrakam || 47||
munerduvāsasaḥ śāpānnṛpo.ajagaratāṃ gataḥ ||
pañca putrā yayāteśca trayo mlecchatvamāgatāḥ || 48 ||
dvau tathāryatvamāpannau yadujyeṣṭhaḥ pururlaghuḥ ||
tapobalaprabhāveṇa rājyaṃ lakṣābdasaṃmitam || 49 ||
kṛtvā viṣṇuprasādena tato vaikuṇṭhamāgataḥ ||
yadoḥ putraḥ smṛtaḥ kroṣṭā rājyaṃ ṣaṣṭisahasrakam || 3.1.2.50 ||
vṛjinaghnassutastasmādrājyaṃ viṃśatsahasrakam ||
tasmātsvāhārcanaḥ putraḥ kṛtaṃ rājyaṃ pitussamam || 51 ||
tasmāccitrarathaḥ putraḥ kṛtaṃ rājyaṃ pitussamam ||
araviṃdassutastasmātkṛtaṃ rājyaṃ pituḥ samam || 52 ||
atha śravāstato jātastejasvī viṣṇutatparaḥ ||
piturarthaṃ kṛtaṃ rājyaṃ tatputrastāmasaḥ smṛtaḥ || 53 ||
pitustulyaṃ kṛtaṃ rājyaṃ tasmāduśanassutaḥ ||
pitustulyaṃ kṛtaṃ rājyaṃ śītāṃśukanṛpo.abhavat || || 54 ||
pitustulyaṃ kṛtaṃ rājyaṃ kamalāṃśustato.abhavat || 55 ||
pitustulyaṃ kṛtaṃ rājyaṃ pārāvatasutastataḥ ||
pitustulyaṃ kṛtaṃ rājyaṃ jāmaghasta tsuto.abhavat || 56 ||
pitustulyaṃ kṛtaṃ rājyaṃ vidarbhastatsuto.abhavat ||
pitustulyaṃ kṛtaṃ rājyaṃ krātho nāma sutastataḥ || 57 ||
pitustulyaṃ kṛtaṃ rājyaṃ kuntibhojastu tatsutaḥ ||
pururdetyasutāputraḥ pātāle vṛṣaparvaṇaḥ || 58 ||
uṣitvā nagare tasminmāyāvidyastato.abhavat ||
prayāgasya pratiṣṭhāne pure rājyamathākarot || 59 ||
daśavarṣasahasrāṇi rājyaṃ kṛtvā divaṃ gataḥ ||
devībhaktaḥ sa nṛpatistatputro janamejayaḥ || 3.1.2.60 ||
pitustulyaṃ kṛtaṃ rājyaṃ pracinvāṃstatsuto.abhavat ||
pitustulyaṃ kṛtaṃ rājyaṃ pravīrastanayo.abhavat || 61 ||
pitustulyaṃ kṛtaṃ rājyaṃ nabhasyastanayo.abhavat ||
pitustulyaṃ kṛtaṃ rājyaṃ bhavadastatsutassmṛtaḥ || 62 ||
pitustulyaṃ kṛtaṃ rājyaṃ sudyumnastanayo.abhavat ||
pitustulyaṃ kṛtaṃ rājyaṃ putro bāhugaraḥ smṛtaḥ || || 63 ||
pitustulyaṃ kṛtaṃ rājyaṃ saṃyātistanayo.abhavat ||
pitustulyaṃ kṛtaṃ rājyaṃ dhanayātistato.abhavat || 64 ||
pitustulyaṃ kṛtaṃ rājyamaindrāśvastanayo.abhavat ||
pitustulyaṃ kṛtaṃ rājyaṃ tasmādraṃtinaraḥ sutaḥ || 65 ||
pitustulyaṃ kṛtaṃ rājyaṃ tatputraḥ sutapāḥ smṛtaḥ||
pitustusyaṃ kṛtaṃ rājyaṃ saṃvaraṇastanayastataḥ || 66 ||
himālayagirau prāpte tapaḥ kartuṃ mano dadhat ||
śatavarṣaṃ tataḥ sūryastapatīṃ nāma kanyakām || 67 ||
