saṃvaraṇāya dadau tuṣṭo ravilokaṃ nṛpo gataḥ ||
tato māyāprabhāvena yugaṃ pralayamāgatam || 68 ||
catvāraḥ sāgarā vṛddhā bhārataṃ kṣayatāṃ gatam ||
dvivarṣe sāgare bhūmiruṣitvā bhūdharaissaha || 69 ||
mahāvāyuprabhāvena sāgarāḥ śuṣkatāṃ gatāḥ ||
agastyatejasā bhūmiḥ sthalī bhūtvā pradṛśyate || 3.1.2.70 ||
pañcavarṣāṃtare bhūmirvṛkṣadūrvādisaṃyutā ||
sūryājñayā ca saṃvarṇastapatyā muninā saha || 71 ||
vaśiṣṭhena trivarṇaiśca mukhyaiḥ sārddhaṃ samāgataḥ || 72 ||
iti śrībhaviṣye mahāpurāṇe pratisargaparvaṇi caturyugakhaṇḍāparaparyāye tretāyugabhūpākhyānaṃ nāma dvitīyodhyāyaḥ || 2 || || cha ||
dvāparanṛpopākhyānavarṇanam
|| śaunaka uvāca || ||
saṃvarṇaśca mahīpālaḥ kasminkāle samāgataḥ ||
lomaharṣaṇa me brūhi dvāparasya nṛpāṃstathā || 1 ||
|| sūta uvāca || ||
bhādrasya kṛṣṇapakṣe tu trayodaśyāṃ bhṛgau dine ||
saṃvarṇo munibhiḥ sārddhaṃ pratiṣṭhāne samāgataḥ || 2 ||
pratiṣṭhānaṃ kṛtaṃ ramyaṃ pañcayojanamāyatam ||
arddhakrośonnataṃ harmyaṃ racitaṃ viśvakarmaṇā || 3 |||
buddhivaṃśe prasenasya saktāyā bhūpatiḥ kṛtaḥ ||
yaduvaṃśe sātvataśca madhurābhūpatiḥ kṛtaḥ || 4 ||
mlecchavaṃśe śmaśrupālo marudeśasya bhūpatiḥ ||
krameṇa varddhitā bhūpāḥ prajābhiḥ sahitā bhuvi || 5 ||
daśavarṣasahasrāṇi saṃvarṇo bhūpatiḥ smṛtaḥ ||
tasyātmajo.ayamarcājñaḥ kṛtaṃ rājyaṃ pitussamam || 6 ||
tasya putraḥ sūrijāpī piturarddhaṃ ca rājyakṛt ||
sūryayajñastasya putraḥ saurayajñaparāyaṇaḥ || 7 ||
śatahīnaṃ kṛtaṃ rājyaṃ tasmādātithyavardhanaḥ ||
śatahīnaṃ kṛtaṃ rājyaṃ dvādaśātmā tu tatsutaḥ || 8 ||
śatahīnaṃ kṛta rājyaṃ tasmājjāto divākaraḥ ||
śatahīnaṃ kṛtaṃ rājyaṃ tasmājjātaḥ prabhākaraḥ || 9 |||
śatahīnaṃ kṛtaṃ rājyaṃ bhāsvadātmā ca tatsutaḥ ||
śatahīnaṃ kṛtaṃ rājyaṃ vivasvajjñastadātmajaḥ || 3.1.3.10 ||
śatahīnaṃ kṛtaṃ rājyaṃ haridaśvārcanastataḥ ||
śatahīnaṃ kṛtaṃ rājyaṃ tasmādvaikartanaḥ sutaḥ || 11 ||
śatahīnaṃ kṛtaṃ rājyaṃ stasmādarkeṣṭimānsutaḥ ||
śatahīnaṃ kṛtaṃ rājyaṃ tasmānmārtaṃḍavatsalaḥ || || 12 ||
śatahīnaṃ kṛtaṃ rājyaṃ mihirārthastu tatsutaḥ ||
śatahīnaṃ kṛtaṃ rājyaṃ tasmādaruṇapoṣaṇaḥ || 13 ||
śatahīnaṃ kṛtaṃ rājyaṃ tasmāddyumaṇivatsalaḥ ||
śatahīnaṃ kṛtaṃ rājyaṃ tasmāttaraṇiyajñakaḥ || 14 ||
śatahīnaṃ kṛtaṃ rājyaṃ tasmānmaitreṣṭivardhanaḥ ||
śatahīnaṃ kṛtaṃ rājyaṃ citrabhānūrjakastataḥ || ||.a 15 ||
śatahīnaṃ kṛtaṃ rājyaṃ tasmādvairocanaḥ smṛtaḥ ||
śatahīnaṃ kṛtaṃ rājyaṃ haṃsanyāyī tu tatsutaḥ || 16 ||
pitustulyaṃ kṛtaṃ rājyaṃ tasmādvedapravardhanaḥ ||
śatahīnaṃ kṛtaṃ rājyaṃ tasmātsāvitra ucyate || 17 ||
śatahīnaṃ kṛtaṃ rājyaṃ dhanapālastato.abhavat ||
śatahīnaṃ kṛta rājyaṃ mlecchahantā sutaḥ smṛtaḥ || 18 ||
śatahīnaṃ kṛtaṃ rājyaṃ tasmādānaṃdavarddhanaḥ ||
śatahīnaṃ kṛtaṃ rājyaṃ dharmapālasutastataḥ || 19 ||
śatahīnaṃ kṛtaṃ rājyaṃ brahmabhakta sutastataḥ ||
pitustulyaṃ kṛtaṃ rājyaṃ tasmādbrahmeṣṭivarddhanaḥ||3.1.3.20||
pitustulyaṃ kṛtaṃ rājyaṃ tasmādātmaprapūjakaḥ||
pitustulyaṃ kṛtaṃ rājyaṃ parameṣṭhī sutastataḥ||21||
pitustulyaṃ kṛtaṃ rājyaṃ tasmāddhairaṇyavarddhanaḥ||
śatahīnaṃ kṛtaṃ rājyaṃ dhātṛyājī tu tatsutaḥ||22||
pitustulyaṃ kṛtaṃ rājyaṃ tadvidhātṛprapūjakaḥ ||
pitustulyaṃ kṛtaṃ rājyaṃ tasmādvai druhiṇaḥ kratuḥ || 23 ||
pitustulyaṃ kṛtaṃ rājyaṃ tasmādvairañcya ucyate||
śatahīnaṃ kṛtaṃ rājyaṃ tatputraḥ kamalāsanaḥ || 24 ||
pitustulyaṃ kṛtaṃ rājyaṃ śamavartī tu tatsutaḥ ||
pitustulyaṃ kṛtaṃ rājya śrāddhadevastu tatsutaḥ ||25||
pitustulyaṃ kṛtaṃ rājyaṃ tasmādvai pitṛvarddhanaḥ ||
pitustulyaṃ kṛtaṃ rājyaṃ somadattastu tatsutaḥ || 26 ||
pitustulyaṃ kṛtaṃ rājyaṃ saumadattistadātmajaḥ ||
pitustulyaṃ kṛtaṃ rājyaṃ tasmādvai somavarddhanaḥ || 27 ||
pitustulyaṃ kṛtaṃ rājyamavataṃsaḥ sutastataḥ ||
pitustulyaṃ kṛtaṃ rājyaṃ prataṃsastanayastataḥ || 28 ||
pitustulyaṃ kṛtaṃ rājyaṃ parātaṃsastadātmajaḥ ||
pitustulyaṃ kṛtaṃ rājyamayataṃsastato.abhavat || 29 ||
pitustulyaṃ kṛta rājyaṃ samātaṃsastu tatsutaḥ ||
pitustulyaṃ kṛtaṃ rājyamanutaṃsastadātmajaḥ || 3.1.3.30 ||
pitustulyaṃ kṛtaṃ rājyamadhitaṃsastato.abhavat ||
pitustulyaṃ kṛtaṃ rājyamabhitaṃsastadātmajaḥ ||| || 31 ||
pitustulyaṃ kṛtaṃ rājyaṃ samuttaṃsastato.abhavat ||
pitustulyaṃ kṛtaṃ rājyaṃ taṃsonāma suto.abhavat || 32 ||
pitustulyaṃ kṛtaṃ rājyaṃ duṣyaṃtastanayastataḥ ||
śakuṃtalāyāṃ tasmācca bharato nāma bhūpatiḥ || 33 ||
pitustulyaṃ kṛtaṃ rājyaṃ duṣyaṃtaḥ svargatiṃ gataḥ ||
bharatonāma tatputro devapūjana tatparaḥ || 34 ||
mahāmāyāprabhāvena ṣaṭtriṃśadvarṣajīvanam ||
ṣaṭtriṃśābdasahasrāṇi nṛpāyurvarddhitaṃ tathā || 35 ||
tasya nāmnā smṛtaḥ khaṃḍo bhārato nāma viśrutaḥ ||
tena bhūmervibhāgaśca kṛtaṃ rājyaṃ pṛthak ciram || 36 ||
divyaṃ varṣaśataṃ rājyaṃ tasmājjāto mahābalaḥ ||
divyaṃ varṣaśataṃ rājyaṃ bharadvājastato.abhavat || 37 ||
divyaṃ varṣaśataṃ rājyaṃ tasmādbhavanamanyumān ||
aṣṭādaśasahasrāṇi samā rājyaṃ prakīrtitam || 38 ||
bṛhatkṣetrastato hyāsītpitustulyaṃ kṛtaṃ padam ||
suhotrastanayastasya pitustulyaṃ kṛtaṃ padam || 39 ||
vītihotrastasya suto rājyaṃ daśasahasrakam ||
yajñahotrastato.apyāsītpitustulyaṃ kṛtaṃ padam || 3.1.3.40 ||
śakrahotrastato jātaḥ pitustulyaṃ kṛtaṃ padam ||
prasanno bhagavāniṃdrastaṃ nṛpaṃ svargamāptavān || 41 ||
tadāyodhyāpatiḥ śrīmānpratāpeṃdro mahābalaḥ ||
bhārataṃ varṣamadadhadvarṣaṃ daśasahasrakam || 42 ||
maṃḍalīkastasya sutaḥ pitustulyaṃ kṛtaṃ padam ||
vijayeṃdrastasya sutaḥ pitustulyaṃ kṛtaṃ padam || 43 ||
dhanurdīptastasya sutaḥ pitustulyaṃ kṛtaṃ padam ||
iṃdrājñayā śakrahotro ghṛtācyā saha bhūtale || 44 |||
prāptāvānsadhanurdīptaṃ jitvā rājyamacīkarat ||
hastīnāma suto jāta airāvatasutaṃ gajam || 45 ||
āruhya paścime deśe hastinānagarī kṛtā ||
daśayojanavistīrṇā svargaṃgāyāstaṭe śubhā || 46 ||
rājyaṃ daśasahasraṃ ca tatra vāsaṃ cakāra saḥ ||
tatputrastvajamīḍhākhyaḥ pitustulyaṃ kṛtaṃ padam || 47 ||
tasmājāto rakṣapālaḥ pitustulyaṃ kṛtaṃ padam ||
suśamyarṇastasya sutaḥ pitustulyaṃ kṛtaṃ padam || 48 ||
tasya putraḥ kururnāma piturarddhaṃ kṛtaṃ padam ||
iṃdrasya varadānena sadehaḥ svargamāgataḥ || 49 ||
tadā sāttvatavaṃśe.asminvṛṣṇirnāma mahābalaḥ ||
mathurāyāṃ sthito rājyaṃ sarvaṃ svavaśamāptavān || 3.1.3.50 ||
bhagavato varadānena hareradbhutakarmaṇaḥ ||
paṃcavarṣasahasraṃ ca sarvaṃ rājyaṃ vaśīkṛtam || 51 ||
nirāvṛttistasya sutaḥ pitustulyaṃ kṛtaṃ padam ||
daśārī tasya tanayaḥ pitustulyaṃ kṛtaṃ padam || 52 ||
viyāmunastasya sutaḥ pitustulyaṃ kṛtaṃ padam ||
jīmūtastasya tanayaḥ pitustulyaṃ kṛtaṃ padam || 53 ||
vikṛtistasya tanayaḥ pitustulyaṃ kṛtaṃ padam ||
tasmājjāto bhīmarathaḥ pitustulyaṃ kṛtaṃ padam || 54 ||
tasmājjāto navarathaḥ pitustulyaṃ kṛtaṃ padam ||
tasmājjāto daśarathaḥ pitustulyaṃ kṛtaṃ padam || 55 ||
tasmājjātaśca śakuniḥ pitustulyaṃ kṛtaṃ padam ||
tasmājjātaḥ kuśuṃbhaśca pitustulyaṃ kṛtaṃ padam || 56 ||
tasmājjāto devarathaḥ pitustulyaṃ kṛtaṃ padam ||
devakṣetrastasya sutaḥ pitustulyaṃ kṛtaṃ padam || 57 ||
tasya putro madhurnāma pitustulyaṃ kṛtaṃ padam ||
tato navarathaḥ putraḥ pitustulyaṃ kṛtaṃ padam || 58 ||
kuruvatsasta sya sutaḥ pitustulyaṃ kṛtaṃ padam ||
tasmādanurathaḥ putraḥ pitustulyaṃ kṛtaṃ padam || 59 ||
puruhotraḥ sutastasya pitustulyaṃ kṛtaṃ padam ||
vicitrāṅgastasya sutaḥ pitustulyaṃ kṛtaṃ padam ||3.1.3.60||
tasmātsātvatavānputraḥ pitustulyaṃ kṛtaṃ padam ||
bhajamānastasya sutaḥ pitustulyaṃ kṛtaṃ padam || 61 ||
vidūrathastasya sutaḥ pitustulyaṃ kṛtaṃ padam ||
surabhaktastasya sutaḥ pitustulyaṃ kṛtaṃ padam || 62 ||
tasmācca sumanāḥ putraḥ pitustulyaṃ kṛtaṃ padam||
tatikṣetrastasya sutaḥ pitustulyaṃ kṛtaṃ padam || 63 ||
svāyaṃbhuvastasya sutaḥ pitustulyaṃ kṛṃtaṃ padam ||
haridīpaka evāsau tasya rājyaṃ pitussa mama || 64 ||
devamedhāssutastasya pitustulyaṃ kṛtaṃ padam ||
surapālastadā jātaḥ pitustulyaṃ kṛtaṃ padam || 65 ||
śakrājñayā kuruścaiva dvāpara tritaye pade ||
vyatīte ca sukeśyāssa svarveśyāyāḥ patiḥ prabhuḥ || 66 ||
āgato bhārate khaṃḍe kurukṣetraṃ tadā kṛtam ||
viṃśadyojanavistīrṇaṃ puṇya kṣetraṃ smṛtaṃ budhaiḥ || 67 ||
dvādaśābdasahasraṃ ca kuruṇā rājyasātkṛtam ||
tasmājjahnussuto jātaḥ pitustulyaṃ kṛtaṃ padam || 68 ||
tasmācca suratho jātaḥ pitustulyaṃ kṛtaṃ padam ||
vidūrathastasya sutaḥ pitustulyaṃ kṛtaṃ padam || 69||
sārvabhaumastasya sutaḥ pitustulyaṃ kṛtaṃ padam ||
jayasenastasya sutaḥ pitustulyaṃ kṛtaṃ padam || 3.1.3.70 ||
tasmādarṇava evāsau pitustulyaṃ kṛtaṃ padam ||
catussāgaragāmī ca pitustulyaṃ kṛtaṃ padam || 71 ||
ayutāyustasya suto rājyaṃ daśasahasrakam||
akrodhanastasya sutaḥ pitustulyaṃ kṛtaṃ padam||72||
tasmādṛkṣassuto jātaḥ pitustulyaṃ kṛtaṃ padam||
bhīmasenastasya sutaḥ pitustulyaṃ kṛtaṃ padam || 73 ||
dilīpastasya tanayaḥ pitustulyaṃ kṛtaṃ padam ||
pratīpastasya tanayo rājyaṃ paṃcasahasrakam || || 74 ||
śaṃtanustasya putraśca rājyamekasahasrakam ||
vicitravīryastatputro rājyaṃ vai dviśataṃ samāḥ || 75 ||
pāṃḍuśca tanayo yasminrājyaṃ paṃcaśataṃ kṛtam ||
yudhiṣṭhirastasya suto rājyaṃ paṃcāśadabdakam || 76 ||
suyodhanena ṣaṣṭyabdaṃ kṛtaṃ rājyaṃ tataḥ param ||
yudhiṣṭhireṇa nidhanaṃ tasya prāptaṃ kurusthale || 77 ||
pūrvaṃ devāsure yuddhe ye daityāśca surairhatāḥ ||
te sarve śaṃtano rājye janmavaṃtaḥ pratasthire || 78 ||
lakṣamakṣauhiṇī teṣāṃ tadbhāreṇa vasundharā ||
śakrasya śaraṇaṃ prāptāvatāraṃ ca tato hareḥ || 79 ||
sa śaurervasudevasya devakyāṃ janmanāviśat ||
evaṃ kṛṣṇo mahāvīryo rohiṇīnilayaṃ gataḥ || 3.1.3.80 ||
paṃcatriṃśaduttaraṃ ca śataṃ varṣaṃ ca bhūtale ||
uṣitvā kṛṣṇacandraśca tato golokamāgataḥ || 81 ||
caturthacaraṇānte ca harerjanma smṛtaṃ budhaiḥ ||
hastināpuramadhyasyābhimanyostanayastataḥ || 82 ||
rājyamekasahasraṃ ca tato.abhūjjanamejayaḥ ||
trisahasraṃ kṛtaṃ rājyaṃ śatānīkastato.abhavat || 83 ||
pitustulyaṃ kṛtaṃ rājyaṃ yajñadattastataḥ sutaḥ ||
rājyaṃ paṃcasahasraṃ ca niścakrastanayo.abhavat || 84 ||
sahasramekaṃ rājyaṃ taduṣṭrapālastato.abhavat ||
pitustulyaṃ kṛtaṃ rājyaṃ tasmāccitrarathassutaḥ || 85 ||
pitustulyaṃ kṛtaṃ rājyaṃ dhṛtimāṃstanayastataḥ ||
pitustulyaṃ kṛtaṃ rājyaṃ suṣeṇastanayo.abhavat || 86 ||
pitustulyaṃ kṛtaṃ rājyaṃ sunīthastanayo.abhavat ||
pitustulyaṃ kṛtaṃ rājyaṃ makhapālaḥ suto.abhavat || 87 ||
pitustulyaṃ kṛtaṃ rājyaṃ na cakṣustanayastataḥ ||
pitustulyaṃ kṛtaṃ rājyaṃ sukhavaṃtastato.abhavat || 88 ||
pitustulyaṃ kṛtaṃ rājyaṃ tasmātpāriplavassutaḥ ||
pitustulyaṃ kṛtaṃ rājyaṃ sunayastatsuto.abhavat || 89 ||
pitustulyaṃ kṛtaṃ rājyaṃ medhāvī tatsuto.abhavat ||
pitustulyaṃ kṛtaṃ rājyaṃ tasmājjāto nṛpaṃjayaḥ || 3.1.3.90 ||
pitustulyaṃ kṛtaṃ rājyaṃ mṛdustattanayo.abhavat ||
pitustulyaṃ kṛtaṃ rājyaṃ tigmajyotistu tatsutaḥ || 91 ||
pitustulyaṃ kṛtaṃ rājyaṃ tasmājjāto bṛhadrathaḥ ||
pitustulyaṃ kṛtaṃ rājyaṃ vasudānastato.abhavat ||92||
pitustulyaṃ kṛtaṃ rājyaṃ śatānīkastato.abhavat||
pitustulyaṃ kṛtaṃ rājyaṃ tasmādudyāna ucyate || 93 ||
pitustulyaṃ kṛtaṃ rājyaṃ tasmājjāto hyahīnaraḥ ||
pitustulyaṃ kṛtaṃ rājyaṃ nirmitrastanayo.abhavat || 94 ||
pitustulyaṃ kṛtaṃ rājyaṃ kṣemakastatsuto.abhavat ||
rājyaṃ tyaktvā sa medhāvī kalāpagrāmamāśritaḥ || 95 ||
mlecchaiśca maraṇaṃ prāpto yamalokamato gataḥ ||
nāradasyopadeśena pradyotastanayastataḥ || 96 ||
mlecchayajñaḥ kṛtastena mlecchā hananamāgatāḥ || || 97 || ||
iti śrībhaviṣye mahāpurāṇe pratisargaparvaṇi caturyugakhaṃḍāparaparyāye dvāparanṛpopākhyāne tṛtīyo.adhyāyaḥ || 3 || ca || || ||
dvāparayugabhūpākhyānavarṇanam
|| śaunaka uvāca || ||
kathaṃ yajñaḥ kṛtastena pradyotena vicakṣaṇa ||
sarvaṃ kathaya me tāta trikālajña mahāmune || 1 ||
|| sūta uvāca || ||
ekadā hastinagare pradyotaḥ kṣemakātmajaḥ ||
āsthitaḥ sa kathāmadhye nārado.abhyāgamattadā || 2 ||
taṃ dṛṣṭvā harṣito rājā pūjayāmāsa dharmavit ||
sukhopaviṣṭaḥ sa muniḥ pradyotaṃ nṛpamabravīt || 3 ||
mlecchairhatastava pitā yamalokamato gataḥ ||
mlecchayajñaprabhāveṇa svargatirbhavitā hi saḥ ||4||
tacchrutvā krodhatāmrākṣo brāhmaṇānvedavittamān ||
āhūya sa kurukṣetre mlecchayajñaṃ samārabhat || 5 ||
yajñakuṃḍaṃ catuṣkoṇaṃ yojanānyeva ṣoḍaśa ||
racitvā devatā dhyātvā mlecchāṃśca juhuyānnṛpaḥ || 6 ||
hārahūṇānbarbarāṃśca guruṃḍāṃśca śakānkhasān ||
yavanānpallavāṃścaiva romajānkharasaṃbhavān || 7 ||
dvīpa sthitānkāmarūśca cīnānsāgaramadhyagān||
prāhūya bhasmasātkurvanvedamaṃtraprabhāvataḥ || 8 ||
brāhmaṇāndakṣiṇāṃ dattvā abhiṣekamakārayat ||
kṣemako nāma nṛpatiḥ svargalokaṃ tato gataḥ || 9 ||
mlecchahaṃtā nāma tasya vikhyātaṃ bhuvi sarvataḥ ||
rājyaṃ daśasahasrābdaṃ kṛtaṃ tena mahātmanā || 3.1.4.10 ||
svargalokaṃ gato rājā tatputro vedavānsmṛtaḥ||
dvisahasraṃ kṛtaṃ rājyaṃ tadā mlecchaḥ kaliḥ svayam ||
nārāyaṇaṃ pūjayitvā divyāṃ stutimathākarot || || 11 ||
|| kaliruvāca || ||
namo.anaṃtāya mahate sarvakālapravartine || 12 ||
caturyugakṛte tubhyaṃ vāsudevāya sākṣiṇe ||
daśāvatārāya hare namastubhyaṃ namonamaḥ ||13||
namaḥ śaktyavatārāya rāmakṛṣṇāya te namaḥ ||
namo matsyāvatārāya mahate gauravāsine || 14 ||
namo bhaktāvatārāya kalpakṣetranivāsine ||
rājñā vedavatā nātha mama sthānaṃ vināśitam ||
mama priyasya mlecchasya tatpitrā vaṃśanāśanam || 15 ||
|| sūta uvāca || ||
iti stutastu kalinā mlecchasya saha bhāryayā ||16||
prāptavānsa hariḥ sākṣādbhagavānbhaktavatsalaḥ ||
kaliṃ provāca sa hariryuṣmadarthe yugottamam || 17 ||
bahurūpamahaṃ kṛtvā tavecchāṃ pūrayāmyaham ||
ādamo nāma puruṣaḥ patnī havyavatī tathā || 18 ||
viṣṇukardamato jātau ṃlecchavaṃśapravardhanau ||
haristvantardadhe tatra kalirānaṃdasaṃkulaḥ || 19 ||
giriṃ nīlācalaṃ prāpya kiṃcitkālamavāsayat ||
putro vedavato jātaḥ sunaṃdo nāma bhūpatiḥ || 3.1.4.20 ||
pitustulyaṃ kṛtaṃ rājyamanapatyo mṛtiṃ gataḥ ||
āryadeśāḥ kṣīṇavaṃto mlecchavaṃśā balānvitāḥ || 21 ||
bhaviṣyaṃti bhṛguśreṣṭha tasmācca tuhinācalam ||
gatvā viṣṇuṃ samārādhya gamiṣyāmo hareḥ padam || 22 ||
iti śrutvā dvijāḥ sarve naimiṣāraṇyavāsinaḥ ||
aṣṭāśītisahasrāṇi gatāste tuhinācalam || 23 || ||
viśālāyāṃ samāsādya viṣṇugāthāṃ pracakṣire ||
iti vyāsena kathitaṃ vākyaṃ kaliviśāradam ||
śrotāraṃ sa manaḥ kṛtvā bhaviṣyaṃ samudīrayat || 24 ||
|| vyāsa uvāca || ||
manaḥ śṛṇu tato gāthāṃ bhāvī sūtena varṇitām ||
kaleryugasya pūrṇāṃ tāṃ tacchrutvā tṛptimāvaha || 25 || ||
|| sūta uvāca || ||
ṣoḍaśābdasahasre ca śeṣe taddvāpare yuge ||
bahukīrtimatī bhūmirāryadeśasya kīrtitā ||26||
kvacidviprāḥ smṛtā bhūpāḥ kvacidrājanyavaṃśajāḥ ||
kvacidvaiśyāḥ kvacicchūdrāḥ kutracidvarṇasaṃkarāḥ||27||
dviśatāṣṭasahasre dve śeṣe tu dvāpare yuge ||
mlecchadeśasya yābhūmirbhavitā kīrtimālinī || 28 ||
iṃdriyāṇi damitvā yo hyātmadhyānaparāyaṇaḥ ||
tasmādādamanāmāsau patnī havyavatī smṛtā || 29 ||
pradānanagarasyaiva pūrvabhāge mahāvanam ||
īśvareṇa kṛtaṃ ramyaṃ catuḥkrośāyataṃ smṛtam || 3.1.4.30 ||
pāpavṛkṣatale gatvā patnīdarśanatatparaḥ ||
kalistatrāgatastūrṇaṃ sarparūpaṃ hi tatkṛtam|| || 31 ||
vaṃcitā tena dhūrtena viṣṇvājñā bhaṃgatāṃ gatā ||
khāditvā tatphalaṃ ramyaṃ lokamārgapradaṃ patiḥ || 32 ||
uduṃbarasya patraiśca tābhyāṃ vāyvaśanaṃ kṛtam ||
sutāḥ putrāstato jātāḥ sarve mlecchā babhūvire || 33 ||
triṃśottaraṃ navaśataṃ tasyāyuḥ parikīrtitam ||
phalānāṃ havanaṃ kurvanpatnyā saha divaṃ gataḥ || 34 ||
tasmājjātaḥ sutaḥ śreṣṭhaḥ śvetanāmeti viśrutaḥ ||
dvādaśottaravarṣaṃ ca tasyāyuḥ parikīrtitam || 35 ||
anuhastasya tanayaḥ śatahīnaṃ kṛtaṃ padam ||
kīnāśastasya tanayaḥ pitāmahasamaṃ padam || 36 ||
mahallalastasya sutaḥ paṃcahīnaṃ śataṃ nava ||
tena rājyaṃ kṛtaṃ tatra tasmānmānagaraṃ smṛtam || 37 ||
tasmācca virado jāto rājyaṃ ṣaṣṭyuttaraṃ samāḥ ||
jñeyaṃ navaśataṃ tasya svanāmnā nagaraṃ kṛtam || 38 ||
hanūkastasya tanayo viṣṇu bhaktiparāyaṇaḥ ||
phalānāṃ havanaṃ kurvaṃstattvaṃ hyasi jayansadā||39||
triśataṃ paṃcaṣaṣṭiśca rājyaṃ varṣāṇi tatsmṛtam ||
sadehaḥ svargamāyāto mlecchadharmaparāyaṇaḥ||3.1.4.40||
ācāraśca vivekaśca dvijatā devapūjanam||
kṛtānyetāni tenaiva tasmānmlecchaḥ smṛto budhaiḥ ||41||
viṣṇubhaktyagnipūjā ca hyahiṃsā ca tapo damaḥ ||
dharmāṇyetāni munibhirmlecchānāṃ hi smṛtāni vai || 42 ||
matocchilastasya suto hanukasyaiva bhārgava||
rājyaṃ navaśataṃ tasya saptatiśca smṛtāḥ samāḥ ||43||
lomakastasya tanayo rājyaṃ saptaśataṃ samāḥ ||
saptasaptatirevāsya tatpaścātsvargatiṃ gataḥ ||44||
tasmājjātaḥ suto nyūho nirgatastūha eva saḥ ||
tasmānnyūhaḥ smṛtaḥ prājñai rājyaṃ paṃcaśataṃ kṛtam || 45 ||
sīmaḥ śamaśca bhāvaśca trayaḥ putrā babhūvire ||
nyūhaḥ smṛto viṣṇubhaktasso.ahaṃ dhyānaparāyaṇaḥ || 46 ||
ekadā bhagavānviṣṇustatsvapne tu samāgataḥ || 47 ||
vatsa nyūha śṛṇuṣvedaṃ pralayaḥ saptame.ahani ||
bhavitā tvaṃ janaissārdhaṃ nāvamāruhya satvaram || 48 ||
jīvanaṃ kuru bhakteṣu sarvaśreṣṭho bhaviṣyasi ||
tatheti matvā sa munirnāvaṃ kṛtvā supuṣṭitām || 49 ||
hastatriśatalambāṃ ca paṃcāśaddhastavistṛtām ||
triṃśaddhastocchritāṃ ramyāṃ sarvajīvasamanvitām || 3.1.4.50 ||
āruhya svakulaissārddhaṃ viṣṇudhyānaparo.abhavat ||
sāṃvartako meghagaṇo maheṃdreṇa samanvitaḥ || 51 ||
catvāriṃśaddinānyeva mahāvṛṣṭimakārayat ||
sarvaṃ tu bhārataṃ varṣaṃ jalaiḥ plāvya tu siṃdhavaḥ || 52 ||
catvāro militāḥ sarve viśālāyāṃ na cāgatāḥ ||
aṣṭāśītisahasrāṇi munayo brahmavādinaḥ || 53 ||
nyūhaśca svakulaissārdhaṃ śeṣāssarve vināśitāḥ ||
tadā ca munayassarve viṣṇumāyāṃ pratuṣṭuvuḥ || 54 ||
|| munaya ūcuḥ || ||
namo devyai mahākālyai devakyai ca namonamaḥ ||
mahālakṣmyai viṣṇumātre rādhā devyai namonamaḥ || 55 ||
revatyai puṣpavatyai ca svarṇavatyai namonamaḥ ||
kāmākṣāyai ca māyāyai namo mātre namonamaḥ || 56 ||
mahāvātaprabhāvena mahā megharaveṇa ca ||
jaladhārābhirugrābhirbhayaṃ jātaṃ hi dāruṇam ||57||
tasmādbhayādbhairavi tvamasmānsaṃrakṣa kiṃkarān ||
tadā prasannā sā devī jalaṃ śāṃta tayā kṛtam || 58 ||
abdāṃtare mahī sarvā sthalī bhūtvā pradṛśyate ||
ārācca śiṣiṇā nāma himādrestaṭabhūmayaḥ || 59 ||
nyūhastatra sthito nāvamāruhya svakulaissaha ||
jalāṃte bhūmimāgatya tatra vāsaṃ karoti saḥ || 3.1.4.60 ||
iti śrībhaviṣye mahāpurāṇe pratisargaparvaṇi caturyugakhaṇḍāparaparyāye dvāparanṛpopākhyānaṃ nāma caturtho.adhyāyaḥ || 4 || cha ||
kaliyugabhūpākhyānavarṇanam
|| śaunaka uvāca || ||
sāṃprataṃ vartate yo vai pralayāṃte munīśvara ||
divyadṛṣṭiprabhāvena jñātaṃ brūhi tataḥ param || 1 ||
|| sūta uvāca || ||
nyūho nāma smṛto mleccho viṣṇumohaṃ tadākarot ||
tadā prasanno bhagavāṃstasya vaṃśaḥ pravarddhitaḥ ||2||
mlecchabhāṣā kṛtā tena vedavākyaparāṅmukhā ||
kaleśca vṛddhaye brāhmīṃ bhāṣāṃ kṛtvā.apaśabdagām ||. 3 ||
nyūhāya dattavāndevo buddhīśo buddhigaḥ svayam ||
vilomaṃ ca kṛtaṃ nāma nyūhena trisutasya vai || 4 ||
simaśca hāmaśca tathā yākūto nāma viśrutaḥ ||
yākūtaḥ saptaputraśca jumro mājūja eva saḥ ||5||
mādī tathā ca yūnānastūvalomasakastathā ||
tīrāsaśca tathā teṣāṃ nāmabhirdeśa ucyate ||6||
jumrā daśa kanābjaśca riphataśca tajarrumaḥ ||
tannāmnā ca smṛtā deśā yūnādyā ye sutāḥ smṛtāḥ || 7 ||
ilīśastaralīśaśca kittīhūdānirucyate ||
caturbhirnāmabhirdeśāsteṣāṃ teṣāṃ pracakrire || || 8 ||
dvitīyatanayāddhāmātsutāścatvāra eva te ||
kuśo miśraśca kūjaśca kanāaṃstatra nāmabhiḥ || 9 ||
deśāḥ prasiddhā mlecchānāṃ kuśātṣaṭtanayāḥ smṛtāḥ ||
sa vā caiva havīlaśca sarvatoragamastathā || 3.1.5.10 ||
tathā savatikā nāma nimarūho mahābalaḥ ||
teṣāṃ putrāśca kalanaḥ siṃnāroraka ucyate || 11 ||
akkado vāvunaścaiva rasanādeśakāśca te ||
śrāvayitvā munīnsūto yoganidrāvaśaṃ gataḥ || 12 ||
dvisahasre śatābdānte buddhvā punarathābravīta ||
simavaṃśaṃ pravakṣyāmi simo jyeṣṭhaḥ sa bhūpatiḥ || 13 ||
rājyaṃ paṃcaśataṃ varṣaṃ tena mlecchena satkṛtam ||
arkansadastasya sutaścatustriṃśacca rājyakam || 14 ||
catuśśataṃ punarjñeyaṃ siṃhastattanayo.abhavat ||
rājyaṃ tasya smṛtaṃ tatra ṣaṣṭyuttara catuḥ śatam || 15 ||
ivratasya suto jñeyaḥ pitustulyaṃ kṛtaṃ padam ||
phalajastasya tanayaścatvāriṃśaddvayaṃ śatam || 16 ||
rājyaṃ kṛtaṃ tu tasmācca raū nāma sutaḥ smṛtaḥ ||
saptatriṃśacca dviśataṃ tasya rājyaṃ prakīrtitam || 17 ||
tasmācca jūja utpannaḥ pitustulyaṃ kṛtaṃ padam ||
nahūrastasya tanayo vayaḥ ṣaṣṭyuttaraṃ śatam ||
rājyaṃ cakāra nṛpatirbahuśatrūnvihiṃsayan || 18 ||
tāharastasya tanayaḥ pitustulyaṃ kṛtaṃ padam ||
tasmātputro.avirāmaśca nahūro hāranastrayaḥ || 19||
evaṃ teṣāṃ smṛtā vaṃśā nāmamātreṇa kīrtitāḥ ||
sarasvatyāśca śāpena mlecchabhāṣā mahādhamāḥ || 3.1.5.20 ||
teṣāṃ vṛddhiḥ kalau cāsītsaṃkṣepeṇa prakīrtitā ||
saṃskṛtasyaiva vāṇī tu bhārataṃ varṣamūhyatām || 21 ||
anyakhaṃḍe gatā saiva mlecchā hyānaṃdino.abhavan ||
evaṃ te vipra kathitaṃ viṣṇubhaktadvijaissaha || 22 || ||
|| vyāsa uvāca || ||
tacchrutvā munayassarve viśālāyāṃ nivāsinaḥ ||
naraṃ nārāyaṇaṃ devaṃ saṃpūjya vinayānvitāḥ ||23||
dhyānaṃ cakrurmudā yuktā dviśataṃ parivatsarān ||
tatpaścādbodhitāssarve śaunakādyā munīśvarāḥ || 24 ||
saṃdhyātarpaṇadevārcāḥ kṛtvā dhyātvā janārddanam ||
lomaharṣaṇamāsīnaṃ papracchurvinayānvitāḥ || 25 ||
vyāsaśiṣya mahābhāga ciraṃ jīva mahāmate ||
sāṃprataṃ vartate yo vai rājā tanme vada prabho || 26 ||
||sūta uvāca || ||
trisahasrābdasaṃprāpte kalau bhārgavanaṃdana ||
āvante śaṃkhanāmā.asau sāṃprataṃ vartate nṛpaḥ ||27||
mlecchadeśe śakapatiratha rājyaṃ karoti vai ||
śṛṇu tatkāraṇaṃ sarve yathā yasya vivardhanam || 28 ||
dvisahasre kalau prāpte mlecchavaṃśavivarddhitā ||
bhūmirmlecchamayī sarvā nānāpathavivarddhitā||29||
brahmāvartamṛte tatra sarasvatyāstaṭaṃ śubham ||
mlecchācāryaśca mūśākhyastanmataiḥ pūritaṃ jagat || 3.1.5.30 ||
devārcanaṃ vedabhāṣā naṣṭā prāpte kalau yuge ||
tallakṣaṇaṃ śṛṇu mune mlecchabhāṣāścaturvidhāḥ || 31||
vrajabhāṣā mahārāṣṭrī yāvanī ca guruṃḍikā ||
tāsāṃ caturlakṣavidhā bhāṣāścānyāstathaiva ca || ||32||
pānīyaṃ ca smṛtaṃ pānī bubhukṣā bhūkha ucyate ||
pānīyaṃ pāpaḍī bhāṣā bhojanaṃ kakkanaṃ smṛtam ||33||
iṣṭiśuddharavaḥ prokta istinī masapāvanī
āhutirvai āju iti dadāti ca dadhāti ca || 34 ||
pitṛpaitarabhrātā ca bādaraḥ patireva ca ||
seti sā yāvanī bhāṣā hyaśvaścāspastathā punaḥ||35||
jānusthāne jainuśabdaḥ saptasiṃdhustathaiva ca ||
saptahinduryāvanī ca punarjñeyā guruṃḍikā || 36 ||
ravivāre ca saṃḍe ca phālgune caiva pharvarī ||
ṣaṣṭiśca siksaṭī jñeyā tadudāhāramīdṛśam || 37 ||
yā pavitrā saptapurī tāsu hiṃsā pravartate ||
dasyavaḥ śabarā bhillā mūrkhā ārye sthitā narāḥ|| 38 ||
mlecchadeśe buddhimato narā vai mlecchadharmiṇaḥ ||
mlecchādhīnā guṇāḥ sarve.avaguṇā āryadeśake || 39 ||
mleccharājyaṃ bhārate ca taddvīpeṣu smṛtaṃ tathā ||
evaṃ jñātvā muniśreṣṭha hariṃ bhaja mahāmate || 3.1.5.40 ||
tacchrutvā munayaḥ sarve rodanaṃ cakrire bahu || 41 ||
iti śrībhaviṣye mahāpurāṇe pratisargaṃ parvaṇi caturyugakhaṃḍāparaparyāye kaliyugabhūpavarṇanaṃnāma paṃcamo.adhyāyaḥ || 5 ||
kaliyugabhūpākhyānavarṇanam
|| śaunaka uvāca || ||
brahmāvarte kathaṃ mlecchā na prāptāḥ kāraṇaṃ vada||
sūtaḥ prāha śṛṇuṣvedaṃ sarasvatyāḥ prabhāvataḥ ||1||
mlecchāḥ prāptā na tatsthāne kāśyapo nāma vai dvijaḥ ||
kalau prāpte sahasrābde svargātprāptaḥ surājñayā || 2 ||
āryāvatī ca tatpatnī daśa putrānakalmaṣān ||
kāśyapātsā labdhavatī teṣāṃ nāmāni me śṛṇu || 3 ||
upādhyāyo dīkṣitaśca pāṭhakaḥ śuklamiśrakau ||
agnihotrī dvivedī ca trivedī pāṇḍya eva ca || 4 ||
caturvedīti kathitā nāmatulyaguṇāḥ smṛtāḥ ||
teṣāṃ madhye kāśyapaśca sarvajñānamasamanvitaḥ || 5 ||
kāśmīre prāptavānso.api jagadambāṃ sarasvatīm ||
tuṣṭāva pūjanaṃ kṛtvā raktapuṣpaistvathākṣataiḥ || 6 ||
dhūpairdīpaiśca naivedyaiḥ puṣpāṃjalisamanvitaḥ||7|
|| kāśyapa uvāca || ||
mātaḥ śaṃkaradayite mayi te karuṇā kuto nāsti||
bho.asi tvaṃ jagadaṃbā jagataḥ kiṃ māṃ bahirna yasi ||8||
devi tvaṃ surahetordharmadrohiṇamāśu haṃsi mātaḥ ||
uttamasaṃskṛtabhāṣāṃ tvaṃ kuru mlecchāṃśca mohayeḥ śīghram || 9 ||
aṃba tvaṃ bahurūpā huṃkārā ddhūmralocanaṃ hasi ||
bhīmaṃ durgā daityaṃ hatvā jagatāṃ sukhaṃ nayasi || 3.1.6.10 ||
daṃbhaṃ mohaṃ ghoraṃ garvaṃ hatvā sadā sukhaṃ śeṣe ||
bodhaya mātarjagato duṣṭānnaṣṭā nkuru tvaṃ vai ||
tadā prasannā sā devī bho munestasya mānase || 11 ||
vāsaṃ kṛtvā dadau jñānaṃ miśradeśe munirgataḥ ||
sarvānmlecchānmohayitvā kṛtvātha tāndvijanmanaḥ || 12 ||
saṃkhyādaśasahasraṃ ca naravṛndaṃ dvijanmanām ||
dvisahasraṃ smṛtā vaiśyāḥ śeṣāḥ śūdrasutāḥ smṛtāḥ || 13 ||
taiḥ sārddhamāryadeśe sa sarasvatyāḥ prasādataḥ ||
avasadvai muniśreṣṭho munikāryarataḥ sadā || 14 ||
teṣāmāryasamūhānāṃ devyāśca varadānataḥ ||
vṛddhirbhavati bahulā catuṣkoṭinarāḥ striyaḥ || 15 ||
teṣāṃ putrāśca pautrāśca tadbhūpaḥ kāśyapo muniḥ ||
viṃśottaraśataṃ varṣaṃ tasya rājyaṃ prakīrtitam || 16 ||
rājyaputrākhyadeśe ca śūdrāścāṣṭasahasrakāḥ ||
teṣāṃ bhūpaścāryapṛthustasmājjātassa māgadhaḥ || 17 ||
māgadhaṃ nāma tatputramabhiṣicya yayau muniḥ ||
iti śrutvā bhṛguśreṣṭhaḥ śaunako harṣamāgataḥ || 18 ||
sūtaṃ paurāṇikaṃ natvā viṣṇudhyānaparo.abhavat ||
punaśca śrutivarṣānte bodhitā munayastathā || 19||
nityanaimittikaṃ kṛtvā papracchuridamādarāt ||
lomaharṣaṇa me brūhi ke rājānaśca māgadhāt ||
kalau rājyaṃ kṛtaṃ yaistu vyāsaśiṣya vadasva naḥ ||3.1.6.20||
|| sūta uvāca || | || ||
māgadho māgadhe deśe prāptavānkāśyapātmajaḥ||21||
pitṛrājyaṃ smṛtaṃ tena tvāryadeśaḥ pṛthakkṛtaḥ||
pāñcālātpūrvato deśo māgadhaḥ parikīrtitaḥ || 22 ||
āgneyyāṃ ca kaliṃgaśca tathāvantastu dakṣiṇe ||
ānartadeśā nairṛtyāṃ siṃdhudeśastu paścime || 21 ||
vāyavyāṃ kaikayo deśo madradeśastathottare ||
īśāne caiva koṇindaścāryadeśaśca tatkṛtaḥ ||24||
deśanāmnā tasya sutā magadhasya mahātmanaḥ ||
tebhyoṃśāni pradattāni tatpaścātkratumudvahan ||25||
balabhadrastadā tuṣṭo yajñabhāvena bhāvitaḥ ||
śiśunāgaḥ kratorjāto balabhadrāṃśasaṃbhavaḥ ||26||
śatavarṣaṃ kṛtaṃ rājyaṃ kākavarmā suto.abhavat ||
tadrājyaṃ navativarṣaṃ kṣemadharmā tato.abhavat || 27 ||
aśītivarṣaṃ rājyaṃ tatkṣetraujāstatsuto.abhavat ||
daśahīnaṃ kṛtaṃ rājyaṃ vedamiśrastato.abhavat || 28 ||
daśahīnaṃ kṛtaṃ rājyaṃ tato.ajātaripussutaḥ ||
daśahīnaṃ kṛtaṃ rājyaṃ darbhakastanayo.abhavat || 29 ||
daśahīnaṃ kṛtaṃ rājyamudayāśvastato.abhavat ||
daśahīnaṃ kṛtaṃ rājyaṃ naṃdavardhana eva tat || 3.1.6.30 ||
daśahīnaṃ kṛtaṃ rājyaṃ tasmānnaṃdasuto.abhavat ||
pitustulyaṃ kṛtaṃ rājyaṃ śūdrīgarbhasamudbhavaḥ || 31 ||
nandājjātaḥ pranandaśca daśavarṣaṃ kṛtaṃ padam ||
tasmājātaḥ parānandaḥ pitustulyaṃ kṛtaṃ padam || 32 ||
tasmājjātassamānaṃdo viṃśadvarṣaṃ kṛtaṃ padam ||
tasmājātaḥ priyānaṃdaḥ pitustulyaṃ kṛtaṃ padam || 33 ||
devānaṃdastasya sutaḥ pitustulyaṃ kṛtaṃ padam ||
yajñabhaṃgaḥ sutastasmātpiturarddhaṃ kṛtaṃ padam || 34||
mauryānaṃdastasya sutaḥ pitustulyaṃ kṛtaṃ padam ||
mahānandastato jātaḥ pitustulyaṃ kṛtaṃ padam || 35 ||
etasminneva kāle tu kalinā saṃsmṛto hariḥ ||
kāśyapādudbhavo devo gautamo nāma viśrutaḥ || 36 ||
bauddhadharmaṃ ca saṃskatya paṭṭaṇe prāptavānhariḥ ||
daśavarṣaṃ kṛtaṃ rājyaṃ tasmācchākyamuniḥ smṛtaḥ || 37 ||
viṃśadvarṣaṃ kṛtaṃ rājyaṃ tasmācchuddhodano.abhavat ||
triṃśadvarṣaṃ kṛtaṃ rājyaṃ śākya siṃhastato.abhavat || 38 ||
śatādrau dvisahasre.abde vyatīte so.abhavannṛpaḥ ||
kaleḥ prathamacaraṇe vedamārgo vināśitaḥ || 39 ||
ṣaṣṭivarṣaṃ kṛtaṃ rājyaṃ sarvabauddhā narāḥ smṛtāḥ||
nareṣu viṣṇurnṛpatiryathā rājā tathā prajāḥ||3.1.6.40||
viṣṇorvīryānusāreṇa jagaddharmaḥ pravarttate ||
tasminharau ye śaraṇaṃ prāptā māyāpatau narāḥ || 41 ||
api pāpasamācārā mokṣavaṃtaḥ prakīrtitāḥ ||
śakyasiṃhādbuddhasiṃhaḥ piturarthaṃ kṛtaṃ padam || 42 ||
caṃdraguptastasya sutaḥ paurasā dhipateḥ sutām ||
sulūvasya tathodvāhya yāvanībauddhatatparaḥ || 43 ||
ṣaṣṭivarṣaṃ kṛtaṃ rājyaṃ biṃdusārastato.abhavat ||
pitṛstulya kṛtaṃ rājyamaśokastanayo.abhavat ||44||
etasminneva kāle tu kānyakubjo dvijottamaḥ ||
arbudaṃ śikharaṃ prāpya brahmahomamathākarot ||45||
vedamaṃtraprabhāvācca jātāścatvāri kṣatriyāḥ ||
pramarassāmavedī ca capahāniryajurvidaḥ||46||
trivedī ca tathā śuklotharvā sa parihārakaḥ ||
airāvatakule jātāngajānāruhya te pṛthak ||47||
aśokaṃ svavaśaṃ cakussarve bauddhā vināśitāḥ ||
caturlakṣāḥ smṛtā bauddhāḥ divyaśastraiḥ prahāritāḥ || 48 ||
avante pramaro bhūpaścaturyojanavistṛtām ||
ambāvatīṃ nāma purīmadhyāsya sukhito.abhavat || 49 ||
iti śrībhaviṣye mahāpurāṇe pratisargaparvaṇi caturyugakhaṃḍāparaparyāye kaliyugabhūpavarṇano pākhyāne ṣaṣṭhodhyāyaḥ || 6 || cha ||

|| sūta uvāca || ||
citrakūṭagirerdeśe parihāro mahīpatiḥ ||
kaliṃjarapuraṃ ramyamakrośāyatanaṃ smṛtam || 1 ||
adhyāsya bauddhahaṃtā sa sukhitobhavadūrjitaḥ ||
rājaputrākhyadeśe ca capahānirmahīpatiḥ || 2 ||
ajamerapuraṃ ramyaṃ vidhiśobhāsamanvitam ||
cāturvarṇyayutaṃ divyamadhyāsya sukhito.abhavat || 3 ||
śuklo nāma mahīpālo gata ānarta.amaṃḍale ||
dvārakāṃ nāma nagarīmadhyāsya sukhito.abhavat || 4 || |
|| śaunaka uvāca ||
teṣāmagnyudbhavānāṃ ca ye bhūpā rājyasatkṛtāḥ ||
tānme brūhi mahābhāga sūto vākyamathābravīt || 5 ||
gacchadhvaṃ brāhmaṇāḥ sarve yoganidrāvaśo hyaham ||
tacchutvā munayaḥ sarve viṣṇordhyānaṃ pracakrire || 6 ||
pūrṇe dve ca sahasrānte sūto vacanamabravīt ||
saptatriṃśaśate varṣe daśābde cādhike kalau || 7 ||
pramaro nāma bhūpālaḥ kṛtaṃ rājyaṃ ca ṣaṭsamāḥ||
mahāmadastato jātaḥ piturardhaṃ kṛtaṃ padam ||8||
devāpistanayastasya pitu stulyaṃ kṛtaṃ padam ||
devadūtastasya sutaḥ pitustulyaṃ smṛtaṃ padam || 9 ||
tasmādgaṃdharvasenaśca paṃcāśadabdabhūpadam ||
kṛtvā ca svasutaṃ śaṃkhamabhiṣicya vanaṃ gataḥ || 3.1.7.10 ||
śaṃkhena tatpadaṃ prāptaṃ rājyaṃ triṃśatsamāḥ kṛtam ||
devāṃganā vīramatī śakreṇa preṣitā tadā || 11 ||
gaṃdharvasenaṃ saṃprāpya putraratnamajījanat ||
sutasya janmakāle tu nabhasaḥ puṣpavṛṣṭayaḥ || 12 ||
peturduṃdubhayo nedurvāṃti vātāḥ sukhapradāḥ ||
śivadṛṣṭirdvijo nāma śiṣyaissārddhaṃ vanaṃ gataḥ || 13 ||
viṃśadbhiḥ karmayogaṃ ca samārādhya śivo.abhavat ||
pūrṇe triṃśacchate varṣe kalau prāpte bhayaṃkare || 14 ||
śakānāṃ ca vināśārthamāryadha rmavivṛddhaye ||
jātaśśivājñayā so.api kailāsādguhyakālayāt || 15||
vikramādityanāmānaṃ pitā kṛtvā mumoda ha ||
sa bālo.api mahāprājñaḥ pitṛ mātṛpriyaṃkaraḥ || 16 ||
pañcavarṣe vayaḥprāpte tapaso.arthe vanaṃ gataḥ ||
dvādaśābdaṃ prayatnena vikrameṇa kṛtaṃ tapaḥ || 17 ||
paścādambāvatīṃ divyāṃ purīṃ yātaḥ śriyānvitaḥ ||
divyaṃ siṃhāsanaṃ ramyaṃ dvātriṃśanmūrtisaṃyutam || 18 ||
śivena preṣitaṃ tasmai sopi tatpadamagrahīt ||
vaitālastasya rakṣārthaṃ pārva tyā nirmito gataḥ || 19 ||
ekadā sa nṛpo vīro mahākāleśaśvarasthalam ||
gatvā sampūjayāmāsa devadevaṃ pinākinam || 3.1.7.20 ||
sabhā dharmamayī tatra nirmitā vyūhavistarā ||
nānādhātukṛtastambhā nānāmaṇivibhūṣitā ||21||
nānādrumalatākīrṇā puṣpavallībhiranvitā ||
tatra siṃhāsanaṃ divyaṃ sthā pitaṃ tena śaunaka || 22 ||
āhūya brāhmaṇānmukhyānvedavedāṃgapāragān ||
pūjayitvā vidhānena dharmagāthāmathā.aśṛṇot || 23 ||
etasminnantare tatra vaitālo nāma devatā ||
sa kṛtvā brāhmaṇaṃ rūpa jayāśīrbhiḥ praśasya tam || 24 ||
upaviśyāsane vipro rājānamidamabravīt ||
yadi te śravaṇe śraddhā vikramādityabhūpate || 25 ||
varṇayāmi mahākhyānamitihāsasamuccayam || 26 ||
iti śrībhaviṣye mahāpurāṇe pratisargaparvaṇi caturyugakhaṇḍāpara paryāye kaliyugasaṃbhūtaraviśaśivaṃśabhūpavarṇanaṃ nāma saptamo.adhyāyaḥ || 7 || || cha || ||
iti prathamakhaṃḍaḥ saṃpūrṇaḥ || 1 || || || ||
viṣayānukramaṇikā

iti madhyamaparvasthaviṣayānukramaṇikā || 3 ||
atha pratisargaparvasthaviṣayānukramaṇikā || 3 ||

iti prathamaḥ khaṇḍaḥ || 1 ||)

|| śrīgaṇeśāya namaḥ ||
|| sūta uvāca || ||
ityuktassa tu vaitālo mahākāleśvarasthitaḥ ||
śivaṃ manasi saṃsthāpya rājñānamidamabravīt||
vikramādityabhūpāla śṛṇu gāthāṃ manoramām ||
vārāṇasī purī ramyā maheśo yatra tiṣṭhati || 2 ||
cāturvarṇyaprajā yatra pratāpamukuṭo nṛpaḥ ||
mahādevī ca mahiṣī dharmajñasya mahīpateḥ || 3 ||
tatputro vajramukuṭo maṃtriṇaḥ sutavallabhāḥ ||
ṣoḍaśābde.atha saṃprāpte hayārūḍho vanaṃ gataḥ ||4||
amātyatanayaścaiva buddhidakṣa iti śrutaḥ ||
hayārūḍho gataḥ sārdhaṃ samānavayasā vane ||5||
sa dṛṣṭvā vipinaṃ ramyaṃ mṛgapakṣisamanvitam ||
mumoda vajamukuṭaḥ kāmāśayavaśaṃ gataḥ || 6 ||
tatra divyaṃ saro ramyaṃ nānāpakṣinināditam ||
tasya kūle śivasthānaṃ munivṛṃdaiḥ prapūjitam || 7 ||
dṛṣṭvā tatra gatau vīrau paramānaṃdamā patuḥ ||
etasminnaṃtare bhūpa karaṇāṭakabhūpateḥ || 8 ||
daṃtavaktrasya tanayā nāmnā padmāvatī matā ||
kāmadevaṃ namaskṛtya kāminī kāmarūpiṇī ||9||
cikrīḍa sakhibhiḥ krīḍāṃ saromadhye manoharā ||
tadā tu vajramukuṭo mandirādāgato bahiḥ || 3.2.1.10 ||
dṛṣṭvā padmāvatīṃ bālāṃ tulyarūpaguṇānvitām||
mūrcchitaḥ patito bhūmau sā dṛṣṭvā tu mumoha vai || 11 ||
prabuddho vajramukuṭo māṃ pāhi śivaśaṃkara ||
ityuktvā bhūpatanayaḥ punarbālāṃ dadarśa ha || 12
śirasaḥ padmakusumaṃ sā gṛhītvā tu karṇayoḥ ||
kṛtvā cakhāna daśanaiḥ pādayordadhatī punaḥ || 13 ||
punargṛhītvā tatpuṣpaṃ hṛdaye saṃpraveśitam ||
iti bhāvaṃ ca sā kṛtvā.a.alibhiḥ sārdhaṃ yayau gṛham || 14 ||
tīrthārthaṃ ca samaṃ pitrā saṃprāptā girijāvane ||
tasyāṃ gatāyāṃ sa nṛpo mārabāṇena pīḍitaḥ || 15 ||
mahatīṃ mānasīṃ pīḍāṃ prāptavānmohamāgataḥ ||
unmādīva tato bhūtvā khādyapānavivarjitaḥ || 16 ||
dhyātvā padmāvatīṃ bālāṃ maunavratamacīkarat ||
tadā kolāhalo jātaḥ pratāpamukuṭāṃtike || 17 ||
kumāraḥ kāṃ daśāṃ prāpta iti hāheti sarvataḥ ||
tridināṃte maṃtrisuto buddhi dakṣo viśāradaḥ || 18 ||
abravīdvajramukuṭaṃ satyaṃ kathaya bhūpate ||
sa āha kāraṇaṃ sarvaṃ yathā jātaṃ sarovare || 19 ||
tacchrutvā buddhidakṣaśca viha syāha mahīpatim ||
mahākaṣṭena sā devī mitratvaṃ hi gamiṣyati || 3.2.1.20 ||
karaṇāṭakabhūpasya daṃtavaktrasya sā sutā ||
padmāvatīti vikhyātā dadhatī tvāṃ svamānase || 21 ||
puṣpabhāvena jñātvāhaṃ tvāṃ nayāmi tadaṃtike ||
ityuktvā tasya pitaraṃ pratāpamukuṭaṃ prati || 22 ||
āhājñāṃ dehi bhūpāla yāsyehaṃ kāraṇāṭake ||
tvatsutasya cikitsārthaṃ sa vajramukuṭo.aciram || 23 ||
āyāmi nā.atra sandeho yadi jīvayase sutam ||
tatheti matvā sa nṛpaḥ prādātputraṃ ca mantriṇe || 24 ||
hayārūḍhau gatau śīghraṃ daṃtavaktrasya pattane ||
kācidvṛddhā sthitā tatra tasyā gehaṃ ca tau gatau || 25 ||
bahudravyaṃ dadau tasyai buddhidakṣo viśāradaḥ ||
ūṣaturmaṃdire tasminrātriṃ ghoratamovṛtām || 26 ||
prātaḥkāle tu sā vṛddhā gacchatī rājamandiram ||
tāmāha mantritanayaḥ śṛṇu mātarvaco mama || 27 ||
padmāvatīṃ ca saṃprāpyaikāṃte madvacanaṃ vada ||
jyeṣṭhaśuklasya pañcamyāmiṃduvāre sarovare || 28 ||
yo dṛṣṭaḥ puruṣo ramyastvadarthe samupāgataḥ||
iti śrutvā yayau vṛddhā padmaṃ tasyai nyavedayat || 29 ||
ruṣṭā padmāvatī prāha caṃdanārdrāṃgulīyikā ||
gaccha gaccha mahāduṣṭe talenorasyatāḍayat ||3.2.1.30 ||
aṃgulībhiḥ kapolau ca tasyāḥ spṛṣṭvā yayau gṛham ||
sā tu vṛddhā buddhidakṣaṃ sarvaṃ bhāvaṃ nyavedayat || || 31 ||
samitraṃ duḥkhitaṃ prāha śṛṇu mitra śucaṃ tyaja ||
tvāmāha bhūpateḥ kanyā prāṇapriya vacaḥ śṛṇu || 32 ||
tvadarthe tāḍitaṃ vakṣaḥ kadā mitraṃ bhaviṣyasi||
śrutvā tanmadhuraṃ vākyaṃ rajo dehe samāgatam || 33 ||
rajasvalāṃte bho mitra tavāsyaṃ cuṃbitāsmyaham ||
iti śrutvā bhūpasutaḥ paramā nandamāyayau || 34 ||
tridināṃte tu sā vṛddhā padmāvatyai nyavedayet ||
tvāmutsukaḥ sa bhūpālastava darśanalālasaḥ || 35 ||
taṃ bhajasvādya suśroṇi saphalaṃ jīvanaṃ kuru ||
iti śrutvā mahāhṛṣṭā sā masyārdrāṃgulīyakam || 36 ||
gavākṣadvāri niṣkāsya tale pṛṣṭhe ca tāḍitā ||
tathaiva vṛddhā taṃ prāpya mantriṇaṃ cābravīdvacaḥ || 37 ||
prasanno buddhidakṣaśca mitraṃ prāha śṛṇuṣva bhoḥ ||
paścime diśi bhoḥ svāmingavākṣaṃ tava nirmitam || 38 ||
arddharātre tu saṃprāpya bhaja māṃ kāmavihvalām ||
śrutvā tadvajramukuṭaḥ priyādarśanalālasaḥ || 39 ||
yayau śīghraṃ mahākāmī ramaṇīṃ tāmarāmayat ||
māsāṃte kāmaśithilo mitradarśanalālasaḥ || 3.2.1.40 ||
padmāvatīṃ priyāṃ prāha śṛṇu vākyaṃ varānane ||
yena prāptavatī mahyaṃ tvaṃ subhrūḥ suradurlabhā || 41 ||
tanmitraṃ buddhidakṣaśca kiṃ nu tiṣṭhati sāṃpratam ||
ājñāṃ dehi priye mahyaṃ dṛṣṭvāyāsyāmi teṃ.atikam || 42 ||
iti śrutvā vacastasya niṣṭhuraṃ kuli śopamam ||
miṣṭānnaṃ saviṣaṃ kṛtvā maṃtriṇe sā nyavedayat || 43 ||
tadā tu buddhidakṣaśca citraguptaprapūjakaḥ ||
jñātvā tatkāraṇaṃ sarvaṃ na tu bhakṣita vānsvayam || 44 ||
etasminnantare prāpto bhūpatistvarayānvitaḥ ||
vivekavantaṃ mitraṃ taṃ dṛṣṭvā prāha ruṣānvitaḥ || 45 ||
kasmānna khāditaṃ mitra bhojanaṃ matpriyākṛtam ||
vihasya buddhidakṣastu sārameye dadau hi tat || 46 ||
bhuktvā sa maraṇaṃ prāptaḥ sa dṛṣṭvā vismito nṛpaḥ ||
strīcaritraṃ ca vijñāya snehaṃ tyaktvā.abravīttu tam ||47||
mitra gaccha gṛhaṃ śīghraṃ mayā tyaktā ca pāpinī ||
sa āha śṛṇu bhūpāla gaccha śīghraṃ priyāṃtikam ||48||
tadalaṃkāramāhṛtya triśūlaṃ kuru jānuni ||
prasuptāṃ tyaja bho mitra yā hi tvaṃ mā vicāraya || 49 ||
iti śrutvā yayau bhūpastathā kṛtvā samāgataḥ ||
svamitreṇa yayau sārdhaṃ smaśāne rudramaṇḍape || 3.2.1.50 ||
śiṣyaṃ kṛtvā nṛpaṃ taṃ sa yogirūpo hi bhūṣaṇam ||
vikrayārthaṃ dadau tasmai svamitrāya sa buddhimān || 51 ||
sa vajramukuṭo matvā tadājñāṃ nagaraṃ gataḥ ||
coroyamiti taṃ matvā baddhvā rājño hi rakṣiṇaḥ || 52 ||
śīghraṃ nivedayāmāsurdantavaktrastamabravīt ||
kva prāptaṃ bhūṣaṇaṃ ramyaṃ sarvaṃ kathaya pūruṣa || 53 ||
jaṭilaḥ prāha bho rājanśmaśāne madguruḥ sthitaḥ ||
tena dattaṃ vikrayārthaṃ bhūṣaṇaṃ svarṇaguṃṭhitam || 54 ||
iti śrutvā sa nṛpatistūrṇamāhūya tadgurum ||
bhūṣaṇaṃ pṛṣṭavānrājā yogī prāha śṛṇuṣva bhoḥ || 55 ||
smaśāne saṃdhitaṃ maṃtraṃ mayā yogisvarūpiṇā ||
piśācī prāpitā kācittasyāścihnaṃ mayā kṛtam || 56 ||
vāmajānuni śūlena tayā dattaṃ hi bhūṣaṇam ||
jñātvā tatkāraṇaṃ rājā sutā niṣkāsitā gṛhāt || 57 ||
sa vajramukuṭastāṃ tu gṛhītvā gṛhamāyayau ||
vihasya prāha vaitālaḥ śṛṇu vikramabhūpate || 58 ||
kasmai pāpaṃ mahatprāptaṃ caturṇā me vadādhunā ||
|| sūta uvāca || ||
iti śrutvā vacastasya vikramo nāma bhūpatiḥ || 59 ||
vihasya bhārgavaṃ prāha prāptaṃ pāpaṃ hi bhūpateḥ ||
mitrakāryamamātyena svāmikāryaṃ ca rakṣibhiḥ || 3.2.1.60 ||
bhūpa putreṇārthasiddhaṃ kṛtaṃ tasmācca bhūpateḥ ||
mahatpāpaṃ ca saṃprāptaṃ tenāsau narakaṃ gataḥ || 61 ||
rajovatīṃ sutāṃ dṛṣṭvā na vivāheta yo naraḥ ||
sa pāpī narakaṃ yāti ṣaṣṭivarṣasahasrakam || 62 ||
gāṃdharvaṃ ca vivāhaṃ vai kāminyā ca kṛtaṃ yayā ||
tasyā vighnakaro yo vai sa pāpī yamapīḍitaḥ || 63 ||
adṛṣṭadoṣāṃ yaḥ kanyāṃ vivekena vinā tyajet ||
sa pāpī narakaṃ yāti lakṣavarṣapramāṇakam || 64 ||
iti śrutvā? sa vaitālo dharmagāthāṃ nṛperitām ||
prasannahṛdayaḥ prāha bhūpatiṃ dharmatatparam ||65 ||
iti śrībhaviṣye mahāpurāṇe pratisargaparvaṇi caturyugakhaṇḍāparaparyāye nāma prathamo.adhyāyaḥ || 1 ||

|| sūta uvāca || ||
prasannamanasaṃ bhūpaṃ mahāsiṃhāsane sthitam ||
dvijavaryaḥ sa vaitālo vacaḥ prāha prasannadhīḥ ||1||
ekadā yamunātīre dharmasthalapurī śubhā ||
dhanadhānyasamāyuktā caturvarṇasamanvitā || 2 ||
guṇādhipo mahīpālastatra rājyaṃ cakāra vai ||
hariśarmā purodhāstu snānapūjanatatparaḥ ||3 ||
tasya patnī suśīlā ca pativrataparāyaṇā ||
satyaśīlaḥ suto jāto vidyādhyayanatatparaḥ || 4 ||
tasyānujā madhumatī śīlarūpaguṇānvitā ||
dvādaśābdavayaḥprāpte vivāhārthaṃ pitā yadā || 5 ||
bhrātā? babhrāma tau sarvaṃ cinutaśca sutāvaram ||
kadācidrājaputrasya vivāhe samato dvijaḥ || 6 ||
paṭhanārthe tu kāśyāṃ vai sattvaśīlaḥ svayaṃ gataḥ ||
etasminnaṃtare rājandvijaḥ kaścitsamāgataḥ || 7 ||
vāmano nāma vikhyāto rūpaśīlavayovṛtaḥ ||
sutā madhumatī taṃ ca dṛṣṭvā kāmāturā.abhavat || 8 ||
bhojanaṃ chādanaṃ pānaṃ svapnaṃ tyaktvā ca vihvalā ||
cakorīva vinā caṃdraṃ kāmabāṇaprapīḍitā || 9 ||
dṛṣṭvā suśīlā taṃ bālā vāmanaṃ brāhmaṇaṃ tathā ||
vārayāmāsa tāṃbūlaiḥ svarṇadravyasamanvitaiḥ || 3.2.2.10 ||
hariśarmā prayoge ca dvijaṃ dṛṣṭvā trivikramam ||
vedavedāṃtattvajñaṃ sutārthe.avarayattadā || 11 ||
satyaśīlastu kāśyāṃ vai guruputraṃ ca keśavam ||
varitvā taṃ bhaginyarthe yayau gehaṃ mudānvitaḥ || 12 ||
māghakṛṣṇatrayodaśyāṃ bhṛgau lagnaṃ śubhaṃ smṛtam ||
trayo viprāstadā prāptāḥ kanyārthe rūpamohitāḥ || 13 ||
tasminkāle tu sā kanyā bhujagenaiva daṃśitā ||
mṛtā pretatvamāpannā pūrvakarmaprabhāvataḥ || 14 ||
tadā te brāhmaṇā yatnaṃ kārayāmāsuruttamam ||
na jīvanavatī bālā garalena vimohitā ||15||
hariśarmā tu tatsarvaṃ kṛtvā vedavidhānataḥ ||
āyayau maṃdiraṃ rājantsutāguṇavimohitaḥ || 16 ||
trivikramastu bahudhā duḥkhaṃ kṛtvā smarānugaḥ ||
kaṃthādhārī yatirbhūtvā deśāddeśātaraṃ yayau || 17 ||
keśavastu mahāduḥkhī priyāsthīni gṛhītavān ||
tīrthāttīrthāṃtaraṃ prāptaḥ kāmabāṇena pīḍitaḥ || 18 ||
bhasmagrāhī vāmanastu virahāgniprapīḍitaḥ ||
tasthau citāyāṃ kāmārtaḥ patnīdhyānaparāyaṇaḥ ||19||
ekadā sarayūtīre lakṣmaṇākhyapure śubhe ||
trivikramastu bhikṣārthe saṃprāpto dvijamaṃdire || 3.2.2.20 ||
tasmindine rāmaśarmā śivadhyānaparāyaṇaḥ ||
yatinaṃ varayāmāsa bhojanārthaṃ svamaṃdire || 21 ||
tasya patnī viśālākṣī racitvā bahubhojanam ||
āhūya yatinaṃ rājanpātramālabhamākarot || 22 ||
tasminkāle ca tadbālo mṛtaḥ pāpavaśaṃgataḥ ||
arodīttasya sairaṃdhrī viśalākṣyapi bhartsitā || 23 ||
na rodanaṃ tyaktavatī putraśokāgnitāpitā ||
rāmaśarmā tadā prāpto maṃtraṃ saṃjīvanaṃ śubham || 24 ||
japitvā mārjanaṃ kṛtvā jīvayāmāsa bālakam ||
vinayāvanato viprastaṃ ca saṃnyāsinaṃ tadā|| || 25 ||
bhojanaṃ kārayitvā tu maṃtraṃ saṃjīvanaṃ dadau ||
trivikramastu taṃ maṃtraṃ paṭhitvā yamunātaṭe ||26||
prāptavānyatra sā nārī dāhitā hariśarmaṇā||
etasminnantare tatra rājaputro mṛtiṃ gataḥ || 27 ||
dāhitastanayaḥ pitrā śokakartrā tadāmunā ||
jīvanaṃ prāptavānbālastasya maṃtraprabhāvataḥ || 28 ||
guṇādhipasya tanayo rājño dharmasthalīpateḥ ||
trivikramaṃ vacaḥ prāha vīrabāhurmahābalaḥ ||29||
jīvanaṃ dattavānmahyaṃ varayādya varaṃ mama ||
sa vipraḥ prāha bho rājankeśavo nāma yo dvijaḥ || 3.2.2.30 ||
gṛhītvāsthi gatastīrthe tamanveṣaya mā ciram ||
vīrabāhustathā matvā dūtamārgeṇa taṃ prati || 31 ||
prāptastaṃ kathayāmāsa yathā prāptaṃ hi jīvanam ||
iti śrutvā vacastasya keśavo.asthisamanvitaḥ |32||
pragatyāsthīni sarvāṇi dadau tasmai dvijātaye ||
punaḥ saṃjīvitā bālā keśavādīnvaco.abravīt||33||
yogyā dharmeṇa yasyāhaṃ tasmai prāyāmi dharmiṇe||
iti śrutvā vacastasyā maunavaṃtastrayaḥ sthitāḥ||34||
atastvaṃ vikramāditya dharmajña kathayasva me ||
kasmai yogyā ca sā bālā nāmnā madhumatī śubhā || 35 ||
||sūta uvāca || ||
vihasya vikramādityo vaitālaṃ prāha namradhīḥ||
yogyā madhumatī nārī vāmanāya dvijanmane||36||
prāṇadātā tu yo vipraḥ piteva guṇatatparaḥ ||
asthidātā tu yo vipro bhrātṛtulyassa vedavit || 37 ||
iti śrībhaviṣye mahāpurāṇe pratisargaparvaṇi caturyugakhaṇḍāparaparyāye kaliyugīyetihāsasamuccaye dvitīyo.adhyāyaḥ || 2 ||
|| sūta uvāca || ||
vipravarya mahābhāga śṛṇu gāthāṃ manoramām||
vaitālo bhūpatiśreṣṭhaṃ punarvikramamabravīt ||1||
varddhavannagare ramye nānājananiṣevite||
tatrābhavanmahīpālo rūpaseno mahābalaḥ || 2 ||
vidvanmālā priyā tasya patisevāparāyaṇā ||
ekadā kṣatriyaḥ kaścinnāmnā vīravaraḥ smṛtaḥ || 3 ||
putrakanyāsapatnīko vṛttyarthaṃ samupāgataḥ ||
vinayāvanato bhūtvā rūpasenaṃ mahīpatim || 4 ||
kiṃcicchrutvā dadau svarṇaṃ sahasraṃ pratyahaṃ nṛpa ||
vīrasenastu tallabdhvā vahnau tīrthe dvijātiṣu ||5||
vyayaṃ kṛtvā tu taccheṣaṃ sa kulye bhuktavānsvayam ||
evaṃ varṣe gate rājanrājalakṣmīḥ śivājñayā ||6||
parīkṣārthaṃ smaśāne ca rodanaṃ bahu kurvatī ||
ardharātre tadā rājā buddhvā prāha svasevakam || 7 ||
gaccha vīravara tvaṃ vai yato.asau śrūyate ravaḥ ||
jñātvā tatkāraṇaṃ sarvaṃ mahyaṃ śīghraṃ nivedaya || 8 ||
iti śrutvā vīravaraḥ śastrāstrakuśalo balī ||
sa tatra gatvā yatrāste rājalakṣmīḥ śubhānanā || 9 ||
ślakṣṇaṃ vacaśca tāmāha kimarthaṃ rodane sthitā ||
mahatkaṣṭaṃ ca kiṃ prāptaṃ kāraṇaṃ devi me vada || 3.2.3.10 ||
iti śrutvā rājalakṣmīrvīrasenaṃ tamabravīt ||
rājalakṣmīṃ ca māṃ viddhi rūpasenasya bhūpateḥ || 11 ||
māsānte pralayaṃ yāsye tasmācchocāmi bho balin ||
sa āha śṛṇu bho devi tvadalpāyussa mīritam ||
kena puṇyena dīrghāyustvaṃ bhaveḥ kāraṇaṃ vada || 12 ||
devyuvāca ||
mahābāho mahāprājña yadi te tanayasya vai || 13 || ||
kapālamarpaya tvaṃ ca caṃḍikāyai tadānagha ||
dīrghāyurbhavitā cāhaṃ svāmikāryaṃ prasādhaya||14||
iti śrutvā vīravaro maṃdiraṃ svayamāgataḥ ||
patnīṃ prāha prasannātmā sutaṃ devyai nivedaya || 15 ||
tathetyuktvā tu sā sādhvī tanayaṃ prāha nirbhayā ||
rājño.arthe tava dehaṃ vai putra pāsi kuruṣva tat || 16 ||
tathā matvā tu tatputro bhaginyā mātṛsaṃyutaḥ||
caṃḍikābhavanaṃ prāpyābravītsvapitaraṃ tadā || 17 ||
bhostāta me kapālaṃ ca caṃḍikāyai samarpaya ||
dīrghāyuryena yatnena rājalakṣmīśca tatkuru || 18 ||
iti śrutvā vīrasenaḥ śiraśchittvā samārpayat ||
tasyānujā mṛtā tatra tathā mātā tathā pitā || 19 ||
dṛṣṭvā tadrūpa senastu kāraṇaṃ sarvamāditaḥ ||
sevakaṃ satyasaṃdhaṃ ca matvā tu svaśiro.arpayat || 3.2.3.20 ||
tadā prasannā sā devī nṛpamujīvya sābravīt ||
varaṃ varaya bhūpāla yatheṣṭaṃ śīghramāpnuyāḥ || 21 ||
sa āha vīrasenastu sakulo jīvamāpnuyāt ||
tathetyuktvā tu sā devī tatraivāṃtarhitābhavat || 22 ||
rūpasenaḥ prasannātmā svasutāṃ kāmarūpiṇīm ||
dadau sutāya vaitālo nṛpatiṃ prāha vismitaḥ||
mukhyasnehaṃ kṛtaṃ kena teṣāṃ madhye vadasva me ||23||
|| rājovāca ||
mukhyasnehaṃ kṛtaṃ rājñā dāsārthe svatanuṃ dadau ||
svarṇasnehī vīravaro dhamarprītiḥ pativratā ||
baṃdhuprītiśca bhaginī pitṛsnehī tu putrakaḥ || 24 ||
mahānsnehaḥ kṛto rājñā rūpasenena dhīmatā || 25 ||
iti śrībhaviṣye mahāpurāṇe pratisargaparvaṇi caturyugakhaṃḍāparaparyāye kaliyugīyetihāsasamuccaye tṛtīyo.adhyāyaḥ || 3 ||cha||

|| sūta uvāca || ||
iti śrutvā sa vaitālo rājānamidamabravīt ||
kācidbhogāvatī nāmnā nagarī paramādbhutā ||1||
rūpavarmā ca nṛpatistatra rājyaṃ karoti vai ||
cūḍāmaṇiriti khyātaḥ śuko buddhiviśāradaḥ ||2||
tasya bhūpasya gehe ca nivasanañcchubhapaṃjare ||
kadācidrūpavarmā ca triṃśadabda urūrjitaḥ || 3 ||
papraccha mama yogyā vai śuka kācidvarāṃganā ||
cedasti tarhi me brūhi śrutvā taṃ cābravīcchukaḥ || 4 ||
magadheśvarabhūpasya kanyā candravatī śubhā ||
tava yogyā hi bho rājansāṃprataṃ tāṃ gṛhāṇa vai || 5 ||
iti śrutvā sa nṛpatirgaṇeśaṃ dvijasattamam ||
preṣayitvā dadau dravyaṃ yathodvāhyā tathā kuru || 6 ||
gaṇeśopi gatastūrṇaṃ deśe māgadhake śubhe ||
mahādevaṃ ca saṃpūjya cakāra stavanaṃ mudā || 7 ||
namaḥ śivāya śāṃtāya sarvābhīṣṭapradāyine ||
bhavāya śaṃkarāyaiva rudrāya satataṃ namaḥ || 8 ||
mṛḍāyānaṃdarūpāya sarvaduḥkhaharāya ca || 9 ||
ityuktavati vipre ca tadā candravatī śubhā ||
kāmāturābravīccaināṃ nāmnā madanamañjarīm || 3.2.4.10 ||
mama yogyaśca puruṣaḥ kaścidasti mahītale ||
sāha bho rūpavarmā ca yogyo bhogāpurīpatiḥ || 11 ||
iti śrutvā tu sā devī durgāṃ vāñchitadāyinīm ||
tuṣṭāva manasā subhrūryayā jātamidaṃ jagat || 12 ||
namonamo jaganmātarmama kāryapradāyini ||
triliṃgajananī tvaṃ vai varṇamūrtiḥ sanātanī ||13||
tvaṃ svāhā tvaṃ svadhā saṃdhyā namastasyai namonamaḥ ||
nṛpatiṃ rūpavarmāṇaṃ matpatiṃ kuru bhoḥ śive||14||
iti stutyā prasannābhūjjagadaṃbā jaganmayī||
pitaraṃ magadheśaṃ ca mohayitvā ca mātaram ||15||
vivāhaṃ kārayāmāsa māsānte siddharūpiṇī ||
rūpavarmā caṃdravatī bubhujāte paraṃ sukham ||16||
ekasmindivase rājanmenāṃ madanamaṃjarīm||
nṛpaḥ prāha vivāhaṃ tvaṃ suśukena kuruṣva bhoḥ || ||17||
mrenakā prāha bho rājanvivāhāścedṛśo matāḥ ||
uttamādhamamadhyāśca puruṣāstrividhāḥ smṛtāḥ||18||
tathaiva trividhā nārī yathā yogyo varo bhavet||
uttamā yo bhavennārī yogyāyā cādhamāya vai ||19||
śṛṇu tatkāraṇaṃ rājanmayā dṛṣṭaṃ yathā.abhavat ||
ilāpure vasatyeko vaiśyo lakṣapatirdhanī|| 3.2.4.20 ||
anapatyo devayājī tasya patnī pativratā ||
bahuyatnena tanayastasya jāto mahādhamaḥ || 21 ||
dyūtakrīḍāparo nityaṃ surāpāne ratassadā ||
veśyāgāmī mahādhūrto nityaṃ māṃsāśanaḥ khalaḥ || 22 ||
tasya dharmaṃ ca pitarau samālokya vanaṃ gatau ||
naraṃ nārāyaṇaṃ dhyātvā paramaṃ padamāpatuḥ || 23 ||
madapālastu tanayaḥ kṛtvā sarvadhanavyayam ||
anyadeśe ca vṛttyarthaṃ jagāma dhanavarjitaḥ ||24||
prāptaścaṃdrapure ramye yatra hemapatiḥ sthitaḥ||
vṛttāṃtaṃ kathayāmāsa vaiśyaṃ hemapatiṃ hi saḥ || 25 ||
devayājī suto.ahaṃ vai svalpaṃ vai dhanamāhṛtam ||
deśāntare vikrayārthe sindhumārgeṇa prāptavān || 26 ||
mahāvāyu prabhāvena dravyaṃ tanmagnamaṃbhasi ||
tallajjayā na yāsye.ahaṃ pitaraṃ prati māriṣa || 27 ||
iti śrutvā hemapatiḥ svapatnīṃ kāmamaṃjarīm ||
vacaḥ prāha prasannātmā saṃyogo vidhinā kṛtaḥ || 28 ||
caṃdrakāṃtiṃ sutāṃ dāsye tadvarāya tvadājñayā ||
saṃmaṃtrya daṃpatī rājandadau kanyāṃ vidhānataḥ || 29 ||
svagṛhe vāsayāmāsa madapālaṃ sutāpatim ||
māsamekamuṣitvā taṃ śvaśuraṃ prāha namradhīḥ || 3.2.4.30 ||
ājñāṃ dehi dhanādhyakṣa svagehaṃ yāmi mā ciram ||
iti śrutvā hemapatiḥ svasutāṃ svarṇabhūṣitām ||31||
caṃdrakāṃtiṃ sadāsīṃ ca tasmai dattvā gṛhaṃ yayau ||
narānvisṛjya duṣṭātmā śibikāvāhakānnṛpa ||| || 32 ||
dāsīṃ hatvā tadā patnīṃ visṛjya dhanavarjitām ||
ekākī prāptavāngehaṃ madapālo mahādhamaḥ || 33 ||
varṣāṃtare ca tatsvarṇaṃ vyayaṃ kṛtvā kumārgake ||
bubhukṣitaḥ punaḥ śokaṃ cakāra bahudhā nṛpa || 34 ||
punaśca śvaśurasyaiva gṛhe saṃprāptavānkhalaḥ ||
caṃdrakāṃtistu taṃ dṛṣṭvā svapatiṃ prāha namradhīḥ || 35 ||
mayā niveditaṃ pitre dhanaṃ cauraiśca luṃṭhitam ||
atastvaṃ tyaja saṃtāpaṃ ciraṃ vasa gṛhe mama || 36 ||
tathetyuktvā mahādhūrta uvāsa katiciddinam ||
jñātvā vimohitā patnīmarddharātre tamovṛte || 37 ||
hatvā tāṃ sa yayau gehaṃ gṛhītvā bahubhūṣaṇam ||
ayogyoyamato rājanvivāhaḥ śukamenayoḥ || 38 ||
iti śrutvā śukaḥ prāha bhūpatiṃ karuṇānidhim ||
vivāhaṃ na kariṣyāmi nāryyā cādhamayā saha || 39 ||
adhamā menakā nārī śyāmāṃgā ca kurūpiṇī ||
uttamo.ahaṃ śuko rājanpuruṣaśca harettanum || 3.2.4.40 ||
śṛṇu tatkāraṇaṃ bhūpa mayā dṛṣṭaṃ mahottamam ||
nagare kāṃcanapure vaṇikchaṃkhapatiḥ śrutaḥ || 41 ||
tasya putrastu medhāvī sindhugupto guṇī dhanī ||
prabhāvatī priyā tasya śrīdattastatsutaḥ smṛtaḥ || 42 ||
vivāhamakarottasya jayaśrīpattane śubhe ||
somadattasya sutayā jayalakṣmyā samanvitam || 43 ||
śrīdattastu gato deśaṃ vāṇijyārthaṃ kurusthalam ||
āyāti dvādaśābde tu sadhano gehamāgataḥ || 44 ||
jayalakṣmīstu kāmena pīḍitā pitṛmaṃdire ||
amātyatanayenaiva homadattena mohitā || 45 ||
dūtī mārgeṇa taṃ prāpya vyayaṃ kṛtvā dhanaṃ bahu ||
ramayāmāsa sā nārī tena sārddhaṃ mahādhamā || 46 ||
trimāsānte ca tatsvāmī śrīdattaḥ śvaśurālaye ||
saṃprāptaḥ sā tu taṃ dṛṣṭvā mahadduḥkhamupāyayau || 47 ||
ardharātre tu tanmātrā preṣitā svapatiṃ prati ||
jayalakṣmīśca saṃprāptā krodhena sphuritādharā||48||
bahumānena svapatisnehaṃ kṛtvālayaṃ yayau ||
tadā tu kulaṭā sā ca gatā dūtīgṛhaṃ prati || 49 ||
śūnyālaye homadatto daṃśito bhujagena vai ||
suṣvāpa maraṇaṃ prāpya tadā bālā samāgatā || 3.2.4.50 ||
vegena ramayāmāsa taṃ jāraṃ viṣamohitam ||
pippalasthaḥ piśācaśca dṛṣṭvā tāṃ jāriṇīṃ śubhām || 51 ||
śavadehaṃ ca saṃprāpya ramaṇīṃ tāmarīramat ||
khanitvā daśanairnāsāṃ pippalopari so.agamat || 52 ||
kaphallo nāma caurastu dṛṣṭvā tatkāraṇaṃ tadā ||
kāminyā anugo bhūtvā maṃdiraṃ tatpraviṣṭavān || 53 ||
tadā tu jayalakṣmīśca svapatiṃ prāpya durbhagā ||
cakre sā rodanaṃ gāḍhaṃ sarve lokāḥ prata sthire || 54 ||
nāsāhīnāṃ sutāṃ dṛṣṭvā somadatto mahādhanaḥ ||
baddhvā jāmātaraṃ śīghraṃ rājāṃtikamupāyayau || 55 ||
nṛpājñayā rājadūtāstamudbaṃdhanamādadhuḥ ||
tadā kaphallaḥ saṃprāpya sarvaṃ rājñe nyavedayat || 56 ||
matvā tasya vacaḥ satyaṃ jayalakṣmīṃ mahādhamām ||
rāsabhopari saṃsthāpya kṛtvā durgatirūpiṇīm || 57 ||
nagarātpreṣayāmāsa vanaṃ śārdūlasevitam ||
atastvaṃ śṛṇu bhūpāla menā madyogyikā na hi || 58 ||
ityuktvā sa tu vaitālo vikramaṃ prāha namradhīḥ ||
nārī pāpādhikā vātha puruṣastadvadvasva me || 59 ||
|| vikrama uvāca || ||
brahmaṇo.aguṇarūpasya māyāvarṇasva rūpiṇī ||
tamo na puṃsakaṃ jñeyaṃ triliṃgaikaṃ tadavyayam || 3.2.4.60 ||
avyayaṃ brahmaṇo dhāma māyā liṃgasvarūpiṇī ||
tayā jātamidaṃ viśvaṃ tadaṃbāyai namonamaḥ || 61 ||
klībā strī sarvadā śreṣṭhā striyāstu puruṣastathā ||
avyādhikaśca puruṣo nārī karmādhikā matā || 62 ||
klībamajñānamadhikaṃ kathitaṃ pūrvakovidaiḥ ||
karmaiva bandhanaṃ puṃsāṃ jñānaṃ nirbaṃdhana smṛtam || 63 ||
ataḥ pāpādhikā nārī puruṣo hīnakilbiṣaḥ || || 64 || ||
iti śrībhaviṣye mahāpurāṇe pratisargaparvaṇi caturyugakhaṇḍāparaparyāye kaliyugīyetihāsasamuccaye caturtho.adhyāyaḥ || 4 || || cha || ||

|| sūta uvāca || ||
bhṛguvarya mahābhāga śrutvā vaitāla eva saḥ ||
prasannātmā vacaḥ prāha bhūpatiṃ jñānasaṃpadam || 1 ||
ujjayinyāṃ mahārāja mahābala iti śrutaḥ ||
caṃdravaṃśī nṛpaḥ prājño vedaśāstraviśāradaḥ || 2 ||
tasya dūto harerdāsaḥ svāmikāryakaraḥ sadā ||
bhaktimālā priyā tasya sādhusevāparāyaṇā || 3 ||
tasyāṃ jātā rūpavatī kanyā kamalalocanā ||
mahādevīti vikhyātā sarvavidyāviśāradā || 4 ||
haridāsaṃ ca sā prāha śṛṇu tāta vaco mama ||
matto.adhiko naro yo vai tasmai māṃ tu dadasva bhoḥ || 5 ||
tathetyuktvā pitā rājanrājñāhūto gataḥ sabhām ||
natvā taṃ nṛpatiḥ prāha haridāsa śṛṇuṣva bhoḥ || 6 ||
tailaṃgādhipatiṃ gaccha hariścaṃdraṃ mahīpatim ||
tasya kṣemaṃ tathā jñātvā māṃ nivedaya mā ciram || || 7 ||
iti śrutvā dvijaḥ prāgāddhariścaṃdraṃ mahāmatim ||
kuśalaṃ varṇayāmāsa mahābalanṛpasya vai || 8 ||
śrutvā prasannahṛdayo hariścaṃdro mahīpatiḥ ||
śvaśurastasya nṛpateḥ sa bhūyo harṣamāgataḥ || 9 ||
haridāsaṃ sa papraccha kalerāgamanaṃ kadā ||
ityuktaḥ sa tu taṃ prāha nyūhaśca bhavitādhikam || 3.2.5.10 ||
yadā rājyaṃ kṛtaṃ tena kalerāgamamanaṃ tadā ||
brahmaṇosya mukhājjāta oṃkāraḥ satyapūjitaḥ ||11||
dvitīyāsyācca vividhā bhāṣā loka vimohinī ||
jātā kalerhitārthāya yamalokahitaiṣiṇī || 12 ||
yadā dharmaṃ ca vedoktaṃ viparītaṃ hi dṛśyate ||
kalirājyaṃ tadā jñeyaṃ mlecchā yasya priyāḥ smṛtāḥ|| || 13 ||
kalinā.adharmamitreṇa sarve devā nirākṛtāḥ ||
pāpasyaiva mṛṣā bhāryā duḥkhaṃ tattanayaḥ smṛtaḥ || 14 ||
durgatistasya cārdhāṃgī gehegehe tadā bhavet ||
krodhavaśyāḥ nṛpāḥ sarve brāhmaṇāḥ kāmakiṃkarāḥ || 15 ||
lobhavaśyāstu dhanino mahattvaṃ śūdrakā gatāḥ ||
nāryo lajjāvihīnāśca kiṃkarāḥ svāmighātakāḥ || 16 ||
niṣphalā tu mahī jātā kalau prāpte hi dṛśyate ||
ye hareḥ śaraṇaṃ prāptāste sarve muditāḥ kalau || 17 ||
iti śrutvā hariścaṃdro dattvā tasmai sudakṣiṇām ||
svagehaṃ prāptavānrājā viprastu śibiraṃ yayau || 18 ||
etasminnaṃtare tatra brāhmaṇo buddhikovidaḥ ||
svavidyāṃ darśayāmāsa haridāsāya dhīmate || 19 ||
vimānaṃ śīghragaṃ nāma devyā dattaṃ mahottamam ||
maṃtrajāpātsamudbhūtaṃ kāmajaṃ vismayapradam || 3.2.5.20 ||
tasmindadarśa kanyārthe tadā vipro vimohitaḥ ||
varitvā taṃ svakanyārthaṃ tataḥ svapuramāgataḥ || 21 ||
haridāsasya tanayo mukuṃdo nāma kovidaḥ ||
paṭhitvā svaguruṃ prāha vṛṇīṣva gurudakṣiṇām || 22||
gururāha ca śiṣyaṃ taṃ śṛṇu vācaṃ mukuṃda me ||
dāpaya svasya bhaginīṃ matputrāya ca dhīmate ||23||
tathetyuktvā mukuṃdastu svagehaṃ śīghramāyayau ||
tasminkāle mahādevī drauṇiśiṣyaṃ dvijaṃ śubham || 24 ||
vāmanaṃ varayāmāsa taṃ vipraṃ śabdavedhinam ||
dakṣiṇādibhirabhyarcya tāṃbūlena vidhānataḥ || 25 ||
trayaste brāhmaṇāḥ prāptāḥ sutārthe guṇakovidāḥ ||
etasminnantare kāmī rākṣaso daivamohitaḥ || || 26 ||
mahādevīṃ jahārāśu prāpto viṃdhyācale girau ||
tadā te duḥkhino bhūtvā vilepuḥ kāmapīḍitā || 27 ||
dhīmānnāma dvijo vidvāṃstānprāha gaṇakottamaḥ||
viṃdhyācale girau bālā cāste kravyādavaśyagā || 28 ||
svavimāne samāropya tau dvijau buddhikovidaḥ ||
viṃdhyācale girau prāptaḥ śabdavedhī tadā dhanuḥ || 29 ||
samāropya śareṇaiva jaghānāśu sa rākṣasam ||
kanyāṃ gṛhītvā te jagmurujjayinyāṃ vimānagāḥ || 3.2.5.30 ||
mitho vivādavaṃtaste dṛṣṭvā kanyāṃ smarānugāḥ ||
kasmai yogyā bhavetkanyā bhūpa me kṛpayā vada || 31 ||
|| sūta uvāca || ||
iti śrutvā vacastasya vikramo nāma bhūpatiḥ ||
praśrayāvanataḥ prāha vaitālaṃ rudrakiṃkaram || 32 ||
viditvā yo.avadatkanyāṃ pitṛtulyo dvijo hi saḥ ||
yena prāptā vimānena sa tu tadbhrātṛkaḥ smṛtaḥ || 33 ||
hatvā yo rākṣasaṃ vīraṃ kanyāyogyo hi so.abhavat || 34 ||
iti śrībhaviṣye mahāpurāṇe pratisargaparvaṇi caturyugakhaṃḍāpara paryāye kaliyugīyetihāsasamuccaye paṃcamo.adhyāyaḥ || 5 || cha ||

|| sūta uvāca || ||
punarāha sa vaitālaḥ śṛṇu rājankathāmimām ||
grāme dharmapuraṃ ramye nānājananiṣevite || 1 ||
tatrābhavanmahīpālo dharmaśīlo mahottamaḥ ||
lajjādevī ca mahiṣī tasya bhūpasya bhūpate || 2 ||
aṃdhako nāma tanmaṃtrī nyāyaśāstraviśāradaḥ ||
kiyatā caiva kālena devīmaṃdiramuttamam || 3 ||
dharmaśīlena racitaṃ tatra durgā pratiṣṭhitā ||
apatyārthe bhūpatinā kṛtastatra mahotsavaḥ || 4 ||
arddharātre mahāgaurī nṛpaṃ prāha vṛṇīṣva bhoḥ ||
śrutvāmṛtamayaṃ vākyaṃ dharmaśīlo nṛpottamaḥ ||
stutiṃ cakāra namrātmā yena durgā prasīdati || 5 ||
|| dharmaśīla uvāca || ||
ekā tu prakṛtirnityā sarvavarṇasvarūpiṇī || 6 ||
sā tvaṃ bhagavatī sākṣāttvayā sarvamidaṃ tatam ||
tvadājñayā suraśreṣṭho racitvā lokamuttamam ||7||
mahālakṣmyā tvayā sārddhaṃ bubhuje nirmalaṃ sukham ||
tvadbhaktyā bhagavānviṣṇustrailokyaṃ brahma nirmitam || 8 ||
pālayaṃśca mahālakṣmyā tvayā sārddhaṃ sanātani ||
tvadbalena mahādevi trailokyaṃ viṣṇupālitam || 9 ||
mahākālyā tvayā sārddhaṃ bhasma kṛtvā virājate ||
sarve devāstathā daityāḥ pitaro manujāḥ khagāḥ ||3.2.6.1 0||
tvallīlayā ca te jātā jaganmātarnamostu te ||
ityuktavaṃtaṃ nṛpatiṃ vāguvā cāśarīriṇī|| 11||
mahābalo mahāvīryastanayaste bhaviṣyati ||
tava stutyā prasannāhaṃ dāsyāmi vividhaṃ phalam||12||
iti śrutvā sa nṛpatiḥ svagehaṃ prāpya nirbhayaḥ ||
rājñyai nivedayāmāsa devīvacanamuttamam||13||
tataḥ prabhṛti rājendra mūrtau jātā svayaṃ kila||
ekasmindivase rājanrajakaḥ kalibhojanaḥ||14||
kāśīdāsena sahito grāmaṃ dharmapuraṃ gataḥ ||
tatra dṛṣṭvā śubhāṃ kanyāṃ kāmāṃgīṃ nāma viśrutām || 15 ||
pitrānvitāṃ rājamārge gacchaṃtī śramapīḍitām ||
mumoha kāmavegena rajakaḥ kalibhojanaḥ || 16 ||
kāmāṃdhaścaṃḍikāṃ prāha jaganmātaḥ sanātani ||
yadi me bhavitā subhrūstarhi dāsyāmi te śiraḥ || 17 ||
jātiyogyā mamaivāsti rajakasya sutā śubhā ||
iti śrutvā tu sā devī vacanaṃ rajakasya vai || 18 ||
mohayitvā ca pitaraṃ tasyāḥ pāṇigrahaḥ kṛtaḥ ||
sa sutāṃ kāminīṃ prāpya prasannātmā gṛhaṃ yayau || 19 ||
bhuktvā sa vividhaṃ bhogaṃ tayā sārddhaṃ sukhapradam ||
varṣāṃtare śiro devyai gatvā śīghraṃ samārpayat || 3.2.6.20 ||
kāśidāsastu tacchrutvā snehena tvarito.agamat ||
svaśiro dattavāndevyai kāmāṃgī patiśokataḥ|| 21 ||
arpayitvā śiro devyai devīrūpatvamāgatā ||
tadā prasannā sā caṇḍī trīnujjīvyābravīcca tān || 22 ||
varaṃ varayatāmadya yo yaḥ kāmo hyabhīpsitaḥ ||
kāśidāsastu tāṃ prāha kāmāṃgīṃ māṃ samarpaya||23||
kāmāṃgī sā tu tāṃ prāha svapatiṃ māṃ samarpaya||
kalibhojana evāsau devīṃ prāha prasannadhīḥ||24||
mitrāṃgaṃ sundaraṃ mahyaṃ dehi mātarnamonamaḥ ||
teṣāṃ vācastadā śrutvā sā durgā maunamāsthitā ||
yathākāmaṃ dattavatī varaṃ dārasurūpiṇī || || 25 ||
|| sūta uvāca || ||
ityuktvā sa tu vaitālo nṛpaṃ prāha vihasya bhoḥ || 26 ||
kiṃ kṛtaṃ ca tayā devyā teṣāmarthe vadasva me ||
ityuktaḥ sa tu bhūpālo vaitālamidamabravīt || 27 ||
kapālamuttamaṃ dehe tayā cchinnaṃ dvayostadā ||
viparītaṃ kṛtaṃ mātrā varaṃ svaṃsvaṃ samāpnuyuḥ || 28 ||
iti śrībhaviṣye mahāpurāṇe pratisargaparvaṇi caturyugakhaṇḍāparaparyāye kaliyugīyetihāsasamuccaye ṣaṣṭho.adhyāyaḥ || 6 || ||cha ||
sūta uvāca || ||
tasminkāle sa vaitālo bhṛguvaryaḥ prasannadhīḥ ||
rājānamuttamāṃ gāthāṃ varṇayāmāsa viśrutām || 1 ||
caṃpāpurī ca vikhyātā campakeśo mahīpatiḥ ||
tatrāste balavāndhanvī mahiṣī tatsulocanā || 2 ||
trilokasuṃdarī nāma kanyā tasyāmajāyata ||
vadanaṃ candravadyasyā bhruvau cāpasame smṛte || 3 ||
mṛgākṣī kokilaravā komalāṃgī mahottamā ||
devairmanovṛtā bālā kimanyairmānuṣairnṛpa || 4 ||
tasyāḥ svayaṃvaro jāto nṛpā bahuvidhāstadā ||
tasyā yogena saṃprāptā ye bhūpā bhuvi viśrutāḥ || 5 ||
indro yamaḥ kuberaśca varuṇo vibudhottamaḥ ||
kṛtvā naramayaṃ rūpaṃ tadarthe samupāgatāḥ || 6 ||
caṃpakeśamidaṃ prāha śṛṇu rājanvaco mama ||
sarvaśāstreṣu nipuṇaṃ rūpavantaṃ manoramam ||
indradattaṃ ca māṃ viddhi svasutāṃ me samarpaya || 7 ||
dvitīyastu tadā prāha dharmadattaṃ manoramam ||
dhanurvedeṣu nipuṇaṃ svakanyāṃ dātumarhasi || 8 ||
tṛtīyaścāha bho rājandhanapālāya śobhine ||
sarvajīvasya bhāṣāṇāṃ jñāyine guṇarūpiṇe ||
mahyaṃ ca svasutāṃ śīghraṃ samarpaya sukhī bhava || 9 ||
caturthaścāha bho rājansarvakalāsu kovidaḥ ||
pañcaratnasamudyogī pratyahaṃ bhūpate hyaham || || 3.2.7.10 ||
puṇyārthamekaratnaṃ ca homārthaṃ dvitiyaṃ vasu ||
ātmārthaṃ tṛtiyaṃ ratnaṃ patnyarthe turiyaṃ vasu || 11 ||
śeṣaṃ subhojanārthaṃ ca ratnaṃ nityaṃ mayāhṛtam ||
īdṛgvidhaṃ māṃ puruṣaṃ svasutāṃ dātumarhasi || 12 ||
iti śrutvā vacasteṣāṃ mohito nṛpatistadā ||
svasutāṃ prāha dharmātmā kasmai dāsyāmi kanyake || 13 ||
sā devī tu vacaḥ śrutvā vrīḍitā daivamohitā ||
nottaraṃ ca dadau tasmai svapitre dharmaśālinī || 14 ||
ityuktvā sa tu vaitālo vihasyovāca bhūpatim ||
kasmai yogyā bhavetkanyā rūpayauvanaśālinī || 15 ||
|| sūta uvāca || ||
ityuktaḥ sa tu bhūpālo vacanaṃ taṃ samabravīt ||
dharmadattāya sā kanyā yogyā bhavati rūpiṇī || 16 ||
sarvaśāstreṣu nipuṇaḥ sa dvijo varṇataḥ smṛtaḥ ||
bhāṣāvettā tu vaṇijo dhanadhānya prasārakaḥ ||17||
kalājñaḥ sa tu śūdro hi dhanurvedī sa bhūpatiḥ||
savarṇāya ca vaitāla sadā yogyā hi kanyakā ||
ato vivāhitā bālā dharmadattāya śīline||18||
iti śrībhaviṣye mahāpurāṇe pratisargaparvaṇi caturyugakhaṇḍāparaparyāye kaliyugīyetihāsasamuccaye saptamo.adhyāyaḥ || 7 || || cha,|| ||
|| sūta uvāca || ||
iti śrutvā sa vaitālo rājānamidamabravīt ||
videhadeśe bhūpāla nagarī mithilāvatī || 1 ||
guṇādhipastatra rājā dhanadhānyasamanvitaḥ ||
ciraṃdeva iti khyāto rājanyaḥ kaścanāgataḥ || 2 ||
vṛttyarthaṃ mithilādeśe tatra vāsaṃ cakāra saḥ ||
varṣāṃte bhūpatiḥ so.api caturaṅgabalānvitaḥ || 3 ||
mṛgayārthe vanaṃ prāptastatra śārdūlamuttamam ||
dṛṣṭvā taṃ cāvadhīdrājā krodhatāmrekṣaṇo vane || 4 ||
vyāghra mārgeṇa bhūpālo vanāntaramupāyayau ||
ciraṃdevastu tatpaścādgataḥ sa gahane vane || 5 ||
kṣutkṣāmakaṇṭho nṛpatiḥ śramasantāpapīḍitaḥ ||
ciraṃdevamuvācāśu bhojanaṃ dehi me.adya bhoḥ || 6 ||
iti śrutvā sa rājanyo hatvā hariṇamuttamam ||
saṃskṛtya pradadau rājñe tanmāṃsaṃ bhūpatipriyam || 7 |||
tuṣṭo bhūpastadā prāha varaṃ varaya sattama ||
vāṃchitaṃ te dadāmyāśu sa hovāca mahīpatim|| 8||
tvayā sahasramudrāśca khāditā mama bhūpate||
gṛhamānīya bhūpāla tāḥ samarpaya mā ciram||9||
śatamudrāstu māsānte mahyaṃ dehi kuṭuṃbine||
tathetyuktvā sa nṛpatiḥ svagehaṃ śīghramāyayau|| 3.2.8.10||
ekasmindivase rājansa ca rājā guṇādhipaḥ||
ciraṃdevaṃ svabhṛtyaṃ ca preṣayāmāsa sāgare||11||
sa gatvā sāgarataṭe devīmūrtiṃ dadarśa ha||
nāmnā kusumadāṃ devīṃ mārkaṇḍeyasthalasthitām||12||
gandharvatanayāṃ subhrūṃ pūjayitvā prasannadhīḥ||
prāṃjaliḥ puratastasthau tadā devī samāgatā| || 13 ||
varaṃ varaya taṃ prāha ciraṃdevastu cābravīt ||
pāṇiṃ gṛhāṇa me subhrūstvadrūpeṇa vimohitaḥ ||14||
iti śrutvā tu sā devī vihasyovāca kāminam ||
adya snānaṃ vidhehi tvaṃ matkuṇḍe devanirmite||15||
tathetyuktvā gatastoye plāvito mithilāṃ yayau||
sa sthito bhūpatiṃ prāha kāraṇaṃ vismayapradam||16||
guṇādhipastu tacchrutvā svabhṛtyena samanvitaḥ||
prāptavānmaṃdire devyāḥ sā bhūyaḥ prāha puṣpadā||17||
gāṃdharveṇa vivāhena māṃ gṛhāṇa guṇādhipa||
iti śrutvā nṛpaḥ prāha yadi devi vaco mama||18||
puṇyade tvaṃ gṛhāṇādya tarhi tvāṃ saṃbhajāmyaham||
tatheti matvā taṃ prāha satvaṃ kāryaṃ nivedaya||19||
sa hovāca śṛṇu tvaṃ bho mama bhṛtyaṃ ciraṃ suram ||
bhaja tvaṃ capalāpāṃgi devi satyaṃ vacaḥ kuru ||3.2.8.20||
vrīḍitā tu kathāṃ kṛtvā bhūpatiṃ prāha kāminī||
māṃ bhajasva dayāsiṃdho kāminīṃ śakracoditām || 21 ||
ciraṃdevaṃ tu saṃprāpya kāmāṃdhā tvāṃ samāgatā ||
puṣpadaṃtaruya? tanayā gandharvasya śubhānanā||
śāpitā devadevena narabhogakarī hyaham ||22||
iti śrutvā sa bhūpālo dharmātmā śīlavigrahaḥ ||
kathaṃ bhajāmyahaṃ subhrūḥ snuṣāmiva sudharmiṇīm || 23 ||
ciraṃdevastu rājanyo matputra iva vartate ||
tasya tvaṃ bhoginī nārī śobhane bhava sāṃpratam || 24 ||
lajjitā sā tadā devī snuṣevaḥ ca vavarta vai || 25 ||
ityuktvā bhūpatiṃ prāha vaitālo rudrakiṃkaraḥ ||
satyaṃ dharmaśca kasyaiva jātastanme vadasva bhoḥ || 26 ||
|| sūta uvāca || |||
bhūpatistaṃ vihasyāha ciraṃdevasya jāyate ||
satyaṃ dharmaśca vetāla śṛṇu tatkāraṇaṃ śubham || 27 ||
nṛpāṇāṃ paramo dharmaḥ sarvopakaraṇaṃ smṛtaḥ ||
kṛtopakārabhṛtyasya tena tatkiṃ hi satyatā || 28 ||
bhṛtyena ca kṛtaṃ karma tacchṛṇuṣva vadāmyaham ||
vinā vṛttiṃ sthito gehe bhūpaterguṇaśālinaḥ ||
sevā vṛttiḥ kṛtā sarvā yathānyairna naraiḥ kṛtā || 29 ||
paścādbhūpatinā jñātaḥ saṃkaṭe bṛhadāgate ||
ciraṃdevastu tasmācca kāraṇādadhiko mataḥ || 3.2.8.30 ||
iti śrībhaviṣye mahāpurāṇe pratisargaparvaṇi caturyugakhaṇḍāparaparyāye kaliyugīyetihāsasamuccaye.aṣṭamo.adhyāyaḥ || 8 || || cha ||
|| sūta uvāca || ||
bho śaunaka mahābuddhe vaitālena mahīpatiḥ ||
mahāpravīṇaśca matastamāha sa ca bhūpatim || 1 ||
rājankāmapure ramye vīrasiṃho mahīpatiḥ ||
nyāyato dharmataścaiva tatra rājyamacīkarat || 2 ||
hiraṇyadattastatraiva vaiśyo dhanamadānvitaḥ ||
kāmālasā tasya sutā rūpayauvanaśālinī || 3 ||
avasatsukhato nityaṃ vasaṃte kusumapriyā ||
kadācitkusumārthaṃ vai vanaṃ bhramaranāditam || 4 ||
gacchantīṃ tāṃ samālokya dharmadattātmajo balī ||
somadatta iti khyātaḥ pasparśa madanālasām || 5 ||
sā tu taṃ nirjane sthāne provāca vinayānvitā ||
kanyakāhaṃ mahāvīra tyaja māṃ dharmatodya bhoḥ || 6 ||
vivāhe sati pūrvaṃ tvāṃ bhajāmi daśame.ahani ||
ato daśadinasyaivādeśaṃ dehi dayānidhe || 7 ||
tatheti matvā tāṃ tyaktvā nijagehaṃ samāgataḥ ||
kāmālasā tu tadgrāme pitrā dattā varāya ca || 8 ||
madapālāya vaiśyāya maṇigrīvasutāya ca ||
śvaśurasya gṛhaṃ gatvā svamitraṃ pratyacintayat || 9 ||
navame.ahani tatsvāmī gṛhītvā kāminīṃ balāt ||
kāmāturaḥ sa patnīṃ tāmāliliṃga madānvitaḥ || 3.2.9.10 ||
arudatsā tu tatpatnī mitravākyena karṣitā ||
tāmuvāca tadā vaiśyaḥ śāṃtipūrvamidaṃ vacaḥ || 11 ||
kiṃ rodiṣi madāpūrṇe satyaṃ kathaya śobhane ||
sā tu satyavatī prāha yathājātaṃ hi kānane || 12 ||
yadi nāyāmi pārśve tvāṃ somadatta dhanottama ||
tadā vaidhavyatāṃ prāpya bhajāmi vṛjinaṃ hi tat || 13 ||
iti vākyena baddhāhaṃ yāsyāmyadya tadaṃtike ||
iti śrutvā ca tatsvāmī tāmājñāpya mudānvitaḥ || 14 ||
suṣvāpa sā tu tatpārśve hyagamatkāmavihvalā ||
tadā caurastu tāṃ dṛṣṭvā sarvābharaṇabhūṣitām || 15 ||
vacaścovāca lobhātmā kutra yāsi ca sundari ||
kenaivāpekṣitā rātrau satyaṃ kathaya bhāmini || 16 ||
kāmālasā tu taṃ cauramuvāca madavihvalā ||
rakṣitā kāmabāṇena svamitraṃ prati yāmi bhoḥ || 17 ||
caurastāmāha bhoḥ subhrūrbhūṣaṇa dehi me.abale ||
cauro.ahaṃ te dhanagrāhī sā śrutvā vākyamabravīt || 18 ||
āliṃgyopapatiṃ mitraṃ tubhyaṃ dāsyāmi bhūṣaṇam ||
tathetyuktvā tu tenaiva somadattaṃ samāgatā || 19 ||
dṛṣṭvā tāmabravīdvaiśyaḥ kathaṃ yātā smarālase ||
satyaṃ kathaya me śīghraṃ tatpaścāttvāṃ bhajāmyaham || 3.2.9.20 ||
kāmālasā tu tacchrutvā yathā jātaṃ tathā.abravīt ||
śrutvā sa jñānahṛdayo viṣṇudevena bodhitaḥ || 21 ||
matvā pativratāṃ nārīṃ parikramya vyasarjayat ||
caurastu kāraṇaṃ śrutvā viṣṇudevena bodhitaḥ || 22 ||
gehe praveśayāmāsa tatpatiryatra tiṣṭhati ||
sā tu kāmālasā devī svapātivratya dharmiṇī || 23 ||
bubhuje viṣayāndivyāndevadevena coditān ||
ityuktvā sa tu vaitālo nṛpatiṃ prāha kovidam ||
kasya satyaṃ smṛtaṃ śreṣṭhaṃ teṣāṃ madhye vadasva me || 24 ||
|| sūta uvāca || ||
ityuktaḥ sa tu bhūpālo vaitālamidamabravīt || 25 ||
caurasya satyatā śreṣṭhā yathā jātā tathā śṛṇu ||
nṛpabhītyā sa vaiśyastu tāṃ nārīṃ na tu bhuktavān|| 26 ||
vaidhavyabhītyā sā devī svamitraṃ prati cāgatā ||
dharmabhītyā ca tatsvāmī svapatnīṃ na tu bhuktavān || 27 ||
caurastu satyabhītyā vai tyaktvā tāṃ mudamāgataḥ || 28 || ||
iti śrībhaviṣye mahāpurāṇe pratisargaparvaṇi caturyugakhaṇḍāparaparyāye kaliyugīyetihāsasamuccaye navamo.adhyāyaḥ || 9 || || cha ||

|| sūta uvāca || ||
vaitālastu mahābhāga rājānamidamabravīt ||
gauḍadeśe mahārāja vardhanaṃ nāma vai puram || 1 ||
guṇaśekhara ākhyāto bhūpālastatra dharmavān ||
tanmantrī nirbhayānando jainadharmaparā yaṇaḥ || 2 ||
kadācidbhūpatiryāto mandire girijāpateḥ ||
pūjayāmāsa taṃ devaṃ sarvavyāpinamīśvaram || 3 ||
vṛścikastatra saṃprāpya dadaṃśa nṛpatiṃ ruṣā ||
tatkaṣṭena sa bhūpālo mūrchitaḥ patito bhuvi || 4 ||
tadā tu nirbhayānando viṣamuttārya tasya vai ||
bhūpatiṃ varṇayāmāsa jainadharma parāyaṇaḥ || 5 ||
śṛṇu rājanmahābhāga śatrūnṣaṇmānasādhamān ||
kāmaḥ krodhastathā lobho ratirhiṃsā ca tṛṣṇikā ||
rajoguṇācca te jātāsteṣāṃ bhedāḥ pṛthakpṛthak || 6 ||
moho daṃbho madaścaiva mamatāśā ca garhaṇā ||
tamoguṇācca te jātāstairidaṃ pūritaṃ jagat || 7 ||
kāmī viṣṇustathā rudraḥ krodhī lobhī vidhistathā ||
daṃbhī śakro yamo mohī madī yakṣapatiḥ svayam || 8 ||
māyā vaśyāśca te sarve tarhi tatpūjanena kim ||
ṣaṭśatrubhirjito yo vai sa jino munibhiḥ smṛtaḥ || 9 ||
na jitaḥ sa jino jñeyo.advaitavādī niraṃjanaḥ ||
tasya dhyānena bhāvena mokṣavaṃto narāḥ sadā || 3.2.10.10 ||
tatprasādāya yo dharmaḥ śṛṇu me vasudhādhipa ||
gopūjanena te devāstuṣṭiṃ yānti sadaiva hi || 11 ||
ato gopūjanaṃ śuddhaṃ hiṃsā sarvatra varjitā ||
madapānena sarvātmā jinaḥ kleśaṃ samāpnuyāt || 12 ||
tasmānmāṃsaṃ ca pānaṃ ca varjitaṃ sarvadaiva hi|
nyāyenopārjitaṃ vittaṃ bhojayecca bubhukṣitān || 13 ||
ravirātmā jinasyaiva tatprakāśe hi bhojayet ||
ityevaṃ varṇayitvainaṃ maṃtrī gehamupāyayau || 14 ||
tathaiva matvā sa nṛpo jinadharmaṃ gṛhītavān ||
kiyatā caiva kālena vedamārgo hi laṃghitaḥ || 15 ||
tadā tu duḥkhitā rājñī śivasya śaraṇaṃ yayau || 16 ||
varadānena rudrasya putro jāto mahottamaḥ ||
dharmarāja iti khyāto vedavrataparāyaṇaḥ || 17 ||
guṇaśekhara evāsau paṃcatve nirayaṃ yayau ||
dharmarājastadā rājyaṃ kṛtavāndharmataḥ svayam || 18 ||
tasya dharmaprabhāveṇa tatpitā svargamāptavān ||
trayaḥ patnyobhavaṃstasyaguṇarūpā mahottamā || 19 ||
vasaṃtasamaye rājā tābhiḥ saha vanāṃtare ||
saṃyāto ramayāmāsa puṣpabhramaranādite || 3.2.10.20 ||
śramitaḥ sa tu bhūpālo rājñībhiḥ saha moditaḥ ||
sarovare snāpitavānmadāghūrṇitalocanaḥ || 21
gṛhītvā kusumaṃ pādmaṃ kare rājñyai samārpayat ||
padi hīnatvamāyātā patatā kusumena vai ||22 ||
duḥkhitaḥ sa tu bhūpālo rājñīṃ tāmacikitsayat ||
rātrau prāpte dvitīyā tu candraśīlena mohitā || 23 ||
apatadvyākulībhūtvā śuddhaṃ pādamabhūttataḥ ||
patitāyāśca śabdena tṛtīyā jvaritā.abhavat || 24 ||
tasyā mūrcchā tadā kṣīṇā dvitīyāyā ajāyata ||
nṛpasparśena sā subhrūrjvaratāpaṃ vihāya ca || 25 ||
prabhāte suṃdare jāte sa tābhirgṛhamāyayau ||
ityuktvā sa tu vaitālo bhūpatiṃ prāha namradhīḥ ||
āsāṃ madhye mahārāja kā śreṣṭhā sukumārikā ||26||
||rājovāca|| ||
tṛtīyā sukumārī ca tāsāṃ madhye mahottamā||
vāyuprakṛtitaścāsau padmapuṣpeṇa khaṃjitā||27||
śītāṃśunā dvitīyā tu mūrcchitā kaphabhāvataḥ ||
śabdamātreṇa saṃtāpo yasyāṃ jāto hi sottamā ||28||
vihasyāha punardevo bhavabhaktaṃ mahīpatim ||
jainadharmaḥ pradhāno hi vedadharmotha vā vada ||29||
sa hovāca pradhāno.asau vedadharmaḥ sanātanaḥ||
aṣṭau śreṇyo hi tasyaiva brahmaṇovyaktarūpiṇaḥ||3.2.10.30||
śūdro vaiśyastathā kṣatrī brāhmaṇo brahmacaryakṛt ||
gehī vanyo yatiścaiva kramācchreṣṭhāḥ prakīrtitāḥ || 31 ||
yaḥ kṛtvā dārasaṃsargaṃ yativadvartate gṛhī ||
sa pāpī narakaṃ yāti yāvadābhūtasaṃplavam || 32 ||
gṛheṣu yativaddharmo jainaśāstre prakīrtitaḥ ||
pākhaṇḍaḥ sa smṛtaḥ prājñairvarjanīyo hi sarvadā || 33 ||
iti śrībhaviṣye mahāpurāṇe caturyugakhaṃḍāparaparyāye kaliyugī yetihāsasamuccaye daśamo.adhyāyaḥ ||10||

|| sūta uvāca || ||
bhoḥ śaunaka mahābhāga sa vaitālo hi devatā|||
rājānamabravīdgāthāṃ dharmapraśnamayīṃ śubhām ||1||
rājanpuṇyapure ramye nānājananiṣevite ||
dharmavallabhabhūpālastatra rājyaṃ purākarot ||2||
satyaprakāśastanmaṃtrī lakṣmīścāmātyakāminī ||
kadācitsa tu bhūpālo maṃtriṇaṃ prāha dharmavit ||3||
ānaṃdaḥ katidhā loke tanmamācakṣva sattama ||
sa hovāca mahārāja sukhaṃ caiva caturvidham ||4||
brahmacaryāśrame yo vai brahmānaṃdo mahottamaḥ ||
gārhasthye viṣayānaṃdo madhyamaḥ kathito budhaiḥ ||5||
vānaprasthe mahārāja sa dharmānaṃdako.adhamaḥ ||
karmakāṃḍena cānaṃdaḥ satyadharmaḥ sa vai smṛtaḥ||6||
saṃnyaste tu śivānaṃdassa hi sarvottamottamaḥ||
viṣayānaṃdako rājanstrīpradhānaḥ prakīrtitaḥ||7||
striyaṃ vinā sukhaṃ nāsti gṛhasthāśramake nṛpa||
iti śrutvā sa bhūpālo deśāṃtaramupāyayau ||8||
patnīmanveṣayāmāsa svayogyāṃ dharmatatparām ||
prāptavānna tu vāmāṃgīṃ manovṛttyanusāriṇīm||9||
sa bhūpo maṃtriṇaṃ prāha nārīmanveṣayādya bhoḥ||
no cetprāṇānahaṃ tyakṣye satyaṃ vākyaṃ bravīmyaham||3.2.11.10||
iti śrutvā yayau maṃtrī deśāddeśāṃtaraṃ prati ||
siṃdhudeśe ca saṃprāpya samudraṃ prati so.agamat ||
tuṣṭāva manasā siṃdhuṃ sarvatīrthapatiṃ śubham|| 11 ||
|| buddhiprakāśa uvāca || ||
siṃdhudeva namastubhyaṃ sarvaratnālaya prabho ||12||
ahaṃ te śaraṇaṃ prāptaḥ śaraṇāgatavatsala||
tvāṃ namāmi jalādhīśaṃ gaṃgādisaritāṃ patim||13||
strīratnaṃ dehi rājño.arthe no cetprāṇāṃstyajāmyaham ||
iti śrutvā prasannātmā sāgaraḥ saritāṃ patiḥ ||14||
jale vṛkṣaṃ suvarṇāṃgaṃ patravidrumakaṃ mahat ||
muktā phalānvitaṃ divyaṃ maṃtriṇe samadarśayat ||15||
tasyopari sthitā bālā sukumārī manoramā ||
tatraiva sā laye jātā vṛkṣeṇa saha bhūpate ||16||
iti dṛṣṭvā mahāścaryaṃ nṛpāṃtikamupāyayau ||
varṇayitvā tu tatsarvaṃ rājñā sārdhaṃ samāptavān|| 17 ||
tathāvidhaṃ nṛpo dṛṣṭvā sāgarāṃtamupāyayau ||
bālayā saha pātālaṃ prāptavānbhūpatiḥ svayam || 18 ||
tāṃ nārīṃ prāha namrātmā tvadarthe.ahaṃ samāgataḥ ||
gāṃdharveṇa vivāhena māṃ prāpaya varānane || 19 ||
vihasya sā.a.aha taṃ bhūpaṃ kṛṣṇapakṣe caturdaśī ||
taddine.ahaṃ samāgatya tvāṃ bhajāmi nṛpottama ||3.2.11.20||
iti śrutvā sa nṛpatistaddine smaravihvalaḥ||
khaḍgahasto yayau tatra yatra devīgṛhottamam || 21 ||
etasminnaṃtare tatra rākṣaso bakavāhanaḥ ||
tāṃ bālāṃ sa ca pasparśa nṛpaḥ krodhāturo.abhavat || 22 ||
kāmāṃdho rākṣasaṃ hatvā svapatnīṃ prāha nirbhayām ||
ko.ayaṃ te.atra samāyātaḥ kāraṇaṃ vada bhāmini || 23 ||
sāha bhoḥ śṛṇu bhūpāla vidyādharasutā hyaham ||
pitṛpriyā madavatī kāmārtā vanamāgatā || 24 ||
nāgatā bhojane kāle pitṛmātrośca maṃdire ||
jñātvā dhyānena matpitrā śāpitā tacchṛṇuṣva bhoḥ || 25 ||
adya kṛṣṇacaturdaśyāṃ tvāṃ bhajiṣyati rākṣasaḥ ||
kṛṣṇapakṣacaturdaśyāṃ bhuṃkṣva tvamaparādhakam || 26 ||
tadāhaṃ rodanaṃ kṛtvā bravīmi pitaraṃ prati ||
kadā muktirbhaveddeva tattvaṃ kathaya suvrata || 27 ||
sa hovāca kumāri tvaṃ vīrabhuktā bhaviṣyasi||
tadā śāpasya muktiḥ syātsāhaṃ tava vimocitā || 28 ||
tvadājñayāhaṃ yāsyāmi bho rājanpitṛmaṃdire ||
iti śrutvā nṛpaḥ prāha mama gehaṃ samāvraja || 29 ||
tvayā sārddhaṃ gamiṣyāmi gṛhaṃ vidyādharasya tat ||
tathetyuktvā tu sā devī nṛpagehaṃ samāyayau || 3.2.11.30 ||
tadā tu nagare tasminnṛṇāṃ jāto mahotsavaḥ ||
maṃtrī dṛṣṭvā tu taṃ bhūpaṃ divyapatnīsamanvitam ||
pañcatvamagamattūrṇaṃ kuto hetorhi tadvada || 31 ||
|| rājovāca || ||
mantrī buddhiprakāśastu dṛṣṭvā devīṃ samāgatām ||32||
nṛpaṃ sa hṛdi saṃdhyātvā rājyabhaṃgabhayāturaḥ ||
tyaktvā prāṇānyayau svargaṃ śṛṇu yatkāraṇaṃ śubham || 33 ||
viṣayī yo hi bhūpālastasya rājyavināśanam ||
strīmadaṃ prāpya rājyasya sadā hānimavāpnuyāt || 34 || ||
iti śrībhaviṣye mahāpurāṇe pratisargaparvaṇi caturyugakhaṃḍāparaparyāye kaliyugīyetihāsasamuccaye ekādaśo.adhyāyaḥ || 11 ||

|| sūta uvāca || ||
vihasya sa tu vaitālo rājānamidamabravīt ||
rājaṃścūḍāpure ramye bhūpaścūḍāmaṇiḥ smṛtaḥ ||1||
devasvāmī gurustasya vedavedāṃgapāragaḥ ||
tasya patnī viśālākṣī patidharmaparāyaṇā || 2 ||
śivamārādhayāmāsa putrārthe varavarṇinī ||
rudrasya varadānena kāmadevasamaḥ sutaḥ || 3 ||
harisvāmīti vikhyāto jāto devāṃśavānbalī ||
sarvasaṃpatsamāyukto devatulyasukhī kṣitau || 4 ||
rūpalāvaṇyikā nāmnā tatpatnī hi surāṃganā ||
jātā devalaśāpena tasya nandanato nṛpa || 5 ||
ekadā patinā sārddhaṃ vasante kusumākare ||
harmye suṣvāpa saṃprītyā śayyāmadhyāsya suṃdarī ||6||
sukalo nāma gaṃdharvastasyā rūpeṇa mohitaḥ ||
tāṃ jahāra vimāne sve saṃsthāpya svapuraṃ yayau ||7||
prabuddhaḥ sa tu tāṃ nārīṃ mṛgayāmāsa vihvalaḥ ||
alabdhvā vyākulo bhūtvā deśaṃ tyaktvā vanaṃ gataḥ ||8||
saṃnyasya viṣayānsarvānharidhyānaparāyaṇaḥ ||
kadācitprāpa sa snehī vipragehamupāgataḥ || 9 ||
prapacya pāyasamapi vaṭavṛkṣamupāśritaḥ ||
vṛkṣopari nidhāyāśu nadīsnānamathākarot ||
bhojanaṃ ca tato rājansarpeṇa garalīkṛtam || 3.2.12.10 ||
tato yatiḥ samāyāto bhuktvā madamupāyayau ||
viṣeṇa pīḍitatanurdṛṣṭvā brāhmaṇamabravīt || 11 ||
tvayā pradattaṃ mūrkheṇa pāyasaṃ viṣamiśritam ||
maraṇaṃ yāmi bho duṣṭa brahmahatyāmavāpsyasi || 12 ||
ityuktvā maraṇaṃ prāpya śivalokamupāyayau ||
rūpatejoyutāṃ devīṃ gṛhītvā sukhamāptavān || 13 ||
ityuktvā sa tu vetālo rājānamidabravīt ||
kasmai prāptā brahmahatyā teṣāṃ madhye vadasva me || 14 ||
|| rājovāca || ||
svābhāvikaviṣo nāgo hyajñānena viṣaṃ kṛtam ||
ato doṣī hi bhujago brahmahatyāṃ na cāptavān || 15 ||
bubhukṣite dadau bhikṣāṃ sa dvijo daivamohitaḥ ||
brahmahatyāmato nāyātkuladharmaparāyaṇam || 16 ||
ātmanā ca kṛtaṃ pāpaṃ bhoktavyaṃ sarvadā janaiḥ ||
ātmatyāgo brahmahatyā cātitheścāvamānanam|| 17 ||
brahmahatyā tadā jñeyā viṣadattena sā tathā ||
ātmatyāgaḥ smṛto daivāttasmātsopi na pāpavān || 18 ||
yairnaraiḥ kathitā vārtā brahmahatyā tvayā kṛtā ||
teṣāṃ brāhmaṇahatyā sā nyāyabhraṣṭavatāṃ nṛṇām || 19 || ||
iti śrībhaviṣye mahāpurāṇe pratisargaparvaṇi caturyuga khaṇḍāparaparyāye kaliyugīyetihāsasamuccaye dvādaśo.adhyāyaḥ || 12 || || cha ||
|| sūta uvāca || ||
kṛtakṛtyaḥ prasannātmā vaitālo nṛpamabravīt ||
nagare candrahṛdaye raṇadhīro nṛpo.abhavat || 1 ||
tatra vaiśyo.avasaddharmī nāmnā dharmadhvajo dhanī ||
tasya putrī samāyātā sundarī sukhabhāvinī || 2 ||
ekadā nagare tasminyātubhakto naro.abhavat ||
dyūtavidyāparo nityaṃ madyamāṃsaparāyaṇaḥ || 3 ||
vāśaro nāma tatrāsīdrākṣasaḥ puruṣādanaḥ ||
tasmai madyaṃ ca māṃsaṃ ca pratyahaṃ sa ca dattavān || 4 ||
prasanno rākṣaso bhūtvā yātubhaktaṃ tamabravīt ||
varaṃ varaya yo yogyo mattaḥ sarvamavāpsyasi || 5 ||
sa hovāca varo mahyaṃ deyaste puruṣādaka ||
guptagartaṃ ca bhūmadhye kuru cauranirūpaṇam || 6 ||
iti śrutvākarodgartaṃ nara buddhivimohanam ||
svayaṃ tatra sthito devaḥ svabhaktena samanvitaḥ || 7 ||
tena rātrau tu cauryeṇa nṛpadāsī varāṃganā ||
hṛtā saṃsthāpitā garte bahudravyaṃ tathā hṛtam || 8 ||
saptapatnyo.abhavaṃstasya caturvarṇasya yoṣitaḥ ||
tāsāṃ madhye bhūpadāsī tasya caurasya vallabhā || 9 ||
nṛpadurgasamaṃ gehaṃ racitaṃ tena rakṣasā ||
bhūtale guptarūpaṃ ca narabuddhivimohanam|| 3.2.13.10 ||
coritaṃ bahudhā dravyaṃ garte saṃsthāpitaṃ balāt||
tadā te vyākulā rājañjanā rājānamabru van || 11 ||
tyajāma nagarīṃ bhūpa cauravighnakarīṃ tava ||
iti śrutvāya bhūpena rakṣiṇaḥ śastrasaṃyutāḥ ||
sthāpitā nagare tasmiścaurahiṃsāparāya ṇāḥ || 12 ||
ājñāpya sa yayau gehaṃ taistu śrutvā tathā kṛtam || 13 ||
rākṣasyā māyayā sarve mohitā rakṣiṇastadā ||
caureṇa bahudhā dravyaṃ hṛtaṃ ca dhanināṃ valāt || 14 ||
punaste prayayurbhūpaṃ raṇadhīraṃ samerayan ||
śrutvā tu vismito rājā svayaṃ nagaramāgataḥ || 15 ||
ardharātre tamobhūte sa cauro nṛpamāgatam ||
jñātvābravīcca rājānaṃ ko bhavānatra cāptavān || 16 ||
nṛpo.abravīdahaṃ cauraścoditārthaḥ samāgataḥ ||
yāsyāmi dhanināṃ gehe bhavānme vacanaṃ kuru || 17 ||
mayā sārddhaṃ ca bahudhā dravyaṃ hara sukhī bhava ||
tathā matvā tu bahudhā caureṇa dhanamāhṛtam || 18 ||
gartamadhye gato rātrau sthāpayitvā nṛpaṃ bahiḥ ||
etasminneva tatpatnī nṛpadāsī varāṃganā || 19 ||
bhūpatiṃ prāha bho rājangaccha śīghraṃ svakaṃ gṛham ||
cauro.asau hi tvadarthe ca mṛtyuṃ kurvangṛhaṃ gataḥ || 3.2.13.20 ||
ityuktvā sā tu bhūpāya mārgabhedamadarśayat ||
nṛpo.api svagṛhaṃ prāpya prabhāte vimale ravau || 21 ||
āyayau senayā sārddhaṃ yatra cauraḥ svayaṃ sthitaḥ ||
cauro.api bhayamāsādya vāśaraṃ nāma rākṣasam || 22 ||
saṃpūjya varṇayāmāsa yathā jātaṃ tathāvidhi ||
vihasyāha ca rakṣastaṃ tvayā me bhojanaṃ kṛtam| 23 ||
adya bhakṣyāmyahaṃ sarvānmānuṣāndaivacoditān ||
ityuktvā sa yayau ghoro rākṣaso nṛpatiṃ prati || || 24 ||
cakhāda bahulāṃ senāṃ tepi yātā diśo daśa ||
ākrāṃtaḥ sa ca bhūpālo rakṣasā vikalīkṛtaḥ || 25 ||
tadā cauraḥ svayaṃ prāya bhūpatiṃ prāha roṣataḥ ||
palāyanaṃ na bhūpasya yogyaṃ dharmajanasya vai || 26 ||
iti śrutvā nṛpaścaiva tūrṇamāgatya tatra ha ||
dhyātvā devīṃ mahākālīṃ labdhvā maṃtraṃ mahottamam || 27 ||
rakṣasā saha tadgartaṃ bhasmasādabhavatkṣaṇāt ||
nigaḍaistaṃ babaṃdhāśu cauraṃ nagaraluṃṭhakam || 28 ||
tathā sarvadhanaiḥ sārdhaṃ strībhistābhiḥ samāyayau ||
rājyasthānaṃ samāsādya durgatistasya cābhavat || 29 ||
paṭahātāḍitenaiva śabdena ca gṛhegṛhe ||
jñāpitaṃ karaṇaṃ sarvaṃ taccaurasya vadhasya taiḥ || 3.2.13.30 ||
taddine nagare tasminbhrāmito gardabhopari ||
dharmadhvajagṛhadvāre sa cauro hi samāgataḥ || 31 ||
tasya rūpaṃ samālokya mumoha sukhabhāvinī ||
pitaraṃ prāha duḥkhārtā cauraṃ mocaya satvaram || 32 ||
sa gatvā nṛpatiṃ prāha paṃcalakṣadhanaṃ mama ||
gṛhāṇa cauramokṣārthe mriyate na hi me sutā || 33 ||
vihasyāha nṛpastaṃ vai cauro.ayaṃ dhanaluṃṭhakaḥ ||
karhicinna mayā tyājyo bhuvi vai puruṣādhamaḥ || 34 ||
iti śrutvā nirāśo.abhūtsa cauro maraṇaṃ gataḥ ||
śalyāropaṇakāle tu prākprahasya tato.arudat || 35 ||
etasminneva tatputrī devamāyāvimohitā ||
gṛhītvā cauradehaṃ tu vahnikuṇḍe tu sāgamat || 36 ||
tadā prasannā sā durgā tāvujīvya prasādataḥ ||
tasyai datto varo divyo bhuktimuktiphalapradaḥ || 37 ||
ityuktvā sa tu bhūpālaṃ punaḥ prāha vihasya tam ||
kiṃ kāraṇena caurosau prākprahasya tato.arudat || 38 ||
|| rājovāca || ||
madarthe sundarī nārī svaprāṇāndātumudyatā ||
tasyai kiṃ ca pradātavyaṃ mayā tatsneharūpiṇā || 39 ||
ato roditavānpaścāddhasane kāraṇaṃ śṛṇu ||
dhanyo.ayaṃ bhagavānkṛṣṇo yasya līleyamīdṛśī || || 3.2.13.40 ||
adharmiṇe ca nākasya phalaṃ dātuṃ samarhati ||
dharmiṇo narakasyaiva phalaṃ tasmai namonamaḥ || 41 ||
ataḥ sa hasitaḥ pūrvaṃ mohito harilīlayā ||
iti śrutvāha vaitālo hareḥ śaraṇamuttamam || 42 ||
vākyaṃ tena kṛtaṃ śūlyāmato jīvitavācchuciḥ || 43 ||
iti śrībhaviṣye mahāpurāṇe pratisargaparvaṇi caturyugakhaṇḍāparaparyāye kaliyugīyetihāsasamuccaye trayodaśo.adhyāyaḥ || 13 || cha ||
|| sūta uvāca || ||
bhṛguvarya mahābhāga vaitālo nṛpamabravīt ||
rājanpuṣpāvatī ramyā nagarī tatra bhūpatiḥ ||
suvicāra iti khyātaḥ prajāpālanatatparaḥ || 1 ||
candraprabhā tasya patnī rūpayauvana śālinī ||
tasyāṃ jātā sutā devī nāmnā candrāvalī matā || 2 ||
kadācitsvālibhiḥ sārddhaṃ vipinaṃ kusumākaram ||
āyayau tatra vai vipraṃ sudevaṃ sā dadarśa ha ||3||
mohitā cābhavaddevī vipropi patitaḥ kṣitau ||
kāmabāṇavyathāṃ prāpya gataprāṇa ivābhavat || 4 ||
tasyāṃ gatāyāṃ sadane dvau viprau tatra cāgatau ||
mūladevaḥ śaśī nāmnā tatra vidyāviśāradau ||5||
tathāgataṃ dvijaṃ dṛṣṭvā rūpayauvanaśālinam ||
papraccha kāraṇaṃ sarva yena mohatvamāgataḥ || 6 ||
sa śrutvā rodanaṃ kṛtvā sarvaṃ tasmai nyavedayat ||
kṛpālurmūladevastu taṃ svagehamavāptavān || 7 ||
gṛhe japtvā mahāmaṃtraṃ cāmuṇḍābījasaṃyutam ||
kṛtavānguṭike cobhe sudevāya samārpayat || 8 ||
ekayā suṃdarī kanyā dvādaśābdamayī śubhā ||
dvitīyayā mahāvṛddho mūladevastadābhavat || 9 ||
dvau gatau rājasadane nṛpamāśīrbhirarcya tam ||
hetuṃ nivedayāmāsa tacchuṇuṣva mahāmate ||3.2.14.10||
nagare tāṃtrike rājanmadgehaṃ sundaropamam ||
vilāpadhvajanāmnā vai rājñā saṃluṭhitaṃ balāt||1 1||
palāyitau sutaḥ patnī tāvanveṣṭuṃ samāyayau||
iyaṃ vadhūrmahārāja mama tatputrabhāvinī||12||
