yāvadahaṃ na gacchāmi svagehe rakṣa dharmataḥ ||
iti śrutvā sa nṛpatiścāhūya svasutāṃ tadā ||
tasyai samarpya tāṃ paścātsa dvijo gehamāyayau || 13 ||
sudevastu niśīthe vai ramaṇīṃ prāha nirbhayaḥ||
kutaste mana udvignaṃ satyaṃ kathaya me sakhi ||14||
sāha me hṛdaye nityaṃ sudevo brāhmaṇottamaḥ ||
uṣitastadviyogena vyākulāhaṃ sadā sakhe ||15||
sudevaścāha bhoḥ subhūryadi te brāhmaṇottamam ||
samarpayāmi tattvaṃ me kiṃ dadāsi vadasva bhoḥ ||
sāha te sarvadā dāsī bhavāmi dvijabhāmini ||16||
iti śrutvā sudevastu mukhānniṣkṛṣya yaṃtrakam ||
pūrvadehatvamāpannastayā sārddhaṃ samāramat || 17 ||
caturmāsyo bhavadgarbhastasminkāle tu bho nṛpa || || 18 ||
amātyatanayo viprastrīrūpaṃ prati mohitaḥ ||
tadā maraṇasampannaṃ jñātvā taṃ madanālasam || 19 ||
mantrī snehācca bahudhā sañcitya hṛdi paṃḍitaiḥ ||
tasmai samarpayāmāsa tāṃ nārīṃ mantrasambhavām || 3.2.14.20 ||
sāha bhomātyatanaya trimāsaṃ tīrthamaṇḍale ||
saṃsnāhi tarhi me yogyo bhaviṣyasi tathā kuru || 21 ||
tathā matvā maṃtrisuto namrātmā madanālasaḥ ||
tīrthāṃtaraṃ gataḥ so.api sudevastasya yoṣitam || 22 ||
bhūpakāṃtiṃ kāmavaśāṃ cāliliṃga sa kāmukaḥ ||
sā tu garbhaṃ dadhārāśu dvimāsasya dvijena vai || 23 ||
sudevo mānuṣo bhūtvā mūladevagṛhaṃ yayau ||
sarvaṃ nivedayāmāsa yathājātaṃ nṛpālaye || 24 ||
mūladevaḥ prasannātmā śaśinaṃ nāma mitrakam ||
viṃśadvarṣataraṃ kṛtvā svayaṃ vṛddhasya rūpavān || 25 ||
rājñe nivedya tatsarvaṃ vadhūṃ me dehi bhūpate ||
tadā tu sa nṛpo bhītyā taṃ prāha ślakṣṇayā girā || 26 ||
mantrī rājakaro nāma tatputro madanālasaḥ ||
dṛṣṭvā tava vadhūṃ ramyāṃ mumoha maraṇonmukhaḥ || 27 ||
svaputrasya viyogena sa mantrī ca tathedṛśaḥ ||
tathāhaṃ brāhmaṇānvṛddhānpṛṣṭvā tasmai ca tāmadām || 28 ||
yathā prasanno hi bhavānkuru tvaṃ ca tathāvidham ||
mūladevastu nṛpatiṃ provāca viṣamudvaman || 29 ||
dehi bhūpa sutāṃ mahyaṃ tatputrasya suratāya vai ||
tathaiva matvā sa nṛpaḥ sutāṃ candrāvalīṃ śubhām || 3.2.14.30 ||
dattvā ca vedavidhinā bahudhā dravyasaṃyutām ||
svayaṃ cakāra rājyaṃ vai brahmadoṣavivarjitaḥ || 31 ||
śaśī tu bhūpateḥ kanyāṃ gṛhītvā svagṛhaṃ yayau ||
sudevastu tadā duḥkhī mūladevamuvāca ha || 32 ||
madīyeyaṃ nṛpasutā bhogapatnī mahottamā ||
tacchrutvā mūladevastu vismitaḥ sa tathākarot || 33 ||
ityuktvā nṛpatiṃ prāha vaitālo rudrakiṃkaraḥ ||
kasmai prāptā nṛpasutā dharmatastadvadasva me || 34 || ||
|| rājovāca || ||
pitāmātrājñayā putrī devānāṃ sanmukhe sthitā ||
yasmai niveditā tasmai sā yogyā dharmataḥ sadā || 35 ||
śāstreṣu kathitaṃ deva strīratnaṃ sarvadaiva hi ||
yathākṣetraṃ bhuvi khyātaṃ bījamantrena ropitam || 36 ||
tatkṣetraṃ kṛṣikārasya bījadāturna caiva ha ||
tasmādvai rājatanayā śaśinaṃ varayiṣyati || 37 ||
sudevasya vai tanayo yogyatvaṃ hi gamiṣyati || 38 ||
iti te kathitaṃ deva yathāśāstreṣu bhāṣitam ||
kiṃ kṛtaṃ mantriputreṇa tathaiva kathayasva me || 39 ||
iti śrutvā sa hovāca sa putro madanālasaḥ ||
vṛndāvanaṃ śubhaṃ prāpya rādhākuṇḍe samāgataḥ || 3.2.14.40 ||
sa snātvā bahulā ṣṭamyāṃ tatpuṇyena nṛpottama ||
bhasmasādabhavatpāpaṃ yena mohatvamāgataḥ || 41 ||
smṛtvā sa hṛdi goviṃdaṃ tuṣṭāva ślakṣṇayā girā || 42 ||
|| madanālasa uvāca || ||
namaste dayāsiṃdhave kṛṣṇadeva tvayedaṃ tataṃ viśvamambhodhirūpam ||
tvayaikena līlārthato devadeva priyārādhayā sārddhametaddhi guptam|| || 43 || jagatyantakāle tvayā kālamūrtyā jagatsaṃhṛtaṃ vai namastenamaste ||
madīyā ca buddhirhṛṣīkeśa śuddhā yathā syāttathaiveśa śīghraṃ kuru tvam || || 44 ||
iti stotraprabhāvena devadevena mocitā ||
kāmapāśāttasya buddhiḥ sa kṣatrī gṛhamāyayau || 45 ||
ramaṇīṃ svāṃ samāliṃgya nananda mudito nṛpa ||
vipradoṣavināśāya hṛdi saṃcintya buddhimān||
sudevaṃ sa samāhūya svāṃ svasāraṃ dadau mudā || 46||
sudevastasya bhaginīṃ kṣatriyasya madāturām ||
dharmeṇodvāhya svagehaṃ prāptavānkāmakiṃkaraḥ || 47 ||
iti te kathitaṃ bhūpa caritraṃ tasya dhīmataḥ ||
mūladevasya viprasya tathānyatkathayāmyaham|| || 48 ||
iti śrībhaviṣye mahāpurāṇe pratisargaparvaṇi caturyugakhaṇḍāparaparyāye kaliyugīyetihāsasamuccaye caturdaśo.adhyāyaḥ || 14 || || cha ||
|| sūta uvāca || ||
praśasya bhūpatiṃ śuddhaṃ vetālo rudrakiṃkaraḥ ||
punarākhyānakaṃ vipra varṇayāmāsa sundaram || 1 ||
kānyakujje mahārāja brāhmaṇo dānaśīlakaḥ ||
babhūva satyasaṃdhaśca devīpūjanatatparaḥ ||
pratigraheṇa yaddravyaṃ tena dānamacīkarat || 2 ||
kadācittu śaratkāle navadurgāvrataṃ hyabhūt ||
na prāptaṃ dānato dravyaṃ tadā ciṃtāturo.abhavat ||3||
kiṃ kartavyaṃ mayā cādya yena dravyayuto hyaham ||
kanyā nimaṃtritāścādya kathaṃ tāṃ bhojayāmyaham ||4||
iti śokasamāyuktastadā devīprasādataḥ ||
mudrāḥ pañca tadā prāptāstābhirvratamacīkarat || 5 ||
nirāhāravrataṃ tena kṛtaṃ tu navamāhnikam ||
tena vrataprabhāvena mṛto devatvamāgataḥ || 6 ||
jīmūtaketuriti ca sobhūdvidyādharādhipaḥ ||
himācalagirau ramye pure vidyādhare śubhe ||7||
uvāsa katicidvarṣāndivya bhogaprabhogavān||
tatra kalpadrumaṃ nityaṃ pūjayāmāsa bhaktitaḥ || 8 ||
tena vṛkṣaprabhāvena jātaḥ putro mahottamaḥ ||
sarvākalāsu nipuṇo nāmnā jīmūtavāhanaḥ || 9 ||
sa vai pūrvabhave rājanmadhyadeśe mahottame ||
kṣatriyaḥ śūrasenākhyo babhūva vasudhādhipaḥ || 3.2.15.10 ||
ekadā mṛgayākelilolupaḥ sa mahīpatiḥ ||
prāptavānutpalāraṇyaṃ yatra vālmīkisaṃsthitiḥ || 11 ||
caitraśuklanavamyāṃ tu na kṛtaṃ jīvaghātanam ||
utsavaṃ rāmadivase cakāra vidhivannṛpaḥ || 12 ||
vālmīkeśca kuṭīmadhye rātrau jāgaraṇaṃ kṛtam || 13 ||
śrutā rāmamayī gāthā tasya puṇyaprabhāvataḥ ||
vidyādharatvamāpanno mumude tatra śakravat ||14||
kalpavṛkṣasya vai pūjā kṛtā tena mahātmanā ||
varṣāṃtare drumaḥ prāha varaṃ varaya sattama || 15 ||
sa tamāha mahāvṛkṣa madīyaṃ nagaraṃ śubham ||
dhanadhānyasa māyuktaṃ yathaiva syāttathā kuru || 16 ||
ityukte sati vṛkṣeṇa nagaraṃ bhūpateḥ samam ||
kṛtaṃ tadā na ko.apyāsīdyo manyetpārthivāśrayam || 17 ||
sarve te rājatulyāśca kalpavṛkṣaprasādataḥ ||
tadā tau tu pitāputrau tapaso.arthe vanaṃ gatau ||18||
malayādrau mahāramye tepaturbahulaṃ tapaḥ||
ekasmindivase rājanmalayadhvajabhūpateḥ || 19 ||
kamalākṣīti vikhyātā kanyā ca śivamaṃdire ||
svasakhyā sahitā prāptā śivapūjanatatparā || 3.2.15.20 ||
jīmūtavāhanaścaiva pūjārthe maṃdiraṃ yayau ||
bālāṃ dadarśa divyāṃgīṃ sarvabhūṣāsamanvitām || 21 ||
tasyā darśanamātreṇa kāmabāṇena pīḍitaḥ ||
manasā kāmadevaṃ taṃ tuṣṭāva ślakṣṇayā girā || 22 ||
jīmūtavāhana uvāca || ||
madanāya namastubhyaṃ kṛṣṇaputrāya te namaḥ ||
śaṃbaraprāṇahaṃtre ca caturvyūhāya te namaḥ || || 23 ||
paṃcabāṇāya kāmāya pradyumnāya namonamaḥ ||
madyogyāṃ kuru suśroṇīṃ kāminīṃ kamalānanām || 24 ||
tadā prasanno bhagavānmakaradhvajadevatā ||
mohayitvā ca pitaraṃ tadvivāhamakārayat || 25 ||
viśvāvasuriti khyātastasya bhūpasya vai sutaḥ ||
bhaginīpatinā sārddhaṃ sa yayau gaṃdhamādanam || 26 ||
naraṃ nārāyaṇaṃ natvā garuḍottuṃgamāyayau ||
tadā nāgasya vai mātā śaṃkhracūḍasya bho nṛpa ||27||
ruroda bahudhā tatra yatra jīmūtavāhanaḥ||
duḥkhitaḥ sa jagāmāśu dayālurdīnavatsalaḥ || 28 ||
vṛddhāmāśvāsya papraccha kenedaṃ duḥkhamāgatam ||
sāha me tanayo deva garuḍāsye gamiṣyati || || 29 ||
tadviyogena duḥkhārtā vilapāmi mahākulā ||
iti jñātvā sa nṛpatirgaruḍottuṃgamāyayau || 3.2.15.30 ||
garuḍo.api gṛhītvā taṃ nabhomārgamupāgamat ||
tasyāṃgado.asṛjā lipto nyadhāttattatra bhāminī || 31 ||
kamalākṣī tu viyati sthitaṃ garuḍabhakṣitam ||
vilokya cārudadgāḍhaṃ patiduḥkhena duḥkhitā || 32 ||
tadā tu garuḍastrastastatrāgatya tvarānvitaḥ ||
jīmūtavāhanaṃ prāha kasmāttvaṃ mama bhakṣitaḥ || 33 ||
sa hovāca prabho medya vacaḥ śṛṇu mahāmate ||
śaṃkhacūḍasya jananī mahāduḥkhena duḥkhitā || 34 ||
tasyāḥ putrasya rakṣārthaṃ saṃprāpto.ahaṃ tavāṃtikam ||
ityukte sati bhūpāla śaṃkhacūḍaśca pannagaḥ || 35 ||
tadvyālasyaiva duḥkhena duḥkhitaḥ śatrumāptavān ||
māṃ prabhakṣa kṛpāsiṃdho tvadāhārārthamāgatam || 36 ||
saṃtyajya mānuṣaṃ divyaṃ kurvāhāraṃ mahāmate ||
tadā prasanno garuḍo dadau tasmai varatrayam ||37 ||
jīmūtavāhanāyaiva vidyādharasutāya ca ||
śaṃkhacūḍakulaṃ nāhaṃ bhakṣayiṣye kadācana || 38 ||
tvaṃ tu vidyādharapure prāpya rājyaṃ mahottamam ||
subhojayitvā lakṣābdaṃ tato vaikuṇṭhameṣyasi || 39 ||
ityuktvāntardadhau devaḥ sa pitrā rājyamāptavān ||
svapatnyā saha rājyāṃgaṃ bhuktvā vaikuṃṭhamāyayau || 3.2.15.40 ||
ityuktvā sa tu vaitālo nṛpatiṃ prāha namradhīḥ ||
teṣāṃ madhye mahārāja kasya prāptaṃ mahāphalam || 41 ||
|| rājovāca || ||
śaṃkhacūḍasya saṃprāptaṃ jīvadānamahāphalam ||
nṛpasyaivopakāraṃ ca svabhāvo vidhinā kṛtaḥ || 42 ||
pativratāprabhāvena jīvadānena bhūpateḥ ||
santuṣṭo garuḍo jātastasya kiṃ tarhi tatphalam || 43 ||
nirbhayaḥ śaṃkhacūḍastu svaśatruṃ prati cāgamat ||
śarīramarpayitvā taṃ tataḥ prāptaṃ mahāphalam || 44 ||
iti śrībhaviṣye mahāpurāṇe pratisargaparvaṇi caturyugakhaṇḍāparaparyāye kaliyugīyeti hāsasamuccaye paṃcadaśo.adhyāyaḥ || 15 || cha ||
|| sūta uvāca || ||
punaḥ prāha sa vaitālo bhūpatiṃ jñānakovidam ||
caṃdraśekharabhūpasya nagarī dakṣiṇe sthitā || 1 ||
ratnadattovasadvaiśyo dharmajño dhanadhānyavān||
kāmāvarūthinī tasya sutā jātā mahottamā || 2 ||
tadrūpamuttamaṃ dṛṣṭvā sa vaiśyo bhūpatiṃ prati ||
uvāca bho mahārāja sutā mama surepsitā || 3 ||
tāṃ gṛhāṇa kṛpāsiṃdho tvadyogyā vidhinirmitā ||
iti śrutvā tu vacanaṃ bhūpatiścaṃdraśekharaḥ||| || 4 ||
maṃtriṇaṃ viduraṃ prāha tvaṃ ca gaccha mahāmate ||
yathāyogyaṃ hi tadrūpaṃ māṃ nivedaya satvaram || 5 ||
ityuktvā sa yayau gehaṃ bhūpatiścaṃdraśekharaḥ|
śyāmalā nāma tatpatnī jñātvā rājānamāgatam||6||
dhūpadīpādibhiḥ puṣpairyathāyogyaiḥ samārcayat ||
etasminneva kāle tu gauśca śārdūlapīḍitā||7||
haṃbhāśabdena mahatā vilalāpa bhayāturā ||
tacchrutvā sa tu bhūpālaḥ khaṅgahastaḥ samabhyagāt || 8 ||
śīghraṃ hatvā tu śārdūlaṃ mumoda nṛpatistadā ||
mukulo dānavo nāma taddehādrūpamāptavān ||9||
bhūpatiṃ prāha namrātmā dharmajñaṃ caṃdraśekharam ||
tvayā vimocito nātha yāsyāmi varuṇālayam ||1 0||
prahrādasyaiva śāpena vvāghradehatvamāgataḥ ||
parikramya yayau daityaḥ prahlādaṃ prati satvaraḥ || 11 ||
nṛpatirgṛhamāgatya suṣvāpa parayā mudā ||
prabhāte bodhito rājā sabhāyāṃ svayamāgamat || 12 ||
nṛpoktaḥ sa yayau tatra yatra kāmāvarūthinī ||
divyamūrtimayīṃ dṛṣṭvāciṃtayatsa svamānase || 13 ||
asyā mūrtiprabhāvena rājāsau mohamāpsyati||
iti jñātvā nṛpaṃ prāha saiva tvadyogyakā na hi||14||
tathā matvā sa nṛpatirna vivāhamathākarot||
ratnadattasya bhūpasya senāyāḥ pataye dadau || 15 ||
balabhadrasya sā patnī babhūva varavarṇinī ||
ekadā nṛpatistāṃ vai dṛṣṭvā kāmāvatharūthinīm || 16 ||
mohitaḥ kāmabāṇena mūrcchitaḥ patito bhuvi ||
tadā senāpatistūrṇaṃ nṛpamutthāpya satvaram || 17 ||
śibikāṃ caiva saṃsthāpya sabhāyāṃ ca samairayat ||
tadā prabuddho nṛpatiḥ prāha senāpatiṃ mudā || 18 ||
kasyeyaṃ sundarī bhāryā kuto jātā mahottamā ||
balabhadrastu tacchrutvā nṛpatiṃ prāha namradhīḥ || 19 ||
mameyaṃ sundarī nārī ratnadattasya sā sutā ||
rājyabhaṃgabhayānmantrī na rūpaṃ tvayi varṇivān || 20 ||
mama dāsasya yā patnī tvadyogyā bhūpate sadā ||
tavecchāṃ pūrayiṣyāmi tāṃ gṛhāṇa kṛpānidhe || 21 ||
ityuktaḥ krodhatāmrākṣo bhūpatistamuvāca ha ||
taveyaṃ dharmato bhāryā prāptā sundararūpiṇī || 22 ||
gṛhṇāmi yadi tāṃ devīṃ narake yamakiṃkarāḥ ||
pātayitvā mahāduḥkhaṃ bhajayiṣyanti tarhi bhoḥ || 23 ||
ityuktvā bhūpatistūrṇaṃ virahāgniprapīḍitaḥ ||
maraṇaṃ prāptavānrājā gato dharmapurāṃtike || 24 ||
ityuktvā sa tu vaitālo nṛpaṃ prāha śṛṇuṣva bhoḥ ||
mṛte rājani tatpatnī satī bhūtvā pradṛśyate ||25||
senāpatistu tatraiva bhasmasādabhavatkṣaṇāt ||
kāmāvarūthinī devī bhasma kṛtvā kalevaram ||26||
svargaṃ gatāstu te sarve kasya puṇyādhikaṃ matam ||
sa hovāca ca vaitālaṃ rājā dharmādhiko mataḥ ||27 ||
maraṇaṃ kiṃkarasyaiva yogyaṃ bhūpatihetave ||
pativratāyā maraṇaṃ patisaṃgena yogyakam || 28 ||
dattā yatkiṃkareṇaiva suṃdarī nṛpahetave ||
dharmabhītyā na nṛpatistāmagṛhṇātsa kāmukaḥ || 29 ||
jitvā kāmaṃ tathā pālyaṃ dharmaṃ tasmānnṛpe.adhikam || 30 || ||
iti śrībhaviṣye mahāpurāṇe pratisargaparvaṇi caturyugakhaṇḍāparaparyāye kaliyugīyetihāsasamuccaye ṣoḍaśo.a dhyāyaḥ || 16 || || cha ||
|| sūta uvāca || ||
punaḥ provāca vetālastadā brāhmaṇarūpavān ||
śṛṇu bhūpa mahābhāga kathāṃ tava manoramām || 1 ||
ujjayinyāṃ mahābhāga mahāseno nṛpo.abhavet ||
tasya rājye.avasadvipro devaśarmeti viśrutaḥ || 2 ||
guṇākarastasya suto madyamāṃsaparāyaṇaḥ ||
dyūtena saṃkṣayaṃ vittaṃ tasya pāpasya cābhavat || 3 ||
bāṃdhavaiḥ sa parityakto babhrāma vasudhātale ||
kadāciddaivayogena siddhāśramamupāgamat || 4 ||
kapardī nāma taṃ yogī kapālānnairapūjayat ||
jñātvā paiśācamannaṃ sa bubhukṣurna gṛhītavān || 5 ||
tadātithyaṃ tadarthaṃ sa yakṣiṇīṃ samupāhvayat ||
tayā rātrau mahānandaṃ prāptavānsa dvijaḥ śayī || 6 ||
prātaḥ kāle tu saṃprāpte kailāsaṃ yakṣiṇī gatā ||
sa dvijastadviyogena yogyaṃtikamupāyayau || 7 ||
kapardī pradadau tasmai vidyāṃ yakṣiṇikarṣiṇīm ||
catvāriṃśaddinānyeva niśīthe jalamadhyagaḥ || 8 ||
sa jajāpa śubhaṃ mantraṃ na prāptā kāmacāriṇī ||
tadā yogyājñayā vipraḥ svayaṃ tu mamatāṃ tyajan || 9 ||
prāptavānpitarau natvā svagehe nivasanniśi || 3.2.17.10||
pratibodhivanaṃ prāptastacchiṣyatvamupāyayau ||
pañcāgnimadhye sa sthitvā tanmaṃtramajapacchuciḥ || 11 ||
na prāptā yoginī devī tadā cintāturo .abhavat ||
ityuktvā sa vaitālo nṛpatiṃ jñānakovidam || 12 ||
punarāha kathaṃ devī na prāptā yakṣiṇī priyā ||
śrutvāha nṛpatirvipra vaitālaṃ rudra kiṃkaram || 13 ||
trividhaṃ karma bho vipra siddhyarthe sādhakāya vai ||
manovāgvihitaṃ karma paraloke sukhapradam || 14 ||
sundarāṃgakṛtaṃ jñeyaṃ punarvākkāyasaṃbhavam ||
kiñcitsiddhipradaṃ jñeyamiha janmani vīkṣitam || 15 ||
paratra ca bhuvarloke piṇḍadehakṛtaṃ smṛtam ||
manaḥkāyena saṃbhūtaṃ para janmani rājyadam || 16 ||
manovākkāyasaṃbhūtamiha janmani siddhidam ||
paratra paramāṃ siddhiṃ tatkarma pradadāti hi || 17 ||
tasmātkartavyameveha trividhaṃ karma sādhakaiḥ ||
anyavitttena sa dvijaḥ kṛtavānkarma mantrajam ||
ato.anyajanmani prāpto yakṣatvaṃ tatparo dvijaḥ || 18 ||
|| sūta uvāca ||
ityuktvā sa tu vaitālaḥ prasannavadano.abhavat || 19 ||
sādhu sādhviti taṃ procya sadvākyaiḥ samapūjayat ||
itihāsaṃ punaḥ prāha parīkṣārthe nṛpāya saḥ || 3.2.17.20 || ||
iti śrībhaviṣye mahāpurāṇe pratisargaparvaṇi caturyugakhaṇḍāparaparyāye kaliyugīyetihāsasamuccaye saptadaśo .adhyāyaḥ || 17 || || cha ||
|| sūta uvāca || ||
bhoḥ śaunaka mahāprājña vaitālastaṃ hi so.abravīt ||
sudakṣo nāma nṛpatirvasankaṃbalake pure || 1 ||
nyāyavāndharmavāñchūro dātā śivaparāyaṇaḥ ||
tasya rājye.avasadvaiśyo dhanādhyakṣa iti śrutaḥ || 2 ||
tanayā sundarī tasya nāmnā dhana vatī śubhā ||
gaurīdattāya vaiśyāya pitrā dattā varāṃganā || 3 ||
kiyatā caiva kālena mohinī tatsutābhavat ||
dvādaśābdavayastasyāḥ pitā tu nidhanaṃ gataḥ || 4 ||
tadā dhanavatī raṃḍā nidhanā pituraṃtike ||
kanyayā saha saṃprāptā niśi mārge tamomaye || 5 ||
nyāyaśarmā dvijaḥ kaścidbrahmasvasyāpahārakaḥ ||
nāmasatyatvabhāvena śūlyāṃ na nidhanaṃ gataḥ || 6 ||
akasmādvaiśyajā prāptā tatkaraṃ sā tadāspṛśat ||
tena duḥkhena mahatā rurodo ccairdvijaśca saḥ ||7||
hā rāmakṛṣṇa pradyumnāniruddheti punaḥpunaḥ ||
śrutvā dhanavatī dīnā ko bhavāniti sābravīt ||8||
dvija āha ca vipro.ahaṃ tryahaṃ śūlyāṃ nirūpitaḥ ||
yadi dāsyasi me kanyāṃ koṭisvarṇaṃ dadāmi te || 9 ||
śrutvā dhanavatī tasmā udvāhya mohinīṃ sutām ||
vaṭamūle sthitaṃ dravyaṃ khanitvā gṛhamāyayau || 3.2.18.10 ||
mohinyapi patiṃ prāha bhavānmṛtyuvaśaṃ gataḥ ||
kuto jāyeta tanayastanme brūhi dayānidhe || 1 1||
dvijaḥ prāha śṛṇu vyaṃge yadā te hṛcchayo bhavet ||
datā tvaṃ paṃḍitaṃ prāpya putramutpādayāśu vai ||12||
ityuktvā maraṇaṃ prāpya yamalokaṃ gato dvijaḥ ||
nārakīṃ yātanāṃ nityaṃ bubhuje niṃdyakarmajām || 13 ||
māturgṛhe tu sā nārī mohinī yauvanānvitā ||
samayaṃ hṛdaye kṛtvā tiṣṭhaṃtī ca punaḥpunaḥ || 14 ||
ke bhogāśca kimāścaryaṃ ko jāgarti śayīta kaḥ ||
pāpo vyādhiśca duḥkhaṃ ca kuto jātaṃ hṛdi sthitam || 15 ||
iti ślokaṃ dvijānāha nottaraṃ ca dadurdvijāḥ ||
medhāvī nāma kāśmīre sthito vipraḥ samāgataḥ || 16 ||
tāmuvāca prasannātmā śṛṇu mohini suṃdari ||
sugaṃdhi vanitā vastraṃ gītaṃ pānaṃ ca bhojanam ||
śayyā ca bhūṣaṇaṃ jñeyo bhogo hyaṣṭavidho budhaiḥ || 17 ||
ahanyahani bhūtāni mriyante janayanti ca ||
mamatāṃ yaḥ karotyeṣāṃ tadāścaryaṃ smṛtaṃ budhaiḥ || 18 ||
yo vivekaṃ samāsādya kurute karmasaṃgraham ||
saṃsāre ghoratamasi sa jāgarti vivekavān|| 19 ||
saṃsārājagaraṃ jñātvā vairāgyaṃ yo.akarodbhuvi ||
audāsīnyaṃ samādhiṃ ca sukhaṃ śete hi mānavaḥ ||3.2.18.20||
saṃkalpājjāyate kāmastato lobhaḥ prajāyate||
lobhājjātaśca tṛṣṇāyāṃ sa pāpo nirayapradaḥ || 21 ||
jalaprakṛtyāṃ yo jāto raso rasavikāravān ||
rasājātasya dehe.asminvyādhiḥ karmamayo.aśubhaḥ || 22 ||
rudrātkālyāṃ samudbhūto moho hṛdi ca lokahā ||
sa tuṣṭāva mahādevīṃ patnyarthe surapūjitām || 23 ||
mithyādṛṣṭistato jātā mohasya dayitābhavat||
tasmātsnehaśca tatpatnyāṃ jātaśca mamatāpriyaḥ || 24 ||
tayoḥ sakāśātsaṃjātaṃ duḥkhaṃ śokasamanvitam ||
iti śrutvā tu sā nārī muhoha varavarṇinī || 25 ||
mānī śūraśca caturo.adhikārī guṇavānsakhā ||
strīrakṣakaśca puruṣo vaśaṃ nārīṃ sadā nayet || 26 ||
tasyai garbhaṃ ca vipro.asau dattvā svarṇaṃ gṛhītavān ||
sāpi nārī sukhaṃ lebhe tena garbheṇa pratyaham || 27 ||
kadāciddaśamāsāṃte mohinīmabravīcchivaḥ ||
svapnāṃtare mahārāja sāpi jñātvā tathākarot || 28 ||
dolāmadhye sahasraṃ ca svarṇaṃ caiva svabālakam ||
rājadvāre sthāpayitvā suṣvāpa jananī sukham || 29 ||
śivena bodhito rājā sutārthī rudrapūjakaḥ ||
dvijaputraṃ samālebhe mohinyāṃ jātamuttamam || 3.2.18.30 ||
kārayitvā jātakarma vitatāra dhanaṃ bahu ||
haradattaśca nāmnāsītsarvavidyāviśāradaḥ || 31 ||
piturante ca tadrājyaṃ prāpya dharmaṃ prakāśayan ||
gayāśrāddhaṃ kṛtaṃ tena phalgutīre vidhānataḥ || 32 ||
trayo hastāstadā jātāḥ sa rājā vismito.abhavat || 33 ||
ityuktvā sa tu vaitālo nṛpatiṃ prāha bho nṛpa ||
kasmai yogyo hi piṃḍo.asau śrutvā rājābravīdidam || 34 ||
dravyārthī paṃḍito jñeyo gurutulyaśca bhūpatiḥ ||
caurāya piṃḍa ucito yasya nārī ca mohinī || 35 ||
|| sūta uvāca || ||
tena piṃḍaprabhāvena sa cauro brahmadravyahā ||
nirayānniḥsṛto vipra svargalokaṃ samāgataḥ || 36 ||
iti śrībhaviṣye mahāpurāṇe pratisargaparvaṇi caturyugakhaṃḍāparaparyāye kali yugīyetihāsasamuccaye.aṣṭādaśo.adhyāyaḥ ||18|| cha ||
citrakūṭe ca nṛpatī rūpadatta iti śrutaḥ ||
vane mṛgaprasaṃgena vanāntaramupāyayau||1||
madhyāhne sarasastīre muniputro dadarśa saḥ||
cinvatīṃ padmakusumaṃ rūpayauvanaśālinīm ||2||
tasyā netre svayaṃ netre caikībhūte samāgate||
etasminnaṃtare viprastatra prāpto dadarśa tau ||3||
tasya darśanamātreṇa nṛpaterjñānamāgatam ||
vinayāvanato rājā dharmaṃ papraccha cottamam ||4||
tamuvāca munirddhīmāndayādharmaprapoṣaṇam || |
nirbhayasya samaṃ dānaṃ na bhūtaṃ na bhaviṣyati ||5||
anarhāndaṇḍamādadyādarhapūjāphalaṃ bhajet ||
mitratā godvije nityaṃ samatā daṃḍanigrahe || 6 ||
satyatā surapūjāyāṃ damatā gurupūjane ||
mṛdutā dānasamaye saṃtuṣṭirniṃdyakarmaṇi ||7||
ityuktvā sa muniḥ putrīṃ tasmai dattvā gṛhaṃ yayau||
rājāpi ca tayā sārddhaṃ vaṭamūle.aśayiṣṭa vai ||8||
tadā tu rākṣasaḥ kaścittatpatnībhakṣaṇotsukaḥ ||
bodhayāmāsa nṛpatiṃ baliṃ tasmai sa bhūpatiḥ ||9||
dānārthaṃ caiva kravyāde saptavarṣātmakaṃ dvijam ||
samayaṃ kṛtavānrājā satyena svagṛhaṃ yayau ||3.2.19.1 0||
amātyaiḥ saṃmataṃ kṛtvā svarṇalakṣaṃ dadau dvije ||
madhyaṃ bālaṃ puraskṛtya rākṣasāya baliṃ dadau||11||
mṛtyukāle dvijasuto vihasyoccai ruroda ha ||
kathaṃ hāsyaṃ kṛtaṃ tena tatpaścādrodanaṃ katham ||12||
iti śrutvā nṛpaḥ prāha śṛṇu vaitālika dvija ||
jyeṣṭhaputraṃ piturhadyaṃ mātṛhṛdyamavaryakam||13||
jñātvā sa madhyamaḥ putro rājānaṃ śaraṇaṃ yayau||
nirdayī rūpasenaśca patnīkalyāṇabhikṣukaḥ ||14||
khaṅgahastaṃ nṛpaṃ jñātvā jahāsa śivatatparaḥ ||
rākṣasāya śarīraṃ me prāptamasmādruroda ha ||15||
iti śrībhaviṣye mahāpurāṇe pratisargaparvaṇi caturyugakhaṃḍāparaparyāye kaliyugīyetihāsasamuccaya ekonaviṃśo.adhyāyaḥ ||19|||
|| sūta uvāca || ||
iti śrutvā sa vaitālo nṛpaṃ prāha punaḥ kathām ||
viśālanagare ramye vipuleśo mahīpatiḥ ||1||
tasya grāmevasadvaiśyorthadattovipaṇe rataḥ ||
anaṃgamaṃjarī kanyā tasya jātā manoramā||2||
suvarṇanāmne vaiśyāya pitā vai dattavānsvayam||
kadācitkamalagrāmātsuvarṇo dvīpamāgamat||
dravyalābhāya nyavasacciraṃ kālaṃ sa lubdhavān ||3||
anaṃgamaṃjarīgehe daivayogāddvijottamaḥ ||
kamalākaranāmāsau kṛtyayogātsamāgataḥ || 4 ||
homāṃte sundarī nārī mārjanārthe sutā gatā ||
dṛṣṭvā tāṃ kāmakalikāṃ mumoha dvijasattamaḥ || 5 ||
sutāpi madaghūrṇākṣī viprāya samayaṃ dadau ||
niśīthe tama_udbhūte tvaṃ māṃ prāpya sukhī bhava || 6 ||
iti śrutvā dvijo vākyaṃ tasyā dhyānaṃ tadākarot ||
kāmāgninā ciraṃ taptaḥ suṣvāpa paramāsane || 7 ||
arddharātre tu sā nārī dvijāgamanatatparā ||
mārgamanveṣamāṇā sā priyasya smarapīḍitā|| || 8 ||
nāgataḥ sa dvijo daivāttadā sā maraṇaṃ gatā ||
kamalākara evāśu samayānte samāyayau || 9 ||
dṛṣṭvā mṛtyuvaśāṃ subhrūṃ svayaṃ maraṇamāgataḥ ||
prabhāte cārthadatto vai dāhayāmāsa tāṃ śucā || 3.2.20.10 ||
suvarṇaśca tadāgatya vilalāpa priyāṃ prati ||
citāyāṃ bhasmasādbhūtvā svargaloke tu sā yayau|| || 11 ||
ityuktvā sa tu vaitālo nṛpatiṃ prāha vikramam ||
kasya sneho.adhikasteṣāṃ kutaḥ svargapuraṃ yayau || 12 ||
|| rājovāca || ||
pati snehodhikasteṣāṃ madhyamau nāriviprakau ||
dvijasnehena sā nārī mṛtā svargapuraṃ yayau || 13 ||
vaiśyavarṇaiḥ sadā pūjyo brāhmaṇo brahmamūrtimān || || 14 ||
dvijo.api nāptavānnārīṃ tadā svargagatiṃ harim ||
hṛdi kṛtvā ca nidhanaṃ prāpto hyasmāttriviṣṭapam || 15 ||
suvarṇo hṛdi saṃjñāya matpriyā brahmavatsalā ||
māṃ tyaktā tu divaṃ yātā vahnidāhaprabhāvataḥ || 16 ||
iti śrībhīviṣye mahāpurāṇe pratisargaparvaṇi caturyugakhaṇḍāparaparyāye kaliyu gīyetihāsamuccaye viṃśo.adhyāya || 20 || || cha ||

sūta uvāca||
ityuktvā sa tu vaitālo rājānaṃ prāha namradhīḥ||
jayasthalapure ramye vardhamāno nṛpobhavat||1||
tasya grāme vasadvipro vedavedāṃgapāragaḥ||
viṣṇusvāmīti vikhyāto rādhākṛṣṇaparāyaṇaḥ||2||
catvāraścātmajāstasya caturbhāgaparāyaṇāḥ ||
dyūtakarmā ca kulaṭo viṣayī nāstikaḥ śrutaḥ || 3 ||
kadāciddaivayogena nirddhanatvaṃ ca te gatāḥ ||
pitaraṃ viṣṇuśarmāṇaṃ nemuste vinayānvitāḥ || 4 ||
ūcū ramā kathaṃ naṣṭā tadvadasva pitaḥ priya ||
pitovāca tu tacchrutvā dyūtakarmanniśāmaya || 5 ||
dyūto dhanavyayakaraḥ pāpamūlo mahākhalaḥ ||
vyabhicārastathā cauryaṃ nirdayatvamato bhavet ||
dyūtakarmaprabhāveṇa tvadīyadravyasaṃkṣayaḥ || 6 ||
dhanopāyena bhoḥ pitrorvākyaṃ kuru matiṃ prati ||
tīrthavrataprabhāveṇa tvatpāpaṃ saṃkṣayaṃ vrajet || 7 ||
he putra kulaṭa tvaṃ vai veśyāsaṃgaṃ mahāśubham ||
tyaktvā brahmaparo bhūtvā brahmacarye matiṃ kuru || 8 ||
viṣayinmāṃsamadire nityapāpavivardhike ||
ataḥ prāpsyati cauryatvamato vai nirayastathā || 9 ||
tasmāttvaṃ prabhumīśānaṃ viṣṇuṃ jiṣṇuṃ jagatpatim ||
nivedya sarvathā dravyaṃ bhuñjīthā vāgyataḥ svayam || 3.2.21.10 ||
nāstikatvaṃ devaniṃdā parityajya matiṃ kuru ||
ātmā sarvābhayo nityamā tmaśaktiśca caṃḍikā || 11 ||
ātmanoṃgāni devāśca sarvajīvaguhāśayāḥ ||
tāñjñātvā pūjanaṃ teṣāṃ kuru tvaṃ pāpaśāntaye || 12 ||
iti te vacanaṃ śrutvā gatāstīrthāntaraṃ prati ||
śivamārādhayāmāsurvidyārthe sarvarūpiṇam || 13 ||
varṣāṃte ca mahādevo vidyāṃ saṃjīvanīṃ dadau ||
te prāpya vanamāgatya parīkṣārthe samudyatāḥ || 14 ||
mṛtavyāghrāsthini śreṣṭhaṃ matrapūtāṃbu cākṣipat ||
tena maṃtraprabhāveṇa paṃjaratvamupāgatam || 15 ||
tasyoparyyeva kulaṭo maṃtrapūtaṃ payo.akṣipat ||
ghanamāṃsaṃ ca rudhiraṃ tena maṃtreṇa cābhavat || 16 ||
viṣayī cākṣipaccaiva tasyopari jalaṃ śubham ||
tena mantraprabhāveṇa tvakprāṇatvamupāgatam || 17 ||
suptaṃ vyāghraṃ ca saṃjñāya nāstikastu jalaṃ dadau ||
maṃtreṇa bodhito vyāghrastāṃśca viprānakhādayat||18||
sūta uvāca ||
ityuktvā sa tu vetālo rājānamidamabravīt ||
rājanmūrkho hi kasteṣāṃ śrutvā rājābravīdidam || 19 ||
bodhito yena sa vyāghraḥ sa mūrkhastvadhiko mataḥ ||
iti śrutvā dvijaśreṣṭho vaitālaḥ punarabravīt || 3.2.21.20 ||
iti śrībhaviṣye mahāpurāṇe pratisargaparvaṇi caturyugakhaṇḍāparaparyāye kaliyugīyetihā sasamuccaya ekaviṃśo.adhyāyaḥ || 21 ||

|| vaitāla uvāca || ||
bho rājanbilvatīgrāme gaṃgāyāmunamadhyage ||
ahaṃ pūrvabhave cāsaṃ kṣatrasiṃho mahīpatiḥ || 1 ||
tasya grāme vasadvipro vedavedāṃgapāragaḥ ||
śaṃbhudatta iti khyāto rudrabhaktiparāyaṇaḥ || 2 ||
ubhakau tanayau tasya sarvavidyāviśāradau ||
viṣṇubhaktaḥ smṛto jyeṣṭho nāmnā līlādharo balī ||
śākto.abhavattadanujo mohano nāma śrutaḥ || 3 ||
kadācitkṣatrasiṃhastu yajñārthī yajñahetave ||
śaṃbhudattaṃ samāhūya sasutaṃ dharmakovidam ||
svayaṃ ca kārayāmāsa cchāgamedhaṃ surapriyam || 4 ||
śaṃbhudattastu vṛddhātmā śivabhaktiparāyaṇaḥ ||
catuścakrāṃśca saṃsthāpya kalaśaṃ kāryasiddhidam || 5||
havyaiḥ susaṃskṛtai ramyaiścakāra havanaṃ mudā ||
chāgamāhūya vidhivatpūjayāmāsa bhūpatiḥ || 6 ||
līlādharastu taṃ dṛṣṭvā chāgaṃ ca maraṇonmukham ||
dayālurveṣṇavo dhīmānabravīdvacanaṃ ruṣā || 7 ||
dāruṇaṃ narakaṃ yogyamanayā jīvahiṃsayā ||
sarveśo bhagavānviṣṇuhiṃsāyajñena duṣyati || 8 ||
iti śrutvā vacastasya jyeṣṭhabaṃdhośca mohanaḥ ||
mṛdupūrvaṃ jahāsoccairvacanaṃ prāha namradhīḥ || 9 ||
purā satyayuge bhrātarbrāhmaṇā yajñatatparāḥ ||
ajenaiva hi yaṣṭavyamiti jñātvā parāṃ śrutim ||3.2.22.1 0||
tilādhikamajaṃ matvā havye te tu mano dadhuḥ ||
tadā śakrādayo devā vahnimadhye samāgatāḥ || 11 ||
ūcuste madhuraṃ vākyaṃ tvanmataṃ niṣphalapradam ||
ajacchāgaḥ smṛto vedaistena yaṣṭavyamantaram || 12 |||
śrutveti vacanaṃ teṣāṃ vismitā munayo.abhavan ||
etasminnaṃtare tatra pitṛyoniramāvasuḥ || 13 ||
vimānaṃ paramāruhya munīnprovāca nirbhayaḥ ||
chāga medhena yaṣṭavyaṃ surāṇāṃ tṛptihetave || 14 ||
iti śrutvā vacastasya tathā kṛtvā śivaṃ yayuḥ ||
tasmāttvaṃ ca mayā sārddhaṃ yajñaṃ kuru mahāmate || 15 ||
iti śrutvā vaco ghoraṃ līlādhara udāradhīḥ ||
mohanaṃ prāha dharmātmā yajñastretāyuge.abhavat || 16 ||
rajoguṇamayo lokastretāyāṃ saṃbabhūva ha ||
hiṃsā satyayuge nāsīddharmastatra catuṣpadaḥ ||17||
havyena tarpitā devā na māṃse raktasaṃbhavaiḥ||
iti śrutvā kṣatrasiṃhastyaktvā chāgaṃ bhayāturam ||18||
phalā.adyaiḥ kārayāmāsa tadā pūrṇāhutīrnṛpa ||
etasminnantare devī tāmasī krodhamūrchitā ||
nagaraṃ dāhayāmāsa naranārīsamanvitam || 19 ||
mahāmāyāprabhāveṇa śaṃbhudattaḥ śivapriyaḥ ||
sa bhūtvā ca mahonmādī tyaktvā dehaṃ divaṃ yayau || 3.2.22.20 ||
tadā līlādharo vipro daśaputropajīvakaḥ ||
bālānadhyāpayāmāsa grāme padmapure śubhe || 21 ||
kṣatrasiṃhastu nṛpatirmohanāntikamāyayau ||
prasādaṃ kārayāmāsa devamāturanugraham || 22 ||
|| mohana uvāca || |||
bījamantrajapādbrahmā brāhmīṃ śaktimavāptavān ||
tadaṃbāyai namastubhyaṃ mahāvīrāyai namonamaḥ || 23 ||
japtvā saptaśatīṃ viṣṇurvaiṣṇavīṃ śaktimāptavān ||
tadaṃbāyai namastubhyaṃ mahālakṣmyai namonamaḥ || 24 ||
praṇavāstanayā yasyāsturīyapuruṣapriyā ||
tadaṃbāyai namastubhyaṃ praṇavāyai namonamaḥ || 25 |||
yayā dṛśyamidaṃ jātaṃ yayā vai pālyate jagat ||
yasyā dehe sthitaṃ viśvaṃ tadaṃbāyai namonamaḥ || 26 ||
śacī siddhistathā mṛtyuḥ prabhā gīrvāṇasainikāḥ ||
svāhā ca nirṛtī rātrirṛddhirbhuktistvadudbhavā ||
lokapālapriyā tvaṃ hi lokamātarnamonamaḥ || 27 ||
tṛṣṇā tṛptī ratirnnītirhiṃsā kṣāṃtirmatirgatiḥ ||
niṃdā stutistatherṣyā ca lajjā tvaṃ hi namonamaḥ || 28 ||
ityaṣṭakaprabhāveṇa kṣatrasiṃho mahīpatiḥ ||
śivalokaṃ gataḥ sādhu rvaitālatvamavāptavān || 29 ||
tasmāttvaṃ vikramāditya bhaja durgāṃ sanātanīm ||
śivājñayā tvahaṃ prāptastvatsamīpe mahīpate || 3.2.22.30 ||
praśnottareṇa bhūpāla mayā tvaṃ saṃparīkṣitaḥ ||
bhujayoste sthitirme syājjahi sarvaripūnbhuvi || 31 ||
dasyunaṣṭāḥ purīḥ sarvāḥ kṣetrāṇi vividhāni ca ||
śāstramānena saṃsthāpya samayaṃ kuru bho nṛpa || 32 ||
yo nṛpaḥ sarvatīrthāni punaruddhārayiṣyati ||
sa hi matsthāpitaṃ saṃvadviparītaṃ kariṣyati || || 33 ||
vikramākhyānakālo.ayaṃ punardharmaṃ karoti hi ||
dvādaśābdaśataṃ varṣaṃ dvāparo hi pravartate || 34 ||
tadante bhuvi kṛṣṇāṃśo bhaviṣyati mahā balī ||
kaleruddharaṇārthāya mlecchavaṃśavivṛddhaye || 35 ||
sūtādyā munayaḥ sarve naimiṣāraṇyavāsinaḥ ||
viśālāyāṃ samāgatya cakratīrthanivāsinaḥ ||
bhaviṣyaṃti mahārāja purāṇaśravaṇe ratāḥ || 36 ||
ityuktvā sa tu vaitālastatraivāntaradhīyata ||
nṛpatirvikramādityaḥ paramānaṃdamāptavān ||37||
tasmādyūyaṃ muniśreṣṭhā jñātvā saṃdhyāṃ samāgatām ||
śivaṃ bhajata sarveśaṃ dhyānaniṣṭhāsamanvitāḥ || 38 || ||
iti śrībhaviṣye mahāpurāṇe pratisarga parvaṇi vaturyugakhaṇḍāparaparyāye kaliyugīyetihāsasamuccaye dvāviṃśo.adhyāyaḥ || 22 || || cha ||

|| vyāsa uvāca || ||
iti śrutvā tu munayo viśālānagarīsthitāḥ ||
snātvā kedārakuṇḍe te manasā pūjayañchivam || 1 ||
samādhiniṣṭhāste sarve varṣamekaṃ vyatītayan || 2 ||
etasminnaṃtare rājā vikramādityabhūpatiḥ ||
natvā munīnsamādhisthāṃstuṣṭāva parayā girā || 3 ||
uṣitvā te tu munayaḥ sūtaṃ gatvā.abruvannidam ||
so.ayaṃ rājā samāyāto yasyaivaṃ varṇitā kathā || 4 ||
vājimedhaṃ ca nṛpateḥ kārayāmastvadājñayā ||
bhavānhi cakratīrthe ca sthitvā dhyānaparo bhavet || 5 ||
tathetyuktvā tu sūtastaiḥ sārdhaṃ ca punarāgamat ||
vidhinā kārayāmāsa hayamedhaṃ mahāmakham ||6||
pūrve tu kapilasthānaṃ dakṣiṇe setubandhanam ||
paścime siṃdhunadyantaṃ cottare badarīvanam || 7 ||
hayo jagāma tarasā tataḥ kṣiprāṃ nadīṃ gataḥ ||
tyaktvā kalevaraṃ vahnau svargalokamato yayau || 8 ||
nṛpayajñe surāḥ sarve sapatnīkāḥ samāgatāḥ ||
caṃdramāstatra nāyāto bhūpatirvimanā abhūt ||9||
yajñāṃte vividhaṃ dānaṃ dattvā vaitālasaṃyutaḥ ||
caṃdralokaṃ gato rājā caṃdramāḥ sukhito.abhavat ||3.2.23.1 0||
bhobho rājanmahābhāga kalau prāpte bhayaṃkare ||
madgatirbhūtale nāsti tasmānnāyāmi te.antikam || 11 ||
dattvā sudhāmayaṃ toyaṃ caṃdraścāntardadhe punaḥ ||
jñātvendrastatra saṃprāpya dvijarūpī hyayācayat ||12||
dattaṃ rājñā tadamṛtaṃ śakraḥ svargamumupāgataḥ ||
tena tasya phalaṃ jātamāyurlakṣa samaṃ hyabhūt||13||
tasminkāle dvijaḥ kaścijjayanto nāma viśrutaḥ ||
tatphalaṃ tapasā prāptaḥ śakrataḥ svargṛhaṃ yayau ||14||
jayanto bhartṛharaye lakṣasvarṇena varṇayan ||
bhuktvā bhartṛharistatra yogārūḍho vanaṃ yayau ||15||
vikramāditya evāsya rājyamakaṃṭakam||
śatavarṣaṃ mudāyukto jagāma maraṇe divam || ||16||
śaunakādyāstu ṛṣayo jñātvā bhūpasya svargatim ||
gatvā sūtaṃ praṇamyocurdharmaṃ mukhyaṃ vadādhunā || 17 ||
tebhyaḥ sūtaḥ purāṇāni śrāvayāmāsa vai punaḥ ||
śatavarṣaṃ pañcalakṣaślokamadhyāpayanmudā ||
te śrutvā munayaḥ sarve jagmurhṛṣṭāḥ svamālayam || 18 ||
iti śrībhaviṣye mahāpurāṇe pratisargaṃ parvaṇi caturyugakhaṇḍāparaparyāye kaliyugīyetihāsasamuccaye trayoviṃśo.adhyāyaḥ || 23 || || cha ||
|| vyāsa uvāca || ||
ekadā naimiṣāraṇye ṛṣayaḥ śaunakādayaḥ ||
pṛcchanti vinayenaiva sūtaṃ paurāṇikaṃ khalu || 1 ||
bhagavanbrūhi lokānāṃ hitārthāya caturyuge ||
kaḥ pūjyaḥ sevitavyaśca vāṃcchitārthapradāyakaḥ ||2||
vināyāsena vai kāmaṃ prāpnuyurmānavāḥ śubham ||
satyaṃ brahmanvadopāyaṃ narāṇāṃ kīrtikārakam ||3||
|| sūta uvāca || ||
navāṃbhojanetraṃ ramākelipātraṃ catuà¥rbāhucāmīkarācārugātram ||
jagattrāṇahetuṃ ripau dhūmraketuṃ sadā satyanārāyaṇaṃ staumi devam || 4 ||
śrīrāmaṃ sahalakṣmaṇaṃ sakaruṇaṃ sītānvitaṃ
sāttvikaṃ vaidehīmukhapadmalubdhamadhupaṃ paulastyasaṃhārakam ||
vande vandyapadāṃbujaṃ suravaraṃ bhaktānukampākaraṃ
śatrughnena hanūmatā ca bharatenāsevitaṃ rāghavam || 5 ||
kalikaluṣavināśaṃ kāmasiddhiprakāśaṃ suravaramukhabhāsaṃ bhūsureṇa prakāśam || vibudhabudhavilāsaṃ sādhucaryāviśeṣaṃ nṛpa tivaracaritraṃ bhoḥ śṛṇuṣvetihāsam || 6 ||
ekadā nārado yogī parānugrahavāṃcchayā ||
paryaṭanvividhā~mllokānmartyalokamupāgamat || 7 ||

kenopāyena caiteṣāṃ duḥkhanāśo bhaveddhruvam||
iti sañciṃtya manasā viṣṇulokaṃ gatastadā || 9 ||
tatra nārāyaṇaṃ devaṃ śuklavarṇaṃ caturbhujam ||
śaṃkhacakragadāpadmavanamālāvibhūṣitam || 3.2.24.10 ||
prasannavadanaṃ śāṃtaṃ sanakādyairabhiṣṭutam ||
dṛṣṭvā taṃ devadeveśaṃ stotuṃ samupacakrame || 11 ||
|| nārada uvāca || ||
namo vāṅmanasātītarūpāyānaṃtaśaktaye ||
nādi madhyāntadevāya nirguṇāya mahātmane || 12 ||
sarveṣāmādibhūtāya lokānāmupakāriṇe ||
apāraparimāṇāya tapodhāmne namonamaḥ || 13 || ||
|| sūta uvāca || ||
iti śrutvā stutiṃ viṣṇurnāradaṃ pratyabhāṣata ||
kimarthamāgato.asi tvaṃ ki te manasi vartate ||14||
kathayasva mahābhāga tatsarvaṃ kathayāmi te ||
śrutvā tu nārado viṣṇumuktavānsarvakāraṇam || 15 ||
nāradasya vacaḥ śrutvā sādhusādhvityapūjayat ||
śṛṇu nārada vakṣyāmi vratamekaṃ sanātanam||16||
kṛte tretāyuge viṣṇurdvāpare.anekarūpadhṛk ||
kalau pratyakṣaphaladaḥ satyanārāyaṇo vibhuḥ || 17 ||
catuṣpādo hi dharmaśca tasya satyaṃ prasādhanam ||
satyena dhāryate lokaḥ satye brahma pratiṣṭhitam || 18 ||
satyanārāyaṇavratamataḥ śreṣṭhatamaṃ smṛtam ||
iti śrutvā harervākyaṃ nāradaḥ punarabravīt || 19 ||
kiṃ phalaṃ kiṃ vidhānaṃ ca satyanārāyaṇārcane ||
tatsarvaṃ kṛpayā deva kathayasva kṛpānidhe || 3.2.24.20 ||
|| bhagavānuvāca || ||
nārāyaṇārcane vaktuṃ phalaṃ nālaṃ caturmukhaḥ ||
śṛṇu saṃkṣepato hyetatkathayāmi tavāgrataḥ || 21 ||
nirdhanopi dhanāḍhyaḥ syādaputraḥ putravānbhavet ||
bhraṣṭarājyo labhedrājyamandho.api syātsulocanaḥ || 22 ||
mucyate baṃdhanādbaddho nirbhayaḥ syādbhayāturaḥ ||
manasā kāmayedyaṃyaṃ labhate taṃ vidhānataḥ ||23||
iha janmani bho vipra bhaktyā ca vidhinārcayet ||
labhetkāmaṃ hi tacchīghraṃ nātra kāryā vicāraṇā || 24 ||
prātaḥsnāyī śucirbhūtvā daṃtadhāvanapūrva kam ||
tulasīmañjarīṃ dhṛtvā dhyāyetsatyasthitaṃ harim || 25 ||
nārāyaṇaṃ sāṃdraghanāvadātaṃ caturbhujaṃ pītamahārhavāsasam ||
prasannavaktraṃ navakaṃjalocanaṃ sanandanādyairupasevitaṃ bhaje || 26 ||
karomi te vrataṃ deva sāyaṃkāle tvadarcanam ||
śrutvā gāthāṃ tvadīyāṃ hi prasādaṃ te bhajāmyaham || 27 ||
iti saṃkalpya manasā sāyaṃkāle prapūjayet ||
pañcabhiḥ kalaśairjuṣṭaṃ kadalītoraṇānvitam || 28 ||
śālagrāmaṃ svarṇayuktaṃ pūjayedātmasūktakaiḥ ||
pañcāmṛtena saṃsnāpya candanādibhirarcayet || 29 ||
oṃnamo bhagavate nityaṃ satyadevāya dhīmahi ||
catuḥpadārthadātre ca namastubhyaṃ namonamaḥ || 3.2.24.30 ||
japtavyaṣṭottaraśataṃ juhuyāttaddaśāṃśakam ||
tarpaṇaṃ mārjanaṃ kṛtvā kathāṃ śrutvā harerimām ||31||
ṣaḍadhyāyīṃ satyamukhyāṃ tatpaścāttatprasādakam ||
samyagvibhajya tatsarvaṃ dāpayecchrotṛkāya ca || 32 ||
ācāryāyādibhāgaṃ ca dvitīyaṃ svakulāya saḥ ||
śrotṛbhyaśca tṛtīyaṃ ca caturthaṃ cātmahetave || 33 ||
viprebhyo bhojanaṃ dadyātsvayaṃ bhuñjīta vāgyataḥ ||
devarṣe.anena vidhinā satyanārāyaṇārcanam ||34||
kārayedyadi bhaktyā ca śraddhayā ca samanvitaḥ ||
vratī kāmānavāpnoti vāṃchitāniha janmani || 35 ||
iha janmakṛtaṃ karma parajanmani padyate ||
parajanmakṛtaṃ karma bhoktavyaṃ sarvadā naraiḥ || 36 ||
satyanārāyaṇa vratamiha sarvānkāmāndadāti hi ||
adyaiva jagatīmadhye sthāpayāmi tvadājñayā || 37 ||
ityuktṃvā.atardadhe devo nāradaḥ svargatiṃ yayau ||
svayaṃ nārāyaṇo devaḥ kāśyāṃ puryāṃ samāgataḥ ||38||
iti śrībhaviṣye mahāpurāṇe pratisargaparvaṇi caturyugakhaṃḍāparaparyāye kaliyugīyetihāsasamuccaye caturviśo.a dhyāyaḥ || 24 || || cha ||
|| sūta uvāca || ||
kṛpayā brāhmaṇadvārā prakaṭīkṛtavānsvakam ||
itihāsamimaṃ vakṣye saṃvādaṃ hariviprayoḥ || 1 ||
kāśīpurīti vikhyātā tatrāsīdbrāhmaṇo varaḥ ||
dīno gṛhāśramī nityaṃ bhikṣuḥ putrakalatravān || 2 ||
śatānaṃda iti khyāto viṣṇuvrataparāyaṇaḥ ||
ekadā pathi bhikṣārthaṃ gacchatastasya śrīpatiḥ || 3 ||
vinītasyātiśāṃtasya sa babhūvākṣigocaraḥ ||
vṛddhabrāhmaṇaveṣeṇa papraccha brāhmaṇaṃ hariḥ ||
kva yāsīti dvijaśreṣṭha vṛttiḥ kāmena kathyatām || 4 ||
|| śatānanda uvāca || ||
bhikṣāvṛttirahaṃ saumya kalatrāpatyahetave ||
yācituṃ dhanināṃ dvāri vrajāmi dhanamuttamam || 5 ||
|| nārāyaṇa uvāca || ||
bhikṣāvṛttistvayā dīrghakālaṃ dvija sadā dhṛtā ||
tadvāraka upāyoyaṃ viśeṣeṇa kalau kila || 6 ||
mamopadeśato vipra satyanārāyaṇaṃ bhaja ||
dāridryaśokaśamanaṃ saṃtāpaharaṇaṃ hareḥ ||
caraṇaṃ śaraṇaṃ yāhi mokṣadaṃ padmalocanam || || 7 ||
evaṃ saṃbodhito vipro hariṇā karuṇātmanā ||
punaḥ papraccha viprosau satyanārāyaṇo hi kaḥ || 8 ||
|| vṛddhabrāhmaṇa uvāca || ||
bahu rūpaḥ satyasaṃdhaḥ sarvavyāpī nirañjanaḥ ||
idānīṃ viprarūpeṇa tava pratyakṣamāgataḥ || 9 ||
duḥkhodadhinimagnānāṃ taraṇiścaraṇau hareḥ ||
kuśalāḥ śaraṇaṃ yāṃti netare viṣayātmikāḥ || 3.2.25.10 ||
āhṛtya pūjāsaṃbhārānhitāya jagatāṃ dvija ||
arcayaṃstamanudhyāyaṃstvametatprakaṭī kuru || 11 ||
iti bruvaṃtaṃ viprosau dadarśa puruṣottamam ||
jaladaśyāmalaṃ cārucaturbāhuṃ gadādibhiḥ || 12 ||
pītāṃbaraṃ navāṃbhojalocanaṃ smitapūrvakam ||
vanamālāmadhuvrāta cuṃbitāṃgrisaroruham || 13 ||
niśamya pulakāṃgosau premapūrṇasulocanaḥ ||
stuvangadgadayā vācā daṃḍavatpatito bhuvi || 14 ||
praṇamāmi jagannātha jagatkāraṇakārakam ||
anāthanāthaṃ śivadaṃ śaraṇyamanaghaṃ śucim || 15 ||
avyaktaṃ vyaktatāṃ yātaṃ tāpatrayavimocanam || 16 ||
namaḥ satya nārāyaṇāyāsya kartre namaḥ śuddhasattvāya viśvasya bhartre ||
karālāya kālāya viśvasya hartre namaste jaganmaṅgalāyātmamūrte || 17 || dhanyosmyadya kṛtī dhanyo bhavodya saphalo mama ||
vāṅmanogocaro yastvaṃ mama pratyakṣamāgataḥ || 18 ||
diṣṭaṃ kiṃ varṇayāmyāho na jāne kasya vā phalam ||
kriyāhīnasya mandasya deho.ayaṃ phalavānkṛtaḥ || 19 ||
pūjanaṃ ca prakartavyaṃ lokanātha ramāpate ||
vidhinā kena kṛpayā tadājñāpaya māṃ vibho || || 3.2.25.20 ||
haristamāha madhuraṃ sasmitaṃ viśvamohanaḥ ||
pūjāyāṃ mama viprendra bahu nāpekṣitaṃ dhanam || 21 ||
anāyāsena labdhena śraddhāmātreṇa māṃ yaja ||
grāhagrastojāmilo vā yathā.abhūnmuktasaṃkaṭaḥ || 22 ||
vidhānaṃ śṛṇu viprendra manasā kāmayetphalam ||
pūjāsaṃbhṛtasaṃbhāraḥ pūjāṃ kuryādyathā vidhi ||23||
godhūmacūrṇaṃ pādārddhaṃ seṭakādipramāṇataḥ ||
dugdhena tāvatā yuktaṃ miśritaṃ śarkarādibhiḥ ||24||
taccūrṇaṃ haraye dadyād ghṛtayuktaṃ haripriyam||
godugdhenaiva dadhinā goghṛtena samanvitam || 25 ||
gaṃgājalena madhunā yuktaṃ pañcāmṛtaṃ priyam ||
pañcāmṛtena saṃsnāpya śālagrāmodbhavāṃ śilām || || 26 || gandhapuṣpādinaivedyairvedavādairmanoharaiḥ ||
dhūpairdīpaiśca naivedyaistāṃbūlādibhirarcayet || 27 ||
miṣṭānnapānasanmānairbhakṣyairbhojyaiḥ phalaistathā ||
ṛtukālodbhavaiḥ puṣpaiḥ pūjayedbhaktitatparaḥ || 28 ||
brāhmaṇaiḥ svajanaiścaiva veṣṭitaḥ śraddhayānvitaḥ ||
tvayā sārddhaṃ mama kathāṃ śṛṇuyātparamādarāt || || 29 ||
itihāsaṃ tathā rājño bhillānāṃ vaṇijo.asya ca ||
kathāṃte praṇamedbhaktyā prasādaṃ vibhajettataḥ || 3.2.25.30 ||
labdhaṃ prasādaṃ bhuṃjīta mānayanna vicārayet ||
dravyādibhirna me śāṃtirbhaktyā kevalayā yathā || 31 ||
vidhi?nānena viprendra pūjayaṃti ca ye narāḥ ||
putrapautradhanairyuktā bhuktvā bhogāna nuttamān || 32 ||
ante sānnidhyamāsādya modante te mayā saha ||
yaṃyaṃ kāmayate kāmaṃ suvratī taṃtamāpnuyāt || 33 ||
ityuktvāntardadhe viṣṇurvipropi sukhamāptavān ||
praṇamyāgādyathādiṣṭaṃ manasā kautukākulaḥ || 34 ||
adya bhaikṣyeṇa labhyena pūjyo nārāyaṇo mayā ||
iti niścitya manasā bhikṣārthī nagaraṃ gataḥ || 35 ||
vinā dehīti vacanaṃ labdhā ca vipulaṃ dhanam ||
kautukāyāsamanasā jagāma nijamālayam || 36||
vṛttāṃtaṃ sarvamācakhyau brāhmaṇī sānvamodata ||
sādaraṃ dravyasaṃbhāramāhṛtya bharturājñayā || 37 ||
āhūya bandhumitrāṇi tathā sānnidhyavartinaḥ ||
satyanārāyaṇaṃ devaṃ yajāmi svagaṇairvṛtaḥ || 38 ||
bhaktyā tutoṣa bhagavānsatyanārāyaṇaḥ svayam ||
kāmaṃ ditsuḥ prādurāsītkathāṃte bhaktavatsalaḥ || 39 ||
vavre vipro.abhilaṣitamihāmutra sukhapradam ||
bhaktiṃ parāṃ bhagavati tathā tatsaṃgināṃ vratam || 3.2.25.40 ||
rathaṃ kuñjaraṃ maṃjulaṃ mandiraṃ ca hayaṃ cāru cāmī karālaṃ kṛtaṃ ca ||
dhanaṃ dāsadāsīgaṇaṃ gāṃ mahīṃ ca lulāyāḥ sadugdhā hare dehi dāsyam ||41||
tathāstviti hariḥ prāha tataścāṃtardadhe prabhuḥ ||
vipro.apikṛta kṛtyo.abhūtsarve lokā visismire ||42||
praṇamya bhuvi kāyena prasādaṃ prāpurādarāt ||
svaṃsvaṃ dhāma samājagmurdhanyadhanyeti vādinaḥ || 43 ||
pracacāra tato loke satyanārāyaṇārcanam ||
kāmasiddhipradaṃ muktibhuktidaṃ kaluṣāpaham ||44||
iti śrībhaviṣye mahāpurāṇe pratisargaparvaṇi caturyugakhaṃḍāparaparyāye kaliyugīyetihāsasamuccaye pañcaviṃśo.adhyāyaḥ ||25||
|| sūta uvāca || ||
rājāsīddhārmikaḥ kaścitkedāramaṇipūrake ||
candracūḍa iti khyātaḥ prajāpālanatatparaḥ ||1||
śāṃto madhuravāgdhīro nārāyaṇaparāyaṇaḥ||
babhūvuḥ śatravastasya mlecchā viṃdhyanivāsinaḥ ||2||
tasya tairavabhavadyuddhamatiprabaladāruṇaiḥ||
bhuśuṃḍīyuddhanipuṇaiḥ kṣepaṇaiḥ parighāyudhaiḥ ||3||
candracūḍasya mahatī senā yamapure gatā||
śataṃ rathāstathā nāgāsahasraṃ tu hayāstathā||4||
pattayaḥ paṃcasāhasrā mṛtāḥ svargapuraṃ yayuḥ ||
dasyavaḥ paṃcasāhasrā mṛtāḥ kaitavayodhinaḥ || 5 ||
ākrāṃtaḥ sa mahābhāgastairmlecchairdaṃbhayodhibhiḥ ||
tyaktvā rāṣṭraṃ ca nagaraṃ saikākī vanamāyayau || 6 ||
tīrthavyājena sa nṛpaḥ purīṃ kāśīṃ samāgataḥ ||
tatra nārāyaṇaṃ devaṃ vaṃdyaṃ sarvagṛhegṛhe || 7 ||
dadarśa nagarīṃ caiva dhanadhānyasamanvitām ||
yathā dvārāvatī jñeyā tathā sā ca purī śubhā || 8 ||
vismitaścaṃdracūḍaśca dṛṣṭvāścaryamanuttamam ||
satyena rodhitāṃ lakṣmīṃ śīladharmasamanvitām|| 9 ||
dṛṣṭvā śrutvā sadānaṃdaṃ satyadevaprapūjakam ||
patitvā taccaraṇayoḥ praṇanāma mudā yutaḥ || 3.2.26.10 ||
dvijarāja namastubhyaṃ sadānaṃda mahāmate ||
bhraṣṭarājyaṃ ca māṃ jñātvā kṛpayā māṃ samuddhara || 11 ||
yathā prasanno bhagavā~mllakṣmīkānto janārdanaḥ ||
tathā tadvada yadyogyaṃ vrataṃ pāpapraṇāśanam || 12 ||
|| sadānaṃda uvāca || ||
duḥkhaśokādiśamanaṃ dhanadhānyapravardhanam ||
saubhāgyasaṃtatikaraṃ sarvatra vijayapradam || 13 ||
satyanārāyaṇavrataṃ śrīpatestuṣṭikārakam ||
yasminkasmindine bhūpa yajeccaiva niśāmukhe || 14 ||
toraṇādi prakartavyaṃ kadalīstaṃbhamaṃḍitam ||
paṃcabhiḥ kalaśairyuktaṃ dhvajapaṃcasamanvitam ||15||
tanmadhye vedikāṃ ramyāṃ kārayetsa vratī dvijaiḥ ||
tatra sthāpya śilārūpaṃ kṛṣṇaṃ svarṇa samanvitam ||16||
kuryādgaṃdhādibhiḥ pūjāṃ premabhaktisamanvitaḥ||
bhūmiśāyī hariṃ dhyāyansaptarātraṃ vyatītayet ||17||
iti śrutvā sa nṛpatiḥ kāśyāṃ devamapūjayat ||
rātrau prasanno bhagavāndadau rājñe.asimuttamam || 18 ||
śatrupakṣakṣayakaraṃ prāpya khaṅgaṃ nṛpottamaḥ ||
praṇamya ca sadānandaṃ kedāramaṇimā yayau || 19 ||
hatvā dasyūnṣaṣṭiśatāṃsteṣāṃ labdhvā mahaddhanam ||
hariṃ prapūjayāmāsa narmadāyāstaṭe śubhe ||3.2.26.20||
paurṇamāsyāṃ vidhānena māsimāsi nṛpottamaḥ||
apūjayatsatyadevaṃ premabhaktisamanvitaḥ||21||
tadvratasya prabhāvena lakṣagrāmādhipo.abhavat||
rājyaṃ kṛtvā sa ṣaṣṭyabdamante viṣṇupuraṃ yayau||22||
iti śrībhaviṣye mahāpurāṇe pratisargaparvaṇi caturyugakhaṃḍāparaparyāye kaliyugīyetihāsasamuccaye candracūḍoddhāronāma ṣaḍūviṃśo.adhyāyaḥ || 26 || cha || ||
|| sūta uvāca || ||
athetihāsaṃ śṛṇuta yathā bhillāḥ kṛtārthinaḥ ||
vicaraṃto vane nityaṃ niṣādāḥ kāṣṭhavāhinaḥ ||1||
vanātkāṣṭhāni vikretuṃ purīṃ kāśīṃ yayuḥ kvacit||
ekastṛṣākulo yāto viṣṇudāsāśramaṃ tadā ||2||
dadarśa vipulaiśvaryaṃ sevitaṃ ca dvijairharim ||
jalaṃ pītvā vismito.abhūdbhikṣukasya kuto dhanam||3||
yo dṛṣṭo.akiṃcano vipro dṛśyate.adya mahādhanaḥ||
iti saṃciṃtya hṛdaye sa papraccha dvijottamam||4||
aiśvaryaṃ te kuto brahmandurgatiste kuto gatā ||
ājñāpaya mahābhāga śrotumicchāmi tattvataḥ || 5 ||
|| sadānaṃda uvāca || ||
satyanārāyaṇasyāṃga sevayā kiṃ na labhyate ||
na kiṃcitsukhamāpnoti vinā tasyānukaṃpayā || 6 ||
||niṣāda uvāca || ||
aho kimiti māhātmyaṃ satyanārāyaṇārcane ||
vidhānaṃ sopacāraṃ ca hyupadeṣṭuṃ tvamarhasi || 7 ||
sādhūnāṃ samacittānāmupakāravatāṃ satām ||
na gopyaṃ vidyate kiṃcidārtānāmārtināśanam || 8 ||
iti pṛṣṭo vidhiṃ vaktumitihāsamathābravīt ||
candracūḍo mahīpālaḥ kedāramaṇipūrake || 9 ||
mamāśramaṃ samāyātaḥ satyanārāyaṇārcane ||
vidhānaṃ śrotukāmo.asau māmāha sādaraṃ vacaḥ || 3.2.27.10 ||
mayā yatkathitaṃtasmai tannibodha niṣādaja ||
saṃkalpya manasā kāmaṃ niṣkāmo vā janaḥ kvacit || 11 ||
godhūmacūrṇaṃ pādārdhaṃ seṭakādyaiḥ sucūrṇakam ||
saṃskṛtaṃ madhugaṃdhājyairnaivedyaṃ vibhave.arpayet || 12 ||
paṃcāmṛtena saṃsnāpya candanādyaiśca pūjayet ||
pāyasāpūpasaṃyāvadadhikṣīramathoharet || 13 ||
uccāvacaḥ phalaiḥ puṣpairdhūpadīpaimarnoramaiḥ ||
pūjayetparayā bhaktyā vibhave sati vistaraiḥ || 14 ||
na tuṣyeddravyasaṃbhārairbhaktyā kevalayā yathā ||
bhagavānparitaḥ pūrṇo na mānaṃ vṛṇuyātkvacit || 15 ||
duryodhanakṛtāṃ tyatkvā rājapūjāṃ janārdanaḥ ||
vidurasyāśrame vāsamātithyaṃ jagṛhe vibhuḥ || 16 ||
sudāmnastaṃḍulakaṇāñjagdhvā mānuṣyadurlabhāḥ ||
saṃpado.adāddhariḥ prītyā bhaktimātramapekṣyate || 17 ||
gopo gṛdhro vaṇigvyādho hanumānsavibhīṣaṇaḥ ||
ye.anye pāpātmakā daityā vṛtrakāyādhavādayaḥ || 18 ||
nārāyaṇāntikaṃ prāpya modaṃte.adyāpi yadvaśāḥ ||
iti śrutvā narapatiḥ pūjāsaṃbhāramādarāt || 19 ||
kṛtavānsa dhanaṃ labdhvā modate narmadātaṭe ||
niṣāda tvamapi prītyā satyanārāyaṇaṃ bhaja || 3.2.27.20 ||
iha loke sukhaṃ prāpya cānte sānnidhyamāpnuyāḥ ||
kṛtakṛtyo niṣādo.abhūtpraṇamya dvijapuṃgavam || 21 ||
sa gatvā svagaṇānāha māhātmyaṃ harisevane ||
te hṛṣṭamanasaḥ sarve samayaṃ cakrurādṛtāḥ || 22 ||
satyanārāyaṇe pūjāṃ kāṣṭhalabdhena yāvatā ||
vayaṃ kulaiḥ kariṣyāmaḥ puṇyavṛkṣavidhānataḥ || 23 ||
iti niścitya manasā kāṣṭhaṃ vikrīya lebhire ||
caturguṇaṃ dhanaṃ hṛṣṭāḥ svaṃsvaṃ bhavanamāyayuḥ ||24||
mudā strībhyassamācakhyurvṛttāṃtaṃ sarvamāditaḥ||
tāḥ śrutvā hṛṣṭamanasaḥ pūjanaṃ cakrurādarāt ||25||
kathānte praṇamanbhaktyā prasādaṃ jagṛhustataḥ ||
svajātibhyaḥ parebhyaśca dadustaccūrṇamuttamam || 26 ||
pūjāprabhāvato bhillāḥ putradārādibhiryutāḥ ||
labdhvā bhūmitale dravyaṃ jñānacakṣurmahottamam || 27 ||
bhuktvā bhogānyatheṣṭante daridrāndhā dvijottama ||
jagmuste vaiṣṇavaṃ dhāma yogināmapi durlabham || 28 ||
iti śrībhaviṣye mahāpurāṇe pratisargaparvaṇi caturyugakhaṇḍāparaparyāye kaliyugīyetihāsasamuccaye saptarviśo.adhyāyaḥ || 27 ||
|| sūta uvāca || ||
atha te varṇayiṣyāmi kathāṃ sādhūpacāritām ||
nṛpopadeśataḥ sādhuḥ kṛtārtho.abhūdvaṇigyathā|| || 1 ||
maṇipūrapatī rājā candracūḍo mahāyaśāḥ ||
saha prajābhirānarca satyanārāyaṇaṃ prabhum || 2 ||
atha ratnapurasthāyī sādhurlakṣapatirvaṇik ||
dhanairāpūrya taraṇīḥ saha gacchannadītaṭe || 3 ||
dadarśa bahulaṃ lokaṃ nānāgrāmavilāsinam ||
maṇimuktāviracitairvitānaissamalaṃkṛtam || 4 ||
vedavādāṃśca śuśrāva gītavāditrasaṃgatān ||
ramyaṃ sthānaṃ samālokya karṇadhāraṃ samādiśat || 5 ||
viśrāmayātra taraṇīriti paśyāmi kautukam ||
bhartrādiṣṭastathā cakre karṇadhāraḥ sabhṛtyakaiḥ || 6 ||
taṭasīmnaḥ samuttīrya mallalīlāvilāsinaḥ ||
karṇadhārā nagā vīrā yuyudhurmallalīlayā || 7 ||
svayamuttīrya sāmātyo lokānpapraccha sādaram ||
yajñasthānaṃ samālokya praśastaṃ samudo yayau ||8||
kimatra kriyate sabhyā bhavadbhirlokapūjitaiḥ ||
sabhyā ūcuśca te sarve satyanārāyaṇo vibhuḥ || 9 ||
pūjyate baṃdhubhiḥ sārdhaṃ rājñā lokānukaṃpinā ||
prāptaṃ niṣkaṭakaṃ rājyaṃ satyanārāyaṇārcanāt || 3.2.28.10 ||
dhanārthī labhate dravyaṃ putrārthī sutamuttamam ||
jñānārthī labhate cakṣurnirbhayaḥ syādbhayāturaḥ || 11 ||
sarvānkāmānavāpnoti naraḥ satyasurārca nāt ||
vidhānaṃ tu tataḥ śrutvā cailaṃ baddhvā gale.asakṛt || 12 ||
daṃḍavatpraṇipatyāha kāmaṃ sabhyānamodayat ||
anapatyo.asmi bhagavanvṛthaiśvaryo vṛthodyamaḥ || 13 ||
putraṃ vā yadi vā kanyāṃ labheyaṃ tvatprasādataḥ ||
patākāṃ kāṃcanīṃ kṛtvā pūjayiṣye kṛpānidhim || 14 ||
śrutvā sabhyā abruvaṃste kāmanāsiddhirastu te ||
hariṃ praṇamya sabhyāśca prasādaṃ bhuktavāṃstadā || 15 ||
jagāma svālayaṃ sādhurmanasā ciṃtayanharim||
svagṛhe hyāgate tasminnāryo maṃgalapāṇayaḥ || 16 ||
maṃgalāni vicitrāṇi yathocitamakārayan ||
viveśāṃtaḥpure sādhurmahākautukamaṃgalaḥ || 17 ||
ṛtusnātā satī līlāvatī paryacaratpatim ||
garbhaṃ dhṛtavatī sādhvī samaye suṣuve tu sā || 18 ||
kanyāṃ kamalalolākṣīṃ bāṃdhavāmodakāriṇīm ||
sādhuḥ parāṃ mudaṃ lebhe vitatāra dhanaṃ bahu || 19 ||
viprānāhūya vedajñānkārayāmāsa maṃgalam ||
lekhayitvā janmapatrīṃ nāma cakre kalāvatīm || 3.2.28.20 ||
kalānidhikale vāsau vavṛdhe sā kalāvatī ||
aṣṭavarṣā bhavedgaurī navavarṣā ca rohiṇī || 21 ||
daśavarṣā bhavetkanyā tataḥ prauḍhā rajasvalā ||
prauḍhāṃ kālena tāṃ dṛṣṭvā vivāhārthamacintayat || 22 ||
nagare kāṃcanapure vaṇikchaṃkhapatiḥ śrutaḥ ||
kulīno rūpasaṃpattiśīlaudāryaguṇānvitaḥ || 23 ||
varayāmāsa taṃ sādhurduhituḥ sadṛśaṃ varam ||
śubhe lagne bahuvidhairmaṃgalairagnisannidhau ||24||
vedavāditraninadairdadau kanyāṃ yathāvidhi ||
maṇimuktāpravālāni vasanaṃ bhūṣaṇāni ca || 25 ||
mahāmodamanāḥ sādhurmaṃgalārthaṃ dadau ca ha ||
premṇā nivāsayāmāsa gṛhe jāmātaraṃ tataḥ || 26 ||
taṃ mene putravatsādhuḥ sa ca taṃ pitṛvatsudhīḥ ||
atīte bhūyasaḥ kāle satyanārāyaṇārcanam || 27 ||
vismṛtya saha jāmātrā vāṇijyāya yayau punaḥ ||
|| sūta uvāca || ||
atha sādhuḥ samādāya ratnāni vividhāni ca || 28 ||
naukāḥ saṃsthāpya sa yayau deśāddeśāntaraṃ prati ||
nagaraṃ narmadātīre tatra vāsaṃ cakāra saḥ ||29||
kurvankrayaṃ vikrayaṃ ca ciraṃ tasthau mahāmanāḥ ||
karmaṇā manasā vācā na kṛtaṃ satyasevanam || 3.2.28.30 ||
tataḥ karmavipākena tāpamāpācirādvaṇik ||
kasmiṃściddivase rātrau rājño gehe tamovṛte:|| 31 ||
jñātvā nidrāgatānsarvānhṛtaṃ caurairmahādhanam ||
prabhāte vācito rājā sūtamāgadhabaṃdibhiḥ || || 32 ||
prātaḥkṛtyaṃ nṛpaḥ kṛtvā sadaḥ saṃprāviśacca saḥ ||
tatastatra samāyātaḥ kiṃkaro rājavallabhaḥ || 33 ||
uvāca sa tadā vākyaṃ śṛṇuṣva tvaṃ dharā pate ||
muktāmālāśca bahudhā ratnāni vividhāni ca || 34 ||
mumuṣuścaurā gatāssarve na jānīmo vayaṃ nṛpa ||
iti vijñāpito rājā puṇyaśloka śikhāmaṇiḥ || 35 ||
uvāca krodhatāmrākṣo yūyaṃ saṃyāta mā ciram ||
sacauraṃ dravyamādāya matpārśvaṃ tvamupānaya || 36 ||
no ceddhaniṣye sagaṇāniti dūtānsamādiśat ||
nṛpavākyaṃ samākarṇya prajagmuste ca kiṃkarāḥ || 37 ||
bahuyatnairna saṃśodhya dravyaṃ corasamanvitam ||
ekībhūtvā niśi tadā mahāciṃtāturo.abhavat || 38 ||
hantā māṃ sagaṇaṃ rājā kiṃ karomi kutaḥ sukham ||
nṛpadaṃḍācca me mṛtyuḥ pretatvāya bhavediha || 39 ||
narmadāyāṃ ca maraṇaṃ śivalokapradāyakam ||
ityevaṃ saṃmataṃ kṛtvā narmadāyāstaṭaṃ yayuḥ || 3.2.28.40 ||
videśino.asya vaṇijo dadarśa vipulaṃ dhanam ||
muktāhāraṃ gale tasya luṃṭhitaṃ vaṇijo.asya ca || 41 ||
cauro.ayamiti niścitya tau babaṃdhātmarakṣaṇāt ||
sadhanaṃ saha jāmātrā nṛpāntikamupānayat || 42 ||
pratikūle harau tasminrājñāpi na vicāritam ||
dhanāgāre dhanaṃ nītvā badhnīta tau sudurmatī || 43 ||
kārāgāre lohamayaiḥ śṛṃkhalairaṃgapādayoḥ ||
iti rājājñayā dūtāstathā cakrurnibaṃdhanam || 44 ||
jāmātrā sahitaḥ sādhurvilalāpa bhṛśaṃ muhuḥ ||
hā putra tāta tāteti jāmātaḥ kva dhanaṃ gatam || 45 ||
kva sthitā ca sutā bhāryā paśya dhāturviparyayam ||
nimagnau duḥkhajaladhau ko vāṃ pāsyati saṃkaṭāt || 46 ||
mayā bahutaraṃ dhāturvipriyaṃ hi purākṛtam ||
tatkarmaṇaḥ prabhāvo.ayaṃ na jāne kasya vā phalam || 47 ||
samaṃ śvaśurajāmātrau dvādaśeṣu viṣādinau || 48 ||
iti śrībhaviṣye mahāpurāṇe pratisargaparvaṇi caturyugakhaṃḍāparaparyāye kaliyugīyetihāsasamuccaye.aṣṭāviṃśo .adhyāyaḥ || 28 ||
|| sūta uvāca || ||
tāpatrayaharaṃ viṣṇoścaritaṃ tasya te śivam ||
śṛṇvaṃti sudhiyo nityaṃ te vasaṃti hareḥ padam || || 1 ||
pratikūle harau tasminyāsyanti nirayānbahūn ||
tatpriyā kamalā devī catvārastasya cātmajāḥ || 2 ||
dharmo yajño nṛpaścauraḥ sarve lakṣmīpriyaṃkarāḥ ||
viprebhyaścātithibhyaśca yaddānaṃ dharma ucyate||3 ||
mātṛbhyo devatābhyaśca svadhā svāheti vai makhaḥ ||
dharmasyaiva makhasyaiva rakṣako nṛpatiḥ smṛtaḥ || 4 ||
dvayorhantā hi coraḥ sa te sarve dharmakiṃkarāḥ ||
yatra satyaṃ tato dharmastatra lakṣmīḥ sthirā bhavet ||5||
satyahīnasya tatsādhordhanaṃ yattadgrahe sthitam ||
hṛtavānavanīpālaḥ caurairbhāryātiduḥkhitā || 6 ||
vāsolaṃkaraṇādīni vikrīya bubhuje kila ||
nāsti tatpacyate kiṃcittadā kaṣṭamagāhata || 7 ||
athaikasmindine kanyā bhojanācchādanaṃ vinā ||
gatā vipragṛhe.apaśyatsatyanārāyaṇārcanam || 8 ||
prārthayaṃtaṃ jagannāthaṃ dṛṣṭvā sā prārthayaddharim ||
satyanārāyaṇa hare pitā bhartā ca me gṛham ||9||
āgacchatvarcayiṣyāmi bhavaṃtamiti vācaye ||
tathāstu brāhmaṇairuktā tataḥ sā tvāśramaṃ yayau || 3.2.29.10 ||
mātrā nirbhartsiteyaṃtaṃ kālaṃ kutra sthitā śubhe ||
vṛttāṃtaṃ kathayāmāsa satyanārāyaṇārcane || 11 ||
kalau pratyakṣa phaladaḥ sarvadā kriyate naraiḥ ||
kartumicchāmyahaṃ mātaranujñātuṃ tvamarhasi || 12 ||
deśamāyātu janakaḥ svāmī ca mama kāmanā ||
rātrau niścitya manasā prabhāte sā kalāvatī || 13 ||
śīlapālasya guptasya gehe prāptā dhanārthinī ||
baṃdho kiṃciddhanaṃ dehi yena satyārcanaṃ bhavet || 14 ||
iti śrutvā śīlapālaḥ paṃcaniṣkaṃ dhanaṃ dadau ||
tvatpituśca ṛṇaṃ śeṣaṃ mayītyeva kalāvati || 15 ||
ityuktvā so.anṛṇo bhūtvā gayāśrāddhāya saṃyayau ||
sutāpi tena dravyeṇa kṛtaṃ satyārcanaṃ śubham || 16 ||
līlāvatī saha tayā bhaktyākārṣītprapūjanam||
pūjanena viśeṣeṇa tuṣṭo nārāyaṇo.abhavat||17||
narmadātīranagare nṛpaḥ suṣvāpa maṃdire ||
rātriśeṣe suparyaṃke nidrāṃ kurvati rājani ||
uvāca viprarūpeṇa bodhayañchlakṣṇayā girā || 18 ||
uttiṣṭhottiṣṭha rājendra tau sādhū parimocaya ||
aparādhaṃ vinā baddhau no cecchaṃ na bhavettava || 19 ||
ityevaṃ bhūpatiścaiva viprarūpeṇa bodhitaḥ ||
tadā hyantardadhe viṣṇu rvinidro nṛpatistadā || 3.2.29.20 ||
vismitaḥ sahasotthāya dadhyau brahma sanātanam ||
sabhāyāṃ maṃtriṇe rājā svapnahetuṃ nyavedayat || 21 ||
mahāmantrī ca bhūpālaṃ prāha satyena bho dvija ||
mayāpi darśitaṃ svapnaṃ vṛddhavipreṇa bodhitam ||
atastau hi samānīya saṃpṛccha vidhivannṛpa || 22 ||
ānīya sādhuṃ papraccha satyamālaṃbya bhūpatiḥ ||
kutratyau vāṃ kulaṃ kiṃ vā vasatiḥ kasya vā pure || 23 ||
|| sādhuruvāca || ||
ramye ratnapure vāso vaṇigjātau janirmama ||
vāṇijyārthaṃ mahārāja vāṇijyaṃ jīvikāvayoḥ || 24 ||
maṇimuktādi vikretuṃ kretuṃ vā tava pattane ||
prāptau dūtaiśca baddhvāvāṃ tvatsamīpamupāgatau || 25 ||
pratikūle vidhau ko vā daśāṃ nāpnoti vai pumān ||
vināparādhaṃ rājendra maṇicaurānavādayan || 26 ||
āvāṃ na cauro rājeṃdra tattvatastvaṃ vicāraya ||
śrutvā tanniścayaṃ jñātvā tayorbaṃdhanakāraṇam || 27 ||
chedayitvā dṛḍhaṃ pāśaṃ lomaśātimakārayat ||
kārayitvā pariṣkāraṃ bhojayāmāsa tau nṛpaḥ || 28 ||
nagare pūjayāmāsa vastrābhūṣaṇavāhanaiḥ ||
abravītpūjitaḥ sādhurbhūpatiṃ vinayānvitaḥ || 29 ||
kārāgāre bahuvidhaṃ prāptaṃ duḥkhamataḥ param ||
ājñāpaya mahārāja deśaṃ gaṃtuṃ kṛpānidhe || 3.2.29.30 ||
śrutvā sādhuvaco rājā prāha kośādhikāriṇam ||
mudrābhistaraṇīḥ sadyaḥ pūrayāśu madājñayā || 31 ||
jāmātrā sahitaḥ sādhurgītavāditramaṃgalaiḥ ||
svadeśaṃ calito.adyāpi na cakre harisevanam|| 32 ||
satyanārāyaṇo devaḥ pratyakṣaphaladaḥ kalau ||
sa eva tāpaso bhūtvā cakre sādhuviḍaṃbanam || 33 ||
|| tāpasa uvāca || ||
dharmaḥ kiṃ nauṣu te sādho māmanādṛtya yāsi bhoḥ ||
pratyuttaramadātsādhuḥ kṣipa naukāśca satvaram || 34 ||
bhoḥ svāminme dhanaṃ nāsti latāpatrādipūritam ||
naubhirgacchāmi svasthānaṃ virodhe nātra kiṃ phalam || 35 ||
ityuktastāpasaḥ prāha tathāstviti vacaḥ kṣaṇāt ||
dhanamaṃtardadhe sādhorlatāpatrāvaśeṣitam || 36 ||
dhanaṃ naukāsu nāstīti sādhuściṃtāturo.abhavat ||
kimidaṃ kasya vā hetordhanaṃ kutra gataṃ mama || 37 ||
vajrapātāhata iva bhṛśaṃ duḥkhitamānasaḥ ||
kva yāsyāmi kva tiṣṭhāmi kiṃ karomi dhanaṃ kutaḥ || 38 ||
iti mūrchāgataḥ sādhurvilalāpa punaḥpunaḥ ||
jāmātrā bodhitaḥ paścāttāpasaṃ taṃ jagāma ha || 39 ||
gale vasanamādāya praṇanāma sa tāpasam ||
ko bhavāniti papraccha devo gaṃdharva īśvaraḥ||3.2.29.40||
devadevo.athavā ko.api na jāne tava vikramam ||
ājñāpaya mahābhāga tadviḍambanakāraṇam || 41 ||
|| tāpasa uvāca || ||
ātmā caivātmanaḥ śatrustathātra ca priyo.apriyaḥ ||
tyaja mauḍhyamati sādho pravādaṃ mā vṛthā kṛthāḥ ||42||
iti vijñāpitaḥ sādhurna bubodha mahādhanaḥ ||
punaḥ sa tāpasaḥ prāha kṛpayā pūrvakarmataḥ||43||
caṃdracūḍo yadānarca satyanārāyaṇaṃ nṛpaḥ ||
anapatyena suciraṃ putrakanyārthinā tvayā || 44 ||
prārthitaṃ na smṛtaṃ hyeva idānīṃ tapyase vṛthā ||
satyanārāyaṇo devo viśvavyāpī phalapradaḥ ||45||
tamanādṛtya durbuddhe kutaḥ samyagbhavettava ||
purālabdhavaraṃ smṛtvā sasmāra jagadīśvaram || 46 ||
satyanārāyaṇaṃ devaṃ tāpasaṃ taṃ dadarśa ha ||
praṇamya bhuvi kāyena parikramya punaḥpunaḥ ||
tuṣṭāva tāpasaṃ tatra sādhurgadgadayā girā || 47 ||
|| sādhuruvāca || ||
satyarūpaṃ satyasaṃdhaṃ satyanārāyaṇaṃ harim ||
yatsatyatvena jagatastaṃ satyaṃ tvāṃ namāmyaham || 48 ||
tvanmāyāmohitātmāno na paśyaṃtyātmanaḥ śubham ||
duḥkhāṃbhodhau sadā magnā duḥkhe ca sukhamāninaḥ || 49 ||
mūḍhohaṃ dhanagarveṇa madāṃdhīkṛtalocanaḥ ||
na jāne svātmanaḥ kṣemaṃ kathaṃ paśyāmi mūḍhadhīḥ || 3.2.29.50 ||
kṣamasva mama daurātmyaṃ tapo dhāmne hare namaḥ||
ājñāpayātmadāsyaṃ me yena te caraṇau smare || 51 ||
iti stutvā lakṣamudrāḥ sthāpitāḥ svapurodhasi ||
gatvāvāsaṃ pūjayiṣye satyanārāyaṇaṃ prabhum ||52||
tuṣṭo nārāyaṇaḥ prāha vāṃchā pūrṇā bhavettu te ||
putrapautrasamāyukto bhuktvā bhogāṃstvanuttamān ||
aṃte sāṃnidhyamāsādya modase tvaṃ mayā saha ||53||
ityuktvāntardadhe viṣṇuḥ sādhuśca svāśramaṃ yayau ||
saptāhena gṛhaṃ prāptaḥ satyadevena rakṣitaḥ || 54 ||
āgatya nagarābhyāśe prāhi ṇoddrutamāśramam ||
gṛhamāgatya dūtopi prāha līlāvatīṃ prati || 55 ||
jāmātrā sahitaḥ sādhuḥ kṛtakṛtyaḥ samāgataḥ ||
satyanārāyaṇārcāyāṃ sthitā sādhvī sakanyakā || 56 ||
pūjābhāraṃ sutāyai sā dattvā naukāṃtikaṃ yayau ||
sakhīgaṇaiḥ parivṛtā kṛtakautukamaṃgalā || 57 ||
kalāvatī tvavajñāya prasādaṃ satvarā yayau ||
pātuṃ patimukhāṃbhojaṃ cakorīva dinātyaye || 58 ||
avajñānātprasādasya naukāśaṃkhapateratha ||
nimagnā jalamadhye tu jāmātrā saha tatkṣaṇāt || 59 ||
magnaṃ jāmātaraṃ paśyanvilalāpa sa mūrcchitaḥ ||
līlāvatī tu taddṛṣṭvā mūrcchitā vilalāpa ha || 3.2.29.60 ||
tataḥ kalāvatī dṛṣṭvā papāta bhuvi mūrcchitā ||
raṃbheva vātavihatā kāntakāntetivādinī || 61 ||
hā nātha priya dharmajña karuṇākarakauśala ||
tvayā virahitā patyā nirāśā vidhinā kṛtā ||
patyurarddhaṃ gataṃ kasmādarddhāṃgaṃ jīvanaṃ katham|| 62 ||
|| sūta uvāca || ||
kalāvatī cārukalāsu kauśalā pravālaraktāṃghritalātikomalā ||
sarojanetrāṃbukaṇānvimuṃcatī muktāvalībhistanakuḍmalāṃcitā || 63 ||
hā satyanārāyaṇa satyasiṃdho magnaṃ hi māmu ddhara tadviyoge ||
śrutvārtaśabdaṃ bhagavānuvāca vacastadākāśasamudbhavaṃ ca || 64 ||
sādho kalāvatī kṣipraṃ matprasādaṃ hi bhojayet ||
tatpaścādiha saṃprāpya patiṃ prāpsyati mā śucaḥ || 65 ||
ityākāśe vacaḥ śrutvā vismitā taccakāra sā ||
nārāyaṇasya kṛpayā patiṃ prāptā kalāvatī || 66 ||
tatraiva sādhuḥ sāhlādo bhaktyā paramayā yutaḥ ||
pūjanaṃ lakṣamudrābhiḥ satyadevasya cākarot || 67 ||
tena vrataprabhāvena putrapautrasamanvitaḥ ||
bhuktvā bhogānmudā yukto mṛtaḥ svargapuraṃ yayau || 68 ||
itihāsamimaṃ bhaktyā śṛṇuyādyo hi mānavaḥ ||
so.api viṣṇupriyataraḥ kāmasiddhimavāpnuyāt || || 69 ||
iti te kathitaṃ vipra vratānāmuttamaṃ vrata||
kalikāle paraṃ puṇyaṃ brāhmaṇasya mukhodbhavam || 3.2.29.70 ||
iti śrībhaviṣye mahāpurāṇe pratisargaṃ parvaṇi caturyugakhaṇḍāparaparyāye kaliyugīyetihāsasamuccaye satyanārāyaṇavratamāhātmyavarṇanaṃ nāmaikonatriṃśo.adhyāyaḥ||29||cha||

|| ṛṣaya ūcuḥ|| ||
bhagavanguhyajaṃ karma vṛttaṃ proktaṃ purātanaiḥ ||
vratānāṃ caiva sarveṣāṃ śreṣṭhaṃ nārāyaṇavratam || 1 ||
tvanmukhena śrutaṃ sūta tāpatrayavināśanam ||
idānīṃ śrotumicchāmi liṃgajaṃ karma cottamam || 2 ||
sarveṣāṃ brahmacaryāṇāṃ brahmacarye hi kiṃ param ||
tanme vada mahāprājña sarvaṃjño.asi matau mama || 3 ||
|| sūta uvāca || ||
āsītpurā kaliyuge pitṛśarmā dvijottamaḥ ||
vedavedāṃgatattvajño yamalokabhayānvitaḥ || 4 ||
jñātvā ghoratamaṃ kālaṃ kali kālamadharmajam||
vārdhanaṃ yamarāṣṭrasya tadā ciṃtāturo.abhavat || 5 ||
kenāśrameṇa varṇena mama śreyo bhavediha ||
kalau saṃnyāsamārgo hi daṃbhapākhaṃḍakhaṃḍitaḥ || 6 ||
vānaprasthaḥ kalau nāsti brahmacaryaṃ kvacitkvacit ||
gārhasthyaṃ karma sarveṣāṃ karmaṇāṃ śreṣṭhamucyate || 7 ||
ataḥ strī saṃgrāhyo mayā ghore kalau yuge ||
yadi me ca bhavennārī manovṛttyanusāriṇī ||
tarhi me saphalaṃ janma mama śreyo bhavediha || 8 ||
ityevaṃ saṃmataṃ kṛtvā śivāṃ maṃgaladāyinīm ||
caṃdanādyaiśca saṃpūjya tuṣṭāva manasā parām ||
viśveśvarīṃ jaganmūrtiṃ saccidānaṃdarūpiṇīm || 9 || ||
|| pitṛśarmovāca ||
namaḥ prakṛtyai sarvāyai kaivalyāyai namonamaḥ ||
triguṇaikyasvarūpāyai turīyāyai namonamaḥ || 3.2.30.10 ||
mahattattvajananyai ca dvaṃdvakartryai namonamaḥ ||
brahmamātarnamastubhyaṃ sāhaṃkārapitāmahi || 11 ||
pṛthagguṇāyai śuddhāyai namo mātarnamonamaḥ ||
vidyāyai śuddhasattvāyai lakṣmyai sattvarajomayi ||12||
namo mātaravidyāyai tataḥ śuddhyai namonamaḥ||
kālyai sattvatamobhūtyai namo mātarnarmonamaḥ ||13||
striyai śuddharajomūrtyai namastrailokyavāsini ||
namorajastamomūrtyai durgāyai ca namonamaḥ || 14 ||
iti śrutvā stavaṃ devyā prasādaḥ sthāpitastayā ||
sutāyāṃ viṣṇuyaśaso brāhmaṇasya tadā svayam || 15 ||
tāmudvāhya dvijo devīṃ nāmnā vai brahmacāriṇīm ||
nyavasanmathurāyāṃ sa kṛtvā dharmaṃ svayaṃ hṛdi || 16 ||
priyāyai sa rajovatyai ṛtudānaṃ karoti hi ||
catvāraścātmajāścāsaṃścaturvedaikyadhāriṇaḥ || 17 ||
ṛgyajuśca tathā sāma turyaścāsī datharvaṇaḥ ||
ṛcaśca tanayo vyāḍirnyāyaśāstraviśāradaḥ || 18 ||
yajuṣastu suto jāto mīmāṃso lokaviśrutaḥ ||
pāṇiniḥ sāmanasyaiva suto.abhū cchabdapālaḥ || 19 ||
putro vararuciḥ śreṣṭho.atharvaṇasya nṛpapriyaḥ ||
te gatā māgadheśasya candraguptasya vai sabhām 3.2.30.20 ||
nṛpastānpūjayāmāsa bahumānapuraḥsaram ||
abravīttāṃstato rājā brahmacaryaṃ hi kiṃ param || 21 ||
vyāḍirāha mahārāja yaḥ stutau tatparaḥ pumān ||
nyāyato.akhila devānāṃ brahmacārī hi me mataḥ || 22 ||
mīmāṃsaścāha bho rājanyajñe yo hi pumānparaḥ ||
karmaṇā yajate devānrocanādibhirarcayet || 23 ||
havanaṃ tarpaṇaṃ kṛtvā brahmādikasurānprati ||
tatprasādaṃ hi gṛhṇīyādbrahmacārī ca sa smṛtaḥ || 24 ||
śrutvedaṃ pāṇiniścāha candragupta śṛṇuṣva bhoḥ ||
tridhā svaraiḥ paraṃ brahma śuddhaśabdamayaiḥ paraiḥ || 25 ||
tathaiva sūtrapāṭhaiśca liṃgadhātugaṇāvṛtaiḥ ||
yo yajedbrahmacārī sa paraṃ brahmādhigacchati || 26 ||
śrutvā vararuciścāha śṛṇu māgadhabhūpate ||
gṛhītvā yajñasūtraṃ yaḥ prāpto gurukule vasan || 27 ||
daṃḍalomanakhādhārī bhikṣārthī vedatatparaḥ ||
ājñayā ca gurorvartedbrahmacārī hi sa smṛtaḥ || 28 ||
iti teṣāṃ vacaḥ śrutvā pitṛśarmābravīdidam ||
yo gṛhasthe vasanvipraḥ pitṛdevātithipriyaḥ || 29 ||
gāmī pāṇigṛhītāyāmṛtukāle yateṃdriyaḥ ||
brahmacārī hi mukhyassa śrutvā rājābravīdidam || 3.2.30.30 ||
svāminyadbhavatā coktaṃ dharmajñena yaśasvinā ||
kalau bhayaṃkare prāpte sa dharmo hi mato mama ||31||
ityuktvā tasya śiṣyo.abhūdguruvākyaparāyaṇaḥ ||
tathānte maraṇaṃ prāpya svargalokaṃ nṛpo yayau ||32||
pitṛśarmāpi manasā dhyātvā dāmodaraṃ harim ||
himālayaṃ giriṃ prāpya yogadhyānaparo.abhavat || 33 ||
iti śrībhaviṣye mahāpurāṇe pratisargaṃ parvaṇi caturyugakhaṇḍāparaparyāye kaliyugīyetihāsasamuccaye triṃśo.adhyāyaḥ || 30 || cha ||

|| ṛṣaya ūcuḥ || ||
bhagavansarvatīrthānāṃ dānānāṃ kiṃ paraṃ smṛtam ||
yatkṛtvā ca kalau ghore parāṃ nirvṛtimāpnuyāt || 1 ||
|| sūta uvāca || ||
sāmanasya sutaḥ śreṣṭhaḥ pāṇinirnāma viśrutaḥ ||
kaṇabhugvaraśiṣyaiśca śāstrajñaiḥ sa parājitaḥ || 2 ||
lajjitaḥ pāṇinistatra gatastīrthāntaraṃ prati ||
snātvā sarvāṇi tīrthāni saṃtarpya pitṛdevatāḥ ||3||
kedāramudakaṃ pītvā śivadhyānaparo.abhavat ||
parṇāśī saptadivasāñjalabhakṣastato.abhavat || 4 ||
tato daśadinānte sa vāyubhakṣo daśāhani ||
aṣṭāviṃśaddine rudro varaṃ brūhi vaco.abravīt || 5 ||
śrutvāmṛtamayaṃ vākyamastaudgadgadayā girā ||
sarveśaṃ sarvaliṃgeśaṃ girijāvallabhaṃ haram || 6||
|| pāṇiniruvāca || ||
namo rudrāya mahate sarveśāya hitaiṣiṇe ||
nandīsaṃsthāya devāya vidyābhayakarāya ca || 7 ||
pāpāntakāya bhargāya namonantāya vedhase ||
namo māyāhareśāya namaste lokaśaṃkara || 8 ||
yadi prasanno deveśa vidyāmūlaprado bhava ||
paraṃ tīrthaṃ hi me dehi dvaimāturapitarnamaḥ || 9 ||
|| sūta uvāca || |||
iti śrutvā mahādevaḥ sūtrāṇi pradadau mudā ||
sarvavarṇamayānyeva a_iuṇādiśubhāni vai || 3.2.31.10 ||
jñānahrade satyajale rāga dveṣamalāpahe ||
yaḥ prāpto mānase tīrthe sarvatīrthaphalaṃ bhajet ||11||
mānasaṃ hi mahattīrtha brahmadarśanakārakam ||
pāṇine te dadau vipra kṛtakṛtyo bhavānbhava || 12 ||
ityuktvāṃtardadhe rudraḥ pāṇiniḥ svagṛhaṃ yayau ||
sūtrapāṭhaṃ dhātupāṭhaṃ gaṇapāṭhaṃ tathaiva ca || 13 ||
liṃgasūtraṃ tathā kṛtvā paraṃ nirvāṇamāpta vān ||
tasmāttvaṃ bhārgavaśreṣṭha mānasaṃ tīrthamācara || 14 ||
yato yātā svayaṃ gaṃgā sarvatīrthamayī śivā ||
gaṃgātīrthātparaṃ tīrthaṃ na bhūtaṃ na bhavi ṣyati || 15 || ||
iti śrībhaviṣye mahāpurāṇe pratisargaparvaṇi caturyugakhaṇḍāparaparyāye kaliyugīyetihāsasamuccaya ekatriṃśo.adhyāyaḥ || 31 || ||

|| sūta uvāca || ||
totādaryāṃ dvijaḥ kaścidbopadeva iti śrutaḥ ||
babhūva kṛṣṇabhaktaśca vedavedāṃgapāragaḥ || 1 ||
gatvā vṛndāvanaṃ ramyaṃ gopagopīniṣevitam ||
manasā pūjayāmāsa devadevaṃ janārddanam || 2 ||
varṣānte ca hariḥ sākṣāddadau jñānamanuttamam ||
tena jñānena saṃprāptā hṛdi bhāgavatī kathā || 3 ||
śukena varṇitā yā vai viṣṇurātāya dhīmate ||
tāṃ kathāṃ varṇayāmāsa mokṣamūrtiṃ sanātanīm || 4 ||
kathānte bhagavānviṣṇuḥ prādurāsījjanārdanaḥ ||
uvāca snigdhayā vācā varaṃ brūhi mahāmate || 5 ||
|| bopadeva uvāca || ||
namaste bhagavanviṣṇo lokānugrahakāraka ||
tvayā tatamidaṃ viśvaṃ devatiryaṅnarādikam || 6 ||
tvannāmnā narakārtāśca te kṛtārthāḥ kalau yuge ||
tvayā dattaṃ bhāgavataṃ śrīma dvyāsena nirmitam ||
māhātmyaṃ tasya me brūhi yadi datto varastvayā || 7 ||
|| śrībhagavānuvāca || ||
ekadā bhagavānrudro bhavānyā saha śaṃkaraḥ || 8 ||
bauddharājye jagatprāpte daṃbhapākhaṇḍanirmite ||
dṛṣṭvā kāśyāṃ bhūmituṃgaṃ praṇanāma mudā yutaḥ ||
jaya saccidānanda vibho jagadānaṃ dakāraka || 9 ||
iti śrutvā śivā prāha ko devo.asti tavottamaḥ ||
sa hovāca mahādevi yajñaḥ saptāhamatra vai || 3.2.32.10 ||
tasmādbhūmipavitratvamiha prāptaṃ varānane ||
sarvatīrthādhikatvaṃ ca svayaṃ brahma sanātanam || 11 ||
iti śrutvā śivā devī prāptāsīdguhyakālayam ||
rudreṇa sahitā tatra bhūmiśuddhimakārayat || 12 ||
caṇḍīśaśca gaṇeśaśca naṃdino guha eva ca ||
rakṣārthe sthāpitāstatra devadevena bho dvija || 13 ||
śṛṇu devi kathāṃ ramyāṃ mama mānasasaṃsthitām ||
ityuktvā dhyānamāsthāya saptāhena svavarṇayat || 14 ||
aṣṭāhe netra unmīlya dṛṣṭvā nidrāgatāṃ śivām ||
bodhayāmāsa bhagavānkathāṃte lokaśaṃkaraḥ || 15 ||
kiyatī te śrutā gāthā śrutvāha jagadaṃbikā ||
sudhāmaṃthanaparyaṃtaṃ caritraṃ śivayeritam || 16 ||
koṭarasthaḥ śukaḥ śrutvā ciraṃjīvatvamāgataḥ ||
pārvatyā rakṣitosau vai śukaḥ paramasundaraḥ || 17 ||
sthitvā śivasya sadane mama dhyānaparo.abhavat ||
mamājñayā śukaḥ sākṣāttvadīyahṛdayasthitaḥ || 18 ||
tena prāptaṃ bhāgavataṃ māhātmyaṃ cāsya durlabham ||
tvaṃ vai gaṃdharvasenāya pitre vikramabhūpateḥ || 19 ||
narmadākūlamāsādya śrāvayasva kathāṃ śubhām ||
harimāhātmyadānaṃ hi sarvadānaparaṃ smṛtam || 3.2.32.20 ||
satpātrāya pradātavyaṃ viṣṇubhaktāya dhīmate ||
bubhukṣitānnadānaṃ ca taddānasya samaṃ na hi || 21 ||
ityuktvāṃtardadhe devo bopadevaḥ prasannadhīḥ || 22 ||
iti śrībhaviṣye mahāpurāṇe pratisargaparvaṇi caturyugakhaṇḍāparaparyāye kaliyugīyetihāsasamuccaye dvātriṃśattamo.adhyāyaḥ || 32 || || cha ||
|| ṛṣaya ūcuḥ || ||
vāgjaṃ karma smṛtaṃ sūta veda pāṭhaḥ sanātanaḥ ||
bahutvātsarvavedānāṃ śrotumicchāmahe vayam || 1 ||
kena stotreṇa vedānāṃ pāṭhasya phalamāpnuyāt ||
pāpāni vilayaṃ yāṃti tanme vada vicakṣaṇa || 2 ||
|| sūta uvāca || ||
vikramādityarājye tu dvijaḥ kaścidabhūdbhuvi ||
vyādhakarmeti vikhyāto brāhmaṇyāṃ śūdrato.abhavat || || 3 ||
tripāṭhino dvijasyaiva bhāryā nāmnā hi kāminī ||
maithunecchāvatī nityaṃ madāghūrṇitalocanā || 4 ||
dvijassaptaśatīpāṭhe vṛttyarthī karhicidgataḥ ||
grāme devalake ramye vahuvaiśyaniṣevite || 5 ||
tatra māso gataḥ kālo nāyayau sa svamaṃdiram ||
tadā tu kāminī duṣṭā rūpayauvanasaṃyutā || 6 ||
dṛṣṭvā niṣādaṃ sabalaṃ kāṣṭhabhāropajīvinam ||
tasmai dattvā pañca mudrā bubhuje kāmapīḍitā || 7 ||
tadā garbhaṃ dadhau sā ca vyādhivīryeṇa saṃci tam ||
putro.abhūddaśamāsāṃte jātakarma pitākarot || 8 ||
dvādaśābde gate kāle sa dhūrto vedavarjitaḥ ||
vyādhakarmakaro nityaṃ vyādhakarmā hyatobhavat|| || 9 ||
niṣkāsitau dvijenaiva mātṛputrau dvijādhamau ||
tripāṭhī brahmacaryaṃ tu kṛtavāndharmatatparaḥ || 3.2.33.10 ||
pratyahaṃ caṃḍikāpāṭhaṃ kṛtvā viṃdhyagirau vasan ||
jīvanmuktobhavacchīghraṃ jagadaṃbāprasādataḥ || 11 ||
niṣādasya gṛhe cobhau vane gatvoṣaturmudā ||
pratyahaṃ jārabhāvena bahudravyamupārjitam || || 12 ||
vyādhakarmā tu cauryeṇa pitṛmātṛpriyaṃkaraḥ ||
ekadā daivayogena śivāmaṃdiramāyayau || 13 ||
cauravṛttiparo dhūrtaḥ striyā bhūṣaṇamāharat ||
kaiścijjātaḥ sa nī? dhūrto bahumāyāviśāradaḥ || 14 ||
kadācitprāptavāṃstatra dvijavastrasamudgatam ||
śrutamādicaritraṃ hi tena śabdapriyeṇa vai || 15 ||
pāṭhapuṇyaprabhāveṇa dharmabuddhistato.abhavat ||
dattvā cauryadhanaṃ sarvaṃ tasmai viprāya pāṭhine || 16 ||
śiṣyatvamagamattatrākṣaramaiśaṃ jajāpa ha ||
bījamaṃtraprabhāveṇa tadaṃgātpāpamulbaṇam || 17 ||
niḥsṛtaṃ kṛmirūpeṇa bahuvarṇena tāpitam ||
trivarṣānte ca niṣpāpo babhūva dvijasattamaḥ || 16 ||
paṭhitvākṣaramālāṃ ca jajāpādicaritrakam ||
dvādaśābdamite kāle kāśyāṃ gatvā sa tu dvijaḥ || 19 ||
annapūrṇāṃ mahādevīṃ tuṣṭāva parayā mudā ||
rocanādyaiśca saṃpūjyāṃ munidevaniṣevitām || 3.2.33.20 ||
nityānaṃdakarī parābhayakarī sauṃdaryaratnākarī nirdhūtākhilapāpapāvanakarī kāśīpurādhīśvarī ||
nānālokakarī mahābhayaharī viśvaṃbharī sundarī vidyāṃ dehi kṛpāvalaṃbanakarī mātānnapūrṇeśvarī || 21 ||
sa ityaṣṭottaraṃ japtvā dhyānastimitalocanaḥ ||
suṣvāpa tatra muditaḥ svapne prādurabhūcchivā || 22 ||
dattvā tasmai hi ṛgvidyāṃ punaraṃtaradhīyata ||
utthāya sa dvijo dhīmā~mllabdhvā vidyāmanuttamām || 23 ||
vikramādityabhūpasya yajñācāryo babhūva ha ||
yajñāṃte yogamāsthāya jagāma tu himālayam || 24 ||
etatte varṇitaṃ vipra puṇyamādicaritrakam ||
brahmībhūya yathā vipro lebhe siddhimanuttamām || 25 ||
iti śrībhaviṣye mahāpurāṇe pratisargaparvaṇi caturyugakhaṃḍāparaparyāye kaliyugīyetihāsasamuccaye prathamaca ritravarṇanaṃnāma trayastriṃśodhyāyaḥ || 33 || || cha ||
|| sūta uvāca || ||
ujjayinyāṃ purā vipra rājanyaḥ sarvahiṃsakaḥ ||
babhūva madyamāṃsāśī bhīmavarmeti viśrutaḥ || 1 ||
māṃsalobhena sa khalaḥ sūkarāngrāmakukkuṭān ||
hatvā cābhakṣayatpāpī veśyāsaṃgaparāyaṇaḥ || || 2 ||
naramāṃsaṃ sa kravyādastyaktvānyānbhakṣako.abhavat ||
evaṃ bahugate kāle bhīmavarmā mahādhamaḥ ||
visūcyagnivaśaṃ yāto mamāra ca yuvāpi saḥ || 3 ||
kāritaścaṃḍikāpāṭhastena duṣṭena bhīruṇā ||
tasya puṇyaprabhāvena nāgato narakānprati || 4 ||
punaḥ kṣatratvamagamanmāgadhe sa mahīpatiḥ ||
mahānandīti vikhyāto rājanītiparāyaṇaḥ || 5 ||
jātismaro babhūvāsau vedadharmaparāyaṇaḥ ||
kātyāyanasya śiṣyo.abhūnmahāśāktasya dhīmataḥ || 6 ||
tasmai nṛpāya sa munirdattvā madhyacaritrakam ||
sabījaṃ punarāgatya vindhye śakti paro.abhavat || 7 ||
nṛpo.api pratyahaṃ devīṃ mahālakṣmīṃ sanātanīm ||
rocanādyaiśca saṃpūjya japanmadhyacaritrakam || 8 ||
puṇyakṣetratvamagamanmahāmāyāprasādataḥ ||
śūdrabhāvaṃ parityajya kṣatrabhāvamupāgataḥ || 9 ||
dvādaśābdāṃtare prāptastadguruḥ śaktitatparaḥ ||
lakṣacaṇḍīṃ nṛpādeva kārayāmāsa dharmataḥ || 3.2.34.10 ||
tadā prādurabhūddevī jagadaṃbā sanātanī ||
nṛpāya dharmamarthaṃ ca kāmaṃ mokṣaṃ hi cādadāt || 11 ||
mahānandī mahābhāgo bhuktvā bhogaṃ surepsitam ||
ante jagāma paramaṃ lokaṃ devanamaskṛtam || 12 ||
iti te kathitā vipra yatproktaṃ yajuṣo gatiḥ ||
sā vai madhyacaritreṇa prāptā śūdranṛpeṇa vai || 13 ||
ityevaṃ varṇitaṃ vipra māhātmyaṃ munivarṇitam || 14 ||
iti śrībhaviṣye mahāpurāṇe pratisargaparvaṇi catu ryugakhaṇḍāparaparyāye kaliyugīyetihāsasamuccaye catustriṃśo.adhyāyaḥ || 34 || || cha ||
|| sūta uvāca || ||
citrakūṭe girau ramye nānādhātuvicitrite ||
tatrāvasanmahāprājña upādhyāyaḥ patañjaliḥ| 1 ||
vedavedāṃgatattvajño gītāśāstraparāyaṇaḥ ||
viṣṇubhaktaḥ satyasandho bhāṣyaśāstra viśāradaḥ || 2 ||
kadācitsa tu śuddhātmā gatastīrthāṃtaraṃ prati ||
kāśyāṃ kātyāyanenaiva tasya vādo mahānabhūt || 3 ||
varṣānte ca tadā vipro devībhaktena nirjitaḥ ||
lajjitaḥ sa tu dharmātmā saṃtuṣṭāva sarasvatīm || 4 ||
|| patañjaliruvāca || ||
namo devyai mahāmūrtyai sarvamūrtyai namo nama ||
śivāyai sarvamāṃgalyai viṣṇumāye ca te namaḥ || 5 ||
tvameva śraddhā buddhistvaṃ medhā vidyā śivaṃkarī ||
śāṃtirvāṇī tvamevāsi nārāyaṇi namonamaḥ || 6 ||
ityukte sati vipre tu vāguvācāśarīriṇī ||
viprottama caritraṃ me japa caikāgramānasaḥ || 7 ||
taccaritraprabhāveṇa satyaṃ jñānamavāpsyasi ||
kātyāyanasya viprasya rājasaṃjñānamuddhatam ||
madbhaktyā tena saṃprāptaṃ parājaya patañjale ||8 ||
iti śrutvā vaco devyā vindhyavāsini mandiram ||
gatvā tāṃ pūjayāmāsa tuṣṭāva stotrapāṭhataḥ || 9 ||
jñānaṃ prasādajaṃ vipraḥ prāpya viṣṇuparāyaṇam ||
kātyāyanaṃ parājitya parāṃ mudamavāpa ha || 3.2.35.10 ||
ūrddhvapuṃḍūṃ ca tilakaṃ tulasīkaṇṭhamālikām ||
kṛṣṇamantraṃ ca śivadaṃ sthāpayitvā gṛhegṛhe || 11 ||
janejane tathā kṛtvā mahābhāṣya mudairayat ||
ciraṃjīvitvamagamadviṣṇumāyāprasādataḥ || 12 ||
iti te kathito vipra jāpyānāmuttamo japaḥ ||
kimanyacchrotumicchaṃti śaunakādyā maharṣayaḥ || 13 ||
sarve bhadrāṇi paśyaṃtu mā kaścidduḥkhabhāgbhavet || 14 ||
maṃgalaṃ bhagavānviṣṇurmaṃgalaṃ garuḍadhvajaḥ ||
maṃgalaṃ puṃḍarīkākṣo maṃgalā yatano hariḥ || 15 ||
śuciryo hi naro nityamitihāsasamuccayam ||
śṛṇuyāddharmakāmārthī sa yāti paramāṃ gatim || 16 ||
iti śrībhaviṣye mahāpurāṇe pratisargaparvaṇi caturyugakhaṇḍāparaparyāye kaliyugīyetihāsasamuccaye uttamacaritamāhātmye paṃcatriṃśo.adhyāyaḥ ||35||
samāpto.ayaṃ dvitīyaḥ khaṃḍaḥ||

viṣayānukramaṇikā

|| || śrīgaṇeśāya namaḥ ||
|| ṛṣayaḥ ūcuḥ || ||
bhagavanvikramākhyānakālo.ayaṃ bhavatoditaḥ ||
śatadvādaśamaryādo dvāparasya samo bhuvi || || 1 ||
asminkāle mahābhāga līlā bhagavatā kṛtā ||
tāmetāṃ kathayāsmānvai sarvajño.asti bhavānsadā || 2 ||
|| sūta uvāca || ||
nārāyaṇaṃ namaskṛtya naraṃ caiva narottamam ||
devīṃ sarasvatīṃ vyāsaṃ tato jayamudīrayet || 3 ||
bhaviṣyākhye mahākalpe prāpte vaivasvatentare ||
aṣṭāviṃśaddvāparānte kurukṣetre raṇo.abhavat || 4 ||
pāṃḍavairnirjitāḥ sarve kauravāḥ yuddhadurmadāḥ ||
aṣṭādaśe ca divase pāṃḍavānāṃ jayo.abhavat || 5 ||
dinānte bhaga vānkṛṣṇo jñātvā kālasya durgatim ||
śivaṃ tuṣṭāva manasā yogarūpaṃ sanātanam || 6 ||
|| kṛṣṇa uvāca || ||
namaḥ śāṃtāya rudrāya bhūte śāya kapardine||
kālakartre jagadbhartre pāpahartre namonamaḥ || 7 ||
pāṃḍavānrakṣa bhagavanmadbhaktānbhūtabhīrukān ||
iti śrutvā stavaṃ rudro naṃdiyānoparisthitaḥ ||
rakṣārthaṃ śibirāṇāṃ ca prāptavāñchūlahastadhṛk || 8 ||
tadā nṛpājñayā kṛṣṇaḥ sa gato gajasāhvayam ||
pāṃḍavāḥ paṃca nirgatya sarasvatyā staṭe.avasan || 9 ||
niśīthe drauṇibhojau ca kṛpastatra samāyayuḥ ||
tuṣṭuvurmanasā rudraṃ tebhyo mārgaṃ śivodadāt || 3.3.1.10 ||
aśvatthāmā tu balavāñchivadattamasiṃ tadā ||
gṛhītvā sa jaghānāśu dhṛṣṭadyumnapuraḥsarān || 11 ||
hatvā yatheṣṭamagamaddrauṇistābhyāṃ samanvitaḥ || 12 ||
pārṣatasyaiva sūtaśca hataśeṣo bhayāturaḥ ||
pāṃḍavānvarṇayāmāsa yathā jāto janakṣayaḥ || 13 ||
āgaskṛtaṃ śivaṃ jñātvā bhīmādyāḥ krodhamūrcchitāḥ ||
svāyudhaistā ḍayāmāsa devadevaṃ pinākinam || 14 ||
astraśastrāṇi teṣāṃ tu śivadehe samāviśan ||
dṛṣṭvā te vismitāḥ sarve prajaghnustalamuṣṭibhiḥ || 15||
tāñchaśāpa tadā rudro yūyaṃ kṛṣṇaprapūjakāḥ ||
ato.asmābhī rakṣiṇīyā vadhayogyāśca vai bhuvi || 16 ||
punarjanma kalau prāpya bhokṣyate cāparādhakam ||
ityuktvāntardadhe devaḥ pāṃḍavā duḥkhitāstadā || 17 ||
hariṃ śaraṇamājagmuraparādhanivṛttaye ||
tadā kṛṣṇayutāḥ sarve pāṃḍavāḥ śastravarjitāḥ || 18 ||
tuṣṭuvurmanasā rudraṃ tadā prādurabhūcchivaḥ ||
varaṃ varayata prāha kṛṣṇaḥ śrutvābravīdidam || 19 ||
śastrāṇyastrāṇi yānyeva tvadaṃge kṣapitāni vai||
pāṃḍavebhyaśca dehi tvaṃ śāpasyānugrahaṃ kuru || 3.3.1.20 ||
iti śrutvā śivaḥ prāha kṛṣṇadeva namo.astu te ||
aparādho na me svāminmohito.ahaṃ tavājñayā || 21 ||
tadvaśena mayā svāmindattaḥ śāpo bhayaṃkaraḥ ||
nānyathā vacanaṃ me syādaṃśāvataraṇaṃ bhavet || 22 ||
vatsarājasya putratvaṃ gamiṣyati yudhiṣṭhiraḥ ||
balakhāniriti khyātaḥ śirīṣākhyapurādhipaḥ || 23 ||
bhīmo durvacanādduṣṭo mlecchayonau bhaviṣyati ||
vīraṇo nāma vikhyātaḥ sa vai vanarasādhipaḥ || 24 ||
arjunāṃśaśca madbhakto janiṣyati mahāmatiḥ ||
putraḥ parimalasyaiva brahmānanda iti smṛtaḥ||25||
kānyakubje hi nakulo bhaviṣyati mahābalaḥ||
ratnabhānusuto sau vai lakṣmaṇo nāma viśrutaḥ||26||
sahadevastu valavāñjaniṣyati mahāmatiḥ||
bhīṣmasiṃha suto jāto devasiṃha iti smṛtaḥ ||27||
dhṛtarāṣṭrāṃśa evāsau janiṣyatyajamerake ||
pṛthivīrāja iti sa dropadī tatsutā smṛtā ||28||
velā nāmnā ca vikhyātā tārakaḥ karṇa eva hi ||
raktabījastathā rudro bhaviṣyati mahītale ||29||
kauravāśca bhaviṣyanti māyāyuddhaviśāradāḥ||
pāṃḍupakṣāśca te sarve dharmiṇo balaśālinaḥ ||3.3.1.30||
|| sūta uvāca || ||
iti śrutvā hariḥ prāha vihasya parameśvaram ||
mayā śaktyavatāreṇa rakṣaṇīyā hi pāṃḍavāḥ ||31||
mahāvatī purī ramyā māyādevīvinirmitā ||
deśarājasutastatra mamāṃśo hi janiṣyate || 32 ||
devakījaṭhare janmodayasiṃha iti smṛtaḥ ||
āhlādo mama dhāmāṃśo janiṣyati gururmama || 33 ||
hatvāgnivaṃśajānbhūpānsthāpayiṣyāmi vai kalim ||
iti śrutvā śivo devastatraivāṃtaradhīyata || 34 ||
iti śrībhaviṣye mahāpurāṇe pratisargaparvaṇi caturyugakhaṇḍāparaparyāye kaliyugīyetihāsasamuccaye vikramākhyānakāle prathamo.adhyāyaḥ || 1 || cha || ||

|| sūta uvāca || ||
prātaḥ kāle ca saṃprāpte pāṃḍavāḥ putraśokinaḥ ||
pretakāryāṇi te kṛtvā bhīṣmāntikamupāyayuḥ || 1 ||
rājadharmānmokṣadharmāndānadharmānvibhāgaśaḥ ||
śrutvāyajannaśvamedhaistribhiruttamakarmabhiḥ ||2||
ṣaṭtriṃśadabdarājyaṃ hi kṛtvā svargapuraṃ yayuḥ ||
janiṣyante tadaṃśā vai kalidharma vivṛddhaye || 3 ||
|| vyāsa uvāca || ||
ityuktvā sa muniḥ sarvānpunaḥ sūto vadiṣyati ||
gacchadhvaṃ munayaḥ sarve yoganidrāvaśo hyaham ||
cakratīrthe samādhistho dhyāye.ahaṃ triguṇātparam || 4 ||
iti śrutvā tu munayo naimiṣāraṇyavāsinaḥ ||
yogasiddhiṃ samāsthāya gamiṣyaṃtyātmanontike || 5 ||
dvādaśābdaśate kāle.atīte te śaunakādayaḥ || 6 ||
utthāya devakhāte ca snānadhyānādikāḥ kriyāḥ ||
kṛtvā sūtāntikaṃ gatvā vadiṣyaṃti punarvacaḥ || 7 ||
|| ṛṣaya ūcuḥ || ||
vikramākhyānakālo.ayaṃ dvāpare ca śivājñayā ||
vinītānbhagavanbhūmau tadā tānnṛpatīnvada || 8 || ||
|| sūta uvāca || ||
svargate vikramāditye rājāno bahudhā.abhavan ||
tathāṣṭādaśa rājyāni teṣāṃ nāmāni me śṛṇu || 9 ||
paścime siṃdhunadyaṃte setubandhe hi dakṣiṇe ||
uttare badarīsthāne pūrve ca kapilāntike ||3.3.2.1 0||
aṣṭādaśaiva rāṣṭrāṇi teṣāṃ madhye babhūvire ||
iṃdraprasthaṃ ca pāṃcālaṃ kuru kṣetraṃ ca kāpilam || 11 ||
antarvedī vrajathyaivājameraṃ marudhanva ca ||
gaurjjaraṃ ca mahārāṣṭraṃ drāviḍaṃ ca kaliṃgakam || 12 ||
āvaṃtyaṃ coḍupaṃ vaṃgaṃ gauḍaṃ māgadhameva ca ||
kauśalyaṃ ca tathā jñeyaṃ teṣāṃ rājā pṛthakpṛk || 13 ||
nānābhāṣāḥ sthitāstatra bahudharmapravartakāḥ ||
evamabdaśataṃ jātaṃ tataste vai śakādayaḥ ||14||
śrutvā dharmavināśaṃ ca bahuvṛṃdaiḥ samanvitāḥ ||
kecittīrtvā siṃdhunadīmāryyadeśaṃ samāgatāḥ || 15 ||
himaparvatamārgeṇa siṃdhumārgeṇa cāgaman ||
jitvāryyāllā~mṭhayitvā tānsvadeśaṃ punarāyayuḥ || 16 ||
gṛhītvā yoṣitasteṣāṃ paraṃ harṣamupāyayuḥ ||
etasminnantare tatra śālivāhanabhūpatiḥ || 17 ||
vikramādityapautraśca pitṛrājyaṃ gṛhītavān ||
jitvā śakāndurādharṣāṃścīnataittirideśajān || 18 ||
bāhlīkānkāmarūpāṃśca romajānkhurajā cchaṭhān ||
teṣāṃ kośāngṛhītvā ca daṃḍayogyānakārayat || 19 ||
sthāpitā tena maryyādā mlecchāryāṇāṃ pṛthakpṛthak ||
siṃdhusthānamiti jñeyaṃ rāṣṭra māryyasya cottamam ||3.3.2.20||
mlecchasthānaṃ paraṃ sindhoḥ kṛtaṃ tena mahātmanā ||
ekadā tu śakādhīśo himatuṃgaṃ samāyayau || 21 ||
hūṇadeśasya madhye vai giristhaṃ puruṣaṃ śubham ||
dadarśa balavānrājā gaurāṃgaṃ śvetavastrakam || 22 ||
ko bhavāniti taṃ prāha sa hovāca mudānvitaḥ ||
īśaputraṃ ca māṃ viddhi kumārīgarbhasaṃbhavam || 23 ||
mlecchadharmasya vaktāraṃ satyavrataparāyaṇam ||
iti śrutvā nṛpaḥ prāha dharmaḥ ko bhavato mataḥ || 24 ||
śrutvovāca mahārāja prāpte satyasya saṃkṣaye ||
nirmaryāde mlecchadeśe masīho.ahaṃ samāgataḥ || 25 ||
īśāmasī ca dasyūnāṃ prādurbhūtā bhayaṃkarī ||
tāmahaṃ mlecchataḥ prāpya masīhatvamupāgataḥ || 26 ||
mleccheṣu sthāpito dharmo mayā tacchṛṇu bhūpate ||
mānasaṃ nirmalaṃ kṛtvā malaṃ dehe śubhāśubham ||27|
naigamaṃ japamāsthāya japeta nirmalaṃ param||
nyāyena satyavacasā manasaikyena mānavaḥ || 28 ||
dhyānena pūjayedīśaṃ sūryamaṃḍalasaṃsthitam |
acalo.ayaṃ prabhuḥ sākṣāttathā sūryocalaḥ sadā || 29 ||
tattvānāṃ calabhūtānāṃ karṣaṇaḥ sa samaṃtataḥ ||
iti kṛtyena bhūpāla masīhā vilayaṃ gatā || 3.3.2.30 ||
īśamūrtirhṛdi prāptā nityaśuddhā śivaṃkarī ||
īśāmasīha iti ca mama nāma pratiṣṭhitam || 31 ||
iti śrutvā sa bhūpālo natvā taṃ mlecchapūjakam||
sthāpayāmāsa ta tatra mlecchasthāne hi dāruṇe || 32 ||
svarājyaṃ prāptavānrājā hayamedhamacīkarat ||
rājyaṃ kṛtvā sa ṣaṣṭyabdaṃ svargalokamupāyayau||
svargate nṛpatau tasminyathā cāsīttathā śṛṇu || 34 ||
iti śrībhaviṣye mahāpurāṇe pratisargaparvaṇi caturyugakhaṇḍāparaparyāye kaliyugīyetihāsasamuccaye śālivāhanakāle dvitīyo.adhyāyaḥ||2||
śrīsūta uvāca|| ||
śālivāhanavaṃśe ca rājāno daśa cābhavan||
rājyaṃ paṃcaśatābdaṃ ca kṛtvā lokāntaraṃ yayuḥ|| 1||
maryyādā kramato līnā jātā bhūmaṃḍale tadā||
bhūpatirdaśamo yo vai bhojarāja iti smṛtaḥ ||
dṛṣṭvā prakṣīṇamaryyādāṃ balī digvijayaṃ yayau || 2 ||
senayā daśasāhasryā kālidāsena saṃyutaḥ ||
tathānyairbrāhmaṇaiḥ sārddhaṃ siṃdhupāramupāyayau || 3 ||
jitvā gāṃdhārajānmlecchānkāśmīrānnāravāñchaṭhān ||
teṣāṃ prāpya mahākośaṃ daṃḍayogyānakārayat ||4||
etasminnantare mleccha ācāryyeṇa samanvitaḥ||
mahāmada iti khyātaḥ śiṣyaśākhāsamanvitaḥ||5||
nṛpaścaiva mahādevaṃ marusthalanivāsinam||
gaṃgājalaiśca saṃsnāpya paṃcagavyasamanvitaiḥ||
caṃdanādibhirabhyarcya tuṣṭāva manasā haram||6||
bhojarāja uvāca||
namaste girijānātha marusthalanivāsine ||
tripurāsuranāśāya vahumāyāpravarttine || 7 ||
mlecchairguptāya śuddhāya saccidānandarūpiṇe ||
tvaṃ māṃ hi kiṃkaraṃ viddhi śaraṇārthamupāgatam||8 ||
||sūta uvāca || ||
iti śrutvā stavaṃ devaḥ śabdamāha nṛpāya tam ||
gaṃtavyaṃ bhojarājena mahākāleśvarasthale || 9 ||
mlecchaissudūṣitā bhūmirvāhīkā nāma viśrutā ||
āryyadharmo hi naivātra vāhīke deśadāruṇe || 3.3.3.10 ||
babhūvātra mahāmāyī yo.asau dagdho mayā purā||
tripuro balidaityena preṣitaḥ punarāgataḥ || 11 ||
ayoniḥ sa varo mattaḥ prāptavāndaityavarddhanaḥ ||
mahāmada iti khyātaḥ paiśācakṛtitatparaḥ || 12 ||
nāgantavyaṃ tvayā bhūpa paiśāce deśadhūrtake ||
matprasādena bhūpāla tava śuddhiḥ prajāyate || 13 ||
iti śrutvā nṛpaścaiva svadeśānpunarāgamat||
mahāmadaśca taiḥ sārddhaṃ siṃdhutīramupāyayau || 14 ||
uvāca bhūpatiṃ premṇā māyāmadaviśāradaḥ ||
tava devo mahārāja mama dāsatvamāgataḥ || 15 ||
mamocchiṣṭhaṃ sabhuṃjīyādyathā tatpaśya bho nṛpa ||
iti śrutvā tathā dṛṣṭvā paraṃ vismayamāgataḥ || 16 ||
mlecchadharme matiścāsīttasya bhūpasya dāruṇe||17||
tacchrutvā kālidāsastu ruṣā prāha mahāmadam ||
māyā te nirmitā dhūrta nṛpamohanahetave || 18 ||
haniṣyāmi durācāraṃ vāhīkaṃ puruṣādhamam |||
