ityuktvā sa dvijaḥ śrīmānnavārṇajapatatparaḥ || 19 ||
japtvā daśasahasraṃ ca taddaśāṃśaṃ juhāva saḥ ||
bhasma bhūtvā sa māyāvī mlecchadevatvamāgataḥ||3.3.3.20|||
bhayabhītāstu tacchiṣyā deśaṃ vāhīkamāyayuḥ ||
gṛhītvā svagurorbhasma madahīnatvamāgatam || 21 ||
sthāpitaṃ taiśca bhūmadhye tatroṣurmadatatparāḥ |||
madahīnaṃ puraṃ jātaṃ teṣāṃ tīrthaṃ samaṃ smṛtam || 22 ||
rātrau sa devarūpaśca bahumāyāviśāradaḥ ||
paiśācaṃ dehamāsthāya bhojarājaṃ hi so.abravīt||23||
āryyadharmo hi te rājansarvadharmottamaḥ smṛtaḥ||
īśājñayā kariṣyāmi paiśācaṃ dharmadāruṇam || 24 ||
liṃgacchedī śikhāhīnaḥ śmaśrudhārī sa dūṣakaḥ ||
uccālāpī sarvabhakṣī bhaviṣyati jano mama || 25 ||
vinā kaulaṃ ca paśavasteṣāṃ bhakṣyā matā mama ||
musalenaiva saṃskāraḥ kuśairiva bhaviṣyati || 26 ||
tasmānmusalavanto hi jātayo dharmadūṣakāḥ ||
iti paiśācadharmaśca bhaviṣyati mayā kṛtaḥ || 27 ||
ityuktvā prayayau devaḥ sa rājā gehamāyayau ||
trivarṇe sthāpitā vāṇī sāṃskṛtī svargadāyinī || 28 ||
śūdreṣu prākṛtī bhāṣā sthāpitā tena dhīmatā ||
paṃcāśadabdakālaṃ tu rājyaṃ kṛtvā divaṃ gataḥ || 29 ||
sthāpitā tena maryyādā sarvadevopamāninī ||
āryyāvartaḥ puṇyabhūmirmadhyaṃ viṃdhyahimālayoḥ || 3.3.3.30 ||
āryya varṇāḥ sthitāstatra viṃdhyānte varṇasaṃkarāḥ ||
narā musalavantaśca sthāpitāḥ siṃdhupārajāḥ || 31 ||
barbare tuṣadeśe ca dvīpe nānāvidhe tathā ||
īśāmasīhadharmmāśca surai rājñaiva saṃsthitāḥ || 32 ||
iti śrībhaviṣye mahāpurāṇe pratisargaparvaṇi caturyugakhaṃḍāparaparyāye kaliyugīyetihāsasamuccaye tṛtī yo.adhyāyaḥ || 3 || cha ||

|| sūta uvāca || ||
svargate bhojarāje tu saptabhūpāstadanvaye ||
jātāścālpāyuṣo mandāstriśatābdāntare mṛtāḥ || 1 ||
bahubhūpavatī bhūmisteṣāṃ rājye babhūva ha ||
vīrasiṃhaśca yo bhūpaḥ saptamaḥ saṃprakīrtitaḥ || 2 ||
tadanvaye tribhūpāśca dviśatābdāntare mṛtāḥ ||
gaṃgāsiṃhaśca yo bhūpo daśamaḥ sa prakīrtitaḥ || 3 ||
kalpakṣetre ca rājyaṃ svaṃ kṛtavāndharmato nṛpaḥ ||
antarvedyāṃ kānyakubje jayacandro mahīpatiḥ || 4 ||
iṃdraprasthenaṃgapālastomarānvayasaṃbhavaḥ ||
anye ca bahavo bhūpā babhūvurgrāmarāṣṭrapāḥ || 5 ||
agnivaṃśasya vistāro babhūva balavattaraḥ ||
pūrve tu kapila sthāne vāhīkānte tu paścime || 6 ||
uttare cīnadeśānte setubaṃdhe tu dakṣiṇe ||
ṣaṣṭilakṣāśca bhūpālā grāmapā balavattarāḥ || 7 ||
agnihotrasya kartāro gobrāhmaṇahitaiṣiṇaḥ ||
babhūvurdvāparasamā dharmakṛtyaviśāradāḥ ||8||
dvāparākhyasamaḥ kālaḥ sarvatra parivartate ||
gehegehe sthitaṃ dravyaṃ dharmaścaiva janejane ||9||
grāmegrāme sthito devo deśedeśe sthito makhaḥ ||
āryadharmakarā mlecchā babhūvuḥ sarvatomukhāḥ ||3.3.4.10||
iti dṛṣṭvā kalirghoro mlecchayā saha bhīrukaḥ ||
nīlādrau prāpya matimānhariṃ śaraṇamāyayau ||11||
dvādaśābdamite kāle dhyānayogaparo.abhavat||
dhyānena saccidānaṃdaṃ dṛṣṭvā kṛṣṇaṃ sanātanam||12||.
tuṣṭāva manasā tatra rādhayā sahitaṃ harim ||
purāṇamajaraṃ nityaṃ vṛṃdāvananivāsinam ||13||
|| kaliruvāca || ||
sāṣṭāṃgaṃ daṃḍavatsvāmingṛhāṇa mama ceśvara ||
.pāhi māṃ śaraṇaṃ prāptaṃ caraṇe te kṛpānidhe || 14 ||
sarvapāpaharastvaṃ vai sarvakālakaro hariḥ ||
bhavāngauraḥ satyayuge tretāyāṃ raktarūpakaḥ || || 15 ||
dvāpare pītarūpaśca kṛṣṇatvaṃ mama diṣṭake ||
matputrāśca smṛtā mlecchā āryyadharmatvamāgatāḥ|| 16 ||
caturgehaṃ ca me svāmindyūtaṃ madyaṃ suvarṇa kam ||
strī hāsyaṃ cāgnivaṃśyaiśca kṣatriyaiśca vināśitam || 17 || tyaktadehastyaktakulastyaktarāṣṭro janārdana ||
tvatpādāṃbujamādhāya sthito.ahaṃ śaraṇaṃ tvayi ||18||
iti śrutvā sa bhagavānkṛṣṇaḥ prāha vihasya tam ||
bho kale tava rakṣārthaṃ janiṣyehaṃ mahāvatīm ||19||
mamāṃśo bhūmimāsādya kṣayiṣyati mahābalān ||
mlecchavaṃśasya bhūpālānsthāpayiṣyati bhūtale || 3.3.4.20 ||
ityuktvā bhagavānsākṣāttatraivāntaradhīyata ||
kalistu mlecchayā sārdhaṃ paramā naṃdamāptavān || 21 ||
etasminnantare vipra yathā jātaṃ śṛṇuṣva tat ||
ābhīrī vāksare grāme vratapā nāma viśrutā || 22 ||
navadurgāvrataṃ śreṣṭhaṃ? navavarṣaṃ cakāra ha ||
prasannā caṃḍikā prāha varaṃ varaya śobhane || 23 ||
sāha tāṃ yadi me mātarvaro deyastvayeśvari ||
rāmakṛṣṇasamau bālau bhaveyāḥ mamānvaye || 24 ||
tathetyuktvā tu sā devī tatraivāntaradhīyata ||
vasumānnāma nṛpatistasyā rūpeṇa mohitaḥ || 25 ||
udvāhya dharmato bhūpaḥ svagehe tāmavāsayat ||
tasyāṃ jātau nṛpātputrau deśarājastu tadvaraḥ || 26 ||
āvāryo vatsarājaśca śatahastisamo bale ||
jitvā tau māgadhāndeśānrājya vaṃtau babhūvatuḥ || 27 ||
śatayattaḥ smṛto mlecchaḥ śūro vanarasādhipaḥ ||
tatputro bhīmasenāṃśo vīraṇobhūcchivājñayā || 28 ||
tālavṛkṣapramāṇena .cordhvavego hi tasya vai ||
tālano nāma vikhyātaḥ śatayattena vai kṛtaḥ || 29 ||
tābhyāṃ nṛpābhyāṃ tadyuddhamabhavallomaharṣaṇam ||
yuddhena hīnatāṃ prāptastālano balavattaraḥ || 3.3.4.30 ||
tadā maitrī kṛtā tābhyāṃ tālanena samanvitā ||
jayacaṃdraparīkṣārthe trayaḥ śūrāḥ samāyayuḥ || 31 ||
iti śrībhaviṣye mahāpurāṇe pratisargaparvaṇi caturyugakhaṃḍāparaparyāye kaliyugīyetihāsamuccaye caturtho.adhyāyaḥ || 4 || cha ||
|| sūta uvāca || ||
iṃdraprasthe.anaṃgapālonapatyaśca mahīpatiḥ ||
putrārthaṃ kārayāmāsa śaivaṃ yajñaṃ vidhānataḥ || 1 ||
kanyake ca tadā jāte śivabhāgaprasādataḥ ||
caṃdrakāṃtiśca jyeṣṭhā vai dvitīyā kīrtimālinī || 2 ||
kānyakubjādhipāyaiva caṃdrakāntiṃ pitādadat ||
devapālāya śuddhāya rāṣṭrapālānvayāya ca || 3 ||
someśvarāya bhūpāya capahānikulāya tu ||
ajamerādhipāyaiva tathā vai kīrtimālinīm || 4 ||
jayaśarmā dvijaḥ kaścitsamādhistho himālaye ||
dṛṣṭvā bhūpotsavaṃ ramyaṃ rājyārthe svamano.adadhat || 5 ||
tyaktvā dehaṃ sa śuddhātmā caṃdrakāṃtyāḥ sutobhavat ||
jayacaṃdra iti khyāto bāhuśālī jitendriyaḥ ||
ratnabhānuśca saṃjajñe śūrastasyānujo balī || 6 ||
sa jitvā gauḍavaṃgādīnmarudeśānmadotkaṭān ||
daṃḍyānkṛtvā gṛhaṃ prāpya bhrātrājñā tatparo.abhavat ||7||
gaṃgāsiṃhasya bhaginī nāmnā vīravatī śubhā ||
ratnabhānośca mahiṣī babhūva varavarṇinī || 8 ||
nakulāṃśastadā bhūmau tasyāṃ jātaḥ śivājñayā ||
lakṣaṇo nāma balavānkhaḍgayuddhaviśāradaḥ ||
sa saptābdāntare prāpte pitustulyo babhūva ha || 9 ||
trayaśca kīrtimālinyāṃ putrā jātā madotkaṭāḥ ||
dhuṃdhakāraśca prathamastataḥ kṛṣṇakumārakaḥ ||
pṛthivīrāja evāsau tatonuja iti smṛtaḥ || 3.3.5.10 ||
dvādaśābdavayaḥ prāptaḥ siṃhakhelastato.abhavat ||
śrutvā cānaṃgapālaśca tasmai rājyaṃ svayaṃ dadau ||
gatvā himegiriṃ ramyaṃ yogadhyānaparobhavat || 11 ||
mathurāyāṃ dhuṃdhakāro.ajamere ca tatonujaḥ ||
rājā babhūva nītijñastau sutau piturājñayā || 12 ||
pradyotaścaiva vidyotaḥ kṣatriyau cadravaṃśajau ||
maṃtriṇau tasya bhūpasya balavaṃtau madotkaṭau || 13 ||
pradyotatanayo jāto nāmnā parimalo balī ||
lakṣasenādhipaḥ so hi tena rājñaiva saṃskṛtaḥ || 14 ||
vidyotādbhīṣmasiṃhaśca gajasenādhipo.abhavat ||
svargate.anaṃgapāle tu bhūmirājo mahīpatiḥ || 15 ||
dṛṣṭvā tānvipriyānsarvānnijarājyānnirākarot ||
pradyotādyāśca catvāraḥ svaśūrairdviśatairyutāḥ || 16 ||
kānyakubjapuraṃ prāpya jayacaṃdramavarṇayan ||
jayacaṃdra mahīpāla tvanmātṛṣvasṛjo nṛpaḥ || 17 ||
mātāmahasya te rājyaṃ prāptavānnirbhayo balī ||
nyāyena kathito.asmābhirarddharājyaṃ hi te smṛtam || 18 ||
sarvarājyaṃ kathaṃ bhuṃkṣe śrutvā tena nirākṛtāḥ ||
bhavantaṃ śaraṇaṃ prāptā yathāyogyaṃ tathā kuru || 19 ||
iti śrutvā mahīpālo jayacaṃdra uvāca tān ||
aśvasainye madīye cādhikārī te suto bhavet || 3.3.5.20 ||
nāmnā parimalaḥ śūrastvaṃ manmaṃtrī bhavādhunā ||
vidyotaśca tathā maṃtrī gajasainye hi bhīmakaḥ || 21 ||
vṛttyarthe ca mayā vo vai purī dattā mahāvatī ||
mahīpateśca bhūpasya nagarī sā priyaṃkarī||22||
iti śrutvā tu te sarve tathā matvā mumodire |
mahīpatistu balavānduḥkhātsaṃtyajya tāṃ purīm||23||
kṛtvaurvīyāṃ purīmanyāṃ tatra vāsamakārayat ||
agamā malanā caiva bhaginyau tasya cottame || 24 ||
agamā bhūmirājāya cānyā parimalāya sā ||
dattā bhrātrā vidhānena paramānaṃdamāpatuḥ || 25 ||
vivāhāṃte ca bhūrājā durgamanyamakārayat ||
kṛtvā ca nagarīṃ ramyāṃ caturvarṇanivāsinīm || 26 ||
dehalī sumūhūrtena durga dvāre suropitā ||
gatā sā yojanānte vai vṛddhirūpā sukālataḥ || 27 ||
vismitaḥ sa nṛpo bhūtvā dehalī nāma cākarot ||
dehalīgrāma iti ca prasiddho.abhūnnṛpājñayā || 28 ||
trivarṣāṃte ca bho viprā jayacandro mahīpatiḥ ||
lakṣaṣoḍaśasainyāḍhyastatra patramacodayat || 29 ||
kimarthaṃ pṛthivīrāja maddāyaṃ me na dattavān ||
mātāmahasya vai dāyaṃ cārddhaṃ me ca samarpaya || 3.3.5.30 ||
no cenmacchastrakaṭhinaiḥ kṣayaṃ yāsyaṃti sainikāḥ ||
iti jñātvā mahīrājo viṃśallakṣādhipo balī || 31 ||
dūtaṃ vai preṣayāmāsa rājarājo madotkaṭaḥ ||
jayacaṃdra mahīpāla sāvadhānaṃ śṛṇuṣva tat || 32 ||
yadā nirākṛtā dhūrtā mayā te caṃdravaṃśinaḥ ||
tataḥ prabhṛti senāṅgaṃ viṃśallakṣaṃ samāhṛtam||33||
tvayā ṣoḍaśalakṣaṃ ca yuddhasainyaṃ samāhṛtam ||
sarve vai bhārate bhūpā daṃḍayogyāśca me sadā ||34||
bhavānna daṃḍyo balavānkaraṃ me dātumarhati ||
no cenmatkaṭhinairbāṇaiḥ kṣayaṃ yāsyaṃti sainikāḥ ||35||
iti jñātvā tayorghoraṃ vairaṃ cāsīnmahītale ||
bhūmirājaśca valavāñjayacandrabhayārditaḥ ||36||
jayacaṃdraśca balavānpṛthivīrājabhīrukaḥ ||
jayacandraścāryadeśamarddharāṣṭramamakalpayat|| ||37||
pṛthivīrāja evāsau tathārddhaṃ rāṣṭramānayat ||
evaṃ jātaṃ tayorvairamagnivaṃśapraṇāśanam ||38||
iti śrībhaviṣye mahāpurāṇe pratisargaparvaṇi caturyuga khaṃḍāparaparyāye kaliyugīyetihāsasamuccaye paṃcamo.adhyāyaḥ ||5||
|| sūta uvāca || ||
ekadā ratnabhānurhi mahīrājena pālitām ||
diśaṃ yāmyāṃ sa vai jitvā teṣāṃ kośānupāharat ||1||
mahīrājastu tacchutvā paraṃ vismayamāgataḥ ||
ratnabhānośca tilako babhūva bahuvistaraḥ ||2||
tilakā nāma vikhyātā yā tu vīravatī śubhā ||
śreṣṭhā dvādaśarājñīnāṃ jananī lakṣaṇasya vai || 3 ||
jayacaṃdrasya bhūpasya yoṣitaḥ ṣoḍaśābhavan ||
tāsāṃ na tanayo hyāsītpūrvakarmavipākataḥ || 4 ||
gauḍabhūpasya duhitā nāmnā divyavibhāvarī ||
jayacaṃdrasya mahiṣī taddāsī surabhānavī || 5 ||
rūpayauvana saṃyuktā ratikeliviśāradā ||
dṛṣṭvā tāṃ sa nṛpaḥ kāmī bubhuje smarapīḍitaḥ ||6||
tasyāṃ jātā sutā devī nāmnā saṃyoginī śubhā ||
dvādaśābdavayaḥ prāptā sā babhūva varāṃganā || 7 ||
tasyāḥ svayaṃvare rājāhvayadbhūpānmahāśubhān ||
bhūmirājastu balavāñchrutvā tadrūpamuttamam || ||
vivāhārthe manaścāsīccaṃdrabhaṭṭamacodayat ||
maṃtripravara bho mitra caṃdrabhaṭṭa mama priya || 9 ||
kānyakubjapurīṃ prāpya manmūrtiṃ svarṇanirmitām|| ||
sthāpaya tvaṃ sabhāmadhye yadvṛttāṃtaṃ tu me vada || 3.3.6.10 ||
iti śrutvā caṃdrabhaṭṭo bhavānībhaktitatparaḥ ||
gatvā tatra bhṛguśreṣṭha yathā proktastathākarot || 11 ||
svayaṃvare ca bhūpāśca nānādeśyāḥ samāgatāḥ ||
tyaktvā saṃyoginī tānvai nṛpamūrtivimohitā || 12 ||
pitaraṃ prāha kāmākṣī yasya mūrtiriyaṃ nṛpa ||
bhaviṣyati sa me bhartā sarvalakṣaṇalakṣitaḥ || 13 ||
jayacaṃdrastu tacchrutvā caṃdrabhadramuvāca tam ||
yadi te bhūpatiścaiva sarvasainyasamanvitaḥ || 14 ||
sañjayedyoginīmetāṃ tarhi me.atipriyo bhavet ||
caṃdrabhaṭṭastu tacchrutvā tattu sarvamavarṇayat || 15 ||
pṛthivīrāja evāsau śrutvā sainyamacodayat ||
ekalakṣā gajāstasya saptalakṣāsturaṃgamāḥ || 16 ||
rathāḥ paṃcasahasrāśca dhanurbāṇaviśāradāḥ ||
lakṣāḥ padātayo jñeyā dvādaśaiva mahābalāḥ || 17 ||
rājānastriśatānyeva mahīrājapadānugāḥ ||
sārddhaṃ dvābhyāṃ ca bandhubhyāṃ kānyakubje nṛpo.agamat || 18 ||
dhundhukāraśca tadbandhurgajānīkapatissadā ||
hayānīkapatiḥ kṛṣṇa kumāro balavattaraḥ || 19 ||
padātīnāṃ nṛpatayaḥ patayastatra cābhavan ||
mahānkolāhalo jātaḥ sthalīṃ śūnyāmakārayan || 3.3.6.20 ||
viṃśatkośapramāṇena sthitaṃ tasya mahābalam ||
jayacaṃdrastu saṃjñāya mahīrājasya cāgamam || 21 ||
svasainyaṃ kalpayāmāsa lakṣaṣoḍaśasaṃmitam ||
ekalakṣā gajāstasya saptalakṣāḥ padātayaḥ || 22 ||
vājinaścāṣṭalakṣāśca sarvayuddhaviśāradāḥ ||
dviśatānyeva rājānaḥ prāptāstatra samāgame || 23 ||
āgaskṛtaṃ mahīrājaṃ matvā te śuklavaṃśinaḥ ||
yuddhārthinaḥ sthitāstatra puramāgaskṛtaṃ hyabhūt || 24 ||
īśanadyāḥ pare kūle taddolā sthapitā tadā ||
nānā vādyāni ramyāṇi tatra cakrurmahāravam || 25 ||
ratnabhānurgajānīke rūpānīke hi lakṣaṇaḥ ||
tasyāṃ senāpatibhyāṃ tau saṃguptau balavattarau || 26 ||
pradyotaścaiva vidyoto ratnabhānuṃ rarakṣatuḥ ||
bhīṣmaḥ parimalaścaiva lakṣaṇaṃ caṃdravaṃśajaḥ || 27 ||
bhūpāḥ padātisainye ca saṃsthitā madavihvalāḥ ||
tayoścāsīnmahadyuddhaṃ dāruṇaṃ sainyasaṃkṣayam || 28 ||
hayā hayairmṛtā jātā gajāścaiva gajaistathā ||
padātayaḥ padātaiśca mṛtāścānye kramādraṇe || 29 ||
bhūpaiśca rakṣitāḥ sarve nirbhayā raṇamāyayuḥ ||
yāvatsūryaḥ sthito vyomni tāvadyuddhamavartata || 3.3.6.30 ||
evaṃ paṃcadinaṃ jātaṃ yuddhaṃ vīrajanakṣayam ||
gajā daśasahasraṇi hayā lakṣāṇi saṃkṣitāḥ || 31 ||
paṃcalakṣaṃ mahībharturhatāstatra padātayaḥ ||
rājāno dve śate tatra rathāśca triśataṃ tathā || 32 ||
kānyakubjādhipasyaiva gajā navasahasrakāḥ ||
sahasraikaṃ rathā jñeyāstrilakṣaṃ ca padātayaḥ || 33 ||
ekalakṣaṃ hayāstatra mṛtāḥ svargapuraṃ yayuḥ ||
ṣaṣṭhāhe samanuprāpte pṛthivīrāja eva saḥ || 34 ||
duḥkhito manasā devaṃ rudraṃ tuṣṭāva bhaktimān ||
saṃtuṣṭastu mahādevo mohayāmāsa tadbalam || 35 ||
prasannastu mahīrājo gataḥ saṃyoginīṃ prati ||
dṛṣṭvā tatsundaraṃ rūpaṃ mumoha vasudhādhipaḥ || 36 ||
saṃyoginī nṛpaṃ dṛṣṭvā mūrcchitā cābhavatkṣaṇāt ||
etasminnaṃtare rājā taddolāmanayadbalāt|| 37 ||
jagāma dehalīṃ bhūpaḥ sarvasainyasamanvitaḥ ||
yojanānte gate tasminbodhitāste madodbhaṭāḥ || 38 ||
dṛṣṭvā naiva tadā dolāṃ prajagmurvegavattarāḥ ||
śrutvā kolāhalaṃ teṣāṃ mahīrājo nṛpottamaḥ || 39 ||
arddhasainyaṃ ca saṃsthāpya svayaṃ gehamupāgamat ||
ubhau tadbhrātarau vīrau cārddhasainyasamanvitau || 3.3.6.40 ||
sūkarakṣetramāsādya yuddhāya samupasthitau ||
etasminnantare sarve pradyotādimahābalāḥ ||41||
svasainyaiḥ saha saṃprāpya mahadyuddhamakārayan||
hayā hayaiśca saṃjagmurgajā atha gajaiḥ saha || 42 ||
saṃkulaśca mahānāsīddāruṇo lomaharṣaṇaḥ ||
dinānte saṃkṣayaṃ yātaṃ tayoścaiva mahadbalam || 43 ||
bhayabhītā pare tatra jñātvā rātriṃ tamovṛtām ||
pradudruvurbhayādvīrā hataśeṣāstu dehalīm ||44 ||
pradyotādyāśca te vīrā dehalīṃ prati saṃyayuḥ ||
punastayormahadyuddhaṃ hyabhavallomaharṣaṇam || 45 ||
dhuṃdhukāraśca pradyotaṃ hṛdi bāṇairatāḍayat ||
tribhiśca viṣanirdhūtairmūchitaḥ sa mamāra ca || 46 ||
bhrātaraṃ nihataṃ dṛṣṭvā vidyotaśca mahāvalaḥ ||
ājagāma gajārūḍho dhuṃdhukāramatāḍayat || 47 ||
tribhiśca tomaraiḥ so.api mūrchito bhūmimāgamat ||
mūrchitaṃ bhrātaraṃ dṛṣṭvā dhuṃdhukāraṃ mahābalam || 48 ||
tadā kṛṣṇakumāro.asau gajasthastvarito yayau ||
rūpāviṣṭaśca taṃ vīraṃ bhallenaivamatāḍa yat || || 49 ||
bhallena tena saṃbhinno mṛtaḥ svargapuraṃ yayau ||
vidyote nihate tasmitsarvasainyacamūpatau || 3.3.6.50 ||
ratnābhānurmahāvīro.ayudhyattena samanvitaḥ ||
etasminnaṃtare rājā sahasragajasaṃyutaḥ || 51 ||
lakṣaṇaṃ sahitaṃ tābhyāṃ kruddhaṃ taṃ samayudhyata ||
śivadattavaro rājā bhīṣmaṃ parimalaṃ ruṣā || || 52 ||
rudrāstrairmohayāmāsa lakṣaṇaṃ balavattaram ||
mūrchitāṃstānsamālokya ratnabhānuḥ śarairnijaiḥ || 53 ||
dhuṃdhukāraṃ mahīrājaṃ vaiṣṇavaiḥ samamojayan ||
kṛṣṇako ratnabhānuśca yuyudhāte parasparam ||54||
ubhau samabalau vīrau gajapṛṣṭhasthitau raṇe ||
anyonyanihatau nāgau khaṅgahastau mahī tale || 55 ||
yuyudhāte bahūnmārgānkṛtavaṃtau sudurjayau ||
praharāntaṃ raṇaṃ kṛtvā maraṇāyopajagmatuḥ || 56 ||
hate tasminmahāvīrye kānyakubjā bhayāturāḥ ||
mūrchitāṃstrīnsamādāya paṃcalakṣabalairyutāḥ || 57 ||
raṇaṃ tyaktvā gṛhaṃ jagmurnṛpaśokaparāyaṇāḥ ||
ratnabhānau ca nihate hatotsāhāśca bhūmipāḥ || 58 ||
svaṃsvaṃ niveśanaṃ jagmurmahīrājabhayāturāḥ ||
devānārādhayāmāsuryatheṣṭaṃ te gṛhe gṛhe || 59 ||
mahīrājastu balavānsaptalakṣabalānvitaḥ ||
dhuṃdhukāreṇa sahito vaṃdhukṛtyordhvamācarat || 3.3.6.60 ||
tathā bhīṣmaḥ parimalo lakṣaṇaḥ pitaraṃ svakam||
gaṃgākūle samāgamya caurdhvadaihikamācaran || 61 ||
bhūmirājasya vijayo jayacaṃdayaśo raṇe ||
prasiddhamabhavadbhūmau gehegehe janejane ||62||
jayacaṃdraḥ kānyakubje dehalyāṃ pṛthivīpatiḥ ||
utsavaṃ kārayitvā tu paramānandamāyayau || 63 ||
iti śrībhaviṣye mahāpurāṇe pratisargaparvaṇi caturyugakhaṇḍāparaparyāye kaliyugīyetihāsasamuccaye ṣaṣṭho.adhyāyaḥ || 6 || cha ||
|| sūta uvāca ||
bhīṣmaḥ siṃhasthite gaṃgākūle śakraprapūjakaḥ ||
śakraṃ sūryamayaṃ jñātvā tapasā samatoṣayat || 1 ||
māsāṃte bhagavāniṃdro jñātvā tadbhaktimuttamām ||
varaṃ varaya ca prāha śrutvā śūrobravīdidam || 2 ||
dehi me vaḍavāṃ divyāṃ yadi tuṣṭo bhavānprabhuḥ ||
iti śrutvā tadā tasmai vaḍavāṃ hariṇīṃ śubhām || 3 ||
dadau sa bhagavāniṃdrastatraivāntarhitobhavat || 4 ||
tasminkāle parimalaḥ pitṛśokaparāyaṇaḥ ||
pārthivaiḥ pūjayāmāsa mahādevamumāpatim ||
parīkṣārthaṃ śivaḥ sākṣātsarparogeṇa taṃ grasat || 5 ||
vyatīte paṃcame māse nṛpaḥ śaktivivarjitaḥ ||
na tatyāja mahāpūjāṃ mahākleśasamanvitaḥ || 6 ||
maraṇāya yayau kāśīṃ svapatnyā sahito nṛpaḥ ||
uvāsa vaṭamūlāṃte rātrau rogaprapīḍitaḥ || 7 ||
etasminnantare kaścitpannago mūlasaṃsthitaḥ ||
śabdaṃ cakāra madhuraṃ śrutvā rudrāhirāyayau || 8 ||
rudrāhiṃ pannagaḥ prāha bhavānnirdaya mandadhīḥ ||
śivabhaktaṃ nṛpamimaṃ pīḍayetpratyahaṃ khalaḥ || 9 ||
mūrkho.ayaṃ bhūpatiḥ sākṣādāranālaṃ pibennahi ||
iti śrutvā sa rudrāhirāha re pannagādhama || 3.3.7.10 ||
rājño dehe paraṃ harṣaṃ pratyahaṃ prāptavānaham ||
svagehaṃ duḥkhatastyājyaṃ kathaṃ tyājyaṃ mayā śaṭha || 11 ||
mūrkhotra bhūpatiryo vai tailoṣṇaṃ yanna dattavān ||
ityuktvāntargato dehe śrutvā sā malanā satī || 12 ||
cakāra pannagoktaṃ tadgatarogo nṛpo.abhavat ||
tailoṣṇairbilamāpūrya cakhāna ca satī svayam || 13 ||
tato jātaṃ svayaṃ liṃgamaṃguṣṭhābhaṃ sanātanam ||
jyotīrūpaṃ cidānaṃdaṃ sarvalakṣmasamanvitam || 14 ||
niśīthe tama udbhūte dikṣu sūryatvamāgatam ||
dṛṣṭvā sa vismito rājā pūjayāmāsa śaṃkaram || 15 ||
mahimnastavapāṭhaiśca tuṣṭāva girijāpatim ||
tadā prasanno bhagavānvaraṃ brūhi tamabravīt || 16 ||
śrutvāha nṛpatirdevaṃ yadi tuṣṭo maheśvara ||
śrīpatirme gṛhaṃ prāpya vasenmatpriyakārakaḥ || 17 ||
tathetyuktvā mahādevo liṃgarūpatvamāgataḥ ||
pratyahaṃ bhāramekaṃ ca suvarṇaṃ suṣuve tanoḥ || 18 ||
tadā malastu saṃtuṣṭaḥ prāpto gehaṃ mahāvatīm ||
bhīmasiṃhena sahitaḥ paramānaṃdamāyayau || 19 ||
tataḥprabhṛti varṣāṃte jayacaṃdrapurīṃ yayau ||
dṛṣṭvā parimalaṃ rājā kṛtakṛtyatvamāgataḥ || 3.3.7.20 ||
diṣṭyā te saṃkṣito rogo diṣṭyā te darśitaṃ mukham ||
bhavānnijapurīṃ prāpya sukhī bhavatu mā ciram || 21 ||
yadā me vighna ābhūyāttadā tvaṃ māṃ samācara ||
iti śrutvā parimalo gatvā sthānamavāsayat || 22 ||
tadā tu lakṣaṇo vīro bhagavantamuṣāpatim ||
jagannāthamupāgamya samabhyarccāparo.abhavat || 23 ||
pakṣamātrāṃtare viṣṇurjagannātha uṣāpatiḥ ||
varaṃ brūhi vacaśceti lakṣaṇaṃ prāha harṣataḥ || 24 ||
ityuktaḥ sa tu taṃ devaṃ natvovāca vinamradhīḥ ||
dehi me vāhanaṃ divyaṃ sarvaśatruvināśanam || 25 ||
iti śrutvā jagannāthaḥ śaktimairāvatādgajāt ||
samutpādya dadau tasmai divyāmairāvatīṃ mudā || 26 ||
āruhyairāvatīṃ rājā lakṣaṇo gehamāyayau ||
sa vai parimalo rājā jagāma ca mahāvatīm || 27 ||
etasminnaṃtare vīrāstālanādyā madotkaṭāḥ ||
mahāvatīṃ purīṃ prāpya dadṛśustaṃ mahīpatim || 28 ||
tena sārddhaṃ ca mahatīṃ prītiṃ kṛtvā nyavāsayan ||
māsānte ca punaste vai rājāno vinayānvitāḥ || 29 ||
ūcustaṃ śṛṇu bhūpāla vayaṃ gacchāmahe purīḥ ||
tadā rājāpi tānprāha sarvānkṣitipatī natha ||
dattvādhikāraṃ putrebhyastadā.a.ayāsyāmi vo.antikam || 3.3.7.30 ||
tathetyuktāstu te rājñā svagehaṃ punarāyayuḥ ||
sānujo deśarājastu dvijebhyaḥ svapuraṃ dadau || 31 ||
putrebhyastālano vīro dadau vārāṇasīṃ purīm ||
alikollāmatiḥ kālaḥ patra puṣpodarī varī || 32 ||
karīnarī sulalitasteṣāṃ nāmāni vai kramāt ||
dvau dvau putrau smṛtau teṣāṃ pitustulyaparākramau || 33 ||
sa vai putrājñayā śūrastālano rākṣasapriyaḥ ||
yātudhānamayaṃ devaṃ tuṣṭāva mlecchapūjanaiḥ || 34 ||
tathā vasumataḥ putrau bhūpatīdeśavatsajau ||
śakraṃ sūryyaṃ samārādhya kṛtakṛtyau babhūvatuḥ || 35 ||
siṃhinīnāma vaḍavāṃ yā tu dattā bhayānakā ||
āruhya balavāñchūro gamanāya mano dadhau || 36 ||
paṃcaśabdaṃ mahānāgamindradattaṃ manoramam ||
deśarājastamāruhya gamanāya mano dadhe || 37 ||
hyaṃ papīhakaṃ nāma sūryadattaṃ narasvaram ||
vatsarājastamāruhya gamanāya mano dadhe || 38 ||
trayaḥ śūrāḥ samāgamya nagarīṃ te mahāvatīm ||
ūṣustatra mahātmāno bahumānena satkṛtāḥ || 39 ||
senā ṣaṣṭisahasraṃ tatteṣāṃ svāmī sa tālanaḥ ||
maṃtriṇau bhrātarau tau ca nṛpateścandravaṃśinaḥ || 3.3.7.40 ||
tairvīrai rakṣito rājā kṛtakṛtyatvamāgataḥ || 41 || ||
iti śrībhaviṣye mahāpurāṇe pratisargaparvaṇi caturyugakhaṇḍāpara paryāye kaliyugīyetihāsasamuccaye saptamo.adhyāyaḥ || 7 || || cha ||
|| sūta uvāca || ||
jambuko nāma bhūpālo mahīrājo bhayāturaḥ ||
kāliyena yutaḥ prāpto narmadāyāstaṭe śubhe || 1 ||
pārthivaiḥ pūjayāmāsa devadevaṃ pinākinam ||
ṣaṇmāsānte mahādevo jambukaṃ prāha bhūpatim || 2 ||
varaṃ varaya te.abhīṣṭaṃ bhūpa āha kṛtāṃjaliḥ ||
ajitatvaṃ nṛpaiḥ sarvairdehi me karuṇānidhe || 3 ||
tathetyuktvā mahādevastatraivāntarhitobhavat ||
kāliyasta tsuto labdhvā vīro māheśvaraṃ varam || 4 ||
mohanaṃ sarvasainyānāṃ pituraṃtikamāyayau ||
pitaraṃ prāha namrātmā dehyājñāṃ tāta matpriyām || 5 |
gamiṣyāmi balaiḥ sārddhaṃ gaṃgāṃ śuddhajalāṃ śubhām ||
tathetyuktvā pitā tasmai yayau tu svaṃ niveśanam || 6 ||
bhaginīṃ prāha balavānvijayaiṣiṇi śobhane ||
kimicchasi śubhaṃ vastu tadājñāṃ dehi mā ciram || 7 ||
sāha graiveyakaṃ hāraṃ maṇimuktāvibhūṣitam ||
matpriyaṃ dehi me vīra tathetyuktvā yayau gṛhāt || 8 ||
kāliyo lakṣaturagaiḥ saṃyutastvarito.agamat ||
prāpya gaṃgāṃ sāgaragāṃ kṛtvā snānaṃ vidhānataḥ || 9 ||
dattvā dānāni viprebhyo jayacandrapurīṃ yayau ||
nirdhanaḥ samabhūdrājā bāhuśālī mahābalaḥ || 3.3.8.10 ||
kānyakubje mahāhārau na prāpto bahumūlyakaḥ ||
tadorvīyādhipenaiva mahīśena prabodhitaḥ ||11||
yayau mahāvatīṃ ramyāṃ śivadattavaro balī ||
rurodha nagarīṃ sarvāṃ śrutvā rājā bhayāturaḥ ||12||
rudraṃ kapardinaṃ śaṃbhuṃ śaraṇyaṃ śaraṇaṃ yayau ||
śivājñayā nṛpo dhīmānbalaiḥ ṣaṣṭisahasrakaiḥ || 13 ||
sārddhaṃ purādbahiryātastribhiḥ śūraiḥ surakṣitaḥ ||
tasya nāgāḥ sahasraṃ ca deśarājaśca tatpatiḥ || 14 ||
hayāḥ ṣoḍaśasāhasrā vatsarājastu tatpatiḥ ||
śeṣāḥ padātayastasya tālanenaiva rakṣitāḥ || 15 ||
pranaṣṭo mulaṃ yuddhaṃ teṣāṃ vīravarakṣayam ||7
ahorātrapramāṇena mahadghoramavartata || 16 ||
te hatvā śātravīṃ senāṃ cakrurjayaravānmuhuḥ ||
bhayārtā nārmadeyāśca māhiṣmatinivāsinaḥ || 17 ||
dudruvuḥ sarvato vipra dṛṣṭvā tānkāliyo nṛpaḥ ||
āśvāsya prayayau yuddhamarddhasainyasamanvitaḥ || 18 ||
hṛdi kṛtvā mahādevaṃ mohanaṃ bāṇamādadhat ||
siddhamantraprabhāveṇa mohitāste babhūvire || 19 ||
śeṣāste śatravaḥ sarve ripughātāya saṃyayuḥ ||
alasāṃstānkapāleṣu jaghnuste bhayavarjitāḥ || 3.3.8.20 ||
bhīṣmasiṃhastathā dṛṣṭvā bodhayāmāsa sainikān ||
sūryadattena bāṇena saṃjñākhyānena tatra vai || || 21 ||
bhairavākhyena bhallena śatrudehamatāḍayat ||
mūrcchitaḥ so.apatadvīro gajapṛṣṭhe śarārditaḥ || 22 ||
tadā māhiṣmatī senā niryayau sā diśau daśa ||
muhūrtaṃ kaśmalaṃ prāpya punarutthāya kāliyaḥ || 23 ||
bhallena tacchiraḥ kāyādapāharata bhūmipaḥ ||
hate tasminmahāvīrye tālanādyā mahā balāḥ || 24 ||
kāliyaṃ te parājitya taṃ śatruṃ pratyaṣedhayan ||
mahākaṣṭānvito bhūpo dhyātvā manasi śaṃkaram || 25 ||
mohayitvā ripūnsarvān yayau svaṃ niveśanam ||
arddhasainyena sahitā hataśeṣāstrayastathā || 26 ||
tadā parimalo rājā dṛṣṭvā śatruparājayam ||
pariṣvajya mahāvīrānsva gehaṃ punarāyayau || 27 ||
jayacandrastu tacchutvā paraṃ vismayamāgataḥ ||
tālanaṃ ca samāhūya senādhīśamakarāyat || 28 ||
bhīṣmasiṃhe gate loke paṃcamāsāntare nṛpe ||
tatpatnī janayāmāsa putraratnaṃ śubhānanam || 29 ||
sā tu gurjarabhūpasya tanayākhyā madālasā ||
divyaṃ putraṃ samālokya mumude sagaṇā bhṛśam || 3.3.8.30 ||
śrutvā tajjanma nṛpatirvitatāra dhanaṃ bahu ||
āhūya gaṇakānprājñāñjātakarma hyakārayat || 31 ||
sahadevāṃśa evāsau bhuvi jātaḥ śivājñayā ||
devasiṃhaḥ kṛto nāma gaṇakaiḥ śāstraciṃtakaiḥ || 32 ||
iti śrībhaviṣye mahāpurāṇe pratisargaparvaṇi caturyugakhaṇḍāparaparyāye kaliyugīyetihāsasamuccaye.aṣṭamo.adhyāyaḥ || 8 || cha ||
|| sūta uvāca || ||
kāliyaṃ tau parājitya bhrātarau nṛpasevakau ||
gatau gopālake rāṣṭre bhūpatirdalavāhanaḥ || 1 ||
sahasracaṃḍikāhome nānābhūpasamāgame ||
gṛhītau mahiṣau tābhyāṃ bhūpairanyaiśca durjayau || 2 ||
pūrvaṃ hi nṛpakanyābhyāṃ pratyahaṃ baṃdhanaṃ gatau ||
tau saṃpūjya vidhānena dadau tābhyāṃ ca kanyake || 3 ||
devakīṃ deśarājāya brāhmīṃ tasyānujāya vai ||
dadau durgājñayā rājā rūpayauvanaśāli nīm || 4 ||
lakṣāvṛttiṃ tathā veśyāṃ gītanṛtyaviśāradām ||
kanyayośca sakhīṃ ramyāṃ meghamallārarāgiṇīm || 5 ||
śataṃ gajānrathānpaṃca hayāṃścaiva sahasrakān ||
catvāriṃśacca śibikāḥ pradadau dalavāhanaḥ || 6 ||
bahudravyayutāṃ kanyāṃ dāsadāsīsamanvitām ||
udūhya vedavidhinā prāpatuśca mahāvatīm || 7 ||
malanā tāṃ vadhūṃ dṛṣṭvā tasyai graiveyakaṃ dadau ||
brāhmyai ṣoḍaśaśṛṃgāraṃ tathā dvādaśabhūṣaṇam || 8 ||
rājā ca paramānandī deśarājāya śūriṇe ||
dadau daśapuraṃ ramyaṃ nānājananiṣevitam || 9 ||
ūṣatustatra tau vīrau rājamānyau mahābalau ||
etasminnantare jāto devasiṃho harājñayā || 3.3.9.10 ||
jāte tasminkumāre tu devakī garbhamādadhau ||
dāsaśrutā paterdevī suṣuve putramūrjitam || 1 1||
gaurāṃgaṃ kamalākṣaṃ ca dīpyamānaṃ svatejasā ||
tadānaṃdamayo devaḥ śakraḥ suragaṇaiḥ saha || 12 ||
śaṃkhaśabdaṃ cakāroccairjayaśabdaṃ punaḥpunaḥ ||
diśaḥ praphullitāścāsangrahāḥ sarve tathā divi || 13 ||
āyātā bahavo viprā vedaśāstraparāyaṇāḥ ||
cakruste jātakarmāsya nāmakarma tathāvidham || 14 ||
rāmāṃśaṃ taṃ śiśuṃ jñātvā prasannavadanaṃ śubham ||
bhādrakṛṣṇatithau ṣaṣṭhyāṃ candravāre.aruṇodaye || 15 ||
saṃjātaḥ kṛttikābhe ca pitṛvaṃśayaśaskaraḥ ||
āhlādanāmnā hyabhavatpraśritaśca mahītale || 16 ||
māsānte ca sute jāte brāhmī putramajījanat ||
dharmajāṃśaṃ tathā gauraṃ mahābāhuṃ suvakṣasam || 17 ||
tadā ca brāhmaṇāḥ sarve dṛṣṭvā bālaṃ śubhānanam ||
prasannavadanaṃ cāruṃ padmacihnapadasthitam || 18 ||
tairdvijaiśca kṛto nāmnā balakhānirmahābalaḥ ||
varṣānte vatsaje jātaṃ mūlagaṃḍāntasaṃbhavaḥ || 19 ||
cāmuṇḍo devakisuto nijavaṃśabhayaṃkaraḥ ||
janitāraṃ tatastyājya ityūcurdvijasattamāḥ ||
na tatyāja sutaṃ rājā bālatve.api dayāparaḥ || 3.3.9.20 ||
trivarṣāṃte gate tasminbalakhānau sute śubhe ||
śūdryāṃ jātaḥ śikhaṃḍayaṃśo rūpaṇo nāma viśrutaḥ || 21 ||
vatsarājo yayau deśe gurjare ca madālasām|
sa sutāṃ ca samādāya dine tasminsamāgataḥ || 22 ||
prāpte tasminvatsarāje jambukaḥ svabalairvṛtaḥ ||
saptalakṣaiśca saṃprāpto bāhuśālī yateṃdriyaḥ || 23 ||
rurodha nagarīṃ sarvāṃ rājñaḥ parimalasya vai ||
trilakṣaiśca māhāvatyai sārddhaṃ tau jagmatuḥ purāt || 24 ||
māhiṣmataiḥ saptalakṣaiḥ sārddhaṃ yuddhamabhūnmahat ||
trirātraṃ dāruṇaṃ ghoraṃ yamarāṣṭravivarddhanam || 25 ||
śivasya varadānena bhrātrorjātaḥ parājayaḥ ||
baddhvā tau jambuko rājā luṃṭhayitvā mahāvatīm || 26 ||
veśyāṃ lakṣāratiṃ tasya taṃ hataṃ tadgajaṃ tathā ||
graiveyakaṃ tathā hāraṃ maṇiratnavibhūṣitam || 27 ||
gṛhītvā nagarīṃ sarvāṃ bhasmayitvā gṛhaṃ yayau ||
ye guptā bhūtale śūrāste śeṣāśca tadā.abhavan ||28 ||
durgeṣu yāni ratnāni tāni prāpya mudā yayau ||
luṃṭhite nagare tasmindevakī garbhamuttamam || 29 ||
kṛṣṇāṃśaṃ saptamāsyaṃ hi cādadhāddaivatapriyā ||
jñātvā kulādhamaṃ putraṃ cāmuṃḍaṃ devakī satī || 3.3.9.30 ||
kalpakṣetraṃ samāgamya kāliṃdyāṃ tamapātayat||
yojanānte gate tasmitmahīrājapurohitaḥ ||31||
sāmanto nāma taṃ gṛhya śvaśurālayamāyayau ||
jātastu daśamāsānte rātrau ghoratamovṛte || 32 ||
bhādrakṛṣṇāṣṭamīsaumye brāhmanakṣatrasaṃyute ||
prādurāsījjagannātho devakyāṃ ca mahottamaḥ || 33 ||
śyāmāṃgaḥ sa ca padmākṣa iṃdranīlamaṇidyutiḥ ||
vimānānāṃ sahasrāṇāṃ prakāśaḥ samajāyata || 34 ||
vismitā jananī tatra dṛṣṭvā bālaṃ tamadbhutam ||
nagare ca mahāścaryaṃ jātaṃ sarve samāyayuḥ || 35 ||
udayaḥ kimaho jāto devānāṃ sūryarūpakaḥ ||
ityāścaryyajujāṃ teṣāṃ vāguvācāśarīriṇī || 36 ||
kṛṣṇāṃśo bhūtale jātaḥ sarvānandapradāyakaḥ ||
sa nāmnodayasiṃho hi sarvaśatruprakāśahā || 37 ||
ityākāśavacaḥ śrutvā te paraṃ harṣa māyayuḥ ||
yasminkāle suto jātastadā ca malanā satī || 38 ||
śyāmāṃgaṃ sundaraṃ bālaṃ sarvalakṣaṇalakṣitam ||
suṣuve paramodāraṃ phālgunāṃśaṃ śivājñayā || 39 ||
tadā tu nagarī sarvā harṣabhūtā babhūva ha ||
ṣaṣṭhāhani sute jāte brahmānandaguṇākare || 3.3.9.40 ||
brāhmī tu suṣuve putraṃ pārṣadāṃśaṃ mahābalam ||
śyāmāṃgaṃ kamalākṣaṃ ca dṛḍhaskandhaṃ mahābhujam || 41 ||
brāhmaṇāśca tadāgatya jātakarma hyakārayan ||
sukhakhānirdvijairnāmnā kṛtastu gaṇakottamaiḥ || 42 ||
krameṇa varddhitā bālāḥ sarvalokaśivaṃkarāḥ ||
teṣāṃ kālī mahacchreṣṭhā pitṛmātṛpriyaṃkarī || 43 ||
tṛtīyābde vayaḥ prāpte kṛṣṇāṃśe balavattare ||
śakrastaddarśanakāṃkṣī hayārūḍho jagāma ha || 44 ||
krīḍansa candanāraṇye kṛṣṇāṃśo bhrātṛbhiḥ saha ||
nabhasthaṃ puruṣaṃ dṛṣṭvā sahasrākṣaṃ jahāsa vai || 45 ||
aśvinī hariṇī divyā uccaiḥśravasamantike ||
gatvā garbhamupādāya svagehaṃ punarāyayau || 46 ||
varṣāṃtare ca suṣuve kapotaṃ tanayaṃ śubham ||
pañcābdaṃ ca samāyāte vidyādhyanamāsthitāḥ || 47 ||
brāhmaṇaṃ śivaśarmāṇaṃ sarvavidyāviśāradam ||
svabhaktyā sevanaṃ kṛtvā te cakrurvedapāṭhikām || 48 ||
aṣṭābde caiva kṛṣṇāṃśo nāmapatrādikāṃ kriyām ||
likhatāṃ bālakānāṃ ca kṛṣṇāṃśaḥ śreṣṭhatāmagāt || 49 ||
iti śrībhaviṣye mahāpurāṇe pratisargaparvaṇi caturyugakhaṇḍāparaparyāye kaliyugīyetihāsasamuccaye kṛṣṇāṃśāvatāro nāma navamo.adhyāyaḥ || 9 || || cha || |
sūta uvāca || ||
navamābdaṃ vayaḥ prāpte kṛṣṇāṃśo balavattaraḥ ||
paṭhitvānvīkṣikīṃ vidyāṃ catuḥṣaṣṭikalāstathā || 1 ||
dharmaśāstraṃ tathaivāpi sarvaśreṣṭhaṃ babhūva ha ||
tasminkāle bhṛguśreṣṭha mahīrājo nṛpottamaḥ || 2 ||
karārthaṃ preṣayāmāsa svasainyaṃ ca mahāvatīm ||
te vai lakṣaṃ mahāśūrāḥ sarvaśastrāstradhāriṇaḥ || 3 ||
ūcuḥ parimalaṃ bhūpaṃ śṛṇu caṃdrakulodbhava ||
sarve ca bhārate varṣe ye rājāno mahābalāḥ || 4 ||
ṣaḍaṃśaṃ karamādāyāsmadrājāya dadaṃti vai ||
bhavānkare hi tasyaiva yogyo bhavati sāṃpratam || 5||
adyaprabhṛti cedrājñe tasmai dadyātkaraṃ na hi ||
mahīrājasya raudrāstraiḥ kṣayaṃ yāsyati sainikaiḥ || 6 ||
ye bhūpā jayacaṃdrasya pakṣagāste hi tadbhayāt ||
dadaṃte bhūmirājāya daṃḍaṃ tanmānasatkṛtāḥ || 7 ||
iti śrutvā sa nṛpatistasmai rājñe mahātmane||
karaṃ ṣaḍaṃśamādāya dadau prītisamanvitaḥ || 8 ||
daśalakṣamitaṃ dravyaṃ gṛhītvā te samāyayuḥ ||
mahīrājaḥ prasannātmā pūrvavairamapāharat || 9 ||
tadā te lakṣaśūrāśca kānyakubjamupāyayuḥ ||
jayacaṃdraṃ tu natvocuḥ śṛṇu lakṣaṇakovida || 3.3.10.10 ||
pṛthvīrājo mahārājo daṃḍaṃ tvattaḥ samicchati ||
ityuktastairvaiṣṇavāstrī lakṣaṇastānuvāca ha || 11 ||
maddeśe maṃḍalīkāśca bahavaḥ saṃti sāṃpratam ||
bhūmirājo māṃḍaliko mayi jīvati mā bhavet || 12 ||
ityuktvā vaiṣṇavāstraṃ tānkruddhaḥ sa ca samādadhat ||
tadastrajvālataḥ sarve bhayabhītā pradudruvuḥ || 13 ||
mahīrājastu tacchrutvā mahadbhayamupāgamat ||
daśābdaṃ ca vayaḥ prāpte kṛṣṇāṃśe mallakovide || 14 ||
nānāmallāḥ samājagmustena rājñaiva satkṛtāḥ ||
teṣāṃ madhye sa kṛṣṇāṃśo bāhuśālī babhūva ha || 15 ||
urvīyādhipateḥ putraḥ ṣoḍaśābdavayā balī ||
śatamallaiśca sahitaḥ kadācitsa samāgataḥ || 16 ||
pitṛṣvasṛpatiṃ bhūpaṃ natvā nāmnā.abhayo balī ||
uvāca śṛṇu bhūpāla kṛṣṇo.ayaṃ madamattaraḥ || 17 ||
tena sārddhaṃ bhavenmallayuddhaṃ mama nṛpottama ||
iti vajrasamaṃ vākyaṃ śrutvā rājā bhayāturaḥ || 10 ||
uvāca śyālajaṃ premṇā bhavānyuddhaviśāradaḥ ||
aṣṭābdo.ayaṃ sutaḥ snigdho mama prāṇasamo bhuvi || 19 ||
kva bhavānvajrasadṛśaḥ kva suto.ayaṃ sukomalaḥ ||
anyairmallairmadīyaiśca sārddhaṃ yogyo bhavānraṇe ||3.3.10.20||
iti śrutvā nṛpaḥ syālo mahīpatiriti smṛtaḥ ||
sa tamāha ruṣāviṣṭo bālo.ayaṃ balavattaraḥ || 21 ||
śṛṇu tatkāraṇaṃ bhūpa yathā jñāto mayā śiśuḥ ||
āgaskṛtaṃ mahīrājaṃ matvā satilakaḥ sutam || 22 ||
paṃḍitāṃśca samāhūya muhūrtaṃ pṛṣṭavānmudā ||
gaṇeśo nāma matimāñjyotiśśāstraviśāradaḥ || 23 ||
lakṣaṇaṃ vacanaṃ prāha mahīrājamanuttamam ||
śivadattavaro rājankubera iva sāṃpratam || 24 ||
kṛṣṇāṃśastasya yogyo.ayaṃ deśarājasuto.avaraḥ ||
nānyo.asti bhūtale rājansatyaṃ satyaṃ bravīmyaham ||| 25 ||
tacchrutvā lakṣaṇo vīraḥ pūrve barhiṣmatīṃ prati ||
kalpakṣetraṃ dakṣiṇe ca bhūmigrāmaṃ tu paścime || 26 ||
uttare naimiṣāraṇyaṃ svakīyaṃ rāṣṭramādadhat ||
ataḥ śreṣṭhaḥ kumāro.ayaṃ kānyakubje mayā śrutaḥ || 27 ||
nāgotsave ca bhūpāla paṃcamyāṃ ca nabhassite ||
dṛśyamātraṃ kumārāṃgaṃ tasmādyogyo hyayaṃ sutaḥ || 28 ||
iti śrutvā sa kṛṣṇāṃśo vākchareṇa prapīḍitaḥ|
abhayaṃ bhujayoḥ śīghraṃ gṛhītvā so.ayudhadbalī || 29 ||
kṣaṇamātraṃ raṇaṃ kṛtvā bhūmimadhye tamakṣipat ||
abhayasya bhujo bhagnastatra jāto balena vai || 3.3.10.30 ||
mūrcchitaṃ svasutaṃ jñātvā khaḍgahasto mahīpatiḥ ||
preṣayāmāsa tānmallānkṛṣṇāṃśasya prahāraṇe || 31 ||
ruṣāviṣṭāṃśca tāñjñātvā kṛṣṇāṃśo balavattaraḥ ||
tānekaikaṃ samākṣipya vijayī sa babhūva ha || 32 ||
parājite mallabale khaḍgahasto mahīpatiḥ ||
maraṇāya matiṃ cakre kṛṣṇāṃśasya prabhāvataḥ ||33||
jñātvā tamīdṛśaṃ bhūpaṃ vārayāmāsa bhūpatiḥ ||
abhayaṃ nīrujaṃ kṛtvā premṇā gehamavāsayat || 34 ||
navābdāṃge ca kṛṣṇāṃśe cāhlādādyāḥ kumārakāḥ||
mṛgayārthe dadhuścittaṃ tamūcurbhūpatiṃ priyam ||35||
namaste tāta bhūpāgrya sarvānaṃdapradāyaka ||
asmabhyaṃ tvaṃ hayāndehi matpriyānkaruṇākara || 36 ||
iti śrutvā vacasteṣāṃ tathetyuktvā mahīpatiḥ ||
bhūtale vāsino.aśvānvai divyānrāṭ caturo varān || 37 ||
dadau tebhyo mudā yukto hariṇīgarbhasaṃbhavān ||
ṛṣaya ūcuḥ ||
tvanmukhena śrutaṃ sūta hariṇī vaḍavā yathā||38 ||
bhīṣmasiṃhāya saṃprāptā śakrāddeveśato mune ||
idānīṃ śrotumicchāmaḥ kuto jātāsturaṃgamāḥ || 39 ||
divyāṃgā bhūṣaṇāpannā nabhassalilagāminaḥ ||
|| sūta uvāca ||
deśarājena bhūpena purā dharmayutena vai||3.3.10.40||
sevanaṃ bhāskarasyaiva kṛtaṃ ca dvādaśābdikam ||
sevānte bhagavānsūryo varaṃ brūhi tamabravīt|| || 41 ||
prāha deva namastubhyaṃ yadi deyo varastvayā ||
hayaṃ divyamayaṃ dehi nabhasthalajalātigam || 42 ||
tathetyuktvā raviḥ sākṣāddadau tasmai papihakam ||
lokānpāti papīrjñeyastasyedaṃ nāma cottamam || 43 ||
ataḥ papīhako nāma lokapālanakarmavān ||
sa hayo madamattaśca hariṇīṃ divyarūpiṇīm || 44 ||
bubhuje smaravegena tasyāṃ jātāsturaṃgamāḥ ||
manorathaśca pītāṃgaḥ karālaḥ kṛṣṇarūpakaḥ || 45 ||
ekagarbhe samudbhūtau śaibyasugrīvakāṃśakau ||
yasmindine samudbhūtau jiṣṇuviṣṇukalāṃśataḥ || 6 ||
tadā jātau hariṇyāśca meghapuṣpabalāhakau ||
bindulaśca suvarṇāṃgaḥ śvetāṃgo harināgaraḥ|| 47 ||
divyāṃgāste hi catvāraḥ pūrvaṃ jātā mahābalāḥ ||
paścādaṃśāvatārāśca jātāsteṣāṃ mahātmanām || 48 ||
iti te kathitaṃ vipra śṛṇu tatra kathāṃ śubhām ||
bhūtale te hayāḥ sarve prāptāścoparibhūmigāḥ || 49 ||
devasiṃhāya baline dadau cāśvaṃ manoratham ||
āhlādāya karālaṃ ca kṛṣṇāṃśāyaiva bindulam || 3.3.10.50 ||
brahmānaṃdāya putrāya pradadau harināgaram ||
te catvāro hayārūḍhā mṛgayārthaṃ vanaṃ yayuḥ || 51 ||
hariṇīṃ vaḍavāṃ śubhrāṃ balakhāniḥ samāruhat ||
tadanu prayayau vīro vanaṃ siṃhaniṣevitam || 52 ||
āhlādenaiva śārdūlo hataḥ prāṇibhayaṃkaraḥ ||
devasiṃhena siṃhaśca sūkaro balakhāninā || 53 ||
brahmānaṃdena hariṇo hatastatra mahāvane ||
mṛgāḥ śataṃ hatāstaiśca tāngṛhītvā gṛhaṃ yayuḥ || 54 ||
etasminnaṃtare devī śāradā ca śubhānanā ||
mṛgī svarṇamayī bhūtvā teṣāmagre pradhāvitā ||55||
dṛṣṭvā tāṃ mohitāḥ sarve svaiḥ svairbāṇairatāḍayan ||
śarāstu saṃkṣayaṃ jagmurmṛgyaṃge balavattarāḥ ||56||
āhlādādyāśca te śūrā vismitāśca babhūvire ||
tasminkāle sa kṛà¥ṣṇāṃgo bāṇenaiva hyatāḍayat ||57||
tadā ca pīḍitā devī bhayabhītā yayau vanam ||
kṛṣṇāṃśaḥ krodhatāmrākṣastatpaścātprayayau balī ||58||
vanāṃtaraṃ ca saṃprāpya devī dhṛtvā svakaṃ vapuḥ ||
tamuvāca prasannākṣī parīkṣā te mayā kṛtā || 59 ||
yadā te ca bhayaṃ bhūyāttadā tvaṃ māṃ sadā smara ||
sādhayiṣyāmi te kāryaṃ kṛṣṇāṃśo hi bhavānvibhuḥ || 3.3.10.60 ||
ityuktvāntarhitā devī śāradā sarvamaṃgalā ||
kṛṣṇāṃśastu yayau gehaṃ taiśca sārddhaṃ mudā yutaḥ || 61 ||
tadā parākramaṃ teṣāṃ dṛṣṭvā rājā sukho.abhavat ||
gṛhe gṛhe ca sarveṣāṃ lakṣmīrdevī samāviśat || 62 || ||
iti śrībhaviṣye mahāpurāṇe pratisargaparvaṇi caturyugakhaṇḍāparaparyāye kaliyugīyetihāsasamuccaye daśamo.a dhyāyaḥ || 10 || || cha ||
|| sūta uvāca || ||
daśābde ca vayaḥ prāpte viṣṇoḥ śaktyavatārake ||
vasaṃtasamaye ramye yayuste pramadāvanam || || 1 ||
ūṣustatra vratācāre mādhave kṛṣṇavallabhe ||
snātvā ca sāgare prātaḥ pūjayāmāsuraṃbikām || 2 ||
ṛtukālodbhavaiḥ puṣpairdhūpairdīpairvidhānataḥ ||
japtvā saptaśatīstotraṃ dadhyuḥ sarvakarīṃ śivām || 3 ||
kaṃdamūlaphalāhārā jīvahiṃsāvivarjitāḥ ||
teṣāṃ bhaktiṃ samālokya māsāṃte jagadaṃbikā ||4 ||
dadau tebhyo varaṃ ramyaṃ tacchṛṇudhvaṃ samāhitāḥ||
āhlādāya suratvaṃ ca balatvaṃ balakhānaye || 5 ||
kālajñatvaṃ ca devāya brahmajñatvaṃ nṛpāya ca|||
kṛṣṇāṃśāyaiva yogatvaṃ dattvā cāṃtardadhe śivā || 6 ||
kṛtakṛtyāstadā te vai svagehaṃ punarāyayuḥ ||
teṣāṃ prāpte vare ramye malanā putramūrjitam ||7||
śyāmāṃgaṃ sātyakeraṃśaṃ suṣuve śubhalakṣaṇam ||
sa jñeyo raṇajicchūro rājanyapriyakārakaḥ || 8 ||
āṣāḍhe māsi saṃprāpte kṛṣṇāṃśo hayavāhanaḥ ||
urvīyāṃ nagarīṃ prāpta ekākī nirbhayo valī || 9 ||
dṛṣṭvā sa nagarīṃ ramyāṃ caturvarṇaniṣevitām ||
dvijaśālāṃ yayau śūro dvijadhenuprapūjakaḥ || 3.3.11.10 ||
dattvā svarṇaṃ dvijātibhyaḥ saṃtarpya dvijadevatāḥ ||
mahīpatigṛhaṃ ramyaṃ jagāma balavattaraḥ || 11 ||
natvā sa mātulaṃ dhīmāṃstathānyā~mśca sabhāsadaḥ || 12 ||
tadā nṛpājñayā śūrā baṃdhanāya samudyatāḥ ||
khaṅgahastāḥ samājagmuryathā siṃhaṃ gajāḥ śaśāḥ || 13 ||
mohitaṃ taṃ nṛpaṃ kṛtvā duṣṭabuddhirmahīpatiḥ ||
kṛtvā lohamayaṃ jālaṃ tasyopari samādadheḥ || 14 ||
etasminnaṃtare vīro bodhito devamāyayā ||
āgaskṛtānripūñjñātvā khaṅgahastaḥ samāvadhīt || 15 ||
hatvā paṃcaśataṃ śūro hayārūḍho mahābalī ||
urvīyāṃ nagarīṃ prāpya jalapāne mano dadhau 16 ||
kūpe dṛṣṭvā śubhā nāryo ghaṭapūrtikarīstadā ||
uvāca madhuro vākyaṃ dehi suṃdari me jalam || 17 ||
dṛṣṭvā tāḥ suṃdaraṃ rūpaṃ mohanāyopacakrire ||
bhittvā tāsāṃ tu vai kumbhānpāyayitvā hayaṃ jalam || 18 ||
vanaṃ gatvā ripuṃ jitvā baddhvā tamubhayaṃ balī ||
caṇḍikāpārśvamāgamya tadvadhāya mano dadhe || 19 ||
śrutvā sa karuṇaṃ vākyaṃ tyaktvā svanagaraṃ yayau ||
nṛpāṃtikamupāgamya varṇayāmāsa kāraṇam || 3.3.11.20 ||
śrutvā parimalo rājā dvijātibhyo dadau dhanam ||
samāghrāya sa kṛṣṇāṃśaṃ kṛtakṛtyo.abhavannṛpaḥ || 21 ||
saṃprāptaikādaśadābde tu kṛṣṇāṃśe yuddhadurmade ||
mahīpatirnirutsāhaḥ prayayau dehalīṃ prati || 22 ||
baliṃ yathocitaṃ dattvā bhaginyai bhayakātaraḥ ||
ruroda vahudhā duḥkhaṃ deśarājātmajaprajam || 23 ||
agamā bhaginī tasya dṛṣṭvā bhrātaramāturam ||
svapatiṃ varṇayāmāsa śrutvā rājābravīdidam || 24 ||
adyāhaṃ svabalaiḥ sārddhaṃ gatvā tatra mahāvatīm ||
haniṣyāmi mahāduṣṭaṃ deśarājasutaṃ ripum || 25 ||
ityuktvā dhuṃdhukāraṃ ca samāhūya mahābalam ||
sainyamājñāpayāmāsa saptalakṣaṃ tanutyajam || 26 ||
kecicchūrā hayārūḍhā uṣṭrārūḍhā mahābalāḥ ||
gajārūḍhā rathārūḍhāḥ saṃyayuśca padātayaḥ || 27 ||
devasiṃhastu kālajñaḥ śrutvā cāgamanaṃ ripoḥ ||
nṛpapārśvaṃ samāgamya sarvaṃ rājñe nyavedayat || 28 ||
śrutvā parimalo rājā vihvalo.abhūdbhayāturaḥ ||
balakhānistamutthāya harṣayukta ivāha ca || || 29 ||
adyāhaṃ ca mahīrājaṃ dhuṃdhukāraṃ sasainyakam ||
jitvā daṃḍyaṃ ca bhavataḥ kariṣyāmi tavājñayā || 3.3.11.30 ||
ityuktvā taṃ namaskṛtya senāpatirabhūnmune ||
tadā tu nirbhayā vīrā dṛṣṭvā rājānamāturam || 31 ||
caturlakṣabalaiḥ sārddhaṃ te yuddhāya samāyayuḥ ||
śiṃśapākhyaṃ vanaṃ ghoraṃ chedayitvā ripostadā || 32 ||
ūṣustatra raṇe mattāḥ sarvaśatrubhayaṃkarāḥ ||
etasminnantare tatra dhuṃdhukārādayo balā || 33 ||
kṛtvā kolāhalaṃ śabdaṃ yuddhāya samupāyayuḥ ||
pūrvāhṇe tu bhṛguśreṣṭha sannaddhāste śataghnipāḥ || 34 ||
śataghnībhistrisāhasraiḥ pañcasāhasrakā yayuḥ ||
dvisahasraśataghnībhiḥ sahitā ścandravaṃśinaḥ || 35 ||
sainyaṃ ṣaṣṭisahasraṃ ca svagarlokamupāyayau ||
tadarddhaṃ ca tathā sainyaṃ mahīrājasya saṃkṣitam || 36 ||
dudruvurbhīrukāḥ śūrā valakhānerdiśo daśa ||
rathā rathai raṇe hanyurgajāścaiva gajaistathā || 37 ||
hayā hayaistathā uṣṭrā uṣṭrapaiśca samāhanan ||
evaṃ sutumule jāte dāruṇe roma harṣaṇe || 38 ||
hāhābhūtānsvakīyāṃśca sainyāndṛṣṭvā mahābalān ||
aparāhṇe bhṛguśreṣṭha pañca śūrāḥ samāyayuḥ || 39 ||
brahmānaṃdaḥ śaraiḥ śatrūnanayadyamasādanam ||
devasiṃhastathā bhallairāhrādastatra tomaraiḥ || 3.3.11.40 ||
balakhāniḥ svakhaḍgena kṛṣṇāṃśastu tathaiva ca ||
dvilakṣānkṣatriyāñjaghnuḥ sarvasainyaiḥ samaṃ tataḥ || 41 ||
dṛṣṭvā parājitaṃ sainyaṃ dhuṃdhukāro mahābalaḥ ||
āhlādaṃ ca svabhallena gajārūḍhaḥ samāvadhīt || 42 ||
āhlāde mūrcchite tatra devasiṃho mahābalaḥ ||
bhallena bhrātaraṃ tasya daṃśayāmāsa vegataḥ || 43 ||
sa tīkṣṇavraṇamāsādya gajasthaḥ saṃmumoha vai ||
āgatāḥ śatarājāno nānādeśyā mahābalāḥ || 44 ||
śastrāṇyastrāṇi teṣāṃ tu chittvā khaṅgena vatsajaḥ ||
svakhaḍgena śirāṃsyeṣāṃ pātayāmāsa bhūtale || 45 ||
hate śatrusamūhe tu taccheṣāstu pradudruvuḥ ||
mahīrājastu balavāndṛṣṭvā bhagnaṃ svasainyakam || 46 ||
ājagāma gajārūḍhaḥ śivadattavaro balī ||
raudreṇāstreṇa hṛdaye cāvadhīdvatsajaṃ ripum || 47 ||
āhlādaṃ ca tathā vīraṃ devaṃ parimalātmajam ||
mūrcchayitvā mahāvīrāñchatrusainyamupāgamat || 48 ||
pūjayitvā śataghnīśca mahāvadhamakārayat ||
ropaṇastvarito gatvā rājñe sarvamavarṇayat || 49 ||
etasminnaṃtare vīraḥ sukhakhānirmahābalaḥ |
kapotaṃ hayamāruhya nabhomārgeṇa cāgamat || 3.3.11.50 ||
mūrcchayitvā mahīrājaṃ svabaṃdhūṃśca savāhanān ||
kṛtvā nṛpāṃtamāgamya baṃdhanāya samudyataḥ || 51 ||
tadotthāya mahīrājo mahādevena bodhitaḥ ||
punastānsvaśarai raudrairmūrcchayāmāsa kopavān || 52 ||
sukhakhānyādikāñchūrānsaṃbadhya nigaḍairdṛḍhaiḥ ||
nṛpaṃ parimalaṃ prāpya punaryuddhamacīkarat || 53 ||
hāhābhūtaṃ svasainyaṃ ca dṛṣṭvā sa udayo hariḥ ||
nabhomārge hayaṃ kṛtvā tāḥ śatadhnīranāśayat || 54 ||
mahīrājagajaṃ prāpya baddhvā taṃ nigaḍairbalo ||
āhlādapārśvamāgamya bhrātre bhūpaṃ samarpayat || 55 ||
tadā tu pṛthivīrājo lajjitastena nirjitaḥ ||
pañcakoṭidhanaṃ dattvā svagehaṃ punarāyayau || 56 ||
devasiṃhājñayā śūro balakhānirhi vatsajaḥ ||
tairdravyairnagarīṃ ramyāṃ kārayāmāsa sundarīm || 57 ||
śirīṣākhyaṃ puraṃ nāma tena vīreṇa vai kṛtam ||
sarvavarṇasamāyuktaṃ dvikrośāyāmasaṃmitam || 58 ||
tatraiva nyavasadvīro vatsajaḥ svakulaiḥ saha ||
triṃśatkośe kṛtaṃ rāṣṭraṃ tatraiva balakhāninā || 59 ||
śrutvā parimalo rājā tatrāgatya mudānvitaḥ ||
āghrāya vatsajaṃ śūraṃ deśarājasutaṃ tathā || 3.3.11.60 ||
brahmānaṃdena sahitaḥ svagehaṃ punarāyayau || 61 || ||
iti śrībhaviṣye mahāpurāṇe pratisargaparvaṇi caturyugakhaṃḍāparaparyāye kaliyugīyetihāsasamuccaye ekādaśo .adhyāyaḥ || 11 || || cha ||
|| sūta uvāca || ||
dvādaśābde hi kṛṣṇāṃśe yathājātaṃ tathā śṛṇu ||
iṣaśukladaśamyāṃ ca rājñāṃ jātaḥ samāgamaḥ || 1 ||
kānyakubje mahāramye nānābhūpāḥ samāyayuḥ ||
śrutvā parājayaṃ rājño mahīrājasya lakṣaṇaḥ || 2 ||
kṛṣṇāṃśadarśane vāṃchā tasya cāsīttadā mune ||
pitṛvyaṃ bhūpatiṃ prāha draṣṭuṃ yāsyāmi taṃ śubham || 3 ||
jito yena mahīrājaḥ sarvalokaprapūjitaḥ ||
iti śrutvā vacastasya jayacaṃdro mahīpatiḥ ||
bhrātṛjaṃ praṇataṃ prāha śṛṇu śuklayaśaskara ||4||
rājarājapadaṃ te hi kathaṃ saṃhartumicchasi||
ityuktvā jayacaṃdrastu tadājñāṃ naiva dattavān || 5 ||
rājānaste ca sahitāḥ svasainyaiḥ parivāritāḥ ||
kṛṣṇāṃśaṃ draṣṭumicchantaḥ saṃyayuśca mahīpatim || 6 ||
śirīṣākhyapurasthaṃ ca jñātvā kṛṣṇāṃśamuttamam ||
mahīpatiṃ puraskṛtya samājagmurnṛpāstadā || 7 ||
dadṛśustaṃ mahātmānaṃ puṃḍarīkanibhānanam ||
prasannavadanāḥ sarve praśaśaṃsuḥ samaṃtataḥ || 8 ||
tadā mahīpatiḥ kruddho vacanaṃ prāha bhūpatīn ||
yasyeyaṃ ca kṛtā ślāghā yuṣmābhirdūravāsibhiḥ ||
pitarau tasya balinau māhiṣmatyāṃ mṛtiṃ gatau || 9 ||
jambuko nāma bhūpālo nārmadīyaiḥ samanvitaḥ ||
baddhvā tau prayayau gehaṃ luṃṭhayitvā dhanaṃ bahu ||
śilāpatre samāropya tayorgātramacūrṇayat ||
śirasī ca tayośchittvā vaṭavṛkṣe samāruhat || 3.3.12.10 ||
adyāpi tau sthitau vīrau hā putreti prabhāṣiṇau ||
pretadehe ca pitarau yasya prāpto mahābalo ||
tasyodayo vṛthā jñeyo vṛthākīrtiḥ priyaṃkarī || 11 ||
iti śrutvā sa kṛṣṇāṃśo bhūpatīnprāha namradhīḥ ||
gatau matpitarau sārddhaṃ gurjare yatra vai raṇaḥ || 12 ||
mlecchairnarāśanaiḥ sārddhaṃ tannṛpeṇa raṇo.abhavat ||
deśarājo vatsarājo yuddhaṃ kṛtvā bhayaṃkaram ||
mlecchaistaiśca hatau tatra śruteyaṃ viśrutā kathā ||13||
mātulenādya kathitaṃ navīnaṃ maraṇaṃ tayoḥ||
cetsatyaṃ vacanaṃ tasya pauruṣaṃ mama paśyata ||14||
ityuktvā tānsa kṛṣṇāṃśo mātaraṃ prāha satvaram ||
hetuṃ ca varṇayāmāsa bhāṣitaṃ ca mahīpateḥ || 15 ||
śrutvā vajrasamaṃ vākyaṃ ruroda jananī tadā ||
nottaraṃ pradadau mātā pati duḥkhena duḥkhitā ||16||
jñātvā pitṛvadhaṃ śrutvā jambukaṃ śivakiṃkaram ||
manasā sa ca kṛṣṇāṃśastuṣṭāva parameśvarīm ||17||
jaya jaya jaya jagadamba bhavāni hyakhilalokasurapitṛmunikhāni ||
tvayā tataṃ sacarācarameva viśvaṃ pātamidaṃ hṛtameva || 18 ||
iti dhyātvā sa kṛṣṇāṃśaḥ suṣvāpa nijasa dmani ||
tadā bhagavatī tuṣṭā tālanaṃ balavattaram ||
mohayitvāśu tatpārśve preṣayāmāsa sarvagā || 19 ||
caturlakṣabalaiḥ sārddhaṃ tālanaḥ śīghramāgataḥ ||
svasainyaṃ codayāmāsa caikalakṣaṃ mahābalam ||3.3.12.20||
balakhānistadā prāptaścaikalakṣabalānvitaḥ ||
anujaṃ tatra saṃsthāpya śirīṣākhye mahābalaḥ ||21||
sajjībhūtānsamālokya tānudyāne sasainyakān ||
bhītaḥ parimalo rājā kṛṣṇāṃśaṃ prati cāyayau || 22 ||
vihvalaṃ nṛpamālokya kṛṣṇāṃśo.a.aśvāsayanmudā || 23 ||
lakṣasainyaṃ tadīyaṃ ca gṛhītvā cādhipo.abhavat ||
śataghnyaḥ paṃcasāhasrā nānāvarṇāḥ suvāhanāḥ || 24 ||
patākāḥ pañcasāhasrāḥ sāhasraṃ kāṣṭhakāriṇaḥ ||
gajā daśasahasrāśca rathāḥ paṃcasahasrakāḥ || 25 ||
trilakṣāśca hayāḥ sarve uṣṭrā daśasahasrakāḥ ||
śeṣāḥ padātayo jñeyāsta sminsainye bhayānake || 26 ||
tālanaśca samāyātaḥ sarvasenādhipo.abhavat ||
devasiṃho rathānāṃ ca sarveṣāmīśvaro.abhavat || 27 ||
balakhānirhayānāṃ ca sarveṣāmadhipo.abhavat ||
āhlādaśca gajānāṃ ca sarveṣāmadhipo.abhavat ||
pattīnāṃ caiva sarveṣāṃ kṛṣṇāṃśaścādhipo.abhavat || 28 ||
natvā te malanāṃ bhūpo dattvā dānānyanekaśaḥ ||
samāyayuśca te sarve dakṣiṇāśāṃ balānvitāḥ || 29 ||
pakṣamātragataḥ kālo mārge tasminraṇaiṣiṇām ||
chittvā tatra vanaṃ ghoraṃ nānākaṃṭakasaṃyutam ||
senāṃ nivāsayāmāsurnirbhayāste mahābalāḥ || 3.3.12.30 ||
devasiṃhamatenaiva yoginaste tadābhavan ||
nartakaścaiva kṛṣṇāṃśaścāhlādo ḍamarupriyaḥ || 31||
maḍḍudhārī tadā devo vīṇādhārī ca tālanaḥ ||
vatsajaḥ kāṃsyadhārī ca balakhānirmahābalaḥ || 32 ||
māturagre sthitāste vai nanṛtuḥ premavihvalāḥ||
mohitā devakī cāsīnna jñātaṃ tatra kāraṇam || 33||
mohitāṃ mātaraṃ dṛṣṭvā paraṃ harṣamupāyayuḥ ||
tadā tāṃ kathayāmāsurvayaṃ te tanayā hi bhoḥ || 34 ||
natvā tāṃ prayayuḥ sarve purīṃ māhiṣmatīṃ śubhām ||
nagaraṃ mohayāmāsurvādyagānaviśāradāḥ || 35 ||
dūtyā sārddhaṃ riporgehaṃ yayuste kāryatatparāḥ ||
nṛtyagānasuvādyaiśca rājñaste mohane ratāḥ || 36 ||
visaṃjñāṃ mahiṣīṃ kṛtvā kṛṣṇāṃśaḥ sarvamohanaḥ ||
prāptavāṃstatra yatrāsau tatsutā vijayaiṣiṇī || 37 ||
dṛṣṭvā sā suṃdaraṃ rūpaṃ śyāmāṃgaṃ puruṣottamam ||
mumoha vaśamāpannā maithunārthaṃ samudyatā || 38 ||
dṛṣṭvā tathā gatāṃ nārīṃ kṛṣṇāṃśaḥ ślakṣṇayā girā ||
śatrorbhedaṃ ca papraccha kāminīṃ madavihvalām ||39||
sāha bho devakīputra yadi pāṇiṃ grahīṣyasi||
tarhi te kathayiṣyāmi piturbhedaṃ hi dāruṇam || 3.3.12.40 ||
tathetyuktvā sa balavā~mstasyāḥ pāṇiṃ gṛhītavān ||
jñātvā bhedaṃ ripoḥ sarvaṃ tāmāśvāsya yayau mudā ||41||
etasminnantare rājñī bādhitā prāha yoginam ||
deśarājapriyāhāraṃ navalakṣasya mūlyakam ||
tubhyaṃ dāsyāmi saṃtuṣṭā nṛtyagānavimohitā || 42 ||
iti śrutvā vatsasutastāṃ praśasya gṛhītavān ||
prayayau baṃdhubhiḥ sārddhaṃ jambūko yatra tiṣṭhati || 43 ||
nanarta tatra kṛṣṇāṃśo balakhāniragāyata ||
āhlādastālano devo dadhmurvādyagatīrmudā || 44 ||
mohito.abhūnnṛpastatra kāliyaḥ svajanaiḥ saha ||
kāmaṃ varaya kṛṣṇāṃga yacca te hṛdaye sthitam || 45 ||
iti śrutvā vacaḥ śatrorbalakhānirmahābalaḥ ||
tamāha bho mahīpāla lakṣāvartirvarāṃganā ||
svavidyāṃ darśayenmahyaṃ tadā tṛptiṃ vrajāmyaham || 46 ||
iti śrutvā tathā matvā lakṣāvartiṃ nṛpottamaḥ ||
sabhāyāṃ nartayāmāsa deśarājapriyāṃ tathā || 47 ||
sā veśyā sutamāhlādaṃ jñātvā yogitvamāgatam ||
ruroda tatra duḥkhārtā netrādaśrūṇi muṃcatī || 48 ||
ruditāṃ tāṃ samālokya rudannāhlāda eva saḥ ||
svabhujau tāḍayāmāsa tatpriyārthe mahābalaḥ || 49 ||
kṛṣṇāṃśastatra taṃ hāraṃ tasyāḥ kaṃṭhe pradattavān ||
uvāca krodhatāmrākṣastāmāśvāsya punaḥpunaḥ || 3.3.12.50 ||
ahaṃ codayasiṃho.ayaṃ piturvairārthamāgataḥ ||
haniṣyāmi ripuṃ bhūpaṃ sātmajaṃ sabalaṃ tathā || 51 ||
iti śrutvā vacastasya kāliyo balavattaraḥ ||
piturājñāṃ puraskṛtya śatavyūhasamanvitaḥ || 52 ||
teṣāṃ ca baṃdhanāyaiva kapāṭaṃ samaruddha saḥ ||
tāñchatrūnsamanujñāya pāśahastānsaśastragān ||53||
svaṃsvaṃ khaḍgaṃ samākṛṣya kṣatriyāste samāghnata ||
śataśūre hate taiśca kāliyo bhayakātaraḥ || 54 ||
tyaktvā tātaṃ pradudrāva te tu gehādbahiryayuḥ ||
svasainyaṃ śīghramāsādya yuddhāya samupasthitaḥ ||
śibirāṇi kṛtānyeva narmadākūlamāsthitaiḥ || 55 ||
kṛtvā tu narmadāsetuṃ nalvamātraṃ supuṣṭidam ||
svasainyaṃ tārayāmāsa caturaṃgasamanvitam || 56 ||
rurodha nagarīṃ sarvāṃ balakhānirbalairyutaḥ ||
śataghnīragrataḥ kṛtvā mahāśabdakarīstadā ||
māhiṣmatyāśca harmyāṇi pātayāmāsa bhūtale || 57 ||
narāśca svakulaiḥ sārddhaṃ mukhyadravyasamanvitāḥ ||
viṃdhyādreśca guhāṃ prāpya tatroṣurbhayakātarāḥ || 58 ||
kāliyastu gajānīke paṃcaśabdagaje sthitaḥ ||
hastipā daśasāhasrā yuddhāya samupāyayuḥ || 59 ||
tasyānujaḥ sūryavarmā trilakṣaisturagairyutaḥ ||
tuṃdilaśca rathaiḥ sārddhaṃ rathasthaśca sahasrakaiḥ || 3.3.12.60 ||
raṃkaṇo vaṃkaṇaścobhau caturlakṣapadātibhiḥ ||
jagmatustau mahāmlecchau mlecchabhūpasahasrakaiḥ ||
dākṣiṇātyagrāmapāste tau puraskṛtya saṃyayuḥ ||61||
ubhe sene samāsādya yuddhāya samupasthite ||
tayośca tumulayuddhamabhavallomaharṣaṇam ||62||
triyāme rudhiraisteṣāṃ nadī prāvartata drutam ||
dṛṣṭvāsrajāṃ nadīṃ ghorāṃ māṃsakardamavāhinīm ||
balakhānirameyātmā khaṅgapāṇirnaro yayau || 63 ||
bhallahastastadā devo manorathahaye sthitaḥ ||
biṃdulasthaśca kṛṣṇāṃśaḥ khaṅgenaiva ripūnahan || 64 ||
āhlādaśca gadāhastaḥ pothayāmāsa vāhinīm ||
rūpaṇo nāma śūdraśca śaktihastonyahanripūn ||
tālano hastanistriṃśo māhiṣmatyāṃ hananyayau || 65 ||
evaṃ mahābhaye jāte raṇe tasminmahābale ||
dudruvuḥ sarvato vīrāḥ pāhipāhītyathābruvan || 66 ||
prabhagnaṃ svabalaṃ dṛṣṭvā kāliyo balakhānikam ||
gajasthastāḍayāmāsa svabāṇaistaṃ mahābalaḥ || 67 ||
hariṇī vaḍavā tasya jñātvā svāminamāturam ||
gajopari samāsthāya svapādaistamapātayat || 68 ||
patite kāliye vīre paṃcaśabdo mahāgajaḥ ||
śṛṃkhalaistāḍayāmāsa śūrāṃstānmadamattakān|| || 69 ||
mūrcchite paṃcaśūre tu rūpaṇo bhayakātaraḥ ||
devakīṃ varṇayāmāsa yathājātaṃ gajena vai ||3.3.12.70||
tadā tu duḥkhitā devī dolāmāruhya satvarā ||
taṃ gajaṃ ca samāsādya varṇayāmāsa kāraṇam || 71 ||
gajarāja namastubhyaṃ śakradatta mahābala ||
ete putrāstu te vīra pālanīyā yathā pituḥ ||72||
iti śrutvā divyagajo devamāyāviśāradaḥ ||
devakīṃ śaraṇaṃ prāpya kṣamasvāgaskṛtaṃ mama || 73 ||
ityukte gajarāje tu kṛṣṇāṃśo balavattaraḥ ||
tyaktvā mūrcchāṃ yayau tatra yatrāhlādaśca mūrcchitaḥ || 74 ||
tamutthāpya karasparśairbalakhānisamanvitaḥ ||
piturgajaṃ mahāmattamāhlādāya pradattavān ||
karāla mandaṃ smitaṃ rūpaṇāya tadā dadau || 75 ||
mūrcchitaṃ kāliyaṃ śatruṃ baddhvā sa nigaḍairdṛḍhaiḥ ||
senāntaṃ preṣayāmāsa balakhānirmahābalaḥ || 76 ||
sūryavarmā tadā jñātvā baddhaṃ baṃdhuṃ ca kāliyam ||
prayayau śatrusenāntaṃ krodhena sphuritādharaḥ || 77 ||
tamāyāntaṃ samālokya te vīrā yuddhadurmadāḥ ||
rathasthaṃ maṃḍalīkṛtya svasvamastraṃ samākṣipan || 78 ||
kuṃṭhite.astre tadā teṣāṃ vismitāste.abhavanmune ||
cintāṃ ca mahatīṃ prāptāḥ kathaṃ vadhyo bhavedayam || 79 ||
tasyāstraiste mahāvīrā vraṇārtibhayapīḍitāḥ ||
tyaktvā yuddhaṃ punargatvā raṇaṃ cakruḥ punaḥpunaḥ || 3.3.12.80 ||
evaṃ kati dinānyeva babhūva raṇa uttamaḥ ||
āhlādo vatsajo devastālano bhayasaṃyutaḥ ||
kṛṣṇāṃśaṃ śaraṇaṃ jagmustena vīreṇa mohitāḥ || 81 ||
kṛṣṇastu taṃ tathā dṛṣṭvā devīṃ viśvavimohinīm ||
tuṣṭāva manasā vīro rātrisūktaṃ paṭhanhṛdi || 82 ||
tadā tuṣṭā jagaddhātrī durgā durgārtināśinī ||
mohayitvā tu taṃ vīraṃ tatraivāṃtaradhīyataḥ ||83||
nidrayā mohitaṃ dṛṣṭvā kṛṣṇāṃśastu mahābalaḥ ||
babaṃdha nigaḍaistaṃ ca devakyante samāgamat || 84 ||
tuṃdilaśca tathā jñātvā bhātṛśokapariplutaḥ ||
ājagāma hayārūḍhaḥ khaṅgahasto mahābalaḥ ||
ripusainyasya madhye tu bahuśūrānatāḍayat || 85 ||
māhiṣmatyāśca te śūrā raṃkaṇena samanvitāḥ ||
tatsainyaṃ bhañjayāmāsustālanena prapālitam || 86 ||
pradrutaṃ svaṃ balaṃ dṛṣṭvā tālanaḥ parighāyudhaḥ ||
śirāṃsi pothayāmāsa mlecchānāṃ ca pṛthakpṛthak || 87 ||
vaṃkaṇaṃ ca tathā hatvā khaḍgenaiva ca raṃkaṇam ||
tuṃdilaṃ ca tathā baddhvā dinānte śibiraṃ yayau ||88||
kāliye ca ripau baddhe subaddhe sūryavarmaṇi ||
tuṃdile ca tathā baddhe raṃkaṇe vaṃkaṇe hate || 89 ||
sahasraṃ mleccharājāno hataśeṣā balānvitāḥ ||
pakṣamātramahorātraṃ yuddhaṃ cakruḥ samaṃtataḥ || 3.3.12.90 ||
pratyahaṃ tālano vīraḥ senāpatiramarṣaṇaḥ ||
ṣaṣṭiṃ bhūpāñjaghānāśu śatrusainyabhayaṃkaraḥ || 91 ||
bhayabhītā ripoḥ śūrā hatā bhūpā hataujasaḥ ||
hataśeṣā yayurgehamarddhasainyā bhayāturāḥ || 92 ||
jambukastu tathā śrutvā duḥkhito gehamāyayau ||
vrataṃ hyanaśanaṃ kṛtvā rātrau śocannaśeta saḥ || 93 ||
niśīthe samanuprāpte tatsutā vijayaiṣiṇī ||
pūrṇā tu sā kalā jñeyā rādhāyā vrajavāsinī ||94||
āśvāsya pitaraṃ taṃ ca yayau māyāviśāradā ||
rakṣakāñchivirāṇāṃ ca mohayitvā samāyayau || 99 ||
bhrātaro tatra gatvāsau yatra sarvānabodhayat ||
kṛtvā sā rākṣasīṃ māyāṃ paṃcavīrānamohayat || 96 ||
nirastrakavacānbaṃdhūnpratidolāṃ samāruhat ||
pituraṃtikamāsādya tasmai bhrātṛndadau mudā ||97||
prabhāte bodhitāḥ sarve snānadhyānādikāḥ kriyāḥ ||
kṛtvā yayū ripoḥ śālāṃ dṛṣṭavanto na tāṃstadā || 98||
babhūburduḥkhitāḥ sarve kimidaṃ kāraṇaṃ katham ||
tānuvāca tadā devaḥ prāptā hyatra ripoḥ sutā || 99 ||
kṛtvā sā rākṣasīṃ māyāṃ hṛtvā tāngehamāyayau ||
tasmādyūyaṃ mayā sārddhaṃ gatvā yatraiva tadguruḥ || || 3.3.12.100 ||
viṃdhyopari mahāraṇye nānāsattvaniṣevite ||
kuṭīraṃ tasya tatraiva nāmnaivailavilī hi saḥ || ilavilā
yogasiddhiyutaḥ kāmī rākṣasebhyo hi nirbhayaḥ || 101 ||
jambukasya sutā tatra pratyahaṃ svajanairyutā ||
ekākinī ca sā rātrau svaṃ guruṃ tamarīramat || 102 ||
kṛteyaṃ cailavilinā māyā manujamohinī ||
kāryasiddhiṃ gamiṣyāmo gatvā taṃ puruṣādhamam ||
iti śrutvā tu catvāro vināhrādaṃ yayurvanam || 103 ||
gītanṛtyapravādyaiśca mohayitvā ca ta dine ||
vāsaṃ cakruśca tatraiva dhūrtaṃ māyāviśāradam || 104 ||
sa tu pūrvabhave daityaścitro nāma mahāsuraḥ ||
bāṇakanyāmuṣāṃ nityamavāñchacchiva pūjakaḥ ||
jāta ailavilī nāma pakṣapūjī sa vegavān ||1 05||
tayormadhye pramāṇo.ayaṃ vivāho me yadā bhavet ||
tadāhaṃ tvāṃ bhajiṣyāmi saṃtyaktvodvāhitaṃ patim || 106 ||
hate tasminmahādhūrte gatvā saṃgrāmamūrddhani ||
jambukasya yayurdurgaṃ dṛṣṭvā te taṃ samāruhan ||
hatvā tatra sthitānvīrāñchataghnyaḥ parikhākṛtāḥ || 107 ||
tadā tu jambuko rājā śivadattavaro balī ||
jitvā pañca mahāvīrānbaddhvā tānnigaḍairdṛḍhaiḥ ||
śaivaṃ yajñaṃ ca kṛtavāṃsteṣāṃ nāmnopabṛṃhitam || 108 ||
rūpaṇastu tathā jñātvā devakīṃ pratyavarṇayat ||
tadā tu duḥkhitā devī bhavānīṃ bhayahāriṇīm ||
manasā ca jagāmāśu śaraṇyāṃ śaraṇaṃ satī || 109 ||
tadā tuṣṭā jagāddhātrī svapnāṃte tāmavarṇayat ||
aho devaki kalyāṇi putraśokaṃ tyajādhunā || 3.3.12.110 ||
yadā tu jambuko rājā śivadattavaro balī ||
homaṃ kartā sa maṃdātmā teṣāṃ ca balihetave || 111 ||
mohayitvā tadāhaṃ taṃ mocayitvā ca te sutān ||
vijayaṃ te pradāsyāmi mā ca śoke manaḥ kṛthāḥ || 112 ||
iti śrutvā satī devī namaskṛtya maheśvarīm ||
pūjayāmāsa vidhivaddhūpadīpopahārakaiḥ || 113 ||
etasminnaṃtare rājā devamāyāvimohitaḥ ||
suṣvāpa tatra homānte te ca jātā hyabaṃdhanāḥ || 114 ||
tairbaddho jambuko rājā nigaḍairāyasairdṛḍhaiḥ ||
te taṃ baddhvā yayuḥ śīghraṃ devakīṃ prati nirbhayāḥ || 115 ||
etasminnaṃtare tatra kāliyādyāstrayaḥ sutāḥ ||
trilakṣaṃ sainyamādāya yuddhāya samupāyayuḥ || 116 ||
punaryuddhamabhūdghoraṃ senayorubhayostadā ||
tālanādyāśca catvāro hatvā tāṃ ripuvāhinīm || 117 ||
trīñchatrūnkoṣṭhakīkṛtya svaśastrairjaghnurūrjitāḥ ||
evaṃ dināni katicittatra jāto mahāraṇaḥ || 118 ||
kāliyo duḥkhito bhūtvā sasmāra manasā haram ||
mohanaṃ maṃtramāsādya mohayāmāsa tānripūn || 119 ||
etasminnaṃtare devī devakī patidevatā||
pātivratyasya puṇyena sutāṃtikamupāgatā || 3.3.12.120 ||
bodhayitvā tu kṛṣṇāṃśaṃ pañcaśabdagajasthitam ||
punastuṣṭāva jananīṃ sarvaviśvavimohinīm ||
tadā tuṣṭā svayaṃ devī bodhayāmāsa tānmudā || 121 ||
āhlādaḥ sūryavarmāṇaṃ kāliyaṃ ca tato.anujaḥ ||
jaghāna balakhānistaṃ tundilaṃ jambukātmajam ||122||
te tu pūrvabhave vipra jarāsaṃdhaḥ sakāliyaḥ ||
dvivido vānaraḥ śūraḥ sūryyavarmeha cābhavat ||123||
triśirāstudilo jātaḥ śṛgālaḥ sa ca jambukaḥ ||
nityavairakarāḥ sarve bhūpāścāsanmahītale ||124 ||
hateṣu śatruputreṣu devakī jambukaṃ ripum ||
khaṅgena tarjayāmāsa patiśokaparāyaṇā || 125 ||
kṛṣṇāṃśaḥ śirasī pitrorgṛhītvā snehakātaraḥ ||
jambukasyaiva hadaye sthāpayāmāsa vihvalaḥ ||126||
vihasya tau tadā tatra procaturvacanaṃ priyam ||
ciraṃ jīva hi kṛṣṇāṃśa gayāṃ kuru mahāmate ||
iti vāṇī tayorjātā balino pretadehayoḥ || 127 ||
khaḍgahastā ca sā devī śilāyaṃtre tu taṃ ripum ||
saṃsthāpya codayāmāsa svaputrānharṣasaṃyutā ||128||
he putrāḥ svapituḥ śatruṃ jambukaṃ puruṣādhamam ||
khaṇḍakhaṇḍaṃ ca tilaśaḥ kṛtvānandasamanvitāḥ || 129 ||
saṃcūrṇayata tadgātraṃ tattailairmadanirmitaiḥ ||
snāsyāmyahaṃ tathetyuktvā ruroda jananī bhṛśam || 3.3.12.130 ||
tathā kṛtvā tu te putrā mahiṣīṃ sasutāṃ tadā ||
balakhāniyutāstatrāhūya cakruśca tatkriyām || 131 ||
tadā parimalaṃ rājñī dṛṣṭvā svāminamāturam ||
maraṇāyonmukhaṃ vipra paṃcatvamagamanmune || 132 ||
tatsutā khaḍgamānīya balakhānibhujaṃ prati ||
kṛtitvā mūrchayitvā taṃ tatpakṣānanvadhāvata||133||
tālanaṃ devasiṃhaṃ ca rāmāṃśaṃ ca tathāvidham||
kṛttvānyāṃśca tathā śatrūnagacchatkulakātarā||134||
kṛṣṇāṃśaṃ mohayitvāśu māyayā ca samāharat||
hate tatra śate śūre balakhāniramarṣitaḥ ||
tacchiraśca samāhṛtya citāyāṃ ca samākṣipat || 135 ||
tadā vāṇī samutpannā balakhāne śṛṇuṣva bhoḥ ||
avadhyā ca sadā nārī tvayā vadhyā hyadharmiṇaḥ || 136 ||
phalamasya vivāhe sve bhoktavyaṃ pāpakarmaṇaḥ ||
iti śrutvā tadā duḥkhī balakhāniryayau puram || 137 ||
tatastu sainikāḥ sarve mahāharṣasamanvitāḥ ||
śatoṣṭrabhāravāhyāni luṃṭhayitvā dhanāni ca || 138 ||
mahāvatīṃ samājagmuḥ kṛtakṛ tyatvamāgatāḥ ||
hataśeṣaiścārddhasainyaiḥ sahitā gehamāyayuḥ || 139 || ||
iti śrībhaviṣye mahāpurāṇe pratisargaparvaṇi caturyugakhaṃḍāparaparyāye kali yugīyetihāsasamuccaye dvādaśo.adhyāyaḥ || 12 || cha ||
|| ṛṣaya ūcuḥ || ||
kasminmāsyabhavadyuddhaṃ tayoḥ katidināni ca ||
tatpaścātsva purīṃ prāya tadā kimabhavanmune || 1 ||
|| sūta uvāca || ||
pauṣamāsyabhavadyuddhaṃ tayoḥ śatadināni ca ||
jyeṣṭhe māsi gṛhaṃ prāptā dadhmurvādyānyanekaśaḥ|| 2 ||
śrutvā parimalo rājā svasutāñjayino balīn ||
dadau dānāni viprebhyaḥ sukhaṃ jātaṃ gṛhegṛhe || 3 ||
iti śrutvā mahīrājo balakhāniṃ mahābalam ||
tatrāgatya namaskṛtya vacanaṃ prāha namradhīḥ || 4 ||
arddhakoṭimitaṃ dravyaṃ mattaḥ prāpya sukhī bhava ||
māhiṣmatyāśca rāṣṭraṃ me dehi vīra namostu te || 5 ||
varṣe varṣe ca taddravyaṃ gṛhāṇa balavanprabho ||
iti śrutvā tathā matvā balakhānirgṛhaṃ yayau ||6||
vayastrayodaśābde ca kṛṣṇāṃśe balavattare ||
yathā jātā harerlīlā bhṛguśreṣṭha tathā śṛṇu || 7 ||
bhādre śukle trayodaśyāṃ cāhlādaḥ sānujo yayau ||
gayārthe dhanamādāya hastyaśvarathasaṃkulam || || 8 ||
kṛṣṇāṃśo bindulārūḍho vatsajo hariṇīsthitaḥ ||
devaḥ papīhakārūḍhaḥ sukhakhāniḥ karālake || 9 ||
catvāro dvidinānte ca gayākṣetraṃ samāyayuḥ ||
pūrṇimāṃte puraskṛtya ṣoḍaśaśrāddhakāriṇaḥ || 3.3.13.10 ||
śataṃ śataṃ gajāṃścaiva bhūṣitāṃśca rathāstathā ||
dadurhayānsahasraṃ ca hemamālāvibhūṣi tān || 11 ||
dhenūrhiraṇyaratnāni vāsāṃsi vividhāni ca ||
dattvā te suphalībhūya svagehāya dadhurmanaḥ || 12 ||
lakṣāvartistu yā veśyā yayau badarikāśramam ||
prāṇāṃstatra parityajya sāpsarastvamupāgatā || 13 ||
rākāṃ caṃdre tu saṃprāptaṃ rāhugraste tamomaye ||
kāśyāṃ samāgatā bhūpā nānā deśyāḥ kulaiḥ saha || 14 ||
himālayagirau ramye nānādhātuvicitrite ||
tatra śārdūlavaṃśīyo netrasiṃho mahīpatiḥ || 15 ||
ratnabhāno hate śūre netrasiṃho bhayāturaḥ ||
navatuṃge samāsādya toṣayāmāsa vāsavam || 16 ||
dvādaśābdāntare devo dadau ḍhakkāmṛtaṃ mudā ||
pārvatyā nirmitaṃ yattu vāsavāya svasevine || 17 ||
dadau ḍhakkāmṛtaṃ rājñe punaḥ prāha śubhaṃ vacaḥ ||
asya śabdena bhūpāla tvaṃ sainyaṃ jīvayiṣyasi || 18 ||
kṣayaṃ śīghraṃ gamiṣyaṃti śatravaste mahābhaṭāḥ||
prāpte ḍhakkāmṛte tasminnetrasiṃho mahābalaḥ || 19 ||
nagaraṃ kārayāmāsa tatra sarvajanairyutam ||
yojanāntaṃ caturdvāraṃ durādharṣaṃ paraiḥ sadā || 3.3.13.20 ||
netrasiṃhagaḍhaṃ nāmnā vikhyātaṃ bhārate bhuvi ||
kāśmīrānte kṛtaṃ rājye tena śṛṃgasamaṃ tataḥ || 21 ||
pālitaṃ netrasiṃhena tatpuraḥ putravanmune ||
netrapāla iti khyāto grāmo.asau durgamaḥ pareḥ || 22 ||
so.api rājā samāyāto netrasiṃho mahābalaḥ ||
kanyā svarṇavatī tasya revatyaṃśasamanvitā ||
kāmākṣyā varadānena sarvamāyāviśāradā || 23 ||
dṛṣṭvā tāṃ suṃdarīṃ kanyāṃ bālendusadṛśānanām ||
mūrcchitāścābhavanbhūpā rūpayauvanamohitāḥ || 24 ||
dṛṣṭvā tāṃ ca tathāhrādaḥ sarvaratnavibhūṣitām ||
ṣoḍaśābdavayoyuktāṃ kāminīṃ ratirūpiṇīm ||
mūrcchitaścāpatadbhūmau sā taṃ dṛṣṭvā mumoha vai || 25 ||
dolāmāruhya tatsakhyau nṛpāntikamupāyayuḥ ||
āhlādastu samutthāya mahāmohatvamāgataḥ || 26 ||
dṛṣṭvā tathāvidhaṃ baṃdhuṃ kṛṣṇāṃśaḥ prāha duḥkhitaḥ ||
kimarthaṃ mohamāyāto bhavā~mstatvaviśāradaḥ || 27 ||
rajo rāgātmakaṃ viddhi pramādaṃ mohajaṃ tathā ||
jñānāsinā śirastasya chiṃdhi tvamajitaḥ sadā || 28 ||
iti śrutvā vaco bhrātustyaktvā mohaṃ yayau gṛham ||
bhojayitvā dvijaśreṣṭhānsahasraṃ vedatatparān || 29 ||
durgāmārādhayāmāsa japtvā madhyacaritrakam ||
māsānte ca tadā devī dattvābhīṣṭaṃ hṛdi sthitam || 3.3.13.30 ||
mohayāmāsa tāṃ kanyāṃ vivāhārthamaninditā ||
svapne dadarśa sā bālā rāmāṃśaṃ devakīsutam || 31 ||
prātarbuddhvā tu saṃciṃtya mahāmohamupāyayau ||
tadā dhyātvā ca kāmākṣīṃ sarvābhīṣṭapradāyinīm || || 32 ||
pauṣamāse tu saṃprāpte śukakaṃṭhe supatrikām ||
baddhvā taṃ preṣayāmāsa śukaṃ patrasthitaṃ priyam || 33 ||
sa gatvā puṣpavipinaṃ mahāvatipurīsthitam ||
naraśabdena vacanaṃ kṛṣṇāṃśāya śukobravīta || 34 ||
vīra te.avarajo baṃdhurnāmnāhlādo mahābalaḥ ||
tasmai hi preṣitā patrī svarṇavatyā hitapradā || 35 ||
tāṃ jñātvā ca punastasyā uttaraṃ dehi matpriyam ||
atha vā patramālikhya tattvaṃ me kuru kaṃṭhake || 36 ||
iti śrutvodayo vīro gṛhītvā patramuttamam ||
jñātavāṃstatra vṛttāṃtamāhlādāya punardadau || 37 ||
jambukaśca nṛpo vīro rudradattavaro balī ||
ajeyonyanṛpairvīra tvayā yudhi nipātitaḥ || 38 ||
tathāvidhaṃ matpitaramiṃdradattavaraṃ ripum ||
tamevaṃ jahi saṃgrāme mama pāṇigrahaṃ kuru || || 39 ||
iti jñātvā sa āhlādastāmāśvāsya hṛdi sthitām ||
śukakaṃṭhe babaṃdhāśu likhitvā patramuttamam || 3.3.13.40 ||
sa śukaḥ pannagaḥ pūrvaṃ puṃḍarīkena śāpitaḥ ||
revatyaṃśasya kāryaṃ ca kṛtvā mokṣatvamāgataḥ || 41 ||
mṛte tasmiñchuke ramye devī svarṇavatī tadā ||
dāhayitvā dadau dānaṃ viprebhyastasya tṛptaye || 42 ||
māghamāsi ca saṃprāpte paṃcamyāṃ kṛṣṇapakṣake ||
āhlādaḥ saptalakṣaiśca sainyaiḥ sārddhaṃ yayau mudā || 43 ||
tālanādyāśca te śūrāḥ svaṃsvaṃ vāhanamāśritāḥ ||
āhlādaṃ rakṣayantaste yayuḥ paṃcadaśāhakam || 44 ||
vaṃgadeśaṃ samullaṃghya śīghraṃ prāptā himālayam ||
rūpaṇaṃ patrakarttāraṃ balakhāniruvāca tam || 45 ||
gaccha tvaṃ vīra kavacī karālāśvaṃ samāsthitaḥ ||
paṃcaśastrasamāyukto rājānaṃ śīghramāvaha || 46 ||
yuddhacihnaṃ tanau kṛtvā māmāgaccha tvarānvitaḥ ||
tathā matvā śikhaṃḍyaṃśo yayau śīghraṃ sa rūpaṇaḥ ||47||
sa dadarśa sabhāṃ rājño bahuśūrasamanvitām||
pārvatīyairnṛpaiḥ sārddhaṃ sahasrairbalavattaraiḥ || 48 ||
sa uvāca nṛpaśreṣṭhaṃ netrasiṃhaṃ mahābalam ||
tvatsutāyā vivāhāya balakhānirmahābalaḥ ||
saptalakṣabalairguptaḥ saṃprāptastava rāṣṭrake || 49 ||
tasmāttvaṃ svasutāṃ śīghramāhlādāya samarpaya ||
śulkaṃ me dehi nṛpate yuddharūpaṃ sudāruṇam || 3.3.13.50 ||
iti śrutvā vacastasya sa rājā krodhamūrchitaḥ ||
paṭṭanādhipamājñāya bhūpaṃ pūrṇabalaṃ ruṣā ||
arudhatsa kapāṭaṃ ca tasya baṃdhanahetave || 51 ||
pāśahastāñchūraśataṃ paṭṭanādhiparakṣitān ||
dṛṣṭvā sa rūpaṇo vīraḥ khaḍgayuddhamacīkarat || 52 ||
hatvā tanmukuṭaṃ rājño gṛhītvākāśago balī ||
balakhāniṃ tu saṃprāpya cihnaṃ tasmai nyavedayat || 53 ||
iti śrutvā prasannātmā sapta lakṣadalairyutaḥ ||
arudhannagarīṃ sarvāṃ netrasiṃhena rakṣitām || 54 ||
netrasiṃhastu balavānpārvatīyairnṛpaiḥ saha ||
himatuṃgatalaṃ prāpya yuddhārthī tānsamāhvayat || 55 ||
sahasraṃ ca gajāstasya hayā lakṣaṃ mahābalāḥ ||
sahasraṃ ca nṛpāḥ śūrāścaturlakṣa padātibhiḥ || 56 ||
yogasiṃho gajaiḥ sārddhaṃ balakhāniṃ samāhvayat ||
bhogasiṃho hayaiḥ sārddhaṃ kṛṣṇāṃśaṃ ca samāhvayat || 57 ||
vijayo nṛpaputraśca sarvabhūpatibhiḥ saha ||
devasiṃhastathā mlecchai rūpaṇaṃ ca samāhvayat || 58 ||
tayoścāsīnmahadyuddhaṃ senayostatra dāruṇam ||
nirbhayāścaiva te śūrāḥ pārvatīyāḥ samaṃtataḥ ||
jaghnuste śātravīṃ senāṃ dvilakṣāṃ vīrapālitām || 59 ||
prabhagnaṃ svabalaṃ dṛṣṭvā catvāro madamattakāḥ ||
divyānaśvānsamāruhya cakruḥ śatrormahāvadham ||
punarujīvitaṃ sarvaṃ ḍhakkāmṛtaravādbalam || 3.3.13.60 ||
yuddhāya saṃmukhaṃ prāpa bhṛguśreṣṭha punaḥ punaḥ ||
ahorātraṃ raṇaścāsītteṣāṃ tatraiva dāruṇaḥ || 61 ||
evaṃ saptāhni saṃjāte yuddhe bhīrubhayaṃkare ||
upāyairbahubhirvīrāścakruścaiva raṇaṃ bahum || 62 ||
punaste jīvamāpannā jaghnustānripusainyapān||
tālanādyāstu te śūrā duḥkhitāstatra cābhavan ||
nirāśāṃ vijaye prāpya kṛṣṇāṃśaṃ śaraṇaṃ yayuḥ || 63 ||
tānāśvāsya sa kṛṣṇāṃśastatra divyahaye sthitaḥ ||
nabhomārgeṇa balavānsvarṇavatyaṃtikaṃ yayau || 64 ||
harmyopari sthitāṃ devīṃ sarvaśobhāsamanvitām ||
natvovāca vacaḥ ślakṣṇaṃ kiṃkarohamihodayaḥ ||
śaraṇyāṃ tvāmupāgacchaṃ kāmākṣīmiva bhāmini || 65 ||
vṛttāntaṃ kathayāmāsa yathāsīcca mahāraṇaḥ ||
śrameṇa karśitā vīrā nirāśāṃ jīvane.agaman || 66 ||
sāha codayasiṃha tvaṃ kāmākṣyā maṃdiraṃ vraja ||
ahaṃ ca svālibhiḥ sārdhaṃ navamyāṃ pūjane ratā || 67 ||
ḍhakkāmṛtasya vādyena pūjaye sarvakāmadām ||
iti śrutvā sa balavānsvasainyaṃ prati cāgamat || 68 ||
ardhaśeṣāṃ raṇātsenāṃ parājāpya ca dudruvuḥ ||
paṭṭanākhyapure prāptāṃ jayaṃ prāpya mahābalāḥ || 69 ||
parājite ripau tasminnetrasiṃhasutaiḥ saha ||
gṛhamāgatya balavānviprebhyo godhanaṃ dadau || 3.3.13.70 ||
navamyāṃ pitaraṃ prāha devī svarṇavatī tadā ||
kāmākṣīsevanenāśu kuru yāgotsavaṃ mama ||
yatprasādācca vijayī durjayebhyo.abhavadbhavān || 71 ||
iti śrutvā pitā prāha svapno dṛṣṭastathā mayā ||
pūjanānmaṃgalaṃ rājñāṃ no cedvighno hi śobhane || 72 ||
pitroktaivaṃ niśāyāṃ tu sā sutā piturājñayā ||
ḍhakkāmṛtasya vādyena kāmākṣīmadiraṃ yayau || 73 ||
kṛṣṇāṃśo mālyakārasya vadhūrbhūtvā samāgataḥ ||
ḍhakkāmṛtaṃ ca nārībhyo gṛhītvā tvarito yayau || ||74||
etasminnantare vīrāḥ ṣaṣṭirvāhanasaṃyutāḥ ||
ḍhakkārthaṃ prayayuḥ śīghraṃ sarvaśastraiḥ samudyatāḥ ||75||
tānāgatānsa balavāndṛṣṭvā khaḍgaṃ gṛhītavān ||
paṃcapaṃcāśataḥ śūrānanayadyamasādanam || 76 ||
kṛṣṇāṃśastvarito gatvā rūpaṇo yatra tiṣṭhati ||
ḍhakkāmṛtaṃ ca saṃprāpya hayārūḍho yayau sabhām ||77||
hṛte ḍhakkāmṛte divye netrasiṃho bhayāturaḥ ||
aindraṃ yajñaṃ tathā kṛtvā havanāya paro.abhavat || 78 ||
prabhāte samanuprāpte te vīrāḥ svabalaiḥ saha ||
tarasā prayayuḥ sarve gajoṣṭrahayasaṃsthitāḥ ||
dinānte prāptavaṃtaśca yatrābhūtsamahāraṇaḥ || 79 ||
kṛṣṇāṃśaḥ pūjayitvā taṃ dadhmau ḍhakkāmṛtaṃ balī ||
tacchabdena mṛtā vīrāḥ punarujīvitāstadā || 3.3.13.80 ||
saptalakṣabalaṃ tasya punaḥ prāptaṃ madāturam ||
rurodha nagarīṃ sarvāṃ dadhmau vādyānyanekaśaḥ || 81 ||
ruddhe tu nagare tasminnetrasiṃho bhayāturaḥ ||
svātmānamarpayāmāsa vahnau śakrāya dhīmate || 82 ||
tadā prasanno bhagavānuvāca nṛpatiṃ prati ||
rāmāṃśoyaṃ ca kṛṣṇāṃśo bhuvi jātau kalaikayā || 83 ||
tasmai yogyāya sā kanyā rāmāṃśāya yaśasvine ||
yoginīyaṃ svarṇavatī revatyaṃśāvatāriṇī ||84||
ityuktvā ca svayaṃ devo ḍhakkāmṛtamumāpriyam ||
hṛtvā vahnau samākṣipya durgāyai saṃnyavedayat || 85 ||
gate tasminsurapato sa rājā brāhmaṇaiḥ saha ||
mahīpatiṃ prati yayau melanārthaṃ samudyataḥ || 86 ||
tathāgataṃ nṛpaṃ dṛṣṭvā kṛṣṇāṃśaśca mahīpatiḥ ||
āhlādamātulaḥ prāha mānyaḥ sarvabalaiḥ sadā ||87||
rājannayaṃ sa balavānāhrādaḥ sānujaiḥ saha ||
matpaṃktau na sthito vīraḥ kule hīnatvamāgataḥ || 88 ||
āryābhīrī smṛtā teṣāṃ kiṃ tvayā viditaṃ na hi ||
yadi deyā tvayā kanyā tarhi tvaṃ hīnatāṃ vraja || 89 ||
atastvaṃ vacanaṃ cedaṃ kulayogyaṃ śṛṇuṣva bhoḥ ||
caturo bālakānnīcāṃstālanena samanvitān || 3.3.13.90 ||
vañcayitvā vivāhārthe śirāṃsyeṣāṃ samāhara ||
maṃḍapati makhaṃ kṛtvā cāmuṇḍāyai samarpaya || 91 ||
tvatkanyayā samāhūtā vīrā vai revatī hi sā ||
paścātkanyāṃ svayaṃ hatvā kulakalyāṇamāvaha|| 92 ||
no cedbhavānkṣayaṃ yāyātsakulo jaṃbuko yathā ||
ityuktvā sa yayau sārddhaṃ yatrāhrādasya bāṃdhavaḥ || 93 ||
iti śrutvā sa śalyāṃśaḥ suyodhanamukheritam ||
tathetyuktvotsavaṃ kṛtvā maṃḍapāṃte vidhānataḥ ||
āhlādasya samīpaṃ sa gatvaitadvaṃcanāya hi ||
tamāha daṃḍavatpādau gṛhītvā nṛpatissvayam || 94 ||
bhavantoṃśāvatārāśca mayā jñātāḥ surottamāt ||
nirastrānpañca yuṣmāṃśca pūjayitvā yathāvidhi ||
rāmāṃśāya svakanyāṃ ca dāsyāmi kularītitaḥ || 95 ||
ityāhrādaṃ samādiśya sa nṛpaśchalamāśritaḥ ||
durgotsave yayau gehaṃ tadvadhāya samudyataḥ || 96 ||
sahasraṃ maṃḍape bhūpānsaṃsthāpya svabalaiḥ saha ||
tālanādyāṃśca ṣaṭ śūrānmaṃḍapāṃte samāhvayat || 97 ||
vivāhaprathamāvarte yogasiṃho.asimuttamam ||
varamāhatya śirasi jagarja balavānruṣā || 98 ||
tamāha tālano dhīmānna yogyaṃ bhavatā kṛtam ||
śrutvāha netrasiṃhastaṃ kularītiriyaṃ balin ||
nirāyudhaiḥ paraiḥ sārddhaṃ śastriṇāṃ saṃgaro hi naḥ || 99 ||
iti śrutvā yogasiṃhaṃ kṛṣṇāṃśastaṃ samārudhat ||
bhogasiṃhaṃ tathā kṛṣya balakhānirgṛhītavān || 3.3.13.100 ||
vijayaṃ tṛtīyāvarte sukhakhānirnyaruṃddha vai ||
caturthāvartake śatruṃ nṛpaṃ pūrṇabalaṃ śaṭham ||
rūpaṇastaṃ gṛhītvāśu yuyudhe tadbalaiḥ saha || 101 ||
paṃcame bahurājānaṃ tālanaśca samārudhat ||
ṣaṣṭhāvartte netrasiṃhaṃ tathāhlādo gṛhītavān || 102 ||
saṃprāpte tumale yuddhe bahuśūrāḥ kṣayaṃ gatāḥ ||
nirāyudhāḥ ṣaḍ balinaḥ saṃkṣamya vraṇamuttamam ||
nirāyudhānripūnsvānsvāṃścakruḥ śaktiprapūjakāḥ ||1 03||
etasminnantare devaḥ kāladarśī samāgataḥ ||
nabhomārgeṇa tānaśvāṃstebhya āgatya saṃdadau || 104 ||
bindulaṃ caiva kṛṣṇāṃśo devastatra manoratham ||
rūpaṇaśca karālāśvaṃ cāhlādastu papīhakam || 105 ||
hariṇīṃ balakhāniśca tadbhrātā harināgaram ||
siṃhinīṃ tālanaḥ śūraḥ samāruhya raṇodyataḥ || 106 ||
rātrau tannṛpateḥ senāṃ hatvā baddhvā ca tatpatim ||
dolāṃ gehācca niṣkāśya saptabhramarakāritām || 107 ||
svasainyaṃ te samājagmurnirbhayā balavattarāḥ ||
tānsarvānnetrasiṃhādīndṛṣṭvā pāhīti jalpitaḥ || 108 ||
nigaḍairekataḥ kṛtvā pañca bhūpānhi vaṃcakān ||
kārāgāre mahāghore tatra tānsaṃnyavāsayan || || 109 ||
netrasiṃho varo bhrātā sundarāraṇyabhūmipaḥ ||
hetuṃ jñātvāyayau śīghraṃ māyāvī lakṣasainyakaḥ || 3.3.13.110 ||
tatrāgatya harānando nāmnā tānayudhadbalī | |
netrasiṃhasya sainyaṃ ca caturlakṣaṃ tadāgamat | | 111 | |
pañcalakṣai raṇo ghoraḥ saptalakṣayutairabhūt ||
pañcāhorātramātraṃ ca tayoścāsītsa saṃkulaḥ ||
arddhasainyaṃ ripostatra hataśeṣamadudruvat || 112 | |
vismitaḥ sa harānando rudramāyāviśāradaḥ ||
balādhikyayutāñjñātvā śivadhyānaparo.abhavat | | | | 113 | |
racitvā śāṃbarīṃ māyāṃ nānārūpavidhāriṇīm | |
pāṣāṇabhūtānsakalānkṛtvā bhūpānsamāyayau | | 114 | |
sasutaṃ bhrātaraṃ jyeṣṭhaṃ nṛpaṃ pūrṇabalaṃ tataḥ ||
mocayitvā yayau gehaṃ kṛtakṛtyo mahābalī || 115 ||
āhlādaṃ nigaḍairbaddhvā māyayā jaḍatāṃ gatam ||
netrasiṃhaḥ sa balavānyayau svaṃ durgamudyataḥ ||
taṃ praśaṃsyānujaṃ vīro viprebhyaśca dadau dhanam || 11 6| |
tadā svarṇavatī dīnā baddhaṃ jñātvā patiṃ nijam ||
kṛṣṇāṃśādyānmohitāṃśca śaṃbhumāyāvaśānugān | | || 11 7||
rurodoccaistadā devīṃ dhyāyaṃtī kāmarūpiṇīm | |
tadā tuṣṭā jagaddhātrī mūrcchitāṃstānabodhayat | | 118 | |
te sarve cetanāṃ prāptāḥ prāhuḥ svarṇavatīṃ mudā ||
kvāsthito vaṃdhurāhlādo devi tvaṃ kāraṇaṃ vada| | 11 9|
yathā baddhaḥ svayaṃ svāmī kathayāmāsa sā tathā ||
ahaṃ śukī bhavāmyadya bhavānbiṃdulasaṃsthitaḥ | || 3.3.13.12 0 ||
ityuktvā sā śukī bhūtvā kṛṣṇāṃśena samanvitā ||
yatrāste tatpatirbaddhastatra sā kāminī yayau || 121 ||
kṛṣṇāṃśo.api hayārūḍho nabhomārgeṇa cāptavān ||
abhīrīṃ mūrtimāsādya svāminaṃ prati sā yayau || 1 22||
āśvāsya taṃ yathāyogyaṃ kṛṣṇāṃśaṃ pratyavarṇayat ||
kṛṣṇāṃśastatra balavānhatvā durga nivāsinaḥ || 123 ||
rakṣakāñchatasāhasrānhatvā bhrātaramāyayau | |
paurṇimāṃ madhuyuktāṃ ca jñātvā sarve tvarānvitāḥ || 124 ||
ayodhyāṃ śīghramāgamya snātvā vai sarayūṃ nadīm | |
holikādāhasamaye śīghraṃ veṇyāṃ samāgatāḥ || 1 25| |
snānadhyānādikā niṣṭhāḥ kṛtvā gehamupāyayuḥ ||
sāgarasya taṭaṃ prāpya kṛtvā te ca mahotsavam | |
caitrasya kṛṣṇapañcamyāṃ svagehaṃ punarāyayuḥ || 126 ||
dūtā uṣṭrasamārūḍhāstatkṣemakaraṇotsukāḥ | |
vaiśākhe śuklapaṃcamyāṃ svagehaṃ punarāyayuḥ || 127 | |
malanā bhūpatiścaiva gehegehe mahotsavam ||
kārayitvā vidhānena brāhmaṇebhyo dadau dhanam | | 128 ||
iti śrībhaviṣye mahāpurāṇe pratisargaparvaṇi caturyugakhaṇḍāparaparyāye kaliyugīyetihāsasamuccaye trayodaśo.adhyāyaḥ || 13 || || cha ||
| | sūta uvāca || ||
caturdaśābde kṛṣṇāṃśe yathā jātaṃ tathā śṛṇu ||
jayantaḥ śakraputraśca jānakīśāpamohitaḥ ||
kalau janmatvamāpannaḥ svarṇavatyudare.avasat || 1 | |
caitraśukla navamyāṃ ca madhyāhne guruvāsare ||
sa jātaścandravadano rājalakṣaṇalakṣitaḥ || 2 | |
jāte tasminsutaśreṣṭhe devāḥ sarṣigaṇāstadā ||
induloyaṃ mahīṃ jāto jayanto vāsavātmajaḥ ||
ityūcurvacanaṃ tasmādindulo nāma cābhavat | | 3 ||
āhlādo jātakarmādīnkārayitvā śiśormudā ||
brāhmaṇebhyo dadau svarṇadhenuvṛndaṃ hayāngajān || 4 ||
indule tanaye jāte dvimāsāṃte mahītale ||
yogasiṃhastadāgatya svarṇavatyai dadau dhanam ||
netrasiṃha sutaṃ dṛṣṭvā malanāsnehasaṃyutā ||
papraccha kuśalapraśnaṃ bhojayitvā vidhānataḥ || 6 ||
śatavṛndāśca nartakyo nānārāgeṇa saṃyutāḥ ||
tatrāgatyeva nanṛturyatra bhūpasutaḥ sthitaḥ || 7 ||
saptarātramuṣitvā sa yogasiṃho yayau gṛham ||
ṣaṇmāse ca sute jāte devendraḥ snehakātaraḥ || 8 ||
putrasnehena taṃ putraṃ sa jahāra svamāyayā ||
saṃhṛtya bālakaṃ śreṣṭhamindrāṇyai ca samarpayat || 9 ||
snehaplutā śacī devī svastanau tamapāyayat ||
devyā dugdhaṃ sa vai pītvā ṣoḍaśābdasamobhavat || 3.3.14.10 ||
induṃ pīyūṣabhavanaṃ gṛhṇāti vapuṣā svayam ||
ataḥ sa indulo nāma jayantaśca prakīrtitaḥ ||
sa bālaḥ svapiturvidyāṃ paṭhitvā śreṣṭhatāmagāt || 11 ||
vinaṣṭe bālake tasmindevī svarṇavatī tadā ||
rurodoccaistadā dīnā hā putra kva gato.asi bhoḥ || 12 ||
jñātvāhlādaṃ tathā bhūtaṃ daśagrāme tathāvidhe ||
raudraḥ kolāhalo jāto rudatāṃ ca nṛṇāṃ mune || 13 ||
āhlādaḥ svakulaiḥ sārddhaṃ nirāhāro yateṃdriyaḥ ||
śāradāṃ śaraṇaṃ prāptastrirātraṃ tatra cāvasat || 14||
tadā tuṣṭā svayaṃ devī vāguvācāśarīriṇī ||
he putra svakulaiḥ sārddhaṃ mā śucastvaṃ sutaṃ prati || || 15 ||
indraputro jayantaśca svargalokamupāgataḥ ||
divyavidyāṃ paṭhitvā sa trivarṣāṃte gamiṣyati || 16 ||
yāvattvaṃ bhūtale.avātsīstāvatsa bhūtale vaset ||
tatpaścātsvargatiṃ prāpya jayanto hi bhaviṣyati || 17 ||
ityukte vacane devyā niśśokāste tadābhavan ||
daśagrāmapuraṃ prāpya samūṣurjñāna tatparāḥ || 18 ||
iti śrībhaviṣye mahāpurāṇe pratisargaparvaṇi caturyugakhaṃḍāparaparyāye kaliyugīyetihāsasamuccaya caturdaśo.adhyāyaḥ || 14 || |||9|| ||
|| sūta uvāca || ||
indule svargasaṃprāpte te vīrāḥ śokakātarāḥ ||
śāradāṃ pūjayāmāsuḥ sarvalokanivāsinīm || 1 ||
japtvā saptaśatī stotraṃ trisandhyaṃ premabhaktitaḥ ||
dhyānenānandamāpannāstadā saptaśatehani || 2 ||
sāmantadvijaputraśca cāmuṇḍo nāma viśrutaḥ ||
so.aṣṭavarṣavayā bhūtvā pūjayāmāsa caṇḍikām || 3 ||
dvādaśābde tato jāte tricaritrasya pāṭhataḥ ||
parīkṣārthaṃ tu bhaktānāṃ sākṣānmūrtitvamāgatā || 4 ||
kuṃḍikeyaṃ ca bho bhaktāḥ pūrayāmi ca tāmaham ||
yūyaṃ tu manasopāyaiḥ kurudhvaṃ pūraṇe matim || 5 ||
sukhakhānistu balavānmadhupuṣpaistathā phalaiḥ ||
kuṇḍikāṃ pūrayā māsa na pūrṇatvamupāgatā ||
balakhānistathā māṃsairmūlaśarmā tu raktakaiḥ || 6 ||
devakī ca tadā havyaiścandanādibhirarcanaiḥ ||
kuṇḍikāṃ pūrayāmāsa na pūrṇatvamupāgatā || 7 ||
āhrādaścaiva sarvāṃgairudayaḥ śirasā svayam ||
kuṇḍikāṃ pūrayāmāsa tadā pūrṇatvamāgatā || 8 ||
uvāca vacanaṃ devī svabhaktānbhaktavatsalā ||
sukhākhāne bhavānvīro bhaviṣyati surapriyaḥ || 9 ||
balakhānirmahāvīro dīrghe kāle sa mṛtyubhāk ||
mūlaśarmā tu balavānraktabījo bhaviṣyati || 3.3.15.10 ||
devakī ca bhaveddevī cirakālaṃ svalokagā ||
āhlādaścaiva kṛṣṇāṃśastayormadhye dvayaṃ varam ||
ekastu devavatprokto balādhikyo dvitīyakaḥ || 11 ||
niṣkāmo.ayaṃ devasiṃho mṛto mokṣatvamāpnuyāt ||
ityuktvāntardadhe mātā te sarve tṛptimāgatāḥ || 12 ||
iti śrībhaviṣye mahāpurāṇe pratisargaparvaṇi caturyugakhaṃḍāparaparyāye kaliyugīyetihāsasamuccaye pañcadaśo.adhyāyaḥ || 15 || || cha ||
|| sūta uvāca || ||
prāpte saptadaśābde ca kṛṣṇāṃśe tatra cābhavat ||
śṛṇu tvaṃ muniśārdūla dṛṣṭaṃ yadyogadarśanāt || 1 ||
ratnabhānau mṛte rājñi marudhanvamahīpatiḥ ||
gajasenastadā vipra pṛthvīrājabhayāturaḥ || 2 ||
ārādhya pāvakaṃ devaṃ yajñadhyānavratārcanaiḥ ||
dvādaśābdaṃ sadācāraḥ premabhaktyā hyatoṣayat || 3||
tadā prasanno bhagavānpāvakīyaṃ hayaṃ śubham ||
dadau tasmai sutau cobhau kanyāṃ ca gajamuktikām || 4 ||
pāvakāste hi catvāraḥ samudbhūtā mahītale ||
agnivarṇā mahāvīrāḥ sarvalakṣaṇalakṣitāḥ || 5 ||
aṣṭādaśavayobhūtāḥ sarve te munipuṃgava ||
jātamātrā devasamāḥ sarvavidyāviśāradāḥ || 6 ||
aṣṭādaśābdavayasā sā kanyā varavarṇinī ||
durgāyāśca varaṃ prāptā dharmāṃśastvāṃ variṣyati || 7 ||
śārdūlavaṃśī sa nṛpaḥ kṛtavānvai svayaṃvaram ||
nānādeśyā nṛpāḥ prāptāḥ sutāyā rūpamohitāḥ || 8 ||
mārgaśīrṣe site pakṣe cāṣṭamyāṃ caṃdravāsare ||
tasyāḥ svayaṃvaraścāsītsā nṛpānprati cāyayau || 9 ||
vidyudvarṇaṃ mukhaṃ tasyāścaṃcalāyāstathāgatam ||
dṛṣṭvā mumoha dharmāṃśo balakhānirmahīpatiḥ || 3.3.16.10 ||
sāpi dṛṣṭvā ca taṃ vīraṃ mumoha gajamuktikā ||
buddhvā tasmai dadau mālāṃ vaijayaṃtī śubhānanā || 11 ||
tārakādyāśca bhūpālāḥ sarvaśastrāstrasaṃyutāḥ ||
rurudhuḥ sarvato vīraṃ te balātkanyakārthinaḥ || 12 ||
tathāvidhānnṛpāndṛṣṭvā bhūpānpaṃcaśatānbalī ||
sa śīghraṃ khaṅgamutsṛjya śatabhūpaśirāṃsyahan || || 13 ||
sarvato vadhyamānaṃ taṃ balakhāniṃ sa tārakaḥ ||
tadbhujābhyāṃ dadau khaḍgaṃ sa tadaṃge dvidhābhavat || 14 ||
mahīrājasuto jyeṣṭho dṛṣṭvā khaḍgaṃ tathā gatam ||
apovāha raṇācchūrastatpaścātte nṛpā yayuḥ || 15 ||
parājite nṛpabale balakhānirmahābalaḥ ||
tāṃ kanyāṃ śibikārūḍhāṃ svagehaṃ so.anayadbalī || 16 ||
tāṃ gacchaṃtīṃ sutāṃ dṛṣṭvā gajaseno mahīpatiḥ ||
mahīpatyājñayā prāpto jñātvā taṃ kṣatriyādhamam || 17 ||
jaṃbukaghnaṃ mahāvīraṃ māyayā tamamohayat ||
jāte nidrāture vīre durgāyāḥ śāpamohite || 18 ||
nigaḍaistaṃ babaṃdhāśu dṛḍhairlohamayai ruṣā ||
lohadurgaṃ ca saṃprāpya grāmarūpaṃ mahīpatiḥ || 19 ||
cāṃḍālāṃśca samāhūya kaṭhināṃstatravāsinaḥ ||
vadhāyājñāpayāmāsa tasya daṃḍairanekaśaḥ || 3.3.16.20 ||
te raudrāstaṃ samābadhya tāḍayāmāsurūjjitāḥ ||
tattāḍanāttadā nidrā tatraiva vilayaṃ gatā || 21 ||
dṛṣṭvā tatastu caṃḍālānbalakhāniratāḍayat ||
talamuṣṭiprahāreṇa cāṃḍālā maraṇaṃ gatāḥ || 22 ||
mṛte paṃcaśate raudre taccheṣā dudruvurbhayāt ||
kapāṭaṃ sudṛḍhaṃ kṛtvā nṛpāṃtikamupāyayuḥ || 23 ||
sa nṛpaḥ kāraṇaṃ jñātvā hastabaddho mahābalī ||
uvāca tatra gatvāsau vacanaṃ kāryatatparaḥ ||24||
bhavānmahābalo vīra cāṃḍālairbaṃdhanaṃ gataḥ ||
dasyubhirluṃṭhitastatra nidrāvaśyo vanaṃ gataḥ||25||
matsutā bhavane prāptā diṣṭyā tvaṃ jīvitaṃ gataḥ ||
udvāhya matsutāṃ śīghraṃ svagehaṃ yātumarhasi ||
iti śrutvā priyaṃ vākyaṃ taṃ praśasya tathākarot||26||
maṃḍape vedakarmāṇi vivāhārthaṃ cakāra saḥ ||
jātāyāṃ maṃḍapārcāyāṃ patramāhlādahetave || 27 ||
tadājñayā likhitvāsau gajaseno.agnisevakaḥ ||
uṣṭrārūḍhaṃ samāhūya śīghraṃ patramacodayat || 28 ||
balakhānervivāho.atra bhavānsainyasamanvitaḥ ||
saṃprāpya yogyadravyāṇi bhuktvā tvaṃ tṛptimāvaha || 29 ||
ityukte niśi jātāyāṃ balakhānirmahābalaḥ ||
bhojanaṃ kṛtavāṃstatra viṣajuṣṭaṃ nṛpārpitam || 3.3.16.30 ||
garalaṃ tena saṃbhuktaṃ na mamāra varācchubhāt ||
tataḥ kāle ca saṃprāpte dṛṣṭvā mohatvamāgatam ||
punarbabaṃdha nigaḍaistāḍayāmāsa vetasaiḥ || 31 ||
viṣadoṣamasṛkdvārānnissṛtaṃ sarvadehataḥ ||
tadā bubodha balavānbhūpatiṃ prāha namradhīḥ || 32 ||
rājankimīdṛśaṃ jātaṃ tvatsainyaṃ tāḍane ratam ||
sa āha bho mahāvīra matkule rītirīdṛśī ||
yātanāṃ prathamaṃ prāpya tadanūdvāhito bhavet || 33 ||
ityukte sati bhūpāle gajamuktā samāgatā ||
pitaraṃ prāha vacanaṃ ko.ayaṃ tattāḍane gataḥ || 34 ||
nṛpaḥ prāha sute śīghraṃ yāhi tvaṃ nijamaṃdire ||
kṛṣikaroyamāyāto dravyārthaṃ tāḍane gataḥ || 35 ||
iti śrutvā vaco ghoraṃ balakhānirmahābalaḥ ||
chittvā tadbaṃdhanaṃ ghoraṃ khaḍgahastaḥ samāyayau || 36 ||
śūrānpaṃcaśataṃ taṃ ca ruddhvā śastraiḥ samaṃtataḥ ||
prajaghnatastu tānsarvānbalakhānirvyanāśayat || 37 ||
gajasena suto jyeṣṭhaḥ sūryadyutirupāgataḥ ||
baddhvā punastaṃ balinaṃ gartamadhye samākṣipat || 38 ||
tathā gataṃ patiṃ dṛṣṭvā gajamuktā suduḥkhitā ||
niśi tatra gatā devī dattvā dravyaṃ tu rakṣakān || 39||
patiṃ niṣkāsya rudatī vyajanaṃ pataye dadau ||
rātraurātrau tathā prāptā vyatītaṃ pakṣamātrakam || 3.3.16.40 ||
etasminnaṃtare vīraścāhlādaḥ saptalakṣakaiḥ ||
sainyaiḥ sahāyayau śīghraṃ śrutvā tatraiva kāraṇam || 41 ||
balakhānirgato garte rurodha nagarīṃ tadā ||
gajaiḥ ṣoḍaśasāhasrairgajaseno raṇaṃ yayau || 42 ||
trilakṣaiśca hayaiḥ sārddhaṃ sūryadyutirupāyayau ||
kāṃtāmalastadā prāptastrilakṣaiśca padātibhiḥ || 43 ||
tayoścāsīnmahadyuddhamahorātraṃ hi sainyayoḥ ||
rakṣite tālanādye ca gajasenādyake tadā || 44 ||
dvitīye.ahni samāyāte gajaseno mahābalaḥ ||
prabhagnaṃ svabalaṃ dṛṣṭvā pāvakī.ayaṃ samāruhat ||
dāhayāmāsa tatsainyaṃ tālanādyaiśca pālitam || 45 ||
bhasmībhūtaṃ balaṃ dṛṣṭvā tālanaḥ śatrusammukhe ||
gatvā bhallena bhūpālaṃ tāḍayāmāsa vegataḥ || 46 ||
mūrchitaṃ nṛpamājñāya sūryadyutirupāyayau ||
pāvakīyaṃ samāruhya dāhayāmāsa tālanam || 47 ||
etasminnaṃtare śūrau devau cāhlādakṛṣṇakau ||
babandhatū ruṣāviṣṭau sūryadyutimariṃdamam || 48 ||
subaddhaṃ bhrātaraṃ jñātvā hayaṃ kāṃtāmalo.aruhat ||
devasiṃhaṃ ca saṃmohya kṛṣṇāṃśaṃ prati so.agamat ||
gṛhītvā taṃ sa kṛṣṇāṃśaṃ tasya tejaḥ samāharat || 49 ||
saptalakṣabalaṃ sarvaṃ vahnibhūtamabhūttadā ||
amaratvātsa āhlādastadā tu samajīvayat || 3.3.16.50 ||
gajasenasyārddhasainyaṃ taiśca sarvairvināśitam ||
vijayaṃ nṛpatiḥ prāpya harṣito gehamāyayau | 51 ||
vahnibhūtaṃ ca kṛṣṇāṃśaṃ dṛṣṭvāhlādaḥ suduḥkhitaḥ ||
