durgāṃ devīṃ sa tuṣṭāva manasā raṇamūrddhani || 52 ||
tadā devī vacaḥ prāha vatsa te putra eva ca ||
svargādāgatya sarvāṇi punarujjīvayiṣyati || 53 ||
ityukte vacane devyā indulo vāsavājñayā ||
dvādaśābdasamaṃ rūpaṃ dhṛtvā vidyāviśāradaḥ ||
vaḍavāmṛtamāruhya hayaṃ tatra samāgataḥ || 54 ||
tadaṅgāduddhṛtā vāhā meghā iva samantataḥ ||
pāvakaṃ śamayāmāsustrayaste devatopamāḥ || 55 ||
śamībhūte tadā vahnau svamukhātsahayo mudā ||
lālāmudvāhayāmāsa tayā te jīvitāstataḥ || 56 ||
jīvite saptalakṣe tu śamībhūte hi pāvake ||
gajasenaḥ sutābhyāṃ ca prayātaḥ sarvatodiśam || 57 ||
lakṣaṃ sainyaṃ tu ye śiṣṭāste sarve.api bhayāturāḥ ||
dudruvurbhārgavaśreṣṭha divyarūpatvadhāriṇaḥ || 58 ||
kecitsaṃnyāsino bhūtvā kecidvai brahmacāriṇaḥ ||
jīvatvaṃ prāptavantaste tathānye saṃkṣayaṃ gatāḥ || 59 ||
baddhvā tāngajasenādīṃstrīñchūrānsa ca tālanaḥ ||
kṛṣṇāṃśena samāyukta iṃdradurgaṃ samāyayau || 3.3.16.60 ||
balakhāniṃ ca niṣkāsya tālanastadanaṃtaram ||
pṛṣṭavān kāraṇaṃ sarvaṃ śrutvā tanmukhato vacaḥ ||
tānvīrāṃstāḍayāmāsa vetasaiḥ staṃbhabaṃdhanaiḥ || 61 ||
gajamuktājñayā vipra senāpatarirudāradhīḥ ||
tālanastānsamutsṛjya vivāhārthaṃ samāyayau ||
balakhānirhayārūḍho gajamuktā ca maṃḍape || 62 ||
gajasenastadā divyairbhojanaistānabhojayat ||
nivāsya lohadurge tānkapāṭaḥ sudṛḍhīkṛtaḥ ||
lakṣaśūrānsa saṃsthāpya svayaṃ rudrapuraṃ yayau ||63||
te rātrau lohadurgeṣu hyuṣitvā yatnato balāt ||
prabhāte ca kapāṭe na dvāraṃ dṛṣṭvā tadābravīt ||
dvāramudghāṭayāśu tvaṃ no cetprāṇāṃstyajiṣyasi || 64 ||
iti senāpatiḥ śrutvā lakṣaśūrānsamādiśat ||
nānāyatnaiśca haṃtavyāḥ śatravo bhayakāriṇaḥ || 65 ||
iti śrutvā tu te śūrāḥ śataghnyastaiḥ suropitāḥ ||
ekaikaṃ kramaśo jaghnurvṛṃdaṃ te vairatatparāḥ || 66 ||
hate daśasahasre tu kṛṣṇāṃśo biṃdulaṃ hayam ||
samāruhya jaghānāśu svakhaḍgena mahadbalam || 67 ||
hataśeṣā bhayārtāśca sahayāśītisammitāḥ ||
iṃdradurgaṃ prati prāhuryathā jāto balakṣayaḥ || 68 ||
śrutvā bhayāturo rājā svasutābhyāṃ samanvitaḥ ||
gajamuktāṃ puraskṛtya vahudravyasamanvitām ||
svapāpaṃ kṣālayāmāsa dattvā kanyāṃ vidhānataḥ || 69 ||
ṣoḍaśoṣṭrāṇi svarṇāni gṛhītvāhlāda eva saḥ ||
yayau svagehaṃ sahitaḥ putrabhrātṛsamanvitaḥ || 3.3.16.70 ||
saṃprāpte gehamāhlāde devī svarṇavatī svayam ||
indulaṃ svāṃkamāropya lalāpa karuṇaṃ bahu || 71 ||
mṛtāhaṃ ca tvayā putra punarujjīvitā khalu ||
dhanyāhaṃ kṛtakṛtyāsmi jayanta tava darśanāt ||72||
iti śrutvendulo vīro natvāha jananīṃ mudā||
anṛṇaṃ nādhigacchāmi tvatto mātaḥ kadācana||73||
saṃprāpte gehamāhlāde rājā parimalaḥ sudhīḥ ||
vādyāni vādayāmāsa viprebhyaśca dadau dhanam|| 74||
iti śrībhaviṣye mahāpurāṇe pratisargaparvaṇi caturyugakhaṃḍāpaparaparyāye kaliyugīyetihāsasamuccaye ṣoḍaśo.adhyāyaḥ || 16 || || a ||
|| sūta uvāca || ||
kṛṣṇāṃśe.aṣṭādaśābde tu yathājātaṃ tathā śṛṇu ||
mṛte kṛṣṇakumāre tu bhūpatau ratnabhānunā || 1 ||
mahīrājaḥ suduḥkhārto lakṣacaṃḍīmakārayat ||
homānte tu tadā devī vāguvāca nṛpaṃ prati || 2 ||
varṣevarṣe tu te sapta bhaviṣyaṃtyaṃgasambhavāḥ ||
kumārāḥ kauravāṃśāśca draupadyaṃśā sutā nṛpa || 3 ||
ityukte vacane tasminrājñī garbhamatho dadhau ||
karṇāṃśaśca suto jātastārako balavattaraḥ || 4 ||
dvitīyābde tathā jāte duśśāsanaśubhāṃśataḥ ||
nṛhaririti vikhyātastṛtīyābde tu cābhavat || 5 ||
uddharṣāṃśaḥ saradano durmukhāṃśastu mardanaḥ ||
vikarṇāṃśaḥ sūryyakarmā bhīmaścāṃśo viviṃśateḥ || 6 ||
varddhanaścitrabāṇāṃśo velā tadanu cābhavat ||
yathā kṛṣṇā tathā saiva rūpaceṣṭāguṇairmune || 7 ||
bhuvi tasyāṃ ca jātāyāṃ bhūkampo dāruṇo.abhavat ||
aṭṭāṭṭahāsamaśivaṃ cāmuṃḍā khe cakāra ha ||
raktavṛṣṭiḥ pure cāsīdasthiśarkarayā yutā || 8 ||
brāhmaṇāśca samāgatya jātakarmādikāṃ kriyām ||
kṛtvā nāma tathā cakre śṛṇu bhūmipa sākṣaram || 9 ||9||
ilā ca śaśino mātā vikalpenā.abhavadbhuvi ||
tasmādveleti vikhyātā kanyeyaṃ rūpaśālinī || 3.3.17.10 ||
jātāyāṃ ca sutāyāṃ sa pitā viprebhya uttamam ||
dadau dānaṃ mudā yukto vāsāṃsi vividhāni ca || 11 ||
dvādaśābdavayaḥ prāpte sā sutā varavarṇinī ||
uvāca pitaraṃ namrā śṛṇu tvaṃ pṛthivīpate || 12 ||
maṃḍape raktadhārābhiryo māṃ saṃsnāpayiṣyati ||
draupadyā bhūṣaṇaṃ dātā sa me bhartā bhaviṣyati ||13||
svarṇapatre tadā rājā padyaṃ velāmukhodbhavam ||
likhitvā tārakaṃ prāha tvamanveṣaya tatpatim || 14 ||
sārddhaṃ lakṣatrayaṃ dravyaṃ gṛhītvā lakṣasainyakaḥ ||
nṛpāntaraṃ yayau śīghraṃ tārakaḥ piturājñayā || 15||
siṃdhusthāne cāryadeśe bhūpaṃ bhūpaṃ yayau balī ||
na gṛhītaṃ nṛpaiḥ keścittadvākyaṃ ghoramulbaṇam ||
mahīpatiṃ sa saṃprāpya mātulaṃ tadvaco.abravīt || 16 ||
śrutvā sa āha bho vīra brahmānando mahābalaḥ ||
sa ca vākyaṃ pragṛhṇīyādāhlādādyaiḥ surakṣitaḥ || 17 ||
kiṃ tvayā viditaṃ naiva caritaṃ tasya viśrutam ||
bhavānṣaḍbaṃdhusahitaḥ kṛṣṇāṃśādyairvivāhitaḥ || 18 ||
te sarve vaśagāstasya brahmānaṃdasya dhīmataḥ ||
nāsti bhūmaṃḍale kaścittadbalena samo nṛpaḥ || 19 ||
iti śrutvā yayau tūrṇaṃ tārakaḥ svabalaiḥ saha ||
tatpadyaṃ kathayitvāgre hastabaddhastadābhavat || 3.3.17.20 ||
kṛṣṇāṃśastu gṛhītvāśu padyaṃ vākyamuvāca ha ||
ahaṃ vivāhayiṣyāmi brahmānaṃdaṃ nṛpottamam || 21 ||
tūṣṇīṃ bhūtāstadā sarve tārakaḥ sa dvijaiḥ saha ||
abhiṣekaṃ tadā kṛtvā svagehaṃ punarāyayau || 22 ||
māghamāse site pakṣe trayodaśyāṃ suvāsare ||
vivāhalagnaṃ śubhadaṃ varakanyārthayostadā || 23 ||
saptalakṣabalaiḥ sārddhaṃ lakṣaṇaśca satālanaḥ ||
mahāvatīṃ purīṃ prāpto balī parimalādibhiḥ || 24 ||
āhlādo lakṣasainyāḍhyaḥ kṛṣṇāṃśena samanvitaḥ ||
balakhānirlakṣasainyaḥ saṃyutaḥ sukhakhāninā || 25 ||
netrasiṃho lakṣasainyo yogabhogasamanvitaḥ ||
raṇajicca balī bālo dvilakṣabalasaṃyutaḥ || 26 ||
evaṃ dvādaśalakṣāṇāṃ sainyānāmadhipo balī ||
tālanaḥ siṃhinīsaṃstho vaḍavāṃ prayayau saha || 27 ||
sainyairdvādaśalakṣaiśca sahitastālano balī ||
āyayau dehalīgrāme mahīrājānupālite || 28 ||
devo manorathārūḍho viṃdulasthaḥ sa kṛṣṇakaḥ ||
vaḍavāmṛtamāsādya svarṇavatyāḥ suto gataḥ || || 29 ||
rūpaṇaśca karālastha āhlādaśca papīhake ||
balakhāniḥ kapotastho hariṇastho.anujastataḥ || 3.3.17.30 ||
raṇajinmalanāputraḥ saṃsthito harināgare ||
pañcaśabdagajārūḍho mahāvatyadhipo gataḥ || 31 ||
vimānavaramāruhya dhīvaraiḥ śatavāhikaiḥ ||
maṇimuktāsvarṇamayaṃ sahasrairvādyakairyutam || 32 ||
ayutaiśca patākaiśca vetrapāṇisahakrakaiḥ ||
sahasraiḥ śibikābhiśca pañcasāhasrakai rathaiḥ || 33 ||
śakaṭairmahiṣoḍhaistu tathā pañcasahasrakaiḥ ||
sarvatopaskṛtaṃ ramyaṃ brahmānaṃdaṃ samāgataḥ || 34 ||
śrutvā kolāhalaṃ teṣāṃ mahīrājo nṛpottamaḥ ||
vismitaḥ sa babhūvātra śibirāṇi mudā dadau || 35 ||
durgadvāri kriyāṃ ramyāṃ kṛtvā vidhividhānataḥ ||
draupadyā bhūṣaṇaṃ dehi velāyai sa tamabravīt || 36 ||
indulastu yayau svargaṃ vāsavaṃ prati cābravīt ||
draupadyā bhūṣaṇaṃ sarvaṃ dehi mahyaṃ surottama || 37 ||
kuberātsa samānīya divyamābhūṣaṇaṃ dadau ||
indulaḥ praharānte ca prāptaḥ pitre nyavedayat || 38 ||
āhlādastu svayaṃ gatvā velāye bhūṣaṇaṃ dadau ||
prāpte brāhme muhūrte tu vivāhastatra cābhavat || 39 ||
saṃprāpte prathamāvarte tārakaḥ khaḍgamādadau ||
āhlādastaṃ samāsādya yuyudhe bahulīlayā || 3.3.17.40 ||
nṛharistu dvitīye ca kṛṣṇāṃśaṃ prati cārudhat ||
tathā saradanaṃ vīraṃ balakhānirupāyayau || 41 ||
mardanaṃ sukhakhānistu caturthāvartake.arudhat ||
raṇajitsūryavarmāṇaṃ sa bhīmaṃ rūpaṇo balī ||
devastu vardhanaṃ vīraṃ saptāvarte kramādyayau || 42 ||
śatabhūpānkhaḍgadharāngajasenādikāṃstadā ||
lakṣaṇādyāḥ samājagmurmaṃḍape bahuvistate || 43 ||
bhagnabhūtaṃ nṛpabalaṃ dṛṣṭvā rājā ruṣānvitaḥ ||
mahīrājo yayau rūḍho gajaṃ cāribhayaṃkaram || 44 ||
jitvā tānnetrasiṃhādīñchabdavedhī nṛpottamaḥ ||
lakṣaṇaṃ prayayau śīghraṃ bauddhinīṃ hastinīṃ sthitam || 45 ||
śivaṃ manasi saṃsthāpya jitvā baddhvā ruṣānvitaḥ ||
agamattamupagṛhya darśayāmāsa taṃ nṛpam || 46 ||
śrutvā parimalo rājā kṛṣṇāṃśaṃ bhīruko yayau ||
vṛttāntaṃ kathayāmāsa cāhrādādiparājayam|| 47 ||
ajitaḥ sa ca kṛṣṇāṃśo nabhomārgeṇa maṃdiram ||
gatvā jagarja balavānyoginyānaṃdadāyakaḥ || 48 ||
tadā sa lakṣaṇo vīrastyaktvā baṃdhanamuttamam ||
viṣṇuṃ manasi saṃsthāpya mahīrājaṃ samāyayau || 49 ||
gṛhītvā cāgamāṃ dolāṃ svayaṃ śibiramāptavān || 3.3.17.50 ||
etasminnaṃtare sarve tyaktvā mūrcchāṃ samaṃtataḥ ||
khaḍgayuddhena tāñjitvā baddhvā tānnigaḍairdṛḍhaiḥ || 51 ||
sānvayāñchatabhūpāṃśca hatvā tadrudhirāvahaiḥ ||
draupadīṃ snāpayāmāsurvelārūpāṃ kalottamām || 52 ||
vivāhānte ca te sarve śibirāṇi samāyayuḥ ||
samutsṛjya sutānsapta subhojyaiste hyabhojayan || 53 ||
bhuktavatsu suvīreṣu sāhasrāstaiḥ sutaiḥ saha ||
rurudhuḥ sarvato jaghnurastraśastraiḥ samaṃtataḥ || 54 ||
sahasraśūrāṃstānhatvā punarbaddhvā mahābalān ||
śibirāṇi samājagmusteṣāṃ hāsyaviśāradāḥ || 55 ||
daśalakṣasuvarṇāni gṛhītvā nṛpatirbalī ||
velāṃ navoḍhāmādāya gatvā natvā tamabravīt || 56 ||
pradyotasuta he rāja~mllakṣaṇo.asau mahābalaḥ ||
mama patnīṃ samādāya dāsīṃ kartuṃ samicchati || 57 ||
iti śrutvā parimalaḥ sarva bhūpasamanvitaḥ ||
bahudhā bodhitaścaiva na bubodha tadā nṛpaḥ || 58 ||
tadā mahāsatī velā vilalāpa bhṛśaṃ muhuḥ ||
tacchutvā sa ca kṛṣṇāṃśaḥ sahito balakhāninā ||
tāmāśvāsya tadā velāṃ nabhomārgeṇa cāyayau ||59||
lakṣaṇaṃ tarjayitvāsau gṛhītvā cāgamanmudā||
nabhomārgeṇa gehe taṃ kṛṣṇāṃśaḥ samapeṣayat || 3.3.17.60 ||
punastyaktvā sapta sutānsahitānnṛpatestu te ||
śapathaṃ kārayāmāsurdaṃbhaṃ prati mahābalāḥ ||
uṣitvā daśarātrāṃte dadhyurgaṃtumano mune ||61||
mahīrājastu balavāngṛhītvā bhūpateḥ padau ||
sa uvācāśrupūrṇākṣastadā parimalaṃ nṛpam || 62 ||
mahārāja vadhūste ca veleyaṃ dvādaśābdikā ||
pitṛmātṛviyogaṃ ca na kṣamaṃtī tu bālikā || 63 ||
tasmāttāṃ tvaṃ parityajya gaccha gehaṃ sukhī bhava ||
patiyogyā yadā bhūyāttadā tvāṃ punareṣyati||64||
ityuà¥ktvā ca vaco rājā sa snehādaṃkamaspṛśat||
cūrṇībhūte parimale cāhlādastatra duḥkhitaḥ||
mahīrājaṃ sa pasparśa sa rājā cūrṇatāṃ gataḥ|| 65||
bhagnāsthī bhūpatī cobhau pāvakīyaiścikitsakaiḥ||
sukhavaṃtau gṛhaṃ prāpya kṛtakṛtyatvamāgatau||66||
malanā svasutaṃ dṛṣṭvā prāptamudvāhitaṃ gṛhe ||
kṛtvotsavaṃ bahuvidhaṃ viprebhyaśca dadau dhanam ||
homaṃ vai kārayāmāsa caṃḍikāyāḥ prasādataḥ || 67 ||
sabhāyāṃ lakṣaṇo vīro yātrākāle tamabravīt ||
agamā jayacandrāya matvā jitvā hṛtāṃ tu tām ||
nabhomārgeṇa saṃprāptau yoginau ca śivājñayā||68||
jahatustau ca māṃ jitvā tattīkṣṇabhaya mohitam ||
adyāhaṃ dhāma gacchāmi ciraṃ jīva nṛpottama ||
ityuktavaṃtaṃ taṃ natvā yayurbhūpāḥ svamālayam || 69 ||
iti śrībhaviṣye mahāpurāṇe pratisargaparvaṇi caturyugakhaṇḍāparaparyāye kaliyugīyetihāsasamuccaye saptadaśo.adhyāyaḥ || 17 || ||8|||
|| sūta uvāca || ||
viṃśābde caiva kṛṣṇāṃśe yathā jātaṃ tathā śṛṇu ||
sāgarākhyasarastīre kadācidiṃdulo balī ||
japtvā saptaśatīstotraṃ tatra dhyānānvito.abhavat ||1||
etasminnaṃtare haṃsā ākāśādbhū mimāgatāḥ ||
teṣāṃ ca rutaśabdaiśca sa dhyānādutthito.abhavat || 2 ||
vakṣyamāṇaṃ vacaḥ prāhurdhanyo.ayaṃ divyavigrahaḥ ||
parvatānāṃ himagirirvanaṃ vṛṃdāvanaṃ tathā || 3 ||
mahāvatī purīṇāṃ ca sāgaraḥ sarasāmapi ||
nārīṇāṃ padminī nārī nṛṇāṃ śreṣṭhastvamiṃdulaḥ || 4 ||
bho indula mahāprājña mānase sarasi sthitāḥ ||
vayaṃ śrutvā śriyo vākyaṃ nalinī sāgaraṃ gatāḥ || 5 ||
dṛṣṭvā tatra śubhāṃ nārīṃ sarvābharaṇabhūṣitām ||
saptālibhiryutāṃ ramyāṃ gītanāṭya viśāradām || 6 ||
dṛṣṭvā mohatvamāpannā vayaṃ deśāntaraṃ gatāḥ ||
vilokitā narāḥ sarve.atrāsmābhirjagatītale ||
tvatsamo na hi ko.apyatra padminī sadṛśo varaḥ || 7 ||
tasmāttvaṃ naḥ samāruhya tāṃ devīṃ draṣṭumarhasi ||
tathetyuktvā śakrasuto haṃsarājaṃ samāruhat || 8 ||
siṃhaladvīpake ramye hyāryasiṃho nṛpaḥ sthitaḥ ||
tatsutā padminī nāmnā rūpayauvanaśālinī ||
rāgiṇyaḥ sapta vikhyātāstatsakhyaḥ pramadottamāḥ || 9 ||
nalinīsāgare ramye girijāmaṃdiraṃ śubham ||
tatra sthitāṃ ca tāṃ devīmindulaḥ sa dadarśa ha || 3.3.18.10 ||
sāpi taṃ sundaraṃ dṛṣṭvā haṃsadehe samāsthitam ||
saṃmohyāhūya taṃ devaṃ tena sārddhamarīramat ||11||
varṣamekaṃ yayau tatra nānālīlāsu mohitaḥ ||
naktaṃ divaṃ na bubudhe ramamāṇastayā saha || 12||
bhaktigarvatvamāpanne cāhlāde jagadaṃbikā ||
dṛṣṭvā cāntardadhe devī garvācaraṇakuṃṭhitā || 13 ||
tasya prāptaṃ mahadduḥkhamāhlādasya jayaiṣiṇaḥ ||
sa kaiścitpuruṣairvīraḥ kathito.abhūtsva maṃdire || 14 ||
indulaṃ rūpasampannaṃ laṃkāpuranivāsinaḥ ||
rākṣasāstaṃ samāhṛtya svagehaṃ śīghramāyayuḥ || 15 ||
iti śrutvā vaco ghoraṃ sakulo vilalāpa ha ||
hāhāśabdo mahāṃścāsītteṣāṃ tu rudatāṃ mune || 16 ||
kṛṣṇāṃśo ruditaṃ prāhāhlādaṃ jyeṣṭhaṃ śṛṇuṣva bhoḥ ||
jitvāhaṃ rākṣasānsarvāṃstālanādyaiḥ samanvitaḥ ||
iṃdulaṃ tvāṃ sameṣyāmi bhavāndhairyaparo bhavet ||17||
balakhāniśca kṛṣṇāṃśo devasiṃhaśca tālanaḥ ||
saptalakṣabalaiḥ sārddhaṃ lakāṃ prati yayurmudā || 18 ||
mārgaprāptāśca ye bhūpā grāmapā rāṣṭrapāstathā ||
yathāyogya baliṃ ramyaṃ prāpya tasmai nyavedayan ||19||
ye bhūpā madamattāśca jitvā tāṃstālano balī ||
baddhvā taiśca samāgacchatsetubaṃdhaṃ śivasthalam ||3.3.18.20||
pūjayitvā ca rāmeśaṃ rāmeṇa sthāpitaṃ śivam ||
siṃhaladvīpamaganṣaṇmāsābhyaṃtare tadā ||21||
nalinīsāgaraṃ prāpya tatra vāsamakārayan ||
patraṃ saṃpreṣayāmāsa balakhānirnṛpāya ca ||22||
āryyasiṃha mahābhāga svapotāndehi tīrṇakān ||
bhavā~mśca svabalaiḥ sārddhaṃ laṃkāṃ prati vrajādhunā ||
no cettvāṃ sabalaṃ jitvā rāṣṭrabhaṃgaṃ karomyaham ||23||
iti śrutvā patravaco bhūpatirbalavattaraḥ ||
rakṣitaḥ śakraputreṇa yuddhāya samupāyayau ||24||
indulaḥ staṃbhanaṃ maṃtraṃ saṃsthāpya śara uttame ||
staṃbhayāmāsa tatsainyaṃ tālanādyaiḥ surakṣitam || ||25||
divase sukhaśarmā ca trilakṣaiḥ svadalaiḥ saha ||
āryyasiṃhasya tanayo mahadyuddhamacīkarat || 26 ||
niśāmukhe ca saṃprāpte śakraputro mahābalaḥ|
śataputraiḥ kṣatriyāṇāṃ sārddhaṃ yuddhāya cāyayau ||27||
teṣāṃ hayā haridvarṇā yogiveṣadharā balāt ||
mahatīṃ te sahasraṃ ca ripoḥ senāṃ vyanāśayat ||
tatpaścādgehamāsādya tadā taiḥ sukhito.avasat || 28 ||
evaṃ jātāśca ṣaṇmāsāstayoryuddhaṃ hi senayoḥ ||
krameṇa saṃkṣayaṃ prāptaṃ balakhānermahadbalam || 29 ||
iti śrībhaviṣye mahāpurāṇe pratisargaparvaṇi caturyugakhaṃḍāparaparyāye kaliyugīyetihāsasamuccaye.aṣṭādaśo.adhyāyaḥ || 18 ||||9|||
|| sūta uvāca || ||
dṛṣṭvā sainyanipātaṃ ca balakhānirmahābalaḥ ||
saṃprāpya mānasīṃ pīḍāṃ yuddhārthaṃ vimukho.abhavat ||1||
devasiṃhaṃ samāhūya trikālajñaṃ mahāmatim ||
taṃ maṃtraṃ maṃtrayāmāsa kāryasiddhiryathā bhavet ||
śrutvovāca mahāyogī devasiṃho mahābalaḥ ||2||
maheṃdratanayaḥ kaścitsarvaśastrāstrakovidaḥ ||
tvatsainyaṃ rodhayitvā vai divyāstreṇa divāmukhe ||
rātrau svayaṃ samāgamya karoti balasaṃkṣayam ||3||
atastvaṃ matsahāyena tālanena samanvitaḥ ||
kṛṣṇāṃśena samāgamya śakra putraṃ śubhānanam ||
vijayī bhava śīghraṃ hi no cedyāyāṃ yamakṣayam ||4||
iti śrutvā vacastasya devasiṃhasya bhāṣitam ||
yatnaṃ cakāra balavānbhrātṛmitrasamanvitaḥ ||||
ekaviṃśābdakṛṣṇāṃśe saṃprāpte yuddhakovide ||
senāṃ niveśayāmāsa poteṣu hayavāhanaḥ ||6||
arddhaṃ sainyaṃ ca tatraiva sthāpayitvā mahābalaḥ ||
arddhasainyena kṛṣṇāṃśo dakṣiṇāṃ diśamāgamat || 7 ||
hayārūḍhāśca te śūrāḥ sarve yuddhasamanvitāḥ ||
kapāṭaṃ dṛḍhamudghāṭya nagarāntamupāyayuḥ ||8||
hatvā te rakṣiṇaḥ sarvā~mlluṃṭhayitvā puraṃ śubham ||
ripordurgaṃ samāsādya cakruḥ śatrormahākṣayam || 9 ||
rājño.antaḥ puramāgatya kṛṣṇāṃśo balavattaraḥ ||
dadarśa sundarīṃ bālāṃ padminīṃ padmalocanām ||
saptālibhirvṛtāṃ ramyāṃ gītanṛtyaviśāradām || 3.3.19.10 ||
balāddolāṃ samāropya luṃṭhayitvā riporgṛham||
jagāma śivire tasminyatra jāto mahāraṇaḥ || 11 ||
balakhānistu balavāndevatālanasaṃyutaḥ ||
jaghāna śātravīṃ senāmindulāstreṇa pālitām || 12 ||
sukhavarmāṇamāgatya senādhyakṣaṃ ripoḥ sutam ||
sarvatastaṃ svakīyāstrairjaghnuste madavihvalāḥ || 13 ||
hate tasminmahāvīrye jayantaḥ krodhamūrcchitaḥ ||
senāmujjīvayāṃcakre śakraputraḥ pratāpavān || 14 ||
śyālaṃ ca sukhavarmāṇaṃ saṃjīvya svagṛhaṃ yayau ||
tatra dṛṣṭvā janānsarvānbahurodanatatparān || 15 ||
vismitaḥ sa yayau gehaṃ yathā pūrvaṃ tathāvidhaḥ ||
na dadarśa priyāṃ tatra sakhībhiḥ sahitāṃ mune || 16 ||
āryyasiṃhagṛhaṃ gatvā pṛṣṭavānsarvakāraṇam ||
jñātvā saṃluṭhitaṃ gehaṃ śatrubhiḥ śastrakovidaiḥ || 17 ||
ruroda subhṛśaṃ vīro hā priye madavihvale ||
darśayādya mukhaṃ ramyaṃ tvatpatistvāṃ samutsukaḥ ||18||
ityevaṃ rodanaṃ kṛtvā vaḍavopari saṃsthitaḥ ||
dhanustūṇīramādāya khaḍgaṃ śatruvimohanam ||
ekākī sa yayau kruddho niśi yatra sthito ripuḥ || 19 ||
etasminsamaye vīro balakhānirmahābalaḥ ||
dṛṣṭvā tāṃ sundarīṃ bālāṃ vilalāpa bhṛśaṃ muhuḥ || 3.3.19.20 ||
hā indula mahāvīra hā madbaṃdho priyaṃkara ||
tvadyogyeyaṃ śubhā nārī rūpayauvanaśālinī||21||
darśanaṃ dehi me śīghraṃ gṛhāṇādya śubhānanām ||
ityuktvā mūrcchito bhūtvā mānase pūjayañchivām ||22|| |
tasminkāle ca saṃprāptaḥ śakraputro mahābalaḥ||
jaghāna śātravīṃ senāṃ kṛṣṇāṃśenaiva pālitām || 23 ||
dṛṣṭvā sainyanipātaṃ ca tālano vāhinīpatiḥ|| |
siṃhanādaṃ nanādoccaiḥ siṃhinyupari saṃsthitaḥ || 24 ||
na jayaḥ sainyanāśena tava vīra bhaviṣyati ||
māṃ hatvā jahi matsainyaṃ yoginbālasvarūpaka || |||25||
iti śrutvā vacastasya śakraputro bhayaṃkaraḥ ||
jaghāna hṛdaye bāṇānsa tu khaḍgena cācchinat ||
svabhallena punarvīro daṃśayāmāsa vakṣasi ||26||
iṃdule mūrchite tasminvaḍavā divyarūpiṇī ||
ākāśopari saṃprāpya jayantaṃ samabodhayat ||27||
tadā sa bālastvaritaḥ kālāstraṃ cāpa ādadhe||
tena jāto mahāñchabdastālanaḥ sa mamāra ha || 28 ||
mṛte senāpatau tasminkṛṣṇāṃśo madavihvalaḥ ||
nabhomārgeṇa saṃprāpya jagarjja ca muhurmuhuḥ || 29 ||
indulaḥ krodhatāmrākṣastvāgneyaṃ śaramādade ||
vahnibhūtaṃ nabhastatra svayogena mahābalaḥ ||
kṛtvā śīghraṃ yayau śatruṃ sa tu vāyavyamādadhe || 3.3.19.30 ||
svayogenaiva kṛṣṇāṃśaḥ pītvā vāyavyamuttamam ||
punarjagāma tatpārśvaṃ kalaikaḥ sa hareḥ svayam ||31||
tathāvidhaṃ ripuṃ dṛṣṭvā śakraputro mahābalaḥ ||
gaṃdharvāstraṃ samādāya mohanāyopacakrame || 32 ||
punaryogabalenaiva tadastraṃ saṃkṣayaṃ gatam ||
vāruṇaṃ śaramādāya tasyopari samākṣipat || 33 ||
svayogenaiva kṛṣṇāṃśo jalaṃ sarvaṃ mukhe.akarot ||
evaṃ sarvāṇi cāstrāṇi pītvā pītvā punaḥpunuḥ ||34||
yayau śīghraṃ prasannātmā bāhuśālī yatendriyaḥ ||
iṃdulastu tadā kruddho.aśvinīṃ tyaktvā bhuvi sthitaḥ ||
carma khaḍgaṃ gṛhītvāśu khaḍgayuddhamacīkarat ||35||
etasminnaṃtare prāptā devādyāḥ sarvabhūmipāḥ ||
dadṛśustanmahadyuddhaṃ sarvavismayakāraṇam || 36 ||
prātaḥkāle ca saṃprāpte balakhānirmahābalaḥ ||
dadarśa vālakaṃ ramyaṃ jaṭājinasamanvitam || 37 ||
śrameṇa karśito vīraḥ śakraputraḥ pratāpavān ||
balakhāneḥ piturbandhoḥ śapathaṃ kṛtavānsvayam || 38 ||
svakhaḍgenaiva kṛṣṇāṃśa śirastava harāmyaham ||
no cenme dūṣitā mātā nāmnā svarṇavatī satī ||
ityuktvā khaḍgamādāya yayau śīghraṃ ruṣānvitaḥ || 39 ||
balakhānistu taṃ jñātvā tyaktvāstraṃ premakātaraḥ ||
putrāṃtikamupāgamya vacanaṃ cedamabravīt || 3.3.19.40 ||
he indula mahābhāga pitṛmātṛyaśaskara ||
āhlādaprāṇasadṛśa svarṇavatyaṃgamānasa || 41 ||
pūrvaṃ hatvā ca māṃ vīra svapitṛvyaṃ tataḥ punaḥ ||
tathaivodayasiṃhaṃ ca devasiṃhaṃ tathā kulam ||
sukhī bhava mahāvīra gehe vai sukhavarmaṇaḥ || 42 ||
iti śrutvā vacastasya jñātvā ca svakulaṃ śiśuḥ ||
tyaktvā khaḍgaṃ patitvā ca svapitṛvyasya pādayoḥ ||
kṛtavānrodanaṃ gāḍhamaparādhanivṛttaye || 43 ||
uvāca madhuraṃ vākyaṃ śṛṇu tāta mama priya ||
nārīyaṃ dūṣitā vedairnṛṇāṃ mohapradāyinī || 44 ||
devo vā mānuṣo vāpi pannago vāpi dānavaḥ ||
āryya nārīmayairjālairbandhanāya samudyataḥ ||45||
sohamājanmaśuddhasya piturāhlādakasya ca ||
gehe jāto jayantaśca śakraputraḥ svayaṃ vibho || 46 ||
padminyā janitaṃ mohaṃ gṛhītvā jñātavānna hi ||
kṣamasva mama mandasya śeṣamajñānajaṃ pituḥ || 47 ||
ityuktvā sa punarbālo ruroda snehakātaraḥ ||
senāmujjīvayāmāsa tālanaṃ ca mahābalam ||48||
iti śrutvā vacastasya kṛṣṇāṃśo vacanaṃ śiśoḥ ||
paramānandamāgamya hṛdaye tamaropayat||
utsavaṃ kārayāmāsa tatra deśe janejane ||49||
āryyasiṃhastu tacchrutvā nānādravyasamanvitaḥ ||
dadau kanyāṃ vidhānena padminīmiṃdulāya vai ||3.3.19.50||
śataṃ hayāṃstathā nāgānmuktāmaṇi vibhūṣitān ||
kanyārthe tāndadau rājā jāmātre bahubhūṣaṇam ||51||
prasthānamakarotteṣāṃ sa premṇā vākyagadgadaḥ ||
te tu sarve mudā yuktāḥ svagehaṃ śīghra māyayuḥ || 52 ||
uṣitvā māsamekaṃ tu tasminmārge bhayānake ||
kīrtisāgaramāsādya cakruste bahudhotsavam||53||
āhlādastu prasannātmā sutaṃ patnīsamanvitam ||
dṛṣṭvā viprānsamāhūya dadau dānānyanekaśaḥ ||54 ||
daśahārākhyanagaraṃ saṃprāptaḥ svakulaissaha ||
kṛṣṇāṃśasya mahākīrtirjātā loke jane jane ||59||
pṛthvīrājastu tacchrutvā vismayaṃ paramaṃ yayau ||
sā tu vai padminī nārī durvāsaḥśāpamohitā || 56 ||
apsasarastvaṃ svayaṃ tyaktvā bhūmau nārītvamāgatā ||
dvādaśābdapramāṇena soṣitvā jagatītale ||57||
yakṣmaṇā maraṇaṃ prāpya svargalokamupāyayau ||
nava māsānkṛto vāsastayā cāhlā damaṃdire ||58||
iti śrībhaviṣye mahāpurāṇe pratisargaparvaṇi caturyugakhaṃḍāparaparyāye kaliyugīyetihāsasamuccaye ekonaviṃśo.adhyāyaḥ ||19|| |||9||
|| || sūta uvāca || ||
mune pāṃcāladeśe tu rājāsīdbalavarddhanaḥ ||
tasya patnī viśālākṣī jaladevīti viśrutā || 1 ||
bisenavaṃśabhūpālo vedatattvaviśāradaḥ ||
sastrīkaḥ pūjayāmāsa varuṇaṃ yādasāṃ patim ||2 ||
tasya putrāvubhau jātau kṣatradharmaparāyaṇau ||
laharo jyeṣṭhatanayo mayūradhvaja eva hi || 3 ||
dvādaśābdavayā bhūtvā mayūradhvaja eva saḥ ||
ājñayā jyeṣṭhabaṃdhośca skaṃdadevamatoṣayat || 4 ||
yateṃdriyastathā maunī vānaprastha parāyaṇaḥ ||
paṃcābdaṃ tadvratī bhūtvā japadhyānaparobhavat || 5 ||
tadā prasanno bhagavānsenānīragnibhūḥ svayam ||
svarūpaṃ darśayāmāsa sarvāścaryasamanvi tam|| 6 ||
mayūradhvaja evāpi dṛṣṭvā sarvamayaṃ śiśum ||
devasenāsahāyaṃ ca tuṣṭāva ślakṣṇayā girā || 7 ||
mayūradhvaja uvāca ||
jayati te vapurdivyavigrahaṃ nayati sarvadā devatāgaṇān ||
pibati mātriyaṃ dugdhamuttamaṃ vadhati sarvadā daityadānavān || 8 ||
namaste devaseneśa mahiṣāsuramardana ||
ṣaḍānana mahābāho tārakaprāṇanāśaka || 9 ||
prasanno bhava sarvātmanguhaśaktidharāvyaya ||
kiṃkaraṃ pāhi māṃ nityaṃ śaraṇāgatavatsala || 3.3.20.10 ||
iti śrutvā stutiṃ tasya senānīstamuvāca vai ||
kiṃ te.abhīṣṭaṃ nṛpaśreṣṭha mattaḥ sarvamavāpsyasi || 11 ||
ityuktastena devena bhūpatiḥ prāha namradhīḥ ||
balaṃ me dehi bhagavansahāyaṃ kuru sarvadā || 12 ||
tathetyuktvā tu taṃ skaṃdastatraivāntardadhe punaḥ ||
sa nṛpastu prasannātmā kārayāmāsa vai puram || 13 ||
nāmnā mayūranagaraṃ naravṛṃdasamanvitam ||
dviyojanāyāmayutaṃ skaṃdadevena rakṣitam || 14 ||
laharo nāmā tadbaṃdhurdvidaśābdaprayatnataḥ ||
varuṇaṃ pūjayāmāsa nadīnadasamanvitam || 15 ||
tadā prasanno bhagavānvaruṇo yādasāṃ patiḥ ||
varaṃ brūhīti vacanaṃ premṇovāca mahīpatim || 16 ||
iti śrutvā.amṛtamayaṃ vacanaṃ laharo nṛpaḥ ||
tuṣṭāva ślakṣṇayā vācā pāśinaṃ payasāṃ patim || 17 ||
|| lahara uvāca || ||
yasya cittaṃ mahajjñeyaṃ tapo balasamanvitam ||
ataḥ pracetāste nāma namastubhyaṃ pracetase || 18 ||
ruṇaddhi payasāṃ vegaṃ na kenāpyavarodhitaḥ ||
atastvaṃ varuṇo nāma namaste varuṇāya vai || 19 ||
daityānāṃ baṃdhanārthāya devānāṃ jayahetave ||
divyaḥ pāśastvayānītaḥ pāśine te namonamaḥ || 3.3.20.20 ||
iti stutastadā devo rājñā tenaiva dhīmatā ||
nagarīṃ kārayāmāsa lāharīmatha cottamām ||21||
triyojanāyāmayutāṃ caturvarṇasamanvitām ||
svayaṃ ca grāmarakṣārthe tatrovāsa jalā dhipaḥ|| 22 ||
bhūpastu tatprasādena prāpa rājñīṃ śubhānanām ||
rāvī nāma mahāśreṣṭhā jñeyā devāṃganopamā || 23 ||
tasyāṃ sa janayāmāsa sutānṣo ḍaśasaṃmitān || dhārtarāṣṭrāṃśajānmukhyāngajatulyabalānvitān ||24||
tatpaścātkanyakā jātā nāmnā madanamaṃjarī ||
dvādaśābdavayaḥprāpte sutāyāḥ sa tu bhūpatiḥ || 25 ||
devasiṃhaṃ varaṃ matvā caṃdravaṃśinamuttamam ||
prāhūya jyeṣṭhatanayaṃ preṣayāmāsa bhūpatiḥ||26 ||
raṇadhīrastu tanayo lakṣamudrānvito balī ||
sahasraśabarasahitaḥ prāptavānsa mahāvatīm || 27 ||
natvā parimalaṃ bhūpaṃ tadīyātkulaśālinaḥ ||
svahetuṃ varṇayāmāsa vivāhārthe svasuḥ svayam ||28||
śrutvā parimalo bhūpo devasiṃhaṃ mahāmatim ||
āhūya vacanaṃ prāha vivāhārthe manaḥ kuru || 39 ||
devasiṃhastu balavānpitṛvyaṃ prāha namradhīḥ ||
vivāhaṃ na kariṣyāmi brahmacaryaṃ vrataṃ mama || 3.3.20.30 ||
bahudhā prārthitassarvairdvijavṛṃdasamanvitaiḥ ||
na tatyāja vrataṃ śreṣṭhaṃ devasiṃho mahāmatiḥ || || 31 ||
tadā parimalo bhūpo raṇadhīraṃ vaco.abravīt ||
sukhakhānirayaṃ bālo vivāhārthe vadāmyaham|| 32 ||
tatheti matvā sa nṛpo raṇadhīro gṛhaṃ yayau ||
pitaraṃ kathayāmāsa sukhakhānirmahāvrataḥ || 33 ||
etasminnantare dhūrto mahīpatiruvāca tam ||
ayogyo.ayaṃ vivāho.atra pāvakīye kulottame || 34 ||
śūdrīyo.atra varo rājanvarṇasaṃkarakārakaḥ ||
tasmāttvaṃ sainyasahito jetuṃ tāngaṃtumarhasi || 35 ||
kārāgāre lohamaye baṃdhanaṃ kuru bhūpateḥ ||
matkīrtiḥ svargagā nityaṃ jagatyaṃte bhaviṣyati || 36 ||
jitastairjambuko rājā netrasiṃhastu yo nṛpaḥ ||
tathā gajapatirbhūpaḥ pṛthvīrājo mahābalaḥ || 37 ||
āryasiṃhastathānye ca jitāste balavattarāḥ ||
iti śrutvā vaco ramyaṃ laharo nṛpasattamaḥ || 38 ||
senāṃ saṃsthāpayāmāsa caturaṃgabalānvitām ||
caturlakṣamitāṃ śreṣṭhāṃ pālitāṃ ṣoḍaśātmajaiḥ || 39 ||
māghaśukladaśamyāṃ ca balakhāniṃ mahābalaḥ ||
saṃprāptaḥ svakulaissārddhaṃ caturlakṣabalānvitam ||3.3.20.40||
deśe pāṃcālake ramye laharīnagare sthitaḥ ||
dvādaśābde ca kṛṣṇāṃśe tatra vāsamakārayat || 41 ||
nṛpaterājñayā śūrā yuddhāya samupāyayuḥ ||
balakhānistu dharmātmā dṛṣṭvā śūrāṃstathāgatān||
vīrānājñāpayāmāsa svakīyānsaṃgare punaḥ || 42 ||
tayoryuddhamabhūdghoraṃ senayorlomaharṣaṇam ||
paṃcame.ahni divā prāpte balakhānirmahābalaḥ ||
kṛṣṇāṃśenaiva sahito riporvadhamakārayat|| 43 ||
parājitāśca te śūrā hataśeṣā bhayāturāḥ ||
tāndṛṣṭvā ṣoḍaśasutā rathaṃ svaṃsvaṃ samāsthitāḥ ||
yuddhāyābhimukhaṃ jagmurdhanurbāṇaviśāradāḥ || 44 ||
kṛṣṇāṃśastāṃstathā dṛṣṭvā śaravarṣasamanvitān ||
ekākī prayayau śīghraṃ khaḍgacarmadharo balī || 45 ||
teṣāṃ dhanūṃṣi saṃchidya baddhvā tānyuddhadurmadān||
āhlādāya dadau vīraḥ kṛṣṇāṃśo raṇakovidaḥ || 46 ||
putrāṇāṃ bandhanaṃ śrutvā laharo nṛpasattamaḥ ||
plāvayāmāsa tatsainyaṃ balakhānermahātmanaḥ || 47 ||
jalībhūte tathā sainye jayanto balavattaraḥ ||
vāyavyāstreṇa samare śuśoṣa sakalaṃ jalam ||
laharasya tataḥ senāmuvāha bahuyojanam || 48 ||
tadā tu bhagavāndevo varuṇo yādasāṃ patiḥ ||
sutāmudvāhayāmāsa laharasya mahīpateḥ || 49 ||
laharo.api prasannātmā jñātvāṃśaṃ jagatītale ||
bhaktiṃ cakāra śuddhānāmaṃśānāṃ parayā mudā || 3.3.20.50 ||
dattvā ca bahudhā dravyaṃ parikramya punaḥpunaḥ ||
svānte niveśayāmāsa māsamātraṃ prasannadhīḥ || 51 ||
aṃśāste.api mahāpūjāṃ gṛhītvā laharapradām ||
dolāmāropya tāṃ devīṃ svagehāya yayurmudā || 52 ||
iti te kathitaṃ vipra kṛṣṇāṃśacaritaṃ śubham ||
sukhakhānervivāhaṃ ca śrutvānaṃdamavāpnuyāt ||53||
iti śrībhaviṣye mahāpurāṇe pratisargaparvaṇi caturyugakhaṃḍāparaparyāye kaliyugīyetihāsasamuccaye viṃśo.adhyāyaḥ ||20|| ||
|| ṛṣiruvāca || ||
gṛhaṃ gatvā ca te vīrāḥ kiṃ cakruścaritaṃ śubham ||
tattvaṃ kathaya viprendra sarvajño.asi mato hi naḥ || 1 ||
|| sūta uvāca || ||
gṛhamāgatya te sarve parito bhūpateḥ sabhām ||
gatvā vārtāṃ tathā cakruryathā jāto mahāraṇaḥ || 2 ||
śrutvā parimalo bhūpo vājivṛṃdaṃ kṣayaṃ gatam ||
āhūya sa ca kṛṣṇāṃśaṃ vacanaṃ prāha namradhīḥ || 3 ||
siṃdhudeśe ca gaṃtavyaṃ tvayā ca balaśālinā ||
pañcalakṣānhayānkṛtvā punarāgaccha vai gṛham ||4||
iti śrutvā tu kṛṣṇāṃśo devasiṃhena saṃyutaḥ ||
svarṇabhārasahasroṣṭrāngṛhītvā tarasā yayau || 5 ||
śūraiśca daśasāhasraissārddhaṃ tatra samāgataḥ ||
mayūranagarī yatra caturvarṇasamanvitā || 6 ||
prātaḥkāle tu saṃprāpte mālākārasya vai sutā||
puṣpānāma samāsannā cāraṃbhe kusumārthinī || 7 ||
kṛṣṇāṃśastu tadā pūjāṃ kṛtvā devamayo mudā ||
jagāma vipinaṃ ramyaṃ vasaṃte puṣpanālike || 8 ||
bahvāścaryayutaṃ puṣpa mattabhramaranāditam ||
dṛṣṭvā mumoha kṛṣṇāṃśastadarthe svayamudyataḥ || 9 ||
etasminnaṃtare puṣpā puṣpārthaṃ samupāgatā ||
dadarśa devasadṛśaṃ ṣoḍaśābdamayaṃ naram ||
prasannavadanaṃ śāntamiṃdranīlamaṇidyutim ||3.3.21.10||
kṛṣṇāṃśastu śubhāṃ nārīṃ dṛṣṭvāścaryamupāgataḥ ||
papraccha vacasā tāṃ vai kasyeyaṃ surasuṃdarī ||
svargalokādihāyātā yadi vā pannagī svayam || 11 ||
iti śrutvā ca sā prāha mālākārasya vai sutā ||
ahaṃ śūdrī mahābāho puṣpārthaṃ samupāgatā || 12 ||
puṣpeṇānena bhūpāla tulitā bhūpateḥ sutā ||
nāmnā puṣpavatī devī rādheva saguṇāvalī || 13 ||
devaiśca prārthitā bālā rūpayauvanaśālinī ||
makaraṃdabhayāddevāstasyā yogyā na vai balāt || 14 ||
śṛṇu tatkāraṇaṃ bhūpa makaraṃdo yathā bhavet ||
mayūradhvajabhūpena saṃprāpto guhato varaḥ || 15 ||
ajeyo.anyaiśca kṛṣṇāṃśādṛte tvaṃ jagatītale ||
tanmitraṃ pṛthivīrājo rājarājaḥ śivapriyaḥ || 16 ||
sa rājyaṃ kārayāmāsa dharmameghaṃ haripriyam ||
tadā prasanno bhagavānyajñeśo yajñamūrtimān||17||
mithunaṃ janayāmāsa pāvakātsuṃdarānanam ||
makaraṃdaḥ suto jñeyaḥ kanyā puṣpavatī matā || 18 ||
pañcamābdavayā bhūtvā makaraṃdo mahābalaḥ ||
tuṣṭāva tapasā dharmaṃ vedadharmaparāyaṇaḥ || 19 ||
dvādaśābdavayaḥ prāpte makaraṃde nṛpapriye ||
prasanno bhagavāndharmo dadau tasmai mahāhayam || 3.3.21.20 ||
śilāmayaṃ mahāvegaṃ śatrusenākṣayaṃkaram ||
tamaśvaṃ svayamāruhya sarvapūjyo hyabhūtsukhī ||21||
tasyedaṃ suṃdaraṃ divyaṃ vipinaṃ surapūjitam ||
bhavānarhati vai śreṣṭhaḥ puṣpavatyāḥ kalevaram || 22 ||
iti śrutvā tu vacanaṃ kṛṣṇāṃśaḥ smarapīḍitaḥ ||
dadau bahudhanaṃ tasyai mālinyā gehamāgataḥ || 23 ||
devasiṃhastu kālajño jñātvā mohatvamāgatam ||
kṛṣṇāṃśaṃ bodhayāmāsa padyaiḥ sāṃkhyasamudbhavaiḥ ||24 ||
kṛṣṇāṃśastu tatassārddhaṃ devasiṃhena tanmayaḥ ||
siṃdhudeśaṃ samāgatya krītvā sarvahayāṃstadā || 25 ||
māsānte gṛhamāgatya rājñe sarvānnyavedayat ||
puṣpavatyāḥ śubhaṃ rūpaṃ dhyātvā puṣperitaṃ balī ||
kṛṣṇāṃśo mohamāgatya tuṣṭāva jagadaṃbikām ||26||
kṛṣṇāṃśa uvāca ||
devamāye mahāmāye nityaśuddhasvarūpiṇi ||
pāhi māṃ kāmadevārtaṃ puṣpavatyai prabodhaya ||27||
madhukaiṭabhasaṃmohe mahiṣāsuraghātini ||
pāhi māṃ kāmadevārtaṃ puṣpavatya prabodhaya || 28 ||
dhūmralocanasaṃdāhe caṃḍamuṃḍavināśini ||
pāhi māṃ kāmadevārttaṃ puṣpavatyai prabodhaya || 29 ||
raktabījāsṛkkapīte sarvadaityabhayaṃkare ||
pāhi māṃ kāmadevārttaṃ puṣpavatyai prabodhaya || 3.3.21.30 || |
niśuṃbhadaityasaṃhāre śuṃbhadaityavināśini ||
pāhi māṃ kāmadevārttaṃ puṣpavatyai prabodhaya || 31 ||
iti stutvā ca suṣvāpa sa vīraḥ paramāsane ||
tadā tu śāradā devī tasyāḥ svapnapradarśanam ||
cakāra pratyahaṃ devī varadābhayakāriṇī || 32 ||
evaṃ gate caturmāse jalavṛṣṭikare mune ||
triviṃśābdavayaścāsītkṛṣṇāṃśasya yaśaskaram || 33 ||
kārtike kṛṣṇapakṣe tu gato.asau devasaṃyutaḥ ||
mayūranagare ramye makaraṃdena rakṣite || 34 ||
puṣpāgṛhamupāgamya tatra vāsamacīkarat || 35 ||
ekadā suṃdaraṃ hāra kṛṣṇāṃśenaiva guṃṭhitam ||
maṇimuktāyutaṃ ramyaṃ nānāpuṣpasamanvitam ||
gṛhītvā prayayau puṣpā puṣpavatyāśca maṃdire || 36 ||
sā tu graiveyakaṃ dṛṣṭvā tvaṣṭreva racitaṃ priyam ||
hṛdi kṛtvā mumohāśu kāminī ratirūpiṇi || 37 ||
aye sakhi mahāmāye satyaṃ kathaya me.agrataḥ ||
graiveyakamidaṃ ramyaṃ kutaḥ prāptaṃ mama priyam || 38 ||
iti śrutvā vacastasyā makaraṃdabhayāturā ||
puṣpā puṣpāṃjaliṃ kṛtvā vacanaṃ prāha tāṃ prati || 39 ||
jīvadānaṃ ca me dehi tarhi te kathayāmyaham ||
tathetyuktavatīṃ kanyāṃ sāha me bhaginī śubhe || 3.3.21.40 ||
kṛṣṇā nāma mahāramyā sarvalokavimohinī ||
mahāvatyāṃ gṛhaṃ tasyā madgṛhe sā samāgatā ||
tayā viracitaṃ subhūrgraiveyakamanuttamam || 41 ||
iti śrutvā tu vacanaṃ devī puṣpavatī svayam ||
uvāca mālinīṃ vākyaṃ rātriṃ darśaya tāṃ mama || 42 ||
makaraṃdabhayāddevāstathānye puruṣā bhuvi ||
matsamīpe gatirnāsti teṣāṃ satyaṃ bravīmyaham || 43 ||
iti śrutvā vaco ghoraṃ puṣpā tu bhayakātarā ||
novāca vacanaṃ kiñcitpṛcchyamānā punaḥ punaḥ || 44 ||
tadā puṣpavatī prāha kiṃ te bhayamupāgatam ||
sāha me bhaginī ramyā yadi tvadgehamāgatā || 45 ||
mohitaḥ puruṣaḥ kaścidbalāttāṃ hi bhajiṣyati ||
tarhi me maraṇaṃ jñeyaṃ kuladharmaparāyaṇe || 46 ||
iti śrutvā puṣpavatī punaḥ provāca dharmiṇī ||
mayūradhvaja evāpi matpitā nītitatparaḥ ||
ayogyaṃ ye kariṣyaṃti te yāsyaṃti yamālayam || 47 ||
atastvaṃ śīghramādāya taddolāṃ ca madaṃtike ||
darśayitvā ca tāṃ ramyāṃ punargaccha gṛhaṃ svakam || 48 ||
tatheti matvā sā śūdrī gṛhamāgatya bhāminī ||
kṛṣṇāśaṃ varṇayāmāsa yathā proktaṃ tayā mune || 49 ||
iti śrutvā vaco ramyaṃ kṛṣṇāṃśo balavattaraḥ ||
nāsāvedhaṃ svayaṃ kṛtvā punarnārīmayaṃ vapuḥ ||
jagāma puṣpayā sārddhaṃ dolāmāruhya vīryavān || 3.3.21.50 ||
tadā puṣpavatī devī dṛṣṭvā kṛṣṇāṃ manoramām ||
uvāca vacanaṃ puṣpāṃ śṛṇu me vacanaṃ sakhi || 51 ||
yādṛśīyaṃ śubhā nārī tādṛśaḥ puruṣo mayā ||
svapnāṃte pratyahaṃ dṛṣṭo ramamāṇo mayā saha || 52 ||
kṛṣṇāṃśaśca sa tāmāha deśarājasuto varaḥ ||
udayo nāma vikhyātastasyāhaṃ lalitā sakhī || 53 ||
pratyahaṃ racitaṃ hāramatha pūjanahetave ||
sa vīrastu gṛhītvā taṃ devīṃ pūjya nyavedayat || 54 ||
ekadā prasthitaṃ vīraṃ puṣpamadhye śanaiḥśanaiḥ ||
udāsīnaṃ ca taṃ dṛṣṭvā provācāhaṃ samāgatā || 55 ||
moho.ayaṃ te kutaḥ prāptaḥ sa tvaṃ kathaya mā ciram ||
ityuktaḥ sa tu māmāha svapnāṃte pratyahaṃ sakhi || 56 ||
mayā dṛṣṭā śubhā nārī rūpayauvanaśālinī ||
tadviyogena duḥkhārtaṃ mukhaṃ mlānatvamāgatam || 57 ||
iti śrutvā puṣpavatī tāmāha rucirānanām ||
vivāho me yadā tena sārddhaṃ ramyo bhaviṣyati || || 58 ||
tadā tvāṃ tarpayiṣyāmi bahudravyaiḥ śubhānane ||
atastvaṃ gaccha tatpārśvaṃ śīghraṃ tasmai nivedaya || 59 ||
iti śrutvā tu tadvācaṃ puṣpā premasamanvitā ||
dolāmāropya tāṃ kṛṣṇāṃ svagehaṃ gaṃtumuyatā || 3.3.21.60 ||
durgadvāre tu prāptāyāṃ taddolāyāṃ ca bhārgava ||
makaraṃdo mahāvīryyo dvādaśābdavayā balī || 61 ||
dolāsamīpamāgatya dadarśa rucirānanām ||
kṛṣṇāmindīvaraśyāmāṃ cārunetrāṃ manoharām || 62 ||
mumoha balavānvīro govarddhana kalāṃśakaḥ || govardhana
premṇovāca sa cārvaṃgi śṛṇu me vacanaṃ priye || 63 ||
madgṛhaṃ śīghramāgaccha patnī mama bhavādhunā ||
iti śrutvā tu sā kṛṣṇā vihasyo vāca bhūpatim || 64 ||
kulīnastvaṃ mahāvīra vahnikuṇḍātsamudbhavaḥ ||
ṣoḍaśābdavayāstūṇī śanibhallasamanvitaḥ || 65 ||
tvadyogyā bhūpateḥ kanyā caṃdrasūryyānvayasya vai ||
ahaṃ śūdrī hīnatamā kathaṃ yogyā taveha vai || 66 ||
kanyāhaṃ śūdrajāteśca bahmacaryyavrate sthitā ||
iti śrutvā tu vacanaṃ makarando nṛpātmajaḥ || 67 ||
balādgṛhītvā tāṃ nārīṃ pasparśa hṛdaye svayam ||
kṛṣṇāṃśastu tadā tasmai dattvā hṛdayavedanām ||
mohayitvā nṛpasutaṃ sa devaḥ svagṛhaṃ yayau || 68 ||
makarandastu saṃbuddho madanāgniprapīḍitaḥ ||
gehamāgatya puṣpāyāḥ sarvaṃ tasyai nyavedayat || 69 ||
tatsnehakātaraṃ bhūpaṃ makaraṃdaṃ mahābalam||
puṣpāha ślakṣṇayā vācā śṛṇu pārthivasattama || 3.3.21.70 ||
mahāvatī purī ramyā tatra kṛṣṇāgṛhaṃ śubham ||
tvadbhayācca gatā gehaṃ kṛṣṇāṃśasya ca sā sakhī || 71 ||
rodanaṃ kurvatī gāḍhaṃ tava nindanatatparā || 72 ||
āgamiṣyati vai vīro balaissārddhaṃ mahābala ||
atastvaṃ sarvasainyāni sajjībhūtāni vai kuru || 73 ||
jito yena mahāvīraḥ pitṛvyo laharastava ||
vivāhaṃ kārayāmāsa tadbandhoḥ sutayā saha || 74 ||
iti śrutvā vaco ghoraṃ makarando mahīpatiḥ ||
śataghnīḥ sthāpayāmāsa durgakūṭeṣu dāruṇāḥ || 75 ||
svasainyaṃ ca samāhūya trilakṣaṃ khaḍgasaṃyutam ||
tatraiva sthāpayāmāsa rāṣṭrarakṣārthamudyataḥ || 76 ||
kṛṣṇāṃśastu gṛhaṃ prāpya balakhānimuvāca tat ||
śrutvā sa ca mahāvīro bhrātṛmitrasamanvitaḥ ||
pañcalakṣabalaissārddhaṃ mayūranagaraṃ yayau || 77 ||
śataghnyaḥ pañcasāhasrā gajā daśa sahasrakāḥ ||
ekalakṣaṃ hayāḥ sarve śeṣā jñeyāḥ padātayaḥ ||
uṣitvā pakṣamātraṃ tu mārge pāṃcālake tadā || 78 ||
makaraṃdastu tacchrutvā śanibhallakaraḥ sthitaḥ ||
senāmājñāpayāmāsa jahi śatrūnmahābalān || 79 ||
śrutvā padātayo lakṣaṃ śataghnīvahnimādadan ||
te tu vai saptasāhasrāścakruḥ śatrubalakṣayam || 3.3.21.80 ||
grāmasya dakṣiṇadvāre hayārūḍhāstadā yayuḥ ||
bhuśuṃḍīkṣepaṇīśaktikhaḍgayuddhaviśāradāḥ || 81 ||
ekalakṣaṃ hayāssarve makaraṃdasya bhūpateḥ ||
tayoścāsīnmahadyuddhaṃ tumulaṃ hayasenayoḥ || 82 ||
tadā tu paścimadvāre gajā viṃśatsahasrakāḥ ||
tathā daśasahasraiśca śatrubhiḥ saha saṃyayuḥ || 83 ||
uṣṭra rakṣā mahāvīrāścatvāriṃśatsahasrakāḥ ||
balakhānyādibhiḥ sārddhaṃ yuyudhurdiśi cottare || 84 ||
ahorātramabhūdyuddhaṃ tumulaṃ lomaharṣaṇam ||
tataḥ parājitāssarve balakhānermahābalāḥ || 85 ||
tyaktvā yuddhaṃ tu te sarve dudruvuśca diśo daśa ||
kṛṣṇāṃśo biṃdulārūḍho balakhāniḥ kapotagaḥ || 86 ||
manorathasthito devaścāhlādastu gajasthitaḥ||
pūrvādikramato dvāri gatāste raṇadurmadāḥ || 87 ||
satsaruṃ khaḍgamutsṛjya cakruḥ śatrumahāvadham ||
parājitāśca te śūrā makaraṃdamupāyayuḥ || 88 ||
vahniputrastu balavānvājinaṃ ca śilāmayam||
śanibhallakaragrāhī tamāruhya raṇaṃ yayau || 89 ||
kṛṣṇāṃśādyāśca te śūrā rurudhussarvatodiśam ||
taṃ ca kaṃṭhe dadau khaḍgaṃ balakhānirmahābalaḥ || 3.3.21.90 ||
svabhallaṃ devasiṃhaśca tamaṃke ca samāhanat ||
āhlādo vakṣasi śaraṃ kṛṣṇāṃśaḥ khaḍgamuttamam || 91 ||
śilāvājiprabhāveṇa kaśmalaṃ na jagāma ha ||
sa dṛṣṭvā niṣphalānvīrāñjagarja bhairavaṃ dhvanim || 92 ||
śanibhallena te sarve babhūvurmūrchitā raṇe ||
te.aśvāḥ śilāśvavegena mūrchitāścābhavankṣaṇāt || 93 ||
makaraṃdastu balavānbaddhvā tānyuddhadurmadān ||
prasannātmā yayau gehaṃ svapitre tānnyavedayat || 94 ||
dṛṣṭvā parājitānvīrānrūpaṇo bhayakātaraḥ ||
mahāvatīṃ purīṃ prāpya bhūpatiṃ samavarṇayat || 95 ||
brahmānaṃdastu tacchrutvā lakṣasainyasamanvitaḥ ||
iṃdulena sahāyena mayūranagaraṃ yayau || 96 ||
likhitvā nirmalaṃ patraṃ tadrājñe tvarito dadau ||
bhūmirājasutākāṃta viddhi māṃ manujarṣabha || 97 ||
kṛṣṇāṃśāya sutāṃ dehi nāmnā puṣpavatīṃ śubhām ||
no cenmatkaṭhinairbāṇaiḥ kṣayaṃ yāsyaṃti sainikāḥ || 98 ||
niśamyeti nṛpaśreṣṭho mayūradhvaja eva saḥ ||
makaraṃdena sahito dvilakṣabalasaṃyutaḥ ||
ahorātraṃ kṛtaṃ yuddhaṃ tena sārddhaṃ bhayapradam || 99 ||
brahmānaṃdastu balavānbāṇayuddhamacīkarat ||
makaraṃdasya bhallena mūrchitaḥ so.apatadbhuvi || 3.3.21.100 ||
tadā svarṇavatīputro jayantaḥ śakrasaṃbhavaḥ ||
svavidyāṃ darśayāmāsa makaraṃdāya dhīmate || 101 ||
vaiṣṇavāstraprabhāvena śilāśvo bhasma cābhavat ||
brahmāstreṇa bhṛguśreṣṭha śanibhallo.apatadbhuvi ||1 02||
nāgapāśena taṃ baddhvā makaraṃdaṃ mahābalam ||
vivāhaṃ kārayāmāsa kṛṣṇāṃśasya mahātmanaḥ ||1 03||
senāmujjīvayāmāsa svakīyāmiṃdulo balī ||
maṃgalaṃ kārayāmāsa makaraṃdo gṛhegṛhe ||
dadau kanyāṃ vidhānena bahudravyasamanvitām ||1 04||
mayūradhvajabhūpālo mahāsnehamacīkarat||
nṛpājñāṃ te puraskṛtya yayuḥ sārddhaṃ mahāvatīm || ||1 05||
iti śrībhaviṣye mahāpurāṇe pratisargaparvaṇi caturyugakhaṇḍāparaparyāye kaliyugīyetihāsasamuccaye kṛṣṇāṃśavivāhonāmaikaviṃśo.adhyāyaḥ||21||
sūta uvāca ||
mahāvatyāṃ tu saṃprāpte kṛṣṇāṃśe balavattare ||
maṃgalaṃ kṛtavānrājā tadā parimalo balī || 1 ||
puṣpavatyā tayā sārddhaṃ gītanṛtyaviśāradaḥ ||
kṛṣṇāṃśaḥ pratyahaṃ gehe mumoha sakhibhiḥ saha || 2 ||
hemaṃtaśiśire vīro rahaḥ krīḍāṃ karoti vai ||
yathā śakro.apsarobhiśca tathaiva hyudayo balī || 3 ||
grāmyadharmaṃ na kṛtavānsarvasparśaviśāradaḥ ||
ekadā nṛtyakrīḍāyāṃ devī puṣpavatī svayam || 4 ||
kṛṣṇāṃśaṃ vacanaṃ prāha pūrvajanmani ko bhavān ||
iti śrutvodayo vīro vihasyovāca vai vacaḥ || 5 ||
nṛpohaṃ caṃdradāsaśca pūrvajanmani he priye ||
bālyātprabhṛti me duḥkhaṃ prāptaṃ daivavinirmitam||6||
śālagrāmaśilāpūjā pratyahaṃ vai mayā kṛtā ||
tena puṇyaprabhāvena sārvabhaumo babhūva ha ||7||
mṛte.ahani tu saṃprāpte śālagrāme mano dadhau ||
sāyujyaṃ me hareścāsītsvayaṃ brahmaprasādataḥ||8||
kalinā prārthito viṣṇuḥ kālātmā parameśvaraḥ ||
svadehānmāṃ tu niṣkāsya bhūmau janimacīkarat ||9||
yadā yadā hi dharmasya glānirbhavati vai priye||
yugadharmasya maryādāsthāpanāya bhavāmyaham||3.3.22.1 0||
satye tu mānasī pūjā devānāṃ tṛptihetave ||
tretāyāṃ vahnipūjā ca yajñadānādikā kriyā ||11||
dvāpare mūrtipūjā ca devānāṃ vai priyaṃkarī ||
kalau tu dāruṇe prāpte brahmapūjanamuttamam||12||
ahaṃ haṃsaḥ satyayuge tretāyāṃ yajñapūruṣaḥ ||
hiraṇyagarbhaśca priye dvāpare.ahaṃ sukhapradaḥ ||
śālagrāmaḥ kalau prāpte devānāṃ tṛptaye hyaham || 13 ||
munayo devatāssarvāstathā pitṛgaṇāḥ priye ||
sarve te tṛptimāyāṃti śālagrāmasya pūjanāt || 14 ||
dvijātibhistrivarṇaiśca pūjanaṃ caṃdanādikaiḥ ||
śūdraiśca snānamātreṇa bhakti bhāvena pūjanam ||15||
mlecchaiśca darśanaṃ puṇyaṃ vinayādbhaktibhāvataḥ ||
śālagrāmaḥ svayaṃ brahma saccidānaṃdavigrahaḥ ||
tasya darśanamātreṇa kṣayaṃ yāsyaṃti vai malāḥ ||16||
iti te kathitaṃ devi yugamaryādamuttamam ||
purā tvaṃ kasya tanayā satyaṃ kathaya me.aciram||17||
puṣpavatyuvāca||
pūrvajanmani veśyāhaṃ caṃdrakāṃtiriti śrutā ||
gānanṛtyādikaṃ vādyaṃ devasyāgre mayā kṛtam || 18 ||
tena puṇyaprabhāveṇa svargalokamupāgatā ||
devaiśca prārthitā tatra rūpa yauvanaśālinī || 19 ||
brahmacaryaṃ na tatyāja svargaloke.api vai hyaham ||
tena puṇyaprabhāveṇa coṣā bāṇasutā.abhavam ||
aniruddhaḥ svayaṃ brahma mama pāṇiṃ gṛhītavān || 3.3.22.20 ||
kalinā prārthito devo mama svāmī svahetave ||
arcāvatāramāsādya mārkaṃḍeyasthalaṃ gataḥ || 21 ||
svaprasādasya mahimā darśitastena tatra vai ||
atraiva sthitimaryādo dārurūpasya me pateḥ || 22 ||
ahaṃ tasyājñayā svāmiñjambukasya sutābhavam ||
divyarūpasamāyuktā nāmnāhaṃ vijayaiṣiṇī || 23 ||
kṛtaṃ mamaiva maraṇaṃ tvadbhrātrā balakhāninā ||
makaraṃdasya bhaginī bhūtvā tvāṃ patimāgatā ||24||
tena doṣeṇa tvadbhrātā yātanāṃ tīvramāgataḥ ||
rājña innagaṭhasyaiva gehe gajapateḥ svayam ||
ityuktvā maunamāsthāya reme patyā samaṃ mudā || 25 ||
holikāsamaye prāpte malanā snehaduḥkhitā ||
sutāṃ caṃdrāvalīṃ ramyāṃ svapnāṃte sā dadarśa ha ||
ruroda niśi duḥkhena svasutāsnehakātarā || 26 ||
tadodayo mahāvīro jñātvā rodana kāraṇam ||
śūraiśca daśasāhasraissārddhaṃ bahudhanairyutaḥ ||
ekākī prayayau vīro yatra caṃdrāvalīgṛham || 27 ||
mahīpatistu tacchatrurjñātvā kāraṇamuttamam ||
paścājjagāma kāryārthī sa tu duryodhanāṃśakaḥ ||
balīṭhāṭhamiti khyātaṃ grāmaṃ yādavapālitam || 28 ||
vīraseno nṛpastatra trilakṣabalasaṃyutaḥ ||
aṣṭau sutāśca tasyāsanrūpayauvanaśālinaḥ || 29 ||
kāmasenaḥ prasenaśca mahāsenastathaiva ca ||
sukhaseno rūpaseno viṣvakseno madhuvrataḥ ||
madhupaśca kramājjātā yādavāṃśāśca yādavāḥ || 3.3.22.30 ||
tatra gatvā ca kṛṣṇāṃśassabhāyāṃ narakesarī ||
daṃḍavatpraṇato bhūtvā vīrasenaṃ mahīpatim || 31 ||
malanālikhitaṃ patraṃ dattvā rājñe mahāmanāḥ ||
daśabhāraṃ suvarṇasya punarvāsamacīkarat || 32 ||
vyaṃjanāni vicitrāṇi bhuktvā yādavasaṃyutaḥ ||
caṃdrāvalīṃ samāgatya kuśalaṃ ca nyavedayat || 33 ||
premotsukā ca bhaginī kṛṣṇāṃśaṃ prāha duḥkhitā||
bhavāndvyabdavayā vīra tadāhaṃ ca vivāhitā ||34||
viṃśadabdastato jāto vismṛtā pitṛmātṛbhiḥ ||
samarthena tvayā vīra saṃsmṛtā bhaginī svayam || 35 ||
adya me saphalaṃ janma jīvitaṃ saphalaṃ ca me ||
baṃdhudarśanamātreṇa sarvaṃ ca saphalaṃ mama || 36 ||
prasannātmodayastatra bhaginīṃ prāha namradhīḥ ||
jambukena gṛhaṃ sarvaṃ luṇṭhitaṃ balaśālinā || 37 || |
tasya duḥkhena bhūpālo bhayabhīto dinedine ||
mahākaṣṭena vijayo jambukāccābhayo.abhavat || 38 ||
mahīrājastu balavānrurodha nagarīṃ mama ||
mayā vivāhito bhrātā brahmā tatsutayā saha || 39 ||
punaśca siṃhaladvīpe jayaṃtārthe vayaṃ gatāḥ ||
evaṃvidhāni duḥkhāni bahūni hyabhavanpituḥ || 3.3.22.40 ||
atastvāṃ prati suprītā vayaṃ bhaginikiṃkarāḥ ||
mṛduvākyamiti śrutvā tadā caṃdrāvalī mudā || 41 ||
gehaṃ nivāsayāmāsa svakīyaṃ premavihvalā ||
etasminnantare dhūrto mahīpatirupāyayau || 42 ||
sabhāyāṃ vīrasenasya rājñā tenaiva satkṛtaḥ ||
vārtāṃtaraṃ samāsādya tamuvāca mahīpatiḥ || 43 ||
niṣkāsitāśca te sarve rājñāhlādādayaḥ khalāḥ |
caurito nṛpateḥ kośo hīnajātyairmahābalaiḥ ||44||
tadā tu kuṃṭhitāḥ sarve śirīṣākhyapure.avasan ||
chidradarśī tu kṛṣṇāṃśo gehaṃ tava samāgataḥ || 45 ||
caṃdrāvalyāśca vai dolāṃ gṛhītvā sa gamiṣyati ||
satyaṃ bravīmi bhūpāla nānyathā vacanaṃ mama || || 46 ||
iti śrutvā vīraseno jñātvā tatsatyakāraṇam ||
kāmasenaṃ samāhūya caṃdrāvalyāḥ patiṃ sutam ||47||
vacanaṃ prāha bhoḥ putra baṃdhanaṃ kuru tasya vai ||
iti śrutvā kāmaseno viṣamādāya dāruṇam || 48 ||
bhojanāya dadau tasyai jñātvā candrāvalī tadā ||
bhrāturaṃtikamāsādya pātramādāya sā yayau || 49 ||
kāmasenaśca kupito gṛhītvā daṃḍavetasam ||
svapriyāṃ tāḍayāmāsa sa dṛṣṭvā taṃ tadākupat || 3.3.22.50 ||
gṛhītvā bhujayostaṃ vai baṃdhanāya samudyataḥ ||
baṃdhanatvaṃ gate putre vīraseno mahābalaḥ || 51 ||
putrānājñāpayāmāsa tasya baṃdhanahetave ||
etasminnaṃtare vīro dolāmādāya satvaram || || 52 ||
senāmadhye samāgamya mahadyudamacīkarat ||
ekato daśasāhasrāstrilakṣāstu tathaikataḥ ||
ahorātramabhūdyuddhaṃ dāruṇaṃ romaharṣaṇam ||53 ||
hatā lakṣaṃ mahāśūrā udayena mahābalāḥ ||
śeṣāḥ pradudruvussarve yādavā bhayakātarāḥ || 54 ||
dṛṣṭvā parājitaṃ sainyaṃ sapta putrā mahābalāḥ ||
svāngajāṃśca samāruhya kṛṣṇāṃśaṃ rurudhū ruṣā || 55 ||
sa vīro biṃdulārūḍho bhūmau kṛtvā gajāsanān ||
teṣāmastrāṇi saṃcchidya badhnāti baladarpitaḥ||56||
iti śrutvā vīrasenaḥ sūryabhaktiparāyaṇaḥ ||
sauramastraṃ samādāya tasya sainyamadāhayat ||
tenāstreṇaiva kṛṣṇāṃśaḥ sahayo mūrcchito bhuvi || 57 ||
vīrasenastu taṃ baddhvā mocayitvā sutānvadhūm ||
svagehamāgatastṛrṇaṃ nānāvādyānyavādayat || 58 ||
hataroṣāstadā vīrāḥ kṛṣṇāṃśasya yayurdiśaḥ ||
hetuṃ parimalasyāgre sarvamūcustadāditaḥ || 59 ||
mahīpatiṃ mahādhūrtaṃ matvā rājābravīdidam ||
gaccha tvaṃ malanāputra lakṣasainyasamanvitaḥ || 3.3.22.60 ||
baddhvā svabhaginīkāṃtaṃ svabaṃdhuṃ mocayāśu vai ||
iti śrutvā ca sa suto lakṣasenāsamanvitaḥ ||61||
śīghraṃ gatvā ca nagarīṃ rurodha balavānruṣā ||
yuddhī bhūte bale tasminvīraseno nṛpottamaḥ ||
sauramastramupādāya dāhanārthaṃ samudyataḥ || 62 ||
sajjībhūte tadastre tu brahmānaṃdo mahābalaḥ ||
brahmāstreṇaiva sa śaraṃ vārayāmāsa vai ruṣā || 63 ||
dṛṣṭvā bhayānvito bhūpastameva śaraṇaṃ yayau ||
brahmānaṃdastu taṃ bhūpaṃ vacanaṃ prāha nirbhayaḥ || 64 ||
dhūrtavākyena he bhūpa madbaṃdhurbādhitastvayā ||
avadhyā ca sadā nārī tvatsutastāmatāḍayat ||
atastvaṃ bhaginīyuktaṃ svasutaṃ dehi me nṛpa || 65||
iti śrutvā ca nṛpatirvacanaṃ prāha namradhīḥ ||
matsutā ca gṛhe nāsti kāmasenaṃ gṛhāṇa bhoḥ || 66 ||
ityuktvā vīrasenaśca sutaṃ caṃdrāvalīṃ tathā ||
dattvā tasmai prasannātmā tatprasthānamakārayat || 67 ||
brahmānando.api balavānkṛṣṇāṃśena samanvitaḥ ||
senayāśītisāhasryā yayau sārddhaṃ mahāvatīm || 68 ||
malanā svasutaṃ dṛṣṭvā premavihvalakaṃpitā ||
snāpayitvāśrudhārābhirdvijātibhyo dadau dhanam || 69 ||
iti te kathitaṃ vipra kṛṣṇāṃśacaritaṃ śubham ||
śṛṇvatāṃ kalipāpaghnaṃ kathayiṣyāmi vai punaḥ || 3.3.22.70 ||
iti śrībhaviṣye mahāpurāṇe pratisargaparvaṇi caturyugakhaṃḍāparaparyāye kaliyugīyetihāsasamuccaye dvāviṃśo.adhyāyaḥ || 22 || || cha ||
|| sūta uvāca || ||
caturviśābdakaṃ prāpte kṛṣṇāṃśe balaśālini ||
iṣaśukladaśamyāṃ ca kṛto rājñā mahotsavaḥ || 1 ||
bhojayitvā dvijaśreṣṭhāndattvā tebhyo hi dakṣiṇāḥ ||
svabhṛtyebhyastathā vittaṃ yathāyogyaṃ kramāddadau || 2 ||
kārtikyāṃ śubhayuktāyāṃ kṛṣṇāṃśo balasaṃyutaḥ ||
indulena ca saṃyukto devasiṃhena saṃyutaḥ || 3 ||
ayutaiḥ svarṇadravyaiśca śūrairdaśasahasrakaiḥ ||
yayau barhiṣmatīsthāne nānābhūpasamanvite || 4 ||
etasminnaṃtare tatra citrarekhā samāgatā ||
vṛtā saptālibhirdevī citraguptaprapūjinī || 5 ||
gaṃgāmadhye mahāramyaṃ yānaṃ māyāmayaṃ tayā ||
kṛtaṃ kautūhalayutaṃ bahusaṃpatsamanvitam || 6 ||
āgatāstatra rājāno nānā taddarśanotsukāḥ ||
tadodayo devayuto jayaṃtena samanvitaḥ ||
śataśūraiśca sahito darśanārthamupāyayau || 7 ||
citrarekhā mahāramyā vāhīkanṛpateḥ sutā ||
dadarśa sudaraṃ kāntamiṃdulaṃ śaśivanmukham ||
yena svapnāṃtare ramyaṃ sārddhaṃ bhuktaṃ tayā sukham || 8 ||
tamāhlādasutaṃ jñātvā sābhinaṃdanadehajā ||
kṛtvā mohamayaṃ jālaṃ śukabhūtaṃ tadeṃdulam || 9 ||
hṛtvā svayaṃvare ramye paramānandamāyayau ||
punarāhṛtya tāṃ māyāṃ svagehāya yayau mudā || 3.3.23.10 ||
kṛṣṇāṃśastu tadā buddhvā na dadarśa svakaṃ śiśum ||
devasiṃhaṃ bodhayitvā papraccha kva gataḥ śiśuḥ || 11 ||
kālajño devasiṃho.api mohitaścitramāyayā ||
na jñātastena vai bālaḥ kva gataḥ kena vā hṛtaḥ || 12 ||
vismitaṃ devasiṃhaṃ ca dṛṣṭvā kṛṣṇāṃśako balī ||
rurodoccaistadā gāḍhaṃ citramāyāvimohitaḥ || 13 ||
śrutvā tu rodanaṃ tasya khalastatra mahīpatiḥ ||
yayau śīghraṃ prasannātmā yatrāhlādaḥ svayaṃ sthitaḥ ||
ruditvā tatra vai gāḍhaṃ vacanaṃ prāha namradhīḥ || 14 ||
udayo nāma te bhrātā mohayitvā madena tau ||
devamindulamevāsau hatvā dhārāsvaropayat || 15 ||
pratyakṣaṃ ca mayā dṛṣṭaṃ tena vīreṇa vai kṛtam ||
śataṃ svarṇaṃ ca me dattvā vinayenāvarodhitaḥ || 16 ||
devasiṃhastato buddhyā na jñātaṃ tena yatkṛtam ||
iti śrutvā tu vacanaṃ niścayaṃ nādhigacchati || 17 ||
etasminnaṃtare prāptau tau vīrau rodane ratau ||
tadviyogena kṛṣṇāṃśaḥ svadehaṃ tyaktumudyataḥ || 18 ||
āhlādo niścayaṃ jñātvā bhāṣitaṃ ca mahīpateḥ ||
kṛṣṇāṃśaṃ tāḍayāmāsa vaitasaiścarmakartanaiḥ||19||
tasya mātā tathā patnī bhaginī premaduḥkhitāḥ ||
āhlādaṃ bodhayāmāsurdhūrtamāyāvimohitam ||
na bodhitastadā vīraścitramāyāvimohitaḥ || 3.3.23.20 ||
tadā puṣpavatī devī svapatiṃ bhrātṛpīḍitam ||
dṛṣṭvā tatra gatā śīghraṃ patiduḥkhena duḥkhitā ||21||
vināparādhaṃ kṛṣṇāṃśo mahāniṃdāmavāptavān ||
tadā vedavido viprā āhlādaṃ prāhurūrjitam || 22 ||
vadhastyāgaḥ samo jñeyo yogyaṃ buddhyā vicāraya ||
ityuktaḥ sa turīyātmā putraśokena duḥkhitaḥ || ||23 ||
cāṃḍālāṃśca samāhūya baddhvā taṃ putraghātinam ||
dattvā tebhyaḥ sapatnīkaṃ vadhaṃ kuruta mā ciram || 24 ||
asya netre samutpāṭya māṃ darśayata saṃyutāḥ ||
iti śrutvā gatāste vai gahanaṃ vyāghrasevitam || 25 ||
devasiṃhastato gatvā dattvā tebhyo mahaddhanam ||
saṃprāpya daṃpatī vīraścāṃḍālebhyo vanaṃ yayau || 26 ||
balakhānestu yā patnī gajamuktā pativratā ||
daṃpatī pālayāmāsa guhyagehe mudā yutā || 27 ||
cāṃḍālāste tu saṃgatya mṛganetre ca taṃ daduḥ ||
devasiṃhastadāgatya krodhātmā ca tamabravīt ||
dhiktvāṃ pāpaṃ durācāraṃ tvayā me hiṃsitaḥ sakhā || 28 ||
jīvitastvatsuto bhūmau tadanveṣaṇahetave ||
yāsyāmi vividhānrāṣṭrānsatyaṃsatyaṃ bravīmyaham ||
ityuktvā prayayau vīraḥ śirīṣākhyapuraṃ śubham || 29 ||
gajamuktāmanujñāpya daṃpatī prāpya nirbhayaḥ ||
mayūranagaraṃ ramyaṃ niśi ghoraṃ samāyayau || 3.3.23.30 ||
makaraṃdastu balavānjñātvā tatsarvakāraṇam ||
svasuḥ patiṃ ca bhaginīṃ svāṃte premṇā nyavāsayat || 31 ||
dharmamārādhayāmāsa yajñairnānāvidhaiḥ stavaiḥ ||
prasanno dharmarājaśca makarandamuvāca ha || 32 ||
abhinaṃdanabhūpasya sutā citraprapūjinī ||
nāṭyātmajā kesariṇī tatsakhī daṃbhakovidā || 33 ||
kesariṇyā gururjñeyaḥ kutuko yogurūpadhṛk ||
tena prasāritā māyā śatayojanamantarā || 34 ||
śatrubhirdurgamā bhūmiḥ śatrupāṣāṇakāriṇī ||
citraguptaprabhāveṇa nirbhayo bhūpatiḥ svayam || 35 ||
citrarekhābhūpasutā jayaṃtastu tayā hṛtaḥ ||
nararūpadharo rātrau śukarūpadharo dine ||
indulaśca sthito duḥkhī citramāyāvimohitaḥ || 36 ||
kṛṣṇāṃśaśca bhavāndevaḥ sahitaḥ sūryavarmaṇā ||
mayā dattāni yaṃtrāṇi gṛhītvā te mudā yutāḥ ||
citrarekhāṃ samāgatya nṛtyādīṃstaiḥ samaṃ kuru || 37 ||
mohayitvā ca tāṃ devīṃ paṭhitvā tanmataṃ śubham ||
punarāgaccha vai śīghraṃ sainyayogaṃ punaḥ kuru || || 38 ||
ityuktvāntardadhe devassa rājā vismayānvitaḥ ||
kṛṣṇāṃśaṃ varṇayāmāsa yathā dharmeṇa bhāṣitam || 39 ||
phālgune māsi saṃprāpte trayaste yogirūpiṇaḥ ||
yayurinnagaṭaṃ ramyaṃ nṛtyagītaviśāradāḥ || 3.3.23.40 ||
mṛdaṃgāṃkastadā devo makaraṃdo vipaṃcimān||
nṛtyagānakaro vīraḥ kṛṣṇāṃśaḥ sarva mohanaḥ || 41 ||
mohayitvā ca nagaraṃ tathā gajapatiṃ nṛpam ||
sakulaṃ ca sasainyaṃ ca tuṣṭo rājābravīdididam || 42 ||
vāṃchitaṃ brūhi me yoginsa śrutvā prāha namradhīḥ ||
dehi me sūryavarmāṇaṃ svasutaṃ kāryahetave ||43||
kṛtvā kāryamahaṃ śīghraṃ punardāsyami te sutam||
vidhinā nirmito dharmo rājabhirviśvarakṣaṇam ||44||
iti śrutvā gajapatirdattvā tebhyaḥ svakaṃ sutam ||
svarājñīmāyayau rājā gatāste kāryatatparāḥ ||45||
pakṣamātreṇa bāhlīkaṃ nagaraṃ prayayurmudā ||
dharmadattāni yaṃtrāṇi gṛhītvā śatrumaṃdiram || 46 ||
āyayurlāsyatattvajñā nṛpamohanatatparāḥ ||
sarve ca nāgarāḥ prāptāstatra kṣatragaṇā mudā ||47||
mohitāstaiśca te sarve gītanṛtyaviśāradaiḥ ||
mahaddhanaṃ dadau tebhyastomarānvayasaṃbhavāḥ ||48||
tānādāya punarbhūpaḥ svagehamabhinaṃdanaḥ ||
āyayau gehanṛtyārthī kārayāmāsa vai punaḥ ||49||
makaraṃdastadā vīṇāṃ mṛdaṃgaṃ bhīṣmajo balī||
maṃjīraṃ sūryavarmā ca kṛṣṇāṃśo gānanṛtyakam ||3.3.23.50||
gṛhītvā modayāmāsurnārīvṛndā mahottamam ||
citrarekhā svayaṃ dṛṣṭvā teṣāṃ mohanahetave || 51 ||
māyāṃ nirvāpayāmāsa niṣphalā sā.abhavatkṣaṇāt ||
mohitā taiśca sā devī tānuvāca mudānvitā || 52 ||
vāṃchitaṃ brūhi me vīra kṛṣṇāṃśaścāha tāṃ vadhūm||
śukaṃ dehi ca me dehi no cecchāpaṃ dadāmya.aham || 53 ||
iti śrutvā citrarekhā śokavyākulacetanā ||
kṛṣṇāṃśaṃ yoginaṃ prāha satyaṃ kathaya ko bhavān || 54 ||
iṃdrādyā devatāssarve mayā nirmitayā yayā ||
mohitāḥ kṣaṇamātreṇa na bhavānmohito mayā ||55||
devo nārāyaṇo vāpi dharmo vāpi śivaḥ svayam ||
ityuktassa tu kṛṣṇāṃśo vacanaṃ prāha nirbhayaḥ ||56||
udayo nāma me rājñi devasiṃho.ayamuttamaḥ ||
macchyālo makaraṃdo.ayaṃ sūryavarmā tathāvidhaḥ || 57 ||
indulasya viyogena vayaṃ yogitvamāgatāḥ ||
madguruśca tathonmādī saṃkulastadviyogataḥ || 58 ||
śukaṃ dehi mahāmāye iṃdulaṃ dehi vā yadi ||
ityuktvāśu rurodoccairhā indula mahābala || 59 ||
darśanaṃ dehi me śīghraṃ no cetprāṇāṃstyajāmyaham ||
ityevaṃvādinaṃ vīraṃ citrarekhā mahottamā || 3.3.23.60 ||
kṛtvā lajjāṃ punaḥ prāha māṃ ca putraṃ gṛhāṇa bhoḥ ||
kṛtvā naramayaṃ rūpaṃ svakāntaṃ sarvasuṃdaram || 61 ||
patitvā taccaraṇayo rurodoccaiśca daṃpatī ||
tathāvidhau ca tau dṛṣṭvā kṛṣṇāṃśo harṣasaṃyutaḥ || 62 ||
iṃdulenaiva likhitaṃ gṛhītvā patramuttamam||
dharmayaṃtraprabhāveṇa mayūranagaraṃ yayau || 63 ||
sūryavarmā gato gehaṃ makaraṃdena mānitaḥ ||
devasiṃhastu balavāngṛhītvā patramuttamam ||64||
yayau manorathārūḍho yatrāhlādaḥ śucānvitaḥ ||
ko bhavāniti taṃ prāha mahonmādīva dṛśyate || 65 ||
devasiṃhaṃ ca māṃ viddhi tava putrānveṣaṇe ratam ||
patraṃ gṛhāṇa bho vīra likhitaṃ tatsutena vai || 66 ||
iti śrutvā sa āhlādaścā hlādaṃ paramāptavān ||
jñātvā tatkāraṇaṃ sarvaṃ yathāvidhi suto hṛtaḥ ||67||
mahīpatiṃ samāhūya vacanaṃ prāha namradhīḥ||
satyaṃ kathaya me bhūpa kṛṣṇāṃśena hatassutaḥ || 68 ||
sa hovāca śrutaṃ vīra kṛṣṇāṃśena yathā hataḥ ||
ityuktvā tu vihasyāśu kāryasiddhimupāgataḥ || 69 ||
ahlādaḥ krodhatāmrākṣaḥ keśānā kṛṣya taṃ mudā ||
vetasaistāḍayāmāsa svahastena punaḥ punaḥ || 3.3.23.70 ||
śrutvā parimalo rājā sapatnīkassamāgataḥ ||
bahudhā modayāmāsa rāmāṃśaṃ bahurūpiṇam || 71 ||
are dhūrta mahāpāpinmadbaṃdhurghātitastvayā ||
gato yatra mama prāṇassakulaṃ tvāṃ nayāmyaham || 72 ||
tadā mahīpatirduḥkhī niḥśvāso maunamāsthitaḥ ||
tadaghaṃ hṛdi saṃsthāpya mahāpīḍāmavāptavān || 73 ||
etasminnaṃtare vīro balakhāniḥ samāgataḥ ||
vimucya mātulaṃ dhūrtaṃ jyeṣṭhabandhumasāntvayat || 74 ||
sa cakāra vivāhārthamudyogaṃ bhrātṛjasya vai ||
netrasiṃho nṛpaḥ prāpto lakṣasainyasamanvitaḥ || 75 ||
tārakaśca tamāyātassārddhaṃ śūrasahasrakaiḥ ||
vīrasenaḥ svayaṃ prāptaḥ śūraiḥ sārddhaṃ navā.ayutaiḥ || 76 ||
tālanaśca tataḥ prāpto lakṣasainyasama nvitaḥ ||
sūryavarmā tathā prāpto lakṣasainyasamanvitaḥ || 77 ||
brahmānaṃdaḥ svayaṃ prāptastrilakṣabalasaṃyutaḥ ||
āhlādaśca śucāviṣṭo lakṣasainya samanvitaḥ || 78 ||
hā baṃdho kva gatastvaṃ vai māṃ tyaktvā puruṣādhamam ||
ityuktvā prayayau vīraḥ śokavyākulacetanaḥ || 79 ||
balakhānistu balavā~mllakṣasainyasamanvitaḥ ||
devasiṃhena sahito bāhlīkaṃ prati sogamat || 3.3.23.80 ||
ahorātrapramāṇena māsaikaḥ pathi vai gataḥ ||
jyeṣṭhakṛṣṇasya paṃcamyāṃ vāhlīkagrāmamāptavān ||
vyūhaḥ svakīyasainyānāṃ racito balakhāninā || 81 ||
eko rathaḥ sthito yuddhe tatpaścātsaṃsthitā gajāḥ ||
pañcāśacca kramātteṣāṃ vājinaśca śataṃśatam || 82 ||
teṣāṃ paścātkramājjñeyā pattayo daśa saṃsthitāḥ ||
ekā senā ca sā jñeyā tatpramāṇaṃ bravīmyaham || 83 ||
eko ratho gajāssarve śatārddhaṃ tu hayāstu ye ||
senāyāṃ pañcasāhasrāḥ śataghnyastu tathā smṛtāḥ|| 84 ||
pañcāyutāni senāyāṃ sarve padacarāḥ smṛtāḥ ||
evaṃvidhāśca tāḥ senā balakhāneśca ṣoḍaśa || 85 ||
gajāstu daśasāhasrā madamattāḥ pṛthagyayuḥ ||
yuddhe .asmingaṇitaṃ hyevaṃ śūrāḥ śatruprahāriṇaḥ || 86 ||
abhinandanabhūpasya mlecchāḥ paiśācadharmiṇaḥ ||
trilakṣāśca hayārūḍhā ekalakṣāḥ śatapripāḥ? || || 87 ||
ekalakṣaḥ padacarā bhuśuṇḍīparighāyudhāḥ ||
tomarānvayasaṃyuktāḥ kṣatriyāḥ prayutāni vai ||
gajasthāstatra saṃprāptā yatrāhlādamahā camūḥ || 88 ||
tayoścāsīnmahadyuddhaṃ tumulaṃ romaharṣaṇam ||
madamattāśca te sarve nirbhayā raṇamāyayuḥ || 89 ||
saptāhorātramabhavadyuddhaṃ samaraśāli nām ||
bāhlīkasyārddhasenā ca kṣayaṃ nītā ca tairnṛpaiḥ || 3.3.23.90 ||
ekalakṣaṃ hatāḥ sarve balakhāneśca sainyapaiḥ ||
hāhābhūte śatrusainye bhayabhīte diśo gate ||
harṣitā balakhānyādyā jaya durge vaco.abruvan||91||
dṛṣṭvā sainyavināśaṃ ca rājñaḥ saptakumārakāḥ ||
kauravāṃśāśca te jagmuryatra jāto mahārathāḥ||92||
mahānandaśca nandaśca parānandopanandakau ||
sunandaśca surānandaḥ pranandaḥ kramatobhavāḥ || 93 ||
gajasthāste mahāvīrāstomarānvayasaṃbhavāḥ ||
senāṃ jaghnuḥ śaraistīkṣṇairbalakhānermahātmanaḥ || 94 ||
bhayabhītāśca te sarve balakhānimupāyayu ||
dṛṣṭvā sainyaṃ parābhūtaṃ balakhānistadā ruṣā || 95 ||
abhyadhāvata vegena kapotastho mahābalaḥ ||
naṃdaṃ prati tathā devaḥ parānaṃdaṃ ca tālanaḥ || 96 ||
upanandaṃ sūryavarmā sunandaṃ prati tārakaḥ ||
netrasiṃhaḥ surānandaṃ pranandaṃ prati yādavaḥ || 97 ||
yudhyamānāstu te sarve parasparaṃ vadhaiṣiṇaḥ ||
dinārddhamabhavadyuddhaṃ bahuvīrapraṇāśanam || 98 ||
parājitāstu te putrā bāhlīkasya mahābalāḥ ||
tyaktvā yuddhaṃ yayurgehaṃ bhīrukā balakhāninā || 99 ||
dṛṣṭvā teṣāṃ balaṃ ghoramabhinandanabhūmipaḥ ||
kutukaṃ ca samāhūya nāṭyāṃ kesīraṇīṃ tathā ||
kathitaṃ kāraṇaṃ rājñā yathā jātaḥ parājayaḥ || 3.3.23.100 ||
iti śrutvā tu kutukastamāśvāsya mahīpatim ||
sa dhyātvā śāṃbarīṃ māyāṃ mahādevena nirmitām ||
tatsainyaṃ mohayāmāsa śilābhūtamacetanam || 101 ||
tadā kesariṇī nāṭyā aṣṭau baddhvā mahābalān||
rājñaḥ pārśvamupāgamya dattvā tāngehamāyayau ||102||
bāhlīkaśca prasannātmā baddhvā tānnigaḍairdṛḍhaiḥ ||
luṃṭhitvā draviṇaṃ teṣāṃ kośamadhye samākṣipat || 103 ||
devyāśca varadānena devasiṃho bhayāturaḥ ||
mahāvatīṃ samāgamya svarṇavatyai nyavedayat || 104 ||
jñātvā svarṇavatī devī sarvavidyāviśāradā ||
śyenīṃ mūrtiṃ samāsthāya yayau puṣpavatīṃ prati || 105 ||
dṛṣṭvā tu daṃpatī tatra makaraṃdaṃ gṛhe sthitau ||
ruditvā kathayāmāsa yathā prāptaḥ parājayaḥ || || 106 ||
kṛṣṇāṃśastu tadā duḥkhī makarandaṃ vaco.abravīt ||
gaccha vīra mayā sārddhaṃ madgururbaṃdhanaṃ gataḥ || 107 ||
kulakṣaye mahatpāpaṃ suproktaṃ pūrva sūribhiḥ ||
nimagnānduḥkhajaladhau samuddhara mama priya || 108 ||
iti śrutvā tu tacchayālaḥ śūrāyutasamanvitaḥ ||
saṃnyastaveṣamāsthāya khaḍgacarmasamanvitaḥ ||
kṛṣṇāṃśena hayārūḍho bāhlīkaṃ tvarito yayau || 109 ||
tadā svarṇavatī devī puṣpavatyā samanvitā ||
śyenīrūpamupāsthāya yayau yatra mahāraṇaḥ || 3.3.23.110 ||
sa chittvā śāṃbarīṃ māyāṃ bodhayitvā svasainikān ||
rurodha nagarīṃ tasya bāhlīkasya mahātmanaḥ || 111 ||
dṛṣṭvā tāñchatrusaṃyuktānkutukastu tayā saha ||
punaśca śāṃbarīṃ māyāṃ preṣayāmāsa tānprati || 112 ||
chittvā sā sakalāṃ māyāṃ baddhvā tau daityasannibhau ||
nagaraṃ dāhayāmāsa tasya bhūpasya māyayā || 113 ||
na dāho dāhamāpanno na bhasmī bhasmavānkhalu ||
svarṇavatyā kṛtaṃ citraṃ svayaṃ devyā ca māyayā || || 114 ||
tadā puṣpavatī devī hatvā kesariṇī ruṣā ||
tanmāṃsaistarpayāmāsa gṛdhragomāyuvāyasān || 115 ||
kutukaṃ ca tathābhūtaṃ hatvā svarṇavatī svayam ||
kārāgāre lohamaye sthitānvīrānamocayat || 116 ||
punarāgamya sā devī tayā sārddhaṃ śubhānanā ||
makarandaḥ sthito yatra kṛṣṇāṃśena samanvitaḥ || 117 ||
te sarve vismitāścāsañjñātvā devyā vimohitāḥ ||
krodhavanto mahāvīrā yuddhāya samupāyayuḥ || 118 ||
punaścāsīttayoryuddhaṃ senayorubhayormṛdhe ||
balakhāniṃ mahānando nandaścāhlādamāyayau || 119 ||
parānaṃdastathā devaṃ tārakaṃ copanaṃdanaḥ ||
sunando netra siṃhaṃ ca surānaṃdaśca tālanam || 3.3.23.120 ||
pranando vīrasenaṃ ca brahmānandaṃ sa bhūpatiḥ ||
gajasthitāśca te sarve dhanuryuddhaparāyaṇāḥ ||
ahorātramabhūdyuddhaṃ teṣāṃ ca tumulaṃ kramāt || 121 ||
etasminnantare rātrau citrarekhā samāgatā ||
svakīyānvyākulībhūtāṃstādṛśāṃśca vilokya vai || 122 ||
citraguptaṃ tadā dhyātvā citramāyāmacīkarat ||
tadā tadbāṃdhavāścāsanbahudhā cābhinaṃdanāḥ || 123 ||
tān dṛṣṭvā vismitāḥ sarve bhayabhītāśca dudruvuḥ ||
tyaktvā yuddhamayīṃ bhūmiṃ śokavyākulacetanā || 124 ||
paṃcayojanamāgatya tato vāsamakārayan ||
saṃdhyākāle tamobhūte nirutsāhā mahābalāḥ || 125||
hā kṛṣṇāṃśa mahābāho śaraṇāgatavatsala ||
indulaste kumāro.ayaṃ saṃhṛtaścitrarekhayā || 126 ||
tayā vimohitā vīrā vayaṃ te śaraṇaṃ gatāḥ ||
ityuktvā rodanaṃ cakruḥ kva gato.asi mahāmate ||127||
tadā kolāhalaścāsīdrudatāṃ balaśālinām ||
āhlādaṃ garhayitvā te mūrchitā bhuvi vihvalāḥ || 128 ||
āhlādastu.atathā śrutvā vajrapātāhataḥ svayam ||
unmādivattadā bhūtvā tāḍayāmāsa vakṣasi || 129 ||
etasminnaṃtare yogī kṛṣṇāṃśo bhagavatkalā ||
caṃdrodaye svayaṃ prāptaścāṣṭamyāṃ bhṛguvāsare || 3.3.23.130 ||
śūraśca daśasāhasrairmakaraṃdena saṃyutaḥ ||
tatsenāṃ bodhayāmāsa pālitāṃ balakhā ninā || 131 ||
jitvā tānsarvabhūpālāngṛhītvā vipulaṃ dhanam ||
pañcaśabdasthitaṃ baṃdhuṃ pratyāgatya jagarja vai || 132 ||
tasya śabdena śeṣāṃśo bodhito balaśālinā ||
śakunaṃ śubhamālokya bhujāvutthāpya vīryavān ||
svāṃke niveśayāmāsa kṛṣṇāṃśaṃ yogirūpiṇam || 133 ||
snāpayitvā śrudhārābhiḥ kṛṣṇāṃśaṃ premavihvalaḥ ||
dattvā dvijātimukhyebhyo varṇayāmāsa kāraṇam || 134 ||
kṛṣṇāṃśo.api prasannātmā svakīyāṃ sakalāṃ kathām||
varṇayitvā yathābhūtāṃ punarbāhlīkamāyayau ||135||
citravidyāṃ svayaṃ kṛtvā pāṭhitāṃ citrarekhayā ||
baddhvābhinaṃdanaṃ bhūpaṃ sasutaṃ ca samaṃtriṇam ||
vivāhaṃ kārayāmāsa jayaṃtasya tayā saha || 136 ||
bāhlīkastu prasannātmā dattvā ca vipulaṃ dhanam ||
svasutāṃ citrarekhāṃ ca jayantāya mudā dadau ||137||
śataṃ gajānhayāṃstatra sahasrāṇi dhanairyutān ||
śataṃ dāsāṃstathā dāsīrjayaṃtāya svaya dadau || 138 ||
prasthānaṃ kārayāmāsa balakhānermahātmanaḥ ||
śrāvaṇe māsi saṃprāptāste sarve ca mahāvatīm || 139 ||
svaṃsvaṃ gehaṃ yayussarve bhūpāścāhlādamānitāḥ ||
iti te kathitaṃ vipra caritraṃ kalināśa nam||
śṛṇvatāṃ sarvapāpaghnaṃ kathayiṣyāmi vai punaḥ || 3.3.23.140 ||
iti śrībhaviṣye mahāpurāṇe pratisargaparvaṇi caturyugakhaṃḍāparaparyāye kaliyugīyetihā sasamuccaye trayoviṃśo.adhyāyaḥ || 23 || cha ||
|| sūta uvāca || ||
kṛṣṇāṃśe ca gṛhaṃ prāpte cendule ca vivāhite ||
mahīpatissadā duḥkhī dehalīṃ prati cāgamat|| 1 ||
vṛttāṃtaṃ ca nṛpasyāgre kathayitvā sa tārakaḥ ||
paraṃ vismayamāpannaḥ kṛṣṇāṃśacaritaṃ prati || 2 ||
etasminnaṃtare maṃtrī caṃdrabhaṭṭa udāradhīḥ ||
bhūmirājaṃ vacaḥ prāha śṛṇu pārthivasattama||3||
mayā cārādhitā devī vaiṣṇavī viśvakāriṇī ||
trivarṣāṃte ca tuṣṭābhūdvaradā bhayahāriṇī||4||
tayā dattaṃ śubhaṃ jñānaṃ kumatidhvaṃsakārakam||
tato.ahaṃ jñānavānbhūtvā kṛṣṇāṃśaṃ prati bhṛpate ||
caritraṃ varṇayāmāsa tasya kalmaṣanāśanam || 5 ||
ityuktvā sa ca śuddhātmā graṃthaṃ bhāṣāmayaṃ śubham ||
māhātmyaṃ devibhaktānāṃ śrāvayāmāsa vai sabhām ||6||
tacchrutvā bhūmirājastu vismitaścābhavatkṣa ṇāt ||
mahīpatistadā prāha divyāśvabaladarpitaḥ| ||
udayo nāma balavānyasyaivaṃ varṇitā kathā ||7||
catvāro vājino divyā jalasthalakhagāśca te ||
śīghraṃ tāṃśca samāhṛtya svayaṃ bhūpa balī bhava || 8 ||
iti śrutvā sa nṛpatiḥ śrutavākyaviśāradam ||
āhūya kuṃdanamalaṃ preṣayāmāsa satvaram || 9 ||
mahāvatīṃ samāgatya sa dūto bhūpatiṃ prati ||
uvāca vacanaṃ premṇā mahīrājasya bhūpateḥ || 3.3.24.10 ||
vājinaste hi catvāro divyarūpāḥ śubha prabhāḥ ||
darśanātheṃ tava vadhūrvelā nāma mamātmajā || 11 ||
tayāhūtānhayānbhūpa dehi me vismayaṃ tyaja ||
no cedvelāgninā sarve kṣayaṃ yāsyaṃti sainyapāḥ || 12 ||
iti śrutvā vaco ghoraṃ sa bhūpo bhayakātaraḥ ||
āhlādādīnsamāhūya vacanaṃ prāha namradhīḥ ||
hayānsvānsvānmudā dehi madīyaṃ vacanaṃ kuru || ||13||
iti śrutvā sa āhlādo dhyātvā sarvamayīṃ śivām ||
uvāca madhuraṃ vākyaṃ śṛṇu bhūpa śivapriya ||14||
yatra naḥ saṃsthitāḥ prāṇāstatra te vā jinaḥ sthitāḥ ||
na dāsyāmo vayaṃ rājansatyaṃsatyaṃ na cānyathā || 15 ||
iti śrutvā vacastasya rājā parimalo balī ||16||
śapathaṃ kṛtavānghoraṃ śṛṇvatāṃ balaśālinām ||
bhojanaṃ brahmamāṃsasya pānīyaṃ go.asṛjopamam||17||
śayyā svamātṛsadṛśī brahmahatyopamā sabhā ||
mama rāṣṭre ca yuṣmābhirvāsaḥ pāpamayo mahān ||18||
iti śrutvā tu śapathaṃ devakī śokatatparā ||
cakāra rodanaṃ gāḍhaṃ sagehajanavigrahā||19||
paṃcaviṃśābdake prāpte kṛṣṇāṃśe yogatatpare ||
bhādraśuklacaturdaśyāṃ tadgehāddharmatatparāḥ || 3.3.24.20 ||
niryayuḥ kānyakubjaṃ te jayacaṃdreṇa pālitam ||
svarṇavatyā puṣpavatyā sahitāścitrarekhayā ||21||
indulaḥ prayayau śīghramayutāśvabalaissaha ||
karālaṃ hayamāruhya paṃcaśabdaṃ ca tatpitā ||
kṛṣṇāṃśo biṃdulārūḍho devakīmanusaṃyayau ||22||
tyaktvā te bhūpatergrāmaṃ sarvasaṃpatsamanvitam ||
pathi tryahamuṣitvā te jayacaṃdramupāyayuḥ ||23||
natvā taṃ bhūpatiṃ premṇā gaditvā sarvakāraṇam ||
uṣitvā śītalāsthāne pūjayāmāsurambikām||24||
jayacaṃdrastu bhūpālo devasiṃhena varṇitaḥ||
tebhyaśca na dadau vṛttiṃ bhūmā parimalājñayā||25||
kuṃṭhito devasiṃhastu gatvā kṛṣṇāṃśamuttamam ||
uditvā kāraṇaṃ sarvaṃ sa śrutvā roṣamādadhau || 26||
tvaritaṃ biṃdulārūḍho hayapaṃcaśatāvṛtaḥ ||
luṃṭhayāmāsa nagaraṃ pālitaṃ lakṣaṇena tat || 27 ||
dṛṣṭvā taṃ lakṣaṇo vīro hastinaḥ pṛṣṭhamāsthitaḥ ||
śareṇa tāḍayāmāsa kṛṣṇāṃśahṛdayaṃ dṛḍham ||28||
niṣphalatvaṃ gato bāṇo viṣṇumaṃtreṇa preritaḥ ||
vismitaḥ sa tu bhūpālo vāhanādbhūmimāgataḥ || 29 ||
natvā taccaraṇau divyau kuliśādibhiranvitau ||
tuṣṭāva daṃḍavadbhūtvā lakṣaṇo gadgadaṃ girā || 3.3.24.30 ||
|| lakṣaṇa uvāca || ||
vaiṣṇavaṃ viddhi māṃ svāminviṣṇupūjanatatparam ||
jāne.ahaṃ tvāṃ mahābāho kṛṣṇaśaktyavatārakam ||31||
tvadṛte ko hi me bāṇaṃ niṣphalaṃ kurute bhuvi ||
kṣamasva mama daurātmyaṃ nātha te māyayā kṛtam ||32||
ityuktvā tena sahito jayacandraṃ mahīpatim||
gatvā taṃ kathayāmāsa yathā prāptaḥ parājayam||33||
nṛpastayoḥ parīkṣārthaṃ yau tu chāyāvimohitau||
gajau kuvalayāpīḍau tyaktavācchītalāsthale||34||
tadāhlādodayau vīrau gṛhītvā tau svalīlayā ||
cakṛṣaturbalātpucche krośamātraṃ punaḥpunaḥ || 35 ||
mṛtau kuvalayāpīḍau dṛṣṭvā rājā bhayāturaḥ ||
dadau rājagṛhaṃ grāmaṃ tayorarthe prasannadhīḥ || 36 ||
iṣaśuddhe tu saṃprāpte lakṣaṇo nāma vai balī ||
nṛpājñayā yayau śīghraṃ taiśca digvijayaṃ prati || 37 ||
saptalakṣabalaissārddhaṃ tālanādyaiśca saṃyutaḥ ||
vārāṇasīṃ purīṃ prāpya rurodha nagarīṃ tadā || 38 ||
rudravarmā ca bhūpālo gauḍavaṃśayaśaskaraḥ ||
paṃcāyutaiḥ svasainyaiśca sārddhaṃ yuddhārthamāptavān || 39 ||
yāmamātreṇa taṃ jitvā ṣoḍaśābdasya vai karam ||
koṭimudrāmayaṃ prāpya jayacaṃdrāya cārpayat ||3.3.24.40 ||
māgadheśaṃ punarjitvā nāmnā vijayakāriṇam ||
viṃśatyabdakaraṃ prāpya svabhūpāya samarpayat || 41 ||
paṃcakoṭīśca vai mudrā rājatasya punaryayau ||
aṃga vaṃgadeśapatiṃ vīro lakṣaṇo vai yutaśca taiḥ||
lakṣasainyayutaṃ bhūpaṃ kālīvarmāṇamuttamam||
ahorātreṇa taṃ jitvā mahāyuddhena lakṣaṇaḥ|| 44|
viṃśatyabda karaṃ prāpya koṭiṃ svarṇamayaṃ tadā||
preṣayāmāsa bhūpāya jayacaṃdrāya vai mudā||45||
uṣṭradeśaṃ yayau vīraḥ pālitaṃ tairmahābalaiḥ||
dhoyīkavistatranṛpo lakṣasainyasamanvitaḥ|46||
jagannāthājñayā prāptastaiśca sārddhaṃ raṇonmukhe||
tayoścāsīnmahadyuddhaṃ tumulaṃ romaharṣaṇam||
ahorātrapramāṇena kṛṣṇāṃśena jito nṛpaḥ||47||
viṃśatyabdakaraṃ sarvaṃ koṭisvarṇasamanvitam ||
saṃprāpya preṣayāmāsa kānyakubjādhipāya vai || 48 ||
puṃḍradeśaṃ yayau vīro lakṣaṇo balavattaraḥ ||
nṛpaṃ nāgapatiṃ nāma paṃcāyutabalairyutam ||
dinamātreṇa taṃ jitvā koṭimudrā gṛhītavān || 49 ||
maheṃdragirimāgatya natvā taṃ bhārgavaṃ munim ||
nato nivṛtya te sarve netrapālapuraṃ yayuḥ || 3.3.24.50 ||
yogasiṃhastadāgatya kṛṣṇāṃśaṃ prati bhārgava ||
koṭimudrā dadau tasmai saptarātrama vāsayat || 51 ||
vīrasiṃhapuraṃ jagmuste vīrā madavattarāḥ ||
rurudhurnagarīṃ sarvāṃ himatuṃgopari sthitām ||
pālitāṃ gorakhākhyena yoginā bhaktakāra ṇāt || 52 ||
bhūpānujaḥ pravīraśca sainyāyutasamanvitaḥ ||
kṛtavāndāruṇaṃ yuddhaṃ lakṣaṇasyaiva senayā || 53 ||
pratyahaṃ balavāñchūro hatvā śūrasahasra kam ||
sāyaṃkāle gṛhaṃ prāpya yoginaṃ tamapūjayat || 54 ||
pūjanātsa prasannātmā sainyamujjīvya bhūpateḥ ||
dattvā gajabalaṃ tebhyaḥ punaryogaṃ karoti vai || 55 ||
sārddhamāso gatastatra yuddhyatāṃ balaśālinām ||
tadā te tu nirutsāhā devasiṃhaṃ tamabruvavan || 56 ||
vijayo naḥ kathaṃ bhūpa brūhi nastattvamagrataḥ||
iti śrutvā sa hovāca śṛṇu kṛṣṇāṃśa me vacaḥ ||57||
yogināṃ gorakhaṃ nāma parājitya svanṛtyataḥ ||
punaryuddhaṃ kuru tvaṃ vai tato jaya mavāpsyasi || 58 ||
ityuktāste hi kṛṣṇādyāḥ kṛtvā yogamayaṃ vapuḥ ||
sthāpayitvā raṇe senāṃ pālitāṃ lakṣaṇena vai || 59 ||
prātaḥ kāle yayuste vai maṃdiraṃ tasya yoginaḥ ||
kṛṣṇāṃśo nartakaścāsīdveṇuvādyaviśāradaḥ || 3.3.24.60 ||
devasiṃho mṛdaṃgāḍhyo vīṇādhārī ca tālanaḥ ||
kāṃsyadhārī tadāhlādo jagau gītāṃ sanātanīm || 61 ||
tadarthaṃ hṛdaye kṛtvā gorakhassarvayogavān ||
varaṃ vṛṇuta tānāha te tacchrutvā.abruvanvacaḥ || 62 ||
namasyāmo vayaṃ tubhyaṃ yadi deyo varastvayā ||
dehi saṃjīvinī vidyāmāhlādāya mahātmane ||63||
iti śrutvā hṛdi dhyātvā tānuvāca prasannadhīḥ ||
vidyā saṃjīvinī tubhyaṃ varṣamātraṃ bhaviṣyati ||
tatpaścānniṣkalībhūyāgamiṣyati madaṃtikam ||64||
adyaprabhṛti bho vīra mayā tyaktamidaṃ jagat ||
yatra bhartṛhariḥ śiṣyastatra gatvā śaye hyaham|| 65 ||
ityuktvāntarhito yogī jagmuste raṇamūrddhani ||
jitvā pravīrasiṃhaṃ ca vīrasiṃhaṃ tathaiva ca || 66 ||
hatvā tasyāyutaṃ sainyaṃ luṇṭhayitvā ca tadgṛham ||
kṛtvā dāsamayaṃ bhūpaṃ lakṣaṇaḥ prayayau mudā || 67 ||
kośalaṃ deśamāgatya jitvā tasya mahīpatim ||
sainyāyutaṃ sūryadharaṃ karayogyamacīkarat || 68 ||
ṣoḍaśābdakaraṃ prāpya mudrākoṭyayutaṃ mudā ||
naimiṣāraṇyamāgamya tatroṣuḥ snānatatparāḥ || 69 ||
holikāyā dine ramye lakṣaṇo balavattaraḥ ||
dattvā dānāni viprebhyo mahotsavamakārayat || 3.3.24.70 ||
tadā vayaṃ ca munayaḥ samādhisthāśca bhūpatiḥ ||
yadā sa lakṣaṇaḥ prāpto naimiṣāraṇyamuttamam || 71 ||
snātvā sarvāṇi tīrthāni saṃtarpya dvijadevatāḥ ||
kānyakubjapuraṃ jagmuścaitrakṛṣṇāṣṭamīdine || 72 ||
iti te kathitaṃ vipra yathādigvijayobhavat ||
śṛṇu vipra kathāṃ ramyāṃ balakhāniryathā mṛtaḥ || 73 ||
mārgakṛṣṇasya saptamyāṃ bhūmirājo mahābalaḥ ||
mahīpateśca vākyena sāmaṃtaṃ prāha nirbhayaḥ || 74 ||
mayā śrutaste tanayaḥ śāradāvaradarpitaḥ ||
raktabījatvamāpannastaṃ me dehi kṛpāṃ kuru || 75 ||
ityuktassa tu sāmantastena rājñeva satkṛtaḥ |
cāmuṃḍaṃ nāma tanayaṃ samāhūyābravīdidam || 76 ||
putra tvaṃ nṛpateḥ kāryaṃ sadā kuru raṇapriya ||
iti śrutvā piturvākyaṃ sa vai rājānamabravīt || 77 ||
dehyājñāṃ bhūpate mahyaṃ śīghraṃ jayamavāpsyasi ||
iti śrutvā sa hovāca balakhānirmahābalaḥ || 78 ||
macchirīṣavanaṃ chitvā gṛhīttvā rāṣṭramuttamam ||
susthito nirbhayo gehe bāhuśālī yateṃdriyaḥ ||79||
yadi tvaṃ balakhāniṃ ca jitvā me hyarpayiṣyasi||
hatvā vā tasya sakalaṃ rāṣṭraṃ tvayi bhaviṣyati || 3.3.24.80 ||
ityuktvā raktabījaṃ taṃ samāhūya svakaṃ balam ||
saptalakṣaṃ dadau tasmai sa tatprāpya mudā yayau || || 81 ||
uṣitvā tridinaṃ mārge śirīṣākhyamupāgataḥ ||
rurodha nagarīṃ sarvāṃ balakhānermahātmanaḥ|| 82 ||
cāmuṃḍāgamanaṃ śrutvā balakhānirmahābalaḥ||
pūjayitvā mahamāyāṃ dattvā dānānyanekaśaḥ ||
lakṣasainyena sahitaḥ prayayau nagarādbahiḥ || 83 ||
tasyānujo mahāvīrassukhakhānirbalaiḥ saha ||
hariṇīṃ tāṃ samāruhya śatrusainyamacikṣapat || 84 ||
balakhāniḥ kapotastho nāśayitvā riporbalam ||
lakṣasainyaṃ mudā yuktaścāmuṃḍaṃ prati cāgamat || || 85 ||
tayoścāsīnmahadyuddhaṃ svasvasainyakṣayaṃkaram ||
ahorātrapramāṇena nihatāḥ kṣatriyā raṇe || 86 ||
prātaḥkāle tu saṃprāpte kṛtvā snānādikāḥ kriyāḥ ||
jagmatustau raṇe vīrau dhanurbāṇaviśāradau || 87 ||
rathastho balakhāniśca cāmuṇḍo gajapṛṣṭhagaḥ ||
cakratustumulaṃ ghoraṃ naravismayakārakam || 88 ||
bāṇairbāṇāṃśca saṃchidya devībhaktau ca tau mudā ||
anyonyaṃ vāhane hatvā bhūtalatvamupāgatau ||
khaḍgacarmadharau vīrau yuyudhāte parasparam||89||
yāvanto raktabījāṃgātsaṃjātā raktabiṃdavaḥ ||
tāvantaḥ puruṣā jātā raktabījaparākramāḥ || 3.3.24.90 ||
taiśca vīrairmadonmattairbalakhānissamaṃtataḥ ||
saṃruddho.abhūd bhṛguśreṣṭha śāradāṃ śaraṇaṃ yayau||91||
etasminnaṃtare vīraḥ sukhakhānistato.anujaḥ||
āgneyaṃ śaramādāya raktabījānadāhayat||92||
purā tu sukhakhā niśca havyairdevaṃ ca pāvakam ||
paṃcābdānpūjayāmāsa tadā tuṣṭassvayaṃ prabhuḥ || 93 ||
pāvakīyaṃ śaraṃ ramyaṃ śatrusaṃhārakārakam ||
dadau tasmai prasannātmā tenāsāvabhavajjayī || 94 ||
balakhānistu balavāndṛṣṭvā śatruvināśanam ||
parājitaṃ ca cāmuṃḍaṃ baddhvā gehamupāgatam || 95||
kṛtvā nārīmayaṃ veṣaṃ sa bhīto brahmahatyayā ||
dolāmāropya balavānpreṣayāmāsa śatrave || 96 ||
hataśeṣaṃ paṃcalakṣaṃ sainyaṃ gatvā ca dehalīm ||
vṛttāntaṃ kathayāmāsa yathā jāto mahāraṇaḥ || 97 ||
nārīveṣaṃ ca cāmuṃḍaṃ sa dṛṣṭvā pṛthivīpatiḥ ||
krodhāviṣṭaśca balavānmahīpatimuvāca ha || 98 ||
kathaṃ jayo me bhavitā sukhakhānau ca jīvite ||
śrutvā mahīpatiḥ prāha cchadmanā kāryamākuru || 99 ||
brāhmī mātā tayorjñeyā śuddhā saiva pativratā ||
dūtībhiḥ kāraṇaṃ jñātvā punaryuddhaṃ kuruṣva bhoḥ || 3.3.24.100 ||
iti śrutvā mahīrājo dūtīstāśchalakovidāḥ ||
āhūya preṣayāmāsa balakhānigṛhaṃ prati ||1 01||
brāhmaṇyastāstadā bhūtvā balakhānigṛhaṃ yayuḥ ||
sasutāṃ tāṃ praśasyāśu papracchurvinayānvitāḥ || 102 ||
tava putrau mahāvīrau diṣṭyā śatrukṣayaṃkarau ||
tayormṛtyuḥ kathaṃ bhūyājjīvatāṃ śaradāṃ śatam || 103 ||
tadā brāhmī vacaḥ prāha pāvakīyaḥ śaraḥ śubhaḥ ||
sukhakhānerjīvakaro balakhāneḥ padāhvakaḥ || 104 ||
iti jñātvā tu tā dūtyaḥ prayayurdehalīṃ prati ||
kathayitvā nṛpasyāgre dhanaṃ prāpyaṃ gṛhaṃ yayuḥ ||105||
mahīrājastu tacchrutvā mahādevamumāpatim ||
pārthivaiḥ pūjanaṃ cakre sahasradivasānmudā ||106||
iti śrībhaviṣye mahāpurāṇe pratisargaparvaṇi caturyugakhaṇḍāparaparyāye kaliyugīyetihāsasamuccaye caturviśo.a dhyāyaḥ || 24 |||9||
sūta uvāca ||
ṣaḍviṃśābde ca kṛṣṇāṃśe yathā jātaṃ tathā śṛṇu ||
mune biṃdusaro nāma dakṣiṇasyāṃ diśi sthitam ||1||
tasya tīre.avasadgrāmo yojanāyāmasaṃyutaḥ ||
nāmnā biṃdugaḍho durgo varṇadharmapravartakaḥ || 2 ||
tasmingrāme.avasadbhūpo viṣvaksenānvayodbhavaḥ ||
śāradānandano nāma brahmadhyānaparāyaṇaḥ||3||
brahmacaryaprabhāveṇa tadvīryaṃ śirasi sthitam ||
atassa kāmapālākhyaḥ prathito.abhūnmahītale||4||
yajñaiḥ saṃpūjayāmāsa surajyeṣṭhaṃ prajāpatim||
yajñāṃśabhuktamātreṇa rājñī garbhamupādadhau||5||
daśamāsāntare jātā kanyā sarvaguṇālayā ||
padminī nāma vikhyātā sarvaśobhāsamanvitā|| 6 ||
dvādaśābdavayaḥ prāptau babhūva varavarṇinī ||
padmākaro bhūpasuto mahīrājapadānugaḥ ||7||
piturājñānusāreṇa bhūpānāhūya satvaram ||
svayaṃ varaṃ bhaginyāśca kārayāmāsa vai mudā || 8 ||
nānādeśyā yayurbhūpā mukhyaśūrasamanvitāḥ ||
sahāhlādaiścatuvīrairlakṣaṇaḥ piturājñayā || 9 ||
yayau biṃdugaḍhaṃ grāmaṃ sthito yatra mahotsavaḥ ||
mahīrājastu balavāndṛṣṭvā lakṣaṇamāgatam || 3.3.25.10 ||
svasenāṃ sthāpayāmāsa rakṣārthe sarvabhūbhujām ||
etasminnaṃtare devī sakhībhiḥ saha padminī || 11 ||
sarvabhūpānvilokyāśu lakṣaṇāṃtamupāyayau ||
śyāmāṃgaṃ ca yuvānaṃ ca sarvalakṣaṇa lakṣitam || 12 ||
catvāriṃśattathā paṃcāśanmānābdavayovṛtam ||
vyūḍhoraskaṃ dṛḍhaskaṃdhaṃ nirjaraṃ rogavarjitam || 13 ||
dṛṣṭvā tamātmasadṛśamāhlādādyaiśca rakṣitam ||
jayamālāṃ dadau tasmai padminī lakṣaṇāya ca || 14 ||
tadā sa lakṣaṇo vīro gṛhītvā pāṇimuttamam ||
svarathaṃ ca samāruhya rājñāṃ madhye yayau mudā || 15 ||
pṛdhvīrājastathā sarve bhūmipā balasaṃyutāḥ ||
rurudhuḥ sarvato vīraṃ lakṣaṇaṃ balavattaram || 16 ||
tālanaḥ siṃhinīsaṃstho gṛhītvā parighaṃ mudā ||
sainyāni yodhayāmāsa bhīmasenāṃśasaṃbhavaḥ || 17 ||
paṃcaśabdagajārūḍhaścāhrādastomarāyudhaḥ ||
ripūnvidārayāmāsa balabhadrāṃśasaṃbhavaḥ || 18 ||
kṛṣṇāṃśo bindulārūḍho gṛhītvā khaṅgamuttamam ||
bhūpatīnbahudhā chittvā mahāvadhamakārayat || 19 ||
devo manorathārūḍho bhairavaṃ bhallamādadhau ||
hatvā ca bahudhā sainyaṃ nanarda ca punaḥpunaḥ || 3.3.25.20 ||
lakṣaṇo dhanurādāya vaiṣṇavāstrāṇi vai punaḥ ||
saṃdhāya ca jaghānāśu mahīrājasya sainyapān || 21 ||
yāmamātramabhūyuddhaṃ teṣāṃ taiśca samanvitam ||
tyaktvā yuddhaṃ mahīrājaḥ sarvabhūpasamanvitaḥ || 22 ||
yayau sa dehalīgrāme śāradānaṃdanastadā ||
saṃsthāpya maṇḍapaśubhaṃ kṛtvā vaivāhikīḥ kriyāḥ ||
dadau kanyāṃ vidhānena dhanadhānyādisaṃvṛtām || 23 ||
etasminnantare prāpto mahīpatiruvāca tam ||
padmākaraṃ bhūpasutaṃ lakṣasainyasamanvitam || 24 ||
aho mitra mahāvīra kīdṛśī te matiḥ sthitā ||
viṣvaksenānvaye tvaṃ vai saṃjātaḥ kṣatriyottamaḥ || 25 ||
lakṣaṇo dharmarahito varṇasaṃkarasaṃyutaḥ ||
āhlādādyāśca te śūrā ābhīramātṛsaṃbhavāḥ ||
tairyutaśca nivāso vai saṃtyājyo dharmakovidaiḥ || 26 ||
iti padmākaraḥ śrutvā sarvamāyāviśāradaḥ ||
sa kṛtvā śāmbarīṃ māyāṃ baddhvā tāneva durjayān ||
svagehe sthāpayāmāsa kārāgāre śilāmaye || 27 ||
devyāśca varadānena devasiṃhastadā niśi ||
tyaktvā māyāmohamayī kānyakubjamupāyayau || 28 ||
iṃdulāgre ca tatsarve gaditvā tena saṃyutaḥ ||
prāpto biṃdugaḍhaṃ śīghraṃ divyamāyāviśāradaḥ || 29 ||
padmākarastu tacchutvā kṛtvā māyāṃ ca śāmbarīm ||
mohanāyodyatastatra yathā megho raviṃ divi || 3.3.25.30 ||
iṃdulaśca tadā cāpe saṃdhāya śaramuttamam ||
kāmāstreṇa tu tanmāyā bhasmībhūtābhavatkṣaṇāt || 31 ||
tadā te bodhitāḥ sarve kāmāstreṇa mahābalāḥ ||
bhittvā lohamayaṃ jālaṃ kapāṭaṃ ca tathā dṛḍham || 32 ||
bahirbhūtā: samājagmuḥ śatrusainyānyanāśayan ||
kṣatriyāḥ paṃcasāhasrā mṛtā yamapuraṃ yayuḥ || 33 ||
śāradānaṃdano bhūpastatrāgatya vinamya tān ||
svasutāṃ ca dadau tasmai lakṣaṇāya mahātmane ||34||
nānāvidhāni bhojyāni praśasyābharaṇāni ca ||
sarvebhyaśca dadau rājā sahasrebhyastadā mudā || 35 ||
kumārikāṃ svakīyāṃ ca bahurodanatatparām||
sa matvā kāmapālo vai svagehāttaṃ nyavāsayat ||
āgato lakṣaṇo gehaṃ māghakṛṣṇāṣṭamīdine || 36 ||
jayacaṃdrastu taṃ dṛṣṭvā lakṣaṇaṃ premavihvalaḥ ||
śatagrāmāndadau tebhyastālanādibhya eva ca||37||
dattvā tato.anyadānāni govastrābharaṇāni ca ||
pradadau brāhmaṇebhyaśca sa cakāra mahotsavam ||38|| ||
|| sūta uvāca || ||
mahīrājo varaṃ prāptaḥ śaṃkarātpārthivārcanāt ||
saṃyojya phālgune māsi senāṃ śatrubhayaṃkarām || 39 ||
saptalakṣaiśca sahitaḥ śirīṣākhyapuraṃ yayau ||
nṛpājñayā ca cāṃmuḍo rurodha nagaraṃ punaḥ || 3.3.25.40 ||
sukhakhānistadā kruddho lakṣasainyasamanvitaḥ ||
nagarādbahirāgatya mahāvadhamakārayat || 41 ||
pāvakāstreṇa balavānhatvā daśasahasrakam ||
mahīrājamupāgamya vacanaṃ prāha nirbhayaḥ || 42 ||
adya tvāṃ ca haniṣyāmi tvaṃ vā hantā raṇe mama ||
svavidyāṃ kuru bhūpa tvaṃ no cedyāsyasi vaiśasam || 43 ||
iti śrutvā mahīrājo raudrāstraṃ cāpa ādadhe ||
tadastrācca mahāvahniḥ prādurbhūto bhayaṃkaraḥ || 44 ||
sukhakhānistadāgneyaṃ saṃdadhau tasya śāṃtaye ||
raudrāgninā ca saśaraḥ sukhakhānirlayaṃ gataḥ || 45 ||
tadastraṃ śivatūṇīre gataṃ kāryaṃ vidhāya tat ||
balakhānistu tacchrutvā bhayabhītaḥ samāgataḥ || 46 ||
bhrāturvairamupādāya jaghāna ca riporbalam ||
dhyātvā ca śāradāṃ devīṃ bhūmirājamupāgamat || 47 ||
bhūmirājastu taṃ dṛṣṭvā tadbalādhikyamohitaḥ ||
uvāca vacanaṃ premṇā balakhāne śṛṇuṣva bhoḥ || 48 ||
krośamātrāntare gartā dvādaśaiva mayā kṛtāḥ ||
rakṣitā dvādaśaśataiḥ śūrairyuddhaviśāradaiḥ || 49 ||
śūrāñjitvā samullaṃghya gartāndvādaśasammitān ||
mamārddhaṃ sakalaṃ rāṣṭraṃ gṛhāṇa balisattama || 3.3.25.50 ||
iti śrutvā priyaṃ vākyaṃ tadrājñā satyabhāṣitam ||
kapotaṃ hayamāruhya khaḍgahasto vanaṃ yayau || 51 ||
dṛṣṭvā gartānmahāvīro hatvā śūrāñchatañchatam||
yayau sa dvādaśāngarttānbāhuśālī jiteṃdriyaḥ || 52 ||
cāmuṃḍastu tadāgatya śarāyutasamanvitaḥ ||.
rurodha sarvato vīraṃ chadmakārī dvijādhamaḥ || 53 ||
balakhāniśca mahatīṃ senāṃ tasya jaghāna ha ||
cāmuṃḍaṃ tamupāgamya nanarda ca punaḥpunaḥ || 54 ||
trayodaśaṃ guptagartaṃ tṛṇairācchāditaṃ mṛdā ||
viṣadhautairmahābhallaissaṃruddhaṃ vivaraprabham || 55 ||
patitaḥ sakapotaśca sa vīro daivamohitaḥ ||
aṃdhakāre mahāghoraṃ gaṃbhīraṃ krośamātrakam || 56 ||
vidīrṇastatra caraṇassa padmo vatsajasya vai ||
mahākaṣṭena tadvājī gartādāgatya vai bahiḥ ||
svapadaistāḍayāmāsa mahīrājasya tadbalam || 57 ||
cāmuṃḍastu tadāgatya balakhāneśca vai śiraḥ ||
chittvā jaghāna tatsainyaṃ hāhābhūtaṃ vineśvaram || 58 ||
gajamuktā ca tacchutvā citāmāropya vai patim ||
dāhayāmāsa cāṃgāni sā patyā saha vai satī || 59 ||
tadā brahmā svavadhvā ca sārddhamāgatya tatra vai ||
sukhakhāniṃ ca saṃhūya dadāha tatkalevaram || 3.3.25.60 ||
śūnyabhūtaṃ ca nagaraṃ bhasma kṛtvā sa vai nṛpaḥ ||
jagāma dehalī śīghraṃ mahotsāhasamanvitaḥ || 61 ||
iti śrībhaviṣye mahāpurāṇe pratisargaparvaṇi caturyugakhaṃḍāparaparyāye kaliyugīyetihāsasamuccaye vikramākhyānakāle paṃcaviṃśo.adhyāyaḥ || 25 || cha || ||
|| sūta uvāca || ||
śrāvaṇe māsi saṃprāpte dehalīṃ ca mahīpatiḥ ||
nāgotsavāya prayayau sadaiva kalahapriyaḥ || 1 ||
dṛṣṭvā nāgotsavaṃ tatra gītanṛtyasamanvitam ||
mahīrājaṃ namaskṛtya vacanaṃ prāha namradhīḥ || 2 ||
rājanmahāvatīgrāme kīrtisāgaramadhyage ||
vāmanotsavamatyaṃ taṃ yavavrīhisamanvitaḥ ||
paśya tvaṃ tatra gatvā ca mamaiva vacanaṃ kuru || 3 ||
iti śrutvā mahīrājo dhuṃdhukāreṇa saṃyutaḥ ||
saptalakṣabalairyuktaścāmuṇḍena samanvitaḥ ||
prāptaḥ śirīṣavipine tatra vāsamakārayat || 4 ||
mahīpatistu nṛpatiṃ natvā vai candravaṃśinam ||
uvāca vacanaṃ duḥkhī dhūrto māyāviśāradaḥ || 5 ||
rājanprāpto mahīrājo yuddhārthī tvāmupasthitaḥ ||
candrāvalīṃ ca tanayāṃ brahmānaṃdaṃ tavātmajam ||
divyaliṃgaṃ sa saṃpūjya balātkārādgrahīṣyati || 6 ||
tasmāttvaṃ svabalaiḥ sārddhaṃ mayā saha mahāmate ||
chadmanā taṃ parājitya nagare.asminsukhī bhava || 7 ||
iti śrutvā daiva vaśo rājā parimalo balī ||
caturlakṣabalaissārddhaṃ niśīthe ca samāgataḥ || 8 ||
śayitānkṣatriyāñchūrānhatvā paṃcasahasrakān ||
śataghnīṃ roṣaṇīṃ cakre bahuśūravināśinīm || 9 ||
tadotthāya mahīrājaḥ kaṭimābadhya saṃbhramāt ||
vairiṇaṃ paramaṃ matvā mahadyuddhamacīkarat || 3.3.26.10 ||
yuddhyaṃtyoḥ senayo statra malanā putragṛddhinī ||
śāradāmādarādgatvā pūjayāmāsa bhaktitaḥ || 11 ||
devidevi mahādevi sarvaduḥkhavināśini ||
hara me sakalāṃ bādhāṃ kṛṣṇāṃśaṃ bodhayāśu ca || 12 ||
japtvāyutamimaṃ maṃtraṃ hutvā tarpaṇamārjane ||
kṛtvā suṣvāpa tadveśmastadā tuṣṭā svayaṃ śivā || 13 ||
malane mahatī bādhā kṣayaṃ yāsyati mā śucaḥ || 14 ||
ityuktvā śāradā devī kṛṣṇāṃśaṃ prati cāgamat ||
putra te jananī bhūmirmahīrājena pīḍitā||
kṣayaṃ yāsyati śīghraṃ ca tasmāttvaṃ tāṃ samuddhara || 15 ||
iti śrutvā vaco devyāssa vīro vismayānvitaḥ ||
devakīṃ prati saṃprāptaḥ kathayāmāsa kāraṇam || 16 ||
sā tu śrutvā vaco ghoraṃ svarṇavatyā samanvitā ||
ruroda bhṛśamudvignā vilapya bahudhā satī || 17 ||
kṛṣṇāṃśastu tadā duḥkhī devasiṃhamuvāca ha ||
kiṃ kartavyaṃ mayā vīra dehyājñāṃ dāruṇe bhaye || 18 ||
tacchrutvā tena sahito lakṣaṇena samanvitaḥ ||
yayau digvijayārthena vyājena ca mahāvatīm || || 19 ||
tālano bhīmasenāṃśaḥ senāpatirudāradhīḥ ||
