saptalakṣabalaissārddhaṃ vināhlādena saṃyayau || 3.3.26.20 ||
kalpakṣretramupāgamya yoginaste tadābhavan ||
senāṃ niveśayāmāsa vipine tatra dāruṇe || 21 ||
kṛṣṇāṃśastālano devo lakṣaṇo balavattaraḥ ||
gṛhītvā lāsyavastūni yuddhabhūmimupāgaman ||22||
saptāhaṃ ca tayoryuddhaṃ jātaṃ mṛtyuvivarddhanam ||
saptame.ahani te vīrāssaṃprāptā raṇamūrddhani ||23||
tasmindine mahābhāga mahadyuddhamavartata || 24 ||
dṛṣṭvā parājitaṃ sainyaṃ rājā parimalo balī ||
rathasthaścāpamādāya mahīrājamupāyayau || 25 ||
yādavaśca gajārūḍhastadā caṃdrāvalīpatiḥ ||
dhundhukāraṃ samāhūya dhanuryuddhamacīkarat || 26 ||
harināgaramāruhya brahmānaṃdo mahābala. ||
tārakaṃ śatrumāhūya dhanuryuddhaṃ cakāra ha || 27 ||
mardanaṃ rājaputraṃ ca raṇajidga jasaṃsthitaḥ ||
svaśaraistāḍayāmāsa tatsutaṃ ca jaghāna ha || 28 ||
rūpaṇo vai saradanaṃ hayārūḍho jagāma ha ||
ābhīrītanayo jāto madano nāma vai balī ||
nṛharaṃ rājaputraṃ ca śaṃkhāṃśaśca jagāma ha || 29 ||
teṣu saṃgrāmameteṣu cāmuṇḍo.ayutasainyapaḥ ||
mahīpateśca vacanaṃ matvā nagaramāyayau || 3.3.26.30 ||
dadarśa nagarīṃ ramyāṃ caturvarṇasamanvitām ||
dhanadhānyayutāṃ vīro devībhaktiparāyaṇaḥ || 31 ||
mahīpatistu vai dhūrto durgadvāri samāgataḥ ||
cāmuṃḍena yutaḥ pāpī rājagehamupāyayau ||32||
malanā bhrātaraṃ dṛṣṭvā vacanaṃ prāha duḥkhitā ||
bhādrakṛṣṇāṣṭamī cādya yavavrīhi gṛhe sthitam ||33||
na prāptaṃ jala saṃsthāne supuṇye kīrtisāgare ||
mahīrājo mahāpāpī vāmanotsavamāgataḥ ||34||
vināhlādaṃ ca kṛṣṇāṃśaṃ mahadduḥkhamupāgatam ||
ityuktasya vihasyāha brāhmaṇo.ayaṃ mahābalī ||
kānyakubjātsamāyātaḥ kṛṣṇāṃśena prayojitaḥ ||35||
devīdattaśca nāmnā.ayaṃ sa te kāryaṃ kariṣyati ||
śrutvā caṃdrāvalī devī sarvabhūṣaṇasaṃyutā ||36||
kāmāgnipīḍitaṃ vipraṃ cāmuṃḍaṃ ca dadarśa ha||
mātaraṃ prati cāgamya vacanaṃ prāha nirbharam||37||
dhūrto.ayaṃ brāhmaṇo mātarniścayaṃ māṃ hariṣyati ||
ko.ayaṃ vīro na jānāmi kathaṃ yāmi pativratā ||38||
iti śrutvā vacastasyā lajjitassa mahīpatiḥ||
cāmuṃḍena yutaḥ prāpto yatrābhūtsa mahāraṇaḥ||39||
etasminnaṃtare te vai brahmādyāstaiḥ parājitāḥ||
tyaktvā yuddhaṃ gṛhaṃ prāptāstrilakṣabalasaṃyutāḥ ||3.3.26.40||
kapāṭaṃ sudṛḍhaṃ kṛtvā mahāciṃtāmupāyayuḥ |
mahīrājastu balavānmahīpatyanumoditaḥ||41||
pramadāvanamāgatya ṣaṣṭilakṣabalānvitaḥ||
jugopa tatra balavānmānanotsavahetave ||
tālanādyāśca catvāraḥ śirīṣākhyapuraṃ yayuḥ||
sthalībhūtaṃ ca taṃ grāmaṃ dṛṣṭvā te vismayānvitāḥ||
prayayuste sukhabhraṣṭā dadṛśurhimadaṃ munim||43||
praṇamyocuḥ śucāviṣṭā balakhā nirmune balī ||
kva gataḥ samaraślāghī sa ca kunāgarairyutaḥ ||44||
śrutvāha himado yogī mahīrājena nāśitaḥ ||
chadmanā balakhāniśca tasyeyaṃ sundarī citā ||45||
iti śrutvā vaco ghoraṃ kṛṣṇāṃśaḥ śokatatparaḥ ||46||
vilalāpa bhṛśaṃ tatra hā bandho dharmajāṃśaka ||
tvadṛte bhūtale vāso mamātīva bhayaṃkaraḥ || 47 ||
darśanaṃ dehi me kṣipraṃ no cetprāṇāṃstyajāmyaham || 48 ||
ityuktaḥ sa tu tadbhrātā balakhāniḥ piśācagaḥ ||
sapatnīkassamāyāto rodanaṃ kṛtavānbahu ||
kathitvā sarvavṛttāntaṃ yathājātaṃ svavaiśasam || 49 ||
divyaṃ vimānamāruhya gato nākaṃ manoramam ||
yudhiṣṭhire tasya kalā balakhānerlayaṃ gatā || 3.3.26.50 ||
tadā duḥkhī sa kṛṣṇāṃśaḥ kṛtvā bhrātustilāṃjalim ||
mahāvatīṃ samāgatya rājagehamupāyayau || 51 ||
veṇuśabdena kṛṣṇāṃśo nanarta janamohanaḥ ||
vīṇāpravādyaṃ ca jagau tālano yogirūpadhṛka || 52 ||
mṛdaṃgadhvaninā devo lakṣaṇaḥ kāṃsyavādyakaḥ ||
susvaraṃ ca jagau tatra śrutvā rājā vimohitaḥ || 53 ||
tadā tu malanā rājñī dṛṣṭvā tadvāmanotsavam ||
ruditvā vacanaṃ prāha kva gato me priyaṃkaraḥ || 54 ||
kṛṣṇāṃśo bandhusahitastyaktvā māṃ mandabhāginīm ||
tvayā virahito deśo mahīrājena luṃṭhitaḥ || 55 ||
ityuktāṃ malanāṃ dṛṣṭvā kṛṣṇāṃśaḥ sneha kātaraḥ ||
vacanaṃ prāha namrātmā devi tvaṃ vacanaṃ kuru || 56 ||
yoginaśca vayaṃ rājñi sarvayuddhaviśāradāḥ ||
tavedaṃ sakalaṃ kāryaṃ kṛtvā yāmo hi naimiṣam || 57 ||
ye yavavrīhayaścaiva tava sadmani saṃsthitāḥ ||
gṛhītvā yoṣitassarvā gacchantu sāgarāntikam ||
vayaṃ tu yogasainyena tava rakṣāṃ ca kurmahe || 58 ||
iti śrutvā vacastasya tatsutā ca pativratā ||
mātaraṃ vacanaṃ prāha kṛṣṇāṃśo.ayaṃ na nartakaḥ || 59 ||
puṇḍarīkanibhe netre śyāmāṃgaṃ tasya sundaram ||
kṛṣṇāṃśena vinā mātaḥ ko rakṣārthaṃ kṣamo bhuvi ||
durjayaśca mahīrājaḥ kṛṣṇāṃśena vinirjitaḥ || 3.3.26.60 ||
iti tadvacanaṃ śrutvā malanā premavihvalā ||
yavavīhayo niṣkāsya yoṣitāṃ sthāpitāḥ kare || 61 ||
jagustā yoṣitassarvāḥ kṛṣṇāṃśacaritaṃ śubham ||
lakṣaṇaḥ śīghramāgamya yogiveṣānsvasainikān ||
sajjīkṛtya sthitastatra tālanādyaiḥ surakṣitaḥ || 62 ||
kīrtisāgaramāgamya te vīrā bala darpitāḥ ||
rurudhuḥ sarvato nārīrdolāyutamitasthitāḥ || 63 ||
mahīpatistu kulahā jñātvā kṛṣṇāṃśamāgatam ||
caṃdravaṃśinamāgamya saputraśca ruroda ha || 64 ||
yogibhistairmahārāja luṃṭhitāḥ sarvayoṣitaḥ ||
malanā saṃhṛtā tatra tathā caṃdrāvalī sutā || 65 ||
mahīrājasya te sainyā yogiveṣāssamāgatāḥ ||
tārakāya sutāṃ prādānmahīrājāya matsvasām || 66 ||
iti śrutvā vaco ghoraṃ brahmānando mahābalaḥ ||
lakṣasainyānvitastatra yayau roṣasamanvitaḥ || 67 ||
mahīrājastu kalahī sainyāyutamahātmajaḥ ||
rakṣitaḥ kāmasenena tathā raṇajitā yayau || 68 ||
tayoścāsīnmahayuddhaṃ senayorubhayorbhuvi ||
tālano yogiveṣaśca brahmānaṃdamupāyayau || 69 ||
lakṣaṇaścābhayaṃ śūraṃ devasiṃho mahīpatim ||
jitvā baddhvā ca muditau kāmasenassamāgataḥ || 3.3.26.70 ||
lakṣaṇaḥ kāmasenaṃ ca devo raṇajitaṃ tadā ||
baddhvā tatra sthitau vīrau śatrūsainyakṣayaṃkarau || 71 |
etasminnaṃtare brahmā baddhvā vai tālanaṃ balī ||
lakṣaṇāntamupāgamya dhanuryuddhamacīkarat || 72 ||
lakṣaṇaṃ chinnadhanvānaṃ punarbaddhvā mahābalaḥ ||
devasiṃhamupāgamya mūrchitaṃ taṃ cakāra ha || 73 ||
hāhābhūte yogisainye pradrute sarvato diśam ||
kṛṣṇāṃśo yoṣitassarvā vacanaṃ prāha namradhīḥ || 74 ||
brahmānando.ayamāyāto mama sainya kṣayaṃkaraḥ ||
tasmādyūyaṃ mayā sārddhaṃ gacchāśu ca taṃ prati || 75 ||
ityuktvā tāssamādāya brahmānandamupāyayau ||
tayoścāsīnmahadyuddhaṃ naranārāyaṇāṃ śayoḥ || 76 ||
kṛṣṇāṃśastatra balavānnabhomārgeṇa taṃ prati ||
rathasthaṃ ca samāgamya mohayāmāsa so.asinā || 77 ||
tadā tu mūrchite tasminmocayitvā ca tā mudā ||
yogī sainyānvito yuddhātpalāyanaparo.abhavat || 78 ||
parājite yogisainye brahmānaṃdo mahābalaḥ ||
yoṣitastāḥ samādāya svagehāya dadhau manaḥ || 79 ||
mahīrājastu saṃprāpto mahīpatyanumoditaḥ ||
rurodha sarvato nārīḥ śivadattavaro balī || 3.3.26.80 ||
nṛharaścābhayaṃ śūraṃ mardanaścaiva rūpaṇam ||
madanaṃ vai saradano brahmānaṃdaṃ ca tārakaḥ || 81 ||
cāmuṇḍaḥ kāmasenaṃ ca dhanuryuddhamacīkarat ||
tadābhayo mahāvīro dhunvaṃtaṃ nṛharaṃ ripum || 82 ||
chittvā dhanustamāgatya khaḍgayuddhamacīkarat ||
nṛharaḥ khaḍgarahito.abhavadyuddhaparāṅmukhaḥ ||
tamāha vacanaṃ kruddho.abhayo yuddhārthamudyataḥ || || 83 ||
bhavānvai mātṛṣvasrīyo mahīrājasya cātmajaḥ || 84 ||
kṣatriyāṇāṃ paraṃ dharmaṃ kathaṃ saṃhartumicchati ||
iti śrutvā tu nṛharo gṛhītvā parighaṃ ruṣā || 85 ||
jaghāna taṃ ca śirasi sa hataḥ svargamāyayau ||
sa ca vai kṛtavarmāṃśo vilīnaḥ kṛtavarmaṇi || 86 ||
madanaṃ gopajātaṃ ca hatvā saradano balī ||
jayaśabdaṃ cakāroccairpunarhatvā riporbalam ||
uttarāṃśaśca sa jñeyo madanaścottare layaḥ || 87 ||
rūpaṇaśca samāgatya mūrchayitvā ca mardanam ||
punassaradanaṃ prāpya khaḍgayuddhaṃ cakāra ha || 88 ||
brahmānaṃdaśca balavānsa baddhvā tārakaṃ ruṣā ||
mahīrājāntamāgamya dhanuryuddhaṃ cakāra ha || 89 ||
nṛharaṃ raṇajitprāpya svabhallena tadā ruṣā ||
jaghāna samaraślāghī mahīrājasutaṃ śubham ||3.3.26.90||
sa vai duśśāsanāṃśaśca mṛtastasminsamāgataḥ || 91 ||
nihate nṛhare baṃdhau mardanaḥ krodhatatparaḥ ||
svaśaraistāḍayāmāsa sātyakeraṃśamuttamam || 92 ||
chittvā tānraṇajicchūrassa vai parimalodbhavaḥ ||
svabhallena śiraḥ kāyānmardanasya sa cāharat || 93 ||
mṛte.asminmardane vīre tadā saradano balī ||
tāḍayāmāsa taṃ vīraṃ svabhallenaiva vakṣasi || 94 ||
mahatkaṣṭamupāgamya raṇajinmalanodbhavaḥ ||
svakhaṅgena śiraḥ kāyādapāharata vairiṇaḥ || 95 ||
tribaṃdhau nihate yuddhe tārakaḥ krodhamūrchitaḥ ||
rathasthaśca rathasthaṃ ca tāḍayāmāsa vai śaraiḥ || 96 ||
chittvā bāṇaṃ ca raṇajittathaiva ca riporddhanuḥ ||
triśaraistāḍayāmāsa karṇāṃśaṃ tārakaṃ hṛdi || 97 ||
amarṣavaśamāpanno yathā daṃḍairbhujaṃgamaḥ ||
dhyātvā ca śaṃkaraṃ devaṃ viṣadhautaṃ śaraṃ punaḥ || 98 ||
saṃdhāya tarjayitvā ca śatrukaṃṭhamatāḍayat ||
tena bāṇena raṇajittyaktvā dehaṃ divaṃ gataḥ || 99 ||
hate tasminmahāvīrye brahmānaṃdaśca duḥkhitaḥ ||
mahīrājabhayādbrahmā puraskṛsya ca yoṣitaḥ ||
saṃdhyākāle tu saṃprāpte bhādrakṛṣṇāṣṭamīdine || 3.3.26.100 ||
kapāṭaṃ sudṛḍhaṃ kṛtvā sainyaiḥ ṣaṣṭisahasrakaiḥ ||
sārddhaṃ gehamupāgamya śāradāṃ śaraṇaṃ yayau || 101 ||
mahīrājastu balavānputraśokena duḥkhitaḥ ||
saṃkalpaṃ kṛtavānghoraṃ śṛṇvatāṃ sarvabhūbhṛtām || 102 ||
śirīṣākhyapuraṃ ramyaṃ yathā śūnyaṃ mayā kṛtam ||
tathā mahāvatī sarvā brahmānaṃdādibhissaha ||
kṣayaṃ yāsyaṃti madbāṇaiḥ sarve te caṃdravaṃśinaḥ || 103 ||
ityuktvā dhuṃdhukāraṃ vai cāhvayāmāsa bhūpatiḥ ||
paṃcalakṣabalaissārddhaṃ śīghramāgamyatāṃ priya || 104 ||
iti śrutvā dhuṃdhukāro gatvā śīghraṃ ca dehalīm ||
uṣitvā sapta divasānyuddhabhūmimupāgamat || 105 ||
tadāṣṭalakṣasahito mahīrājo mahābalaḥ ||
tārakeṇa ca saṃyukto yuddhāya samupāyayau || 106 ||
iti śrībhaviṣye mahāpurāṇe pratisargaparvaṇi caturyuga khaṇḍāparaparyāye kaliyugīyetihāsasasamuccaye ṣaḍviṃśo.adhyāyaḥ || 26 || cha ||
|| sūta uvāca || ||
saptaviṃśābdake prāpte kṛṣṇāṃśe sarvamaṃgale ||
bhādrakṛṣṇadaśamyāṃ ca malanā śokakātarā ||
jananāyakamāhūya vacanaṃ prāha duḥkhitā || 1 ||
aye kacchapadeśīya gotamānvayasaṃbhava ||
harināgaramāruhya kānyakubjaṃ vrajādhunā || 2 ||
putramāhlādamāhūya sānujaṃ matpriyaṃkaram ||
iti śrutvā tu vacanaṃ hṛdi saṃciṃtya trai punaḥ || 3 ||
malanāṃ duḥkhitāṃ prāha na tvāyāsyati sa prabhuḥ ||
rājñaḥ parimalasyaiva vākyaṃ matvā suduḥkhadam || 4 ||
iti śrutvā tu vacanaṃ ruroda malanā satī ||
punarmūrcchāṃ gatā bhūmau jīvanaṃ tyaktumudyatā || 5 ||
hā rāmāṃśa mahābāho vatsa kṛṣṇāṃśa sundara ||
kva gatau saha devakyā tyaktvā māṃ maṃdabhāginīm ||6||
tadā parimalāputro dṛṣṭvā rājñīṃ tathā gatām ||
bahudhāśvāsya balavānkānyakubjapuraṃ yayau || 7 ||
|| ṛṣaya ūcuḥ || ||
tvayā parimalāputrassaṃprokto jananāyakaḥ ||
romaharṣaṇa no brūhi so.ayaṃ kastena kiṃ kṛtam || 8 ||
|| sūta uvāca || ||
iṃdraprasthapurevātsītpradyotaḥ kathito mayā ||
pitā parimalasyaivāmātyo.anaṃgamahīpateḥ || 9 ||
tasya kanyā samājātā nāmnā parimalā mune ||
duḥśalāṃśasamudbhūtā raṃbheva sukumārikā || 3.3.27.10 ||
tadvivāhārthamudyogaḥ kṛtaḥ pitrā svayaṃvaraḥ ||
putraḥ kacchapabhūpasya sa nāmnā kamalāpatiḥ ||
tāmudvāhma vidhānena svagehāya yayau mudā|| 11 ||
tayossamāgamo jātaḥ putro.ayaṃ jananāyakaḥ ||
śatruvidyāparaḥ śūraḥ khaḍgayuddhaviśāradaḥ ||12||
jitvā bhūpānbalādvīraḥ siṃdhutīralanivāsinaḥ ||
ṣaḍaṃśakaramādāya pitṛrājyamupasthitaḥ ||13||
ekadā tu mahīrājaḥ svasainyaparivāritaḥ ||
kacchadeśamupāgamya karārthaṃ samupasthitaḥ ||14||
tayoścāsīnmahadyuddhaṃ jananāyakabhūpayoḥ||
māsānte sūryavaṃśīyo mahīrājena nirjitaḥ || 15 ||
tyaktvā rāṣṭraṃ ca sakulaḥ saṃprāptaśca mahāvatīm ||
parimalastu tadā rājā tasmai grāmaṃ śubhaṃ dadau || 16 ||
nivāsaṃ kṛtavāṃstatra svanāmnā prathitaṃ bhuvi ||
sa vai kacchapadeśīyo yayau parimalājñayā|| 17 ||
tadāsau ca mahīrājo mahīpatyanumoditaḥ ||
cāmuṃḍaṃ śīghramāhūya lakṣasainyasamanvitam ||
ādeśaṃ kṛtavānrājā tasya baṃdhanahetave || 18 ||
sa ca netravatīkūle saṃprāpte lakṣa sainyapaḥ ||
rurodha sūryavaṃśīyaṃ jananāyakamuttamam ||19||
sa tadā khaḍgamādāya bāhuśālī yateṃdriyaḥ ||
tatra śūraśataṃ hatvā nabhomārgamupāyayau ||3.3.27.20||
senāpateśca mukuṭaṃ gajasthasya gṛhītavān ||
lajjitaḥ sa tu cāmuṃḍo vacanaṃ prāha namradhīḥ ||21||
bhavānvṛttikaro mahyaṃ kṣatriyo brāhmaṇasya vai ||
dehi me mukuṭaṃ vīra ciraṃ jīva sukhī bhava||22||
iti śrutvā sa vinayaṃ dattvā tasmai śubhaṃ vasu ||
kuṭhāranagare prāpto vāmanena surakṣitaḥ ||23||
dṛṣṭvā tatra vaṭacchāyāṃ śrameṇātīva karṣitaḥ||
suṣvāpa nirbhayo vīrastatra sthāne sukhaprade || 24 ||
tadā tu vāmano jñātvā svadūtaistatra kāraṇam ||
vastrāṇyācchādya cāgamya cāharaddharināgaram || 25 ||
hṛte tasmiṃśca divyāśve prabuddho jananāyakaḥ ||
ciṃtāmavāpya mahatīṃ rodanaṃ kṛtavānbahu || 26 ||
aśvāṃghricihnamālokya vāmanaṃ prāpya nirbhayaḥ ||
vacanaṃ prāha namrātmā nṛpaṃ gaurānvayodbhavam || 27 ||
kṣatriyāṇāṃ hi saṃhāsyo bhayado bhuvi sarvadā ||
sa bhavānrājanītijño dehi me.aśvaṃ sukhī bhava ||28||
no cettvāṃ vai sanagaraṃ kṛṣṇāṃśaḥ kṣapayiṣyati ||
iti śrutvā tu vacanaṃ vāmano gauravaṃśajaḥ||29||
bhayabhīto viniścitya pradadau harināgaram || 3.3.27.30 ||
pratodaṃ svarṇaracitaṃ nānāratnasamanvitam ||
lobhācca na dadau rājā mṛṣā śapathakārakaḥ ||31 ||
tadā parimalāputraḥ kuṃṭhitaḥ prāha bhūpatim ||
pratodalobhātte rājankṣayaṃ durgo gamiṣyati || 32 ||
ityuktvā prayayau vīraḥ kānyakubjaṃ mahottamam||
lakṣaṇo hastinīsaṃstho vacanaṃ prāha garvitaḥ ||
kastvaṃ prāpto hayārūḍho nirbhayaḥ kṣatriyottamaḥ || 33 ||
sa hovāca mahārāja preṣitaścaṃdravaṃśinā ||
tavāntikaṃ samāyātaḥ śaraṇāgatavatsala || 34 ||
mahīrājaśca balavānsakulaṃ caṃdravaṃśinam ||
haniṣyati ca raudrāstrairmahīpatyanumoditaḥ || 35 || |
atastvaṃ svabalaissārddhaṃ sahāhlādādibhiryutaḥ ||
gacchagaccha mahārāja mṛtānujīvayādhunā || 36 ||
ityukto lakṣaṇastena jayacaṃdraṃ praṇamya saḥ ||
sarvaṃ vai kathayāmāsa mahīrājo yathāgataḥ || 37||
jayacaṃdrastu tacchrutvā cāhūya jananāyakam ||
vacanaṃ prāha kruddhātmā śṛṇu gautamavaṃśaja || 38 ||
rājā parimalaḥ krūrastyaktvā māṃ nijabhūpatim ||
prītiṃ ca kṛtavāṃstena macchatrordehalīpateḥ || 39 ||
priyaṃ saṃbadhinaṃ matvā saṃtyaktāstena rakṣakāḥ ||
yathā kṛtaṃ phalaṃ tena bhoktavyaṃ ca tathā bhuvi || 3.3.27.40 ||
iti śrutvā tu vacanaṃ kṛṣṇāṃśaḥ prāha namradhīḥ ||
rājañchuddhaḥ parimalo mahīpatyanuvācakaḥ ||
ato vai tvāṃ samutsṛjya bhūmirājavaśaṃ gataḥ ||41||
bhavānvai sarvadharmajñastatkṣamasvāparādhakam ||
ājñāṃ dehi mahārāja nivatsyāmastadaṃtikam|| 42 ||
iti śrutvā tu vacanaṃ jayacaṃdro mahīpatiḥ ||
kṛṣṇāṃśaṃ prāha bho vīra dehi me bhuktimūlyakam ||
śīghraṃ vraja tvaṃ sakulo no cenno gaṃtumarhasi || 43 ||
iti śrutvā vihasyāha kṛṣṇāṃśassarvamohanaḥ ||
mayā digvijayaḥ sarvaḥ kṛto bhīrubhayaṃkaraḥ ||
taddeyaṃ dehi me rājangṛhāṇa bhuktimūlyakam||44||
ityuktassa tu bhūpālaḥ kṛṣṇāṃśena vilajjitaḥ ||
sainyamājñāpayāmāsa saptalakṣaṃ mahābalam || 45 ||
tadā vai sakulo vīraścāhlādo lakṣaṇānvitaḥ ||
nṛpasyāgre samāsthāya namaskṛtya yayau mudā || 46 ||
kuṭhāranagaraṃ prāpya nṛpadurgaṃ rurodha ha ||
jñātvā sa vāmano bhūpaḥ pratodaṃ ca dadau mudā || 47 ||
sainyāyuta yutaṃ bhūpaṃ vāmanaṃ lakṣaṇo balī ||
paścātkṛtya yayau śīghraṃ yamunātaṭamuttamam || 48 ||
yamunājalamuttīrya kalpakṣetramavāptavān||
gaṃgāsiṃhaṃ ca nṛpatiṃ ṣaṣṭisāhasrasaṃyutam ||
puraskṛtya yayau vīro lakṣaṇo balavattaraḥ || 49 ||
nadīṃ vetravatīṃ ramyāṃ samāgamya balaissaha ||
tatroṣuḥ kṣatriyāḥ śūrāssarva śastrāstrasaṃyutāḥ || 3.3.27.50 ||
etasminnaṃtare vīraścāmuṃḍo lakṣasainyapaḥ ||
śataghnīḥ sthāpayāmāsa bhairavīḥ śatrunāśinīḥ || 51 ||
tayoścāsīnmahadyuddhaṃ śataghrīraṇasaṃsthayoḥ ||
praharānte ca tatsainyaṃ dṛṣṭvā śūraḥ parājitam || 52 ||
raktabījaḥ samāgamya gajasthastvarito balī||
svabāṇaistāḍayāmāsa sainyaṃ tālanapālitam || 53 ||
kecicchūrā hatā yuddhe kecittatra parājitāḥ ||
dudruvurbhayabhītāśca cāmuṃḍena ca pīḍitāḥ || 54 ||
prabhagnaṃ svabalaṃ dṛṣṭvā tālanaḥ parighāyudhaḥ ||
jaghāna tena sa gajaṃ cāmuṃḍo bhūmimāgataḥ 55 ||
khaḍgayuddhaparo vīrastālanaṃ pīraghāyudham||
parājitya yayau paścācchatru sainyakṣayaṃkaraḥ ||56||
lakṣaṇastvarito gatvā svabhallena ca taṃ ripum ||
bhujayostāḍayāmāsa tadā te bahudhā.abhavan|| 57 ||
sahasraṃ raktabījāśca khaḍga śaktyṛṣṭipāṇayaḥ ||
tiṣṭhatiṣṭheti bhāṣantaḥ kṣatriyānyuddhadurmadān || 58 ||
āhlādādyāśca te śūrā raktabījabhayāturāḥ ||
tyaktvā yuddhaṃ yayussarve brahmānaṃdaṃ mahābalam || 59 ||
brahmānaṃdastu tāndṛṣṭvā gatvā svapitaraṃ prati ||
vṛttāṃtaṃ kathayāmāsa lakṣaṇāgamanaṃ mune || 3.3.27.60 ||
śrutvā parimalo rājā premavihvalagadgadaḥ ||
āhlādapārśvamāgamya ruroda bhṛśamāturaḥ || 61 ||
tadā tu devakī devī nṛpatiṃ prematatparam ||
uvāca sumukhī dīnā vayaṃ te bhakti tatparāḥ || 62 ||
bhavatā saṃparityaktā vicarāmo.anyabhūpatim ||
kṣamasva mama daurātmyaṃ pūrvajanmavipākajam|| 63 ||
iti śrutvā ca nṛpatiḥ paramā naṃdanirbharaḥ ||
maṃtriṇaścādhikāraṃ ca rāmāṃśāya dadau mudā ||
svakīyaṃ lakṣasainyaṃ ca tatpatiścodayaḥ kṛtaḥ || 64 ||
tataḥ paṃcadinānte tu mahīrājassamāgataḥ ||
rurodha nagarīṃ sarvāṃ cāmuṃḍabaladarpitaḥ ||
tayoścāsīnmahayuddhaṃ māsamātraṃ bhayānakam ||65||
prabhāte vimale jāte kṛṣṇāṃśo lakṣasainyapaḥ||
cāmuḍāntamupāgamya sahasraṃ svāṃgasaṃbhavam ||
ciccheda ca śirasteṣāṃ cāmuṃḍānāṃ pṛthakpṛthak || 66 ||
chinne śirasi te sarve lakṣavīrā babhūvire ||
tadā tadvyākulaṃ sainyaṃ cāmuṇḍaistaiḥ prapīḍitam ||67||
vismitaścaiva kṛṣṇāṃśo bhayabhītastadā mune ||
tuṣṭāva śāradāṃ devīṃ sarvamaṃgalakāriṇīm || 68 ||
kṛṣṇāṃśa uvāca||
namaste śārade mātarbrahmalokanivāsini||
tvayā tatamidaṃ viśvaṃ śabdamātraniraṃtaram||69||
raktabījavināśāya cāmuṃḍārūpadhāriṇi||
namaste divyacāmuṇḍe pāhi māṃ śaraṇāgatam||3.3.27.70||
iti śrutvā stavaṃ devī varadā sarvakāriṇī||
tasya khaḍgamupāgamya raktabījaṃ dadāha vai|| 71||
bhasmībhūte lakṣaripau cāmuṇḍo bhūmimāgataḥ||
babaṃdha taṃ sa kṛṣṇāṃśo brahmānaṃdāṃtikaṃ yayau||
bhūmirājastu tacchrutvā bhayabhītaḥ samāgataḥ||
tadā parimalaṃ bhūpaṃ dayāluṃ premavihvalam ||
uvāca vacanaṃ rājā kṣamasva mama duṣkṛtam || 73 ||
mahīpateśca vacanānmahadbhayamupāgatam ||
adyaprabhṛti bho vīra saṃtyaktaḥ kalahaḥ priyaḥ ||
bhavāṃśca mama saṃbandhī vayaṃ vai tava kiṃkarāḥ ||74 ||
iti śrutvā parimalo rājānamidamabravīt ||
ratnabhānośca tanayaṃ lakṣaṇaṃ nāma viśrutam ||
śaraṇyaṃ śaraṇaṃ yāhi viṣṇubhaktaṃ dayāparam || 75 ||
iti śrutvā bhūmirājo dvijarūpadharo balī||
sāṣṭāṃgaṃ daṃḍavadbhūmau lakṣaṇasya cakāra ha || 76 ||
tadā tu lakṣaṇo vīraḥ kṛtvā snehaṃ nṛpopari ||
saptalakṣabalaiḥ sārddhaṃ kānyakujjamupāyayau || 77 ||
phālgune māsi saṃprāpte sarve svaṃsvaṃ gṛhaṃ yayuḥ || 78 || balakhānergayāśrāddhamacīkaradaviplutaḥ ||
caitramāsi site pakṣe saṃprāpya nijamaṃdire ||
brāhmaṇānbhojayāmāsa sahasraṃ vedatatparān || 79 ||
iti śrībhaviṣye mahāpurāṇe pratisargaparvaṇi caturyugakhaṇḍāparaparyāye kaliyugīyetihāsasamuccaye sapta viṃśo.adhyāyaḥ || 27 || || a ||
|| sūta uvāca || ||
aṣṭāviṃśābdake prāpte kṛṣṇāṃśe balavattare ||
kārtikyāmiṃduvāre ca kṛttikāvyatipātabhe||1||
kṛṣṇāṃśo.ayutasenāḍhyaḥ svarṇavatyā samanvitaḥ||
vivāhamukuṭasyaiva saṃtyāgāya yayau mudā||2||
pavitramutpalāraṇyaṃ vālmīkimunisevitam||
gaṃgākūle brahmamayaṃ lohakīlakamuttamam||3||
tatra gatvā sa śuddhātmā puṣpavatyā samanvitaḥ||
gosahasraṃ ca viprebhyo dadau snāne prasannadhīḥ|| || 4 ||
etasminnaṃtare prāptā mlecchajātisamudbhavā ||
śobhā nāma mahāramyā veśyā paramasundarī|| 5 ||
sā dadarśa paraṃ ramyaṃ kṛṣṇāśaṃ puruṣottamam||
taddṛṣṭimohamāpannā vyākulā cābhavatkṣaṇāt || 6 ||
mūrcchitāṃ tāṃ samālokya kṛṣṇāṃśaḥ sarvamohanaḥ ||
svanivāsamupāgamya viprānāhūya pṛṣṭavān || 7 ||
aṣṭādaśa purāṇāni kena proktāni kiṃ phalam ||
brūta me viduṣāṃ śreṣṭhā vedaśāstraparāyaṇāḥ || 8 ||
iti śrutvā vaco ramyaṃ vidvāṃsaḥ śāstrakovidāḥ ||
abruvanvacanaṃ ramyaṃ kṛṣṇāṃśaṃ sarvadharmagam || 9 ||
parāśareṇa racitaṃ purāṇaṃ viṣṇudaivatam ||
śivena racitaṃ skāṃdaṃ pādmaṃ brahmamukhodbhavam || 3.3.28.10 ||
śukaproktaṃ bhāgavataṃ brāhmaṃ vai brahmaṇā kṛtam ||
gāruḍaṃ hariṇā proktaṃ ṣaḍ vai sāttvikasaṃbhavāḥ || 11 ||
matsyaḥ kūrmo nṛsiṃhaśca vāmanaḥ śiva eva ca ||
vāyuretatpurāṇāni vyāsena racitāni vai || 12 ||
rājasāḥ ṣaṭ smṛtā vīra karmakāṃḍamayā bhuvi ||
mārkaṃṇḍeyaṃ ca vārāhaṃ mārkaṇḍeyena nirmitam || 13 ||
āgneyamaṃgirāścaiva janayāmāsa cottamam ||
liṃgabrahmāṃḍake cāpi taṃḍinā racite śubhe ||
mahādevena lokārthe bhaviṣyaṃ racitaṃ śubham || 14 ||
tāmasāḥ ṣaṭ smṛtāḥ prājñaiḥ śaktidharmaparāyaṇāḥ ||
sarveṣāṃ ca purāṇānāṃ śreṣṭhaṃ bhāgavataṃ smṛtam || 15 ||
ghore bhuvi kalau prāpte vikramo nāma bhūpatiḥ ||
kailāsādbhuvamāgatya munīnsarvānsamāhvayat || 16 ||
tadā te munayassarve naimiṣāraṇyavāsinaḥ ||
sūtaṃ sañcodayāmāsusteṣāṃ tacchravaṇāya ca ||
proktānyupapurāṇāni sūtenāṣṭādaśaiva ca || 17 ||
iti śrutvā tu vacanaṃ kṛṣṇāṃśo dharmatatparaḥ ||
śrutvā bhāgavataṃ śāstraṃ saptame.ahni mahottamam || 18 ||
dadau dānāni viprebhyo gosuvarṇamayāni ca ||
brāhmaṇānbhojayāmāsa sahasraṃ vedatatparān ||19||
tadā tu bhikṣukī bhūtvā śobhā nāma madāturā ||
māyāṃ kṛtavatī prāpya kṛṣṇāṃśo yatra vai sthitaḥ || 3.3.28.20 ||
dhyātvā mahāmadaṃ vīraṃ paiśācaṃ rudrakiṃkaram ||
māyāṃ sā janayāmāsa sarvapāṣāṇakāriṇīm || 21 ||
dṛṣṭvā svarṇavatī devī tāṃ māyāṃ śobhayodbhavām ||
chittvā cāhlādya vāmāṃgīṃ svagehaṃ gaṃtumudyatā 22 ||
sā veśyā tu śucāviṣṭā tasyāḥ śṛṃgāramuttamam ||
svarṇayaṃtrasthitaṃ ramyaṃ lakṣadravyopamūlyakam ||
saṃhṛtya māyayā dhūrtā deśaṃ vāhlīkamāyayau || 23 ||
kalpakṣetramupāgamya netrasiṃhasamudbhavā ||
veśyayā mama śṛṃgāraṃ hṛtaṃ jñātvā suduḥkhitā || 24 ||
kṛṣṇāṃśaṃ vacanaṃ prāha gacchagaccha mahābala ||
gṛhītvā mama śṛṃgāraṃ śīghramāgaccha māṃ prati || 25 ||
guṭikeyaṃ mayā vīra racitā tāṃ mukhena ca ||
dhūrtamāyāvināśāya tava maṃgalahetave || 26 ||
iti śrutvā tathā kṛtvā kṛṣṇāṃśassarvamohanaḥ ||
śūkarakṣetramāgamya tatra veśyāṃ dadarśa ha || 27 ||
sā tu veśyā ca taṃ vīraṃ dṛṣṭvā kandarpakāriṇam ||
racayitvā punarmāyāṃ tadaṃtikamupāgatā || 28 ||
tadā sā niṣphalībhūya ruroda karuṇaṃ bahu ||
rudatīṃ tāṃ samālokya dayālussa prasannadhīḥ || 29 ||
gṛhītvā sarvaśṛṃgāraṃ vacanaṃ prāha nirbhayaḥ ||
kiṃ rodiṣi mahābhāge satyaṃ kathaya mā ciram || 3.3.28.30 ||
sāha me saharo nāma bhrātā prāṇasamapriyaḥ ||
nāṭyaiśca pañcasāhasraiḥ sahito maraṇaṃ gataḥ ||31||
ato raumi mahābhāga saṃprāptā śaraṇaṃ tvayi ||
ityuktvā māyayā dhūrtā kṛtvā śavamayāntyajān || 32 ||
tasmai pradarśayāmāsa nijakāryaparāyaṇā ||
ruditvā ca punastatra prāṇāṃstyaktuṃ samudyatā || 33 ||
dayālussa ca kṛṣṇāṃśastāmāha karuṇaṃ vacaḥ ||
kathaṃ te jīvayiṣyanti śobhane kathayāśu me || 34 ||
sāha vīra tavāsye tu saṃsthitā guṭikā śubhā ||
dehi me kṛpayā vīra jīvayiṣyanti te tathā || 35 ||
ityuktastu tayā vīro dadau tasyai ca tadvasu||
tadā prasannā sā dhūrtā kṛtvā śukamayaṃ vapuḥ ||
paṃjarasthamupādāya kṛṣṇāṃśaṃ kāmavihvalā || 36 ||
bāhlīkadeśamāgamya sāraṭṭanagaraṃ śubham ||
uvāsa ca svayaṃ gehe kṛtvā divyamayaṃ vapuḥ || 37 ||
niśīthe samanuprāpte kṛtvā taṃ nararūpiṇam ||
āliliṃga hi kāmārtā kṛṣṇāṃśaṃ dharmakovidam || 38 ||
dṛṣṭvā tāṃ sa tathābhūtāṃ kṛṣṇāṃśo jagadaṃbikām ||
tuṣṭāva manasā dhīro rātrisūktena namradhīḥ ||39||
tadā sā sveḍinī bhūtvā tyaktvā kṛṣṇāṃśamuttamam ||
punaḥ śukamayaṃ kṛtvā ciṃciṇīvṛkṣamāruhat || 3.3.28.40 ||
tadā svarṇavatī devī bodhitā viṣṇumāyayā ||
kṛtvā śyenīmayaṃ rūpaṃ tatra gatvā mudānvitā ||
dadarśa śukabhūtaṃ ca kṛṣṇāṃśaṃ yogatatparam 41 ||
etasminnaṃtare veśyā punaḥ kṛtvā śubhaṃ vapuḥ ||
narabhūtaṃ ca kṛṣṇāṃśaṃ vacanaṃ prāha namradhīḥ || 42 ||
aye prāṇapriya svāminbhaja māṃ kāmavihvalām ||
pāhi māṃ ratidānena dharmajñosi bhavānsadā || 43 ||
ityuktassa tu tāmāha vacanaṃ śṛṇu śobhane ||
te āryavartmasthitohaṃ vai vedamārgaparāyaṇaḥ || 44 ||
vivāhitāṃ śubhāṃ nārīṃ yo bhajeta ṛtau na hi ||
sa pāpī narakaṃ yāti tiryyagyonimayaṃ smṛtam ||
ataḥ parastriyā bhogo jñeyo vai nirayapradaḥ || 45 ||
iti śrutvā tu sā prāha viśvāmitreṇa dhīmatā ||
śṛṃgiṇā ca mahāprājña veśyāsaṃgaḥ kṛtaḥ purā ||
na ko.api narakaṃ prāptastasmānmāṃ bhaja kāminīm || 46 ||
punaścāha sa kṛṣṇāṃśaḥ kṛttaṃ pāpaṃ tapobalāt ||
tābhyāṃ ca muniyugmābhyāmasamartho hi sāṃpratam || 47 ||
arddhāṃgaṃ puruṣasya strī maithune ca viśeṣataḥ ||
ahamāryaśca bhavatī veśyā ca bahubhoginī || 48 ||
ṛci śabdaśca pūrvāsyājjāta ṛgjassanātanaḥ ||
yogajaścaiva yaḥ śabdo dakṣiṇāsyādyajurbhavaḥ ||49||
taddhitāntaśca yaśśabdaḥ paścimāsyācca sāmajaḥ ||
chandobhūtāśca ye śabdās te sarve brāhmaṇapriyāḥ ||
kevalo varṇamātraśca sa śabdo.atharvajaḥ smṛtaḥ || 3.3.28.50 ||
pañcamāsyācca ye jātāḥ śabdāḥ saṃsārakāriṇaḥ ||
te sarve prākṛtā jñeyāścaturlakṣavibhedinaḥ || 51 ||
hitvā tānyo hi śuddhātmā caturvedaparāyaṇaḥ ||
sa vai bhavāṭavīṃ tyaktvā padaṃ gacchatyanāmayam || 52 ||
na vadedyāvanīṃ bhāṣāṃ prāṇaiḥ kaṃṭhagatairapi ||
gajairāpīḍayamāno.api na gacchejjainamaṃdiram || 53 ||
ityevaṃ smṛtivākyāni muninā paṭhitāni vai ||
kathaṃ tyājyo mayā dharmassarvalokasukhapradaḥ || 54 ||
iti śrutvā tu sā veśyā mlecchāyāścāṃśasaṃbhavā ||
śobhanā nāma raṃbhorūrmahākrodhamupāyayau || 55 ||
vetasaistāḍayitvā taṃ punaḥ kṛtvā śukaṃ svayam ||
na dadau bhojanaṃ tasmai phalāhāraṃ śukāya vai || 56 ||
tadā svarṇavatī devī kṛtvā nārīmayaṃ vapuḥ ||
maśakīkṛtya taṃ vīraṃ tatraivāntardadhe tu sā || 57 ||
punaḥ śyenīvapuḥ kṛtvā taddeśādyātumudyatā ||
pṛṣṭhamāropya maśakaṃ mayūranagaraṃ yayau || 58 |
makaraṃdastu tāṃ dṛṣṭvā kṛṣṇāṃśena samanvitām ||
netrapālasya tanayāṃ nāmnā svarṇavatī balī ||
caraṇāvupasaṃgṛhya svagehe tāmavāsayat || 59 ||
śobhanāpi ca saṃbudhya pañjarāntamupasthitā ||
na dadarśa śukaṃ ramyaṃ mūrchitā cāpatadbhuvi || 3.3.28.60 ||
kiṃ karomi kva gacchāmi vinā taṃ ramaṇaṃ param ||
ityeva bahudhālapya madahīnapuraṃ yayau || 61 ||
tatra sthitaṃ ca paiśācaṃ māyāmadaviśāradam ||
mahāmadaṃ ca saṃpūjya svadehaṃ tyaktumudyatā || 62 ||
mahāmadastu saṃtuṣṭo gatvā vai śivamaṃdiram ||
marusthaleśvaraṃ liṃgaṃ tuṣṭāvārṣabhabhāṣayā || 63 ||
tadā prasanno bhagavānvacanaṃ prāha sevakam ||
svarṇavatyā hṛto vīraḥ kṛṣṇāṃśaścāryadharmagaḥ ||
mayā saha samāgaccha mayūranagaraṃ prati || 64 ||
ityuktastena paiśāco naṭaiḥ paṃcasahasrakaiḥ ||
tayā saha yayau tūrṇaṃ sahureṇaṃ samanvitaḥ || 65 ||
indulaśca tathāhlādo bodhito viṣṇumāyayā ||
trilakṣabalasaṃyukto devasiṃhena saṃyutaḥ ||
mayūranagaraṃ prāpya makaraṃdamupāyayau ||66||
tadā tu śobhanā veśyā sahureṇa balaissaha ||
cakāra bhairavīṃ māyāṃ sarvaśatrubhayaṃkarīm ||67||
sarvataścotthito vāto mahāmeghasamanvitaḥ||
pataṃti bahudhā colkāḥ śarkarāvarṣaṇe ratāḥ || 68
dṛṣṭvā tāṃ bhairavīṃ māyāṃ tamobhūtāṃ samantataḥ ||
makarandaśca balavānrathasthaḥ svayamāyayau || 69 ||
śanibhallena tāṃ māyāṃ bhasma kṛtvā mahābalaḥ ||
gṛhītvā sahuraṃ dhūrtaṃ sabalaṃ gehamāptavān || 3.3.28.70 ||
tadā tu śobhanā nārī kāmamāyāṃ cakāra ha ||
bahulāssaṃsthitā veśyā gītanṛtyaviśāradāḥ || 71 ||
mohitāḥ kṣatriyāḥ sarve mumuhurlāsyadarśanāt ||
devasiṃhācca kṛṣṇāṃśādṛte te jaḍatāṃ gatāḥ || ||72||
tadā svarṇavatī devī kāmākṣī dhyānatatparā ||
punarutthāpya tānsarvāngṛhītvā śobhanāṃ punaḥ ||
mayūradhvajamāgamya nigaḍaistānbabaṃdha ha||73||
mahāmadastu tajjñātvā rudradhyānaparāyaṇaḥ ||
cakāra śāmbarīṃ māyāṃ nānāsattvavidhāyinīm ||74||
vyāghrāḥ siṃhā varāhāśca vānarā daṃśakā narāḥ ||
sarpā gṛdhrāstathā kākā bhakṣayaṃti samaṃtataḥ || 75 ||
tadā svarṇavatī devī kāmākṣīdhyānatatparā ||
sasarja smarajāṃ māyāṃ tanmāyādhvaṃsinīṃ raṇe || ||76||
tayā tārkṣyāssamutpannāḥ śarabhāśca mahābalāḥ ||
siṃhādīnbhakṣayāmāsurjaghnuścaiva sahasraśaḥ ||77||
hāhābhūte ca tatsainye dikṣu vidrāvite sati ||
śobhanā cābhavaddāsī svarṇavatyāśca māyinī || 78||
sahurastairnaṭaissārddhaṃ cāhlādenaiva cūrṇitaḥ ||
teṣāṃ rudhirakabhāśca? bhūmimadhye samāruhan || 79 ||
evaṃ ca muniśārdūla caturmāssvabhavadraṇaḥ ||
vaiśākhe māsi saṃprāpte te vīrā gehamāyayuḥ ||
iti te kathitaṃ vipra cānyatkiṃ śrotumicchasi || 3.3.28.80 ||
iti śrībhaviṣye mahāpurāṇe pratisargaparvaṇi caturyugakhaṃḍāparaparyāye kaliyugīyetihāsasamuccaye.aṣṭāviṃśo.adhyāyaḥ || 28 |||6|||
|| ṛṣaya ūcuḥ || ||
kinnarī nāma yā kanyā tvayā proktā mahāmune ||
kutra sthāne kathaṃ jātā tatsarvaṃ kṛpayā vada || 1 ||
|| sūta uvāca || ||
purā caitrarathe deśe nānājananiṣevite ||
vasaṃtasamaye prāpte krīḍaṃtyatra divaukasaḥ || 2 ||
maṃjughoṣā ca svarveśyā śukasthāne samāgatā ||
dṛṣṭvā taṃ sundaraṃ bālaṃ mohanāya samudyatā || 3 ||
gītanṛtyādirāgāṃśca kṛtvā sā kāmavihvalā ||
prāṃjaliṃ praṇatā baddhvā punastuṣṭāva taṃ munim ||4||
tadā śukastu bhagavānpadyaṃ stuti mayaṃ śubham ||
śrutvā prasannahṛdayo varaṃ brūhīti so.abravīt || 5 ||
sā tu śrutvā śubhaṃ vākyaṃ provāca ślakṣṇayā girā ||
patirme bhava he nātha śaraṇāgatavatsala || 6 ||
iti śrutvā tu vacanaṃ tathā kṛtvā tayā saha ||
sa reme muniśārdūlaḥ śuko vijñānakovidaḥ || 7 ||
tayossakāśātsaṃjajñe munirnāma suto.anayoḥ ||
tapaścakāra balavāndvādaśābdaṃ prayatnataḥ || 8 ||
tasmai dadau tadā patnīṃ svarṇadevasya vai sutām ||
kubero rudrasahitaḥ sa munistu mudānvitaḥ || 9 ||
tayā reme prasannātmā tayorjātā sutottamā ||
kinnarī nāma vikhyātā himatuṃge samudbhavā ||
tapaścacāra sā devī rūpayauvana śālinī || 3.3.29.10 ||
tadā prasanno bhagavāñchaṃkaro lokaśaṃkaraḥ ||
makaraṃdāya dhīrāya dadau tāṃ rucirānanām || 11 ||
munistu śaṃkaraṃ prāha devadeva namo.astu te ||
matsutāyai varaṃ dehi rāṣṭravardhanamuttamam || 12 ||
iti śrutvā śivaḥ prāha guruṃḍānte ca bhūtale ||
madhyadeśe ca te rāṣṭraṃ bhaviṣyati sukhapradam ||
triṃśadabdapramāṇena tatpaścātkṣayameṣyati || 13 ||
iti śrutvā tu sa munirhimatuṃganivāsakaḥ ||
makaraṃdena sahitastatra vāsamakārayat||14||
iti te kathitaṃ vipra punaḥ śṛṇu kathāṃ śubhām ||
ūnatriṃśābdakaṃ prāpte kṛṣṇāṃśe raṇakāraṇam || 15 ||
netrapālasya nagaraṃ nānādhātuvicitritam ||
matvā nyūnapatirbauddho rurodha nagaraṃ śubham || 16 ||
saptalakṣayuto rājā bauddhasiṃho mahābalaḥ ||
trilakṣabalasaṃyuktaissārddhaṃ yuddhamacīkarat || 17 ||
saptāhorātramabhavatsenāyuddhaṃ bhayānakam ||
yogasiṃho bhogasiṃho vijayaśca mahābalaḥ || 18 ||
jaghāna śātravīṃ senāṃ bauddhasiṃhena pālitām ||
etasminnaṃtare prāptāḥ śyāmajāpakadeśagāḥ || 19 ||
bauddhā māyāvinassarve lokamānyaprapūjakāḥ ||
punarjātaṃ mahadyuddhaṃ māsamekaṃ tayostadā || 3.3.29.20 ||
netrapālājñayā sarve kṛṣṇāṃśādyāḥ samāgatāḥ ||
kṛṣṇāṃśo biṃdulārūḍho devaḥ svahayasaṃsthitaḥ ||21||
iṃdulaśca karālāśve maṃḍalīko gaje sthitaḥ ||
gautamaśca samāyāto harināgarasaṃsthitaḥ ||22||
tālanaśca samāyātaḥ siṃhinyupari saṃsthitaḥ ||
dhānyapālastailyakāro yuyutsoraṃśasaṃbhavaḥ ||23||
lallasiṃhaśca balavānkuṃtibhojāṃśasaṃbhavaḥ ||
tāmbūlīyakajātīyo lakṣaṇānujñayā yayau || 24 ||
tadā tu netrasiṃhaśca saptalakṣabalairvṛtaḥ ||
pālitaścāṣṭabhirvīraisteṣāṃ nāśāya cāyayau || 25 ||
bhayabhītāśca te bauddhāstyaktvā deśaṃ samantataḥ ||
cīnadeśamupāgamya yuddhabhūmimakārayan || 26 ||
tadanuprayayuste vai hūhānadamupasthitāḥ ||
māghamāse tu saṃprāpte punaryuddhamavartata || 27 ||
śyāmadeśodbhavā lakṣaṃ tathā lakṣaṃ ca jāpakāḥ ||
daśa lakṣāścīnadeśyā yuddhāya samupasthitāḥ || 28 ||
kṛṣṇāṃśo lakṣasenāḍhyo devo lakṣasamanvitaḥ ||
netrapālaśca lakṣāḍhayo yogabhogasamanvitaḥ || 29 ||
maṃḍalīkaścendulena lakṣasainyasamanvitaḥ ||
dhyānapālo lallasiṃho lakṣasainyānvitaḥ sthitaḥ || 3.3.29.30 ||
jananāyaka evāpi lakṣasainyayutaḥ sthitaḥ ||
tālano lakṣasenāḍhyo yuddhāya samupāgataḥ || 31 ||
tatra yuddhamabhūdghoraṃ bauddhānāmāryakaissaha ||
pakṣamātraṃ muniśreṣṭha yamalokavivarddhanam || 32 ||
sapta lakṣaṃ hatā bauddhā dvilakṣaṃ cāryadeśajāḥ ||
tataste bhayabhītāśca tyaktvā yuddhaṃ gṛhaṃ yayuḥ || 33 ||
kṛtvā dārumayīṃ senāṃ kalayaṃtraprabhāvataḥ ||
gajāśca daśasāhasrā saśūrāḥ kāṣṭhanirmitāḥ || 34 ||
ekalakṣaṃ hayārūḍhā dārupāśca raṇonmukhāḥ ||
sahasraṃ mahiṣārūḍhāssahasraṃ kolapṛṣṭhagāḥ|| 35 ||
siṃhārūḍhāssahasraṃ ca sahasraṃ haṃsavāhanāḥ||
kaṃkagomāyugṛdhrāṇāṃ śyāmārūḍhāḥ pṛthaktathā || 36 ||
uṣṭrāḥ saptasahasrāṇi saśūrāśca raṇonmukhāḥ ||
evaṃ sapādalakṣaiśca kāṣṭhasainyaiśca mānuṣāḥ || 37 ||
dvilakṣāṇi kṣayaṃ jagmuḥ kṛṣṇāṃśādyaiḥ surakṣitāḥ ||
tato hāhākṛtaṃ sainyaṃ cāryyāṇāṃ ca nanāśa tat || || 38 ||
dṛṣṭvā tatkautukaṃ ramyaṃ jayanto yuddhakovidaḥ ||
āgneyaṃ śaramādāya kāṣṭhasainyeṣu cākṣipat || 39 ||
bhasmībhūtāśca te sarve tatraiva vilayaṃ gatāḥ ||
trilakṣaṃ kṣatriyāḥ śeṣā jayaṃtaṃ raṇakovidam ||
cakrurjayaravaṃ tatra tuṣṭuvuśca punaḥ punaḥ || 3.3.29.40 ||
tadā tu cīnajā bauddhāḥ kṛtvā viṃśatsahasrakān|| hayārūḍhā~mllohamayānpreṣayāmāsurūrjitān || 41 ||
yogasiṃho gajārūḍho dhanurbāṇadharo valī ||
kaṃṭheṣu lohajānvīrāṃstāḍayāmāsa vai tadā || || 42 ||
mṛtāste paṃcasāhasrā yogasiṃhaśarārditāḥ ||
bauddhasiṃhastadā śūro dṛṣṭvā tasya parākramam ||
kṛtvā lohamayaṃ siṃhaṃ yogasiṃhamapeṣayat ||43||
pātena tasya siṃhasya sa vīro maraṇaṃ gataḥ ||
tadā tu bhogasiṃhaśca hayārūḍho jagāma ha ||
svabhallena ca taṃ siṃhaṃ hatvā tatra jagarja vai || 44 ||
tadā tu bauddhasiṃhena śārdūlastatra coditaḥ ||
sahayo bhogasiṃhaśca tenaiva maraṇaṃ gataḥ || 45 ||
mātulau mṛtyuvaśagau dṛṣṭvā svarṇavatīsutaḥ ||
karālaṃ hayamā ruhya bauddhasiṃhamupāyayau || 46 ||
śaramādāya vai śīghraṃ nāmnā saṃmohanaṃ śubham ||
mohayitvā ripubalaṃ bauddhasiṃhasamanvitam || 47 ||
baddhvā tānbauddhasiṃhādīnnṛpāndaśasahasrakam ||
kalayaṃtraṃ ca saṃcūrṇya kṛṣṇāṃ śāṃtikamāyayau || 48 ||
tadā te harṣitāssarve prapeṣya nagaraṃ yayuḥ ||
tadveśma yojanāyāmaṃ sarvasaṃpatsamanvitam ||
luṇṭhayitvā balātsarve nṛpadurgamupāyayuḥ || 49 ||
bauddhasiṃhastadāgatya jayantena vimocitaḥ ||
sutāṃ svāṃ padmajāṃ nāmnā jayantāya dadau mudā || 3.3.29.50 ||
daśakoṭīḥ suvarṇasya cāhlādāya tadā dhanam||
sarvaiśca bauddhavṛndaiśca tatraiva śapathaḥ kṛtaḥ || 51 ||
āryadeśaṃ na yāsyāmaḥ kadācidrāṣṭrahetave ||
ityuktvā tānpraṇamyāśu saṃprasthānamakārayan ||
trilakṣaiśca yutāste vai netrapālagṛhaṃ gatāḥ || 52 ||
|| ṛṣayaḥ ūcuḥ || ||
indulena kathaṃ sūta tatra prāṇīkṛtā na hi ||
supriyā yogasiṃhādyāstanno vada vicakṣaṇa || 53 ||
|| sūta uvāca || ||
āgatā yamalokādvai katicitprāṇino bhuvi ||
tadā tu duḥkhito devo maheṃdrāntamupāyayau || 54 ||
devarāja namastubhyaṃ sarvadevapriyaṃkara ||
jayaṃto jagatīṃ prāpya mṛtāñjīvayati svayam ||
ato vai lokamaryādā viruddhā dṛśyate bhuvi || 55 ||
iti śrutvā tu vacanaṃ mahendro devamāyayā ||
vaḍavāmṛtamāhṛtya tathā vai svargagāṃ gatim ||
jayaṃtasya svaputrasya mumoda sa suraiḥ saha || 56 ||
indulaśca tadā duḥkhī śāradāṃ sarvamaṃgalām ||
pūjayitvā vidhānena yogadhyāna paro.abhavat || 57 ||
iti te kathitaṃ vipra punaḥ śṛṇu kathāṃ śubhām ||
netrapālaśca balavānbahuputraḥ śucānvitaḥ ||
daśakoṭimitaṃ svarṇaṃ tebhyo dattvā samaṃ samam || 58 ||
prasthānaṃ kārayāmāsa cāṣṭānāṃ balaśālinām ||
te vai dvilakṣasainyāḍhyāḥ svagehāya yayurmudā || 59 || ||
iti śrībhaviṣye mahāpurāṇe pratisargaparvaṇi caturyugakhaṇḍāparaparyāye kaliyugīyetihāsasamuccaye ekonatriṃśo.adhyāyaḥ || 29 || cha ||
|| sūta uvāca || ||
yadā te cīnadeśasthāstadāhūto nṛpeṇa vai ||
kāmapālena bho vipra lakṣaṇo nakulāṃśakaḥ || 1 ||
jayacaṃdra mahābhāga sāvadhānaṃ vacaḥ śṛṇu ||
vaiśākhaśukla saptamyāṃ muhūrto.ayaṃ dināgame || 2 ||
ato vai lakṣaṇo vīraścaikākī māṃ samāpnuyāt ||
gṛhītvā matsutāṃ dolāṃ gamiṣyati tavāṃtikam || 3 ||
senānvitaṃ ca taṃ jñātvā mahīrājo mahābalaḥ ||
grahīṣyati parājitya tasmādyogyaṃ vaco mama || 4 ||
iti tatratyavacanaṃ matvā rājā prasannadhīḥ ||
lakṣaṇaṃ hastinīsaṃsthaṃ śataśūrasamanvitam || 5 ||
āhūya preṣayāmāsa kāmapālāya dhīmate ||
mārge paṃcadinaṃ vīra uṣitvā tadgṛhaṃ yayau || 6 ||
tadā padmākaraḥ śyālo jñātvā lakṣaṇamāgatam ||
bhūmirājaṃ samāhūya tena yuddhamacīkarat || 7 ||
lakṣaṇo nakulāṃśaśca dṛṣṭvā śatrumupasthitam ||
svaśaraistarpayāmāsa rājarājaṃ mahābalam || 8 ||
mūrcchayitvā mahīrājaṃ hatvā paṃcaśataṃ balī ||
kāmapālaṃ samāgamya natvā vāsamakārayat || 9 ||
utthitaśca mahīrājo gatvā padmākaraṃ prati ||
vacanaṃ prāha kāryārthī śṛṇu mitra vaco mama || 3.3.30.10 ||
lakṣaṇo me mahāñchatrussa ca tvadgehamāgataḥ ||
yadi dāsyasi taṃ baddhvā tvāṃ madaṃgaṃ karomyaham || 11 ||
iti śrutvā sa lobhātmā dattvā hālāhalaṃ viṣam ||
baddhvā taṃ lakṣaṇaṃ vīraṃ mahīrājāya cārpayat ||
hatvā tāñchataśūrāṃśca guptavārtāmakārayan || 12 ||
jñātvā tatpadminī nārī duḥkhitālapya vai bhṛśam ||
caṃḍikāṃ pūjayāmāsa patimaṃgalahetave || 13 ||
tadā prasannā sā devī varadā sarvamaṃgalā ||
āśvāsya padminīṃ nārīṃ lakṣaṇāṃtamupāyayau || 14 ||
svapne tamāha sā devī hrīṃ phaṭ gheghe japaṃ kuru ||
asya maṃtraprabhāvācca sarvavighnaḥ praṇaśyati || 15 ||
sa buddhvā lakṣaṇo vīrastaṃ maṃtraṃ ca jajāpa ha ||
āṣāḍhe māsi saṃprāpte kṛṣṇāṃśādyā gṛhaṃ yayuḥ || 16 ||
tālanaśca yutastābhyāṃ kalyakubjamupāyayau ||
na dṛṣṭo lakṣaṇo vīro jayacaṃdrapriyaṃkaraḥ ||
jñātvā tatkāraṇaṃ taiśca kṛtaṃ yogamayaṃ vapuḥ || 17 ||
dhānyapālaḥ kāṃsyadhārī vīṇādhārī ca tālanaḥ ||
lallasiṃho mṛdaṃgāṃko yayuste vai mahāvatīm || 18 ||
sabhāṃ parimalasyaiva gatvā te yogarūpiṇaḥ ||
cakrurgānaṃ mudā yuktāḥ sarve te mohamāgatāḥ || 19 ||
prasannaśca tadā rājā muktāmālāṃ svakaṇṭhagām ||
tālanāya dadau prītyā tābhyāṃ svarṇāṃgulīyake || 3.3.30.20 ||
tadā te harṣitāḥ sarve kṛṣṇāṃśaṃ prati cāyayuḥ ||
jñātvā kṛṣṇāṃśa evāpi dhṛtvā yogamayaṃ vapuḥ ||
yayau biṃdugaḍhaṃ vīrastālanādyaissamanvitaḥ || 21 ||
haṭṭamadhye samāgamya kṛtvā rāsotsavaṃ śubham ||
gehaṃ padmākarasyaiva gatvā te nanṛturmudā || || 22 ||
etasminnaṃtare sarvā yoṣitastatra cāgatāḥ ||
veṇuvādyavṛtaṃvīraṃ kṛṣṇāṃśaṃ dadṛśurmuhuḥ ||
mohitāstasya gānena jaḍībhūtā dhanaṃ daduḥ || || 23 ||
tadā tu padminī nārī sarvalakṣaṇasaṃyutā ||
jñātvā kṛṣṇāṃśamevāpi ruroda ciramāturā || 24 ||
uvāca ca vilapyāśu matpatirla kṣaṇo balī ||
mahīrājena śūreṇa kārāgāre balātkṛtaḥ ||
ahaṃ yoṣā bhavānyogī kathaṃ kāryaṃ bhaviṣyati || 25 ||
iti śrutvā tu sa nṛpo bhujamutthāpya satvaram ||
āśvāsya padminīṃ nārīṃ yayuste dehalīṃ prati ||
rājadvāramupāgamya kṛṣṇāṃśassa nanarta ha || 26 ||
mahīrājastu balavānprasannastasyalīlayā ||
vāṃchitaṃ brūhi kṛṣṇāṃśa sarvaṃ yogindadāmyaham || 27 ||
iti śrutvā bhūpavaco vihasyovāca taṃ prati||
kārāgāraṃ lohamayaṃ nṛpayogyaṃ ca me nṛpa ||
darśayāśu svakīyaṃ vai bhavānbhūpaśiromaṇiḥ || 28 ||
iti śrutvā sa nṛpatirmohitaḥ kṛṣṇalīlayā ||
darśayitvā ca vai śīpraṃ punastebhyo dadau dhanam || 29 ||
tataste yoginassarve saṃprāpya ca mahāvatīm ||
natvā parimalaṃ bhūpaṃ gaditvā sarvakāraṇam || || 3.3.30.30 ||
svasenāṃ sajjayāmāsa cāhlādaśca nṛpājñayā ||
pañcalakṣaṃ mahāvatyā hayārūḍhāssamāsthitāḥ || 31 ||
tālanassapta lakṣāṇi sainyānyāhūya cāgataḥ ||
evaṃ dvādaśalakṣāṇi kṣatriyā raṇadurmadāḥ ||
dehalīṃ ca samājagmussarvaśastrasamanvitāḥ || 32 ||
etasminnaṃtare mantrī cadrabhaṭṭo viśāradaḥ ||
sarvaśāstrārthakuśalo vaiṣṇavīśaktipūjakaḥ ||33||
mahīrājaṃ samāgamya vacaḥ prāha śṛṇuṣva bhoḥ ||
mayā vai ca rahaḥ krīḍā dṛṣṭā devīprasādataḥ ||34||
tatrodayaśca kṛṣṇāṃśaḥ pūrṇabrahmāṇamāgamat ||
vacaḥ prāha prasannātmā śṛṇu tvaṃ sattvavigraha || 35 ||
agnivaṃśavināśāya cādya yāsyāmi dehalīm ||
hatvāhaṃ kauravāṃśāṃśca sthāpayitvā kaliṃ bhuvi || 36 ||
punastavāntikaṃ prāpya rahaḥ krīḍāṃ karomyaham ||
ityuktvā biṃdulārūḍhaḥ sa vīrastvāmupa sthitaḥ ||
ityahaṃ dṛṣṭavānbhūpa kṛṣṇāṃśaṃ yoganidrayā || 37 ||
iti tasya vacaḥ śrutvā sa bhūpo vismayānvitaḥ ||
bhayabhītaḥ sahasrāṇi śūrānāhūya satvaram ||
tebhyaśca lakṣaṇaṃ dattvā vacanaṃ prāha tānprati || 38 ||
padmākarāya bhūpāya gatvā dattvāśu lakṣaṇam ||
mamāntikamupāgamya kāraṇaṃ vadatāśu tat || 39 ||
iti śrutvā tu te sarve vahnivaṃśyā mahābalāḥ ||
gatvā tatra tathā kṛtvā mahīrājamupāgaman || 3.3.30.40 ||
bhagadaṃtaśca teṣāṃ tu sahasrāṇāṃ ca nāyakaḥ||
mahīrājaṃ vacaḥ prāha śṛṇu tannṛpabhāṣitam ||41||
padminī me svasā rājan guptavidyāviśāradā ||
tayā yajñapatirdevaḥ samyagārādhitaḥ purā || 42 ||
dattastena varo ramyo hyantardhānamayaḥ paraḥ ||
sā tu taṃ lakṣaṇaṃ kāṃtamaṃtardhānaṃ kariṣyati ||
iti śrutvā sa nṛpatiḥ paramānandamāptavān || 43 ||
etasminnaṃtare prāptāḥ kṛṣṇāṃśādyā mahābalāḥ ||
rurudhurdehalīṃ sarvāṃ mahīrājena pālitām || 44 ||
sa tadā pṛthivīrājo gṛhītvā bahubhūṣaṇam ||
sarvebhyaśca dadau premṇā vacanaṃ prāha namradhīḥ || 45 ||
lakṣaṇo nāma te rājā kārāgāre na vai mama ||
yadi mannagare cāsti tarhi te roṣa īdṛśaḥ || 46 ||
ityuktvā taṃ ca kṛṣṇāṃśaṃ darśayāmāsa vai gṛham| ||
mahādevasya śapathaṃ kṛtavānbhūpatirbhayāt || 47 ||
tadodayo bhūpavacaḥ satyaṃ matvā suduḥkhitaḥ ||
svakīyaiḥ saha saṃprāpto grāmaṃ biṃdugaḍhaṃ śubham || 48|
kāmapālastu tacchrutvā kṛṣṇāṃśāgamanaṃ balī ||
baliṃ bahuṃ gṛhītvāśu kṛṣṇāṃśaṃ śaraṇaṃ yayau ||
prāṃjaliḥ praṇato bhūtvā vacanaṃ prāha bhīrukaḥ || 49 ||
sutā me padminī nārī lakṣaṇena samanvitā ||
na jñātvā kva gatā.asmābhissatyaṃ satyaṃ bravīmyaham ||3.3.30.50||
iti tadvacanaṃ śrutvā kṛṣṇāṃśaḥ svabalaissaha ||
kānyakubjaṃ samāgatya jayacandramuvāca ha || 51 ||
bhrātṛjastava bhūpāla padminyā lakṣaṇo.anvitaḥ ||
kāmapālagṛhe nāsti niścito bahudhā mayā || 52 ||
na jāne kva gato rājā mama prāṇasamo bhuvi ||
yadi bhūpa na paśyāmi satyaṃ prāṇāṃstyajāmyaham || 53 ||
hā ratnabhānutanaya viṣṇubhakta śubhaṃkara ||
svamitraṃ māṃ parityajya kāṃ diśaṃ gatavānbhavān ||
ityuktvā mūrchitaścāsītkṛṣṇāṃśo vaiṣṇavapriyaḥ || 54 ||
tadā svarṇavatī devī svadāsyā śobhayā saha ||
dhṛtvā śukamayaṃ rūpaṃ tatrāgatya svamūrtigā || 55 ||
tayā saṃpreṣitā śobhā mlecchamāyāviśāradā ||
jayacaṃdramupāgamya dhṛtvā divyamayaṃ vapuḥ || 56 ||
uvāca vacanaṃ tatra śṛṇu bhūpaśiromaṇe ||
māyāvinī ca māṃ viddhi śobhanāṃ nāma viśrutām || 57||
daṃpatī tava bhūpāla saṃhṛtau yena yatra vai ||
tatrāhaṃ ca gamiṣyāmi mahāmadasamanvitā || 58 ||
āhlādaścendulo vīro devo vai tālano balī ||
kṛṣṇāṃśapālitāssarve yāsyāmo bhūpate vayam || 59||
ityuktvā śobhanā veśyā kṛtvā yogamayaṃ vapuḥ ||
mahāmadaṃ samāruhya paiśācaṃ rudrakiṃkaram ||
prayayau tānpuraskṛtya yogiveṣānmahāba lān|| 3.3.30.60 ||
āhlādo gajasaṃstho vai karālārūḍha indulaḥ ||
tālanaḥ siṃhinīsaṃstho devasiṃho manorathe ||
kṛṣṇāṃśo bindulārūḍho nartayāmāsa taṃ hayam|| 61 ||
kāmarūpamayaṃ deśaṃ śatayojanagāminaḥ ||
balavaṃtaśca saṃprāptā gehegehe janejane ||
lakṣaṇaṃ śodhayāmāsurna prāptāstatra taṃ nṛpam || 62 ||
punarmayūranagaraṃ śobhanā taiḥ samanvitā ||
cinvatī taṃ manuṣyeṣu na prāptā tatra vai nṛpam || 63 ||
punarinnagaḍhagrāmaṃ śobhanā ca janejane ||
lakṣaṇaṃ mṛgayāmāsa na prāpa tatra lakṣaṇam|| 64 ||
gatvā bāhlīkanagaraṃ śobhanā taissamanvitā ||
lakṣaṇaṃ ca nṛpaśreṣṭhaṃ nāpaśyattatra duḥkhitā || 65 ||
punaḥ svadeśamāgamya bāhlīkaṃ mlecchavāsinam ||
markaṭeśvaramīśānaṃ tatrāha vanavāsinam ||
pūjayitvā ca sā veśyā gānanṛtyaparābhavat || 66 ||
sa devo bhūmimadhyāt samāgamya mudānvitaḥ ||
kṛṣṇāṃśaṃ praṇato bhūtvā.abravīnmlecchaprapūjitaḥ || 67 ||
ahaṃ kālāgnirudreṇa bhūmigarte suropitaḥ ||
asamarthaṃ ca māṃ viddhi gaccha vīra yathāsukham || 68 ||
iti śrutvā ca sā śobhā nirāśābhūttadā svayam || 69 ||
punaḥ svarṇavatīṃ prāpya sarvamevā dito.abravīt ||
triṃśadabdaiśca kṛṣṇāṃśe caitraśukla samāgate || 3.3.30.70 ||
tānāśvāsya suvarṇāṃgī pūjayāmāsa caṃḍikām ||
navarātraṃ gataṃ tasyā bhojanācchādanaṃ vinā ||
niśīthānte tamaḥprāpte gatvāha jagadambikā || 71 ||
padminī nāma yā nārī maṇidevasya vai priyā ||
jātā sā kāmapālasya gṛhe yajñāvamānitā || 72 ||
senāpatiḥ kuberasya maṇidevo hi sa smṛtaḥ ||
pūrvaṃ hi bhīmasenena yakṣayuddheṣu ghātitaḥ || 73 ||
tadā tatpadminī nārī devadevamumāpatim ||
tuṣṭāva ca nirāhārā matpatiṃ dehi śaṃkara || 74 ||
śatavarṣāṃtare devo mahādeva uvāca tām ||
kalau vikramakāle hi śatadvādaśake.antike || 75 ||
nakulāṃśaṃ ca saṃprāpya bhuktvā tena mahatsukham ||
tadviyogena saṃtyajya dehaṃ padmānuvāsitam ||
svapatiṃ ca tadā prāpya kailāsaṃ punareṣyasi || 76 ||
mahāvatīṃ purīṃ ramyāṃ rāṣṭrapālāya śāradā ||
kariṣyati tadā devī maṇidevastu tvatpatiḥ || 77 ||
tayā viracito bhūmau grāmarakṣārthamudyataḥ ||
prāptastvāṃ padminīṃ nārīṃ kailāsaṃ punareṣyati || 78 ||
ataḥ svarṇavati tvaṃ vai kailāsaṃ guhyakālayam ||
gatvāśu padminīṃ tatra bodhayāśu vacaḥ kuru || 79 ||
iti śrutvā svarṇavatī padminīṃ prati cāgamat ||
vṛttāṃtaṃ kathayitvāgre padminīṃ tu dayāturā || 3.3.30.80 ||
kāmapālagṛhaṃ prāpya tatra vāsamakārayat ||
svarṇavatyapi saṃprāptā tadā śīghraṃ mahāvatīm || 81 ||
tasyāṃ gatāyāṃ gehe vai padminyā likhitaṃ śubham ||
patraṃ parimalo rājā vartayāmāsa harṣitaḥ ||83||
āgaccha senayā sārddhaṃ kṛṣṇāṃśa balavattara ||
jitvā padmākaraṃ baṃdhuṃ matpatiṃ mocayāśu vai||
bhūtale lakṣaṇo rājā sthitaḥ padmākarārtigaḥ || 83 ||
iti jñātvā ca kṛṣṇāṃśo lakṣadvādaśasenayā ||
rurodha nagarīṃ sarvāṃ kāmapālena rakṣitām || 84 ||
kāmapālastu balavāṃstrilakṣabalasaṃyutaḥ ||
sutājñayā yayau yuddhaṃ sārddhaṃ padmākareṇa vai || 85||
tayoścāsīnmahadyuddhaṃ senayorubhayostadā ||
ahorātrapramāṇena bhūpasenā parājitā || 86 ||
padminīṃ śaraṇaṃ prāpya tadā bhrātā pitā sthitaḥ ||
tayorvijayamevāśu yathāprāptaṃ cakāra sā ||
antarddhānamayaṃ patraṃ tayorarthe ca sā dadau || 87 ||
tau tatrāntarhitau bhūtvā svakhaḍgena riporbalam ||
ayutaṃ jaghnaturmattau tadā te vismayaṃ gatāḥ ||88||
tālanādyā raṇaṃ tyaktvā kṛṣṇāṃṇaśaṃ śaraṇaṃ yayuḥ ||
kṛṣṇāṃśo.api tadā duḥkhī dhyātvā sarvamayīṃ śivām || 89 ||
divyadṛṣṭistato jātaḥ saṃprāpya tamayudhyata ||
nabhogataṃ kāmapālaṃ tathā padmākaraṃ nṛpam || 3.3.30.90 ||
baddhvā tatra mudāviṣṭo lakṣaṇaṃ prāpya nirbhayaḥ ||
dolāmāropya tāṃ devīṃ svagehāya mudā yayau || 91 ||
jayacaṃdrāya bhūpāya dattvā vai tau ca daṃpatī ||
lakṣaṇaṃ padminīṃ caiva kṛtakṛtyastadābhavat || 92 ||
jayacaṃdro.api balavāndṛṣṭvā gehe svadaṃpatī ||
dadau dānaṃ dvijātibhyo bhūpatiṃ samamocayat ||
jyeṣṭhe māsi site pakṣe kṛṣṇāṃśo gehamāgataḥ || 93 ||
iti te kathitaṃ vipra kṛṣṇāṃśacaritaṃ śubham ||
punaste kathayiṣyāmi dṛṣṭaṃ yogabalena vai ||94||
iti śrībhaviṣye mahāpurāṇe pratisargaparvaṇi caturyugakhaṃḍāparaparyāye kaliyugīyetihāsasamuccaye triṃśo.adhyāyaḥ ||30|| |||7|| ||
|| sūta uvāca || ||
śṛṇu vipra mahābhāga caṃdrabhaṭṭastadā svayam ||
mahīrājaṃ sadaḥsthaṃ taṃ candratulyassamāgataḥ || 1 ||
tamāgataṃ samālokya sa rājā śokatatparaḥ ||
uvāca vacanaṃ ramyaṃ śṛṇu maṃtrivara prabho || 2 ||
kṛṣṇāṃśādyairmahāśūrairmadgrāme bhayamāgatam ||
kadā te ca mariṣyaṃti kaṃṭakā mama dāruṇāḥ || 3 ||
ityuktassa tu śuddhātmā dhyātvā sarvamayīṃ śivām ||
vacanaṃ prāha rājānaṃ stha bhūpaśiromaṇe || 4 ||
jiṣṇoraṃśātsamudbhūto brahmānaṃdo mahāvatīm ||
sa kṛṣṇāṃśasakhaḥ śreṣṭhaḥ sarvadā tatpriye rataḥ || 5 ||
yadā ca malanāputro dehaṃ tyaktvā gamiṣyati ||
tadā te sarvadevāṃśā gamiṣyaṃti yato gatāḥ || 6 ||
ityevaṃvādinaṃ dhīramamātyaṃ ca mahīpatiḥ ||
vacanaṃ prāha namrātmā ko.apyarthaściṃtito mayā || 7 || |
ekākinaṃ mahāśūraṃ brahmānaṃdaṃ nṛpottamam ||
samāhūya mahīrājo dvirāgamanahetave ||
chadmanā ghātayitvā taṃ kṛtakṛtyo bhaviṣyati || 8 ||
ityukte nṛpatiṃ prāha mahīrājaḥ prasannadhīḥ ||
vacanaṃ śṛṇu bho mitra gaccha śīghraṃ mahāvatīm || 9 ||
malanāṃ ca samāgatya bodhayitvā tu tāṃ svayam ||
mamāntikamupāgamya ciraṃ jīva sukhībhava || 3.3.31.10 ||
iti śrutvā tu vacanaṃ natvā taṃ ca mahīpatiḥ ||
rātrau ghoraṃ muniśreṣṭha malanāṃ prāha nirbhayaḥ ||11 ||
vadhūstava mahārājñi velā nāma surūpiṇī ||
saṃprāptā yauvanavatī patiyogyā śubhānanā || 12 ||
kujātiścaiva kṛṣṇāṃśaḥ śruto rājñā mahātmanā ||
ato na preṣitā putrī tava putrāya dhīmate ||
ato madvacanaṃ matvā kuru kāryaṃ tava priyam || 13 ||
mayā sārddhaṃ tava suto brahmānaṃdo mahābalaḥ ||
urvīyāṃ nagarīṃ prāpya tadā matsainyasaṃyutaḥ || 14 ||
mahīrājamupāgamya patnīṃ śīghramavāpsyati ||
no cenmamājñayā velā tyaktvā kāntaṃ mariṣyati || 15 ||
iti śrutvā tu sā rājñī mohitā devamāyayā ||
rājānaṃ samupāgamya bhrāturvacanamuttamam ||
kathayāmāsa vai sarvaṃ śrutvā bhūpo.abravīdidam || 16 ||
mahīpatirmahādhūrto madvināśāya codyataḥ ||
tasya vārtā na me ramyā kapaṭastena nirmitaḥ || 17 ||
iti śrutvā ca malanā rājānaṃ kopasaṃyutam ||
vacanaṃ prāha bho rājanyathā baṃdhustathā hyaham||
vacanaṃ kuru me rājanno cetprāṇāṃstyajāmyaham||18||
ityuktavādinīṃ rātrau tadā parimalo nṛpaḥ ||
brahmānandaṃ dadau tasmai sa suto mātṛvatsalaḥ || 19 ||
māturājñāṃ puraskṛtya mātulena samanvitaḥ ||
rātrau ca mātulagrāmaṃ saṃprāpya mudito.abhavat ||3.3.31.20||
prātaḥkāle ca saṃprāpte harināgaramāsthitaḥ ||
ekākī dehalīṃ ramyāṃ prayayau devamohitaḥ || 21 ||
sāyaṃkāle tu saṃprāpte mahīrājasya maṃdire ||
agamāṃ darśayāmāsa surūpāṃ divyavigrahām || 22 ||
agamā ca samālokya paraṃ harṣamupāyayau ||
māghaśuklasya cāṣṭamyāṃ brahmānaṃdaśca nirbhayaḥ ||
śyālānāṃ yoṣitaḥ sapta dadarśa rucirānanā || 23 ||
tisro nāryaśca vidhavāścatasro dhavasaṃyutāḥ ||
brahmānaṃdaṃ śarumayaṃ vākyamūcurmudānvitāḥ || 24 ||
brahmānaṃda mahābhāga sāvadhānaṃ vacaḥ śṛṇu ||
tava patnī svayaṃ kālī velā kalaharūpiṇī ||
saṃjahāra dhavāneva no vayaṃ tu suduḥkhitā || 25 ||
sāpatnyamastu tattasyā gṛhāṇāsmānmanohara ||
dhavānvidehi no vīra patirbhava mudānvitaḥ || 26 ||
iti śrutvā vacastāsāṃ brahmānaṃdo mahābalaḥ ||
uvāca madhuraṃ vākyaṃ śrutismṛtisamanvitam || 27 ||
purā satyayuge nārī cottamā ca pativratā ||
tretāyāṃ madhyamā jātā nikṛṣṭā dvāpare punaḥ || 28 ||
adhamā hi kalau nārī parapuṃsopabhoginī ||
atastu kalikāle vai vihāho? vidhavāstriyāḥ ||
devalena śubhaḥ proktaścāsitena svayaṃ smṛtau ||29||
satī satye tu sā proktā tretāyāṃ patibhasmagā ||3.3.31.30||
satī sā madhyamā proktā dvāpare vidhavā satī ||
brahmacaryaparā jñeyā kalau nāsti satīvratam || 31 ||
ato yūyaṃ mayā sārddhaṃ bhuṃkṣadhvamamalaṃ sukham ||
iti śrutvā priyaṃ vākyaṃ tisrastā vidhavāḥ striyaḥ || 32 ||
kṛtvā śṛṃgāra rūpāṇi bhūṣaṇāni ca sarvaśaḥ ||
brahmānaṃdamupāgamya samāliṃganatatparāḥ ||33||
tā dṛṣṭvā malanāputro vacanaṃ prāha nirbhayaḥ ||34||
yuṣmābhiḥ patayo muktā ye ca madbaṃdhunā hatāḥ || 35 ||
yuṣmānato na gṛhṇīyāṃ satyaṃsatyaṃ bravīmyaham||
iti śrutvā vaco ghoraṃ hāsyayuktaṃ ca yoṣitaḥ ||36||
mahīrājantamāgamya rurudurbhṛśaduḥkhitāḥ||
rājanvelāpatirdhūrto mama dharmaṃ jahāti vai ||
daṃḍaṃ dehi ca dhūrtāya no cetprāṇāṃstyajāmyaham || 37 ||
iti śrutvā mahīrājo brahmānandaṃ mahābalam ||
samāhūya vacaḥ prāha bhavānbhūpakulādhamaḥ || 38 ||
parastriyaṃ ca yo bhuṃkte sa yāti yamamaṃdiram ||
adyaiva tvaṃ sutākānta kārāgṛhamavāpnuyāḥ || 39 ||
itiśrutvā vaco ghoraṃ brahmānaṃdo mahābalaḥ ||
satsaroḥ khaḍgamutsṛjya mahīrājamadhāvata || 3.3.31.40 ||
dṛṣṭvā bhayāturo rājā cāmuṃḍāntamupāyayau||
kapāṭaṃ dṛḍhamācchādya tatra vāsamakārayat || 41 ||
|| ṛṣaya ūcuḥ|| || ||
tāsāṃ kathaṃ vivāhāḥ syustattvaṃ no brūhi vistarāt||
kutratyāstāḥ kimaṃśāśca dṛṣṭā yogena vai tvayā || 42||
|| sūta uvāca| ||
aṃgadeśe muniśreṣṭha māyāvarmanṛpo.abhavat ||
tāmasīṃ pūjayitvā vai śaktiṃ sarvavimohinīm || 43 ||
varmottamaṃ tayā dattaṃ sarvasattvabhayaṃkaram|
gṛhītvā sa tu bhūpālaḥ prasthito.abhūnmahītale ||44||
pramadā nāma tatpatnī daśa putrānasūṣuvat ||
kauravāṃśānmahābhāga varṣānte nāma me śṛṇu ||45||
mattaḥ pramatta unmatta sumatto durmadastathā||
durmukho durdharo bāhuḥ suratho virathaḥ kramāt|
teṣāṃ svasānujā cāsītsunāmnā madirekṣaṇā||46||
tasyā vai suṃdaraṃ rūpaṃ madāghūrṇitalocanam ||
kitavo nāma vai daityo dṛṣṭvā mohamupāgataḥ || 47||
māyāvarmāṇamāgatya vacanaṃ prāha namradhīḥ ||
yadi tvaṃ me svatanayāṃ dehi kāmāturāya ca ||48||
tarhi te sakalaṃ kāryaṃ kariṣyāmi na saṃśayaḥ ||
iti śrutvā tadā bhūpo dadau  tasmai svakanyakām||49||
kitavo gahvarāvāsī rātrau ghore tamovṛte ||
nṛpagehamupāgamya bubhuje smaravihvalaḥ ||
prātaḥkāle tu tāṃ tyaktvā kandarāntamupāyayau||3.3.31.50||
varmadevamate jāte tato rājā madāturaḥ||
purohitaṃ samāhūya lakṣadravyasamanvitam ||
mahīrājāya saṃpreṣya tārakaṃ sa samāvṛṇot ||51||
mahīrājastu balavā~mllakṣaṣoḍaśasainyapaḥ||
saṃyutaḥ śatabhūpālairmāsānte samupāgamat ||52||
kṛṣṇāṃśe paṃcadaśake saṃprāpte vratatatpare||
tārakaśca vivāhāya bahubhūpoṃgamānayat||53||
māyāvarmā ca taṃ dṛṣṭvā tārakaṃ bhūpasaṃyutam||
vacanaṃ prāha balavānrājarāja vacaḥ śṛṇu|| 54||
kitavo nāma medhāvī daityavaṃśayaśaskaraḥ||
tena me pīḍitā bālā rātrau ghoratamovṛte ||55||
hatā bhūpakumārāśca matsutārthaṃ samāgatāḥ||
bhakṣitāstena daityena saṃyayuste yamālayam|| 56 ||
teṣāṃ ca bahudhā dravyaṃ luṃṭhayitvā madāturaḥ||
matsutāyai dadau sarvaṃ tasmāttvaṃ ditijaṃ jahi||57||
iti śrutvā mahīrājassarvasainyasamanvitaḥ ||
kitavaṃ ca samāhūya mahadyuddhamacīkarat ||58||
kitavassa tu māyāvī jitvā sarvānmahābalān||
tārakaṃ ca samāhṛtya guhāyāṃ samupāgamat || 59 ||
tārakaśca tadā duḥkhī dhyātvā śaṃkaramuttamam ||
pāṣāṇabhūto hyagamanmahādevaprasādataḥ || 3.3.31.60 ||
etasminnaṃtare prāptā mahāvatīnivāsinaḥ ||
kṣatriyā daśasāhasrā kṛṣṇāṃśādyaiśca pālitāḥ || 61 ||
mahīrājastu tāndṛṣṭvā balakhāniṃ mahābalam ||
uvāca vacanaṃ premṇā putraśokena duḥkhitaḥ || 62 ||
tārakaḥ kitavenaiva saṃhṛto ditijena vai ||
yadi tvaṃ me sutaṃ dehi koṭisvarṇaṃ dadāmi tat ||63||
iti śrutvā tu te dhīrāḥ kṛṣṇāṃśo devasiṃhakaḥ ||
vatsajau ca tathāgamya kitavaṃ rurudhurbalāt ||64||
ahorātramabhūdyuddhaṃ teṣāṃ tena samanvitam ||
kitavastu ruṣāviṣṭaḥ kṛṣṇāṃśaṃ devasiṃhakam ||
balakhāniṃ mohayitvā jagarja ca punaḥpunaḥ || 65 ||
sukhakhānistadā śūraḥ kitavaṃ balavattaram ||
svakhaḍgena śirastasya chittvā rājānamāgamat || 66 ||
trayaste sukhino bhūtvā sukhakhāniṃ praśasya ca ||
mahīrājāya ca dadau tārakaṃ kaitavaṃ śiraḥ || || 67 ||
tadā bhūpasutā devī sukhakhāniṃ samāvṛṇot ||
mahīpatistadāgatya tatsutāṃ madirekṣaṇām || 68 ||
saṃbodhya vividhairvākyairbhūmirājāṃtamāgamat ||
tārakasya tayā sārddhaṃ vivāho mudito.abhavat || 69 ||
koṭisvarṇaṃ nṛpātprāpya balakhānirmahābalaḥ ||
prayayau baṃdhubhissārddhaṃ śirīṣākhyapuraṃ śubham || 3.3.31.70 ||
|| sūta uvāca || ||
gurjare nṛpatiścāsīnmūlavarmā mahābalaḥ ||
prabhāvatī tasya sutā daśaputrānujābhavat || 71 ||
balaśca prabalaścaiva subalo balavānbalī ||
sumūlaśca mahābhūlo durgo bhīmo bhayaṃkaraḥ || 72 ||
karabho nāma vai yakṣo lallarājasya sevakaḥ ||
prabhāvatīṃ samālokya mumoha madavihvalaḥ ||
pañcavarṣāṃtare jāte tena bhuktā kumārikā || 73 ||
mūlavarmā mahīrājaṃ samāhūya sasainyakam ||
vacanaṃ prāha namrātmā rājarāja vacaḥ kuru || 74 ||
prabhāvatīṃ śubhāṃ kanyāṃ nṛharāya dadāmyaham ||
ityuktvā nṛharaṃ putraṃ samāhūya svamaṃdire ||
dadau vedavidhānena sutāṃ ca nṛharāya vai || || 75 ||
pakṣamātrāṃtare yakṣaḥ karabhastatra cāgataḥ ||
daṃpatī pīḍayāmāsa jitvā sarvamahīpatīn || 76 ||
mahīrājastadā duḥkhī vatsajau balavattarau ||
samāhūya kathitvāgre ruroda balavānbalī || 77 ||
dayālū vatsajau vīrau karabhāṃtamupeyatuḥ ||
karabhastau samālokya tatraivāṃtardhimāgamat ||
nāgapāśena tau baddhvā pīḍayāmāsa daṃpatī || 7 ||
iti śrutvā sa kṛṣṇāṃśaḥ karabhaṃ yakṣakiṃkaram ||
baddhvā yogabalenaiva mocayāmāsa dampatī || 79 ||
bhrātarau tau samāgamya nāgapāśaṃ tu cāsinā ||
chittvā mumoda balavānkoṭisvarṇaṃ gṛhītavān||
bhūmirājaḥ prasannātmā dehalīṃ mudito.agamat|| 3.3.31.80 || ||
|| sūta uvāca || ||
kāśmīre ca nṛpaścāsītkaikayo nāma viśrutaḥ ||
daśa putrāśca tasyaiva kanyā ca madanāvatī || 81 ||
kāmaḥ prakāmaḥ sakāmo niṣkāmo nirapatrapaḥ ||
jayaśca vijayaścaiva jayanto jayavāñjayaḥ || 82 ||
sa bhūpo bhūmirājaṃ ca samāhūya vaco.abravīt ||
putraste vai saradano matkanyāṃ prāptumarhati || 83 ||
gaṃdharvassukalo nāma matkanyāṃ ca śubhānanām ||
jyotsnāyāṃ niśi saṃhṛtya tayā sārdraṃ hi dīvyati || 84 ||
pūrṇimāyāṃ ca saṃprāptaḥ sa vai citrarathapriyaḥ ||
vaiśākhasyāsite pakṣe cāṣṭamī cādya maṃgalā ||
vadhaṃ kuru nṛpaśreṣṭha dehalīṃ gaṃtumarhasi || 85 ||
iti śrutvā mahīrājo lakṣasainyasamanvitaḥ ||
gṛhītvā daṃpatī śīghraṃ dehalīnagaraṃ yayau || 86 ||
vaiśākhyāṃ sukhajātāyāṃ sukalonāma vīryavān ||
gaṃdharvo daśa sāhasrai rurodha nagaraṃ ruṣā || 87 ||
nagarācca bahirjātā ye śūrā madavihvalāḥ ||
hatvā tānsukalaḥ śīghraṃ rājñe duḥkhaṃ cakāra ha || 88 ||
bhayabhīto mahīrājo dhyātvā sarvamayīṃ śivām ||
suṣvāpa niśi śuddhātmā tuṣṭābhūjjagadaṃbikā || 89 ||
kṛṣṇāṃśādīnbodhayitvā taiśca sārdhaṃ samāgamat ||
teṣāṃ cāsīnmahadyuddhaṃ gaṃdharveṇa tadāhnikam|| 3.3.31.90 ||
balakhāniśca balavāñchatagaṃdharvamuttamam ||
tridināṃte ca saṃhatya sukhakhānistathaiva ca || 91 |||
sukalaśca tadā kruddho gāṃdharvīṃ ca sasarja ha ||
bahudhā te hi gaṃdharvāstaiśca sārddhaṃ samārudhan || 92 ||
bhayabhītāstadā sarve rāmāṃśaṃ śaraṇaṃ yayuḥ ||
āhlādaśca prasannātmā śāradāṃ sarvamaṃgalām || 93 ||
divāsūktena tuṣṭāva tadā prādurabhūcchivā| ||
gaṃdharvānmohayitvāśu drāvayāmāsa śāradā || 94 ||
parājite ca gaṃdharve kṛṣṇāṃśo janamohanaḥ ||
mahīrājamupāgamya koṭisvarṇaṃ gṛhītavān || 95 ||
ṣoḍaśābde ca kṛṣṇāṃśe saṃprāpte devipūjake ||
mārgamāsaṃ tu saṃprāpte mardanaśca vivāhitaḥ || 96 ||
|| sūta uvāca || ||
puṃḍradeśe mahārājo nāgavarmā mahābalaḥ ||
babhūva takṣakaparo dharmavāñjagatītale |||1 || 97 ||
patnī nāgavatī tasya takṣakasya sutā śubhā ||
pituḥ śāpena sañjātā kaliṃgādhipateḥ sutā || 98 ||
daśaiva tanayāścāsankanyā tasya śubhānanā ||
suvelā nāma vikhyātā rūpayauvanaśālinī || 99 ||
purohitaṃ samāhūya mahīrājāya praiṣayat ||
sa gatvā kathayitvāgre mardano vīrato mayā || 3.3.31.100 ||
mahīrājastu tacchrutvā trilakṣabalasaṃyutaḥ ||
maṃgalaṃ kārayāmāsa gatvā nāgapure śubhe || 101 ||
suvelā pitaraṃ prāha dehi me nāgabhūṣaṇam||
vivāhaṃ hi kariṣyāmi nocetprāṇāṃstyajāmyaham || 102 ||
iti śrutvā nāgavarmā mahīrājāntamāyayau ||
suvelāyā abhiprāyaṃ varṇayāmāsa vistarāt || 103 ||
ityuktaḥ sa mahīrājo vismitobhūtsuduḥkhitaḥ ||
preṣayāmāsa vai patraṃ yatrāhlādādayaḥ sthitāḥ || 104 ||
iti jñātvā tadā.a.ahlādaḥ śūrapaṃcaśatāvṛtaḥ ||
kṛṣṇāṃśavatsajaissārddhaṃ dināṃte ca samāgamat || 105 ||
śatayojanagāminyo vājinyaśca dviyāmake ||||
sahasrayojanaṃ vīryaṃ tāsāṃ caiva dine niśi||106||
kalāṃśādudbhavā aśvā vājinā ca hareḥ svayam||
ratnāśvasya kalāṃśaśca kapoto haraṇībhavaḥ||107||
gāyatro yobhavadvājī kālacakrapravartakaḥ ||
tatkalāṃśātsamudbhūto ravidattaḥ papīhakaḥ ||
hariṇī nāma tacchaktiḥ kalāṃśādbhūmimāgatā || 108 |||
sukhakhāniḥ papīhastho balakhāniḥ kapotagaḥ||
āhlādaśca karālastho biṃdulastho hareḥ kalā ||109||
gatvā te tu mahīrājaṃ natvā tuṃgāsanāṃ yayuḥ ||
prasannaḥ sa mahīrājo vacanaṃ prāha namradhīḥ || 3.3.31.110 ||
mama putrāśca yuṣmābhistrayaḥ śūrā vivāhitāḥ ||
tathaiva mardanaṃ vīraṃ samudvāhya sukhī bhava ||111||
iti śrutvā sa āhlādo gatvā bhūtalamuttamam ||
rasātalaṃ ca vikhyātaṃ nāginīṃ prāha nirbhayaḥ || 112 ||
supto hi tava bhartā ca puṃḍarīkaḥ śubhānanaḥ ||
bodhayāśu mahārājñi nāgānāṃ no dayāṃ kuru ||113||
ityuktā sāha taṃ vīraṃ puṃḍarīkaśca matpatiḥ ||
ruṣāviṣṭaśca balavāndāhayecca vapustava || 114 ||
iti śrutvā vihasyāha tava bharturna no bhayam ||
ityevaṃ vacanaṃ kṛtvā padbhyāṃ pucchamatāḍayat || 115 ||
prabuddhaśca tadā rājā nāgānāṃ ca mahābalaḥ||
jvālāmālāṃ svadehācca janayāmāsa vīryavān||116||
dṛṣṭvā tadviṣamujjvālaṃ sa dhyātvā sarvamaṃgalām||
śamayāmāsa balavāndevīpūjanatatparaḥ ||117||
puṃḍarīkaḥ prasannātmā nāgabhūṣaṇamuttamam ||
āhlādāya dadau śīghraṃ sarvaśṛṅgārasaṃyutam || 118 ||
āhlādastu hayārūḍho mahīrājāya dattavān ||
vivāhaṃ kārayāmāsa vaivāhikavidhānataḥ ||
koṭisvarṇaṃ nṛpātprāptaṃ gṛhītvā śīghramāyayau || 119 ||
hayavidyāsamārūḍhāste hayā gehamāgatāḥ ||
jñeyāḥ paṃcaśataṃ sarve saśūrā gṛhamāyayuḥ || 3.3.31.120 ||
sūta uvāca ||
madradeśeṣu yaścāsīnmadrakeśo mahābalaḥ||
pañcābdaṃ pūjayāmāsa svargavaidyau surottamau || 121 ||
tayośca varadānena daśa putrā babhūvire ||
sutā kāntimatī jātā rūpayauvanaśālinī ||122||
sa mahīrājamāhūya trilakṣabalasaṃyutam ||
dadau kanyāṃ vidhānena madreśaḥ sūryavarmaṇe ||123||
navoḍhāṃ tu tadā patnīṃ sūryavarmā gṛhītavān||
svagehāya yayau śīghraṃ mahīrājo balaissaha || 124 ||
karburonāma māyāvī vibhīṣaṇasuto balī ||
rākṣasastatra saṃprāpto dṛṣṭvā kāṃtimatīṃ śubhām || 125 ||
madrakeśasya tanayāṃ divyaśobhāsamanvi tām ||
jahāra paśyatāṃ teṣāṃ sahyādrigirimāyayau || 126 ||
mahīrājastadā duḥkhī vilalāpa bhṛśaṃ muhuḥ ||
dehalīgehamāgamya dūtamāhūya satva ram || 127 ||
kṛṣṇāṃśaṃ preṣayāmāsa sa gatvā samavarṇayat ||
jñātvā te tu hayārūḍhāḥ śūrāḥ paṃcaśatāvṛtāḥ || 128 ||
sahyādrigirimāgamya kṛṣṇāṃ śaḥ karburaṃ prati ||
nirbhayo vacanaṃ prāha śṛṇu rākṣasasattama || 129 ||
vibhīṣaṇo bhaktarājastasya tvaṃ dayitaḥ sutaḥ ||
tasmāttvayā na kartavyaṃ pāpaṃ vaṃśa vināśanam ||
rāvaṇena purā sītā saṃhṛtā viditaṃ tava || 3.3.31.130 ||
iti śrutvā sa hovāca pureyaṃ dayitā priyā ||
mama gaṃdharvatanayā muniśāpānmahīṃ gatā || 131 ||
ato.ahaṃ tadviyogena tyaktvā laṃkāṃ mahāpurīm ||
madrakeśamahaṃ prāpya madrakeśabhayādaham ||
na jahāra priyāṃ ramyāṃ tatroṣitvā dinaṃ bahu || 132 ||
adya me vaśagā sābhūnnāmnā kāṃtimatī śubhā ||
jitvā māṃ ca gṛhāṇāśu samarthāśca vayaṃ sadā || 133 ||
iti śrutvā sa kṛṣṇāṃśaḥ khaḍgayuddhamacīkarat ||
saptarātreṇa taṃ jitvā labdhvā kāṃtimatīṃ śubhām ||
tadā ca dehalīṃ prāpya mahīrājāntamāyayau ||134||
koṭisvarṇaṃ dadau rājā kṛṣṇāṃśāya mahātmane ||
sa vīro baṃdhubhiḥ sārdhaṃ pramadāvanamāyayau ||135||
|| sūta uvāca || ||
paṭṭanākhyapure rājā nāmnā pūrṇāmalo balī ||
vasūnārādhāyāmāsa paṃcavarṣāntare mudā ||
tadā prasannāste devā dadustasmai varaṃ śubham || 136 ||
varadānācca sañjātā daśa putrā mahīpateḥ ||
vidyunmālā sutā jātā rūpayauvanaśālinī || 137
tadvivāhārthamāhūya mahīrājaṃ mahābalam ||
saptalakṣabalaiḥ sārddhaṃ tatputrāya sutāṃ dadau || 138 ||
mahīrājasuto bhīmaḥ patnīṃ prāpya manoramām ||
gehamāgamya taiḥ sārddhaṃ dehalīṃ harṣamāptavān || 139 ||
tadā paiśācadeśasthaḥ sahodaśca mahīpatiḥ ||
mlecchaiśca daśasāhasrairvidyunmālārthamudyataḥ ||3.3.31.140||
balidaityājñayā prāptaḥ kurukṣetraṃ śubhasthalam ||
bhittvā mūrtīḥ surāṇāṃ goraktaistīrthajalaṃ kṛtam || || 141 ||
patramālikhya balavānmahīrājāya dharmiṇe ||
svadūtaḥ preṣitastena śrutvā bhūpo.abravīdidam || 142 ||
bhavānmlecchapatī rājā vidyunmālārthamudyataḥ ||
māṃ śabdavedhinaṃ viddhi cauryadeśadhuraṃdharam || 143 ||
ityuktvā sa trilakṣaiśca kurukṣetramupāgataḥ ||
tayoścāsīnmahadyuddhamahorātraṃ bhayānakam || 144 ||
niśīthe samanuprāpte jyeṣṭhe māsi tamomaye ||
pātālādbalirāgatya daityāyutasamanvitaḥ || 145 ||
nṛpasainyaṃ jaghānāśu bhakṣayitvā punaḥ punaḥ ||
bhayabhītastadā rājā śāradāṃ śaraṇaṃ yayau || 146 ||
etasminnaṃtare devāḥ kṛṣṇāṃśādyā mahābalāḥ ||
kṣaṇamātreṇa saṃprāptāstadā padacarā mune || 147 ||
hatvā daityasahasrāṇi balidaityamupāyayuḥ ||
deśajau vatsajau vīrau devasiṃhastathaiva ca ||
svakhaḍgaistarpayāmāsa daityarājaṃ mahābalam || 148 ||
tadā prasanno balavāndaityarājo baliḥ svayam ||
varaṃ vṛṇuta tānāha te tu śrutvābruvanvacaḥ ||149||
āryadeśaṃ ca te daityā nāgacchantu tvayā saha||
mlecchadeśaṃ sadā prāpya bhakṣadhvaṃ mlecchadharmagān || 3.3.31.150 ||
iti śrutvā vaco ghoraṃ vipriyaṃ ca baliḥ svayam ||
kṛṣṇāṃśamudayaṃ gatvā tuṣṭāva parayā girā || 151 ||
tadā prasannaḥ kṛṣṇāṃśo vacanaṃ prāha nirbhayaḥ ||
yāvadahaṃ bhūmivāsī tāvattvaṃ gehamāvasa ||
tatpaścādbhūmimāgatya yathāyogyaṃ kuruṣva bhoḥ || 152 ||
iti tadvacanaṃ śrutvā sahodo nīlasaṃyutaḥ ||
paiśācaṃ deśamagamatpunaḥ prāpto rasātalam || 153 ||
bhūmirājaḥ prasannātmā koṭisvarṇaṃ dadau tadā ||
gajārūḍhāśca te paṃca saṃyayuśca mahāvatīm || 154 ||
|| sūta uvāca || ||
varddhano bhūmirājasya sutaḥ sarvebhya uttamaḥ||
paṃcamābdavayā bhūtvā śrīdaṃ tuṣṭāva bhaktitaḥ||
varṣāṃtare ca bhagavāndadau sarvaṃ śubhaṃ nidhim ||155||
tatsarvanidhibhāvena nṛpakośaḥ samantataḥ ||
pūrṇo babhūva kanakai rājarājaprabhāvataḥ ||156||
kiṃnarī nāma yā kanyā maṃkaṇasya prakīrtitā ||
kuberaśca dadau tasmai varddhanāya priyāya ca ||
iti te kathitaṃ sarvaṃ vivāhacaritaṃ mune || 157 ||
dhundhukāro mahāśūro lakṣasainyasamanvitaḥ ||
brahmānaṃdamupāgamya yuddhārthāya tamāhvayat|| 158 ||
ekatriṃśābdake prāpte kṛṣṇāṃśe balavattare ||
ekākī malanāputro dṛṣṭvā sainyamupasthitam ||
brahmāstraṃ cāpa ādhāya cārdhasainyamadāhayat || 159 ||
paṃcāyutāśca te śūrā bhayabhītā diśo gatāḥ ||
dhundhukāro raṇaṃ tvaktvā bhūmirājamupāgamat || 3.3.31.160 ||
mahīrājastadā duḥkhī bhayabhītaḥ samaṃtataḥ ||
mahīpatiṃ samāhūya candrabhaṭṭaṃ ca so.abravīt || 161 ||
kathaṃ jayo me bhavitā tatsarvaṃ maṃtrayāśu vai ||
mahīpatistadā prāha śṛṇu bhūpaśiromaṇe || || 162 ||
kṛtvā nārīmayaṃ veṣaṃ cāmuṇḍaṃ balaśālinam ||
velāṃ matvā ca taddolāṃ brahmānaṃdāya cārpaya || 163 ||
catvāraste sutāḥ śūrā dhuṃdhukāreṇa saṃyutā ||
chadmanā ca svaśastraiśca ghātayeyustamūrjitāḥ || 164 ||
iti śrutvā mahīrājo brahmānaṃdāya harṣitaḥ ||
tathā kṛtvā dadau dolāṃ paṃcaśūraiśca pālitām || 165 ||
sāyaṃkāle tu saṃprāpte māghaśuklāṣṭamīdine ||
velāvaṃśaśca cāmuṇḍo brahmānaṃdamupāyayau || 166 ||
chadmanā ca triśūlaṃ ca balātkṛtvā ripūdare ||
ruroda balavāñchūraste tu śūrāḥ samāgatāḥ || 167 ||
tārako hṛdi taṃ bāṇaiḥ sūryavarmā ca tomaraiḥ ||
bhīmaśca gadayā cātra varddhanaśca tadāsinā ||
dhuṃdhukāraśca bhallena jaghāna ripumūrddhani || 168 ||
mūrchitaḥ patito bhūmau bahmānaṃdo mahābalaḥ ||
mahadvraṇayutastatra svakhaṅgaṃ ca samādadat || 169 ||
bhīmasya ca śiraḥ kāyādvarddhanasya tathaiva ca ||
chittvā tathaiva bhūmadhye sūryavarmāṇamāgataṃḥ || 3.3.31.170 ||
tārako dhuṃdhukāraśca cāmu ṇḍaśca tathaiva ca ||
brahmānaṃdaṃ tadā tyaktvā mahīrājāntamāyayau || 171 ||
hateṣu teṣu putreṣu mahīrājo bhayāturaḥ ||
velāpārśvamupāgamya ruroda bahu duḥkhitaḥ || 172 ||
iti śrutvā tadā velā dolāmāruhya satvaram ||
brahmānaṃdaṃ yayau śīghraṃ mūrcchitaṃ taṃ dadarśa ha || 173 ||
kaniṣṭhāmṛtabhāvena velāyā balavāṃstadā ||
utthāya rudatīṃ nārīṃ dadarśa rucirānvitām || 174 ||
kā tvaṃ kasya sutā ramyā saṃgrāme māmupasthitā ||
jalaṃ dehi mahā subhūrvacanaṃ kuru supriyam || 175 ||
iti śrutvā tadā velā jalaṃ dattvā śucānvitā ||
vacanaṃ prāha vai rātrau śṛṇu tvaṃ malanāsuta || 176 ||
velā nāma mahībhartuḥ sutāhaṃ tvāmupasthitā ||
matpatiśca bhavāndhīraśchadmanā vaṃcakairhataḥ ||
jīvanaṃ kuru rājeṃdra bhuṃkṣva bhogānmayā saha || 177 ||
ityuktaḥ sa tu tāmāha kalikāle samāgate ||
jīvanānmaraṇaṃ śreṣṭhaṃ tasmānmadvacanaṃ kuru || 178 ||
harināgaramāruhya mayā sārddhaṃ śubhānane ||
gatvā tīrthāni ramyāṇi saṃtyajāmi kalevaram||179||
itpuktvā tau samāruhya pūrve ca kapilāntikam||
gatvā snātvā ca vidhivattatodhye jagmaturmudā||3.3.31.180||
pṛthakpṛthaksutārthāni snātvā dattvā ca .jagmatuḥ ||
dakṣiṇe setubaṃdhānte paścime dvārikāmanu || 181 ||
uttare badarīsthāne snātvā tīrthāni jagmatuḥ ||
gaṃdhamādanamāgatya brahmānaṃdo mahābalaḥ || 182 ||
velāmuvāca vacanaṃ bhādraśuklāṣṭamīdine ||
dehaṃ tyajāmi bho rājñi tārakaṃ jahi bhūtale ||183||
iti śrutvā tu sā prāha svāminmadvacanaṃ kuru ||
kurukṣetraṃ mayā sārddhaṃ bhavānvai gaṃtumarhati ||184||
sthitvā tatra samasvānto bhaja tvaṃ sarvamaṃgalām ||
ahaṃ mahāvatīṃ prāpya punarvai dehalīṃ prati || 185 ||
tārakaṃ ca tathā hatvā tvatsamīpaṃ vrajāmyaham ||
ityuktaḥ sa tathetyuktvā brahmadhyānaparo.abhavat || 186 ||
iti śrībhaviṣye mahāpurāṇe pratisargaparvaṇi caturyugakhaṃḍāparaparyāye kaliyugīyetihāsasamuccaye ekatriṃ śo.adhyāyaḥ || 31 |||5 ||
|| sūta uvāca || ||
dvātriṃśābde ca kṛṣṇāṃśe saṃprāpte yogarūpiṇī ||
velā nāma śubhā nārī harināgarasaṃsthitā ||
mahāvatīṃ samāgamya sabhāyāṃ tatra cāviśat || 1 ||
etasminnaṃtare prāptāḥ kṛṣṇāṃśādyā mahābalāḥ ||
natvā parimalaṃ bhūpaṃ velā vacanamabravīt || 2 ||
mahīpatiṃ priyaṃ matvā kṛṣṇāṃśaṃ nṛpa duṣpriyam ||
tvayā me ghātito bhartā brahmānaṃdo mahābalaḥ || 3 || mahīrājasutairdhūrtaistārakādyairmahābalaiḥ ||
nārīveṣaṃ ca cāmuṇḍo dhuṃdhukāreṇa kāritaḥ || 4 ||
svāminaṃ prati cāgamya te jagmuśchadmanā priyam ||
kurukṣetraṃ sthitaḥ svāmī mahatyā mūrchayānvitaḥ ||
tasmādyūyaṃ mayā sārddhaṃ gaṃtumarhatha taṃ prati || 5 ||
iti ghoratamaṃ vākyaṃ śrutvā sarve śucānvitāḥ ||
dhigbhūpatiṃ ca malanāṃ tābhyāṃ no ghātitaḥ sakhā || 6 ||
ityuktvoccaiśca ruruduḥ kṛṣṇāṃśādyā mahābalāḥ ||
patrāṇi preṣayāmāsuḥ svakīyānbhūpatī nprati || 7 ||
krodhayuktā tadā velā likhitvā patramulbaṇam ||
mahīrājāya saṃpreṣya malanāgehamāgamat || 8 ||
tatpatraṃ ca mahīrājo vācayitvā vidhānataḥ ||
jñātvā tatkāraṇaṃ sarvaṃ tanniśamya viśāmpatiḥ || 9 ||
cintākalevaraṃ prāpya sukhanidrāṃ vyanāśayat ||
āhūya bhūpatīnsarvānghorayuddhonmukho.abhavat || 3.3.32.10 ||
caturviṃśatilakṣaiśca śūrairbhūpasamanvitaiḥ ||
kurukṣetraṃ yayau śīghraṃ dhṛtarāṣṭrāṃśasaṃbhavaḥ || 11 ||
tathā parimalo bhūpo lakṣaṣoḍaśasainyapaḥ ||
drupadāṃśo yayau śīghraṃ velayā svakulaiḥ saha || 12 ||
syamantapaṃcake tīrthe śibirāṇi cakāra ha ||
brahmānaṃdaḥ sthito yatra samādhidhyānatatparaḥ || 13 ||
gaṃgākūle ca te sarve kauravāṃśā mahābalāḥ ||
śibirāṇi vicitrāṇi cakruste vijayaiṣiṇaḥ ||14||
kṛtvā te kārtikīsnānaṃ dattvā dānānyanekaśaḥ ||
mārgakṛṣṇadvitīyāyāṃ yuddhabhūmimupāyayuḥ || 15 ||
viṣvaksenīyabhūpālo laharastatra cāgataḥ ||
kauravāṃśāśca tatputrāḥ ṣoḍaśaiva mahābalāḥ ||
pūrvajanmani yannāma tannāmnā praśritā iha || 16 ||
dussaho duśśalaścaiva jalasaṃdhaḥ samaḥ sahaḥ ||
viṃdastathānuviṃdaśca subāhurduṣpradharṣaṇaḥ || 17 ||
durmarṣaṇaśca duṣkarṇaḥ somakīrtiranūdaraḥ ||
śalaḥ sattvo vivitsuśca kramājjñeyā mahābalāḥ || 18 ||
tomarānvayabhūpālo bāhlīkapatirāgataḥ ||
trilakṣaiśca tathā sainyaiḥ saptaputraiśca bhūpatiḥ || 19 ||
citropacitrau citrākṣaścāruścitraḥ śarāsanaḥ ||
sulocanaḥ savarṇaśca pūrvajanmani kauravāḥ || 3.3.32.20 ||
teṣāmaṃśāḥ kramājjātā abhinaṃdanadehajāḥ ||
mahānaṃdaśca naṃdaśca parānaṃdopanaṃdakau ||
sunaṃdaśca surānandaḥ pranaṃdaḥ kauravāṃśakaḥ || 21 ||
nṛpaḥ pariharavaṃśīyo māyāvarmā mahābalī ||
lakṣa sainyayutaḥ prāpto daśaputrasamanvitaḥ || 22 ||
durmado durvigāhaśca naṃdaśca vikaṭānanaḥ ||
citravarmā suvarmā ca sudurmocana eva ca || 23 ||
ūrṇanābhaḥ sunābhaśca copanaṃdaśca kauravāḥ ||
teṣāmaṃśāḥ kramājjātāḥ sutā aṃgapateḥ smṛtāḥ 24 ||
mattaḥ pramatta unmattaḥ sumatto durmadastathā||
durmukho durdaro vāyuḥ suratho virathaḥ kramāt || 25 ||
śuklavaṃśīyabhūpālo mūlavarmā samāgataḥ ||
lakṣasainyaiśca balavāndaśaputrasamanvitaḥ || 26 ||
ayobāhurmahābāhuścitrāṃgaścitrakuṇḍalaḥ ||
citrāyudho niṣaṃgī ca pāśī vṛndārakastathā || 27 ||
dṛḍhavarmā dṛḍhakṣatraḥ pūrvajanmani kauravāḥ ||
teṣāmaṃśā mahīṃ jātā gṛhe te mūlavarmaṇaḥ || 28 ||
balaśca prabalaścaiva subalo balavānbalī ||
sumūlaśca mahāmūlo durgo bhīmo bhayaṃkaraḥ || 29 ||
kaikayaścaṃdravaṃśīyo lakṣasainyasamanvitaḥ ||
daśaputrānvitaḥ prāptaḥ kurukṣetre mahā raṇe || 3.3.32.30 ||
bhīmavego bhīmabalo balākī balavarddhanaḥ ||
ugrāyudho daṃḍadharo dṛḍhasaṃdho mahīdharaḥ ||31||
jarāsaṃdhaḥ satyasaṃdhaḥ pūrvajanmani kauravāḥ ||
teṣāmaṃśāḥ samudbhūtāḥ kaikayasya gṛhe śubhe || 32 ||
kāmaḥ prakāmaḥ saṃkāmo niṣkāmo nirapatrapaḥ ||
jayaśca vijayaścaiva jayaṃto jayavāñjayaḥ || 33 ||
nāgavaṃśīyabhūpālo nāgavarmā samāgataḥ ||
lakṣasenānvitaḥ prāpto daśaputrasamanvitaḥ ||34||
pūrvajanmani yannāmnā tannāmnā kauravā bhuvi||
puṃḍradeśapateḥ putrā jātā daśa śivājñayā ||35||
ugraśravā ugrasenaḥ senānīrduṣparāyaṇaḥ||
aparājitaḥ kuṇḍaśāyī viśālākṣo durādharaḥ||36||
dṛḍhahastaḥ suhastaśca sutāste nāgavarmaṇaḥ || 37 ||
madrakeśaḥ samāyātastomarānvayasaṃbhavaḥ ||
lakṣasainyairyuto rājā daśaputrasamanvitaḥ || 38 ||
vātavegaḥ suvarcāśca nāgadaṃtograyājakaḥ ||
ādiketuśca vakśī ca kavacī krātha eva ca || 39 ||
kuṇḍaśca kuṇḍadhāraśca kauravāḥ pūrvajanmani ||
tannāmnā bhuvi vai jātā madra keśasya maṃdire || 3.3.32.40 ||
nṛpaḥ śārdūlavaṃśīyau lakṣasainyasamanvitaḥ ||
pūrṇāmalo māgadheśo daśaputrānvito yayau || 41 ||
vīrabāhurbhīmarathaścograścaiva dhanurdharaḥ||
raudrakarmā dṛḍharatho.alolupaścābhayastathā||42||
anādhṛṣṭaḥ kuṇḍabhedī kauravāḥ pūrvajanmani||
pūrṇāmalasya vai gehe tannāmnā bhuvi saṃbhava||43||
maṃkaṇaḥ kiṃnaro nāma rūpadeśe mahīpatiḥ ||
cīnadeśātpare pāre rūmadeśaḥ smṛto budhaiḥ ||
naraḥ kinnarajātīyo vasati priyadarśanaḥ || 44 ||
maṃkaṇaśca tadā prāptaḥ kinnarāyutasaṃyutaḥ ||
aṣṭaputrānvitaḥ prāpto yatra sarvanṛpāḥ sthitāḥ || 45 ||
virāvī prathamaścaiva pramāthī dīrgharomakaḥ ||
dīrghabāhurmahābāhurvyūḍhorāḥ kanakadhvajaḥ || 46 ||
pūrvajanmani yannāmnā tannāmnā kinnarā bhuvi ||
virajoṃśaśca yo jāto maṃkaṇo nāma kinnaraḥ ||47||
netrasiṃhaḥ samāyāto lakṣasainyasamanvitaḥ ||
śalyāṃśaḥ sa tu vijñeyaḥ śārdūlānvayasaṃbhavaḥ || 48 ||
tadā gajapatī rājā lakṣasainyasamanvitaḥ||
saṃprāptaḥ śakuneraṃśastyaktvā gehe svaputrakān ||49||
mayūradhvaja evāpi lakṣasainyasamanvitaḥ ||
makaraṃdaṃ gṛhe tyaktvā virāṭāṃśaḥ samāgataḥ || 3.3.32.50 ||
vīrasenaḥ samāyātaḥ kāmasenasamanvitaḥ ||
lakṣasenānvitastatra cograsenāṃśasaṃbhavaḥ ||51||
lakṣaṇaśca samāyātaḥ saptalakṣabalairyutaḥ ||
saṃtyajya padminīṃ nārīṃ mahā kaṣṭena bhūpatiḥ ||52||
tālano dhānyapālaśca lallasiṃhastathaiva ca ||
bhīmasyāṃśo yuyutsośca kuṃtibhojasya vai kramāt ||53 ||
āhlādaśca samāyātaḥ kṛṣṇāṃśena samanvitaḥ ||
jayantena ca vai vīro lakṣasainyānvito balī || 54 ||
jagannāyaka evāpi śūrāyutasamanvitaḥ ||
saṃprāpto bhagadattāṃśo gautamānvayasaṃbhavaḥ || 55 ||
anye ca kṣudrabhūpāśca sahasrāḍhyāḥ pṛthakpṛthak ||
kurukṣetraṃ paraṃ sthānaṃ saṃyayurmadavihvalāḥ || 56 ||
mūlavarmā ca nṛpatiḥ saputro lakṣasainyapaḥ ||
nṛpaṃ parimalaṃ prāpya saṃyukto dehalīpateḥ || 57 ||
kaikayo lakṣasenāḍhyaḥ saputro nṛpatiḥ svayam ||
nṛpaṃ parimalaṃ prāpya sa yuddhārthamupasthitaḥ || 58 ||
netrasiṃhaśca nṛpatiḥ sa vīro lakṣasainyapaḥ ||
mayūradhvaja evāpi lakṣapaḥ śaśivaṃśinam || 59 ||
vīrasenaśca lakṣāḍhyaḥ saputraścāṃdripakṣagaḥ ||
lakṣaṇaḥ saptalakṣāḍhyo yuddhārthaṃ samupasthitaḥ || 3.3.32.60 ||
āhlādo lakṣasainyāḍhyaḥ pakṣagaścaṃdravaṃśinaḥ ||
dvilakṣasaṃyuto rājā candravaṃśo raṇonmukhaḥ ||
evaṃ ṣoḍaśalakṣāḍhyaḥ sthitaḥ parimalo raṇe || 61 ||
laharo bhūpatiśreṣṭho lakṣapaḥ putrasaṃyutaḥ ||
mahīrājamupāgamya yuddhārthaṃ samupasthitaḥ || 62 ||
abhinandana evāpi saputro lakṣasainyapaḥ ||
māyāvarmā ca nṛpatiḥ saputro lakṣasainyapaḥ || 63 ||
nāgavarmā samāyātaḥ saputro lakṣasainyapaḥ ||
madrakeśaḥ saputraśca lakṣasainyo raṇonmukhaḥ || 64 ||
pūrṇāmalaḥ saputraśca lakṣapaścaiva pakṣagaḥ ||
maṃkaṇaḥ kinnaro nāma saputrastatra saṃsthitaḥ || 65 ||
gajarājaḥ samāyāto mahīrājaṃ hi lakṣapaḥ ||
dhuṃdhukāraḥ samāyātaḥ pañcalakṣapatiḥ svayam || 66 ||
putraḥ kṛṣṇakumārasya bhagadattaḥ samāgataḥ ||
trilakṣabalasaṃyukto mahīrājaṃ mahīpatim || 67 ||
balavāhanaputraśca daśagopālasaṃsthitaḥ ||
aṃgadastatra saṃprāptaḥ sāyuto devakī priyaḥ ||
mahīrājamupāgamya yuddhārthaṃ samupasthitaḥ ||68||
kaliṃgaśca nṛpaḥ prāptastrikoṇaśca tathaiva ca ||
śrīpatiśca tathā rājā śrītāraśca tathā gataḥ || || 69 ||
mukundaśca suketuśca ruhilo guhilastathā ||
induvāraśca valavāñjayaṃtaśca tathāvidhaḥ ||
sarve daśasahasrāḍhyā mahīrājamupasthitāḥ || 3.3.32.70 ||
mahīrājasya pakṣe tu sahasraṃ kṣudrabhūmipāḥ ||
te tu sāhasrasenāḍhyā mahīrājamupasthitāḥ || 71 ||
teṣāṃ madhye ca vai bhūpāndviśatāndehalīṃ prati ||
sasainyānpreṣayāmāsa rāṣṭrarakṣaṇahetave ||
evaṃ sa dehalīrājaścaturviṃśatilakṣapaḥ || 72 ||
yuddhamaṣṭādaśāhāni sañjātaṃ sarvasaṃkṣayam ||
śṛṇu yuddhakathāṃ ramyāṃ bhṛguvarya suvistarāt || 73 ||
mārgakṛṣṇadvitīyāyāṃ mahīrājo mahābalaḥ ||
āhūya laharaṃ bhūpaṃ vacanaṃ prāha nirbhayaḥ ||9||
bhavānsaputraḥ senāḍhyo dhuṃdhukāreṇa rakṣitaḥ ||
cāmuṇḍena yuto yuddhe gantumarhati sattama ||
iti śrutvā yayau śīghraṃ kurukṣetre mahāraṇe || 75 ||
tadā parimalo rājā mayūradhvajameva hi ||
samāhūya vacaḥ prāha śṛṇu pārthivasattama || 76 ||
kṛṣṇāṃśena jayaṃtena devasiṃhena rakṣitaḥ ||
sa bhavā~mllakṣasainyāḍhyo gaṃtumarhati vai raṇe || || 77 ||
iti śrutvā tu vacanaṃ mayūradhvaja eva hi ||
lakṣasainyānvitaḥ prāpto laharaṃ nṛpatiṃ prati || 78 ||
tayoścāsīnmahadyuddhaṃ senayorubhayo raṇe ||
senā tu lakṣavīrasya tatra yuddhe prakīrtitā || 79 ||
eko ratho gajāstatra jñeyāḥ pañcaśataṃ raṇe||
hayāśca pañcasāhasrā pattayastadgaṇā daśa ||
ete sainyā narā jñeyā sainyapāṃśca śṛṇuṣva bhoḥ ||3.3.32.80||
daśānāṃ paccarāṇāṃ ca patirnāmnā sa pattipaḥ ||
paṃcānāṃ ca hayānāṃ ca patirnāmnā sa gulmapaḥ||81||
paṃcānāṃ ca gajānāṃ ca patirnāmnā gajādhipaḥ ||
etaiḥ sārddhaṃ rathī jñeyo raṇe.asmindāruṇe kalau ||82||
uṣṭrārūḍhāḥ smṛtā dūtāścatvāriṃśacca tadbale ||
śataghnyastatra sāhasrāsteṣāṃ madhye pṛthakpṛthak ||
ṣaḍtriṃśadvai padacarāsteṣāṃ karmāṇi me śṛṇu || 83 ||
daśa golakadātāro daśatatpuṣṭikārakāḥ ||
daśa cārdrakarāstāṃ vai trayaste vahnidāyinaḥ ||
trayo dṛṣṭikarā jñeyāstriyāmeṣu pṛthakpṛthak || 84 ||
śeṣāḥ śūdrāstu senānāṃ śūrakṛtyaparāyaṇāḥ ||
evaṃ ca lakṣavīrāṇāṃ senā tatra prakīrtitā || 85 ||
tatrāsīttumulaṃ yuddhaṃ dharmeṇa ca samantataḥ ||
prātaḥkālātsamārabhya madhyāhnaṃ sainyayordvayoḥ || 86 ||
tatpaścādyāmamātreṇa sainyapā yuddhamāgatāḥ ||
tatpaścācca mahāśūrā dhuṃdhukārādayo balāḥ ||87||
yāmamātraṃ ca yuddhāya saṃsthitā raṇamūrdhani ||
cāmuṇḍena ca kṛṣṇāṃśo dhuṃdhukāreṇa cendulaḥ || 88 ||
bhagadattena vai devaḥ kṛtavānyuddhamuttamam ||
sāyaṃkāle tu saṃprāpte sarve śūrāḥ kṣayaṃ gatāḥ || 89 ||
kṛṣṇāṃśastatra cāmuṇḍaṃ jitvā tu laharātmajān ||
ṣoḍaśaiva jaghānāśu ghaṭīmātreṇa vīryavān ||
dadhmau śaṃkhaṃ prasannātmā lakṣaṇāntamupāyayau ||3.3.32.90||
cāmuṃḍo dhuṃdhukāraśca bhagadatto yutaḥ śataiḥ ||
mahīrājamupāgamya suṣupurniśi nirbhayāḥ || 91 ||
iṃdulo devasiṃhaśca sahasraiḥ saṃyutau mudā ||
gatvā parimalaṃ bhūpaṃ rātrau suṣupatustadā || 92 ||
prātaḥkāle tu saṃprāpte tṛtīyāyāṃ bhayaṃkare ||
mahīrājastadāhūya nṛpaṃ gajapatiṃ balī || 93 ||
vacanaṃ prāha bho rāja~mstvaṃ trivīraiḥ surakṣitaḥ ||
svakīyairlakṣasainyaiśca gaṃtumarhasi vai raṇe ||94 ||
tadā parimalo bhūpo netrasiṃhaṃ mahīpatim ||
yuddhāyājñāpayāmāsa kṛṣṇāṃśādyaiḥ surakṣitam || 95 ||
tayoścāsīnmahayuddhaṃ senayorubhayoḥ kramāt ||
hayā hayaiḥ kṣayaṃ jagmurgajāścaiva tathā gajaiḥ ||
paccarāḥ paccaraiḥ sārddhaṃ śataghnyaśca śataghnibhiḥ ||96||
aparāhne muniśreṣṭha netrasiṃho mahābalaḥ ||
mahāgajaṃ gajapatiṃ gatvā yuddhamacīkarat ||97||
parasparaṃ ca virathau saṃchinnadhanuṣau tadā ||
khaḍgahastau mahīṃ prāpya cakratū raṇamulbaṇam ||
anyonyena vadhaṃ kṛtvā svargalokamupāgatau || 98 ||
indulastaṃ tu cāmuṃḍaṃ devo vai dhuṃdhukaṃ tathā ||
kṛṣṇāṃśo bhagadattaṃ ca jitvā rājānamāyayuḥ || 99 ||
śeṣaiḥ paṃcaśataiḥ śūraistaiḥ sārddhaṃ lakṣaṇaṃ prati ||
parājitāśca te sarve sahasraiḥ sahitā yayuḥ || 3.3.32.100||
prātaḥkāle tu saṃprāpte mahīrājo mahābalaḥ ||
māyāvarmāṇamāhūya vacanaṃ prāha nirbhayaḥ || 101 ||
bhavāndaśasutairvīrairlakṣasainyaiśca saṃyutaḥ ||
sarvaśatruvināśāya gaṃtumarhati sattama ||
iti śrutvā sa nṛpatirvādyānsaṃvādya cāyayau || 102 ||
dṛṣṭvā parimalo bhūpo māyāvarmāṇamāgatam ||
jagannāyakamāhūya vacanaṃ prāha nirbhayaḥ || 103 ||
bhavāndaśasahasraiśca sārddhaṃ taistribhiranvitaḥ ||
gantumarhati yuddhāya śīghraṃ madvijayaṃ kuru || 104 ||
iti śrutvā yayau śīghraṃ senayorubhayormahat ||
yuddhaṃ cāsīnmuniśreṣṭha yāmamātraṃ bhayānakam || 105 ||
hatāste daśasāhasrā kṛṣṇāṃśādyaiḥ surakṣitāḥ || śaṃ
khāndadhmuśca te sarve cāṃgadeśanivāsinaḥ || 106 ||
etasminnaṃtare dhīrāḥ kṛṣṇāṃśādyāsturīyakāḥ ||
yāmamātreṇa saṃjaghnurlakṣasainyaṃ ripostadā || 107 ||
aparāhṇe mahārājo māyāvarmā sutaiḥ saha||
kṛṣṇāṃśaṃ devasiṃhaṃ ca saṃprāpto jaganāyakam ||1 08||
athāṅgabhūpaṃ daśaputrayuktaṃ kṛṣṇāṃśa evāśu jagāma śīghram ||
hayasthito vīravaraḥ pramāthī kalaikajāto madhusūdanasya ||1 09||
tatoṃgabhūpastribhireva bāṇairatāḍayanmūrdhni ca pārśvayorvai ||
amarṣa māṇo balavānmahīpatirdaṃḍairhataḥ kāla ivāśu sarpaḥ|| || 3.3.32.110 ||
hayaṃ samuḍḍīya su puṣkarāntaṃ tatobhyagāttaṃ nṛpatiṃ rathastham ||
hayasya pātairvirathī cakāra sa eva bhūpo.asimupādadhānaḥ || 111 ||
svenāsinā biṃdulamaṃgaśalyaṃ kṛtvā sa kṛṣṇāṃśamuvāca vākyam ||
kallolamāyāttava nāśanāya tvayā jitā bhūpatayaḥ pradhānāḥ ||1 12||
tadaiva kīrtirbhavitā mamāśu hatvā bhavaṃtaṃ ca sukhī bhavāmi ||
ityuktavantaṃ nṛpatiṃ mahāntaṃ svenāsinā tasya śiro jahāra || 113 ||
hate.aṅgabhūpe daśa tasya putrāstameva jagmuryudhi kauravāṃśāḥ ||
tānāgatāniṃdula eva paṃca jaghāna bāṇaistu tadā samanyuḥ || 114||
ubhau ca devastu jaghāna tatra bhallena siddhena nṛpātmajau ca||
jyeṣṭhaṃ sutaṃ gautama eva hatvā dvau yau sa kṛṣṇāṃśa upājaghāna||115||
śaṃkhānpradadhmū rucirānanāste pradoṣakāle śibirāṇi jagmuḥ||
śramānvitāste suṣupurniśāyāṃ prātaḥ samutthāya svakarma kṛtvā||116||
gatvā sabhāyāṃ nṛpatiṃ praṇamya vākyaṃ samūcuḥ śṛṇu caṃdravaṃśin||
adyaiva senāpatirasti ko vai cājñāpayāsmānnṛpa tasya guptyai||117||
śrutvāha bhūpodya tu vīrasenaḥ sakāmasenaḥ svabalaiḥ sametaḥ||
raṇaṃ kariṣyatyacireṇa vīrāstasmātsurakṣadhvamaribhya eva|| 118
sa vīraseno nṛpatiṃ praṇamya lakṣaiḥ svasainyairyudhi saṃjagāma||
tadā mahīrājanṛpaḥ pratāpī sa nāgavarmāṇamuvāca tāpī || 119 ||
raṇāya gacchāśu sutaiḥ sameto lakṣaiḥ svasainyairuta bhūpavarya ||
hatvā ripuṃ ghoratamaṃ hi vīraṃ patiṃ mahāntaṃ yudhi vīrasenam || 3.3.32.120 ||
ityuktavaṃtaṃ nṛpatiṃ praṇamya suvādayāmāsa tadā hi vīraḥ ||
tayorbabhūvāśu raṇo mahānvai susenayoḥ saṃkulayuddhakartroḥ || 121 ||
triyāmamātreṇa hatāśca sarve vimānamāruhya yayuśca nākam ||
hateṣu sarveṣu ca nāgavarmā suteṣu vai yādavabhūpamāha || 122 ||
bhavānvisainyaśca tathaiva cāhaṃ bhavānsaputraśca tathāhameva ||
saṃsmṛtya dharmaṃ kuru yuddhamāśu tato rathasthaḥ sudhanurgṛhītvā || 123 ||
bāṇaiśca bāṇānbhuvi tau ca chittvā babhūvastustau virathau nṛpāgryau ||
khaḍgena khaḍgaṃ ca tathaiva chittvā vimānamāruhya gatau hi nākam || 124 ||
sa kāmasenaḥ svaripośca  putrāñjaghāna bāṇaiśca tadāṣṭasaṃkhyān ||
jyeṣṭhau tadā kopasamanvitau taṃ gṛhītakhaḍgau ca samīyatuśca || 125 ||
ripoḥ śiro jahraturugravegī sa kāmasenaśca kabaṃdha eva ||
hatvā ripū tau ca tadā militvā svargaṃ yayuste ca vimānarūḍhāḥ || 126 ||
hateṣu sarveṣu tadā trayaste cāmuṃḍakādyā jaganāyakaṃ te ||
ruddhā sametāḥ svaśaraiḥ kaṭhorairjaghnustamaśvaṃ harināgaraṃ ca || 127 ||
sa divyavājī ca tadā svapakṣau prasāryya khenāśu ripuṃ jagāma ||
sa puṃdhukārasya gajaṃ vihatya cāmuṃḍakasyaiva gajaṃ vimardya ||128 ||
rathaṃ ca bhūmau bhagadattakasya vicūrṇya śīghraṃ ca nabho jagāma ||
pravādya śaṃkhaṃ jaganāyakaśca kṛṣṇāṃśamāgamya kathāṃ cakāra ||129||
niśāmuṣitvā jaganāyakādyāḥ prātaḥ samutthāya raṇaṃ prajagmuḥ ||
tadā mahīrāja utāśukā rī sa kinnareśaṃ kaṇakaṃ saputram ||3.3.32.130||
uvāca rājañchṛṇu kinnarāṇāṃ mahābalāste ripavo mamaite ||
vināśayāśu prabalārighātāndevairna sārddhaṃ yudhi vai manuṣyāḥ || 131 || ityuktavānmaṃkaṇabhūpatistu yayau saputro.ayutasainyapaśca ||
tamāgataṃ tatra vilokya rājā vīrānsvakīyāṃśca samādideśa ||132||
manorathastho jaganāyakaśca sa tālano vai vaḍavāṃ vigṛhya ||
karālasaṃsthaśca tadā jayanto vigṛhya cāpaṃ tarasā jagāma||133||
papīhakasthaśca sa rūpaṇo vai jagāma kṛṣṇāṃśasamanvitaśca ||
sa lallasiṃho gajamattasaṃsthaḥ sa dhānyapālo hayamāruroha || 134 ||
samaṃtataḥ kinnarasainyaghoraṃ vināśayāmāsurupāṃśukhaḍgaiḥ||
vinaśyamāne trisahasrasainye sa kinnareśastarasā jagāma ||135||
dhyātvā kuberaṃ ca gṛhītacāpo nabhogatastatra babhūva sūkṣmaḥ||136||
adṛśyamānaḥ svaśaraiḥ kaṭhorairvinardya sarvānhi nanarda ghoram ||
vilapyamāne ca samastaśūre jayanta evāśu jagāma śatruma || 137 ||
dhyātvā maheṃdraṃ kaṇakaṃ ca baddhvā kṛṣṇāṃśamāgamya padau nanāma ||
tadā tu te śatrusahasrasainye niśamya baddhaṃ kaṇakaṃ nijeṃdram || 138 ||
vinargha ghoraṃ rurudhuśca sarvānmāyā vino guhyakamastramūhuḥ ||
