dineṣu sapteṣu tathā niśāsu babhūva yuddhaṃ ca samaṃtatastaiḥ || 139 ||
śramānvitāḥ sapta mahāpravīrā hateṣu sarveṣu suṣupuśca vai yadā||
tadā kuberaṃ kaṇakaśca dhyātvā labdhvā varaṃ baṃdhanamāśu chittvā || 3.3.32.140 || suptānsamutthāya ca sapta śūrānniśīthakāle sa cakāra yuddham ||
jitvā ca tānṣaṭ sa varaprabhāvāttadeṃdulenaiva raṇaṃ cakāra || 141 ||
gṛhītakhaḍgau raṇaghoramattau hatvā tato vai bhuvi ceyatuśca ||
prajagmaturnākamupāntadevau saṃstūyamānau surasattamaiśca || 142 ||
tataḥ prabhāte vimale vijāte ruroda rāmāṃśa utālalāpa ||
pāpaiḥ kalāpaiḥ parīpīḍyamānaḥ kulānvitaḥ sarva yuto munīṃdra || 143 ||
sa paṃcaśabdaṃ gajamāruroha trilakṣasainyaistarasā jagāma ||
tadā mahīrāja utāha śṛṇvangacchadhvamadyaiva mayā sametāḥ || || 144 ||
svapaṃcalakṣaiḥ prabalaiśca śūraiḥ sārddhaṃ rurodhāśu ripośca senām ||
tayorbabhūvāśu raṇaḥ praghoro vinardatoryudanimittamāśu || 145 ||
triyāma mātreṇa hatāśca sarve dvayośca pakṣā balaśālinaśca ||
tadā mahīrāja utāyayau vai samaṃḍalīkaśca dhanurvigṛhya || 146 ||
sa dhuṃdhukāraśca tadājagāma ratha sthitaṃ lakṣaṇamugravīram ||
tadodayo vai bhagadattameva cāmuṃḍakaṃ bhīṣmakarājasūnuḥ || 147 ||
sa paṃcaśabdaṃ gajamāsthito vai gataḥ sa evāśu jagāma bhūpam ||
dhanurvigṛhyāśugamulbaṇaṃ ca nṛpasthitaścātha bhayaṃkaraṃ ca || 148 ||
gajaṃ pramattaṃ śivadattamugramāhlādahantāramuvāca vākyam ||
aye pramattāgragajeṃdra śūra jayaṃ ca me dehi śivapradatta || 149 ||
sa maṃḍalīko raṇadurmadaśca rāmāṃśa āhlāda iti prasiddhaḥ||
tasmācca māṃ rakṣa javena hastinmahābalātkāla rasācca vīrāt || 3.3.32.150 || ityevamukto nṛpatiṃ sa hastī vacastamāhāśu śṛṇuṣva rājan||
yāvadahaṃ vai tanujīvadhārī tāvadbhavāñchatrubhayaṃkaraśca||151||
ityuktavaṃtaṃ ca gajaṃ pramattaṃ sa paṃcaśabdaśca tadā svadaṃtaiḥ ||
mukhaṃ caturbhiśca vidārya śatrornanarda ghoraṃ sa maheṃdradattaḥ || 152 ||
sa rudradattaśca gajaḥ pramatto ruṣānvadhāvattarasā gajeṃdram ||
ripuṃ svapadbhyāṃ ca cakhāna kuṃbhaiḥ svatuṃḍadaṃḍena tudaṃ prakurvan || 153 ||
avāpa mūrchāṃ ca sa paṃcaśabdastadāśu bhūpaṃ prati maṃḍalīkaḥ ||
svatomareṇāṃgavraṇaṃ pradāya khaḍgena hatvā gajarājamugram ||
jagāma padbhyāṃ sa ripupramāthī yatra sthitaścendula ugradhanvā || || 154 ||
utthāpya putraṃ ca vilapyamānāṃ patnīṃ svakīyāṃ prati cājagāma ||
tadā pramattau ca gajau samūrchāṃ tyaktvā punaścakratureva yuddham || || 155 ||
sa lakṣaṇaḥ khaḍgavareṇa bāṇānripośca chittvā nijavaiṣṇavāstram ||
dadhāra cāpe ca sumaṃtrayitvā sadhuṃdhukāraṃ ca gajaṃ dadāha || 156 ||
hate ca tasminnijamukhyabaṃdhau sabhūmirājaśca gṛhītacāpaḥ ||
śareṇa raudreṇa ca lakṣaṇaṃ taṃ jaghāna tatrādibhayaṃkarasthaḥ || 157 ||
sa mūrchitaḥ śukla kuleṣu sūryastadodayo vai bhagadattameva ||
sumūrchayitvā ca jagāma śīghraṃ yatra sthito lakṣaṇa ekavīraḥ || 158 ||
bhayānvitastaṃ ca vilokya rājā javena dudrāva ca raktabījam ||
tadā sudevaṃ ca sa raktabījo jitvā tu kṛṣṇāṃśayutaṃ jagāma || 159 ||
bāṇena śīghraṃ sa ca mūrcchayitvā punaśca devaṃ ca sa mūrchayitvā ||
tadbaṃdhanāyodyata āśukārī sa lakṣaṇastatra tadā jagāma || 3.3.32.160 ||
pradhāya cāpe ca sa vaiṣṇavāstraṃ pracodayāmāsa ca raktabīje ||
tadā sa sāmantasuto balīyānraṇaṃ vihāyāśu vilokya saṃdhyām ||
bhayānvitaḥ svaiśca yuto yayau vai yatra sthitā bhūpatayaḥ sakopāḥ || 161 ||
vilokya śatruṃ ca sa ratnabhānoḥ suto yayau vai śibirāṇi yuktaḥ ||
niśāmya bhūpaḥ sa ca caṃdravaṃśī jayaṃ svakīyaṃ suṣupustu te vai ||
prātaśca kāle sa ca caṃdravaṃśī vilokya śuklānvayamāha bhūpam||162||
aye guà¥rjaradeśīya mūlavarmansutaiḥ saha||
lakṣasainyānvito bhūtvā gantumarhatu vai bhavān|| 163||
ityuktaḥ sa tu bhūpālo yuddhabhūmimupāyayau||
mahīrājājñayā prāpto nāmnā pūrṇāmalo balī|| 164||
daśaputrānvito yuddhe sainya lakṣeṇa saṃyutḥ||
tayoścāsīnmahadyuddhaṃ yāmadvayamupasthitam||165||
hateṣu teṣu sarveṣu tau nṛpau sasutairbalau ||
anonyena raṇaṃ kṛtvā yamaloka mupāgatau || 166 ||
mārgakṛṣṇacaturdaśyāṃ prabhāte vimale ravau ||
kaikayo lakṣasenāḍhyo dayāputrasamanvitaḥ ||
lakṣaṇānujñayā prāptastasminyudhi bhayānake || 167 ||
madrakeśastadā rājā daśaputrasamanvitaḥ ||
lakṣasainyānvitastatra yatra yuddhaṃ samanvabhūt||
parasparaṃ hatāḥ sarve dinānte kṣatriyā raṇe || 168 ||
punaḥ prabhāte vimale bhagadatto mahābalī ||
trilakṣabalasaṃyukto jagarjja raṇamūrddhani|| 169||
dṛṣṭvā taṃ lakṣaṇo vīrastrilakṣabalasaṃyutaḥ ||
cakāra tumulaṃ ghoraṃ senayā ca svakīyayā || 3.3.32.170 ||
aparāhṇe hatāḥ sarve sainikā nṛpayostadā ||
bhagadataḥ svayaṃ kruddho rathastho lakṣaṇaṃ yayau || 171 ||
lakṣaṇo rathamāruhya svapituḥ śatrujaṃ nṛpam ||
tribhirbāṇaiśca saṃtodya bhallena samatāḍayat || |172 ||
bhagadattastadā kruddho virathaṃ taṃ cakāra ha ||
kruddhavaṃtaṃ ripuṃ ghoraṃ lakṣaṇaḥ khaṅgapāṇikaḥ ||
hatvā hayāṃstathā sūtaṃ bhagadattamupāyayau || 173 ||
mardayitvā ca taccarma cchittvā varma tadudbhavam ||
tridhā cakāra balavānbhagadattaṃ ripossutam || 174 ||
saṃdhyākāle hate tasmi~mllakṣaṇastvarayānvitaḥ ||
ekākī śiviraṃ prāpto hastinyupari saṃsthitaḥ || 175 ||
bhagadatte hate tasminsa rājā krodhamūrchitaḥ ||
svakīyānsarvabhūpāṃśca cāmuṃḍena samanvitān ||
preṣayāmāsa yuddhāya mārge ca pratipaddine || 176 ||
aṃgadaśca kaliṃgaśca trikoṇaḥ śrīpatistathā ||
śrītāraśca mukuṃdañca ruhilo guhilastathā || 177 ||
suketurnava bhūpāste navāyutabalairyutāḥ ||
vādyāni vādayāmāsustasminyuddhamahotsave || 178 ||
dṛṣṭvā tā~mllakṣaṇo vīro rājabhiśca svakīyakaiḥ ||
sārddhaṃ jagāma yuddhāya tathā vyūhyāyudhadripūn || 179 ||
rudravarmā ca nṛpatiḥ śūrairdaśasahasrakaiḥ ||
aṃgadaṃ vairiṇaṃ matvā tena sārddhamayudhyata || 3.3.32.180 ||
kālīvarmā.ayutaissārdhaṃ kaliṃgaṃ pratyabudhyata ||
vīrasiṃho.ayutaissārddhaṃ trikoṇaṃ pratyayudhyata || 181 ||
tatonujaḥ pravīraśca śrīpatiṃ so.ayutaissaha ||
nṛpaḥ sūryo dharo vīro.ayutāḍhayo balavānraṇe ||
śrītāraṃ nṛpamāsādya mahadyuddhamacīkarat ||182||
vāmanoyutasaṃyukto mukuṃdaṃ prati so.agamat ||
gaṃgāsiṃhaśca balavānmahilaṃ prati sāyutaḥ ||183||
lallasiṃhoyutaissārddhaṃ guhilaṃ prati so.agamat ||
triśatāni tato bhūpāḥ sahasrāḍhyāḥ pṛthakpṛthak ||184||
kṣudrabhūpāḥ kṣudrabhūpāṃstriśatāni samāyayuḥ ||
anyonyena hatāḥ sarve kṛtvā yuddhaṃ bhayānakam|| 185 ||
cāmuṃḍastu tadā dṛṣṭvā mṛtakānsarvabhūpatīn ||
lakṣaṇāntamupāgamya mahadyuddhaṃ cakāra ha ||186|
lakṣaṇo raktabījaṃ taṃ jñātvā brāhmaṇasaṃmatam ||
vaiṣṇavāstraṃ tadā tasmai na dadau tena pīḍita||187||
sāyaṃkāle tu saṃprāpte lakṣaṇo hastinīsthitaḥ ||
ekākī śiviraṃ prāptaścāmuṃḍaṃ nṛpamāyayau || 188 ||
dvitīyāyāṃ prabhāte ca kṛṣṇāṃśo devasaṃyutaḥ ||
śūrairdaśasahasraiśca yuddhabhūmimupāyayau || 189 ||
tārakaśca sacāmuṃḍo dvilakṣabalasaṃyutaḥ ||
dviśataiśca tathā bhūpaiḥ sārddhaṃ yuddhamupasthitau||3.3.32.190||
puraskṛtya ,nṛpānsarvānsasainyau balavattarau ||
teṣāmanu sthitau yuddhe tatra jāto mahāraṇaḥ || 191 ||
yāmamātreṇa tau vīrau hatvā sarvamahīpatīn ||
lakṣasainyāṃstathā hatvā saṃsthitau śramakarṣitau||192||
cāmuṃḍastārako dhūrtaḥ saṃprāptau chidradarśinau ||
tābhyāṃ śramānvitābhyāṃ ca cakratustau samaṃ raṇam||193||
teṣāṃ triyāmamātreṇa saṃbabhūva mahānraṇaḥ ||
sāyaṃkāle tu saṃprāpte kṛṣṇāṃśaśca nirāyudhaḥ ||
talaprahāreṇa ripuṃ mūrcchayāmāsa vīryavān ||194||
etasminnaṃtare vīrastārako devasiṃhakam ||
hayaṃ manorathaṃ hatvā śaṃkhaśabdamathākarot || 195 ||
tacchabdātsa ca cāmuṃḍastyaktvā mūrchāṃ mahābalaḥ ||
kṛṣṇāṃśasya śiraḥ kāyādapahṛtya ca vegavān ||
tayorgṛhītvā śirasī mahīrājamupāyayau || 196 ||
mahīrājastu te dṛṣṭvā paramānaṃdanirbharaḥ ||
dattvā dānaṃ dvijātibhyo mahotsavamakārayat || 197 ||
lakṣaṇasya tadā sainye hāhāśabdo mahānabhūt ||
śrutvā kolāhalaṃ teṣāṃ jñātvā tau ca hatau nṛpaḥ ||
brahmānaṃdastadā mūrcchāṃ tyaktvā velāmuvāca ha || 198 ||
priye gaccha raṇaṃ śīghraṃ harināgaramāsthitā ||
mama veṣaṃ śubhaṃ kṛtvā tārakaṃ jahi mā ciram || 199 ||
iti śrutvā tu sā velā rāmāṃśena samanvitā ||
sahasraśūrasahitā yuddhabhūmimupāyayau || 3.3.32.200 ||
śrutvā sa lakṣaṇo vīrastālanena samanvitaḥ ||
sainyaiśca daśasāhasrairmahīrājamupāyayau ||201||
tṛtīyāyāṃ prabhāte ca tārako balavattaraḥ ||
brahmānaṃdaṃ ca taṃ matvā mahadyuddhamacī karat || 202 ||
raktabījaśca cāmuṃḍo rāmāṃśo balavattaraḥ ||
cakāra dāruṇaṃ yuddhaṃ tasminvīrasamāgame || 203 ||
yāmamātreṇa rāmāṃśo hatvā tasya mahāgajam ||
tacchastrāṇi tathā cchitvā mallayuddhamacīkarat || 204 ||
triyāmamātreṇa tadā sāyaṃkāle samāgate ||
mamaṃtha bhrātṛhantāraṃ sa ca vīro mamāra ha || 205 ||
tadā velā mahāśatruṃ tārakaṃ balavattaram ||
chittvāstrāṇi svakhaḍgena śiraḥ kāyādapāharat || 206 ||
citāṃ kṛtvā vidhānena sā devī drupadātmajā ||
brahmānaṃdaṃ namaskṛtya taccitāyāṃ samāruhat || 207 ||
tena sārddhaṃ ca sā śuddhā śvaśurasyājñayā mudā ||
saptajanmakathāṃ kṛtvā svapatestu dadāha vai || 208 ||
taccitāyāṃ ca bhartāramiṃdulaṃ balavattaram ||
saṃsthāpya dāhayāmāsa tena sārddhaṃ kalevaram || 209 ||
rātrau parimalo rājā lakṣaṇena samanvitaḥ ||
mahīrājamupāgamya mahadyuddhamakārayat || 3.3.32.210 ||
sapādalakṣāśca tadā hataśeṣā mahābalāḥ ||
trilakṣairhataśeṣaiśca sārddhaṃ yoddhumupasthitāḥ||211||
dhānyapālaḥ śataṃ bhūpā~mllakṣaṇaśca tathā śatam||
tālanaśca śataṃ bhūpānhatvā rājānamāyayau||212||
mahīrājastadā duḥkhī dhyātvā rudraṃ maheśvaram||
niśīthe samanuprāpte hataśeṣaissamāgataḥ||
ekākī gajamāruhya yayau cādibhayaṃkaram|| 213||
rudradattena bāṇena hatvā parimalaṃ nṛpam||
dhānyapālaṃ tathā hatvā tālanaṃ balavattaram ||
lakṣaṇāntamupāgamya mahadyuddhamacīkarat || 214 ||
mahīrājasya raudrāstraissainyāssarve kṣayaṃ gatāḥ ||
lakṣaṇaṃ prati raudrāstraṃ mahīrājaḥ samādadhe || 215 ||
tadā tu lakṣaṇo vīro vaiṣṇavāstraṃ samādadhe ||
tenāstreṇa kṣayaṃ jāto mahīrājasya sāyakaḥ ||
tenāstratejasā rājā mahāsaṃtāpamāptavān || 216 ||
dhyātvā rudraṃ mahādevaṃ tyaktvā vidyāṃ ca vaiṣṇavīm ||
svabhallena śiraḥ kāyādapāharata bhūmipaḥ || 217 ||
hastinī ca tadā ruṣṭā gajamādibhayaṃkaram ||
gatvā yuddhaṃ muhūrtena kṛtvā svargamupāyayau || 218 ||
uṣaḥkāle ca saṃprāpte malanā patimuttamam ||
taccitāyāṃ samāropya dadāha svaṃ kalevaram|| 219 ||
tadā tu devakī śuddhaṃ lakṣaṇaṃ balavattaram||
tālanādīṃstathā hutvā dadāha svaṃ kalevaram || 3.3.32.220 ||
prabhāte vimale jāte caturthe bhaumavāsare ||
tathā hutvā svarṇavatī kṛtvā teṣāṃ tilāṃjalim ||
dhyātvā sarvamayīṃ devīṃ sthirībhūya svayaṃ sthitaḥ || 221 ||
etasminnaṃtare tatra kalirbhāryāsamanvitaḥ ||
vāṃchitaṃ phalamāgamya tuṣṭāva ślakṣṇayā girā || 222 ||
|| kaliruvāca || ||
nama āhlāda mahate sarvānaṃdapradāyine ||
yogeśvarāya śuddhāya mahāvatīnivāsine || 223 ||
rāmāṃśastvaṃ mahābāho mama pālanatatparaḥ ||
kalaikayā samāgamya bhuvo bhārastvayā hṛtaḥ || 224 ||
rājānaḥ pāvakīyāśca tapobalasamanvitāḥ ||
hatvā tānpañcasāhasrānkṣudrabhūpānanekaśaḥ ||
yogamadhye samāsīno namastasmai mahātmane || 225 ||
teṣāṃ sainyāḥ ṣaṣṭilakṣāḥ kramādvīra tvayā hatāḥ ||
varaṃ brūhi mahā bhāga yatte manasi vartate || 226 ||
iti śrutvā sa āhlādo vacanaṃ prāha nirbhayaḥ ||
mama kīrtistvayā deva kartavyā ca jane jane || 227 ||
punaste kāryamatulaṃ kariṣyāmi śṛṇuṣva bhoḥ ||
mahīrājaśca dharmātmā śivabhaktiparāyaṇaḥ ||
tasya netre mayā śuddhe kartavye nīlarūpake || 228 ||
tava priyaḥ sadā nīlastathaiva ca mama priyaḥ ||
devānāṃ duḥkhado deva daityānāṃ harṣavarddhanaḥ || 229 ||
ityuktvā sa tu rāmāṃśo gajamāruhya vegataḥ ||
mahīrājamupāgamya mahadyuddhaṃ cakāra ha || 3.3.32.230 ||
rudradatto gajastūrṇaṃ paṃcaśabdamupasthitaḥ ||
padmadaṃtānsamāruhya yuyudhāte parasparam|| 231 ||
anyonyena tathā hatvā gajau svargamupeyatuḥ || 232 ||
tadā bhayāturo rājā tyaktvā yuddhaṃ bhayaṃkaram||
sa tu dudrāva vegena rāmāṃśo.anuyayau tataḥ || 233 ||
keśeṣu ca mahīrājaṃ gṛhītvā tarasā balī ||
kalidattaṃ mahānīlaṃ netrayostena tatkṛtam || 234 ||
tadāprabhṛti vai śambhuraśuddhaṃ nṛpatiṃ priyam ||
matvā tyaktvā yayau sthāne kailāse guhyakālaye || 235 ||
āhlādaḥ kalinā sārddhaṃ kadalīvanamuttamam||
gatvā yogaṃ cakārāśu parvate gaṃdhamādane || 236 ||
tathābhūtaṃ ca rāmāṃśaṃ kalirdṛṣṭvā mudānvitaḥ ||
balipārśvamupāgamya varṇayāmāsa sarvaśaḥ || 237 ||
sa vai balirdaityarājo.ayutaiḥ saha vinirgataḥ ||
gaura deśamupāgamya sahoḍḍīnamuvāca ha || 238 ||
gaccha vīra balaissārddhaṃ niśāyāṃ rakṣito mayā ||
hatvā bhūpaṃ mahīrājaṃ vidyunmālāṃ gṛhāṇa bhoḥ ||239||
iti śrutvā vacastasya ṣoḍaśābdāṃtare gate ||
sapādalakṣaiśca balaiḥ kurukṣetramupāyayau || 3.3.32.240 ||
mahīrājasutāñjitvā samāhūya mahāvatīm ||
mahīpatiṃ preṣayitvā luṇṭhayitvā ca tadvasu ||241||
liṃgārthaṃ kṛtavānyatnaṃ sa nṛpaḥ kīrtisāgare ||
na prāptassa nṛpastaṃ vai svagehāya tadā yayau ||242||
lakṣacaṃḍīṃ kārayitvā paramānaṃdamāptavān||
jayacaṃdrastu tacchrutvā putraśokasamanvitaḥ || 243 ||
nirāhāro yatirbhūtvā mṛtaḥ svargapuraṃ yayau ||
sahoḍḍīnena sa nṛpaḥ kṛtvā yuddhaṃ bhayaṃkaram || 244 ||
saptāhorātramātreṇa mleccharājavaśaṃ gataḥ ||
mārito bahuyatnena mahīrājo na vai mṛtaḥ || 245 ||
tadā mlecchassahoḍḍīno nirbaṃdhanamathākarot ||
jyotirūpasthitaṃ tatra caṃdrabhaṭṭo nṛpājñayā ||
kṣurapreṇa ca bāṇena hatvā vahnau dadāha vai || 246 ||
vidyunmālāṃ sa ca mleccho gṛhītvā ca dhanaṃ bahu ||
tatrāsthāpya svadāsaṃ ca kutukoḍḍīnamāgataḥ || 247 ||
iti śrībhaviṣye mahāpurāṇe pratisargaparvaṇi caturyugakhaṇḍāparaparyāye kaliyugīyetihāsasamuccaye dvātriṃśo.adhyāyaḥ|| 32 || || cha || ||
iti tṛtīyakhaṇḍaṃ samāptam || || a || || ||

viṣayānukramaṇikā

|| śrīgaṇeśāya namaḥ ||
|| śrīrādhāvallabho jayati ||
|| vedavyāsa uvāca || ||
evaṃ dvāparasaṃdhyāyā ante sūtena varṇitam ||
sūryacaṃdrānvayākhyānaṃ tanmayā kathitaṃ tava ||1||
viśālāyāṃ punargatvā vaitālena vinirmitam ||
kathayiṣyati sūtastamitihāsasamuccayam ||2||
tanmayā kathitaṃ sarvaṃ hṛṣīkottamapuṇyadam||
punarvikramabhūpena bhaviṣyati samāhvayaḥ || 3 ||
naimiṣāraṇyamāsādya śrāvayiṣyati vai kathām||
punaruktāni yānyeva purāṇāṣṭādaśāni vai || 4 ||
tāni copapurāṇāni bhaviṣyaṃti kalau yuge ||
teṣāṃ copapurāṇānāṃ dvādaśādhyāyamuttamam || 5 ||
sārabhūtaśca kathitaṃ itihāsasamuccayaḥ ||
yaste mayā ca kathito hṛṣīkottama te mudā || 6 ||
vikramākhyānakālāṃte.avatāraḥ kalayā hareḥ ||
sa ca śaktyāvatāro hi rādhākṛṣṇasya bhūtale || 7 ||
tatkathāṃ bhagavānsūto naimiṣāraṇyamāsthitaḥ ||
aṣṭāśītisahasrāṇi śrāvayiṣyati vai munīm || 8 ||
yattanmayā ca kathitaṃ haṣīkottama te mudā ||
punaste śaunakādyāśca kṛtvā snānādikāḥ kriyāḥ || 9 ||
sūtapārśvaṃ gamiṣyaṃti naimiṣāraṇyavāsinaḥ ||
tatpṛṣṭenaiva sūtena yaduktaṃ tacchṛṇuṣva bhoḥ || 3.4.1.10 ||
|| ṛṣaya ūcuḥ || ||
śrutaṃ kṛṣṇasya caritaṃ bhagavanbhavatoditam ||
idānīṃ śrotumicchāmi rājñāṃ teṣāṃ kramātkulam || ||11 ||
caturṇāṃ vahnijātānāṃ paraṃ kautūhalaṃ hi naḥ ||
sa haristriyugī proktaḥ kathaṃ jātaḥ kalau yuge || 12 ||
|| sūta uvāca || ||
kathayāmi muniśreṣṭhā yuṣmākaṃ praśnamuttamam ||
agnivaṃśanṛpāṇāṃ ca caritraṃ śṛṇu vistarāt || 13 ||
pramaraśca mahīpālo dakṣiṇāṃ diśamāsthitaḥ ||
ambayā racitāṃ divyāṃ pramarāya purīṃ śubhām || 14 ||
nivāsaṃ kṛtavānrājā sāmavedaparo balī ||
ṣaḍvarṣāṇi kṛtaṃ rājyaṃ tasmājjāto mahāmaraḥ || 15 ||
trivarṣaṃ ca kṛtaṃ rājyaṃ devāpistanayo.abhavat ||
pitustulyaṃ kṛtaṃ rājyaṃ devadūtastato.abhavat ||
pitustulyaṃ kṛtaṃ rājyaṃ śṛṇu tatkāraṇaṃ mune || 16 ||
aśoke nihate tasminbauddhabhūpe mahābale ||
kalirbhāskaramārādhya tapasā dhyānatatparaḥ || 17 ||
paṃcavarṣāntare sūryastasmai ca kalaye mudā ||
śakākhyaṃ nāma puruṣaṃ dadau tadbhaktitoṣitaḥ || 18 ||
tadā prasannaḥ sa kaliḥ śakāya ca mahātmane ||
taittiraṃ nagaraṃ premṇā dadau harṣitamānasaḥ ||19||
tatra gopāndasyugaṇānvaśīkṛtya mahābalī ||
āryadeśavināśāya kṛtvovodyogaṃ punaḥpunaḥ ||
hatavānbhūpatīnbāṇaistasmātte svalpajīvinaḥ || 3.4.1.20 ||
gaṃdharvasenaśca nṛpo devadūtātmajo balī ||
śatārddhābdaṃ padaṃ kṛtvā tapase punarāgataḥ || 21 ||
śivājñayā ca nṛpatirvikramastanayastataḥ ||
śatavarṣakṛtaṃ rājyaṃ devabhaktastato.abhavat ||
daśavarṣaṃ kṛtaṃ rājyaṃ śakairduṣṭairlayaṃ gataḥ || 22 ||
śālivāhana evāpi devabhaktasya cātmajaḥ ||
jitvā śakānsa ṣaṣṭyabdaṃ rājyaṃ kṛtvā divaṃ gataḥ || 23 ||
śālihotrastasya suto rājyaṃ kṛtvā śatārddhakam ||
svargalokaṃ tataḥ prāptastatsutaḥ śālivarddhanaḥ ||24||
pitustulyaṃ kṛtaṃ rājyaṃ śakahantā tato.abhavat||
pitustulyaṃ kṛtaṃ rājyaṃ suhotrastanayo.abhavat || 25 ||
pitustulyaṃ kṛtaṃ rājyaṃ havirhotrastato.abhavat||
pitustulyaṃ kṛtaṃ rājyamiṃdrapālastato.abhavat || 26 ||
purīmiṃdrāvatīṃ kṛtvā tatra rājyamakārayat ||
pitustulyaṃ kṛtaṃ rājyaṃ mālyavānnāma tatsutaḥ ||
purīṃ mālyavatīṃ kṛtvā pitustulyaṃ kṛtaṃ padam || 27 ||
anāvṛṣṭistataścāsīnmahatī caturabdikā ||
tataḥ kṣudhāturo rājā śvaviṣṭhādhānyagarhitam || 28 ||
saṃskṛtya maṃdire rājā śālagrāmāya cārpayat ||
tadā prasanno bhagavānvacanaṃ nabhaseritam || 29 ||
kṛtvā dadau varaṃ tasmai śṛṇu tanmunisattama||
kule yāvannṛpā bhāvyāstava bhūpatisattama||
anāvṛṣṭirna bhavitā tāvatte rāṣṭra uttame||3.4.1.30||
suto mālyavataścāsīcchaṃbhudatto harapriyaḥ||
pitustulyaṃ kṛtaṃ rājyaṃ bhaumarājastato.abhavat||31||
pitustulyaṃ kṛtaṃ rājyaṃ vatsarājastato.abhavat||
pitustulyaṃ kṛtaṃ rājyaṃ bhojarājastato.abhavat||32||
pitustulyaṃ kṛtaṃ rājyaṃ śaṃbhudattastato.abhavat||
daśahīnaṃ kṛtaṃ rājyaṃ bhojarājapitussamam||33 ||
śaṃbhudattasya tanayo biṃdupālastato.abhavat ||
biṃdukhaṇḍaṃ ca rāṣṭraṃ vai kṛtvā sa sukhito.abhavat ||
tena rājyaṃ pitustulyaṃ kṛtaṃ vedavidā mune || 34 ||
biṃdupālasya tanayo rājapālastato.abhavat||
pitustulyakṛtaṃ rājyaṃ tasmājjāto mahīnaraḥ || 35 ||
pitustulyaṃ kṛtaṃ rājyaṃ somavarmā nṛpo.abhavat ||
pitustulyaṃ kṛtaṃ rājyaṃ kāmavarmā suto.abhavat || 36 ||
pitustulyaṃ kṛtaṃ rājyaṃ bhūmipālastato.abhavat ||
bhūsarastena khanitaṃ puraṃ tatra śubhaṃ kṛtam || 37 ||
pitustulyaṃ kṛtaṃ rājyaṃ raṃgapālastato.abhavat ||
bhūmipālastu nṛpatirjitvā bhūpānanekaśaḥ || 38 ||
vīrasiṃhastato nāmnā vikhyāto.abhūnmahītale ||
svarājye raṃgapālaṃ sa cābhiṣicya vanaṃ yayau ||
tapaḥ kṛtvā divaṃ yāto devadevaprasādataḥ || 39 ||
kalpasiṃhastato jāto raṃgapālānnṛpottamāt ||
anapatyo hi nṛpatiḥ pitustulyaṃ kṛtaṃ padam || 3.4.1.40 ||
ekadā jāhnavītoye snānārthaṃ mudito yayau ||
dānaṃ dattvā dvijātibhyaḥ kalpakṣetramavāptavān || 41 ||
puṇyabhūmiṃ samālokya śūnyabhūtāṃ sthalīmapi ||
nagaraṃ kārayāmāsa tatra sthāne mudānvitaḥ || 42 ||
kalāpanagaraṃ nāmnā prasiddhamabhavadbhuvi ||
tatra rājyaṃ kṛtaṃ tena gaṃgāsiṃhastato.abhavat || 43 ||
navatyabdavapurbhūtvā so.anapatyo raṇaṃ gataḥ ||
tyaktvā prāṇānkurukṣetre svargalokamavāptavān ||
samāptimagamadvipra pramarasya kulaṃ śubham || 44 ||
tadanvaye ca ye śeṣāḥ kṣatriyāstadanaṃtaram ||
tannārīṣvamitovipra babhūva varṇasaṃkaraḥ || 45 ||
vaiśyavṛttikarāḥ sarve mlecchatulyā mahītale ||
iti te kathitaṃ vipra kulaṃ dakṣiṇabhūpateḥ || 46 ||
iti śrībhaviṣye mahāpurāṇe pratisargaparvaṇi caturyugakhaṇḍāparaparyāye kaliyugīyetihāsasamuccaye pramaravaṃśavarṇanaṃ nāma prathamo.adhyāyaḥ || 1 || a ||
|| sūta uvāca || ||
vayahānirmahīpālo madhyadeśe svakaṃ padam ||
gṛhītvā brahmaracitamajameramavāsayat || 1 ||
ajasya brahmaṇo mā ca lakṣmīstatra ramā gatā ||
tayā ca nagaraṃ ramyamajameramajaṃ smṛtam || 2 ||
daśavarṣaṃ kṛtaṃ rājyaṃ tomarastatsuto.abhavat ||
pārthivaiḥ pūjayāmāsa varṣamātraṃ maheśvaram || 3 ||
iṃdraprasthaṃ dadau tasmai prasanno nagaraṃ śivaḥ ||
tadanvaye ca ye jātāstomarāḥ kṣatriyāḥ smṛtāḥ || 4 ||
tomarāvarajaścaiva cayahānisutaḥ śubhaḥ ||
nāmnā sāmaladevaśca praśrito.abhūnmahītale || 5 ||
saptavarṣaṃ kṛtaṃ rājyaṃ mahādevastato.abhavat ||
pitustulyaṃ kṛtaṃ rājyamajayaśca tato bhavat || 6 ||
pitustulyaṃ kṛtaṃ rājyaṃ vīrasiṃhastato.abhavat ||
śatārddhābdaṃ kṛtaṃ rājyaṃ tato biṃdusuro.abhavat || 7 ||
piturarddhaṃ kṛtaṃ rājyaṃ madhyadeśe mahātmanā ||
tasmācca mithunaṃ jātaṃ vīrā vīravihāttakaḥ || 8 ||
vikramāya dadau vīrāṃ pitā vedavidhānataḥ ||
svaputrāya svakaṃ rājyaṃ madhyadeśāntaraṃ mudā || 9 ||
pitustulyaṃ kṛtaṃ rājyaṃ māṇikyastatsutobhavat ||
śatārddhābdaṃ kṛtaṃ rājyaṃ mahāsiṃhastato.abhavat || 3.4.2.10 ||
pitustulyaṃ kṛtaṃ rājyaṃ caṃdraguptastato.abhavat||
piturddhaṃ kṛtaṃ rājyaṃ tatsutaśca pratāpavān || 11 ||
pitustulyaṃ kṛtaṃ rājyaṃ mohanastatsuto.abhavat ||
triṃśadabdaṃ kṛtaṃ rājyaṃ śvetarāyastato.abhavat ||12||
pitustulyaṃ kṛtaṃ rājyaṃ nāgavāhastato.abhavat ||
pitustulyaṃ kṛtaṃ rājyaṃ lohadhāra.astatobhavat || || 13 ||
pitustulyaṃ kṛtaṃ rājyaṃ vīrasiṃhastato.abhavat ||
pitustulyaṃ kṛtaṃ rājyaṃ vibudhastatsuto.abhavat || 14 ||
śatārddhābdaṃ kṛtaṃ rājyaṃ caṃdrarāya statobhavat ||
pitustulyaṃ kṛtaṃ rājyaṃ tato hariharo.abhavat ||15||
pitustulyaṃ kṛtaṃ rājyaṃ vasaṃtastasya cātmajaḥ ||
pitustulyaṃ kṛtaṃ rājyaṃ balāṃga stanayo.abhavat || 16 ||
pitustulyaṃ kṛtaṃ rājyaṃ pramathastatsuto.abhavat ||
pitustulyaṃ kṛtaṃ rājyamaṃgarāyastato.abhavat || 17 ||
pitustulyaṃ kṛtaṃ rājyaṃ viśālastasya cātmajaḥ ||
pitustulyaṃ kṛtaṃ rājyaṃ śārṅgadevastato.abhavat || 18 ||
pitustulyaṃ kṛtaṃ rājyaṃ maṃtradevastato.abhavat ||
pitustulyaṃ kṛtaṃ rājyaṃ jayasiṃhastato.abhavat ||19||
āryadeśāśca sakalā jitāstena mahātmanā ||
taddhanaiḥ kārayāmāsa yajñaṃ bahuphalapradam || 3.4.2.20 ||
tataścānaṃda devo hi jātaḥ putraḥ śubhānanaḥ ||
śatārddhābdaṃ kṛtaṃ rājyaṃ jayasiṃhena dhīmatā || 21 ||
tatsutena pitustulyaṃ kṛtaṃ rājyaṃ mahītale ||
someśvarastasya suto mahāśūro babhūva ha || 22 ||
anaṃgapālasya suto jyeṣṭhāṃ vai kīrtimālinīm ||
tāmudvāhya vidhānena tasyāṃ putrānajījanat || 23 ||
dhuṃdhukāraśca vai jyeṣṭho mathurārāṣṭrasaṃsthitaḥ ||
madhyaḥ kumārākhyasutaḥ pituḥ padasamāsthitaḥ ||24||
mahīrājastu balavāṃstṛtīyo dehalīpatiḥ ||
sahoddīnasya nṛpatervaśamāpya mṛtiṃ gataḥ || 25 ||
capahāneśca sa kulaṃ chāyayitvā divaṃ yayau ||
tasya vaṃśe tu rājanyāsteṣāṃ patnyaḥ piśācakaiḥ ||26||
mlecchaiśca bhuktavatyastā babhūburvarṇasaṃkarāḥ ||
na vai āryā na vai mlecchā jaṭṭā jātyā ca mehanāḥ || 27 ||
mehanā mlecchajātīyā jaṭṭā āryamayāḥ smṛtāḥ ||
kvacitkacicca ye śeṣāḥ kṣatriyāścapahānijāḥ || 28 || ||
iti śrībhaviṣye mahāpurāṇe pratisargaparvaṇi kaliyugīyetihāsa samuccaye pramaravaṃśavarṇanaṃ nāma dvitīyo.adhyāyaḥ || 2 || cha ||
|| sūta uvāca || ||
śuklavaṃśaṃ pravakṣyāmi śṛṇu vipravarāditaḥ ||
yadā kṛṣṇaḥ svayaṃ brahma tyaktvā bhūmiṃ svakaṃ padam || 1 ||
divyaṃ vṛndāvanaṃ ramyaṃ prayayau bhūtale tadā ||
kalerāgamanaṃ jñātvā mlecchapā dvīpamadhyage || 2 ||
sthitā dvīpeṣu vai nānā manujā vedatatparāḥ ||
kalinā mitradharmeṇa dūṣitāste babhūvire || 3 ||
aṣṭaṣaṣṭisahasrāṇāṃ varṣāṇāṃ munisattama ||
adyaprabhṛti vai jātaḥ kālaḥ kalisamāgame || 4 ||
ṣaṣṭivarṣasahasrāṇi dvīparājyamacīkarat ||
sa kalirmlecchayā sārdhaṃ sūryapūjanatatparaḥ || 5 ||
tatpaścādbhārate varṣe mlecchayā kalirāyayau ||
dṛṣṭvā tadbhārataṃ varṣaṃ lokapālaiśca pālitam || 6 ||
bhayabhītastvarāviṣṭo gandharvāṇāṃ yaśaskaraḥ ||
sa kaliḥ sūryamārādhya samādhistho babhūva ha ||7||
tato varṣaśatābdāṃte saṃtuṣṭo ravirāgataḥ ||
soṃśubhirlokamātapya mahāvṛṣṭimakārayat || 8 ||
caturvarṣasahasrāṇi caturvarṣaśatāni ca ||
vyatītāni muniśreṣṭha cādya prabhṛti saṃlape ||9||
saṃpannaṃ bhārataṃ varṣaṃ tadā jātaṃ samaṃtataḥ ||
nyūhākhyo yavano nāma tena vai pūritaṃ jagat ||| ||| 3.4.3.10 ||
sahasrābdakalau prāpte mahendro devarāṭ svayam ||
kāśyapaṃ preṣayāmāsa brahmāvarte mahottame || 11 ||
āryāvatī devaśaktistatkaraṃ cāgrahīnmudā ||
daśaputrānsamutpādya sa dvijo miśramāgamat || 12 || miśradeśodbhavānmlecchānvaśīkṛtyāyutaṃ mudā ||
svadeśaṃ punarāgatya śiṣyāṃstānsa cakāra ha || 13 ||
naṣṭāyāṃ saptapuryāṃ ca brahmāvartaṃ mahottamam||
sarasvatīdṛṣadvatyormadhyagaṃ tatra cāvasat || 14 ||
svaputraṃ śuklamāhūya dvijaśreṣṭhaṃ tapodhanam ||
ājñāya raivataṃ śṛṃgaṃ tapase tu punaḥ svayam || 15 ||
navaputrā~mstathā śiṣyānmanudharmaṃ sanātanam ||
śrāvayāmāsa dharmātmā sa rājā manudharmagaḥ || 16 ||
śuklopi raivataṃ prāpya saccidānaṃdavigraham ||
vāsudevaṃ jagannāthaṃ tapasā samatoṣayat || 17 ||
tadā prasanno bhagavāndvāra kānāyako balī ||
kare gṛhītvā taṃ vipraṃ samudrāṃtamupāyayau || 18 ||
dvārakāṃ darśayāmāsa divyaśobhāsamanvitām ||
vyatīte dvisahasrābde kiñcijjāte bhṛgūttama || 19 ||
agnidvāreṇa prayayau sa śuklo.arbudaparvate ||
jitvā bauddhāndvijaiḥ sārdhaṃ tribhiranyaiśca baṃdhubhiḥ || 3.4.3.20 ||
dvārakāṃ kārayāmāsa hareśca kṛpayā hi saḥ ||
tatroṣya mudito rājā kṛṣṇadhyānaparobhavat || 21 ||
paścime bhārate varṣe daśābdaṃ kṛtavānpadam ||
nārāyaṇasya kṛpayā viṣvaksenaḥ suto.abhavat || 22 ||
viṃśadabdaṃ kṛtaṃ rājyaṃ jayasenastato.abhavat ||
triṃśadabdaṃ kṛtaṃ rājyaṃ visenastasya cātmajaḥ ||| || 23 ||
śatārdhābdaṃ kṛtaṃ rājyaṃ mithunaṃ tasya cābhavat ||
pramodo modasiṃhaśca vikramāya nijāṃ sutām || 24 ||
visenaśca dadau prītyā rāṣṭraṃ putrāya cottamam ||
pitustulyaṃ kṛtaṃ rājyaṃ siṃdhuvarmā suto.abhavat || 25 ||
siṃdhukūle kṛtaṃ rājyaṃ tyaktvā tatpaitṛkaṃ padam ||
siṃdhudeśastato nāmnā prasiddhobhūnmahītale || 26 ||
pitustulyaṃ kṛtaṃ rājyaṃ rājñā vai siṃdhuvarmaṇā ||
siṃdhudvīpastasya sutaḥ pitustulyaṃ kṛtaṃ padam || 27 ||
śrīpatistasya tanayo gautamānvayasaṃbhavām ||
kācchapīṃ mahiṣīṃ prāpya kacchadeśamupāyayau || 28 ||
pulindānyavanāñjitvā tatra deśamakārayat ||
deśo vai śrīpatirnāmnā siṃdhukūle babhūva ha || 29 ||
pitustulyaṃ kṛtaṃ rājyaṃ bhujavarmā tato.abhavat ||
jitvā sa śabarānbhillāṃstatra rāṣṭramakārayat || || 3.4.3.30 ||
bhujadeśastato jātaḥ prasiddho.abhūnmahītale ||
pitustulyaṃ kṛtaṃ rājyaṃ raṇavarmā suto.abhavat || 31 ||
pitustulyaṃ kṛtaṃ rājyaṃ citravarmā suto.abhavat ||
kṛtvā sa citranagarīṃ vanamadhye nṛpottamaḥ || 32 ||
pitustulyaṃ kṛtaṃ rājyaṃ dharmavarmā suto.abhavat ||
pitustulyaṃ kṛtaṃ rājyaṃ kṛṣṇa varmā suto.abhavat || 33 ||
pitustulyaṃ kṛtaṃ rājyamudayastatsuto.abhavat ||
kṛtvodayapuraṃ ramyaṃ vanamadhye nṛpottamaḥ || 34 ||
pitustulyaṃ kṛtaṃ rājyaṃ vāpyakarmā suto.abhavat ||
vāpīkūpataḍāgāni nānāharmyāṇi tena vai || 35 ||
dharmārthe kārayāmāsa dharmātmā sa ca vai puram ||
etasminnantare prāpto balado nāma bhūpatiḥ || 36 ||
lakṣasainyayuto vīro mahāmadamate sthitaḥ ||
tena sārdhamabhūyuddhaṃ rājño vai vāpyakarmaṇaḥ || 37 ||
jitvā paiśācakānmlecchānkṛṣṇotsavamakārayat ||
pitustulyaṃ kṛtaṃ rājyaṃ guhilastatsuto.abhavat || 38 ||
pitustulyaṃ kṛtaṃ rājyaṃ kālabhojaḥ suto.abhavat ||
pitustulyaṃ kṛtaṃ rājyaṃ rāṣṭrapālastato.abhavat || 39 ||
sa tyaktvā paitṛkaṃ sthānaṃ vaiṣṇavīṃ śaktimāgamat ||
tapasārādhayāmāsa śāradāṃ sarvamaṃgalām || || 3.4.3.40 ||
prasannā sā tadā devī kārayāmāsa vai purīm ||
mahāvatīṃ mahāramyāṃ maṇidevena rakṣitām || 41 ||
tatroṣya nṛpatirdhīmāndaśābdaṃ rājyamāptavān ||
tasyobhau tanayau jātau vijayaḥ prajayastathā || 42 ||
prajayaḥ pitarau tyaktvā gaṃgākūlamupāyayau ||
dvādaśābdaṃ ca tapasā pūjayāmāsa śāradām || 43 ||
kanyā mūrtimayī devī veṇuvādanatatparā ||
hayamāruhya saṃprāptā vihasyāha mahīpatim || 44||
kinnimittaṃ bhūpasuta tvayā cārādhitā śivā ||
tatphalaṃ tvaṃ hi tapasā mattaḥ śīghramavāpsyasi || 45 ||
iti śrutvā sa hovāca kumāri madhurasvare ||
navīnaṃ nagaraṃ mahyaṃ kuru devi namostu te || 46 ||
iti śrutvā tu sā devī dadau tasmai hayaṃ śubham ||
puro bhūtvā vādyakarī dakṣiṇāṃ diśamāgatā || 47 ||
sa bhūpo hayamāruhya netra ācchādya cāyayau ||
punaḥ sa bhūpatiḥ paścātpaścimāṃ diśamāgatā || 48 ||
tatonuprayayau pūrvamarkaṇo yatra pakṣirāṭ ||
bhayabhīto nṛpastena samunmīlya sa cakṣuṣī || 49 ||
dadarśa nagaraṃ ramyaṃ kanyāyā racitaṃ śubham ||
uttare tasya vai gaṃgā dakṣiṇenāsa pāṇḍurā || 3.4.3.50 ||
paścime īśasaritā pūrve pakṣī sa markaṇaḥ ||
kubjabhūtamabhūdgrāmaṃ kānyakubja iti smṛtaḥ || 51 ||
daśavarṣaṃ ca tenaiva jayapālena vai padam ||
kṛtaṃ tasya suto jāto veṇuvādyācca veṇukaḥ || 52 ||
sa veṇuśca mahīpālo devīdattāṃ manoharām ||
patnīṃ kanyāvatīṃ nāmnā samudvāhya rarāja ha || 53 ||
tasyāṃ sapta sutā jātā mātṛrṇāṃ maṃgalāḥ kalāḥ ||
śītalā pārvatī kanyā tathā puṣpavatī smṛtā || 54 ||
govardhanī ca siṃdūrā kālī nāmnā prakīrtitā ||
brāhmī māheśvarī caiva kaumārī vaiṣṇavī tathā || 55 ||
vārāhī ca tathendrāṇī cāmuṇḍāḥ kramato.abhavan||
ekadā bhūpateḥ patnī taṃtunā mṛttikāghaṭam || || 56 ||
kūpe kṛtavatī premṇā yathā pūrvaṃ tathādya sā ||
dadarśa bahulā nārīrnānābhūṣaṇabhūṣitāḥ || 57 ||
svayamekaiva vasanā manoglānimupāyayau ||
tadaiva sa ghaṭo bhūmau na prāptaḥ sapravṛttikām || 58 ||
dṛṣṭvā kanyāvatī devī ghaṭahīnā gṛhaṃ yayau ||
tadā tu saptakanyāśca śilābhūtā gṛhe sthitāḥ || 59 ||
śrutvā veṇustadāgatya bhartsayitvā svakāṃ priyām ||
brahmacaryavrataṃ tyaktvā ramayāmāsa yoṣitam || 3.4.3.60 ||
nṛpādvai vīravatyāṃ ca yaśovigraha ātmajaḥ ||
babhūva balavāndharmī cāryadeśapatiḥ svayam || 61 ||
viṃśadvarṣaṃ kṛtaṃ rājyaṃ tena rājñā mahītale ||
mahīcaṃdrastasya sutaḥ pitustulyaṃ kṛtaṃ padam || 62 ||
caṃdradevastasya suto rājyaṃ tena pituḥ samam ||
kṛtaṃ tasmātsuto jāto maṃdapālo mahīpatiḥ || 63 ||
tasya bhūpasya samaye sarve bhūpāḥ samantataḥ ||
tyaktvā taṃ maṃdapālaṃ ca taddatte saṃsthitā gṛhe || 64 ||
piturarddhaṃ kṛtaṃ rājyaṃ kumbhapālastato .abhavat ||
rājanīyā ca nagarī piśācaviṣaye sthitā || 65 ||
tatpatiśca mahāmodo mlecchapaiśācadharmagaḥ ||
sa jitvā bahudhā deśā~mlluṃṭhayitvā dhanaṃ bahu || 66 ||
mlecchadharmakaraḥ prāptaḥ kumbhapālo yataḥ sthitaḥ ||
kumbhapālastu taṃ dṛṣṭvā kalinā nirmitaṃ nṛpa || 67 ||
mahāmodaṃ samāgamya praṇanāma sa buddhimān ||
tadā mlecchapatiḥ śūro dattvā tasmai dhanaṃ bahu || 68 ||
rājanīyāṃ ca nagarīṃ prāptavānmūrtikhaṃḍakam ||
viṃśadabdaṃ kṛtaṃ rājyaṃ kuṃbhapālena dhīmatā || 69 ||
tatputro devapālaścānaṃgabhūpasya kanyakām ||
samudvāhya vidhānena caṃdrakāṃtiṃ tayā saha || 3.4.3.70 |||
kānyakubjagṛhaṃ prāpya jitvā bhūpānanekaśaḥ ||
pitustulyaṃ kṛtaṃ rājyaṃ tasyobhau tanayau smṛtau || 71||
jayacaṃdro ratnabhānurdiśaṃ pūrvāṃ tathottarām ||
āryadeśasya vai jitvā vaiṣṇavo rājyamāptavān||72||
ratnabhānośca tanayo lakṣaṇo nāma viśrutaḥ ||
kurukṣetre raṇaṃ prāpya tyaktvā prāṇāndivaṃ gataḥ||73||
samāptimagamadvaṃśo vaiśyapālasya dhīmataḥ ||
kuṃbhapālasya śauklasya vaiśyānāṃ rakṣakasya ca ||74||
viṣvaksenānvaye jātā viṣvaksenā(viśvaknenā?) nṛpāḥ smṛtāḥ||
visenasya kule jātā visenāḥ kṣatriyāḥ smṛtāḥ || 75 ||
guhilasya kule jātā gauhilāḥ kṣatriyā hi te ||
rāṣṭrapālānvaye jātā rāṣṭrapālā nṛpāḥ smṛtāḥ || 76 ||
vaiśyapālasya vai vaṃśe kuṃbhapālasya dhīmataḥ ||
vaiśyapālāśca rājanyā babhūburbahudhā hi te || 77 ||
lakṣaṇe maraṇaṃ prāpte śukla vaṃśadhuraṃdhure ||
sarve te kṣatriyā mukhyāḥ kurukṣetre layaṃ gatāḥ || 78 ||
śeṣāstu kṣudrabhūpālā varṇasaṃkarasaṃbhavāḥ ||
mlecchaiśca dūṣitā jātā mleccharājye bhayānake || 79 || ||
iti śrībhaviṣye mahāpurāṇe pratisargaparvaṇi caturyugakhaṃḍāparaparyāye kaliyugīyetihāsasamuccaye pramaravaṃśavarṇanaṃ nāma tṛtīyo.a dhyāyaḥ || 3 || || a || ||
||sūta uvāca || ||
bhṛguvarya śṛṇu tvaṃ vai vaṃśaṃ pariharasya ca ||
jitvā bauddhānpariharo.atharvavedaparāyaṇaḥ || 1 ||
śaktiṃ sarvamayīṃ nityāṃ dhyātvā premaparo.abhavat ||
prasannā sā tadā devī sārdhayojanamāyatam || 2 ||
nagaraṃ citrakūṭādrau cakāra kalinirjaram ||
kaliryatra bhavedbaddho nagare.asminsurapriye || 3 ||
ataḥ kaliṃjaro nāmnā prasiddho.abhūnmahītale ||
dvādaśābdaṃ kṛtaṃ rājyaṃ tena pūrvapradeśake || 4 ||
gauravarmā tasya sutaḥ kṛtaṃ rājyaṃ pituḥ samam ||
svānujaṃ ghoravarmāṇaṃ tatrāsthāpya mudānvitaḥ || 5 ||
gauḍadeśaṃ samāgamya tatra rājyamakārayat ||
suparṇo nāma nṛpatistato.abhūdgauravarmaṇaḥ || 6 ||
pitustulyaṃ kṛtaṃ rājyaṃ rūpaṇastatsuto.abhavat ||
pitustulyaṃ kṛtaṃ rājyaṃ kāravarmā suto.abhavat ||7||
śako nāma tato rājā mahālakṣmīṃ sanātanīm ||
trivarṣāṃte ca sā devī kāmākṣīrūpadhāriṇī || 8 ||
svabhaktapālanā caiva tatra vāsamakārayat ||
śatārddhābdaṃ kṛtaṃ rājyaṃ tena vai kāmavarmaṇā || 9 ||
mithunaṃ janayāmāsa bhogo bhogavatī hi sā ||
vikramāyaiva nṛpatiḥ sutāṃ bhogavatīṃ dadau || || 3.4.4.10 ||
svarājyaṃ ca svaputrāya pradadau bhogavarmaṇe ||
pitustulyaṃ kṛtaṃ rājyaṃ kālivarmā suto.avat || 11 ||
mahotsavaṃ mahākālyāḥ kṛtavānsa ca bhūpatiḥ ||
tasmai prasannā varadā kālī bhūtvā svayaṃ sthitā || 12||
kalikā bahupuṣpāṇāṃ sā cakāra svaharṣataḥ ||
tābhirbhavaṃ ca nagaraṃ saṃjātaṃ ca manoharam || 13 ||
kalikātā purī nāmnā prasiddhābhūnmahītale ||
kauśikastasya tanayaḥ pitustulyaṃ kṛtaṃ padam || 14 ||
kātyāyanastasya sutaḥ pitustulyaṃ kṛtaṃ padam ||
tasya putro hemavataḥ pitustulyaṃ kṛtaṃ padam || 15 ||
śivavarmā ca tatputraḥ pitustulyaṃ kṛtaṃ padam ||
bhavavarmā ca tatputraḥ pitustulyaṃ kṛtaṃ padam || 16 ||
rudravarmā ca tatputraḥ kṛtaṃ rājyaṃ pituḥ samam ||
bhojavarmā ca tatputrastyaktvā vai paitṛkaṃ padam || 17 ||
bhojarāṣṭraṃ vanoddeśe kārayāmāsa vīryavān ||
pitustulyaṃ kṛtaṃ rājyaṃ gavavarmā nṛpobhavat ||18||
pitustulyaṃ kṛtaṃ rājyaṃ viṃdhyavarmā nṛpo.abhavat ||
svānujāya svakaṃ rājyaṃ dattvā vaṃgamupāyayau || 19 ||
pitustulyaṃ kṛtaṃ rājyaṃ sukhasenastato.abhavat ||
pitustulyaṃ kṛtaṃ rājyaṃ balākastasya cātmajaḥ || 3.4.4.20 ||
daśavarṣaṃ kṛtaṃ rājyaṃ lakṣmaṇastatsuto.abhavat ||
pitustulyaṃ kṛtaṃ rājyaṃ mādhavastatsuto.abhavat || 21 ||
pitustulyaṃ kṛtaṃ rājyaṃ veśavastatsuto.a bhavat ||
pitustulyaṃ kṛtaṃ rājyaṃ surasenastato.abhavat || 22 ||
pitustulyaṃ kṛtaṃ rājyaṃ tato nārāyaṇo.abhavat ||
pitustulyaṃ kṛtaṃ rājyaṃ śāṃtivarmā sutobhavat || 23 ||
gaṃgākūle śāṃtipuraṃ racitaṃ tena dhīmatā ||
nivāsaṃ kṛtavānbhūpaḥ pitustulyaṃ kṛtaṃ padam || 24 ||
nadīvarmā tasya suto gaṃgādattavaro balī ||
cakāra nagarīṃ ramyāṃ nadīhāṃ gauḍarāṣṭragām || 25 ||
gaṃgayā ca tadāhūtobhijño vidyādharaḥ svayam||
tenaiva rakṣitā cāsītpurī vedaparāyaṇā || 26 ||
viṃśadvarṣaṃ kṛtaṃ rājyaṃ tena rājñā mahātmanā ||
gaṃgāvaṃśastato jāto viśruto.abhūnmahītale || 27 ||
śārṅgadevastasya suto balavānharipūjakaḥ ||
gauḍadeśamupāgamya haridhyānaparobhavat || 28 ||
daśavarṣaṃ kṛtaṃ rājyaṃ gaṃgādevastu tatsutaḥ ||
viṃśadvarṣaṃ kṛtaṃ rājyaṃ cānaṃgastasya bhūpatiḥ || 29 ||
tanayo balavāṃścāsīdgauḍadeśamahīpatiḥ ||
pitustulyaṃ kṛtaṃ rājya tato rājeśvaro.abhavat || 3.4.4.30 ||
pitustulyaṃ kṛtaṃ rājyaṃ nṛsiṃha stanayo.abhavat ||
pitustulyaṃ kṛtaṃ rājyaṃ kalivarmā suto.abhavat || 31 ||
rāṣṭradeśamupāgamya jitvā tasya nṛpaṃ balī ||
mahāvatīṃ purīṃ ramyāmadhyāsya sukhito.abhavat || 32 ||
pitustulyaṃ kṛtaṃ rājyaṃ dhṛtivarmā suto.abhavat ||
pitustulyaṃ kṛtaṃ rājyaṃ tasya putro mahīpatiḥ || 33 ||
jayacaṃdrājñayā bhūpa urvīmāyāmiti smṛtām ||
nagarīṃ kārayāmāsa tatra vāsamakārayat || 34 ||
kurukṣetre hatāḥ sarve kṣatriyāścaṃdravaṃśinaḥ ||
tadā mahīpatī rājā mahāvatyadhipo.abhavat || 35 ||
viṃśadvarṣaṃ kṛtaṃ rājyaṃ sahoddīnena vai tataḥ ||
kurukṣetre mṛtiṃ prāptāḥ suyodhanakalāṃśakāḥ || 36 ||
ghoravarmā tu nṛpatiḥ sutaḥ pariharasya vai||
kaliṃjare kṛtaṃ rājyaṃ śārdūlastatsuto.abhavat|| 37 ||
tadanvaye ca ye bhūpāḥ śārdūlīyāḥ prakīrtitāḥ ||
bhūpānāṃ bahudhā rāṣṭraṃ śārdūlānvayasaṃbhavam||38||
babhūva sarvato bhūmau mahāmāyāprasādataḥ ||
iti te kathitaṃ vipra pāvakīyamahībhujām||39||
kulaṃ sakalapāpaghnaṃ yathaiva śaśisūryayoḥ ||
punaranyatpravakṣyāmi yathā jātaḥ svayaṃ hariḥ ||3.4.4.40||
iti śrībhaviṣye mahāpurāṇe pratisargaparvaṇi caturyugakhaṇḍāparaparyāye kaliyugīyetihāsasamuccaye caturtho.adhyāyaḥ || 4 || cha ||
|| sūta uvāca || ||
madhyāhnakāle saṃprāpte brahmaṇo.avyaktajanmanaḥ ||
cākṣuṣāṃtaramevāpi mahāvāyurbabhūva ha || 1 ||
tatprabhāvena hemādriḥ kaṃpamānaḥ punaḥpunaḥ||
yathā vṛkṣastathaivāsau tatkaṃpādeva maṃḍalaḥ ||2||
nabhaso bhūtale prāptastadā bhūmiḥ prakaṃpitā ||
babhūva muniśārdūla sarvalokavināśinī || 3||
saptadvīpāḥ samudrāśca jalabhūtā babhūvire ||
lokālokastadā śeṣo.abhavatsottaraparvataḥ || 4 ||
śeṣā bhūmirlayaṃ prāptā manvaṃtare laye ||
sahasrābdāṃtare bhūmirbabhūva jalamadhyagā|| || 5 ||
tadā sa bhagavānviṣṇurbhavena vidhinā saha ||
śaiśumāraṃ śubhaṃ cakraṃ cakāra nabhasi sthitam || 6 ||
gṛhītvā sakalāstārā grahānsarvānyathāvidhi ||
sthāpayāmāsa bhagavānyathāyogyaṃ pitāmahaḥ ||7||
punarvai jyotiṣāṃ cakraiḥ śoṣitā sakalā mahī ||
sthalībhūyāyutābdānte dṛśyamānā babhūva ha || 8 ||
tadā sa bhagavānbrahmā mukhātsomaṃ cakāra ha ||
dvijarājaṃ mahāprājñaṃ sarvavedaviśāradam || 9 ||
bhujābhyāṃ bhagavānbrahmā kṣatrarājaṃ mahābalam ||
sūryaṃ ca janayāmāsa rājanītiparāyaṇam || 3.4.5.10 ||
ūrubhyāṃ vaiśyarājaṃ ca samudraṃ saritāṃ patim||
ratnākaraṃ ca kṛtavānparameṣṭhī pitāmahaḥ ||11||
padbhyāṃ ca janayāmāsa viśvakarmāṇamuttamam ||
dakṣaṃ nāma kalābhijñaṃ śūdrarājaṃ sukṛtyakam ||12||
somādvai brāhmaṇā jātāḥ sūryādrājanyavaṃśajāḥ ||
samudrātsakalā vaiśyā dakṣācchūdrā babhūvire ||13||
sūryamaṃḍalato jāto manurvaivasvataḥ svayam ||
tasya rājyamabhūtsarvaṃ prāṇināṃ lokavāsinām ||14||
divyānāṃ ca yugānāṃ ca tajjñeyaṃ caikasaptatiḥ ||
tadā sa bhagavānviṣṇurviśvarūpā.avatārakaḥ || 15 ||
viṣṇuḥ pūrvārddhato jātaḥ parārddhādvāmanaḥ svayam ||
bālaḥ satyayuge devo viśvarūpaḥ sanātanaḥ ||16||
catuśśatāni varṣāṇi paramāyurnṛṇāṃ tadā ||
tretāyāṃ yauvanaṃ prāptaḥ pūrvārddhātsaṃbhavo hareḥ || 17 ||
varṣāṇāṃ triśatānāṃ ca nṛṇāmāyuḥ prakīrtitam ||
dvāpare vārddhiko devo nṛṇāmāyuḥ śatadvayam || 18 ||
kalau tu maraṇaṃ prāpto viśvarūpo hariḥ svayam ||
nṛṇāmāyuḥ śatābdaṃ ca keṣāṃciddharmaśālinām || 19 ||
parārddhādvāmano devo mahendrāvarajo hariḥ ||
caturbhujo mahāśyāmo garuḍopari saṃsthitaḥ || 3.4.5.20 ||
viśvarūpahitārthāya triyugī saṃbabhūva ha ||
vāmanārddhācca triyugī jāto nārāyaṇaḥ svayam||21||
śvetarūpo hariḥ satye haṃsākhyo bhagavānsvayam ||
tretāyāṃ raktarūpaśca yajñākhyo bhagavānsvayam ||
dvāpare pītarūpaśca svarṇagarbho hariḥ svayam ||22||
kalikāle tu saṃprāpte saṃdhyāyāṃ dvāpare yuge ||
kalā tu sakalā viṣṇorvāmanasya tathā kalā ||
ekībhūtā ca devakyāṃ jāto viṣṇustadā svayam || 23 ||
vasudevagṛhe ramye mathurāyāṃ ca devatāḥ ||
brahmādyāstuṣṭuvurdevaṃ paraṃ brahma sanātanam || 24 ||
tadā prasanno bhagavāndevānāha śubhaṃ vacaḥ ||
devānāṃ ca hitārthāya daityānāṃ nidhanāya ca ||
ahaṃ kalau ca bahudhā bhavāmi surasattamāḥ || 25 ||
divyaṃ vṛṃdāvanaṃ ramyaṃ sūkṣmaṃ bhūtalasaṃsthitam ||
tatrāhaṃ ca rahaḥkrīḍāṃ kariṣyāmi kalau yuge || 26 ||
sarve vedāḥ kalau ghore gopībhūtāḥ samaṃtataḥ ||
raṃsyante hi mayā sārddhaṃ tyaktvā bhūmaṃḍalaṃ tadā || 27 ||
rādhayā prārthito.ahaṃ vai yadā kaliyugāṃtake ||
samāpya ca rahaḥkrīḍāṃ kalkī ca bhavitāsmyaham || 28 ||
yugāṃtapralayaṃ kṛtvā punarbhūtvā dvidhātanuḥ ||
satyadharmaṃ kariṣyāmi satye prāpte surottamāḥ || 29 ||
iti śrutvā tu te devāstatraivāntarlayaṃ gatāḥ ||
evaṃ yugeyuge krīḍā hareradbhutakarmaṇaḥ || 3.4.5.30 ||
ye tu vai viṣṇubhaktāśca te hi jānaṃti viśvagam ||
yathaiva nṛpaterdāsāḥ svarājñaḥ kāryagauravam ||
jānaṃti nāpare vipra tathā dāsā hareḥ svayam ||31||
viṣṇuvāṃchānusāreṇa viṣṇumāyā sanātanī ||
racitvā vividhā~mllokānmahākālī babhūva ha ||32||
kṛtvā kālamayaṃ sarvaṃ jagadeccarācaram ||
paścāttu bhakṣayitvā tānmahāgaurī bhaviṣyati ||33||
namastasyai mahākālyai viṣṇumāye namonamaḥ ||
mahāgauri namastubhyamasmānpāhi bhayānvitān ||34||
iti śrībhaviṣye mahāpurāṇe pratisargaparvaṇi caturyugakhaṇḍāparaparyāye kaliyugīyetihāsasamuccaye paṃcamo.adhyāyaḥ || 5 || ||
|| ṛṣiruvāca || ||
mahīrājānmuniśreṣṭha ke rājāno babhūvire ||
tānno vada mahābhāga sarvajño.asti bhavānsadā ||1||
|| sūta uvāca || ||
paiśācaḥ kutukoddīno dehalīrājyamāsthitaḥ ||
valīgaḍhaṃ mahāramyaṃ yādavai rakṣitaṃ puram ||
yayau tatra sa paiśācaḥ śūrāyutasamanvitaḥ ||2||
vīrasenasya vai pautraṃ bhūpasenaṃ nṛpottamam ||
sa jitvā kutukoddīno dehalīgrāmasaṃsthitaḥ || 3 ||
etasminnaṃtare bhūpā nānādeśyāḥ samāgatāḥ ||
jitvā sa kutukoddīnaḥ svadeśāttairnirākṛtaḥ || 4 ||
sahoddīnastu tacchrutvā punarāgatya dehalīm ||
jitvā bhūpāndaityavaro mūrtikhaṃḍamathākarot || 5 ||
tatpaścādbahudhā mlecchā ihāgatya samantataḥ ||
paṃcaṣaṭsaptavarṣāṇi kṛtvā rājyaṃ layaṃ gatāḥ || 6 ||
adyaprabhṛti deśe.asmiñchatavarṣāntare hi te ||
bhūtvā cālpāyuṣo mandā devatīrthavināśakāḥ || 7 ||
mlecchabhūpā muniśreṣṭhāstasmādyūyaṃ mayā saha ||
gaṃtumarhatha vai śīghraṃ viśālāṃ nagarīṃ śubhām || 8 ||
iti śrutvā tu vacanaṃ duḥkhātsaṃtyajya naimiṣam ||
yayuḥ sarve viśālāyāṃ himādrau girisattame || 9 ||
tatra sarve samādhisthā dhyātvā sarvamayaṃ harim ||
śatavarṣāntare sarve dhyānādbrahmagṛhaṃ yayuḥ ||3.4.6.1 0||
vyāsa uvāca ||
ityevaṃ sakalaṃ bhāvyaṃ yogābhyāsavaśāddrutam ||
varṇitaṃ ca mayā tubhyaṃ kimanyacchrotumicchasi | || 11 ||
|| manuruvāca || ||
bhagavanvedatattvajña sarvalokaśivaṃkaraḥ ||
ahaṃ māyābhavo jāto bhavānvedabhavo bhuvi || 12 ||
avidyayā ca sakalaṃ mama jñānaṃ samāhṛtam ||
ato.ahaṃ vividhā yonīrgṛhītvā lokamāgataḥ ||13||
paraṃ brahmaiva kṛpayā dṛṣṭvā māṃ maṃdabhāginam ||
vyāsarūpaṃ svayaṃ kṛtvā samuddhartumupāgataḥ || 14 ||
namastasmai munīṃdrāya vedavyāsāya sākṣiṇe ||
avidyāmohabhāvebhyo rakṣaṇāya namonamaḥ || 15 ||
punaranyacca me brūhi sūtādyaiḥ kiṃ kṛtaṃ mune ||
tatsarvaṃ kṛpayā svāminvaktumarhasi sāṃpratam || 16 ||
|| vyāsa uvāca || ||
brahmāṃḍe ye sthitā lokāste sarvesminkalevare ||
ahaṃkāro hi jīvātmā sarvaḥ syātkoṭihīnakaḥ || 17 ||
purāṇo.aṇoraṇīyāṃśca ṣoḍaśātmā sanātanaḥ ||
indriyāṇi manaścaiva pañca cendriyagocarāḥ || 18 ||
jñeyo jīvaḥ śarīre.asminsa īśaguṇabaṃdhitaḥ ||
īśo hyaṣṭādaśātmā vai śaṃkaro jīvaśaṃkaraḥ || 19 ||
buddhirmanaśca viṣayā iṃdriyāṇi tathaiva ca ||
ahaṃkārasya ceśo vai mahādevaḥ sanātanaḥ || 3.4.6.20 ||
jīvo nārāyaṇassākṣācchaṃkareṇa vimohitaḥ ||
sa baddhastriguṇaiḥ pāśairekaśca bahudhābhavat || || 21 ||
kālātmā bhagavānīśo mahākalpasvarūpakaḥ ||
śivakalpo brahmakalpo viṣṇukalpastṛtīyakaḥ ||
īśanetrāṇi tānyeva bandhakalpaścaturthakaḥ || 22 ||
vāyukalpo vahnikalpo brahmāṃḍo liṃgakalpakaḥ ||
īśavaktrāṇi pañcaiva tattvajñaiḥ kathitāni vai || 23 ||
bhaviṣyakalpaśca tathā tathā garuḍaka lpakaḥ ||
kalpo bhāgavataścaiva mārkaṇḍeyaśca kalpakaḥ ||24||
vāmanaśca nṛsiṃhaśca varāho matsyakūrmakau ||
jñānātmano maheśasya jñeyā daśa bhujā budhaiḥ || 25 ||
aṣṭādaśadineṣveva brahmaṇo.avyaktajanmanaḥ ||
kalpāścāṣṭādaśāssarve budhairjñeyā vilomataḥ || 26 ||
kūrmakalpaśca tatrādyo matsyakalpo dvitīyakaḥ ||
tṛtīyaḥ śvetavārāhaḥ kalpo jñeyaḥ purātanaiḥ || 27 ||
dvidhā ca bhagavānbrahmā sūkṣmaḥ sthūlo.aguṇo guṇī ||
saguṇaḥ sa virāṇnāmnā viṣṇu nābhisamudbhavaḥ || 28 || nirguṇovyayarūpaścāvyaktajanmā svabhūḥ svayam ||
brahmaṇaḥ saguṇasyaiva śatāyuḥ kālanirmitam || 29 ||
ūnaviṃśasahasrāṇi lakṣaiko mānuṣābdakaiḥ ||
ebhirvarṣairdinaṃ jñeyaṃ virājo brahmaṇaḥ svayam || 3.4.6.30 ||
nirguṇo.avyaktajanmā ca kālātsarveśvaraḥ paraḥ ||
avyaktaṃ prakṛtirjñeyā dvādaśāṃgāni vai tataḥ || 31 ||
indriyāṇi mano buddhiravyaktasya smṛtāni vai ||
avyaktācca paraṃ brahma sūkṣmajyotistadavyayam || 32 ||
yadā vyakte svayaṃ prāpto.avyaktajanmā hi saṃsmṛtaḥ ||
śatavarṣasamādhistho yastiṣṭhecca niraṃtaram || 33 ||
sūkṣmo manonilo bhūtvā gacchedvai brahmaṇaḥ padam ||
satya lokamiti jñeyaṃ yogagamyaṃ sanātanam ||34||
tatra sthāne tu munayo gatāḥ sarve samādhinā ||
tatroṣitvā ca lakṣābdaṃ bhūrlokātkṣaṇamātrakam ||35||
saccidānaṃdaghanakaṃ tataḥ prāptāḥ kalevare ||
netrāṇi ca samunmīlya saṃprāpte dvitayāhnike || 36 || dadṛśurmanujānsarvānpaśutulyānhi sūkṣmakān||
ṣaṣṭyabdāyuryutānghorānsārddhakiṣkudvayonnatān ||37||
kvacitkvacitsthitā varṇā varṇasaṃkarasannibhāḥ ||
sarve mlecchāśca pāṣaṃḍā bahurūpamato sthitāḥ ||38||
tīrthāni sakalā vedāstyaktvā bhūmaṃḍalaṃ tadā ||
gopyo bhūtvā ca hariṇā sārddhaṃ cakrurmahotsavam 39 ||
pāṣaṃḍā bahujātīyā nānāmārgapradarśakāḥ ||
kalinā nirmitānvarṇānvaṃcayitvā sthitā bhuvi || 3.4.6.40 ||
iti dṛṣṭvā tu munayo romaharṣaṇamaṃtike ||
gatvā tatra bhaviṣyaṃti tataḥ prāṃjalayo hi te || 41 ||
taiśca tatra stutaḥ sūto yoganidrāṃ sanātanīm ||
kathayiṣyati saṃtyajya kalpākhyānaṃ munīnprati ||
tacchṛṇuṣva nṛpaśreṣṭha yathā sūtena varṇitam || 42 ||
|| sūta uvāca || ||
kalpākhyānaṃ pravakṣyāmi yaddṛṣṭaṃ yoganidrayā ||
tacchṛṇudhvaṃ muniśreṣṭhā lakṣābdāṃte yathābhavat ||43||
mukulānvayasaṃbhūto mlecchabhūpaḥ piśācakaḥ ||
nāmnā timiraliṃgaśca madhyadeśamupāyayau || 44 ||
āryānmlecchāṃstadā bhūpāñjitvā kālasvarūpakaḥ ||
dehalīnagarīmadhye mahāvadhamakārayat || 45 ||
āhūya sakalānviprānāryadeśanivāsinaḥ ||
uvāca vacanaṃ dhīmānyūyaṃ mūrtiprapūjakāḥ || 46 ||
nirmitā yena vā mūrtistasya putrīsamā smṛtā ||
tasyāḥ kiṃ pūjanaṃ śuddhaṃ śālagrāmaśilāmayam ||
viṣṇudevaśca yuṣmābhiḥ proktaḥ sa tu na vai hariḥ || 47 ||
ato vaḥ sakalā vedāḥ śāstrāṇi vividhāni ca ||
vṛthā kṛtāni munibhirlokavañcanahetave ||
ityuktvā tānbalādgṛhya jvaladagnau samākṣipat ||48||
śālagrāmaśilāḥ sarvā balātteṣāṃ supūjyakāḥ ||
gṛhītvā coṣṭrapṛṣṭheṣu samāropya gṛhaṃ yayau ||49||
taittiraṃ deśamāgamya durgaṃ tatra cakāra saḥ ||
śālagrāmaśilānāṃ ca svāsanārohaṇaṃ kṛtam || 3.4.6.50 ||
tadā tu sakalā devā duḥkhitā vāsavaṃ prabhum ||
samūcurbahudhālapya devadevaṃ śacīpatim ||51||
vayaṃ tu bhagavansarve śālagrāmaśilāsthitāḥ ||
tyaktvā mūrtīśca sakalāḥ kṛṣṇāṃśena prabodhitāḥ ||
śālagrāmaśilāmadhye vasāmo muditā vayam ||52 ||
śilāssarvāśca no deva śāladeśasamudbhavāḥ ||
tāśca vai mleccharājena svapadārohaṇīkṛtāḥ ||53||
iti śrutvā tu vacanaṃ devānāṃ bhagavānsvarāṭ||
jñātvā balikṛtaṃ sarvaṃ devapūjānirākṛtam || 54 ||
cukopa bhagavānindro daityānpratyabhravāhanaḥ ||
gṛhītvā vajramatulaṃ svāyudhaṃ daityanāśanam ||
taittire preṣayāmāsa deśe mlecchanivāsake || 55 ||
tasya śabdena sakalā deśāśca bahubhinnakāḥ ||
sa mleccho maraṇaṃ prāptastadā sarvasabhājanaiḥ ||56||
śālagrāmaśilāḥ sarvā gṛhītvā vibudhāstadā ||
gaṃḍakyāṃ ca samākṣipya svargalokamupāyayuḥ ||57||
mahendrastu suraiḥ sārddhaṃ devapūjyamuvāca ha ||
mahītale kalau prāpte bhagavandānavottamāḥ ||58||
vedadharmaṃ samullaṃghya mama nāśanatatparāḥ ||
ato māṃ rakṣa bhagavandevaiḥ sārddhaṃ kalau yuge ||59||
||jīva uvāca || ||
mahendra tava yā patnī śacī nāmnā mahottamā ||
dadau tasyai varaṃ viṣṇurbhavitāsmi sutaḥ kalau ||3.4.6.60||
tvadājñayā ca sā devī purīṃ śāṃtimayīṃ śubhām||
gauḍadeśe ca gaṃgāyāḥ kūle lokanivāsinīm ||61||
pratyāgatya dvijo bhūtvā kāryasiddhiṃ kariṣyati ||
bhavānvai brāhmaṇo bhūtvā devakāryaṃ prasādhaya || || 62 ||
iti śrutvā gurorvākyaṃ rudrairekādaśaiḥ saha ||
aṣṭabhirvasubhiḥ sārdhamaśvibhyāṃ sa ca vāsavaḥ || 63 ||
tīrtharājamupāgamya prayāgaṃ ca ravipriyam||
māghe tu makare sūrye sūryadevamatoṣayat|| 64 ||
bṛhaspatistadāgatya sūryamāhātmyamuttamam||
indrādīnkathayāmāsa dvādaśādhyāyamāpaṭhan||65||
iti śrībhaviṣye mahāpurāṇe pratisargaparvaṇi cataryugakhaṃḍāparaparyāye kaliyugīyetihāsasamuccaye pramaravaṃśavarṇano nāma ṣaṣṭho.adhyāyaḥ || 6 || cha || ||
ṛṣaya ūcuḥ || ||
bṛhaspatistu bhagavānmunirdevānsamāsthitān ||
kiṃ provāca ca māhātmyaṃ maṃḍalasthasya vai raveḥ ||1||
tatsarvaṃ kṛpayā brahmanbrūhi nastatsamutsukān ||
iti śrutvā vacasteṣāṃ sūto vacanamabravīt ||2||
bṛhaspatiṃ samāsīnaṃ jīvarūpaṃ guṇālayam ||
prayāgastho mahendraśca suraiḥ sārddhamuvāca ha||3||
kathayasva mahābhāga sūryamāhātmyamuttamam||
yacchrutena raviḥ sākṣātprasannodya bhavetprabhuḥ||4||
bṛhaspatiruvāca||
dhātṛśarmā dvijaḥ kaścidapatyārthe prajāpatim||
tapasā toṣayāmāsa barhiṣmatipure sthitaḥ||5||
paṃcamābde tu bhagavānsaṃtuṣṭaśca prajāpatiḥ||
sutaṃ kanyāṃ punaḥ putraṃ trīṇyapatyāni saṃdadau ||6||
varṣāṃtare janayitvā tryapatya sa dvijottamaḥ ||
dhātṛśarmā paraṃ harṣamāptavānputralālanaiḥ || 7 ||
vivāhāśca kathaṃ teṣāṃ bhavitavyā mahottamāḥ ||
iti cintānvito vipro gaṃdharveśaṃ ca tumburum || 8 ||
havanaistoṣayāmāsa varṣamātravidhānataḥ ||
tumburuśca tadāgatya taṃ cakāra manoratham || 9 ||
prasannastu tadā vipro vadhūrjāmātaraṃ mudā ||
dṛṣṭvā teṣāṃ vihāraṃ ca punaściṃtāṃ cakāra ha || 3.4.7.10 ||
bhūṣaṇāni ca vāsāṃsi dhanāni vividhāni ca ||
teṣāṃ kathaṃ bhaviṣyaṃti nirdhanānāṃ mamāśuca || 11 ||
ṣaṣṭivarṣamayo bhūtvā caṃdanādyairdhanādhipam ||
vidhivatpūjayāmāsa varṣamātraṃ tu tatparaḥ || 12 ||
tadā prasanno bhagavāndadau tasmai dhanaṃ bahu ||
vidyāṃ yakṣamayīṃ ramyāṃ paṃcasvarṇapradāṃ mudā || 13 ||
sahasrajāpī saṃpūjya havanaṃ taddaśāṃśakam ||
tarpaṇaṃ mārjanaṃ caiva kṛtvā vāṃchāmavāptavān ||14||
ityevaṃ vartamānasya gataḥ kālo mahānsvayam ||
mṛtyorāgamanaṃ tasya jātaṃ rogasamanvitam || 15 ||
pīḍitastu rujā vipraḥ śaṃkaraṃ lokaśaṃkaram ||
stutibhiḥ śrutirūpābhistuṣṭāva balavarjitaḥ ||
māsamātreṇa bhagavāndadau jñānaṃ svayaṃ haraḥ || 16 ||
dhātṛśarmā tu tatprāpya bhāskaraṃ mohanāśanam ||
sūryavāravrataistatra toṣayāmāsa namradhīḥ || 17 ||
paṃcābde bhagavānsūryo bhaktibhāvena vatsalaḥ ||
caitryāṃ tamāha vacanaṃ varaṃ brūhi punaḥ punaḥ || 18 ||
dhātṛśarmā tu tacchrutvā bhāskaraṃ mohanāśanam ||
praśrayāvanato bhūtvā tuṣṭāva parayā girā|| 19 ||
|| dhātṛśarmovāca || ||
pravṛttiśca nivṛttiśca manasosya tanau priyā ||
rātrirūpā pravṛttiśca nivṛttirdinarūpiṇī||
bhavatastejasā jāte lokabaṃdhanahetave||3.4.7.20||
avyakte tu sthitaṃ tejo bhavato divyasūkṣmakam||
tridhābhūtaṃ tu viśvāya tasmai tejātmane namaḥ || 21 ||
rājasī yā smṛtā buddhistatpatirbhagavānvidhiḥ||
bhavatastejasā jātastasmai te vidhaye namaḥ||22||
sāttvikī yā tanau buddhistatpatirbhagavānhariḥ||
bhavatā nirmitassattvāttasmai te haraye namaḥ || 23 ||
tāmasī mohanā buddhistatpatiśca svayaṃ śivaḥ ||
tamobhūtena bhavatā jātastasmai namonamaḥ ||
dehi me bhagavanmokṣaṃ saṃjñākāṃta namonamaḥ || 24 ||
|| bṛhaspatiruvāca || ||
ityevaṃ saṃstutastena bhagavāndhātṛśarmaṇā ||
mahendravacanaṃ prāha taṃ dvijaṃ jñānakovidam || 25 ||
mokṣaścaturvidho vipra sālokyaṃ tapasodbhavam ||
sāmīpyaṃ bhaktito jātaṃ sārūpyaṃ dhyānasaṃbhavam || || 26 ||
sāyujyaṃ jñānato jñeyaṃ teṣāṃ svāmī paraḥ pumān ||
saguṇo viguṇo jñeya ānando mokṣiṇāṃ kramāt || 27 ||
devānāṃ caiva deheṣu ye mokṣāḥ punarāgatāḥ ||
yadgatvā na nivartaṃte tadviṣṇoḥ paramaṃ padam || 28 ||
yatprasannena viprendra sāyujyaṃ me bhavettava ||
manumātraśca yaḥ kālastāvatte mokṣa āsthitaḥ ||
ityuktvāṃtardadhe devastena mokṣīkṛto dvijaḥ || 29 ||
|| sūta uvāca || ||
ityuktavaṃtaṃ vāgīśaṃ caitramāse divākaraḥ ||
svarūpaṃ darśayāmāsa devadevaḥ sanātanaḥ || 3.4.7.30 ||
śṛṇudhvaṃ sakalā devā yannimitāḥ samāgatāḥ ||
vaṃgīye svāṃśamutpādya devakāryaṃ karomyaham || 31 ||
ityuktvā svamukhāttejaḥ samutpādya divākaraḥ ||
svabhaktāyai sukanyāyai dvijapatnyai dadau hi tat || 32 ||
dhātṛśarmā dvijo yo vai sūrye mokṣamupāgataḥ ||
sa vai tattejasā jātaḥ kāvyakārasya maṃdire || 33 ||
īśvaro nāma vikhyātaḥ purīśadvānta ātmavān ||
jitvā viprānvedaparānmahatīṃ kīrtimāptavān||34||
iti te kathitaṃ vipra yathā jīvanabhāṣitam ||
punaḥ śṛṇu kathāṃ ramyāṃ devabhyo jīvanirmitām || 35 ||
|| bṛhaspatiruvāca|| ||
māyāvatyāṃ dvijaḥ kaścinmitraśarmeti viśrutaḥ ||
kāvyavidyāparo nityaṃ rasikaḥ kāminīpriyaḥ || 36 ||
kuṃbharāśiṃ mayi prāpte gaṃgādvāre mahotsavaḥ ||
babhūva bahu lairbhūpeḥ kāritastīrthatatparaiḥ || 37 ||
tatrotsave narā nāryyo bahubhūṣaṇabhūṣitāḥ ||
samāyayurdarśanārthe paramānandanirbharāḥ || 38 ||
mitraśarmā tu sa prāpya kāmasenasya vai sutām ||
kāvyakelikalāyuktāṃ dvādaśābdamayīṃ śubhām|| 39 ||
dākṣiṇātyasya bhūpasya tanayāṃ madhurānanām ||
dṛṣṭvā tāṃ mṛgaśāvākṣīṃ tadvaśitvamupāgataḥ || 3.4.7.40 ||
sā tu taṃ citriṇī nāmnā mitraśarmāṇamuttamam ||
dṛṣṭvā tu mūrcchitā cāsīdvipramūrtirhadi sthitā || 41 ||
svagehaṃ punarāgatya citriṇī bhāskaraṃ prabhum ||
pratyahaṃ pūjayāmāsa bahumānapurassarā || 42 ||
mitraśarmā tu tatsthāne gaṃgākūle manohare ||
prātaḥ snātvā śucirbhūtvā vaiśākhe jalamadhyagaḥ || 43 || stotramādityahṛdayamajapatsūryatatparaḥ ||
pratyahaṃ dvādaśāvartaistoṣayāmāsa bhāskaram || 44 ||
māsānte bhagavānsūryo dadau tasmai hi taṃ varam ||
sa tu labdhavaro vipraḥ svagehaṃ punarāgataḥ || 45 ||
citriṇī tu varaṃ prāptā vāṃchitaṃ lokabhāskarāt ||
punastau pitarau svapne bhāskareṇa prabodhitau || 46 ||
mitraśarmāṇamāhūya varayāmāsatuḥ sutām ||
svānte nivāsayāmāsa kāmasenaśca daṃpatī||47||
tau tu cakraṃ mudāviṣṭau pratyahaṃ sūryadevatam ||
tāmrapātre ca tadyaṃtraṃ lekhayitvā vidhānataḥ || 48 ||
ījatū raktakusumairvrataṃ kṛtvā ravipriyam || 49 ||
śatābdavapuṣau cobhau nirjarau śramavarjitau ||
ārogyau maraṇaṃ prāpya sāmīpyaṃ ca ravergatau || 3.4.7.50 ||
iti śrutvā ravergāthāṃ vaiśākhyāṃ devarāṭ svayam ||
pratyakṣaṃ bhāskaraṃ devaṃ dadarśa sahitaṃ suraiḥ || 51 ||
bhaktinamrānsurāndṛṣṭvā bhagavāṃstimirāpahaḥ ||
uvāca vacanaṃ ramyaṃ devakāryaparaṃ śubham ||
mamāṃśāttanayo bhūmau bhaviṣyati surottama || 52 ||
|| sūta uvāca || ||
ityuktvā svasya biṃbasya tejorāśiṃ samantataḥ ||
samutpādya kṛtaḥ kāśyāṃ rāmānaṃdastatobhavat || 53 ||
devalasya ca viprasya kānyakubjasya vai sutaḥ ||
bālyātprabhṛti sa jñānī rāmanāmaparāyaṇaḥ ||
pitrā mātrā parityakto rāghavaṃ śaraṇaṃ gataḥ || 54 ||
tadā tu bhagavānsākṣāccaturdaśakalo hariḥ ||
sītāpatistaddhṛdaye nivāsaṃ kṛtavānmudā || 55 ||
iti te kathitaṃ vipra mitradevāṃśato yathā ||
rāmānaṃdastu balavānharibhakteśca saṃbhavaḥ || 56 ||
|| bṛhaspatiruvāca || ||
śṛṇu śakra kathāṃ ramyāṃ jyeṣṭhamāsasya vai raveḥ||
aryamā nāma vai vipraḥ purā satyayuge hyabhūt ||
vedavedāṃgatattvajño dharmaśāstraparāyaṇaḥ || 57 ||
tasya patnī pitṛmatī śrāddhayajñasya bhūpateḥ ||
tanayā ca mahāsādhvī sapta putrānakalmaṣān ||
aryamṇo janayāmāsa dharmaśāstraparāyaṇan|| 58 ||
ekadā sa dvijo dhīmānvicāryya bahudhā hṛdi||
dhanārthī bhāskaraṃ devaṃ tuṣṭāva bahupūjanaiḥ || 59 ||
prabhāte śvetakusumaiścandanādibhirarcanaiḥ ||
madhyāhne raktakusumaiḥ pītapuṣpaiḥ pitṛprasau || 3.4.7.60 ||
māsamātraṃ tu vidhinā pūjayāmāsa bhāskaram ||
jyeṣṭhe vai bhagavānsūryo dadau tasmai maṇiṃ śubham || 61 ||
tanmaṇeśca prabhāveṇa prasthamātraṃ ca kāṃcanam ||
pratyahaṃ janayāmāsa tena dharmaḥ samarjitaḥ || 62 ||
vāpīkūpataḍāgānhi tathā harmyāṇi bhūtale ||
kārayāmāsa dharmārthī sūryadevaprasādataḥ || 63 ||
sahasrābda vapurbhūtvā nirjaro nirupadravaḥ ||
tyaktvā kalevaraṃ ramyaṃ sūryalokamupāyayau ||
uṣitvā tatra lakṣābdaṃ sūryarūpo babhūva ha || 64 ||
ityevaṃ bhāskarasyaiva māhātmyaṃ kathitaṃ mayā ||
tasmācchakra suraiḥ sārddhaṃ bhaja maṃḍalagaṃ ravim || 65 ||
iti śrutvā tu te devāḥ padyaiḥ sūryakathā mayaiḥ ||
toṣayāṃcakrire premṇā jyeṣṭhamāsi ravistvasau ||
pratyakṣamabhavattatra devānāha prasannadhīḥ || 66 ||
sudarśano dvāparānte kṛṣṇājñapto janiṣyati || 67 ||
nimbāditya iti khyāto dharmaglāniṃ hariṣyati ||
|| sūta uvāca || ||
śṛṇuṣva caritaṃ tasya nimbārkasya mahātmanaḥ || 68 ||
yamāha bhagavānkṛṣṇaḥ kuru kāryaṃ mamājñayā ||
merośca dakṣiṇe pārśve narmadāyāstaṭe śubhe || 69 ||
deśe tailaṃgake ramye devarṣivarasevite ||
tatrāvatīrya saddharmānnāradāddevadarśanāt || 3.4.7.70 ||
labdhvā bhūmau vartayasva naṣṭaprāyānmamājñayā ||
māthure naimiṣāraṇye dvāravatyāṃ mamāśrame || 71 ||
sudarśanāśramādau ca sthitiḥ kāryā tvayānagha ||
omityādeśamādāya bhagavāñśrīsudarśanaḥ || 72 ||
bhaktābhīṣṭapradaḥ sākṣādavatīrṇo mahītale ||
deśe tailaṃgake puṇye dvijavaryo mahāmanā || 73 ||
sudarśanāśrame puṇye bhṛguvaṃśasamudbhavaḥ ||
nāmnā.a.aruṇa iti khyāto vedavedāṃgapāragaḥ || 74 ||
ṛṣirūpadharaścāsījjayaṃtyā bhāryayā saha ||
samāhitaṃ tena tejo viṣṇucakrasamudbhavam || 75 ||
dadhāra manasā devī jayantī patidevatā ||
tejasā śuśubhe tena candreṇeva diśāmalā || 76 ||
atha sarvaguṇopete kāle paramaśobhane ||
kārttikasya site pakṣe pūrṇimāyāṃ vṛṣe vidhau || 77 ||
kṛttikābhe mahāramye uccasthe grahapaṃ cakre ||
sūryāvasānasamaye meṣalagne niśāmukhe || 78 ||
jayantyāṃ jayarūpiṇyāṃ jajāna jagadīśvaraḥ ||
yena sarvamidaṃ viśvaṃ vedadharme niyojitam|| || 79 ||
viriñcirekadā tasminnimbārkasyāśrame śubhe ||
samāgatyāha bho brahmanprāpto.ahaṃ kṣudhayānvitaḥ || 3.4.7.80 ||
yāvatsūryaḥ sthito vyomni tāvanmāṃ bhojaya dvija ||
iti śrutvā tathetyuktvā dadau tasmai ca bhojanam || 81 ||
tadā tu bhagavānsūryo hyastācalamupāgataḥ ||
muninā ṛṣiṇā tena nimba vṛkṣe tadā śubhe || 82 ||
sthāpitaṃ tejasā svena tejastattvaṃ sudarśanam ||
tattejaḥ sūryasaṃkāśaṃ dṛṣṭvā vedhāḥ smayānvitaḥ || 83 ||
bhikṣuveṣadharaṃ bālaṃ muniṃ sūryamivāparam ||
nanāma daṃḍavadbhūmau tapasā tasya toṣitaḥ ||84||
uvāca vacanaṃ ramyaṃ sādhu sādhviti pūjayan||
nimbāditya iti khyāto vasudhāyāṃ bhaviṣyasi || 85 ||
iti śrībhaviṣye mahāpurāṇe pratisargaparvaṇi caturyugakhaṇḍāparaparyāye kaliyugīyetihāsasamuccaye rāmānaṃdaniṃbārkasamutpāttivarṇanaṃ nāma saptamo.adhyāyaḥ || 7||
|| bṛhaspatiruvāca || ||
purā tretāyuge śakra śakraśarmā dvijo hyabhūt |
ayodhyāyāṃ mahābhāgo devapūjanatatparaḥ || 1 ||
aśvinau ca tathā rudvānvasūnsūryānpṛthakpṛthak ||
yajurvedamayairmaṃtrairarcayitvā prasannadhīḥ ||
havyaiśca tarpayāmāsa devā~mstānpratyahaṃ dvijaḥ || 2 ||
tadbhāvatastrayastriṃśaddevāḥ kṣudragaṇairyutāḥ ||
dudurmanorathaṃ  tasmai durlabhaṃ sulabhīkṛtam || 3 |
daśavarṣasahasrāṇi nirjaro nirupadravaḥ ||
paścātkalevaraṃ tyaktvā paścātsūryo babhūva saḥ || 4 |
lakṣābdaṃ maṇḍale tasminnadhikāraḥ kṛtastataḥ ||
brahmalokaṃ yayau vipraḥ sarvadevaprasādataḥ|| 5||
aṣṭavarṣasahasrāṇi divyāni padamuttamam ||
vilokya maṃḍale prāptaṃ taṃ sūryaṃ japapūjanaiḥ || 6||
iti śrutvā tu vacanaṃ mahendraḥ surasaṃyutaḥ ||
āṣāḍhe bhāskaraṃ devaṃ pūjayāmāsa namradhīḥ || 7 ||
āṣāḍhapūrṇimāyāṃ ca sa devo jagatītale||
pratyakṣamagamattatra surānāha śṛṇuṣva tat ||8||
vṛndāvane mahāramye janayiṣye kalau bhaye ||
sa dvijaḥ sūryarūpaśca devakāryaṃ kariṣyati || 9 ||
mādhavasya dvijasyaiva tanayaḥ sa bhaviṣyati ||
madhurnāma mahābhāgo vedamārgaparāyaṇaḥ ||3.4.8.10||
|| sūta uvāca || ||
ityuktvā bhagavānsūryo devakāryārthamudyataḥ||
svāṃgāttu teja utpādya vṛṃdāvanamapre(pe?)ṣayat || 11||
vimukhānmadhurālāpairvaśīkṛtya samantataḥ ||
tebhyaśca vaiṣṇavīṃ śaktiṃ pradadau bhuktimuktidām |
madhvācārya iti khyātaḥ prasiddho.abhūnmahītale||| 12||
jīva uvāca || ||
dvāpare ca dvijaśreṣṭho meghaśarmā babhūva ha ||
jñānavānmatimāndharmī vedamārgaparāyaṇaḥ|| 13||
kṛṣikṛtyaparo nityaṃ taddhanaiśca daśāṃśakaiḥ ||
pratyahaṃ sakalāndevānarcayāmāsa bhaktimān ||14||
ekadā pañcavarṣābde śantanau ca mahīpatau ||
saṃprāpte tasya vai deśe hyanāvṛṣṭirbabhūva ha||15||
krośamātraṃ hi tatkṣetraṃ parjanyenaiva secitam ||
dhānyānāṃ droṇamānaśca bhāvo.abhūdekamudrayā||16||
meghaśarmā tadā tatra dhanadhānyayuto.abhavat|
anye tu pīḍitā lokā rājānaṃ śaraṇa yayuḥ||17||
tadā tu duḥkhito rājā meghaśarmāṇamāhvayat ||
dvijaśreṣṭha namastubhyaṃ gururbhava mama priyaḥ || 18 ||
anāvṛṣṭiryathā na syāttathā vipra samādiśa ||19||
ityevaṃvādinaṃ bhūpaṃ meghaśarmā vaco.abravīt ||
śrāvaṇe māsi saṃprāpte viprānvedaparāyaṇān|| 3.4.8.20||
dvādaśaiva samāhūya lakṣamātraṃ raveḥ svayam||
jāpayitvā sumanasā pūrṇimāyāṃ tu tadvratī ||
sūryamantrāhutīrvahnau taddaśāṃśaṃ hi taddvijaiḥ || 21 ||
kārayitvā vidhānena kṛtakṛtyaḥ sukhī bhava ||
iti śrutvā tathā kṛtvā bhojayāmāsa vedagān||22||
prasannastu tadā sūryaḥ parjanyātmā samantataḥ||
bhūmimācchādya sa diśaṃ prabhurvṛṣṭimakārayat||23||
śantanustu tadā rājā sūryavrataparāyaṇaḥ ||
tadvratena mahāpuṇyo babhūva nṛpasattamaḥ || 24||
yaṃ yaṃ kareṇa spṛśati vṛddho bhavati vai yuvā ||
sūryadevaprabhāvena meghaśarmā tathā hyabhūt|| 25 ||
sa vai paṃcaśatāyuśca nirjaro nirupadravaḥ ||
tyaktvā prāṇānravirbhūtvā sūryalokamupāgamat||
lakṣābda bhuvamāsādya brahmalokaṃ gamiṣyati ||26||
ityevaṃvādinaṃ jīvaṃ parjanyo bhagavānraviḥ ||
svarūpaṃ darśayāmāsa prayāgaṃ prati cāgataḥ || 27 ||
murā nāha prasannātmā mleccharājye kalau yuge ||
vṛndāvane samāgamya devakāryaṃ karomyaham || 28 ||
|| sūta uvāca || ||
ityuktvā bhagavānsūryo gatvā vṛndāvanaṃ śubham ||
śrīdharo nāma vikhyātaḥ putrobhūdvedaśarmaṇaḥ || 29 ||
śrīmadbhāgavataṃ śāstraṃ samālokya viśāradaḥ ||
cakāra viduṣāmarthe pradīptaṃ śrīdharaḥ śubham ||
śrīmadbhāgavataṃ śāstraṃ purāṇopari tatkṛtam || 3.4.8.30 ||
|| jīva uvāca || ||
purā kalau yuge prāpte prāṃśuśarmā dvijo.abhavat||
vedaśāstraparo nityaṃ devatātithipūjakaḥ || 31 ||
satyavādī mahāsādhuḥ steyahiṃsāvivarjitaḥ ||
bhikṣāvṛttiparo nityaṃ putradāraprapoṣakaḥ || 32 ||
ekadā pathi bhikṣārthaṃ gacchatastasya bhūpateḥ ||
māyākṛtyakaro dhūrtaḥ kalistatrākṣigocaraḥ || 33 ||
babhūva vāṭikāṃ kṛtvā kalirdānamanoharām ||
tamuvāca dvijo bhūtvā prāṃśuśarmanvacaḥ śṛṇu || 34 ||
mameyaṃ vāṭikā ramyā tatra gaccha sukhī bhava ||
iti vipravacaḥ śrutvā vāṭikāṃ tāṃ samāgataḥ || 35 ||
kalistu vāṭikāmadhye gatvā ramyaphalāni ca ||
troṭayitvā dadau tasmai bhojanārthaṃ mahākhalaḥ || 36 ||
prāṃjaliḥ praṇato bhūtvā prāṃśuśarmāṇamabravīt ||
bhuṃkṣva vipra mayā sārddhaṃ kaliṃdasya phalaṃ śubham || 37 ||
ityuktaḥ sa tu taṃ prāha vihasya madhura svaram ||
vṛkṣe bibhītake caiva kaliṃdasya phale tathā ||
kaliḥ prāptaḥ smṛtaḥ prājñaistasmādgṛhṇāmyahaṃ na hi || 38 ||
yadi dattaṃ phalaṃ bhaktyā tvayādya dvijasevinā ||
śālagrāmāya vai dattvā prasādaṃ tadbhajāmyaham ||
śālagrāmaḥ svayaṃ brahma saccidānandavigrahaḥ || 39 ||
darśanāttasya cābhakṣyo bhakṣyo bhavati niścitaḥ ||
iti śrutvā kalistatra lajjito.abhūnnirāśakaḥ ||
dvijastu tatphalaṃ gṛhya bhūmigrāmamupāyayau ||3.4.8.40||
nṛpatistatra cāgatya dvijamāha prasannadhīḥ ||
kiṃ gṛhītaṃ tvayā vipra darśayāśu priyaṃ kuru || 41 ||
iti śrutvā prāṃśuśarmā tatphalaṃ vatsamuṃḍavat ||
gṛhītvā pradadau rājñe vismito dvijasattamaḥ || 42 ||
tadā tu sa kalirbhūpastaṃ vipraṃ tāḍya vetasaiḥ ||
kārāgāre lohamaye kṛtavānnyāyamitrakaḥ || || 43 ||
prātaḥkāle ravau prāpte prāṃśuśarmā suduḥkhitaḥ ||
tuṣṭāva bhāskaraṃ devaṃ stotrairṛgvedasaṃbhavaiḥ || 44 ||
tadā prasanno bhagavānraviḥ sākṣātsanātanaḥ ||
viprasya karṇayorvākyamuvāca nabhaseritam || 45 ||
śṛṇu vipra mahābhāga kālarūpo hariḥ svayam ||
caturyugaṃ tena kṛtaṃ viśvapālādihetave || 46 ||
kalirviśvasamūhānāṃ mṛtyave racitastathā ||
ato ghore kalau prāpte viṣṇumāyāvinirmitam ||
kaliñjaraṃ ca nagaraṃ tatroṣya mudito bhava || 47 ||
ityuktvā rakṣaṇaṃ kṛtvā tasya viprasya bhāskaraḥ ||
kaliñjare ca nagare preṣayāmāsa taṃ dvijam || || 48 ||
sapādaśatavarṣaṃ ca dvijastatra vasanravim ||
ārādhya putrapatnīko ravilokamupāyayau || 49 ||
sa vai bhādrapade māsi sūryo bhūtvāyutābdakam||
paścādbrahmapuraṃ prāpya paramānandamāptavān ||
iti te kathitaṃ vipra yathā jīvastamabravīt || 3.4.8.50 ||
āgatya bhāskaro devaḥ pūrṇimāyāṃ tu bhādrake ||
aṣṭāviṃśe kalau prāpte svayaṃ jātaḥ kaliñjare || 51 ||
śivadattasya tanayo viṣṇuśarmeti viśrutaḥ ||
vedaśāstrakalābhijño vaiṣṇavo deva pūjakaḥ || 52 ||
caturvarṇānnarānvipra samāhūya harergṛhe ||
vacanaṃ prāha dharmātmā viṣṇuḥ sarveśvaro hariḥ || 53 ||
śṛṇu tatkāraṇaṃ śiṣya viśvakāraṇa kārakaḥ ||
bhagavānsaccidānandaścaturviśatitattvavān ||
devānsasarja lokārthe tasmātsarveśvaro.abhavat || 54 ||
pūrvaṃ hi sakalāndevānpūjayitvā naraḥ śuciḥ ||
paścācca pūjayedviṣṇuṃ yathā bhṛtyā nṛpaṃ punaḥ || 55 ||
iti śrutvā tu te sarve praśasya bahudhā hi tam ||
viṣṇusvāmīti taṃ nāmnā kathāṃ cakruśca harṣitāḥ ||56||
iti te kathitaṃ vipra viṣṇusvāmī yathābhavat ||
punaḥ śṛṇu kathāṃ ramyāṃ bṛhaspatimukheritām ||57||
|| jīva uvāca || ||
purā caitrarathe deśe bhagaśarmā dvijo.abhavat ||
svarveśyā maṃjughoṣāyāṃ munimedhāvinā bhuvi || 58 ||
pitṛmātṛparityaktaḥ sa bālaḥ śraddhayānvitaḥ ||
sūryamārādhayāmāsa tapasā śatavārṣikam || 99 ||
sūryamaṇḍalamadhyasthā sāvitrī nāma devatā ||
sarvasūryasya jananī kanyā tanmaṇḍalasya vai || 3.4.8.60||
prasannā tapasā tasya prādurbhūtā sanātanī ||
āśvine māsi rājānaṃ dvijaṃ cakre ca maṇḍale || 61 ||
lakṣavarṣasahasrāṇi māsi māsi tathāśvine ||
prakāśaṃ kṛtavānvipraḥ pūjito lokavāsibhiḥ || 62 ||
tvaṃ sūryaṃ bhaja devendra sa te kāryaṃ kariṣyati ||
iti śrutvāśvine māsi sa ravirdevapūjanāt || 63 ||
pratyakṣamagamattatra vacaḥ prāha surānprati ||
kānyakubje śubhe deśe vāṇībhūṣaṇa ityaham ||
bhavāmi satyadevasya viprasya tanayaḥ śubhaḥ || 64 ||
|| sūta uvāca || ||
ityuktvā bhagavānsūryo jātaḥ kānyapure śubhe ||
jitvā pākhaṃḍino viprānmāṃsabhakṣaṇatatparān ||
chaṃdograṃthaṃ svanāmnā vai kṛtavāndaivatapriyaḥ || 65 ||
matsyamāṃsāśanā viprā mṛgameṣājakāśanāḥ ||
ekībhūya samāgamya cakruḥ śāstrārthamulbaṇam ||66||
kalinā.adharmamitreṇa rakṣitāste dvijātayaḥ ||
taṃ dvijaṃ ca parājitya matsyaketuṃ ca tadgṛhe || 67 ||
balācca staṃbhanaṃ cakrustadā viṣṇupriyo dvijaḥ ||
vaiṣṇavīṃ śaktimāgamya svamukhānmīnakhāditān || 68 ||
saṃjīvya darśayāmāsa te dṛṣṭvā vismitāstadā ||
śiṣyabhūtāśca te tasya vaiṣṇavaṃ matamā gaman || 69 ||
|| jīva uvāca || ||
kadācitsarayūtīre devayājī dvijo.abhavat ||
sarvadevaparo nityaṃ vedapāṭhaparāyaṇaḥ || 3.4.8.70 ||
tatsutastu mṛtiṃ prāpto janmamātre hi dāruṇe ||
tadā tu sa dvijaḥ śrutvā sūryadevamatoṣayat || 71 ||
jijīva tatprasādena vivasvānnāma cābhavat ||
ṣoḍaśābda vapurbhūtvā sarvavidyāviśāradaḥ || 72 ||
apatyavāndharmaparaḥ sūryavataparāyaṇaḥ ||
śivarātridine prāpte tatpatnī bhūṣaṇapriyā || 73 ||
suśīlā nāma vikhyātā patisevārthamāgatā ||
sa vratī rudradevasya dṛṣṭvā tāṃ madhurānanām || 74 ||
balādgṛhītvā tu niśi bubhuje smaravihvalaḥ ||
maithunasyaiva doṣeṇa tasya kuṣṭho mahānabhūt || 75 ||
liṃgedriyaṃ ca patitaṃ gudabhraṣṭo mahāṃgaruk ||
kena cidupadeśena ravivārasya vai vratam || 76 ||
sa cakre dvādaśaṃ premṇā nirāhāro yatendriyaḥ ||
tena vrataprabhāveṇa sarvapīḍā layaṃ gatāḥ || 77 ||
tadā śraddhā ravau prāptā pratyahaṃ sa dvijottamaḥ ||
āditya hṛdayaṃ japtvā kāmarūpo dvijo.abhavat || 78 ||
nārībhirbhartsitaḥ pūrvaṃ sotha kāminīyācitaḥ ||
brahmacaryavrataṃ kṛtvā brahmadhyānaparo.abhavat || 79 ||
śatāyurbrāhmaṇo bhūtvā jñānavānrogavarjitaḥ ||
tyaktvā prāṇānravirbhūtvā sūryamaṇḍalamadhyagāt || 3.4.8.80 ||
kārtike māsi lakṣābdaṃ prakāśaṃ kṛtavānnabhaḥ ||
taṃ ca sūryaṃ mahendrastvaṃ pūjayāśu suraiḥ saha || 81 ||
|| sūta uvāca || ||
iti śrutvā mahendrastu māsamātraṃ hi bhāskaram ||
pūjayitvā vidhānena pūrṇimāyāṃ dadarśa ha || 82 ||
uvāca śakraṃ sa ravirdevakāryaṃ karomyaham ||
bhaṭṭairvidyāmayairdhūrtaiḥ sūtrapāṭhaśca khaṃḍitaḥ || 83 ||
dhātupāṭho nyapaṭhito bhraṃśārthaḥ svaravarṇakaḥ ||
jitvā tānbhaṭṭapāṣaṃḍānvedamuddhārayāmi bhoḥ || 84 ||
ityuktvā sa gataḥ kāśyāṃ gehe vai vedaśarmaṇaḥ ||
dīkṣitānvayabhūtasya nāmnā kāryaguṇo.abhavat || 85 ||
dvādaśābdavapurbhūtvā sarvaśāstraviśāradaḥ ||
śivamārādhayāmāsa viśvanāthaṃ śivāpriyam || 86 ||
trivarṣānte ca bhagavāṃstasmai jñānaṃ mahaddadau ||
tasya jñānaprabhāveṇa vyaktamavyaktamuttamam || 87 ||
jñātaṃ kāryaguṇenaiva dīkṣitena tadā hṛdi ||
avyakte yadā buddhiḥ sā vidyā dvādaśāṃginī || 88 ||
vyakte.ahaṃkārabhūte ca buddhirjñeyā budhairajā ||
avidyā nāma vikhyātā ṣoḍaśāṃgasvarūpiṇī || 89 ||
avyaktaṃ tu paraṃ brahma vyaktaṃ śabdamayaṃ smṛtam ||
ahaṃkāro lokakaro hi vyakto.aṣṭadaśāṃgakaḥ ||3.4.8.90||
vṛṣarūpadharo mukhyo nandiyānaḥ smṛto budhaiḥ ||
śṛṅgāṇi tasya catvāri tripādo dviśirā vṛṣaḥ||91||
saptahastastridhā baddho nityaśuddho mukhe sthitaḥ||
suvantaśca tiṅantaśca kṛdaṃtaścāvyayastathā||92||
dvaudvau śṛṃgau ca śirasornaṃdiyānasya vai smṛtau ||
bhūtaṃ bhavyaṃ bhavaccaiva trayaḥ pādā hi tasya vai || 93 ||
rūḍhiśca yogarūḍhiśca śabdau tasya śirodvayam ||
kartā karma ca karaṇaṃ saṃpradānaṃ vibhāgataḥ || 94 ||
saṃvaṃdhaścādhikāraśca bhujāstasya vṛṣasya vai ||
vākyaṃ svarānvitaṃ jñeyaṃ vibhattyaṃtaṃ padaṃ smṛtam || 95 ||
tābhyāṃ baddhaśca sa vṛṣo nandiyānātha te namaḥ ||
tasyoparisthitaṃ nityamavyaktaṃ liṃgarūpi yat || 96 ||
jātaśca vṛṣaliṃgābhyāṃ so.ahaṃkāro hariḥ svayam||
nārāyaṇaḥ ṣoḍaśātmā bahumūrtiramūrtikaḥ || 97 ||
iti jñānaṃ hṛdi prāpya tadā siddhāntakaumudīm ||
jitvā bhaṭṭāṃścakārāśu bhaṭṭojiḥ praśruto.abhavat ||98||
|| jīva uvāca || ||
purā kāṃcīpure ramye gaṇako brāhmaṇottamaḥ||
purodhāḥ satyadattasya rājño vedaparasya vai || 99 ||
ekadā gaṇako dhīmānsatyadattamuvāca ha ||
muhūrto.abhijidākhyoyaṃ puṣyanakṣatrasaṃyutaḥ ||
hāṭaṃ kuru mahārāja sāṃprataṃ bahuvṛttidam || 3.4.8.100 ||
iti śrutvā tathā kṛtvā ḍiṃḍimadhvaninā pure ||
narānājñāpayāmāsa tacchṛṇuṣva surottama || 101 ||
akrītaṃ yasya vai vastu hāṭe.asminvaiśyakovidaiḥ ||
mayā krītaṃ ca tajjñeyaṃ satyametadvaco mama || 102 ||
iti śrutvā śūdrajanāścakrurnānāvidhaṃ vasu ||
vaiśyaissarvaṃ tadā krītaṃ mahānhāṭo hi so.abhavat || 103 ||
ekadā lohakāraśca dāridraṃ loharūpiṇam ||
kṛtvā hāṭamupāgamya śatamudrāmayācata || 104 ||
akrītaṃ puruṣaṃ rājā jñātvā lohadaridrakam ||
krītaṃ taṃ śatamudrābhirgṛhītvā gehamāgamat ||
kośāgāre tadā rājñā sthāpitobhūddaridrakaḥ || 105 ||
niśīthe tama udbhūte karma dharmaśca mā tathā ||
bhūpagehātsamāgatya paśyatastasya nirgatāḥ || 106 ||
tatpaścātsatyapuruṣo rājānamidamabravīt ||
daridro yatra bhūpāla tatra karmaparo na hi ||
karmaṇā rahito dharmo bhūtale na sthiro bhavet || 107 ||
dharmeṇa rahitā lakṣmīrna śobheta kadācana ||
ahaṃ lakṣmyā vihīnaśca na tiṣṭhāmi kadācana || 108 ||
ityuktvā gantumicchaṃtaṃ gṛhītvā karayornṛpaḥ ||
namrībhūto vacaḥ prāha śṛṇu satyaṃ mama priyam || 109 ||
na tyājyo hi mayā deva bhavānkiṅgantumarhati ||
iti śrutvā tu vacanaṃ satyadevo gṛhegamat || 3.4.8.110 ||
tatpaścācca svayaṃ lakṣmīstadgehe gaṃtumudyatā ||
tāmāha bhūpatirdhīro devi tvaṃ caṃcalā sadā || 111 ||
acalā bhava bho mātastarhi manmadiraṃ vraja ||
iti śrutvā varaṃ dattvā nṛpagehaṃ yayau tadā || 112 ||
purodhasaṃ taṃ gaṇakaṃ samāhūya nṛpottamaḥ ||
lakṣasvarṇaṃ dadau tasmai kathitvā sarvakāraṇam || 113 ||
putrajanmani kāle tu saṃprāptaṃ tena vai dhanam ||
vyayaṃ kṛtvā dhanaṃ sarvaṃ poṣayāmāsa bālakam || 114 ||
pūṣā nāma tato jātaṃ mārgaśīrṣe śubhe dine ||
sa tu sūryaṃ samārādhya jyotiḥśāstraparaḥ sutaḥ || 115 ||
sūrye tu mokṣamagamaddevadevaprasādataḥ ||
tasmāttvaṃ mārgamāse vai raviṃ devendra pūjaya ||116||
|| sūta uvāca || ||
devendrapūjanātsūryassamāgamya tadā svayam ||
pūṣā nāma vaco devānuvāca madhurasvaram ||117||
ujjayinyāmahaṃ devā yāsye rudrapaśorgṛhe ||
nāmnā ca mihirācāryo jyotiśśāstrapravarttakaḥ || 118 ||
ityuktvā bhagavānpūṣā putro jāto dvijasya vai ||
mūlagaḍāntaviṣaye.abhijidyoge śubhaṃkare || 119 ||
jātamātraṃ ca taṃ putraṃ pitā kāṣṭhakaṭāhake ||
dhṛtvā kṣiptvā nadīmadhye niśīthe samavāhayat || 3.4.8.120 ||
samudramagamatputro rākṣasībhiśca rakṣitaḥ ||
laṃkāmāgamya tatraiva jyotiḥśāstramadhīta vān|| 121 ||
jātakaṃ phalitaṃ caiva mūkapraśnaṃ tathāditaḥ ||
paṭhitvā rākṣaseṃdraṃ ca vibhīṣaṇamupāgatam || 122 ||
bhaktarāja namastubhyaṃ vibhīṣaṇa hari priya ||
āhṛto rākṣasībhiśca tvāmahaṃ śaraṇaṃ gataḥ || 123 ||
iti śrutvā ca sa nṛpo vaiṣṇavaṃ dvijamuttamam ||
matvā saṃpreṣayāmasa yatra tajjanmabhūmikā || 124 ||
mlecchairvināśitaṃ yattu vedāṃgaṃ jyotiṣāṃ gatiḥ ||
punaruddhāritaṃ tena tridhābhūtaṃ sanātanam || 125 ||
iti śrībhaviṣye mahāpurāṇe pratisargaparvaṇi caturyugakhaṇḍāparaparyāye kaliyugīyetihāsasamuccaye madhvācāryaśrīdharācāryaviṣṇusvāmi vāṇībhūṣaṇabhaṭṭojidīkṣitavarāhamihirācāryotpattivarṇano nāmā.aṣṭamo.adhyāyaḥ ||8||
sūta uvāca ||
ityuktvā bhagavāñjīvassūryamāhātmyamuttamam||
prayāge tu punardevānuvāca vacasāṃ patiḥ ||1||
pratiṣṭhānapure ramye sūryo jāto harājñayā ||
purā tretāyugāṃte ca tacchṛṇuṣva surottama || 2 ||
tretānte siṃhaladvīpe parīkṣitanṛpo.abhavat ||
vedadharmaparo nityaṃ devatātithipūjakaḥ ||3||
kanyā bhānumatī tasya sūryavrataparāyaṇā ||
bhaktibhāvena savitā pratyahaṃ tadgṛhe svayam || 4 ||
tayā kṛtaṃ śubhaṃ bhakṣyaṃ madhyāhne bhuktavānprabhuḥ||
ravivāre kadācitsā nalinī sāgaraṃ prati ||5||
snānārthamāgatā kanyā tadā nārada āgataḥ||
dṛṣṭvā manoramāṃ bālāmekākīṃ jalamadhyagām||6||
gṛhītvā vasanaṃ tasyā vacanaṃ prāha nirbhayaḥ||
pāṇiṃ gṛhāṇa me subhrūstvaddṛṣṭyā vaśamāgataḥ || 7 ||
ityuktavaṃtaṃ tu muniṃ kumārī namrakandharā ||
uvāca śṛṇu devarṣe kanyāhaṃ tvaṃ sutapradaḥ || 8||
bhavāndevāṅganābhiśca prārthitaḥ svargamaṇḍale ||
kva ca vai menakā raṃbhā kvāhaṃ manujayonijā || ||9||
navadvārepu dehesmindurgandhāḥ saṃsthitāḥ sadā ||
naiva devāṅganāṅge vai tasmāttubhyaṃ namonamaḥ||3.4.9.10
iti śrutvā vacastasyā lajjito nārudastadā||
mahādevamupāgamya coktavānsarvakāraṇam || 11 ||
kuṣṭhībhūtaṃ muniṃ dṛṣṭvā śaṃkaro lokaśaṃkaraḥ ||
tuṣṭāva bhāskaraṃ devaṃ tadā prādurabhūtprabhuḥ || 12 ||
nāradasya śubhaṃ dehaṃ kṛtvā śivamuvāca ha ||
ājñāṃ dehi mahādeva tavāśāṃ pūrayāmyaham || 13 ||
ityuktaṃ taṃ śivaḥ prāha dvijo bhūtvā bhavānbhuvi ||
gṛhāṇa nṛpateḥ kanyāṃ raviṇā tu tathā kṛtam || 14 ||
savitā bhānumatyā ca sārddhaṃ kṛtvā taponvaham ||
sūryalokaṃ punaḥ prāptassa pauṣe ca prakāśa kṛt||
taṃ bhajāśu mahendra tvaṃ devakāryaṃ prasādhaya||15||
|| sūta uvāca || ||
iti śrutvā gurorvākyaṃ mahendraśca suraissaha ||
savitāraṃ pauṣamāse tuṣṭāva śubha pūjanaiḥ || 16 ||
tadā prasanno bhagavāndevānāha śubhaṃ vacaḥ ||
ahaṃ kāśyāṃ bhavāmyadya nāmnā dhanvatariḥ svayam || 17 ||
rogaiśca pīḍitā~mllokā nkalinā nirmitairbhuvi ||
śamayiṣyāmi tatroṣya devakāryaṃ bhaviṣyati || 18 ||
ityuktvā bhagavānsūryaḥ kāśīnagaramāgataḥ ||
kalpadattasya viprasya putro bhūtvā mahītale || 19 ||
suśrutaṃ rājaputraṃ ca vipravṛddhasamanvitam ||
śiṣyaṃ kṛtvā prasannātmā kalpavedamacīkarat || 3.4.9.20 ||
rogaiśca kṣayitaṃ dehaṃ kālpametatsmṛtaṃ budhaiḥ ||
tasya jñānaṃ ca taṃtre.asmikalpavedohyataḥ smṛtaḥ || 21 ||
dhanvatarissa bhagavānprasiddhobhūtkalau yuge ||
yasya darśanamātreṇa rogā naśyaṃti tatkṣaṇāt || 22 ||
suśrutaḥ kalpavedaṃ taṃ dhanvattarivinirmitam ||
paṭhitvā ca śatādhyāyaṃ sau.aśrutaṃ taṃtramākarot ||23||
|| bṛhaspatiruvāca || ||
purā paṃpāpure ramye helī nāmnā dvijo.abhavat ||
catuṣṣaṣṭikalābhijño ravipūjanatatparaḥ ||24||
tyaktvā pratigrahaṃ vṛttiṃ kāruvṛttiṃ gṛhītavān ||
kṛtvā vastrakalaṃ lauhaṃ tathā citrakalaṃ punaḥ ||25||
dhātumūrtikalaṃ caiva sarvakārukalaṃ tathā ||
pañcasahasramudrābhirākrīṇankāruko.abhavat ||26||
kalaeko māsamātre kāle tenaiva nirmitaḥ ||
taddhanena raviṃ devaṃ yajñairmāghe hi so.arcayat||
helino bahulairyajñaissantuṣṭaḥ pratyahaṃ prabhuḥ ||
paṃpāsarovare ramye nirmitaḥ staṃbha uttamaḥ ||28||
jyotīrūpo mahāramyastatra prāpto raviḥ svayam||
madhyāhne helinā dattaṃ bhojana daivatapriyam ||29||
bhuktvā sa pratyahaṃ svāmī māsimāsi divākaraḥ ||
trailokyaṃ bhāvayāṃcakre sarvadevamayo hariḥ ||3.4.9.30||
sahasrāyurdvijo bhūtvā tyaktvā prāṇānraviḥ svayam ||
bhūtvā maṇḍalamadhyāsya māghamāsamatoṣayat ||
taṃ sūryaṃ bhaja devendra sa te kāryaṃ kariṣyati || 31 ||
|| sūta uvāca || ||
iti śrutvā gurorvākyaṃ vāsavo daivataissaha||
sūryamārādhayāmāsa viśvakarmāṇamuttamam||32||
tadā prasanno bhagavāṃstvaṣṭā tuṣṭikarojanān||
surānāha vaco ramyaṃ śṛṇudhvaṃ surasattamāḥ ||33||
bilgrāme vaṃgadeśe saṃbhavāmi niruktakṛt ||
jayadeva iti khyātaḥ kavīnāṃ hi śiromaṇiḥ || 34 ||
ityuktvā bhagavānsūryo vaṃgadeśamupāyayau ||
gehe kaṃdukino jāto brāhmaṇasya mahītale || 35 ||
sa paṃcābdavapurbhūtvā pitṛmātṛparāyaṇaḥ ||
dvādaśābdaṃ mahāsevā tatra tena tayoḥ kṛtā || 36 ||
mṛtimaṃtau ca pitarau pretakṛtyena tarpitau ||
jayadevena tau nākaṃ gayāśrāddhe hi jagmatuḥ || 37 ||
jayadevastadā vipro bhūtvā vairāgyavānbhuvi ||
tatrasthāne mahāramye vane vāsamakārayat || 38 ||
triviṃśābde tataḥ prāpte kenacinmadhurānanā ||
brāhmaṇena śubhā kanyā jagannāthāya cārpitā || 39 ||
arcāvasāne bhagavānaniruddhassanātanaḥ ||
dārubrahmamayaḥ sākṣādāha taṃ svena vai vacaḥ || 3.4.9.40 ||
śṛṇu tvaṃ bhoḥ satyavrata jayadevo vapurmama ||
padmāvatīṃ sutāṃ tasmai nivedaya mamājñayā || 41 ||
ityuktassa dvijastūrṇaṃ dṛṣṭvā vairāgarūpiṇam ||
tatra sthāpya nijāṃ kanyāṃ svagehāya mudā yayau || 42 ||
sā tu padmāvatī kanyā matvā taṃ suṃdaraṃ patim ||
tatsevāṃ sā mudā yuktā cakāra bahuvārṣikam || 43 ||
niruktaṃ vaidikaṃ cāṃgaṃ kṛtavānsa samādhinā ||
varṇāgamo gaveṃdrādau siṃhe varṇaviparyayaḥ ||
ṣoḍaśādau vikāraśca varṇanāśaḥ pṛṣodare || 44 ||
varṇavikāranāśābhyāṃ dhātoratiśayena yaḥ ||
yogastaducyate prājñairmayūrabhramarādiṣu || 49 ||
evaṃ paṃcavidhānyeva niruktāni smṛtāni vai ||
śūdraiśca nāgavaṃśīyairbhraṃśitāni kalau yuge || 46 ||
jitvā prākṛtabhāṣāyāḥ kartṛrnmūḍhānkalipriyān ||
śuddhaṃ hi pāṇiniḥ śāstraṃ cakāra surahetave || 47 ||
ekadā tu kalirdhūrto hṛdisthaścaurakarmaṇām ||
nṛpadattaṃ dvijasyaiva luṃṭhayitvā dhanaṃ bahu || 48 ||
padmāvatīṃ satīṃ matvā tyaktvā tadvai gato gṛham ||
hastau pādau dvijasyaiva kaliścoraiḥ samācchinat || 49 ||
tadā tu duḥkhitā devī gartamadhye sthitaṃ patim ||
niṣkāsya bahudhālapyāpīḍya hastena cāharat || 3.4.9.50 ||
ekasmindivase rājā mṛgayārthamupāgataḥ||
ahastapādaṃ ca muniṃ jayadevaṃ dadarśa ha ||
sa pṛṣṭastena tatraiva kṛtaṃ kena tavedṛśam || 51 ||
sa hovāca mahārāja hastapādavihīnakaḥ ||
karmaṇāhamiha prāpto na kenāpi kṛtaṃ khalu || 52 ||
iti śrutvā dharmapālo nṛpatistaṃ dvijottamam ||
sapatnīkaṃ ca śibikāmāropya svagṛhaṃ yayau || 53 ||
tasya dīkṣāṃ nṛpaḥ prāpya dharmaśālāmakāraya t ||
kadācidvaiṣṇavā bhūtā te caurāḥ kalinirmitāḥ ||
dharmapālagṛhaṃ prāpya rājānamidamabruvan || 54 ||
vayaṃ hi śāstranipuṇāstava gehamupāgatāḥ||
asmābhirnirmitaṃ bhojyaṃ svayaṃ viṣṇuḥ śilāmayaḥ ||
saṃbhuṃkte pratyahaṃ prītyā tatpaśya nṛpasattama || 55 ||
ityuktvā kalibhaktāste viṣṇurūpaṃ caturbhujam ||
nṛpāya darśayāmāsurbhuktavaṃtaṃ svamāyayā || 56 ||
vismito dharmapālaśca jayadevamuvāca ha ||
guro madbhavane prāptā vaiṣṇavā viṣṇutatparāḥ||
adīdṛśanhariṃ sākṣāttasmāttvaṃ śīghramāvraja ||57||
iti śrutvā dvijaḥ prāpto vismito.abhūttathā nṛpaḥ ||
tadā tu taṃ hi pākhaṃḍā bhūpamūcurvihasya te || || 58 ||
asau vipraśca nṛpate gauḍadeśe nivāsinaḥ ||
sūdo bhakṣyakarastasmai kadāciddhanalobhataḥ || 59 ||
garalaṃ miśritaṃ bhakṣye tena pākhaṃḍarūpiṇā ||
jñātvā rājā tu taṃ vipraṃ śūlamadhye hyaropayat || 3.4.9.60 ||
etasminnaṃtare rājanvayaṃ tatra samāgatāḥ ||
āgaskṛtaṃ dvijaṃ matvā dattvā jñānānya nekaśaḥ ||
śūlāttaṃ hi samuttārya hastau pādau nṛpo.acchinat || 61 ||
asmākaṃ śiṣyabhūto hi rājāsmābhiḥ prabodhitaḥ ||
ityuktamātre vacane duḥkhitābhūcca dāritā || 62 ||
caurā~mstānsā hi pātāle cakāra surarakṣitān ||
jayadevastathā bhūtāndṛṣṭvā caurānruroda ha || 63 ||
kraṃdamāne dvije tasminhastāṃghrī prakṛtiṃ gatau ||
vismitaṃ nṛpatiṃ tatra sarvaṃ hetumavarṇayat || 64 ||
śrutvā rājā prasannātmā jayadevamukhodbhavam ||
gītagoviṃdamevāśu paṭhitvā mokṣamāgamat || 65 ||
iti te kathitaṃ vipra jayadevo yathābhavat ||
kṛṣṇacaitanyacaritaṃ yathā jātaṃ śṛṇuśva tat || 66 ||
iti śrībhaviṣye mahāpurāṇe pratisargaparvaṇi caturyugakhaṇḍāparaparyāye kaliyugīyetihāsasamuccaye dhanvaṃtarisuśrutajayadevasamutpattivarṇano nāma navamo .adhyāyaḥ || 9 ||5||
|| jīva uvāca || ||
viṣṇuśarmā purā kaścidviprobhūdvedapāragaḥ ||
sarvadevamayaṃ viṣṇuṃ pūjayitvā prasannadhīḥ ||1||
anyaissuraiśca saṃpūjyo babhūva haripūjanāt ||
bhikṣāvṛttiparo nityaṃ patnīmānputravarjitaḥ || 2 ||
kadācittasya gehe vai vratī kaścitsamāgataḥ ||
dvijapatnīṃ tadaikākīṃ bhaktinamrāṃ daridriṇīm ||
dṛṣṭvovāca mahābhāgaḥ sa sparśāḍhyo dayāparaḥ || 3 ||
anena sparśamaṇinā lohadhātuśca kāṃcanam ||
bhavettasmānmahāsādhvi tridināṃtaṃ gṛhāṇa tam || 4 ||
snātvā tāvatsarayvāṃ cāyāsyāmi teṃtikaṃ mudā ||
ityuktvā sa yayau vipro brāhmaṇī bahu kāṃcanam ||
kṛtvā lakṣmīṃ samāpyāsīdviṣṇuśarmā tadāgamat || 5 ||
bahusvarṇayutāṃ patnīṃ dṛṣṭvovāca haripriyaḥ ||
gaccha nāri madāghūrṇe yatra vai rasiko janaḥ || || 6 ||
ahaṃ viṣṇuparo dīnaścaurabhītaḥ sadaiva hi ||
madhumattāṃ kathaṃ tvāṃ vai gṛhītuṃ bhuvi ca kṣamaḥ ||7||
iti śrutvā vaco ghoraṃ patibhītā pativratā ||
sasvarṇaṃ sparśakaṃ tasmai dattvā sevāparābhavat || 8 ||
dvijo.api ghargharāmadhye taddravyaṃ balato.akṣipat ||
tridinānte ca sa yatistatrāgatya mudānvitaḥ ||
uvāca brāhmaṇīṃ dīnāṃ svarṇaṃ kiṃ na kṛtaṃ tvayā || 9 ||
sāha bho matpatiśśuddho gṛhītvā sparśakaṃ ruṣā ||
gharghare ca nicikṣepa tatohaṃ vahnipākinī ||
nirloho vartate viprastataḥ prabhṛti he guro || 3.4.10.10 ||
iti śrutvā tu vacanaṃ sa yatirvismayānvitaḥ ||
sthitvā dinānte taṃ vipramuvāca bahu bhartsayan || 11 ||
daridro bhikṣukaścāsti bhavāndaivena mohitaḥ ||
dehi me sparśakaṃ śīghraṃ no cetprāṇāṃstyajāmyaham|| 12 ||
ityuktavaṃtaṃ yatinaṃ viṣṇu śarmā tadābravīt ||
gaccha tvaṃ ghargharākūle tatra vai sparśakastava ||13||
ityuktvā yatinā sārddhaṃ gṛhītvā kaṃṭakānbahūn ||
yatine darśayāmāsa sparśakāniva kaṃṭakān || 14 ||
tadā tu sa yatī vipraṃ natvā provāca namradhīḥ ||
mayā vai dvādaśābdāṃtaṃ samyagārādhitaḥ śivaḥ ||
tataḥ prāptaṃ śubhaṃ ratnaṃ tattu taddarśanena vai || 15 ||
sparśako bahudhā prāpto mayā lobhātmanā dvija ||
ityābhāṣya śubhaṃ jñānaṃ prāpto mokṣamavāptavān || 16 ||
viṣṇuśarmā sahasrābdamuṣitvā jagatītale ||
sūryamārādhya vidhivadviṣṇormokṣamavāptavān||17||
sa dvijo vaiṣṇavaṃ tejo dhṛtvā vai māsi phālgune||
trailokyamatapatsvāmī devakāryaparāyaṇaḥ || 18 ||
sūta uvāca ||
ityuktvā bhagavāñjīvaḥ punaḥ prāha śacīpatim ||
phālgune māsi taṃ sūryaṃ samārādhya sukhī bhava || || 19 ||
ityukto guruṇā devo dhyātvā sarvamayaṃ harim ||
pūjanairbahudhākārairdevadevamapūjayat || 3.4.10.20 ||
tadā prasanno bhagavānsamabhūtsūryamaṇḍalāt ||
caturbhujo hi raktāṃgo yathā yakṣastathaiva saḥ ||
paśyatāṃ sarvadevānāṃ śakradehamupāgamat || 21 ||
tattejasā tadā śakraḥ svāntarlīya svakaṃ vapuḥ || |
ayonissa dvijo bhūtvā śacī devī tathaiva sā || 22 ||
tadā tau mithunībhūtau vaiṣṇavāgniprapīḍitau ||
remāte varṣaparyantaṃ gaṃgākūle mahāvane|| ||| 23 ||
adhādgarbhaṃ tadā devī śacī tu dvijarūpiṇī ||
bhādraśukle gurau vāre dvādaśyāṃ brāhmamaṇḍale || 24 ||
prādurāsītsvayaṃ viṣṇurdhṛtvā sarva kalāṃ hariḥ ||
caturbhujaśca raktāṅgo ravikuṃbhasamaprabhaḥ || 25 ||
tadā rudrāśca vasavo viśvedevā marudgaṇāḥ ||
sādhyāśca bhāskarāḥ siddhāstuṣṭuvustaṃ sanātanam || 26 ||
|| devā ūcuḥ || ||
kuliśadhvajapadmagadāṃkuśābhaṃ caraṇaṃ tava nātha mahābharaṇam ||
ramaṇaṃ munibhirvidhiśaṃbhuyutaṃ praṇamāma vayaṃ bhavabhītiharam || 27 || daracakragadāmbujamānadharaḥ suraśatrukaṭhoraśarīraharaḥ ||
sacarācaralokabharaścapalaḥ khalanāśakarassurakārya karaḥ || 28 ||
namaste śacīnaṃdanānandakārinmahāpāpasantāpadurlāpahārin ||
surārīnnihatyāśu lokādhidhārinsvabhaktyāghajātāṅgakoṭi prahārin || 29 ||
tvayā haṃsarūpeṇa satyaṃ prapālyaṃ tvayā yajñarūpeṇa vedaḥ prarakṣya ||
sa vai yajñarūpo bhavā~mllokadhārī śacīnandanaḥ śakraśarmaprasaktaḥ || 3.4.10.30 || anarpitacarocirātkaruṇayāvatīrṇaḥ kalau samarpayitumunnatojvalarasāṃ svabhaktiśriyam || hareḥ punarasundaradyutikadaṃbasandīpitaḥ sadā sphuratu no hṛdayakandare śacīnaṃdanaḥ || 31|| visarjati narānbhavānkaruṇayā prapālya kṣitau nivedayitumudbhavaḥ parātparaṃ svakīyaṃ padam ||
kalau ditijasaṃbhavādhivyathābdhisuramagnagānsamuddhara mahāprabho kṛṣṇacaitanya śacīsuta || 32 ||
mādhuryyairmadhubhissugaṃdhavadanaḥ svarṇāṃbujānāṃ vanaṃ kāruṇyā mṛtanirjharairupacitaḥ satpremahemācalaḥ ||
bhaktāṃbhodharadhāriṇī vijayinī niṣkaṃpasaptāvalī devo na: kuladevataṃ vijayate caitanyakṛṣṇo hariḥ || 33 ||
devārātijanairadharmajanitaissapīḍiteyaṃ mahī saṃkucyāśu kalau kalevaramidaṃ bījāya hā vartate ||
tvannāmnaiva surārayo vidalitāḥ pātālagāḥ pīḍitā mlecchā dharmaparāḥ sureśanamanāstasmai namo vyāpine || 34 ||
|| sūta uvāca || ||
ityabhiṣṭūya puruṣaṃ yajñeśaṃ ca śacīpatim ||
bṛhaspatimupāgamya devā vacanamabruvan || 35 ||
vayaṃ rudrā mahābhāga ime ca vasavo.aśvinau ||
kena kenāṃśakenaiva janiṣyāmo mahītale ||
tatsarvaṃ kṛpayā deva vaktu marhati no bhavān || 36 ||
