|| bṛhaspatiruvāca || ||
ahaṃ vaḥ kathayiṣyāmi śṛṇudhvaṃ surasattamāḥ ||
purā pūrvabhave cāsīnmṛgavyādho dvijādhamaḥ ||
dhanurbāṇadharo nityaṃ mārge vipravihiṃsakaḥ ||37||
hatvā dvijānmahāmūḍhasteṣāṃ yajñopavītakam ||
gṛhītvā helayā duṣṭo mahākrośastu tatkṛtaḥ || 38 ||
brāhmaṇasya ca yaddravyaṃ sudhopamamanuttamam ||
madhuraṃ kṣatriyasyaiva vaiśyasyānnasamaṃ smṛtam || 39 ||
śūdrasya vastu rudhiramiti jñātvā dvijā dhamaḥ ||
sa jaghāna trivarṇāṃśca brāhmaṇānbahulānkhalaḥ || 3.4.10.40 ||
dvijanāśātsurāssarve bhayabhītāssamaṃtataḥ ||
parameṣṭhinamāgamya kathāṃścakuśca kāraṇam|| || 41 ||
śrutvā ca duḥkhito brahmā saptarṣīnprāha lokagān ||
uddeśaṃ kuru tatraiva gatvā tasya dvijottama || 42 ||
iti śrutvā marīcistu vaśiṣṭhādibhiranvitaḥ ||
tatra gatvā sthitāssarve mṛgavyādhasya vai vane || 43
mṛgavyādhastu tāndṛṣṭvā dhanurbāṇadharo balī ||
uvāca vacanaṃ ghoraṃ haniṣyehaṃ ca vodya vai || 44 ||
marīcādyā vihasyāhuḥ kimarthaṃ haṃtumudyataḥ ||
kulārthaṃ vātmano.arthaṃ vā śīghraṃ vada mahābala || 45 ||
ityuktastāndvijaḥ prāha kulārthaṃ cātmano hite ||
hanmi yuṣmāndhanairyuktānbrāhmaṇā~mśca viśeṣataḥ || 46 ||
śrutvā tamāhuste viprā gaccha śīghraṃ dhanurdhara ||
viprahatyākṛtaṃ pāpaṃ bhuñjīyātko vicāraya ||47||
iti śrutvā tu ghorātmā teṣāṃ dṛṣṭyā sunirmalaḥ ||
gatvā vaṃśajanānāha bhūri pāpaṃ mayārjitam ||48||
tatpāpakaṃ bhavadbhiśca grahaṇīyaṃ dhanaṃ yathā ||
te tu śrutvā dvijaṃ prāhurna vayaṃ pāpabhoginaḥ || 49 ||
sākṣīyaṃ bhūmiracalā sākṣī sūryo.ayamuttamaḥ ||
iti śrutvā mṛgavyādho munīnāha kṛtāṃjaliḥ || 3.4.10.50 ||
yathā pāpaṃ kṣayaṃ yāti tathā mājñātumarhatha ||
ityuktāstena te prāhuḥ śṛṇu tvaṃ maṃtramuttamam || 51 ||
rāma nāma hi tajjñeyaṃ sarvāghaughavināśanam ||
yāvattvatpārśvamāyāmastāvattvaṃ japa cottamam || 52 ||
ityuktvā te gatā viprāstīrthāttīrthāntaraṃ prati ||
marāmarāmaretyevaṃ sahasrābdaṃ jajāpa ha || 53 ||
japaprabhāvādabhavadvanamutpalasaṃkulam ||
tatsthānamutpalāraṇyaṃ prasiddhamabhavadbhuvi|| 54 ||
tataḥ saptarṣayaḥ prāptā valmīkāttaṃ nirākṛtam ||
dṛṣṭvā śuddhaṃ tadā vipramūcuste vismayānvitāḥ || 55 ||
valmīkānnissṛto yasmāttasmādvālmīkiruttamam ||
tava nāma bhavedvipra trikālajña mahāmate || 56 ||
evamuktvā yayurlokaṃ sa tu rāmāyaṇaṃ muniḥ ||
kalpāṣṭādaśayuktaṃ hi śatakoṭipravistaram ||57||
cakāra nirmalaṃ padyaiḥ sarvāghaughavināśanam ||
tatpaścātsa śivo bhūtvā tatra vāsamakārayat || 58 ||
adyāpi saṃsthitaḥ svāmī mṛgavyādhaḥ sanātanaḥ ||
śṛṇudhvaṃ ca surāḥ sarve taccaritraṃ harapriyam || 59 ||
vaivasvate.antare prāpte cādye satyayuge śubhe ||
brahmāgatyotpalāraṇyaṃ tatra yajñaṃ cakāra ha || 3.4.10.60 ||
tadā sarasvatī devī nadī bhūtvā samāgatā ||
taddarśanātsvayaṃ brahmā mukhato brāhmaṇaṃ śubham|| 61 ||
bāhubhyāṃ kṣatriyaṃ caiva corubhyāṃ vaiśyamuttamam ||
padbhyāṃ śūdraṃ śubhācāraṃ janayāmāsa vīryavān || 62 ||
dvijarājastathā somaścaṃdramā nāmato dvijaḥ ||
loke sarvātapaḥ sūryaḥ kaśyaṃ vīryaṃ hi pāti yaḥ || 63 ||
kaśyapo hi dvitīyo.asau marīcistu tato.abhavat ||
ratnānāmākaro yo vai sa hi ratnākaraḥ smṛtaḥ || 64||
lokāndharati yo dravyaiḥ sa tu dharmo hi nāmataḥ ||
gaṃbhīraścāsti sadṛśaḥ kośo yasya saritpatiḥ || 65 ||
lokāndakṣati yaḥ kṛtyaiḥ sa tu dakṣaḥ prajāpatiḥ ||
brahmaṇoṃgācca te jātāstasmādvai brāhmaṇāḥ smṛtāḥ || 66 ||
varṇadharmeṇa te sarve varṇātmānaśca vai kramāt ||
dakṣasya manaso jātāḥ kanyāḥ paṃcaśataṃ tataḥ ||
viṣṇu māyāprabhāvena kalābhūtāḥ sthitā bhuvi ||67||
tadā tu bhagavānbrahmā somāyāśvinimaṇḍalam ||
saptaviṃśadgaṇaṃ śreṣṭhaṃ dadau lokavivṛddhaye ||68||
kaśyapāyāditigaṇaṃ kṣatrarūpaṃ trayodaśam ||
dharmāya kīrtiprabhṛtīrdadau sa ca mahāmuniḥ || 69 ||
nānāvidhāni sṛṣṭāni cāsanvaivasvate.antare ||
teṣāṃ patistvayaṃ dakṣo.abhūdvidherājñayā bhuvi || 3.4.10.70 ||
tatra vāsaṃ svayaṃ dakṣaḥ kṛtavānyajñatatparaḥ ||
sarve devagaṇā dakṣaṃ namaskṛtya caraṃti hi ||71||
bhūtanātho mahādevo na nanāma kadācana ||
tadā kruddhaḥ svayaṃ dakṣaḥ śivabhāgaṃ na dattavān || 72 ||
mṛgavyādhaḥ śivaḥ kruddho vīrabhadro babhūva ha ||
triśirāśca trinetraśca tripadastatra cāgataḥ || 73 ||
tenaiva pīḍitā devā munayaḥ pitaro.abhavan ||
tadā vai yajñapuruṣo bhayabhītaḥ samaṃtataḥ || 74 ||
mṛgabhūto yayau tūrṇaṃ dṛṣṭvā vyādhaḥ śivobhavat ||
rudravyādhena sa mṛgo vibhinnāṅgo babhūva ha || 75 ||
tadā tu bhagavānbrahmā tuṣṭāva madhurasvaraiḥ ||
saṃtuṣṭaśca mṛgavyādho yajñaṃ pūrṇamakārayat || 76 ||
tulārāśisthite bhānau taṃ rudraṃ candramaṇḍale ||
sthāpayitvā svayaṃ brahmā saptaviṃśaddinātmake ||
prayayau saptalokaṃ vai sa rudraścaṃdrarūpavān || 77 ||
iti śrutvā vīrabhadro rudraḥ saṃhṛṣṭamānasaḥ ||
svāṃśaṃ dehātsamutpādya dvijagehamacodayat || 78 ||
vipra bhairavadattasya gehaṃ gatvā sa vai śivaḥ ||
tatputro.abhūtkalau ghore śaṃkaro nāma viśrutaḥ ||79||
sa bālaśca guṇī vettā brahmacārī babhūva ha ||
kṛtvā śaṃkarabhāṣyaṃ ca śaivamārgamadarśayat || 3.4.10.80 ||
tripuṇḍraścākṣamālā ca maṃtraḥ paṃcākṣaraḥ śubhaḥ ||
śaivānāṃ maṃgalakaraḥ śaṃkarācāryanirmitaḥ || 81 ||
iti śrībhaviṣye mahāpurāṇe pratisargaparvaṇi caturyugakhaṇḍāparaparyāye kaliyugīyetihāsasamuccaye kṛṣṇacaitanyaśaṃkarācāryasamutpattivarṇanaṃ nāma daśamo.adhyāyaḥ || 10 ||

athaikādaśo.adhyāyaḥ
ānandagirivanaśarmapurīśarma_utpattivarṇanam
bṛhaspatiruvāca
purā tu naimiṣāraṇye vipraścājagaro.abhavat|
vedāntaśāstranipuṇo jñānavāñchambhupūjakaḥ||1||
dvādaśābdāntare rudrastuṣṭo.abhūtpārthivārcanāt |
tadāgatya dadau jñānaṃ jīvanmokṣatvamāgataḥ | | 2
saṅkarṣaṇaṃ samārādhya tajjñānena dvijottamaḥ |
tuṣṭāva puṣkalābhiśca stutibhiḥ parameśvaram | | 3
ajagara uvāca
sadaivyaṃ pradhānaṃ paraṃ jyotirūpaṃ nirākāramavyaktamānandanityam |
tridhā tattu jātaṃ triliṅgaikyabhinnaṃ pumānsattvarūpo rajorūpanārī | |
tayoryattu śeṣaṃ tamorūpameva tataśśeṣanāmne namastenamaste | | 4
rajaścādibhūto guṇasyaiva māyā tathā madhyabhūto narassattvarūpam |
tathaivāntabhūto napuṃskaṃ tamovatsadaivādya nāgeśa tubhyaṃ namaste | | 5
narādhārarūpo bhavānkālakartā narākarṣaṇastvaṃ hi saṅkarṣaṇaśca |
ramante munīśāstvayi brahmadhāmni namastenamaste punaste namo.astu | |
narāṅgeṣu cādhārabhūtā śivā yā smṛtā yoganidrā hi śaktistvadīyā | | 6
jīva uvāca
evaṃ hi saṃstuto devo dvijaṃ cājagaraṃ prabhuḥ |
sāyujyaṃ kṛtavānsvāṅge rudraḥ sarpo hi so.abhavat | | 7
phaṇāsahasrasahito gaurāṅgo gauravigrahaḥ |
kṣīrābdhau mandiraṃ yasya babhūva ca guṇākaram | | 8
taṃ sarpākhyaṃ mahārudraṃ pratyāgatyātmabhūḥ svayam |
karkarāśisthite sūrye candre bhagaṇamaṇḍale | | 9
taṃ rudraṃ sthāpayāmāsa candramāḥ sa tu cābhavat |
iti śrutvā śeṣanāgo rudraḥ śrīgurubhāṣitam | | 3.4.11.10
vacanaṃ sa prasannātmā teja utpādya vai mukhāt |
vindhyādrau janayāmāsa devadattadvijālaye | | 11
giriśarmā sa vai vipro vijitya viduṣāṃ gaṇān |
kāśīpurīṃ samāyātaḥ śiṣyobhūcchaṅkarasya vai | | 12
iti te kathitaṃ vipra yathā rudro babhūva ha |
punaḥ śṛṇu kathāṃ vipra yathā jīvena bhāṣitām | | 13
jīva uvāca
prayāge ca purā hyāsīdbrāhmaṇo harisevakaḥ |
dāridryārtto mandabhāgyo nairṛto nāma viśrutaḥ | | 14
mahākaṣṭena tasyaiva bhikṣā prāptā dināntake |
nairṛtaḥ putrapatnīko dāridryārto dinedine | | 15
ekadā nārado yogī samprāpto vaiṣṇavapriyaḥ |
pūjitastena vipreṇa viṣṇulokamupāyayau | | 16
dṛṣṭvā nārāyaṇaṃ devaṃ namaskṛtya punaḥpunaḥ |
vacanaṃ prāha namrātmā sadaiva bhagavatpriyaḥ | | 17
bhagavanye surāḥ sarve sadā tvatpūjane ratāḥ |
teṣāṃ bhaktāśca ye bhūmau dhanadhānyasamanvitāḥ | | 18
tvadbhaktāśca mayā dṛṣṭā dāridyārtāḥ sadā bhuvi |
kimarthaṃ brūhi me svāmiñjanārdana namo.astu te | | 19
ityukto nāradenaiva bhagavānbhaktavatsalaḥ |
tamāha vacanaṃ ramyaṃ tacchṛṇu tvaṃ surottama | | 3.4.11.20
madbhakto bhagavānbrahmā dṛṣṭvā nārāyaṇapriyān |
janā~mśca svavaśīkṛtya lokakāryaṃ karoti hi | | 21
dharmo.adharmastena kṛto dharmo vedamayaḥ smṛtaḥ |
sapta lokāśca dharmasya nirmitāstena dhīmatā | | 22
bhūrbhuvaḥ svo mahaścaiva janaścaiva tapastathā |
satyaṃ tathaiva kramato nṛṇāṃ dviguṇadaṃ sukham | | 23
adharmo vedarahito bhuvi śabdānyakartṛkaḥ |
ye śabdāśca mahāvāṇyā dūṣitāste hi lokagāḥ | | 24
vedetara pāpamayā daityavṛddhikarāḥ sadā |
adharmaḥ sa tu vijñeyaḥ saptalokāśca tasya vai | | 25
bhūmigarteṣu vidhinā nirmitāḥ sukhadāyakāḥ |
atalaṃ vitalaṃ caiva sutalaṃ ca talātalam | |
mahātalaṃ rasā caiva pātālaṃ cānyadharmajam | | 26
anyadharmo hyadharmaśca devāstvanye hi te.asurāḥ |
dharmapakṣāḥ surā jñeyā asurāścānyadharmajāḥ | | 27
tayorvihīno yo dharmo devairdetyaiśca dūṣitaḥ |
vidharmaḥ sa nu vijñeyastatra lokā vyathākulāḥ | | 28
tāmisramandhatāmisraṃ kumbhīpākaśca rauravam |
mahārauravamevāpi tathāmūrtirayastathā | | 29
ikṣuyantraṃ śālmalaṃ ca hyasipatravanaṃ tathā |
jñeyamityeva racitaṃ vidhinā caikaviṃśatiḥ | | 3.4.11.30
brahmāṇḍo.ayaṃ lokamayaḥ paraṃ tasmācca matpadam |
madbhaktā bhūtale ye vai te gacchanti paraṃ padam | | 31
devabhaktāśca ye lokāḥ sapta lokānvrajanti te |
ye tu vai tāmasā lokā daityapūjanatatparāḥ | |
te gacchanti bhahīlokānatalādimayā~mstathā | | 32
pātālādyojanaṃ lakṣamadholokaḥ prakīrtitaḥ |
vidharmatatparā lokāste gacchanti hyadhogatim | |
ato vai vidhinā bhraṣṭā madbhaktāśca daridragāḥ | | 33
ye madbhaktāḥ surānpūrvaṃ pūjayitvā bhajanti mām |
lakṣmīvantaśca te jñeyā bhuktimuktiparāyaṇāḥ | | 34
prayāge nairṛto viprastyaktvā devānmama priyān |
bhajatyananyabhāvena tasmātsa hi daridravān | | 35
devairdattaṃ hi yaddravyaṃ bhoktavyaṃ sarvadā janaiḥ |
mayā dattaṃ hi yadvastu brahmāṇḍe nāsti nārada | |
ato madājñayā vipra dehi tasmai varaṃ śubham | | 36
ityukto nārado yogī hariṇā viśvakāriṇā |
dvijapatnī sthitā gehe tatra prāpya vaco.abravīt | | 37
varaṃ varaya he sādhvi tvayā yadvāñchitaṃ hṛdi |
sāha dehi varaṃ svāminbhūparājñī bhavāmyaham | | 38
ityuktvā vacanaṃ tatra divyarūpā babhūva sā |
āgatastatra nṛpatirgṛhītvā gehamāyayau | | 39
sāyaṅkāle tu samprāpte dvijastatra samāgataḥ |
nāradastaṃ vacaḥ prāha śṛṇu vipra haripriya | | 3.4.11.40
varadānācca te patnī bhūparājñī hi vartate |
tvayā kiṃ vāñchitaṃ vastu mattaḥ prāpya sukhī bhava | | 41
iti śrutvā daivavaśo vacaḥ prāha ruṣānvitaḥ |
kroṣṭrī bhavecca matpatnī dehi vipra varaṃ mama | | 42
ityuktvā vacanātkroṣṭrī sā babhūva dvijapriyā |
ekasminnantare prāstastatputro gurupūjakaḥ | | 43
śrutvā tatkāraṇaṃ sarvaṃ nāradaṃ sa vaco.abravīt |
mama mātā yathā svāmiṃstathā śīghraṃ varādbhavet | | 44
etattribhirvaraiḥ prāptaṃ daivamāyāvimohitaiḥ |
tadā tu nārado duḥkhī nairṛtaṃ prāha vai vacaḥ | | 45
brahmāṇḍo.ayaṃ devamayo bhavastasya maheśvaraḥ |
ato bhavaṃ bhajāśu tvaṃ sa te kāryaṃ kariṣyati | | 46
ityuktavacano vipro bhavaṃ taṃ pārthivārcanaiḥ |
tuṣṭāva parayā bhaktyā varṣamātraṃ hi nairṛtaḥ | | 47
tadā prasanno bhagavānmaheśo bhaktavatsalaḥ |
kuberasadṛśaṃ divyaṃ dadau tasmai mahaddhanam | | 48
taddhanena sa vai vipro dharmakāryaṃ cakāra ha |
prasiddho.abhūnmahīpṛṣṭhe nāmnā puṇyajano dhanaiḥ | | 49
śivabhaktiprabhāveṇa prāpya dravyamakaṇṭakam |
sahasrābdavapurbhūtvā tyaktvā prāṇāndivaṃ yayau | | 3.4.11.50
vṛṣarāśisthite sūrye rājā candrasya somavat |
nairṛto nāma vikhyāto rudraḥ sarvajanapriyaḥ | | 51
iti śrutvā nairṛtastu bhṛguvarya gurūditam |
svāṃśādbhūtalamāgamya girinālagirau vane | | 52
yoginaḥ siddhasāṅkhyasya putro.abhūdvanavāsinaḥ |
vanaśarmeti vikhyāto vedaśāstraparāyaṇaḥ | | 53
dvādaśābdavapurbhūtvā jitvā vidvajjanānbahūn |
kāśīmāgamya tattvārthī śaṅkarācāryamuttamam | |
praṇamya tasya śiṣyo.abhūdvanaśarmā viśāradaḥ | | 54
bṛhaspatiruvāca
vasuśarmā dvijaḥ kaścinmāhiṣmatyāṃ purābhavat |
śivavrataparo nityaṃ putrārthī pārthivārcaka. | | 55
caturviṃśativarṣāṇi pūjatastasya dhīmata |
vyatītāni surāstatra na prasanno.abhavacchivaḥ | | 56
tadā tu duḥkhito vipro vahniṃ prajvālya bhairavam |
juhāva svāṅgamāṃsāni mukhataścaraṇāntakam | | 57
na prasannobhavadrudrastadā vipraḥ śucānvitaḥ |
gṛhītvā cottamaṃ meṣaṃ saṃskāraṃ kṛtavāñchuciḥ | |
tena meṣeṇa sahito jvaladagnau samāyayau | | 58
prasanno bhagavānrudrastatrāgatya gaṇairyutaḥ |
svarūpaṃ darśayāmāsa śuddhasphaṭikasundaram | |
varaṃ brūhi vacaḥ prāha vasuśarmāṇamuttamam | | 59
tacchrutvā sa prasannātmā natvā pārvativallabham |
praśrayāvanato bhūtvā vacanaṃ prāha śaṅkaram | | 3.4.11.60
dehi me tanayaṃ svāmiñcharaṇāgatavatsala |
ityuktaśśaṅkarastena vihasyovāca taṃ dvijam | | 61
putradātā svayaṃ brahmā bhāgyakarttā parātparaḥ |
tubhyaṃ ca śatajanmāntaṃ tena putro na nirmitaḥ | |
tasmādahaṃ sutaṃ svāṃśāttava vipra dadāmi bhoḥ | | 62
ityuktvā svamukhāttejo nirākṛtya maheśvaraḥ |
tatpatnyāṃ janayāmāsa sakāśādvasuvarmaṇaḥ | | 63
daśamāsāntare jātaḥ suputro madhurānanaḥ |
ajasyeva padaścaiko dvitīyo naravattataḥ | |
ajaikapāda iti sa prasiddho.abhūnmahītale | | 64
catuśśatābdavapuṣi prāpte tasminsute priye |
samprāpto bhagavānmṛtyustadā rogagaṇairyutaḥ | | 65
tasya tairabhavadyuddhamajaikacaraṇasya vai | | 66
varṣamātreṇa tānsarvāñjitvā mallaraṇotkaṭaḥ |
mṛtyuñjayaḥ sa vai nāmnā prasiddho.abhūnmahītale | | 67
duḥkhito bhagavānmṛtyustena vipreṇa nirjitaḥ |
parameṣṭhinamāgamya kathayāmāsa kāraṇam | | 68
tadā tu bhagavānbrahmā sarvadevagaṇairyutaḥ |
kumbhage dyumaṇau deve candramaṇḍalagaṃ nṛpam | |
taṃ dvijaṃ ca cakārāśu rudrarūpaṃ bhayāpaham | | 69
sūta uvāca
iti śrutvā mahādevaḥ sa vipraśca tadājapād |
purīṃ māhiṣmatīṃ prāptaḥ kaliśuddhikaraḥ prabhuḥ | |
purīśarmeti vikhyāto yatidattasya vai sutaḥ | | 3.4.11.70
ṣoḍaśābdavapurbhūtvā jitvā veda parāyaṇān |
śaṅkarācāryamāgamya tasya śiṣyo babhūva ha | |
iti te kathitaṃ vipra yathā mṛtyuñjayobhavat | | 7
iti śrībhaviṣye mahāpurāṇe pratisargaparvaṇi caturyugakhaṇḍāparaparyāye kaliyugīyetihāsasamuccaye ānandagirivanaśarmapurīśarma_utpattivarṇanaṃ nāmaikādaśo.adhyāyaḥ | 11

|| sūta uvāca || ||
punaḥ śṛṇu kathāṃ ramyāṃ prayāge jīvabhāṣitām||
hirburnāma purā cāsīddānavo lokakaṃṭakaḥ||1||
nikuṃbhānvayasaṃbhūtaḥ śakratulyaparākramaḥ ||
sahasrābdaṃ tapaḥ kṛtvā tāpayāmāsa vai surān || 2 ||
tadā lokapatirbrahmā lokarakṣārthamudyataḥ ||
varaṃ brūhīti vacanamuvāca danujeśvaram || 3 ||
namaskṛtya vidhātāraṃ vacanaṃ prāha namradhīḥ ||
yadi deyo varaḥ svāmiṃstvayā viśvakṛtā vibho ||4||
maraṇaṃ na ca me bhūyāttvatkṛtaiśca carācaraiḥ ||
ityuktassa tathetyuktvā brahma lokamupāyayau || 5 ||
dānavassa tu raudrātmā jitvā svarganivāsinaḥ ||
āhūya dānavāndaityānvivarebhyaḥ prasannadhīḥ || 6 ||
svarge nivāsayāmāsa te devā bhūtalīkṛtāḥ ||
lakṣābdaṃ ca surāssarve bubhujuḥ paramāpadaḥ || 7 ||
ekadā nārado dhīmāndṛṣṭvā devāṃstathāgatān ||
vacanaṃ prāha yogātmā bhajadhvaṃ lokaśaṃkaram || 8 ||
sa devaśca mahādevo brahmāṇḍeśo vipattihā ||
iti śrutvā tu vacanaṃ te devā vismayānvitāḥ || 9 ||
pārthivaiḥ pūjayā māsurdevadevamumāpatim ||
gataikādaśavarṣāśca teṣāṃ pūjanakāriṇām || 3.4.12.10 ||
tadā prasanno bhagavānmaheśo lokaśaṃkaraḥ ||
jyotirliṃgamayo bhūtvā lokā~mstrīnsamadāhayat || 11 ||
ye tu vai devabhaktāśca śeṣāścāsanmahābhaye ||
anye tu dānavaissārddhaṃ bhasmībhūtā babhūvire || 12 ||
etasminnantare brahmā viṣṇunā saha harṣitaḥ ||
tuṣṭāva sa mahārudraṃ stotraissāmasamudbhavaiḥ || 13 ||
mithunasthe divānāthe śaśimaṇḍalabhūpatim ||
hirbughnaṃ ca mahārudraṃ cakāra surahetave || 14 ||
iti śrutvā sa hirbughno devakāryārthamudyataḥ ||
himālaye girau ramye putro.abhūtsādyakarmaṇaḥ ||15 ||
patirūpaḥ kalābhijño bhāratīśa iti śrutaḥ ||
sa jitvā vṛṃdānkāśīnagaramāgataḥ ||
śaṃkarācāryamāgamya śiṣyo.abhūttena nirjitaḥ || 16 ||
|| bṛhaspati ruvāca || ||
mayaputraḥ smṛto māyī tapoghoraṃ cakāra ha || 17 ||
padaikena sthitaḥ sūrye sahasrābdaṃ prayatnataḥ ||
sa lokā~mstāpayāmāsa tapasā lokavāsinaḥ || 18 ||
tadā prasanno bhagavānparameṣṭhī pitāmahaḥ ||
trayo grāmāstatpriyārthe kramādvai tena nirmitāḥ || 19 ||
sauvarṇaṃ svargasadṛśaṃ puraṃ ṣoḍaśayojanam ||
tadadho yojanānte ca rājataṃ ca bhuvarmayam||3.4.12.20||
tadadhoyojanānte ca bhūrlokamiva cāyasam ||
evaṃ puranivāsinyo daityānāṃ yoṣito mudā || 21 ||
śatakoṭimitādaityā dharmātmāno nivāsinaḥ ||
gṛhītvā yajñabhāgaṃ ca devatulyā babhūvire || 22 ||
tadā nirbalino devāḥ kṣudhayā pīḍitāḥ prabhum ||
bhagavantaṃ mahāviṣṇuṃ tuṣṭuvuḥ parayā girā || 23 ||
caturyugasamūhānāṃ varṣāṇāṃ bhagavanprabho ||
adhikāravihīnāśca vartaṃte svargamaṇḍale || 24 ||
tāmasāṃtaramevāpi ṣoḍaśaiva caturyugam ||
vyatītāni mahāviṣṇo māyināṃ duḥkhaṃ bhuṃjatām || 25 ||
iti śrutvā vacasteṣāṃ, bhagavānmadhusūdanaḥ ||
dṛṣṭvā saṃskṛtavārtāyāṃ daityāndharmaparāyaṇān ||26||
bauddharūpassvayaṃ jātaḥ kalau prāpte bhayānake ||
ajinasya dvijasyaiva suto bhūtvā janārdanaḥ || 27 ||
vedadharmaparānviprānmohayāmāsa vīryavān ||
nirvedāḥ karmarahitāstrivarṇāstāmasāntare || 28 ||
ṣoḍaśe ca kalau prāpte babhūvuryajñavarjitāḥ ||
tadā daityā ruṣāviṣṭāssarve tripuravāsinaḥ || 29 || manujānpīḍayāmāsurniryajñānvedavarjitān ||
kṣayaṃ jagmurnarāssarve kalpāṃte daityabhakṣitāḥ || 3.4.12.30 ||
punassatyayuge prāpte kailāse guhyakālaye ||
devaiścārādhitaḥ śaṃbhussarvalokaśivaṃkaraḥ || 31 ||
jyotirliṃgaṃ vapuḥ kṛtvā tatra tasthau bhayaṃkaraḥ ||
etasminnantare devāḥ prasannāstāmasāntare || 32 ||
bhūmessāraṃ gṛhītvā te rathaṃ kṛtvā vidhānataḥ ||
caṃdrabhāskarayossārāccakre kṛtvā tathaiva ca ||33||
sumerośca tathā sārātketuṃ kṛtvā rathasya vai ||
dadau śivāya mahate yānaṃ syandanarūpi tat || 34 ||
tadā brahmā svayaṃ prāpya babhūva rathasārathiḥ ||
vedāśca vājinaścāsandevadevasya vai rathe || 35 ||
lokālokagireḥ sāro dhanuścāsīnmahātmanaḥ ||
ghoraṃ cājagavaṃ nāma prasiddha mabhavaddhanuḥ || 36 ||
sajyaṃ cakāra bhagavāṃstaddhanuḥ kaṭhinaṃ mahat ||
bhagnībhūtamabhūccāpaṃ devadevasya vai ruṣā || 37 ||
vismito bhagavānviṣṇussāraṃ svargasya vai tadā ||
gṛhītvāśu dhanurdivyaṃ pinākaṃ sa cakāra ha || 38 ||
sajyaṃ jātaṃ ca rudreṇa puṣṭibhūtaṃ mahaddhanuḥ ||
tadā brahmarṣayastuṣṭāstuṣṭuvu rmanasā haram || 39 ||
pinākīti ca tannāmā prasiddhobhūnmaheśvaraḥ ||
guṇaścāpasya vai śeṣaḥ śakro bāṇastadābhavat || 3.4.12.40 ||
śarapakṣau vahnivāyū śalyaṃ viṣṇuḥ sanātanaḥ ||
tena bāṇena daityānāṃ koṭisaṃkhyā mṛtā ca khe || 41 ||
tripuraṃ dāhayāmāsa māyinā pālitaṃ śivaḥ ||
bhasmībhūte pure ghore tadā lokapatirvidhiḥ || 42 ||
pinākinaṃ mahārudraṃ mīnarāśisthite ravau ||
śaśino maṇḍalasyaiva rājānaṃ sa cakāra tam ||
svādhikārā~mstadā devā avāpustāmasāntare || 43 ||
|| sūta uvāca || ||
iti śrutvā pinākī ca svamukhātsvāṃśamuttamam || 44 ||
samutpādya haradvāre hima sānau cakāra ha ||
macchando nāma tatraiva yogī śaṃbhuparāyaṇaḥ || 45 ||
gorakhasya gururyo vai tanmukhe teja āviśat ||
raṃbhā nāmnaiva tatraiva svarveśyā kāmarūpiṇī || 46 ||
macchandaṃ ca vaśīkṛtya bubhuje smaravihvalā ||
tayossakāśādvai jātassa putro rucirānanaḥ || 47 ||
nāthaśarmeti vikhyāto vidvāñcchreṣṭhataro.abhavat ||
sa jitvā paṃḍitānbhūmau purīṃ kāśīṃ samāgataḥ ||
śaṃkarācāryavijitastasya śiṣyo babhūva ha || 48 ||
|| bṛhaspatiruvāca || ||
cākṣuṣāṃtarasaṃprāpte dvādaśe dvāpare yuge || 49 ||
kṣatriyaistālajaṃghīyairbrāhmaṇā bhṛguvaṃśajāḥ ||
vināśitāḥ kurukṣetre gṛhītvā taddhanaṃ bahu || 3.4.12.50 ||
babhujurbalavaṃtaste daityapakṣā mahādhamāḥ ||
kasyacittu muneḥ patnī gurviṇī ca bhayānvitā || 51 ||
himatuṃge samāgamya tadgarbhaṃ munisaṃbhavam ||
śatavarṣaṃ dadau devī tapasā jñānarūpiṇī || 52 ||
māturūrū suto bhittvā tato jāto mahītale ||
tejasā tasya putrasya bhasmībhūtamabhūjjagat || 53 ||
tadā tu sakalā devāḥ puraskṛtya prajāpatim ||
vajrasthitaśca vaitālāssamājagmu rbhayāturāḥ || 54 ||
pitṛbhidaivatairbālassamājñāto himācale ||
lokanāśakaraṃ tejo jalamadhye sa cākṣipat || 55 ||
jaladevī ca vaḍavā bhūtvā tatteja uttamam ||
pītvā vavāma tatraiva pīḍitā raudratejasā || 56 ||
tadāgatya svayaṃ brahmā trikuṭo yatra vai giriḥ ||
tadadhaḥ sāgare ghore sthāpayāmāsa lokapaḥ || 57 ||
meṣage dyumaṇau prāpte śaśimaṇḍalagaṃ prabhum ||
taṃ rudraṃ sa cakārāśu parameṣṭhī pitāmahaḥ || 58 ||
ūrujātātsmṛto vorvo dahano lokadāhataḥ ||
vaḍavāmukhato jāto vāḍavo nāma sa prabhuḥ || 59 ||
|| sūta uvāca || ||
iti śrutvā tu dahano guruvākyaṃ manoharam ||
svamukhātteja utpādya kurukṣetraṃ cakāra ha || 3.4.12.60 ||
sārasvatasya viprasya gṛhe jātassa vai śivaḥ ||
kṣetraśarmeti vikhyāto vidvacchreṣṭho vabhūva ha || 61 ||
śaṃkarācāryamāgamya śiṣyo bhūtvā parājitaḥ ||
brahmacaryavratī kāśyāṃ tasthau śaṃbhuparāyaṇaḥ || 62 ||
bṛhaspatiruvāca ||
ekārṇave purā jāte naṣṭe sthāvara jaṃgame ||
śatābde brahmaṇaḥ prāpte.avyaktajanmani lokage || 63 ||
avyaktaṃ prakṛtirmāyā pītvā sarvajalaṃ mudā ||
mahākālī svayaṃ mūrtiraṃdhakārasvarūpiṇī || 64 ||
ekā babhūva tatraiva prākṛte kalpadāruṇe ||
caturyugānāṃ koṭīnāṃ trayāṇāṃ dāruṇe laye || 65 ||
ṣaṣṭilakṣayutānāṃ ca kālastatra vyatī tavān ||
tadā sā prakṛtirdevī nityaśuddhā sanātanī ||66||
svecchayā ca svarūpaṃ svaṃ mahāgauramanuttamam ||
paṃcavaktraṃ daśabhujaṃ trinetraṃ ca dadhau śivā || || 67 ||
bhālanetreṇa sā mātā sūkṣmatejo dadarśa ha ||
śūnyabhūtaṃ paraṃ nityamavikāri niraṃjanam || 68 ||
tadā dikṣu gataṃ brahma svabhujaiḥ prakṛtiḥ purā ||
grahītumicchatī tatra na samarthā babhūva vai || 69 ||
vismitā prakṛtirmātā paṃcavaktraiḥ sanātanam ||
tuṣṭāva parayā bhaktyā ciraṃkālātparātparam || || 3.4.12.70 ||
dhātuśabdaiḥ prāṅmukhajaiḥ pratyayairyāmyavakrajaiḥ ||
suvibhaktimayaiḥ śabdairmukhapaścimajaiḥ sthirā || 71 ||
tiṅvibhaktimayairnityā mukhottaramayai mudā ||
nabhovaktramayaiḥ śabdairvarṇamātrairniraṃjanam || 72 ||
saccidānaṃdaghanakaṃ pūrṇabrahma sanātanam ||
tutoṣa tattu sarvajñaṃ paṃcavaktreṣu cāgamat || 73 ||
puruṣatvamabhūdbrahma svayaṃbhūrnāma cābhavat ||
avyaktātprakṛterjāto.avyaktajanmā hi sa smṛtaḥ || 74 ||
tasya hetoḥ svayaṃ devī varadā lokarūpiṇī ||
mahālakṣmīśca pūrvārddhājjātā ṣoḍaśalokinī || 75 ||
aṣṭādaśabhujāstasyā lokarakṣaṇatatparāḥ ||
dṛṣṭvā tadadbhutaṃ rūpaṃ svayaṃbhūrvismayānvitaḥ || || 76 ||
praviśya bahudhā bhūtvā nāntaṃ tasyā jagāma ha ||
bṛhatvādbahurūpatvadbrahmā nāmeti viśrutaḥ || 77 ||
śramito bhagavānbrahmā satyalokamupa sthitaḥ ||
mukhebhya udbhavairdevo vedaistuṣṭāva śaṃkaram || 78 ||
ciraṃ kālaṃ tadaṃgādvai nadīnadasamudbhavaḥ ||
ekārṇavaṃ tadā jātaṃ śete tatra svayaṃ prabhuḥ || || 79 || sahasrayugaparyaṃtamuṣitvā.avyaktabhūḥ svayam ||
satyalokamupāgamya punaḥ sṛṣṭiṃ cakāra ha || 3.4.12.80 ||
anantāḥ sṛṣṭayaścāsangaṇarūpāḥ pṛthakpṛ thak ||
tābhirvyaktamabhūtsarvaṃ mahālakṣmīmayaṃ jagat|| 81 ||
dṛṣṭvā bahutvaṃ sṛṣṭīnāṃ mahālakṣmīḥ sanātanī||
vismitābhūcca sarveśaṃ bhagavantamupāyayau || || 82 ||
natvovāca vaco ramyaṃ kṛṣṇamavyaktamaṃgalam || bhagavannityaśuddhātmannarāścāsanmahattarāḥ || 83 ||
kathaṃ teṣāṃ ca gaṇanā kartavyā ca mayā sadā ||
iti śrutvā vacastasyā dvidhābhūtaśca so.avyayaḥ || 84 ||
pūrvārddhātsa tu raktāṅgaḥ parārddhādgaurarūpavān ||
caturbhujassa raktāṃgo gauravarṇaścaturbhujaḥ ||85||
sarvasṛṣṭigaṇānāṃ ca sa īśo bhagavānbhavaḥ ||
gaṇeśo nāma vikhyātaśceśvarassa tu viśrutaḥ ||86||
paraścatu?rbhujo yo vai yogidhyeyo niraṃjanaḥ ||
ekadā vidhito jātaḥ śivaḥ pārvativallabhaḥ || 87 ||
gaṇeśaṃ pūjayāmāsa sahasrābdaṃ prayatnataḥ ||
tadā prasanno bhagavāngaṇeśaḥ śarvapūjakaḥ || || 88 ||
varaṃ varaya taṃ prāha pārvatīsahitaṃ haram ||
prasannātmā bhavaḥ sākṣāttuṣṭāva ca vinamradhīḥ || 89 ||
|| śiva uvāca || ||
namo viṣṇusvarūpāya gaṇeśāya parātmane ||
caturbhujāya raktāya yajñapūrṇakarāya ca || 3.4.12.90 ||
vighnahaṃtre jagadbhartre sarvānandapradāyine ||
siddhīnāṃ pataye tubhyaṃ nidhīnāṃ pataye namaḥ || 91 ||
prasanno bhava deveśa putro bhava mama priyaḥ ||
iti śrutvādipūjyastu gaṇeśo bhaktavatsalaḥ ||92||
pārvatyāḥ sarvadehāttu tejobhūtātsamu dbhavaḥ ||
tadā kailāsaśikhare sarve devāssavāsavāḥ || 93 ||
maṃgalārthamupājagmurdevadevasya mandire||
mahotsavaśca tatrāsītsarvalokasukhāvahaḥ || 94 ||
etasminnatare tatra sūryaputraḥ śaniḥ svayam ||
krūradṛṣṭiḥ samāyātaḥ kālātmā devamaṇḍape || 95 ||
tasya darśanamātreṇa sa bālo viśirā hyabhūt ||
hāhākāro mahā~mścāsītkailāse guhyakālaye || 96 ||
tacchiraścaṃdraloke vai tulāsaṃsthe divākare ||
saptaviṃśaddinānyeva prakāśayati bhūtale || 97 ||
niṃdito daivataistatra śanirjanabhayaṃkaraḥ ||
gajasya mastakaṃ chittvā dantaikaṃ rāgarūpi yat || 98 ||
tacchiśoḥ kaṃdhare rakte.aropayatsūryasaṃbhavaḥ ||
gaja yonyā stuto brahmā karkaṭasya tadā śiraḥ || 99 ||
samāropya tu tadyoniḥ karkaṭo viśirīkṛtaḥ ||
evaṃ gajānano jāto gaṇeśaśceśvaraḥ svayam || || 3.4.12.100 ||
sūta uvāca ||
iti śrutvā gaṇeśastu gurorvacanamuttamam ||
svamukhātskaṃdhamutpādya kāśyāṃ jātaḥ sa ceśvaraḥ || 101 ||
daivajñasya dvijasyaiva putro bhūtvā śubhānanaḥ ||
ḍhuṃḍhirājastato nāmnā prasiddho.abhūnmahītale || 102 ||
jātakābharaṇaṃ nāma jyotiḥśāstraṃ phalātmakam ||
kṛtvā sa vedarakṣārthe śaṃkarācāryamāgamat || 103 ||
śiṣyo bhūtvā prasannātmā gurusevāparo.abhavat ||
iti te kathitaṃ vipra ḍhuṃḍhirājo yathābhavat || 104 ||
iti śrībhaviṣye mahāpurāṇe pratisargaparvaṇi caturyugakhaṇḍāparaparyāye kaliyugīyetihāsa samuccaye bhāratīrāgorakhanāthakṣetraśarmaḍhuṃḍhirājasamutpattivarṇano nāma dvādaśo.adhyāyaḥ || 12 ||

atha trayodaśo.adhyāyaḥ
aghorapathabhairavahanumajjanmarudramāhātmyabālaśarmasamutpattivarṇanam
bṛhaspatiruvāca
ṣoḍaśābde ca samprāpte brahmaṇo.avyaktajanmanaḥ |
sa uṣitvā ca kamale sthitaḥ sṛṣṭyarthamudyataḥ | | 1
etasminnantare vaktrātsamudbhūtā ca śāradā |
dvivyāṅgaṃ sundaraṃ tasyā dṛṣṭvā brahmā smarāturaḥ | | 2
balād gṛhītvā tāṃ kanyāmuvāca smarapīḍitaḥ |
ratiṃ dehi madāghūrṇe rakṣa māṃ kāmavihvalam | | 3
iti śrutvā tu sā mātā ruṣā prāha pitāmaham |
pañcavaktro.ayamaśubho na yogyastava kandhare | | 4
caturvaktro vedamayo yogyassarveśvare tvayi |
ityuktvāntardadhe mātā brahmā krodhānvito.abhavat | | 5
tasya kopāgninā toyaṃ śuṣkabhūtamabhūdbhuvi |
śāntibhūte ca tatkope rudro jāto bhayaṅkaraḥ | | 6
bhairavo nāma vikhyātaḥ kālātmā saptavāhanaḥ |
svanakhaiśca nṛsiṃhābhaiḥ kṣiptvā tatpañcamaṃ śiraḥ | | 7
jagarja balavānrudraḥ śaṅkaro lokaśaṅkaraḥ |
bhayabhītastadā brahmā bhairavaṃ śaraṇaṃ yayau | | 8
nātha naḥ pāpabhūtānāṃ dhiyo yo.asau pracodayāt |
iti śrutvā sa bhagavānbhairavo lokaviśrutaḥ | | 9
brahmabhūtamahaṃ svāminvareṇyaṃ tvāmupāgataḥ |
savitustadvareṇyaṃ yadbhargo devasya dhīmahi | | 3.4.13.10
gāḍhamuccai rurodāśu khātpetuścāśrubindavaḥ |
tato vṛkṣāssamudbhūtā rudrākṣāṇāṃ pṛthakpṛthak | | 11
śivo brahmavadhādbhītastatkapālaṃ gṛhītavān |
kapālī nāma vikhyātaṃ bhairavasya tadā hyabhūt | | 12
sarvalokeṣu pūtāni yāni cāyatanāni ca |
tāni tānyeva gatvāśu śuddho nābhūcchivaṅkaraḥ | | 13
ekadā teṣu vṛkṣeṣu saṃsthito bhagavānharaḥ |
tadā brahmavadhe doṣaṃ tyaktvā dūramupāgataḥ | | 14
tataḥ prabhṛti vai śambhurdhṛtvā rudrākṣamuttamam |
purīṃ kāśīṃ samāyātaḥ kapālastena mocitaḥ | | 15
kapālamocanaṃ nāma tīrthaṃ jātamaghāpaham |
etasminnantare brahmā sarvadevasamanvitaḥ | | 16
samāgatya mahādevaṃ tuṣṭāva stutijaistavaiḥ |
makarasthe divānāthe śaśinaśceśvaraṃ śubham | |
kapālinaṃ mahārudraṃ cakāra bhagavānvidhiḥ | | 17
sūta uvāca
iti śrutvā gurorvākyaṃ kapālī bhairavaḥ śivaḥ |
svamukhātsvāṃśamutpādya kāśyāṃ jāto hyayonijaḥ | | 18
kapālamocanātkuṇḍātsamāgamya mahītale |
yatirūpo vedanidhirbhairavo nāma viśrutaḥ | |
aghoraṃ kaṭhinaṃ mārgaṃ svaśiṣyānsamacodaya | | 19
śaṅkarācāryamāgamya śiṣyobhūtvā sa bhairavaḥ |
ḍāmaraṃ nāma vai tantraṃ mantrabhūtaṃ cakāra ha | |
kīlitā ye tu vai mantrāstena cotkīlitīkṛtāḥ | | 3.4.13.20
bṛhaspatiruvāca
mandodarī mayasutā tripurādhipateḥ svasā |
tripure tu tadā naṣṭe mahāviṣṇuṃ sanātanam | |
bhaktyā tuṣṭāva sā devī pratyahaṃ guptabhāvinī | | 21
bhaktibhāvāttato yogaṃ harau prāpya mahottamam |
vindhyādrikandhare ghore tatraivāntaradhīyata | | 22
caturyugaṃ ca dviśataṃ tasyā jātaṃ samādhitaḥ |
vaivasvate.antare prāpte dvādaśe caiva kṛdyuge | | 23
pulastyo brahmaṇaḥ putro viśravā roṣato.abhavat |
śatābdaṃ ca tapastaptvā viśravā nāma yo muniḥ | | 24
sumālino.atha daityasya sutāṃ vai kaikasīṃ mudā |
samudvāhya vidhānena pulastyassa ca viśravāḥ | | 25
kadalīvipine ramye gandhamādanaparvate |
sa reme ca tayā sārddhaṃ viśravā bhagavānṛṣiḥ | | 26
rāvaṇaḥ kumbhakarṇaśca tayorjāto hi rākṣasau |
rāvaṇo mātṛbhaktaśca pitṛbhaktastato.anujaḥ | | 27
sahasrābdaṃ tapo ghoraṃ cakratustau varārthinau |
tadā prasanno bhagavānparameṣṭhī pitāmahaḥ | | 28
dadau tābhyāṃ varaṃ ramyamajeyaṃ devadānavaiḥ |
tau tu labdhavarau kruddhau puṣpakaṃ yānamuttamam | |
gṛhītvā ca balādvīrau yuyudhāte parasparam | | 29
tābhyāṃ vinirjitā devāstyaktvā svargaṃ sukhapradam |
pārthivaiḥ pūjayāmāsuḥ śivaṃ kailāsasaṃsthitāḥ | | 3.4.13.30
ekādaśābdamārādhya te devā girijāpatim |
śaṅkarācca varaṃ prāptā nirbhayāśca tadābhavan | | 31
śivo.api ca svapūrvārddhājjāto vai mānasottare |
girau yatra sthitā devī gautamasya tanūdbhavā | |
añjanā nāma vikhyātā kīśakesaribhoginī | | 32
raudraṃ tejastadā ghoraṃ mukhe kesariṇo yayau |
smarāturaḥ kapīndrastu bubhuje tāṃ śubhānanām | | 33
etasminnantare vāyuḥ kapīndrasya tanau gataḥ |
vāñchitāmañjanāṃ śubhrāṃ ramayāmāsa vai balāt | | 34
dvādaśābdamato jātaṃ dampatyormaithunasthayoḥ |
tadanu bhrūṇamāsādya varṣamātraṃ hi sā dadhat | | 35
putro jātassa rāgātmā sa rudro vānarānanaḥ |
kurūpācca tato mātrā prakṣipto.abhūdgireradhaḥ | | 36
balādāgatya balavāndṛṣṭvā sūryamupasthitam |
vilikhya bhagavānrudro devastatra samāgataḥ | | 37
vajrasantāḍito vāpi na tatyāja tadā ravim |
bhayabhītastadā prāṃśussūryaṃ trāhīti jalpitaḥ | | 38
śrutvā tadārtavacanaṃ rāvaṇo lokarāvaṇaḥ |
pucche gṛhītvā taṃ kīśaṃ muṣṭiyuddhamacīkarat | | 39
tadā tu kesarisuto raviṃ tyaktvā ruṣānvitaḥ |
varṣamātraṃ mahāghoraṃ mallayuddhaṃ cakāra ha | | 3.4.13.40
śramito rāvaṇastatra bhayabhītassamantataḥ |
palāyanaparo bhūtaḥ kīśarudreṇa tāḍitaḥ | | 41
etasminnantare prāpto viśravā bhagavānṛṣiḥ |
stotrairvedamayairdevaṃ tuṣṭāva parayā girā | |4 2
prasannastu tadā rudro rāvaṇaṃ lokarāvaṇam |
tyaktvā pampāsarastīre nivāsaṃ kṛtavānbalī | |
sthāṇubhūtaḥ sthitastatra sthāṇurnāma tato.abhavat | | 43
nighnantaṃ ca surānmukhyānrāvaṇaṃ lokarāvaṇam | | 44
nihanti muṣṭibhiryo na hanumāniti viśrutaḥ | | 45
tapasā tasya kīśasya prasanno bhagavānvidhiḥ |
namradhīrvacanaṃ prāha śṛṇu rudra taponidhe | | 46
vaivasvate.antare prāpte cāṣṭāviṃśattame yuge |
tretāyāḥ pūrvacaraṇe rāmassākṣādbhaviṣyati | |
tasya bhaktiṃ ca samprāpya kṛtakṛtyo bhaviṣyasi | | 47
rāvaṇāya priyāṃ ramyāṃ dadau mandodarī vidhiḥ | | 48
nairṛtasyaiva dikpālassa babhūva ca rāvaṇaḥ |
alpāyurmaraṇaṃ prāpto rāmeṇa harirūpiṇā | | 49
sūta uvāca
iti śrutvā sa hanumānayoniḥ kadalīvane |
dehabhūto mahīṃ prāpto bālaśarmeti viśrutaḥ | | 3.4.13.50
purīṃ kāśīṃ samāyāto yatra vai maṇikarṇikā |
rāmapakṣe bālaśarmā śivapakṣe tu śaṅkaraḥ | | 51
māsamātraṃ ca śāstrārthastayoścāsīnmahottamaḥ |
śaṅkarācāryayatinā bālaśarmā parājitaḥ | | 52
śiṣyo bhūtvā ca tatraiva gurusevāparo.abhavat |
yaścakāra tantramantraṃ sarva jātikathāmayam | | 53
iti śrībhaviṣye mahāpurāṇe pratisargaparvaṇi caturyugakhaṇḍāparaparyāye kaliyugīyetihāsasamuccaye aghorapathabhairavahanumajjanma rudramāhātmyabālaśarmasamutpattivarṇanaṃ nāma trayodaśo.adhyāyaḥ | 13

atha caturdaśo.adhyāyaḥ
rudramāhātmyavarṇanam
bṛhaspatiruvāca
idaṃ dṛśyaṃ yadā nāsītsadasadātsakaṃ ca yat |
tadākṣaramayaṃ tejo vyāptarūpamacintyakam | | 1
na ca sthūlaṃ na ca sūkṣṇaṃ śītaṃ noṣṇaṃ ca tatparam |
ādimadhyāntarahitaṃ manāgākāravarjitam | | 2
yogidṛśyaṃ paraṃ nityaṃ śūnyabhūtaṃ parātparam |
ekā vai prakṛtirmāyā rekhā yā tadadhaḥ smṛtā | | 3
mahattatvamayī jñeyā tadadhaścordhvarekhikāḥ |
rājassattvatamobhūtā omityevasulakṣaṇam | | 4
tatsadbrahma paraṃ jñeyaṃ yatra prāpya punarbhavaḥ |
kiyatā caiva kālena tasyecchā samapadyata | | 5
ahaṅkārastato jātastatastanmātrikāḥ parāḥ | pañcabhūtānyatopyāsañjñānavijñānakānyataḥ | | 6
dvāviṃśajjaḍabhūtāṃśca dṛṣṭvā svecchāmayo vibhuḥ |
dvandvabhūtaśca saguṇo buddhirjīvassamāgataḥ | | 7
pūrvārddhātsaguṇaḥ sosau nirguṇaśca parārddhataḥ |
tābhyāṃ gṛhītaṃ tatsarvaṃ caitanyamabhavattataḥ | | 8
savirāḍitisaṃjño vai jīvo jātassanātanaḥ |
virāḍo nābhito jātaṃ padmaṃ tacchatayojanam | | 9
padmācca kusumaṃ jātaṃ yojanāyāmamuttamam |
tatpadmakusumājjāto virañciḥ kamalāsanaḥ | | 3.4.14.10
dvibhujassa caturvaktro dvipādo bhagavānvidhiḥ |
jñeyaḥ saptavitatyaṅgo mahācintāmavāptavān | | 11
ko.ahaṃ kasmātkuta āyātaḥ kā me jananī ko me tātaḥ |
ityadhicintaya taṃ hṛdi devaṃ śabdamahattvamayena sa āha | | 12
tapaścaiva tu kartavyaṃ saṃśayasyāpanuttaye |
tadākarṇya vidhissākṣāttapastepe mahattaram | | 13
sahasrābdaṃ prayatnena dhyātvā viṣṇuṃ sanātanam |
caturbhujaṃ yogagamyaṃ nirguṇaṃ guṇavistaram | | 14
samādhiniṣṭho bhagavānbabhūva kamalāsanaḥ |
etasminnantare viṣṇurbālo bhūtvā caturbhujaḥ | | 15
śyāmāṅgo balavānastrī divyabhūṣaṇabhūṣitaḥ |
brahmaṇo.aṅke haristasthau yathā bālaḥ pituḥ svayam | | 16
tadā prabuddhaśca vidhistaṃ dṛṣṭvā mohamāgataḥ |
vatsavatseti vacanaṃ vidhiḥ prāha prasannadhīḥ | | 17
vihasyāha tadā viṣṇurahaṃ brahmanpitā tava |
tayorvivadatorevaṃ rudro jātastamomayaḥ | | 18
jyotirliṅgaśca bhayado yojanānantavistaraḥ |
haṃsarūpaṃ tadā brahmā varāho bhagavānprabhu | | 19
śatābdaṃ tau prayatnena jātau cordhvamadhaḥ kramāt |
lajjitau punarāgatya tadā tuṣṭuvaturmudā | | 3.4.14.20
tābhyāṃ stuto haraḥ sākṣādbhavo nāmnā samāgataḥ |
kailāsanilayaṃ kṛtvā samādhistho babhūva ha | | 21
jātaṃ pañcayugaṃ tatra divyaṃ rudrasya yoginaḥ |
etasminnantare ghoro dānavastārakāsuraḥ | | 22
sahasrābdaṃ tapaḥ kṛtvā brahmaṇo varamāptavān |
bhavavīryodbhavaḥ putraḥ sa te mṛtyuṃ kariṣyati | | 23
iti matvā surāñjitvā mahendraśca tadābhavat |
te surāścaiva kailāsaṃ gatvā rudraṃ pratuṣṭuvuḥ | | 24
varaṃ brūhīti vacanaṃ surānprāha tadā śivaḥ |
te tu śrutvā praṇamyocurvacanaṃ namrakandharāḥ | | 25
bhagavanbrahmaṇā datto varo vai tārakāya ca |
śivavīryodbhavaḥ putra sa te mṛtyurbhaviṣyati | |
ato.asmānrakṣa bhagavanvivāhaṃ kuru śaṅkara | | 26
svāyambhuve.antare pūrvaṃ dakṣaścāsītprajāpatiḥ |
ṣaṣṭikanyāstato jātāstāsāṃ madhye satī varā | | 27
varṣamātraṃ bhavantaṃ sā pārthivaiḥ samapūjayat |
tasyai tvayā varo dattaḥ sā babhūva tava priyā | | 28
tatpitrā yā kṛtā nindā bhavato.ajñānacakṣuṣā |
tasya doṣātsatī devī tatyāja svaṃ kalevaram | | 29
satītejastadā divyaṃ himādrau ghoramāgamat |
pīḍitastena girirāḍ babhūva smaravihvalaḥ | | 3.4.14.30
pitrīśvaraṃ sa tuṣṭāva kāmavyākulacetanaḥ |
aryamā tu tadā tuṣṭo dadau tasmai sutā nijām | |
menāṃ manoharāṃ śuddhāṃ sa dṛṣṭvā harṣito.abhavat | | 31
nararūpaṃ śubhaṃ kṛtvā devatulyaṃ ca tatpriyam |
sa reme ca tayā sārddhaṃ ciraṃ kālaṃ mahāvane | | 32
garbho jātastadā ramyo navavarṣāntamuttamaḥ |
kanyā jātā tadā subhrūrgaurī gauramayī satī | | 33
jātamātrā ca sā kanyā babhūva navahāyinī |
tuṣṭāva śaṅkaraṃ devaṃ bhavantaṃ tapasā ciram | | 34
śatābdaṃ ca jale magnā śatābdavahnisaṃsthitā |
śatābde ca sthitā vāyau śatābdaṃ nabhasi sthitā | | 35
śatābdaṃ ca sthitā candre śatābdaṃ ravimaṇḍale |
śatābdaṃ garbhabhūmyāṃ ca sthitā sā girijā satī | | 36
śatābdaṃ ca mahattatve gatvā yogabalena sā |
bhavantaṃ śaṅkaraṃ śuddhaṃ tatra dṛṣṭvā sthitādya vai | | 37
triśatābdamato jātaṃ tasmāttvaṃ pārvatīṃ śivām 1 |
varaṃ dehi prasannātmā mahādeva namo.astu te | | 38
iti śrutvā vaco ramyaṃ śaṅkaro lokaśaṅkaraḥ |
devānāha tadā vākyamayogyaṃ vacanaṃ hi vaḥ | | 39
matto jyeṣṭhāśca ye rudrāḥ kumāravratadhāriṇaḥ |
mṛgavyādhādayo mukhyā daśajyotissamudbhavāḥ | | 3.4.14.40
ahaṃ teṣāmavarajo bhavo nāmaiva yogarāṭ |
māyārūpāṃ śubhāṃ nārīṃ kathaṃ gṛhṇāmi lokadām | | 41
nārī bhagavatī sākṣāttayā sarvamidaṃ tatam |
mātṛrūpā tu sā jñeyā yogināṃ lokavāsinām | | 42
ahaṃ yogī kathaṃ nārīṃ mātaraṃ vārituṃ kṣamaḥ |
tasmādahaṃ bhavadarthe svavīryamādadāmyaham | | 43
tadvīryaṃ bhagavānvahniḥ prāpya kāryaṃ kariṣyati |
ityuktvā vahnaye devo dadau vīryamanuttamam | |
svayaṃ tatra samādhistho babhūva bhagavānharaḥ | | 44
tadā śakrādayo devā vahninā saha niryayuḥ |
satyalokaṃ samāgatyābruvansarvaṃ prajāpatim | | 45
śrutvā tatkāraṇaṃ sarvaṃ svayambhūścaturānanaḥ |
namaskṛtya paraṃ brahma kṛṣṇadhyānaparo.abhavat | | 46
dhyānamārgeṇa bhagavāngatvā brahmā paraṃ padam |
hetuṃ tadvarṇayāmāsa yathā śaṅkarabhāṣitam | | 47
śrutvā vihasya bhagavānsvamukhātteja uttamam |
samutpādya tato jātaḥ puruṣo rucirānanaḥ | | 48
brahmāṇḍasya cchaviryā vai sthitā tasya kalevare |
pradyumno nāma vikhyātaṃ tasya jātaṃ mahātmanaḥ | | 49
tena sārddhaṃ tadā brahmā samprāpya svaṃ kalevaram |
dadau tebhyassa puruṣaṃ pradyumnaṃ śambarārtidam | | 3.4.14.50
tejasā tasya devasya narā nāryassamantataḥ |
ekībhūtāstrilokeṣu babhūvuḥ smarapīḍitāḥ | | 51
sthāvarāḥ saumyabhūtā vai te tu kāmāgnipīḍitāḥ |
saridbhiśca latābhiśca militāssambabhūvire | | 52
brahmāṇḍeśaḥ śivaḥ sākṣādrudraḥ kālāgnisannibhaḥ |
trinetrātteja utpādya śamayāmāsa tadvyathām | | 53
tadā kruddhaḥ sa kṛṣṇāṅgo gṛhītvā kausumaṃ dhanuḥ |
divyānpañca śarānghorānmahādevāya bandhave | | 54
uccāṭanena bāṇena gantābhūllokaśaṅkaraḥ |
vaśīkaraṇabāṇena nārīvaśyaḥ śivo.abhavat | | 55
stambhanena mahādevaḥ śivāpārśve sthiro.abhavat |
ākarṣaṇena bhagavācchivākarṣaṇatatparaḥ | |
māraṇenaiva bāṇena mūrchito.abhūnmaheśvaraḥ | | 56
etasminnantare devī mahattatve sthitā śivā |
mūrchitaṃ śivamālokya tatraivāntarddhimāgamat | | 57
tadotthāya mahādevo vilalāpa bhṛśaṃ muhuḥ |
hā priye candravadane hā śive ca ghaṭastani | | 58
hā ume sundarābhe ca pāhi māṃ smaravihvalam |
darśanaṃ dehi rambhoru dāsabhūto.asmi sāmpratam | | 59
evaṃ vilapamānaṃ taṃ girijā yoginī svayam |
samāgatya vacaḥ prāha natvā taṃ śaṅkaraḥ priyam | | 3.4.14.60
kanyāhaṃ bhagavandeva mātṛpitrānusāriṇī |
tayossakāśādbhagavanmama pāṇiṃ gṛhāṇa bhoḥ | | 61
tatheti matvā sa śivaḥ pradyumnaśarapīḍitaḥ |
saptarṣīnpreṣayāmāsa te tu gatvā himācalam | |
sambodhya ca vivāhasya vidhiṃ cakrurmudānvitāḥ | | 62
brahmāṇḍe ye sthitā devāsteṣāṃ svāmī maheśvaraḥ |
vivāhe tasya samprāpte sarve devāssamāyayuḥ | | 63
anantaśca gaṇā~mścaiva surāndṛṣṭvā himācalaḥ |
girijāṃ śaraṇaṃ prāpya tasthau parvatarāṭ svayam | | 64
tadā tu pārvatī devī nidhīnsiddhīḥ samantataḥ |
cakāra koṭiśastatra bahurūpā sanātanī | | 65
dṛṣṭvā tadvismitā devā brahmaṇā saha harṣitāḥ |
tuṣṭuvuḥ pārvatīṃ devīṃ nārīratnaṃ sanātanīm | | 66
devā ūcuḥ
u vitarke ca mā lakṣmīrbahurūpā vidṛśyate |
umā tasmācca te nāma namastasyai namo namaḥ | | 67
katicidayanānyeva brahmāṇḍe.asmicchive tava |
kātyāyanī hi vijñeyā namastasyai namo namaḥ | | 68
gauravarṇācca vai gaurī śyāmavarṇācca kālikā |
raktavarṇāddhaimavatī namastasyai namo namaḥ | | 69
bhavasya dayitā tvaṃ vai bhavānī rudrasaṃyutā |
durgā tvaṃ yogi duṣprāpyā namastasyai namonamaḥ | | 3.4.14.70
nāntaṃ jagmurvayaṃ 3 te vai caṇḍikā nāma viśrutā |
ambā tvaṃ mātṛbhūtā no namastasyai namonamaḥ | | 71
iti śrutvā stavaṃ teṣāṃ varadā sarvamaṅgalā |
devānuvāca muditā daityabhītiṃ harāmi vaḥ | | 72
stotreṇānena samprītā bhavāmi jagatītale | | 73
ityuktvā śambhusahitā kailāsaṃ guhyakālayam |
guhāyāṃ mithunībhūya sahasrābdaṃ mumoda vai | | 74
etasminnantare devā bhīrukā lokanāśanāt |
brahmāṇaṃ ca puraskṛtya tuṣṭuvurgirijāpatim | | 75
lajjitau tau tadā tatra paścāttāpaṃ hi cakratuḥ |
mahānkrodhastayoścāsīttena vai dudruvuḥ surāḥ | | 76
pradyumno balavāṃstatra santasthe gaurivācalaḥ |
rudrakopāgninā dagdho babhūva balavattaraḥ | | 77
pradyumnaḥ sthalarūpaṃ ca tyaktvā bhasmamayaṃ tadā |
sūkṣmadehamupāgamya viśruto.abhūdanaṅgakaḥ | |
yathā pūrvaṃ tathaivāsītkāyaṃ kṛtvā smaro vibhuḥ | | 78
sthūlarūpā ratirdevī śatābdaṃ śaṅkaraṃ param |
dhyānenārādhayāmāsa girijāvallabhaṃ vrataiḥ | |
tadā dadau varaṃ devastasya ratyai sanātanaḥ | | 79
ratidevi śṛṇu tvaṃ vai lokānāṃ hṛtsu jāyase |
yauvane vayasi prāpte nṛṇāṃ dehaiḥ patiṃ svakam | |
bhajiṣyasi madardhena pradyumnaṃ kṛṣṇasambhavam | | 3.4.14.80
svārociṣāntaraḥ kālo vartate cā.adyasupriyaḥ |
vaivasvate.antare prāpte hyaṣṭāviṃśatame yuge | |
dvāparānte ca bhagavān kṛṣṇaḥ sākṣājjaniṣyati | | 81
tadā tasya sutaṃ devaṃ pradyumnaṃ merumūrddhani |
bhajiṣyasi sukhaṃ ramye vipine nandane ciram | | 82
anyeṣu dvāparānteṣu svarṇagarbho hi tatpatiḥ |
janmavānvartate bhūmau yathā kṛṣṇastathaiva saḥ | | 83
madhyāhne caiva sandhyāyāṃ brahmaṇo.avyaktajanmanaḥ |
kalpekalpe harissākṣātkaroti janamaṅgalam | | 84
ityuktvā bhagavāñchambhustatraivāntarddhimāgamat |
rājā babhūva rudrāṇī girijāvallabho bhavaḥ | | 85
sūta uvāca
iti śrutvā bhavaḥ sākṣātsvamukhātsvāṃśamuttamam |
samutpādya tadā bhūmau godāvaryāṃ babhūva ha | | 86
ācāryaśarmaṇo gehe putro jāto bhavāṃśakaḥ |
rāmānujassa vai nāmnānujo.abhūdrāmaśarmaṇaḥ | | 87
ekadā rāmaśarmā vai patañjalimate sthitaḥ |
tīrthāttīrthāntaraṃ prāptaḥ purīṃ kāśīṃ śivapriyām | | 88
śaṅkarācāryamāgamya śataśiṣyasamanvitaḥ |
śāstrārthaṃ kṛtavānramyaṃ kṛṣṇapakṣo haripriyaḥ | | 89
śaṅkarācāryavijito lajjito niśi bhīrukaḥ |
svagehaṃ punarāyātaḥ śāṅkarairvā śarairhataḥ | | 3.4.14.90
rāmānujastu tacchrutvā sarvaśāstraviśāradaḥ |
bhrātṛśiṣyaiśca sahitaḥ purīṃ kāśīṃ samāyayau | | 91
vādo vedāntaśāstre ca tayoścāsīnmahātmanoḥ |
śaṅkaraḥ śivapakṣaśca kṛṣṇapakṣassa vai dvijaḥ | | 92
māsamātreṇa vedānte darśitastena vai hariḥ |
vāsudevassa vai nāma saccidānandavigrahaḥ | | 93
vāsudevassa vai jñeyo vasuṣvaṃśena dīvyati |
vasudevassa vai brahmā tasya sāro hi yaḥ smṛtaḥ | | 94
vāsudevo harissākṣācchivapūjyaḥ sanātanaḥ |
śaṅkaro lajjitastatra bhāṣyaśāstre samāgataḥ | | 95
pakṣamātraṃ śivaissūtrairvarṇayāmāsa vai śivas |
rāmānujena tatraiva bhāṣye sandarśito hariḥ | | 96
govindo nāma vikhyāto vaiyyākaraṇadevatā |
gāṃ parāṃ vindate yasmādgovindo nāma vai hariḥ | | 97
girīśastu na govindo girīṇāmīśvaro hi saḥ |
gopālastu na vai rudro gavārūḍhaḥ prakīrtitaḥ | | 98
jñeyaḥ paśupatiḥ śambhurgopatirnaiva viśrutaḥ |
lajjitaḥ śaṅkarācāryo mīmāṃsāśāstramāgataḥ | | 99
tayordaśadinaṃ śāstre vivādassumahānabhūt |
yastu vai yajñapuruṣo rāmānujamatapriyaḥ | | 3.4.14.100
vicchinnaḥ śaṅkareṇaiva mṛgabhūtaḥ parājitaḥ |
ācāraprabhavo dharmo yajñadevena nirmitaḥ | | 101
bhraṣṭācārastadā jāto yajñe dakṣaprajāpateḥ |
iti rāmānujaḥ śrutvā vacanaṃ prāha namradhīḥ | | 102
karmaṇe janito yajño viśvapālanahetave |
karmabrahmodbhavaṃ viddhi brahmākṣarasamudbhavam | | 103
akṣaro.ayaṃ śivaḥ sākṣācchabdabrahmaṇi saṃsthitaḥ |
purāṇapuruṣo yajño jñeyo.akṣarakaro bhuvi | |
akṣarātsa tu vai śreṣṭhaḥ paramātmā sanātanaḥ | | 104
akṣareṇa na vai tṛptāttṛpto.abhūdyajñakarmaṇi |
nāmnā sa yajñapuruṣo vede loke hi viśrutaḥ | | 105
prapautrasya tadā vṛddhiṃ dṛṣṭvā sparddhāturaḥ śivaḥ |
mṛgabhūtaśca rudro.asau divyabāṇairatarpayat | | 106
samartho yajñapuruṣo jñātvā gurumayaṃ śivam |
palāyanaparo bhūto dharmastena mahānkṛtaḥ | | 107
lajjitaḥ śaṅkarācāryo nyāyaśāstre samāgataḥ |
bhavatīti bhavo jñeyo mṛḍatīti sa vai mṛḍaḥ | | 108
lokānbharati yo devaḥ sa kartā bharga eva hi |
haratīti haro jñeyaḥ sa rudraḥ pāparāvaṇaḥ | | 109
svayaṃ kartā svayaṃ bharttā svayaṃ hartā śivaḥ svayam |
śivādviṣṇurmahīṃ yāto viṣṇorbrahmā ca padmabhūḥ | | 3.4.14.110
iti śrutvā tu vacanaṃ prāha rāmānujastadā |
dhanyo.ayaṃ bhagavācchambhuryasyāyaṃ mahimā paraḥ | | 111
satyaṃ satyaṃ mamājñeyaṃ kartā kārayitā śivaḥ |
rāmanāma paraṃ nityaṃ kathaṃ śambhurjapeddharim | | 112
anantā sṛṣṭayaḥ sarvā udbhūtā yasya tejasā |
anantaḥ śeṣataḥ śeṣā ramante yogino hi tam | | 113
sa ca vai matprabhordhāma saccidānandavigrahaḥ |
iti śrutvā tadā vākyaṃ lajjitaḥ śaṅkaro.abhavat | | 114
yogaśāstra paro devaḥ kṛṣṇastenaiva darśitaḥ |
kālātmā bhagavānkṛṣṇo yogeśo yogatatparaḥ | | 115
sāṅkhyaśāstre ca kapilastasmai tenaiva darśitaḥ |
kaṃ vīryaṃ pāti yo vai sa kapistaṃ caiva lāti yaḥ | |
kapilassa tu vijñeyaḥ kapī rudraḥ prakīrtitaḥ | | 116
kapilo bhagavānviṣṇuḥ sarvajñaḥ sarvarūpavān |
tadā tu śaṅkarācāryo lajjito namrakandharaḥ | | 117
śuklāmbaradharo bhūtvā govindo nāma nirmalam |
jajāpa hṛdi śuddhātmā śiṣyo rāmānujasya vai | | 118
iti te rudramāhātmyaṃ prasaṅgenāpi varṇitam |
dhanavānputravānvāgmī bhavedyaḥ śṛṇuyādidam | | 119
iti śrībhaviṣye mahāpurāṇe pratisargaparvaṇi caturyugakhaṇḍāparaparyāye
rudramāhātmyavarṇanottararāmānujotpattivarṇanaṃ nāma caturdaśo.adhyāyaḥ | 14
atha pañcadaśo.adhyāyaḥ
vasumāhātmye trilocanavaiśyotpattivarṇanam
sūta uvāca
bhṛguvarya mahābhāga śṛṇu tvaṃ jīvavarṇitam |
pavitraṃ vasumāhātmyaṃ sarvavastusukhapradam | | 1
bṛhaspatiruvāca
vaivasvate.antare prāpte cādye satyayuge śubhe |
ilvalā tāmasī śaktiḥ priyā viśravaso muneḥ | |
śivamārādhayāmāsa satī sā pārthivārcanaiḥ | | 2
etasminnantare jāto dīkṣitānvayasambhavaḥ |
yakṣaśarmā mahādhūrto yakṣiṇīpūjane rataḥ | | 3
tasya mitrasnuṣā subhrū ramitā tena pāpinā |
tena doṣeṇa vipro.asau kuṣṭhabhūtastadābhavat | | 4
kuṣṭhabhūtaṃ dvijaṃ tyaktvā yakṣiṇī mantravatsalā |
śivalokaṃ yayau devī kailāsaṃ guhyakālayam | | 5
kṣudhāturo yakṣaśarmā śivarātre mahottame |
darśitaṃ pūjanaṃ tena yoṣidbhyaścopadeśataḥ | | 6
prabhāte samanuprāpte pāraṇāṃ kṛtavāndvijaḥ |
maraṇaṃ prāptavānkuṣṭhī tatraiva śivamandire | | 7
tena puṇyaprabhāvena rājāsītkaraṇāṭake |
rājarāja iti khyāto maṇḍalīko nṛpo.abhavat | | 8
śivārcanaṃ maṅgaladaṃ gehe gehe dine dine |
brāhmaṇaiḥ kārayāmāsa rājarājo mahābalaḥ | | 9
śatābdaṃ bhūtale rājyaṃ kṛtaṃ tena mahātmanā |
rājyādhikāraṃ śreṣṭhasya sutasya pradadau nṛpaḥ | |
tataḥ kāśīpurīṃ prāpya śivaṃ tuṣṭāva pūjanaiḥ | | 3.4.15.10
trivarṣānte mahādevo jyotirliṅgo babhūva ha |
rājarājeśvaro nāma prasiddho.abhūcchivaḥ svayam | | 11
sa nṛpaḥ pāvitastena tyaktvā prāṇāṃstadā svayam |
ilvalāgarbhamāgamya putro.abhūcchubhalakṣaṇaḥ | | 12
jātaḥ kutsitavelāyāṃ rātrau ghoratamovṛte |
kubera iti tannāma prasiddhamabhavadbhuvi | | 13
tapasā toṣayāmāsa sa bālaḥ parameṣṭhinam |
tasmai brahmā tadāgatya laṅkāṃ nāma purīṃ śubhām | |
suvarṇaracitāṃ ramyāṃ kārayitvā dadau prabhuḥ | | 14
tisraḥ koṭyaḥ smṛtā yakṣā lokakāryaparāyaṇāḥ |
teṣāṃ svāmī sa vai cāsīdyakṣarāḍiti viśrutaḥ | | 15
kinnarā bahurūpāśca tadādeśanivāsinaḥ |
balibhiḥ pūjayāmāsuḥ kinnareśastadā svayam | | 16
guhyakā narabhāvasthā divyamūlyaprakāriṇaḥ |
teṣāṃ svāmī sa vai cāsītkubero bhagavānsvayam | | 17
giribhyo bahuratnāni gṛhītvā lokahetave |
rakṣobhiḥ preṣayāmāsa gehe gehe jane jane | | 18
dharmakāryakarā ye tu narā vedaparāyaṇāḥ |
teṣāṃ kośāśca tenaiva pūritā naradharmiṇā | | 19
ye tu lobhaparā dhūrtā narāḥ sañcayakāriṇaḥ |
teṣāṃ rājā sa bhagavāndravyado rākṣaseśvaraḥ | | 3.4.15.20
śavabhūtā narā ye vai dāhitā vahnikarmaṇi |
agnidvāreṇa tanmāṃsaṃ bhuñjate rākṣasāḥ sadā | | 21
ābhirvibhūtibhiryuktaṃ dṛṣṭvā taṃ rāvaṇo balī |
jitvā niṣkāsya laṅkāyāḥ svayaṃ rājā babhūva ha | | 22
kubero duḥkhitastatra śaṅkaraḥ duḥkhanāśanam |
śaraṇyaṃ śaraṇaṃ prāptastadā tu bhagavānharaḥ | |
tena maitrī kṛtā ramyā kubereṇa samaṃ dadhau | | 23
alakāvatī nāma purī racitā viśvakarmaṇā |
sa tāṃ maṅgaladāmāpya kubero harṣamāptavān | | 24
iti śrutvā tadanujo rāvaṇo lokarāvaṇaḥ |
kailāsaṃ girimāgamya nalakūbarabhoginīm | | 25
dṛṣṭvā pulastyatanayaḥ pasparśa madhurānanām |
tadā pativratā devī suprabhā prāha taṃ ruṣā | | 26
snuṣeva tava pāpātmanvarte.ahaṃ lokarāvaṇa |
kuṣṭho bhavettava tanau tena doṣeṇa dāruṇaḥ | | 27
tvayā hṛtaṃ vimānaṃ yajjyeṣṭhabandhośca puṣpakam |
niṣphalatvamavāpnotu yathā caurairhṛtaṃ dhanam | | 28
iti śāpānvito vīrastathābhūtaḥ suduḥkhitaḥ |
śivamārādhayāmāsa kailāse pārthivārcanaiḥ | | 29
dvādaśābdamato jātaṃ pūjanaṃ tasya kurvataḥ |
sa rudro na prasanno.abhūttadā duḥkhī sa rāvaṇaḥ | | 3.4.15.30
juhāva vahnau kramataḥ śirāṃsi puruṣādanaḥ |
sthūladehaṃ ca sakalaṃ sa rudrāya tadārpayat | | 31
bhasmabhūtastadā rakṣo na mṛto brahmaṇo varāt |
pāvakādudbhavaṃ cānyaṃ dehaṃ prāpya manoharam | | 32
śivāya vāyurūpāya dadau svāṅgaṃ punarbalī |
piśācairvāyurūpaiśca bhakṣitaḥ sa ca rāvaṇaḥ | | 33
na mamāra varādghoro vāyorjātaṃ kalevaram |
gṛhītvā sa ca rudrāya nabhobhūtāya cārpayat | | 34
tadā mātṛgaṇairghorairbhakṣito.abhūtsa rāvaṇaḥ |
brahmaṇo varadānena na pañcatvamavāptavān | | 35
nabhasaścodbhavaṃ dehaṃ śūnyabhūtaṃ sa rāvaṇaḥ |
punaḥ prāpya śivāyaiva so.ahaṃ bhūtāya cārpayat | | 36
tadā prasanno bhagavānrudro.ahaṅkāradevatā |
kuberasya yathā mitraṃ rāvaṇasya tathābhavat | | 37
ekaikenaiva śirasā koṭikoṭiśiro.abhavat |
vajrabhūto.abhavaddeho devadevaprasādataḥ | |
evaṃ sa rāvaṇo ghoro babhūva varadarpitaḥ | | 38
devadaityamanuṣyāṇāṃ pannagānāṃ ca yoṣitaḥ |
navoḍhā ramitāścāsanbrahmāṇḍe tena rakṣasā | | 39
pativratāmato ramyo vedadharmaḥ sanātanaḥ |
bhagnībhūto.abhavatsarvaḥ sarvalokeṣu rakṣasā | | 3.4.15.40
kṣuttṛḍbhyāṃ varjito nityaṃ śaṅkareṇaiva tarpitaḥ |
anye surā vinā yajñaiḥ kṣudhitāḥ sambabhūvire | | 41
brahmāṇaṃ ca puraskṛtya kṣīrābdhau prāpya duḥkhitāḥ |
ekībhūya surāssarve tuṣṭuvuḥ parameśvaram | | 42
tadā prasanno bhagavānsaguṇo nirguṇo hariḥ |
uvāca sakalāndevānbhaktinamrānyatendriyān | | 43
kalpākhye śvetavārāhe nedṛśaḥ ko.api dānavaḥ |
babhūva ca yathaivāsau rāvaṇo lokarāvaṇaḥ | | 44
purā mārkaṇḍakalpe ca niśumbhaḥ śumbha eva hi |
yathā jātau tathā ghorau kumbhakarṇaśca rāvaṇaḥ | | 45
rāvaṇā bahavaścāsanhīdṛśo naiva rāvaṇaḥ |
ahaṃ brahmā tathā rudro yato jātāssanātanāḥ | |
sā tu vai prakṛtirmāyā koṭiviśvavidhāyinī | | 46
devasaṅkaṭaghoreṣu samartho devarāṭ svayan |
śakravighne samudbhūte samartho bhagavānharaḥ | | 47
rudrāṇāṃ saṅkaṭe ghore samartho.ahaṃ sadā bhuvi |
mayi saṅkaṭasamprāste samartho bhagavānharaḥ | |48
brahmaṇaḥ parame duḥkhe samarthā prakṛtiḥ parā |
madhukaiṭabhau purā jātau dānavau lokaviśrutau | |4 9
tābhyāṃ dukhamayo brahmā tuṣṭāva jagadambikām |
tadā tasyā balenāhaṃ jaghāna madhukaiṭabhau | | 3.4.15.50
ato madājñayā sarve viṣṇumāyāṃ sanātanīm |
śaraṇyāṃ śaraṇaṃ prāpya kurvatāṃ jagato hitam | | 51
iti śrutvā tu te devāstuṣṭuvuḥ prakṛtiṃ parām |
prasannā ca tadā devī brahmajyotirmayī śivā | | 52
dvidhābhūtā mahīṃ prāptā sītārāmau parāparau |
triliṅgajananī sītā tayā tadaparaṃ dvidhā | |
kṛtaṃ tau ca dvidhā jātau śabdārthau rāmalakṣmaṇau | | 53
śabdamātrasamūhānāṃ svāmī rāmassanātanaḥ |
arthamātrasamūhānāmīśaḥ klībassa lakṣmaṇaḥ | | 54
yasya vajramayaṃ vīryaṃ brahmacaryaṃ dṛḍhaṃ tathā |
sa klībaśca tato.anye vai ktībabhūtā hi vānarāḥ | | 55
parā tu prakṛtissītā tayormaṅgaḥladāyinī |
bhūmimadhyātsamudbhūtā hyayoniryonikāriṇī | | 56
sahasraṃ rāmarāmeti japitaṃ yena dhīmatā |
sītānāmnā ca tasyaiva phalaṃ jñeyaṃ ca tatsamam | | 57
yonibhūtau ca tau devau rādheyasya gṛhaṃ gatau |
idaṃ dṛśyaṃ yadā nāsīttāmasī prakṛtistadā | |
akṣarāśeṣabhūtā ca svayaṃ jātā tridhecchayā | | 58
pūrvaṃ śeṣassa vai rāmo madhye klībasya lakṣmaṇaḥ |
aparau pūrvato jātau puṃklībau ca pareśvarau | |
paro bhāgastu sā devī yoganidrā sanātanī | | 59
anyakalpeṣu he devāḥ kṣīraśāyī hariḥ svayam |
rāmo jñeyastathā śeṣo rudrarūpassa lakṣmaṇaḥ | | 3.4.15.60
sītā bhagavatī lakṣmīrjātā janakanandinī |
sudarśanaśca bharato hareḥ śaṅkhastato.anujaḥ | | 61
kalpākhye śvetavārāhe rāmo jātaḥ parātparaḥ |
pradyumno bharato jñeyo.aniruddhaḥ śatruhā prabhuḥ | |
taiśca sarve vidalitā rākṣasā rāvaṇādayaḥ | | 62
kīrtiṃ svakīyāṃ lokeṣu saṃsthāpya pāvanīṃ prabhuḥ |
puṣpakaṃ ca kuberāya vimānaṃ ca tadā dadau | |
rudrasaṅkhyā sahasrābdaṃ rājyaṃ kṛtvā paraṃ yayau | | 63
sūta uvāca
iti śrutvā kuberastu prathamo vasudevatā |
svamukhātsvāṃśamutpādya vaiśyayonau babhūva ha | | 64
dharadattasya vaiśyasya putro bhūtvā mahītale |
trilocanassa vai nāma mathurāyāṃ babhūva ha | | 65
sarvadravyavyayaṃ kṛtvā nānātīrtheṣu harṣitaḥ |
purīṃ kāśīṃ samāgamya rāmānandaṃ ca vaiṣṇavam | |
natvā tadvaśyamabhajacchiṣyo bhūtvā trilocanaḥ | | 66
svagehaṃ punarāgatya sa vaiśyaścājñayā guroḥ |
rāmabhaktiparaścāsītsādhusevāparāyaṇaḥ | | 67
tadā tu bhagavānrāmo dāsabhūtaśca tadgṛhe |
sthitastrayodaśe māsi sarvavācchitadāyakaḥ | | 68
maṇiratnahiraṇyāni vāsāṃsi vividhāni ca |
nānā vyañjanayogyāni brāhmaṇebhyaḥ svayaṃ dadau | | 69
vaiṣṇavebhyo yatibhyaśca manovācchitadāyakaḥ |
tatastrilocanaṃ prāha bhagavānrāvaṇārtihā | | 3.4.15.70
ahaṃ rāmo na vai dāsastava bhaktivimohitaḥ |
nivāsaṃ kṛtavāngehe tava priyahite rataḥ | | 71
adyaprabhṛti bho vaiśya vasāmi hṛdaye tava |
ityuktvāntarhito devaḥ sa vaiśyo harṣamāgataḥ | | 72
tyaktvā kalatraṃ putraṃ ca prāpya vairāgyamutkaṭam |
uṣitvā sarayūtīre rāmadhyānaparobhavat | | 73
iti śrībhaviṣye mahāpurāṇe pratisargaparvaṇi caturyugakhaṇḍāparaparyāye
kaliyugīyetihāsasamuccaye vasumāhātmye trilocanavaiśyotpattivarṇanaṃ nāma pañcadaśo.adhyāyaḥ | 15

atha ṣoḍaśo.adhyāyaḥ
raṅkaṇavaiśyotpattivarṇanam
bṛhaspatiruvāca
svāyambhuve.antare pūrvaṃ dhruvavaṃśasamudbhavaḥ |
rājā prācīnabarhiśca babhūva makhakārakaḥ | | 1
nāradasyopadeśena tyaktvā hiṃsāmayaṃ makham |
jñānavān vaiṣṇavo bhūtvā daśaputrānajījanat | | 2
pracetānāma teṣāṃ vai jātaṃ te caikarūpiṇaḥ |
piturājñāṃ puraskṛtya jalamadhye tapo.arthinaḥ | |
ratnākarasya sindhośca magnabhūtā babhūvire | | 3
teṣāṃ tu tapasā tuṣṭaḥ svayambhūścaturānanaḥ |
saptābdhiṣu sa tānsapta sutānsaṃsthāpya lokarāṭ | | 4
ratnākare.aṣṭamaṃ putraṃ navamaṃ mānasottare |
daśamaṃ meruśākhāyāṃ sutaṃ kṛtvā mumoda ha | | 5
āpo vahati yo loke sa āpava iti smṛtaḥ |
dvitīyo varuṇo nāma yādasāṃ patirappatiḥ | | 6
dadau pāśaṃ tadā brahmā daityabandhanahetave |
pāśī nāma tato jātaṃ varuṇasya mahātmanaḥ | | 7
sa tu pūrvabhave cāsīdbrāhmaṇaḥ śaktipūjakaḥ. |
āpavo nāma vikhyāto vāruṇīpānatatparaḥ | | 8
bhadrakālyāḥ priyo bhakto nityaṃ pūjanatatparaḥ |
nānāraktamayaiḥ puṣpairguṇṭhitāṃ raktamālikām | | 9
raktacandanasaṃyuktāṃ gṛhītvā mantrasaṃyutaḥ |
bhadrakālyai nivedyāśu navārṇavaparo.abhavat | | 3.4.16.10
dhūpairdīpaiśca naivedyaistāmbūlairṛtujaiḥ phalaiḥ |
pūjayitvā mahālakṣmīṃ bhadrakālīṃ sanātanīm | | 11
tilaiḥ śarkarayā yuktaṃ madhunā ca haviḥ svayam |
vahnidvāreṇa saṃhṛtya tuṣṭāva jagadambikām | | 12
caritraṃ madhyamaṃ devyā viṣṇudevena nirmitam |
navārṇavena tenaiva pratyahaṃ jāpyatatparaḥ | | 13
evaṃ varṣatrayaṃ jātaṃ tasya pūjāṃ prakurvataḥ |
prasannābhūttadā devī varadā sarvamaṅgalā | |
varaṃ brūhīti vacanaṃ tamāha dvijasattamam | | 14
iti vākyaṃ priyaṃ śrutvā dvija āpava namradhīḥ |
tuṣṭāva daṇḍavad bhūtvā bhadrakālīṃ sanātanīm | | 15
āpava uvāca
viṣṇukalpe purā cāsīddānavo mahiṣāsuraḥ |
koṭikoṭisahasraistu rathairvājigajairyutaḥ | | 16
trailokyaṃ svavaśe kṛtvā mahendrassa tadābhavat |
svārociṣāntaraḥ kālo gato rājyaṃ prakurvataḥ | | 17
tatassa bhagavānviṣṇussarvadevasamanvitaḥ |
samutpādya mukhāttejo jvālāmālī babhūva ha | | 18
jyotirliṅgāttadā devī bhavatī svecchayā bhuvi |
sambhūya mahiṣaṃ hantrī tasyai devyai namonamaḥ | | 19
rūdrakalpe purā cāsīdrudacchambhumukhāddivi |
rāvaṇaśca sahasrāsyo jāto brahmāṇḍarāvaṇaḥ | | 3.4.16.20
rākṣaso balavānghoro lokālokagireradhaḥ |
nyavasaddevadaityānāṃ manuṣyāṇāṃ ca bhakṣakaḥ | |
ṣaṣṭhe manvantare tena brahmāṇḍaṃ rājyasātkṛtam | | 21
tato vaivasvate prāpte tretāṣṭāviṃśake prabhuḥ |
sa jāto rāghavagṛhe rāmassaṅkarṣaṇaḥ svayam | | 22
ṣoḍaśābdavapurbhūtvā sa gato janakālaye |
dhanuścājagavaṃ ghoraṃ prabhagnaṃ tena dhīmatā | | 23
tadā brahmādayo devā jñātvā rāmaṃ sanātanam |
sahasravadanasyaiva varṇayāmāsa kāraṇam | | 24
tacchutvā haṃsayānaṃ ca samāruhya sa sītayā |
lokālokagirau prāpya ghorayuddhamacīkarat | | 25
haṃsayānapatākāyāṃ saṃsthito hanumānkapiḥ |
vedāśca vājinastatra netā brahmā sanātanaḥ | | 26
divyavarṣamabhūdghoraḥ saṅgrāmastena rakṣasā |
rāvaṇassa tadā kruddho dvisahasraiśca bāhubhiḥ | | 27
aparau mūrchayitvā tau bhrātarau rāmalakṣmaṇau |
jagarja balavānghorassa ca brahmāṇḍarāvaṇaḥ | | 28
brāhmaṇā saṃstutā mātā bhavatī brahmarūpiṇī |
sītā śāntimayī nityā tayā brahmāṇḍarāvaṇaḥ | |
vināśito namastasyai namastasyai namo namaḥ | | 29
brahmakalpe purā cāsīttālajaṃ ghānvayodbhavaḥ |
muro nāma mahādaityo brahmaṇo baladarpitaḥ | | 3.4.16.30
brahmāṇḍeśaṃ mahārudraṃ mahendrādisamanvitam |
sa babhūva parājityādhikārī raudra āsane | | 31
devaissārddhaṃ mahādevo mādhavaṃ kṣīraśāyinam |
gatvā nivedayāmāsa sa viṣṇuḥ krodhasaṃyutaḥ | | 32
jagāma garuḍārūḍho yatra daityo muraḥ sthitaḥ |
tena sārddhamabhūdyuddhaṃ tasya devasya dāruṇam | 33
sahasrābdamato jātaṃ dṛṣṭvā brahmā bhayānvitaḥ |
parāṃ tu prakṛtiṃ nityāṃ tuṣṭāva ślakṣṇayā girā | | 34
prasannā sā tadā devī kumārī saptahāyinī |
caturbhujāstrasahitā bhūtvā daityamuvāca ha | | 35
parājito.ayaṃ bhagavāndaityarājena vai tvayā |
vijayā nāma me ramyā kaiścinnāhaṃ parājitā | | 36
unmīlinī viñculī ca trispṛśā pakṣavarddhinī |
jayā jayantī vijayā varṣevarṣe kramādaham | | 37
ekādaśaśubhācārā viṣṇavastanayā mama |
ekādaśīti vikhyātā vedamadhye sadā hyaham | | 38
ato māṃ balavāñjitvā vijayāṃ viṣṇumātaram |
pāṇiṃ grahāṇa me ramyaṃ sarvapūjyo bhavānbhavet | | 39
iti śrutvā muro daityastasyā rūpeṇa mohitaḥ |
yuyudhe sa tayā sārddhaṃ kṣaṇārddhena layaṅgataḥ | | 3.4.16.40
taṃ muraṃ nihataṃ dṛṣṭvānujastannarakāsuraḥ |
daityamāyāṃ mahāghorāṃ cakāra suranāśinīm | | 41
ekādaśī svayaṃ māyā huṅkāreṇaiva taṃ tadā |
narakeṇa samaṃ hatvā jagarja jagadambikā | | 42
tayostejo mahāghoramannamadhyeṣu cāgamat |
duṣṭabhūtamamūdannaṃ nṛṇāṃ rogabhayapradam | | 43
dṛṣṭvā caikādaśī nāmnā raviśukrāvuvāca ha |
kurutāṃ śuddhamevāntarbhavantau lokaviśrutau | | 44
tadājñayā tathā kṛtvā deva pūjyau babhūvatuḥ |
evaṃ mātastvayā sarvaṃ kṛtaṃ tasyai namo namaḥ | | 45
iti śrutvā bhadrakālī stotraṃ divyaṃ kathāmayam |
āpavaṃ prāha sā devī brāhmaṇaṃ vedakovidam | | 46
pralaye ca tadā prāpte naṣṭe sthāvarajaṅgame |
ekārṇave purā tvaṃ vai matprasādātsukhī bhava | | 47
stotreṇānena suprītā varadāhaṃ sadā narān 1 |
ityuktyāntarhitā devī sa vipro varuṇo.abhavat | | 48
sūta uvāca
iti śrutvā gurorvākyaṃ bhagavāndvitiyo vasuḥ |
varuṇaḥ svamukhāttejo janayāmāsa bhūtale | | 49
dehalyāṃ sa tu vai jāto dharmabhaktasya vai gṛhe |
vidhavā tasya yā kanyā garbhaṃ dhatte hareḥ svayam | | 3.4.16.50
iti jñātvā dharmabhakto mumude sutajanmani |
nāmadeva iti khyātaḥ sāṅkhyayogaparāyaṇaḥ | | 51
ābrahmastambaparyantaṃ sarvaṃ viṣṇumayaṃ jagat |
jñātvā dṛṣṭvā gataḥ kāśyāṃ rāmānandaṃ haripriyam | | 52
natvā tacchiṣyatāṃ prāpya tatra vāsamakārayat |
sikandaro mlecchapatirdehalīrājyamāsthitaḥ | | 53
nāmadevaṃ samāhūya samparīkṣya tadā sukhī |
ardhakoṭimitaṃ dravyaṃ dadau tasmai kalipriyaḥ | | 54
nāmadevastu taddravyairgaṅgārohaṇamuttamam |
kārayāmāsa vai kāśyāṃ śubhraṃ sarvaṃ śilāmayam | | 55
daśaviprānpañca nṛpānpañca vaiśyāñchataṃ gavām |
punarujjīvayāmāsa śavabhūtānsa yogavān | | 56
bṛhaspatiruvāca
viśvānaraḥ purā cāsīdbrāhmaṇo vedakovidaḥ |
anapatyo vidhātāraṃ tuṣṭāva bahupūjanaiḥ | | 57
varṣamātreṇa bhagavānparameṣṭhī prajāpatiḥ |
samāgatya vacaḥ prāha varaṃ brūhi dvijottama | | 58
iti śrutvā sa hovāca bhagava~mste namo namaḥ |
prakṛteśca paraḥ putro bhūyānmama varāttava | | 59
iti śrutvā tadā brahmā vismitaḥ prāha taṃ dvijam |
ekā vai prakṛtirmāyā triliṅgajananī svayam | | 3.4.16.60
tayā dṛśyaṃ jagatsarvaṃ samutpāditamātmanā |
prakṛteśca paro yo vai paramātmā sa cāvyayaḥ | | 61
abuddhirbodhanirato hyaśrutiśca śṛṇoti vai |
adehaḥ sa spṛśatyetadacakṣuḥ paśyati svayam | | 62
ajihvonnaṃ sa gṛhṇāti sa jighrati na sā vinā |
amukho vedavaktā ca karmakāraḥ karaṃ vinā | | 63
apado gacchati hyetadaliṅgo nāribhogavān |
aguhyo hi karotyetāṃ satattvāṃ guhyabhūtinīm | | 64
śabdabrahma sparśamayaṃ rūpabrahma rasātmakam |
gandhabrahma paraṃ jñeya tasmai tadbrahmaṇe namaḥ | | 65
prakṛtiṃ puruṣaṃ caiva viddhyanādi ubhāvapi |
vikārāṃśca guṇāṃścaiva viddhi prakṛtisambhavān | | 66
ekārthau tau ca śabdaikau rūpaikau nityavigrahau |
ādimadhyāntarahitau nityaśuddhau sanātanau | | 67
puṃstrīnapuṃskajananī jñeyā sā prakṛtiḥ parā |
puruṣaśca kaviḥ sūkṣmaḥ kūṭastho jñānavānparaḥ || 68 ||
ajanmā janma cāpnoti mayā jātaḥ sa janmavān ||
kathaṃ sa puruṣo nityastava putro bhaviṣyati || 69 ||
ato viśvānara mune māyābhūto hariḥ svayam ||
tava putratvamāpnoti varānmama janārdanaḥ || 3.4.16.70 ||
ityuktvāntardadhe devaḥ pāvakastadvarādabhūt ||
aṣṭānāṃ ca vasūnāṃ ca pāvako hi patistvayam || 71 ||
vaiśvānara iti khyāto.abhavatsvāhāpatiḥ prabhuḥ ||
sa tu pūrvabhave devaḥ purā kalpe.analobhavat || 72 ||
naiṣadho brāhmaṇo dhīmānyathā rājā nalastathā ||
saṃkaṭāyāṃ gate bhūpe damayantī pativratā || 73 ||
svapiturgehamāsādyānveṣayāmāsa bhūpatim ||
tadā nalo dvijaṃ prāpto damayaṃtīpatiḥ prabhuḥ || 74 ||
dṛṣṭvā taṃ mohamāpannā damayaṃtī śubhānanā ||
etasminnaṃtare tatra vāguvācāśarīriṇī || 75 ||
nāyaṃ nalastava patirbrāhmaṇoyaṃ sumohitaḥ ||
analo nāma vikhyāto devavākyātsa cābhavat || 76 ||
mahāsarasvatīṃ devīṃ tuṣṭāva sa tu mohitaḥ ||
tasya puṇyaprabhāvena viśvānarasuto.abhavat || 77 ||
|| sūta uvāca || ||
iti śrutvā gurorvākyaṃ pāvako bhagavānprabhuḥ ||
svamukhātsvāṃśamutpādya saṃjātastu tato vasuḥ || 78 ||
raṃkaṇo nāma vikhyāto lakṣmīdattasya vai sutaḥ ||
nagare kāṃcanapure vaiśyajātisamudbhavaḥ || 79 ||
yaṃkaṇā nāma tatpatnī babhūva ca pativratā ||
sarvadravyavyayaṃ kṛtvā dharmakāryeṣu daṃpatī || 3.4.16.80 ||
kāṣṭhamānīya vikrīya bubhujāte parasparam ||
rāmānaṃdastasya gurū raṃkaṇasya mahātmanaḥ || 81 ||
iti śrībhaviṣye mahāpurāṇe pratisargaparvaṇi caturyugakhaṃḍāparaparyāye kaliyugīyetihāsasamuccaye vasumāhātmye raṃkaṇa vaiśyotpattivarṇano nāma ṣoḍaśo.adhyāyaḥ || 16 || || cha ||

|| bṛhaspatiruvāca || ||
ditiputrau mahāghorau viṣṇunā prabhaviṣṇunā ||
saṃhatau tu ditirjñātvā kaśyapaṃ samapūjayat|| 1 ||
dvādaśābdāṃtare svāmī kaśyapo bhagavānṛṣiḥ ||
uvāca patnīṃ sa hi tāṃ varaṃ brūhi varānane ||
sā tu śrutvā namaskṛtya vacanaṃ prāha harṣitā || 2 ||
aditirmama yā devī sapatnī putrasaṃyutā ||
dvādaśatanayāstasyā mama dvau tanayau smṛtau || 3 ||
tadavaryasute naiva viṣṇunā surapālinā ||
vināśitau sutau ghorau tato.ahaṃ bhṛśaduḥkhitā || 4 ||
dehi me tanayaṃ svāmindvādaśādityanāśanam ||
iti śrutvā vaco ghoraṃ ditiṃ prāha suduḥkhitaḥ || 5 ||
brahmaṇā nirmitau loke dharmādharmau parāparau ||
dharmapakṣāstu ye loke narāste brahmaṇaḥ priyāḥ || 6 ||
adharmapakṣāstu narā vairiṇastasya dhīmataḥ ||
adharmapakṣau tanayau tasmānmṛtyumupāgatau || 7 ||
ato dharmapriye śuddhaṃ kuru tasmānmahābalaḥ ||
bhaviṣyati suto dhīmā~mścirajīvī tava priyaḥ|| 8 ||
iti śrutvā ditirdevī kaśyapādgarbhamuttamam ||
saṃprāpya sā śubhācārā babhūva vratadhāriṇī || 9 ||
tasyā garbhagate putre mahendraśca bhayānvitaḥ ||
dāsabhūtaḥ sthito gehe sa diterājñayā guroḥ || 3.4.17.10 ||
saptamāsi sthite garbhe śakramāyāvimohitā ||
aśuciśca ditirdevī suṣvāpa nijamaṃdire || 11 ||
aṃguṣṭhamātro bhagavānmahendro vajrasaṃyutaḥ ||
kukṣimadhye samāgamya cakre garbhaṃ sa saptadhā || 12 ||
jīvabhūtānatibalāndṛṣṭvā sapta mahāripūn||
ekaikaḥ saptadhā tena mahendreṇa tadā kṛtaḥ || 13 ||
namrībhūtaśca tāndṛṣṭvā mahendrastaiḥ samanvitaḥ ||
yoni dvāreṇa cāgamya praṇanāma tadā ditim || 14 ||
prasannā sā ditirdevānmahendrāya ca tāndadau ||
marudgaṇāśca te sarve vikhyātāḥ śakrasevakāḥ ||15|||
sa tu pūrvabhave jāto brāhmaṇo lokaviśrutaḥ ||
ilo nāma sa vedajño yathelo nṛpatistadā || 16 ||
ekadā balavānrājā manuputra ilaḥ svayam||
ekākī hayamāruhya merorvipinamāyayau || 17 ||
meroradhaḥ sthitaḥ khaṇḍaḥ svarṇagarbho haripriyaḥ ||
nivāsaṃ kṛtavā~mstatra kṛtvā rāṣṭraṃ mahottamam || || 18 ||
ilenāvṛtamevāpi kṛtaṃ tatra sthale surāḥ ||
ilāvṛtamiti khyātaḥ khaṇḍo.abhūdvibudhapriyaḥ || 19 ||
bhārate ye sthitā lokā ilāvṛtamupāgatāḥ ||
merurgirirvṛkṣamayo vidhātrā nirmito hi saḥ || 3.4.17.20 ||
ārohaṇaṃ naraistasmitkṛtaṃ svarṇamayaṃ śubham ||
tamāruhya kramāllokaḥ svargalokamupāgataḥ ||21 ||
tāndṛṣṭvā manujānprāptānsadehānsvargamaṇḍale ||
vismitāśca surāssarve maheśaṃ śaraṇaṃ yayuḥ || 22 ||
jñātvā sa bhagavānrudro bhavānyā saha śaṃkaraḥ ||
ilāvṛtavane ramye sa reme ca tayā saha || 23 ||
etasminnantare prāpto vaivasvatasuto mahān ||
ilonāma mahāprājño mṛgayārthī sadāśivam || 24 ||
nagnabhūtaṃ samālokya netre saṃmīlya saṃsthitaḥ ||
lajjitāṃ girijāṃ dṛṣṭvā śaśāpa bhaga vānharaḥ || 25 ||
asminkhaṇḍe sadā nāryo bhaviṣyaṃti ca māṃ vinā ||
ityuktā vacanaṃ tasminnāryassarvā babhūvire || 26 ||
ilā babhūva nṛpate kanyā janamanoharā ||
bahukālaṃ meruśṛṃge mahattapamacīkarat || 27 ||
ilāsamādhibhūtāyāḥ saptaviṃśaccaturyugam ||
jātaṃ tata ilā kanyā tretāmadhye tu candrajam ||
budhaṃ devaṃ patiṃ kṛtvā caṃdravaṃśamajījanat || 28 ||
ayodhyādhipatiḥ śrīmānyadelāvṛtamāgataḥ ||
tasya rājñī madavatī nāmnā tuṣṭāva pārvatīm || 29 ||
tadā prāpta ilo viprastasyā rūpeṇa mohitaḥ ||
pasparśa tāṃ madavatīṃ rājñīṃ kāmavimohitaḥ || 3.4.17.30 ||
etasminnaṃtare tatra vāguvā cāśarīriṇī ||
ilo nāyaṃ dvijaścāyaṃ tava rūpavimohitaḥ || 31 ||
anilo nāma tatraiva vikhyāto.abhūddvijasya vai ||
kāmāgnipīḍito viprassa tuṣṭāva ca pāvakam || 32 ||
chittvāchittvā śiro ramyaṃ tasmai jātaṃ punaḥ punaḥ ||
dattvā tuṣṭāva taṃ devaṃ prasanno.abhūddhanaṃjayaḥ || 33 ||
prāha tvamūnapaṃcā śadvibhedāñjanayiṣyasi ||
tathāhaṃ mitravānbhūtvā tatsaṃkhyastava kāmadaḥ || 34 ||
yathā kubero bhagavānṣaḍviṃśadvaruṇapriyaḥ ||
tathāhamūnapaṃcāśadvibhedastava vai sakhā ||35||
ityukte vacane tasminditikukṣau dvijottamaḥ ||
vāyurnāma sa vai jātaḥ pāvakasya priyassakhā ||36||
|| sūta uvāca || ||
iti śrutvā gurorvākyaṃ vaiśyajātyāṃ samudbhavaḥ ||
dhānyapālasya vai gehe mṛlagaṃḍāntajaḥ sutaḥ ||
pitṛmātṛparityaktaḥ kāśyāṃ viṃdhyavane tadā || 37 ||
aliko nāma vai mlecchastatra sthāne samāgataḥ || 38 ||
anapatyo vastrakārī sutaṃ prāpya gṛhaṃ yayau ||
kabīra iti vikhyātaḥ sa putro madhurānanaḥ || || 39 ||
sa saptābdavapurbhūtvā godugdhapānatatparaḥ ||
rāmānaṃdaṃ guruṃ matvā rāmadhyānaparo.abhavat ||3.4.17.40||
svahastenaiva saṃskṛtya bhojanaṃ haraye.aparyat ||
tatpriyārthaṃ harissākṣātsarvakāmaprado.abhavat || 41 ||
|| bṛhaspatiruvāca || ||
uttānapādatanayo dhuvobhūtkṣatriyaḥ purā ||
pitṛmātṛparityaktaḥ sa bālaḥ paṃcahāyanaḥ || 42 ||
govarddhanagirau prāpya nāradasyopadeśataḥ ||
sa cakre bhagavaddhyānaṃ māsānṣaṭ ca mahāvratī || 43 ||
tadā prasanno bhagavānviṣṇurnārāyaṇaḥ prabhuḥ ||
khamaṃḍale padaṃ tasmai dadau prītyā nabhomayam || 44 ||
dṛṣṭvā tadvadanaṃ ramyaṃ māyāśaktyā diśo daśa ||
svāminaṃ ca dhruvaṃ matvā bhaktinamrā babhūvire || 45 ||
dhuvo.api bhagavānsākṣātsarvapūjyo babhūva ha ||
dikpatiḥ sa tu vijñeyo bhagaṇānāṃ patiḥ svayam || 46 ||
nabhaḥpatiḥ kālakaraḥ śiśumārapatissa vai ||
paṃcatattvā hi vai māyā prakṛtistatpatiḥ svayam || 47 ||
tasmāddharāyāṃ saṃbhūto bhaumo nāma mahāgrahaḥ ||
jaladevyāstato jātaḥ śukro nāma mahāgrahaḥ || 48 ||
vahnidevyā tato jātaścāhaṃ tatra mahāgrahaḥ ||
vāsudevyāṃ dhuvājjātaḥ keturnāma mahāgrahaḥ||49||
grahabhūtaḥ sthitastatra nabhodevyāṃ tadudbhavaḥ ||
rāhurnāma tathā ghoro mahāgraha upagrahaḥ || 3.4.17.50 ||
pūrvasyāṃ diśi vai tasmājjātaścairāvato gajaḥ ||
āgneyyāṃ diśi vai tasmātpuṃḍarīko gajo.abhavat || 51|
vāmanaḥ kumudaścaiva puṣpadaṃtaḥ kramādgajāḥ ||
sārvabhaumaḥ supratīko nabhodikṣu tu tatsutāḥ |55||
abhramuḥ kapilā caiva piṃgalākhyā imāḥ kramāt ||
tāmrakarṇī śubhradaṃtī cāṃganā cāṃjanāvatī ||53||
bhūmidikṣu kariṇyaśca jātāstasmāttu tatpriyāḥ |||
bhaginī ca tathā mātā sutā caiva snuṣā tathā || 54 ||
paśuyonyudbhavānāṃ ca nṛṇāṃ tā yoṣitassadā ||
devayonyudbhavānāṃ ca nṛṇāṃ patnī smṛtā svasā || 55 ||
manuvaṃśodbhavānāṃ ca nṛṇāṃ cānyodbhavāḥ striyaḥ ||
iti dharmo vidhātrokto mayā proktaḥ surā hi vaḥ || 56 ||
dvidhā dhuvassa vijñeyo bhūmerūrddhvamadhastathā ||
sadguṇaḥ sa divārūpo rātrirūpastamoguṇaḥ || 57 ||
adhodhruve sadā rātrirnārakāstatra vai sthitāḥ ||
ūrdhvadhruve divā nityaṃ tapomadhye niśā divā || 58 ||
maho janastapassatyaṃ teṣu nityaṃ dinaṃ smṛtam ||
rauravaścāṃdhakūpaśca tāmisraṃ ca tamomayam ||
teṣu nityaṃ smṛtā rātriḥ kalpamānaṃ ca kovidaiḥ || 59 ||
sa tu pūrvabhave cāsīdbrāhmaṇo mādhavapriyaḥ ||
ṣaṣṭyabdaṃ sarvatīrtheṣu prātaḥsnānaṃ cakāra ha || 3.4.17.60 ||
tīrtha puṇyātsa vai vipro mādhavo mādhavapriyaḥ ||
sunītyāṃ garbhamāsādya dhruvo bhūtvā rarāja ha ||
ṣaṭtriṃśacca sahasrābdaṃ rājyaṃ kṛtvā dhruvo.abhavat || 61 || ||
|| sūta uvāca || ||
iti śrutvā gurorvākyaṃ sa dhruvaḥ paṃcamo vasuḥ ||
gurjare deśa āgamya vaiśyajātyāṃ samudbhavaḥ ||
naraśrīrnāma vikhyāto guṇavaiśyasya vai sutaḥ || 62 ||
kusīdaguṇaguptaśca naraśrīḥ putravatsalaḥ ||
tyaktvā prāṇānyayau svargaṃ sa vaiśyatanayo dhruvaḥ || 63 ||
pratyahaṃ sa hareḥ krīḍāṃ vṛndāvanamahottame ||
śivaprasādātpratyakṣāṃ dṛṣṭvā harṣamavāptavān || 64 ||
yasya putravivāhe ca bhagavānbhaktavatsalaḥ ||
yādavaissaha saṃprāptastasya vāṃchitadāyakaḥ || 65 ||
purīṃ kāśīṃ samāgamya naraśrībharktarāṭ svayam ||
rāmānandasya śiṣyo.abhūdviṣṇudharma viśāradaḥ || 66 ||
|| bṛhaspatiruvāca || ||
kadācidbhagavānatrirgaṃgākūle.anasūyayā ||
sārddhaṃ tapo mahatkurvanbrahmadhyānaparo.abhavat || || 67 ||
tadā brahmā hariśśaṃbhuḥ svasvavāhanamāsthitāḥ ||
varaṃ brūhīti vacanaṃ tamāhuste sanātanāḥ || 68 ||
iti śrutvā vaca steṣāṃ svayaṃbhūtanayo muniḥ ||
naiva kiñcidvacaḥ prāha saṃsthitaḥ paramātmani || 69 ||
tasya bhāvaṃ samālokya trayo devāḥ sanātanāḥ ||
anasūyāṃ tasya patnīṃ samāgamya vaco.abruvan ||3.4.17.70||
liṃgahastaḥ svayaṃ rudro viṣṇustadrasavarddhanaḥ ||
brahmā kāmabrahmalopaḥ sthitastasyā vaśaṃ gataḥ ||
ratiṃ dehi madāghūrṇe no cetprāṇāṃstyajāmyaham || 71 ||
pativratā.anasūyā ca śrutvā teṣāṃ vaco.aśubham ||
naiva kiṃcidvacaḥ prāha kopa bhītā surānprati || 72 ||
mohitāstatra te devā gṛhītvā tāṃ balāttadā ||
maithunāya samudyogaṃ cakrurmāyāvimohitāḥ || 73 ||
tadā kruddhā satī sā vai tāñchaśāpa munipriyā ||
mama putrā bhaviṣyaṃti yūyaṃ kāmavimohitāḥ || 74 ||
mahādevasya vai liṃgaṃ brahmaṇo.asya mahāśiraḥ ||
caraṇau vāsudevasya pūjanīyā naraissadā ||
bhaviṣyaṃti suraśreṣṭhā upahāso.ayamuttamaḥ || 75 ||
iti śrutvā vaco ghoraṃ namaskṛtya munipriyām ||
tuṣṭuvurbhaktinamrāśca devapāṭhaiśca ṛṅmayaiḥ ||76||
anasūyā tadā prāha bhavanto mama putrakāḥ ||
bhūtvā śāpaṃ madīyaṃ ca tyaktvā tṛptimavāpsyatha ||77||
ityukte vacane brahmā caṃdramāśca tadā hyabhūt ||
dattātreyo hariḥ sākṣāddurvāsā bhagavānharaḥ ||
tatpāpaparihārārthaṃ yogavanto babhūvire || 78 ||
etasminnaṃtare devī prakṛtissarva dharmiṇī ||
vidhiṃ viṣṇuṃ haraṃ cānyaṃ cakre sā guṇarūpiṇī || 79 ||
manvaṃtaramato jātaṃ teṣāṃ yogaṃ prakurvatām ||
hṛṣitāśca trayo devāssamāgamya ca tānprati || 3.4.17.80 ||
uvāca vacanaṃ ramyaṃ teṣāṃ maṃgalahetave ||
candramāśca bhavetsomo vasuḥ ṣaṣṭhaḥ surapriyaḥ || 81 ||
rudrāṃśaścaiva durvāsāḥ pratyūṣaḥ saptamo vasuḥ ||
dattātreyamayo yogī prabhāsaścāṣṭamo vasuḥ ||
teṣāṃ vākyaṃ samākarṇya vasavaste trayo.abhavan ||82||
|| sūta uvāca || ||
iti śrutvā gurorvākyaṃ vasavo harṣitāstrayaḥ ||
svāṃśena bhūtalaṃ jagmuḥ kaliśuddhāya dāruṇe ||
dākṣiṇātye rājagṛhe vaiśyajātyāṃ samudbhavaḥ || 83 ||
pīpā nāma sutaḥ somaḥ sudevasya tadā hyabhūt ||
kṛtaṃ rājyapadaṃ tena yathā bhūpena tatpure || 84||
rāmānandasya śiṣyo.abhūddvārakāṃ sa samāgataḥ ||
harermudrāṃ svarṇamayīṃ prāpya kṛṣṇātsa vai nṛpaḥ ||
vaiṣṇavebhyo dadau tatra pretatattvavināśinīm || 85 ||
pratyūṣaścaiva pāṃcāle vaiśyajātyāṃ samudbhavaḥ ||
mārgapālasya tanayo nānako nāma viśrutaḥ || 86 ||
rāmānandaṃ samāgamya śiṣyo bhūtvā sa nānakaḥ ||
sa vai mlecchānvaśīkṛtya sūkṣmamārgamadarśayat || 87 ||
prabhāso vai śāṃtipure brahmajātyāṃ samudbhavaḥ ||
śukladattasya tanayo nityānaṃda iti smṛtaḥ ||
iti te vasumāhātmyaṃ mayā śaunaka varṇitam || 88 ||
iti śrībhaviṣye mahāpurāṇe pratisargaparvaṇi caturyugakhaṇḍāparaparyāye kaliyugīyetihāsasamuccaye vasumāhātmye kabīranaraśrīpīpānānakanityānandasamu tpattivarṇanaṃ nāma saptadaśo.adhyāyaḥ || 17 || cha ||

|| sūta uvāca || ||
ityuktvā tānsurāndevo bhagavānbṛhatāṃpatiḥ ||
aśvinau ca samālokya tayorgāthāmavarṇayat || 1 ||
vaivasvate.antare pūrvaṃ viśvakarmā vicitrakṛt ||
citraguptaśriyaṃ dṛṣṭvā citralekhāvinirmitām ||
sparddhābhūto mahāmāyāṃ tuṣṭāva bahupūjanaiḥ || 2 ||
prasannā sā tadā devī citrāyāṃ tasya yoṣiti ||
svāṃśājjātā smṛtā saṃjñā sarvajñānakarī svayam || 3 ||
ṣoḍaśābde vayaḥ prāpte saṃjñāyāstatpitā sukhī ||
vivāhārthī surānsarvānāhvayanmerumūrddhani || 4 ||
yakṣādhīśāśca ṣaḍviṃśatkuberādyāssamāgatāḥ ||
yādasāṃ patayaḥ prāptā daśa tatraiva kāmukāḥ || 5 ||
pāvakā ūnapaṃcāśadvāyavaśca tathā smṛtāḥ ||
dhruvau dvau ca svayaṃ prāptau somāstatraiva ṣoḍaśa ||6||
trayodaśa ca pratyūṣāḥ prāptā viśvaprarakṣakāḥ ||
ṣaṣṭyuttaraṃ ca triśataṃ prabhāsā dinarakṣakāḥ ||7 ||
bhavādyāśca tadāḥ rudrāḥ śaśimaṇḍalarakṣakāḥ ||
ādityāśca sthitāssarve saṃjñāyāśca svayaṃvare || 8 ||
dānavā vipracittyādyāścaturāśītirāyayuḥ ||
prahlādādyāstadā daityā vāsukyādyāśca pannagāḥ || 9 ||
śeṣādyāśca tadā nāgāstārkṣyādyā garuḍāḥ smṛtāḥ ||
sarve svayaṃvare prāptā mahākolāhalohyabhūt || 3.4.18.10 ||
etasminnaṃtare devī devakanyāsamanvitā ||
saṃjñā devānprati tadā pratyakṣamabhavaddivi || 11 ||
tāṃ samālokya balavānbaliḥ kāmavimohitaḥ ||
kare gṛhītvā prayayau paśyatāṃ sarvadhanvinām || 12 ||
tadā krodhāturā devā rurudhurdaityasattamam ||
śastrāstraistarpayitvā taṃ mahadyuddhamakārayan || 13 ||
dānavāśca tadā daityā nānāvāhanasaṃsthitāḥ ||
devaiḥ sārddhaṃ mahadyuddhaṃ tumulaṃ cakrire mudā || 14 ||
dānavaiśca hatā devāḥ surairdaityā vināśitāḥ ||
śavabhūtairilāvarte.abhūdagamyā vasuṃdharā || 15 ||
pakṣamātra mabhūdyuddhaṃ divyaṃ dānavadevayoḥ ||
pāṃcajanyastathā dhātā hayagrīvaśca mitrakaḥ || 16 ||
aghāsuro.aryamā caiva balaḥ śakrastathaiva ca ||
bakāsuraśca varuṇaḥ śakaṭaḥ prāṃśureva ca || 17 ||
vatsāsuro bhagaścaiva vivasvāṃśca baliḥ svayam ||
pralaṃbaśca tathā pūṣā gardabhaḥ savitā yudhi ||18||
viśvakarmā mayaścaiva kālanemirhariḥ svayam ||
kāṃkṣamāṇau ca vijayaṃ yuyudhāte parasparam ||
parājitāśca te daityā yuddhaṃ tyaktvā pradudruvuḥ || 19 ||
vivasvā~mśca tadā saṃjñāṃ gṛhītvā rathasaṃsthitām ||
viśvakarmāṇamāgamya dadau tasmai prasannadhīḥ || 3.4.18.20 ||
vivasvaṃtaṃ suraśreṣṭhaṃ dṛṣṭvā saṃjñā vaco.abravīt ||
matpatiśca bhavāndevo bhavetkāryakarassadā || 21 ||
tvayā jitāhaṃ bhagavanbalervipriyakāriṇaḥ ||
bhrātṛjāgrahaṇe doṣo na bhavetsa kadācana || 22 ||
vīrabhuktā sadā nārī strīratnaṃ munibhiḥ smṛtam ||
caturddhā prakṛtirdevī guṇabhinnā guṇaikikā ||
ekā sā prakṛtirmātā guṇasāmyātsanātanī || 23 ||
sattvabhūtā ca bhagi nī rajobhūtā ca gehinī ||
tamobhūtā ca sā kanyā tasyai devyai namonamaḥ || 24 ||
bahavaḥ puruṣā ye vai nirguṇāścaikarūpiṇaḥ ||
caitanyā.ajñānavaṃtaśca loke prakṛtisaṃbhavāḥ || 25 ||
aloke pāpajāssarve devabrahmasamudbhavāḥ ||
yā tu jñānamayī nārī vṛṇedyaṃ puruṣaṃ śubham ||
ko.api putraḥ pitā bhrātā sa ca tasyāḥ patirbhavet || 26 ||
svakīyāṃ ca sutāṃ brahmā viṣṇudevaḥ svamātaram ||
bhaginīṃ bhagavāñchaṃbhurgṛhītvā śreṣṭhatāmagāt || 27 ||
iti śrutvā vedamayaṃ vākyaṃ cāditisaṃbhavaḥ ||
vivasvānbhrātṛjāṃ saṃjñāṃ gṛhītvā śreṣṭhavānabhūt || 28 ||
sutāḥ kanyāstayorjātā manurvaivasvatastathā ||
yamaśca yamunā caiva divyatejobhiranvitāḥ || 29 ||
tadā saṃjñā satī sākṣāttejobhūtaṃ patiṃ svakam ||
jñātvā chāyāṃ samutpādya tapase vanamā gatā || 3.4.18.30 ||
sāvarṇiśca manustasyāṃ śaniśca tapatī tathā ||
chāyāyāṃ ca samudbhūtāḥ kūradṛṣṭyā vivasvataḥ || 31 ||
putrabhedena tāṃ nārīṃ matvā māyāṃ ruṣānvitaḥ ||
cakāra bhasmabhūtāṃ tāṃ vivasvānbhagavānraviḥ || 32 ||
tadā śaniśca sāvarṇirvivasvataṃ ruṣānvitam ||
jñātvā ca krodhatāmrākṣau yuyudhāte parasparam || 33 ||
kiyato caiva kālena bhagnabhūtau vivasvatā ||
himācale girau prāpya tepatuḥ paramaṃ tapaḥ || 34 ||
trivarṣānte ca sā devī mahākālī samāgatā||
arcitaṃ ca varaṃ tābhyāṃ dadau tadbhaktivatsalā ||35||
punastau ca samāgamya yuyudhāte vivasvatā||
vivasvānbhayabhītaśca tyaktvā yuddhaṃ parābhavat || 36 ||
tatra sthitā priyā saṃjñā vaḍavārūpadhariṇī ||
kurukhaṃḍe mahāramye tapaṃtī tapa ulbaṇam || 37 ||
gatvā dadarśa bhagavānsajñāṃ saṃbodhakāriṇīm ||
kāmāturo hayo bhūtvā tatra reme tayā saha || 38 ||
paṃcavarṣāntare saṃjñā garbhaṃ tasmāddadhau svayam ||
tanayau ca samudbhūtau divya rūpaparākramau || 39 ||
piturduḥkhaṃ samālokya jagmatū ravimaṇḍalam ||
jitvā baṃdhū durācārau krūradṛṣṭyā tadā svayam || 3.4.18.40 ||
baddhvā tau svapituḥ pārśvama saṃprāptau vaḍavāsutau ||
dṛṣṭvā vivasvānbhagavānvairiṇau samupāgatau || 41 ||
saṃpīḍya tāḍayāmāsa lohadaṃḍairbhayānakaiḥ ||
paṃgubhūtau punastyaktvā chāyāputrau divākaraḥ || 42 ||
āśvineyau samālokya vacanaṃ prāha tau mudā ||
jīva īśo yathā mitre naranārāyaṇau yathā||
ekanāmnā yuvāṃ prītau nāsatyau ca bhaviṣyathaḥ || 43 ||
somaśaktiriḍādevī jyeṣṭhapatnī bhaviṣyati ||
piṃgalā sūryaśaktiśca laghupatnī bhaviṣyati || 44 ||
iḍāpatissa vai nāma dvitīyaḥ piṃgalāpatiḥ ||
dvādaśassa nṛṇāṃ rāśeḥ krūradṛṣṭiḥ śanaiścaraḥ ||
tasya śāntikaro jyeṣṭho bhaviṣyati mahītale || 45 ||
dvitīyaśca nṛṇāṃ rāśeḥ sāvarṇirbhramakārakaḥ ||
tasya śāntikaro bhūmau bhavitā piṃgalāpatiḥ || 46||
janmarāśisthitā devī tapatī tā pakāriṇī ||
iḍā ca piṃgalā tasyāḥ śāntikartryau bhaviṣyataḥ || 47 ||
iti śrutvā vacastasya suravaidyau babhūvatuḥ ||
sāvarṇiśca śanī rāhuḥ ketuḥ svargapratāpanaḥ ||
teṣāṃ tu parihārārthau dasrau cāśvinisaṃbhavau || 48 ||
sūta uvāca ||
iti śrutvā gurorvākyaṃ prasannau surasattamau ||
svāṃśānmahītale jātau śūdrayonyāṃ ravestutau || 49 ||
cāṇḍālasya gṛhe jātaśchāgahaṃturiḍāpatiḥ ||
sadhano nāma vikhyātaḥ pitṛmātṛparāyaṇaḥ || 3.4.18.50 ||
śāligrāmaśilātulyaṃ chāgamāṃsaṃ vicikriye ||
kabīraṃ samupāgamya śiṣyo bhūtvā rarāja vai|| 51 ||
sa tu satyanidhiḥ pūrvaṃ brahmaṇastapa āsthitaḥ||
bhayabhītāṃ ca gāṃ tatra cāṇḍālāya hyadarśayat ||
rājagehe karastasmātsadhanasya layaṃ gataḥ || 52 ||
carmakāragṛhe jāto dvitīyaḥ piṃgalāpatiḥ ||
mānadā sasya tanayo raidāsa iti viśrutaḥ || 53 ||
purīṃ kāśīṃ samāgamya kabīraṃ rāmatatparam ||
jitvā matavivādena śaṃkarācāryamāgataḥ ||54 ||
tayorvivādo sabhavadahorātraṃ matāntare ||
parājitassa raidāso natvā taṃ dvijasattamam ||
rāmānandamupāgamya tasya śiṣyatvamāgataḥ || 55 ||
iti te kathitaṃ vipra surāṃśāśca yathābhavan ||
kaliśuddhikarī līlā teṣāṃ mārgapradarśinām || 56 ||
iti śrībhaviṣye mahāpurāṇe pratisargaparvaṇi caturyugakhaṃḍāparaparyāye kaliyugīyetihāsasamuccaye aśvinīkumārāvatāre sadhanaraidāsasamutpattivarṇanaṃ nāmā.aṣṭādaśo.adhyāyaḥ || 18 ||

athaikonaviṃśo.adhyāyaḥ
viṣṇusvāmīmadhvācāryavarṇanam
sūta uvāca
ityuktvā bhagavāñjīvo devamāhātmyamuttamam |
svamukhātsvāṃśamutpādya brahmayonau babhūva ha | | 1
iṣṭikā nagarī ramyā gurudattasya vai sutaḥ |
ropaṇo nāma vikhyāto brahmamārgapradarśakaḥ | | 2
sūtragranthamayīṃ mālāṃ tilakaṃ jalanirmitam |
vāsudeveti tanmantre kalau kṛtvā janejane | | 3
kṛṣṇacaitanyamāgamya kambalaṃ ca tadājñayā |
gṛhītvā svapurīṃ prāpya kṛṣṇadhyānaparobhavat | | 4
ataḥ paraṃ śṛṇu mune caritraṃ ca harermudā |
yacchrutvā ca kalau ghore jano naiva bhayaṃ vrajet | | 5
pañcābde kṛṣṇacaitanye yajñāṃśe yajñakāriṇi |
vaṅgadeśabhavo vipra īśvaraḥ śāradāpriyaḥ | | 6
prāptaḥ śāntipure grāme vāgdevīvaradarpitaḥ |
satāṃ digvijayaṃ kṛtvā sarvaśāstraviśāradaḥ | | 7
gaṅgākūle stavaṃ divyaṃ racitvā 1 so.apaṭhaddvijaḥ |
etasminnantare tatra yajñāṃśassamupāgataḥ | |
uvāca vacanaṃ ramyamīśvaraṃ stutikāriṇam | | 8
sukṛtaṃ pūrtamarṇaṃ ca śrutīnāṃ sārameva hi |
ityuktaṃ bhavatā stotre dūṣaṇaṃ bhūṣaṇaṃ vada | | 9
tathāha ceśvaro dhīmāndūṣaṇaṃ naiva dṛśyate |
ityuktyā prāha bhagavānbhūṣaṇaṃ naiva dṛśyate | | 3.4.19.10
sukṛtaṃ ca smṛtaṃ dharmaḥ pūrtaṃ caitanyamucyate |
arṇaṃ vīryamiti jñeyaṃ śrutisāramatastrayam | |
gaṅgājale dūṣaṇo.ayaṃ bhūṣaṇo.ayaṃ kalevare 11
iti śrutvā sa vai bhikṣurvismito.abhūcca gīḥ priyaḥ |
lajjitaṃ svajanaṃ dṛṣṭvā śāradā sarvamaṅgalā | |
vihasyeśvaramityāha kṛṣṇaścaitanyasaṃjñakaḥ | | 12
iti śrutvā tu tacchiṣyaḥ kṛṣṇamantra_upāsakaḥ |
babhūva vaiṣṇavaśreṣṭhaḥ kṛṣṇacaitanyasevakaḥ | | 13
sūta uvāca
śrīdharo nāma vikhyāto brāhmaṇaḥ śivapūjakaḥ |
pattane nagare ramye tasya saptāhamuttamam | | 14
rājñā bhāgavataṃ tatra kāritaṃ sadhanaṃ bahu |
gṛhītvā śrīdharo vipro jagāma śvaśurālaye | | 15
tatroṣya māsamātraṃ ca svapatnyā saha vai dvijaḥ |
svagehamagamanmārge caurāḥ sapta tu taṃ prati |
śapathaṃ rāmadevasya kṛtvā sārddhamupāyayuḥ | | 16
samāpte vipine ramye hatvā te śrīdharaṃ dvijam |
gorathaṃ sadhanaṃ tatra sabhāryaṃ jagṛhustadā | | 17
etasminnantare rāmaḥ saccidānandavigrahaḥ |
sapta tāṃśca śarairhatvā punarujjīvya taṃ dvijam | | 18
preṣayāmāsa bhagavāṃstadā vṛndāvane prabhuḥ |
tadā prabhṛti vai vipraḥ śrīdharo vaiṣṇavo.abhavat | | 19
saptābde caiva yajñāṃśe gatvā śāntipurīṃ śubhām |
brahmajñānamupāgamya yajñāṃśācchiṣyatāṃ gataḥ | |
ṭīkā bhāgavatasyaiva kṛtā tena mahātmanā | | 3.4.19.20
sūta uvāca
rāmaśarmā sthitaḥ kāśyāṃ śaṅkarārcanatatparaḥ |
śivarātre dvijo dhīmānavimukteśvarasthale | |
ekākī jāgarandhyānī japtvā pañcākṣaraṃ śubham | | 21
tadā prasanno bhagavāñchaṅkaro lokaśaṅkaraḥ |
varaṃ brūhīti vacanaṃ tamāha dvijasattamam | | 22
rāmaśarmā śivaṃ natvā vacanaṃ prāha namradhīḥ |
bhavānyasya samādhistho dhyāne yasya paro bhavān | | 23
sa devo hṛdaye mahyaṃ vasettava varātprabho |
ityuktavacane tasminvihasyāha maheśvaraḥ | | 24
ekā vai prakṛtirmāyā tridhā brahmasvarūpiṇī |
śūnyabhūtāvyavasyaiva puruṣasyārddhataijasam | |
gṛhītvā lokajananī puṃklībau suṣuve sutau | | 25
pumānnārāyaṇaḥ sākṣādgauraścāṣṭabhujairyutaḥ |
tridhā babhūva bhagavānsvecchayā viśvarakṣakaḥ | | 26
ardhatejāssa vai viṣṇurvanamālī caturbhujaḥ |
kṣīraśāyī sa ādityaḥ svayaṃ sadguṇadevatā | | 27
ardhatejā dvidhā saiva naranārāyaṇāvṛṣī |
jiṣṇurviṣṇuḥ sa vai jñeyo parvate gandhamādane | | 28
klībaḥ saṅkarṣaṇaḥ sākṣādbrahmarūpaṃ tridhābhavat |
pūrvārddhādgauraśeṣaśca parārdhādrāmalakṣmaṇau | | 29
gauraśeṣo dvāparānte balabhadraḥ sa vai svayam |
rāmalakṣmaṇayordhyānaṃ balabhadrasya pūjanam | |
sadā mayā ca kartavyaṃ tatprāpya tvaṃ sukhī bhava | | 3.4.19.30
ityuktvāntardadhe devo rāmānandasya cābhavat |
kṛṣṇacaitanyamāgamya dvādaśābdavayovṛtam | | 31
śiṣyo bhūtvā sthitastatra kṛṣṇacaitanyapūjakaḥ |
kṛtaṃ tadājñayā tenādhyātmarāmāyaṇaṃ śubham | | 32
sūta uvāca
jīvānandassa vai vipro rūpānandasamanvitaḥ |
śrutvā caitanyacaritaṃ purīṃ śāntimayīṃ gataḥ | | 33
caitanye ṣoḍaśābde ca natvā taṃ tau samāsthitau |
ūcatuḥ kṛṣṇacaitanyaṃ bhavatā kiṃ mataṃ smṛtam | | 34
vihasyāha sa caitanyaḥ śākto.ahaṃ śaktipūjakaḥ |
śaivo.ahaṃ vai dvijau 1 nityaṃ lokārthe śaṅkaravratī | |
vaiṣṇavo.ahaṃ dhyānaparo devadevasya bhaktimān | | 35
ahaṃ bhaktimadaṃ pītvā pāpapuṃso baliṃ śubham |
śaktyai samarpya homānte jñānāgnau yajñatatparaḥ | | 36
iti śrutvā dvijau tau tu tasya śiṣyatvamāgatau |
ācāramārgamāgamya sarvapūjyau babhūvatuḥ | | 37
tadājñayā ṣaṭsandarbhaṃ jīvānandaścakāra vai |
uvāsa tatra matimānkṛṣṇacaitanyasevakaḥ | | 38
rūpānando gurorājñāṃ puraskṛtya mahāmuniḥ |
kṛṣṇakhaṇḍaṃ purāṇāṅgaṃ cakre daśasahasrakam | |
tatroṣya gurusevāḍhyo rādhākṛṣṇa prapūjakaḥ | | 39
sūta uvāca
viṣṇusvāmī sa vai vipro gataḥ śāntipurīṃ śubhām |
yajñāṃśa ūnaviṃśābde natvā taṃ prāha sa dvijaḥ | | 3.4.19.40
ko devaḥ sarvadevānāṃ pūjyo brahmāṇḍagocare |
