iti śrutvā sa bhagavānuvāca dvijasattamam | | 41
sarvapūjyo mahādevo bhaktānugrahakārakaḥ |
viṣṇvīśvaraśca rudreśo brahmeśo bhagavānharaḥ | | 42
vinā tatpūjakenaiva padārthā niṣphalā hi te |
ye tu vai viṣṇubhaktāśca śaṅkarārcanatatparāḥ | | 43
śivaprasādātsulabhā vaiṣṇavī bhaktiruttamā |
vaiṣṇavaḥ puruṣo bhūtvā śaṅkaraṃ lokaśaṅkaram | | 44
karmabhūmyāṃ samāgamya na pūjayati nārakaḥ |
viṣṇusvāmīti tacchrutvā śiṣyo bhūtvā ca tadguṇaiḥ | | 45
kṛṣṇamantramupāsitvā 1 sa babhūva śivārcakaḥ | | 46
vaiṣṇavī saṃhitā tena nirmitā ca tadājñayā |
tatroṣya viṣṇubhaktaśca kṛṣṇacaitanyapūjakaḥ | | 47
sūta uvāca
madhvācāryaḥ kṛṣṇaparo jñātvā yajñāṃśamuttamam |
gatvā śāntipurīṃ ramyāṃ natvā taṃ prāha sa dvijaḥ | | 48
kṛṣṇo.ayaṃ bhagavānsākṣāttadanye viśvakārakāḥ |
devā dhātrādayo jñeyāstarhi tatpūjanena kim | | 49
śaktimārgaparā viprā vṛthā hiṃsāmayairmakhaiḥ |
aśvamedhādibhirdevānpūjayanti mahītale | 3.4.19.50
iti śrutvā vihasyāha yajñāṃśaśca śacīsutaḥ |
na kṛṣṇo bhagavānsākṣāttāmaso.ayaṃ ca śaktijaḥ | | 51
cauro.ayaṃ sarvabhogī ca hiṃsako māṃsabhakṣakaḥ |
parastriyaṃ bhajedyo vai sa gacchedyamamandiram | | 52
cauro yamālayaṃ gacchejjīvahantā viśeṣataḥ |
ebhiśca lakṣaṇairhīno bhagavānprakṛteḥ paraḥ | | 53
yasya buddhiḥ sa vai brahmā.ahaṅkāro yasya vai śivaḥ |
śabdamātrā gaṇeśaśca sparśamātrā yamaḥ svayam | | 54
rūpamātrā kumāro vai rasamātrā ca yakṣarāṭ |
gandhamātrā viśvakarmā śravaṇaṃ bhagavācchaniḥ | | 55
yasya tvaksa budho jñeyaścakṣussūryaḥ sanātanaḥ |
yajjitvā bhagavāñchukro ghrāṇastasyāśvinīsutau | | 56
yanmukhaṃ bhagavāñjīvo yasya hastastu devarāṭ |
kṛṣṇo.ayaṃ tasya caraṇau liṅgaṃ dakṣaḥ prajāpatiḥ | |
gudaṃ tadbhagavānmṛtyustasmai bhagavate namaḥ | | 57
hiṃsāyajñaiśca bhagavānsa ca tṛptimavāpnuyāt |
sa ca yajñapaśurvahnau brahmabhūyāya kalpate | |
tasya mokṣaprabhāvena mahatpuṇyamavāpnuyāt | | 58
vidhihīno naraḥ pāpī hiṃsāyajñaṃ karoti yaḥ |
andhatāmisranarakaṃ taddoṣeṇa vasecciram | | 59
mahatpuṇyaṃ mahatpāpaṃ hiṃsāyajñeṣu vartate |
atastu bhagavānkṛṣṇo hiṃsāyajñaṃ kalau yuge | | 3.4.19.60
samāpya kārtike māsi pratipacchuklapakṣake |
annakūṭamayaṃ yajñaṃ sthāpayāmāsa bhūtale | | 61
devarājastadā kruddho hyanujaṃ prati duḥkhitaḥ |
vajraṃ saplāvayāmāsa tadā kṛṣṇaḥ sanātanīm | |
prakṛtiṃ sa ca tuṣṭāva lokamaṅgalahetave | | 62
tadā sā prakṛtirmātā svapūrvāddivyavigraham |
rādhārūpaṃ mahatkṛtvā hadi kṛṣṇasya cāgatā | | 63
tacchaktyā bhagavānkṛṣṇo dhṛtvā govardhanaṃ girim |
nāmnā giridharo devaḥ sarvapūjyo babhūva ha | | 64
rādhākṛṣṇassa bhagavānpūrṇabrahma sanātanaḥ |
ataḥ kṛṣṇo na bhagavānrādhākṛṣṇaḥ paraḥ prabhuḥ | | 65
iti śrutvā vacastasya madhvācāryo haripriyaḥ |
śiṣyo bhūtvā sthitastatra kṛṣṇacaitanyapūjakaḥ | | 66
iti śrībhaviṣye mahāpurāṇe pratisargaparvaṇi caturyugakhaṇḍāparaparyāye kaliyugīyetihāsasamuccaye kṛṣṇacaitanyayajñāṃśaśiṣyabalabhadraviṣṇusvāmimadhvācāryādivṛttāntavarṇanaṃ nāmaikonaviṃśo.adhyāyaḥ | 19
atha viṃśo.adhyāyaḥ
jagannāthamāhātmyavarṇanam
sūta uvāca
bhaṭṭojissa ca śuddhātmā śivabhaktiparāyaṇaḥ |
kṛṣṇacaitanyamāgamya namaskṛtya vaco.abravīt | | 1
mahādevo guruḥ sa vai śiva ātmā śarīriṇām |
viṣṇurbrahmā ca taddāsau tarhi tatpūjanena kim | | 2
iti śrutvā sa yajñāṃśo viṃśadabdavayovṛtaḥ |
vihasyāha sa bhaṭṭojiṃ nāyaṃ śambhurmaheśvaraḥ | | 3
samartho bhagavāñchambhuḥ kartā kinna śarīriṇām |
na bhartā ca vinā viṣṇuṃ saṃhartāyaṃ sadā śivaḥ | | 4
ekamūrtistridhā jātā brahmā viṣṇurmaheśvaraḥ |
śāktamārgeṇa bhagavānbrahmā mokṣapradāyakaḥ | | 5
viṣṇurvaiṣṇavamārgeṇa jīvānāṃ mokṣadāyakaḥ |
śambhurvai śaivamārgeṇa mokṣadātā śarīriṇām | | 6
śāktaḥ sadāśramo gehī yajñabhukpitṛdevagaḥ |
vānaprasthāśramī yo vai vaiṣṇavaḥ kandamūlabhuk | | 7
yatyāśramaḥ sadā raudrau nirguṇaḥ śuddhavigrahaḥ |
brahmacaryāśramasteṣāmanugāmī mahāśramaḥ | | 8
iti śrutvā gurorvākyaṃ śiṣyo bhūtvā sa vai dvijaḥ |
tṛtīyāṅgaṃ ca vedānāṃ vyācakhyau pāṇinikṛtam | | 9
tadājñayā ca siddhāntakaumudyāssa cakāra ha |
tatroṣya dīkṣito dhīmānkṛṣṇacaitanyasevakaḥ | | 3.4.20.10
sūta uvāca
varāhamihiro dhīmānsa ca sūryaparāyaṇaḥ |
dvāviṃśābde ca yajñāṃśe tamāgatya vaco.abravīt | | 11
sūryo.ayaṃ bhagavātsākṣāttrayo devā yato.abhavan |
prātarbrahmā ca madhyāhne viṣṇuḥ sāyaṃ sadāśivaḥ | | 12
ato raveḥ śubhā pūjā tridevayajanena kim |
iti śrutvā sa yajñāṃśo vihasyāha śubhaṃ vacaḥ | | 13
dvidhā babhūva prakṛtiraparā ca parā tathā |
nāmamātrā tathā puṣpamātrā tanmātrikā tathā | | 14
śabdamātrā sparśamātrā rūpamātrā rasā tathā |
gaṃdhamātrā tathā jñeyā parā prakṛtiraṣṭadhā | | 15
aparāyāṃ jīvabhūtā nityaśuddhā jaganmayī |
bhūmirāpo.analo vāyuḥ khaṃ manobuddhireva ca | |
ahaṅkāra iti jñeyā prakṛtiścāparāṣṭadhā | | 16
viṣṇurbrahmā mahādevo gaṇeśo yamarāḍ guhaḥ |
kubero viśvakarmā ca parā prakṛtidevatā | | 17
sumerurvaruṇo vahnirvāyuścaiva dhruvastathā |
somo ravistathā śeṣo.aparā prakṛtidevatā | | 18
ataḥ somapatī rudro raviḥ svāmī vidhiḥ svayam |
śeṣasvāmī hariḥ sākṣānnamastebhyo namo namaḥ | | 19
iti śrutvā tadā vipraḥ śiṣyo bhūtvā ca tadguroḥ |
tadājñayā caturthāṅgaṃ jyotiḥśāstraṃ cakāra ha | | 3.4.20.20
varāhasaṃhitā nāma bṛhajjātakameva hi |
kṣudratantrāṃstathānyānvai kṛtvā tatra sa cāvasat | | 21
sūta uvāca
vāṇībhūṣaṇa evāpi śivabhaktiparāyaṇaḥ |
kṛṣṇacaitanyamāgamya vacaḥ prāha vinamradhīḥ | | 22
viṣṇumāyā jagaddhātrī saikā prakṛtirutkṛtā |
tayā jātamidaṃ viśvaṃ viśvāddevasamudbhavaḥ | | 23
viśvedevassa puruṣaśśaktijo bahudhābhavat |
brahmā viṣṇurharaścaiva devāḥ prakṛtisambhavāḥ | |
ato bhagavatī pūjyā tarhi tatpūjanena kim | | 24
iti śrutvā sa yajñāṃśo vihasyāha dvijottamam |
na vai bhagavatī śreṣṭhā jaḍarūpā guṇātmikā | | 25
ekā sā prakṛtirmāyā raciturjagatāṃ kṣamā |
puruṣasya sahāyena yoṣiteva narasya ca | | 26
devībhāgavate śāstre prasiddheyaṃ kathā dvija |
kadācitprakṛtirdevī svecchayedaṃ jagatkhalu | | 27
nirmitaṃ jaḍabhūtaṃ tadbahudhā bodhitaṃ tadā |
na caitanyamabhūdviprā vismitā prakṛtistadā | | 28
śūnyabhūtaṃ ca puruṣaṃ caitanyaṃ samatoṣayat |
praviṣṭo bhagavāndevīmāyājanitagolake | | 29
svapnavadvā svayaṃ jātaścaitanyamabhavajjagat |
ataḥ śreṣṭhaḥ sa bhagavānpuruṣo nirguṇaḥ paraḥ | | 3.4.20.30
prakṛtyāṃ svecchayā jāto liṅgarūpastadā.abhavat |
pu~mlliṅgaprakṛtau jātaḥ pu~mlliṅgo.ayaṃ sanātanaḥ | | 31
strīlliṅgaprakṛtau jātaḥ strīlliṅgo.ayaṃ sanātanaḥ |
napuṃskaprakṛtau jātaḥ klībarūpaḥ sa vai prabhuḥ | | 32
avyayaprakṛtau jātau nirguṇo.ayamadhokṣajaḥ |
namastasmai bhagavate śūnyarūpāya sākṣiṇe | | 33
iti śrutvā tu tadvākyaṃ śiṣyo bhūtvā sa vai dvijaḥ |
triviṃśābde ca yajñāṃśe tatra vāsamakārayat | | 3 4
chandogranthaṃ tu vedāṅgaṃ svanāmnā tena nirmitam |
rādhākṛṣṇaparaṃ nāma japtvā harṣamavāptavān | | 35
sūta uvāca
dhanvantarirdvijo nāma brahmabhaktiparāyaṇaḥ |
kṛṣṇacaitanyamāgamya natvā vacanamabravīt | | 36
bhavāṃstu puruṣaḥ śreṣṭho nityaśuddhassanātanaḥ |
jaḍabhūtā ca tanmāyā samartho bhagavānsvayam | | 37
nityo.avyaktaḥ paraḥ sūkṣmastasmātprakṛtirudbhavaḥ |
ataḥ pūjyassa bhagavānprakṛtyāḥ pūjanena kim | | 38
iti śrutvā vihasyāha yajñāṃśassarvaśāstragaḥ |
nāyaṃ śreṣṭhassa puruṣo na kṣamaḥ prakṛtiṃ vinā | | 39
purāṇe caiva vārāhe prasiddheyaṃ kathā śubhā |
kadācitpuruṣo nityo nāmamātraḥ svakecchayā | |
babhūva bahudhā tatra yathā pretastathā svayam | | 3.4.20.40
asamartho viracituṃ jaganti puruṣaḥ paraḥ |
tuṣṭāva prakṛtiṃ devīṃ cirakālaṃ sanātanīm | | 41
tadā devī ca taṃ prāpya mahattatvaṃ cakāra ha |
so.ahaṅkāraśca mahato jātastanmātrikāstataḥ | | 42
mahābhūtānyato.apyāsaṃstaiḥ sañjātamidaṃ jagat | | 43
atassanātanau cobhau puruṣātprakṛtiḥ parā |
prakṛteḥ puruṣaścaiva tasmāttābhyāṃ namo namaḥ | | 44
iti dhanvantariḥ śrutvā śiṣyo bhūtvā ca tadguroḥ |
tatroṣya caiva vedāṅgaṃ kalpavedaṃ cakāra ha | |
suśrutādapare cāpi śiṣyā dhanvantareḥ smṛtaḥ | | 45
sūta uvāca
jayadevassa vai vipro bauddhamārgaparāyaṇaḥ |
kṛṣṇacaitanyamāgamya pañcaviṃśavayovṛtam | |
natvovāca vaco ramyaṃ sa ca śreṣṭha uṣāpatiḥ | | 46
yasya nābherabhūtpadmaṃ brahmaṇā saha nirgatam |
atassa brahmasūrnāma sāmavedeṣu gīyate | | 47
viśvo nārāyaṇassākṣādyasya ketau samāsthitaḥ |
viśva keturato nāma na niruddho.aniruddhakaḥ | | 48
brahmavelā ca tatpatnī nityā coṣā mahottamā |
sa vai lokahitārthāya svayamarcāvatārakaḥ | | 49
iti śrutvā vihasyāha yajñāṃśastaṃ dvijottamam |
vedo nārāyaṇaḥ sākṣātpūjanīyo naraḥ sadā | | 3.4.20.50
tataḥ kālastataḥ karma tato dharmaḥ pravartate |
dharmātmakāmaḥ samudbhūtaḥ kāmapatnī ratiḥ svayam | | 51
ratyāṃ kāmātsamudbhūto.aniruddho nāmadevatā |
uṣā sā tasya bhaginī tena sārddhaṃ samudbhavā | | 52
kālo nāma sa vai kṛṣṇo rādhā tasya sahodarā |
karmarūpaḥ sa vai brahmā niyatistatsahodarā | | 53
dharmarūpo mahādevaḥ śraddhā tasya sahodarā |
aniruddhaḥ kathaṃ ceśo bhavatoktaḥ sanātanaḥ | | 54
tridhā sṛṣṭiśca brahmāṇḍe sthūlā sūkṣmā ca kāraṇā |
sthūlasṛṣṭyai samudbhūto devo nārāyaṇaḥ svayam | | 55
nārāyaṇī ca tacchaktistayorjalasamudbhavaḥ |
jalājjātassa vai śeṣastasyopari samāsthitau | | 56
supte nārāyaṇe deve nābheḥ paṅkajamuttamam |
anantayojanāyāmamudabhūcca tato vidhiḥ | | 57
vidheḥ sthūlamayī sṛṣṭirdevatiryyaṅnarādikā |
sūkṣmasṛṣṭyai samudbhūtaḥ so.aniruddha uṣāpatiḥ | | 58
tato vīryamayaṃ toyaṃ jātaṃ brahmāṇḍamastake |
vīryājjātassa vai śeṣastasyopari sa cāsthitaḥ | | 59
tasya nābhessamudbhūto brahmā lokapitāmahaḥ |
sūkṣmasṛṣṭistato jātā yathā svapne.api dṛśyate | | 3.4.20.60
hetusṛṣṭyai samudbhūto vedā nārāyaṇaḥ svayam |
vedātkālastataḥ karma tato dharmādayaḥ smṛtāḥ | | 61
tvadguruśca jagannātha uḍradeśanivāsakaḥ |
mayā tatraiva gantavyaṃ saśiṣyeṇādya bho dvijāḥ | | 62
iti śrutvā tu vacanaṃ kṛṣṇacaitanyakiṅkarāḥ |
svānsvāñchiṣyānsamāhūya tatpaścātprayayuśca te | | 63
śāṅkarā dvādaśagaṇā rāmānujamupāyayuḥ |
nāmadevādayastatra gaṇāssapta samāgatāḥ | | 64
rāmānandaṃ namaskṛtya saṃsthitāstasya sevakā |
ropaṇaśca tadāgatya svaśiṣyairbahubhirvṛtaḥ | | 65
kṛṣṇacaitanyamāgamya namaskṛtya sthitaḥ svayam |
jagannāthapurīṃ te vai prayayurbhaktitatparāḥ | | 66
nidhayaḥ siddhayastatra teṣāṃ sevārthamāgatāḥ |
sarve ca daśasāhasrā vaiṣṇavāḥ śaivaśāktakaiḥ | | 67
yajñāṃśaṃ ca puraskṛtya jagannāthapurīṃ yayuḥ |
arcāvatāro bhagavānaniruddha uṣāpatiḥ | | 68
tadāgamanamālokya dvijarūpadharo muniḥ |
jagannāthaḥ svayaṃ prāpto yatra yajñāṃśakādayaḥ | | 69
yajñāṃśastaṃ samālokya natvā vacanamabravīt |
kiṃ mataṃ bhavatā jñātaṃ kalau prāpte bhayānake | | 3.4.20.70
tatsarvaṃ kṛpayā brūhi śrotumicchāmi tattvataḥ |
iti śrutvā tu vacanaṃ jagannātho hariḥ svayam | |
uvāca vacanaṃ ramyaṃ lokamaṅgalahetave | | 71
miśradeśodbhavā mlecchāḥ kāśyapenaiva śāsitāḥ |
saṃskṛtā śūdravarṇena brahmavarṇamupāgatāḥ | | 72
śikhāsūtraṃ samādhāya paṭhitvā vedamuttamam |
yajñaiśca pūjayāmāsurdevadevaṃ śacīpatim | | 73
duḥkhito bhagavānindraḥ śvetadvīpamupāgataḥ |
stutyā māṃ bodhayāmāsa devamaṅgalahetave | | 74
prabuddhaṃ māṃ vacaḥ prāha śṛṇu deva dayānidhe |
śūdrasaṃskṛtamannaṃ ca khādituṃ na dvijo.arhati | | 75
tathā ca śūdrajanitairyajñaistṛptiṃ na cāpnuyām |
kāśyape svargate prāpte māgadhe rājñi śāsati | | 76
mama śatrurbalirdaityaḥ kalipakṣamupāgataḥ |
nistejāśca yathā.ahaṃ syāṃ tathā vai kartumudyataḥ | | 77
miśradeśodbhave mlecche sāṃskṛtī tena saṃskṛtā |
bhāṣā devavināśāya daityānāṃ varddhanāya ca | | 78
āryyeṣu prākṛtī bhāṣā dūṣitā tena vai kṛtā |
ato māṃ rakṣa bhagavanbhavantaṃ śaraṇāgatam | | 79
iti śrutvā tadāhaṃ vai devarājamuvāca ha |
bhavanto dvādaśādityā gantumarhanti bhūtale | | 3.4.20.80
ahaṃ lokahitārthāya janiṣyāmi kalau yuge |
pravīṇo nipuṇo.abhijñaḥ kuśalaśca kṛtī sukhī | | 81
niṣṇātaḥ śikṣitaścaiva sarvajñaḥ sugatastathā |
prabuddhaśca tathā buddha ādityāḥ kramato bhavāḥ 1 | | 82
dhātā mitro.aryamā śakro meghaḥ prāṃśurbhagastathā |
vivasvāṃśca tathā pūṣā savitā tvāṣṭraviṣṇukau | |
kīkaṭe deśa āgatya te surā jajñire kramāt | | 83
vedanindāṃ puraskṛtya bauddhaśāstramacīkaran |
tebhyo vedānsamādāya munibhyaḥ pradadussurāḥ | | 84
vedanindāprabhāveṇa te surāḥ kuṣṭhino.abhavan |
viṣṇudevamupāgamya tuṣṭuvurbauddharūpiṇam | | 85
hariryogabalenaiva teṣāṃ kuṣṭhamanāśayat |
taddoṣānnagnabhūtaśca bauddhassa tejasā.abhavat | | 86
pūrvārddhānnemināthaśca parārddhādbauddha eva ca |
bauddharājyavināśāya dārupāṣāṇarūpavān | | 87
ahaṃ sindhutaṭe jāto lokamaṅgalahetave |
indradyumnaśca nṛpatiḥ svargalokādupāgataḥ | |
mandiraṃ racitaṃ tena tatrāhaṃ samupāgataḥ | | 88
atra sthitaśca yajñāṃśaprasādamahimā mahān |
sarvavāñchitadaṃ loke sthāpayāmāsa mokṣadam | | 89
varṇadharmaśca naivātra vedadharmastathā na hi |
vrataṃ cātra na yajñāṃśamaṇḍale yojanāntare | | 3.4.20.90
yenoktā yāvanī bhāṣā yena bauddho vilokitaḥ |
tasya prāptaṃ mahatpāpaṃ sthito.ahaṃ tadaghāpahaḥ | |
māṃ vilokya naraḥ śuddhaḥ kalikāle bhaviṣyati | | 91
iti śrībhaviṣye mahāpurāṇe pratisargaparvaṇi caturyugakhaṇḍāparaparyāye kaliyugīyetihāsasamuccaye kṛṣṇacaitanyacaritre jagannāthamāhātmyavarṇanaṃ nāma viṃśo.adhyāyaḥ | 20

athaikaviṃśo.adhyāyaḥ
kṛṣṇacaitanyavarṇanam
sūta uvāca
iti śrutvā vacastasya jagannāthasya dhīmataḥ |
kṛṣṇacaitanya evāpi tamuvāca prasannadhīḥ | | 1
bhagavanprāṇināṃ śreyo yaduktaṃ bhavatā mune |
vistarāttatkathāṃ brūhi yathā bauddhasamudbhavaḥ | | 2
jagannātha uvāca
sahasrābde kalau prāpte karmabhūmyāṃ ca bhārate |
kaṇvo nāma muniśreṣṭhassamprāptaḥ kaśyapātmajaḥ | | 3
āryāvatī devakanyā kaṇvasya dayitā priyā |
śakrājñayā ca samprāptau dampatī śāradātaṭe | | 4
sarasvatīṃ nadīrūpāṃ kurukṣetranivāsinīm |
caturvedamayaiḥ stotraiḥ kaṇvastuṣṭāva namradhīḥ | | 5
varṣamātrāntare devī prasannā samupāgatā |
āryasṛṣṭisamṛddhau sā dadau tasmai varaṃ śubham | | 6
daśaputrāstayorjātā āryabuddhikarā hi te |
upādhyāyo dīkṣitaśca pāṭhakaḥ śuklamiśrakau | | 7
agrihotrī dvivedī ca trivedī pāṇḍa eva ca |
caturvedīti kathitā yathā nāma tathā guṇāḥ | | 8
te vai sarasvatīṃ devīṃ tuṣṭuvurnamrakandharāḥ |
dvādaśābdavayobhyaśca tebhyo devī svaśaktitaḥ | |
kṛtvā kanyāṃ dadau mātā śāradā bhaktivatsalā | | 9
upādhyāyī dīkṣitā ca pāṭhakī śuklikā kramāt |
miśrāṇī ca tathā jñeyā ṣaṣṭhī sā cā(ca?)gnihotriṇī | | 3.4.21.10
dvivedinī tathā jñeyā cāṣṭamī ca trivedinī |
pāṇḍāyanī ca navamī daśamī turyavedinī | | 11
tāsāṃ ca svapatibhyo vai sutāḥ ṣoḍaśa ṣoḍaśa |
te tu gotrakarā jñeyāsteṣāṃ nāmāni me śṛṇu | | 12
kaśyapaśca bharadvājo viśvāmitro.atha gautamaḥ |
jamadagnirvaśiṣṭhaśca vatso gautama eva ca | | 13
parāśarastathā gargo.atrirbhṛguścāṅgirāstathā |
śṛṅgī kātyāyanaścaiva yājñavalkyaḥ kramātsutāḥ | |
iti nāmnā sutāssarve jñeyāḥ ṣoḍaśa ṣoḍaśa | | 14
sarasvatyājñayā kaṇvo miśradeśamupāyayau |
mlecchānsaṃskṛtamābhāṣya tadā daśasahasrakān | |
vaśīkṛtya svayamprāpto brahmāvarte mahottame | | 15
te sarve tapasā devīṃ tuṣṭuvuśca sarasvatīm |
pañcavarṣāntare devī prādurbhūtā sarasvatī | |
sapatnīkā~mśca tānmlecchāñchūdravarṇāya cākarot | | 16
kāruvṛttikarāssarve babhūvurbahuputrakāḥ |
dvisahasrāstadā teṣāṃ madhye vaiśyā babhūvire | | 17
tanmadhye cācāryapṛthurnāmnā kaśyapasevakaḥ |
tapasā sa ca tuṣṭāva dvādaśābdaṃ mahāmunim | | 18
tadā prasanno bhagavānkaṇvo devavarādvaraḥ |
teṣāṃ cakāra rājānaṃ rājaputrapuraṃ dadau | | 19
rājanyā nāma tatpatnī māgadhaṃ suṣuve tadā |
tasmai kaṇvo dadau grāmaṃ pūrvasyāṃ diśi māgadham | | 3.4.21.20
svargalokaṃ punaḥ prāptaḥ sa muniḥ kaśyapātmajaḥ |
svargate kāśyape vipre te mlecchāḥ śūdravarṇakāḥ | | 21
yajñaissamarcayāmāsurdevadevaṃ śacīpatim |
duḥkhito bhagavānindrassabandhurjagatītale | | 22
vedānāhartumicchanto brahmayonau babhūvire |
jino nāma dvijaḥ kaścittatpatnī jayanī smṛtā | | 23
kaśyapādaditeraṃśājjātau tau kīkaṭasthale |
tayossakāśātsañjātā ādityā lokahetave | | 24
karmanāśānadītīre purī bodhagayā smṛtā |
tatroṣya bauddhaśāstrāḍhyāścakruḥ śāstrārthamuttamam | | 25
vedāñchūdrebhya āhṛtya viśālāṃ prayayuḥ purīm |
samādhisthānmunīnsarvānsamutthāpya daduḥ svayam | | 26
gatāssarve surāssvarge tataḥ prabhṛtibhūtale |
mlecchā babhūvire bauddhāstadanye vedatatparāḥ | | 27
sarasvatyāḥ prabhāveṇa ta āryā bahavo.abhavan |
taiśca devapitṛbhyaśca havyaṃ kavyaṃ samarpitam | | 28
tṛptimantaḥ surāścāsaṃsta āryāṇāṃ sahasrakāḥ |
saptaviṃśacchate bhūmau kalau saṃvatsare gate | | 29
balinā preṣito bhūmau mayaḥ prāpto mahāsuraḥ |
śākyasiṃhagururgeyo bahumāyāpravartakaḥ | | 3.4.21.30
sa nāmnā gautamācāryo daityapakṣavivarddhakaḥ |
sarvatīrtheṣu tenaiva yantrāṇi sthāpitāni vai | | 31
teṣāmadho gatā ye tu bauddhāścāsansamantataḥ |
śikhāsūtravihīnāśca babhūburvarṇasaṅkarāḥ | | 32
daśa koṭyaḥ smṛtā āryā babhūvurbauddhamārgiṇaḥ |
pañcalakṣāstadā śeṣāḥ prayayurgirimūrddhani | | 33
caturvedaprabhāveṇa rājanyā vahnivaṃśajāḥ |
catvāriṃśabhavā yodhāstaiśca bauddhāssamujjhitāḥ | | 34
āryāṃstāṃste tu saṃskṛtya vindhyādrerdakṣiṇe kṛtān |
tatraiva sthāpayāmāsurvarṇarūpānsamantataḥ | | |
āryāvartaḥ puṇyabhūmistatrasthāḥ pañcalakṣakāḥ | | 35
sūta uvāca
iti śrutvā vacastasya yajñāṃśo bhagavānhariḥ | | 36
jagannāthasya śiṣyobhūdvedamārgaparāyaṇaḥ |
śukladattasya tanayo nityānando dvijottamaḥ | | 37
jagannāthapadaṃ natvā śiṣyo bhūtvā rarāja ha |
tadā prasanno bhagavānaniruddha uṣāpatiḥ | | 38
abhiṣekantayorbhāle mahattatve cakāra ha |
mahattvapadavī jātā tadā prabhṛtibhūtale | | 39
gurubandhū prasannau tau svaśiṣyānprocaturmudā |
jagannāthasya vadanaṃ padmanābheruṣāpateḥ | |
dṛṣṭvā yaścātra samprāpya sa vai svargamavāpnuyāt | | 3.4.21.40
prasādaṃ yaśca bhuñjīyāttasya devasya sādaram |
koṭijanma bhavedvipro vedapātro mahādhanī | | 41
mārkaṇḍeya vaṭe kṛṣṇaṃ dṛṣṭavā snātvā mahodadhau |
indradyumnasarasyeva punarjanma na vindate | | 42
imāṃ gāthāṃ śṛṇodyo vai śraddhābhaktisamanvitaḥ |
yatpurīgamane puṇyaṃ phalaṃ tacchīghramāpnuyāt | |43
iti yajñāṃśavacanaṃ śrutvā sa hyavatārakaḥ |
vaiṣṇavaiśca tathetyuktvā tatraivāntaradhīyata | | 44
etasminnantare vipra kalinā prārthito baliḥ |
mayadaityaṃ samāhūya vacanaṃ prāha duḥkhitaḥ | | 45
sukandaro mlecchapatiḥ sadā madvarddhane rataḥ |
sahāyaṃ tasya daityendra kuru śīghraṃ mamājñayā | | 46
iti śrutvā balervākyaṃ śatadaityasamanvitaḥ |
karmabhūmyāṃ mayaḥ prāptaḥ kalavidyāviśāradaḥ | | 47 mlecchajātīnnarānduṣṭānrekhāgaṇitamuttamam |
ekaviṃśatimadhyāyaṃ kalavedamaśikṣayat | | 48
tadā kalānvitā mlecchāḥ kalāvidyāviśāradāḥ |
yantrāṇi kārayāmāsuḥ saptasveva purīṣu ca | | 49
tadadho ye gatālokāste sarve mlecchatāṃ gatāḥ |
mahatkolāhalaṃ jātamāryāṇāṃ śokakāriṇām | | 3.4.21.50
śrutvā te vaiṣṇavāḥ sarve kṛṣṇacaitanyasevakāḥ |
divyamantraṃ guroścaiva paṭhitvā prayayuḥ purīm | | 51
rāmānandasya śiṣyo vai cāyodhyāyāmupāgataḥ |
kṛtvā vilomaṃ taṃ mantraṃ vaiṣṇavāṃstānakārayat | | 52
bhāle triśūlacihnaṃ ca śvetaraktaṃ tadābhavat |
kaṇṭhe ca tulasī mālā jihvā rāmamayī kṛtā | | 53
mlecchāste vaiṣṇavāścāsanrāmānandaprabhāvataḥ |
saṃyoginaśca te jñeyā rāmānandamate sthitāḥ | | 54
āryāśca vaiṣṇavā mukhyā ayodhyāyāṃ babhūvire |
nimbādityo gato dhīmānsaśiṣyaḥ kāñcikāṃ purīm | |
mlecchayantraṃ rājamārge sthitaṃ tatra dadarśa ha | | 55
vilomaṃ svagurormantraṃ kṛtvā tatra sa cāvasat |
vaṃśapatrasamā rekhā lalāṭe kaṇṭhamālikā | | 56
gopīvallabhamantro hi mukhe teṣāṃ rarāja ha |
tadadho ye gatā lokā vaiṣṇavāśca babhūvire | | 57
mlecchāḥ saṃyogino jñeyā āryāstanmārgavaiṣṇavāḥ |
viṣṇusvāmī haridvāre jagāma svagaṇairvṛtaḥ | | 58
tatra sthitaṃ mahāyantraṃ vilomaṃ taccakāra ha |
tadadho ye gatā lokā āsansarve ca vaiṣṇavāḥ | | 59
ūrdhvapuṇḍraṃ dvirekhābhaṃ tanmadhye binduruttamaḥ |
lalāṭe ca sthitasteṣāṃ kaṇṭhe tulasigolakam | | 3.4.21.60
mukhe sādhavamantraśca babhūva hitadāyakaḥ |
mathurāyāṃ samāyāto madhvācāryo haripriyaḥ | | 61
rājamārge sthitaṃ yantraṃ vilomaṃ sa cakāra ha |
tadadho ye gatā lokā vaiṣṇavāstasya pakṣagāḥ | | 62
karavīrapatrasadṛśaṃ lalāṭe tilakaṃ śubham |
sthitam nāsārddhabhāgānte kaṇṭhe tulasi mālikā | |
rādhākṛṣṇaśubhaṃ nāma mukhe teṣāṃ babhūva ha | | 63
śaṅkarācārya evāpi śaivamārgaparāyaṇaḥ |
rāmānujājñayā prāptaḥ purīṃ kāśīṃ gaṇairyutaḥ | | 64
kṛtvā vilomaṃ tadyantraṃ śaivāśca tadadho.abhavan |
tripuṇḍraṃ ca sthitaṃ bhāle kaṇṭhe rudrākṣamālikā | |
govindamantraśca mukhe teṣāṃ tatra babhūva ha | | 65
totādaryāṃ ca samprāptastadā rāmānujaḥ sukhī |
ūrdhvarekhādvayormadhye sūkṣmarekhā ca pītikā | |
lalāṭe tu tathā kaṇṭhe mālā tulasikā śubhā | | 66
ujjayinyāṃ ca samprāpto barāhamihiro guṇī |
tadyantraṃ niṣphalaṃ kṛtvā narāñchaivāṃścakāra ha | | 67
citābhasmasthitaṃ bhāle kaṇṭhe rudrākṣamālikā |
śiveti maṅgalaṃ nāma teṣāṃ tatra babhūva ha | | 68
kānyakubje svayaṃ prāpto vāṇībhūṣaṇa eva hi |
arddhacandrākṛtiṃ puṇḍraṃ raktacandanamālikā | |
devyāśca nirmalaṃ nāma teṣāṃ tatra babhūva ha | | 69
dhanvantariḥ prayāge ca gatvā tadyantramuttamam |
vilomaṃ kṛtavāṃstatra tadadho ye gatā narāḥ | | 3.4.21.70
arddhapuṇḍraṃ smṛtaṃ raktaṃ sabindu ca lalāṭake |
raktacandanajā mālā kaṇṭhe teṣāṃ babhūva ha | | 71
bhaṭṭojiḥ sa gato dhīmānutpalāraṇyamuttamam |
tripuṇḍraṃ ca tathā raktaṃ kaṇṭhe rudrākṣamālikā | |
viśvanāthetitanmantraṃ teṣāṃ tatra babhūva ha | | 72
ropaṇaścaiṣṭikāṃ prāptastadyantraṃ caiva niṣphalam |
kṛtvā jane jane tatra brahma mārgam dadarśa ha | | 73
jayadeva svayaṃ prāpto dvārakāṃ viṣṇubhaktimān |
tadyantraṃ niṣphalaṃ yātaṃ tadadho ye gatā narāḥ | | 74
raktarekhā sthitā bhāle caikā kaṇṭhe tu mālikā |
padmākṣā mantragovindastatra teṣāṃ babhūva ha | |
evaṃ te vaiṣṇavāḥ śaivāḥ śāktakā bahudhā.abhavan | | 75
nirguṇāḥ śāktakā jñeyāḥ saguṇā vaiṣṇavāḥ smṛtāḥ |
nirguṇāḥ saguṇā ye tu śaivā jñeyā budhaistadā | | 76
samādhisthāstrayastriṃśaddevāḥ puṇyā babhūvire |
nityānandaḥ śāntipure nadīhāpattane hariḥ | | 77
kabīro māgadhe deśe raidāsastu kaliñjare |
sadhano naimiṣāraṇye samādhistho babhūva ha | | 78
adyāpi saṃsthito vipra vaiṣṇavānāṃ gaṇo mahān |
yajñabhāgamahāvṛddhiḥ sañjātā merumūrddhani | | 79
iti te kathitaṃ vipra yajñāṃśacaritaṃ śubham |
yacchrutvā ca narā nāryo mahatpuṇyamavāpnuyuḥ | |
mayādyā niṣphalā daityā balipārśvamupāgatāḥ | | 3.4.21.80
iti śrībhaviṣye mahāpurāṇe pratisargaparvaṇi caturyugakhaṇḍāparaparyāye kaliyugīyetihāsasamuccaye kṛṣṇacaitanyacaritraṃ nāmaikaviṃśo.adhyāyaḥ | 21
atha dvāviṃśo.adhyāyaḥ
guruṇḍamaunarājyavarṇanam
sūta uvāca
iti śrutvā balirdaityo devānāṃ vijayaṃ mahat |
roṣaṇaṃ nāma daityendraṃ samāhūya vaco.abravīt | | 1
sutastimiraliṅgasya saruṣo nāma viśrutaḥ |
tvaṃ hi tatra samāgamya daityakāryaṃ mahatkuru | | 2
iti śrutvā sa vai daityo hṛdi viprāptaroṣaṇaḥ |
nanāśa vedamārgasthāndehalīdeśamāsthitaḥ | | 3
pañcavarṣaṃ kṛtaṃ rājyaṃ tatsuto bābarobhavat |
viṃśadabdaṃ kṛta rājyaṃ homāyustatsuto.abhavat | | 4
homāyuṣā madāndhena devatāśca nirākṛtāḥ |
te surāḥ kṛṣṇacaitanyaṃ nadīhopavane sthitam | | 5
tuṣṭuvurbahudhā tatra śrutvā kruddho hariḥ svayam |
svatejasā ca tadrājyaṃ vighnabhūtaṃ cakāra ha | | 6
tatsainyajanitairlokairhomāyuśca nirākṛtaḥ |
mahārāṣṭraistadā tatra śeṣaśākaḥ samāsthitaḥ | | 7
dehalīnagare ramye mleccho rājyaṃ cakāra ha |
dharmakāryaṃ kṛtaṃ tena tadrājyaṃ pañcahāyanam | | 8
brahmacārī mukundaśca śaṅkarācāryagotrajaḥ |
prayāge ca tapaḥ kurvanviṃśacchiṣyairyutaḥ sthitaḥ | | 9
bābareṇa ca dhūrtena mleccharājena devatāḥ |
bhraṃśitā sa tadā jñātvā vahnau dehaṃ juhāva vai | | 3.4.22.10
tasya śiṣyā gatā vahnau mlecchanāśanahetunā |
godugdhe ca sthitaṃ romaṃ pītvā sa payasā muniḥ | | 11
mukundastasya doṣeṇa mlecchayonau babhūva ha |
homāyuṣaśca kāśmīre saṃsthitasyaiva putrakaḥ | | 12
jātamātre sute tasminvāguvācā śarīriṇī |
akasmācca varo jātaḥ putro.ayaṃ sarvabhāgyavān | | 13
paiśāce dāruṇe mārge na bhūto na bhaviṣyati |
ataḥ so.akabaro nāma homāyustanayastava | | 14
śrīdharaḥ śrīpatiḥ śambhurvareṇyaśca madhuvratī |
vimalo devavānsomo varddhano vartako ruciḥ | | 15
māndhātā mānakārī ca keśavo mādhavo madhuḥ |
devāpiḥ somapāḥ śūro madano yasya śiṣyakāḥ | | 16
sa mukundo dvijaḥ śrīmāndaivāttvadgehamāgataḥ |
ityākāśavacaḥ śrutvā homāyuśca prasannadhīḥ | | 17
dadau dānaṃ kṣudhārtebhyaḥ premṇā putramapālayat |
daśābde tanaye jāte dehalīdeśamāgataḥ | | 18
śeṣaśāṅkaṃ parājitya sa ca rājā babhūva ha |
abdaṃ tena kṛtaṃ rājyaṃ tatputraśca nṛpo.abhavat | | 19
samprāpte.akabare rājyaṃ saptaśiṣyāśca tatpriyāḥ |
pūrvajanmani ye mukhyāste prāptā bhūpatiṃ prati | | 3.4.22.20
keśavo gānasenaśca vaijavāksa tu mādhavaḥ |
mlecchāste ca smṛtāstatra haridāso madhustathā | | 21
madhvācāryakule jāto vaiṣṇavaḥ sarvarāgavit |
pūrvajanmani devāpiḥ sa ca vīrabalo.abhavat | | 22
brāhmaṇaḥ pāścimātyo vai vāgdevīvaradarpitaḥ |
somapā mānasiṃhaśca gautamānvayasambhavaḥ | | 23
senāpatiśca nṛpaterāryabhūpaśiromaṇeḥ |
sūraścaiva dvijo jāto dakṣiṇaścaiva paṇḍitaḥ | | 24
bilvamaṅgala evāpi nāmnā tannṛpateḥ sakhā |
nāyikābhedanipuṇo veśyānāṃ sa ca pāragaḥ | | 25
madano brāhmaṇo jātaḥ paurvātyaḥ sa ca nartakaḥ |
candalo nāma vikhyāto rahaḥ krīḍāviśāradaḥ | | 26
anyadeśe gatāḥ śiṣyāsteṣāṃ pūrvāstrayodaśa |
anapasya suto jātaḥ śrīdharaḥ śatruveditaḥ | | 27
vikhyātastulasīśarmā purāṇanipuṇaḥ kaviḥ |
nārīśikṣāṃ samādāya rāghavānandamāgataḥ | | 28
śiṣyo bhūtvā sthitaḥ kāśyāṃ rāmānandamate sthitaḥ |
śrīpatiḥ sa babhūvāndho madhvācāryamate sthitaḥ | | 29
sūradāsa iti jñeyaḥ kṛṣṇalīlākaraḥ kaviḥ |
śambhurvai candrabhaṭṭasya kule jāto haripriyaḥ | | 3.4.22.30
rāmānandamate saṃstho bhaktakīrtiparāyaṇaḥ |
vareṇyaḥ sograbhuṅnāmā rāmānandamate sthitaḥ | | 31
jñānadhyānaparo nityaṃ bhāṣāchandakaraḥ kaviḥ |
madhuvratī sa vai jāto kīlako nāma viśrutaḥ | | 32
rāmalīlākaro dhīmānrāmānandamate sthitaḥ |
vimalaśca sa vai jātaḥ sa nāmnaiva divākaraḥ | | 33
sītālīlākaro dhīmānrāmānandamate sthitaḥ |
devavānkeśavo jāto viṣṇusvāmimate sthitaḥ | | 34
kavipriyādiracanāṃ kṛtvā pretatvamāgataḥ |
rāmajyotsnāmayaṃ granthaṃ kṛtvā svargamupāyayau | | 35
somo jātaḥ sa vai vyāso nimbādityamate sthitaḥ |
rahaḥ krīḍāmayaṃ granthaṃ kṛtvā svargamupāyayau | | 36
varddhanaśca sa vai jāto nāmnā caraṇadāsakaḥ |
jñānamālāmayaṃ kṛtvā granthaṃ raidāsamārgagaḥ | | 37
vartakaḥ sa ca vai jāto ropaṇasya mate sthitaḥ |
ratnabhānuriti jñeyo bhāṣākartā ca jaimineḥ | | 38
ruciśca rocano jāto madhvācāryamate sthitaḥ |
nānāgānamayīṃ līlāṃ kṛtvā svargamupāyayau | | 39
māndhātā bhūpatirnāma kāyasthaḥ sa babhūva ha |
madhvācāryo bhāgavataṃ cakre bhāṣāmayaṃ śubham | | 3.4.22.40
mānakāro nāribhāvānnārīdehamupāgataḥ |
mīrānāmeti vikhyātā bhūpatestanayā śubhā | | 41
mā śobhā ca tanau yasyā gatirgajasamā kila |
sā mīrā ca budhaiḥ proktā madhvācāryamate sthitā | | 42
evaṃ te kathitaṃ vipra bhāṣāgranthaprakāraṇam |
prabandhaṃ maṅgalakaraṃ kalikāle bhayaṅkare | | 43
sa bhūpo.akabaro nāma kṛtvā rājyamakaṇṭakam |
śatārddhena ca śiṣyaiśca vaikuṇṭhabhavanaṃ yayau | | 44
salomā tanayastasya kṛtaṃ rājyaṃ pituḥ samam |
khurdakastanayastasya daśābdaṃ ca kṛtaṃ padam | | 45
catvārastanayāstasya navaraṅgo hi madhyamaḥ |
pitaraṃ ca tathā bhrātṛrñjitvā rājyamacīkarat | | 46
pūrvajanmani daityo.ayamandhako nāma viśrutaḥ |
karmabhūmyāṃ tadaṃśena daityarājājñayā yayau | | 47
tenaiva bahudhā mūrtīrbhraṃśitāśca samantataḥ |
dṛṣṭvā devāstadāgatya kṛṣṇacaitanyamabruvan | | 48
bhagavandaityarājāṃśaḥ sa jātaśca mahīpatiḥ |
bhraṃśayitvā surānvedāndaityapakṣaṃ vivarddhate | | 49
iti śrutvā sa yajñāṃśo nadīhopavane sthitaḥ |
śaśāpa taṃ durācāraṃ yathā vaṃśakṣayo bhavet | | 3.4.22.50
rājyamekonapañcāśatkṛtaṃ tena durātmanā |
sevājayo nāma nṛpo devapakṣavivarddhanaḥ | | 51
mahārāṣṭradvijastasya yuddhavidyāviśāradaḥ |
hatvā taṃ ca durācāraṃ tatputrāya ca tatpadam | | 52
datvā yayau dākṣiṇātye deśe devavivarddhanaḥ |
alomā nāma tanayaḥ pañcābdaṃ tatpadaṃ kṛtam | | 53
tatpaścānmaraṇaṃ prāpto vidradhena rujā mune |
vikramasya gate rājye saptatyuttarakaṃ śatam | | 54
jñeyaṃ sapta daśaṃ vipra yadālomā mṛtiṃ gataḥ |
tālanasya kule jāto mlecchaḥ phalaruṣo balī | | 55
mukulasya kulaṃ hatvā svayaṃ rājyaṃ cakāra ha |
daśābdaṃ ca kṛtaṃ rājyaṃ tena bhūpena bhūtale | | 56
śatrubhirmaraṇaṃ prāpto daityalokamupāgamat |
mahāmadastattanayo viṃśatyabdaṃ kṛtaṃ padam | | 57
tadrāṣṭre nādaro nāma daityo deśa upāgamat |
hatvāryāṃśca surāñjitvā deśaṃ khurajamāyayau | | 58
mahāmatsyo hi madasya tanayastatpituḥ padam |
gṛhītvā pañcavarṣāntaṃ sa ca rājyaṃ cakāra ha | | 59
mahārāṣṭrairhato duṣṭastālanānvayasambhavaḥ |
dehalīnagare rājyaṃ daśābdaṃ mādhavena vai | | 3.4.22.60
kṛtaṃ tatra tadā mleccha ālomā rājyamāptavān |
tadrāṣṭre bahavo jātā rājāno nijadeśajāḥ | | 61
grāmapā bahavo bhūpā deśe deśe babhūvire |
maṇḍalīkapadaṃ tatrākṣayaṃ jātaṃ mahītale | | 62
triṃśadabdamato jātaṃ grāme grāme nṛpe nṛpe |
tadā tu sakalā devāḥ kṛṣṇacaitanyamāyayuḥ | | 63
yajñāṃśaśca hariḥ sākṣājjñātvā duḥkhaṃ mahītale |
muhūrtaṃ dhyānamāgamya devānvacanamabravīt | | 64
purā tu rāghavo dhīmāñjitvā rāvaṇarākṣasam |
kapīnujjīvayāmāsa sudhāvarṣaissamantataḥ | | 65
vikaṭo vṛjilo jālo varalīno hi siṃhalaḥ |
javassumātraśca tathā nāmnā te kṣudravānarāḥ | | 66
rāmacandraṃ vacaḥ prāhurdehi no vācchitaṃ prabho |
rāmo dāśarathiḥ śrīmāñjñātvā teṣāṃ manoratham | | 67
devāṅganodbhavāḥ kanyā rāvaṇāllokarāvaṇāt |
dattvā tebhyo harissākṣādvacanaṃ prāha harṣitaḥ | | 68
bhavannāmnā ca ye dvīpā jālandharavinirmitāḥ |
teṣu rājño bhaviṣyanti bhavanto hitakāriṇaḥ | | 69
nandinyā gośca ruṇḍādvai jātā mlecchā bhayānakāḥ |
guruṇḍā jātayasteṣāṃ tāstu teṣu sadā sthitāḥ | | 3.4.22.70
jitvā tāṃśca guruṇḍānvai kurudhvaṃ rājyamuttamam |
iti śrutvā hariṃ natvā dvīpeṣu prayayurmudā | | 71
vikaṭānvayasambhūtā guruṇḍā vānarānanāḥ |
vāṇijyārthamihāyātā gauruṇḍā bauddhamārgiṇaḥ | | 72
īśaputramate saṃsthāsteṣāṃ hṛdayamuttamam |
satyavrataṃ kāmajitamakrodhaṃ sūryatatparam | | 73
yūyaṃ tatroṣya kāryaṃ ca nṛṇāṃ kuruta mā ciram |
iti śrutvā tu te devāḥ kuryurārcikamādarāt | | 74
nagaryyā kalikātāyāṃ sthāpayāmāsurudyatāḥ |
vikaṭe paścime dvīpe tatpatnī vikaṭāvatī | | 75
aṣṭakauśalamārgeṇa rājamantraṃ cakāra ha |
tatpatistu pulomārciḥ kalikātāṃ purīṃ sthitaḥ | | 76
vikramasya gate rājye śatamaṣṭādaśaṃ kalau |
catvāriṃśaṃ tathābdaṃ ca tadā rājā babhūva ha | | 77
tadanvaye saptanṛpā guruṇḍāśca babhūvire |
catuṣṣaṣṭimitaṃ varṣaṃ rājyaṃ kṛtvā layaṃ gatāḥ | | 78
guruṇḍe cāṣṭame bhūpe prāpte nyāyena śāsati |
kalipakṣo balirdaityo muraṃ nāma mahāsuram | | 79
āruhya preṣayāmāsa devadeśe mahottame |

sa muro vārḍilaṃ bhūpaṃ vaśīkṛtya hṛdi sthitaḥ | | 3.4.22.80
āryadharmavināśāya tasya buddhiṃ cakāra ha |
mūrtisaṃsthāstadā devā gatvā yajñāṃśayoginam | | 81
namaskṛtyābruvansarve yathā prāpto muro.asuraḥ |
jñātvā śaśāpa kṛṣṇāṃśo guruṇḍānbauddhamārgiṇaḥ | | 82
kṣayaṃ yāsyanti te sarve ye murasya vaśaṃ gatāḥ |
ityukte vacane tasminguruṇḍā kālanoditāḥ | | 83
svasainyaiśca kṣayaṃ jagmurvarṣamātrāntare khalāḥ |
sarve triṃśatsahasrāśca prayayuryamamandire | | 84
vāgdaṇḍaissa ca bhūpālo vārḍilo nāśamāptavān |
guruṇḍo navamaḥ prāpto bhekalo nāma vīryavān | | 85
nyāyena kṛtavānrājya dvādaśābdaṃ prayatnataḥ |
āryadeśe ca tadrājyaṃ babhūva nyāyaśāsati | | 86
laḍilo nāma vikhyāto guruṇḍo daśamohitaḥ |
dvātriṃśābdaṃ ca tadrājyaṃ kṛtaṃ tenaiva dharmiṇā | | 87
laḍile svargate prāpte makarandakulodbhavāḥ |
āryāḥ prāptāstadā maunā himatuṅganivāsinaḥ | | 88
babhruvarṇāḥ sūkṣmanaso vartulā dīrghamastakāḥ |
evaṃ lakṣāśca samprāptā dehalyāṃ bauddhamāgiṇaḥ | | 89
ārjiko nāma vai rājā teṣāṃ tatra babhūva ha |
tasya putro devakaṇo gaṅgotragirimūrddhani | | 3.4.22.90
dvādaśābdaṃ tapo ghoraṃ tepe rājyavivṛddhaye |
tadā bhagavatī gaṅgā tapasā tasya dhīmataḥ | | 91
svarūpaṃ svecchayā prāpya brahmalokaṃ jagāma ha |
kuberaśca tadāgatya dattvā tasmai mahatpadam | | 92
āryāṇāṃ maṇḍalīkaṃ ca tatraivāntaradhīyata |
maṇḍalīko devakarṇo babhūva janapālakaḥ | | 93
ṣaṣṭyabdaṃ ca kṛtaṃ rājyaṃ tena rājñā mahītale |
tadanvaye.aṣṭabhūpāśca babhūvurdevapūjakāḥ | | 94
dviśatābdaṃ padaṃ kṛtvā svargalokamupāyayuḥ |
ekādaśaśca yo maunaḥ pannagāririti śrutaḥ | | 95
catvāriṃśacca varṣāṇi rājyaṃ kṛtvā prayatnataḥ |
svargalokaṃ gato rājā pannagairmaraṇaṃ gataḥ | | 96
evaṃ ca mauryajātīyaiḥ kṛtaṃ rājyaṃ mahītale | | 97
iti śrībhaviṣye mahāpurāṇe pratisargaparvaṇi caturyugakhaṇḍāparaparyāye kaliyugīyetihāsasamuccaye guruṇḍamaunarājyavarṇanaṃ nāma dvāviṃśo.adhyāyaḥ | 22
atha trayoviṃśo.adhyāyaḥ
kaliyugīyetihāsasamuccayavarṇanam
sūta uvāca
vaikrame rājyavigate catuṣṣaṣṭyuttaraṃ mune |
dvāviṃśadabdaśatakaṃ bhūtanandistadā nṛpaḥ | | 1
kuberayakṣakānmaunāndhanadhānyasamanvitān |
sārddhalakṣānkalairghorairjitvā tānyuddhakāriṇaḥ | | 2
kilkilāyāṃ svayaṃ rājyaṃ nāgavaṃśaiścakāra ha |
āgneyyāṃ diśi vikhyātā puṇḍarīkeṇa nirmitā | | 3
purī kilakilā nāma tatra rājā babhūva ha |
puṇḍarīkādayo nāgāstasminrājyaṃ praśāsati | | 4
gehe gehe janaissarvaiḥ pūjanīyā babhūvire |
svāhā svadhā vaṣaṭkāro devapūjā mahītale | | 5
tyaktvā devānupāgamya saṃsthitā merumūrddhani |
śakrājñayā kuberastu śūkadhānyaṃ samantataḥ | | 6
yakṣaiḥ ṣaḍaṃśānādāya devebhyaḥ pradadau prabhuḥ |
maṇisvarṇādivastūni maunarājyeṣu yāni vai | | 7
dattāni tāni kośeṣu punardevaścakāra ha |
maṇḍalīkaṃ padaṃ tena satkṛtaṃ bhūtanandinā | | 8
śatārddhaṃ tu tato rājā śiśunandirbabhūva ha |
nāgapūjāṃ puraskṛtya tiraskṛtya surānbhuvi | | 9
cakāra rājyaṃ viśābdaṃ yaśonandistato.anujaḥ |
bhrātrāsanaṃ svayaṃ prāpto nāgapūjāparāyaṇaḥ | | 3.4.23.10
pañcaviṃśativarṣāṇi sa ca rājyamacīkarat |
tatastattanayo rājā sa babhūva pravīrakaḥ | | 11
ekādaśābdaṃ tadrājyaṃ karmabhūmyāṃ prakīrtitam |
kadācitsa ca bāhlīke senayā sārddhamāgataḥ | | 12
tatra tairabhavadyuddhaṃ paiśācairmlecchadāruṇaiḥ |
māsamātrāntare mlecchā lakṣasaṃkhyā mṛtiṃ gatāḥ | | 13
tathā ṣaṣṭisahasrāśca nāgabhaktā layaṃ gatāḥ |
bādalo nāma tadrājā romajastho mahābalaḥ | | 14
yaśonandinamāhūya dadau jālavatīṃ sutām |
gṛhītvā mleccharājasya sutāṃ gehamupāgataḥ | | 15
garbho jātastatastasyāṃ babhūva tanayo balī |
bāhlīko nāma vikhyāto nāgapūjanatatparaḥ | | 16
tadanvaye nṛpā jātā bāhlīkāśca trayodaśa |
catuśśatāni varṣāṇi kṛtvā rājyaṃ mṛtiṃ gatāḥ | | 17
ayomukhe ca bāhlīke rājyamatra praśāsati |
tadā pitṛgaṇāssarve kṛṣṇacaitanyamāyayuḥ | | 18
natvocurvacanaṃ tatra bhagavañchṛṇu me vacaḥ |
vayaṃ pitṛgaṇā bhūpairnāgavaṃśyairnirākṛtāḥ | | 19
śrāddhatarpaṇakarmāṇi tairvayaṃ varddhitāssadā |
pitṛvṛddhātsomavṛddhistato devāśca varddhanāḥ | | 3.4.23.20 devavṛddhāllokavṛddhistasmādbrahmā prajāpatiḥ |
brahmavṛddhātparaṃ harṣaṃ gehe gehe jane jane | | 21
ato.asmānrakṣa bhagavanprajāḥ pāhi sanātanīḥ |
iti śrutvā vacasteṣāṃ yajñāṃśo bhagavānhariḥ | | 22
puṣyamitraṃ dharmaparamāryavaśavivarddhanam | | 23
jātamātraḥ sa vai bālaḥ ṣoḍaśārddhavayo.abhavat |
ayoniryonibhūtāṃstānayomukha purassarān | | 24
jitvā deśānnirākṛtya svayaṃ rājyaṃ gṛhītavān |
yathā śivāṃśato jāto vikramo nāma bhūpatiḥ | | 25
śakāngandharvapakṣīyāñjitvā pūjyo babhūva ha |
nāgapakṣāṃstathā bhūpāngolakāsyānbhayaṅkarān | | 26
puṣyamitrastadā jitvā sarvapūjyo.abhavadbhuvi |
saptaviṃśacchataṃ varṣaṃ dvisaptatyuttaraṃ tathā | | 27
rājyaṃ vikramato jātaṃ samāptimagamattadā |
puṣyamitre rājyapadaṃ prāpte samabhavattadā | | 28
śatavarṣaṃ rājyapadaṃ tena dharmātmanā dhṛtam |
ayodhyā mathurā māyā kāśī kāñcī hyavantikā | | 29
purī dvāravatī tena rājñā ca punaruddhṛtāḥ |
kurusūkarapadmāni kṣetrāṇi vividhāni ca | | 3.4.23.30
naimiṣotpalavṛndānāṃ vanakṣetrāṇi bhūtale |
nānātīrthāni tenaiva sthāpitāni samantataḥ | | 31
tadā kaliḥ sa gandharvo devatāpitṛdūṣakaḥ |
brāhmaṇaṃ vapurāsthāya puṣyamitramupāgamat | | 32
natvovāca priyaṃ vākyaṃ śṛṇu bhūpa dayāpara |
āryadeśe pitṛgaṇāḥ pūjārhāḥ śrāddhatarpaṇaiḥ | | 33
ajñānamiti tajjñeya bhuvi yatpitṛpūjanam |
mṛtā ye tu narā bhūmau pūrvakarmavaśānugāḥ | | 34
bhavanti dehavantaste caturāśītilakṣadhā |
chadmanā mayadevena pitṛpūjā vinirmitā | | 35
vṛthā śramaṃ vṛthā karma nṛṇāṃ ca pitṛpūjanam |
iti śrutvā vaco ghoraṃ vihasyāha mahīpatiḥ | | 36
bhavānmūrkho mahāmūḍho na jānīṣa paraṃ phalam |
bhuvarloke na ye dṛṣṭāḥ śūnyabhūtāśca bhāsvarāḥ | | 37
ye tu te vai pitṛgaṇāḥ piṇḍarūpavimānagāḥ |
satputraiśca vidhānena piṇḍadānaṃ ca yatkṛtam | | 38
tadvimānaṃ nabhojātaṃ sarvānandapradāyakam |
abdamātraṃ sthitisteṣāṃ piṇḍapāyasarūpiṇām | | 39
gītāṣṭādaśakādhyāyaiḥ saptaśatyāścaritrakaiḥ |
pāvitaṃ yattu vai piṇḍaṃ triśatābdaṃ ca tatsthitiḥ | | 3.4.23.40
śrāddhatarpaṇahīnā ye dṛśyante mānavā bhuvi |
te sarve nārakā jñeyāḥ kulamekottaraṃ śatam | | 41
śrāddhakarma mahāndharmaḥ śrāddho.ayaṃ sarvakāraṇam |
iti śrutvā sa gandharvaḥ kalīrājo.atra dehinām | | 42
natvovāca nṛpaśreṣṭhaṃ prasannavadano hi saḥ |
sadā bhava mamāśu tvaṃ tavāhaṃ nṛpa kiṅkaraḥ | | 43
kalimitraḥ puṣyamitro bhavānbhuvi bhavetsadā |
yathā vikramarājasya vaitālasya ca vai sakhā ||44
sarvakāryakaro.ahaṃ vai tathā tava na saṃśayaḥ |
ityuktyā ca nṛpaṃ dhīraṃ samādāya sa vai kaliḥ ||45
saptadvīpāṃstathā khaṇḍānnabhomārgānanekaśaḥ |
svapṛṣṭhasthāya rājñe ca darśayāmāsa vīryavān ||46
āryadharmaṃ kalau sthāpya naṣṭabhūtaṃ sa vai nṛpaḥ |
tyaktvā prāṇāṃśca yajñāṃśe tejastasya samāgamat ||47
āndhradeśodbhavo rājā sugado nāma vīryavān |
vinā bhūpaṃ ca taṃ deśaṃ dṛṣṭvā rājyamacīkarat ||48
viṃśadabdaṃ padaṃ tena karmabhūmyāṃ ca satkṛtam |
tadanvaye ṣaṣṭinṛpā babhūvurbahumārgiṇaḥ ||49
puṣyamitragate rājye daśottaraśatatrayam |
tasminkāle layaṃ jagmuścāndhradeśanivāsinaḥ ||3.4.23.50
śatārddhābdaṃ tato bhūmirvinā rājñā babhūva ha |
tadā kṣudrā narā lubdhā luṇṭhitāścauradāruṇaiḥ ||5 1
dāridramagamanghoraṃ vinā svarṇaṃ ca bhūrabhūt |
punardevaśca bhagavānprārthitastānuvāca ha ||52
deśe kauśalake jātaḥ sūryyāṃśācya mahīpatiḥ |
rākṣasāririti khyāto devamārgaparāyaṇaḥ ||53
mamājñayā sa vai rājā bhaviṣyati mahītale |
ityuktvāntardadhe viṣṇurdevalokānupāgamat ||54
rākṣasārimayodhyāyāṃ sthāpayāmāsureva tam |
āndhrarāṣṭre ca yaddravyaṃ rākṣasaiśca samāhṛtam ||55
taddravyaṃ rākṣasāñjitvā grāme grāme cakāra saḥ |
tāradhātoraṣṭamūlyaṃ suvarṇaṃ bhuvi tatkṛtam ||56
āradhā(dha?)toḥ śataṃ mūlyaṃ rājataṃ tena vai kṛtam |
tāmradhātoḥ pañcamūlyamāradhātośca tatkṛtam ||57
nāgadhātoḥ pañcamūlyaṃ bhuvi tenaiva nirmitam |
tāmraṃ pavitramadhikaṃ nāgo vaṅgastathottamaḥ | | 58
lauhadhātoḥ śataṃ mūlyaṃ vaṅgo.asau tena satkṛtaḥ |
śatārddhābdaṃ mahīṃ bhuktvā sūryalokamupāyayau | | 59
tadanvaye ṣaṣṭinṛpā jātā vedaparāyaṇāḥ |
puṣyamitragate rājye cābde saptaśate gate | | 3.4.23.60
kauśalānvayasambhūtā bhūpāḥ svargamupāyayuḥ |
śatārddhābdaṃ tato bhūmirmaṇḍalīkaṃ nṛpaṃ vinā | | 61
kṣudrabhūpāśca bubhuje deśe deśe ca bhārgavaḥ |
tato baidaradeśīyo nāmnā bhūpo viśāradaḥ | | 62
āryadeśamupāgamya lakṣasainyasamanvitaḥ |
kṣudrabhūpānvaśīkṛtya maṇḍalīko babhūva ha | | 63
nānākalaiśca karmāṇi vicitrāṇi mahītale |
grāme grāme narāścakurvarṇasaṅkarakārakāḥ | | 64
brahmakṣatramayo varṇo nāmamātreṇa dṛśyate |
vaiśyaprāyā narā āryāḥ śūdraprāyāśca kāriṇaḥ | | 65
tadrāṣṭre manujāścāsannāmamātraṃ surārcakāḥ |
ṣaṣṭivarṣaṃ padaṃ tena karmabhūmyāṃ ca satkṛtam | | 66
tato nṛpā mahīṃ prāptāḥ ṣaṭsaṅkhyāstu tadanvayāḥ |
puṣyamitragate rāṣṭre śataṣoḍaśahāyanī | | 67
vaidūrā nidhanaṃ jagmuḥ kalikāle bhayānake |
catuśśatāni varṣāṇi kṣudrarūpā ca bhūrabhūt | | 68
tatpaścānnaiṣadhe rāṣṭraṃ kālamālī nṛpo.abhavat |
kṣudrabhūpānvaśīkṛtya svayaṃ rājā babhūva vai | | 69
yamābhūyā bhuvi tvaṣṭrā nagarī yamunātaṭe |
nirmitā yojanāyātu kālakāleti viśrutā | | 3.4.23.70
tatrāryadeśa bhūpānāṃ pūjyo rājā sa cābhavat |
devānpitṛrṃstiraskṛtya pretapūjāṃ jane jane | | 71
kālamālī ca kṛtavāndeśanaiṣadhasaṃsthitaḥ |
dvātriṃśadvarṣarājyaṃ tadbabhūva janapīḍanam | | 72
tadanvaye ṣaṣṭinṛpā babhūvuḥ pretapūjakāḥ |
śatābdāṃtamabhūdrājyaṃ teṣāṃ naiṣadhadeśinām | | 73
sahasrābdaṃ tu tatpaścātkṣudrabhūpā mahī hyabhūt |
surārcanaṃ vedamārgaḥ śrutamātraśca dṛśyate | | 74
puṣyamitragate rājye caikatriṃśacchate kalau |
dvātriṃśaduttare caiva tadā devāśca duḥkhitāḥ | | 75
kṛṣṇacaitanyamāgamya natvocurvacanaṃ priyam |
bhagavankalikāle.adya varṇāścatvāribhūtale 1 | | 76
bhraṣṭācārāḥ pretamayāḥ śatārddhābdaprajīvinaḥ |
devānpitṛrṃstiraskṛtya piśācānpūjayanti vai | | 77
grāme grāme ca kughnāni pūjitāni narairbhuvi |
dṛśyante.asmābhiradyaiva duḥkhitāśca narā bhṛśam | | 78
bhūtapretapiśācāśca ḍākinīśākinīgaṇāḥ |
svapūjābhirmadāndhāśca nindayanti surānpitṛrn | | 79
ato.asmāndurbalānviddhi sabalānbhūtanāyakān |
kṛpayā pāhi naḥ svāmiñcharaṇāgatavatsala | | 3.4.23.80
iti śrutvā sa yajñāṃśo nadīhopavane sthitaḥ |
namrabhūtānsurānprāha māgadhe tu mahīpatiḥ | | 81
purañjayo brahmaparastasya patnī purañjanī |
madājñayā tayoḥ putro bhaviṣyati mahābalaḥ | | 82
viśvasphūrjiriti khyāto brahmamārgaparo guṇī |
ityuktavacane tasmingarbhaṃ dhatte purañjanī | | 83
daśamāsāntare jāto viśvasphūrjirmahābalaḥ |
jātamātre sute tasminvāguvācāśarīriṇī | | 84
puṣyamitro yathā cāsīdvarṇadharmapravartakaḥ |
tathāyaṃ bālako jāto brahmamārgaparo balī | | 85
kariṣyati paro varṇānkalindayadumadrakān |
prajāśca brahmabhūyiṣṭhāḥ sthāpayiṣyati durmatiḥ | | 86
vīryavānkṣatramutsādya padmavatyāḥ sa vai puram |
ityākāśavacaḥ śrutvā sa nṛpastu purañjayaḥ | | 87
dadau dānaṃ kṣudhārtebhyo.atithibhyassaparicchadaḥ |
aṣṭau varṣasahasrāṇi cāṣṭavarṣaśatāni ca | | 88
karmabhūmyāṃ kalau prāpte vyatītāni tadā mune |
viśvasphūrjirnṛpaścāsīnmahābuddho mahābalaḥ | | 89
kṣudrabhūpānvaśīkṛtya sarvavarṇānnarāṃstadā |
sthāpayāmāsa vai brahme varṇe brahmaparāyaṇe | | 3.4.23.90
kṣatraviṭcchūdrakā varṇāḥ piśācā varṇasaṅkarāḥ |
guruṇḍādyāstathā mlecchā brāhmaṇāste babhūvire | | 91
sandhyātarpaṇadevānāṃ pūjādivividhāḥ kriyāḥ |
cakruste vedavidhinā tulyabhojanaśīlinaḥ | | 92
ṣaṣṭivarṣaṃ kṛtaṃ rājyaṃ tena samyakkṛtā mune |
tadanvaye nṛpāścāsansahasrā bhuvi viśrutāḥ | | 93
ayutābdāntare jātā brahmamārgaparāyaṇāḥ |
taiśca dattāni bhāgāni yajñamadhye vidhānataḥ | | 94
daityebhyaśca surebhyaśca tulyarūpāṇi cāgaman |
vismitāśca surāssarve yajñāṃśaṃ śaraṇaṃ yayuḥ | | 95
taduktaṃ kāraṇaṃ jñātvā śakraputra uvāca tān |
vedo nārāyaṇaḥ sākṣādvivekī haṃsarūpavān | | 96
nṛṇāṃ ca yugabhedena varṇabhedaṃ cakāra ha |
tadguṇo brāhmaṇo varṇaḥ kṣatriyastu rajoguṇaḥ | | 97
tamoguṇastathā vaiśyo guṇasāmyāttu śūdrakaḥ |
tṛptiṃ yānti piturvṛndā brāhmaṇaiḥ kṣatriyaiḥ surāḥ | | 98
vaiśyaiśca yakṣarakṣāṃsi kṣudrairdaityāśca dānavāḥ |
ekavarṇe ca catvāro varṇāḥ kāyastha eva saḥ | | 99
bhūtapretapiśācādyāḥ kāyasthaistarpitāssadā |
brahmavarṇe tu varṇāśca sthitāścatvāri sāmpratam | | 3.4.23.100
brahmaśaṅkaravarṇo.ayaṃ tebhyaḥ pūrvaṃ hi dānavāḥ |
arddhatṛptā bhaviṣyanti tatpaścātsvargavāsinaḥ || 101
ato.ahaṃ ca kalau ghore yuṣmadarthe mahītale |
saurāṣṭanṛpatergehaṃ svāṃśādyāsyāmi bhoḥ surāḥ || 102
ityuktvā sa ca yajñāṃśaḥ somanāthaḥ kalaikayā |
nāmnā babhūva tadgehe saurāṣṭranagarīsthitaḥ || 103
jitvā bhūpānsvayaṃ rājyaṃ cakārābdhitaṭe mudā |
kṣatravarṇamayī bhūmistadā jātā kalau yuge || 104
somanāthaḥ sa vai yajñaiḥ surānsarvānatarpayat |
śatābdaṃ ca kṛtaṃ rājyaṃ tena devaprasādataḥ || 105
tasya rājyamayaṃ saṃvadabhavallokaviśrutam |
tadanvaye sārddhaśataṃ bhūpāścāsansurapriyāḥ || 106
ayutābdāntare kiñcidadhike ca sukhapradāḥ |
karmabhūmyāṃ kalau prāpte hāyanā ayutatrayam || 107
vyatītaṃ ca tato daityā duḥkhitāḥ kalimabruvan |
purāssamābhiḥ śatābdaṃ ca tapasā vai maheśvaraḥ || 108
tuṣṭīkṛtastadāsmabhyaṃ bhavāndatto hitena vai |
ardhabhāgaṃ vajramayamardhabhāgaṃ ca komalam || 109
tavāṅgaṃ sundaraṃ deva kale.asmānrakṣa duḥkhitān |
iti śrutvā ca sa kalirdetyapakṣavivarddhanaḥ || 3.4.23.110
svāṃśājjanma kalau prāpya gurjare deśadāruṇe |
ābhīrī siṃhikā nāma sihamāṃsāśanā khalā || 111
tasyā yonau samāgamya rāhurnāma sa cābhavat |
yathā rāhurnabhomārge dāruṇo hi vidhuntudaḥ || 112
tathā rāhuḥ kaleraṃśo bhuvi jātaḥ surantudaḥ |
jātamātre sute tasminbhūmikampo mahānabhūt || 113
viparītā grahāḥ sarve janayanti mahadbhayam |
tadbhayātsakalā devāstyaktvā mūrtīḥ samantataḥ || 114
mahendraṃ śaraṇaṃ jagmuḥ sumerugirimūrddhani |
tadarthe bhagavāñchakrastuṣṭāva jagadambikām | | 115
kanyāmūrtimayī devī surānprāha śivaṅkarī |
mamāṅgadarśanāddevāḥ kṣuttṛḍbhyāṃ ca vinā sadā | | 116
bhavadhvaṃ ca tato yūyaṃ madvilokanatatparāḥ |
iti śrutvā tu te devā harṣitāḥ sambamūvire | | 117
ābhīrītanayo rāhuḥ kṛtvā rājyaṃ śataṃ samāḥ |
tyaktvā prāṇānkalau līno babhūva munisattama | | 118
tadanvaye sārddhaśatamayutābdāntarebhavat |
mahāmadamataṃ ghoraṃ cirakālādvināśitam | | 119
taiḥ punaścoddhṛtaṃ bhūmau sarve mlecchā babhūvire |
na vedāśca na devāśca na varṇāśca kalau yuge | | 3.4.23.120
dṛśyante na ca maryādā kalikāle tadanvaye |
dvijaśeṣāḥ sahasrāśca punararbudamūrddhani | | 121
dvādaśāhaṃ prayatnena devānārādhituṃ kṣamā |
arbudācca samudbhūto rājanyaḥ khaḍgacarmadhṛk | | 122
jitvā mlecchāndurādharṣānnāmnā cārvabalī hyabhūt |
pañcayojanamānā sa bhūmirātmavivṛddhaye | | 123
nirmitā tena śuddhena nāmnā cārvapurī smṛtā |
śanaiḥ śanairāryakulaṃ punastatra vavarddha ha | | 124
śatārddhābdaṃ prayatnena tena rājyaṃ mahatkṛtam |
tadanvaye sārddhaśataṃ nṛpāścāsaṃstadā mune | | 125
ayutābdāntare vīrā mlecchamitrāśca saṅkarāḥ |
mlecchakanyodvahā ghorā nāmamātrāryyamārgagāḥ | | 126
tadā malayadeśasthairmlecchairlakṣapramāṇakaiḥ |
ārvudāryaiḥ samaṃ yuddhamabhavallomaharṣaṇam | | 127
varṣamātrāntare jitvā mālavasthā mahābalāḥ |
maṇḍalīkapadātaiśca muktamāryaiḥ samantataḥ | | 128
catvāriṃśatsahasrāṇi varṣāṇi jagatītale |
mlecchabhūpāśca śataśo babhūvuḥ svalpajīvinaḥ | | 129
paṃcaviṃśatsahasrāṇi teṣāṃ saṃkhyā ca bhūbhujām |
ye tu puṇyā mahīpālāḥ pūrvajanmatapodbhavāḥ | | 3.4.23.130
teṣāṃ līlā ca munibhiḥ purāṇeṣu prakīrtitā |
nānāsaṃvatkarāḥ sarve paiśācā dharmadūṣakāḥ | | 131
navatyabdasahasrāṇi vyatītāni kalau yuge |
jātā mlecchamayī bhūmiralakṣmīstu janejane | | 132
iti śrībhaviṣye mahāpurāṇe pratisargaparvaṇi caturyugakhaṇḍāparaparyāye
kaliyugīyetihāsasamuccayavarṇanaṃ nāma trayoviṃśo.adhyāyaḥ | 23
atha caturviśo.adhyāyaḥ
kaliyugīyetihāsasamuccayavarṇanam
sūta uvāca
tataste sakalā daityāḥ kalinā ca puraskṛtāḥ |
kṛtvā ca jalayānāni harikhaṇḍamupāyayuḥ | | 1
manujā harikhaṇḍe ca devatulyā mahābalāḥ |
ayudhyaṃstānmahāśastrairayutābdaprajīvinaḥ | | 2
daśavarṣāntare sarve māyāyuddhaiḥ parājitāḥ |
mahendraṃ śaraṇaṃ jagmurharikhaṇḍanivāsinaḥ | | 3
tadā tu bhagavāñchakro viśvakarmāṇamabravīt |
bhramiśca nāmayantro.ayaṃ saṃsthitaḥ saptasindhuṣu | | 4
tvayā viracitastāta tatprabhāvānnarā bhuvi |
anyakhaṇḍe na gacchanti sa ca yantrastu māyinā | | 5
mayena bhraṃśito bhrātrā mlecchaiḥ sārddhaṃ samantataḥ |
saptadvīpeṣu yāsyanti manujā mama vairiṇaḥ | | 6
ato naḥ pāhi maryādāṃ bhūmadhye bhavatā kṛtām |
ti śrutvā viśvakarmā divyayantramacīkarat | | 7
tena yantraprabhāvena bhramitāste babhūvire |
bhramiyantrānmahāvāyurjjāto mlecchavināśakaḥ | | 8
tadvāyorabhavatputro vātyo vātyāsamudbhavaḥ |
daityayakṣā~mśca paiśācāñjitvā jñānamayo balī | | 9
brāhmaṇāḥ kṣatriyā vaiśyāstrivarṇāstena satkṛtāḥ |
balānmlecchānvarṇamayānkṛtvā vātyo mahābalaḥ | | 3.4.24.10
śatārddhābdaṃ maṇḍalīkaṃ padaṃ bhuvi gṛhītavān |
tadanvaye sahasrāśca nṛpāścāsankalau yuge | | 11
vāyupakṣāstrivarṇāḍhyāḥ ṣoḍaśābdasahasrake |
vāyorjātaḥ svayaṃ brahmā vāyorjātaḥ sa vai hariḥ | | 12
vāyorjāto mahādevaḥ sarvaṃ vāyumayaṃ jagat |
vinā vāyuṃ mṛtāḥ sarve vāyunā bhuvi jīvinaḥ | | 13
iti matvā tu te lokā vāyuṃ ca samatarpayan |
punastadā kalirghoro daityarājaṃ baliṃ prabhum | | 14
natvā nivedayāmāsa duḥkhito.abhūttadā baliḥ |
vāmanāntikamāgamya kalimitreṇa saṃyutaḥ | | 15
natvovāca sa vai rājā devadevaṃ janārdanam |
tvayā kaliḥ kṛto mahyaṃ prasannena surottama | | 16
vātyairdvijaiḥ karmabhūmeḥ kalistu sa nirākṛtaḥ |
ekapādo vyatīto.ayaṃ kiñcidūnaṃ kaleḥ prabhoḥ | | 17
mayā samyaktu vai bhuktā bhūmirdevendramāyayā |
sahasrābdaṃ kalau prāpte mayā bhuktaṃ mahītalam | | 18
tataḥ sārddhaṃ sahasrābdaṃ devairbhuktaṃ surasthalam |
tataḥ paṃcaśataṃ varṣaṃ kiñcidadhikameva ca | | 19
mayā bhuktā karmabhūmiḥ sarvalokasya kāraṇāt |
tataḥ sārddhaṃ sahasrābdaṃ devairbhukteyamuttamā | | 3.4.24.20
tataḥ sārddhasahasrābdaṃ kiñcidūnaṃ mayā dhṛtā |
sārddhatriṃśatsahasrābdaṃ devairdetyaistathā mahī | | 21
bhuktā daityaiḥ punardevaiḥ tathā devaiśca dānavaiḥ | | 22
tvayā datto hi me deva kaliḥ kalivināśana |
nādhikāraṃ kṛtaṃ nātha satyaṃ satyapriyakṣama | | 23
iti śrutvā balervākyaṃ bhagavānvāmano hariḥ |
svāṃśānmahītale prāpto daityapakṣavivardhanaḥ | | 24
kāmaśarmā tadā vipro yamunātaṭasaṃsthitaḥ |
hariṃ tuṣṭāva manasā dvādaśābdaṃ prayatnataḥ | | 25
tadā tu vāmanaḥ śrīmānvacaḥ prāha dvijottamam |
varaṃ brūhi dvijaśreṣṭha yatte manasi saṃsthitam | |
iti śrutvā kāmaśarmā tuṣṭāva ślakṣṇayā girā | | 26
kāmaśarmovāca
namo devāya mahate sarvapūjyāya te namaḥ | | 27
dharmapriyāya dharmāya devadaityakarāya ca |
daivādhīnanṛṇāṃ bhartre karmakartre namo namaḥ | | 28
daivādhīnāśca te devā daivollaṅghāśca dānavāḥ |
teṣāṃ bharttā kramāddhartā tasmai devāya te namaḥ | | 29
putro bhava hare svāminsaphalaṃ vāñchitaṃ kuru |
iti śrutvā hariḥ sākṣādvāmano balirakṣakaḥ | | 3.4.24.30
svapūrvārddhāddevahūtyāṃ tatpatnyāṃ ca samudbhavaḥ |
dvidhā bhūtvā mahī jātau divyāṅgau divyavigrahau | | 31
bhogasihaḥ kelisiṃha devapo daityapo hariḥ |
jitvā vātyodbhavānbhūpātkalpakṣetramupasthitaḥ | | 32
rahaḥ krīḍāvatī nāma nagarī mayanirmitā |
tatroṣya balavantau tau dadhatuśca kalerdhuram | | 33
patnīyaṃ sarvadharmāṇāṃ sārabhūtā sanātanī |
pativratāyāṃ ye jātā narā āryāḥ surapriyāḥ | | 34
dūṣitāyāṃ narā jātāste sarve varṇasaṅkarāḥ |
iti sañcintya bhagavānkṛtvā kāmamayaṃ vapuḥ | | 35
dine dine sahasrāṇi yoṣito bubhuje hariḥ |
tāḥ sarvā garbhamādhāya yamau suṣuvire mudā | | 36
nāryā tayā sahodaryā remire te sahodarāḥ |
evaṃ ca bahudhā sṛṣṭisteṣāṃ jātā kalau yuge | | 37
pūrvajātāstrivarṇāśca bhakṣayitvā dinedine |
karmabhūmyāṃ vavṛdhire pakṣiṇaśca yathā drume | | 38
ubhayābdasahasrānte tairannāḥ pūrvamānavāḥ |
tadā kaleśca caraṇo dvitīyo bhuvi cāgamat | | 39
sāmprataṃ vartate vārtā kinnarāṇāṃ ca bhūtale |
dvikiṣkumātrāśca narāḥ sārddhā daityamayāḥ smṛtāḥ | | 3.4.24.40
yathā khagāḥ karmahīnāścatvāriṃśābdajīvinaḥ |
bhūmigāśca tathā te vai bhedaṃ teṣveṣu naiva bhoḥ | | 41
dṛśyante cādya yuṣmābhirbhūtale kinnarā narāḥ |
dvitīyacaraṇānte ca bhaviṣyantyevameva hi | |4 2
na vivāho na bhūpaśca nodyamo na hi karmakṛt |
bhavitā ca tadā teṣāṃ dvitīyacaraṇāntike | |4 3
sapādalakṣābdamitamadyaprabhṛti bho dvijāḥ |
bhogakelyanvayodbhūtā bhaviṣyanti mahītale | | 44
ato mayā ca sahitā bhavanto munisattamāḥ |
kṛṣṇacaitanyamāgamya gamiṣyāmastadājñayā | | 45
vyāsa uvāca
iti śrutvā tu munayo viśālāpūrnivāsinaḥ |
bho namaste gamiṣyanti yajñāṃśaṃ prati harṣitāḥ | |46
natvā sarve muniśreṣṭhā yajñāṃśaṃ yajñarūpiṇam |
vacanaṃ ca vadiṣyanti dehyājñāṃ bhagavanprabho | | 47
indraloke gamiṣyāmo nākamadhyaṃ manoharam |
iti śrutvā tu yajñāṃśaḥ sarvaśiṣyasamanvitaḥ | |48
taiḥ sarvaiḥ saha svarlokaṃ gamiṣyati surapriyaḥ |
tadā kaliḥ samaṃ daityairbhajiṣyati mahītalam | |
kimanyacchrotumicchā te hṛṣīkottama tadvada | |49
manuruvāca
bhagavanvistarādbrūhi bhogakelicaritrakam |
kalau yathā bhaviṣyanti manujāstattathā prabho | | 3.4.24.50
vyāsa uvāca
bhogasiṃhe kelisiṃhe vāmanāṃśasamudbhave | | 51
jitvā daityānnaramayānnarānvātyodbhavānbhuvi |
vāmanāṃśamupāgamya harṣitāḥ sambabhūvire | | 52
tadā tu duḥkhitā devāstyaktvā mūrtīḥ samantataḥ |
kṛṣṇacaitanyamāgamya natvocurnatakandharāḥ | | 53
bhagavaṃstvatprasādena caraṇaṃ prathamaṃ kaleḥ |
bhuktā tathā mahī svāmiñjitvā vai daityaprapūjakān | | 54
kiṃ kartavyaṃ ca yajñāṃśa namaste karuṇākara |
iti śrutvā hariḥ prāha tadā śṛṇudhvaṃ surasattamāḥ | | 55
ahaṃ svargaṃ gamiṣyāmi bhavadbhiḥ saha harṣitaḥ |
ato yūyaṃ surāḥ sarve devavaṃśānnarānsadā | | 56
utthāpya śīghramāgamya gacchadhvaṃ ca triviṣṭapam |
iti sūtena kathite munīnprati sumaṇḍalam | | 57
devā vimānamādāya tatra yāsyanti bho manaḥ |
sūtādīṃśca munīnsarvānsamāruhya surāstadā | | 58
yajñāṃśaṃ ca gamiṣyanti nadīhopavane tadā |
ahlādaśca tadā yogī gorakhādyāstathaiva ca | | 59
śaṅkarādyāśca rudrāṃśā nṛpo bhartṛharistadā |
anye tu yoganiṣṭhāśca gamiṣyanti hitapradāḥ | | 3.4.24.60
taiḥ sārddhaṃ kṛṣṇacaitanyo devalokaṃ gamiṣyati |
tadā tau vāmanāṃśau ca dvitīyacaraṇe kalau | | 61
yoganiṣṭhāṃ samādhāya kalpakṣetre vasiṣyataḥ |
tadaiva sakalā daityā harṣitāstairnṛbhirmuhuḥ | | 62
vivarānvarddhayiṣyanti pātālādyānsamantataḥ |
kalestutīyacaraṇe samprāpte kinnarāśca te | | 63
śanaiḥśanaiḥ kṣayaṃ bhūmau gamiṣyanti samantataḥ |
ṣaḍviṃśābdasahasre ca tṛtīyacaraṇe gate | | 64
rudrājñayā bhṛṅgaṛṣirbhūtapakṣo gamiṣyati |
saurabhī nāma tatpatnī janiṣyati mahābalān | | 65 kaulakalpānnarānghorānsarvakinnarabhakṣakān |
ṣaḍviṃśābdavayasteṣāṃ bhaviṣyati tadā kalau | | 66
śaraṇaṃ vāmanāṃśaṃ ca gamiṣyanti sakinnarāḥ |
bhogasihaḥ kelisiṃhastaiśca sārddhaṃ mahadraṇam | | 67
kariṣyati daśābdaṃ ca punastaiśca parājitau |
daityaiḥ sārddhaṃ ca pātālaṃ vāmanāṃśo gamiṣyataḥ | | 68
bhṛṅgasṛṣṭirmahāghorā bhaviṣyati tadā kalau |
mātṛ: svasuḥ sutāste vai narāśca paśurūpiṇaḥ | | 69
bhuktvā prītyā ca kāmāndhā janiṣyanti sutānbahūn |
kalestṛtīyacaraṇe samāpte tāstu sṛṣṭayaḥ | | 3.4.24.70
tiryyagyonidharā ghorāḥ kṣayiṣyanti kalau yuge |
kaleścaturthacaraṇe samprāpte tu tadā narāḥ | | 71
viṃśadabdavayaskāśca mariṣyanti ca nārakāḥ |
yathā jalamanuṣyāśca yathaiva vanajā narāḥ | | 72
kandamūlaphalāhārā bhaviṣyanti kalau tadā |
ālokā ye tu vikhyātāstāmisrādyā bhayānakāḥ | | 73
te sarve pūrṇameṣyanti karmabhūmibhavairnaraiḥ |
yathā satyasya prathame caraṇe satyalokakaḥ | | 74
dvitīye ca tapoloke janalokastṛtīyakaḥ |
caturthe svargalokaśca pūritaḥ karmabhūmijaiḥ | | 75
tretāyugādyacaraṇe bhuvarlokaṃ bhuvāspadam |
svargalokaṃ yathā taiśca manujaiḥ pūritaṃ smṛtam | | 76
dvitīye ṛṣilokaṃ ca tṛtīye grahaviṣṭapam |
caturthe ca bhuvarlokaṃ pūritaṃ karmajairnaraiḥ | | 77
dvāparādyapade pūrṇe bhaveddvīpaḥ sa puṣkara |
dvitīye śālmalaḥ krauñcastṛtīye dvīpaśeṣakaḥ | | 78
jambūdvīpaścaturthe ca caraṇe munibhiḥ smṛtaḥ |
kaleśca caraṇe cādyedhaścordhvaṃ pūritaṃ jagat | | 79
dvitīye saptapātālastṛtīye bhūtaviṣṭapam |
pūritaṃ manujaistatra karmabhūmisamudbhavaiḥ | | 3.4.24.80
tadādyanārakāssarve pūrṇameṣyanti tairnaraiḥ |
iti te kathitaṃ sarvaṃ yatpṛṣṭo.ahaṃ mano tvayā | | 81
iti śrībhaviṣye mahāpurāṇe pratisargaparvaṇi caturyugakhaṇḍāparaparyāye
kaliyugīyetihāsasamuccayo nāma caturviṃśo.adhyāyaḥ | 24

atha pañcaviṃśo.adhyāyaḥ
kaliyugīyetihāsasamuccayavarṇanam
vyāsa uvāca
caturthacaraṇe jātairmanujairekaviṃśatiḥ |
ajīrṇabhūtā narakā yāsyanti ca yamālayam | | 1
namaste dharmarājāya naśca tṛptikarāya ca |
vacanaṃ śṛṇu sarvajña naśca jātamajīrṇakam | | 2
yathā bhajāma prakṛtiṃ tathā kuru surottama |
iti śrutvā dharmarājaścitraguptena saṃyutaḥ | | 3
brahmāṇaṃ ca gamiṣyanti sandhyāyāṃ ca kalau yuge |
caturaśca yamāndṛṣṭvā parameṣṭhī pitāmahaḥ | | 4
tadīritaṃ svayaṃ jñātvā kṣīrābdhiṃ prati yāsyati |
pūjayityā jagannāthaṃ devadevaṃ vṛṣākapim | | 5
sāṅkhyaśāstramayaiḥ stotraiḥ saṃstoṣyati param prabhum | | 6
jaya jaya jaya nirguṇa guṇadhārinragajagajīvatattvaśubhakārin |
sārabhūtasadguṇamaya tattvairdevānracayati pāti guṇasattvaiḥ | |
tasmai namo namo guṇarāśe devavṛndahṛdi kṛṣṇavikāśe | | 7
rajobhūtatattvebhya utāśu viracati bhuvi ca narānsvayamāśu |
pāti hanti yo deva udārastasya śirasi saṃsthitajagabhāraḥ | |
pāhi nātha no daityavināśinkālajanitalīlāguṇabhāsin | | 8
teṣāmiti vacanaṃ prabhuḥ śrutvā hyavanimivāśu |
yathā janiṣyati sa prabhustacchṛṇu vai mana āśu | | 9 ? namrībhūtānturānviṣṇurnamovākyena tānprati |
vadiṣyati vaco ramyaṃ lokamaṅgalahetave | | 3.4.25.10
bhoḥ surāḥ sambhalagrāme kaśyapo.ayaṃ janiṣyati |
nāmnā viṣṇuyaśāḥ khyāto viṣṇukīrtistu tatpriyā | | 11
kṛṣṇalīlāmayaṃ granthaṃ narāṃstāñchrāvayiṣyati |
tadā te nandino bhūtvā caikībhūya samantataḥ | | 12
taṃ dvijaṃ viṣṇuyaśasaṃ gṛhītvā nigaḍairdṛḍhaiḥ |
baddhvā sarve sapatnīkaṃ kārāgāre dṛḍhāyase | | 13
kariṣyanti mahādhūrtā nārakā iva dāruṇāḥ |
viṣṇukīrtyā sa bhagavānpūrṇo nārāyaṇo hariḥ | | 14
janiṣyati mahāviṣṇuḥ sarvalokaśivaṅkaraḥ |
niśīthe tamasodbhūte mārgakṛṣṇāṣṭamīdine | | 15
brahmāṇḍaṃ maṅgalaṃ kurvansurāḥ prādurbhaviṣyati |
brahma viṣṇurharaścaiva gaṇeśo vāsavo guruḥ | | 16
vahniḥ pitṛpatiḥ pakṣo varuṇaḥ savibhīṣaṇaḥ |
citro vāyuà¥rdhruvo viśve raviḥ somaḥ kujo budhaḥ | | 17
guruḥ śukraḥ śaniḥ rāhuḥ ketustatra gamiṣyati |
padyaikaikena te devāḥ stoṣyanti parameśvaram | | 18
mahattamā mūrtimayī tavājā tadāsya pūrvājjanitoha.amādau |
mayā tataṃ viśvamidaṃ sadaiva yato namastatpuruṣottamāya | | 19
ajasya yāmyājjanito.ahamādau viṣṇurmahākalpakaro.adhikārī |
svakīyanāmnā tu mayā tataṃ tadviśve sadaivaṃ ca namo namaste | | 3.4.25.20
avyaktapāścātyamukhātsujanmā śivo.ahamādau suratattvakārī |
mayā mahākalpakarastṛtīyā tvadājñayā deva namo namaste | | 21 pradhānavaktrottarato.ahamādau jāto gaṇeśaḥ kila kalpakartā |
mayā tataṃ viśvamidaṃ sadaiva tasmai namaḥ kāruṇikottamāya | | 22 ajārddhavaktrājjanito.ahamādau marunmahākalpakaro mahendraḥ |
mayā tataṃ viśvamidaṃ svakalpe yadājñayā deva namo namaste | | 23 prathānabhālākṣisamudbhavo.ahaṃ vahnermahākalpakaro guhākhyaḥ |
vinirmitaṃ viśvamidaṃ mayā tadyadājñayā nātha namo namaste | | 24 ajāmukhātpūrvagatācca jātaścādau mahākalpakaro.ahamagniḥ |
brahmāṇḍametacca mayā tataṃ vai brahmāṇḍakalpāya namo namaste | | 25 ajābhujāddakṣiṇato.ahamādau jāto mahākalpakakaraḥ sadharmaḥ |
mayā sadevai racitaṃ samagraṃ liṅgākhyakalpāya namo namaste | | 26 ajābhujātpaścimato.ahamādau jāto mahākalpakaraḥ sa yajñaḥ |
mayā tataṃ viśvamidaṃ samagraṃ matsyākhyakalpāya namo namaste | | 27 pradhānabāhūttarato.ahamādau jāto mahākalpakaraḥ pracetāḥ |
mayā tataṃ nātha tavājñayedaṃ karmākhyakalpāya namo namaste | | 28
bahmāṇḍatamaso jātastvaddāso.ahaṃ vibhīṣaṇaḥ |
mayā tataṃ trilokaṃ ca namaste manurūpiṇe | | 29
brahmāṇḍasadguṇājjātaścitto.ahaṃ manukārakaḥ |
mayā tataṃ ca trailokyaṃ svāyambhuva namo.astu te | | 3.4.25.30
brahmāṇḍarajaso jāto vāyurmanvantaraṃ tatam |
mayā svārociṣaṃ svāminnamaste manurūpiṇe | | 31
brahmāṇḍamanaso jāto dhruvo.ahaṃ manukārakaḥ |
mayottamaṃ ca racitaṃ namaste.astu tavājñayā | | 32
brahmāṇḍaśravaṇājjāto viśvakarmāhamīśvaraḥ |
mayā tataṃ raivataṃ ca namo deva tavājñayā | | 33
brahmāṇḍadehato jātassūryo.ahaṃ cākṣuṣapradaḥ |
tavājñayā tataṃ viśvaṃ manurūpāya te namaḥ | | 34
brahmāṇḍanetrato jātaḥ somo.ahaṃ tu mayā tatam |
vaivasvatāntaraṃ ramyaṃ namaste manurūpiṇe | | 35
brahmāṇḍarasanājjāto moho.ahaṃ manukārakaḥ |
namaste manurūpāya mayā sāvarṇikaṃ tatam | | 36
brahmāṇḍaghrāṇato jāto budho.ahaṃ nātha kiṅkaraḥ |
nirmitaṃ brahmasāvarṇaṃ mayā tāta namo namaḥ | | 37
brahmāṇḍavaktrato jāto jīvo.ahaṃ manukārakaḥ |
mayā vai dakṣasāvarṇaṃ tataṃ tatte namo namaḥ | | 38
brahmāṇḍakarato jātaḥ śukrohaṃ tava kiṅkaraḥ |
nirmitaṃ rudrasāvarṇaṃ mayā tubhyaṃ namo namaḥ | | 39
brahmāṇḍapadato jātomando.ahaṃ nātha te.anugaḥ |
tataṃ vai dharmasāvarṇaṃ prabhātesmai namo namaḥ | | 3.4.25.40
brahmāṇḍaliṅgato jāto rāhuścāhaṃ tava priyaḥ |
mayā bhaumaṃ kṛtaṃ nātha namaste manurūpiṇe | | 41
brahmāṇḍaguhyato jātaḥ ketuścāhaṃ tavānugaḥ |
bhautaṃ manvataraṃ sṛṣṭaṃ tasmai devāya te namaḥ | | 42
vyāsa uvāca
iti teṣāṃ stavānsvāmī śrutvā devānvadiṣyati |
varaṃ brūhīti vacanaṃ tataṃ prati manuḥ kramāt | |4 3
iti kṛtvā tu te devā bālarūpaṃ hariṃ svayam |
namaskṛtya vadiṣyanti vāñchitaṃ lokahetave | |
keyaṃ bhavānbrūhi lokānāṃ kalpe kalpe tamudbhavam |
tathā manvantare caiva śrotumicchāmahe vayam | |45
kalkyuvāca
aṣṭādaśa mahākalpāḥ prakṛteśca tanau sthitāḥ |
ādyo brahmamahākalpastatra brahmā paraḥ pumān | |46 tatpūrvārddhātsamudbhūtāstrayastriṃśacca devatāḥ |
parārddhādbhagavānbrahmā yogidhyeyo nirañjanaḥ | |47
tasminkalpe tu yā līlā brahmapaurāṇikaiḥ smṛtā |
śatakoṭipravistāro brahmapaurāṇikasya vai | |48
purāṇapuruṣasyānte mahākalpaḥ smṛto budhaiḥ |
brahmāṇḍapralaye kalpo yugadaivasahasrakaḥ | |4 9
kalpāścāṣṭādaśa khyātāsteṣāṃ nāmāni me śṛṇu |
kūrmakalpo matsya kalpaḥ śvetavārāhakalpakaḥ | | 3.4.25.50
nṛsiṃhakalpaśca tathā tathā vāmanakalpakaḥ |
skandakalpo rāmakalpaḥ kalpo bhāgavatastathā | | 51
tathā mārkaṇḍakalpaśca tathā bhaviṣyakalpakaḥ |
liṅgakalpastathā jñeyastathā brahmāṇḍakalpakaḥ | | 52
agnikalpo vāyukalpaḥ padmakalpastathaiva ca |
śivakalpo viṣṇukalpo brahmakalpastathā kramāt | | 53
dvisahasramitāvartaireṣāṃ kalpo mahānsmṛtaḥ |
sahasrayugaparyantaṃ brahmāṇḍāyuḥ prakīrtitam | | 54
yannāmnā ca smṛtaḥ kalpastasmājjāto virāḍayam ||
caturdaśamanūnāṃ ca madhye kalpaḥ sa kālavān|| 55||
svāyaṃbhuvāṃtare yadvai jāṃtaṃjātaṃ caturyugam||
tasmiṃścaturyuge sarve nṛṇāmāyurhare śṛṇu ||56||
lakṣābdaṃ vai satyayuge tretāyāmayutābdakam ||
dvāpare ca sahasrābdaṃ kalau cāyuśśatābdakam||57||
svārociṣe.antare aiva jātaṃjātaṃ caturyugam ||
śṛṇu tatra nṛṇāmāyussatyeśītisahasrakam || 58 ||
tretāyāṃ ca tadarddhābdaṃ dvāpare tu tadarddhakam ||
kalau dvika sahasrābdaṃ nṛṇāmāyuḥ prakīrtitam || 59 ||
auttamasyāntare caiva satye ṣaṣṭisahasrakam ||
tretāyāṃ ca tadarddhābdaṃ dvāpare tu tadarddhakam ||3.4.25.60||
kalau sārddhasahasrābdaṃ nṛṇāmāyuḥ prakīrtitam ||
tāmasāntarake caiva ṣaṭtriṃśābdasahasrakam || 61 ||
nṛṇāmāyuḥ satyayuge tretāyāṃ ca tadarddhakam ||
dvāpare ca tadarddhābdaṃ kalau varṣasahasrakam || 62 ||
raivatāntarake caiva satye triṃśatsahasrakam ||
tretāyāṃ ca tadarddhābdaṃ dvāpare ca tadarddhakam || 63 ||
kalau cāṣṭaśatābdāyurnṛṇāṃ vedaiḥ prakīrtitam ||
cākṣuṣāntarake caiva satye turyasahasrakam|| 64 ||
tretāyāṃ trisahasrābdaṃ dvāpare dvisahasrakam ||
kalau sahasra varṣāntaṃ nṛṇāmāyuḥ prakīrtitam|| 65 ||
vaivasvatentare caiva satye turyasahasrakam ||
tretāyāṃ triśatābdaṃ ca dvāpare dviśatābdakam || 66 ||
kalau śatābdakaṃ proktamāyurvedaistathā nṛṇām ||
sāvarṇike.antare deva nṛṇāṃ viṃśatsahasrakam || 67 ||
āyuḥ satye tadarddhaṃ tu tretāyāṃ ca prakīrtitam ||
dvāpare ca tadarddhābdaṃ tadarddhābdaṃ tu vai kalau || 68 ||
brahmasāvarṇike caiva satye daśasahasrakam ||
tretāyāṃ ca tadarddhābdaṃ dvāpare tu tadarddhakam || || 69 ||
kalau caiva tadarddhābdaṃ nṛṇāmāyuḥ prakīrtitam||
dakṣasāvarṇike caiva tathābdāyuścaturyuge || 3.4.25.70 ||
rudrasāvarṇike caiva satye cāṣṭasahasrakam ||
tretāyāṃ tadarddhābdaṃ dvāpare ca tadarddhakam || 71 ||
kalau tadarddhakaṃ jñeyaṃ nṛṇāmāyuḥ purātane ||
dharmasāvarṇike caiva tathābdāyuścaturyuge || 72 ||
bhauma manvaṃtare caiva satye turyasahasrakam ||
tretāyāṃ trisahasrābdaṃ dvāpare ca tadarddhakam || 73 ||
kalau tadarddhakaṃ jñeyaṃ narāyuścārṣasammatam ||
bhautamanvaṃtare caiva satye turyaśatābdakam|| 74 ||
tretāyāṃ triśatābdaṃ ca dvāpare tu tadarddhakam ||
tadarddhakaṃ kalau ghore nṛṇāmāyuḥ prakīrtitam || 75 ||
manvaṃtare tu yannāmnā bhūpāścāsaṃścaturyuge ||
tannāmnā ca nṛpā jātāsteṣāṃ līlāḥ pṛthakpṛthak || 76 ||
evamanyatra vai jñeyaṃ yuge turye manau manau ||
yo manustasya vaṃśāśca divyaikayugasaptatau || 77 ||
yugāṃte karmabhūmeśca layaḥ kalpaḥ sa vai smṛtaḥ ||
manvante sarvabhūmeśca pralayaḥ sa ca kalpakaḥ || 78 ||
purāṇa puruṣasyaiva dinānte pralayo hi yaḥ ||
mukhyakalpaḥ sa vai jñeyaḥ sarvalokavināśakaḥ || 79 ||
ṣaḍviṃśatkalpasāhasrairmahākalpo hi yaḥ smṛtaḥ ||
yadā purāṇapuruṣo meṣarāśau samāsthitaḥ ||3.4.25.80||
tadā brahmā suraiḥ sārddhaṃ bhūpaṃ svāyaṃbhuvaṃ gataḥ ||
yadā purāṇapuruṣo makare ca samāgataḥ ||81||
svāyaṃbhuvamanormadhye vārāho.abhūtsa vai bhuvi ||
yadā purāṇapuruṣo gataḥ siṃhe svakecchayā || 82 ||
svārociṣamanorante nṛsiṃho.abhūtsa vai bhuvi ||
yadā purāṇapuruṣo vṛṣarāśau samāsthitaḥ || 83 ||
tadauttamamanormadhye rudro.abhūtsagaṇo bhuvi ||
yadā purāṇapuruṣo mīnarāśau samāsthitaḥ || 84 ||
tāmasānte.abhavanmatsyaḥ sa vai bhuvi sanātanaḥ ||
yadā purāṇapuruṣo yugmarāśau samāsthitaḥ || 85 ||
vaivasvatamanormadhye kṛṣṇobhūdbhuvi sa prabhuḥ ||
yadā purāṇapuruṣaḥ karkarāśau samāsthitaḥ || 86 ||
raivatānte.abhavatkūrmaḥ sa vai bhuvi sanātanaḥ ||
yadā purāṇapuruṣaḥ kanyārāśau samāsthitaḥ || 87 ||
cākṣuṣānte jāmadagnyo.abhavadrāmaḥ sa vai bhuvi ||
yadā purāṇapuruṣaḥ prāpto.alau ca svakecchayā || 88 ||
vaivasvatamanorādau vāmano.abhūtsa vai bhuvi ||
yadā purāṇapuruṣastulārāśau samāsthitaḥ || 89 ||
vaivasvatamanormadhye kalkī nāmnāhamāgataḥ ||
yadā purāṇapuruṣaḥ kumbharāśau samāsthitaḥ ||3.4.25.90||
sāvarṇikādau bhavitā buddho nāmnā sa vai bhuvi ||
yadā purāṇapuruṣo dhanurāśau samāsthitaḥ || 91 ||
vaivasvatamanormadhye rāmo dāśarathirbhuvi ||
yadā purāṇapuruṣo nakrarāśau samāsthitaḥ || 92 ||
sarvapūjyāvatāraśca na bhavedvai kadācana ||
asmiṃścaturyuge devāḥ purāṇapuruṣasya hi || 93 ||
trayo.avatārāḥ kathitāstathā nānyaccaturyuge ||
tretāyāḥ prathame pāde rāmo dāśarathiḥ prabhuḥ || 94 ||
dvāparasya tathā kṛṣṇaḥ śeṣeṇa saha vai bhuvi||
kaleśśeṣe tathāhaṃ vai dvātriṃśābdasahasrake || 95 ||
ataḥ khaṃḍaḥ pavitro.ayaṃ nṛṇāṃ pātakanāśanaḥ ||
imaṃ caturyugaṃ khaṇḍaṃ yaḥ paṭhecchrāvayecca yaḥ || 96 ||
janma prabhṛti pāpāni tasya naśyaṃti nānyathā ||
iti vaḥ kathitaṃ devā mahākalpacaritrakam || 97||
dvitīyo yo mahākalpo viṣṇukalpaḥ sa vai smṛtaḥ ||
tatkathā paṭhitā devā viṣṇupaurāṇikairnaraiḥ || 98 ||
śatakoṭipravistāro viṣṇupaurāṇikasya vai ||
tatraiva ca mahākalpo viṣṇornābhisamudbhavaḥ || || 99 ||
pūrvārddhādbhagavānbrahmā ṣarvadevasamanvitaḥ ||
parārddhādbhagavānviṣṇuḥ purāṇapuruṣaḥ sa vai || 3.4.25.100 ||
tṛtīyo yo mahākalpaḥ śivakalpaḥ sa vai smṛtaḥ ||
śivapūrvārddhato jāto viṣṇustasmādvidhiḥ svayam || 101 ||
śatakoṭipravistāraḥ śivapaurāṇikaiḥ smṛtaḥ ||
caturtho yo mahākalpaḥ padma kalpaḥ sa vai smṛtaḥ || 102 ||
gaṇeśastatra bhagavānpurāṇapuruṣāsane ||
gaṇeśādabhavadrudro rudrādviṣṇuḥ surottamaḥ || 103 ||
viṣṇornābhisamudbhūtaḥ parameṣṭhī pitāmahaḥ ||
kalpekalpe kramādādau devāścāsansamaṃtataḥ ||104||
paṃcamo yo mahākalpo vāyukalpaḥ sa vai smṛtaḥ ||
maheṃdrastatra bhagavānpurāṇa puruṣāsane || 105 ||
mahendrādabhavatprāpto maheṃdrādiṃdriyāṇi ca ||
indriyebhyaśca taddevāsteṣāṃ nāmāni me śṛṇu ||106||
śanirbudho raviḥ śukro viśva karmā bṛhaspatiḥ ||
indro viṣṇustathā brahmā rudraḥ somaḥ kramātsmṛtāḥ ||107||
sṛṣṭikartā sa vai brahmā liṅgendriyasamudbhavaḥ |
sṛṣṭipātā sa vai viṣṇuravatāripadodbhavaḥ | | 108
caturviṃśatitattveṣu kalpekalpe prabhurgataḥ |
sanatkumāro haṃsaśca vārāho nāradastathā | | 109
nārāyaṇau ca kapilātreyau yajñāśvakaṇṭakau |
vṛṣabhaśca pṛthurmatsyaḥ kūrmo dhanvantaristathā | | 3.4.25.110
mohinī ca nṛsiṃhaśca vāmano bhārgavastathā |
rāmo vyāso balaḥ kṛṣṇo buddhaḥ kalkī svatattvagaḥ | | 111
guhyajanmā mahādevaḥ sṛṣṭidaityavināśakaḥ |
evaṃ jātāstrayo devā mahākalpe ca pañcame | | 112
ṣaṣṭho yastu mahākalpo vahnikalpaḥ sa vai smṛtaḥ |
skandastatraiva bhagavānpurāṇapuruṣāsane | | 113
puruṣāvyayataḥ skannaḥ skandastasmānmahārcimān |
sūryarūpā mahārciryā tasyāṃ jāto hariḥ svayam | | 114
vahnirūpā mahārciryā tasyāṃ jātaḥ pitāmahaḥ |
candrarūpā mahārciryā tasyāṃ jātaḥ sa vai haraḥ | | 115
ṛṣayo munayo varṇā lokā jātāḥ pitāmahāt |
ādityā viśvavasavastuṣitā bhāsvarānilāḥ | | 116
mahārājikasādhyāśca devā viṣṇusamudbhavāḥ |
yakṣarākṣasagandharvāḥ piśācāḥ kinnarādayaḥ | | 117
daityāśca dānavā bhūtāstāmasā rudrasambhavāḥ |
kalpe kalpe samudbhūtamevaṃ brahmāṇḍagocare | | 118
saptamo yo mahākalpaḥ sa vai brahmāṇḍakalpakaḥ |
pāvakastatra bhagavānpurāṇapuruṣāsane | | 119 acintyatejasastasmātpuruṣādvahnirudbhavaḥ |
tato jāto mahābdhiśca tasmājjātaṃ virāṇmayam | | 3.4.25.120
romṇi romṇi tatastasya brahmāṇḍāḥ koṭiśo.abhavan |
brahmāṇḍādabhavadbrahmā sarvalokapitāmahaḥ | | 121
tasmājjāto vibhurviṣṇustasmājjāto haraḥ svayam |
śatakoṭipravistāro brahmāṇḍākhyapurāṇake | | 122
trinetraṃ pañcavaktraṃ ca daśabāhurbhavasya ca |
aṣṭādaśānāṃ kalpānāṃ vāyurvai vaidikaiḥ smṛtaḥ | | 123
mahākalpe.abhavansarve dvisahasrāḥ kṣayaṃ gatāḥ |
aṣṭamo yo mahākalpo liṅgakalpaḥ sa vai smṛtaḥ | | 124
tatraiva bhagavāndharmaḥ purāṇapuruṣāsane |
acintyāvyaktarūpaśca jāto dharmaḥ sanātanaḥ | | 125
dharmātkāmaḥ samudbhūtaḥ kāmālliṅgastridhābhavat |
puṃlliṅgaḥ klībaliṅgaśca strīliṅgaśca surottama | | 126
pu~mlliṅgādabhavadviṣṇuḥ strīliṅgācca mahendirā |
klībaliṅgātsa vai śeṣastasyopari sa ca sthitaḥ | | 127
tribhyastamomayebhyaśca jātamekārṇavaṃ jagat |
supte nārāyaṇe deve nābheḥ paṅkajamuttamam | | 128
jātaṃ tasmātsa vai brahmā tasmājjāto virāḍayam |
śatakoṭipravistārairliṅgapaurāṇikaiḥ kathā | | 129
gītā caiva vidheragre tasya sāro.ayamuttamaḥ |
navamo yo mahākalpo matsyakalpaḥ sa vai smṛtaḥ | | 3.4.25.130
kuberastatra bhagavānpurāṇapuruṣāsane |
avyayācca samudbhūto dhūlivṛndo mahāṃstathā | | 131
rajobhūtācca tasmācca kuberasya samudbhavaḥ |
kuberādudbhavanmatsyo vedamūrtiśca sadguṇaḥ | | 132
matsyodarātsamudbhūto viṣṇurnārāyaṇo hariḥ |
viṣṇornābheḥ samudbhūto brahmā lokapitāmahaḥ | | 133
brahmaṇaścodbhavaṃ daivaṃ daivāddevā babhūvire |
caturviṃśatitattvāni tairdevairjanitāni vai | | 134
kalpekalpe kramādevaṃ kalpanāmānyakārayat |
matsyakalpe tu matsyaśca mahāmatsyātsamudbhavaḥ | | 135 tanmatsyādbhagavānviṣṇustato brahmaṇa udbhavaḥ |
kūrmakalpe mahāmatsyātkūrmo jātaḥ sa kacchapaḥ | | 136
kūrmācca bhagavānviṣṇustato brahmā tato virāṭ |
śvetavārāhakalpe ca varāhādviṣṇurudbhavaḥ | | 137
viṣṇornābheśca sa brahmā tato jāto virāḍayam |
evaṃ sarve ca vai kalpā jñeyāḥ sarvatra vai budhaiḥ | | 138
daśamo yo mahākalpaḥ kūrmakalpaḥ sa vai smṛtaḥ |
acetāstatra bhagavānpurāṇapuruṣāsane | | 139
prakṛteśca paro yo vai turīyo.avyaya eva ca |
śūnyabhūtāttato jātaḥ pracetā bhagavānsvayam | | 3.4.25.140
tasmājjāto mahānabdhistatra suṣvāpa sa prabhuḥ |
nārāyaṇa iti khyātaḥ sa vai jalapatiḥ svayam | | 141
tadarddhācca mahākūrmastataḥ śeṣo mahānabhūt |
tridhā.abhavatsa vai śeṣo bhūmā śeṣaśca bhaumanī | | 142
bhūmā sa vai virāḍ jñeyaḥ śeṣopari sa cāsthitaḥ |
bhaumanī ca mahālakṣmīḥ sā bhūmno hṛdi saṃsthitā | | 143
bhūmno jātaḥ sa vai brahmā sṛṣṭisthitivināśakaḥ |
tridhāmūrtiḥ sa vai brahmā kalpekalpe kramādayam || 144
paṭaṃ suṣuptabhūtaṃ yatpurāṇapuruṣāsanam |
yatra gatvendriyāṇyeva tṛptiṃ prāpya kṣayanti vai || 145
ahaṅkārastadāgatya caitanyaṃ manasi sthitam |
vañcayitvā punarlokaṃ karoti sma svalīlayā || 146
turīyaśaktiryā jñeyā mahākālī sanātanī |
mahākalpaśca taiḥ sarvaistadaṅgaṃ śrutibhiḥ smṛtam || 147
namastasyai mahākālyai mama mātre namo namaḥ |
yataḥ purāṇapuruṣā bhavanti ca liyanti ca || 148
daśaiva ca mahākalpā vyatītā iha bhoḥ surāḥ |
sāmprataṃ vartate yo vai mahākalpo bhaviṣyakaḥ || 149
tadutpattiṃ śṛṇudhvaṃ bho devāḥ sarpigaṇā mama |
acintyamakṣaraṃ yattu turīyaṃ ca sadā sthitam || 3.4.25.150
yadgatvā na nivartante narāstatraiva tatpadam |
anekasṛṣṭiracanāḥ santi tasyaiva līlayā || 151
tasyāntaṃ na vidurdevāḥ kathaṃ jānanti vai narāḥ |
bhūto bhūto mahākalpo dṛṣṭo vaidestadīritaḥ || 152
bhāvyā ye tu mahākalpā na vai jānanti te sadā |
trayastriṃśanmahākalpāḥ kaiścidvedairudīritāḥ || 153
aṣṭādaśa mahākalpāḥ pṛthaṅ nāmnopavarṇitāḥ |
ekādaśa mahākalpāḥ kaiścitproktāḥ purātanaiḥ || 154
ato.ahaṃ niścayenādya bhāvyakalpeṣu bhoḥ surāḥ |
vedānāṃ vacanaṃ satyaṃ nānyathā ca bhavetkvacit || 155
tadavyayātsamudbhūto rādhākṛṣṇaḥ sanātanaḥ |
ekībhūtaṃ dvayoraṅgaṃ rādhākṛṣṇo budhaiḥ smṛtaḥ || 156
sahasrayugaparyantaṃ yattepe paramaṃ tapaḥ |
tadā sa ca dvidhā jāto rādhākṛṣṇaḥ pṛthakpṛthak || 157
sahasrayugaparyantaṃ tepatustau paraṃ tapaḥ |
tayoraṅgātsamudbhūtā jyotsnā tamanāśinī | | 158
tajyotsnābhiḥ samudbhūtaṃ divyaṃ vṛndāvanaṃ śubham |
ekaviṃśatprakṛtayo yojane yojane smṛtāḥ | | 159
divyaṃ vṛndāvanaṃ jātaṃ caturāśītisammite |
krośāyāmaṃ mahāramyaṃ talliṅgaṃ śṛṇu me prabho | | 3.4.25.160
indriyaprakṛtīnāṃ ca daśānāṃ grāmataddaśa 1 |
gokulaṃ vārṣa nāndaṃ bhāṇḍīraṃ māthuraṃ tathā | | 161
vrajaṃ ca yāmunaṃ mānyaṃ śreyaskaṃ gopikaṃ kramāt |
mātrābhūtadaśabhyaśca prakṛtibhyaḥ samudbhavam | | 162
tathā daśavanaṃ ramyaṃ teṣāṃ nāmāni me śṛṇu |
vṛndāvanaṃ gopavanaṃ bahulāvanameva ca | | 163
madhuśṛṅgaṃ kuñjavanaṃ vanaṃ dadhivanaṃ tathā |
rahaḥ krīḍāvanaṃ ramyaṃ veṇupadmavanaṃ kramāt | | 164
manasaḥ prakṛterjāto girirgovarddhano mahān |
divyaṃ vṛndāvanaṃ dṛṣṭvā paramānandamāpa saḥ | | 165
kṛṣṇādudabhavangopāstisraḥ koṭyo guṇātmakāḥ |
śrīdāmādyāḥ sātvikāśca rājasā arjunādayaḥ | | 166
kaṃsādyāstāmasā jātā divyalīlāprakāriṇaḥ |
rādhāṅgādudbhavā gopyastisraḥ koṭyastathā kramāt | | 167
lalitādyāḥ sāttvikāśca kubjādyā rājasāstathā |
tāmasāḥ pūtanādyāśca nānāhelācaritrakāḥ | | 168
sahasrayugaparyantaṃ teṣāṃ līlā babhūva ha |
tatastau tānsamāhṛtya tepatuśca punastapaḥ | | 169
dvidhā jātaḥ sa vai kṛṣṇo rādhā devī tathā dvidhā |
sahasraśīrṣā puruṣaḥ sahasrākṣaḥ sahasrapāt | | 3.4.25.170
pūrvārddhātsa ca vai jātaḥ parārddhātkṛṣṇa eva hi |
ekaśīrṣā trinetrā ca dvipadī dvisahasrikā | | 171
pūrvārdhātsā tu vai jātā rādhā devī parārddhataḥ |
puruṣaḥ prakṛtiścobhau tepatuḥ paramaṃ tapaḥ | | 172
sahasrayugaparyyantaṃ divye vṛndāvane śubhe |
tapasā vavṛdhāte tau nāmnānanto hyanantakaḥ | | 173
ekībhūtau tu tatpaścātsaṃsthitau maithunecchayā |
tadaṅkaromakūpeṣu brahmāṇḍāḥ koṭiśo.abhavan | | 174
koṭyarddhayojanāyāmāste tu sarve pṛthakpṛthak |
hṛdi romasamudbhūto brahmāṇḍo.ayaṃ ca bhoḥ surāḥ | | 175
brahmāṇḍādudbhavo brahmā padmapuṣpe samāsthitaḥ |
sa padmo yojanāyāmo bhūmimaṇḍalasaṃsthitaḥ | | 176
yato jātaṃ vidheḥ padmaṃ tadvai padmasarovaram |
prasiddhaṃ puṣkarakṣetraṃ tatpadmasarasaṃ surāḥ | | 177
vismitaḥ sa tadā brahmā nararūpaścaturmukhaḥ |
nāle nāle gatosau vai divyaṃ jātaṃ śataṃ samāḥ | | 178
nāntaṃ jagāma padmasya punarbrahmā sa cāgataḥ |
māyayā mohitastatra ruroda bahudhā tadā | | 179
rodanādrudra utpannaḥ sa ca tatkṣemakārakaḥ |
kiṃ rodiṣi mahābhāga tvadīśo hṛdaye tava | | 3.4.25.180
iti śrutvā vacastasya brahmā lokapitāmahaḥ |
samādhibhūto hṛdaye ciraṃ tepe svakecchayā | | 181
divyavarṣaśatābde tu prādurbhūto hariḥ svayam |
vacanaṃ prāha bhagavānmeghagambhīrayā girā | | 182
karmabhūmiriyaṃ brahmañjīvāntā jīvakāriṇī |
sahasrayojanāyāṃ tu viśvasminbhūmimaṇḍale | | 183
himādriruttare tasyāḥ pūrve.abdhiśca mahodadhiḥ |
ratnākaraḥ paścime.abdhirdakṣiṇe vaḍavābdhikaḥ | | 184
ataḥ sarve bhaviṣyanti lokāścorddhvaṃ tathā hyadhaḥ |
karmabhūmermadhyabhūtaḥ puṣkaro.ayaṃ sanātanaḥ | | 185
matto vedānbhavānprāpya kariṣyati makhaṃ śubham |
yajñāddevā bhaviṣyanti tridhābhūtā guṇatrayāt | | 186
siddhā vidyādharāścaiva cāraṇāḥ sāttvikāstridhā |
gandharvayakṣarakṣāṃsi rājasā girisaṃsthitāḥ | | 187
piśācaguhyakā bhūtāstāmasā gāmino hyadhaḥ |
tathā svadhāmayā yajñāstridhā pitṛgaṇā vidhe | | 188
bhaviṣyanti surai ramyā vimānasadṛśāśca khe |
khecarā gauravarṇāśca śyāmāste sāttvikāḥ smṛtāḥ | | 189
giridvīpamayā ramyāḥ sarorūpāśca rājasāḥ |
bhūcarāste bhaviṣyanti tridhā pitṛgaṇā vidhe | | 3.4.25.190
biletalamayā ye tu nārakā yātanāmayāḥ |
tāmasāste bhaviṣyanti pitaro.adhomahītale | | 191
vyayabhūtāśca te lokā vṛddhā madhyāḥ kṣayāḥ kramāt |
iyaṃ bhūmirmahābhāgā sarvadā ca sanātanī | | 192
merurvai ca nameruśca dvīpāścāsaṃstathā na hi |
ilāvartādikhaṇḍāśca santi naiva kvacitkvacit | | 193
ye tu tārāmayā lokā vimānasadṛśā vidhe |
svecchayā ca kariṣyanti rakṣitā yajñakarmaṇā | | 194
yajño nāsti yadā bhūmau tadā te bhagaṇā vidhe |
vighnabhūtāścariṣyanti nityavakrāticāriṇaḥ | 195
karmabhūmiśca gaurjñeyā śrutirūpā jaganmayī |
yastāṃ pāti ca bho brahmansa gopa iti viśrutaḥ | | 196
gopaśaktiḥ sa vai gopo gopānāmarcako hariḥ |
koṭikoṭisahasrāśca sarva gopā hareḥ kalāḥ | | 197
tāvantaścaiva brahmāṇḍā gopanāmnā prakīrtitāḥ |
karmabhūmestathordhvaṃ ca raviryojanalakṣakaḥ | | 198
tataśśaśī tathāmānastataścordhvaṃ bhamaṇḍalam |
dvilakṣayojanagatastato bhaumastathāvidhaḥ | | 199
bhaumādbudhastathā jñeyo budhācca bṛhatāṃpatiḥ |
guroḥ śukrastathāmānaḥ śukrātsauristathāgataḥ | | 3.4.25.200
śanerāhustathā jñeyo rāhoḥ ketustathordhvagaḥ |
saptalakṣamitaṃ jñeyaṃ ketoḥ saptarṣimaṇḍalam | | 201
lakṣaikādaśagāḥ sarve tataścordhvaṃ dhruvāspadam |
lakṣayojanagaṃ caiva tataścordhvaṃ mahatpadam | | 202
lakṣayojanagaṃ jñeyaṃ tataścordhvaṃ janāspadam |
lakṣayojanagaṃ jñeyaṃ tadūrdhvaṃ tapasaḥ sthalam | | 203
evaṃ ca karmabhūmeśca tapaḥ koṭyardhayojanam |
karmabhūmeradhaścaiva pātālāḥ sapta cāntarāḥ | | 204
lakṣayojanagā jñeyāstataścādhogatāśca ye |
narakāśca kramājjeyā bhūmeḥ koṭyarddhayojanāḥ | | 205
karmabhūmeruttare ca khaṇḍānyaṣṭau tataḥ param |
lavaṇābdhistato dvīpastataḥ kṣīrābdhireva hi | |
tato dvīpastataḥ sindhustato dvīpastato.abdhikaḥ | | 206
koṭyarddhalakṣavyānena yojanena vidhe svayam | | 207
karmabhūmeḥ sa vai jñeyo lokālokā mahācalaḥ |
lokāloko dakṣiṇe ca paścime ca sa vai giriḥ | | 208
pūrve ca karmabhūmeśca lokālokastathāvidhaḥ |
eteṣāṃ samudāyānāṃ brahmāṇḍo.ayaṃ prakīrtitaḥ | | 209
tvatto bhaviṣyati vidhe kalpaparyantameva hi |
omityekākṣaraṃ brahma tato viṣṇustridhābhavat | | 3.4.25.210
adya viṣṇuḥ sa vai kṛṣṇa iha viṣṇuḥ sa vai virāṭ |
iti viṣṇuḥ sa vai jñeyaḥ purāṇapuruṣottamaḥ | | 211
purāṇapuruṣo jñeya ādibrahmā cirāyugaḥ |
daive yugasahasre dve.ahorātraṃ tasya kīrtitam | | 212
viṣṇostu romakūpeṣu brahmāṇḍāḥ koṭiśo.abhavan |
adya viṣṇurahaṃ brahmanvighnahā tava bhūtale | | 213
ityuktavāntardadhe viṣṇurbrahmā sṛṣṭimacīkarat |
tena proktaṃ yato bhāvyaṃ mahākalpo hi sa smṛtaḥ | | 214
bhaviṣyo nāma vikhyāto dvisahasrabhavāyuṣā |
pūrvārddhaśca kūparārddhaśca purāṇapuruṣasya hiḥ | | 215
aṣṭādaśasahasrāṇi kalpāḥ pūrvārddhake gatāḥ |
parārddhaḥ sāmprataṃ jñeyo jātaṃ tasya dinadvayam | | 216
adyāhaṃ kūrmakaścaiva vāhane matsyaḥ prakīrtitaḥ |
tṛtīyaḥ śvetavārāho divasastasya kalpavān | | 217
tathā madhyāhnakālo hi sāmprataṃ vartate surāḥ |
bhaviṣyākhye mahākalpe kathā bhāviṣyakairjanaiḥ | | 218
kathitā brahmaṇaścāgre śatakoṭipravistaraiḥ |
daśalakṣaṇasaṃyuktaṃ śatakoṭipravistaram | | 219
mahāpurāṇa kathitaṃ purāṇaṃ pañcalakṣaṇam |
padyatriṃśatsahasraṃ ca kalpe kalpe prakīrtitam | | 3.4.25.220
kalpanāmnā purāṇaṃ ca mahādevena nirmitam |
aṣṭādaśapurāṇāni nirmitāni śivātmanā | | 221
dvāparānte ca bhagavānvyāsaḥ satyavatīsutaḥ |
tānyeva janayāmāsa lokamaṅgalahetave | | 222
vyāsa uvāca
iti kalkivacaḥ śrutvā te devā vismayānvitāḥ |
namaskṛtya gamiṣyanti svaṃ svaṃ dhāma praharṣitāḥ | | 223
iti śrībhaviṣye mahāpurāṇe pratisargaparvaṇi caturyugakhaṇḍāparaparyāye
kaliyugīyetihāsasamuccayavarṇanaṃ nāma pañcaviṃśo.adhyāyaḥ | 25

atha ṣaḍviṃśo.adhyāyaḥ
kaliyugīyetihāsasamuccayavarṇanam
vyāsa uvāca
tadā sa bhagavānkalkiḥ purāṇapuruṣodbhavaḥ |
divyaṃ vājinamāruhya khaḍgī varmī ca carmadhṛk | |
mlecchāṃstāndaityabhūtāṃśca hatvā yogaṃ gamiṣyati | | 1
ṣoḍaśābdasahasrāṇi tadyogāgnipratāpitā |
bhasmabhūtā karmabhūmirnirjīvā bhavitā tadā | | 2
tato.anuyogaṃ janito megho bhūtvā layaṅkaraḥ |
pralayāgreṇa sā bhūmirjalamadhye gamiṣyati | | 3
tadā kaliyugo ghoro balipārśvaṃ gamiṣyati |
gate kaliyuge ghore karmabhūmiṃ punarhariḥ | |
kṛtvā sthalamayīṃ ramyāṃ yajñairdevānyajiṣyati | | 4
yajñabhāgamupādāya devāste balasaṃyutāḥ |
vaivasvataṃ manuṃ gatvā kathayiṣyanti kāraṇam | | 5
kalkino vadanājjāto brāhmaṇo varṇa eva hi |
bāhvoḥ kṣatraṃ viśo jānvoḥ śūdro varṇastadaṅghrayoḥ | | 6
gauro raktastathā pītaḥ śyāmaste brāhmaṇādayaḥ |
devyāḥ śaktiṃ samādāya janiṣyanti sutānbahūn | | 7
ekaviṃśatkiṣkumitā manujā dharmarūpiṇaḥ |
jātidharmamupādāya yajiṣyaṃti surānmudā | | 8
tadā vaivasvato dhīmānnatvā taṃ kalkinaṃ harim |
ayodhyāyāṃ rājapadaṃ kariṣyati tadājñayā | | 9
tacchikṣāto bhavetputro yaḥ sa ikṣvākureva hi |
pitū rājyaṃ puraskṛtya bhūmau divyaṃ śataṃ samāḥ | |
divyavarṣaśatāyuśca tyaktvā dehaṃ gamiṣyati | | 3.4.26.10
yadā tu bhagavānkalkī brahmasūtraṃ kariṣyati |
tadā vedāśca catvāro mūrtimantaśca sāṅgaḥkāḥ | |
aṣṭādaśapurāṇaiśca tatrāyāsyanti harṣitāḥ | | 11
stoṣyanti kalkinaṃ devaṃ purāṇapuruṣāṃśakam |
kārttike śuklapakṣe ca navamyāṃ guruvāsare | | 12
yajñakuṇḍācca puruṣo bhaviṣyati mahottamaḥ |
nāmnā satyayugo jñeyaḥ satya mārgapradarśakaḥ | | 13
dṛṣṭavā taṃ puruṣaṃ ramyaṃ tadā brahmādayaḥ surāḥ |
tāṃ tithiṃ varṇayiṣyanti karmakṣayakarīṃ manoḥ | | 14
asyāṃ tithau ca manujo dhātṛvṛkṣataṭe mudā |
yo.arcayiṣyati yāndevāndevāste tasya vaśyagāḥ | | 15
akṣayā navamī nāma yugādinavamī hi sā |
lokamaṅgaladātrī ca sarvakilviṣanāśinī | | 16
dhātṛmūlatale caiva mālatīṃ tulasīṃ mudā |
saṃsthāpya vedavidhinā śālagrāmaṃ yajanti ye | |
jīvanmuktāśca te jñeyā pitṛrṇāṃ tṛptikārakāḥ | | 17
dhātṛvṛkṣatale gatvā yo vai śrāddhaṃ kariṣyati |
gayāśrāddhasahasrasya lapsyate ca phalaṃ param | | 18
yaḥ karoti tathā homaṃ sahasramakhasannibham |
mṛtaḥ sa svargamāpnoti sakulaḥ saparicchadaḥ | | 19
ityukte vacane teṣāṃ kalkī devo mudānvitaḥ |
tathāstvityeva vacanaṃ vadiṣyati surānprati | | 3.4.26.20
ityuktvā bhagavānkalkī paśyatāṃ devarūpiṇām |
tatraivāntargato bhūtvā suṣuptaśca bhaviṣyati | | 21
gate tasminbhagavati karmabhūmiḥ suduḥkhitā |
virahāgnimatī bhūtvā bījāṃstānsaṃkṣayiṣyati | | 22
tasminkāle mahādaityāḥ pātālatalavāsinaḥ |
prahlādaṃ ca puraskṛtya gamiṣyanti surānprati | | 23 kharoṣṭragṛddhramahiṣakākakarkasamāsthitāḥ |
siṃhavyāghravṛkārūḍhāḥ śṛgālaśyenavāhanaḥ | | 24
prāsapaṭṭiśakhaḍgāṃśca bhuśuṇḍīparighādikān |
gṛhītvā vegavantaste garjiṣyanti punaḥ punaḥ | | 25
tadā śakrādayo devāstrayastriṃśadgaṇā mudā |
svāyudhāni gṛhītvāśu kariṣyanti raṇaṃ mahat | | 26
divyavarṣamayaṃ ghoraṃ yuddhaṃ teṣāṃ bhaviṣyati |
mṛtānmṛtānraṇe daityānbhārgavo jīvayiṣyati | | 27
śramabhūtāstathā devāstyaktvā yuddhaṃ samantataḥ |
kṣīrābdhiṃ ca gamiṣyanti yatra sākṣādhariḥ svayam | | 28
teṣāṃ stutyā sa bhagavāndevamaṅgalahetave |
svapūrvārddha svarūpaṃ ca kariṣyati sanātanaḥ | | 29
sa ca haṃso hariḥ sākṣācchatasūryasamaprabhaḥ |
śukraṃ prahlādapramukhāṃstejasā tāpayiṣyati | | 3.4.26.30
tadā parājitā daityāstyaktvā gāṃ duḥkhitā bhṛśam |
vitale ca gamiṣyanti mahādevena rakṣitāḥ | | 31
punaste sakalā devā nirbhayā nirupadravāḥ |
vaivasvatasya tanayaṃ cābhiṣekṣyanti bhūpade | | 32
divyavarṣaśatāyuśca sa ikṣvākurbhaviṣyati |
varṣāṇāṃ ca pramāṇena nṛṇāmāyuścatuśśatam | | 33
iti te kathitaṃ sarvaṃ yatpṛṣṭo.ahaṃ mano tvayā |
caturyugānāṃ caritaṃ nṛpāṇāṃ ca pṛthak pṛthak | | 34
catuṣpādā hi dharmasya jñānaṃ dhyānaṃ śamo damaḥ |
ātmajñānaṃ sa vai jñānaṃ dhyānamadhyātmacintanam | |
manaḥ sthiratvaṃ ca śamo damastvindriyanigrahaḥ | | 35
caturlakṣābdakānyeva dvātriṃśacca sahasrakam |
tatsaṅkhyayā hi dharmasya pādaścaikaḥ prakīrtitaḥ | | 36
prāhṇamadhyāhnasāyāhnaṃ trisandhyaṃ ca bhavetsadā |
ekaikena padā tasya virājo bhuvi vartate | | 37
yadā dharmo bhavedvṛddhastadāyuścaiva varddhate |
saptaślokasahasrāṇi khaṇḍe.asminkathitāni hi | |
ataścottarakhaṇḍaṃ hi varṇayāmi mano śṛṇu | | 3 8
iti śrībhaviṣye mahāpurāṇe pratisargaparvaṇi caturyugakhaṇḍāparaparyāye
kaliyugīyetihāsasamuccayavarṇanaṃ nāma ṣaḍviṃśo.adhyāyaḥ | 26
