iti śrībhaviṣye mahāpurāṇe tṛtīyaṃ pratisargaparvacaturyugakhaṇḍāparaparyāyaṃ samāptam | | 3 | |
viṣayānukramaṇikā

iti pratisargaparvasthaviṣayānukramaṇikā || 3 ||

athottaraparvasthaviṣayānukramaṇikā || 4 ||

vyāsāgamanavarṇanam
|| || śrīgaṇeśāya namaḥ ||
|| śrīsarasvatyai namaḥ || ||
oṃ namo bhagavate vāsudevāya || ||
kalyāṇāni dadātu vo gaṇapatiryasminnatuṣṭe sati kṣodīyasyapi karmaṇi prabhavituṃ brahmāpi jihmāyate ||
bheje yaccaraṇāravindamasakṛtsaubhāgyabhāgyodayaistenaiṣā jagati prasiddhimagamaddevendralakṣmī rapi || 1 ||
śaśvatpuṇyahiraṇyagarbharasanāsiṃhāsanādhyāsinī seyaṃ vāgadhidevatā vitaratu śreyāṃsi bhūyāṃsi vaḥ ||
yatpādāmalakomalāṃgulinakha jyotsnābhirudvellitaḥ śabdabrahmasudhāṃbudhirbudhamanasyucchraṃkhalaṃ khelati || 2 ||
namastasmai viśvodayavilayarakṣāprakṛtaye śivāya kleśaughacchidurapad padmapraṇataye || amandasvacchandaprathitapṛthulīlātanubhṛte trivedīvācāmapyapathanijatattvasthitikṛte || 3 || yasya gaṇḍatale bhāti vimalā ṣaṭpa dāvalī ||
akṣamāleva vimalā sa naḥ pāyādgaṇādhipaḥ || 4 ||
oṃ namo vāsudevāya saśārṅgāya saketave ||
sagadāya sacakrāya saśaṃkhāya namo namaḥ || 5 ||
namaḥ śivāya somāya sagaṇāya sasūnave ||
savṛṣāya saśūlāya sakapālāya sendave || 6 ||
śivaṃ dhyātvā hariṃ stutvā praṇamya parame ṣṭhinam ||
citrabhānuṃ ca bhānuṃ ca natvā granthamudīrayet || 7 ||
chatrābhiṣiktaṃ dharmajñaṃ dharmaputraṃ yudhiṣṭhiram ||
draṣṭumabhyāgatā hṛṣṭā vyāsādyāḥ parama rṣayaḥ || 8 ||
mārkaṇḍeyaḥ samāṇḍavyaḥ śāṇḍilyaḥ śākaṭāyanaḥ ||
gautamo gālavo gārgyaḥ śātātapaparāśarau || 9 ||
jāmadagnyo bharadvājo bhṛgu rbhāgurireva ca ||
uttaṃkaḥ śaṃkhalikhitau śaunakaḥ śākaṭāyaniḥ || 4.1.10 ||
pulastyaḥ pulaho dālbhyo bṛhadaśvaḥ salomaśaḥ ||
nāradaḥ parvato jahurapāva suparāvasū || 11 ||
tānṛṣīnāgatāndṛṣṭvā vedavedāṅgapāragān ||
bhaktimānbhrātṛbhiḥ sārddhaṃ kṛṣṇadhaumyapuraḥsaraḥ || 12 ||
yudhiṣṭhiraḥ saṃprahṛṣṭaḥ samutthāyābhivādya ca ||
arghyamācamanaṃ pādyamāsanāni svayaṃ dadau || 13 ||
upaviṣṭeṣu teṣveva tapasviṣu yudhiṣṭhiraḥ ||
vinayāvanato bhūtvā vyāsaṃ vacanamabravīt || 14 ||
bhagavaṃstvatprasādena prāptaṃ rājyaṃ mahanmayā ||
vikramya nihataḥ saṃkhye sānubandhaḥ suyodhanaḥ || 15 ||
sarogasya yathā bhogaḥ prāpto.api na sukhāvahaḥ ||
hatvā jñātīṃstathā rājyaṃ na sukhaṃ pratibhāti me || 16 ||
yatsukhaṃ pāvanaṃ prītirvanamūlaphalāśinām ||
prāpya gāṃ ca hatārātiṃ na tadasti pitāmaha || 17 ||
yo no bandhurgururgoptā sadā śarma ca varma ca ||
sa mayā rājyalobhena bhīṣmaḥ pāpena ghātitaḥ || 18 ||
avivekamahaṃ dhāsye mano me pāpapaṅkilam ||
kṣālayitvā tava girā bahudarśitavāriṇā || 19 ||
saṃśrutāni purāṇāni vedāssāṃgā mayā vibho ||
mamādya dharmasarvasvaṃ prajñādīpena darśaya || 4.1.20 ||
ete sadharmagoptāro munayaḥ samupāgatāḥ ||
pibato netrabhramarairbhavato mukhapaṃkajam ||21||
arthaśāstrāṇi yāvaṃti dharmaśāstrāṇi yāni vai ||
śrutāni sarvaśāstrāṇi bhīṣmādbhāgīrathīsutāt || 22 ||
svargaṃ gate śāntanave bhavānkṛṣṇo.atha yādavaḥ ||
suhṛttvādbandhubhāvācca nānyaḥ śikṣayitā mama || 23 ||
satyaṃ satyavatīsūnurdharmarājāya vakṣyati ||
viśeṣadharmānakhilānmunīnāmaviśeṣataḥ || 24 ||
vyāsa uvāca || ||
yadākhyeyaṃ tadākhyātaṃ mayā bhīṣmeṇa te.anagha ||
mārkaṇḍeyena dhaumyena lomaśena maharṣiṇā || 25 ||
dharmajño hyasi medhāvī guṇavānprā jñasattamaḥ ||
na te.astyaviditaṃ kiñciddharmādharmaviniścaye || 26 ||
pārśvasthite hṛṣīkeśe keśave keśisūdane ||
kasyacitkathane jihvā tatra saṃpari vartate || 27 ||
kartā pālayitā hartā jagatāṃ yo jaganmayaḥ ||
pratyakṣadarśī sarvasya dharmānvakṣyatyasau tava || 28 ||
samādiśyeti kartavyaṃ bhagavānbādarāyaṇaḥ ||
pūjitaḥ pāṇḍutanayairjagāma svatapovanam || 29 ||
svābhāṣya bhāratavidhātari saṃprayāte te kautukākuladhiyo munayaḥ praśāntāḥ ||
kiṃ pṛcchati kṣapitabhāratalokaśokaḥ kiṃ vakṣyatīha bhagavānyaduvaṃśavīraḥ || 4.1.30 ||
iti śrībhaviṣye mahāpurāṇe uttaraparvaṇi vyāsāgamanavarṇanaṃnāma prathamo.adhyāyaḥ || 1 || || cha ||
brahmāṇḍotpattivarṇanam
yudhiṣṭhira uvāca || ||
kasya pratiṣṭhā nirdiṣṭā ko hetuḥ kiṃ parāyaṇam ||
kasminnaitallayaṃ yāti kasmādu tpadyate jagat || 1 ||
kati dvīpāḥ samudrāśca kiyaṃto hi kulācalāḥ ||
kiyatpramāṇamavanerbhuvanāni kiyaṃti ca || 2 ||
|| śrīkṛṣṇa uvāca || ||
paurāṇaścaiva viṣayo yatpṛṣṭo.ahaṃ tvayānagha ||
śruto.anubhūtaśca mayā saṃsāre saratā ciram || 3 ||
ajāya viśvarūpāya nirguṇāya guṇātmane ||
namastasmai bhagavate vāsudevāya vedhase || 4 ||
atra te varṇayiṣyāmi śṛṇu pārtha purātanam ||
yājñavalkyena muninā bhaviṣyaṃ bhāsvatāṃpatiḥ ||
pṛṣṭo yaduttaraṃ prādādṛṣibhyastanmayā śrutam || 5 ||
dhanyaṃ yaśasyamāyuṣyaṃ sarvāśubhavināśanam ||
bhaviṣyottarametatte kathayāmi yudhiṣṭhira || 6 ||
ekātmakaṃ tridaivatyaṃ catuḥpaṃcasulakṣaṇam ||
guṇakālādibhedena sadasatsaṃpradarśitam || 7 ||
eka eva jagadyoniḥ pratiyoniṣu saṃsthitaḥ ||
ekadhā bahudhā caiva dṛśyate jalacandravat || 8 ||
brahmā viṣṇurvṛṣāṃkaśca trayo devāḥ satāṃ matāḥ ||
nāmabhedaiḥ kriyābhedairbhidyaṃte nātmanā svayam|| 9 ||
prakriyā cānuṣaṃgaśca upoddhātastathaiva ca ||
upasaṃhāra ityetaccatuṣpādaṃ prakīrtitam || 4.2.10 ||
tarkaśca pratisargaśca vaṃśo manvantarāṇi ca ||
vaṃśānucaritaṃ caiva purāṇaṃ paṃcalakṣaṇam || 11 ||
eṣa vaktavyaviṣayaḥ sumahānpratibhāti me ||
tathāpyuddeśato vacmi sargaṃ prati tavānagha || 12 ||
mahadādiviśeṣāntaṃ savairūpyaṃ salakṣaṇam ||
pañcapramāṇaṃ ṣaṭkakṣaṃ puruṣādhiṣṭhitaṃ jagat|| 13||
avyaktājjāyate buddhirmahāniti ca sā smṛtā||
ahaṃkārastu mahatastriguṇaḥ sa ca paṭhyate || 14 ||
tanmātrāṇi ca pañcāhurahaṅkārācca sāttvikāt ||
jātāni tebhyo bhūtāni bhūtebhyaḥ sacarācaram || 15 ||
jalamūrtimaye viṣṇau naṣṭe sthāvarajaṃgame ||
bhūtātmakamabhūdaṇḍaṃ mahattadudakeśayam || 16 ||
sṛṣṭyāṃ śaktyā ca nirbhinnaṃ tadaṇḍamabhavaddvidhā ||
bhūkapālamathaikaṃ taddvi tīyamabhavannabhaḥ || 17 ||
ulbaṃ tasyābhavanmerurjarāyuḥ parvatāḥ smṛtāḥ ||
nadyo dhamanyaḥ sañjātāḥ kledaḥ sarvatragaṃ payaḥ || 18 ||
yojanānāṃ sahasrāṇi ṣoḍaśādhaḥ pratiṣṭhita ||
utsedhe caturāśītirdvātriṃśadūrdhvavistṛtaḥ||
bhūmipaṃkajavistīrṇā karṇikā merurucyate || 19 ||
ādityaścādidevatvāttatrābhūttriguṇātmakaḥ ||
prātaḥ prajāpatirasau madhyāhne viṣṇuriṣyate ||
rudro.aparāhṇasamaye sa evaikastridhāmataḥ || 4.2.20 ||
prātaḥ prajāpaterjātā munayo nava mānavāḥ ||
marīciratryaṃgirasau pulastyaḥ pulahaḥ kratuḥ ||
bhṛgurvaśiṣṭha ityaṣṭau nārado navamaḥ smṛtaḥ || 21 ||
nava brahmāṇa ityeṣa purāṇe niścayaḥ smṛtaḥ ||
aṃguṣṭhāddakṣiṇāddakṣaḥ saṃjajñe kamalodbhavāt || 22 ||
vāmā prasūtirudagādaṃguṣṭhāttau ca daṃpatī ||
tābhyāṃ jātāstu tanayā haryaśvāste vināśitāḥ ||
sṛṣṭiṃ prati samudyuktā nāradena mahātmanā ||23||
dakṣaḥ kṣīṇānsutānvīkṣya janayāmāsa kanyakāḥ ||
pañcāśaddaśa vikhyātāḥ satyāyā nāmabhiḥ smṛtāḥ || 24 ||
dadau sa daśa dharmāya kaśyapāya trayodaśa ||
kālasya nayane yuktāḥ saptarviśatimiṃdave || 25 ||
dve prādādbāhuputrāya dve kṛśāśvāya caiva hi ||
rūpayauvanaśālinyaścatasro.ariṣṭanemine || 26 ||
ekāṃ bhṛgorbhavāyaikāṃ prādāttebhyaścarācaraḥ ||
abhavatpuruṣavyāghra bhūtagrāmaścaturvidhaḥ || 27 ||
vairājamatha vaikuṇṭhaṃ kelāsamiti nāmataḥ ||
meroḥ śṛṃgatrayaṃ mūrdhni brahmaviṣṇuśivālayam || 28 ||
prācīdikkramayogena teṣāṃ pārśve puraḥ smṛtāḥ ||
indrādilokapālānāṃ divyaiḥ svarllakṣaṇairyutāḥ || 29 ||
himavānhemakūṭaśca niṣadho merureva ca ||
nīlaḥ śvetastathā śṛṃgī jambūdvīpe kulācalāḥ ||
jambūdvīpapramāṇena sahasraguṇitaṃ śatam || 4.2.30 ||
bhidyate navadhā so.api varṣabhedena bhārata ||
jambūśākakuśakrauñcaśālmagomeda puṣkarāḥ ||
dvīpāḥ sapta samākhyātāḥ samudre saptabhirvṛtāḥ || 31 ||
kṣārakṣīrekṣusurayā dadhnā caiva ghṛtena ca ||
svādūdakena ca bhṛtairdviguṇairdviguṇaista thā ||32||
bhūrloko.atha bhuvarlokaḥ svarmaharjjana ityapi ||
tapaḥ satyaśca kathitāḥ pārtha sapta surālayāḥ || 33 ||
mahātalo bhūmitalaḥ sutalo vitala stataḥ ||
rasātalaśca vijñeyaḥ saptamaśca talātalaḥ ||34||
hiraṇyākṣaprabhṛtayo dānavendrā mahoragāḥ||
vasaṃtyeteṣu kaunteya siddhāśca ṛṣayaśca ye ||35||
svāyaṃbhuvo manuḥ pūrvaṃ tataḥ svārociṣo.abhavat ||
uttamastāmasaścaiva raivataścākṣuṣeti ṣaṭ ||36||
vaivasvato.ayamadhunā vartate manuruttamaḥ ||
yasya putraiḥ prapautraiśca vibhakteyaṃ vasundharā || 37 ||
ādityā vasavo rudrā ekādaśa tathāśvinau ||
uṣastrayaḥ samākhyātā deva vaivasvateṃ.atare || 38 ||
vipracittihiraṇyākhyau daityadānavasattamau ||
tayorvaṃśe tu bahavo daityadānavasattamāḥ || 39 ||
pañcāśadguṇitakoṭiyojanānāṃ mahattayā ||
saptadvīpasamudrāyāḥ pramāṇamavaneḥ smṛtam || 4.2.40 ||
piṇḍena ca sahasrāṇi saptatirjalamadhyataḥ ||
gaurivaiṣā sumahatī bhrājate na ca līyate || 41 ||
lokā lokaḥ parataraḥ parvato.agramahocchrayaḥ ||
dvaitamarthaṃ sa niyato yo.asau ravirucāmapi || 42 ||
naimittikaḥ prākṛtikastathaivātyantiko layaḥ |||
nityaścaturtho vijñeyaḥ kālo nityāpahārakaḥ || 43 ||
utpadyate svayaṃ yasmāttattasminneva līyate ||
rakṣati ca pare puṃsi bhūtānāmeva niścayaḥ || || 44 ||
yathartāvṛtuliṅgāni nānārūpāṇi paryaye ||
dṛśyaṃte tāni tānyeva tathā bhāvā yugādiṣu || 45 ||
pratilīneṣu bhūteṣu vibuddhaḥ sakalaṃ jagat ||
vedaśabdebhya evādau nirmame sa maheśvaraḥ || 46 ||
hiṃsrāhiṃsre mṛdukrūre dharmādharmāvṛtānṛte ||
te taṃ vinā prapadyaṃte punasteṣveva karma su || 47 ||
bhūrdaśaguṇena payasā saṃvṛtā tacca tejasā ||
tejo.anilena nabhasā tadguṇenānilo vṛtaḥ || 48 ||
bhūtādinā tathākāśaṃ bhūtādirmahatāvṛtaḥ||
mahānparivṛtastena puruṣeṇāvināśinā ||49||
evaṃ vidhānāmaṇḍānāṃ sahasrāṇi śatāni ca ||
utpannāni vinaṣṭāni bhāvitāni mahātmanā || 4.2.50 ||
vaikuṇṭhakoṣṭhagatametadaśeṣatāyāṃ khyātaṃ jagatsuranaroragasiddhanaddham ||
paśyaṃti śuddhamunayo bahiraṃtare ca māyā carācaraguroraparaiva kācit || 51 ||
iti śrībhaviṣye mahāpurāṇe uttare parvaṇi brahmāṇḍotpattivarṇanaṃ nāma dvitīyo.adhyāyaḥ || 2 || cha ||
māyādarśanavarṇanam
|| yudhiṣṭhira uvāca ||
kīdṛśī kṛṣṇa sā māyā viṣṇoramitatejasaḥ ||
yayā vyāmohitaṃ yacca jagadetaccarācaram || 1 ||
|| śrīkṛṣṇa uvāca || ||
yena dvīpe purā viṣṇurāste cakragadādharaḥ ||
vāsudevaḥ sagaruḍaḥ sacakraśca śriyā saha || 2 ||
nīlotpaladalaśyāmaḥ kuṃḍalābhyāṃ vibhūṣitaḥ ||
bhrājate mukuṭoddyotakeyūravanamālayā || 3 ||
tasya draṣṭumathābhyāgānnārado munisattamaḥ ||
praṇamya stutibhirddevaṃ prāhedaṃ vismayānvitaḥ || 4 ||
saṃśayaṃ paripṛcchāmi bhagavanvaktumarhasi ||
kā māyā kīdṛśī māyā kiṃrūpā ca kutastathā || 5 ||
tasyā darśaya me rūpaṃ māyāyāḥ puruṣottama ||
yā ca mohayate sarvaṃ trailokyaṃ sacarācaram || 6 ||
ābrahmastaṃbaparyaṃtaṃ sadevāsuramānuṣam ||
vaikuṃṭhaṃ vāsudevaṃ ca prasādaṃ kartumarhasi || 7 ||
evamuktastu muninā devadevo janārdanaḥ ||
prahasyovāca devarṣe na kāryaṃ māyayā tvayā || 8 ||
bhūyo.api mohayāmāsa somagrāheṇa nāradam ||
nāradopi mahārāja provācedaṃ punaḥ punaḥ || 9 ||
māyāṃ darśaya me deva nānyadasti prayojanam ||
athāsau viṣṇurutthāya śvetadvīpaṃ punaryayau || 4.3.10 ||
aḍulyagreṇa saṃgṛhya nāradaṃ muni puṅgavam ||
tato mārgagataścakre ātmānaṃ dvijarūpiṇam || 11 ||
ṛgvedasadṛśaḥ sākṣādviṣṇurbrahmavadāsthitaḥ ||
vṛddhadvijottamavapuḥ saṃśayo nālpako bhavat || 12 ||
śikhī kamaṃḍaludhṛto mṛgacarmopavītakaḥ ||
yajñaśarmeti saṃjñāṃ ca cakre.asāvātmanaḥ prabhuḥ || 13 ||
kṛtvāpi kuśataṃtvagrapavitrakṛta lakṣaṇam||
āyayau sa mahīpṛṣṭhe jambūdvīpaṃ cacāra ha || 14 ||
vaidiśaṃ nāma nagaraṃ vetravatyāstaṭe śubham ||
tasminsadodyamaparo dhanadhānyasa mṛddhimān || 15 ||
gomahiṣyajasaṃpūrṇaṃ pāśupālyena saṃsthitaḥ ||
halakarmavṛṣāsakto vaiśyajātiraniṃditaḥ || 16 ||
gṛhakarmaṇi tanniṣṭhaḥ sīrabhadra iti smṛtaḥ ||
tasyāṃtike hariḥ sākṣānnāradena sahāgataḥ || 17 ||
tenāpyāsanasanmānaiḥ samarthena kṛtādarau ||
proktaṃ kenātha kiṃ tubhyaṃ sādhyamannaṃ na sādhyate || 18 ||
na vāsmadīyaṃ yuṣmākaṃ rocatennaṃ tato hariḥ ||
prahasya pradadau tasmai varaṃ dvijavaro mahat || 19 ||
unnāmya vaktraṃ covāca devasaṃstutayā girā ||
saṃtu te bahavaḥ putrāḥ kṣetravyāpārabuddhayaḥ || 4.3.20 ||
paśupāśagṛhāsaktāḥ śatārddhabalavāhanāḥ ||
teṣāṃ putrāśca pautrāśca kṛṣi vṛddhipravarddhakāḥ || 21 ||
tvañca vṛttiśatairnnityaṃ varddhasva svajanāvṛtaḥ ||
ityuktvā sa jagannātho vāsudevaḥ sanāradaḥ || 22 ||
kṣetre gosvāmināmānaṃ dvijaṃ dadṛśatuśca tau||
daridraṃ halakarmārttaṃ methyādyopaskarārditam || 23 ||
bhāgīrathyāstaṭe ramye veṇikāgrāmasannidhau ||
tṛṇagulmalatācchannakṣetre ciṃtākulo hi saḥ || 24 ||
tābhyāṃ saṃprārthito vipro bhojyaṃ prādācca kiṃcana ||
sakāśaṃ tava saṃprāptau dūrādatithidharmiṇau || 25 ||
ityukto.asau dvijaśreṣṭho halakarma vidhāya tat ||
ājagāma gṛhaṃ tūrṇaṃ tābhyāṃ saha sasaṃbhramam || 26 ||
cakre caivādaraṃ bhaktyā svayamāsanasatkriyām ||
pādaśaucaṃ tathābhyaṃgaṃ kṛtvātra ca susaṃskṛtam || 27 ||
saha patnyā satanayo bhojyaṃ bhuktiṃ cakāra saḥ ||
bhuktabhojyau ca śarvaryāṃ sukhaṃ suptau niśātyaye||28||
prayātau dadatuḥ śreṣṭhaṃ varaṃ tasmai dvijātaye ||
mā te bhavatu gosvāminkadācidapi karṣaṇam || 29 ||
mā dhānyaṃ makhasaṃtāna matprasādādvijottama ||
ityuktvā jagmatustūrṇaṃ punaḥ papraccha nāradaḥ||4.3.30||
kimidaṃ vada deveśa śāparūpo varastvayā ||
bhadra gosvāmine dattaḥ kiṃ ca vaiśye tathāvidhaḥ||31||
ityuktaḥ prāha deveśaḥ śṛṇu nārada madvacaḥ ||
paramārthaṃ pravakṣye.ahaṃ tava saṃśayakartanam || 32 ||
saṃvatsareṇa yatpāpaṃ matsyaghātī samācaret ||
tadahne kena kurute lāṃgalī nātra saṃśayaḥ || 33 ||
ato.arthaṃ kṛṣipālyena narakaṃ yāti lāṃgalī ||
tadabhāvānna kalpaḥ syāttena mokṣo mayi dhruvam || 34 ||
mayi bhukte prasanne vā ko viśeṣo.asya nārada ||
yadi svargo.atha vā mokṣo na saṃpadyeta tadvṛthā || 35||
idānīṃ halakāluṣyaiḥ sīrabhadro viceṣṭitaiḥ ||
bahupāpaprasaṃgena ghoraṃ narakameṣyati || 36 ||
saputrapautrasaṃtāno hṛtorthastadgṛhe mayā ||
na bhuktaṃ na ca viśrāntaṃ viśrāṃtaṃ dvijaveśmani || 37 ||
so.api dvijo muniśreṣṭha saṃsārāduttariṣyati ||
ityevaṃ saṃvadaṃtau ca jagmaturmārgamuttamam || 38 ||
kānyakubjasya sāmīpye saraḥ śreṣṭhamapaśyatām ||
haṃsakāraṇḍa vākīrṇaṃ cakravākopaśobhitam || 39 || padminījalakahlāraraktotpalasitotpalaiḥ ||
chāditaṃ padminīpatrairmatsyaiḥ kūrmairjjalodbhavaiḥ || 4.3.40 ||
taṭai ramyairghanairvṛkṣaiḥ ketakīkhaṇḍamaṃḍitam||
ketakīkusumāmodairllakucaistaṭamaṃḍitaiḥ || 41 ||
dātyūhaśikhibhāruṇḍacakorādyaiśca saṃkulam ||
kuravaiścātakai ramyaṃ kekākulanināditam || 42 ||
jalakukkuṭasaṃgītaṃ haṃsasārasaśobhitam ||
jīvaṃjīvakahārītacakorairupaśobhitam || 43 ||
vaśiṣṭhasya munernāmnā vikhyātaṃ śrīmahodayam ||
asminnadya praveṣṭavyaṃ mahājanavivekinām || 44||
sthātavyaṃ puratasteṣāṃ tasmātsnānaṃ samācaret ||
ityuktvā keśavaḥ pāpaṃ sasnau prāgeva tajjalaiḥ || 45 ||
yattīrthalokaṃ vikhyātaṃ snātvā tīraṃ samāśritaḥ ||
prahare vāsudevasya nārado.api mudā yutaḥ || 46 ||
ācamya sasnau tīrthena kṣaṇāttīrthamavāpya ca ||
yāvaduttiṣṭhate toyātsnātvā ṛṣirudāradhīḥ || 47 ||
tāvatstrītvaṃ samāpanno nāradaḥ kena varṇyate ||
yasyāstu vistṛte netre vaktraṃ candropamaṃ śubham || 48 ||
smarapāśopamau karṇau kapolau kanakojjvalau ||
nāsikā tilasūnena kāmacāpopame bhruvau || 49 ||
daśanā hīrakaistulyā vidrumābhaḥ śubhādharaḥ ||
mayūrasya kalāpena tulya kacanibaṃdhanam || 4.3.50 ||
śaṃkharekhātrayeṇaiva kaṃṭhadeśo virājate ||
mādhavīlatayā tulyau maṃjū tasyā bhujau śubhau || 51 ||
yutau raktotpalābhāsau pāṇī raktanakhāṃgulī ||
pīnāvatuṃgatanudhṛtkaṭhinau kalaśopamau || 52 ||
stanāvaviralau snigdhau cakravākayugopamau ||
svalpakaṃ madhyadeśaṃ tu muṣṭigrāhyamasaṃśayam || 53 ||
nābhimaṃḍalagāṃbhīryaṃ lāvaṇyaṃ kena varṇyate ||
valitrayeṇa vikṛtā romarājirvirājitā || 54 ||
nayane ca punastasyā mṛgyā iva suśobhane ||
nitaṃbo biṃbaphalakā manmathāyatanaṃ śubham || 55 ||
raṃbhāyugmopamāvūrū smarabāṇanibaṃdhanau ||
viparītaratāyāsakhedabhārasahau dṛḍhau || 56 ||
navakundalatāsārasaralaṃ sanibaṃdhanam ||
jaṃghāyugaṃ mahārāja gūḍhagulpha yugaṃ tathā || 57 || raktāṃgulīlatātalpanakhacandrakayācitam ||
caraṇāraviṃdayugalaṃ saraktaṃ supratiṣṭhitam || 58 ||
saivaṃvidhā tadā nārī sarvalakṣaṇapū jitā ||
babhūva kṣaṇamātreṇa jagadvyāmohakāriṇī || 59 ||
kṣīrodamathanottīrṇā lakṣmīmanyābhivocchritām ||
dṛṣṭvāpyadarśanaṃ prāpto māyayā madhusūdanaḥ || 4.3.60 ||
saṃprāpyate ca sā kālasaṃgarāhāriṇī yathā ||
āsta ekākinī mugdhā kuryāddigavalokanam || 61 ||
athājagāma taṃ deśaṃ nāmnā tāladhvajo nṛpaḥ ||
saha sainyaiḥ parivṛtaḥ puraṃdara ivāmaraiḥ || 62 ||
gajārūḍhairhayārūḍhai rathārūḍhairnarottamaiḥ ||
vimānayānayugmasthaistathāṃtaḥpurikājanaiḥ ||63||
dhvajātapatrakalilairanīkaiḥ parivāritaḥ ||
tena sā sahasā dṛṣṭā nārī kamalalocanā || 64 ||
babhūva kṣaṇamātreṇa kaṃdarpaśarapīḍitaḥ ||
keyaṃ kasya kutaḥ prāptā kiṃ devī vātha mānuṣī || 65 ||
adṛṣṭarūpāpsarasā kāciddevī samāgatā ||
ahorūpaṃ surūpāyā gocare paritaḥ pumān || 66 ||
mumūrṣurjāyate mohādanudigdhahato yathā ||
iti saṃcintya hṛdaye rājā tāladhvajo.antike || 67 ||
uvāca nārīṃ mugdhāṃ tāṃ śṛṇu madvacanaṃ śubhe ||
kā tvaṃ kasya kutaḥ prāptā deśametaṃ śucismite || 68 ||
ityukte sāśru cārvaṃgī prāha māṃ viddhyayonijām ||
pitrā mātrā vihīnāṃ ca tathādyāpi kumārikām || 69 ||
nirāśrayāṃ viditvaināṃ tato jātaḥ smarārditaḥ ||
āropya hayapṛṣṭhe tāṃ tato rājāgato gṛham || 4.3.70 ||
nītvā vivāhayāmāsa śāstroktavidhinā tataḥ ||
reme prāsādaśṛṃgāgre paryaṃke sitayā tayā || 71 ||
udyānabhavyabhūmīṣu nadīnāṃ pulineṣu ca ||
parvatānāṃ nitaṃbeṣu nirjhareṣu guhāsu ca || 72 ||
padmakhaṃḍeṣu phulleṣu śobhiteṣu sarassu ca ||
prayāgādiṣu tīrtheṣu nadīnāmāśrameṣu ca || 73 ||
divyāvasatharamyeṣu velākūleṣu pārthivaḥ ||
yāvaddvādaśa varṣāṇi ekāhamapi bhārata ||74||
tatastrayodaśe varṣe tasyā garbho.abhavanmahān ||
etasmingarbhasaṃpūrṇe jātaṃ dīrghamalābukam || || 75 ||
tadbhedāhatakuṃbheṣu bījaprārohaṇānnarāḥ ||
babhūvurddhātuśūnyā vai divyadehabalotkaṭāḥ || 76 ||
paṃcāśatsaṃkhyayā jātā upasargādivarjitāḥ ||
ārūḍhayauvanāḥ sarve sutāḥ saṃgrāmakovidāḥ || 77 ||
teṣāṃ putrāśca pautrāśca babhūvuḥ surasattamāḥ ||
yuyudhuḥ śarasaṃghātaiścakraśūlāsipaṭṭiśaiḥ || 78 ||
hayairanyairgajairanyaiḥ krodhāṃdhāḥ kauravā iva ||
pāṃḍavaiḥ saha saṃgrāme yuyudhuḥ kṣayamaṃjasā ||79 ||
sapadātigajārohāḥ sāṃtaḥpurayugecchayā ||
vineśurabdhimāsādya siṃdhūnāṃ pravahā iva||4.3.80||
sāsisabalavistārāḥ sadarpāḥ samahocchrayāḥ ||
indralokopamaṃ sarvaṃ kulaṃ naṣṭaṃ kṣaṇaṃ tadā ||81||
saṃdṛśya nāradīyaiṣā vinaṣṭaṃ svakulaṃ raṇe ||
ruroda snehasaṃyuktai rasaiḥ kaluṣayā girā || 82||
hā daiva hā vidhe pāpa hā kṛtānta namaskṛta ||
darśayitvā vidhānaṃ me punarnetre hṛte tvayā || 83 ||
ityuktvā svamurohastairjaghāna bhṛśaduḥkhitā ||
bhūmau mūrcchāturā bhūtvā punaḥ prāptā vicetanam ||84||
so.api rājā viṣaṇṇo.asau nirviṇṇaḥ śokasāgare||
bhūmau nipatito duḥkhādruroda bhṛśaduḥkhitaḥ ||85||
viṣaṇṇo maṃtribhiḥ sārdhaṃ vṛddhaśokena saṃyutaḥ ||
etasminnaṃtare viṣṇurājagāma dvijaiḥ saha ||86||
dvijaveṣaparicchanna upaviṣṭaḥ sukhāsane ||
tataḥ purassaro bhūtvā cakre dharmārthadarśanam ||87||
kiṃ rodanena bahunā yuvayoḥ kleśakāriṇā ||
śrūyatāṃ viṣṇumāyaiṣā svapnadṛṣṭadhanopamā ||88||
śobhane yādṛśaḥ śokaḥ kṛtaḥ saṃsārasāgare ||
sarveṣāmeva bhūtānāṃ pariṇāmoyamīdṛśaḥ || || 89 ||
puraṃdarasahasrāṇi cakravartiśatāni ca ||
nirvāpitāni kālena pradīpa iva vāyunā || 4.3.90 ||
ye.api śoṣayituṃ śaktāḥ samudraṃ grāhasaṃkulam|99|
kuryuśca karayugmena cūrṇaṃ meruṃ mahītale || 91 ||
ūddhartuṃ dharaṇīsaṃjñāṃ grahītuṃ candrabhāskarau ||
praviṣṭāste tu kālena kṛtāṃtavadanaṃ tadā || 92 ||
durgastrikūṭaḥ parikhāḥ samudrā rakṣāṃsi yodhā dhanadācca vittam ||
maṃtraśca yasyauśanasā praṇītaḥ sa rāvaṇo daivavaśādviṣaṇṇaḥ || 93 ||
saṃgrāme gajaturagasamākule.api vādādagnau vā gatavivare mahodadhau vā ||
sarvairvā saha vasatāmudīrṇakopairnābhāvyo bhavati kadācideva nāśaḥ || 94 || pātālamāviśatu yātu surendralokamārohatu kṣitidharādhipatiṃ sumerum || maṃtrauṣadhipraharaṇaiśca karotu rakṣāṃ yadbhāvi tadbhavati nātha vibhāvito.asmi || 95 || roditi kaścidathāśrudhautānanagurutaraśokavihvalaḥ ||
pravikaṭacaraṇavānapi nṛtyati kaściddharmādivigrahaḥ || 96 ||
gāyati hṛdayahāri sukhanirbharamāyatavistṛtā.adharo.adhikam ||
sāra eṣa raṃgodaragatanaṭapaṭahākāma evāyam || 97||
ityevaṃ dharmamuddiśya viṣṇuḥ saṃsāraceṣṭitam ||
tūṣṇīṃ babhūvānupadaṃ tataste dvijapuṅgavāḥ || 98 ||
uttiṣṭha snāhi putrāṇāṃ prakuruṣvaurdhvadehikam ||
mā śokaṃ viṣṇumāyaiṣā viṣṇunā nirmitā svayam || 99 ||
ityuktā cārusarvāṃgī sa babhūvācalaḥ pumān ||
sa eṣa sadṛśākāro nāradastatkṣaṇe.abhavat || 4.3.100 ||
so.api rājā dadarśātha taṃ samaṃtripurohitaḥ ||
sāṃtaḥpuramidaṃ sarvamiṃdrajālopamaṃ kṣaṇāt || 101 ||
nāradaṃ muniśārdūlaṃ jaṭābhārabhayānakam ||
gauravarṇaṃ jvalaṃtaṃ ca brāhamyā lakṣmyā virājitam || 102 ||
śikhā kamaṇḍaludharaṃ vīṇādaṇḍakaraṃ tathā ||
brahmasūtreṇa śubhreṇa kaupīnācchādanena ca ||
pādukābhyāṃ sthitaṃ tīre saraso brāhmaṇāsane || 103 ||
saṃpragṛhya karāgreṇa jagāmādarśanaṃ hariḥ ||
ambareṇa suraiḥ sārddhaṃ tasmāddeśādyudhiṣṭhira || 104 ||
śvetadvīpamathāsādya prāha devo muniṃ nṛpa ||
devarṣe yattvayā pṛṣṭaṃ pūrvaṃ māyākathāṃ prati || 105 ||
māyā yayedṛśī māyā yatsvarūpā yadātmikā ||
sā te māyā mayā brahmanvaiṣṇavī saṃpradarśitā || 106 ||
evamuktvā munivaraṃ devadevo janārdanaḥ ||
babhūvāntarhitassadyo devarṣestasya paśyataḥ || 107 ||
iti śrībhaviṣye mahāpurāṇa uttaraparvaṇi śrīkṛṣṇayudhiṣṭhirasaṃvāde māyādarśanaṃ nāma tṛtīyo.adhyāyaḥ || 3 || || cha ||
saṃsāradoṣavarṇanam
|| yudhiṣṭhira uvāca || ||
devatvaṃ mānuṣatvaṃ ca tiryaktvaṃ kena karmaṇā ||
prāpnoti puruṣaḥ kena garbhavāsaṃ sudāruṇam || 1 ||
garbhasthaśca kimaśnāti kathamutpadyate punaḥ ||
dattotthānādikāndoṣānkathaṃ tarati dustarān || 2 ||
bālabhāve kathaṃ puṣṭiḥ syādyuvā kena karmaṇā ||
kulīnaḥ kena bhavati surūpaḥ sudhanaḥ katham || 3 ||
kathaṃ dārānavāpnoti gṛhaṃ sarvaguṇairyutam ||
paṃḍitaḥ putravāṃstyāgī syādā mayavivarjitaḥ || 4 ||
kathaṃ sukhena mriyate kathaṃ bhuṃkte śubhāśubham ||
sarvamevāmalamate gahanaṃ pratibhāti me || 5 ||
|| śrīkṛṣṇa uvāca || ||
śubhairdevatvamāpnoti miśrairmānuṣatāṃ vrajet ||
aśubhaiḥ karmabhirjjaṃtustiryagyoniṣu jāyate || 6 ||
pramāṇaṃ śrutirevātra dharmādharmaviniścaye ||
pāpaṃ pāpena bhavati puṇyaṃ puṇyena karmaṇā || 7 ||
ṛtukāle tadā bhuktaṃ nirdoṣaṃ yena saṃsthitam ||
tadā tadvāyunā spṛṣṭaṃ strīraktenaikatāṃ vrajet ||8||
visargakāle śukrasya jīvaḥ karaṇasaṃyutaḥ ||
bhṛtyaḥ praviśate yoniṃ karmabhiḥ svairnniyojitaḥ || 9 || tacchukraraktamekasthamekāhātkalalaṃ bhavet ||
pañcarātreṇa kalalaṃ buhudā kāratāṃ vrajet || 4.4.10 ||
budbudaṃ saptarātreṇa māṃsapeśī bhavettataḥ ||
dvisaptāhādbhavetpeśī raktamāṃsadṛḍhāṃcitaḥ || 11 ||
bījasyevāṃkurāḥ peśyāḥ pañcaviṃśa tirātrataḥ ||
bhavaṃti māsamātreṇa pañcadhā jāyate punaḥ || 12 ||
grīvā śiraśca skandhaśca pṛṣṭhavaṃśastathodaram ||
māsadvayena sarvāṇi kramaśaḥ saṃbhavaṃti ca || 13 ||
tribhirmāsaiḥ prajāyaṃte sadravyāṃkurasaṃdhayaḥ ||
māsaiścaturbhiraṃgulyaḥ prajāyaṃte yathākramam || 14 ||
mukhaṃ nāsā ca karṇau ca jāyante pañca māsakaiḥ ||
daṃtapaṃktistathā guhyaṃ jāyaṃte ca nakhāḥ punaḥ || 15 ||
karṇau ca raṃdhrasahitau ṣaṇmāsābhyaṃtareṇa tu ||
pāyurmeḍhramupasthaśca nābhiścāpyupa jāyate || 16 ||
saṃdhayo ye ca gātreṣu māsairjāyaṃti saptabhiḥ ||
aṅgapratyaṃgasaṃpūrṇaḥ śiraḥ keśasamanvitaḥ || 17 ||
vibhaktāvayavaḥ puṣṭaḥ punarmāsāṣṭakena ca ||
paṃcātmakasamāyuktaḥ paripakvaḥ sa tiṣṭhati || 18 ||
māturāhāravīryeṇa ṣaḍvidhena sa tiṣṭhati ||
rasena pratyahaṃ bālo vardhate bharatarṣabha || 19 ||
tatte.ahaṃ saṃpravakṣyāmi yathāśrutamariṃdama ||
nābhisūtranibandhena varddhate sa dinedine || 4.4.20 ||
tataḥ smṛtiṃ labhejjīvaḥ saṃpūrṇe.asmiñcharīrake ||
sukhaṃ duḥkhaṃ vijānāti nidrāsvapnaṃ purā kṛtam || 21 ||
mṛtaścāhaṃ punarjāto jātaścāhaṃ punarmṛtaḥ ||
nānāyoni sahasrāṇi mayā dṛṣṭāni tāni vai || 22 ||
adhunā jātamātro.ahaṃ prāptasaṃskāra eva ca||
etacchreyaḥ kariṣyāmi yena garbhe na saṃśrayaḥ ||23||
garbhasthaściṃtaye devamahaṃ garbhādviniḥsṛtaḥ ||
adhyeṣye caturo vedānsaṃsāravinivartakān || 24 ||
evaṃ sa garbhaduḥkhena mahatā paripīḍitaḥ ||
jīvaḥ karmavaśādāste mokṣopāyaṃ viciṃtayan || 25 ||
yathā girivarākrāṃtaḥ kaścidduḥkhena tiṣṭhati ||
tathā jarāyuṇā dehī duḥkhe tiṣṭhati ceṣṭitaḥ || 26 ||
patitaḥ sāgare yadvadduḥkhairāste samākula. ||
garbhodakena siktāṃgastathāste vyākulaḥ pumān || 27 ||
lohakuṃbhe yathā nyastaḥ pacyate kaścidagninā ||
tathā sa pacyate jaṃturgarbhasthaḥ pīḍitodaraḥ || 28 ||
sūcībhiragnivarṇābhirvibhinnasya niraṃtaram ||
yadduḥkhamupajāyeta tadgarbhe.aṣṭaguṇaṃ bhavet || 29 ||
garbhavāsātparo vāsaḥ kaṣṭo naivāsti kutracit ||
dehināṃ duḥkhavadrājansughoro hyatisaṅkaṭaḥ || 4.4.30 ||
ityetadgarbhaduḥkha hi prāṇināṃ parikīrtitam ||
carasthirāṇāṃ sarveṣātmāmagarbhānurūpataḥ || 34 ||
garbhātkoṭiguṇaṃ duḥkhaṃ yoniyaṃtraprapīḍanāt ||
saṃmūrcchitasya jāyeta jāyamānasya dehinaḥ ||32||
śaravatpīḍyamānasya yaṃtreṇeva samaṃtataḥ ||
śirasi tāḍyamānasya pāpamudgarakeṇa ca || 33 ||
garbhānniṣkampamāṇasya prabalaiḥ sūtimārutaiḥ ||
jāyate sumahadduḥkhaṃ paritrāṇamaviṃdataḥ || 34 ||
yaṃtreṇa pīḍitā yadvanniḥsārāḥ syustilekṣavaḥ ||
tathā śarīraṃ niḥsāraṃ yoniyaṃtraprapīḍitam ||35||
asthimajjātvacāmāṃsasnāyubaṃdhena yaṃtritam ||
raktamāṃsamṛdā yuktaṃ viṇmūtradravalepanam || 36 ||
keśalomatṛṇācchannaṃ rogāyatanamāturam ||
vadanaikamahaddvāraṃ daṃtoṣṭhakavibhūṣitam|| 37 ||
oṣṭhadvayakapāṭaṃ ca dantajihvārgalānvitam ||
nāḍīsvedapravāhaṃ ca kaphapittapariplutam || 38 ||
jarāśokasamāviṣṭaṃ kālacakrānale sthitam ||
kāmakrodhasamākrāṃtaṃ vyasanaiścopamarditam || 39 ||
bhogatṛṣṇāturaṃ mūḍhaṃ rāgadveṣavaśānugam ||
saṃvartitāṃgapratyaṃgaṃ jarāyupariveṣṭitam || 4.4.40 ||
saṃkaṭenāviviktena yonidvāreṇa nirgatam ||
viṇmūtraraktasiktāṃgaṃ patkeśācca samudbhavam || 41 ||
iti dehagṛhaṃ proktaṃ nityasyānityamā tmanaḥ ||
aviśuddhaṃ viśuddhasya karmabaṃdhavinirmitam || 42 ||
śukraśoṇitasaṃyogāddehaḥ saṃjāyate yataḥ ||
nityaṃ viṇmūtrapūrṇaśca tenāyamaśuciḥ smṛtaḥ || 43 ||
yathāṃtarviṣṭhayā pūrṇaḥ śuciḥ syānna bahirghaṭaḥ ||
yatnataḥ śodhyamāno.api deho.ayamaśucistathā || 44 ||
saṃprāpyātra pavitrāṇi paṃcaga vyahavīṃṣi ca ||
aśucitvaṃ kṣaṇāccāpi kimanyadvastubiṃdavaḥ || 45 ||
dehaḥ saṃśodhyamāno.api pañcagavyakuśāṃbubhiḥ ||
ghṛṣyamāṇa ivāṃgāro nirmalatvaṃ na gacchati || 46 ||
srotāṃsi yasya satataṃ pravahaṃti gireriva ||
kaphamūtrapurīṣādyaiḥ sa dehaḥ śuddhyate katham || 47 ||
sarvāśucinidhānasya śarīrasya na vidyate ||
śucirekaḥ pradeśo.api viṭpūrṇaḥ syaṃdate kila || 48 ||
kāyaḥ sugaṃdhadhūpādyairyatnenāpi tu saṃskṛtaḥ ||
na jahāti svakaṃ bhāvaṃ śvapu cchamiva nāmitam || 49 ||
yathā jātyaiva kṛṣṇo hi na śuklaḥ syādupāyataḥ ||
saṃśodhyamānā.api tathā bhavenmūrtirna nirmalā || 4.4.50 ||
jighrannapi svadurgaṃdhaṃ paśyannapi malaṃ svakam ||
na virajjati loko.ayaṃ pīḍayannapi nāsikām || 51 ||
aho mohasya māhātmyaṃ yena vyāmohitaṃ jagat ||
jighranpaśyansvakaṃ doṣaṃ kāyasya na virajyate || 52 ||
evametaccharīraṃ hi nisargādaśuci dhruvam ||
tvaṅmātrasāraṃ niḥsāraṃ kadalīsārasaṃnibham ||53||
garbhasthasya smṛtiryāsītsā jātasya praṇaśyati ||
saṃmūrcchitasya duḥkhena yoniyaṃtraprapīḍanāt || 54 ||
bāhyena vāyunā cāsya mohasaṃjñena dehinaḥ||
spṛṣṭamātreṇa ghoreṇa jvaraḥ samupajāyate || 55 ||
tena jvareṇa mahatā mahāmohaḥ prajāyate ||
saṃmūḍhasya smṛtibhraṃśaḥ śīghraṃ saṃjāyate punaḥ || 56 ||
smṛtibhraṃśāttu tasyeha pūrvakarmavaśena ca ||
ratiḥ saṃjāyate tūrṇaṃ jaṃtostatraiva janmani || 57 ||
rakto mūḍhasya loko.ayamakārye saṃpravartate ||
na cātmānaṃ vijānāti na paraṃ vindate ca saḥ || 58 ||
na śrūyate paraṃ śreyaḥ sati cakṣuṣi nekṣate ||
same pathi śanairgacchanskhalatīva padepade || 59 ||
satyāṃ buddhau na jānāti bodhyamāno budhairapi ||
saṃsāre kliśyate tena rāgalobhavaśānugaḥ || 4.4.60 ||
garbhasmṛterabhāvena śāstramuktaṃ maharṣibhiḥ ||
tadduḥkhamathanārthāya svargamokṣaprasādhakam || 61 ||
ye saṃtyasminpare jñāne sarvakāmārthasādhake ||
na kurvaṃtyātmanaḥ śreyastadatra mahadbhutam || 62 ||
avyakteṃdriyavṛttitvādbālye duḥkhaṃ mahatpunaḥ ||
icchannapi na śaknoti kartuṃ vaktuṃ ca satkriyām || 63 ||
daṃtotthāne mahadduḥkhaṃ maulena vyādhinā tathā ||
bālarogaiśca vividhaiḥ pīḍā bālagrahairapi || 64 ||
tṛḍbubhukṣāparītāṃgaḥ kaścittiṣṭhati rāraṭan ||
viṇmūtrabhakṣaṇamapi mohādbālaḥ samācaret || 65 ||
kaumāre karṇavedhena mātāpitrośca tāḍanāt ||
akṣarādhyayanātpuṃsāṃ duḥkhaṃ syādguruśāsanāt || 66 ||
prasanneṃdriyavṛttiśca kāmarāgaprapīḍanāt ||
rogoddhatasya satataṃ kutaḥ saukhyaṃ ca yauvane || 67 ||
īrṣyayā ca mahadduḥkhaṃ mohādraktasya jāyate ||
netrasya kupitasyaiva rāgo duḥkhāya kevalam ||68||
na rātrau viṃdate nidrāṃ kopāgniparipīḍitaḥ ||
divā vāpi kutaḥ saukhyamarthopārjanaciṃtayā || 69 ||
strīṣvāyāsitadehasya ye puṃsaḥ śukrabiṃdavaḥ ||
na te sukhāya maṃtavyāḥ svedajā iva biṃdavaḥ || 4.4.70 ||
krimibhistudyamānasya kuṣṭhinaḥ kāminastathā ||
kaṇḍūyanāgnitāpena yadbhavetstrīṣu taddhi tat || || 71 ||
yādṛśaṃ viṃdate saukhyaṃ gaṃḍānvayavinirgame ||
tādṛśaṃ strīṣu maṃtavyaṃ nādhikaṃ tāsu vidyate ||72||
gaṃḍasya vedanā yadvatsphuṭitasya nivartate ||
tadvatstrīṣvapi maṃtavyaṃ na saukhyaṃ paramārthataḥ || 73 ||
viṇmūtrasya samutsargātsukhaṃ bhavati yādṛśam ||
tādṛśaṃ teṣu vijñeyaṃ mūḍhaiḥ kalpitamanyathā || ||74||
nārīṣvaśucibhūtāsu sarvadoṣāśrayāsu ca ||
nāṇumātrakamapyevaṃ sukhamasti vicārataḥ ||75||
sanmānamapamānena viyogena susaṃgamaḥ ||
yauvanaṃ jarayā grastaṃ kiṃ saukhyamanupadravam || 76 ||
valīpalitakhālityaiḥ śithilīkṛtavigraham ||
sarvakriyāsvaśaktaṃ ca jarayā jarjarīkṛtam || 77 ||
strīpuṃsayornnavaṃ rūpaṃ tadānyonyaṃ priyaṃ purā ||
tadeva jarayā grastamubhayorapi na priyam ||78||
apūrvavatsvamātmānaṃ jarayā parivartitaḥ ||
yaḥ paśyannapi rajyeta ko.anyastasmādacetanaḥ || 79 ||
jarābhibhūtaḥ puruṣaḥ patnīputrādibāṃdhavaiḥ ||
aśaktatvāddurācārairbhṛtyaiśca paribhūyate || 4.4.80 ||
dharmamarthaṃ ca kāmaṃ ca mokṣaṃ ca na jarī yataḥ ||
śaktaḥ sādhayituṃ tasmāccharīramidamātmanaḥ || 81 ||
vātapittakaphādīnāṃ vaiṣamyaṃ vyādhirucyate ||
tasmādvyādhimayaṃ jñeyaṃ śarīramidamātmanaḥ || 82 ||
vātādyavyatiriktatvādvyādhīnāṃ pañjarasya ca ||
rogairnānāvidhairyāni dehaduḥkhānyanekadhā ||
tāni ca svātmavedyāni kimanyatkathayāmyaham || 83 ||
ekottaraṃ mṛtyuśatamasmindehe pratiṣṭhitam ||
tatraikaḥ kālasaṃyuktaḥ śeṣāścāgantavaḥ smṛtāḥ || 84 ||
ye tvihāgaṃtavaḥ proktāste praśāmyaṃti bheṣajaiḥ ||
japahomapradānaiśca kālamṛtyurna śāmyati || 85 ||
yadi cāpi na mṛtyuḥ syādviṣamadyādaśaṃkitaḥ ||
na saṃti puruṣe tasmādapamṛtyuvibhītayaḥ || 86 ||
vividhā vyādhayaḥ śastraṃ sarpādyāḥ prāṇinastathā ||
viṣāṇi jaṃgamādyāni mṛtyordvārāṇi dehinām || || 87 ||
pīḍitaṃ sarvarogādyairapi dhanvantariḥ svayam ||
svasthīkartuṃ na śaknoti prāptamṛtyuṃ ca dehinam || 88 ||
nauṣadhaṃ na tapo dānaṃ na maṃtrā na ca bāṃdhavāḥ ||
śaknuvaṃti paritrātuṃ naraṃ kālena pīḍitam || 89 || rasāyanatapojapyairyogasiddhairmahātmabhiḥ ||
kālamṛtyurapi prājñaistīryate nālasairnnaraiḥ || 4.4.90 ||
nāsti mṛtyusamaṃ duḥkhaṃ nāsti mṛtyusamaṃ bhayam ||
nāsti mṛtyusamastrāsaḥ sarveṣāmeva dehinām || 91 ||
sadbhāryāputramitrāṇi rājyaiśvaryadha nāni ca ||
abaddhāni ca vairāṇi mṛtyuḥ sarvāṇi kṛntati || 92 ||
he janāḥ kiṃ na paśyadhvaṃ sahasrasyāpi madhyataḥ ||
janāḥ śatāyuṣaḥ pañca bhavaṃti na bhavaṃti ca || 93 ||
aśītikā vipadyante kecitsaptatikā narāḥ ||
paramāyuṣaṃ sthitaṃ ṣaṣṭistaccaivāniścitaṃ punaḥ || 94 ||
yasya yāvadbhavedāyurdehināṃ pūrvakarmabhiḥ ||
tasyārddhamāyuṣo rātrirharate mṛtyurūpiṇī || 95 ||
bālabhāvena mohena vārddhakye jarayā tathā ||
varṣāṇāṃ viṃśatiryāṃti dharmakāmārthavarjitā || 96 ||
āgaṃtukerbhayaiḥ puṃsāṃ vyādhiśokairanekadhā ||
bhakṣyate.arddhaṃ ca tatrāpi yaccheṣaṃ tacca jīvati || 97 ||
jīvitāṃte ca maraṇaṃ mahāghoramavāpnuyāt ||
jāyate janmakoṭīṣu mṛtaḥ karmavaśātpunaḥ || 98 ||
dehabhedena yaḥ puṃsāṃ viyogaḥ karmasaṃkṣayāt ||
maraṇaṃ tadvinirdiṣṭaṃ nānyathā paramārthataḥ || 99 ||
mahātapapraviṣṭasya cchidyamāneṣu marmasu ||
yadduḥkhaṃ maraṇe jaṃtorna tasyehopamā kvacit || 4.4.100 ||
hā tāta mātaḥ kāṃteti rudannevaṃ hi duḥkhitaḥ ||
maṃḍūka iva sarpeṇa grasyate mṛtyunā janaḥ || 101 ||
bāṃdhavaiḥ saṃpariṣvaktaḥ priyaiḥ sa parivāritaḥ ||
niḥśvasandīrghamuṣṇaṃ ca mukhena pariśuṣyati || 102 ||
krandate caiva khaṭvāyāṃ parivartanmuhurmuhuḥ ||
saṃmūḍhaḥ kṣipate.atyarthaṃ hastapādāvitastataḥ ||103||
khaṭvāto kāṃkṣate bhūmiṃ bhūmeḥ khaṭvāṃ punarmahīm ||
vivaśastyaktalajjaśca mūtraviṣṭhānulepitaḥ || 104 ||
yācamānaśca salilaṃ śuṣkakaṇṭhoṣṭhatālukaḥ ||
ciṃtayānaśca vittāni kasyaitāni mṛte mayi || 105 ||
pañcāvaṭānkhanyamānaḥ kālapāśena karṣitaḥ ||
mriyate paśyatāmeva janānāṃ ghurghurasvanaḥ || || 106 ||
jīvastṛṇajalaukeva dehāddehaṃ viśetkramāt ||
saṃprāpyottarakālaṃ hi dehaṃ tyajati paurvakam || 107 ||
maraṇātprārthanāduḥkhamadhikaṃ hi vive kinaḥ ||
kṣaṇikaṃ maraṇāduḥkhamanaṃtaṃ prārthanākṛtam || 108 ||
jagatāṃ patirarthitvādviṣṇurvāmanatāṃ gataḥ ||
adhikaḥ ko.aparastasmādyo na yā syati lāghavam || 109 ||
jñātaṃ mayedamadhunā mataṃ bhavati yadguru ||
na paraṃ prārthayedbhūyastṛṣṇā lāghavakāraṇam || 4.4.110 ||
ādau duḥkhaṃ tathā madhye duḥkhamaṃte ca dāruṇam ||
nisargātsarvabhūtānāmiti duḥkhaparaṃparā || 111 ||
vartamānānyatītāni duḥkhānyetāni yāni tu ||
narā na bhāvayaṃtyajñā na virajyati tena te || 112 || atyāhārānmahadduḥkhamanāhārānmahattamam ||
tulitaṃ jīvitaṃ kaṣṭaṃ manye.apyevaṃ kutaḥ sukham || 113 ||
bubhukṣā sarvarogāṇāṃ vyādhiḥ śreṣṭhatamaḥ smṛtaḥ ||
sa cānnauṣadhilepena kṣaṇamātraṃ praśāmyati || 114 ||
kṣudvyādhivedanātulyā niḥśeṣabalakartanī ||
tayābhibhūto mriyate yathānyairvyādhibhirna hi ||1 15||
tadrasopi hi kāmādvā jihvāgre parivartate ||
tatkṣaṇādvārddhakālena kaṃṭhaṃ prāpya nivartate ||116||
iti kṣudvyādhitaptānāmannamauṣadhavatsmṛtam ||
na tatsukhāya mantavyaṃ paramārthena paṃḍitaiḥ || 117 ||
mṛtopamo yaścekṣeta sarvakāryavivarjitaḥ ||
tatrāpi ca kutaḥ saukhyaṃ tamasācchāditātmanaḥ || 118 ||
prabodhe.api kutaḥ saukhyaṃ kāryairupahatātmanaḥ ||
kṛṣigorakṣavāṇijyasevādhvādipariśramaiḥ ||119||
prātarmūtrapurīṣābhyāṃ madhyāhne tu bubhukṣayā ||
tṛptāḥ kāmena bādhyante jaṃtavo.api vinidrayā || 4.4.120 ||
arthasyopārjane duḥkhamarjitasyāpi rakṣaṇe ||
āye duḥkhaṃ vyaye duḥkhamarthebhyaśca kutaḥ sukham || 121 ||
caurebhyaḥ salilādagneḥ svajanātpārthivādapi ||
bhayamarthavatāṃ nityaṃ mṛtyoḥ prāṇabhṛtā miva || 122 ||
khe yātaṃ pakṣibhirmāṃsaṃ bhakṣyate śvāpadairbhuvi ||
jale ca bhakṣyate matsyaistathā sarvatra vittavān || 123 ||
vimohayati saṃpatsu tāpayaṃti vipattiṣu ||
khedayaṃtyarjanākāle kadā hyarthāḥ sukhāvahāḥ || 124 ||
yathārthapatirudvigno yaśca sarvārthaniḥspṛhaḥ ||
yataścārthapatirduḥkhī sukhī sarvārthaniḥspṛhaḥ || 125 ||
śītena duḥkhaṃ hemaṃte grīṣme tāpena dāruṇam ||
varṣāsu vātavarṣābhyāṃ kāle.apyevaṃ kutaḥ sukham || 126 ||
vivāhavistare duḥkhaṃ tadgarbhodvahane punaḥ ||
prasave.apatyadoṣaiśca duḥkhaṃ duḥkhādikarmabhiḥ || 127 ||
dantākṣiraugaiḥ putrasya hā kaṣṭaṃ kiṃ karomyaham ||
gāvo naṣṭāḥ kṛṣirbhagnā vṛṣāḥ kvāpi palāyitāḥ || 128 ||
amī prāghūrṇakāḥ prāptā bhaktacchede ca me gṛhe ||
bālāpatyā ca me bhāryā kaḥ kariṣyati raṃdhanam || || 129 ||
pradānakāle kanyāyāḥ kīdṛśaśca varo bhavet ||
iti cintābhibhūtānāṃ kutaḥ saukhyaṃ kuṭubinām || 4.4.130 ||
kuṭuṃbaciṃtākulitasya puṃsaḥ śrutaṃ ca śīlaṃ ca guṇāśca sarve ||
apakvakuṃbhe nihitā ivāpaḥ prayāṃti dehena samaṃ vināśam ||131||
rājyepi ca mahadduḥkhaṃ saṃdhivigrahaciṃtayā ||
putrādapi bhayaṃ yatra tatra saukhyaṃ hi kīdṛśam ||132||
sajātīyādvadhaḥ prāyaḥ sarveṣāmeva dehinām ||
ekadravyābhilāṣitvācchunāmiva parasparam || || 133 ||
nāpradhṛṣyabalaḥ kaścinnṛpaḥ khyātosti bhūtale ||
nikhilaṃ yastiraskṛtya sukhaṃ tiṣṭhati nirbhayaḥ || 134 ||
ā janmanaḥ prabhṛti duḥkha mayaṃ śarīraṃ karmātmakaṃ tava mayā kathitaṃ narendra ||
dānopavāsaniyamaiśca kṛtaistadeva sarvopabhogasukhabhāgbhavatīha puṃsām || 135 ||
iti śrībhaviṣye mahāpurāṇa uttaraparvaṇi śrīkṛṣṇayudhiṣṭhirasaṃvāde saṃsāradoṣākhyānaṃ nāma caturtho.adhyāyaḥ|| 4 || cha ||
pāpabhedākhyānavarṇanam
|| śrīkṛṣṇa uvāca || ||
adhodhaḥ patanaṃ puṃsāmadhaḥkarma prakīrtitam ||
narakārṇavaghoreṣu yātanā pāpamucyate || 1 ||
adharmabhedā vijñeyāścittavṛttiprabhedataḥ ||
sthūlāḥ sūkṣmāḥ susūkṣmāśca koṭi bhedairanekadhā || 2 ||
tatra ye pāpanicayāḥ sthūlā narakahetavaḥ ||
te samāsena kathyaṃte manovākkāyasādhanāḥ || 3 ||
parastrīṣvatha saṃkalpaścetasāniṣṭaciṃtanam ||
akāryābhiniveśaśca caturdhā karma mānasam|| 4 ||
anibaddhapralāpitvamasatyaṃ cāpriyaṃ ca yat ||
parāpavādapaiśunyaṃ caturdhā karma vācikam || 5 ||
abhakṣyabhakṣaṇaṃ hiṃsā mithyā kāmasya sevanam ||
parasvānāmupādānaṃ caturddhā karma kāyikam || 6 ||
ityetaddvādaśavidhaṃ karma proktaṃ sasādhanam ||
teṣāṃ bhedaṃ punarvacmi yeṣāṃ phalamanaṃtakam )| 7 .a
ye dviṣaṃti mahādevaṃ saṃsārārṇavatāraṇam ||
samastapātakopetāste yānti narakāgniṣu |||8|||
brahmaghnaśca surāpaśca steyī ca gurutalpagaḥ ||
mahāpātakinaścaite tatsaṃsargī ca paṃcamaḥ || 9 ||
krodhāddveṣādbhayāllobhādbrāhmaṇaṃ viśasaṃti ye ||
prāṇāṃtiko mahādoṣo brahmaghnāste prakīrtitāḥ||| 4.5.10||
brāhmaṇaṃ ca samāhūya yācamānamakiñcanam ||
paścānnāstīti taṃ brūyātsa caivaṃ brahmahā smṛtaḥ || 11 ||
yastu vidyābhimānena nityaṃ jayati vai dvijān ||
samāsīnaḥ sabhāmadhye brahmahā so.api kīrtitaḥ||12||
mithyāguṇaiḥ svamātmānaṃ nayatyutkarṣaṇaṃ balāt||
gurūṇāṃ ca viruddho yaḥ sa caiva brahmahā smṛtaḥ||
kṣuttṛṭsaṃtaptadehānāṃ dvijānāṃ bhoktumicchatām||
samācarati yo vighnaṃ tamāhurbrahmaghātakam||14||
piśunaḥ sarvalokānāṃ chidrānveṣaṇatatparaḥ ||
udvegajananaḥ krūraḥ sa caiva brahmahā smṛtaḥ || 15 ||
gavāṃ tṛṣṇābhibhūtānāṃ jalārthamupasarpatām ||
samācarati yo vighnaṃ sa caiva brahmahā smṛtaḥ || 16 ||
paradoṣamabhijñāya nṛpakarṇe karoti yaḥ ||
pāpīyānpiśunaḥ kṣudraḥ sa caiva brahmahā smṛtaḥ || 17 |||
devadvijagavāṃ bhūmiṃ pūrvabhuktā harettu yaḥ ||
pranaṣṭāmapi kālena tamāhurbrahmaghātakam || 18 ||
dvijavittāpaharaṇe nyāyataḥ samupārjite ||
brahmahatyā samaṃ jñeyaṃ pātakaṃ nātra saṃśayaḥ || 19 ||
agnihotraparityāgo yastu yājñikakarmaṇām ||
mātāpitṛparityāgaḥ kūṭasākṣyaṃ suhṛdvadhaḥ || 4.5.20 ||
gavāṃ mārge vane cāgniṃ pure grāme ca dīpayet ||
iti pāpāni ghorāṇi surāpānasamāni tu || 21 ||
hīnasvaharaṇe cāpi narastrīgajavājinām ||
gobhūrajataratnānāmauṣadhīnāṃ rajasya ca || 22 ||
caṃdanāgarukarpūrakastūrīkhaṇḍavāsasām ||
haste nyasyāpaharaṇaṃ rukmasteyasamaṃ smṛtam || 23 ||
kanyānāṃ varayogyānāmadānaṃ sadṛśe vare ||
putramitrakalatreṣu gamanaṃ bhaginīṣu ca || 24 ||
kumārīsāhasaṃ ghoramantyajastrīniṣevaṇam ||
avarṇāyāśca gamanaṃ gurutalpasamaṃ smṛtam || 25 ||
mahāpātakatulyāni pāpānyuktāni yāni tu ||
tāni pātakasaṃjñāni tadvadāmyupapātakam || 26 ||
dvijārthaṃ ca pratijñāya na prayacchati yaḥ punaḥ ||
tasmānnarapate vighnatulyaṃ tadupapātakam || 27 ||
dvijadravyāpaharaṇaṃ maryādāyā vyatikramaḥ ||
atikopaśca mānaśca dāṃbhikatvaṃ kṛtaghnatā || 28 ||
atyaṃtaviṣayāsaktiḥ kārpaṇyaṃ śreṣṭhamatsaraḥ ||
paradārāpaharaṇaṃ sādhukanyāvidūṣaṇam || 29 ||
parivittiḥ parīvettā yayā ca parividyate ||
tayorddānaṃ ca kanyāyāstayoreva ca yājanam || 4.5.30 ||
putramitrakalatrāṇāmabhāve svāminastathā ||
śiṣṭānāṃ caiva saṃnyāsaḥ sahajānāṃ tapasvinām || 31 ||
bhaṃgaśca dharmakṛtyānāṃ sahāyānāṃ vināśanam || pīḍāmāśramasaṃsthānānnācarettvalpikāmapi || 32 ||
svabhṛtyaparivargasya paśudhānyadhanasya ca ||
kupyadhānyapaśusteyamayācyānāṃ ca yācanam || 33 ||
gavāṃ kṣatriyaveśyānāṃ strīśūdrāṇāṃ viśeṣataḥ ||
yajñārāmataḍāgānāṃ dārāpatyasya vikrayaḥ ||
tīrthayātropavāsānāṃ vratāyatanakarmaṇām || 34 ||
strīdhanānyupajīvaṃti strībhiratyaṃtanirjitāḥ ||
arakṣaṇaṃ ca nārīṇāṃ madyapastrīniṣevaṇam || 35 ||
ṛṇānāmapradānaṃ ca dhānyavṛddhyupajīvinām ||
niṃditācca dhanādānamapaṇyānāṃ ca vikrayaḥ || 36 ||
viṣamāraṇamaṃtrāṇāṃ prayogo mūlakarmaṇām ||
uccāṭanāvicāraśca garavidveṣaṇakriyā || 37 ||
jihvāsamupabhogārthaṃ yasyārambhaḥ svakarmasu ||
mūlyenādhyāpayedyaśca mūlyenādhīyate ca ye || 38 ||
vrātyatā vratasaṃtyāgaḥ sarvāhāraniṣevaṇam ||
asaddārābhigamanaṃ śuṣkatarkāvalaṃbanam || 39 ||
devāgnisādhusādhvīnāṃ niṃdā gobrāhmaṇasya ca|
pratyakṣaṃ vā parokṣaṃ vā rājñāṃ maṇḍalikāmapi ||
duḥśīlā nāstikāḥ pāpāḥ sarvaśūnyasya vādinaḥ || 4.5.40 ||
parvakāle divā caiva viyonau paśuyoniṣu ||
rajasvalānāṃ yonau ca maithunaṃ ca samācaret ||41||
strīputramitrasaṃprīte grāsānnacchedakāśca ye ||
janasyā priyavaktāro dhūrtāḥ samayabhedinaḥ ||42||
bhettā taḍāgacakrāṇāṃ saṃkramāṇāṃ rathasya ca ||
ekapaṃktisthitānāṃ ca pākabhedaṃ karoti yaḥ ||43||
ityetaiste narāḥ pāpairupapātakinaḥ smṛtāḥ ||
yuktāstadūnakaiḥ kṣudraiḥ pāpaiḥ pāpatarāḥ smṛtāḥ || 44 ||
ye gobrāhmaṇakanyānāṃ svāmimitratapasvinām ||
aṃtaraṃ yāṃti kāryeṣu te narā nārakāḥ smṛtāḥ || 45 ||
paraśriyā ye tapyaṃte ye paradravyasūcakāḥ ||
paravyāpāraniratāḥ parastrīnaradūṣakāḥ || 46 ||
dvijāya duḥkhaṃ yaḥ kuryātprakārairbahubhiḥ sadā ||
sevate yo dvijaḥ śūdrāṃ surāṃ jighrati kāmataḥ || 47 ||
ye pānābhiratāḥ krūrā ye ca hiṃsāpriyā narāḥ ||
vittārthaṃ ye ca kurvaṃti dānayajñādikāṃ kriyām || 48 ||
goṣṭhāgnijalarathyāsu tarucchāyāmaṭheṣu ca ||
tyajaṃtyamedhyaṃ puruṣā ārāmāyataneṣu ca || || 49 ||
madyapānaratā nityaṃ gānavādyaratā narāḥ ||
kelīkalābhujaṃgāśca raṃdhrānveṣaṇatatparāḥ || 4.5.50 ||
vaṃśeṣu kāśakāṣṭhaiśca śubhaiḥ śaṃkubhireva vā ||
ye mārgānsamupaghnaṃti parastrīrāharaṃti ca || 51 ||
kūṭaśāsanahartāraḥ kūṭakarmakriyāratāḥ ||
kūṭayuddhāśca śastreṇa kūṭasaṃvyavahāriṇaḥ || 52 ||
dhanuṣāṃ śalyaśastrāṇāṃ yaḥ kartā yaśca vikrayī ||
nirdayo.atīva bhṛtyeṣu paśūnāṃ damakaśca yaḥ || 53 ||
mithyā pravadato vākyamākarṇayati yaḥ śanaiḥ ||
svāmimitragurudrohī māyāvī capalaḥ śaṭhaḥ || 54 ||
ye bhāryāputramitrāṇi bālavṛddhakṛśāturān ||
bhṛtyānatithibandhūṃśca prabādhante bubhukṣayā || 55 ||
yaḥ svayaṃ miṣṭamaśnāti viprāyānyatprayacchati ||
vṛthāpākaḥ sa vijñeyo brahmavādiṣu garhitaḥ || 56 ||
niyamānsvayamādāya ye tyajaṃtyajiteṃdriyāḥ ||
pravrajyāvāsino ye ca rahasyānāṃ ca bhedakāḥ || 57 ||
tāḍayaṃti ca vegādye śapaṃti ca muhurmuhuḥ ||
durbalāṃśca na puṣṇaṃti punastānvāhayaṃti ca || 56 ||
pīḍayaṃtyatibhāreṇa sakṣatānvāhayaṃti ca ||
sārddhayāmāduparitaḥ saṃyukteṣu ca bhuṃjate || 59 ||
ye bhagnakṣatarogārtānsvagorūpānbubhukṣayā ||
na pālayaṃti yatnena te goptā nārakā narāḥ || 4.5.60 ||
vṛṣāṇāṃ vṛṣaṇānyeva pāpiṣṭhā gālayaṃti ye ||
vāhayaṃti ca gāṃ vadhyāṃ te mahānārakāḥ smṛtāḥ || 61 ||
āśramaṃ samanuprāptaṃ kṣuttṛṣṇāśramapīḍitam ||
ye.atithiṃ nābhimanyaṃte te vai nirayagāminaḥ||62||
anāthaṃ vikalaṃ dīnaṃ bālaṃ vṛddhaṃ kṛśāturam||
nānukaṃpaṃti ye mūḍhāste yānti nirayārṇavam || 63 ||
ajāviko māhiṣikaḥ sāmudro vṛṣalīpatiḥ ||
śūdraviṭkṣatravṛttiśca nārakī syāddvijādhamaḥ || 64 ||
śilpinaḥ kārukā vaidyā hemakārā naṭā dvijāḥ ||
kṛtakaukṣeya sayuktāstathānye nārakāḥ smṛtāḥ || 65 ||
yaścoditamatikramya svecchayā vā haretkaram ||
narake tu sa pacyeta yaśca daṃḍarucirbhavet || 66 ||
utkocakairadhikṛtaistaskaraiśca prapīḍyate ||
yasya rājñaḥ prajā ruṣṭā pacyate narakeṣu saḥ || 67 ||
ye dvijāḥ pratigṛhṇaṃti nṛpasyānyāyavartinaḥ ||
prayāṃti tepi ghorāṇi narakāṇi na saṃśayaḥ ||68||
pāradārikacaurāṇāṃ yatpāpaṃ pārthivasya tat ||
bhavedarakṣatastasmādghorastasya pratigrahaḥ || 69 ||
acauraṃ cauravatpaśyeccoraṃ vā.acaurarūpavat ||
avicārya nṛpastasmāddhātayannarakaṃ vrajet || 4.5.70 ||
ghṛtatailānnapānāni madhumāṃsasurāsavam ||
guḍekṣukṣāraśākāni dadhimūlaphalāni ca || 71 ||
tṛṇaṃ kāṣṭhaṃ puṣpapatramauṣadhaṃ kāṃsyabhājanam ||
upānacchatraśakaṭamāsanaṃ śayanāṃbaram || 72 ||
tāmraṃ sīsaṃ trapuṃ kācaṃ śaṃkhādyaṃ ca jalodbhavam ||
vārkṣaṃ vā vaiṇavādyaṃ vā gṛheṣūpaskarāṇi ca || 73 ||
ūrṇākārpāsakauśeyabhaṃgapaṭṭodbhavāni ca ||
sthūlasūkṣmāṇi vastrāṇi ye ca lobhāddharaṃti ca || 74 ||
evamādīni cānyāni dravyāṇi vividhāni ca ||
narakāṇi dhruvaṃ yāṃti narā vā nātra saṃśayaḥ || 75 ||
yadvā tadvā paradravyamapi sarṣapamātrakam ||
apahṛtya naro yāti narakaṃ nātra saṃśayaḥ || 76 ||
evamādyaià¥rnaraḥ pāpairutkrāṃteḥ samanaṃtaram ||
śarīraṃ yātanārthāya pūrvākāramavāpnuyāt || 77 ||
yamalokaṃ vrajettena śarīreṇa yamājñayā ||
yamadūtairmahāghorairnīyamānaḥ suduḥkhitaḥ || 78 ||
tiryaṅmānuṣadehānāmadharmaniratātmanām ||
dharmarājaḥ smṛtaḥ śāstā sughorairvividhairvadhaiḥ || 79 ||
vinayācārayuktānāṃ pramādātskhalitātmanām ||
prāyaścitterguruḥ śāstā na ca tairdṛśyate yamaḥ || 4.5.80 || pāradārikacaurāṇāmanyāyavyavahāriṇām ||
nṛpatiḥ śāsakasteṣāṃ pracchannānāṃ ca dharmarāṭ || 81 ||
tasmātkṛtasya pāpasya prāyaścittaṃ samācaret ||
nābhuktasyānyathā nāśaḥ kalpakoṭiśatairapi || 82 ||
yaḥ karoti svayaṃ karma kārayedvāpi moda yet ||
kāyena manasā vācā tasya cādhogatiḥ phalam || 83 ||
iti saṃkṣepataḥ proktāḥ pāpabhedāḥ sasādhanāḥ ||
kathyate gatayaścitrā narāṇāṃ pāpakarmaṇām || 84 ||
vākkāyacittajanitairbahubhedabhinnaiḥ kṛtyaiḥ śubhāśubhaphalodayahetubhūtaiḥ || bhāsvatsureśabhuvanaṃ narakānanekānsaṃprāpnuvaṃti manujā manujeṃdracandra||85||
iti śrībhaviṣye mahāpurāṇa uttaraparvaṇi pāpabhedākhyānaṃ nāma pañcamodhyāyaḥ||5||
śubhāśubhaphalanirdeśavarṇanam
śrīkṛṣṇa uvāca||
athaibhiḥ pātakairyāṃti yamalokaṃ caturvidhaiḥ||
saṃtrāsajananaṃ ghoraṃ vivaśāḥ sarvadehinaḥ||1||
garbhasthairjāyamānaiśca bālaistaruṇamadhyamaiḥ||
puṃstrīnapuṃsakairvṛddhairjñātavyaṃ sarvajaṃtubhiḥ || 2 ||
śubhāśubhaphalaṃ tatra dehināṃ pravicāryate ||
citraguptādibhiḥ sabhyairmadhyasthaiḥ sarvadarśibhiḥ || 3 ||
na te.atra prāṇinaḥ saṃti ye na yāṃti yamakṣayam ||
avaśyaṃ hi kṛtaṃ karma bhoktavyaṃ tadvidhāritam|| 4 ||
tatra ye śubhakarmāṇaḥ saumyacittā dayānvitāḥ |||8
te narā yāṃti saumyena pathā yamaniketanam || 5 ||
yaḥ pradadyāddvijendrāṇāmupānatkāṣṭhapādukām ||
sa varāśvena mahatā sukhaṃ yāti yamālayam ||6||
chatradānena gacchaṃti yathā chatreṇa dehinaḥ ||
divyavastraparīdhānā yāṃti vastrapradāyinaḥ || 7 ||
śibikāśvapradānena tatastena sukhaṃ vrajet ||
śayyāsana pradānena sukhaṃ yāṃti yamāśrayam || 8 ||
ārāmakartā chāyāsu śītalāsu sukhaṃ vrajet ||
yāṃti puṣpakayānena puṣpārāmapradāyinaḥ || 9 ||
devāyatanakartā ca yatīnāmāśramasya ca ||
anāthamaṃḍapānāṃ ca krīḍanyāti gṛhottamaiḥ || 4.6.10 ||
devāgniguruviprāṇāṃ mātāpitrośca pūjakāḥ ||
pūjyamānā narā yāṃti kāmikena pathā sukham || 11 ||
dyotayaṃto diśaḥ sarvā yāṃti dīpapradāyinaḥ ||
pratiśrayapradānena sukhaṃ yāṃti gṛhaṃ svayam || 12 ||
sarva kāmasamṛddhena pathā gacchaṃti gopradāḥ ||
ye na pāpāni kurvaṃti te tṛptā yāṃti nānyathā ||13||
ārtauṣadhapradātāraḥ sukhaṃ yāṃti nirākulāḥ ||
viśrāmyamāṇā gacchaṃti guruśuśrūṣaṇe ratāḥ||14||
pādaśaucapradānena śītalena pathā vrajet ||
pādābhyaṃgaṃ ca yaḥ kuryādaśvapṛṣṭhena sa vrajet||15||
hemaratnapradānena yāti durgāṇi nistaran ||
yānavāhanadānena narayānena gacchati || 16 ||
sarvakāmasamṛddhātmā bhūmidānena gacchati ||
annapānapradānena pibankhādaṃśca gacchati || 17 ||
ityevamādibhirdānaiḥ sukhaṃ yāṃti yamakṣayam ||
svargepi vipulānbhogānprāpnuvaṃti narottama || 18 ||
sarveṣāmeva dānānāmannadānaṃ paraṃ smṛtam ||
sadyaḥ prītikaraṃ divyaṃ balabuddhivivarddhanam || 19 ||
trayāṇāmapi lokānāṃ jīvitaṃ hyudakaṃ smṛtam ||
pavitramamṛtaṃ divyaṃ śuddhaṃ sarvarasāyanam || 4.6.20 ||
annaṃ pānaṃ ca govastrabhūśayyācchatramāsanam ||
paraloke praśastāni dānānyaṣṭau viśeṣataḥ || 21 ||
annadānaṃ viśeṣeṇa dharma rājapure narāḥ ||
yasmādyāṃti sukhenaiva tasmāddharmaṃ samācaret || 22 ||
ye punaḥ krūrakarmāṇaḥ pāpā dānavivarjitāḥ ||
te ghoreṇa pathā yāṃti dakṣiṇena svamālayam || 23 ||
ṣaḍaśītisahasrāṇi yojanānāmatītya yat ||
vaivasvatapuraṃ jñeyaṃ nānārūpavyavasthitam || 24 ||
samīpasthamivābhāti narāṇāṃ śubhakarmaṇām ||
pāpānāmatidūrasthaṃ pathā raudreṇa gacchatām || 25 ||
tīvrakaṃṭakayuktena śarkarānicitena ca ||
kṣuradhārānibhaistīvraiḥ pāṣāṇairnicitena ca || 26 ||
kvacitpaṃkena mahatā duruttāraiśca khātakaiḥ ||
lohasūcīnibhairdarbhaiḥ saṃchannena pathā kvacit || 27 ||
taṭaprapātaviṣṭaṃbhaiḥ parvatairvṛkṣasaṃkulaiḥ ||
prataptāṃgārayuktena yāṃti mārgeṇa duḥkhitāḥ || 28 ||
kvacidviṣamagartaiśca kvacilloṣṭaiḥ supicchilaiḥ ||
prataptavālukābhiśca tathā tīkṣṇaiśca śaṃkubhiḥ || 29 ||
anekatāpairvitatairvyāptaṃ vaṃśavanaṃ kvacit ||
kvacidvālukayā vyāptaṃ kaṣṭenaiva praveśanam || 4.6.30 ||
kvaciduṣṇāṃbunā vyāptaṃ kvacitkārīṣavahninā ||
kvacitsiṃhairvṛkairvyāptaṃ daṃśaiḥ kīṭaiśca dāruṇaiḥ || 31 ||
kvacinmahājalaukābhiḥ kvaciccājagaraiḥ punaḥ ||
makṣikābhiśca raudrābhiḥ kvacitsarpairviṣolbaṇaiḥ || 32 ||
mattamātaṃgayūthaiśca balonmattaiḥ pramāthibhiḥ ||
paṃthānamullikhadbhiśca tīkṣṇaśṛṃgairmahāvṛṣaiḥ || 33 ||
mahāviṣāṇairmahiṣairuṣṭrairmattaiśca khādakaiḥ ||
ḍākinībhiśca raudrābhirvikarālaiśca rākṣasaiḥ || 34 ||||
vyādhibhiśca mahāghoraiḥ pīḍyamānā vrajaṃti ca ||
mahādhūlīvimiśreṇa mahācaṇḍena vāyunā || 35 ||
mahāpāṣāṇavarṣeṇa hanyamānā nirāśrayāḥ ||
kvacidvidyutprapātena dīryamāṇā vrajaṃti ca || 36 ||
mahatā bāṇavarṣeṇa vidhyamānāśca sarvaśaḥ ||
patadbhirvajrasaṃghātairulkāpātaiśca dāruṇaiḥ || 37 ||
prataptāgāravarṣeṇa dahyamānā vrajaṃti ca ||
taptena pāṃśuvarṣeṇa pūryamāṇā rudaṃti ca || 38 ||
mahāmegharavairghorairvitrāsyaṃte muhurmuhuḥ ||
niśitāyudhavarṣeṇa cūryamāṇā narairvṛtāḥ ||
mahākṣārāmbudhārābhiḥ sicyamānā dravaṃti ca || 39 ||
mahāśītena marutā tīkṣṇena paruṣeṇa ca ||
samaṃtātpīḍyamānāste śuṣyaṃte saṃkucaṃti ca || 4.6.40 ||
itthaṃ mārgeṇa raudreṇa pāṃthairvi rahitena ca ||
nirālaṃbena durgeṇa nirjalena samaṃtataḥ ||41||
aviśrāmeṇa mahatā nirgatāpāśrayeṇa ca ||
tamorūpeṇa kaṣṭena sarvaduḥkhāśrayeṇa ca||42||
nīyaṃte dehinaḥ sarve ye mūḍhāḥ pāpakarmiṇaḥ ||
yamadūtairmahāghoraistadājñākāribhirbalāt ||43||
ekākinaḥ parādhīnā mitrabaṃdhuvivarjitāḥ ||
śocaṃtaḥ svāni karmāṇi rudaṃtaśca muhurmuhuḥ || 44 ||
pretabhūtā vivastrāśca śuṣkakaṇṭhoṣṭhatālukāḥ ||
kṛśāṅgā bhītabhītāśca dahyamānāḥ kṣudhāgninā || 45 ||
baddhāḥ śṛṃkhalayā keciduttānāḥ pādayornarāḥ ||
ākṛṣyaṃte ghṛṣyamāṇā yamadūtairbalotkaṭaiḥ || 46 ||
punaścādhomukhāścānye ghṛṣyamāṇāḥ suduḥkhitāḥ||
keśapāśanibaddhāśca kṛṣyaṃte rajjubhirnarāḥ || 47 ||
lalāṭe cāṃkuśaistīkṣṇairbhinnāḥ kṛṣyaṃti dehinaḥ ||
uttānā raṭamānāśca kvacidaṃgāravartmanā|| 48 ||
pāścādbāhvaṃsabaddhāśca jaṭhare ca prapīḍitāḥ ||
pūritāḥ śṛṃkhalābhiśca hastayośca prakīlitāḥ || 49 ||
grīvāyāmarddhacandreṇa kṣipyamāṇā itastataḥ ||
śiśne ca vṛṣaṇe baddhvā nīyaṃte carmarajjunā || 4.6.50 ||
vibhinnā udare cānye taptaśṛṃkhalayā narāḥ ||
kṛṣyaṃte karṇayoścānye bhinnāśca cibukopari || || 51 ||
chinnāgrapādahastāśca chinnakarṇauṣṭhanāsikāḥ || saṃchinnaśiśnavṛṣaṇāśchinnabhinnāṃgasaṃdhayaḥ || 52 ||
pratudyamānāḥ kuṃtaiśca sāyakaiśca tatastataḥ ||
bhidyamānāḥ pradhāvaṃti krandamānā nirāśrayāḥ || 53 ||
mudgarairllohadaṇḍaiśca hanyamānā muhurmuhuḥ ||
kaśaiśca vividhaighorairjvalitāgnisamaprabhaiḥ || 54 ||
bhiṃdipālairvibhidyaṃte sravaṃtaḥ pūyaśoṇitam ||
māṃse kṣatāśca kṛmibhirnīyaṃte vivaśā narāḥ || 55 ||
yācamānāśca salilamannaṃ cāpi bubhukṣitāḥ ||
chāyāṃ prārthayamānāśca śītārtā bahuvāyunā || 56 ||
dānahīnāḥ prayāṃtyevaṃ yāvaṃto vimukhā narāḥ ||
gṛhītadānapātheyāḥ sukhaṃ yāṃti yamālayam || 57 ||
evaṃ pathātikaṣṭena prāptā yamapuraṃ tadā ||
prajñāpitāstadā dūtairniveśyaṃte yamāgrataḥ || 58 ||
tatra ye śubhakarmāṇastāṃśca saṃmānayedyamaḥ ||
svāgatāsanadānena pādyārgheṇa priyeṇa ca || 59 ||
dhanyā yūyaṃ mahātmāna ātmano hitakāriṇaḥ ||
yena divyasukhārthāya bhavadbhiḥ sukṛtaṃ kṛtam || 4.6.60 ||
idaṃ vimānamāruhya divyastrībhogabhūṣitam ||
svargaṃ gacchadhvamatulaṃ sarvakāmasamanvitam || 61 ||
tato bhuktvā mahābhogānaṃte puṇyasya saṃkṣayāt ||
yatkiñcidalpamaśubhaṃ punastadiha bhokṣyatha || 62 ||
te cāpi dharmarājānaṃ narāḥ puṇyānubhāvataḥ ||
paśyaṃti saumyavadanaṃ pitṛbhūtamivātmanaḥ || 63 ||
ye punaḥ pāpakarmāṇaste paśyaṃti bhayānakam ||
pāpāviśuddhanayanā viparītātmabuddhayaḥ || 64 ||
daṃṣṭrākarālavadanaṃ bhrukuṭīkuṭilekṣaṇam ||
ūrdhvakeśaṃ mahāśmaśruprasphuradadharottaram || 65 ||
aṣṭādaśabhujaṃ kruddhaṃ nīlāṃjanacayopamam ||
savāryudhodyatakaraṃ brahmadaṇḍena tarjakam || 66 ||
mahāmahiṣamārūḍhaṃ dīptāgnisamalocanam ||
raktamālyāmbaradharaṃ mahāmerumivocchritam || 67 ||
pralayāṃbudanirghoṣaṃ pibaṃtamiva sāgaram ||
grasaṃtamiva lokānāmudgiraṃtamivānalam || 68 ||
mṛtyuśca tatsamīpasthaḥ kālānalasamaprabhaḥ ||
kālaścāṃjanasaṃkāśaḥ kṛtāṃtaśca bhayānakaḥ || 69 ||
mārī cogrā mahāmārī kālarātriḥ sudāruṇā ||
vividhā vyādhayaḥ kaṣṭā nānārūpabhayāvahāḥ || 4.6.70 ||
śaktiśūlāṃkuśadharāḥ pāśacakrāsidhāriṇaḥ ||
vajradaṇḍadharā raudrāḥ kṣudratūṇīdhanurdharāḥ || 71 ||
asaṃkhyātā mahāvīryāḥ krūrāścāñjanasaṃprabhāḥ ||
sarvāyudhodyatakarā yamadūtā bhayānakāḥ || 72 ||
anena parivāreṇa mahāghoreṇa saṃvṛtam ||
yamaṃ paśyaṃti pāpiṣṭhāścitraguptaṃ ca bhīṣaṇam ||
nirbhartsayataṃ cātyantaṃ yamaṃ sadupakāriṇam ||73||
citraguptaśca bhagavāndharmavākyaiḥ prabodhayan ||
bhobho duṣkṛtakarmāṇaḥ paradravyāpahāriṇaḥ |
garvitā rūpavīryeṇa paradāravimardakāḥ ||74||
yatsvayaṃ kriyate karma tatsvayaṃ bhujyate punaḥ ||
tatkimātmopaghātārthaṃ bhavadbhirduṣkṛtaṃ kṛtam ||75||
idānīṃ kiṃ pratapyadhvaṃ pīḍyamānāḥ svakarmabhiḥ ||
bhuñjadhvaṃ svāni karmāṇi nātra doṣo.asti kasyacit || 76 ||
ete ca pṛthivīpālāḥ saṃprāptā matsamīpataḥ ||
svakīyaiḥ karmabhirghorairduṣprajñā balagarvitāḥ || 77 ||
bhobho nṛpā durācārāḥ prajāvidhvaṃsakāriṇaḥ ||
alpakālasya rājyasya kṛte kiṃ duṣkṛtaṃ kṛtam || 78 ||
rājyalobhena mohādvā balādanyāyataḥ prajāḥ ||
yatpīḍitāḥ phalaṃ tasya bhuṃjadhvamadhunā nṛpāḥ || 79 ||
kṛtaṃ rājyaṃ kalatraṃ ca yadarthamaśubhaṃ kṛtam ||
tatsarvaṃ saṃparityajya yūyamekākinaḥ sthitāḥ || 4.6.80 ||
paśyāma tadbalaṃ tubhyaṃ yena vidhvaṃsitāḥ prajāḥ ||
yamadūtaistāḍyamānā adhunā kīdṛśaṃ bhavet|| 81 ||
evaṃ bahuvidhairvākyairupālabdhā yamena te ||
śocaṃtaḥ svāni karmāṇi tūṣṇīṃ tiṣṭhaṃti pārthiva || 82 ||
iti dharmaṃ samādiśya nṛpāṇāṃ dharmarāṭ punaḥ ||
tatpāpapaṃkaśuddhyarthamidaṃ vacanamabravīt || 83 ||
bhobhoścaṇḍa mahācaṇḍa gṛhītvā nṛpatīnimān ||
viśodhayadhvaṃ pāpebhyaḥ krameṇa narakāgniṣu ||84||
tataḥ śīghraṃ samutthāya nṛpānsaṃgṛhya pādayoḥ ||
bhrāmayitvātivegena vikṣipyordhvaṃ vigṛhya ca || 85 ||
sarvaprāṇena mahatā sutapte tu śilātale ||
ā sphālayaṃti tarasā vajreṇeva mahādrumam || 86 ||
tataḥ sa raktasrotobhiḥ sravate jarjarīkṛtaḥ ||
sa niḥsaṃjñastadā dehī niśceṣṭaḥ saṃprajāyate || 87 ||
tataḥ sa vāyunā spṛṣṭaḥ śanairujīvate punaḥ ||
tataḥ pāpaviśuddhyarthaṃ kṣipyate narakārṇave || 88 ||
aṣṭāviṃśatirevādhaḥ kṣiternarakakoṭayaḥ||
saptamasya talasyāṃte ghore tamasi saṃsthitāḥ || 89 ||
rauravaprabhṛtīnāṃ ca narakāṇāṃ śataṃ smṛtam ||
catvāriṃśatsamadhikaṃ mahānarakamaṃḍalam || 4.6.90 ||
yeṣu pāpāḥ prapacyaṃte narāḥ karmānurūpataḥ ||
yātanābhirvicitrābhirākarmaprakṣayādbhṛśam || 91 ||
ā malaprakṣayādyadvadagnau dhāsyaṃti dhātavaḥ ||
tathā pāpakṣayātpāpāśśodhyaṃte narakāgniṣu || 92 ||
sugāḍhahastayā bāḍhaṃ taptaśṛṃkhalayā narāḥ ||
mahāvṛkṣāgraśākhāyāṃ laṃbyaṃte yamakiṃkaraiḥ || 93 || |
tataste sarpayaṃtreṇa kṣiptā dolyaṃti kiṃkaraiḥ ||
dolyaṃtaścātivegena niḥsaṃjñā yāṃti yojanam || 94 ||
aṃtarikṣasthitānāṃ ca lohabhāraśataṃ tataḥ ||
pādayorbadhyate teṣāṃ yamadūtairmahābalaiḥ || 95 ||
tena bhāreṇa mahatā bhṛśamātardditā narāḥ ||
dhyāyaṃtaḥ svāni karmāṇi tūṣṇīṃ tiṣṭheti vihvalāḥ || ||96 || jvālābhiragnivarṇābhirllohadaṃḍaiḥ sakaṃṭakaiḥ||
hanyaṃte kiṃkarairghoraiḥ samaṃtātpāpakāriṇaḥ ||97 ||
tataḥ kṣāreṇa dīptena vahnerapi viśeṣataḥ ||
samaṃtataḥ pralipyaṃte kṣatāṃgā jarjarīkṛtāḥ || 98 ||
punarvidārya cāṃgeṣu śirasaḥprabhṛti kramāt ||
vṛntākavatprapacyaṃte taptatailakaṭāhake || 99 ||
viṣṭhāpūrṇe tataḥ kūpe kṛmīṇāṃ nicaye tataḥ ||
medastvakpūyapūrṇāyāṃ vāpyāṃ kṣipyaṃti te punaḥ || 4.6.100 ||
bhakṣyaṃte krimibhistīkṣṇairlohatuṇḍaiśca vāyasaiḥ ||
śvabhirdaṃśairvṛkairghorairvyāghrairapyatha vānaraiḥ || 101 ||
pacyaṃte māṃsavaccāpi pradīptāṃgārarāśiṣu ||
protāḥ śūleṣu tīkṣṇeṣu narāḥ pāpena karmaṇā || 102||
tilapiṃḍairivākramya ghoraiḥ karmabhirātmanaḥ ||
tilavatsamprapīḍayante cakrākhye narake tathā || 103 ||
bhidyaṃte cāpi talpeṣu lohabhrāṣṭreṣvanekadhā ||
tailapūrṇakaṭāheṣu sutapteṣu punaḥpunaḥ || 104 ||
bahuśaḥ pīḍyate jihvā yā.asatyapriyavādinī ||
saṃdaṃśena sutaptena prapīḍyante ca pādayoḥ || 1-5||
mithyāgamapravaktuśca dvijihvasya ca nirgatā ||
jihvārddhakrośavistīrṇā halaistīkṣṇaiśca bādhyate || || 106 ||
nirbhartsayaṃti ye krūrā mātaraṃ pitaraṃ gurum ||
teṣāṃ vakṣa ulūkābhirmukhamāpūrya sevyate ||107||
tataḥ kṣāreṇa dīptena tāmreṇa tu punaḥpunaḥ ||
hatenāpūryate.atyarthaṃ taptatailaiśca tanmukham || 108 ||
itastataḥ punarvaktraṃ bhṛśamāpūrya hanyate ||
viṣṭhābhiḥ kṛmibhiścāpi suvarṇaharaṇairnaraḥ || 109 ||
pariṣvajati cātyugrāṃ pradīptāṃ lohaśālmalīm ||
hanyate pṛṣṭhadeśe ca punastīkṣṇairmahāghanaiḥ || 4.6.110 ||
daṃtureṇātikūṭena krakacena balīyasā ||
śiraḥ prabhṛti pādāṃtaṃ ghoraiḥ karmabhirātmajaiḥ ||
khādyate svāni māṃsāni pāyate śoṇitaṃ svakam || 111 ||
annaṃ pānaṃ na dattaṃ yairmūḍhairnāpyanumoditam||
ikṣuvatte prapīḍyante jarjarīkṛtamastakāḥ || 112 ||
asitālavane ghore cchidyaṃte khaṃḍakhaṃḍaśaḥ||
sūcībhirbhinnasarvāṃgāstaptaśūlapraropitāḥ ||
saṃbādhyamānā vivaśāḥ kliśyaṃte na mriyaṃti vai || 113 ||
dehādutsādyamāṃsāni bhidyaṃte.asthīni mudgaraiḥ ||
dṛṣṭirākṛṣyate tūrṇaṃ yamadūtairbalotkaṭaiḥ || 114 ||
nirastāste nirucchvāsāstiṣṭhaṃti narake dhruvam ||
ucchvasaṃti sadā śvāsairvālukāvadanāvṛtāḥ || 115 ||
raurave rodamānāśca pīḍyante vividhaiḥ śaraiḥ ||
mahārauravapīḍābhirmahatībhistadaṃtike || 116 ||
padorāsye gude caiva pārśve corasi mastake ||
nikhanyaṃte ghanaistīkṣṇaiḥ sutaptairlohaśaṃkubhiḥ || 117 ||
sutaptavālukāyāṃ ca praluṭhyante punaḥpunaḥ ||
jatupaṃke bhṛśaṃ tapte kṣiprā krandaṃti vistaram || 118 ||
tenatenaiva rūpeṇa hasante pāradārikam ||
gāḍhamāliṅgyate nārīṃ jvalaṃtīṃ lohanirmitām || 119 ||
pūrvākāraṃ ca puruṣaṃ prajvalaṃtaṃ samaṃtataḥ ||
duścāriṇīḥ striyo gāḍhamāliṃgaṃti vadaṃti ca || 4.6.120 ||
kiṃ pradhāvasi vegena te na mokṣo.asti sāṃpratam ||
laṃghitaste yathā bhartā pāpaṃ bhuṃkṣva tathādhunā || 121 ||
lohakumbhe tathā kṣiptāḥ savidhānaiḥ śanaiḥśanaiḥ ||
mṛdvagninātha pacyaṃte svapāpaireva mānavāḥ || 122 ||
kvaṇaṃtyudūkhale sāsrāḥ prakṣipyaṃte śilāsu ca ||
kṣipyaṃte cāṃdhakūpeṣu daśyaṃte bhramarairbhṛśam || 123 ||
kṛmibhirbhinnasarvāṃgāḥ śataśo jarjarīkṛtāḥ ||
sutīkṣṇakṣārakūpepu kṣipyaṃte tadanaṃtaram|| 124 ||
mahājvāle ca narake pāpāḥ phūtkārayaṃti ca ||
itastataśca dhāvaṃti dahyamānāstadarcciṣā || 125 ||
pṛṣṭhe cānīya jaṃghe dve vinyaste skandhayoḥ sthite ||
tayormadhyena cākṛṣya bāhupṛṣṭhena gāḍhataḥ ||
baddhvā parasparaṃ sarvaṃ sudṛḍhaṃ gāḍharajjubhi. || 126 ||
pīḍayaṃti susaṃrabdhā bhramarāstīkṣṇalohajāḥ ||
mānināṃ krodhināṃ caiva purā pāpasya saṃśayāt || 127 ||
pāpānāṃ narake puṃsāṃ ghṛṣyate caṃdanaṃ yathā ||
śarīrābhyaṃtaragataṃ taruṇānāṃ ca dāruṇam || 128 ||
piṃḍabaṃdho smṛto yāmyo mahājvāleṣu yātanāḥ ||
rajjubhirveṣṭitāṃgāśca praliptāḥ kardamena ca ||
karīṣarūkṣavahnau ca pacyaṃte na mriyaṃti ca || 129 ||
sutīkṣṇakṣāratoyena śarkarāsu śilāsu ca ||
ā pāpasaṃkṣayātpāpā ghṛṣyaṃte caṃdanaṃ yathā || 4.6.130 ||
śarīrābhyantaragataiḥ prabhūtaiḥ kṛmibhirnarāḥ ||
bhakṣyaṃte tīkṣṇavadanairādehaprakṣayāṭ bhṛśam || 131 ||
kṛmīṇāṃ nicaye kṣiptāḥ pūtimāṃsasya rāśiṣu ||
tiṣṭhantyudvignahṛdayāḥ parvatābhyāṃ ca pīḍitāḥ || 132 ||
sutaptavajralepena śarīramanulipyate ||
adhomukhordhvapādāśca dhṛtāstapyaṃti vahniṣu || 133 ||
vadanāṃte pravinyastaṃ sutaptāyomayaṃ guḍam ||
te khādaṃti parādhīnā hanyamānāstu mudgaraiḥ || 134 ||
ye śivāyatanārāmavāpīkūpamaṭhāṃga ṇāt ||
abhidravaṃti pāpiṣṭhā narāstatra vasaṃti ca || 135 || vyāyāmodvartanābhyaṃgasnānamāpānabhojanam ||
krīḍanaṃ maithunaṃ dyūtamāca raṃti ramaṃti ca || 136 ||
te bādhairvividhairghorairikṣuyantrādipīḍanaiḥ ||
nirayāgniṣu pacyaṃte yāvadācandratārakam || 137 ||
ye śṛṇvaṃti gurorniṃdāṃ teṣāṃ karṇaḥ prapūryyate ||
agnivarṇairayaḥkīlaistaptatāmrādibhirdrutaiḥ || 138 ||
trapusīsārakūṭādyaiḥ kṣāreṇa jatunā punaḥ ||
kramādāpūryate karṇo narakeṣu ca yātanāḥ ||
anukrameṇa sarveṣu bhavaṃtyetāḥ samaṃtataḥ || 139 ||
sarveṃdriyāṇāmapyevaṃ kramātpāpena yātanāḥ ||
bhavaṃti ghorāḥ pratyekaṃ śarīre tatkṛtena ca || 4.6.140 ||
sparśalobhena ye mūḍhāḥ saṃspṛśaṃti parastriyam ||
teṣāṃ tvagagnivarṇābhiḥ sūcībhiḥ pūryate bhṛśam ||141||
tataḥ kṣārādibhiḥ sarvaiḥ śarīramanulipyate ||
yātanā ca mahākaṣṭā sarveṣu narakeṣu ca || 142 ||
guroḥ kurvaṃti bhrukuṭiṃ krūraṃ cakṣuśca ye narāḥ ||
paradārāṃśca paśyaṃti lubdhāḥ snigdhena cakṣuṣā ||143||
sūcībhiragnivarṇābhisteṣāṃ netraṃ prapūryate ||
kṣārādyaiśca kramātsarvairdehe sarvāśca yātanāḥ || 144 |||
devāgniguruviprāṇāṃ ye.anivedya prabhuṃjate ||
lohakīlaśataistaptaistajjihvāsyaṃ prapūryate || 145 ||
tataḥ kṣāreṇa dīptena tailatāmrādibhiḥ kramāt |||
śarīre ca mahāghorāścitrā narakayātanāḥ ||146||
ye śivārāmapuṣpāṇi lobhātsaṃgṛhya pāṇinā ||
jighraṃti mūḍhamanasaḥ śirasā dhārayaṃti ca ||147|||
āpūryate śirasteṣāṃ sutaptairlohaśaṃkubhiḥ ||
nāsikā cātibahuśastataḥ kṣārādibhiḥ punaḥ || 148 ||
ye niṃdaṃti mahātmānamācāryaṃ dharmadeśikam ||
śivabhaktāṃśca ye mūḍhāḥ śivadharmaṃ ca śāśvatam || 149 ||
teṣāmurasi kaṃṭhe ca jihvāyāṃ daṃtasaṃdhiṣu ||
tālukoṣṭhe ca nāsāyāṃ mūrdhni sarvāṃgasaṃ dhiṣu || 4.6.150 ||
agnivarṇāḥ sutaptāśca triśikhā lohaśaṃkavaḥ ||
ākhanyaṃte subahuśaḥ sthāneṣveteṣu mudgaraiḥ || 151 ||
tataḥ kṣāreṇa taptena tāmreṇa trapuṇā punaḥ ||
taptatailādibhiḥ sarvairāpūryaṃte samaṃtataḥ || 152 ||
kṣāratāmrādibhirdīptairdahyaṃte bahuśaḥ punaḥ ||
narakeṣu ca sarveṣu vicitrā dehayā tanāḥ || 153 ||
bhavaṃti bahuśaḥ kaṣṭāḥ pāṇipādasamudbhavāḥ ||
śivāyatanaparyaṃte śivārāme ca kutracit || 154 ||
samutsṛjaṃti ye pāpāḥ purīṣaṃ mūtrameva vā ||
teṣāṃ liṃgaṃ savṛṣaṇaṃ cūrṇyate lohamudgaraiḥ || 155 ||
sūcībhiragnivarṇābhistataścāpūryate punaḥ ||
lohadaṇḍaśca sumahānagnivarṇaḥ sakaṃṭakaḥ ||
ākhanyate gude teṣāṃ yāvanmūrdhni vinirgataḥ ||156||
tataḥ kṣāreṇa mahatā tāmreṇa trapuṇā punaḥ ||
drutenāpūryate gāḍhaṃ gudaṃ śiśnaṃ hi dehinām||157||
manaḥ sarvendriyāṇāṃ ca yasmāduktaṃ pravarttakam ||
tasmādindriyaduḥkhena jāyate tatsuduḥkhitam ||158||
dhane satyapi ye dānaṃ na prayacchaṃti tṛṣṇayā |||
atithiṃ cāvamanyaṃte kālaprāptaṃ gṛhāśrame ||159||
te lohatoraṇe baddhā hastapādāvatāḍitāḥ ||
vidāritāṃgāḥ śuṣyaṃte tiṣṭhaṃtyabdaśataṃ narāḥ ||4.6.160||
hastapādalalāṭeṣu kīlitā lohaśaṃkubhiḥ ||
nityaṃ ca nīvṛtaṃ vaktraṃ kīlakadvayanāḍitam || 161 ||
kṛmibhiḥ prāṇibhiścograirlohadaṃḍaiśca vāyasaiḥ ||
upadravairbahuvidhaiḥ sarpairmukharakaistataḥ || 162 ||
āpīḍyaṃte jihvāmūle nibadhya śṛṃkhalāḥ punaḥ ||
tiṣṭhaṃti laṃbamānāśca lohabhāraprapīḍitāḥ ||163||
snigdhe ca vṛṣaṇe naddhe lohabhāradvayaṃ punaḥ ||
tiṣṭhate laṃbamānaṃ ca bahubhāracaturguṇam || 164 ||
tataḥ svamāṃsamutkṛtya tilamātrapramāṇataḥ ||
bhojanaṃ dīyate teṣāṃ sūcyagreṇa saśoṇitam || 165 ||
yadā nirmāṃsatāṃ prāptāḥ kālena mahatā punaḥ ||
tataḥ kṣāreṇa dīptena vapusteṣāṃ pralipyate || 166 ||
sicyaṃte varṣadhārābhiḥ śoṣyaṃte vāyunā punaḥ ||
sicyaṃte taptatailena prataptena samaṃtataḥ || 167 ||
paścātte vahninā bhūyo dūrasthena śanaiḥ śanaiḥ ||
niḥśeṣayātanābhiśca pīḍyaṃte kramaśaḥ punaḥ || 168 ||
bhṛśaṃ bubhukṣayā pīḍā mūrcchayātipipāsayā ||
atyuṣṇenātiśītena pāpānāṃ samareṇa ca || 169 ||
evamādimahāghorā yātanāḥ pāpakāriṇaḥ ||
ekaike narake caiva śataśotha sahasraśaḥ || 4.6.170 ||
pratyekaṃ yātanāścitrāḥ sarveṣu narakeṣu ca ||
kaṣṭaṃ varṣaśatenāpi soḍhuṃ sarvaiśca nārake ||171||
ete ca vividhairghorairyātyamānāśca karmabhiḥ ||
mriyante naiva pāpiṣṭhā vividhāḥ pāpakāriṇaḥ || || 172 ||
mahāghorābhighorākhyā kālāgnisadṛśopamāḥ ||
śrutairetairmahāraudrairmriyante mṛducetasaḥ || 173 ||
tatastenātra kathitāḥ pāpā gacchaṃti tānsvayam ||
putramitrakalatrārthaṃ yadā puṇyaṃ tvapākṛtam || 174 ||
ekākī dahyate tena na ca paśyati tāni saḥ ||
ātmanā ca kṛtaṃ pāpaṃ bhoktavyaṃ dhruvamātmanā || 175 ||
tatkimanyopaghātārthaṃ mūḍha pāpaṃ kṛtaṃ tvayā ||
evaṃ dūtairupālabdhāste pṛcchaṃti tataḥ punaḥ || 176 ||
kiyaṃtaṃ kena pāpena kālamatrāyate naraḥ ||
devadravyavināśena gurudrohādikarmabhiḥ ||
pāpātsarveṣu pacyaṃte narakeṣvāmahākṣayāt || 377 ||
mahāpātakinaścāpi sarveṣu narakeṣviha ||
ācaṃdratārakaṃ yāvatpīḍyaṃte vividhairvadhaiḥ || 178 ||
mahāpātakinaścānye narakārṇavakoṭiṣu ||
caturdaśasu pacyaṃte kalārdhaṃ vividhairvadhaiḥ || 179 ||
upapātakinaścāpi tadarthaṃ yāṃti mānavāḥ ||
śeṣapāpaistadardhaṃ tu kālaṃ cāpi tathāvidham || 4.6.180 ||
tasmātpāpaṃ na kurvīta caṃcale jīvite sati ||
pāpena hi dhruvaṃ yāṃti narakeṣu narāḥ svayam || 181 ||
yaḥ karoti naraḥ pāpaṃ tasyātmā dhruvamapriyaḥ ||
pāpasyeha phalaṃ duḥkhaṃ tadbhoktavyamihātmanā || 182 ||
kathaṃ te pāpaniratā narā rātriṣu śerate ||
maraṇāṃtaritā yeṣāṃ nārakī tīvrayātanā || 183 ||
evaṃ kliṣṭaviśuddhāśca sāvaśeṣeṇa karmaṇā ||
tataḥ kṣitiṃ samāsādya jāyante dehinaḥ puna. ||
sthāvarā vividhākārāstṛṇagulmādibhedataḥ || ||| 184 ||
tatrānubhūya duḥkhāni jāyaṃte kīṭayoniṣu ||
niṣkrāṃtāḥ kīṭayonibhyo jāyante pakṣiṇastataḥ || 185 ||
saṃśliṣṭāḥ pakṣibhāvena bhavaṃti mṛgajādiṣu ||
mārgaṃ duḥkhamatikramya jāyaṃte paśuyoniṣu || 186 ||
kramādgoyonimāsādya jāyante mānavāḥ punaḥ ||
evaṃ yoniṣu sarvāsu parikramya krameṇa tu ||
kālāṃtaravaśādyāṃti mānuṣyamatidurlabham || 187 ||
vyutkrameṇāpi mānuṣyaṃ prāpyate puṇyagocarāt ||
vicitrā gatayaḥ proktāḥ karmaṇāṃ gurulāghavāt || 188 ||
mānuṣyaṃ yaḥ samāsādya svargamokṣaprasādhakam ||
dvayorna sādhayatyekaṃ sa mṛtastapyate ciram || || 189 ||
devāsurāṇāṃ sarveṣāṃ mānuṣyamatidurlabham ||
tatsaṃprāpya kathāḥ kuryānna gacchennarakaṃ yathā || 4.6.190 ||
svargāpavargalābhāya yadi nāsti samudyataḥ ||
svargasya mūlaṃ mānuṣyaṃ tadyatnādanupālayet || 191 ||
dharmamūlena mānuṣyaṃ labdhvā sarvārthasādhakam ||
yadi lābhe na yatnaste mūlaṃ rakṣasva yatnataḥ || 192 ||
manuṣyatve ca vipratvaṃ yaḥ saṃprāpyātidurllabham ||
na karotyātmanaḥ śreyaḥ konyastasmādacetanaḥ || 193 ||
sarveṣāmeva deśānāṃ madhyadeśaḥ paraḥ smṛtaḥ ||
ataḥ svargaśca mokṣaśca yaśaḥ saṃprāpyate naraiḥ || 194 ||
etasminbhārate puṇye prāpya mānuṣyamadhruvam ||
yaḥkuryādātmanaḥ śreyastenātmā rakṣitaḥ svayam ||
yaḥ kuryānnātmanaḥ śreyastenātmā vaṃcitaḥ svayam || 195 ||
bhogabhūmiḥ smṛtaḥ svargaḥ karmabhūmiriyaṃ matā ||
iha yatkriyate karma svarge tadupabhujyate || 196 ||
yāvatsvāsthyaṃ śarīrasya tāvaddharmaṃ samācara ||
asvasthaścātiyatnena na kiñcitkartumutsa het || 197 ||
adhruveṇa śarīreṇa hyadhruvaṃ yaḥ prasādhayet ||
dhruvaṃ tasya paribhraṣṭamadhruvaṃ naṣṭameva ca || 198 ||
āyuṣaḥ khaṃḍakhaḍāni nipataṃti tavā grataḥ ||
ahorātrāpadeśena kimarthaṃ nāvabudhyase || 199 ||
yadā na jñāyate mṛtyuḥ kadā kasya bhaviṣyati ||
ākasmike hi maraṇe dhṛtiṃ viṃdeta kastadā || 4.6.200 ||
parityajya yadā sarvamekākī yāsyasi dhuvam ||
na dadāsi tadā kasmātpātheyārthamidaṃ dhanam || 201 ||
gṛhītadānapātheyā sukhaṃ yāṃti mahādhvani ||
anyathā kliśyate jaṃtuḥ pātheyarahitaḥ pathi || 202 ||
yeṣāṃ dvijendravāhitrī pūrṇabhāṃḍā tu gacchati ||
svargadeśasya pura tasteṣāṃ lābhaḥ padepade||203||
iti jñātvā naraḥ puṇyaṃ kuryātpāpaṃ vivarjayet ||
puṇyena yāti devatvamapuṇyānnarakaṃ vrajet 204||
ye manāgapi deveśaṃ prapannāḥ śaraṇaṃ śivam||
tepi ghoraṃ na paśyaṃti yamasya vadanaṃ narāḥ||205||
kiṃ tu pāpairmahāghoraiḥ kiñcitkālaṃ śivājñayā|
|| bhavaṃti preta rājānastato yāṃti śivālayam|| 206||
ye punaḥ sarvabhāvena pratipannā maheśvaram ||
na te lipyaṃti pāpena padmapatramivāṃbhasā || 207 ||
tasmā dvivardhayedbhaktimīśvare satataṃ budhaḥ ||
tanmāhātmyavicāreṇa bhavadoṣavirāgataḥ || 208 ||
pāpāni paṃca paramārthatayaiva pārtha duḥkhapradāni suciraṃ pitṛ rājaloke ||
anyāni yāni cirakālabhayānakāni vaktuṃ na yāṃti kila tāni parisphuṭāni || 209 ||
iti śrībhaviṣye mahāpurāṇe uttaraparvaṇi śrīkṛṣṇayudhiṣṭhirasaṃvāde śubhāśubhaphalanirdeśo nāma ṣaṣṭho.adhyāyaḥ || 6 || cha ||

śakaṭavratamāhātmyavarṇanam
|| śrīkṛṣṇa uvāca || ||
yadetatte samākhyātaṃ gaṃbhīraṃ narakārṇavama||
vratopavāsaniyamaplavenottīryate sukham || 1 ||
durllabhaṃ prāpya mānuṣyaṃ vidyutpatanacañcalam ||
tathātmānaṃ samādadhyādbhraśyate na punaryathā || 2 ||
dāna vratamayī kīrtiryasya syādiha dehinaḥ ||
paraloke.api sa tayā jñāyate jñātivarddhanaḥ || 3 ||
jñāyate neha nāmutra vratasvādhyāyavarjitaḥ ||
puruṣaḥ puruṣavyāghra tasmādvrataparo bhavet || 4 ||
atra te kathayiṣyāmi itihāsaṃ purātanam ||
siddhena saha saṃvādamavaṃtyāṃ brāhmaṇasya hi || 5 ||
yogarddhisiddhyā saṃsiddhaḥ kaścitsiddho mahītalam ||
cacāra vikṛtaṃ kṛtvā vapuḥ paramabhīṣaṇam || 6 ||
nigīrṇadaṃto laṃboṣṭhaḥ piṃgākṣastanumūrddhajaḥ ||
truṭitaika karṇo durvaṇaḥ śīrṇavastro mahodaraḥ || 7 ||
cipiṭākṣaḥ sphuṭitapājjaṃghāḍhyaḥ kṛśakūrparaḥ ||
diśaḥ paśyati saṃhṛṣṭo babhrāmodbhrāṃtacittavat || 8 ||
mūlajālikavipreṇa dṛṣṭaḥ pṛṣṭaśca ko bhavān ||
kadā svargātsamāyātaḥ kena kāryeṇa me vada || 9 ||
kacciddṛṣṭā tvayā raṃbhā bhābhāsitadigaṃtarā ||
cittasaṃmohanakarī devānāmekasundarī || 4.7.10 ||
gatvā madvacanādvācyā nirvācyā doṣadarśibhiḥ ||
āvaṃtyastvāṃ kuśalinīṃ pṛcchati sma dvijo ttamaḥ || 11 ||
siddhaḥ prasiddhaṃ taṃ vipraṃ prāhedaṃ vismayānvitaḥ ||
kathaṃ tvayāhaṃ vijñātaḥ svargādabhyāgataḥ sphuṭam || 12 ||
brāhmaṇastamathovāca vijñāto.asi mayā yathā ||
tathā te.ahaṃ pravakṣyāmi kṣīṇāghaughāvadhāraya || 13 ||
gātratrayaṃ virūpaṃ syāddvitīyaṃ vā svarūpataḥ||
dṛṣṭvā sarvāṃga vairūpyaṃ vijñāto.asi tato mayā || 14 ||
durllaṃghyā prakṛtiḥ sākṣādanubhūtakarī bhavet ||
prakṛteranyathābhāvaḥ sarvathā lakṣyate janaiḥ || 15 ||
viprasyaivaṃ vacaḥ śrutvā jagāmādarśanaṃ śanaiḥ ||
punaḥ kaiścidahorātrairājagāma sa tāṃ purīm || 16 ||
mūlajālakavipreṇa pṛṣṭaḥ prāhāmarāvatīm ||
gato.ahaṃ pṛṣṭavāṃ statra raṃbhāṃ vibhramakāriṇīm || 17 ||
śakrasyāvasare vṛtte vrajantyāḥ svagṛhaṃ mayā ||
tvatsaṃdeśaḥ samākhyātaḥ sāvadatko na vedmi tam ||18||
vidyayā kalayā cāpi pauruṣeṇa vratena ca ||
tapasā vā pumāmartyo divi vijñāyate ciram || 19 ||
brāhmaṇastamathovāca mugdhā dagdhāgnisaṃbhavā ||
na bhakṣayāmi śakaṭaṃ vratenaitena vetti mām || 4.7.20 ||
tasyaitadvacanaṃ śrutvā sa siddhaḥ suviśuddhadhīḥ ||
prahasyāmaṃtrya taṃ vipraṃ jagāmādarśanaṃ punaḥ || 21 ||
kadācicca ratā tena svargamārgaṃ yadṛcchayā ||
dṛṣṭvā raṃbhāṃ dvijaproktaṃ sarvameva niveditam || 22 ||
|| raṃbhovāca || ||
ko na jānāmi taṃ vipraṃ śakaṭavratacāriṇam ||
mūlajālairvartayaṃtaṃ mahākālavanāśrayam || 23 ||
darśanādatha saṃbhāṣādupakārātsahāsanāt ||
caturdhā snehanirbaṃdho nṛṇāṃ saṃjāyate.adhikaḥ || 24 ||
na darśanaṃ na saṃbhāṣā kadācitsaha tena me ||
nāmaśravaṇamātreṇa snehaḥ saṃdarśito mahān || 25 ||
ityevamuktvā raṃbhorū raṃbhā jaṃbhāriṇoṃtikam ||
vismayotphullanayanā jagāma gajagāminī ||26||
gatvā nivedayāmāsa snehavrataviceṣṭitam ||
purato ruddhahṛdayā brāhmaṇasya ca dhīmataḥ || 27 ||
śakraḥ provāca cārvaṃgīṃ gīrvāṇahṛdayaṃgamām ||
kimānayāmi taṃ vipraṃ samīpaṃ tava suvratam || 28 ||
divyamālyāṃbaradharaṃ divyasragunulepanam ||
vimānavaramāropya darśayāmāsa taṃ punaḥ || 29 ||
tatrasthaḥ sa dvijo bhogīvibhunakti saha raṃbhayā ||
śakaṭavratamāhātmyamityetatte mayoditam || 4.7.30 ||
rājyaśriyaṃ jagati sarvajanopabhogyāmāpnoti śakraśivakeśavayornivāsam||
nāprāpyabhasti bhuvane sudṛḍhavratānāṃ tasmātsadā vratapareṇa nareṇa bhāvyam || 31 ||
iti śrībha viṣye mahāpurāṇe uttaraparvaṇi śrīkṛṣṇayudhiṣṭhirasaṃvāde śakaṭavratamāhātmyakathanaṃnāma saptamo.adhyāyaḥ || 7 || cha ||

tilakavratavarṇanam
|| yudhiṣṭhira uvāca || ||
brahmeśa keśavādīnāṃ gauryā gaṇapatestathā ||
durgāsūryāgnisomānāṃ vratāni madhusūdana || 1 ||
śāstrāṃtareṣu dṛṣṭāni tava buddhigatāni ca ||
tāni sarvāṇi me deva vada devakiranandana || 2 ||
pratipatkramayogena vihitā yasya yā tithiḥ ||
devasya tasyāṃ yatkāryaṃ tadaśeṣeṇa kīrtaya || 3 ||
|| śrīkṛṣṇa uvāca || ||
vasaṃte kiṃśukāśokaśobhane pratipattithiḥ ||
śuklā tasyāṃ prakurvīta snānaṃ niyamatatparaḥ|| 4 ||
nārī naro vā rājendra saṃtarpya pitṛdevatāḥ ||
nadyāstīre taḍāge vā gṛhe vā niyatātmavān|| 5 ||
piṣṭātakena vilikhedvatsaraṃ puruṣākṛtim ||
tataścandanacūrṇena puṣpadhūpādinārcayet ||6|
dīpaiścāpi sanaivedyaiḥ pūjayedvatsaraṃ tadā ||
māsartunāmabhiḥ paścānnamaskārāṃtayojitaiḥ ||
pūjayedbrāhmaṇānvidvānmaṃtrairvedoditaiḥ śubhaiḥ || 7 ||
saṃvatsaro.asi parivatsarosīḍā vatsaro.abhitsaro.asi uṣasaste kalpaṃtāmahorātrāste kalpaṃtāmardhamāsaste kalpatāṃ māsāste kalpatāmṛtavaste kalpantāṃ saṃvatsaraste kalpatām || || 8 ||
evamabhyarcya vāsobhiḥ paścāttamabhiveṣṭayet ||
kālodbhavairmūlaphalainairvedyairmodakādibhiḥ || 9 ||
tatastaṃ prārthayetpaścātpuraḥ sthitvā kṛtāṃjaliḥ||
bhagavaṃstvatprasādena varṣa śubhadamastu me || 4.8.10 ||
evamuktvā yathāśakti dadyādviprāya dakṣiṇām ||
lalāṭapaṭṭe tilakaṃ kuyaccāṃdanapaṅkajam ||11||
tataḥ prabhṛtyanudinaṃ tilakālaṃkṛtaṃ mukham ||
dhāryaṃ saṃvatsaraṃ yāvacchaśineva nabhastalam || 12 ||
evaṃ naro vā nārī vā vratametatsamācaret ||
sadaiva puruṣa vyāghra bhogānbhuvi bhunaktyasau || 13 ||
bhūtāḥ pretāḥ piśācāśca durvārā vairiṇo grahāḥ ||
nirarthakā bhavaṃtyete tilakaṃ vīkṣya tatkṣaṇāt || 14 ||
pūrvamāsīnmahīpālo nāmnā śatruṃjayo jayī ||
citralekheti tasyābhūdbhāryā cāritrabhūṣaṇā || 15 ||
tayā vratamidaṃ caitre gṛhītaṃ dvijasannidhau ||
saṃvatsaraṃ pūjayitvā dhṛtvā hṛdi janārdanam 16||
asūyuḥ kṣeptukāmo vā samāgacchati yaḥ puraḥ ||
prayāti priyakṛttasyā dṛṣṭvā mukhamadhomukhaḥ||17||
sapatnīdarpāpaharā vaśīkṛtamahītalā ||
bharturiṣṭā prahṛṣṭā ca sukhamāste nirākulā ||18||
tāvatkareṇābhibhūto bhartā putraḥ savedanaḥ ||
śiro.artyā nāśaṃ prayātaḥ suhṛdāṃ duḥkhadāyakaḥ ||19||
dharmarājapuraṃ prāptuṃ sarvabhūtāpahārakaḥ||
tasminkṣaṇe mahārājaḥ dharmarājasya kiṃkarāḥ||4.8.20||
tasya dvāramanuprāptāḥ praveṣṭuṃ gṛhamañjasā ||
śatruṃjayaṃ samānetuṃ kālamṛtyupuraḥsarāḥ ||21||
pārśvasthitāṃ citralekhāṃ tilakālaṃkṛtānanām ||
dṛṣṭvā pranaṣṭasaṃkalpāḥ parāvṛtya gatāḥ punaḥ||22||
gateṣu teṣu sa nṛpaḥ putreṇa saha bhārata ||
nīrujo bubhuje bhogānpūrvakarmārjitāñchubhān || 23 ||
etadvrataṃ mahābhāga kīrtitaṃ te mahodayam ||
śaṃkareṇa samākhyātaṃ mama pūrvaṃ yudhiṣṭhira ||24||
etattrilokatilakālakabhūṣaṇaṃ te khyātaṃ vrataṃ sakaladuḥkhaharaṃ paraṃ ca ||
itthaṃ samācarati yaḥ sa sukhaṃ vihṛtya martyaḥ prayāti padamāpadi padmayoneḥ || 25 || iti śrībhaviṣye mahāpurāṇe uttaraparvaṇi śrīkṛṣṇayudhiṣṭhirasaṃvāde tilakavratakathanaṃ nāmāṣṭamo.adhyāyaḥ || 8 || ||9|||
aśokavratavarṇanam
|| śrīkṛṣṇa uvāca || ||
āśvayucchuklapakṣasya prathame.ahni dinodaye ||
aśokaṃ pūjayedvṛkṣaṃ prarūḍhaśubhapallavam || 1 ||
virūḍhaiḥ saptadhānyaiśca guṇa kairmodakaiḥ śubhaiḥ ||
phalaiḥ kālodbhavairdivyairnnālikeraiḥ sadāḍimaiḥ || 2 ||
puṣpadhūpādinā tadvatpūjayettaddine.anagha ||
aśokaṃ pāṃḍavaśreṣṭha śokaṃ nāpnoti kutracit || 3 ||
pitṛbhrātṛpatiśvaśrūśvaśurāṇāṃ tathaiva ca ||
aśoka śokaśamano bhava sarvatra naḥ kule || 4 ||
ityuccārya tato dadyādarghyaṃ śraddhāsamanvi tam ||
patākābhiralaṃkṛtya pracchādya śubhavāsasā || 5 ||
damayantī yathā svāhā yathā vedavatī satī ||
tathāśokavratādasmājjāyate pativallabhā || || 6 ||
vane vrajaṃtyā saddharmaḥ sītayā saṃpradarśitaḥ ||
dṛṣṭvā.aśokaṃ vane pārtha pallavālaṃkṛtāṃbaram || 7 ||
kṛtvā samīpe bhartāraṃ devaraṃ ca tilākṣataiḥ ||
dīpālaṃkṛtanaivedyadhūpasūtraphalārccanaiḥ || 8 ||
arcayitvā hyarthito.asau raktāśoko yudhiṣṭhira ||
maithilyā prāñjalirbhūtvā śṛṇvato rāghavasya ca || 9 ||
ciraṃ jīvatu me vṛddhaḥ śvaśuraḥ kośaleśvaraḥ ||
bhartā me devarāścaiva jīvaṃtu bharatādayaḥ ||
kauśalyāmapi jīvantīṃ paśyeyamiti maithilī || 4.9.10 ||
yayāce taṃ mahābhāgā drumaṃ satyopayācanam ||
pradakṣiṇamupāvṛtya tataste prayayuḥ punaḥ || 11 ||
evamanyāpi yā nārī pūjayedbhuvi taṃ nagam ||
tila taṃḍulasaṃmiśrairyavagodhūmasarṣapaiḥ || 12 ||
kṣamāpya vandayenmūlaṃ pādapaṃ raktapallavam ||
mantreṇānena kauṃteya praṇamya strī pativratā || 13 ||
mahāvṛkṣa mahāśākha makaradhvajamandira ||
prārthaye tvāṃ mahābhāga vanopavanabhūṣaṇa || 14 ||
evamābhāṣya taṃ vṛkṣaṃ dattvā viprāya dakṣiṇām ||
sakhībhiḥ sahitā sādhvī tataḥ svabhavanaṃ vrajet || 15 ||
yāḥ śokanāśanamaśokataruṃ taruṇyaḥ saṃpūjayaṃti kusumākṣatadhūpadīpaiḥ ||
tāḥ prāpya saukhyamatulaṃ bhuvi bhartṛ jātaṃ gaurīpadaṃ pramuditāḥ punarāpnuvaṃti || 16 || iti śrībhaviṣye mahāpurāṇa uttaraparvaṇi śrīkṛṣṇayudhiṣṭhirasaṃvāde aśokavratavarṇanaṃ nāma navamo.a dhyāyaḥ || 9 || || cha ||
karavīravratavarṇanam
|| śrīkṛṣṇa uvāca || ||
jyeṣṭhe māsi site pakṣe prathame.ahni dinodaye ||
devodyānabhavaṃ hṛdyaṃ karavīraṃ samarcayeta ||1||
raktataṃtuparīdhānaṃ gandhadhūpavilepanaiḥ ||
virūḍhaiḥ saptadhānyaiśca nāraṃgairbījapūrakaiḥ || 2 ||
guṇakairghaṭakairdivyairnālikeraiḥ suśobhanaiḥ ||
abhyukṣyākṣatatoyena maṃtreṇaivaṃ kṣamāpayet || 3 ||
karavīra viṣāvāsa namaste bhānuvallabha ||
maulimaṃḍanasadratna namaste keśaveśayoḥ || 4 ||
ākṛṣṇena rajasā vartamāno niveśayannamṛtaṃ martyaṃ ca ||
hiraṇyayena savitā rathenādevo yāti bhuvanāni paśyan || 5 ||
evaṃ bhaktyā samabhyarcya dattvā viprāya dakṣiṇām ||
pradakṣiṇāmatho kṛtvā tataḥ svabhavanaṃ vrajet || 6 ||
etadvrataṃ mahābhāga sūryārādhanakāmyayā ||
anasūyayā ca kṣamayā sāvitryā satyabhāmayā || 7 ||
damayantyā sarasvatyā gāyatryā gaṃgayā tathā ||
anyābhirapi nārībhirmartyaloke.apyanuṣṭhitam ||
karavīvrataṃ pārtha sarvasaukhyaphalapradam || 8 ||
saṃpūjya ratnakusumāṃcitasarvaśākhaṃ nīlairdalaistatatanuṃ karavīravṛkṣam ||
bhuktvā mano.abhilaṣitānbhuvi bhavyabhogānaṃte prayāti bhavanaṃ bharatāgrya bhānoḥ|| || 9 || iti śrībhaviṣye mahāpurāṇa uttaraparvaṇi śrīkṛṣṇayudhiṣṭhirasaṃvāde karavīravratavarṇanaṃ nāma daśamo.adhyāyaḥ || 10 || || cha || || ||
kokilāvratavarṇanam
|| yudhiṣṭhira uvāca || ||
svabhartrā saha saṃbaddhamahāsneho yathā bhavet ||
kulastrīṇāṃ tadācakṣva vrataṃ mama surottama || 1 ||
|| śrīkṛṣṇa uvāca || ||
yamunāyāstaṭe pūrvaṃ mathurāste purī śubhā ||
tasyāṃ śatrughnanāmnābhūdrājā rāmapratiṣṭhitaḥ || 2 ||
tasya bhāryā kīrtimālā nāmnāsītprathitā bhuvi ||
tayā praṇamya bhagavānvaśiṣṭho munipuṃgavaḥ || 3 ||
pṛṣṭaḥ sukhaṃ muniśreṣṭha kathaṃ samupajāyate ||
brūhi me tilasambandhakāraṇaṃ vratamuttamam || 4 ||
evamuktastayā jñānī vaśiṣṭhaḥ kīrtimālayā ||
dhyātvā muhūrtamācakhyau kokilāvratamuttamam || 5 ||
|| śrīvaśiṣṭha uvāca || ||
āṣāḍhapūrṇimāyāṃ tu saṃdhyākāle hyupasthite ||
saṃkalpayenmāsamekaṃ śrāvaṇe śvaḥprabhṛtyaham || 6 ||
snānaṃ kariṣye niyatā brahmacaryasthitā satī ||
bhokṣyāmi naktaṃ bhūśayyāṃ kariṣye prāṇināṃ dayām || 7 ||
iti saṃkalpya puruṣo nārī vā brāhmaṇāṃtike ||
prāpyānujñāṃ tataḥ prātaḥ sarvasāmagrisaṃyutaḥ || 8 ||
puruṣaḥ pratipatkālāddantadhāvanapūrvakam ||
nadyāṃ gatvā tathā vāpyāṃ taḍāge girinirjhare || 9 ||
snānaṃ kuryādvratī pārtha sugandhāmalakaistilaiḥ ||
dināṣṭakaṃ tathā paścātsarvauṣadhyā punaḥ pṛthak || 4.11.10 ||
vacayāṣṭau punaḥ piṣṭvā śiroruhavimardanam ||
snātvā dhyātvā raviṃ caiva vaṃditvā ca pitṛrnatha || 11 ||
tarpayitvā tilāpiṣṭaiḥ kokilāṃ pakṣirūpiṇīm ||
kalakaṇṭhīṃ śubhaiḥ puṣpaiḥ pūjayeccaṃpakodbhavaiḥ || 12 ||
patrairvā dhūpanaivedyadīpālaktakacaṃdanaiḥ ||
tila tanduladūrvāgraiḥ pūjayitvā kṣamāpayet ||
nityaṃ tilavratī bhakto maṃtreṇānena pāṃḍava || 13 ||
tilasahe tilasaukhye tilavarṇe tilapriye ||
saubhāgyaṃ dravyaputrāṃśca dehi me kokile namaḥ || 14 ||
ityuccārya tataḥ paścādgṛhamabhyetya saṃyataḥ ||
kṛtvāhāraṃ svapetpārtha yāvanmāsaḥ samāpnute ||15||
māsāṃte tāmrapātryāṃ tu kokilāṃ tilapiṣṭajām ||
ratnanetrāṃ svarṇapakṣāṃ brāhmaṇāya nivedayet|| 16 ||
vastrairddhanairguḍairyuktāṃ śrāvaṇyāṃ kuṃḍale.atha vā ||
śvaśrūśvaśuravarge vā daivajñe vā purohite ||
vyāse vā saṃpradātavyā vratibhiḥ śubhakāmyayā ||17||
evaṃ yā kurute nārī kokilāvratamādarāt ||
sapta janmāni saubhāgyaṃ sā prāpnoti suvistaram || 18 ||
niḥsāpatnyaṃ patiṃ bhavyaṃ sasnehaṃ prāpya bhūtale ||
mṛtā gaurīpuraṃ yāti vimānenārkavarcasā || 19 ||
etadvrataṃ vaśiṣṭhena muninā kathitaṃ purā ||
tathā cānuṣṭhitaṃ pārtha samastaṃ kīrtimālayā || 4.11.20 ||
tasyāśca sarvaṃ saṃpannaṃ vaśiṣṭhavacanādiha ||
putrasaubhāgyasaṃmānaṃ śatrughnasya prasādajam|| 21 ||
evaṃ yānyāpi kauṃteya kokilāvratamādarāt ||
kariṣyati dhruvaṃ tasyāḥ saubhāgyaṃ ca bhaviṣyati ||22||
ye kokilāṃ kalaravāṃ kalakaṃṭhapīṭhāṃ yacchaṃti sājyatilapiṣṭamayīṃ dvijebhyaḥ ||
te naṃdanādiṣu vaneṣu vihṛtya kāmaṃ martye sametya madhuradhvanayo bhavaṃti || 23 || || iti śrībhaviṣye mahāpurāṇa uttaraparvaṇi śrīkṛṣṇayudhiṣṭhirasaṃvāde kokilāvrata nāmaikādaśo.adhyāyaḥ || 11 || || cha || ||
bṛhattapovratavarṇanam
|| śrīkṛṣṇa uvāca|| ||
atha pāpāpahaṃ vakṣye bṛhadvratamanuttamam ||
surāsuramunīnāṃ ca durllabhaṃ vidhinā śṛṇu ||1||
parvaṇyāśvayujasyāṃte pāyasaṃ ghṛta saṃyutam ||
naktaṃ bhuñjīta śuddhātmā odanaṃ vaikṣavānvitam || 2 ||
ācamyātha śucirbhūtvā bilvajaṃ daṃtadhāvanam ||
bhakṣayitvā mahādevaṃ praṇamyedamudīrayet || 3 ||
ahaṃ devavratamidaṃ kartumicchāmi śāśvatam ||
tavājñayā mahādeva yathā nirvahate kuru ||4||
ityevaṃ niyamaṃ kṛtvā yāvadvarṣāṇi ṣoḍaśa ||
tithayaḥ pratipatpūrvāṃ bhajiṣyāmītyanukramāt || 5 ||
tato mārgaśire māsi pratipadyapare.ahani ||
pṛṣṭvā guruṃ copavāsaṃ mahādevaṃ smaranmuhuḥ || 6 ||
snātvā devaṃ samabhyarcya rātrau prajvālya dīpakān ||
yamunāṃ ca mahādevaṃ natvā paścānnimaṃtrayet || 7 || mahādevaratānviprānsapatnīkānyatavratān ||
ṣoḍaśāṣṭau tadardhaṃ vā ekaṃ vā śaktyapekṣayā || 8 ||
āmaṃtrya svagṛhaṃ gatvā mahādevaṃ smarankṣitau ||
śucivastrāstṛtāyāṃ tu nirāhāro niśi svapeta || 9 ||
bhāskarodayamāsādya snātvā cādāya dīpakān ||
naivedyaṃ snapanaṃ puṣpaṃ dhūpaṃ gaccheṣchivālaye ||4.12.10||
abhyaṃgayitvā deveśaṃ kaṣāyaiśca virūkṣayet ||
snapayetpañcagavyena payasā tadanaṃtaram || 11 ||
ghṛtena madhunā dadhnā rasena payasā punaḥ ||
tilāṃbunā tataḥ snāpya snāpayeduṣṇavā riṇā || 12 ||
lepayetsughanaṃ paścātkarpūrāgarucaṃdanaiḥ ||
puṣpaiḥ saṃpūjya dātavyaṃ haimaṃ śirasi paṃkajam || 13 ||
vastrayugmaṃ patākāṃ ca pañcavarṇaṃ vitānakam||
dhūpaṃ dīpaṃ ca ghaṃṭāñca dadyāddevasya śaktitaḥ ||14||
paścānnivedya naivedyaṃ stutvā svabhavanaṃ vrajet||
susamiddhaṃ tataḥ kṛtvā pūjayejjātavedasam ||15||
vratinaśca tathācāryaṃ bhojayenmithunāni ca ||
hemavastrādidānena yathāśakti kṣamāpayet || 16 ||
evaṃ visṛjya tānsarvānsārddhaṃ baṃdhujanaiḥ svayam ||
āśayitvā pañcagavyaṃ hṛṣṭo bhuñjīta vāgyataḥ || 17 ||
evameva vidhiṃ kṛtvā prārabhetādhano dhanī ||
vittasāmarthyataścaiva pratimāsaṃ ca kṛtsnaśaḥ || 18 ||
vittahīno yathā kaścicchraddhayā ca punaḥpunaḥ ||
puṣpārcanavidhānena sarvametatsamācaret || 19 ||
pratimāsamupoṣyaivaṃ prati patkārttikāvadhau ||
pārayettaṃ hutaṃ pārtha prāraṃbhavidhinā sphuṭam || 4.12.20 ||
dvitīye dve pañcadaśyāṃ kṛtvā naktaṃ narādhipaḥ ||
pratipatsa dvitīyā cettasyāmupavasetsudhīḥ || 21 ||
dvitīyopavasecchuklā tataḥ prabhṛti vatsaram ||
prāraṃbhavidhinā caivaṃ dvitīyāmapi pārayet || 22 ||
