upavāsadvayaṃ kṛtvā tṛtīyāṃ prārabhettataḥ ||
anena kramayogena yāvadvarṣaṃ samāpyate || 23 ||
kṛtvaivaṃ ṣoḍaśe varṣe pūrṇamāsyāṃ samudyataḥ ||
pūrvavaddevamabhyarcya kṛśānuṃ vābhitarpya ca || 24 ||
hemaśṛṃgīṃ raupyakhurāṃ saghaṃṭāṃ kāṃsyadohanām ||
mahādevāya gāṃ dadyāddīkṣitāya dvijāya vai || 25 ||
śivabhaktiratānviprānviśuddhāṃścaiva ṣoḍaśa ||
vastrābharaṇadānaiśca śaktyā saṃpūjayedvratī || 26 ||
brāhmaṇāṃśca yathāśaktyā bhojayedaparānapi ||
anyeṣāṃ ca kṣudhārtānāṃ dadyāddānaṃ yathecchayā || 27 ||
bṛhattapovrataṃ caiva brahmaghnādyaghaśoṣaṇam ||
bhūrbhuvādiṣu lokeṣu bhūribhogapradaṃ nṛṇām || 28 ||
caturṇāmapi varṇānāṃ svargasopānavatsthitam ||
na kuryādyo dhanaṃ prāpya sa muṣṭo naṣṭacetanaḥ || 29 ||
dhanyamāyuḥpradaṃ puṇyaṃ rūpasaubhāgyavarddhanam ||
strīpuṃsayośca nirdiṣṭaṃ vratametatpurātanam || 4.12.30 ||
vidhavayāpi kartavyaṃ bhūyo.avaidhavyahetave ||
sadhavayāpi kartavyamaviyogāya sadvratam || 31 ||
upoṣya pratimāsaṃ tu bhuṃjīta brāhmaṇaiḥ saha ||
ekadvitricaturbhirvā svaśaktyā pāṃḍunaṃdana || 32 ||
aṃte cāṃte suvarṇānāṃ prāraṃbhavidhinācaret ||
puṇyasaṃbhāramanvicchangamayitvā śivālayam || 33 ||
vratavighne mahārāja jāte daivātkathaṃcana ||
tāvatyastithayaścānyāḥ samupoṣyāḥ samāptaye|| || 34 ||
atha śīghrataraṃ kaścidvrataṃ kartuṃ samudyataḥ ||
vidhinānena rājendra tena grāhyaṃ tithidvayam || 35 ||
aṃte cāṃte ca varṣāṇāṃ prāraṃbhavidhinā ca ret ||
athārabdhe vrate kaścidasamāpte mriyeta cet || 36 ||
so.api tatphalamāpnoti satyāraṃbhaprabhāvataḥ ||
vācakāḥ śrāvakāścaiva vratasyāsya yudhiṣṭhira||
bhavaṃti putrasaṃśliṣṭāḥ śivadhyānānubhāvataḥ ||37||
puṇyaṃ bṛhattapa idaṃ vratamādarādye kurvaṃti ṣoḍaśasamā niratāḥ svadharme ||
te bhānumaṃḍalamabhedyamaciṃtyamādyaṃ bhittvā prayānti śaśiśekharapādamūlam || 38 || iti śrībhaviṣye mahāpurāṇa uttaraparvaṇi śrīkṛṣṇayudhiṣṭhirasaṃvāde vṛhattapovratavarṇanaṃ nāma dvādaśo.adhyāyaḥ || 12 || cha ||

bhadropavāsavratavarṇanam
|| yudhiṣṭhira uvāca || ||
jātismaratvaṃ deveśa duṣprāpyamiti me matiḥ ||
tadahaṃ jñātumicchāmi prāpyate kena karmaṇā || 1 ||
varapradānāddevānāmṛṣīṇāṃ sevanena vā ||
tīrthasnānena vā deva tapohomavratena vā || 2 ||
|| śrīkṛṣṇa uvāca || ||
catvāri rājanbhadrāṇi samupoṣyāṇi yatnataḥ ||
tatprabhāvādbhavennūnaṃ rājañjātismaro naraḥ || 3 ||
śubhodayaḥ purā vaiśyo babhūva yamunātaṭe ||
tena vratamidaṃ cīrṇaṃ mṛtaḥ kālakramādasau || 4 ||
saṃjayasya suto jātaḥ svarṇaṣṭhīvīti viśrutaḥ ||
vrataprabhāvājjātijñaḥ sa ca caurernipātitaḥ || 5 ||
nāradasya prabhāveṇa punaru jīvyate.apyasau ||
sasmāra pūrvavṛttāṃtaṃ sakalaṃ vratadharmataḥ ||6||
|| yudhiṣṭhira uvāca || ||
saṃjayasya kathaṃ putraḥ svarṇaṣṭhīvīti vā katham ||
dasyubhiśca kathaṃ nīto mṛtyuṃ vai jīvitaḥ katham || 7 ||
|| śrīkṛṣṇa uvāca ||. ||
saṃjayo nāma rājāsītkuśāvatyāṃ narādhipa ||
devarṣī tasya mitre ca sadā nāradaparvatau || 8||
ekadā saṃjayagṛhaṃ saṃprāptau tau yadṛcchayā ||
svagatāsanadānādyairupacārairapūjayat || 9 ||
teṣāmathopaviṣṭānāṃ pūrvavṛttāṃtabhāṣiṇau ||
saṃjayasya sutā prāptā taruṇī pituraṃtikam || 4.13.10 ||
parvataḥ prāha rājānaṃ kanyeyaṃ varavarṇinī ||
guptagulphā saṃhatorūḥ pīnaśroṇipayodharā || 11 ||
padmapatrekṣaṇanakhā padmakiṃjalkasaprabhā ||
ākuñcitamṛdusnigdhaiḥ keśairavitatairghanaiḥ || 12 ||
savilāsā gajagatiḥ sunāsā kokilasvarā ||
aho rūpamaho dhairyamaho lāvaṇyamuttamam ||13||
tilapuṣpasphuṭā nāsā rūpaṃ saṃparilakṣyate ||
kasyeyaṃ bhadrikā bhadrā mamātihṛdayaṃgamā || 14 ||
evaṃ bruvā ṇaṃ taṃ vipraṃ vismayotphullalocanam ||
sa rājā prāha kanyeyaṃ duhitā mama parvata || 15 ||
athovāca nṛpaṃ dhīmānnāradaḥ kṣubhitendriyaḥ ||
rājanniveṣṭukāmo.ahaṃ kanyeyaṃ mama dīyatām || 16
īpsitaṃ tava dāsyāmi varaṃ martyeṣu durllabham ||
evamukto nāradena prītātmā saṃjayastathā || 17 ||
kṛtāñjaliruvācedaṃ praharṣotphullalocanaḥ ||
putro me dīyatāṃ kṣipramakṣīṇakanakākaraḥ || 18 ||
yasya mūtraṃ purīṣaṃ vā śleṣmāṇaṃ kṣipati kṣitau ||
jātarūpaṃ hi tatsarvaṃ suvarṇaṃ bhavatu sthiram || 19 ||
evamastviti taṃ rājannāradaḥ pratyabhāṣata ||
suvarṇaṣṭhīvinaṃ putraṃ dadāmi tava suvrata || 4.13.20 ||
evamuktvā sa tāṃ kanyāṃ sālaṅkārāṃ sumadhyamām ||
vivāhayāmāsa tayā nārado hṛṣṭamānasaḥ ||21 ||
tattasya ceṣṭitaṃ dṛṣṭvā parvataḥ krodhamūrchitaḥ ||
uvāca nāradaṃ roṣāddīptākṣaḥ sphuritādharaḥ || 22 ||
mayeyaṃ prārthitā pūrvaṃ tvayā yasmādvivāhitā ||
tasmānmayā samaṃ svargaṃ na gaṃtāsi kathaṃcana || 23 ||
dattastvayāsya yaḥ putro varadānena nārada ||
so.api caurairabhihataḥ pañcatvamupayāsyati || 24 ||
evamuktaḥ parvatena nāradaḥ prāha durmanāḥ ||
na tvaṃ dharmaṃ vijānāsi kiñcinmūḍho.asi durmate || 25 ||
sāmānyaṃ sarvabhūtānāṃ kanyā bhavati suvrata ||
na tasyā varaṇe duḥkhaṃ paśyaṃtīha bahuśrutāḥ || 26 ||
na sevitāstvayā vṛddhāstena māṃ śapase ruṣā ||
paṇigrahaṇamaṃtrāṇāṃ niṣṭhā syātsaptame pade || 27 ||
yasmādetadavijñāya śapase māmanāgasam ||
tasmāttvamapyaho svargaṃ na gaṃtāsi mayā vinā || 28 ||
saṃjayasya sutaḥ śāpādyadi pañcatvameṣyati ||
ānayiṣye tathāpyenaṃ yamalokānna saṃśayaḥ ||29||
evaṃ śaptvā tadā.a nyonyaṃ devarṣī tāvubhau punaḥ ||
pūjitau saṃjayenātha jagmatuḥ svāśramaṃ prati || 4.13.30 ||
athāsya saptame māsi jātaḥ putro nṛpasya saḥ ||
svarṇaṣṭhīvīti nāmāsya yathārthamakarotpitā || 31 ||
jātismaraḥ smaravapuḥ suvarṇotpattikāraṇam ||
sarvabhūtarutajño.abhūdbhadravrataphalādiha || 32 ||
mūtraśleṣmapurīṣādi yatkiñcitkṣipati kṣitau ||
jāyate kanakaṃ sarvaṃ prasādānnāradasya ca ||33||
tenāsau yajate rājā vidhivadbhūridakṣiṇaiḥ ||
rājasūyādibhiryajñairvi vidhairbrāhmaṇairvṛtaḥ ||34||
babhāra bhṛtyānaniśaṃ pupoṣa svajanātithīn ||
cakāra devatāgāraṃ saraścārāmavāṭikāḥ ||35||
jātasnehaṃ tathā putraṃ rarakṣa rakṣi bhirvṛtaḥ ||
rāśayaḥ kanakasyāsya babhūvurnṛpateḥ sutāt||36||
athāsya dasyavaḥ kecicchrutvā taṃ kanakākaram||
dhanalolupayā jaghnurdākṣiṇātyā madoddha tāḥ||37||
tasminvinaṣṭe tannaṣṭaṃ varadānasamudbhavam ||
kanakaṃ tadapaśyaṃto jagmuranyonyataḥ kṣayam ||38||
pātitaṃ dasyubhiḥ putraṃ dṛṣṭvā rājā suduḥkhitaḥ||
vilalāpākulamatiḥ sa mumoha papāta ca ||39||
vilapaṃtaṃ tu taṃ dṛṣṭvā nāradaḥ prāha saṃjayam ||
rājanviṣādaṃ mā kārṣīḥ śṛṇvimāṃ bhāratīṃ mama ||4.13.40||
ityuktvā sa samācakhyau caritāni mahaujasām ||
viśiṣṭānāṃ narendrāṇāṃ yatīnāṃ dakṣiṇāvatām || 41 ||
śrutvā rājā nareṃdrāṇāṃ caritāni mahā tmanām ||
vinaṣṭaśokaḥ sahasā prakṛtistho vabhūva saḥ ||42||
nārado.api nareṃdrasya mṛtaṃ putraṃ yamālayāt ||
ānayāmāsa tarasā tathārūpaṃ yathā hatam || 43 ||
dṛṣṭvā spṛṣṭvā sa putraṃ taṃ parituṣṭena cetasā ||
vrīḍito vismitaścaiva kṛtāñjalirathāvravīt || 44 ||
kimāścaryaṃ prasannena bhavatā mama nārada ||
dattaḥ putrastathābhūto dasyubhirghātito yathā || 45 ||
ṣaṇmāsāṃte punarasau jīvitaṃ sarvameva tat ||
sasmāra pūrvaṃ vṛttāṃtaṃ bhadrāṇāṃ pāraṇātkila || 46 ||
etatte sarvamākhyātaṃ jātismaraṇakārakam ||
vrataṃ vratādhikaṃ śreṣṭhaṃ kimanyatkathayāmi te ||47 ||
|| śrīkṛṣṇa uvāca || ||
brāhmaṇāścaiva śūdrāśca kule mahati janma ca ||
dātā kṣamī dhanī vāgmī rūpī svairbhadrakairbhavet ||48||
catvāri rājanbhadrāṇi catuṣpādāni tāni vai ||
tānyeva bahuvighnāni duṣprāpyānyakṛtātmabhiḥ || 49 ||
mārgaśīrṣe tu prathamaṃ dvitīyaṃ phālgune tathā ||
jyeṣṭhe tṛtīyaṃ rājendra khyātaṃ bhādrapade param || 4.13.50 ||
phālgunāmalapakṣādau trīnmāsāṃstu narādhipa ||
tattripuṣpamiti khyātaṃ tapasyākaraṇaṃ param || 51 ||
jyeṣṭhasya śuklapakṣādau trīnvai māsānyudhiṣṭhira ||
tattrirāmamiti khyātaṃ satyaśauryapradāyakam || 52 ||
śukle bhādrapadasyādau trīnmāsānpāṃḍunaṃdana ||
tattriraṃgamiti khyātaṃ vahuvidyāpradāyakam || 53 ||
śuklamārgaśirasyādau trīnmāsāṃstu narādhipa ||
tadviṣṇupadamityuktaṃ sarvadharmapradāyakam || 54 ||
samāsenaiva coktāni bhadrāṇyetāni bhārata ||
kartavyāni naraiḥ strībhirvā brahmaṇānumatena vā || 55 ||
|| yudhiṣṭhira uvāca || ||
vistareṇaiva me brūhi devadeva jagatpate ||
bhadrāṇāṃ niyamādhānaṃ pradhānaniyamāṃstathā || 56 || ||
||śrībhagavānuvāca || ||
śṛṇu rājannavahito bhadrāṇāṃ vistaraṃ param ||
kathayiṣye na kathitaṃ kasyacidyanmayāpurā ||57||
śukle mārgaśirasyādau catvārastithayo varāḥ ||
dvitīyā ca tṛtīyā ca caturthī pañcamī tathā || 58 || ekabhuktāsanastiṣṭhetpratipadyāṃ jitendriyaḥ ||
prabhāte tu dvitīyāyāṃ kṛtvā yatkaraṇīyakam || 59 ||
praharatraye samadhike gate snānaṃ samācaret ||
mṛdgomayaṃ ca saṃgṛhya maṃtrairebhirvicakṣaṇaḥ || 4.13.60 ||
ahaṃ te tu pradiśyāmi maṃtrāṇāṃ vidhimuttamam ||
yeṣāṃ deyo na deyo vā tāñchṛṣva vadāmi te || 61 ||
brāhmaṇāḥ kṣatriyā vaiśyāḥ śūdrā ye śucayo.amalāḥ ||
teṣāṃ maṃtrāḥ pradeyā vai na tu saṃkīrṇadharmiṇām || 62 ||
yā strī bhartrā viyuktāpi svācāraiḥ saṃyutā śubhā ||
sā ca mantrānpragṛhṇātu sabhartrī tadanujñayā ||63||
snānaṃ nadyāṃ taḍāge vā vāpyāṃ kūpe gṛhepi vā ||
daśottaraṃ phalaṃ jñeyamadhikaṃ hi samantrakam || 64 ||
mṛdaṃ maṃtreṇa saṃgṛhya sarvāṃgeṣu pralepayet ||
tvaṃ mṛtsne vaṃditā devaiḥ samalairddaityaghātibhiḥ || 65 ||
mayāpi vaṃditā bhaktyā māmato vimalaṃ kuru || 66 ||
iti mṛnmaṃtraḥ ||
evaṃ japanmṛdaṃ dattvā svahastāgresamaṃtrakam ||
jalāvagāhanaṃ kuryātkuṇḍamālikhya dharmavit ||
siddhārthakaiḥ kṛṣṇatilairvacāsarvauṣadhīḥ kramāt || 67 ||
tvamādiḥ sarvadevānāṃ jagatāṃ ca jaganmaye ||
bhūtānāṃ vīrudhāṃcaiva rasānāṃpataye namaḥ || 68 ||
gaṃgāsāgarajaṃ toyaṃ pauṣkaraṃ nārmadaṃ tathā ||
yāmunaṃ sāṃnihatyaṃ ca saṃnidhānamihāstu me || 69 ||
iti snānamaṃtraḥ ||
śarīrālaṃbhanaṃ pūrvaṃ kṛtvā mṛdgomayāṃbubhiḥ||
evaṃ snātvā samāplutya ācamya taṭamāsthitaḥ ||4.13.70||
nivasya vāsasī śubhre śuciḥ prayatamānasaḥ ||
devānpitṛrnmanuṣyāṃśca tarpayetsusamādhinā || 71 ||
evaṃ gṛhītaniyamo gṛhaṃ gacchecchucivrataḥ ||
upaviśya na saṃjalpedyāvaccandrasya darśanam || 72 ||
snātvā caiva tato nāma tṛtīyādi caturdine ||
namaḥ kṛṣṇācyutānaṃta hṛṣīkeśeti ca kramāta || || 73 ||
caturdine dvitīyādau devamabhyarcaye.acyutam ||
prathamehni smṛtā pūjā pādayoścakrapāṇinaḥ || 74 ||
nābhipūjā dvitīyehni kartavyā vidhivannaraiḥ ||
muradviṣastatīyehni pūjāṃ vakṣasivinyaset || 75 ||
caturthehni jagaddhātuḥ pūjāṃ śirasi kalpayet ||
puṣpairvilepanairdhūpairarghyaṃ dadyurvi bhūṣaṇaiḥ || 76 ||
ghīvarairharinaivedyairdīpadānaiśca bhaktitaḥ ||
pūjayitvā vidhānena viṣṇuṃ viśveśvaraṃ vratī || 77 ||
tato dināvasāne tu muhūrte nirgate sati ||
arghyaṃ pradadyātsomāya bhaktyātadbhāvabhāvitaḥ || 78 ||
śaśicandraśaśāṃkendunāmāni kramaśo naraḥ ||
tṛtīyādiṣu candrasya saṃkīrtyārghyaṃ nivedayet || 79 ||
sa cārghyo yādṛśo deya ṛddhimadbhirathetaraiḥ ||
tatte samyakpravakṣyāmi yudhiṣṭhira nibodha me || 4.13.80 ||
candanāgurukarpūradadhi dūrvākṣatādibhiḥ ||
ratnaiḥ samudrajaiścānyairvajravaidūryamauktikaiḥ || 81 ||
puṣpaiḥ phalaiḥ svakālotthaiḥ kharjūrairnnālikerakaiḥ ||
vastrācchādanagovā jibhūmihemagajānvitaiḥ || 82 ||
sattvayuktasya ṛddhasya rājanneṣa vidhiḥ smṛtaḥ ||
itarasya yathāśakti phalapuṣpākṣatodakaiḥ || 83 ||
lavaṇaṃ guḍaṃ ghṛtaṃ tailaṃ payaḥkuṃbhāstilaiḥ saha ||
argheṣvetāni śastāni śaśivṛddhyā vivarddhayet || 84 ||
pratyahaṃ varddhayedarghyaṃ śaśi vṛddhyā narottama ||
evamarghaḥ pradātavyaḥ śṛṇu maṃtravidhikramam || 85 ||
navonavosi māsāṃte jāyamānaḥ punaḥpunaḥ ||
triragnisamaveto vai devānāpyāyase haviḥ || 86 ||
gaganāṅgaṇasaddīpa dugdhābdhimathanodbhava ||
bhābhāsitadigābhoga ramānuja namo.astu te || 87 ||
dattvārghyaṃ dvijarājāya tadviprāya nivedayet ||
nirvartyārghyakramamimaṃ tato bhuṃjīta vāgyataḥ || 88 ||
bhūmiṃ tu bhājanaṃ kṛtvā padmapatrasamāstṛtām ||
pālāśairmadhupatrairvā surūpairvā śilātale || 89 ||
samālabhya dharāṃ devīṃ maṃtreṇānena maṃtravit ||
tvattale bhoktukāmo.ahaṃ devi sarvarasodbhave || 4.13.90 ||
madanugrahāya susvādaṃ kurvannamamṛtopamam ||
evaṃ japtvā ca bhuktvā ca śākaṃ pākaṃ guṇottaram || 91 ||
ācamya khānyupālabhya smṛtvā somaṃ svapedbhuvi ||
bhoktavyaṃ tu dritīyāyāmakṣāralavaṇaṃ haviḥ || 92 ||
munyannaṃ tu tṛtīyāyāṃ caturthyāṃ gorasottaram ||
ghṛtāktāḥ saguṇāḥ śastāḥ pañcamyāṃ kṛśarāssadā 93 ||
śastā bhadreṣu sarveṣu sadā śyāmākataṇḍulāḥ ||
prasādhikā ghṛtaṃ gavyaṃ vanyaṃ phalamayācitam || 94 ||
prātaḥ snānaṃ tataḥ kṛtvā saṃtarjya pitṛdevatāḥ ||
bhojayedbrāhmaṇānbhaktyā dattadānānvisarjayeta ||95||
bhṛtyabandhujanaiḥ sārddhaṃ paścādbhuñjīta kāmataḥ ||
evaṃ bhadreṣu sarveṣu trimāseṣu gateṣu yaḥ ||96||
karotyetannaro bhaktyā varṣamekamamatsarī ||
tasya śrīrvijayaścaiva nityaṃ somaḥ prasīdati ||97||
etatkaroti yā kanyā śubhaṃ prāpnoti sā patim ||
durbhagā subhagā sādhvī bhavatyavidhavā sadā || 98 ||
rājyārthī labhate rājyaṃ dhanārthī labhate dhanam ||
putrārthī labhate putrāniti prāha prabhākaraḥ || 99 ||
yoṣitkulākulavivāhamanoramāṇi śayyānnayānaśayanāsanaśobhitāni ||
bhadrāṇyavāpya dhanaputrakalatrajāni jātismaro bhavati bhārata bhadrakartā || 4.13.100 ||
iti śrī bhaviṣye mahāpurāṇa uttara parvaṇi śrīkṛṣṇayudhiṣṭhirasaṃvāde bhadropavāsavratanirūpaṇaṃ nāma trayodaśo.adhyāyaḥ || 13 ||
dvitīyāvratamāhātmyavarṇanam
|| śrīkṛṣṇa uvāca || ||
saṃtyanyāstithayaḥ pārtha dvitīyādyāḥ pariśrutāḥ ||
māsaiścaturbhiścatvāraḥ prāvṛṭchuklāḥ klamāpahāḥ || 1 ||
gopitāśca sadā loke na proktāśca mayā kvacit ||
prakāśayāmi tāḥ pārtha śṛṇu sarvā mayā hi tāḥ || 2 ||
ekā tu śrāvaṇe māsi anyā bhādrapade tathā ||
aparāśvayuje māsi caturthī kārtike bhavet || 3 ||
śrāvaṇe kaluṣā nāma proṣṭhapāde ca gīrmalā ||
āśvine pretasaṃcārā kārtike ca yamā smṛtā ||4||
|| yudhiṣṭhira uvāca || ||
kasmātsā kaluṣā proktā kasmātsā gīrmalā matā |
kasmātsā pretasaṃcārā kasmādyāmyā prakīrtitā || 5 ||
|| śrīkṛṣṇa uvāca || ||
purā vṛtravadhe vṛtte prāptarājye puraṃdare ||
brahmahatyāpanodārthamaśvamedhe pravartite || 6 ||
krodhādindreṇa vajeṇa brahmahatyā niṣūditā ||
ṣaṭkhaṇḍā ca kṛtā kṣiptā vṛkṣe toye mahītale || 7 ||
nāryāṃ brahmahane vahnau saṃvibhajya yathākramam ||
tatpāpaṃ śrāvaṇe vyūḍhaṃ dvitīyāyāṃ dinodaye ||8||
nārīvṛkṣanadībhūmivahnibrahmahaneṣvatha ||
nirmalīkaraṇaṃ jātamatorthaṃ kaluṣā smṛtā ||9||
madhukaiṭabhayo rakte purā magneti medinī ||
aṣṭāṃgulā pavitrā sā nārīṇāṃ tu rajo malam || 4.14.10 ||
nadyaḥ pūramalāḥ sarvā vahnerdhūmaśikhā malaḥ ||
kaluṣāṇi caraṃtyasyāṃ tenaiṣā kaluṣā matā || 11 ||
gīrgirā bhāratī vāṇī vācā medhā sarasvatī ||
gīrmalaṃ vahate yasmādvitīyā gīrmalā matā || 12 ||
devarṣipitṛdharmāṇāṃ niṃdakā nāstikāḥ śaṭhāḥ ||
teṣāṃ sā vāgmalavyūḍhā dvitīyā tena gīrmalā || 13 ||
anadhyāyeṣu śāstrāṇi pāṭhayaṃti paṭhaṃti ca ||
śābdikāstārkikāḥ śrautāsteṣāṃ śabdāpaśabdajāḥ || 14 ||
malā vyūḍhā dvitīyāyāmato.arthaṃ gīrmalā ca sā ||14||
pretāstu pitaraḥ proktāsteṣāṃ tasyāṃ tu saṃcaraḥ ||
dvitīyāyāṃ ca lokeṣu tena sā pretasaṃcarā || 15 ||
agniṣvāttā barhiṣada ājyapāḥ somapāstathā || 16 || pitṛpitāmahapretasaṃcarātpretasaṃcarā || 16 ||
putraiḥ pautraiśca dauhitraiḥ svadhāmaṃtraiḥ supūjitāḥ ||
śrāddhadānamakhaistṛptā yātyataḥ pretasaṃcarāḥ || 17 ||
kārtike śuklapakṣasya dvitīyāyāṃ yudhiṣṭhira ||
yamo yamunayā pūrvaṃ bhojitaḥ svagṛhe tadā || 18 ||
dvitīyāyāṃ mahotsarge nārakīyāśca tarpitāḥ ||
pāpebhyo vipramuktāste muktāḥ sarve vibaṃdhanāḥ ||
bhrāmitā nartitāstuṣṭāḥ sthitāḥ sarve yadṛcchayā ||19||
teṣāṃ mahotsavo vṛtto yamarāṣṭre sukhāvahaḥ ||
tato yamadvitīyā sā proktā loke yudhiṣṭhira || 4.14.20 ||
asyāṃ nijagṛhe pārtha na bhoktavyamato budhaiḥ ||
snehena bhaginīhastādbhoktavyaṃ puṣṭivarddhanam || 21 ||
dānāni ca pradeyāni bhaginībhyo vidhānataḥ ||
svarṇālaṃkāravastrādyaiḥ pūjāsatkārabhojanaiḥ || 22 ||
sarvā bhaginyaḥ saṃpūjyā abhāve pratipattigāḥ ||
pitṛvyabhaginī hastātprathamāyāṃ yudhiṣṭhira || 23 ||
mātulasya sutāhastādvitīyāyāṃ punarnṛpa ||
pitṛmātṛsvasārau ye tṛtīyāyāṃ tayoḥ karāt || 24 ||
bhoktavyaṃ sahajāyāśca bhaginyā hastataḥ param ||
sarvāsu bhaginīhastādbhoktavyaṃ balavarddhanam || ||25||
dhanyaṃ yaśasyamāyuṣyaṃ dharmakāmārthavarddhanam ||
vyākhyātaṃ sakalaṃ snehātsarahasyaṃ mayā tava ||26||
yasyāṃ tithau yamunayā yamarājadevaḥ sambhojito jagati sattvarasauhṛdena ||
tasyāṃ svasuḥ karatalādiha yo bhunakti prāpnoti vittamatha bhojyamanuttamaṃ saḥ || 27 ||
iti śrībhaviṣye mahāpurāṇa uttara parvaṇi śrīkṛṣṇayudhiṣṭhirasaṃvāde yamadvitīyāvratamāhātmyaṃ nāma caturdaśo.adhyāyaḥ || 14 || |||9|||
aśūnyaśayanamāhātmyavarṇanam
|| yudhiṣṭhira uvāca || ||
bhagavanbhavatā proktaṃ dharmārthādeḥ susādhanam ||
gārhasthyaṃ tacca bhavati daṃpatyoḥ prīyamāṇayoḥ || 1 ||
patnīhīnaḥ pumānpatnī bhartrā virahitā tathā ||
dharmakāmārthasaṃsiddhī na syātāṃ madhusūdana || 2|
tadbrūhi devadeveśa vidhavā strī na jāyate ||
vratena yena goviṃda patnyā.avirahito naraḥ || 3 ||
|| śrīkṛṣṇa uvāca || ||
aśūnyaśayanīṃ nāma dvitīyāṃ śṛṇu tāṃ mama ||
yāmupoṣya na vaidhavyaṃ prāpnoti strī yudhiṣṭhira || 4 ||
patnīvimuktaśca naro na kadācitprajāyate ||
śete jagatpatirviṣṇuḥ striyā sārddhaṃ yadā kila || 5 ||
aśūnyaśayanaṃ nāma tadā grāhyā ca sā tithiḥ ||
upavāsena naktena tathaivāyācitena ca || 6 ||
kṛṣṇapakṣe dvitīyāyāṃ śrāvaṇe nṛpasattama ||
snānaṃ nadyāṃ taḍāge vā gṛhe vā niyatātmavān || 7 ||
kṛtvā pitṛrnmanuṣyāṃśca devānsaṃ tarpya bhaktimān ||
sthaṃḍilaṃ caturasraṃ tu mṛnmayaṃ kārayettataḥ || 8 ||
tatrasthaṃ śrīdharaṃ śrīśaṃ bhaktyābhyarcya śriyā saha ||
naivedyapuṣpadhūpādyaiḥ phalaiḥ kālodbhavaiḥ śubhaiḥ || 9 ||
imamuccārayenmaṃtraṃ praṇamya jagataḥ patim ||
śrīvatsadhāriñchrīkāṃta śrīdhāmañchrīpate.avyaya || 4.15.10 ||
gārhasthyaṃ mā praṇāśaṃ me yātu dharmārthakāmadam ||
agnayo mā praṇaśyaṃtu mā praṇaśyantu devatāḥ ||
pitaro mā praṇaśyaṃtu matto dāṃpatyabhedataḥ ||11||
lakṣmyā viyujyate kṛṣṇa na kadācidyathā bhavān ||
tathā kalatrasambandho deva mā me praṇaśyatu || 12 ||
lakṣmyā na śūnyaṃ varada yathā te śayanaṃ sadā ||
śayyā mamāpyaśūnyāstu tathā janmanijanmani || 13 ||
evaṃ prasādya pūjāṃ ca kṛtvā lakṣmyā harestathā ||
candrodaye snānapūrvaṃ pañcagavyena saṃyutam ||
viprāya dakṣiṇāṃ dadyātsva śaktyā phalasaṃyutām || 14 ||
anenavidhinā rājanyāvanmāsacatuṣṭayam ||
kṛṣṇapakṣe dvitīyāyāṃ prāguktavidhimācaret || 15 ||
kārttike cātha saṃprāpte śayyāṃ śrīkāṃtasaṃyutām ||
sopaskarāṃ sodakuṃbhāṃ sānnāṃ dadyāddvijātaye || 16 ||
pratimāsaṃ ca somāya arghyaṃ dadyātsamaṃtrakam ||
dadhyakṣatairmūla phalai ratnaiḥ sauvarṇabhājanaiḥ || 17 ||
gaganāṃgaṇasaddīpa durābdhimathanodbhava ||
ābhāsitadigābhoga ramānuja namostu te || 18 ||
evaṃ karoti yaḥ samyaṅnaro māsacatuṣṭayam ||
tasya janmatrayaṃ yāvadgṛhabhaṅgo na jāyate || 19 ||
aśūnyaśayanaścaiva dharmakāmārthasādhakaḥ ||
bhavatyavyāhataiśvaryaḥ puruṣo nātra saṃśayaḥ || 4.15.20 ||
nārī ca pārtha dharmajñā vratametadyathāvidhi ||
yā karoti na sā śocyā bandhuvargasya jāyate || 21 ||
vaidhavyaṃ durbhagatvaṃ ca bhartṛtyāgaṃ ca sattama ||
prāpnoti janmatritayaṃ na sā pāṃḍukulodvaha || 22 ||
eṣā hyaśūnyaśayanā nṛpate dvitīyā khyātā samastakaluṣāpaharā.advitīyā ||
etāṃ samācarati yaḥ puruṣo.atha yoṣitprāpnotyasau śayanamagryamahārhabhogyam || 23 || iti śrībhaviṣye mahāpurāṇe uttaraparvaṇi śrīkṛṣṇa yudhiṣṭhirasaṃvāde aśūnyaśayanavratamāhātmyaṃ nāma pañcadaśo.adhyāyaḥ || 15 ||
madhūkatṛtīyāvratavarṇanam
|| śrīkṛṣṇa uvāca || ||
phālgune.apyasite pakṣe tṛtīyāyāmupoṣitā ||
prātaḥ sthitvā brahmacarye jaṭāmukuṭaśobhitā || 1 ||
godhārathagatāṃ devīṃ rudradhyānaparāyaṇām ||
pūjayedgandhakusumairdīpālaktakacaṃdanaiḥ ||
kesarairmadhurairdravyaiḥ svarṇamāṇikyapūjayā || 2 ||
oṃ bhūṣikā devabhūṣā ca bhūṣikā lalitā umā ||
tapovanaratā gaurī saubhāgyaṃ me prayacchatu || 3 ||
daurbhāgyaṃ me śamayatu suprasannamanāḥ sadā ||
avaidhavyaṃ kule janma dadātvaparajanmani || 4 ||
aṅgeṅge ca mamopāṅge parvepave sthitāmṛtam ||
sukhadṛṣṭisparśarasaṃ gaurī saubhāgyaṃ yacchatu || 5 ||
evamuccārya maṃtrāṃśca nārījñānavatī satī ||
pūjayedbrāhmaṇoktaistu maṃtrairmukhasuvāsinī || 6 ||
jīrakaiḥ kaṭuhuṇḍaiśca lavaṇairguḍasarpiṣā ||
hṛdyairārdraiḥ phalaiḥ svarṇairmanojñaiḥ puṣpabandhanaiḥ || 7 ||
kusumaiḥ. kuṃkumairgandhaiḥ kāleyāgurucandanaiḥ ||
sindūreṇātiraktena vastrairnānāvidhaiḥ śubhaiḥ || 8 ||
netrairanekadeśotthaiḥ pūpakaistilataṇḍulaiḥ ||
aśokaiśca viguṇakairghṛtapūrṇaistu modakaiḥ || 9 ||
ityevamādinaivedyaiḥ pūjayitvā mahādrumam ||
pradakṣiṇaṃ tataḥ kṛtvā dattvā viprāya dakṣiṇām || 4.16.10 ||
etatkaroti yā putrī tṛtīyāvratamuttamam ||
tataḥ prāpsyati duṣprāpyaṃ trailokye śrīdharaṃ prati || 11 ||
etadvrataṃ mayā khyātaṃ yāsyaṃti śāśvatīḥ samā ||
vyākhyātaṃ kaśyapenādau rukmiṇyā vratamuttamam || 12 ||
yāścariṣyaṃti tāḥ sarvā bhaviṣyaṃti nirāmayāḥ ||
aṅgapratyaṅgasubhagā lokadṛṣṭimanoharāḥ || || 11 ||
sthitvā varṣaśataṃ cānte tato rudrapuraṃ śubham ||
yāsyaṃti haṃsayānena kiṃkiṇīśabdanādinā || 14 ||
tatra tvāramayiṣyaṃti svabhartṛrnvatsarānbahūn ||
divyabhogabhujo hṛṣṭāḥ siddhyaṣṭakasamanvitāḥ || 19 ||
arghaṃ mahārghamaṇikuṃkumakesarāḍhyaṃ sraggaṃdhamugdhamukharāli kulopagītam ||
dattvā phalākṣatayutaṃ madhupādapasya gaurīva lokamahitā bhavatīha nārī || 16 ||
iti śrībhaviṣye mahāpurāṇa uttaraparvaṇi śrīkṛṣṇa yudhiṣṭhirasaṃvāde madhūkatṛtīyāvratavarṇanaṃ nāma ṣoḍaśo.adhyāyaḥ || 16 || a
meghapālītṛtīyāvratavarṇanam
|| yudhiṣṭhira uvāca ||
meghapālīvrata kṛṣṇa kadācitkriyate nṛbhiḥ ||
kiṃ puṇyaṃ kimanuṣṭhānaṃ kīdṛgvallī smṛtā tu sā || 1 ||
|| śrīkṛṣṇa uvāca || ||
āśvayukkṛṣṇapakṣe tu tṛtīyāyāṃ yudhiṣṭhira ||
meghapālyai pradātavyo bhaktyā strībhirnṛbhistathā || 2 ||
argho virūḍhairgodhūmaiḥ saptadhānyasamanvitaiḥ ||
tilataṃḍulapiṃḍairvā dātavyo dharmalipsubhiḥ || 3 ||
tāṃbūlasadṛśaiḥ parvai raktā vallī samaṃjarī ||
vāṭīṣu grāmamārgeṣu protthitā parvate.api ca ||4||
meghapālyāṃ dhānyatailaguḍakuṃkumahaimanān ||
padānapi ca kurvaṃti janā vāṇijyajīvanāḥ || 5 ||
pāpaṃ satyānṛtaṃ kṛtvā dravyalubdhāḥ phalānvitāḥ ||
arghyaṃ dattvā meghapālye nāśayaṃti kṣaṇādiha || 6 ||
mānonmānairjanma madhye yatpāpaṃ kutracitkṛtam ||
satsarvaṃ nāśamāyāti vratenānena pāṃḍava || 7 ||
meghapālī śubhe sthāne śubhe deśe samutthitā ||
pūjanīyā varastrībhiḥ phalaiḥ puṣpaistathākṣataiḥ || 8 ||
kharjūrairnālikeraiśca dāḍimaiḥ karavīrakaiḥ ||
gaṃdhadhūpairdadhidīpairvirūḍhairdhānyasaṃcayaiḥ || 9 ||
raktavastraiḥ samācchādya piṣṭātakavibhūṣitām ||
kṛtvārghyaḥ saṃpradātavyo maṃtreṇānena bhārata || 4.17.10 ||
vedoktena dvijo vidvāṃstacca tasyai nivedayet ||
ityevaṃ pūjayitvā tāṃ meghapālīṃ pumāṃstataḥ || 11 ||
nārī vā puruṣavyāghra prāpnoti paramāṃ śriyam ||
sthitvā varṣaśataṃ martye sukhasaubhāgyagarvite || 12 ||
viṣṇulokamavāpnoti dehāṃte yānasaṃsthitaḥ ||
kulāni sapta nayati svargaṃ svāni rasātalāt ||
uddhṛtya nātra saṃdehastvayā kāryo yudhiṣṭhira || 13 ||
naraka bhīrutayā dadāti yo.arghyaṃ phalādyanuyutaṃ nanu meghapāleḥ ||
unmānakūṭakapaṭāni kṛtāni yāni pāpāni haṃti saviteva tamaḥ prarohān || 14 ||
iti śrībhaviṣye mahāpurāṇa uttaraparvaṇi śrīkṛṣṇayudhiṣṭhirasaṃvāde meghapālītṛtīyāvratavarṇanaṃ nāma saptadaśo.adhyāyaḥ || 17 || || cha ||
rūparambhāvratavarṇanam
|| yudhiṣṭhira uvāca ||
strīṇāṃ saṃpadyate yena martyaloke gṛhaṃ śubham ||
patiprema tathātyaṃtaṃ tanme brūhi vrataṃ śubham || 1 ||
|| śrīkṛṣṇa uvāca || ||
ekadā pārvatīśaṃbhū sthitau munisurāvṛtau ||
kailāsaśikhare ramye nānādhātuvicitrite || 2 ||
nānādrumalatākīrṇe nānāpuṣpopaśobhite ||
munikinnara saṃghuṣṭe geyanṛtyasamākule || 3 ||
śaṃkaraḥ pārvatīṃ prāha kiṃ tvayā sadvrataṃ kṛtam ||
vāmārūpeṇa metyaṃtaṃ priyāsi varavarṇini || 4 ||
āgaccha jānudeśaṃ tu suprasannā tathā priye ||
brūhi cāvitathaṃ sarvaṃ tvayā pārvati yatkṛtam || 5 ||
ityuktā praṇatā bhūtvā gaurī prāha śivaṃ śubhā ||
tṛtīyāyāṃ mayā cīrṇaṃ purā raṃbhāvrataṃ śubham || 6 ||
tena me tvaṃ manohārī bhartā labdhosi śaṃkara||
īśvarī vāpyahaṃ strīṇāṃ tava dehārddhahāriṇī || 7 ||
|| īśvara uvāca || ||
kīdṛśaṃ tadvrataṃ bhadre sarvasaukhyapradāyakam ||
brūhi pārvati yatnena yaccīrṇaṃ pituraṃtike || 8 ||
|| gauryuvāca ||
purāhaṃ deva tiṣṭhāmi kumārī bhavane pituḥ ||
himavadgahvare ramye sakhīgaṇasamāvṛtā || 9 ||
tato.ahaṃ menayā proktā svapitrā ca himādriṇā ||
putri rabhāvrataṃ cāryaṃ varasaubhāgyavardhanam || 4.18.10 ||
yena prārabdhamātreṇa sarvaṃ saṃpatsyate tava ||
saubhāgyaṃ strīgaṇaiśvaryaṃ mahādevīpadaṃ tathā || 11 ||
evaṃ karomi vai mātarmama coktaṃ purastvayā ||
manobhilaṣitaṃ yena yena prāpnomi śaṃkaram || 12
|| menovāca ||
adya śuklatṛtīyāyāṃ snātvā niyamatatparā ||
kuru pārśveṣu pañcāgnīñjvālamānānhutāśanān || 13 ||
gārhapatyaṃ dakṣiṇāgnimanyaṃ cāhavanīyakam ||
paṃcamaṃ bhāskaraṃ teja ityete paṃca vahnayaḥ || 14 ||
eteṣāṃ madhyato bhūtvā tiṣṭha pūrvamukhā ciram ||
caturbhujāṃ dhyānaparāṃ paddvayopari saṃsthitām || 15 ||
mṛgājinacchannakucāṃ jaṭāvalkaladhāriṇīm ||
sarvābharaṇasaṃyuktāṃ devīmabhimukhīṃ kuru || 16 ||
mahālakṣmīrmahākālī mahāmāyā mahāmatiḥ ||
gaṅgā ca yamunā siṃdhuḥ śatadurnarmadā mahī || 17 ||
sarasvatī vaitariṇī saiva proktā mahāsatī ||
tasyāśca prekṣaṇaparā bhava tadbhāvabhāsitā || 18 ||
homaṃ kuryuryatātmāno brāhmaṇāḥ sarvatodiśam ||
devyāḥ pūjā prakartavyā puṣpadhūpādinā tataḥ ||19||
bahuprakāranaivedyaṃ naivedyaṃ ghṛtapācitam ||
sthāpayetpurato devyāḥ pṛthaksaubhāgyameva ca || 4.18.20 ||
jīrakaṃ kaḍuhuṃḍaścāpyapūpānkusumaṃ tathā ||
nipācāṃ pāvanatarāṃ lavaṇaṃ śarkarāṃ guḍam || 21 ||
puṣpamaṃḍapikā kāryā gaṃdhapuṣpādhivāsitā ||
padmāsanena saṃtiṣṭhedyāvatpariṇato raviḥ ||
tataḥ praṇamya rudrāṇīṃ maṃtrametamudīrayet || 22 ||
vedeṣu sarvaśāstreṣu divi bhūmau dharātale ||
dṛṣṭaḥ śrutaśca bahuśaḥ śaṃkāvirahitaḥ stavaḥ || 23 ||
tvaṃ śaktistvaṃ svadhā svāhā tvaṃ sāvitrī sarasvatī ||
patiṃ dehi gṛhaṃ dehi vasu dehi namostu te || 24 ||
evaṃ saṃkṣamayeddevīṃ praṇipatya punaḥpunaḥ ||
dehi bhaktyā gṛhaṃ ramyaṃ vicitraṃ bahubhūmikam || ācchādyadvārakedārakapotādivibhūṣitam || 25 ||
kuḍyastaṃbhagavākṣāḍhyaṃ maṇimaṃḍitatoraṇam ||
padmarāgamahānīlavajravaiḍūryabhūṣitam || 26 ||
gṛhadānavidhānena brāhmaṇāya yaśasvine ||
sapatnīkāya saṃpūjya sarvopaskarasaṃyutam || 27 ||
suvāsinībhyastaddeyaṃ naivedyaṃ sūryasaṃsthitam ||
nirvartya vidhinānena tatpaścātkṣamayedagham || 28 ||
dāṃpatyāni ca bhojyāni caturthyāṃ madhurai rasaiḥ ||
ityuktamumayā cīrṇaṃ hara raṃbhāvrataṃ param || 29 ||
vratāṃtegastyamunaye dattaṃ gṛhavaraṃ śubham ||
lopāmudrā priyā patnī tasya veśmani pūjitā || 4.18.30 ||
tena dharmeṇa deva tvaṃ bhartā labdho.asi śaṃkaraḥ ||
arddhāṃke.api sthitā tena yāścariṣyaṃti yoṣitaḥ ||31||
kauṃteya puruṣo vāpi khyātaṃ raṃbhāvrataṃ bhuvi ||
tāsāṃ putrā gṛhaṃ bhogāḥ kulavṛddhirbhaviṣyati || 32 ||
strīṇāṃ cāturyasaubhāgyaṃ gārhasthyaṃ sarvakāmikam ||
bālāvṛddhāsumadhyānāṃ rūpalāvaṇyabṛṃhaṇam ||
sapatnīdarpadalanaṃ vaśīkaraṇamuttamam || 33 ||
himavadviṃdhyayormadhye āryāvarte manohare ||
utpatya śobhane vāse pūrvotpannadhane kule || 34 ||
mṛtaḥ śakrapuraṃ yāti tato viṣṇupuraṃ vrajet ||
tataḥ śivapuraṃ yāti vyāsasya vacanaṃ yathā || 35 ||
yadraṃbhayā kila bhayāpaharaṃ tataśca gauryā himādribhavanasthitayāpi cīrṇam ||
tasyā vrataṃ suvikaroti ratā ca dharme brahmeśakeśavapatiṃ sukhadaṃ labheta || 36 || ||
iti śrībhaviṣye mahāpurāṇa uttaraparvaṇi śrīkṛṣṇayudhiṣṭhirasaṃvāde pañcāgnisādhanākhyaṃ raṃbhātṛtīyāvrataṃ nāmāṣṭādaśo.adhyāyaḥ || 18 |||9||
gopadatṛtīyāvratavarṇanam
|| śrīkṛṣṇa uvāca || ||
pārtha bhādrapade māsi śuklapakṣe dinodaye ||
tṛtīyāyāṃ caturthyāṃ ca śuddhāyāṃ prativatsaram || 1 ||
upavāsena gṛhṇīyādvrataṃ nāmnā tu gopadam ||
snātvā naro vā nārī vā puṣpadhūpavilepanaiḥ || 2 ||
dadhyakṣataiśca mālābhiḥ piṣṭakairvanamālayā ||
abhyaṃjayedgavāṃ śṛṃgaṃ khuraṃ pucchāntameva ca || 3 ||
dadyādgavāhnikaṃ bhaktyā tāsāṃ pūrvāparāhṇayoḥ ||
anagnipākaṃ bhuñjīta tailakṣāravivarjitam || 4 ||
vrajaṃtīnāṃ gavāṃ nityamāyāṃtīnāṃ ca bhārata ||
puradvāretha vā goṣṭhe mantreṇā nena maṃtravit ||
arghyaṃ pradadyādgṛṣṭyāṃ vā gavāṃ pādeṣu pāṃḍava || 5 ||
mātā rudrāṇāṃ duhitā vasūnāṃ svasādityānāmamṛtasya nābhiḥ ||
pranuvocaṃ cikituṣe janāya mā gāmanāgāmaditiṃ vadhiṣṭa || 6 ||
|| iti gavāṃ maṃtraḥ || ||
gāvo me agrataḥ santu gāvo me saṃtu pṛṣṭhataḥ ||
gāvo me hṛdaye saṃtu gavāṃ madhye vasāmyaham|| 7 ||
itthaṃ saṃpūjya dattvārghaṃ tato gacchedgṛhāśramam ||
paṃcamyāṃ krodharahito bhuñjīta gorasaṃ dadhi || 8 ||
śālipiṣṭaṃ phalaṃ śākaṃ tilamannaṃ ca śobhanam||
bhuktāvasāne rājendra saṃyatastāṃ niśāṃ svapet ||9||
prabhāte gopadaṃ dattvā brāhmaṇāya hiraṇmayam ||
kṣamayecca gavāṃ nāthaṃ goviṃdaṃ garuḍadhvajam || 4.19.10 ||
arcyaṃte.atra yathā gāvastathā govardhano giriḥ ||
praṇamyācyutamuddiśya śṛṇu yatphalamāpnuyāt ||11||
gobhakto govrataṃ kṛtvā bhaktyā śaktyā ca goṣpadam ||
saubhāgyaṃ rūpalāvaṇyaṃ prāpnoti pṛthivītale || 12 ||
gotarṇakākulaṃ gehaṃ gokulaṃ ca samāsataḥ ||
dhanadhānyasamopeta śālīkṣurasamṛddhimān ||13||
saṃtānaṃ pūjitaṃ labdhvā tataḥ svarge.amaro bhavet ||
divyarūpadharaḥ sragvī divyālaṃkārabhūṣitaḥ ||14||
gandharvairgītavādyena sevyamāno.apsarogaṇaiḥ ||
divyaṃ yugaśataṃ chittvā tato viṣṇupuraṃ vrajet || 15 ||
yo gopadavratamidaṃ kurute trirātraṃ gā vai prapūjayati gorasapūjanācca ||
goviṃdamādipuruṣaṃ praṇataḥ savitrāmālokamuttamamupaiti gavāṃ pavitram || 16 || ||
iti śrībhaviṣye mahāpurāṇa uttara parvaṇi śrīkṛṣṇayudhiṣṭhirasaṃvāde tṛtīyāvrate goṣpadatṛtīyāvrataṃ nāmaikonaviṃśo.adhyāyaḥ || 19 || cha ||
harikālīvratavarṇanam
|| śrīkṛṣṇa uvāca || ||
śukle bhādra padasyaiva tṛtīyāyāṃ samarcayet ||
sarvadhānyaistāṃ virūḍhāṃ bhūtāṃ haritaśāḍvalām ||
harakālīṃ devadevīṃ gaurīṃ śaṃkaravallabhām || 1 ||
gandhaiḥ puṣpaiḥ phalairdhūpairnaivedyairmodakādibhiḥ ||
prīṇayitvā samācchādya padmarāgena bhāsvatā || 2 ||
ghaṇṭāvādyādibhirgītaiḥ śubhairdivyakathānugaiḥ ||
kṛtvā jāgaraṇaṃ rātrau prabhāte hyudgate ravau || 3 ||
suvāsinībhiḥ sā neyā madhye puṇyajalāśaye ||
tasminvisarjayetpārtha harakālīṃ haripriyām ||4||
|| yudhiṣṭhira uvāca || ||
bhagavanharakālīti kā devī procyate bhuvi ||
ārdradhānyaiḥ sthitā kasmātpūjyate strījanena sā ||
pūjitā kiṃ dadātīha sarvaṃ me brūhi keśava|| 5 ||
|| śrīkṛṣṇa uvāca || ||
sarvapāpaharāṃ divyāṃ mattaḥ śṛṇu kathāmimām ||
āsīddakṣasya duhitā kālīnāmnī tu kanyakā || 6 |
varṇenāpi ca sā kṛṣṇā navanīlotpalaprabhā ||
sā ca dattā tryaṃbakāya mahādevāya śūline ||7||
vivāhitā vidhānena śaṃkhatūryānunādinā ||
yatkuryādāgatairdevairbrāhmaṇānāṃ ca nisvanaiḥ || 8 ||
nirvartite vivāhe tu tayā sārdhaṃ trilocanaḥ ||
krīḍate vividhairbhogairmanasaḥ prītivardhanaiḥ || 9 ||
atha devasamānastu kadācitsa vṛṣadhvajaḥ ||
āsthānamaṃḍape ramye āste viṣṇusahāyavān || 4.20.10 ||
tatrasthaścāhvayāmāsa narmaṇā tripurāṃtakaḥ ||
kālī nīlotpalaśyāmāṃ gaṇamātṛgaṇāvṛtām || 11 ||
ehyehi tvamitaḥ kāsi kṛṣṇāṃjanasamanvite ||
kālasuṃdari matpārśve dhavale tvamupāviśa || 12 ||
evamutkṣiptamanasā devī saṃkuddhamānasā ||
śvāsayāmāsa tāmrākṣī bāṣpagadgadayā girā || 13 ||
ruroda sasvaraṃ bālā tatrasthā sphuritādharā ||
kiṃdaivayogāttāmrā gaurgaurī cetyabhidhīyate || 14 ||
yasmānmamopamā dattā kṛṣṇavarṇena śaṃkara ||
harakālīti vāhūtā devarṣigaṇasevitā || 15 ||
tasmāddehamimaṃ kṛṣṇaṃ juhomi jvalite.anale ||
ityuktvā vāryamāṇā tu harakālī ruṣānvitā || 16 ||
mumoca haritacchāyākāṃtiṃ haritaśādvale ||
cikṣepa doṣaṃ rāgeṇa jvalite havyavāhane || 17 ||
punaḥ parvatarājasya gṛhe gaurī babhūva sā ||
mahādevasya dehārddhe sthitā saṃpūjyate suraiḥ || 18 ||
evaṃ sā harakālīti gaurīśasya vyavasthitā ||
pūjanīyā mahādevī maṃtreṇānena pāṃḍava || 19 ||
harakarmasamutpanne harakāye harapriye ||
māṃ trāhīśasya mūrtisthe praṇatāstu namonamaḥ || 4.20.20 ||
itthaṃ saṃpūjya naivedyaṃ dadyādviprāya pāṃḍava ||
tāṃ ca prātarjale ramye maṃtreṇaiva visarjayet || 21 ||
arcitāsi mayā bhaktyā gaccha devi surālayam ||
harakāle śive gauri punarāgamanāya ca ||22||
evaṃ yaḥ pāṃḍavaśreṣṭha harakālīvrataṃ caret ||
varṣevarṣe vidhānena nārī narapate śubhā || 23 ||
sā yatphalamavāpnoti tacchṛṇuṣva narādhipa ||
martyaloke ciraṃ tiṣṭhetsarvarogavivarjitā || 24 ||
sarvabhogasamāyuktā sau bhāgyabalagarvitā ||
putrapautrasuhṛnmitranaptṛdauhitrasaṃkulā || 25 ||
sāgraṃ varṣaśataṃ yāvadbhogānbhuktvā mahītale ||
tatovasāne dehasya śivajñānā mahāmune || 26 ||
cirabhadrā mahākālanaṃdīśvaravināyakāḥ ||
tadājñākiṃkarāḥ sarve mahādevaprasādataḥ || 27 ||
saṃpūrṇasūryagaṇasaptavirūḍhaśasyāṃ tāṃ vai himādritanayāṃ harakālikākhyām ||
saṃpūjya jāgaramanuddhatagītavādyairyacchaṃti yā iha bhavaṃti patipriyāstāḥ || 28 ||
iti śrībhaviṣye mahāpurāṇa uttaraparvaṇi śrīkṛṣṇayudhiṣṭhirasaṃvāde harakālītṛtīyāvrataṃ nāma viṃśo.adhyāyaḥ || 20 || || cha ||
lalitāvratavarṇanam
|| yudhiṣṭhira uvāca ||
atha pṛcchāmi bhagavanvrataṃ dvādaśamāsikam ||
lalitārādhanaṃ nāma māsamāsakrameṇa vā || 1
|| kṛṣṇa uvāca ||
śṛṇu pāṃḍava yatnena yathā vṛttaṃ purātanam ||
śaṃkarasya mahādevyāḥ saṃvādaṃ kurusattama || 2 ||
kailāsaśikhare ramye bahupuṣpaphalopage ||
sahakāradrumacchanne caṃpakāśokabhūṣite || 3 ||
kadaṃbabakulāmoda vaśīkṛtamadhuvrate ||
mayūraravasaṃghuṣṭe rājahaṃsopaśobhite || 4 ||
mṛgarkṣagajasiṃhaiśca śākhāmṛgagaṇāvṛte ||
gaṃdharvayakṣadevarṣisiddhakinnarapannagaiḥ || 5 ||
tapasvibhirmahābhāgaiḥ sevamānaṃ samaṃtataḥ ||
sukhāsīnaṃ mahādevaṃ bhūtasaṃghaiḥ samāvṛtam || 6 ||
apsarobhiḥ parivṛtamumā natvābravīdidam ||
umovāca ||
bhagavandevadeveśa śūlapāṇe vṛṣadhvaja || 7 ||
kathayasva maheśāna tṛtīyāvratamuttamam ||
saubhāgyaṃ labhate yena dhanaṃ putrānpaśūnsukham || 8 ||
nārī svargaṃ śubhaṃ rūpamārogyaṃ śriyamuttamām ||
evamukto dayitayā bhāryayā prītipūrvakam ||
vihasya śaṃkaraḥ prāha kiṃ vratena tava priye || 9 ||
ye kāmāstriṣu lokeṣu divyā bhūmyaṃtīrakṣajāḥ ||
sarvepi tena cāyattā vaśyastehaṃ yataḥ patiḥ || 4.21.10 ||
umovāca || satyametatsureśāna tvayi dṛṣṭe na durlabham ||
kiṃcittribhuvanābhogabhūṣaṇe śaśibhūṣaṇe || 11 ||
bhaktyā striyo hi māṃ deva prajapaṃti śubhāśubham ||
virūpāḥ sulabhāḥ kāścidaputrā bahuputrakāḥ ||12||
suśīlāstapasā kāścicchvaśrubhiḥ pīḍitā bhṛśam ||
śaucācārasamāyuktā na rocantetha kasyacit || 13 ||
evaṃ vahuvidhairduḥkhaiḥ pīḍyamānāstu dāruṇaiḥ ||
śaraṇaṃ māṃ prapannāstāḥ kṛpāviṣṭā tato hyaham || 14 ||
yena tāḥ sukhasaṃbhogarūpalāvaṇyasaṃpadā ||
putraiḥ saubhāgyavittaughai ryuktāḥ syuḥ surasattama ||
tanme kathaya tattvena vratānāmuttamaṃ vratam || 15 ||
|| īśvara uvāca || ||
māghe māsi site pakṣe tṛtīyāyāṃ yatavratāḥ||
mukhaṃ prakṣālya hastau ca pādau caiva samāhitāḥ || 16 ||
upavāsasya niyamaṃ daṃtadhāvanapūrvakam ||
madhyāhne tu tataḥ snānaṃ bilvairāmalakaiḥ śubhaiḥ ||17||
snātvā tīrthajale śubhre vāsasī paridhāya ca ||
sugaṃdhaiḥ sumanobhiśca prabhūtaiḥ kuṃkumādibhiḥ ||18||
arcayaṃti sadā devi tvāṃ bhaktyā bhaktavatsale ||
karpūrādyaistathā dhūpairnaivedyaiḥ śarkarādibhiḥ || 19 || yadṛcchālābhasaṃpannairdhūpadīpārcanādibhiḥ ||
nāmneśānīṃ gṛhītvā tu pratīkṣeddhaṭikāṃ tataḥ || 4.21.20 ||
pātre tāmramaye śuddhe jalākṣatavimiśrite ||
sahiraṇyaṃ dvijaṃ kṛtvā maṃtrapūrvaṃ samādhinā || 21 ||
śirasi prakṣipettoyaṃ dhyāyaṃtī manasepsitam ||
brahmāvartātsamāyātā brahmayonervinirgatā || 22 ||
bhadreśvarā tato devī lalitā śaṃkarapriyā ||
gaṃgādvārāddharaṃ prāptā gaṅgājalapavitritā || 23 ||
saubhāgyārogyaputrārthamarthārthaṃ haravallabhe ||
āyātā ghaṭikāṃ bhadre pratīkṣasva namonamaḥ || 24 ||
dattvā hiraṇyaṃ tattasmai prāśnīyācca kuśodakam ||
ācamya prayato bhūtvā bhūbhisthā kṣapayetkṣapām || 25 ||
dhyāyamānā umāṃ daivīṃ harite yavasaṃstare ||
dvitīyehni tataḥ snātvā tathaivābhyarcya pārvatīm || 26 ||
yathāśakti dvijānpūjya tato bhuñjīta vāgyatā ||
evaṃ tu prathame māsi pūjanīyāsi kālike || 27 ||
dvitīye pārvatīnāma tṛtīye śaṃkarapriyā ||
bhavānyatha caturthe tvaṃ skadamātātha pañcame || 28 ||
dakṣasya duhitā ṣaṣṭhe mainākī saptame smṛtā ||
kātyāyanyaṣṭame māsi navame tu himādrijā ||29||
daśame māsi vikhyātā devi saubhāgyadāyinī ||
umā tvekādaśe māsi gaurī tu dvādaśe parā || ||4.21.30||
kuśodakaṃ payaḥ sarppirgomūtraṃ gomaya phalam ||
niṃbapatraṃ kaṃṭakārī gavāṃ śṛṃgodakaṃ dadhi ||31||
pañcagavyaṃ tathā śākaḥ prāśanāni kramādamī ||
māsimāsi sthitā hyevamupavāsaparāyaṇā ||32||
dadāti śraddhayaitāni vācake brāhmaṇottame ||
kusuṃbhamājyaṃ lavaṇaṃ jīrakaṃ guḍameva ca ||33||
dattairebhiḥ sūryasthā tvaṃ sūryasthā tuṣyasi priye ||
māsimāsi bhavenmantro gakāro dvādaśākṣaraḥ || 34 ||
oṅkārapūrvako devi namaskārāṃta īritaḥ ||
ebhistvaṃ pūjitā maṃtraistuṣyasi vratataḥ priye || 35 ||
tuṣṭā tvabhīpsitānkāmāndadāsi prītipūrvakam ||
samāpte tu vrate tasminbrāhmaṇaṃ vedapāragam || 36 ||
sahitaṃ bhāryayābhyarcya gaṃdhapuṣpādibhiḥ śubhaiḥ ||
dvijaṃ maheśvaraṃ kṛtvā umāṃ bhāryāṃ tathaiva ca || 37 ||
annaṃ sadakṣiṇaṃ dadyāttathā śukle ca vāsasī ||
raktaṃ vāsoyugaṃ dadyāttvāmuddiśya harapriye || 38 ||
brāhmaṇe śraddhayā yuktastasyāṃ phalamidaṃ śṛṇu ||
daśavarṣasahasrāṇi lokānprāpya parāparān || 39 ||
modate bhartṛsahitā yatheṃdreṇa śacī tathā ||
mānuṣatvaṃ punaḥ prāpya svena bhartrā sahaiva sā || 4.21.40||
puṇye kule śriyā yuktā nīrogā sukhamaśnute ||
sapta janmāni yāvacca na vaidhavyamavāpnuyāt ||41||
putrānbhogāṃstathā rūpaṃ saubhāgyārogyameva ca ||
ekapatnī tathā bhartuḥ prāṇebhyo.apyadhikā bhavet||42||
śṛṇuyādvācyamānaṃ tu bhaktyā yā lalitāvratam ||
mayā snehena kathitaṃ sāpi tatphalabhāginī || 43 ||
saṃpūjya lakṣalalitāṃ lalitāṃgayaṣṭiṃ gaṃdhodakāmṛtaghaṭīṃ śirasi kṣipedyaḥ||
sā svargametya lalitāsu lalāmabhūtā bhūpādhipaṃ patimavāpya bhuvaṃ bhunakti || 44 || iti śrībhaviṣye mahāpurāṇa uttaraparvaṇi śrīkṛṣṇayudhiṣṭhirasaṃvāde lalitātṛtīyāvratamāhātmyaṃ nāmaikaviṃśatitamo.adhyāyaḥ || 21 || cha ||
aviyogatṛtīyāvratavarṇanam
|| yudhiṣṭhira uvāca || ||
ihāpi yogamāsādya bhartṛbaṃdhujanaiḥ saha ||
vada nārī naraśreṣṭha vrajedyena śivālayam || 5 ||
vidhavā ca pare loke bhūyo.api na viyujyate ||
sukhasaṃdohasaubhāgyayuktā bhavati bhāminī || 2 ||
|| śrīkṛṣṇa uvāca || ||
ubhayācaritaṃ yatnādbhavavāglalitāmṛtam ||
labdhvā hi bhavato janma dakṣakopādviyuktayā || 3 ||
mahāsaubhāgyasaṃdohaṃ dṛṣṭvā devyā mahātmanā ||
aruṃdhatyā vaśiṣṭhena pṛṣṭena kathitaṃ śṛṇu || 4 ||
māsi mārgaśire prāpte caṃdravṛddhau śucismitā ||
dvitīyāyāṃ samāsādya naktaṃ bhuṃjīta pāyasam || 5 ||
ācamya ca śucirbhūtvā daṃḍavacchaṃkaraṃ namet ||
mudānvitā namaskṛtya vijñāpya parameśvaram || 6 ||
audumbaramṛjuṃ gṛhya bhakṣayeddaṃtadhāvanam ||
uttarāśāgataṃ sāgraṃ satvacaṃ nirvraṇaṃ śubham || 7 ||
dvitīyāyāṃ pare vāhni gaurīṃ śaṃbhuṃ ca pūjayet ||
śālipiṣṭamaye kṛtvā rūpe strīpuṃsayoḥ śubhe ||
pātre saṃsthāpya saṃpūjya jāgaraṃ niśi kalpayet || 8 ||
vidhivatpūjayitvā tu śaṃkaraṃ kīrtayatsvapet ||
prabhāte te gṛhītvā tu ācāryāya nivedayet || 9||
bhojayenmṛṣṭamannādyaṃ śivabhaktyā dvijottamān ||
dāṃpatyāni ca tatraiva śaktyā tānyapi bhojayet || 4.22.10 ||
pratimāsaṃ prakurvīta vidhinā tena saṃyatā ||
kārtikāṃte tato māsi mārgaśīrṣe samudyamet || 11 ||
nāmāni ca pravakṣyāmi pratimāsaṃ kramācchaṇu ||
pūjājāpyanimittaṃ ca siddhyarthaṃ ceti tasya ca || 12 ||
evaṃ pauṣe tu saṃprāpte giriśaṃ pārvatīṃ tathā ||
samabhyarcya caturthyāṃ tu paṃcagavyaṃ pibetsudhīḥ || 13 ||
etatpāraṇamuddiṣṭaṃ mārgādau mārgagocaram ||
na cānyatpañcagavyādi pāvanaṃ paramaṃ smṛtam ||14||
bhavaṃ caiva bhavānīṃ ca māsi māghe prapūjayet ||
phālgune tu mahādevamumayā sahitaṃ matam || 15 ||
lalitāṃ śaṃkaraṃ devaṃ caitre saṃpūjayettataḥ ||
sthāṇuṃ vaiśākhamāse tu lolanetrāyutaṃ yajet || 16 ||
jyeṣṭhe vīreśvaraṃ devamekavīrāsamanvitam ||
āṣāḍhe paśunāthaṃ ca śaktyā sārddhaṃ trilocanam || 17 ||
śrīkaṃṭhaṃ śrāvaṇe devaṃ sutānvitamathārcayet ||
bhīmaṃ bhādrapade māsi durgayā sahitaṃ yajet ||
īśānaṃ kārttike māsi śivādevīyutaṃ yajet || 18 ||
japyadhyānārcanāyaiva nāmānyetāni suvrata ||
smṛtāni vidhinā rājanvratasiddhirbhaved dhuvam ||19||
pratimāsaṃ tu puṣpāṇi yāni pūjāsu yojayet ||
tāni kramātpravakṣyāmi sadyaḥ prītikarāṇi vai || 4.22.20 ||
ādau nīlotpalaṃ yojyaṃ tadabhāve.aparāṇyapi ||
pavitrāṇi sugaṃdhīni yojayedbhaktito.arcane || 21 ||
karavīraṃ bilvapatraṃ kiṃśukaṃ kubjamallikā ||
pāṭalābjakadaṃbaṃ ca tagaraṃ droṇamālatī || 22 ||
etānyuktakrameṇaiva māseṣu dvādaśasvapi ||
bhaktyā yojyāni rājendra śivayostuṣṭihetave || 23 ||
vatsarāṃte vitānaṃ ca dhūpotkṣepaṃ saghaṃṭikam ||
dhvajaṃ dīpaṃ vastrayugaṃ śaṅkarāya nivedayet||24||
snāpayitvā ca liptvā ca sauvarṇaṃ mūrdhni paṅkajam ||
pūpayugmaṃ ca purataḥ śālipiṣṭamayaṃ nyaset || 25 ||
naivedyaṃ śaktito datvā nattvā ca vidhivacchivam ||
kuryānnīrājanaṃ śambhostato gacchetsvakaṃ gṛham || 26 ||
tatra gatvā trikoṇaśca caturasraṃ ca kārayet ||
trikoṇe brāhmaṇī bhojyā caturasre dvijottamāḥ || 27 ||
vratino bhojayetpaścādvādaśaiva dvijottamān ||
mithunāni ca tāvaṃti śaktyā bhaktyā ca pāṇḍava || 28 ||
umāmaheśvaraṃ haimaṃ kārayitvā suśobhanam ||
mauktikāni catuḥṣaṣṭistāvato.api pravālakāḥ ||
tāvaṃti puṣparāgāṇi tāmrapātropari nyaset || 25||
vastreṇa veṣṭayitvā ca gandhairdhūpaistathārcayet ||
etatsaṃbhārasaṃyuktamācāryāya nivedayet || 4.22.30 ||
vratināṃ brāhmaṇānāṃ ca dampatīnāṃ ca bhārata ||
dattvā hiraṇyavāsāṃsi kṣamayetpraṇipatya ca || 31 ||
catvāriṃśattathāṣṭau ca kumbhāṃcchatramupānahau || sahiraṇyākṣatānsarvāndadyātpuṣpodakānvitān || || 32 ||
dīnāndhaduḥkhitānāṃ ca taddine vā nivāritam ||
kalpayedannadānaṃ cālocayañchaktimātmanaḥ || 33 ||
nyūnādhikaṃ ca kartavyaṃ svavittapari māṇataḥ ||
saṃpūrayetkalpanayā vittaśāṭhyaṃ na kārayet ||34||
aviyogakaraṃ caitadrūpasaubhāgyavittadam ||
āyuḥputrapradaṃ svargyaṃ śivalokapradāyakam || ||| 35 ||
samyakpurāṇapatitaṃ vratacaryametattattvaṃ carācaragurorhṛdayaṃgamāyāḥ||
pūjāṃ vidhāya vidhivanna viyogameti sādhvīsvabhartṛsutabandhujanairdhanaiśca||36||
iti śrībhaviṣye mahāpurāṇa uttaraparvaṇi aviyogatṛtīyāvrataṃ nāma dvāviṃśatitamo.adhyāyaḥ || 22 ||
umāmaheśvaravratavarṇanam
|| yudhiṣṭhira uvāca || ||
kena dharmeṇa nārīṇāṃ vratena niyamena ca ||
saubhāgyaṃ jāyate.atīva putrāśca bahavaḥ śubhāḥ || 1 ||
dhanaṃ dhānyaṃ suvarṇaṃ ca vastrāṇi vividhāni ca ||
aviyogaṃ ca satataṃ labhate putrapautrayoḥ || 2 ||
|| śrīkṛṣṇa uvāca || ||
śṛṇu pārtha pravakṣyāmi vratānāmuttamaṃ vratam ||
yatkṛtvā subhagā nārī bahvapatyā ca jāyate || 3 ||
dhanaṃ dhānyaṃ hiraṇyaṃ ca dāsīdāsādikaṃ vahu ||
utpadyate gṛhe yena tadvata kathayāmi te || 4 ||
umāmaheśvaraṃ nāma apsarobhiḥ purā kṛtam ||
vidyādharaiḥ kinnaraiśca ṛṣikanyābhireva ca ||5||
rūpiṇyā raṃbhayā caiva sītayā.ahalyayā tathā||
rohiṇyā damayaṃtyā ca taptayā cānasūyayā || ||6||
etābhiścaritaṃ pārtha vrataṃ sarvavratottamam ||
saubhāgyārogyaphaladaṃ dāridryavyādhināśanam || 7 ||
martyaloke striyo yāśca durbhagārūpavarjitāḥ ||
aputrā nirdhanāścaiva sarvabhogavivarjitāḥ || 8 ||
tāsāṃ hitārthaṃ pārvatyā umāmaheśvaraṃ vratam ||
avatāritaṃ purā pārtha na jānaṃtyadhamāḥ striyaḥ ||9||
pūrvaṃ mārgaśire māsi nārī dharmaparāyaṇā ||
śuklapakṣe tṛtīyāyāṃ sopavāsā jitendriyā || 4.23.10 ||
snātvā saṃpūjya lalitāṃ harakāyārdhavāsinīm ||
punaḥ prabhātasamaye snānaṃ cākṛtrime jale ||
kṛtvā devīstarpayitvā idaṃ vākyamudīrayet || 11 ||
namo namaste deveśa umādehārddhadhāraka ||
mahādevi namaste.astu harakāyārddhavāsini || 12 ||
hṛdi kṛtvā śivaṃ devīṃ japedyāvadgṛhaṃ gatā ||
pūjayeddevamīśānaṃ puṣpaiḥ kālodbhavaistataḥ || 13 ||
vāmapārśve umāṃ devīṃ dakṣiṇe tu maheśvaram ||
dhūpaṃ vā gugguluṃ vāpi dahetpaścātsubhāvitā ||
naivedyaṃ tu yathāśakti ghṛtapakvaṃ nivedayet || 14 ||
kārayedvaiśvadevaṃ tu tilājyena susaṃskṛtam ||
pañcagavyaṃ tataḥ prāśya ātmakāyaviśodhanam || 15 ||
evaṃ dvādaśamāsāṃstu pūjayitvā maheśvaram ||
udyāpanaṃ tataḥ kuryātprahṛṣṭenāntarātmanā || 16 ||
śivaṃ rūpyamayaṃ kṛtvā umāṃ haimamayīṃ tathā ||
ārūḍhau vṛṣabhe raupye sarvālaṃkārabhūṣitau || 17 ||
candanena śivaṃ carcya kuṃkumena ca pārvatīm ||
arcayetkusumaiḥ paścātsugandhaiḥ sumanoharaiḥ || 18 ||
veṣṭayecchuklavastreṇa śivaṃ raktena pārvatīm ||
paścāddhūpaṃ dahennārī bhaktibhāvena bhāvitā || 19 ||
bhojayecchivabhaktāṃśca brāhmaṇānvedapāragān ||
bhaktebhyo dakṣiṇā deyā bhaktyā śāṭhyavivarjitā || 4.23.20 ||
tataḥ pradakṣiṇīkṛtya idamuccārayedbudhaḥ ||
umāmaheśvarau devau sarvalokapitāmahau ||
vratenānena suprītau bhavetāṃ mama sarvadā || 21 ||
evamuktvā jitakrodhe brāhmaṇe vedapārage ||
vrataṃ nivedayedbhaktyā vācake vā guṇānvite || 22 ||
idaṃ kṛtvā vrataṃ nārī maheśārpitamānasā ||
prayāti paramaṃ sthānaṃ yatra devo maheśvaraḥ || 23 ||
śivaloke vasettāvadyāvadindrāścaturddaśa ||
apsarobhiḥ parivṛtā kinnarībhistathaiva ca || 24 ||
yadā mānuṣyamāyāti jāyate vimale kule ||
rūpayauvanasaṃpannā bahuputrā pativratā || 25 ||
dhanadhānyasamāyukte suvarṇamaṇimaṃḍite ||
yāvajjīvaṃ gṛhe ramye tiṣṭhatyavyāhatendriyā || 26 ||
viyogaṃ naiva sā paśyedbhartṛmitrasutādikaiḥ ||
mṛtā śivapuraṃ yāti śivagaurīprasādataḥ || 27 ||
haimīmumāṃ rajatapiṇḍamayaṃ maheśaṃ raupye surūpavṛṣabhe ca samāsthitau tau ||
sampūjya raktasitavastrayugāvagūḍhau nārī bhavatyavidhavā sutasaukhyayuktā || 28 ||
iti śrībhaviṣye mahāpurāṇe uttara parvaṇi śrīkṛṣṇayudhiṣṭhirasaṃvāde umāmaheśvaravrataṃ nāma trayoviṃśatitamo.adhyāyaḥ || 23 || ||9||||
rambhātṛtīyāvratavarṇanam
|| śrīkṛṣṇa uvāca || ||
raṃbhātṛtīyāṃ vakṣyāmi sarvapāpapraṇāśinīm ||
putrasaubhāgyaphaladāṃ sarvāmayanivāriṇīm || 1 ||
sarvaduṣṭaharāṃ puṇyāṃ sarvasaukhyapradāṃ tathā ||
sapatnīdarpadalanāṃ tathaiśvaryaṃ karīṃ śivām || 2 ||
śaṃkareṇa purā proktā pārvatyāḥ priyakāmyayā ||
tāmimāṃ śṛṇu bhūpāla sarvabhūtahitāya vai || 3 ||
mārgaśīrṣe śubhe māsi tṛtī yāyāṃ narādhipa ||
śuklāyāṃ prātarutthāya daṃtadhāvanapūrvakam ||
upavāsasya niyamaṃ gṛhṇīyādbhaktibhāvitā || 4 ||
devi saṃvatsaraṃ yāvattṛtīyāyāmupo ṣitā ||
pratimāsaṃ kariṣyāmi pāraṇaṃ cāpare.ahani ||
tadavighnena me yātu prasādāttava pārvati || 5 ||
evaṃ saṃkalpya vidhivatkauṃteya kṛtaniścayaḥ ||
bhaktyā naro vā nārī vā snānaṃ kuryādataṃdritaḥ ||6||
nadyāṃ taḍāge vāpyāṃ vā gṛhe vā niyatātmavān ||
pūjayetpārvatīṃ nāma rātrau prāśya kuśodakam|| || 7 ||
prabhāte bhojayedvidvāñchivabhaktānviśeṣataḥ ||
hiraṇyaṃ lavaṇaṃ caiva teṣāṃ dadyāttu dakṣiṇām ||
gaurīśvaraṃ yathāśakti bhojayetprayatā satī || 8 ||
anena vidhinā rājanyaḥ kuryānmāsi pauṣake ||
gomūtraṃ prāśayedrātrau prabhāte bhojayeddvijān || 9 ||
hiraṇyaṃ jīrakaṃ caiva svaśaktyā dāpayettataḥ ||
kaḍuhuṃḍaṃ ca kanakaṃ tebhyo dattvā visarjayet || 4.24.10 ||
vājapeyātirātrābhyāṃ phalaṃ prāpnotyasaṃśayaḥ ||
śakraloke vasetkalpaṃ tataḥ śivapuraṃ vrajet || 11 ||
māghe māsi tṛtīyāyāṃ sudevīṃ nāma pūjayet ||
gomayaṃ prāśayedrātrau tataścaikākinī svapet || 12 ||
prātaḥ kusuṃbhaṃ kanakaṃ dadyā cchaktyā dvijātiṣu ||
viṣṇuloke ciraṃ sthitvā prāpnoti śivasāmyatām || 13 ||
gaurīti phālgune nāma gokṣīraṃ prāśayenniśi ||
prabhāte bhojayedvidvāñchivabhaktānsuvāsinīḥ || 14 ||
kaḍuhuṃḍaṃ sakanakaṃ tebhyo dattvā visarjayet ||
vājapeyātirātrābhyāṃ phalaṃ prāpnotyasaṃśayaḥ ||15||
caitre māsi viśālākṣīṃ pūjayedbhaktitatparā ||
dadhi prāśya svapetprātardadyāddhema sakuṃkumam ||
saubhāgyaṃ mahadāpnoti viśālākṣyāḥ prasādataḥ || 16 ||
vaiśākhasya tṛtīyāyāṃ śrīmukhīṃ nāma pūjayet ||
ghṛtaṃ ca prāśayedrātrau tataścaikākinī svapet || 17 || śivabhaktāndvijānprātarbhojayitvā yathepsitam ||
tāṃbūla lavaṇaṃ dattvā praṇipatya visarjayet ||
anena vidhinā dattvā putrānāpnoti śobhanān || 18 ||
āṣāḍhe mādhavīṃ natvā prāśnīyācca tilodakam ||
prabhāte bhojayedviprāndakṣiṇāyāṃ guḍaḥ smṛtaḥ ||
sakāṃcanaḥ śubhāṃllokānprāpnoti hi na saṃśayaḥ || 19 ||
śrāvaṇe tu śriyaṃ pūjya pibedgośṛṃgajaṃ jalam ||
śivabhaktāṃśca saṃpūjya dayāddhemaphalaiḥ saha ||
sarvalokeśvaro bhūtvā sarvakāmānavāpnuyāt || 4.24.20 ||
bhādre caiva tṛtīyāyāṃ haratālīti pūja yet ||
māhiṣaṃ ca pibeddugdhaṃ saubhāgyamatulaṃ labhet ||
iha loke sukhaṃ bhuktvā cāṃte śivapuraṃ vrajet || 21 ||
āśvine tu tṛtīyāyāṃ giriputrīti pūjayet ||
saṃprāśya taṇḍulajalaṃ prātarviprāṃśca pūjayet ||22||
dakṣiṇā cāpi nirdiṣṭā kanakaṃ ca sacandanam ||
sarvayajñaphalaṃ prāpya gaurīloke mahī yate || 23 ||
padmodbhavā kārtike ca pañcagavyaṃ pibettataḥ ||
rātrau prajāgaraṃ kuryātprabhāte bhojayeddvijān || 24 ||
sapatnīkāñchubhācārānmālyavastra vibhūṣaṇaiḥ ||
pūjayecchivabhaktāṃśca kumārīścaiva bhojayet || 25 ||
umāmaheśvaraṃ haimaṃ samāpte kārayennṛpa ||
yathāvibhavasāreṇa vitānaṃ pañcavarṇakam || || 26 ||
aśanaṃ ca śubhaṃ dadyācchvetacchatraṃ kamaṃḍalum ||
pādukopānahau divyairvastrayugmaiśca pāṃḍava || 27 ||
pītayajñopavītaiśca dīpanetraiḥ samujjvalaiḥ ||
śaṃkhaśuktisamopetairddarpaṇaiśca suśobhitaiḥ ||28||
umāmaheśvaraṃ sthāpya pūjayitvā yathāvidhi ||
nānāvidhaiḥ sugandhaiśca patraiḥ puṣpaiḥ phalaistathā || 29 ||
ghṛtapakvaiśca naivedyairdīpamālābhireva ca ||
śarkarānālikeraiśca dāḍimairbījapūrakaiḥ || 4.24.30 ||
jīrakairlavaṇaiścaiva kusumbhaiḥ kuṃkumaistathā ||
satāmrabhājanairdivyodakai rasasaṃyutaiḥ ||
pūjayeddevadeveśaṃ kṣamayettadanaṃtaram || 31 ||
śaṃkhavāditranirghoṣairvedadhvanisamanvitaiḥ ||
evaṃ kṛte phalaṃ yatsyāttanna śakyaṃ mayoditum || 32 ||
pūrvoktaphalabhāgī syātsarvadevaiśca pūjyate ||
kalpakoṭiśataṃ yāvatsarvakāmānavāpnuyāt || 33 ||
tadaṃte śivasāyujyaṃ prāpnotīha na saṃśayaḥ ||
puraitadraṃbhayā cīrṇaṃ tena raṃbhāvrataṃ smṛtam || 34 ||
yo.ahaṃ sā ca smṛtā gaurī yā gaurī sa maheśvaraḥ ||
iti matvā mahārāja śaraṇaṃ vraja pārvatīm || 35||
eṣā himādriduhiturdayitā tṛtīyā raṃbhāvidhānamalabhadbhuvi tatkṛteti|| satprāśitairuditanāmayutāmupoṣya prāpnoti vāṃchitaphalānyabalā bahūni ||36||
iti śrībhaviṣye mahāpurāṇa uttaraparvaṇi śrīkṛṣṇayudhiṣṭhirasaṃvāde raṃbhātṛtīyāvrataṃ nāma caturviṃśatitamo.adhyāyaḥ ||24|| |||cha||| ||

saubhāgyāṣṭakavarṇanam
|| śrīkṛṣṇa uvāca || ||
tathaivānyatpravakṣyāmi sarvakāmaphalapradam ||
saubhāgyaśayanaṃ nāma yatpurāṇavido viduḥ || 1 ||
purā dagdheṣu lokeṣu bhūrbhuvaḥsvarmahādiṣu ||
saubhāgyaṃ sarvalokānāmekasthamabhavattadā || 2 ||
tacca vaikuṇṭhamāsādya viṣṇorvakṣasthale sthitam ||
tataḥ kālena mahatā punaḥ sargavidhau nṛpa || 3 ||
ahaṃkārāvṛte loke pradhānapuruṣānvite ||
sparddhāyāṃ ca pravṛttāyāṃ kamalāsanakṛṣṇayoḥ || 4 ||
piṃgākārā samudbhūtā jvālā vakṣasthalī tadā ||
tayābhitaptasya harervakṣasastadviniḥsṛtam || 5 ||
yadvakṣasthalamāśritya viṣṇoḥ saubhāgyamāsthitam ||
rasarūpatayā tāvatprāpnoti vasudhātalam || 6 ||
utkṣiptamantarikṣasthaṃ brahmaputreṇa dhīmatā ||
dakṣeṇa pītamātraṃ tu rūpalāvaṇyakāraṇam || 7 ||
balaṃ tejo mahajjātaṃ dakṣasya parameṣṭhinaḥ ||
śeṣaṃ yadapatadbhūmāvaṣṭadhā tadajāyata || 8 ||
ikṣavastavarājaṃ ca niṣpāvājājidhānyakam ||
vikāravacca gokṣīraṃ kusumbhaṃ kuṃkumaṃ tathā ||
lavaṇaṃ cāṣṭamaṃ tatra saubhāgyāṣṭakamucyate || 9 ||
pītaṃ yadbrahmaputreṇa yogajñānavidā tathā ||
duhitāsyābhavattasmādyā satītyabhidhīyate ||
lokānatītya lālityāllalitā tena cocyate || 4.25.10 ||
trailokyasuṃdarīmenāmupayeme pinākadhṛk ||
triviśvasaubhāgyamayī bhukti muktiphalapradā || 11 ||
ārādhya tāmumāṃ bhaktyā strī rājankinna vindati || 12 ||
|| yudhiṣṭhira uvāca || ||
kathamārādhanaṃ tasyā jagaddhātryā janārdana ||
yadvidhānaṃ ca tatsarvaṃ jagannātha vadasva me || 13 ||
|| śrīkṛṣṇa uvāca || ||
vasaṃtamāsamāsādya tṛtīyāyāṃ yudhiṣṭhira ||
śuklapakṣasya pūrvāhne tilaiḥ snānaṃ samācaret || 14 ||
tasminnahani sā devī kila viśvātmanā satī ||
pāṇigrahaṇakairmantrairudvāhyā varavarṇinī||15||
tathā sahaiva deveśaṃ tṛtīyāyāmathārcayet ||
phalairnānāvidhairdhūpadīpanaivedyasaṃyutaiḥ || 16 ||
pañcagavyenānumāsaṃ tathā gaṃdhodakena ca ||
snapayitvā rcayedgaurīminduśekharasaṃyutām || 17 ||
pāṭalāṃ śaṃbhusahitāṃ pādayostu prapūjayet ||
triyugāṃ śivasaṃyuktāṃ gulphayorubhayorapi || 18 ||
bhadreśvareṇa sahitāṃ vijayāṃ jānunoryuge ||
īśānīṃ harikeśaṃ ca kaṭyāṃ saṃpūjayedbudhaḥ || 19 ||
koṭanīṃ śūlinaṃ kukṣau maṃgalāṃ śarvasaṃyutām ||
udare pūjayedrāja nnumāṃ rudraṃ kucadvaye || 4.25.20 ||
anaṃtāṃ tripuraghraṃ ca pūjayetkarasaṃpuṭe ||
kaṃṭhe bhavaṃ bhavānīṃ ca mukhe gaurīṃ haraṃ tathā || 21 ||
sarvātmanā ca sahitāṃ lalitāṃ mastakopari ||
oṃkārapūrvakairetairnnamaskārāṃtayojitaiḥ ||
pūjayedbhaktisahito gandhamālyānulepanaiḥ || 22 ||
evamabhyarcya vidhivatsaubhāgyāṣṭakamagrataḥ ||
sthāpayetsvinnaniṣpāvānkusuṃbhaṃ kṣīrajīrakam || 23 ||
tavarājekṣulavaṇaṃ kuṃkumaṃ ca tathāṣṭamam ||
dattaṃ saubhāgyakaṃ yasmātsaubhāgyāṣṭa kamucyate || 24 ||
evaṃ nivedya tatsarvaṃ śivayoḥ prīyatāmiti ||
caitre śṛṃgodakaṃ prāśya svapyādbhūmāvariṃdama ||25 ||
tataḥ prātaḥ samutthāya kṛtaprāṇa jayaḥ śuciḥ ||
saṃpūjya dvijadāṃpatyaṃ mālyavastravibhūṣaṇaiḥ ||
saubhāgyāṣṭakasaṃyuktaṃ sauvarṇacaraṇadvayam || 26 ||
prīyatāmatra lalitā brāhmaṇāya nive dayet||
evaṃ saṃvatsaraṃ yāvattṛtīyāyāṃ sadā nṛpa || 27 ||
prāśane nāmamaṃtre ca viśeṣo.ayaṃ nibodha me ||
gośṛṃgodakamādye syādvaiśākhe gomayaṃ punaḥ || 28 ||
jyeṣṭhe maṃdārapuṣpaṃ ca bilvapatraṃ śucau smṛṃtam ||
śrāvaṇe dadhi saṃprāśyaṃ nabhasye ca kuśodakam || 29 ||
kṣīramāśvayuje tadvatkārtike pṛṣadājyakam ||
mṛgottamāṃge gomūtraṃ pauṣe saṃprāśayedghṛtam ||4.25.30||
māghe kṛṣṇatilāṃstadvatpañcagavyaṃ ca phālgune ||
lalitā vijayā bhadrā bhavānī kumudā śritā ||31||
vāsudevī tathā gaurī maṅgalā kamalā satī ||
umā ca dānakāle tu prīyatāmiti kīrtayet ||32||
mallikāśokakamalakadaṃbotpalamālati ||
kuḍmalaṃ karavīraṃ ca bāṇamamlānakuṃkumam ||
siṃduvāraṃ ca māseṣu sarveṣu kramaśaḥ smṛtam || 33 ||
japākusuṃbhakusumaṃ mālatī śatapatrikā ||
yathālābhaṃ pradeyāni karavīraṃ ca sarvadā || 34 ||
evaṃ saṃvatsaraṃ yāvadupoṣya vidhivannaraḥ ||
strī nakte tu kumārī vā śivāmabhyarcya śaktitaḥ ||
vratāṃte śayanaṃ dadyātsarvopaskarasaṃyutam || 35 ||
umāmaheśvaraṃ haimaṃ vṛṣabhaṃ ca gavā saha ||
sthāpayitvā tu śayane brāhmaṇāya nivedayet || 36||
anyānyapi yathāśakti midhunānyaṃbarādibhiḥ ||
dhānyālaṃkaraṇairdānairanyaiśca dhanasaṃcayaiḥ ||
vittaśāṭhyena rahitaḥ pūjayedgatavismayaḥ || 37 ||
evaṃ karoti yaḥ samyaksaubhāmyaśayanavratam ||
sarvānkāmānavāpnoti padaṃ cānantyamaśnute || 38 || saubhāgyārogyarūpāyurvastrālaṃkārabhūṣaṇaiḥ ||
na viyukto bhavedrājanvarṣāyutaśatatrayam || 39 ||
yastu dvādaśa varṣāṇi saubhāgyaśayanaṃ vratam ||
karoti sapta cāṣṭau vā śrīkaṇṭhabhuvaneśvaraiḥ ||
pūjyamāno bhavetsamya gyāvatkalpāyutatrayam || 4.25.40 ||
nārī vā kurute yā tu kumārī vā nareśvara ||
sāpi tatphalamāpnoti devyanugrahalālitā || 41 ||
śṛṇuyādapi yaścaitatpradadyādatha vā matim ||
so.api vidyādharo bhūtvā svargaloke ciraṃ vaset || 42 ||
idamiha madanena pūrvamiṣṭaṃ caritamidaṃ śaśabiṃdunā vrata vai || surapatidhanadeśavāyusomaiścaritadidaṃ karuṇena baṃdinā ca || 43 ||
yānīha dattāni purā nareṃdrairdānāni dharmārthayaśaskarāṇi ||
nirmālyavaṃti pratimāni tāni sa nāma sādhuḥ punarādadānaḥ || 44 ||
iti śrībhaviṣye mahāpurāṇa uttaraparvaṇi saubhāgyāṣṭakatṛtīyāvrataṃ nāma pacaviṃśatitamo.a dhyāyaḥ || 25 || || cha ||

rasakalyāṇinīvratavarṇanam
yudhiṣṭhira uvāca ||
saubhāgyārogyaphaladaṃ vipakṣakṣayakārakam ||
bhuktimuktipradaṃ kiñcidvrataṃ brūhi janārdana || 1 || ||
|| śrīkṛṣṇa uvāca || ||
yadumāyai purā deva uvācāsurasūdanaḥ ||
kathāsu saṃpravṛttāsu lalitārādhanaṃ prati || 2 ||
tadidānīṃ pravakṣyāmi bhuktimukti phalapradam ||
narāṇāmatha nārīṇāmārādhanamanuttamam || 3 ||
śṛṇuṣvāvahito bhūtvā sarvapāpapraṇāśanam ||
nabhasye vātha vaiśākhe punarmārgaśire.atha vā || 4 ||
śuklapakṣatṛtīyāyāṃ snātaḥ sadgaurasarṣapaiḥ ||
gorocanasugomūtramustāgośakṛtaṃ tathā ||
dadhicaṃdanasaṃmiśraṃ lalāṭe tilakaṃ nyaset || 5 ||
saubhāgyārogyakṛdyatsyātsadā ca lalitāpriyam ||
pratipakṣaṃ tṛtīyāyāṃ baddhvā vā pītavāsasī || 6 ||
dhārayedatha vā raktapītāni kusumāni ca ||
vidhavāpyanuraktāni kumārī śuklavāsasī || 7 ||
devyarcāṃ paṃcagavyena tataḥ kṣīreṇa kevalam ||
snapayenmadhunā tadvatpuṣpagandhodakena ca || 8 ||
pūjayecchuklapuṣpaiśca phalairnānāvidhairapi ||
dhānyakājājilavaṇaguḍakṣīraghṛtādibhiḥ || 9 ||
śuklākṣataistilairarcyāṃ lalitāṃ yaḥ sadārcayet ||
āpādādyarcanaṃ kuryādgauryāḥ samyaksamāsataḥ || 4.26.10 ||
varadāyai namaḥ pādau tathā gulphau śriye namaḥ ||
aśokāyai namo jaṃghe bhavānyai jānunī tathā || 1 1||
ūrū māṃgalyakāriṇyai kāmadevyai tathā kaṭim ||
padmodbhavāyai jaṭharamuraḥ kāmapriye namaḥ || 12 ||
karau saubhāgyavāsinyai bāhū śaśimukhaśriyai ||
mukhaṃ kaṃdarpavāsinyai pārvatyai tu smitaṃ tathā || 13 ||
gauryyai namastathā nāsāṃ sunetrāyai ca locane ||
tuṣṭyai lalāṭaphalakaṃ kātyāyanyai śirastathā || || 14 ||
namo gauryai namaḥ sṛṣṭyai namaḥ kāṃtyai namaḥ śriyai ||
raṃbhāyai lalitāyai ca vāsudevyai namonamaḥ || 15 ||
evaṃ saṃpūjya vidhivadagrataḥ padma mālikhet ||
patrairdvādaśabhiryuktaṃ kuṃkumena sakarṇikam || 16 ||
pūrveṇa vinyasedgaurīmaparṇāṃ ca tataḥ param ||
bhavānīṃ dakṣiṇe tadvadrudrāṇīṃ ca tataḥ param || 17 ||
vinyasetpaścime saumyāṃ tato madanavāsinīm||
vāyavyāṃ pāṭalāvāsāmuttareṇa tato hyumām|| 18||
lakṣmīṃ svāhāṃ svadhāṃ tuṣṭiṃ maṃgalāṃ kumudāṃ satīm||
rudrāṇīṃ madhyataḥ sthāpya lalitāṃ karṇikopari||
kusumairakṣataiḥ śubhrairnamaskāreṇa vinyaset||19||
gītamaṃgalaghoṣaṃ ca kārayitvā suvāsinīḥ ||
pūjayedraktavāsobhī raktamālyānulepanaiḥ || 4.26.20 ||
siṃdūraṃ snānacūrṇaṃ ca tāsāṃ śirasi pātayet ||
siṃdūraṃ kuṃkumaṃ snānamiṣṭaṃ satyāḥ sadā yataḥ || 21 ||
nabhasye pūjayedgaurīmutpalairasitaistathā ||
bandhujīvairāśvayuje kārtike śatapatrakaiḥ || 22 ||
kundapuṣpairmārgaśire pauṣe vai kuṃkumena ca ||
māghe tu pūjayeddevīṃ siṃduvāreṇa bhaktitaḥ || 23 ||
jātyā tu phālgune pūjyā pārvatī pāṃḍunaṃdana ||
caitre ca mallikāśokairvaiśākhe gaṃdha pāṭalaiḥ || 24 ||
jyeṣṭhe kamalamaṃdārairāṣāḍhe caṃpakāṃbujaiḥ ||
kadaṃbairatha mālatyā śrāvaṇe pūjayedumām || 25 ||
gomūtraṃ gomayaṃ kṣīraṃ dadhi sarpiḥ kuśo dakam ||
bilvapatrārkapuṣpaṃ ca gavāṃ śṛṃgodaka tathā ||
paṃcagavyaṃ tathā bilvaṃ prāśayetkramaśaḥ sadā ||26||
etadbhādrapadādyaṃ tu prāśanaṃ samudāhṛtam ||
pratipakṣaṃ dvitīyāyāṃ mayā proktaṃ varānane || 27 ||
brāhmaṇaṃ brāhmaṇīṃ caiva śivaṃ gaurīṃ prakalpya ca ||
bhojayitvārcayedbhaktyā vastramālyānulepanaiḥ ||
puṃse pītāṃbare dattvā striyai kausuṃbhavāsasī || 28 ||
niṣpāvājājilavaṇamikṣudaṃḍaṃ guṇānvitam ||
striyai dadyātphalaṃ puṃse suvarṇotpalasaṃyutam || || 29 ||
yathā na devadeveśastvāṃ parityajya gacchati ||
tathā māṃ saṃparityajya patirnānyatra gacchatu || 4.26.30 ||
kumudā vimalānaṃtā bhavānī vasudhā śivā ||
lalitā kamalā gaurī satī raṃbhātha pārvatī || 31 ||
nabhasyādiṣu māseṣu prīyatāmityudīrayet ||
vratāṃte śayanaṃ dadyātsuvarṇaṃ kamalānvitam || 32 ||
mithunāni caturviṃśattadarddhaṃ sakṛdarccayet ||
aṣṭāvaṣṭāvatha punaścāturmāsye samarcayet || 33 ||
tathopadeṣṭāramapi pūjayedyatnato gurum ||
na pūjyate gururyatra sarvāstatrāphalāḥ kriyāḥ || 34 ||
uktānaṃtatṛtīyaiṣā sadānaṃtaphalapradā ||
sarvapāpaharā devī saubhāgyārogya vardhinī || 35 ||
na caināṃ vittaśāṭhyena kadācidapi laṃghayet ||
naro vā yadi vā nārī vittaśāṭhyātpatatyadhaḥ || 36 ||
garbhiṇī sūtikā naktaṃ kumārī cātha rogayuk ||
yadā śraddhā tadānyena kriyamāṇaṃ tu kārayet || 37 ||
imāmanaṃtaphaladāṃ tṛtīyāṃ yaḥ samācaret ||
kalpakoṭi śataṃ sāgraṃ śivaloke sa pūjyate || 38 ||
vittahīno.api kurvīta varṣatrayamupoṣaṇaiḥ ||
puṣpapatravidhānena sopi tatphalamāpnuyāt || 39 ||
nārī vā kurute yā tu kumārī vidhavā tathā ||
sā.api tatphalamāpnoti gauryanugrahabhāvitā ||4.26.40||
iti paṭhati śṛṇoti vā ya itthaṃ giritanayāvratamiṃdulokasaṃsthaḥ ||
matimapi ca dadāti so.api devairamaravadhūjanakiṃnaraiśca pūjyaḥ || 41 || ||
|| śrīkṛṣṇa uvāca || ||
anyāmapi pravakṣyāmi tṛtīyāṃ pāpanāśinīm ||
rasakalyāṇinīṃ nāma purā kalpavido viduḥ ||42||
māghamāse tu saṃprāpya tṛtīyāṃ śuklapākṣikīm||
prātargavyena payasā tilaiḥ snānaṃ samācaret || 43 ||
snāpayenmadhunā devīṃ tathaivekṣurasena ca ||
punaḥ pūjā prakartavyā jātyā vā kuṃkumena vā ||44||
dakṣiṇāṃgāni saṃpūjya tato vāmāni pūjayet ||
lalitāyai namaḥ pādau gulphaṃ tadvadathārcayet || 45 ||
jaṃghe jānū tathā satyai tathoraśca śriyai namaḥ ||
madanālasāyai tu kaṭiṃ madanāyai tathodaram ||46||
stanau madanavāsinyai kumudāyai ca kaṃdharam||
bhujānbhujāgraṃ mādhavyai kamalāyai hyupasthakam ||47||
bhrūlalāṭe ca rudrāṇyai śaṃkarāyai tathālakān ||
mukuṭaṃ viśvavāsinyai punaḥ kāṃtyai tathālakān||48||
netraṃ cakrāvadhāriṇyai puṣṭyai ca vadanaṃ punaḥ ||
utkaṃṭhinyai namaḥ kaṃṭhamanaṃtāyai tu kaṃdharām || 49 ||
raṃbhāyai vāmabāhuṃ ca viśokāyai namaḥ param ||
hṛdayaṃ manmathādityai pāṭalāyai namonamaḥ || 4.26.50 ||
evaṃ saṃpūjya vidhivaddvijadāṃpatyamarcayet ||
bhojayitvānnadānena madhureṇa vimatsaraḥ || 51 ||
salaḍḍukaṃ vārikuṃbhaṃ śuklāṃbarayugaṃ tatam ||
dattvā suvarṇakalaśaṃ gaṃdhamālyairathārcayet || 52 ||
prīyatāmatra kumudā gṛhṇīyāllavaṇavratam ||
anena vidhinā devīṃ māsimāsi samarcayet || 53 ||
lavaṇaṃ varjayenmāghe phālgune ca guḍaṃ punaḥ ||
tavarājaṃ tathā caitre varjyaṃ ca madhu mādhave || 54 ||
yārakaṃ jyeṣṭhamāse tu āṣāḍhe jīrakaṃ tathā ||
śrāvaṇe varjayetkṣīraṃ dadhi bhādrapade tathā || 55 ||
ghṛtamaśvayuje tadvadvarjayedyā ca majjikā ||
dhānyakaṃ mārgaśīrṣe tu pauṣe varjyā tu śarkarā || 56 ||
vratāṃte karakā pūrṇā eteṣāṃ māsimāsi ca ||
dayādvikālavelāyāṃ bhakṣapātreṇa saṃyutān || 57 ||
taṃḍulāñchvetavarṇāṃśca saṃyāvamadhupūrikāḥ ||
ghārikā ghṛtapūrāṃśca maṃḍa kānkṣīraśākakam || 58 ||
dadhyannaṃ ṣaḍvidhaṃ caiva bhiṃḍayaḥ śākavartikāḥ ||
māghādau kramaśo dadyādetāni karakopari || 59 ||
kumudā mādhavī gaurī raṃbhā bhadrā jayā śivā ||
umā śacī satī tadvanmaṃgalā ratilālasā || 4.26.60 ||
kramānmāghādi sarvatra prīyatāmiti kīrtayet ||
carvaṃtaṃ paṃcagavyaṃ ca prāśanaṃ samudāhṛtam || 61 ||
upavāsī bhavennityamaśakto dakṣiṇe kare ||
punarmāghe tu saṃprāpya śarkarāṃ karakopari|| 62 ||
kṛtvā tu kāṃcanīṃ godhāṃ paṃcaratnasamanvitām ||
umāmaṃguṣṭhamātrāṃ ca sudhāsūtre kamaṃḍalum || 63 ||
tadvadgomithunaṃ sarvaṃ suvarṇāsyaṃ sitaṃ param ||
savastrabhājanaṃ dattvā bhavānī prīyatāmiti || 64 ||
anena vidhinā yaśca rasakalyāṇinīvratam ||
kuryātsa sarvapāpebhyastatkṣaṇādeva mucyate || 65 ||
bhavārbudasahasraṃ tu na duḥkhī jāyate kvacit ||
agniṣṭomasahasreṇa yatphalaṃ tadavāpnuyāt || 66 ||
nārī vā kurute yā tu kumārī vā yudhiṣṭhira ||
vidhavā vā varākī vā sāpi tatphalabhāginī ||
saubhāgyārogyasaṃpannā gaurīloke mahīyate || 67 ||
iti paṭhati ya itthaṃ yaḥ śṛṇoti prasaṃgātsakalakaluṣamuktaḥ pārvatīlokameti || matimapi ca narāṇāṃ yo dadāti priyārthaṃ vipulamatijanānāṃ nāyakaḥ syādamogham || 68 ||
iti śrībhaviṣye mahāpurāṇa uttaraparvaṇi śrīkṛṣṇayudhiṣṭhirasaṃvāde rasakalyāṇinīvratavarṇanaṃ nāma ṣaḍviṃśatitamo.adhyāyaḥ || 26 || cha
ārdrānandakarīvratavarṇanam
|| śrīkṛṣṇa uvāca || ||
tathā cānyāṃ pravakṣyāmi tṛtīyāṃ pāpanāśinīm ||
lokeṣu nāmnā vikhyātāmārdrānaṃdakarīmimām || 1 ||
yadā śuklatṛtīyāyāmāṣāḍharkṣaṃ bhavetkvacit ||
brahmarkṣaṃ cātha mārgaṃ vā vrataṃ grāhyaṃ tadā śubham || 2 ||
darbhagaṃdhodakaiḥ snānaṃ tadā samyaksamācaret ||
śuklamālyāṃbaradharaḥ śuklagaṃdhānulepanaḥ || 3 ||
bhavānīmarcayedbhaktyā śuklapuṣpaiḥ sugaṃdhibhiḥ ||
mahādevena sahitāmupaviṣṭāṃ varāsane ||4||
vāsudevyai namaḥ pādau śaṃkarāya namo hareḥ ||
jaṃghe śokavināśinyāyānandāya namaḥ prabho|| || 5 ||
raṃbhāyai pūjayedūrū śivāya ca pinākinaḥ ||
ādityai ca kaṭiṃ pūjyā śūlinaḥ śūlapāṇaye || 6 ||
mādhavyai ca tathā nābhimatha śaṃbhorbhavāya vai ||
stanāvānaṃdakāriṇyai śaṃkarāyeṃdudhāriṇe || 7 ||
utkaṃṭhinyai namaḥ kaṃṭhaṃ nīlakaṃṭhāya vai hareḥ ||
karāvutpaladhāriṇyai rudrāya jagatīpateḥ ||8||
bāhuṃ ca pariraṃbhiṇyai nṛtyaśīlāya vai hareḥ || 9 ||
devyā mukhaṃ vilāsinyai vṛṣeśāya punarvibhoḥ ||
smitaṃ sasmaraśīlāyai viśvavaktrāya vai vibhoḥ || || 4.27.10 ||
netraṃ madanavāsinyai viśvadhāmne triśūline ||
bhruvau ratipriyāyai ca tāṃḍaveśāya vai vibhoḥ || 11 ||
devyai lalāṭamiṃdrāṇyai havyavāhāya vai vibhoḥ ||
svāhāyai mukuṭaṃ devyā vibhoḥ pañcaśarāya vai || 12 ||
viśvakāyai viśvamukhyai viśvapādakarau śivau ||
prasannavadanau vaṃde pārvatīparameśvarau || || 13 ||
evaṃ saṃpūjya vidhivadagrataḥ śivayoḥ punaḥ ||
padmotpalāni ca tathā nānāvarṇāni kārayet || 14 ||
śaṅkhacakre sakaṭake svastikaṃ varddha mānakam ||
gomūtraṃ gomayaṃ kṣīraṃ dadhi sarpiḥ kuśodakam || 15 ||
śṛṃgodakaṃ bilvapatraṃ vāri kuṃbhānvitaṃ tathā ||
uśīranīraṃ tadvacca yavacūrṇodakaṃ tataḥ || 16 ||
tilodakaṃ ca saṃprāpya svapyānmārgaśirādiṣu ||
pratipakṣadvitīyāyāṃ prāśanaṃ samudāhṛtam || 17 ||
sarvatra śuklapuṣpāṇi praśastāni śivārcane ||
dānakāleṣu sarveṣu maṃtrametamudīrayet || 18 ||
gaurī me prīyatāṃ nityamaghanāśāya maṃgalā ||
saubhāgyāyāstu lalitā bhavānī sarvasiddhaye || 19 ||
saṃvatsarāṃte lavaṇaṃ guḍakuṃbhaṃ samarjitam ||
candanaṃ netrapaṭṭaṃ ca sitavastrayugānvitam ||
umāmaheśvaraṃ haimaṃ tadvadikṣuphalairyutam || 4.27.20 ||
prastarāvaraṇaṃ śayyāṃ saviśrāmāṃ nivedayet ||
sapatnīkāya viprāya gaurī me prīyatāmiti || 21 ||
ārdrānandakarī nāma tṛtīyaiṣā sanātanī ||
yāmupoṣya naro yāti śaṃbhostatparamaṃ padam || 22 ||
iha loke yamānaṃdaṃ prāpnoti dhanasaṃcayāt ||
āyurārogyasaṃpanno na kiñcicchokamāpnuyāt || 23 ||
nārī vā kurute yā tu kumārī vidhavā tathā ||
sāpi tatphalamāpnoti devyanugrahalālitā || 24 ||
pratipakṣamupoṣyaivaṃ maṃtrārcanavidhānataḥ ||
rudrāṇīlokamāpnoti punarāvṛttivarjitam || 25 ||
ya idaṃ śṛṇuyānnityaṃ śrāvayedvāpi mānavaḥ ||
śakraloke sagaṃdharvaiḥ pūjyate.abdaśatatrayam || 26 ||
ānaṃdadāṃ sakaladuḥkhaharāṃ tṛtīyāṃ yā strī karoti vidhivatsadhavādhavā ca ||
sā sve gṛhe sukhaśatānyanubhūya bhūyo gaurīpuraṃ sadayitā muditā prayāti || 27 ||
iti śrībhaviṣye mahāpurāṇa uttaraparvaṇi śrīkṛṣṇayudhiṣṭhirasaṃvāde ārdrānandakarītṛtīyāvrataṃ nāma saptaviṃśatitamo.adhyāyaḥ || 27 || || cha ||
caitrabhādrapadamāghavarṇanam
|| yudhiṣṭhira uvāca || ||
caitre bhādrapade māghe rūpasaubhāgya putradam ||
tṛtīyātrayametanme kṛṣṇa kasmānna kīrtitam || 1 ||
kimahaṃ bhaktirahitastrayīmārgātigo naraḥ ||
suprasiddhaṃ jagatyetadgopitaṃ kena hetunā || 2 ||
bhavānsarvārthānukūlaḥ sarvajña iti me matiḥ ||
śrīkṛṣṇa uvāca ||
vrataṃ caitajjagatkhyātaṃ nākhyātaṃ tena te mayā ||3||
yadyasti śravaṇe buddhiḥ śrūyatāṃ pāṇḍunandana ||
ko.anyaḥ śrotā jagatyasminbhavatā sadṛśo bhuvi || 4 ||
jayā ca vijayā caiva umāyāḥ paricārike ||
āgatya munikanyābhiḥ pṛṣṭebhīṣṭaphalecchayā || 5 ||
bhavatyau sarvadā devyāścittavṛttividau kila ||
kena vratopacāreṇa kasminnahani pārvatī ||
pūjitā tuṣṭimabhyeti maṃtrai kaiśca varānane || 6 ||
tāsāṃ tadvacanaṃ śrutvā jayā provāca sādaram ||
śrūyatāmabhidhāsyāmi sarvakāmaphalapradam ||
vratamutsavasaṃyuktaṃ naranārī manoramam || 7 ||
caitre sitatṛtīyāyāṃ dantadhāvanapūrvakam ||
upavāsasya niyamaṃ gṛhṇīyādbhaktibhāvitam || 8 ||
sakuṃkumaṃ satāṃbūlaṃ sindūraṃ raktavāsasī ||
vidhavā sopavāsāpyavaidhavyakaraṇaṃ param || 9 ||
vidhavā yāti mārgeṇa kumārī tu yadṛcchayā ||
kuryādabhyarcanavidhiṃ śrūyatāṃ maṃtravikramaḥ || 4.28.10 ||
netrapaṭṭapaṭīvastrairvastramaṇḍapikāṃ śubhām ||
kārayetkusumāmodadivyābharaṇabhūṣitām || 11 ||
pravālalaṃbitavrātāmaṃtardivyavitānikām ||
vinyastapūrṇakalaśāṃ satpīṭhasthāpitadvijām || 12 ||
purataḥ kārayetkuṇḍaṃ hastamātraṃ samekhalam ||
tataḥ snātānuliptāṃ ca paridhāya suvāsasī || 13 ||
devānpitṛrnsamabhyarcya tato devīgṛhaṃ vrajet ||
nāmāṣṭakena saṃpūjyā gaurī gopativallabhā || 14 ||
tatkālaprabhavaiḥ puṣpairgandhāli bakulākulaiḥ ||
kuṃkumena samālabhya karpūrāgurucandanaiḥ || 15 ||
evaṃ saṃpūjya vidhivatsaddhūpenādhivāsayet ||
pārvatī lalitā gaurī gāṃdhārī śāṅkarī śivā ||
umā satī samuddiṣṭaṃ nāmāṣṭakamidaṃ mayā || 16 ||
laḍḍukaiḥ khaṇḍaveṣṭaiśca guḍakaiḥ siṃhakesaraiḥ ||
somālakaiḥ kokasaraiḥ khaṇḍakhādyakaraṃbakaiḥ || 17 ||
ghṛtapakvairbahuvidhaiḥ supakvaphalakalpitaiḥ ||
dṛṣṭiprāṇaharairhṛdyairnnaivedyaiḥ prīṇayedumām || 1. ||
kaṭukhaṃḍaṃ jīrakaṃ ca kuṃkumaṃ lavaṇārdrakam ||
ikṣudaṃḍānaikṣavaṃ ca haridrārdrānpuro nyaset || 19 || nārikelānāmalakānmātuluṃgānsadāḍimān ||
kūṣmāṇḍakarkaṭīvṛṃtanāraṅgapanasādikān || 4.28.20 ||
kālodbhavāni cānyāni phalāni vinivedayet ||
gṛhādyulūkhalaśilāśūrpānpraṇatibhiḥ saha || 21 ||
netrāṃjanaśalākāśca nakhare canakāni ca ||
darpaṇaṃ vaṃśapātrāṇi bhavānyai vinivedayet || 22 ||
śaṃkhatūryaninādena gītamaṅgalanisvanaiḥ ||
bhaktyā saṃpūjayeddevīṃ svaśaktyā śivavallabhām || 23 ||
tato.astasamaye bhānoḥ kumāryaḥ karakairnavaiḥ ||
snānaṃ kuryurmudā yuktāḥ saubhāgyārogyavṛddhaye || 24 ||
yāmeyāme gate snānaṃ devīpūjanameva ca ||
taireva nāmabhirhomastilājyena praśasyate || 25 ||
padmāsanasthitā sādhvī tenaivārdreṇa vāsasā ||
gaurīmukhekṣaṇaparā tāṃ rātrimativāhayet || 26 ||
kāścidvādyaṃti saṃhṛṣṭāḥ kāścinnṛtyaṃti harṣitāḥ ||
kathayaṃti kathāḥ kāściddevyāstatra mahotsave || 27 ||
gītatālānu saṃbaddhamanuddhatamanākulam ||
nṛtyaṃti sma pure devyāḥ kāścidullasitabhruvaḥ || 28 ||
nṛtyena hṛṣyati haro gaurī gītena tuṣyati ||
sadbhāvenātha vā sarve gacchaṃti paramāṃ mudam || 29 ||
suvāsinībhyastāṃbūlaṃ kuṃkumaṃ kusumāni ca ||
pradeyaṃ jāgaravatyā cānyeṣāmapi kiṃcana || 4.28.30 ||
naṭairviṭairbhaṭaiścaiva tathā prekṣaṇakotsavaiḥ ||
sakhibhiḥ sahitā rātriṃ gāyanṛtyanhitāṃ nayet || 31 ||
evaṃ prabhātasamaye snātvā saṃpūjya pārvatīm ||
tato vai sā samārohedvastrālaṃkṛtatoraṇam || 32 ||
tolayetsā tathāsīnaṃ guḍena lavaṇena ca ||
kuṃkumenātha vā śaktyā karpūrāgarucaṃdanaiḥ || 33 ||
parvatānāmapicchedaiḥ kecidicchaṃti sūrayaḥ ||
kuṃḍamaṃḍapasaṃbhārairmaṃtraistatraiva śobhayet || 34 ||
lavaṇena sahātmā hi tolyate ca guḍena vā ||
kayāpi bhaktiparayā saubhāgyamatulīkṛtam || 35 ||
evaṃ devīṃ praṇamyāryāṃ kṣamāpya gṛhamāviśet ||
āmaṃtrya śāstrakuśalānācāravidhipāragān || || 36 ||
annaṃ ca madhuraprāyaṃ bhojayitvā suvāsinīḥ ||
svayaṃ bhuṃjīta sahasā jñātījanabudhaiḥ svakaiḥ || 37 ||
yacca devyāḥ puro dattaṃ naive dyādi tadicchayā ||
gṛhaṃ pratinayetsarvaṃ vibhajyābhrāṃtimānasā || 38 ||
tato dadyādgṛhasthebhyaḥ kṛtakṛtyā bhavettadā ||
vidhirbhādrapade.apyeṣa susaundaryapradāyakaḥ || 39 ||
saptadhānyasvarūpāṃ ca śūrpe saṃpūjayedumām ||
gomūtraprāśanaṃ hyatra tena gomūtrasaṃjñitā || 4.28.40 ||
māghamāsatṛtīyāyāṃ viśeṣaḥ śrūyatāmiti ||
pūrvoktaṃ sakalaṃ kṛtvā prabhāte yavasaṃstaram ||
tolayitvā kuṃdapuṣpaiḥ pūjayettatsutāmiti || 41 ||
etena kāraṇenoktā caturthī kundasaṃjñayā ||
tṛtīyākhyaṃ mayaitatte kathitaṃ sarvakāraṇam ||
jayayā munikanyānāṃ yatpurā samudāhṛtam || 42 ||
śrīkṛṣṇa uvāca ||
āsīdvidarbhanagare veśyā sarvāṃgasuṃdarī ||
tayā brāhmaṇavākyena sarvametatkṛtaṃ purā || 43 ||
bhuktvā bhogānmahīpṛṣṭhe dattvā dānaṃ yathepsayā || 44 ||
kālena samanuprāptā maraṇaṃ manujeśvara ||
acintyā rājaduhitā sā babhūvātiśobhanā ||
avaṃtisundarī nāma devānāmapi sundarī || 45 ||
yadi vaktrasahasrāṇāṃ sahasraṃ syātkathaṃcana ||
tathāpi nirvarṇayitumaśakyā sā sulocanā || 46 ||
caitratṛtīyāmāhātmyātsā babhūva prabhāvatī ||
mātāpitroratipreṣṭhā śiṣṭā nyajanavallabhā || 47 ||
labdhābdhisaṃbhavā yadvatkṛṣṇenākliṣṭakarmaṇā ||
tataḥ sā bubhuje bhogānbhartrā sārddhaṃ mudā satī || 48 ||
yadadādbrāhmaṇebhyaḥ sā bhūṣaṇaṃ kaṭakādikam ||
tatprabhāveṇa sā lebhe saubhāgyaṃ kiṃ tataḥ param || 49 ||
putrāṃśca janayāmāsa viṣṇuśakraparākramān ||
sarvāstraśastrakuśalā nvedoktavidhipāragān || 4.28.50 ||
evaṃ rūpaṃ mahatprāpya saubhāgyaṃ putrasaṃpadam ||
bhartrā sahaiva maraṇamaṃte prāpya pativratā || 51 ||
śakrādilokapā lānāṃ bhavaneṣu yathākramam ||
ākramya brahmalokaṃ ca jagāma śivasātmatām || 52 ||
evaṃ yānyāpi kurute nārī vratamidaṃ śubham ||
sā rūpasaubhāgyasutānprāpya svarge mahīyate || 53 ||
na durbhagā kule tasyāḥ kācidbhavati kanyakā ||
na durvinītaśca suto na bhṛtyo.apriyakṛdbhavet || 54 ||
na dāridryaṃ gṛhe tasminna vyādhirupajāyate ||
yatra sā ramate sādhvī dhmātacāmīkaraprabhā || 55
anyāśca yāścariṣyaṃti brāhmaṇānumate vratam ||
saṃpūjya vācakaṃ bhaktyā bhūṣaṇācchādanādibhiḥ || 56 ||
tāḥ sarvasukhasaṃpannā avipannamanorathāḥ ||
bhaviṣyaṃti kuruśreṣṭha tasyai devi namostu te || 57 ||
māghe mahārghyamaṇimaṃḍitapādapīṭhāṃ caitre vicitrakusumotkaracarcitāṃgīm || śūrpaprarūḍhanavasasyamayīṃ nabhasye saṃpūjya śaṃbhudayitāṃ prabhavaṃti nāryaḥ || || 58 ||
iti śrībhaviṣye mahāpurāṇa uttaraparvaṇi śrīkṛṣṇayudhiṣṭhirasaṃvāde caitrabhādrapadamāghatṛtīyāvratavarṇanaṃ nāmāṣṭaviṃśatitamo.adhyāyaḥ || 28 || ||
anantaratṛtīyāvratavarṇanam
|| yudhiṣṭhira uvāca || ||
śuklapakṣatṛtīyāstu bahavaḥ samudāhṛtāḥ ||
ānantaryavrataṃ brūhi tṛtīyobhayasaṃyutam || 1 ||
hitāya sarvabhūtānāṃ lalanānāṃ viśeṣataḥ ||
nāma prāśananaivedyairmāsimāsi pṛthakpṛthaka || 2 ||
śrīkṛṣṇa uvāca || ||
brahmaviṣṇumaheśādyairyathoktaṃ surasattamaiḥ ||
apūrvaṃ sarvamaṃtrāṇāmānaṃtaryavrataṃ śṛṇu || 3 ||

ādau mārgaśire māsi vratametatsamācaret ||
naktaṃ kuryāddvitīyāyāṃ tṛtīyāyāmupoṣitā || 4 ||
umāṃ devīṃ samabhyarcya puṣpagaṃdhādibhiḥ kramāt ||
śarkarāputrikāṃ śaktyā praṇipatya nivedayet || 5 ||
saṃprāśya dadhi rātrau ca svapyādvigatamatsarā ||
prabhāte vidhivadbhaktyā mithunaṃ bhojayetsudhīḥ ||6||
aśvamedhamavāpnoti samagraṃ nātra saṃśayaḥ ||
tathā kṛṣṇatṛtīyāyāṃ sopavāsā jitendriyā || 7 ||
japetkātyāyanīṃ nāma nāli keraṃ nivedayet ||
svapyātprāśya payo rātrau kāmakrodhavivarjitā ||
dāṃpatyaṃ subhagaṃ bhojyaṃ gomedhaphalamāpnuyāt || 8 ||
pauṣasyāditṛtīyāyāṃ sopavāsā jitendriyā ||
gaurīṃ nāma tu saṃpūjya laḍḍukānvinivedayet || 9 ||
svapyātprāśya ghṛtaṃ rātrau tyaktvā kāmaṃ tadagrataḥ||
prabhāte mithunaṃ bhojyaṃ naramedhaphalaṃ bhavet || 4.29.10 ||
evaṃ kṛṣṇatṛtīyāyāṃ pārvatīmiti pūjayet ||
nivedayānnaṃ śaṣkulyo gomayaṃ prāśayenniśi ||
dāṃpatyaṃ vividhaṃ bhojyama śvamedhaphalaṃ labhet || 11 ||
māghasya śuklapakṣe tu tṛtīyāyāmupoṣitaḥ ||
suranāyikāṃ ca saṃpūjya khaṇḍabilvaṃ nivedayet || 12 ||
tataḥ kuśodakaṃ prāśya svapyādbhūmau jitendriyā ||
prabhāte madhurānnena mithunaṃ bhojya bhaktitaḥ ||
kṣamāpyāṃte namaskṛtya iti svarṇaphalaṃ labhet || 13 ||
punaretattato māghe kṛṣṇapakṣe śucivratā ||
āryāṃ nāmnā prapūjyātha khādyakāni nivedayet || 14 ||
madhu prāśya svapedrātrau kāmakrodhavivarjitā ||
mithunaṃ bhojayitvā tu vājapeyaphalaṃ labhet || 15 ||
evaṃ vai phālgune māsi sopavāsā śucivratā ||
bhadrīṃ nāma prapūjyātha kāsāraṃ vinivedayet || 16 ||
suprāśya śarkarāṃ cātha svapyādrātrau vimatsarā ||
prabhāte mithunaṃ bhojyaṃ sautrāmaṇiphalaṃ labheta || 17 ||
punaḥ kṛṣṇatṛtīyāyāṃ phālgunasyaiva bhārata||
viśālākṣīṃ samabhyarcya pūrikā vinivedayet || 18 ||
sodakāṃstaṃḍulāndattvā svapyādbhūmau manasvinī ||
bhojayenmithunaṃ prātaragniṣṭomaphalaṃ labhet || 19 ||
caitrasyāditṛtīyāyāṃ śucirbhūtā jitendriyā ||
śriyaṃ devīṃ yajedbhaktyā vaṭakānvinivedayet || 4.29.20 ||
bilvapatraṃ tataḥ prāśya svapyāddhyāna parāyaṇā ||
prātarutthāya madbhaktyā mithunaṃ pūjayetsudhīḥ ||
praṇipatya kṣamāpyaivaṃ rājasūyaphalaṃ labhet || 21 ||
punaḥ kṛṣṇatṛtīyāyāṃ caitre samyagupoṣitaḥ ||
kālīṃ nāma samabhyarcya piṣṭaṃ prāśya svapenniśi || 22 ||
pūpakāni nivedyātha kuryādrātrau prajāgaram ||
mithunāni ca saṃbhojya atirātraphalaṃ bhavet || 23 ||
evaṃ vaiśākhamāse tu sopavāsā jitendriyā ||
pūjayeccaṇḍikāṃ devīṃ madhukāni nivedayet || 24 ||
śrīkhaṃḍaṃ caṃdanaṃ liptvā svapyāddevyagrato bhuvi ||
bhojayitvā ca dāṃpatyaṃ cāṃdrāyaṇaphalaṃ labhet || 25 ||
tathā kṛṣṇatṛtīyāyāṃ sopavāsā vimatsarā ||
pūjayetkālarātriṃ tu gandhapuṣpaiḥ sadīpakaiḥ || 26 ||
surājyaṃ yāvakaṃ dattvā tilānbhuṃjansvapenniśi ||
prabhāte mithunaṃ bhojyama tikṛcchraphalaṃ labhet || 27 ||
jyeṣṭhe sitatṛtīyāyāṃ hyupavāsakṛtāṃ varā ||
śubhāṃ devīṃ samabhyarcya āmrāṇi vinivedayet ||
saṃprāśyāmalakaṃ rātrau gaurīṃ dhyātvā sukhaṃ svapet || 28 ||
tataḥ prātaḥ samutthāya daṃpatī rūpaśālinau ||
bhojayitvā vidhānena tīrthayātrāphalaṃ labhet || 29 ||
punaḥ kṛṣṇatṛtīyāyāṃ sopavāsā suvāsinī ||
skandamāteti saṃpūjya iḍāyai vinivedayet || 4.29.30 ||
prāśayetpaṃcagavyañca svapyāddevyagratastataḥ ||
prabhāte mithunaṃ bhojyaṃ kanyādānaphalaṃ labhet || 31 ||
āṣāḍhamāse saṃprāpte pūjayecca yaśodhanam ||
karaṃjakaṃ ca naivedyaṃ gośṛṃgāṃbhaḥ pibenniśi ||
prabhāte mithunaṃ bhojyaṃ kanyādānaphalaṃ labhet || 32 ||
tathā kṛṣṇatṛtīyāyāṃ kūṣmāṃḍīṃ śaktito yajet ||
saktūnguḍājyasaṃmuktānpurato vinivedayet || 33 ||
kuśodakaṃ ca saṃprāśya svapyādrātrau jitendriyā ||
prabhāte mithunaṃ bhojyaṃ gosahasraphalaṃ labhet || 34 ||
śrāvaṇe sopavāsā ca caṃḍāṃ ghaṇṭāṃ prapūjayet ||
kulmāṣāstatra naivedyaṃ pibetpuṣpodakaṃ punaḥ || 35 ||
prabhāte śaktito dadyādbhojanaṃ mithunasya tu ||
prāpnotyabhayadānasya phalaṃ naivātra saṃśayaḥ || 36 ||
tadvatkṛṣṇatṛtīyāyāṃ rudrāṇīṃ nāmabhiryajet ||
siddhapiṃḍāni divyāni naivedyaṃ dāpayettathā || 37 ||
piṇyākaṃ prāśa yitvā tu svapyādrātrau vimatsarā ||
saṃpūjya dvijadāṃpatyamiṣṭāpūrtaphalaṃ labhet || 38 ||
bhādre śuklatṛtīyāyāṃ pūjayeta himādrijām ||
godhūmānnaṃ nivedyaiva prāśayeccandanaṃ sitam || 39 ||
gandhodakaṃ tataḥ prāśya sakhībhiḥ sahitā svapet ||
prabhāte mithunaṃ bhojyaṃ mārgapālīśataṃ labhet || 4.29.40 ||
tadvatkṛṣṇatṛtīyāyāṃ durgāṃ daivīṃ samarcayet || dadyātpiṣṭaphalāndivyānguḍājyaparipūritān || 41 ||
prāśayitvā tu gomūtraṃ svapyācchāṃtena cetasā ||
prātastu mithunaṃ bhojyaṃ sadāsatraphalaṃ labhet ||42||
māsi cāśvayuje bhaktyā devīṃ nārāyaṇīṃ yajet ||
sopavāsā khaṇḍapūpānnaivedyaṃ parikalpayet || || 43 ||
prāśayeccaṃdanaṃ raktaṃ svapyācca gatamatsarā ||
prabhāte bhojyaṃ dāṃpatyamagnihotraphalaṃ labhet || 44 ||
tathā kṛṣṇatṛtīyāyāṃ svasti nāma prapūja yet ||
śālyodanaṃ guḍopetaṃ naivedyaṃ nirvapettataḥ || 45 ||
kusuṃbhabījānsaṃprāśya tyaktvā kāmaṃ svapenniśi ||
saṃbhojya mithunaṃ prātargavāhnikaphalaṃ labhet || 46 ||
kārtikasya tṛtīyāyāṃ svāhānāmnīṃ prapūjayet ||
kṣīraṃ khaṇḍaghṛtopetaṃ naivedyaṃ dāpayecca tām || 47 ||
svapyādrātrau jitakrodhā prāśya kuṃkumakeśarān ||
prabhāte mithunaṃ bhojyamekabhaktaphalaṃ labhet ||48 ||
tathā kṛṣṇatṛtīyāyāṃ svadhānāmnīṃ prapūjayet ||
mudgaudanaṃ nivedyātha ghṛtaṃ prāśya svapenniśi ||49||
prātaḥ saṃbhojya mithunaṃ naktavrataphalaṃ labhet ||
evaṃ saṃvatsaraṃ kṛtvā muktapāpā śucirbhavet ||4.29.50||
śuklapakṣe tṛtīyāyāṃ sopavāsā nirāmayā ||
vijñāya ca drutaṃ bhaktyā umāṃ śāstrārthabodhakaiḥ || 51 ||
maṃḍalaṃ ca tato likhya navanābhaṃ varapradam ||
sauvarṇaṃ kārayeddevamumayā sahitaṃ prabhum || 52 ||
tābhyāṃ netreṣu dātavyaṃ mauktikaṃ nīlameva ca ||
pravālamoṣṭhayordadyātkarṇayo ratnakuṇḍale || 53 ||
upavītaṃ tu devasya devyā hāraṃ tatho rasi ||
raktavastradharāṃ devīṃ sitavastraṃ maheśvaram || 54 ||
catuḥsamena vālabhya puṣpairdhūpairathārccayet ||
maṃḍale pūjayitvā ca homaṃ kuryāttato.aguroḥ ||55||
tato.aparājitāṃ nāma devīṃ tatraiva pujayet ||
mṛtsnāṃ saṃprāśayitvā ca rātrau kuryātprajāgaram || 56 || gītavādyotsavairhṛdyairvīṇāmaṃgalapāṭhakaiḥ ||
rātrimeva japedbhaktyā yāvadudgacchate raviḥ || 57 ||
tūlīgaṃḍakasaṃyukte paryaṃketyaṃtaśobhite ||
uddhṛtya maṇḍalāddevaṃ paryaṃkopari vinyaset || 58 || vitānadhvajamālālikiṃkiṇīdarppaṇānvitam ||
puṣpamaṇḍapikācchannaṃ dhūpagugguluvāsitam || 59 ||
tasyāgre bhojayedbhaktyā svaśaktyā mithunāni ca ||
prīṇayedbhakṣyabhojyaiśca pakvānnairmadhuraiḥ śubhaiḥ || 4.29.60 ||
tato dattvā.akṣatānhaste tāṃbūlaṃ vinivedayet ||
prīyatāṃ me umākāṃtaḥ pārvatyā sahitaḥ śivaḥ || 61 ||
ucchiṣṭaṃ śodhayitvā tu punaḥ prokṣya samantataḥ ||
raktavarṇāṃ suśīlāṃ ca surūpāṃ supayasvinīm || 62 ||
śṛṃgābhyāṃ dattakanakāṃ rājatakhurasaṃyutām ||
kāṃsyadohanakopetāṃ raktavastrāvaguṃṭhitām || 63 ||
ghaṇṭābharaṇaśobhāḍhyāṃ devadevyagrasaṃsthitām ||
pādukopānahacchatrabhojyabhājanasaṃyutām ||
tridhā pradakṣiṇīkṛtya guroḥ sarvaṃ nivedayet || 64 ||
umāmaheśvaraṃ devamaviyogaṃ surārcitam ||
avyavacchedabhūtaṃ ca suprītaṃ tadihāstu me || 65 ||
praṇamya śirasā bhūmau kṣamasveti guruṃ vadet ||
evaṃ samāpyate devyāṃ ānaṃtaryavratodyamam ||
yaḥ prakuryātpumānstrī vā tasya puṇyaphalaṃ śṛṇu || 66 ||
gandharvayakṣalokāṃśca vidyādharamahoragān ||
ṛṣisiddhāmaraṃ brāhmaṃ viṣṇulokaṃ sanātanam ||67||
bhuktvā bhogānaśeṣāṃśca ekaviṃśatkulānvitaḥ ||
ratnayāne samārūḍho guhyāpsarasasaṃvṛtaḥ || 68 |||
devavidyādharairyakṣairvṛto yāti śivālayam||
tatra bhuktvā mahābhogānsa bhuṃkte śivavadbahūn || 69 ||
bhuktvā bhogānyadā bhūtaḥ kadācittapasaḥ kṣayāta ||
pṛthivyāṃ tu samāgamya bhavetsakalabhūmipaḥ || 4.29.70 ||
strī vā samācaredyā tu mahādevī tu jāyate ||
ānaṃtaryavyavacchinnānbhogāndevī umā yathā ||
trailokyapatirudreṇasā bhuṃkte sahitā tathā||71||
manurddevyā yathāmahyā śacyā śakro yathāsukham ||
nairaṃtaryaṃ yathā saukhyaṃ sā bhuṃkte patinā saha || 72 ||
muneraruṃdhatī yadvadviṣṇorlakṣmīrhṛdi sthitā ||
tathā tayormahatsaukhyaṃ nairaṃtaryaṃ hi jāyate || 13 ||
sāvitrī brahmaṇo yadvadgaṃgā toyanidheryathā ||
avyavacchinnayoḥ prītistathā janmanijanmani || 74 ||
atha janmanyahonyasminvratametatkṛtaṃ bhavet ||
tenaiva patinā sārddhaṃ na viyogamupaiti sā ||
yojanāyutasāhasre surūpā maṇḍale bhavet ||
arghāḍhyā subhagā sādhvī putrapautrairalaṃkṛtā || 75 ||
ettate nikhilaṃ proktamānaṃtaryavrataṃ mayā ||
bhaktāya suvinītāya kathitavyaṃ na cānyathā || 76 ||
eṣā viśeṣavihitābhihitā tṛtīyā yānaṃtarītya vidhavābhirudīritoccaiḥ ||
etāmupoṣya vidhivatpratipakṣayogānnaivāṃtaraṃ sutasuhṛtsvajanairupaiti || 77 ||
iti śrībhaviṣye mahāpurāṇa uttaraparvaṇi śrīkṛṣṇayudhiṣṭhira saṃvāde anaṃtaratṛtīyāvratavarṇanaṃ nāmaikonatriṃśattamo.adhyāyaḥ || 29 || || cha ||
akṣayatṛtīyāvratavarṇanam
|| śrīkṛṣṇa uvāca || ||
bahunātra kimuktena kiṃ bahvakṣaramālayā ||
vaiśākhasya sitāmekāṃ tṛtīyāṃ śṛṇu pāṇḍava || 1 ||
snānaṃ dānaṃ japo homaḥ svādhyāyaḥ pitṛtarpaṇam ||
yadasyāṃ kriyate kiñcitsarvaṃ syāttadihākṣa yam || 2 ||
ādau kṛtayugasyeyaṃ yugādistena kathyate ||
sarvapāpapraśamanī sarvasaukhyapradāyinī || 3 ||
śākale nagare kaściddharmanāmābhavadvaṇik ||
priyaṃvadaḥ satyarato devabrāhmaṇapūjakaḥ || 4 ||
tena śrutaṃ vācyamānaṃ tṛtīyā rohiṇī purā ||
yadā syādbudhasaṃyuktā tadā sāca mahāphalā || 5 ||
tasyāṃ yaddīyate kiṃñcittatsarvaṃ cākṣayaṃ bhavet ||
iti śrutvā sa gaṃgāyāṃ santarpya pitṛdevatāḥ || 6 ||
gṛhamāgatya karakānsānnānudakasaṃyutān ||
aṃbupūrṇāngṛhe kuṃbhānkramānniḥśeṣatastadā || 7 ||
yavagodhūmacaṇakasaktudadhyaudanaṃ tathā ||
ikṣukṣīravikārāṃśca sahiraṇyāṃśca śaktitaḥ || 8 ||
śuciḥ śuddhena manasā brāhmaṇebhyo dadau vaṇik ||
bhāryayā vāryamāṇopi kuṭuṃbāsaktaciṃtayā || 9 ||
tāvatsa ca sthitaḥ sattve matvā sarvaṃ vinaśvaram ||
dharmārthakāma śaktastu kālena bahunā tataḥ || 4.30.10 ||
jagāma pañcatvamasau vāsudevaṃ smaranmuhuḥ ||
tataḥ sa kṣatriyo jātaḥ kuśāvatyāṃ nareśvaraḥ || 11 ||
babhūva cā kṣayā tasya samṛddhirdharmanirjitā ||
iyāja sa mahāyajñaiḥ samāptavaradakṣiṇaiḥ || 12 ||
dadau gobhūhiraṇyādi dānānyasyāmaharniśam ||
bubhuje kāmato bhogāndīnārtāṃstarpayañjanān || 13 ||
tathāpyakṣayamevāsya kṣayaṃ yāti na taddhanam ||
śraddhāpūrvaṃ tṛtīyāyāṃ yaddattaṃ vibhavaṃ vinā || 14 ||
etadvrataṃ mayākhyātaṃ śrūyatāmatra yo vidhiḥ ||
udakuṃbhānsakarakātsnānasarvarasairyutān || 15 ||
graiṣmikaṃ sarvamevātra sasyadānaṃ praśasyate ||
chatropānatpradānaṃ ca gobhūkāṃcanavāsasām || 16 ||
yadyadiṣṭatamaṃ cānyattaddeyamaviśaṃkayā ||
etatte sarvamākhyātaṃ kimanyacchrotumicchasi || 17 ||
anākhyeyaṃ na me kiñcidasti svastyastu te.anagha || 18 ||
asyāṃ tithau kṣayamupaiti hutaṃ na dattaṃ tenākṣayā ca munibhiḥ kathitā tṛtīyā ||
