uddiśya yatsurapitṛrnkriyate manuṣyaistaccākṣayaṃ bhavati bhārata sarvameva || 19 ||
iti śrībhaviṣye mahāpurāṇa uttaraparvaṇi śrīkṛṣṇayudhiṣṭhirasaṃvāde.akṣayyatṛtī yāvratavarṇanaṃ nāma triṃśattamo.adhyāyaḥ || 30 || || cha ||
aṅgārakacaturthīvratavarṇanam
|| yudhiṣṭhira uvāca || ||
rūpasaubhāgyasukhadaṃ naranārījanapriyam ||
pāpāpahaṃ bahuphalaṃ sukaraṃ sūpavāsakam ||1||
ṛddhibuddhikaraṃ svargyaṃ yaśasyaṃ sarvakāmadam ||
tanme vada vrataṃ kiñcidyadi tuṣṭo.asi mādhava ||2||
|| śrīkṛṣṇa uvāca ||
śṛṇu pārtha paraṃ guhyaṃ yanmayā kathitaṃ na ca ||
purā tava vanasthasya tadadya pravadāmyaham ||3||
śivayoratisaṃharṣādraktabiṃduścyutaḥ kṣitau ||
medinyā sa prayatnena vidhṛto dhṛtiyuktayā || 4 ||
tasmājjātaḥ kumāro.asau rakto raktasamudbhavaḥ ||
aṃgaṃ prasiddhamevehāṃgārako vega ucyate || 5 ||
śivāṃgādrabhasā jāta stenāṃgāraka ucyate ||
agasthoṃ.agārakāṃtiśca aṃgapratyaṅgasaṃbhavaḥ || 6 || saubhāgyārogyakṛdyasmāttasmādaṃgārakaḥ smṛtaḥ ||
bhaktyā caturthyāṃ naktena yastu śraddhāsamanvitaḥ || 7 ||
taṃ pūjayati yatnena nārī vā.ananyamānasā ||
tasya tuṣṭaḥ prayacchetsa yattvayā samudāhṛtam ||
rūpaṃ saubhāgyasaṃpannaṃ naranārīmanoharam || 8 ||
yudhiṣṭhira uvāca ||
etanme vada deveśa aṃgārakavidhiṃ śubham ||
sahomamaṃtrasaṃsthānaṃ sādhivāsavidhānataḥ || 9 ||
śrīkṛṣṇa uvāca ||
pūrvaṃ tu kṛtasaṃkalpaḥ snānaṃ kṛtvā bahirjale ||
snānārthaṃ mṛttikāṃ maṃtrairgṛhṇīyādaṃbhasi sthitaḥ ||4.31.1 0||
tvaṃ mṛde vaṃditā pūrvaṃ kṛṣṇenoddharatā kila||
tena me daha pāpaughaṃ yanmayā pūrvasaṃcitam || 1 1||
imaṃ maṃtraṃ paṭhanpārtha ādityāya pradarśayet ||
ādityaraśmisaṃtaptāṃ gaṃgājalakaṇokṣitām ||12||
tāṃ mṛdaṃ śirasi prārthya pūrvaṃ dattvāṃgasaṃdhiṣu ||
tataḥ snānaṃ prakurvīta maṃtreṇāntarjale punaḥ || 13 ||
tvamāpo yoniḥ sarveṣāṃ daityadānavarakṣasām ||
svedajodbhijjayonīnāṃ rasānāṃ pataye namaḥ ||14||
snāto.ahaṃ sarvatīrtheṣu sarvaprasravaṇeṣu ca ||
nadīṣu devakhāteṣu snānaṃ teṣu ca me bhavet||15||
dhyāyandhvanimimaṃ maṃtraṃ tataḥ snānaṃ samācaret ||
tataḥ snātvā śucirbhūtvā gṛhamāgatya na spṛśet ||
na jalpecca na vīkṣeta kvacitpāpiṣṭhameva hi || 16 ||
dūrvāśvatthau śamīṃ spṛṣṭvā māṃ ca maṃtreṇa maṃtravit ||
dūrvāmapyasya maṃtreṇa yutena samupasthitām ||17||
tvaṃ dūrve.amṛtajanmāsi sarvadevaiśca vaṃditā ||
vaṃditā daha tatsarvaṃ yanmayā duṣkṛtaṃ kṛtam ||18|| ( iti dūrvāmaṃtraḥ ||)
pavitrāṇāṃ pavitraṃ tvaṃ kāśyapī paṭhyase śrutau||
śamī śamaya tatpāpaṃ yanmayā duranuṣṭhi tam || 19 || ( iti śamīmaṃtraḥ)
aśvatthamaṃgaṃ labhate maṃtrametaṃ nibodha me ||
akṣispaṃdaṃ bhujaspaṃdaṃ duḥsvapnaṃ durviciṃtitam ||
śatrūṇāṃ ca samutthānamaśvattha śamayasva me || 4.31.20 || ( ityaśvatthamaṃtraḥ)
gāṃ dadyāttu tato devīṃ savatsāṃ sapradakṣiṇām ||
samālabhya tu maṃtreṇa maṃtrametamudīrayet || 21 ||
sarvadevamaye devi daivataistvaṃ supūjitā ||
tasmātspṛśāmi vaṃdāmi vaṃditā pāpahā bhava ||22|| ( iti gomaṃtraḥ)
evaṃ maṃtraṃ paṭhanpārtha bhaktibhāvena bhāvitaḥ ||
pradakṣiṇāṃ yaḥ kurute gāṃ dṛṣṭvā varavarṇinīm || 23 ||
pradakṣiṇīkṛtā tena pṛthivī nātra saṃśayaḥ ||
evaṃ maunena cāgatya vaṃdyānvaṃdya gṛhaṃ vrajet || 24 ||
prakṣālya ca mṛdā pādau āhitā.agnigṛhaṃ viśet ||
homaṃ tatra prakurvīta ebhirmaṃtraiḥ padairvaraiḥ || 25 ||
śarvāya śarvaputrāya pārvatyā goḥ sutāya ca ||
kujāya lohitāṃgāya graheśāṃgārakāya ca ||
bhūyobhūyoyamāhutyā hutvāhutvā juhoti vai || 26 ||
oṃkārapūrvakairmaṃtraiḥ svāhākārāṃtayojitaiḥ ||
aṣṭottara śataṃ pārtha arddhamardhārdhameva ca ||27||
ebhimaṃtrapadairbhaktyā śaktyā vā kāmameva vā ||
samidbhiḥ khādirībhiśca ghṛtadugdhaistilairyavaiḥ ||28||
bhakṣyairnānāvidhairanyaiḥ śaktyā vā maṃtravidvaśī ||
hutvāhutīstataḥ pārtha devaṃ saṃsthāpayetkṣitau || 29 ||
snapanaṃ kecidicchaṃti saguḍe tāmrabhājane ||
sauvarṇaṃ raktavarṇaṃ ca śaktyā dārumayaṃ tathā || 4.31.30 ||
kṛṣṇāgarumayaṃ caiva śrīkhaṇḍaghaṭitaṃ punaḥ ||
sauvarṇapātre raupye vā arcyaṃ kuṃkumakesaraiḥ || 31 ||
anyairālohitaiḥ pārtha puṣpairvastraiḥ phalaiḥ śubhaiḥ ||
rājanratnaiśca vividhairarthavānbhaktito.arcayet || 32 ||
yāvaddhi śakyate cittaṃ vittavānbhaktibhāvitaḥ ||
tāvaddhi vardhate puṇyaṃ dātuḥ śatasahasrikam || 33 ||
kiñcittāmramaye pātre vaṃśaje mṛnmayepi vā ||
pūjayaṃti narā raktaiḥ puṣpaiḥ kuṃkumakeśaraiḥ || 34 ||
oṃkujāya namaḥ vadane ||
oṃ bhaumāya namaḥ skaṃdhayoḥ ||
oṃ maṃgalāya namaḥ bāhvoḥ ||
oṃ raktāya namaḥ urasi ||
oṃ lohitāṃgāya namaḥ kaṭyām ||
oṃ ārāya namaḥ jaṃghayoḥ ||
oṃ mahīdharāya namaḥ pādayoḥ ||
eṣāṣṭapuṣpikā ||
puruṣākṛtiṃ kṛtaḥ pātre kujaṃ maṃtraiḥ samarcayet ||
guggulaṃ ghṛtasaṃyuktaṃ kṛṣṇāgarusamanvitam ||
dhūpaṃ sadravyajaṃ vāpi dadyāttatra samādhinā || 35 ||
homaṃ kurvīta pūrvoktairmaṃtrairmaṃgalasaṃ jñitaiḥ ||
evaṃ praṇamya deveśaṃ brāhmaṇāya nivedayet ||36||
niṣpāvakaṃ bhojanaṃ vā dadyācchaktyā sadakṣiṇam ||
vittaśāṭhyaṃ hi kurvāṇo na mukhyaphalabhāgbhavet || 37 ||
paścādbhuñjīta maunena bhūmiṃ kṛtvā tu bhājanam ||
mantreṇānena cālabhya tannibodha mayoditam || 38 ||
sarvauṣadhirasāvāse sarvadā sarva dāyini ||
tvattale bhoktukāmo.ahaṃ tadbhuktamamṛtaṃ bhavet || 39 ||
yudhiṣṭhira uvāca ||
aṃgārakeṇa saṃyuktā caturthī naktabhojanaiḥ ||
upoṣyā katimātrā sā kimekā vada yādava || 4.31.40 || ||
śrīkṛṣṇa uvāca ||
caturthī ca caturthī ca yadāṃgārakasaṃyutā ||
upoṣyā tatratatraiva pradeyo vidhinā kujaḥ ||
vittahīnāḥ pratīkṣaṃte yāvadvittopalaṃbhanam ||41||
caturthyāṃ ca caturthyāṃ ca vidhānaṃ śṛṇu pāṇḍava ||
sauvarṇapātre kṛtvā tu aṃgārakamakṛtrimam ||
daśa sauvarṇikaṃ mukhyaṃ daśārddhārddhamathāpi vā ||42||
viṃśatpalāni pātrāṇi viṃśatyarddhapalāni ca ||
viṃśatkarṣāṇi vā pārtha ato nyūnaṃ na kārayet ||43||
pratiṣṭhāpya kujaṃ maṃtrairvastraiḥ saṃpariveṣṭitam ||
puṣpamaṃḍapikāṃ kṛtvā divyāṃ saddhūpadhūpitām ||44||
tatra saṃpūjayeddevaṃ pūrvamaṃtrairvidhānataḥ ||
bhaktyā bhojyairanekaiśca phalairatnaiśca sāgaraiḥ || 45 ||
vastraiḥ prāvaraṇairyānaiḥ śayyopānadvarāsanaiḥ ||
chatraiḥ puṣpairgandhavaraiḥ śaktyā vittānusārataḥ || 46 ||
tato vipra parīkṣeta vrataśaucasamanvitam ||
vedādhyayanasaṃpannaṃ śāstrajñaṃ nirahaṃkṛtim|| 47 ||
aṃgārakavidhiṃ yaśca samyagjānāti śāstrataḥ||
āhvānavidhi maṃtrāṃśca homārcanavisarjanam || 48 ||
saṃpūjya vastrābharaṇaistasmai deyaḥ kujottamaḥ ||
yathā śruto yathā jñātastathā bhaktyā hyupoṣitaḥ || 49 ||
vittasāreṇa tuṣya tvaṃ mama bhauma bhavodbhava ||
paṭhannimaṃ maṃtravaraṃ brāhmaṇāya nivedayet ||
brāhmaṇaścāpyasau vidvānmaṃtrametamudāharet || 4.31.50 ||
maṃgalaṃ prati gṛhṇāmi ubhayorastu maṃgalam ||
dātṛpratigrāhakayoḥ kṣemārogyaṃ bhavatviti || 51 || pratigrāhakamaṃtraḥ ||
evaṃ caturthe saṃprāpte dhanaprāptirna vidyate ||
tadā maṃtrārcanaparaḥ punaretāṃ samācaret || 52 ||
āśarīranipātādvā yathoktaphalabhāgbhavet ||
alpavitto yathā śaktyā sarvametatsamācaret || || 53 ||
aṃgārakeṇa saṃyuktāṃ vāsrāṃ(vastrāṃ) tilaśarāvikām ||
anena vidhinā dattvā yathoktaphalabhāgbhavet || 54 ||
evaṃ caturthīṃ yo bhaktyā kujayuktā mupoṣayet||
tasya puṇyaphalaṃ yacca tannibodha yudhiṣṭhira || 55 ||
iha sthitvā ciraṃ kālaṃ putrapautraśriyā vṛtaḥ ||
dehāvasāne divyaujā divyagandhānu lepanaḥ || 56 ||
divyanārīgaṇavṛto vimānavaramāsthitaḥ ||
yāti devapuraṃ hṛṣṭo devaiḥ sahābhinaṃditaḥ || 57 ||
sa tatra ramate kālaṃ devaiḥ saha sureśavat||
caturyugāni ṣaṭtriṃśattataḥ kālāṃtare punaḥ || 58 ||
iha cāgatya rājāsau kule mahati jāyate ||
rūpavāndhanavānvāgmī dānaśīlo dayāparaḥ|| || 59 ||
nārī ca rūpasaṃpannā subhagā jātisaṃyutā ||
puà¥trapautraiḥ parivṛtā bhartrā saha ramecciram ||4.31.60||
ramitvā suciraṃ kālaṃ punaḥ svargagatiṃ labhet ||
eṣa te kathito rājansarahasyo vidhistathā ||
durllabho yo manuṣyāṇāṃ devānāṃ bhadramastu te || 61 ||
aṃgārakeṇa sahitā tu sitā caturthī śastā surārccanavidhau pitṛpiṇḍadāne ||
tasyāṃ kujaṃ kurukulodvaha ye.arcayaṃti bhūmau bhavaṃti bahumaṃgalabhājanāste || 62 || || iti śrībhaviṣye mahāpurāṇa uttara parvaṇi śrīkṛṣṇayudhiṣṭhirasaṃvāde caturthīvrate aṃgārakacaturthīvratavarṇanaṃ nāmaikatriṃśattamo.adhyāyaḥ || 31 || cha ||
vināyakasnapanacaturthīvratavarṇanam
|| yudhiṣṭhira uvāca || ||
yanna siddhyanti karmāṇi prārabdhāni narottamaiḥ ||
tatkena kāraṇenaitatpṛṣṭo me brūhi mādhava || 1 ||
|| śrīkṛṣṇa uvāca || ||
vināyakorthasiddhyarthaṃ lokasya viniyojitaḥ ||
gaṇānāmādhipatye ca rudreṇa brahmaṇā tathā || 2 ||
tenopasṛṣṭo yastasya lakṣaṇāni nibodhata ||
svapne.avagāhate.atyarthaṃ jalaṃ muṇḍāṃśca paśyati || 3 ||
kāṣāyavāsasaścaiva kravyādāṃścādhirohati ||
aṃtyajairgardabhairuṣṭraiḥ sahaikatrāvatiṣṭhate || 4 ||
vrajamānastathātmānaṃ manyate tu gataṃ paraiḥ ||
vimanā viphalāraṃbhaḥ sasīdatyanimittataḥ || 5 ||
pātakī vihīnacchāyo mlānatvahetulakṣaṇaḥ ||
karabhārūḍhamātmānaṃ mahiṣakharagaṃ tathā ||6||
yātudhānāśritaṃ yānaṃ śmaśānasyāṃtikaṃ nṛpa ||
vīkṣeta kuruśārdūla svapnāṃte nātra saṃśayaḥ ||
tailārdramātraṃ svaṃ dehaṃ karavīravibhūṣitam||7||
tenopasṛṣṭo labhate na rājyaṃ rājanaṃdanaḥ ||
kumārī na ca bhartāramapatyaṃ garbhamaṃganā || 8 ||
ācāryatvaṃ śrotriyaśca na śiṣyo.adhyayanaṃ tathā||
vaṇiglābhaṃ na cāpnoti kṛṣiṃ caiva kṛṣīvalaḥ || 9 ||
snapanaṃ tasya kartavyaṃ puṇye.ahni vidhipūrvakam ||
gaurasarṣapakalkena vastreṇācchāditasya tu || 4.32.10 ||
sarvauṣadhaiḥ sarvagandhairviliptaśirasastathā ||
śuklapakṣe caturthyāṃ tu vāre vā dhiṣaṇasya tu || 11 ||
puṣye ca vīranakṣatre tasyaiva purato nṛpa ||
bhadrāsanopaviṣṭasya svastirvācyā dvijaiḥ śubhaiḥ || 12 ||
catvāra ṛgyajuḥ sāmātharvaṇapravaṇāstataḥ ||
vyomakeśaṃ tu saṃpūjya pārvatīṃ bhūmijaṃ tathā || || 13 ||
kṛṣṇasya pitaraṃ cātha avatāraṃ sitaṃ tathā ||
dhiṣaṇaṃ kledaputraṃ ca koṇaṃ lakṣmīṃ ca bhārata ||
vidhuṃtudaṃ bāhuleyaṃ naṃdakasya ca dhāriṇam || || 14|| aśvasthānādgajasthānādvalmīkātsaṃgamādhradāt ||
mṛttikāṃ rocanāṃ ratnaṃ gugguluṃ cāpsu nikṣipet || 15 ||
yadāhṛtaṃ hyekavarṇaiścaturbhiḥ kalaśairhradāt ||
carmaṇyānaḍuhe rakte sthāpya bhadrāsanaṃ tathā || 16 ||
sahasrākṣaṃ śatadhāramṛṣibhiḥ pāvanaṃ kṛtam ||
tena tvāmabhiṣiṃcāmi pāva mānyaḥ punaṃtu me || 17 ||
oṃ bhagaṃ te varuṇo rājā bhagaṃ sūryo bṛhaspatiḥ ||
bhagamindraśca vāyuśca bhagaṃ saptarṣayo daduḥ || 18 ||
yatte keśeṣu daurbhāgyaṃ sīmaṃte yacca mūrddhani ||
lalāṭe karṇayorakṣṇorāpastadghnaṃtu sarvadā || 19 ||
snātasya sārṣapaṃ tailaṃ sruveṇauduṃbareṇa tu ||
juhuyānmūrdhni śakalānsavyena pratigṛhya ca || 4.32.20 ||
mitaśca sammitaścaiva tathā śālakaṭaṃkaṭo ||
kūṣmāṇḍo rājaputraścetyaṃte svāhāsamanvitaiḥ || 21 ||
nāmabhirbalimantraiśca namaskārasamanvitaiḥ ||
dadyāccatuṣpathe śūrpe kuśānāstīrya sarvataḥ || 22 ||
kṛtākṛtāṃstaṃḍulāṃśca pala laudanameva ca ||
matsyānhyapakvāṃśca tathā māṃsametāvadeva tu || 23 ||
puṣpānvitaṃ sugandhaṃ ca surāṃ ca trividhāmapi ||
mūlakaṃ pūrikā pūpāṃstathaivoṃḍerakasrajaḥ || 24 ||
dadhyannaṃ pāyasaṃ caiva guḍaveṣṭitamodakam ||
vināyakasya jananīmupatiṣṭhettatoṃbikām ||
dūrvāsarṣapa puṣpāṇāṃ dattvārghyaṃ pūrṇamañjalim || 25 ||
rūpaṃdehi jayaṃ dehi bhagaṃ bhavati dehi me ||
putrāndehi dhanaṃ dehi sarvānkāmāṃśca dehi me || || 26 ||
prabalaṃ kuru me devi balavikhyātisambhavam ||
śuklamālyāṃbaradharaḥ śuklagandhānulepanaḥ ||
bhojayedbrāhmaṇāndadyādvastrayugmaṃ gurorapi || 27 ||
evaṃ vināyakaṃ pūjya grahāṃścaiva vidhānataḥ ||
karmaṇāṃ phalamāpnoti śriyaṃ prāpnotyanuttamām || 28 ||
ādityasya sadā pūjāṃ tilakaṃ svāminastathā ||
mahāgaṇapateścaiva kurvansiddhimavāpnuyāt || 29 ||
vaināyakaṃ vinayasattvavatāṃ narāṇāṃ snānaṃ praśastamiha vighnavināśakāri ||
kurvaṃti ye vidhivadatra bhavaṃti teṣāṃ kāryāṇyabhīṣṭaphaladāni na saṃśayo.atra || 4.32.30 ||
iti śrībhaviṣye mahāpurāṇa uttaraparvaṇi śrīkṛṣṇayudhiṣṭhirasaṃvāde vināyakasnapanacaturthīvrataṃ nāma dvātriṃśattamo.adhyāyaḥ || 32 || |||9|||
vināyakacaturthīvratavarṇanam
|| śrīkṛṣṇa uvāca || ||
athāvighnakaraṃ rājankathayāmi vrataṃ tava ||
yena samyakṛteneha na vighnamupajāyate || 1 ||
caturthyāṃ phālgune māsi gṛhītavyaṃ vrataṃ tvidam ||
naktāhāreṇa rājendra tilānnaṃ pāraṇaṃ smṛtam || 2 ||
tadeva vahnau hotavyaṃ brāhmaṇāya ca tadbhavet || 3 ||
śūrāya vīrāya gajānanāya laṃbodarāyaikaradāya caiva ||
evaṃ tu saṃpūjya punaśca homaṃ kuryādvratī vighnavināśahetoḥ || 4 ||
cāturmāsyāṃ vrataṃ caiva kṛtvetthaṃ pañcame tathā ||
sauvarṇaṃ gajavaktraṃ tu kṛtvā viprāya dāpayet || 5 ||
tāmrapātraiḥ pāyasabhṛtaiścaturbhiḥ sahitaṃ nṛpa ||
pañcamena tilaiḥ sārddhaṃ gaṇeśādhiṣṭhitena ca || 6 ||
mṛnmayānyapi pātrāṇi vittahīnastu kārayet ||
heraṃbaṃ rājataṃ tadvadvidhinānena dāpayet ||
itthaṃ vratamidaṃ kṛtvā sarvavipraiḥ pramucyate || 7 ||
hayamedhasya vighne tu saṃjāte sagaraḥ purā ||
etadeva vrataṃ cīrtvā punaraśvaṃ pralabdhavān || 8 ||
tathā rudreṇa devena tripuraṃ nighnatā purā ||
etadeva kṛtaṃ yasmāttripurastena ghātitaḥ || 9 ||
mayā samudraṃ viśatāṃ etadeva vrataṃ kṛtam ||
tenādridrumasaṃyuktā pṛthivī punaruddhṛtā || 4.33.10 ||
anyairapi mahīpālairetadeva kṛtaṃ purā ||
tapo.arthibhiryajña siddhyai nirvighnaṃ syātparaṃtapa || 11 ||
anena kṛtamātreṇa sarvavipraiḥ pramucyate ||
mṛto rudrapuraṃ yāti varāhavacanaṃ yathā || 12 ||
vighnāni tasya na bhavaṃti gṛhe kadāciddharmārthakāmasukhasiddhivighātakāni ||
yaḥ saptamīnduśakalākṛtikāṃ tadaṃtaṃ vighneśamarcayati naktakṛtī caturthyām || 13 || iti śrībhaviṣye mahāpurāṇa uttaraparvaṇi śrīkṛṣṇayudhiṣṭhirasaṃvāde vināyakacaturthīvrataṃ nāma trayastriṃśatamo.adhyāyaḥ || 33 ||
iti caturthīkalpaḥ samāptaḥ || |||9|||
śāntivratavarṇanam
|| śrīkṛṣṇa uvāca || ||
śāṃtivrataṃ pravakṣyāmi śṛṇuṣvekamanādhunā ||
yena cīrṇena śāṃtiḥ syātsarvadā gṛhamedhinām || 1 ||
pañcamyāṃ śuklapakṣasya kārtike māsi pārthiva ||
ārabhya varṣamekaṃ tu hyaśnīyādamlavarjitam || 2 ||
naktaṃ devaṃ ca saṃpūjya hariṃ śeṣoparisthitam ||
anaṃtāyeti pādau tu dhṛtarāṣṭrāya vai kaṭim || 3 ||
udaraṃ takṣakāyeti uraḥ karkoṭakāya ca ||
padmāya karṇau saṃpūjya mahāpadmāya doryugam || 4 ||
śaṃkhapālāya vakṣastu kulikāyeti vai śiraḥ ||
evaṃ viṣṇuṃ sarvagataṃ pṛthageva prapūjayet || 5 ||
kṣīreṇa snapanaṃ kuryāddharimuddiśya vāgyataḥ ||
tadagre homayetkṣīraṃ tilaiḥ saha vicakṣaṇaḥ || 6 ||
evaṃ saṃvatsarasyāṃte kuryādbrāhmaṇabhojanam ||
acyutaṃ kāṃcanaṃ kṛtvā suvarṇaṃ tu vicakṣaṇaḥ || 7 ||
gāṃ savatsāṃ vastrayugaṃ kāṃsyapātraṃ sapāyasam ||
hiraṇyaṃ ca yathāśakti brāhmaṇāyopapādayet || 8 ||
evaṃ yaḥ kurute bhaktyā vratametannarādhipa ||
tasya śāṃtirbhavennityaṃ nāgānāmabhayaṃ tathā || 9 ||
śeṣāhibhogaśayanasthamayogasūtiṃ saṃpūjya yajñapuruṣaṃ patageṃdranātham||
ye pūjayaṃti madhuraiḥ sitapañcamīṣu teṣāṃ na nāgajanitaṃ bhayamabhyupaiti || 4.34.10 ||
iti śrībhaviṣye mahāpurāṇe uttaraparvaṇi śrīkṛṣṇayudhiṣṭhirasaṃvāde śāṃtivrataṃ nāma catustriṃśattamo.a dhyāyaḥ ||34|| |||9|||
sārasvatavratavarṇanam
|| yudhiṣṭhira uvāca || ||
madhurā bhāratī kena vratena madhusūdana ||
tathaiva janasaubhāgyamatividyāsu kauśalam ||1||
abhedaścāpi daṃpatyostathā baṃdhujanena ca ||
āyuśca vipulaṃ puṃsāṃ jāyate kena keśava || 2 ||
|| śrīkṛṣṇa uvāca || ||
samyakpṛṣṭastvayā rājañchṛṇu sārasvataṃ vratam ||
yasya saṃkīrtanādeva tuṣyatīha sarasvatī || 3 ||
yo.ayaṃ bhaktaḥ pumānkuryādetadvratamanuttamam ||
tadvatsarādau saṃpūjya vipreṇa taṃ samācaret || 4 ||
atha cādityavāreṇa grahatārābalena ca ||
pāyasaṃ bhojayitvā ca kuryādbrāhmaṇavācanam || 5 ||
śuklavastrāṇi dadyācca sahiraṇyāni śaktitaḥ ||
gāyatrīṃ pūjayedbhaktyā śuklamālyānulepanaiḥ ||
ebhirmaṃtrapadaiḥ paścātpūrvaṃ kṛtvā kṛtāñjaliḥ || 6 ||
yathā tu devi bhagavānbrahmā lokapitā mahaḥ||
tvāṃ parityajya no tiṣṭhettathā bhava varapradā || 7 ||
vedaśāstrāṇi sarvāṇi nṛtyagītādikaṃ ca yat ||
vāhitaṃ yattvayā devi tathā me saṃtu siddhayaḥ || 8 ||
lakṣmīrmedhā varāriṣṭirgorī tuṣṭiḥ prabhā matiḥ ||
etābhiḥ pāhi tanubhiraṣṭābhirmāṃ sarasvati || 9 ||
evaṃ saṃpūjya gāyatrīṃ vīṇākṣamaṇidhāriṇīm ||
śuklapakṣe.akṣatairbhaktyā sakamaṃḍalupustakām || 4.35.10 ||
maunavratena bhuñjīta sāyaṃ prātaśca dharmavit ||
pañcamyāṃ pratipakṣe ca pūjayitvā suvāsinīḥ || 11 ||
tilaiśca taṃḍulaprasthaṃ ghṛtapātreṇa saṃyutam ||
kṣīraṃ tathā hiraṇyaṃ ca gāyatrī prīyatāmiti || 12 ||
saṃdhyāyāṃ ca tato maunaṃ tadvrata tu samācaret ||
nāṃtarā bhojanaṃ kuryādyāvanmāsāstrayodaśa || 13 ||
samāpte tu vrate dadyādbhojanaṃ śuklataṃḍulaiḥ ||
pūrṇaṃ suvastrayugmaṃ ca gāṃ ca viprāya bhojanam || 14 ||
devyai vitānaṃ ghaṃṭāṃ ca sitanetraṃ paṭānvitam ||
candanaṃ vastrayugmaṃ ca dadhyannaṃ śikharairyutam || 15 ||
tathopadeṣṭāramapi bhaktyā saṃpūjayedgurum ||
vittaśāṭhyena rahito vastramālyānulepanaiḥ || 16 ||
anena vidhinā yastu kuryātsārasvataṃ vratam ||
vidyāvānarthayuktaśca raktakaṃṭhaśca jāyate || 17 ||
sarasvatyāḥ prasādena vyāsavattu kavirbhavet ||
nārī vā kurute yā tu sāpi tatphalabhāginī ||
brahmaloke vasettāvadyāvatkalpāyutatrayam || 18 ||
sārasvataṃ vrataṃ yastu śṛṇuyādapi yaḥ paṭhet ||
vidyādharapure so.api vasetkalpāyutatrayam || 19 ||
saṃvatsaraṃ vratavareṇa sarasvatīṃ ye saṃpūjayaṃti jagato jananīṃ janitrīm ||
madhurasvarāste rūpānvitā vahukalākuśalā bhavaṃti ||4.35.20||
iti śrībhaviṣye mahāpurāṇa uttaraparvaṇi śrīkṛṣṇayudhiṣṭhirasaṃvāde sārasvatavratanirūpaṇaṃ nāma paṃcatriṃśattamo.adhyāyaḥ || 35 || || cha || || ||
nāgapañcamīvratavarṇanam
|| śrīkṛṣṇa uvāca || ||
paṃcamī dayitā rājannāgānaṃdavivarddhanī ||
pañcamyāṃ kila nāgānāṃ bhavatītyutsavo mahān || 1 ||
vāsukistakṣakaścaiva kāliko māṇibhadrakaḥ||
dhṛtarāṣṭro raivataśca karkoṭakadhanaṃjayau ||
ete prayacchaṃtyabhayaṃ prāṇināṃ prāṇajīvinām || 2 ||
pañcamyāṃ snapayaṃtīha nāgānkṣī reṇa ye narāḥ ||
teṣāṃ kule prayacchaṃti abhayaṃ prāṇināṃ sadā || 3 ||
śaptā nāgā yadā mātrā dahyamānā divāniśam ||
nirvāpitā gavāṃ kṣīraistataḥ prabhṛti vallabhāḥ || 4 ||
|| yudhiṣṭhira uvāca || ||
mātrā śaptāḥ kathaṃ nāgāḥ kimuddiśya ca kāraṇam ||
kathaṃ vā tasya śāpasya vināśo.a bhūjjanārdana || 5 ||
|| śrīkṛṣṇa uvāca || ||
uccaiḥśravāśvarājaśca śvetavarṇo.amṛtodbhavaḥ ||
taṃ dṛṣṭvā cābravītkadrūrnāgānāṃ jananī svasām || || 6 ||
aśvaratnamidaṃ śvetaṃ paśyapaśyāmṛtodbhavam ||
kṛṣṇāṃśca vīkṣyase bālānsarvaśvetānutādya vai || 7 ||
|| vinatovāca || ||
sarvaśveto hayavaro nāyaṃ kṛṣṇo na lohitaḥ ||
kathaṃ tvaṃ vīkṣase kṛṣṇaṃ vinatovāca tāṃ svasām || 8 ||
|| kadrūruvāca || |
vīkṣe.ahamekanayanā kṛṣṇabāla samanvitam ||
dvinetrā ca tvaṃ vinate na paśyasi paṇaṃ kuru || 9 ||
|| vinatovāca || ||
ahaṃ dāsī bhavitrī te kṛṣṇakeśe pradarśite ||
na ceddarśayase kadru mama dāsī bhaviṣyasi || 4.36.10 ||
evaṃ te vipaṇaṃ kṛtvā gate krodhasamanvite ||
suṣupte prājyadoṣe tu kadrūrjihmamaciṃtayat || 11 ||
āhūya putrān provāca bālā bhūtvā hayottame ||
tiṣṭhadhvaṃ vipaṇau jeṣye vinatāṃ jayagṛddhinīm || 12 ||
procuste jihmabuddhiṃ tāṃ nāgāḥ kadrūṃ vigṛhya ca ||
adharma eṣa tu mahānkariṣyāmo na te vacaḥ ||
aśapadruṣitā kadrūḥ pāvako vaḥ pradhakṣyati || 13 ||
gate bahutithe kāle pāṃḍavo janamejayaḥ ||
sarpasatraṃ sa kartā vai bhūmāvanyaiḥ suduṣkaram ||14||
tasminsatre ca tigmāṃśuḥ pāvako bhakṣayiṣyati ||
evaṃ śaptvā tadā kadrūḥ pratyuvāca na kiṃcana ||15||
mātrā śaptastadā nāgaḥ kartavyaṃ nānvapadyata ||
vāsukirduḥkhasaṃtaptaḥ papāta bhuvi mūrcchitaḥ || 16 ||
vāsukiṃ duḥkhitaṃ dṛṣṭvā brahmā provāca sāṃtvayan||
mā śuco vāsuke.atyarthaṃ śṛṇu madvacanaṃ param|| 17||
yāyāvarakule jāto jaratkāruriti dvijaḥ||
bhaviṣyati mahātejāstasminkāle taponidhiḥ ||18||
bhaginīṃ ca jaratkāruṃ tasya tvaṃ pratidāsyasi ||
bhavitā tasya putro.asāvastīka iti viśrutaḥ || 19 ||
sa tatsatraṃ pravṛddhaṃ vai nāgānāṃ bhayadaṃ mahat ||
niṣedhayiṣyati munirvāgbhiḥ saṃpūjya pārthivam || 4.36.20 ||
tadiyaṃ bhaginī nāga rūpaudāryaguṇānvitā ||
jaratkārurjaratkāroḥ pradeyā hyavi cārataḥ || 21 ||
yadāsau prārthyate.araṇye yatkiñcitpravadiṣyati ||
tatkartavyamaśeṣeṇa icchecchreyastathātmanaḥ || 22 ||
pitāmahavacaḥ śrutvā vāsukiṃ praṇipatya ca ||
tathākarodyathā coktaṃ yatnaṃ paramamāsthitaḥ || 23 ||
tacchrutvā pannagāḥ sarve praharṣotphullalocanāḥ ||
punarjātamivātmānaṃ menire bhujagottamāḥ || 24 ||
aplave tu nimagnānāṃ ghore yajñāgnisāgare ||
āstīkastatra bhavitā plavabhūto.abhayapradaḥ || 25 ||
śrutvā sa cāgnirājānamṛtvijastadanaṃtaram ||
nivartayiṣyati yāgaṃ nāgānāṃ mohanaṃ param || 26 ||
pañcamyāṃ tacca bhavitā brahmā provāca lelihān ||
tasmādiyaṃ mahārāja pañcamī dayitā śubhā || 27 ||
nāgānāṃ harṣajananī dattā vai brahmaṇā purā ||
dattvā tu bhojanaṃ pūrvaṃ brāhmaṇānāṃ tu kāmataḥ || 28 ||
visṛjya nāgāḥ prīyaṃtāṃ ye kecitpṛthivītale ||
himācale ye vasanti yeṃ.atarikṣe divisthitāḥ ||
ye nadīṣu mahānāgā ye saraḥsvabhigāminaḥ ||29||
ye vāpīṣu taḍāgeṣu teṣu sarveṣu vai namaḥ ||4.36.30||
nāgānviprāṃśca saṃpūjya visṛjya ca yathārthataḥ ||
tataḥ paścācca bhuñjīyātsaha bhṛtyairnnarādhipa ||31||
pūrvaṃ madhuramaśnīyātsvecchayā tadanaṃta ram ||
evaṃ niyamayuktasya yatphalaṃ tannibodha me ||32||
mṛto nāgapuraṃ yāti pūjyamāno.apsarogaṇaiḥ ||
vimānavaramārūḍho ramate kālamīpsitam ||33||
iha cāgatya rājāsau sarvarājavaro bhavet ||
sarvaratnasamṛddhaśca vāhanāḍhyaśca jāyate || 34 ||
pañcajanmanyasau rājā dvāparedvāpare bhavet ||
ādhivyādhivinirmuktaḥ patnīputrasahāyavān ||
tasmātpūjyāśca nāgāśca ghṛtakṣīrādinā sadā || 35 ||
|| yudhiṣṭhira uvāca || ||
daśaṃti yaṃ naraṃ kṛṣṇa nāgāḥ krodhasamanvitāḥ ||
bhavetkiṃ tasya daṣṭasya vistarādbrūhi māṃ hare || 36 ||
|| śrīkṛṣṇa uvāca || ||
nāgadaṣṭo naro rājanprāpya mṛtyuṃ vrajatyadhaḥ ||
adho gatvā bhavetsarpo nirviṣo nātra saṃśayaḥ || 37 ||
|| yudhiṣṭhira uvāca || ||
nāgadaṣṭaḥ pitā yasya bhrātā mātā suhṛtsutaḥ ||
svasā vā duhitā bhāryā kiṃ kartavyaṃ vadasva me || 38 ||
mokṣāya tasya govinda dānaṃ vratamupoṣitam ||
brūhi me yaduśārdūla yena svargatimāpnuyāt|| || 39 ||
|| śrīkṛṣṇa uvāca || ||
upoṣyā pañcamī rājannāgānāṃ puṣṭivarddhinī ||
varṣamekaṃ tu rājendra vidhānaṃ śṛṇu yādṛśam || 4.36.40 ||
māse bhādrapade yā tu śuklapakṣe mahīpate ||
sā ca puṇyatamā proktā grāhyā sadgatikāmyayā || 41 ||
jñeyā dvādaśa varṣāṃte pañcamyo bharatarṣabha ||
caturthyāmekabhaktaṃ tu tasyāṃ naktaṃ prakīrtitam || 42 ||
bhūricandramayaṃ nāgamathavā kaladhautajam ||
kṛtvā dārumayaṃ cāpi utāho mṛnmayaṃ nṛpa || 43 ||
pañcamyāmarcayedbhaktyā nāgaṃ pañcaphaṇaṃ śṛṇu ||
karavīraistathā padmairjātīpuṣpaiḥ suśobhanaiḥ || 44 ||
gandhapuṣpaiḥ sanaivedyaiḥ pūjya pannagasattamam ||
brāhmaṇānbhojayetpaścād ghṛtapāyasamodakaiḥ || 45 ||
nārāyaṇabaliḥ kāryaḥ sarpadaṣṭasya dehinaḥ ||
dāne piṃḍapradāne ca brāhmaṇānāṃ ca tarpayet || 46 ||
vṛṣotsargastu kartavyo gate saṃvatsare nṛpa ||
snānaṃ kṛtvodakaṃ dadyātkṛṣṇo.atra prīyatāmiti || 47 ||
anaṃto vāsukiḥ śeṣaḥ padmaḥ kambala eva ca ||
tathā takṣaka nāgaśca nāgaścāśvataro nṛpa || 48
dhṛtarāṣṭraḥ śaṃkhapālaḥ kāliyastakṣakastathā ||
piṃgalaśca mahānāgo māsimāsi prakīrtitāḥ ||
vatsarāṃte pāraṇaṃ syānmahābrāhmaṇabhojanam || 49 ||
itihāsavide nāgaḥ kāṃcanena kṛto nṛpa ||
tathārjunī pradātavyā savatsā kāṃsyadohanā || 4.36.50 ||
eṣa pāraṇake pārtha vidhiḥ prokto vicakṣaṇaiḥ ||
kṛte vratavare tasminsadgatiṃ yāṃti bāndhavāḥ || 51 ||
ye dandaśūkaradanairdaṣṭāḥ prāptā hyadhogatim ||
varṣamekaṃ cari ṣyaṃti bhaktyā ye vratamuttamam ||
dāṃṣṭrikaṃ mokṣyate teṣāṃ śubhaṃ sthānamavāpsyati || 52 ||
yaścedaṃ śṛṇuyānnityaṃ paṭhedbhaktyā samanvitaḥ ||
na vai kuṭumbe nāgebhyo bhayaṃ bhavati kutracit || 53 ||
|| śrīkṛṣṇa uvāca || ||
tadvadbhādrapade māsi pañcamyāṃ śraddhayānvitaḥ ||
yastvālikhya naro nāgānkṛ ṣṇavarṇādivarṇakaiḥ ||
pūjayedgandhapuṣpaistu sarpirgguggulupāyasaiḥ || 54 ||
tasya tuṣṭiṃ samāyāṃti pannagāstakṣakādayaḥ ||
āsaptamātkulāttasya na bhayaṃ nāgato bhavet || 55 ||
tasmātsarvaprayatnena nāgānsaṃpūjayedbudhaḥ ||
tathā cāśvayuje māsi pañcamyāṃ kurunaṃdana || 56 ||
kṛtvā kuśamayānnāgāniṃdrāṇyā saha pūjayet ||
ghṛtodakābhyāṃ payasā snapayitvā viśāṃpate || 57 ||
godhūmaiḥ payasā svinnairbhakṣyaiśca vividhaistathā ||
yastvasyāṃ vividhānnāgāñchucirbhaktyā samanvitaḥ || 58 ||
pūjayetkuruśārdūla tasya śeṣādayo nṛpa ||
nāgāḥ prītā bhavantīha śāṃtiṃ prāpnoti śobhanām ||
sa śāṃtilokamāsādya modate śāśvatīḥ samāḥ || 59 ||
ityetatkathitaṃ vīra pañcamīvratamuttamam ||
tatrāyamucyate maṃtraḥ sarvadoṣaniṣedhakaḥ || 4.36.60 ||
bhaktena bhaktisahitāḥ śatapañcamīṣu ye pūjayaṃti bhujagānkusumopahāraiḥ||
teṣāṃ gṛheṣvabhayadā hi sadaiva sarpāḥ śaśvatpramodaparamā rucayo bhavaṃti || 61 ||
iti śrībhaviṣye mahāpurāṇa uttaraparvaṇi śrīkṛṣṇayudhiṣṭhirasaṃvāde nāgapaṃcamīvratavarṇanaṃ nāma ṣaṭtriṃśattamo.adhyāyaḥ || 36 || |||9|||
śrīpañcamīvratavarṇanam
|| yudhiṣṭhira uvāca || ||
kathamāsādyate lakṣmīrdurllabhā bhuvanatraye ||
dānena tapasā vāpi vratena niyamena vā || 1 ||
japahomanamaskāraiḥ saṃskārairvā pṛthagvidhaiḥ ||
etadvada yaduśreṣṭha sarvavittvaṃ mato mama || 2 ||
|| śrīkṛṣṇa uvāca || ||
bhṛgoḥ khyātyāṃ samutpannā pūrvaṃ śrīḥ śrūyate śubhā ||
vāsudevāya sā dattā muninā mānavṛddhaye || 3 ||
vāsudevo.api tāṃ prāpya pīnonnatapayodharām ||
padmapatraviśālākṣīṃ pūrṇacandranibhāna nām || 4 ||
bhābhāsitadigābhogāṃ sākṣādbhānoḥ prabhāmiva ||
nitaṃbāḍaṃbaravatīṃ mattamātaṃgagāminīm ||
reme saha tayā rājanbibhramodbhrāṃtacittayā || 5 ||
sā ca viṣṇuṃ jagajjiṣṇuṃ patiṃ trijagatāṃ patim ||
prāpya kṛtārthamātmānaṃ mene mānayaśodhanā || 6 ||
hṛṣṭaṃ puṣṭaṃ jagatsarvamabhavadbhā vitaṃ tayā ||
lakṣmyā nirīkṣitaṃ caiva sānaṃdaṃ hi mahītalam || 7 ||
kṣemaṃ subhikṣamārogyamanākrandamanākulam ||
jagadāsīdanudbhrāntaṃ praśāṃtopadravaṃ tathā || 8 ||
divi devā mumudire dānavā daityamāgatāḥ ||
visphāritaphaṇābhogā nāgāścaiva rasātale || 9 ||
hṛdaye brāhmaṇairvahnau bhujyate tridivairhaviḥ ||
cāturvarṇyamasaṃkīrṇaṃ pālyate pārtha pārthivaiḥ ||4.37.1 0||
virocanaprabhṛtibhirdṛṣṭvaivaṃ daityasattamaiḥ ||
tapastaptumathārabdhamagnimāśritya saṃyataiḥ || || 11 || somasaṃsthāhaviḥsaṃsthāpākasaṃkhyādibhirmakhaiḥ ||
sadācāraiḥ samārabdhamiṣṭaṃ sveṣṭābhilāṣibhiḥ || 12 ||
evaṃ dharmapradhānaistairvedavādaratātmabhi||
jagadāsītsamākrāṃtaṃ vikrameṇa krameṇa tu ||13||
lakṣmīvilāsaprabhavo devānāmabhavanmadaḥ ||
madācchīlaṃ ca śaucaṃ ca satyaṃ sadyo vyanīnaśan || || 14 || satyaśaucavihīnāṃstāndevānsaṃtyajya cañcalān ||
jagāma dānavakulaṃ kuladevānurāgataḥ ||15||
lakṣmyā bhāvitadehaistaiḥ punaruddhatamānasaiḥ||
vyavahartuṃ samārabdhamanyāyena madoddhataiḥ || 16 ||
vayaṃ vedā vayaṃ yajñā vayaṃ vidyā vaya jagat ||
brahmaviṣṇuśaṃkarādyā vayaṃ sarve divaukasaḥ || 17 ||
ahaṃkāravimūḍhāṃstāñjñātvā dānavasattamān ||
sāgaraṃ sā viveśātha bhrāṃtacittā bhṛgoḥ sutā || 18 ||
kṣīrābdhimadhyagatayā lakṣmyā kṣīṇārthasaṃcayam ||
nirānandagataśrīkamabhavadbhuvanatrayam || 19 ||
gataśrīkamathātmānaṃ matvā śaṃbarasūdanaḥ ||
papacchāṃgirasaṃ vipraṃ brūhi kiñcidvrataṃ mama || 4.37.20 ||
yena saṃprāpyate lakṣmīrlabdhā na calate punaḥ ||
niścalāpi suhṛnmitrairbhogyā bhavati sā mune || 21 ||
na sā śrītyabhimantavyā kanyā sā pālyate gṛhe ||
parārthaṃ yā suhṛnmitrabhṛtyairnaivopabhujyate || 22 ||
śakrasyaitadvacaḥ śrutvā bṛhaspatirudāradhīḥ ||
kathayāmāsa saṃciṃtya śubhaṃ śrīpañcamīvratam || 23 ||
yatpurā kasyacitproktaṃ vratānāmuttamaṃ vratam ||
tadasmai kathayāmāsa sarahasyamaśeṣataḥ || 24 ||
tacchrutvā kartumārabdhaṃ sureśena suraistathā ||
daityadānavagaṃdharvairyakṣaiḥ prakṣīṇakalmaṣaiḥ || 25 ||
siddhaiḥ prasiddhacaritairviṣṇunā prabhaviṣṇunā ||
brāhmaṇairbrahmatattvajñaiḥ samarthaiḥ pārthivaiḥ saha || 26 ||
kaiścitsāttvikabhāvena rājasenāparairapi ||
tāmasena tathā kaiścitkṛtaṃ vratamidaṃ tathā || 27 ||
vrate samāpte bhūyiṣṭhe niṣṭhayā parayā prabho ||
devānāṃ dānavānāṃ ca yuddhamāsīdathoddhatam || 28 ||
nirmathya bhujavīryeṇa sāgaraṃ saritāṃ patim||
samāharāmo hyamṛtaṃ hitāya tridivaukasām || 29 ||
ityevaṃ samayaṃ kṛtvā mamaṃthurvaruṇālayam ||
maṃthānaṃ maṃdaraṃ kṛtvā netraṃ kṛtvā tu vāsukim || 4.37.30 ||
mathyamānajalājjātaścandraḥ śītāṃśurujjvalaḥ ||
anaṃtaraṃ samutpannā lakṣmīḥ kṣīrābdhimadhyataḥ || 31 ||
tayā vilokitāḥ sarve daityadānavasattamāḥ ||
ālokya sā jagāmāśu viṣṇorvakṣaḥsthalaṃ śubham || 32 ||
vidhinā viṣṇunā cīrṇaṃ vrataṃ tenābdhisaṃbhavā ||
śarīrasthā babhūvāsya vibhramodbhrāṃtalocanā || 33 ||
kiṃ ca rājasabhāvena śakreṇaitatkṛtaṃ yataḥ ||
tatastribhuvanaiśvaryaṃ prāptaṃ tena maharddhikam || 34 ||
tamasāvṛtacittaistu saṃcīrṇaṃ daityadānavaiḥ ||
tena teṣāmathaiśvaryaṃ dṛṣṭanaṣṭamabhūtkila ||35||
evaṃ saśrīkamabhavatsadevāsuramānuṣam ||
jaracca jagatāṃ śreṣṭha vratasyāsya prabhāvataḥ || 36 ||
|| yudhiṣṭhira uvāca || ||
kathametadvrataṃ kṛṣṇa kriyate manujaiḥ kadā ||
prārabhyate pāryate ca sarvaṃ vada yadūttama || 37 ||
|| śrīkṛṣṇa uvāca || ||
mārgaśīrṣe site pakṣe paṃcamyāṃ patagodaye ||
upavāsasya niyamaṃ kuryādāśu suhṛddhṛdi || 38 ||
svarṇaraupyārakūṭotthā tāmramṛtkāṣṭhajātha vā ||
citrapaṭṭagatāṃ devīṃ lakṣmīṃ kṣmāpāla kārayet || 39 ||
padmahastāṃ padmavarṇāṃ padmāṃ padmadalekṣaṇām ||
diggajendraiḥ snāpyamānāṃ kāṃcanaiḥ kalaśottamaiḥ || 4.37.40 ||
tato yāmatraye jāte nimnagāyāṃ gṛhe.atha vā ||
snānaṃ kuryādasaṃbhrātaṃ śakravadupacārataḥ || 41 ||
devānpitṛrṃśca saṃtarpya tato devagṛhaṃ vrajet ||
tatrasthāṃ pūjayeddevīṃ puṣpai statkālasaṃbhavaiḥ || 42 ||
capalāyai namaḥ pādau caṃcalāyai ca jānunī ||
kaṭiṃ kamalavāsinyai nābhiṃ khyātyai namonamaḥ || 43 ||
stanau manmathavāsinyai lalitāyai bhujadvayam ||
utkaṃṭhitāyai kaṇṭhaṃ ca mādhavyai mukhamaṇḍalam || 44 ||
namaḥ śriyai śiraḥ pūjya dadyānnaivedyamādarāt ||
phalāni ca yathālābhaṃ virūḍhāndhānyasaṃcayān || 45 ||
tataḥ suvāsinī pūjyā kusumaiḥ kuṃkumena ca ||
bhojayenmadhurānnena praṇipatya visarjayet || 46 ||
tatastu taṃḍulaprasthaṃ ghṛtapātreṇa saṃyutam ||
brāhmaṇāya pradātavyaṃ śrīśaḥ saṃprīyatāmiti || 47 ||
nirvartya tadaśeṣeṇa tato bhuñjīta vāgyataḥ ||
māsānumāsaṃ kartavyaṃ vidhinānena bhārata || 48 ||
śrīrlakṣmīḥ kamalā saṃpadumā nārāyaṇī tadā ||
padmā dhṛtiḥ sthitiḥ puṣṭirṛddhiḥ siddhiryathākramam ||
māsānumāsa rājendra prīyatāmiti kīrtayet || 49 ||
tataśca dvādaśe māsi saṃprāpte paṃcame dine ||
vastramaṃḍapikāṃ kṛtvā puṣpagandhādhivāsitām || || 4.37.50 ||
śayyāyāṃ sthāpayellakṣmīṃ sarvopaskarasaṃyutām ||
mauktikāṣṭakasaṃyuktāṃ netrapaṭṭāvṛtastanīm || 51 ||
saptadhānyasamopetāṃ rasadhātusamanvitām||
pādukopānahacchatrabhājanāsanasatkṛtām||52||
dadyātsaṃpūjya vidhivadbrāhmaṇāya kuṭumbine||
vyāsāya vedaviduṣe yasya vā rocate svayam||
sopaskarāṃ savatsāṃ ca dhenuṃ dattvā kṣamāpayet||53||
kṣīrābdhimathanodbhūte viṣṇorvakṣaḥsthalālaye ||
sarvakāmaprade devi ṛddhiṃ yaccha namo.astu te ||54||
tataḥ suvāsinīḥ pūjya vastrairābharaṇaiḥ śubhaiḥ ||
bhojayitvā svayaṃ paścādbhuñjīta saha bandhubhiḥ || 55 ||
evaṃ yaḥ kurute pārtha bhaktyā śrīpañcamīvratam||
tasya śrīrbhavane bhāti kulānāmekaviṃśatiḥ || 56 ||
nārī vā kurute yā tu prāpyānujñāṃ svabhartṛtaḥ ||
subhagā darśanīyā ca bahuputrā ca jāyate ||57||
śrīpañcamīvratamidaṃ dayitaṃ murārerbhaktyā samācarati pūjyabhṛgostanūjām ||
rājyaṃ nijaṃ sa bhuvi bhavyajanopabhogānbhuktvā prayāti bhuvanaṃ madhusūdanasya||58||
iti śrībhaviṣye mahāpurāṇa uttaraparvaṇi śrīkṛṣṇayudhiṣṭhirasaṃvāde pañcamīvratakalpe śrīpañcamīvratanirūpaṇaṃ nāma saptatriṃśattamo.adhyāyaḥ ||37||
iti paṃcamīkalpaḥ samāptaḥ ||
viśokaṣaṣṭhīvratavarṇanam
|| yudhiṣṭhira uvāca || ||
ṣaṣṭhīvidhānamadhunā kathayasva janārdana ||
sarvavyādhipraśamanaṃ sarvakarmaphalapradam || || 1 ||
śrutaṃ mayā pūjyamāno bhānuḥ sarvaṃ prayacchati ||
divākarārādhanaṃ me tasmātkathaya keśava || 2 ||
|| śrīkṛṣṇa uvāca || ||
viśoka ṣaṣṭhīmatulāṃ vakṣyāmi manujottama| ||
yāmupoṣya naraḥ śokaṃ na kadācidiha jāyate|| 3 ||
māghe kṛṣṇatilaiḥ snātaḥ pañcamyāṃ śuklapakṣataḥ||
kṛtāhāraḥ kṛśasyā daṃtadhāvanapūrvakam||
upavāsavrataṃ kṛtvā brahmacārī bhavenniśi||
tataḥ prabhāte cotthāya kṛtasnānastataḥ śuciḥ||5||
kṛtvā tu kāñcanaṃ padmamarko.ayamiti pūjayet ||
karavīreṇa raktena raktavastrayugena ca || 6 ||
yathā viśokaṃ bhavanaṃ tvayaivādityasarvadā ||
tathā viśokatāṃ me syāttvadbhaktirjanmajanmani || 7 ||
evaṃ saṃpūjya ṣaṣṭhyāṃ tu śaktyā saṃpūjayeddvijān ||
suptvā saṃprāśya gomūtramutthāya kṛtaniścayaḥ || 8 ||
saṃpūjya vipramaṃtreṇa guḍapātrasamanvitaḥ ||
susūkṣmavastrayugalaṃ brāhmaṇāya nivedayet || 9 ||
atailalavaṇaṃ bhuktvā saptamyāṃ maunasaṃyutaḥ ||
tataḥ purāṇaśravaṇaṃ kartavyaṃ bhūtimicchatā || 4.38.10 ||
anena vidhinā sarvamubhayorapi pakṣayoḥ ||
kuryādyāvatpunarmāghaśuklapakṣasya saptamī || 11 ||
vratāṃte kalaśaṃ dadyātsuvarṇakamalānvitam ||
śayyāṃ sopaskarāṃ tadvatkapilāṃ ca payasvinīm || 12 ||
anena vidhinā yastu vittaśāṭhyavivarjitaḥ ||
viśokaṣaṣṭhīṃ kurute sa yāti paramāṃ gatim || 13 ||
yāvajjanmasahasrāṇāṃ sāgrakoṭiśataṃ bhavet ||
tāvanna śokamabhyeti rogadaurgatyavarjitaḥ || 14 ||
yaṃyaṃ prārthayate kāmaṃ taṃtaṃ prāpnoti puṣkalam ||
niṣkāmaṃ kurute yastu sa paraṃ brahma gacchati. || 15. ||
yaḥ paṭhecchṛṇuyādvāpi ṣaṣṭhīṃ śokavināśinīm||
sopīṃdralokamāpnoti na duḥkhī jāyate kvacit || 16 ||
ye bhāskaraṃ dinakaraṃ karavīrapuṣpaiḥ saṃpūjayaṃtyabhinamaṃti kṛtopavāsā ||
te duḥkhaśokarahitāḥ sahitāḥ suhṛdbhirbhūmau vihṛtya ravilokamavāpnuvaṃti || 17 ||
iti śrībhaviṣye mahāpurāṇa uttaraparvaṇi śrīkṛṣṇayudhiṣṭhirasaṃvāde viśokaṣaṣṭhīvrataṃ nāmā ṣṭatriṃśattamo.adhyāyaḥ ||38|| |||9||
kamalaṣaṣṭhīvratavarṇanam
|| śrīkṛṣṇa uvāca || ||
anyāmapi pravakṣyāmi padmaṣaṣṭhī śubhāṃ tathā||
yāmupoṣya naraḥ pāpavimuktaḥ svargabhāgbhavet || 1 ||
mārgaśīrṣe śubhe māsi pañcamyāṃ niyatavrataḥ ||
ṣaṣṭhīmupoṣya kamalaṃ kārayitvā sukāñcanam || 2 ||
śarkarāsaṃyutaṃ dadyādbrāhmaṇāya kuṭuṃbine ||
rūpaṃ ca kāṃcanaṃ kṛtvā phalasyaikasya dharmavit || 3 ||
dadyātprātaḥ kṛtasnāno bhānurme prīyatāmiti ||
bhaktyā tu viprānsaṃpūjya saptamyāṃ kṣīrabhojanam || 4 ||
kṛtvā kuryātphalatyāgaṃ yā ca syātkṛṣṇasaptamī ||
etāmupoṣya vidhivadanenaiva krameṇa tu|| 5 ||
tadvai haimaṃ phalaṃ dattvā suvarṇa kamalānvitam||
śarkarāpātrasaṃyuktaṃ vastramālāsamanvitam || 6 ||
ṣaṣṭhyorubhayormahārāja yāvatsaṃvatsaraṃ tataḥ ||
upoṣya dadyātkramaśaḥ sūryamaṃtrānudīrayet || 7 ||
bhānurarko ravirbrahmā sūryaḥ śukro hariḥ śivaḥ ||
śrīmānvibhāvasustvaṣṭā varuṇaḥ prīyatāmiti || 8 ||
pratimāsaṃ ca saptamyāmekaikaṃ nāma kīrtayet ||
pratipakṣaṃ phalatyāgametatkurvansamācaret || 9 ||
vratāṃte vipramithunaṃ pūjayedvastrabhūṣaṇaiḥ ||
śarkarākalaśaṃ dadyāddhaimapadmaphalānvitam || 4.39.10 ||
yathā phalakaro māsastvadbhaktānāṃ sadā rave ||
tathānaṃtaphalāvāptirastu janmanijanmani ||11||
imāmanaṃtaphaladāṃ phalaṣaṣṭhīṃ karoti yaḥ ||
sa sarvapāpanirmuktaḥ sūryaloke mahīyate ||12||
surāpānādikaṃ kiñcidyadatrāmutra vā kṛtam ||
tatsarvaṃ nāśamāyāti sūryalokaṃ sa gacchati ||13||
bhūtānbhavyāṃśca puruṣāṃstārayedekaviṃśatim ||
śṛṇuyādyaḥ paṭhedvāpi sopi kalyāṇabhāgbhavet||14||
haimaṃ phalaṃ sakamalaṃ kalaśaṃ sitāyā ṣaṣṭhīmupoṣya vidhivaddvijapuṃgavāya || dadyātsurāsuraśiromaṇighṛṣṭapādaṃ bhānuṃ praṇamya phalasiddhimupaiti martyaḥ ||15||
iti śrībhaviṣye mahāpurāṇa uttaraparvaṇi śrīkṛṣṇayudhiṣṭhirasaṃvāde kamalaṣaṣṭhīvrataṃ nāmaikonacatvāriṃśattamo.adhyāyaḥ || 39 |||9|||
maṃdāraṣaṣṭhīvratavarṇanam
|| śrīkṛṣṇa uvāca || ||
athātaḥ saṃpravakṣyāmi sarvapāpapraṇāśinīm ||
sarvakāmapradāṃ puṇyāṃ ṣaṣṭhīṃ mandārasaṃjñitām || 1 ||
māghasyāmalapakṣe tu pañcamyāṃ laghubhuṅnaraḥ ||
daṃtakāṣṭhaṃ tataḥ kṛtvā ṣaṣṭhīmupavasedbudhaḥ ||
viprānsaṃpūjya vidhivanmaṃdāraṃ prāśayenniśi||2||
tataḥ prabhāte cotthāya kṛtasnānaḥ punardvijān||
bhojayecchaktitaḥ kṛtvā maṃdārakusumāṣṭakam||3||
sauvarṇaṃ puruṣaṃ tadvatpadmahastaṃ suśobhanam ||
padmaṃ kṛṣṇatilaiḥ kṛtvā tāmrapātre.aṣṭapatrakam || 4 ||
pūjya maṃdārakusumairbhāskarāyeti pūrvataḥ ||
namaskāreṇa tadvacca sūryāyetyanale dale || ||5||
dakṣiṇe tadvadarkāya tathāryamṇe ca nairṛte||
paścime vasudhātre ca vāyavye caṇḍabhānave ||6||
pūṣṇe hyuttarataḥ pūjya ānaṃdāyetyataḥ param||
karṇikāyāṃ tu puruṣaḥ pūjyaḥ sarvātmaneti ca || 7 ||
śuklavastraiḥ samāveṣṭya bhakṣyairmālyaphalādibhiḥ ||
evamabhyarcya tatsarvaṃ dadyādvedavide punaḥ ||
bhuṃjītātailalavaṇaṃ vāgyataḥ prāṅmukho gṛhī || 8 ||
anena vidhinā sarvaṃ saptamyāṃ māsimāsi ca ||
kuryātsaṃvatsaraṃ yāvadvittaśāṭhyavivarjitaḥ || 9 ||
etadeva vratāṃte tu nidhāya kalaśopari ||
gobhirvibhavataḥ sārddhaṃ dātavyaṃ bhūtimicchatā || 4.40.10 ||
namo maṃdāranāthāya maṃdārabhavanāya ca ||
tvaṃ ca vai tārayasvāsmānasmātsaṃsārakardamāt || 11 ||
anena vidhinā yastu kuryānmaṃdārakaṃ vratam ||
vipāpmā sa sukhī martyaḥ kalpaṃ ca divi modate || 12 ||
imāmaghaughapaṭaladhvāṃtasadvartidīpikām ||
gacchanpragṛhya saṃsāraśarvaryāṃ na skhalennaraḥ || 13 ||
maṃdāraṣaṣṭhīṃ vikhyātāmīpsitārthaphalapradām ||
yaḥ paṭhecchṛṇuyādvāpi sopi pāpaiḥ pramucyate || 14 ||
ṣaṣṭhīmupoṣya tilapaṅkajakarṇikāyāṃ saṃpūjya bhāskaramaho suravṛkṣapuṣpaiḥ ||
yatprāpnuvaṃti puruṣā na hi tatkadācidgobhūhiraṇyatiladāḥ padamāpnuvanti || 15 || iti śrībhaviṣye mahāpurāṇa uttaraparvaṇi śrīkṛṣṇayudhiṣṭhirasaṃvāde maṃdāraṣaṣṭhīvratanirūpaṇanāma catvāriṃśo.adhyāyaḥ || 40 || cha ||
lalitāṣaṣṭhīvratavarṇanam
|| śrīkṛṣṇa uvāca || ||
bhadra bhādrapade māsi śuklaṣaṣṭhyāṃ yudhiṣṭhira ||
yoṣitsuveṣā subhagā sarvalokamanoharā || 1 ||
prātaḥ snānaṃ mahānadyāṃ kṛtvā saṃgṛhya vālukām ||
nave vaṃśamaye pātre yāyādgṛhamataṃdritā || 2 ||
sopavāsā prayatnena devīṃ tatra prapūjayet ||
kṛtvā vastragṛhaṃ ramyaṃ dīpanetrapaṭāvṛtam || 3 ||
tatra saṃsthāpya tāṃ devīṃ puṣpaiḥ saṃpūjayennavaiḥ ||
dhyātvā lalitikāṃ gaurīṃ tapovananivāsinīm || 4 ||
maṃtreṇānena kusumaiścaṃpakasya suśobhanaiḥ ||
caṃpakaṃ karavīraṃ ca nemāliṃ mālatīṃ tathā ||
nīlotpalaṃ ketakīṃ ca saṃgṛhya tagaraṃ tathā || 5 ||
ekaikasya tvaṣṭaśatamaṣṭāviṃśatireva vā ||
akṣataiḥ kalikā grāhyāstaistu devīṃ samarcayet || 6 ||
gaṃgādvāre kuśāvarte bilvake nīlaparvate ||
snātvā kanakhale tīrthe haraṃ labdhavatī vrajet || 7 ||
lalite lalite devi saukhyasaubhāgyadāyini ||
yā saubhāgyasamutpannā tasyai devyai namonamaḥ ||
evamabhyarcya vidhinā naivedyaṃ purato nyaset || 8 ||
kūṣmāṃḍaiḥ karkaṭīvṛṃtaiḥ karkoṭaiḥ kāravellakaiḥ ||
vṛtāṃkairakṣatairaṅgairdīpadhūpādyalaktakaiḥ || 9 ||
sārddhaṃ saguḍakairdhūpaiḥ sohālakakaraṃbakaiḥ ||
guḍapuṣpaiḥ karṇaveṣṭairmodakairmukhamodakaiḥ || 4.41.10 ||
evamabhyarcya vidhivadrātrau jāgaraṇaṃ tataḥ ||
gītavādyanaṭacchatraprekṣaṇīyaiḥ suśobhanaiḥ ||
sakhībhiḥ sahitā sādhvī tāṃ rātrīṃ praśamannayet || 11 ||
na ca sammīlayennetre nārī yāmacatuṣṭayam ||
durbhagā durgatā vaṃdhyā netrasaṃmīlanādbha vet || 12 ||
evaṃ jāgaraṇaṃ kṛtvā saptamyāṃ saritaṃ nayet ||
gandhapuṣpairathābhyarcya gītavādyapuraḥsaram || 13 ||
tacca dadyāddvijeṃdrāya naivadyādi narottama ||
snātvā gṛhamupāgamya hutvā vaiśvānaraṃ kramāt ||
devānpitṛrnmanuṣyāṃśca pūjayitvā suvāsinīm || 14 ||
kumārikā bhojanīyā brāhmaṇā daśapaṃca ca ||
bhakṣyabhojyairbahuvidhairdeyā tebhyaḥ sudakṣiṇā ||
lalitā prītiyuktā.astu ityuktvā tānvisarjayet || 15 ||
yaḥ kaścidācaredetadbhaktyā lalitikāvratam ||
naro vā yadi vā nārī tasya puṇyaphalaṃ śṛṇu || 16 ||
tannāsti mānuṣe loke tasya yannopapadyate ||
sukhasaubhāgyasaṃyuktā gaurīlokamavāpnuyāt || 17 ||
ṣaṣṭhyāṃ jalāṃtaragatā varavaṃśapātre saṃgṛhya pūjayati yā sikatāḥ krameṇa ||
naktaṃ ca jāgaramanuddhatagītanṛtyaiḥ kṛtvā hyasau tribhuvane laliteva bhāti ||18||
iti śrībhaviṣye mahāpurāṇe uttaraparvaṇi śrīkṛṣṇayudhiṣṭhirasaṃvāde lalitāṣaṣṭhīvratavarṇanaṃ nāmaikacatvāriṃśo.adhyāyaḥ ||41|| ||
kārtikeyapūjāvarṇanam
|| śrīkṛṣṇa uvāca || ||
yeyaṃ mārgaśire māsi ṣaṣṭhī bharatasattama ||
puṇyā pāpaharā dhanyā śivā śāntā gṛhapriyā || 1 ||
nihatya tārakaṃ ṣaṣṭhyāṃ guhastārakarājavat ||
rarāja tena dayitā kārttikeśasya sā tithiḥ ||
snānadānādikaṃ karma tasyāmakṣayamucyate ||2||
yasyāṃ paśyaṃti gāṃgeyaṃ dakṣiṇāpathamāśritam ||
brahmahatyādipāpaiste mucyaṃte nātra saṃśaya. || 3 ||
tasmādasyāṃ sopavāsaḥ kumāraṃ svarṇasaṃbhavam||
rājataṃ vā mahārāja mṛnmayaṃ vāpi kārayet || 4 ||
aparāhṇe tataḥ snātvā samācamya yatavratī ||
padmāsanastho gāṅgeyaṃ dhyāyaṃstiṣṭhetsamādhinā || 5 ||
brāhmaṇastu tato vidvāngṛhītvā karakaṃ navam ||
pātayettasya śirasi dhārāṃ vai dakṣiṇāmukhaḥ || 6 ||
candramaṇḍalabhūtānāṃ bhavabhūtipavitritā ||
gaṃgākumāradhāreyaṃ patitā tava mastake||7||
evaṃ snātvā samabhyarcya bhāskaraṃ bhuvanādhipa ||
puṣpadhūpādinā paścātpūjayetkṛttikāsutam || 8 ||
deva senāpate skanda kārttikeya bhavodbhava ||
kumāra guha gāṃgeya śaktihasta namo.astu te || 9 ||
ebhirnnāmapadaiḥ pūjya naivedyaṃ vinivedayet ||
phalāni dakṣiṇānnāni candanaṃ malayodbhavam|| ||4.42.1 0||
pārśvasthau pūjayecchāgakukkuṭau svāmivallabhau||
sakalāpaṃ mayūraṃ ca pratyakṣāṃ himajāṃ tathā ||11||
kṛttikākaṭakaṃ pārśve saṃpūjya skandavallabham||
tenaiva nāmabhirhomaḥ kāryaḥ sājyaistilaistathā || 12 ||
evaṃ nirvartya vidhivatphalamevaṃ yudhiṣṭhira ||
bhakṣayitvā svapedbhūmau svāstṛte darbhasaṃstare || || 13 ||
nālikeraṃ mātuluṃgaṃ nāriṃgaṃ panasaṃ tathā ||
jaṃbīraṃ dāḍimaṃ drākṣāṃ hṛdyānyāmraphalāni ca || 14 ||
śrīphalāmalakaṃ tadvattrapusaṃ kadalīphalam ||
krameṇa bhakṣayedrājansaṃyato niyatavratī ||
alābhe kalakālaughaphalamadyādataṃdritaḥ || 15 ||
pratyakṣo hemaghaṭitaśchāgo vā kukkuṭo.athavā||
prātardadyāddvijāyaitatsenānīḥ prīyatāmiti || 16 ||
senāyāṃ sa ca saṃbhūtaḥ krauñcāriḥ ṣaṇmukho guhaḥ ||
gāṃgeyaḥ kārttikeyaśca svāmī bālagrahāgraṇīḥ || 17 ||
chāgapriyaśśaktidharo dvāro dvādaśamaḥ smṛtaḥ ||
prīyatāmiti sarveṣu kramānmāseṣu kīrtayet || 18 ||
brāhmaṇānbhojayitvādau paścādbhuñjīta vāgyataḥ ||
evaṃ saṃvatsarasyānte kārttike māsi śobhane ||19||
kārttikeyaṃ samabhyarcya vāsobhirbhūṣaṇaiḥ saha ||
gāṃgeyaḥ kārtikeyaśca sakṛdevaivamācaret ||4.42.20||
saṃvatsaravidhiṃ kṛtvā japaṃ homapuraskṛtam ||
dadyādviprāya rājendra vācakāya viśeṣataḥ ||21||
ete viprāḥ smṛtā divyā bhaumāstvanye dvijātayaḥ ||
pālite.asminvrate pārtha tīrṇaḥ syādbhavasāgarāt ||22||
evaṃ yaḥ kurute bhaktyā naro yoṣidathāpi vā||
sa prāpyeha śubhaṃ kāmaṃ gacchatīndrasalokatām|| ||23||
sadaiva pūjanīyastu kārtikeyo mahīpate||
kārttikeyādṛte nānyo rājñāṃ pūjyaḥ pravakṣyate ||24||
saṃgrāmaṃ gacchamāno yaḥ pūjayetkṛttikāsutam||
sa sarvaṃ jayate vīro yathendro dānavānraṇe ||25||
tasmātsarvaprayatnena pūjayecchaṃkarātmajam||
pūjyamānastu sadbhaktyā sarvānkāmānprayacchati ||26||
yastu ṣaṣṭhyāṃ naro naktaṃ kuryādbhāratasattama ||
sarvapāpavinirmukto gāṃgeyasya sadā vrajet ||27||
śrutvaivaṃ dakṣiṇāṃ māsaṃ gatvā śraddhāsamanvitaḥ|
pūjayed devadeveśaṃ sa gatvā śivamaṃdiram || 28 ||
skandaṃ guhaṃ śaravaṇodbhavamādidevaṃ śambhoḥ sutaṃ sadayitaṃ girirājaputryāḥ ||
svarge nirargalasukhānyanubhūyate na senāpatirbhavati rājyadhuraṃdhuro.asau || 29 || ||
iti śrībhaviṣye mahāpurāṇa uttaraparvaṇi śrīkṛṣṇayudhiṣṭhirasaṃvāde tārakavadhakārttikeyapūjāṣaṣṭhī vratavarṇanaṃ nāma dvicatvāriṃśo.adhyāyaḥ || 42 || cha ||
vijayasaptamīvratavarṇanam
|| yudhiṣṭhira uvāca || ||
saptamī ca yadā deva kena kālena pūjyate ||
kiṃphalā niyamaḥ kaścidvada devakinandana || 1 ||
|| śrīkṛṣṇa uvāca || ||
śuklapakṣe tu saptamyāṃ yadādityadinaṃ bhavet ||
saptamī vijayā nāma tatra dattaṃ mahā phalam || 2 ||
snānaṃ dānaṃ japo homa upavāsastathaiva ca ||
sarvaṃ vijayasaptamyāṃ mahāpātakanāśanam || 3 ||
pradakṣiṇāṃ yaḥ kurute phalaiḥ puṣpai rdivākaram ||
sa sarvaguṇasaṃpannaṃ putraṃ prānotyanuttamam || 4 ||
prathamā nālikeraistu dvitīyā raktanāgaraiḥ ||
tṛtīyā mātuluṃgaiśca caturthī kadalīphalaiḥ || || 5 ||
pañcamī varakūṣmāṇḍaiḥ ṣaṣṭhī pakvaistu teṃdukaiḥ ||
vṛntākaiḥ saptamī deyā aṣṭottaraśatena ca || 6 ||
mauktikaiḥ padmarāgaiśca nīlaiḥ karketanaistathā ||
gomedairvajravaiḍūryaiḥ śatenāṣṭādhikena tu || 7 ||
akṣoṭairbadarairbilvaiḥ karamardaiḥ sabarbaraiḥ ||
āmrāmrātakajaṃbīrairjaṃbukarkoṭikāphalaiḥ ||8||
puṣpairdhūpaiḥ phalaiḥ patrairmodakairguṇakaiḥ śubhaiḥ ||
ebhirvijayasaptamyāṃ bhānoḥ kuryātpradakṣiṇām || 9 ||
anyaiḥ phalaiśca kāmyaiśca aikṣavairgraṃthivarjitaiḥ ||
raveḥ pradakṣiṇā deyā phalena phalamādiśet || 4.43.10 ||
na viśenna ca saṃjalpenna ca kaścidvadedapi ||
ekacittatayā bhānuścintanāya prayacchati || 11||
vasordhārāpradātavyā bhānorgavyena sarpiṣā ||
candrātapatraṃ badhnīyājjayaṃ kiṃkiṇikāyutam ||12||
kuṃkumena samālabhya puṣpadhūpaiśca pūjayet ||
śubhaṃ nivedya naivedyaṃ tataḥ paścātkṣamāpayet ||13||
bhāno bhrāskaramārtaṇḍa caṇḍaraśme divākara ||
ārogyamāyurvijayaṃ putraṃ dehi namo.astu te || 14 ||
upavāsena naktena tathaivāyācitena ca ||
kṛtā niyamayuktena yā tviyaṃ jayasaptamī || 15 ||
rogī vimucyate rogāddaridraḥ śriyamāpnuyāt ||
aputro labhate putraṃ vidyā vidyārthino bhavet || 16 ||
śuklapakṣe yadā pārtha sādityasaptamī bhavet ||
tadā naktena mudgāśī kṣapayetsapta saptamī || 17 ||
bhūmau palāśapatreṣu snātvā hutvā yathāvidhi ||
samāpte tu vrate dadyātsauvarṇaṃ mudgamiśritam || 18 ||
mudgaṃ śreṣṭhāya viprāya vācakāya viśeṣataḥ||
saptamyāṃ saptisaṃyukta ādityena narottama || 19 ||
upoṣya vidhinānena mantraprāśanapūjaneḥ ||
ṣaḍakṣareṇa mantreṇa sarvaṃ kāryaṃ vijānatā || 4.43.20 ||
arcanaṃ vahnikāryaṃ ca śatamaṣṭottaraṃ naraḥ ||
samāpte tu vrate paścātsuvarṇena ghaṭāpitam || 21 ||
sauvarṇaṃ bhāskaraṃ pārtha rukmapātragataṃ śubham ||
raktāṃbaraṃ ca kāṣāyaṃ gandhaṃ dadyātsadakṣiṇam || 22 ||
mantreṇānena viprāya karmasiddhyai dvijātaye ||
oṃ bhāskarāya sudevāya namastubhya yaśaskara || 23 ||
mamādya samīhitārthaprado bhava namonamaḥ ||
dānāni ca pradeyāni gṛhāṇi śayanāni ca || 24 ||
śrāddhāni pitṛdevānāṃ śāśvatīṃ tṛptimicchatā ||
yātrā praśastā yātṛrṇāṃ rājñāṃ ca jayamicchatām ||25||
vijayo jāyate.avaśyaṃ yatīnāṃ ca nṛṇāṃ tadā ||
atorthaṃ viśrutā loke sadā vijayasaptamī || 26 ||
evameṣā tithiḥ pārtha iha kāmapradā nṛṇām ||
paratra sukhadā saumyā sūryalokapradāyinī || 27 ||
dātā bhogī ca caturo dīrghāyurnīrujaḥ sukhī ||
ihāgatya bhavedrājā hastyaśvadhanaratnavān || 28 ||
nārī vā kurute yā tu sāpi tatpuṇyabhāginī ||
bhavatyatra na saṃdehaḥ kāryaḥ pārtha tvayā kvacit|| || 29 ||
svargyā samīhitasukhārthaphalapradā ca yā mṛgyate munivaraiḥ pravarā tithīnām ||
sā bhānupādakamalārcanaciṃtakānāṃ puṃsāṃ sadaiva vijayā vijayaṃ dadāti ||4.43.30||
iti śrībhaviṣye mahāpurāṇa uttaraparvaṇi śrīkṛṣṇayudhiṣṭhirasaṃvāde vijayasaptamīvratakathanaṃ nāma tricatvāriṃśo.adhyāyaḥ ||43|| ||
ādityamaṇḍalavidhivarṇanam
|| śrīkṛṣṇa uvāca || ||
athānyadapi te vacmi dānaṃ śreyaskaraṃ param ||
ādityamaṃḍalaṃ nāma sarvāśubhavināśanam || 1 ||
yavacūrṇena śubhreṇa kuryādgodhūmajena vā ||
supakvaṃ bhānubiṃbābhaṃ guḍagavyājyapuritam || 2 ||
saṃpūjya bhāskaraṃ bhaktyā tadagre maṃḍalaṃ śubham ||
raktacandanajaṃ kuryātkuṃkumaṃ vā viśeṣataḥ || 3 ||
maṇḍalaṃ tatra saṃsthāpya raktavastraiḥ supūjitam ||
brāhmaṇāya pradātavyaṃ maṃtreṇānena pāṃḍava || 4 ||
ādityatejasotpannaṃ rājataṃ vidhinirmitam ||
śreyase mama vipra tvaṃ pratigṛhṇedamuttamam || 5 || (iti dānamaṃtraḥ)
kāmadaṃ dhanadaṃ dharmyaṃ putradaṃ sukhadaṃ tava ||
ādityaprītaye dattaṃ pratigṛhṇāmi maṃḍalam || 6 || ( iti pratigrahamaṃtra)
evaṃ dattvā naro rājansūryavaddivi rājate ||
sarvakāmasamṛddhārtho maṃḍalādhipatirbhavet || 7 ||
dātavyaṃ jayasaptamyāṃ tadārabhya dinedine ||
bhāskarasya mahārāja śaktyā bhāvena bhāvitaḥ || 8 ||
godhūmacūrṇajanitaṃ yavacūrṇajaṃ vā ādityamaṃḍalamakhaṇḍaguḍādyapūrṇam ||
kṛtvā dvijāya vidhivatpratipādayedyo bhūmau bhavatyamitamaṃḍalamaṃḍito.asau || 9 ||
iti śrībhaviṣye mahāpurāṇa uttara parvaṇi śrīkṛṣṇayudhiṣṭhirasaṃvāde ādityamaṃḍalavidhivarṇanaṃ nāma catuścatvāriṃśo.adhyāyaḥ || 44 || cha ||
trayodaśavarjyasaptamīvratavarṇanam
|| yudhiṣṭhira uvāca || ||
yāmupoṣya naraḥ kāmānprāpnoti manasepsitān ||
tāmekāṃ vada me deva saptamīṃ dhanasaukhyadām || 1 ||
śrīkṛṣṇa uvāca || ||
bhānordine site pakṣe atīte cottarāyaṇe ||
punnāmāhvaya nakṣatre gṛhṇīyātsaptamīvratam || 2 ||
savrīhikānyavatilānsaha māṣamudgairgodhūmamāṃsamadhumaithunakāṃsyapātram ||
abhyaṃjanāṃjana śilātalacūrṇitāni ṣaṣṭhyāṃ paraṃ pariharedahani prasiddhyai || 3 || devānmunīnpitṛgaṇānsajalāñjalībhiḥ saṃtarpya pūjya gaganāṃgaṇahastabhuktān || hutvānale tilayavānbahuśo ghṛtāktānbhūmau svapeddhṛdi nidhāya hi taṃ savitram || 4 || yāni trayodaśa janairiha varjitāni dravyāṇi tāni parihṛtya paridviṣaṣṭyā ||
saṃprāśya varṣamekaṃ prāpnoti bhārata sukhaṃ manasepsitaṃ ca || 5 ||
iti śrībhaviṣye mahāpurāṇa uttaraparvaṇi śrīkṛṣṇa yudhiṣṭhirasaṃvāde trayodaśavarjyasaptamīvrataṃ nāma paṃcacatvāriṃśo.adhyāyaḥ || 45 || || cha
kukkuṭīmarkaṭīvratavarṇanam
|| śrīkṛṣṇa uvāca || ||
lomaśo nāma viprarṣirmathurāyāṃ gataḥ purā ||
sorcito vasudevena devakyā ca yudhiṣṭhira || 1 ||
upaviṣṭaḥ kathāḥ puṇyāḥ kathayitvā manoharāḥ ||
tataḥ kathayituṃ bhūyaḥ kathāmetāṃ praca krame ||2||
kaṃse hate mṛtāḥ putrāḥ putrā jātāḥ puna. punaḥ ||
mṛtavatsā devaki tvaṃ putraduḥkhena duḥkhitā||3||
yathā candramukhī dīptirbabhūva mṛtaputrikā ||
paścāccīrṇavratā saiva babhūvākṣatavatsakā ||
tvameva devaki tathā bhaviṣyasi na saṃśayaḥ ||4||
|| devakyuvāca || ||
kā sā candramukhī brahmanbabhūva bahu putrikā || 5 ||
caritaṃ kiṃ vratavaraṃ bahusaṃtatikārakam ||
satāṃ sadarthakaraṇaṃ saubhāgyārogyavarddhanam || 6 ||
|| lomaśa uvāca || ||
ayodhyāyāṃ purā rājā nuhuṣo nāma viśrutaḥ ||
tasya rājño mahādevī nāmnā candramukhī purā || 7 ||
purohitasya tasyaiva patnyāsīnmānamānikā ||
tayorāsīddṛḍhā prītiḥ spṛhaṇīyā parasparam || 8 ||
athāpi tepi mitriṇyau snānārthaṃ sarayūjale ||
prāpte prāptāśca tatraiva bahvyaśca nagarāṅganāḥ || 9 ||
snātvā tu maṃḍala cakruḥ svapatervyaktarūpiṇaḥ ||
lekhayitvā śivaṃ śāṃtamumayā saha śaṃkaram || 4.46.10 ||
gandhapuṣpākṣatairbhaktyā pūjayitvā yathāvidhi ||
praṇamya gaṃtukāmāstāḥ pṛṣṭāstābhyāṃ narastriyaḥ || 11 ||
tā ūcuḥ śaṅkaro.asmābhiḥ pārvatyā saha pūjitaḥ ||
svarṇasūtramayastaṃtuḥ śivāyātmā nive ditaḥ || 12 ||
dhārāmayamidaṃ tāvadyāvatprāṇāvadhāraṇam ||
tāsāṃ tu vacanaṃ śrutvā mitriṇyau te.api bhārata || 13 ||
tasyaiva samayaṃ tatra baddhvā dorbhyāṃ tu dorakaiḥ ||
tatastāḥ svagṛhāñjagmuḥ svasakhībhiḥ samāvṛtāḥ || 14 ||
kālena mahatā yātaṃ tasyā vai tadvrata nṛpa ||
caṃdravatyāḥ pramattāyā vismṛtaḥ sa tu dorakaḥ || 15 ||
mṛtā kaiścidahorātraiḥ sā babhūva plavaṅgamī ||
mānī ca kukkuṭī jātā prāyaḥ saṃnikaṭañcare || || 16 ||
tathaiva jāte mitriṇyau pūrvajātismare tathā ||
saṃbhūya bhūpasamayaṃ prāgbhūtaṃ cakratuḥ punaḥ || 17 ||
taddine tatra saṃprāpte punaḥ kāle na te mṛte ||
tatraiva mātrake deśe jāte gokulasaṃyute || 18 ||
rājño jāyā babhūvātha pṛdhvīnāthasya vā punaḥ ||
īśvarī nāma vikhyātā rājñī rājeṃdravallabhā || 19 ||
agnimīlā dvijasyābhūdbhāryā bhūṣaṇanāmikā ||
purohitasya kālena kukkuṭī bahuputriṇī || 4.46.20 ||
jātismarā padmahastā aṣṭaputrā mṛtaprajā ||
punarnirantarā prītirbabhūvātha tayornṛpa || 21 ||
tatreśvarī putramekaṃ prasūtā caiva rogiṇam ||
navavarṣastu pañcatvamagātsa ca yudhiṣṭhira || 22 ||
tatastāṃ bhūṣaṇāṃ draṣṭumathaiṣā putraduḥkhitā ||
sakhībhāvādatisnehātsarvaputrasamanvitā ||
amuktābharaṇā nityaṃ svabhāvenaiva bhūṣitā || 23 ||
tāṃ dṛṣṭvā putriṇīṃ bhavyāṃ prajajvāleśvarī ruṣā ||
tato gṛhaṃ preṣya ca tāṃ sakhīṃ vai tīvramatsarā || 24 ||
cintayāmāsa sā rātryāṃ tasyāḥ putravadhaṃ prati ||
hatāhatāśca tatputrā punarjīvantyanāmayāḥ || 25 ||
kadācidāhūya sakhīṃ bhūṣaṇāṃ purataḥ sthitām ||
īśvarī prāha kimidaṃ sakhi puṇyaṃ tvayā kṛtam || 26 ||
yena te nihatāḥ putrāḥ punarjīvanti no bhayam ||
bahuputrā jīvavatsā amuktābharaṇā katham ||
śobhase.abhyadhikaṃ bhadre vidyutsaudāminīva hi || 27 ||
|| bhūṣaṇovāca || ||
bhadre bhādrapade māsi saptamyāṃ salilāśaye ||
snātvā śivamaṃḍalake lekhayitvā sahāṃbikam || 28 ||
bhaktyā saṃpūjya samayaṃ kuryādbaddhvā kare guṇam ||
yāvajjīvaṃ mayā tāvacchivasyātmā niveditaḥ || 29 ||
ityevaṃ samayaṃ kṛtvā tataḥprabhṛti dorakam ||
svarṇaraupyamayaṃ vāpi karaśākhāsu dhārayet || 4.46.30 ||
maṃḍakaṃ veṣṭikāṃ dayācchvaśrūpakṣe dvije tu vā ||
svayaṃ ca tā na bhoktavyā vratabhaṃgabhayātsakhi || 31 ||
parito mudrikā raupyā sauvarṇīṃ ca yudhiṣṭhira ||
tāmrapātropari sthāpya brāhmaṇāya nivedayet || 32 ||
sohālakāni kāṃsāraṃ dadyādbhuñjīta ca svayam ||
maṇḍalaṃ sadma vittaṃ ca śivaṃ śaktisamanvitam || 33 ||
sampūjya sakhi duṣprāpyaṃ trailokye.api na vidyate ||
tadevaṃ samayaḥ pūrvaṃ tvayā saha mayā kṛtaḥ || 34 ||
sa mayā pālito bhaktyā tato.ahaṃ susthitā sakhi ||
tvayā sa bhagnaḥ samayo darpāttyaktaḥ śarīrayoḥ || 35 ||
tena santativicchinnā rājyepi sati duḥkhitā ||
eṣa prabhāvaḥ kathito vratasyāsya mayā tava || 36 ||
arddhaṃ tava pradāsyāmi tasya dharmasya suvrate ||
sakhībhāvātpratīccha tvaṃ nātra kāryā vicāraṇā || 37 ||
ityuktvā pratijagrāha vratadānaphalaṃ tataḥ ||
babhūva suprajāḥ sādhvī mokṣaṃ prāpa sureśvarī || 38 ||
vratasyāsya prabhāveṇa saputrā tvaṃ ca devaki ||
bhaviṣyasi trilokeśaṃ putraṃ ca janayiṣyasi || 39 ||
ityevaṃ kathayitvāsyai lomaśo munipuṃgavaḥ ||
jagāma nabhasā pārtha mayā.apyetattavoditam|| 4.46.40 ||
ye cariṣyaṃti manujā vratametadyudhiṣṭhira ||
kṛkavākuprasaṅgākhyaṃ devakyā caritaṃ śubham || 41 ||
teṣāṃ santativicchedo na kadācidbhaviṣyati ||
striyaśca yāścariṣyaṃti vratametatsutapradam ||
martyaloke sukhaṃ sthitvā yāsyaṃti śivamaṃdiram || 42 ||
yaḥ kukkuṭīvratavaraṃ plavagīsametaṃ cakre carācaraguruṃ hṛdaye nidhāya ||
tadvyākaroti kaluṣaughavighātarakṣāṃ sā strī yuvāṃ bhavati śobhanagītavatsā || 43 || iti śrībhaviṣye mahāpurāṇa uttaraparvaṇi śrīkṛṣṇayudhiṣṭhirasaṃvāde kukkuṭīmarkaṭīvratavarṇanaṃ nāma ṣaṭcatvāriṃśo.adhyāyaḥ || 46 ||
ubhayasaptamīvratavarṇanam
|| śrīkṛṣṇa uvāca || ||
ata ūrdhvaṃ pravakṣyāmi saptamīkalpamuttamam ||
māghamāsātsamārabhya śuklapakṣe yudhiṣṭhira ||1||
saptamyāṃ kuru saṃkalpamahorātre vrate nṛpa ||
varuṇetyarcayitvā tu brahmakūrcaṃ tu kārayet || 2 ||
aṣṭamyāṃ bhojayedviprāṃstilapiṣṭaṃ guḍaudanam ||
agniṣṭomasya yajñasya phalaṃ prāpnoti mānavaḥ || 3 ||
saptamyāṃ phālgune māsi sūryamityabhipūjayet ||
vājapeyasya yajñasya yathoktaṃ labhate phalam || 4 ||
saptamyāṃ caitramāse tu vedāṃśumabhipūjayet ||
ukthādhvarasamaṃ puṇyaṃ naraḥ prāpnoti bhaktimān || 5 ||
vaiśākhasya tu saptamyāṃ dhātāramabhipūjayet ||
paśubaṃdhvadhvare puṇyaṃ samyakprāpnoti mānavaḥ || 6 ||
saptamyāṃ jyeṣṭhamāsasya indra ityabhipūjayet ||
vājapeyasya yajñasya phalaṃ prāpnoti durllabham||7||
āṣāḍhamāse saptamyāṃ pūjayitvā divākaram ||
bahuvarṇasya yajñasya phalaṃ prāpnoti puṣkalam || 8 ||
saptamyāṃ śrāvaṇe māsi mātāpi nāma pūjayet||
sautrāmaṇiphalaṃ samyakprāpnoti puruṣaḥ śubham || 9 ||
raviṃ prauṣṭhapade māse saptamyāmarcayecchuciḥ ||
tulāpuruṣadānasya phalaṃ prāpnoti mānavaḥ || ||| 4.47.10 ||
āśvayukchuklasaptamyāṃ savitāraṃ prapūjya ca ||
gosahasrapradānasya phalaṃ prāpnoti mānavaḥ || 11 ||
kārtike śuklasaptamyāṃ dineśaṃ saptavāha nam||
yo.abhyarcayati puṇyātmā pauṃḍarīkaṃ sa vindati || 12 ||
bhānuṃ mārgasite pakṣe pūjayitvā vidhānataḥ ||
rājasūyasya yajñasya phalaṃ daśaguṇaṃ bhajet || 13 ||
bhāskaraṃ pauṣamāse tu pūjayitvā yathāvidhi ||
narameghasya yajñasya phalaṃ prāpnoti puṣkalam || 14 ||
tadeva kṛṣṇasaptamyāṃ nāma saṃpūjayedbudhaḥ ||
sopavāsaḥ prayatnena varṣamekaṃ yudhiṣṭhira ||
paścātsamāpte niyame sūryayāgaṃ samācaret || 15 ||
śucirbhūmau same deśe lepayedraktaca ndanaiḥ ||
ekahastaṃ dvihastaṃ vā caturhastamathāpi vā || 16 ||
siṃdūragairikābhyāṃ ca sūryamaṇḍalamālikhet ||
raktapuṣpaiḥ sapadmaiśca dhūpaiḥ kundurakādibhiḥ ||
sampūjya dadyānnaivedyaṃ vicitraṃ ghṛtapācitam || 17 ||
purataḥ sthāpayetkumbhānsahiṇyānnasaṃyutān ||
agnikāryaṃ tataḥ kuryātsamabhyukṣya hutāśanam || 18 ||
ākṛṣṇeneti maṃtreṇa samidbhiścārkasaṃbhavaiḥ ||
tilairājyaguḍopeterdadyāddaśaśatāhutīḥ || 19 ||
tatastu dakṣiṇā deyā brāhmaṇānāṃ yudhiṣṭhira ||
bhojayitvā raktavastraiḥ śuklānyapi pidhāpayet|| 4.47.20 ||
dvādaśātra praśaṃsaṃti gāvo vastrānvitāḥ śubhāḥ||
chatropānahayugmaṃ ca ekaikāya pradāpayet ||
evaṃ visṛjya tānviprānsvayaṃ bhuñjīta vāgyataḥ || 21 ||
ya evaṃ kurute pārtha saptamīvratamuttamam ||
nīrujo rūpavānvāggmī dīrghāyuścaiva jāyate || 22 ||
saptamyāṃ sopavāsastu bhānoḥ paśyaṃti ye mukham ||
sarvapāpavinirmuktāḥ sūryalokamavāpnuyuḥ || 23 ||
vratametanmahārāja sarvāśubhavināśanam ||
sarvaduṣṭapraśamanaṃ śarīrārogyakārakam ||
sūryalokapradaṃ cāṃte prāhaivaṃ nārado muniḥ || 24 ||
ye saptamīmupavasaṃti sitāsitāṃ ca nāmākṣarairahimadīdhitimarcayaṃti ||
te sarvarogarahitāḥ sukhinaḥ sadaiva bhūtvā raveranucarāḥ suciraṃ bhavaṃti || 25 ||
iti śrībhaviṣye mahāpurāṇa uttaraparvaṇi śrīkṛṣṇayudhiṣṭhirasaṃvāde ubhayasaptamīvratavarṇanaṃ nāma saptacatvāriṃśo.adhyāyaḥ || 47 || ja ||
kalyāṇasaptamīvratavarṇanam
|| yudhiṣṭhira uvāca ||
bhagavandurgasaṃsārasāgarottārakārakam ||
kiñcidvrataṃ samācakṣva svargārogyasukhapradam || 1 ||
|| śrīkṛṣṇa uvāca || ||
yadā tu śuklasaptamyāmādi tyasya dinaṃ bhavet ||
tadā sā tu mahāpuṇyā vijayā tu nigadyate ||2||
prātargavyena payasā snānamasyāṃ samācaret ||
śuklāṃbaradharaḥ padmamakṣataiḥ parika lpayet ||3||
prāṅmukhoṣṭadalaṃ madhye tadvicitrāṃ ca karṇikām ||
sarveṣvapi daleṣveva vinyasetpūrvataḥ kramāt ||4||
pūrveṇa tapanāyeti mārtaṇḍāyeti vai namaḥ ||
yāmye divākarāyeti vidhātre nairṛtena ca ||5||
paścime varuṇāyeti bhāskarāyeti vānile ||
saumye ca varuṇāyeti ravayetya.aṣṭame dale ||6||
ādāvaṃte ca tanmadhye namo.astu paramātmane ||
maṃtrairevaṃ samabhyarcya namaskārāṃtadīpitaiḥ ||7||
śuklavastraphalairbhakṣyairdhūpamālyānulepanaiḥ ||
sthaṃḍile pūjayedbhaktyā guḍena lavaṇena ca ||8||
tato vyāhṛtihomena vibhajya dvijapuṅgavān ||
śaktitastarpayedbhaktyā guḍakṣīraghṛtādibhiḥ ||9||
tilapātraṃ hiraṇyaṃ ca gurave ca nivedayet ||
evaṃ niyamakṛtsnātvā prātarutthāya mānavaḥ ||4.48.10||
kṛtasnānajapo vipraiḥ sahaiva ghṛtapāyasam ||
bhuktvā ca vedavidvadbhirbaiḍālavratava rjitaiḥ || 11 ||
evaṃ saṃvatsarasyāṃte kṛtvaitadakhilaṃ nṛpa ||
udyāpayedyathāśakti bhāskaraṃ saṃsmaranhṛdi || 12 ||
ghṛtapātraṃ sakarakaṃ sodakumbhaṃ niveda yet ||
vastrālaṃkārasaṃyuktāṃ suvarṇāsyāṃ payasvinīm || 13 ||
ekāmapi pradadyādgāṃ vittahīno vimatsaraḥ ||
vittaśāṭhyaṃ na kurvīta tato mohātpata tyadhaḥ || 14 ||
anena vidhinā yastu kuryātkalyāṇasaptamīm ||
śṛṇuyādvā paṭhedvāpi so.api pāpaiḥ pramucyate || 15 ||
yaścāṣṭapatrakamalodarakarṇikāyāṃ saṃpūjayetkusumadhūpavilepanāyaiḥ ||
ṣaṣṭhyāḥ parehani navārtiharaṃ dineśaṃ kalyāṇabhājanamasau bhavate hi jaṃtuḥ || 16 ||
iti śrībhaviṣye mahāpurāṇa uttaraparvaṇi śrīkṛṣṇayudhiṣṭhirasaṃvāde kalyāṇasaptamīvratavarṇanaṃ nāmāṣṭacatvāriṃśo.adhyāyaḥ || 48 || ||9||
śarkarāsaptamīvratavarṇanam
|| śrīkṛṣṇa uvāca || ||
śarkarāsaptamīṃ vakṣye sarvakalmaṣanāśinīm ||
āyurārogyamaiśvaryaṃ yayānaṃtaṃ prajāyate || 1 ||
mādhavasya site pakṣe saptamyāṃ śraddhayānvitaḥ ||
prātaḥ snātvā tilaiḥ śuddhaiḥ śuklamālyānulepanaiḥ || 2 ||
sthaṃḍile padmamālikhya kuṃkumena sakarṇikam ||
tasminnamaḥ savitreti gandhapuṣpaṃ nivedayet||3||
sthāpayedudakuṃbhaṃ ca śarkarāpātrasaṃyutam ||
raktavastraiḥ svalaṃkṛtya śuklamālyānulepanaiḥ || 4 ||
suvarṇāśvasamāyuktaṃ maṃtreṇānena pūjayet ||
viśvedevamayo yasmādvedavādīti paṭhyate || 5 ||
tvamevāmṛtasarvasvamataḥ pāhi sanātana ||
saurasūktaṃ japaṃstiṣṭhetpurāṇaśravaṇena vā || 6 ||
ahorātre gate paścādaṣṭamyāṃ kṛtanityakaḥ ||
sarvaṃ ca vedaviduṣe brāhmaṇāyopapādayet ||7||
bhojayecchaktito viprāñcharkarāghṛtapāyasaiḥ ||
bhuñjīta tailalavaṇaṃ svayamapyatha vāgyataḥ || || 8 ||
anena vidhinā sarvaṃ māsimāsi samācaret ||
vatsarāṃte punardadyādbrāhmaṇāya samāhitaḥ || 9 ||
śayanaṃ vastrasaṃvītaṃ śarkarākalaśānvitam || |
sarvopaskarasaṃyuktaṃ tathaikāṃ gāṃ payasvinīm || 4.49.10 ||
gṛhaṃ ca śaktito dadyātsamastopaskarānvitam ||
sahasreṇāpi niṣkāṇāṃ kṛtvā dadyācchatena vā ||| 11 || daśabhirdvitribhirniṣkaistadardhenāpi bhaktitaḥ ||
suvarṇāśvaḥ pradātavyaḥ pūrvavanmaṃtravācanam || 12 ||
vittaśāṭhyaṃ na kurvīta kurvandoṣānsa maśnute ||
amṛtaṃ pibato vaktrātsūryasyāmṛtabindavaḥ||13||
nipetureta utthāya śālimudgekṣavaḥ smṛtāḥ ||
śarkarā ca paraṃ tasmādikṣurasodbhavā matā||14|| |
iṣṭā raverataḥ puṇyā śarkarā havyakavyayoḥ ||
śarkarāsaptamī caiṣā vājimedhaphalapradā || 15 ||
sarve hyupaśamaṃ yāṃti punaḥ saṃtativarddhinī ||
yaḥ kuryātparayā bhaktyā sa paraṃ brahma gacchati || 16 ||
kalpamekaṃ vasetsvarge tato yāti paraṃ padam || 17 ||
idamanagha śṛṇoti yaḥ smaredvā paripaṭhatīha sureśvarasya loke ||
matimapi ca dadāti yo janānāmamaravadhūjanakinnaraiḥ sa pūjyaḥ || 18 || ||
iti śrībhaviṣye mahāpurāṇa uttaraparvaṇi śrīkṛṣṇa yudhiṣṭhirasaṃvāde śarkarāsaptamīvratavarṇanaṃ nāmaikonapaṃcāśattamo.adhyāyaḥ || 49 || || cha ||
kamalāsaptamīvratavarṇanam
|| śrīkṛṣṇa uvāca || ||
ataḥparaṃ pravakṣyāmi tadvatkamalasaptamīm ||
yasyāḥ saṃkīrtanādeva tuṣyatīha divākaraḥ || 1 ||
vasaṃte.amalasaptamyāṃ snātaḥ sangaurasarṣapaiḥ ||
tilapātre ca sauvarṇaṃ nidhāya kamalaṃ śubham || 2 ||
vastrayugmavṛtaṃ kṛtvā gaṃdhapuṣpairathārcayet||
namaste padmahastāya namaste viśvadhāriṇe||3||
divākara namastubhyaṃ prabhākara namo.astu te ||
tato dvikālavelāyāmudakuṃbhasamanvitam || 4 ||
viprāya dadyātsaṃpūjya vastramālyavibhūṣaṇaiḥ ||
ahorātre gate paścādaṣṭamyāṃ bhojayeddvijān|| 5||
yathāśaktyātha bhuñjīta vimāṃsaṃ tailavarjitam ||
anena vidhinā śuklasaptamyāṃ māsimāsi ca || 6 ||
sarvaṃ samācaredbhaktyā vitta śāṭhyavivarjitaḥ ||
vratāṃte śayanaṃ dadyātsuvarṇakamalānvitam ||7||
gāvaṃ sa dadyācchaktyā tu suvarṇāḍhyāṃ payasvinīm||
bhājanāsanadīpādīndadyādiṣṭānupaskarān || 8 ||
anena vidhinā yastu kuryātkamalasaptamīm ||
lakṣmīmanantāmabhyetya sūryaloke ca modate || 9 ||
kalpekalpe tathā lokānsapta gatvā pṛthakpṛthak ||
apsarobhiḥ parivṛtastato yāti parāṅgatim || 4.50.10 ||
yaḥ paśyatīdaṃ śṛṇuyānmuhūrtaṃ paṭhecca bhaktyā sumatiṃ dadāti ||
so.apyatra lakṣmīmacalāmavāpya gandharvavidyādharalokameti || 11 || ||
iti śrībhaviṣye mahāpurāṇa uttaraparvaṇi śrīkṛṣṇayudhiṣṭhirasaṃvāde kamalāsaptamīvrata varṇanaṃ nāma paṃcāśattamo.adhyāyaḥ || 50 || || cha ||
śubhasaptamīvratavarṇanam
|| śrīkṛṣṇa uvāca || ||
anyāmapi pravakṣyāmi śobhanāṃ śubhasaptamīm ||
yāmupoṣya naro rogācchokaduḥkhātpramucyate || 1 ||
puṇya āśvayuje māsi kṛtasnānaḥ payaḥ śuciḥ ||
vācayeta tato viprānārabhecchubhasaptamīm || 2 ||
kapilāṃ pūjayedbhaktyā gandhamālyānulepanaiḥ ||
namāmi sūryasaṃbhūtāmaśeṣabhuvanālayām || 3 ||
tvāmahaṃ śubhakalyāṇaśarīrāṃ sarvasiddhaye ||
athāhṛtya tilaprasthaṃ tāmrapātreṇa saṃyutam || 4 ||
kāñcanaṃ vṛṣabhaṃ tadvadvastramālyaguḍānvitam ||
dadyādvikālavelāyāmaryamā prīyatāmiti || 5 ||
pañcagavyaṃ ca saṃprāśya svapyādbhūmau vimatsaraḥ ||
tataḥ prabhāte saṃjāte bhaktyā saṃtarpayeddvijān || 6 ||
anena vidhinā dadyānmāsimāsi sadā naraḥ ||
vāsasī vṛṣabhaṃ haimaṃ tadvaddhenostu pūjanam || 7 ||
saṃvatsarāṃte śayanamikṣudaṇḍaguḍānvitam ||
sopadhānakaviśrāmaṃ bhājanāsanasaṃyutam || 8 ||
tāmrapātraṃ tilaprasthaṃ sauvarṇavṛṣasaṃyutam ||
dadyādvedavide sarvaṃ viśvātmā prīyatāmiti || 9 ||
anena vidhinā rājankuryādyaḥ śubhasaptamīm ||
tasya śrīrvimalā kīrtirbha vejanmanijanmani || 4.51.10 ||
apsarogaṇagandharvaiḥ pūjyamānaḥ surālaye ||
vasedgaṇādhipo bhūtvā yāvadābhūtasaṃplavam || 11 ||
sa kalpādavatīrṇastu saptadvīpādhipo bhavet||
brahmahatyāsahasrasya bhrūṇahatyāśatasya ca || 12 ||
nāśaṅkaroti puṇyeyaṃ kṛtā vai śubhasaptamī || 13 ||
imāṃ paṭhedyaḥ śṛṇuyā nmuhūrtaṃ vīkṣeta saṃgādapi dīyamānam ||
so.apyatra saṃbādhya vimuktadehaḥ prāpnoti vidyādharanāyakatvam ||18 || ||
iti śrībhaviṣye mahāpurāṇa uttara parvaṇi śrīkṛṣṇayudhiṣṭhirasaṃvāde śubhasaptamīvratanirūpaṇaṃ nāmaikapaṃcāśattamo.adhyāyaḥ || 51||
snapanasaptamīvratavarṇanam
yudhiṣṭhira uvāca ||
kimudvegādbhavetkṛtyamalakṣmīḥ kena hanyate ||
mṛtavatsādikāryeṣu duḥsvapne ca kimiṣyate || 1 ||
|| śrīkṛṣṇa uvāca || ||
purā kṛtāni pāpāni phalaṃtyatra yudhiṣṭhira||
rogardaurgatyarūpeṇa tathaiveṣṭavighātanaiḥ || 2 ||
tadvighātāya vakṣyāmi sadā kalyāṇasaptamīm ||
saptamīsnapanaṃ nāma vyādhipīḍāvināśanam || 3 ||
bālānāṃ maraṇaṃ yatra kṣīrapānaṃ praśasyate ||
tadvadvṛddhāturāṇāṃ ca yauvane vāpi vartatām ||4||
śāntaye tatra vakṣyāmi mṛtavatsādike ca yat ||
etadevādbhutodvegaciṃtāvibhramamānasam ||5||
varāhakalpe saṃprāpte manorvaivasvateṃ.atare||
kṛte yuge mahārāja haihayo rūpavarddhanaḥ ||6||
āsīnnṛpottamaḥ pūrvaṃ kṛtavīryaḥ pratāpavān ||
sa saptadvīpamakhilaṃ pālayāmāsa bhūtalam ||7||
yāvadvarṣasahasrāṇi saptasaptati bhārata||
jātamātraṃ ca tasyātha śubhaṃ putraśataṃ kila ||8||
yavanasya tu śāpena vināśamagamatpurā ||
kṛtavīryaḥ samārādhya sahasrāṃśuṃ divākaram ||9||
upavāsavratairdivyairvedasūktaiśca bhārata ||
darśayāmāsa cātmānaṃ kṛtavīryasya bhānumat ||4.52.1 0||
kṛtavīryeṇa vai pṛṣṭaḥ provācedaṃ bṛhaspatiḥ ||
atikleśena mahatā putrastava narādhipa ||11||
bhaviṣyati ciraṃjīvī kiṃ tu kalmaṣanāśanam ||
saptamīsnapanaṃ vāpyāṃ kuru pāpavinaṣṭaye || 12 ||
jātasya mṛtavatsāyāḥ saptame māsi bhūpate ||
gṛhatārābalaṃ labdhvā kṛtvā brāhmaṇavācanam ||13||
bālasya janmanakṣatraṃ varjayettāṃ tithiṃ budhaḥ ||
sadvṛddhāturagāṇāṃ tu kṛtaṃ syāditi teṣu ca ||14||
gomayenopaliptāyāṃ bhūmāvekāgracittavān ||
taṃḍulai raktaśāleyairvaruṇākṣīrasaṃyutam ||15||
nirvapetsūryamudgābhyāṃ mātṛbhyopi vidhānataḥ ||
kīrtayetsūryadaivatyaṃ saptārciṣi ghṛtāhutīḥ ||16||
juhuyādrudrasūktena tadvadrudrāya bhārata ||
hotavyāḥ samidhaścātra tatra vārkapalāśajāḥ ||17||
yavakṛṣṇatilairhomaḥ kartavyoṣṭaśataṃ punaḥ ||
hutvā snānaṃ ca kartavyaṃ madhye gāṃgena dhīmatā || 18 ||
vipreṇa vedaviduṣā vidhivaddarbhapāṇinā ||
sthāpayitvā catuṣkoṇe catuṣkuṃbhānpraśobhanān || 19 ||
pañcamaṃ ca punarmadhye cākṣatena vibhūṣitam ||
sthāpayeddarpaṇākrāṃtaṃ saptarṣiṇābhimaṃtritam || 4.52.20 ||
saureṇa tīrthatoyena pūrṇacandramalānvitam ||
sarvānsarvauṣadhiyutānpañcabhaṃgajalānvitān || 21 ||
paṃcaratnaphalairyuktāñchākhābhirapi veṣṭitān || gajāśvarathyārājadvārvalmīkāddhradagokulāt || 22 ||
suśuddhāṃ mṛdamānīya sarveṣveva vinikṣipet ||
caturṣvapi ca kuṃbheṣu ratnagarbheṣu madhyamam || 23 ||
gṛhītvā brāhmaṇaṃ cātra saurānmantrānudīrayet ||
nārībhiḥ saptasaṃkhyābhī rathāṅgāṅābhiratra ca || 24 ||
bhojitābhiryathāśakti mālyavastravibhūṣaṇaiḥ ||
saviprābhiśca kartavyaṃ mṛtavatsābhiṣecanam|| 25 ||
dīrghāyurastu bālo.ayaṃ jīvaputrā ca bhāvinī ||
ādityacandramāsārdhaṃ grahanakṣatramaṇḍalam || 26 ||
śakraḥ salokapālo vai brahmā viṣṇurmaheśvaraḥ ||
ete cānye ca vai devāḥ sadā pāṃtu kumārakam || 27 ||
māśanirmā sa hutabhuṅmā ca bālagrahā kvacit ||
pīḍāṃ kurvaṃtu bālasya mā mātṛjanakasya vai || || 28 ||
tataḥ śuklāmbaradharāḥ kumāraṃ patisaṃyutāḥ ||
saptakaṃ pūjayedbhaktyā puṣpairgandhaiḥ phalaiḥ śubhaiḥ || 29 ||
kāñcanīṃ ca tataḥ kṛtvā tilapātropari sthitām ||
pratimāṃ dharmarājasya gurave vinivedayet || 4.52.30 ||
vastrakāñcanaratnaughairbhakṣyaiḥ saghṛtapāyasaiḥ ||
pūjayedbrāhmaṇāstadvadvittaśāṭhyaṃ vivarjayet ||
bhuktvā ca guruṇā ceyamuccāryā maṃtrasaṃtatiḥ || 31 ||
dīrghāyurastu bālo.ayaṃ yāvadvarṣaśataṃ sukhī ||
yatkiñcidasya duritaṃ tatkṣiptaṃ vaḍa vāmukhe || 32 ||
brahmā rudro viṣṇuḥ skando vāyuḥ śakro hutāśanaḥ ||
rakṣaṃtu sarve duṣṭebhyo varadā yāṃtu sarvadā ||33||
evamādīni cānyāni vadataḥ pūjayedgurūn ||
śaktitaḥ kapilāṃ dattvā praṇipatya visarjayet ||34||
caruṃ ca putrasahitā praṇamya raviśaṃkarau ||
hutaśeṣaṃ tadānīyādādityāya namo.astu te || 35 ||
ayamevādbhutaṃ yogo hyadbhuteṣu ca śasyate ||
karturjanmani vṛkṣāṇāṃ devāntsaṃpūjayettadā ||
śāṃtyarthaṃ śuklasaptamyāmetatkurvanna sīdati || 36 ||
puṇyaṃ pavitramāyuṣyaṃ saptamīsnapanaṃ raviḥ ||
kathayitvā naraśreṣṭha tatraivāṃtaradhīyata || 37 ||
sa cānena vidhānena kārtavīryo.arjuno nṛpaḥ ||
saṃvatsarāṇāmayutaṃ śaśāsa pṛthivīmimām ||38||
ārogyaṃ bhāskārādiccheddhanamiccheddhutāśanāt ||
śaṃkarājjñānamicchettu gatimicchejjanārdanāt || || 39 ||
etanmahāpātakanāśanaṃ syādapyakṣayaṃ vedavidaḥ paṭhaṃti ||
śṛṇoti yaścainamananyacetāstasyāpi siddhiṃ munayo vadaṃti || 4.52.40 ||
iti śrībhaviṣye mahāpurāṇa uttaraparvaṇi śrīkṛṣṇayudhiṣṭhirasaṃvāde snapanasaptamīvratavarṇanaṃ nāma dvipaṃcāśattamo.adhyāyaḥ ||52|| cha ||
acalāsaptamīvratavarṇanam
|| yudhiṣṭhira uvāca ||
adhruveṇa śarīreṇa supakvenāpi kiṃ phalam ||
māghasnānavihīnena yattyaktaṃ yadunandana || 1 ||
prātaḥsnānāsamarthānāṃ śarīraṃ paśya dehinām ||
kiṃ tena vada kartavyaṃ māghe saṃsārabhīruṇā || 2 ||
kāyakleśasahā nāryo na bhavaṃti yadūttama ||
saukumāryaṃ śarīrasya acalatvāttathaiva ca || 3 ||
kathaṃ ca tāḥ surūpāḥ syuḥ subhagāḥ suprajāstathā ||
sukṛtasyeha puṇyasya sarvametatphalaṃ yataḥ || 4 ||
alpāyāsena sumahadyena puṇyamavāpyate ||
strībhirmāghe mama brūhi snānaṃ tattvaṃ ramādhava ||5||
|| śrīkṛṣṇa uvāca || ||
śrūyatāṃ pāṃḍavaśreṣṭha rahasyamṛṣibhāṣitam||
yanmayā kasyacinnoktamacalāsaptamīvratam || || 6 ||
veśyā cendumatī nāma rūpaudāryaguṇānvitā ||
āsītkurukulaśreṣṭha magadhasya vilāsinī || 7 ||
tanumadhyā sujaghanā pīnonnatapayodharā ||
samyagvibhaktāvayavā pūrṇacandranibhānanā || 8 ||
sauṃdaryaṃ saukumāryaṃ ca tasyāḥ kāmena gīyate ||
yasyāḥ saṃdarśanādeva kāmaḥ kāmāturo bhavet ||9||
mūrtiḥ śaśadharasyeva nayanānandakāriṇī ||
vaśīkaraṇavidyeva sarvalokamanoharā || 4.53.10 ||
ekasmindivase prātaḥ sumukhasthitayā tayā ||
ciṃtitā hṛdaye rājantsaṃsārasyānavasthitiḥ || 11 ||
sannimajya jagadidaṃ viṣaye kāyasāgare ||
janmamṛtyujarāgrāhaṃ na kaścidavabuddhyate || 13 ||
apāko bhūtabhāṇḍānāṃ dhātṛśilpivinirmitam ||
svakarmeṃdhanasaṃvītaṃ pacyate bālavahninā || 13 ||
ye yāṃti divasāḥ puṃsāṃ dharmakāmārthavarjitāḥ ||
na te punarihāyāṃti harabhaktā narā yathā || 14 ||
snānaṃ dānaṃ tapo homaḥ svādhyāyaḥ pitṛtarpaṇam ||
yasmindine na kriyate vṛthā sa divaso nṛṇām || || 15 ||
putrāṇāṃ dāragṛhakasamāsaktaṃ hi mānasam||
vṛkīvoraṇamāsādya mṛtyurdvārāya gacchati || 16 ||
ityevaṃ ciṃtayitvā tu veśyā cendumatī tataḥ||
vaśiṣṭhasyāśramaṃ puṇyaṃ jagāma gajagāminī || 17 ||
vaśiṣṭhamṛṣimāsīnaṃ praṇamya vinayāttataḥ ||
kṛtāñjalipuṭā bhūtvā idaṃ vacanamabravīt || 1- ||
|| indumatyuvāca ||
daśasūnāsamaścakrī daśacakrisamo dhvajaḥ ||
daśadhvajasamā veśyā daśaveśyāsamo nṛpaḥ ||19||
mayā na dattaṃ na hutaṃ nopavāso vrataṃ kṛtam ||
bhaktyā na pūjitaḥ śambhuḥ śrito naiko dhanī naraḥ || 4.53.20 ||
sāṃprataṃ vartamānāyā vrataṃ kiṃcidvadasva me ||
yena duḥkhāṃbupāpaughāduttarāmi bhavārṇavāt || 21 ||
etadasyāḥ subahuśaḥ śrutvā dharmaṃ paraṃtapaḥ ||
vaśiṣṭhaḥ kathayāmāsa mahākāruṇiko muniḥ || 22 ||
|| vaśiṣṭha uvāca || ||
māghasya sitasaptamyāṃ sarvakāmaphalapradam ||
tapaḥsaubhāgyajananaṃ snānaṃ tava varānane ||23||
kṛtvā ṣaṣṭhyāmekabhaktaṃ saptamyāṃ niścalaṃ jalam ||
rātryaṃte cālayethāstvaṃ dattvā śirasi dīpakam|| 24 ||
māghasya sitasaptamyāmacalaṃ cālitaṃ mayā ||
jalāmalānāṃ sarveṣāṃ kṛtaṃ na calanaṃ tathā || 25 ||
vaśiṣṭhavacanaṃ śrutvā tasminnahani bhūpate ||
sarvaṃ cakārendumatī snānaṃ dānaṃ yathāvidhi || 26 ||
tryahasnānaprabhāveṇa bhuktvā bhogyānyathepsitān ||
indralokepsaraḥsaṃghe nāyikātvamavāpa sā || 27||
acalāsaptamīsnānaṃ kathitaṃ ca viśāṃpate ||
sarvapāpapraśamanaṃ sukhasaubhāgyavarddhanam || 28 ||
|| yudhiṣṭhira uvāca ||
saptamīsnānamāhātmyaṃ śrutaṃ na ca viśeṣataḥ ||
sāṃprataṃ śrotumicchāmi vidhimaṃtrasamanvitam ||29||
|| śrīkṛṣṇa uvāca || ||
ekabhaktena saṃtiṣṭhetṣaṣṭhyāṃ saṃpūjya bhāskaram ||
saptamyāṃ tu vrajetprātaḥ sugaṃbhīraṃ jalāśayam || 4.53.30 ||
saritsaṃgaṃ taḍāgaṃ ca devakhātamathāpi vā ||
sukhāvagāhasalilaṃ duṣṭasattvairadūṣitam || 31||
paśubhiḥ pakṣibhiścaiva jalajairmatsyakacchapaiḥ ||
na jalaṃ cālyate yāvattāvatsnānaṃ samācaret ||32||
namaste rudrarūpāya rasānāṃ pataye namaḥ ||
varuṇāya namaste.astu harivāsa namo.astu te || 33 ||
yāvajjanma kṛtaṃ pāpaṃ mayā janmasu saptasu ||
tanme rogaṃ ca śokaṃ ca mākarī haṃtu saptamī || 34 ||
jananī sarvabhūtānāṃ saptamī saptasaptike ||
sarvavyādhihare devi namaste ravimaṃḍale || 35 ||
jaloparitaraṃ dīpaṃ snātvā saṃtarpya devatāḥ ||
caṃdanena likhetpadmamaṣṭapatraṃ sakarṇikam ||36||
madhye śarvaṃ sapatnīkaṃ praṇavena tu pūjayet ||
bhānuṃ śakre dale pūjya raviṃ vaiśvānare dale||37||
yāmye vivasvānnairṛtye bhāskarasyeti pūjayet ||
paścime savitā pūjyaḥ pūjyorko vāyunā jale ||38||
saumye sahasrakiraṇaḥ śeṣe sarvātmaneti ca ||
pūjyāḥ praṇavapūrvāstu namaskārāṃtayojitāḥ ||39||
puṣpaiḥ sugandhadhūpaiśca vastreṇācchādya bhāskaram||
visarjayettataḥ paścātsvasthānaṃ gamyatāmiti || 4.53.40 ||
tāmrapātre suvistīrṇe mṛnmaye vā yudhiṣṭhira ||
sthāpayettilacūrṇaṃ ca saghṛtaṃ saguḍaṃ tathā || 41 ||
kāñcanaṃ tālakaṃ kṛtvā hyasiktastilacūrṇakam ||
saṃsthāpya raktavastraistu puṣpairdhūpaistathārcayet || 42 ||
tatastaṃ brāhmaṇe dadyāddattvā maṃtreṇa tālakam ||
ādityasya prasādena prātaḥ snānaphalaṃ bhajet || 43 ||
duṣṭadaurbhāgyaduḥkhebhyo mayā dattaṃ tu tālakam ||
tatastattālakaṃ kṛtvā brāhmaṇāyopapādayet|| 44 ||
saputrapaśubhṛtyāya me.arkoyaṃ prīyatāmiti ||
tato vratopadeṣṭāraṃ pūjayedvastragotilaiḥ || 45 ||
viprānanyānyathāśaktyā pūjayitvā gṛhaṃ vrajet ||
etatte kathitaṃ kāryaṃ rūpasaubhāgyakārakam || 46 ||
acalāsaptamīsnānaṃ sarvakāmaphalapradam || 47 ||
iti paṭhati ya itthaṃ yaḥ śṛṇoti prasaṃgātkalikaluṣaharaṃ vai sapta mīsnānametat || matimapi nayanānāṃ yo dadāti prasaṃgātsurabhavanagato.asau pūjyate devasaṃghaiḥ || 48 || || iti śrībhaviṣye mahāpurāṇa uttaraparvaṇi śrīkṛṣṇayudhiṣṭhirasaṃvāde.acalāsaptamīvratavidhivarṇanaṃ nāma tripaṃcāśattamo.adhyāyaḥ || 53 || || cha ||
budhāṣṭamīvratavarṇanam
|| śrīkṛṣṇa uvāca || ||
budhāṣṭamīvrataṃ bhūyo bravīmi śṛṇu pāṃḍava ||
yena cīrṇena narakaṃ naraḥ paśyati na kvacit || 1 ||
purā kṛtayugasyādau dṛlo rājā babhūva ha ||
bahubhṛtyasuhṛnmitramaṃtribhiḥ parivāritaḥ || 2 ||
jagāma himavatpārśve mahādevena vāritaḥ ||
yo.anyaḥ praviśate bhūmau sā strī bhavati niścitam || 3 ||
sa rājā mṛgasaṃgena prāviśattadumāvane ||
ekākī turagopetaḥ kṣaṇātstrītvaṃ jagāma ha || 4 ||
sā babhrāma vane śūnye pīnonnatapayodharā ||
kuto.ahamāgatetyevaṃ na tvabu dhyata kiṃcana || 5 ||
tāṃ dadarśa budhaḥ saumyāṃ rūpaudāryaguṇānvitām ||
aṣṭamyāṃ budhavāreṇa tasyāstuṣṭo budho grahaḥ || 6 ||
dadhau garbhaṃ tadudare ilāyā rūpatoṣitaḥ ||
putramutpādayāmāsa yo.asau khyātaḥ purūravāḥ || 7 ||
caṃdravaṃśakaro rājā ādyaḥ sarvamahīkṣitām||
tataḥ prabhṛti pūjye yamaṣṭamī budhasaṃyutā || 8 ||
sarvapāpapraśamanī sarvopadravanāśinī ||
athānyadapi te vacmi dharmarāja kathānakam || 9 ||
āsīdrājā videhānāṃ mithilāyāṃ sa vairibhiḥ ||
saṃgrāme nihato vīrastasya bhāryā daridriṇī || 4.54.10 ||
ūrmilā nāma babhrāma mahīṃ bālakasaṃyutā ||
avaṃtī viṣayaṃ prāptā brāhmaṇasya niveśane || 11 ||
cakārodarapūrtyarthaṃ nityaṃ kaṃḍanapeṣaṇe ||
hṛtvā sā stokagodhūmāndadau bālakayostadā || 12 ||
kāruṇyānmātṛvātsalyātkṣudhāsaṃpīḍyamānayoḥ ||
kālena bahunā sādhvī pañcatvamagamacchubhā ||13||
putrastasyā videhāyāṃ gatvā svapiturāsane ||
upaviṣṭaḥ sattvayogādbubhuje gāmanākulaḥ || 14 ||
anviṣya dharmarājño vai sā kanyā mithivaṃśajā ||
vivāhitā hitā bhartuḥ sā mahānāyikā.abhavat || 15 ||
śyāmalā nāma cārvaṃgī prasiddhā śrūyate śrutau ||
tāmuvāca varārohāṃ dharmarājaḥ svayaṃ priyām || 16 ||
vahasva sarvavyāpāraṃ śyāmale tvaṃ gṛhe mama ||
kuru svajanabhṛtyānāṃ dānakṣepaṃ yathepsitam || 17 ||
kiṃ tvete paṃjarāḥ sapta kīlakairatiyaṃtritāḥ ||
kadācidapi noddhāṭyāstvayā vaidehanaṃdini || 18 ||
evamastviti sāpyuktā nijaṃ karma cakāra ha ||
kadācidvyākulībhūte dharmarāje videhajā ||
uddhāṭayitvā prathamaṃ dadarśa jananīṃ svakām|| 19||
sā pacyamānā kraṃdaṃtī bhīṣaṇairyamakiṃkaraiḥ ||
helayā kṣipyate baddhvā taptataile punaḥpunaḥ || 4.54.20 ||
tathaiva tālakaṃ dattvā vrīḍitā sā manasvinī ||
dvitīye paṃjare tadvatsā tāmevaṃ dadarśa ha || 21 ||
sudhāvallipyamānāṃ tāṃ śilātalpeṣṭakena tu ||
tṛtīyapañjare tadvattāṃ dadarśa svamā taram ||
krakacaiḥ pāṭyate mūrdhni ghaṇṭāyuktaiḥ karolbaṇaiḥ || 22 ||
caturthe pañjare sthāne bhīṣaṇairdāruṇānanaiḥ ||
bhakṣyamāṇāṃ śvāpadaiśca kraṃdaṃtīṃ tāṃ punaḥ punaḥ.|| 23 ||
pañcame nihitā bhūmau kaṇṭhe pādena pīḍitā ||
saṃdaṃśairvanaghātaiśca vidīrṇā kriyate ruṣā || 24 ||
ṣaṣṭhe cekṣuyantragatāṃ mastake mudga rāhatām ||
saṃpīḍyamānāmaniśaṃ sudṛḍhāmikṣukhaṃḍavat || 25 ||
saptame pañjare cīrṇasvanāṃ pṛtikagaṃdhinīm ||
dṛṣṭvā tathā gatāṃ tāṃ tu mātaraṃ duḥkha karṣitā ||
śyāmalā mlānavadanā kiṃcinnovāca bhāminī || 26 ||
athāgataṃ yamaṃ prāha saroṣā śyāmalā patim ||
kiṃ tavāpahṛtaṃ rājanmama mātrā sudāruṇam ||
yeneyaṃ vividhairghātairvadhyate bahudhā tvayā || 27 ||
yamaḥ prāha priyāṃ dṛṣṭvā bhadre hyudghāṭitāstvayā ||
ete pañjarakāḥ sapta niṣiddhā tvaṃ mayā purā || 28 ||
tava mātrā sutasnehādgodhūmā ye hṛtāḥ kila ||
kiṃ na jānāsi tadbhadre yena ruṣṭā mamopari || 29 ||
brahmasvaṃ praṇayādbhuktaṃ dahatyāsaptamaṃ kulam||
tadeva cauryarūpeṇa dahatyācaṃdratārakam || 4.54.30 ||
godhūmāsta ime bhūtāḥ kṛmirūpāḥ sudāruṇāḥ ||
ye purā brāhmaṇagṛhe hṛtā stava kṛte.anayā ||31||
|| śyāmalovāca || ||
jānāmi tadahaṃ sarvaṃ yanme mātrā kṛtaṃ purā ||
tathāpi tvāṃ samāsādya sā ca jāmātaraṃ śubham ||
mucyate kṛmirāśitvādyathā tadadhunā kuru || 32 ||
tacchrutvā cintayāviṣṭaściraṃ sthitvā jagāda tām ||
dharmarājaḥ sahāsīnāṃ priyāṃ prāṇadhaneśvarīm || 33 ||
itaśca saptame.atīte janmani brāhmaṇī śubhā ||
āsīstasmiṃstvayā saṃgātsakhīnāṃ paryupāsitā ||
budhāṣṭamī susaṃpūrṇā yathoktaphaladā yinī || 34 ||
tatphalaṃ yaddadāsyasyai satyaṃ kṛtvā mamāgrataḥ ||
tena mucyeta te mātā narakātpāpasaṃkaṭāt || 35 ||
tacchrutvā tvaritaṃ snātvā dadau puṇyaṃ svakaṃ kṛtam ||
svamātuḥ śyāmalā tuṣṭā tena mokṣaṃ jagāma sā || 35 ||
ūrmilā rūpasaṃpannā divyadehadharā śubhā ||
vimānavaramārūḍhā divyamālyāṃbarāvṛtā || 36 ||
bhartuḥ samīpe svargasthā dṛśyate.adyāpi sā janaiḥ ||
budhasya pārśve nabhasi mithirājasamīpataḥ ||
visphuraṃtī mahārāja budhāṣṭamyāḥ prabhāvataḥ || 37 ||
|| yudhiṣṭhira uvāca || ||
yadyevaṃ pravarā kṛṣṇa sā tithirvai budhāṣṭamī ||
tasyā eva vidhiṃ brūhi yadi tuṣṭosi me prabho || 38 ||
|| śrīkṛṣṇa uvāca || ||
śṛṇu pāṃḍava yatnena budhāṣṭamyā vidhiṃ śubham ||
yadāyadā sitāṣṭamyāṃ budhavāro bhavedyadi ||
tadātadā ca sā grāhyā ekabhaktāśanairnṛbhiḥ || 39 ||
snātvā nadyāṃ tu pūrvāhne gṛhītvā kalaśaṃ navam ||
jalapūrṇaṃ tu sadravyaṃ pūrṇapātrasamanvitam || 4.54.40 ||
aṣṭavārānprakartavyā vidhānaistu pṛthakpṛthak ||
prathamā modakaiḥ kāryā dvitīyā pheṇakaistathā || 41 ||
tṛtīyā ghṛtapūpaiśca caturthī vaṭakairnṛpa ||
pañcamī śubhrakāraiśca paṣṭhī sohālakaistathā ||42||
aśokavartibhiḥ śubhraiḥ saptamī khaṃḍasaṃyutaiḥ||
aṣṭamī phalapuṣpaiśca kevalākhaṇḍapheṇikaiḥ ||
evaṃ krameṇa kartavyā suhṛtsvajanabāṃdhavaiḥ ||43||
saha kṛtvā sthitairbhojyaṃ bhoktavyaṃ svasthamānasaiḥ ||
upoṣyāṇāmidaṃ śreṣṭhaṃ kathayadbhiḥ śanaiḥśanaiḥ ||44||
śrutvāṣṭamī budhasyāpi māhātmyaṃ bhojanaṃ tyajet ||
tāvadeva na bhoktavyaṃ kathā yāvatsamāpyate || 45 ||
tathā bhuktvā budhasyāgre ācamya ca punaḥpunaḥ ||
viprāya vedaviduṣe taṃ bruvanpratipādayet || 46 ||
sākṣataṃ sahiraṇyaṃ ca jātarūpamayaṃ śubham ||
arcitaṃ vividhaiḥ puṣpairdhūpadīpaiḥ sugaṃdhibhiḥ ||47 ||
pītavastraiḥ samācchannaṃ budhaṃ somātmajākṛtim ||
māṣakeṇa suvarṇena tadardhārdhena vā punaḥ ||48||
oṃ budhāya namaḥ ||
oṃ somātmajāya namaḥ ||
oṃ durbuddhināśanāya namaḥ ||
oṃ subuddhipradāya namaḥ ||
oṃ tārājātāya namaḥ ||
oṃ saumyagrahāya namaḥ ||
oṃ sarvasaukhyapradāya namaḥ || ete pūjāmantrāḥ ||
aṣṭamī tu yadā pūrṇā tadā rājarṣisattama ||
brāhmaṇānbhojayedaṣṭau gāṃ dadyācca savatsikām ||49||
vastrālaṃkaraṇaiḥ sarvairbhūṣaṇairvividhairapi ||
sapatnīkaṃ samabhyarcya karṇamātrāṃgulīyakaiḥ ||
mantreṇānena kauṃteya dadyādevaṃ samācaran || 4.54.50 ||
budho.ayaṃ pratigṛhṇātu dravyastho.ayaṃ budhaḥ svayam ||
dīyate budharājāya tuṣyatāṃ ca budho mama || 51 || || (iti dānamaṃtra |) || ||
budhaḥ saumyastārakeyo rājaputra ilāpatiḥ ||
kumāro dvijarājasya yaḥ purūravasaḥ pitā || 52 || || ( iti pratigrahaṇamaṃtraḥ |) || durbuddhibādhajanitaṃ nāśayitvā ca me budhaḥ ||
saukhyaṃ ca saumanasyaṃ ca karotu śaśinaṃdanaḥ || 53 ||
ityuccārya gṛhītvā tu dadyānmaṃtrapuraḥsaram ||
saptajanmani rājendra jāto jātismaro bhavet ||54||
dhanadhānyasamāyuktaḥ. putrapautrapravarddhanaḥ ||
dīrṣāyurvipulānbhogānbhuktvā caiva mahītalaṃ || 55 ||
tataḥ sutīrthe maraṇaṃ dhyātvā nārāyaṇaṃ vibhum ||
mṛto.asau svargamāpnoti purandarasamo naraḥ || 56 ||
vasate yāvadāsṛṣṭeḥ punarābhūtasaṃplavam ||
evametanmayā khyātaṃ vratānāmuttamaṃ vratam || 57 ||
eṣaivaṃ ca mayākhyātā guhyā pārtha budhāṣṭamī ||
yāṃ śrutvā brahmahā goghnaḥ sarvapāpaiḥ pramucyate || 58 ||
yaścāṣṭamīṃ budhayutāṃ samavāpya bhaktyā sampūjayedvidhusutaṃ kanapṛṣṭhasaṃ stham || pakvānnapātrasahitaiḥ sahiṇyavastraiḥ paśyedasau yamapuraṃ na kadācideva || 59 ||
iti śrībhaviṣye mahāpurāṇa uttaraparvaṇi śrīkṛṣṇayudhiṣṭhirasaṃvāde budhāṣṭamīvratavarṇanaṃ nāma catuṣpañcāśattamo.adhyāyaḥ || 54 || || cha ||
janmāṣṭamīvarṇanam
|| yudhiṣṭhira uvāca || ||
janmāṣṭamīvrataṃ brūhi vistareṇa mamācyuta ||
kasminkāle samutpannaṃ kiṃ puṇyaṃ ko vidhiḥ smṛtaḥ || 1 ||
|| śrīkṛṣṇa uvāca || ||
hate kaṃsāsure duṣṭe mathurāyāṃ yudhiṣṭhira ||
devakī māṃ pariṣvajya kṛtvotsaṃge ruroda ha || 2 ||
tatraiva raṃgavāḍhena maṃcārūḍhajanotsave ||
mallayuddhe purāvṛtte samete kukurā.andhake || 3 ||
svajanairbaṃdhubhiḥ snigdhaiḥ sastrībhiḥ samāvṛte ||
vasudevo.api tatraiva vātsalyātpraruroda ha || 4 ||
samākṛṣya pariṣvajya putraputretyuvāca ha ||
sagadgadasvaro dīno vāṣpaparyākulekṣaṇaḥ || 5 ||
balabhadraṃ ca māṃ caiva pariṣvajya mudā punaḥ ||
adya me saphalaṃ janma jīvitaṃ yatsujīvitam || 6 ||
yadubhābhyāṃ supu trābhyāṃ samudbhūtaḥ samāgamaḥ ||
evaṃ varṣeṇa dāṃpatye hṛṣṭaṃ puṣṭaṃ tathā hyabhūt || 7 ||
praṇipatya janāḥ sarve babhūvuste praharṣitāḥ ||
evaṃ mahotsavaṃ dṛṣṭvā māmāha sakalo janaḥ || 8 ||
prasādaḥ kriyatāṃ nātha lokasyāsya prasādataḥ ||
yasmindine jagannātha devakī tvāmajījanat || 9 ||
taddine dehi vaikuṃṭhaṃ kurmastetra namonamaḥ ||
samyagbhaktiprapannānāṃ prasādaṃ kuru keśava || 4.55.10 ||
evamukte janaughena vasudevo.ativismitaḥ ||
vilokya balabhadraṃ ca māṃ ca kṛtvā ruroda ha ||
evamastviti lokānāṃ kathayasva yathā tathā ||11||
tataśca piturādeśāttathā janmāṣṭamīvratam ||
mathurāyāṃ janaughāgre pārtha samyakprakāśitam || 12 ||
paurajanā janmadinaṃ varṣevarṣe mamoditam ||
punarjanmāṣṭamīṃ loke kurvaṃtu brāhmaṇādayaḥ ||
kṣatriyā vaiśyajātīyāḥ śūdrā yenye.api dhārmikāḥ || 13 ||
siṃharāśigate sūrye gagane jaladākule ||
māsi bhādrapade.aṣṭamyāṃ kṛṣṇapakṣe.ardharātrake ||
vṛṣarāśisthite candre nakṣatre rohiṇīyute || 14 ||
vasudevena devakyāmahaṃ jāto janāḥ svayam ||
evametatsamākhyātaṃ loke janmāṣṭamīvratam || 15 ||
bhagavatpārśvato rājanbahurūpaṃ mahotsavam ||
mathurāyāstataḥ paścālloke khyātiṃ gamiṣyati ||
śāṃtirastu sukhaṃ cāstu lokāḥ santu nirāmayāḥ || 16 ||
|| yudhiṣṭhira uvāca || ||
tatkīdṛśaṃ vrataṃ deva lokaiḥ sarvairanuṣṭhitam ||
janmāṣṭamīvrataṃ nāma pavitraṃ puruṣottama || 17 ||
yena tvaṃ tuṣṭimāyāsi lokānāṃ prabhura vyayaḥ ||
etanme bhagavanbrūhi prasādānmadhusūdana || 18 ||
|| śrīkṛṣṇa uvāca || ||
pārtha taddivase prāpte daṃtadhāvanapūrvakam ||
upavāsasya niyamaṃ gṛhṇīyādbhaktibhāvitaḥ || 19 ||
