ekenaivopavāsena kṛtena kurunaṃdana ||
sarvajanmakṛtaiḥ pāpairmucyate nātra saṃśayaḥ || 4.55.20 ||
upāvṛttasya pāpebhyo yastu vāso guṇaiḥ saha ||
upavāsaḥ sa vijñeyaḥ sarvabhogavivarjitaḥ || 21 ||
tataḥ snātvā ca madhyāhne nadyādau vimale jale ||
devyāḥ suśobhanaṃ kuryāddevakyāḥ sūtikāgṛham || 22 ||
padmarāgaiḥ patranetrairmaṃḍitaṃ carcitaṃ śubhaiḥ ||
ramyaṃ tu vanamālābhī rakṣāmaṇivibhūṣitam || 23 ||
sarvaṃ gokulavatkāryaṃ gopījanasamākulam ||
ghaṇṭāmardalasaṅgītamāṅgalyakalaśānvitam || 24 ||
yavārdhaṃ svastikā kuḍyaiḥ śaṃkhavāditrasaṃkulam ||
vaddhvāsurā lohakhaḍgaiḥ priyacchāgasamanvitam || 25 ||
dhānye vinyasya musalaṃ rakṣitaṃ rakṣapālakaiḥ ||
ṣaṣṭhyā devyā ca saṃpūrṇairnaivedyairvividhaiḥ kṛtaiḥ || 26 ||
evamādi yathāśeṣaṃ kartavyaṃ sūtikāgṛham ||
etanmadhye pratiṣṭhāpyā sā cāpyaṣṭavidhā smṛtā || 27 ||
kāṃcanī rājatī tāmrī paittalī mṛnmayī tathā ||
dārvī maṇimayī caiva karṇikā likhitātha vā || 28 ||
sarvalakṣaṇasampannā paryaṃke cārddhasuptikā ||
prataptakāṃcanābhāsā mayā saha tapasvinī || 29 ||
prastutā ca prasūtā ca tatkṣaṇācca praharṣitā ||
māṃ cāpi bālakaṃ suptaṃ paryaṃke stanapāyinam || 4.55.30 ||
śrīvatsavakṣasaṃ pūrṇaṃ nīlotpaladala cchavim ||
yaśodā cāpi tatraiva prasūtā varakanyakām || 31 ||
tatra devagṛhaṃ nāgā yakṣavidyādharā narāḥ ||
praṇatāḥ puṣpamālāgravyagrahastāḥ surāsurāḥ || 32 ||
saṃcaraṃta ivākāśe prākārairuditoditaiḥ ||
vasudevo.api tatraiva khaḍgacarmadharaḥ sthitaḥ || 33 ||
kaśyapo vasudevoyamaditi ścāpi devakī ||
balabhadraḥ śeṣanāgo yaśodādityajāyata || 34 ||
nandaḥ prajāpatirdakṣo gargaścāpi caturmukhaḥ ||
eṣovatāro rājendra kaṃso.ayaṃ kālanemijaḥ || 35 ||
tatra kaṃsaniyuktā ye dānavā vividhāyudhāḥ ||
te ca prāhārikāḥ sarve suptā nidrāvimohitāḥ || 36 ||
godhenukuñjarāścāsya dānavāḥ śastrapāṇayaḥ ||
nṛtyaṃtyapsaraso hṛṣṭā gaṃdharvā gītatatparāḥ || 37 ||
lekhanīyaśca tatraiva kāliyo yamunāhrade ||
ramyamevaṃ vidhiṃ kṛtvā devakīṃ navasūtikām || 38 ||
tāṃ pārtha pūjayedbhaktyā gandhapuṣpākṣataiḥ phalaiḥ ||
kūṣmāṇḍairnālikeraiśca kharjūrairdāḍimīphalaiḥ || 39 ||
bījapūraiḥ pūgaphalairllakucaistrapusaistathā ||
kāladeśodbhavairmuṣṭaiḥ puṣpaiścāpi yudhiṣṭhira || 4.55.40 ||
dhyātvāvatāraṃ prāguktaṃ maṃtreṇānena pūjayet || 41 ||
gāyadbhiḥ kinnarādyaiḥ satataparivṛtā veṇuvīṇāninādairbhṛṅgārādarśakumbhapramarakṛtakaraiḥ sevyamānā munīndraiḥ ||
paryaṃke svāstṛte yā muditataramanāḥ putriṇī samyagāste sā devī devamātā jayati suvadanā devakī kāṃtarūpā || 42 ||
pādāvabhyaṃjayaṃtīṃ śrīrdevakyāścaraṇāṃtike ||
niṣaṇṇā paṅkaje pūjyā namo devyai ca maṃtrataḥ ||43||
oṃ devakyai namaḥ || oṃ vasudevāya namaḥ ||
oṃ balabhadrāya namaḥ || oṃ śrīkṛṣṇāya namaḥ ||
oṃ subhadrāyai namaḥ || oṃ nandāya namaḥ|| oṃ yaśodāyai namaḥ ||
evamādīni nāmāni samuccārya pṛthakpṛthak ||
pūjayeyurdvijāḥ sarve strīśūdrāṇāmamaṃtrakam || 44||
vidhyaṃtaramapīcchaṃti kecidatra dvijottamāḥ ||
candrodaye śaśāṅkāya arghyaṃ dadyāddhariṃ smaret || 45 ||
anaghaṃ vāmanaṃ śauriṃ vaikuṃṭhaṃ puruṣottamam ||
vāsudevaṃ hṛṣīkeśaṃ mādhavaṃ madhusūdanam || 46 ||
vārāhaṃ puṇḍarīkākṣaṃ nṛsiṃhaṃ brāhmaṇapriyam ||
dāmodaraṃ padmanābhaṃ keśavaṃ garuḍadhvajam || 47 ||
govindamacyutaṃ kṛṣṇamanaṃtamaparājitam ||
adhokṣajaṃ jagadbījaṃ sargasthityaṃtakāraṇam || 48 ||
anādinidhanaṃ viṣṇuṃ trailokyeśaṃ trivikramam ||
nārāyaṇaṃ caturbāhuṃ śaṃkha cakragadādharam || 49 ||
pītāṃbaradharaṃ nityaṃ vanamālāvibhūṣitam ||
śrīvatsāṅkaṃ jagatsetuṃ śrīdharaṃ śrīpatiṃ harim || 4.55.50 ||
yogeśvarāya yogeśabhavāya yogapataye govindāya namonamaḥ || (iti snāna maṃtraḥ ||) yajñeśvarāya yajñasaṃbhavāya yajñapataye govindāya namonamaḥ || 51 ||
ityanulepanārghyādyarcanadhūpamaṃtraḥ ||
viśvāya viśveśvarāya viśvasaṃbhavāya viśvapataye govindāya namonamaḥ || 52 || ( iti naivedyamaṃtraḥ ||)
dharmeśvarāya dharmapataye dharmasaṃbhavāya govindāya namonamaḥ || 53 || (iti dīpāsanamaṃtraḥ ||)
kṣīrodārṇavasaṃbhūta atrinetrasamudbhava ||
gṛhāṇārghyaṃ śaśāṃkendo rohiṇyā sahito mama || 54 ||
sthaṃḍile sthāpayeddevaṃ sacandrāṃ rohiṇīṃ tathā ||
devakīṃ vasudevaṃ ca yaśodāṃ nandameva ca || 55 ||
baladevaṃ tathā pūjya sarvapāpaiḥ pramucyate ||
arddharātre vasorddhārāṃ pātayedguḍasarpiṣā ||56||
tato varddhāpanaṃ ṣaṣṭhīnāmādikaraṇaṃ mama ||
kartavyaṃ tatkṣaṇādrātrau prabhāte navamīdine ||57||
yathā mama tathā kāryo bhagavatyā mahotsavaḥ ||
brāhmaṇānbhojayecchaktyā tebhyo dadyācca dakṣiṇām || 58 ||
hiraṇyaṃ kāñcanaṃ gāvo vāsāṃsi kusumāni ca ||
yadyadiṣṭatamaṃ tattatkṛṣṇo me prīyatāmiti || 59 ||
yamevaṃ devakī devī vasudevādajījanat ||
bhaumasya brahmaṇo guptyai tasmai brahmātmane namaḥ || 4.55.60 ||
sujanmavāsudevāya gobrāhmaṇahitāya ca ||
śāntirastu śivaṃ cāstu ityuktvā tu visarjayet || 61 ||
evaṃ yaḥ kurute devyā devakyāḥ sumahotsavam ||
varṣevarṣe bhagavato madbhakto dharmanandana || 62 ||
naro vā yadi vā nārī yathoktaphalamāpnuyāt|| 63 ||
putrasaṃtānamārogyaṃ dhanadhānyādisadgṛham ||
śālīkṣuyavasaṃpūrṇamaṇḍalaṃ sumanoharam || 64 ||
tasminrāṣṭre prabhurbhuṃkte dīrghāyurmanasepsitān ||
paracakrabhayaṃ nāsti tasmi nrājye.api pāṇḍava || 65 ||
parjanyaḥ kāmavarṣī syādītibhyo na bhayaṃ bhavet ||
yasmingṛhe pāṃḍuputra kriyate devakīvratam || 66 ||
na tatra mṛta niṣkrāṃtirna garbhapatanaṃ tathā ||
na ca vyādhibhayaṃ tatra bhavediti matirmama || 67 ||
na vaidyajanasaṃyogo na cāpi kalaho gṛhe ||
saṃparkeṇāpi yaḥ kaścitkuryājjanmāṣṭamīvratam ||
viṣṇulokamavāpnoti so.api pārtha na saṃśayaḥ || 68 ||
janmāṣṭamī janamanonayanābhirāmā pāpāpahā sapadi naṃditanaṃdagopā ||
yo devakīṃ sadayitāṃ yajatīha tasyāṃ putrānavāpya samupaiti padaṃ sa viṣṇoḥ || 69 || iti śrībhaviṣpe mahāpurāṇa uttaraparvaṇi śrīkṛṣṇayudhiṣṭhirasaṃvāde janmāṣṭamīvratavarṇanaṃ nāma paṃcapaṃcāśattamo.adhyāyaḥ || 55 || cha ||
dūrvāṣṭamīvratavarṇanam
|| śrīkṛṣṇa uvāca || ||
śukle bhādrapadasyaiva pakṣe.aṣṭamyāṃ yudhiṣṭhira ||
pūrvāṣṭamīvrataṃ puṇyaṃ yaḥ kuryācchraddhayānvitaḥ || 1 ||
na tasya kṣayamāpnoti saṃtānaṃ saptaṣauruṣam ||
naṃdate varddhate nityaṃ yathā pūrvaṃ tathā kulam || 2 ||
|| yudhiṣṭhira uvāca || ||
kuta eṣā samutpannā dūrvā kasmāccirāyuṣā ||
kasmācca sā pavitrā ca lokanātha bravīhi me||3||
|| śrīkṛṣṇa uvāca ||
kṣīrodasāgare pūrvaṃ mathyamāne.amṛtārthinā ||
viṣṇunā bāhujaṃghābhyāṃ yaddhṛto mandaro giriḥ || 4 ||
bhramito vai sa vegena romaṇyuddharṣitāni vai ||
tānyetāni jalormībhirutkṣiptāni tadarṇavāt || 5 ||
ajāyata śubhā dūrvā ramyā haritaśādvalā ||
evameṣā samutpannā dūrvā vidhu tanūruhā || 6 ||
tasyāścopari vinyastaṃ mathitāmṛtamuttamam ||
devadānavagandharvairyakṣavidyādharaistathā || 7 ||
tatrāpyamṛtakuṃbhasya peturnniṣyaṃdabiṃdavaḥ ||
tairiyaṃ spṛṣṭamātrābhūddūrvā rasyā.ajarā.amarā || 8 ||
vaṃdyā pavitrā devaistu vaṃditābhyarcitā purā ||
aṣṭamyāṃ phalapuṣpaistu kharjūrairnnālikerakaiḥ || 9 ||
drākṣākṣoṭakapitthaiśca barbarairlakucaistathā ||
nāriṃgairjaṃbukairāmrairbījapūraiśca dāḍimaiḥ || 4.56.10 ||
dadhyakṣataiḥ supuṣpaiśca dhūpanaivedyadīpakaiḥ ||
maṃtreṇānena rājendra śṛṇu ṣvāvahitena ca || 11 ||
tvaṃ dūrve.amṛtajanmāsi vaṃditā ca surāsuraiḥ ||
saubhāgyaṃ saṃtatiṃ kṛtvā sarvakāryakarī bhava || 12 ||
yathā śākhāpraśākhābhirvistṛtāsi mahītale ||
tathā mamāpi saṃtānaṃ dehi tvamajarāmare || 13 ||
evameṣā purā pārtha pūjitā tridaśottamaiḥ ||
teṣāṃ patnīvadhūbhiśca bhaginībhi stathaiva ca || 14 ||
pūjitābhyarhitā vācā gauryā rājañchriyā tathā ||
martyaloke vedavatyā damayaṃtyāpi sītayā || 15 ||
sukeśyā ca ghṛtācyā ca raṃbhayā ca sukeśayā ||
sahanyā kāmakaṃdanyā menakorvaśikādibhiḥ || 16 ||
strībhirevārcitā dūrvā saubhāgyasukhadāyinī ||
snātābhiḥ śuci vastrābhiḥ sakhībhiḥ sasuhṛjjanaiḥ || 17 ||
dattvā dānāni viprebhyaḥ phalaṃ dattvārcayetprabhoḥ ||
tilapiṣṭakagodhūmasaptadhānyāni pāṃḍava || 18 ||
bhakṣayitvā suhṛnmitrasaṃbaṃdhisvajane tathā ||
yā nāryo vicariṣyaṃti vratametatpurātanam || 19 ||
dūrvāṣṭamīti vikhyātaṃ puṇyaṃ saṃtānakārakam ||
tāḥ sarvāḥ sukhasaubhāgyaputrapautrādibhistathā || 4.56.20 ||
martye loke ciraṃ sthitvā tataḥ svargaṃ gatāḥ punaḥ ||
devairānaṃditāstatra bhartṛbhiḥ saha bāṃdhavaiḥ || 21 |||
vasaṃti ramamāṇastā yāvadābhūtasaṃplavam || 22 ||
meghāvṛteṃbaratale harite vanāṃte yā sāṣṭamī śubhaphalā saphalā nabhasye || dūrvāphalākṣatatilaiḥ pratipūjya yoṣiddūrveva vṛddhimupayāti sutaiḥ suhṛdbhiḥ || 23 || ||
iti śrībhaviṣye mahāpurāṇa uttaraparvaṇi śrīkṛṣṇayudhiṣṭhirarasaṃvāde dūrvāṣṭamīvratavarṇanaṃ nāma ṣaṭpaṃcāśattamo.adhyāyaḥ || 56 || cha ||

kṛṣṇāṣṭamīvratavarṇanam
|| śrīkṛṣṇa uvāca || ||
kṛṣṇāṣṭamīvrataṃ pārtha śṛṇu pāpabhayāpaham ||
dharmasaṃjananaṃ loke rudraprītikaraṃ param || 1 ||
māsi mārgaśire prāpte daṃtadhāvanapūrvakam ||
upavāsasya niyamaṃ kuryānnaktasya vā punaḥ || 2 ||
aśaktaśaktabhedena gṛhānniṣkramya bāhyataḥ ||
kṛṣṇāṣṭamyāṃ varṣamekaṃ guruṃ pṛṣṭvā vicakṣaṇaḥ || 3 ||
brahmacārī jitakrodhaḥ śivārcanajape rataḥ ||
tato.aparāhṇasamaye snātvā nadyāṃ viśuddhadhīḥ || || 4 ||
śivaliṅgaṃ samabhyarcya sumanobhiḥ sugaṃdhibhiḥ ||
gugguluṃ ca śubhaṃ dagdhvā dadyānnaivedyamuttamam || 5 ||
tato devasya purato homaṃ kuryāttilai rguru ||

mārgaśīrṣe śubhe māsi śaṃkarāyeti pūjayet || 6 ||
gomūtraprāśanaṃ kṛtvā svapyādbhūmau tato niśi ||
atirātrasya yajñasya phalamāpnoti mānavaḥ || 7 ||
evaṃ puṣyepi saṃpūjya śaṃbhuṃ nāma maheśvaram ||
kṛṣṇāṣṭamyāṃ ghṛtaṃ prāśya vājapeyaphalaṃ bhajet || 8 ||
māghe māheśvaraṃ nāma kṛṣṇāṣṭamyāṃ prapūjayet ||
niśi pītvā gavāṃ kṣīraṃ gomedhāṣṭakamāpnuyāta || 9 ||
phālgune ca mahādevaṃ saṃpūjya prāśayettilān ||
rājasūyasya yajñasya phalamaṣṭaguṇaṃ bhajet || 4.57.10 ||
caitre ca sthāṇunāmānaṃ kṛṣṇāṣṭamyāṃ śivaṃ yajet ||
yavāhārośvamedhasya yajñasya phalamāpnuyāt || 11 ||
vaiśākhe śivanāmānamiṣṭvā rātrau kuśodakam ||
pītvā puruṣamedhasya phalaṃ daśaguṇaṃ bhajet || 12 ||
jyeṣṭhe paśupatiṃ pūjya gavāṃ śṛṅgodakaṃ pibet ||
gavāṃ lakṣapradānasya naraḥ phalamavāpnuyāt || 13 ||
āṣāḍhe cogranāmānamiṣṭvā saṃprāśya gomayam ||
varṣāṇāṃ niyutaṃ sāgraṃ rudraloke mahīyate ||14||
śrāvaṇe śarvanāmānamiṣṭvārkaṃ niśi bhakṣayet ||
bahusvarṇasya yajñasya naraḥ phalamavāpnuyāt || 15 ||
māsi bhādrapade.aṣṭamyāṃ tryaṃbakaṃ nāma pūjayet ||
bilvapatraṃ niśi prāśya annadīkṣāphalaṃ bhajet || 16 ||
bhavanāmāśvine pūjyaḥ prāśayettaṃḍulodakam ||
pauṇḍarīkasya yajñasya phalaṃ śataguṇaṃ bhajet || 17 ||
kārtike rudranāmānaṃ saṃpūjya prāśayeddadhi ||
agniṣṭomasya yajñasya phalaṃ prāpnoti mānavaḥ || 18 ||
abdāṃte bhojayedviprāñchivabhaktiparāyaṇān ||
pāyasaṃ madhu saṃyuktaṃ ghṛtena samabhiplutam ||
śaktyā hiraṇyavāsāṃsi bhaktyā tebhyo nivedayet ||19||
satilā kṛṣṇakalaśā bhakṣyabhojyena saṃyutāḥ ||
dvādaśātra pradātavyāśchatropānadyugānvitā ||
nivedayati rudrāṇāṃ gāṃ ca kṛṣṇāṃ payasvinīm || 4.57.20 ||
varṣamekaṃ caredevaṃ nairantaryyeṇa yo naraḥ ||
kṛṣṇāṣṭamīvrataṃ bhaktyā tasya puṇyaphalaṃ śṛṇu || 21 ||
sarvapāpavinirmuktaḥ sarvaiśvaryasamanvitaḥ ||
modate bhūpavannityaṃ martyaloke śataṃ samāḥ || 22 ||
anena vidhinā devāḥ sarve devatvamāgatāḥ ||
devī devītvamāpannā guhaḥ skaṃdatvamāgataḥ || 23 ||
brahmā brahmatvamāpanno hyahaṃ viṣṇutvamāgataḥ ||
indraśca devarājatvaṃ gāṇapatyaṃ gaṇo gataḥ || 24 ||
nārī vā puruṣo vāpi kṛtvā kṛṣṇāṣṭamīvratam ||
akhaṃḍitaṃ mahārāja puṇyaṃ prāpnotyanuttamam || 25 ||
sūryakoṭipratīkāśairvimānaiḥ sarvakāmikaiḥ ||
rudrakanyāsamākīrṇairhaṃsasārasasaṃyutaiḥ || 26 ||
nṛtyavāditrasaṃyuktairutkṛṣṭadhvanināditaiḥ ||
dodhūyamānaścamaraiḥ stūyamānaḥ surāsuraiḥ || 27 ||
trinetraḥ śūlapāṇiśca śivaiśvaryasamanvitaḥ ||
āste śivapure tāvadyāvatkalpeṣu cāṣṭakam || 28 ||
ityetatte samākhyātaṃ pārtha kṛṣṇāṣṭamīvratam ||
yacchrutvā sarvapāpebhyo mucyate nātra saṃśayaḥ || 29 ||
kṛṣṇāṣṭamīvratamidaṃ śivabhāvitātmā satyāśanairuditanāmayutairupoṣya ||
kṛṣṇāndadāti kalaśānsatilānnayuktānyosau prayāti padamuttamamindumauleḥ || 4.57.30 ||
iti śrībhaviṣye mahāpurāṇa uttaraparvaṇi śrīkṛṣṇayudhiṣṭhirasaṃvāde kṛṣṇāṣṭamīvratavarṇanaṃ nāma saptapañcāśattamo.adhyāyaḥ || 57 || cha ||
anaghāṣṭamīvratavarṇanam
|| śrīkṛṣṇa uvāca || ||
brahmaputro mahātejā atrirnāma mahānṛṣiḥ ||
tasya patnī mahābhāga anasūyā pativratā || 1 ||
tayoḥ kālena mahatā jātaḥ putro mahā tapāḥ ||
datto nāma mahāyogī viṣṇoraṃśo mahītale || 2 ||
dvitīyo nāma lokesminnanaghaśceti viśrutaḥ ||
tasya bhāryā nadī nāma babhūva sahacāriṇī || 3 ||
aṣṭaputrā jīvavatsā sarvabrāhmaguṇairvṛtā ||
anayorviṣṇurūpeṇa lakṣmīścaiva nadī smṛtā || 4 ||
evaṃ tasya sabhāryasya yogābhyāsaratasya vā ||
ājagmuḥ śaraṇaṃ devāḥ śuṃbhadaityena pīḍitāḥ || 5 ||
brahmalabdhaprasādena drutaṃ gatvāmarāvatīm ||
saṃruddhāṃ jaṃbhadaityena divyavarṣaśataṃ nṛpa || 6 ||
daityadānavasaṃyoge pātālādetya bhārata ||
tasya sainyamasaṃkhyeyaṃ daityadānavarākṣasaiḥ || 7 ||
tena nirṇāśitā devāḥ seṃdracaṃdramarudgaṇāḥ ||
tyājitāḥ svāni dhiṣṇyāni tyaktvā jagmurdiśo daśa || 8 ||
agrataḥ pralayaṃ yāṃtaḥ sendrā devā bhayārditāḥ ||
pṛṣṭhatonu vrajaṃti sma daityā jaṃbhapuraḥsarāḥ || 9 ||
yudhyaṃtaḥ śarasaṃghātairgadāmusalamudgaraiḥ ||
nardanto vṛṣabhārūḍhāḥ kecinmahiṣavāhanāḥ || 4.58.10 ||
śarabhairgaṃḍakairvyāghrairvānarai rabhasairdrutāḥ ||
muñcanto yāṃti pāṣāṇācchataghnīstomarāñcharān || 11 ||
yāvadvindhyagiriṃ prāptāstattasyāśramamaṇḍalam ||
anaghaścānadī caiva dāṃpatyaṃ yatra tiṣṭhati || 12 ||
tayoḥ samīpaṃ saṃprāptāste narāḥ śaraṇārthinaḥ ||
anagho.api ca tāndevā~mllīlayaiva savāsavān || 13 ||
abhyaṃtare praviśyātha tiṣṭhadhvaṃ vigatajvarāḥ ||
tatheti nāma te kṛtvā sarve tuṣṭiṃ samāsthitāḥ || 14 ||
daityā api drutaṃ prāptā ghnaṃtaḥ praharaṇairarīn ||
ityūcurulbaṇā ghorā gṛhṇīdhvaṃ brāhmaṇīṃ muneḥ || 15 ||
drutaṃ drumānākṣipadhvaṃ puṣpopagaphalopagān ||
athāropyānaghaṃ mūrdhni daityā jagmustadāśramān || 16 ||
tatkṣaṇāccāpi daityānāṃ śrīrbabhūva śirogatā ||
dattakenāpi te dṛṣṭā naṣṭā dhyānāgninā kṣaṇāt ||
nistejaso babhūvurhiḥ niḥśrīkā madapaṃḍitāḥ ||17||
devairapi gṛhītāste daityāśca haraṇe raṇe ||
rudaṃtī nistanaṃtaśca niśceṣṭā brahmakaṃṭakāḥ ||18||
ṛṣṭibhiḥ karaṇaiḥ śūlaistriśūlaiḥ parighairghanaiḥ ||
evaṃ te pralayaṃ jagmustatprabhāvānmunestadā || 19 ||
asurā devaśastraughairjitā indreṇa ghātitāḥ ||
devā api svarāṣṭreṣu tasthuḥ sarve yathā purā ||
surairapi munestasya devarṣermahimā.abhavat || 4.58.20 ||
tataḥ sa sarvalokānāṃ bhavāya satatotthitaḥ ||
karmaṇā manasā vācā śubhānyeva samācarat || 21 ||
kāṣṭhakuḍayaśilābhūta ūrdhvabāhurmahātapāḥ ||
brahmottaraṃ nāma tapastepe suniyatavataḥ || 22 ||
netre hyanimiṣe kṛtvā bhruvormadhye vilokayan ||
trīṇi varṣasahasrāṇi divyānīti hi naḥ śrutam || 23 ||
tathorddhvaretasastasya sthitasyānimiṣasya hi ||
yogābhyāsaprayatnasya māhiṣmatyāḥ patiḥ prabhuḥ || 24 ||
ekāhāddrutamabhyetya kārtavīryorjuno nṛpaḥ ||
śuśrūṣāṃ vinayaṃ cakre divārātramataṃdritaḥ || 25 ||
gātrasaṃvāhanaṃ pūjāṃ manasā ciṃtitaṃ tathā ||
sampūrṇe niyame vṛtte dṛḍhatuṣṭyā samanvitaḥ || 26 ||
tasyai dadau varānpuṣṭāṃścaturo bhūritejasaḥ ||
pūrvaṃ bāhusahasraṃ tu sa vavre prathamaṃ varam || 27 ||
adharmāddhīyamānasya sadbhistasmānnivāraṇam ||
dharmeṇa pṛthivīṃ jitvā dharmeṇaivānupālanam || 28 ||
saṃgrāmānsubahūñjitvā hatvā vīrānsahasraśaḥ ||
saṃgrāme yudhyamānasya vadho me syāddhareḥ karāt || 29 ||
tena dattena loke.asmindattaṃ rājyaṃ mahītale ||
kārtavīryāya kauṃteya yogābhyāsaḥ savistaraḥ 1||
cakravartipadaṃ caiva aṣṭasiddhisamanvitam || 4.58.30 ||
tenāpi pṛthivī kṛtsnā saptadvīpā saparvatā ||
sasamudrākaravatī dharmeṇa vidhinā jitā || 31 ||
tasya bāhusahasraṃ tu prabhāvātkila dhīmataḥ ||
yāgādratho dhvajaścaiva prādurbhavati māyayā || 32 ||
daśayajñasahasrāṇi teṣu dvīpeṣu saptasu ||
nirargalāni vṛttāni svayaṃ vai tasya pāṃḍava || 33 ||
sarve yajñā mahābāho prasannā bhūridakṣiṇāḥ ||
sarve kāñcanavedikyāḥ sarve yūpaiśca kāñcanaiḥ || 34 ||| sarvadevairmahābhāgairvimānasthairalaṃkṛtāḥ ||
gaṃdharvairapsarobhiśca nityamevopaśobhitāḥ || 35 ||
tasya yajñe jagurgāthāṃ gaṃdharvā nāradastathā ||
caritaṃ rājasiṃhasya mahimānaṃ nirīkṣya te || 36 ||
na nūnaṃ kārtavīryasya gatiṃ yāsyanti pārthivāḥ ||
yajñairdānaistapobhirvā vikrameṇa śrutena ca || 37 ||
dvīpeṣu saptasu sa vai khaḍgacarmaśarāsanī ||
vyacaracchyenavadyo vai dūrādārādavaikṣata || 38 ||
anaṣṭadravyatā cāsya na śoko na ca vai klamaḥ ||
prabhāveṇa mahīrājorakṣaddharmeṇa ca prajāḥ || 39 ||
pañcāśītisahasrāṇi varṣāṇāṃ vai narādhipa ||
samudravasanāyāṃ sa cakravartī babhūva ha || 4.58.40 ||
sa eva paśupālobhūtkṣetrapālaḥ sa eva ca ||
sa eva vṛṣṭyāṃ parjanyo yogitvādarjuno.abhavat || 41 ||
sa vai bāhusahasreṇa jyāghātakaṭhinatvacā ||
vāti raśmisahasreṇa kṣobhyamāṇe mahodadhau || 42 ||
na hi nāgamanuṣyaistu māhipmatyāṃ mahādyutiḥ ||
karkoṭāheḥ sutāñjitvā puri tatra nyaveśayat || 43 ||
sa vai patnīṃ samudrasya prāvṛṭkāleṃbujekṣaṇām ||
krīḍate ca madonmattaḥ pratisrotaścakāra ha || || 44 ||
lalitaṃ krīḍatā tena phalaniṣpandamālinī ||
ūrmībhrukuṭimatyeva śaṃkitāsyeti narmadā || 45 ||
tasya bāhusahasreṇa kṣobhyamāṇe mahodadhau ||
bhavaṃtyālīnaniśceṣṭāḥ pātālasthā mahāsurāḥ || 46 ||
tūṣṇīkṛto mahābhāga līnāhīnamahāmatiḥ ||
cakārottuṅgakṣubdhormi doḥsahasreṇa sāgaram || 47 ||
krāṃtā niścalamūrddhāno babhūvuśca mahoragāḥ ||
sāyāhne kadalīkhaṇḍānnirdhā(rghā)tanihatā iva ||
jitā dhanurdharāḥ sarve sutyaktaiḥ pañcabhiḥ śaraiḥ || 48 ||
laṅkādhipaṃ mohayitvā sabalaṃ rāvaṇaṃ balāt ||
nirjitya vaśamānīya māhiṣmatyāṃ babaṃdha ca || 49 ||
tatobhyetya pulastyastu arjunaṃ saṃprasādayan ||
mumoca rakṣaḥ paulastyaṃ paulastyenānugāminā ||
tasya bāhusahasrasya babhūva jyātalasvanaḥ || 4.58.50 ||
kṣudhitena kadācitsa prārthitaścitrabhānunā ||
saptadvīpāṃ citrabhānoḥ prādādbhikṣāṃ mahīmimām || 51 ||
kuṃḍeśayastato.adyāpi dṛśyate bhagavānhariḥ ||
niṃbādityaśca pratyakṣo jāgratsaṃstasya veśmani ||
babhūva duhiturhetoḥ śarado.adyāpi tiṣṭhati || 52 ||
sa evaṃ guṇasaṃyukto rājābhūdarjuno bhuvi ||
anaghasya prasādena yogācā ryasya pāṃḍava || 53 ||
teneyaṃ varalabdhena kārtavīryeṇa yoginā ||
pravartitā martyaloke prasiddhā hyanaghāṣṭamī || 54 ||
aghaṃ pāpaṃ smṛtaṃ loke taccāpi trividhaṃ bhavet ||
yasmādaghaṃ nāśayati tenāsāvanaghā smṛtā || 55 ||
tasyāṣṭaguṇamaiśvaryaṃ vinodārthaṃ vibhāvyate ||
aṇimā mahimā prāptiḥ prākāmye laghimā tathā || 56 ||
īśitvaṃ ca vaśitvaṃ ca sarvakāmāvasāyitā ||
ityaṣṭau yogasiddhasya siddhayo mokṣalakṣaṇāḥ || 57 ||
samutpannā dattakasya loke pratyayakārakāḥ ||
yātrāsamāptau saṃgṛhya yadaghāni tathaiva vā || 58 ||
jagatsamastamanaghaṃ kuryādasmādato.anaghā ||
madaṃśo madgataprāṇo loke sminnṛtako dvijaḥ || 59 ||
|| yudhiṣṭhira uvāca || ||
kīdṛśaṃ puṇḍarīkākṣa sa vai rājārjuno vratam ||
cakre vā triṣu lokeṣu kairmantraiḥ samayaiśca kaiḥ ||
kasminkāle tithau kasyāmetanme vada keśava || 4.58.60 ||
|| śrīkṛṣṇa uvāca || ||
kṛṣṇāṣṭamyāṃ mārgaśīrṣe daṃpatī darbhanirmitau ||
anaghaṃ cānaghāṃ caiva bahuputraiḥ samanvitām || 61 ||
purā kṛtīkṛtau śāṃtau bhūmibhāge sthitau śubhau ||
snātvaivamarcayetpuṣpaiḥ sasugandhairyudhiṣṭhira || 62 ||
ṛgvedoktaṛcā vipro viṣṇuṃ dhyātvā mamāṃśajam ||
anaghaṃ vāsudevenānaghāṃ lakṣmīṃ vrajāṃ tanum ||
pradyumnādiputravargaṃ harivaṃśe yathoditam || 63
oṃ ato devā avaṃtu no yato viṣṇurvicakrame ||
pṛthivyāḥ saptadhāmabhiḥ ||
idaṃ viṣṇurvicakrame tredhā nidadhe padam ||
samū,lhamasyapāṃsure ||
trīṇi padā vicakrame viṣṇurgopā adābhyaḥ ||
ato dharmāṇi dhārayan ||
viṣṇoḥ karmāṇi paśyata yato vratāni paspaśe ||
iṃdrasya yujyaḥ sakhā ||
tadviṣṇoḥ paramaṃ padaṃ sadā paśyaṃti sūrayaḥ ||
divīva cakṣurātatam||
tadviprāso vipanyavo jāgṛvāṃsaḥ samiṃdhate ||
viṣṇoryatparamaṃ padam ||
lokodbhavaiḥ phalaiḥ kandaiḥ śṛṃgārairbadaraiḥ śubhaiḥ ||
vittaiśca dhānyaiḥ puṣpaiśca gaṃdhadhūpaiḥ sadīpakaiḥ || 64 ||
yaḥ pūjayedbhaktiyuktaḥ sarvapāpaiḥ pramucyate ||
tato dvijānbhojayecca suhṛtsaṃbaṃdhibāṃdhavān || 65 ||
vratāvasāne gṛhṇīyātkaścideko naro vratam ||
teṣāṃ madhye dṛḍhāścakruranaghavratapāragāḥ || 66 ||
idaṃ jīvanaghātī cetsatyaṃ tu samayoṣitam ||
varṣamekaṃ tataḥ svecchā idaṃ tavānaghavratam || 67 ||
tatropekṣaṇakaṃ kāryaṃ naṭanartakagāyakaiḥ ||
prabhāte tu navamyāṃ taṃ toyamadhye visarjayet || 68 ||
evaṃ yaḥ kurute yātrāṃ varṣevarṣe ca harṣitaḥ ||
bhaktiyuktaḥ śraddhayā ca sarvapāpaiḥ pramucyate || 69 ||
kuṭuṃbaṃ varddhate tasya yasya viṣṇuḥ prasīdati ||
ārogyaṃ sapta janmāni tato yāṃti parāṃ gatim || 4.58.70 || etāmaghaughaśamanāmanaghāṣṭamīṃ ca kauṃteya saṃprati mayā kathitā hitāya || kurvaṃtyananyamanasaḥ svayaśobhivṛddhyai ṛddhiṃ prayāṃti kṛtavīryasutānurūpām || 71 || || iti śrībhaviṣye mahāpurāṇa uttaraparvaṇi śrīkṛṣṇayudhiṣṭhirasaṃvāde anaghāṣṭamīvrataṃ nāmāṣṭapaṃcāśattamo.adhyāyaḥ || 58 || || a || ||
somāṣṭamīvratavarṇanam
|| śrīkṛṣṇa uvāca || ||
athānyatsaṃpravakṣyāmi vrataṃ śreyaskaraṃ param||
śivalokapradaṃ puṇyaṃ vidhivanme nibodhatām||1||
vāre some sitāṣṭamyāṃ pakṣe somaṃ samarcayet||
vidhinā candracūḍālaṃ prāpyametatsa candrakam | | 2
dakṣiṇārdhe hariṃ dhyātvā madhye tu paritaḥ prabhum |
pañcāmṛtādinā devaṃ sthāpayitvā yatavratī | | 3
candanenenduyuktena dakṣiṇārdhaṃ vilepayet |
harabhāgaṃ nīlaraktaṃ śivasyopari mauktikam | | 4
paścātpuṣpaiḥ samabhyarcya sitaṃ raktairanuttamaiḥ |
nīrājanaṃ punaḥ kuryātpañcaviṃśatidīpakaiḥ | |
atha siddhaiḥ śubhairbhakṣyainevadyaṃ vinivedayet | | 5
evaṃkṛtopavāsastu prabhāte pūrvavacchivam |
sampūjyājyaṃ tilairmiśraṃ juhuyājjātavedasi | | 6
vratino brāhmaṇānpaścādbhojayitvā vidhānataḥ |
mithunāni tu sambhojya yathāśaktyanupūjayet | | 7
āvartya pitarāvarcya vidhinā tena suvrata ||
saṃvatsarāṃte kartavyaṃ yattatsarvaṃ nibodha me || 8 ||
prāgukvavidhinā pūjyā sitapītayugadvayam ||
dadyādvitānakaṃ caiva patākāṃ ghaṭakīṃ tathā || 9 ||
dhūpagaṃdhārasī cāpi dīpavṛkṣaṃ suśobhanam ||
evamādīni yojyāni pūrvavadbhojyamācaret || 4.59.10 ||
caturasraṃ trikoṇaṃ ca maṇḍalaṃ kārayettataḥ ||
trikoṇe pārvatīṃ dhyāyeccaturasre maheśvaram || 11 ||
saṃkalpya dvijadāṃpatyaṃ vāsobhirbhūṣaṇaistathā ||
pūjayitvā yathāśaktyā kuryānnīrājanaṃ śubhaiḥ ||
dīpakaiḥ pañcaviṃśadbhirbhojayitvā visarjayet || 12 ||
abdapañcakamekaṃ vā evaṃ yaḥ kurute naraḥ ||
ubhābhyāṃ lokamāsādya padaṃ yāsyatyanāmayam || 13 ||
ā dehapatanādyastu nityametatsamācaret ||
ihaiva sa hariḥ sākṣānnararūpo vibhāvyate || 14 ||
na spṛśaṃtyāpadastasya na duḥkhī bhavati kvacit ||
jvaragrahādibhirnaiva pīḍyate.asau kadācana || 15 ||
|| śrīkṛṣṇa uvāca || ||
atha vā tena mārgeṇa tāmavehi sitāṣṭamīm ||
saṃprāpyādityayogena prāgvidhānena cābhyaset || 16 ||
kiṃtu dakṣiṇataṃtrasthaṃ bhāskaraṃ vārcayedbudhaḥ ||
padmarāgeṇa divyena suvarṇena ca pārvatīm || 17 ||
kuṃkumena samālabhya candanena śivaṃ tathā ||
abhāve sarvaratnānāṃ hema sarvatra yojayet || 18 ||
rudrabījaṃ paraṃ pūtaṃ priyaṃ rudrasya sarvadā ||
raktamālyāṃbaradharaṃ naivedyaṃ ghṛtapācitam || 19 ||
śeṣaḥ pūrvavidhānena kartavyo vidhivistaraḥ ||
tithau pūrṇe ca kurvīta gavyenānagha pāraṇam || || 4.59.20 ||
etatprākca vidhāyābdaṃ pañcābdānevameva ca ||
kṛtvā sūryādilokeṣu bhuktvā bhogānvrajetparam || 21 ||
pataṃgavatpratāpī syādadīnaśca jana priyaḥ ||
asminrogo na bādheta dhanavānputravānbhavet || 22 ||
yadyaṣṭamī bhavati somayutā kadācidarkeṇa vā kurukulodvaha tāmupoṣya ||
pūjyo mayā saha haraṃ hariṇāṃkacihnaṃ bhaktyāyuṣāṃ padamupaiti padaṃ purāreḥ || 23 || || iti śrībhaviṣye mahāpurāṇa uttaraparvaṇi śrīkṛṣṇayudhiṣṭhirasaṃvāde somāṣṭamīvratavarṇanaṃ nāmaikonaṣaṣṭitamo.adhyāyaḥ || 59 || cha ||
śrīvṛkṣanavamīvratavarṇanam
|| śrīkṛṣṇa uvāca || ||
samutpanneṣu ratneṣu kṣīrodamathane purā ||
daityānāṃ mohanārthāya yoṣidbhūte janārdane || 1 ||
bilve vṛkṣe kṣaṇaṃ śrāṃtā viśrāṃtā kamalālayā ||
yāmevamiti vānyonyaṃ yuyudhurdevadānavāḥ || 2 ||
jitāḥ sarve purā pārtha yuddhe kṛṣṇena cakriṇā ||
pātālaṃ gamitā daityāḥ saśrīkaḥ svayamāyayau || 3 ||
śrīḥ samāvāsitā yasmācchrīvṛkṣastu tataḥ smṛtaḥ ||
tasmādbhādrapadasyaiva śuklapakṣe kurūttama || 4 ||
navamyāmarcayedbhaktyā īṣatsūryodaye nagam ||
śrīvṛkṣaṃ vividhaiḥ puṣpairanagnipācitaiḥ phalaiḥ || 5 ||
tilapiṣṭānnagodhūmairdhūpagandhasragaṃbaraiḥ ||
īṣadbhānukarātāmratāmrīkṛtanabhastale || 6 ||
maṃtreṇānena rājendra kṛtvā brāhmaṇabhojanam ||
tato bhuñjīta maunena tailakṣāravivarjitaḥ ||
anagnipākaṃ bhūpātre dadhipuṣpaphalaiḥ śubham || 7 ||
evaṃ yaḥ kurute pārtha śrīvṛkṣasyārcanaṃ naraḥ ||
nārī vā duḥkhaśokābhyāṃ mucyate nātra saṃśayaḥ || 8 ||
saptajanmāṃtaraṃ yāvatsukhasaubhāgyasaṃyutā ||
śrīmatī phalinī dhanyā martyaloke mahīyate||| 9 ||
śrīvṛkṣamakṣataphalaṃ vasitaṃ navamyāṃ naivedyapuṣpaphalavastravicitradhānyaiḥ ||
pūjyaḥ prabhātasamaye puruṣottameṣṭaḥ saṃprāpnuvaṃti puruṣāḥ puruṣendravandyām || 4.60.10 || || iti śrībhaviṣye mahāpurāṇa uttaraparvaṇi śrīkṛṣṇayudhiṣṭhirasaṃvāde śrīvṛkṣanavamīvratavarṇanaṃ nāma ṣaṣṭitamo.adhyāyaḥ || 60 ||
dhvajanavamīvratavarṇanam
|| śrīkṛṣṇa uvāca || ||
mahiṣāsure vinihate bhagavatyā mahāsuraiḥ ||
pūrvavairamanusmṛtya saṃgrāmā bahavaḥ kṛtāḥ || 1 ||
nānārūpadharā devī avatīrya punaḥpunaḥ ||
dharmasaṃsthāpanārthāya nijaghne daityasattamān || 2 ||
atha raktāsuro nāma mahiṣasya suto mahān ||
āsīttena tapastaptaṃ varṣāṇāṃ niyutāni ṣaṭ ||
tasmai dadau caturvaktro rājyaṃ trailokyamaṇḍale || 3 ||
tena labdhaṃ vareṇātha melayitvā danoḥ sutān ||
prārabdhaṃ saha śakreṇa yuddhaṃ gatvā.amarāvatīm || 4 ||
taddṛṣṭvā dānavabalaṃ sannaddhātyuddhatadhvajam ||
yuyudhe dānavaiḥ sārddhaṃ suraiḥ śakrapurassaraiḥ || 5 ||
tatra prāvartata nadī śoṇitaughataraṃgiṇī ||
khaḍgamatsyagadāgrāhavasunaṃdakakacchapā ||
vahaṃtī pitṛlokāya surāsurabhayānakā || 6 ||
atha raktāsuro roṣādyuyudhe vibudhaiḥ saha ||
te hanyamānā vibudhā raktākṣeṇa mahāraṇe || 7 ||
bhraṣṭāḥ svargaṃ parityajya tyaktapraharaṇā drutam ||
karacchatrāṃ purīṃ prāptā yatrāste bhavavallabhā || 8 ||
durgā cāmuṇḍayā sārdhaṃ navadurgāsamanvitā ||
ādyā tāvanmahālakṣmīrnaṃdā kṣemakarī tathā || 9 ||
śivadūtī mahāruṇḍā bhrāmarī rudramaṃgalā ||
revatī harasiddhistu navaitāḥ parikīrtitāḥ ||
etāsāṃ te stutiṃ cakrustridaśāḥ praṇatānanāḥ || 4.61.10 || amarapatimukuṭacumbitacaraṇāṃbujasakalabhuvanasukhajananī ||
jayati jagadīśavaṃditā sakalāmalaniṣkalā durgā || 11 || vikṛtanakhadaśanabhūṣaṇarudhiravaśācchuritakṣatakhaḍgahastā ||
jayati naramuṃḍamuṃḍitapiśita surāhārakṛccaṇḍī || 12 || pracchāditaśikhigaṇodbalavikaṭajaṭābaddhacandramaṇiśobhā ||
jayati digaṃbarabhūṣā siddhavaṭeśā mahālakṣmīḥ || 13 ||
karakamalajanitaśobhā padmāsanabaddhapadmavadanā ca ||
jayati kamaṇḍaluhastā naṃdā devī natārtiharā || 14 ||
digvasanā vikṛtamukhā phetkāroddāma pūritadiśaughā ||
jayati vikarāladehā kṣemaṃkarī raudrabhāvasthā || 15 || krośitabrahmāṃḍodarasuravaramukharahuṃkṛtaninādā ||
jayati madātimihastā śivadūtī prathamaśivaśaktiḥ || 16 || muktāṭṭahāsabhairavaduḥsahataracakitasakaladikcakrā ||
jayati bhujagendramaṇiśobhitakarṇā mahātuṇḍā || 17 || paṭupaṭahamurajamardalajhallarijhaṅkāranartitāvayavā ||
jayati madhuvratarūpā daityaharī bhrāmarī devī || 18 ||
śāṃtā praśāṃtavadanā siṃhavarā dhyānayogata nniṣṭhā ||
jayati caturbhujadehā candrakalā candramaṇḍalā devī || 19 ||
pakṣapuṭacaṃcughātaiḥ saṃcūrṇitavividhaśatrusaṃghātā ||
jayati śitaśūlahastā bahurūpā revatī bhadrā ||4.61.20||
paryaṭati jagati haṣṭā pitṛvananilayeṣu yoginīsahitā||
jayati harasiddhināmnī harasiddhirvaṃditā siddhaiḥ ||21||
iti navadurgāsaṃstavamanupamamāryābhirapararāṭ kṛtvā ||
idamūce saha devaistrāhyasmānsarvabhītibhyaḥ || 22 ||
punaḥpunaḥ praṇamyocurbhavānīṃ siṃhavāhinīm ||
asmākaṃ bhayabhītānāṃ śaraṇye śaraṇaṃ bhava || 23 ||
devānāṃ tadvacaḥ śrutvā dattvā tebhyo.abhayaṃ tataḥ ||
siṃhārūḍhā vinirgatya durgābhiḥ sahitā purā || 24 ||
yuyudhe dānavaissārdhaṃ mahāsamaradurdinam ||
kumārī viṃśatibhujā ghanavidyullatopamā || 25 ||
te.api tatrāsurāḥ prāptāḥ pracaṃḍā rudrarūpiṇaḥ ||
sarve labdhavarāḥ śūrāḥ sutaptatapasastathā || 26 ||
mahāgrāhaparākrāṃtā duṣṭamāyāvinaṣṭaye ||
abrāhmaṇyāddhṛdyamiṣā nāmataśca nijodyatāt || 27 ||
indramārī asatkleśaḥ pralaṃbo narakaḥ sutaḥ ||
kuṣṭhaḥ pulomā śarabha śaṃbaro duṃdubhiḥ kharaḥ || 28 ||
ilvalo namucirbhaumo vātāpi dhenukaḥ kaliḥ ||
māyāvṛtau balau bandhurmadhukaiṭabhakālajit || 29 ||
rahaḥ pauṃḍūà¤¾didaityendrāḥ prādhānyena prakīrtitāḥ ||
phanagobhirjanāḥ sarve sannaddhāḥ svāgrato dhvajaḥ || 4.61.30 ||
rūpato varṇitāścaiva dhvajāsteṣāṃ pṛthakpṛthak ||
pratyadṛśyaṃta rājendra jvalitā iva pāvakāḥ || 31 ||
kāñcanāḥ kāñcanā pīḍāḥ kāñcanasragalaṃkṛtāḥ ||
patākā vividhairvālairucchritā lakṣaṇānvitāḥ || 32 ||
nīlyaḥ pītāḥ sitā raktāḥ kṛṣṇāsrāḥ pañcavarṇakāḥ ||
tatra paṭṭapaṭīsautrāḥ kṛtabudbudakarburāḥ || 33 ||
patākākāntiranalā nartakya iva śobhanāḥ || 34 ||
tato halahalārāvaṃ cakruste dānavottamāḥ ||
prāsphālayaṃta paṇavabherījharjharagomukhān ||
nyavādayaṃtānakānye śaṃkhāḍaṃbaraḍiṃḍimān || 35 ||
evaṃ te samayudhyaṃta bhavānīṃ daityadānavāḥ ||
samājaghnuḥ śaraiḥ śūlaiḥ parighaiḥ śaktitomaraiḥ ||
karṇakairīṣaṇaiḥ kuntaiḥ śataghnīkūṭamudgaraiḥ || 36 ||
āhatya mānaroṣeṇa jajvaluḥ samare.adhikam ||
siṃhārūḍhā drutaṃ devī raṇamadhye pradhāvitā || 37 ||
ācchidyācchidya cihnāni dhvajānnānāvidhāṃstathā ||
balātkāreṇa daityānāmanāthasamare ruṣā || 38 ||
cihnakāni dadau tuṣṭā devebhyaḥ śīghracāriṇī ||
surairapi gṛhītāni jaya devīti vādibhiḥ ||39||
aṃbikā tu bhṛśaṃ tuṣṭā teṣāṃ cakre kṣaṇātkṣayam ||
kālarātrī dānavānāṃ mārīva nipapāta sā ||
jīvitāni ca jagrāha daityānāṃ devanaṃdinī ||4.61.40||
atha raktāsuraṃ kaṃṭhe gṛhītvāpātya bhūtale ||
devī jaghāna tīkṣṇena triśūlena bhṛśaṃ divi || 41 ||
sa bhinnahṛdayaḥ paścādbhūmau tatra prapothitaḥ ||
tathāpi devyā nihataḥ papāta ca mamāra ca || 42 ||
devāstānasurāñjitvā gatvā śatrupuraṃ jitam ||
dadṛśuste raṇaprāṃte laṃbamānānmahādhvajān||
yātrāṃ cakruḥ saṃprahṛṣṭā navamyāṃ dhvajacihnitām || 43 ||
atodyāpīha bhūpālairjayalabdhīcchayādṛtaiḥ ||
upoṣyate narairbhaktairnārībhiścaiva pāṃḍava || 44 ||
|| yudhiṣṭhira uvāca || ||
kīdṛgvidhānaṃ tasyāstu navamyā brūhi me prabho ||
sarahasyaṃ samaṃtraṃ ca yena tuṣyati caṃḍikā || 45 ||
|| śrīkṛṣṇa uvāca || ||
pauṣasya śuklapakṣe yā navamī saṃpariśrutā ||
tasyāṃ snātvā śubhaiḥ puṣpairarcanīyā hareḥ svasā || 46 ||
kumārī subhagā devī siṃhasyaṃndanagāminī ||
dhvajānnānāvidhānkṛtvā purastasyāśca pūjayet ||
mālatīkusumairddīpairgandhadhūpavilepanaiḥ || 47 ||
balibhiḥ paśubhirmedhyaiḥ surāmāṃsāsṛgambaraiḥ ||
dadhicandanacūrṇaiśca bhagnaiścānagnipācitaiḥ ||
maṃtreṇānena kauṃteya brahmaṇopyathavā nanu || 48 ||
bhadrāṃ bhagavatīṃ kṛṣṇāṃ viśvasya jagato hitām ||
saṃveśinīṃ saṃyamanīṃ grahanakṣatra mālinīm || 49 ||
prapannohaṃ śivāṃ rātrī bhadre pāraya me vratam ||
sarvabhūtapiśācebhyaḥ sarvasatvasarīsṛpaiḥ ||
devebhyo mānuṣebhyaśca bhayebhyo rakṣa māṃ sadā || 4.61.50 ||
tataścāropayedrājā devīnāṃ bhavane tathā ||
bhojayeta kumārīṃ ca praṇipatya kṣamāpayet || 51 ||
upavāsena kurvīta ekabhaktena vā punaḥ ||
bhaktyā bhūpālapañcāsya bhaktistasyā garīyasī || 52 ||
evaṃ ye pūjayiṣyaṃti dhvajairbhagavatīṃ narāḥ ||
teṣāṃ durgā durgamārge coravyālāgni saṃkaṭe ||53||
raṇe rājakule gehe yuddhamadhye jale sthite ||
rakṣāṃ karoti satataṃ bhavānī sarvamaṃgalā||54||
asyāṃ babhūva vijayo navamyāṃ pāṃḍunaṃdana ||
bhagavatyāstu tenaiṣā navamī satataṃ priyā || 55 ||
dhanyā puṇyā pāpaharā sarvopadravanāśanī ||
anuṣṭheyā prayatnena sarvānkāmānabhīpsubhiḥ ||56||
devyarcanāhitamatirmanujo navamyāṃ hemasrajaṃ dhvajavaraṃ sa hi ropayedyaḥ ||
bhogānavāpya manasobhimatānprakāmaṃ dehaṃ vihāya samupaiti sa vīralokam || 57 ||
iti śrībhaviṣye mahāpurāṇa uttaraparvaṇi śrīkṛṣṇayudhiṣṭhirasaṃvāde dhvajanavamīvratavarṇanaṃ nāmaikaṣaṣṭitamo.adhyāyaḥ || 61 || cha || || ||
ulkānavamīvratavarṇanam
|| śrīkṛṣṇa uvāca || |
ulkākhyaṃ navamīṃ rājankathayāmi nibodha tām ||
yā kāśyapena kathitā tārakasyārtināśinī ||1||
aśvayukchuklapakṣe yā navamī lokaviśrutā ||
nadyāṃ snātvā samabhyarcya pitṛdevīṃ yathāvidhi || 2 ||
paścātsaṃpūjayeddevīṃ cāmuṇḍāṃ bhairavapriyām ||
puṣpairdhūpaissanaivedyairmāṃsamatsyasurāsavaiḥ || 3 ||
pūjayitvā stavaṃ kuryānmantreṇānena mānavaḥ ||
samāropyāñjaliṃ mūrdhni jānubhyāmavanīṃ gataḥ || 4 ||
mahiṣaghni mahāmāye cāmuṇḍe muṇḍamālini ||
dravyamārogyavijayau dehi devi namo.astu te || 5 || kumārīrbhojayetpaścānnavanīlasukaṃcukaiḥ||
paridhānairbhūṣaṇaiśca bhūṣayitvā kṣamāpayet || 6 ||
sapta pañcāpyathaikāṃ vā cittavittānurūpataḥ ||
śraddhayā tuṣyate devī iti vīrānuśāsanam || 7 ||
abhyukṣya maṇḍalaṃ kṛtvā gomayena śucismitaḥ ||
dattāsane copaviśetpātraṃ ca purato nyaset || 8 ||
tataḥ susiddhamannaṃ yattatsarvaṃ pariveṣayet ||
saghṛtaṃ pāyasaṃ cāpi sthāpayetpātrasa nnidhau || 9 ||
tṛṇāni ṣaṣṭimādāya cādāya dhamanīṃ tathā ||
prajvālayettatto bhojyaṃ yāvajjvalati pāvakaḥ || 4.62.10 ||
praśāṃte bhojanaṃ tyaktvā samācamya prasannadhīḥ ||
cāmuṃḍāṃ hṛdaye dhyātvā gṛhakṛtyaparo bhavet || 11 ||
anena vidhinā sarvaṃ māsimāsi samācaret ||
tataḥ saṃvatsarasyāṃte bhoja yitvā kumārikāḥ || 12 ||
vastrairābharaṇaiḥ pūjya praṇipatya kṣamāpayet||
suvarṇaṃ śaktito dadyādgāṃ ca viprāya śobhanām || 13 ||
ya evaṃ kurute pārtha puruṣo navamīvratam ||
na tasya śatravo nārtiḥ sa rājā naṣṭataskaraḥ || 14 ||
bhūtāḥ pretāḥ piśācā no janayaṃti bhayaṃ gṛhe ||
samudyateṣu śastreṣu haṃtā tasya na vidyate || 15 ||
taṃ rakṣati sadodyuktā sarvāsvāpatsu caṃḍikā ||
naro vā yadi vā nārī vratametatsamācaret ||
ulkāvatsa sapatnānāṃ jvalannāste sadā hṛdi || 16 ||
tāṃ śuṣkakoharamukhīṃ prakaṭorudaṃṣṭrāṃ kāpālinīṃ samavalaṃbitamuṇḍamālām ||
uktavrateṣu puruṣo navamīṣu caṇḍīṃ saṃpūjya kasya hṛdaye na ca śaṃ karoti|| 17 ||
iti śrībhaviṣye mahāpurāṇa uttaraparvaṇi śrīkṛṣṇayudhiṣṭhirasaṃvāda ulkānavamī vratavarṇanaṃ nāma dviṣaṣṭitamo.adhyāyaḥ || 62 || cha ||
daśāvatāracaritravratavarṇanam
|| śrīkṛṣṇa uvāca || ||
pūrvaṃ kṛtayugasyādau bhṛgorbhāryā mahāsatī ||
divyārāmāśrame ramyā gṛhakāryaikatatparā || 1 ||
babhūva sā bhṛgornityaṃ hṛdayepsitakāriṇī ||
tasyāṃ munirmahātejā agnihotraṃ nidhāya ca || 2 ||
viṣṇostrāsāddānavānāṃ kulatrāṇasamākulam ||
muktvā yuddhasthitaṃ pārśve samarpya munipuṅgavaḥ || 3 ||
dattvā nikṣepakaṃ sarvaṃ divyāyai sumahātapāḥ |||
jagāma himavatpārśve haraṃ toṣayituṃ rahaḥ || 4 ||
saṃjīvanīkṛte nityaṃ kaṇairdhūmamadhomukhaḥ ||
papau dānavarājasya vijayāya purohitaḥ || 5 ||
ājagāma gate tasmingaruḍenāśrito hariḥ ||
abhyetya jalpanaṃ cakre cakraṇotkṛttakaṃdharam || 6 ||
galadrudhirasaṃpannaṃ lohitārṇavavasaṃnibham ||
dṛṣṭvāsurabalaṃ sarvaṃ nihataṃ viṣṇunā tadā ||
divyā saṃśaptukāmābhūdviṣṇuṃ sāsrāvilekṣaṇā || 7 ||
yāvannoccarate vācaṃ cakreṇa kṛttakaṃdharam ||
tāvannipātayāmāsa śirastasyāḥ sakuṇḍalam || 8 ||
prāpya saṃjīvanīṃ vidyāṃ yāvadāyātyasau muniḥ ||
tāvatsa daityānnāpaśyatpaśyati sma nipātitam || 9 ||
roṣācchaśāpa ca hariṃ bhrukuṭīkuṭilānanaḥ ||
avaśyabhāvabhāvitvādviśvasya hitakāraṇāt || 4.63.10 ||
yasmāttvayā hatā daityā brahmaṇo matparigrahāḥ ||
tasmāttvaṃ mānuṣe loke daśa vārāngamiṣyasi || 11 ||
ato.arthaṃ mānuṣe loke rakṣārthaṃ ca mahīkṣitām||
avatāraṃ cakārāhaṃ bhūyobhūyaḥ pṛthagvidham || 12 |||||
pūrvoktaiḥ kāraṇaiḥ pārtha avatīrṇaṃ mahītale ||
māṃ narā ye.arcayiṣyaṃti teṣāṃ vāsastriviṣṭape || 13 ||
|| yudhiṣṭhira uvāca || ||
vrataṃ daśāvatārākhyaṃ kṛṣṇa brūhi savistaram ||
samaṃtraṃ sarahasyaṃ ca sarvapāpapraṇāśanam || 14 ||
śrīkṛṣṇa uvāca || ||
proṣṭhapade site pakṣe daśamyāṃ niyataḥ śuciḥ ||
snātvā jalāśaye svacche pitṛdevāditarpaṇam|| 15 ||
kṛtvā kurukulaśreṣṭha gṛhamāgatya mānavaḥ ||
gṛhṇīyāddhānyacūrṇasya dvihastaprasṛti trayam || 16 ||
krameṇa pāvayettāṃ tu puṃsaṃjñaṃ ghṛtasaṃśritam ||
varṣe varṣe dine tasminyāvadvarṣāṇi vai daśa || 17 ||
prathame pūrikānvarṣe dvitīye ghṛtapūrakān ||
tṛtīye śuklakāsāraṃ caturthe modakāñchubhān || 18 ||
sohālakānpañcame.abde ṣaṣṭhe.abde khaṇḍaveṣṭakān ||
saptame.abde kokarasānapūpāṃśca tathāṣṭame || 19 ||
navame karṇaveṣṭāṃstu daśame khaṇḍakāñchubhān ||
daśa dhenūrdaśahare daśaviprāya dāpayet || 4.63.20 ||
krameṇa bhakṣayitvā ca yathoktaṃ bharatarṣabha ||
arddhārddhaṃ piṣṭayedevamarddhārddhaṃ vā dvijātaye ||
svata evārdhamaśnīyādgatvā ramye jalāśaye || 21 ||
daśāvatārānabhyarcya puṣpadhūpavilepanaiḥ ||
maṃtreṇānena medhāvī harimabhyukṣya vāriṇā || 22 ||
matsyaṃ kūrmaṃ varāhaṃ ca narasiṃhaṃ trivikramam ||
śrīrāmaṃ rāma kṛṣṇau ca buddhaṃ caiva sakalkinam || 23 ||
gato.asmi śaraṇaṃ devaṃ hariṃ nārāyaṇaṃ prabhum ||
praṇato.asmi jagannāthaṃ sa me viṣṇuḥ prasīdatu || 24 ||
chinattu vaiṣṇavīṃ māyāṃ bhaktyā jāto janardanaḥ ||
śvetadvīpaṃ nayasyasmānsamātmani nivedayet || 25 ||
evaṃ yaḥ kurute pārtha vidhinānena suvrata ||
daśāvatāranāmākhyaṃ tasya puṇyaphalaṃ śṛṇu || 26 ||
śrūyate yāstvimālocya puruṣāṇāṃ daśā daśa ||
tāśchinatti na saṃdehaḥ śakrapraharaṇairhariḥ || || 27 ||
saṃsārasāgare ghore majjata tatra māṃ hariḥ ||
śvetadvīpaṃ nayatvāśu vratenānena toṣitaḥ || 28 ||
kiṃ tasya na bhavelloke yasya tuṣṭo janārdanaḥ ||
so.ahaṃ janārdano rājankālarūpī dharāsutaḥ ||
martyaloke svayaṃ pārtha bhūbhārottārakāraṇam || 29 ||
yā strī vratamidaṃ pārtha cariṣyati mayoditam ||
sā lakṣmyā.acalayā yuktā bhartṛputrasamanvitā || 4.63.30 ||
martyaloke ciraṃ sthitvā viṣṇuloke mahīyate ||
viṣṇulokādrudralokaṃ tato yāti paraṃ padam || 31 ||
ye pūjayaṃti puruṣāḥ puruṣottamasya matsyādikāṃstu daśamīṣu daśāvatārān ||
martyā daśasvapi daśāsu sukhaṃ vihṛtya te yāṃti yānamadhiruhya sureśalokān || 32 || ||
iti śrībhaviṣye mahāpurāṇa uttaraparvaṇi śrīkṛṣṇayudhiṣṭhirasaṃvāde daśāvatāracaritravrataṃ nāma triṣaṣṭita mo.adhyāyaḥ || 63 || || cha ||
āśādaśamīvarṇanam
|| śrīkṛṣṇa uvāca || ||
pārtha pārthivavṛndānāṃ mukhapaṅkajasadrave ||
śṛṇuṣvāvahito vacmi tavāśādaśamīvratam || || 1||
nalanāmābhavatpūrvaṃ niṣadheṣu mahīpate ||
sa bhrātrā nirjito rājye puṣkareṇeti naḥ śrutam || 2 ||
akṣairdyūtena rājendra niryayau bhāryayā saha ||
vanaṃ pratibhayaṃ śūnyaṃ jhillīkagaṇanāditam || 3 ||
sa gatvā pratyahorātraṃ jalamātreṇa vartayan ||
dadarśa vanamadhyasthāñchakunīnkāṃcanacchavīn || 4 ||
grahītumicchaṃstānrājansamācchādya svavāsasā ||
khamāpetuḥ khagāstūrṇaṃ gṛhītvā vasanaṃ śubham ||5||
āsasāda samāḥ kāściddhṛtavāsāḥ suduḥkhitaḥ||
damayaṃtīṃ samāprāpya nidrayāpahṛtāṃ tadā ||
duḥkhādutsṛjya gatavānbhāgyataḥ prāgdhaneśvaram || 5 ||
gate tu naiṣadhe bhaimī prabuddhai vāñcitānanā||
apaśyaṃtī nalaṃ vīraṃ vīra bhīmasutā vane ||
itaścetaśca babhrāma hāheti rudatī muhuḥ || 7 ||
duḥkhaśokasamākrāṃtā naladarśanalālasā ||
āsasāda dine kaiścitsā caidyapuramaṃjasā || 8 ||
unmattavatparivṛtā śiśubhiḥ kautukākulaiḥ ||
sā dṛṣṭā cedirājasya jananyā janaveṣṭitā ||9||
candralekheva patitā bhūmau bhāsitadiṅmukhā ||
āropya sā svabhavanaṃ pṛṣṭā kā tvaṃ varānane || 4.64.10 ||
uvāca bhaimī savrīḍaṃ sairaṃdhrīṃ māṃ nibodhatām ||
na dhāvayeyaṃ caraṇau nocchiṣṭaṃ bhakṣayāmyaham || 11 ||
yadi prārthayate kaściddaṃḍyaste sāṃprataṃ bhavet ||
pratijñayānayā devi tiṣṭheyaṃ tava veśmani ||
evamastvanavadyāṃgi rāja mātāpyuvāca tām || 12 ||
evaṃvidhā tadbhavane kaṃcitkālamaniṃditā ||
uvāsa vasanārddhena pravṛttāṃte kila dvijaḥ ||
ānayāmāsa mudito damayaṃtīṃ gṛhaṃ pituḥ || 13 ||
mātrā pitrā samāyuktā sutairbhrātṛbhireva ca ||
damayaṃtī tathāpyāste duḥkhaṃ naiṣadhavarjitā || 14 ||
provāca vimanāhūya vrataṃ dānamathāpi vā ||
kathayadhvaṃ yathā me syādiṣṭena saha saṃgamaḥ || 15 ||
tatretihāsakuśalo vipraḥ provāca buddhimān ||
bhadre tvamāśādaśamīṃ kuruṣvepsitasiddhidām || 16 ||
cakāra sarvaṃ tanvaṃgī yatpurāṇavidā tadā ||
khyātamākhyānaviduṣā damanena purodhasā || 17 ||
vratasyāsya prabhāveṇa damayaṃtyā narottama ||
saṃjātaḥ sukhado.atyarthaṃ bharttrā saha samāgamaḥ || 18 ||
|| yudhiṣṭhira uvāca || ||
kathamāśādaśamyeṣā govinda kriyate kadā ||
sarvametatsamācakṣva māṃ sarvajñosi yādava || 19 ||
|| śrīkṛṣṇa uvāca || ||
rājyāśayā rājaputraḥ kṛṣyarthaṃ tu kṛṣīvalaḥ ||
bhāryārthaṃ tu vaṇikputraḥ putrārthe gurviṇī tathā || 4.64.20 ||
dharmārthakāmasaṃsiddhayai lokakanyā varārthinī ||
yaṣṭukāmo dvijavaro rogī rogāpanuttaye || 21 ||
cirapravāsite kāṃte kālena dhṛtipaṃḍitā ||
eteṣvanyeṣu kartavyamāśāvratamidaṃ sadā || 22 ||
yadā yasya bhavedārtaṃ kāryate hi tadā vratam ||
śuklapakṣe daśamyāṃ tu snātvā saṃpūjya devatāḥ ||23||
naktaṃ tadāśāḥ saṃpūjyāḥ puṣpālaktakacandanaiḥ ||
gṛhāṅgaṇe lekhayitvā yavaiḥ piṣṭātakena vā ||
dattvā ghṛtāktaṃ naivedyaṃ punaḥ kāryaṃ nivedayet ||24||
āśāścāśāḥ sadā saṃtu vidyaṃtāṃ ca manorathāḥ||
bhavatīnāṃ prasādena sadā kalyāṇamastviti ||25||
evaṃ saṃpūjya bhuñjīta dattvā viprāya dakṣiṇām||
anena kramayogena māsimāsi samācaret||26||
yāvanmanorathaḥ pūrṇastataḥ paścātsamudyamāt ||
māsi pūrṇe ca ṣaṇmāse varṣe varṣadvaye gate||27||
sauvarṇāḥ kārayedāśā raupyapiṣṭātakena vā||
jñātibaṃdhujanaiḥ sārddhaṃ snātaḥ samyagalaṃkṛtaḥ ||28||
pūjayenmaṃtrasaṃdarbhairebhirdhyātvā gṛhāṃgaṇe|||
tava saṃnihitaḥ śakraḥ surāsuranamaskṛtaḥ ||
pūrvā candreṇa sahitā aindrīdigdevate namaḥ || 29 ||
agneḥ parigrahādārye tvamāgneyīti paṭhyase ||
tejomayī parā śaktirāgneyī varadā bhava || 4.64.30 ||
devarājaṃ samāsādya lokaḥ saṃyamayatyasau ||
tena saṃyamanī yāsi yāmye kāmapradā bhava || 31 ||
khaḍgaṃsahātivikṛtā nairṛtistvamupābhṛtā ||
tena nairṛtanāmnītvaṃ kṛtavānmaghavā sadā || 32 ||
tvayyāste bhavanādhāravaruṇo yādasāṃ patiḥ ||
iṣṭakāmārthasiddhyarthaṃ vāruṇiprabhavā bhava || 33 ||
adhiśritāsi yasmāttvaṃ vāyunā jagadāyunā||
vāyavye tvamataḥ śāntiṃ nityaṃ yaccha namonamaḥ || 34 ||
kuberavāsataḥ saumyā prakhyātā tvamathottarā ||
aiśānī jagadīśena śaṃbhunā tvamalaṃkṛtā ||
atastvaṃ śivasānnidhyaṃ devi dehi śive namaḥ || 35 ||
sarpāṣṭakakulena tvaṃ sevitāsi tathāpyadhaḥ ||
nāgāṃganābhiḥ sahitā hitā naḥ sarvadā bhava || 36 ||
saptalokaiḥ parigatā sarvadā tvaṃ śivā yataḥ ||
sanakādyaiḥ parivṛtā brāhmī jihmānapākuru || 37 ||
nakṣatrāṇi ca sarvāṇi grahāstārāgrahāstathā ||
nakṣatramātaro ye ca bhūtapretavināyakāḥ ||
sarve mameṣṭasiddhyarthe bhavaṃtu praṇatāḥ sadā || 38 ||
ebhirmaṃtraiḥ samabhyarcya puṣpadhūpādinā tataḥ ||
vāsobhirabhisaṃsthāpya phalāni vinivedayet|| 39 ||
tattūryadhvanighoṣeṇa gatimaṅgalaniḥsvanaiḥ ||
nṛtyatībhirvarastrībhistāṃ rātrimativāhayet || 4.64.40 ||
kuṃkumakṣodatīvreṇa dānamānādibhiḥ sukham ||
prabhāte vedaviduṣe sarvaṃ tatpratipādayet || 41 ||
anena vidhinā sarvaṃ kṣamayanpraṇipatya ca ||
bhuñjīta mitrasahitaḥ suhṛdbaṃdhujanairapi || 42 ||
ya evaṃ kurute pārtha daśamīvratamādarāt ||
sa sarvakāmamāpnoti manasābhīpsitaṃ naraḥ || 43 ||
strībhirviśeṣataḥ kāryaṃ vratametadyudhiṣṭhira ||
laghucittā yato nāryaḥ sadā kāmaparāyaṇāḥ || 44 ||
dhanyaṃ yaśasyamāyuṣyaṃ sarvakāmaphalapradam ||
kathitaṃ te mahārāja mayā vratamanuttamam || 45 ||
ye mānavā manujapuṅgava kāmakāmāḥ saṃpūjayaṃti daśamīṣu sadā daśāśāḥ ||
teṣāṃ viśeṣanihitā hṛdaye prakāmamāśāḥ phalaṃtyalamalaṃ bahunoditena || 46 ||
iti śrībhaviṣye mahāpurāṇa uttaraparvaṇi śrīkṛṣṇayudhiṣṭhirasaṃvāda āśādaśamīvrataṃ nāma catuṣpaṣṭitamo.adhyāyaḥ || 64 || || cha ||
tārakadvādaśīvratavarṇanam
|| yudhiṣṭhira uvāca || ||
ahaṃ tvāgaskaraḥ pāpaḥ pṛthivīkṣayakārakaḥ ||
paripṛcchāmi govinda tvāṃ namaskṛtya pādayoḥ || 1 ||
guhyādguhyataraṃ brūhi vrataṃ kiṃcidanuttamam||
tarāmi yena pāpaughaṃ bhīṣmadroṇavadhārṇavam || 2 ||
|| śrīkṛṣṇa uvāca || ||
āsītpurottaro nāmnā vidarbhāyāṃ kuśadhvajaḥ ||
sāṃtaḥpurasuto yaśca cakre rājyamataṃdritaḥ || 3 ||
jaghāna tāpasaṃ so.atha pramādānmṛgayāṃ gataḥ ||
mṛgaṃ matvā mahāraṇye brāhmaṇaṃ daivamohitaḥ || 4 ||
tena karmavipākena dehāṃte narakaṃ gataḥ ||
tatrāsau yātanā ghorā anubhūyātipīḍitaḥ || 5 ||
tasmādihāgato martye raudro viṣadharo.abhavat||
adaśatso.api rājendra brāhmaṇaṃ caraṇe ruṣā || 6 ||
labdhvā saha ca paṃcatvaṃ jagāma dvijasaṃyutaḥ ||
vipannastu tataḥ siṃho dvitīye.abhūtsudāruṇaḥ || 7 ||
vidāritamukho hiṃsro nānāsattvabhayaṃkaraḥ ||
jaghānāsau punaḥ śreṣṭhaṃ rājanyaṃ mṛgayā gatam || 8 ||
tato.api bahubhiḥ śastrai rājalokairnipātitaḥ ||
punarvyāghro babhūvāsau tṛtīye.api bhavāṃtare || 9 || tīkṣṇapādanakhāghātavyāpāditamṛgānvayaḥ ||
tenāpi vaiśyo nidhanaṃ nītaḥ kiñcidvanāṃtaram || 4.65.10 ||
sa nītaḥ kṛmirāśitvaṃ lokaiḥ khātanipātanāt ||
saṃjātastu mahānṛkṣo nakharāhatajaṃturuk || 11 ||
jaghāna bālaṃ caṇḍālādasau mṛtyumavāpnuyāt ||
pañcame makaro jātaḥ samudre.a tibhayaṃkaraḥ || 12 ||
striyaṃ jaghāna taruṇīṃ snātukāmāmathāgatām ||
prabhāte śaṅkarasyāgre śaśāṅkagrahaṇe niśi || 13 ||
tatrāpi baḍiśaṃ dattvā janaiḥ prāṇairviyojitaḥ ||
punaḥ ṣaṣṭhe bhave jātaḥ piśācaḥ piśitāśanaḥ || 14 ||
krūraśchidraparaḥ kṣudro naraprāṇaviyojakaḥ ||
so.avatīrṇo narasyāṃgaṃ karṣayāmāsa kasyacit || 15 ||
maṃtreṇāhūya siddhena vātikena vyasuḥ kṛtaḥ ||
saptame sa punarjāto durnirīkṣyavapurbhṛśam|| 16 ||
krūradaṃṣdraḥ karālāsyo māṃsaśoṇitabhojanaḥ ||
digvāsā marubhūmīṣu vāśiṣṭho brahmarākṣasaḥ ||17||
sa rāṣṭraṃ jarjaraṃ śūnyaṃ sarvaṃ cakre viṣādiṣu ||
ākramya bhīmadāsena rājñā rākṣasaśatruṇā || 18||
samāropya dhanuḥ saṃkhye brahmāstreṇa nipātitaḥ ||
bhūyo.abhavadvyāghrasamaḥ svajanmanyaṣṭame bhuvi ||19||
vanecarāṇāṃ kruddhāṅgo brāhmaṇānnidhanaṃ gataḥ ||
tato hastī ca bhallūko mātaṃgena dhanuṣmatā || 4.65.20 ||
ekādaśe.api pāñcālo bhavamadhye.api bhīṣaṇaḥ ||
ūrdhvakeśoti raktākṣo jāto hrasvatanurdṛḍhaḥ || 21 ||
pāpo dharmadhvajo rakṣo devatojjhitamālyadhṛka ||
sa daṇḍapāśikenaiva vṛkṣāgre hyavalaṃbitaḥ || 22 ||
dvādaśe sa punarjātaḥ puṣkalakleśabhājanaḥ ||
bhakṣyalobhādbilagato vyādhena vinipātitaḥ || 23 ||
tena cāsītkṛtaṃ pūrvaṃ tārakadvādaśīvratam ||
tasya prabhāvājāto.api duṣṭayonau punaḥpunaḥ || 24 ||
avāpa śīghraṃ paṃcatvaṃ saṃsārabhavasāgare ||
punarevābhavadrājā vidarbhāyāṃ sudhārmikaḥ || 25 ||
bhūyaścopoṣitā tena tārakadvādaśī śubhā ||
dṛśyatāṃ vratamāhātmyaṃ jātojātaḥ punaḥpunaḥ || 26 ||
vrataprabhāvādbhuvane bhuktvā rājyamakaṇṭakam ||
prāpa viṣṇupure sthānaṃ yāvadābhūtasaṃplavam || 27 ||
|| yudhiṣṭhira uvāca || ||
kathametadvrataṃ kṛṣṇa kartavyaṃ puruṣottamaiḥ ||
strībhirvā bhartṛvākyena snānadānajapādikam || 28 ||
|| śrīkṛṣṇa uvāca || ||
mārgaśīrṣe site pakṣe gṛhītvā dvādaśīvratam ||
akṛtrime jale snānamaparāhṇe samācaret || || 29 ||
praṇamya bhāskarāyātha kṛtvā devārcanaṃ tathā ||
homaśca tāvatsthātavyo yāvadastamito raviḥ || 4.65.30 ||
tato bhuktvā phalaiḥ puṣpairgandhadhūpa vilepanaiḥ ||
sajalaṃ sākṣataṃ kṛtvā sahiraṇyaṃ śubhaiḥ phalaiḥ || 31 ||
ramye tāmramaye pātre jānubhyāṃ dharaṇīṃ gataḥ ||
pūrvāmukhaḥ pradoṣāgre mūrdhni kṛtvārghyabhājanam || 32 ||
bhūmau tu maṃḍalaṃ kṛtvā gomayena satārakam ||
caṃdanena samālikhya dhruvaṃ hi gaganonmukhaḥ || 33 ||
sahasraśīrṣāmaṃtreṇa bhūmau śaktyā śanaiḥ svayam ||
tārakāṇāṃ kuruśreṣṭha dadyādarghyamataṃdritaḥ ||34||
paryukṣya dhūmamutkṣipya dadyādviprāya dakṣiṇām ||
krameṇa sarvaṃ nirvartya bhojyaṃ bhojyaṃ niśāgame ||35||
mārgaśīrṣe khaṃḍakhādyaṃ pauṣe sohālakaṃ tathā ||
tilataṃḍulakaṃ māghe guḍāpūpaṃ ca phālgune ||36||
modakāṃścaitramāse tu vaiśākhe khaṃḍaveṣṭakam ||
jyeṣṭhe saktubhṛtaiḥ pātrairāṣāḍhe guḍapūrikaiḥ || 37 ||
śrāvaṇe madhuśīrṣeṇa nabhasye pāyasena ca ||
ghṛtaparṇaiścāśvayuje kāṃsāraiḥ kārttike kramān || 38 ||
ebhirdvādaśabhirvarṣairbhojayitvā dvijānsvayam ||
bhuñjīta bhaktyā rājendra paścāddevaṃ kṣamāpayet || 39 ||
samāpte tu vrate kṛtvā rājataṃ tārakāgaṇam ||
dṛṣṭvā vā pūrvavidhinā pūjayitvā kṣamāpayet || 4.65.40 ||
kumbhā dvādaśa dātavyāḥ sodakā modakāśritāḥ ||
brāhmaṇyāṃ paridhānaṃ ca padmarāgaḥ sakuṃcakaḥ || 41 ||
brāhmaṇe valgulallāṭaṃ lakṣapuṣpopaśobhitam ||
cālakenopavītaṃ ca puṣpaṃ dattvā kṣamāpayet || 42 ||
anena vidhinā rājanyaḥ karoti vrataṃ naraḥ ||
nārī vā bharataśreṣṭha bhaktibhāvapuraḥsarā || 43 ||
nakṣatralokaṃ vrajati vimānenārkavarcasā ||
apsarogaṇagandharvayakṣavidyādharāmaraiḥ || 44 ||
sahasrabharttā svarloke pūjyamāno divākaraiḥ||
vasetkalpāyutaṃ yāvatpunarviṣṇupuraṃ vrajet || 45 ||
etadvrataṃ purā cīrṇaṃ śacyā rājñyā śriyomayā ||
sītayā damayaṃtyā ca rukmiṇyā satyabhāmayā || 46 ||
menayā raṃbhayā svarge urvaśyā devadattayā ||
anyābhirapi nārībhiḥ puruṣaiśca pṛthagvidhaiḥ || 47 ||
cīrṇametadvrataṃ pārtha sarvapāpabhayāpaham || 48 ||
janmāṃtareṣvapi kṛtāni haratyaghāni yā saṃdahatyaharahaḥ sukṛtopayogāt ||
sā dvādaśī jagati tārakanāmadheyā tannāsti yanna vidadhāti kṛtā manuṣyaiḥ || 49 ||
iti śrībhaviṣye mahāpurāṇa uttaraparvaṇi śrīkṛṣṇayudhiṣṭhirasaṃvāde tārakadvādaśīvrataṃ nāma pañcaṣaṣṭhitamo.adhyāyaḥ || 65 ||. || a ||
araṇyadvādaśīvratavarṇanam
|| yudhiṣṭhira uvāca || ||
bhagavanbrūhi me samyagaraṇyadvādaśīvratam ||
saprāśanaṃ sopavāsaṃ sarahasyaṃ samantrakam || 1 ||
|| śrīkṛṣṇa uvāca || ||
kauṃteya yatpurā cīrṇaṃ sītayā vanasaṃsthayā ||
vrataṃ rāghavavākyena praśastaṃ doṣavarjitam || 2 ||
lopāmuà¥drālaye sādhvyo munipatnyo bahuprajāḥ ||
bhojitāstarpitāḥ sarvairāhāraiḥ sarvakāmikaiḥ || 3 ||
padminīpatravistīrṇe sopadaṃśai ryathā navaiḥ ||
bhakṣyabhojyaistathā lehyaiścoṣyaiścāpi yadṛcchayā || 4 ||
tāmihaikamanāḥ pārthaḥ śṛṇuṣvāraṇyadvādaśīm ||
mārgaśīrṣe site pakṣe ekādaśyāṃ dinodaye || 5 ||
snātvā naraḥ sopavāsaḥ kṛtvā pūjāṃ janārdane ||
gaṃdhapuṣpākṣatairdhūpairdīpairjāgaraṇairniśām ||6||
nītvā prabhāte gatvā ca vane vedāṅgapāragān ||
bhojayitvā phalaprāyaṃ svayaṃ bhuñjīta vāgyataḥ || 7 ||
pañcagavyaṃ prāśayitvā pūrvamevātha taddine ||
varṣamekaṃ śubhaṃ pūrṇa pārayitvā yudhiṣṭhira||8||
śrāvaṇe kārttike māghe caitre vātha samarcite ||
sopadaṃśaiḥ patraśākaistilaśaṣkulikādibhiḥ || 9 ||
apūpaiḥ khaṇḍaveṣṭaiśca marīcaiḥ siṃhakesaraiḥ ||
dhūlīmukhai ramṛtaphalaiḥ svādukokarasaiḥ śubhaiḥ || 4.66.10 ||
śītalaistarpayedvidvānarkapuṣpaiḥ sumālakaiḥ ||
dadhikṣīrājyapāṇijyaiścāturjātakaraṃjitaiḥ || 11 ||
karpūranakha viddhaiśca madhuraiḥ panasottamaiḥ ||
bahuvṛkṣaṃ vanaṃ gatvā susvādusalilaṃ śivam ||12||
sukhāsanopaviṣṭāṃśca prāgudaṅmukhavacchucīn ||
bhojayeddaśa ca dvau vā munīnāraṇyavāsinaḥ || 13 ||
ekadaṃḍīstridaṃḍīśca gṛhasthāṃścāpi suvratān ||
brāhmaṇīrvividhāḥ sapta ekapatnīḥ pativratāḥ || 14 ||
cārvaṃgyaścārcitāḥ snātāḥ sarvāvayamaśobhanāḥ ||
suvastrāḥ kukumāktāṅgāḥ sugaṃdhakusumāṃcitāḥ || 15 ||
aṃgairvā bhojanīyāstāstāścādityasya devatāḥ ||
vāsudevajanārdanadāmodaramadhusūdanāḥ || 16 ||
padmanābhakṛṣṇaviṣṇugovarddhanatrivikramāḥ ||
śrīdharaśca hṛṣīkeśaḥ puṇḍarīkākṣa ādivārāhāḥ || 17 ||
ebhirdvādaśabhirmantrairnamaskārāṃtayojitaiḥ ||
gaṃdhacandanasaṃvastraṃ dhūpaṃ dattvā pṛthakpṛthak || 18 ||
bhojayitvā śubhānnāni dadyāttābhyaḥ sudakṣiṇām ||
praṇamya prārthayedbhaktyā viṣṇurme prīyatāmiti || 19 ||
tato bhuñjīta sahito bhṛtyaiḥ preṣyajanena ca ||
āgatābhyāgatairlokaiḥ suhṛtsaṃbaṃdhibaṃdhubhiḥ || || 4.66.20 ||
evaṃ kauṃteya kurute yo.araṇyadvādaśīṃ naraḥ ||
sa dehāṃte vimānastho divyakanyāsamāvṛtaḥ ||
yāti jñātisamāyuktaḥ śvetadvīpaṃ hareḥ puram || || 21 ||
yatra lokāḥ pītavastrāḥ śyāmadehāścaturbhujāḥ ||
śaṃkhacakragadāpadmacāruhastāḥ sakaustubhāḥ || 22 ||
garuḍāsanāḥ sābharaṇā mukuṭotkaṭa kuṃḍalāḥ ||
nīlotpaloddāmapadmamālayālaṃkṛtorasaḥ ||23||
lakṣmīdharā meghavarṇāḥ kūrparāṅgadabhūṣaṇāḥ ||
tiṣṭhaṃti viṣṇusāmānye yāvadābhūtasaṃplavam || || 24 ||
tasmādetya mahātejāḥ pṛthivyāṃ nṛpapūjitāḥ ||
martyaloke kīrtimaṃtaḥ saṃbhavaṃti narottamāḥ || 25 ||
tato yāṃti paraṃ sthānaṃ mokṣamārgaṃ śivaṃ śubham ||
yatra gatvā na śocaṃti na saṃsāre bhramaṃti ca || 26 ||
ye dvādaśīmupavasaṃti sitāmaraṇyanāmnīṃ vane dvijavarānatha bhojayaṃti ||
sādhvyaḥ striyaḥ sucaritābharaṇāśca tāsāṃ viṣṇuḥ prasādamupayāti dadāti mokṣam || 27 || ||
iti śrībhaviṣye mahāpurāṇa uttaraparvaṇi śrīkṛṣṇayudhiṣṭhira saṃvāderaṇyadvādaśīvrataṃ nāma ṣaṭṣaṣṭitamo.adhyāyaḥ || 66 || || cha ||
rohiṇīcandravratavarṇanam
|| yudhiṣṭhira uvāca || ||
ghanāvṛte vare deve varṣākāle hyupasthite ||
mayūrakekākulite dardurārāvapūrite || 1 ||
kulastriyaḥ prayacchaṃti kasyānnaṃ kā.atra devatā ||
kiṃ vrataṃ kṛṣṇa vikhyātamannaṃ kasyāṃ tithau bhavet || 2 ||
|| śrīkṛṣṇa uvāca || ||
pravṛtte śrāvaṇe māsi kṛṣṇapakṣe hyupasthite ||
ekādaśyāṃ śucirbhūtvā sarvauṣadhijalaiḥ śubhaiḥ || 3 ||
māṣacūrṇena rājendra kuryādiṃdurikāśanam ||
modakāṃśca tathā paṃca ghṛtapakvānsunirmalān || 4 ||
naramekaikamuddiśya tato gatvā jalāśayam ||
duṣṭayādovirahitaṃ satoyaṃ jalajairyutam || 5 ||
tasyaiva puline ramye juṣṭānne gomayādinā ||
kṛtvā maṃḍalakaṃ vṛttaṃ piṣṭakādibhirarcitam || 6 ||
carcitaṃ gaṃdhakusumairdhūpa dīpākṣatojjvalam ||
tatra caṃdraṃ likhedeva rohiṇyā sahitaṃ vibhum||
arcayecca sabhāryo vai mantreṇānena bhāvitaḥ ||7 ||
somarāja namastubhyaṃ rohiṇyai te namonamaḥ ||
mahāsati mahādevi saṃpādaya mamepsitam || 8 ||
evaṃ saṃpūjya tasyāgre naivedyaṃ deyamarcitam ||
tatraiva brāhmaṇe dadyātsomo me prīyatā miti ||
prīyatāmiti me devī rohiṇī sahitapriyā || 9 ||
evamuccārya dattvā ca tatoṃ.atarjalamāviśet ||
kaṃṭhāṃtaṃ kaṭimātraṃ vā gulphāṃtaṃ vā jalā śaye || 4.67.10 ||
dhyāyecca manasā somaṃ rohiṇīsahitaṃ tadā ||
yāvatsamastaṃ tadbhuktaṃ bhuktvā cāṃtastaṭe sthitaḥ || 11 ||
niyamya vasatāṃ cānye tato viprāya bhojanam ||
dakṣiṇāsahitaṃ deyaṃ niścayaṃ vāci kalpayet ||
bhaktyā śaktyā yathācittaṃ yathāvittaṃ tathā tathā || 12 ||
yaḥ karoti naro rājannārī vātha kumārikā ||
varṣevarṣe vidhānena pārthedaṃ rohiṇīvratam || 13 ||
iha loke ciraṃ sthitvā dhanadhānyasamākule ||
gṛhāśrame śubhāṃ labdhvā putrapautrādisaṃtatim || 14 ||
tataḥ sutīrthe maraṇaṃ tato brahmapuraṃ vrajet ||
tasmādviṣṇupuraṃ pārtha tato rudrapuraṃ śubham ||15||
khe rohiṇī śaśadharābhimatā hitā ca kiṃ kāraṇaṃ śṛṇu narendra nivedayāmi || saṃpiṣṭamāṣaraciteṃdurikāśituṃ yadbhuktaṃ jale guḍaghṛtena phalaṃ tadetat ||16|| ||
iti śrībhaviṣye mahāpurāṇa uttaraparvaṇi śrīkṛṣṇayudhiṣṭhirasaṃvāde rohiṇīcandravrataṃ nāma saptaṣaṣṭitamodhyāyaḥ || 67 || .a|||||
aviyogavratavarṇanam
|| yudhiṣṭhira uvāca || ||
aviyogavrataṃ brūhi mama yādavanaṃdana ||
vidhānaṃ tasya kīdṛkca kiṃ puṇyaṃ kā.atra devatā || 1 ||
|| śrīkṛṣṇa uvāca || ||
śṛṇu pāṃḍava yatnena kathyamānaṃ yathākhilam ||
aviyogavrataṃ nāma vratānāmuttamottamam || 2 ||
prauṣṭhapade śuklapakṣe dvādaśyāṃ prātarutthitaḥ ||
yastu śuklāṃbaradharaḥ snātvā pūrvaṃ jalāśaye || 3 ||
hṛdye ramye saudhataṭe hariṃ likhyeta maṇḍale ||
godhūmacūrṇapiṣṭena lakṣmī tatpārśvavartinīm || 4 ||
tatraiva ca haraṃ gaurīṃ sāvitrīṃ brahmaṇā saha ||
rājñīsahitaṃ ca raviṃ trailokyodyotakārakam || 5 ||
gaṃdhaiḥ puṣpaiśca dhūpairnaivedyairarcayedyathāśaktyā ||
aviyogavratacārī maṃtreṇānena rājendra||6||
nārī vā puruṣo vā aviyogamatiṃ dṛḍhāṃ kṛtvā ||
bhaktyā dhyānī maunī dāṃpatyaṃ pūjayeddevam || 7 ||
sahasramūrddhā puruṣaḥ padmanābho janārdanaḥ ||
vyāso.api kapilācāryo bhagavānpuruṣottamaḥ ||8||
nārāyaṇo madhuliho viṣṇurdāmoharo hariḥ ||
mahāvarāho goviṃdaḥ keśavo garuḍadhvajaḥ || 9 ||
śrīdharaḥ puṃḍarīkākṣo viśvarūpastrivikramaḥ ||
upendro vāmano rāmo vaikuṃṭho mādhavo dhruvaḥ || 4.68.10 ||
vāsudevo hṛṣīkeśaḥ kṛṣṇaḥ sakarṣaṇo.acyutaḥ ||
aniruddho mahāyogī pradyumno naṃda eva ca || 11 ||
nityaṃ sa me śubhaḥ prītaḥ saśrīkaḥ keśaśūlinaḥ ||
umāpatinīlakaṃṭhaḥ sthāṇuḥ śaṃbhurbhagākṣihā || || 12 ||
īśāno bhairavaḥ śūlī tryaṃbakastripurāṃtakaḥ ||
kapardīśo mahāliṃgī mahākālo vṛṣadhvajaḥ ||13||
śivaḥ śarvo mahādevo rudro bhūtamaheśvaraḥ ||
mamāstu saha pārvatyā śaṃkaraḥ śaṃkaraściram || 14 ||
brahmā śaṃbhuḥ prabhuḥ sraṣṭā puṣkarī prapitāmahaḥ ||
hiraṇyagarbho vedajñaḥ parameṣṭhī prajāpatiḥ ||15 ||
caturmukhaḥ sṛṣṭikartā svayaṃbhūḥ kamalāsanaḥ ||
virañciḥ padmayoniśca mamāstu varadaḥ sadā||16||
ādityo bhāskaro bhānuḥ sūryorkaḥ savitā raviḥ ||
mārtaṃḍo maṃḍalajyetiragniraśmirjaneśvaraḥ || 17 ||
prabhākaraḥ saptasaptistaraṇiḥ saraṇiḥ khagaḥ ||
divākaro dinakaraḥ sahasrāṃśurmarīcimān || 18 |||
padmaprabodhanaḥ pūṣā kiraṇī merubhūṣaṇaḥ ||
nikuṃbhoḥ varṇabho devaḥ suprīto.astu sadā mama ||19||
lakṣmīḥ śrīḥ saṃpadā padmā mā vibhūtirharipriyā ||
pārvatī lalitā gaurī umā śaṃkaravallabhā || 4.68.20 ||
gāyatrī prakṛtiḥ sṛṣṭiḥ sāvitrī vedhaso matā ||
rājñī bhānumatī saṃjñā nityabhā bhāskarapriyā| || 21 ||
iti padmanābhaśaṃkarapitāmahārkkādīnsapriyānpūjya ||
dattvādattvā dānaṃ bhuktvā cāṃte vrajedveśma || 22 ||
dvādaśyāṃ carati naro vratametadbhaktibhāvito loke ||
bhavati yaśodhanabhāgī saṃtatimānvigatasaṃtāpaḥ || 23 ||
hariharahiraṇyagarbhaprabhākarāṇāṃ krameṇa lokeṣu ||
bhuktvā bhogānvipulānatha yogī nirvṛto bhavati || 24 ||
strīpuṃsoryadi yugmaṃ puruṣo vā yadi samācarati kaścit ||
nārī vā vratametaccīrtvā yātyālayaṃ viṣṇoḥ||25||
iti śrībhaviṣye mahāpurāṇa uttaraparvaṇi śrīkṛṣṇayudhiṣṭhirasaṃvāde hariharahiraṇyagarbhaprabhākarāṇāmaviyogavrataṃ nāmāṣṭaṣaṣṭitamo.adhyāyaḥ || 68 || ||
govatsadvādaśīvratavarṇanam
|| yudhiṣṭhira uvāca || ||
akṣauhiṇyo daśāṣṭau ca madrājyārthe kṣayaṃ gatāḥ ||
tena pāpena me citte jugupsātīva vartate || 1 ||
tatra brāhmaṇarājanyavaiśyaśūdrādayo hatāḥ ||
bhīṣmadroṇakaliṃgādikarṇaśalyasuyodhanāḥ || 2 ||
teṣāṃ vadhena yatpāpaṃ tanme marmāṇi kṛṃtati ||
pāpaprakṣālanaṃ kañciddharmaṃ brūhi jagatpate || 3 ||
|| śrīkṛṣṇa uvāca || ||
sumahatpuṇyajananaṃ govatsadvādaśīvratam ||
asti pārtha mahābāho pāṃḍavānāṃ dhuraṃdhara || 4 || ||
|| yudhiṣṭhira uvāca || ||
keyaṃ godvādaśī nāma vidhānaṃ tatra kīdṛśam ||
kathameṣā samutpannā kasminkāle janārdana || 5 ||
etatsarvaṃ hare brūhi pāhi māṃ narakārṇavāt||6||
śrīkṛṣṇa uvāca||
purā kṛtayuge pārtha munikoṭiḥ samāgatā||
tapaścacāra vipulaṃ nāmavratadharā girau||7||
harṣeṇa mahatāviṣṭā daivadarśanakāṃkṣayā||
jaṃbūmārge mahāpuṇye nāmatīrthavibhūṣite||8||
pāriyātre siddhapātre ramye taṃdulikāśrame||
ṭaṃṭāviriti vikhyāte uttame śikhare nṛpa || 9 ||
tāpasāraṇyamatulaṃ divyakānanamaṃḍitam ||
vaśiṣṭhaśukrāṃgirasakratudakṣādibhirvṛtam || 4.69.10 ||
valkalājinasaṃvīterbhṛgorāśramamaṃḍalam ||
nānāmṛgagaṇairjuṣṭaṃ śākhāmṛgagaṇairyutam ||11||
praśāṃtasiṃhahariṇaṃ sarvavastugatadrumam ||
gahanaṃ nirṛtaṃ ramyaṃ latāsaṃtānasaṃkulam || 12 ||
siṃhavyāghragajairbhinnaṃ hariṇaiḥ śabaraiḥ śaśaiḥ ||
varāhairurubhiścitraiḥ samaṃtādupaśobhitam || 13 ||
tapasyatā tatra teṣāṃ munīnāṃ darśanārthinām ||
vyājaṃ cakre mahīnātha dvādaśārdhārdhalocanaḥ || 14 ||
babhūva brāhmaṇo vṛddho jarāpāṃḍuramūrddhajaḥ ||
ślathaccarmatanuḥ kubjo yaṣṭipāṇiḥ savepathuḥ ||
umāpi cakre gorūpaṃ śṛṇu tatpārtha yādṛśam || 15 ||
kṣīrodatoyasaṃbhūtā yāḥ purāmṛtamaṃthane ||
pañca gāvaḥ śubhāḥ pārtha pañcalokasya mātaraḥ || 16 ||
nandā subhadrā surabhī suśīlā bahulā iti ||
etā lokopakārāya devānāṃ tarpaṇāya ca ||17||
jamadagnibhāradvājavaśiṣṭhāsitagautamāḥ ||
jagṛhuḥ kāmadāḥ pañca gāvo dattāḥ suraistataḥ || 18 ||
gomayaṃ rocanā mūtraṃ kṣīraṃ dadhi ghṛtaṃ gavām ||
ṣaḍaṃgāni pavitrāṇi saṃśuddhikaraṇāni ca || 19 ||
gomayādutthitaḥ śrīmānbilvavṛkṣaḥ śivapriyaḥ ||
tatrāste padmahastā śrīḥ śrīvṛkṣastena sa smṛtaḥ ||
bījānyutpalapadmānāṃ punarjātāni gomayāt || 4.69.20 ||
gorocanā ca māṃgalyā pavitrā sarvasādhikā ||
gomūtrādguggulurjātaḥ sugaṃdhiḥ priyadarśanaḥ ||
āhāraḥ sarvadevānāṃ śivasya ca viśeṣataḥ || 21 ||
yadbījaṃ jagataḥ kiñcittajjñeyaṃ kṣīrasaṃbhavam ||
dadhuḥ sarvāṇi jātāni maṅgalānyarthasiddhaye ||
ghṛtādamṛtamutpannaṃ devānāṃ tṛptikāraṇam || 22 ||
brāhmaṇāścaiva gāvaśca kulamekaṃ dvidhā kṛtam ||
ekatra mantrāstiṣṭhaṃti haviranyatra tiṣṭhati ||23||
goṣu yajñāḥ pravartaṃte goṣu devāḥ pratiṣṭhitāḥ||
goṣu vedāḥ samutkīrṇāḥ saṣa ḍaṃgapadakramāḥ || 24 ||
śṛṅgamūle gavāṃ nityaṃ brahmā viṣṇuśca saṃsthitau ||
śṛṅgāgre sarvatīrthāni sthāvarāṇi carāṇi ca || 25 ||
śivo madhye mahādevaḥ sarvakāraṇakāraṇam ||
salāṭe saṃsthitā gaurī nāsāvaṃśe ca ṣaṇmukhaḥ ||26||
kaṃbalāśvatarau nāgau nāsāpuṭasamāśritau||
karṇayoraśvinau devau cakṣurbhyāṃ śaśibhāskarau || 27 ||
daṃteṣu vasavaḥ sarve jihvāyāṃ varuṇaḥ sthitaḥ ||
sarasvatī ca kuhare yamayakṣau ca gaṇḍayoḥ || 28 ||
saṃdhyādvayaṃ tatheṣṭābhyāṃ grīvāyāṃ ca puraṃdaraḥ ||
rakṣāṃsi kakude dyauśca pārṣṇikāye vyavasthitā || 29 ||
catuṣpātsakalo dharmo nityaṃ jaṃghāsu tiṣṭhati ||
khuramadhyeṣu gandharvāḥ khurāgreṣu ca pannagāḥ || 4.69.30 ||
khurāṇāṃ paścime bhāge rākṣasāḥ saṃpratiṣṭhitāḥ ||
rudrā ekādaśa pṛṣṭhe varuṇaḥ sarvasandhiṣu || 31 ||
śroṇītaṭasthāḥ pitaraḥ kapoleṣu ca mānavāḥ ||
śrīrapāne gavāṃ nityaṃ svāhālaṃkāramāśritāḥ || 32 ||
ādityā raśmayo vālāḥ piṇḍībhūtā vyavasthitāḥ||
sākṣādgaṃgā ca gomṛtre gomaye yamunā sthitā || 33 ||
trayastriṃśaddevakoṭyo romakūpe vyavasthitāḥ ||
udare pṛthivī sarvā saśailavanakānanā || 34 ||
catvāraḥ sāgarāḥ proktā gavāṃ ye tu payodharāḥ ||
parjanyaḥ kṣīradhārāsu meghā biṃduvyavasthitāḥ ||35||
jaṭhare gārhapatyo.agnirdakṣiṇāgnirhṛdisthitaḥ |||
kaṇṭhe āhavanīyo.agniḥ sabhyo.agnistāluni sthitaḥ || 36 ||
asthivyavasthitāḥ śailā majjāsu kratavaḥ sthitāḥ ||
ṛgvedo.atharvavedaśca sāmavedo yaju stathā || 37 ||
suraktapītakṛṣṇādau gavāṃ varṇe vyavasthitāḥ ||
tāsāṃ rūpamumā smṛtvā surabhīṇāṃ yudhiṣṭhira || 38 ||
saṃsmṛtya tatkṣaṇādgaurī iyeṣa sadṛśīṃ tanum ||
ātmānaṃ vidadhe devī dharmarāja śṛṇuṣva tām || 39 ||
ṣaḍunnatāṃ pañcanimnāṃ maṃḍūkākṣīṃ suvāladhim ||
tāmrastanīṃ raupyakaṭiṃ sukhurīṃ sumukhī sitām || 4.69.40 ||
suśīlāṃ ca sutasnehāṃ sukṣīrāṃ supayodharām ||
gorūpiṇīmumāṃ spṛṣṭvā svāminīṃ tāṃ savatsikām || 41 ||
caryayā prataranhṛṣṭo mahādevaḥ svacetasi ||
śanaiḥśanairyayau pārtha viprarūpī mahāśramam || 42 ||
dattvā kulapateḥ pārśvaṃ bhṛgostāṃ gāṃ nyavedayat ||
tapasvināṃ mahātejāstāṃ ca sarveṣu pāṃḍava || 43 ||
nyāsarūpāṃ dadau dhenuṃ rakṣitvā tāṃ dinadvayam ||
yāvatsnātvā itastīrtvā jaṃbūmārgaṃ viyāmyaham || 44 |||
rakṣiṣyāmaḥ pratijñāte munibhiḥ surabhīmimām ||
antarddhimagamaddevaḥ punarvyāghro babhūva ha || 45 ||
vajracakranakho devīṃ jvalatpiṃgalalocanaḥ ||
jihvā karālavadano jihvālāṃgūladāruṇaḥ || 46 ||
saṃprāyādāśramapadaṃ tāṃ ca dhenuṃ savatsikām ||
trāsayāmāsa tāṃ deva munīnāṃ dikṣvavasthitaḥ || 47 |||
ṛṣayo.api samākrāṃtā ārtanādaṃ pracakrire ||
hāhetyuccaiḥ kecidūcurhuṃhuṃkāraistathāpare || 48 ||
tālāsphoṭāndaduḥ kecidvyāghraṃ dṛṣṭvātibhairavam ||
sāpi haṃbhāravāṃścakre gaurutplutya savatsikā || 49 ||
tasyā vyāghrabhayārtāyāḥ kapilāyā yudhiṣṭhira ||
palāyaṃtyā śilāmadhye kṣaṇaṃ khuracatuṣṭayam ||4.69.50||
vyāghravatsakayostatra vaṃditaṃ surakinnaraiḥ ||
dṛśyate.atīva suvyaktaṃ tadadyāpi catuṣṭayam || 51 ||
sajalaṃ śivaliṃgaṃ ca śambhostīrthaṃ taduttamam ||
yassaṃspṛśati rājendra sa govadhyāṃ vyapohati || 52 ||
tatra snātvā mahātīrthe jaṃbūmārge narādhipa ||
brahmahatyādibhiḥ pāpairmucyate nātra saṃśayaḥ || || 53 ||
tataste munayaḥ kruddhā brahmadattāṃ mahāsvanām ||
jaghnurghaṃṭāṃ surairdattāṃ girikandarapūraṇīm || 54 ||
śabdena tena vyāghro.api muktvā gāvaṃ sava tsikām ||
vipraistatra kṛtaṃ nāma ḍhuṇḍhāgiririti śrutiḥ ||
taṃ prapaśyaṃti ye pārtha te rudrā nātra saṃśayaḥ || 55 ||
atha pratyakṣatāṃ śreṣṭhasteṣāṃ devo maheśvaraḥ ||
śūlapāṇistripurahā kāmaghno vṛṣabhe sthitaḥ || 56 ||
umāsahāyo varadaḥ sasvāmī savināyakaḥ ||
sanaṃdiḥ samahākālaḥ saśṛṅgī samano haraḥ || 57 ||
vīrabhadrā ca cāmuṃḍā ghaṃṭākarṇādibhirvṛtā ||
mātṛbhirbhūtasaṃghātairyakṣarākṣasaguhyakaiḥ ||
devadānavagandharvamunividyādharoragaiḥ || 58 ||
praṇamya devadevāya patnībhiḥ sahitairumā ||
gorūpiṇī savatsā ca pūjitā brahmacāribhiḥ ||59||
kārtike śuklapakṣe tu dvādaśyāṃ naṃdinīvratam ||
tataḥ prabhṛti rājendra avatīrṇaṃ mahītale || 4.69.60 ||
uttānapādena tathā vrataṃ cīrṇamidaṃ śṛṇu ||
uttānapādanāmāsītkṣatriyaḥ pṛthivīpate ||61||
tasya bhāryā dvayaṃ cāsīdruciśughnīti viśrutam ||
śughnījāto dhruvaḥ putro vāmapādadharo.alasaḥ || 62 ||
rucyāḥ samarpitaḥ śughnyā dhruvo.ayaṃ rakṣyatāṃ sakhi ||
ahaṃ kariṣye śuśrūṣāṃ bhartustāvatsadā svayam || 63 ||
rucī rasavatīṃ nityaṃ pratyahaṃ kurute gṛhe ||
akarodbhartṛśuśrūṣāṃ śughnī nityaṃ pativratā ||64||
kadācitkrodhamātsaryātsāpatnyaṃ darśitaṃ tayā ||
svayaṃ rucyā nihatyāsau śiśuḥ khaṃḍalaśaḥ kṛtaḥ || 65 ||
tāpikāyāṃ tathā sthālyāṃ pakvasiddhaḥ susaṃskṛtaḥ ||
annabhojanavelāyāṃ dadāti nṛpabhājane || 66 ||
taṃ vai bhakṣayituṃ duṣṭā sāmiṣaṃ bhojanaṃ kila ||
atha bhojanavelāyāṃ vavre jīvitamāptavān || 67 ||
tathaiva prahasanbālo māturutsaṃgajo.abhavat ||
taṃ dṛṣṭvā mahadāścaryaṃ rucī papraccha vismitā || 68 ||
kimetadbrūhi vṛttāṃtaṃ kasyeyaṃ vyuṣṭiruttamā ||
kiṃ tvayācaritaṃ kiñcidvrataṃ dattaṃ hutaṃ tathā || 69 ||
satyaṃsatyaṃ punaḥ satyaṃ yena jīvati te sutaḥ||
mamāyaṃ sapta vārāṃstu viśalyaśakalī kṛtaḥ||4.69.70||
pakvaḥ svayaṃ kṛtaḥ sthālyāṃ vyañjanaiḥ saha bhojanaiḥ||
pariviṣyamāṇaḥ sa punaḥ kathaṃ jīvitamāptavān||71||
kiṃ te siddhā mahāvidyā mṛtasañjīvanī śubhā||
ratnaṃ maṇirmahāratnaṃ yogāñjanamahauṣadham||72||
kathayasva mahābhāge satyaṃsatyaṃ bhaginyasi ||
evamukte rucistasyai vyācakhyau vatsagovratam || 73 ||
kārttike caiva dvādaśyāṃ yathā cānuṣṭhitaṃ purā ||
vratasyāsya prabhāveṇa punarjīvati me sutaḥ || 74 |
vatso me vatsavelāyāṃ mṛto.arthaṃ labhate punaḥ ||
samāgamaśca bhavati vrataiḥ pravasitairapi || 75 ||
yathārthametadvyākhyātaṃ te ca godvādaśīvratam ||
tavāpi ruci tatsarvaṃ bhaviṣyati śubhaṃ priyam || 76 ||
evamuktaṃ vrataṃ cīrṇaṃ rucyā putrāḥ sukhaṃ dhanam ||
saṃprāptā jīvitāṃte ca dhruvasthāne niveśitāḥ || 77 ||
brahmaṇā sṛṣṭikāreṇa rucirbhartrā sahāsitā ||
daśanakṣatrasaṃyukto dhruvaḥ sodyāpi dṛśyate ||
dhuvarkṣe ca yadā dṛṣṭe lokaḥ pāpaiḥ pramucyate || 78 ||
|| yudhiṣṭhira uvāca || ||
kīdṛśaṃ tadvidhānaṃ ca tanme brūhi janārdana||
yatkṛtaṃ śughnivacanādrucyā yadukulodbhava || 79 ||
|| śrīkṛṣṇa uvāca ||
saṃprāpte kārtike māsi śuklapakṣe kurūttama||
dvādaśyāṃ snātvā puṇye jalāśaye ||
naro vā yadi vā nārī ekabhaktaṃ prakalpayet ||4.69.80||
tato madhyāhnasamaye dṛṣṭvā dhenuṃ savatsikām||
suśīlāṃ vatsalāṃ śvetāṃ kapilāṃ raktarūpiṇīm ||81||
brāhmaṇakṣatriyaviśāṃ śūdrāṇāṃ strījaneśvara ||
yathākrameṇa pūjyaināṃ gaṃdhapuppajalākṣataiḥ || 82||
kuṃkumālaktakairdīpairmāṣānnavaṭakaiḥ śubhaiḥ ||
kusumairvatsakaṃ cāpi maṃtreṇānena pāṃḍava ||83||
oṃ mātā rudrāṇāṃ duhitā vasūnāṃ svasādityānāmamṛtasya nābhiḥ ||
pranuvocaṃ cikituṣe janāya mā gāmanāgāmaditiṃ vadhiṣṭa.a.a namo namaḥ svāhā || 84 || itthaṃ saṃpūjya gāṃ pṛṣṭvā paścāttāṃ ca kṣamāpayet ||
oṃ sarvadevamaye devi lokānāṃ śubhanaṃdini ||
mātarmamābhilaṣitaṃ saphalaṃ kuru naṃdini || 85 ||
evamabhyarcayedekāṃ gāmetaddhi gavāhnikam ||
paryukṣya vāriṇā bhaktyā praṇamya surabhīṃ tataḥ || 86 ||
taddine tāpikāpakvaṃ sthālīpākaṃ ca varjayet ||
bhūmau svayaṃ brahmacārī śayīta phalamāpnuyāt|| 87 ||
yāvaṃti gātre romāṇi gavāṃ kauravanaṃdana ||
tāvatkālaṃ sa vasati goloke nātra saṃśayaḥ || 88 ||
meroḥ puryaṣṭakaṃ ramyamiṃdrāgniyamarakṣasām ||
varuṇānilayakṣāṇāṃ rudrasya ca yudhiṣṭhira ||
tāsāmupari golokastatra yāti sa govratī || 89 ||
ūrje site dvidaśame.ahani gāṃ savatsāṃ yāḥ pūjayaṃti kusumairvaṭakaiśca hṛdyaiḥ ||
tāḥ sarvakāmasukhabhogavibhūtibhājo martye vasaṃti suciraṃ bahujīvavatsāḥ || 4.69.90 || || iti śrībhaviṣye mahāpurāṇa uttaraparvaṇi śrīkṛṣṇayudhiṣṭhirasaṃvāde govatsadvādaśīvrataṃ nāmaikonasaptatitamo.adhyāyaḥ || 69 || cha ||
devaśayanotthāpanadvādaśīvratavarṇanam
|| śrīkṛṣṇa uvāca || ||
śṛṇu pārtha pravakṣyāmi govindaśayanaṃ vratam ||
kaṭadānaṃ samutthānaṃ cāturmāsyavratakramam || 1 ||
|| yudhiṣṭhira uvāca || ||
kiṃ drevaśayanaṃ nāma devassvapiti cāpyasau ||
devaḥ kimarthaṃ svapiti kiṃ vidhānaṃ sadā vada || 2 ||
ke maṃtrāḥ ke ca niyamā vratānyatha kriyā ca kā ||
kiṃ grāhyaṃ kiṃ ca bhoktavyaṃ supte deve janārdane || 3 ||
|| śrīkṛṣṇa uvāca || ||
mithunasthe sahasrāṃśau sthāpayenmadhusūdanam ||
tulārāśigate tasminpunarutthāpayedvratam || 4 ||
adhimāse ca patite eṣa eva vidhikramaḥ ||
nānyathā sthāpayeddevaṃ na caivotthāpayeddharim || 5 ||
āṣāḍhasya site pakṣe ekādaśyāmupoṣitaḥ ||
sthāpayedbhaktimānviṣṇuṃ śaṃkhacakragadādharam || 6 ||
pītāṃbaradharaṃ saumyaṃ paryaṃke svāstṛte śubhe ||
śuklavastrasamācchanne sopadhāne yudhiṣṭhira || 7 ||
itihāsapurāṇajño viṣṇubhaktopi yaḥ pumān ||
snāpayitvā dadhikṣīraghṛtakṣaudrajalaistathā || 8 ||
samālabhya śubhairgaṃdhairdhūpairva strairalaṃkṛtam ||
pūjayitvā kuṃkumādyairmaṃtreṇānena pāṇḍava || 9 ||
supte tvayi jagannātha jagatsuptaṃ bhavedidam ||
vibuddhe tvayi budhyeta jagatsarvaṃ carācaram || 4.70.10 ||
evaṃ tāṃ pratimāṃ viṣṇoḥ sthāpayitvā yudhiṣṭhira ||
tasyaivāgre svayaṃ vācaṃ gṛhṇīyānniyamāṃstataḥ || 11 ||
caturo vārṣikānmāsāndevasyotthāpanāvadhi ||
strī vā naro vā madbhakto dharmārthaṃ sudṛḍhavrataḥ ||12|| gṛhṇīyānniyamānetāndaṃtadhāvanapūrvakam ||
teṣāṃ phalāni vakṣyāmi tatkartṛrṇāṃ pṛthakpṛthak || 13 ||
madhurasvaro bhavedrājā puruṣo guḍavarjanāt ||
tailasya varjanātpārtha sundarāṃgaḥ prajāyate || 14 ||
kaṭutailaparityāgācchatrukṣayamavāpnuyāt ||
madhūkatailatyāgena saubhāgyamatulaṃ bhavet || 15 ||
puṣpādibhogatyāgena svarge vidyādharo bhavet ||
yogābhyāsī bhavedyastu sa brahmapadamāpnuyāt || 16 || kaṭukāmlatiktamadhurakṣārakāṣāyameva ca ||
yo varjayetsa vairūpyaṃ daurgatyaṃ nāpnuyātkvacit || 17 ||
tāṃbūlavarjanādbhogī raktakaṇṭhaśca jāyate ||
ghṛtatyāgātsulāvaṇyaṃ sarvasiddhiḥ punarbhavet || 18 ||
phalatyāgācca matimānbahuputraśca jāyate ||
śākapatrāśanādrogī apakvādo.amalo bhavet || 19 || pādābhyaṃgaparityāgācchirobhyaṃgācca pārthiva ||
dīptimān dīptakaraṇo yakṣo dravyapatirbhavet || 4.70.20 ||
dadhidugdha takraniyamādgolokaṃ labhate naraḥ ||
indrātithitvamāpnoti sthālīpākavivarjitāt || 21 ||
labheta saṃtatiṃ dīrghāṃ tāpapakvasya bhakṣaṇāt ||
bhūmāvastaraśāyī ca viṣṇoranucaro bhavet || 22 ||
sadā muniḥ sadā yogī madhumāṃsasya varjanāt ||
nirvyādhirnīrujaujasvī surāmadyavivarjanāt || || 23 ||
evamādiparityāgāddharmaḥ syāddharmanandana ||
ekāṃtaropavāsena brahmaloke mahīyate || 24 ||
dhāraṇaṃ nakharomāṇāṃ gaṃgāsnānaṃ dinedine ||
maunavratī bhavedyastu tasyājñā.askhalitā bhavet || 25 ||
bhūmau bhuṃkte sadā yastu sa pṛthivyāḥ patirbhavet ||
namo nārāyaṇāyeti japatonaśanaṃ phalam || 26 ||
pādābhivaṃdanādviṣṇorlabhedgodānajaṃ phalam ||
viṣṇupādāṃbusaṃsparśātkṛtakṛtyo bhavennaraḥ || 27 ||
viṣṇudevakule kuryādupalepanamarcanam ||
kalpasthāyī bhavedrājā sa naro nātra saṃśayaḥ || 28 ||
pradakṣiṇāśataṃ yastu karoti stutipāṭhakaḥ ||
haṃsayuktavimānena sa ca viṣṇu puraṃ vrajet || 29 ||
gītavādyakaro viṣṇorgāṃdharvaṃ lokamāpnuyāt ||
nityaṃ śāstravinodena lokānyastu prabodhati || 4.70.30 ||
sa vyāsarūpī bhagavānaṃte viṣṇupuraṃ vrajet ||
puṣpamālādibhiḥ pūjāṃ kṛtvā viṣṇupuraṃ vrajet || 31 ||
nityasnāyī naro yastu narakaṃ sa na paśyati ||
bhojanaṃ ca jayedyastu sa snānaṃ pauṣkaraṃ labhet || 32 ||
kṛtvā prekṣaṇakaṃ divyaṃ rājyaṃ so.apsarasāṃ labhet ||
ayācitena prāpnoti vāpīkūpe yathā phalam || 33 ||
ṣaṣṭhakālennabhojyena sthāyī svarge naro bhavet ||
parṇeṣu yo naro bhuṃkte kurukṣetraphalaṃ labhet ||34||
śilāyāṃ bhojanānnityaṃ snānaṃ prayāgajaṃ bhavet ||
yāmadvaye jalatyāgānna rogaiḥ paribhūyate || 35 ||
evamādivrate pārtha tuṣṭimāyāti hetutaḥ ||
supte sati jagannāthe keśave garuḍadhvaje || 36 ||
nivartate kriyāḥ sarvāścāturvaṇyasya bhārata ||
vivāhavratabaṃdhādibhūtasaṃskāradīkṣaṇam || 37 ||
yajñāśca gṛhaveśādi godānācca pratiṣṭhitam ||
pūjyāni yāni karmāṇi tāni sarvāṇi varjayet || 38 ||
asaṃkrāṃtaṃ tu māsaṃ vai daive pitrye ca varjayet ||
malimlucamaśaucaṃ ca sūryasaṃkrāṃtivarjitam || 39 ||
prāpte bhādrapade māsi ekādaśyāṃ dine hareḥ ||
kaṭadānaṃ bhavedviṣṇormahāpūjā pravartayet || 4.70.40 ||
ya etadeva śayanaṃ tatredaṃ kāraṇaṃ śṛṇu ||
purā tapaḥprabhāvena toṣayitvā hariṃ vibhum || 41 ||
mamāpi mānayatyaṅgaṃ prārthito yoganidrayā ||
nirīkṣya cātmano devā ruddhaṃ lakṣmyā uraḥsthalam || 42 || śaṃkhacakrāsimārgādyairbāhavopyatha vakṣasā ||
adho nābherviruddhaṃ me vainateyena pakṣiṇā || 43 ||
mukaṭena śiro ruddhaṃ kuṃḍalābhyāṃ ca karṇakau ||
tato dadāvahaṃ tuṣṭo netrayoḥ sthānamādarāt || 44 ||
caturo vārṣikānmāsānmā.a.aśritā sā bhaviṣyati ||
yoganidrāpi māhātmyaṃ śrutvā paurātanaṃ śubham || 45 ||
cakāra locanāvāsamato.arthaṃ me yudhiṣṭhira ||
ahaṃ ca tāṃ bhāvayitvā mānayāmi manasvinīm || 46 ||
yoganidrā mahānidrā śeṣābhiśayane sthitaḥ ||
kṣīrodadhau ca viṃdhyagre dhautapādaḥ samāhitaḥ || 47 || lakṣmīkarāṃbujairacchairmṛdyamānapadadvayaḥ ||
tasminkāle.api madbhaktau yo māsāṃścaturaḥ kṣipet || 48 ||
vratairanekainiyamaiḥ pāṃḍavaśreṣṭha mānavaḥ ||
kalpasthāyī viṣṇulokaṃ sa vrajennātra saṃśayaḥ || 49 ||
tato.avabudhyate devaḥ śrīmāñchaṅkhagadādharaḥ ||
kārtike śuklapakṣasya ekādaśyāṃ pṛthakchṛṇu || 4.70.50 ||
mantreṇānena rājendra devamutthāpayeddvijaḥ ||
idaṃ viṣṇurvicakrame svāsane ca tadā nṛpa || 51 ||
samutthite tadā viṣṇo kriyāḥ sarvāḥ pravartayet ||
mahātūryarave rātrau bhrāmayetsyaṃdane sthitam ||52||
utthite devadeveśe nagare pārthivaḥ svayam ||
dīpodrekakare mārge nṛtyagītajanākule || 53 ||
yaṃyaṃ dāmodaraḥ paśyedutthito dharaṇīdharaḥ ||
taṃtaṃ pradeyaṃ rājendra sarvaṃ svargāya kalpate || 54 ||
rātrau prajāgare devamekādaśyāṃ surālaye ||
prabhāte vimale snātvā dvādaśyāṃ viṣṇumarcayet || 55 ||
homayeddhavyavāhaṃ ca havyadravyairghṛtādibhiḥ ||
tato viprāñchubhānsnātvā bhojayedannavistaraiḥ || 56 ||
ghṛtadadhikṣaudrakādyairguḍadhūpaiḥ samodakaiḥ ||
yajamāno.api saṃtuṣṭastvarā hāsyavivarjitaḥ || 57 ||
ekādaśa daśāṣṭau vā paṃca dvau vā kurūttama ||
arcayeccandanairdhūpaiḥ puṣpairgandhairdvijottamān || 58 ||
śraddhoktavidhinā pārtha bhojayedbhāgyavānyatīn ||
ācāṃtebhyastato dadyāttyāgaṃ yatkiñcideva hi || 59 ||
svavācā svamanobhīṣṭapatrapuṣpaphalādikam ||
caturo vārṣikānmāsānniyamo yasya yaḥ kṛtaḥ || 4.70.60 ||
kathayitvā dvijebhyastaṃ dadyādbhaktyā sadakṣiṇām ||
dattvā visarjayedviprāṃstato bhuñjīta ca svayam || 61 ||
yattyaktaṃ caturo māsānpravṛttintasya cācaret ||
evaṃ ya ācaretpārtha so.anantaṃ dharmamāpnuyāt || 62 ||
avasāne tu rājendra vāsudevapurīṃ vrajet ||
yasyāvighnaiḥ samāpyeta cāturmāsyavrataṃ nṛpa || 63 ||
sa bhavetkṛtakṛtyastu na punarmātṛko bhavet ||
yo devaśayanaṃ pārtha māsaṃmāsaṃ samācareta || 64 ||
utthānaṃ cāpi kṛṣṇasya sa harerlokamāpnuyāt ||
śṛṇoti dhyāyati stauti juhotyākhyāti yo naraḥ ||
viṣṇorbhaktiṃ parāṃ pārtha sa gacchedvaiṣṇavaṃ padam || 65 ||
dugdhābdhibhogaśayane bhagavānananto yasmindine svapiti yatra vibudhyate vā || tasminnananyamanasāmupavāsabhājāṃ puṃsāṃ dadāti sugatiṃ garuḍāṃgasaṃgī || 66 || ||
iti śrībhaviṣye mahāpurāṇa uttaraparvaṇi śrīkṛṣṇayudhiṣṭhirasaṃvāde devaśayanotthāpanaddvādaśī vratavarṇanaṃ nāma saptatitamo.adhyāyaḥ || 70 || || cha ||
nīrājanadvādaśīvratavarṇanam
|| śrīkṛṣṇa uvāca || ||
purā babhūva rājarṣirajapāla iti śrutaḥ ||
prārthitaḥ sa prajā bhistu sarvaduḥkhāpanuttaye || 1 ||
duḥkhāpanodaṃ kuru bho vyādhitānāṃ nareśvara ||
evamuktaściraṃ dhyātvā kṛtvā vyādhīnprajāgaṇān || 2 ||
pālayāmāsa hṛṣṭo.asāvajapālastato.abhavat ||
tenaiṣā nirmitā śāṃtirnāmnā nīrājatā jane || 3 ||
tasyāstu pāṃḍavaśreṣṭha lakṣaṇaṃ vacmi te śṛṇu ||
rājñā purohitaiḥ sārddhamanuṣṭheyā vidhānataḥ || 4 ||
tasminkāle vabhūvātha rāvaṇo rākṣaseśvaraḥ ||
laṃkāsthitaḥ suragaṇānniyunakti svakarmasu || 5 ||
akhaṇḍamaṇḍalaṃ candramātapatraṃ cakāra ha ||
indraṃ senāpatiṃ cakre vāyuṃ pāṃsupramārjakam || 6 ||
varuṇaṃ baddhakarmasthaṃ dhanadaṃ dhanarakṣakam ||
yamaṃ saṃyamane.arīṇāṃ yuyuje maṃtraṇe manum || 7 ||
meghāśchādanti nṛpatiṃ drumapuṣpādipaṃktiṣu ||
saptarṣayaḥ śāṃtiparā brahmaṇā saha saṃsthitāḥ || 8 ||
yāmikā madhyakakṣāyāṃ gandharvā gītatatparāḥ ||
prekṣaṇīye.apsarovṛṃdaṃ bāhye vidyādharā vṛtāḥ || 9 ||
gaṃgādyāḥ saritaḥ pāne gārhapatye hutāśanaḥ ||
viśvakarmānnasaṃskāre yamaḥ śilpiprayojane||4.71.1 0||
tiṣṭhaṃti pārthivāḥ sarve puraḥsevāvidhāyinaḥ ||
dṛśyaṃte bhāsurai ratnaiḥ prabhāvaṃto vibhūṣaṇaiḥ || 11 ||
saṃdṛśya rāvaṇaḥ prāha praśastaṃ pratihārakam ||
sevāṃ kartuṃ mama sthāne brūhi ko.atra samāgataḥ || 12 ||
sa uvāca praṇamyāgre daṃḍapāṇirniśācaraḥ ||
eṣa kakutstho māṃdhātā dhuṃdhumāro nalorjunaḥ || 13 ||
yayātirnahuṣo bhīmo rāghavoyaṃ vidūrathaḥ ||
ete cānye ca bahavo rājāna iti āsate || 14 ||
meghākārāstava sthāne nājapāla ihāgataḥ ||
rāvaṇaḥ kupitaḥ prāha śīghraṃ dūtaṃ vyasarjayat||15||
ityukte prahito dūto dhūmrākṣo nāma rākṣasaḥ ||
dhūmrākṣa gaccha brūhi tvamajapālaṃ mamājñayā || 16 ||
sevāṃ kuru samāgaccha kabandho yasya pārthivaḥ ||
anyathā candrahāsena tvāṃ kariṣye vikaṃdharam || 77 ||
rāvaṇenaivamuktastu dhūmrākṣo garuḍo yathā ||
saṃprāpya tāṃ purīṃ ramyāṃ tacca rājakulaṃ gataḥ || || 18 ||
dadarśa yaṃ tamekaṃ sa ajapālamajāvṛtam ||
muktakeśaṃ muktakakṣaṃ naikamuktakramadvayam || 19 ||
yaṣṭiskandhaṃ reṇubhṛtaṃ vyādhibhiḥ parivāritam ||
nihatāmitraśārdūlaṃ sarvopadravanāśanam || 4.71.20 ||
mahyāmālikhya nāmāni vinighnitaṃ dviṣāṃ gaṇam ||
snātaṃ bhuktaṃ śubhe sthāne kṛtakṛtyaṃ muniṃ yathā || 21 ||
dṛṣṭvā hṛṣṭamanāḥ prāha dhūmrākṣo rāvaṇoditam ||
sākṣepamajapālo.api pratyuktvā kāraṇāṃtaram || 22 ||
preṣayāmāsa dhūmrākṣaṃ tataḥ kṛtyaṃ samādadhe ||
jvaramākārayitvā tu provācedaṃ mahīpatiḥ || 23 ||
gaccha laṃkādhipasthānamācarasva yathocitam ||
niyuktastvajapālena jvaro rājañjagāma ha || 24 ||
gatvā ca kaṃpayāmāsa sagaṇaṃ rākṣaseśvaram ||
rāvaṇastaṃ viditvā tu jvaraṃ paramadāruṇam || 25 ||
provāca tiṣṭhatu nṛpastena me na prayoja nam ||
tataḥ savijvaro rājā babhūva dhanadānujaḥ || 26 ||
tenaiṣā nirmitā śāṃtirajapālena dhīmatā ||
sarvarogapraśamanī sarvopadravanāśinī || 27 ||
kārtike śuklapakṣasya dvādaśyāṃ rajanīmukhe ||
samutthite vinidre tu deve dāmodare tadā || 28 ||
vedyaṃte ratnamālābhī ramye mālānuraṃjite ||
janayitvā navaṃ viṣṇuṃ hutvā maṃtrairdvijottamaiḥ || 29 || varddhamānatarūtthābhirdīpikābhirhutāśanam ||
kṛtvā mahājanaḥ sarvairhariṃ nīrājayecchanaiḥ || 4.71.30 ||
puṣpairabhyarcitaṃ devaṃ samālabdhaṃ ca candanaiḥ ||
badaraiḥ karburaiścaiva trapusairikṣubhistathā || 31 ||
gandhaiḥ puṣpairaṃlakārairvastrai ratnaiśca pūjitaiḥ ||
tasyaivānumatā lakṣmīṃ brahmāṇaṃ caṃḍikāṃ tathā|| 32 ||
ādityaṃ śaṃkaraṃ gaurīṃ yakṣaṃ gaṇapatiṃ grahān ||
mātaraṃ pitaraṃ nāgānsarvānnīrājayettataḥ || 33 ||
gavāṃ nīrājanaṃ kuryānmahiṣyādeśca maṃḍalam ||
bhrāmayettrāsayecchardighaṃṭāvādanachādanaiḥ || 34 ||
tā gāvaḥ prasutā yāṃti svāpīḍāstabakāṃgadāḥ ||
sindūrakṛtaśṛṃgāgrāḥ saṃbhāravaśavatsakāḥ || 35 ||
anuyāṃti sagopālāḥ kālayaṃto dhanāni te ||
chedānuliptaraktāṅgā raktapītasitāṃbarāḥ || 36 ||
evaṃ kolāhale vṛtte gavāṃ nīrājanotsave ||
turagā~mllakṣaṇairyuktāndviradāṃśca supūjitān || 37 ||
rājacihnāni sarvāṇi uddhṛtya svagṛhāṃgaṇe ||
rājā purohitaiḥ sārddhaṃ maṃtribhṛtyapuraḥsaraḥ || 38 ||
siṃhāsanopaviṣṭaśca śaṃkhatūryādinisvanaiḥ ||
pūjayedgandhakusumairvastradīpavilepanaiḥ || 39 ||
tataḥ strīlakṣaṇairyuktā veśyā vātha kulāṅganā ||
śīrṣopari narendrasya bhrābhayeddārupātrikām || 4.71.40 ||
śāṃtirastu samṛddhiśca dvijaiśca svajanena ca ||
tato nīrājayetsaumyaṃ hastyaśvarathasaṃkulam || 41 ||
evameṣā mahāśāṃtiḥ khyātā nīrājane jane ||
yeṣāṃ rāṣṭre pure grāme kriyate pāṃḍunandana || 42 ||
teṣāṃ rogāḥ kṣayaṃ yāṃti subhikṣaṃ varddhate tadā ||
śāṃtinīrājanālloke sarvānrogānvyapohati || 43 ||
lokānāvarddhayitvā tu ajapālavaro yathā ||
eṣāṃ rogādipīḍāsu jaṃtūnāṃ hitamicchatā || 44 ||
varṣevarṣe prayoktavyā śāṃtirnīrājanā iti || 45 ||
nīrājayaṃti navameghanibhaṃ hariṃ ye gobrāhmaṇānrathagajāṃśca nareśacihnān||
te sarvarogarahitāśca nutā narendrairiṃdraprabhā bhuvi bhavaṃtyajapālavākyāt || 46 ||
iti śrībhaviṣye mahāpurāṇa uttaraparvaṇi śrīkṛṣṇayudhiṣṭhirasaṃvāde nīrājanadvādaśīvratavarṇanaṃ nāmaikasaptatitamo.adhyāyaḥ || 71 || cha ||
bhīṣmapañcakavratavarṇanam
|| yudhiṣṭhira uvāca || ||
yadetadatulaṃ puṇyaṃ vratānāmuttamaṃ vratam ||
kartavyaṃ kārttike māsi prayatnādbhīṣmapañcakam || 1 ||
vidhānaṃ kīdṛśaṃ tasya phalaṃ ca yadusattama ||
kathayasva prasādānme munīnāṃ hitamicchatām || 2 ||
|| śrīkṛṣṇa uvāca || ||
pravakṣyāmi vrataṃ puṇyaṃ vratānāmuttamaṃ vratam ||
yathāvidhi ca kartavyaṃ phalaṃ cāsya yathoditam || 3 ||
mayāpi bhṛgave proktaṃ bhṛguścośanase dadau ||
uśanāpi hi viprebhyaḥ prahlādāya ca dhīmate || 4 ||
tejasvināṃ yathā vahniḥ pavanaḥ śīghragāminām ||
vipro yathā ca pūjyānāṃ dānānāṃ kāñcanaṃ yathā || 5 ||
bhūlokaḥ sarvalokānāṃ tīrthānāṃ jāhnavī yathā ||
yathāśvamedho yajñānāṃ mathurā muktikāṃkṣiṇām|| 6 ||
vedo yathaiva śāstrāṇāṃ devānāmacyuto yathā ||
tathā sarvavratānāṃ tu varoktaṃ bhīṣmapañcakam || 7 ||
duṣkaraṃ bhīṣmamityāhurna śakyaṃ tadihocyate ||
yastatkaroti rājendra tena sarvaṃ kṛtaṃ bhavet || 8 ||
vaśiṣṭhabhṛgubhargādyaiścīrṇaṃ kṛtayugādiṣu ||
nābhāgāṃgāṃbarīṣādyaiścīrṇaṃ tretāyugādiṣu || 9 ||
sīrabhadrādibhirvaiśyaiḥ śūdrairanyaiḥ kalau yuge ||
dināni paṃca pūjyāni cīrṇametanmahāvratam || 4.72.10 ||
brāhmaṇairbrahmacaryeṇa japahomakriyādibhiḥ ||
kṣatriyaiśca tathā śaktyā śaucavrataparāyaṇaiḥ || 11 ||
parādhiḥ parihartavyo brahmacaryeṇa niṣṭhayā ||
madyaṃ māṃsaṃ parityajya maithunaṃ pāpabhāṣaṇam || 12 ||
śākāhāraparaiścaiva kṛṣṇārcanaparairnaraiḥ ||
strībhirvā bhartṛvākyena kartavyaṃ sukhavarddhanam || 13 ||
vidhavābhiśca kartavyaṃ putrapautrādibruddhaye ||
sarvakāmasamṛddhyarthaṃ mokṣārthamapi pāṃḍava || 14 ||
nityaṃ snānena dānena kārttikī yāvadeva tu ||
prātaḥ snātvā vidhānena madhyāhne ca tathā vratī || 15 ||
nadya nirjharagarte vā samālabhya ca gomayam ||
yavavrīhitilaiḥ samyaktarpayecca prayatnataḥ || 16 ||
devānṛṣīnpitṛrṃścaiva tatonyānkāmacāriṇaḥ ||
snānaṃ maunaṃ naraḥ kṛtvā dhautavāsā dṛḍhavrataḥ || 17 ||
tato.anupūjayeddevaṃ sarvapāpaharaṃ harim ||
snāpayeccācyutaṃ bhaktyā madhukṣīraghṛtena ca || 18 ||
tatraiva pañcagavyena gaṃdhacaṃdanavāriṇā ||
candanena sugaṃdhena kuṃkumenātha keśavam || 19 ||
karpūrośīra miśreṇa lepayedgaruḍadhvajam ||
arcayedruciraiḥ puṣpairgaṃdhadhūpasamanvitaiḥ || 4.72.20 ||
gugguluṃ ghṛtasaṃyuktaṃ dahetkṛṣṇāya bhaktitaḥ ||
dīpakaṃ ca divā rātrau dadyātpaṃcadināni tu || 21 ||
naivedyaṃ devadevasya paramānnaṃ nivedayet ||
oṃ namo vāsudevāyeti japedaṣṭottaraṃ śatam || 22 ||
juhuyācca ghṛtāktāṃśca tilavrīhīṃstato vratī ||
ṣaḍakṣareṇa maṃtreṇa svāhākārānvitena ca || 23 ||
upāsya paścimāṃ saṃdhyāṃ praṇamya garuḍadhvajam ||
japitvā pūrvavanmaṃtraṃ kṣitiśāyī bhavennaraḥ || 24 ||
sarvametadvidhānaṃ ca kāryaṃ paṃcadineṣu hi ||
saṃviśetkaṃbale cāsminpadapūrvaṃ śṛṇuṣva me || 25 ||
prathame.ahni hareḥ pādau pūjayetkamalairnaraḥ ||
dvitīye bilvapatreṇa jānudeśaṃ samarcayet || 26 ||
pūjayecca tṛtīye.ahni nābhiṃ bhṛṅgarasena ca ||
madhye bilvajayābhiśca tataḥ skaṃdhau prapūjayet || 27 ||
tato.anupūjayecchīrṣaṃ mālatyāḥ kusumairnavaiḥ ||
kārttikyāṃ devadevasya bhaktyā tadgatamānasaḥ || 28 ||
arcayitvā hṛṣīkeśamekādaśyāṃ samāhitaḥ ||
saṃprāśya gomayaṃ samyaṅ maṃtravatsamupāvaset || 29 ||
gomūtraṃ maṃtravatkṛtvā dvādaśyāṃ prāśayedvratī ||
kṣīraṃ tatra trayodaśyāṃ caturdaśyāṃ tathā dadhi || 4.72.30 ||
saṃprāśya kāyaśuddhyarthaṃ laṃghayeta caturdinam ||
paṃcame tu dine snātvā vidhivatpūjya keśavam || 31 ||
bhojayedbrāhmaṇānbhaktyā tebhyo dadyācca dakṣiṇām ||
tathopadeṣṭāramapi pūjayedvastrabhūṣaṇaiḥ || 32 ||
tato naktaṃ samaśnīyātpañcagavyapuraḥsaram ||
