evaṃ samāpayetsamyagyathoktaṃ vratamuttamam || 33 ||
sarvapāpaharaṃ puṇyaṃ prakhyātaṃ bhīṣmapañcakam ||
madyapo yastyajenmadyaṃ janmano maraṇāṃtikam || 34 ||
tadbhīṣmapañcakaṃ tyaktvā prāpnotbhyayadhikaṃ phalam ||
brahmacaryaṃ naraścīrtvā sughoraṃ naiṣṭhikaṃ vratam ||35||
yatprāpnoti mahatpuṇyaṃ tatkṛtvā bhīṣmapaṃcakam ||
gātrā bhyaṃgaṃ śiro.abhyaṃgaṃ madhu māṃsaṃ ca maithunam || 36 ||
brahmalokamavāpnoti tyaktvaikaṃ bhīṣmapañcakam ||
saṃvatsareṇa yatpuṇyaṃ kārttikena ca yadbhavet ||37||
yatphalaṃ kārttikenoktaṃ bhavettadbhīṣmapañcake ||
vratametatsuraiḥ siddhaiḥ kinnarairnāgaguhyakaiḥ ||38||
phalaṃ samīhitaṃ prāpya kṛtvābhyarcya janārdanam ||
pāpasya pratimā kāryā raudravaktrātibhīṣaṇā || 39 ||
khaḍgahastātivikṛtā sarvalokamayī nṛpa ||
tilaprasthopari sthāpyā kṛṣṇavastrābhiveṣṭitā || 4.72.40 |||
karavīrakusumāpīḍā calatkāñcanakuṃḍalā ||
brāhmaṇāya pradātavyā kṛṣṇo me prīyatāmiti || 41 ||
anyeṣāmapi dātavyaṃ yatkṛtvā vasu vāṃchitam ||
kṛtakṛtyaḥ sthiro bhūtvā viraktaḥ saṃyato bhavet || 42 ||
śāṃtacetā nirābādhaḥ paraṃ padamavāpnuyāt ||
nīlotpaladalaśyāmaścaturdaṃṣṭraścaturbhujaḥ || 43 ||.a
aṣṭaṣaṣṭhaikanayanaḥ śaṃkukarṇo mahāsvanaḥ||
jaṭī dvijihvastāmasyo mṛgarājatanucchadaḥ || 44 ||
ciṃtanīyo mahādevo yasya rūpaṃ na vidyate ||
idaṃ bhīṣmeṇa kathitaṃ śaratalpagatena me || 45 ||
tadeva te samākhyātaṃ duṣkaraṃ bhīṣmapaṃcakam ||
vrataṃ ca rājaśārdūla pravaraṃ bhīṣmapañcakam || 46 ||
yastasmiṃstoṣayedbhaktyā tasmai muktiprado.acyutaḥ ||
brahmacārī gṛhastho vā vānaprastho.athavā yatiḥ || 47 ||
prāpnoti vaiṣṇavaṃ sthānaṃ satkṛtvā bhīṣmapañcakam ||
brahmahā madyapaḥ steyī gurugāmī sadākṛtī || 48 ||
mucyate pātakātsamyakkṛtvaikaṃ bhīṣmapañcakam ||
nāsmādvratātpuṇyatamaṃ vaiṣṇavebhyo yato vratam || 49 ||
athāsmiṃstoṣito viṣṇurnṛṇāṃ muktiprado bhavet ||
śrutvaitatpaṭhyamānaṃ tu pavitraṃ bhīṣmapaṃcakam || 4.72.50 ||
mucyate pātakebhyo vā pāṭhako viṣṇulokabhāk ||
dhanyaṃ puṇyaṃ pāpaharaṃ yudhiṣṭhira mahāvratam || 51 ||
yadbhīṣmapañcakamiti prathitaṃ pṛthivyāmekādaśīprabhṛtipañcadaśīniruddham ||
annasya bhojananivṛttivaśādamuṣminniṣṭaṃ phalaṃ diśati pāṃḍava śārṅgadhanvā || 52 || iti śrībhaviṣye mahāpurāṇa uttaraparvaṇi śrīkṛṣṇayudhiṣṭhirasaṃvāde bhīṣma paṃcakavratavarṇanaṃ nāma dvisaptatitamo.adhyāyaḥ ||72|| cha ||
malladvādaśīvratavarṇanam
|| yudhiṣṭhira uvāca || ||
śaṅkhacakragadāpāṇe śrīvatsa garuḍāsana ||
brūhi me malladvādaśyā vidhānaṃ devakīsuta || 1 ||
|| śrīkṛṣṇa uvāca || ||
yadā bhāṃḍīranyagrodhe vasāmi yamunātaṭe ||
gopālamadhye govatsairaṣṭavarṣosmi līlayā || || 2 ||
kaṃsāsuravadhārthāya mathuropavane tadā ||
ābālo bālarūpeṇa gopamallairbalotkaṭaiḥ || 3 ||
sametya mallagopasya balena saha kānane ||
āsphoṭayaṃti nṛtyaṃti tridaśe tridaśā iva || 4 ||
surabhadro maṃḍalīkayogavarddhanayogadāḥ||
yakṣeṃdrabhadra ityādi teṣāṃ nāmāni gokule || 5 ||
gopīnāmapi nāmāni prādhānyena nibodha me ||
gopālī pālikā dhanyā viśākhā dhyānaniṣṭhikā|| 6 ||
ilvānugandhā subhagā tārakā daśamī tathā ||
ityevamādibhirahaṃ sūpaviṣṭo varāsane || 7 ||
pūjito.asmi suraiḥ puṣpairdadhidugdhākṣataistathā ||
śatāni trīṇi ṣaṣṭiśca mallānāṃ pūjayaṃti mām || 8 ||
mallinyaśca surāmāṃsairaṃgajāgaranarttanaiḥ ||
mallayuddhairbahuvidhairbāhyairmallabhaṭaiḥ sphuṭaiḥ || 9 ||
bhakṣyairbhojyaistathā pānairdadhidugdhaghṛtāsavaiḥ ||
godānairvṛṣadānaiśca śraddhayā viprapūjanaiḥ || 4.73.10 ||
goṣṭhīprabhūtairvadhūnāṃ snehasaṃbhāṣaṇairmithaḥ ||
evaṃ dvādaśa dvādaśyo grahītavyā yathecchayā || 11 ||
saṃbaṃdhibhiḥ krameṇaiva mallānāṃ ca pṛthakpṛthak ||
pūjayaṃti krameṇaiva māsimāsi tanuṃ mama || 12 ||
māsādikārtikāṃtaṃ ca bhaktyā dvādaśanāmabhiḥ ||
pāraṇepāraṇe dadyānmallakāni dvijātaye || 13 || keśavanārāyaṇamādhavagovindaviṣṇumadhusūdanatrivikramavāmanaśrīdharahṛṣīkeśapadmanābhadāmodarāṇāṃ namonama iti || || 14 ||
gandhaiḥ puṣpaistathā dhūpairdīpairjāgaraṇairniśi ||
gītavādyaiśca nṛtyaiśca mallakṣveḍāṃgayuddhakaiḥ | 15 ||
ghṛtadānaiḥ kṣīradānaiḥ kṛṣṇo me prīyatā miti ||
evameṣa vidhiḥ prokto māsairdvādaśabhirnṛpa || 16 ||
dvādaśī yā mamādyāpi manasaḥ prītivarddhanī ||
mallaiḥ pravartitā yasmādato.arthaṃ malladvādaśī || 17 ||
teṣāṃ paramamallānāṃ teṣāṃ jñāna yudhiṣṭhira ||
goṣṭhe babhūva suprājyaṃ gomahiṣyādyajāvikam || 16 ||
matprasādāddharmaputra balaṃ kīrtiryaśo dhanam ||
evamanye.api puruṣā hyabalā malladvādaśīm || 19 ||
ye kariṣyaṃti madbhaktāsteṣāṃ dāsyāmi hṛdgatam ||
ārogyaṃ balamaiśvarya viṣṇulokaṃ ca śāśvatam || 4.73.20 ||
bhāṃḍīrapādapatale militairmahadbhirmallairanākulitabāhubalairbaliṣṭhaiḥ ||
saṃpūjitaḥ sapadi yatra tithau tataśca sā dvādaśī suviditā vrata malla saṃjñā || 21 || iti śrībhaviṣye mahāpurāṇa uttaraparvaṇi śrīkṛṣṇayudhiṣṭhirasaṃvāde malladvādaśīvratavarṇanaṃ nāma trisaptatitamo.adhyāyaḥ|| 73 || |||9|| ||
bhīmadvādaśīvratavarṇanam
|| śrīkṛṣṇa uvāca || ||
vidarbhādhipatiḥ śrīmānāsītpūrvaṃ sudhārmikaḥ ||
damayaṃtyāḥ pitā pūrvaṃ nalasya śvaśuro bhuvi || 1 ||
satyavādanaśīlaśca prajāpālanatatparaḥ ||
kṣatradharmarataḥ śrīmānsaṃgrāmeṣvaparājitaḥ || 2 ||
tasyāpi kurvato rājyaṃ śāstradṛṣṭena karmaṇā ||
ājagāma mahābhāgaḥ pulastyo brahmaṇaḥ sutaḥ || 3 ||
sarvajñānanidhiḥ śrīmāṃstīrthayātrāprasaṃgataḥ ||
tamāgatamatho dṛṣṭvā brahmayonimakalmaṣam || 4 ||
utthāya pradadau rājā svamāsanamabhīpsitam ||
arghaṃ pādyaṃ ca yatkiñcittattasmai pradadau svayam || 5 ||
rājyaṃ caivātmanā sārddhaṃ nivedya sa kṛtāṃjaliḥ ||
tena caivābhyanujñāto niṣasāda varāsane || 6 ||
papraccha kuśalapraśnaṃ tapasyadhyayane tathā ||
tatheti coktvā sa munistaṃ rājānamabhāṣata || 7 ||
|| pulastya uvāca || ||
kaccitte kuśalaṃ rājankośe janapade pure ||
dharme ca te matirnityaṃ kaccitpārthiva vartate || 8 ||
|| bhīma uvāca || ||
sarvatra kuśalaṃ brahmanyeṣāṃ kuśalamicchasi ||
tava cāgamanenāhaṃ pāvitaḥ saṃgavāriṇā || 9 ||
evaṃ tau saṃvidaṃ kṛtvā saṃbhāṣyātha parasparam ||
remāte pūrvavṛttāṃtaiḥ kathābhiritaretaram || 4.74.10 ||
tataḥ kathāṃte rājendra pulastyaṃ jātavismayaḥ ||
papraccha sarvalokasya hitāya jagataḥ patiḥ || 11 ||
bhagavanprāṇinaḥ sarve saṃsārārṇavamadhyagāḥ ||
dṛśyaṃte vividhairduḥkhaiḥ pīḍyamānā divāniśam || 12 ||
narake garbhavāse ca vyādhibhirjanmanā tathā ||
tathā kaṣṭaviyogā diduḥkhairdaurgatyasaṃbhavaiḥ ||13||
lālapyamānā bahavaḥ parapīḍopajīvinaḥ ||
evaṃ vidhānyanekāni duḥkhāni munipuṅgava ||14||
dṛṣṭvaiva tāni tānyeva bhṛśaṃ me vyādhitaṃ manaḥ ||
teṣāṃ duḥkhāni bhūtānāṃ prāṇināṃ bhuvi mānada || 15 ||
upakārakaraṃ brūhi mamānugrahakāmyayā ||
svalpāyāsena bhagavañjāyate sumahatphalam || 16 ||
|| pulastya uvāca || ||
śṛṇu rājanpravakṣyāmi vratānāmuttamaṃ vratam ||
yadupoṣya na duḥkhānāṃ bhājano jāyate janaḥ || 17 ||
māghamāse site pakṣe dvādaśī pāvanī smṛtā ||
tasyāṃ jalārdravasana upoṣya sukhabhāgbhavet || 18 ||
|| bhīma uvāca || ||
kathaṃ sā muniśārdūla upoṣyā dvādaśī bhavet ||
vidhinā kena viprendra tanme brūhi yathākramam || 19 ||
|| pulastya uvāca || ||
śṛṇu rājannavahito vrataṃ pāpapraṇāśanam ||
tava śuśrūṣaṇādvācyaṃ mamāpyetanna saṃśayaḥ || 4.74.20 ||
adīkṣitāya no deyā nāśiṣyāya kadācana ||
viṣṇubhaktāya śāṃtāya dharmaniṣṭhāya caiva hi || 21 ||
vācyametanmahārāja bhavatānyasya na kvacit ||
brahmahā gurughātī ca bālastrīghātakastathā || 22 ||
kṛtaghno mitradhrukcauraḥ kṣudro bhagnavratastathā ||
mucyate pātakaiḥ sarvairvratenānena bhūpate || 23 ||
śuddhe tithau muhūrte ca maṃḍapaṃ kārayettataḥ ||
daśahastapramāṇena daśapūrvottare plave || 24 ||
tanmadhye pañcahastāṃ tu vedikāṃ parikalpayet ||
śuklāṃ sukuṭṭimāṃ bhūmiṃ vedyāṃ kṛtvā prayatnataḥ || 25 ||
vilikhenmaṃḍalaṃ tatra paṃcavarṇairvidhānataḥ ||
brāhmaṇo vedasaṃpanno viṣṇubhakto jitendriyaḥ || 26 ||
pañcaviṃśatitattvajñaḥ svācārābhiratastathā ||
kuṃḍāni kalpayettatra aṣṭau catvāri vā punaḥ ||27||
brāhmaṇāṃsteṣu yuṃjīta cātuścaraṇikāñchubhān ||
madhye ca maṃḍalasyātha karṇikāyāṃ janārdanam ||28 ||
pratyaṅmukhaṃ nyaseddevaṃ caturbāhumariṃdama ||
pūjayettaṃ vidhānena śāstroktena vicakṣaṇaḥ || 29 ||
gandhaiḥ puṣpaistathā dhūpairnaivedyairvividhairapi ||
evaṃ saṃpūjya deveśaṃ brāhmaṇaiḥ saha deśikaḥ || 4.74.30 ||
nyasetstaṃbhadvayaṃ paścāttiṣṭhankāṣṭhasamanvitam ||
devasyābhimukhaṃ tatra pīṭhaṃ tu parikalpayet || 31 ||
ṣaṭtriṃśadaṃgulaṃ śreṣṭhaṃ caturasraṃ samaṃtataḥ ||
tatra śikyaṃ samālaṃbya suvṛttaṃ sudṛḍhaṃ navam || 32 ||
āropayeddhaṭaṃ tatra yādṛśaṃ tacchṛṇuṣva me ||
kaladhautaṃ tathā raupyaṃ tāmraṃ vāpyatha mṛnmayam || 33 ||
sarvalakṣaṇasaṃyuktaṃ dṛḍhaṃ vyaṃgavivarjitam ||
tatsahasraṃ śataṃ kuryādekacchidramathāpi vā || 34 ||
kuśalatvānurūpeṇa pāśaikacchidrameva vā ||
sannidhāne tataḥ kuryātsalilaṃ vastrapāvanam || 35 ||
homārthaṃ kalpayeccāpi pālāśyaḥ samidhaḥ śubhāḥ ||
tilā ghṛtaṃ tathā kṣīraṃ śamīpatrāṇi caiva hi || 36 ||
vedyāḥ pūrvottare bhāge grahapīṭhaṃ prakalpayet ||
tatra pūjyā grahāḥ sarve graha yajñavidhānataḥ || 37 ||
pūrvasyāṃ diśi śakrasya pūjāṃ kurvīta yatnataḥ ||
dakṣiṇasyāṃ yamasyātha pratīcyāṃ varuṇasya ca || 38
kuberasya tathodīcyāṃ baliṃ kuryātphalākṣataiḥ ||
evaṃ saṃbhṛtya saṃbhāraṃ śuklāṃbaradharastathā || 39 ||
samālabhya śubhairgaṃdhairddarbhapāṇirataṃdritaḥ ||
pīṭhamāropayeyuste yajamānaṃ dvijottamāḥ ||4.74.40 ||
yajamāno.api devasya saṃmukhaḥ prayataḥ śuciḥ ||
upaviśya paṭhenmaṃtraṃ purāṇoktamidaṃ śṛṇu || 41 ||
namaste devadeveśa namaste bhuvane śvara ||
vratenānena māṃ pāhi paramātmannamostu te || 42 ||
tatodakasya dhārāstāḥ pratyaṃgaṣu samanvitāḥ ||
śirasā dhārayettūṣṇīṃ tadgatenāṃtarātmanā || || 43 ||
homaṃ kuryustato viprā dikṣu sarvāsu tatparāḥ ||
paṭheyuḥ śāṃtikādhyāyaṃ viṣṇusaṃjñāni yāni vai || 44 ||
vāditraistāḍyamānaiśca śaṃkhageya svanaistathā ||
puṇyāhajayaśabdaiśca vedasvanavimiśritaiḥ || 45 ||
maṃgalaiḥ stutisaṃyuktaiḥ kārayettanmahotsavam ||
devadevasya caritaṃ keśavasya mahācmanaḥ||46||
harivaṃśādikaṃ sarvaṃ śrāvayedbrāhmaṇo varaḥ ||
soparṇikamathākhyānaṃ bhāratākhyānameva ca || 47 ||
vyākhyānakuśalāḥ kecicchrāvayeyurataṃdritāḥ ||
anena vidhinā sarvāṃ tāṃ rātriṃ prītivarddhinīm || 48 ||
yajamāno nayeddhīmānyāvatsūryodayo bhavet ||
brāhmaṇāścāpi tāṃ rātrīṃ juhvato jātavedasam || 49 ||
maṃtraistu vaiṣṇavairdivyaiḥ kṣapayeyurmahīpate ||
vāsudevasya śirasi vasorddhārāṃ prapātayet || 4.74.50 ||
kṣīreṇājyena vā rājansarvasiddhi pradāyinīm ||
tataḥ prabhātasamaye yajamāno dvijaiḥ saha ||51||
snānaṃ kuryānnṛpaśreṣṭha nadyāṃ sarasi vā punaḥ ||
atha vā śaktihīnastu yajamānoṣṇa vāriṇā || 52 ||
tataḥ śuklāni vastrāṇi paridhāya yatavrataḥ ||
arghyaṃ dattvā bhāskarāya savidhānaṃ prasannadhīḥ || 53 ||
puṣpairdhūpaiḥ sanaivedyaiḥ pūjayetpu ruṣottamam ||
hutvā hutāśanaṃ bhaktyā dattvā pūrṇahutiṃ tataḥ || 54 ||
pūjayedbrāhmaṇānsarvānhotāro yajñakalpitāḥ ||
śayyābhojanagodānairvastrairābharaṇaistathā || 55 ||
ācāryaḥ pūjanīyo.atra sarvasvenāpi bhārata ||
yena vā tasya saṃtuṣṭirdevatulyo gururyataḥ || 56 ||
vittaśāṭhyavihīnastu bhaktiśaktisamanvitaḥ ||
dīnānāthaviśiṣṭāśca baṃdinaśca samāgatāḥ || 57 ||
teṣāmannaṃ hiraṇyaṃ ca dadyācchuddhena cetasā ||
evaṃ saṃpūjya viprāya bhojayitvā yathepsitam || 58 ||
yathāvibhavasāreṇa paścādbhuṃjīta vāgyataḥ ||
haviṣyamannaṃ yajñena haviṣyā satilāstathā || 59 ||
evaṃ yajño mahārājaścoktaste saṃprakīrtitaḥ ||
pāpiṣṭhāḥ sarvapāpebhyo mucyaṃte nātra saṃśayaḥ || 4.74.60 ||
vājapeyātirātrābhyāṃ ye yajaṃti śataṃ samāḥ ||
sarve te viṣṇuyāgasya kalāṃ nārhaṃti ṣoḍaśīm || 61 ||
sapta janmāni saubhāgyamāyurārogyasaṃpadaḥ ||
prāpnoti dvādaśīmetāṃ tāmupoṣya vidhānataḥ || 62 ||
mṛto viṣṇupuraṃ yāti viṣṇunā saha modate ||
caturyugāni dvātriṃśadviṣṇurūpadharaḥ sthitaḥ ||63||
rudraloke tathā rājanyugāni dvādaśaiva tu ||
brahmaloke tathā trīṇi sūryaloke yugāni ca || 64 ||
puṇyakṣayādihābhyetya rājā bhavati dhārmikaḥ ||
pṛthivyadhipatiḥ śrīmānvijitāriḥ pratāpavān || 65 ||
vratametatpurā cīrṇaṃ sagareṇa mahātmanā ||
ajena dhuṃdhumāreṇa dilīpena yayātinā || 66 ||
anyaiśca pṛthivīpālaiḥ pālitāśeṣabhūtalaiḥ||
strībhirvaiśyaistathā śūdrairdharmakāmaiḥ sadā nṛpa || 67 ||
bhṛgvādyairmunibhiḥ sarvairbrāhmaṇairvedapāragaiḥ ||
tvayā ca pṛṣṭena mayā kathitaṃ te narādhipa || 68 ||
adyaprabhṛti caiveyaṃ khyātiṃ yāsyati bhūtale ||
bhīmākhyā dvādaśī ceti kṛtakṛtyā ca bhārata || 69 ||
eṣā pulastyamuninā kathitā kurunaṃdana ||
yaścaināṃ kathitāṃ dhyātvā kuryādvā bhaktibhāvataḥ || 4.74.70 ||
sarvapāpavinirmukto viṣṇuloke mahīyate ||
daridraścāpi bhoḥ pārtha vittaśāṭhyaṃ vivarjayet ||
viṣṇubhaktena kartavyā saṃsārabhayabhīruṇā || 71 ||
bhīmena yā kila purā samupoṣitā ca rātrau ghaṭasthirasuśatilavāridhārā ||
tāṃ dvādaśī daśamu khārimukhācchrutāṃ ca samyagvratī carati yāti sa viṣṇuloke || 72 ||
iti śrībhaviṣye mahāpurāṇa uttaraparvaṇi śrīkṛṣṇayudhiṣṭhirasaṃvāde bhīmadvādaśīvratavarṇanaṃ nāma catuḥsaptatitamo.adhyāyaḥ || 74 || || cha ||
śravaṇadvādaśīvratavarṇanam
|| yudhiṣṭhira uvāca || ||
upavāsāsamarthānāṃ sadaiva puruṣottama ||
ekā yā dvādaśī puṇyā tāṃ vadasva mamānagha || 1 ||
|| śrīkṛṣṇa uvāca || ||
māsi bhādrapade śuklā dvādaśī śravaṇānvitā ||
sarvakāmapradā puṇyā copavāse mahāphalā || 2 ||
saṃgame saritāṃ snātvā dvādaśyāṃ samupoṣitaḥ ||
ayatnātsamavāpnoti dvādaśadvādaśīphalam || 3 ||
budhaśravaṇadvādaśyāmevaṃ vai saṃyato bhavet ||
atīva mahatī tasyāṃ kṛtaṃ sarvamathākṣayam || 4 ||
dvādaśī śravaṇopetā yadā bhavati bhārata ||
saṃgame saritāṃ snātvā gaṃgādisnānajaṃ phalam||
sopavāsaḥ samāpnoti nātra kāryā vicāraṇā || 5 ||
jalapūrṇe tathā kuṃbhe sthāpayitvā vicakṣaṇaḥ ||
paṃcaratnasamopetaṃ sopavītaṃ supūji tam || 6 ||
tasya skaṃdhe sughaṭitaṃ sthāpayitvā janārdanam ||
yathāśakti svarṇamayaṃ śaṃkhaśārṅgavibhūṣitam || 7 ||
snāpayitvā vidhānena sitacaṃdana carcitam ||
sitavastrayugacchannaṃ chatropānadyugānvitam || 8 ||
oṃ namo vāsudevāyeti śiraḥ saṃpūjayaddhareḥ ||
śrīdharāya mukhaṃ tadvatkaṃṭha kṛṣṇāya vai punaḥ || 9 ||
oṃ namaḥ śrīmate vakṣo bhujau sarvāstradhāriṇe ||
vyāpakāya namaḥ kukṣī keśavāyodaraṃ namaḥ || 4.75.10 ||
trailokyajanakāyeti evaṃ saṃpūjayeddharim ||
sarvādhipataye jaṃghe pādau sarvātmane namaḥ || 11 ||
anena vidhinā rājanpuṣpairdhūpaiḥ samarcayet ||
tatastasyāgrato deyaṃ naivedyaṃ ghṛtapācitam || 12 ||
sodakāṃśca navānkuṃbhāñchaktyā dadyādvicakṣaṇaḥ ||
evaṃ saṃpūjya gorvidaṃ jāgaraṃ tatra kārayet || 13 ||
prabhāte vimale snātvā saṃpūjya garuḍadhvajam ||
puṣpadhūpādinaivedyaiḥ phalairvastraiḥ suśobhanaiḥ ||
tataḥ puṣpāṃjaliṃ baddhvā maṃtrametamudīrayet || 14 ||
namo namaste govinda budhaśravaṇa saṃjñaka ||
aghaughasaṃkṣayaṃ kṛtvā sarvasaukhyaprado bhava || 15 ||
evaṃ saṃpūjya goviṃda brāhmaṇaṃ pūjayettataḥ ||
anaṃtaraṃ brāhmaṇe vai vedavedāṃtapārage ||
purāṇajñe viśeṣeṇa vidhivatsaṃpradāpayet || 16 ||
dvādaśyāṃ śravaṇe yukte aśeṣāhaskarānvite ||
karakaṃ saṃgame snātvā prīyatāṃ me janārdanaḥ|| 17 || ||
|| śrīkṛṣṇa uvāca || ||
atrāpyudāharaṃtīmamitihāsaṃ purātanam ||
mahatyaraṇye yadvṛttaṃ bhūmipāla śṛṇuṣva tat ||18||
deśo daśārṇako nāma tasya bhāge tu paścime ||
asti kaścinmarudeśaḥ sarvasattvabhayaṃkaraḥ || 19 ||
sutaptasikatā bhūmiryatra duṣṭā mahoragāḥ||
alpacchāyadrumākīrṇo mṛtaprāṇi samākulaḥ ||4.75.20 ||
śamīkhadirapālāśakarīraiḥ pīlubhiḥ saha ||
tatra bhīmā drumāḥ pārtha kaṃṭakaiḥ śabalā dṛḍhaiḥ ||21||
dagdhaprāṇigaṇākīrṇā yatra bhūrddṛśyate kvacit||
annodakaṃ no labhaṃte rājaṃstatra balāhakāḥ ||22||
kadācidapi dṛśyaṃte bhrāmyanto hi vihagamāḥ||
vṛkṣāṃtaragatairnityaṃ śiśubhistṛṣitaiḥ samam ||
utkṛttajīvitā rājandṛśyaṃte vihagottamāḥ ||23||
tṛṣāturāśca sahasā mṛgāḥ saikatamāgatāḥ||
saikateṣveva naśyaṃti jalaṃ saikatasetuvat||24||
tasmiṃstathāvidhe deśe kaściddaivavaśādvaṇik ||
nijasārthaparibhraṣṭaḥ praviṣṭo marujāṃgale || 25 || piśācānmalināṃstīkṣṇānnirmāṃsānbhīmadarśanān ||
itastataḥ saṃcarato dadarśa vaṇiguttamaḥ || 26 ||
babhrāmodbhrāṃtahṛdayaḥ kṣuttṛṣābhramakarṣitaḥ ||
kva grāmaḥ kva jalaṃ kvāhaṃ yāsyāmi na bubodha saḥ ||27||
atha pretāndadarśāsau tṛṣṇāvyākuliteṃdriyān || snāyubaddhāsthicaraṇānprekṣamāṇānitastataḥ || 28 ||
pretaskaṃdhasamārūḍhamekaṃ pretaṃ dadarśa ha ||
apaśyadbahubhiḥ pretaiḥ samaṃtātparivāritam || 29 ||
āgacchantaṃ tamavyagraṃ srutuśabdapuraḥsaram ||
pretaskaṃdhānmahīṃ gatvā tasyāṃtikamupāgamat || 4.75.30 ||
sa dṛṣṭvātha vaṇikchreṣṭhamidaṃ vacanamabravīt ||
asminvai nirjale deśe gamanaṃ bhavataḥ katham ||31||
tamuvāca vaṇigdhīmānsārthabhraṣṭasya caiva me ||
praveśo daivayogena pūrvakarmakṛtena tu ||32||
tṛṣṇā māṃ bādhate.atyarthaṃ kṣuddunoti bhṛśaṃ tathā ||
prāṇāḥ kaṃṭhamanuprāptā vacanaṃ naśyatīva me ||
atropāyaṃ na paśyāmi jīveyaṃ yena kenacit ||33||
|| kṛṣṇa uvāca || ||
ityevamukte pretastaṃ vaṇijaṃ vākyamabravīt ||
puṃnāgamimamāśritya pratīkṣasva muhūrtakam ||34||
kṛtātithyo yathālābhaṃ gamiṣyasi yathāsukham ||
evamuktastathā cakre sa vaṇiktṛṣṇayārditaḥ || 35 ||
madhyāhnasamaye prāpte tatastaṃ deśamāgataḥ ||
punnāgavṛkṣātkarako vāridhārāmanoramaḥ ||
dadhyodanasamāyukto vardhamānena saṃyutaḥ || 36 ||
āgate karake tasminprādādatithaye tadā ||
bhuktvānnaṃ ca jalaṃ pītvā vaṇiktuṣṭimupāgataḥ ||
vitṛṣṇo vijvaraścaiva kṣaṇena samapadyata || 37 ||
tatastu pretasaṃghasya bhoktukāmasya vai dadau ||
dadhyodadanaṃ sapānīyaṃ pretāstṛptiṃ parāṃ gatāḥ || 38 ||
atithiṃ tarpayitvā ca pretalokaṃ ca sarvaśaḥ ||
tataḥ svayaṃ sa bubhuje bhuktaśeṣaṃ yathāsukham || 39 ||
tasya bhuktavataścānnaṃ pānīyaṃ ca kṣayaṃ yayau ||
pretādhipaṃ tatastṛpto vaṇigvacanamabravīt || 4.75.40 ||
āścaryametatparamaṃ vane.asminpratibhāti me ||
annapānasya samprāptiḥ paramasya kutastava || 41 ||
stokena ca tathānnena bibharṣi subahūnpṛthak ||
tṛptāḥ paraṃ kathaṃ tvete nirmāṃsā bhinnaku kṣayaḥ || 42 ||
aparaṃ ca kathaṃ ceha mama pāpaparikṣayaḥ ||
hastāvalaṃbanakastvaṃ samprāpto nirjane vane ||
tṛptaścāsi kathaṃ grāsamātreṇa ca śubhavrata || || 43 ||
kastvamasyāṃ sughorāyāmaṭavyāṃ tu kṛtālayaḥ ||
tametaṃ saṃśayaṃ chiṃdhi paraṃ kautūhalaṃ mama || 44 ||
evamuktaḥ sa vāṇijyā preto vacanamabravīta ||
śṛṇu bhadra pravakṣyāmi duṣkṛtaṃ karma cātmanaḥ || 45 ||
śākale nagare ramye ahamāsaṃ sudurmatiḥ ||
vāṇijyāsaktitaḥ pūrvaṃ kālo nīto mayānagha || 46 ||
dhanalobhānmayā tatra kadācicca pramādinā ||
na dattā bhikṣave bhikṣā tṛṣṇayā pīḍitāya ca || 47 ||
prativeśe ca tatrāsīdbrāhmaṇo guṇavānmama ||
śravaṇadvādaśīyoge māsi bhādrapade tathā || 48 ||
sa kadācinmayā sārdhaṃ toṣāṃ nāma nadīṃ yayau ||
tasyāśca saṃgamaḥ puṇyo yatrāsīccandrabhāgayā || 49 ||
caṃdrabhāgā somasutā toṣā caivārkanaṃdinī ||
tayoḥ śītoṣṇasalilasaṃgamaḥ sumanoharaḥ || 4.75.50 ||
tattīrthavaramāsādya prātiveśyaḥ sa ca dvijaḥ ||
śravaṇadvādaśīyoge snātaścaivamupoṣitaḥ || 51 ||
caṃdrabhāgātoṣayośca vāridhānyairnavairdṛḍhaiḥ ||
dadhyodanayutaiḥ sārdhaṃ sampūrṇairvardhamānakaiḥ || 52 ||
chatropānadyugaṃ vastraṃ pratimāṃ vidhivaddhareḥ ||
caṃdrabhāgājīvanena dadhyodanayutaṃ tadā || 53 ||
etatkṛtvā gṛhaṃ prāptastataḥ kālena kenacit ||
pañcatvamahamāsādya nāstikyātpretatāṃ gataḥ ||
asyāmaṭavyāṃ ghorāyāṃ yathā dṛṣṭastvayānagha || 54 ||
brahmasvahāriṇastvete pāpāḥ pretatvamāgatāḥ ||
paradāraratāḥ kecitsvāmidroharatāḥ pare || 55 ||
mitradroharatāḥ keciddeśe.asmiṃstu sudāruṇe ||
mamaite bhṛtyatāṃ yātā annapānakṛtena ca || ||56||
akṣayyo bhagavānkṛṣṇaḥ paramātmā sanātanaḥ ||
yaddīyate tamuddiśya akṣayyaṃ tatprakīrtitam ||57||
mayā vihīnāḥ kiṃ tvete vane.asminbhṛśadāruṇe||
pīḍāmanubhaviṣyaṃti dāruṇāṃ karmayonijām ||58||
eteṣāṃ tvaṃ mahābhāga mamānugrahakāmyayā ||
anekanāmagotrāṇi gṛhāṇa lekhanena ca ||59||
astu kakṣāgatā caiva tava saṃpuṭikā śubhā ||
himavatyāṃ tathāsādya tatra tvaṃ lapsyase nidhim || 4.75.60 ||
gayāśīrṣe tato gatvā śrāddhaṃ kuru mahāmate ||
ekamekamathoddiśya pretaṃpretaṃ yathāsukham || 61 ||
evaṃ sambhāṣamāṇo.asau taptajāṃbūnadaprabhaḥ ||
vimānavaramāruhya svargalokamito gataḥ ||62||
svargate pretanāthe tu prabhāvātsa vaṇikpumān ||
nāmagotrāṇi saṃgṛhya prayātaḥ sa himācalam || 63 ||
tatra prāpya nidhiṃ gatvā vinikṣipya svake gṛhe ||
dhanabhāgamupādāya gayāśīrṣavaṭaṃ yayau ||
pretānāṃ kramaśastatra cakre śrāddhaṃ dinedine || 64 ||
yasyayasya gayāśrāddhaṃ sa karoti dine vaṇik ||
sa ca tasya sadā svapne darśayatyātmanastanum || 65 ||
bravīti ca mahābhāga prasādena tavānagha ||
pretabhāvo mayā tyaktaḥ prāptosmi paramāṃ gatim ||66||
sa kṛtvā dhanalobhācca pretānāṃ satkṛtiṃ vaṇik ||
jagāma svagṛhaṃ tatra māsi bhādrapade tathā || 67 ||
śravaṇadvādaśīyoge pūjayitvā janārdanam ||
dānaṃ ca dattvā viprebhyaḥ sopavāso jitendriyaḥ || 68 ||
mahānadīsaṃgameṣu prativarṣaṃ yudhiṣṭhira ||
cakāra vidhivaddānaṃ tato diṣṭāṃtamāgataḥ || 69 ||
avāpa paramaṃ sthānaṃ durlabhaṃ cātra mānavaiḥ ||
yatra kāmaphalā vṛkṣā nadyaḥ pāyasakardamāḥ ||
śītalāmalapānīyāḥ puṣkariṇyo manoharāḥ || 4.75.70 ||
taṃ deśamāsādya vaṇiṅ mahātmā sutaptajāṃbūnadabhūṣitāṃgaḥ ||
kalpaṃ samagraṃ saha sundarībhiḥ svarge sa reme muditaḥ sadaiva || 71 ||
iti śrībhaviṣye mahā purāṇa uttaraparvaṇi śrīkṛṣṇayudhiṣṭhirasaṃvāde śravaṇadvādaśīvratavarṇanaṃ nāma pañcasaptatitamo.adhyāyaḥ || 75 || || cha ||
vijayaśravaṇadvādaśīvratavarṇanam
|| śrīkṛṣṇa uvāca || ||
dvādaśyāste vidhiḥ proktaḥ śrāvaṇe yo yudhiṣṭhira ||
sarvapāpapraśamanaḥ sarvasaukhyapradāyakaḥ || 1 ||
ekādaśī yadā sā syācchravaṇena samanvitā ||
vijayā sā tithiḥ proktā bhaktānāṃ vijayapradā || 2 ||
balavānajito daityo balirnāmā mahābalaḥ ||
tena devagaṇāḥ sarve tyājitāḥ suramaṃdiram ||
tato devā mahāviṣṇuṃ gatvā vacanamūcire ||
tvaṃ gatiḥ sarvadevānāṃ śīghraṃ kaṣṭātsamuddhara || 4 ||
jahi daityaṃ mahābāho baliṃ balaniṣūdana ||
śrutvā viṣṇustadā vākyaṃ devānāṃ karuṇodayam || 5 ||
uvāca vākyaṃ kālajño devānāṃ hitakāmyayā ||
jāne vairocaniṃ daityaṃ baliṃ trailokyakaṇṭakam || 6 ||
tapasā bhāvitātmānaṃ śāntaṃ dāntaṃ jitendriyam ||
madbhaktaṃ madgataprāṇaṃ satyasandhaṃ mahābalam ||
tapasontaḥ subahunā kāle nāsya bhaviṣyati || 7 ||
yadā vinayasampannaṃ jñāsye kālena kenacit ||
samāhṛtya priyaṃ tasya tadā dāsye divaukasām || 8 ||
aditirmāṃ prapannā vai putrārthe putralobhinī ||
tasyāmatihitaṃ devāḥ kariṣye nātra saṃśayaḥ || 9 ||
taddevānāṃ hitaṃ sarve cāhitaṃ tu suradviṣām ||
tadgacchadhvaṃ nirudvignāḥ kālaḥ kaścitpratīkṣyatām || 4.76.10 ||
evamuktā gatā devāḥ kāryaṃ viṣṇuraciṃtayat ||
sā cintayitvā suciraṃ devyā garbhāvatāraṇam ||
aditirvarayāmāsa vāṃchitaṃ me bhaviṣyati || 11 ||
atha kāle bahutithe gate sā garbhiṇī hyabhūt ||
suṣuve navame māsi putraṃ sā vāmanaṃ harim || 12 ||
hrasvapādaṃ hrasvakāyaṃ mahacchirasamarbhakam ||
pāṇipādodarakṛśaṃ svayaṃ nārāyaṇaṃ harim || 13 ||
dṛṣṭvā tu vāmanaṃ jātaṃ yadi sā vaktumudyatā ||
niruddhavākyā hyabhavadvaktuṃ kiṃcinna pāritam || 14 ||
ekādaśyāṃ bhādrapade śravaṇena narottama ||
saṃcacāla mahī jāte vāmane tu trivikrame || 15 ||
bhayaṃ babhūva daityānāṃ devānāṃ toṣa ābhavat ||
jātakarmādikāṃstasya saṃskārānsvayameva hi || 16 ||
cakāra kaśyapo dhīmānprajāpatiranudyataḥ ||
ābaddhamekhalo daṃḍī dhṛtvā yajñopavītakam || 17 ||
kuśasvacchodakadharaḥ kamaṃḍaluvibhūṣitaḥ ||
balerbalavato yajñaṃ jagāma bahuvistaram || 18 ||
dṛṣṭvā balimathovāca vāmano.abhyetya tatkṣaṇam ||
atha cāha yajñapate dīyatāṃ mama medinī || 19 ||
pādatrayapramāṇena paṭhanārthe sthito hyasi ||
dattādattā tava mayā baliḥ prāha dvijottamam || 4.76.20 ||
tato varddhitumārabdho vāmano.anaṃtavikramaḥ ||
pādau bhūmau pratiṣṭhāpya śirasāvṛtya rodasī || 21 ||
tābhyāmiṃdrādikā~mllokā~mllalāṭe brahmaṇaḥ padam ||
na tṛtīya padaṃ lebhe tato nedurdivaukasaḥ || 22 ||
taddṛṣṭvā mahadāścaryaṃ siddhā devarṣayastathā ||
sādhusādhviti deveśaṃ praśaśaṃsurmudānvitāḥ ||23||
tato daityagaṇānsarvāñjitvā tribhuvanaṃ vaśī ||
balimāha tato gaccha sutalaṃ svabalānugaḥ || 24 ||
tatra tvamīpsitānbhogānbhuktvā madbāhupālitaḥ ||
asyeṃdrasyāvasāne tu tvamevendro bhaviṣyasi || 25 |||||
evamukto baliḥ prāyānnamaskṛtya narottamam ||
visṛjyemaṃ baliṃ devānsakalānsa uvāca ha || 26 ||
svāni dhiṣṇyāni gacchadhvaṃ tiṣṭhadhvaṃ vigata jvarāḥ ||
devenoktā gatā devā hṛṣṭāḥ saṃpūjya vāmanam || 27 ||
devaḥ kṛtvā jagatkāryaṃ tatraivāṃtarddhimāgamat ||
etatsarvaṃ samabhavadekādaśyāṃ narādhipa|||
teneṣṭā devadevasya sarvadā vijayā tithiḥ || 28 ||
eṣā vai phālgune māsi puṣyeṇa sahitā nṛpa ||
vijayā procyate sadbhiḥ koṭikoṭiguṇottarā ||29||
ekādaśyāṃ sopavāso rātrau saṃpūjayeddharim ||
raupye sauvarṇapātre vā dāruvaṃśamaye.api vā || 4.76.30 ||
kuṃḍikāṃ sthāpayetpārśve chatraṃ vai pāduke tathā ||
śubhāṃ ca vaiṣṇavīṃ yaṣṭiṃ tathā sūtrakamaḍalū || 31 ||
ācchādya pātraṃ vāsobhiḥ phalaiścāpi suśobhanaiḥ ||
mārgacārmaṇagandhaiśca bhaktyā vā mṛgacarmaṇā || 32 ||
tilāḍhakena vittāḍhyaḥ prasthena kuḍavena vā ||
vrīhibhirvātha godhūmaiḥ phalaiḥ śuklatilairbhavet || 33 ||
puṣpairgaṃdhairdhūpadīpaiḥ pakvānnai rarcayeddharim ||
nānāvidhaiśca naivedyairbhakṣyabhojyairguḍaudanaiḥ || 34 ||
svasvavittānusāreṇa sahiraṇyaṃ ca kārayet ||
maṃtraiḥ śataguṇaṃ caiva bhaktyā lakṣa guṇottaram ||
bhaktimāṃśca guṇopetaṃ koṭikoṭiguṇottaram || 35 ||
ebhirmaṃtrapadaistatra pūjayedgaruḍadhvajam ||
upahārairnaraśreṣṭha śucirbhūtvā samāhitaḥ || || 36 ||
oṃ jalajopamadehāya jalajāsyāya śaṃkhine ||
jalarāśisvarūpāya namaste puruṣottama || 37 ||
namaḥ kamalanābhāya namaste jala śāyine ||
namaste keśavānaṃta vāsudeva namo.astu te || 38 || iti snānamaṃtraḥ ||
malayeṣu samutpannaṃ gandhāḍhayaṃ sumanoharam ||
mayā niveditaṃ tubhyaṃ gṛhāṇa parameśvara || 39 || iti candanamaṃtraḥ || vanaspatisamutpannaṃ gandhāḍhyaṃ sumanoharam ||
mayā niveditaṃ puṣpaṃ gṛhāṇa puruṣottama || 4.76.40 || iti puṣpamantraḥ ||
namaḥ kamalakiṃjalkapītanirmalavāsase ||
manoharavapuḥskandhadhṛtacakrāya śārṅgiṇe || 41 || iti pūjāmaṃtraḥ ||
matsyaḥ kūrmo varā haśca nārasiṃhaśca vāmanaḥ ||
rāmo rāmaśca kṛṣṇaśca nāmabhirvāmanāya te ||
pādādyaikaikāṃgasya pūjanaṃ śīrṣagaṃ tataḥ || 42 || iti sarvāṃgapūjā ||
dhūpo.ayaṃ devadeveśa śaṃkhacakragadādhara ||
acyutānaṃta govinda vāsudeva namo.astu te || 43 || iti dhūpamaṃtraḥ ||
tvameva pṛthivī jyotirvāyurākāśameva ca ||
tvameva jyotiṣāṃ jyotirdīpo.ayaṃ pratigṛhyatām || 44 || iti dīpamaṃtraḥ ||
annaṃ caturvidhaṃ svādu rasaiḥ ṣaḍbhiḥ samanvitam ||
bhakṣyabhojyasamāyuktaṃ prasīda parameśvara || 45 ||
annaṃ prajāpatirviṣṇū rudreṃdraśaśibhāskarāḥ ||
annaṃ tvaṣṭā yamo.agniśca pāpaṃ haratu me.avyayaḥ || 46 || iti naivedyamaṃtraḥ || jagadādirjagadūpamanādirjagadaṃtakṛt ||
jalāśayo jagadyoniḥ prīyatāṃ me janārdanaḥ || 47 || iti prīṇanamaṃtraḥ || anekakarmanirbaṃdhadhvaṃsinaṃ jala śāyinam||
nato.asmi mathurāvāsaṃ mādhavaṃ madhusūdanam || 48 ||
namo vāmanarūpāya namaste.astu trivikrama ||
namaste maṇibandhāya vāsudeva namo.astu te || 49 || iti namaskāramaṃtraḥ ||
namo namaste govinda vāmaneśa trivikrama || 4.76.50 ||
aghaughasaṃkṣayaṃ kṛtvā sarvakāmaprado bhava ||51|| iti prārthanāmaṃtraḥ ||
sarvagaḥ sarvadeveśaḥ śrīdharaḥ śrīniketanaḥ ||
viśveśvaraśca viṣṇuśca śrīśāyī ca namonamaḥ ||52|| iti śayanamaṃtraḥ ||
evaṃ saṃpūjya yo rātrāvekādaśyāṃ nṛpottama ||
jāgaraṃ tatra kurvīta gītavāditranisvanaiḥ || 53 ||
yā ca śravaṇasaṃyuktā dvādaśī paramā tithiḥ ||
tasyāṃ ca saṃgame snātvā sarvapāpaiḥ pramucyate || 54 ||
evaṃ saṃpūjya yatnena prabhāte vimale sati ||
pradeyaṃ śāstraviduṣe brāhmaṇāya ca maṃtrataḥ || 55 ||
brāhmaṇaścāpi mantreṇa pratigṛhṇīta maṃtravat ||
vāmano.asya pratigrāhī vāmanāya namonamaḥ || 56 ||
puṣpaṃ phalaṃ ca naivedyaṃ sarvametadyathāvidhi ||
naro dadyādupoṣyaivamekādaśyāṃ samaṃtrakam || 57 ||
pūrvoktavidhinā prātarbhojanaṃ pṛṣadājyakam ||
pūrvaṃ dattvā brāhmaṇebhyaḥ paścādbhuñjīta vāgyataḥ || 58 ||
bhūyobhūyo.api rājeṃdra sarvatraivaṃ vidhiḥ smṛtaḥ ||
samāpte tu vrate rājanyatpuṇyaṃ tannibodha me || 59 ||
caturyugāni rājeṃdra ekasaptatisaṃkhyayā ||
prāpya viṣṇupure rājankrīḍate kālamakṣayam || 4.76.60 ||
ihāgatya bhavedrājā pratipakṣakṣayaṃkaraḥ ||
hastyaśvarathapattīnāṃ dātā bhoktā vimatsarī || 61 ||
rūpasaubhāgyasaṃpanno dīrghāyurnīrujo bhavet ||
putraiḥ parivṛto jīvo jīvecca śaradaḥ śatam || 62 ||
etasyāḥ phalamākhyātamekādaśyā mayā tava ||
pūrvameva samākhyātā dvādaśī śravaṇānvitā || 63 ||
upoṣyaikādaśīṃ paścāddvādaśīmapyupoṣayet ||
na cātra vidhilopaḥ syādubhayordevatā hariḥ || 64 ||
budhaśravaṇasaṃyuktā dvādaśī saṃgamodakam ||
dānaṃ dadhyodanaṃ satyamupavāsaḥ paro vidhiḥ || 65 ||
sagareṇa kakutsthena dhuṃdhumāreṇa gādhinā ||
etaiścānyaiśca rājeṃdra kṛtaṃ vai dvādaśīvratam || 66 ||
sā dvādaśī budhayutā śravaṇena sākaṃ syādvai jayāya kathitā ṛṣibhirnabhasye || tāmādareṇa samupoṣya naro.amaratvaṃ prāpnoti pārtha aṇimādiguṇopapannam || 67 || iti śrībhaviṣye mahāpurāṇa uttaraparvaṇi śrīkṛṣṇayudhiṣṭhirasaṃvāde vijayaśravaṇadvādaśīvratavarṇanaṃ nāma ṣaṭsaptatitamo.adhyāyaḥ || 76 || a ||
samprāptidvādaśīvratavarṇanam
|| śrīkṛṣṇa uvāca || ||
kṛṣṇapakṣe tu pauṣasya saṃprāptaṃ dvādaśīvratam ||
pauṣādipāraṇaṃ māsaiḥ ṣaḍbhirjyeṣṭhāṃtikaṃ smṛtam || 1 ||
prathamaṃ puṃḍarīkākṣaṃ nāma kṛṣṇasya gīyate ||
dvitīyaṃ mādhavākhyaṃ tu viśvarūpaṃ tu phālgune || 2 ||
puruṣottamākhyaṃ tu tataḥ paṃcame.acyutasaṃjñakam ||
ṣaṣṭhe jayeti deveśa guhyanāma prakīrtitam || 3 ||
pūrvokteṣu ca māseṣu snānaprāśana yostilāḥ ||
āṣāḍhādiṣu māseṣu paṃcagavyamudāhṛtam ||4||
snānaṃ ca prāśanaṃ caiva paṃcagavyaṃ sadeṣyate||
pūjayetpuṃḍarīkākṣaṃ testaireva ca nāmabhiḥ|||
pratimāsaṃ ca deveśa kṛtvā pūjāṃ yathāvidhi ||
viprāya dakṣiṇāṃ dadyācchraddadhānaśca bhaktitaḥ || 6 ||
pāraṇaṃ caiva deveśa prīṇanaṃ bhaktipūrvakam ||
kurvīta bhaktyā goviṃdasadbhāvenārcanaṃ yataḥ || 7 ||
naktaṃ bhuṃjīta satataṃ tailakṣāravivarjitam ||
ekādaśyāmupoṣyaivaṃ dvādaśyāmatha vā dine || 8 ||
evaṃ saṃvatsarasyāṃte yadabhipretamātmanaḥ ||
dhanaṃ vasu hiraṇyaṃ ca dhānyaṃ bhājanamāsanam ||
śayyāṃ vā brāhmaṇe dadyātkeśavaḥ pratigṛhyatām || 9 ||
etāmupoṣya vidhinā viṣṇuprītau ca tatparaḥ ||
sarvānkāmānavāpnoti yadyadicchati cetasā ||
tato lokeṣu vikhyātaṃ saṃprāptaṃ dvādaśīti vai || 4.77.10 ||
kṛtābhilaṣitā dṛṣṭā prārabdhā dharmatatparaiḥ||
pūrayedakhilānkāmānsaṃsmṛtā vā dinedine || 11 ||
saṃprāptikāmupavasaṃti samīhitārthā ye mānavā manu japuṃgava viṣṇubhaktāḥ ||
teṣāṃ samīhitaphalāni dadāti śaśvadvāsaḥ sureśabhavane bhagavatprasādāt || 12 ||
iti śrībhaviṣye mahāpurāṇa uttaraparvaṇi śrīkṛṣṇayudhiṣṭhirasaṃvāde saṃprāptidvādaśīvrataṃ nāma saptasaptatitamo.adhyāyaḥ || 77 |||9|||
govindadvādaśīvratavarṇanam
|| śrīkṛṣṇa uvāca || ||
tathānyāmapi te vacmi goviṃda dvādaśīṃ śṛṇu ||
tasyāḥ samyaganuṣṭhānātprāpnotyabhimataṃ phalam || 1 ||
pauṣe māse site pakṣe dvādaśyāṃ samupoṣitaḥ ||
samyaksaṃpūjya govindaṃ nāmnā devamadhokṣajam || 2 ||
dhūpapuṣpopacāraiśca naivedyaiśca samāhitaḥ ||
goviṃdeti japennāma punastadgatamānasaḥ || 3 ||
viprāya dakṣiṇāṃ dadyādyathāśaktyā narādhipa ||
svayaṃ vibuddhastulito goviṃdeti ca kīrtayet || 4 ||
pākhaṃḍibhirvikarmasthairālāpāṃśca vivarjayet ||
gomūtraṃ gomayaṃ vāpi dadhi kṣīrama thāpi vā || 5 ||
godohataḥ samudbhūtaṃ prāśnīyādātmaśuddhaye ||
dvitīye.ahni punaḥ snānaṃ tathaivābhyarcya keśavam || 6 ||
tenaiva nāmnā saṃpūjya dattvā viprāya dakṣiṇām ||
tato bhuñjīta godohaṃ saṃbhūtena samudbhavam || 7 ||
evamevākhilānmāsānupoṣya prayataḥ śuciḥ ||
dadyādgavāhnikaṃ vidvānpratimāsaṃ tu śaktitaḥ || 8 ||
pārite ca punarvaṣe govindaṃ padmayā saha ||
govindaḥ prītimāyātu vratenānena me sadā || 9 ||
viśeṣataḥ punardadyāttasminnahni gavāhnikam ||
bhaktyā paramayā rājañchṛṇu yatphalamāpnuyāt || 4.78.10 ||
svarṇaśṛṃgaṃ raupyakhuraṃ gośatairvṛṣabhaṃ varam ||
iti māsaṃ dvijātibhyo dattvā yatphalamaśnute || 11 ||
tadāpnotyakhilaṃ samyagvratametadupoṣitaḥ ||
taṃ ca lokamavāpnoti govindo yatra tiṣṭhati ||12||
govindadvādaśīmetāṃ samupoṣya vidhānataḥ ||
vidyotamānā dṛśyaṃte lokedyāpi śaśāṃkavat || 13 ||
govindamarcayati gorasabhojanastu gā vai vinodayati tadvadgavāhnikaśca ||
yo dvādaśīṣu kururāja kṛtopavāsaḥ prāpnotyasau surabhilokamapetaśokam || 14 ||
iti śrībhaviṣye mahāpurāṇa uttara parvaṇi śrīkṛṣṇayudhiṣṭhirasaṃvāde govindadvādaśīvratavarṇanaṃ nāmāṣṭasaptatitamo.adhyāyaḥ || 78 || || ja ||
akhaṇḍadvādaśīvratavarṇanam
|| yudhiṣṭhira uvāca || ||
upavāsavratānāṃ tu vaikalyaṃ yanmahāmate ||
dānadharme kṛtaṃ yasya vipākaṃ vada yādṛśaḥ || 1 ||
|| śrīkṛṣṇa uvāca || ||
yajñānāmupavāsānāṃ vratānāṃ ca nareśvara ||
vaikalyātphalavaikalyaṃ yādṛśa tacchṛṇuṣva me || 2 ||
upavāsānvinā khaṇḍaṃ prāpnuvaṃtyeva tāñchṛṇu ||
bhraṣṭaiśvaryā nirddhanāśca vasaṃti puruṣāḥ punaḥ || 3 ||
rūpaṃ tathottaraṃ prāpya vratavaikalyadoṣataḥ ||
kāṇāḥ kubjāśca ṣaṇḍāśca bhavaṃtyaṃdhāśca mānavāḥ || 4 ||
upavāsī naraḥ patnīṃ nārīṃ prāpya tathā patim ||
viyogaṃ vratavaikalye durbhagatvamavāpnuyāt || 5 ||
ye dravye satyadātārastathānne satyanagnayaḥ ||
kule vasaṃti duḥśīlā duṣkulāḥ śīlaniścaye || 6 ||
vastrānulepanairhīnā bhūṣaṇaiścātirūpiṇaḥ ||
virūparūpāśca tathā prasādhakaguṇānvitāḥ || 7 ||
te sarve vratavaikalyātphala vaikalyamāgatāḥ ||
tasmāttadvratavaikalyaṃ yajñavaikalyameva ca ||
upavāsena kartavyaṃ vaikalyādvikalaṃ phalam ||8||
||yudhiṣṭhira uvāca || ||
kathaṃcidyadi vaikalyamupavāsādike bhavet ||
kiṃ tatra vada kartavyamacchidraṃ yena jāyate || 9 ||
|| śrīkṛṣṇa uvāca || ||
akhaṃḍadvādaśī hyeṣā samasteṣveva karmasu|| ||4.79.1 0||
vaikalyaṃ praśamaṃ yāti śṛṇuṣva gadato mama ||
mārgaśīrṣe site pakṣe dvādaśyāṃ niyataḥ śuciḥ ||
kṛtopavāso deveśaṃ samabhyarcya janārdanam || 11 ||
snāto nārāyaṇaṃ brūyādbhuñjannārāyaṇaṃ tathā ||
gacchannārāyaṇaṃ devaṃ svapannārāyaṇaṃ punaḥ || 12 ||
pañcagavyajalasnāto viśuddhātmā jitendriyaḥ ||
yavavrīhimayaṃ pātraṃ dattvā viprāya bhaktitaḥ ||
idamuccārayetpaścāddevasya purato hareḥ || 13 ||
saptajanmani yatkiñcinmayā khaṇḍavrataṃ kṛtam ||
bhagavaṃstvatprasādena tadakhaṃḍamihāstu me || 14 ||
yathākhaṃḍaṃ jagatsarvaṃ tvameva puruṣottama ||
tathākhilānyakhaṃḍāni vratāni mama saṃtu vai || 15 ||
caturbhirapi māsaistu pāraṇaṃ prathamaṃ smṛtam ||
prīṇanaṃ ca hareḥ kuryātpārite pāraṇe tataḥ || 16 ||
caitrādiṣu ca māseṣu caturguṇyaṃ tu pāraṇam ||
tatrāpi saktupātrāṇi dadyācchraddhāsamanvitaḥ || 17 ||
śrāvaṇādiṣu māseṣu kārttikāṃteṣu pāraṇam ||
tatrāpi ghṛtapātrāṇi dadyādviprāya dakṣiṇāḥ || || 18 ||
sauvarṇaṃ raupyaṃ tāmraṃ ca mṛnmayaṃ pātramiṣyate ||
svaśaktyapekṣayā rājanpālāśaṃ vāpi kārayet || 19 ||
evaṃ saṃvatsarasyāṃte brāhmaṇānsa jitendriyaḥ ||
dvādaśāmantrya viprāṃśca bhojayeddhṛtapāyasaiḥ || 4.79.20 ||
vastrābharaṇadānaiśca praṇipatya kṣamāpayet ||
upadeṣṭāramapyatra pūjayedvidhivadgurum || 21 ||
evaṃ samyagyathānyāyyamakhaṃḍadvādaśīṃ naraḥ ||
samupoṣya akhaṃḍasya vratasya phalamaśnute || 22 ||
saptajanmasu vaikalyaṃ yadvratasya kvacitkṛtam ||
karotyavikalaṃ sarvamakhaṃḍadvādaśī tu tat || 23 ||
tasmādeṣā prayatnena naraiḥ strībhiśca suvrata ||
akhaṃḍadvādaśī samyagupoṣyā phalakāṃkṣayā ||24 ||
ye dvādaśīvratamakhaṃḍamiti prasiddhaṃ mārgottamāṅgamadhikṛtya kṛtena yena ||
khaṃḍavratāni puruṣaiḥ sukṛtāni yāni saṃpūrṇatāṃ samupayānti hareḥ prasādāt || 25 ||
iti śrībhaviṣye mahāpurāṇa uttaraparvaṇi śrīkṛṣṇayudhiṣṭhirasaṃvāde.akhaṃḍadvādaśīvratavarṇanaṃ nāmaikonāśītitamo.adhyāyaḥ || 79 || ||
manorathadvādaśīvratavarṇanam
|| śrīkṛṣṇa uvāca || ||
phālgunemalapakṣasya ekādaśyāmupoṣitaḥ ||
naro vā yadi vā nārī samabhyarcya jagatpatim || 1 ||
harernāma vadanbhaktyā bhāvayukto yudhiṣṭhira ||
uttiṣṭhanprasvapaṃścaiva harimevānukīrtayet || 2 ||
tatonyasmindine prāpte drādaśyāṃ niyato harim ||
snātvā samyaksamabhyarcya dattvā viprāya dakṣiṇām || 3 ||
harimuddiśya caivāgnau ghṛtahomakṛtakriyaḥ ||
praṇipatya jagannāthamiti vāṇīmudīrayeta || 4 ||
pātālasaṃsthāṃ vasudhāṃ yāṃ prasādya manorathā||
avāpa vāsudevosau pradadyāttu manorathān ||5||
yamabhyarcya divi prāptaḥ sakalāṃśca manorathān ||
bhraṣṭarājyaśca devendro yamabhyarcya jagatpatim || 6 ||
manorathānabhinavānprāptavāṃśca manoharān ||
evamabhyarcya pūjāṃ ca niṣpādya ca harestataḥ ||
bhuñjīta prayataḥ samyaghaviṣyaṃ pāṃḍunandana || 7 ||
phālgune caitre vaiśākhe jyeṣṭhe māsi ca sattama ||
caturbhiḥ pāraṇaṃ māsairebhirniṣpāditaṃ bhavet || 8 ||
raktapuṣpaiśca caturo māsā nkurvīta cārcanam ||
dahettu gugguluṃ prāśya gośṛṃgakṣālanaṃ jalam ||9||
haviṣyānnaṃ ca naivedyamātmanaścāpi bhojanam ||
tataśca śrūyatāṃ pārtha āṣāḍhādau tu yā kriyā ||4.80.1 0||
jātīpuṣpāṇi dhūpaśca śastaḥ sārjaraso nṛpa ||
prāśya darbhodakaṃ cāsya śālyannaṃ ca nivedanam ||11||
svayaṃ tadeva cāśnīyāccheṣaṃ pūrvavadācaret ||
kārtikādiṣu māseṣu gomūtraṃ kāyaśodhanam ||12||
sugaṃdhiścecchayā dhūpaṃ pūjā bhṛṃgārakena ca ||
kāṃsāraṃ cātra naivedyamaśnīyāttacca vai svayam ||13||
pratimāsaṃ ca viprāya dātavyā dakṣiṇā tathā ||
pāraṇaṃ cecchayā viṣṇoḥ pāraṇe pāvane mate || 14 ||
yathāśaktyā yathāprītyā vittaśāṭhyaṃ vivarjayet ||
sadbhāvenaiva goviṃdaḥ pūjitaḥ prīyate yataḥ ||15||
pāraṇāṃte yathāśakti snāpitaḥ pūjito hariḥ || prīṇitaścepsitānkāmāṃstāndadātyavyayān nṛpa ||16||
varṣāṃte pratimāmiṣṭāṃ kārayitvā suśobhanām||
svarṇakena yathā śaktyā śaṃkhaśārṅgavibhūṣitām || 17 ||
puṣpavastrayugacchannāṃ brāhmaṇāya nivedayet ||
dvādaśa brāhmaṇāṃstatra bhojayitvā kṣamāpayet ||18||
dvādaśātra pradātavyāḥ kuṃbhāḥ sānnajalākṣatāḥ ||
chatropānadyugaiḥ sārddhaṃ dakṣiṇābhiśca bhārata || 19 ||
eṣā puṇyā pāpaharā dvādaśī phalamicchatām ||
yathābhilaṣitānkāmāndadāti nṛpasattama ||4.80.20||
pūrayatyakhilānbhaktyā yataścaiṣāṃ manorathān ||
manorathā dvādaśīyaṃ tato lokeṣu viśrutā ||21||
upoṣyaitāṃ tribhuvanaṃ labdhamindreṇa vai purā ||
ādityāśceṣṭitāḥ putrā dhanamauśanasā tathā || 22 ||
dhaumyenādhyayanaṃ prāptamanyaiścābhimataṃ phalam ||
rājarṣibhistathā vipraiḥ strīviṭśūdraiśca bhūtale || 23 ||
yaṃyaṃ kāmamabhidhyāya vratametadupoṣitam ||
tattadāpnotyasaṃdigdhaṃ viṣṇorārādhanodyataḥ || 24 ||
aputro labhate putramadhano labhate dhanam ||
rogābhibhūtaścārogyaṃ kanyā prāpnoti satpatim || 25 ||
samāgamaṃ pravasanairupoṣyaitāmavāpyate ||
sarvānkāmānavāpnoti mṛtaḥ svarge ca modate || 26 ||
nāputro nādhano jyeṣṭho viyogī na ca nirguṇaḥ ||
upoṣyaitadvrataṃ martyaḥ strīśūdro vāpi jāyate || 27 ||
svargaloke sahasrāṇi varṣāṇāmayutāni ca ||
bhogānabhimatānbhuktvā tatratatra yathecchayā || 28 ||
iha puṇyavatāṃ nṛrṇāṃ dhanināṃ laghuśālinām ||
gṛhe prajāyate rājansarvavyādhivivarjitaḥ || 29 ||
na dvādaśīmupavasanti manorathākhyāṃ naivārcayaṃti puruṣottamamādidevam ||
gobrāhmaṇāṃśca na namaṃti na pūjayaṃti ye te manobhilaṣitaṃ kathamāpnuvaṃti || 4.80.30 || iti śrībhaviṣye mahāpurāṇa uttaraparvaṇi śrīkṛṣṇayudhiṣṭhirasaṃvāde manorathadvādaśīvratavarṇanaṃ nāmāśītitamo.adhyāyaḥ || 80 || || cha ||
ulkānavamīvratavarṇanam
||yudhiṣṭhira uvāca || ||
alpāyāsena bhagavandhanenālpena vā vibho ||
pāpaṃ praśamamāyāti yena tadvaktumarhasi || || 1 ||
|| śrīkṛṣṇa uvāca || ||
śṛṇu pārtha parāṃ puṇyāṃ dvādaśīṃ pāpanāśinīm ||
yāmupoṣya paraṃ puṇyamāpnuyācchraddhayānvitaḥ || 2 ||
māghamāse ca saṃprāpte āṣāḍharkṣaṃ bhavedyadi ||
mūlaṃ vā kṛṣṇapakṣasya dvādaśyāṃ niyatavrataḥ || 3 ||
gṛhṇīyātpuṇyaphaladaṃ vidhānaṃ tasya me śṛṇu ||
devadevaṃ samabhyarcya susnātaḥ prayataḥ śuciḥ || 4 ||
kṛṣṇanāmnā ca saṃpūjya ekādaśyāṃ mahāmate ||
upoṣito dvitīyehni punaḥ saṃpūjya keśavam || 5 ||
saṃstūya nāmnā tenaiva kṛṣṇākhyena punaḥpunaḥ ||
dadyāttilāṃśca viprāya kṛṣṇo me prīyatāmiti || 6 ||
tataśca prāśayecchastāṃstathā kṛṣṇatilānnṛpa ||
viṣṇuprīṇanamaṃtrokte samāpte varṣapāraṇe || 7 ||
kṛṣṇakuṃbhāṃstilaiḥ sārddhaṃ pakvānnena ca saṃyutāḥ ||
chatropānadyugairvastraiḥ sahitā annagarbhiṇaḥ ||
brāhmaṇebhyaḥ pradeyāste yathāvanmāsasaṃkhyayā || 8 ||
tilaprarohājjāyaṃte yāvatsaṃkhyāstilā nṛpa ||
tāvadvarṣasahasrāṇi svargaloke mahīyate ||
arogo jāyate nityaṃ naro janmanijanmani || 9 ||
aṃdho na badhiraścaiva na kuṣṭhī na ca kutsitaḥ ||
bhavatyetāmuṣitvā tu tilākhyāṃ dvādaśīṃ naraḥ || 4.81.10 ||
anena pārtha vidhinā tiladātā na saṃśayaḥ ||
mucyate pātakaiḥ sarvairanāyāsena mānavaḥ || 11 ||
dānaṃ vidhistathā śrāddhaṃ sarvapātakaśāṃtaye ||
nārthaḥ prabhūto nāyāsaḥ śarīre nṛpasattama || 12 ||
sarvopabhoganiratohni pare daśamyāṃ snānaṃ tilaistilanivedanakṛttilāśī ||
dattvā tilāndvijavarāya virājaketu saṃpūjya viṣṇupadavīṃ samupaiti martyaḥ || 13 || iti śrībhaviṣye mahāpurāṇa uttaraparvaṇi śrīkṛṣṇayudhiṣṭhirasaṃvāde ulkānavamīvratavarṇanaṃ nāmaikāśītitamo.adhyāyaḥ || 81 || |||8| ||
sukṛtadvādaśīvratavarṇanam
|| yudhiṣṭhira uvāca || ||
yanna tāpāya vai puṃsāṃ bhavatyāmuṣmikaṃ kṛtam ||
tadapāpāya bhavati tadācakṣva yadūttama || 1 ||
upavāsaprabhāvaṃ vai kṛṣṇārādhanakāṃkṣiṇām ||
kathayeha mahābāho naiva tṛpyāmi jalpataḥ || 2 ||
|| śrīkṛṣṇa uvāca || ||
śrūyatāṃ pārtha yatpṛṣṭāḥ kautukādbhavatā vayam ||
āmuṣmikaṃ na tāpāya pratāpāya ca jāyate || 3 ||
upoṣitaprabhāvaṃ ca kṛṣṇārādhanakāṃkṣiṇām ||
kathayāmi yathāvṛttaṃ pūrvameva narottama || 4 ||
vaidiśaṃ nāma nagaraṃ prakhyātaṃ nṛpasattama ||
tatra vaiśyo.abhavatpūrvaṃ sīrabhadra iti śrutaḥ || 5 ||
bhāryayā mātṛduhitā putrapautraiḥ samanvitaḥ ||
prabhūta bhṛtyavargaśca bahuvyāpārakārakaḥ || 6 ||
putrapautrādibharaṇe vyāsaktirmatireva ca ||
paralokaṃ prati matistasya nāsītkadācana || 7 ||
cakārānudinaṃ so.atha nyāyānyāyairddhanārjanam ||
sarvatrānyatra niḥsnehaḥ putrasnehapariplutaḥ || 8 ||
na juhotyudite kāle na dadātyatitṛṣṇayā ||
babhūva codyamastasya putrādibharaṇe paraḥ || 9 ||
nityanaimittikānāṃ ca hāniṃ cakre svakarmaṇā ||
tṛṣṇābhibhūto rājendra svavargabharaṇojjhitaḥ || 4.82.10 ||
kālenāgacchatāso.atha mṛto viṃdhyāṭavītaṭe ||
yātanādehabhṛtpreto grīṣmakāle.abhavannṛpa || 11 ||
taṃ dadarśa mahābhāgo divyayānasamanvitaḥ ||
vedavedāṅgavidveṣī vipīto nāma vai dvijaḥ ||
bhāskarasyāśubhirddīptairdahaṃtamatidāruṇaiḥ || 12 ||
prataptavālukāmadhye tṛṣārtaṃ cātipīḍitam ||
kṣutkṣāmakaṃṭhaṃ śuṣkāsyaṃ tathodvṛttavilocanam ||
niṣkrāṃtajihvamaṃgeṣu visphoṭaiḥ sarvataścitam || 13 ||
niśvāsāyāsakhedena vihvalaṃ pīḍitodaram ||
nijena karmaṇā baddhamasamarthaṃ prasarpaṇe || 14 ||
tathādṛśamatho dṛṣṭvā gardabheyo mahānṛṣiḥ ||
vipītaḥ prāha rājendra kāruṇyabharitaṃ vacaḥ || 15 ||
jānannapi yathāprāptaṃ tasyānuṣṭhānajaṃ phalam ||
jaṃtostasyopakārāya sarvato hlādayanniva || 16 ||
|| vipīta uvāca || ||
adhaḥ sūryāṃśubhistaptairbahubhiḥ pathi pāṃśubhiḥ ||
uparyarkakaraistīkṣṇaistṛṣāvātanipīḍitam || 17 ||
anyastatrāṇakairghorairaviṣahyaiḥ sudāruṇaiḥ ||
kathayeha yathātattvamekākī dahyase katham || 18 ||
tasyaitadvacanaṃ śrutvā vipītasya savedanaḥ ||
vedanārta uvācedaṃ kṛcchrāducchusya maṃdakam || 19 ||
|| sīrabhadra uvāca || ||
brahmannālocitaṃ pūrvaṃ kathamaṃte bhaviṣyati ||
aśāśvate śāśvatadhīstena dahyāmi durmatiḥ || 4.82.20 ||
idaṃ kariṣyāmyaparaṃ tvidaṃ kṛtvā tvidaṃ punaḥ ||
itīcchā śatamārūḍhastena dahyāmi durmatiḥ || 21 ||
śītoṣṇavarṣādibhavaṃ lobhātsoḍhaṃ mayā.aśubham ||
tadeva hi na dharmārthaṃ tena dahyāmi durmatiḥ || 22 ||
pitṛdevamanupyāṇāmadattvā yāpitā hi ye ||
te gatā nāpi vartaṃta dahyāmyeko.atra durmatiḥ ||23||
putrakṣetrakalatreṣu mamatvāhṛtacetasā ||
bahvasādhu kṛtaṃ karma tena dahyāmi durmatiḥ || 24 ||
mṛte mayi dhane tasminnanyāyopārjite sadā ||
rūpavaṃto.abhivartaṃte dahyāmyekotra durmatiḥ || 25 ||
na mayā pūjitā gehānnirgatā dvijasattamāḥ ||
svavargamiha kāmena tena dahyāmyahaṃmatiḥ || 26 ||
yanme na pūjitā devāḥ kuṭuṃbaṃ poṣitaṃ param ||
ekākī tatra dahyāmi ye sutāste.anyato gatāḥ ||27||
nityaṃ naimittikaṃ karma pūrveṣāṃ caiva no kṛtam ||
ekākī tena dahyāmi gataste phalabhoginaḥ || 28 ||
dārāḥ putrāśca bhṛtyāśca pāpabuddhyā mayā bhṛtāḥ ||
ekākī tena dahyāmi gatāste phalabhoginaḥ || 29 ||
dārāḥ putrāśca bhṛtyārthe mayā nyāyārthasaṃcayaḥ ||
kṛtastenātra dahyāmi ye bhuktāste.anyato gatāḥ || 4.82.30 ||
kṣatapāpaṃ mayā bhuktamanyaistatkarma saṃcitam ||
dahyāmyeko.ahamatyaṃtaṃ gatāste phalabhoginaḥ || || 31 ||
yanmamatvābhibhūtena mayā pāpamupārjitam ||
na tadanyasya kasyāpi kevalaṃ mama duṣkatam || 32 ||
aṃtarduḥkhena dagdho.ahaṃ bahirdahyāmi bhāvayan ||
tāvadduḥkhaṃ navābhaṃ tu pāpamekaṃ dvidhāsthitam || 33 ||
kuru tasmātsamuddhāraṃ paśyasyamṛtasāgaram ||
tava yenāhamāhlādaṃ prāpnuyāṃ munisattama || || 34 ||
|| vipīta uvāca || ||
alpakālika uddhāre tava paśyāmi saṃśayam ||
prakṣīṇaṃ pāpametāvatsuvṛttaṃ cāsti te param || 35 ||
pratīte daśame janmanyacyutārādhanecchayā ||
sukarmajayadā bhadradvādaśīṃ samupoṣitaḥ ||
na ca tasyāḥ prasādena pāpamatyantadurjayam || 36 ||
alpairahobhiḥ saṃkṣīṇamāmapātre yathā jalam ||
gataṃ pāpamayaṃ hyasyāḥ prabhāvo.atyantadurllabhaḥ || 37 ||
nāśaṃ pāpasya kurute jayaṃ sukṛtakarmaṇaḥ ||
sakṛtkarmapradā hyeṣā tato vai dvādaśī smṛtā || 38 ||
yathaitadvadatārtena bhavatā paridevitam ||
tamuvācātra saṃdeho mama tāpāya deva kim || 39 ||
pāpamatra kṛtaṃ pretya bhadra tāpāya jāyate ||
āhlādāya tathā puṇyamiha puṇyakṛtāṃ nṛṇām || 4.82.40 ||
sīrabhadraṃ samāśvāsya yayāvitthaṃ mahāmuniḥ ||
sopyalpenaiva kālena tato mokṣamavāptavān || 41 ||
upavāsaprabhāvaśca kathitaste narottama ||
yenālpaireva divasairbhūri pāpaṃ kṣayaṃ gatam || 42 ||
tasmānnareṇa puṇyāya yatitavyaṃ na pātakam ||
upavāsāśca kartavyāḥ sadaivātmahitaiṣiṇā || 43 ||
|| yudhiṣṭhira uvāca || ||
athaitatkaṣṭapāpānāṃ vipāko narakasthitaiḥ ||
puruṣairbhujyate śaśvattaṃ mokṣaṃ vada sattama || 44 ||
|| śrīkṛṣṇa uvāca || ||
jayāsametāḥ puruṣāḥ sadā sukṛtakarmaṇaḥ ||
jayā sā dvādaśī śastā nṛṇāṃ sukṛtakarmaṇām || 45 ||
phālgunāmalapakṣasya ekādaśyāmupoṣitaḥ ||
dvādaśyāṃ tu dvijaśreṣṭha pūjayenmadhusūdanam || 46 ||
ekādaśyāṃ samuttiṣṭhanviṣṇornāmānukīrtayan ||
pūjāyāṃ vāsudevasya bhuñjīta susamāhitaḥ || 47 ||
kāmaṃ krodhaṃ ca lobhaṃ ca madaṃ mohaṃ ca varjayet ||
drohādīnvarjayeddoṣānsarvāndhanamadodbhavān || 48-||
bhāyayedviṣṇubhaktaśca saṃsāre.asāratāṃ tathā ||
evaṃ bhāvitacittena prāṇināṃ hitamicchatā || ||49||
namo nārāyaṇāyeti vaktavyaṃ svapatā niśi ||
tathaiva kuryāddvādaśyāṃ nāmnā kṣutpāraṇaṃ nṛpa ||4.82.50||
sauvarṇatāmrapātrāṇi mṛnmayānyapi pāṃḍava ||
yavapātrāṇi pūrvaṃ tu dadyānmāsacatuṣṭayam||51||
āṣāḍhādidvitīyaṃ tu pārayecca mahāmate ||
tatrāpi ghṛtapātrāṇi dadyācchraddhāsamanvitaḥ ||52||
kārttikādiṣu māseṣu māghāṃteṣu tathā tilān||
viprāya dadyātpātraṃ tu pratimāsamupoṣitaḥ ||53||
nāmatrayamaśeṣeṇa māsimāsi dinadvayam||
tathaivoccārayandadyānmāsimāsi yavādikam ||
praṇamya ca hṛṣīkeśaṃ kṛtapūjaḥ prasādayet ||54||
viṣṇo namaste jagatī prasotre śrīvāsudevāya namo namaste ||
nārāyaṇākhyaḥ praṇatairviciṃtyaḥ karotu māṃ śāśvatapuṇyarāśim||55||
prasīda puṇyaṃ jayameti viṣṇo śrīvāsudevarddhimupaitu puṇyam||
prayātu vāśeṣamatho vināśaṃ mā teṃ.aghripadmāditaratra me matiḥ||56||
viṣṇo puṇyodbhavo mestu vāsudevāstu me śubham ||
nārāyaṇostu dharmo jahi pāpamaśeṣataḥ ||57||
aneka janmajanitaṃ bālyayauvanavārddhake||
puṇyaṃ vivṛddhimāyātu yātu pāpaṃ ca saṃkṣayam ||58||
ākāśādiṣu śabdādau śrotrādau mahadādiṣu||
prakṛtau puruṣe caiva brahmaṇyapi ca sa prabhuḥ||59||
yathaika eva dharmātmā vāsudevo vyavasthitaḥ||
tena satyena pāpaṃ me narakārtipradaṃ kṣayam ||4.82.60||
prayātu sukṛtasyāstu mamānudivasañjayaḥ||
pāpasya hāniḥ puṇyasya vṛddhirmestūttamottamā||61||
evamuccārya viprāya dadyādyatkathitaṃ tava||
bhuñjīta kṛtakṛtyastu pāraṇepāraṇe gate||62||
pāraṇāṃte tu deveśa prīṇanaṃ śaktito nṛpa ||
kurvītākhilapākhaṇḍairālāpaṃ ca vivarjayet || 63 ||
evaṃ saṃvatsarasyāṃte kāṃcanīṃ pratimāṃ hareḥ||
pūjayitvā vastrapuṣpairghṛtapātreṇa saṃyutaiḥ || 64 ||
gāṃ savatsāṃ ca viprāya dadyācchraddhāsamanvitaḥ ||
vilaṃbitaṃ ca yatpūrvaṃ devānanyānbhajedyadi || 65 ||
tasminnahani dātavyaṃ bhojane cānivāritam ||
ityeṣā kathitā puṇyā sukṛtasya jayāvahā ||
dvādaśī narakaṃ pārtha yāmupoṣya na paśyati ||66||
nāgnayo na ca śastrāṇi na ca lohamukhāḥ khagāḥ ||
nārakāstaṃ prabādhante matiryasya janārdane || 67 ||
nāmoccāraṇamātreṇa viṣṇoḥ kṣīṇāghasaṃcayaḥ ||
bhavatyagha vināśaśca narake patanaṃ kutaḥ || 68 ||
namo nārāyaṇa hare vāsudeveti kīrtayan ||
na yāti narakaṃ martyaḥ saṃkṣīṇāśeṣapātakaḥ || 69 ||
tasmātpākhaṃḍisaṃsargamakurvandvādaśīmimām ||
upoṣya puṇyopacaye na yāti narakaṃ naraḥ || 4.82.70 ||
pāpaṃ kṣiṇoti sukṛtasya karoti vṛddhiṃ vṛddhiṃ prayacchati niyacchati sarvadoṣān || yaddvādaśīha sukṛtātihitā ca loke kasmānna tāmupavasaṃti vimūḍhacittāḥ ||71 || || iti śrībhaviṣye mahāpurāṇa uttara parvaṇi śrīkṛṣṇayudhiṣṭhirasaṃvāde sukṛtadvādaśīvratavarṇanaṃ nāma dvyaśītitamo.adhyāyaḥ || 82 || cha ||
dharaṇīvratavarṇanam
|| yudhiṣṭhira uvāca || ||
yadetatparamaṃ guhyaṃ sarvavedeṣu paṭhyate ||
sa devaḥ puṇḍarīkākṣaḥ svayaṃ nārāyaṇo hariḥ || 1 ||
sa yajñairvividhairiṣṭairvrataiśca yadusattama ||
prāpyate paramo devaḥ sanātanaḥ kathañcana||| 2||
bahuvittena bhagavannṛtvigbhirvedapāragaiḥ ||
prāpyante susahāyaiśca kvacittyaktāḥ suduṣkarāḥ || 3 ||
vittena ca vinā dānaṃ dātuṃ kṛṣṇa na śakyate ||
vidyamāne.api na matiḥ kuṭuṃbāsaktacetasaḥ || 4 ||
tasya mokṣaḥ kathaṃ kṛṣṇa sarvathā durllabho hariḥ ||
alpāyāsena labhate yena devaḥ sanātanaḥ ||
tanme sāmānyato brūhi sarvavarṇeṣu yadbhavet ||5||
|| śrīkṛṣṇa uvāca || ||
kathayāmi paraṃ guhyaṃ rahasyaṃ devanirmitam ||
dharaṇyā yatkṛtaṃ pūrvaṃ majjantyā vasudhātale || 6 ||
pṛthivyāḥ pārthiva purā saṃjātaḥ saṃgamo.ambubhiḥ ||
tasminsalilasaṃlagne mahī prāyādrasātalam|| 7 ||
sā bhūtadhātrī dharaṇī rasātalagatā śubhā ||
ārādhayāmāsa vibhuṃ devaṃ nārāyaṇaṃ param || 8 ||
upavāsavratairdevī niyamaiśca pṛthagvidhaiḥ ||
kālena mahatā tasyāḥ prasanno garuḍadhvajaḥ ||
ujjahāra sthitau cemāṃ sthāpayāmāsa cācyutaḥ || 9 ||
prāpte mārgaśire māse daśamyāṃ niyatātmavān ||
snātvā devārcanaṃ kṛtvā agnikāryaṃ yathāvidhi || 4.83.10 ||
śucivāsāḥ prasannātmā hyatyalpānna susaṃskṛtam ||
bhuktvā pañcapadaṃ kṛtvā punaḥ śaucaṃ ca pādayoḥ || 11 ||
kṛtvāṣṭāṃgulamātraṃ tu kṣīravṛkṣasamudbhavam ||
bhakṣayeddantakāṣṭhaṃ tu tataścācamya yatnataḥ || 12 ||
spṛṣṭvā nyasyānyakarmāṇi ciraṃ dhyātvā janārdanam |||
śaṃkhacakragadāpāṇiṃ pītāmbarasamāvṛtam || 13 ||
evamuccārayedvācaṃ tasminkāle mahādyute ||
ekādaśyāṃ nirāhāraḥ sthitvāhamaparehani ||
saṃbhokṣye puṇḍarīkākṣa śaraṇaṃ me bhavācyuta || 14 ||
evamuktvā tato deva devadevasya sannidhau ||
japennārāyaṇāyeti rūpe tatra vidhānataḥ || 15 ||
tataḥ prabhāte vimale nadīṃ gatvā samudragām ||
itarāṃ vā taḍāgaṃ vā gṛhe vā niyatātmavān || 16 ||
ānīya mṛttikāṃ śuddhāṃ maṃtreṇānena mānavaḥ ||
dhāraṇaṃ poṣaṇaṃ tvatto bhūtānāṃ devi sarvadā ||
tena sattvena māṃ pāhi pāpānmocaya suvrate || 17 || || iti mṛttikāmantraḥ || || brahmāṇḍodaratīrthāni karaiḥ spṛṣṭāni te raveḥ ||
bhavaṃti bhūtāni satāṃ mṛttikāmālabhetpunaḥ || 18 || ityadityādarśanamantraḥ ||
evaṃ mṛdaṃ raveragre kṛtvāthātmānamā labhet ||
triḥkṛtvāśeṣamṛdayā kuṇḍamālikhya vai jale || 19 ||
tataḥ snātvā naraḥ samyakcakravartyupacārakaḥ ||
ācamyāvaśyakaṃ kṛtvā punardeva gṛhaṃ vrajet || 4.83.20 ||
tamārādhya mahāyogaṃ devaṃ nārāyaṇaṃ prabhum ||
keśavāya namaḥ pādau kaṭiṃ dāmodarāya ca || 21 ||
ūruyugmaṃ nṛsiṃhāya uraḥ śrīvatsadhāriṇe ||
kaṇṭhaṃ kaustubhanāthāya vakṣaḥ śrīpataye tathā || 22 ||
trailokyavijayāyeti bāhu sarvātmane śiraḥ ||
rathāṃgadhāriṇe cakraṃ śaṃkarāyeti cāṃbujam || 23 ||
gambhīrāyeti ca gadāmabhayaṃ śāṃtamūrtaye ||
evamabhyarcya deveśaṃ devaṃ nārāyaṇaṃ prabhum || 24 ||
punastasyāgrataḥ kumbhāṃścaturaḥ sthāpayedbudhaḥ ||
jalapūrṇānsamālyāṃśca sitacandanacarcitān || 25 ||
caturbhistilapātraiśca sthagitānratnasaṃyutān ||
catvāraste samudrāstu kalaśāḥ parikīrtitāḥ || 26 ||
teṣāṃ madhye tu saṃpīṭhaṃ sthāpayedvastrasaṃvṛtam ||
tasminsauvarṇaṃ raupyaṃ vā tāmraṃ vā dāravaṃ tathā ||
pātraṃ toyabhṛtaṃ kṛtvā tasya madhye tato nyaset || 27 ||
sauvarṇaṃ mātsyarūpeṇa kṛtvā devaṃ janārdanam ||
vedavedāṃgasaṃyuktaṃ śrutismṛti vibhūṣitam || 28 ||
bhakṣyairbahuvidhai rājanphalaiḥ puṣpaiśca śobhitam ||
gandhairdhūpairmaṃtravarairarcayitvā yathāvidhi || 29 ||
rasātalagatā vedā yathā deva tvayāhṛtāḥ ||
matsyarūpeṇa tadvanmāṃ bhavāduddhara keśava || 4.83.30 ||
evamuccārya tasyāgre jāgaraṃ tatra kārayet ||
yathāvibhavasāreṇa prabhā te.api punaḥpunaḥ ||
caturṇāṃ brāhmaṇānāṃ tu caturo dāpayeddhaṭān || 31 ||
pūrvaṃ tu bahvṛce dayācchaṃdoge dakṣiṇaṃ tathā ||
yajuḥśākhānvite dadyātpaścimaṃ ghaṭamuttamam || 32 ||
uttaraṃ kāmato dadyāddeśa eva vidhikramāt ||
ṛgvedaḥ prīyatāṃ pūrvaṃ sāmavedaśca dakṣiṇaḥ || 33 ||
yajuṣaḥ paścimo nāmnā ātharvāyottaraṃ tathā ||
pūrṇapātraistu satilaiḥ sthagitānkārayeddhaṭān || 34 ||
tatastaṃ jalapātrasthaṃ brāhmaṇāya kuṭuṃbine ||
dadyādevaṃ mahābhāga tataḥ paścāttu bhojayet || 35 ||
brāhmaṇānpāyasānnena tataḥ paścātsvayaṃ gṛhī ||
bhuñjīta bhṛtyasahito vāgyataḥ saṃyatendriyaḥ || 36 ||
anena vidhinā yastu dvādaśīṃ kṣapayennaraḥ ||
tasya puṇyaphalaṃ rājañchṛṇu satyavatāṃ vara || 37 ||
yadi vaktrasahasrāṇi bhavaṃti hi yugeyuge ||
āyuśca brahmaṇastulyaṃ bhavedyadi mahāmate ||
tadasya phalasaṃkhyānaṃ kartuṃ śakyaṃ na dhārayet || 38 ||
yaḥ kṛṣṇadvādaśīmetāmanena vidhinā nṛpa ||
karoti brahmalokaṃ sa samāpnoti na saṃśayaḥ || 39 ||
brahmahatyādipāpāni janmāṃtarakṛtānyapi ||
akāmataḥ kāmato vā praṇaśyaṃti na saṃśayaḥ || 4.83.40 ||
tathaiva pauṣamāsena amṛtaṃ mathitaṃ suraiḥ ||
tacca kūrmobhavaddevaḥ svayameva janārdanaḥ || 41 ||
tasyeyaṃ tithiruddiṣṭā harervai kūrmarūpiṇaḥ ||
pauṣamāsaṃ samāsādya dvādaśīṃ śuklasaṃyutām || 42 ||
tasyāṃ prāgvatsaṃkalpaḥ prātaḥsnānādikāḥ kriyāḥ ||
nirvartyārādhayedrātryāmekādaśyāṃ janārdanam ||
prīyamaṃtrairnṛpaśreṣṭha devadevaṃ jagadgurum || 43 ||
kūrmāya pādau prathamaṃ supūjya nārāṇāyeti kaṭiṃ harestu ||
saṅkarṣaṇāyetyudaraṃ viśodhetpurobhavāyeti ca kaṃṭhapīṭham || 44 ||
subāhavetyeva bhujau śiraśca sarvātmane pāṃḍava pūjanīyau ||
svanāmamaṃtreṇa ca śaṃkhacakre gadāṃ namaskārapareṇa caiva || 45 ||
ebhirmantraiḥ puṣpasugandhadhūpairnaive dyadīpairvividhaiḥ phalaiśca ||
abhyarcya devaṃ kalaśaṃ tadagre saṃsthāpayenmālyavilepanādyam || 46 ||
taṃ ratnagarbhaṃ susugaṃdhatoyaṃ kṛtvā tato hemamayaṃ svaśa ktyā ||
samaṃdaraṃ kūrmatanuṃ sureśaṃ saṃsthāpayeccātra śubhe ca pātre ||47||
ghṛtaiśca pūrṇe kalaśā.agrasaṃsthaṃ saṃpūjayejjāgaranṛtyagītaiḥ||
saṃpūjya viprānghṛtapāyasena nivedya pūrvaṃ dvijapuṅgavāya ||
nirvartya sarvaṃ vidhivattataśca bhuñjīta saṃtuṣṭamanāḥ sabhṛtyaḥ || 48 ||
evaṃ kṛte kalpayugāṃtarāṇi svarge vasetsarvasamṛddhakāmaḥ ||49||
saṃsāracakraṃ sa vihāya śīghramāpnoti loke tu hareḥ purāṇe ||
prayāṃti pāpāni vināśamāśu śriyā yuto jāyati satyadharma ||4.83.50|| anekajanmārjitasaṃyutāni naśyaṃti pāpāni narasya bhaktyā ||
prāguktarūpaṃ ca phalaṃ labheta nārāyaṇaṃ vastumupaiti sadyaḥ || 51 ||
evaṃ māghe site pakṣe dvādaśīṃ dharaṇīdhara ||
varāhasya śṛṇuṣvānyāṃ rājanparamadhārmika || 52 ||
prāguktena vidhānena snānaṃ saṃkalpameva ca ||
kṛtvā devaṃ samabhyarcya ekādaśyāṃ samāhitaḥ || 53 ||
dhūpanaivedyagaṃdhaistu arcayitvā punarnaraḥ ||
paścāttasyāgrataḥ kuṃbhaṃ jalapūrṇaṃ tu vinyaset || 54 ||
varāhāyeti pādau tu mādhavāyeti vai kaṭim ||
kṣetrajñāyeti jaṭharaṃ viśvarūpetyuro hareḥ ||55||
pūrvatrāyeti kaṃṭhaṃ tu prajānāṃ pataye śiraḥ ||
pradyumnāyeti ca bhujau divyāstrā ya sudarśanam ||56||
amṛtodbhavāya śaṃkhaṃ tu gadine ca gadāṃ tathā ||
evamabhyarcya medhāvī tasminkuṃbhe.api vinyaset ||57||
sauvarṇaṃ rūpyaṃ tāmraṃ vā pātraṃ vibhavaśaktitaḥ ||
sarvabījaistu saṃpūrṇaṃ sthāpayitvā vicakṣaṇaḥ || 58 ||
tatra śaktyā ca sauvarṇaṃ vārāhaṃ kārayettataḥ ||
daṃṣṭrāgreṇoddharanpṛthvīṃ saparvatavanadrumām || 59 ||
mādhavaṃ madhuhaṃtāraṃ vārāhaṃ rūpamāsthitam ||
sarvabījabhṛtaiḥ pātrai ratnagarbhaghaṭopari || 4.83.60 ||
sthāpayetparamaṃ devaṃ jātarūpamayaṃ harim ||
sitavastrayugacchannaṃ tāmrābhāve tu vaiṇave || 61 || sthāpyārcayedgandhapuṣpairnaivedyairvividhaiḥ phalaiḥ ||
puṣpamaṃḍapikāṃ kṛtvā jāgaraṃ tatra kārayet || 62 ||
prādurbhāvaṃ harerdivyaṃ vācayedgāpayedbudhaḥ ||
evaṃ saniyamasyāsya prabhāte udite ravau || 63 ||
vedavedāṅgaviduṣe sādhuvṛttāya dhīmate ||
viṣṇubhaktāya rājendra viśeṣeṇa pradāpayet || 64 ||
evaṃ sakuṃbhaṃ dattvā ca hariṃ vārāharūpiṇam ||
brāhmaṇāya bhavedyadvatphalaṃ tanme niśāmaya || 65 ||
iha janmani saubhāgyaṃ śrīkāntī puṣṭimeva ca ||
prāpnoti puruṣo rājanyadyadicchati kiṃcana || 66 ||
ekā.api vidhinopāstā dadātyamṛtamuttamam ||
kiṃpunarvarṣamekaṃ ca karoti kurunaṃdana || 67 ||
eṣā ca phālgune māsi śuklapakṣe tu dvādaśī ||
upoṣyā pūrvavidhinā harimārādhayetsudhīḥ || 68 ||
narasiṃhāya pādau tu goviṃdāyodaraṃ tathā ||
kaṭiṃ viśvasṛje pūjya aniruddhetyuro hareḥ || 69 ||
kaṃṭhaṃ tu śitikaṃṭhāya vainateyāya vai śiraḥ .||
asuradhvaṃsanāyeti vaktraṃ toyātmane namaḥ || 4.83.70 ||
śaṃkhamityeva saṃpūjya gaṃdhapuṣpaiḥ phalaistathā ||
tadagre tu ghaṭaṃ sthāpya sitavastrayugānvitam || 71 ||
tasyopari nṛsiṃhaṃ tu sauvarṇaṃ tāmrabhājane ||
haime ca śaktitaḥ kṛtvā dāruvaṃśamaye.api vā || 72 ||
ratnagarbhamaye sthāpya bhaktyā saṃpūjya mānavaḥ ||
dvādaśyāṃ vedaviduṣe brāhmaṇāya nivedayet || 73 ||
eṣā vaṃdyā pāpaharā dvādaśī bhavate mayā ||
kathitā ca prayatnena śrutā ca bhavatepsitā || 74 ||
evamenāṃ naravyāghra caitre saṃkalpya dvādaśīm ||
upoṣyārādhayetpaścāddevadevaṃ janārdanam || 75 ||
kuṇḍikāṃ sthāpayetpārśve chatrikāṃ pāduke tathā ||
amalaṃ vāmanaṃ sthāpya bṛsīṃ kāṃsaparicchadām || 76 ||
phalaiḥ puṣpaiḥ sugandhaiśca prabhāte saddvijātaye ||
dāpayetprīyatāṃ viṣṇurhrasvarūpītyudīrayet || || 77 ||
māsanāmnātra saṃyuktaṃ prādurbhāvaṃ vidhānataḥ ||
prīyatāmiti sarvatra vidhireva prakīrtitaḥ || 78 ||
aputro labhate putramadhano dhanamāpnuyāt ||
bhraṣṭarājyo labhedrājyaṃ mṛto viṣṇupuraṃ vrajet || 79 ||
krīḍitvā suciraṃ kālamiha martyamupāgataḥ ||
cakravartī bhaveddhīmānyayātiriti nāhuṣaḥ||4.83.80||
vaiśākhe.apyevamevaṃ tu saṃkalpya vidhivannaraḥ ||
tadvatsnānaṃ mṛdā tadvattato devālayaṃ vrajet || 81 ||
tatrārādhya hariṃ bhaktyā ebhirmantrairvicakṣaṇaḥ ||
jāmadagnyāya pādau tu udaraṃ sarvadhāriṇe || 82 ||
madhusūdanāyeti kaṭimuraḥ śrīvatsadhāriṇe ||
kṣatrāṃtakāya ca bhujau maṇikaṇṭhāya kaṇṭhakam || 83 ||
pūjayenniyato bhūtvā surūpāyeti vai mukham ||
svanāmnā śaṃkhacakre ca śiro brahmāṃḍadhāriṇe || 84 ||
evamabhyarcya medhāvī prāgvaṃśasyāgrato ghaṭam ||
vinyasyetpuṣpavastrāḍhyaṃ sitacandanacarcitam || 85 ||
vaiṇave.abhinave pātre sthāpayenmadhusūdanam ||
jāmadagnyena rūpeṇa kṛtvā sauvarṇamagrataḥ || 86 ||
dakṣiṇe paraśuṃ haste tasya devasya kārayet ||
sarvagandhaistu saṃpūjya puṣpairnānāvidhaiḥ śubhaiḥ ||87||
tatastasyāgrataḥ kuryājjāgaraṃ bhaktimānnaraḥ ||
prabhāte vimale sūrye brāhmaṇāya nivedayet || 88 ||
evaṃ niyamayuktasya yatphalaṃ tannibodha me ||
kāśyape brahmaṇo loke coṣitvāpsarasāṃ gaṇaiḥ ||
sthitvā bhaute ca sṛṣṭau ca cakravartī bhaveddhruvam || 89 ||
jyeṣṭhe māse.apyevameva saṃkalpya vidhivannaraḥ ||
arcayetparamaṃ devaṃ puṣpairnānāvidhaiḥ śubhaiḥ ||4.83.90||
namo dāmodarāyeti pādau pūrvaṃ samarcayet ||
trivikramāyeti kaṭiṃ dhṛtaviśvāya codaram ||91||
uraḥ saṃvartakāyeti kaṇṭhaṃ saṃvatsarāya ca ||
sarvāsudhāriṇe bāhuṃ svanāmnābjarathāṃgake || 92 ||
sahasraśirase.abhyarcya śirastasya mahātmanaḥ ||
evamabhyarcya vidhivatprāguktavidhivannyaset || 93 ||
prāgvadvastrasugandhaiśca sauvarṇau rāmalakṣmaṇau ||
arcayitvā vidhānena prabhāte brāhmaṇāya tau ||
dātavyau manasā kāmamīhatā puruṣeṇa tu || 94 ||
aputreṇa purā pṛṣṭo rājñā daśarathena tu ||
putrakāmena yajatā vaśiṣṭhaḥ paramārcitaḥ || 95 ||
idameva vidhānaṃ tu kathayāmāsa vai dvijaḥ ||
sarahasyaṃ viditvātra sa rājā kṛtavāni dam || 96 ||
tasya putraḥ svayaṃ jajñe rāmo nāma mahābalaḥ ||
caturddhā so.avyayo viṣṇuḥ paritoṣādajāyata ||
etadevaṃ mayākhyātaṃ paraloke sukhapra dam || 97 ||
|| śrīkṛṣṇa uvāca || ||
āṣāḍhe.apyevameva tu saṃkalpya vidhinā naraḥ ||
arcayetparamaṃ devaṃ gaṃdhapuṣpaiḥ samāhitaḥ || 98 ||
vāsudevāya pādau tu kaṭiṃ saṃkarṣaṇāya ca ||
pradyumnāyeti jaṭharamaniruddhāya vai namaḥ || 99 ||
cakrapāṇiṃ bhujau kaṃṭhaṃ mukhaṃ bhūpataye tathā ||
svanāmnā śaṃkhacakre tu puruṣāyeti vai śiraḥ || 4.83.100 ||
evamabhyarcya medhāvī prāgvattasyāgrato ghaṭam ||
vinyasya vastrasaṃyuktaṃ tasyopari tato nyaset ||
kāṃcanaṃ vāsudeveti cakrabāhuṃ sanātanam || 101 ||
tamabhyarcya vidhānena gaṃdhapuṣpādibhiḥ kramāt ||
prāgvattadbrāhmaṇe dadyādvedavādini suvrate || 102 ||
eṣā hyupoṣitā rājanvidyāṃ vipre prayacchati ||
rājyaṃ ca bhraṣṭarājyānāmaputrāṇāṃ sutānbahūn ||1 03||
mṛto viṣṇupure ramye krīḍate kālamakṣayam||1 04||
manvaṃtarāṇi ṣaṭtriṃśattataḥ kālātyaye punaḥ ||
iha loke bhavedrājā saptajanmani mānavaḥ ||
dātā yaśaḥkṣamāyuktastato nirvāṇamāpnuyāt || 105 || ||
|| śrīkṛṣṇa uvāca || ||
evamevaṃ śrāvaṇe tu māsi saṃkalpya dvādaśīm ||
arcayetparamaṃ devaṃ gaṃdhapuṣpanivedanaiḥ || 106 ||
budhāya pādau saṃpūjya śrīdharāyeti vai kaṭim ||
padmodbhavāya jaṭharamuraḥ saṃvatsarāya ca || 107 ||
sugrīvāyeti vai kaṇṭhaṃ bhujau vai citrabāhave ||
prāgvadastrāṇi saṃpūjya brāhma ṇāya nivedayet || 108 ||
anena vidhinā sarvāṃ dvādaśīṃ samupoṣitaḥ ||
śudaudanena tasyābhūtsvayaṃ putro janārdanaḥ || 109 ||
mahatīṃ ca śriyaṃ prāpya putrapautrasamanvitaḥ ||
bhuktvā rājyaśriyaṃ sotha gataḥ paramikāṃ gatim || 4.83.110 ||
eṣa te vidhiruddiṣṭaḥ śrāvaṇe māsi sattama||
ekaikopoṣitāpyastu rājyamekaiva yacchati ||
kiṃ punardvādaśaivātra dadyuraindraṃ mahatpadam || 111 ||
tadvadbhādrapade māsi śuklapakṣe tu dvādaśīm ||
saṃkalpya vidhinā devamarcayetparameśvaram || 112 ||
namo.astu kalkine pādau hṛṣīkeśāya vai kaṭim ||
mlecchapradhvaṃsanāyeti jaganmūrte tathodaram || 113 ||
śitikaṇṭhāya kaṇṭhaṃ tu khaḍgapāṇīti vai bhujau ||
śaṃkhacakre svanāmnātra viśvamūrte tathāsitaḥ || 114 ||
evamabhyarcya medhāvī prāgvattasyāgrato ghaṭam ||
vinyasya kalkinaṃ devaṃ sauvarṇaṃ tatra kārayet || 115 ||
sitavastrayugacchannaṃ gaṃdhapuṣpopaśobhitam ||
kṛtvā prabhāte viprāya pradeyaḥ śāstravittame || || 116 ||
evaṃ kṛte bhavedyattu tannibodha nṛpottama ||
daśāvatāradānena pūjane caiva tatphalam || 117 ||
pūjyate matsyarūpeṇa sarvajñatvamabhīpsubhiḥ ||
svavaṃśabharaṇāyātha kūrmarūpī tu pūjyate || 118 ||
bhavodadhinimagnaistu vārāhaḥ pūjyate hariḥ ||
nṛsiṃhanavarūpeṇa tadvatpāpabhayānnaraḥ || 119 ||
vāmanaṃ mohanāśāya vittārthe jamadagnijam ||
krūraśatruvināśāya yajeddāśarathiṃ budhaḥ || 4.83.120 ||
balakṛṣṇau yajeddhīmānputrakāmo na saṃśayaḥ ||
rūpakāmo yajedbuddhaṃ kalkinaṃ śatrughātane ||
sarvāṃ dattvā vidhānena pūjāṃ prāpnoti vāṃchitam || 121 ||
|| śrīkṛṣṇa uvāca || ||
tadvadāśvayuje māsi śuklapakṣe tu dvādaśīm ||
saṃkalpyābhyarcayeddevaṃ padmanābhaṃ sanātanam || 122 ||
padmanābhāya pādau tu kaṭiṃ vai padmayonaye ||
udaraṃ sarvadevāya puṣkarākṣāya vā uraḥ ||
avyayāya tathā śīrṣaṃ prāgvadastrāṇi pūjayet || 123 ||
tatastasyāgrataḥ kuṃbhaṃ mālyavastrasamanvitam ||
yathāśaktyā kāñcanena padmanābheti bhūṣitam || 124 ||
rātrau tu jāgaraṃ kṛtvā prabhāte vimale tataḥ ||
brāhmaṇe tatpradātavyaṃ saṃsārabhayabhīruṇā || 125 ||
evaṃ kṛte tu yatpuṇyaṃ tadvaktuṃ śakyate katham ||
brahmahatyādipāpāni kiṃ tu paṃcaiva bhārata ||
naśyaṃti kṛtapuṇyasya viṣṇornāmānukīrtanāt || 126 || ||
|| śrīkṛṣṇa uvāca || ||
śṛṇu rājanmahābāho kārtike māsi dvādaśīm ||
upoṣya vidhinā yena yathāsyāḥ prāpyate phalam|| 127 ||
prāgvidhānena saṃkalpya vāsudevaṃ prapūjayet ||
anulomena deveśaṃ pūjayitvā vicakṣaṇaḥ ||
namo dāmodarāyeti sarvāṅgaṃ pūjayeddharim || 128 ||
evaṃ saṃpūjya vidhinā tasyāśca caturo ghaṭān ||
sthāpayedratnagarbhāśca sitacandanacarcitān || 129 ||
sragdāmālaṃbitagrīvānsitavastraiśca guṇṭhitān ||
sthagitāṃstāmrapātre tu tilapūrṇaiḥ sakāṃcanaiḥ || 4.83.130 ||
catvāraḥ sāgarāste ca kathitā rājasattama ||
tanmadhye prāgvidhānena sauvarṇaṃ sthāpayeddharim||131||
yogeśvaramaṃganidhiṃ viraktaṃ pītavāsasam ||
tadvaddeyaṃ ca saṃpūjya jāgaraṃ tatra kārayet || 132 ||
kṛtvā tu vaiṣṇavaṃ yogaṃ yajedyogeśvaraṃ harim ||
ṣoḍaśe vai rathāṃgeṣu rajobhirbahubhiḥ kṛte || 133 ||
evaṃ kṛtvā prabhāte tu brāhmaṇānpañca bhojayet ||
catvāraḥ kalaśā deyāścaturṇāṃ pañcamasya hi || 134 ||
yogeśvaraṃ ca sauvarṇaṃ dāpayetprayataḥ śuciḥ ||
brāhmaṇāya samaṃ dattaṃ dviguṇaṃ vedavādine ||135||
vedavedāṃgaviduṣe sahasraguṇitaṃ bhavet ||
paṃcamasya rahasyaṃ tu sasamaṃ copapādayet ||136||
vidhānaṃ tasya paṃcaiva dattvā koṭiguṇottaram ||
itihāsapurāṇajñe dattaṃ caivākṣayaṃ bhavet || 137 ||
pañcadattvā vidhānena dvādaśyāṃ viṣṇumarcya ca ||
viprāṇāṃ bhojanaṃ dayādyathāśaktyā sadakṣiṇam ||
dīnānāthādikānsarvānpūjayecchaktito nṛpa ||138||
dharaṇīvratametattu purā kṛtvā prajāpatiḥ ||
prajāṃ lebhe tato muktirbrahmaṇā viṣṇave śubhe || 139 ||
yuvanāśvo hi rājarṣiranena vidhinā purā ||
māndhātāraṃ sutaṃ lebhe paraṃ brahma ca śāśvatam || 4.83.140 ||
tathā haihayadāyādaḥ kṛtavīryo narādhipaḥ ||
cakravartisutaṃ lebhe sahasrārjunamūrjitam ||141||
śakuṃtalāpyevameva vrataṃ cīrtvā narottamam ||
lebhe śākuntalaṃ putraṃ duṣyaṃtaścakravartinam || 142 ||
tathā purāṇarājāno vedoktāścakravartinaḥ ||
anena vidhinā prāptāścakravartitvamuttamam || 143 ||
dharaṇyā api pātāle magnayācaritaṃ purā ||
vratametattato nāmrā dharaṇīvratamucyate || 144 ||
samāpte.asmiṃstadā devī hariṇā kroḍarūpiṇā ||
uddhṛtā daśanāgreṇa sthāpitā naurivāṃbhasi || 145 ||
dharaṇīvratametatte kathitaṃ pāṃḍunandana ||
ya idaṃ śṛṇuyādbhaktyā yaśca kuryānnarottama ||
sarvapāpavinirmukto viṣṇusāyujyamāvrajet || 146 ||
cīrṇaṃ rasātalatale gatayā dharaṇyā tena prasiddhimagamaddharaṇīvrateti ||
sadyaḥ samācarati dharmaratirddharitryāmuddhṛtya sapta puruṣānsa paraṃ prayāti || 147 ||
iti śrībhaviṣye mahāpurāṇa uttaraparvaṇi śrīkṛṣṇayudhiṣṭhirasaṃvāde dharaṇīvrataṃ nāma tryaśītitamo.adhyāyaḥ || 83 || || cha ||
viśokadvādaśīvratavarṇanam
|| yudhiṣṭhira uvāca || ||
kimabhīṣṭaviyogaśokasaṃghāllaghu iha samupoṣatāṃ vrataṃ vā||
vibhavodbhavakāri bhūtale.asminbhavati vibho bhayasūdanaṃ ca puṃsām || 1 ||
|| śrīkṛṣṇa uvāca || ||
paripṛṣṭamidaṃ jagatpriyaṃ te vibudhānāmapi durllabhaṃ mahattvāt ||
tava bhaktimatastathāpi vakṣye vratamindrāsuradānaveṣu guhyam ||2||
puṇyamāśvayuje māsi viśokadvādaśīvratam ||
daśamyāṃ laghubhugvidvānārabhenniyamena tu || 3 ||
udaṅmukhaḥ prāṅmukho vā daṃtadhāvanapūrvakam ||
ekādaśyāṃ nirāhāraḥ samyagabhyarcya keśavam || 4 ||
vidhivattvāṃ samabhyarcya bhokṣyāmi apare.ahani ||
evaṃ niyamakṛtsuptvā prātarutthāya mānavaḥ || 5 ||
snānaṃ sarvauṣadhaiḥ kuryātpañcagavyajalena tu ||
śuklamālyāṃbarastadvatpūjayecchrīśamutpalaiḥ || 6 ||
viśokāya namaḥ pādau jaṃghe ca varadāya vai ||
śrīśāya jānunī tadvadūrū ca jalaśāyine || 7 ||
kaṃdarpāya namo guhye mādhavāya namaḥ kaṭim ||
dāmodarāyetyudaraṃ pārśve ca vipulāya vai || 8 ||
nābhiṃ ca padmanābhāya hṛdayaṃ manmathāya vai ||
śrīdharāya vibhorvakṣaḥ karau madhubhide namaḥ || 9 ||
cakriṇe nāma bāhuṃ ca dakṣiṇaṃ gadine namaḥ ||
vaikuṇṭhāya namaḥ kaṇṭhamāsyaṃ yajñamukhāya vai || 4.84.10 ||
nāsāmaśokanidhaye vāsudevāya cākṣiṇī ||
lalāṭaṃ vāmanāyeti kirīṭaṃ viśvarūpiṇe || 11 ||
namaḥ sarvātmane tadvacchira ityabhipūjayet ||
evaṃ saṃpūjya goviṃdaṃ phalamālyānulepanaiḥ || 12 ||
tatastasyāgrato bhavyaṃ sthaṃḍilaṃ kārayenmṛdā ||
caturasraṃ samaṃtāccāratnimātramudagbhavam || 13 ||
nadīvālukayā pūrṇaṃ lakṣmyākṛtiṃ kṛtī nyaset ||
sthaṃḍile sūryamāropya lakṣmīmityarcayedbudhaḥ || 14 ||
namo devyai namaḥ śāṃtyai namo lakṣmyai namaḥ śriye ||
namaḥ puṣṭyai namastuṣṭyai namo dṛṣṭyai namonamaḥ || 15 ||
viśokā duḥkhanāśāya viśokā varadāstu me ||
viśokā vāstu saṃtatyai viśokā sarvasiddhaye ||16||
tataḥ śuklāṃbaradharo śūrpaṃ saṃveṣṭya pūjayet ||
bhakṣyairnānāvidhaistadvatsuvarṇakamalena ca || 17 ||
rajanīṣu ca sarvāsu pibeddarbhodakaṃ vratī ||
tatastu nṛtyagītādi kārayetsarvarātrakam || 18 ||
yāmatraye vyatīte tu suptvā svasthopamānasaḥ ||
abhigamya ca viprāṇāṃ mithunāni sadārcayet || 19 ||
śaktitastrīṇi caikaṃ vā vastramālyānulepanaiḥ ||
śayanāsthāni pūjyāni namo.astu jalaśāyine || 4.84.20 ||
tatastu gītavādyādyai rātrau jāgaraṇe kṛte ||
prabhāte vimale snānaṃ kṛtvā dāṃpatyamarcayet || 21 ||
bhojanaṃ ca yathāśaktyā vittaśāṭhyavivarjitaḥ ||
bhuktvā śrutvā purāṇāni taddinaṃ tvativāhayet || 22 ||
anena vidhinā sarvaṃ māsimāsi samācaret ||
vratāṃte śayanaṃ dadyādguḍadhenusamanvitam ||
sopadhānakaviśrāmamāstarāvaraṇaṃ śubham || 23 ||
yathā na lakṣmīrdeveśa tvāṃ parityajya gacchati ||
tathā kuru yathāyogyamaśokaṃ cāstu me sadā ||24||
yathā devena rahitā na lakṣyīrjāyate kvacit||
tathā viśokatā me.astu bhakti ramyā ca keśave || || 25 ||
maṃtreṇānena dhyātvā tu guḍadhenusamanvitam ||
śūrpaṃ ca lakṣmyā sahitaṃ dātavyaṃ bhūtimicchatā || 26 ||
utpātaṃ karavīraṃ ca bāṇamamlāna kuṃḍalam ||
kesaraṃ siṃduvāraṃ ca mallikāgaṃdhapāṭalam ||
kādaṃbaiḥ kuṃkumairjātyā tathānyairapi pūjayet || 27 ||
|| yudhiṣṭhira uvāca || ||
guḍadhenuvidhānaṃ me tvamācakṣva jagatpate ||
kiṃrūpā kena maṃtreṇa dātavyā tadihocyatām ||28||
|| śrīkṛṣṇa uvāca || ||
guḍadhenuvidhānaṃ ca yadrūmiha yatphalam ||
tadidānīṃ pravakṣyāmi sarvapāpapraṇāśanam || 29 ||
kṛṣṇājinaṃ caturhastaṃ prāgevaṃ vinyasedbhuvi ||
gomayenānuliptāyāṃ darbhānāstīrya sarvataḥ || || 4.84.30 ||
labdhena kāṃcanaṃ tadvadvatsaṃ ca parikalpayet ||
prāṅmukhīṃ kalpayeddhenumudakpādāṃ savatsikām || 31 ||
uttamā guḍadhenuḥ syātsadā bhāra catuṣṭayā ||
vatsaṃ bhāreṇa kurvīta dvābhyāṃ vai madhyamā smṛtā || 32.||
arddhabhāreṇa vatsaḥ syātkaniṣṭhā bhārakeṇa tu ||
caturthāṃśena vatsaḥ syādgṛhavittā nusārataḥ || 33 ||
dhenuvatsau kṛtāvetau sitasūkṣmāṃbarāvṛtau ||
śuktikarṇāvikṣupādau śuktimuktāphalekṣaṇau || 34 ||
sitasūtraśirālau tu sitakaṃbala kaṃbalau ||
tāmragallakapṛṣṭau tau sitacāmararomakau || 35 ||
vidrumabhrūyugāvetau navanītastanānvitau ||
kṣaumapucchau kāṃsyadohāvindranīlakatārakau || ||36||
suvarṇaśṛṃgābharaṇau rājatakhurasaṃyutau ||
nānāphalasamāyuktau ghrāṇagaṃdhakaraṃḍakau ||
ityevaṃ racayitvā tu dhūpadīpairathārcayet || 37 ||
yā lakṣmīḥ sarvabhūtānāṃ yā ca deve vyavasthitā ||
dhenurūpeṇa sā devī mama pāpaṃ vyapohatu || 38 ||
viṣṇorvakṣasi yā lakṣmīḥ svāhāyāṃ ca vibhāvasau ||
caṃdrārkaśakraśaktiryā dhenurūpāstu sā śriye || 39 ||
caturmukhasya yā lakṣmīryā lakṣmīrdhanadasya ca ||
yā lakṣmīrlokapālānāṃ sā dhenurvaradāstu me || || 4.84.40 ||
svadhā tvaṃ pitṛmukhyānāṃ svāhā yajñabhujāṃ punaḥ ||
sarvapāpahare dheno tasmādbhūtiṃ prayaccha me || 41 ||
evamāmaṃtrya tāṃ dhenuṃ brāhmaṇāya nive dayet ||
vidhānametaddhenūnāṃ sarvāsāmiha paṭhyate || 42 ||
yāstu pāpavināśinyaḥ śrūyate daśa dhenavaḥ ||
tāsāṃ svarūpaṃ vakṣyāmi nāmāni ca narā dhipa || 43 ||
prathamā guḍadhenuḥ syād ghṛtadhenurathāparā ||
tiladhenustṛtīyā syāccaturthī madhudhenukā || 44 ||
jaladhenuḥ paṃcamī tu ṣaṣṭhī tu kṣīrasaṃbhavā ||
saptamī śarkarādhenurdadhidhenurathāṣṭamī ||
rasadhenuśca navamī daśamī syātsvarūpataḥ || 45 ||
kuṃbhā syurdaśadhenūnāmitarāsāṃ tu rāśayaḥ ||
suvarṇadhenumapyatra kecidicchaṃti mānavāḥ || 46 ||
navanītena ratnaiśca tathāpyanye maharṣayaḥ ||
etadeva vidhānaṃ syātta evopaskarāḥ smṛtāḥ || 47 ||
maṃtrāvāhanasaṃyuktāṃ sadā parvaṇiparvaṇi ||
yathāśraddhaṃ pradātavyā bhuktimuktiphalapradā || 48 ||
guḍadhenuprasaṃgena sarvāstava mayoditāḥ ||
aśeṣayajña phaladāḥ sarvapāpaharāḥ śubhāḥ || 49 ||
vratānāmuttamaṃ yatsyādviśokadvādaśīvratam ||
tadaṃgatvena caivaiṣā guḍadhenuḥ praśasyate || 4.84.50 ||
ayane viṣuve puṇye vyatīpāte.atha vā punaḥ ||
guḍadhenvādayo deyā uparāgādiparvasu || 51 ||
viśokadvādaśī caiṣā sarvapāpaharā śubhā ||
yāmupoṣya naro yāti tadviṣṇoḥ paramaṃ padam || 52 ||
iha loke tu saubhāgyamāyurārogyameva ca ||
vaiṣṇavaṃ padamāpnoti maraṇe sadgatirbhavet || 53 ||
bhavārbudasahasrāṇi daśa cāṣṭau ca dharmavit ||
na śokaduḥkhadaurgatyaṃ tasya saṃjāyate nṛpa || 54 ||
nārī vā kurute yā tu viśokadvādaśīmi mām ||
nṛtyagītaparā nityaṃ sāpi tatphalamāpnuyāt || 55 ||
iti paṭhati ya itthaṃ yaḥ śṛṇotīha samyaṅ madhupuranarakārerarcanaṃ yaśca paśyet || matimapi ca janānāṃ yo dadātīndraloke vasati sa vibudhādyaiḥ pūjyamānaḥ sadaiva || 56 || ||
iti śrībhaviṣye mahāpurāṇa uttaraparvaṇi śrīkṛṣṇayudhiṣṭhirasaṃvāde viśokadvādaśīvrataṃ nāma caturaśītitamo.adhyāyaḥ || 84 || || a ||
vibhūtidvādaśīvratavarṇanam
|| śrīkṛṣṇa uvāca || ||
śṛṇu bhūpāla vakṣyāmi viṣṇuvratamanuttamam ||
vibhūtidvādaśīṃ nāma sarvāmaranamaskṛtam || 1 ||
kārttike vātha vaiśākhe mārgaśīrṣe ca phālgune ||
āṣāḍhe vā daśamyāṃ ca śuklāyāṃ laghubhuṅnaraḥ || 2 ||
kṛtvā sāyaṃtanīṃ saṃdhyāṃ gṛhṇīyānniyamaṃ budhaḥ ||
ekādaśyāṃ nirāhāraḥ samabhyarcya janārdanam || 3 ||
dvādaśyāṃ dvijasaṃyuktaḥ kariṣye bhojanaṃ vibho ||
tadavighnena me yātu sāphalyaṃ madhūsūdana || 4 ||
tataḥ prabhāta utthāya kṛtasnānajapaḥ śuciḥ ||
pūjayetpuṇḍarīkākṣaṃ śuklamālyānulepanaiḥ || 5 ||
bhūtidāya namaḥ pādau viśokāya ca jānunī ||
namaḥ śivāyetyūrū ca viśvamūrte namaḥ kaṭim || 6 ||
kaṃdarpāya namo meḍhramādityāya namaḥ karau ||
dāmodarāyetyudaraṃ vāsudevāya ca stanau || 7 ||
mādhavāyeti hṛdayaṃ kaṃṭhaṃ vaikuṃṭhine namaḥ ||
śrīdharāya mukhaṃ keśānkeśavāyeti pāṃḍava || 8 ||
pṛṣṭhaṃ śārṅgadharāyeti śravaṇau varadāya vai ||
svanāmnā śaṃkhacakrāsigadāparaśupāṇaye || 9 ||
sarvātmane śiro rājannama ityabhipūjayet ||
daśāvatārarūpāṇi pratimāsaṃ kramānnṛpa || 4.85.10 ||
dattātreyaṃ yathā vyāsamutpalena samanvitam ||
dadyādanena vidhinā pākhaṃḍānapi varjayet || 11 ||
samāpyaivaṃ yathāśaktyā dvādaśa dvādaśīrnaraḥ ||
saṃvatsarāṃte lavaṇaparvatena saha prabho ||
śayyāṃ dadyānmuniśreṣṭha gurave rasasaṃyutām || || 12 ||
grāmaṃ ca śaktimāndadyātkṣetraṃ vā bhavanānvitam ||
guruṃ saṃpūjya vidhivadvadvastrālaṃkārabhūṣaṇaiḥ || 13 ||
anyānapi yathāśaktyā bhojayitvā dvijottamān||
tarpayedvastragodānairanyatra dhanasaṃcayāt || 14 ||
alpavitto yathāśaktyā stokaṃstokaṃ samācaret ||
yaścātiniḥsvaḥ puruṣo bhaktimānmādhavaṃ prati ||
puppārcanavidhānena sa kuryādvatsaratrayam ||15 ||
anena vidhinā yastu vibhūtidvādaśīvratam ||
kuryātsa pāpanirmuktaḥ pitṛrṇāṃ tārayecchatam || 16 ||
janmanāṃ śatasāhasraṃ na śokaphalabhāgbhavet ||
na ca vyādhirbhavettasya na dāridyaṃ na bandhanam || 17 ||
vaiṣṇavo vātha śaivo vā bhavejanmanijanmani ||
yāvadyugasahasrāṇāṃ śatamaṣṭottaraṃ bhavet ||
tāvatsvarge vasedrājanbhūpatiśca punarbhavet || 18 ||
purā rathaṃtare kalpe rājāsītpuṣpavāhanaḥ ||
nāmnā lokeṣu vikhyātastejasā sūryasannibhaḥ || 19 ||
tapasā tasya tuṣṭena caturvaktreṇa bhārata ||
kamalaṃ kāñcanaṃ dattaṃ yathākāmagatiḥ sadā||||4.85.20 ||
samastabhṛtyasahitaḥ sāṃtaḥpuraparisthitaḥ ||
dvīpāni suralokaṃ ca yatheṣṭaṃ vicaratyasau || 21 ||
kalpādau saptame dvīpe tena puṣkaravāsinaḥ ||
loke saṃpūjitā yasmātpuṣkaradvīpa ucyate || 22 ||
tadaiva brahmaṇā dattaṃ yānamasya yato nṛpa ||
puṣpavāhanamityāhustasmāttaṃ devadānavāḥ || 23 ||
nāgasya tasyāsya jagattrayepi brahmāṃbujasthasya tapo.anubhāvāt ||
patnī ca tasyāpratimā narendra nārīsahasrairabhito.abhinaṃdyā||24||
nāmnā ca lāvaṇyavatī babhūva yā pārvatīveṣṭatamā bhavasya ||
tasyātmajānāmayutaṃ babhūva dharmātmanāmagryadhanurddharāṇām || 25 ||
tadātmanaḥ sarvamavekṣya rājā muhurmuhurvismayamāsasāda ||
sobhyāgataṃ pūjya munipravīraṃ pracetasaṃ vācamimāṃ babhāṣe || 26 ||
kasmādvibhūtiramalā mama martyapūjyā jāyā ca sarvavijitāmarasundarī yā ||
bhāryā tvanalpatapasā vasutoṣitena dattaṃ mamāṃbujagṛhaṃ paramaprasādāt || 27 || yasminpraviṣṭamapi koṭiśataṃ nṛpāṇāṃ sāmātyakujaranarāśvaghanāvṛtānām ||
nālakṣya sambādhatayā hi bādhastārāgaṇairapi surāsuralokapālaiḥ || 28 || tasmātkimanyajananījaṭharodbhavena dharmādikaṃ kṛtamaśeṣajanātigaṃ syāt ||
samyaṅmayātha tanayairanayā maharṣe māhāryayā tadakhilaṃ kathaya pracetaḥ ||29||
tasya tadvacanaṃ śrutvā dhyānenā vekṣya cākhilam ||
pracetāstamuvācātha śṛṇu bhūpa purātanam || 4.85.30 ||
lubdhakastvaṃ purā rājansarvasattvabhayaṃkaraḥ ||
āsīdasādhucaritaḥ suhṛnmitravi varjitaḥ || 31 ||
yatamadhyo hrasvakeśaḥ kṛṣṇāṃgo raktalocanaḥ ||
dhanuṣpāṇirvanagataḥ kṛtāṃtakasamo bhavān ||32||
abhūdanāvṛṣṭiratīva raudrā kadāci dāhāranimittaroṣaḥ ||
padmānyathādāya tato bahūni gataṃ puraṃ vaidiśanāmadheyam || 33 ||
unmūlya lobhācca puraṃ samastaṃ bhrāṃtaṃ tvayāśeṣamahattadā sīt ||
kretā na kaścitkamaleṣu jātastoke bhṛśaṃ kṣutparipīḍitaśca || 34 || upaviṣṭastvamekasminsabhāryo bhavanāṃgaṇe ||
atha maṃgalaśabdastu tvayā rātrau tathā śrutaḥ || 35 ||
samāpya māghamāsasya dvādaśyāṃ lavaṇācalam ||
nivedayaṃtī gurave śayyāṃ copaskarānvitām || 36 ||
alaṃkṛtya hṛṣīkeśaṃ sīvarṇaṃ paramaṃ padam ||
sātha dṛṣṭā tatastābhyāmidaṃ cittevadhāritam||37||
kimebhiḥ kamalaiḥ kāryaṃ varaṃ viṣṇuralaṃkṛtaḥ||
iti bhaktistadā jātā dāmpatyasya nareśvara || 38 ||
tatprasaṃgātsamabhyarcya keśavaṃ lavaṇācalam||
śayyā ca puṣpaprakaraiḥ pūjitābhūcca sarvadā || 39 ||
athānaṃgavatī tuṣṭā tayorhonaśatatrayam ||
prādādgṛhītaṃ tābhyāṃ ca na tatsarvāvalaṃbanāt || 4.85.40 ||
anaṃgavatī ca punastayorannaṃ caturvidham||
ānāyyopahṛtaṃ kṛtvā bhujyatāmiti bhūpate|| ||41||
tābhyāṃ tu tadapi tyaktaṃ bhojyāvaḥ śvo varānane ||
prasaṃgāccopavāsena tavādyāstu sukhāvahaḥ || 42 ||
janmaprabhṛti pāpiṣṭhāvāvāṃ devi dṛḍhavrate||
satprasaṃgāddhanurmadhye dharmalābhastu cāvayoḥ || 43 ||
iti jāgaraṇaṃ tābhyāṃ prasaṃgāttadanuṣṭhitam ||
prabhāte ca tayā dattā śayyā salavaṇācalā || 44 ||
grāmaśca gurave bhaktyā viprebhyo dvādaśaiva hi ||
vastrālaṃkārayuktāṃgā gāvaśca kanakāṃcitāḥ || 45 ||
bhojanaṃ ca suhṛnmitradīnāṃdhakṛpaṇaiḥ samam ||
tattu lubdhakadāṃpatyaṃ pūjayitvā visarjitam ||46||
bhavā~mstu lubdhako jātaḥ sapatnīko nareśvaraḥ ||
puṣpāṇāṃ prakare tasmātkeśavasya prapūjanam ||47||
prāptaṃ sudurllabhaṃ vīra tvayā puṣkaramandiram ||
tasya sarvasya māhātmyādalaṃ na tapasā nṛpa || 48 ||
yathā kāmagataṃ dakṣaṃ padmayoniṃ viriṃcinā ||
saṃtuṣṭastasya rājendra brahmarūpī janārdanaḥ ||49 ||
śayyānaṃgavatī veśyā kāmadeśasya sāṃpratam ||
patnī sapatnī saṃjātā ratyā prītiriti śrutā || 4.85.50 ||
lokeṣvānaṃdajananī sakalāmarapūjitā ||
tadapyutsṛjya rājendra nirvāṇaṃ samavāpsyasi || 51 ||
ityuktvā sa muniḥ sarvaṃ tatraivāṃtarhitobhavat ||
rājā yathoktaṃ ca punaḥ sa cakre puṣpavāhanaḥ || 52 ||
imāmācarato brahmannakhaṇḍavratamācaret ||
yathākathaṃcitkālena dvādaśa dvādaśīrmune ||
kartavyāḥ śaktito deyā viprebhyo dakṣiṇā nṛpa || 53 ||
iti kaluṣavidāraṇaṃ janānāmiti paṭhati śṛṇoti cātibhaktyā ||
matimapi ca dadāti devaloke vasati sa paraḥśatāni vatsarāṇām || 54 ||
iti śrībhaviṣye mahāpurāṇa uttaraparvaṇi śrīkṛṣṇayudhiṣṭhirasaṃvāde vibhūtidvādaśīvratavarṇanaṃ nāma paṃcāśītitamo.adhyāyaḥ || 85 || cha ||
madanadvādaśīvratavarṇanam
|| yudhiṣṭhira uvāca || ||
śrotumicchāmi bhagavanmadanadvādaśīvratam ||
sutānekonapaṃcāśadyena lebhe ditiḥ purā || 1 ||
|| śrīkṛṣṇa uvāca|| ||
tadvaśiṣṭhādibhiḥ proktamityekā tithiruttamā ||
vistareṇa tadevedaṃ matsakāśānnivodhata || 2 ||
caitre māse site pakṣe dvādaśyāṃ niyatavrataḥ ||
sthāpayedavraṇaṃ kuṃbhaṃ sitataṃḍulapūritam|| 3 ||
nānāphalayutaṃ tadvadikṣudaṇḍasamanvitam ||
sitavastrayugacchannaṃ sitacandana carcitam || 4 ||
nānābhakṣyasamopetaṃ sahiraṇyaṃ ca śaktitaḥ ||
tāmrapātraṃ guḍopetaṃ tasyopari nivedayeta || 5 ||
tasyopari tathā kāmaṃ kadalīdala saṃsthitam ||
kuryāccharkarayopetamiti tasya samīpataḥ || 6 ||
gaṃdhaṃ puṣpaṃ tathā dadyādgītaṃ vādyaṃ ca kārayet||
tadalābhe kathāṃ kuryātkāmakeśavayo rnaraḥ || 7 ||
kāmaṃ nāmnā harerarcāṃ snāpayedgaṃdhavāriṇā ||
śuklapuṣpākṣatatilairarcayenmadhusūdanam || 8 ||
kāmāya pādau saṃpūjya jaṃghe saubhāgyadāya ca ||
manmathāya tathā meḍhraṃ mādhavāya kaṭiṃ namaḥ || 9 ||
śāṃtodarāyetyudaramanaṃgāyetyuro hareḥ ||
mukhaṃ padmamukhāyeti bāhuṃ pañcaśarāya vai || 4.86.10 ||
namaḥ sarvātmane maulimarcayediti keśavam ||
tataḥ prabhāte kuṃbhaṃ ca brāhmaṇāya nivedayeta || 11 ||
brāhmaṇānbhojayedbhaktyā svayaṃ ca lavaṇādṛte ||
bhaktyātha dakṣiṇāṃ dadyādimaṃ maṃtramudīrayet || 12 ||
prīyatāmatra bhagavānkāmarūpī janārdanaḥ ||
hṛdaye sarvabhūtānāṃ yathā vedo.abhidhīyate || 13 ||
anena vidhinā sarvaṃ māsimāsi samācaret ||
phalamāmalakaṃ prāśya dvādaśyāṃ bhūtale svapet || 14 ||
tatastrayodaśe māsi ghṛtadhenusamanvitām ||
śayyāṃ dadyāddvijendrāya sarvopaskarasaṃyutām || 15 ||
kāñcanaṃ kāmadevaṃ ca śuklāṃ gāṃ ca payasvinīm ||
vāsobhirdvijadāṃpatyaṃ pūjya śaktyā vibhūṣaṇaiḥ||16||
homaḥ śuklatilaiḥ kāryaḥ kāmanāmāni kīrtayet ||
gavyena sarpiṣā tatra pāyasena ca dharmavit || 17 ||
viprebhyo bhojanaṃ dadyādvitta śāṭhyaṃvivarjayet ||
ikṣudaṃḍānnaro dadyātpuṣpamālāṃ ca śaktitaḥ || 18 ||
yaḥ kuryādvidhinānena madanadvādaśīmimām ||
sarvapāpavinirmuktaḥ prāpnoti paramaṃ padam || 19 ||
iha loke varānputrānsaubhāgyaṃ sukhamaśnute ||
kaśyapo vratamāhātmyādāgatya parayā mudā || 4.86.20 ||
cakārākarkaśāṃ bhūyo rūpalāvaṇyasaṃyutām ||
vareṇa cchandayāmāsa yā ca vavre varaṃ varam ||
putraṃ śatruvadhārthāya samarthamamitaujasam || 21 ||
prārthayāmi mahābhāgyaṃ sarvāmaraniṣūdanam ||
kaśyapaḥ prāha tāṃ bhadre evamastu suśobhane || 22 ||
saṃvatsaraśataṃ tvekaṃ garbho dhāryaḥ sukhepsayā ||
saṃdhyāyāṃ naiva bhoktavyaṃ garbhiṇyā varavarṇini || 23 ||
na sthātavyaṃ na gaṃtavyaṃ vṛkṣamūleṣu sarvadā ||
nopaskare bhuvi viśenmusalolūkhalādiṣu || 24 ||
jalaṃ na cāvagāheta śūnyāgāraṃ vivarjayet ||
varjayetkalahaṃ gehe gātrabhaṃgaṃ tathaiva ca ||25||
muktakeśī na tiṣṭheta nāśuciḥ syātkathaṃcana ||
na śayītonnataśirā na cāpyārdraśirāḥ kvacit || 26 ||
na vastuhīnā nodvignā nārdrapādā na bhūtale ||
nāmaṃgalyāṃ vadedvācaṃ na ca hāsyaparā bhavet || 27 ||
kuryācca guruśuśrūṣāṃ nityaṃ maṃgalatatparā ||
sarvauṣadhībhiḥ koṣṇena vāriṇā snānamācaret || 28 ||
kustriyo nābhibhāṣeta vastravātaṃ vivarjayet ||
mṛtavatsādi saṃsargaṃ paragehe ca suṃdari || 29 ||
na śīghraṃ mārgamākrāmellaṃghayenna mahānadīm ||
na ca bībhatsakaṃ kiṃcinna ca vīkṣedbhayānakam || 4.86.30 ||
guru vātulamāhāramajīrṇaṃ na samācaret ||
saṃpūrṇagarbhiṇyāyāmaṃ vyāyāmaṃ vā vivarjayet || 31 ||
garbho rakṣyaḥ sadauṣadhyā hṛdi dhāryo na matsaraḥ ||
anena vidhinā sādhvi śobhanaṃ putramāpnuyāt || 32 ||
anyathā garbhapatanaṃ staṃbhanaṃ vā pravartate ||
tasmāttvamanayā vṛttyā garbhesmiṃśca samācareḥ ||
bhaviṣyati śubhaḥ putraḥ sarvāvayavasuṃdaraḥ || 33 ||
svastyastu te gamiṣyāmi tathetyuktastayā ca saḥ ||
paśyatāṃ sarvabhūtānāṃ tatraivāṃtarhitobhavat || || 34 ||
tataḥ sā kaśyapoktena vidhinā samatiṣṭhata ||
athāpa putrānpaṃcāśadekonānpāṃḍunaṃdana || 35 ||
evamanyāpi yā nārī madanadvādaśīmi mām ||
karoti putrānāpnoti saha bhartrā sukhī bhavet|| 36 ||
ekonamarddhaśatamāpa ditiḥ sutānāṃ yena vratena balavīryasamanvitānām ||
martyaḥ samācarati putradhanābhilāṣī tatsarvamatra saphalaṃ bhavatīha puṃsaḥ || 37 || ||
iti śrībhaviṣye mahāpurāṇa uttaraparvaṇi śrīkṛṣṇayudhiṣṭhirasaṃvāde madanadvāda śīvratavarṇanaṃ nāma ṣaḍaśītamo.adhyāyaḥ || 86 || || cha ||
abādhakavratavarṇanam
|| yudhiṣṭhira uvāca: || ||
kāṃtāravanadurgeṣu suprasannāṭavīṣu ca ||
samudrataraṇe dāne saṃgrāme taskarārdane || 1 ||
kāṃ devatāṃ smaretkṛṣṇa paritrāṇakarīmiha ||
kathaṃ ca devaḥ puruṣaḥ paritrāṇaṃ smṛto janaiḥ || 2 ||
|| śrīkṛṣṇa uvāca || ||
sarvamaṃgalamāṃgalyāṃ durgāṃ bhagavatīmimām ||
