nāpnoti duḥkhaṃ puruṣaḥ saṃsmaransarvamaṅgalām ||3||
alakṣyāṃ lakṣyabhūtānāṃ saṃsmaransarvamaṃgalām ||4
bhayaṃ samavāpnoti puruṣaḥ pārtha kutracit || 4 ||
yadā tāṃ pratijijñāsuravaṃtyāmahamāgataḥ ||
purā saṃdīpaniḥ pārtha balena saha bhārata || 5 ||
prāptavidyena ca mayā pratijñātāsya dakṣiṇā ||
divyaṃ stavaṃ viditvā me tenāhaṃ yācitaḥ prabho || 6 ||
prabhāsatīrthe putro me gataḥ kenāpyasau hataḥ ||
tamānaya mahābāho satyaṃ kuru vaco mama || 7 ||
upādhyāyasya vacanādvaivasvatapure mayā ||
prāptaḥ saṃdīpaneḥ putraḥ samānītaḥ kṣaṇādasau || 8 ||
dakṣiṇāṃ tāmudāhṛtya prasthitau punarāgatau ||
sthānametatsvapādāṃkaṃ kṛtvāvāṃ gṛhamāgatau ||9||
tataḥprabhṛti putrārthāḥ pūjayaṃti janāḥ sadā ||
māṃ caiva balabhadraṃ ca madhyasthāṃ sarvamaṃgalām || 4.87.10 ||
vāme nārāyaṇo haṃsa evameva ca ke bhavet ||
abādhakaṃ yorcayate tṛtīyaṃ kuṃtinadana || 11 ||
trayodaśyāṃ site pakṣe māsimāsi yatavrataḥ ||
naktenaivopavāsena ekabhaktena vā punaḥ || 12 ||
gandhapuṣpaiśca madhubhiḥ sīdhubhiśca surāsavaiḥ ||
mṛnmayīṃ kāṃcanīṃ vāpi kṛtvā pratikṛtiṃ tu yaḥ || 13 ||
yakṣagandhabalikṣepaiḥ palalaudanasaṃsṛjaiḥ ||
yo.abhbhyarcayati rājendra sarvapāpaiḥ pramucyate || 14 ||
bhartṛsahitā svargaloke mahīyate || 15 ||
aṃbāṃbike dvidaśame.ahni site sadaiva yaḥ pūjayetkusumamāṃsasuropahāraiḥ ||
naśyaṃti tasya bhavaneṣvatibhīṣaṇāni caurāgnirājanitāni bhayāni sadyaḥ || 16 || || iti śrībhaviṣye mahāpurāṇa uttaraparvaṇi śrīkṛṣṇayudhiṣṭhirasaṃvāde abādhakavratavarṇanaṃ nāma saptāśītamo.adhyāyaḥ||87 ||
mandārakanimbārkavratavarṇanam
|| yudhiṣṭhira uvāca || ||
brūhi me yaduśārdūla vrataṃ gandhavināśanam ||
kaṭutiktāmladehotthadaurbhāgyaśamanaṃ tathā||1|| 1 ||
|| śrīkṛṣṇa uvāca || ||
imaṃ praśnaṃ purā pārtha jātūkarṇyo mahāmuniḥ ||
pṛṣṭo rājñyā viṣṇubhaktyā kālanaṃdanajātayā || 2 ||
kathayāmāsa saṃpṛṣṭā sūpaviṣṭā śṛṇoti sā ||
devī kṛtāñjalipuṭā jātūkarṇyovadadvratam || 3 ||
jyeṣṭhe māsi site pakṣe trayodaśyāṃ yudhiṣṭhira ||
snātvā puṇyanadītoye pūjayecchubhadeśajam ||4||
śvetamaṃdāramarkaṃ vā karavīraṃ ca raktakam ||
niṃbaṃ ca sūryadevasya vallabhaṃ durlabhaṃ tathā ||5||
puṣpairnaivedyadhūpādyairmaṃtreṇānena pāṃḍava ||
nirīkṣya gagane sūryaṃ dhyātvā hṛdi samuccaret ||6||
sūryaṃ śvetāramaṃdāraśvetārkāsyasaṃśayam ||
karavīra namastubhyaṃ niṃbavṛkṣa namo.astu te || 7 ||
itthaṃ yorkapaterbhaktyā varṣevarṣe pṛthaṅ naraḥ ||
mūlamaṃtreṇa nṛśreṣṭha nārī vā bhaktisaṃyutā ||
tasyāḥ śarīradaurgandhyaṃ daurbhāgyaṃ vā ajāvikam ||6||
niṃbaṃ navārkakaravīralatāṃ supuṣpāṃ yāḥ pūjayaṃti kusumākṣatadhūpadīpaiḥ ||
tāḥ sarvakāmasukhabhogasamṛddhibhājo daurbhāgyadoṣarahitāḥ subhagā bhavaṃti ||9||
iti śrībhaviṣye mahāpurāṇa uttaraparvaṇi śrīkṛṣṇayudhiṣṭhirasaṃvāde mandāranimbārkakaravīravratavarṇanaṃ nāmāṣṭāśītitamo.adhyāyaḥ || 88 |||9||| |||
trayodaśīvratavarṇanam
|| yudhiṣṭhira uvāca || ||
yamasyārādhanaṃ brūhi śrīvatsa puruṣottama ||
kathaṃ na gamyate kṛṣṇa narakaṃ narakesarin || 1 ||
|| śrīkṛṣṇa uvāca || ||
dvāravatyāṃ purā pārtha snāto.ahaṃ lavaṇāmbhasi ||
dṛṣṭavānmunimāyāṃtaṃ mudgalaṃ nāma pārthiva || 2 ||
prajvalaṃtamivādityaṃ tapasā dyotitāntaram ||
taṃ praṇamyārghyasatkāraiḥ papracchāhaṃ yudhiṣṭhira || 3 ||
yamādarśananāmaitadvrataṃ jantubhayāpaham ||
kathayāmāsa sakalaṃ mudgalo vismayānvitaḥ || 4 ||
|| mudgala uvāca || ||
akasmātkṛṣṇa mūrcchā me patito.asmi dharātale ||
paśyāmi daṃḍapuruṣairmaddehātprajvalanniva || 5 ||
aṃguṣṭhamātraḥ puruṣo baladākṛṣya roṣitaḥ ||
baddho yamabhaṭairgāḍhaṃ nīyate vedavādibhiḥ || 6 ||
kṣaṇātsabhāyāṃ paśyāmi yamaṃ piṃgalalocanam ||
kṛṣṇāvadātaṃ raudrāsyaṃ mṛtyuṃ vyādhiśatānvitam || 7 || vātapittamahāśleṣmairmūrtimadbhirupāsitam ||
kāsaśophajvarātaṃkasphoṭikālūtamāribhiḥ || 8 ||
jvaragardabhaśīrṣādibhagaṃdaramalakṣayaiḥ ||
gaṃḍamālākṣirogaiśca mūtrakṛcchrarahovraṇaiḥ || 9 ||
vedanābhiḥ pramehaiśca piṭakairgaṃḍabudbudaiḥ ||
viṣūcikāgalagrāhadaridrābhūtataskaraiḥ || 4.89.10 ||
itthaṃ bahuvidhai raudrairnānārūpabhayaṃkaraiḥ ||
karālaśastrahastaiśca saṃgrāmairnarakaistathā || 11 ||
rākṣasairdānavairugrairupaviṣṭaiḥ puraḥsthitaiḥ ||
dharmādhikaraṇasthaiśca citraguptādilekhakaiḥ || 12 ||
siṃhairvyāghrairvarāhaiśca tarakṣaiścānujaṃtukaiḥ ||
vṛścikairdaṃśa maśakaiḥ śivāsarpaiḥ saḍuṃḍubhaiḥ || 13 ||
gṛdhrairulūkairbahubhirmatkuṇairḍākinīgrahaiḥ ||
apasmārasmaronmādavṛddhikārevatīgrahaiḥ || 14 ||
piśācairyakṣakūṣmāṃḍaiḥ pāśakhaḍgadhanurddharaiḥ ||
muktakeśaistrāsakarairbhṛkuṭīkuṭilānanaiḥ || 15 ||
bṛhatkāyairnārakīyaiḥ pāpiṣṭhānāṃ niyāmakaiḥ ||
asipatravanāṃgāraiḥ kṣāragartāṇḍadāyakaiḥ || 16 ||
asibhaṃgāmiṣacchedarudhirasrāvakādibhiḥ ||
āsthāne saṃbhṛto bhāti yamo mṛtyūpamopamaḥ || 27 ||
sa āha kiṃkarānsarvāndharmarājo janārdana ||
kimayaṃ munirānīto yuṣmābhirbhrāṃtanāmabhiḥ || 18 ||
mudgalo nāma kauḍinye nagare bhīṣmakātmajaḥ||
kṣatriyo.asti sa āneyaḥ kṣīṇāyustyajyatāṃ muniḥ || 19 ||
ityuktāste gatāstasmādāyātāḥ punareva te ||
ūcuryamabhaṭāḥ prahvā dharmarājaṃ savismayāḥ ||4.89.20 ||
asmābhistatra kṣīṇāyurna dehī lakṣito gataiḥ ||
na jānīmo bhānusūno kathaṃcidbhrāṃtamānasāḥ || 21 ||
|| yamarāja uvāca || ||
prāyeṇa te na dṛśyaṃte puruṣairyamakiṃkaraiḥ ||
kṛtā trayodaśī yaistu narakārtivināśinī || 22 ||
ujjayinyāṃ prayāge vā bhairave vātha ye mṛtāḥ ||
tilānnagohiraṇyādi dattaṃ yaiśca gavāhnikam || 23 ||
|| dūta uvāca || ||
dṛśaṃ tadvrataṃ svāmiñchaṃsa no bhāskarātmaja ||
kiṃ tatra vada kartavyaṃ puruṣaistava tuṣṭidam || 24 ||
|| yama uvāca || ||
pūrvāhne mārgaśīrṣādau varṣamekaṃ nirantaram ||
trayodaśyāṃ saumyadine sūryāṃgārakavarjitaḥ || 25 ||
mama nāmnā dvijānaṣṭau paṃca caiva samāhvayet || vedāṃtagāñjātiśuddhāñchāṃtacittānsuśobhanān || 26 ||
vācakaścāpi tanmadhye sadā bhāskaravallabhān ||
dinasya prathame yāme śucau deśe samāsthitān || 27 || aṃtarvāsovṛtānbhaktānsaupadiṣṭadigunmukhān ||
abhyaṃgayecchirodeśāttilatailena marddayet || 28 ||
snāpayedgandhakāṣāyaiḥ sukhoṣṇāṃbubhireva ca ||
pṛthakpṛthaksnāpayitvā sarvāneva dvijottamān || 29 ||
śucirbhūtvā tathācāṃto vratī bhaktiparāyaṇaḥ ||
svayaṃ saṃbhṛtya śuśruṣāṃ teṣāṃ kṛtvā narottama || 4.89.30 ||
prāṅmukhānupaviṣṭāṃśca trayodaśa pṛthakpṛthak ||
bhojayecchālimudgādyaṃ guḍapūpānsukhocitān|| 31 ||
suvyañjanaṃ supakvānnaṃ bhūyobhūyo nivedayet ||
śucirbhūtvā tathācāṃto hyarcayettilataṃḍulaiḥ ||32||
prasthamātrairathaikaikaṃ tāmrapātrasamanvitaiḥ ||
sadakṣiṇaiḥ sacchatraiśca jalakumbhaiḥ pavitrakaiḥ ||33||
carmaprāvaraṇaiḥ śreṣṭhaisteṣāṃ dattvā visarjayet ||
maṃtreṇānena rājendra arcayettānpṛthaksudhīḥ ||
brāhmaṇānvācakaṃ vāpi paṃktibhedaṃ na kārayet || 34 ||
oṃ namaḥ śanaiścaro mṛtyurdaṃḍahasto vināśakaḥ ||
abhāvaḥ pralayaḥ saurirduḥkhaghnaḥ śamanoṃ.atakaḥ || 35 ||
lokapālo hyatikrūro raudro ghorānanaḥ śivaḥ ||
yamaḥ prasannamānasko dadyānme.abhayadakṣiṇām || (svāhā) || 36 ||
ityuktvā saṃprayacchecca deyaṃ dattvā vratī punaḥ ||
dvijāṃścānuvrajetṛptāngṛhāṃścārcitacarcitān || 37 ||
evaṃ yaḥ puruṣaḥ kaścitsakṛdvratamidaṃ caret ||
sa mṛto.api naro martyo nāyāti mama maṃdiram|| 38 ||
adṛṣṭo mama māyābhirvimānenārkamaṃḍalam ||
sa cāyāti purīṃ viṣṇostataḥ śivapuraṃ vrajet || 39 ||
kṛtaṃ cīrṇaṃ vrataṃ tena mudgalena mamoditam ||
tena nāyātyasau loke mama kṣatriyapuṅgavaḥ || 4.89.40 ||
iti kālavacaḥ śrutvā te.api dūtā gatāstu me ||
ahaṃ punaḥ samāpannastūrṇaṃ kālairvisarjitaḥ ||
svaśarīraṃ punaḥ prāpya nīrogaḥ punarutthitaḥ || 41 ||
tvāṃ draṣṭumāgataḥ proktametadvṛttaṃ mayā tava ||
ityuktvā mudgalo rājanprayātaḥ svagṛhaṃ prati || || 42 ||
idaṃ kuruṣva kauṃteya tvamapyatra mahītale ||
tato yāsyasyasaṃdigdhaṃ vaṃcayitvā yamaṃ mṛtaḥ || 43 ||
evaṃ yenye.api puruṣāḥ striyo vāpi yudhi ṣṭhira ||
trayodaśyāṃ trayodaśyāṃ ye cariṣyaṃti bhūtale || 44 ||
ekabhaktena naktena upavāsena vā punaḥ ||
yamadarśanamākhyātaṃ gataṃ sarvavratottamam ||45||
sarvapāpavinirmuktā divyayānaṃ samāśritāḥ ||
yāsyantīndrapuraṃ hṛṣṭā apsarogaṇasaṃvṛtāḥ || 46 ||
dodhūyamānāścamaraiḥ stūyamānāḥ surāsuraiḥ ||
gandharvatūryanādena cchatrapaṃktivirājitāḥ || 47 ||
adṛṣṭo ghorarūpāsyairyamadūtairyudhiṣṭhira ||
anardito vyādhigaṇairadṛṣṭo yamakiṅkaraiḥ || 48 ||
adārito mahāraudrairnānāpraharaṇottamaiḥ||
yamadṛṣṭipathānmuktāḥ sarvasaukhyasamanvitāḥ ||49||
sarvasaukhyasamāyuktāḥ śivavatsaumyadarśanāḥ ||
svarge vasaṃti suciraṃ bhāvitāḥ svena karmaṇā || 4.89.50 ||
snāpya trayodaśa munīnghṛtapāyasena saṃpūjya pūjyatilataṇḍulavastradānaiḥ ||
kurvaṃti ye vratamidaṃ tridaśehni pūtāḥ paśyaṃti te yamamukhaṃ na kadācideva || 51 || || iti śrībhaviṣye mahāpurāṇa uttaraparvaṇi śrīkṛṣṇayudhiṣṭhirasaṃvāde yamadarśanatrayodaśī vratavarṇanaṃ nāmaikonanavatitamo.adhyāyaḥ || 89 ||
anaṅgatrayodaśīvratavarṇanam
|| yudhiṣṭhira uvāca || ||
bhagavanbhūtabhavyeśa saṃsārārṇavatāraka ||
vrataṃ kathaya kiñcinme rūpasaubhāgyadāyakam || 1 ||
|| śrīkṛṣṇa uvāca || ||
kiṃ kṛtairbahubhiḥ pārtha vratairunmattaceṣṭitaiḥ ||
kāyakleśakaraiḥ krūrairasāraiḥ phala sādhanaiḥ || 2 ||
varamekāpi varadā kṛtānaṃgatrayodaśī ||
prasiddhiṃ samanuprāptā martye kāmapradāyinī || 3 ||
saubhāgyārogyajayadā sarvātaṃkanivāriṇī ||
sarvaduṣṭopaśamanī sarvamaṃgalavardhanī || 4 ||
śṛṇuṣva tāṃ mahābāho kathayāmi savistaram ||
purā dagdhena kāmena trinetranayanāgninā || 5 ||
bhasmībhūtena lokānāṃ saṃkalpitā purānagha ||
anaṃgena kathā hyeṣā tenānaṃgatrayodaśī || 6 ||
hemaṃte samanuprāpte māsi mārgaśire śubhe ||
śuklapakṣe trayodaśyāṃ sopavāso jitendriyaḥ || 7 ||
snānaṃ nadyāṃ taḍāge ca gṛhe vā niyatātmavān ||
kṛtvā samabhyarcya vibhuṃ vidhinā śaśiśekharam ||8||
dhūpadīpaiḥ sanaivedyaiḥ puṣpaiḥ kālodbhavaistathā ||
śaṃbhunāmānyathoccārya homaḥ kāryastilākṣataiḥ || 9 ||
anaṃganāmnā saṃpūjya madhu prāśya svapenniśi ||
naivedyairmadhurairdivyaiḥ susvādairghṛtapācitaiḥ || 4.90.10 ||
dhūpaṃ sugaṃdhiṃ dadyācca raktapuṣpaistu pūjanam ||
raṃbhātulyā bhavetsā tu rūpayauvanaśālinī || 11 ||
madhuvatsyātsamadhuraḥ kāmarūpadharastathā ||
daśānāmaśvamedhānāṃ phalaṃ prāpnoti mānavaḥ || 12 ||
puṣyamāsasya caivoktaṃ caṃdanaṃ prāśayanniśi ||
yogeśvaraṃ tu saṃpūjya mālatīkusumaiḥ śubhaiḥ || 13 ||
naivedyaṃ ghṛtapūrāśca damaśāntāstu tāḥ striyaḥ ||
saumyaśītasugandhāśca candanaprāśanodbhavaiḥ || 14 ||
rājasūyasya yajñasya phalaṃ prāpnotyanuttamam ||
māghe naṭeśvaraṃ nāma pūjayetpaṃkajena tu || 15 ||
naivedyaṃ kṣīrakhaṇḍādyairmauktikaṃ prāśayenniśi ||
bahuputrā bhavetsā tu dhanaṃ saubhāgyamuttamam || 16 ||
muktācūrṇanibhairnetrairyadvā syāttadvadeva hi ||
gaurītulyā bhavetsā tu komalāṃgī prajāyate || 17 ||
tapta jāṃbūnadābhāso bhaveddivyatanurmahān ||
gomedhasya sahasrasya phalaṃ prāpnoti mānavaḥ || 18 ||
phālgune māsi saṃpūjya devadevaṃ hareśvaram ||
karṇikārasya puṣpāṇi naivedye bījapūrakam || 19 ||
kaṃkolaṃ prāśayedrātrau sauṃdaryamatulaṃ labhet ||
caitre surūpakaṃ nāma pūjayeddamanena tu || 4.90.20 ||
naivedyaṃ dhūpakaṃ dadyādghṛtakhaṇḍavipācitam ||
karpūraṃ prāśayedrātrau saubhāgyaṃ mahadāpnuyāt || 21 ||
candraśca candrakāṃtiśca candravartyaharāvṛte ||
naramedhasya yajñasya phalaṃ prāpnoti śobhanam || 22 ||
vaiśākhe ca mahārūpaṃ puṣpairnaumālikārcanam ||
kāraṃbakaistu naivedyaṃ dātavyaṃ cātiśobhanam || 23 ||
jātīphalaṃ tu saṃprāśya jātimāpnotyanuttamām ||
saphalāstasya sarvāśā bhavaṃti bhuvi bhārata || 24 ||
gosahasraphalaṃ prāpya brahmaloke mahīyate ||
jyeṣṭhe māse tu pradyumnaṃ pūjayenmallikāsumaiḥ || 25 ||
naivedyaṃ khaṇḍavartiṃ ca lavaṃgaṃ prāśayenniśi ||
jyeṣṭhaṃ padamavāpnoti tathā lakṣmīṃ janārdanāt || 26 ||
sarva saukhyasamopetaḥ sthitvā bhuvi śataṃ samāḥ ||
vājapeyasya yajñasya śatamaṣṭaguṇottaram || 27 ||
āṣāḍhe caiva saṃprāpte umābhartāramarcayet ||
puṣpa dhūpādinaivedyaiḥ prāśnīyācca tilodakam || 28 ||
tilottamā rūpadharā sukhī syāccharadaḥ śatam ||
śrāvaṇe umāpatiṃ nāma tilapuṣpaistu pūjayet || || 29 ||
naivedyaṃ laḍḍukāndadyātkṛṣṇāṃśca prāśayettilān ||
pauṃḍarīkasya yajñasya phalaṃ prāpnotyanākulam || 4.90.30 ||
tadaṃte rājarājaḥ syācchatrupakṣa kṣayaṃkaraḥ ||
sadyojātaṃ bhādrapade pūjya kuṃkumakeśaraiḥ || 31 ||
naivedyaṃ solikāṃ dadyātprāśayedaguruṃ niśi ||
aguruṃ prāśayitvā tu gururbhavati bhūtale|| || 32 ||
putrapautraiḥ parivṛto bhuktvā bhogānmano.anugān ||
uktayajñaphalaṃ prāpya viṣṇuloke mahīyate || 33 ||
tridaśādhipatimaśvayuji pūjya sindūrakavrajaiḥ ||
svarṇādikaṃ tu saṃprāśya svarṇavarṇaḥ prajāyate ||34||
rūpavānsubhago vāgmī bhuktvā bhogānmahītale ||
suvarṇakoṭidānasya phalaṃ prāpnoti mānavaḥ || 35 ||
viśveśvaraṃ kārttike tu sarvapuṣpaistu pūjayet ||
damanasya phalaṃ prāśya damanena pumānbhavet || 36 ||
damanonmādakartā ca sarvasya jagataḥ prabhuḥ ||
bhavedbhujabalopetastataḥ śivapuraṃ vrajet || 37 ||
evaṃ saṃvatsarasyāṃte pārite.asminvratottame ||
yatkartavyaṃ tadadhunā śrūyatāṃ kurunaṃdana || 38 ||
vrate vidhno yadā ca syādaśaktyā sūtakena vā ||
upoṣyamevopavasettadā drumapuraḥ punaḥ || 39 ||
pūrvoktamevaṃ nirvartya sauvarṇaṃ kārayecchivam ||
tāmrapātre tu saṃsthāpya kalaśopari vinyaset || 4.90.40 ||
śuklavastreṇa saṃchādya puṣpanaivedyapūjitam ||
brāhmaṇāya pradātavyaṃ śivabhaktāya suvrata || || 41 ||
śaktimāñchayanaṃ dadyādgāṃ savatsāṃ payasvinīm ||
chatropānatpradātavyaṃ kalaśāḥ sodakāstathā || 42 ||
śāṃtāśca kecidicchaṃti śaktyā dadyācca dakṣiṇām ||
pañcāmṛtena snānaṃ ca tasminnahani kārayet || 43 ||
devadevasya rājendra puṣpadīpānnasaṃyutam ||
bhojanaṃ ca yathā śaktyā ṣaḍrasaṃ madhurottaram || 44 ||
pradadyācchivabhaktebhyo viśuddhenāṃtarātmanā ||
evaṃ nirvartya vidhivatkṛtakṛtyaḥ pumānbhavet || 45 ||
nārī vā bharataśreṣṭha kumārī vā yatavratā ||
pārite tu vrate paścātkuryācca sumahotsavam || 46 ||
anena vidhinā kuryādyastvanaṃgatrayodaśīm ||
sa rājyaṃ nihatāmitraṃ kīrtimāyuryaśo balam || 47 ||
saubhāgyaṃ mahadāpnoti yāvajjanmaśataṃ nṛpa ||
tato nirvāṇamāyāti śivalokaṃ ca gacchati || 48 ||
kāmena yā kila purā samupoṣitāsīcchubhrā tithistridaśamī suśubhāṃgahetoḥ ||
tāṃ prāśanairuditanāmayutairupetā kṛtvā prayāti paramaṃ padamiṃdumauleḥ || || 49 ||
iti śrībhaviṣye mahāpurāṇa uttaraparvaṇyanaṃgatrayodaśīvratavarṇanaṃ nāma navatitamo.adhyāyaḥ || 90 || ||
pālīvratavarṇanam
|| yudhiṣṭhira uvāca || ||
ambupūrṇataḍāgeṣu mahātoyāśayeṣu ca ||
kasyārthaṃ samprayacchaṃti kṛṣṇaitāḥ kulayoṣitaḥ || 1 ||
|| śrīkṛṣṇa uvāca || |
māsi bhādrapade prāpte śukle bhūtatithau nṛpa ||
taḍāgapālyāṃ dātavyaṃ varuṇāyārghyamuttamam || 2 ||
brāhmaṇaiḥ kṣatriyairvaiśyaiḥ śūdraiḥ strībhistathaiva ca ||
tasmindine bhaktinamrairdeyādarghyaṃ yudhiṣṭhira || 3 ||
puṣpaiḥ phalaistathā vastrairdīpālaktakacandanaiḥ ||
anagnipākosiddhānnaistilataṇḍulamiśrakaiḥ || 4 ||
kharjūrairnālikeraiśca bījapūrṇārakaistathā ||
drākṣādāḍimapūgaiśca trapusaiścāpi pūjayet || 5 ||
ālikhya maṇḍale devaṃ varuṇaṃ vāruṇīyutam ||
maṃtreṇānena rājendra pūjayedbhaktibhāvataḥ || || 6 ||
varuṇāya namastubhyaṃ namaste yādasāṃpate ||
apāṃpate namaste.astu rasānāṃpataye namaḥ || 7 ||
mā kledaṃ mā ca daurgaṃdhyaṃ virasyaṃ mā mukhe.astu me ||
varuṇo vāruṇībhartā varado.astu sadā mama ( svāhā) || 8 ||
evaṃ yaḥ pūjayedbhaktyā varuṇaṃ varuṇālayam ||
madhyāhne sarasi snātvā nagnipākī vratī nṛpa || 9 ||
cāturvarṇyatha vai nārī vratenānena pāṃḍava ||
naivedyaṃ brāhmaṇe deyaṃ yannaivedye prakalpitam || 4.91.10 ||
evaṃ yaḥ kurute pārtha pālīvratamuttamam ||
tatkṣaṇātsarvapāpebhyo mucyate nātra saṃśayaḥ || 11 ||
saṃruddhaśuddhasalilātibalāṃ viśālāṃ pālīmupetya bahubhistarubhiḥ kṛtālīm ||
ye pūjayaṃti varuṇaṃ sahitaṃ samudraisteṣāṃ gṛhe bhavati bhūtiralabdhanāśā || 12 ||
iti śrībhaviṣye mahāpurāṇa uttaraparvaṇi śrīkṛṣṇayudhiṣṭhirasaṃvāde pālīvratavarṇanaṃ nāmaikanavatitamo.adhyāyaḥ || 91 || || a ||
rambhāvratavarṇanam
|| śrīkṛṣṇa uvāca || ||
asminneva dine pārtha śṛṇu brahmasabhātale ||
devalena purā gītaṃ devarṣigaṇasannidhau || 1 ||
apsarogaṇagaṃdharvairdevaiḥ sarvaiḥ samarcitam ||
saṃsārāsāratāṃ dṛṣṭvā tatrasthakadalīdrume ||
śuklapakṣe caturdaśyāṃ māsi bhādrapade nṛpa || 2 ||
dattamarghyaṃ varastrībhiḥ phalairnānāvidhaiḥ śubhaiḥ ||
virūḍhaiḥ saptadhānyaiśca dīpālaktakacandanaiḥ || 3 ||
dadhidūrvākṣatairvastrairnaivedyairghṛtapācitaiḥ ||
jātīphalairlavaṅgaiśca tathailālavalīphalaiḥ || 4 ||
kadalaiḥ kandarabhaṭairmocā sātra nigadyate ||
tasminnahani dātavyaṃ strībhiḥ sarvābhirapyalam || 5 ||
maṃtre ṇānena caivārghyaṃ śṛṇuṣva ca narādhipa ||
cityā tvaṃ kandaladalaiḥ kadale kāmadāyini ||
śarīrārogyalāvaṇyaṃ dehi devi namo.astu te || 6 ||
itthaṃ yaḥ pūjayedrājā puruṣo bhaktimānnṛpa ||
nārī vānagnipākāṃtā cāturvarṇyā yudhiṣṭhira || 7 ||
tasyāḥ kule na bhavati kvacinnārī kulāṭanī ||
durgatā durbhagā vaṃdhyā svairiṇī pāpakāriṇī || 8 ||
vilāsinī vā vṛṣalī punarbhūḥ punaretasī ||
gaṇikā svairiṇī voḍhā mūlyakarmakarī khalā || 9 ||
bhartṛ vratātpracalitā na kadācitprajāyate ||
bhavetsaubhāgyasaukhyāḍhyā putrapautraistathāvṛtā ||
āyuṣmatī kīrtimatī ramedvarṣaśatairbhuvi || 4.92.10 ||
ekaṃ raṃbhā vrataṃ cīrṇaṃ gāyatryā svargasaṃsthayā ||
tathā gauryā ca kailāsa indrāṇyā naṃdane vane || 11 ||
śvetadvīpe tathā lakṣmyā rājñyā ca ravimaṃḍale ||
arundhatyā dāruvane svāhayā meruparvate || 12 ||
sītādevyā tvayodhyāyāṃ vedavatyā himācale ||
bhānumatyā nāgapure vratametadanuṣṭhitam|| 13 ||
etadvrataṃ pārthivendra māsi bhādrapade site ||
yā karoti na sā duḥkhaiḥ kadācidapi pīḍyate ||14||
saṃbhinnakandakadalī ca manojñarūpāṃ yāḥ pūjayaṃti kusumākṣatadhūpadīpaiḥ ||
tāsāṃ gṛheṣu na bhavaṃti kadācideva nāryastvanāryacaritā vidhavā virūpāḥ ||15||
iti śrībhaviṣye mahāpurāṇa uttaraparvaṇi śrīkṛṣṇayudhiṣṭhirasaṃvāde rambhāvrataṃ nāma dvinavatitamo.adhyāyaḥ || 92 || || cha ||
āgneyīcaturdaśīvratavarṇanam
|| śrīkṛṣṇa uvāca || ||
caturdaśī mahārāja hutabhugdayitā śubhā ||
naṣṭastadā havyavāhaḥ punarastitvamāptavān || 1 ||
|| yudhiṣṭhira uvāca || ||
kathamagniḥ purā naṣṭo devakāryepyupasthitaḥ ||
kenāgnitvaṃ kṛtaṃ tatra kathaṃ hi vidito.analaḥ ||
etadvadasva deveśa sarvaṃ hi viditaṃ tava || 2 ||
|| śrīkṛṣṇa uvāca || ||
purā surā mahārāja tārakeṇa parājitāḥ ||
apṛcchanviśvakartāraṃ tārakaṃ ko vadhiṣyati || 3 ||
uvācāsau ciraṃ dhyātvā rudromāśukrasambhavaḥ ||
gaṃgāsvāhāgnitejojaḥ śiśurdaityaṃ vadhiṣyati || || 4 ||
evaṃ śrutvā gatā devā yatra śambhuḥ sahomayā ||
praṇamya te tamūcurhi yaduktaṃ brahmaṇā tadā || 5 ||
pratipannaṃ ca rudreṇa umayā sahitena tat ||
prayatnamakarottaṃ ca ya uktomarasattamaiḥ || 6 ||
divyaṃ varṣaśataṃ sāgraṃ gataḥ kālo.atha maithune ||
na cāpyuparamastatra tayorāsītkathañcana ||
bhayaṃ ca sumahatteṣāṃ devānāṃ samajāyata || 7 ||
sa rudrasambhavo yo vai bhaviṣyati mahābalaḥ ||
sa daityāndānavagaṇānvadhiṣyati na saṃśayaḥ || 8 ||
kena kālena bhavati raterviratiretayoḥ ||
etadvicintya prahitau devaistatrānilānalau || 9 ||
gatau tau comayā dṛṣṭau samasthau viṣamasthayā ||
śaśāpa ca ruṣā devī devāngarbhavivarjitā || 4.93.10 ||
yasmāttairjanito vighno me.apatyārthe divaukasām ||
tasmātte sveṣu dāreṣu janayiṣyanti na prajāḥ ||11||
athovāca tadā devo devānsarvagaṇāñchanaiḥ||
agnirgṛhṇātu vīryaṃ me saṃbhṛtaṃ suciraṃ hi yat ||12||
evamukto.atha rudreṇa naṣṭo.agnirdevasaṃkulāt ||
na svastho na bhuvistho vā na sūryastho na bhūtale ||13||
devā anveṣaṇe yatnamakurvannagnidarśane ||
kṛmikīṭapataṃgāśca aṣṭau ca tridivaukasaḥ || 14 ||
haṃsāḥ kekāḥ śukā vahniḥ śīghraṃ śaravaṇaṃ gatāḥ ||
śaśāpāgnirgajā jihvā dviguṇo vā bhaviṣyati || 15 ||
dṛṣṭvātha vibudhāḥ sarve pakṣiṇaṃ pakṣiṇāṃ varam||
jīvaṃ jīvakanāmānaṃ bhobhoḥ satyaṃ vadasva naḥ||16||
kaccidṛṣṭastvayā vahnirvane.asminnaṭatā sadā||
nābhadraṃ nāpi bhadraṃ vā kiñcideva vaco.abravīt ||17||
bhūyobhūyastu pṛṣṭo.api na gāmuccārayecciram||
tuṣṭastasyābravīdvahnirjīvaṃ jīva vadāmi te ||18||
yasmānna kiñciduktaṃ te tasmāccitra tanūruhāḥ ||
jīva jīva punarjīva yāvadicchā tathāyuṣaḥ || 19 ||
dvitīyaṃ te varaṃ dadmo jīvajīvaka śobhanam ||
vyaktā te mānuṣī vācā spaṣṭārthā ca bhaviṣyati || 4.93.20 ||
kaścidyadi tavādhasthādbudhaḥ snānaṃ kariṣyati ||
vaṃdhyā vā ṣoḍaśābdīyā kṣaṇādbālo bhaviṣyati || 21 ||
māsaṃ yaśca tṛtīyaṃ vai bhakṣayiṣyatyaniṃditam ||
ajaraḥ so.amaraścaiva sarvakālaṃ bhaviṣyati || 22 ||
idaṃ dattvā varāṃstasya vahnitvamatha āptavān ||
vibudhā api tatraiva tamadṛśyaṃta vaṃśagam || 23 ||
ūṣmayā jātakalmāṣaṃ jñātvā saṃhṛṣṭamānasaḥ ||
tuṣṭā vaṃśamathocuste devāstribhuvaneśvarāḥ || 24 ||
ūṣmayā kalmaṣībhūya hyagnirgarbhaṃ dhariṣyati ||
yo gṛhī vaiṇavīṃ yaṣṭiṃ brahmacārī ca naiṣṭhikaḥ || 25 ||
paṃḍāgnipālane puṇyaṃ yaddṛṣṭaṃ brahmavādibhiḥ ||
vadaṃtaṃ kalmaṣīyaṣṭistaṃ prāpnoti dvijottamam || 26 ||
vaṃśasyānugrahaṃ kṛtvā devyāhṛtimathābruvan ||
gṛhṇīta śukraṃ bhadrasya tava putro bhaviṣyati || 27 ||
|| yudhiṣṭhira uvāca || ||
yadāgnirnaṣṭo devānāṃ kenāgnitvaṃ tadā kṛtam ||
bhūyo.api kena kālena agniragnitvamāptavān || 28 ||
|| kṛṣṇa uvāca || ||
śṛṇu rājanpranaṣṭe.agnau yenāgnitvaṃ kadācana ||
yasminkāle tithī yasyā punaragnitvamāptavān || 29 ||
utathyāṅgirasoḥ pūrvamāsīdvyatikaro mahān ||
ahaṃ vidyātapobhyāṃ vai tava jyāyāñchrutena ca ||
utathyenaivamuktastu aṅgirāḥ prāha taṃ munim ||4.93.30||
gacchāvo brahmasadanaṃ marīcipramukhairdvijaiḥ ||
upetaṃ cānyamunibhirbrahmarājarṣisattamaiḥ ||
utathyaḥ prāha sadbrahmanṛṣīṃstānstabdhamānasaḥ || 31 ||
jyāyānvā katamosmākamiti naḥ kathyatāṃ sphuṭam || 32 ||
athovāca munirbrahmā tāvubhau kuddhamānasau ||
ānayadhvaṃ drutaṃ gatvā vibudhānbhuvaneśvarān ||33||
tato vivādaṃ paśyāmi bhavatāṃ taiḥ sametya ca ||
tatastau sahitau natvā.a.aninyatuśca ṛṣīṃstadā ||34|| lokapālānmaheṃdrādīnsayamānvāruṇānilān|| sādhyānmarudgaṇānviṣvānṛṣīnbhṛgvagnināradān || || 35|| gaṃdharvānvittarakṣoghnānrākṣasāndaityadānavān ||
nāyātastatra tigmāṃśuḥ sarve cānye samāgatāḥ || 36 ||
dṛṣṭvā tu vibudhānsarvānbrahmā provāca tānṛṣīn ||
ānayadhvamitaḥ sūryaṃ sāmnā daṃḍena vā punaḥ || 37 ||
evamukto gatastāvadutathyaḥ sūryamaṃḍalam ||
sa gatvā prāha mārtaṇḍaṃ śīghramehyeva saṃvidam || 38 ||
sa utathyamathovāca kathaṃ brahmanvrajāmyaham ||
evamuktvā gataḥ sūryo bhuvane mayi nirgate || 39 ||
evamukto muniḥ prāyātsarva devasamāgamam ||
ācacakṣe ca yatproktaṃ bhāsvatā tapanaṃ prati || 4.93.40 ||
uvācāṅgirasaṃ brahmā śīghramenaṃ tvamānaya ||
sa tathokto gatastatra yatrāsau tapate raviḥ || 41 ||
ehyehi bhagavansūrya tapyate bhavatānvaham ||
evamukto gataḥ sūryo yatra devāḥ samāgatāḥ || 42 ||
sthitvā muhūrtaṃ provāca kiṃ vā kāryamupasthitam ||
pṛcchantameva mārtaṃrḍaṃ brahmā provāca sādaram || 43 ||
gaccha śīghraṃ na dahate bhuvanaṃ yāvadaṃgirāḥ ||
labdhaprāyaṃ tu golokaṃ vartate kṛṣṇapiṃgalam || 44 ||
pāṭalo haritaḥ śoṇaḥ śveto varṇaḥ praṇāśitaḥ ||
śākadvīpaṃ kuśadvīpaṃ krauñcadvīpaṃ sapannagam ||
dagdhamaṅgirasā sarvaṃ bhūyo.api pradahiṣyati ||45||
yāvacca dahate sarvaṃ bhuvanaṃ tapasāṃgirāḥ ||
gaccha tāvaditaḥ śīghraṃ svasthāne tapa bhāskara || 46 ||
evamuktaḥ sa vibhunā svasthānamadhirūḍhavān ||
visṛṣṭavānaṃgirasaṃ sakāśamamṛtāśinām || 47 ||
gatvāṅgirā uvācedaṃ gataḥ kiṃ karavāṇyaham ||
devā aṃgirasaṃ prāhustaporāśimakalmaṣam || 48 ||
saṃpraśasyocuragnitvaṃ kuru tāvanmahītale ||
pūrvaṃ yathāgniḥ kṛtavāṃstathā tvamapi sattama || 49 ||
yāvadagniṃ prapaśyāmaḥ kvāsau naṣṭaḥ kva tiṣṭhati ||
evamuktaḥ sa devaistu agnitvaṃ kṛtavāṃstadā || 4.93.50 ||
devairdṛṣṭo yathā hyagnistatte sarvaṃ niveditam ||
devakārye kṛte tasmindevā vahni mathābruvan || 51 ||
agne.agnitvaṃ kuruṣva tvamaṃgirāstu yathā purā ||
evamuktaḥ surairvahniścintayāmāsa duḥkhitaḥ || 52 ||
ko me.apahṛtaṃ tejaḥ kenāgnitvaṃ kṛtaṃ tviha ||
dṛṣṭvāthāgniraṅgirasaṃ tejorāśimakalmaṣam || 53 ||
uvāca muñca matsthānaṃ vacastoṣakaraṃ śṛṇu ||
ahaṃ te tanayaśceṣṭo bhaviṣye prathame śubhe || 54 ||
bṛhaspatīti nāmā vai tathānye bahavaḥ sutāḥ ||
evamukto munistuṣṭo bahūṃścājanayatsutān || 55 ||
vahniṃ saṃjanayāmāsa putrānpautrāṃstadāṃgirāḥ ||
avāpa punaragnitvamagnistasyāṃ tithau nṛpa || 56 ||
sarvameva caturdaśyāṃ saṃjātaṃ havyavāhanam ||
havyavāhana devānāṃ bhūtānāṃ guhyacāritam || 57 ||
tato.aṣṭapatipatve ca rudreṇa pratipāditam ||
pūjiteyaṃ tithirdevairdivisthaiśca nṛpairapi || 58 ||
pailajābālimanvādyairanyaiśca nahuṣādibhiḥ ||
viṣaśastrahatānāṃ ca saṃgrāmenyatra te kvacit || 59 ||
ajñātāvṛṣapāpaiśca vyālairye vyāpya hiṃsitāḥ ||
nadīpravāha patitaḥ samudre parvate.adhvani || 4.93.60 ||
patitāḥ parvatebhyaśca toyāgnidahane mṛtāḥ ||
udadhyā pātitā ye ca ye ke cātmahano janāḥ ||
teṣāṃ śastaṃ caturdaśyāṃ śrāddhaṃ svargasukhapradam ||61 ||
śrāddhāni caiva dattāni dānāni sulaghūnyapi ||
prasūnaphalabhojyāni upatiṣṭhaṃti tānnarān || 62 ||
evaṃ tithiriyaṃ rājannāgneyī procyate janaiḥ ||
raudrīṃ ca kecidityāhū rudrogniḥ sa ca paṭhyate || 63 ||
yasyāṃ manorathaṃ yaṃyaṃ samuddiśya hyupoṣati ||
dadāti tasya tadvahniḥ sāgre saṃvatsare gate || 64 ||
caturdaśyāṃ nirāhāraḥ samabhyarcya trilocanam ||
puṣpadhūpādinaivedyai rātrau jāgaraṇānnaraḥ ||
pañcagavyaṃ niśi prāśya svapyādbhūmau vimatsaraḥ || 65 ||
śyāmākamatha vā bhuktvā tailakṣāravivarjitam ||
homaḥ kṛṣṇatilaiḥ kāryaḥ śatamaṣṭottaraṃ nṛpa || || 66 ||
agnaye havyavāhanāya somāyāṃgirase namaḥ ||
tataḥ prabhāte vimale snāpya paṃcāmṛtaiḥ śivam || 67 ||
pūjayitvā vidhānena homaṃ kṛtvā tathaiva ca ||
udīrayenmantrametaṃ kṛtvā śirasi cāṃjalim || 68 ||
namastrimūrtaye tubhyaṃ namaḥ sūryāgnirūpiṇe ||
putrānyaccha sukhaṃ yaccha mokṣaṃ yaccha namo.astu te || 69 ||
nīrājanaṃ tataḥ kṛtvā paścādbhuṃjīta vāgyataḥ ||
evaṃ saṃvatsarasyāṃte kṛtvā sarvaṃ yathoditam || 4.93.70 ||
sauvarṇaṃ kārayeddevaṃ trinetraṃ śūlapāṇinam ||
vṛṣaskaṃdhagataṃ saumyaṃ sitavastrayugānvitam || 71 ||
candanenānuliptāṅgaṃ sitamālyopaśobhitam ||
sthāpayitvā tāmrapātre brāhmaṇāya nivedayet ||
sarvakālikametatte kathitaṃ vratamuttamam || 72 ||
saṃvatsaraṃ samāptaṃ hi vratasya tu yadā bhavet ||
kāle gate bahutithe tīrthasya śaraṇaṃ bhavet ||
mṛtasya deho divyastho divyālaṃkārabhūṣitaḥ ||73||
divyanārīgaṇavṛto vimānavaramāsthitaḥ||
devadaivaiḥ samaḥ śaṃbhoḥ krīḍati tripure ciram || || 74 ||
iha cāgatya kālāṃte jātaḥ sa ca nṛpo bhavet ||
dātā yajvā dhanī dakṣo brāhmaṇo brāhmaṇapriyaḥ || 75 ||
śrīmānvāgmī kṛtī dhīmānputrapautrasamanvitaḥ ||
patnīgaṇasamrāyuktaściraṃ bhadrāṇi paśyati || 76||
ye durllabhā bhuvi suroragamānavānāṃ kāmā hyanuttamaguṇena yutāḥ sadaiva ||
tānā pnuvaṃti sitabhūtatithau sureśaṃ saṃpūjya somatilakaṃ vidhivanmanuṣyāḥ || 77 || iti śrībhaviṣye mahāpurāṇa uttaraparvaṇi śrīkṛà¥ṣṇayudhiṣṭhirasaṃvāde āgneyīcaturdaśīvratavarṇanaṃ nāma trinavatitamo.adhyāyaḥ || 93 ||
|| śrīkṛṣṇa uvāca || ||
anaṃtavratamastyanyatsarvapāpaharaṃ śivam ||
sarvakāmapradaṃ nṛṇāṃ strīṇāṃ caiva yudhiṣṭhira || 1 ||
śuklapakṣe caturdaśyāṃ māsi bhādrapade śubhe ||
tasyānuṣṭhānamātreṇa sarvapāpaiḥ pramucyate || 2 ||
|| yudhiṣṭhira uvāca || ||
kṛṣṇa ko.ayaṃ tvayākhyāto hyanaṃta iti viśrutaḥ ||
kiṃ śeṣanāga āhosvidanaṃtastakṣakaḥ smṛtaḥ || 3 ||
paramātmātha vānaṃta utāho brahma ucyate ||
ka eṣo.anaṃtasaṃjño vai tathyaṃ brūhi keśava || 4 ||
|| śrīkṛṣṇa uvāca || ||
anaṃta ityahaṃ pārtha mama nāma nibodhaya ||
ādityādiṣu vāreṣu yaḥ kāla upapadyate || 5 ||
kalākāṣṭhāmuhūrtādi dinarātriśarīravān ||
pakṣamāsartuvarṣādi yugakalpavyavasthayā || 6 ||
yo.ayaṃ kālo mayākhyātastava dharmabhṛtāṃ vara ||
so.ahaṃ kālo.avatīrṇo.atra bhuvo bhārāvatāraṇāt || 7 ||
dānavānāṃ vināśāya vasudevakulodbhavam ||
māṃ viddhyanaṃtaṃ pārtha tvaṃ viṣṇuṃ jiṣṇuṃ haraṃ śivam|| 8 ||
brahmāṇaṃ bhāskaraṃ śeṣaṃ sarvavyāpinamīśvaram ||
viśvarūpaṃ mahātmānaṃ sṛṣṭisaṃhārakārakam || 9 ||
pratyayārthaṃ mayākhyātaṃ so.ahaṃ pārtha na saṃśayaḥ ||
|| yudhiṣṭhira uvāca || ||
anantavratamāhātmyavidhiṃ vada vidāṃ vara || 10 ||
kiṃ puṇyaṃ kiṃ phalaṃ cāsya hyanuṣṭhānavatāṃ nṛṇām||
kena vādau purā cīrṇaṃ martye kena prakāśitam || 11 ||
evaṃ samastaṃ vistārya brūhyanaṃtavrataṃ hare ||
|| śrīkṛṣṇa uvāca || ||
āsītpurā kṛtayuge sumaṃto nāma vai dvijaḥ ||12||
vaśiṣṭhagotre cotpannaḥ surūpaśca bhṛgoḥ sutām ||
dīkṣāṃ nāmopayeme tāṃ vedoktavidhinā tataḥ ||13||
tasyāḥ kālena saṃjātā duhitānaṃtalakṣaṇā ||
śīlā nāma suśīlā sā vardhate pitṛsadmani || 14 ||
mātā ca tasyāḥ kālena haradāhena pīḍitā ||
vinanāśa nadītīre mṛtā svargapuraṃ yayau||15||
sumaṃtopi tatonyāṃ vai dharmapuṃsaḥ sutāṃ punaḥ ||
upayeme vidhānena karkaśāṃ nāma nāmataḥ||16||
duḥśīlāṃ karkaśāṃ caṃḍīṃ nityaṃ kalahakāriṇīm ||
sāpi śīlā piturgehe gṛhārcanaratā vibho || 17 ||
kuḍyastaṃbhatulādhāradehalītoraṇādiṣu ||
cāturvarṇakaraṃ vaiśyanīlapītasitāsitaiḥ ||18||
svastikaiḥ śaṃkhapadmaiśca arcayantī punaḥpunaḥ ||
pitrā dṛṣṭā sumantena strīcihnā yauvane sthitā ||19||
kasmai deyā mayā śīlā vicāryaivaṃ suduḥkhitaḥ ||
pitā dadau munīndrāya kauṃḍinyāya śubhe dine || 20 ||
smṛtyuktaśāstravidhinā vivāhamakarottadā ||
nivartyodvāhikaṃ sarvaṃ proktavānkarkaśāṃ dvijaḥ || 21 ||
kiñcidāyādikaṃ deyaṃ jāmātuḥ pāritoṣikam ||
tacchrutvā karkaśā kruddhā proddhṛtya gṛhamaṇḍapam||22||
kapāṭe susthiraṃ kṛtvā gamyatāmityuvāca ha ||
bhojyāvaśiṣṭacūrṇena pātheyaṃ ca cakāra sā ||23||
kauṃḍinyopi vivāhyaināṃ pathi gacchañchanaiḥśanaiḥ||
śīlāṃ suśīlāmādāya navoḍhāṃ gorathena hi || 24 ||
madhyāhne bhojyavelāyāṃ samuttīrya sarittaṭe ||
dadarśa śīlā sā strīṇāṃ samūhaṃ raktavāsasām|| || 25 ||
caturdaśyāmarcayantaṃ bhaktyā devaṃ pṛthakpṛthak ||
upagamya śanaiḥ śīlā papraccha strīkadaṃbakam|| 26 ||
nāryaḥ kimetanme brūta kiṃnāma vratamīdṛśam ||
tā ūcuryoṣitaḥ sarvā ananto nāma viśrutaḥ || 27 ||
sābravīdahamapyevaṃ kariṣye vratamuttamam ||
vidhānaṃ kīdṛśaṃ tatra kiṃ dānaṃ kasya pūjanam || 28 ||
|| striya ūcuḥ || ||
śīle pakvānnaprasthasya punnāmnaḥ sukṛtasya tu ||
arddhaṃ viprāya dātavyamarddhamātmani bhojanam || 29 ||
kartavyaṃ tu sarittīre kathāṃ śrutvā harerimām ||
anaṃtānaṃtamabhyarcya maṃḍale gaṃdhadīpakaiḥ || 30 ||
dhūpaiḥ puṣpaiḥ sanaivedyaiḥ pītālaktaiścatuḥśataiḥ ||
tasyāgrato dṛḍhaṃ sūtraṃ kuṃkumāktaṃ sudorakam || 31 ||
caturdaśagraṃthiyutaṃ vāme strī dakṣiṇe pumān ||
maṃtreṇānena rājendra yāvadvarṣaṃ samāpyate || 32 ||
anaṃta saṃsāramahāsamudre magnānsamabhyuddhara vāsudeva ||
anaṃtarūpe viniyojitātmā hyanaṃtarūpāya namonamaste || 33 ||
anena dorakaṃ baddhvā bhoktavyaṃ svasthamānasaiḥ ||
dhyātvā nārāyaṇaṃ devamanaṃtaṃ viśvarūpiṇam || 34 ||
bhuktvā cāṃte vrajedveśma hīdaṃ proktaṃ vrataṃ tava ||
sāpi śrutvā vrataṃ cakre śīlā baddhvā sudorakam || 35 ||
bhartā tasyāḥ samāgatya tāṃ dadarśa mahādhanām ||
pātheyaśeṣaṃ viprāya dattvā bhuktvā tathaiva ca || 36 ||
punarjagāma sā hṛṣṭā gorathena svamāśramam ||
bhartrā sahaiva śanakaiḥ pratyakṣaṃ tatkṣaṇādabhūt ||
tenānaṃtaprabhāveṇa śubhagodhanasaṃkulaḥ || 37 ||
gṛhāśramaḥ śriyā yukto dhanadhānyasamāyutaḥ ||
ākulo vyākulo ramyaḥ sarvatrātithipūjanaḥ || 38 ||
sāpi māṇikyakāñcībhirmuktāhāravibhūṣitā ||
divyāṃgavastrasaṃchannā sāvitrīpratimābhavat || 39 ||
kadācidupaviṣṭena dṛṣṭaṃ baddhaṃ sudorakam ||
śīlāyā hastamūle tu sākṣepaṃ troṭitaṃ ruṣā || 40 ||
tena karmavipākeṇa tasya sā śrīḥ kṣayaṃ gatā ||
godhanaṃ taskarairnītaṃ gṛhaṃ cāgnividāhitam || 41 ||
yadyadevāgataṃ gehe tatra tatraiva naśyati ||
svajanaiḥ kalaho mitrairvacanaṃ na janaistathā || 42 ||
anaṃtākṣepadoṣeṇa dāridryaṃ patitaṃ gṛhe ||
na kaścidvadate lokastena sārddhaṃ yudhiṣṭhira || 43 ||
tato jagāma kauṃḍinyo nirvedādvanagahvaram ||
manasā dhyāyatenaṃtaṃ kadā drakṣyāmi keśavam || 44 ||
vrataṃ niraśanaṃ gṛhya brahmacaryaṃ japanharim ||
vihvalaḥ prayayau pārtha araṇyaṃ janavarjitam||45||
tatrāpaśyanmahāvṛkṣaṃ phalitaṃ puṣpitaṃ tathā ||
tamapṛcchattvayānaṃtaḥ kaccidṛṣṭo mahādruma ||
tadbrūhi sopyuvācedaṃ nānaṃtaṃ vedmyahaṃ dvija || 46 ||
evaṃ nirīkṣitastena gāṃ dadarśa savatsakām ||
tṛṇamadhye pradhāvantīmitaścetaśca pāṃḍava ||47||
sobravīddhenuke brūhi yadyanaṃtastvayekṣitaḥ ||
gauruvācātha kauṃḍinya nānaṃtaṃ vedmyahaṃ vibho || 48 ||
tato jagāmātha vane govṛṣaṃ śādvale sthitam ||
dṛṣṭvā papraccha gosvāminnanaṃto lakṣitastvayā || 49 ||
govṛṣastamuvācātha nānanto vīkṣito mayā ||
tato vrajandadarśāgre ramyaṃ puṣkariṇīdvayam || 50 ||
anyonyajalakallolavīcibhiḥ pariśobhitam ||
channaṃ kumudakahlāraiḥ kumudotpalamaṃḍitam || 51 ||
sevitaṃ bhramarairhaṃsaiścakraiḥ kāraṃḍavairbakaiḥ ||
te apṛcchaṃ dvijonanto bhavadbhyāṃ nopalakṣitaḥ || 52 ||
ūcatuḥ puṣkariṇyau taṃ nānaṃtaṃ vidvahe dvija ||
tato brahmandadarśāgre gardabhaṃ kuñjaraṃ tathā || 53 ||
tāvapyuktau sumaṃtena tasyāpi viniveditam ||
nāvābhyāṃ vīkṣitonaṃtastacchrutvā niṣasāda ha || 54 ||
tasminkṣaṇe munivare kauṃḍinye brāhmaṇottame ||
kṛpayānaṃtadevopi pratyakṣaḥ samajāyata || || 55 ||
vṛddhabrāhmaṇarūpeṇa ita ehītyuvāca tam ||
praveśayitvā svagṛhaṃ gṛhītvā dakṣiṇe kare || 56 ||
tāṃ purīṃ darśayāmāsa divyanārīnarairyutām ||
tasyāṃ niviṣṭamātmānaṃ varasiṃhāsane nṛpa || 57 ||
pārśvasthaśaṃkhacakrāsigadāgaruḍaśobhitam ||
darśayāmāsa viprāya pūrvoktaṃ viśvarūpiṇam|| 58 ||
vibhūtibhedaiścānantamanantaṃ parameśvaram ||
taṃ dṛṣṭvā tu dvijonantamuvāca parayā mudā || 59 ||
pāpohaṃ pāpakarmāhaṃ pāpātmā pāpasambhavaḥ ||
pāhi māṃ puṇḍarīkākṣa sarvapāpaharo bhava ||60||
adya me saphalaṃ janma jīvitaṃ ca sujīvitam ||
cūtavṛkṣo vṛṣaḥ kastu kā gauḥ puṣkariṇīdvayam ||
gardabhaṃ kuñjaraṃ caiva deva me brūhi tattvataḥ || 61 ||
|| anaṃta uvāca || ||
cūtavṛkṣo hi viprosau vidvānyo vedagarvitaḥ ||
vidyādānaṃ nopakurvañchiṣyebhyastarutāṃ gataḥ || 62 ||
sā gaurvasundharā dṛṣṭā niṣphalā yā tvayekṣitā ||
sa harṣo vṛṣabho dṛṣṭo lābhārthaṃ yastvayā vṛtaḥ || 63 ||
dharmādharmavyavasthānaṃ tacca puṣkariṇīdvayam ||
kharaḥ krodhastvayā dṛṣṭaḥ kuṃjaro dharmadūṣakaḥ ||
brāhmaṇosāvanaṃtohaṃ guhāsaṃsāragahvare || 64 ||
ityuktaṃ te mayā sarvaṃ vipra gaccha punargṛham || 65 ||
carānaṃtavrataṃ tattvaṃ nava varṣāṇi paṃca ca ||
tatastuṣṭaḥ pradāsyāmi nakṣatrasthānamuttamam || 66 ||
bhuktvā ca vipulānbhogānsarvānkāmānyathepsitān ||
putrapautraiḥ parivṛtastato mokṣamavāpsyasi||67||
iti dattvā varaṃ devastatraivāṃtarhito.abhavat||
kauṃḍinyopyāgato gehaṃ cacārānaṃtasadvratam || 68 ||
śīlayā saha dharmātmā bhuktvā bhogānmanoramān||
aṃte jagāma ca svargaṃ nakṣatraṃ ca punarvasum ||
kalpasthānī ca saṃbhūto dṛśyatedyāpi sa jvalan| ||
anaṃtavratadharmeṇa samyakcīṇeṃna kaurava || 70 ||
etatte kathitaṃ pārtha vratānāmuttamaṃ vratam ||
yatkṛtvā sarvapāpebhyo mucyate nātra saṃśayaḥ || 71 ||
ye ca śṛṇvaṃti satataṃ vācyamānaṃ narottama ||
te sarve pāpanirmuktā yāsyaṃti paramāṃ gatim || 72 ||
saṃsārasāgaraguhāṃ susukhaṃ vihartuṃ vāṃchaṃti ye kurukulodbhava śuddhasattvāḥ ||
saṃpūjya te tribhuvaneśamanaṃtadevaṃ badhnaṃti dakṣiṇakare varadorakaṃ me || 73 ||
iti śrībhaviṣye mahā.apurāṇa uttaraparvaṇi śrīkṛṣṇayudhiṣṭhirasaṃvāde.ānaṃtacaturdaśīvratavarṇanaṃ nāma caturnavatitamo.adhyāyaḥ || 94 || cha ||
śabdakalpadruma ---
araṇyavāsamuṣito yudhiṣṭhiranṛpo vaśī |
prāptastrailokyanāthena kṛṣṇena paramātmanā ||
kathopakathanaṃ jātaṃ tayostatra priyāpriyaṃ |
viśeṣeṇa ca govindaṃ papraccha ca yudhiṣṭhiraḥ ||
yudhiṣṭhira uvāca |
kena vratena deveśa vāñchitaṃ prāpyate phalaṃ |
niṣpāpāḥ sakalā lokāḥ bhavanti janmajanmani ||
śrīkṛṣṇa uvāca |
asti vratamanantākhyaṃ yatkṛtaṃ surasadmani |
indrādyairlokapālaiśca tanma kathayataḥ śṛṇu |
śuklapakṣe caturdaśyāṃ māsi bhādrapade tathā |
tasyānuṣṭhānamātreṇa sarvvapāpaṃ praṇaśyati ||
|| yudhiṣṭhira uvāca |
kṛṣṇa ko.ayaṃ tvayākhyāto yo.ananta iti saṃjñitaḥ
ko.ayaṃ śeṣaśca nāgaśca anantastakṣakaḥ smṛtaḥ ||
paramañcottamaṃ vāpi utāho brahma ucyate |
ka eṣo.anantasaṃjño vai tanme brūhi janārddana ||
śrīkṛṣṇa uvāca |
ananta ityahaṃ pārtha mama rūpaṃ nibodha tat |
ādityagatirūpeśa yaḥ kāla upapadyate ||
kalākāṣṭhāmuhūrttādi dinarātrivyavasthayā |
pakṣo māsa ṛturvvarṣaṃ yugakalpavyavasthayā ||

so.ahaṃ kālo.avatīrṇo.asmi bhuvo bhārāvatāraṇāt |
dānavānāṃ vināśāya vasudevatanūdbhavaṃ |!
anantaṃ viddhi māṃ pārtha kṛṣṇaṃ viṣṇuṃ hariṃ śivaṃ
brahmāṇaṃ bhāskaraṃ śeṣaṃ sarvvavyāpinamīśvaraṃ |
pratyayārthaṃ mayā pārtha viśvarūpaṃ nibotha tat |
pūrvameva mahābāho yogidhyeyamanuttamaṃ || ||
yudhiṣṭhira uvāca |
anantavratamāhātmyaṃ vidhiṃ vidhividāṃ vara |
kiṃ puṇyaṃ kiṃ phalaṃ tasya anuṣṭhānañca tasya kiṃ ||
kena vā tatkṛtaṃ pūrvvaṃ loke kena prakāśitaṃ |
tatsarvvaṃ bahu.a vistāryya brūhi nārāyaṇa prabho ||
|| śrīkṛṣṇa uvāca |
āsītpurā kṛtayuge sumanturnāma vai dvijaḥ |
vaśiṣṭhagotrajo vidvān śīlavān vijitendriyaḥ ||
patnī tasyābhavaddīkṣā satī satyavrate sthitā |
cāritraśīlasampannā surūpā bhṛguvaṃśajā ||
tasyāḥ kālena saṃjātā duhitā sarvvalakṣaṇā |
śīlā nāmnā suśīlā sā varddhate pitṛveśmani ||
mātā tasyāstu kālena jvaradāhaprapīḍitā |
samāgatya nadītoye mṛtā svargapuraṃ yayau ||
kṛtaṃ sumantunā tasyāḥ karmma yat pāralaukikaṃ |
tataḥ sumantuḥ saṃtyajya duḥkhaṃ śokaṃ kramāt punaḥ
nāpatnīko gṛhī dharmmaṃ karttumarhati vai kvacit |
iti sañcintya manasā vivāhotsukamānasaḥ ||
devalasya muneḥ kanyāṃ karkaśāṃ pariṇītavān |
sā karkaśātiduḥśīlā sadā niṣṭhurabhāṣiṇī ||
kopanā pratikūlā ca nirlajjā kalahapriyā |
adakṣā gṛhṛkṛtyeṣu dakṣā bhojanakarmmaṇi ||
kalahena tu santuṣṭā ruṣṭā bandhujanān prati |
sā tu śīlā piturgehe varddhitā ca dine dine ||
karoti sakhibhiḥ sārddhaṃ śiśukrīḍāmanuttamāṃ |
gṛhāntarasthaladvāradehalītoraṇādiṣu |
caturaṅgakavarṇaiśca raktapītasitāsitaiḥ |
svastikaṃ padmaśaṅkhau ca maṇḍayantī punaḥ punaḥ ||
kurvvantī pratyahaṃ bālā devatātithipūjanaṃ |
gṛhakṛtye sadā dakṣā pituratyantavallabhā ||
kālena kiyatā viprastāṃ dṛṣṭvā yauvanodgatāṃ |
kasmai deyā mayā kanyā iti cintānvito.abhavat||
tato davavaśāttatra kauṇḍinyaḥ samupāgataḥ |
muniśreṣṭho mahābhāgaḥ kulīno dharmatatparaḥ ||
manasā cintayāmāsa sumantuḥ sutapāḥ sudhīḥ |
asmai bhāgyavaśācchīlā pratipādyā prayatnataḥ ||
iti kṛtvā matiṃ vipro dadau kanyāṃ śubhe dine |
kanyāmalaṅkṛtāṃ sādhvīṃ śīlāṃ candranibhānanāṃ ||
gṭahyoktavedavidhinā vivāhamakarottadā |
tato homādikaṃ karmma samāpya samaye muniḥ ||
sumantuḥ karkaśāṃ prāha jāmātre dehi dakṣiṇāṃ
saphalaṃ kuru me dānaṃ priye munikulodbhave |
dakṣiṇārahitaṃ karmma niṣphalaṃ jāyate yataḥ |
sā tu tadvacanaṃ śrutvā karkaśā kupitābhavat |
sumantuṃ bhartsayāmāsa karkaśairvvacanaiḥ patiṃ |
alaṅkāraṃ samānīya svakīyañcāpi bandhanaṃ ||
nikṣipya nibhṛte sthāne karkaśānyagṛhṛṃ yayau |
sumantuścātidīnātmā lajjitaścābhavattadā ||
yatkiñcidarthayogyañca dravyamānīya yautukaṃ |
jāmātre pradadau vipraḥ paricāryya punaḥ punaḥ ||
tato vivāhaṃ nirvvartya kauṇḍinyo.api nijāśramaṃ |
goyāne tāṃ samāropya śīlāmādāya vai yayau
tataḥ sā pathi gacchantī śīlā candranibhānanā
madhyāhne bhojyavelāyāṃ samuttīryya sarittaṭe ||
dadarśa śīlā nārīṇāṃ samūhaṃ vratacāriṇāṃ |
puṃsāṃ vṛndañca tatreva raktapītāmbarāsanaṃ ||
caturddaśyāmarcayantaṃ bhaktyānantaṃ pṛthak pṛthak |
dṛṣṭvā samūhaṃ nārīṇāṃ satī papraccha sādaraṃ ||
vinayāvanatā sādhvī praṇipatya sureśvaraṃ |
kimidaṃ kriyate kāryyaṃ bhavatībhistaducyatāṃ ||
striya ūcuḥ |
bhādre māsi site pakṣe utthite vāsavadhvaje |
ārādhite mahendre ca dhvajākārāsu yaṣṭiṣu ||
natvā sarasi yaḥ snātvā anantārccanamārabhet |
kṛtvā darbhamayaṃ devaṃ vārivājasamanvitaṃ ||
anantaṃ devadeveśaṃ caturbbāhuṃ kirīṭinaṃ |
atasīpuṣpasaṃkāśaṃ kāñcanāṅgadabhūṣaṇaṃ ||
śaṅkhacakragadāśārṅgaṃ vividhāyudhadhāriṇaṃ |
ehyehi bhagavan kṛṣṇa tava yajñaḥ pravarttate ||
vāridhānyāṃ tathānantaṃ bhagavantaṃ niyojayet |
maṇḍale puṣpanevedyaṃ dhūpavastrānulepanaṃ ||
dattvā ca pūjayedbhaktyā anantaṃ viśvarūpiṇaṃ |
piṣṭakārthaṃ vrīhicūrṇaṃ yavagodhūmayośca vā ||
eteṣāṃ prāpyate yattu tadgrāhyaṃ prasthasaṃjñitaṃ |
arddhaṃ viprāya dātavyamarddhamātmani yojayet ||
pūjayitvā tathā devaṃ gandhapuṣpairyathākramaṃ |
śrutvā kathāṃ tatastasya kuṅkamāktaṃ suḍorakaṃ ||
caturdaśagranthiyuktaṃ nārī vāmakare nyaset |
pumāṃstu dakṣiṇe bāhau tadānantaṃ prapūjayet ||
nirvvarttya pūjāṃ devasya pūpaṃ bhuktvā yathāsukhaṃ |
visṛjya dakṣiṇāṃ dattvā praṇamya ca yathāsukhaṃ ||
śīlā śrutvā vacastāsāṃ yathā tābhirudāhṛtaṃ |
vrataṃ cakāra sā bāhau vaddhā ḍorakamuttamaṃ |
pūpaprasthañca sāṃ kṛtvā bhuktvā caiva tathaiva ca |
punarjagāma tenaiva gorathena samanvitā ||
tenānantaprasādena gṛhaṃ godhanasaṅkulaṃ |
tadāśramaṃ śriyā yuktaṃ dhanadhānyasamanvitaṃ ||
vividhātithisampūrṇaṃ nānāratnairvibhūṣitaṃ |
varāśvamattamātaṅgamahiṣairgodhanānvitaṃ ||
śīlā ca maṇikāñcībhirmuktābharaṇabhūṣitā |
divyāṅgī śīlasampannā sāvitrīpratimā yathā ||
kadācidupaviṣṭā sā vahnikuṇḍaṃ samāgatā |
kauṇḍinyo.api viśedroṣāt dṛṣṭvā ḍoramanantakaṃ |
śolāyāḥ karamūle ca baddhameva prayatnataḥ |
papraccha krodhavacasā bhṛkuṭīkuṭilaṃ mukhaṃ ||
kimidaṃ ḍorakaṃ haste baddhvā bhāryye.atra tiṣṭhasi |
prameyaḥ kasya devasya durbbuddhe brūhi satvaraṃ |5||
śīlovāca |
anantaṃ devadevasya prameyaṃ ḍorakaṃ śubhaṃ |
kare baddhaṃ vidhānena śṛṇu me vacanaṃ prabho ||
prasādād yasya devasya bhuṅkte suvipulaṃ dhanaṃ |
na jānāsi kathaṃ nātha tadevaṃ jagadīśvaraṃ ||
śīlāvākyaṃ tataḥ śrutvā kauṇḍinyaḥ kupito.abhavat |
ko.asāvanantasaṃjño vai na śruto.api varānane |
ityutvākṛṣya kupito bhujāḍḍoramanantakaṃ |
kṣiptaṃ jvālākule vahnau nirbhartsya bahudhā priyāṃ ||
tataḥ sā saṃbhramāt śīlā hāhā kṛtvā pradhāvitā
vahneḥ sūtraṃ samādāya kṣīramadhye tato.akṣipat ||
tatastayā kare vāme punarbaddhaṃ suḍorakaṃ |
anantākṣepadoṣeṇa dāridryaṃ patitaṃ gṛhe ||
na kaiścit varṇyate lokaiḥ so.api vipro yudhiṣṭhira |
gātre malinatā prāptā cakṣurnidrāṃ tathaiva ca ||
śūnyāni gṛharūpāṇi dagdhāni vahninā kvacit |
nirīkṣya svapuraṃ vipraścintayāmāsa cetasā ||
atha śīlā vivarṇā sā duḥkhitā patidoṣataḥ;
vicacāra purīṃ sarvvāṃ śūnyāgārasamanvitāṃ ||
atha kauṇḍinyaviprasya saṃjātā buddhiruttamā |
mamāpi duṣkṛtaṃ karmma kṛtaṃ vā me vigarhitaṃ ||
anantākṣepadoṣeṇa mamāpi gatirīdṛśī |
anantaṃ yatra paśyāmi tatra yāsyāmi durmatiḥ ||
tato jagāma kauṇḍinyo vanaṃ vyāghrādisaṅkulaṃ |
vratasyānveṣaṇaṃ karttuṃ pādau draṣṭuṃ tathā hareḥ ||
vihvalaḥ sa yayau mārge janajantuvivarjjite |
tatrāpaśyacca taṃ vṛkṣaṃ phalapuṣpasamanvitaṃ ||
varjitaṃ pakṣisaṅghātaiḥ kīṭaiścaiva viśeṣataḥ |
tamapṛcchat tvayānantaḥ kvaciddṛṣṭo mahādruma ||
sa covāca mahāvṛkṣo nānantaṃ vedmi bho dvija
tato gacchan dadarśāgre tṛṇamadhye savatsikāṃ ||
tṛṇamadhye pradhāvanto na khādati na jighrati |
he mahādhenuke brūhi kimanantastvayekṣitaḥ ||
savatsā tamuvācātha nānantaṃ vedmi he dvija |
tato gacchan dadarśāgre vṛṣaśreṣṭhaṃ vane sthitaṃ ||
tamapṛcchadayaṃ vipraḥ ananto vīkṣitastvayā |
vṛṣabhastamuvācedaṃ viṣaṇṇaṃ brāhmaṇaṃ prati ||
yadyanantamahaṃ jāne tadā me gatirīdṛśī |
tato vrajan dadarśāgre gardabhaṃ kuñjaraṃ tathā ||
nānāmāyāpracarantaṃ madagarjjanadarpitaṃ |
sa taṃ dṛṣṭvā dvijo.arṛcchadanantaṃ dṛṣṭavān kimu |
pratyuttaramuvācedaṃ nānantaṃ vedmi he dvija |
tato vrajan dadarśāgre ramyaṃ puṣkariṇīdvayaṃ ||
anyonyajalasaṃghātairvvīcibhirupaśobhitaṃ |
śubhaiḥ kumudakahlāraiḥ kamalotpalaśobhitaṃ |
bhramaraiścakravākaiśca haṃsakāraṇḍavairyutaṃ |
tamapṛcchat dvijo.ananto bhavatībhyāñca lakṣitaḥ ||
puṣkariṇyāvūcatusta na jānīvo hariṃ kvacit |
nipapāta tato vipro hāhā kṛtvā rudan bhuvi ||
kiṃ karomi kva gacchāmi kathaṃ paśyāmi taṃ vibhuṃ |
tataḥ kṛpālu hṛdayo deveśo devapūjitaḥ ||
tatkṣaṇādbhagavān viṣṇurdvijapratyakṣamāgataḥ |
vṛddhabrāhmaṇarūpeṇa provāca vacanaṃ dvijaṃ ||
uttiṣṭhottiṣṭha viprendra tyaja duḥkhaṃ sukhī bhava |
anantaṃ darśayiṣyāmi kṛṣṇaṃ viṣṇuṃ hariṃ śivaṃ ||
brāhmaṇaṃ taṃ samādāya pātālavartmanā purīṃ |
tāṃ purīṃ darśayāmāsa tataścāntardadhe dvijaḥ |
sa tāṃ dadarśa kauṇḍinyaḥ purīṃ trailokyadurllabhāṃ
divyanārīnarairyuktāṃ maṇiratnavibhūṣitāṃ ||
suvarṇaracitāṃ sarvvāṃ veṣṭitāṃ takṣakādibhiḥ |
tatrāpaśyat sa kauṇḍinyo devadevamanantakaṃ ||
viśvarūpaṃ jagannāthaṃ caturbbāhuṃ kirīṭinaṃ |
śaṅkhacakragadāpadmadhāriṇaṃ garuḍadhvajaṃ ||
dakṣiṇe vilasallakṣmīṃ vāme krīḍatsarasvatīṃ |
saptaphaṇāsamāyuktaṃ divyasiṃhāsanesthitaṃ |
evaṃ rūpaṃ jagannāthaṃ dṛṣṭvā bhaktyā stutiḥ kṛtā |
jagāma bhūmau śirasā anantasya samīpataḥ ||
namo.astvanantāya sahasramūrttaye sahasrapādākṣiśirorubāhave |
sahasranāmne puruṣāya śāśvate sahasrakoṭīyugadhāriṇe namaḥ ||
ajñānena mayā deva yat kṛtaṃ pāpakarmaṇā |
tatsarvvaṃ kṛpayā śaṃsa kṣamasva madhusūdana || ||
atha kauṇḍinyaviprasya stutiṃ śrutvā janārddanaḥ |
prasanno bhagavāndevaścānanto.anantarūpadhṛk ||
kathaṃ me priyamākhyātamihāgaccheti bhūsura ||7 ||
ananta uvāca |
tuṣṭo.ahaṃ brāhmaṇaśreṣṭha bhaktyā tava viśeṣataḥ |
varaṃ gṛhāṇa viprendra tuṣṭo.asmi tyaja vismayaṃ ||
| kauṇḍinya uvāca |
svakarmmaphalabhogena yāṃ yāṃ yoniṃ vrajāmyahaṃ |
tasyāṃ tasyāṃ hṛṣīkeśa haribhaktirdṛḍhāstu me ||
atipramādānmohādvā yanmayā duṣkṛtaṃ kṛtaṃ |
tadāgaḥ kṣamyatāṃ nātha praṇamāmi punaḥ punaḥ ||
śrutvānantastu tadvākyaṃ dadau tasmai varatrayaṃ |
dāridranāśanaṃ dharmmaṃ viṣṇulokaṃ tathākṣayaṃ |0||
kauṇḍinya uvāca |
pūrṇo manoratho deva mama cādya viśeṣataḥ |
kicit pṛcchāmi deveśa tanme brūhi jagatpate ||
kaścūtaḥ ko vṛṣaḥ kā gauḥ kintat puṣkariṇīdvayaṃ |
kaḥ kharaḥ kuñjaraḥ ko vā ko vā vṛddhadvijottamaḥ |
kṛpayā kathayasvādya pathi dṛṣṭo mayā vibho |
śrīananta uvāca |
yaścāmravṛkṣo dṛṣṭo hi vipro vidyāsu garvvitaḥ |
upasthitāya śiṣyāya vidyāṃ yasmānna dattavān |
tena karmmavipākena vṛkṣatvaṃ prāpya tiṣṭhati |
vṛṣabho yastvayā dṛṣṭo lobhakarmmakṛtaḥ purā ||
dattaṃ paryyuṣitaṃ dravyaṃ svādu bhuktaṃ svayaṃ yataḥ |
vṛṣabhatvaṃ samāsādya tatastiṣṭhati nirjjane ||
viprāya vasudhāṃ dattvā niṣphalāṃ śasyavarjjitāṃ |
tenāsau gotvamāsādya tṛṇamadhye pradhāvati ||
dharmmādharmmau vijānīyādyattat puṣkariṇīdvayaṃ |
gardabho.ajñānasampannaḥ kuñjaro madagarvitaḥ ||
brāhmaṇo.asāvananto.ahaṃ yastvayā darśito mune |
etatte kathitaṃ sarvvaṃ gaccha vipra nijāśramaṃ ||
punaḥ samṛddhiste vipra bhaviṣyati na saṃśayaḥ |
bhuktvā bhogāṃśca vipulān saṃprāpsyasi mahat padaṃ ||
iti dattvā varaṃ tasmai tatraivāntaradhīyata |
kauṇḍinyo.ayi gṛhaṃ gatvā karoti vratamuttamaṃ ||
anantākhyaṃ mahāpuṇyaṃ varṣāṇāñca caturdaśaṃ |
śīlayā saha dharmmātmā sukhaṃ bhuktvā manorathān ||
viṣṇurokaṃ samāsādya rarāja śīlayā saha |
anantākhyavrateneha samāptenaiva pārthiva ||
sarvvapāpavinirmmuktā yāsyanti paramāṃ gatiṃ |
evameva hi niyamāt striyo.anantavratānnṛpa ||
puà¥trapautradhanairyuktā bhuktvā bhogān manorathān |
viṣṇulokamāpnuvanti yāvaccandradivākarau ||
iti bhaviṣyapurāṇe anantavrataṃ samāptaṃ |

śravaṇikāvratam
|| yudhiṣṭhira uvāca || ||
loke prasiddhāḥ śrūyaṃte śrāvaṇyo nāma devatāḥ ||
etāḥ kāḥ kiṃ ca kurvaṃti dharmaṃ cāsāṃ bravīhi me || 1 ||
|| śrīkṛṣṇa uvāca || ||
vidyaṃte devatāḥ puṇyāḥ śrāvaṇyo nāma pāṃḍava ||
brahmaṇā prathamaṃ sṛṣṭā niyogaśca jane kṛtaḥ || 2 ||
yo yadvadati lokesmiñchubhaṃ vāpyatha vā.aśubham ||
śrāvayaṃti hi tacchīghraṃ brāhmaṇyaḥ karmagocaram ||3||
jātāstriloke pūjyāstu niyamena prajāpate ||
dūrācchravaṇavijñānaṃ dūrāddarśanagocaram ||4||
tāsāmastīha sā śaktiracintyā tarkahetubhiḥ ||
naraistuṣṭaiśca yatproktaṃ kāryākāryasya kāraṇāt ||5||
tacchṛṇvaṃti yataḥ pārtha naikā śrāvaṇikā matāḥ ||
yathā devā yathā daityā yathā vidyādharā narāḥ||6||
yathā hi siddhagaṃdharvā nāgāḥ kiṃpuruṣāḥ khagāḥ||
rākṣasāśca piśācāśca devānāmaṣṭayonayaḥ||
tathaitāḥ puṇyanāmāno vaṃdyāḥ śrāvaṇikāḥ smṛtāḥ||7||
tā samuddiśya kartavyastaṃ nārīnarairiha ||
kiṃ tu tāsāṃ mahograṃ tu vrataṃ saṃyamanaṃ tadā ||8||
āghrāya dhūpaṃ pakvānnaṃ jalaṃ cāgandha meva ca ||
dātavyā punaranyāsāṃ nārīṇāṃ bhojyapāraṇā ||9||
adattvā yadi mṛtyuḥ syādaṃtarālepi pāṃḍava ||
tadā lagnagrahairgrastā lagnā hyuparikāraṭam ||
saphenilairmukhai raudrairbhriyaṃte nīcaduḥkhitāḥ || 4.95.10 ||
śrūyaṃte hi purā pārtha pṛthivyāṃ nahuṣo nṛpaḥ ||
tasya bhāryā mahādevī jayaśrīrnāma bhārata || 11 ||
pratyakṣarūpasaṃpannā darśanīyatarā śubhā ||
pīvarorustanā śyāmā mṛdukuñcitamūrddhajā || 12 ||
śabdagadgadasaṃbhāṣā mattamātaṃgagāminī ||
yathārūpā tathā śīlā satī ceṣṭā mahītale || 13 ||
sā kadācidgatā snātuṃ gaṃgāyāṃ cāśrame muneḥ ||
vaśiṣṭhasya dadarśātha satīṃ bhāryāmaruṃdhatīm || 14 ||
bhojayaṃtī munīnāṃ tu patnīrnānānnabhojanaiḥ ||
tayā ca praṇipatyātha pṛṣṭā devyā mahāsatī || 15 ||
pūjyaṃ bhagavati brūhi kimetadvratamucyate || 16 || ||
|| arundhatyuvāca || ||
jayaśriye śṛṇuṣva tvaṃ nāmnā śrāvaṇikāvratam||
etadbhartrā samākhyātaṃ vaśiṣṭhena maharṣiṇā||17||
gūḍhaṃ bahmarṣisarvasvaṃ supativratakaṃ śubham ||
gaccha vā tiṣṭha vā rājñi tavātidhyaṃ karomyaham||18||
evamuktā jayaśrīstu bhojye tasminyadṛcchayā ||
bubhuje sāpi tatraiva aruṃdhatyā kṛtā darā || 19 ||
bhuktvācamya jagāmātha svapuraṃ parameśvaram ||
kālena vismṛtaṃ tasyāstadvrataṃ tasya bhojanam || 4.95.20 ||
tatastu samaye pūrṇe mriyamāṇā mahāsatī ||
jayaśrīrghargharaṃ gaṃtuṃ kurvāṇā kaṃṭhagadgadam || 21 ||
phenaṃ lālāvilādvaktrādudgiraṃtī muhurmuhuḥ ||
sthitā paṃcadaśāhāni bībhatsā dāruṇānanā || 22 ||
tataḥ ṣoḍaśake prāpte dine svayamaruṃdhatī ||
praviśyābhyaṃtaraṃ pūrṇaṃ tāṃ rājñīmavalokya ca ||
nahuṣāya samācakhyau yaduktaṃ śrāvaṇī vrate || 23 ||
tacchutvā nahuṣo rājā drutaṃ bhojyaṃ pracakrame ||
yathoktaṃ tadaruṃdhatyā yacca yāvadabhīpsitam || 24 ||
datvā ca karakānaṣṭau tāmuddiśya jayaśriyam ||
kṣaṇājjagāma pañcatvaṃ karakāṇāṃ pradānataḥ || 25 ||
jagāma śakralokaṃ sā vimānenārkavarcasā ||
dodhūyamānā camaraiḥ stūyamānā surā suraiḥ || 26 ||
|| śrīkṛṣṇa uvāca || ||
mārgaśīrṣādimāseṣu dvādaśasvapi pāṃḍava ||
dravyaprāptiśca bhaktiśca dānakāle praśasyate || 27 ||
bhuktvā yajñe caturdaśyāmaṣṭamyāṃ vā yudhiṣṭhira ||
vratī snātvā tu pūrvāhṇe nadyādau vimale jale || 28 ||
āmaṃtrayeddaśaikaikā nārīrgaurīsvarūpiṇīḥ ||
yatācārāḥ suveṣāśca brāhmaṇīrvā svagotrajāḥ || 29 ||
dvādaśa brāhmaṇāṃstatra vedavedāṃgapāragān ||
maṃtrajñānitihāsajñānupaśāṃtāñjitendriyān || 4.95.30 ||
sarvaṃ dadyādvidhānena pādakṣālanapūrvakam ||
caṃdanena sugandhena puṣpadhūpādinā tathā || 31 ||
grīvāsūtrakasiṃdūrakuṃkumena ca bhūṣayet ||
tāsāmagre pradātavyā varddhanyo dvādaśaiva tu || 32 ||
acchidrā jalapūrṇāstu suvṛttāḥ sūtraveṣṭitāḥ ||
sohālakādibhiścchannāḥ puṣpamālāvibhūṣitāḥ || 33 ||
caṃdanena samālabdhāḥ sahiraṇyāḥ pṛthakpṛthak ||
tanmadhye varddhanīṃ caikāṃ svake śīrṣe niveśayet || 34 ||
sthitvā maṇḍalake madhye yajamānaḥ svayaṃ tadā ||
yadbālye yacca kaumāre vārddhake vāpi yatkṛtam ||
tatsarvaṃ nāśamāyātu pitṛdevarṣiṇāṃ nṛṇām || 35 ||
imā me samayaṃ svarṇaṃ tārayasva bhavārṇavāt ||
adyāhaṃ gantumicchāmi viṣṇoḥ padamanuttamam ||
evamastviti tā brūyuḥ striyaḥ sarvā yudhiṣṭhira || 36 ||
tato brāhmaṇamāhūya yajamāna idaṃ vadet ||
brūhi brāhmaṇa yanme tvamaghaṃ yena kṣayaṃ vrajet || 37 ||
uttīrya śrāvaṇaṃ māsaṃ samuttāraya sāṃpratam ||
uttārayeta maṃtreṇa brāhmaṇo vardhanī ca tām || 38 ||
upoṣya śiraso devyāḥ samuttīrya ruhadrumān ||
kaṭukaṃ niṃbavṛkṣaṃ vā tato madhukamāruha ||
tato gaccha mahādevaṃ śravaṇe śravaṇottame || 39 || iti vardhanikottāraṇamantraḥ ||
evaṃ tāḥ samayaṃ procya dattvāśīrvacanāni ca ||4.95.40||
tāṃ varddhanikāmekānte viprāya pratipādayet ||
gṛhītvā karakānnāryyo vrajeyuḥ sveṣu veśmasu || 41 ||
yajamāno.api yātāsu yatheṣṭaṃ kāmamācaret ||
evamācarate pārtha śrāvaṇīvrata mādarāt ||42||
tasya kāle tu saṃprāpte sukhaṃ mṛtyuḥ prajāyate ||
nirvyādhirnīrujo bhogī sthitvāsthitvā śataṃ sukham || 43 ||
putrapautrasamṛddhyādau bhuktvā martyasukhāni ca ||
rudralokamavāpnoti somalokaṃ sa gacchati || 44 ||
strīṇāṃ tulyaṃ sa hīno.api vratī vrataphalaṃ vrajet ||
gaurībhojyeṣu datteṣu ekādaśasu yatphalam || 45 ||
tadekenāpi labhate pārtha śrāvaṇikāvrate ||
bhaktyā gacchaṃti te lokānvihṛtya sukhamādarāt || 46 || ||
iti śrībhaviṣye mahāpurāṇa uttaraparvaṇi śrīkṛṣṇayudhiṣṭhirasaṃvāde śravaṇikāvrataṃ nāma pañcanavatitamo.adhyāyaḥ || 95 || cha ||

śrīkṛṣṇayudhiṣṭhirasaṃvādavarṇanam
|| śrīkṛṣṇa uvāca || ||
atha naktopavāsasya vidhānaṃ śṛṇu pāṃḍava ||
yena vijñātamātreṇa naro mokṣamavāpnuyāt || 1 ||
yeṣu teṣu ca māseṣu śuklapakṣe caturdaśīm ||
brāhmaṇaṃ bhojayitvā tu prārabheta tato vratam || 2 ||
māsimāsi bhavaṃti dvāvaṣṭamyau ca caturdaśī ||
śivārcanarato bhūtvā śivadhyānaikamānasaḥ ||
vasudhābhājanaṃ kṛtvā bhuñjīyānnaktabhojanam || 3 ||
upavāsātparaṃ bhaikṣyaṃ bhaikṣyātparamayācitam ||
ayācitātparaṃ naktaṃ tasmānnaktena bhojayet || 4 ||
devaiśca bhuktaṃ pūrvāhṇe madhyāhne munibhistathā ||
aparāhṇe ca pitṛbhiḥ sandhyāyāṃ guhyakādibhiḥ || 5 ||
sarvalokānatikramya naktabhojī sadā bhavet ||
haviṣya bhojanaṃ snānaṃ satyamāhāralāghavam || 6 ||
agnikāryo hyadhaḥśayyo naktabhojī sadā bhavet ||
evaṃ saṃvatsarasyāṃte vratapūrṇasya sarpiṣā ||
pūrṇakumbhoparisthāpya pūjayecca suśobhane || 7 ||
kapilāpañcagavyena sthāpayenmṛnmayaṃ śivam ||
phalaṃ puṣpaṃ yavakṣīraṃ dadhi dūrvāṃkurāṃstathā ||8 ||
tatkumbhānāṃ jalonmiśramarghamaṣṭāṃgamucyate ||
śirasā dhārayitvā tu jānū kṛtvā mahītale || 9 ||
mahādevāya dātavyaṃ gandhapuṣpaṃ yathākramam ||
bhakṣyodenairbaliṃ kṛtvā praṇamya parameśvarīm || 4.96.10 ||
dhenuṃ vā dakṣiṇāṃ dadyādvṛṣaṃ vāpi dhuraṃdharam ||
śrotriyāya daridrāya kalpavratavidāya ca ||
yo dadāti śive bhaktyā tasya puṇyaphalaṃ śṛṇu || 11 ||
vimānamarkapratimaṃ haṃsayuktamalaṃkṛtam||
ārūḍho.apsarasāṃ gītairyāti rudrālaye sukham || 12 ||
sthitvā rudrasya bhavane varṣakoṭiśatatrayam ||
iha loke nṛpaśreṣṭha grāmalakṣeśvaro bhavet || 13 ||
yaścāṣṭamīṣu ca śivāsu caturdaśīṣu naktaṃ samācarati śāstravidhāna dṛṣṭam || svargāṃganākalaravākulitaṃ vimānamāruhya yāti sa sukhena sureśalokam || 14 || || iti śrībhaviṣye mahāpurāṇa uttaraparvaṇi śrīkṛṣṇa yudhiṣṭhirasaṃvāde ṣaṇṇavatitamo.adhyāyaḥ || 96 || cha ||
śivacaturdaśīvratavarṇanam
|| śrīkṛṣṇa uvāca || ||
śṛṇuṣvāvahito rājanvakṣye māheśvaraṃ vratam ||
triṣu lokeṣu vikhyātaṃ nāmnā śivacaturdaśī || 1 ||
mārgaśīrṣatrayodaśyāṃ sitāyāmekabhuṅnaraḥ ||
māseṣvanyeṣu vā rājanpārtha evaṃ na kārayet || 2 ||
caturdaśyāṃ nirāhāraḥ samabhyarcya maheśvaram ||
sauvarṇaṃ vṛṣabhaṃ dattvā bhakṣyāmi ca pare.ahani|| 3 ||
evaṃ niyamakṛtsuptvā prātarutthāya mānavaḥ ||
kṛtasnānajapaḥ paścādumayā saha śaṃkaram ||
pūjayetkusumaiḥ śuklairgaṃdhadhūpānulepanaiḥ || 4 ||
pādau namaḥ śivāyeti śiraḥ sarvātmane namaḥ ||
lalāṭaṃ tu trinetrāya netrāṇi haraye namaḥ || 5 ||
mukhamindumukhāyeti tatheśānāya codaram ||
pārśve cānaṃtadharmāya jñānarūpāya vai kaṭim || 6 ||
ūrū cānantyavairāgyaṃ jānunī cārcayedbudhaḥ ||
pradhānāya namo jaṃghe gulphau vyomātmane namaḥ || 7 ||
vyomavyomātmarūpāya pṛṣṭhamabhyarcayennaraḥ ||
namaḥ sṛṣṭyai namastuṣṭyai pārvatīṃ cāpi pūjayet || 8 ||
tataśca vṛṣabhaṃ haimamudakumbhasamanvitam ||
śuklamālyāṃbarayutaṃ pañcaratnavibhūṣitam || 9 ||
bhakṣyairnānāvidhairyuktaṃ brāhmaṇāya nivedayet ||
prīyatāṃ devadevo.atra sadyojātaḥ pinākadhṛk|| 4.97.10 ||
pṛṣadājyaṃ ca saṃprāśya svapyādbhūmāvudaṅmukhaḥ ||
pañcadaśyāṃ tataḥ prātaḥ sarvametatsamācaret || 11 ||
tarpayitvā tatonnena brāhmaṇāñchaktitaḥ śubhān ||
suhṛtpadātisahitaḥ paścādbhuñjīta vāgyataḥ || 12 ||
tataḥ kṛṣṇacaturdaśyāmetatsarvaṃ samācaret ||
caturdaśīṣu sarvāsu kuryātpūrvavadarcanam || 13 ||
ye ca māse viśeṣāḥ syustānnibodha kramādiha ||
mārgaśīrṣādimāseṣu svapannetānudīrayet || 14 ||
śaṃkarāya namastubhyaṃ namaste karavīraka ||
tryaṃbakāya namastubhyaṃ maheśvaramataḥ param || 15 ||
namaste.astu mahādeva sthāṇave ca tataḥ param ||
namaḥ paśupate nātha namaste śaṃbhave namaḥ || 16 ||
namaste paramānaṃda namaḥ somārddhadhāriṇe ||
namo bhīmāya cogrāya tvāmahaṃ śaraṇaṃ gataḥ || 17 ||
gomūtraṃ gomayaṃ kṣīraṃ dadhisarpiḥ kuśodakam ||
paṃcagavyaṃ tathā bilvaṃ yavāgūkṣīravārijam || 18 ||
tilāṃśca kṛṣṇānvidhivatprāśnīyātsamudāhṛtān ||
pratimāsaṃ caturdaśyāmekaikaṃ prāśanaṃ smṛtam || 19 ||
maṃdārairmālatībhiśca tathā dhattūkairapi ||
siṃduvārairaśokaiśca mallikākubjapāṭalaiḥ || 4.97.20 ||
arkapuṣpaiḥ kadaṃbaiśca śatapatraistathotpalaiḥ ||
karavīraiśca rājendra tathā pūjyo maheśvaraḥ || 21 ||
ekaikena caturdaśyāmarcayetpārvatīpatim ||
punaśca kārttike māsi saṃprāpte tarpayeddvijān || 22 || annairnānāvidhairbhakṣyairvastrairmālyavibhūṣaṇaiḥ ||
kṛtvā nīlaṃ vṛṣotsargaṃ śrutyuktavidhinā naraḥ||23||
umāmaheśvaraṃ haimaṃ vṛṣabhaṃ ca gavā saha||
muktāphalāṣṭakayutaṃ sitanetrapaṭāvṛtam||24||
sarvopaskarayuktāyāṃ śayyāyāṃ vinivedayet||
udakuṃbhayutaṃ tadvacchālitaṃdulasaṃyutam||25||
sthāpya viprāya śāṃtāya vedavrataparāya ca||
jyeṣṭhasāmavide deyaṃ na ca kurvaṃti te kvacit||26||
avyaṃgāya ca saumyāya sadākalyāṇakāriṇe ||
sapatnīkāya saṃpūjya mālyavastravibhūṣaṇaiḥ ||
na vittaśāṭhyaṃ kurvīta kurvaṃllobhātpatatyadhaḥ || 27 ||
anena vidhinā yastu kuryācchivacaturdaśīm ||
so.aśvamedhasahasrasya phalaṃ prāpnoti mānavaḥ || 28 ||
brahmahatyādikaṃ pāpaṃ yadatrāmutra vā kṛtam||
pitṛbhirmātṛbhirvāpi tatsarvaṃ nāśamāpnuyāt || 29 || dīrghāyurārogyakulābhivṛddhiratrākṣayānyatra caturbhujatvam ||
gaṇādhipatyaṃ divi kalpakoṭī svarge uṣitvā padameti śaṃbhoḥ || 4.97.30 ||
na bṛhaspatirapyatmannarasya phalamiṃdro na pitāmaho.api vaktum ||
na ca siddhaguṇora.apyalaṃ na vāhaṃ yadi jihvāyutakoṭyapīha vaktre || 31 || bhavatyamaravallabhaḥ paṭhati yaḥ smaredvā sadā śṛṇotyapi vimatsaraḥ sakalapāpanirmocanīm ||
imāṃ śivacaturdaśīmamarakāminīkoṭayaḥ stuvaṃti divi naṃditā kimu samācaredyaḥ sadā || 32 ||
yā pārtha nārī kurute.atibhaktyā bharttāramāpṛcchya śubhaṃ guruṃ vā ||
sāpi prasādātparameśvarasya paraṃ padaṃ yāti pinākapāṇeḥ || 33 ||
iti śrībhaviṣye mahāpurāṇa uttaraparvaṇi śrīkṛṣṇayudhiṣṭhirasaṃvāda śivacaturdaśīvratavarṇanaṃ nāma saptanavatitamo.adhyāyaḥ || 97 || cha ||
phalatyāgacaturdaśīvratavarṇanam
|| śrīkṛṣṇa uvāca || ||
tathā sarvaphalatyāgamāhātmyaṃ śṛṇu bhārata ||
yadakṣayaṃ pare loke sarvakāmaphalapradam || 1 ||
mārgaśīrṣe śubhe māsi caturdaśyāṃ dhṛtavrataḥ ||
āraṃbhe śuklapakṣasya kṛtvā brāhmaṇavācanam || 2 ||
anyeṣvapi tu māseṣu aṣṭamyāṃ narasattama ||
sadakṣiṇāpāyasena śaktitaḥ pūjayeddvijān||3||
aṣṭādaśānāṃ dhānyānāmanyatra phalamūlakam ||
varjayedabdamekaṃ tu vidhinauṣadhakārakam || || 4 ||
tataḥ saṃvatsarasyāṃte caturdaśyaṣṭamīṣu ca ||
aśaktaśca vrataṃ kartuṃ sahasaiva pramucyate ||5||
sauvarṇaṃ kārayedrudraṃ dharmarājaṃ tathaiva ca ||
kūṣmāṇḍaṃ mātuluṃgaṃ ca vṛṃtākaṃ panasaṃ tathā ||6||
āmrāmrātakapitthaṃ ca kaliṃgaṃ servavārukam? ||
śrīphalaṃ savaṭāśvatthaṃ jaṃbīraṃ kadalīphalam ||7||
badaraṃ dāḍimaṃ śaktyā kāryāṇyetāni ṣoḍaśa ||
mūlakāmalakaṃ jaṃbūpuṣkaraṃ karamardakam || 8 ||
uduṃbaraṃ nālikeraṃ drākṣā ca bṛhatīdvayam ||
kaṃkālī kākatuṃḍīraṃ karīrakuṭajaṃ śamī || 9 ||
raupyāṇi kārayecchaktyā phalānīmāni ṣoḍaśa ||
tāmraṃ tālaphalaṃ kuryādagastyaphalameva vā || 4.98.10 ||
piṃḍīrakaṃ ca kharjūraṃ tathā sūraṇa kaṃdakam ||
panasaṃ lakucaṃ caiva karkaṭaṃ tiṃtiḍiṃ tathā || 11 ||
citrāvallīphalaṃ tadvatkūṭaśālmalikāphalam ||
madhūkaṃ kāravellaṃ ca vallīṃ gudapaṭola kam ||12||
kārayecchaktito dhīmānphalānyetāni ṣoḍaśa ||
udakuṃbhadvayaṃ kuryādānyopari savāsasam ||
pakṣapātradvayopetaṃ yamarudrasamanvitam||13||
dhenvā sahaiva śāṃtāya viprāyātha kuṭuṃbine ||
sapatnīkāya saṃpūjya puṇyehani nivedayet || 14 ||
yathā phaleṣu sarveṣu vasaṃtyamarakoṭayaḥ ||
tathā sarvaphalatyāgācchive bhaktiḥ sadāstu me || 15 ||
yathā śivaśca dharmaśca sadānantaphalapradau ||
tadyuktaphaladānena tau syātāṃ me varapradau || 16 ||
yathā phalānāṃ kāmasya śivabhaktasya sarvadā ||
yathānaṃtaphalāvāptirastu janmanijanmani || 17 ||
yathā bhedaṃ na paśyāmi śivaviṣṇvarkapadmajām ||
tathā mamāstu viśvātmā śaṅkaraḥ śaṃkaraḥ sadā || 18 ||
ityuccārya ca tatsarvamalaṃkṛtya vibhūṣaṇaiḥ ||
śaktaścecchayanaṃ dadyātsarvopaskarasaṃyutam ||
aśaktastu phalānyeva yathoktāni vidhānataḥ || 19 ||
tathodakuṃbhasahitau śivadharmau ca kāṃcanau ||
viprāya dattvā bhuñjīta tailakṣāravivarjitam ||
anyānapi yathā śaktyā bhojayeddvijapuṅgavān || 4.98.20 ||
na śaknoti vihātuṃ cetsarvāṇyapi phalānyuta ||
ekameva parityajya taditthaṃ pratipādayet || 21 ||
etattyāgavratānāṃ tu gave vaiṣṇavayoginām ||
śastaṃ sarvaphalatyāgaṃ vrataṃ vedavido viduḥ ||
nārībhiśca yathāśaktyā kartavyaṃ rājasattama || 22 ||
naitasmādaparaṃ kiñcidiha loke paratra ca ||
vratamasti muniśreṣṭha yadannaṃ tatphalapradam ||23||
sauvarṇaraupyatāmreṣu yāvaṃtaḥ paramāṇavaḥ||
bhavaṃti cūryamāṇeṣu phaleṣu nṛpasattama ||
tāvadyugasahasrāṇi rudraloke mahīyate || 24 ||
etatsamastakaluṣāpaharaṃ janānāmājīvanāya manujeśvara sarvadā syāt ||
janmāntareṣvapi na putrakalatraduḥkhamāpnoti dhāma sa puraṃdarajuṣṭameva || 25 ||
yo vā śṛṇoti puruṣolpadhano naro vā yo brāhmaṇastu bhavaneṣu ca dhārmikāṇām|| pāpairvimuktaśca paratra puraṃ murārerānaṃdakṛtparamupaiti narendra sopi ||26|| ||
iti śrībhaviṣye mahāpurāṇa uttaraparvaṇi śrīkṛṣṇayudhiṣṭhirasaṃvāde phalatyāga caturdaśīvratavarṇanaṃ nāmāṣṭanavatitamo.adhyāyaḥ || 98 || || cha ||
paurṇamāsīvratavarṇanam
|| śrīkṛṣṇa uvāca || ||
paurṇamāsī mahārāja somasya dayitā tithiḥ ||
pūrṇamāso bhavedyasyāṃ paurṇamāsī tataḥ smṛtā || 1 ||
paurṇamāsyāṃ ca saṃjātaḥ saṃgrāmo jayalakṣaṇaḥ ||
somasyāribudhaiḥ sārddhaṃ sarvasattvabhayaṃkaram || || 2 ||
tārāyāṃ candramāḥ saktastasyā bhartā bṛhaspatiḥ ||
tayorabhūnmahāyuddhaṃ bhāryākṛtyeṣu vai purā || 3 ||
|| yudhiṣṭhira uvāca ||
tārā kasya sutā kasmātsa kruddhaḥ sasurārihā ||
somena saha saṃgrāmaṃ cakre cakragadādhara || 4 ||
|| śrīkṛṣṇa uvāca || ||
prajāpaterabhūtkanyā tārā vṛtrasya cānujā ||
tāṃ bṛhaspataye prādātpṛthivyāmekasuṃdarīm || 5 ||
devācāryāya sā bhāryā tvanirdeśyā tathāvidhā ||
rūpeṇābhyāṃ rūpavatī sā nirdhūya vyavasthitā || 6 ||
bṛhaspatiṃ paryacaradyathā cānyāḥ striyaḥ kvacit ||
tāṃ dadarśāyatāpāṃgīṃ tanvaṃgīṃ cāruhāsinīm || 7 ||
śītāṃśurdarśanādeva kāmasya vaśamīyivān ||
ābabhāṣe ca madhuraṃ tāre ehyehi mā ciram || 8 ||
iṃgitākārakuśalā tārā somasya ceṣṭitam ||
buddhvā śuddhimatho tanvī prāhedaṃ madhurākṣaram || 9 ||
muneraṃgirasaḥ putrastvaṃ ca saumyo.asi somarāṭ ||
aṃgiraso munervīra snuṣāhamucitaṃ na te ||
saha saumyena yo yogastava siddho.a dbhuto mahān || 4.99.10 ||
aṃgirāstvāṃ kila purā sasurāsurarākṣasaiḥ ||
rājatve sthāpayāmāsa naitatsmarasi kiṃ vidho || 11 ||
kathamadya niśānātha hyanaṃgenāsi pīḍitaḥ ||
tasmādbravīmi siddhiṃ te rocaye ghaṭitaṃ kuru ||
paravatyasmi bhadraṃ te na gamyāsmi budhottama || 12 ||
evamuktastathā cāsau na caitatkṛtavāṃstataḥ ||
gṛhītvākarṣayāmāsa somo.anaṃgavaśīkṛtaḥ || 13 ||
bṛhaspatistu tāṃ jñātvā sa taṃ somamagarhayat ||
preṣayiṣyati me bhāryāṃ svayameva mamāṃtikam || 14 ||
evaṃ cireṇa vijñāya bṛhaspatirudāradhīḥ ||
nāsasāda svakāṃ bhāryāṃ roṣātprasphuritādharaḥ || 15 ||
ācakhyau sarvamindrāya somasyedaṃ viceṣṭitam ||
iṃdraḥ samāhvayāmāsa devānṛṣigaṇāṃstathā || 16 ||
na somo gaṇayāmāsa tato.abudhyata devarāṭ ||
ākāryaṃ tridaśānsarvānācakhyau candraceṣṭitam || 17 ||
tacchrutvā devagaṃdharvāḥ krodhāndhāḥ kṣubdhamānasāḥ ||
pragṛhītapraharaṇā rathānāruruhuḥ svakān|| 18 ||
somo.api devānsodyogāñjñātvā sukṛtaniścayān ||
daityadānavarakṣāṃsi samānīya vyavasthitaḥ || 19 ||
āruhya ca rathaśreṣṭhaṃ yuddhāyaiva mano dadhe ||
pravṛttaṃ sumahadyuddhaṃ śaratomarakaṃpanaiḥ || 4.99.20 ||
kauṇapaiḥ kṣmāsuraiḥ śūlairdevadānavadāraṇam ||
sa teṣāṃ sumahadyuddhaṃ dattvā tārāgaṇādhipaḥ|||
babhaṃja devānsendrāṃśca hemavṛṣṭyā kṣapākaraḥ || 21 ||
sa jitvā devagandharvānsomo rājanyasattama ||
śriyā paramayā yukto yathā nānyo havirbhujām || || 22 ||
devāśca nirjitāstena somenāmitatejasā ||
ājagmuḥ śaraṇaṃ devaṃ śaraṇyaṃ svargavāsinām || 23 ||
indraḥ sarvaṃ samācakhyau somasyedṛgviceṣṭitam ||
śrutvā kruddho hṛṣīkeśa āruhya garuḍaṃ ruṣā ||
gṛhītvā cāyudhaṃ śreṣṭhaṃ yuddhāyaiva mano dadhe || 24 ||
prakartuṃ sumahadyuddhaṃ cakraśārṅgagadā dharaḥ ||
jagāma vibudhaiḥ sārdhaṃ somasyopari roṣitaḥ || 25 ||
viṣṇuṃ viditvā saṃprāptaṃ somo daityagaṇaiḥ saha ||
yuddhāya samarāmarṣī sthitaḥ pradhmāya vārijam || 26 ||
sa jitvā devasaṃghātaṃ seṃdraṃ vāyupurassaram ||
viṣṇunā saha saṃyuktaḥ śastrāstrairasubhojanaiḥ || 27 ||
yadā nāsāvuparamedyuddhāya saha viṣṇunā ||
tadā.a.adade ruṣā viṣṇuścakaṃ krodhasamanvitaḥ || 28 ||
athāha brahmā deveśamajitaṃ viṣṇumavyayam ||
yo.asau meghaprapuṣṭāṃgaṃ yattvāṃ vacmi nibodha tat || 29 ||
nāsti vadhyaṃ tribhuvane cakrasyāsya tavānagha ||
somo dvijādhipatye ca mayā samabhiṣecitaḥ || 4.99.30 ||
tasmādyadyujyate devakārye.asmiṃstadvidhīyatām ||
athāha bhagavānviṣṇuḥ surabrahmarṣisannidhau || 31 ||
sinīvālī kuhūrnāma tasyāṃ naṣṭaḥ kṣapākaraḥ ||
vinaṣṭo.api punarjanma prāpsyatīti na saṃśayaḥ || 32 ||
rākāṃ cānumatiṃ prāpya vṛddhirasya bhaviṣyati ||
āpyāyitaśca śrutyuktaiḥ pitṛpiṇḍaiḥ samaṃtrakaiḥ ||
brāhmaṇairhavyakavyāni devebhyaḥ prāpayiṣyati || 33||
vṛddhiḥ kṛṣṇena caivāsya na ca jātasya bhūyasī ||
evameva vidhirdṛṣṭastasyāpyāya nameva me || 34 ||
amoghasya na moghatvaṃ bhaviṣyati kadācana ||
śaptaśca somo dakṣeṇa sa cāvaśyaṃ bhaviṣyati || 35 ||
sudarśanasya ca prītirevameva bhaviṣyati ||
evamastviti deveśa yadbhavānprabravīti vai || 36 ||
brahmā provāca somaṃ tu vinītavadupasthitam ||
arpayasva gurorbhāryāṃ na kāryaṃ punarīdṛśam || 37 ||
sa tathoktaḥ samānīya dadau tārāṃ bṛhaspateḥ ||
punarūce śaśī spaṣṭaṃ śṛṇvatāṃ tridivaukasām ||38 ||
asyāṃ garbho madīyo.ayaṃ yadapatyaṃ mamaiva tat ||
bṛhaspatirathovāca mayā garbhaḥ samāhitaḥ || 39 ||
kṣetre madīye cotpannastasmātsa mama putrakaḥ||
uktaṃ ca vedaśāstrajñairṣibhirddharmadarśibhiḥ || 4.99.40 ||
uptaṃ vātāhṛtaṃ bījaṃ yasya kṣetre prarohati ||
kṣetriṇastasya tadbījaṃ na bījī phalabhāgbhavet || 41 ||
samyaguktaṃ na bhavatā śaśāṃkaḥ prāha tattvavit ||
mātā bhastrā pituḥ putro yena jātaḥ sa eva saḥ ||
iti paurāṇikāḥ prāhurmunayo nayacakṣuṣaḥ || 42 ||
vivadaṃtau nivāryātha brahmā provāca tāṃ vadhūm ||
śanairekāṃtamānīya garbhoyaṃ kasya śaṃsa me || 43 ||
evamuktā tu sā tārā hriyā novāca kiṃcana ||
utsasarja kṣaṇādgarbhaṃ bhābhāsitasurālayam || 44 ||
tamuvāca tato brahmā putra kasya suto bhavān ||
somasyāhaṃ suto brahmanniti tathyaṃ mayoditam || || 45 ||
budho.ayaṃ vibudhāḥ prāhuḥ sarvajñānavidāṃ varaḥ ||
gṛhītvā putrakaṃ somo jagāma svaṃ niveśanam || 46 ||
gururgṛhītvā svāṃ bhāryāṃ jagāma bhavanaṃ śanaiḥ ||
somo.api tanayaṃ labdhvā harṣavyākulamānasaḥ || 47 ||
paurṇamāsī samākhyātā prāptapūrṇamanorathā ||
prāptaḥ putro mayā hyasyāṃ labdhaśca vi jayastathā ||48||
tasmādenāmupāsiṣye vidhinā vratatatparaḥ||
evamanyo.api pūrṇārthaḥ pūrṇāṃśaḥ pūrṇalakṣaṇaḥ ||49||
yo māmakyāṃ tithau bhaktyā vidhivatpūjayiṣyati ||
tasya prasādābhimukhaḥ sarvakāmaprado hyaham || 4.99.50 ||
evameṣā tithiḥ pārtha somasya dayitā śubhā ||
paurṇamāsī samākhyātā pūrṇo māso bhavedyathā || 51 ||
tadasyāṃ srotasi snātvā saṃtarpya pitṛdevatāḥ ||
ālikhya maṃḍale somaṃ nakṣatraiḥ sahitaṃ vibhum || 52 ||
pūjayetkusumairhṛdyairnaivedyairghṛtapācitaiḥ ||
śuklākṣataiḥ śuklavastraiḥ pūjayitvā kṣamāpayet||
śākāharaṇamunyannairnaktaṃ bhuñjīta vāgyataḥ || 53 ||
vasaṃtabāṃdhava vidho śītāṃśo svasti naḥ kuru ||
gaganārṇavamāṇikya candra dākṣāyaṇīpate || 54 ||
pakṣepakṣe paurṇamāsyāṃ vidhireṣa prakīrtitaḥ ||
kṛṣṇapakṣe.api yaḥ kaścicchraddhāvānvai vratī bhavet || 55||
tasyāpyeṣa vidhiḥ proktaḥ sarvasaukhyapradāyakaḥ ||
āmāvāsyā tithiriyaṃ pitṛrṇāṃ dayitā sadā ||
asyāṃ dattaṃ tapastaptaṃ pitṛrṇāmakṣayaṃ bhavet || 56 ||
amāvāsyā mahārāja prayatnairyairupoṣitā ||
tairakṣayyaṃ bhaveddattaṃ pitṛbhyastīrthamuttamam || 57 ||
yaḥ kaścitkurute tasminpitṛpiṇḍodakakriyām ||
sa tārayati puṇyātmā puruṣānekaviṃśatim || 58 ||
bhaveyurakṣayāstasya lokāḥ pitṛniṣevitāḥ ||
yadā tu iha kālāṃte tasyātrāgamanaṃ bhavet || 59 ||
brāhmaṇaḥ pitṛbhaktaśca sarvavidyāviśāradaḥ ||
evaṃ janmani rājendra bhaveddhanasamanvitaḥ || 4.99.60 ||
evaṃ saṃvatsarasyāṃte haimaṃ kṛtvā suśobhanam ||
somaṃ nakṣatrasahitaṃ viprāya pratipādayet || 61 ||
upadeśaṃ prayacchedyastasmai vratakṛte naraḥ ||
saṃpūjya vastrābharaṇairmaṃtreṇetthaṃ nivedayet ||
māsemāse vidhirayaṃ vratasyāsya narādhipa || 62 ||
yo na śaknoti vā kartuṃ pakṣaṃ vātha niraṃtaram ||
sa ekāmapyupoṣyaiva kuryādudyāpanaṃ sudhīḥ || 63 ||
yaścaitatkurute pārtha paurṇamāsīvrataṃ naraḥ ||
sarvapāpavinirmuktaścandravaddivi rājate || 64 ||
putrapautradhanopeto yajvā dātā priyaṃvadaḥ ||
saṃtatiṃ vipulāṃ prāpya prayāge maraṇaṃ bhajet || 65 ||
tataścaivākṣayā~mllokānprāpnoti surasevitān ||
sevyamānaḥ sa gandharvaiḥ stūyamānaḥ surāsuraiḥ ||
āste saṃpūrṇasarvāṃgo yāvatkalpāyutatrayam || 66 ||
abhyarcayaṃti sitapañcadaśīṣu somaṃ kṛṣṇāsu ye pitṛgaṇaṃ jalapiṃḍadānaiḥ ||
teṣāṃ gṛhāṇi dhana dhānyasutādisaṃpatpūrṇāni pārthiva bhavaṃti vidhervidhānāt || 67 || || iti śrībhaviṣye mahāpurāṇa uttaraparvaṇi śrīkṛṣṇayudhiṣṭhirasaṃvāde vijayapaurṇa māsīvratavarṇanaṃ nāma navanavatitamo.adhyāyaḥ || 99 || || cha ||
vaiśākhīkārttikīmāghīvratavarṇanam
|| yudhiṣṭhira uvāca || ||
saṃvatsare ca yāḥ kāścittithayaḥ puṇyalakṣaṇāḥ ||
tā me vada yaduśreṣṭha snāne dāne mahāphalāḥ || 1 ||
|| śrīkṛṣṇa uvāca || ||
vaiśākhī kārtikī māghī tithayo.atīva pūjitāḥ ||
snānadānavihīnaistā na neyāḥ pāṃḍunandana || 2 ||
tīrthasnānaṃ tadā śastaṃ dānaṃ vittānurūpataḥ ||
vaiśākhyāṃ pāṃḍavaśreṣṭha śreṣṭhā dyotanikā matā || 3 ||
kārttikyāṃ puṣkarāraṇyaṃ māghyāṃ vārāṇasī smṛtā ||
snānenodakadānena tārayatyapi duṣkṛtīn ||4||
kuṃbhānsvachāṃbhasaḥ pūrṇānsahiraṇyānnasaṃyutān||
vaiśākhyāṃ brāhmaṇo dattvā na śocati kṛte vrate || 5 ||
madhurānnarasaiḥ pūrṇānbhājanānkanakojjvalān ||
gobhūhiraṇyavāsāṃsi vidhivatpratipādayet || || 6 ||
māghyāṃ maghāsu ca tathā saṃtarpya pitṛdevatāḥ ||
tilapātrāṇi deyāni tilāṃśca palalaudanam || 7 ||
kārpāsadānamatraiva tiladānaṃ ca śasyate ||
kaṃbalājinaratnāni mocakau pāpamocakau ||8||
upānaddānamatraiva kathitaṃ sarvakāmadam ||
yatra vā tatra vā snānaṃ dānaṃ vittānurūpataḥ ||9||
kalikālodbhavaṃ sarvaṃ śasyate pāṃḍunandana ||
kārtikyāṃ tu vṛṣotsargo vivāhaḥ puṇyalakṣaṇaḥ ||
kāryaṃ kurukulaśreṣṭha harernīrājanaṃ tathā || 4.100.10 ||
gajāśvarathadānaṃ ca ghṛtadhenvādayastathā ||
pradeyāḥ puṇyakṛdbhiśca tāstāḥ saṃkalpya devatāḥ || 11 ||
phalāni yāni vidyaṃte sugandhimadhurāṇi ca ||
jātīphalaṃ ca kaṃkolaṃ lavaṃgaṃ lavalīphalam || 12 ||
kharjūrīṃ nālikerāṃśca kadalyāśca phalāni ca ||
dāḍimānmātuluṃgāṃśca karkoṭāṃstrapusāṃstathā || || 13 ||
vṛṃtākānkāravellāṃśca biṃbānkūṣmāṃḍakarburān ||
apradānena yeṣāṃ tu tithayo yāṃti bhārata ||
te vyādhitā daridrāśca jāyaṃte bhuvi mānavāḥ || || 14 ||
na kevalaṃ brāhmaṇānāṃ dānaṃ sarvasya śasyate ||
bhaginībhāgineyānāṃ mātulānāṃ pitṛṣvasuḥ ||
daridrāṇāṃ ca baṃdhūnāṃ dānaṃ koṭiguṇotta ram || 15 ||
mitraṃ kulīnaścāpanno vadhurdāridryaduḥkhitaḥ ||
āśayābhyāgato dūrātsotithiḥ svargasaṃkramaḥ ||16||
vanaṃ prasthāpite rāme sasīte saha lakṣmaṇe ||
mātāmahakulādetya viśuddhenāṃtarātmanā ||
sā sarveḥ śrāvitānekaiḥ kośalyā bharatena vai || 17 ||
yadā na pratyayaṃ yāti kathaṃcitkośalātmajā ||
tadā viśuddhabhāvena tithayaḥ śrāvitāḥ punaḥ || 18 ||
vaiśākhī kārtikī māghī tithayomarapūjitāḥ ||
apradānavato yāṃti yasyāryyonumate gataḥ || 19 ||
etacchrutvā tu kauśalyā sahasā pratyayaṃ gatā ||
aṃkamānīya bharataṃ sāṃtvayāmāsa duḥkhitam || 4.100.20 ||
etattithīnāṃ māhātmyamākhyātaṃ bahuvistaram ||
bhūyastu kiṃ pravakṣyāmi tava rājanmahāmate || 21 ||
vaiśākhakārtikamaghāsahitātha māghe yā pūrṇimā bhavati pūrṇaśaśāṃkacihnā ||
tasyāṃ jalānnakanakāṃbaramātapatraṃ dattvā prayāti puruṣaḥ puruhūtalokam || 22 || ||
iti śrībhaviṣye mahāpurāṇa uttaraparvaṇi śrīkṛṣṇayudhiṣṭhirasaṃvāde vaiśākhīkārtikīmāghīvratavarṇanaṃ nāma śatatamo.adhyāyaḥ || 100|| || a ||
yugāditithivratamāhātmyavarṇanam
|| yudhiṣṭhira uvāca || ||
punarme brūhi deveśa tvadbhaktyā bhāvitātmanaḥ ||
kathyamānamihecchāmi śubhadharmapadaṃ mahat || 1 ||
yatrāṇvapi narairddattaṃ japtaṃ vā sumahadbhavet || 2 || |||
|| śrīkṛṣṇa uvāca || ||
śṛṇu pāṃḍava te vacmi rahasyaṃ devanirmitam||
yanmayā kasyacinnoktaṃ supriyasyāpi bhārata || 3 ||
vaiśākhamāsasya tu yā tṛtīyā navamyasau kārtikaśuklapakṣe||
nabhasya māsasya tu kṛṣṇapakṣe trayodaśīṃ pañcadaśīṃ ca māghe ||4||
vaiśākhasya tṛtīyā tu samā kṛtayutena tu||
navamī kārtike yā tu tretāyugasamāgatā || 5 ||
trayodaśī nabhasye tu dvāpareṇa samāgatā ||
māghe pañcadaśī rājankalikālādirucyate|| 6 ||
etāścatasro rājendra yugānāṃ prabhavādyathā ||
yugādayaśca kathyaṃte tathaitā sarvasūribhiḥ || 7 ||
upavāsastapo dānaṃ japahomakriyāstathā ||
yadyattu kriyate kiṃcitsarvaṃkoṭiguṇaṃ bhavet || 8 ||
vaiśākhasya tṛtīyāyāṃ śrīsametaṃ jagadgurum ||
nārāyaṇaṃ pūjayethāḥ puṣpadhūpavilepanaiḥ ||
vastrālaṃkārasaṃbhārainaivedyai rvividhaistathā || 9 ||
tatastasyāgrato dhenurlavaṇasyāḍhakena tu ||
kāryā kurukulaśreṣṭha caturbhāgeṇa vatsakaḥ || 4.101.10 ||
avicarmopari sthāpya kalpayitvā vidhānataḥ ||
śāstroktakramayogena brāhmaṇāyopapādayet || 11 ||
śrīdharaḥ śrīpatiḥ śrīmāñchrīśaḥ saṃprīyatāmiti ||
anena vidhinā dattvā dhenuṃ viprāya bhārata ||
gosahasraṃ daśaguṇaṃ prāpnotīha na saṃśayaḥ || 12 ||
tathaiva kārtike māsi navamyāṃ naktabhuṅnaraḥ ||
snātvā nadītaḍāgeṣu devakhāteṣu vā punaḥ || 13 ||
umāsahāyaṃ varadaṃ nīlakaṃṭhamathārcayet ||
puṣpadhūpādinaivedyairaniṃdyaiḥ śaṃkaraṃ śivam || 14 ||
dhenuṃ tilamayīṃ dadyātpurāṇo ktavidhānataḥ ||
aṣṭamūrtirnīlakaṃṭhaḥ prīyatāmiti ciṃtayet || 15 ||
yadatra prāpyate puṇyaṃ pārtha tatkena varṇyate ||
dattvā tilamayīṃ dhenuṃ śivalokamavāpnuyāt || 16 ||
trayodaśī nabhasi yā kṛṣṇamasyāṃ samarcayet ||
pitṛrnpāyasadānena madhunā ca ghṛtena tu ||
bhojayedbrāhmaṇānbhaktyā vedavedāṅgapāragān| 17 ||
pitṛrnuddiśya dātavyā savatsā kāṃsyadohanī ||
pratyakṣā gaurmahārāja taruṇī supayasvinī || 18 ||
pitā pitāmahaścaiva tathaiva prapitāmahaḥ ||
prīyatāṃ gopradānena iti dattvā visarjayet || 19 ||
kṛtenānena rājendra yatpuṇyaṃ prāpyate nṛbhiḥ ||
tatkena varṇituṃ yāti varṣakoṭiśatairapi || 4.101.20 ||
putrānpautrānprapautrāṃśca dhanaṃ ca mahadīpsitam ||
iha cāpnoti puruṣaḥ paratra ca śubhāṃ gatim || 21 ||
pañcadaśyāṃ ca māghasya pūjayitvā pitāmaham ||
gāyatryā sahitaṃ devaṃ vedavedāṅgabhūṣitam || 22 ||
navanītamayīṃ dhenuṃ phalairnānāvidhairyutām ||
sahiraṇyāṃ savatsāṃ ca brāhmaṇāya nivedayet ||
kīrtayetprīyatāmatra padmayoniḥ pitāmahaḥ ||23||
yatsvarge yacca pātāle yacca martye sudurlabham ||
tadavāpnotyasaṃdigdhaṃ padmayoni prasādataḥ || 24 ||
yāni cānyāni dānāni dattāni subahūnyapi ||
yugādiṣu mahārāja akṣayāni bhavaṃti hi || 25 ||
alpamalpaṃ hi yaḥ kaścitpradadyānnirddhanopi san ||
tadakṣayaṃ bhavetsarvaṃ yugādiṣu na saṃśayaḥ || 26 ||
vittānusāraṃ svaṃ jñātvā vittavānpārthivopi vā ||
anusāreṇa vittasya asādhyena samādhinā || 27 ||
bhūrhiraṇyaṃ gṛhaṃ vāsaḥ śayanānyāsanāni ca ||
chatropānatsuyugmāni pradeyāni dvijātiṣu || 28 ||
evaṃ dattvā yathāśaktyā bhojayitvā dvijānapi ||
paścādbhuñjīta sumanā vāgyataḥ svajanaiḥ saha || 29 ||
yatkiñcinmānasaṃ pāpaṃ kāyikaṃ vācikaṃ tathā ||
tatsarvaṃ nāśamāyāti yugāditithipūjanāt || 4.101.30 ||
udgīyamāno gandharvaiḥ stūyamānaḥ surāsuraiḥ ||
ramate cākṣayaṃ kālaṃ svargaloke na saṃśayaḥ ||31||
yaddīyate kimapi koṭiguṇaṃ tadāhuḥ snānaṃ japoniyamamakṣayameva sarvam ||
syādakṣayāsu yugapūrvatithīṣu rājanvyāsādayo munivarāḥ samudāharaṃti||32||
iti śrībhaviṣye mahāpurāṇa uttaraparvaṇi śrīkṛṣṇayudhiṣṭhirasaṃvāde yugāditithivratamāhātmyavarṇanaṃ nāmaikādhikaśatatamo.adhyāyaḥ || 101 || cha || ||
vaṭasāvitrīvratavarṇanam
|| yudhiṣṭhira uvāca || ||
smarayāmi hṛṣīkeśa yannoktaṃ bhavatā kvacit ||
tatsāvitrīvrataṃ brūhi mamopari dayāṃ kuru || 1 ||
|| śrīkṛṣṇa uvāca || ||
kathayāmi kulastrīṇāṃ mahābhāgyaṃ yudhiṣṭhira ||
yathā cīrṇaṃ vratavaraṃ sāvitryā rājakanyayā || 2 ||
āsīnmadreṣu dharmātmā sarvabhūtahite rataḥ ||
pārthivośvapatirnāma paurajānapadapriyaḥ || 3 ||
kṣamāvāṃśca kṣitipatiḥ satyavāṃśca jitendriyaḥ ||
sa sabhāryo vratamidaṃ cacāra nṛpatiḥ svayam || 4 ||
sāvitrīvratasiddhaṃ tatsarvakāmapradāyakam ||
tasya tuṣṭābhavadrājansāvitrī brahmaṇaḥ priyā || 5 ||
bhūrbhuvaḥsvaritītyeṣā sākṣānmūrtimatī sthitā ||
kamaṃḍaludharā devī prasannavadanekṣaṇā || 6 ||
uvāca duhitā hyekā tava rājanbhaviṣyati ||
ityevamuktvā sāvitrī jagāmādarśanaṃ punaḥ || 7 ||
kālena sā tathā rājanduhitā devarūpiṇī ||
sāvitryā prītayā dattā sāvitryā japtayā tadā ||8||
sāvitrītyeva nāmāsyāścakrurviprāstathā pitā ||
sā gṛhavatī saśrīrvyavarddhata nṛpātmajā ||
sāvitrī sukumārāṅgī yauvanasthā babhūva ha || 9 ||
tāṃ sumadhyāṃ pṛthuśroṇīṃ pratimāṃ kāñcanīmiva ||
prāpteva devakanyeti dṛṣṭvā tāmitare janāḥ || 4.102.10 ||
sā tu padmapalāśākṣī prajvalaṃtīva tejasā ||
cacāra sā ca sāvitrīvrataṃ yadbhṛguṇoditam || 11 ||
athopoṣya śiraḥsnātā devatāmabhigamya sā ||
hutvāgniṃ vidhivadviprānvācayitveṃduparvaṇi || 12 ||
tebhyaḥ sumanasaḥ śeṣāḥ pratigṛhya nṛpātmajā ||
sādhvī pativratābhyetya devaśrīriva rūpiṇī || 13 ||
sobhivādya pituḥ pādau śeṣānpūrvaṃ nivedya ca ||
kṛtāṃjalirvarārohā nṛpateḥ pārśvataḥ sthitā || 14 ||
tāṃ dṛṣṭvā yauvanaṃ prāptāṃ svacchāṃ tāṃ devarūpiṇīm ||
uvāca rājā saṃmaṃtrya smṛtyarthaṃ saha maṃtribhiḥ ||15||
yuktaḥ pradānakālo.asyāstena kaścidvṛṇotvimām||
vicārayitvā paśyāmi varaṃ tulyaṃ mahātmanaḥ||16||
devādīnāṃ yathā vācyo na labdheyaṃ tathā kuru ||
boddhayamānā mayā putri dharmaśāstreṣu gaccha tam || 17 ||
piturgṛhe tu yā kanyā rajaḥ paśyatyasaṃskṛtā ||
brahmahatyā pitustatra sā kanyā vṛṣalī smṛtā || 18 ||
atorthaṃ preṣayāmīti kuru putri svayaṃvaram ||
vṛddhairamātyaiḥ sahitā śīghraṃ gaccha vidhāraya || 19 ||
evamastviti sāvitrī proktā tasmādviniryayau ||
tapovanāni ramyāṇi rājarṣīṇāṃ jagāma sā || 4.102.20 ||
mānyānāmatra vṛddhānāṃ kṛtvā pādābhiṣecanam ||
tatobhigamya tīrthāni sarvāṇyevāśrayāṇi ca ||21||
ājagāma punarveśma sāvitrī saha maṃtribhiḥ||
tatrāpaśyacca devarṣiṃ nāradaṃ purataḥ pituḥ ||22||
āsīnamāsane vipraṃ praṇamya smitabhāṣiṇī ||
kathayāmāsa tatsarvaṃ yathā vṛtaṃ vane.abhavat || 23 ||
|| sāvitryuvāca || ||
āsītsālveṣu dharmātmā kṣatriyaḥ pṛthivīpatiḥ ||
dyumatsena iti khyāto devadatto babhūva saḥ ||24||
|| nārada uvāca ||
aho bata mahatkaṣṭaṃ sāvitryā nṛpateḥ kṛtam ||
bālyabhāvādyadanayā na kṛtaḥ satyavānnṛpaḥ || 25 ||
satyaṃ vadatyasya pitā satyaṃ mātā prabhāṣate ||
upeto.asti guṇaiḥ sarvairdyumatsenasuto balī ||26||
eko doṣo.asti nānyo.asya so.adyaprabhṛti satyavāk ||
saṃvatsareṇa hīnāyurdeha tyāgaṃ kariṣyati||27||
nāradasya vacaḥ śrutvā tanayāṃ prāha pārthivaḥ ||
putri sāvitri gaccha tvamanyaṃ varaya satpatim||
saṃvatsareṇa solpāyurdehatyāgaṃ kariṣyati ||28||
|| sāvitryuvāca || ||
sakṛjjalpaṃti rājānaḥ sakṛjjalpaṃti paṃḍitāḥ ||
sakṛtpradīyate kanyā trīṇyetāni sakṛtsakṛt ||29||
dīrghāyuratha vālpāyuḥ saguṇo nirguṇo.api vā ||
sakṛdvṛtomayā bhartā na dvitīyaṃ vṛṇomyaham||4.102.30||
manasā niścayaṃ kṛtvā tato vācā.abhidhīyate||
kriyate karmaṇā paścātpramāṇaṃ me manaḥ sadā||31||
||nārada uvāca || ||
yadyetadiṣṭaṃ duhitustataḥ śīghraṃ vidhīyatām ||
avighnamagre sāvitryāḥ pradāne duhitustava||32||
evamuktvā samutpatya nāradastridivaṃ gataḥ ||
rājā ca duhituḥ sarvaṃ vaivāhikamathākarot ||
śubhe muhūrte pārśvasthairbrāhmaṇairvedapāragaiḥ || 33 ||
sāvitryapi varaṃ labdhvā bhartāraṃ manasepsitam ||
mumude.atīva tanvaṃgī svargaṃ prāpyeva puṇyakṛt ||34||
evaṃ tatrāśrame teṣāṃ vasatāṃ prītipūrvakam ||
kālastapasyatāṃ kaścidaticakrāma bhārata ||35||
sāvitryāstapyamānāyāstiṣṭhaṃtyāśca divāniśam||
nāradena yaduktaṃ tadvākyaṃ manasi vartate ||36||
tataḥ kāle bahutithe vyatikrāṃte kadācana||
saprāptakālo mriyeta iti saṃciṃtya bhāminī||
proṣṭhapade site pakṣe dvādaśyāṃ rajanīmukhe || 37 ||
gaṇayantī ca sāvitrī nāradoktaṃ vaco hṛdi ||
vrataṃ trirātramuddiśya divārātraṃ vinābhavat || 38 ||
tatastrirātraṃ nirvartya snātvā saṃtarpya devatāḥ ||
caturthe.ahani martavyamiti saṃciṃtya bhāminī ||
śvaśrūśvaśurayoḥ pādau vavaṃde cāruhāsinī || 39 ||
atha pratasthe paraśuṃ gṛhītvā satyavānvanam ||
sāvitryapi ca bhartāraṃ gacchataḥ pṛṣṭhato.anvagāt || 4.102.40 ||
tato.avadatsa bhartā tāṃ pṛcchasva śvaśurau nijau ||
tathetyuktvā hi papraccha natvā śvaśrūpadāni sā || 41 ||
śvaśurāvavadatāṃ ca na gaṃtavyaṃ tvayānaghe ||
bāle tvaṃ paramaṃ bhīruḥ kathaṃ gacchasi kānanam || 42||
bhūyo bhāvena sā proce draṣṭavyaṃ kānanaṃ mayā ||
gaccheti tāṃ tadocāte śvaśurau cāruhāsinīm || 43 ||
tato gṛhītvā tarasā phalapuṣpasamitkuśān ||
yathā śuṣkāṇi vādāya kāṣṭhabhāramakalpayat || 44 ||
atha pāṭayataḥ kāṣṭhaṃ jātā śirasi vedanā ||
vyathā māṃ bādhate bāle svaptumicchāmi suṃdari || 49 ||
viśramasva mahābāho sāvitrī prāha duḥkhitā ||
paścādupagamiṣyāmi svāśramaṃ śramanāśanam || 46 ||
yāvadutsaṃgake kṛtvā śira āste mahītale ||
tāvaddadarśa sāvitrī puruṣaṃ kṛṣṇapiṃgalam ||
kirīṭinaṃ pītavastraṃ sākṣātsūryamivoditam || 47 ||
tamuvācātha sāvitrī praṇamya madhupiṃgalam ||
kastvaṃ devo.atha vā daityo māṃ dharṣayitumāgataḥ || || 48 ||
na cāhaṃ kenacicchakyā svadharmādavaropitum ||
spraṣṭuṃ vā puruṣaśreṣṭha dīptā vahniśikhā yathā ||49||
|| yama uvāca || ||
yamaḥ saṃyamanaścāsmi sarvalokabhayaṃkaraḥ ||
kṣīṇāyureṣa te bhartā taṃ nayāmi pativrate ||
na śakyaḥ kiṃkarairnetumato.ahaṃ svayamāgataḥ || 4.102.50 ||
evamuktvā satyavataḥ śarīrātpāśasaṃcayaiḥ ||
aṃguṣṭhamātraṃ puruṣaṃ niścakarṣa yamo balāt ||
atha prayātumārebhe paṃthānaṃ pitṛsevitam || 51 ||
sāvitryapi varārohā pṛṣṭhato.a nujagāma ha ||
pativratāṃ tathā śrāṃtāṃ tāmuvāca yamastadā || 52 ||
nivarta gaccha sāvitri svagṛhe tvamihāgatā ||
eṣa mārgo viśālākṣi na kenāpyanugamyate || 53 ||
|| sāvitryuvāca || ||
na śramo na ca me glāniḥ kadācidapi jāyate ||
bhartāramanugacchaṃti yāstāsāṃ na śramādayaḥ ||54||
satāṃ saṃto gatirnānyā strīṇāṃ bhartā sadā gatiḥ ||
vedo varṇāśramāṇāṃ ca śiṣyāṇāṃ ca gatirguruḥ || 55 ||
sarveṣāmeva jaṃtūnāṃ sthānamasti mahītalam ||
bhartāra eva manujastrīṇāṃ nānyaḥ samāśrayaḥ || 56 ||
evamanyaiśca vividhairvākyairddharmārthasaṃhitaiḥ ||
tutoṣa sūryatanayaḥ sāvitrīṃ ceda mabravīt|| 57 ||
tuṣṭo.asmi tava bhadraṃ te varaṃ varaya bhāmini ||
sāvitryapi varānvavre vinayāvanatānanā || 58 ||
cakṣuḥprāptistathā rājyaṃ śvasu rasya mahātmanaḥ ||
pituḥ putraśataṃ caiva putrāṇāṃ śatamātmanaḥ || 59 ||
jīvitaṃ ca tathā bhartudharmasiddhiśca śāśvatī ||
dharmarājo varāndattvā preṣayāmāsa tāṃ tataḥ || 4.102.60 ||
atha bhartāramāsādya sāvitrī hṛṣṭamānasā ||
jagāma sāśramapadaṃ saha bhartrā nirākulā || 61 ||
bhādrasya paurṇamāsyāṃ tu yathā cīrṇaṃ vrataṃ tvidam ||
māhātmyamasya nṛpate kathitaṃ sakalaṃ mayā || 62 ||
|| yudhiṣṭhira uvāca || ||
kīdṛśaṃ tadvrataṃ deva sāvitryā yadanuṣṭhitam ||
tasminbhādrapade māsi siddhānnaṃ tasya kīdṛśam || 63 ||
kā devatā vrate tasminbrūhi kāmaṃ prati prabho ||
savistaraṃ hṛṣīkeśa brūhi dharmaṃ sanātanam || 64 ||
|| śrīkṛṣṇa uvāca || |
śrūyatāṃ pāṃḍavaśreṣṭha sāvitrīvratamādarāt ||
kathayāmi kathaṃ cīrṇaṃ tayā satyā yudhiṣṭhira || 65 ||
trayodaśyāṃ bhādrapade daṃtadhāvanapūrvakam ||
trirātraṃ niyamaḥ kāryaṃ upavāsasya bhārata || 66 ||
aśaktyā tu trayodaśyāṃ naktaṃ kuryājjitendriyaḥ ||
ayācitaṃ caturdaśyāmupavāsena pūrṇimām || 67 ||
nityaṃ snātvā mahānadyāṃ taḍāge cātha nirjhare ||
viśeṣaḥ paurṇamāsyāṃ tu snānaṃ sarṣapamṛjjalaiḥ || 68 ||
gṛhītvā tilakānpātre prasthamātraṃ yudhiṣṭhira ||
