atha vā dhānyamādāya yavaśālitilādikam || 69 ||
tato vaṃśamaye pātre vastrayugmena veṣṭayet ||
sāvitrīpratimāṃ kṛtvā sarvāvayavaśobhanām || 4.102.70 ||
sauvarṇī mṛnmayīṃ vāpi svaśaktyā raupyanirmitām ||
raktavastrayugaṃ dadyātsāvitryai brahmaṇe tathā || 71 ||
sāvitrīṃ brahmaṇā sārddhamevaṃ bhaktyā prapūjayet ||
gaṃdhaiḥ sugaṃdhipuṣpaiśca dhūpanaivedyadīpakaiḥ || 72||
pūrṇaiḥ kośātakairbhakṣyaiḥ kūṣmāṃḍaiḥ karkaṭīphalaiḥ ||
nālikeraiśca kharjūraiḥ kapisthairdāḍimīphalaiḥ || 73 ||
jaṃbūjaṃbīranāraṃgaiḥ karkaṭaiḥ panasaistathā ||
jīrakaiḥ kaṭukhaṃḍaiśca guḍena lavaṇena ca || 74 ||
virūḍhaiḥ saptadhānyaiśca vaṃśapātre prakalpitaiḥ ||
rājanyā sūtrakaṃṭaiśca śubhaiḥ kuṃkumakeśaraiḥ || 75 ||
avatāravatītyevaṃ sāvitrī brahmaṇaḥ priyā ||
tāmarcayeta maṃtreṇa sāvitrīṃ brāhmaṇaḥ svayam ||
itareṣāṃ purāṇoktamaṃtro.atra samudāhṛtaḥ || 76 ||
oṃkārapūrvake devi vīṇāpustaka dhāriṇi ||
vedamātarnamastubhyamavaidhavyaṃ prayaccha me || 77 ||
evaṃ saṃpūjya vidhivajjāgaraṃ kārayettataḥ ||
gītavāditraśabdena hyaṣṭatārīkadaṃbakaiḥ || 78 ||
nṛtyahāsairnayedrātriṃ pṛṣṭhataśca kathānakaiḥ ||
sāvitryākhyānakaṃ vāpi vācayeddvijasattamam ||
yāvatprabhātasamayaṃ gītyā bhāvarasaiḥ samam || 79 ||
tataḥ prabhāte vimala uṣaḥkāle hyupasthite ||
brāhmaṇe vedaviduṣi sāvitrīṃ vinivedayet || 4.102.80 ||
yathā sāvitrakalpajñe sāvitryākhyānavācake ||
daivajña uṃcchavṛttau ca daridre cāgnihotriṇi || 81 ||
maṃtreṇānena kauṃteya praṇamya vidhipūrvakam ||
darbhākṣatatilairmiśrā pūrvāśābhimukhāsthitā ||
sudhī vipravaro vipra oṃkārasvastipūrvake || 82 ||
sāvitrīyaṃ mayā dattā sahiraṇyā mahāsatī ||
brahmaṇaḥ prīṇanārthāya brāhmaṇa pratigṛhyatām || 83 ||
evaṃ dattvā dvijeṃdrāya sāvitrīṃ tāṃ yudhiṣṭhira ||
naivedyādi ca tatsarvaṃ brāhmaṇaṃ svagṛhaṃ nayet ||
svayaṃ daśapadaṃ gacchetsvaveśma punarāviśet || 84 ||
tatra bhuktvā haviṣyānnaṃ brāhmaṇairbāṃdhavaiḥ saha ||
visarjayettato viprānsāvitrī prīyatāmiti || 85 ||
paṃcadaśyāṃ tathā jyeṣṭhe vaṭake ca mahāsatī ||
trirātropoṣitā nārī vidhinānena pūjayet || 86 ||
sārddhaṃ satyavatā sādhvī phalanaivedyadīpakaiḥ ||
paṭṭāvalaṃbanaṃ kṛtvā kāṣṭhabhāraṃ yudhiṣṭhira || 87 ||
rātrau jāgaraṇaṃ kṛtvā nṛtyagītapurassaraiḥ ||
prabhāte vidhinā pūrvaṃ pūrvoktena narottamaḥ ||
tatsarvaṃ brāhmaṇe dadyātpraṇipatya kṣamāpayet || 88 ||
etattu te vratamidaṃ kathitaṃ vidhivanmayā ||
yāścariṣyaṃti lokesminputrapautrasamanvitāḥ ||
bhuktvā bhogāṃściraṃ bhūmau yāsyaṃti brahmaṇaḥ padam || 89 ||
etatpuṇyaṃ pāpaharaṃ dhanyaṃ duḥsvapnanāśanam ||
japatāṃ śṛṇvatāṃ caiva sāvitrīvratamādarāt || 4.102.90 ||
smṛtyarthavedajananīṃ sahaśaṃbhujāyāṃ saṃpūjayediha trirātrakṛtopavāsā ||
sāvitrivatpitṛkulaṃ ca tathā svabharturuddhārayecca vibhunakti ciraṃ sukhāni || 91 ||
iti śrībhaviṣye mahāpurāṇe uttaraparvaṇi śrīkṛṣṇayudhiṣṭhirasaṃvāde vaṭasāvitrīvratavarṇanaṃ nāma dvyadhikaśatatamo.adhyāyaḥ || 102 || || cha ||
kārtikakṛttikāvratavarṇanam
|| śrīkṛṣṇa uvāca || ||
pūrvamāsītkṛtayuge kṣatriṇī bahuputriṇī ||
nāmnā kaliṃgabhadreti rūpalāvaṇyasaṃyutā || 1 ||
tuṃgastanī padmanetrā haṃsanāgendragāminī ||
saubhāgyaguṇasaṃpūrṇā caṃdrabiṃbanibhānanā || 2 ||
dhanaratnaiśca saṃpūrṇā madhyadeśe vṛṣasthale ||
rājñaḥ patnī tu sā devī dilīpasya mahātmanaḥ ||
kaliṅgabhadrā lalitā mahādevī guṇānvitā || 3 ||
mahāprasādaṃ manvānā bahumānapurassaram ||
brāhmaṇebhyaśca dānāni prayacchati mahāsatī || 4 ||
tyāgasaṃbhogasaubhāgye dvitīyā naiva tādṛśī ||
nārīṇāṃ tu naraśreṣṭha dilīpasya yathā vidhā || 5 ||
yathā ca kārttike māsi gṛhītaṃ kṣattrayāvratam ||
ṣaṇmāsena vrataṃ yāvadidaṃ saṃcintya cetasi ||
pāritaṃ ca tayā sarvaṃ kiṃcinmātraṃ tu vartate || 6 ||
pāraṇepāraṇe vāpi purāṇajñe dvijottame ||
udyāpanaṃ prayacchaṃtī kālaṃ nayati sundarī || 7 ||
kadācidardharātre tu suptā bhartrā sahaiva sā ||
daṣṭā sarpeṇa raudreṇa jagāma nidhanaṃ kṣaṇāt || 8 ||
tena doṣeṇa sā bālā ajāyonau hyajāyata ||
vanecarī dharmaparā pūrvajātismarā dṛḍhā||9||
pūrvābhyāsena tenaiva gṛhītaṃ kṛttikāvratam ||
vyastā yūthaparibhraṣṭā upavāsaparisthitā || 4.103.10 ||
parakṣetreṇa gacchaṃtī ajā sasyāvamarddanī ||
kārttikyāṃ galake baddhvā grāmyakeṇa cirāgatā || 11 ||
dṛṣṭātriṇā mahābhāgā pūrvajātismareṇa sā ||
kāraṇaṃ budhya tāṃ buddhvā sahakāliṃdabhadrikām || || 12 ||
mokṣitā badarībaddhā caraṃtī kṛttikāvratam ||
gopālabaṃdhanātsādhvī anirvedaparā tu sā || 13 ||
saṃprāpya badarīpatraṃ pītvā puṣkariṇī payaḥ ||
mametyuktvā hyasaṃbhrāṃtā pārayāmāsa tadvratam ||
tasyai yogaṃ tato dattvā jagāmātristapovanam || 14 ||
sāpi yogeśvarī bhūtvā niṃditvā janma cātmanaḥ ||
tatyāja yogātsvānprāṇānprasthitā gautamasya hi ||
ṛṣerbabhūva duhitā hyahalyāgarbhasundarī || 15 ||
yogalakṣmīti nāmnā sā kanyā guṇagaṇairyutā ||
vidyeva dattā sā pitrā śāṃḍilyāya maharṣaye ||
tapodhanāya dāṃtāya nityaṃ sahacarī babhau || 16 ||
brāhmalakṣmyā dīpyamānā sākṣādvedasmṛtiryathā ||
sarasvatī ca svāhā ca śacī cārundhatī yathā || 17 ||
gaurī rājñī tathā lakṣmīrgāyatrī cottamā satī ||
mahālakṣmīstathā rājañchāṇḍilyasya gṛhe babhau || 18 ||
pitṛdevamanuṣyāṇāṃ nityaṃ śuśrūṣaṇe ratā ||
atha tenātriṇā dṛṣṭā punargarbhavatī gṛhe || 19 ||
bhaktyā bhikṣāṃ prayacchaṃtī brāhmaṇānāmaniṃditā ||
yogādviditvā tāmūce bhagavānpūrvavacchanaiḥ || 4.103.20 ||
yogalakṣmi mahābhāge vartaṃte kati kṛttikāḥ ||
sāpi jātismarā prāha bhagavaṃtaṃ mahāsatī ||
ṣaḍvartaṃte mahāyoginnekā paravaśe sthitā || 21 ||
tacchrutvāsyai bhagavatā sakāruṇyena cetasā ||
dattaṃ vrataṃ tathā mantro yena svargaṃ jagāma sā || 22 ||
iha bhuktvā ciraṃ bhogānputrapautraśriyā vṛtā ||
tataḥ sā tatpadaṃ prāptā punarāvṛttidurlabham || 23 || ||
|| yudhiṣṭhira uvāca || ||
kīdṛśaṃ tadvrataṃ kṛṣṇa maṃtraścāpi janārdana ||
vidhānaṃ kṛttikānāṃ ca taṃ ca kālaṃ vadasva me || 24 ||
|| śrīkṛṣṇa uvāca || ||
kṛttikāsu svayaṃ somaḥ kṛttikāsu bṛhaspatiḥ ||
yadā syātsomavāreṇa sā mahākārtikī smṛtā || 25 ||
īdṛśī bahubhirvarṣairbahupuṇyaiśca labhyate ||
tathā sā na vṛthā neyā yadīcchecchreya ātmanaḥ || 26 ||
anyāpi kārtikī pārtha samupoṣya vidhānataḥ ||
tasyā vidhānaṃ rājendra śṛṇuṣvaikamanā bhava || 27 ||
kārttike śuklapakṣasya pūrṇamāsyāṃ dinodaye ||
naktāya niyamaṃ kuryāddantadhāvanapūrvakam || 28 ||
upavāsasya vā śaktyā tataḥ snātvā jalāśaye ||
kurukṣetre prayāge vā puṣkare naimiṣe tathā || 29 ||
śālagrāme kuśāvarte mūlasthāne sakuntale ||
gokarṇe vārbude puṇye.atha vāpyamarakaṃṭake || 4.103.30 ||
pure vā nagare vāpi grāme ghoṣe.atha pattane ||
yatra vā tatra vā snāyānnaro yoṣidathāpi vā ||
devarṣipitṛpūjāṃ ca kṛtvā homaṃ yudhiṣṭhira || 31 ||
tato.astasamaye prāpte pātraṃ gavyasya sarpiṣaḥ ||
kṣīrasya vā susaṃpūrṇaṃ kṛtvā guḍaphalānvitam ||
ṣaṭpramāṇaṃ yathā vyomni kṛttikāśakaṭaṃ nyaset|| 32 ||
ṣaṭkṛttikānāṃ biṃbāni svarṇaraupyamayāni ca ||
ratnagarbhāṇi kuryācca svaśaktyā pāṇḍunandana 33 ||
prathamā svarṇaniṣpannā dvitīyā raupyakīkṛtā ||
tṛtīyā ratnaghaṭitā caturthī navanītajā || 34 ||
pañcamī kaṇikānyūnā ṣaṣṭhī piṣṭamayī kṛtā||
ṣaṭ kṛttikāḥ kṛtabiṃbāḥ kṛtvālaktakasūtrikāḥ || 35 ||
ratnagarbhāḥ kuṃkumāktāḥ pṛṣṭhataḥ stabakānvitāḥ ||
siṃdūracandanābhyaktā jātīpuṣpai supūjitāḥ ||
maṃtreṇānena rājendra dvijāya pratipādayet || 36 ||
oṃ saptarṣidārā hyanalasya vallabhā yā brahmaṇā rakṣitayeti yuktāḥ ||
tuṣṭāḥ kumārasya yathārthamātaro mamāpi suprītatarā bhavaṃtu-svāhā || 37 ||
evamuccārya viprāya pradeyāḥ kṛttikā nṛpa ||
brāhmaṇopi pratīccheta maṃtreṇāneva pāṃḍava || 38 ||
dharmadāḥ kāmakāḥ saṃtu imā nakṣatramātaraḥ ||
kṛttikā durgasaṃsārāttārayaṃtvāvayoḥ kulam || 39 ||
anena vidhinā dattvā dṛṣṭvā caivāṃbare sthitāḥ ||
visṛjya brāhmaṇānbhaktyā cānuvrajya padāni ṣaṭ ||
nivartya ca kathārthaṃ tu śṛṇuyātphalamāpnuyāt || 4.103.40 ||
vimānenārkavarṇena gatvā nakṣatramaṃḍalam ||
divyena vapuṣā yuktaḥ srakcaṃdanavibhūṣitaḥ || 41 ||
divyanārīgaṇavṛtaḥ sukhaṃ bhuṃkte hyanāmayam ||
dodhūyamānaścamarai ratnapaṃktyā virājitaḥ || 42 ||
pārijātakamaṃdārapuṣpabhāropaśobhitaḥ ||
kṛtārthaḥ paripūrṇāśastiṣṭhedābhūtasaṃplavam || 43 ||
tārāḥ .a kṛtvā vratāṃte vā gatvā svargaṃ sabhartṛkā ||
ramate nirbhayā sādhvī sarvabhogasamanvitā || 44 ||
yaścaitackṛṇuyātpārtha bhaktiyuktaḥ samādhinā ||
nārī vā puruṣo vāpi mucyate sarvakilbiṣaiḥ || 45 || sauvarṇaraupyamaṇigonavanītasiddhāḥ ṣaṭ kṛttikāḥ kaṇikapiṣṭamayīśca kṛtvā ||
pātre nidhāya kusumākṣatadhūpadīpaiḥ saṃpūjya janmagahanaṃ na viśaṃti martyāḥ || 46 || || iti śrībhaviṣye mahāpurāṇa uttaraparvaṇi śrīkṛṣṇayudhiṣṭhirasaṃvāde kārtikyāṃ kṛttikāvratavarṇanaṃ nāma tryadhikaśatatamo.adhyāyaḥ || 103 || || cha ||
pūrṇamanorathavratavarṇanam
|| śrīkṛṣṇa uvāca || ||
pañcadaśyāṃ śuklapakṣe phālgunasya narottama ||
pākhaṃḍānpatitāṃścaiva tathaivāntyāvasāyinaḥ || 1 ||
nāstikānbhinnavṛttāṃśca pāpino naiva cālapet ||
nārāyaṇe gatamanāḥ puruṣo hi jitendriyaḥ ||2 ||
tiṣṭhanvrajanpraskhalanvā bhuṃjānopi janārdanam ||
kīrtayecca kriyākāle saptakṛtvo mahīpate || 3 ||
lakṣmyā samanvitaṃ devamarcayecca janārdanam ||
saṃdhyādyuparame candrasvarūpaṃ harimīśvaram ||
rātrau ca lakṣmīṃ saṃcintya samyagargheṇa pūjayeta || 4 ||
śrīniśākararūpastvaṃ vāsudeva jagatpate ||
manobhilaṣitaṃ deva pūrayasva namonamaḥ || 5 ||
maṃtreṇānena dattvārghaṃ devadevasya bhaktitaḥ ||
naktaṃ bhuñjīta na svairaṃ tailakṣāravivarjitam || 6 ||
tathaiva caitre vaiśākhe jyeṣṭhe ca nṛpasattama ||
arcayecca yathāproktaṃ māsimāsi ca taddine || 7 ||
niṣpāditaṃ bhavedekaṃ pāraṇaṃ pārtha śaktitaḥ ||
dvitīyaṃ cāpi vakṣyāmi pāraṇaṃ te narottama|| 8 ||
āṣāḍhe śrāvaṇe māsi prāpte bhādrapade tathā ||
tathaivāśvayujebhyarcya śrīdharaṃ priyayā saha ||
arghaṃ candramase dattvā bhuñjātātha yathāvidhi| || 9 ||
dvitīyametadākhyātaṃ tṛtīyaṃ pāraṇaṃ śṛṇu ||
kārtikādiṣu māseṣu tathaivābhyarcya keśavam ||
bhūtyā samanvitaṃ dadyācchaśāṃkāya tathā niśi ||| || 4.104.10 ||
bhuñjīta ca yathākhyātaṃ tṛtīyaṃ pāraṇaṃ śṛṇu ||
pratipūjya tato dadyādbrāhmaṇebhyaśca dakṣiṇām ||
pratimāsaṃ ca vakṣyāmi prāśanaṃ kāyaśuddhaye || || 11 ||
caturaḥ prathamānmāsānpañcagavyamudāhṛtam ||
kuśodakaṃ tathaivānyaduktaṃ māsacatuṣṭayam || 12 ||
sūryāṃśutaptaṃ tadvacca jalaṃ kāyaviśodhanam ||
gītavādyādikaṃ rātrau tathā kṛṣṇakathāṃ śubhām ||
kārayeccaiva devasya pāraṇepāraṇe gate || 13 ||
janārdanaṃ sapatnīkamarcayetprathamaṃ tataḥ ||
saśrīkaṃ śrīdharaṃ tadvattṛtīye bhūtikeśavau || 14 ||
pratimāsaṃ tu nāmāni kṛṣṇasyaitāni bhārata ||
kṛtopavāsaḥ susnātaḥ pūjayitvā janārdanam ||
uccārayannaro yāti yathālokaṃ yathāsukham || 15 ||
tato viprāya vai dadyādudakuṃbhaṃ sadakṣiṇam ||
upānadvastrayugmaṃ ca cchatraṃ kanakameva ca || 16 ||
yadvai māsagataṃ nāma prīyatāmiti kīrtayet ||
keśavaṃ mārgaśīrṣe tu pauṣe nārāyaṇaṃ tathā || 17 ||
mādhavaṃ māghamāse tu govindamapi phālgune ||
caitramāse tathā viṣṇuṃ vaiśākhe madhusūdanam || 18 ||
jyeṣṭhe trivikramo jñeyastathāṣāḍhe ca vāmanaḥ ||
śrīdharaḥ śrāvaṇe tadvaddhṛṣīkeśeti cāparam || 19 ||
rāmo bhādrapade māsi gīyate puṇyakāṃkṣibhiḥ ||
padmanābhamāśvayuji dāmodaramataḥ param || 4.104.20 ||
kārtike devadeveśaṃ stuvaṃstarati durgatim ||
evaṃ saṃvatsarasyāṃte pratimāse kramoditam||
yadi dātuṃ na śaknoti dadyāccaivaikahelayā ||21||
viśeṣaścātra kathitaścandraṃ kṛtvā hiraṇmayam||
pūjayitvā phalairvastrairbrāhmaṇāya nivedayet||22||
stuvannevaṃ vidhānena pāraṇe.abhyarcayetprabhum||
tāvaṃti janmānyasukhaṃ nāpnotīṣṭaviyogajam ||23||
ihaiva svasthatāṃ prāpya maraṇe smaraṇaṃ tataḥ||
sthānaṃ tu mama saṃprāpya svargaloke mahīyate || 24 ||
tato mānuṣyamāsādya nirātaṃko gatajvaraḥ ||
dhanadhānyavati sphīte janma sādhukulerhati ||25||
śrīśarvarī madhuni hā bhagavāñchaśāṃkaḥ saṃkalpya candanatilākṣatapuṣpamiśram ||
yacchaṃti ye.arghamanayā nṛpa pūrṇimāyāṃ nūnaṃ bhavaṃti paripūrṇamanorathāste || 26 ||
iti śrībhaviṣye mahāpurāṇa uttaraparvaṇi śrīkṛṣṇayudhiṣṭhirasaṃvāde pūrṇamanorathavrataṃ nāma caturadhikaśatatamo.adhyāyaḥ || 104 || ||
viśokapūrṇimāvratavarṇanam
|| śrīkṛṣṇa uvāca || ||
aśokapūrṇimāṃ cānyāṃ śṛṇuṣva gadato mama ||
yāmupoṣya narāḥ śokaṃ nāpnuvaṃti kadācana || 1 ||
phālgunāmalapakṣasya paurṇamāsyāṃ narottama ||
mṛjjalena naraḥ snātvā dattvā śirasi vai mṛdam ||
mṛtprāśanaṃ tataḥ kṛtvā kṛtvā ca sthaṃḍilaṃ mṛdā || 2 ||
puṣpaiḥ patraistathābhyarcya bhūdharaṃ nāma nāmataḥ ||
dharaṇīṃ ca tathā devīmaśoketyabhikīrtayet || 3 ||
yathā viśokāṃ dharaṇe kṛtavāṃstvāṃ janārdanaḥ ||
tathā māṃ sarvaśokebhyo mocayāśeṣadhāriṇi ||4 ||
yathā samastabhūtānāmādhārattvaṃ vyavasthitā ||
tathā viśokaṃ kuru māṃ sakalecchāvibhūtibhiḥ || 5 ||
dhyānamātre yathā viṣṇoḥ svāsthyaṃ jānāsi medini ||
tathā manaḥ svasthatāṃ me kuru tvaṃ bhūtadhāriṇi || 6 ||
evaṃ stutvā tathābhyarcya candrāyārghyaṃ nivedya ca||
upoṣitavyaṃ naktaṃ vā bhoktavyaṃ tailavarjitam || 7 ||
anenaiva prakāreṇa catvāraḥ phālgunādayaḥ ||
upoṣyā nṛpate māsāḥ prathamaṃ pāraṇaṃ smṛtam || || 8 ||
āṣāḍhādiṣu māseṣu tadvatsnānaṃ mṛdaṃbunā ||
tathaiva prāśanaṃ pūjā tadvadiṃdostathārhaṇam || 9 ||
caturṣvanyeṣu caivoktaṃ kārtikādiṣu pāraṇam||
pāraṇatritaye caiva cāturmāsikamucyate || 4.105.10 ||
viśeṣapūjā dānaṃ ca tathā jāgaraṇaṃ niśi ||
viśeṣeṇaiva kartavyaṃ pāraṇepāraṇe gate || 11 ||
prathame dharaṇī nāma tubhyaṃ māsacatuṣṭayam ||
dvitīye medinī vācyā tṛtīye ca vasundharā || 12 ||
pāraṇepāraṇe pārtha yugmānevārccayeddvijān ||
dharaṇīṃ deva devaṃ ca tattatsthānena keśavam | | 13 ||
vastrābhāve ca sūtreṇa pūjayeddharaṇīṃ tathā ||
ghṛtābhāve tathā kṣīraṃ śastaṃ vā salilaṃ hareḥ | |. 14 | |
evaṃ saṃvatsarasyāṃte gauḥ savatsā dvijātaye ||
pradeyā dharaṇī devī vastrālaṃkārasaṃyutā || 15 ||
pātālasaṃsthayā devyā cīrṇametanmahāvratam | |
dharaṇyā keśava prītyai tataḥ prāptā samunnatiḥ || 16 ||
devena coktā dharaṇī varāhavapuṣā purā ||
upavāsavrataparā samuddhṛtya rasātalāt || 17 | |
vratenānena kalyāṇi tvayāhaṃ paritoṣitaḥ ||
tasmātprasādamatulaṃ karomi tava suvate || 18 ||
yathaiva kuruṣe bhaktyā pūjāṃ mama suśobhanām | |
tathaiva tava kalyāṇi praṇato yaḥ kariṣyati | | 1 9| |
vratametadupāśritya pāraṇaṃ ca yathāvidhi | |
sarvabādhāvinirmukto janmajanmāṃtarāṇyapi ||
viśokaḥ sarvakalyāṇabhājanaṃ syānna saṃśayaḥ || 4.105.20 ||
yathā tvameva vasudhe saṃprāptā nirvṛteḥ padam | |
tathā sa parama~mlloke sukhaṃ prāpsyati mānavaḥ | | 21 ||
evametanmahāpuṇyaṃ sarvapāpapraśāṃtidam | |
viśokākhyaṃ vratavaraṃ tatkuruṣva mahāvratam || 22 ||
samyagviśokakaraṇī nṛpapūrṇimā te khyātā mayā manumahendrasamānakīrte ||
evaṃ karoti kurupuṃgava yaḥ prayatnācchoko na tasya bhavatīha kulepi puṃsaḥ || 23 | | iti śrībhaviṣye mahāpurāṇa uttaraparvaṇi śrīkṛṣṇayudhiṣṭhirasaṃvāde viśokapūrṇimāvrataṃ nāma pañcādhikaśatatamo.adhyāyaḥ || 105 || cha | |
anantavratavarṇanam
|| yudhiṣṭhira uvāca | | ||
sarvakāmānavāpnoti samārādhya janārdanam ||
prakārairbahubhiḥ kṛṣṇa yānyānicchati cetasā || 1 ||
nṛṇāṃ strīṇāṃ ca sarveṣāṃ nānyacchokasya kāraṇam ||
apatyādadhikaṃ kiṃcidvidyate hyatra janmani|| || 2 ||
aputratā mahāduḥkhamatiduḥkhaṃ kuputratā ||
suputraḥ sarvasaukhyānāṃ hetubhūto mato mama || 3 ||
dhanyāste ye sutaṃ prāptāḥ sarvaduḥkhavivarjitam | |
śaktaṃ praśāṃtaṃ balinaṃ parāṃ nirvṛtimāgatam ||4||
svakarmābhirataṃ nityaṃ devadvijaparāyaṇam||
śāstrajñaṃ sarvadharmajñaṃ dīnānāthānukaṃpinam || 5 || |
vinirjitārisarvasvaṃ manohṛdayanandanam ||
devānukūlatāyuktaṃ yuktaṃ samyagguṇena ca ||6||
mitrasvajanasanmānalabdhaṃ nirvāṇamuttamam ||
yaḥ prāpnoti sutaṃ tasmānnānyo dhanyataro bhuvi || 7 ||
so.ahamevaṃvidhaṃ śrotuṃ karmecchāmi mahāmate ||
yenedṛglakṣaṇaḥ putraḥ prāpyate bhuvi mānavaiḥ || 8 ||
|| śrīkṛṣṇa uvāca || ||
evametanmahābhāga putrāputrasamudbhavam ||
duḥkhaṃ prayātyupaśamaṃ tanayānneha kenacit || 9 ||
atrāpi śrūyatāṃ vṛttaṃ yatpūrvamabhavanmune ||
utpattau kārtavīryasya haihayasya mahātmanaḥ || 4.106.10 ||
kṛtavīryo mahīpālo haihayo nāma vai purā ||
tasya śīladhanā nāma babhūva varavarṇinī || 11 ||
patnī sahasrapravarā mahiṣī śīlamaṇḍanā ||
sā tvaputrā mahābhāgā maitreyīṃ paryapṛcchata || 12 ||
guṇavatputralābhāya kṛtāsanaparigraham ||
tayā pṛṣṭātha sā samyaṅmaitreyī brahmavādinī || 13 ||
kathayāmāsa paramaṃ nāmnānantavrataṃ mahat ||
sarvakāmaphalāvāptikāraṇaṃ pāpanāśanam ||
tasyāḥ suputralābhāya rājaputryāstapasvinī || 14 ||
|| maitreyyuvāca || ||
yo yamicchennaraḥ kāmaṃ nārī vā varavarṇinī || 15 ||
sa taṃ samārādhya vibhuṃ samāpnoti janārdanāt ||
mārgaśīrṣe mṛgaśiro bhīmo yasmindine.abhavat ||16||
tasminsaṃprāśya gomūtraṃ snāto niyatamānasaḥ ||
puṣpairdhūpaistathā gandhairupavāsaiśca bhaktitaḥ ||
vāmapādamanaṃtasya pūjayedvaravarṇini || 17 ||
anaṃtaḥ sarvakāmānāmanaṃtaṃ bhagavānphalam ||
dadātvanantaṃ ca punastadevānyatra janmani || 18 ||
anaṃtapuṇyopacayamanantaṃ tu mahāvratam ||
yathābhilaṣitāvāptiṃ kuru me puruṣottama || 19 ||
ityuccāryābhipūjyainaṃ yathāvadvidhinā naraḥ ||
samāhitamanā bhūtvā praṇipātapurassaram|| 4.106.20 ||
viprāya dakṣiṇāṃ dadyādanaṃtaḥ prīyatāmiti ||
samuccārya tato naktaṃ bhuñjītatailavarjitam || 21 ||
tataśca pauṣe puṣyarkṣe tathaiva bhagavatkaṭim ||
vāmāmabhyarccayedbhaktyā gomūtraprāśanaṃ tataḥ ||22||
anaṃtaḥ sarvakāmānā miti coccārayetpunaḥ||
bhojayeta tathā viprānvācayitvā yathāvidhi ||23||
māghe maghāsu tadvacca bāhuṃ devasya pūjayet ||
skandhau ca mama phālgunyoḥ phālgune māsi bhāmini || 24 ||
caturṣveteṣu gomūtraṃ prāśayennṛpanaṃdini ||
brāhmaṇāya tathā dadyāttilānkanakameva ca || 25 ||
devasya dakṣiṇaṃ skandhaṃ caitre citrāsu pūjayet ||
tathaiva prāśanaṃ cātra pañcagavyamudāhṛtam ||
vipre pravācake dadyādyavānmāsacatuṣṭayam || 26 ||
vaiśākhe ca viśākhāsu bāhuṃ sampūjya dakṣiṇam||
tathaivoktānyavāndadyānnaktaṃ kuryādbhujikriyām || 27 ||
jyeṣṭhāsu kaṭipūjāṃ ca jyeṣṭhamāsi śubhavrate ||
āṣāḍhāsu tathāṣāḍhe kuryātpādārcanaṃ śubhe || 28 ||
pādadvayaṃ tu śravaṇe śrāvaṇe māsi pūjayet ||
ghṛtaṃ viprāya dātavyaṃ prāśanīyaṃ yathāvidhi || 29 ||
śrāvaṇādiṣu māseṣu prāśanaṃ dānameva ca ||
etadevaṃ samākhyātaṃ devāṃstadvacca pūjayet || 4.106.30 ||
guhyaṃ proṣṭhapadāyoge māsi bhādrapade.arcayet ||
tadvadāśvayuje pūjyaṃ hṛdayaṃ cāśvinīṣu ca || 31 ||
kuryātsamāhitamanāḥ snānaṃ prāśanamarcanam ||
anantaśirasaḥ pūjāṃ kārttike kṛttikāsu ca || 32 ||
yasminyasmindine pūjā tatratatra tadā dine ||
nāmānaṃtasya japtavyaṃ kṣutapraskhalitādiṣu ||33||
ghṛtenānaṃtamuddiśya pūrvaṃ māsacatuṣṭayam ||
kurvīta homaṃ caitrādau śālinā kulanaṃdini || 34 ||
kṣīreṇa śrāvaṇādau ca homo māsacatuṣṭayam ||
praśastaṃ sarvamāseṣu haviṣyānnena bhojanam || 35 ||
evaṃ dvādaśabhirmāsaiḥ pāraṇātritayaṃ śubhe ||
vratāvasāne cānantaṃ sauvarṇaṃ kārayecchubham || 36 ||
rājataṃ musalaṃ caiva halaṃ pārśveṣu vinyaset ||
puṣpadhūpādinaivedyaiḥ pūjā kāryā yathāvidhi || 37 ||
tāmrapīṭhopari harermantrairebhiryathākramam ||
namo.astvanaṃtāya śiraḥ pādau sarvātmane namaḥ || 38 ||
śeṣāya jānuyugalaṃ kāmāyeti kaṭiṃ namaḥ ||
namostu vāsudevāya pārśvaṃ saṃpūjayeddhareḥ || 39 ||
saṃkarṣaṇāyetyudaraṃ bhujaṃ sarvāsudhāriṇe ||
kaṇṭhaṃ śrīkaṇṭhanāthāya mukhamiṃdumukhāya ca || 4.106.40 ||
halaṃ ca musalaṃ caiva svanāmnā pūjayedbudhaḥ ||
evaṃ sampūjya govindaṃ sitavastravibhūṣitam || 41 ||
chatropānatsusaṃyuktaṃ sragdāmālaṃkṛtaṃ tathā ||
nakṣatradevatāḥ pūjyā nakṣatrāṇi ca sarvaśaḥ || 42 ||
somo nakṣatrarājaśca māsaḥ saṃvatsaraṃ tathā ||
dvādaśātra ghaṭānkuryātsa toyāṃścānnasaṃyutān || 43 ||
evaṃ saṃpūjya vidhivaddevadevaṃ janārdanam ||
brāhmaṇaṃ pūjayitvā ca vastrairābharaṇaistathā || 44 ||
karṇāṃgulaiḥ pavitraiśca śāṃtaṃ dāṃtaṃ jitendriyam ||
purāṇajñaṃ dharmanityamavyaṃgaṃ supriyaṃvadam || 45 ||
tasmai deyaṃ samastaṃ tadanantaḥ prīyatāmiti ||
anyeṣāṃ brāhmaṇānāṃ ca deyaṃ śaktyā yathepsitam || 46 ||
anena vidhinā pārtha vrataṃ caitatsamāpyate ||
pārite ca samāpnoti sarvāneva manorathān || 47 ||
putrārthibhirvittakāmairbhṛtyadārānabhīpsubhiḥ ||
prārthayadbhiśca martye.asminnārogyaphalasampadaḥ || 48 ||
etadvrataṃ mahābhāge puṇyaṃ svastyayanapradam ||
anaṃtavratasaṃjñaṃ vai sarva pāpapraṇāśanam || 49 ||
tatkuruṣvaiva devi tvaṃ vrataṃ śīladhane param ||
variṣṭhaṃ sarvalokasya yadi putramabhīpsasi || 4.106.50 ||
|| śrīkṛṣṇa uvāca || ||
iti śīladhanā śrutvā maitreyīvacanaṃ śubham ||
cakāraitadvratavaraṃ sā viṣṇvāhitamānasā || 51 ||
putrārthinyāstatastasmādvratenānena suvrata ||
viṣṇustutoṣa tuṣṭe ca viṣṇau sā suṣuve sutam || 52 ||
tasya vai jātamātrasya pravavau cānilaḥ śubham ||
nīrajaskamabhūdvyoma mudaṃ prāpākhilaṃ jagat||53||
devadundubhayo neduḥ puṣpavṛṣṭiḥ papāta ca ||
prajagurdevagaṃdharvā nanṛtuścāpsarogaṇāḥ ||54||
dharme manaḥ samastasya pārtha lokasya cābhavat ||
tasya nāma pitā cakre tanayasyārjuneti vai ||55 ||
kṛtavīryasutatvācca kārtavīryo babhūva saḥ ||
tenāpi bhagavānviṣṇurdattātreyasvarūpavān ||
ārādhito.atimahatā tapasā pārtha bhūbhṛtā ||56||
tasya tuṣṭo jagannāthaścakravartitvamuttamam ||
dadau śauryadhane cāpi sakalānyāyudhāni ca ||
sa vavre ca vadho deva mama tvatto bhavediti ||57||
paraṃ tu smaraṇaṃ jñānaṃ bhītānāmārtināśanam ||
smaraṇādupakārittvaṃ jagato.asya jagatpate ||58||
tamāha devadeveśaḥ puṇḍarīkanibhekṣaṇaḥ ||
sarvametanmahābhāga tava bhūyo bhaviṣyati || 59 ||
yaśca prabhāte rātrau ca tvāṃ naraḥ kīrtayiṣyati ||
namo.astu kārtavīryāyetyabhidhāsyati caiva yaḥ ||
tilaprasthapradānasya naraḥ puṇyamavāpsyati || 4.106.60 ||
anaṣṭadravyatā caiva tava nāmānukīrtane||
bhaviṣyati mahīpāletyuktvā taṃ prayayau hariḥ||61||
sa cāpi varamāsādya prasannādgaruḍadhvajāt ||
pālayāmāsa bhūpālaḥ saptadvīpāṃ vasuṃdharām || 62 ||
teneṣṭaṃ vividhairyajñaiḥ samāptavaradakṣiṇaiḥ ||
jitvārivargamakhilaṃ dharmataḥ pālitāḥ prajāḥ || 63 ||
anaṃtavratamāhātmyādāsādya tanayaṃ ca tam ||
pituḥ putrodbhavaṃ duḥkhaṃ nāsītsvalpamapi prabho || || 64 ||
evametatsamākhyātamanaṃtākhyaṃ vrataṃ tava ||
yatkṛtvā rājapatnī sā kārtavīryamasūyata || 65 ||
yaścaitacchṛṇuyājjanma kārtavīryasya mānavaḥ ||
strī vā duḥkhamapatyotthaṃ saptajanmasu nāśnute || 66 ||
aiśvaryamapratihataṃ paramaṃ vivekaṃ putrānamitrahṛdayārtikarānbahūṃśca ||
kṛtvā tvanaṃta iti yadvrata nāmadheyaṃ prāpnotyanaṃtavibhavasya vibhoḥ prasādāt || 67 || || iti śrībhaviṣye mahāpurāṇa uttaraparvaṇi śrīkṛṣṇayudhiṣṭhirasaṃvāda anaṃtavratavarṇanaṃ nāma ṣaḍadhikaśatatamo.adhyāyaḥ || 106 || || cha ||
sāṃbharāyaṇīvratavarṇanam
|| yudhiṣṭhira uvāca || ||
aprāptairna tathā duḥkhamaiśvaryādyairnarottama ||
yathā manorathaiḥ svaiḥ svairnānāduḥkhaṃ bhavennṛṇām || 1 ||
yathā manorathairlabdhairna syādduḥkhabhayaṃ nṛṇām ||
aiśvaryādvicyuto vāpi saṃtaterdevalokataḥ || 2 ||
abhīṣṭādanyato vāpi yadāghena viniṣkṛtim ||
prāpnoti puruṣo vātha nārī vā puṇyasaṃcayāt ||
tanmamācakṣva bhagavanyena nābhyeti vicyutim || 3 || ||
|| śrīkṛṣṇa uvāca || ||
satyametanmahābhāga duḥkhaṃ prāpnotyasaṃśayaḥ || 4 ||
aiśvaryodayacittasya baṃdhuvargasukhasya ca ||
tadetacchrūyatāṃ pārtha yathā neṣṭātparicyutiḥ || 5 ||
svargāderjāyate samyagupavāsavatāṃ satām ||
dvādaśarkṣāṇi rājendra pratimāsaṃ tu yāni vai || 6 ||
tannāmnā cācyutaṃ teṣu samyaksaṃpūjayennṛpa ||
puṣpairdhūpaistathāṃbhobhirabhīṣṭairaparairapi || 7 ||
āditaḥ kṛttikāṃ kṛtvā kārttike nṛpasattama ||
kṛśarāmatra naivedyaṃ pūrvaṃ māsa catuṣṭayam ||8||
nivedayetphālgunādi saṃyāvaṃ ca tataḥ param ||
āṣāḍhādiṣu devāya pāyasaṃ vinivedayet || 9 ||
tenaivānnena rājendra brāhmaṇānbhojayedbudhaḥ ||
pañcagavyajalasnānaṃ tasyaiva prāśanācchuciḥ || 4.107.10 ||
samyaksaṃpūjya rājendra tameva puruṣottamam ||
praṇamya prārthayedviṣṇuṃ śuciḥ snāto yathāvidhi ||11||
namonamaste.acyuta me kṣayostu pāpasya vṛddhiṃ samupaitu puṇyam ||
aiśvaryavittādi tathā.akṣayaṃ mekṣayaṃ ca mā saṃtatirabhyupaitu || 12 ||
yathācyutastvaṃ parataḥ parasmātsa brahmabhūtaḥ parataḥ parātmā ||
tathācyutaṃ me kuru vāṃchitaṃ tvaṃ harasva pāpaṃ ca tathāprameya || 13 ||
acyutānaṃta govinda prasīda yadabhīpsitam ||
tadakṣayamameyātmankuruṣva puruṣottama || 14 ||
evamevaṃ samabhyarcya prārthayitvā tathā śivam ||
naivedyaṃ svayamaśnīyānnaktaṃ saṃpūjitecyute || 15 ||
tataḥ saṃvatsarasyāṃte sukhasuptotthite.acyute ||
ghṛtapūrṇaṃ tāmrapātraṃ brāhmaṇāya nivedayet ||16||
śaktito dakṣiṇāṃ dadyādacyutaḥ prīyatāmiti ||
tatastu saptame varṣe kuryādudyāpanaṃ budhaḥ || 17 ||
kāryā caivācyutasyārcā śaktyā svarṇamayī nṛpa ||
tadagre brāhmaṇī sthāpyā sthavirā sāṃbharāyaṇī || 18 ||
mahāsatī raupyamayī samānārhā sadevatā ||
tatastau pūjayitvā ca mālyavastravilepanaiḥ || 19 ||
maṃtreṇānena rājendra praṇipatya vidhānataḥ ||
prativarṣaṃ ca dattaṃ cettāmraṃ pātraṃ dvijātaye || 4.107.20 ||
tadevahelayā dadyātsahiraṇyāśvasaṃyutam ||
gāśca pradadyātsaṃ pūjya savatsāḥ kāṃsyadohanāḥ || 21 ||
ekāṃ vā śaktito dadyādbhaktyā tuṣyati keśavaḥ ||
ghaṭāḥ satpātranirdiṣṭāḥ sānnāḥ pūrṇajalojjvalāḥ ||22||
chatropānadyugaiḥ sārdhamevaṃ dattvā visarjayet ||
śayyāṃ satūlikāṃ dadyādgṛhaṃ copaskaraiḥ saha || 23 ||
śriyā ca saha viṣṇuṃ ca pūjayedbhūṣayetprabhum ||
vastrairābharaṇaiścaiva praṇipatya kṣamāpayet || 24 ||
kṛtenānena rājendra cyutiṃ nāpnoti mānavaḥ ||
saṃtateḥ svargavittāderaiśvaryasya tathaiva ca ||
yadvābhimatamanyacca tato na cyavate naraḥ || 25 ||
tasmātsarvaprayatnena māsanakṣatrapūjanaiḥ ||
yajetākṣayakāmastu sadaiva puruṣottamam || 26 ||
|| śrīkṛṣṇa uvāca || ||
atrāpi śrūyate kācitsiddhā svarge mahāvratā ||
nārī tapodhanā bhūtvā prakhyātā sāṃbharāyaṇī ||
samastasaṃdehaharā sadāsvargau kasāṃ hi sā || 27 ||
kasyacittvatha kālasya devarājaḥ śatakratuḥ ||
pūrvendracaritaṃ rājanpapracchedaṃ bṛhaspatim || 28 ||
pūrvendrātparataḥ pūrve ye babhūvuḥ sureśvarāḥ ||
teṣāṃ caritamicchāmi śrotumaṃgirasāṃ vara || 29 ||
evamuktastadā tena devendreṇāmaladyutiḥ ||
prāha dharmabhṛtāṃ śreṣṭhaḥ paramarṣirbṛhaspatiḥ || 4.107.30 ||
nāhaṃ ciraṃtanānvedmi devarāja sureśvarān ||
ātmanaḥ samakālīnamavehi ca sureśvara || 31 ||
tataḥ papraccha devendraḥ kosmābhirmunipuṃgavaḥ ||
praṣṭavyo.atra mahābhāga kṛtādivasatirdivi || 32 ||
bṛhaspatiściraṃ dhyātvā tataḥ prāha śacīpatim ||
tapasvinīṃ mahābhāgāṃ pṛcchaitāṃ sāṃbharāyaṇīm || 33 ||
ityuktastena devendraḥ kautūhalasamanvitaḥ ||
yayau yatra mahābhāgā samyagāste tapasvinī || 34 ||
sā tau dṛṣṭvā samāyāṃtau devarājabṛhaspatī ||
samyagarghyeṇa saṃpūjya praṇipatyāha suvratā || 35 |||
namo.astu devarājāya tathaivāṅgirase namaḥ ||
yadvāṃ kāryaṃ mahābhāgau sakalaṃ tadihocyatām||36||
yadi kartuṃ mayā śakyaṃ tatkariṣye vimṛśya ca ||37||| ||
|| bṛhaspatiruvāca|| ||
āvāmabhyāgatau praṣṭuṃ tvāmatrātivivekinīm ||
yacca kāryaṃ mahābhāge pṛṣṭaṃ tatkathayasva naḥ ||38||
yadi smarasi kalyāṇi pūrvendracaritāni vai ||
tadākhyāhi mahābhāge devendrasya kutūhalam || 39 ||
|| sāṃbharāyaṇyuvāca || ||
yo vai pūrvaṃ sureṃdrasya tataśca prathamo hi yaḥ||
tasmātpūrvataro yasya tasyāpi prathamaśca yaḥ || 4.107.40 ||
teṣāṃ pūrvatarā ye ca vedmi tānakhilānaham ||
teṣāṃ ca caritaṃ kṛtsnaṃ jānāmyagirasāṃ vara ||41||
manvaṃtarāṇyanekāni sṛṣṭīśca tridivaukasām ||
saptarṣīnsubahūnvedmi manūnāṃ ca sutānnṛpān || 42 ||
evamuktvā tatastābhyāṃ suhṛṣṭā sāṃbharāyaṇī ||
yathāvadācaṣṭa tayoḥ pūrvendracaritaṃ mahat || 43 ||
svāyaṃbhuve yastu manau manau svārociṣe ca yaḥ ||
uttame tāmase caiva raivate cākṣuṣe tathā || 44 ||
ye babhūvurhi devendrāstasya tasya tapasvinī ||
tadā jagāda caritaṃ yathāvatsāṃbharāyaṇī || 45 ||
kathayāmāsa cāścaryaṃ taccāpi kathayāmi te ||46 ||
śaṃkukarṇastadā daityo babhūvātyaṃtadurjayaḥ ||
sa lokapālānsamare vijitya saha daivataiḥ ||
indrasyāsādya bhavanaṃ praviveśa sunirbhayaḥ || 47 ||
taṃ dṛṣṭvā sahasā prāptaṃ śakraḥ śayyātale.aluṭhat ||
jugopa sahasātmānaṃ śaṃkukarṇabhayārditaḥ ||48||
dānavaḥ śakraśayane tasminnupaviveśa ha ||
indrāṇyapi tathā bhītā gatā vācaspatergṛham || 49 ||
atha devāḥ samājagmurbhayāddraṣṭuṃ suradviṣam ||
āsīnaṃ śakraśayane praṇipātapurassarāḥ || 4.107.50 ||
vāsudevo.api tatrāgāttaṃ draṣṭuṃ devakaṃṭakam ||
dṛṣṭvā kṛṣṇamanuprāptaṃ dānavaḥ prāha harṣitaḥ || 51 ||
dhanyo.ahaṃ kṛtakṛtyohaṃ yasya me garuḍadhvajaḥ ||
śakraśayyāsanasthasya draṣṭumabhyeti keśavaḥ || 52 ||
tataḥ kare samālaṃbya śayanābhyāśamānayat ||
cakāra kaṃṭhagrahaṇaṃ bāṃdhavasyeva harṣita || 53 ||
tataḥ kṛṣṇastu sahasā gṛhya dorbhyāṃ śanaiḥ śanaiḥ ||
pīḍayāmāsa vihasannadaṃtaṃ bhairavānravān ||
mamāra dānavendro.asau balādbhagnāsthipañjaraḥ || 54 ||
nirjagāma tataḥ śakraḥ śayyāmūlādavākchirāḥ ||
tuṣṭāva harimāsīnaṃ śaṃkhacakragadādharam || 59 ||
etaddṛṣṭaṃ mayā śakra vasaṃtyā surasadmani || 56 ||
tataḥ kutūhalaparo devarāṭ tāṃ tapasvinīm ||
uvāca jānāsi kathaṃ tvametānsāṃbharāyaṇi ||57||
|| sāṃbharāyaṇyuvāca || ||
sarva eva hi devendrāḥ svargasthā yemareśvarāḥ||
babhūvurete caritameteṣāṃ vedmi tena vai ||
caritaṃ ca mayā teṣāṃ śrutaṃ dṛṣṭaṃ tathaiva ca ||58||
|| indra uvāca || ||
kiṃ kṛtaṃ vada dharmajñe tvayā yeneyamakṣayā ||
svarloke vasatiḥ prāptā yathā nānyena kenacit || 59 ||
aho sarvavratānāṃ tu hyupoṣitamathādbhutam ||
pradhānataramatyaṃtaṃ svargavāsapradaṃ matam || 4.107.60 ||
evamuktā tatastena devendreṇa tapasvinīṃ ||
pratyuvāca mahābhāgā yathāvatsāṃbharāyaṇī || 61 ||
māsarkṣe hyacyuto devaḥ pratimāsaṃ sureśvara ||
yathoktavratayā samyaksaptavarṣāṇi pūjitaḥ || 62||
tasyeyaṃ karmaṇo vyuṣṭiracyutārādhanasya me ||
devalokādabhimatā devarājapadacyutiḥ || 63 ||
svargendravibhavaiśvaryaṃ saṃtatiṃ yāti cācyutim ||
naro vāñchati tenetthaṃ toṣaṇīyastataḥ prabhuḥ || 64 ||
etatte pūrvadevendracaritaṃ sakalaṃ mayā ||
svargavāsākṣayatvaṃ ca māsarkṣācyutapūjanāt ||
yathāvatkathitaṃ deva pṛcchatastridaśeśvara || 65 ||
dharmārthakāmamokṣāśca vāñchitā vibudhādhipa ||
viṣṇorārādhanādanyatparamaṃ siddhikāraṇam || 66 ||
tasyāstadvacanaṃ śrutvā devarājabṛhaspatī ||
tattathetyūcatuḥ sādhvīṃ ceratuścāpi tadvratam || 67 ||
tasmātpārtha prayatnena pratimāsaṃ samāhitaḥ ||
māsarkṣācyutapūjāyāṃ bhavethāstanmanāḥ sadā ||68||
ye sāṃbharāyaṇikathācaritavratesminvarṣāṇi sapta vidhinā sudhiyo nayaṃti ||
te svagarlokamabhigamya kṛtādhivāsāḥ kalpāyutāyutaśatairapi na cyavaṃte || 69 ||
iti śrībhaviṣye mahāpurāṇa uttaraparvaṇi śrīkṛṣṇa yudhiṣṭhirasaṃvāde sāṃbharāyaṇīvratavarṇanaṃ nāma saptādhikaśatatamo.adhyāyaḥ || 107 || || cha ||
nakṣatrapuruṣavratavarṇanam
|| yudhiṣṭhira uvāca || ||
surūpatā manuṣyāṇāṃ strīṇāṃ ca yadusattama ||
karmaṇā jāyate kena tanmamākhyātumarhasi || 1 ||
surūpāṇāṃ sugātrāṇāṃ suveṣāṇāṃ tathaiva ca ||
nyūnaṃ tathādhikaṃ cāpi yathā nāṅgaṃ prajāyate ||2||
samastaiḥ śobhanairaṃgairnarāḥ kecidyadūttama ||
kāṇāḥ kubjāṃśca jāyaṃte truṭitaśravaṇāstathā ||3||
narāṇāṃ yoṣitāṃ caiva samastāṅgaḥ surūpatā ||
karmaṇā yena bhavati tatpūrvaṃ kathayāmala || 4 ||
lāvaṇyagativākyāni sati rūpe mahāmate ||
kurvaṃtyabhyadhikāṃ śobhāṃ samastāḥ paramā guṇāḥ || 5 || vākyalāvaṇyasaṃskāravilāsalalitā gatiḥ ||
viḍaṃbanā kurūpāṇāṃ kevalā sā hi jāyate || 6 ||
rūpakāraṇabhūtāya karmaṇā prayato bhavet ||
tasmāttanme samācakṣva karma yaccāru rūpadam ||7||
|| śrīkṛṣṇa uvāca || ||
samyakpṛṣṭaṃ tvayā hīdamupavāsāśritaṃ nṛpa ||
kathayāmi yathāproktaṃ variṣṭhena mahātmanā || 8 ||
vaśiṣṭhamṛṣimāsīnaṃ saptarṣipravaraṃ dvijam ||
papracchārundhatī pṛṣṭā yadetadbhavatā vayam ||9||
tasyāstu paripṛcchantyā jagāda munisattamaḥ ||
yattacchṛṇuṣva kauṃteya mamedaṃ vadato.akhilam || 4.108.10 ||
|| vaśiṣṭha uvāca || ||
śrūyatāṃ yadahaṃ pṛṣṭastvayaitadvaravarṇini ||
surūpatā nṛṇāṃ yena yoṣitāṃ copajāyate || 11 ||
anabhyarcya tu goviṃdamanārādhya ca keśavam ||
rūpādikā guṇāḥ kena prāpyaṃte.anyena karmaṇā || 12 ||
tasmādārādhanīyo.agre viṣṇureva yaśasvini ||
pāratryaṃ prāptukāmena rūpasaṃpatsutādikam || 13 ||
yastu vāñchati dharmajñe rūpaṃ sarvāṃgasundaram ||
nakṣatrapuruṣaṃ bhadre jitakrodho jiteṃdriyaḥ || 14 ||
susnātaḥ prayatāhāraḥ saṃpūjayati yo.acyutam ||
bhaktyā yoṣinnaro vāpi surūpāṃgaḥ prajāyate || 15 ||
yoṣitā hi paraṃ rūpamicchantyā jagataḥ patiḥ ||
sa evārādhanīyo.agre nakṣatrāṃgo janārdanaḥ || 16 ||
|| arundhatyuvāca || ||
nakṣatrarūpī bhagavānpūjyate puruṣottamaḥ ||
mune yena vidhānena tanmamākhyātumarhasi || 17 ||
|| vaśiṣṭha uvāca || ||
caitramāsātsamārabhya viṣṇoḥ pādābhipūjanam ||
yathā kurvīta rūpārthaṃ tanniśāmaya tattvataḥ || 18 ||
nakṣatramekamekaṃ vai snātaḥ samyagupoṣitaḥ ||
nakṣatrapuruṣasyāṃgaṃ pūjayecca vicakṣaṇaḥ || 19 ||
mūle pādau tathā jaṃghe rohiṇyāmarcayecchubhe ||
jānunī cāśvinīyoge āṣāḍhe corusaṃjñite || 4.108.20 ||
phālgunīdvitaye guhyaṃ kṛttikāsu tathā kaṭim ||
pārśve bhādrapadā gulphe dve kukṣī revatīṣu ca || 21 ||
anurādhāsūraḥ pṛṣṭhaṃ dhaniṣṭhāsvabhipūjayet ||
bhujayugmaṃ viśākhāsu haste caiva karadvayam || 22 ||
punarvasāvaṃgulīśca āśleṣāsu tathā nakhān ||
jyeṣṭhāyāṃ pūjayedgrīvāṃ śravaṇe śravaṇe tathā || 23 ||
puṣye mukhaṃ tathā svātau daśanānabhipūjayet ||
āsyaṃ śatabhiṣagyoge maghāyoge ca nāsikām || 24 ||
mṛgottamāṃge nayane pūjayedbhaktitaḥ śubhe ||
citrāyoge lalāṭaṃ ca bharaṇīṣu tathā śiraḥ || 25 ||
saṃpūjanīyā vidvadbhirārdrāyāṃ ca śiroruhāḥ ||
upoṣito naro bhadre snānamabhyaṃgapūrvakam || 26 ||
varjanīyaṃ prayatnena rūpaghnaṃ tadvinirdiśet ||
pūjayettacca nakṣatraṃ nakṣatrasya ca daivatam || 27 ||
somaṃ nakṣatrarājānaṃ svamantrairarcayedbudhaḥ ||
pratinakṣatrayoge ca bhojanīyā dvijottamāḥ || 28 ||
nakṣatrajñāya viprāya dānaṃ dadyācca śaktitaḥ ||
antarāye samutpanne sūtakāśaucakārite || 29 ||
upoṣya vācopa viśennakṣatramaparaṃ punaḥ ||
evaṃ māghāvasāne tu vratapāraḥ samāpyate || 4.108.30 ||
samāpte tu vrate dadyācchaktyā sopaskarānvitam ||
nakṣatrapuruṣaṃ haimaṃ pūjaye ttatra śaktitaḥ || 31 ||
brāhmaṇaṃ brāhmaṇīṃ caiva vastrālaṃkārabhūṣaṇaiḥ ||
śayyāyāṃ tu samāsannaṃ gandhamālyānulepanaiḥ || 32 ||
saptadhānyaṃ yathālābhaṃ gāṃ savatsāṃ payasvinīm ||
chatropānadyugaṃ caiva ghṛtapātraṃ tathaiva ca||33||
maṃtreṇānena viprāya suśīlāya nivedayet ||
yathā na viṣṇubhaktānāṃ vṛjinaṃ jāyate kvacita ||
tathā surūpatārogya sukhasaṃpadihāstu me || 34 ||
yathā na lakṣmyā śayanaṃ tava śūnyaṃ janārdana ||
śayyā mamāpyaśūnyāstu tathā janmani janmani || 35 ||
evaṃ nivedya tatsarvaṃ praṇipatya kṣamāpayet ||
śaktihīnastu gāṃ dadyād ghṛtapātrasamanvitām || 36 ||
nakṣatrapuruṣākhyo.ayaṃ yathāvatkathitastava ||
pāpāpanodaṃ kurute samyakchraddhāvatāṃ satām || 37 ||
aṅgopāṅgāni caivāsya pādādīni yaśasvini ||
surūpāṇyabhijāyaṃte sadā janmāntarāṇi ve || 38 ||
gātrāṇi caiva bhadrāṇi śarīrārogyamuttamam ||
saṃtatiṃ manasaḥ prītiṃ rūpaṃ cātīva śobhanam || 39 ||
vāṅmādhuryaṃ tathā kāṃtiṃ yaccānyadapi vāṃchitam ||
dadāti nakṣatrapumānpūjitaśca janārdanaḥ || 4.108.40 ||
vaśiṣṭhena yathākhyātaṃ sarvaṃ tatte niveditam ||
nakṣatrapuruṣaṃ nāma vratānāmuttamottamam || 41 ||
hṛdbāhujānunayanorunitaṃbabhāgaṃ dakṣaiḥ prakalpya sutanuṃ puruṣottamasya ||
ye pūjayaṃti jitakopamanovikārāḥ kauṃteya te nanu bhavaṃti surūpadehā || 42 ||
iti śrībhaviṣye mahāpurāṇa uttaraparvaṇi śrīkṛṣṇayudhiṣṭhirasaṃvāde nakṣatrapuruṣavratavarṇanaṃ nāmāṣṭādhika śatatamo.adhyāyaḥ || 108 || || cha ||
nakṣatrākhyavratavarṇanam
|| yudhiṣṭhira uvāca || ||
upavāseṣvaśaktasya tadaiva phalamicchataḥ ||
anabhyāsena yogādvā kimiṣṭaṃ vratamucyate || 1 ||
śivasyopari yasya syādbhaktiḥ sūryasya saṃbhavet ||
nakṣatrākhyaṃ vrataṃ tena kathaṃ kāryaṃ vadasva me || 2||
|| śrīkṛṣṇa uvāca || ||
upavāseṣvaśaktānāṃ naktaṃ bhojanamiṣyate ||
asminvrate tadapyatra śrūyatāmakṣayaṃ mahat || 3 ||
śivanakṣatrapuruṣaṃ śivabhaktipradāyakam ||
yasminnakṣatrayoge tu purāṇajñāḥ pracakṣate || 4 ||
phālgunasyāmale pakṣe yadā hastaḥ prajāyate ||
tadā grāhyaṃ vrataṃ caiva naktena śivapūjanam || 5 ||
śivā yeti ca hastena pādau pūjyatamau smṛtau ||
śaṃkarāya namo gulphau pūjyau citrāsu pāṃḍava || 6 ||
bhīmāyeti ca svātīṣu pūjayetpuruṣarṣabha ||
ūru ddvayaṃ viśākhāsu trinetrāyati pūjayet || 7 ||
meḍhraṃ caivānurādhāsu anaṅgāṅgaharāya ca ||
kaṭiṃ jyeṣṭhāsu ca tathā surajyeṣṭheti cārcayet || || 8 ||
dānākhyāya namo nābhiḥ pūjyā mūlena śūlinaḥ ||
pūrvottarāṣāḍhayuge pārśve vai pārvatīpatiḥ || 9 ||
śravaṇena tathā kukṣī pūjye kapālineti ca ||
vakṣaḥsthalaṃ dhaniṣṭhāsu sadyojāteti nāma ca || 4.109.10 ||
vāmeti pūjayetpārtha hṛdayaṃ śatabhiṣāsu ca ||
pūrvottarāyuge bāhū namaḥ khaṭvāṃgadhāriṇe || 11 ||
pūjyaṃ rudrāya ca tathā revatīṣu karadvayam ||
nakhaḥ pūjyo.aśvinīyoge namaḥ khaṇḍendudhāriṇe || 12 ||
bharaṇīṣu tataḥ pṛṣṭhaṃ vṛṣāṃkāya namo.astu te ||
kṛttivāsāya ca tathā kṛttikāsu kṛkāṭikām || 13 ||
vākpūjyā rohiṇīyoge namo vācaspateti ca ||
mṛgottamāṃge daśanānbhairavāyeti vai namaḥ || 14 ||
ārdrāsu pūjyāvadharau sthāṇaveti yudhiṣṭhira ||
nāsā punarvasau pūjyā pūṣadaṃtavināśine || || 15 ||
puṣye netratrayaṃ pūjyaṃ namaste sarvadarśine ||
āśleṣāyāṃ lalāṭaṃ ca tryambakāya namonamaḥ || 16 ||
maghāsu ca jaṭājūṭaṃ pūjayedaṃdhakāraye ||
pūrvāphālgunikāyugme śravaṇe somadhāriṇe || 17 ||
namo.astu pāśāṃkuśapadmaśūlakapālasarpendudhanurddharāya ||
gajāsurānaṃgadhurāṃdhakādivināśamūlāya namaḥ śivāya || 18 ||
śiraḥ sampūjayeddadyāttato dhūpavilepanam ||
tatastu rātrau bhoktavyaṃ tailakṣāravivarjitam || 19 ||
śālitaṇḍulakaprasthaṃ ghṛtapātreṇa saṃyutam ||
dadyātsarveṣu nakteṣu brāhmaṇāya nṛpottama || 4.109.20 ||
śaktyabhāve na doṣaḥ syādadhike cādhikaṃ phalam ||
nakṣatrayugale prāpte naktayugmaṃ samācaret || 21 ||
sūtakāśaucadoṣe tu punaranyadupoṣayet ||
evaṃ krameṇa saṃprāpte pāraṇe pāṃḍavādike || 22 ||
brāhmaṇānbhojayedbhaktyā guḍakṣīra ghṛtādibhiḥ||
kāṃcanaṃ kārayeddevamumayā saha śaṃkaram || 23 ||
śayyāṃ sulakṣaṇāṃ kṛtvā viruddhagraṃthivarjitām ||
sopadhānakaviśrāmāṃ svāstarāvaraṇāṃ śubhām || 24 ||
bhājanopānahacchatracāmarāsanadarpaṇaiḥ ||
bhūṣaṇairapi saṃyuktāṃ phalavastrānulepanaiḥ || 25 ||
tasyāṃ nidhāya taṃ devamalaṃkṛtya guṇānvitam ||
kapilāṃ vastrasaṃvītāṃ śuciśīlāṃ payasvinīm || 26 ||
suvarṇaśṛṃgīṃ raupyakhurāṃ savatsāṃ kāṃsyadohanām ||
dadyānmaṃtreṇa pūrvāhne na kālamabhilaṃghayet || 27 ||
yathā na devaśayanaṃ tava parvatajātayā ||
śūnyaṃ vṛttyātha saṃtatyā tathā me saṃtu siddhayaḥ || 28 ||
yathā deva na śreyo.arthastvadanyo vidyate kvacit ||
tathā māmuddharāśeṣaduḥkhasaṃsārasāgarāt || 29 ||
tataḥ pradakṣiṇīkṛtya praṇipatya visarjayet ||
śayyāgavāditatsarvaṃ dvijasya bhavanaṃ nayet || 4.109.30 ||
naitadviśīlāya na dāṃbhikāya kutarkaduṣṭāya viniṃdakāya ||
prakāśanīyaṃ vratamindumauleryaścāpi lobhopahatāṃtarātmā || 31 ||
bhaktāya dāṃtāya guṇānvitāya pradeyametacchivabhaktiyuktaiḥ ||
idaṃ mahāpātakakṛnnarāṇāmapyakṣayaṃ vedavido vadaṃti || 32 ||
yā vātha nārī kurute.atibhaktyā bhartāramāśritya śubhaṃ guruṃ vā ||
na baṃdhuputrairna dhanairviyogamāpnoti duḥkhaṃ na suhṛtsamuttham || 33 ||
idaṃ vaśiṣṭhena purā.arjunena kṛtaṃ kubereṇa puraṃdareṇa ||
yatkīrtanādapyakhilānyaghāni vighnaṃ samāyāṃti na saṃśayotra || 34 ||
iti paṭhati śṛṇoti vā ya itthaṃ śivapuruṣaṃ puruhūtavallabhaḥ syāt ||
api narakagatānpitṛrnaśeṣāñcchivabhavanaṃ nayatīha yaḥ karoti || 35 ||
iti śrībhaviṣye mahāpurāṇa uttaraparvaṇi śrīkṛṣṇayudhiṣṭhirasaṃvāde śivanakṣatrapuruṣavratavarṇanaṃ nāma navottaraśatatamo.adhyāyaḥ || 109 || || cha ||
sampūrṇavratavarṇanam
|| yudhiṣṭhira uvāca || ||
yadi kartuṃ na śaknoti vrataṃ nakṣatrapauruṣam ||
gṛhītaṃ rabhasā kṛṣṇa hyanyadvā vratamuttamam || 1 ||
saṃpūrṇaṃ jāyate yena yadacīrṇaṃ purā sthitam ||
kuru prasādaṃ guhyārthametanme vaktumarhasi || | 2 ||
|| śrīkṛṣṇa uvāca || ||
sādhusādhu mahābāho kururāja yudhiṣṭhira ||
rahasyānāṃ rahasyaṃ te kathayāmi vratottamam || 3 ||
sampūrṇaṃ nāma taccāpi vrataṃ samyakphalapradam ||
yaccīrṇaṃ naranārībhirbhavetsaṃpūrṇakārakam || 4 ||
avaśyaṃ tacca kartavyamakṣīṇaphalakāṃkṣibhiḥ ||
kiñcidbhagnaṃ pramādena yadgataṃ vratināṃ sthitam ||
tatsaṃpūrṇaṃ bhavetsarvaṃ vratenānena pāṇḍava || 5 ||
upadravairbahuvidhairmadānmohācca pārthiva ||
yadbhagnaṃ kiñcideva syādvrataṃ vipravināyakaiḥ ||
tatsaṃpūrṇaṃ bhavetpārtha satyaṃsatyaṃ na saṃśayaḥ || 6 ||
kāṃcanaṃ raupyakaṃ rūpaṃ śilpinā taddhaṭāpayet ||
bhagnavrate tu yo devastatsvarūpaṃ sunirmitam || 7 ||
rūpaṃ strīpuṃsayorvāpi prārabdhaṃ yadvrate kila ||
navaniṣpāditaṃ kiñciddaivātsarvaṃ tathotthitam || 8 ||
dvibhujaṃ paṅkajārūḍhaṃ saumyaprahasitānanam ||
niṣpāditaṃ śilpabhāvāttasminneva dinedine || 9 ||
tanmāse ca punaḥ prāpte brāhmaṇo vidhinā gṛhe ||
snāpayetpayasā dadhnā ghṛtakṣīrarasāṃbubhiḥ || 4.110.10 ||
gaṃdhacaṃdanapuṣpaiśca carcayetkuṃkumādinā ||
toyapūrṇasya kumbhasya pṛthvyāṃ vinyasya caṃdanaiḥ || 11 ||
dhūpadīpākṣatairvastrai ratnairapyupahārakaiḥ ||
arghyaṃ dadyācca tannāmnā maṃtreṇānena pāṃḍava || 12 ||
upasannasya dīnasya prāyaścittakṛtāñjaleḥ ||
śaraṇaṃ ca prapannasya kuruṣvādya dayāṃ prabho || 13 ||
paratra bhayabhītasya bhagnakhaṇḍavratasya ca ||
kuru prasādaṃ saṃpūrṇaṃ vrataṃ saṃpūrṇamastu me || 14 ||
tapaśchidraṃ vratacchidraṃ yacchidraṃ bhagnake vrate ||
tava prasādāddeveśa sarvamacchidramastu naḥ || svāhā || 15 || (amukadevāya namaḥ ||) pūrvato dakṣiṇataḥ paścimata uttarataḥ ||
vidikṣu coparyyadhastāddikpālebhyo namonamaḥ || 16 ||
idamarghyamidaṃ pādyaṃ naivedyaṃ te namonamaḥ ||
evaṃ procya tataḥ pādau jānunī kaṭiśīrṣake || 17 || vakṣaḥkukṣidṛṣṭipṛṣṭhabāhvaṃsāṃkaśiroruhān ||
pūjayettasya devasya tataḥ paścātkṣamāpayet || 18 ||
pūjitastvaṃ yathāśaktyā namaste.astu surottama ||
aihikāmuṣmikīṃ nātha kāryasiddhiṃ diśasva me || 19 ||
evaṃ kṣamāpayitvā tu devarūpaṃ vidhānataḥ ||
tato dvijasya kaunteya vidhijñasyopapādayet || 4.110.20 ||
sthitvā pūrvamukho vipro gṛhṇīyāddarbhapāṇinā ||
viprasya haste yacchecca dātā vai cottarāmukhaḥ ||
maṃtreṇānena kauṃteya sopavāsaḥ prayatnataḥ 21 ||
idaṃ vrataṃ mayā khaṃḍaṃ kṛtamāsītpurā dvija ||
bhagavaṃstvaprasādena saṃpūrṇaṃ tadihāstu me || 22 ||
brāhmaṇo.api pratīcchettu maṃtreṇānena tadvratam ||
vāksaṃpūrṇaṃ manaḥpūrṇaṃ pūrṇaṃ kāyavratena te||
saṃpūrṇasya prasādena bhava pūrṇamanorathaḥ ||23||
brāhmaṇā yatprabhāṣaṃte hyanumodaṃti devatāḥ ||
sarvadevamayā viprā naitadvacanamanyathā || 24 ||
jaladhiḥ kṣāratāṃ nītaḥ pāvakaḥ sarvabhakṣatām ||
sahasranetraḥ śakro.api kṛto viprairmahātmabhiḥ || 25 ||
brāhmaṇānāṃ tu vacanādbrahmahatyā praṇaśyati ||
aśvamedhaphalaṃ sāgraṃ prāpyate nātra saṃśayaḥ || 26 || vyāsavālmīkivacanādbrāhmaṇavacanācca gargagautama parāśaradhaumyāṃgirasavāṣṭhināradādimunivacanātsaṃpūrṇaṃ bhavatu te vratam || 27 || evaṃvidhavidhānena gṛhītvā brāhmaṇo vrajet ||
taddānaṃ preṣayetsa brāhmaṇasya gṛhe svayam ||
tataḥ paṃca mahāyajñānnirvapedbhojanādi ca || 28 ||
evaṃ yaḥ kurute bhaktyā vratametatsakṛttathā ||
tasya saṃpūrṇatāṃ yāti tadvrataṃ yatpurā sthitam || 29
khaṃḍaṃ saṃpūrṇatāṃ yāti prasanne vratadaivate ||
saṃpūrṇaṃ ca tataḥ kṛtvā saṃpūrṇāṃgo bhavedvratī || 4.110.30 ||
bhogī bhavyo lasatkīrtiḥ sva saṃpūrṇamanorathaḥ ||
sthitvā varṣaśataṃ martye tataḥ svarge.amaro bhavet|| 31 ||
yatheṣṭaceṣṭācārī ca brahmaviṣṇvindrapūjitaḥ ||
svargaloke ciraṃ sthitvā punarmokṣamavāpnuyāt || 32 ||
prāyaścittamidaṃ proktaṃ purā gargeṇa me prabho ||
gokule gokulākīrṇe mayā bālye.apyupoṣitam || 33 ||
evaṃ tvamapi kauṃteya cara saṃpūrṇakaṃ vratam || 34 ||
bhagnāni yāni madamohavaśādgṛhītvā janmāntareṣvapi nareṇa samatsareṇa || saṃpūrṇapūjanaparasya puro bhavaṃti sarvavratāni paripūrṇaphalapradāni || 35 ||
iti śrībhaviṣye mahāpurāṇa uttaraparvaṇi śrīkṛṣṇayudhiṣṭhirasaṃvāde saṃpūrṇavratavarṇanaṃ nāma daśottara śatatamo.adhyāyaḥ || 110 || || cha ||
kāmadānaveśyāvratavarṇanam
|| yudhiṣṭhira uvāca || ||
varṇāśramāṇāṃ prabhavaḥ purāṇeṣu mayā śrutaḥ ||
paṇyastrīṇāṃ samācāraṃ śrotumicchāmi tattvataḥ || 1 ||
kā hyāsāṃ devatā kṛṣṇa kiṃ vrataṃ kimupoṣitam ||
kena dharmeṇa caivetāḥ svargamāpsyaṃtyanuttamam || 2 ||
|| śrīkṛṣṇa uvāca ||
mama patnīsahasrāṇi saṃti pāṃḍava ṣoḍaśa ||
rūpaudāryaguṇopetā manmathāyatanāḥ śubhāḥ || 3 ||
tābhirvasaṃtasamaye kokilālikulākule ||
puṣpitopavanotphullakahlārasarasastaṭe ||
nirbharāpānagoṣṭhīṣu prasaktābhiralaṃkṛte || 4 ||
kuraṃganayanaḥ śrīmānmālatīkṛtaśekharaḥ ||
gacchansamīpe mārgeṇa sāṃbaḥ parapuraṃjayaḥ || 5 ||
sākṣātkaṃdarparūpeṇa sarvābharaṇabhūṣitaḥ ||
anaṃgaśarataptābhiḥ sābhilāṣamavekṣitaḥ || 6 ||
pravṛddho manmathastāsāṃ sarvāṅgakṣobhadāyakaḥ ||
nirīkṣya tamahaṃ sarvaṃ vikāraṃ jñānacakṣuṣā || 7 ||
aśeṣe ruṣitaḥ sarvā hariṣyaṃtīha dasyavaḥ ||
mayi svargamanuprāpte bhavatīḥ kāmamohitāḥ || 8 ||
etadvākyamupaśrutya bāṣparyākulekṣaṇāḥ ||
māmūcurvada govinda kathametadbhaviṣyati || 9 ||
bhartāraṃ jagatāmīśaṃ bhavaṃtamaparā jitam||
divyānubhāvāṃ ca purīṃ ratnavaṃti gṛhāṇi ca || 4.111.10 ||
dvārikāvāsinaḥ sarvāndevarūpānkumārakān ||
bhagavansarvalokasya kathaṃ bhogyā bhavāmahe || 11 ||
dāsabhāvamanuprāpya bhaviṣyāmaḥ kathaṃ punaḥ ||
ko dharmaḥ kaḥ samācāraḥ kathaṃ vṛttirbhaviṣyati || 12 ||
tathā lālapyamānāstā vāṣpaparyākulekṣaṇāḥ ||
mayā proktā yuvatyastāḥ saṃtāpastyajyatāmayam || 13 ||
jalakrīḍāvihāreṣu purā sarasi mānase ||
bhavatīnāṃ sagarvāṇāṃ nārado.abhyāśamāgataḥ || 14 ||
hutāśanasutāḥ sarvā bhavatyo.apsarasaḥ purā ||
apraṇamyāvalepena paripṛṣṭaḥ sa yogavit || 15 ||
kathaṃ nārā yaṇo.asmākaṃ bhartā syādityupādiśa ||
tasmādvratapradānaṃ ca śāpadānamabhūtpurā || 16 ||
śayyādvayapradānena madhumādhavamāsayoḥ ||
suvarṇopaskarotsargāddvādaśyāṃ śuklapakṣataḥ ||
bhartā nārāyaṇo nūnaṃ bhaviṣyatyanyajanmani|| 17 ||
na kṛto yatpraṇāmo me rūpasaubhāgyamatsarāt ||
paraṃ pṛṣṭo.asmi tenāśu viyogo vo bhaviṣyati ||
caurairapahṛtāḥ sarvā veśyātvaṃ samavāpsyatha || 18 ||
evaṃ nāradaśāpena macchāpena ca sāṃpratam||
na kāryaḥ saṃbhramaḥ kaściddāsītvaṃ vo bhaviṣyati || 19 ||
idānīmapi yadvakṣye tacchraṇudhvaṃ varānanāḥ ||
purā devāsure yuddhe hateṣu śataśaḥ punaḥ ||
dānavāsurasainyeṣu rākṣaseṣu tatastataḥ || 4.111.20 ||
teṣāṃ nārīsahasrāṇi śataśo.atha sahasraśaḥ ||
pariṇītāni yāni syurbalādbhuktāni yāni vai || 21 ||
tāni sarvāṇi deveśaḥ provāca vadatāṃ varaḥ ||
veśyādharmeṇa vartadhvamadhunā nṛpamaṃdire || .22 ||
bhaktimatyo varārohāstadā devakuleṣu ca ||
rājānaḥ svāminaḥ stutyā brāhmaṇāśca bahuśrutāḥ || 23 ||
teṣāṃ gṛheṣu tiṣṭhadhvaṃ sūtakaṃ cāpi tatsamam ||
bhaviṣyati ca saubhāgyaṃ sarvāsāmapi śaktitaḥ ||24|||
na caikasminratiḥ kāryā puruṣe dhanavarjite ||
anumānyaḥ prasādyaśca śulkado devavatsadā || 25 ||
surūpo vā virūpo vā dravyaṃ tatra prayojanam ||
na tadvyatikramaḥ kāryo brahmahatyāmavāpnuyāt ||
na cāpi madyapābhiśca bhāvyaṃ kauṭilyabuddhibhiḥ ||26||
yaḥ kaścicchulkamādāya gṛhameṣyati vaḥ sadā ||
niśchadmanaivāpahāryaṃ tatsarvaṃ daṃbhavarjitam || 27 ||
vyabhicāro na kartavyaḥ svāminā saha karhicit||
rūpayauvanadarpeṇa dhanalobhena vā punaḥ |28||
dāsī bhūtvā ca yā kācidvyabhicāraṃ karoti ca ||
patinā saha pāpiṣṭhā pāpiṣṭhāṃ yātyadhogatim||29||
devatānāṃ pitṛrṇāṃ ca puṇye.ahni samupasthite ||
gobhūhiraṇyadhānyāni pradeyāni ca śaktitaḥ||4.111.30||
brāhmaṇebhyo varārohāḥ kāryāṇi vacanāni ca ||
yaccāpyanyadvrataṃ samyagupadekṣyāmi tattvataḥ. 31 ||
avicāreṇa sarvābhiranuṣṭheyaṃ ca tatpunaḥ ||
saṃsārottāraṇāyālametadvedavido viduḥ || 32 ||
yadā sūryadine prāpte puṣyo vā sa punarvasuḥ ||31||
bhavetsarvauṣadhisnānaṃ samyaṅnārī samācaret || 33 ||
tadā pañcaśarasyāpi saṃnidhātṛtvameṣyati ||
arcayetpuṇḍarīkākṣamanaṅgasyāpi kīrtanam||34|||
kāmāya pādau saṃpūjya jaṃghe vai mohakāriṇe||
meḍhraṃ kadarpanidhaye kaṭiṃ prītiyuje namaḥ || 35 ||
nābhiṃ saukhyasamudrāya vāmanāya tathodaram||
hṛdayaṃ hṛdayeśāya stanāvāhlādakāriṇe || 36 ||
utkaṃṭhāyeti vai kaṃṭhamāsyamānandajāya ca||
vāmāṃsaṃ puṣpacāpāya puṣpabāṇāya dakṣiṇam || 37 ||
namo.anantāya vai mauliṃ vilolāyeti ca dhvajam||
sarvātmane śirastadvaddevasya pūjayet||38||
namaḥ śrīpataye tārkṣyadhvajāṃkuśadharāya ca||
gadine pītavastrāya śaṃkhine cakriṇe namaḥ||
namo nārāyaṇāyeti kāmadevātmane namaḥ ||39||
namaḥ śāṃtyai namaḥ prītyai namo ratyai namaḥ śriye ||
namaḥ puṣṭyai namastuṣṭyai namaḥ sarvārthadāya ca || 4.111.40 ||
evaṃ saṃpūjya govindamanaṃgātmakamīśvaram ||
gaṃdhairmālyaistathā dhūpairnaivedyaiścaiva bhāminī || 41 ||
atra cāhūya dharmajñaṃ brāhmaṇaṃ vedapāragam ||
avyaṃgāvayavaṃ pūjya gaṃdhapuṣpādibhistathā || 42 ||
śāleyataṃḍulaprasthaṃ ghṛtapātreṇa saṃyutam ||
tasmai viprāya sā dadyān mādhavaḥ prīyatāmiti || 43 ||
yatheṣṭāhārabhuktaṃ ca tameva dvijasattamam ||
ratyarthaṃ kāmadevo.ayamiti citte.avadhārya ca || 44 ||
yadyadicchati viprendrastattatkuryādvilāsinī ||
sarvabhāvena cātmānamarpayetsmitabhāṣiṇī || 45 ||
evamādityavāreṇa sadā tadvratamācaret ||
taṃḍulaprasthadānaṃ ca yāvanmāsāṃstu dvādaśa || 46 ||
tatastrayodaśe māsi saṃprāpte tasya bhāminī ||
viprasyopaskarairyuktāṃ śayyāṃ dadyādvilakṣaṇām || 47 ||
sopadhānakaviśrāmāṃ svāstarāvaraṇāṃ śubhām ||
dīpikopānahacchatrapādukāsanasaṃyutām || 48 ||
sapatnīkamalaṃkṛtya hemasūtrāṅgulīyakaiḥ ||
sūkṣmavastraiḥ sakaṭakairdhūpamālyānulepanaiḥ || 49 ||
kāmadevaṃ sapatnīkaṃ guḍakuṃbhopari sthitam ||
tāmrapātrāsanagataṃ haimanetrapaṭāvṛtam || 4.111.50 ||
sakāṃsyabhājanopetamikṣudaṇḍasamanvitam ||
dadyādetena maṃtreṇa tathaikāṃ gāṃ payasvinīm || 51 ||
yathāṃtaraṃ na paśyāmi kāmakeśavayoḥ sadā ||
tathaiva sarvakāmāptirastu viṣṇo sadā mama || 52 ||
yathā na kāminīdehātprayāti tava keśava ||
tathāpi mama deveśa śarīrasthaṃ patiṃ kuru ||
tathaiva kāñcanaṃ devaṃ prati gṛhṇandvijottamaḥ || 53 ||
.a.aka idaṃ ko.adātkasmā adātkāmaḥ kāmāyādātkāmo dātā kāmaḥ pratigrahītā kāma~m samudramāviśamaitatta-iti vaidikamantramīrayet.a ||
ko.adāditi paṭhenmantraṃ dhyāyaṃścetasi mādhavam ||
tataḥ pradakṣiṇīkṛtya visṛjeddvijapuṅgavam ||
śayyāsanādikaṃ sarvaṃ brāhmaṇasya gṛhaṃ nayet || 54 ||
tataḥprabhṛti yo.anyopi ratyarthaṃ gṛhamāgataḥ ||
sa samyaksūryavāreṇa samaṃ pūjyo yathecchayā || 55 ||
evamekaṃ dvijaṃ śāṃtaṃ purāṇajñaṃ vicakṣaṇam ||
tamarcayeta ca sadā aparaṃ vā tadājñayā || 56 ||
na prāpnoti tadā vighnaṃ garbhasūtakajaṃ kvacit ||
daivaṃ vā mānuṣaṃ vā syāduparāgeṇa vā tataḥ || 57 ||
sādhāranaṣṭapaśuvadyathāśaktyā samāpayet ||
etadvaḥ kathitaṃ sarvaṃ veśyādharmamaśeṣataḥ || 58 ||
puruhūtena yatproktaṃ dānuvīṣu tato mayā ||
tadidaṃ ca vrataṃ sarvaṃ bhavatīṣu prakāśitam || 59 ||
sarvapāpapraśamanamanaṃtaphaladāyakam ||
kalyāṇinīnāṃ kathitaṃ kurudhvaṃ tadvarānanāḥ || 4.111.60 ||
etatpārtha mayā pūrvaṃ gopīnāṃ tu prakāśitam ||
purāṇaṃ dharmasarvasvaṃ veśyājanasukhapradam || 61 ||
karoti yā.aśeṣamakhaṇḍametatkalyāṇinī mādhavalokasaṃsthā ||
sā pūjitā devagaṇairaśeṣairānandakṛtsthānamupaiti viṣṇoḥ || 62 || ||
iti śrībhaviṣye mahāpurāṇa uttaraparvaṇi śrīkṛṣṇayudhiṣṭhirasaṃvāde kāmadānaveśyāvratavarṇanaṃ nāmaikādaśottaraśatatamo.adhyāyaḥ || 111 || || cha || || ||
vṛntākavratavidhivarṇanam
|| śrīkṛṣṇa uvāca || ||
athāto vṛṃtākavidhiṃ vyākhyāsyāmaḥ ||
saṃvatsaraṃ ca ṣaṇmāsāṃstrīnmāsānvā na bhakṣayet ||
atha bharaṇyāṃ maghāyāṃ vā ekarātropavāsaṃ kṛtvā sthaṃḍile devānāhūya gaṃdhadhūpapuṣpanaivedyadīpādinā pūjayet ||
darbhapāṇirgaṃdhodakenāvāhayet ||
yamarājānamāvāhayāmi || kālamāvāhayāmi || nīlamāvāhayāmi || citraguptamāvāhayāmi || vaivasvatamāvāhayāmi || mṛtyumāvāhayāmi || parameṣṭhinamāvāhayāmīti || tatognimupasamādhāya tilājye juhuyāt ||
yamarājāya svāhā || kālāya svāhā || nīlāya svāhā || citraguptāya svāhā || vaivasvatāya svāhā || mṛtyave svāhā || parameṣṭhine svāheti || agnirmūrdhetyāhutīstvaṣṭaśataṃ hutvā sviṣṭakṛtiṃ kṛtvā prāyaścittaṃ hutvā brāhmaṇaḥ svayameva karoti || itareṣāmācāryaḥ||
atha sauvarṇaṃ vṛṃtākaṃ brāhmaṇāya nivedayet ||
kṛṣṇavṛṣabhaṃ gāṃ ca dadyāt ||
karṇaveṣṭāṃgulīyake cchatropānahau kṛṣṇayugaṃ kṛṣṇakaṃbalaṃ ca dadyāt||
brāhmaṇānbhojayitvā āśiṣo vācayet ||
pauṃḍarīkāśvamedhaphalamavāpnoti ||
saptakoṭisahasrāṇi nākapṛṣṭhe mahīyate ||
saptajanmāṃtaraṃ yāvadyamalokaṃ na paśyatītyāha bhagavānbaudhāyanaḥ || vṛṃtākamapratihatāntarahemasiddhaṃ dadyāddvijāya ghṛtatakrasamanvitaṃ yaḥ||
kṛtvā vrataṃ vatsaramāsamekaṃ yāmyaṃ na paśyati puraṃ puruṣaḥ kadācit || 1 || ||
iti śrībhaviṣye mahāpurāṇa uttaraparvaṇi śrīkṛṣṇayudhiṣṭhirasaṃvāde vṛṃtākavratavidhivarṇanaṃ nāma dvādaśottaraśatatamo.a dhyāyaḥ || 112 || || cha ||
grahanakṣatravratavarṇanam
|| śrīkṛṣṇa uvāca || ||
athātaḥ saṃpravakṣyāmi rahasyaṃ hyetaduttamam ||
yena lakṣmīnirvṛtistu puṣṭiścaivopajāyate || 1 ||
sarve grahāḥ sadā saumyā jāyaṃte yena pāṃḍava ||
ādityavāre hastena pūrvaṃ gṛhya vicakṣaṇaḥ || 2 ||
naktoktavidhinā sarvaṃ kuryātpūjāṃ tathā raveḥ ||
pratyakṣaṃ sapta naktāni kṛtvā bhaktiparo naraḥ || 3 ||
tatastu saptame prāpte kuryādbrāhmaṇavācanam ||
bhāskaraṃ sarvasauvarṇaṃ kṛtvā yatnena mānavaḥ || 4 ||
tāmrapātre sthāpayitvā raktapuṣpaiḥ prapūjya ca ||
raktavastrayugacchannaṃ chatropānadyugānvitam || 5 ||
ghṛtena snapanaṃ kṛtvā laḍḍukānvinivedya ca ||
maṃtreṇānena viduṣe brāhmaṇāyopapādayet || 6 ||
ādideva namastubhyaṃ saptasapte divākara ||
tvaṃ rave tārayasvāsmāna.asmātsaṃsārasāgarāt || 7 ||
kṛtenānena rājendra bhavedārogyamuttamam ||
dravyasaṃpatsutaprāptiriti paurāṇikā viduḥ || 8 ||
avisaṃvādinī ceyaṃ śāntipuṣṭipradā nṛṇām||
tadvaccitrāsu saṃgṛhya somavāraṃ vicakṣaṇaḥ || 9 ||
saptame ca tataḥ prāpte dattvā brāhmaṇabhojanam ||
kāṃsyabhājanasaṃsthaṃ vā rājataṃ rājate.atha vā || 4.113.10 ||
pātre kṛtvā somarājaṃ śvetavastrāvaguṃṭhitam ||
pādukopānahacchatrabhājanāsanasaṃyutam || 11 ||
dadhyannaśikharaṃ dattvā brāhmaṇāya nivedayet ||
maṃtreṇānena rājendra taṃ śṛṇuṣva vadāmi te || 12 ||
śrīmahādevajāvallī puṣpagokṣīrapāṃḍura ||
soma saumyo bhavāsmākaṃ sarvadā hyuttamottama || || 13 ||
evaṃ kṛte mahārāja somastuṣṭiprado bhavet ||
bhavaṃti tuṣṭe.atrisute sarve sānugrahā grahāḥ || 14 ||
svātyāmaṃgārakaṃ gṛhya kṣapayennaktabhojanaḥ ||
saptame tvatha saṃprāpte sthāpitaṃ tāmrabhājane || 19 ||
raktavastrayugacchannaṃ kuṃkumenānulepanam ||
naivedyaṃ haṃtakāraṃ ca pūjya dhūpākṣatādibhiḥ || 16 ||
maṃtreṇānena taṃ dadyādbrāhmaṇāya kuṭuṃbine ||
kujanmaprabhavo.api tvaṃ maṃgalaḥ paṭhyase budhaiḥ ||
amaṃgalaṃ nihatyāśu sarvadā yaccha maṃgalam || 17 ||
viśākhāsu budhaṃ gṛhya sapta naktānyathācaret ||
budhaṃ hemamayaṃ kṛtvā sthāpitaṃ kāṃsyabhājane || 18 ||
śuklavastrayugacchannaṃ śuklamālyānulepanaiḥ ||
guḍaudanopahāraṃ tu brāhmaṇāya nivedayet || 19 ||
budhaḥ sadbuddhijanano bodhadaḥ sarvadā nṛṇām ||
tattvāvabodhaṃ kuru me rājaputra namonamaḥ || 4.113.20 ||
anurādhāsvathācāryaṃ devānāṃ pūjya bhaktitaḥ ||
pūrvoktakramayogena sapta naktānyathācaret || 21 ||
haimaṃ hemamaye pātre sthāpayitvā bṛhaspatim ||
pītāṃbarayugacchannaṃ pītayajñopavītinam || 22 ||
pādukācchatrasahitaṃ sadaṃḍaṃ sakamaṇḍalum ||
saṃpūjya puṣpanikarairdīpadhūpākṣatādibhiḥ || 23 ||
khaṇḍakhādyopahāraiśca dvijāya pratipādayet ||
dharmaśāstrārthaśāstrajña jñānavijñānapāraga ||
agādhabuddhigāṃbhīrya devācārya namo.astu te || 24 ||
śukraṃ jyeṣṭhāsu saṃgṛhya kṣapayennaktabhojanaiḥ ||
pūrvoktakramayogena dvijasaṃtarpaṇena ca || 25 ||
saptame tvatha saṃprāpte sauvarṇaṃ kārayecchubham ||
raupye vā vaṃśapātre vā sthāpayitvā bhṛgoḥ sutam || 26 ||
saṃpūjya parayā bhaktyā śvetavastravilepanaiḥ ||
agre tasya pradātavyaṃ pāyasaṃ ghṛta saṃyutam || 27 ||
dadyādanena maṃtreṇa brāhmaṇāya vicakṣaṇaḥ ||
bhārgavo bhṛguputro.asi śukra kramaviśārada || 28 ||
hatvā grahakṛtāndoṣānāyurārogyado bhava ||
mūlena sūryatanayaṃ gṛhītvā bharatarṣabha || 29 ||
tasmindine pūjanīyaṃ grahatritayamādarāt ||
śanaiścaraśca rāhuśca ketuśceti kramānnṛpa || 4.113.30 ||
homaṃ tilaghṛtaiḥ kuryādgṛhanāmnā tu maṃtravit ||
arkaḥ palāśakhadirau hyapāmārgotha pippalaḥ || 31 ||
uduṃbaraśamīdūrvākuśāśca samidhaḥ kramāt ||
ekaikasya tvaṣṭaśatamaṣṭāviṃśatireva vā || 32 ||
hotavyaṃ madhusarpibhyāṃ dadhnā vā pāyasena vā ||
saptame tvatha saṃprāpte naktaṃ sūryasutasya tu || 33 ||
grahāstrayo.api kartavyā rāja~mllohamayāḥ śubhāḥ ||
vratāṃte sarvataścaitānsauvarṇānvātha kārayet || 34 ||
kṛṣṇavastrayugaṃ dadyādekaikasya kramānnṛpa ||
mṛganābhyā samālabhya kṛśarānvinivedya ca || 35 ||
homāvasāne sarvaṃ tadbrāhmaṇāyopapādayet ||
śanaiścara namaste.astu namo.astu rāhave tathā || 36 ||
ketave ca namastubhyaṃ sarvaśāṃtiprado bhava ||
evaṃ kṛte bhavedyastu tannibodha nareśvara || 37 ||
yadi bhaumo ravisuto bhāskaro rāhuṇā saha ||
ketuśca mūrdhni tiṣṭhaṃti sarve pīḍākarā grahāḥ || 38 ||
anena kṛtamātreṇa sarve śāmyaṃtyupadravāḥ || 39 ||
evaṃ yaḥ kurute rājansadābhaktisamanvitaḥ ||
tasya sānugrahā sarve yacchanti vijayaṃ sukham ||4.113.40||
yaścaitacchraṇuyātkalpaṃ grahāṇāṃ paṭhate.api vā ||
tasya sānugrahā sarve śāṃtiṃ yacchaṃti nānyathā ||41||
śanaiścaraṃ rāhuketū lohapātreṣu vinyaset ||
kṛṣṇāgaruḥ smṛto dhūpo dakṣiṇā cātmaśaktitaḥ ||42||
sūryaṃ vidhuṃ kuja budhau guruśukrasaurīnhastādikarkṣasahitānuditakrameṇa||
saṃpūjya hemaghaṭitāndvijapuṅgavāya dattvā pumāngrahagaṇena na pīḍyate.atra ||43||
iti śrībhaviṣye mahāpurāṇa uttaraparvaṇi śrīkṛṣṇayudhiṣṭhirasaṃvāde grahanakṣatravratavarṇanaṃ nāma trayodaśottaraśatatamo.adhyāyaḥ || 113 || cha ||
śanaiścaravratavarṇanam
|| śrīkṛṣṇa uvāca || |||||
purā tretāyuge pārtha nāvarṣatpākaśāsanaḥ ||
kathaṃcidanayādrājñastasya rāṣṭre samaṃtataḥ || 1 ||
tato rāṣṭraṃ kṣudhāviṣṭaṃ babhūvātīva dāruṇam ||
pataṃgamūṣikākīrṇaṃ coravyālabhayākulam || 2 ||
tasminghorākule kāle sapatnīkaḥ sabālakaḥ ||
kauśikaḥ svagṛhaṃ tyaktvā pararāṣṭramagācchanaiḥ || 3 ||
mārge.atha gacchatā tena kauśikena maharṣiṇā ||
tyaktaḥ sa bālako hyeko durbharaṃ ca kuṭumbakam || 4 ||
tasminkāle viśeṣeṇa kṣīṇennauṣadhi saṃcaye ||
kṛtvātinirghṛṇaṃ karma gato.asau kauśiko muniḥ || 5 ||
so.api bālo rudandīno diśo vīkṣya sthitaḥ pathi ||
utthāya pippalasyādhaḥ phalānyattuṃ pracakrame || 6 ||
kūpe jalaṃ papau nityaṃ tatraivāśramamaṃḍale ||
kṛtvā samyak sthito raudraṃ tepe ca vipulaṃ tapaḥ || 7 ||
athājagāma bhagavānnārado vedapāragaḥ ||
taṃ dṛṣṭvā dīnavadanaṃ kṣudhārtaṃ dvijapotakam || 8 ||
dayayā tasya saṃskāraṃ cakre mauṃjyādibaṃdhanam ||
vedānadhyāpayāmāsa sarahasyapadakramān ||
dadau ca vaiṣṇavaṃ maṃtraṃ dvādaśākṣaramityuta || 9 ||
vedābhyāsaratasyāsya viṣṇudhyānaparasya ca ||
pratyahaṃ pippalādasya viṣṇuḥ pratyakṣatāṃ yayau || 4.114.10 ||
vainateyasamārūḍho nīlotpaladalacchaviḥ ||
caturbhujaḥ pītavāsāḥ śaṃkhacakragadādharaḥ || 11 ||
sa uvāca tadā tuṣṭo varaṃ brūhi yami cchasi ||
tacchrutvā nāradamukhaṃ samālokya śiśustadā ||
nāradenāpyanujñāto jñānavidyāmayācata || 12 ||
dattvā jñānaṃ sopadeśaṃ yogābhyāsaṃ ca nirmalam ||
nāgārigamano viṣṇustatraivāntarhitobhavat || 13 ||
tato rājanmahājñānī maharṣiḥ sa śiśustadā ||
nāradaṃ paripapraccha kenāhaṃ pīḍito mune || 14 ||
graheṇāgrahabhūtena bālarūpo.api duḥkhita. ||
na me pitā na me mātā jīvitosmyatipīḍayā || 15 ||
brāhmaṇyaṃ bhavatā dattaṃ daivānmama dvijottama ||
etacchrutvā śiśorvākyaṃ kathayāmāsa nāradaḥ || 16 ||
śanaiścareṇa krūreṇa graheṇa tvaṃ hi pīḍitaḥ ||
pīḍitaśca samasto.api deśoyaṃ maṃdacāriṇā || 17 ||
tenaitatte phalaṃ prāptaṃ saiṣaḥ sauriḥ śanaiścaraḥ ||
prajvalannatidarpeṇa sphuratīva nabhastale || 18 ||
evamuktaḥ śiśuḥ krodhātprajajvāleva pāvakaḥ ||
ālokya gaganādbhūmau pātayāmāsa vai śanim ||
patamāno gireḥ śṛṃgādbhagnaḥ khaṃjo babhūva ha || 19 ||
dharaṇyāṃ patitaṃ dṛṣṭvā bhāskarātmajamāturam ||
narīnarti bhujakṣepairnārado hṛṣṭamānasaḥ || 4.114.20 ||
harṣāddevānathāhūya darśayāmāsa taṃ śanim || 21 ||
atha devāstathā prāptā brahmarudrendrapāvakāḥ ||
śanaiḥ saṃśamayāsurūcuścedamṛṣiṃ ca tam || 22 ||
svasti te.astu mahābhāga pippalāda mahāmune ||
bhadraṃ te.atra kṛtaṃ nāma nāradena maharṣiṇā ||
anvarthayuktaṃ viprendra jīvitaṃ piplādanāt || 23 ||
bhagavanpippalānyattvā jīvito.asi yato mune ||
tataśca pippalādeti khyātiṃ loke gamiṣyasi || 24 ||
ye ca tvāṃ pūjayiṣyaṃti snātvā puṣpairmahāṛṣim ||25||
ihāśrame samabhyetya rūpesminbhaktibhāvitāḥ ||
saptajanmāntaraṃ yāvatputrapautrānugāminaḥ||26||
na teṣāṃ bādhikā satyaṃ grahapīḍā bhaviṣyati ||
smariṣyaṃtīha ye ca tvāṃ pippalādeti nāmataḥ ||27||
teṣāṃ śanaiścara kṛtā pīḍā na prabhaviṣyati ||
kṣamasvāsya mahābhāga nirdoṣo.ayaṃ grahāgraṇīḥ || 28 ||
caranvṛkṣaṃ śanaireṣa śubhāśubhaphalapradaḥ ||
hatasādhyā grahāścaite na bhavaṃti kadācana||29||
balihomanamaskāraiḥ śāṃtiṃ yacchaṃti pūjitāḥ ||
ato.arthamasya divase snānamabhyaṃgapūrvakam ||4.114.30||
kāryaṃ deyaṃ ca viprāṇāṃ tailamabhyaṃgahetave ||
yastu saṃvatsaraṃ yāvatprāpte śanidine naraḥ ||31||
tailaṃ dadāti viprāṇāṃ svaśaktyānyajanepi ca ||
tatassaṃvatsarasyāṃte prāpte tasya dinaṃ punaḥ || 32 ||
lohaissaṃghaṭitaṃ sauriṃ tailamadhye vinikṣipet ||
lohabhāṃḍakamadhyasthaṃ kṛṣṇavastrayugacchadam || 33 ||
kṛṣṇagodakṣiṇāyuktaṃ kṛṣṇakaṃbala śāyinam ||
tilatailena ca snānaṃ kṛṣṇapuṣpaiḥ supūjitam ||34||
kṛṣṇagaṃdhaiḥ kṛṣṇadhūpaiḥ kṛśarānnaistilaudanaiḥ ||
pūjayitvā sūryaputraṃ brāhmaṇāya nivedayet || 35 ||
maṃtreṇānena brahmarṣe śannodevīti bhaktimān ||
itareṣāṃ tu varṇānāṃ śṛṇu mantraṃ dvijottama || 36 ||
krūrāvalokanavaśādbhuvanaṃ nāśayiṣyati yo graho ruṣṭaḥ ||
tuṣṭo dhanakanakasukhaṃ dadāti sauriḥ śanaiścaraḥ pātu || 37 ||
yatpurā naṣṭarājyāya nalāya pradadau kila ||
svapne saurirnijaṃ mantraṃ śṛṇu kāmaphalapradam || 38 ||
kroḍaṃ nīlāñjanaprakhyaṃ nīlavarṇasamasrajama ||
chāyāmārtaṃḍasaṃbhūtaṃ namasyāmi śanaiścaram || 39 ||
namo.arkaputrāya śanaiścarāya nīhāravarṇāṃjanamecakāya ||
śrutvā rahasyaṃ bhavakāmadaśca phalaprado me bhava sūryaputra || 4.114.40 ||
namo.astu pretarājāya kṛṣṇadehāya vai namaḥ ||
śanaiścarāya krūrāya śuddhabuddhipradāyine || 41 ||
ya ebhirnāmabhiḥ stauti tasya tuṣṭo bhavāmyaham ||
madīyaṃ tu bhayaṃ tasya svapne.api na bhaviṣyati ||42||
evamūce śaniḥ pūrvamatastaṃ brāhmaṇe dadet ||
evametadvrataṃ vipra ye cariṣyaṃti mānavāḥ || 43 ||
sthāvaresthāvare prāpte vatsaraṃ yāvadeva tu ||
teṣāṃ śānaiścarī pīḍā deśe.api na bhaviṣyati || 44 ||
evamuktvā surāḥ sarve pratijagmuryathāgatam ||
śanaiścaro.api svasthāne grahāṃte khe pratiṣṭhitaḥ || 45 ||
pippalādo.api brahmajño brahmājñāṃ pratipālayan ||
śanaiścaraṃ tu saṃpūjya tuṣṭāva racitāñjaliḥ || 46 ||
koṇasthaḥ piṅgalo babhruḥ kṛṣṇo raudro.antako yamaḥ ||
sauriḥ śanaiścaro modaḥ prīyatāṃ me grahottamaḥ ||47||
śanaiścaramiti stutvā pippalādo mahāmuniḥ ||
khe prajvalanvimānastho dṛśyate.adyāpi mānavaiḥ ||48||
idaṃ śanaiścarākhyānaṃ ye śroṣyanti samāhitāḥ ||
teṣāṃ kuruvaraśreṣṭha śaniḥ pīḍāṃ na dāsyati || 49 ||
kṛṣṇāyasena ghaṭitāṃ graharājamūrtiṃ lohe nidhāya kalaśe tilatailapūrṇe ||
yo brāhmaṇāya ravijaṃ pradadāti bhaktyā pīḍā śanaiścarakṛtā na hi bādhate tam || 4.114.50 || ||
iti śrībhaviṣye mahāpurāṇa uttaraparvaṇi śrīkṛṣṇayudhiṣṭhirasaṃvāde śanaiścaravratavarṇanaṃnāma caturdaśottaraśatamo.adhyāyaḥ || 114 || || cha ||
ādityadinanaktavidhivarṇanam
|| yudhiṣṭhira uvāca || ||
yadārogyakaraṃ puṃsāṃ yadanaṃtaphalapradam ||
vrataṃ tadbrūhi govinda sarvapāpapraṇāśanam ||1||
|| śrīkṛṣṇa uvāca || ||
yattadviśvātmano dhāma paraṃ brahma sanātanam ||
sūryāgnicandrarūpeṇa tattridhā jagati sthitam || 2 ||
tamārādhya pumānkiṃ na prāpnoti kurunandana ||
tasmādādityavāreṇa sadā naktāśano bhavet || 3 ||
utpadyate yadā bhaktirbhānorupari śāśvatī ||
tadārabhya sadā kāryaṃ naktamādityavāsare || 4 ||
pūrvoktavidhinā caiva pūjayitvā dvijottamān ||
tato.astasamaye bhāno raktacandanapaṅkajam || 5 ||
vilikhya dvādaśadalaṃ pūjya sūryeti pūrvataḥ ||
divākaraṃ tathāgneye vivasvatamataḥ param || 6 ||
bhagaṃ tu nairṛte devaṃ varuṇaṃ paścime dale ||
mahendraṃ mārutadale ādityaṃ tu tathottare || 7 ||
śāṃtamīśānabhāge tu namaskāreṇa vinyaset||
karṇikāpūrvapatre tu sūryasya turagānnyaset || 8 ||
dakṣiṇe yamanāmānaṃ mārtaṃḍaṃ paścime dale ||
uttareṇa raviṃ devaṃ karṇikāyāṃ tu bhāskaram || 9 ||
arghyaṃ dadyāttataḥ pārtha satilāruṇacaṃdanam ||
phalākṣatayutaṃ tadvadimaṃ maṃtramudīrayet || 4.115.10
kālātmā sarvabhūtātmā vedātmā viśvatomukhaḥ||
yasmādagnīṃdurūpastvamataḥ pāhi prabhākara || 11 ||
agnimīle namastubhyamiṣe tvorje ca bhāskare||
agna āyāhi varada namaste jyotiṣāṃ pate||12||
arghyaṃ dattvā visarjyātha niśi tailavivarjitam ||
bhuñjīta bhāvitamanā bhāskaraṃ saṃsmaranmuhuḥ ||13||
prāktane.ahni śanau caiva tailābhyaṃgaṃ vivarjayet ||
vatsarāṃte kārayitvā kāñcanaṃ kamalottamam || 14 ||
puruṣaṃ ca yathāśaktyā kārayeddvibhujaṃ tathā || 15 ||
suvarṇaśṛṃgīṃ kapilāṃ mahārghyāṃ raupyakhurāṃ kāṃsyadohāṃ savatsām ||
pūrṇe guḍasyopari tāmrapātre nidhāya padmaṃ ca tato nidadhyāt ||9||
gāṃ kalpayitvā puruṣaṃ sapadmaṃ dadyādanekavratanāyakāya ||
avyaṃgarūpāya jitendriyāya kuṭuṃbine śuddhamanuddhatāya || 17 ||
namo.astu ṛksāmayajurvidhātre padmaprabodhāya jagatsavitre ||
trayīmayāya triguṇātmane ca trilokanāthāya namonamaste ||18||
ityanena vidhānena varṣamekaṃ tu yo naraḥ ||
naktamādityavāreṇa kuryātsa nīrujo bhavet ||19||
dhanadhānyasamāyuktaḥ putrapautrasamanvitaḥ ||
martye sthitvā ciraṃ kālaṃ sūryalokamavāpnuyāt || 4.115.20 ||
karmasaṃkṣayamavāpya pārthivaḥ śokaduḥkhabhayarogavarjitaḥ ||
syādamitrakulakālasaṃnibho dharmamūrtiramitaujasā yutaḥ || 21 ||
yā ca bhartṛgurudevatatparā vedamūrtidinanaktamācarat||
sāpi lokamamareśapūjitā yāti kau rava ravernna saṃśayaḥ || 22 ||
yaḥ paṭhedatha śṛṇoti vā naraḥ paśyatītthamatha vānumodayet ||
so.api śakrabhavane divaukasaiḥ kalpakoṭiśatamekamīḍyate | || 23 || ||
iti śrībhaviṣye mahāpurāṇa uttaraparvaṇi śrīkṛṣṇayudhiṣṭhirasaṃvāda ādityadinanaktavidhivarṇanaṃ nāma pañcadaśottaraśatatamo.adhyāyaḥ | || 115 || cha ||
saṃkrāntyudyāpanavarṇanam
|| śrīkṛṣṇa uvāca || ||
athānyadapi te vacmi saṃkrāṃtyudyāpane phalam ||
yadakṣayaṃ paraṃ loke purāṇakavayo viduḥ || 1 |
viṣuve ayane vāpi saṃkrātivratamārabhet ||
pūrvedyurekabhaktena daṃtadhāvanapūrvakam || 2 ||
saṃkrāṃtivāsare prāpte tilaiḥ snānaṃ vidhīyate ||
abhisaṃkramaṇaṃ bhūmau candanenāṣṭapatrakam || 3 ||
padmaṃ sakarṇikaṃ kuryāttasminnāvāhayedravim ||
karṇikāyāṃ nyasetsūryamādityaṃ pūrvatastataḥ || 4 ||
namaḥ saptārciṣe.agneye yāmye ruṅmaṇḍalāya ca ||
namaḥ savitre nairṛtye varuṇaṃ vāruṇe yajet || 5 ||
saptasaptiṃ ca vāyavye pūjayedbhāsvatāṃ patim ||
mārtaṃḍamuttare viṣṇumīśāne vinyaseddale || 6 ||
gandhamālyaphalairbhakṣyaiḥ sthaṃḍile pūjayettataḥ ||
candanodakapuṣpaistu dattvārghaṃ vinyasedbhuvi || 7 ||
namaste viśvarūpāya viśvadhātre svayaṃbhuve ||
namonamaste varada ṛksāmayajuṣāṃ pate || 8 ||
anena vidhinā dattvā bhānave.arghyaṃ narottama ||
dvijāya sodakaṃ kumbhaṃ ghṛtapātraṃ hiraṇmayam || 9 ||
kamalaṃ ca yathāśaktyā kārayitvā nivedayeta||
vidhinānena kartavyaṃ māsi māsi narottama || 4.116.10 ||
ekabhuktāśanaiḥ puṃbhiḥ sarvametadyathāvidhi ||
ekasminnahni kartavyaṃ vatsarāṃtetha vā punaḥ || 11 ||
kauṃteya tasminghṛtapāyasena saṃpūjya vahniṃ dvijapuṃgavāya ||
kumbhānpunardvādaśadhenuyuktāndaurgatyayuktaḥ kuśalāmathaikām || 12 || nivedayedbrāhmaṇapuṅgavāya haimīṃ ca dadyātpṛthivīṃ sasasyām ||
śaktyātha raupyāmatha vāpi tāmrīṃ paiṣṭīmaśakto vasudhāṃ vidhāya || 13 ||
sauvarṇasūryeṇa samaṃ pradadyānna vittaśāṭhyaṃ purupo.atra kuryāt ||
kurvannadho yāti narendracandrayāvanmahendra pramukhāḥ sureśāḥ || 14 ||
pṛthvī ca yāvatsakulācalā ca yāvacca sūryānilavahnicandrāḥ ||
tāvatsa gandharvakulairaśeṣaiḥ saṃpūjyate bhārata nākapṛṣṭhe || || 15 ||
tatastu karmakṣayamāpya saptadvīpādhipaḥ syātsukulaprasūtaḥ ||
divyaiḥ mukhairyuktavapuḥ sabhāryaḥ prasūtaputrānvayabandhuvargaḥ || 16||
iti paṭhati śṛṇoti yo.atibhaktyā vidhimakhilaṃ ravisaṃkrameṣu puṇyam ||
matimapi ca dadāti so.api devairamarapatipramukhairmṛtastu pūjyaḥ || 17 || ||
iti śrībhaviṣye mahāpurāṇa uttaraparvaṇi śrīkṛṣṇayudhiṣṭhirasaṃvāde saṃkrāṃtyudyāpanavarṇanaṃ nāma ṣoḍaśottaraśatatamo.adhyāyaḥ || 116 || || cha || || ||
viṣṭivratavarṇanam
|| yudhiṣṭhira uvāca || ||
kṛṣṇa keyaṃ janaiḥ sarvairviṣṭirbhadreti cocyate ||
kasyātmajeyaṃ kiṃrūpā pūjyate ca kathaṃ janaiḥ|||||
|| śrīkṛṣṇa uvāca || ||
sutā mārtaṃḍadevasya chāyayā janitā purā ||
śanaiścarasya sodaryā bhaginyatibhayaṃkarī || 2 ||
sā jātamātrā bhuvanaṃ grastuṃ samupacakrame ||
kṛṣṇā karālavadanā sitadaṃṣṭrordhvamūrddhajā || 3 ||
niryāti yadi kāryeṇa kaścittasya puraḥ sthitā ||
vighnaṃ karoti svapato bhuñjānasya sthitasya vā || 4 ||
yajñavighnakarī raudrā samājotsavanāśinī ||
nityodvegakarī raudrā vināśayati sā jagat || 5 ||
tāṃ tu durvinayāsaktāṃ dṛṣṭvā devo divākaraḥ ||
ciṃtayāmāsa kasyāpi yacchāmyenāṃ sumadhyamām || 6||
kanyādurvinayācceha pitā doṣeṇa gṛhyate ||
yuvatyāstu tato bhartā tasmādbhartṛgṛhaṃ nayet ||7||
viciṃtyaivaṃ sutāṃ bhadrāṃ yasyayasya prayacchati ||
te namaṃti kṣaṇenaiva surarākṣasakinnarāḥ || 8 ||
maṇḍapaṃ maṇḍapārambhe bhaṃktvā bhīṣayate janam ||
vivasvāṃścintayāviṣṭaḥ kasyeyaṃ pratipādyatām || 9 ||
virūpā duṣṭahṛdayā svecchācāravihāriṇī ||
dattāpyeṣā na doṣāya bhavatīha kathaṃcana ||4.117.1 0||
vitarkayanyāvadevamāste devo divaspatiḥ ||
tāvattayā jagatsarvaṃ duṣṭayā samabhidrutam || 11 ||
athājagāma savituḥ pārśve brahmā.aṇḍasaṃbhavaḥ ||
kāryaṃ nivedayāmāsa viṣṭerdauṣṭyamaśeṣataḥ || 12 ||
bhāskarastamuvācātha brahmāṇaṃ bhuvaneśvaram ||
bhavānkartā ca hartā ca kasmādevaṃ prabhāṣase || 13 ||
evamuktastadā brahmā bhāskareṇāmitadyutiḥ ||
uvāca viṣṭimānāyya śṛṣu bhadre mayoditum || 14 ||
karaṇaiḥ saha vartasva bavabālavakaulavaiḥ ||
saptame.ardhadine prāpte yadabhīṣṭaṃ kuruṣva tat || 15 || yātrāpraveśamāṃgalyakṛṣivāṇijyakāraṇāt ||
bhakṣayasvābhimukhagānnarānunmārgagāminaḥ|| || 16 ||
udvejanīyo no hi jano bhavatyā divasatrayam ||
pūjyā surāsurāṇāṃ tvaṃ divasārddhe bhaviṣyasi || 17 ||
ullaṃghya ye pravartaṃte bhadre tvāṃ nirbhayā narāḥ ||
teṣāṃ vināśayāśu tvaṃ kāryamārye sukhī bhava || 18 ||
evamuktvā gato brahmā bhadrāpi bhuvanatrayam ||
babhrāmodbhrāṃtahṛdayā bhīṣayantī surāsurān || 19 ||
evameṣā samutpannā viṣṭiriṣṭavināśinī ||
niveditā te kauṃteya tasmāttāṃ parivarjayet || 4.117.20 ||
asitajaladavarṇā dīrghanāsogradaṃṣṭrā vipulahanukapālā piṃḍikodbaddhajaṃghā || analaśatasahasraṃ codgiraṃtī samaṃtātpatati bhuvanamadhye kāryanāśāya viṣṭiḥ || 21 || bhānoḥ sutā ketuśatāgrajātā kṛṣṇā kumūrtiḥ satataṃ kucelā ||
devairniyuktā karaṇārthasaṃsthā viṣṭistu sarvatra vivarjanīyā || 22 ||
mukhe tu ghaṭikāḥ pañca dve kaṃṭhe tu sadā sthite ||
hṛdi caikādaśa proktāścatasro nābhimaṃḍale || 23 ||
kaṭyāṃ pañcaiva vijñeyāstisraḥ pucche jayāvahāḥ ||
mukhe kāryavināśāya grīvāyāṃ dhananāśinī|| 24 ||
hadi prāṇaharā jñeyā nābhyāṃ tu kalahāvahā ||
kaṭyāmarthaparibhraṃśo viṣṭipucche dhruvo jayaḥ ||25||
pṛthivyāṃ yāni kāryāṇi suśubhānyaśubhāni ca ||
tāni sarvāṇi siddhyaṃti viṣṭipucche na saṃśayaḥ ||26 ||
dhanyā dadhimukhī bhadrā mahāmārī kharānanā ||
kālarātrirmahārudrā viṣṭiśca kulaputrikā || 27 ||
bhairavī ca mahākālī asurāṇāṃ kṣayaṃkarī ||
dvādaśaiva tu nāmāni prātarutthāya yaḥ paṭheta || 28 ||
na ca vyādhirbhavettasya rogī rogātpramucyate ||
grahāḥ sarve.anukūlāḥ syurna ca vighnādi jāyate || 29 ||
raṇe rājakule dyūte sarvatra vijayī bhavet ||4.117.30 ||
yaśca pūjayate nityaṃ śāstroktavidhinā naraḥ ||
tasya sarvārthasiddhistu bhavatīha na saṃśayaḥ || 31 ||
yenopavāsavidhinā vratena ca yaśasvinī ||
pūjitā tuṣṭimabhyeti tadeva kathayāmi te || 32||
yasmindine bhavedbhadrā tasminnahani bhārata ||
upavāsasya niyamaṃ kuryā nnārī naro.atha vā || 3||
yadi rātrau bhavedviṣṭirekabhuktaṃ dinadvayam ||
kāryaṃ tenopavāsaḥ syāditi paurāṇikī śrutiḥ || 34 ||
praharasyopari yadā syādviṣṭiḥ praharatrayam ||
tatropavāsaḥ kartavya ekabhuktamatonyathā|| 35 ||
sarvauṣadhyudakasnānaṃ sugaṃdhāmalakairatha ||
nadyāṃ taḍāge.atha gṛhe snānaṃ sarvatra śasyate || 36 ||
devānpitṛrnprīṇayitvā tato darbhamayīṃ śubhām ||
viṣṭiṃ kṛtvā puṣpadhūpairnaivedyena ca pūjayet || 37 ||
homaṃ kṛtvā viṣṭināmairaṣṭottaraśataṃ tataḥ ||
bhuñjīta dattvā viprāya tilānpāyasameva ca ||
satilāṃ kṛśarāṃ bhuktvā paścādbhuñjīta kāmataḥ|| 38||
chāyāsūryasute devi viṣṭiriṣṭārthadāyini ||
pūjitā.asi yathāśaktyā bhadre bhadrapradā bhava || 39 ||
upoṣpa vidhinānena daśa sapta yathākramam ||
udyāpanaṃ tataḥ kuryātpūrvava tpūjya bhāminīm || 4.117.40 ||
sthāpayitvāyase pīṭhe kṛśarānnaṃ nivedya ca ||
paridhāpya kṛṣṇayugaṃ stutvā maṃtreṇa tāṃ punaḥ || 41 ||
brāhmaṇāya punardadyāllohaṃ tailaṃ tilāṃstathā ||
kṛṣṇāṃ savatsāṃ gāmekāṃ tathaikaṃ kālakaṃbalam ||
dakṣiṇāṃ ca yathāśaktyā dattvā bhadrāṃ visarjayet || 42 ||
ya evaṃ kurute pārtha samyagbhadrāvrataṃ naraḥ ||
vighno na jāyate tasya kāryāraṃbhe kadācana || 43 ||
rākṣasāśca piśācā vā pūtanāśākinīgrahāḥ ||
na pīḍayanti taṃ martyaṃ yo bhadrāvratamācaret || 44 ||
na caiveṣṭaviyogaḥ syānna hānistasya jāyate ||
dehāṃte yāti sadanaṃ bhāskarasya na saṃśayaḥ || 45 ||
sūryātmajātidayitā bhaginī śaneryā martye bhramatyatirathā karaṇakrameṇa ||
tāṃ kṛṣṇabhāsuramukhīṃ samupoṣya viṣṭimiṣṭārthasiddhimabudho.api pumānupaiti|| 46||
iti śrībhaviṣye mahāpurāṇa uttaraparvaṇi śrīkṛṣṇayudhiṣṭhirasaṃvāde viṣṭivratavarṇanaṃ nāma saptadaśottaraśatatamo.adhyāyaḥ || 117 || || cha || || ||
agastyavratavarṇanam
|| śrīkṛṣṇa uvāca || ||
agastyavratamastyanyatsarvapāpapraṇāśanam ||
tacchṛṇuṣva mahīpāla kathyamānaṃ mayānagha || 1 ||
|| yudhiṣṭhira uvāca || ||
śṛṇomi brūhi me kṛṣṇa devarṣestasya ceṣṭitam ||
janma caivārghadānaṃ ca kālamudgamanasya ca ||2||
|| śrīkṛṣṇa uvāca || ||
mitraśca varuṇaścaiva pūrvametau surottamau ||
maṃdarasya samīpe tu ceraturvipulaṃ tapaḥ || 3 ||
tayoḥ saṃkṣobhaṇārthāya vāsavena varāpsarāḥ ||
urvaśī preṣitā tatra rūpodāryaguṇānvitā || 4 ||
tasyāḥ saṃdarśanādeva kṣubhitau tau surottamau ||
vikāraṃ manaso buddhvā kuṃbhe vīryaṃ sasarjatuḥ || 5 ||
nimeḥ śāpāttatra jāto vaśiṣṭho bhagavānṛṣiḥ ||
anaṃtaramagastyastu jāto divyastapodhanaḥ || 6 ||
malayasyaikadeśe tu vaikhānasavidhānataḥ ||
sabhāryaḥ saṃvṛto vipraistapastepe suduścaram || 7 ||
āstāṃ daityau purā duṣṭāvādau kṛtayugasya tu ||
nāmnā ilvalavātāpī devabrāhmaṇakaṃṭakau || 8 ||
tayoreko.abhavanmeṣo dvitīyo bhojyadāyakaḥ ||
śrāddhakrameṇa tenaivaṃ bahavo nāśitā dvijāḥ || 9 ||
athānyasmindine daityo hyagastyaṃ saṃnyamantrayat ||
bhojyārthaṃ brāhmaṇaiḥ sārddhaṃ bhṛgugargakulodbhavaiḥ || 4.118.10 ||
agastyopyabhavacchrāddhe dhaureyo roṣadarpitaḥ ||
so.api hatvāpacadvahnau vātāpiṃ meṣarūpiṇam || 11 ||
pariviṣyamāṇeṣu teṣu stimitaṃ prāha dānavam ||
agastyo bhagavānkruddhaḥ sarvaṃ me dīyatāmiti || 12 ||
maiṣaṃ māṃsaṃ tataḥ prādādilvalaḥ kupitastadā ||
bhakṣayitvā.abhavatsvastho nirvikāro mahāmuniḥ || 13 ||
śucirbabhau tataḥ prāha vātāpimilvalaḥ śanaiḥ ||
niṣkramasva munerddehaṃ bhittvā kasmādvilaṃbase || 14 ||
tacchrutvāgastyavipro.api udgāraṃ kṛtavāngurum ||
kuto niṣkramaṇaṃ prāha bhakṣitaḥ sa mayā punaḥ || 15 ||
jīrṇo.ayaṃ bhasmabhūto.ayaṃ vātāpirbrahmakaṃṭakaḥ ||
ilvalo.api sphuratkrodhaḥ so.agastyena nirīkṣitaḥ || 16 ||
bhasmībhūtaḥ kṣaṇenaiva tataḥ śāṃtaṃ jagadbabhau ||
tena vaireṇa te duṣṭā naṣṭaśeṣāstu dānavāḥ || 17 ||
saṃmaṃtrya niścayaṃ merau tato.agastyamupāgatāḥ ||
vivarddhayiṣavastejo munerasya divaukasaḥ || 18 ||
te.agastyamāhurbrahmarṣe samudraṃ śoṣayasva vai ||
tacchrutvāgastyavipro.api āgneyīṃ dhāraṇāṃ dadhat || 19 ||
tayā pītaḥ samudro.api bhrāṃtamīnormikacchapaḥ ||
pīte samudratoye.api devaiḥ kruddhaistu dānavāḥ || 4.118.20 ||
kṣayaṃ nītāḥ kṣaṇātsarve krandamānāḥ punaḥpunaḥ ||
kṣemaṃ jagatyabhūtsarvamagastyarṣeḥ prasādataḥ ||21||
atha gaṃgānadītoyaiḥ saṃpūrṇe sāgare punaḥ ||
maṃthānaṃ maṃdaraṃ kṛtvā netraṃ kṛtvā tu vāsukim || 22 ||
mamaṃthuḥ sahitāḥ sarve samudraṃ daityadānavāḥ ||
athotthitaṃ ratnasaṃghe some śrīkaustubhe gaje || 23 ||
atilobhānmathyamāne sāgare payasāṃ nidhau ||
athotthitaṃ jvaladraudraṃ kālakūṭaṃ mahāviṣam || || 24 ||
yenāsau surasaṃghāte āghūrṇitā ivābhavat ||
sāgaraṃ saṃpraviṣṭāste rātrau rātrau viniryuyuḥ ||25||
nirgamya ca vadhaṃ cakrurmunīnāmūrdhvaretasām||
babhaṃjuryajñapātrāṇi divā toye nililyire || 26 ||
samudramadhye na jñātvā brahmā nārāyaṇo haraḥ ||
vāyuḥ kubero vasavaḥ sarve devāḥ savāsavāḥ ||| || 27 ||
tato mantraiḥ śaṃkareṇa kiñcittatraiva bhakṣitam ||
kṣaṇāddagdhaḥ sa maṃtropi nīlakaṃṭhīkṛto haraḥ || 28 ||
brahmāpi cetanāṃ prāpya abrahmaṇyamuvāca ha ||
nāsti kaścijagatyasminviṣamāpātumīśvara || 29 ||
agastyo dakṣiṇāśāyāṃ laṅkāmūle mahāmuniḥ ||
tadgacchadhvaṃ mahābhāgāḥ śaraṇaṃ sarvadā hyasau || 4.118.30 ||
evamuktā gatā devā agastyāśramadakṣiṇām ||
devānvīkṣya ca tānharṣādagastyo munisattamaḥ || 31 ||
dhyānaṃ cakre viṣaṃ yena himādrau saṃpraveśitam ||
kaṃṭhīsūtraṃ nikuṃjeṣu himaparvatasānuṣu || 32 ||
tasminkāle viṣaṃ lagnaṃ kiñciccheṣaṃ drumādiṣu ||
unmattakaravīrārkasthalabhūmi jalānile || 33 ||
tadviṣaṃ cūrṇitaṃ tena kṣaṇātsaṃkocitaṃ tathā ||
himavātena duṣṭena vahamānena pāṃḍava || 34 ||
manuṣyāṇāṃ tu jāyaṃte rogā nānāvidhā bhuvi ||
te ca māsatrayaṃ sārddhaṃ pravahaṃti viṣolbaṇāḥ || 35 ||
vṛṣasaṃkrātimārabhya siṃhāṃte śāmyate viṣam ||
rogadoṣāpanodaśca bhavetpārtha prabhāvataḥ || 36 ||
evaṃ kālena mahatā nīruje vyādhivarjite ||
jagatyasminpurā pārtha ghanībhūte prajāgaṇe || 37 ||
niraṃtare martyaloke ūrdhvabāhu prasāriṇi ||
balavāndhūmanirdeśānmṛtyurbhrāmyati mūrtimān || 38 ||
prajā vyāpādayankālādājagāma mahāmuneḥ ||
samīpaṃ mūrtimānkruddho mṛtyustena nirīkṣitaḥ || 39 ||
bhasmībabhūva paścācca brahmaṇaḥ sukhakāraṇāt ||
vyādhivṛndasamopeto mṛtyuranyo vinirmitaḥ ||4.118.40||
tathānyo daṃḍakāraṇye śveto nāma nṛpottamaḥ ||
svamāṃsamaśnatā tena nirvedātprārthito muniḥ ||41||
bhagavatsarvamevānyaddattaṃ rājyamadānmayā ||
annaṃ jalaṃ vā śrāddhaṃ vā na dattaṃ pāpabuddhinā || 42 ||
tato.agastyaḥ kāruṇyā ratnaiḥ śrāddhamakalpayat ||
śrāddhe nivṛtte sahasā divyadehaḥ śriyā vṛtaḥ || 43 ||
prāptaśca paramaṃ sthānamagastyarṣeḥ prasādataḥ ||
atha vindhyo mahāśailaḥ sūryaroṣādvyavardhata || 44 ||
kasmānmerumivāsau māṃ na karoti pradakṣiṇam ||
varddhamānaṃ tu taṃ dṛṣṭvā tato devāḥ savāsavāḥ || 45 ||
ekībhūyāśramaṃ gatvā stutvā devarṣipuṅgavam ||
agastyamūcurbhagavansūryamārganirodhinam || 46 ||
viṃdhyaṃ nivāraya svainaṃ sthitau sthāpaya parvatam ||
agastyopi drutaṃ gatvā prāhedaṃ vindhyaparvatam || 47 ||
prasthitaṃ tīrthayātrāyāṃ viddhi māmacalottama ||
sthitau ca sthīyatāṃ tāvadyāvadāgamanaṃ mama || 48 ||
evamuktvā saṃprayāto nādyāpi vinivartate ||
dṛśyate bhrājayannāśāṃ dakṣiṇāṃ gagane jvalan || 49 ||
trailokyavaṃdyacaraṇo lopāmudrāsahāyavān ||
lopāmudrāpi taṃ prāha devarṣiṃ devapūjitam || 4.118.50 ||
tatrāśramasthalikāyāmṛtukāle hyupasthite ||
bhoktumicchāmi viṣayāṃstvayā saha sukheṣiṇī|| 91 ||
bhavedyadi gṛhaṃ ramyaṃ sarvaratnavibhūṣitam ||
gajai rathaiśca saṃpūrṇaṃ śayanaiḥ pravarāsanaiḥ || 52 ||
dukūlapaṭṭanetraiśca vilāsairlalitairmune ||
tvayā saha samāyogaṃ yāsye.ahaṃ kuru cintitam || 53 ||
etacchutvā munihṛrṣṭaḥ prāhvayaddhanadaṃ kṣaṇāt ||
kārayāmāsa bhavanaṃ saṃpūrṇaṃ ratnarāśibhiḥ || 54 ||
tatra reme sa bhagavānagastyaḥ svāśrame sukham ||
tasyaivaṃ ceṣṭitasyarṣeḥ prayacchārghyaṃ yudhiṣṭhira || 55 ||
āstikyabuddhyā bhaktyā ca dhanaṃ prāpsyasi pāṃḍava ||
kanyāyāmāgate sūrye arvāgvai saptame dine || 56||
kanyāyāṃ samanuprāpte sūrye yaḥ sannivartate ||
pratyūṣasamaye vidvānkuryāvasyodaye niśi|| 57 ||
snānaṃ śuklatilaistadvacchuklamālyāmbaro gṛhī ||
sthāpayedavraṇaṃ kuṃbhaṃ mālyavastravibhūṣitam ||58||
pañcaratnasamāyuktaṃ ghṛtapātreṇa saṃyutam ||
nānābhakṣyasamopetaṃ saptadhānyasamanvitam || 59 ||
kāñcanaṃ kārayitvā tu yathāśaktyā suśobhanam ||
puruṣākṛtiṃ praśāntaṃ ca japamaṇḍaladhāriṇam ||4.118.60||
kamaṇḍalukaraṃ śiṣyairmṛgaiśca paridhāritam ||
mṛtyughnaṃ viṣahantāraṃ darbhākṣeṣṭakaraṃ munim||61||
tasminkrame samālagnaṃ candanena tato nyaset||
snāpitaṃ cānuliptaṃ ca candanena sugaṃdhinā ||62||
pūjitaṃ cāpi kusumairhṛdyairdhūpaistu dhūpitam ||
tataścārghaṃ pradātavyo yairdravyaistāni me śṛṇu || 63 ||
kharjūrairnālikeraiśca kūṣmāṃḍaistrapuṣairapi ||
karkoṭakāravellaiśca karcūrairbījapūrakaiḥ ||64||
vṛṃtākairdāḍimaiścaiva nāraṃgaiḥ kadalīphalaiḥ ||
dūrvāṃkuraiḥ kuśaiḥ kāśaiḥ padmainīlotpalaistathā || 65 ||
nānāprakārairbhakṣyaiśca gobhirvastrai rasaiḥ śubhaiḥ ||
virūḍhaiḥ saptadhānyaiśca vaṃśapātre nidhāpitaiḥ ||66||
sauvarṇaraupyapātreṇa tāmravaṃśamayena ca ||
mūrdhni sthitena namreṇa jānubhyāṃ pṛthivītale || 67 ||
dakṣiṇābhimukho bhūtvā hyarghyapādyādikaṃ ca yat ||
śīlena cetasā bhaktyā dadyātkauravanandana || 68 ||
kāśapuṣpapratīkāśa agnimārutasaṃbhava ||
mitrāvaruṇayoḥ putra kuṃbhayone namo.astu te || 65. ||
viṃdhyavṛddhikṣayakara meṣatoyaviṣāpaha ||
rakto vallabhadevarṣe laṃkāvāsa namo.astu te || 4.118.70 ||
vātāpirbhakṣito yena samudrāḥ śoṣitāḥ purā ||
lopāmudrāpatiḥ śrīmānyo.asau tasmai namo.astu te || 71 ||
yenoditena pāpāni pralayaṃ yāṃti vyādhayaḥ ||
tasmai namo.astvagastyāya saśiṣyāya suputriṇe ||
brāhmaṇo vedaṛcayā dadyādarghyaṃ namo.astu te || 72 ||
.a.āgastyaḥ khanamānaśca nityaṃ prājāpatyaṃ balimicchamānaḥ ||
ubhau varṇau vṛṣṭyanugrahārthamupoṣa satyādeṣvaśikho jagāma ||.a
dattvaivamarghyaṃ kauṃteya pratipūjya ca puṣpakaiḥ ||
visarjayitvāgastyaṃ taṃ viprāya pratipādayet || 73 ||
daivajñavyāsarūpāya vedavedāṃgavādine ||
evaṃ yaḥ kurute bhaktyā hyagastyapratipūjanam ||
phalamekaṃ tathā dhānyaṃ kopaṃ vāsaṃ parityajet || 74 ||
saṃpūrṇe ca tato varṣe punara nyadupakramet ||
dattvārghyaṃ saptavarṣāṇi krameṇānena pāṃḍava ||
pumānphalamavāpnoti tadekāgramanāḥ śṛṇu || 75 ||
brāhmaṇaścaturo vedānsarvaśāstraviśāradaḥ ||
kṣatriyaḥ pṛthivīṃ sarvāṃ prāpnotyarṇavamekhalām ||76||
vaiśyo.apyāyuṣyamāpnoti godhanaṃ cāpi naṃdati||
śūdrāṇāṃ dhanamārogyaṃ sanmānaścādhiko bhavet || 77 ||
strīṇāṃ putrāḥ prajāyaṃte saubhāgyaṃ vṛddhiṛddhimat ||
vidhavānāṃ mahāpuṇyaṃ vardhate pāṃḍunandana|| 78 ||
kanyā bhartāramāpnoti vyādhermucyeta duḥkhitaḥ||79||
yeṣu deśeṣvagastyarṣeḥ pūjanaṃ kriyate janaiḥ ||
teṣu deśeṣu parjanyaḥ kāmavarṣī prajāyate ||4.118.80||
ītayaḥ praśamaṃ yāṃti naśyaṃti vyādha yastathā ||
paṭhaṃti ye tvagastyarṣeḥ khyānaṃ śṛṇvaṃti cāpare || 81 ||
te sarve pāpanirmuktāściraṃ sthitvā mahītale ||
haṃsayuktavimānena svargaṃ yāṃti narottama||82||
martyo yadīcchati gṛhaṃ paramarddhiyuktaṃ bhogaśarīramarujaṃ paśuputrapuṣṭim|| tatsarvavallabhamunerudaye mahārghyaṃ yacchenmahārghaphalavastradhanaiḥ sahānyaiḥ|| || 83 ||
iti śrībhaviṣye mahāpurāṇa uttaraparvaṇi śrīkṛṣṇayudhiṣṭhirasaṃvāde
.agastyārghyavidhivratavarṇanaṃ nāmāṣṭādaśottaraśatatamo.adhyāyaḥ || 118 || ||
abhinavacandrārghyavratavarṇanam
|| śrīkṛṣṇa uvāca || ||
pārtha pārthiva divyastrīmukhapaṃkajaseṃdave ||
śṛṇuṣvābhinavasyeṃdorudaye.arghyavidhiṃ param || 1 ||
ravirdvādaśabhirbhāgairvāruṇyāṃ dṛśyate yadi ||
pradoṣasamaye pārtha arghyaṃ dadyāttadā vibhoḥ || 2 ||
dvitīyāyāṃ site pakṣe saṃdhyākāle hyupasthite ||
saṃsthāpyābhinavaṃ candraṃ sa bhūmyāṃ dṛśyate yadi || 3 ||
gomayaṃ maṃḍalaṃ kṛtvā caṃdanena suśobhitam||
rohiṇyā sahitaṃ devaṃ kumudāmodasaṃbhavam|| 4 ||
puṣpacandanadhūpaiśca dīpākṣatajalaiḥ śubhaiḥ ||
dūrvāṃkurai ratnavarairdadhnā vastraiśca pāṃḍuraiḥ || 5 ||
maṃtreṇānena rājendra kṣatriyaḥ sapurohitaḥ ||
navonavo.asi māsāṃte jāyamānaḥ puna. punaḥ ||
āpyāyasva sametvevaṃ somarāja namonamaḥ || 6 ||
anenavidhinācāryaṃ sarvakāmaphalapradam ||
yaḥ prayacchati kauṃteya māsimāsi samāhitaḥ || 7 ||
sa kīrtyā yaśasā kāṃtyā dhanyaśca bhuvi mānavaḥ ||
