putrapautraiḥ parivṛto godhānyadhanasaṃkulaḥ || 8 ||
sthitvā varṣaśataṃ martye tataḥ somapuraṃ vrajet ||
tatrāste divyavapuṣā bhogānbhuñjannṛpottama ||
varastrībhiḥ sahātyarthaṃ yāvadābhūtasaṃplavam || 9 ||
dharmaṃ samṛddhimatulāṃ yadi vāñchasi tvaṃ māsānumāsamiha madvacanaṃ kuruṣva ||
somasya somakulanaṃdana dhūpapuṣpairarghaṃ prayaccha natajānu navoditasya || 4.119.10 ||
iti śrībhaviṣye mahāpurāṇa uttaraparvaṇi śrīkṛṣṇayudhiṣṭhirasaṃvāde.abhinavacaṃdrārghyavratavarṇanaṃ nāmaikonaviṃśottaraśatatamo.adhyāyaḥ || 119|| cha ||
śukrabṛhaspatyarghapūjāvarṇanam
|| śrīkṛṣṇa uvāca || ||
athātaḥ śṛṇu bhūpāla pratiśukrapraśāṃtaye ||
yātrāraṃbhe prayāṇe ca tathā śukrodayeṣviha || 1 ||
śukrapūjā prakartavyā tāṃ niśāmaya sārataḥ ||
rājate vā.atha sauvarṇe kāṃsyapātre.atha vā punaḥ || 2 ||
śuklapuṣpāṃbarayute sitataṃḍulapūrite ||
nidhāya rājataṃ śukraṃ śuci muktāphalānvitam || 3 ||
saha tena savatsāṅgāṃ brāhmaṇāya nivedayet ||
namaste sarvadeveśa namaste bhṛgunandana ||
kave sarvārthasiddhyarthaṃ gṛhāṇārghyaṃ namo.astu te||4||
dattvaivamarghyaṃ kaunteya praṇipatya visarjayet ||5||
yāvacchukrasya na kṛtā pūjā sohālakaiḥ śubhai. ||
vaṭakaiḥ pūrikābhiśca godhūmaiścaṇakairapi ||
tāvanna dānaṃ dātavyaṃ strībhiḥ kāmārthasiddhaye ||6||
evaṃ tasyodaye kurvanyātrādiṣu ca bhārata ||
sarvasasyāgamaṃ caiva sarvānkāmānavāpnuyāt || 7 ||
tadvadvācaspateḥ pūjāṃ pravakṣyāmi yudhiṣṭhira ||
sauvarṇapātre sauvarṇamamareśapurohitam ||
pītapuṣpāṃbarayutaṃ kṛtvā snātvātha sarṣapaiḥ ||8||
pālāśāśvatthabhaṃgena pañcagavyajalena ca||
pītāṃgarāgavasanaṃ ghṛtahomaṃ tu kārayeta || 9 ||
praṇamya ca gavā sārddhaṃ brāhmaṇāya nivedayet || 4.120.10 ||
namaste.aṅgirasāṃ nātha vākpatetha bṛhaspate ||
krūragrahaiḥ pīḍitānāmamṛtāya bhavasva naḥ || 11 ||
evaṃ suraguruṃ pūjya praṇipatya kṣamāpayet ||
saṃkrātāvudaye cāste sarvānkāmānavāpnuyāt || 12 ||
atha vā mauktikānyeva suvṛttāni bṛhaṃti ca ||
bhārgavāṃgirasau ciṃtya tānyeva pratipādayet || 13 ||
bhaktyā mauktikadānena dattena kurunandana ||
virūpatā dṛśoḥ puṃsāṃ yātrāsvabhyudayeṣu ca ||
kurvanbṛhaspateḥ pūjāṃ na kadācitprajāyate || 14 ||
ye bhārgavodayamavāpya savastrapuṣpāṃ kurvaṃtyananya manaso.aṅgirase ca pūjām ||
teṣāṃ gṛhe praviśatāṃ pratiśukrajātaṃ vighnaṃ na saṃbhavati bhārata puṇyabhājām || 15 || iti śrībhaviṣye mahāpurāṇa uttaraparvaṇi śrīkṛṣṇayudhiṣṭhirasaṃvāde śukrabṛhaspatyarghapūjāvidhānaṃ nāma viṃśatyuttaraśatatamo.adhyāyaḥ || 120 || || a ||
vratapañcāśītivarṇanam
|| śrīkṛṣṇa uvāca || ||
śṛṇu bhārata vakṣyāmi pañcāśītivratāni ca ||
noktāni yāni kasyāpi munibhirdharmadarśibhiḥ || 1 ||
bhaviṣyamatsyamārtaṃḍapurāṇeṣu ca varṇitam ||
vārāhaṃ caiva saṃgṛhya kathyaṃte tāni pāṃḍava || 2 ||
yadabhīṣṭaṃ sumitrāya śiṣyāya ca sutāya ca ||
na kathyate dharmajātaṃ kiṃ tenodaravartinā || 3 ||
śrutismṛtipurāṇebhyo yanmayā hyavadhāritam ||
tatte vacmi kuruśreṣṭha kasyānyasyopadiśyate || 4 ||
snātvā prabhātasaṃdhyāyāmupagṛhya ca pippalam ||
tilapātrāṇi yo dadyānna sa śoceta tatkṛte || 5 ||
vratānāmuttamaṃ hyetatsarvapāpapraṇāśanam ||
pātravratamiti khyātaṃ nākhyātaṃ kasyacinmayā || 6 ||
suśuddhasya suvarṇasya suvarṇaṃ yaḥ prayacchati ||
puṇye.ahni viprakathite prītyā pītayugānvitam || 7 ||
vrataṃ vācaspateretadbalabuddhipradāyakam ||
vṛtraghnasya purākhyātaṃ guruṇā sarvakāmadam || 8 ||
lavaṇaṃ kaṭutiktaṃ ca jīrakaṃ maricāni ca ||
hiṃguśuṃṭhisamāyuktaṃ sarvaṃ paricayaṃ tathā || 9 ||
caturthyā mekabhaktāśī sakṛddattvā kuṭuṃbine ||
gṛheṣu saptasu sadā śilāyuktāni bhārata || 4.121.10 ||
etacchilāvrataṃ nāma lakṣmīlokapradāyakam ||
kartavyamiha yatnena mukhapāṭavakārakam || 11 ||
naktamannaṃ caritvā tu gavā sārddhaṃ kuṭuṃbine ||
haimaṃ cakraṃ triśūlaṃ ca dadyādviprāya vāsasī|| 12 ||
praṇamya bhaktyā deveśau prīyetāṃ śivakeśavau ||
etadevavrataṃ nāma mahāpātakanāśanam ||13||
kṛtvaikabhuktaṃ varṣāṃte śaktyā haimavṛṣānvitām ||
dhenuṃ tilamayīṃ dadyātsarvo paskaraṇairyutām || 14 ||
etadrudravrataṃ nāma pāpaśokapraṇāśanam ||
yaḥ karoti pumānrājansa padaṃ yāti śāṃkaram || 15 ||
sarvauṣadhyudakasnātaḥ pañcamyāṃ pūjya paṃcakam ||
saptopaskaradānaṃ ca yaḥ karoti gṛhāśramī || 16 ||
gṛhādyulūkhalaṃ śūrpaḥ śilā sthālī ca pañcamī ||
udakuṃbhaśca cullī ca eteṣāmanukiñcana|| 17 ||
etāni gṛhiṇāṃ gehe prasthāpya puruṣottamam ||
upaskaroti yā nārī na sīdati kadācana || 18 ||
etadgṛhavrataṃ nāma sarva saukhyapradāyakam||
atriṇā hyanasūyāyāḥ kathitaṃ pāṇḍunandana || 19 ||
yastu nīlotpalaṃ haimaṃ śarkarāpātrasaṃyutam ||
dadāti śraddhayopeto brāhmaṇāya kuṭuṃbine || 4.121.20 ||
sa vaiṣṇavaṃ padaṃ yāti līlāvratamidaṃ smṛtam ||
āṣāḍhādicaturmāsamabhyaṃgaṃ varjayennaraḥ || 21 ||
pārite ca punardadyāttilatailaghaṭaṃ navam ||
bhojanaṃ pāyasājyaṃ ca sa yāti bhavanaṃ hareḥ ||22||
lokaprītikaraṃ caitatprītivratamihocyate ||
varjayitvā madhau yastu dadhikṣīraghṛtaikṣavam || || 23 ||
dadyādvastrayugaṃ sūkṣmaṃ rasapātraiśca saṃyutam ||
saṃpūjya vipramithunaṃ gaurī me prīyatāmiti || 24 ||
etadgaurīvrataṃ nāma bhavānīloka dāyakam ||
puruṣo yastrayodaśyāṃ kṛtvā naktamatho punaḥ || 25 ||
saṃvatsarāṃte tasminvā divase vighnavarjitam ||
aśokakāṃcanaṃ dadyātsadvastrayugasaṃśritam || 26 ||
viprāya vasusaṃyuktaṃ pradyumnaḥ prīyatāmiti ||
kalpaṃ viṣṇupade sthitvā viśokaḥ syātpunarnṛpa || 27 ||
etatkāmavrataṃnāma sarvaśokavināśanam ||
āṣāḍhādicaturmāsaṃ varjayennakhakartanam || 28 ||
vṛṃtākabhakṣaṇaṃ caiva madhusarpirghaṭānvitam ||
kārtikyāṃ tu punarhaimaṃ brāhmaṇāya nivedayet || 29 ||
rudralokamavāpnoti śivavratamidaṃ smṛtam ||
evaṃ pañcadaśīṃ smṛtvā ekabhaktena mānavaḥ || 4.121.30 ||
saṃpūjya pūrṇimāṃ devīṃ likhitvā candanādinā ||
tataḥ pañcaghaṭānpūrṇānpayodadhighṛtena ca ||
madhunā sitakhaṇḍena brāhmaṇāyopapādayet || 31 ||
manorathānpūrayasva saṃpūrṇānpūrṇimā hyasi ||
pañcakumbhapradānena bhūtānāṃ tuṣṭirastu me ||
dvijānevaṃ namaskṛtya sarvānkāmānavāpnuyāt || 32 ||
etatpaṃcaghaṭaṃ nāma vrataṃ puṣṭipradāyakam|||
varjayedyastu puṣpāṇi hemaṃtaśiśirāvratam || 33 ||
puṣpatrayaṃ ca phālgunyāṃ kṛtvā śaktyātha kāñcanam ||
dadyādvai kālavelāyāṃ prīyetāṃ śivakeśavau || || 34 ||
śiraḥsaugandhajananaṃ sadānandakaraṃ nṛṇām ||
kṛtvā parapadaṃ yāti saugandhyavratamuttamam || 35 ||
phālgunāditṛtīyāyāṃ lavaṇaṃ yastu varjayet ||
samāpte śayanaṃ dayādgṛhe copaskarānvitam || 36 ||
saṃpūjya vipramithunaṃ bhavānī prīyatāmiti ||
gaurīloke vasetkalpaṃ saubhāgyavratamutta mam || 37 ||
saṃdhyāmaunaṃ naraḥ kṛtvā samāpte ghṛtakuṃbhadaḥ ||
vastrayugmaṃ ca ghaṃṭāṃ ca brāhmaṇāya nivedayet || 38 ||
sārasvataṃ padaṃ yāti punarāvṛtti durlabham||
etatsārasvataṃ nāma rūpavidyāpradāyakam || 39 ||
lakṣmīmadhye.atha pañcamyāmupavāsī bhavennaraḥ ||
samāpte hemakamalaṃ dadyāddhenusamanvitam || || 4.121.40 ||
sa vaiṣṇavaṃ padaṃ yāti lakṣmīḥ syājjanmajanmani ||
etallakṣmīvrataṃ nāma duḥkhaśokavināśanam ||41||
yā tu nārī pibettoyaṃ jaladhārāṃ prapātayet ||
samāptaghṛtasaṃpūrṇāṃ dadyādvadvaṃtikāṃ? navām ||42 ||
etaddhārāvrataṃ nāma sarvarogaharaṃ param||
kāṃtisaubhāgyajananaṃ sapatnīdarpanāśanam||43||
gaurīsamanvitaṃ rudraṃ lakṣmyā saha janārdanam ||
rājñīsamanvitaṃ sūryaṃ pratiṣṭhāpya yathāvidhi || 44 ||
dhūpākṣepeṇasahitāṃ sughaṃṭāṃ pātrasaṃyutām ||
yo dadāti dvijendrāṇāṃ puṣpairabhyarcya pāṃḍuraiḥ || 45 ||
dakṣiṇāsahitāṃ kṛtvā praṇamya ca visarjayet ||
etaddevavrataṃ nāma divyadehapradāyakam || 46 ||
kṛtvopalepanaṃ śaṃbhoragrataḥ keśavasya ca ||
yāvadvrataṃ samāpyaitaddhenuṃ ca sajalānvitām || 47 ||
janmāyutaṃ sa rājā syāttataḥ śivapuraṃ vaset ||
etacchrutvā vrataṃ nāma bahukalyāṇakārakam || 48 ||
aśvatthaṃ bhāskaraṃ gaṃgāṃ praṇamyaiva ca vāgyataḥ ||
ekabhuktaṃ naraḥ kuryādaṣṭa caikaṃ vimatsaraḥ || 49 |||
vratāṃte vipramithunaṃ pūjya dhenutrayānvitam ||
vṛkṣaṃ hiraṇmayaṃ dadyātsośvamedhaphalaṃ labhet || 4.121.50 ||
divi divyavimānasthaḥ sevyate.apsarasāṃ gaṇaiḥ|||
etatkīrtivrataṃ nāma bhūtikīrtiphalapradam ||51||
ghṛtena snapanaṃ kṛtvā śaṃbhorvā keśavasya ca ||
brāhmaṇo bhāskarasyāpi gauryā laṃbodarasya vā|| 52||
akṣataistu samaṃ kuryātpadmaṃ gomayamaṇḍale ||
samāpya hemakamalaṃ tiladhenusamanvitam || 53 ||
śuddhamaṣṭāṅgulaṃ dayācchivaloke mahīyate ||
sāmagāyanataścaitatsāmavratamihocyate || 54 ||
navamyāmekabhuktaṃ tu kṛtvā kanyāśca śaktitaḥ ||
bhojayitvā samādadyāddhaimakaṃcukavāsasī || 55 ||
haimaṃ ca siṃhaṃ viprāya dattvā śivapuraṃ vrajet ||
bhavārbudaṃ surūpaśca śatrubhiścāparājitaḥ || 56 ||
etadvīravrataṃ nāma nārīṇāṃ ca sukhapradam ||
yāvatsamārabhedyastu pañcadaśyāṃ payovrataḥ || 57 ||
samāpte śraddhayā dayadgāśca pañca payasvinīḥ ||
vāsāṃsi ca piśaṃgāni jalakuṃbhayutāni ca || 58 ||
sa yāti vaiṣṇavaṃ lokaṃ pitṛrṇāṃ tārayecchatam||
kalpāṃte rājarājaḥ syātpitṛvratamidaṃ smṛtam || 59 ||
tāṃbūlaṃ samaye nityaṃ gaurīputraṃ dadāti yā||
pūgacūrṇasamāyuktaṃ nārī vā puruṣo.api vā || 4.121.60 ||
varṣasyāṃte tu sauvarṇaṃ kārayitvā phalānvitam ||
muktāphalamayaṃ cūrṇatritayaṃ yā prayacchati || 61 ||
na sā prāpnoti daurbhāgyaṃ na daurgandhyaṃ mukhasya ca ||
etatpatravrataṃ nāma saugandhyajananaṃ param || 62 ||
caitrādicaturo māsāñjalaṃ kuryādayācitam ||
jyeṣṭhāṣāḍhe ca vā māsaṃ pakṣaṃ vā pāṃḍunaṃdana || 63 ||
vratāṃte maṇikaṃ dadyādannavastrasamanvitam ||
ghṛtena sahitaṃ tadvatsaptadhānyasamanvitam || 64 ||
tilapātraṃ hiraṇyaṃ ca brahmaloke mahīyate ||
kalpāṃte rājarājaḥ syādvārivratamihocyate || 65 ||
pañcāmṛtena snapanaṃ kṛtvā viṣṇoḥ śivasya ca ||
vatsarāṃte punardadyāddhenuṃ pañcāmṛtairyutām || 66 ||
viprāya kanakaṃ śaṃkhaṃ sa padaṃ yāti śāṃkaram ||
rājā bhavati kalpāṃte vṛttivratamihocyate || 67 ||
yo hiṃsāṃ varjayitvā tu māsaṃ saṃvatsaraṃ tathā ||
vratāṃte hemahariṇaṃ kṛtvā śaktyā vicakṣaṇaḥ || 68 ||
tadvatsavatsāṃ gāṃ dadyātso.aśvamedhaphalaṃ labhet ||
ahiṃsāvratamityetatsarvaśāṃtipradaṃ nṛṇām || 69 ||
māghamāsyuṣasi snānaṃ kṛtvā dāṃpatyamarcayet ||
bhojayitvā yathāśaktyā mālyavastravibhūṣaṇaiḥ || 4.121.70 ||
saubhāgyaṃ mahadāpnoti śarīrārogyamuttamam||
sūryaloke vasetkalpaṃ sūryavratamidaṃ smṛtam ||71||
āṣāḍhādicaturmāsaṃ prātaḥsnāyī bhavennaraḥ ||
viprāya bhojanaṃ dadyātkārtikyāṃ goprado bhavet || 72 ||
ghṛtakuṃbhaṃ tato dattvā sarvānkāmānavāpnuyāt ||
vaiṣṇavavratamityuktaṃ viṣṇulokamavāpnuyāt || 73 ||
ayanādayanaṃ yāvadvarjayenmadhusarpiṣī ||
tadaṃte puṇyadānāni ghṛtadhenvā sahaiva tu || 74 ||
dattvā śivapadaṃ yāti dattvā tu ghṛtapāyasam ||
etacchīlavrataṃ nāma śīlārogyaphalapradam || 75 ||
saṃdhyādīpaprado yastu māṃsaṃ tailaṃ vivarjayet ||
samāpte dīpakaṃ dadyāccakraśūle ca kāñcane || 76 ||
vastrayugmaṃ ca viprāya sa tejasvī bhaveddṛḍham ||
etaddīpavrataṃ nāma sadā kāṃtipradāyakam || 77 ||
ekabhaktena saptāhaṃ gaurīṃ vā yastu pūjayet ||
saṃpūjya pārvatīṃ bhaktyā gandhapuṣpavilepanaiḥ || 78 ||
tataḥ suvāsinībhyāṃ tu kuṃkumena vilepayet ||
puṣpairvilepayeccaināṃ karpūrāgarucandanaiḥ || 79 ||
tāṃbūlaṃ śobhanaṃ dattvā nārikelaphalaṃ tathā ||
prīyatāṃ kumudā devī praṇipatya visarjayet || 4.121.80 ||
ekaikāṃ pūjayeddevīṃ saptāhaṃ yāvadeva tu ||
punastu saptame pūrṇe tāḥ saptaiva nimaṃtrayet || 81 ||
ṣaḍrasaṃ bhojayitvā tu yathāśaktyā vibhūṣaṇaiḥ ||
bhūṣayitvā mālyavastraiḥ karṇaveṣṭāṃgulīyakaiḥ || 82 ||
kumudā mādhavī gaurī bhavānī pārvatī umā ||
kālī ca darpaṇaṃ haste pratyekaṃ vinivedayet || 83 ||
brāhmaṇaṃ pṛjayitvaikaṃ vācyaḥ saṃpamannamastu te||
saptasundarakaṃ nāma vrataṃ caitadyudhiṣṭhira || 84 ||
karoti sundaraṃ dehaṃ saubhāgyaṃ yacchate param ||
varjayeccaiva māse tu yastu gandhānulepanam || 85 ||
śuktiṃ gaṃdhabhṛtāṃ dattvā viprāya sitavāsasī ||
śaktyā ca dakṣiṇāṃ dadyātsarvānkāmānsamaśnute || 86 ||
vāruṇaṃ ca padaṃ yāti tadetadvaruṇavratam ||
vaiśākhamāse lavaṇaṃ varjayitvā yatavrataḥ || 87 ||
māsāṃte.atha tato dadyātsavatsāṃ gāṃ dvijātaye ||
sthitvā viṣṇupade kalpaṃ tato rājā bhavediha|88||
etatkāṃtivrataṃ nāma kāṃtikīrtipradāyakam ||
brahmāṇḍaṃ kāṃcanaṃ kṛtvā tiladroṇopari sthitam || 89 ||
tryahaṃ tilavratī bhūtvā vahniṃ saṃtarpayeddvijam ||
saṃpūjya vipradāṃpatyaṃ mālyavastravibhūṣaṇaiḥ || 4.121.90 ||
śaktitastripalādūrdhvaṃ viśvātmā prīyatāmiti ||
puṇye.ahni dadyātsa paraṃ brahma yātyapunarbhavam ||91||
etadbrahmavrataṃ nāma nirvāṇaphaladaṃ nṛṇām || 92 ||
yaścobhayamukhīṃ dadyātprabhūtakanakānvitām ||
dinaṃ payovrataṃ tiṣṭhetsa yāti paramaṃ padam || 93 ||
tryahaṃ payovrataḥ sthitvā kāñcanaṃ kalpapādapam ||
palādūrdhvaṃ yathā śaktyā taṃḍulaṃ rūpasaṃyutam || 94 ||
chāditaṃ varavāsobhiḥ puṣpamālāvibhūṣitam |||||
dattvā svarge vasetkalpaṃ kalpavratamidaṃ smṛtam || 95 ||
yastu vatsatarīṃ bhavyāṃ kaṇṭhābharaṇabhūṣitām ||
suparyāṇāṃ sukhaspṛṣṭāṃ khalīnālaṃkṛtā nanām || 96 ||
modakodakapātreṇa tāṃbūlena samanvitām ||
sthagitāṃ sthāpayetpṛṣṭhe śṛṃgāgreṣu himānvitām || 97 ||
īdṛgvidhāṃ vyatīpāte grahaṇe cāyanadvaye ||
ayācitena ca sthitvā tato dadyāddvijātaye || 98 ||
etadvāravrataṃ nāma mārgakhedavināśanam ||
paralokārddhagamane klāṃtiśramaharaṃ param || 99 ||
naktāśī tvaṣṭamīṣu syādvatsarāṃte.aṣṭagopradaḥ ||
pauraṃdaraṃ padaṃ yāti sugativratamucyate || 4.121.100 ||
yaścendhanaprado rājanhemaṃtaśiśira vratam ||
ghṛtadhenuṃ prayaccheta paraṃ brahma sa gacchati ||| 101||
śarīrārogyajananaṃ dyutikāṃtipradāyakam ||
vaiśvānaravrataṃ nāma sarvapāpapraṇāśanam ||102||
ekādaśyāṃ tu naktāśī yaścakraṃ vinivedayet ||
tadvacchaṃkhaṃ tu sauvarṇaṃ caitre citrāsu pāṃḍava || 103 ||
ya etatkurute bhaktyā sa viṣṇoḥ padamāpnuyāt ||
etadviṣṇuvrataṃ nāma kalpādau rājyalābhakṛt || 104 ||
payovratastu pañcamyāṃ vratāṃte goyugapradaḥ ||
lakṣmīloke vaset kalpam etad devīvrataṃ smṛtam || 105 ||
saptamyāṃ naktabhugdadyātsamāpte gāṃ payasvinīm ||
so.arkalokamavāpnoti bhānuvratamihocyate || 106 ||
caturthyāṃ naktabhugdadyādaṣṭa gā homacāraṇam ||
vrataṃ vaināyakaṃ nāma sarvavighnavināśanam || 107 ||
mahāphalāni yastyaktvā cāturmāsaṃ dvijātaye ||
haimāni kārttike dadyādgoyugena samaṃ naraḥ || 108 ||
sitaṃ vastrayugaṃ nāma saṃpūrṇādyaghaṭāni ca ||
etatphalavrataṃ nāma phalāvāptikaraṃ sadā ||1 09||
yaścopavāsī saptamyāṃ samāṃte hemapaṅkajam ||
dhenūśca śaktito dadyātsavatsāḥ kāṃsyadohanāḥ || 4.121.110 ||
bhaktyā rājendra viprāya vācakāya nivedayet ||
etatsauravrataṃ nāma sūryalokapradāyakam || 111 ||
dvādaśa dvādaśīryastu nāma prāśanasaṃyutaḥ ||
samupoṣya samāṃte tu savastrāḥ sodakā ghaṭāḥ || 112 ||
dvādaśātra pradeyāśca sarvakāmaprasiddhaye ||
govindavratamityetadgovindapadadāyakam || 113 ||
kārttikyāṃ yo vṛṣotsargaṃ kṛtvā naktaṃ samācaret ||
sa golokamavāpnoti vṛṣavratamidaṃ smṛtam || 114 ||
vratāṃte gauḥ pradātavyā bhojanaṃ śaktitaḥ param ||
viprāṇāmatra kathitaṃ prājāpatyamidaṃ vratam|| 115 ||
caturdaśyāṃ tu naktāśī samāṃte goyugapradaḥ ||
śaivaṃ padamavāpnoti jñeyaṃ ca tryaṃbakavratam || 116 ||
saptarātroṣito dadyādghṛtakuṃbhaṃ dvijātaye ||
brahmavratamidaṃ prāhurbrahmalokapradāyakam || 117 ||
māsāṃte ca sa gāṃ dadyāddhenumaṃte payasvinīm ||
śakraloke vasetkalpaṃ śakravratamidaṃ smṛtam || 118 |||
kārttikasya site pakṣe caturdaśyāṃ narādhipa ||
sopavāsaḥ pañcagavyaṃ pibedrātrau vicakṣaṇaḥ || 119 ||
kapilāyāstu gomūtraṃ kṛṣṇāyā gomayaṃ tathā ||
sitadhenvāstathā kṣīraṃ raktāyāstu tathā dadhi || 4.121.120 ||
gṛhītvā karburāyāstu ghṛtamekatra melayet ||
vedoktamantrai rājendra kuśodakasamanvitam || ||121||
tataḥ prabhātasamaye snātvā saṃtarpya devatāḥ||
brāhmaṇānvācayitvā tu bhuñjīyādvāgyataḥ śuciḥ||122||
brahmakūrcavrataṃ hyetatsarvapāpapraṇāśanam ||
yadbālye yacca kaumāre vārdhakye cāpi yatkṛtam ||
brahmakūrcopavāsena tatsarvaṃ naśyati kṣaṇāt ||123||
anagnipakvamaśnāti tṛtīyāyāṃ tu yo naraḥ ||
gāṃ dattvā śivamabhyeti punarāvṛttivarjitam || 124 ||
etaddṛṣivrataṃ nāma sarvamāṅgalyakārakam ||
haimaṃ paladvayādūrdhvaṃ rathamaśvayugānvitam || 125||
tilaprasthopari gataṃ sitamālyayugānvitam ||
dattvā kṛtopavāsastu divi kalpaśataṃ vaset||
tadaṃte rājarājaḥ syādagnivratamidaṃ smṛtam || || 126 ||
kṛtvā paladvayādūrdhvaṃ śayyābhyāṃ saṃyutaṃ naraḥ ||
haimaṃ rathavaraṃ śreṣṭhaṃ sarvopaskarasaṃyutam || 127 ||
satyaloke vasetkalpaṃ sahasramatha bhūpatiḥ ||
bhavedupoṣito dattvā karivratamidaṃ śubham || 128 ||
mukhavāsaṃ parityajya samāṃte goprado bhavet ||
yakṣādhipaṃ samāpnoti sumukha vratamucyate || 129 ||
niśi kṛtvā jale vāsaṃ prabhāte goprado bhavet ||
ruṇaṃ lokamāpnoti varuṇavratamucyate || 4.121.130 ||
cāndrāyaṇaṃ ca yaḥ kuryāddhaimaṃ candraṃ nivedayet ||
candravratamidaṃ proktaṃ candralokapradāyakam || 131 ||
jyeṣṭhe pañcatapāḥ sāyaṃ hemadhenuprado divam ||
athāṣṭamīcaturdaśyau rudravratamidaṃ smṛtam || 132 ||
anulepanaṃ yaḥ kuryāttṛtīyāyāṃ śivālaye ||
sa svargaṃ dhenudo yāti bhavānī vratamucyate || 133 ||
māghe niśyārdravāsāḥ syātsaptamyāṃ goprado bhaveta ||
divi kalpaṃ vasitveha rājā syāttāpanaṃ vratam || 134 ||
dattvā kṛtopavāsastu divi kalpaśataṃ vaset ||
tadaṃte rājarājaḥ syādaśvavratamidaṃ smṛtam ||135||
tadvatkalpadvayādūrdhvaṃ karibhyāṃ saṃyutaṃ naraḥ ||
haimaṃ rathaṃ naraśreṣṭha sarvopaskaraṇānvitam || 136 ||
trirātropoṣito dadyātphālgunyāṃ bhavanaṃ śubham ||
ādityalokamāpnoti pūjitaḥ sa surāsuraiḥ || 137 ||
suralokamavāpnoti dhāma vratasamanvitam ||
trisaṃdhyaṃ pūjya dāṃpatyamupavāsī vibhūṣaṇaiḥ || 138 ||
paurṇamāsyāmavāpnoti mokṣaminduvratādiha||139||
dattvā sitadvitīyāyāmiṃdorlavaṇabhojanam ||
kāṃsyaṃ savastraṃ rājendra dakṣiṇāsahitaṃ tathā || 4.121.140 ||
samāṃte goprado yāti viprāya śivamaṃdiram ||
kalpāṃte rājarājaḥ syātsomavratamidaṃ smṛtam || 141 ||
pratipadyekabhaktāśī samāṃte kapilāpradaḥ ||
vaiśvānarapuraṃ yāti āgneyavratamucyate ||142||
ekādaśyāṃ māghamāse caturdaśyaṣṭamīṣu ca ||
ekabhaktena yo dadyādbālakānyajināni ca || 143 ||
upānahau kaṃbalāṃśca caitre chatrādikaṃ tataḥ ||
karapatrādikaṃ cāpi yathā śaktyā vicakṣaṇaḥ || 144 ||
brāhmaṇānāṃ mahārāja so.aśvamedhaphalaṃ labhet ||
etatsaukhyavrataṃ nāma sarvasaukhyapradāyakam || || 145 ||
daśamyāmekabhaktāśī samāṃte daśadhenudaḥ ||
diśaśca kāñcanīrdadyānnārīrūpā yudhiṣṭhira ||146||
tiladroṇoparigato brahmāṃḍādhipatirbhavet||
etadviśvavrataṃ nāma mahāpātakanāśanam || 147 ||
saṃpūjya sitasaptamyāṃ bhānudhānyāni sapta yaḥ ||
dadāti naktabhugrāja~mllavaṇena samaṃ dvije || 148 ||
sa tārayati saptāṣṭau kulānyātmānameva ca ||
etaddhānyavrataṃ nāma dhanadhānyapradāyakam || 149 ||
māsopavāsī yo dadyāddhenuṃ viprāya śobhanām ||
sa vaiṣṇavaṃ padaṃ yāti bhīmavratamidaṃ smṛtam || 4.121.150 ||
pakṣopavāsī yo dadyādviprāya kapilādvayam ||
sa brahmalokamāpnoti pūjitaḥ surasattamaiḥ || || 151 ||
dadyāttriṃśatpalādūrdhvaṃ mahīṃ kṛtvā tu kāṃcanīm ||
kulācalādrisahitāṃ tilavastrasamanvitām || 152 ||
tiladroṇopari gatāṃ brāhmaṇāya kuṭuṃbine ||
dinaṃ payovratastiṣṭhedrudraloke mahīyate || 153 ||
etanmahīvrataṃ proktaṃ saptakalpānuvartakam ||
māghamāse.atha caitre vā guḍadhenuprado bhavet || || 154 ||
guḍavratastṛtīyāyāṃ sarvopaskaraṇairyutaḥ ||
gaurīlokamavāpnoti pūjyate.apsarasāṃ gaṇaiḥ || 155 ||
umāvratamidaṃ proktaṃ satatānandadāyakam||
vatsaraṃ tvekabhaktāśī sabhakṣyajalakuṃbhadaḥ || 156 ||
śivaloke vasetkalpaṃ prāptivratamidaṃ smṛtam ||
kārttikāditṛtīyāyāṃ prāśya gomūtrayāvakam || || 157 ||
gaurīloke vasetkalpaṃ tato rājā bhavediha ||
etadrudravrataṃ nāma mahākalyāṇakārakam || 158 ||
caitrī trirātraṃ naktāśī nadyāṃ snātvā dadāti yaḥ ||
ajāḥ payasvinīḥ pañca brāhmaṇāya kuṭuṃbine || 159 ||
na jāyate punarasau jīvaloke kadācana ||
etadbastavrataṃ proktaṃ sarvavyādhivināśanam || 4.121.160 ||
kanyādānaṃ tu yaḥ kuryādudvāhaṃ kārayecca yaḥ ||
ekaviṃśatikulopeto brahmalokaṃ sa gacchati || 161 ||
kanyādānātparaṃ dānaṃ na cāstyabhyadhikaṃ kvacit ||
ye kariṣyaṃti nṛpate teṣāṃ loko.akṣayo divi || 162 ||
tilapiṣṭamayaṃ kṛtvā gajaṃ hemavibhūṣitam ||
kuryātkuśamayaṃ tadvadārohakasamanvitam || 163 ||
nakṣatramālāsahitaṃ cāmarāpīḍadhāriṇam ||
daśanāprabaddhanetraraktavastrayugānvitam || 164 ||
tāmrapātryāṃ kuṇḍakaṃ vā kṛtaṃ dattvāgramodakam ||
pradadyāddvijadāṃpatyaṃ pūjya mālyavibhūṣaṇaiḥ || 165 ||
kaṃṭhapramāṇamāviśya jalaṃ malavivarjitaḥ ||
kāṃtārakāriṇā hyetatkathitaṃ tu yudhiṣṭhira || 166 ||
kāṃtārakāridurgeṣu vārayatyapi duṣkṛtīn||
iha loke pare caiva nātra kāryā vicāraṇā || 167 ||
ye kurvaṃti dine puṇye vrataṃ pauraṃdaraṃ narāḥ ||
teṣāṃ pauraṃdaro loko bhavedābhūtasaṃplavam || 168 ||
payovratastu pañcamyāṃ dattvā nāgaṃ dvijātaye ||
sauvarṇaṃ sarpajanitaṃ bhayaṃ tebhyo na jāyate || 169 ||
sitāṣṭamyāṃ sopavāso vṛṣabhaṃ yaḥ prayacchati ||
sitavastrasamācchannaṃ ghaṇṭābharaṇabhūṣitam || 4.121.170 ||
śivaloke vasetkalpaṃ tato rājā bhavediha ||
vṛṣavratamidaṃ proktaṃ sarvadharmapradāyakam ||171||
uttare tvayane prāpte ghṛtaprasthena yo harim ||
snāpayitvā brāhmaṇāya vaḍavāṃ yaḥ prayacchati||172||
sa sarvakāmasaṃyuktaḥ putrabhrātṛsamanvitaḥ||
sūryaloke vasedrājanrājñīvratamihocyate ||173||
sakṛnnavamyāṃ bhaktena pūjayedvindhyavāsinīm||
puṣpardhūpaistato dadyātpañjaraṃ śukaśobhitam ||174||
haimaṃ viprāya śāṃtāya sa vāgmī jāyate naraḥ ||
etadāgneyamityuktaṃ vratamagnipadapradam || 175 ||
dvādaśyāṃ guhyakānāṃ ca palalaikṣavasaṃyutam ||
viprāya bhojanaṃ dattvā yaḥ sa yāti hareḥ padam || 176 ||
viṣkambhādiṣu yogeṣu ekamuktarato naraḥ ||
etadāgneyamityuktaṃ vratamagnipadapradam || 177 ||
yo dadāti kramādeṣu ghṛtatailaphalaikṣavam ||
yavagodhūmacaṇakānniṣpāvāñchālitaṃḍulān || 178 ||
lavaṇaṃ dadhi dugdhaṃ ca vastraṃ kanakameva ca ||
kaṃbalaṃ gāṃ vṛṣaṃ chatramupānadyugalaṃ tathā || 179 ||
karpūraṃ kuṃkumaṃ caiva caṃdanaṃ kusumāni ca ||
lohaṃ kanaka tāmraṃ ca raupyaṃ ceti yudhiṣṭhira || 4.121.180 ||
snātaḥ svaśaktyā vidhivatsarvapāpaiḥ pramucyate ||
na viyogamavāpnoti yogavratamidaṃ smṛtam || 181 ||
kārtikyāṃ naktabhugdadyānmeṣaṃ mārgaśire vṛṣam ||
pauṣamāghādimāseṣu sauvarṇīḥ sarva eva hi||182||
krameṇa rāśayaḥ sarvā vastramālyairvibhūṣitāḥ||
paurṇamāsyāṃ paurṇamāsyāṃ kauṃteya bahudakṣiṇām || 183 ||
etadrāśivrataṃ nāma sarvopadravanāśanam ||
sarvāśāpūrakaṃ tadvatsomalokapradāyakam || 184 ||
pañcāśītirvratānāṃ te kathitā pāṃḍunaṃdana ||
yāṃ śrutvā brahmahā goghnaḥ pitṛhā mātṛhā tathā || 185 ||
mucyate tatkṣaṇādeva pātakaiḥ sopapātakaiḥ || 186 ||
paṃcādhikā tava mayā kathitā vratānāṃ rājannaśītiratisaukhyadhanapradānām||
etāṃ samācarati yaḥ śṛṇuyātpaṭhedvā hastāgra lagna iva tasya sureśalokaḥ || 187 || ||
iti śrībhaviṣye mahāpurāṇa uttaraparvaṇi śrīkṛṣṇayudhiṣṭhirasaṃvāde vratapañcāśītivarṇanaṃ nāmaikaviṃśatyuttaraśatatamo.adhyāyaḥ || 121 || || cha ||
māghasnānavidhivarṇanam
|| śrīkṛṣṇa uvāca || ||
kṛtaṃ brahmayugaṃ proktaṃ tretā tu kṣatriyaṃ yugam ||
vaiśyaṃ dvāparamityāhuḥ śūdraṃ kaliyugaṃ smṛtam || 1 ||
kalau rājanmanuṣyāṇāṃ śaithilyaṃ snānakarmaṇi ||
tathāpi māghavyājena kathayiṣyāmi te śṛṇu || 2 ||
yasya hastau ca pādau ca vāṅmanastu susaṃyatam ||
vidyā tapaśca kīrtiśca sa tīrthaphalamaśnute || 3 ||
aśraddadhānaḥ pāpātmā nāstiko.acchinnasaṃśayaḥ ||
hetuniṣṭhāśca pañcaite na tīrthaphalabhāginaḥ ||4||
prayāgaṃ puṣkaraṃ prāpya kurukṣetramathāpi vā ||
yatra vā tatra vā snāyānmāghe nityamiti śrutiḥ||5||
trirātraphaladā nadyo yāḥ kāścidasamudragāḥ ||
samudragāstu pakṣasya māsasya saritāṃ patiḥ ||6||
uṣaḥsamīpe yaḥ snānaṃ saṃdhyāyāmudite ravau ||
prājāpatyena tattulyaṃ mahāpātakanāśanam || 7 ||
prātarutthāya yo vipraḥ prātaḥsnāyī sadā bhavet ||
sa sarvapāpanirmuktaḥ paraṃ brahmādhigacchati || 8 ||
vṛthā coṣṇodakasnānaṃ vṛthā jāpyamavaidikam ||
aśrotriye vṛthā śrāddhaṃ vṛthā bhuktamasākṣikam || 9 ||
snānaṃ caturvidhaṃ proktaṃ snānavidbhiryudhiṣṭhira ||
vāyavyaṃ vāruṇaṃ brāhmaṃ divyaṃ ceti pṛthakśṛṇu | 4.122.10 |||
vāyavyaṃ gorajaḥ snānaṃ vāruṇaṃ sāgarādiṣu||
brāhmaṃ brāhmaṇamaṃtroktaṃ divyaṃ meghāṃbubhāskaram||
sarveṣāmeva snānāṃ viśiṣṭaṃ tatra vāruṇam||11||
brahmacārī gṛhasthaśca vānaprastho.atha bhikṣukaḥ||
ete sarve praśaṃsaṃti sarvadā māghamajjanam||12||
bālāstaruṇakā vṛddhā naranārīnapuṃsakāḥ||
snātvā māghe śubhe tīrthe prāpnuvaṃtīpsitaṃ phalam||13||
brahmakṣatraviśāṃ caiva mantravatsnānamiṣyate ||
tūṣṇīmeva hi śūdrasya strīṇāṃ ca kurunaṃdana || 14 ||
māghamāse raṭaṃtyāpaḥ kiñcidabhyudite ravau ||
brahmaghraṃ vā surāpaṃ vā kaṃpaṃ taṃtaṃ punīmahe || 15 ||
prāsādā yatra sauvarṇāḥ striyaścāpsarasopamāḥ ||
dadhikulyavahā yatra nadyaḥ pāyasakardamāḥ ||
tatra te yāṃti majjaṃti ye māghe bhāskarodaye ||16||
yativatpathi gaccheta maunī paiśunyavarjitaḥ || yadīcchedvipulānbhogāṃścandrasūryopamāngṛhān || 1 7||
pauṣaphālgunayormadhye prātaḥsnāyī bhavennaraḥ ||
paurṇamāsyā hyamāvāsyāḥ prārabhya snānamācaret || 18 ||
triṃśaddināni puṇyāṇi makarasthe divākare ||
tatra utthāya niyamaṃ gṛhṇīyādvidhipūrvakam || 19 ||
māghamāsamimaṃ pūrṇaṃ sthāpyehaṃ devamādhavam ||
tīrthaṃ śītajale nityamiti saṃkalpya cetasā || 4.122.20 ||
aprāvṛtaśarīrastu yaḥ kaṣṭaṃ snānamācaret||
padepade.aśvamedhasya phalaṃ prāptoti mā navaḥ ||21 ||
tatra snātvā śubhe tīrthe dattvā śirasi vai mṛdam ||
vedoktavidhinā rājansūryasyārghaṃ nivedayet || 22 ||
pitṛrnsaṃtarpya tatrastho hyavatīrya tato jalāt ||
iṣṭadevaṃ namaskṛtya pūjayetpuruṣottamam ||23 ||
śaṅkhacakradharaṃ devaṃ mādhavaṃ nāma pūjayet ||
vahniṃ hutvā vidhānena tatastvekāśano bhavet|| || 24 ||
bhūśayyābrahmacaryeṇa śaktaḥ snānaṃ samācaret ||
aśaktasya dhanāḍhyasya svecchā sā tatra kathyate || 25 ||
avaśyamapi kartavyaṃ māghe snānamiti śrutiḥ ||
īśvareṇa yathākāmaṃ balaṃ dharmo.anuvartate || 26 ||
tilasnāyī tilodvartī tilabhoktā tilodakī ||
tilahotā ca dātā ca ṣaṭtilo nāvasīdati ||27||
tailasyāmalakānāṃ ca tīrthe deyāni nityaśaḥ ||
tathā prajvālayedvahniṃ nivātārthaṃ dvijanmanām ||28||
evaṃ snānāvasāne tu bhojyaṃ deyamavāritam ||
bhojayeddvijadāṃpatyaṃ bhūṣayedvastrabhūṣaṇaiḥ || 29 ||
kaṃbalājinaratnāni vāsāṃsi vividhāni ca ||
colakāni ca divyāni pracchādanapaṭīstathā || || 4.122.30 ||
upānahau tathā guptaṃ modakaiḥ pāpamocakaiḥ ||
anena vidhinā dadyānmādhavaḥ prīyatāmiti || 31 ||
agamyāgamanasteyapāpebhyaśca parigrahāt ||
rahasyācaritādvāpi mucyate snānamācaret || 32 ||
pitṛbhiḥ pitāmahaiḥ sārddhaṃ tathaiva prapitāmahaiḥ ||
mātāmātāmahaiḥ sārddhaṃ vṛddhamātāmahaistathā || 33 ||
ekaviṃśakulaiḥ sārddhaṃ bhogānbhuktvā yathepsitān ||
māghamāsyuṣasi snātvā viṣṇulokaṃ sa gacchati || 34 ||
yo māghamāsyuṣasi sūryyakarābhitāmre snānaṃ samācarati cārunadīpravāhe ||
uddhṛtya saptapuruṣānpitṛmātṛtaśca svargaṃ prayātyamaladehadharo naro.asau || 35 || ||
iti śrībhaviṣye mahāpurāṇa uttaraparvaṇi śrīkṛṣṇayudhiṣṭhirasaṃvāde māghasnānavidhivarṇanaṃ nāma dvāviṃśatyuttaraśatatamo.adhyāyaḥ || 122 || cha ||

nityasnānavidhivarṇanam
|| śrīkṛṣṇa uvāca || ||
nairmalyaṃ bhāvaśuddhiśca vinā snānaṃ na yujyate ||
tasmātkāyaviśuddhyarthaṃ snānamādau vidhīyate || 1 ||
anuddhatairuddhatairvā jalaiḥ snānaṃ samācaret ||
tīrthaṃ prakalpayedvidvānmūlamaṃtreṇa maṃtravit || 2 ||
namo nārāyaṇāyeti mūlamantra udāhṛtaḥ ||
darbhapāṇistu vidhinā svācāntaḥ prayataḥ sudhīḥ || 3 ||
caturhastasamāyuktaṃ caturasraṃ samaṃtataḥ ||
prakalpyāvāhayedgaṅgāmebhirmaṃtrairvicakṣaṇaḥ || 4 ||
oṃ viṣṇupādaprasūtāsi vaiṣṇavī viṣṇudevatā||
pāhi nastvenasastasmādājanmamaraṇāṃtikāt || 5 ||
tisraḥ koṭyo.arddhakoṭī ca tīrthānāṃ vāyurabravīt ||
divi bhuvyaṃtarikṣe ca tāni te santi jāhnavi || 6 ||
naṃdinītyeva te nāma deveṣu nalinīti ca ||
kṣamā pṛthvī ca vihagā viśvakāyā śivā smṛtā || 7 ||
vidyādharā suprasannā tathā loka prasādinī ||
kṣemyā tathā jāhnavī ca śāṃtā śāṃtipradāyinī || 8 ||
etāni puṇyanāmāni snānakāle prakīrtayet ||
bhavetsaṃnihitā tatra gaṅgā tripathagāminī || 9 ||
saptavārābhijaptena karasaṃpuṭayojitam ||
snānaṃ kuryānmṛdā tadvadā maṃtrya ca vidhānataḥ || 11 ||
aśvakrāṃte rathakrāṃte viṣṇukrāṃte vasuṃdhare ||
mṛttike hara me sarvaṃ yanmayā duṣkṛtaṃ kṛtam || 12 ||
uddhṛtāsi varāheṇa kṛṣṇena śatabāhunā ||
namaste sarvalokānāmasudhāriṇi suvrate || 13 ||
evaṃ snātvā tataḥ paścādācamya ca vidhānataḥ ||
utthāya vāsasī śukle sūkṣme tu paridhāya vai || 14 ||
tatastu tarpaṇaṃ kuryāttrailokyāpyāyanāya tu ||
devā yakṣāstathā nāgā gandharvāpsarasāṃ gaṇāḥ ||
krūrāḥ sarvāḥ suparṇāśca tarakṣā vihagāḥ khagāḥ || 15 || ||
vidyādharā jaladharāstathaivākāśagāminaḥ ||
nirādhārāśca ye jīvāḥ pāpakarmaratāśca ye || 16 ||
teṣāmāpyāyanāyaitaddīyate salilaṃ mayā ||
kṛtopavīto devebhyo nivītī ca bhavettataḥ || 17 ||
manuṣyāṃstarpayedbhaktyā brahmaputrānṛṣīṃstathā ||
sanakaśca sanandaśca tṛtīyaśca sanātanaḥ || ||| 18 ||
kapilaścāsuriścaiva voḍhuḥ pañcaśikhastathā ||
sarve te tṛptimāyāṃtu maddattenāṃbunā sadā || 19 ||
marīcimatryaṅgirasau pulastyaṃ pulahaṃ kratum ||
pracetasaṃ vaśiṣṭhaṃ ca bhṛguṃ nāradameva ca || 4.123.20 ||
devabrahmaṛṣīnsarvāṃstarpayetākṣatodakaiḥ ||
apasavyaṃ tataḥ kṛtvā savyaṃ jānu ca bhūtale || 21 ||
agniṣvāttā barhiṣado haviṣmaṃtastathoṣmapāḥ ||
sukalitāstathā bhaumā ājyapāḥ somapāstathā || 22 ||
tarpayecca pitṛrnbhaktyā satilodakacandanaiḥ ||
darbhapāṇistu vidhivattarpayennāmagotrataḥ || 23 ||
pitrādīnnāmagotreṇa tathā mātāmahānapi ||
saṃtarpya vidhivadbhaktyā imaṃ maṃtramudīrayet || 24 |||
ye.abāndhavā bāndhavā vā ye.anyajanmani bāndhavāḥ ||
te tṛptimakhilā yāṃtu yaścāsmatto.abhivāñchati ||25||
tataścācamya vidhivadālikhetpadmamagrataḥ||
akṣataiḥ saha puṣpañca satilāruṇacandanaiḥ || 26 ||
arghaṃ dadyātprayatnena sūryanāmānukīrtanaiḥ ||
namaste viśvarūpāya namo viṣṇusakhāya vai |||27 || |
sahasraraśmaye nityaṃ namaste sarvatejase ||
namaste sarvavapuṣe namaste sarvaśaktaye || 28 ||
jagatsvāminnamaste.astu divyacaṃdanabhūṣita ||
padmanābha namaste.astu kuṇḍalāṃgadadhāriṇe || 29 ||
namaste sarvalokeśa sarvāsuranamaskṛta ||
sukṛtaṃ duṣkṛtaṃ caiva samyagjānāsi sarvadā || 4.123.30 ||
satyadeva namastestu sarvadeva namo.astu te ||
divākara namaste.astu trayīmaya namo.astu te || 31 ||
evaṃ sūryaṃ namaskṛtya triḥkṛtvā ca pradakṣiṇām ||
dvijaṃ gāṃ kāñcanaṃ spṛṣṭvā tato viṣṇugṛhaṃ vrajet || 32 ||
snānaṃ khalu pratidinaṃ kathitaṃ munīndraiḥ pāpāpahaṃ malaharaṃ sukhadaṃ sadaiva || tasmānnadīṣvatha gṛheṣvatha vā taḍāge kartavyametadiha dharmadhiyā nareṇa || 33 ||
iti śrībhaviṣye mahāpurāṇa uttaraparvaṇi śrīkṛṣṇayudhiṣṭhirasaṃvāde nityasnānavidhivarṇanaṃ nāma trayorviśatyuttaraśatatamo.adhyāyaḥ || 123 || cha ||
rudrasnānavidhivarṇanam
|| yudhiṣṭhira uvāca || ||
rudrasnānavidhānaṃ me kathayasva janārdana ||
sarvaduṣṭopaśamanaṃ sarvaśāṃtipradaṃ nṛṇām || 1 ||
|| śrīkṛṣṇa uvāca || ||
devasenāpatiṃ skandaṃ rudraputraṃ durāsadam ||
agastyo muniśārdūlaḥ sukhāsīnamuvāca ha || 2 ||
sarvajño.asi kumāra tvaṃ prasādācchaṅkarasya vai ||
snānaṃ rudravidhānena brūhi kasya kathaṃ bhavet || 3 ||
|| rudra uvāca || ||
mṛtaprajā tu yā nārī durbhagā sutavarjitā ||
yā sute duhitāṃ vaṃdhyā snānamāsāṃ vidhīyate || 4 ||
aṣṭamyāṃ vā caturdaśyāmupavāsaparāyaṇā ||
ṛtau śuddhe caturthehni prāpte sūryadine.atha vā || 5 ||
nadyostu saṅgame kuryānmahānadyorviśeṣataḥ ||
śivālaye.atha vā goṣṭhe vivikte vā gṛhāṅgaṇe || 6 ||
āhitāgniṃ dvijaṃ śāṃtaṃ dharmajñaṃ satyaśīlinam ||
snānārthaṃ prārthayeddevaṃ nipuṇaṃ raudrakarmaṇi || 7 ||
tatastu maṃḍapaṃ kuryāccaturasramudaggatam ||
baddhacandanamālaṃ tu gomaye nopalepitam || 8 ||
tanmadhye śvetarajasā saṃpūrṇaṃ padmamālikhet ||
madhye tasya mahādevaṃ sthāpayetkarṇikopari || 9 ||
dadyāddaleṣu śaktyādīṃścaturthavidhipūrvakam ||
indrādilokapālāṃśca daleṣvanyeṣu vinyaset || 4.124.10 ||
devīṃ vināyakaṃ caiva sthāpayettasya pārśvataḥ ||
dattvārghaṃ gandhapuṣpaṃ ca dhūpadīpaṃ guḍaudanam || 11 ||
bhakṣyānnānāvidhāndadyātphalāni vividhāni ca ||
catuṣkoṇeṣu bhṛṃgāramaśvatthadalabhūṣitam || 12 ||
ekaikaṃ vinyasedbrahmansarvauṣadhisamanvitam ||
caturdiśaṃ maṃḍapasya dadyādbhūtabaliṃ tataḥ || 13 ||
āgneyyāṃ diśi kartavyaṃ maṃḍapasya samīpataḥ ||
agnikāryaṃ śubhe kuṇḍe puṣpapatrairalaṃkṛte || 14 ||
lavaṇaṃ sarṣapairyuktaṃ ghṛtena madhunā saha ||
mānastokena juhuyātkṛtahome navagrahe ||15||
dvitīyamagnikāryasya kartāraṃ brāhmaṇaṃ kuru ||
rudrajāpakamācāryaṃ sitacandanacarcitam || 16 ||
sitavastraparīdhānaṃ sitamālādharaṃ śubham ||
śobhitaṃ kaṃkaṇaiḥ kaṃṭhyaiḥ karṇaveṣṭāṃgulīyakaiḥ || 17 ||
maṃḍala sya samīpastho japedrudrānvimatsaraḥ ||
yāvadekādaśa gatāḥ punareva japettu tān || 18 ||
devamaṃḍalavatkāryaṃ dvitīyaṃ maṃḍalaṃ śubham ||
tasya madhye tu sā nārī śvetapuṣpairalaṃkṛtā|| 19||
śvetavastraiśca saṃchannā śvetagaṃdhānulepitā||
sukhāsanopaviṣṭāyāmācāryo rudraciṃtakaḥ||4.124.20||
abhiṣiṃcettataścaiva nāmarkapatrapuṭāṃbunā ||
catuḥṣaṣṭividhenaiva rudreṇaikādaśena tu || 21 ||
śatāni saptaparṇānāṃ caturbhiradhikāni tu ||
acchidrāṇāṃ manūnāṃ ca snānārthaṃ viniyojayet || 22 || aśvasthānādgajasthānādvalmīkātsaṃgamādhradāt ||
veśyāgaṇādrājagṛhādgoṣṭhādānīya vai mṛdaḥ || 23 ||
sarvauṣadhiṃ rocanāṃ ca nadītīrthodakāni ca ||
etānsaṃkṣipya kalaśe śivasaṃjñe supūjite || 24 ||
āpādatalakeśaṃ ca kukṣī caiva viśeṣataḥ ||
sarvāṃgaṃ lepayennāryāḥ suśīlā kācidaṅganā || 25 ||
rudrābhijaptena tataḥ snāpayetkalaśena tām ||
toyapūrṇāṣṭakalaśairaśvatthadalapūritaiḥ || 26 ||
sarvatodiksthitaiḥ paścātsnāpayetsaphalākṣataiḥ ||
evaṃ snātā snāpakāya dadyādgāṃ kāṃcanaṃ tathā || 27 ||
heturapyatra nirdiṣṭā dakṣiṇā gauḥ payasvinī ||
brāhmaṇānāmathānyeṣāṃ svaśaktyā pāṃḍunaṃdana || 28 ||
govatsakāñcanādīni dattvā sarvaṃ kṣamāpayet ||
kṛtenānena rājendra rudrasnānena bhāminī || 29 ||
subhagā sukhasaṃyuktā bahuputrā ca jāyate ||
sarveṣvapi hi māseṣu brāhmaṇābhimate śubham || 4.124.30 ||
tasmādavaśyaṃ kartavyaṃ putraśrīsukhamicchatā || 31 ||
yā snānamācarati rudramiti prasiddhaṃ śraddhānvitā dvijavarānumatā.a.anatāṅgī || doṣānnihatya sakalānsvaśarīrabhāgādbhartuḥ priyā bhavati bhārata jīvavatsā || 32 ||
iti śrībhaviṣye mahāpurāṇa uttaraparvaṇi śrīkṛṣṇayudhiṣṭhirasaṃvāde rudrasnānavidhivarṇanaṃ nāma caturviṃśatyuttaraśatatamo.adhyāyaḥ || 124 || ||
candrādityagrahaṇasnānavidhivarṇanam
|| yudhiṣṭhira uvāca || ||
candrādityoparāgeṣu yatsnānamabhidhīyate ||
tadahaṃ śrotumicchāmi dravyamannaṃ pradhānataḥ || 1 ||
|| śrīkṛṣṇa uvāca || ||
yasya rāśiṃ samāsādya bhavedgrahaṇasaṃplavaḥ ||
tasya snānaṃ pravakṣyāmi maṃtrauṣadhisamanvitam || 2 ||
candroparāgaṃ saṃprāpya kṛtvā brāhmaṇavācanam||
saṃpūjya caturo viprāngandhamālyānulepanaiḥ || 3 ||
pūrvamevoparāgasya samānīyauṣadhādikam ||
sthāpayeccaturaḥ kumbhānagrataḥ sāgarāniti || 4 ||gajāśvarathyāvalmīkasaṅgamāddhradagokulāt ||
rājadvārapradeśāttu mṛdamānīya prakṣipet || 5 ||
paṃcagavyaṃ ca kuṃbheṣu paṃcaratnāni caiva hi ||
rocanā padmaśaṃkhau ca pañcabhaṅgasamanvitau || 6 ||
sphaṭikaṃ candanaṃ śvetaṃ tīrthavārisasarṣapam ||
gajadaṃtaṃ kuṃkumaṃ ca tathaivośīraguggulam ||
etatsarvaṃ vinikṣipya kumbheṣvāvāhayetsurān || 7 ||
sarve samudrāḥ saritastīrthāni jaladā hradāḥ ||
āyāṃtu yajamānasya duritakṣayakārakāḥ || 8 ||
yo.asau vajradharo deva ādityānāṃ prabhurmataḥ ||
sahasranayanaścendraḥ pīḍāṃ me.atra vyapohatu || 9 ||
rakṣogaṇādhipaḥ sākṣātpralayānilasaprabhaḥ ||
khaḍgavyagro.ati bhīmaśca rakṣaḥpīḍāṃ vyapohatu || 4.125.10 ||
yo.asau bindukaro binduḥ pinākī vṛṣavāhanaḥ ||
candroparāgapāpāni sa nāśayatu śaṅkaraḥ || 11 ||
trailokye yāni bhūtāni sthāvarāṇi carāṇi ca ||
brahmārkaviṣṇuyuktāni tāni pāpaṃ dahaṃtu vai || 12 ||
evamāmaṃtritaiḥ kumbhairaṃbhoyuktairyugānvitaiḥ ||
ṛgyajuḥ sāmamaṃtraiśca śuklamālyānulepanaiḥ ||
pūjayedvastragodānairbrāhmaṇāniṣṭadevatāḥ || 13 ||
etāneva tato maṃtrānsaṃlikhya kanakānvitān |
yajamānasya śirasi uddhāryāste narottama || 14 ||
kalaśāndravyasaṃyuktānprāpte grahaṇaparvaṇi ||
candragrahe nivṛtte tu kṛtagodānamaṅgalaḥ | || 15 ||
kṛtasnānaḥ śvetapaṭṭaṃ brāhmaṇāya nivedayet ||
anena vidhinā yastu sagrahaṃ snānamācaret || 16 ||
na tasya grahapīḍā syānna ca baṃdhujanakṣayaḥ ||
paramāṃ siddhimāpnoti punarāvṛttidurlabhām || 17 ||
sūryagrahe sūryanāma sadā maṃtreṣu kīrtayet ||
dravyaistaireva kathitaṃ snānaṃ kurukulodvaha || 18
ya idaṃ śṛṇuyānnityaṃ śrāvayedvāpi mānavaḥ ||
sarvapāpavinirmuktaḥ śakraloke mahīyate || 19 ||
candragrahe nṛpa ravigrahaṇe japanmāṃ maṃtrairimaiḥ samabhimaṃtrya śubhodakuṃbhāt ||
snānaṃ karoti niyamena naraśca yaśca pīḍā na taṃ grahakṛtā ca punardunoti || 4.125.20 || iti śrībhaviṣye mahāpurāṇa uttaraparvaṇi śrīkṛṣṇayudhiṣṭhirasaṃvāde candrādityagrahaṇasnāna vidhivarṇanaṃ nāma paṃcaviṃśatyuttaraśatatamo.adhyāyaḥ || 125 || ||
sāṃbharāyaṇīvratavarṇanam
|| yudhiṣṭhira uvāca || ||
gṛhastho maraṇe prāpte kathaṃ tyajati jīvitam||
etanme brūhi govinda paraṃ kautūhalaṃ hi me||1||
|| śrīkṛṣṇa uvāca||
nānyaduṣkṛṣṭamuddiṣṭaṃ tajjñairanaśanātparam ||
tasyāhaṃ lakṣaṇaṃ vakṣye yajjapyaṃ ca mumūrṣatā || 2
yādṛgrūpaśca bhagavāṃściṃtanīyo janārdanaḥ ||
āsannamātmanaḥ kālaṃ jñātvā prājño yudhiṣṭhira || 3 ||
nirdhūtamaladoṣaśca snāto niyatamānasaḥ ||
samabhyarcya hṛṣīkeśaṃ puṣpadhūpādibhistataḥ || 4 ||
praṇipātaiḥ stavaiḥ puṇyairgaṃdhairdhūpaistu pūjayet ||
dattvā dānaṃ ca viprebhyo vikalādibhya eva ca ||
samarpya brāhmaṇebhyaśca devārcādyupayogi ca || 5 ||
baṃdhu putrakalatreṣu kṣetradhānyadhanādiṣu ||
mitravarge ca rājendra mamatvaṃ vinivartayet || 6 ||
mitrāṇyamitrānmadhyasthānparānsvāṃśca punaḥ punaḥ ||
atyarthamapakāreṇa nopakāreṇa cintayet || 7 ||
tataśca prayataḥ kuryādutsargaṃ sarvakarmaṇām ||
śubhāśubhānāṃ rājendra vākyaṃ cedamudīrayet || 8 ||
parityajāmyahaṃ bhogāṃstyajāmi suhṛdo.akhilān ||
bhojanaṃ hi mayotsṛṣṭamutsṛṣṭamanulepanam || 9 ||
sragbhūṣaṇādikaṃ geyaṃ dānamāsanameva ca ||
homādayaḥ parārthā ye ye ca nityakramāgatāḥ || 4.126.10 ||
naimittikāstathā kāmyāḥ śrāddhadharmādayojjhitāḥ ||
tyaktāścāśramikā dharmā varṇadharmāstathojjhitāḥ ||11||
padbhyāṃ karābhyāṃ viharankurvāṇaḥ karma codvahan ||
na pāpaṃ kasyacinnyāyyāḥ prāṇinaḥ saṃtu nirbhayāḥ || 12 ||
nabhasi prāṇino ye ca ye jale ye ca bhūtale ||
kṣitervivaragā ye ca ye ca pāṣāṇasaṃpuṭe || 13 ||
dhānyādiṣu ca vastreṣu śayaneṣvāsaneṣu ca ||
te svayaṃ tu vibudhyaṃte dattaṃ tebhyo.abhayaṃ mayā || 14 ||
na me.asti bāṃdhavaḥ kaścidviṣṇuṃ muktvā jagadgurum ||
mitrapakṣe ca me viṣṇuradhaścordhvaṃ tathā punaḥ || 15 ||
pārśvato mūrdhni hṛdaye bāhubhyāṃ caiva cakṣuṣoḥ ||
śrotrādiṣu ca sarveṣu mama viṣṇuḥ pratiṣṭhitaḥ || 16 ||
iti sarvaṃ samutsṛjya dhṛtvā sarveśamacyutam ||
vāsudevetyavirataṃ nāma devasya kīrtayet || 17 ||
dakṣiṇāgreṣu darbheṣu śete vai prākchirāstathā ||
udakchirā vā rājeṃdra ciṃtayañjagataḥ patim || 18 ||
viṣṇuṃ jiṣṇuṃ hṛṣīkeśaṃ keśavaṃ madhusūdanam ||
nārāyaṇaṃ naraṃ śauriṃ vāsudevaṃ janārdanam || 19 ||
vārāhaṃ yajñapuruṣaṃ puṃḍarīkākṣamacyutam ||
vāmanaṃ śrīdharaṃ kṛṣṇaṃ nṛsiṃhamaparājitam || 4.126.20 ||
padmanābhamajaṃ śrīśaṃ dāmodaramadhokṣajam ||
sarveśvareśvaraṃ śuddhamanaṃtaṃ viśvarūpiṇam || 21 ||
cakriṇaṃ gadinaṃ śāṃtaṃ śaṃkhinaṃ garuḍadhvajam ||
kirīṭakaustubhadharaṃ praṇamāmyahamavyayam || 22 ||
ahamasmi jagannātha mayi vāsaṃ kuru drutam ||
āvayoraṃtaraṃ māstu samīrākāśayoriva || 23 ||
ayaṃ viṣṇurayaṃ śaurirayaṃ kṛṣṇaḥ puro mama ||
nīlotpaladalaśyāmaḥ padmapatrāyatekṣaṇaḥ || 24 ||
eṣa paśyatu māmīśaḥ paśyāmyahamadhokṣajam ||
itthaṃ japedekamanāḥ smaransarveśvaraṃ harim || 25 ||
āsīta sukhaduḥkheṣu samo mitrāhiteṣu ca ||
oṃ namo vāsudevāya .a ityetatsatataṃ japet || 26 ||
yathāyathā bhavetkāmastathā tannāmakīrtayet ||
dhyāyecca devadeveśaṃ viṣṇo rūpaṃ manoramam || 27 ||
prasannanetrabhrūcakraśaṃkhacakragadādharam ||
śrīvakṣasaṃ sumanasaṃ caturvaktraṃ kirīṭinam || 28 ||
pītāṃbaradharaṃ kṛṣṇaṃ cārukeyūradhāriṇam ||
ciṃtayettu sadārūpaṃ manaḥ kṛtvaikaniścayam||29||
yādṛśe vā manaḥ sthairyaṃ rūpe badhnāti cakriṇaḥ ||
tadeva ciṃtayedrūpaṃ vāsudeveti kīrtayet || 4.126.30 ||
itthaṃ japansmarannityaṃ svarūpaṃ paramātmanaḥ ||
aprāṇaparamodārastaccittastatparāyaṇaḥ || 31 ||
sarvapātakayukto.api puruṣaḥ puruṣarṣabha ||
prayāti devadeveśe layamīḍyatamecyute || 32 ||
yathāgnistṛṇa jātāni dahatyanilasaṃgataḥ ||
tathānaśanasaṃkalpaḥ puṃsāṃ pāpamasaṃśayam || 33 ||
|| yudhiṣṭhira uvāca || ||
utkrāṃtikāle bhūtānāṃ muhyaṃti cittavṛttayaḥ ||
jarāvyādhivihīnānāṃ kimuta vyādhidoṣiṇām || 34 ||
atyaṃtavayasā dagdho vyādhinā copapīḍitaḥ ||
yadi sthātuṃ na śaknoti kṣitistho darbhasaṃstare || 35 ||
kimapyanyopyupāyo.asti na vānaśanakarmaṇi ||
vaikalyaṃ yena nāpnoti tanme brūhi janārdana||36||
tvayoktaṃ bhagavandhyānaṃ tadbrūhi mama tattvataḥ ||
dhyānasvarūpamakhilaṃ kathayasva janārdana ||37||
|| śrīkṛṣṇa uvāca|| ||
nātra bhūmirna ca kuśāḥ svāstarāśca na kāraṇam||
cittasyālaṃ vanībhūto viṣṇurevātra kāraṇam || 38 ||
tiṣṭhanbhuñjansvapangacchaṃstathā dhāvannitastataḥ ||
utkrāṃtikāle govindaṃ saṃsmaraṃstanmayo bhavet || 39 ||
yaṃ yañcāpi smaranbhāvaṃ tyajanyante kalevaram ||
taṃ tamevaiti kaunteya sadā tadbhāvabhāvitaḥ ||4.126.40||
tasmātpradhānamaṃtroktaṃ vāsudevasya cintanam ||
yadyatpṛṣṭaṃ tvayā dhyānaṃ tadeva kathayāmi te ||41||
purā me kathitaṃ pārtha mārkaṃḍeyena dhīmatā ||42||
rājyopabhogaśayanāsanavāhaneṣu strīgaṃdhamālyamaṇivastravibhūṣaṇeṣu || icchābhilāṣamatimātramudeti mohāddhyānaṃ tadāttamiti saṃpravadaṃti tajjñāḥ ||43|| saṃchedanairdahanatāḍanapīḍanaiśca gātraprahāradamanairvinikartanaiśca||
yasyeha cetasi hi yāti na cānukaṃpā dhyānaṃ tu raudramiti tatpravadaṃti tajjñāḥ || 44 ||
sūtrārthamārgaṇamahāvratabhāvanābhirbaṃdhapramokṣagatirāgatihetu cintā || pañcendriyādyupaśamaśca śamaśca bhūterdhyānaṃ tu dharmyamiti tatpravadaṃti saṃtaḥ || 45 || yasyendriyāṇi viṣayairna vivarjitāni saṅkalpanātmaja vikalpavikārayogaiḥ || tatvekaniṣṭhahṛdayo nibhṛtāṃtarātmā dhyānaṃ tu śuklamiti tatpravadaṃti siddhāḥ || 46 || ādye tiryagadhogatiśca niyataṃ dhyāne tu raudre sadā dharmye devagatiḥ śubhaṃ phalamahośukle ca janmakṣayaḥ ||
tasmājjanmarujāpahe hitatare saṃsāranirvāhake dhyāne śuklatare rajaḥpramathane kuryātprayatnaṃ budhaḥ || 47 ||
samāḥ sahasrāṇi tu sapta vai jale daśaikamagnau pavane ca ṣoḍaśa ||
gavāṃ gṛhe ṣaṣṭiraśītirāhave anāśane bhārata cākṣayā gatiḥ|| || 48 || ||
iti śrībhaviṣye mahāpurāṇa uttaraparvaṇi śrīkṛṣṇayudhiṣṭhirasaṃvāde sāṃbharāyaṇīvratavarṇanaṃ nāma ṣaḍviṃśatyuttaraśatatamo.adhyāyaḥ || 126 || ||
vāpīkūpataḍāgotsargavidhivarṇanam
|| yudhiṣṭhira uvāca || ||
taḍāgotsarjane deva vidhiṃ vidhividāṃ vara ||
kathayasva mahābhāga mama devakinaṃdana || 1 ||
vāpīkūpodakānāñca ke maṃtrāḥ parikīrtitāḥ ||
ke ṛtvijotra ke yūpāḥ kartavyāḥ kuṇḍamaṇḍape || 2 ||
dānaṃ kimatra nirdiṣṭaṃ balayaḥ ke prakīrtitāḥ ||
kasminkāle kathaṃ kuryādityetatsakalaṃ vada || 3 ||
|| śrīkṛṣṇa uvāca || ||
sādhusādhu mahābāho yanmāṃ tvaṃ paripṛcchasi ||
taḍāgavāpīkūpānāmutsargaṃ kathayāmi te || || 4 ||
niṣpanne baddhapālīke sarvodbhedavivarjite ||
sopānapaṃktisahite pāṣāṇaiḥ sarvataścite || 5 ||
tasminsalilasaṃpūrṇe kārtike vā viśeṣataḥ ||
taḍāgasya vidhiḥ kāryaḥ sthiranakṣatrayogataḥ || 6 ||
munayaḥ kecidicchaṃti vyatīte cottarāyaṇe ||
na kālaniyamo hyatra pramāṇaṃ salilaṃ yataḥ ||7 ||
taḍāgapālaśīrṣe tu maṃḍalaṃ kārayecchubham ||
daśadvādaśahastaṃ ca caturdvāraṃ suvistṛtam || 8 ||
toraṇāni tu catvāri caturdikṣu vicakṣaṇaiḥ ||
aśvatthoduṃbaraplakṣavaṭaśākhāmayāni ca || 9 ||
nānāvarṇāstu paritaḥ patākāḥ parikalpayet ||
madhye mahādhvajaḥ kāryaḥ pañcavarṇaḥ suśobhanaḥ || 4.127.10 ||
caturhastā bhavedvedī madhye pañcakarātha vā ||
yajamānapramāṇena madhye yūpena śobhitā ||11||
kadaṃbāśvatthapālāśavaikaṃkatamayaḥ śubhaḥ ||
brāhmaṇasyāsya nirdiṣṭo yūpaḥ śrutivicakṣaṇaiḥ || 12 ||
nyagrodhabilvajaḥ proktaḥ kṣatriyāṇāṃ ca khādiraḥ ||
vaiśyasyoduṃbaramayo madhvarjunasamudbhavaḥ || 13||
bibhītakoduṃbarajaḥ śākaśālmalisaṃbhavaḥ ||
śūdrasya yūpo nirdiṣṭaḥ sāradārumayo.atha vā ||14||
lokapālāṣṭakaṃ tatra rajasā ca vilekhayet ||
brahmāviṣṇuśca rudraśca kamalā cāmbikā tathā || 15 ||
sāvitrī sahitā kāryā puṣpadhūpairathārcayet ||
kuryātkuṃḍāni catvāri caturdikṣu vicakṣaṇaḥ || 16 ||
mekhalātrayayuktāni hastamātrāṇi sarvataḥ ||
hemālaṃkāriṇaḥ kāryā hotāraḥ ṣoḍaśāṣṭa vā || 17 ||
ahatāṃbarasaṃvītāḥ srakcandanavibhūṣitāḥ ||
sthāpakāścātra vihitā vedavedāṅgapāragāḥ || 18 ||
itihāsapurāṇajñāḥ priyavāco.anasūyakāḥ ||
mṛnmayāni ca pātrāṇi tāmrāṇi sruksruvaṃ tathā || 19 ||
vyaṃjanāni ca kāryāṇi homārthaṃ samidhastilāḥ ||
grahayajñavidhānena homaḥ kāryo vijānatā || 4.127.20 ||
vedyādhivāsitānāṃ ca surāṇāṃ homa iṣyate ||
vāruṇaistu tathā maṃtrairhotavyaṃ puṣṭivarddhanam || 21 ||
indrādilokapālānāṃ pūrvādikramayogataḥ ||
baliṃ dadyācca talliṅgairmantraissarvārthasiddhaye || 22 ||
dvāreṣu kalaśāndadyātsahiraṇyānsapallavān ||
aśvatthapallavaiḥ kāryāḥ śubhāścandanamālikāḥ || 23 ||
sauvarṇaṃ kārayetkūrmaṃ tāmreṇa makaraṃ tathā ||
rajatena tathā matsyaṃ trapuṇā darduraṃ tathā || 24 ||
śiśumārajalaukāñca rajatenaiva kārayet ||
sarvānapi yathāsthānaṃ tāmrapātryāṃ nidhāpayet || 25 ||
eṣā pratiṣṭhā nāmeti mantreṇāmaṃtrayecca tān ||
yūpapratiṣṭhā kartavyā vedoktavidhinā tataḥ || 26 ||
kuṃkumena samālabhya puṣpairdhūpaiḥ samarcayet ||
vastrayugmena saṃpūjya naivedyādi yathākramam || 27 ||
tato dvijātipravaraḥ śrapayitvā caruṃ navam ||
tataścāgnyāhutīrdadyādbhūrbhuvaḥsvariti kramāt || 28 ||
tataścāvāhayeddevaṃ varuṇaṃ saritāṃ patim ||
vāditraghoṣaigītaiśca gandhamālyānulepanaiḥ || 29 ||
śvetenaiva tu vastreṇa śiroveṣṭaṃ tu kārayet ||
ādāya tāmrapātrīṃ tu brahmaghoṣapuraḥsaraḥ || 4.127.30 ||
apramāṇaṃ jalaṃ gatvā varuṇāya nivedayet ||
tvaṃ varuṇa iti maṃtreṇa jala madhye pravāhayet || 31 ||
yaccānyadvastrabījāni tatsarvaṃ majjayejjale ||
tārayecca tato dhenuṃ dakṣiṇāyā udagvrajet || 32 ||
gośiroveṣṭanaṃ kuryātsati vastre tu buddhimān ||
lāṃgalasyāgramādāya avatīrya tato jalam || 33 ||
jñātibhiḥ sahitaḥ kartā sabhāryaścāvagāhayet ||
tato.avatīrya salilāddattvā gāṃ brāhmaṇāya tām ||
śaktyā ca dakṣiṇāṃ dadyādevaṃ viprānvisarjayet || 34 ||
sāmānyaṃ sarvabhūtebhyo mayā dattamidaṃ jalam ||
evaṃ jalāñjaliṃ kṣiptvā pūjayejjalamātaraḥ || 35 ||
toṣyāḥ karmakarāḥ sarve kuddālāni ca pūjayet ||
avāritaṃ tu dātavyaṃ mantrapūrvaṃ dinatrayam || 36 ||
ekāhaṃ ca yathāśaktyā vittaśāṭhyaṃ na kārayet ||
gosahasraṃ tadardhaṃ vā tasyārdhamathavāpi vā || 37 ||
śatamardhaśataṃ vāpi pañcaviṃśatimeva ca ||
tāsāmabhāve gāṃ dadyātsavatsāṃ kāṃsyadohanām || 38 ||
eṣa rājaṃstaḍāgasya vidhiste parikīrtitaḥ ||
vāpīkūpavidhānaṃ ca kathayāmi tathā param || 39 || kuṇḍamaṇḍapasaṃbhārabhūṣaṇācchādanādikam ||
taḍāgavidhivatkuryādyūpagotaraṇādikam || 4.127.40 ||
akālamūlānkalaśānvāpīkoṇeṣu dāpayet ||
tīrthodakasamāyuktānsitacandanacarcitān || 41 || sitavāsoyugacchannānsamālyānratnagarbhiṇaḥ ||
śrapayitvā caruṃ tatra yāvanmātro yathāvidhi || 42 ||
catasra āhutīrdadyādbhūrbhuvaḥ svariti kramāt ||
grahahomaṃ prakurvīta śāṃtipuṣṭivivarddhanam || 43 ||
varuṇāya baliṃ dadyāllokapālebhya eva ca ||
vāruṇāni ca sūktāni paṭheyurddhijasattamāḥ || 44 ||
vedīmadhye maṃḍalaṃ ca padmamatra praśasyate ||
tanmadhye pūjaye cchaṃbhuṃ brahmāṇaṃ keśavaṃ tathā || 45 ||
matsyakamaṭhamaṇḍūkānvedyā madhye.adhivāsayet ||
mitramitro.asi bhūtānāṃ dhanado dhanakāṃkṣiṇām || 46 ||
vaidyo rogābhibhūtānāṃ śaraṇyaḥ śaraṇārthinām ||
anenaiva hi maṃtreṇa varuṇāya visarjayet || 47 ||
ādau cāvāhayeddevamanenaiva viśeṣataḥ ||
namaste viśvaguptāya namo viṣṇo apāṃpate || 48 ||
sānnidhyaṃ kuru deveśa samudre yadvadatra vai ||
tatastu dakṣiṇā deyā brāhmaṇānāṃ narādhipa || 49 ||
gauḥ sthāpakāya dātavyā bhojanaṃ cānivāritam ||
sarveṣāmeva dātavyameṣa paurāṇiko vidhiḥ || 4.127.50 ||
śarāyā āgataṃ toyaṃ sāmudraṃ prathamaṃ smṛtam ||
nipāne vā taḍāge vā saṃsthitaṃ tadbhavecchuci || 51 ||
vāpīkūpataḍāge vā sthitaṃ tu prathamaṃ jalam ||
apeyaṃ tu bhavetsarvaṃ tajjalaṃ sūtikāsamam || 52 ||
samudro.api hi kauṃteya devayonirapāṃpatiḥ ||
kuśāgreṇāpi rabhasā na spṛṣṭavyastvasaṃskṛtaḥ || 53 ||
agniśca tejo mṛḍayātha dehe retodhā viṣṇuramṛtasya nābhiḥ ||
evaṃ bruvanpāṃḍava satyavākyaṃ tatovagāheta patiṃ nadīnām || 54 ||
vaiṣṇave māsi saṃprāpte nakṣatre vāruṇe tathā ||
arghyaṃ pradadyādbhaktyā tu tasminkāle mahodadheḥ || 55 ||
snātvā tu vidhivanmaṃtraiḥ sāgare tu samāhitaḥ ||
phalamūlākṣatairbhakṣyaistathārghyaṃ saṃprakalpayet || 56 ||
api janmasahasraṃ tu yatpāpaṃ kurute naraḥ ||
mucyate sarvapāpebhyaḥ snātvā tu lavaṇāṃbhasi || 57 ||
vidhijñena tu kartavyaṃ brāhmaṇena yathāvidhi ||
kartā kārayitā caiva ubhau tu svargagāminau || 58 ||
vidhiṃ tvenamajānāno yaḥ kuryādarthamohitaḥ ||
kartā kārayitā caiva ubhau narakagāminau || 59 |||
yo na kārayate śāṃtiṃ taḍāgādyeṣu karmasu ||
tasya tanniṣphalaṃ sarvamuptaṃ bījamivoṣare || 4.127.60 ||
sarvaratnamayaṃ divyaṃ candrārkasadṛśaprabham ||
vimānaṃ tejasā yuktamārohetpuṇyakarmakṛt || 61 ||
kaścitpibati tattoyaṃ nipānasthaṃ tato.añjalim ||
brāhmaṇo vā yatirgaurvā yena kartā na sīdati ||62|||
utsṛṣṭe kṛtakṛtyastu suhṛtkuryānmahotsavam ||
mahābhojyaṃ mahotsargaṃ yajamāno dināṣṭakam || 63 ||
kārakāḥ karmaṇo vāpi sūtradhārādayo narāḥ ||
iṣṭāpūrtena dharmeṇa te.api svargaṃ prayāṃti hi || 64 ||
khanyamāne mahībhāge prāṇino ye kṣayaṃ gatāḥ ||
citre vā devakūṭārthe te sarve tridivaṃ gatāḥ || || 65 ||
dhenostu romakūpāṇi yāvantīha narottama ||
tāvadvarṣasahasrāṇi varṣakoṭiśatāni ca || 66 ||
koṭiryugasahasrāṇāṃ svarge tiṣṭhettaḍāgakṛt ||
cettasyapitaraḥ kecinnarakaṃ samupāgatāḥ || 67 ||
tāṃstu tārayate sarvānātmānaṃ ca mahīpate ||
āsphoṭayaṃti pitaro valgaṃti prapitāmahāḥ || 68 ||
api naḥ sa kule jāto yastaḍāgaṃ kariṣyati ||
sarvasvenāpi kauṃteya bhūmiṣṭhamudakaṃ kuru ||69||
kulāni tārayetsapta yatra gaurvitṛṣī bhavet ||
evaṃ varṣaśatenāpi kṛttikā viharīvane||4.127.70||
māsaṃ cetāgṛhe koṭikṣaṇadhvaṃsidhanasya hi||
taḍāgaṃ devabhavanaṃ vāpīvṛkṣoghanacchadaḥ||71||
caturthakaṃ phalaṃ prāptaṃ kārite.asmiṃścatuṣṭaye||
yathā mātuḥ samācaṣṭe putraḥ śīlaṃ svakairguṇaiḥ||72||
tathā svādena ca jalaṃ kartuḥ sarvaṃ śubhāśubham||
ataḥ śubhāgataṃ dravyaṃ taḍāgādiṣu lāpayet ||73||
dhanyasya pāṃthāḥ saṃprāpya taḍāgaṃ vṛkṣamaṃḍitam ||
pītvāpaḥ pādapatale viśramaṃti ramaṃti ca ||74 ||
mārutodbhūtavīcyagraiḥ karaiḥ kamalamaṃḍitam ||
abhyāgatāya sudhiyā taḍāgādyaṃ prakalpitam || 75 ||
sāmānyaṃ sarvabhūtebhyo yena bhūmigataṃ jalam ||
tāritaṃ kāritaṃ tena suputreṇa kuladvayam || 76 ||
mūrtaṃ svabhāvataḥ siddhamiṣṭaṃ mantrapradarśitam ||
iṣṭāpūrte kṛte rājankṛtakṛtyaḥ pumānbhavet || 77 ||
unnatā vātha nimnā vā kīrtiryena prakāśitā ||
tena trailokya candreṇa jananī pārtha putriṇī ||78||
tritayaṃ nighnatāṃ neyaṃ tritayaṃ connatiṃ parām ||
taḍāgamatha yo bhūmau deva devālayaṃkṛtī ||79||
yaḥ kārayati loke.asminkīrtistasyāmalā bhavet ||
sa jīvati sa evaikaḥ sa bhavedajarāmaraḥ || 4.127.80 ||
upetānāmapi divaṃ sa nibandhavidhāyinām ||
āsta eva nirātaṃkaṃ tasya kīrtimayaṃ vapuḥ || 81 ||
tāvatsvarge sa ramate yāvatkīrtiranaśvarā ||
tāvattvilāyāmadhyāste sukṛtī vaibudhaṃ padam || 82 ||
haṃsāsyakṣiptanīlyagraṃ padminīkhaṇḍamaṇḍitam ||
pīyamānaṃ mahāgrāmairdhanyāḥ paśyaṃti svaṃ saraḥ || 83 ||
ghaṭairañjalibhirvaktrairyasya vāṭīpuṭairjalam ||
pibaṃti jaṃtavaḥ sarve kimanyattasya varṇyate|| 84 ||
taḍāgaṃ nagaropāṃte dhanyasya kila jāyate ||
ubhayorarthasaṃsiddhirdṛṣṭā karturjanasya ca || 85 ||
yeṣāṃ devakulaṃ tattu niṣpadyeta sarastaṭe ||
abhīṣṭadevatāyuktaṃ teṣāṃ pārtha kimucyate || 86 ||
na bhavaṃtīṣṭikā yāvaddroṇī vā bhūmisannibhā ||
svarge mahīyate tāvatkārako devaveśmanaḥ || 87 ||
bhogyasthāne kṛtaḥ kūpaḥ susvādusalilastathā ||
dṛḍharajjusamāyuktaḥ punātyāsaptamaṃ kulam || 88 ||
yasya svādujalaṃ kūpe pibaṃti satataṃ janāḥ ||
kiṃ tena na kṛtaṃ puṇyaṃ savasattvopakāriṇā ||89||
yaḥ prāsādānracayati śubhāndevatānāṃ taḍāge kīrtistasya bhramati vipulā vaṃśamārgānuyātā ||
divyānbhogānbhajati ca sadā kārakaścāprameyānbhuktvā saukhyaṃ punarapi ca bhaveccakravartī pṛthivyām || 4.127.90 ||
teṣāṃ taḍāgāni bahūdakāni kūpāśca yūpāśca pratiśrayāśca ||
annapradānaṃ madhurā ca vāṇī yamasya te nirvacanī bhavaṃti || 91 || ||
iti śrībhaviṣye mahāpurāṇa uttaraparvaṇi śrīkṛṣṇayudhiṣṭhirasaṃvāde vāpīkūpataḍāgotsargavidhivarṇanaṃ nāma saptaviṃśatyuttaraśatatamo.adhyāyaḥ || 127 || || cha || ||
vṛkṣodyāpanavidhivarṇanam
|| yudhiṣṭhira uvāca || ||
vṛkṣāropaṇamāhātmyaṃ vada devakinandana ||
udyāpanavidhiṃ caiva sarahasyaṃ samāsataḥ || 1 ||
|| śrīkṛṣṇa uvāca || ||
varaṃ bhūmiruhāḥ pañca nagakāṣṭharuhā daśa ||
patraiḥ puṣpaiḥ phalairmūlaiḥ kurvaṃti pitṛtarpaṇam || 2 ||
bahubhirmṛtakiñjātaiḥ putrairdharmārthavarjitaiḥ ||
varameke pathitaruryatra viśramate janaḥ ||3||
prāṇinaḥ prīṇayaṃti sma cchāyāvalkalapallavaiḥ ||
ghanacchadāḥ sutaravaḥ puṣpairdevānphalaiḥ pitṛrn ||4||
puṣpapatraphalacchāyāmūlavalkaladārubhiḥ ||
dhanyā mahīruhā yeṣāṃ viphalā yāṃti nārthinaḥ || 5 ||
putrāḥ saṃvatsarasyāṃte śrāddhaṃ kurvaṃti vā na vā ||
pratyahaṃ pādapāḥ puṣṭiṃ śreyo.arthaṃ janayaṃti hi || 6 ||
na tatkarotyagnihotraṃ sukhaṃ yadyoṣitaḥ sutaḥ ||
yatkaroti ghanacchāyaḥ pādapaḥ pathi ropitaḥ || 7 ||
sacchāyā ca sapuṣpā ca saphalā vṛkṣavāṭikā ||
kulayoṣeva bhavati bhartṛlokadvayānugā || 8 ||
aśokaphalāvakarā tilakālaṃkṛtānanā ||
sarvopabhoga veśyeva vāṭikā rasikā sadā || 9 ||
sadā sa tīrthī bhavati sadā dānaṃ prayacchati ||
sadā yajñaṃ sa yajate yo ropayati pādapam || || 4.128.10 ||
aśvatthamekaṃ picumaṃdamekaṃ nyagrodhamekaṃ daśa ciñciṇīkān||
kapitthabilvāmalakītrayaṃ ca pañcāmravāpī narakaṃ na paśyet || 11 || puṣpopagaṃdhāḍhyaphalopagandhaṃ yaḥ pādapaṃ sparśayate dvijāya ||
sa strīsamṛddhaṃ vahuratnapūrṇaṃ labhedvimānapratimaṃ gṛhaṃ vai || 12 ||
pratiśrayāśrānta samāśrayatvātsamīhitaṃ tatra phalaṃ bubhukṣoḥ ||
apatyamekaṃ paralokahetorvimṛśyatāṃ kiṃ taravo na ropitāḥ || 13 ||
na khānitāḥ puṣkariṇyo ropitā na mahīruhāḥ ||
māturyauvanacaureṇa tena jātena kiṃ kṛtam || 14 ||
chāyāmanyasya kurvaṃti tiṣṭhaṃti svayamātape ||
phalaṃti ca parārtheṣu na svārtheṣu mahādrumāḥ || 15 ||
ataḥ paraṃ pravakṣyāmi vṛkṣasyodyāpane vidhim ||
sarvapāpapraśamanaṃ sarvakīrtivivarddhanam || 16 ||
aputrayā purā pārtha pārvatyā mandarācale ||
aśokaḥ śokaśamanaḥ putratve parikalpitaḥ || 17 ||
jātakarmādikāstasya yāḥ kriyāḥ kila buddhiman ||
carakātripurāṇoktāstāḥ śṛṇuṣva yudhiṣṭhira || 18 ||
tato mūle ghanadalo valgucchāyāṃgapallavaḥ ||
śītavātātapasahaḥ saṃskāryastaruṇastaruḥ || 19||
strīnāmakaṃṭakīkubjakīṭavṛścikakoṭaraḥ ||
nodyāpyaḥ pādapaḥ pārtha śiṣṭānāṃ yo na saṃmataḥ || 4.128.20 ||
ālavāle suvihite śubhe baddhacatuṣkike ||
śodhayitvā tamuddeśaṃ suguptaṃ kārayettataḥ || 21 ||
sadaivodyāpanaṃ pārtha pādapānāṃ praśasyate ||
śubhe.ahni viprakathite grahanakṣatrasaṃyute || 22 ||
patākālaṃkṛtaṃ vṛkṣaṃ pūrvedyuradhivāsayet ||
raktavastraiḥ samācchādya raktasūtreṇa veṣṭayet ||23||
piṣṭātakenāvakiretsarvauṣadhyā ca pādapam ||
sthāpayetpūrṇakalaśāṃścaturdikṣu vicakṣaṇaḥ || 24 ||
pallavālaṃkṛtamukhānsitacandanacarcitān ||
sitavāsoyugacchannānsakalānratnagarbhiṇaḥ || 25 ||
patākālaṃkṛtāḥ sarve kāryāstatsannidhau drumāḥ ||
mūlavinyastakalaśā raktasūtrāvaguṇṭhitāḥ || 26 ||
raktapītasitācchādaiścarcitāḥ sumanoharaiḥ ||
kaladhautamayānyatra phalāni daśa paṃca vā || 27 ||
tāmrapātryāṃ sabījāni saralānyadhivāsayet ||
tūryamaṅgalaghoṣeṇa caturdikṣu kṣipedbalim || 28 ||
indrādilokapālebhyo bhūtebhyo maṃtravidguruḥ ||
tataḥ prabhāte vimale kuṃḍaṃ kṛtvā samekhalam || 29 ||
grahayajñavidhānena śāṃtikarma samārabhet ||
suvarṇālaṃkṛtānkṛtvā brāhmaṇānvedapāragān || 4.128.30 ||
caturo.aṣṭau yathāśaktyā vāsobhirabhipūjayet ||
tilājyena ca homaḥ syāttuṣṭipuṣṭikaraḥ sadā || 31 ||
mātaraṃ sthāpayitvāgre pūjayetkusumākṣataiḥ ||
śrapayitvā caruṃ samyakpāyasādyapariplutam || 32 ||
homādau jātakarmādi godānaṃ yāvadeva tu ||
pādapaṃ snāpayitvā tu samaṃtraistīrthavāribhiḥ||33||
jātakaṃ nāmakaraṇamannaprāśanameva ca ||
suvarṇasūcyā kurvīta karṇavedhaṃ vidhānavit || 34 ||
jātarūpakṣureṇātra cūḍākāryā yathākramam ||
badhnīyānmekhalāṃ mauñjīṃ vāsaśca paridhāpayet || 35 ||
yajamānastataḥ snātaḥ śuklāṃbaradharaḥ śuciḥ ||
puṣpāñjaliḥ samabhyetya maṃtrametamudīrayet || 36 ||
ye śākhinaḥ śikhariṇāṃ śirasā vibhūṣā ye nandanādiṣu vaneṣu kṛtapratiṣṭhāḥ ||
ye kāmadāḥ suranaroragakinnarāṇāṃ te me natasya duritārtiharā bhavaṃtu ||| 37 || etairdvijairvidhivaraprahuto hutāśaḥ paśyatyasāvahimadīdhitiraṃbarasthaḥ ||
tvaṃ vṛkṣa putraparikalpanayā vṛto.asi kāryaṃ sadaiva bhavatā mama putrakāryam || 38 || ityevamuktvā taṃ vṛkṣaṃ lālayitvā punaḥpunaḥ ||
ghṛtapātre svavadanaṃ dṛṣṭvāśiṣamudīrayet || 39 ||
aṅgādaṅgātsaṃbhavasi hṛdayādabhijāyase ||
ātmā vai putranāmāsi sa jīva śaradaḥ śatam || 4.128.40 ||
brāhmaṇānāṃ tato deyā dakṣiṇā hṛṣṭamānasaiḥ ||
sthāpakāya śubhāṃ dhenuṃ dattvā kuryānmahotsavam || 41 ||
dīnānāthajanānāṃ ca bhojanaṃ cānivāritam ||
itareṣāṃ pradātavyaṃ saṃtuṣṭena surāsavam || 42 ||
jñātibandhujanaiḥ sārddhaṃ svayaṃ bhuñjīta kāmataḥ ||
preṣyāḥ karmakarāḥ sarve pūjanīyāḥ svaśaktitaḥ || 43 ||
ya evaṃ kurute pārtha vṛkṣāṇāṃ mahadutsavam ||
sarvakāmānavāpnoti ihaloke paratra ca || 44 ||
putrairvinā śubhagatirna bhavennarāṇāṃ duṣputrakairiti tathobhayalokanāśaḥ ||
etadvicārya sudhiyā paripālya vṛkṣānputrāḥ purāṇavidhinā parikalpanīyā || 45 || iti śrībhaviṣye mahāpurāṇa uttaraparvaṇi śrīkṛṣṇayudhiṣṭhirasaṃvāde vṛkṣodyāpanavidhivarṇanaṃ nāmāṣṭāviṃśatyuttaraśatatamo.a dhyāyaḥ || 128 || cha ||
devapūjāvidhivarṇanam
|| śrīkṛṣṇa uvāca || ||
ye mānavāstridaśamūrtiniketanāni kurvaṃti sādhujanadṛṣṭimanoharāṇi ||
teṣāṃ mṛte.atha paramārthamaye śarīre loke paribhramati kīrtimayaṃ śarīram || 1 ||
yaḥ kārayeddvārasitābhragauramuttuṃgasaudhadhavalāyatanaṃ surāṇām ||
caṃdrāvadātabhavane divi labdhasaukhyo rājyaśriyaṃ sa bhuvi bodhayutāmupaiti || 2 ||
ye kārayaṃti surasadmasu devatānāmarcāḥ suvarṇarajatāyasaśailatāmrāḥ || sāmaṃtamaulimaṇiraśmisamamarcitāste siṃhāsane.aṅgadakirīṭabhṛto.avabhāṃti || 3 ||
ye merumaulisurasaṃghakṛtābhiṣekāḥ pañcāmṛtaiḥ suravarānabhiṣecayaṃti ||
te divyakalpamabhidhārya sureśvaratvaṃ rājyābhiṣekamatulaṃ punarāpnuvaṃti || 4 ||
ye śailarājamalayodbhavacaṃdanena satkuṃkumena ca surānanulepayaṃti ||
te divyagandhapaṭavāsasugaṃdhidehā naṃdaṃti naṃdanavaneṣu sahāpsarobhiḥ || 5 || gaṃdhāḍhyajātikamalotpaladivyapuṣpairdevānnavairanudinaṃ nanu ye.arcayaṃti || puṣpottamairnarapatitvamavāpya te.api yāsyaṃti kuṃdadhavalāmacireṇa siddhim || 6 || āmodibhirhimaturuṣkasugandhadhūpairye mānavāḥ suravarānapi dhūpayaṃti || karpūradhāranibhagandhavarā bhirāme svarge vimānavati te bhavane ramaṃte || 7 ||
dodhūyate kanakadaṃḍavirājitaiśca saccāmarairdhavalakuṇḍalasundarībhiḥ || divyāṃbarasraganulepanabhūṣi tāṅgāṃ kṛtvā sureśabhavanāṃbaravastrapūjām ||8||
dedīpyate dinakarojjvalapadmarāgaratnaprabhācchuritahemamaye vimāne ||
divyāṃganāparivṛto nayanābhirāmaḥ prajvālya dīpamamalaṃ bhavane surāṇām || 9 ||
yo jāgaraṃ suravarābhimato dadāti caitrotsavādidivaseṣvapi tūryanādaiḥ || vīṇāsuveṇumadhurasvarabhāṣi ṇībhiḥ saṃgīyate ca sa kṛśodarakinnarībhiḥ || 4.129.10 ||
kurvati ye sadupalenadhāturāgasaṃmārjanaṃ suravarāyatane.anuraktāḥ ||
muktākalāpamapi kāṃcanabhakti citrairvaiḍūryakṛṭṭimatale divi te vasaṃti || 11 || dadyācca yaḥ paramabhaktiyutaḥ surāṇāṃ ghaṇṭāvitānavaracāmaramātapatram || keyūrahāramaṇikuṇḍalabhūṣi tosau ratnādhipo vasati bhūtalacakravartī || 12 || abhyarcayetprativacaḥ kusumairvicitrairdevādhidevaparisaṃstutapādapadmān ||
bhaktyā prahṛṣṭamanasaḥ praṇamaṃti devāṃste bhūrbhuvaḥ svarmahimāptaphalā bhavaṃti || 13 || iti śrībhaviṣye mahāpurāṇa uttaraparvaṇi śrīkṛṣṇayudhiṣṭhirasaṃvāde devapūjāvidhivarṇanaṃ nāmaikonatriṃśaduttaraśatata mo.adhyāyaḥ || 129 || cha ||
dīpadānavidhivarṇanam

|| yudhiṣṭhira uvāca || ||
bhagavankena tapasā vratena niyamena vā ||
dānena kena vā loke projjvaltvaṃ prajāyate || 1 ||
atitejo mahaddīptaṃ dīptāṃśukiraṇojjvalam ||
śarīraṃ jāyate yena tanme vaktumathārhasi || 2 ||
|| śrīkṛṣṇa uvāca || ||
mathurāyāṃ purā pārtha piṅgalo nāma tāpasaḥ ||
āgataḥ sa ca me patnyā jāmbavatyā prapūjitaḥ || 3 ||
praṣṭaśca praśramevaitaṃ sa cāvocadyathātatham ||
tayāpi me samākhyātaṃ tatsarvaṃ te vadāmyaham || 4 ||
yadāyadā nṛpaśreṣṭha puṇyakālaḥ prapadyate ||
saṃkrātau sūryagrahaṇe candraparvāṇe vaidhṛtau || 5 ||
uttare tvayane prāpte dakṣiṇe viṣuve tathā ||
ekādaśyāṃ śuklapakṣe caturdaśyāṃ dinakṣaye || 6 ||
saptamyāmatha vāṣṭamyāṃ snātvā vrataparo naraḥ ||
nārī vā bhūmidevebhyaḥ prayacchetprayatāṃgaṇe ||
ghṛtakuṃbhena dīpena prajvalaṃtaṃ pradīpakam || 7 ||
|| yudhiṣṭir uvāca || ||
bhūmidevā iti proktaṃ yattvayā madhusūdana ||
kimetatkautukaṃ me.asti saṃśayaṃ chettumarhasi || 8 ||
|| śrīkṛṣṇa uvāca || ||
purā kṛtayugasyādau triśaṃkurnāma pārthivaḥ ||
sa svargaṃ gantukāmo.abhūccharīreṇa narottama ||
tataścaṇḍālatāṃ nīto vaśiṣṭhena mahātmanā || 9 ||
triśaṃkuḥ sarvamācakhyau viśvāmitrāya dhīmate ||
so.api manyuvaśādyajñaṃ cakārāhūya devatāḥ || 4.130.10 ||
na tā haviḥ pratyagṛhṇaṃstataḥ kruddhaḥ kuśātmajaḥ ||
viśvāmitrastu kopena cakārānyānsurottamān || 11 ||
śṛṃgāṭakā nnālikerānpacanānānajauḍakān ||
medhārathadavārtākatārikūṣmaṇḍakodravān|| 12 ||
uṣṭrānmanujadevāṃśca krodhānmuniravāsṛjat ||
cakārānyānsapta ṛṣīnpratimāsaṃ surottamān || 13 ||
tataḥ śakraḥ samāgamya viśvāmitraṃ prasādya vai ||
sṛṣṭiṃ nivārayāmāsa ye sṛṣṭāste tathāpi ca || 14 ||
martya loke ca te sarve devā devakuleṣvatha ||
maṃtrairnibaddhāḥ piṇḍīṣu sthitā mūrtibhṛto yathā ||15||
brahmā viṣṇustathā rudro ye cānye devatāgaṇāḥ ||
lokānāmupakārāya martyalokamupāgatāḥ || 16 ||
pratimāsu sthitāḥ śaśvadbhogānbhuñjati śāśvatān ||
varapradāśca bhaktānāmiti te guhyamīritam || 17 |||
tebhyaḥ purastāddātavyo dīpyamānaḥ pradīpakaḥ ||
sūryāya raktavastreṇa pūrṇavartiṃ ghṛtairyutām ||
catuḥprasthaiḥ prajvalantīṃ maṃtreṇānena dāpayet || 18 ||
.a.atadvi ṣṇoḥ paramaṃ padaṃ sadā paśyaṃti sūrayaḥ ||
divīva cakṣurātatam.a.a || 19 ||
pītavastreṇa kṛṣṇāya śvetavastreṇa śūline ||
kausuṃbhavastreṇāḍhyena gaurīmuddiśya dāpayet ||4.130.20 ||
lākṣāraktena durgāyai pūrṇavarti prabodhayet ||
nīlavastreṇa kāmāya gaṇanāthāya khādiraiḥ ||21||
nāgebhyaḥ kṛṣṇavastreṇa grahebhya iṣikā yudhām ||
devāṃganā pitṛbhyastu pitṛvartiṃ prabodhayet ||22||
viśeṣaṃ śṛṇu sūryāya pūrṇavartirnigadyate ||
śivāyeśvaravartīti bhogavartirjanārdane || 23 ||
padmavartirviriṃcāya gauryyai saubhāgyavartikā ||
nāgebhyo nāgavartīti grahavartiryudhiṣṭhira || 24 ||
netrapaṭṭena madhunā ghṛtena madhukuṃḍake ||
arcite carcite caiva lalitāyai prabodhayet || 25 ||
maṃtreṇānena rājendra tanniśāmaya vaidikam || 26 ||
.a.āgre tvāṃ kāmyayā girā tubhyaṃ tā girasastu viśvāḥ ||
sukṣitayaḥ pṛthakpṛthak || 27 ||
agne kāmāya jegire agnipriyeṣu dhāmasu ||
kāmo bhūtasya bhavyasya samrāḍeko virājati tābhyāṃ nāma svāhā.a.a || || 28 || evametena vidhinā yaḥ prayacchati dīpakam ||
vistīrṇe vipule pātre ghṛtakumbhe niyojitam || 29 ||
yāṃti te brahmasadanaṃ vimānenārkava rcasā ||
tiṣṭhaṃti dyotamānāste yāvadābhūtasaṃplavam || 4.130.30 ||
sadīpe tu yathā deśe cakṣūṃṣi balavanti hi ||
tathā dīpasya dātāro bhavaṃti saphalekṣaṇāḥ|| || 31 ||
yathaivordhvaṃ gatirnityaṃ rājandīpaśikhāsu vai ||
dīpadātustathaivordhvaṃ gatirbhavati śobhanā || 32 ||
ghṛtena dīpo dātavyo rājaṃstailena vā punaḥ ||
vasāmajjādibhirdeyo na tu dīpaḥ kathañcana || 33 ||
dīpastailena kartavyo na tu karma vijānatā ||
nirvāpaṇaṃ ca dīpasya hiṃsanaṃ ca vigarhitam || 34 ||
yaḥ kuryātkarmaṇā tena syādasau puṣpitekṣaṇaḥ ||
dīpahartā bhavatyaṃdhaḥ kāṇo nirvāpako bhavet || 35 ||
padmasūtrodbhavāṃ vartiṃ gaṃdhatailena dīpitām ||
virogaḥ subhagaścaiva dattvā bhavati mānavaḥ || 36 ||
prajvālya devadevasya karpūreṇa tu dīpakam ||
aśvamedhamavāpnoti kulaṃ caiva samuddha ret|| 37 ||
etanmayoktaṃ tava dīpadānaphalaṃ samagraṃ kuruvaṃśacandra ||
śrutvā yathāvatsatataṃ hi deyā dīpāstvayā viprasurālayeṣu || 38 ||
atrāpyudāharantīmamitihāsaṃ purātanam ||
dīpadānāllalitayā yadavāptaṃ purā.anagha || 39 ||
āsīccitrarathonāma vidarbheṣu mahīpatiḥ ||
tasya putraśataṃ rājño jajñe pañcadaśottaram || 4.130.40 ||
ekaiva kanyā tasyāsīllalitā nāma nāmataḥ ||
sarvalakṣaṇasampannā rūpeṇāpratimā bhuvi || 41 ||
tāṃ dadau kāśirājāya cārvaṃgīṃ cārudharmaṇe ||
śatānyanyāni bhāryāṇāṃ trīṇyāsaṃścārudharmaṇaḥ || 42 ||
tāsāṃ madhye.agramahiṣī lalitā sāpyathābhavat || 43 ||
viṣṇorāyatane sā tu sahasraṃ paridīpakān ||
prajvālayantyanudinaṃ divārātramanirvṛtam|| 44 ||
tāmisramāśvayukpakṣaṃ śuklapakṣaṃ ca kārttikam ||
tasyāḥ prajvalito dīpa uccasthānakṛtaḥ śubhaḥ || 45 ||
tasminkāle tathā nityaṃ brāhmaṇāvasathe ca sā ||
vyagrā bhavati sāyāhne dīpapreṣaṇatatparā || 46 ||
catuṣpatheṣu rathyāsu devatāyataneṣu ca ||
caityavṛkṣeṣu goṣṭheṣu parvatānāṃ ca mūrddhasu || 47 ||
pulineṣu nadīnāṃ ca kūpamūleṣu pāṃḍava ||
tāṃ sapatnyo.atha saṃgamya papracchuridamādṛtāḥ || 48||
lalite vada bhadraṃ te lalitaṃ vacanaṃ tathā ||
na tathā balipuṣpeṣu na tathā dvijapūjane || 49 ||
bhavatyāḥ sumahānyatno dīpaprajvālane yathā ||
tadetatkathayāsmākaṃ lalite kautukaṃ param || 4.130.50 ||
manyāmahe tvayāvaśyaṃ dīpadānaphalaṃ śrutam||
|| lalitovāca || ||
nāhaṃ matsariṇī bhadrā na ca rāgādidūṣitā || 51 ||
ekapatyāśritāḥ sādhvyo bhavatyo mama mānadāḥ ||
apṛthagdharmacaraṇāḥ śṛṇvantu gaditaṃ mama || 52 ||
mayaitaddīpadānasya yatheṣṭaṃ bhujyate phalam ||
hiraṇyadayitā bhāryā śailarājasutā varā || 53 ||
umādevīti madreṣu devikā sā saridvarā ||
narāṇāmanukampārthaṃ brahmaṇā hyavatāritā ||
śrutā kiṃ bhavatībhiḥ sā devikā pāpanāśinī || 54 ||
tasyāṃ snātvā sakṛnnadyāṃ gāṇapatyamavāpnuyāt||
tasyāmatha nṛsiṃhākhyaṃ tīrthaṃ kalmaṣanāśanam ||
hariṇā nṛsiṃhavapuṣā yatra snānaṃ kṛtaṃ purā || 55||
sauvīrarājasya purā maitreyobhūtpurohitaḥ ||
tena cāyatanaṃ viṣṇoḥ kāritaṃ devikātaṭe || 56 ||
ahanyahani śuśrūṣāṃ puṣpadhūpānulepanaiḥ ||
dīpadānādibhiścaiva cakre tatra sa vai dvijaḥ || 57 ||
kārttikyāṃ dīpakastatra pradattastena caikadā ||
āsīnnirvāṇabhūyiṣṭho devārcāsu rato niśi || 58 ||
devatāyatane.avātsaṃ tatrāhamapi mūṣikā ||
pradīpavartiharaṇe kṛtabuddhirvarānanāḥ || 59 ||
gṛhītātha mayā vartirvṛkadaṃśo rarāsa ca ||
naṣṭā cāhaṃ tatastasya mārjārasya bhayāturā || 4.130.60 ||
vaktraprāṃtena paśyaṃtyā sa dīpaḥ prerito mayā ||
jajvāla pūrvavaddīptyā tasminnāyatane punaḥ || 61 ||
mṛtāhaṃ ca punarjātā vaidarbhe rājakanyakā ||
jātismarā mahīpasya mahiṣī cārudharmaṇaḥ || 62 ||
eṣa prabhāvo dīpasya kārttike māsi śobhanaḥ ||
dattasyāyatane viṣṇo ryasyeyaṃ vyuṣṭiruttamā || 63 ||
asaṃkalpitamadhyasya preraṇaṃ yanmayā kṛtam ||
keśave bāladīpasya tasyedaṃ bhujyate phalam || 64 ||
etasmātkāra ṇāddīpānahametānaharniśam ||
prayacchāmi harergehe jātamasya mahāphalam || 65||
evamuktvā sapatnīḥ sā dīpadānaparāyaṇā ||
babhūva devadevasya keśava sya gṛhe sadā || 66 ||
tataḥ kālena mahatā saha rājñā mahātmanā ||
viṣṇulokamanuprāptā paṃcatvaṃ prāya mānadā || 67 ||
taṃ lokamāsādya nṛpeṇa sārddhaṃ sā rājapatnī kamalābhanetrā ||
reme mahīpālamudā sametā dīpapradānātsakalārtihīnā || 68 ||
dīpapradānamapi puṇyataraṃ vadaṃti viprāgnigosurakulaikagṛhāṃgaṇeṣu ||
taddānadīptavapuṣātha pathoṃdhakāre gacchannaraḥ patati na skhalate kadācit || 69 ||
iti śrībhaviṣye mahāpurāṇa uttaraparvaṇi śrīkṛṣṇayudhiṣṭhirasaṃvāde dīpadānavidhivarṇanaṃ nāma triṃśaduttaraśatatamo.adhyāyaḥ || 130 || || cha ||

vṛṣotsargavidhivarṇanam
|| śrīkṛṣṇa uvāca || ||
kārttikyāmatha vā māghyāmayameva yudhiṣṭhira || 1 ||
caitryāmatha tṛtīyāyāṃ vaiśākhyāṃ dvādaśe.ahni vā ||
khaṃḍanīlaṃ śaṃkhapādaṃ sapauṃḍraṃ dhautapuṣpakam || 2 ||
gobhiścaturbhiḥ sahitaṃ sṛjeccaiva vidhiṃ śṛṇu ||
yaduvāca purā gargo gokule.anagha pāṃḍava || 3 ||
tattehaṃ ca pravakṣyāmi vidhiṃ gargapracoditam || .
mātaraṃ sthāpayitvāgre pūjayetkusumākṣataiḥ || 4 ||
mātṛśrāddhaṃ tataḥ kuryātsadābhyudayakārakam ||
akālamūlaṃ kalaśamaśvatthadalaśobhitam || 5 ||
tatra vidvāñjapitvā tu sthāpayedrudradevatām ||
susamiddhaṃ tataḥ kṛtvā vahnimaṃtrapuraḥsaram || 6 ||
athainaṃ juhuyātṣaḍbhiḥ pṛthagāhutisaṃjñitaiḥ ||
pauṣyāmaṃtraistataḥ paścāddhutvā vahniṃ yathāvidhi || 7 ||
ekavarṇaṃ dvivarṇaṃ vā rohitaṃ śvetameva vā ||
jīvadvatsapayasvinyāḥ .annaṃ sarvāṃgasundaram || 8 ||
catasro vatsataryaśca tābhiḥ sārdha malaṃkṛtam||
tāsāṃ karṇe japedvipraḥ patiṃ vo balinaṃ śubham || 9 ||
samitāstena sahitāḥ krīḍadhvaṃ hṛṣṭamānasāḥ ||
tato vāme triśūlaṃ ca dakṣiṇe cakramālikhet|| 4.131.10 ||
aṃkitaṃ śaṃkhacakrābhyāṃ varṣitaṃ kusumādinā||
puṣpamālākṛtagrīvaṃ sitavastraiśca cchāditam || 11 ||
vimuṃcedvatsakābhiśca nīlābhirbalinaṃ vṛṣam ||
devālaye gokule vā nadīnāṃ saṃgame.atha vā || 12 ||
ityukte gargamuninā vidhānaṃ vṛṣamokṣaṇe ||
svecchāvihāriṇaṃ dṛptaṃ garjaṃtaṃ sundaraṃ gavām || 13 ||
kakudminaṃ patiṃ yā dhanye vimuñcanti govṛṣam ||
phalaṃ ca tasya vakṣyāmi bruvatāṃ me nibodha tat || 14 ||
vṛṣotsarge punātyeva daśātītāndaśāparān ||
yatkiṃcitspṛśate toyaṃ samuttīrya jalānmahīm || 15 ||
vṛṣotsṛṣṭaṃ pitṛrṇāṃ tu tadakṣayamudāhṛtam ||
yaiśca yaiśca spṛśettoyaṃ lāṃgūlādibhiraṃtataḥ || 16 ||
sarvaṃ tadakṣayaṃ tasya pitṛrṇāṃ nātra saṃśayaḥ ||
śṛṅgaiḥ khurairvā yadbhūmimullikhatyaniśaṃ vṛṣaḥ || 17 ||
madhukulyāḥ pitustasya akṣayāstā bhavaṃti vai ||
sahasratalamātreṇa taḍāgo na yathāśruti || 18 ||
pitṛrṇāṃ yā bhavettṛptistāṃ vṛṣastvatiricyate ||
yo dadāti tilairmiśrāṃstilānvā śrāddhakarmaṇi||
madhu vā nīlakhaṃḍaṃ vā akṣayaṃ sarvameva tat||19||
eṣṭavyā bahavaḥ putrā yadyeko.api gayāṃ vrajet||
yajeta vāśvamedhena nīlaṃ vā vṛṣamutsṛjet||4.131.20||
na karoti vṛṣotsargaṃ sutīrthe vā jalāñjalim||
na prayacchati yaḥ putraḥ pituruccāra eva saḥ||21||
yadbhūmimālikhati śṛṅgakhuraiḥ prahṛṣṭo yadvā karoti pratimallavṛṣānnirīkṣya|
khaṇḍaṃ samastamapi tasya vivāhakartuḥ saṃtoṣamāvahati śakrasabhāgatasya||22||
iti śrībhaviṣye mahāpurāṇa uttaraparvaṇi śrīkṛṣṇayudhiṣṭhirasaṃvāde vṛṣotsargavidhivarṇanaṃ nāmaikatriṃśaduttaraśatatamo.adhyāyaḥ || 131 || || a || ||
phālgunapūrṇimāvratavarṇanam
||yudhiṣṭhira uvāca || ||
kimarthaṃ phālgunasyāṃte paurṇamāsyāṃ janārdana ||
utsavo jāyate loke grāmegrāme pure pure|| 1 ||
kimarthaṃ śiśavastasyāṃ gehegehe.ativādinaḥ ||
holikā dīpyate kasmātphālgunāṃte kimucyate || 2 ||
aḍāḍeti ca kā saṃjñā śītoṣṇeti kimucyate ||
ko hyasyāṃ pūjyate devaḥ keneyamavatāritā ||
kimasyāṃ kriyate kṛṣṇa etadvistarato vada || 3 || ||
|| śrīkṛṣṇa uvāca || ||
āsītkṛtayuge pārtha raghurnāma narādhipaḥ ||
śūraḥ sarvaguṇopataḥ priyavādī bahuśrutaḥ || 4 ||
sa sarvāṃ pṛthivīṃ jitvā vaśīkṛtya narādhipān ||
dharmataḥ pālayāmāsa prajāḥ putrānivaurasān || 5 ||
na durbhikṣaṃ na ca vyādhirnākālamaraṇaṃ tathā ||
nādharmarucayaḥ paurāstasmiñchāsati pārthiva || 6 ||
tasyaivaṃ śāsato rājyaṃ kṣātradharmaratasya vai ||
paurāḥ sarve samāgamya pāhipāhītyathābruvan|| 7 ||
|| paurā ūcuḥ ||
asmākaṃ hi gṛhe kāciḍhḍhauṃḍhā nāmeti rākṣasī ||
divā rātrau samāgamya bālānpīḍayate balāt ||8||
rakṣayā kaṃḍakenāpi bheṣajairvā narādhipa ||
maṃtrajñaiḥ paramācāryaiḥ sā niyaṃtuṃ na śakyate || 9 ||
paurāṇāṃ vacanaṃ śrutvā raghurvismayamāgataḥ ||
vismayāviṣṭahṛdayaḥ purohitamathābravīt||4.132.10|
|| raghuruvāca || ||
ḍhauṃḍheti rākṣasī keyaṃ kiṃprabhāvā dvijottama ||
kathameṣā niyaṃtavyā mayā duṣkṛtakāriṇī || 11 ||
rakṣaṇātprocyate rājā pṛthivīpālanātpatiḥ ||
arakṣamāṇaḥ pṛthivīṃ rājā bhavati kilbiṣī || 12 ||
vaśiṣṭha uvāca ||
śṛṇu rājanparaṃ guhyaṃ yannākhyātaṃ mayā kvacit ||
ḍhauṃḍhā nāmeti vikhyātā rākṣasī mālinaḥ sutā || 13 ||
tayā cārādhitaḥ śaṃbhurugreṇa tapasā purā ||
prītastāmāha bhagavānvaraṃ varaya suvrate || 14 ||
yatte manobhilaṣitaṃ taddadāmyavicāritam ||
ḍhauṃḍhā prāha mahādevaṃ yadi tuṣṭaḥ svayaṃ mama || 15 ||
na ca vadhyāṃ surādīnāṃ manujānāṃ ca śaṃkara ||
māṃ kuru tvaṃ trilokeśa śastrāstrāṇāṃ tathaiva ca || 16 ||
śītoṣṇavarṣāsamaye divā rātrau bahirgṛhe ||
abhayaṃ sarvadā me syāttvatprasādānmaheśvara || 17 ||
śaṃkara uvāca ||
evamastvityathoktvā tāṃ punaḥ provāca śūlabhṛt ||
unmattebhyaḥ śiśubhyaśca bhayaṃ te saṃbhaviṣyati ||
ṛtāvṛtau mahābhāge mā vyathāṃ hṛdaye kṛthāḥ || 18 ||
evaṃ datvā varaṃ tasyai bhagavānbhaganetrahā ||
svapne labdho yathārthārthastatraivāṃtarhito.abhavat || 19 ||
evaṃ labdhavarā sā tu rākṣasī kāmarūpiṇī ||
nityaṃ pīḍayate bālānsaṃsmṛtya harabhāṣitam ||4.132.20||
aḍāḍayeti gṛhṇāti siddhamaṃtraṃ kuṭuṃbinī ||
gṛheṣu tena sā loke hyaḍāḍetyabhidhīyate || 21 ||
etatte sarvamākhyātaṃ ḍhauṃḍhāyāścaritaṃ mayā ||
sāṃprataṃ kathayiṣyāmi yenopāyena hanyate ||22||
adya pañcadaśī śuklā phālgunasya narādhipa ||
śītakālo viniṣkrāṃtaḥ prātargrīṣmo bhaviṣyati || 23 ||
abhayapradānaṃ lokānāṃ dīyatāṃ puruṣottama ||
yathādyāśaṃkitā lokā ramaṃti ca hasaṃti ca || 24 ||
dārujāni ca khaṃḍāni gṛhītvā samarotsukāḥ ||
yodhā iva viniryāṃtu śiśavaḥ saṃpraharṣitāḥ || 25 ||
saṃcayaṃ śuṣkakāṣṭhānāmupalānāṃ ca kārayet ||
tatrāgniṃ vidhivaddhutvā rakṣoghnairmantravistaraiḥ || 26 ||
tataḥ kilakilāśabdaistālaśabdairmanoharaiḥ ||
tamagniṃ triḥ parikramya gāyaṃtu ca hasaṃtu ca ||
jalpaṃtu svecchayā lokā niḥśaṃkā yasya yanmatam || 27 ||
tena śabdena sā pāpā homena ca nirā kṛtā ||
adṛṣṭaghātairḍiṃbhānāṃ rākṣasī kṣayameṣyati ||28||
śrīkṛṣṇa uvāca ||
tasyarṣervacanaṃ śrutvā sa nṛpaḥ pāṃḍunadana||
sarvaṃ cakāra vidhivaduktaṃ tena ca dhīmatā ||29||
gatā sā rākṣasī nāśaṃ tena cogreṇa karmaṇā ||
tataḥ prabhṛti loke.asminnaḍāḍā khyātimāgatā||4.132.30|
sarvaduṣṭāpaho homaḥ sarvarogopaśāṃtidaḥ ||
kriyate.asyāṃ dvijaiḥ pārtha tena sā holikā matā || 31 ||
sarvasārātiviśveyaṃ pūrvamāsīdyudhiṣṭhira ||
sāratvātphalgurityeṣā paramānaṃdadāyinī || 32||
asyāṃ niśāgame pārtha saṃrakṣyāḥ śiśavo gṛhe ||
gomayenopasaṃlipte sacatuṣke gṛhāṃgaṇe || 33 ||
ākārayecchiśuprāyānkhaḍgavyagra karānnarān ||
te kāṣṭhakhaṇḍaiḥ saṃspṛśya gītairhāsyakaraiḥ śiśūn ||
rakṣaṃti teṣāṃ dātavyaṃ guḍaṃ pakvānnameva ca ||34||
evaṃ ḍhauṃḍhitamātrasya sa doṣaḥ praśamaṃ vrajet ||
bālānāṃ rakṣaṇaṃ kāryaṃ tasyāttasminniśāgame || 35 ||
|| yudhiṣṭhira uvāca || ||
prabhāte kiñjanairdeva kartavyaṃ sukhamīpsubhiḥ ||
pravṛtte mādhave māsi pratipadbhāskarodaye || 36 ||
|| śrīkṛṣṇa uvāca || ||
kṛtvā cāvaśyakāryāṇi saṃtarpya pitṛdevatāḥ ||
vaṃdayeddholikābhūtiṃ sarvaduṣṭopaśāṃtaye || 37 ||
maṃḍite carcite caiva upalipte gṛhājire ||
catuṣkaṃ kārayecchreṣṭhaṃ varṇakaiścākṣataiḥ śubhaiḥ || 38 ||
tanmadhye sthāpayetpīṭhaṃ śuklavastrottara cchadam ||
agrataḥ pūrṇakalaśaṃ sthāpayetpallavairyutam|| 39 ||
sākṣataṃ sahiraṇyaṃ ca sitacandanacarcitam||
kalaśasyāgrato deyā upānahavarāṃśukāḥ||4.132.40||
āsane copaviṣṭasya brahmaghoṣeṇa bhārata ||
carcayeccandanaṃ nārī avyaṃgāṃgā sulakṣaṇā || 41 ||
padmarāgottarapaṭā śreṣṭhāṃśukavibhūṣitā ||
vasudhārāṃ śirogre ca dadhidūrvākṣatānvitām|| 42 ||
carcāpayitvā śrīkhaṃḍamāyurārogyavṛddhaye ||
paścācca prāśayedvidvāṃścūtapuṣpaṃ sacaṃdanam|| 43 ||
manobhavasya sā pūjā ṛṣibhiḥ saṃpradarśitā ||
ye pibaṃti vasaṃtādau cūtapuṣpaṃ sacandanam || 44 ||
satyaṃ hṛdisthakāmasya tatpūrtirjāyateñjasā ||
anaṃtaraṃ dvijendrāṇāṃ sūtamāgadhabaṃdinām || 45 ||
dadyāddānaṃ yathāśaktyā kāmo me prīyatāmiti ||
tato bhojanavelāyāṃ śṛtaṃ yatprāktane.ahani || 46 ||
prāśnīyātprathamaṃ cānnaṃ tato bhuñjīta kāmataḥ ||
ya evaṃ kurute pārtha śāstroktaṃ phālgunotsavam || 47 ||
anāyāsena sidhyaṃti tasya sarve manorathāḥ ||
ādhayo vyādhayaścaiva yāṃti nāśaṃ na saṃśayaḥ ||48||
putrapautrasamāyuktaḥ sukhaṃ tiṣṭhati mānavaḥ || 49 ||
puṇyā pavitrā jayadā sarvavighravināśinī ||
eṣā te kathitā pārtha tithīnāmuttamā tithiḥ || 4.132.50 ||
vṛtte tuṣārasamaye sitapañcadaśyāṃ prātarvasantasamaye samupasthite ca ||
saṃprāśya cūtakusumaṃ saha candanena satyaṃ hi pārtha puruṣaḥ sa sukhī samāste || 51 || || iti śrībhaviṣye mahāpurāṇa uttaraparvaṇi śrīkṛṣṇayudhiṣṭhirasaṃvāde phālgunapūrṇimo tsavavarṇanaṃ nāma dvātriṃśaduttaraśatatamo.adhyāyaḥ || 132 || cha ||
āndolakavidhivarṇanam
|| yudhiṣṭhira uvāca || ||
saṃtyajyālikulālīḍhakusumāni mṛdūnyapi ||
damanena kathaṃ lokaiḥ pūjyaṃte nākanāyakāḥ || 1 ||
dolāṃdolanamāhātmyaṃ rathayātrāmahotsavam ||
kathayasvāmalaṃ prājña yādavāṃbhojabhāskara || 2 || ||
|| śrīkṛṣṇa uvāca || ||
pārthārthijanasadvṛkṣa kṣāṃtidhāma dharāpate ||
yadetadbhavatā pṛṣṭaṃ tacchṛṇuṣva vadāmi te || 3 ||
purā surāṇāmāvāse maṃdare cārukaṃdare ||
gandhādhārī kulālīḍho jāto damanakastaruḥ || 4 ||
tasya gaṃdhamanāghreyamāghrāya surayoṣitaḥ ||
madanonmādavaśagā gāyaṃti ca hasaṃti ca ||5||
ṛṣayo niyamāṃstyaktvā prādravaṃta gṛhānprati ||
na vedādhyayane dhyāne ratisteṣāṃ babhūva ha ||6||
aparādhādvighaṭitaṃ yadbabhūva priye param ||
mānasaṃ māninīnāṃ tu punargaṃdhena saṃdhitam || 7 ||
gaṃdhenākulitaṃ lokaṃ dṛṣṭvā brahmā tamabravīt ||
śamanirmitayā vācā roṣātprasphuritādharaḥ || 8 || ||
|| brahmovāca || ||
jātastvaṃ lokadamanānnūnaṃ damanako mayā ||
jagadvā ghūrṇase kasmātkarma naitattavocitam|| 9 ||
yatsaṃtastvanumanyaṃte sarvātiśayavarjitam ||
tatseveta naraḥ karma yatrodvego na dhīmatām || 4.133.10 ||
ekasyāpyapakāraṃ yaḥ karoti sa narādhamaḥ ||
bahūnāmapakārāya saṃpravṛtaḥ kimucyate || 11 ||
dṛṣṭārthabādhakaṃ karma na kartavyaṃ kathaṃcana ||
adṛṣṭaṃ prati saṃdehaḥ sosmābhiranumīyate || 12 ||
tataḥ svayaṃ prabhajati daivapitrye ca karmaṇi ||
bhogārthe ca tribhuvananirādeyo bhaviṣyati || 13 ||
|| damanaka uvāca || ||
puruṣādevamārabdhaṃ na krodhānnārthakāraṇāt ||
svabhāva eṣa me brahmaṃstvayā sṛṣṭaḥ purā vibho || 14 ||
yā yasya jaṃtoḥ prakṛtiḥ śubhā vā yadi vetarā ||
sa tasyāmeva ramate duṣkṛte sukṛte tathā || 15 ||
tatsvabhāvapravṛttasya yadi śāpastvayā mama ||
pradattaḥ kiṃ karomyetanna kṛtyamaparādhyati || 16 ||
yuktiyuktaṃ vacaḥ śrutvā damanena samīritam ||
prītātmā padmajaḥ prāha karomi tava satpriyam || 17 ||
vasaṃte sahakārotthamaṃjarīpiṃjare jane ||
puṣpitāśokaśobhāḍhye vane puṃskokilākule || 18 ||
tasminkāle sureśānāṃ śirāṃsyākramya līlayā ||
sthāsyasi tvaṃ dinaṃ caikaṃ yadyasya vihitaṃ hitam || 19 ||
ye tvāmāropayiṣyaṃti dānamānapurassarāḥ ||
surāṇāṃ te bhaviṣyaṃti sadaiva sukhino narāḥ || 4.133.20 ||
sarvadaiva śivasyeṣṭā puṇyā pāpabhayāpahā ||
prasiddhiṃ yāsyati madhau damanākhyā caturdaśī || 21 ||
evamuktvā yayau brahmā damano maṃdare girau ||
uvāsa vāsitāśeṣabhuvano gaṃdhasampadā || 22 ||
divye girau girisu nādayitādhivāse ratnāṃśukacchuritakāñcanabhūmibhāge ||
śāpaṃ varaṃ ca hṛdaye viniveśya śaṃbhostatrāsthito damanako damitāṃtarātmā || 23 || || || śrīkṛṣṇa uvāca || ||
dharmarājaṃ nibodhedamāṃdolakamahotsavam ||
pravṛttanaranārīkaṃ pañcamoccārasundaram||24||
sānaṃdaṃ naṃdanavane ārdrayā sahito yathā ||
vismayasmeranayano babhrāmodvāṃtasaurabhaḥ || 25 ||
unmādayanvane puṇye vidyādharagaṇānbahūn||
vasaṃtartau nṛtyamānānsurāsuraśatārcitaḥ || || 26 ||
saṃtānapārijātotthāṃ baddhvā sa mādhavīlatām ||
kaścidāṃdolanaṃ cakre samāliṃgya ghanastanīm || 27 || gītamāṃdolakārūḍhastadgāyaṃtyamara striyaḥ ||
yena cotpādayaṃti sma manmathasyāpi manmatham || 28 ||
taṃ dṛṣṭvāṣṭāpadanibhā bhavānī prāha śaṃkaram ||
kautukaṃ me sabhutpannaṃ paśyemāḥ śaṃkara prabho || 29 ||
āṃdolakaṃ mama kṛte kārayasva svalaṃkṛtam ||
tvayā sahāṃdolayeyaṃ yathā caite trilocana||4.133.30||
tadgaurīvacanaṃ ramyaṃ śrutvā govṛṣabhadhvajaḥ ||
saddolāṃ kārayāmāsa samāhūya mahāsurān ||31||
staṃbhadvayaṃ ropayitvā iṣṭāpūrtamayaṃ dṛḍham ||
satyaṃ caivoparitataṃ śreṣṭhaṃ kāṣṭhamakalpayat || ||32||
vāsukiṃ daṃḍakasthāne baddhvā tāṃtavasaprabham ||
tatphaṇāmaṃtarāpīṭhaṃ kṛtavānmaṇimaṃḍitam || 33 ||
kṛmikārpāsakauśeyavastraiḥ saṃveṣṭitaṃ navaiḥ || sragdāmālaṃbitaprāṃtamaṇimauktikaśekharam||34||
racayitvā vicitrāṃ tāṃ dolāṃ cailājinottarām ||
sa siddhāṃ siddhagurave gauraveṇa nyavedayat ||35||
tatrārūḍhastu yāvatsa saumyasomavibhūṣaṇaḥ ||
maṃdaraṃ dolayāmāsa pārśvasthaiḥ pārṣadaiḥ saha ||36||
vāmapārśve tu vijayā dakṣiṇena jayā bhavet ||
cāmarākrāṃtabāhū te tenāśliṣṭe nyavījatām || 37 ||
āṃdolayaṃtyā pārvatyā sahitaṃ sa gadākṣaram ||
yena devāsurastraiṇamāsīdānaṃdanirbharam || 38 ||
jagurgaṃdharvapatayo nanṛtuścāpsarogaṇāḥ ||
ucchalattālavādyāni vādayaṃti sma cāraṇāḥ || 39 ||
celuḥ kulācalāḥ sarve cukṣubhuḥ sapta sāgarāḥ ||
vavurvātāḥ sanirghātā deve dolāṃ samāsthite || 4.133.40 ||
ālokya vyākulaṃ lokaṃ devāḥ śakrapurogamāḥ ||
upetya praṇipatyocuḥ sarvapāpaharaṃ param || 41 ||
upāramasva bhagavanbhavataḥ krīḍayānayā ||
jagadvyāpadyate deve calitaḥ sāgaraśca yat || 42||
gīrvāṇagīrbhiḥ saṃhṛṣṭaḥ śaṃkaro lokaśaṃkaraḥ ||
samutpapāta dolātaḥ praharṣotphullalocanaḥ || 43 ||
uvāca vacanaṃ pārtha surasārthasya paśyataḥ ||
sānukaṃpaṃ sulalitaṃ visphuṭārthapadākṣaram || 44 ||
śrīmahādeva uvāca ||
adya prabhṛti ye dolākrīḍāṃ puṣkariṇītaṭe ||
vasaṃte kārayiṣyaṃti maṃḍite tridaśāṃgaṇe || 45 ||
netrapaṭṭāpaṭacchannāṃ padmarāgavibhūṣi tām ||
ātapatreṇa saṃyuktāṃ vinyastakanakāṃḍakām || 46 || vicitrābharaṇābhābhirābhāsitadigaṃtarām ||
tārakāśāṃtacitrāṃgapuṣpamālāmanoramām || 47 |
mālāṃ vidyādharākrātāṃ prāṃtaropitadarpaṇām ||
chatracāmarasaṃchannāṃ yathā śaktyāpyalaṃkṛtām || 48 ||
agnikāryaṃ tataḥ kṛtvā kṣiptvā caiva diśāṃ balim || tasyāmāropayeddevamiṣṭahṛṣṭajanāvṛtaḥ || 49 ||
mūlamaṃtreṇa devānāṃ proktaṃ dolādhirohaṇam ||
pārśvastho brāhmaṇo vidvānpaṭhedvā maṃtramuttamam || 4.133.50 ||
gaṃbhīrāṃtaranirghoṣairlalanānāṃ ca nisvanaiḥ ||
stutimaṃgalaśabdaiśca puṣpadhūpāghivāsitām || 51 ||
etasminnantare nārīṃ dohanāya nikuṭṭakām ||
praveśayetkuṃkumāḍhyāṃ krīḍāvarṇapriyaiḥ saha || 52 ||
suvarṇaśṛṃgiṇā proktaṃ smitadaṃtāṃśukarburam ||
lagamānaṃ jalaṃ cāṃge kasya na syātsukhapradam || 53 ||
jalasaṃklinnavasano raśanādāmamaṃḍitaḥ ||
kambugrīvollasansarvo babhūva gaṇikāgaṇaḥ || 54 ||
kuṃkumakṣodatāṃbūlapuṣpamālākulo janaḥ ||
tāṃ vihāya jalakrīḍāṃ nānyasyā vidadhe manaḥ || 55 ||
pītaśītajalāghātatāḍito.api janaḥ sukham ||
manyate niyataḥ kopi prabhāvo.ayamanaṃgajaḥ || 56 ||
evaṃ ye tu gamiṣyaṃti narā vartmatayā gatam ||
nīrujaste bhaviṣyaṃti sukhitāḥ śaradāṃ śatam || 57 ||
putrapautrasamā yuktā dhanadhānyasamāyutāḥ ||
vihṛtya sukhasaṃpattau tato yāsyaṃti matpuram || 58 ||
prāpte vasaṃtasamaye surasattamānāmāndolanaṃ suravarānanukurvate ye ||
te prāpnuvaṃti bhuvi janmataroḥ phalāni duḥkhārṇavātkulaśatānyapi tārayaṃti || 59 || || iti śrībhaviṣye mahāpurāṇa uttaraparvaṇi śrīkṛṣṇayudhiṣṭhi rasaṃvāde āndolakavidhivarṇanaṃ nāma trayastriṃśaduttaraśatatamo.adhyāyaḥ || 133 || || cha ||
damanakāṃdolakarathayātrāmahotsavavarṇanam
|| śrīkṛṣṇa uvāca || ||
rathayātrāvidhānaṃ te katha yāmi yudhiṣṭhira ||
sthiro bhūtvā nibodhedaṃ tvaṃ hi mūrtavidāṃ varaḥ || 1 ||
caitre trinetrasaṃbhūtamalayākhyamahāgirau ||
pravahatpavanadhvānapreṃkholitalatācaye || 2 ||
etasminneva kāle tu bhramamāṇo yadṛcchayā ||
nāradaḥ śāradākāṃtācchivaloke samāyayau || 3 ||
dṛṣṭvāpūrvaṃ śivaṃ śāṃtaṃ sureśaiḥ sarvato vṛtam ||
praṇamyopāviśadvipraḥ purataḥ keśaveśayoḥ || 4 ||
tamupāsīnamālakṣya bhagavānbhaganetrahā ||
papracchācchāditamanāḥ kutaścāgamyate punaḥ || 5 ||
|| śrīnārada uvāca || ||
śiva kāmaṃ ca taṃ viddhi dagdhaṃ mā vibudhottama ||
vasaṃto nāma ko.apyeṣa kāmasya dayitaḥ sakhā || 6 ||
malayānilayuktena tena viśvaṃ vaśīkṛtam ||
