sahakārakarīndrasthaṃ kṛtvā kokilaḍiṃḍimam || 7 ||
poṣayāmāsa vijayaṃ manmathasya purepure ||
śaśāṃkaśekharaḥ ko.ayaṃ koyaṃ śaṃkhagadādharaḥ || 8 ||
koyaṃ ca ḍimbo vā brahmā kāmastrijagatāṃ prabhuḥ ||
prāyaḥ krīḍāratirloko vasaṃtavacanātpunaḥ || 9 ||
ūrdhvabāhustu narnarti tāladattapadakramaḥ ||
vyavasāyaṃ na gacchaṃti ye saṃhṛtya vanāṃtaram || 4.134.10 ||
gāyaṃtaśca parīhṛṣṭāste cāpyāyāṃti yāṃti ca ||
gopyasīmāṃtaragatāḥ kṣetrasthānasya rakṣiṇaḥ || 11 ||
te.api gāyaṃti nṛtyaṃti hasaṃti smaratārakāḥ ||
karasya tāḍane.atyarthaṃ murajo dhurdharāyate || 12 ||
viṭaṃ paśyaṃti kulaṭāḥ prārabdhocitapaṇḍitāḥ ||
sumanāṃsi susaṃgītanṛtyavādyasuvāditam || 13 ||
evametattriloke.asminniti vyavasito janaḥ ||
lalallambastanīṃ dṛṣṭvā jarā yoṣāpi nṛtyati || 14 ||
vasaṃtasya prabhāvo.ayaṃ ko.apyapūrvo vijṛṃbhate ||
sarāṃsyadbhutapadmāni praphullā puṣpavāṭikāḥ || 15 ||
vṛkṣāḥ pakṣiśatākīrṇā vijighrāṇamukhāḥ surāḥ ||
vikaṃpavasanāvālaḥ pavanastriguṇātmakaḥ ||16||
kṛtaḥ pratyakṣasumahānvasaṃto na jagattraye ||
avajalpamukhā bālā vṛddhāstu vikaladvijāḥ || 17 ||
ubhāvapi pratapyete paśyedaṃ kāmaceṣṭitam ||
pakṣiṇāṃ pakṣanikṣepairnadyastuṃgataraṃgakaiḥ || 18 ||
pādapāḥ pallavaśatairnṛtyaṃte ca praharṣiṇaḥ ||
etacchrutvā tu vacanaṃ nāradasyenduśekharaḥ || 19 ||
kautukākulitaḥ śīghramāruroha rathaṃ svakam ||
rathena kāñcanāṃgena patatrivaraketanaḥ || 4.134.20 ||
prayayau puṇḍarīkākṣaḥ śaṃkhacakragadādharaḥ ||
pārāvatapratīkāśaṃ caturvedamayaṃ ratham || 21 ||
āsthāya prayayau hṛṣṭo brahmā brāhmaṇasaṃstutaḥ ||
munibhiścāpsarobhiśca yakṣarakṣomahoragaiḥ || 22 ||
vṛto rathena prayayau bhāskaro vāritaskaraḥ ||
śailajorupatākena rathenādityavarcasā || 23 ||
kātyāyanī pracalitā pañcavaktreṇa ketunā ||
laṃbodaraḥ karaśatagṛhītakanakotpalaḥ || 24 ||
prayātaḥ svarathārūḍhaḥ kṛtakarṇakulākulaḥ ||
evaṃ devaḥ parivṛto bhagavāngovṛṣadhvajaḥ || 25 ||
rathārūḍhairamūḍhātmā martyalokamavātarat ||
yāvatpaśyati deveśastāvatsarvaṃ tadakṣaram || 26 ||
nāradena yathaivoktastāvatsarvaṃ tadakṣaram ||
nāradena yathaivoktaṃ jagadānandanirbharam || 27 ||
devaiḥ sārddhaṃ paśupatiryāvatpaśyati vismitaḥ ||
tāvattasyaiva hi gaṇāḥ parabrahmasamaṃjasam || 28 ||
gāyaṃti kecitsotkaṃṭhaṃ luṭhaṃtyanye praharṣitāḥ ||
vādayaṃtyapare tuṣṭā jahasuḥ kecidulbaṇam || 29 ||
vādayaṃtyanyathā vādyaṃ gāyaṃtyanyenyathā gaṇāḥ ||
anyenyathā pranṛtyaṃti citraṃ caitrasya ceṣṭitam || 4.134.30 || nīlotpalābhanayanairvilasatprāṃtatārakaiḥ ||
krīḍāratibhirārabdhamālāpaiśca surairapi || 31 ||
surāṇāṃ kṣobhamālakṣya bhagavāngovṛṣadhvajaḥ ||
cintayāmāsa sumahānkāryayogo hyupasthitaḥ || 32 ||
anarthamutthitaṃ tadvattadvighātāya ye janāḥ ||
nayaṃte ye.atimūrkhatvādāpado.abhibhavaṃti tān || 33 ||
vasaṃtaḥ svāmibhaktatvānmānyapuṣpākaraṃ yadā ||
unmādāḍhyajano rakṣyaḥ kāryaṃ kāryadvayaṃ mama || 34 ||
saṃciṃtyaivaṃ samānāyya vasaṃtaṃ prāha śaṃkaraḥ ||
samānīto māsamekaṃ sthātavyaṃ bhavatā tviha || 35 ||
sitapakṣaḥ sahāyo.ayaṃ sarvabhūtasukhapradaḥ ||
bhavatyatimahānando viśeṣeṇa divaukasām || 36 ||
yo yathā rathamārūḍhaḥ samāyātaḥ samīkṣitum ||
varṣevarṣe sa tenaiva saṃsthānenāgamiṣyati || 37 ||
kārayiṣyanti ye martyā rathayātrāmahotsavam ||
te divyabhogabhoktāro bhaviṣyanti nirāmayāḥ || 38 ||
evamābhāṣya bhagavānvasaṃtaṃ ca tataḥ suraiḥ ||
saṃstuto.atha nataścāpi svasthānamagamattataḥ || 39 ||
|| yudhiṣṭhira uvāca || ||
rathaḥ kimātmakaḥ kāryaḥ kāryā yātrā kathaṃ bhavet ||
āropayetkathaṃ devānrathe vada jagatpate || 4.134.40 ||
|| śrīkṛṣṇa uvāca || ||
suvicitraṃ citratanuṃ śreṣṭhakāṣṭhamayaṃ ratham ||
sudṛḍhākṣaṃ dṛḍhābaṃdhaṃ sucakrarathakūbaram || 41 ||
atha vā vaṃśavihitaṃ netrapaṭṭapaṭāvṛtam ||
tārakāśatacitrāṃśaṃ puṣpamālāvibhūṣitam || 42 ||
sitagoyugasaṃyuktaṃ pañcabāṇapatākinam ||
chatracāmaraśobhāḍhyaṃ sthāpayedbhavanāṅgaṇe || 43 ||
vaiśvadevaṃ tataḥ kuryādgrahayajñavidhānataḥ ||
catuścaraṇakairmaṃtrairvipra śāntikapauṣṭikaiḥ || 44 ||
āropayedrathe devaṃ mūlamaṃtreṇa maṃtravit ||
vedoktairathapaurāṇairgaṃdhadhūpādhivāsite || 45 ||
rathe tiṣṭhannayati vājinaḥ puro yatrayatra kāmayate suṣārathiḥ ||
abhīṣūṇāṃ mahimānaṃ panāyata manuḥ paścādanuyacchanti raśmayaḥ||
śaṃkhaduṃdubhinirghoṣaiḥ kāhalānāṃ ca niḥsvanaiḥ||
hastadīpaiḥ prajvalitaistālakolāhā lena ca || 47 ||
doṣāsukhena ramitaṃ preṣaṇīyapuraḥsaram ||
mahatotsavabhāreṇa bhrāmayetparito ratham||48||
tāṃbūlāni rathe dadyātpuṣpamālāyutāni ca ||
rathavoḍhraṃ pradadyāttu prekṣakebhyo.apyavāritam || 49 ||
yasyayasya gṛhebhyeti prerito rathinā rathaḥ||
tasya tasya bhavetpūjyaḥ puṣpadhūpākṣatādibhiḥ ||| || 4.134.50 ||
itaro.api bhavetpūjyaḥ saṃprāpte gṛhiṇāṃ gṛhe ||
kiṃ punarjagatāṃ bhartā sarvalokamaheśvaraḥ || 51 ||
kadācidakṣabhaṅgaḥ syāddhvajabhaṃgo.atha vā bhavet||
bhajyeta vā yugamadhye nahanaṃ truṭyate yadi || 52 ||
brāhmaṇāṃstatra saṃpūjya homaḥ kāryo vijānatā ||
tilairājyena payasā yena saṃpadyate sukham || || 53 ||
preraṇīprekṣaṇīyaiśca bhrāmayitvā rathottamam ||
sthāpayennagarasyāṃtastatra kuryānmahotsavam || 54 || dolāgrāhaiścakradolābhramairḍamarakaistathā ||
vidyādharīṇāṃ caritamitarābhiḥ prakāśyate || 55 ||
evaṃ yaḥ kurute pārtha sukhadaṃ tu rathotsavam ||
tathaiva pūjayetpārtha upavāsaparo naraḥ || 56 |||
sarvavyādhivihīnaśca sukhī syāccharadāṃ śatam ||
yaḥ kārayitvā sauvarṇaṃ raupyaṃ vā rathamuttamam || 57 ||
varṇakaiścitritaṃ divyaṃ dārujaṃ vā suśobhanam||
svahastaracitaṃ yaśca bhāskarāya nivedayet || 58 ||
sa martyaloke sucirātsukhāni ca samaśnute ||
pūrvoktavidhinā bhānuṃ bhrāmayitvā rathe sthitam || || 59 ||
sthāpayetsarvabhāge tu geyaṃ vādyapuraḥsaram ||
dakṣiṇe tu diśo bhāge dvitīye.ahni nayedratham || 4.134.60 ||
tatrāpi jāgaraṃ kuryādvādyagītasumaṃ galaiḥ ||
aparāyāṃ tṛtīye.ahni sthāpayedrathamuttamam || 61 ||
prekṣaṇīyavinodena tāṃ rātrimativāhayet ||
sthāpayeduttarasyāṃ tu caturthe divase ratham || ||62 ||
mahāyātrāṃ prakurvīta tatrāpyadbhutaceṣṭitam ||
paṃcame divase prāpte nagarāṃtasthitaṃ ravim || 63
pūjayitvā vidhānena ṣaṣṭhe.ahni bhavanaṃ nayet ||
rathayātrāprasaṃgena kathitā rathasaptamī || 64 ||
sarvapāpaharā puṇyā kiñcidanyannibodha me ||
gaurī pūjyā tṛtīyāyāṃ caturthyāṃ vighnanāyakaḥ || 65 ||
pañcamyāṃ paṃkajakarāṃ pūjayedvā sarasvatīm ||
ṣaṣṭhyāṃ śaktidharaṃ skandaṃ saptamyāṃ tu divākaram || 66 ||
aṣṭamyāṃ ca caturdaśyāṃ sampūjyaḥ śaśiśekharaḥ ||
navamyāṃ pūjayeccaṇḍīṃ cāmuṇḍāṃ muṇḍamālinīm || 67 ||
daśamyāmṛṣayaḥ śāṃtāḥ sarve vyāsapurassarāḥ ||
ekādaśyāṃ cakrapāṇiṃ dvādaśyāṃ vā samarcayet||68||
trayodaśyāṃ trinetrotthavahninā śāṃtavigraham||
sādhāraṇī tu sarveṣāṃ paurṇamāsī tithiḥ smṛtā||69||
āṃdolake madanake rathayātrāsu caiva hi||
vyutkrameṇāpi kartavyā tithīnāṃ kāryagauravāt||
yātrā vāsaṃtikī ceyaṃ cittasvāsthyakarī parā||4.134.70||
samyaksudhādhavalite bhavane surāṇāmaṃtassuvastramaṇimauktikadānacitre || tāṃbūlakakramukavāravilāsinībhiryātrāṃ vidhāya bhavatīha sa bhārateśaḥ || || 71 || || iti śrībhaviṣye mahāpurāṇa uttaraparvaṇi śrīkṛṣṇayudhiṣṭhirasaṃvāde damanakāṃdolakarathayātrāmahotsavavarṇanaṃ nāma catustriṃśaduttaraśatatamo .adhyāyaḥ || 134 || || cha ||
madanamahotsavavarṇanam
|| śrīkṛṣṇa uvāca || ||
gaurīṃ vivāhya jagrāha haraḥ pāśupataṃ vratam ||
umāpatiḥ paśupatirdhyānāsakto babhūva ha || 1 ||
brahmādibhiḥ samāmaṃtrya vibudhaiḥ putralabdhaye ||
gauryā manobhilaṣitapūraṇāya praharṣitaiḥ || 2 ||
prahitaḥ kṣobhaṇārthāya samartha iti manmathaḥ||
tato māraḥ smaraḥ kāmopyājagāma tamāśramam || 3 || ratiprītimadonmādavasaṃtaśrīsahāyavān ||
nidhānavāruṇīdarpaśṛṃgāraiḥ parivāritaḥ || 4 ||
āmrāśokavanottaṃso mālatīkṛtaśekharaḥ ||
vīṇāmṛdaṃgasaṃgītakokilāśṛṃgadūtakaḥ ||5||
jhallarīvādyasaṃghuṣṭabhāṃḍāgārikalekhakaḥ ||
pānamattāṅganārūḍho hindolāścaryamaṃtrimān || 6 ||
dakṣiṇānilagaṃdhāḍhyaḥ kaṭākṣekṣitavarṣavān ||
mahārājādhirājo vā smaraḥ prāpto harāṃtikam || 7 ||
sa puṣpacāpamākṛṣya madanonmādanaṃ śaram ||
cikṣepa tripuraghnāya samādherbhaṃgahetave || 8 ||
buddhvā taṃ tasya saṃkalpaṃ rudraḥ krodhājjvalanruṣā ||
lalāṭādvahnimasṛjattṛtīya nayanāddharaḥ || 9 ||
kāmo vilokitastena bhasmībhūtaśca tatkṣaṇāt ||
dagdhaṃ dṛṣṭvā smaraṃ śokādratiprītī sthite sadā || 4.135.10 ||
karuṇaṃ vilapaṃtyau te sarvamanyaddiśaṃ gatam ||
tataḥ śokārtahṛdayā gaurī rudramuvāca ha || 11 ||
bhagavannasmadarthe taṃ kāmaṃ nirdagdhavānasi ||
tenaite paśya nāryau te kāmasya ruditaḥ katham || 12 ||
kuru prasādaṃ deveśa ratiprītye vṛṣadhvaja ||
saṃjīvaya smaraṃ śaṃbho mūrtimaṃtaṃ punaḥ kuru || 13 ||
tacchrutvā tu mahādevo hṛṣṭaḥ provāca pārvatīm ||
upaplutaṃ jagatsarvaṃ manmathena śarīriṇā || 14 ||
mayā dagdhasya kāmasya punarāgamanaṃ kutaḥ ||
kiṃ tu te mānayanvākyaṃ karomi saphalaṃ priye||15 ||
asminvasaṃtasamaye śuklapakṣe trayodaśī ||
asyāṃ manobhavo devi bhaviṣyati śarīravān || 16 ||
etena bījabhūtena jagadvarṇiṣyate.akhilam ||
evaṃ varamimaṃ dattvā manmathāya yudhiṣṭhira ||17||
jagāma himavacchṛṃgaṃ kailāsaṃ pārvatīpriyaḥ ||
tadetatsarvamākhyātaṃ smarasya caritaṃ nṛpa || 18 ||
pūjāvidhānamaparaṃ kathayāmi śṛṇuṇva tat ||
asyāṃ snātvā trayodaśyāmaśokākhyaṃ nagaṃ likhet || 19 ||
sindūrajanitairaṃgairatiprīti samanvitam |
kāmadevaṃ vasaṃtaṃ ca vājivaktraṃ jhaṣadhvajam || 4.135.20 ||
sauvarṇaṃ vā mahārāja vārkṣaṃ citramathāpi vā ||
līlāvilāsagamanaṃ garvitaṃ sāpsa rogaṇam ||21||
gandharvagītavāditraprekṣaṇīyasamākulam ||
naṃdyāvartiratikrīḍāprītividyādharairyutam ||22||
madhyāhne bhojayedbhaktyā bhakṣyairdhūpaiḥsragaṃbaraiḥ||
maṃtreṇānena kauṃteya naro nāryā samanvitaḥ || 23 ||
namo vāmāya kāmāya devadevāya mūrtaye ||
brahmaviṣṇuśivendrāṇāṃ manaḥkṣobhakarāya vai || 24 ||
kṛtvaivamarcayitvā tu devadevamanobhavam ||
tatastasyāgrato deyā modakā mukhamodakāḥ || 25 ||
nānāprakārānbhakṣyāṃśca kāmo me prīyatāmiti ||
tato visarjayedviprāndattvā yugmaṃ sadakṣiṇam || 26 ||
svapatiṃ pūjayennārī vastramālāvibhūṣaṇaiḥ ||
kāmo.ayamiti saṃciṃtya prahṛṣṭenāṃtarātmanā ||27||
manmathāyatane tasminyajamānaḥ suhṛdvṛtaḥ ||
rātrau jāgaraṇaṃ kuryātsukharātriryathā bhavet || 28 ||
karpūrakuṃkumakṣodagaṃdhatāṃbūlasarjanaiḥ ||
nānāprakārairbhakṣyaiśca kuryādrātrau mahotsavam || 29 ||
dīpaprajvālanairnṛtyaiḥ prekṣaṇaiḥ prekṣaṇotsavaiḥ ||
evaṃ yaḥ kurute pārtha varṣevarṣe mahotsavam || 4.135.30 ||
vasaṃtasamaye prāpte hṛṣṭastuṣṭo nṛpaḥ pure ||
tasya saṃvatsaraṃ yāvalloko rogairvimucyate || 31 ||
subhikṣaṃ kṣemamārogyaṃ yaśaḥ śrīḥ saukhyamuttamam ||
kāmavarṣī ca parjanyastasminrāṣṭre prajāyate || 32 ||
tuṣyate tu bhṛśaṃ devo dvādaśārddhārddhalocanaḥ ||
tathā kāmaśca viṣṇuśca vasaṃtaśca prajāpatiḥ || 33||
candrasūryādikā sarve grahā brahmarṣayastathā ||
sarve.api tasya tuṣyaṃti yakṣagaṃdharvadānavāḥ || 34 ||
asurā yātudhānāśca suparṇāḥ patagā nagāḥ ||
tuṣṭāḥ prayacchaṃti sukhaṃ tasya karturna saṃśayaḥ || 35 ||
caitrotsave sakalalokamanonivāsaṃ kāmaṃ vasaṃtamalayādrimarutsahāyam ||
ratyā sahārcya puruṣaḥ pravarā ca yoṣitsaubhāgyarūpasutasaukhyayutā sadā syāt || 36 || iti śrībhavidhye mahāpurāṇa uttaraparvaṇi śrīkṛṣṇayudhiṣṭhira rasaṃvāde madanamahotsavavarṇanaṃ nāma pañcatriṃśaduttaraśatatamo.adhyāyaḥ || 135 || cha ||
bhūtamātryutsavavarṇanam
|| yudhiṣṭhira uvāca || ||
bhūtamāteti saṃhṛṣṭe grāmegrāme purepure ||
gāyannṛtyanhasa~mllokaḥ sarvataḥ paridhāvati || 1 ||
unmattavatpralapati kṣitau patati mattavat ||
kruddhavaddhāvati purānmattavatkarṣate bahiḥ || 2 ||
mukhāṃgabhaṃgānkurute loke vātagṛhītavat ||
bhūtavadbhasmagātraṃ tu kardamānavagāhate || 3 ||
kimeṣa śāstranirdiṣṭo mārgaḥ kimuta laukikaḥ ||
muhyate me manaḥ kṛṣṇa tvaṃ tu vaktumihārhasi || 4 ||
|| śrīkṛṣṇa uvāca || ||
śṛṇu pārtha pravakṣyāmi yatte kiñcinmanogatam ||
āstikaḥ śraddadhānaśca bhavatīti matirmama || 5 ||
pārvatyā sahitaḥ pārtha mandare cārukandare ||
krīḍannāste mudā yukto divyakrīḍanakairharaḥ || 6 ||
haṃsonnatagatiṃ cārukumbhabhrājikucadvayam ||
siñjatsadraśanāṃ hṛṣṭāṃ dṛṣṭvā gaurīṃ jagadguruḥ || 7 ||
dagdhakāmo.api ca haraḥ saṃdīptamadano.abhavat ||
niḥsṛtāṃ kāmayāmāsa mahārhaśayane śivaḥ || 8 ||
ratasthayostayorjātaṃ divyavarṣaśataṃ yadā ||
tadā devīsamucchrāyanirodhānnirgatā bahiḥ||9||
mūtrodakātsamuttasthau nārī nirdāritodarā ||
kṛṣṇā karālavadanā piṃgākṣā muktamūrddhajā || 4.136.10 ||
kapālamālābharaṇā baddhapiṃḍordhvapiṃḍikā ||
khaṭvāṅgakaṃ kāladharā mudrāṅkitakarā śivā || 11 ||
vyāghracarmāṃbaradharā raṇatkiṃkiṇimekhalā ||
ḍamaḍḍamaḍḍamarukā phūtkārāpūritāṃbarā || 12 |||
tasyāḥ pārśvānujāścānyā gītavādyalayānugāḥ ||
uttālatālamabalā nṛtyaṃti ca hasaṃti ca || 13 ||
kapālakhaṭvāṅgadharā gajacarmāvaguṇṭhitāḥ ||
tathaiva śaṃkarājjātastadrūpābharaṇaḥ pumān || 14 ||
anugamyamāno bahubhirbhūtairatibhayaṃkaraiḥ ||
siṃhaśārdūlavadanai radanollikhitāṃbaraiḥ || 15 ||
ekībhūtaiḥ kṣaṇenaiva tau bhavānībhavodbhavau ||
dṛṣṭvā hṛṣṭamanā devaḥ prāha devīṃ suvismitām || 16 ||
kalyāṇi paśya paśyaitau mattvadaṅgasamudbhavau ||
bībhatsādbhutaśṛṃgāravarāyudhavidhāriṇau || 17 ||
bhrātṛbhāṃḍau yathā devi tadvadetau matau mama ||
nṛnāryoraṃtaraṃ kiñcitsādṛśyātpratibhāsayet || 18 ||
bhrātṛbhāṃḍā bhūtamātā tathaivodakasevikā ||
saṃjñātrayaṃ tayoḥ kṛtvā tataḥ prādādvaraṃ haraḥ || 19 ||
bhuktvārhopagatāṃ caitāṃ jarattarutale sthitām ||
sevayiṣyaṃti ye bhaktyā jalasaṃpūrṇakaṃḍukaiḥ || 4.136.20 ||
candanena samālabhya puṣpadhūpairathārcya tām ||
bhojayetkṣiprayā caiva kṛśarāpūpapāyasaiḥ || 21 ||
ya evaṃ kurute devi bhaktibhāvena bhāvitaḥ ||
sa putrapaśuvṛddhiṃ ca śarīrārogyamāpnuyāt || 22 ||
na śākinyo gṛhe tasya na piśācā na rākṣasāḥ ||
pīḍāṃ kurvaṃti śiśavo yāṃti vṛddhiṃ nirāmayāḥ || 23 ||
|| yudhiṣṭhira uvāca || ||
kadā pūjā prakartavyā bhūtamātuḥ sukhārthibhiḥ ||
puruṣaiḥ puruṣavyāghra yattanme vaktumarhasi || 24 ||
|| śrīkṛṣṇa uvāca || ||
sarvatraiṣā bhagavatī bālānāṃ hitakāriṇī ||
nāmabhedaiḥ kriyābhedaiḥ kālabhedaiśca pūjyate || 25 ||
pratipatprabhṛti jyeṣṭhe yāvatpaṃcadaśī tithiḥ ||
tāvatpūjā prakartavyā preraṇaiḥ prekṣaṇīyakaiḥ || 26 ||
vikarmaphalanirdeśaḥ pāṃḍavānāṃ viḍaṃbanam||
pradṛśyaṃte hāsyaparairnarairadbhutaceṣṭitaiḥ || 27 ||
viśvāsyadhanalobhena saṃdhyāyāṃ nihataḥ pathi ||
ārohaṇaṃ ca śūlāgre na paśyaṃtaṃ hi paśyati || 28 ||
dṛṣṭo bhavadbhiḥ saṃhṛṣṭaḥ parapārāvamarśakaḥ ||
chittvā svahastairyaddatto vibhunā mukhyamodakaḥ || 29 ||
śīrṇasūkṣmeṇa patreṇa bālā mālānumoditāḥ ||
muṣkabhugrāsamārūḍho mukhaṃ kṛtvā ca paścime || 4.136.30 ||
he janāḥ kiṃ na paśyadhvaṃ svāmidrohakaraṃ param || karapatrairvidāryaṃtamucchalacchoṇitacchaṭam||31||
caraiḥ kilāsaiḥ saṃprāptaḥ sarvodvegakaraḥ param ||
daṃḍaprahārābhihato nīyate daṃḍapāśikaiḥ || 32 ||
prekṣakairveṣṭitaḥ steno raṭatyeṣa vimohitaḥ ||
saṃyamya nīyateyaṃ tu mūrkhaḥ krauryāvilekṣaṇaḥ || 33 ||
sitakeśaṃ sitaśmaśrusitāṃbaradharaṃ dvijam ||
vaṭaceṣṭācapeṭābhirhanyamānaṃ na paśyata || 34 ||
gṛhānniṣkramyatāṃ raṃḍā vṛddho bhūtvāpyasau striyāḥ ||
svasyā asau na kurute mūḍho bharaṇapoṣaṇam || 35 ||
bhairavābharaṇottālā vyālayajñopavītinaḥ ||
pradattvātāṇḍavapadānpaśyadhvaṃ dhvāṃtadīpakān || 36 ||
nirvedako.asya hṛdaye na kiṃcidapi tiṣṭhati ||
gṛhītaṃ yadanenedaṃ bālenāpi mahāvratam || 37 ||
raktadṛkkākakṛṣṇāṃgaṃ śabaraṃ kiṃ na paśyata ||
tarukoṭarāṃtaragatāṃśchitvā ca śukaśāvakān || 38 ||
bahubhiḥ koṣṭhakīkṛtya śaraughaiḥ śakalīkṛtam ||
vimuktaḍhakkāhaṃkārasuprahāraṃ nirīkṣata || 39 ||
imāṃ kṛṣṇārddhavadanāṃ gṛhītāṃ siṃdurārcitām ||
vimuktakeśāṃ nṛtyaṃtīṃ paśyadhvaṃ yoginīmiva || 4.136.40 ||
gaṃbhīratūryadhvaninā prabuddhāṃ vṛttatāṃḍavām ||
evaṃ prekṣaṇakaṃ kṛtvā nayetvṛkṣatale ca tām ||41||
evaṃ kṛte na dāridryaṃ na ca duḥkhaṃ bhavennṛṇām || 42 ||
iti śrībhaviṣye mahāpurāṇa uttaraparvaṇi śrīkṛṣṇayudhiṣṭhirasaṃvāde bhūtamātrutsavavarṇanaṃ nāma ṣaṭatriṃśaduttaraśatatamo.adhyāyaḥ || 136 || || cha || ||
rakṣābandhanavarṇanam
|| śrīkṛṣṇa uvāca || ||
athātaḥ saṃpravakṣyāmi balirakṣāvidhiṃ nṛpa ||
taṃ śṛṇvekāgramanasā samāsādgaditaṃ mayā || 1 ||
purā devāsure yuddhe dānavā suranirjitāḥ ||
śukraṃ baliṃ puraḥ kṛtvā yayuḥ śukra uvāca tam ||2||
|| śakra uvāca || ||
na viṣādastvayā kāryaḥ kāryāṇāṃ gatirīdṛśī||
daivādbhavaṃti bhūtānāṃ kāle jayaparājayāḥ|| 3 ||
saṃdhānaṃ saha śakreṇa kriyatāmayanadvayama ||
ajeyaḥ sarvaśatrūṇāṃ kṛtaḥ śacyā śacīpatiḥ|| 4 ||
rakṣābaṃdhaprabhāvena dānavendro jito mahān ||
varṣamekaṃ pratīkṣasva tataḥ śreyo bhaviṣyati || 5 ||
bhārgaveṇaivamuktāste dānavā vigatajvarāḥ ||
tasthuḥ kālaṃ pratīkṣanto yathoktaṃ guruṇā tathā ||6||
eṣa prabhāvo rakṣāyāḥ kathitaste yudhiṣṭhira ||
jayadaḥ sukhadaścaiva putrārogyadhanapradaḥ ||7||
|| yudhiṣṭhira uvāca || ||
kriyate kena vidhinā rakṣābaṃdhaḥ surottama ||
kasyāṃ tithau kadā deva etanme vaktumarhasi || 8 ||
yathā yathā hi bhagavānvicitrāṇi prabhāṣate ||
tathā tathā na me tṛptirbahvarthāḥ śṛṇvataḥ kathāḥ || 9 ||
|| śrīkṛṣṇa uvāca || ||
ghanāvṛte.ambare pārtha śādvale dharaṇītale ||
saṃprāpte śrāvaṇe caiva paurṇamāsyāṃ dinodaye || 4.137.10 ||
snānaṃ kurvīta matimāñśrutismṛtividhānata ||
tato devānpitṛrṃścaiva tarpayetparamāṃbhasā || 11 ||
upākarmādivedoktamṛṣīṇāṃ caiva tarpaṇam ||
kuryuśca brāhmaṇāḥ śrāddhaṃ devamuddiśya śaktitaḥ || 12 ||
śūdrāṇāṃ maṃtrasahitaṃ snānaṃ dānaṃ ca śasyate || 13 ||
tatoparāhnasamaye rakṣāpoṭalikāḥ śubhāḥ ||
kārayeccākṣataiḥ śastaiḥ siddhārthairhemabhūṣitāḥ || 14 ||
vastrairvicitraiḥ kārpāsaiḥ kṣaumairvā malavarjitaiḥ ||
vicitratarairgrathitāḥ sthāpayedbhā janopari || 15 ||
kāryā gṛhasya rakṣā gomayarahitaiḥ suvṛttakuṃḍūkaiḥ ||
dūrvāvarṇakasahitaiḥ sakaladuṣkṛtopaśāṃtaye || 16 ||
upaliptagṛhamadhye catuṣkopari nyasecchubhaṃ pīṭham ||
tatropaviśedrājā sāmātyaḥ sapurohitaḥ sasuhṛt || 17 ||
veśyājanenasahito maṃgalaśabdaiḥ suhasitaiścihnaiḥ||
rakṣābaṃdhaḥ kāryaḥ śāṃtidhvaninā narendrasya||18||
devadvijātiśastā sustrīrarghyaiḥ samarcayetprathamam||
tadanu purodhā nṛpatiṃ rakṣāṃ badhnīta maṃtreṇa||19||
yena baddho balī rājā dānavendro mahābalaḥ |
tena tvāmabhibadhnāmi rakṣe mā cala mā cala | | 4.137.20
brāhmaṇaiḥ kṣatriyairvaiśyaiḥ śūdraiścānyaiśca mānavaiḥ |
kartavyo rakṣikābandho dvijānsampūjya bhaktitaḥ | | 21
anena vidhinā yastu rakṣikābandhamācaret |
sa sarvadoṣarahitaḥ sukhī samvatsaraṃ bhavet | | 22
yaḥ śrāvaṇe sravati śītajale narendra rakṣāvidhānavidhimācarate manuṣyaḥ |
āste sukhena parameṇa ca sarvamekaḥ putraprapautrasahitaḥ sasuhṛdvṛtaśca | | 23
iti śrībhaviṣye mahāpurāṇa uttaraparvaṇi śrīkṛṣṇayudhiṣṭhirasaṃvāde
śrāvaṇapūrṇimārakṣābandhanavidhivarṇanaṃ nāma saptatriṃśadadhikaśatatamo.adhyāyaḥ | 137
athāṣṭātriṃdadhikaśatatamo.adhyāyaḥ
mahānavamīvratavarṇanam
śrīkṛṣṇa uvāca
puṇyā mahānavamyasti tithīnāṃ pravarā tithiḥ |
sānuṣṭheyā suraiḥ sarvaiḥ prajāpālairviśeṣataḥ | | 1
bhavānutthāpayetpārtha samvatsarasukhāya vai |
bhūtapretapiśācānāṃ prītyarthaṃ cotsavāya vā | | 2
yudhiṣṭhira uvāca
kasmātkālātpravṛtteyaṃ navamī mahaśabdayuk |
kimādāvupapanno.asti bhagavannavamīvidhiḥ | | 3
yaśodāgarbhasambhūteruta yātrā pravartate |
utāho pūrvamevāsītkṛtatretāyugādiṣu | | 4
yadasyāṃ prāṇinaḥ kecinmanyante ghātayanti ca |
hatānāṃ prāṇināṃ teṣāṃ kā gatiḥ pāralaukikī | | 5
svayaṃ ghnatāṃ ghātayatāmanumodayatāṃ tathā |
etanme saṃśayaṃ pūrvaṃ vaktumarhasi keśava | | 6
śrīkṛṣṇa uvāca
pārtha yā paramā śaktiranantā lokaviśrutā |
ādyā sarvagatā śuddhā bhāvagamyā manoharā | | 7
ādyāṣṭamī kalākālī dvitīyā sarvamaṅgalā |
māyā kātyāyanī durgā cāmuṇḍā śaṅkarapriyā | | 8
dhyāyanti yāṃ yogaratāṃ sā devī parameśvarī |
rūpabhedairnāmabhedairbhavānī pūjyate śivā | | 9
aṣṭamyāṃ tu navamyāṃ tu devadānavarākṣasaiḥ |
gandharvairuragairyajñaiḥ pūjyate kinnarairnaraiḥ | | 4.138.10
anyeṣvapi yugeṣvādau sṛṣṭeḥ pūrvaṃ pradarśitā |
pūjyateyaṃ purā devī tebhyaḥ pūrvataraiḥ śubhaiḥ | | 11
āśvayukchuklapakṣe ca yāṣṭamī mūlasaṃyutā |
sā mahānavamī nāma trailokye.api sudurlabhā | | 12
kanyāgate savitari śuklapakṣe.aṣṭamī tu yā |
mūlanakṣatrasaṃyuktā sā mahānavamī smṛtā | | 13
aṣṭamyāṃ ca navamyāṃ ca jaganmātaramambikām |
pūjayityā.a.aśvine māsi viśoko jayati dviṣaḥ | | 14
santarjayantī huṃkāraiḥ khaḍgādibhiraharniśam |
navamyāṃ pūjitā devī dadāti navamaṃ phalam | | 15
sā puṇyā sā pavitrā ca sā dharmasukhadāyinī |
tasmātsadā pūjanīyā cāmuṇḍāmuṇḍamālinī | | 16
tasyāṃ yadyupayujyante prāṇino mahiṣādayaḥ |
sarve te svargatiṃ yānti ghnatāṃ pāpaṃ na vidyate | | 17
na tathā balidānena puṣpadhūpavilepanaiḥ |
yathā saṃtuṣyate loke mahiṣairvindhyavāsinī | | 18
uddiśya durgāṃ hanyante vidhānādye.atra jantavaḥ |
svargaṃ te yānti kaunteya ghātayanto.api bhaktitaḥ | | 19
bhavānīprāṅgaṇe prāṇā yeṣāṃ yātā yudhiṣṭhira |
teṣāṃ svarge dhruvaṃ vāso varāste.apsarasāṃ priyāḥ | | 4.138.20
manvantareṣu sarveṣu kalpeṣu kurunandana |
teṣu sarveṣu caivāsīnnavamīyaṃ purārcitā || 21 ||
prasiddhānādinidhanā varṣevarṣe yudhiṣṭhira ||
bhūyobhūyo.avatāraiśca bhavānī pūjyate suraiḥ || 22 ||
avatīrṇā bhuvi sadā nityaṃ daityanibarhiṇī ||
svargapātālamartyeṣu karoti sthitipālanam || 23 ||
punaścaiṣā mahādevī yaśodā garbhasaṃbhavā ||
kaṃsāsurasyottamāṅge pādaṃ dattvā gatāyuṣaḥ || 24 ||
tataḥ prabhṛti lokeṣu yaśodānaṃdadāyinīm ||
viṃdhyācale sthāpayitvā punaḥ pūjā pravartitā || 25 ||
pūrvapravṛddho.api punarbhaginyā mahimā kṛtaḥ ||
bhuvi sarvopakārāya sarvopadravaśāṃtaye || 26 ||
evaṃ viṃdhyopavāsinyā navarātropavāsinaḥ ||
ekarātreṇa naktena svaśaktyā.ayācitena vā || 27 ||
yajanairyājanairdevāḥ sthānesthāne purepure ||
gṛhegṛhe bhaktipare grāmegrāme vanevane || 28 ||
snātaiḥ pramuditairhṛṣṭairbrāhmaṇaiḥ kṣatriyairnṛpaiḥ ||
vaiśyaiḥ śūdrairbhakticitrairmlecchairanyaiśca mānavaiḥ || 29 ||
strībhiśca kuruśārdūla tadvidhānamidaṃ śṛṇu ||
jayābhilāṣī nṛpatiḥ pratipatprabhṛtikramāt || 4.138.30 ||
lohābhihārikaṃ karma kārayedyāvadaṣṭami ||
prāgudakpravaṇe deśe patākābhiralaṃkṛtam || 31 ||
maṇḍapaṃ kārayeddivyaṃ navasaptakaraṃ varam||
āgneyyāṃ kārayetkuṇḍaṃ hastamātraṃ suśobhanam || 32 ||
mekhalātrayasaṃ yuktaṃ yonyaśvatthadalābhayā ||
rājacihnāni sarvāṇi śastrāṇyastrāṇi yāni ca || 33 ||
ānīya maṇḍape tāni sarvāṇyevādhivāsayet ||
tatastu brāhmaṇaḥ snātaḥ śuklāṃbaradharaḥ śuciḥ || 34 || oṃkārarapūrvakairmantraistalliṃgairjuhuyād ghṛtam||
lohanāmābhavatpūrvaṃ dānavastu mahābalaḥ || 35 ||
sa devaiḥ samare kruddhairbahudhā śakalīkṛtaḥ ||
tadaṃgasambhavaṃ lohaṃ yatsarvaṃ dṛśyate kṣitau || 36 ||
śastrāstramantrairhotavyaṃ pāyasaṃ ghṛtasaṃyutam ||
hutaśeṣaṃ turaṃgāṇāṃ gajānāmupahārayet || 37 ||
lohābhihārikaṃ karma tenaitadṛṣibhiḥ smṛtam ||
baddhapratiśaravyaṃ ca gajāśvasamalaṃkṛtam || 38 ||
bhrāmayennagare nityaṃ naṃdighoṣapurassaram ||
pratyahaṃ nṛpatiḥ snātvā saṃpūjya pitṛdevatāḥ || 39 ||
pūjayedrājacihnāni phalamālyānulepanaiḥ ||
hutaśeṣaṃ pradātavyamaupanāyanike dvije || 4.138.40 ||
tasyābhiharaṇādrājño vijayaḥ samudāhṛtaḥ ||
pūjāmaṃtrānpravakṣyāmi purāṇoktānahaṃ tava || 41 ||
yaiḥ pūjitāḥ prayacchanti kīrtimāyur yaśobalam ||
yathāṃbudaśchādayati śivāyemāṃ vasundharām || 42 ||
tathācchādaya rājānaṃ vijayārogyavṛddhaye || (iti chatramantraḥ) ||
gandharva kulajātastvaṃ mā bhūyāḥ kuladūṣakaḥ || 43 ||
brahmaṇaḥ satyavākyena somasya varuṇasya ca ||
prabhāvācca hutāśasya varddhasva tvaṃ turaṃgama || 44 ||
tejasā caiva sūryasya munīnāṃ tapasā yathā ||
rudrasya brahmacaryeṇa pavanasya balena ca|| 45 ||
smara tvaṃ rājaputro.asi kaustubhaṃ ca maṇiṃ smara ||
yāṃ gatiṃ brahmahā gacchetpitṛhā mātṛhā tathā || 46 ||
bhūmyarthenṛtavādī ca kṣatriyaśca parāṅmukhaḥ ||
sūryācandramasau vāyuḥ pāvakaśca na yatra vai || 47 ||
vrajecca tāṃ gatiṃ kṣipraṃ tacca pāpaṃ bhavetkila ||
vikṛtiṃ yadi gacchestvaṃ yuddhedhvani turaṃgama ||
ripūnvijitya samare saha bhartrā sukhī bhava || 48 || || ( ityaśvamaṃtraḥ) || || śakraketo mahāvīrya suparṇastvayyupasthitaḥ ||
patatrirāḍvainateyastathā nārāyaṇadhvajaḥ || 49 ||
kāśyapeyo.amṛto jñeyo nāgārirviṣṇuvāhanaḥ ||
aprameyo durādharṣo devaśatruniṣūdanaḥ || 4.138.50 ||
garutmānmārutagatistvayi sannihitaḥ sthitaḥ ||
śastravarmāyudhānyodhānrakṣā smāṃśca ripūndaha || 51 || || (iti dhvajamaṃtraḥ) || || kumudairāvaṇau padmaḥ puṣpadaṃto.atha vāmanaḥ ||
supratīkoñjano nīla ete.aṣṭau devayonayaḥ ||| || 52 ||
eteṣāṃ putrapautrāśca balānyaṣṭau samāśritāḥ ||
bhadro mandro mṛgaścaiva gajaḥ saṃkīrṇa eva ca ||
vanevane prasūtāste kariyoniṃ mahāgajāḥ||53||
pāṃtu tvāṃ vasavo rudrā ādityāḥ samarudgaṇāḥ ||
bhartāraṃ rakṣa nāgendra samayaṃ pratipālayan || 54 ||
avāpurhi jayaṃ yuddhe gamane svasti no vraja ||
śrīste somādbalaṃ viṣṇostejaḥ sūryājjavonilāt||
sthairyaṃ merorjayaṃ rudrādyaśo devātpuraṃdarāt || 55 ||
yuddhe rakṣaṃtu nāgāstvāṃ diśaśca saha daivataiḥ ||
aśvinau saha gaṃdharvaiḥ pāṃtu tvāṃ sarvataḥ sadā || 56 || ( iti hastimaṃtraḥ ||) hutabhugvasavo rudrā vāyuḥ somo maharṣayaḥ ||
nāgakinnaragandharvayakṣa bhūtagaṇāgrahāḥ || 57 ||
pramathāśca sahādityairbhūteśo mātṛbhiḥ saha ||
śakrasenāpatiḥ skando varuṇaścāśritāstvayi || 58 ||
pradahaṃtu ripūnsarvānrājā vijayamṛcchatu ||
yāni prayuktānyaribhirdūṣaṇāni samaṃtataḥ || 59 ||
etāni paraśatrūṇāṃ hatāni tava tejasā ||
kālanemivadhe yuddhe yuddhe tripura ghātane || 4.138.60 ||
hiraṇyakaśiporyuddhe yuddhe devāsure tathā ||
śobhitāsi tathaivādya śobhamānāstu bhūpateḥ || 61 ||
nīlāṃ śvetāmimāṃ dṛṣṭvā naśyaṃtvadya nṛpārayaḥ ||
vyādhibhirvividhairghoraiḥ śastraiśca yudhi nirjitāḥ || 62 ||
sadyaḥ svasthā bhavaṃti sma tvadvātenāpamārjitāḥ || 63 ||
pūtanā revatī nāmnā kālarātrīti yā smṛtā ||
dahaṃtvāśu ripūnsarvānpatāke tvāmupāgatāḥ || 64 || (iti patākāmantraḥ ||)
asiśca ripuhā khaḍgastīkṣṇakarmā durāsadaḥ ||
śrīgarbho vijayaścaiva dharmadhārastathaiva ca || 65 ||
ityaṣṭau tava nāmāni svayamuktāni vedhasā ||
nakṣatraṃ kṛttikā tubhyaṃ gururdevo maheśvaraḥ || 66 ||
hiraṇyaṃ ca śarīraṃ te dhātā devo janārdanaḥ ||
pitā pitāmaho devastvaṃ māṃ pālaya sarvadā || 67 || (iti khaḍgamantraḥ ||) śarmapradastvaṃ samare varma sarvāyaso hyasi ||
rakṣa māṃ rakṣaṇīyo.ahaṃ tava varmannamo.astu te || 68 || ( iti varmamantraḥ ||) ||
dundubhe tvaṃ sapatnānāṃ ghoṣāddhṛdayakampana ||
bhava bhūmipa sainyānāṃ tathā vijayavarddhanaḥ || 69 ||
yathā jīmūtaghoṣeṇa hṛṣyaṃti varavāraṇāḥ ||
tathāstu tava śabdena harṣo.asmākaṃ mudāvahaḥ ||4.138.70||
yathā jīmūtaśabdena strīṇāṃ trāso.abhijāyate ||
tathā ca tava śabdena trasyaṃtvasmaddviṣo raṇe||71|| ( iti duṃdubhimaṃtraḥ || )
sarvāyudha mahāmātra sarvadevārisūdana ||
cāpa māṃ sarvadā rakṣa sākaṃ sāyakasattamaiḥ || 72|| ( iti cāpamantraḥ||)
puṇyastvaṃ śaṅkha puṣpāṇāṃ maṅgalānāṃ ca maṅgalam ||
viṣṇunā vidhṛto nityaṃ manaḥśāṃtiprado bhava || 73 || ( iti śaṅkhamantraḥ ||) śaśāṃkakarasaṃkāśa himaḍiṃḍīrapāṃḍura ||
protsārayāśu duritaṃ cāmarāmaravallabha || 74 || ( iti cāmaramaṃtraḥ ||)
sarvāyudhānāṃ prathamā nirmitā.asi pinākinā ||
śūlāyudhādviniṣkṛṣya kṛtvā muṣṭiparigraham || 75 ||
caṃḍikāyāḥ pradattāsi sarvaduṣṭanibarhiṇi ||
tathā vistāritā cāsi devānāṃ pratipāditā || 76 ||
sarva sattvāṃgabhūtāsi sarvāśubhanivāriṇi ||
churike rakṣa māṃ nityaṃ śāntiṃ yaccha namo.astu te || 77 || ( iticchurikāmaṃtraḥ ||) protsāraṇāya duṣṭānāṃ mādhusaṃgrahaṇāya ca ||
brahmaṇā nirmitaścāsi vyavahāraprasiddhaye ||78||
yaśo dehi sukhaṃ dehi jayado bhava bhūpateḥ ||
tāḍayāśu ripūnsarvānhemadaṃḍa namostu te || 72 || ( iti kanakadaṇḍamantraḥ ||)
vijayo jayado jetā ripughātī priyaṃkaraḥ ||
duḥkhahā dharmadaḥ śāṃtaḥ sarvāriṣṭavināśanaḥ ||4.138.80||
ete.aṣṭau saṃnidhau yasmāttava siṃhā mahābalā||||
tena siṃhāsaneti tvaṃ viprairvedeṣu gīyase ||81||
tvayi sthitaḥ śivaḥ sākṣāttvayi śakrasureśvaraḥ||
tvayi sthito harirdevastvadarthaṃ tapyate tapaḥ || 82 ||
namaste sarvatobhadra bhadrado bhava bhūpateḥ ||
trailokyajayasarvasva siṃhāsana namo.astu te || 83 || ( iti siṃhāsanamaṃtra ||) lohābhihārikaṃ karma kṛtvedaṃ maṃtrapūrvakam||
phalanaivedyakusumairdhūpadīpavilepanaiḥ ||84||
aṣṭamyāṃ dhāvanaṃ kṛtvā pūrvāhne snānamācaret|| || 85 ||
durgāṃ kāṃcanamūrtiṃ raupyāṃ vā paittalīṃ vārkṣī caitrīṃ tāmrīṃ vādhibhavataḥ kṛtvā dāruvicitratoraṇavinyastāṃ śobhane sthāne purato vinyastadṛṣṭāṃ vicitragṛhamadhyagāṃ snātāṃ kuṃkumacaṃdanagaṃdhaiścatuḥsamaiścīrapaṭṭaiścarcitagātrāṃ devīṃ kusumairabhyarcya tāṃ bahubhiḥ puṣyamāṇakīrtistairdvi jananairjanitaparitoṣairdivānvito naredraḥ svayaṃ prayacchetpurohitaiḥ sārdhaṃ bilvapatreṇārcanena maṃtreṇānena bhagavatyai || ( iti gadyaṃ sampūrṇaṃ) ||
jayaṃtī maṃgalā kālī bhadrakālī kapālinī ||
durgā śivā kṣamā dhātrī svāhā svadhā namostu te || 86 ||
amṛtodbhavaḥ śrīvṛkṣo mahādevīpriyaḥ sadā ||
bilvapatraṃ prayacchāmi pavitraṃ te sureśvari || 87 ||
durgā saṃpūjanīyā ca taddināddroṇapuṣpayā ||
sā cābhīṣṭā sureśānyāstathā rūḍhavraṇāyutaḥ ||88||
tataḥ khaḍgaṃ namaskṛtya śatrūṇāṃ mānamarddanam||
icchetsvavijayaṃ rājyaṃ subhikṣaṃ cātmano nṛpa || 89 ||
punaḥ punaḥ praṇamyātha dhyāyecca hṛdaye śivām ||
mahiṣaghnīṃ bahubhujāṃ kumārīṃ siṃhavāhinīm || 4.138.90 ||
dānavāṃstarjayatī ca khaḍgoddhatakarāṃ śubhām ||
ghaṃṭākṣasragdharāṃ durgāṃ raṇāraṃbhe vyavasthitām || 91 ||
tato jayajayākāraiḥ stavaṃ kuryādimaṃ tataḥ || 92||
sarvamaṅgalamāṅgalye śive sarvārthasādhike ||
śaraṇye tryaṃbake gauri nārāyaṇi namo.astu te || 93 ||
kuṃkumena samālabdhe candanena vilepite ||
bilvapatrakṛtāmāle durge.ahaṃ śaraṇaṃ gataḥ ||94||
kṛtvaivamarccāṃ kauravya aṣṭamyāṃ jāgaraṃ niśi ||
naṭanartanagītaiśca kārayettu mahotsavam ||95||
evaṃ hṛṣṭairniśāṃ nītvā prabhāte cāruṇodaye ||
pātayenmahiṣānmeṣānagrato natakandharān ||96||
śataṃ cāpi śatārdhaṃ vā tadarddhaṃ vā yathecchayā ||
surāsavabhṛtaiḥ kuṃbhaistarpayetparameśvarīm || 97 ||
kāpālikebhyastaddeyaṃ dāsīdāsajanaistathā ||
vibhajya sarvaṃ kauṃteya suhṛtsaṃbaṃdhibaṃdhuṣu ||98||
tatoparāhṇasamaye navamyāṃ syaṃdane sthitām ||
bhavānīṃ bhrāmayedrāṣṭre svayaṃ rājā sasainyavān ||99||
sahasraiḥ puruṣairvāpi rathayuktaiḥ suśikṣitaiḥ ||
śanaiḥ śanairadhikayā dīptyā prajvaladīpakaiḥ ||4.138.100||
ākṛṣṭakhaḍgairvīraiśca dhāturaktairgajaistathā ||
nadadbhiḥ śaṃkhapaṭahairnṛtyadbhi rvārayauvataiḥ ||
alaṃkṛtābhirnārībhirbālakaiḥ suvibhūṣitaiḥ ||101||
bhūtebhyastu baliṃ dadyānmaṃtreṇānena sāmiṣam ||
saraktaṃ sajalaṃ sānnaṃ gandhapuṣpākṣa tairyutam ||1 02||
trīṃstrīnvārāṃstriśūlena digvidikṣu kṣipedbalim ||
baliṃ gṛhṇantvimaṃ devā ādityā vasavastathā || 103 ||
maruto.athāśvinau rudrāḥ suparṇā pannagā grahāḥ ||
asurā yātudhānāśca mātaraśca piśācakāḥ || 104
śākinyo yakṣavetālā yoginyaḥ pūtanāḥ śivāḥ ||
jṛṃbhakāḥ siddhagandharvā vyālā vidyādharā dharāḥ||105||
dikpālā lokapālāśca ye ca vighnavināyakāḥ ||
jagatāṃ śāṃtikartāro brahmādyāśca maharṣayaḥ ||1 06||
savighnaṃ mama pāpaṃ te śāmyaṃtu paripanthinaḥ|
saumyā bhavaṃtu tṛptāśca bhūtāḥ pretāḥ sukhāvahāḥ ||1 07||
ityevaṃ bhrāmayedrāṣṭre durgāṃ devī rathe sthitām||
narayānena vā pārtha tato.avighnaṃ samāpayet ||1 08||
athotpanneṣu vipreṣu bhūtaśāṃtiṃ samācaret ||
yena vighnā na jāyaṃte yātrā saṃpūrṇatāṃ vrajet||1 09||
evaṃ ye kurvate yātrāṃ rājāno.anye.api mānavāḥ||
mahānavamyāṃ naṃdāyāṃ putrakā hṛṣṭamānasāḥ ||4.138.11 0||
te sarve pāpanirmuktā yāṃti bhāgavatīṃ purīm ||1 11||
na teṣāṃ śāvako nāgnirna caurā na vināyakāḥ ||
vighnaṃ kurvanti rājendra yeṣāṃ tuṣṭā maheśvarī || 112 ||
nīrujaḥ sukhino bhogabhoktāro bhayavarjitāḥ||
bhavaṃti bhaktāḥ puruṣāḥ bhagavatyāḥ kimucyate || 113 ||
ityeṣa te samākhyāto durgādevyā mahotsavaḥ ||
paṭhatāṃ śṛṇvatāṃ caiva sarvāśubhavināśanaḥ || 114 || śūlāgrabhinnamahiṣāsurapṛṣṭhaviṣṭāmṛtkhātakhaḍgarucirāṃgadabāhudaṇḍām ||
abhyarcya paṃcavadanānugatāṃ navamyāṃ durgāṃ sudurgagahanāni taraṃti martyāḥ || 115 ||
iti śrībhaviṣye mahāpurāṇa uttaraparvaṇi śrīkṛṣṇayudhiṣṭhirasaṃvāde mahānavamīvratavarṇanaṃnāmāṣṭatriṃśaduttaraśatatamo.adhyāyaḥ||138|| ||
mahendradhvajamahotsavavarṇanam
|| śrīkṛṣṇa uvāca || ||
purā devāsure yuddhe brahmādyairamarairnṛpa ||
vijayārthaṃ mahendrasya dhvajayaṣṭiḥ pratiṣṭhitā || 1 ||
merorupari saṃsthāpya siddhavidyādharoragaiḥ ||
sā devī hyarcitā nityaṃ bhūṣaṇairbhūṣitā svakaiḥ || 2 ||
svacchatraghaṃṭāpiṭakaiḥ kiṃkiṇībaddhabudbudaiḥ ||
tāṃ dṛṣṭvā dānavā naṣṭā bhayādeva raṇe hatāḥ ||
gatā rasātalaṃ daityā devāścāpi divi sthitāḥ || 3 ||
tataḥ prabhṛti tāṃ divyāmiṃdrayaṣṭiṃ yajaṃti te ||
devāḥ sarve gaṇāḥ sarve hṛṣṭāstuṣṭā yudhiṣṭhira || 4 ||
ataḥ svargaṃ gato rājā bhūripuṇyavaśādvasuḥ ||
indraloke mahābhāgo vasudevaiḥ supūjitaḥ || 5 ||
tasmai datā mahendreṇa vasuyaṣṭiḥ pragṛhyatām ||
pūjayitvā mahābhāga sarvadaityāpanuttaye || 6 ||
avatārya varṣāsamaye sarvairnṛpatibhiḥ saha ||
mahyāṃ saṃpūjayāmāsa cakre ceṃdramahaṃ vasuḥ || 7||
mahena maghavā prīto dadau puṇyaṃ vasorvaram || 8 ||
yeṣu deśeṣu manujā bhaktibhāvapuraḥsarāḥ ||
pūjayiṣyaṃti varṣānte mayā dattaṃ mahādhvajam || 9 ||
teṣu deśeṣu muditāḥ prajā rogavivarjitāḥ ||
prabhūtānnā dharmayuktā vṛṣamedhā mahotsavāḥ || 4.139.10 ||
bhaviṣyaṃti suveṣāśca subhāṣāśca subhūṣaṇāḥ || 11 ||
śrutvaitadvacanaṃ rājā vasurvasumatāṃ varaḥ ||
viśeṣeṇa tataścakre varṣevarṣe mahotsavam || 12 ||
śravaṇe sthāpayedyaṣṭiṃ snānavastraiḥ prapūjitām ||
dairghyeṇa viṃśatikarāṃ sāradārumayīṃ śubhām || 13 ||
indrasthāne puroddiṣṭe indramātṛkasaṃjñake ||
tasminyaṣṭiṃ nṛpo bhoktā svayaṃ yatnena yojayet || 14 ||
vastrairvicitraiḥ saṃvītāṃ piṭikālaṃkṛtāṃ tathā ||
piṭikānāṃ mahārāja kramaṃ ca kathayāmi te || 15 ||
prathamaṃ lokapālākhyaṃ caturasraṃ sakarṇikam ||
yamendradhanadairyuktaṃ varuṇena samaṃ tataḥ || 16 ||
vṛttaṃ khaṃḍāsrakaṃ ramyaṃ dvitīyaṃ raktacūrṇitam ||
tṛtīyaṃ śvetakaṃ citramaṣṭāsra piṭakaṃ śubham || 17 ||
caturthamindragopālavṛttaṃ mātṛsamāvṛtam ||
pañcamaṃ cāṣṭakoṇaṃ tu śuklaṃ dhātuvicitritam || 18 ||
kṛṣṇakarṇikayā ṣaṣṭhaṃ vṛttaṃ budbuda śobhitam ||
saptamaṃ cāṣṭakoṇaṃ tu śuddhaṃ vidyādharairyutam || 19 ||
aṣṭamaṃ piṭakaṃ vṛttaṃ varatrāsūtraveṣṭitam ||
navagrahayutaṃ dīptaṃ navamaṃ ca sacaṃḍikam || || 4.139.20 ||
brahmaviṣṇvīśasahitaṃ daśamaṃ śivasaṃsthitam ||
kṛṣṇamekādaśaṃ vṛttaṃ yamayuktaṃ yudhiṣṭhira || 21 ||
chātraṃ dvādaśamaṃ śuklaṃ dhvajadīrghaṃ trayodaśam ||
sakuśaṃ puṣpasragdāmaghaṃṭācāmaracarcitam || 22 ||
bandhayitvā candrapādai rajjubhiḥ sthūṇikāṃ naraiḥ ||
śanairutthāpayetpārtha hutvā vaiśvānaraṃ dvijān || 23 ||
dakṣiṇābhiśca saṃpūjya guḍapāyasapūpakaiḥ ||
kuryānmahotsavaṃ rājā dināni nava sapta vā || 24 ||
prekṣaṇīyairmahādānairnaṭaigītaiḥ kathānakaiḥ ||
cakradolādharotsargaiḥ karkeṭairmallayodhanaiḥ || 25 ||
veśyāṃganānarairhṛṣṭairdyūtakrīḍāmahotsavaiḥ ||
karpūravastradānaiśca saṃmānaiśca parasparam||| 26 ||
rātrau prajāgaraḥ kāryo rakṣaṇāya prayatnataḥ ||
kākolūkakapotānāṃ yena pāto na vidyate || 27 ||
kākādbhavati durbhikṣaṃ kauśikānmriyate nṛpaḥ ||
kapotācca prajānāśastato rakṣetsadodyataḥ || 28 ||
śaithilyādgiribhicchakraḥ pramādānnīyate yadi ||
tasmindeśe samutthānamindraketorna kārayet || || 29 ||
yāvattu nīyate sthānādanyasmādaiṃdrato dhvajaḥ || 4.139.30 ||
iṃdradhvajasamutthānaṃ pramādānna kṛtaṃ yadi ||
tato dvādaśame varṣe kartavyaṃ nāṃtare punaḥ || 31 ||
kathaṃcidyadi vighnaḥ syādvipākaṃ me nibodha vai ||
chatrabhaṃge cchatrabhaṃgo dhvaje rāṣṭraṃ vinaśyati || 32 ||
mastake mantravicchedo mukhe mukhyabalakṣayaḥ ||
bāhudaṃḍe vadetpīḍāṃ jaṭhare jāṭharaṃ bhayam || 33 ||
varatrāyāṃ mitranāśaḥ sthūṇikāsu padātayaḥ ||
kṣayaṃ gacchaṃti rājendra tasmādyatnātpuraṃdaram || 34 ||
utthāpya pūjayedbhaktyā divārātramataṃdritaḥ ||
pramādātpatite bhagne gate cendradhvaje dvidhā || 35 ||
sauvarṇaṃ raupyakaṃ kṛtvā pūrṇamutthāpayeddhvajam ||
śāṃtikaṃ pauṣṭikaṃ kṛtvā dvijebhyonnaṃ pradāpayet || 36 ||
trapusaiḥ karkaṭībhiśca nālikeraiḥ kapitthakaiḥ ||
bījapūraiḥ sanāraṃgairbhakṣyānnairvividhaistathā || 37 ||
naivedyādibhirabhyarcya maṃtreṇānena toṣayet ||
vajrahasta surārighna bahunetra puraṃdara ||
kṣemārthaṃ sarvalokasya pūjeyaṃ pratigṛhyatām || 38 ||
śravaṇādbharaṇīṃ yāvatpūjāṃ kṛtvā vidhānataḥ ||
rātrau visarjayecchakraṃ maṃtreṇānena pāṃḍava || 39 ||
sārthaṃ surāsuragaṇaiḥ puraṃdaraśatakrato ||
upahāraṃ gṛhītvainaṃ mahendradhvaja gamyatām|| 4.139.40 ||
evaṃ yaḥ kurute yātrāmindraketoryudhiṣṭhira ||
parjanyaḥ kāmavarṣī syāttasminrāṣṭre na saṃśayaḥ || 41 ||
ītayo na pravartaṃte tasmānmṛtyukṛtaṃ bhayam ||
vijitya śatrūnsamare vaśe kṛtvā mahītalam ||
bhuktvā rājyaṃ ciraṃkālamindraloke mahīyate ||42||
rāṣṭre pure ca nagare surarājaketoryatrotsavo nṛpajanaiḥ kriyate sametya||
duṣṭopasargajanitaṃ paracakrajaṃ vā tasminbhayaṃ bhavati pārtha na kiñcideva || 43 ||
iti śrībhaviṣye mahāpurāṇa uttaraparvaṇi śrīkṛṣṇayudhiṣṭhirasaṃvāde mahendradhvajamahotsavavarṇanaṃ nāmaikonacatvāriṃśadutaraśatatamo.adhyāyaḥ || 139 || ||
dīpālikotsavavarṇanam
śrīkṛṣṇa uvāca || ||
purā vāmanarūpeṇa yācayitvā dharāmimām ||
baliyajñe hariḥ sarvaṃ krāṃtavānvikramaistribhiḥ || || 1 ||
indrāya dattavānrājyaṃ baliṃ pātālavāsinam ||
kṛtvā daityapatervāsamahorātraṃ punarnṛpa || 2 ||
ekameva hi bhogārthaṃ balirājyeticihnitam ||
sarahasyaṃ tadetatte kathayāmi narottama || 3 ||
kārttike kṛṣṇapakṣasya pañcadaśyāṃ niśāgame ||
yatheṣṭaceṣṭā daityānāṃ rājyaṃ teṣāṃ mahītale || 4 || ||
yudhiṣṭhira uvāca || ||
niśśeṣeṇa hṛṣīkeśa kaumudīṃ brūhi me prabho ||
kimarthaṃ dīyate dānaṃ tasyāṃ kā devatā bhavet || 5 ||
kiṃsvittasyai bhaveddeyaṃ kebhyo devaṃ janārdana ||
praharṣaḥ ko.atra nirdiṣṭaḥ krīḍā kātra prakīrtitā || 6 ||
śrīkṛṣṇa uvāca || ||
kārttike kṛṣṇapakṣe ca caturdaśyāṃ dinodaye ||
avaśyameva kartavyaṃ snānaṃ narakabhīrubhiḥ || 7 ||
apāmārgapallavānvā bhrābhayenmastakopari ||
sītāloṣṭasamāyuktasakaṃṭakadalānvitān || 8 ||
hara pāpamapāmārga bhrāmyamāṇaṃ punaḥpunaḥ ||
āpadaṃ kilbiṣaṃ cāpi mamāpahara sarvaśaḥ ||
apāmārga namastestu śarīraṃ mama śodhaya || 9 || ( ityapāmārga bhramaṇa mantraḥ)
tataśca tarpaṇaṃ kāryaṃ dharmarājasya nāmabhiḥ ||
yamāya dharmarājāya mṛtyave cāṃtakāya ca ||
vaivasvatāya kālāya sarvabhūtakṣayāya ca ||4.140.1 0||
narakāya pradātavyo dīpaḥ saṃpūjya devatāḥ ||
tataḥ pradoṣasamaye dīpāndadyānmanoramān || 11 ||
brahmaviṣṇuśivādīnāṃ bhavaneṣu maṭheṣu ca ||
kūṭāgāreṣu caityeṣu sabhāsu ca nadīṣu ca || 12 ||
prākārodyānavāpīṣu pratolīniṣkuṭeṣu ca ||
siddhārhabuddhacāmuṃḍābhairavāyataneṣu ca ||
maṃdurāsu viviktāsu hastiśālāsu caiva hi || 13 ||
evaṃ prabhātasamaye.amāvāsyāyāṃ narādhipa ||
snātvā devānpitṛrnbhaktyā saṃpūjyātha praṇamya ca || 14 ||
kṛtvā tu pārvaṇaṃ śrāddhaṃ dadhikṣīraghṛtādibhiḥ ||
bhojyairnānāvidhairviprānbhojayitvā kṣamāpya ca || 15 ||
tato.aparāhṇasamaye ghoṣayennagare nṛpaḥ ||
adya rājyaṃ balerlokā yatheṣṭaṃ modyatāmiti || 16 ||
lokaścāpi pare hṛṣyetsudhādhavalitājire ||
vṛkṣacandanamālāḍhyaiścarcite ca gṛhegṛhe || 17 ||
dyūtapānaratodṛptanaranārīmanohare ||
nṛtyavāditrasaṃghuṣṭe samprajvalitadīpake || 18 .||
anyonyaprītisaṃhṛṣṭadattalābhena vai jane ||
tāṃbūlahṛṣṭa vadane kuṅkumakṣodacarcite || 19 ||
dukūlapaṭṭanepathye svarṇamāṇikyabhūṣite ||
adbhutodbhaṭaśṛṃgārapradarśitakutūhale || 4.140.20 ||
yuvatījanasaṃkīrṇavastrojjvalavihāriṇi ||
dīpamālākule ramye vidhvastadhvāṃtasañcaye ||
pradoṣe doṣarahite śastadoṣāgame śubhe || 21 ||
śaśipūrṇamukhābhiśca kanyābhiḥ kṣiptataṇḍulam ||
nīrājanaṃ prakartavyaṃ vṛkṣaśākhāsu dīpakaiḥ || 22 ||
bhrāmyamāṇo nato mūrghni manujānāṃ janādhipaḥ ||
vṛkṣaśākhāṃtadīpānāṃ nirastāddarśanādvrajet ||
nīrājanaṃ tu teneha procyate vijayapradam || 23 ||
tasmājjanena kartavyaṃ rakṣodoṣabhayāpaham ||
yātrāvihārasañcāre jayajīveti vādinā || 24 ||
kṣudropasargarahite rājacaurabhayojjhite ||
mitrasvajanasambandhisuhatpremānuraṃjite || 25 ||
tato.arddharātrasamaye svayaṃ rājā vrajetpuram ||
avalokayituṃ ramyaṃ padbhyāmeva śanaiḥśanaiḥ || 26 ||
mahatā tūryaghoṣeṇa jvaladbhirhastadīpakaiḥ ||
kṛtaśobhāṃ purīṃ paśyetkṛtarakṣāṃ svakairnaraiḥ || 27 ||
taṃ dṛṣṭvā mahadāścaryamṛddhiṃ caivātmanaḥ śubhām ||
balirājyapramodaṃ ca tataḥ svagṛhamāvrajet || 28 ||
evaṃ gate niśārdhe tu jane nidrārdralocane ||
tāvannagaranārībhiḥ śūrpaḍiṃḍimavādanaiḥ ||
niṣkrāmyate prahṛṣṭābhiralakṣmīḥ svagṛhāṃgaṇāt || 29 ||
tataḥ prabuddhe sakale jane jātamahotsave ||
mālyadīpakahaste ca snehanirbharalocane || 4.140.30 ||
veśyā vilāsinī sārdhaṃ svasti maṃgalakāriṇī ||
gṛhādgṛhaṃ vrajantī ca pādābhyaṃgapradāyinī || 31 ||
piṣṭakodvartanapare guruśuśrūṣaṇākule ||
dvijābhivādanapare sukharājyābhivīkṣaṇe || 32 ||
suvāsinībhyo dāne ca dīyamāne yadṛcchayā ||
yathāprabhātasamaye rājārhamānayejjanam || 33 ||
sadbhāvenaiva santoṣyā devāḥ satpuruṣā dvijāḥ ||
itare cānnapānena vākpradānena paṃḍitāḥ || 34 ||
vastraistāṃbūladānaiśca puṣpakarpūrakuṃkumaiḥ ||
bhakṣyairuccāvacairbhojyairantaḥpuravilāsinīḥ || 35 ||
grāmairviṣayadānaiśca sāmaṃtanṛpatīndhanaiḥ ||
padātīnaṅgasaṃlagnāngraiveyakaṭakaiḥ svakān || 36 ||
svayaṃ rājā toṣayetsa janānbhṛtyānpṛthakpṛthak ||
yathārhaṃ toṣayitvā tu tato mallanaṭānbhaṭān ||37||
vṛṣabhānmahiṣāṃścaiva yudhyamānānparaiḥ saha ||
gajānaśvāṃśca yodhāṃśca padātīnsamalaṃkṛtān |||38||
maṃcārūḍhaḥ svayaṃ paśyennaṭanartakacāraṇān ||
kruddhāpayedānayecca gomahiṣyādikaṃ tataḥ || 39 ||
diṣṭyā kāryaṃ payojyotiruktipratyuktikā vadet ||
tatoparāhnasamaye pūrvasyāṃ diśi bhārata || 4.140.40 ||
mārgapālīṃ prabadhnīyāttuṃgastaṃbhe.atha pādape ||
kuśakāśamayīṃ divyāṃ saṃbhave bahubhirvṛtām || 41 ||
pūjayitvā gajānvājīnsārdhe yāmatraye gate ||
gāvo vṛṣāḥ samahiṣā maṃḍitā ghaṭikotkaṭāḥ || 42 ||
kṛte home dvijendraistu gṛhṇīyānmārgapālikām ||
rāṣṭrabhojyena dhārābhiḥ sahasreṇa śatena vā ||43||
svaśaktyapekṣayā vāpi gṛhṇīyādvāmabhojanaiḥ ||
mātuḥ kulaṃ pitṛkulamātmānaṃ sahabaṃdhubhiḥ || 44||
saṃtārayetsa sakalaṃ mārgapālīṃ dadāti yaḥ ||
nīrājanaṃ ca tatraiva kāryaṃ rājñe jayapradam ||45||
mārgapālītalenetthaṃ hayā gāvo gajā vṛṣāḥ ||
rājāno rājaputrāśca brāhmaṇā śūdrajātayaḥ || 46 ||
mārgapālīṃ samullaṃghya nīrujaḥ syātsukhī sadā ||
kṛtvaitatsarvameveha rātrau daityapaterbaleḥ || || 47 ||
pūjāṃ kuryānnaraḥ sākṣādbhūmau maṃḍalake kṛte ||
balimālikhya daityendraṃ varṇakaiḥ paṃcaraṃgakaiḥ || 48 ||
sarvābharaṇasaṃpūrṇaṃ viṃdhyāvalyā sahāsitam||
kūṣmāṃḍabāṇajaṃghorumuradānavasaṃvṛtam || 49 ||
saṃpūrṇahṛṣṭavadanaṃ kirīṭotkaṭakuṇḍalam ||
dvibhujaṃ daityarājānaṃ kārayitvā nṛpaḥ svayam||4.140.50||
gṛhasya madhye śālāyāṃ viśālāyāṃ tato.arcayet ||
bhrātṛmaṃtrijanaiḥ sārddhaṃ saṃtuṣṭo vaṃdibhiḥ stutaḥ || 51 ||
kamalaiḥ kumudaiḥ puṣpaiḥ kahlārai raktakotpalaiḥ ||
gandhadhūpānnanaivedyairakṣatairguḍapūpakaiḥ ||52||
madyamāṃsasurālehyadīpavartyupahārakaiḥ ||
maṃtreṇānena rājendra samaṃtrī sapurohitaḥ || 53 ||
balirāja namastubhyaṃ virocanasuta prabho ||
bhaviṣyendrasurārāte pūjeyaṃ pratigṛhyatām || 54 ||
evaṃ pūjāṃ nṛpaḥ kṛtvā rātrau jāgaraṇaṃ tataḥ ||
kārayetprekṣaṇīyādi naṭakṣatrakathānakaiḥ || 55 ||
lokaścāpi gṛhasyāṃte śayyāyāṃ śuklataṃḍulaiḥ ||
saṃsthāpya balirājānaṃ phalaiḥ puṣpaiśca pūjayet || 56 ||
balimuddiśya dīyaṃte dānāni kurunandana ||
yāni tānyakṣayāṇyāhurmayaivaṃ saṃpradarśitam || 57 ||
yadasyāṃ dīyate dānaṃ svalpaṃ vā yadi vā bahu ||
tadakṣayaṃ bhavetsarvaṃ viṣṇoḥ prītikaraṃ param || 58 ||
viṣṇunā vasudhā labdhā prītena balaye punaḥ ||
upakārakaro dattaścāsurāṇāṃ mahotsavaḥ || 59 ||
tataḥ prabhṛti rājendra pravṛttā kaumudī punaḥ ||
sarvopadravavidrāvi sarvavighnavināśinī ||4.140.60||
lokaśokaharī kāmyā dhanapuṣṭisukhāvahā ||
kuśabdena mahī jñeyā mudī harṣe tataḥ param || 61 ||
dhātujñairnaigamajñaiśca tenaiṣā kaumudī smṛtā ||
kau modante janā yasyāṃ nānābhāvaiḥ parasparā || 62 ||
hṛṣṭāstuṣṭāḥ sukhāyattāstenaiṣā kaumudī smṛtā ||
kumudāni baleryasmāddīyante.asyāṃ yudhiṣṭhira || 63 ||
arthārthe pārtha bhūmau ca tenaiṣā kaumudī smṛtā ||
ekamevamahorātraṃ varṣe varṣe viśāṃpate || 64 ||
dattaṃ dānavarājasya ādarśamiva bhūtale ||
yaḥ karoti nṛpo rāṣṭraṃ tasya vyādhibhayaṃ kutaḥ || 65 ||
kuta īti bhayaṃ tatra nāsti mṛtyukṛtaṃ bhayam ||
subhikṣaṃ kṣemamārogyaṃ sarvasampada uttamāḥ || 66 ||
nīrujaśca janāḥ sarve sarvopadravavarjitāḥ ||
kaumudīkaraṇādrājanbhavatīha mahītale || 67 ||
yo yādṛśena bhāvena tiṣṭhatyasyāṃ yudhiṣṭhira ||
harṣadainyādirūpeṇa tasya varṣaṃ prayāti hi || 68 ||
rudite roditi varṣaṃ hṛṣṭo varṣaṃ prahṛṣyati ||
bhuktau bhoktā bhavedvarṣaṃ svasthaḥ svastho bhavediti || 69 ||
tasmātprahṛṣṭaistuṣṭaiśca kartavyā kaumudī naraiḥ ||
vaiṣṇavī dānavī ceyaṃ tithiḥ paitrī yudhiṣṭhira || 4.140.70 ||
upaśamitameghanādaṃ prajvalitadaśānanaṃ ramitarāmam ||
rāmāyaṇamiva subhagaṃ dīpadinaṃ haratu vo duritam || 71 ||
kūṣmāṇḍādānaramyaṃ kuvalayakhaṇḍaiśca dhātukābhadram ||
śaradiva harigatanidraṃ dīpadinaṃ haratu vo duritam ||72||
dīpotsave janitasarvajanapramodāṃ kurvaṃti ye sumanaso balirājapūjām || dānopabhogasukhavṛddhiśatākulānāṃ harṣeṇa varṣamiha pārthiva yāti teṣām ||73||
iti śrībhaviṣye mahāpurāṇa uttarapa rvaṇi śrīkṛṣṇayudhiṣṭhirasaṃvāde dīpālikotsavavarṇanaṃ nāma catvāriṃśaduttaraśatatamo.adhyāyaḥ || 140 |||9|||

|| yudhiṣṭhira uvāca || ||
kathayasva mahābhāga sarvajño hyasi yādava ||
sarvakāmāptaye kṛtyaṃ kathaṃ śāṃtikapauṣṭikam ||1||
|| śrīkṛṣṇa uvāca|| ||
śrīkāmaḥ śāntikāmo vā grahayajñaṃ samārabhet ||
dṛṣṭyāyuḥ puṣṭikāmo vā tathaivābhicaranpunaḥ || 2 ||
sarvaśāstrāṇyanukramya saṃkṣipya granthavistaram ||
grahaśāṃtiṃ pravakṣyāmi purāṇaśrutibhāṣitām ||3||
puṇye.ahni viprakathite kṛtvā brāhmaṇavācanam ||
grahāngrahādhidevāṃśca sthāpya homaṃ samārabhet || 4 ||
grahayajñastridhā proktaḥ purāṇaśrutikovidaiḥ ||
prathamo.ayutahomaḥ syāllakṣahomastataḥ param || 5 ||
tṛtīyaḥ koṭihomastu sarvakāmaphalapradaḥ ||
ayutenāhutīnāṃ ca navagrahamakhaḥ smṛtaḥ ||6||
tasya tāvadvidhiṃ vakṣye purāṇaśrutibhāṣitam ||
gartasyottarapūrveṇa vitastidvayavistṛtām || 7 ||
kuryādvidhānato vediṃ vitastyucchrayasaṃyutām ||
saṃsthāpanāya devānāṃ caturasrāmudakplavām || 8 ||
agnipraṇayanaṃ kṛtvā tasyāmāvāhayetsurān ||
devānāṃ tatra saṃsthāpyā viṃśatirdvādaśādhikā || 9 ||
sūryaḥ somo mahīputro budho jīvaḥ sitorkajaḥ ||
rāhuḥ keturiti proktā grahālokahitāvahāḥ || 4.141.10 || tāmrakātsphaṭikādraktacandanātsvarṇajāvubhau ||
rajatādāyasāccaiva grahāḥ kāryāḥ kramādamī || 11 ||
madhye tu bhāskaraṃ vidyāllohitaṃ dakṣiṇena tu ||
uttareṇa guruṃ vidyādbudhaṃ pūrvottareṇa tu || 12 ||
pūrveṇa bhārgavaṃ vidyātsomaṃ dakṣiṇapūrvake ||
paścimottarataḥ ketuṃ sthāpayecchuklataṃḍulaiḥ || 13 ||
rājāmātyānmahārāja taṃḍulaiḥ sthāpayedatha ||
bhāskarasyeśvaraṃ vidyādumāṃ ca śaśinastathā || 14 ||
skandamaṅgārakasyāpi budhasya ca tathā harim ||
brahmāṇaṃ ca gurorvidyācchukrasyāpi śacīpatim || || 15 ||
śanaiścarasya tu yamaṃ rāhoḥ kālaṃ tathaiva ca ||
ketostu citraguptaṃ tu sarveṣāmeva devatāḥ || 16 ||
agnirāpaḥ kṣitirviṣṇurindraḥ sauvarṇadevatāḥ ||
prajāpatiśca sūryaśca brahmā pratyadhidevatāḥ ||17||
vināyakaṃ tathā durgāṃ vāyumākāśameva ca ||

saṃsmaredraktamādityamaṃgārakasamanvitam || 19 ||
somaśukrau yathāśvetau budhajīvau ca piṅga lau ||
maṃdarāhū tathā kṛṣṇau dhūmraṃ ketuguṇaṃ viduḥ || 4.141.20 ||
grahavarṇāni deyāni vāsāṃsi kusumāni ca ||
gaṃdhāśca balayaścaiva dhūpā guggulapūrvakāḥ || || 21 ||
guḍaudanaṃ raverdadyātsomāya ghṛtapāyasam ||
aṃgārakāya saṃyāvaṃ budhāya kṣīraṣaṣṭikam || 22 ||
dadhyannaṃ gurave dadyācchakrāya tu ghṛtaudanam ||

citraudanaṃ ketave ca sarvānbhakṣyairathārcayet ||
prāguttareṇa tasmācca dadhyakṣatavibhūṣitam || 24 ||
cūta pallavasaṃpannaṃ phalavastrayugānvitam ||
pañcaratnasamāyuktaṃ pañcabhaṃgayutaṃ tathā || 25 ||
sthāpayedavraṇaṃ kuṃbhaṃ varuṇaṃ tatra vinyaset ||
gaṃgāyāḥ saritaḥ sarvāḥ samudrāśca sarāṃsi ca || 26 || gajāśvarathyāvalmīkātsaṃgamāddhṛdagokulāt ||
mṛdamānīya rājendra sarvauṣadhijalānvitām || 27 ||

sarve samudrāḥ saritaḥ saraḥ prasravaṇāni ca || 28 ||
āyāṃtu yajamānasya duritakṣayakārakāḥ ||
evamāvāhayitvā tānsarvānnṛpatisattama || 29 ||
homaṃ samārabhetsarpiryavavrīhitilādinā ||
arkaḥ palāśakhadirau hyapāmārgo.atha pippalaḥ || 4.141.30 ||
uduṃbara śamīdūrvākuśāśca samidhaḥ kramāt ||
ekaikasya cāṣṭaśatamaṣṭāviṃśati vā punaḥ || 31 ||
hotavyā madhusarpibhyāṃ dadhnā vā pāyasena vā ||
prādeśamātrā ṛjavo viśākhā viphalāḥ śubhāḥ || 32 ||
kalpyaṃte samidhaḥ prājñaiḥ sarvakarmasu sarvadā ||
devānāmapi sarveṣāmupāṃśu paramārthavit || 33 ||.a
svena svenaiva maṃtreṇa hotavyāḥ samidhaḥ pṛthak ||

.a.āgniṃ dūtaṃ vṛṇīmahe.a.a iti vahnerudāhṛtaḥ ||

.a.asahasraśīrṣā puruṣa.a.a iti viṣṇorudāhṛtaḥ || 43 ||
varuṇaḥ pavanaścaiva dhanādhyakṣastathā śivaḥ ||
brahmaṇā sahitaḥ śeṣo dikpālāḥ pātu te sadā || 44 ||
kīrtirlakṣmīrdhṛtirmedhāḥ puṣṭiḥ śraddhā kriyā matiḥ ||
buddhirlajjā śāṃtipuṣṭī kāṃtistuṣṭiśca mātaraḥ ||45||
etāstvāmabhiṣiṃcaṃtu dharmapatnyaḥ samāgatāḥ ||
ādityaścandramā bhaumo budhajīvasitārkajāḥ ||46||
grahāstvāmabhiṣiṃcaṃtu rāhuḥ ketuśca tarpitāḥ ||
devadānavagaṃdharvā yakṣarākṣasapannagāḥ || 47 ||
ṛṣayo manavo gāvo devamātara eva ca ||
devapatnyo drumā nāgā daityāścāpsarasāṃ gaṇāḥ || || 48 ||

auṣadhāni ca ratnāni kālasyāvayavāśca ye || 49 ||

tataḥ śuklāṃbaradharaḥ śuklagandhānulepanaḥ ||

yajamānaḥ sapatnīkānsiddhidāṃstānsamāhitān ||

kapile sarvadevānāṃ pūjanīyāsi rohiṇī ||
tīrthadevamayī yasmādataḥ śāṃtiṃ prayaccha me || 57 ||
puṇyastvaṃ śaṃkha puṇyānāṃ maṅgalānāṃ ca maṃgalam ||

dharma tvaṃ vṛṣarūpeṇa jagadānandakārakaḥ ||
aṣṭamūrteradhiṣṭhānamataḥ śāṃtiṃ prayaccha me || 59 ||
hiraṇyagarbhagarbhasthaṃ hema bījaṃ vibhāvasoḥ ||
anantapuṇyaphaladamataḥ śāṃtiṃ prayaccha me || 4.141.60 ||
pītavastrayugaṃ dadyādvāsudevasya vallabham ||

kapilastvaśvarūpeṇa yasmādamṛtasambhavaḥ ||
candrārkavāhano nityamataḥ śāṃtiṃ prayaccha me || 62 ||

yaṃ yaṃ prārthayate kāmaṃ taṃ tamāpnoti puṣkalam ||
niṣkāmaḥ kurute yastu paraṃ brahma sa gacchati || 4.141.120 ||
śāṃtiṃ navagrahamayīṃ duritopaśāṃtiṃ rājankaroti bahunā vidhivaddvijendraiḥ ||
kṣemaṃ subhikṣamatulaṃ kulavṛddhisaṃpattatrāsti yatra kurute bata lakṣahomam ||121||
iti śrībhaviṣye mahāpurāṇa uttaraparvaṇi śrīkṛṣṇayu dhiṣṭhirasaṃvāde navagrahalakṣahomavidhivarṇanaṃ nāmaikacatvāriṃśaduttaraśatatamo.adhyāyaḥ ||141|| ||9|||
koṭihomavidhivarṇanam
śrīkṛṣṇa uvāca || ||
rājā saṃvaraṇaḥ pūrvaṃ pratiṣṭhāne purottame ||
babhūva sa mahābhāgaḥ śāstrārthakuśalo balī ||1||
brahmaṇyaḥ pitṛbhaktaśca devabrāhmaṇapūjakaḥ ||
tasyātha kurvato rājyaṃ samyakpālayataḥ prajāḥ ||2||
ājagāma mahāyogī sanako brahmaṇaḥ sutaḥ||
dattvā tasyāsanaṃ rājā praṇamya śirasā tathā ||3||
pūjayitvārghyapādyādyairātmānaṃ vinivedya ca ||
itihāsapurāṇoktāścakāra vividhāḥ kathāḥ ||4||
rājarṣīṇāṃ purāṇāṃ ca caritāni yathārthavit ||
tataḥ kathāṃtare rājā kāryaṃ manasi saṃsthitam ||5||
hitāya pṛthivīśānāṃ jagataścātmanastathā ||
papraccha vinayopeto yogācāryaṃ mahāmatiḥ || 6 ||
|| saṃvaraṇa uvāca || ||
bhagavanmahadutpātasaṃbhave bhūprakaṃpane ||
nirghāte pāṃśuvarṣe ca gṛhabhaṃge tathaiva ca || 7 ||
janmanakṣatrapīḍāsu anāvṛṣṭibhayeṣu ca ||
jvareṣu grahapīḍāsu durbhikṣe rāṣṭravigrahe || || 8 ||
vyādhīnāṃ saṃbhave jāte śarīre cātipīḍite ||
kleśe mahati cotpanne kiṃ kartavyaṃ narottamaiḥ || 9 ||
svargasya sādhanaṃ yacca kīrtidaṃ dhanadaṃ tathā ||
prabrūhi me dvijaśreṣṭha tathārogyapradaṃ nṛṇām || 4.142.10 ||
|| sanatkumāra uvāca || ||
śṛṇurājanpravakṣyāmi śāṃtikarma hyanuttamam ||
koṭihomākhyamatulaṃ sarvakāmaphalapradam || 11 ||
brahmahatyādipāpāni yena naśyaṃti tatkṣaṇāt ||
utpātā praśamaṃ yāṃti mahatsaṃpadyate sukham || 12 ||
vidhānaṃ tasya vakṣyāmi śṛṇuṣvaikamanā bhava ||
devāgāre nadītīre vane vā bhavane.api vā || 13 ||
parvate vāpi kurvīta ya icchetkṣemamātmanaḥ ||
śubhanakṣatrayoge ca vāre pūrvaguṇānvite || 14 ||
yajamānasyānukūlye koṭihomaṃ samācaret ||
pūjayitvā prayatnena brāhmaṇaṃ vedapāragam || 15 ||
vastrairvibhūṣaṇaiścaiva gaṃdhamālyānulepanaiḥ ||
praṇamya vidhivattasmai ātmānaṃ vinivedayet || 16 ||
tvaṃ no gatiḥ pitā mātā tvaṃ gatistvaṃ parāyaṇaḥ ||
tvatprasādena viprarṣe sarvaṃ me syānmanogatam || 17 ||
āpadvimokṣāya ca me kuru yajñamanuttamam||
koṭihomārthamatulaṃ śāṃtyarthaṃ sārvakāmikam || 18 ||
purohitastataḥ prājñaḥ śuklāṃbaradharaḥ śuciḥ ||
brāhmaṇairvedasaṃvṛttaiḥ puṇyairyuktaḥ samāhitaiḥ || 19 ||
bhūmibhāge same śuddhe prāgudakpravaṇe tathā ||
puṇyāhaṃ vācayetpūrvaṃ kṛtvā viprānsupūjitān || 4.142.20 ||
tatastu mahitairvipraḥ sūtrayenmaṇḍapaṃ śubham ||
uttamaṃ śatahastaṃ tu tadardhena tu madhyamam ||
jaghanyaṃ tu tadardhena śaktikālādyapekṣayā ||21||
madhye tu maṇḍapasyāpi kuṃḍaṃ kuryādvicakṣaṇaḥ ||
aṣṭahastapramāṇena āyāmena tathaiva ca || 22 ||
mekhalātritayaṃ tasya dvādaśāṃgulavistatam ||
tatpramāṇāṃ tathā yoniṃ kurvīta susamāhitaḥ || 23 ||
kuṃḍasya pūrvabhāge tu vediṃ kuryādvicakṣaṇaḥ ||
caturhastāṃ samāṃ caiva hastamātrocchritaḥ nṛpa || 24 ||
sthānaṃ tatsarvabhūtānāṃ kuryādyatnena buddhimān || 25 ||
udalipya tato bhūmiṃ maṃḍapasya samīpataḥ ||
vinyasetkalaśāṃstatra jalapūrṇāṃścaturdaśa || 26 ||
aśvatthaplakṣacūtādyaiḥ pallavairupaśobhitān||
vitānamupariṣṭācca maṃḍapasya prakalpayet || 27 ||
sthāpayeddikṣu sarvāsu toraṇāni vicakṣaṇaḥ ||
evaṃ saṃbhṛtasaṃbhāraiḥ purodhāḥ susamāhitaḥ || 28 ||
puṇyāhajayaghoṣeṇa homakarma samārabhet ||
sthāpayitvā surānvedyāṃ vakṣyamāṇānariṃdama || 29 ||
brāhmaṇaṃ pūrvabhāge tu madhye devaṃ janārdanam||
paścime tu tathā rudraṃ vasūnuttaratastathā || 4.142.30 ||
aiśānyāṃ ca grahānsarvānāgneyyāṃ marutastathā ||
vāyuṃ saumyāṃ tathaiśānyāṃ lokapālānkrameṇa tu || 31 ||
evaṃ saṃsthāpya vibudhānyathāsthānaṃ nṛpottama ||
pūjayedvidhivadvastragandhamālyānulepanaiḥ || 32 ||
vedoktamaṃtraistalliṅgaiḥ purāṇoktaiḥ pṛthakpṛthak || ||
ādityā vasavo rudrā lokapālāstathā grahāḥ || 33 ||
brahmā janārdanaścaiva śūlapāṇirbhagākṣihā ||
atra saṃnihitāḥ sarve bhavaṃtu sukhabhāginaḥ || 34 ||
pūjāṃ gṛhṇaṃtu sarvetra mayā bhaktyopapāditām ||
kurvaṃtu ca śubhaṃ sarve yajñakarma samāhitāḥ || 35 ||
evaṃ saṃpūjayitvā tāndevānyatnena śuddhadhīḥ||
naivedyairvividhairbhakṣyaiḥ phalaiḥ patraistathaiva ca || 36 ||
tatastu tairdvijaiḥ sārddhaṃ kuṃḍasya vidhipūrvakam ||
kuryātsaṃskārakaraṇaṃ yathoktaṃ vedacintakaiḥ || 37 ||
tataḥ samāhvayedvahniṃ nāmnā khyātaṃ ghṛtārciṣam ||
niyojayeddvijāṃstatra śatasaṃkhyānnṛpottama ||
alābhe tu bahūnā ca yathālābhaṃ niyojayet || 38 || vidyāvṛddhānvayovṛddhāngṛhasthānsaṃyatendriyān|| svakarmaniyatāñjñānaśīlāñchāntāndvijottamān || 39 ||
ciṃtayettatra deveśaṃ paṃcāsyaṃ nṛpa pāvakam ||
mukhāni tasya catvāri sapta jihvāśca pārthiva || 4.142.40 ||
ekajihvamathaikaṃ tu tatsmṛtaṃ sarvakāmadam ||
dhūmāyamāne mana vṛthā hotavyaṃ jvalite nale || 41 ||
ṛgbhiḥ pūrvāmukhairhomo yajurbhiścottarāmukhaiḥ|
sāmabhiḥ paścime kāryo.atharvabhirdakṣiṇāmukhaiḥ || 42 ||
āghārāvājya bhāgau tu pūrvaṃ hutvā vicakṣaṇaḥ ||
paritotha paristīrṇe kalpitai ca tathāsane || 43 ||
brahmāṇaṃ pūrvamapyetatsarvaṃ paścātsamācaret ||
homo vyāhṛtibhiścaiva sarvastatra vidhīyate || 44 ||
praṇavādibhistalliṃgaiḥ svāhākārāṃtayojitaiḥ||
juhuyātsarvadevānāṃ vedyāṃ ye copakalpitāḥ ||45||
evaṃ prakalpaye dyajñaṃ koṭihomākhyamuttamam ||
tilāḥ kṛṣṇā ghṛtābhyaktāḥ kiñcidyavasamanvitāḥ || 46 ||
hotavyāḥ koṭihome tu samidhaśca palāśajāḥ ||
pūrṇe pūrṇesahasre tu dadyātpūrṇāhutiṃ śubhām ||
pañcame tanmukhe rājansarvakāmārthasiddhaye || 47||
pūrṇāhutyaḥ samākhyātāḥ koṭihome narādhipa ||
sahasrāṇi nṛpaśreṣṭha daśa śāstraviśāradaiḥ || 48 ||
prāraṃbhadinamārabhya brāhmaṇairbrahmavādibhiḥ ||
bhāvyaṃ sayajamānaistu athavā sapurohitaiḥ || 49 ||
krodhalobhādayo doṣā varjanīyāḥ prayatnataḥ ||
yajamānena rājendra savargakāmānabhīpsitā || 4.142.50 ||
|| saṃvaraṇa uvāca || ||
bahutvātkarmaṇo brahmankoṭi homaḥ suduṣkaraḥ ||
kālena mahatā caiva śakyaḥ prāptuṃ kathaṃcana || 51 ||
niyamādbrahmacaryādvā duṣkaro hīti me matiḥ ||
nirodho.atra brāhmaṇānāṃ bhṛśayyādiṣu duṣkaraḥ ||52||
kāryādgurutayā yasmātparvakālādyapekṣayā ||
etadvijñāyate brahmanyadi śāstreṣu kathyate ||
koṭihomasya saṃkṣepaṃ vada me brahma saṃbhava || 53 ||
|| sanatkumāra uvāca || ||
śatānano daśamukho dvimukhaikamukhastathā ||
caturvidho mahārāja koṭihomo vidhīyate || 54 ||
kāryasya gurutāṃ jñātvā naiva kuryādaparvaṇi ||
yathā saṃkṣepataḥ kāryaḥ koṭihomastathā śṛṇu || 55 ||
kṛtvā kuṃḍaśataṃ divyaṃ yathoktaṃ hasta saṃmitam ||
ekaikasmiṃstataḥ kuṃḍe śataṃ viprānniyojayet || 56 ||
sadyaḥ pakṣe tu viprāṇāṃ sahasraṃ parikīrtitam ||
ekasthānapraṇītegnau sarvataḥ paribhāvite || 57 ||
homaṃ kuryurdvijāḥ sarve kuṇḍe kuṇḍe yathoditam ||
yathā kuṃḍabahutve.api rājasūye mahākratau || 58 ||
na ca vahnibahutvaṃ syāttatra yajñe vidhīyate ||
tathā kuṃḍaśate.apyatra ghṛtārciṣi vitānite || 59 ||
eka eva bhavedyajñaḥ koṭihomo na saṃśayaḥ ||
evaṃ yatkriyate kṣipraṃ vyākulaiḥ kāryagauravāt ||
śatānanaḥ sa vijñeyaḥ koṭihomo na saṃśayaḥ || 4.142.60 ||
svalpairahobhiḥ kāryaḥ syādvarṣākālādike.api vā ||
tadā daśaguṇaḥ kāryaḥ koṭihomo vijānatā || 61 ||
viprāṇāṃ dve śate tatra suvibhajya niyojayet ||
te.api vijñānaśīlāḥ syurvratavaṃto jitendriyāḥ || 62 ||
bhūpa kuṃḍadvayaṃ kṛtvā vibhajya ca vibhāvasum ||
homaṃ kuryurdvijā bhūyaḥ saṃskṛtya vidhipūrvakam || 63 ||
śataṃ tatra niyojyaṃ syādviprāṇāṃ pravibhajya vai ||
māse vātha dvimāse vā yathākāle hyupasthite || 64 ||
evaṃ ca dvimukhaṃ kāryaḥ koṭihomo vicakṣaṇaiḥ || 65 ||
yadā tu svecchayā yajñaṃ yajamānaḥ samāpayet ||
kālena bahudhā rājaṃstadā caikamukho bhavet || 66 ||
ekakuṃḍasthito vahnirekacittaiḥ samāhitaiḥ ||
yathālābha sthitairviprairjñānaśīlairvicakṣaṇaiḥ ||67||
na saṃkhyāniyamaścātra brāhmaṇānāṃ narottama ||
na kālaniyamaścaiva svecchāyajñaḥ sa ucyate || 68 ||
āvṛttyā sarvakāmasya cāturmāsyānukarmavat ||
tadaprasaktau kartavyo yajño.ayaṃ sārvakālikaḥ || 69 ||
ayamekamukho rājankālena bahunā bhavet ||
bahuvighnaśca kālena tasmātsaṃkṣepamācaret || 4.142.70 ||
yato hi cittavittādyamāyuścaivāsthiraṃ sadā ||
ataḥ saṃkṣepataḥ kāryaṃ dharmakāryaṃ praśasyate || 71 ||
tataḥ samāpte yajñe tu kārayetsumahotsavam ||
śaṃkhatūryaninādena brahmaghoṣasvanena ca || 72 ||
tatastu dīkṣayedvinprānhotṛrṃśca śraddhayānvitaḥ ||
niṣkaiśca kaṃkaṇaiścaiva kuṇḍalairvividhairnṛpa || 73 ||
gośataṃ caiva dātavyamaśvānāṃ ca śataṃ tadā ||
sahasraṃ ca suvarṇasya sarveṣāmapi dāpayet || 74 ||
grāmairgajai rathairaśvaiḥ pūjayecca purohitam ||
dīnāndhakṛpaṇānsarvānvastrādyaiścāpi pūjayet || 79 ||
tataścāvabhṛthaṃ snāyāttairghaṭaiḥ pūrvakalpitaiḥ ||
lakṣahomoktamaṃtreṇa sadā vijayakāriṇā || 76 ||
evaṃ samāpayedyastu koṭihomamakhaṃ śubham ||
tasyārogyaṃ vittaputrarāṣṭravṛddhistathaiva ca || 77 ||
sarvapāpakṣayaścaiva jāyate nṛpasattama ||
anāvṛṣṭibhayaṃ caiva utpātabhayameva ca || 78 ||
durbhikṣaṃ grahapīḍā ca praśamaṃ yāti bhūtale ||
etatpuṇyaṃ pāpaharaṃ sarvakāmaphalapradam ||
sanatkumāramuninā pārthivāya niveditum || 79 ||
sarvopasargaśamanaṃ bhavane vane vā ye kārayanti manujā nṛpakoṭihomam ||
bhogānavāpya manasobhimatānprakāmaṃ te yāṃti śakrasadanaṃ suviśuddhasattvāḥ || 4.142.80 || || iti śrībhaviṣye mahāpurāṇa uttaraparvaṇi śrīkṛṣṇayudhiṣṭhirasaṃvāde koṭihoma vidhivarṇanaṃ nāma dvicatvāriṃśaduttaraśatatamo.adhyāyaḥ || 142 || || cha ||
mahāśāntividhivarṇanam
|| śrīkṛṣṇa uvāca || ||
mahāśāṃtiṃ pravakṣyāmi mahādevena bhāṣitām||
pārthivānāṃ hitārthāya mahādustaratāriṇīm|| 1 ||
nṛpābhiṣeke sā kāryā yātrākāle nṛpasya tu ||
duḥsvapne durnimitte ca grahavaiguṇyasaṃbhave || || 2 ||
vidyudulkānipāte ca janmarkṣe grahadaivate ||
ketūdaye.atha saṃjāte nirghāte kṣitikampane || 3 ||
prasūtau mūlagaṇḍānte yamalasya tu saṃbhave ||
chatrāṇāṃ ca dhvajānāṃ ca svasthānātpatane bhuvi ||
kākolūkakapotānāṃ praveśe veśmanastathā || 4 ||
krūragrahāṇāṃ vakratve janmādiṣu viśeṣataḥ ||
janmani dvādaśe caiva caturthe vāṣṭame tathā || 5 ||
yadā syurgurumandā.a.arāḥ sūryaścaiva viśeṣataḥ ||
yuddhe grahāṇāṃ sarveṣāṃ sūryaśītāṃśukīlake || 6 ||
vastrāyudhagavāśveṣu maṇikeśavināśane ||
yadyagre paridṛśyeta rātrāviṃdradhanustathā || 7 ||
veśmanaśca tulābhaṃge garbheṣvaśvatarīṣu ca||
ravīndvoruparāgeṣu mahāśāṃtiḥ praśasyate || 8 ||
sarvāṇi durnimittāni praśamaṃ yānti sarvathā ||
tāṃ kuryurbrāhmaṇāḥ paṃca kulaśīlasamanvitāḥ || 9 ||
caturvedāstrivedāśca dvivedāścāpi pāṃḍava ||
ātharvaṇā viśeṣeṇa bahvṛcā yajusaṃyutāḥ || 4.143.10 ||
śucayaḥ śrutasaṃpannā japahomaparāyaṇāḥ ||
kṛcchrapārākanaktādyaiḥ kṛtakāya viśodhanāḥ || 11 ||
pūrvamārādhya maṃtraistu prārabheta kriyāṃ tataḥ ||
daśadvādaśahastaṃ vā maṃḍapaṃ kārayecchubham || 12 ||
tanmadhye vedikāṃ kuryāccaturhasta pramāṇataḥ ||
āgneyyāṃ kārayetkuṃḍaṃ hastamātraṃ suśobhanam || 13 ||
mekhalātrayasaṃyuktaṃ yonyā cāpi vibhūṣitam ||
baddhacandanamālaṃ ca toraṇālaṃkṛtaṃ tathā || 14 ||
gomayenopalipte ca maṃḍape tu dvijātayaḥ ||
śuklāmbaradharaḥ snātāḥ śuklamālyānulepanāḥ || 15 ||
tataśca pañca kalaśāṃstasyāṃ vedyāṃ niyojayet ||
āgneyādiṣu koṇeṣu pañcamaṃ madhyatastathā || 16 ||
aṣṭāsrālaṃkṛte padme cūtapallavaśobhite ||
brahmakūrcavidhānena paṃcagavyaṃ tu kārayet || 17 ||
auṣadhīḥ pañcaratnāni rocanāṃ candanaṃ tathā ||
siddhārthakāñchamīdūrvāḥ kuśānvrīhiryavāṃstathā || 18 ||
apāmārgaṃ phalavatīṃ nyagrodhoduṃbarau tathā ||
plakṣāśvatthakapitthāṃśca priyaṃgucūtapallavān || 19 ||
hastidaṃtamṛdaṃ caiva koṇakumbheṣu nikṣipet ||
puṇyatīrthodakānnaṃ ca dhānyaṃ gavyaṃ ca madhyame || 4.143.20 ||
kūrcaṃ vācamitīdaṃ ca vahnikumbhābhimantraṇam ||
āśuḥ śiśāno mantreṇa mantraṇaṃ vāyugocare|| || 21 ||
īśāvāsyaṃ caturthasya kumbhasya cābhimaṃtraṇam ||
madhyame japitavyāstu rudrakumbhe bhavodbhavāḥ ||22|| gaṃdhapuṣpākṣatairvastrairnaivaidyairghṛtapācitaiḥ||
phalaiśca nārikelādyairdīpakaiḥ kuṃbhapūjanam || 23 ||
svastivācanakaṃ caiva kārayettadanaṃtaram ||
krameṇānena śanakairagnikāryaṃ prayojayet|| 24 ||
agniṃ dūtamiti hyagniṃ pūrvameva nidhāpayet ||
hiraṇyagarbhaḥ samiti brahmāsananiyojanam || 25 ||
kapotasupraṇītena maṃtreṇa viniśeṣayet ||
kṛtvā cāvaraṇaṃ vahnerājyasaṃskārameva ca || 26 ||
atha cāsādayeddravyaṃ yathāvatsaprayojanam ||
tataḥ puruṣasūktena pāyasaśrapaṇaṃ bhavet || 27 ||
abhighāryātha saṃsiddhaṃ tathā saṃsthāpayedbhuvi ||
aṣṭādaśapramāṇedhmāndadyādatha śamīmayān || 28 ||
pālāśī samidhaḥ sapta tathā sapteti dāpayet ||
āghārāvājyabhāgau tu hutvā pūrvakrameṇa tu || 29 ||
juhuyādāhutīḥ sapta jātavedasa ityṛcā ||
sthālīpākasya juhuyātpunarvai jātavedasā || 4.143.30 ||
taratsamaṃdī sūktena catasro juhuyāttataḥ ||
yamāyeti ca saptānyāḥ svāhāṃtā juhuyāttataḥ || 31 ||
idaṃ viṣṇustataḥ sapta juhuyādāhutīrnṛpa ||
nakṣatrebhyastataḥ svāhā saptaviṃśada thāhutīḥ || 32 ||
yatkarmaṇaiti juhuyāttataḥ sviṣṭakṛtaṃ punaḥ ||
grahahomastataḥ kāryastilairājyapariplutaiḥ || 33 ||
prāyaścittaṃ tato hutvā homakarma samāpayet ||
tatastu tūryanirghoṣaiḥ kāhalāśaṃkhaniḥsvanaiḥ || 34 ||
yajamānasya kartavyo hyabhiṣeko dvijottamaiḥ ||
kāśmaryavṛkṣasaṃbhūte bhadre bhadrāsane sthitam || 35 ||
vedimadhyagataṃ kṛtvā durnimittapraśāṃtaye ||
paṃcabhiḥ kalaśaiḥ pūrṇairmaṃtrairebhiryathākramam || 36 ||
sahasrākṣeṇa prathamaṃ tataścaiva śatā yuṣā ||
sajoṣasā ca indreti viśvānītyṛgbhireva ca || 37 ||
ṛtamastviti ca tataḥ snāpayeyuḥ samāhitāḥ ||
tato diśāṃ baliṃ dadyādvicitrānna samāyutam || 38 ||
namostu sarvabhūtebhya iti mantramudāharan ||
snātasya brāhmaṇāḥ sarve paṭheyuḥ śāṃtimuttamām || 39 ||
śāṃtitoyena dhārāṃ ca pātayitvā saṃmatataḥ ||
puṇyāhavācanaṃ kṛtvā śāṃtikarma samāpayet || 4.143.40 ||
kṣitiṃ hiraṇyaṃ vāsāṃsi śayanānyāsanāni ca ||
viprebhyo dakṣiṇāṃ dadyādyathā śaktyā vimatsaraḥ || 41 ||
dīnānāthaviśiṣṭebhyaḥ śrotriyebhyaśca dāpayet ||
bhojanaṃ śobhanaṃ dattvā tataḥ sarvaṃ prasiddhyati || 42 ||
āyuśca labhate dīrghaṃ śatrūnvijayate kṣaṇāt ||
durgāṇi cāsya sidyanti putrāṃśca labhate śubhān || 43 ||
yathāśastraprahārāṇāṃ kavacaṃ vāraṇaṃ bhavet||
tathā daivopaghātānāṃ śāntirbhavati vāraṇam || 44 ||
ahiṃsakasya dāṃtasya dharmārjitadhanasya ca ||
dayādākṣiṇyayuktasya sarve sānugrahā grahāḥ|| 45||
arthānsamarthayati varddhayate ca dharmaṃ kāmaṃ prasādhayati tasya pinaṣṭi pāpam ||
yaḥ kārayetsakaladoṣaharīṃ samarthāṃ śāṃtiṃ praśāṃtahṛdayaḥ puruṣaḥ sadaiva || || 46 ||
iti śrībhaviṣye mahāpurāṇa uttaraparvaṇi śrīkṛṣṇayudhiṣṭhirasaṃvāde mahāśāṃtividhivarṇanaṃ nāma tricatvāriṃśaduttaraśatatamo.adhyāyaḥ ||143||
gaṇanāthaśāntivarṇanam
|| || yudhiṣṭhira uvāca || ||
śāṃtiṃ kathaya deveśa gaṇanāthasya me vibho ||
yāṃ kṛtvā sarvadurgāṇi tarate mānavo.akhilaḥ || 1 || || ||
|| śrīkṛṣṇa uvāca || ||
śāṃtiṃ vakṣyāmi rājendra gaṇanāthapriyāṃ parām ||
yasyā ācaraṇenaiva sarvāriṣṭakṣayo bhavet || 2 ||
vināyakaṃ karmāvighnasiddhyarthaṃ vinibodhata ||
svapne.avagāhate.atyarthaṃ jalaṃ muṃḍāṃśca paśyati || 3 ||
kāṣāyavāsasaścaiva kravyādānadhirohati ||
apamūrdhaiḥ śave rudraiḥ sahaikatra ca tiṣṭhati || 4 ||
vrajannapi tathātmānaṃ manyatenugataṃ paraiḥ ||
vimanā viphalāraṃbhaḥ saṃsīdatyanimittataḥ || 5 ||
tenopasṛṣṭo labhate na rājyaṃ rājanaṃdanaḥ ||
kumārī na ca bhartāramapatyaṃ garbhiṇī tathā || 6 ||
ācāryatvaṃ śrotriyaśca na śiṣyo.adhyāpanaṃ tathā ||
vaṇiglābhaṃ na cāpnoti na kṛṣiṃ ca kṛṣīvalaḥ || 7 ||
snapanaṃ tasya kartavyaṃ puṇye.ahni vidhipūrvakam ||
gaurasarṣapakalkena sājyenotsāditasya tu || 8 ||
sugandhakuṃkumāliptaśarīraśirasastathā ||
bhadrāsanopaviṣṭasya svasti vācya dvijāñchubhān || 9 || aśvasthānādgajasthānādvalmīkātsaṃgamāddhradāt ||
mṛttikāṃ rocanāṃ gaṃdhānguggulaṃ cāpsu nikṣipet || 4.144.10 ||
yadā hṛtā hyekavaṇairmanubhiḥ kalaśairhradāt ||
carmaṇyānaḍuhe rakte sthāpya bhadrāsanaṃ tathā || ||1 1||
sahasrākṣaṃ śatadhāramṛṣiṇā vacanaṃ kṛtam ||
tena tvāmabhiṣiṃcāmi pāvamānyaḥ punaṃtu te ||12||
bhagaṃ te varuṇo rājā bhagaṃ sūryo bṛhaspatiḥ ||
bhagamindraśca vāyuśca bhagaṃ saptarṣayo daduḥ || 13 ||
yatte keśeṣu daurbhāgyaṃ sīmaṃte yacca mūrddhani ||
lalāṭe karṇayorakṣṇorāpastadghnantu te sadā || 14 ||
snātasya sārṣapaṃ tailaṃ sruveṇaudumbareṇa ca ||
juhuyānmūrddhani kuśānsavyena parigṛhya ca || 15 ||
mitaśca samitaścaiva tathā sālakaṭaṃkaṭau ||
kūṣmāṃḍo rājaputraśca aṃte svāhāsamanvitaiḥ || 16 ||
nāmabhirbalimaṃtraiśca namaskārasamanvitaiḥ ||
dadyāccatuṣpathe śūrpe kuśānāstīrya sarvaśaḥ || 17 ||
kṛtā kṛtāṃstaṃḍulāṃśca palalaudanameva ca ||
matsyānpakvāṃstathaivāmānmāṃsametāvadeva tu || 18 ||
puṣpaṃ citraṃ sugandhaṃ ca surāṃ ca trividhāmapi ||
mūlakaṃ pūri kāpūpaṃ tathaivoṃḍerakasrajam || 19 ||
dūrvāṃ sarvaprapuṣpāṇāṃ dattvārghyaṃ pūrṇamaḍalām ||
vināyakasya jananīmupatiṣṭhettatoṃ.abikām || 4.144.20 ||
rūpaṃ dehi yaśo dehi bhagaṃ bhavati dehi me ||
putrāndehi dhanaṃ dehi sarvakāmāṃśca dehi me || 21 ||
tataḥ śuklāṃbaradharaḥ śuklamālyānulepanaḥ ||
bhojayedbrāhmaṇāndadyādvastrayugmaṃ gurorapi || 22 ||
evaṃ vināyakaṃ pūjya grahāṃścaiva vidhānataḥ ||
karmaṇāṃ phalamāpnoti śriyamāpnoti cottamām || 23 ||
ādityasya tathā pūjāṃ tilakaṃ svāminastathā ||
mahāgaṇapateścaiva kurvansiddhimavāpnuyāt || 24 ||
śvetārkasya tu yo mūle mahāgaṇapatiḥ kṛtaḥ ||
sarvalakṣaṇasaṃpūrṇaḥ so.api siddhikaraḥ smṛtaḥ || 25 ||
saṃjapyate śucau deśe vighnaṃ nātra hi dehinaḥ ||
paramaṃ pūjayennityaṃ gandhamālyasragādibhiḥ || 26 ||
kṣīṇabhāgyo.api puruṣaḥ pūjitaśca nareśvaraḥ ||
sarvasiddhimavāpnoti jayī bhavati sarvadā || .27 || ||
iti śrībhaviṣye mahāpurāṇa uttaraparvaṇi śrīkṛṣṇa yudhiṣṭhirasaṃvāde gaṇanāthaśāṃtivarṇanaṃ nāma catuścatvāriṃśaduttaraśatatamo.adhyāyaḥ || 144 || cha ||
nakṣatrahomavidhivarṇanam
|| śrīkṛṣṇa uvāca || ||
agnihotre sukhāsīnaṃ gargaḥ pṛcchati kauśikam ||
baṃdhane saṃnirodheṅgā vyādhīnāṃ saṃprapīḍane || 1 ||
kathaṃ mokṣo bhavettasya sādhyāsādhyaṃ bravīhi me ||
gargeṇa kauśikaḥ pṛṣṭa idaṃ vacanamabravīt ||2||
ādhāne janmanakṣatre naidhanapratyayeṣu ca ||
vyādhirutpadyate yasya kleśāya maraṇāya ca ||3||
kṛttikāsu yadā kaściśdvyādhiṃ saṃpratipadyate ||
navarātraṃ bhavetpīḍā trirātraṃ rohiṇīṣu ca ||4||
mṛgaśīrṣe pañcarātramārdrā prāṇaviyojinī ||
punarvasau ca puṣye ca saptarātraṃ vidhīyate || || 5 ||
navarātraṃ tathāśleṣā śmaśānāṃtaṃ maghāsu ca ||
dvau māsau phālgunī caiva uttarāsu tripakṣakam || 6 ||
haste ca tanu dṛśyeta citrāyāṃ tvarddhamāsa kam ||7||
māsadvayaṃ tathā svātau viśākhā viṃśatirdināḥ ||
maitre caiva daśāhaṃ tu jyeṣṭhā caivārddhamāsikā ||8||
mūlena jāyate mokṣaścāṣāḍhāsu tripañcakam ||
uttarādinaviṃśatyā dvau māsau śravaṇena tu || 9 ||
dhaniṣṭhāyāmarddhamāsaṃ vāruṇe tu daśāhakaiḥ ||
nava bhādrapadāṛkṣa uttarāsu tripaṃcakam || 4.145.10 ||
revatī daśarātraṃ tu ahorātraṃ tathāśvinī ||
prāṇairviyojayennityaṃ garga nāstyatra saṃśayaḥ || 11 ||
kauśikena samādiṣṭo nakṣatravyādhisaṃbhavaḥ ||
daivajñenāpi jñātavyaṃ nakṣatramatha janmanā || 12 ||
kṣīravṛkṣasya samidho juhuyādaśvadaivate ||
tilānmadhuplutānyāmye yavamevāgnidaivate || 13 ||
prājāpatye tu juhuyādbhogyabījakaraṃ bakam ||
saumye priyaṃgavo raudre sarpirmāṃsasamanvitam || 14 ||
āditye ca prayatnena ghṛtāktāḥ sitataṃḍulāḥ ||
payasā sarpiṣā sākaṃ bṛhaspatyadhidaivate || 15 ||
grāmyoṣadhairvaṭapatraiḥ sarpiḥ sarpādhidaivate ||
homaḥ proktaḥ priyaṃgūnāṃ nakṣatre yāmadaivate || 16 ||
sāvitre dadhihomotra tvāṣṭraṃ citraudanaṃ haviḥ || 17 ||
yavānsahājyena hunedraudre.agnau tu payodanam ||
maitreṇātha tu maṃtreṇa maitre kaṭakamiśritam || 18 ||
nairṛtye tilahomaḥ syādavyakte ca hutāśane ||
abdaivatye śālibījairvaiśvadevaṃ tu kārayet || 19 ||
raktāśca taṃḍulāścaiva hotavyā viṣṇudaivate ||
vāruṇe pārijātānāṃ puṣpāṇāṃ homa iṣyate || 4.145.20 ||
ajaikapāde nakṣatre prājāpatyena tatsamam ||
āhirbudhnye tu nakṣatre vaiśvadevaṃ tu kārayet || 21 ||
raktāśca taṇḍulāścaiva hotavyā viṣṇudaivate ||
pauṣe phalānyakhaṃḍāni juhuyādaṣṭottaraṃ śatam || 22 ||
sāvitrī homamekaṃ tu brahmābhihitavānpurā ||
sarvajvarapraśamanaṃ sadyo jvaraharaṃ param || 23 ||
iti śrībhaviṣye mahāpurāṇa uttaraparvaṇi śrīkṛṣṇayudhiṣṭhirasaṃvāde nakṣatrahomavidhivarṇanaṃ nāma paṃca catvāriṃśaduttaraśatatamo.adhyāyaḥ || 145 || || cha ||
aparādhaśatavratavarṇanam
|| śrīvasiṣṭha uvāca || ||
athānyadapi te vacmi vrataṃ rājanmahāphalam ||
aparādhaśataṃ yena kṣayaṃ yāti śṛṇuṣva tat || 1 ||
|| ikṣvākuruvāca || ||
kiṃ vrataṃ tanmamācakṣva ko.aparādhastu taṃ vada ||
kaḥ pūjyate ca vai tasminkadā vā kriyate naraiḥ || 2 ||
|| śrīvasiṣṭha uvāca ||
śṛṇu rājanmahābāho aparādhaśatavratam||
yenānuṣṭhitamātreṇa kāmamokṣau labheta nā || 3 ||
prāyaścittānyaśeṣāṇi sarvapāpāpanuttaye ||
kṛtānyapyakṛtāni syuriti hovāca padmajaḥ || 4 ||
pāpaṃ gurutaraṃ cāpi dahyate tūlarāśivat ||
aparādhaśataṃ rājañśṛṇuṣva gadato mama || 5 ||
na karoti naro mohādvratametaddinedine||
anāśramitvaṃ prathamo.anagnitā vratahīnatā || 6 ||
adātṛtvamaśaucaṃ ca nirdayatvaṃ spṛhālutā ||
akṣāṃtirjanapīḍā ca māyitvamapyamaṃgalam || 7 ||
kṣatavratatvaṃ nāstikyaṃ vedaniṃdā kaṭhoratā ||
asatyatā hiṃsakatvaṃ stainyami ndriyaviplavaḥ || 8 ||
manaso.anigrahaścaiva krodha īrṣyātha matsaraḥ ||
daṃbhaḥ śāṭhyaṃ ca dhaurtyaṃ ca kaṭukoktiḥ pramādatā || 9 ||
bhāryāmātṛsutādīnāṃ tyāgaścāpūjya pūjanam ||
śrāddhahānirjapatyāgaḥ paṃcayajñavivarjanam || 4.146.10 ||
saṃdhyātarpaṇahomānāṃ hāniragneḥ praṇāśanam ||
anṛtau maithunaṃ pārtha parvaṇyapi ca maithunam || 11 ||
paiśunyaṃ paradāreṣu dānaṃ veśyābhigāmitā ||
apātradānaṃ cālpaṃ ca mūlikākulibhakṣaṇam || 12 ||
aṃtyajāgamanaṃ mātṛtyāgaḥ pitṛvivarjanam ||
pitrorabhaktirvādaśca purāṇasmṛtivarjanam || 13 ||
abhakṣyabhojanaṃ cāpi patidroho.avicāratā ||
kṛṣikarmakriyāvāhaṃ bhāryāsaṃgrahakāritā || 14 ||
iṃdriyājayamāyitvaṃ vidyāvismaraṇaṃ tathā ||
śāstratyāga ṛṇaṃ citrakarma cānaṃgadhāvanam || 15 ||
bhāryāputrasutādīnāṃ vikrayaḥ paśumaithunam||
indhanārthaṃ drumacchedo bile vāryādipūraṇam || 16 ||
taḍāgāgamane vṛttaṃ vidyāvikrayakāritā ||
vṛttilopo mahīpāla yācakatvaṃ kumitratā || 17 ||
strīvadho govadhaścaiva paurohityaṃ suhṛdvadhaḥ ||
bhrūṇahatyā parānnaṃ ca śūdrānnasya niṣevaṇam || 18 ||
śūdrasya cāgnikarmatvamavidhitvaṃ kuputratā ||
vidvadbhyo yācakatvaṃ hi vācāṭatvaṃ pratigrahaḥ || 19 ||
śrautasaṃskāra dīnatvamārtatrāṇavivarjanam ||
brahmahatyāsurāpānarukmastainyamataḥ param || 4.146.20 ||
gurudārābhigāmitvaṃ saṃyogaścāpi taiḥ saha ||
aparādhaśataṃ tvetatkathitaṃ te mayānagha || 21 ||
anye.api vividhāḥ saṃti proktāḥ prādhānyatastvamī ||
yadi vaktrasahasrāṇi vaktre jihvāśatāni ca || 22 ||
tathāpyete na śakyaṃte vaktuṃ yasmādanaṃtakāḥ ||
aparādhasahasrāṇi lakṣakoṭiśatāni ca || 23 ||
naśyaṃti tatkṣaṇānnūnaṃ satyeśasyānupūjanāt ||
pūjye bhagavānatra kṛtakṛtye parājite || 24 ||
dhvaje satye sthitaścāyaṃ lakṣmyā saha jagatpatiḥ ||
vāmadevastataḥ pūrvaṃ nṛsiṃho dakṣiṇe sthitaḥ ||25 ||
kapilaḥ paścimāsye tu vārāhaścottare sthitaḥ||
ūrdhvavaktro.acyuto jñeya etadvai brahmapaṃcakam || 26 ||
taṃ satyeśaṃ sthitaṃ rājanpūjayecca sadaiva hi ||
kṣīrodayārdhacandrasthapadmakarṇikasaṃsthitam || 27 ||
padmakaumodakīśaṃkhacakrāyudhavidhāraṇam ||
vāme cādhastathā dakṣe ūrdhve paścādadho nṛpa || 28 ||
pādādhastādviniṣkrāṃtā gaṃgā pūtā sadā nṛbhiḥ ||
śaktyaṣṭakaṃ tathā cānyattannāmāni ca me śṛṇu || 29 ||
jayā ca vijayā caiva jayaṃtī pāpanāśinī||
unmīlinī vaṃjulī ca trispṛśātha vivarddhanā ||4.146.30||
etābhiḥ śaktibhiryuktaṃ lokadikpālavarjitam ||
śuklāṃbaradharaṃ saumyaṃ prahṛṣṭavadanaṃ śivam || || 31 ||
sarvābharaṇaśobhāḍhyaṃ bhuktimuktipradaṃ harim ||
pūjayecca prayatnena vidhinā yena taṃ śṛṇu || 32 ||
mārgaśīrṣādimāseṣu dvādaśasvapi sarvadā ||
dvādaśyāmapyamāyāṃ vā aṣṭamyāṃ ca sitāsite || 33 ||
kṛtopavāsaḥ śuddhātmā kuryādvratamataṃdritaḥ ||
pakṣayorubhayorevaṃ pūjaye.ahaṃ janārdanam || 34 ||
evaṃ tu niyamaṃ kṛtvā daṃtadhāvanapūrvakam ||
gacchettatastaḍāge vā puṣkariṇyāṃ gṛhe.api vā || 35 ||
snātvā tu naityakaṃ karma kṛtvā naimittikaṃ tataḥ ||
kuryātsarvaṃ prayatnena yathāvadanupūrvaśaḥ || 36 ||
sauvarṇaṃ kārayeddevaṃ pūrvoktaṃ satyarūpiṇam ||
śaktyaṣṭakayutaṃ lakṣmyā yuktaṃ padmāsanasthayā || 37 ||
suvarṇapalamānena kāryametatsavistaram ||
dugdhakuṃbhopariṣṭāttu svarṇapadmaṃ prakalpayet || 38 ||
tatkarṇikāgataṃ devaṃ śaktivṛndasamanvitam ||
pūjayedvidhivatpaścādgurumaṃtrapracoditaḥ || 39 ||
śuddhaśuklāṃbaradharo maṃtrasaṃbhārasaṃsthitaḥ ||
devakṣīrasamudre.asminvṛtte candre ca puṣkare ||
tatra tvaṃ satyayā sārddhaṃ satyeśa bhava sannidhau || 4.146.40 ||
oṃ kṣīrasāgarakallole snāhi pāpaniṣūdana ||
anena bhūtabhavyena dattena jalabindunā || 41 ||
harasva sarvaṃ duritaṃ mama nātha janārdana ||
vastradānena śubhreṇa satyeśa kuru me śubham || 42 ||
yajñe yoge tathā sāṃkhye pavitrastvaṃ sadocyase ||
yajñopavītadānena kuru māṃ sarvapāvanam || 43 ||
viliptaṃ karmaṇā sarvaṃ satyaṃ satyaṃ na kenacit ||
mama candanaliptāṃgaḥ sarvalepāpaho bhava || 44 ||
satyanātha namastubhyaṃ mūrtāmūrtasvarūpiṇe ||
vāsudeva nṛsiṃhākhya kapilādivyabhūdhara || 45 ||
vārāhācyuta yajñeśa lakṣmīkāṃta nṛpeśvara ||
paśuṃ putraṃ ca me dehi pāpaśatro niraṃjana || 46 ||
saṃkarṣaṇa mahāvīrya sarveśāmitavikrama ||
aniruddhendra govinda dhṛtacakra namo.astu te || 47 || (iti pūjāmaṃtraḥ)
kṛṣṇakṛṣṇa prabho rāmarāma kṛṣṇa vibho hare ||
trāhi māṃ sarvaduḥkhebhyo ramayā saha mādhava || 48 ||
pūjā ceyaṃ mayā dattā pitāmahajagadguro ||
gṛhāṇa jagadīśāna nārāyaṇa namo.astu te || 49 ||
dhanaṃ guptaṃ mahīpāla sarvapāpāpanuttaye ||
ekasyaiva tu viprasya yāvadvarṣaṃ samarpayet || 4.146.50 ||
dānaṃ dadyānmahārāja hyaśaktau tadabhāvataḥ ||
pakṣepakṣe prakartavyaṃ vratametanmahattaram || 51 ||
saṃvatsare tataḥ pūrṇe kuryādudyāpanaṃ budhaḥ ||
pūrvavatpūjayedevaṃ bahusaṃbhāravi staraiḥ || 52 ||
anujñāṃ prārthayedviprānpāpaghvaṃso mamāstu vai ||
pāpadhvaṃso.astu satataṃ taveti ca dvijo vadet || 53 ||
tataḥ sarvaṃ brāhmaṇāya samarpya ca kṣamāpayet ||
asminvrate kṛte rājanbhavedbahuphalodayaḥ || 54 ||
yatphalaṃ sarvavedeṣu sarvatīrtheṣu yatphalam ||
tatphalaṃ koṭiguṇitaṃ vratasyāsya niṣevaṇāt || 55 ||
ihaloke dhanaṃ dhānyaṃ putramitrasukhādikam ||
prāpnoti puruṣaḥ samyagvidyārogyakalāyudham || 56 ||
dharmamatha ca kāmaṃ ca mokṣaṃ ca nṛpasattama ||
labhate nātra saṃdeho brahmaṇo vacanaṃ yathā || 57 ||
yaḥ paṭhecchṛṇuyādvāpi sarvapāpaiḥ pramucyate ||
yaḥ kuryātpunaretaddhi so.anantaphalabhāgbhavet || 58 ||
aśaktastu tathā śakto vittaśāṭhyavivarjitaḥ ||
vrataṃ kurvannaro bhaktyā labhate śāśvataṃ padam || 59 ||
kṛte vai kriyamāṇe tu kartā phalamavāpnuyāt ||
aparādhaśatāghaughaṃ vratenānena nāśayet || 4.146.60 ||
iti śrībhaviṣye mahāpurāṇa uttaraparvaṇi śrīkṛṣṇayudhiṣṭhirasaṃvāde aparādhaśatavratavarṇanaṃ nāma ṣaṭcatvāriṃśaduttaraśatatamo.adhyāyaḥ || 146 || || cha ||
kāñcanavratavarṇanam
|| śrīkṛṣṇa uvāca || ||
śvetadvīpe sukhāsīnaṃ devadevaṃ jagatprabhum ||
vāsudevaṃ jagannāthaṃ sthitisaṃyamakārakam || 1 ||
parāvarāṇāṃ sraṣṭāraṃ purāṇaṃ paramavyayam ||
ādidevaṃ jagannāthaṃ jagataḥ kāraṇātma kam|| 2 ||
praṇipatya mahādevaṃ carācaraguruṃ harim ||
lakṣmīḥ provāca rājendra pādasaṃvāhane sthitā || 3 ||
bhagavandevadeveśa bhaktānāmanukampaka ||
praṣṭavyaṃ kiñcidicchāmi praṣṭuṃ praśnavidāṃ vara || 4 ||
prakuruṣva mahābhāga dayāṃ kṛtvā mamopari ||
vrataṃ kiñcitkathaya me rūpasaubhāgyadāyakam || 5 ||
uttamaṃ sarvavarṇānāṃ vratānāmapi cottamam||
kṛtena yena deveśa sarvatīrthaphalaṃ bhavet || 6 ||
|| viṣṇuruvāca || ||
gṛhasthaścāśramāṇāṃ ca varṇānāṃ brāhmaṇo yathā ||
yathā nadīṣu sarvāsu jāhnavī lokaviśrutā || 7 ||
hradānāmudadhiḥ śreṣṭho devānāṃ viṣṇuruttamaḥ ||
strīṇāṃ devā yathā lakṣmīstathedaṃ vratamuttamam|| 8 ||
na gaṅgā na kurukṣetraṃ na kāśī na ca puṣkaram ||
pāvanāni mahābhāge yathedaṃ vratamuttamam || 9 ||
gauryā devyā kṛtaṃ pūrvaṃ śaṃkareṇa mahātmanā ||
rāmeṇa sītayā sārddhaṃ rājyaṃ prāpya kṛtaṃ purā || 4.147.10 ||
damayantīviyogena nalena tu tathā kṛtam ||
kṛṣṇayā sahitaiḥ pārtha pāṃḍavairvana vāsibhiḥ || 11 ||
kṛtametadvrataṃ bhadre svargamokṣapradāyakam ||
raṃbhayā menayā vāpi paulomyā satyabhāmayā || 12 ||
śāṃḍilyā cāpyarundhatyā urvaśyā devadattayā ||
kṛtaṃ vratamidaṃ bhadraṃ saubhāgyasukhakāmyayā || 13 ||
pātāle nāgakanyābhiḥ kṛtametatsuśobhanam ||
gāyatryā ca sarasvatyā sāvitryā brahmabhāryayā || 14 ||
anyābhiḥ sarvanārībhiḥ sarvakāmaphalepsubhiḥ ||
tasmātte.ahaṃ pravakṣyāmi sarvapāpapraṇāśanam || 15 ||
vasuprītikaraṃ ramyaṃ vratānāṃ paramaṃ śṛṇu ||
brahmahā mucyate pāpātsurāpo vasuhārakaḥ || 16 ||
gurubhāryābhigāmī ca hyeteṣāṃ saṃgamī ca yaḥ ||
mānakūṭaṃ tulākūṭaṃ kanyāvṛttirgavāṃ vratī || 17 ||
agamyāgamano yastu māṃsāśī vṛṣalīpatiḥ ||
kuṇḍāgnibhojī yastu syādbhūbhihartā tathaiva ca || 18 ||
ebhiḥ sarvairmahāpāpairmucyate nātra saṃśayaḥ ||
ebhiḥ syānnaranārībhiḥ kartavyaṃ vratamuttamam ||19||
ataste.ahaṃ vidhiṃ vakṣye vidhānamavadhāraya ||
kāñcanākhyā purī nāma vrataṃ trailokyaviśrutam || 4.147.20 ||
yaḥ karoti naro devi nārī vā bhaktisaṃyutā ||
tasya putrāśca pautrāśca jāyate vipulaṃ dhanam || 21 ||
tasminmāse ca kartavyaṃ vratametacca sundari ||
tasminmāse ca kartavyā kāñcanākhyā purī śubhā || 22 || śuklakṛṣṇatṛtīyāyāmekādaśyāṃ ca pūrṇimā ||
saṃkrāṃtirvā mahābhāge kuhūrvā cāṣṭamī tithiḥ || 23 ||
parvasvanyeṣu sarveṣu dātavyā kāñcanī purī ||
vratī snātvā tu pūrvāhṇe nadyādau vimale jale || 24 ||
mṛttikālaṃbhanaṃ kāryaṃ maṃtreṇānena suvrate ||
uddhṛtāsi yathāpūrvaṃ viṣṇunā kroḍarūpiṇā ||25||
lokānāmupakārārthaṃ vandanātsiddhikāmadā ||
tasmāttvaṃ vaṃditā pāpaṃ hara me.anekajanmajam || 26 || ( iti mṛttikāmaṃtraḥ ||) || āpastu viśvayonirhi viṣṇunā nirmitāḥ svayam ||
sānnidhyaṃ tīrthasahitaṃ kartavyaṃ mama sāṃpratam || 27 || ( ityammaṃtraḥ ||) ||
anena vidhinā snātvā yajamānaḥ samāhitaḥ ||
gṛhamāgamya śuddhātmā nālapanpiśunāṃstva rāt || 28 ||
pākhaṃḍino vikarmasthāndhūrtāṃśca kitavācchaṭhān ||
prakṣālya pāṇivadanaṃ kuryāttvācamanaṃ tataḥ || 29 ||
upavāsasya niyamaṃ kuryānnaktasya vā punaḥ ||
śaṃkhapravaramādāya hemayuktaṃ jalairbhṛtam || 4.147.30 ||
dvādaśākṣaramaṃtreṇa tajjalaṃ cābhimaṃtrayet ||
pibetto.ayaṃ gṛhe gatvā harirityakṣaraṃ japet || 31 ||
śamīvṛkṣamayā vedī catuḥstaṃbhasamanvitā ||
caturhastapramāṇena kāryyā caiva suśobhanā || 32 ||
vastreṇāveṣṭitāḥ stambhā vitānavara maṇḍitāḥ ||
puṣpamālānvitāḥ kāryā divyadhūpādhivāsitāḥ || 33 ||
madhye tu maṃḍalaṃ kāryaṃ padmākhyaṃ varṇakaiḥ śubhaiḥ ||
yena dṛṣṭena deveśi sarvapāpa kṣayo bhavet ||
maṃḍalasya tu madhye vai bhadrapīṭhaṃ suśobhanam || 34 ||
āsanaṃ tatra vinyasya komalaṃ vastraveṣṭitam ||
tasyopari nyaseddevaṃ lakṣmyā yuktaṃ janārdanam || 35 ||
agre tu kalaśaḥ kāryo jalapūrṇaḥ suśobhanaḥ ||
kṣīrasāgaranāmā sa kalpitavyaḥ prayatnataḥ || 36 ||
pañcaratnasamāyuktaṃ vastreṇāve ṣṭayeddhanam ||
kumbhaṃ prapūrṇamudakaistasyopari nyasedbudhaḥ || 37 ||
tasyopariṣṭātsaṃsthāpya kāṃcanākhyāṃ purīṃ śubhām||
catuṣpalā hyuttamā syāddvipalā madhyamā smṛtā || 38 ||
sāmānyaikapalā kāryā kalaśaistu samanvitā || modakānsthāpayeddivyānsamaṃtātsuṃdarākṛtīn || 39 ||
tadagre kadalīstambhaistoraṇaṃ parikalpayet ||
cātuścaraṇikāṃstatra viprānāvāhya suṃdari || 4.147.40 ||
pratiṣṭhāṃ kārayettasya vedamantraiḥ suśobhanaiḥ ||
tasyā madhye nyasedviṣṇuṃ haimaṃ lakṣmyā samanvitam || 41 ||
netre ratnamaye kārye daśanā vajrabhūṣitāḥ ||
muktāphalamayaṃ tasya bhūṣaṇaṃ parikalpayet || 42 ||
aṃgaṃ svarṇamayaṃ kāryaṃ śaṃkhacakragadāyudham ||
pañcāmṛtena deveśaṃ snāpya nārāyaṇaṃ vibhum || 43 ||
tameva gaṃdhapuṣpādyairmaṃtramuccārya pūjayet ||
brāhmaṇo vaidikairmantraiḥ pūjayenmadhusūdanam || 44 ||
śeṣā varṇāḥ purāṇoktaistāñchṛṇuṣva mama priye ||
vāsudevāya pādau tu gulphau saṃkarṣaṇāya ca || 45 ||
trailokyajanakāyeti jānunī pūjayeddhareḥ ||
trailokyanāthāya guhye jñānamayāya vai kaṭim || 46 ||
dāmodarāyetyudaraṃ hṛdayaṃ viśvarūpiṇe ||
nityaṃ hi pūjayeddevi uraḥ śrīvatsadhāriṇe || 47 ||
kaṇṭhaṃ kaustubhanāthāya āsyaṃ yajñamukhāya ca ||
daityāṃtakāriṇe bāhū svairnāmairāyudhāni ca || 48 ||
śiraḥ sarvātmane devi devadevasya pūjayet ||
śriyaṃ prapūjayeddevīṃ devyā maṃtraiḥ pṛthagvidhaiḥ || 49 ||
indrādilokapālānāṃ pūjā kāryā yathākramam ||
navagrahāṇāṃ homaśca kartavyo vighnanāśanaḥ ||4.147.50||
pūjā gaṇapateḥ kāryā tathā homo vidhānataḥ ||
agre naivadyamatulaṃ dāpayeddhṛtapācitam || 51 ||
pāyasaṃ ghṛtapūrāṃśca modakānpūrikāstathā ||
sohālikādinaivedyaṃ pheṇikāḥ śarkarāstathā || 52 ||
deśakālodbhavānyeva phalāni vinivedayet ||
dīpāndaśa diśo dadyātpārthivānraktavartikān||53||
etena tu viśālākṣi mūlamantreṇa dāpayet ||
puṣpamālānvitānkṛtvā caṃdanena vibhūṣitān ||54||
abhimaṃtrya prayatnena viṣṇustabakavācakaiḥ ||
sahasraśīrṣādibhirmaṃtrairjapadbhirbrāhmaṇottamaiḥ || 55 ||
ṣoḍaśātha sapatnīkānpūjayecca yathāvidhi ||
bhūṣayecca śubhairvastraistathālaṃkāraṇādibhiḥ || 56 ||
viṣṇuṃ matvā dvijaḥ pūjyo lakṣmīṃ matvā ca brāhmaṇīm ||
chatraṃ copānahau caiva aṃgulyābharaṇaṃ tathā ||57||
phalāni sapta dhānyāni bhojanaṃ ca yadīpsitam ||
dātavyaṃ ca sabhāryāya kṛṣṇo me prīyatāmiti || 58 ||
śayyāṃ sopaskarāṃ caiva vastreṇācchādya yatnataḥ ||
tathā prakalpayedvittaśaktyā ca suṃdarī yathā || 59 ||
vrate pūrṇe ca gaurdeyā sarvopaskarasaṃyutā ||
purīṃ ghaṭāpayetpūrvaṃ vastreṇācchādyayastaḥ ||
yathā kuryātprayāsena yathā kartā na paśyati || 4.147.60 ||
dīpāṃstu dīpitāṃstatra ānayedyajñamaṇḍapam ||
śvetavastreṇa netre tu yajamānasya ca priye||61||
śrutavāñchāstravitprājñaḥ kṛtasarvāghasaṃkṣayaḥ ||
