ābadhya netre suprājña ācāryastamidaṃ vadet ||62||
sarvakāmapradāṃ paśya kāṃcanākhyāṃ purīmimām||
varavastrayutāṃ ramyāṃ duḥkhadaurbhāgyanāśinīm|| 63 ||
evamukto mahābhāga paṭamunmucya netrayoḥ ||
puṣpāñjaliṃ gurau kṣiptvā sa paśyettāṃ purīṃ śubhām||64||
dṛṣṭvā tāṃ nagarīṃ devi yajamānaḥ samāhitaḥ ||
sauvarṇaṃ pātramādāya raupyaṃ tāmramathāpi vā || 65 ||
atha vā śaṃkhamādāya pātrālābhe tu sundari ||
pañcaratnaṃ kṣipetpātre jalaṃ gāṅgaṃ tathā phalam || 66 ||
siddhārthamakṣatāḥ pūrvaṃ rocanā dadhi vā punaḥ ||
tataścārdhyaṃ pradātavyaṃ kṛṣṇāya prabhaviṣṇave || 67 ||
lakṣmīnārāyaṇau devau sarvakāmaphalapradau ||
rukmapuryāḥ pradānena yacchaitāṃ vāṃchitaṃ mama || 68 ||
nārāyaṇa hṛṣīkeśa jñānajñeya niraṃjana||
lakṣmīkāṃta jagannātha gṛhāṇārghyaṃ namostu te||69|| ( ityarghamaṃtraḥ) ||
evamarghyaṃ tato dattvā viṣṇave prabhaviṣṇave||
devyāstvarghyaṃ pradātavyaṃ bhaktiyukte na cetasā||4.147.70||
jānubhyāmavaniṃ gatvā maṃtrametamudīrayet ||
brahmaṇā pūjitā devī viṣṇunā śaṃkareṇa ca ||71||
pārvatyā pūjitā lakṣmīḥ skaṃdavaiśravaṇena ca||
mayā ca pūjitā devi dharmasya vijigīṣayā ||72||
saubhāgyaṃ dehi me putrāndhanaṃ pautrāṃśca pūjitān ||
gṛhāṇārghyaṃ mayā dattaṃ devi saukhyaṃ prayaccha me ||73||
ya evaṃ purato dattvā pūrvoktavidhinā tava ||
rātrau jāgaraṇaṃ kuryādbhaktiyuktena cetasā ||74||
gītanṛtyavinodena upākhyānaiśca vaiṣṇavaiḥ||
yena kena vinodena nidrā naiva prajāyate ||75||
unnidro jāgṛyādyastu śatayajñaphalaṃ labhet ||
prabhāte vimale snātvā saṃpūjya pitṛdevatāḥ ||76||
brāhmaṇāṃśca sapatnīkānparidhāpyānubhojayet ||
dakṣiṇāśca yathāśaktyā pradāya ca kṣamāpayet || 77 || dīnāṃdhabadhirānpaṃgūnsarvāṃstānparitoṣayet ||
paścātpāraṇakaṃ kāryamupavāsī bhavedyadi || 78 ||
madhuraṃ payasā yuktaṃ suhṛdbhirbāṃdhavaiḥ saha ||
evametadvrataṃ kāryamekādaśyāṃ śucismite || 79 ||
śuklāyāmatha kṛṣṇāyāṃ tṛtīyāyāṃ tathā tithau||
saṃkrāṃtivāsare vāpi vyatīpāte ca vaidhṛtau ||4.147.80||
yadā vā jāyate vittaṃ cittaṃ ca varavarṇini ||
gaurānīya pradātavyā kṛṣṇo me prīyatāmiti || 81 ||
evaṃ kṛte ca yatpuṇyaṃ tanna śakyaṃ niveditum ||
api varṣasahasreṇa kulalakṣaśatairapi || 82 ||
kalpakoṭisahasrāṇi kalpakoṭiśatāni ca||
brahmalokaṃ samāsādya brahmaṇā pratimodyate || 83 ||
brahmakādrudralokaṃ tatparaṃ viṣṇusaṃnidhau ||
indrādilokapālānāṃ vratī lokamavāpnuyāt || 84 ||
tato bhuktvā śuciḥ śrīmānbhogāṃstrailokyasuṃdari ||
cakravartī bhavedbhūmau brahmaṇyo vaiṣṇavastathā ||85||
ya idaṃ śṛṇuyānnityaṃ vācayamānaṃ samaṃtataḥ ||
kulasaptakamuddhṛtya vaiṣṇavaṃ lokamāpnuyāt ||86||
tvayā kāṃcanapuryākhyaṃ vratametatkṛtaṃ purā ||
tena puṇyena labdho.ahaṃ bhartā trailokyapūjitaḥ || 87 ||
iti śrībhaviṣye mahāpurāṇa uttaraparvaṇi śrīlakṣmīviṣṇusaṃvāde kāṃcanapurīvratavarṇanaṃ nāma saptacatvāriṃśaduttara śatatamo.adhyāyaḥ || 147 || cha ||
kanyāpradānavarṇanam ( atha kanyādānam) ||
|| śrīkṛṣṇa uvāca || ||
brahmadeyāṃ tu yaḥ kanyāmalaṃkṛtya prayacchati ||
saptapūrvānbhaviṣyāṃśca svakule sapta mānavān||1||
tena kanyāpradānena sa tārayatyasaṃśayam ||
lokānāpnoti ca tathā dakṣasyaiva prajāpateḥ||2||
prājāpatyena vidhinā ātmānaṃ ca samuddharet||
mahatpuṇyamavāpnoti svargalokaṃ ca gacchati ||3||
bhūgavāśvapradānāni gajadānaṃ tathaiva ca ||
dattvā tu varṇahīnāya ghore tamasi majjati ||4||
bahuvarṣasahasrāṇi purīṣaṃ kākamaśnute||
śulkena dattvā kanyāṃ ca ghoraṃ narakamāpnuyāt ||5||
bahūnyabdasahasrāṇi tathā aśucibhuṅnaraḥ||
savarṇāṃ ca savarṇebhyo dadyātkanyāṃ yathāvidhi ||6||
dattvā cādhikavarṇāya dviguṇaṃ nirguṇaṃ tathā ||
dvijaputramanāthaṃ vā saṃskuryādyaśca karmabhiḥ ||7||
cūḍopanayādyaiśca so.aśvamedhaphalaṃ labhet ||
anāthāṃ kanyakāṃ dattvā nākaloke mahīyate || 8 ||
kanyayā saha dattaṃ ca suvarṇaṃ vahnimūlakam ||
sakalaṃ dviguṇaṃ tasya phalamuktaṃ purātanaiḥ || 9 ||
kanyādānādavāpnoti dakṣalokaṃ narottama ||
viṣṇupūjāsamaṃ puṇyaṃ tatkanyāpūjayā bhavet || 4.148.10 ||
vimānamāhṛtya manobhirāmaṃ surāṅganāgītavilāsahṛdyam ||
prāpnoti lokaṃ tridaśottamānāṃ kanyāpradānānna vicāraṇeti || 11 || ||
iti śrībhaviṣye mahāpurāṇa uttaraparvaṇi śrīkṛṣṇayudhiṣṭhirasaṃvāde kanyāpradānavarṇanaṃ nāmāṣṭacatvāriṃśaduttaraśatatamo.adhyāyaḥ || 148 || || a || ||| ||
brāhmaṇaśuśrūṣāvidhivarṇanam
|| śrīkṛṣṇa uvāca|| ||
brāhmaṇā daivataṃ bhūmau brāhmaṇā divi daivatam ||
brāhmaṇebhyaḥ paraṃ nāsti nāsti bhūtaṃ jagattraye || 1 ||
adevaṃ daivataṃ kuryuḥ kuryurdevamadaivatam ||
brāhmaṇā hi mahābhāgāḥ pūjyaṃte satataṃ dvijāḥ ||2||
brāhmaṇebhyaḥ samutpannā devāḥ pūrvamiti smṛtiḥ ||
brāhmaṇebhyo jagatsarvaṃ tasmātpūjyatamā dvijāḥ || 3 ||
yeṣāmaśnaṃti vaktreṇa devatāḥ pitarastathā ||
ṛṣayaśca tathā nāgāḥ kiṃ bhūtamadhikaṃ tataḥ || 4 ||
yadaiva manujo bhaktyā brāhmaṇebhyaḥ prayacchati ||
tadaivāpnoti dharmajña bahujanmani janmani || 5 ||
tālavṛṃtānilenaiva śrāṃtasaṃvāhanena ca ||
utsādanena gātrāṇāṃ tathā vyaṃjanakarmaṇā || 6 ||
pādaśaucapradānena pādayoḥ secanena ca ||
paricarya yathā kāmamekenaiva dvijottama || 7 ||
aniṣṭvāpi samāpnoti svargalokaṃ ca śāśvatam ||
brāhmaṇānāṃ śubhaṃ kṛtvā nākaloke mahīyate || 8 ||
yadbrāhmaṇāstuṣṭimanto vadaṃti pratyakṣadeveṣu parokṣadevāḥ ||
tadvai śubhaṃ tasya narasya nūnaṃ bhavedatastānsatataṃ niṣevet || 9 ||
iti śrībhaviṣye mahāpurāṇa uttaraparvaṇi śrīkṛṣṇayudhiṣṭhirasaṃvāde brāhmaṇaśuśrūṣāvidhivarṇanaṃ nāmaikonapaṃcā śaduttaraśatatamo.adhyāyaḥ || 149 || || a ||
vṛṣadānavidhivarṇanam
|| yudhiṣṭhira uvāca || ||
yuṣmadvākyāmṛtamidaṃ hyahaṃ śṛṇvañjanārdana||
na tṛptimadhigacchāmi jātaṃ kautūhalaṃ hi me || 1 ||
gopatiḥ kila govindastriṣu lokeṣu viśrutaḥ ||
govṛṣasya pradānena trailokyamabhinaṃdati || 2 ||
tasmādgovṛṣakalpasya vidhānaṃ kathayācyuta || 3 ||
|| śrīkṛṣṇa uvāca || ||
vṛṣadānaphalaṃ puṇyaṃ śṛṇuṣva kathayāmi te ||
pavitraṃ pāvanaṃ caiva sarvadānottamaṃ tathā || 4 ||
daśadhenusamo.anaḍvānekaścaiva dhuraṃdharaḥ ||
daśadhenupradānāddhi sa evaiko viśiṣyate || 5 ||
voḍhā ca cārupṛṣṭhāṃgo hyarogaḥ pāṃḍunaṃdana ||
yuvā bhadraḥ suśī laśca sarvadoṣavivarjitaḥ || 6 ||
dhuraṃdharaḥ sthāpayate eka eva kulaṃ mahat ||
trātā bhavati saṃsārānnātra kāryā vicāraṇā || 7 ||
alaṃkṛtya vṛṣaṃ śāṃtaṃ puṇyehni samupasthite ||
raupyalāḍgūlasaṃyuktaṃ brāhmaṇāya nivedayet || 8 ||
maṃtreṇānena rājendra taṃ śṛṇuṣva vadāmi te ||
dharmastvaṃ vṛṣarūpeṇa jaga dānaṃdakāraka || 9 ||
aṣṭamūrteradhiṣṭhānamataḥ pāhi sanātana ||
datvaivaṃ dakṣiṇāyuktaṃ praṇipatya visarjayet || 4.150.10 ||
saptajanmakṛtaṃ pāpaṃ vāṅmanaḥ kāyakarmajam ||
tatsarvaṃ vilayaṃ yāti godānasukṛtena ca || 11 ||
yānaṃ vṛṣabhasaṃyuktaṃ dīpyamānaṃ suśobhitam ||
āruhya kāmagaṃ divyaṃ svarlokamadhirohati || 12 ||
yāvaṃti tasya romāṇi govṛṣasya mahīpate ||
tāvadvarṣasahasrāṇi gavāṃ loke mahīyate || 13 ||
golokādavatīrṇastu ihaloke dvijottamaḥ ||
yajñayājī mahātejāḥ sarvabrāhmaṇapūjitaḥ || 14 ||
tavoktaṃ vai mahārāja kasya deyo vṛṣottamaḥ ||
tadapyahaṃ te vakṣyāmi pātraṃ trāṇapradaṃ nṛṇām || 15 ||
yeṣāṃ sadā vai śrutipūrṇakarṇā jitendriyāḥ prāṇivadhe nivṛttāḥ ||
pratigrahe saṃkucitā gṛhasthāste brāhmaṇāstārayituṃ samarthāḥ ||16 ||
gātre dṛḍhaṃ bhārasahaṃ supuṣṭaṃ suśṛṅgiṇaṃ sarvaguṇopapannam ||
dattvarṣabhaṃ godaśakena tulyaṃ satyaṃ bhavaṃti bhuvi tatphalabhāginaste || 17 ||
iti śrībhaviṣye mahāpurāṇa uttaraparvaṇi śrīkṛṣṇayudhiṣṭhirasaṃvāde vṛṣadānavidhivarṇanaṃ nāma paṃcāśaduttaraśatatamo.adhyāyaḥ || 150 || || cha || ||
pratyakṣadhenudānavratavidhivarṇanam( atha vividhadānāni) ||
|| yudhiṣṭhira uvāca || ||
śrutaḥ purāṇaviṣayastvatprasādānmayācyuta ||
saṃsārāsāratāṃ jñātvā śrutaśca vratavistaraḥ || 1 ||
bhūyaśca śrotumicchāmi dānamāhātmyamuttamam ||
kiṃ dīyate kadā kṛṣṇa kenopāyena śaṃsa me || 2 ||
nahi dānātparataramanyadastīti me matiḥ ||
dhanaṃ dhanavatāṃ kiñcidahāryaṃ rājataskaraiḥ || 3 ||
|| śrīkṛṣṇa uvāca || ||
aniścitaṃ nidhānaṃ yadaprayuktaṃ ca varddhate ||
anītaṃ yāti cādhvānaṃ dhanaṃ viprakarārpitam || 4 ||
kiṃ kāyena supuṣṭena balinā cirajīvinā ||
yannasattvopakārāya tajjīvitamanarthakam || 5 ||
grāsādarddhamapi grāsa marthibhyaḥ kiṃ na dīyate ||
icchānurūpo vibhavaḥ kadā kasya bhaviṣyati || 6 ||
ekasminnapyatikrāṃte dine dānavivarjite ||
dasyubhirmuṣitaścaiva divārātrau ca śocati || 7 ||
yasya trivargaśūnyāni dinānyāyāṃti yāṃti ca ||
salohakārabhastreva śvasannapi na jīvati || 8 ||
yairna dattaṃ na ca hutaṃ na tīrthe maraṇaṃ kṛtam ||
hiraṇyamannamudakaṃ brāhmaṇebhyo na cārpitam || 9 ||
dīnā niraśanā rūkṣāḥ kapālāṅkitapāṇayaḥ ||
te dṛśyaṃte mahārāja jāyamānā punaḥ || 4.151.10 ||
āyāsaśatalabdhasya prāṇebhyopi garīyasaḥ ||
gatirekaiva vittasya dānamanyā vipattayaḥ || 11 ||
nopabhogaiḥ kṣayaṃ yāṃti na pradānaiḥ samṛddhayaḥ ||
pūrvārjitānāmanyatra sukṛtānāṃ parikṣayāt || 12 ||
adṛṣṭaparatattvopi pātrebhyo visṛjeddhanam ||
yasmānmṛtasya tannāsti tasmātsāṃśayikaṃ varam || 13 ||
dānāni bahurūpāṇi kathayāmi tavānagha ||
vyāsavālmīkimanvādyaiḥ kathitāni purā mama || 14 ||
kiñcidvrataṃ yatkriyate pūjyate ca trilocanaḥ ||
dīyate yacca viprebhya etajjanmataroḥ phalam || 15 ||
|| yudhiṣṭhira uvāca || ||
brāhmaṇaprīṇanārthāya keśavasya śivasya ca ||
yāni dānāni deyāni tānyācakṣya yadūttama ||16||
yena caiva vidhānena dānaṃ puṇyasukhāvaham ||
ehikāmuṣmikāvāptiṃ karoti nahi hanyate || 17 ||
|| śrīkṛṣṇa uvāca || ||
trīṇyāhuratidānāni gāvaḥ pṛthvī sarasvatī ||
āsaptamaṃ punaṃtyete dohavāhanavedanaiḥ || 18 ||
godānamādau vakṣyāmi pratyakṣakramayogataḥ ||
yena caiva vidhānena anyūnādhikavistaram || 19 ||
|| yudhiṣṭhira uvāca ||
deyāḥ kiṃlakṣaṇā gāvaḥ kāśca rājanvivarjitāḥ ||
kīdṛśāya pradātavyā na deyāḥ kīdṛśāya vai ||4.151.20||
|| śrīkṛṣṇa uvāca || ||
taruṇī rūpasaṃpannā suśīlā ca payasvinī ||
nyāyārjitā savatsā ca pradeyā śrotriyāya gauḥ || 21 ||
vṛddhā sarogā hīnāṃgī vaṃdhyā duṣṭā mṛtaprajā ||
dūrasthā.anyāyalabdhā ca deyā gaurna kathaṃcana || 22 ||
sā dattaiva haretpāpaṃ śrotriyāyāhitāgnaye ||
atithipriyāya dāṃtāya dhenuṃ dadyādguṇādhike ||23||
akulīnāya mūrkhāya lubdhāya piśunāya ca ||
havyakavyavyapetāya na deyā gauḥ kathaṃcana || 24 ||
|| śrīkṛṣṇa uvāca || ||
puṇyaṃ dinamathāsādya snātvātarpya pitṛrṃstathā ||
ghṛtakṣīrābhiṣekaṃ ca kṛtvā viṣṇoḥ śivasya ca || 25 ||
samabhyarcya yathānyāyaṃ puṣpādibhiranukramāt ||
udaṅmukhīṃ prāṅmukhīṃ vā gṛṣṭiṃ kṛtvā payasvinīm || 26 ||
savatsāṃ vastrasaṃvītāṃ sitayajñopavītinīm ||
svarṇaśṛṅgīṃ raupyakhurāṃ kāṃsyadohanakānvitām || 27 ||
śaktito dakṣiṇāyuktāṃ brāhmaṇāya nivedayet ||
pucche kṛṣṇājinaṃ deyaṃ gāṃ pucche kariṇaṃ kare || 28 ||
aśvaṃ sadā sukarṇe vā dāsīṃ śirasi dāpayet ||
gāvo mamāgrataḥ saṃtu gāvo me saṃtu pṛṣṭhataḥ || 29 ||
gāvo me hṛdaye saṃtu gavāṃ madhye vasāmyaham ||
pradakṣiṇāṃ tataḥ kṛtvā dhenuṃ dvijavarāya tām || 4.151.30 ||
imāṃ ca pratigṛhṇīṣva dhenurdattā mayā tava ||
evamuccārya taṃ vipraṃ deveśaṃ parikalpayet || 31 ||
anuvrajecca gacchaṃtaṃ padānyaṣṭau narādhipa ||
anena vidhinā dhenuṃ yo viprāya prayacchati || 32 ||
sarvakāmasamṛddhātmā svargalokaṃ sa gacchati ||
sapta pūrvānsapta parānātmānaṃ caiva mānavaḥ ||33||
sapta janmakṛtātpāpānmocayatyavanīpate||
pade pade.aśvamedhasya gośatasya ca mānavaḥ ||34||
phalamāpnoti rājendra dakṣāyaivaṃ jagau hariḥ ||
sarvakāmapradā sā syātsarvakāleṣu pārthiva ||35||
bhavatyasau pāpaharā yāvadiṃdrāścaturdaśa ||
sarveṣāmeva pāpānāṃ kṛtānāmapi jānatā ||36||
prāyaścittamidaṃ proktamanutāpopabṛṃhitam ||
sarveṣāmeva dānānāmekajanmānugaṃ phalam || 37 ||
brāhmaṇaiḥ kṣatriyairvaiśyaiḥ śūdraiścānyaiśca mānavaiḥ ||
lokāḥ kāmagamā prāptā dattvaitadvidhinā nṛpa || 38 ||
gobhyodhikaṃ jagati nāparamastikiñciddānaṃ pavitramiti śāstravido vadaṃti ||
tatsaṃpadaḥ surasadaśca samīhamānairdeyāḥ sadaiva vidhinā dvijapuṃgavāya || 39 ||
iti śrībhaviṣye mahāpurāṇa uttaraparvaṇi śrīkṛṣṇayudhiṣṭhirasaṃvāde pratyakṣadhenudānavrata vidhivarṇanaṃ nāmaikapaṃcāśaduttaraśatatamo.adhyāyaḥ || 151 || ||
dhenudānavratavidhivarṇanam
|| śrīkṛṣṇa uvāca || ||
athātaḥ saṃpravakṣyāmi dhenūnāṃ kalpanā nṛpa ||
viśeṣavidhinā yāśca deyāḥ kāmānabhīpsubhiḥ || 1 ||
kāmaṃ yaddīyate dānaṃ samagraṃ tatsukhāvaham ||
asamagraṃ tu doṣāya bhavatīha paratra ca || 2 ||
tasmānna dakṣiṇāhīnaṃ vidhānavikalaṃ tathā ||
deyaṃ dānaṃ mahārāja samagraphalakāmyayā || 3 ||
anyathā dīyamānaṃ tadahaṃkārāya kevalam ||
pratyakṣaṃ cārthahāniḥ syānna vā tatphaladaṃ bhavet || 4 ||
tiladhenuṃ pravakṣyāmi śṛṇu pārthivasattama ||
vārāheṇa purā proktāṃ mahāpātakanāśinīm || 5 ||
yāṃ dattvā brahmahā goghnaḥ pitṛhā gurutalpagaḥ ||
agāradāhī garadaḥ sarvapāparatopi vā || 6 ||
mahāpātakayuktaśca saṃyuktaścopapātakaiḥ ||
mucyate hyakhilaiḥ pāpaiḥ svargalokaṃ ca gacchati || 7 ||
anulipte mahīpṛṣṭhe kṛṣṇājinasamāvṛte ||
dhenuṃ tilamayīṃ kṛtvā darbhānāstīrya sarvataḥ || 8 ||
tilāḥ śvetāstilāḥ kṛṣṇāstilā gomūtravarṇakāḥ ||
tilānāṃ ca vicitrāṇāṃ dhenuṃ sarvāṃ ca kārayet ||9 ||
droṇasya vatsakaṃ kuryāccaturāḍhakikāṃ ca gām ||
svarṇaśṛṃgīṃ raupyakhurāṃ gandhavarṇavatīṃ tathā || 4.152.10 ||
kāryā śarkarayā jihvā guḍenāsyaṃ ca kambalaḥ ||
ikṣupādāṃ tāmrapṛṣṭhīṃ śuktimuktāphalekṣaṇām || 11 ||
praśastapatraśravaṇāṃ phaladaṃtavatīṃ śubhām ||
sragdāmapucchāṃ kurvīta nava nītastanānvitām || 12 ||
sitavastraśirālambāṃ sitasarṣaparomikām ||
phalairmanoharairannairmaṇimuktāphalānvitām || 13 ||
īdṛksaṃsthānasampannāṃ kṛtvā śraddhāsamanvitaḥ ||
kāṃsyopadohanāṃ dadyātparvakāle samāgate || 14 ||
yā lakṣmīḥ sarvabhūtānāṃ yā vai deveṣvavasthitā ||
dhenurūpeṇa sā devī mama pāpaṃ vyapohatu || 15 ||
tataḥ pradakṣiṇāṃ kṛtvā pūjayitvā praṇamya ca ||
sadakṣiṇā mayā tubhyaṃ dattetyuktvā visarjayet || 16 ||
anena vidhinā dattvā tiladhenuṃ narādhipa ||
sarvapāpavinirmukto paraṃ brahmādhigacchati || 17 ||
yaśca gṛhṇāti vidhivaddīyamānāṃ pramodate ||
dīyamānāṃ praśaṃsaṃti ye ca saṃhṛṣṭamānasāḥ || 18 ||
tepi doṣavinirmuktā brahmalokaṃ vrajaṃti te ||
praśāṃtāya suśīlāya vedavrataratāya ca || 19 ||
dhenuṃ tilamayīṃ dattvā na śocati kṛtākṛte ||
trirātraṃ yastilāhārastiladhenuprado bhavet || 4.152.20 ||
ekāhamatha vā rājanna yucchedantarātmanā ||
dānādviśuddhiḥ pāpasya tasya puṇyavato nṛpa || 21 ||
cāndrāyaṇādabhyadhikaṃ kathitaṃ tilabhakṣaṇam ||
bālatve caiva yatpāpaṃ yauvane vārddhake tathā || 22 ||
vācā kṛtaṃ tu manasā karmaṇā yacca saṃcitam ||
udakaṣṭhīvane caiva nagnasnānena yadbhavet || 23 ||
muśalenodyate nāpi laṃbite brāhmaṇe tathā ||
vṛṣalīgamane caiva gurudārābhigāmini || 24 ||
surāpānena yatpāpamabhakṣyasya ca bhakṣaṇāt ||
tatsarvaṃ vilayaṃ yāti tiladhenupradāyinām || 25 ||
yamamārge mahāghore nadī vaitaraṇī smṛtā ||
vālukāyāḥ sthalaṃ caiva pacyate yatra pāpinaḥ || 26 ||
yatra lohamukhāḥ kākā yatra śvāno bhayāvahāḥ ||
nikṛtya pāpināṃ māṃsaṃ bhakṣayaṃti bubhukṣitāḥ || 27 ||
asipatravanaṃ caiva lohakaṃṭakaśālmalīm ||
etānsarvānatikramya tato yamapuraṃ vrajet || 28 ||
vimāne kāṃcane divye maṇiratnavibhūṣite ||
tatrāruhya naraśreṣṭho gacchate paramāṅgatim || 29 ||
guṇahīne na dātavyā na dātavyā dhaneśvare ||
kuṇḍe gole ca lubdhe ca na ca deyā kadāpi sā || 4.152.30 ||
ekā ekasya dātavyā munibhiḥ kathitaṃ purā ||
araṇye naimiṣe pārtha nāradena niveditam || 31 ||
tattehaṃ saṃpravakṣyāmi samyakphalasahasradam ||
idaṃ puṇyaṃ pavitraṃ ca māṅgalyaṃ kīrtivardhanam || 32 ||
viprāṇāṃ śrāvayecchrāddhe anantaphalamaśnute ||
bahubhyo na pradeyāni gaurgṛhaṃ śayanaṃ striyaḥ || 33 ||
vibhajyamānānyetāni dātāraṃ pātayaṃtyadhaḥ ||
sā tu vikrayamāpannā dahatyāsaptamaṃ kulam || 34 ||
asyā dānaprabhāvena vimānaṃ sarvakāmikam ||
samāruhya naro yāti yatra devo hariḥ svayam || 39 ||
eṣā caiva pradātavyā prayatenāntarātmanā ||
paurṇamāsyāṃ ca māghasya kārtikyāṃ caiva bhārata || 36 ||
candrasūryoparāge tu viṣuve ayane tathā ||
ṣaḍaśītimukhe caiva vyatīpāte tu sarvadā || 37 ||
vaiśākhyāṃ mārgaśīrṣyāṃ vā gajacchāyāsu caiva hi ||
eṣā te kathitā pārtha tiladhenurmayānagha || 38 ||
yāvaṃti dheno romaṇi gātreṣu nṛpapuṅgava ||
tāvadvarṣasahasrāṇi tadā svarge mahīyate || 39 ||
yaśca gṛhṇāti vidhivaddīyamānāṃ ca paśyati ||
anumodayate caiva te sarve svargagāminaḥ || 4.152.40 ||
dhenuṃ dhanādhipatayo magadhodbhavena mānena ye tilamayīṃ caturāḍhakena ||
kṛtvā yathoktaracanāṃ kṛtacāruvatsāṃ yacchaṃti te bhuvi bhavaṃti vimuktapāpāḥ ||41|| pratigṛhṇāmi devi tvāṃ kuṭuṃbabharaṇāya ca ||
kāmaṃ deyā dayāsmabhyaṃ dheno tvaṃ sarvadā hyasi || 42 || ||
iti śrībhaviṣye mahāpurāṇa uttaraparvaṇi śrīkṛṣṇayudhiṣṭhirasaṃvāde tila dhenudānavratavidhivarṇanaṃ nāma dvipaṃcāśaduttaraśatatamo.adhyāyaḥ || 152 || || a ||
jaladhenudānavratavidhivarṇanam
|| śrīkṛṣṇa uvāca || ||
jaladhenuṃ pravakṣyāmi prīyate dattayā yayā ||
devadevo hṛṣīkeśaḥ pūjitaḥ sarvabhāvanaḥ || 1 ||
jalakuṃbhaṃ naravyāghra sthāpayitvā supūjitam ||
ratnagarbhaṃ tu taṃ kṛtvā grāmyairdhānyai samanvitam || 2 ||
sitavastrayugacchannaṃ dūrvāpallavaśobhitam ||
kuṣṭhamāṃsīpurośīravālakāmalakīyutam || 3 ||
priyaṅgupatrasahitaṃ sitayajñopavītinam ||
sopānaktaṃ ca sacchatraṃ darbhaviṣṭarasaṃsthitam || 4 ||
caturbhiḥ saṃyutaṃ raupyaṃ tilapātraiścaturdiśam ||
sthagitaṃ dadhipātreṇa ghṛtakṣaudravatā mukhama| || 5 ||
savatsāṃ ca pratiṣṭhāpya gomayenopaśobhitām ||
sragdāmapucchīṃ kurvīta tāmradohanakānvitām || 6 ||
tataḥ samabhyarcya vibhuṃ vāsudevaṃ sanātanam ||
puṣpadhūpopahāraiśca yathāvibhavamātmanaḥ || 7 ||
saṃkalpya jaladhenuṃ ca kuṃbhaṃ tamabhimaṃtrya ca ||
viṣṇorvakṣasi yā lakṣmīḥ svāhā yā ca vibhāvasoḥ ||
somaśakrārkaśaktiryā dhenurūpeṇa sāstu me || 8 ||
evamāmaṃtrya vidhivatsaphalāṃ vatsakānvitām ||
bhaktyā saṃpūjya goviṃdaṃ jalaśāyinamacyutam || 9 ||
sitavastradharaḥ śāṃto vītarāgo vimatsaraḥ ||
dadyādviprāya rājendra prītyarthaṃ jalaśāyinaḥ || 4.153.10 ||
śeṣaparyaṃkaśayanaḥ śrīmāñchārṅgavibhūṣitaḥ ||
jalaśāyī jagadyoniḥ prīyatāṃ mama keśavaḥ || 11 ||
ityuccārya jagannāthaṃ viprāya prati pādya tām ||
taddinaṃ govratastiṣṭhecchraddhayā parayā yutaḥ || 12 ||
anena vidhinā dattvā jaladhenuṃ janādhipa ||
sarvabhogānavāpnoti ye divyā ye ca mānuṣāḥ || 13 ||
śarīrārogyamatulaṃ praśamaḥ sarvakālikaḥ ||
nṛṇāṃ bhavaṃti dattāyāṃ sarve kāmā na saṃśayaḥ || 14 ||
atrāpi śrūyate bhūpa mudgale na mahātmanā ||
jātismareṇa yadgītamihābhyetya purā kila || 15 ||
sa mudgalaḥ purā vipro yamalokagato muniḥ ||
dadarśa yātanānekāḥ pāpakarmakṛtāṃ nṛṇām || 16 ||
dīptāgnitīkṣṇayantrasthāḥ kvāthatailamayāstathā ||
uṣṇakṣāranadīpātā bhairavāḥ puruṣarṣabha || 17 ||
vraṇakṣāranipātotha kumbhīpākamahālayāḥ ||
tā dṛṣṭvā yātanā vipraścakāra paramāṃ kṛpām || 18 ||
āhlādaṃ te tadā jagmuḥ pāpāstadanukaṃpayā ||
taṃ dṛṣṭvā nārakāḥ kecitsthitvā tadavalokinaḥ || 19 ||
tadavasthaṃ vilokyātha munirnārakamaṇḍalam ||
dharmarājaṃ sa papraccha teṣāṃ praśamakāraṇam || 4.153.20 ||
tasmai cācaṣṭa rājendra tadā vaivasvato yamaḥ ||
āhlādahetumadhikaṃ nārakāṇāṃ narottama || 21 ||
dānānubhāvātsarveṣāṃ nārakāṇāṃ dvijottama ||
saṃpravṛto.ayamāhlādaḥ kāraṇaṃ tacchṛṇu ṣva me || 22 ||
tvayābhyarcya jagannāthaṃ sarveśaṃ jalaśāyinam ||
jaladhenuḥ purā dattā vidhivadvijapuṅgava || 23 ||
tasmātvajjanmano.atīte tṛtīye dvija janmani ||
tasya dānasya te vyuṣṭiriyamāhlādadāyinī || 24 ||
ye tvāṃ paśyaṃti śṛṇvaṃti ye ca dhyāyaṃti mānavāḥ ||
śṛṇoṣi yāṃśca viprendra yāṃśca dhyāyasi paśyasi ||25||
nivṛttiḥ paramā teṣāṃ sarvāhlādapradāyinī ||
sadyo bhavati mā.atra tvaṃ dvijāte kuru vismayam || 26 ||
āhlādahetujananaṃ nāsti viprendra tādṛśam ||
jaladhenuryathā nṛṇāṃ janmānyekonaviṃśatim ||27||
na doṣo na jvaro nārtirna klamo dvija jāyate ||
api janmasahasre.api jaladhenupradāyinām || 28 ||
sa tvaṃ gaccha gṛhītvārdhamasmato dvijasattama ||
yeṣāṃ samāśrayaḥ kṛṣṇe na niyamyā hi te mayā || 29 ||
kṛṣṇastu pūjito yaistu ye kṛṣṇārthamupoṣitāḥ ||
yaiśca nityaṃ smṛtaḥ kṛṣṇo na te madviṣayopagāḥ || 4.153.30 ||
namaḥ kṛṣṇācyutānaṃta vāsudevetyudīritam ||
yairbhā vabhāvitairvipra na te madviṣayopagāḥ ||31||
dānaṃ dadadbhiryairuktamacyutaḥ prīyatāmiti ||
śraddhāpuraḥsarairvipra na te madviṣayopagāḥ || 32 ||
sa eva nāthaḥ sarvasya tanniyogakarā vayam ||
janasaṃyamanaścāhamasmatsaṃyamano hariḥ || 33 ||
itthaṃ niśamya vacanaṃ yamasya vadato.akhilam ||
ūcuste nārakāḥ sarve vahniśastrārkabhīravaḥ ||34||
namaḥ kṛṣṇāya haraye viṣṇave jiṣṇave namaḥ ||
hṛṣīkeśāya keśāya jagaddhātre.acyutāya ca || 35 ||
namaḥ paṅkajanetrāya namaḥ paṅkajanābhaye ||
janārdanāya śrīśāya śrībhartre pītavāsase || 36 ||
goviṃdāya namo nityaṃ namaścodadhiśāyine ||
namaḥ kamalanetrāya nṛsiṃhāya ninādine || 37 ||
śārṅgiṇe śitakhaḍgāya śaṃkhacakragadābhṛte ||
namo vāmanarūpāya krāṃtalokatrayāya ca || 38 ||
varāharūpāya tathā namo yajñāṅgadhāriṇe ||
vyāptāśeṣadigaṃtāyānaṃtāya paramātmane ||39||
vāsudeva namastubhyaṃ namaḥ kaiṭabhasūdine ||
keśavāya namo rāma namastestu mahīdhara ||4.153.40||
namo.astu vāsudevāya hyevamuccārite ca taiḥ ||
śastrāṇi kuṃṭhatāṃ jagmuranalaścāpi śītatām || 41 ||
samabhajyaṃta vastrāṇi samutpeturayomukhāḥ ||
saṃśuṣkā kṣārasaritaḥ patitaḥ śālmalidrumaḥ || 42 ||
prakāśastamaso jajñe narakādbhānubhiḥ saha ||
vavau ca yuṃjanpavano.apyasipatravane tataḥ || 43 ||
nirutsāhā jaḍadhiyo babhūvuryamakiṃkarāḥ ||
jātā gaṅgāmbuvāhinyaḥ pūyaśauṇitanimnagāḥ ||44||
divyaḥ sugaṃdhi pavano manaḥprītikarastathā ||
veṇuvīṇāsvanayutāḥ śabdāścāsanmanoramāḥ || 45 ||
taṃ tādṛśamathālakṣya tadā vaivasvato yamaḥ ||
kṣīṇapāpatrayāṃstāṃstu pādyārghyaiḥ samapūjayat || 46 ||
pūjayitvā ca tānāha kṛṣṇāya sa kṛtāṃjaliḥ ||
samāhitamatirbhūtvā dharmarājo nareśvara || 47 ||
viṣṇo deva jagaddhātarjanārdana jagatpate ||
praṇāmaṃ ye.api kurvanti teṣāmapi namonamaḥ || 48 ||
acyutāyāprameyāya māyāvāmanarūpiṇe ||
praṇāmaṃ ye.api kurvanti teṣāmapi namo namaḥ || 49 ||
namaste vāsudevāya dhīmate puṇyakīrtaye ||
praṇāmaṃ ye ca kurvaṃti teṣāmapi namo namaḥ || 4.153.50 ||
tasya yajñavarāhasya viṣṇoramitatejasaḥ || 51 ||
evaṃ stutvā hṛṣīkeśaṃ dharmarājasya paśyataḥ ||
vimānavaramāruhya nārakāstridivaṃ yayuḥ || 52 ||
mudgalo.api mahābuddhirdṛṣṭvaitadakhilaṃ nṛpa ||
jātismaro bhavadvipraḥ kaṇvagotre mahāmuniḥ ||53||
saṃsmṛtya yamavākyāni viṣṇormāhātmyameva ca||
jaladhenostu māhātmyaṃ saṃsmṛtyedamagāyata||54||
aho sudustarā viṣṇormāyeyamatigahvarī ||
yayā mohitacittastu na vetti parameśvaram ||55||
jīvo gacchati kīṭatvaṃ yūkāmatkuṇayonitām||
tasmāddrumalatādīnāṃ yoniṃ tasmācca pakṣiṇām || 56 ||
tataśca paśutāṃ prāpya naratvamabhivāṃchati ||
tato manuṣyatāṃ prāpya naro yoniṃ kṛtātmanām ||
tāṃ prāpya ca śriyaṃ parāṃ naro māyāvimohitaḥ ||57||
dustarāpi susādhyā sā māyā kṛṣṇasya mohinī ||
vidyate sā manonyastā mudhaiva madhusūdane ||58||
avāpyaivaṃ ca gārhasthyamavāpyaivaṃ ca tatparam ||
chinatti vaiṣṇavīṃ māyāṃ keśavārpitamānasaḥ || 59 ||
avirodhena viṣayānbhuñjanviṣṇuṃ samāśrayet |||
bhuktvā narastaratyenāṃ viṣṇormāyāṃ sudustarām || 4.153.60 ||
īdṛgbahuphalā bhaktiḥ sarvadhātari keśave ||
māyayā tasya devasya tāṃ na kurvaṃti mohitāḥ || || 61 ||
mudhaivoktaṃ sudhāpānaṃ mudhā taddhi viceṣṭitam ||
mudhaiva janma tannaṣṭaṃ yatra nārādhito hariḥ || 62 ||
ārādhito hi yaḥ puṃsāmaihikāmuṣmikaṃ phalam ||
dadāti bhagavāndevaḥ kastaṃ na pratipūjayet || 63 ||
saṃvatsarāstathā māsā viphalā divasāśca te ||
narāṇāṃ viṣayāṃdhānāṃ yaistu nārādhito hariḥ || 64 ||
yo na vittarddhivibhavairna vāsobhirna bhūṣaṇaiḥ ||
tuṣyate hṛdayenaiva kastamīśaṃ na pūjayet || 65 ||
jaladhenostu māhātmyaṃ niśamyedṛgvidhaṃ narāḥ||
nātra yacchaṃti teṣāṃ vai vivekaḥ kutra tiṣṭhati || 66 ||
karmabhūmau hi mānuṣyaṃ janmanāmayutairapi ||
svargāpavargaphaladaṃ kadācitprāpyate naraiḥ || 67 ||
saṃprāpya ca na yairviṣṇustoṣito jaladhenunā ||
te janā bhraṣṭajanmāno vaṃcitāstasya māyayā || 68 ||
ūrdhvabāhurviraumyeṣa dṛṣṭalokadvayo.asmi bhoḥ ||
ārādhayadhvaṃ govindaṃ jaladhenuṃ prayacchata || 69 ||
duḥsaho nārako vahniraviṣahyā ca yātanā ||
jñātaṃ mayaitadālaṃbya kṛṣṇaṃ bhavati niścalaḥ || 4.153.70 ||
ādeśiko deśiko hi yamamārge sudustare ||
vicintya tatsatyametanmanaḥ kṛṣṇe niveśyatām || 71 ||
iṣṭena kiṃ kratuśatena suduṣkareṇa kleśādhikena sukṛtairniyamairvrataiśca ||
dattā dvijāya pitṛrājagṛhaṃ gatasya hyekā.api gaurjalamayī sukhamātanoti ||72||| || iti śrībhaviṣye mahāpurāṇa uttaraparvaṇi śrīkṛṣṇayudhiṣṭhirasaṃvāde jaladhenudānavratavidhivarṇanaṃnāma tripaṃcāśaduttaraśatatamo.adhyāyaḥ || 153 || ja | |||
ghṛtadhenudānavratavarṇanam
|| śrīkṛṣṇa uvāca || ||
ghṛtadhenuṃ pravakṣyāmi tāṃ śṛṇuṣva narottama ||
dīyate yena vidhinā yādṛgrūpāṃ ca kārayet || 1 ||
gavyasya sarpiṣaḥ kumbhāngaṃdhamālyavibhūṣitān || kāṃsyopadohasaṃyuktānsitavastrāvaguṇṭhitān|| 2 ||
ikṣuyaṣṭimayāḥ pādāḥ khurā raupyamayāstathā ||
sauvarṇe cākṣiṇī kārye śṛṃge cāgurukāṣṭhake || 3 ||
saptadhānyamaye pārśve paṭorṇena ca kambalam ||
kuryātturuṣkakarpūrairghrāṇaṃ phalamayānstanān || 4 ||
tadvaccharkarayā jihvāṃ guḍakṣīramayaṃ mukham ||
kṣaumasūtreṇa lāṃgūlaṃ romāṇi sitasarṣapaiḥ || 5 ||
tāmrapātramayaṃ pṛṣṭhaṃ kuryācchraddhāsamanvitaḥ ||
īdṛgrūpāṃ tu saṃkalpya ghṛtadhenuṃ narādhipa || 6 ||
tadvatkalpanayā dhenorvatsaṃ ca parikalpayet ||
maṃtreṇānena rājendra tāṃ samabhyarcya buddhimān || 7 ||
ājyaṃ tejaḥ samuddiṣṭamājyaṃ pāpaharaṃ param ||
ājyaṃ surāṇāmāhāraḥ sarvamājye pratiṣṭhitam|| 8 ||
tvaṃ caivājyamayī devi kalpitāsi mayā kila ||
sarvapāpāpanodāya sukhāya bhava bhāmini || 9 ||
taṃ ca vipraṃ mahābhāga manaseva ghṛtārciṣā ||
kalpayitvā tatastasmai prayataḥ pratipādayet || 4.154.10 ||
dakṣiṇāsahitā dhenuḥ kalpitājyamayī śubhā ||
etāṃ mamopakārāya gṛhāṇa tvaṃ dvijottama ||11||
ityudāhṛtya viprāya tāṃ gāṃ tu pratipādayet ||
dattvaikarātraṃ sthitvā ca ghṛtāhāro yatavrataḥ || 12 ||
anena ca vidhānena navanītamayī śubhā ||
dātavyā nṛpate dhenurnyūnādhikavivarjitā || 13 ||
śṛṇu pārtha mahābāho pradānaphalamuttamam||
ghṛtakṣīramahānadyo yatra pāyasakardamāḥ || 14 ||
ghṛtadhenupradā yāṃti tatra kāmaiḥ supūritāḥ ||
piturūrdhvaṃ ca ye sapta puruṣāstasya ye.apyadhaḥ || 15 ||
tāṃsteṣu nṛpa lokeṣu sa nayatyastakalmaṣān||
sakāmānāmiyaṃ vyuṣṭiḥ kathitā nṛpasattama || 16 ||
niṣkilviṣaṃ padaṃ yāṃti niṣkāmā ghṛtadhenudāḥ ||
ghṛtamagnirghṛtaṃ somastanmayāḥ sarvadevatāḥ || 17 ||
ghṛtaṃ prayacchatāṃ bhītā bhavaṃtyakhiladevatāḥ || 18 ||
māyājalaṃ sutakalatramahormimālaṃ lobhogranakraviṣamaṃ bahupuṇyabhājaḥ ||
lagnā nimagnavapuṣo ghṛtadhenupucche saṃsārasāgaramapāramaho taraṃti || 19 || ||
iti śrībhaviṣye mahāpurāṇe uttaraparvaṇi śrīkṛṣṇayudhiṣṭhirasaṃvāde ghṛtadhenudānavratavidhivarṇanaṃ nāma catuṣpaṃcāśaduttaraśatatamo.adhyāyaḥ || 154 || || cha ||
lavaṇadhenudānavratavarṇanam
|| || || yudhiṣṭhira uvāca || ||
kṛṣṇakṛṣṇa mahābāho sarvaśāstraviśārada ||
kathayasveha dānānāmuttamaṃ yatprakīrtitam || 1 ||
yena dattena dānāni sarvāṇyeva bhavaṃtyuta ||
sarvakāmasamṛddhiśca sarvapāpakṣayo bhavet || 2 ||
prāyaścittaviśuddhiśca tanme kathaya suvrata ||
śrīkṛṣṇa uvāca ||
śṛṇu rājanpravakṣyāmi dānānāmuttamottamam || 3 ||
khyātaṃ lavaṇadhenvākhyaṃ sarvakāmapradaṃ nṛṇām ||
yāṃ dattvā brahmahā goghnaḥ pitṛhā gurutalpagaḥ || || 4 ||
viśvāsaghātī krūrātmā sarvapāparato.api vā||
mucyate nātra saṃdehaḥ śivalokaṃ sa gacchati || 5 ||
subhago dhanasaṃpanno dīrghāyuraparājitaḥ ||
jāyate puruṣo loke sarvakāmasamanvitaḥ || 6 ||
vidhiṃ vakṣyāmi rājendra lavaṇasyeha kalpanam ||
gomayenopaliptena darbhasaṃstarasaṃsthitam || 7 ||
āvikaṃ carma vinyasya pūrvāśābhimukhaṃ sthitam ||
vastreṇācchāditaṃ kṛtvā dhenuṃ kurvīta buddhimān || 8 ||
āḍhakenaiva kurvīta vahuvitto.alpavittavān ||
svarṇaśṛṅgīṃ raupyakhurāmikṣupādāṃ phalastanīm || 9 ||
kāryā śarkarayā jihvā gandhaprāṇavatī tathā ||
samudrodaraje śuktī karṇau tasyāḥ prakalpayet|| 4.155.10 ||
kaṃbalaṃ paṭṭasūtreṇa grīvāyāṃ ghaṇṭikāṃ tathā ||
śṛṃge candanakāṣṭhābhyāṃ mauktike cākṣiṇī ubhe || 11 ||
kapolau saktupiṇḍābhyāṃ yavānāsye pradāpayet ||
tilānpārśve prakurvīta godhūmāścaiva bhaktitaḥ ||12||
evaṃ vai saptadhānyāni yathālābhaṃ prakalpayet ||
pṛṣṭhe vai tāmrapātraṃ tu apāne guḍa piṃḍikām ||13||
lāṃgūle kaṃbalaṃ dadyāddrākṣāṃ kṣīrapradeśataḥ ||
yonipradeśe ca madhu sarvavastuphalānvitam ||14||
evaṃ samyakparisthāpya rasarasyamayīṃ ca gām ||
sthāpayedvatsamekaṃ ca caturbhāgena mānavaḥ || 15 ||
evaṃ dhenuṃ samabhyarcya mālyavastravibhūṣaṇaiḥ ||
snātvā devārcanaṃ kṛtvā brāhmaṇānabhipūjya ca ||
kṛtvā pradakṣiṇāṃ gāṃ tu putrabhāryāsamanvitaḥ || 16 ||
brāhmaṇāya suśīlāya vṛttayuktāya vai nṛpa ||
dadyātparvasu sarveṣu mantrapūrvaṃ subhaktitaḥ||17||
lavaṇe vai rasāḥ sarve lavaṇe sarvadevatāḥ ||
sarvadevamaye devi lavaṇākhye namo.astu te || 18 ||
evamuccārya maṃtrāṃ te viprāya pratipādayet ||
samyakpradakṣiṇāṃ kṛtvā dakṣiṇāsahitāṃ nṛpa || 19 ||
pradakṣiṇā mahī tena kṛtā bhavati bhārata ||
sarvadānāni dattāni sarvakratuphalāni ca || 4.155.20 ||
sarve rasāḥ sarvamannaṃ sarvaṃ ca sacarācaram ||
saubhāgyaṃ paramā buddhirārogyaṃ sarvasaṃpadaḥ || 21 ||
bhavati dattvā nṛṇāṃ tu rasadhenuṃ na saṃśayaḥ ||
svarge ca niyatā vāso yāvadābhūtasaṃplavam || 22 ||
parṇaurṇakaṃbalagalāṃ lavaṇāḍhakena kṛtvā phalastanavatīmapi lāvaṇākhyām ||
dattvā dvijāya vidhivadrasadhenumenāṃ lokaṃ gavāṃ sakalasaukhyayuto viśetsaḥ || 23 || iti śrībhaviṣye mahāpurāṇa uttaraparvaṇi śrīkṛṣṇayudhiṣṭhirasaṃvāde lavaṇadhenudānavratavidhivarṇanaṃ nāma paṃcapaṃcāśaduttaraśatatamo.adhyāyaḥ || 155 || cha ||
suvarṇadhenudānavratavarṇanam
|| śrīkṛṣṇa uvāca || ||
ataḥ paraṃ pravakṣyāmi rājankāñcanadhenukām ||
yāṃ dattvā sarvapāpebhyo mucyate nātra saṃśayaḥ || 1 ||
surāpo brahmahā goghno bhīrurbhagnavrato.api vā ||
gurughātī svasṛgāmī paradārarataśca yaḥ || 2 ||
mucyate pātakaiḥ sarvairdattvā kāñcanadhenukām ||
saṃśuddhasya suvarṇasya paṃcāśatpalikāṃ śubhām || 3 ||
arddhena vā prakurvīta śaktyā vā nṛpasattama ||
ukhāṃ paścimabhāge tu dṛṣṭakukṣipayodharām || 4 ||
vibhaktāṅgīṃ sujaghanāṃ sumanoharakarṇikām ||
sarvaratnavicitrāṅgīṃ kārayetkapilāṃ śubhām || 5 ||
caturthena tu bhāgena vatsaṃ tasyāḥ prakalpayet ||
raupyaghaṭāṃ ca dattvā tu kauśeyaparivāritām || 6 ||
tāmraśṛṃgīṃ tathā kuryādvaiḍūryamayakaṃbalām ||
muktāphalamaye netre vaidrumī rasanā tathā || 7 ||
kṛṣṇājine guḍaprasthaṃ tatrasthāṃ kārayecchubhām||
kuṃbhāṣṭakasamopetāṃ nānā phalasamanvitām || 8 ||
tathāṣṭādaśa dhānyātapatropānadyugānvitām ||
bhājanaṃ vasanaṃ caiva tāmradohanakaṃ tathā || 9 || dīpakānnādilavaṇaśarkarādhānyakānvitām ||
pradadyādbrāhmaṇaṃ pūjya vastrairābharaṇaiḥ śubhaiḥ || 4.156.10 ||
snātaḥ pradakṣiṇīkṛtya dhenuṃ sarvāṅgasaṃyutām ||
guḍadhenūktamaṃtraiśca āvāhya pratipūjya ca || 11 ||
tvaṃ sarvadevagaṇamandirabhūṣaṇāsi viśveśvaratripathagodadhiparvatānām || śraddhāmbutīkṣṇaśakalīkṛtapātakaughaḥ prāpnoti nirvṛtimatīva parāṃ namāmi ||12||
loke yathepsitaphalārthavidhāyinī tvāmāsādya ko hi bhayabhāgbhavatīha martyaḥ || (pāṭhā. bhayabhāgyavatīha)
saṃsāraduḥkhaśamanāya yatastvakāmāstvāṃ kāmadhenumiti vedavido vadaṃti || 13 || evamāmantrya tāṃ dhenuṃ viprāya pratipādayet ||
sadakṣiṇopaskarāṃ ca praṇipatya kṣamāpayet || 14 ||
dānakāle tu ye devāstīrthāni manavastathā ||
śarīre nivasaṃtyasyāstāñchṛṇuṣva narādhipa || 15 ||
netrayoḥ sūryaśaśinau jihvāyāṃ tu sarasvatī ||
daṃteṣu maruto devāḥ karṇayośca tathāśvinau || 16 ||
śṛṃgāgragau sadā cāsyā devau rudrapitāmahau ||
gaṃdharvāpsarasaścaiva kakuddeśaṃ pratiṣṭhitāḥ ||
kukṣau samudrāśca tvāro yonau tripathagāminī || 17 ||
ṛṣayo romakūpeṣu apāne vasudhā sthitā ||
antreṣu nāgā vijñeyāḥ parvatāścāsthiṣu sthitāḥ || || 18 ||
dharmakāmārthamokṣāstu pādeṣu parisaṃsthitāḥ ||
huṃkāre ca caturvedāḥ kaṃṭhe rudrāḥ pratiṣṭhitāḥ || 19 ||
pṛṣṭhabhāge sthito merurviṣṇuḥ sarvaśarīragaḥ ||
evaṃ sarvamayī devī pāvanī viśvarūpiṇī || 4.156.20 ||
kāñcanena kṛtā dhenuḥ sarvadevamayī smṛtā ||
yo dadyāttādṛśīṃ dhenuṃ sarvadānaprado hi saḥ || 21 ||
karmabhūmau hi martyānāṃ dānametatsudurlabham ||
tasmāddeyamidaṃ śaktyā sarvakalmaṣanāśanam ||22||
pāvanaṃ tāraṇaṃ caiva kīrtidaṃ śāṃtidaṃ tathā ||
varṣakoṭiśataṃ sāgraṃ svargaloke gato naraḥ || 23 ||
nārī vā pūjyate devairvimānavaramāsthitā ||
gaṃdharvaigīyamānastu puṣpairmālāvibhūṣitaiḥ || 24 ||
sarvābharaṇasaṃpannaḥ sarvadvaṃdvavivarjitaḥ ||
svarge sthitvā ciraṃ kālaṃ tato martye.abhijāyate || 25 ||
ādhi vyādhi vinirmukto rūpavānpriyadarśanaḥ ||
evaṃ naro vā nārī vā dattvā dānamidaṃ bhuvi ||
sarvānkāmānavāpnoti jāyamānaḥ punaḥ punaḥ || 26 ||
āmantrya sādhukulaśīlaguṇānvitāya viprāya yaḥ kanakadhenumimāṃ pradadyāt ||
prāpnoti siddhamunikinnaradevajuṣṭaṃ kanyāśataiḥ parivṛtaṃ padamindumauleḥ||27||
iti śrībhaviṣye mahāpurāṇa uttaraparvaṇi śrīkṛṣṇayudhiṣṭhirasaṃvāde suvarṇadhenudānavratavidhivarṇanaṃ nāma ṣaṭpaṃcāśaduttaraśatatamo.adhyāyaḥ || 156 || ||
ratnadhenudānavratavidhivarṇanam
|| śrīkṛṣṇa uvāca || ||
athātaḥ saṃpravakṣyāmi dānamanyatsudurllabham ||
ratnadhenviti vikhyātaṃ golokaphaladaṃ nṛṇām || 1 ||
puṇyaṃ dinamathāsādya gomayenopalepanam ||
kṛtvā bhūmau mahārāja tatra dhenuṃ prakalpayet || 2 ||
dhenuṃ ratnamayīṃ kuryāttattatsaṃkalpapūrvikām ||
sthāpayetpadmarāgāṇāmekāśītiṃ mukhe budhaḥ || 3 ||
puṣparāgaśataṃ dhenoḥ pādayoḥ parikalpayet ||
lalāṭe hematilakaṃ muktāphalaśataṃ dṛśoḥ || 4 ||
bhrūyuge vidrumaśataṃ śuktī karṇadvaye smṛte ||
kāñcanāni ca śṛṅgāṇi śirovajraśatātmakam || 5 ||
grīvāyāṃ netrapuṭake gomedakaśataṃ tathā ||
indranīlaśataṃ pṛṣṭhe vaidūryaśata pārśvake || 6 ||
sphāṭikairudaraṃ kāryaṃ saugandhikaśataṃ kaṭau ||
khurā hemamayā kāryāḥ pucchaṃ muktāvalīmayam || 7 ||
sūryakāntendukāntau ca ghrāṇe karpūracandanaiḥ ||
kuṃkumena ca romāṇi raupyaṃ nābhiṃ ca kārayet || 8 ||
gārutmataśataṃ tadvadapāne parikalpayet ||
tathānyāni ca ratnāni sthāpayetsarvasaṃdhiṣu || 9 ||
kuryāccharkarayā jihvāṃ gomayaṃ ca guḍātmakam ||
gomūtramājyena tathā dadhidugdhasvarūpataḥ || 4.157.10 ||
pucchāgre cāmaraṃ dadyātstanayostāmradohanam ||
kārayedevamevaṃ tu caturthāṃśena vatsakam || 11 ||
nānāphalāni pārśveṣu kṛtvā pūjāṃ prayatnataḥ ||
guḍadhenuvadāvāhya idaṃ codāharettataḥ || 12 ||
tvāṃ sarvadevagaṇavāsamiti stuvaṃti rudrendracandrakamalāsanavāsudevāḥ || tasmātsamastabhuvanatrayadehayuktā māṃ pāhi devi bhavasāgara magnamāsu || 13 || evamāmantrya tāṃ dhenuṃ viprāya pratipādayet ||
saṃpūjya vastrābharaṇairvidhijñaṃ vedapāragam || 14 ||
tataśca dakṣiṇāṃ dattvā praṇipatya kṣamāpayet ||
evaṃ yaḥ kurute pārtha tasya puṇyaphalaṃ śṛṇu || 15 ||
kalpakoṭiśataṃ sāgraṃ śivaloke sukhaṃ vaset ||
tataḥ kāle bahutithe rājarājo bhavediha || 16 ||
sarvakāmasamṛddhaśca śatrupakṣakṣayaṃkaraḥ || 17 ||
iti sakalavidhijño ratnadhenupradānaṃ vitarati sa vimānaṃ prāpya dedīpyamānam ||
sakala kaluṣamukto baṃdhubhiḥ putrapautraiḥ sa hi madanasarūpaḥ sthānamabhyeti śaṃbhoḥ || 18 ||
iti śrībhaviṣye mahāpurāṇa uttaraparvaṇi śrīkṛṣṇayudhiṣṭhirasaṃvāde ratnadhenudānavratavidhivarṇanaṃ nāma saptapaṃcāśaduttaraśatatamo.adhyāyaḥ || 157 || a ||
ubhayamukhīgodānavratavarṇanam
|| yudhiṣṭhira uvāca || ||
prasūyamānā dātavyā dhenurbrāhmaṇapuṅgave ||
vidhinā kena dharmajñaṃ dāne tasyāśca kiṃ phalam || 1 ||
|| śrīkṛṣṇa uvāca || ||
prasūyamānātipuṇyaiḥ prāpyate gaurnṛpottama ||
prāpnuvaṃti narāḥ kecitpuṇyasaṃbhāravistarāḥ ||2 ||
yāvatpādau yonigatau śiraścaiva pradṛśyate ||
tāvadgauḥ pṛthivī jñeyā yāvadgarbhaṃ na muṃcati || 3 ||
gauryāvadvimukhī caiva yadā bhavati bhārata ||
tadāsau pṛthivī jñeyā saśailavanakānanā || 4 ||
dattvobhayamukhīṃ rājanyatpuṇyaṃ prāpyate nṛbhiḥ ||
na tadvarṇayituṃ yāti mukhenaikena kenacit || 5 ||
kimiṣṭairbahubhiryajñairdānairdattaiśca sattama ||
prasūyamānāṃ gāmekāṃ dehi kiṃ bahunā tava || 6 ||
ekaiva pāti narakātsukhamekaiva kārayet||
ekāpi dvimukhī dattā gaurgaurbhavati bhārata || 7 ||
svarṇaśṛṃgīṃ raupyakhurāṃ muktālāṅgūlabhūṣitām ||
kāṃsyopadohanāṃ rājannalaṃkṛtya dvijottame ||
prasūyamānāṃ gāṃ dattvā mahatpuṇyaphalaṃ labhet || 8 ||
yāvaṃti dhenuromāṇi vatsasyāpi narādhipa ||
tāvadvarṣasahasrāṇi svargaloke mahīyate || 9 ||
pitṛrnpitāmahāṃścaiva tathaiva prapitāmahān ||
samuddharatyasaṃdigdhaṃ narakādbhūridakṣiṇaḥ || 4.158.10 ||
ghṛtakṣīravahā nadyo dadhipāyasakardamāḥ ||
tatra te yāṃti yatrāsti drumaścepsitakāmadaḥ || 11 ||
yo dadāti suvarṇena bahunā saha bhāvinīm ||
golokaḥ sulabhastasya brahmalokaśca pārthiva || 12 ||
na deyā durbalā rājandhenurnaivālpadakṣiṇā ||
kāmyo.ayaṃ vidhiruddiṣṭaḥ phalado vidhinā kṛtaḥ || 13 ||
striyaśca ta caṃdrasamānavaktrāḥ prataptajāṃbūnadatulyavarṇāḥ ||
mahānitaṃbāstanuvṛttamadhyāḥ sevaṃtyajasraṃ nalinābhanetrāḥ || 14 |||
iti śrībhaviṣye mahāpurāṇa uttaraparvaṇi śrīkṛṣṇayudhiṣṭhirasaṃvāda ubhayamukhīgodānavratavidhivarṇanaṃ nāmāṣṭapaṃcāśaduttaraśatatamo.adhyāyaḥ || 158 || || cha || || ||
gosahasrapradānavidhivarṇanam
|| yudhiṣṭhira uvāca || ||
gosahasravidhānaṃ ca kathayasva janārdana ||
kasminkāle pradātavyaṃ kathaṃ deyaṃ ca tadbhavet || 1 ||
|| śrīkṛṣṇa uvāca || ||
gāvaḥ pavitrā lokānāṃ gāva eva parāyaṇam ||
brahmaṇā sṛjatā lokānvṛttihetoḥ prajeśvara ||
gāvaḥ prathamataḥ sṛṣṭāstrailokya hitakāmyayā || 2 ||
yāsāṃ mūtrapurīṣeṇa devatāyatanānyapi ||
śucīni samajāyaṃta kiṃbhūtamadhikaṃ tataḥ || 3 ||
mūlaṃ yajñasya kāmyasya sarvadevamayāḥ śubhāḥ ||
gomaye vasate lakṣmīḥ paryāptaṃ tannidarśanam || 4 ||
brāhmaṇāścaiva gāvaśca kulamekaṃ dvidhā kṛtam ||
ekatra maṃtrāstiṣṭhanti haviranyatra tiṣṭhati || 5 ||
yāsāṃ putrairdhṛtā lokā dhāritāḥ sarvadevatāḥ ||
tāsāṃ dānavidhānaṃ ca śṛṇu tatpṛthivīpate || 6 ||
ekā.api gaurguṇopetā kṛtsnaṃ tārayate kulam ||
surūpā śīlasaṃpannā yuvatiḥ supayasvinī || 7 ||
suvatsā suduhā caiva pāparogavivarjitā ||
vidhivattādṛśā dattā kṛtsnaṃ tārayate kulam || 8 ||
kiṃ punardaśa yo dadyācchataṃ vā vidhipūrvakam ||
sahasraṃ tu punardadyāttasya vai kimihocyate || 9 ||
gosahasraṃ purā dattaṃ nahuṣeṇa mahībhṛtā ||
sa gato brahmaṇaḥ sthānaṃ yayātiśca mahāmatiḥ || 4.159.10 ||
gaṃgātīre mahaddattamadityā putrakāmyayā ||
lebhe putraṃ trilokeśaṃ nārāyaṇamakalmaṣam || 11 ||
śrūyate pitṛbhirgītā gāthāstāḥ śṛṇu bhūpate || 12 ||
yadi kaścitkule.asmākaṃ gosahasraṃ pradāpayet ||
yāsyāmaḥ paramāṃ siddhiṃ kāritāṃ puṇyakarmaṇā || 13 ||
duhitā vā kule kācidgosahasrapradāyinī ||
sopānaḥ sugatirdatto bhaviṣyati na saṃśayaḥ || 14 ||
ataḥ paraṃ pravakṣyāmi yajñaṃ vai sarvakāmikam ||
gosahasraṃ tadā dadyācchāstroktavidhivannaraḥ || 15 ||
tīrthe goṣṭhe gṛhe vāpi maṃḍapaṃ kārayecchubham ||
daśadvādaśahastaṃ vā caturvaktraṃ satoraṇam || 16 ||
tanmadhye kārayedvediṃ caturhastāmanūpamām ||
hastamātrapramāṇena hastena samalaṃkṛtām ||17||
pūrvottare.athadigbhāge grahavediṃ prakalpayet ||
grahayajñavidhānena grahāṃstatra kramādyajet || 18 ||
brahmā viṣṇuśca rudraśca pūjyāḥ prathamameva hi ||
ṛtvijaḥ parikartavyā ṣoḍaśāṣṭau ca śobhanāḥ || 19 ||
catvāro vā mahārāja upādhyāyaśca paṃcamaḥ ||
sarvābharaṇasaṃpannāḥ karṇaveṣṭāṃgulīyakaiḥ || 4.159.20 ||
śobhitāśchatrasaṃpannāstāmrapātradvayānvitāḥ ||
grahayajñoktavidhinā homaṃ havyaṃ samācaret || 21 ||
vedyāḥ pūrvottare bhāge śivakuṃḍaṃ niyojayet ||
kuṃbhadvayaṃ ca dvāreṣu paṃcaratnaṃ sapallavam || 22 ||
kāryaṃ kurukulaśreṣṭha tato homaṃ samārabhet ||
lokapālabaliṃ dadyāttulāpuruṣadānavat || 23 ||
gosahasrādviniṣkṛṣya savatsaṃ daśakaṃ gavām || gosahasrādbahiṣkuryādvastramālyavibhūṣaṇam ||
ataḥ praveśya daśakaṃ vastrairmālyaiśca pūjayet || 24 ||
suvarṇaghaṃṭikāyuktaṃ tāmradohanakānvitam ||
suvarṇatilakopetaṃ khurai raupyairalaṃkṛtaiḥ ||
hemaratnamayaiḥ śṛṃgaiścāmaraiścopaśobhitam || 25 ||
munayaḥ kecidicchanti kāṃcanaṃ naṃdikeśvaram ||
lavaṇadroṇaśikhare bhaktyā tamapi kārayet || 26 ||
ekā pratyakṣaṛṣabhe keṣāṃciddānamiṣyate ||
grahānsurāṃśca saṃpūjya mālyavastraphalākṣataiḥ || 27 ||
patākābhiralaṃkṛtya devatāyatanāni ca ||
gośate.api daśāṃśena sarvametatprakalpayet || 28 ||
yadi sarvā na vidyante gāvaḥ sarvaguṇottamāḥ||
daśakaṃ pūjya yatnena itaraḥ parikalpayet || 29 ||
puṣpakālamatho vādyagītamaṃgalanisvanaiḥ ||
sarvauṣadhyudakasnātaḥ snapito dvijapuṃga vaiḥ ||
imamuccārayenmaṃtraṃ gṛhītakusumāṃjaliḥ || 4.159.30 ||
namo vo viśvamūrtibhyo viśvamātṛbhya eva ca ||
lokādhivāsinībhyastu rohiṇībhyo namo namaḥ || 31 ||
gavāmaṃgeṣu tiṣṭhanti bhuvanānyekaviṃśatiḥ ||
brahmādayastathā devā rohiṇyaḥ pāṃtu mātaraḥ || 32 ||
gāvo mamāgrataḥ saṃtu gāvo me saṃtu pṛṣṭhataḥ ||
gāvo me sarvataḥ saṃtu gavāṃ madhye vasāmyaham || 33 ||
yasmāttvaṃ vṛṣarūpeṇa dharmaścaiva sanātanaḥ || (pāṭhā. sanānataḥ)
aṣṭamūrtteradhiṣṭhānamataḥ pāhi sanātanaḥ || ||34||
ityāmantrya tato dayādgurave naṃdikeśvaram ||
sarvopaskaraṇopetaṃ goyutaṃ ca viśeṣataḥ || 35 ||
gavāṃ śatamathaikaikaṃ tadardhaṃ cāpi viṃśatiḥ ||
daśa pañcaśataṃ dadyādbahubhyastadanujñayā || 36 ||
naikā bahubhyo dātavyā dātā doṣakaro bhavet ||
bahvyastvekasya dātavyāḥ śrīmadārogyavṛddhaye || 37 ||
payovratastatastiṣṭhedekāhaṃ gosahasradaḥ ||
tathaiva brahmacārī syādya icchedvipulāṃ śriyam || 38 ||
na deyā durbalā dhenurnālpakṣīrā na rogiṇī ||
na jīrṇā jīrṇavastrā vā nāpatyagatacetanā || 39 ||
anena vidhinā yastu gosahasraprado bhavet ||
sarvapāpavinirmuktaḥ siddhacāraṇasevitaḥ || || 4.159.40 ||
vimānenārkavarṇena kiṃkiṇījālamālinā ||
sarveṣāṃ lokapālānāṃ loke saṃpūjyate suraiḥ || 41 ||
saptāvarānsapta parānsapta caiva parāvarān ||
puruṣānuddhareddattvā gosahasraṃ vidhānataḥ || 42 ||
svargalokāccyuto vātha nārī vā satparāyaṇā ||
sapta janmāni rājñī syātstūyamānā punaḥpunaḥ || 43 ||
na tvevedaṃ dānamātraṃ praśastaṃ pātraṃ kālo goviśeṣo vighiśca ||
tasmādetāḥ sarvabhūṣāsametāḥ pātre kāle kṣīravatyo vidhānāt ||44 ||
ekāpi gaurbahuguṇā guṇine pradattā dātuḥ kulaṃ tripuruṣaṃ vidhivatpunāti ||
yaḥ śraddhayā vitaratīha gavāṃ sahasraṃ śakyaṃ phalaṃ na nṛpate.asya mayābhidhātum || 45 || || iti śrībhaviṣye mahāpurāṇa uttaraparvaṇi śrīkṛṣṇayudhiṣṭhirasaṃvāde gosahasrapradānavidhivratavarṇanaṃ nāmaikonaṣaṣṭyuttaraśatatamo.adhyāyaḥ || 159 || || cha ||
vṛṣabhadānavratavarṇanam
|| yudhiṣṭhira uvāca|| ||
yuṣmadvākyāmṛtamidaṃ śṛṇvānāha janārdana ||
na tṛptimadhigacchāmi jātaṃ kautūhalaṃ hi me || 1 ||
gopatiḥ kila govindastriṣu lokeṣu viśrutaḥ ||
govṛṣasya pradānena trailokyamabhinaṃdati || 2 ||
tadgovṛṣabhadānasya phalaṃ me kathāyācyuta ||
|| śrīkṛṣṇa uvāca || ||
vṛṣadānaphalaṃ puṇyaṃ śṛṇuṣva kathayāmi te || 3 ||
pavitraṃ pāvanaṃ caiva sarvadānottamottamam ||
daśadhenusamo.anaḍvānekaścaikadhuraṃdharaḥ ||
daśadhenupradānāddhi sa evaiko viśiṣyate || 4 ||
yo hṛṣṭaścātipuṣṭāṃgo hyarogaḥ pāṃḍunandana ||
yuvā bhadraḥ suśīlaśca sarvadoṣavivarjitaḥ || 5 ||
dhuraṃdharaḥ sthāpayate eka eva kulaṃ mahat ||
trātā bhavati saṃsāre nātra kāryā vicāraṇā ||6||
alaṃkṛtya vṛṣaṃ śāṃtaṃ puṇyakāla upasthite ||
raupyalāṃgūlasaṃyuktaṃ brāhmaṇāya nivedayet || 7 ||
maṃtreṇānena rājendra taṃ śṛṇuṣva vadāmi te || 8 ||
dharmastvaṃ vṛṣarūpeṇa jagadānandakārakaḥ ||
aṣṭamūrteradhiṣṭhānamataḥ pāhi sanātana || 9 ||
dattvaivaṃ dakṣiṇāyuktaṃ praṇipatya visarjayet ||
saptajanmakṛtaṃ pāpaṃ vāṅmanaḥ kāyakarmaṇām ||
tatsarvaṃ vilayaṃ yāti godānasukṛtena ca || 4.160.10 ||
yānaṃ vṛṣabhasaṃyuktaṃ dīpyamānaṃ suśobhanam ||
āruhya kāmagaṃ divyaṃ svalokamadhirohati ||| 11 ||
yāvaṃti tasya romāṇi govṛṣasya mahīpate ||
tāvadvarṣasahasrāṇi gavāṃ loke mahīyate ||12||
golokādavatīrṇastu iha loke dvijo bhavet ||
yajñayājī mahātejāḥ sarvabrāhmaṇapūjitaḥ || 13 ||
yathoktaṃ te mahārāja kasya deyo vṛṣottamaḥ ||
tadahaṃ te pravakṣyāmi pātraṃ trāṇapadaṃ nṛṇām || 14 ||
ye kṣāṃtadāṃtāḥ śrutipūrṇakarṇā jiteṃdriyāḥ prāṇivadhānnivṛttāḥ ||
pratigrahe saṃkucitā gṛhasthāste brāhmaṇāstārayituṃ samarthāḥ || 15 ||
ūrjasvinaṃ bharasahaṃ dṛḍhakaṃdharaṃ ca yacchaṃti ye vṛṣamaśeṣaguṇopapannam ||
dattena yadbhavati godaśakena puṇyaṃ satyaṃ bhavaṃti bhuvi tatphalabhāginaste || 16 ||
iti śrībhaviṣye mahāpurāṇa uttaraparvaṇi śrīkṛṣṇayudhiṣṭhirasaṃvāde vṛṣabhadānavratavarṇanaṃ nāma ṣaṣṭayuttaraśatatamo.adhyāyaḥ || 160 || chaṃ ||
kapilādānamāhātmyavarṇanam
|| yudhiṣṭhira uvāca || ||
kapilādānamāhātmyaṃ kathayasva jagatpate ||
puṇyaṃ yatsarvadānānāṃ sarvapātakanāśanam || 1 ||
|| śrīkṛṣṇa uvāca || ||
tatte.ahaṃ saṃpravakṣyāmi vinatāśvena yatpurā ||
kathitaṃ kapilādānaṃ tacchṛṇuṣva mahāmate || 2 ||
|| vinatāśva uvāca || ||
ataḥ paraṃ mahārājobhayamukhyāḥ samāsataḥ ||
vidhānaṃ yadvarāheṇa dharaṇyai kathitaṃ purā || 3 ||
tadahaṃ saṃpravakṣyāmi navapuṇyaphalaṃ ca yat ||
|| dharaṇyuvāca || ||
yattvayā kapilā nāma pūrvamutpāvitā prabho || 4 ||
homadhenuḥ sadā puṇyā dhenuryajñāvatārabhūḥ ||
sā kathaṃ brāhmaṇebhyo hi deyā kasmindine.api ca || || 5 ||
kīdṛśāya ca viprāya dātavyā puṇyalakṣaṇā ||
kati vā kapilāḥ proktāḥ svayameva svayaṃbhuvā || 6 ||
tāsāṃ prayatnāddānena kiṃ puṇyaṃ syācca mādhava ||
etadicchāmyahaṃ śrotuṃ vistarānmadhusūdana || 7 ||
|| varāha uvāca || ||
śṛṇuṣva bhadre tattvena pavitraṃ pāpanāśanam ||
kṛtvā yatsarvapāpebhyo mucyate nātra saṃśayaḥ || 8 ||
kapilā agnihotrārthaṃ yajñārthe ca varānane ||
uddhṛtya sarvatejāṃsi brahmaṇā nirmitā purā || 9 ||
pavitrāṇāṃ pavitraṃ ca maṅgalānāṃ ca maṃgalam ||
puṇyānāṃ paramaṃ puṇyaṃ kapilā ca varānane || 4.161.10 ||
tapasastapa evāgryaṃ vratānāmuttamaṃ vrataṃ ||
dānānāmuttamaṃ dānaṃ vidhinā hyetadakṣayam || 11 ||
pṛthivyāṃ yāni tīrthāni guhyānyāyatanāni ca ||
pavitrāṇi ca puṇyāni sarvaloke vasundhare || 12 ||
hotavyānyagnihotrāṇi sāyaṃ prātardvijātibhiḥ ||
kapilāyā ghṛteneha daśa kṣīreṇa vā punaḥ || 13 ||
yajaṃte ye.agnihotrāṇi annaiśca vividhaiḥ sadā ||
pūjayantyatithīṃścaiva parāṃ bhaktimupāgatāḥ || 14 ||
teṣāṃ tvādityavarṇaiśca vimānairjāyate gatiḥ ||
sūryamaṇḍalamadhye ca brahmaṇā nirmitā purā || 15 ||
kapilāyāḥ śiro grīvāṃ sarva tīrthāni bhāmini ||
pitāmahaniyogācca nivasaṃti hi nityaśaḥ || 16 ||
prātarutthāya yo martyaḥ kapilā galamastakāt ||
cyutaṃ tu bhaktyā pānīyaṃ śirasā dhārayennaraḥ || 17 ||
sa tena puṇyenopetastatkṣaṇādgatakilviṣaḥ ||
viṃśadvarṣakṛtaṃ pāpaṃ dahatyagnirivendhanam || 18 ||
kalya utthāya yo martyaḥ kuryāttāsāṃ pradakṣiṇam ||
pradakṣiṇīkṛtā tena pṛthivī syādvasundhare || 19 ||
pradakṣiṇāyāṃ caikāyāṃ kṛtāyāṃ ca vasundhare ||
daśavarṣakṛtaṃ pāpaṃ naśyate nātra saṃśayaḥ || 4.161.20 ||
kapilāyāstu mūtreṇa snāyādvai yaḥ śucivrataḥ ||
sa gaṅgādyeṣu tīrtheṣu snāto bhavati mānavaḥ || 21 ||
yena snānena caikena bhavamukto bhavennaraḥ ||
yāvajjīvakṛtātpāpāttatkṣaṇādeva mucyate || 22 ||
gosahasraṃ ca yo dadyādekāṃ vā kapilāṃ naraḥ ||
samametatpurā prāha brahmaloke pitāmahaḥ || 23 ||
yaścaikāṃ kapilāṃ hanyānnaro rajjukaro yadi ||
gosahasraṃ hataṃ tena bhavatīha na saṃśayaḥ || 24 ||
gavāṃ sthitiṃ kalpayeta ghṛtaṃ gavyaṃ na dūṣayet ||
yāvaddhi varddhate gavyaṃ tāvatpāpaistu pūyate || 25 |||
gavāṃ kaṃḍūyanaṃ śreṣṭhaṃ tathā ca pratipālanam ||
tulyaṃ goghṛtadānasya bhayarogādipālanam || 26 ||
tṛṇādibhakṣaṇārthaṃ ca gavāṃ dadyāddharādikam ||
svargavāsaphalaṃ divyaṃ labhate mānavottamaḥ || 27 ||
daśeha kapilāḥ proktāḥ svayameva svayaṃbhuvā ||
yo dadyācchrotriyasyaiva svargaṃ gatvā sa mānavaḥ || 28 || vimānairvividhairdivyairdivyakanyābhirarcitaḥ ||
sevyamānastu gaṃdharvairdīpyamānā yathāgnayaḥ || 29 ||
suvarṇakapilā pūrvā dvitīyā gaurapiṅgalā ||
āśā caiva tṛtīyā syādagnijvālā caturthikā || 4.161.30 ||
paṃcamī juhuvarṇā syātṣaṣṭhī tu ghṛtapiṅgalā ||
saptamī śvetapiṅgā syādaṣṭamī kṣīrapiṅgalā || 31 ||
navamī pāṭalā jñeyā daśamī puṣpapiṅgalā ||
etā daśa samākhyātāḥ kapilāśca vasuṃdhare || 32 ||
sarvā hyetā mahābhāgāstārayaṃti na saṃśayaḥ ||
saṃgameṣu praśastāśca sarvapāpapraṇāśanāḥ || 33 ||
evametāstu kapilāḥ pāpaghnyaśca vasundhare ||
āśā caiva tu yā proktā agnigarbhānalaprabhā ||34||
agnijvālojjvalaiḥ śṛṃgaiḥ pradīptāṃgāralocanā ||
agnipuṣpā agnilomā tathānyā cānalaprabhā ||35||
tāmāgneyyāṃ sadā dadyādbrāhmaṇāyetaraiḥ sadā ||
gṛhītvā kapilāṃ śūdraḥ kāmatastatpayaḥ pibet ||36||
patitaśca bhavennityaṃ caṃḍālasadṛśaḥ pumān||
tasmānna pratigṛhṇīyācchabalāṃ gāṃ kathaṃcana ||37||
dvārāṃte parihartavyā kapilā gaurdvijetaraiḥ ||
lokeṣu te mṛḍhatamāḥ kapilākṣīrabhojanāḥ ||38||
asaṃbhāṣyāśca patitāḥ śūdrāste pāpakarmiṇaḥ ||
pibaṃti yāvatkapilāṃ tāvatteṣāṃ pitāmahāḥ ||
amedhyaṃ bhuñjate.atastāṃ nopajīveddvijetaraḥ || 39 ||
tāsāṃ ghṛtaṃ ca kṣīraṃ vā navanītamathāpi vā ||
upajīvaṃti ye śūdrāste prayāṃti yamālayam ||4.161.40||
kapilājīvinaḥ śūdrāḥ sarve gacchaṃti rauravam ||
raurave bhuñjate duḥkhaṃ varṣakoṭi śatoṣitāḥ ||41||
tato vimuktāḥ kālena jāyaṃte śvānayoniṣu ||
śvānayonervimuktāste viṣṭhāyāṃ kṛmiyonigāḥ ||42||
viṣṭhāsveva ca pāpiṣṭhā durgaṃdheṣu ca nityaśaḥ||
bhūyo.api jāyamānāste tatrottāro na vidyate ||43||
brāhmaṇaścaiva yo devi kuryātteṣāṃ pratigraham ||
tataḥ prabhṛtyamedhyāyāṃ pitarastasya śerate || 44 ||
taṃ vipraṃ nānubhāṣeta na cāpyekāsane viśet ||
sa nityaṃ varjanīyo vai dūrāttu brāhmaṇādhamaḥ ||45||
yastena saha bhāṣeta prāyaścittī bhave ddvijaḥ ||
ekasya gopradānasya sahasrāṃśo na pūryate ||46||
kimanyairbahubhirdānaiḥ koṭisaṃkhyātavistaraiḥ||47||
śrotriyāya daridrāya suvṛttāyāhitāgnaye ||
dattvaikāṃ kapilāṃ dhenuṃ sarvapāpaiḥ pramucyate ||48||
māse prasavinīṃ dhenuṃ dānārthī pratipālayet ||
ātmārthe na prapālyā hi sadā narakabhīrubhiḥ ||49|||
kapilā.ardhaprasūtā ca dātavyā hi dvijanmane ||
jāyamānasya vatsasya mukhaṃ yonyāṃ pradṛśyate || 4.161.50 ||
tāvatsā pṛthivī jñeyā yāvadgarbhaṃ na muṃcati || || 51 ||
dhenoryāvaṃti romāṇi savatsāyā vasundhare ||
bhūmyāṃ tu pāṃsavo yāvadyāvannakṣatratārakāḥ || 52 ||
tāvadvarṣasahasrāṇi brahmeśādibhirarcitaḥ ||
brahmaloke nivasati yaścaikakapilāpradaḥ || 53 ||
suvarṇaśṛṅgīṃ yaḥ kṛtvā khurai raupyaiḥ samarcitām ||
brāhmaṇasya kare dattvā suvarṇaṃ raupyameva ca || 54 ||
kapilāyāstadā putraṃ brāhmaṇasya kare nyaset ||
udakaṃ ca kare dattvā vācayeta svaśaktitaḥ || 55 ||
suvarṇaistu caturbhiśca tribhirdvābhyāmathāpi vā ||
ekahīnā na dātavyā yadīcchecchubhamātmanaḥ || 56 ||
sa samudravanopetā saśailavanakānanā ||
ratnapūrṇā bhaveddattā pṛthivī nātra saṃśayaḥ || 57 ||
pṛthivīdānatulyena dānenaitena vai naraḥ ||
tārito yāti pitṛbhirvaiṣṇavaṃ yatpadaṃ param || 58 ||
brahmasvaharaṇo goghno bhrūṇahā brahmaghātakaḥ ||
pāpakṛccobhayamukhīṃ dadyātsatkanakānvitām ||
taddinaṃ ca payobhojī saṃyataścātivāhayet || 59 ||
gomayenopalipyātha maṇḍalaṃ vidhipūrvakam ||
svaśākhoktena maṃtreṇa homayettu vicakṣaṇaḥ || 4.161.60 ||
vyāhṛtyā homayetpūrvaṃ paṃcavāruṇakaṃ tathā ||
irāvatī dhenumatī devasya tveti vā punaḥ || 61 ||
syonā pṛthivi maṃtreṇa gaurvatsasahitā navā ||
nikāmaphaladā dhenuḥ sā syātsurabhinaṃdinī || 62 ||
yā te sarasvatī devī viṣṇunā ca tathā mahī ||
gaurī viṣṇupadaṃ coktvā śāṃtikarmaṇi vācayet || 63 ||
yāvadvatsasyadvau pādau śiraścaiva pradṛśyate ||
tāvadvai pṛthivī jñeyā yāvadgarbhaṃ na muñcati ||
tasminkāle pradātavyā brāhmaṇāya vasuṃdhare || 64 ||
suvarṇaśṛṃgīṃ raupyakhurāṃ kāsyadohāṃ satāmrakām ||
savastraghaṃṭābharaṇāṃ gaṃdhapuṣpairalaṃkṛtām ||
vastrākṣataiḥ samabhyarcya brāhmaṇāya samarpayet 65 ||
suvarṇasya sahasreṇa tadardhenāpi bhāmini ||
tasyāpyardhena śaktyā.atha tasyāpyarddhena vā punaḥ || || 66 ||
yathā śaktyā pradātavyā vittaśāṭhyavivarjitaiḥ ||
kare dattvā suvarṇaṃ ca athavā rūpyameva ca ||
gṛhāṇemāṃ mahādhenuṃ bhava bhrātā mamāśu vai ||
sarvapāpakṣayaṃ kṛtvā sadā svastikaro bhava ||68||
irāvatī dhenumatī jāhnavī tadanantaram ||
pratidāsyāmi te dhenuṃ kuṭumbārthe viśeṣataḥ ||69||
bhavatātsvasti me nityaṃ sukhaṃ cānuttamaṃ tathā ||
dattā tu pṛthivī devī tvayeyaṃ pratigṛhyatām ||4.161.70||
ko.adāditi ca vai maṃtro japitavyo dvijena ca |||
visṛjya brāhmaṇaṃ so.api tāṃ dhenuṃ svagṛhaṃ nayet || 71 ||
evaṃ prasūyamānāṃ gāṃ yo dadāti vasundhare ||
sā samudravanopetā saśailavanakānanā ||
ratnapūrṇā bhaveddattā pṛthivī nātra saṃśayaḥ || 72 ||
prataptajāṃbūnadatulyavarṇāṃ mahānitaṃbāṃ tanuvṛttamadhyām ||
arddhaprasūtāṃ dvimukhīṃ suśīlāṃ sevantyajasraṃ kapilāṃ hi devāḥ || 73 ||
prātarutthāya yo bhaktyā dhenukalpaṃ naro bhuvi ||
jitendriyaḥ śucirbhūtvā paṭhedbhaktyā samanvitaḥ || 74 ||
trikālaṃ paṭhate yastu pāpaṃ varṣaśatodbhavam ||
naśyatyekakṣaṇādeva vāyunā pāṃsavo yathā || 75 ||
śrāddhakāle paṭhedyastu idaṃ pāvanamuttamam ||
tasyānnaṃ saṃskṛtaṃ tadvai pitaro.aśnaṃti dhīmataḥ || 76 ||
amāvāsyāṃ ca yo vidvāndvijānāmagrataḥ paṭhet ||
pitarastasya tuṣyaṃti varṣāṇāṃ śatameva ca || 77 ||
yaścaitatchṛṇuyātpuṇyaṃ tadgatenāṃtarātmanā ||
saṃvatsarakṛtātpāpāttatkṣaṇādeva mucyate || 78||
idaṃ rahasyaṃ rājendra varāhamukhanirgatam||
dharaṇyai kathitaṃ pūrvaṃ sarvapāpapraṇāśanam || 79 ||
iti śrībhaviṣye mahāpurāṇa uttaraparvaṇi śrīkṛṣṇayudhiṣṭhirasaṃvāde kapilādānamāhātmyavarṇanaṃ nāmaikaṣaṣṭyuttaraśatatamo.adhyāyaḥ || 161 || a ||
mahiṣīdānavratavidhivarṇanam
|| śrīkṛṣṇa uvāca || ||
mahiṣīdānamāhātmyaṃ kathayāmi yudhiṣṭhira ||
puṇyaṃ pāpavināśaṃ ca āyuṣyaṃ sarvakāmadam || 1 ||
candrasūryagrahe puṇye kārttikyāmayane tathā ||
śuklapakṣe caturdaśyāṃ sūryasaṃkrāntivāsare || 2 ||
yadā vā jāyate cittaṃ vittaṃ ca kurunandana ||
tadaiva deyā mahiṣī saṃsārabhayabhīruṇā || 3 ||
supayodharaśobhāḍhyā suśṛṃgī sukhurā tathā ||
prathamaprasūtā taruṇī suśīlā doṣavarjitā || 4 ||
suvarṇaśṛṅgatilakā ghaṃṭābharaṇabhūṣitā ||
raktavastrāvṛtā ramyā kāṃsyadohanakānvitā || 5 ||
piṇyākapiṭikopetā sahiraṇyā ca śaktitaḥ ||
saptadhānyayutā deyā brāhmaṇe vedapārage || 6 ||
purāṇapāṭhake tadvajjyotiḥśāstravide tathā ||
deyā na vedarahite na ca kuvratine kvacit || 7 ||
dravyairebhiḥ samāyuktāṃ puṇye.ahni vidhipūrvakam ||
dadyānmaṃtreṇa rājendra purāṇapaṭhitena tu || 8 ||
indrādilokapālānāṃ yā rājamahiṣī śubhā ||
mahiṣī dānamāhātmyātsāstu me sarvakāmadā || 9 ||
dharmarājasya sāhāyye yasyāḥ putraḥ pratiṣṭhitaḥ ||
mahiṣāsurasya jananī yā sāstu varadā mama ||4.162.10|| (iti dānamaṃtraḥ) dadyātpradakṣiṇīkṛtya brāhmaṇe tāṃ payasvinīm||
pratigrahaḥ smṛtastasyāḥ pṛṣṭhadeśe svayaṃbhuvā||11||
evaṃ dattvā vidhānena brāhmaṇasya gṛhaṃ nayet ||
vastrairābharaṇaiḥ pūjya bhaktyā ca kurunandana || 12 ||
saṃpāditā mayā tubhyaṃ saṃtuṣṭo me bhava dvija || 13 ||
anena vidhinā dattvā mahiṣīṃ dvijapuṅgave ||
sarvānkāmānavāpnoti iha loke paratra ca || 14 ||
yā sā dadāti mahiṣīṃ sā rājamahiṣī bhavet ||
mahārājaḥ pumānrājanvyāsasya vacanaṃ yathā || 15 ||
yajñayājī bhavedvipraḥ kṣatriyo vijayī bhavet ||
bhavedvaiśyastu dhanavāñchūdraḥ sarvārthasaṃyutaḥ || 16 ||
tasmānnareṇa dātavyā mahiṣī vibhave sati ||
putrapautraprapautrārthamātmanaḥ śubhamicchatā || 17 ||
daśadhenusamāṃ rājanmahiṣīṃ nārado.abravīt ||
viṃśatigosamāṃ vyāsaḥ sarvadānottamaṃ raviḥ || 18 ||
sagareṇa kakutsthena dhuṃdhumāreṇa gādhinā ||
dattāḥ saṃpūjya viprebhyo mahiṣyaḥ sarvakāmadāḥ || 19 ||
mahiṣī dānamāhātmyaṃ yaḥ śṛṇoti sadā naraḥ ||
sa sarvapāpanirmuktaḥ śivaloke mahīyate || 4.162.20 ||
dugdhādhikāṃ hi mahiṣīṃ jalameghavarṇāṃ sapuṣṭapaṭṭakavatīṃ jaghanābhirāmām ||
dattvā suvarṇatilakāṃ dvijapuṃgavāya lokadvayaṃ vijayate kimu tatra citram || 21 || iti śrībhaviṣye mahāpurāṇa uttaraparvaṇi śrīkṛṣṇayudhiṣṭhirasaṃvāde mahiṣīdānavratavidhivarṇanaṃ nāma dviṣaṣṭayuttaraśatatamo.adhyāyaḥ || 162 || cha ||
avidānavratavidhivarṇanam
|| śrīkṛṣṇa uvāca || ||
śṛṇu pārtha paraṃ dānaṃ sarvakilbiṣanāśanam ||
yaddattvā trividhaṃ pāpaṃ sadyo vilayamṛcchati || 1 ||
suvarṇaromāṃ sauvarṇīṃ pratyakṣaṃ vā suśobhanām ||
suvarṇatilakopetāṃ sarvālaṃkārabhūṣitām || 2 ||
kauśeyaparidhānāṃ ca divyacaṃdanabhūṣitām ||
divyapuṣpopahārāṃ ca sarvadhāturasairyutām ||
saptadhānyasamāyuktāṃ phalapuṣpavatīṃ tathā || 3 ||
śatena kārayettāṃ ca suvarṇasya prayatnataḥ ||
yathā śaktyātha vā kuryādvittaśāṭhyaṃ na kārayeta || 4 ||
ayane viṣuve caiva grahaṇe śaśisūryayoḥ ||
duḥsvapnadarśane caiva janmarkṣe pitṛsaṃkṣaye || 5 ||
yadā vā jāyate vittaṃ cittaṃ śraddhāsamanvitam ||
tadaiva dānakālaḥ syādyato.anityaṃ hi jīvitam || 6 ||
dadyāttīrthe gṛhe vāpi yatra vā ramate manaḥ || 7 ||
tatra saṃsthāpya deveśamumayā saha śaṃkaram ||
brahmāṇaṃ saha gāyatryā saśrīkaṃ śrīdharaṃ tathā || 8 ||
ratyā saha tathānaṃgaṃ lokapālāngrahānapi ||
saṃpūjya ca vidhānena gaṃdhapuṣpanivedanaiḥ || 9 ||
tadagre kārayeddhomaṃ tilājyena mahīpate ||
alaṃkṛtya dvijaṃ śāṃtaṃ vāsobhiḥ pratipūjya ca || 4.163.10 ||
talliṅgamaṃtrairhomaśca kartavyo jvalite.anale ||
tatastāṃ tilakuṃbhasthāṃ lavaṇāntamupasthitām || 11 ||
pūjayitvā vidhānena mantrametamudīrayet ||
romatvaṅmāṃsamajjādyaiḥ sarvopakaraṇaiḥ sadā||
jagataḥ saṃpravṛddhāsi tvāmataḥ prārthaye sthitām || 12 ||
vāṅmanaḥkāyajanitaṃ yatkiñcinmama duṣkṛtam||
tatsarvaṃ vilayaṃ yātu tava dānātprasevitam || 13 ||
evamuccārya tāṃ dadyādbrāhmaṇāya kuṭumbine ||
nābhibhāṣeta taṃ dattvā mukhaṃ ca nāvalokayet || 14 ||
duṣṭapratigrahahato vipro bhavati pātakī || 15 ||
no dadyāddakṣiṇāhīnāṃ dātavyā sā vidhānataḥ ||
dakṣiṇāvidhinā hīnā duḥkhaśokāvahā bhavet || 16 ||
purā dattamidaṃ dānaṃ gauryā śaṃkarakāmyayā ||
tena śaṃbhuḥ patirlabdhaḥ sarvadevanamaskṛtaḥ || 17 ||
indrāṇyā svarṇaromāṇāṃ śataṃ dattaṃ vidhānataḥ ||
sarvadevapatiṃ prāpya patiṃ sādyāpi modate || 15 ||
nalena dattametaddhi rājyaṃ kṛtvā divaṃ gataḥ ||
rukmiṇyāhaṃ patirlabdhaḥ saubhāgyamatulaṃ tathā || 19 ||
dānasyāsya prabhāveṇa putrā bahubalānvitāḥ ||
aputro labhate putramadhano labhate dhanam||4.163.20||
dattvā dānaṃ śubhāṃ kāṃtiṃ vipulāṃ ca tathā śriyam ||
ya imaṃ śṛṇuyānnityaṃ dānakalpamanuttamam||
ahorātrakṛtātpāpānmucyate nātra saṃśayaḥ ||21 ||
meṣī viśeṣakaluṣāpaharātiśastā dāne sadaiva rasadhātuyutā sadhānyā ||
tāmādareṇa kurunandana dehi dattvā yenāstapāpatimiraḥ saviteva bhāsi || 22 || || iti śrībhaviṣye mahāpurāṇa uttaraparvaṇi śrīkṛṣṇayudhiṣṭhirasaṃvāde.avidānavratavidhivarṇanaṃnāma triṣaṣṭyuttaraśatatamo.adhyāyaḥ || 163 || ||8||
bhūmidānavarṇanam
|| śrīkṛṣṇa uvāca|| ||
bhūmidānam ato vakṣye sarvapāpapraṇāśanam || 1031
ye prayacchaṃti viprebhyo bhūmidānaṃ sadakṣiṇam || 1 ||
śrotriyāya daridrāya agnihotraratāya ca || 1032
sa sarvakāmatṛptātmā sarvaratnairvibhūṣitaḥ || 2 ||
sarvapāpavinirmukto dīpyamāno raviryathā ||
bālasūryaprabhābhāsairvāditradhvajaśobhitaiḥ ||3||
vimānairbhāsvarairdivyairviṣṇulokaṃ sa gacchati || 4 ||
tatra divyāṃganābhiśca sevyamāno yathāsukham ||
kāmagaḥ kāmarūpī ca krīḍatyānaṃdamakṣayam || 5 ||
yāvaddhārayate lokānbhūraṃkurasamudbhavā ||
tāvadbhūmipradaḥ kāmaṃ viṣṇuloke mahīyate || 6 ||
nahi bhūmipradānādvai dānamanyadviśiṣyate ||
diśo daśānugṛhṇāti hartā tā daśa haṃti ca || 7 ||
dānānyanyāni kṣīyaṃte kālena puruṣarṣabha ||
bhūmipradānapuṇyasya kṣayo naivopapadyate || 8 ||
sarvapāpāni kṣīyaṃte kālayogakrameṇa tu ||
bhūmihartuśca rājeṃdra duḥkhasyāṃto na vidyate || 9 ||
brāhmaṇāya suśīlāya bhūmiṃ dattvā tu yo naraḥ ||
na hi tāmupajīvedyaḥ sa mahatpuṇyamāpnuyāt || 4.164.10 ||
halakṛṣṭāṃ mahīṃ kṛtvā sabījāṃ sasyamālinīm||
yāvatsūryakṛtā lokastāvatsvarge mahīyate || 11 ||
dhanaṃ dhānyaṃ hiraṇyaṃ ca ratnānyābharaṇāni ca ||
sarvadānāni rājeṃdra dadāti vasudhāṃ dadat || 12 ||
sāgarānsaritaḥ śailānsamāni viṣamāṇi ca ||
sarvagaṃdharasānsnehāndadāti vasudhāṃ dadat || 13 ||
oṣadhīḥ kṣīrasaṃpannā nānāpuṣpaphalopagāḥ ||
kamalotpalakhaṃḍāṃśca dadāti vasudhāṃ dadat || 14 ||
agniṣṭomādibhiryajñairye yajaṃti sadakṣiṇaiḥ ||
prāpnuvaṃti ca tatpuṇyaṃ bhūmidānādyadāpyate || 15 ||
śrotriyāya mahīṃ dattvā ye haraṃti na mānavāḥ ||
tāvatteṣāṃ bhavetsvargo yāvallokā pratiṣṭhitāḥ || 16||
sasyapūrṇāṃ mahīṃ yastu śrotriyāya prayacchati ||
pitarastasya tuṣyaṃti yāvadābhūtasaṃplavam || 17 ||
yatkiṃcitkurute pāpaṃ puruṣo vṛttikarśitaḥ ||
api gocarmamātreṇa bhūmidānena śudhyati || 18 ||
suvarṇānāṃ sahasreṇa yatpuṇyaṃ samudāhṛtam||
bhūmi gocarmamātreṇa tatphalaṃ prāpnuyānnaraḥ || 19 ||
kapilānāṃ sahasrebhyo yaddatte.annaṃ narottama ||
bhūmigocarmamātreṇa tatphalaṃ labhate naraḥ || 4.164.20 ||
madhyamasya manuṣyasya vyāsena parisaṃkhyayā||
triṃśaddaṃḍāṃśca gocarma dattvā svarge mahīyate || 21 ||
bahubhir vasudhā bhuktā rājabhiḥ sagarādibhiḥ ||
yasya yasya yadā bhūmisi tasyai tasya tadā phalam || 22 ||
kiṃkarā mṛtyudaṃḍāśca asipatravanādayaḥ ||
ghorāśca vāruṇāḥ pāśā nopasarpaṃti bhūmidam|| 23 ||
nirayā rauravādyāśca kuṃbhīpākaḥ suduḥsahaḥ ||
tathā ca yātanāḥ kaṣṭā nopasarpaṃti bhūmidam || 24 ||
citraguptaśca kālaśca kṛtāṃto mṛtyureva ca ||
yamaścāpi svayaṃ rājā saṃpūjayati bhūmidam || 25 ||
rudraḥ prajāpatiḥ śakro devāsuragaṇāstathā ||
ahaṃ ca paramaprītyā pūjayāmīha bhūmidam|| 26 ||
ṣaṭkarmakṛtsuvṛttāya kṛśāya ca priyārthine ||
bhūmirdeyā naravyāghra sannidhiścākṣayo bhavet || 27 ||
sīdamānakuṭuṃbāya śrotriyāyāhitāgnaye ||
vṛttasthāya daridrāya bhūmirdeyā nareśvara || 28 ||
yathā janitrī kṣīreṇa putraṃ saṃvarddhayetsadā ||
tathā bhūmipradaṃ bhūmiḥ sarvakāmaistu tarpati || 29 ||
yathā gaurbharate vatsa kṣīreṇa kṣīramutsṛjet ||
tathā sarvarasopetā bhūmirbharati bhūmidam || 4.164.30 ||
yathā bījāni rohaṃti jalasiktāni bhūtale ||
tathā kāmāḥ prarohaṃti bhūmidasya dinedine || 31 ||
yathodayansahasrāṃśustamaḥ sarvaṃ vyapohati ||
tathā bhūmipradānaṃ tu sarvapāpaṃ vyapohati || 32 ||
paradattāṃ tu yo bhūmim upahiṃset kadācana ||
sa baddho vāruṇaiḥ pāśaiḥ kṣipyate pūyaśoṇite || 33 ||
svadattāṃ paradattāṃ vā yo hareta vasuṃdharām ||
sa naro narake ghore kliśyaty āpralayāṃtikam || 34 ||
rudatāṃ vṛttināśena ye pataṃtyaśrubiṃdavaḥ ||
tādvarṣasahasrāṇi narake pacyate tu saḥ || 35 ||
brāhmaṇānāṃ hṛte kṣetre hartustripuruṣaṃ kulam || 1111 in app. 4
dattvā bhūmiṃ tu viprāya upahiṃsedyadā punaḥ || 1113
adhomukhaśca duṣṭātmā kuṃbhīpāke sa pacyate ||36|| 1115
divyavarṣasahasrāṃte kuṃbhīpākādviniḥsṛtaḥ || 1116
iha loke bhavecchā vai sapta janmāni pārthiva||37|| 1117
svadattāṃ paradattāṃ vā yatnād rakṣed yudhiṣṭhira ||
mahīṃ mahībhṛtāṃ śreṣṭha dānāc chreyo nupālanam|| 38 ||
toyahīneṣv araṇyeṣu śuṣkakoṭaravāsinaḥ ||
kṛṣṇāhvayo bhijāyaṃ te narā brahmasvahāriṇaḥ ||39||
evaṃ dattvā mahīṃ rājanprahṛṣṭenāṃtarātmanā || 1123
sarvānkāmānavāpnoti manasā ciṃtitānnaraḥ || 4.164.40 ||
bhūmidānātparaṃ nāsti sukhaṃ vāmuṣmikaṃ mahat ||
na cāpi bhūmiharaṇādanyatpātakamucyate || 41 ||
yacchaṃti ye dvijavarāya mahīṃ sukṛṣṭāṃ te yāṃti śakrasadanaṃ suviśuddhadehāḥ ||
ye lopayaṃtyatibalādatha kāmalobhātte rauravātigahanānna samuttaraṃti || 42 ||
iti śrībhaviṣye mahāpurāṇa uttaraparvaṇi śrīkṛṣṇayudhiṣṭhirasaṃvāde bhūmidānamāhātmyavarṇanaṃnāma catuḥṣaṣṭyu ttaraśatatamo.adhyāyaḥ || 164 || cha ||
pṛthivīdānavidhivarṇanam
|| yudhiṣṭhira uvāca || ||
bhūmidānaṃ kṣatriyāṇāṃ nānyeṣāmupapadyate ||
te hyupārjayituṃ śaktā dātuṃ pālayituṃ yathā || 1 ||
bhūmidānasamaṃ kiṃcidanyatkathaya yādava ||
saṃprāptavittairyacchakyaṃ saṃsārabhayabhīrubhiḥ || 2 ||
|| śrīkṛṣṇa uvāca || ||
sauvarṇāṃ vidhivatkṛtvā sādridrumavatīṃ śubhām ||
mahīṃ prayaccha viprāṇāṃ tattulyā sā nigadyate || 3 ||
śṛṇuṣvaikamanā bhūtvā mahādānaṃ narottama ||
savidhānaṃ pravakṣyāmi phalaṃ yatnena yadbhavet || 4 ||
caṃdrasūryoparāge ca janmarkṣe viṣuve tathā ||
yugādiṣu ca dātavyamayane ca vidhānataḥ || 5 ||
anyeṣvapi ca kāleṣu praśaste dhanasaṃcaye ||
pāpakṣayāya dātavyaṃ yaśo.arthe vā narairbhuvi || 6 ||
hemnaḥ palaśatenoktā tadardhenāpi śaktitaḥ ||
kuryātpaṃcapalādūrdhvamasamartho.api bhaktimān || 7 ||
kārayetpṛthivīṃ haimīṃ jaṃbudvīpānukāriṇīm ||
maryādāparvatavatīṃ madhye merusamanvitām || 8 ||
lokapālāṣṭakopetāṃ brahmaviśveśasaṃyutām ||
nānāparvatapūrṇāṃ ca ratnābharaṇabhūṣitām || 9 ||
sarvasasyavicitrāṃgīṃ sarvagaṃdhādhivāsitām ||
īdṛśīṃ tu mahīṃ kṛtvā kārayenmaṃḍapaṃ tataḥ || 4.165.10 ||
daśadvādaśahastaṃ ca caturvaktra satoraṇam ||
madhye ca vedikāṃ kuryāddhanurhastāṃ pramāṇataḥ || ||11||
aiśānyāṃ surasaṃsthānamāgneyyāṃ kuṃḍameva ca ||
patākābhiralaṃkṛtya devatāyatanānyatha || 12 ||
lokapālā grahāścaiva pūjyā mālyavilepanaiḥ ||
homaṃ kuryurdvijāḥ śāṃtāścātuścaraṇikāḥ śubhāḥ || 13 ||
sālaṃkārā savastrāśca mālyacaṃdanabhūṣitāḥ ||
agnisaṃsthāpanaṃ tatra kṛtvā pūrvaṃ tato mahīm|| 14 ||
ānayeyurdvijā rājanbrahmaghoṣapuraḥsaram ||
śaṃkhatūryaninādaiśca geyamaṃgalanisvanaiḥ || 15 ||
tilaiḥ pracchāditāṃ vediṃ kṛtvā tatrādhivāsayet ||
athāṣṭādaśadhānyāni rasāṃśca lavaṇādikān || 16 ||
tathāṣṭau pūrṇakalaśānsamaṃtātsthāpayecchubhān ||
vitānakaṃ ca kauśeyaṃ phalāni vividhāni ca || 17 ||
aṃśukāni vicitrāṇi śrīkhaṃḍaśakalāni ca ||
ityevaṃ racayitvā tāmadhivāsanapūrvakam || 18 ||
tato homāvasāneṣu niṣpanne sarvaśāṃtike ||
śuklamālyāṃbaradharo yajamānaḥ svayaṃ tataḥ || 19 ||
kṛtvā pradakṣiṇaṃ pṛthvīṃ gṛhītvā kusumāṃjalim ||
puṇyakālamathāsādya maṃtrānetānudīrayet || 4.165.20 ||
namaste sarvadevānāṃ tvameva bhavanaṃ yataḥ ||
dhātrī tvamasi bhūtānāmataḥ pāhi vasuṃdhare || 21 ||
vasu dhārayase yasmātsarvasaukhyapradāyakam ||
vasuṃdharā tato jātā tasmātpāhi bhayādalam || 22 ||
caturmukho.api no gacchedyasmādaṃtaṃ tavācale ||
anaṃtāyai namastubhyaṃ pāhi saṃsārakardamāt || 23 ||
tvameva lakṣmīrgovide śive gaurīti saṃsthitā ||
gāyatrī brahmaṇaḥ pārśve jyotsnā caṃdre ravau prabhā || 24 ||
buddhirbṛhaspatau khyātā medhā muniṣu saṃsthitā ||
viśvaṃ prāpya sthitā yasmāttato viśvaṃbharā matā || 25 ||
dhṛtiḥ kṣitiḥ kṣamā kṣoṇī pṛthivī vasudhā mahī ||
etābhirmūrtibhiḥ pāhi devi saṃsārasāgarāt || 26 ||
evamuccārya tāṃ devīṃ brāhmaṇebhyo niveda yet ||
dharārddhaṃ vā caturbhāgaṃ gurave pratipādayet || 27 ||
anena vidhinā yastu dadyāddevīṃ dharāṃ budhaḥ ||
puṇyakāle ca saṃprāpte sa padaṃ yāti vaiṣṇavam || || 28 ||
yadi kartuṃ na śaknoti puṇyehni bahuvistaram ||
saṃsthāpya śobhane sthāne mahīmeva pradāpayet || 29 ||
vimānenārkavarṇena kiṃkiṇījāla mālinā ||
nārāyaṇapuraṃ gatvā kalpatrayamathāvaset || 4.165.30 ||
kṣīṇapuṇya ihābhyetya rājā bhavati dhārmikaḥ ||
vijayī śatrudamano bahubhṛtyaparicchadaḥ || 31 ||
śatakoṭyadhipaḥ śūraścakravartī mahābalaḥ ||
sapta janmāni dānasya māhātmyādrājyamāpnuyāt || 32 ||
dvīpāvikarṣaviṣamāṃ vidhivadvidhāya haimīṃ mahīṃ suramahīmiva vindhyamadhyām || lokeśaśaṃbhuśivakeśavasaṃyutāṃ ca prāyaccha pārtha tava kiṃ bahunoditena || 33 ||
iti śrībhaviṣye mahāpurāṇa uttaraparvaṇi śrīkṛṣṇayudhiṣṭhirasaṃvāde pṛthivīdānavidhivarṇanaṃ nāma paṃcaṣaṣṭyuttaraśatatamo.adhyāyaḥ || 165 || || cha ||
halapaṃktidānavidhivarṇanam
|| śrīkṛṣṇa uvāca || ||
ataḥ paraṃ pravakṣyāmi dānamatyadbhutaṃ tava ||
yena dattena rājendra sarvadānaprado bhavet || 1 ||
sarvapāpapraśamanaṃ sarvasaukhyapradāyakam ||
prayuktaṃ halapaṃktyā ca sarvadānaphalapradam || 2 ||
paṃktirdaśahalā proktā halaṃ syāttu caturgavam ||
sāradārumayānyāhurhalāni daśa paṃḍitāḥ||3||
sauvarṇapaṭṭasaṃnaddha ratnavaṃti śubhāni ca ||
yūnaśca balino bhavyānvyaṃgahīnānsvalaṃkṛtān || 4 ||
vastrakāṃcanapuṣpaiśca caṃdanairdigdhamastakān ||
abhagnānyojayetteṣu lāṃgaleṣu vṛṣāñchubhān || 5 ||
yoktrāṇi yugalagnāni savṛṣāṇi ca kārayet ||
pratodakīlakābaṃdhasarvopakaraṇānvitām || 6 ||
evaṃvidha halaiḥ kuryāttaṃ yuktāṃ halapaṃktikām ||
karkaṭaṃ kheṭakaṃ cāpi grāmaṃ vā sasyamālinam || 7 ||
nivartanaśataṃ vāpi tadarddhaṃ vā prakalpayet ||
evaṃvidhāṃ parvakāle dadyātprayatamānasaḥ || 8 ||
kārtikyāṃ cātha vaiśākhyāmuttare vā.ayane tathā ||
janmarkṣe grahaṇe vāpi viṣuve vā pradāpayet || 9 ||
brāhmaṇānvedasaṃpannānvyaṃgahīnānalaṃkṛtān ||
śrotriyāṃśca vinītāṃśca halasaṃkhyānnimaṃtrayet || 4.166.10 ||
daśahastapramāṇena maṃḍapaṃ kārayedbudhaḥ ||
pūrve dvikuḍamekaṃ vā hastamātraṃ suśobhanam || 11 ||
tatra vyāhṛtibhirhomaṃ kuryuste dvijasattamāḥ ||
parjanyādityarudrebhyaḥ pāyasena yajedbudhaḥ || 12 ||
pālāśyaḥ samidhastatra sājyaṃ kṛṣṇāstilāstathā ||
adhivāsya ca tāṃ paṃktiṃ dhānyamadhyagatāṃ śubhām || 13 ||
tataḥ sarvasamīpe tu snātaḥ śuklāṃbaraḥ śuciḥ ||
halapaṃktiṃ yojayitvā yajamānaḥ samāhitaḥ || 14 ||
tūryaśaṃkhaninādaiśca brahmaghoṣaiḥ supuṣkalaiḥ ||
imamuccārayenmaṃtraṃ gṛhītakusumāṃjaliḥ || 15 ||
yasmāddevagaṇāḥ sarve hale tiṣṭhaṃti sarvadā ||
vṛṣaskaṃdhe saṃnihitāstasmādbhaktiḥ śivestu me || 16 ||
yasmācca bhūmidānasya kalāṃ nārhaṃti ṣoḍaśīm ||
dānānyanyāni me bhaktirdharme cāstu dṛḍhā sadā || 17 ||
evamukte tataḥ paṃktiṃ prerayeyurdvijottamāḥ ||
bījāni sarvaratnāni suvarṇaṃ rajataṃ tathā || 18 ||
svayaṃ paścāddhale lagno viprahasteṣu nirvapet ||
yāyānnivartanaṃ yāvattatastu viramedbudhaḥ || 19 ||
pradakṣiṇaṃ tataḥ kṛtvā viprāṇāṃ pratipādya ca ||
sadakṣiṇāṃ vidhānena praṇipatya visarjayet || 4.166.20 ||
anena vidhinā yastu dānametatprayacchati ||
ekaviṃśatkulopetaḥ svargaloke mahīyate || 21 ||
saptajanmasu dāridryaṃ daurbhāgyaṃ vyādhayastathā ||
na paśyati ca bhūmestu tathaivādhipatirbhavet || 22 ||
dṛṣṭvā taddīyamānaṃ tu dānametadyudhiṣṭhira ||
ājanmanaḥ kṛtātpāpānmucyate nātra saṃśayaḥ ||23||
dānametatpradattaṃ hi dilīpena yayātinā ||
śibinā niminā caiva bharatena ca dhīmatā || 24 ||
te.adyāpi divi modaṃte dānasyāsya prabhāvataḥ ||
tasmātsarvaprayatnena dānametannṛpottama || 25 ||
dātavyaṃ bhaktiyuktena striyā vā puruṣeṇa vā ||
yadi paṃktirna vidyeta paṃca vā caturo.atha vā|| 26 ||
ekamapyuktavidhinā halaṃ deyaṃ vicakṣaṇaiḥ || 27 ||
ye saṃti lāṃgalamukhottharajovikārā yāvaṃti tadgatadhuraṃdhara romakāṇi ||
tāvaṃti śaṃkarapure triyugāni tiṣṭhetpaṃktipradānamiha yatkurute manuṣyaḥ || 28 ||
yuktāṃ vṛṣairatibalairhalapaṃktimetāṃ puṇyehni bhaktisahitāndvijapuṃgavebhyaḥ ||
yacchaṃti ye sukṛtino vasudhāsametāṃ te bhūbhujo bhuvamupetya bhavaṃti bhavyāḥ || 29 || iti śrībhaviṣye mahāpurāṇa uttaraparvaṇi śrīkṛṣṇa yudhiṣṭhirasaṃvāde halapaṃktidānavidhivarṇanaṃnāma ṣaṭṣaṣṭyuttaraśatatamo.adhyāyaḥ||166|| ||cha||

āpākadānavidhivarṇanam
|| yudhiṣṭhira uvāca || ||
tanme kathaya deveśa yena dattena mānavaḥ ||
bahuputro bahudhano bahubhṛtyaśca jāyate ||1||
|| śrīkṛṣṇa uvāca || ||
purā bhārata vaṃśesminrājāsīddhavyavāhanaḥ|| (havyavāhanaḥ)
pitṛpaitāmahaṃ tena prāptaṃ rājya makaṃṭakam ||2||
na tasya rājye vidhvaṃso na vairijanitaṃ bhayam ||
śarīrotthamahāvyādhirna caivāṃtaradāyakaḥ ||3||
tasyaivaṃ kurvato rājyaṃ pūrvakarmārjitāśubhāt ||
nāsti bhṛtyo bhārasahaḥ sarvarājyadhuraṃdharaḥ ||4||
na putraḥ priyakṛtkaścinna maṃtrī madhurākṣaraḥ ||
na mitraṃ kāryakaraṇe samartho na suhṛttathā|| 5 ||
na bhojyasamaye prāpte bhojanaṃ sārvakāmikam ||
na pūgaphalasaṃyuktaṃ tāṃbūlaṃ vasanaṃ na ca || 6 ||
na dhanaṃ janasaṃbandhakārako ratnasaṃcayaḥ ||
tasyaivaṃ kurvato rājyamavyāhatamaceṣṭitam || 7 ||
athaikasmindine vipraḥ pippalādo.ativiśrutaḥ ||
ājagāma mahāyogī rājñaḥ pārśvaṃ mahādyutiḥ || 8 ||
tamāgataṃ muniṃ dṛṣṭvā rājapatnī śubhāvatī ||
pādyārghyāsanadānena sarvathā tamapūjayat || 9 ||
tataḥ kathāṃte kasmiṃścittamuvāca śubhāvatī ||
bhagavanrājyametannaḥ sarvabādhāvivarjitam || 4.167.10 ||
kasmānna bhṛtyāḥ putrā vā maṃtrimitrādikaṃ dvija ||
bhogāvāptirna ca tathā sarvalokātiśāyinī || 11 ||
|| pippalāda uvāca || ||
yadyena pūrvavihitaṃ tadasau prākṛte phalam ||
karmabhūmiriyaṃ rājñi nātaḥ śocitumarhasi || 12 ||
na tatkurvaṃti rājāno na dāyādā na śatravaḥ ||
na bāṃdhavā na mitrāṇi yadyena na purā kṛtam || 13 ||
tasmādbhavadbhiyarddattaṃ prāptaṃ tadrājyamuttamam ||
bhṛtyamitrādisaṃbaṃdho na dattaḥ prāpyate kutaḥ || 14 ||
|| śubhāvatyuvāca || ||
idānīmeva viprarṣe kasmāttannopadiśyate ||
yena me bahavaḥ putrā dhanaṃ bhṛtyā bhavaṃti vai || 15 ||
maṃtro vā siddhayogo vā vrataṃ dānamupoṣitam ||
kathayasvāmalamate yena saṃpadyate sukham || 16 ||
tataḥ sa kathayāmāsa pippalādo dvijottamaḥ ||
āpākākhyaṃ mahādānaṃ sarvasaṃpatpradāyakam || 17 ||
śraddhayā kuruśārdūla nārī vāpyatha vā pumān ||
yena dattena bhāgyānāṃ bahūnāṃ bhājanaṃ bhavet || 18 ||
tacchrutvā sa dadau rājā.a.apākākhyaṃ dānamuttamam ||
lebhe putrānpaśūnbhṛtyānmaṃtrimitrasuhṛjjanān|| 19 ||
|| śrīkṛṣṇa uvāca || ||
āpākākhyaṃ mahādānaṃ kathayāmi yudhiṣṭhira ||
dattena yena kāmānāṃ pumānbhavati bhājanam || 4.167.20 ||
grahatārābalaṃ labdhvā bhārgavaṃ pūjayecchubham ||
vāsobhirbhūṣaṇaiścaiva puṣpairagarucaṃdanaiḥ || 21 ||
kuryāttathaiva sammānaṃ yathā tuṣṭo.abhijāyate ||
kuruṣva tvaṃ me bhāṃḍāni gurūṇi ca laghūni ca || 22 ||
maṇikādīni śubhrāṇi sthālyaśca sumanoharāḥ ||
ghaṭakāḥ karakāścaiva galaṃtyaḥ kuṃḍalāni ca || 23 ||
śarāvādīni pātrāṇi bhāṃḍamuccāvacaṃ bahu ||
saṃpādaya mahābhāga viśvakarmā tvameva hi || 24 ||
bhārgavo.api prayatnena nānā bhāṃḍānvitaṃ śubham ||
āpākaṃ kalpayeddivyaṃ vidhidṛṣṭena karmaṇā ||29||
sahasramekaṃ bhāṃḍānāṃ sthāpayitvā vicakṣaṇaḥ ||
saṃdhyākāle jvalitvā tu dadyāccāpi hutāśanam || 26 ||
rātrau jāgaraṇaṃ kuryādgītamaṅgalanisvanaiḥ ||
tataḥ prabhāte vimale jñātvā nirvāpitaṃ śanaiḥ || 27 ||
raktavastraiḥ samācchādya puṣpamālābhirarcayet ||
yajamānastataḥ snātvā śuklāṃbaradharaḥ śuciḥ || || 28 ||
hemaraupyāṇi bhāṃḍāni tāmralohamayāni ca ||
paritaḥ sthāpayitvā ca svaśaktyā tāni ṣoḍaśa || 29 ||
pūjayitvā prayatnena kṛtvā cāru pradakṣiṇām ||
brāhmaṇānpūjayitvā ca bhārgavaṃ pūjya yatnataḥ || 4.167.30 ||
nāryaścāvidhavāstatra samānīya prapūjya ca ||
pradakṣiṇaṃ tataḥ kṛtvā maṃtreṇānena pūjayet || 31 ||
āpākabrahmarūposi bhāṃḍānīmāni jaṃtavaḥ ||
pradānātte prajāpuṣṭiḥ svargaścāstu mamākṣayaḥ || 32 ||
bhāṃḍarūpāṇi yānyatra kalpitāni mayā kila ||
bhūtvā satpātrarūpāṇi upatiṣṭhaṃtu tāni me || 33 || iti dānamaṃtraḥ ||
yā ca yadbhāṃḍamādatte tasyaitaddāpayettataḥ ||
svecchayā caiva gṛhṇātu na nivāryāstu kāścana || 34 ||
anena vidhinā yastu dānametatprayacchati ||
viśvakarmā bhavettuṣṭastasya janmatrayaṃ nṛpa || 35 ||
nārī ca dattvā saubhāgyamatulaṃ pratipadyate ||
gṛhaṃ sarvaguṇopetaṃ bhṛtyamitrajanairvṛtam || 36 ||
aviyogaṃ sadā bhartrā rūpaṃ cānuttamaṃ labhet ||
bhūdānametannirdiṣṭaṃ prakāreṇa tavānagha ||
bhidyate bahubhirbhedairbhūmireṣā nareśvara || 37 ||
niṣpādya bhāṃḍanicayoccataraṃ prayatnādāpākadānamiha yā kurute varastrī ||
sā putrapautrapaśuvṛddhimukhāni bhuktvā pretya svabhartṛsahitā sukhinī sadāste || 38 || || iti śrībhaviṣye mahāpurāṇa uttaraparvaṇi śrīkṛṣṇayudhiṣṭhirasaṃvāda āpākadānavidhivarṇanaṃ nāma saptaṣaṣṭyuttaraśatatamo.adhyāyaḥ || 167 || || cha || ||
gṛhadānavidhivarṇanam
|| śrīkṛṣṇa uvāca || ||
sarvaśāstrārthatattvajña jñānavijñānapāraga ||
gṛhadānasya māhātmyaṃ vidhiṃ vada vidāṃvara || 1 ||
|| śrīkṛṣṇa uvāca || ||
na gārhasthayātparo dharmo nāsti dānaṃ gṛhātparam ||
nānṛtādadhikaṃ pāpaṃ na pūjyo brāhmaṇātparaḥ || 2 ||
dhanadhānyasamāyuktaṃ kalatrāpatyasaṃkulam || 3 ||
gogajāśvagaṇākīrṇaṃ gṛhaṃ svargādviśiṣyate ||
yathā mātaramāśritya sarve jīvaṃti jaṃtavaḥ || 4 ||
evaṃ gṛhasthamāśritya vartayaṃtītarāśramāḥ ||
dharmaścārthaśca kāmaśca mitrāṇi prathitaṃ yaśaḥ || 5 ||
prāptakāmairnaraiḥ pārtha sadā sevyo gṛhāśramaḥ ||
na gṛheṇa vinā dharmo nārthakāmau sukhaṃ na ca || 6 ||
na loka paṃktirna yaśaḥ prāpyate tridaśairapi ||
na tatsvarge nāpavarge na tatkenopamīyate || 7 ||
prasārya pādau yadrātrau svagṛhe svapatāṃ sukham ||
dināni nāsya gaṇyaṃte nainamāhurmahāśanam || 8 ||
api śākaṃ pacānasya svagṛhe paramaṃ sukham ||
iti matvā mahārāja kārayitvā suśobhanam|| 9 ||
bhavanaṃ brāhmaṇe deyaṃ bhavyabhūtimabhīpsatā ||
kārayitvā dṛḍhastaṃbhaṃ śubhapakveṣṭakāmayam || 4.168.10 ||
śubhaṃ kamaṭhapṛṣṭhābhaṃ bhābhāsitadigaṃtaram ||
sudhānuliptaṃ guptaṃ ca sukhaśālāvirājitam || 11 ||
dadyādanaṃtaphaladaṃ śaivavaiṣṇavayoginām ||
pratiśraye tu vistīrṇe kārite sajale ghane || 12 ||
dīnānāthajalārthāya kṛtaṃ kiṃ na kṛtaṃ bhavet ||
kārayitvā gṛhānpaścādṛtvigrudrārkasaṃkhyayā || 13 || kuḍhyastaṃbhagavākṣāḍhayānvicitrānbahubhūmikān||
saprākārapratolīkānkapāṭārgalayaṃtritān || 14 || sudhādhavalitānramyānvistīrṇāṃgaṇavāṭikān ||
praveśanirgamayutānsamāsannajalāśayān|| 15 ||
lohopaskarasaṃpūrṇāṃstā mropaskarasaṃyutān ||
svarṇopaskaraśobhāḍhyānraupyopaskarasaṃkulān || 16 || ratnopaskarasaṃyuktānkāṃsyopaskaramaṃḍitān ||
ārakūṭatrapusīsadā nopaskaravarjitān || 17 ||
vaṃśopaskarasaṃkīrṇānkāṣṭhopaskara bṛṃhitān || mṛnmayopaskarākīrṇānvastropakaraṇānvitān || 18 ||
dharmopaskarasaṃbhāraśaṇavalkalarājitān ||
rājitāṃstṛṇapāṣāṇaiḥ sarvopaskarabhūṣitān || 19 ||
saptadhātumayaṃ bhāṃḍaṃ yattadratnasamudbhavam ||
carmakāṣṭhamahābhāṃḍaṃ navavastumayaṃ tathā || 4.168.20 || gomahiṣyaśvavṛṣabhapreṣyaveśyāgaṇānvitān || kṣetrārāmajalāsannānkāmyānharmyavarāñchubhān || 21 ||
saṃpūrṇānsarvadhānyaistu ghṛtatailaguḍādibhiḥ ||
tilataṃdulaśālīkṣumudgagodhūmasarṣapaiḥ || 22 ||
niṣpāvāḍhakyacaṇakakulatthāṇumasūrakaiḥ ||
kaṃgumāṣayavādyāḍhyāñchākavṛṃtākapūritān || 23 ||
lavaṇārdrakakharjūradrākṣājīrakadhānyakaiḥ ||
hiṃgukuṃkumakarpūrasnānadravyaiḥ sacaṃdanaiḥ || 24 ||
dhūpopaskaraparyuptatūlīgaṇḍopadhānakaiḥ ||
cullīcchedanamaṃthānabhadrāsanakagucchakaiḥ || 25 ||
piṭharolūkhalasthālīśūrpadarpaṇapatrakaiḥ ||
muśalāsikṛpāṇīṣudaṃḍakodaṃḍamudgaraiḥ || 26 ||
gṛhāṭavāṭakādarvīdṛṣalloṣṭakahastakaiḥ ||
cātrakāṃśukalohādi dīptamaṃthanikādibhiḥ ||27||
kaṃḍaṇī peṣaṇī cullī udakumbhī pramārjanī ||
maṃjūṣākoṣṭhakāsaṃdī kaṃbalaistanurāṃkavaiḥ || 28 ||
ityevamādibhiḥ pūrṇāngṛhāndadyāddvijātiṣu ||
kartuścaṃdrabalopete sthiranakṣatrasaṃyute || 29 ||
śubhe.ahni viprakathite dānakālaḥ praśasyate ||
evaṃ saṃbhṛtasaṃbhāro yajamānaḥ svayaṃ dvijān || 4.168.30 || kulaśīlasamāyuktāngṛhasaṃkhyānnimaṃtrayet ||
adhītavedāñchāstrajñānpurāṇasmṛtipāragān || 31 || gṛhasthadharmaniratāñchāṃtāndāṃtāñjiteṃdriyān ||
alaṃkṛtya sapatnīkānvāsobhiratha pūjayet || 32 ||
sugaṃdhisragdharānkṛtvā śāṃtikarmaṇi yojayet ||
gṛhāṃgaṇe kārayitvā kuṃḍamekaṃ samekhalam || 33 ||
grahayajñaḥ prakartavyastuṣṭipuṣṭikaraḥ sadā ||
rākṣoghnāni ca sūktāni paṭheyurbrāhmaṇāstataḥ || 34 ||
vāstupūjā prakartavyā dikṣu bhūtabaliṃ kṣipet ||
tataḥ puṇyāhaghoṣeṇa brāhmaṇāṃsteṣu veśmasu || 35||
praveśayitvā śayyāsu sabhāryānupaveśayet ||
yajamānastataḥ prājñaḥ śuklāṃbaradharaḥ śuciḥ || 36 ||
yadyasya vihitaṃ pūrvaṃ tattasya pratipādayet ||
idaṃ gṛhaṃ gṛhāṇa tvaṃ sarvopaskarasaṃyutam || 37 ||
tava vipra prasādena mamāstvabhimataṃ phalam ||
evamekaikaśo dattvā praṇipatya kṣamāpayet || 38 |||
svastīti brāhmaṇairvācyaṃ kodāditi ca pūjitaiḥ ||
gṛhopakaraṇaistulyā dakṣiṇā bhavanaṃ vinā || 39 ||
upadeṣṭāramāpṛcchettanmūlatvānmaharṣayaḥ ||
svayaṃ tānpūjayitvā tu tataḥ svabhavanaṃ vrajet || 4.168.40 ||
dadyādanena vidhinā gṛhamekaṃ bahūnapi ||
na saṃkhyāniyamaḥ kāryaḥ śaktiratra niyāmikā || 41 ||
śītavātātapaharaṃ dattvā tṛṇakuṭīrakam ||
iṣṭānkāmānavāpnoti pretya svarge mahīyate || 42 ||
kiṃ punarbahunoktena sarvopaskarabhūṣitām ||
atyaṃtasukhalubdhena dattvā brahmapurīṃ priyām || 43 ||
gobhūhiraṇyadānāni yamāḥ saniyamāstathā ||
gṛhadānasya kauṃteya kalāṃ nārhaṃti ṣoḍaśīm || 44 ||
yaḥ kārayetsudṛḍhaharmyavatī mahārhā satsevitāṃ dvijapurīṃ sujanopabhogyām || divyāpsarobhirabhi naṃditacittavṛttiḥ prāpnotyasāvanavamaṃ padamiṃdumauleḥ || 45 ||
iti śrībhaviṣye mahāpurāṇa uttaraparvaṇi śrīkṛṣṇayudhiṣṭhirasaṃvāde gṛhadānavidhivarṇanaṃ nāmāṣṭaṣaṣṭyuttaraśatatamo.adhyāyaḥ || 168 || || cha ||
annadānamāhātmyavarṇanam
|| śrīkṛṣṇa uvāca || ||
annadānasya māhātmyaṃ kathayāmi tavānagha ||
yatproktamṛṣibhiḥ pūrvaṃ tadihaikamanāḥ śṛṇu || 1 ||
dadasvānnaṃ dadasvānnaṃ dadasvānnaṃ yudhiṣṭhira ||
sadyastuṣṭikaraṃ loke kiṃ dattena pareṇa te ||2||
rāmeṇa daśarathinā vanasthena nijānujaḥ ||
nirvedādyatpurā proktastadahaṃ prabravīmi te || 3 ||
pṛthivyāmannapūrṇāyāṃ vayamannasya kāṃkṣiṇaḥ ||
saumitre nūnamasmābhirna brāhmaṇamukhe hutam || 4 ||
yaducyate karmabījaṃ tasyāvaśyaṃ phalaṃ naraiḥ ||
prāpyate lakṣmaṇāsmābhirnānnaṃ vipramukhe hutam || 5 ||
yatra prāpyaṃ tadaprāpyaṃ vidyayā pauruṣeṇa vā ||
satyo lokapravādo.ayaṃ nādattamupatiṣṭhati || 6 ||
bhakṣopayogādannasya dānaṃ śreyaskaraṃ param || 7 ||
prakārāṃtarabhojyāni dānānyanyāni bhārata ||
annameva paraṃ dānaṃ satyavākyaṃ paraṃ padam || 8 ||
buddhiścārthātparo lobhaḥ santoṣaḥ paramaṃ sukham ||
snātānāmanuliptānāṃ bhūṣitānāṃ ca bhūṣaṇaiḥ || 9 ||
na sukhaṃ na ca santoṣo bhavedannādṛte nṛṇām ||
śveto nāma mahīpālaḥ sārvabhaumo.abhavatpurā || 4.169.10 ||
teneṣṭaṃ bahubhiryajñaiḥ saṃgrāmā bahavo jitāḥ ||
dānāni ca pradattāni dharmataḥ pālitā mahī || 11 ||
bhuktā bhogāḥ suvipulā śatrūṇāṃ mūrdhani sthitam ||
vānaprasthena vidhinā tyaktvā rājaśriyaṃ nṛpa || 12 ||
svargaṃ jagāma bhuktvā tu pūjyamāno marudgaṇaiḥ ||
vimānamarkapratimaṃ pratipede mudā yutaḥ || 13 ||
tatrāste ramamāṇo.asau sākaṃ vidyādharaiḥ sukham ||
prasiddhaiḥ stūyate siddhaiḥ sevyate.apsarasāṃ gaṇaiḥ || 14 ||
gaṃdharvairgīyate hṛṣṭaiḥ śakreṇāpyanugamyate ||
divyamālyāṃbaradharo divyābharaṇabhūṣitaḥ || 15 ||
sa ca nityaṃ vitānāgryādavatīrya mahītalam ||
svamāṃsānyatti kauṃteya pūrvaṃ tyaktvā kalevaram || 16 ||
taccharīraṃ tathaivāste rakṣitaṃ pūrvakarmabhiḥ ||
sa kadācitsureśānaṃ brahmāṇaṃ samupasthitaḥ || 17 ||
praṇamya prāṃjalirbhūtvā nirvedādidamabravīt ||
bhagavaṃstvatprasādena prāptaṃ svargasukhaṃ mayā || 18 ||
sarveṣāmapi saṃpūjyaḥ surāṇāṃ surapuṃgava ||
kiṃ tu kṣudbādhate.atyarthaṃ svargasthasyāpi me prabho || 19 ||
yayā māṃsānyahaṃ svasya bhakṣyayāmyaśanaṃ vinā ||
|| brahmovāca || ||
śvetābhijanasaṃpanna śveta śṛṇu vaco mama || 4.169.20 ||
tvayādhītaṃ hutaṃ dattaṃ guravaḥ paritoṣitāḥ ||
nāśanaṃ bhavatā dattaṃ yaddvijebhyo narādhipa || 21 ||
anannadānasya phalaṃ tvayedamupabhujyate ||
tarhyannadānato nānyaccharīrārogyakārakam || || 22 ||
nānyadannādṛte puṃsāṃ kiñcitsañjīvanauṣadham ||
mahīṃ gatvā mahārāja kuruṣva vacanaṃ mama || 23 ||
tapaḥ svādhyāyasaṃpanne śāstrajñe saṃjitendriye ||
yena saṃpadyate tṛptirakṣayā kṣmāṃpate tava || 24 ||
viriṃcervacanādgatvā tvarāyukto mahītalam ||
agastyaṃ bhojayāmāsa bhaktyā bharatasattama || || 25 ||
bhojayitvā tataḥ prādāddakṣiṇāṃ kṣīṇakalmaṣaḥ ||
ekāvaliṃ svakātkaṇṭhātsamuttārya samujjvalām || 26 ||
tato dundubhighoṣeṇa pūjitaḥ surasattamaiḥ ||
śvetastṛpto gataḥ svargaṃ dattvānnaṃ dakṣiṇāyutam || 27 ||
paulastye nihate paścāddevadānavasaṃkaṭe ||
rāmāyaikāvaliṃ prādādagastyaḥ parayā mudā || 28 ||
etadannasya māhātmyaṃ kathayāmyaparaṃ ca te ||
na cānnādaparaṃ kiñcitsatyaṃ tava mayoditam || 29 ||
annaṃ vai prāṇināṃ prāṇā annamojo balaṃ sukham ||
etasmātkāraṇātsadbhirannadaḥ prāṇadaḥ smṛtaḥ || 4.169.30 ||
sudūrādāśayā yasya gṛhaṃ prāptā bubhukṣitāḥ ||
tṛptāḥ pratinivartaṃte ko.anyastatsadṛśaḥ pumān ||31||
dīkṣitaḥ kapilā satrī rājā bhikṣurmahodadhiḥ ||
dṛṣṭamātrā punaṃtyete tasmātpaśyaṃti nityaśaḥ || 32 ||
ekasyāpyatitherannaṃ yaḥ pradātumaśaktimān||
tasyā.a.arambhaiḥ parikleśairvasataḥ kiṃ phalaṃ gṛhe || 33 ||
śakyate duṣkare.apyarthe cirarātrāya jīvitum ||
na tvāhāravihīnena śakyaṃ vartayituṃ ciram || 34 ||
bhuktvā gṛhe gṛhasthasya maithunaṃ yaśca sevate ||
yasyānnaṃ tasya te putrā iti prāhurmanīṣiṇaḥ || 35 ||
duṣkṛtaṃ hi manuṣyāṇāmannamāśritya tiṣṭhati ||
yo yasyānnaṃ samaśnāti sa tasyāśnāti duṣkṛtam || 36 ||
vanaspatigate some parānnaṃ yastu bhuṃjati ||
tasya māsakṛtaṃ puṇyaṃ dātāramupagacchati || 37 ||
kasmānna dīyate nityaṃ kasmādannaṃ na dīyate ||
yasyedṛśī phalāvāptiḥ kathitā pūrvasūribhiḥ || 38 ||
bhikṣāṃ vā puṣkalāṃ vāpi haṃtakāraṃ dvijātaye ||
bhojanaṃ vā yathālābhamadattvāśnāti kilbiṣam || 39 ||
yenāyutaṃ sahasraṃ vā bhojitaṃ syāddvijanmanām ||
tena brahmagṛhāsannaṃ nūnaṃ baddhaṃ kuṭīrakam || 4.169.40 ||
vārāṇasyāṃ purā pārtha vaṇigāpaṇajīvanaḥ ||
