dhaneśvara iti khyāto devabrāhmaṇapūjakaḥ|| 41 ||
tasyāpaṇaikadeśe tu muktvāṃḍaṃ pāṃḍuracchavi ||
sasarpa sarpastaddeśādvaṇigdṛṣṭvā viśaṃkitaḥ || 42 ||
tadaṃḍaṃ vaṇijā tena dṛṣṭaṃ kāruṇyabuddhinā ||
tataḥ prabhṛtyanudinaṃ rarakṣa ca puṣoṣa ca || 43 ||
nirjagāma dinaiḥ kaiścidbhitvāṃḍaṃ sarpapotakaḥ ||
taṃ vaṇikkṣīrapānādyairupacārairavardhayat || 44 ||
lilihe ghṛtabhāṃḍāni jighre ca gaṃdhasaṃcayān ||
luloṭha pāṃsuprakare cacāra vārimadhyagaḥ || 45 ||
vaṇijā rakṣyamāṇaḥ sa snehāccāharahaḥ punaḥ ||
jagāma sumahānkālo.abhavadeṣa bhayaṃkaraḥ || 46 ||
athaikasmindine gaṃgāṃ gataḥ snātuṃ trilokagām ||
vaṇigāpaṇe paṇyavidaṃ sthāpayitvā sutaṃ matam || 47 ||
vyavahartuṃ samārabdhaṃ vaṇikputreṇa dhīmatā ||
dadāti pratigṛhṇāti ghṛtatailayavaikṣavam|| 48 ||
vyavahārākulatayā pādayoraṃtareṇa saḥ ||
sarpaścacāla cāpalyādvaṇigvikṣepamabhyagāt || 49 ||
jānannapi tadvṛttāṃtaṃ nidāne niyatervaśāt ||
trāsātsaṃtarjayāmāsa balena padacāriṇam || || 4.169.50 ||
sa mahītaḥ samutthāya mūrddhānamavaruhya ca ||
uvāca dāruṇataraṃ vacanaṃ pannagādhamaḥ || 51 ||
śaraṇāgataṃ poṣitaṃ ca tava pitrā priyaṃkaram ||
kasmānmāṃ haṃsi duṣṭātmankathaṃ jīvanvimokṣyase || 52 ||
anaṃtaraṃ kalakalaḥ saṃjāto rodatāṃ nṛṇām ||
dhaneśvarasuto daṣṭaḥ sarpeṇāpi bhṛśākulaḥ || || 53 ||
acyutānaṃta goviṃda kṛṣṇakṛṣṇetyudīrayan||
dhaneśvaropyanuprāptaḥ provācākulayā girā || 54 ||
kiṃ kṛtaṃ mama putreṇa tava pavraga vipriyam ||
yadayaṃ bhavatā mūrdhni svabhogenābhiveṣṭitaḥ || 55 ||
mūrkha mitraṃ susaṃbaṃdhaṃ hīnajātijano hi yaḥ ||
yaḥ karotyabuthoṃgārānsa svahastena karṣati || || 56 ||
tamuvāca ca sarpo.asau vāṣpagadgadayā girā ||
niraparādho bhavataḥ putreṇāhaṃ samāhataḥ || 57 ||
tadahaṃ paśyataste.adya daśāmyenaṃ narādhipa ||
yathā na bhūyo bhūtānāṃ bhavedasmātkvacidbhayam || 58 ||
|| dhaneśvara uvāca || ||
upakāraṃ vrataṃ bhaktyā snehapāro na yasya ca ||
satāṃ mārgamapākramya prayātaḥ kena vāryate || 59 ||
kṣaṇamātraṃ pratīkṣasva yāvadeva śiśurmama ||
aurdhvadehikakarmāṇi karoti svayamātmanaḥ || 4.169.60 ||
evamuktā gṛhaṃ gatvā yatīnāṃ brahmacāriṇām ||
sahasraṃ bhojayāmāsa ghṛtapāyasabhojanaiḥ ||61 ||
samutthāya tataḥ sarve brāhmaṇā hṛṣṭamānasāḥ ||
vaṇikputrasyottamāṃge cikṣipuḥ kusumākṣatān || 62 ||
vaṇikputra ciraṃ jīva naśyaṃtu tava śatravaḥ ||
abhīṣṭaphalasaṃsiddhirastu te brāhmaṇājñayā || 63 ||
tataḥ sa duṣṭaprakṛtirvipra vāgvajratāḍitaḥ ||
pannago nagasaṃkāśaḥ papāta ca mamāra ca || 64 ||
vipannaṃ pannagaṃ dṛṣṭvā trastacakṣurdhaneśvaraḥ ||
āḥ kimetaditi procya viṣādamagamatparam || 65 ||
poṣito.ayaṃ mayā bālaḥ pālito lālitastathā ||
mamāpacārātpaṃcatvamāpannaḥ pavanāśanaḥ || 66 ||
upakāriṣu yaḥ sādhuḥ sādhutve tasya ko guṇaḥ ||
apakāriṣu yaḥ sādhuḥ sa sādhuḥ sadbhiriṣyate || 67 ||
ityevamavadhāryāsau duḥkhasaṃtaptamānasaḥ ||
bubhuje nākulatayā na ca suṣvāpa tāṃ niśām || 68 ||
tataḥ prabhāte gaṃgāyāṃ snātvā saṃtarpya devatāḥ ||
sahasraṃ bhojayāmāsa punareva dvijanmanām || 69 ||
tairbhuktairiṣṭasaṃsiddhairbrāhmaṇai ranumoditaḥ||
vaṇikprāha mamābhīṣṭaṃ saṃjīvatveṣa pannagaḥ || 4.169.70 ||
tato dvijavaronmuktairaṃbubhiḥ pariṣiṃcitaḥ ||
udatiṣṭhadahīnāṃgaḥ sahasā hi mahākulaḥ || || 71 ||
praharṣamatulaṃ lebhe dṛṣṭvā taṃ purataḥ sthitam ||
pratyagrāvayavaṃ dṛṣṭvā sṛkkiṇīparileliham || 72 ||
sādhuvādo mahāñjātaḥ praśaśaṃsurdhaneśvaram ||
purīnivāsinaḥ sarve vismayotphullalocanāḥ ||73||
sahasrabhojyamāhātmyaṃ kathitaṃ te yudhiṣṭhira ||
samyakchraddhāprayuktasya kimanyatkathayāmi te ||75||
yacchaṃti ye.anudivasaṃ dvijapuṃgavānāmannaṃ viśuddhamanaso bhṛśamāgatānām ||
martye vihṛtya suciraṃ sasuhṛjjanāste pretya prayāṃti bhavanaṃ muditā murāreḥ||77||
iti śrībhaviṣye mahāpurāṇa uttaraparvaṇi śrīkṛṣṇayudhiṣṭhirasaṃvāde annadānamāhātmyavarṇanaṃ nāmaikonasaptatyuttaraśatatamo.adhyāyaḥ || 169 || a || ||
sthālīdānavarṇanam
yudhiṣṭhira uvāca || ||
annadānaprasaṃgena mamāpi smṛtimāgatam ||
tatte.ahaṃ saṃpravakṣyāmi śrutaṃ dṛṣṭaṃ ca yanmayā || 1 ||
akṣadyūtena bhagavandhanaṃ rājyaṃ ca no hṛtam ||
āhūya niṣkṛtiprājñaiḥ kitavairakṣakovidaiḥ ||2||
vanaṃ prasthāpitāḥ sarve valkalājinavāsasaḥ ||
draupadyā sahitāḥ kṛṣṇa karṇaduryo dhanādibhiḥ || 3 ||
jñātvā vanagatānasmānbrāhmaṇāḥ saṃjiteṃdriyāḥ ||
draṣṭumabhyāyayuḥ sarve paurāścāpyanujagmire || 4 ||
asmānsnehātkliśyamānā dṛṣṭvā brāhmaṇasattamāḥ ||
paurānkarmakarāṃścaiva nirvedādidamabruvan || 5 ||
jīvato yasya jīvaṃti viprā mitrāṇi bāṃdhavāḥ ||
jīvanaṃ tasya saphalamātmārthe ko na jīvati || 6 ||
abhyāgataṃ suhṛdvargaṃ kuṭuṃbamapahāya ca ||
jīvannapi mṛtaḥ pāpaḥ kevalaṃ svodaraṃbhariḥ || 7 ||
ityevamavadhāryāhaṃ tānṛṣīnpunarabruvam ||
bhavaṃtaḥ sarva evātra trikālajñā maharṣayaḥ || 8 ||
samāgatā matpriyārthaṃ jñānavijñānapāragāḥ ||
brūta kaṃcidupāyaṃ me bhavaṃtobhijanaṃ prati || || 9 ||
bhavadbhiḥ sahitāḥ sarve bhṛtyairbhrātṛbhireva ca ||
nirgaccheyaṃ vane śūnye dvādaśemāḥ samā yathā ||4.170.1 0||
māmuvācātha maitreyaḥ śṛṇu kauṃteya madvacaḥ ||
pūrvavṛttaṃ pravakṣyāmi dṛṣṭaṃ divyena cakṣuṣā || 11 ||
āsīttapovane kācidbrāhmaṇī brahmacāriṇī ||
durbhagā durgatā duḥkhādārādhayati sā dvijān || || 12 ||
śaucena tuṣṭā munayaḥ praśrayeṇa damena ca ||
procurvada viśālākṣi kiṃ kurmastava suvrate || 13 ||
sā tānuvāca kiṃ tanme vrataṃ dānamathāpi vā ||
kathayadhvaṃ bhaveyaṃ vai yena śrīsukhabhāginī || 14 ||
ādhārabhūtā bhūtānāṃ bahvapatyā patipriyā ||
spṛhaṇīyā trijagatāṃ trivargaphalabhāginī || || 15 ||
vasiṣṭhastāmuvācātha śṛṇuṣva kathayāmi te ||
dānaṃ mānakaraṃ puṃsāṃ sarvakāmapradāyakam || 16 ||
kṛtvā tāmramayīṃ sthālīṃ palānāṃ pañcabhiḥ śataiḥ ||
aśaktastu tadarddhena caturthāṃśena vā punaḥ || 17 ||
sarvaśaktivihīnastu mṛnmayīmapi kārayet ||
sugaṃbhīrodaradarīdṛḍhadaṇḍakuṭuṃbakām || | || 18 || mudgataṃdulaniṣpannasusvinnakṣiprapūritām ||
upadaṃśodakayutāṃ ghṛtapātrasamanvitām || 19 ||
dhautapārśvāṃ dhautakarṇāṃ carcitāṃ candanena ca ||
sthāpya maṃḍalake vastraiḥ puṣpadhūpairathārcayet ||4,170.20||
āditye.ahani saṃkrāṃtau caturdaśyaṣṭamīṣu vā ||
ekādaśyāṃ tṛtīyāyāṃ viprāya pratipādayet || 21 ||
jvalajjvalanapārśvasthaistaṃḍulaiḥ sajalairapi ||
na bhavedbhojyasaṃsiddhirbhūtānāṃ piṭharīṃ vinā || 22 ||
tvaṃ siddhiḥ siddhikāmānāṃ tvaṃ puṣṭiḥ puṣṭimicchatām ||
atastvāṃ praṇamāmyāśu satyaṃ kuru vaco mama || 23 ||
jñātibaṃdhusuhṛdvarge vipre preṣyajane tathā ||
abhuktavati nāśnīyāttathā bhava varapradā || ||24||
ityuccārya pradātavyā haṃḍikā dvijapuṃgave ||
tuṣṭipuṣṭipradā puṃsāṃ sarvānkāmānabhīpsatā || 25 ||
vasiṣṭhavacanaṃ śrutvā sā cakāra tathaiva tu ||
prādātsthālīṃ brāhmaṇāya bahūnāṃ bahudakṣiṇām || 26 ||
sā caiṣā draupadī pārtha bhavadbhāryā.abhavatpriyā ||
tena dānaprabhāveṇa bhavitā.aśūnyapāṇikā || || 27 ||
eṣā satī śacī svāhā sāvitrī bhūraruṃdhatī ||
śrīreṣā yatra vasati na kiṃcittatra durlabham || 28 ||
anayā yā bhṛtā sthālī tayā sarvamidaṃ jagat ||
bhojayiṣyasi kauṃteya kimato brāhmaṇā amī || 29 ||
maitreyāttadupaśrutya tatra saṃhṛṣṭamānasaḥ ||
pūrvaṃ bhojitavānasmi bahuviprajanā vane || 4.170.30 ||
annadānaprasaṃgena sthālīdānamidaṃ mayā ||
kathitaṃ puṇḍarīkākṣa kṣaṃtavyamanasūyayā || 31 ||
sthālīṃ viśālavadanāṃ ca sataṃḍulāṃ ca yacchaṃti ye madhuraśulbamayīṃ dvijebhyaḥ ||
teṣāṃ suhṛtsvajanaviprajanena bhojyaṃ saṃbhujyamānamapi kṛṣṇa na yāti nāśam ||32|| iti śrībhaviṣye mahā purāṇa uttaraparvaṇi śrīkṛṣṇayudhiṣṭhirasaṃvāde sthālīdānavidhivarṇanaṃ nāma saptatyuttaraśatatamo.adhyāyaḥ || 170 || a ||
dāsīdānavidhivarṇanam
|| śrīkṛṣṇa uvāca || ||
dāsīdānamahaṃ te.adya pravakṣyāmyarisūdana ||
bhaktyā snehācca bhavato yatroktaṃ kenacitkvacit || 1 ||
caturṇāmāśramāṇāṃ hi gṛhasthaḥ śreṣṭha ucyate ||
gṛhasthācca gṛhaṃ śreṣṭhaṃ gṛhācchreṣṭhā varāḥ striyaḥ || 2 ||
pūrṇeṃdubiṃbavadanāḥ pīnonnatapayodharāḥ ||
tadgṛhaṃ yatra dṛśyaṃte yoṣitaḥ śīlamaṃḍanāḥ || 3 ||
jāmayo yatra pūjyaṃte ramante tatra devatāḥ ||
yatraitāstu na pūjyaṃte vinaṃkṣyatyāśu tadgṛham || 4 ||
jāmayo yāni gehāni śapaṃtyapratipūjitāḥ ||
tāni kṛtyāhatānīva sadyo yāṃti parābhavam || 5 ||
amṛtasyeva kuṇḍāni sukhānāmiva rāśayaḥ ||
rateriva nidhānāni yoṣitaḥ kena nirmitāḥ || || 6 ||
śyāmā maṃtharagāminyaḥ pīnonnatapayodharāḥ ||
mahiṣyo varanāryaśca na bhavaṃti gṛhegṛhe || 7||
ahiraṇyamadāsīkamalpānnājyamagorasam ||
gṛhaṃ kṛpaṇavṛttīnāṃ narakasyāparo vidhiḥ || 8 ||
adaṇḍapāśikaṃ grāmamadāsīkaṃ ca yadgṛham ||
anājyaṃ bhojanaṃ yacca vṛthā taditi me matiḥ ||9||
vibhavābharaṇā dāsyo yadgṛhaṃ samupāsate||
tatrāste paṃkajakarā lakṣmīḥ kṣīrodavāsinī ||4.171.10||
na yatrāsti gṛhe śaucaṃ na sukhaṃ vyavahārajam||
yatra vā nāsti dāsyekā tatsadaivānavasthitam||11||
yatra karmakarī nāsti sarvakarmakarī sadā||
na tacchataṃ kiṃkarāṇāṃ karoti śubhatāmapi||12||
yadekā kurute dāsī gṛhasthena bhṛtā hi sā||
bahulokākulo grāmo dāsīdāsākulaṃ gṛham || 13 ||
buddhirdharmākulā yasya tasya cetaḥ kimākulam ||
yatra bhāryāgṛhe dakṣā dāsyakarmaṇyanuvratāḥ ||14||
bhṛtyāḥ sadodyamaparāstrivargastatra dṛśyate||
yadyadiṣṭatamaṃ loke tattaddeyamiti śrutiḥ || 15 ||
etadvicārya hṛdaye deyā dāsī dvijātaye ||
sthiranakṣatrasaṃyukte some saumyagrahānvite || 1 6||
dānakālaṃ praśaṃsaṃti saṃtaḥ parvaṇi vā punaḥ ||
alaṃkṛtya yathāśaktyā vāsobhirbhūṣaṇaistathā || 17||
brāhmaṇāya pradātavyā maṃtreṇānena kaurava ||
iyaṃ dāsī mayā tubhyaṃ bhagavanpratipāditā || 18 ||
karmopayojyā bhojyā vā yatheṣṭaṃ bhadramastu te ||
dattvā kṣamāpayetpaścādbrāhmaṇaṃ kāṃcanena tam||19||
anuvrajya gṛhadvāraṃ yāvatpaścādvisarjayet||
anena vidhinā dadyādaṃkayitvā surālaye||4.171.20||
makhe cāpi mahārāja prasiddhe vā pratiśraye ||
sarvakarmakarī dattvā taruṇīṃ rūpaśālinīm ||21||
prāpyate yatphalaṃ puṃbhiḥ pārtha tatkena varṇyate || 22 ||
dāsīṃ samīkṣya bahuśo gṛhakarmadakṣāṃ yo brahmaṇāya kulaśīlavate dadāti || vidyādharādhipaśatairapi pūjito.asau lokaṃ trilokaramayāpsarasāṃ prayāti || 23 ||
iti śrībhaviṣye mahāpurāṇa uttaraparvaṇi śrīkṛṣṇayudhiṣṭhirasaṃvāde dāsīdānavidhivarṇanaṃ nāmaikasaptatyuttaraśatatamo.adhyāyaḥ || 171 || a ||
prapādānavidhivarṇanam
|| yudhiṣṭhira uvāca || ||
prapādānasya māhātmyaṃ vada devakinaṃdana ||
kathaṃ deyā kadā deyā dāne tasyāśca kiṃ phalam || 1 ||
|| śrīkṛṣṇa uvāca || ||
atīte phālgune māsi prāpte caitre mahotsave ||
puṇye.ahni viprakathite grahacaṃdrabalānvite || 2 ||
maṃḍapaṃ kārayedvidvānghanacchāyaṃ manoramam ||
purasya madhye pathi vā kāṃtāre toyavarjite || 3 ||
devatāyatane vāpi caityavṛkṣatale.api vā ||
suśītalaṃ ca ramyaṃ ca vicitrāsanasaṃyutam || 4 ||
kārayenmaṃḍapaṃ bhavyaṃ śītavātasahaṃ dṛḍham ||
tanmadhye sthāpayedbhaktyā maṇīnkuṃbhāṃśca śobhanān || 5 || akālamūlānkarakānvastrairāveṣṭitānatha ||
brāhmaṇaḥ śīlasaṃpanno vṛttiṃ dattvā yathocitām || 6 ||
prapāpālaḥ prakartavyo bahuputraparicchadaḥ ||
pānīyapānenāśrāṃtānyaḥ kārayati mānavān ||7||
evaṃvidhāṃ prapāṃ kṛtvā śubhe.ahni vidhipūrvakam ||
yathāśaktyā naraśreṣṭha prāraṃbhe bhojayeddvijān || 8 ||
tataścotsarjayedviprānmaṃtreṇānena mānavaḥ ||
prapeyaṃ sarvasāmānyā bhūtebhyaḥ pratipāditā || 9 ||
asyāḥ pradānātpitarastṛpyaṃtu ca pitāmahāḥ ||
anivāryaṃ tato deyaṃ jalaṃ māsacatuṣṭayam || 4.172.10 ||
tripakṣaṃ vā mahārāja jīvānāṃ jīvanaṃ param ||
gaṃdhāḍhyaṃ surasaṃ śītaṃ śobhane bhājane sthitam || 11 ||
pradadyādapratihataṃ mukhaṃ cānavalokayan ||
pratyahaṃ kārayettasyāṃ śaktito dvijabhojanam || 12 ||
anena vidhinā yastu grīṣmoṣmaśoṣanāśanam ||
pānīyamuttamaṃ dadyāttasya puṇyaphalaṃ śṛṇu || 13||
sarvatīrtheṣu yatpuṇyaṃ sarvadāneṣu yatphalam ||
tatpuṇyaphalamāpnoti sarvadevaiḥ supūjitaḥ || 14 ||
pūrṇacaṃdrapratīkāśaṃ vimānaṃ sodhiruhya ca ||
yāti devendranagare pūjyamāno.apsarogaṇaiḥ || 15 ||
viṃśatkoṭyo hi varṣāṇāṃ yakṣagandharvasevitaḥ ||
puṇyakṣayādihāgatya caturvedī dvijo bhavet || 16 ||
tataḥ paraṃ padaṃ yāti punarāvṛttidurlabham ||
prapādānāsamarthena viśeṣāddharmamīpsatā || 174
pratyahaṃ dharmaghaṭakaḥ karpaṭāveṣṭitānanaḥ ||
brāhmaṇasya gṛhe neyaḥ śītāmalajalaḥ śuciḥ || 18 ||
tasyaivodyāpanaṃ kāryaṃ māsimāsi narottama ||
maṃḍakāveṣṭikābhiśca pakvānnaiḥ sārvakāmikaiḥ || 19 ||
uddiśya śaṃkaraṃ viṣṇuṃ brahmāṇaṃ kurunandana ||
salilaṃ prokṣayitvā tu maṃtreṇānena mānavaḥ || 4.172.20 ||
eṣa dharmaghaṭo datto brahmaviṣṇuśivātmakaḥ ||
asya pradānātsaphalā mama saṃtu manorathāḥ || 23 || (iti dharmaghaṭadānamaṃtraḥ)
anena vidhinā yastu dharmakuṃbhaṃ prayacchati ||
prapādānaphalaṃ so.api prāpnotīha na saṃśayaḥ || 22 ||
dharmakuṃbhapradāne.api yadyaśaktaḥ pumānbhavet ||
tenāśvatthatarormūlaṃ secyaṃ nityaṃ jitātmanā || 23 ||
aśvattharūpī bhagavānprīyatāṃ me janārdanaḥ ||
ityuccārya namaskṛtya pratyahaṃ pāpanāśanam ||24||
yaḥ karoti tarormūle sekaṃ māsacatuṣṭayam ||
sopi tatphalamāpnoti śrutireṣā sanātanī||25||
susvāduśītasalilā klamanāśinī ca prāṃte purasya pathi pāṃthasamājabhūmau ||
yasya prapā bhavati sarvajanopabhogyā dharmottaraḥ sa khalu jīvati jīvaloke ||26||
iti śrībhaviṣye mahāpurāṇa uttaraparvaṇi śrīkṛṣṇayudhiṣṭhirasaṃvāde prapādānavidhivarṇanaṃnāma dvisaptatyuttaraśatatamo.adhyāyaḥ|| ||172||
agnīṣṭikādānavidhivarṇanam
yudhiṣṭhira uvāca || ||
agnīṣṭikā kathaṃ deyā śiśire śītabhīrubhiḥ ||
sarvasattvopakārāya karuṇīkṛtamānasaiḥ||1||
|| śrīkṛṣṇa uvāca || ||
agnīṣṭikāmahaṃ pārtha kathayāmi nibodha tām|
yathā yena vidhānena sarvasatvasukhapradām || 2 ||
ādau mārgaśire māsi śobhane divase śubhām ||
agnīṣṭikāṃ kārayitvā sukhāsanavatīṃ śubhām || 3 ||
devāṃgaṇe pathe gehe vistīrṇe catvaretha vā ||
ubhayoḥ saṃdhyayoḥ kṛtvā saṃśuṣkaṃ kāṣṭhasaṃcayam || 4 ||
tataḥ prajvālayedagniṃ hutvā vyāhṛtibhiḥ kramāt||
anena vidhinā hutvā pratyahaṃ jvālayettataḥ || 5 ||
yadi kaścitkṣudhārthī syādbhojyaṃ tasmai prakalpayet ||
sukhāsīno janastatra viśīto vijvarastathā || 6 ||
yaḥ karoti kathāḥ pārtha na tāḥ śakyā mayoditum ||
rājavārtā janavārtā yadi kaścinnijecchayā || 7 ||
vadellokaḥ sukhāsīno na kenāpi nivāryate ||
anena vidhinā yastu dadyādagnīṣṭikāṃ naraḥ || 8 ||
tasya puṇyaphalaṃ rāja nkathyamānaṃ nibodha me ||
vimāne cārkasaṃkāśe samārūḍho mahādhane || 9 ||
ṣaṣṭivarṣasahasrāṇi ṣaṣṭivarṣaśatāni ca ||
harṣito.atyaṃtasukhito brahmaloke mahīyate || 4.173.10 ||
iha lokevatīrṇaśca caturvedo dvijo bhavet ||
nīrujaḥ satrayājī ca agnivattejasānvitaḥ || 11 ||
caitye surāṃgaṇasabhāvasathe subhavyāṃ ye.agnīṣṭikāṃ pracurakāṣṭhavatīṃ pradadyuḥ || hemaṃtaśaiśiraṛtau sukhadā janānāṃ kāyāgnidīpanamalaṃ punarāpnuvaṃti || 12 || ||
iti śrībhaviṣye mahāpurāṇa uttaraparvaṇi śrīkṛṣṇayudhiṣṭhirasaṃvāde agnīṣṭikādānavidhivarṇanaṃ nāma trisaptatyuttaraśatatamo.adhyāyaḥ ||173|| cha || ||
vidyādānavidhivarṇanam
yudhiṣṭhira uvāca || ||
bahupradānaṃ godānaṃ tvatto vidvañchrutaṃ mayā ||
bhūmidānasya māhātmyaṃ vidhiścaivāvadhāritaḥ || 1 ||
sāṃprataṃ yaduśārdūla vidyādānasya yo vidhiḥ ||
tamahaṃ śrotumicchāmi kathayasva janārdana || 2 ||
|| śrīkṛṣṇa uvāca || ||
vidyādānavidhiṃ vakṣye yāthātathyena te.adhunā ||
yathā deyaṃ phalaṃ yacca dattena kurunaṃdana || 3 ||
śubhe.ahni viprakathite gomayena suśobhanam ||
kārayenmaṃḍalaṃ divyaṃ caturasraṃ samaṃtataḥ || 4 ||
puṣpaprakarasaṃchannaṃ svastikādi vibhūṣitam||
pustakaṃ tatra saṃsthāpya gaṃdhapuṣpaiḥ samarcayet || 5 ||
sauvarṇīṃ lekhanī kāryā raupyaṃ ca maṣibhājanam ||
lekhakaṃ pūjayitvā tu āraṃbhaṃ kārayetsudhīḥ || 6 ||
vinītaścāpramattaśca tataḥ prabhṛti lekhakaḥ ||
mātrānusvārasaṃyuktaṃ padacchedasamanvitam || 7 ||
samāni samaśīrṣāṇi vartulāni dhanāni ca ||
lekhayedakṣarāṇīha tadgatenāṃtarātmanā || 8 ||
niṣpādayitvā tacchāstraṃ śaivaṃ vāpyatha vaiṣṇavam ||
niṣpādite tataḥ pūjyo lekhako vastrabhūṣaṇaiḥ || 9 ||
saṃpūjayitvā tacchāstraṃ deyaṃ guṇavate tadā ||
śāstrasadbhāvaviduṣe vācake ca priyaṃvade || 4.174.10 ||
vastrayugmena saṃvītaṃ pustakaṃ pratipādayet ||
sāmanyaṃ sarvalokānāṃ sthāpayedatha vā maṭhe || 11 ||
anena vidhinā dattvā yatphalaṃ prāpnuyānnaraḥ ||
tadahaṃ te pravakṣyāmi yudhiṣṭhira nibodha tat || 12 ||
yatpuṇyaṃ tīrthayātrāyāṃ yatpuṇyaṃ yajvanāṃ tathā ||
tatpuṇyaṃ koṭiguṇitaṃ vidyādānāllabhennaraḥ || 13 ||
kapilānāṃ sahasreṇa samyagdattena yatphalam ||
tatphalaṃ samavāpnoti pustakasya pradāyakaḥ || 14 ||
purāṇaṃ bhārataṃ vāpi rāmāyaṇamathāpi vā ||
dattvā yatphalamāpnoti pārtha tatkena varṇyate || 15 ||
prātarutthāya yaḥ śiṣyānadhyāpayati yatnataḥ ||
vedaśāstraṃ nṛtyagītaṃ kastena sadṛśaḥ kṛtī || 16 ||
upādhyāyasya yo vṛttiṃ dattvā.adhyāpayate janaḥ ||
kiṃ na dattaṃ bhavettena dharmakāmārthadarśinā || 17 ||
chātrāṇāṃ bhojanābhyaṃgaṃ vastraṃ bhikṣāmathāpi vā ||
dattvā prāpnoti puruṣaḥ sarvakāmānna saṃśayaḥ || 18 ||
viveko jīvitaṃ dīrghaṃ dharmakāmārthasaṃpadaḥ ||
sarvaṃ tena bhaveddattaṃ chātrāṇāṃ poṣaṇe kṛte || 19 ||
śāstraṃ śastrakalāśilpaṃ yo yadicchedupārjitum ||
tasyopakārakaraṇe pārtha kāryaṃ sadā manaḥ || 4.174.20 ||
vājapeyasahasrasya samyagiṣṭasya yatphalam ||
tatphalaṃ samavāpnoti vidyādānānna saṃśayaḥ || 21 ||
śivālaye viṣṇugṛhe sūryasya bhavane.atha vā ||
yaḥ kārayati dharmātmā sadā pustakavācanam || 22 ||
gobhūhiraṇyavāsāṃsi śayanānyāsanāni ca ||
pratyahaṃ tena dattāni bhavaṃti bharatarṣabha || 23 ||
dharmādharmaṃ na jānāti vidyayā rahitaḥ pumān ||
tasmātsadaiva dharmātmā vidyādānarato bhavet || 24 ||
trailokyaṃ caturo varṇāścatvāraścāśramāḥ pṛthak ||
brahmādyā devatāḥ sarvā vidyādāne pratiṣṭhitāḥ || 25 ||
caturyugāni rājeṃdra ekasaptatisaṃkhyayā ||
kalpaṃ viṣṇupure tiṣṭhetpūjyamānaḥ surottamaiḥ || 26 ||
kṣitiṃ vopetya kālāṃte rājā bhavati dhārmikaḥ ||
hastyaśvarathadānāḍhyo dātā bhoktā vimatsarī || 27 ||
rūpasaubhāgyasaṃpanno dīrghāyurnīrujo bhavet ||
putraiḥ pautre parivṛto jīvecca śaradāṃ śatam || 28 ||
dānaṃ viśeṣaphaladaṃ jagatīha nānyādvidyāṃ vihāya vadanābjakṛtādhivāsām || gobhūhiraṇyagajavājirathādisarvaṃ tāṃ yacchatāṃ kimiha pārtha bhavenna dattam || 29 || || iti śrībhaviṣye mahāpurāṇa uttaraparvaṇi śrīkṛṣṇayudhiṣṭhirasaṃvāde vidyādānavidhivarṇanaṃ nāma catuḥsaptatyuttaraśatatamo.adhyāyaḥ || 174 || || cha ||

tulāpuruṣadānavidhivarṇanam
|| śrīkṛṣṇa uvāca || ||
purā priyavrato rājā putraḥ svāyaṃbhuvasya tu ||
pālayāmāsa vasudhāṃ prajāpatirivāparaḥ || 1 ||
triṃśadvarṣasahasrāṇi pālayitvā mahīmimām ||
saptadvīpānvibhajyāsau putrebhyaḥ pradadau vibhuḥ || 2 ||
rājye nikṣipya tanayānsaptadvīpeṣu sapta saḥ ||
viṣayānupasaṃhṛtya jagāma tapase vanam || 3 ||
tapovanagataṃ śrutvā rājānaṃ paramadyutim ||
samājagmurmahātmāna ṛṣayastaṃ didṛkṣavaḥ || 4 ||
tānāgatānṛṣīndṛṣṭvā taponirdhūtakalmaṣān ||
pūjayāmāsa medhāvī vidhidṛṣṭena karmaṇā || 5 ||
pādyārghyācamanīyena priyapraśnottareṇa ca ||
atha teṣūpaviṣṭeṣu brāhmaṇeṣu mahātmasu || 6 ||
ājagāma mahātejāḥ pulastyo brahmaṇaḥ sutaḥ ||
dīpyamāno mahātejā dvitīya iva bhāskaraḥ(pāvakaḥ) || 7 ||
taṃ dṛṣṭvā munayaḥ sarve sa ca rājā mahārathaḥ ||
uttasthurvismitāḥ sarve protphullana yanāstataḥ || 8 ||
kṛtvā tu saṃvidaṃ tena yathāyogyaṃ vidhānataḥ ||
viṣṭaraṃ ca dadustasmai pādyārghyācamanādikam || 9 ||
tatastu munayaḥ sarve samā sīnā yathāsukham ||
cakruḥ kathā mudāyuktā vedoktavividhāśrayāḥ || 4.175.10 ||
tataḥ kathāṃte kasmiṃścinmunayaste sarājakāḥ ||
papracchurbrahmatanayaṃ lokānāṃ hitakāmyayā || 11 ||
|| ṛṣaya ūcuḥ || ||
bhagavankena dānena vratena niyamena vā ||
prāpyate sadgatiḥ puṃbhiḥ strībhiśca munisattama || 12 ||
icchāmaḥ śrotumetatte rājā cāyaṃ yatavrataḥ ||
|| pulastya uvāca || ||
śṛṇudhvaṃ munayaḥ sarve rahasyaṃ pāpanārānam || 13 ||
uttamaṃ sarva dānānāṃ samavāyaṃ vadāmi vaḥ ||
yaddattvā brahmahā goghnaḥ pitṛghno gurutalpagaḥ || 14 ||
kṛtaghnaḥ kūṭasākṣī ca mucyate pātakānnaraḥ ||
sadyo divya tanuścaiva jāyate strī tathaiva ca || 15 ||
kṛcchracāṃdrāyaṇādyaiśca tulāpuruṣasaṃjñitaiḥ ||
vrataiśca pācayeddehamākāṃkṣanbrahmaṇaḥ padam || 16 ||
kṛcchracāṃdrāyaṇādīni vratāni munisattamāḥ ||
brāhmaṇānāṃ vanasthānāṃ bhikṣo raṃḍājanasya ca || 17 ||
kāyakleśena sidhyaṃti gṛhasthepu na tāni vai ||
mahādhanāśca ye lokā rājāno ratnabhāginaḥ || 18 ||
na teṣāṃ kṛcchrasādhyo.api kvaciddharmaḥ praśasyate ||
yadetaddraviṇaṃ nāma prāṇāścaite bahiścarāḥ || 19 ||
tasmādbahiścaraiḥ prāṇairātmā yojyaḥ sadā budhaiḥ ||
dravyāṇāmuttamaṃ loke kāṃcanaṃ sārvakāmikam || 4.175.20 ||
apatyaṃ suramukhyasya jyeṣṭhaṃ caivaṃ vibhā vasoḥ ||
tena sārddhaṃ ya ātmānaṃ tolayetprayato budhaiḥ || 21 ||
vidhūya sarvapāpāni sadyo divyatanurbhavet ||
etatpulastyamuninā ṛṣīṇāṃ pārthi vasva ca || 22 ||
samākhyātaṃ nṛpaśreṣṭha tebhyaśca tanmayā śrutam ||
|| yudhiṣṭhira uvāca || ||
tulāpuruṣadānasya vidhānaṃ parameśvara || 23 ||
kathayasva mahābhāga mama bhaktānukaṃpayā ||
|| śrīkṛṣṇa uvāca || ||
śṛṇuṣvāvahito rājanvidhānaṃ gadato mama || 24 ||
tulāpuruṣasaṃjñasya dānasyeha nṛpottama ||
vyatīpāte.ayane caiva kārtikyāṃ viṣuve tathā || 25 ||
candrasūryagrahe yadvā māghyāṃ vā nṛpasattama ||
janmarkṣe grahapīḍāsu tathā duḥsvapnadarśane || 26 ||
yadā vā jāyate vittaṃ tadā deyamidaṃ bhavet ||
anityaṃ jīvitaṃ yasmādvapuścātīva cañcalam || 27 ||
keśeṣu ca gṛhītaḥ sanmṛtyunā dharmamācaret ||
tasmādyadaiva jāyeta śraddhā dānaṃ prati prabho || 28 ||
tadaiva dānakālaḥ syātkāraṇaṃ hi yato mama ||
tīrthe vāyatane goṣṭheṣvatha vā bhava nāṃgaṇe ||
maṇḍapaṃ kārayedvidvāṃścaturbhadrānanaṃ budhaḥ || 29 ||
ārdraśākhānvitaṃ divyaṃ prāgudakpravaṇaṃ dṛḍham ||
ṣoḍaśāratnimātraṃ ca patākābhiralaṃkṛ tam || 4.175.30 ||
tanmadhye kārayedvediṃ hastamātrocchritāṃ śubhām ||
caturasrāṃ samaṃtācca saptahastāṃ suśobhanām || 31 ||
tasyā madhye tulāṃ divyāṃ sthāpa yedvidhipūrvakam ||
hastadvayaṃ ca nikhaneccaturhastocchritāṃ budhaḥ ||32||
staṃbhadvayaṃ mahārāja sthāpayetsudṛḍhaṃ navam ||
caṃdanaḥ khadiro bilvaḥ śākaścaiveṃguda stathā ||33||
tiṃduko devadāruśca śrīparṇaścāṣṭamaḥ smṛtaḥ ||34||
ityaṣṭau vṛkṣajātīyāḥ staṃbhāste parikīrtitāḥ ||
anyathāpi bhavedvṛkṣaḥ sārajño yājñikastathā||35||
suniścalaṃ tataḥ kṛtvā tiryakkāṣṭhamathopari||
nyasettadvṛkṣajātīyaṃ caturhastaṃ pramāṇataḥ ||36||
samānajātiṃ tu tulāṃ tanmadhye yojayeddṛḍham||
ṣaṇṇavatyaṃgulā divyā samagrā lohapāśikā || 37 ||
kṛṣṇalohamayau tasyāṃ karṇau cāpi prakalpayet ||
tulāpuruṣasaṃjñastu madhye kāryaḥ pumānbha vet || 38 ||
evaṃvidhāṃ tulāṃ kṛtvā nānāratnairvibhūṣitām||
caṃdanenānuliptāṃgīṃ vastrālaṃkāravigrahām || 39 ||
staṃbhau ca vastrasaṃyuktau puṣpamālāva laṃbinau ||
caṃdanenānuliptāṃgau nānātnairalaṃkṛtau || 4.175.40 ||
kuṇḍāni cātra catvāri yoniyuktāni kārayet ||
hastamātrapramāṇāni mekhalātrayavaṃti ca || 41 ||
pūrvottare hastamitā vediḥ kāryā suśobhanā ||
lokapālagrahāṇāṃ ca pūjā tatra vidhīyate || 42 ||
arcārcanaṃ ca tatraiva viriṃcyacyutayo rnṛpa ||
śaṃkarasya bhavetkāryaṃ mālyavastraphalākṣataiḥ || 43 ||
toraṇāni ca kāryāṇi kṣīravṛkṣodbhavāni ca ||
caturdvāreṣu saṃsthāpyāḥ kumbhāḥ srakpalla vānanāḥ || 44 ||
paṃcaratnasamāyuktāḥ saptadhānyoparisthitāḥ ||
ṛgvedapāṭhakau dvau ca pūrvakuṇḍe niyojayet || 45 ||
yajurvedavidau yāmye paścime sāmavedinau ||
atharvaṇāvuttarato navamo dharmadeśakaḥ ||46||
atraiva kecidicchaṃti ṛṣayaḥ ṣoḍaśartvijaḥ ||
tāmrapātradvayaṃ deyamekaikasmai tathāsanam || ||47||
homadravyāṇi sarvāṇi tilājyaṃ samidhastathā||
sruvāḥ srucaśca śastrāṇi viṣṭaraḥ kusumāni ca ||48||
lokapālāḥ suvarṇāstu patākāḥ paritaḥ śubhāḥ ||
mahādhvajaṃ ca badhnīyātpaṃcavarṇaṃ vitānakam || 49 ||
etatsarvaṃ samāhṛtya puṇye.ahani vicakṣaṇaḥ ||
varddhakirbrāhmaṇaiḥ sārddhaṃ sarvaśilpaviśā radaḥ || 4.175.50 ||
saṃpūrṇaṃ yajamānāya darśayedyajñamaṃḍapam ||
yajamānastataḥ prājñaḥ śuklāṃbaradharaḥ śuciḥ || 51 ||
śaṃkhatūryaninādena vedadhvaniraveṇa ca ||
prakṣipellokapālānāmebhirmaṃtraiḥ śubhairbalim || 52 ||
ehyehi sarvāmarasiddhasādhyairabhiṣṭuto vajradharāmareśa ||
saṃvījyamānopsarasāṃ gaṇena rakṣādhvaraṃ no bhagavannamaste || 53 ||
ehyehi sarvāmarahavyavāha munipravīrerabhihṛṣṭamānasaḥ ||
tejovatā lokagaṇena sārddhaṃ mamādhvaraṃ rakṣa kave namaste ||54||
ehyehi vaivasvatadharmarāja sarvāmarairarcitadivyamūrte ||
śubhāśubhānaṃdakṛtāmadhīśa rakṣādhvaraṃ me bhagavannamaste ||55||
oṃ yamāya namaḥ) ||
ehyehi rakṣogaṇanāyakastvaṃ viśālavetālapiśācasaṃghaiḥ ||
mamādhvaraṃ pāhi piśācanātha lokeśvarastvaṃ bhagavannamaste || 56 ||
oṃ nirṛtaye namaḥ||)
ehyehi yādogaṇavāridhīnāṃ gaṇena parjanya sahāpsarobhiḥ ||
vidyādharendrāmaragīyamāna pāhi tvamasmānbhagavannamaste || 57||
ehyehi yajñe mama rakṣaṇāya mṛgādhirūḍhaḥ saha siddhasaṃghaiḥ ||
prāṇādhipaḥ kālakaveḥ sahāyo gṛhāṇa pūjāṃ bhagavannamaste || 58 ||
ehyehi yajñeśvara yajñarakṣāṃ vidhatsva nakṣatragaṇena sārddham ||
sarvauṣadhībhiḥ pitṛbhiḥ sahaiva gṛhāṇa pūjāṃ bhagavannamaste || 59 ||
ehyehi viśveśvara viśvamūrte triśūlakhaṭvāṅgadhareṇa sārddham ||
lokena bhūteśvara yajñasiddhyai gṛhāṇa pūjāṃ bhagavannamaste || 4.175.60 ||
ehyehi pātāladharādharendra nāgāṃganākinnaragīyamāna ||
yakṣoragendrāmaralokasaṃghairanaṃta rakṣādhvaramasmadīyam ||61||
ehyehi viśvādhipate munīṃdra lokeśa sārddhaṃ pitṛdevatābhiḥ ||
viśādhvarāṃtaḥ satataṃ śivāya pitāmahastvaṃ satataṃ namaste || 62||
trailokye yāni bhūtāni sthāvarāṇi carāṇi ca ||
brahmaviṣṇuśivaiḥ sārddhaṃ rakṣāṃ kurvaṃtu tāni me || 63 ||
devadānavagandharvā yakṣa rākṣasapannagāḥ ||
ṛṣayo manavo gāvo devamātara eva ca ||64||
sarve mamādhvare rakṣāṃ prakurvaṃtu mudānvitāḥ ||
ityāvāhya surāndadyādṛtvigbhyaḥ kaṇṭha bhūṣaṇam || 65 ||
kuṃḍalāni ca haimāni sūtrāṇi kaṭakāni ca ||
tathāṃgulipavitrāṇi vāsāṃsi kusumāni ca || 66 ||
dviguṇaṃ gurave dadyādbhūṣaṇā cchādanādikam ||
āghārāvājyabhāgau tu pūrvaṃ hutvā vicakṣaṇaḥ || 67 ||
praṇavādisvanāmnā ca svāhāṃto homa ucyate ||
homaḥ surāṇāṃ kartavyo ye caivātra pratiṣṭhitāḥ || 68 ||
grahāṇāṃ lokapālānāṃ śivakeśavayostathā ||
vanaspatibhyo brahmaṇe homaḥ kāryo yathecchayā || 59 ||
tato maṃgalaśabdena sthāpito vedamaṃgalaiḥ ||
triḥpradakṣiṇamāvṛtya gṛhītakusumāṃjaliḥ || 4.175.70 ||
śuklamālyāṃbaro bhūtvā tāṃ tulāmabhimaṃtrayet ||
namaste sarvadevānāṃ śaktistvaṃ satyamāsthitā || 71 ||
sākṣibhūtā jagaddhātri nirmitā viśvayoninā ||
ekataḥ sarvasatyāni tathānṛtaśatāni ca || 72 ||
dharmādharmabhṛtāṃ madhye sthāpitāsi jagaddhite ||
tvaṃ tule sarvabhūtānāṃ pramāṇamiha kīrtitā || 73 ||
māṃ tolayaṃtī saṃsārāduddharātra namostute ||
yo.asau tattvā dhipo devaḥ puruṣaḥ pacaviṃśakaḥ || 74 ||
sa eko.adhiṣṭhito devi tvayi tasmānnamo namaḥ ||
namo namaste goviṃda tulāpuruṣasaṃjñaka || 75 ||
tvaṃ hare tārayasvāsmānasmātsaṃsārasāgarāt ||
puṇyakālamathāsādya kṛtvaivamadhivāsanam || 76 ||
praṇamya parayā bhaktyā tāṃ tulāmāruhedbudhaḥ ||
sa saṅgacarmakavacī sarvābharaṇabhūṣitaḥ || 77 ||
dharmarājamathādāya hemasūryeṇa saṃyutam ||
karābhyāṃ baddhamuṣṭibhyāmāste paśyanharermukham || 78 ||
vāme yamaṃ tathā gṛhya dakṣiṇe ca raviṃ tathā ||
tato.apare tulābhāge nyaseyurdvijapuṃgavāḥ ||
sāmyādabhyadhikaṃ yāvatkāṃcanaṃ cātinirmalam || 79 ||
puṣṭikāmastu kurvīta bhūmisaṃsthaṃ nareśvara ||
kṣaṇamātraṃ tataḥ sthitvā punaretadudīrayet|| 4.175.80 ||
namaste sarvabhūtānāṃ sākṣibhūte sanātane ||
pitāmahena devi tvaṃ nirmitā parameṣṭhinā || 81 ||
tvayoddhṛtaṃ jagatsarvaṃ saha sthāvarajaṃgamam ||
sarvabhūtātmabhūtasthe namaste viśvadhāriṇi || 82 ||
tato.avatīrya gurave sarvamarddhaṃ nivedayet||
ṛtvigbhyo.aparamarddhaṃ ca dadyādudakapūrvakam || 83 ||
prāpya teṣāmanujñāṃ vā tathānyebhyo.api dāpayet ||
dīnānātha viśiṣṭādīnpūjayedbrāhmaṇaiḥ saha || 84 ||
na ciraṃ dhārayedgehe hemasaṃprokṣitaṃ budhaḥ ||
tiṣṭhadbhayāvahaṃ yasmātkaṣṭavyādhikaraṃ bhavet || 85 ||
rātriṃ parasvīkara ṇācchriyaṃ prāpnotyanuttamām ||
anenaiva vidhānena kecidraupyamayaṃ tathā ta 86 ||
karpūreṇa tathecchaṃti kecidbrāhmaṇapuṃgavāḥ ||
tathāsitatṛtīyāyāṃ nāryaḥ saubhāgyavardhitāḥ || 87 ||
kuṃkumena prayacchaṃti lavaṇena guḍena ca ||
tatra maṃtrā na homo vā evameva pradāpayet || 88 ||
vidhinānena yo dadyā ddānametatsamāhitaḥ ||
tasya puṇyaphalaṃ rājañchṛṇuṣva gadato mama || 89 ||
vimānavaramāsthāya nārī vā puruṣo.api vā ||
apsarogaṇasaṃkīrṇaṃ gaṃdha rvanagaropamam || 4.175.90 ||
nānāvṛkṣākulaṃ ramyaṃ nānāgaṃdhādhivāsitam ||
anekaratnaviddhāṃgaṃ muktādāmāvalaṃbitam || 91 ||
śayanāsanasaṃkīrṇaṃ patākā bhiralaṃkṛtam ||
ghaṃṭāśataravoddhuṣṭaṃ cāmaravyajanānvitam|| 92 ||
sarvartusukhadaṃ ramyaṃ sarvaduḥkhavivarjitam ||
itthaṃ vimānamāruhya gacchetsūryasalo katām|| 93 ||
mitvā tatra rājeṃdra kalpamekaṃ nirāmayaḥ ||
viṣṇuloke tathā kalpaṃ śivaloke tathaiva ca || 94 ||
viśveṣāṃ caiva devānāṃ deva rāja pure tathā ||
pure ca dharmarājasya varuṇasya tathaiva ca || 95 ||
dhanadasya pure sthitvā kalpakoṭiśataṃ naraḥ ||
punarmānuṣamabhyetya rājā bhavati dhārmikaḥ || 96 ||
yajvā dānapatirdhīmāñchatrupakṣakṣayaṃkaraḥ ||
yaścaitacchṛṇuyādbhaktyā mahādānānukīrtanam || 97 ||
so.api mucyeta pāpena trividhena na saṃśayaḥ || 98 ||
brahmeśakeśavaparo.asti na pūjanīyo naivāśvamedhasadṛśaḥ kraturasti kaścit ||
gaṃgāsamaṃ tribhuvane.api na tīrthamasti dānaṃ tulāpuruṣatulyamihāsti nānyat|| 99 ||
iti śrībhaviṣye mahāpurāṇa uttaraparvaṇi śrīkṛṣṇayudhiṣṭhirasaṃvāde tulāpuruṣadānavidhivarṇanaṃ nāma paṃcasaptatyuttaraśatatamo.adhyāyaḥ || 175 ||
hiraṇyagarbhadānavratavarṇanam
|| yudhiṣṭhira uvāca || ||
bhagavansarvabhūteśa sarvabhūtanamaskṛta ||
anugrahāya lokānāṃ kathayasva mamāparam || 1 ||
tvattulyo jāyate yena āyuṣā yaśasā śriyā ||
tanme kathaya deveśa dānaṃ vratamathāpi vā || 2 ||
|| śrīkṛṣṇa uvāca || ||
śṛṇu rājanpravakṣyāmi tava lokahitecchayā ||
yenopāyena jāyaṃte mattulyā mānavā bhuvi || 3 ||
na vratainopavāsaiśca na tīrthagamanairapi ||
mahāpathādimaraṇairna yajñairna śrutena ca || 4 ||
prāpyate mama loko.ayaṃ duṣprāpyastridaśairapi ||
pārthasnehānmahābhāga pravakṣyāmi hitaṃ tava || 5 ||.a
gobrāhmaṇārthe maraṇaṃ prāptaṃ yena sumedhasā ||
prayāge.anaśanaṃ vāpi pūjito vātha śaṃkaraḥ || 5 ||
prayāti brahmasālokyaṃ śrutireṣā sanātanī ||
yena matsamatāṃ yāti tatte vakṣyāmyataḥ param || 7 ||
dānaṃ hiraṇyagarbhākhyaṃ kathyamānaṃ nibodha me ||
agnerapatyaṃ prathamaṃ suvarṇamiha paṭhyate || 8 ||
pavitraṃ sarvabhūtānāṃ pāvanaṃ paramaṃ mahat ||
paryāyanāma tasyoktaṃ hiraṇyaṃ sārvalaukikam || 9 ||
tadapāṃ garbhamāviśya punarjātaṃ tu bhūtale ||
yaśca tadbrāhmaṇe dadyānmattulyo jāyate hi saḥ || 4.176.10 ||
|| yudhiṣṭhira uvāca || ||
vidhānaṃ tasya deveśa kathayasva sanātana ||
yatpramāṇaṃ yathācaitaddātavyaṃ parameśvara || 11 ||
|| śrīkṛṣṇa uvāca || ||
parvakāle pradātavyaṃ dānametanmahāmate ||
ayane viṣuve caiva grahaṇe śaśisūryayoḥ || 12 ||
vyatīpāte.atha kārtikyāṃ janmarkṣe vā narottama ||
duḥsvapnadarśane caiva grahapīḍāsu caiva hi || 13 ||
prayāge naimiṣe caiva kurukṣetre tathārbude ||
gaṃgāyāṃ yamunāyāṃ ca siṃdhusāgarasaṃgame || 14 ||
puṇyanadyaśca dānesminpraśastāḥ syurna saṃśayaḥ ||
yatra vā rocate rājangṛhe devakule.athavā || 15 ||
ārāme vā taḍāge vā śucau deśe vidhānataḥ ||
tatra bhūśodhanaṃ kuryātprāgudakpravaṇaṃ śubham || 16 ||
hastā dvādaśa kartavyaṃ maṃḍapaṃ tu suśobhanam ||
staṃbhairmanoharairyuktyārdraśākhābhiranvitam || 17 ||
tanmadhye vedikāṃ kuryātpaṃcahastāmalakṛtām ||
vitānamupariṣṭācca puṣpamālāvalaṃbitum || 18 ||
hiraṇyagarbhaṃ tanmadhye prathame.ahani kalpayet ||
tasya pramāṇaṃ vakṣyāmi rūpaṃ vai sthaṃḍilodbhavam || 19 ||
śilpinaṃ pūjayetpūrvaṃ vāsobhirbhūṣaṇaistathā ||
brāhmaṇānvācayetpaścāttataḥ karma samārabhet || 4.176.20 ||
suvarṇena saṃśuddhena śaktitaḥ kārayedbudhaḥ ||
aṃgulāni catuḥṣaṣṭirdairghyaṃ ca parikīrtitam || 21 ||
tribhāgahīnaṃ vadane mūle tasyārddhavistaram ||
vartulaṃ karṇikākāraṃ cārugraṃthivivarjitam || 22 ||
pidhānamupariṣṭācca kartavyaṃ cāṃgulādhikam ||
astrāṇi daśa kurvīta nālaṃ sūryaṃ ca kāṃcanam || 23 ||
dātraṃ sapaṭṭikaṃ caiva sarvopaskaraṇānvitam ||
sūcīkṣuraśca haimāni tatsarvaṃ parikalpayet || 24 ||
pārśvataḥ sthāpayettasya hemadaṃḍakamaṃḍalū ||
chatrikāpādukāyugmaṃ vajravaiḍūryamaṃḍitam || 25 ||
evaṃ lakṣaṇasaṃyuktaṃ kṛtvā garbhaṃ vicakṣaṇaḥ ||
brahmaghoṣeṇa mahatā śaṃkhatūryaraveṇa ca || 26 ||
hastinā śakaṭenātha rājanbrahmarathena vā ||
ānayenmaṃḍapaṃ kṛtvā pradakṣiṇamataṃdritaḥ || 27 ||
tiladroṇoparigataṃ vedīmadhye.adhivāsayet ||
samālabhya punaḥ sarvaṃ kuṃkumena sugaṃdhinā || 28 ||
kauśeyavāsasī śubhre tatastaṃ paridhāpayet ||
samaṃtātpuṣpamālābhiḥ pūjayedbhaktitaḥ sudhīḥ ||29||
dhūpaiḥ sudhūpitaṃ kṛtvā maṃtrametamudīrayet ||
bhūrlokapramukhālokāstava garbhe vyavasthitāḥ || 4.176.30 ||
brahmādayastathā devā namaste bhuvanodbhava ||
namaste bhuvanādhāra namaste bhuvaneśvara || 31 ||
namo hiraṇyagarbhāya garbhe yasya pitāmahaḥ ||
evaṃ saṃpūjayitvā tu tau rātrimadhivāsayet || 32 ||
vedyāścaturdiśaṃ caiva kuṃḍāni parikalpayet ||
catvāri caturasrāṇi teṣu homo vidhīyate || 33 ||
catuścāraṇikāstatra brāhmaṇā maṃtrapāragāḥ ||
homaṃ kuryurjitātmāno mauninaḥ sarva eva te ||34||
sarvābharaṇasaṃpannāḥ sarve cāhatavāsasaḥ ||
tāmrapātradvayopetā gaṃdhapuṣpādipūjitāḥ || 35 ||
vedyāḥ pūrvottare bhāge grahavediṃ prakalpayet ||
tatra grahāṃllokapālānbrahmaviṣṇumaheśvarān || || 36 || pūjayetsvarṇaghaṭitānpuṣpadhūpavilepanaiḥ ||
patākābhiralaṃkṛtya maṃḍapaṃ toraṇaistathā || 37 ||
kuṃbhadvayaṃ ca dvāreṣu sthāpayedratnasaṃyutam ||
tulāpuruṣamaṃtraiśca lokapālabaliṃ kṣipet || 38 ||
pālāśyaḥ samidhastatra praśastā homakarmaṇi ||
caruścaivendradaivatyastilā gavyaṃ ghṛtaṃ tathā ||39||
svaliṃgairhomayetpūrvaṃ maṃtrairvyāhṛtibhiḥ pumān ||
ayute dve ca homasya saṃkhyāmāhurmanīṣiṇaḥ || 4.176.40 ||
yajamānastataḥ snātvā śuklāṃbaradharaḥ śuciḥ||
bhaktyā hiraṇyagarbhaṃ ca parvakāle samarcayet || 41 ||
namo hiraṇyagarbhāya viśvagarbhāya vai namaḥ ||
carācarasya jagato gṛhabhūtāya te namaḥ || 42 ||
mātrāhaṃ janitaḥ pūrva martyadharmāsurottama ||
tvadgarbhasaṃbhavādadya divyadeho bhavāmyaham || 43 ||
ityuccārya svayaṃ bhaktyā kṛtvā caiva pradakṣiṇām ||
kṣīrājyadadhisaṃpūrṇaṃ tadgarbhaṃ praviśedbudhaḥ || 44 ||
sauvarṇaṃ dharmarājaṃ tu savye kṛtvā kare tataḥ ||
bhāskaraṃ dakṣiṇe caiva muṣṭiṃ baddhvā prayatnataḥ || 45 ||
jānvoraṃtarataścaiva śiraḥ kṛtvā samāhitaḥ ||
ucchvāsapaṃcaka tiṣṭheccetasā ciṃtayañchivam || 46 ||
garbhādhānaṃ puṃsavanaṃ sīmaṃtonnayanaṃ tathā ||
kuryurhiraṇyagarbhasya tataste dvijapuṃgavāḥ || 47 ||
jātakarmādikāḥ kuryuḥ kriyāḥ ṣoḍaśa cāparāḥ ||
tata utthāya niḥsṛtya punaḥ kuryātpradakṣiṇām|| 48 ||
tāvanmukhaṃ na paśyeta kasyacinnṛpasattama ||
sauvarṇā pṛthivī yāvanna dṛṣṭā spaṣṭacakṣuṣā || 49 ||
tataḥ snānaṃ prakurvīta brahmaghoṣapuraḥsaram ||
aṣṭau dvijāḥ suvarṇāṃgā sauvarṇaiḥ kalaśaiḥ śubhaiḥ || 4.176.50 ||
raupyairauduṃbarairvāpi mṛṇmayairvā suśobhanaiḥ ||
dadhyakṣatavicitrāṃgairāmrapallavaśobhitaiḥ || 51 ||
puṣpairāveṣṭitagrīvairavraṇaiḥ kalaśairdṛḍhaiḥ ||
catuṣkamadhye saṃsthāpya pīṭhamavraṇamuttamam || 52 ||
tatra sthāpya mahābhāga yajamānaṃ dvijottamāḥ ||
devasya tveti maṃtreṇa kuryurasyābhiṣecanam || 53 ||
adya jātasya teṃ.agāni abhiṣekṣyāmahe vayam ||
divyenānena vapuṣā ciraṃjīvamukhī bhava || 54 ||
evaṃ kṛtābhiṣekastu yajamānaḥ samāhitaḥ ||
dadyāddhiraṇyagarbhaṃ taṃ sodakenaiva pāṇinā || 55 ||
tānsaṃpūjya ca bhāvena bahubhyo vā tadājñayā ||
yajñopakaraṇaṃ sarvaṃ gurave vinivedayet || 56 ||
pādukopānahau caiva cchatracāmarabhājanam ||
anyeṣāṃ caiva viprāṇāṃ ye ca tatra sabhāsadaḥ || 57 ||
teṣāṃ caiva pradātavyaṃ dānaṃ cātra viśeṣataḥ ||
dīnāṃdhakṛpaṇānāṃ ca dātavyaṃ sārvakāmikam || 58 ||
annasatraṃ ca kartavyaṃ yāvaddānaparigrahaḥ ||
anena vidhinā yastu dānametatprayacchati || 59 ||
sa kulaṃ tārayetsarvaṃ devalokaṃ sa gacchati ||
vimānavaramāruhya pañcayojanavistṛtam || 4.176.60 ||
vāpīkūpataḍāgādyairjalasthānairalaṃkṛtam ||
udyānaśatasaṃsthānaṃ padmākaraniṣevitam || 61 ||
prāsādaśatasaṃkīrṇaṃ varastrīśatasevitam ||
vīṇāveṇumṛdaṃgānāṃ śabdairāpūritaṃ mahat || 62 ||
bhūmayo yatra rājendra divyā maṇimayāḥ śubhāḥ ||
vedikābhirvicitrābhiḥ śobhitaṃ bhāskaraprabham|| 63 ||
dhṛtaṃ stambhasahasreṇa sukṛtaṃ viśvakarmaṇā ||
patākābhirvicitrābhirvajraiśca samalaṃkṛtam || 64 ||
tadāruhya vimānāgryaṃ vidyādharagaṇairyutam ||
sa yāti lokaṃ śakrasya śakreṇa saha modate || 65 ||
manvantaraśate jāte karmabhūmau prajāyate ||
jaṃbūdvīpamaśeṣaṃ tu bhuṃkte divyaparākramaḥ || 66 ||
dhārmikaḥ satyaśīlaśca brahmaṇyo guruvatsalaḥ||
daśa janmrānyasau rājā jāyate rogavarjitaḥ || 67 ||
yastvidaṃ śṛṇuyādbhaktyā rahasyaṃ pāpanāśanam ||
so.api varṣaśataṃ sāgraṃ suraloke mahīyate || 68 ||
garbhaṃ hiraṇyaracitaṃ vidhivatpraviśya saṃskārasaṃskṛtatanuḥ punareva tasmāt ||
niḥsṛtya taddvijavarāya nivedya bhaktyā mārtaṇḍavaddivi virājati divyadehaḥ || 69 || iti śrībhaviṣye mahāpurāṇa uttaraparvaṇi śrīkṛṣṇayudhiṣṭhirasaṃvāde hiraṇyagarbhadānavidhivarṇanaṃ nāma ṣaṭsaptatyuttaraśatata tamo.adhyāyaḥ || 176 || || cha ||
brahmāṇḍadānavidhivarṇanam
|| śrīkṛṣṇa uvāca || ||
agastyena purā gīto dānānāṃ vidhiruttamaḥ ||
śṛṇu tvaṃ rājaśārdūla kathyamānaṃ mayādhunā || 1 ||
yena dattena rājendra sarvaṃ pāpaṃ vyapohati ||
mānasaṃ vācikaṃ vāpi kāyikaṃ ca sudustaram || 2 ||
maṃgalyaṃ maṃgalaṃ puṇyaṃ sarvadāneṣu cottamam ||
dhanyaṃ yaśasyamāyuṣyaṃ paralokabhayāpaham ||
brahmāṃḍaṃ kāṃcanaṃ kṛtvā sarvalakṣaṇasaṃyutam || 3 ||
devāsuramanuṣyaiśca gandharvoragarākṣasaiḥ ||
saṃyuktaṃ ca nadībhiśca samudraiḥ parvataistathā ||
vimānaśatakoṭībhirbhūṣitaṃ cāpsarovaraiḥ || 4 ||
diggajāṣṭakasaṃyuktaṃ madhyasthitacaturmukham ||
śivācyutārkaśikharamumālakṣmīsamanvitam || 5 ||
tasyāṃge kalpayedrājanbhuvanāni caturdaśa ||
vitasteraṃgulaśataṃ yāvadāyāmavistaram || 6 ||
kuryādviṃśatpalādūrdhvamāsahasrācca bhaktitaḥ ||
śakaladvayasaṃyuktaṃ puṭākāraṃ susaṃhitam ||7 ||
śilpinā vihitaṃ yasmādbrahmāṃḍaṃ sarvakāmadam ||
ayane viṣuve caiva caṃdrādityagrahe tathā || 8 ||
anyeṣvapi tu kāleṣu śraddhāvittasamanvitaḥ ||
puṣpamaṃḍapikāṃ kṛtvā tatra saṃsthāpayedbudhaḥ || 9 ||
tiladroṇoparigataṃ kaṃkumakṣodacarcitam ||
vāso yugmena saṃchādya puṣpagandhādhivāsitam || 4.177.10 ||
tasya dikṣu ca sarvāsu pūrṇakumbhāṃśca vinyaset ||
aṣṭādaśaiva cānyāni droṇamātrāṇyathāharet || 11 ||
gṛhe vā maṃḍape vāpi sthāpayettadvicakṣaṇaḥ ||
pādukopānahacchatrabhājanāsanadarpaṇaiḥ || 12 ||
saṃyuktaṃ kārayettatra payasvinyā tathaiva ca ||
kārayetkuṇḍamekaṃ tu hastamātraṃ vidhānataḥ || 13 ||
catuścāraṇikāstatra homaṃ kuryurdvijottamāḥ ||
sarvābharaṇasampannā susnātāhatavāsasaḥ || 14 ||
pracareyurdvijāstatra upādhyāyasamanvitāḥ ||
tathā purohitaścaiva rājñā ṣaṣṭho vidhīyate || 15 ||
itareṣāṃ tu pañcaiva kuryuryajñamataṃdritāḥ ||
grahayajñavidhānena grahāṇāṃ yajña iṣyate || 16 ||
brahmaviṣṇuśivānāṃ ca tannāmnā juhuyāttilān ||
ayutaṃ homayetpaścānmahāvyāhṛtibhirnṛpa || 17 ||
rudrajāpastu kartavyastasyaivānaṃtaraṃ dvijaiḥ ||
tataḥ sarvasamāptau tu snātvā śuklāṃbaraḥ śuciḥ || 18 ||
brahmāṃḍaṃ pūjayedbhaktyā gṛhītakusumāṃjaliḥ ||
namo jagatpratiṣṭhāya viśvadhāmne namo.astu te || 19 ||
vāṅmayāṃta nimagnāya brahmāṃḍa śubhakṛdbhava ||
brahmāṃḍodaravartīni yāni sattvāni kānicit || 4.177.20 ||
tāni sarvāṇi me tuṣṭiṃ prayacchatvatulāṃ sadā ||
brahmā viṣṇuśca rudraśca lokapālāstathā grahāḥ || 21 ||
nakṣatrāṇi tathā nāgā ṛṣayo marutastathā ||
sarve bhavaṃtu saṃtuṣṭāḥ saptajanmāṃtarāṇi me || 22 ||
ityuccārya tato dadyādbrahmāṃḍaṃ sarvakāmadam ||
sadakṣiṇaṃ ca taṃ kṛtvā vasu saṃpādayeddvijān ||23||
anena vidhinā dattvā yatpuṇyaṃ syānnarottama ||
tatte.ahaṃ saṃpravakṣyāmi śṛṇuṣva gadato mama || 24 ||
āsīdādiyuge rājā sudyumno nāma bhārata ||
nāgāyutabalaḥ śrīmānbahubhṛtyaparicchadaḥ || 25 |||
triṃśadvarṣasahasrāṇi kṛtvā rājyamakaṃṭakam ||
tataḥ saṃsthāpya tanayaṃ rājā rājye vanaṃ yayau || 26 ||
praviśya ca vanaṃ ghoraṃ tapastīvraṃ cacāra ha ||
adhyātmagatitattvajñaḥ karmakāṃḍaṃ visṛjya ca || 27 ||
kālena mahatā rājā diṣṭāṃtamagamatpurā ||
divyaṃ vimānamāruhya nānā vādyaravākulam ||28||
atītya śakralokādīnbrahmalokamito gataḥ ||
tasyāsanaṃ dideśātha brahmāsuragaṇairvṛtaḥ || 29 ||
divyaṃ kanakacitrāṃgaṃ ratnālaṃkṛtavigraham ||
evaṃ lokavare tasminramamāṇo nṛpottama || 4.177.30 ||
āste cānudinaṃ so.atha divyabhogavivarjitaḥ ||
vasatastasya rājñastu śarīraṃ paritapyate || 31 ||
bubhukṣayā naraśreṣṭha tathātyaṃtapipāsayā ||
sa pīḍyamāno brahmāṇaṃ kṛtāṃjalirabhāṣata || 32 ||
bhagavanbrahmaloko.ayaṃ sarvadoṣavivarjitaḥ ||
atra sthitaṃ ca māṃ deva kṣuttṛṣṇā ca prabādhate || 33 ||
kena karma vipākena kṣudhā me nāpasarpati||
brahmaloke gatasyāpi saṃśayaṃ chettumarhasi ||34||
|| brahmovāca || ||
tvayā hi kurvatā rājyaṃ puṣṭānyaṃgāni pārthiva ||
naiva dattaṃ tu bahulamātmavādaratena vai || 35 ||
dānaṃ baṃdhātmakaṃ matvā tasmāddattaṃ tvayā na hi ||
jñānādbrahmapadaṃ prāptamadānātkṣutprabādhate || 36 ||
|| rājovāca || ||
bhagavaṃstṛṣāpanuttiḥ syātkathaṃ me parameśvara ||
upadeśapradānena prasādaṃ kartumarhasi || 37 ||
|| brahmovāca || ||
bhūyo gatvā mahīṃ rājanbrahmāṃḍaṃ sārvakāmikam ||
prayaccha dvijamukhyānāṃ tena tṛptimavāpsyasi || 38 ||
ityuktaḥ samyagāgatya martyalokaṃ mahīpatiḥ ||
brahmāṃḍaṃ tu vidhānena brāhmaṇebhyaḥ pradattavān || 39 ||
sa jagāma punaḥ svargaṃ lebhe tṛptiṃ ca śāśvatīm||
etatte sarvamākhyātaṃ mahādānasya yatphalam || 4.177.40 ||
brahmāṃḍaṃ yaḥ prayaccheta tena dattaṃ carācaram ||
saptāvarānsapta parānsapta caiva parāvarān|| 41 ||
tārayetkulajāndattvā bhaviṣyāṃśca na saṃśayaḥ ||
manvaṃtarāṇi ṣaṭtriśadbrahmaloke mahīyate || 42 ||
punarmānuṣyamabhyetya dhārmiko jāyate kule ||
na dāridyaṃ na ca vyādhiṃ viyogaṃ naiva paśyati || 43 ||
nārī vā puruṣo vāpi dānasyāsya prabhāvataḥ ||
yaścaitacchṛṇuyādbhaktyā bhaktānāṃ śrāvayecca yaḥ || 44 ||
so.api sadgatimāpnoti kiṃ punaryaḥ prayacchati || 45 ||
brahmāṃḍakhaṃḍayugalaṃ sakulācalaṃ ca digbhāgasāgarasarovarasiddhajuṣṭam ||
diksaṃkhyayā guṇavatāṃ dvijasattamānāṃ dattvā pumānpadamupaiti pitāmahasya || 46 || iti śrībhaviṣye mahāpurāṇa uttaraparvaṇi śrīkṛṣṇayudhiṣṭhisaṃvāde brahmāṃḍadānavidhivarṇanaṃ nāma saptasaptatyuttaraśatatamo.adhyāyaḥ || 177 || || cha ||
kalpavṛkṣadānavidhivarṇanam
|| śrīkṛṣṇa uvāca || ||
bhagavāñchaṃkaraḥ pūrvaṃ kṛtodvāho mayā saha ||
ramamāṇastayā sārddhaṃ bahuvarṣagaṇānsthitaḥ || 1 ||
tataḥ suragaṇāḥ sarve paraṃ trāsamupāgatāḥ ||
tayorapatyasya bhayāttameva śaraṇaṃ gatāḥ || 2 ||
vaiśvānaramukhā devā mahādevaṃ trilocanam ||
prasannaścābhavatteṣāṃ vibudhānāṃ trilocanaḥ || 3 ||
|| īśvara uvāca || ||
kiṃ bhītāstridaśāḥ sarve kaṃ varaṃ ca dadāmi vaḥ ||
mayi prasanne vibudhā durlabhaṃ hi na kiṃcana || 4 ||
|| devā ūcuḥ || ||
bhagavaṃstava saṃyogātpārvatyā saha śaṃkara ||
mogho bhavatu deveśa bhītāḥ sma tanayasya te ||5 ||
anapatyaśca deveśa bhava bhūtapate sadā ||
aśaktāḥ sma vayaṃ sarve bhavadojo vidhāraṇe || 6 ||
|| śrībhagavānuvāca || ||
ataḥ prabhṛtyahaṃ devā ūrdhvaretā vyavasthitaḥ ||
sthāṇuvacca sthitaścāsmi nāma caitadbhaviṣyati || 7 ||
tataḥ kruddhā umā teṣāṃ devānāṃ vākyamabravīt ||
vitathaṃ putrajaṃ saukhyaṃ bhavadbhirme kṛtaṃ surāḥ || 8 ||
yasmāttasmādbhavaṃto.api na putrāñjanayiṣyatha ||
tataḥ prabhṛti vai devāḥ prasūyaṃte na bhūpate || 9 ||
dattvā śāpaṃ tato devī devānāmāha śaṃkaram ||
putrajanma mayā prāptaṃ na tāvajjagataḥ pate || 4.178.10 ||
aputrasya gatirnāsti itīyaṃ śrūyate śrutiḥ ||
tadādiśa mahābhāga lokadvayahitaṃ prabho || 11 ||
|| bhagavānuvāca || ||
aputraḥ puruṣo yaśca nārī vā parvatātmaje ||
sauvarṇastena dātavyaḥ kalpavṛkṣo guṇānvitaḥ || 12 ||
kṛtrimaṃ vāpi gṛhṇīyādvṛkṣaṃ vā sthāvarādikam ||
jātaputro.atha vā putraḥ putratve parikalpayet||13||
tena putravatāṃ lokā devi tasya na saṃśayaḥ ||
kalpavṛkṣastu kartavyaḥ śuddhakāṃcanasaṃbhavaḥ || 14 ||
bahuśākhaḥ suvarṇāṃgopyanekakusumānvitaḥ ||
mahāskaṃdhasvarūpaśca ratnālaṃkṛtavigrahaḥ || 15 ||
phalāni tasya divyāni sauvarṇāni prakalpayet ||
kuryāviṃśatpalādūrddhvaṃ śaktyā vā nṛpasattama || 16 ||
dānametatpradātavyaṃ rājataṃ caivamuttamam ||
pravālāṃkurasaṃchannaṃ muktādāmāvalaṃbitam || 17 ||
catuṣkoṇeṣu kurvīta caturaḥ kāṃcanadrumān ||
suvarṇasya pramāṇaṃ ca kathayāmi varānane || 18 ||
sahasreṇa tadarddhena tasyāpyarddhena vā punaḥ ||
nadyāstīre gṛhe vāpi devatāyatane tathā||19||
prāgudakpravaṇe deśe maṃḍapaṃ tatra kārayet ||
daśahastapramāṇena daśahastāśca vedikāḥ || 4.178.20 ||
hastamātrapramāṇena kuṃḍamekaṃ suśobhanam ||
āgneyyāṃ kārayedrājanmekhalāmupalepanam || 21 ||
tatra vai brāhmaṇā yojyā ṛgyajuḥsāmapāṭhakāḥ ||
upadeṣṭā ca tatraiva tṛtīyaḥ paṃcamo.atha vā || || 22 || sarvābharaṇasaṃpannāstāmrapatradvayānvitāḥ ||
anuliptāścaṃdanena vastramālyādibhūṣitāḥ || 23 ||
guḍaprasthopariṣṭācca sthāpayetkalpapādapam ||
brahmaviṣṇuśivopetaṃ paṃcaśākhaṃ sabhāskaram || 24 ||
kāmadevamadhastācca sakalatra prayojayet ||
saṃtānaṃ saha gāyatryā pūrvato lavaṇopari || 25 ||
maṃdāraṃ dakṣiṇe pārśve śriyā saha tathā ghṛte ||
paścime pārijātaṃ tu umayā saha pādapam || 26 ||
surabhīsaṃyutaṃ tadvattileṣu haricaṃdanam ||
kauśeyavastrasaṃyuktānikṣumālyaphalānvitān|| 27 ||
tathāṣṭau pūrṇakalaśānsamaṃtātparikalpayet ||
agnipraṇayanaṃ kṛtvā adhivāsya ca pādapān || 28 ||
dhānyāni caiva sarvāṇi samaṃtātparikalpayet ||
nānā bhakṣyāṇi naivedyaṃ sarvaṃ tatra niyojayet || 29 ||
dīpamālā vicitrāśca jvālayeta samaṃtataḥ ||
maṃtreṇa yojayitvā tā mayoktena varānane || 4.178.30 ||
kāmadastvaṃ hi devānāṃ kāmavṛkṣastataḥ smṛtaḥ ||
mayā saṃpūjito bhaktyā pūrayasva manorathān || || 31 ||
evaṃ saṃpūjya vidhinā jāgaraṃ tatra kārayet ||
śaṃkhavāditranirghoṣairvedadhvanivimiśritaiḥ || 32 ||
homaṃ ca brāhmaṇāḥ kuryurmadgatenāṃtarātmanā ||
āghārāvājyabhāgau tu pūrvaṃ hutvā vicakṣaṇaḥ || 33 ||
talliṃgaiḥ sthāpitāndevānhomenāpyāyayettataḥ ||
mahāvyāhṛtibhiścaiva homaṃ kuryustataḥ param || || 34 ||
ayutena bhavetsiddhiryajñasya varavarṇini ||
tataḥ prabhāte cotthāya snātvā śuklāṃbaraḥ śuciḥ || 35 ||
dadyātparvasamīpe tu kalpavṛkṣaṃ sada kṣiṇam ||
triḥpradakṣiṇamāvṛtya maṃtrametamudīrayet || 36 ||
namaste kalpavṛkṣāya vitatārthapradāya ca ||
viśvaṃbharāya devāya namaste viśvamūrtaye || || 37 ||
yasmāttvameva viśvātmā brahmasthāṇudivākarāḥ ||
mūrtāmūrtaparaṃ bījamataḥ pāhi sanātana ||38||
evamāmantrya taṃ dṛṣṭvā gurave kalpapādapam ||
caturbhyaścāpi ṛtvigbhyaḥ sāmaṃtādīnprakalpayet || 39 ||
anena vidhinā yastu dānametatprayacchati ||
tasya puṇyaphalaṃ devi śṛṇuṣva gadato mama|| || 4.178.40 ||
vimānavaramāruhya sūryatejaḥsamaprabham ||
apsarogaṇasaṃkīrṇaṃ kiṃkiṇījālamālitam || 41 ||
yāti lokaṃ sureśasya sarvabādhāvivarji tam||
punaḥ karmakṣitāvetya jāyate śrotriye kule || 42 ||
yajvā śūro.api vidvāṃśca naro bhavati dhārmikaḥ ||
punaraṃte prāpnuyādvai lokaṃ devasya śārṅgiṇaḥ || 43 || ||
iti śrībhaviṣye mahāpurāṇa uttaraparvaṇi śrīkṛṣṇayudhiṣṭhirasaṃvāde kalpavṛkṣadānavidhivarṇanaṃ nāmāṣṭasaptatyuttaraśatata mo.adhyāyaḥ .|| 178 ||
kalpalatādānavidhivarṇanam
|| yudhiṣṭhira uvāca || ||
bhagavansarvabhūteśa sarvalokanamaskṛta ||
anugrahāya lokānāṃ kathayasva mamāparam || 1 |||
niṣpāpo jāyate yena āyuṣā yaśasā śriyā ||
tanme kathaya deveśa dānaṃ vratamathāpi vā || 2 ||
|| śrīkṛṣṇa uvāca || ||
śṛṇu rājanpravakṣyāmi tava lokahitepsayā ||
yenopāyena jāyaṃte sabhāgyā mānavā bhuvi || 3 ||
na vratairnopavāsaiśca na tīrthagamanairapi ||
mahāpathādimaraṇairna yajñairna śrutena ca || 4 ||
prāpyate mama loko.ayaṃ duṣprāpyastridaśairapi ||
pārtha snehānmahābhāga pravakṣyāmi hitaṃ tava || 5 ||
vakṣye kalpalatādānaṃ śobhanaṃ vidhipūrvakam ||
sarvaṃ pūrvavidhānaṃ ca tatra tantre prakalpayet || 6 ||
dikpālebhyo baliṃ tatra kṣipedvai vidhipūrvakam ||
āghārāvājyabhāgau tu pūrvaṃ hutvā vicakṣaṇaḥ || 7 ||
tato grahamakhaṃ kuryāddhomaṃ vyāhṛtibhistataḥ ||
ayutenaiva homasya samāptiriha kathyate || 8 ||
tataḥ sarvasamīpe tu snātaḥ śuklāṃbaraḥ śuciḥ ||
puṣpadhūpairathābhyarcya vāsobhiḥ saphalākṣataiḥ ||
tataḥ pradakṣiṇīkṛtya maṃtrānetānudīrayet || 9 ||
namo namaḥ pāpavināśinībhyo brahmāṃḍalokeśvarapālanībhyaḥ || āśāśatādhikyaphalapradābhyo digbhyastathā kalpalatāvadhūbhyaḥ || 4.179.10 ||
yā yasya śaktiḥ paramā pradiṣṭā vede purāṇe surasattamasya ||
tāṃ pūjayāmīha pareṇa sāmnā sā me śubhaṃ yacchatu tāṃ nato.asmi || 11 ||
evamuccārya tāḥ sarvā brāhmaṇebhyo nivedayet ||
daśāśāḥ parayā bhaktyā tāstāḥ saṃkalpya cetasi || 12 ||
tataḥ kṣamāpayedviprānpraṇipatya sadakṣiṇān ||
anena vidhinā yastu dānametatprayacchati || 13 ||
tasya puṇyaphalaṃ rājankathyamānaṃ nibodha me ||
iha loke sa vijayī dhanavānputravānbhavet || 14 ||
mṛto lokādhipapure pratimanvataraṃ vaset ||
mahāśaktivṛtaḥ paścādetya rājanrasātalam || 15 ||
jitasarvamahīpālaścakravartī bhavedbhuvi ||
yā ca nārī mahārāja dānametatprayacchati||16||
sā cakravartinaṃ putraṃ sūte śaktisamanvitam ||
yaśca paśyeddīyamānaṃ dattaṃ yaścānumodate || 17 ||
śṛṇoti vācyamānaṃ ca sopi pretya vimucyate||18||
yāḥ śakravahniyamanairṛtapāśahastā vāteṃdurājaśivakeśavaśaṃbhuśaktyaḥ ||
tā vai prapūjya daśakalpalatā dvijebhyo dehi trilokavijaye yadi te.asti buddhiḥ || 19 || ||
iti śrībhaviṣye mahāpurāṇa uttaraparvaṇi śrīkṛṣṇayudhiṣṭhirasaṃvāde kalpalatādānavidhivarṇanaṃ nāmaikonāśītyuttaraśatatamo.a dhyāyaḥ || 179 || cha ||
gajarathāśvarathadānavidhivarṇanam
|| yudhiṣṭhira uvāca || ||
bhagavankṣatriyaiḥ śūraiḥ svavīryopāttasaṃcayaiḥ ||
kāni dānāni deyāni pavitrāṇi śubhāni ca || 1 ||
anyairvā puruṣaiḥ kṛṣṇa adharmabhayabhīrubhiḥ ||
grahapīḍāṅisaṃtaptairduḥsvapnādyupatāpitaiḥ || 2 ||
iha loke pare caiva vihitaṃ sarvakāmadam ||
viśeṣavihitaṃ dānaṃ kathayasva mahāmate || 3 ||
|| śrīkṛṣṇa uvāca || ||
śṛṇu bhūpāla bhadraṃ te dānadharmamanuttamam ||
viśeṣeṇa mahīpānāṃ hitāya ca na saṃśayaḥ || 4 ||
dānāni bahurūpāṇi nānāśāstroditāni ca ||
godānādīni rājendra pradhānāni na saṃśayaḥ || 5 ||
kiṃ tu pradhānamekaṃ te dānaṃ vakṣyāmi bhārata ||
vairocanāya yatsarvaṃ śukraḥ provāca bhārata || 6 ||
|| śukra uvāca || ||
śṛṇu daityapate dānaṃ sarvapāpapraṇāśanam ||
ādhayo vyādhayaścaiva grahapīḍā sudāruṇāḥ || 7 ||
yena dattena naśyaṃti puṇyamāpnoti cottamam ||
kārttikyāmayane caiva grahaṇe śaśisūryayoḥ || || 8 ||
dānametatpradātavyaṃ viṣuve sūryasaṃkrame ||
puṇyaṃ dinamathāsādya jitakrodho jiteṃdriyaḥ || 9 ||
saṃsthāpya dārujaṃ divyaṃ hemapaṭṭairalaṃkṛtam ||
rathaṃ sucakrākṣadharaṃ yugayoktrasamanvitam || 4.180.10 ||
suvarṇadhvajasaṃyuktaṃ sitāsitapatākinam ||
puṣpaprakarasaṃkīrṇe prāgudakpravaṇe śubhe || 11 ||
nadyāstīre.atha vā goṣṭhe vicitre vā gṛhāṃgaṇe ||
rathasya pūrvabhāge tu kṛtvā vedīmanuttamām || 12 || purāṇavedavidyāvānvinayācārasaṃyutaḥ ||
tasyāṃ saṃsthāpayeddevānbrahmādīnkathayāmi te || 13 ||
madhye brahmā pratiṣṭhāpyaḥ pūjayetpraṇavena tam ||
viṣṇuruttarataḥ sthāpyaḥ pauruṣeṇa tamarcayet || 14 ||
sūktena rudraṃ raudreṇa dakṣiṇasyāṃ samarcayet ||
grahānsūryamukhāṃścaiva vidhivatpūjayettathā ||
puṣpairgaṃdhaiḥ phalairbhakṣyairdīpamālābhireva ca || 15 ||
pūjayedgaṃdhakusumaiḥ śvetavastraiḥ sacaṃdanaiḥ ||
śaṃkhabherīmṛdaṃgānāṃ śabdaiḥ sarvatragāmibhiḥ || 16 ||
brahmaghoṣavimiśraiśca kārayeta mahotsavam ||
kuṃḍaṃ kṛtvā vidhānena hastamātrapramāṇataḥ || 17 ||
āgneyyāṃ diśi rājeṃdra brāhmaṇāṃstatra pūjayet || catuścāraṇikānviprānpūjitānbrahmabhūṣaṇaiḥ || 18 ||
caturoṣṭau mahārāja gurureko.athavā bhavet ||
homopakaraṇaṃ sarvaṃ melayitvā tilānghṛtam || 19 ||
agnikāryaṃ tataḥ kuryādyathāvadvidhipūrvakam ||
āghārāvājyabhāgau tu hutvā prāgvacca tau tataḥ || 4.180.20 ||
viṣṇave śitikaṇṭhāya maṃtraiḥ pūrvoditaiḥ śubhaiḥ ||
grahayajñoditaiścaiva grahāṇāṃ homa iṣyate || 21 ||
evaṃ yajñavidhiṃ kṛtvā yajamāno dvijaiḥ saha ||
yojayeta rathe dāṃtau gajau lakṣaṇasaṃyutau || 22 ||
vicitratanusaṃvītau śubhakakṣau sughaṃṭikī ||
hemapaṭṭaiḥ sutilakaiḥ śobhitau śaṃkhacāmaraiḥ || 23 ||
divyamuktāparicchannau divyāṃkuśasamanvitau ||
mahāmātrānvitau caiva sarvābharaṇabhūṣitau || 24 ||
evaṃ vidhiṃ tataḥ kṛtvā rathaṃ taṃ sagajaṃ naraḥ ||
āropayettatastasminbrāhmaṇaṃ śaṃsitavratam || 25 ||
bhūṣitaṃ kaṇṭhakaṭakaiḥ karṇaveṣṭāṃgulīyakaiḥ ||
āguptacolakacchatra vastrāyudhasamanvitam || 26 ||
baddhatūṇiṃ dhanuṣpāṇiṃ bahucarmavibhūṣitam ||
khaḍgadhenukayā naddhaṃ hārālaṃkṛtavigraham || 27 ||
yajamānastataḥ prājñaḥ śuklāṃbaradharaḥ śuciḥ ||
rathaṃ pradakṣiṇīkṛtya gṛhītakusumāṃjaliḥ || 28 ||
imamuccārayenmantraṃ sarvapāpapraṇāśanam ||
kumudairāvaṇau padmaḥ puṣpadaṃto.atha vāmanaḥ ||
supratīkoṃjanaḥ sārvabhaumo.aṣṭau devayonayaḥ || 29 ||
teṣāṃ vaṃśaprasūtau tu balarūpasamanvitau ||
tadyuktarathadānena mama syātāṃ varapradau ||4.180.30||||
ratho.ayaṃ yajñapuruṣo brāhmaṇotra śivaḥ svayam ||
mamebharathadānena prīyetāṃ śivakeśavau ||31||
ityuccārya mahābhāge pūjayitvā punaḥpunaḥ ||
āropayettatastasminbrāhmaṇaṃ śaṃsitavratam ||32||
svadāranirataṃ śāṃtaṃ vedavedāṃgapāragam ||
pañcāgnyabhimataṃ caiva avyaṃgaṃ vyādhivarjitam || 33 ||
punaḥ pradakṣiṇīkṛtya rathasthaṃ dvijasattamam ||
ādvāramanugacchecca praṇipatya gṛhaṃ viśet || 34 ||
tato yajñāvasāne tu dīnāṃdhādīñjaḍānkṛśān ||
pūjayedvividhairdānairvastragodānabhojanaiḥ ||35||
anenaiva vidhānena saṃkalpya rathamuttamam||
kuṇḍamaṃḍapasaṃbhārabhūṣaṇācchādanādikam ||36||
tadeva homadravyaṃ ca homamaṃtrāsta eva hi ||
viśeṣo.aśvarathe rājankathyamāno nibodhyatām ||37||
hayau lakṣaṇasaṃyuktau khalīnālaṃkṛtānanau||
vicitravastusaṃvītau kaṇṭhābharaṇabhūṣitau|| || 38 ||
supragrahayutau yojyau dātā tasminnathottame ||
taṃ pradakṣiṇamāvṛttya maṃtrametamudīrayet || 39 ||
namostu te vedaturaṃgamāya trayīmayāya triguṇātmakāya ||
sudurgamārge sukhapānapātre namo.astu te vājidharāya nityam || 4.180.40 ||
ratho.ayaṃ savitā sākṣādvedāścāmī turaṃgamāḥ ||
aruṇo brāhmaṇaścāyaṃ prayacchaṃtu sukhaṃ mama || 41 ||
ityuccārya tatastasminrathe brāhmaṇasattamam ||
āropayedgṛhāddvāraṃ yāvadetamanuvrajet || 42 ||
anena vidhinā yastu dadyādvājirathaṃ budhaḥ ||
tasmādvāharathaṃ rājyaṃ tasya puṇyaphalaṃ śṛṇu || 43 ||
sarvapāpavinirmuktaḥ sarvāmayavivarjitaḥ ||
manvaṃtaraśataṃ yāvatsarvabhogasamanvitaḥ || 44 ||
apsarogaṇasaṃkīrṇe vimāne sūryavarcase ||
divyabhogānvitaḥ śrīmānkāmacārī vaseddivi || 45 ||
puṇyakṣayādihābhyetya rājā bhavati dhārmikaḥ ||
putrapautrānvitaścaiva ciraṃjīvī priyātithiḥ ||46||
gajenaikena nirdiṣṭaḥ kaścidgajaratho nṛpa ||
ekenāśvenāśvarathaḥ kathyate vedavādibhiḥ || 47 ||
dānamaṃtrāsta evoktāḥ phalaṃ tatra nigadyate || 48 ||
yacchaṃti ye rathavaraṃ sudhurākṣacakraṃ vikrāṃtavāraṇayutaṃ turagānvitaṃ vā ||
sopaskaraṃ kanakapaṭṭavicitritāgaṃ te syaṃdanena surarājapuraṃ prayāṃti || 49 ||
iti śrībhaviṣye mahāpurāṇa uttaraparvaṇi śrīkṛṣṇayudhiṣṭhirasaṃvāde gajarathā śvarathadānavidhivarṇanaṃ nāmāśītyuttaraśatatamo.adhyāyaḥ ||180|| ||9|| ||
kālapuruṣadānavidhivarṇanam
yudhiṣṭhira uvāca || ||
dānānyanyāni me kṛṣṇa kathayasva yadūttama ||
maṃgalyāni pavitrāṇi sarvapāpaharāṇi ca || 1 ||
saṃsārasāgarottārahetubhūto.asi mādhava ||
dharmādharmaparijñāne tvadanyo neha kaścana ||2||
|| śrīkṛṣṇa uvāca || ||
dānāni bahurūpāṇi kathitāni mayā tava ||
punareva pravakṣyāmi yadyasti tava kautukam || 3 ||
kathitāni mayā tubhyaṃ kathayiṣyāmi yāni ca ||
mahatārthena sidhyaṃti prayacchaṃti mahatphalam || 4 ||
kāmyo dānavidhiḥ pārtha kriyamāṇaḥ prayatnataḥ ||
phalāya munibhiḥ prokto viparīto bhayāya ca || 5 ||
jñeyaṃ niṣkaśataṃ sarvadāneṣu vidhiruttamaḥ ||
madhyamastu tadardhena tadarddhenāvaraḥ smṛtaḥ || 6 ||
evaṃ vṛkṣaratheṃdrāṇāṃ dhenoḥ kṛṣṇājinasya ca ||
aśaktasyāpi kṛṣṭo.ayaṃ paṃcasauvarṇiko vidhiḥ || 7 ||
ato.anyūnena yo dadyānmahādānaṃ narādhipa ||
pratigṛhṇāti vā tasya duḥkhaśokāvahaṃ bhavet || 8 ||
ādau tāvatpravakṣyāmi kālākhyaṃ puruṣaṃ tava ||
saptasāgaradānaṃ ca mahābhūtaghaṭantathā || 9 ||
ardhyapradānamaṃtrokta mātmapratikṛtistathā ||
suvarṇāśvaḥ smṛtaḥ ṣaṣṭhaḥ suvarṇāśvaratho.aparaḥ || 4.181.10 ||
sarvadānottamaṃ rājankṛṣṇājinamathāṣṭamam ||
viśvacakraṃ ca navamaṃ haimo gajarathastathā || 11 ||
etatte dānadaśakaṃ vedmi pārthivasattama ||
dehi dāpaya sadbudiṃ dāne nṛpanarottama || 12 ||
dānādṛte nopakāro vidyate dhanino.aparaḥ ||
dīyamāno hi nāpaiti bhūya evābhivardhate || 13 |
kūpa ullikhyamāno.api bhavatyeva bahūdakaḥ ||
puṇyaṃ dinamathāsādya bhūmibhāge same śubhe || 14 ||
caturthyāṃ vā caturdaśyāṃ viṣṭyāṃ vā pāṃḍunaṃdana ||
pumānkṛṣṇatilaiḥ kāryo raupyadaṃtaḥ suvarṇadṛk || 15 ||
khaḍgodyatakaro dīrṇo japā kusumakuṃḍalaḥ ||
raktāṃbaradharaḥ sragvī śaṃkhamālāvibhūṣitaḥ || 16 ||
tīkṣṇāsipatradhanuṣā visphāritakaṭītaṭaḥ ||
upānadyugayukto hi kṛṣṇakaṃbala pārśvagaḥ || 17 ||
gṛhītamāṃsapiṃḍaśca vāme karatale tathā ||
evaṃ vidhaṃ naraṃ kṛtvā gṛhītakusumāṃjaliḥ || 18 ||
saṃpūjya gaṃdhakusumairnaivedyaṃ vinivedya ca ||
tilājyaṃ juhuyāttatra tryaṃbaketi ca maṃtrataḥ || 19 ||
svagṛhyoktavidhānena śatamaṣṭottaraṃ yajet ||
yajamānaḥ prasannātmā imaṃ maṃtramudīrayet ||4.181.20|||
sarvaṃ kalayase yasmātkālastvaṃ tena bhaṇyase ||
brahmaviṣṇuśivādīnāṃ tvamasādhyo.asi suvrata || 21 ||
pūjitastvaṃ mayā bhaktyā prārthitaśca tathā sukham ||
yaducyate tava vibho tatkuruṣva namonamaḥ || 22 ||
evaṃ saṃpūjayitvā taṃ brāhmaṇāya nivedayet ||
brahmāṇaṃ prathamaṃ pūjya vāsobhirbhūṣaṇaistathā || 23 ||
dakṣiṇāṃ śaktito dadyātpraṇipatya visarjayet||
anena vidhinā yastu dānametatprayacchati || 24 ||
nāpamṛtyubhayaṃ tasya na ca vyādhikṛtaṃ bhayam ||
bhavatyavyāhataiśvaryaḥ sarvabādhāvivarjitaḥ || 25 ||
dehāṃte sūryabhavanaṃ bhittvā yāti paraṃ padam ||
puṇyakṣayādihābhyetya rājā bhavati dhārmikaḥ ||
saṃtatyā ca śriyā yuktaḥ putrapautrasamanvitaḥ || 26 ||
saṃpūjya kālapuruṣaṃ vidhivaddvijāya dattvā śubhāśubhaphalodayahetubhūtaḥ ||
rogāṃtare sakaladoṣamaye ca dehī no vadhyabhāvamupagacchati tatprabhāvāt || 27 || || iti śrībhaviṣye mahāpurāṇa uttaraparvaṇi śrīkṛṣṇayudhiṣṭhira saṃvāde kālapuruṣadānavidhivarṇanaṃ nāmaikāśītyuttaraśatatamodhyāyaḥ || 181 || || a ||
saptasāgaradānavidhivarṇanam
|| śrīkṛṣṇa uvāca || ||
athātaḥ saṃpravakṣyāmi pārthadānamanuttamam ||
saptasāgarakaṃ nāma sarvapāpapraṇāśanam || 1 ||
puṇyaṃ dinamathāsādya yugādigrahaṇādikam ||
kārayetsaptakuṇḍāni kāṃcanāni vicakṣaṇaḥ || 2 ||
prādeśamātrāṇi tathā ratnimātrāṇi vā punaḥ ||
kuryātsaptaśatādūrdhvamāsahasrācca śaktitaḥ || 3 ||
saṃsthāpyāni ca sarvāṇi kṛṣṇājinatilopari ||
prathamaṃ pūrayetkuṃḍaṃ lavaṇena vicakṣaṇaḥ || 4 ||
dvitīyaṃ payasā tadvattṛtīyaṃ sarpiṣā punaḥ ||
caturthaṃ tu guḍenaiva dadhnā paṃcamameva ca || 5 ||
ṣaṣṭhaṃ śarkarayā tadvatsaptamaṃ tīrthavāriṇā ||
sthāpayellavaṇasyāṃte brahmāṇaṃ kāṃcanaṃ śubham || 6 ||
keśavaṃ kṣīramadhye tu ghṛtamadhye maheśvaram ||
bhāskaraṃ guḍamadhye tu dadhimadhye surādhipam || 7 ||
śarkarāyāṃ nyasellakṣmīṃ jalamadhye tu pārvatīm ||
sarveṣu sarvaratnāni dhānyāni ca samaṃtataḥ || 8 ||
sthāpayetpuruṣaśreṣṭha yathālābhaṃ yathāsukham ||
tataḥ parvasamīpe tu snātaḥ śuklāṃbaro gṛhī || 9 ||
triḥpradakṣiṇamāvṛtya maṃtrānetānudīrayet ||
namo vaḥ sarvasiṃdhūnāmādhārebhyaḥ sanātanāḥ || 4.182.10 ||
jaṃtūnāṃ prāṇadebhyaśca samudrebhya namonamaḥ ||
pūrṇāḥ sarve bhavaṃto vai kṣāra kṣīraghṛtaikṣavaiḥ || 11 ||
dadhnā śarkarayā tadvattīrthavāribhireva ca ||
tasmādaghaughavidhvaṃsaṃ kurudhvaṃ mama mānadāḥ || 12 ||
alakṣmīḥ praśamaṃ yātu lakṣmīścāstu gṛhe mama ||
evamuccārya tāndadyādbrāhmaṇebhyo yudhiṣṭhira|| 13 ||
ekamevamathābhyarcya puṣpavastravilepanaiḥ ||
bahūnāmetaduddiṣṭaṃ dānamekasya vā punaḥ || 14 ||
deyaṃ vā sarvasāmānyaṃ kriyāviprānurūpataḥ ||
dānaṃ saptasamudrākhyaṃ yaḥ prayacchati pārthiva || 15 ||
tasya gṛhānna calati lakṣmīryāvatkulāṣṭakam ||
pūjyamānaḥ suragaṇaiḥ siddhavidyādharoragaiḥ || 16 ||
devalokānna cyavate saptamanvatarāṇyasau ||
tataśca vedasaṃskārātparaṃ brahmādhigacchati || 17 ||
iti dadāti rasāmarasaṃyutāñchuciravismayadāniha sāgarān ||
analakāṃcanaratnamayānasau padamupaiti hare ramayā vṛtam || || 16 ||
dānaṃ pradhānatarametadatīva vipre proktaṃ yudhiṣṭhira samādhidhiyā viciṃtya ||
haimānvidhāya jaladhīnvitarasva śaktyā prāpnoṣi yena sarasāni samīhitāni || 19 || iti śrībhaviṣye mahāpurāṇa uttaraparvaṇi śrīkṛṣṇayudhiṣṭhirasaṃvāde saptasāgaradānavidhivarṇanaṃ nāma dvyaśītyuttaraśatatamo.a dhyāyaḥ || 182 || ||9|||
mahābhūtaghaṭadānavarṇanam
|| śrīkṛṣṇa uvāca || ||
athātaḥ saṃpravakṣyāmi dānamanyattavottamam ||
mahābhūtaghaṭaṃ nāma mahāpātakanāśanam || 1 ||
puṇyāṃ tithiṃ samāsādya svanulipte gṛhāṃgaṇe ||
kārayetkāṃcanaṃ kuṃbhaṃ mahāratnānvitaṃ punaḥ || 2 ||
prādeśādaṃgulaśataṃ yāvatkuryātpramāṇataḥ ||
śaktyā paṃcapalādūrdhvamāśatācca narottama || 3 ||
kṣīrājyapūritaṃ kṛtvā kalpavṛkṣasamanvitam ||
padmāsanagatāstatra brahmaviṣṇumaheśvarāḥ || 4 ||
lokapālā mahendrāśca svavāhanasamāsthitāḥ ||
ṛgvedaḥ sākṣasūtraśca yajurvedaḥ sapaṃkajaḥ || 5 ||
vīṇādhārī sāmavedo hyatharvā srakchubhānvitaḥ ||
purāṇavedo varadaḥ sākṣasūtrakamaṃḍaluḥ || 6 ||
saptadhānyāni purataḥ sthāpayecchaktito budhaḥ ||
pādukopānahacchatraṃ cāmarāgryāsanāyudhān || 7 ||
evaṃ prakalpya vidhivanmahābhūtaghaṭaṃ naraḥ ||
guḍasāroparigataṃ mālyavastrairathārcayet || 8 ||
atha parvasamīpe tu snātvā niyatamānasaḥ ||
triḥ pradakṣiṇamāvṛtya maṃtrametamudīrayet || 9 ||
yasmānna kiṃcidapyasti mahābhūtairvinā kṛtam ||
mahābhūtamayaścāyaṃ tasmācchāṃtiṃ dadātu me || 4.183.10 ||
atra sannihitā devāḥ sthāpitā viśvakarmaṇā ||
te me śāṃtiṃ prayacchaṃtu bhaktibhāvena pūjitāḥ || 11 ||
ityevaṃ pūjayitvā tu mahābhūtaghaṭaṃ naraḥ ||
brāhmaṇaṃ pūjayitvā tu bhūṣaṇācchādanādibhiḥ || 12 ||
mahābhūtaghaṭaṃ dadyātparvakāle yatavrataḥ ||
punaḥ pradakṣiṇīkṛtya brāhmaṇaṃ taṃ kṣamāpayet|| 13 ||
anena vidhinā yaśca dānametatprayacchati ||
ekaviṃśatkulopetaḥ śivaloke prayātyasau || 14 ||
puṇyakṣayādihābhyetya rājā bhavati dhārmikaḥ ||
ajeyaḥ śatrusaṃghātairmahābala parākramaḥ || 15 ||
kṣatradharmarato vidvāndevabrāhmaṇapūjakaḥ ||16||
aṣṭāpadottamaghaṭaṃ vimalaṃ vidhāya brahmeśakeśavayutaṃ sahalokapālaiḥ ||
kṣīrājyapūrṇavivaraṃ praṇipatya bhaktyā viprāya dehi tava dānaśataiḥ kimanyaiḥ |||17|| iti śrībhaviṣye mahāpurāṇa uttaraparvaṇi śrīkṛṣṇayudhiṣṭhirasaṃvāde mahābhūtaghaṭadāna vidhivarṇanaṃ nāma tryaśītyuttaraśatatamo.adhyāyaḥ || 183 || ||cha|| ||
śayyādānavidhivarṇanam
|| śrīkṛṣṇa uvāca || ||
śayyādānaṃ pravakṣyāmi tava pāṃḍukulodvaha ||
yaddattvā sukhabhāgī syādiha loke paratra ca || 1 ||
śayyādānaṃ prayacchaṃti sarvadaiva dvijottamāḥ ||
anityaṃ jīvitaṃ yasmātkonyaḥ paścātpradāsyati || 2 ||
tāvatsa baṃdhuḥ sa pitā yāvajjīvati bhārata ||
mṛto mṛta iti jñātvā kṣaṇātsneho nivartate || 3 ||
tasmātsvayaṃ pradātavyaṃ śayyābhojyajalādikam ||
ātmaiva hyātmano bandhuriti saṃciṃtya cetasi || 4 ||
ātmaiva yo hi nātmānaṃ dānabhogaiḥ samarcayet ||
ko.anyo hitatarastasmātkaḥ paścātpūjayiṣyati || 5 ||
tasmācchayyāṃ samāsādya sāradārumayīṃ dṛḍhām ||
daṃtapatracitāṃ ramyāṃ himapaṭṭairalaṃkṛtām || 6 ||
haṃsatūlīpraticchannāṃ subhagāṃ sopadhānikām ||
pracchādanapaṭīyuktāṃ gaṃdhadhūpādhivāsitām || 7 ||
tasyāṃ saṃsthāpayeddhaimaṃ hariṃ lakṣmīsamanvitam ||
ucchīrṣake dhṛtaṃ caiva kalaśaṃ parikalpayet || 8 ||
vijñeyaṃ pāṃḍava sadā sanidrākalpakaṃ budhaiḥ ||
tāṃbūlaṃ kuṃkumakṣodakarpūrāgaru caṃdanam || 9 ||
dīpakopānahacchatracāmarāsanabhojanam ||
pārśveṣu sthāpayecchaktyā saptadhānyāni caiva hi || 4.184.10 ||
śayanasthasya bhavati yadanyadupakārakam ||
bhṛṃgārakādyapuṣpāṇi paṃcavarṇavitānakam || 11 ||
śayyāmevaṃvidhāṃ kṛtvā brāhmaṇāyopadāpayet ||
sapatnīkāya saṃpūjya puṇye.ahni vidhipūrvakam || 12 ||
namaste sarvadeveśa śayyādānaṃ kṛtaṃ mayā ||
dehi tasmācchāṃtiphalaṃ namaste puruṣottama || 13 ||
yathā na kṛṣṇa śayanaṃ śūnyaṃ sāgarajātayā ||
śayyā mamāpyaśūnyāstu tathā janmanijanmani || 14 ||
dattvaivaṃ talpamamalaṃ praṇipatya visarjayet ||
ekādaśāhe.api tathā vidhireṣa prakīrtitaḥ || 15 ||
dadāti yadi dharmārthaṃ mānavo bāṃdhave mṛte ||
viśeṣaṃ cātra rājeṃdra kathyamānaṃ nibodha me || 16 ||
tenopabhuktaṃ yadvastu kiṃcitpūrvaṃ gṛhe satā ||
tadgātralagnaṃ ca tathā vastravāhanabhājanam || 17 ||
yadiṣṭaṃ ca tathāsyāsīttatsarvaṃ parikalpayet ||
sa eva puruṣo haimastasyāṃtaṃ sthāpayettathā || 18 ||
pūjayitvā pradātavyo mṛtaśayyā yathoditā ||
svarge puraṃdaragṛhe sūryaputrālayetha vā || 19 ||
sukhaṃ vasatyasau jaṃtuḥ śayyādānaprabhāvataḥ ||
pīḍayaṃti na taṃ yāmyāḥ puruṣā bhīṣaṇānanāḥ || 4.184.20 ||
na dharmeṇa na śītena bādhyate sa naraḥ kvacit ||
api pāpasamāyuktaḥ svargaloke mahīyate || 21 ||
vimānavaramārūḍhaḥ sevyamānopsarogaṇaiḥ ||
ābhūtasaṃplavaṃ yāvattiṣṭhetpātakavarjitaḥ || 22 ||
śayyāpradānamamalaṃ tava pāṃḍuputrasaṃkīrtitaṃ sakalasaukhyānidhānametat ||
tayo dadāti vidhivatsvayameva nāke talpe vikalparahitaḥ sa vibhāti satyam || 23 || iti śrībhaviṣye mahāpurāṇa uttaraparvaṇi śrīkṛṣṇayudhiṣṭhirasaṃvāde śayyādānavidhivarṇanaṃ nāma caturaśītyuttaraśatatamo.adhyāyaḥ || 184 || cha ||
ātmapratidānavidhivarṇanam
|| śrīkṛṣṇa uvāca || ||
ātmapratikṛtirnāma yathoktaṃ kasyacitpurā ||
tatte.ahaṃ saṃpravakṣyāmi dānaṃ mānavivardhanam || 1 ||
dānakālaḥ sadā tasya munibhiḥ parikīrtitaḥ ||
puṇyaiḥ puṇyadinaṃ pārtha prāpyate jīvitairna ca || 2 ||
lohajāṃ prakṛtiṃ bhavyāṃ kārayitvātmano nṛpa ||
abhīṣṭavāhanagatāmiṣṭālaṃkārasaṃyutām || 3 ||
abhīṣṭalokasahitāṃ sarvopaskarasaṃyutām ||
tataḥ paṭṭapaṭīvastraiśchāditāṃ ratnabhūṣitām || 4 ||
kuṃkumenānuliptāṃgīṃ karpūrāguruvāsitām ||
strī ceddadāti śayane śayitāṃ kārayetsvayam || 5 ||
yadyadiṣṭatamaṃ kiṃcittatsarvaṃ pārśvato nyaset ||
upakārakaraṃ strīṇāṃ svaśarīre ca yadbhavet || 6 ||
tatsarvaṃ sthāpayetpārśve svayaṃ saṃciṃtya cetasi ||
etatsarvaṃ melayitvā svesve sthāne nidhāya ca || 7 ||
pūjayitvā lokapālāngṛhāndevīṃ vināyakam ||
tata śuklāṃbaraḥ snātvā gṛhītakusumāṃjaliḥ || 8 ||
imamuccārayenmaṃtraṃ viprasya purato budhaḥ ||
ātmanaḥ pratimā ceyaṃ sarvopakaraṇairyutā || 9 ||
sarvaratnasamāyuktā tava vipra niveditā ||
ātmā śaṃbhuḥ śivaḥ śauriḥ śakraḥ suragaṇairvṛtaḥ || 4.185.10 ||
tasmādātmapradānena mamātmā suprasīdatu ||
ityuccārya tato dadyādbrāhmaṇāya yudhiṣṭhira || 11 ||
brāhmaṇaścāpi gṛhṇīyātkodāditi ca kīrtayan ||
tataḥ pradakṣiṇīkṛtya praṇipatya visarjayet || 12 ||
vidhinānena rājendra dānametatprayacchati ||
yaḥ pumānatha vā nārī śṛṇuyātphalamāpnuyāt || 13 ||
sāgraṃ varṣaśataṃ divyaṃ svargaloke surairvṛtaḥ ||
abhīṣṭaphaladānena hyabhīṣṭaphalabhāgbhavet || 14 ||
yatraivotpadyate jaṃtuḥ prāpte karmakṣaye punaḥ ||
tatraiva sarvakāmānāṃ phalabhāgbhavate nṛpaḥ || 15 ||
iṣṭabaṃdhujanaiḥ sārddhaṃ na viyogaṃ kadācana ||
prāpnoti puruṣo rājansvarge cānaṃtyamaśnute || 16 ||
yaścātmanaḥ pratikṛtiṃ varavāhanasthā haimīṃ vidhāya dhanadhānyasamākulāṃ ca ||
sopaskaraṃ dvijavarāya dadāti bhaktyā caṃdrārkavatsa divi bhāti hi rājarājaḥ || 17 || iti śrībhaviṣye mahāpurāṇa uttaraparvaṇi śrīkṛṣṇayudhiṣṭhirasaṃvāda ātmapratikṛtidānavidhivarṇanaṃ nāma pañcāśītyuttaraśatatamo.adhyāyaḥ || 185 || || cha || ||
hiraṇyāśvadānavidhivarṇanam
|| śrīkṛṣṇa uvāca || ||
sāṃprataṃ saṃpravakṣyāmi hiraṇyāśvavidhiṃ param ||
yasya prasādātpuruṣaḥ śāśvataṃ phalamaśnute || 1 ||
puṇyaṃ dinamathāsādya pātraṃ vāpi guṇādhikam ||
śaktitastripalādūrdhvamāśatācca narottama || 2 ||
khalīnālaṃkṛtamukhaṃ kārayeddhemavājinam ||
mukharaṃ sonnataskaṃdhaṃ dṛḍhajānuṃ savāladhim || 3 ||
sthāpayedvedimadhye tu kṛṣṇājinatilopari ||
kauśeyavastrasaṃvītaṃ kuṃkumena vilepitam || 4 ||
saṃpūjya kusumaiḥ śvetaiścaṇakānvinivedya ca ||
tataḥ parvasamīpe tu gṛhītakusumāṃjaliḥ || 5 ||
imamuccārayenmaṃtraṃ purāṇoktaṃ yatavrataḥ ||
namaste sarvadeveśa vedāharaṇalaṃpaṭa || 6 ||
vājirūpeṇa māmasmātpāhi saṃsārasāgarāt ||
tvameva saptadhā bhūtvā chaṃdorūpeṇa bhāskaram || 7 ||
yasmāddhārayase lokānataḥ pāhi sanātana ||
evamuccārya taṃ rājanviprāya pratipādayet || 6 ||
pradakṣiṇaṃ tataḥ kṛtvā praṇipatya visarjayet ||
anena vidhinā rājanhiraṇyāśvama laṃkṛtam || 9 ||
dattvā pāpakṣayādbhānorlokamāpnoti śāśvatam ||
tasminnahani bhuṃjīta tailakṣāravivarjitam || 4.186.10 ||
purāṇaśravaṇaṃ tadvatkārayedbhojanādanu || 11 ||
itthaṃ hiraṇyāśvavidhiṃ karoti yaḥ supuṇyamāsādya dinaṃ nareṃdra ||
vimuktapāpaḥ sa puraṃ murāreḥ prāpnoti siddhairabhipūjitaṃ yat|| 12 ||
iti paṭhati ya itthaṃ haimavājipradānaṃ sakalakaluṣamuktaḥ so.aśvayuktena bhūpaḥ || kanakamayavimānenārkalokaṃ prayātastridaśapativadhūbhiḥ pūjyate harmyabhogaiḥ || 13 ||
yo vā śṛṇoti puruṣo.apyatha vā smaredvā haimāśvadānamabhinaṃdati dīyamānam ||
so.api prayāti hatakalmaṣaśuddhadehaḥ sthānaṃ puraṃdaramahe śvaralokajuṣṭam || 14 || ||
iti śrībhaviṣye mahāpurāṇa uttaraparvaṇi śrīkṛṣṇayudhiṣṭhirasaṃvāde hiraṇyāśvadānavidhivarṇanaṃ nāma ṣaḍaśītyuttaraśatata mo.adhyāyaḥ || 186 || cha||
hiraṇyāśvarathadānavidhivarṇanam
|| śrīkṛṣṇa uvāca || ||
athātaḥ saṃpravakṣyāmi tava pāṃḍukulodvaha ||
puṇyaṃ hemarathaṃ nāma mahāpātakanāśanam || 1 ||
puṇye.ahni viprakathite svanulipte gṛhāṃgaṇe ||
kṛṣṇājinatilānkṛtvā kāṃcanaṃ sthāpayedratham || 2 ||
caturasraṃ mahābhāga catuścakraṃ sakūbaram ||
brahmāṇamagrataḥ kṛtvā gṛhītapragrahaṃ śubham || 3 ||
iṃdranīlena kuṃbhena dhvajarūpeṇa saṃyutam ||
lokapālāṣṭakopetaṃ padmarāgadalānvitam || 4 ||
catvāraḥ pūrṇakalaśā dhānyānyaṣṭādaśaiva tu ||
kauśeyavastrasaṃvītamupariṣṭādvitānakam || 5 ||
madhye tu phalasaṃyuktaṃ puruṣeṇa samanvitam ||
yogayuktaḥ pumānkāryastaṃ ca tatrādhivāsayet || 6 ||
evaṃvidhaṃ pūjayitvā mālyagaṃdhānulepanaiḥ ||
cakrarakṣāvubhau tasya kāryau viśvakumārakau || 7 ||
puṇyaṃ kālaṃ tataḥ prāpya snātaḥ saṃpūjya devatāḥ ||
triḥpradakṣiṇamāvṛtya gṛhītakusumāṃjaliḥ || 6 ||
śuklamālyāṃbaradhara imaṃ maṃtramudīrayet || 9 ||
namonamaḥ pāpavināśanāya viśvātmane devaturaṃgamāya ||
dhātrāmadhīśāya bhavābhavāya rathasya dānānmama dehi śāṃtim || 4.187.10 || vasvaṣṭakādityamarudgaṇānāṃ tvameva dhātā paramaṃ nidhānam ||
yatastato me hṛdayaṃ prayātu dharmaikatānatvamaghaughanāśāt || 11 ||
iti turagarathapradānametadbhavabhayasūdanamaṃtraṃ yaḥ karoti ||
sakaluṣapaṭalairvimuktadehaḥ paramamupaiti padaṃ pinākapāṇeḥ || 12 ||
dedīpyamānavapuṣā ca jitaprabhāvamākramya maḍalamakhaṃḍalacaṃḍabhānoḥ || siddhāṃganānayanayugmaprani pīyamānavaktrāṃbujeṃ.abujabhavena ciraṃ sahāste || 13 ||
iti paṭhati śṛṇoti vā ya etatkanakaturaṃgarathapradānamasmin ||
na sa narakapuraṃ vrajetkadācinnarakariporbhavanaṃ prayāti bhūyaḥ || 14 || ||
iti śrībhaviṣye mahāpurāṇa uttaraparvaṇi śrīkṛṣṇayudhiṣṭhirasaṃvāde hiraṇyāśvarathadānavidhivarṇanaṃ nāma saptāśītyuttaraśatatamo.adhyāyaḥ || 187 || cha ||
kṛṣṇājinadānavidhivarṇanam
|| yudhiṣṭhira uvāca || ||
kṛṣṇājinapradānasya vidhikālaṃ mamānagha ||
brāhmaṇaṃ ca samācakṣva tatra me saṃśayo mahān || 1 ||
śrīkṛṣṇa uvāca || ||
yugādiṣūparāgeṣu saṃkrāṃtau dinasaṃkṣaye ||
māghyāṃ vā grahapīḍāsu duḥsvapnādbhutadarśane || 2 ||
deyametanmahādānaṃ dravyamātrāgame tathā ||
āhitāgnirdvijo yaśca vedavedāṃgapāragaḥ || 3 ||
purāṇābhirato dakṣo deyaṃ tasmai ca pārthiva ||
yathā yena vidhānena tanme nigadataḥ śṛṇu || 4 ||
gomayenopalipte tu śucau deśe narādhipa ||
ādāveva samāstīrya śobhitaṃ vastramāvikam || 5 ||
kartavyaṃ rukmaśṛṃgaṃ tadraupyadaṃtaṃ tathaiva ca ||
muktādāmnā tu lāṃgūlaṃ tilacchannaṃ tathaiva ca || 6 ||
tilaiḥ kṛtvā śiro rājanvāsasācchādayedbudhaḥ ||
suvarṇenābhitaḥ kuryādalaṃkuryādviśeṣataḥ || 7 ||
puṣpairgaṃdhaiḥ phalaiścaiva naivedyena ca pūjayet ||
ratnairevaṃ yathāśaktyā tasya dikṣu ca vinyaset |||| || 8 ||
kāṃsyapātrāṇi catvāri teṣu dadyādyathākramam ||
ghṛtaṃ kṣīraṃ dadhi kṣaudramevaṃ dattvā yathāvidhi || 9 ||
tataḥ sarvasamīpe tu maṃtrametamudīrayet ||
kṛṣṇaḥ kṛṣṇamalo deva kṛṣṇājinavarastathā || 4.188.10 ||
tvaddānāpāstapāpasya prīyatāṃ me namonamaḥ ||
trayastriṃśatsurāṇāṃ ca ādhāre tvaṃ vyavasthitaḥ || 11 ||
kṛṣṇo.asi mūrtimānsākṣātkṛṣṇājina namo.astu te ||
evaṃ pradakṣiṇīkṛtya praṇipatya punaḥ punaḥ || 12 ||
tatpratigrāhakaṃ vipraṃ vedavedāṃgapāragam ||
snātaṃ vastrayugācchannaṃ svaśaktyā vāpyalaṃkṛtam || 13 ||
pratigrahaśca tasyoktaḥ puccha deśe svayaṃbhuvā ||
pratigrahapradagdhasya viprasya ca sa bhārata || 14 ||
na paśyedvadanaṃ paścānna cainamabhibhāṣayet ||
anena vidhinā dattvā yathāvatkṛṣṇamārgaṇam || 15 ||
samagraṃ bhūmidānasya phalaṃ prāpnoti mānavaḥ ||
kṛṣṇājinatilānkṛtvā hiraṇyaṃ madhusarpiṣī || 16 ||
ye prayacchaṃti viprāya na te śocyā bhavaṃti vai ||
sarvā~mllokāṃścaraṃtyeva kāmacārā viyadgatāḥ || 17 ||
ābhūtasaṃplavaṃ yāvatsvargaṃ prāptā na saṃśayaḥ ||
kṛṣṇājinasamaṃ dānaṃ na cāsti bhuvanatraye || 18 ||
pratigrahopi pāpīyāniti vedavido viduḥ ||
avasthātritaye yacca tridhā yatsamupārjitam || 19 ||
tatsarvaṃ nāśamāyāti dattvā kṛṣṇājinaṃ kṣaṇāt || 4.188.20 ||
kṛṣṇekṣaṇaṃ kṛṣṇamṛgasya carma dattvā dvijedrāya samāhitātmā ||
yathoktametanmaraṇaṃ na śocetprāpnotyabhīṣṭaṃ manasaḥ phalaṃ yat || 21 || ||
iti śrībhaviṣye mahāpurāṇa uttaraparvaṇi śrīkṛṣṇayudhiṣṭhirasaṃvāde kṛṣṇājinadānavidhivratavarṇanaṃ nāmāṣṭāśī tyuttaraśatatamo.adhyāyaḥ || 188 || cha ||
hemahastidānavidhivarṇanam
|| śrīkṛṣṇa uvāca || ||
kathayiṣye mahārāja hemahastirathaṃ tava ||
yasya pradānādbhavanaṃ vaiṣṇavaṃ yāti mānavaḥ || 1 ||
parvakālaṃ samāsādya saṃkrāṃtau grahaṇe.api vā ||
kuryāddevarathākāraṃ rathaṃ maṇivibhūṣitam || 2 ||
valabhībhirvicitrābhiścatuścakrasamanvitam||
caturbhirhemamātaṃgairyuktaṃ hemavibhūṣitam || 3 ||
dhvaje ca garuḍaṃ kuryātkūbarāgre vināyakam ||
lokapālāṣṭakopetaṃ brahmārkaśivasaṃyutam || 4 ||
madhye nārāyaṇopetaṃ lakṣmīpuṣṭisamanvitam ||
kṛṣṇājinatiladroṇaṃ kṛtvā taṃ sthāpayedratham || 5 || nānāphalasamāyuktamupariṣṭādvitānakam||
kauśeyavastrasaṃvītamamlānakusumārcitam || 6 ||
kuryātpaṃcapalādūrdhvamāśatācca narottama ||
tataḥ snātvā samabhyarcya pitṛrndevānyathāvidhi || 7 ||
triḥpradakṣiṇamāvṛtya gṛhītakusumāṃjaliḥ ||
imamuccārayenmaṃtraṃ sarvasaukhyapradāyakam || 8 ||
namonamaḥ śaṃkarapadmajārkalokeśavidyādharavāsudevaiḥ ||
tvaṃ sevyase vedapurāṇayajñaistejo hi naḥ syaṃdana pāhi tasmāt || 9 ||
yattatpadaṃ paramaguhyatamaṃ purāṇamānaṃdahetugaṇarūpavimuktabandhāḥ ||
yogaikamānasadṛśo munayaḥ samādhau paśyaṃti tattvamasi nātha ratheti rūḍhaḥ || 4.189.10 || yasmāttvameva bhavasāgarasaṃplutānāmānaṃdabhāṃḍacitamadhyagapānapātram ||
tasmādaghaughaśamanena kuru prasādaṃ cāmīkarebharatha mādhava saṃpradānāt || 11 ||
itthaṃ praṇamya kanakebharathapradānaṃ yaḥ kārayetsakalapāpavimuktadehaḥ ||
vidyādharāmaramunīṃdragaṇābhijuṣṭaṃ prāpnotyasau padamatīṃdriyamiṃdumauleḥ || 12 || kṛtaduritavitānātuṣṭisadvahnipālavyatikarakṛtadehodvegabhāno.api baṃdhūn||
nayati ca pitṛpautrānrauravādapyaśeṣātkṛtagajarathadānaḥ śāśvataṃ sadma viṣṇoḥ || 13 || || iti śrībhaviṣye mahāpurāṇa uttaraparvaṇi śrīkṛṣṇayudhiṣṭhirasaṃvāde hemahastirathadānavidhivarṇanaṃ nāmaikonanavatyuttaraśatatamo.adhyāyaḥ || 189 || cha ||
viśvacakradānavidhivarṇanam
|| śrīkṛṣṇa uvāca || ||
punareva pravakṣyāmi dānamatyadbhutaṃ tava ||
viśvacakramiti khyātaṃ sarvapāpavināśanam || 1 ||
tapanīyasya śuddhasya viśuddhātmātha kārayet ||
śreṣṭhaṃ palasahasreṇa tadardhena tu madhyamam || ||2||
tasyāpyarddhaṃ kaniṣṭhaṃ syādviśvacakramudāhṛtam ||
tathā viṃśatpalādūrdhvamaśakto.api nivedayet || 3 ||
ṣoḍaśāraṃ tataścakraṃ bhramannemyaṣṭakāvṛtam ||
nābhipadmesthitaṃ viṣṇuṃ yogārūḍhaṃ caturbhujam || 4 ||
śaṃkhacakre.asya pārśvasthe devyaṣṭakasamāvṛtam ||
dvitīyāvaraṇe tadvatpūrvato jalaśāyinam|| 5 ||
atrirbhṛgurvaśiṣṭhaśca brahmā kaśyapa eva ca ||
matsyaḥ kūrmo varāhaśca nārasiṃhotha vāmanaḥ ||6||
rāmo rāmaśca kṛṣṇaśca buddhaḥ kalkī ca te daśa ||
tṛtīyāvaraṇe gaurī manubhirvasurbhiryutā || 7 ||
caturthe dvādaśādityā vedāścatvāra eva ca ||
pañcame pañca bhūtāni rudrāścaikādaśaiva tu ||8||
lokapālāṣṭakaṃ ṣaṣṭhe diṅmātaṃgāstathaiva ca ||
saptame.astrāṇi sarvāṇi maṃgalāni ca kārayet || 9 ||
antarāṃtarato devānvinyasedaṣṭame punaḥ ||
daśahastaṃ tataḥ kṛtvā patākātoraṇānvitam || 4.190.10 ||
maṃḍapaṃ kuṇḍamekaṃ ca kārayedvastrasaṃyutam ||
caturhastā bhavedvedī madhye tasyāstato nyaset || 11 ||
kṛṣṇājinoparigataṃ viśvacakraṃ vidhānataḥ ||
tathāṣṭādaśadhānyāni rasāśca lavaṇādayaḥ || 12 ||
pūrṇakumbhāṣṭakaṃ tadvadvastramālyavibhūṣitam ||
phalāni dāpayetpārśve pañcavarṇavitānakam || 13 ||
adhivāsya tataścakraṃ paścāddhomaṃ samācaret ||
cātuścaraṇikāṃstatra brāhmaṇāṃścaturotha vā ||14||
homaṃ kuryurjitātmāno vastrābharaṇabhūṣitāḥ ||
homadravyasamopetāḥ sruksruvaistāmrabhājanaiḥ || 15 ||
cakrapratiṣṭhitānāṃ tu surāṇāṃ homa iṣyate ||.
talliṃgairjuhuyānmantraiḥ sarvopadravaśāṃtaye || 16 ||
tato maṃgalaśabdena snātaḥ śuklāṃbaro gṛhī ||
homādhivāsanāṃte tu gṛhītakusumāṃjaliḥ || 17 ||
imamuccārayanmaṃtraṃ kṛtvā tattriḥpradakṣiṇam ||
namo viśvaṃbharāyeti viśvacakrātmane namaḥ ||
paramānaṃdarūpī tvaṃ pāhi naḥ pāpakardamāt || 18 ||
tejomayamidaṃ yasmātsadā paśyaṃti sūrayaḥ||
hṛdi tatra guṇātītaṃ viśvacakraṃ namāmyaham || 19 ||
vāsudeve sthitaṃ cakraṃ tasya madhye tu mādhavaḥ ||
anyonyādhārarūpeṇa praṇamāmi sthitāviha || || 4.190.20 ||
viśvacakramidaṃ yasmātsarvapāpaharaṃ hareḥ ||
āyudhaṃ cādhivāsaśca tasmācchāntiṃ dadātu me || 24 ||
ityāmaṃtrya ca yo dadyādviśvacakraṃ vimatsaraḥ ||
vimuktaḥ sarvapāpebhyo viṣṇuloke mahīyate || 22 ||
vaikuṇṭhalokamāsādya caturbāhunarāvṛtam ||
sevyate.apsarasāṃ saṃghaistiṣṭhetkalpaśatatrayam || 23 ||
praṇamedvātha yaḥ kṛtvā viśvacakraṃ dinedine ||
tasyāyurvarddhate dīrghaṃ lakṣmīstu vipulā bhavet || 24 ||
tasmāccakraṃ sadā kāryaṃ dhāryaṃ ca svagṛhe naraiḥ ||
kāṃcanaṃ vātha raupyaṃ vā tadabhāve.atha tāmrajam || 25 ||
iti sakalajagatsurādhivāsaṃ vitarati yastapanīyaṣoḍaśāram ||
haribhuvanagataḥ sa siddhasaṃghaiściramadhigamya namasyate.apsarobhiḥ || 26 ||
atha sudarśanatāṃ prayāti śatrormadanasudarśanatāṃ ca kāminībhyaḥ ||
sa sudarśanakeśavānurūpaḥ kanakasudarśanadānadagdhapāpaḥ || 27 ||
kṛtagurudurito.api ṣoḍaśārapravitaraṇātpravarākṛtirmurāreḥ||
abhibhavati bhavodbhavāni bhittvā bhavamabhito bhavane bhavāni bhūyaḥ || 28 || ||
iti śrībhaviṣye mahāpurāṇa uttaraparvaṇi śrīkṛṣṇayudhiṣṭhirasaṃvāde viśvacakradānavidhivarṇanaṃ nāma navatyuttaraśatatamo .adhyāyaḥ ||190|| |||9||
bhuvanapratiṣṭhāvarṇanam
|| yudhiṣṭhira uvāca || ||
pratiṣṭhā śāśvatī kena dānena madhusūdana ||
iha loke pare caiva kīrtiratyadbhutā tathā ||1||
sadgatiṃ ca tathā yāṃti sarve pitṛpitāmahāḥ ||
saṃtatiścākṣayā loke vibhavaścāpi puṣkalaḥ ||2||
sthāpanātsarvadevānāṃ kathaṃ syādyadunaṃdana ||
tadācakṣva mahābhāga dānena niyamena vā || 3 ||
|| śrīkṛṣṇa uvāca || ||
sādhu pṛṣṭaṃ tvayā rāja~mllokānāmupakārakam ||
śṛṇuṣvaikamanā bhūtvā guhyaṃ paramamuttamam|| ||4||
bhuvanānāṃ samāsena pratiṣṭhāṃ kathayāmi te ||
devāsurāstathā nāgā gaṃdharvā yakṣarākṣasāḥ ||5||
pretāḥ piśācā bhūtāśca sthāpitāḥ syurna saṃśayaḥ||
kārakasyānukūle tu muhūrte vijaye śubhe ||6||
puṇye tithau śivakṣetre dine saumyagrahānvite ||
sapta hastaṃ paṭaṃ kṛtvā caturasraṃ susaṃhatam ||7||
abhinnāṃgaṃ dṛḍhaṃ śuddhaṃ śuddhasphaṭikavarcasam ||
tasminsarvāṇi rājeṃdra bhuvanāni ca lekhayet || 8 ||
cāturvarṇyakamānīya vicitraṃ citrakarmaṇi ||
yuvānaṃ vyādhirahitaṃ bhavyaṃ citrakaraṃ śubham || 9 ||
saṃpūjayitvā yatnena divyavāsovibhūṣaṇaiḥ ||
tasminkarmaṇi yuṃjīta paṭhyamānairdvijottamaiḥ || 4.191.10 ||
śaṃkhabherīninādaiśca gītamaṃgalanisvanaiḥ ||
puṇyāhajayaghoṣaiśca brāhmaṇānpūjyettataḥ || 11 ||
ācāryamapi saṃpūjya vāsobhirbhūṣaṇaistathā ||
prāraṃbhaṃ kārayedrājanpaṭe tasminyathoditam || 12 ||
madhye ca lekhayedrājañjaṃbūdvīpaṃ savistaram ||
tasya madhye sthito merurmerorupari devatāḥ ||13||
diśāsu lokapālānāṃ puro.aṣṭau surasaṃyutāḥ ||
saptadvīpavatī pṛthvī sapta caiva kulācalāḥ || 14 ||
sāgarāḥ sapta cātraiva nadyo hradāḥ sarāṃsi ca ||
pātālāḥ sapta cātraiva sapta svargavibhūtayaḥ || 15 ||
brahmaviṣṇuśivādīnāṃ bhuvanāni yathākramam ||
dhruvamārgastathādityo grahatārāgaṇairyutaḥ || 16 ||
devadānavagandharvā yakṣa rākṣasapannagāḥ ||
ṛṣayo munayo gāvo devamātara eva ca ||17||
suparṇādyāśca vihagā nāgāścairāvatādayaḥ ||
diggajāṣṭakamatraiva lekhayenmadamaṃḍitam || || 18 ||
evaṃvidhaṃ paṭaṃ rājankārayitvā suśobhanam ||
daśottareṇa payasā etatsarvasamāvṛtam || 19 ||
tattejasā vṛtaṃ bhūyo mahatogreṇa sarvataḥ ||
tejastadvāyunā vāyurākāśena samāvṛtaḥ || 4.191.20 ||
bhūtādinā tathākāśaṃ bhūtādirmahatā tathā ||
avyaktena mahāṃścaiva vyāpto vai śuddhilakṣaṇaḥ || 21 ||
avyaktaṃ tamasā vyāptaṃ tamaśca rajasā tathā ||
rajaḥ sattvena saṃvyāptaṃ tridhā prakṛtirucyate || 22 ||
evamāvaraṇopetaṃ brahmāṃḍamakhilaṃ nṛpa ||
puruṣeṇāvṛtaṃ sarvaṃ sabāhyābhyaṃtaraṃ tathā || 23 ||
etatsarvaṃ paṭasthaṃ tu kṛtvā citramayaṃ sudhīḥ ||
kārtikyāmayane caiva viṣuve grahaṇe.api vā || 24 ||
pūjayedyena vidhinā tatsamāsena me śṛṇu ||
purato maṃḍapaṃ tasya vicitraṃ kārayedbudhaḥ || 25 ||
tatra kuṇḍāni catvāri caturasrāṇi kārayet ||
dvaudvau niyojayetteṣu brāhmaṇau vedapāragau || 26 ||
yajñopakaraṇopetau vastrābharaṇabhūṣitau ||
homaṃ kuryurjitātmāno mauninaḥ sarva eva te || 27 ||
paṭe sthitānāṃ devānāṃ maṃtrairoṃkārapūrvakaiḥ ||
yajamānastataḥ snātaḥ sarvālaṃkārabhūṣitaḥ || 28 ||
ācāryeṇasamaṃ kuryātpūjāmagre paṭasya tu ||
puṣpairvastraiḥ samabhyarcya maṃtrametamudīrayet || 29 ||
brahmāṃḍodaravartīni bhuvanāni caturdaśa ||
tāni saṃnihitānyatra pūjitāni bhavaṃtu me || 4.191.30 ||
brahmā viṣṇustathā rudro hyādityā vasavastathā ||
pūjitāḥ supratiṣṭhāśca bhavaṃtu satataṃ mama || 31 ||
evaṃ paṭaṃ taṃ saṃpūjya kṛtvā caiva pradakṣiṇam ||
bhakṣyānnānāvidhāṃścaiva naivedyaṃ tatra dāpayet || 32 ||
śaṃkhatūryaninādaiśca jāgaraṃ kārayettataḥ||
brahmaghoṣaivicitraiśca gītamaṃgalanisvanaiḥ || 33 ||
punaḥ prabhāte vimale snātvā śuciralaṃkṛtaḥ ||
pūrvoktavidhinānena punaḥ saṃpūjya taṃ paṭam || 34 ||
ṛtvikpūjāṃ tataḥ kṛtvā gośatena vicakṣaṇaḥ ||
athavā goyugaṃ dadyādekaika syātyalaṃkṛtam || 35 ||
upānahau tathā chatraṃ gṛhopakaraṇāni ca ||
yadyadiṣṭatamaṃ kiṃcitsarvaṃ dadyādvicakṣaṇaḥ || 36 ||
tataḥ prakalpayedyānaṃ nāgayuktamalaṃkṛtam ||
alābhe vājisaṃyuktaṃ patākādhvajaśālinam ||37||
sahasraṃ dakṣiṇāṃ dattvā tatastvāropayetpaṭam ||
brāhmaṇaṃ vā rathenātha nayeddevālayaṃ budhaḥ || 38 ||
tatrasthaṃ sthāpayennītvā gandhaiḥ puṣpaiśca dhūpayet ||
tatrāpi dadayānnaivedyaṃ kuryāccāpi mahotsavam || 39 ||
yasminnāyatane tasya pratiṣṭhā kriyate nṛpa ||
pūjā tatrāpi mahatī kartavyā bhūtimicchatā || 4.191.40 |||
caṃdrātapatraṃ ghaṇṭāṃ ca dhvajādyaṃ dāpayetsudhīḥ ||
yathāśaktyā ca rājendra guruṃ gauravayaṃtritaḥ || 41 ||
abhyarcya dakṣiṇābhiśca brāhmaṇāṃśca visarjayet ||.a
dīnāṃdhakṛpaṇānāṃ ca bhojanaṃ cāpyavāritam || 42 ||
tasminnahani dātavyaṃ mitrasvajanabaṃdhuṣu ||
anena vidhinā yastu śraddadhāno jitendriyaḥ |||| || 43 ||
kuryānnaro vā nārī vā pratiṣṭhāṃ sārvalaukikīm ||
sthāpitaṃ tu bhavettena trailokyaṃ sacarācaram || 44 ||
kulaṃ ca tāritaṃ tena satputreṇa yudhiṣṭhira ||
yāvacca devatāgāre paṭastiṣṭhati pūjitaḥ || 45 ||
tāvadasyākṣayā kīrtistrailokye saṃprasarpati ||
dānena kīrtiryāvaṃti martyalokeṣu gīyate || 46 ||
tāvadvarṣasahasrāṇi svargaloke mahīyate ||
gandharvairgīyamānastu apsarogaṇasevitaḥ || 47 ||
vaseddhṛṣṭamanāḥ svarge yāvadiṃdrāścatu rdaśa ||
puṇyakṣayādihābhyetya rājā bhavati dhārmikaḥ || 48 ||
putrapautrānvitaḥ śrīmāndīrghāyuratidhārmikaḥ ||
daśa janmāni rājendra jāyamānaḥ punaḥ punaḥ || 49 ||
śrūyate ca purā rājā rajirnāma mahābalaḥ ||
