cakravartī dṛḍhamatirjitārirvijiteṃdriyaḥ || 4.191.50 ||
mahī yena purā dattā devarājasya saṃgare ||
jitvā daityabalaṃ sarvaṃ dattavāṃstridivaṃ punaḥ || 51 ||
mahendrāya mahābhāga sarvaṃ nihatakaṃṭakam ||
sa kadācitsabhāmadhye yāvadāste mahī patiḥ || 52 ||
tāvattatrājagāmātha pulastyo brahmaṇaḥ sutaḥ||
śiṣyaiḥ parivṛtaḥ śrīmānvedavedāṃgapāragaiḥ || 53 ||
dattārghastu tadā tena upaviṣṭo varāsane || (pāṭhā. dattārdhastu)
śuśubhe parayā lakṣmyā pitāmaha ivāparaḥ || 54 ||
atha taṃ pūjayitvāgre madhuparkeṇa pārthivaḥ ||
papraccha vinayopetaḥ kathāmātmodbhavāṃ nṛpaḥ || 55 ||
bhagavankena dānena tapasā niyamena vā ||
śrīriyaṃ mama dharmajña tejaścāvyāhataṃ bhuvi || 56 ||
balaṃ puṣṭiṃ dhanaṃ dhānyaṃ putrapautraṃ tathottamam ||
etanme sarvamācakṣva sarvajño.asi dvijottama || 57 ||
|| pulastya uvāca || ||
śṛṇu rājankathāmetāmātmīyāṃ sumanoharām ||
kathyamānāṃ mayā samyaksaptame tava janmani || 58 ||
katheyamabhinirvṛttā śṛṇuṣvaiśvaryavarddhinīm ||
āsīstvaṃ vaiśyajātīyo vārāṇasyāṃ narottama || || 59 ||
bahubhṛtyaparīvāro dhanadhānyasamanvitaḥ ||
dhārmikaḥ satyanirato vaṇigdharmarataḥ sadā || 4.191.60 ||
tatra tvayā śrutā dharmā dharmākhyānagatena vai||
dānāśrayā bahuvidhā vratāni vividhāni ca || 61 ||
prasaṃgena kadācicca pratiṣṭhā bhauvanī tvayā ||
śrutā rājendra vidhivatkṛtā ca vahupuṇyadā || || 62 ||
phalena tena jāto.asi sapta janmāni bhūpatiḥ ||
kīrtiste prathitā loke valaṃ cāpi mahattava || 63 ||
aparāṇyapi janmāni sapta rājā bhaviṣyasi ||
paścādyogikule bhūtvā nirvāṇaṃ samavāpsyasi || 64 ||
etatte sarvamākhyātaṃ yanmāṃ paripṛcchasi ||
nārī vā puruṣo vāpi pratiṣṭhāṃ bhauvanīṃ tu yaḥ || 65 ||
prakaroti vidhānena kṛtakṛtyo bhavedbudhaḥ ||
ityuktvā sa munistatra rājānaṃ śaṃsitavrataḥ ||66||
yayāvadarśanaṃ tatra sūrye vaiśvānaropamaḥ || 67 ||
dharmaṃ vivarddhayati kīrtiṃ śatāni dhatte kāmaṃ prasādhayati pāpamapākaroti ||
khyātā mayeyamadhunā tava dānaniṣṭhā tannāsti yanna kurute bhuvanapratiṣṭhā ||68||
iti śrībhaviṣye mahāpurāṇa uttaraparvaṇi śrīkṛṣṇayudhiṣṭhirasaṃvāde bhuvanapratiṣṭhāvarṇanaṃ nāmaikanavatyuttaraśatatamo.adhyāyaḥ || 191 || ||
nakṣatradānavidhivarṇanam
|| yudhiṣṭhira uvāca || ||
śruto dānavidhiḥ sarvaḥ prasādātte ramādhava ||
nakṣatradānasyedānī dānakalpaṃ pracakṣva me || 1 ||
|| śrīkṛṣṇa uvāca ||
atrāpyudāharaṃtīmamitihāsaṃ purātanam ||
devakyāścaiva saṃvādaṃ devarṣernāradasya ca || 2 ||
dvārakāmanusaṃjātaṃ nāradaṃ devadarśanam ||
papracchedaṃ tathā praśnaṃ devakī dharmadarśinī || 3 ||
tasyāḥ saṃpṛcchamānāyā devarṣirnāradastataḥ ||
ācaṣṭa vidhivatsarvaṃ yattacchṛṇu viśāṃpate || 4 ||
nakṣatrayogaṃ vakṣyāmi sarvapātakanāśanam ||
kṛttikāsu mahābhāga pāyasena sasarpiṣā || 5 ||
saṃtarpya brāhmaṇānsādhū~mllokānprāpnotyanuttamān ||
rohiṇyāṃ pāṃḍavaśreṣṭha māṃsairannena sarpiṣā || 6 ||
saṃtarpya brāhmaṇānsādhū~mllokānprāpnotyanuttamān ||
payo.a.annadānaṃ dātavyamānṛṇyārthaṃ dvijātaye || 7 ||
dogdhnīṃ savatsāṃ tu naro nakṣatre somadaivate ||
dattvā divyavimānasthaḥ svargaṃ prāpnotyanuttamam || 8 ||
ārdrāyāṃ kṛśarāṃ dattvā tilamiśrā samāhitaḥ ||
narastarati durgāṇi sarvāṇyeva narottama || 9 ||
pūṣānpunarvasau dattvā ghṛtapūrṇānsupācitān ||
yaśasvī rūpasaṃpannaḥ sajjano jāyate kule || 4.192.10 ||
puṣye tu kāṃcanaṃ dattvā kṛtaṃ vākṛtameva vā ||
anālokeṣu lokeṣu somavatsa virājate ||11||
āśleṣāsu tathā raupyaṃ yaḥ surūpaṃ prayacchati ||
sarvabhayavinirmuktaḥ śāstravānabhijāyate || 12 ||
maghāsu tilapūrṇāni vardhamānāni mānavaḥ ||
pradāya paśumāṃścaiva putravāṃśca prajāyate ||13||
phālgunīpūrvasamaye vaḍavāṃ dvijapuṃgave ||
dattvā puṇyakṛtāṃllokānprāpnoti surasevitān || 14 ||
uttarāphālgunīyoge dattvā sauvarṇapaṃkajam ||
sūryalokamavāpnoti sarvabādhāvivarjitaḥ || 15 ||
haste tu hastinaṃ dattvā kāṃcanaṃ śaktitaḥ kṛtam ||
yātyasau śakrasadanaṃ varavāraṇadhūrgataḥ || 16 ||
citrāsu vṛṣabhaṃ dattvā puṇyānāṃ puṇyamuttamam ||
caratyapsarasāṃ loke modate naṃdanevane || 17 ||
svātīṣu ca dhanaṃ dattvā yadabhīṣṭamihātmanaḥ ||
prāpnoti ca śubhāṃllokāniha loke mahadyaśaḥ || 18 ||
viśākhāsu mahārāja dhuraṃdharavibhūṣitam ||
sopaskaraṃ ca śakaṭaṃ sadhānyaṃ vastrasaṃvṛtam || 19 ||
dattvā prīṇāti sa pituḥ pretya cānantyamaśnute ||
na ca durgāṇyavāpnoti rauravādīni mānavaḥ || 4.192.20 ||
dattvā yatheṣṭaṃ viprebhyo gatimiṣṭāṃ sa gacchati ||
kambalānyanurādhakṣeṃ dattvā prāvaraṇāni ca || 21 ||
svarge varṣaśataṃ sāgramāste suragaṇairvṛtaḥ ||
kālaśākaṃ ca viprebhyo dattvā martyaḥ samūlakam || 22 ||
jyeṣṭhānujyeṣṭhatāmeti gatimiṣṭāṃ ca gacchati ||
mūle mūlaphalaṃ dattvā brāhmaṇebhyaḥ samāhitaḥ || 23 ||
pitṛrnprīṇayate sarvāngatiṃ prāpnotyanuttamām ||
atha pūrvāsvaṣāḍhāsu dadhipātrāṇi mānavaḥ || 24 ||
kulavṛttopasampanne brāhmaṇe vedapārage ||
pradāya jāyate pretya kule ca bahubhogavān || 25 ||
putrapautraiḥ parivṛtaḥ paśumāndhanavāṃstathā ||
udamaṃthaṃ sasarpiṣkaṃ prabhūtamadhuphāṇitam || 26 ||
dattvottarāsvaṣāḍhāsu sarvānkāmānavāpnuyāt||
dugdhaṃ tvabhijito bhāge
dattvā ghṛtamadhuplutam || 27 ||
dharmanityo manīṣibhyaḥ svarge vasati puṇyabhāk ||
śravaṇe pustakaṃ śreṣṭhaṃ pradadātīha yo naraḥ || 28 ||
svecchayā yāti yānena sarvāṃllokānna saṃśayaḥ ||
goyugaṃ ca dhaniṣṭhāsu dattvā viprāya mānavaḥ || 29 ||
sarvatra mānamāpnoti yatra yatreha jāyate ||
tathā śatabhiṣāyoge dattvā sāgaru caṃdanam || 4.192.30 ||
prāpnotyapsarasāṃ loke pretya gaṃdhāṃśca śobhanān ||
pūrvabhādrapadāyoge rājamāṣānpradāpayet || 31 ||
sarvabhakṣaphalopetaḥ sa vai pretya sukhī bhavet ||
ratnamuttarayoge tu suvastraṃ yaḥ prayacchati ||32||
pitṛrnprīṇāti sakalānpretya cānaṃtyamaśnute ||
kāṃsyopadohanāṃ dhenuṃ revatyāṃ yaḥ prayacchati || 33 ||
sa pretya kāmānādāya dātāramupagacchati ||
rathamaśvasamāyuktaṃ dattvāśvinyāṃ narottama || 34 ||
hastyaśvarathasaṃpūrṇe varcasvī jāyate kule ||
bharaṇīṣu dvijātibhyastiladhenuṃ pradāya vai || 35 ||
gāvaḥ prabhūtāḥ prāpnoti naraḥ pretya yaśastathā ||
ityeṣa dakṣiṇoddeśaḥ prokto nakṣatrayogataḥ || 36 ||
devakyai nāradenaiva mayā ca kathitastava ||
sarvapāpapraśamanaḥ sarvopadravanāśanaḥ || 37 ||
na cātra kālaniyamo nakṣatraprakamastathā ||
vittaṃ śraddhā ca rājendra kāraṇaṃ cātra kathyate || 38 ||
yadyacca te bhagavatā kamalodbhavasya putreṇa dānamuditaṃ prasamīkṣya vedān||

tadyo dadāti vibhave sati sādhuvṛtte kiṃ tena pārtha na kṛtaṃ bhavatīha loke || 39 || iti śrībhaviṣye mahāpurāṇa uttaraparvaṇi śrīkṛṣṇayudhiṣṭhirasaṃvāde nakṣatradānavidhivarṇanaṃnāma dvinavatyuttaraśatatamo.adhyāyaḥ || 192 || cha ||
tithidānavarṇanam
|| śrīkṛṣṇa uvāca || ||
tithidānamidānīṃ te kathayāmi yudhiṣṭhira ||
sarvapāpapraśamanaṃ sarvavighnavināśanam ||1||
mānasaṃ vācikaṃ cāpi karmajaṃ yadaghaṃ bhavet ||
sarvaṃ praśamamāyāti dānenānena pāṃḍava ||2||
śrāvaṇe kārtike caitre vaiśākhe phālgune tathā ||
sitapakṣātprabhṛtyeva dātavyaṃ puṇyavarddhanam || 3 ||
vittaṃ śraddhāsahāyaśca pātraprāptistathaiva ca ||
dānakālaḥ sadaiveha kathitastattvadarśibhiḥ || 4 ||
tīrthe devālaye goṣṭhe gṛhe vā niyatātmavān ||
yaddadāti naraśreṣṭhastadānaṃtyāya kalpate ||5||
pratipatsu dvijānpūjyapta pūjayitvā prajāpatim||
sauvarṇamaravindaṃ ca kārayitvāṣṭapatrakam || 6 ||
kṛtvā caudumbare pātre sugandhavṛtapūrite ||
puṣpairdhūpaiḥ pūjayitvā viprāya pratipāda yet ||7||
anena vidhinā dattvā kamalaṃ kamalālayam ||
īpsitāṃllabhate kāmānniṣkāmo brahmasātmyatām ||8||
vahniṃ pūjya dvitīyāyāṃ bhūrbhuvaḥsvariti kramāt ||
tilājyena śataṃ hutvā dattvā pūrṇāhutiṃ tataḥ ||9||
vaiśvānaraṃ tu sauvarṇaṃ sthāpayettāmrabhājane ||
guḍājyapūrite rājaṃstoyapūrṇaghaṭopari ||4.193.1 0||
pūjayitvā vastramālyairbhakṣyabhojyairanekadhā ||
tatastaṃ brāhmaṇe dadyādvahnirme prīyatāmiti ||1 1||
yāvajjīvakṛtātpāpānmucyate nātra saṃśayaḥ ||
mṛto vahni puraṃ yāti prāhedaṃ nārado muniḥ ||12||
tṛtīyāyāṃ mahārāja rādhāṃ svarṇamayīṃ śubhām ||
sthāpayitvā tāmrapātre lavaṇopari vinyaset ||13||
jīrakaṃ kaṭukaṃ caiva guḍaṃ pārtheṣu dāpayet ||
raktavastrayugacchannāṃ kuṃkumena vibhūṣitām || 14 ||
puṣpadhūpaiḥ sanaivedyaiḥ pūjayitvā dvijātaye ||
dattvā yatphalamāpnoti pārtha tatkena varṇyate || 15 ||
prāsādā yatra sauvarṇā nadyaḥ pāyasakardamāḥ||
gandharvāpsaraso yatra tatra te yāṃti mānavāḥ ||16||
svargādihaitya saṃsāre surūpaḥ subhago bhavet ||
dātā bhoktā bahudhanaḥ putrapautrasamanvitaḥ || 17 ||
nārī vā tadguṇairyuktā bhavatīha na saṃśayaḥ ||
caturthyāṃ vāraṇaṃ haimaṃ palādūrddhvaṃ suśobhanam || 18 ||
kāmayitvāṃkuśayutaṃ tiladroṇopari nyaset ||
vastraiḥ puṣpaiḥ pūjayitvā naiveyaṃ vinivedya ca || 19 ||
tatastu brāhmaṇe dadyādgaṇeśaḥ prīyatāmiti ||
kāryāraṃbheṣu sarveṣu tasya vighnaṃ na jāyate || 4.193.20 ||
vāraṇāḥ sapta janmāni bhavaṃti madavihvalāḥ ||
vāraṇendrasamārūḍhastrailokyavijayī bhavet || 21 ||
paṃcamyāṃ pannagaṃ caiva svarṇenaikena kārayet ||
kṣīrājyapatramadhyasthaṃ pūjayitvā pradāpayet || 22 ||
dvijaṃ saṃpūjya vāsobhiḥ praṇipatya kṣamāpayet ||
iha loke pare caiva dānametatsukhāvaham || 23 ||
nāgopadravavidrāvi sarvaduṣṭanibarhaṇam ||
prāyaścittaṃ tathā proktaṃ nāgadaṣṭasya śaṃbhunā || 24 ||
ṣaṣṭhyāṃ śaktisamopetaṃ kumāraṃ śikhivāhanam ||
kārayitvā yathāśaktyā hemamālāvibhūṣitam || 25 ||
taṃḍulenātha śikhare vāsobhiḥ pūjya bhaktitaḥ ||
ṣaṣṭhyāṃ skaṃdaṃ yathāśakti kṛtvā skaṃdaṃ hiraṇmayam || 26 ||
pūjayitvā gaṃdhapuṣpadhūpainaivedyatastathā ||
namaskṛtya tato dadyādbrāhmaṇāya kuṭuṃbine || 27 ||
iha bhūtiṃ parāṃ prāpya pretya svarge mahīyate ||
śūdro brāhmaṇatāmeti brāhmaṇo brahmalokatām || 28 ||
saptamyāṃ bhāskaraṃ pūjya brāhmaṇānaśvamuttamam ||
dadyādalaṃkṛtagrīvaṃ saparyāṇaṃ sadakṣiṇam || 29 ||
sūryalokamavāpnoti sūryeṇa saha modate ||
gaṃdharvāstuṣṭimāyāṃti datte.aśve samalaṃkṛte || 4.193.30 ||
aṣṭamyāṃ vṛṣabhaṃ śvetamavyaṃgāṃgaṃ dhuraṃdharam ||
sitavastrayugacchannaṃ ghaṃṭābharaṇabhūṣitam || 31 ||
dadyātpraṇamya viprāya prīyatāṃ vṛṣabhadhvajaḥ ||
pradakṣiṇaṃ tataḥ kṛtvā ādvārāṃtamanuvrajet || 32 ||
dānenānena nṛpate śivaloko na durlabhaḥ ||
vṛṣaskaṃdhe pratiṣṭhaṃti bhuvanāni caturdaśa || 33 ||
tasmādvṛṣabhadānena dattā bhavati bhāratī ||
navamyāṃ kāṃcanaṃ siṃhaṃ kārayitvā svaśaktitaḥ || 34 ||
muktāphalāṣṭakayutaṃ nīlavastrāvaguṇṭhitam ||
dadyāddevīmanusmṛtya duṣṭadaityanibarhaṇīm || 35 ||
dvijātipravarāyetthaṃ sarvānkāmānsamaśnute ||
kāṃtāravanadurgeṣu cauravyālā kule pathi || 36 ||
hiṃsakāstaṃ na hiṃsaṃti dānasyāsya prabhāvataḥ ||
mṛto devīpuraṃ yāti pūjyamānaḥ surāsuraiḥ || 37 ||
puṇyakṣayādihābhyetya rājā bhavati dhārmikaḥ ||
daśamyāṃ nṛpaśārdūla daśāśāḥ svarṇanirmitāḥ || 38 ||
lavaṇe ca guḍe kṣīre niṣpāveṣu tileṣu ca ||
gavyatraye taṃduleṣu māṣāṇā supari sthitāḥ || 39 ||
saṃpūjya vastrapuṣpādyairdvijāya pratipādayet ||
anena vidhinā yastu pumānstrī vātha vā punaḥ || 4.193.40 ||
nirvāpayati rājeṃdra tasya puṇyaphalaṃ śṛṇu ||
iha loke bhūpatiḥ syātpretya svarge mahīyate ||41||
sakalāstasya sarvāśā yāḥ kāścinmanasecchitāḥ ||
tataḥ svargādihābhyetya kule mahati jāyate || 42 ||
ekādaśyāṃ garutmaṃtaṃ kārayitvā hiraṇmayam ||
yathāśaktyā tāmrapātre ghṛtasyopari pūjitam || 43 ||
paṃcāgnyabhirate vipre purāṇajñe viśeṣataḥ ||
dattvā kiṃ bahunoktena viṣṇuloke mahīyate || 44 ||
gāṃ vṛṣaṃ mahiṣīṃ hemaṃ saptadhānyānyajāvikam ||
vaḍavāṃ guraḍarasānsa rvāṃstathā bahuphaladrumān || 45 ||
puṣpāṇi ca vicitrāṇi gaṃdhāṃścoccāvacānbahūn ||
yathāśaktyā melayitvā vastrairācchādayennavaiḥ || 46 ||
dvādaśyāṃ dvādaśaitāni brāhmaṇebhyo nivedayet ||
ekasya vā mahārāja yatphalaṃ tanniśāmaya || 47 ||
iha kīrtiṃ parāṃ prāpya bhuktvā bhogānyathepsitān ||
tato viṣṇupuraṃ yāti sevyamāno.apsaroṇaṇaiḥ || 48 ||
karmakṣayādihābhyetya rājā bhavati dhārmikaḥ ||
yajñayājī dānapatirjīvecca śaradāṃ śatam || 49 ||
snāpayedbrāhmaṇāṃścātra trayodaśyāṃ trayodaśa ||
tānācchādya navairvastrairgaṃdhapuṣpairathārcayet || || 4.193.50 ||
bhojayīta sumiṣṭānnaṃ dakṣiṇāṃ vinivedayet ||
yathāśaktyā hemakhaṇḍāndharmātmā prīyatāmiti || 51 ||
dharmarājāya kālāya citraguptāya daṃḍine ||
mṛtyave kṣayarūpāya aṃtakāya yamāya ca || 52 ||
pretanāthāya raudrāya tathā vaivasvatāya ca ||
mahiṣasthāya devāya nāmānīha trayodaśa || 53 ||
uccārya śraddhayā yuktaḥ praṇipatya visarjayet ||
yaḥ karoti mahārāja pūjāmetāṃ manoramām ||54||
yamāya sa sukhaṃ martye sthitvā vyādhivivarjitaḥ ||
yamamārgagataḥ paścādduḥkhaṃ nāpnotyasau pumān || 95 ||
na paśyati pretamukhaṃ pitṛlokaṃ sa gacchati ||
puṇyakṣayādihābhyetya sa sukhī nīrujo bhavet || 56 ||
mahiṣaṃ suśubhaṃ kuṃbhaṃ caturdaśyāṃ payobhṛtam ||
taṃ karṣakeṇa saṃyuktaṃ hemnaḥ sadvastrasaṃyutam || 57 ||
ghaṃṭābharaṇaśobhāḍhyaṃ vṛṣabheṇa samanvitam ||
yo dadyācchivabhaktāya brāhmaṇāya kuṭuṃbine || 58 ||
vṛṣaṃ dattvā naraśreṣṭha śivaloke mahīyate ||
tatra sthitvā ciraṃ kālaṃ kramādetya mahītalam || 59 ||
ārogyadhanasaṃyukte kule mahati jāyate ||
sarvakāmasamṛddhyarthaṃ yāvajanmaśatatrayam || || 4.193.60 ||
paurṇamāsyāṃ vṛṣotsargaṃ kārayitvā vidhānataḥ ||
caṃdrarajataniṣpannaṃ phalenaikena śobhanam || 61 ||
pūjayedgaṃdhakusumairnaivedyaṃ vinivedya ca ||
dadyādviprāya saṃkalpya vāsolaṃkārabhūṣaṇaiḥ || 62 ||
maṃtreṇānena rājendra tannibodha yathoditam ||
kṣīrodārṇavasaṃbhūta trailokyāṃgaṇadīpaka || 63 ||
umā pateḥ śiroratnaśivaṃ yaccha namonamaḥ ||
dānenānena nṛpate bhrājate caṃdravaddivi || 64 ||
apsarobhiḥ parivṛto yāvadābhūtasaṃplavam ||65||
dānānyamūni vidhivatprayatikrameṇa yacchaṃti ye dvijavarāya viśuddhasattvāḥ ||
te brahmaviṣṇubhuvaneṣu sukhaṃ vihṛtya yāṃtyekatāṃ saha śivena na saṃśayo me || 66 ||
iti śrībhaviṣye mahāpurāṇa uttaraparvaṇi śrīkṛṣṇayudhiṣṭhirasaṃvāde tithidānavarṇanaṃ nāma trinavatyuttaraśatatamo.adhyāyaḥ || 193 || a || ||
varāhadānavidhivarṇanam
|| śrīkṛṣṇa uvāca || ||
ādivārāhadānaṃ ta kathayāmi yudhiṣṭhira ||
dharaṇyai yatpurā proktaṃ varāhavapuṣā mayā || 1 ||
puṇyaṃ pavitramāyuṣyaṃ sarva dānottamottamam ||
mahāpāpādidoṣaghnaṃ pūjitaṃ dharmasattamaiḥ|| 2||
deyaṃ saṃkramaṇe bhānorgrahaṇe dvādaśīṣvatha||
yajñotsavavivāheṣu duḥsvapnādbhutadarśane ||3||
yadā ca jāyate vittaṃ cittaṃ śraddhāsamanvitam ||
tadaiva dānakālaḥ syādadhruvaṃ jīvitaṃ yataḥ || 4 ||
kurukṣetrāditīrtheṣu gaṃgādyāsu nadīṣu ca ||
pureṣu ca pavitreṣu araṇyeṣu vaneṣu ca || 5 ||
goṣṭhe devālaye vāpi rathe vā svagṛhāṃgaṇe ||
deyaṃ purāṇavidhinā brāhmaṇāya kuṭuṃbine|| 6 ||
kuśairāstīrya tāṃ pārtha praṇavākṣaramaṃtritaiḥ ||
upariṣṭāttilaisteṣāṃ varāhaṃ parikalpayet || 7 ||
drauṇaiścaturbhiḥ saṃpūrṇaṃ tadardhenātha vā punaḥ ||
āḍhakenātha kurvīta vitta śāṭhyaṃ na kārayet || 8 ||
suvarṇena mukhaṃ kāryaṃ bhujau cakragadānvitau ||
rājatīṃ kārayeddaṃṣṭāṃ padmarāgavibhūṣitām || 9 ||
śaṃkhaṃ ca sthāpayetpārśve vanamālāṃ hiraṇmayīm ||
puṣpairvā kārayedvidvānpādau rūpyamayau tathā || 4.194.10 ||
daṃṣṭrāgralagnavasudhāṃ sauvarṇīṃ kārayecchubhām ||
sarvadhānyarasopetāṃ vastrālaṃkṛtavigrahām || 11 ||
pracchādya vastrairdeveśaṃ varāhaṃ sarvakāmadam ||
romarājiṃ kuśaiḥ kṛtvā gaṃdhapuṣpairathārcayet || 12 ||
navagrahamakhaḥ kāryo homa ścātra tilaiḥ smṛtaḥ ||
evaṃ saṃsthāpya vidhivattataḥ stotramudīrayet || 13 ||
varāheśa praduṣṭāni sarvapāpaphalāni ca ||
marddamardda mahādaṃṣṭra bhāsvatkana kakuṃḍala || 14 ||
śaṃkhacakrāsihastāya hiraṇyākṣāṃtakāya ca ||
daṃṣṭroddhṛtadharābhṛte trayīmūrtimate namaḥ || 15 ||
ityuccārya namaskṛtya pradakṣiṇamanu vrajet ||
tatastaṃ brāhmaṇe dadyādvastrālaṃkārabhūṣitam || || 16||
prarigrahastu tasyoktaḥ pādayoḥ paramarṣibhiḥ ||
anena vidhinā dattvā praṇipatya kṣamā payet || 17 ||
evaṃ dattvā mahīnātha varāhaṃ sarvakāmadam ||
yatphalaṃ samavāpnoti pārtha tatkena varṇyate || 18 ||
sarvadāneṣu yatpuṇyaṃ sarvakratuṣu yatphalam||
tatphalaṃ samavāpnoti dattvā devaṃ janārdanam|| 19 ||
yathāśaktyā samuddhṛtā varāheṇa vasuṃdharā||
yathākulaṃ samuddhatya viṣṇuloke mahīyate| ||| 4.194.20 ||
brāhmaṇakṣatriyaviśāṃ strīṇāṃ śūdrajanasya ca ||
etatsādhāraṇaṃ dānaṃ śaivavaiṣṇavayoginām || 21 ||
viprāya vedaviduṣe nṛvarāharūpaṃ dattvā tilāmalasuvarṇamayaṃ savastram ||
uddhṛtya pūrvapuruṣānsakalatramitraḥ prāpnoti siddhabhuvanaṃ surasiddhajuṣṭam || 22 || ||
iti śrībhaviṣyemahāpurāṇa uttaraparvaṇi śrīkṛpṇayudhiṣṭhirasaṃvāde varāhadānavidhivarṇanaṃ nāma caturnavatyuttaraśatatamo.adhyāyaḥ || 194 ||

dhānyaparvatadānavidhivarṇanam
|| yudhiṣṭhira uvāca ||
bhagavañchrotumicchāmi dānamāhātmyamuttamam ||
yadakṣayaṃ pare loke devarṣigaṇapūjitam || 1 ||
|| śrīkṛṣṇa uvāca || ||
rudreṇa yatpurā proktaṃ nāradāya mahātmane ||
matsyena manave tadvattacchuṇuṣva kurūdvaha || 2 ||
meroḥ pradānaṃ vakṣyāmi daśadhā punareva te ||
yatpradātottarā~mllokānprāpnoti surapūjitān|| 3 ||
purāṇeṣu ca vedeṣu yajñeṣvadhyayaneṣu ca ||
na tatphalamadhīteṣu kṛteṣviha yadaśnute || 4 ||
tasmādvidhānaṃ vakṣyāmi parvatānāmanukramāt ||
prathamo dhānyaśailaḥ syaddvitīyo lavaṇācalaḥ || 5 ||
guḍācalastṛtīyastu caturtho hemaparvataḥ ||
paścamastilaśailaḥ syātṣaṣṭhaḥ kārpāsaparvataḥ || 6 ||
saptamo ghṛtaśailaśca rasaśailastathāṣṭamaḥ ||
rājato navamastadvaddaśamaḥ śarkarācalaḥ || || 7 ||
vakṣye vidhānameteṣāṃ yathāvadanupūrvaśaḥ ||
ayane viṣuve puṇye vyatīpāte dinakṣaye || 8 ||
śuklapakṣe tṛtīyāyāmuparāge śaśikṣaye ||
vivāhotsavayajñe vā dvādaśyāmatha vā punaḥ || 9 ||
śuklāyāṃ pañcadaśyāṃ vā puṇyarkṣe vā pradhānataḥ ||
dhānyaśailādayo deyā yathāśāstraṃ vijānatā || 4.195.10 ||
tīrthe vāyatane vāpi goṣṭhe vā saṃgame.api vā ||
maṃḍapaṃ kārayedbhaktyā caturasramudaṅmukham || 11 ||
prāgudakpravaṇaṃ tatra prāṅmukhaṃ vā vidhānataḥ ||
gomayenānuliptāyāṃ bhūmāvāstīrya vā kuśān || 12 ||
tanmadhye parvataṃ kuryādviṣkambhaparvatānvitam ||
dhānyadroṇasahasreṇa bhavedgiririhottamaḥ || 13 ||
madhyamaḥ paṃcaśatikaḥ kaniṣṭhaḥ syāttribhiḥ śataiḥ || 14 ||
merurmahāvrīhimayastu madhyasuvarṇavṛkṣatrayasaṃyutaḥ syāt ||
saṃpūrṇamuktāphalavajrayukto yāmye nu gomedakapuṣparāgaiḥ ||15||
yaḥ syācca gārutmatanīlaratnaiḥ saumyena vaiḍūryasarojarāgaiḥ ||
śrīkhaṃḍakhaṇḍairabhitaḥ pravāla latānvitaḥ śuddhaśilātalaḥ syāt ||16||
brahmātha viṣṇurbhagavānpurārirdivākaro.apyatra hiraṇmayaḥ syāt ||
tathaikadeśoddhatakandharastu ghṛtodakaprasravaṇāśca dikṣu || 17 ||
śuklāṃbaro.anyaśca surācalaḥ syātpūrveṇa kṛṣṇāni ca dakṣiṇena ||
vāsāṃsi paścādatha kesarāṇi raktāni caivottarato dalāni || 18 ||
raupyā maheṃdrapramukhāstathāṣṭau saṃsthāpayellokapatīnkrameṇa ||
nānāphalālī ca samaṃtataḥ syānmanoramāmālyavilepanādyā || 19 ||
vitānakañcopari pañcavarṇamamlānapuṣpābharaṇaṃ sitaṃ vā ||
itthaṃ niveśyāmaraśailamapyunmanāstu viṣkambhagaṇānkrameṇa || 4.195.20 ||
turīyabhāgena caturdiśaṃ ca saṃsthāpayetpuṣpavilepanādyān ||
pūrveṇa mandaramanekaphalopayuktaṃ yatrollasatkanakabhadrakadaṃbacihnam || 21 ||
kāmena kāṃcanamayena virājamānamākārayetkusumavastravilepanāḍhyam || kṣīrāruṇodasarasātha tathā vanena raupyeṇa śaktighaṭitena virājamānam ||22||
yāmyena gaṃdhamadanotra niveśanīyo godhūmasaṃcayamayaḥ kaladhautajo vā ||
haimena pakṣipatinā dhṛtamānasena tenādyameva sakalaṃ kilasaṃyutaḥ syāt || 23 || paścāttilācalamanekasugandha puṣpasauvarṇapippalahiraṇyayahaṃsayuktam || ākārayedrajatapuṣpavanena tadvadvastrānvitaṃ dadhiśatodasarastathāgre || 24 ||
saṃsthāpya taṃ vipulaśailamathottareṇa śailaṃ supārśvamapi māṣamayaṃ suvapram ||
puṣpaiśca hemavaṭapādapaśeṣaratnamākārayetkanakadhenuvirājamānam || 25 || mākṣīkabhadrakarasāvacayena tadvadrau pyeṇa bhāsvararasaiśca yutaṃ vidhāya ||
homaścaturbhiratha vedapurāṇavidbhirhyetairaniṃdya varitākṛtibhirdvijendraiḥ || 26 ||
pūrveṇa hastamukhamatra vidhāya kuṃḍaṃ kāryastilairatha ghṛtena samitkuśaiśca ||
rātrau ca jāgaramanuddhatagītatūryairāvāhanaṃ ca kathayāmi śiloccayānām || 27 ||
tvaṃ sarvadevagaṇadhāmanidhe ca vighnamasmadgṛheṣvamaraparvata nāśayāśu ||
kṣemaṃ vidhatsva kuru śāṃtimanuttamāṃ naḥ saṃpūjitaḥ paramabhaktimataḥ pradehi || 28 || tvameva bhagavānīśo brahmā viṣṇurdivākaraḥ ||
mūrtāmūrtaparaṃ bījamataḥ pāhi sanātana || 29 ||
yasmāttvaṃ lokapālānāṃ viśvamūrteśca maṃdiram ||
keśavārkavasūnāṃ ca tasmā cchāṃtiṃ prayaccha me || 4.195.30 ||
yasmādaśūnyamamarairgaṃdharvaiśca śirastava ||
tasmānmāmuddharāśeṣa duḥkhasaṃsārasāgarāt || 31 ||
evamabhyarcya taṃ meruṃ mandaraṃ cāpi pūjayet ||
yasmāccaitrarathenātha bhadrāśvavariṣeṇa ca || 32 ||
śobhase mandarakṣipramatastuṣṭikaro bhava ||
yasmāccūḍāmaṇirjaṃbūdvīpe tvaṃ gandhamādanaḥ || 33 ||
gandharvairapsarobhiśca gīyamānaṃ yaśo.astu me ||
yasmāttvaṃ ketumālena vaibhrājena vanena ca || 34 ||
hiraṇyamayapāṣāṇastasmācchāṃtiṃ prayaccha me ||
uttaraiḥ kurubhiryasmātsāvitreṇa vanena ca || 35 ||
supārśva rājase nityamataḥ śrīrakṣayāstu me ||
evamāmaṃtrya tānsarvānprabhāte vimale punaḥ || 36 ||
snātvā tu gurave dadyānmadhyamaṃ parvatottamam ||
śeṣāṃśca paṃca tāndadyādṛtvigbhyaḥ kramaśo nṛpa || 37 ||
gāvo deyāścatustriṃśadathavā daśa bhārata||
śaktitaḥ sapta vāṣṭau vā evaṃ dadyādaśaktimān || 38 ||
ekāpi gurave deyā kapilā supayasvinī ||
parvatānāmaśeṣāṇāmeṣa eva vidhiḥ smṛtaḥ || 39 ||
ya eva pūjane maṃtrāsta evopaskare tathā ||
grahāṇāṃ lokapālānāṃ brahmādīnāmagaiḥ saha || 4.195.40 ||
svamaṃtreṇaiva sarveṣu homaḥ śaileṣu śasyate ||
upavāsī bhavennityamaśaktau naktamiṣyate || 41 ||
vidhānaṃ sarvaśailānāṃ kramaśaḥ śṛṇu bhārata ||
dānakāleṣu ye mantrāḥ parvateṣu ca yatphalam || 42 ||
annaṃ brahma yataḥ proktamanne prāṇāḥ pratiṣṭhitāḥ ||
annādbhavaṃti bhūtāni jagadannena varddhate || 43 ||
annameva yato lakṣmīrannameva janārdanaḥ ||
dhānyaparvatarūpeṇa pāhi tasmānnagottama || 44 ||
anena vidhinā yastu dadyāddhānyamayaṃ girim ||
manvantaraśataṃ sāgraṃ devaloke mahīyate || 45 ||
apsarogaṇagaṃdharvairākīrṇena virājatā ||
vimānena divaḥ pṛṣṭhe sa yāti ṛṣisevitaḥ || 46 ||
puṇyakṣaye rājarājyamāpnotīha na saṃśayaḥ || 47 ||
dhānyācalaṃ kanakavṛkṣavirājamānaṃ viṣkaṃbhaparvatayutaṃ surasiddhajuṣṭam ||
yacchaṃti ye sumatayaḥ praṇipatya viprāṃste prāpnuvaṃti parameṣṭhipadābjayugmam || 48 || ||
iti śrībhaviṣye purāṇa uttaraparvaṇi śrīkṛṣṇayudhiṣṭhirasaṃvāde dhānyaparvatadānavidhivarṇanaṃ nāma paṃcanavatyuttaraśatatamo.adhyāyaḥ|| || 195 || || a ||
lavaṇaparvatadānavidhivarṇanam
|| śrīkṛṣṇa uvāca || ||
athātaḥ saṃpravakṣyāmi lavaṇācalamuttamam ||
yatpradānānnaro lokamāpnoti śivasaṃyutam ||1||
uttamaḥ ṣoḍaśadroṇaḥ kartabyo lavaṇācalaḥ ||
madhyamaḥ syāttadardhena tadarddhenādhamaḥ smṛtaḥ ||2||
vittahīno yathāśaktyā droṇādardhaṃ tu kārayet ||
caturthāṃśena viṣayānparvatānkārayetpṛthak ||3||
vidhānaṃ pūrvavatkuryādbrahmādīnāṃ ca sarvadā ||
tadvaddhematarūnsarvāṃllokapālaniveśanam ||4||
śirāṃsi kāmadevādīṃstadvattatra niveśayet ||
kuryājjāgaramatrāpi dānamaṃtrānnibodha me ||5||
saubhāgyarasasaṃbhūto yato.ayaṃ lavaṇorasaḥ ||
dānātmakatvena ca māṃ pāhi pāpānnagottama || 6 ||
tasmādannarasāḥ sarve notkṛṣṭā lavaṇaṃ vinā ||
priyaṃ ca śivayornityaṃ tasmākchāṃtiprado bhava ||7||
viṣṇudeha samudbhūtaṃ yasmādārogyavardhanam ||
yasmātparvatarūpeṇa pāhi saṃsārasāgarāt || 8 ||
anena vidhinā yastu dadyāllavaṇaparvatam ||
umāloke vasetkalpaṃ tato yāti parāṃ gatim || 9 ||
puṇyakṣayādihābhyetya rājā bhavati dhārmikaḥ ||
putrapautraiḥ parivṛto jīvecca śaradāṃ śatam || 4.196.10 ||
kurvaṃti ye lavaṇa parvatasaṃpradānaṃ saṃprāpnuvaṃti divi te sumahadvimānam || tatrāpsarogaṇasurāsurasevyamānāstiṣṭhaṃti hṛṣṭamanaso divi vṛddhamānāḥ || 11 || ||
iti śrībhaviṣye mahāpurāṇa uttaraparvaṇi śrīkṛṣṇayudhiṣṭhirasaṃvāde lavaṇaparvatadānavidhivarṇanaṃ nāma ṣaṇṇavatyuttaraśatatamo.adhyāyaḥ || 196 || cha || ||
guḍācaladānavidhivarṇanam
|| śrīkṛṣṇa uvāca || ||
ataḥ paraṃ pravakṣyāmi guḍaparvatamuttamam ||
yatpradānānnaraḥ svargaṃ prāpnoti surapūjitam || 1 ||
uttamo daśabhirbhāraiḥ madhyamaḥ paṃcabhistathā ||
tribhirbhāraiḥ kaniṣṭhaḥ syāttadarddhenālpako mataḥ || 2 ||
tadvadāmaṃtraṇaṃ pūjāṃ hemavṛkṣasurārcanam ||
viṣkaṃbhaparvatāstatra sarāṃsi vanadevatāḥ || 3 ||
homaṃ jāgaraṇaṃ tadvallokapālādhivāsanam ||
dhānyaparvatavatkuryādimaṃ maṃtramudīrayet || 4 ||
yathā deveṣu viśvātmā pravaroyaṃ janārdanaḥ ||
sāmavedastu vedānāṃ mahādevastu yoginām || 5 ||
praṇavaḥ sarvamaṃtrāṇāṃ nārīṇāṃ pārvatī yathā ||
tathā rasānāṃ pravaraḥ sadā cekṣuraso mataḥ || 6 ||
mama tasmātparāṃ lakṣmīṃ prayaccha guḍaparvata ||
surāsurāṇāṃ sarveṣāṃ nāgayakṣarkṣayaṃtriṇām || 7 ||
vināśaścāpi pārvatyāstasmānmāṃ pāhi sarvadā ||
anena vidhinā yastu dadyādguḍamayaṃ girim || 8 ||
saṃpūjyamāno gaṃdharvairgauṃrīloke mahīyate ||
punaḥ kalpaśatāṃte tu saptadvīpādhipo bhavet || 9 ||
āyurārogyasaṃpannaḥ śatrubhiścāparājitaḥ ||
āsīdrājñī mahābhāgā sulabhā nāma suvratā || 4.197.10 ||
maruttasya priyā bhāryā rūpa yauvanaśālinī ||
tasya bhāryā śatānyāsansapta rājño mahātmanaḥ || 11 ||
tā dāsya iva vākyāni kuryustasyāḥ sadaiva hi ||
mukhāvalokanakaro rājā tasya ca sā priyā || 12 ||
atha kālena mahatā durvāsā ṛṣisattamaḥ ||
ājagāma tadabhyāśaṃ bhramamāṇo yadṛcchayā || 13 ||
tasyātha satkriyāṃ kṛttvā dattvā cārghaṃ yathāvidhi ||
papraccha sulabhā vipraṃ durvāsasamakalmaṣam || 14 ||
|| sulabhovāca || ||
kena puṇyena bhagavanmama rājā priyaṃkaraḥ ||
mukhāvalokanaparo vaśe tiṣṭhati sarvadā || 15 || ||
sapatnyaśca mama brahmansadā priyahite ratāḥ ||
etadācakṣva bhagavanparaṃ kautūhalaṃ mama ||16||
|| durvāsā uvāca || ||
śṛṇuṣvāvahitā subhrūrātmavṛttaṃ purātanam ||
jānāmi sarvaṃ subhage tava vṛttamaśeṣataḥ || 17 ||
tvamāsīrvaiśya mahiṣī girivrajapure purā ||
dhārmikā satyaśīlā ca pativrataparāyaṇā || 18 ||
tatra śrutastvayā vatse brāhmaṇānāṃ samīpataḥ ||
purā dānavidhiḥ kṛtsnaḥ sthitayā patisaṃnidhau || 19 ||
viśeṣatastatra vipraiḥ kathito guḍaparvataḥ ||
dattaścāpi tvayā putri saṃbhṛtya vidhivattadā || 4.197.20 ||
tasya dānasya māhātmyāttvayā bhuktaṃ varānane ||
rājyaṃ janmāni catvāri niḥsapatnamanākulam || 21 ||
anyāni sapta janmāni tava rājyaṃ bhaviṣyati ||
saubhāgyamatulaṃ caiva rūpamārogyameva ca || 22 ||
bhūtaṃ caivamavaśyaṃ ca guḍaparvatadānajam ||
kathā tava varārohe yāsye tvaṃ bhava pu triṇī || 23 ||
tasmāddeyamidaṃ dānaṃ phalamuttamamicchatā ||
gatiṃ ca śāśvatīṃ lebhe saubhāgyaṃ rūpameva ca || 24 ||
dānametatpraśaṃsaṃti strīṇāṃ rāja nviśeṣataḥ ||
pūrvoktaṃ ca phalaṃ prāpya kṛtakṛtyo.abhijāyate || 25 ||
kṛṣṇeṣṭasuṃdaradarīsravaṇākulena gaṃdharvasiddhavanitāśatasevitena ||
dattena bhārata vidhānavatā sadaiva gaurī prasādamupayāti guḍācalena || 26 || ||
iti śrībhaviṣye mahāpurāṇa uttaraparvaṇi śrīkṛṣṇayudhiṣṭhirasaṃvāde guḍācaladānavidhivarṇanaṃ nāma saptanavatyuttaraśatatamo.adhyāyaḥ || 197 || cha ||
hemācaladānavidhivarṇanam
|| śrīkṛṣṇa uvāca || ||
atha pāpaharaṃ vakṣye suvarṇācalamuttamam ||
yasya prasādādbhavanaṃ vairicyaṃ yāti mānavaḥ || 1 ||
uttamaḥ palasāhasro madhyamaḥ pañcabhiḥ śataiḥ ||
tadarddhenāvarastadvadalpavitto.api śaktitaḥ || || 2||
dadyādekapalādūrdhvaṃ yathāśaktyā vicakṣaṇaḥ ||
dhānyaparvatavatsarvaṃ vidadhyānnṛpasattama || 3 ||
viṣkaṃbhaśailāṃstadvacca kṛtvā maṃtramudīrayet ||
namaste brahmabījāya brahmagarbhāya vai namaḥ || 4 ||
yasmādanaṃtaphaladastasmātpāhi śiloccaya ||
yasmādagnerapatyaṃ tvaṃ yasmādulba jagatpateḥ || 5 ||
hemaparvatarūpeṇa tasmātpāhi nagottama ||
anena vidhinā yastu dadyātkanakaparvatam || 6 ||
sa yāti paramaṃ sthānaṃ yatra devo maheśvaraḥ ||
tatra varṣaśataṃ tiṣṭhettato yāti parāṃ gatim|| 7 ||
hemācalātparaṃ dānaṃ na cānyadvidyate kvacit || 8 ||
haimaṃ mahīṃdramaṇiśṛṃgaśatairupetaṃ lokādhipāṣṭakayutaṃ sahitaṃ munīndraiḥ ||
yaḥ śaktimānvitaratīha gaṇeśaloke kalpaṃ kumāravadasau kurupuṃgavā.a.aste || 9 || || iti śrībhaviṣye mahāpurāṇa uttaraparvaṇi śrīkṛṣṇa yudhiṣṭhirasaṃvāde hemācaladānavidhivarṇanaṃ nāmāṣṭanavatyuttaraśatatamo.adhyāyaḥ || 198 || cha ||
tilācaladānavidhivarṇanam
|| śrīkṛṣṇa uvāca || ||
ataḥ paraṃ pravakṣyāmi tilaśailaṃ vidhānataḥ ||
yatpradānānnaro yāti viṣṇulokamanuttamam || 1 ||
tilāḥ pavitramatulaṃ pavitrāṇāṃ ca pāvanam ||
viṣṇudehasamudbhūtāstasmāduttamatāṃ gatāḥ || 2 ||
madhukaiṭabhanāmānāvāstāṃ ditisutau purā ||
madhunā saha tatrābhūdyuddhaṃ viṣṇoranāratam || 3 ||
sahasraṃ kila varṣāṇāṃ na vyajīvata dānavaḥ ||
tatra svedo mahānāsītkruddhasyātha gadābhṛtaḥ || 4 ||
patitaśca dharāpṛṣṭhe kaṇaśo lavaśastathā ||
samuttasthustilā māṣāḥ kuśāśca kurunaṃdana || 5 ||
hataśca hariṇā yuddhe sa madhurbalināṃ varaḥ ||
medasā tasya vasudhā raṃjitā sakalā tadā || 6 ||
medinīti tataḥ saṃjñāmavāpācala dhāriṇī ||
hate.atha daityapravare devāstoṣaṃ paraṃ yayuḥ || 7 ||
stutibhiśca paraṃ stutvā ūcustridaśapuṃgavam ||
|| devā ūcuḥ || ||
tvayā dhṛtaṃ jagaddeva tvayā sṛṣṭaṃ tathaiva ca || 8 ||
tvayīśa līyate sarvaṃ tvayaiva madhusūdana ||
tasmāttvadaṃgato jātāstilāḥ saṃtu jagaddhitāḥ || 9 ||
pālayaṃtu ca deveśa havyakavyāni sarvadā ||
daive pitrye ca satataṃ niyojyāstatparairnaraiḥ || 4.199.10 ||
nahi daityāḥ piśācā vā vipraṃ kurvaṃti bhārata ||
tilā yatropayujyaṃte etacchīghraṃ vidhīyatām || 11 ||
śrutvā surāṇāṃ tadvākyaṃ viṣṇustānidamabravīt ||
tilā bhavantu rakṣārthaṃ trayāṇāṃ jagatāmapi || 12 ||
śuklapakṣe tu devānāṃ saṃpradadyāttilodakam ||
kṛṣṇapakṣe pitṛrṇāṃ ca snātvā śraddhāsamanvitaḥ || 13 ||
tilaiḥ saptāṣṭabhirvāpi samarpitajalāṃjaliḥ ||
tasya devāḥ sapitarastṛptā yacchaṃti śobhanam || 14 ||
śvakākopahataṃ yacca patitādibhireva ca ||
tilairabhyukṣitaṃ sarvaṃ pavitraṃ syānna saṃśayaḥ || 15 ||
etairmṛtaistilairyastu kṛtvā parvatamuttamam ||
pradadyāddvijamukhyāya dānaṃ tasyākṣayaṃ bhavet || 16 ||
uttamo daśabhirdroṇairmadhyamaḥ paṃcabhirmataḥ ||
tribhiḥ kaniṣṭho rājendra tilaśailaḥ prakīrtitaḥ || 17 ||
pūrvavaccāparaṃ sarvaṃ viṣkaṃbhaparvatādikam ||
dānamannaṃ pravakṣyāmi yathāvannṛpasattama || 18 ||
yasmānmadhuvadhe viṣṇordehasvedasamudbhavāḥ ||
tilāḥ kuśāśca māṣāśca tasmācchaṃ no bhavatviha || 19 ||
havye kavye ca yasmācca tilairevābhimaṃtraṇam ||
bhavāduddhara śaileṃdra tilācala namo.astu te || 4.199.20 ||
ityāmaṃtrya ca yo dadyāttilācalamanuttamam ||
sa vaiṣṇavaṃ padaṃ yāti punarāvṛttidurlabham || 21 ||
dīrghāyuṣṭvamavāpnoti iha loke paratra ca ||
pitṛbhirdevagandharvaiḥ pūjyamāno divaṃ vrajet || 22 ||
puṇyakṣayādihābhyetya rājā bhavati dhārmikaḥ ||
nārī vā tasya patnī syādrūpasaubhāgyasaṃyutā || 23 ||
dakṣā kulodbhavā caiva putrapautrasamanvitā ||
vidhānamidamākarṇya vidhinā śraddhayānvitaḥ || 24 ||
kapilādānapuṇyasya samaṃ phalamavāpnuyāt || 25 ||
dānaṃ tilācalasamaṃ yadi cānyadasti tadbhūta śāstranicayaṃ pravicārya buddhyā ||
yairvarjitā pitṛkriyā na ca homakarma teṣāṃ pradānamiha kiṃ na karoti śarma || 26 || || iti śrībhaviṣye mahāpurāṇa uttaraparvaṇi śrīkṛṣṇayudhiṣṭhirasaṃvāde tilācaladānavidhivarṇanaṃ nāmaikonadviśatatamo.adhyāyaḥ || 199 || ||7||| |||
kārpāsācaladānavidhivarṇanam
|| śrīkṛṣṇa uvāca || ||
ataḥ paraṃ pravakṣyāmi kārpāsācalamuttamam ||
paramaṃ sarvadānānāṃ priyaṃ sarvadivaukasām || 1 ||
deśakālau samāsādya dhanaṃ śraddhāṃ ca yatnataḥ ||
deyametanmahādānaṃ kuloddharaṇahetave || 2 ||
pūrvoktena vidhānena kṛtvā sarvamaśeṣataḥ ||
parvataṃ kalpayettatra kārpāsena vidhānataḥ || 3 ||
viṃśadbhārastu kartavya uttamaḥ parvato budhaiḥ ||
daśabhirmadhyamaḥ prokto jaghanyaḥ paṃcabhirmataḥ || 4 ||
bhāreṇālpadhano dadyādvittaśāṭhyavivarjitaḥ ||
dhānyaparvatavatsarvamāsādya nṛpapuṃgava || 5 ||
tadvajjāgaraṇaṃ kuryāttadvaccaivādhivāsanam ||
prabhātāyāṃ tu śarvaryāmimaṃ mantramudīrayet || 6 ||
tvamevāvaraṇaṃ yasmāllokānāmiha sarvadā ||
kārpāsācala nastasmādaghaughadhvaṃsano bhava || 7 ||
iti kārpāsaśailendraṃ yo dadyātparvasaṃnidhau ||
rudraloke vasetkalpaṃ tato rājā bhavediha || 8 ||
rūpavānsubhago vāgmī śrīmānatulavikramaḥ ||
pañcajanmāni nārī vā jāyate nātra saṃśayaḥ || 9 ||
kārpāsaparvatamayo jagadekabaṃdhuryasmānnatena rahito varavastrayogaḥ ||
tasmādaghaudhaśamanāya sukhāya nityaṃ deyo nareṇa naranāthavimatsareṇa || 4.200.10 ||
iti śrībhaviṣye mahāpurāṇa uttaraparvaṇi śrīkṛṣṇayudhiṣṭhirasaṃvāde kārpāsācaladānavidhivarṇanaṃ nāma dviśatatamo.adhyāyaḥ || 200 || || cha || ||
ghṛtācaladānavidhivarṇanam
|| śrīkṛṣṇa uvāca || ||
athātaḥ saṃpravakṣyāmi ghṛtācalamanuttamam ||
tejo.amṛtamayaṃ divyaṃ mahāpātakanāśanam || 1 ||
paṃcāśadghṛtakumbhānāmuttamaḥ syādghṛtācalaḥ ||
madhyamastu tadardhena tadarddhenāvaraḥ smṛtaḥ || 2 ||
alpavittastu kurvīta yathāśaktyā vidhānataḥ ||
viṣkaṃbhaparvatāṃstadvaccaturbhāgena kalpayet || 3 ||
śāleyataṃdulānāṃ ca kuṃbhāṃśca parivinyaset ||
kārayetsaṃhatānuccānyathāśobhaṃ vidhānataḥ || 4 ||
veṣṭayecchuklavāsobhirikṣudaṃḍaphalādikaiḥ ||
dhānyaparvatavaccheṣaṃ vidhānamiha paṭhyate || 5 ||
adhivāsanapūrvaṃ ca tadvaddhomaṃ surārcanam ||
prabhātāyāṃ tu śarvayāṃ gurave vinivedayet||6||
viṣkaṃbhaparvatāṃstadvadṛtvigbhyaḥ śāṃtamānasaḥ ||
maṃtreṇānena kauṃteya tacchṛṇuṣva vadāmi te ||7||
saṃyogādghṛtamutpannaṃ yasmādamṛtatejase ||
tasmādghṛtācalaścāsmātprīyatāṃ mama śaṃkaraḥ ||8 ||
tasmāttejomayaṃ brahma ghṛte nityaṃ vyavasthitam ||
ghṛtaparvatarūpeṇa tasmānnaḥ pāhi bhūdhara || 9 ||
anena vidhinā dadyādghṛtācalamanuttamam ||
mahāpātakayukto.api lokamāyāti śāṃkaram || 4.201.10 ||
haṃsasārasasaṃyukte kiṃkiṇījālamālite ||
vimāne apsarobhiśca siddhavidyādharairvṛtaḥ || 11 ||
viharetpitṛbhiḥ sārddhaṃ yāvadābhūtasaṃplavam || 12 ||
ājyācalaṃ pracalakuṃḍalasundarībhiḥ saṃsevyamānamiha ye vitaraṃti martyāḥ ||
svargaṃ sureṃdrabhavanaṃ bhavasaṃnidhiṃ vā snehānubaṃdhamacalaṃ bhavatīti sarvam || 13 ||
iti śrībhaviṣye mahāpurāṇa uttaraparvaṇi śrīkṛṣṇayudhiṣṭhirasaṃvāde ghṛtācaladānavidhivarṇanaṃ nāmaikādhikadviśatatamo.adhyāyaḥ || 201 || || cha || ||
ratnācaladānavidhivarṇanam
|| śrīkṛṣṇa uvāca || ||
athātaḥ saṃpravakṣyāmi ratnācalamanuttamam ||
yatpradānānnaro yāti lokānsaptarṣisevitān || 1 ||
muktāphalasahasreṇa parvataḥ syādanuttamaḥ ||
madhyamaḥ pañcaśatikastriśatenāvaraḥ smṛtaḥ || 2 ||
alpavittastu kurvīta muktāphalaśatena ca ||
caturthāṃśena viṣkaṃbhaparvatāḥ syuḥ samaṃtataḥ || 3 ||
pūrveṇavajragomedairdakṣiṇeneṃdranīlakaiḥ ||
puṣparāgayutaḥ kāryo vidvadbhirgaṃdhamādanaḥ || 4 ||
vaiḍūryavidrumaiḥ paścātsāvitro vipulācalaḥ ||
padmarāgaṃ sasauvarṇamuttareṇāpi vinyaset || 5 ||
dhānyaparvatavaccheṣamatrāpi parikalpayet ||
tadvadāvāhanaṃ kṛtvā vṛkṣāndevāṃśca kāṃcanām || 6 ||
pūjayetpuṣpanaivedyaiḥ prabhāte tu visarjanam ||
pūrvavadguruṛtvigbhyāṃ imānmaṃtrānudīrayet ||7||
yathā devagaṇāḥ sarve sarvaratneṣvavasthitāḥ ||
tvaṃ ca ratnamayo nityamataḥ pāhi mahācala || 8 ||
yasmādratnapradānena tuṣṭimeti janārdanaḥ ||
pūjāratnapradānena tasmānnaḥ pāhi sarvadā || 9 ||
anena vidhinā yastu dadyādratnamayaṃ girim ||
sa yāti vaiṣṇavaṃ lokamamareśvarapūjitam || 4.202.10 ||
yāvatkalpaśataṃ sāgramuṣitveha narādhipa ||
rūpārogyaguṇopetaḥ saptadvīpādhipo bhavet|| || 11 ||
brahmahatyādikaṃ kiṃcidatra cāmutra vā kṛtam ||
tatsarvaṃ nāśamāyāti girirvajrahato yathā || 12 ||
muktāmayaṃ kanakavidrumabhakticitraṃ caṃcanmahāmaṇimarīcicayopapannam ||
ratnācalaṃ dvijavarāya nivedayitvā bhāsvatprabhāmabhibhavetsuralokaloke || 13 ||
iti śrībhaviṣye mahāpurāṇa uttaraparvaṇi śrīkṛṣṇayudhiṣṭhirasaṃvāde ratnācaladānavidhivarṇanaṃ nāma dvayadhikadviśatatamo.adhyāyaḥ || 202 || || cha ||
raupyācaladānavidhivarṇanam
|| śrīkṛṣṇa uvāca || ||
ataḥ paraṃ pravakṣyāmi raupyācalamanuttamam ||
yatpradānānnaro yāti somalokaṃ narottama || 1 ||
sahasreṇa palānāṃ tu uttamo rajatācalaḥ ||
paṃcabhirmadhyamaḥ proktastadarddhenāvaraḥ smṛtaḥ||2||
aśakto viṃśaterūrdhvaṃ kārayedbhaktitaḥ sadā ||
viṣkaṃbhaparvatāṃstadvatturīyāṃśena kalpayet ||3||
pūrvavadrājatānkuryānmaṃdarādīnvidhānataḥ ||
kaladhautamayāṃstadvallokeśānkārayennṛpa ||4||
brahmaviṣṇuśivādīṃśca nitaṃbo.atra hiraṇmayaḥ ||
rājataṃ syādyadanyeṣāṃ sarvaṃ tadiha kāṃcanam || 5 ||
śeṣaṃ ca pūrvavatkṛtvā homajāgaraṇādikam ||
dadyāttadvatprabhāte tu gurave raupyaparvatam || 6 ||
viṣkaṃbhaśailānṛtvigbhyaḥ pūjayecca vibhūṣaṇaiḥ ||
imaṃ maṃtraṃ paṭhandadyāddarbhapāṇirvimatsaraḥ || 7 ||
pitṛrṇāṃ vallabhaṃ yasmāccharmadaṃ śaṃkarasya ca ||
rajataṃ pāhi tasmānno ghorātsaṃsārasāgarāt ||8||
itthaṃ niveśya yo dadyādrajatācalamuttamam ||
gavāmayutadānasya phalaṃ prāpnoti mānavaḥ || 9 ||
somaloke sagaṃdharvakiṃnarāpsarasāṃ gaṇaiḥ ||
pūjyamāno vasedvidvānyāvadābhūtasaṃplavam || 4.203.10 ||
rājeśa rājatagiriṃ kanakopalālīcchannaṃ prasannasalile sahitaṃ sarobhiḥ ||
yacchaṃti ye sukṛtino virajo vi śokaṃ gacchaṃti te gatamalā nṛpa somalokam ||1 1|| || iti śrībhaviṣye mahāpurāṇa uttaraparvaṇi śrīkṛṣṇayudhiṣṭhirasaṃvāde raupyācaladānavidhivarṇanaṃ nāma tryadhikadviśatatamo.adhyāyaḥ || 203 || || cha ||
śarkarācaladānavidhivarṇanam
||śrīkṛṣṇa uvāca || ||
athātaḥ saṃpravakṣyāmi śarkarācalamuttamam ||
yasya pradānādviṣṇvarkarudrāstuṣyaṃti sarvadā || 1 ||
aṣṭabhiḥ śarkarābhārairuttamaḥ syānmahācalaḥ ||
caturbhirmadhyamaḥ prokto bhārābhyāmadhamaḥ smṛtaḥ || 2 ||
bhāreṇaivārddhabhāreṇa kuryādyaścālpavittavān ||
viṣkaṃbhaparvatānkuryātturīyāṃśena mānavaḥ || 3 ||
dhānyaparvatavatsarvamāsādya rasasaṃyutam ||
meroruparitastadvatsthāpya hematarutrayam || 4 ||
maṃdāraḥ pārijātaśca tṛtīyaḥ kalpapādapaḥ||
etadvṛkṣatrayaṃ mūrdhni sarveṣvapi nidhāpayet ||5||
haricaṃdanasaṃtānau pūrvapaścimabhāgayoḥ ||
niveśyau sarvaśaileṣu viśeṣāccharkarācale || 6 ||
maṃdare kāmadevaṃ tu kaṃdabasya tale nyaset ||
jaṃbūvṛkṣatale kāryo garunmāngaṃdhamādane ||7||
prāṅmukho hemamūrtiśca haṃsaḥ syādvipulācale ||
haimī śreyorthibhiḥ kāryā surabhirdakṣiṇāmukhī || 8 || dhānyaparvatavatsarvamāvāhanamakhādikam ||
kṛtvātha gurave dadyānmadhyamaṃ parvatottamam || 9 ||
ṛtvigbhyaścaturaḥ śailānimānmaṃtrānudīrayet ||
saubhāgyāmṛtasāro.ayaṃ paramaḥ śarkarāyutaḥ || 4.204.10 ||
yasmādānaṃdakārī tvaṃ bhava śaileṃdra sarvadā ||
amṛtaṃ pibatāṃ ye tu niṣpeturbhuvi śīkarāḥ || 11 ||
devānāṃ tatsamuttho.asi pāhi naḥ śarkarācala ||
manobhavadhanurmadhyādudbhūtā śarkarā yataḥ || 12 ||
tanmayo.asi mahāśaila pāhi saṃsārasāgarāt ||
yo dadyāccharkarāśailamanena vidhinā naraḥ || 13 ||
sarvapāpavinirmuktaḥ sa yāti śivamaṃdiram ||
caṃdrādisārcisaṃkāśamadhiruhyānujīvibhiḥ || 14 ||
sahaiva yānamātiṣṭhetsa tu viṣṇupade divi ||
tataḥ kalpa śatāṃte tu saptadvīpādhipo bhavet || 15 ||
āyurārogyasaṃpanno yāvajjanmāyutatrayam ||
bhojanaṃ śaktito dadyātsarvaśaileṣvamatsaraḥ ||
svayaṃ vā kṣāra lavaṇamaśnīyāttadanujñayā || 16 ||
parvatopaskaraṃ sarvaṃ prāpayedbrāhmaṇālayam ||
āsītpurā brahmakalpe dharmamūrtirnarādhipaḥ || 17 ||
suhṛcchakrasya nihatā yena daityāḥ sahasraśaḥ ||
somasūryādayo yasya tejasā vigataprabhāḥ || 18 ||
bhavaṃti śataśo yena rājāno.api parājitāḥ ||
yathecchārūpadhārī ca manuṣyo.apyapavāritaḥ || 19 ||
tasya bhānumatīnāma bhāryā trailokyasuṃdarī ||
lakṣmīriva ca rūpeṇa nirjitāmarasuṃdarī || 4.204.20 ||
rājñastasyāgramahiṣī prāṇebhyo.api garīyasī ||
daśanārīsahasrāṇāṃ madhye śrīriva rājate || 21 ||
nṛpakoṭisahasreṇa na kadācitpramucyate ||
sa kadācitsthānagataṃ papraccha svaṃ purohitam || 22 ||
vismayāviṣṭahṛdayo vasiṣṭhamṛṣisattamam ||
bhagavankena dharmeṇa mama lakṣmīranuttamā || 23 ||
kasmācca vipulaṃ tejo maccharīre sadottamam || 24 ||
|| vaśiṣṭha uvāca ||
purā līlāvatī nāma veśyā śivaparāyaṇā ||
tayā dattaścaturdaśyāṃ gurave lavaṇācalaḥ || 25 ||
hemavṛkṣāmaraiḥ sārddhaṃ yathāvadvidhipūrvakaḥ ||
śūdraḥ suvarṇakārastu nāmnā śauṃḍobhavattadā || 26 ||
bhṛtyo līlāvatīgehe tena haimā vinirmitāḥ ||
taravo.amaramukhyāśca śraddhāyuktena pārthiva || 27 ||
atirūpeṇa saṃpannānghaṭayitvā tato hṛdi ||
dharmakāryamatiṃ jñātvā nāgṛhīta kathaṃcana || 28 ||
ujjvālitāstu tatpatnyā sauvarṇāmarapādapāḥ ||
līlāvatī gṛhe pārśve paricaryā ca pārthiva || 29 ||
kṛtaṃ tābhyāṃ praharṣeṇa dvijaśuśrūṣaṇādikam ||
sā tu līlāvatī veśyā kālena mahatā nṛpa || 4.204.30 ||
sarvapāpavinirmuktā jagāma śivamaṃdiram ||
yo.asau suvarṇakāraśca daridro.apyati sattvavān || 31 ||
na mūlyamādādveśyātaḥ sa bhavāniha sāṃpratam ||
saptadvīpapatirjātaḥ sūryāyutasamaprabhaḥ || 32 ||
yayā suvarṇa racitāstaravo hemadevatāḥ ||
samyagujjvalitāḥ patnī seyaṃ bhānumatī tava || 30 ||
ujjvālanādujjvalarūpamasyāḥ sujātamasminbhuvanādhipatyam ||
tasmātkṛtaṃ tatparikarma rātrāvanuddhatābhyāṃ lavaṇācalasya || 34 ||
tasmācca lokeṣvaparājitastvamārogyasaubhāgyayutā ca lakṣmīḥ ||
tasmāttvamapyatra vidhānapūrvaṃ dhānyācalādīndaśadhā kuruṣva || 35 ||
tatheti sampūjya ca dharmamūrti vaco vaśiṣṭhasya dadau sa sarvān ||
dhānyācalādīnkramaśaḥ purārerlokaṃ jagāmāmarapūjyamānaḥ || 36 ||
yaścādhanaḥ paśyati dīyamānaṃ meroḥ pradānamiha dharmaparo manuṣyaḥ ||
śṛṇoti bhaktyā parayā.apramādī vikalmaṣaḥ so.api divaṃ prayāti || 37 ||
duḥsvapnaṃ praśabhamupaiti paṭhyamāne śailendre bhavabhayabhedane narāṇām ||
yaḥ kuryātkimu nṛpapuṃgaveha samyakchāṃtātmā hariharapurameti jaṃtuḥ || 38 ||
iti śrībhaviṣye mahāpurāṇa uttaraparvaṇi śrīkṛṣṇayudhiṣṭhirasaṃvāde śarkarācaladānavidhi varṇanaṃ nāma caturadhikadviśatatamo.adhyāyaḥ || 204 || || cha ||
sadācāradharmavarṇanam
|| yudhiṣṭhira uvāca || ||
pratipankramayogena tithīnāṃ vistaraḥ śrutaḥ ||
sarahasyaḥ samaṃtraśca prāraṃbhodyāpanaiḥ saha || 1 ||
navagrahamakhātsarvaṃ homakarmāvadhāritam ||
snānakramaśca vidito vijñātāścotsavā mayā || 2 ||
dānadharmastvaśeṣeṇa śrutaḥ sarvārthadarśitaḥ ||
taḍāgotsarjanavidhirviditaḥ pādapotsavaḥ || 3 ||
evaṃ gataṃ mama mano muhyate madhusūdana ||
vrataṃ kathayatā kṛṣṇa tāstāḥ saṃśritya devatāḥ || 4 ||
devānāṃ devakīputra nānātvaṃ saṃpradarśitam ||
tithikramānkathayatā pūjāmantrodhivāsanam || 5 ||
vyāsādyairmunibhiḥ sarvairdhyānayogaparāyaṇaiḥ ||
eka evātra nirdiṣṭo devaḥ sarvagato.avyayaḥ || 6 ||
varṇāśramācāradharmaḥ kasmānnātra pradarśitaḥ ||
ete maharṣayastuṣṭāḥ śrotukāmā bhavadvacaḥ || 7 ||
|| śrīkṛṣṇa uvāca || ||
vratadānaikaleśoyaṃ kathitastava pārthiva ||
viśeṣataśca śaknoti vaktuṃ yadi sarasvatī || 8 ||
sarvastarati durgāṇi sarvo bhadrāṇi paśyati ||
varṇāśramāṇāṃ sāmānya iti dharmaḥ prakīrtitaḥ || 9 ||
kathito.ayaṃ vratatvoho devānuddiśya yo mayā ||
paramārthaḥ sa evokto devastamupadhāraya || 4.205.10 ||
yo brahmā sa hariḥ prokto yo hariḥ sa maheśvaraḥ ||
maheśvaraḥ smṛtaḥ sūryaḥ sūryaḥ pāvaka ucyate || || 11 ||
pāvakaḥ kārtikeyosau kārtikeyo vināyakaḥ ||
gaurī lakṣmīśca sāvitrī śaktibhedāḥ prakīrtitāḥ || 12 ||
devaṃ devīṃ samuddiśya yaḥ karoti vrataṃ naraḥ ||
na bhedastatra maṃtavyaḥ śivaśaktimayaṃ jagat || 13 ||
bahuprakārā vasudhā bhedāḥ sāgnyanilāṃbhasām ||
paramārthataściṃtyamāno na bhedaḥ pratibhāsate || 14 ||
kañciddevaṃ samāśritya karoti kimapi vratam ||
trayīdharmānugaṃ pārtha ekaṃ tatrāpi kāraṇam || 15 ||
yaścaiva te mayā khyāto vratadānavidhiḥ paraḥ ||
saphalaḥ sa tu vijñeyaḥ sadācāravatāṃ satām || 16 ||
ācārahīnaṃ na punaṃti vedā yadyapyadhītāḥ saha ṣaḍbhiraṅgaiḥ ||
chaṃdāṃsyenaṃ mṛtyukāle tyajaṃti nīḍaṃ śakuntā iva jātapakṣāḥ || 17 ||
kapālasthaṃ yathā toyaṃ śvadṛtau vā yathā payaḥ ||
duṣṭaṃ syātsthānadoṣeṇa vṛttahīne tathā śubham || 18 ||
vṛttaṃ yatnena saṃrakṣedvittameti prayāti ca ||
ahīno vittato hīno vṛttatastu hato hataḥ || 19 ||
evamācāradharmasya mūlaṃ rājankulasya ca ||
ācārāddhi cyuto jaṃturna kulīno na dhārmikaḥ || 4.205.20||
kiṃ kulenopadiṣṭen vipulena durātmanām ||
kṛmayaḥ kiṃ na jāyaṃte kusumeṣu sugaṃdhiṣu || 21 ||
hīnajātiprasūtopi śaucācārasamanvitaḥ ||
sarvadharmārthakuśalaḥ sakulīnaḥ satāṃ varaḥ || 22 ||
na kulaṃ kulamityāhurācāraḥ kulamucyate ||
ācārakuśalo rājanniha cāmutra naṃdate || 23 ||
|| yudhiṣṭhira uvāca || ||
sadācāramahaṃ kṛṣṇa śrotumicchāmi śāśvatam ||
sarvaṃ dharmamayaḥ ko.atra sadācāraḥ prakīrtitaḥ || 24 ||
|| śrīkṛṣṇa uvāca || ||
ācāraprabhavo dharmaḥ saṃtaścācāralakṣaṇāḥ ||
sādhūnāṃ ca yathā vṛttaṃ sa sadācāra ucyate || 29 ||
tasmātkuryādihācāraṃ ya icchedgatimātmanaḥ ||
api pāpaśarīrasya ācāro haṃtyalakṣaṇam || 26 ||
adṛṣṭamaśrutaṃ vedaṃ puruṣaṃ dharmacāriṇam ||
svāni karmāṇi kurvāṇaṃ taṃ janaṃ kurute priyam || 27 ||
ye nāstikā naiṣṭhikāśca guruśāstrātilaṃghinaḥ ||
adharmajñā durācārāste bhavaṃti gatāyuṣaḥ || 28 ||
sarvalakṣaṇahīnopi yaḥ sadācāravānnaraḥ ||
śraddadhānonasūyaśca sarvānkāmānavāpnuyāt || 29 ||
brāhme muhūrte budhyeta dharmārthāvanucintayet ||
brāhmaṇānalago sūryānna meheta kadācana || 4.205.30 ||
udaṅmukho divārātrāvutsargaṃ dakṣiṇāmukhaḥ ||
utthāyācamya tiṣṭheta pūrvāṃ saṃdhyāṃ samāhitaḥ || 31 ||
evamevottarāṃ saṃdhyāṃ samupāsīta vāgyataḥ ||
nekṣetādityamudyantaṃ nāstaṃ yāṃtaṃ kadācana || 32 ||
ṛṣayo dīrghatapasā dīrghamāyuravāpnuyuḥ ||
upāsate yena pūrvāṃ dvijāḥ saṃdhyāṃ na paścimām || 33 ||
sarvāṃstāndhārmiko rājā śūdrakarmaṇi yojayet ||
ābādhāsu yathākāmaṃ kuryānmūtrapurīṣayoḥ || 34 ||
śirasā prāvṛtenaiva samāstīrya tṛṇairmahīm ||
grāmāvasathatīrthānāṃ kṣetrāṇāṃ caiva vartmani || 35 ||
na mūtramadhitiṣṭheta na kṛṣṭe na ca govraje || antarjalādāvasathādvalmīkānmūṣakasthalāt || 36 ||
kṛtaśaucāvaśiṣṭāśca varjayetpañca vai mṛdaḥ ||
devārcanādikāryāṇi tathā gurvabhivādanam || 37 ||
kurvīta samyagācamya tadvadannabhuji kriyām ||
aphenaśabdagaṃdhābhiradbhiracchābhirādarāt || || 38 ||
ācāmetprayataḥ samyakprāṅmukhodaṅmukho.api vā ||
trivargasādhane yacca sadā kāryaṃ vipaścitā || 39 ||
tatsāṃnidhye gṛhasthasya siddhiratra paratra ca ||
pādena kāryaṃ pāratryaṃ pādaṃ kuryācca saṃcaye || 4.205.40 || ardhenāhāracaraṇanityanaimittikāṃtakam ||
arthasyopārjane yatnaḥ sadā kāryo vipaścitaiḥ || 41 ||
tatsaṃsiddhau hi siddhyanti dharmakāmādayo nṛpa ||
keśaprasādhanādarśadarśanaṃ daṃtadhāvanam || 42 ||
pūrvāhna eva kāryāṇi devatānāṃ ca pūjanam ||
dūrādāvasathānmūtraṃ dūrātpādāvasecanam || 43 ||
ucchiṣṭotsarjanaṃ dūrātsadā kāryaṃ hitaiṣiṇā ||
loṣṭamardī tṛṇacchedī nakhakhādī ca yo naraḥ || 44 ||
nityocchiṣṭaḥ saṃkarakṛnnehāyurviṃdate mahat ||
nagnāṃ parastriyaṃ nekṣenna paśyedātmanaḥ śakṛt || 45 ||
udakyādarśanasparśaṃ kuryātsaṃbhāṣaṇaṃ na ca ||
nāpsu mūtraṃ purīṣaṃ vā maithunaṃ vā samācaret || 46 ||
nādhitiṣṭhecchakṛnmūtre keśabhasmakapālikān ||
tuṣāṃgārāsthiśīrṇāni rañjuvastrādikāni ca || 47 ||
dhāriṇo na namedvidvānnāsanaṃ cāpi dāpayet ||
brāhmaṇānpraṇamedvidvānāsanaṃ cāpi dāpayet || 48 ||
kṛtāṃjalirupāsīta gacchaṃtaṃ pṛṣṭhatonviyāt ||
na cāsītāsane bhinne bhinnaṃ kāṃsyaṃ ca varjayet || 49 ||
nāmuktakeśairbhoktavyaṃ na nagnaḥ snānamācaret ||
svaptavyaṃ naiva nagnena na cocchiṣṭastu saṃviśet || 4.205.50 ||
ucchiṣṭo na spṛśecchīrṣaṃ sarve prāṇāstadāśrayāḥ ||
keśagrahānprahārāṃśca śirasyetāni varjayet || 51 ||
nānyatra putra śiṣyābhyāṃ śiphayā tāḍanaṃ smṛtam ||
na pāṇibhyāṃ saṃhatābhyāṃ kaṃḍūyedātmanaḥ śiraḥ || 52 ||
na cābhīkṣṇaṃ śiraḥsnānaṃ kāryaṃ niṣkāraṇaṃ naraiḥ ||
apraśastaṃ niśi snānaṃ rāhoranyatra darśanāt || 53 ||
na bhuktottarakālaṃ ca na gambhīrajalāśaye ||
śiraḥsnānaṃ tu tailena nāṃgaṃ kiṃcidupaspṛśet|| || 54 ||
tilapiṣṭaṃ ca nāśnīyāttathāsyāyurna hīyate ||
duṣkṛtaṃ na gurorbhūyātkruddhaṃ cainaṃ prasādayet ||55||
parīvādaṃ na śṛṇuyādanyeṣāmapi jalpatām||
sadānupahatastiṣṭhetpraśastāśca tathauṣadhīḥ || 56 ||
gāruḍāni ca ratnāni bibhṛyātprayato naraḥ ||
susnigdhāmalakeśaśca sugandhiścāruveṣadhṛk ||57||
sitāḥ sumanaso hṛdyā bibhṛyācca naraḥ sadā||
kiṃcitparasvaṃ na harennālpamapyapriyaṃ vadet||58||
priyaṃ ca nānṛtaṃ brūyānnānyadoṣānudīrayet ||
nānyāśritaṃ tathā vairaṃ rocayetpuruṣeśvaraḥ||59||
na duṣṭayānamārohetkūlacchāyā na saṃśrayet ||
vidviṣṭapatitonmattabahuvairādisaṃkaraiḥ ||4.205.60||
baṃdhakībaṃdhakībhartṛkṣudrānṛta kathaiḥ saha ||
tathātivyayaśīlaiśca parivādarataiḥ śaṭhaiḥ ||61||
budho maitrīṃ na kurvīta naikaḥ paṃthānamāśrayet ||
nāvagāhejjalaughasya vegamagre nareśvarā|62||
pradīptaṃ veśma na viśennārohecchikharaṃ taroḥ ||
na huṃkuryācchavaṃ caiva śavagandho hi somajaḥ || 63 ||
na kuryāddantasaṃvarṣaṃ na kuryāccalanāsikām ||
nāsaṃspṛṣṭamukho brūyācchvāsakāsau ca varjayet || 64 ||
noccairhasetsaśabdaṃ ca na muñcetpavanaṃ budhaḥ ||
nakhānna vādayecchiṃdyānna nakhaiśca mahīṃ likhet || || 65 ||
na śmaśru bhakṣayeccaiva na loṣṭhāni ca mardayet ||
pādena nākrametpādaṃ na pūjyābhimukhaṃ nayeta ||66||
noccāsane samāsīta guroragre kadācana ||
tasmātsadācāraparo bhavetkāmacaro na hi || 67 ||
lokadvaye śubhaṃ prepsuḥ pretya svarge mahīyate ||
catuṣpathaṃ caityataruṃ śmaśānopavanāni ca || 68 ||
duṣṭastrīsaṃnikarṣaṃ ca varjayenniśi sarvadā ||
grīṣmavarṣāsu cacchatrī maunī rātrau vaneṣu ca || 69 || keśāsthikaṇṭakāmedhyabalibhasmatuṣāṃstathā ||
snānārdrāṃ dharaṇīṃ caiva dūrataḥ parivarjayet||4.205.70||
paṃthā deyo brāhmaṇebhyo rājabhyaḥ strībhya eva ca ||
vidyādhikasya gurviṇyā bhārārtasya mahīyasaḥ||71||
mūkāṃdhabadhirāṇāṃ ca mattasyonmattakasya ca ||
upānadvastramālyaṃ ca dhṛtamanyairna dhārayet || 72 ||
na hīdṛśamanāyuṣyaṃ loke kiñcana vidyate ||
yādṛśaṃ puruṣasyeha paradāropasevanam ||73||
na cerṣyā strīṣu kartavyā dārā rakṣyāḥ prayatnataḥ ||
anāyuṣyā bhavedīrṣyā tasmāttāṃ parivarjayet || 74 ||
mūrkhonmattavyasanino virūpānmāninastathā ||
hīnāṃgānadhikāṃgāṃśca vidyāhīnāṃśca nākṣipet || 75 ||
pānīyasya kriyā naktaṃ tathaiva dadhisaktavaḥ ||
varjanīyā mahārāja niśīthe bhojanakriyāḥ || 76 ||
nordhvajānuściraṃ tiṣṭhenna rahasyaparo bhavet ||
tadvannopaviśetprājñaḥ pādenākramya vāsanam ||77||
na cātiraktavāsāḥ syāccitrāsitadharo.api vā ||
na ca kuryādviparyāsaṃ vāsaso na vibhūṣaṇe || 78 ||
strīṃ kṛśāṃ nāvajānīyāddīrghamāyurjijīviṣuḥ ||
brāhmaṇaṃ kṣatriyaṃ sarvaṃ sarve hyāśīviṣopamāḥ ||79||
hanyādāśīviṣaḥ kruddho yāvatspṛśati daṃṣṭrayā ||
kṣatriyo.api dahetkruddho yāvatpaśyati tejasā||4.205.80||
brāhmaṇaḥ sakulaṃ hanyāddhyāne nāvekṣitena ca ||
nātikalyaṃ nātisāyaṃ na ca madhyaṃ dine tathā||81||
nājñātaiḥ saha gaṃtavyaṃ naikena bahubhiḥ saha ||
nāruṃtudaḥ syānna parokṣavādī na sahī nataḥ || 82 ||
rohate cāgninā dagdhaṃ vanaṃ paraśunā hatam ||
vaco duruktabībhatsaṃ na saṃrohati cāśatam || 83 ||
nāstikyaṃ vedaniṃdā ca devatānāṃ ca kutsanam ||
dveṣastaṃbhādimānasya klaibyaṃ ca parivarjayet || 84 ||
na brāhmaṇaṃ parivadenna nakṣatrāṇi darśayet ||
tithiṃ pakṣasya na brūyādyayāsyāyurna riṣyate || 85 ||
tejo niṣṭhīvya vāsaśca paridhāyācamedbudhaḥ ||
jitāmitro nṛpo yaśca balavānkarmatatparaḥ ||86 ||
tatra nityaṃ vasetprājñaḥ kṛtakṛtyaḥ patau sukham ||
paurāḥ susaṃhatā yatra satatanyāyavartinaḥ || 87 ||
yatra striyo.amatsariṇyastatra vāsaḥ sukhodayaḥ ||
yasminkṛṣīvalā rāṣṭre prāyaśo nātibhāṣiṇaḥ || 88 ||
yatrauṣadhānyaśeṣāṇi vasettatra vicakṣaṇaḥ ||
tatra rājanna vastavyaṃ yatraitattritayaṃ sadā || 89 ||
jigīṣuḥ pūrvavairaṃ ca janaśca viratotsavaḥ ||
tatra rājanna vastavyaṃ yatra nāsti catuṣṭayam || 4.205.90 ||
ṛṇapradātā vaidyaśca śrotriyaḥ sajalā nadī ||
avalokyo na cādarśo malino buddhimattaraiḥ || 91 ||
na ca rātrau mahārāja dīrgharājyamabhīpsatā ||
hemakāragṛhe cānnamaśnīyānna ca viśvaset|| 92 ||
na ca mitraṃ prakurvīta hemakāraṃ kadācana ||
bhinnabhāṃḍaṃ ca khaṭvāṃ ca kukkuraṃ kukkuṭaṃ tathā ||93||
apraśastāni catvāri ye ca vṛkṣāḥ sakaṃṭakāḥ ||
bhinna bhāṃḍe baliḥ prāyaḥ khadvāyāṃ ceha niścayaḥ || 94 ||
nāśnaṃti pitarastasya yatra kukkurakukkaṭau ||
vṛkṣamūle piśācānāṃ sarveṣāmeva saṃsthitiḥ || 95 ||
atasteṣāṃ tale bhujannaśnute pūyaśoṇitam ||
asaṃskṛtānnabhuṅmūtraṃ bālādiprabhavaṃ svayam || 96 ||
suvāsinīṃ gurviṇīṃ ca vṛddhāṃ bālāturāṃstathā ||
bhojayetsaṃskṛtānnena prathamaṃ caramaṃ gṛhī || 97 ||
aghaṃ sa kevalaṃ bhuṃkte baddhagovāhanādikam ||
yo bhuṃkte ca bahirjyeṣṭhaprekṣatāmapradāya ca || 98 ||
vaiśvadevaṃ tataḥ kuryādyāvadāhutayaḥ kramāt ||
prathamāṃ brahmaṇe dadyātprajānāṃ pataye tataḥ || 99 ||
tṛtīyāṃ caiva guhyebhyaḥ kaśyapāya tathā parām ||
tataścānumate dadyāddattvā gṛhabaliṃ tataḥ || 4.205.100 ||
pūrvākhyātaṃ mayā yatte nityakarmakriyāvidhau ||
dadyādatha dharitrīṇāṃ dadyāttu maṇikatrayam || 101 ||
prācyādikramayogena iṃdrādīnāṃ baliṃ kṣipet ||
brahmaṇe cāntarikṣāya sūryāya ca yathākramam ||102||
viśvebhyaścaiva devebhyo viśvabhūtebhya eva ca ||
kṛtvāpasavyaṃ vāyavyaṃ yakṣmaitatte nivedayet ||103||
tataścāgraṃ samuddhṛtya haṃtakāropakalpitam ||
yathāvidhi yathānyāyaṃ brāhmaṇāyopapādayet ||104||
dattvā vidhibhyo devebhyo gurubhyaḥ suśrutāya ca ||
puṇyagaṃdhāṃbaradharo mālyadhārī nareśvara || 105 ||
naikavastradharo.aśnīyānnārdrapādo mahīpate ||
viśuddhavadanaḥ prīto bhuṃjīta na vidiḍmukhaḥ || 106 ||
prāṅmukhodaṅmukho vāpi na caivānyamanā naraḥ ||
kutsitena hataṃ caiva jugupsāvadasaṃskṛtam ||107||
dattvā tu bhuṃkte śiṣṭebhyaḥ kṣudhitebhyastathā gṛhī ||
praśastaśuddhapātreṣu bhuñjītākupito nṛpa || 108 ||
nāsaṃdīsaṃsthite pātre nādeśe ca nareśvara ||
nā kāle nātisaṃkīrṇe dattvāgraṃ ca naro mahī || 109 ||
aśnīyāttanmayo bhūtvā pūrvaṃ tu madhuraṃ rasam ||
lavaṇograu tataḥ paścātkaṭutīkṣṇādikaṃ tataḥ || || 4.205.110 ||
mārdavaṃ puruṣośnanvai madhye ca kaṭhināśanam ||
aṃte punardravāśī ca naro rogeṇa mucyate ||111||
divādhānāsu vasati rātrau ca dadhisaktuṣu ||
alakṣmīḥ kovidāreṣu sarvadaiva kṛtālayā || 112 ||
aniṃdyaṃ bhakṣayennityaṃ vāgyato.annamakutsayan ||
bhuktvā samyagyathācamya prāṅmukhodaṅ mukho.api vā || 113 ||
yathāvatpunarācāmetpāṇī prakṣālya yatnataḥ ||
abhīṣṭadevatānāṃ ca kurvīta smaraṇaṃ naraḥ || 114 ||
prāṇāpānasamānānāmudānavyānayostathā ||
annapuṣṭikaraṃ cāstu mamādyāvyāhataṃ sukham || 115 ||
agastiragnirvaḍavānalaśca bhuktaṃ prapātraṃ jarayatvaśeṣam ||
sukhaṃ ca me tatpariṇāmasaṃbhava yacchatvarogaṃ khalu vāsudevaḥ || 116 ||
ityuccārya svahastena pīramārjya tathodaram ||
anāyāsapradāyīti kuryātkarmāṇyataṃdritaḥ||117||
saṃdhyāyāṃ pathikaḥ kaścitsamāgacchati bhārata ||
pādaśaucāsanaiḥ prahvaḥ svāgatoktyā ca pūjayet || 118 ||
tataścānnapradānena śayanena ca pārthiva ||
divā tithau ca vimukho yadaikaṃ pātakaṃ bhavet ||119||
tadevāṣṭaguṇaṃ puṃsāṃ sūrye haṃsamukhe gate ||
gacchecchayyāmasphuṭitāmapi dārumayīṃ nṛpa || 4.205.120 ||
nāviśālāṃ na vā bhagnāṃ nāsamāṃ malināṃ na ca ||
na ca jaṃtumayīṃ śayyāṃ samātiṣṭhedanāpadi || 121 ||
prācyāṃ diśi śiraḥ śastaṃ yāmyāyāmapi bhūpate ||
sadaiva svapatāṃ puṃsāṃ viparītaṃ tu rogadam || 122 ||
ṛtāvupagamaḥ śastaḥ sapatnyāṃ hyavanīpate ||
puṇyarkṣe ca śubhe kāle putrā yugmāsu rātriṣu || 123 ||
na cāsnātāṃ striyaṃ gacchedgarbhiṇīṃ na rajasvalām ||
nāniṣṭāṃ vai na kupitāṃ nāśastāṃ na ca rogiṇīm || 124 ||
nādakṣiṇāṃ nānyakāmāṃ nākāmāṃ nānyayoṣitam ||
sukṣāmāmatyabhuktāṃ ca svayaṃ caibhirguṇairyutaḥ ||125||
snātaḥ sugandhadhṛgdhṛṣṭo na śrāṃtaḥ kṣudhito.api vā ||
sakāmaḥ sānurāgaśca vyavāyaṃ puruṣo vrajet || 126 ||
caturdaśyāṃ tathāṣṭamyāṃ paṃcadaśyāṃ ca parvasu ||
tailābhyaṃgaṃ tathā bhogānyoṣitaśca vivarjayet || 127 ||
kṣura karmaṇi cāṃte ca strīsaṃbhoge ca bhārata ||
snāyīta cailavānprātaḥ kaṭabhūmimupetya ca || 128 ||
guroḥ pativratānāṃ ca tathā yajñatapasvinām ||
parivādaṃ na kurvīta parihāse.api bhārata || 129 ||
yugapajjalamagniṃ ca bibhṛyānna vicakṣaṇaḥ ||
guruṃ devānprati tathā na ca pādau prasārayet || 4.205.130 ||
nācakṣīta dhayaṃtīṃ gāṃ jalaṃ nāṃjalinā pibet ||
vātātapau na seveta anutāpaṃ ca varjayet ||131||
dāsaṃ śapenna vai kruddhaḥ sarvabandhūnamatsarī ||
bhītāśvāsanakṛtsādhuḥ svargastasyāvyayaṃ phalam || 132 ||
nordhvaṃ tu pattanadvāraṃ nirīkṣya paryaṭennaraḥ||
yugamātraṃ mahīpṛṣṭhe naro gacchedvilokayan || 133 ||
śeṣāhe tvapi śeṣāṃśca vaśyātmā yo nirasyati ||
tasya dharmārthakāmānāṃ hānirnālpāpi jāyate || 134 ||
vṛthā māṃsaṃ na khādeta pṛṣṭhamāṃsaṃ tathaiva ca ||
ākrośaṃ ca vivādaṃ ca paiśunyaṃ ca vivarjayet || 135 ||
saṃyāvaṃ kṛśaraṃ māṃsaṃ śaṣkulīpāyasaṃ tathā ||
ātmārthe na prakartavyaṃ devatānāṃ prakalpayet || || 136 ||
ajāśca nāvakarṣeta tā bahirdhārayaṃti ca ||
raktamālyaṃ na dhāryaṃ syācchuklaṃ dhāryaṃ tu paṃḍitaiḥ || 137 ||
varjayitvātra kamalaṃ tathā kuvalayaṃ vibho ||
raktaṃ śirasi dhāryaṃ ca tathā pāneyamityapi || 138 ||
kāṃcanīyāpi yā mālā sā na duṣyati karhicit ||
anyadeva bhavedvāsaḥ śayanīye narottama || 139 ||
anyadarcāsu devānāmanyaddhāryaṃ sabhāsu ca ||
pippalaṃ ca vaṭaṃ caiva śīrṇaśleṣmāṃtakaṃ tathā || 4.205.140 ||
udubaraṃ na khādeta bhavārthī puruṣottamaḥ ||
patitaiśca kathāṃte ca cchedanaṃ ca vivarjayet || 141 ||
patitaḥ syānnaro rājanpatitaistu sahācaran ||
vṛddho jñātistathā mitraṃ daridro yo bhavediha || 142 ||
gṛhe vā saṃsthāpitāste gṛhavṛddhimabhīpsatā ||
gṛhe pārāvatā dhanyāḥ śukāśca sahasārikāḥ|| 143 ||
bhavaṃtyete tathā pāpāstathā vai tilapāyikāḥ ||
ājokṣā caṃdanaṃ vīṇā ādarśo madhusarpiṣī || 144 ||
jalāgnī caiva bibhṛyādgṛhe nityamiti sthitiḥ||
dhanurvede ca satataṃ yatnaḥ kāryo narādhipa || 145 ||
hastipṛṣṭhe.aśvapṛṣṭhe ca rathacaryāsu caiva hi||
yatnavānbhava rājendra nayavānsukhamedhate || 146 ||
prajāpālana yuktaśca na kṣāṃtiṃ labhate nṛpa ||
yajñaśāstraṃ ca vijñāya śabdaśāstraṃ ca bhārata || 147 ||
gāṃdharvaśāstraṃ vijñeyaṃ kalā jñeyāśca bhārata ||
purāṇamitihāsaṃ ca tathākhyānāni yāni ca || 148 ||
eṣa te lakṣaṇoddeśa ācārasya prakīrtitaḥ ||
śeṣāśca vedyā vṛddhebhyaḥ pratyāhāryā narādhipa|| 149 ||
ācāro bhūtijanana ācāraḥ kīrtivardhanaḥ ||
ācārādvardhate hyāyurācāro haṃtyalakṣaṇam || 4.205.150 ||
āgamānāṃ hi sarveṣāmācāraḥ śreṣṭha ucyata ||
ācāraḥ paramo dharma ācārādvardhate dhanam || 151 ||
puṇyaṃ yaśasyamāyuṣyaṃ svargyaṃ svastyayanaṃ mahat ||
sarvavarṇānukaṃpārthaṃ mayaitatsamudāhṛtam || || 152 ||
ācāra eva narapuṃgava sevyamāno dharmārthakāmaphalado bhavatīha puṃsām ||
tasmātsadaiva viduṣāvahitena rājañchāstrodito hyanudinaṃ paripālanīyaḥ || 153 ||
iti śrībhaviṣye mahāpurāṇa uttaraparvaṇi śrīkṛṣṇayudhiṣṭhirasaṃvāde sadācāradharmavarṇanaṃ nāma pañcādhikadviśatatamo.adhyāyaḥ || 205 || cha ||
rohiṇīcandraśayanavratavidhivarṇanam
|| nārada uvāca || ||
dīrghāyurārogyakulādivṛddhiyuktaḥ pumānyena guṇānvitaḥ syāt ||
muhurmuhurjanmani yena samyagvrataṃ mama brūhi tadiṃdumauleḥ || 1 ||
|| śrībhagavānuvāca || ||
tvayā pṛṣṭamidaṃ samyagamutrākṣayakārakam ||
rahasyaṃ te pravakṣyāmi yatpurāṇavido viduḥ || 2 ||
rohiṇīcandraśayanaṃ nāma vratamihottamam ||
tasminnārāyaṇasyārccāmarccayediṃdunāmabhiḥ || 3 ||
yadā somadinayuktā bhavetpaṃcadaśī kvacit ||
atha vā brahmanakṣatraṃ paurṇamāsyāṃ prajāyate || 4 ||
tadā snānaṃ naraḥ kuryātpaṃcagavyaṃ ca sarṣapaiḥ ||
āpyāyasveti ca japedvidvānaṣṭaśataṃ punaḥ || || 5 ||
śūdro.api parayā bhaktyā pākhaṃḍālāpavarjitaḥ ||
somāya varadāyātha viṣṇave ca namonamaḥ || 6 ||
kṛtajapyaḥ svabhavanamāgatya madhusūdanam ||
pūjayetphalapuṣpaiśca somanāmāni kīrtayet || 7 ||
somāya śāṃtāya namo.astu pādāvanaṃtanāmne hyanujānu jaṃghe ||
ūrudvayaṃ cāpi vṛkodarāya saṃpūjayenmeḍhramanaṃgabāhave || 8 ||
namonamaḥ kāmasukhapradāya kaṭiḥ śaśāṃkasya samarcanīyā ||
tathodaraṃ cāpyamṛtodarāya nābhiḥ supūjyā vidhilocanāya || 9 ||
namo.astu candrāya mukhaṃ prapūjya hanurdvijānāmadhipāya pūjyā ||
āsyaṃ namaścaṃdramasebhipūjyamoṣṭhau kumutkhaṃḍavanapriyāya || 4.206.10 ||
nāsā ca nāthāya vanauṣadhīnāṃ hyānaṃndadāyātha punarbhruvośca ||
netradvayaṃ nīlakumutpriyāya ceṃdīvaraśyāmakarāya coraḥ || 11 ||
namaḥ samastādhvaravaṃditāya karṇadvayaṃ daityaniṣūdanāya ||
lalāṭamiṃdorudadhipriyāya keśā suṣumṇādhipateḥ prapūjyāḥ || 12 ||
śiraḥ śaśāṃkāya namo.asurārerviśveśvarāyeti namaḥ kirīṭam ||
padmapriye rohiṇi nāma lakṣmi saubhāgyasaukhyāmṛtatārakāyai || 13 ||
devīṃ ca saṃpūjya sugandhadhūpanevadyapuṣpādibhiriṃdupatnīm||
prapūjya bhūmau punarutthitena snātvā ca viprāya haviṣyayuktaḥ ||14||
deyaḥ prabhāte sa hiraṇyavārikuṃbho manaḥpāpavināśanāya|
saṃprāśya gomūtramamāṃsamannamakṣāramaṣṭāvatha viṃśatiṃ ca || 15 ||
grāsānpayaḥ sarpiyutānupoṣya bhuktvetihāsaṃ śṛṇuyānmuhūrtam ||
kadaṃbanīlotpalaketakāni jātī sarojaṃ śatapatrikā ca ||16||
amlānakubjānatha siṃduvārapuṣpaṃ punarnārada mallikāyāḥ||
muktaṃ ca viṣṇoḥ karavīrapuṣpaṃ śrīcaṃpakaṃ caṃdramasaśca deyam||17|||
śrāvaṇādiṣu māseṣu kramādetāni sarvadā ||
yasminmāse vratādiḥ syātpuṣpairabhyarcayeddharim || 18 ||
ekasaṃvatsaraṃ yāvadupoṣya vidhivannaraḥ ||
vratāṃte śayanaṃ dadyāddarpaṇopaskarānvitam || 19 ||
rohiṇacaṃdramithunaṃ kārayitvā tu kāṃcanam ||
caṃdraḥ ṣaḍaṃgulaḥ kāryo rohiṇī caturaṃgulā || 4.206.20 ||
muktāphalāṣṭakayutaṃ sitanetrapaṭāvṛtam ||
kṣīrakuṃbhopari puna. kāṃsyapātrākṣatānvitam || 21 ||
dadyānmaṃtreṇe pūrvāhne śālīkṣuphalasaṃyutam ||
śvetāmatha suvarṇāsyāṃ raupyakhurasamanvitām || 22 ||
savastrabhājanāṃ dhenuṃ tathā śaṃkhaṃ ca śobhanam ||
bhūṣaṇairdvijadāṃpatyamalaṃkṛtya guṇānvitam || 23 ||
caṃdro.ayaṃ dvijarūpeṇa sabhārya iti kalpayet ||
yathā na rohiṇī kṛṣṇa śayanaṃ tyajya gacchati || 24 ||
somarūpasya te tadvanmamābhedo.astu mūrtibhiḥ ||
yathā tvameva sarveṣāṃ paramānaṃdamuktidaḥ || 25 ||
bhuktirmuktistathā bhaktistvayi yajñe.astu me dṛḍhā ||
iti saṃsārabhītasya muktikāmasya cānagha || 26 || rūpārogyāyuṣāmetadvidhāyakamanuttamam ||
idameva pitṛrṇāṃ ca sarvadā vallabhaṃ mune || 27 ||
trailokyādhipatirbhūtvā śatakalpaśatatrayam ||
caṃdralokamavāpnoti punarāvṛttidurlabham || 28 ||
nārī vā rohiṇī caṃdraśayanaṃ vā samācaret ||
sā.api tatphalamāpnoti punarāvṛttidurlabham || 29 ||
iti paṭhati śṛṇoti vā ya itthaṃ madhumathanārcanamiṃdukīrtanena ||
matimapi ca dadāti so.api śaurerbhavanagataḥ paripūjyate.amaraughaiḥ || 4.206.30 || ||
iti śrībhaviṣye mahāpurāṇa uttaraparvaṇi śrīkṛṣṇayudhiṣṭhirasaṃvāde nāradamaheśvarasaṃvāde rohiṇīcaṃdraśayanavratavidhivarṇanaṃ nāma paḍadhikadviśatatamo.adhyāyaḥ || 206 || cha ||
śrīkṛṣṇasya dvārakāgamanavarṇanam
|| śrīkṛṣṇa uvāca || ||
vrataṃ dānamatho rājaṃstava dharmāḥ prakāśitāḥ ||
dharmamūlaṃ yataścedaṃ tasmāddharmaparo bhava || 1 ||
jānatā.api mayā pārtha kāmārthau na prakāśito ||
yataḥ svayaṃ pravṛttotra lokaḥ kimanuvarṇyate || 2 ||
kāmino varṇayankāmā~mllobhaṃ lubdhasya varṇayan ||
naraḥ kiṃ phalamāpnoti kūpeṃ.adhamiva pātayan || 3 ||
bhaviṣyottarametatte kathitaṃ pāṃḍunaṃdana ||
sadācāravatāṃ puṃsāṃ vratadānasamuccayaḥ ||4||
yaddṛṣṭamitihāseṣu purāṇeṣu ca bhārata ||
vedavedāṃgasaṃbaddhaṃ tatsarvamiha darśitam ||5||
lokavedaviruddhaṃ yatkathyate manujottama ||
na tatrāsthā prakartavyā vipralāpo hi sa smṛtaḥ || 6 ||
atisnehena bhavato mamaitatsamudāhṛtam ||
ṛṣīṇāṃ purataḥ pārtha kuṃṭhā bhavati bhāratī || 7 ||
naitatprakāśanīyaṃ hi dāṃbhikāya śaṭhāya vā ||
nāstikāyānyamanase kutarkopahatāya ca || 8 ||
sādhuvṛttāya dāṃtāya satyārjavaratāya ca ||
etadākhyāyamānaṃ hi śubhāmutpādayedgatim ||9||
sāmānyametatsurasattamānāṃ varṇāśramāṇāṃ ca nareṃdracandra ||
khyātaṃ bhaviṣyottaranāmadheyaṃ mayā purāṇaṃ tava sauhṛdena ||4.207.10||
dharmaḥ svayaṃ pārtha bhavāniha tvaṃ dharmārthaviddṛṣṭaparāvaraśca ||
pṛṣṭo.asmyato dharmamahaṃ ca vacmi śraddheyametatsutarāṃ janasya || 11 ||
yāsyāmyahaṃ dvāravatīṃ punaśca yajñaṃ sameṣyāmi mahotsave ca ||
kālasya sarvaṃ hi vaśe viditvā naivānutāpo bhavatātra kāryaḥ || 12 || ityuktavānyātukāmaḥ prahṛṣṭaḥ saṃpūjitaḥ pāṃḍusutairmahātmā ||
pṛṣṭvā suhṛjjjñātijanaṃ hi sarvaṃ jagāma viprānpraṇipatya kṛṣṇaḥ || 13 || yadyājñavalkyamuninā bhagavānvaśiṣṭhaḥ pṛṣṭaḥ kilottaramuvāca bahuprakāram ||
kṛṣṇena pāṃḍutanayasya ca yatpradiṣṭaṃ vyāsena tatkṛtamaho munipuṃgavena || 14 ||
jayati parāśarasūnuḥ satyavatīhṛdayanaṃdano vyāsaḥ ||
yasyāsyakamalagalita vāṅmadhupuṇyaṃ jagatpibati ||15||
iti śrībhaviṣye mahāpurāṇa uttaraparvaṇi śrīkṛṣṇayudhiṣṭhirasaṃvāde samāptivarṇanaṃ śrīkṛṣṇasya dvārakāṃ prati gamanavarṇanaṃ nāma saptādhikadviśatatamo.adhyāyaḥ || 207 || || || cha || ||
anukramaṇikākathanam
vyāsānugamanaṃ pūrvaṃ brahmāṃḍasya samudbhavaḥ ||
māyā ca vaiṣṇavī yasmātsaṃsāre doṣakīrtanam || 1 pāpabhedastatastasmācchubhāśubhavinirṇayaḥ ||
śakaṭavratamāhātmyaṃ tilakavratakīrtanam || 2 ||
aśokakaravīrākhyaṃ vrataṃ tasmācca kokilam ||
bṛhattapovrataṃ nāma rudropoṣaṇameva ca || 3 ||
dvitīyāvratamāhātmyamaśūnya śayanaṃ tathā ||
kāmākhyā tu tṛtīyā ca meghapālīvrataṃ tathā || 4 ||
paṃcāgnisādhanā ramyā tṛtīyāvratamuttamam ||
trirātraṃ goṣpadaṃ nāma harakālī vrataṃ tathā || 5 ||
lalitākhyā tṛtīyā ca yogākhyā ca tathāparā||
umāmaheśvaraṃ nāma tathā raṃbhātṛtīyakam || 6 ||
saubhāgyākhyā tṛtīyā ca ārdrānaṃdakarī thā ||
caitre bhādrapade māghe tṛtīyāvratamucyate || 7 ||
anaṃtarī tṛtīyā ca gaṇaśāṃtivrataṃ tathā ||
sārasvatavrataṃ nāma paṃcamīvrata mucyate || 8 ||
tathā śrīpaṃcamī nāma ṣaṣṭhī śokapraṇāśinī ||
phalaṣaṣṭhī ca maṃdāraṣaṣṭhīvratamathocyate || 9 ||
lalitāvrataṣaṣṭhī ca ṣaṣṭhī kārtikasaṃjñitā ||
mahattapaḥ saptamī ca vibhūṣā saptamī tathā || 4.208.10 ||
ādityamaṃḍapavidhistrayodaśīti saptamī ||
kṛkavākuplavaṅgā ca tathaivābhayasaptamī || 11 |||
kalyāṇasaptamī nāma śarkarāsaptamīvratam ||
saptamī kamalākhyā ca tathānyā śubhasaptamī || 12 ||
snapanavratasaptamyau tathaivācala saptamī ||
budhāṣṭamīvrataṃ nāma tathā janmāṣṭamīvratam || 13 ||
dūrvākṛṣṇāṣṭamī proktā anayāvratamaṣṭamī ||
aṣṭamyarkāṣṭamī cātha vṛkṣanavamīvratam|| ||| 14 ||
dhvajākhyā navamī caiva ulkākhyā navamī tathā ||
daśāvatāravratakaṃ tathāśādaśamīvratam || 15 ||
rohiṇīṃhariśaṃbhubrahmasūryāviyogakam||
govatsadvādaśīnāma vratamuktaṃ tataḥ param || 16 ||
nīrājanadvādaśī ca bhīṣmapaṃcakameva ca ||
mallikākhyā dvādaśī ca bhīmā dvādaśikottamā || || 17 ||
śravaṇadvādaśī nāma saṃprāptidvādaśīvratam ||
govindadvādaśīnāma vratamuktaṃ tataḥ param||18||
akhaṃḍadvādaśīnāma tiladvādaśyataḥ param ||
sukṛtadvādaśī nāma dharaṇīvratameva ca || 19 ||
viśokadvādaśī nāma vibhūtidvādaśīvratam ||
puṣyarkṣadvādaśī caiva dvādaśī śravaṇarkṣagā || 4.208.20 ||
anaṃgadvādaśī caiva aṅgapādavrataṃ tathā ||
nimbārkakaravīrātha yamā darśatrayodaśī ||
anaṃgadvādaśī cāpi pālirambhāvrate tathā || 21 ||
caturdaśīvrataṃ proktaṃ tato.anantacaturdaśī ||
śrāvaṇīvratanaktaṃ ca caturdaśyaṣṭamīdine || 22||
vrataṃ śivacaturdaśyāṃ phalatyāgacaturdaśī ||
vaiśākhī kārtikī māghī vratametadanaṃtaran || 23 ||
kārtikyāṃ kṛttikāyoge kṛttikāvratamīritam ||
phālgune pūrṇimāyāṃ tu vrataṃ pūrṇamanoratham || 24 ||
aśokapūrṇimā nāma anaṃtavratameva ca ||
vrataṃ hi sāṃbharāyiṇyaṃ nakṣatrapuruṣavratam || 25 ||
śivanakṣatrapuruṣaṃ saṃpūrṇaṃ yena mucyate ||
kāmadānavrataṃ nāma vṛntākavidhireva ca || 26 ||
ādityasya dine naktaṃ saṃkrātyudyāpane phalam ||
bhadrāvratamagastyārgho navacandrārkameva ca || 27 ||
arghaḥ śukrabṛhaspatyoḥ paṃcāśīti vratāni ca ||
māghasnānaṃ nityasnānaṃ rudrastānavidhistathā || 28 ||
caṃdrārkagrahaṇe snānaṃ vidhiścānnāśane tathā ||
vāpīkūpataḍāgānāmutsargo vṛkṣayājanam || 29 ||
devapūjādīpadānavṛṣotsargavidhistathā ||
phālgunyutsavakaṃ nāma tathānyaḥ sadanotsavaḥ || 4.208.30 ||
bhūtamātā ca śrāvaṇyāṃ rakṣābaṃdhavidhistathā ||
vidhistathā navamyāstu tathā candramahotsavaḥ || 31 ||
dīpālikāyāṃ tu homo lakṣahomavidhistathā ||
koṭihomo mahāśītirgaṇanāthasya śātikā || 32 ||
tathā nakṣatrahomotha godānavidhireva ca ||
guḍadhenughṛtadhenutiladhenuvrataṃ tathā || 33 ||
jaladhenuvidhiḥ prokto lavaṇasya tathā parā ||
dhenuḥ kāryāsamaṃjñātvā navanītasya cāparā ||
suvarṇadhenuśca tathā devakāryaṃ cikīrṣubhiḥ || 34 ||
iti śrībhaviṣye mahāpurāṇa uttaraparvaṇi śrīkṛṣṇayudhiṣṭhirasaṃvāde saṃkṣiptānukramaṇikākathanaṃ nāmāṣṭottaradviśatatamo.adhyāyaḥ || 208 || || cha || || || iti caturthamuttaraparva || 4 ||
samāpto.ayaṃ bhaviṣyapurāṇagranthaḥ |

athottaraparvasthaviṣayānukramaṇikā || 4 ||

3.94 anantavratam
śabdakalpadruma ---
araṇyavāsamuṣito yudhiṣṭhiranṛpo vaśī |
prāptastrailokyanāthena kṛṣṇena paramātmanā ||
kathopakathanaṃ jātaṃ tayostatra priyāpriyaṃ |
viśeṣeṇa ca govindaṃ papraccha ca yudhiṣṭhiraḥ ||
yudhiṣṭhira uvāca |
kena vratena deveśa vāñchitaṃ prāpyate phalaṃ |
niṣpāpāḥ sakalā lokāḥ bhavanti janmajanmani ||
śrīkṛṣṇa uvāca |
asti vratamanantākhyaṃ yatkṛtaṃ surasadmani |
indrādyairlokapālaiśca tanma kathayataḥ śṛṇu |
śuklapakṣe caturdaśyāṃ māsi bhādrapade tathā |
tasyānuṣṭhānamātreṇa sarvvapāpaṃ praṇaśyati ||
|| yudhiṣṭhira uvāca |
kṛṣṇa ko.ayaṃ tvayākhyāto yo.ananta iti saṃjñitaḥ
ko.ayaṃ śeṣaśca nāgaśca anantastakṣakaḥ smṛtaḥ ||
paramañcottamaṃ vāpi utāho brahma ucyate |
ka eṣo.anantasaṃjño vai tanme brūhi janārddana ||
śrīkṛṣṇa uvāca |
ananta ityahaṃ pārtha mama rūpaṃ nibodha tat |
ādityagatirūpeśa yaḥ kāla upapadyate ||
kalākāṣṭhāmuhūrttādi dinarātrivyavasthayā |
pakṣo māsa ṛturvvarṣaṃ yugakalpavyavasthayā ||

so.ahaṃ kālo.avatīrṇo.asmi bhuvo bhārāvatāraṇāt |
dānavānāṃ vināśāya vasudevatanūdbhavaṃ |!
anantaṃ viddhi māṃ pārtha kṛṣṇaṃ viṣṇuṃ hariṃ śivaṃ
brahmāṇaṃ bhāskaraṃ śeṣaṃ sarvvavyāpinamīśvaraṃ |
pratyayārthaṃ mayā pārtha viśvarūpaṃ nibotha tat |
pūrvameva mahābāho yogidhyeyamanuttamaṃ || ||
yudhiṣṭhira uvāca |
anantavratamāhātmyaṃ vidhiṃ vidhividāṃ vara |
kiṃ puṇyaṃ kiṃ phalaṃ tasya anuṣṭhānañca tasya kiṃ ||
kena vā tatkṛtaṃ pūrvvaṃ loke kena prakāśitaṃ |
tatsarvvaṃ bahu.a vistāryya brūhi nārāyaṇa prabho ||
|| śrīkṛṣṇa uvāca |
āsītpurā kṛtayuge sumanturnāma vai dvijaḥ |
vaśiṣṭhagotrajo vidvān śīlavān vijitendriyaḥ ||
patnī tasyābhavaddīkṣā satī satyavrate sthitā |
cāritraśīlasampannā surūpā bhṛguvaṃśajā ||
tasyāḥ kālena saṃjātā duhitā sarvvalakṣaṇā |
śīlā nāmnā suśīlā sā varddhate pitṛveśmani ||
mātā tasyāstu kālena jvaradāhaprapīḍitā |
samāgatya nadītoye mṛtā svargapuraṃ yayau ||
kṛtaṃ sumantunā tasyāḥ karmma yat pāralaukikaṃ |
tataḥ sumantuḥ saṃtyajya duḥkhaṃ śokaṃ kramāt punaḥ
nāpatnīko gṛhī dharmmaṃ karttumarhati vai kvacit |
iti sañcintya manasā vivāhotsukamānasaḥ ||
devalasya muneḥ kanyāṃ karkaśāṃ pariṇītavān |
sā karkaśātiduḥśīlā sadā niṣṭhurabhāṣiṇī ||
kopanā pratikūlā ca nirlajjā kalahapriyā |
adakṣā gṛhṛkṛtyeṣu dakṣā bhojanakarmmaṇi ||
kalahena tu santuṣṭā ruṣṭā bandhujanān prati |
sā tu śīlā piturgehe varddhitā ca dine dine ||
karoti sakhibhiḥ sārddhaṃ śiśukrīḍāmanuttamāṃ |
gṛhāntarasthaladvāradehalītoraṇādiṣu |
caturaṅgakavarṇaiśca raktapītasitāsitaiḥ |
svastikaṃ padmaśaṅkhau ca maṇḍayantī punaḥ punaḥ ||
kurvvantī pratyahaṃ bālā devatātithipūjanaṃ |
gṛhakṛtye sadā dakṣā pituratyantavallabhā ||
kālena kiyatā viprastāṃ dṛṣṭvā yauvanodgatāṃ |
kasmai deyā mayā kanyā iti cintānvito.abhavat||

tato davavaśāttatra kauṇḍinyaḥ samupāgataḥ |
muniśreṣṭho mahābhāgaḥ kulīno dharmatatparaḥ ||
manasā cintayāmāsa sumantuḥ sutapāḥ sudhīḥ |
asmai bhāgyavaśācchīlā pratipādyā prayatnataḥ ||
iti kṛtvā matiṃ vipro dadau kanyāṃ śubhe dine |
kanyāmalaṅkṛtāṃ sādhvīṃ śīlāṃ candranibhānanāṃ ||
gṭahyoktavedavidhinā vivāhamakarottadā |
tato homādikaṃ karmma samāpya samaye muniḥ ||
sumantuḥ karkaśāṃ prāha jāmātre dehi dakṣiṇāṃ
saphalaṃ kuru me dānaṃ priye munikulodbhave |
dakṣiṇārahitaṃ karmma niṣphalaṃ jāyate yataḥ |
sā tu tadvacanaṃ śrutvā karkaśā kupitābhavat |
sumantuṃ bhartsayāmāsa karkaśairvvacanaiḥ patiṃ |
alaṅkāraṃ samānīya svakīyañcāpi bandhanaṃ ||
nikṣipya nibhṛte sthāne karkaśānyagṛhṛṃ yayau |
sumantuścātidīnātmā lajjitaścābhavattadā ||
yatkiñcidarthayogyañca dravyamānīya yautukaṃ |
jāmātre pradadau vipraḥ paricāryya punaḥ punaḥ ||
tato vivāhaṃ nirvvartya kauṇḍinyo.api nijāśramaṃ |
goyāne tāṃ samāropya śīlāmādāya vai yayau
tataḥ sā pathi gacchantī śīlā candranibhānanā
madhyāhne bhojyavelāyāṃ samuttīryya sarittaṭe ||
dadarśa śīlā nārīṇāṃ samūhaṃ vratacāriṇāṃ |
puṃsāṃ vṛndañca tatreva raktapītāmbarāsanaṃ ||
caturddaśyāmarcayantaṃ bhaktyānantaṃ pṛthak pṛthak |
dṛṣṭvā samūhaṃ nārīṇāṃ satī papraccha sādaraṃ ||
vinayāvanatā sādhvī praṇipatya sureśvaraṃ |
kimidaṃ kriyate kāryyaṃ bhavatībhistaducyatāṃ ||
striya ūcuḥ |
bhādre māsi site pakṣe utthite vāsavadhvaje |
ārādhite mahendre ca dhvajākārāsu yaṣṭiṣu ||
natvā sarasi yaḥ snātvā anantārccanamārabhet |
kṛtvā darbhamayaṃ devaṃ vārivājasamanvitaṃ ||
anantaṃ devadeveśaṃ caturbbāhuṃ kirīṭinaṃ |
atasīpuṣpasaṃkāśaṃ kāñcanāṅgadabhūṣaṇaṃ ||
śaṅkhacakragadāśārṅgaṃ vividhāyudhadhāriṇaṃ |
ehyehi bhagavan kṛṣṇa tava yajñaḥ pravarttate ||
vāridhānyāṃ tathānantaṃ bhagavantaṃ niyojayet |
maṇḍale puṣpanevedyaṃ dhūpavastrānulepanaṃ ||
dattvā ca pūjayedbhaktyā anantaṃ viśvarūpiṇaṃ |
piṣṭakārthaṃ vrīhicūrṇaṃ yavagodhūmayośca vā ||
eteṣāṃ prāpyate yattu tadgrāhyaṃ prasthasaṃjñitaṃ |
arddhaṃ viprāya dātavyamarddhamātmani yojayet ||
pūjayitvā tathā devaṃ gandhapuṣpairyathākramaṃ |
śrutvā kathāṃ tatastasya kuṅkamāktaṃ suḍorakaṃ ||
caturdaśagranthiyuktaṃ nārī vāmakare nyaset |
pumāṃstu dakṣiṇe bāhau tadānantaṃ prapūjayet ||
nirvvarttya pūjāṃ devasya pūpaṃ bhuktvā yathāsukhaṃ |
visṛjya dakṣiṇāṃ dattvā praṇamya ca yathāsukhaṃ ||
śīlā śrutvā vacastāsāṃ yathā tābhirudāhṛtaṃ |
vrataṃ cakāra sā bāhau vaddhā ḍorakamuttamaṃ |
pūpaprasthañca sāṃ kṛtvā bhuktvā caiva tathaiva ca |

punarjagāma tenaiva gorathena samanvitā ||
tenānantaprasādena gṛhaṃ godhanasaṅkulaṃ |
tadāśramaṃ śriyā yuktaṃ dhanadhānyasamanvitaṃ ||
vividhātithisampūrṇaṃ nānāratnairvibhūṣitaṃ |
varāśvamattamātaṅgamahiṣairgodhanānvitaṃ ||
śīlā ca maṇikāñcībhirmuktābharaṇabhūṣitā |
divyāṅgī śīlasampannā sāvitrīpratimā yathā ||
kadācidupaviṣṭā sā vahnikuṇḍaṃ samāgatā |
kauṇḍinyo.api viśedroṣāt dṛṣṭvā ḍoramanantakaṃ |
śolāyāḥ karamūle ca baddhameva prayatnataḥ |
papraccha krodhavacasā bhṛkuṭīkuṭilaṃ mukhaṃ ||
kimidaṃ ḍorakaṃ haste baddhvā bhāryye.atra tiṣṭhasi |
prameyaḥ kasya devasya durbbuddhe brūhi satvaraṃ |5||
śīlovāca |
anantaṃ devadevasya prameyaṃ ḍorakaṃ śubhaṃ |
kare baddhaṃ vidhānena śṛṇu me vacanaṃ prabho ||
prasādād yasya devasya bhuṅkte suvipulaṃ dhanaṃ |
na jānāsi kathaṃ nātha tadevaṃ jagadīśvaraṃ ||
śīlāvākyaṃ tataḥ śrutvā kauṇḍinyaḥ kupito.abhavat |
ko.asāvanantasaṃjño vai na śruto.api varānane |
ityutvākṛṣya kupito bhujāḍḍoramanantakaṃ |
kṣiptaṃ jvālākule vahnau nirbhartsya bahudhā priyāṃ ||
tataḥ sā saṃbhramāt śīlā hāhā kṛtvā pradhāvitā
vahneḥ sūtraṃ samādāya kṣīramadhye tato.akṣipat ||
tatastayā kare vāme punarbaddhaṃ suḍorakaṃ |
anantākṣepadoṣeṇa dāridryaṃ patitaṃ gṛhe ||
na kaiścit varṇyate lokaiḥ so.api vipro yudhiṣṭhira |
gātre malinatā prāptā cakṣurnidrāṃ tathaiva ca ||
śūnyāni gṛharūpāṇi dagdhāni vahninā kvacit |
nirīkṣya svapuraṃ vipraścintayāmāsa cetasā ||
atha śīlā vivarṇā sā duḥkhitā patidoṣataḥ;
vicacāra purīṃ sarvvāṃ śūnyāgārasamanvitāṃ ||
atha kauṇḍinyaviprasya saṃjātā buddhiruttamā |
mamāpi duṣkṛtaṃ karmma kṛtaṃ vā me vigarhitaṃ ||
anantākṣepadoṣeṇa mamāpi gatirīdṛśī |
anantaṃ yatra paśyāmi tatra yāsyāmi durmatiḥ ||
tato jagāma kauṇḍinyo vanaṃ vyāghrādisaṅkulaṃ |
vratasyānveṣaṇaṃ karttuṃ pādau draṣṭuṃ tathā hareḥ ||
vihvalaḥ sa yayau mārge janajantuvivarjjite |
tatrāpaśyacca taṃ vṛkṣaṃ phalapuṣpasamanvitaṃ ||
varjitaṃ pakṣisaṅghātaiḥ kīṭaiścaiva viśeṣataḥ |
tamapṛcchat tvayānantaḥ kvaciddṛṣṭo mahādruma ||
sa covāca mahāvṛkṣo nānantaṃ vedmi bho dvija
tato gacchan dadarśāgre tṛṇamadhye savatsikāṃ ||
tṛṇamadhye pradhāvanto na khādati na jighrati |
he mahādhenuke brūhi kimanantastvayekṣitaḥ ||
savatsā tamuvācātha nānantaṃ vedmi he dvija |
tato gacchan dadarśāgre vṛṣaśreṣṭhaṃ vane sthitaṃ ||
tamapṛcchadayaṃ vipraḥ ananto vīkṣitastvayā |
vṛṣabhastamuvācedaṃ viṣaṇṇaṃ brāhmaṇaṃ prati ||
yadyanantamahaṃ jāne tadā me gatirīdṛśī |
tato vrajan dadarśāgre gardabhaṃ kuñjaraṃ tathā ||

nānāmāyāpracarantaṃ madagarjjanadarpitaṃ |
sa taṃ dṛṣṭvā dvijo.arṛcchadanantaṃ dṛṣṭavān kimu |
pratyuttaramuvācedaṃ nānantaṃ vedmi he dvija |
tato vrajan dadarśāgre ramyaṃ puṣkariṇīdvayaṃ ||
anyonyajalasaṃghātairvvīcibhirupaśobhitaṃ |
śubhaiḥ kumudakahlāraiḥ kamalotpalaśobhitaṃ |
bhramaraiścakravākaiśca haṃsakāraṇḍavairyutaṃ |
tamapṛcchat dvijo.ananto bhavatībhyāñca lakṣitaḥ ||
puṣkariṇyāvūcatusta na jānīvo hariṃ kvacit |
nipapāta tato vipro hāhā kṛtvā rudan bhuvi ||
kiṃ karomi kva gacchāmi kathaṃ paśyāmi taṃ vibhuṃ |
tataḥ kṛpālu hṛdayo deveśo devapūjitaḥ ||
tatkṣaṇādbhagavān viṣṇurdvijapratyakṣamāgataḥ |
vṛddhabrāhmaṇarūpeṇa provāca vacanaṃ dvijaṃ ||
uttiṣṭhottiṣṭha viprendra tyaja duḥkhaṃ sukhī bhava |
anantaṃ darśayiṣyāmi kṛṣṇaṃ viṣṇuṃ hariṃ śivaṃ ||
brāhmaṇaṃ taṃ samādāya pātālavartmanā purīṃ |
tāṃ purīṃ darśayāmāsa tataścāntardadhe dvijaḥ |
sa tāṃ dadarśa kauṇḍinyaḥ purīṃ trailokyadurllabhāṃ
divyanārīnarairyuktāṃ maṇiratnavibhūṣitāṃ ||
suvarṇaracitāṃ sarvvāṃ veṣṭitāṃ takṣakādibhiḥ |
tatrāpaśyat sa kauṇḍinyo devadevamanantakaṃ ||
viśvarūpaṃ jagannāthaṃ caturbbāhuṃ kirīṭinaṃ |
śaṅkhacakragadāpadmadhāriṇaṃ garuḍadhvajaṃ ||
dakṣiṇe vilasallakṣmīṃ vāme krīḍatsarasvatīṃ |
saptaphaṇāsamāyuktaṃ divyasiṃhāsanesthitaṃ |
evaṃ rūpaṃ jagannāthaṃ dṛṣṭvā bhaktyā stutiḥ kṛtā |
jagāma bhūmau śirasā anantasya samīpataḥ ||
namo.astvanantāya sahasramūrttaye sahasrapādākṣiśirorubāhave |
sahasranāmne puruṣāya śāśvate sahasrakoṭīyugadhāriṇe namaḥ ||
ajñānena mayā deva yat kṛtaṃ pāpakarmaṇā |
tatsarvvaṃ kṛpayā śaṃsa kṣamasva madhusūdana || ||

atha kauṇḍinyaviprasya stutiṃ śrutvā janārddanaḥ |
prasanno bhagavāndevaścānanto.anantarūpadhṛk ||
kathaṃ me priyamākhyātamihāgaccheti bhūsura ||7 ||
ananta uvāca |
tuṣṭo.ahaṃ brāhmaṇaśreṣṭha bhaktyā tava viśeṣataḥ |
varaṃ gṛhāṇa viprendra tuṣṭo.asmi tyaja vismayaṃ ||
| kauṇḍinya uvāca |
svakarmmaphalabhogena yāṃ yāṃ yoniṃ vrajāmyahaṃ |
tasyāṃ tasyāṃ hṛṣīkeśa haribhaktirdṛḍhāstu me ||
atipramādānmohādvā yanmayā duṣkṛtaṃ kṛtaṃ |
tadāgaḥ kṣamyatāṃ nātha praṇamāmi punaḥ punaḥ ||
śrutvānantastu tadvākyaṃ dadau tasmai varatrayaṃ |
dāridranāśanaṃ dharmmaṃ viṣṇulokaṃ tathākṣayaṃ |0||
kauṇḍinya uvāca |
pūrṇo manoratho deva mama cādya viśeṣataḥ |
kicit pṛcchāmi deveśa tanme brūhi jagatpate ||
kaścūtaḥ ko vṛṣaḥ kā gauḥ kintat puṣkariṇīdvayaṃ |
kaḥ kharaḥ kuñjaraḥ ko vā ko vā vṛddhadvijottamaḥ |
kṛpayā kathayasvādya pathi dṛṣṭo mayā vibho |
śrīananta uvāca |
yaścāmravṛkṣo dṛṣṭo hi vipro vidyāsu garvvitaḥ |
upasthitāya śiṣyāya vidyāṃ yasmānna dattavān |
tena karmmavipākena vṛkṣatvaṃ prāpya tiṣṭhati |
vṛṣabho yastvayā dṛṣṭo lobhakarmmakṛtaḥ purā ||
dattaṃ paryyuṣitaṃ dravyaṃ svādu bhuktaṃ svayaṃ yataḥ |
vṛṣabhatvaṃ samāsādya tatastiṣṭhati nirjjane ||
viprāya vasudhāṃ dattvā niṣphalāṃ śasyavarjjitāṃ |
tenāsau gotvamāsādya tṛṇamadhye pradhāvati ||
dharmmādharmmau vijānīyādyattat puṣkariṇīdvayaṃ |
gardabho.ajñānasampannaḥ kuñjaro madagarvitaḥ ||
brāhmaṇo.asāvananto.ahaṃ yastvayā darśito mune |
etatte kathitaṃ sarvvaṃ gaccha vipra nijāśramaṃ ||
punaḥ samṛddhiste vipra bhaviṣyati na saṃśayaḥ |
bhuktvā bhogāṃśca vipulān saṃprāpsyasi mahat padaṃ ||
iti dattvā varaṃ tasmai tatraivāntaradhīyata |
kauṇḍinyo.ayi gṛhaṃ gatvā karoti vratamuttamaṃ ||
anantākhyaṃ mahāpuṇyaṃ varṣāṇāñca caturdaśaṃ |
śīlayā saha dharmmātmā sukhaṃ bhuktvā manorathān ||
viṣṇurokaṃ samāsādya rarāja śīlayā saha |
anantākhyavrateneha samāptenaiva pārthiva ||
sarvvapāpavinirmmuktā yāsyanti paramāṃ gatiṃ |
evameva hi niyamāt striyo.anantavratānnṛpa ||
puà¥trapautradhanairyuktā bhuktvā bhogān manorathān |
viṣṇulokamāpnuvanti yāvaccandradivākarau ||
iti bhaviṣyapurāṇe anantavrataṃ samāptaṃ |
